Genesis24:36 Sɑrɑ̀ cï wɑ̈ɑ, ɑ́pɑ̈dhi piny ki wɑ̈d e rum yöø, o wɑ̈ɑ jɑmm-ɑ ying yïe bënn ɑ́mëgge wɑ̈nɑni." 
Genesis24:37 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi wɑ̈ɑ kinni köngɑ kinni, møg-ɑ köbbe yɑn ómïdhɑ, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dɑ ko yɑ̈bbí ki dhɑjø kì kelli nyigi Kɑnɑɑn, tyëng-ɑ buti gen bëëd yi yɑn ek." 
Genesis24:38 De kedhí pödhi wøn, kɑ wɑ̈dɑ Isɑɑk yɑ̈bbí ki dhɑjø kì kelli tyëng gøl wøn.’" 
Genesis24:39 Aköbbɑ wɑ̈ɑ kinni, O keløg nyɑnɑni óbɑ̈nyi bëënø yø?" 
Genesis24:40 De ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ bøle cyɑ̈dhi yi yɑn wëywöne óöre bɑngí, o yï køny yi en. Yï óyïddi ki dhɑjø me nywøm yi wɑ̈dɑ kì yij gøl wøn, kì gøl wïyɑ ceth." 
Genesis24:41 Codhe, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi yïn thume cyee. De keløg yï ómɑ̈ɑ̈n yi gen ki dhɑjø me muuj wɑ̈dɑ, yïí bɑ̈r.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Yɑ ɑ́bï kɑ dhøngɑni dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Átïni yɑ ɑ́kööb kì kömi wɑɑng pï kinni, Yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ bɑ Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm wɑ̈ɑ, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, køny yɑn." 
Genesis24:43 Yɑn ɑ cungi kì kömi wɑɑng pï èn. Yɑ oyïdø ki nyɑndhɑjø men-ɑ óbï be römmø ki pï, o óköbbɑ kinni, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, dwöög pugí piny o yɑ mɑ̈dhɑ ki pï." 
Genesis24:44 Kɑ wiy kööbe kinni, mɑdh pï møg. Amɑllí ótömmɑ ki pï thyew, nyɑnɑni óbëëd ɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn ɑ́ dhɑjø me muuj wɑ̈d wɑ̈ɑ." 
Genesis24:45 E kwɑ̈jjɑ nuti thumø, ɑbëën Rebekɑ̀ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, e puge obyellø yi en kì wïj tøge, kɑ kedh-ɑ be tömø ki pï. Aköbbɑ en kinni, ‘Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, nëngí yɑn ki pï møg mɑ̈ɑ̈dhɑ.’" 
Genesis24:46 Kɑ pug gø jwɑne’ yeej piny kì wïj tøge, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Mɑ̈dhí, ɑmɑllí ótömmɑ ki pï thyew.’ Codhe, ɑmɑ̈dhɑ, kɑ ɑmɑllɑ nënge ki pï thyew." 
Genesis24:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pyëjɑ en kinni, wïyí bɑ men? Alögge kinni, ‘Wïyɑ bɑ Bethuel wɑ̈d Nɑor, ɑ meye cwøl ɑ́ Milkɑ̀.’ Codhe, ɑgøødɑ gwelø órøme, kɑ yëll bødhɑ cingge." 
Genesis24:48 Kɑ wïjɑ kuulɑ piny, ɑpwøjɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm wɑ̈ɑ, kipe kɑ ɑ́kwølle yɑn kì yuu-ɑ dyër, be kwɑjji nyɑɑr ómï wɑ̈ɑ, o muuj wɑ̈de." 
Genesis24:49 Anɑn keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ göggi wɑ̈ɑ ki gïndøj, kɑ wu oyïëyø, köbbu yɑn, o rummɑ gwirɑ, ying yɑ töng-ɑ wïj cɑɑm wɑlɑ̀ wïj kyëj.”" 
Genesis24:50 Alöggi Lɑbɑn geki Bethuel kinni, “Kwøb nënni ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong gïjø me cuggi kwøbø yi wøn, ɑ́ gïjø me rɑɑj wɑlɑ̀ me døøj." 
Genesis24:51 Rebekɑ̀ ɑ bølí ɑnɑn, kwɑɑny kɑ yï kedh. Wiy nywøm yi wɑ̈d wöw ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Genesis24:52 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi bɑ̈ng Abrɑhɑm, kɑ wïje kuule piny kinni kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Genesis24:53 Codhe, kɑ Rebekɑ̀ nënge ki gwel kí yëll, kí ɑ́cwecwelli ɑ́tegg geki dhɑb, kí ógudh. Wïye geki meye ɑ́thödhi thyew kí jɑmmì mø ngewi gen teeg." 
Genesis24:54 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en ocyɑ̈mø kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø, kɑ ge nïnn-ɑ gølɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh gen dhuki kì mwøl, kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni okööbø kinni, “Wiy yɑ døøgɑ yï wɑ̈ɑ ɑnɑn.”" 
Genesis24:55 Kɑ meyi Rebekɑ̀ geki ómen okööbø kinni, “Wiy nyɑnthinh bëëde ki wøn ki osboo wɑlɑ̀ ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø, codhe o kedhe.”" 
Genesis24:56 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi bɑ̈ngɑni kinni, “Yɑ ko cöngi wun, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́rum ki kønyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wiyu yɑn, o yɑ døøgɑ yï wɑ̈ɑ.”" 
Genesis24:57 Kɑ ómï Rebekɑ̀ geki meye okööbø kinni, “Cwøl wɑ nyɑnthinh o pëjji wɑ kej dhøge.”" 
Genesis24:58 Kɑ Rebekɑ̀ cwøl yi gen, ɑpyëj ge gøn kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ kedhø wuki jɑɑl, ɑnɑn?” Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ngee, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kedhø.”" 
Genesis24:59 Codhe, ɑwiy gen Rebekɑ̀ kedhe geki nyɑn-ɑ bɑ 'mïdhe, kí bɑ̈ng Abrɑhɑm geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en." 
Genesis24:60 Kɑ Rebekɑ̀ kwëng yi gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Yï bɑ nyimï wøn, kwɑrrí óngënyi kɑ ge ogöögø ki ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø ki mendwøng. Myërri tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen ólɑg yi gen!”" 
Genesis24:61 Codhe, kɑ Rebekɑ̀ geki nyɑn-ɑ bɑ bɑ̈nge pëgg-ɑ kömi ɑmɑl, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑng bɑ̈ng Abrɑhɑm geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en. Codhe, kɑ Rebekɑ̀ mɑg-ɑ yöö geki bɑ̈ngɑni." 
Genesis24:62 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Isɑɑk rum dhwödhø kì Bir Lɑhɑy Roì, o bëëd ɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Genesis24:63 Kɑ kedh-ɑ be wïïnø yethi pwödh cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì böörø, e cyɑ̈dhi e orumø, ɑtïnge wïje kɑ ólïdhø ki ɑmɑl ge obëënø." 
Genesis24:64 Rebekɑ̀ wïje ɑ́tïnge thyew, kɑ Isɑɑk lidhe, kɑ bï-ɑ piny kì kömi ɑmɑlø," 
Genesis24:65 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni pyëje kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yij pwödhø ɑcɑ̀, e bï-ɑ yïee, bɑ men?” Alöggi bɑ̈ngɑni kinni, “Jɑlɑni bene wɑ̈ɑ.” Codhe, kɑ Rebekɑ̀ wïje kume ki thɑrɑ̀." 
Genesis24:66 Kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb löbbi Isɑɑk yi bɑ̈ngɑni ge bënn. 
Genesis24:67 Kɑ Rebekɑ̀ kïdhi yi Isɑɑk yij kemɑ̀ mi meye Sɑrɑ̀. Kɑ ogöögø ki cyëge. Kɑ mɑɑr yi Isɑɑk ki mendwøng. Isɑɑk óyïddi ki ngɑn tïïn wɑnge kì bɑng thøwi meye. 
Genesis25:1 Kɑ Abrɑhɑm ókɑ̈bbø dhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Keturɑ̀. 
Genesis25:2 Kɑ onywølø ki yɑɑg mø cwølli gɑ Dhimrɑn, kí Yokcɑn, kí Medɑn, kí Midyɑn, kí Icbɑk, kí Cuɑ̀." 
Genesis25:3 Yokcɑn ɑ bɑ wïyi Cebɑ̀ geki Dedɑn. Kwɑrri Dedɑn bene gen ɑ bɑ tyëng Acuur, kí Lethuc, kí Leum." 
Genesis25:4 Wɑ̈ddi Midyɑn bɑ Epɑ̀, Eper, Aɑnök, Abïdɑ̀, kí Eldɑ̀. Jøgɑni bënn bɑ kwɑrri Keturɑ̀." 
Genesis25:5 Abrɑhɑm jɑmme bënn ɑ́wïye Isɑɑk. 
Genesis25:6 De Abrɑhɑm kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e onëënø, wɑ̈dde møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi mɑ̈nn-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́thödhe ki jɑmmì. Kɑ gï köbbe dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen. Ge ɑ́dɑ̈ggi kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o ri gen lɑ̈ɑ̈w gen ki Isɑɑk." 
Genesis25:7 Abrɑhɑm ɑ́bëëd ki runn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj. 
Genesis25:8 Ákɑ̈l yi Jwøk e rum yöø ki mendwøng. Ábëëd ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r ki bëëdø me døøj. 
Genesis25:9 Kɑ kony yi wɑ̈dde ryeet, ɑ løg Isɑɑk geki Icmɑil kì yij órøngi Kïti Mɑkpïlɑ̀ kì yij pwödhi Eprön kì buti Mɑmɑrɑ̀ (Eprön bɑ wɑ̈d Dhoɑr kwɑɑr Kit)." 
Genesis25:10 Abrɑhɑm ɑ́koony-ɑ buti cyëge Sɑrɑ̀, kì yij pwönh-ɑ ɑ́ngew yi en ki yï kwɑrri Kit." 
Genesis25:11 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thøw Abrɑhɑm, kɑ Isɑɑk wɑ̈de gyëdh yi Jwøk. Isɑɑk ɑ́bëëd ɑ Bir Lɑhɑy Roì kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Genesis25:12 Bene kwɑrri Icmɑil wɑ̈d Abrɑhɑm ek: Äjer nyɑɑr Rïp, bɑ̈ng Sɑrɑ̀ ɑ bɑ meyi Icmɑil." 
Genesis25:13 Wɑ̈ddi Icmɑil ek, gɑ ɑwɑd ki këër nywølø, Nebɑyoth ɑ mɑl, bɑnge dɑ Kedɑr, kí Adbeel, kí Mibsɑm." 
Genesis25:14 Kí Micmɑ̀, kí Dumɑ̀, kí Mɑɑsɑ̀." 
Genesis25:15 Kí Adɑd, kí Temɑ̀, kí Yetur, kí Nɑpic, kí Kedemɑ̀." 
Genesis25:16 Bene gen wɑ̈ddi Icmɑil ɑgɑk. Bene nyingi gen ɑnɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́göög ki nyingi kɑ̈lli gen kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd gen. Ge ɑ́göög ki wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. 
Genesis25:17 Athøw Icmɑil e runne bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryew. 
Genesis25:18 Ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ myërr-ɑ kɑɑm Abïlɑ̀ geki Cur, ge cyɑ̈gi ki Rïp, kì kö yuu Acuur, e ri gen rwööm gen ki kwɑrri nyiiwɑ̈n." 
Genesis25:19 Bene kwɑrri gøl Isɑɑk ek: Abrɑhɑm ɑ́nywøl ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Isɑɑk. 
Genesis25:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög runni Isɑɑk ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ɑnywøme Rebekɑ̀, nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Misøpøtɑmiyɑ̀. Bɑ nyɑɑr Bethuel, o bɑ nyimï Lɑbɑn jɑl Arɑm." 
Genesis25:21 Cï Isɑɑk ɑ́dhɑ̈li yïddø ki dhɑnhø, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjji yi Isɑɑk kipere. Kwɑ̈jji Isɑɑk ɑ́yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Rebekɑ̀ ongølø ki dhɑnhø." 
Genesis25:22 Ábëëd e bɑ ɑcwegg ɑ yije, kɑ ɑcweggɑni ónyïɑ̈ggø kì yije. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ cuggi gïn ni men ki cwöbø.” Kɑ kedh-ɑ be pyëji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Genesis25:23 Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Pödhh ɑ́ryew ɑ yijí, yï ónywøl ki ji mø mɑ̈n ki ri gen. Ákyel óbëëd e teg kibøli men-ɑ kyeelø. Nyel-ɑ dwøng óbëëd ɑ́ bɑ̈ng nyel-ɑ thinh.”" 
Genesis25:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej pɑ̈dhi piny, kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki ɑcwegg-ɑ cwøw." 
Genesis25:25 Kɑ Ngör bï-ɑ wɑ̈g dële pɑ̈ng yi yëyy, de ce rug-ɑ lɑwø me kwɑrø, kɑ nyinge cɑg ɑ́ Isøø." 
Genesis25:26 Abëën Cyɑ̈n wɑ̈g e mïdh-ɑ tyeli Isøø, kɑ cɑg ɑ́ Yɑgob. Ge ɑ́nywøl e Isɑɑk runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel." 
Genesis25:27 Kɑ yɑnythønhø ódøngø. Isøø ɑ́göög ki jɑldwɑr, nyi mɑɑr-ɑ wïïnø kì pɑ̈l, de Yɑgob nyi tyer-ɑ bëëdø kì pɑc." 
Genesis25:28 Isɑɑk ɑ́mɑɑr-ɑ Isøø, mɑ́ e tyer-ɑ cɑm ki lɑ̈yyi dwɑr. De Rebekɑ̀ ɑ́mɑɑr-ɑ Yɑgob." 
Genesis25:29 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel e Yɑgob otɑ̈dø ki ɑ́dɑs, ɑbëën Isøø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ be dwɑr. Ábëëd ree dɑ kɑ̈j." 
Genesis25:30 Aköbbe Yɑgob kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, nëngí yɑn ki gïn-ɑ kwɑrø ɑnɑn, yɑ ɑ́nyönhi yi kɑ̈j.” (Bene ɑ bɑnge døøgii be cwøllø yi teedø ɑ́ Edöm.)" 
Genesis25:31 Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Yï ónëngi yi yɑn keløg kejí, kej kɑyø ómëggí yɑn.”" 
Genesis25:32 Kɑ Isøø okööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ men thøw ni men, kej kɑyø ɑ́ me gwøøg ngø yi yɑn?”" 
Genesis25:33 Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Köngí møti kinni kejí, kej kɑyø ɑ́mëggí yɑn.” Isøø ɑ́köngi, kɑ keje mëgge Yɑgob." 
Genesis25:34 Kɑ Isøø nëngi yi Yɑgob ki ópun kí muli ɑ́dɑs. Kɑ ocyɑ̈mø, kɑ omɑ̈dhø ki pï. Kej kɑyø ɑ́ngëwwe Yɑgob." 
Genesis26:1 Kɑ kɑ̈j ómɑ̈gø kì pönhɑni, pɑth ki kɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈gi e Abrɑhɑm nudd e onëënø. Kɑ Isɑɑk dɑ̈g-ɑ Gerɑr kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi Abimelek, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Pelistiyɑ̀." 
Genesis26:2 Acwöb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli Isɑɑk, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yï ko kedhi Rïp, de bëëd kì piny-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn." 
Genesis26:3 Bëëd kì piny men, yɑ óbëëdø kì butí o yï ógyëdh yi yɑn. Piny men bëne ómëggɑ yïn, wuki kwɑrrí. O møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wïyí Abrɑhɑm ómïdhi yi yɑn." 
Genesis26:4 Kwɑrrí ógwøg yi yɑn ge gïïr ni kyelli mɑl, kɑ ge mëggɑ piny møg bënn. Jurri kömi piny óyïddi ki gyëdh kì bɑng kwɑrrí." 
Genesis26:5 Gïgɑni ógwøg yi yɑn kipe kɑ ɑ́lïngi dhøgɑ yi wïyí Abrɑhɑm. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn ɑ́gwøg yi en, kɑ ciggɑ lïnge, kɑ pwönyɑ mïdhe, kɑ yïëy-ɑ jɑɑgø yi yɑn.”" 
Genesis26:6 Codhe, kɑ Isɑɑk obëëdø kì Gerɑr." 
Genesis26:7 Rebekɑ̀ cyëge ɑ́bëëd e myëër cɑrø, kɑ Isɑɑk pyëj yi jø pönhɑni kipere. Kɑ Isɑɑk okööbø kinni, “Bɑ nyimïɑ.” Mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e óböggø ki köbbi gen kinni bɑ cyëge. Árum cem e ócuggø nɑ̈gø yi tyëngɑni, o nyɑnɑni kwɑny yi gen." 
Genesis26:8 Isɑɑk ɑ́bëëd kì kunɑni ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r. Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, e Abimelek ceg-ɑ wɑ̈dhi lïdhi wɑ̈g kì ɑwɑj, kɑ Isɑɑk lidhe ge ongyëdø ki Rebekɑ̀ cyëge." 
Genesis26:9 Acwøøl Isɑɑk yi Abimelek, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ngɑɑn bɑ cyëgí. Á kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni bɑ nyimyëw?” Aköbbii yi Isɑɑk kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ óböggø kinni, yɑ ónɑ̈g ke di kööbɑ kinni nyɑnɑni bɑ cyëgɑ.”" 
Genesis26:10 Kɑ Abimelek okööbø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggí wøn ni men? Ke di bëëd e dɑ ngɑn buddø ki cyëgí kì kelli wøn, pɑ di kɑ̈ni ki orøg!”" 
Genesis26:11 Codhe, kɑ teedø bëne kyëddi yi Abimelek kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ónywɑl jɑɑl wɑlɑ̀ cyëge, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø.”" 
Genesis26:12 Kɑ Isɑɑk opurø kì pönhɑni, kɑ byelle ocyegø kidøøj kì wɑɑngɑni. Ágyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mendwøng," 
Genesis26:13 Kɑ ogöögø ki jɑlkɑ̈r. Álïm ki jɑmmì gïti kɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ jɑlkɑ̈r me luudø. 
Genesis26:14 Yïe ɑ́dɑ bɑ̈ngg mø gïïr, kí dhög, kí dyëg, kɑ mod yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀." 
Genesis26:15 Kɑ yïïth møg-ɑ ɑ́kony yi bɑ̈nggi wïyí Isɑɑk kɑ̈ge dööng rïg yi gen. Yïïthɑni ɑ́kony e Abrɑhɑm nudd e onëënø. Yïïthɑni ɑ́pɑ̈ng ki lɑ̈bø yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. 
Genesis26:16 Kɑ Isɑɑk köbbi yi Abimelek kinni, “Dhwöödh kì pödhi wøn, mɑ́ yï ɑ́göög yï teg kibøli wøn.”" 
Genesis26:17 Codhe, kɑ Isɑɑk odhwödhø kì kenyɑni, kɑ gudd-ɑ yij Töör Gerɑr, ɑbëëde kì yije." 
Genesis26:18 Ádɑ yïïth mɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ókonyø yi Abrɑhɑm kɑ̈ge dööng, de ge ɑ́rïg ki lɑ̈bø yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Codhe, kɑ yïïthɑni thödh yi Isɑɑk. Kɑ ge cwølli ki nying-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑg gen ceth yi Abrɑhɑm wïye." 
Genesis26:19 Kɑ bɑ̈nggi Isɑɑk okunyø ki yith kì yij tör, kɑ yiinhɑni töng-ɑ kömi wɑɑng pï." 
Genesis26:20 De jøkwɑ̈yi Gerɑr ɑ́wër ki gen kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Pï møg bɑ mø wøn.” Kɑ yiinhɑni cɑg yi Isɑɑk ɑ́ Wëërø." 
Genesis26:21 Kɑ bɑ̈ngge cig-ɑ kony ki yith megø, keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg teenɑni ki wëërø, ɑcɑɑg yiinhɑni yi Isɑɑk ɑ́ Liny." 
Genesis26:22 Kɑ odɑ̈gø kì kenyɑni, ɑcige kony ki yith megø. Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́wër kipe menɑni, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Keny Lɑj. Isɑɑk ɑ́kööb kinni, “Anɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́muuj ki keny lɑj, wɑ ódönyi kì keny.”" 
Genesis26:23 Kɑ Isɑɑk odhwödhø kì kenyɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ Bircebɑ̀." 
Genesis26:24 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ocwöbø kì bøle kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Bene yɑn Jwøøg wïyí Abrɑhɑm. Yï ko böggi, yɑ cyɑ̈dhi kɑ yïn, yï ógyëdh yi yɑn, o yï ónëngɑ ki kwɑrr mø gïïr kipe bɑ̈ngɑ Abrɑhɑm.”" 
Genesis26:25 Codhe, kɑ Isɑɑk ogëdø ki këli lɑm, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlle kì kenyɑni. Águd ki kɑɑl kì kenyɑni, kɑ bɑ̈ngge okunyø ki yith." 
Genesis26:26 Abimelek ɑ́bï kì Gerɑr e bï-ɑ yï Isɑɑk. Kɑ Abudhɑdh jɑl-ɑ nyi kønyii ki kwøb geki Piköl pënyi linye gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le. 
Genesis26:27 Apyëjii yi Isɑɑk kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ bëën wun yïɑ? Wu ɑ́bëëd wu mɑ̈n ki yɑn, kɑ yɑ cyeddi yi wun kì pödhi wun?”" 
Genesis26:28 Alöggi gen kinni, “Áyod yi wøn ɑnɑn kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cyɑ̈dhi kɑ yïn. Köngi wɑ kì kɑɑmee. Wiy kwøbbee reb yi wɑ," 
Genesis26:29 kinni koo di gïnrɑj me göggí wøn, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde e bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi wøn, de bëëdi wøn ɑ́bëëd e døøj ki yïn gïti kɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn yi wøn kinni kedh ki mër, ɑnɑn yï bɑ ɑgyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Genesis26:30 Codhe, kɑ gï ryeje, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø." 
Genesis26:31 Kì mwøl keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, kɑ ge óköngø kì kɑɑm gen kinni, bong ngɑn nywɑl ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø. Codhe, ɑmɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen yi Isɑɑk, kɑ ge ókedhø ki mër." 
Genesis26:32 Dicyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën bɑ̈nggi Isɑɑk yïe be köbbii kwøbbi yith men-ɑ ókonyø yi gen, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́yïddi ki pï!”" 
Genesis26:33 Kɑ yiinhɑni cɑg yi Isɑɑk ɑ́ Cebɑ̀, o kɑɑlɑni cwøl ɑ́ Bircebɑ̀ gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Genesis26:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög runni Isøø ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ɑnywøme Judith nyɑɑr Beerì geki Bɑsemɑth nyɑɑr Elön, ge bɑ nyigi tyëng Kit bënn." 
Genesis26:35 Isɑɑk geki Rebekɑ̀ ɑ́thödhi ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw yi woɑni ryeet. 
Genesis27:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døngi Isɑɑk, nyinge ɑ́göög ge ceg-ɑ dhïïdhø, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø nënnø kidøøj. Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel wɑ̈de nyeldwøng ɑ́cwøle kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ!” Alöggi Isøø kinni, “Yɑn èn.”" 
Genesis27:2 Akööb Isɑɑk kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yöø, o kej thøwɑ kwïj yi yɑn." 
Genesis27:3 Kwɑny jɑmmí, wethí kí nywøle kɑ yï kedhí wɑg be dwɑ̈rri yɑn ki lɑ̈y men cɑm yi yɑn." 
Genesis27:4 Keny-ɑ ógwøøg gïncɑm-ɑ med kì pyëwɑ, kɑ muuj yɑn, o cɑm yi yɑn. Codhe, o yï lɑ̈mmɑ gyëdh, yɑ nuti thøø.”" 
Genesis27:5 Codhe, kɑ Isøø kedh-ɑ be dwɑr. De kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Isɑɑk, e köbb-ɑ Isøø wɑ̈de, ólïngø yi Rebekɑ̀." 
Genesis27:6 Kɑ Rebekɑ̀, Yɑgob wɑ̈de köbbe kinni, “Lïng, yɑ ɑ́lïng e wïyí köbb-ɑ Isøø ómyëw kinni," 
Genesis27:7 kɑ̈ní ki lɑ̈ɑ̈y dwɑr, kɑ thɑ̈llí yɑn, o yï lɑ̈mmɑ gyëdh kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ nuti thøø." 
Genesis27:8 De lïngí kwøbbɑ wɑ̈dɑ, kɑ gïn-ɑ köbbɑ yïn gwøøg ceth." 
Genesis27:9 Kedhí kelli dyëgee, kɑ yɑ muuj ki ónyögg ɑ́ryew møg thønhø, o ge thɑ̈llɑ wïyí ki thɑl-ɑ nyi mɑɑr yi en." 
Genesis27:10 Codhe, o gïncɑmɑni muuj wïyí yi yïn, o yï lɑ̈mme gyëdh, e nuti thøø.”" 
Genesis27:11 De Yɑgob Rebekɑ̀ meye ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Isøø ómïɑ dële dɑ yëyy de dëlɑ lïw!" 
Genesis27:12 Keløg yɑ ónywɑl yi wïyɑ, óyod yi en kinni yɑ pɑth ki Isøø. Kɑ yɑ ocögø yɑ pɑ lɑ̈mme gyëdh, de yɑ óyöd yɑ lɑ̈mme’ cyën kipe kɑ ɑ́wënyɑ en.”" 
Genesis27:13 Codhe, ɑköbbii yi Rebekɑ̀ kinni, “Keløg yï lɑ̈mm-ɑ cyën yi wïyí, cɑ́yɑ óyïëy yi yɑn. Gwøg gïn-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn yøw, kedh kɑ dyëg muuj yɑn.”" 
Genesis27:14 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki dyëg ɑ́ryew, kɑ gï muuje meye, kɑ ge thɑl yi en ki thɑl-ɑ nyi mɑɑr yi Isɑɑk." 
Genesis27:15 Kɑ Rebekɑ̀ ógudh-ɑ døj mø Isøø wɑ̈de nyeldwøng, møg-ɑ ying yïe kì ød kwɑnye, kɑ gï lønye ri Yɑgob wɑ̈de nyelthinh." 
Genesis27:16 Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø thyew ki lɑ̈ni dyëg, kɑ gï kume cinggi Yɑgob geki kɑ̈jj-ɑ bong yëyy kì mune, mɑ́ ge lïw." 
Genesis27:17 Codhe, kɑ rïng-ɑ ɑ́thɑle geki ópun-ɑ ɑ́gwøge cïbe cingi Yɑgob." 
Genesis27:18 Akedhi Yɑgob yï wïye ɑkööbe kinni, “Wïyø!” Kɑ wïye okööbø kinni, “Yɑ olïngø, yïn ɑ́ men wɑ̈dɑ?”" 
Genesis27:19 Aköbbii yi Yɑgob kinni, “Yɑ Isøø wɑ̈dí, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn. Dhwödhí mɑl, o yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki rïngi lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́dwɑ̈rrɑ yïn. Codhe, o yɑ lɑ̈mmi gyëdh yi yïn.”" 
Genesis27:20 De Isɑɑk wɑ̈de ɑ́pyëje kinni, “Lɑ̈y ɑ́jwɑn yi yïn kɑ yodø kidï kɑ nɑ̈g yi yïn?” Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́kønye ki yodii.”" 
Genesis27:21 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yɑgob yi Isɑɑk kinni, “Bïí butɑ o yï nywɑl yi yɑn wɑ̈dɑ, o yodɑ cyee mɑ bëëd yï bɑ Isøø wɑ̈dɑ kidyër.”" 
Genesis27:22 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob kedh-ɑ buti Isɑɑk wïye. Kɑ nywɑl yi Isɑɑk, ɑkööbe kinni, “Cwɑggí nɑ cwɑggi Yɑgob. De cinggí dɑ yëyy ni cinggi Isøø.”" 
Genesis27:23 Nuti ngijø yi Isɑɑk kinni bɑ Yɑgob, mɑ́ cingge dɑ yëyy ni cinggi Isøø, cem e lɑ̈mm-ɑ gyëdh yi Isɑɑk," 
Genesis27:24 ɑcigii pyëjø yi Isɑɑk kinni, “Yï bɑ Isøø wɑ̈dɑ kidyër?” Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Ngee, bɑ yɑn.”" 
Genesis27:25 Codhe, kɑ Isɑɑk okööbø kinni, “Mëggí yɑn gïncɑmɑni, o cɑm yi yɑn, o yï lɑ̈mmɑ gyëdh.” Codhe, ɑmëggii gïncɑmɑni yi Yɑgob, ɑcyɑ̈me. Kɑ nëngi ki møgi oløg yi Yɑgob kɑ ómɑ̈dhø." 
Genesis27:26 Aköbbii yi Isɑɑk wïye kinni, “Nyïngí butɑ, kɑ yɑ nuum kì pïnɑ wɑ̈dɑ.”" 
Genesis27:27 Kɑ kedh-ɑ bute, ɑnuume gøn. Kɑ yømi ógudhe ngwɑ̈j yi wïye kɑ gø kwënge, kinni, “Arøwøø, yømi wɑ̈dɑ ngwɑ̈ɑ̈j nɑ yømi pwödhø men-ɑ ógyëdhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Genesis27:28 Jwøgɑ yï ónënge ki kødh me gïïr, kɑ yï nënge ki piny me døøj, o yï óbëëd yïí dɑ byel mø gïïr geki møgi oløg me nyɑ̈n." 
Genesis27:29 Yï ógöggi yi jurrì bënn. Kɑ ji ri gen bøødh gen bølí. Yï óbëëd yï teg kibøli nyiimyëw. Wɑ̈ddi meyí, ri gen óbødh yi gen kì bøli. Ngɑn-ɑ ólɑ̈mmi yïn cyën ócyen, o ngɑn-ɑ ólɑ̈mmi yïn gyëdh ógyëdh.”" 
Genesis27:30 Ri bëëni Yɑgob wɑ̈g ceth kì buti Isɑɑk wïye, kɑ ɑ́rume lɑ̈mmi gyëdh, bøli kenyɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́dwöög Isøø kì wɑg kun-ɑ ɑ́kedhe be dwɑr." 
Genesis27:31 Isøø thyew ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈d ki gïncɑm me døøj cɑrø. Kɑ gø muuje wïye. Kɑ wïye köbbe kinni, “Dhwöödh wïyø, o yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki rïngi lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́dwɑr yi wɑ̈dí, o yɑ lɑ̈mmí gyëdh, ki medi pyëwí.”" 
Genesis27:32 Apëjji Isɑɑk kinni, “Yï bɑ men?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ wɑ̈dí, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø, yɑ Isøø.”" 
Genesis27:33 Kɑ Isɑɑk dële okïrrø ki menteg, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́dwɑ̈rri yɑn lɑ̈yɑni, kɑ yɑ muuje ki gïncɑm, yï nuti bëënø? Ácɑm yi yɑn kɑ lɑ̈mmɑ gyëdh. O bɑ men cög ki gyëdhhɑni ceth.”" 
Genesis27:34 Isøø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kwøbbi wïye, kɑ óryeerø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe. Aköbbe wïye kinni, “Lɑ̈mmí yɑn gyëdh thyew wïyø!”" 
Genesis27:35 De wïye ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ómyëw ɑ́bï, kɑ yɑ wëny yi en. Gyëdh ɑ́rum ki kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi en.”" 
Genesis27:36 Kɑ Isøø okööbø kinni, “Yɑgob bɑ nying-ɑ dyër kipere. Yɑ ɑ́wëny yi en ki tyel ɑ́ryew ɑnɑn. Jɑmm-ɑ di bëëd gɑ tungɑ kì ri jɑmmí bënn, ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi en kì yïɑ, o ɑnɑn gyëdh møgɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi en.” Codhe, kɑ Isøø okööbø kinni, “Bong gyëdh mø nøg yøw mɑ ɑ́wïyí yɑn?”" 
Genesis27:37 Alöggi Isɑɑk kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́muuj ki tegø me bëëd Yɑgob bɑ jɑgø kì kömí. O nyiimen bënn óbëëd gɑ bɑ̈ngge. Kɑ gwøgɑ e teg kì ri mïdhi byel geki møng-ɑ nyɑ̈n. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng me mëggɑ yïn wɑ̈dɑ.”" 
Genesis27:38 De Isøø nuti wïyø, ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yï nyi gëdh-ɑ́ɑ̀ tyelø ɑ́kyel kete, wïyø? Gyëdh yɑn thyew, wïyø!” Codhe, kɑ Isøø ócɑ̈gø’ ywøg ki ywøng dwøng." 
Genesis27:39 Kɑ köbbi yi Isɑɑk kinni, “Yï óbëëdø yï lɑ̈wi ki piny-ɑ pëddi døøjø. Yï óbëëdø yïí pɑ wɑ̈dhi yi kødh." 
Genesis27:40 Kejí ónyɑg yi yïn kɑ tøng. O yï óbëëdø yï bɑ bɑ̈ng kì yï ómyëw. De keny-ɑ ónyɑɑg rií, yï óbï wɑ̈g kì cinge.”" 
Genesis27:41 Kɑ Yɑgob mɑɑn yi Isøø ki mendwøng kì bɑng gyënh-ɑ ɑ́gyëdhii yi Isɑɑk wïye. Kɑ ree köbbe kinni, “Wïyɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki thøø, Yɑgob ómïɑ ónɑ̈g yi yɑn keny-ɑ óthøw wïyɑ.”" 
Genesis27:42 Kɑ kwøbbi dwɑddi Yɑgob nɑ̈gø yi Isøø lïngi yi Rebekɑ̀. Codhe, kɑ öd-ɑ yï Yɑgob kinni, “Isøø ómyëw pyëwe mɑg yi en kɑ kinni o yï ónɑ̈g yi en keny-ɑ óthøw wïyí." 
Genesis27:43 De yïn, wɑ̈dɑ, gwøg gïn-ɑ köbbɑ yïn. Lɑbɑn ómïɑ nud kì Arɑn. Kedhí yïe ɑnɑn ceth!" 
Genesis27:44 Kɑ yï kɑl bëëdø kì bute gïti keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny liny ómyëw. 
Genesis27:45 Keny-ɑ ókwööj linye, kɑ wïje owïlø ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggií, yɑ óödi yïí ki bɑ̈ng men-ɑ ódwöög yïn. Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni o wɑ̈ddɑ ryeet lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gen kì bølɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel.”" 
Genesis27:46 Codhe, ɑköbbi Isɑɑk yi Rebekɑ̀ kinni, “Köörɑ ɑ́buudh yi nyigi Kit. Keløg Yɑgob ónyömø kì kelli nyigi Kit kì pönhï, yɑ óbëëdø yɑ onëënø kɑ per ngø?”" 
Genesis28:1 Kɑ Yɑgob cwøl yi Isɑɑk kɑ gø kwënge, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yï ko nyömi ki dhɑjø kì kelli nyigi Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis28:2 Dhwöödh, kedhí Töör Arɑm gøl Bethuel wïyi meyí, kɑ yï nyömí kì kelli nyigi Lɑbɑn ómï meyí." 
Genesis28:3 Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøk Áyïmø, kɑ yï nënge ki nywøl mø ngenyø, møg-ɑ ógöögø ki jurrì mø gïïr." 
Genesis28:4 Kɑ gyëdhhi Abrɑhɑm mëgge yïn, wuki nyigí. Piny-ɑ bëëd yi yïn ɑnɑn yï bɑ wëdh, ólɑg yi yïn, eni piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Abrɑhɑm yi Jwøk.”" 
Genesis28:5 Aör Yɑgob yi Isɑɑk, kɑ kedh-ɑ Töör Arɑm kun-ɑ bëëd yi Lɑbɑn wɑ̈d Bethuel ómï Rebekɑ̀, meyi Yɑgob geki Isøø." 
Genesis28:6 Kɑ yod yi Isøø kinni Isɑɑk Yɑgob ɑ́gyëdhe kɑ gø öre Töör Arɑm be nyömø ki dhɑjø. Áyod yi en thyew kinni Yɑgob ɑ́cege kinni ko nyömi kì kelli nyigi Kɑnɑɑn. 
Genesis28:7 Áyode thyew kinni Yɑgob kwøbbi wïye geki meye lïng en kɑ kedh-ɑ Töör Arɑm. 
Genesis28:8 Codhe, ɑyode gøn kinni Isɑɑk wïye pɑ dwɑddi kinni o wɑ̈dde nyömi gen ki nyigi Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis28:9 Codhe, kɑ Isøø kedh-ɑ yï Icmɑil, ɑnywøme nyimï Nebɑyoth, nyɑn-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Mɑlɑɑth nyɑɑr Icmɑil wɑ̈d Abrɑhɑm, e gø nywøøme’ kömi mɑ̈nn-ɑ yïe." 
Genesis28:10 Kɑ Yɑgob odhwödhø kì Bircebɑ̀ e kedh-ɑ Arɑn. 
Genesis28:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe keny megø ɑbudde, mɑ́ cɑ̈ng ɑ́kedhi piny. Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki tungi kït me thɑ̈ɑ̈nhe wïje, ɑnene." 
Genesis28:12 Kɑ Yɑgob ólɑ̈gø, e lidh-ɑ yïdhi men-ɑ ócwöödh piny, wïje nywɑ̈ddø ki mɑl, ɑlidhe wëywöddi Jwøk ge nyi yedh-ɑ mɑl kɑ ge nyi yïnh-ɑ piny kì wïj yïnhɑni." 
Genesis28:13 Aliidh Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Yɑgob e ócungø kì wïj yïdhi, ɑkööbe kinni, “Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Yɑ Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm kweyí, o bene yɑn Jwøøg Isɑɑk. Yï ómëggɑ piny-ɑ buud yi yïn èn, wuki kwɑrrí." 
Genesis28:14 Kwɑrrí ógöögø ge nɑ tør kɑ wɑ̈thi tùngi piny bënn pɑ̈ng yi gen. Kɑ jurri kömi piny bënn óyïddø ki gyëdh kì bɑngí wuki kwɑrrí. 
Genesis28:15 Yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki yïn kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kedhi yi yïn bënn, kɑ yï dwöögɑ piny men. Yï pɑ pɑ̈nyɑ’ wiyø gïti keny-ɑ ógwøgɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn bënn.”" 
Genesis28:16 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob ócyëwø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud kì keny kidyër, de yɑ bëëdø yɑ kwïj wøw.”" 
Genesis28:17 Kɑ obwøgø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ óböggø yi keny! Bɑ ød Jwøk kidyër, o men bɑ dhø yuu mɑl.”" 
Genesis28:18 Kɑ Yɑgob jwɑn-ɑ dhwödhø kì mwøl, kɑ tungi kïn-ɑ ɑ́thɑ̈ɑ̈nhe wïje kwɑnye, kɑ gø cwöödhe piny, ɑkunye köme ki møw." 
Genesis28:19 Kenyɑni ɑ́bëëd e cwøl ɑ́ Ludh, de ɑ́døøg ki cɑgø yi Yɑgob ɑ́ Betiil (ød Jwøk)." 
Genesis28:20 Kɑ Yɑgob óköngø kinni, “Keløg Jwøk ócyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn, kɑ yɑ kor yi en ki yuu-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi yɑn èn, kɑ yɑ thödhe ki gïncɑm men cɑm yi yɑn, ki ógudh møg rug yi yɑn," 
Genesis28:21 kɑ yɑ dwööge gøl wïyɑ ki tɑrø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëd ɑ́ Jwøgɑ ceth." 
Genesis28:22 Kït men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödhɑ piny èn, óbëëd ɑ́ ød Jwøk. Pyɑ̈ri wɑ̈thi jɑmmɑ bënn møg-ɑ ómëggi yɑn yi Jwøk, ójwödhɑ en.”" 
Genesis29:1 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob ódøøgø wɑ̈di yöö, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ Töör Arɑm." 
Genesis29:2 Atïnge wïje, kɑ ólïdhø ki yith me wïje di dɑggi dyëg ɑ́dɑ̈g ge obuddø kì piny, mɑ́ ge nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ɑ yij yiinhɑni ki pï. Kït me dwøng ócïb dhø yith." 
Genesis29:3 Tyëng-ɑ kwɑ̈yø ki dyëg ɑ́bëëd ge nyi ceg-ɑ cugø bënn, o kït ngyel yi gen kì dhø yith, o dyëg tömmi ki pï. Codhe, o kït nyi dwøøg keje kì dhø yith." 
Genesis29:4 Kɑ kwɑ̈yyi dyëg pyëj yi Yɑgob kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Wø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Arɑn.”" 
Genesis29:5 Apëjje kinni, “Lɑbɑn kwɑɑr Nɑor ngɑ̈nyi yi wun?” Akööb gen kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn.”" 
Genesis29:6 Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Dële yööd?” Akööb gen kinni, “Dële yööd. Lidh, Rebekɑ̀ nyɑre ɑ bï ɑcinee ki dyëg.”" 
Genesis29:7 Akööb Yɑgob kinni, “De cɑ̈ng ce nudd e dwøng. Pɑth ki bøli keny-ɑ nyi køøl dyëg pɑc. Tömmu gen ki pï, kɑ wiy ge døøg gen be cɑm.”" 
Genesis29:8 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Pɑth, wø ceg-ɑ yïd gïti keny-ɑ ókööl dyëg bënn, o kït ngyel kì dhø yith, o dyëg tömmi ki pï cyee.”" 
Genesis29:9 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kööb Yɑgob geki kwɑ̈yyi dyëg, ɑwɑ̈nhi Rɑceel ki dyëgi wïye, mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́bëëd e kwɑy-ɑ dyëg." 
Genesis29:10 Yɑgob keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Rɑceel nyɑɑr Lɑbɑn geki dyëgi Lɑbɑn, ɑkedhe wïj yith, kɑ kït ngyëële wɑ̈g kì dhø yith, kɑ dyëgi Lɑbɑn tömme ki pï. Lɑbɑn bɑ ómï Rebekɑ̀ meyi Yɑgob." 
Genesis29:11 Codhe, kɑ Rɑceel nuum yi Yɑgob, kɑ Yɑgob ceg-ɑ ì túl ki ywøg." 
Genesis29:12 Aköbbe nyɑnɑni kinni ge bɑ wɑdd, o bɑ wɑ̈d Rebekɑ̀. Codhe, ɑrengi Rɑceel pɑc, kɑ wïye köbbe." 
Genesis29:13 Lɑbɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge wööni Yɑgob wɑ̈d nyimen, ɑrenge be pɑɑrii, kɑ dööb kɑ̈w yi Lɑbɑn, kɑ gø nuume, kɑ gø kïdhe gøle. Aköbbii yi Yɑgob ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn." 
Genesis29:14 Akööb Lɑbɑn kinni, “Wɑ bɑ remø ɑ́kyel.” Kɑ Yɑgob obëëdø kì kunɑni ki dwɑ̈y." 
Genesis29:15 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yɑgob yi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Yï bɑ wɑɑd wøn kidyër, de pɑ døøj kiperí kinni o yï göög e bong köögi men mëggɑ yïn. Köbbí yɑn, yï køøg kɑ ngø?”" 
Genesis29:16 Lɑbɑn ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ nyige, womɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew. Nyɑn-ɑ dwøng cwøl ɑ́ Leɑ̀, o nyɑn-ɑ thinh cwøl ɑ́ Rɑceel." 
Genesis29:17 Leɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd bøle myëër, de Rɑceel ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑ́ywinyø, o myëër cɑrø." 
Genesis29:18 Rɑceel mɑɑr yi Yɑgob. Codhe, ɑköbbe Lɑbɑn kinni, “Yï ógöggɑ ki runn ɑ́bïryew, othumi gen, o yɑ mëggí nyɑrí Rɑceel ɑ́ dhɑjø.”" 
Genesis29:19 Kɑ Lɑbɑn okööbø kinni, “Lɑ̈w kipere ke nywømii yi yïn kibøli ke di nywømii yi jɑlø megø. Bëëd kì butɑ keny.”" 
Genesis29:20 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob obëëdø e göög ɑ cingi Lɑbɑn ki runn ɑ́bïryew kipe kinni o ómëggi Rɑceel keny-ɑ óthumi runnɑni. Gï nenne ge nɑ cyɑ̈ng mø nøg yøw, yi kɑ mɑɑre Rɑceel ki mendwøng." 
Genesis29:21 Kì bɑng runn ɑ́bïryew, ɑköbbi Lɑbɑn yi Yɑgob kinni, “Mëggí yɑn Rɑceel, o nywøm yi yɑn. Runni gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi wɑ ɑ́thumi.”" 
Genesis29:22 Codhe, kɑ tyëng myërrɑni ryej yi Lɑbɑn." 
Genesis29:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yuudh wøw kɑ Lɑbɑn yöd e muuj-ɑ Leɑ̀ nyɑre, kɑ gø kïdhe ød geki Yɑgob." 
Genesis29:24 Kɑ Lɑbɑn nyɑbɑ̈nge Dhilpɑ̀ mëgge Leɑ̀ nyɑre ɑ́ bɑ̈ng. 
Genesis29:25 Kì mwøl keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Yɑgob kinni ge buddø kɑ Leɑ̀, ɑköbbe Lɑbɑn kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggí yɑn kinnï! Yɑ ɑ́göög ki gwøng teg ki runn ɑ́bïryew kɑ per kinni, o yɑ nywømɑ Rɑceel! Yïde ɑ wëëny yɑn?”" 
Genesis29:26 Kɑ Lɑbɑn okööbø kinni, “Kì pödhi wøn, nyɑnthinh pɑ nyi wëggi nywømø kì bøli nyimen nyɑndwøng." 
Genesis29:27 De tyëgu cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew kì ød wuki Leɑ̀, o yï mëggɑ Rɑceel, o nywøm yi yïn thyew. De yï ceg-ɑ døøgø gwøg ki runn ɑ́bïryew møøgø.”" 
Genesis29:28 Kɑ møgɑni yïëy yi Yɑgob. Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew e ying-ɑ ød geki Leɑ̀, kɑ Lɑbɑn Rebekɑ̀ nyɑre mëgge Yɑgob ɑ́ dhɑjø." 
Genesis29:29 (Kɑ Lɑbɑn bɑ̈nge Bilɑ̀ mëgge Rɑceel nyɑre ɑ́ bɑ̈ng.) 
Genesis29:30 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob kedh-ɑ ød geki Rɑceel thyew, kɑ Rɑceel mɑɑr yi Yɑgob kidøøj kibøli Leɑ̀. Kɑ Yɑgob ogöögø kì cingi Lɑbɑn ki runn ɑ́bïryew møøgø." 
Genesis29:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni Rɑceel mɑɑr kidøøj yi Yɑgob kibøli Leɑ̀, ɑgöjje Leɑ̀ nywølø, kɑ Rebekɑ̀ göjje bøøjø." 
Genesis29:32 Leɑ̀ ɑ́yɑɑj kɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈d. Kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Ruben, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j orɑngɑ ɑ́lidhe. Jɑlgølɑ yɑ ómɑɑr yi en ɑnɑn.”" 
Genesis29:33 Leɑ̀ ɑ́cigi yɑɑjø kɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈d megø. Kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Cimeøn, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïng kinni yɑ pɑ mɑɑr, ɑmëgge yɑn wɑ̈ɑ̈n.”" 
Genesis29:34 Leɑ̀ ɑ́cigi yɑɑjø, kɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈d megø. Kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Leebì, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Anɑn jɑlgølɑ órëbi ki yɑn, mɑ́ e ɑ́nyöddɑ ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
Genesis29:35 Codhe, kɑ Leɑ̀ onywølø ki wɑ̈d megø. Kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Yeudɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Anɑn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólejjɑ.” Codhe, kɑ Leɑ̀ ódhɑ̈lø yïddø ki dhɑnhø megø." 
Genesis30:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Rɑceel kinni bɑ bwøj, kɑ mɑg yi tyiel ki Leɑ̀ nyimen, ɑköbbe Yɑgob kinni, “Nëngí yɑn ki nywøl, ke pɑ nywølɑ yɑ othøø.”" 
Genesis30:2 Kɑ Yɑgob mɑg yi liny ki en, ɑkööbe kinni, “Gïn-ɑ nyi gwøg yi Jwøk kete, olwɑ̈ngø yi yɑn ki gwøgø? En ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n yïn nywølø.”" 
Genesis30:3 Akööb Rɑceel kinni, “Bɑ̈ngɑ Bilɑ̀ ɑnɑn. Kedhu ød ki en, o yɑ nyödde ki nywøl. O gølɑ tïng yi en.”" 
Genesis30:4 Codhe, kɑ Rɑceel bɑ̈nge Bilɑ̀ mëgge Yɑgob ɑ́ dhɑjø, kɑ kedh-ɑ ød ki gøn." 
Genesis30:5 Ayɑɑj Bilɑ̀, kɑ Yɑgob nyödde ki wɑ̈d." 
Genesis30:6 Kɑ Rɑceel okööbø kinni, “Álidh yi Jwøk kinni yïɑ bɑ̈r. Kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑ́lïnge, kɑ yɑ nënge ki wɑ̈d.” Acɑge gøn ɑ́ Dɑn." 
Genesis30:7 Bilɑ̀ ɑ́cigi yɑɑjø, kɑ onywølø ki ryeew wɑ̈dde." 
Genesis30:8 Akööb Rɑceel kinni, “Wø ɑ́byëddi ki nyimïɑ ki byëddø me teg, kɑ tyɑm yi yɑn.” Codhe, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Nɑptɑlì." 
Genesis30:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Leɑ̀ kinni nyöde ɑ́cungi, ɑmëgge bɑ̈nge Dhilpɑ̀ Yɑgob ɑ́ dhɑjø." 
Genesis30:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nywøl Dhilpɑ̀ ki wɑ̈d," 
Genesis30:11 ɑkööb Leɑ̀ kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ dhwɑ̈ng.” Codhe, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Gɑd." 
Genesis30:12 Yɑgob ɑ́nyöddi yi Dhilpɑ̀ ki wɑ̈d megø," 
Genesis30:13 kɑ Leɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Pyëwɑ med cɑrø! Anɑn yɑ ócwølli yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn yɑn ɑ́ ngɑn pyëwe med.” Acɑge gøn ɑ́ Aceer." 
Genesis30:14 Kɑ Ruben kedh-ɑ yethi pwödh cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, ji onyɑ̈rø kí gemè, kɑ óyïddø ki dödɑyim, kɑ gï muuje meye Leɑ̀. Kɑ Leɑ̀ kwɑjji yi Rɑceel kinni, “Thödhí yɑn ki kwï dödɑyim mø wɑ̈dí.”" 
Genesis30:15 Alöggi Leɑ̀ kinni, “Jɑlgølɑ ɑ́rum ki kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi yïn, o ɑnɑn yï dwɑddí kwɑnyi dödɑyim mø wɑ̈dɑ?” De Rɑceel ɑ́löggi kinni, “Keløg yɑ onëngø yi yïn ki dödɑyim mø wɑ̈dí, wu ócuggø buddø wuki Yɑgob tïn kì wɑ̈r.”" 
Genesis30:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Yɑgob kì pwödhø kì böörø, ɑkedhi Leɑ̀ be pɑɑrii. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yï buddi kɑ yɑn tïn kì wɑ̈r, mɑ́ yï ɑ́rum ki kïrø yi yɑn ki dödɑyim mø wɑ̈dɑ.” Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob óbuddø ki en kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
Genesis30:17 Codhe, kɑ kwɑ̈jji Leɑ̀ lïngi yi Jwøk, kɑ óyɑɑjø këti. Anyödde Yɑgob ki bïïj wɑ̈dde." 
Genesis30:18 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́nëngi yi Jwøk ki köögi, mɑ́ bɑ̈ngɑ ɑ́mëggɑ jɑlgølɑ.” Codhe, kɑ Leɑ̀ wɑ̈de cɑge ɑ́ Isɑkɑr." 
Genesis30:19 Leɑ̀ ɑ́cigi yɑɑjø, kɑ Yɑgob nyödde ki bïkyeel wɑ̈dde." 
Genesis30:20 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Jwøk yɑ ɑ́mëgge gïn-ɑ nyi tyer yi pyëw. Yɑgob óyïëy bëëdø ki yɑn ɑnɑn cyee, mɑ́ e ɑ́nyöddɑ ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel.” Codhe, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Dhebulun." 
Genesis30:21 Kɑ Leɑ̀ onywølø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny ki nyɑndhɑjø, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Dïnɑ̀." 
Genesis30:22 Codhe, ɑpɑɑr Rɑceel yi Jwøk, kɑ kwɑ̈jje lïngi yi en, kɑ nyöde yiebe." 
Genesis30:23 Kɑ óyɑɑjø, ɑnywøle ki wɑ̈d, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ayɑ̈rɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Jwøk kì kömɑ.”" 
Genesis30:24 Kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Yosep. Rɑceel ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j o yɑ nënge ki wɑ̈d megø.”" 
Genesis30:25 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum Yosep ki nywølø, ɑköbbi Lɑbɑn yi Yɑgob kinni, “Wiy yɑn, o yɑ døøgɑ pödhi wøn." 
Genesis30:26 Mëggí yɑn mɑ̈nnɑ geki nyigɑ, kɑ wiy yɑ kedhɑ. Yɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg kiper gen, o ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidøøj eni gwøng-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn.”" 
Genesis30:27 Aköbbii yi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Keløg pyëwí med ki yɑn, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn bëëd. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ perí." 
Genesis30:28 Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o culɑ yïn.”" 
Genesis30:29 Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidøøj kinni yï ɑ́göggɑ kɑ gwøg me teg, kɑ dyëgí óngënyø kɑ ɑ́korrɑ gen." 
Genesis30:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ, yïí ɑ́dɑ mø nøg, de ɑnɑn yïí dɑ mø ngenyø. Kenyi di gïí me gwøg yi yɑn ceth, yï nyi ceg kɑ gyëdhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Dɑ́ ki wën ɑ ólunyɑ ki gwøg yɑ gögg-ɑ gølɑ?”" 
Genesis30:31 Apyëëj Yɑgob yi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Mëggɑ yïn ngø?” Aløøg møge yi Yɑgob kinni, “Ko di gïn mëggí yɑn. Göggí yɑn gïn kete yøw; wiy yɑ kedhɑ be kwɑyi dyëgí kí dhögí, o ge korri yi yɑn." 
Genesis30:32 Kɑ wiy yɑ kɑ̈llɑ kelli dyëgí bënn tïn, o møg-ɑ ógeddø, ki møg-ɑ ri gen di kïddì kì kelli gen køjɑ wɑ̈yi gen geki órömm-ɑ lojø bënn. Kí dyëg ɑ́tegg geki dhög-ɑ ri gen di kïddì, o møgɑni bëëd gen gɑ kööngɑ." 
Genesis30:33 O ólidh yi yïn dhuki megø mɑ bëëdɑ yɑ pɑth ki wëny. Keny-ɑ óbëën be lidhi dyëgɑ, keløg yï ólïdhi ki dyel ɑ́tegø me pɑth ki ɑgid wɑlɑ̀ ree bong kïddì, wɑlɑ̀ órömø me pɑth ki dïtɑ̈ng, óbëëd ɑ́ ɑkwɑl yi yɑn.”" 
Genesis30:34 Alöggi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïëy! Wiy bëëde ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbií.”" 
Genesis30:35 De kì dicyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, Lɑbɑn dyëg ɑ́tegg-ɑ ri gen di kïddì kí møg-ɑ ógeddø, kí møg-ɑ ógwelø ki kïdd-ɑ tɑr, kí dyëg-ɑ lojø bënn gï ɑ́køje wɑ̈yi gen, o wɑ̈dde nenni gen dyëgɑni." 
Genesis30:36 Kɑ dyëgɑni køøle kun me lɑ̈wi ki Yɑgob, kunɑni cɑɑdh kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g. Dyëg-ɑ ɑ́döng ɑ́korri yi Yɑgob." 
Genesis30:37 Kɑ Yɑgob ókɑ̈bbø ki bɑ̈ddi yenh odɑɑrø, kí ɑkemel, kí ɑ́cøngø, kɑ gï celle, kɑ gï gwede e gööb-ɑ pɑ̈ddi gen wɑ̈g, o kɑ̈jji gen döng gen ge tɑr." 
Genesis30:38 Kɑ lødh møgɑni cwöödhe kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi dyëg geki dhög ki pï. Dyëg kí dhög nyi tïg ɑ kenyi bëën gen be mɑdh ki pï. 
Genesis30:39 Codhe, kɑ dyëg nyii tïgø kì bøli lødhɑni. Kɑ møg-ɑ nyi nywøl yi gen nyi nywøl ri gen dɑ kïddì, ge ógeddø." 
Genesis30:40 Kɑ dyëg-ɑ thønhø geki røjj-ɑ thønhø møgɑni køj wɑ̈yi gen yi Yɑgob kì ri møg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ løg dyëgi Lɑbɑn." 
Genesis30:41 Kenyi tïg møg-ɑ teg (møg-ɑ dëlli gen døøj), kɑ lødh nyi cwöödh bøli gen yi Yɑgob, o gï nenni gen kɑ̀ tïg gen." 
Genesis30:42 De kenyi tïg møg-ɑ nyødh (møg-ɑ dëlli gen rijjø), lødh pɑ nyi cwöödh bøli gen yi Yɑgob. Codhe, kɑ møg-ɑ nywøl yi dhög geki dyëg-ɑ rijjø løg-ɑ mø Lɑbɑn, o møg-ɑ nywøl yi møg-ɑ teg bɑ mø Yɑgob." 
Genesis30:43 Yɑgob ɑ́göög ɑ́ jɑlkɑ̈r kì bɑng gwøng ni menɑni. Kɑ óyïddø ki dhyɑng kí dyel bëne. Kɑ jɑmme óngënyø, yïe dɑ bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ cwøw, kí ɑmɑl, kí ɑderr." 
Genesis31:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kɑ wɑ̈ddi Lɑbɑn lïngi ge okööbø yi Yɑgob. Ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑgob jɑmmi wïyee ɑ́kwɑnye bënn, bene ɑ bɑnge kɑ̈re.”" 
Genesis31:2 Kɑ yod yi Yɑgob kinni Lɑbɑn bëëde ɑ́kedh e órënyø ki en. 
Genesis31:3 Kɑ Yɑgob köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Døøg piny kweyyi wun, yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki yïn.”" 
Genesis31:4 Codhe, kɑ Rɑceel geki Leɑ̀ cwøøl yethi pwödh yi Yɑgob, kun-ɑ ɑ́ködde ki kɑɑle." 
Genesis31:5 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Álidh yi yɑn kinni wïyi wun bëëde ɑ́kedh e órënyø ki yɑn, pɑ pɑ̈r ki bëëdi cøn. De Jwøøg wïyɑ yɑ ɑ́korre." 
Genesis31:6 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun ryeet, kinni yɑ ɑ́göög kì cingi wïyi wun ki gwøg me teg," 
Genesis31:7 de yɑ ɑ́ruj yi en, kɑ kööngɑ wile ki tyel pyɑ̈rø. De Jwøk wïyi wun nuti wiyø yi en, o yɑ gögge ki gïnrɑj." 
Genesis31:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb Lɑbɑn kinni, ‘Yï ócuggø kwɑnyi dyëg-ɑ ri gen di kïddì bënn gɑ kööngí.’ Kɑ dyëg nywøl-ɑ møg mø ri gen di kïddì." 
Genesis31:9 Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni dyëg ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøk kì yï wïyi wun, kɑ gï mëgge yɑn." 
Genesis31:10 “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi kì bøli kej tïïg dyëg geki dhög. Yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ ónyögg-ɑ tïgø gɑ ɑgid, kí ɑgwel, kí møg-ɑ ócwinyø ki kïddì keti gen ɑ tïgø." 
Genesis31:11 Wëywöni Jwøk ɑ́kööb ki yɑn kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Yɑgob!’ Ayïëyɑ kinni, ‘Wööy!’" 
Genesis31:12 Kɑ wëywönɑni okööbø kinni, ‘Lïdhí, ónyögg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwel ki møg-ɑ ógeddø geki møg-ɑ ócwinyø ki kïddì, bɑ ge keti gen ɑ tïgø. Gïn ni men gwøg yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ ɑ́lidhɑ gïg-ɑ göggi yïn yi Lɑbɑn bënn." 
Genesis31:13 Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bølí kì Betiil, kun-ɑ ɑ́kunyí kömi tungi kïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöödh yi yïn piny ki møw, kɑ yï óköngø kì bølɑ. Anɑn yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ yïn, dhwöödh kì keny, kɑ yï døøg piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́nywøøl yïn.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Kɑ Leɑ̀ geki Rɑceel ólöggø kinni, “Bong gïjø men-ɑ ólɑg yi wøn kì bɑng wïyi wøn keny-ɑ óthøwe." 
Genesis31:15 Wø ɑ́mïdhi yi en wø nɑ tyëngpɑth. Wø ɑ́ngëwwe yïn, kɑ ngyëny møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn cɑme." 
Genesis31:16 Jwøk jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnye bënn kì yï wïyi wøn, bɑ mø wøn, wøki nyigi wøn. De gwøg gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn yi Jwøk kinni gwøøg.”" 
Genesis31:17 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob nyige kí mɑ̈nne cïbe kömi ɑmɑl." 
Genesis31:18 Kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø ki døøg yï wïye Isɑɑk kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Jɑmmi Yɑgob bënn kwøl ɑ bøli gen. Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́lem yi en bënn kì Töör Arɑm ɑ́kɑ̈l yi en. 
Genesis31:19 Kɑ ngïjji jwöggi gøl Lɑbɑn kwɑl yi Rɑceel, e Lɑbɑn ying-ɑ be teb ki yëyyi dyëge." 
Genesis31:20 Yɑgob, Lɑbɑn jɑl Arɑm ɑ́wënye; nuti köbbø yi en kinni ceg-ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g." 
Genesis31:21 Yɑgob ɑ́jwɑn dhwödhø geki tyëng gøle, kɑ Nɑm Porɑt bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen, kɑ ge ókedhø ge töng-ɑ kuni myërri kïtti Gilyɑd." 
Genesis31:22 Kɑ Lɑbɑn olïngø kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kinni, i Yɑgob pɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Genesis31:23 Codhe, kɑ wɑddi gen cønge, kɑ ge reng-ɑ bɑnge. Bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, ɑpïïdii kelli kïtti Gilyɑd yi Lɑbɑn." 
Genesis31:24 Kɑ Jwøk bï-ɑ yï Lɑbɑn jɑl Arɑm kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Køkødh! Ko di gïjø me köbbí Yɑgob, cɑgg ɑ́ gïndøj wɑlɑ̀ gïnrɑj.”" 
Genesis31:25 Yɑgob ɑ́pïïd yi Lɑbɑn, ɑ́pïïd yi en e rum gur ki kɑɑle kì kelli kïttì, codhe kɑ Lɑbɑn geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en pëgg-ɑ kelli kïtti Gilyɑd." 
Genesis31:26 Kɑ Yɑgob köbbi yi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́kedhi wïjí ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l nyigɑ de ge ce mɑɑg yïn ɑ yij liny?" 
Genesis31:27 Yïde ɑ kwɑɑl rií, kɑ yɑ wëny yi yïn? Yɑde ɑ bɑɑny yɑn ki köbbø? Yï di lwøøg yöö ki dhwɑ̈ng e bullì opwödø, o kɑ̈ngì okodhø." 
Genesis31:28 Yɑ nuti wëggi yïn mɑ̈dhi nyigɑ geki kwɑrrɑ, keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh gen. Gïn ni menɑni ɑ́gwøg yi yïn kɑ nøgi wïjí!" 
Genesis31:29 Yï di cuggi göggø yi yɑn ki gïnrɑj. De ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈r, Jwøøg wïyi wøn yɑ ɑ́kyëdde kinni, i yï ko köbbɑ ki kwøb ying gɑ møg døj wɑlɑ̀ mø rijjø." 
Genesis31:30 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn yï dwɑdd-ɑ døøg pödhi wun, dɑ́ per ngø ɑ kwɑɑl ngïjji jwöggi gølɑ?”" 
Genesis31:31 Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ riɑ ki kwɑlø, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bögg-ɑ kinni nyigí ókwɑny yi yïn kì yïɑ." 
Genesis31:32 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn-ɑ óyod yi yïn kì keny, e ngïjji jwöggi gølí kwɑɑny en, ngɑnɑni ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø! Yɑ kööb ɑ bøli wɑddi wun ɑnɑn, dhøgɑ ómïdhɑ. Yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki jɑmm-ɑ bɑ møgí, kɑ jɑmmí kwɑɑny.” Kwïj yi Yɑgob kinni ge ókwɑɑl-ɑ yi Rɑceel." 
Genesis31:33 Kɑ Lɑbɑn oyɑ̈bø kì yij kemi Yɑgob, kì yij kemi Leɑ̀. Kí yij kem-ɑ bëëd yi bɑ̈ngg, de ngïjji jwöggi gøle nuti yood en. Kɑ kedh-ɑ yij kemi Rɑceel e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kemi Leɑ̀." 
Genesis31:34 Rɑceel ngïjji jwöggɑni kɑɑn en kelli jɑmmi kömi ɑmɑlø, o bëëd ɑ kömi gïn. Yij kemɑ̀ ɑ́yɑb bëne yi Lɑbɑn, de ge ɑ́cög gï pɑ yode." 
Genesis31:35 Rɑceel wïye ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Wïyø, yï ko mɑg yi liny ki yɑn. Yɑ pɑ cuggi dhwödhi mɑl kì bølí, kipe riɑ dɑ thɑ̈nggɑ.” Codhe, ɑyɑ̈ɑ̈b Lɑbɑn kì yij kemɑ̀ bëne, de ngïjji jwöggi gøle ɑ́cög gï pɑ yode." 
Genesis31:36 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob mɑg yi liny ki menteg, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á gïn ɑ ɑ́bɑj yi yɑn? Á cigg mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́pyemɑ, ɑ rïngí kì bɑngɑ?" 
Genesis31:37 Jɑmm-ɑ yïɑ bënn yethi gen ɑ́rum ki yɑbø yi yïn, de bong gïjø mɑ mií, mɑ ɑ́yod yi yïn. Keløg e dɑ gïn yood yïn, nyudhí ji bënn kì keny. Cïb bøli wɑddi wun geki wɑddi wøn, kɑ wiy ge kwøb gen ngɑn-ɑ yïe di dyër kì kɑɑmee." 
Genesis31:38 Yɑ ɑ́göög kì cingí ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew ɑnɑn. Kì kɑɑmɑni bëne, bong dyel wɑlɑ̀ nyɑɑr dyel me thinh mɑ ɑ́thøw e ceg kɑ nywølø, o bong órömø mɑ ɑ́cɑm yi yɑn kì kelli römmí." 
Genesis31:39 Kenyi di dyel me cɑm yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l, pɑ nyi muujɑ yïn, de keje nyi col-ɑ yi yɑn kiriɑ, keje nyi kwɑny yi yïn ɑ yïɑ, ying e cɑm-ɑ wɑ̈r wɑlɑ̀ dicɑ̈ng." 
Genesis31:40 Yɑ nyi ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi cɑ̈ng kì dicɑ̈ng, o yɑ nyi ceg-ɑ tödø yi yømø kì wɑ̈r kɑ yɑ nyii dhɑ̈lø’ nenø." 
Genesis31:41 Yɑ ɑ́göög yɑ nɑ bɑ̈ng kì yïí ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kipe nywømi nyigi ryeet, o runn ɑ́bïkyel møg-ɑ kyeelø kipe yïddø ki dyëgí. Kì kɑɑmɑni bëne köggɑ ɑ́wil yi yïn ki tyel pyɑ̈rø." 
Genesis31:42 De Jwøøg wïyɑ, Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm geki Isɑɑk ɑ́ying-ɑ kömɑ. Keløg e di bëëd e lɑ̈wi ki yɑn, yɑ di ör pödhi wøn yi yïn kɑ cinggɑ. De orɑngɑ ɑ́lidh yi en, ki gwøng teg men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn, ɑkyëdde yïn kì wɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈.”" 
Genesis31:43 Kɑ Yɑgob köbbi yi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Womɑ̈nn møg bɑ nyigɑ. Nyigi gen bɑ møgɑ, o dyëg møg bɑ møgɑ. Jɑmm-ɑ nenni yi yïn kì keny bënn bɑ møgɑ, dɑ́ ngø ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn ɑnɑn kipe nyigɑ geki othønh-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi gen?" 
Genesis31:44 Ceg wɑ lwöbø, kɑ wɑ rööri wɑ piny ki kïttì møg nyi pɑr wɑ lwömɑni.”" 
Genesis31:45 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob ókɑ̈bbø ki kït me dwøng, kɑ gø cwöödhe piny." 
Genesis31:46 Kɑ Yɑgob wɑdde köbbe kinni cung gen ki tuggi kïttì, ɑkwɑny gen tuggi kïttɑni, kɑ gï röör gen piny ge myeer-ɑ mɑl gɑ lwøbb." 
Genesis31:47 Kenyɑni ɑ́cɑg yi Lɑbɑn ɑ́ Yegɑr Sɑdutɑ̀, ɑ wɑngi kïtti lwöbø. De ɑ́cɑg yi Yɑgob ɑ́ Gilyɑd, nyingɑni wɑng-ɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel." 
Genesis31:48 Kɑ Yɑgob köbbi yi Lɑbɑn kinni, “Lwøøb tuggi kïttì møg, bɑ møg nyi pɑ̈ddi wɑ ki lwöm-ɑ kɑɑmee.” Bene ɑ bɑnge cwøllii ɑ́ Gilyɑd." 
Genesis31:49 Kenyɑni nyii cwøllø thyew ɑ́ Midhpɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb thyew kinni, “Wɑ ónenni yi Jwøk kɑ̀ dɑ̈ɑ̈ng wɑ." 
Genesis31:50 Ngɑ̈nyí wøw kinni wɑ kööb ɑ bøli Jwøk, cɑgg e di bëëd e bong ji mø lïngø. Óbëëd e ngɑ̈nyi yi en, ke göggí nyigɑ yi yïn ki gïnrɑj, wɑlɑ̀ ke nyömmí kömi gen ki mɑ̈nn møøgø." 
Genesis31:51 Lwøøb tuggi kïttì men-ɑ ɑ́röör yi yɑn piny èn, bɑ men nyi pɑ̈ddi wɑ ki lwöm-ɑ kɑɑmee." 
Genesis31:52 Lwøøb tuggi kïttì møg geki tungi kïn-ɑ ócwöödh piny èn, bɑ møg nyi pɑ̈ddi wɑ ki lwömee. Lwøøb tuggi kïttì men pɑ cuggi kɑdhø yi yɑn, o yɑ kedhɑ be göggi yïn ki gïnrɑj. Kɑ yï ko bï løøng-ɑ di yɑn be göggi yɑn ki gïnrɑj." 
Genesis31:53 Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, ɑ bɑ Jwøøg Nɑor, kɑ en ɑ bɑ Jwøøg wëëg gen, wiy e ócɑɑye ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈d lwömɑni kì kɑɑmee.” Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob óköngø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ nyi mɑlli yi wïye Isɑɑk." 
Genesis31:54 Kɑ Yɑgob ongɑ̈dø ki gëëdhi kì kelli kïttɑni, kɑ wɑddi gen cwøle, o ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen. Acyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen kɑ ge óbuddø kì kelli kïttɑni." 
Genesis31:55 Kì mwøl, ɑdhwödh Lɑbɑn kɑ kwɑrre mɑ̈dhe geki nyige ryeet, kɑ gï kwënge, ɑkedhe kɑ døøg-ɑ pödhi gen." 
Genesis32:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lunyi Yɑgob ki kedhø ki yuue, ɑrøøm gen ki wëywöddi Jwøk." 
Genesis32:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïn, ɑkööbe kinni, “Men bene kɑɑl Jwøk.” Codhe, kɑ kenyɑni cɑge ɑ́ Mɑɑ̈nɑim." 
Genesis32:3 Isøø ómï Yɑgob ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ Edöm, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Seir. Yɑgob ɑ́ödi yï Isøø ki ji," 
Genesis32:4 kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Köbbu wöödø men Isøø wɑ̈ɑ kinni, ‘Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yɑgob bɑ̈ngí ek: Yɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ buti Lɑbɑn gïti bøli keny-ɑ dwöögɑ èn." 
Genesis32:5 Yïɑ dɑ dhög, kí ɑderr, kí dyel bëne, kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ cwøw. Wöödø men örɑ’ yïn kɑ per kinni, o wø yïëy yi yïn ki bëënø.”" 
Genesis32:6 Kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör dwöög-ɑ yï Yɑgob ge okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́kedhi yï ómyëw Isøø. Bï-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈ri yïn, cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen.”" 
Genesis32:7 Kɑ Yɑgob obwøgø, kɑ pyëwe ceg-ɑ olïng. Kɑ ji møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en pɑ̈nge gɑ kɑ̈jj ɑ́ryew. Kɑ dyëg kí dhög kí ɑmɑl pɑ̈nge kì dyëri gen thyew. Gï ɑ́pɑ̈nge gɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew." 
Genesis32:8 Yɑgob ɑ́rømm-ɑ kinni, ke bëën Isøø, kɑ töng-ɑ be nɑ̈gi kɑɑl ɑ́kyel, kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø órengi kɑ obødhø." 
Genesis32:9 Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøøg kweyɑ Abrɑhɑm, kɑ yï løg-ɑ Jwøøg wïyɑ Isɑɑk, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi yïn kinni døøgɑ gøl wøn kì pödhi wøn. Yï ɑ́kööb kinni yɑ ókorri yi yïn kidøøj." 
Genesis32:10 Yɑ ɑ́göggi yi yïn ki gïgdøj mø lod møg-ɑ rømmɑ, kɑ yɑ kor yi yïn kidøøj; keny-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ Nɑm Urdun yɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø, ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi yɑn yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ lodh kete. De ɑnɑn, yɑ nuti nëngi yi yïn ki jɑmmì mø gïïr, mø bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew?" 
Genesis32:11 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yiel yɑn ki ómïɑ Isøø. Yɑ óböggø kinni óbï, kɑ wø nɑ̈ge bënn, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn geki nyigi gen." 
Genesis32:12 Yɑ ɑ́köbbí kinni, yɑ ókorri yi yïn kidøøj kɑ nyigɑ gwøøg ge gïïr ni ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø; ge dhɑ̈li kwɑnø.”" 
Genesis32:13 Yɑgob ɑ́nin kì kenyɑni, kɑ okujø ki jɑmmi møg mëggi Isøø kì ri jɑmm-ɑ nud kì yïe." 
Genesis32:14 Ákuj ki dyëg ɑ́tegg gɑ miy ɑ́ryew, kí ónyögg pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kí römm miy ɑ́ryew, kí órömm pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Genesis32:15 Kí ɑmɑll-ɑ mɑ̈nn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kí thönhh pyɑ̈rø, kí ɑderr-ɑ mɑ̈nn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kí thönhh pyɑ̈rø." 
Genesis32:16 Kɑ ɑkud ɑ́kyel köme nyi cïbi ki bɑ̈ng yi Yɑgob, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu mɑl bølɑ, kɑ kɑɑm jɑmmì mïdhi wun ge lɑ̈wi ki møg-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
Genesis32:17 Kɑ ge ceg yi Yɑgob ki gïn-ɑ ókwøb yi gen. Bɑ̈ng-ɑ kwølli jɑmm-ɑ mɑl ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Orøøm wun ki ómïɑ Isøø kɑ yï pyëj yi en kinni, ‘Yï bɑ bɑ̈ng men? Yï kedh-ɑ keny? O ɑ́ jɑmmi men ek?’" 
Genesis32:18 Codhe, kɑ yï löggí kinni, ‘Ge bɑ mø Yɑgob bɑ̈ngí. Gï ɑ́öre gï mëgge’ yïn, yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Isøø, Yɑgob obëënø thyew kì bɑng wøn.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Kɑ ryeew bɑ̈ngg ceg yi Yɑgob kinøw, kí dɑ̈ɑ̈g bɑ̈ngg, kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ kyeelø bënn, gï ɑ́cege kinøw bënn kinni, “Köbbu Isøø gïjø ɑ́kyel wu bënn, keny-ɑ órøøm wun ki en." 
Genesis32:20 Kööb wun kinni, ‘Bɑ̈ngí, Yɑgob obëënø kì bɑng wøn.’ ” Yɑgob ɑ́rum kinni, keløg jɑmm-ɑ muuj yi yɑn örɑ’ bølɑ, Isøø pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yɑn mɑwɑnø. Codhe, o keny-ɑ óyïddi wøn ki en, o yɑ óyïëye yɑn ɑ́ wɑd." 
Genesis32:21 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuje öre yï Isøø, de en kiree, ɑ́nin kì kenyɑni, kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
Genesis32:22 Kì wɑ̈rɑni kɑ Nɑm Yɑbok bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi Yɑgob geki mɑ̈nne ryeet, kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn ryeet, ki wɑ̈dde gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel." 
Genesis32:23 Gøle kí jɑmme bënn ɑ́kïdhe løøg nɑm. 
Genesis32:24 Kɑ Yɑgob odöngø kete. Kɑ jɑl megø obëënø, kɑ óbyëddø ki Yɑgob, gïti kɑ ɑ́tuul cɑ̈ng ge óbyëddø." 
Genesis32:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi jɑlɑni kinni Yɑgob dhɑ̈li ki tyɑmø yi en, ɑgøje ɑ́cwiig Yɑgob kɑ orunyø." 
Genesis32:26 Aköbbe Yɑgob kinni, “Wiy yɑ kedhɑ. Cɑ̈ng bï-ɑ mɑl.” De Yɑgob ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yï ówiy yi yɑn o yï kedh keløg yɑ ókwëng yi yïn.”" 
Genesis32:27 Apyëjii yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Nyingí ɑ́ men?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑgob.”" 
Genesis32:28 Codhe, ɑkööb jɑlɑni kinni, “Nyingí pɑ cwøl ɑ́ Yɑgob këti. Nyingí ócwøl ɑ́ Isrɑil, mɑ́ wu ɑ́byëddi ki Jwøk, kɑ wu óbyëddø ki ji, kɑ yï otyɑ̈mø.”" 
Genesis32:29 Apyëjii yi Yɑgob kinni, “Köbbí yɑn, nyingí ɑ́ men?” Kɑ jɑlɑni okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ pyëëj nyingɑ?” Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob kwënge kì kenyɑni." 
Genesis32:30 Codhe, ɑcɑɑg kenyɑni yi Yɑgob ɑ́ Peniel, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, de yɑ nudd yɑ onëënø.”" 
Genesis32:31 Kɑ cɑ̈ng wɑ̈nh-ɑ mɑl kedh Yɑgob ókedhø kì kenyɑni. Yɑgob ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi e ókwömø yi ɑ́cwige. 
Genesis32:32 Gïti ɑnɑn, tyëng Isrɑil pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø’ rɑ̈ri ɑ́cwig, mɑ́ Yɑgob ɑ́gøj ɑ kenyɑni." 
Genesis33:1 Kɑ Yɑgob wïje tïnge, ɑlidhe Isøø e obëënø, e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jøg mø bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen. Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob nyige pɑ̈nge kì kɑɑm Leɑ̀, kí Rɑceel, kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn ryeet." 
Genesis33:2 Kɑ bɑ̈nggɑni geki nyigi gen cïb mɑl yi Yɑgob. Kɑ Leɑ̀ geki nyige cïbe bɑng gïn. Kɑ Rɑceel geki Yosep cïbe cyɑ̈n. 
Genesis33:3 Kɑ Yɑgob kiree kedh-ɑ bøli gen mɑl, kɑ ree bøødhe piny tyel ɑ́bïryew kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kedhe, e kedh-ɑ yï ómen." 
Genesis33:4 De Isøø ɑ́yöd e reng-ɑ yï Yɑgob, kɑ gø dööbe kööre. Codhe, kɑ nuum kì pïne yi Isøø, kɑ ge óywöngø ryeet." 
Genesis33:5 Isøø keny-ɑ ɑ́tïnge wïje kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn lidhe geki othønhø, ɑpëjje kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki yïn ek bɑ møg?” Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Bene gen nyig-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøk. Yɑ ɑ́göggi yi Jwøk ki gïgdøj, yɑn ɑ bɑ̈ngí.”" 
Genesis33:6 Codhe, kɑ bɑ̈nggɑni ryeet kedh-ɑ bøli Isøø geki nyigi gen, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle." 
Genesis33:7 Kɑ Leɑ̀ geki nyige ólunyø’ kedhø, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle. Alunyi Rɑceel geki Yosep ki kedhi bøle kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen bënn, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny thyew kì bøle." 
Genesis33:8 Apëjji Isøø kinni, “Kɑ ɑ́bëën wø keny, wø ɑ́røøm ki jɑmmì mø gïïr ge okwøllø. Menɑni wɑng-ɑ ngø?” Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Bɑ kipe kinni o pyëw wɑ̈ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki yɑn.”" 
Genesis33:9 Akööb Isøø kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ jɑmmì mø gïïr, ómïɑ. Mïdhí møg-ɑ yïí.”" 
Genesis33:10 Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Pɑth! Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn! Keløg pyëwí mïnø ki yɑn, yïëy gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn. Pyëwɑ med cɑrø kɑ ɑ́lidhɑ yïn këti, nɑ men-ɑ́ lidhi Jwøk, kipe kɑ ɑ́yïëëy yɑn." 
Genesis33:11 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, kwɑny jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn. Yɑ ɑ́køny yi Jwøk ki mendwøng, o yïɑ dɑ gïïpiny bëne.” Kɑ Isøø oyïëyø ki kwɑnyi jɑmmì kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kwɑjjii yi Yɑgob." 
Genesis33:12 Codhe, ɑkööb Isøø kinni, “Kedh wɑ, yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki wun.”" 
Genesis33:13 De ɑ́kyëddi yi Yɑgob kinni, “Wuö, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni othønhø nyøødh, o kwï jɑmmɑ bɑ ɑ́nyödd nywøli gen thønhø, keløg ge ocirø yi yɑn o ge cyɑ̈dhi gen ki kɑɑm me lɑɑj cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, jɑmmì bɑ møg thøw bënn." 
Genesis33:14 De kedh, møøl bølɑ wuö, bɑ̈ngí óbï bɑngí. Yɑ óbï bɑngí mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì bɑng dyëg geki othønhø. Wɑ óyïddi kì Seir, wuö.”" 
Genesis33:15 Codhe, ɑkööb Isøø kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, wiy yï wïyɑ ki kwï jiɑ.” Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Pɑth! Pɑth! Ge ódwɑddi yi yɑn kɑ per ngø? Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn yøw, bɑ kinni o pyëw wɑ̈ɑ mede ki yɑn.”" 
Genesis33:16 Codhe, kɑ Isøø ócɑ̈gø’ døøg Seir kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Genesis33:17 De Yɑgob ɑ́kedhi Suköth. Kɑ ree gëdde ki ød kì kunɑni, kɑ ogëdø ki ɑkɑnnì kipe dhöge geki dyëge. Bene ɑ bɑnge cwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Suköth, Suköth wɑng-ɑ ɑkɑnnì." 
Genesis33:18 Kɑ Yɑgob wɑ̈dh-ɑ Cekïm kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, ki bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëne e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Töör Arɑm, kɑ pëgg-ɑ buti kɑɑlɑni." 
Genesis33:19 Kɑ piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́pëgge ngewe kì yï kwɑɑr Amör, wïyi Cekïm ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg miyø." 
Genesis33:20 Kɑ ogëdø ki këli lɑm kì kenyɑni, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Iil, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Genesis34:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, kɑ Dïnɑ̀ nyɑɑr Yɑgob, ɑ meye cwøl ɑ́ Leɑ̀, kedh-ɑ be lidhi nyigi pönhɑni." 
Genesis34:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Cekïm wɑ̈d Amör jɑngi pönhɑni, ɑmɑge gøn, kɑ gø ciire be buddø ki en." 
Genesis34:3 De Dïnɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e myëër cɑrø, ɑmɑɑrii yi Cekïm kɑ gø kwɑjje ki kwøb mø døøj." 
Genesis34:4 Kɑ Amör wïye köbbe kinni, “Nyömmí yɑn nyɑɑn.”" 
Genesis34:5 Yɑgob ɑ́lïng ki kër-ɑ ómød nyɑre yi Cekïm, de ɑ́cög e okudø, mɑ́ wɑ̈dde ɑ́bëëd ge tøøk, ge ying-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́köddi yi gen ki dhög." 
Genesis34:6 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yïde bëëni wɑ̈dde, ɑbëën Amör wïyi Cekïm be kwøb ki Yɑgob." 
Genesis34:7 Wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑdwöög gen kì pɑ̈l-ɑ ɑ́köddi yi gen. Ge ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen rijjø ki mendwøng kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́göggi Isrɑil ki gïnrɑj ni menɑni yi Cekïm. Ábɑ̈jji kɑ ɑ́budde ki nyɑɑr Yɑgob, o bɑ gïjø me bɑ ɑkerø." 
Genesis34:8 De Amör ɑ́lwööb geki nyiimï Dïnɑ̀, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dïnɑ̀ mɑɑr yi wɑ̈dɑ Cekïm ki mendwøng. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, wiy gø nywøm yi en." 
Genesis34:9 Wɑ ócuggø nywømi riee, mëggu wøn nyigi wun, o ge nywøm yi wøn, kɑ wu nyömi wun ki nyigi wøn." 
Genesis34:10 Wu óbëëdø kì piny wøn. Piny ɑnɑn, gëëd wun, kɑ wu kwɑ̈ɑ̈y wun, kɑ wu pur wun kì yije.”" 
Genesis34:11 Cekïm ɑ́lwööb thyew ki nyiimï Dïnɑ̀ geki wïyi gen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yïëyu kwɑ̈jjɑ, wu ómëggɑ gïn-ɑ cwøl yi wun." 
Genesis34:12 Cwöddi wun ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun ɑ́ kɑ̈ny, o mëggɑ wun. Kɑ wiy yɑ nywømɑ Dïnɑ̀ kete yøw.”" 
Genesis34:13 Kwøbbi Cekïm geki wïye ɑ́løøg yi wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob kɑ wëënyø, kipe kɑ ɑ́rënyi Dïnɑ̀ nyimï gen yi Cekïm." 
Genesis34:14 Akööb nyiimëëgɑni kinni, “Nyimï wøn pɑ wëggi wøn nywømø yi wun, mɑ́ wu nuti ngølø. Menɑni bɑ gïnrɑj kì yï wøn." 
Genesis34:15 De wø óyïëy ki nywööm wun keløg wu ógöögø ni wøn, kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn ngøl kì kɑɑl wun." 
Genesis34:16 Orum wun ki ngølø cyee, o wu nyömi wun ki nyigi wøn. Wø ónyömi thyew ki nyigi wun, kɑ wɑ obëëdø kì pödhø ɑ́kyel, kɑ wɑ ogöögø ki jur ɑ́kyel." 
Genesis34:17 Keløg wu óbɑ̈nyø’ ngølø, Dïnɑ̀ ókwɑny yi wøn kɑ wø ókedhø.”" 
Genesis34:18 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi gen ɑ́nënni ge døøj kì yï Amör geki Cekïm. 
Genesis34:19 Codhe, kɑ Cekïm jwɑn-ɑ be ngølø, mɑ́ nyɑɑr Yɑgob mɑɑr yi en. Cekïm ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ en ɑ ceg ki wørø ki mendwøng kì gøl gen." 
Genesis34:20 Codhe, kɑ Amör geki Cekïm kedh-ɑ kej burø kì dhø döri kɑɑl gen be kwøb ki jø kɑɑlɑni, ge ɑ́kööb kinni," 
Genesis34:21 “Tyëngɑni dwɑdd-ɑ bëëdø gɑ wɑdd ki wɑ. Wiy ge bëëd gen kì pinyee, kɑ ge göög gen ki jɑmmi gen. Piny lɑɑj. Nyömi wɑ ki nyigi gen, kɑ wiy ge nyömi gen ki nywølee." 
Genesis34:22 De wɑ ceg-ɑ yïëyø ki gïjø ɑ́kyel, Jøg-ɑ cwøw ceg kɑ ngølø bënn kì kɑɑlee ni tyëngɑni. Codhe, o ge yïëy gen ki bëëdø kì pinyee, wɑ ógöögø ki jur ɑ́kyel." 
Genesis34:23 Dhögi gen kí dyëgi gen kí jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø bënn ceg-ɑ gwøg ki møgee, keløg møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen oyïëyø yi wɑ, kɑ ge obëëdø ki wɑ kì pinyee. Gwøg wɑ gïn-ɑ kømmi yi gen.”" 
Genesis34:24 Kwøbbɑni ɑ́lïngi yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni bënn. Kɑ kwøbbi Amör geki Cekïm yïëy yi gen, kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw ngøl bënn." 
Genesis34:25 Kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g opödhø e kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́ngøl nuti nøggø. Abëën wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob ɑ́ryew, Cimeøn geki Leebì, nyiimï Dïnɑ̀, e cinggi gen dɑ pil, kɑ ge pödh-ɑ kɑɑlɑni, kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw nɑ̈g gen bënn." 
Genesis34:26 Amör ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen geki wɑ̈de Cekïm, kɑ Dïnɑ̀ kwɑny gen kì gøl Cekïm, kɑ ge ókedhø." 
Genesis34:27 Codhe, kɑ wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob kedh-ɑ kömi kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g, kɑ jɑmme kwɑny gen gɑ møg cool kej gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi nyimï gen yi Cekïm." 
Genesis34:28 Codhe, kɑ nyiimëëgɑni dhög, kí dyëg, kí ɑderr, kí jɑmm-ɑ kɑɑl, kí jɑmm-ɑ yethi pwödh bënn kwɑny yi gen." 
Genesis34:29 Jɑmmi kɑɑlɑni møg-ɑ døj ɑ́kwɑny yi gen bënn, cɑgg ɑ́ jɑmm-ɑ yethi ud, ki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn geki othønhø ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen bënn." 
Genesis34:30 Kɑ Cimeøn geki Leebì köbbi yi Yɑgob kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́muuj yi wun ki göj. Anɑn, yɑ ómɑɑn yi tyëng Kɑnɑɑn geki tyëng Perïdh, ɑ løg tyëngpiny men. O kwɑnnee nøg ni men, keløg ge órëbø, kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömee, yɑ bɑ men nɑ̈g yi gen wøki jiɑ bënn.”" 
Genesis34:31 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Dɑ́ kinni o nyimï wøn gwøge ɑ́ ngɑn nyi tuug yi cwøw?”" 
Genesis35:1 Kɑ Yɑgob köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Kedhí Betiil kɑ yï bëëd kì kunɑni, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bølí keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r, yï bwøg-ɑ ómyëw Isøø, gëddí ki këli lɑm kì kunɑni.”" 
Genesis35:2 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob tyëng gøle geki tyëng-ɑ bute bënn köbbe kinni, “Weddu ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ yï wun, kɑ wu lwøggi wun, o wun dhïwi wun, kɑ ógudhi wun wil wun." 
Genesis35:3 Wɑ ceg-ɑ dhwödhø kì keny, wɑ kedh-ɑ Betiil. Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́køny yɑn kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ orɑngø, ógëddɑ ki këli lɑm kì kunɑni. Ábëëd e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ yɑn kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhɑ bënn.”" 
Genesis35:4 Codhe, kɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ yï gen, geki gwell-ɑ yïthhi gen bënn mëggi gen Yɑgob. Kɑ ge koony thɑ óthur-ɑ dwøng kì buti Cekïm yi Yɑgob." 
Genesis35:5 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob odhwödhø geki wɑ̈dde kì kenyɑni. De tyëng myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ɑ́göjji wɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi Jwøk, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ løg bɑng gen." 
Genesis35:6 Kɑ Yɑgob geki tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en bënn kedh-ɑ Ludh, kɑɑl-ɑ cwølli ɑnɑn ɑ́ Betiil, kì piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis35:7 Kɑ Yɑgob ogëdø ki këli lɑm kì kunɑni, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Betiil, ɑ wɑngi ød Jwøk, mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ́cwöb kì bøle kì kenyɑni wɑɑng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈re, e bwøg-ɑ ómen." 
Genesis35:8 Kɑ Debörɑ̀ 'mïdhi nyigi Rebekɑ̀ othøø, kɑ koony thɑ óthur-ɑ Betiil, kɑ kenyɑni cɑg gen ɑ́ “Óthuri Ywøg.”" 
Genesis35:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Yɑgob kì Töör Arɑm, Jwøk ɑ́cwöb kì bøle kɑ gyëdhe." 
Genesis35:10 Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Nyingí cwøl ɑ́ Yɑgob, de yï pɑ cigi cwøllø yïn ɑ́ Yɑgob, nyingí ócwøl ɑ́ Isrɑil.” Codhe, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Isrɑil." 
Genesis35:11 Aköbbii yi Jwøk kinni, “Yɑ bene Jwøk Áyïmø. Nywøøl kɑ yï ngënyí, kɑ yï göög yïn ɑ́ pödhø. Yï ógöögø ki kweyi jurrì mø gïïr, kɑ yï løg-ɑ kweyi rɑ̈nhì." 
Genesis35:12 Piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ Abrɑhɑm geki Isɑɑk ómëggɑ yïn, wuki kwɑrrí.”" 
Genesis35:13 Akedhi Jwøk mɑl, kɑ gø wiye keny-ɑ ɑ́di gen." 
Genesis35:14 Kɑ Yɑgob cwödh-ɑ piny ki kït kì keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb gen ki Jwøk, kɑ kömi kïnɑni kunye ki møgi oløg geki møw møg thyëye gøn Jwøk." 
Genesis35:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb yi Yɑgob geki Jwøk gø ɑ́cɑge ɑ́ Betiil. 
Genesis35:16 Kɑ ge odɑ̈gø kì Betiil. Kɑ Rɑceel pïïd yi pɑ̈dhi piny ge nuti wɑ̈nhi Eprɑtɑ̀ ki kɑɑm me lɑɑj," 
Genesis35:17 de ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pɑ̈dhi piny me rɑɑj. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëde e orɑngø kinøw, ɑköbbii yi gɑ̈ɑ̈mi kinni, “Yï ko böggi Rɑceel. Yï nywøl-ɑ wɑ̈d megø.”" 
Genesis35:18 Wɑ̈nɑni ɑ́nywøl yi Rɑceel, de Rɑceel kiree ɑ́thøw. Wɑ̈nɑni ɑ́cɑge ɑ́ Ben Onì, codhe ɑthøwe. De wɑ̈nɑni ɑ́døøg ki cɑgø yi wïye ɑ́ Ben Yɑmïn." 
Genesis35:19 Athøw Rɑceel. Kɑ koony kö yuu Eprɑtɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Betleem ɑnɑn." 
Genesis35:20 Kɑ Yɑgob cwödh-ɑ piny ki kït kì wïj röre, ɑ́ kïn-ɑ nyi pɑɑr Rɑceel, gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, nud kì kenyɑni." 
Genesis35:21 Codhe, kɑ Yɑgob ódøøgø wɑ̈di yöö, kɑ gudd-ɑ buti ønbɑ̈r kì Eder." 
Genesis35:22 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ying Isrɑil kunɑni, kɑ Ruben kedh-ɑ ri Bilɑ̀ cï wïye, kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi Isrɑil, kɑ pyëwe órënyø. Yɑgob yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Genesis35:23 Wɑ̈ddi Leɑ̀ cï Yɑgob nyɑn-ɑ dwøng bɑ ɑ́bïkyel: Ruben, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø, kí Cimeøn, kí Leebì, kí Yeudɑ̀, kí Isɑkɑr, kí Dhebulun." 
Genesis35:24 Ányöddi ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew yi Rɑceel: Yosep kí Ben Yɑmïn. 
Genesis35:25 Ányöddi ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew yi Bilɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Rɑceel: Dɑn kí Nɑptɑlì. 
Genesis35:26 Kɑ nyöddi ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew yi Dhilpɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Leɑ̀, Gɑd kí Aceer. Bene gen wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob ɑgɑk, møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì Töör Arɑm." 
Genesis35:27 Kɑ Yɑgob kedh-ɑ yï wïye kì Mɑmɑrɑ̀ buti Kibrön, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi Abrɑhɑm geki Isɑɑk." 
Genesis35:28 Isɑɑk ɑ́bëëd ki runn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Genesis35:29 Athøw Isɑɑk kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny cyee, e rum yöø ki mendwøng. Kɑ kony yi Isøø geki Yɑgob wɑ̈dde." 
Genesis36:1 Men bɑ gøl Isøø, ɑ løg Edöm." 
Genesis36:2 Isøø ɑ́nyömi ki nyigi piny Kɑnɑɑn; Adɑ̀ nyɑɑr Elön kwɑɑr Kit. Kí Olibɑmɑ̀ nyɑɑr Anɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhibeon kwɑɑr Kit," 
Genesis36:3 kí Bɑsemɑth nyɑɑr Icmɑil, nyimï Nibɑyoth." 
Genesis36:4 Kɑ Adɑ̀ Isøø nyödde ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Elipɑdh. Kɑ Bɑsemɑth nywøl-ɑ Reuel. 
Genesis36:5 Kɑ Olibɑmɑ̀ nywøl-ɑ Yeuc, kí Yɑlɑm, kí Körɑ̀. Bene gen wɑ̈ddi Isøø ɑgɑk, møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis36:6 Codhe, kɑ Isøø mɑ̈nne, kí wɑ̈dde, kí nyige womɑ̈nn, kí tyëng-ɑ gøle bënn, kí dhöge, kí dyëge, kí jɑmme bënn kwɑnye, kɑ dɑ̈g-ɑ piny megø me lɑ̈wi ki keny-ɑ bëëd yi ómen Yɑgob." 
Genesis36:7 Jɑmmi Isøø geki jɑmmi Yɑgob ɑ́kedh ge óngënyø, kɑ piny ódhïngø yi gen. Piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́di gen ɑ́dhïngi kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø bëëdø kì yije, mɑ́ dhög kí dyëg ɑ́ngënyi ki mendwøng." 
Genesis36:8 Codhe, kɑ Isøø dɑ̈g-ɑ kelli Kïti Seir (nyingi Isøø cwøl ɑ́ Edöm thyew)." 
Genesis36:9 Bene lwömi gøl Isøø ɑnɑn. En ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Edöm, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli kïttì Seir." 
Genesis36:10 Isøø ɑ́nyöddi ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Elipɑdh yi Adɑ̀ cyëge. Kɑ Elipɑdh onywølø ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj: Temɑn, kí Omɑr, kí Dhepö, kí Gɑtɑm, kí Kenɑdh. Kɑ nyöddi yi cyëge me cwøl ɑ́ Timnɑ̀, ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Amɑlek. Isøø ɑ́nyöddi yi cyëge Bɑsemɑth ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Reuel, kɑ Reuel onywølø ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Nɑɑ̈th, kí Dherɑ̀, kí Cɑmɑ̀, kí Mïdhɑ̀." 
Genesis36:11  
Genesis36:12  
Genesis36:13  
Genesis36:14 Dɑ̈ɑ̈g mɑ̈nni Isøø bɑ Olibɑmɑ̀ nyɑɑr Anɑ̀. Anɑ̀ bɑ wɑ̈d Dhibeon. Isøø geki Olibɑmɑ̀ ɑ́nywøl-ɑ Yeuc, kí Yɑlɑm, kí Körɑ̀." 
Genesis36:15 Bene jø wïj gøl Isøø ɑgɑk, wɑ̈d Isøø nyel-ɑ dwøng bɑ Elipɑdh. En ɑ ree ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi pëjjì møg: Temɑn, Omɑr, Dhepö, Kenɑdh," 
Genesis36:16 Körɑ̀, Gɑtɑm kí Amɑlek. Bene gen pëjji gøl Elipɑdh kì piny Edöm. Ge bɑ kwɑrri Adɑ̀." 
Genesis36:17 Reuel wɑ̈d Isøø ɑ bɑ wïyi pëjjì møg: Nɑɑ̈th, Dherɑ̀, Cɑmɑ̀, kí Mïdhɑ̀. Bene gen pëjji gøl Reuel kì piny Edöm. Ge bɑ kwɑrri Bɑsemɑth cï Isøø." 
Genesis36:18 Olibɑmɑ̀ cï Isøø ɑ́nywøl-ɑ pëjjì møg: Yeuc, Yɑlɑm, kí Körɑ̀. Bene gen pëjjì møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri cï Isøø, Olibɑmɑ̀ nyɑɑr Anɑ̀." 
Genesis36:19 Bene gen wɑ̈ddi Isøø. Isøø ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Edöm. O møgɑk bene gen pëjji gen. 
Genesis36:20 Møg bɑ wɑ̈ddi Seir kwɑɑr Orït ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì piny Edöm, Lötɑn, Cöbɑl, Dhibeon kí Anɑ̀," 
Genesis36:21 Dïcön, Edher kí Dïcɑn. Bene gen wɑ̈ddi Seir jɑl Orït, møgɑni ɑ́bëëd gɑ pëjjì kì Edöm." 
Genesis36:22 Wɑ̈ddi Lötɑn bɑ Örì, kí Ëmɑm. (Timnɑ̀ bɑ nyimï Lötɑn.)" 
Genesis36:23 Wɑ̈ddi Cöbɑl bɑ Albɑn, Mɑnɑɑth, Ebɑl, Cepì, kí Onɑm." 
Genesis36:24 Wɑ̈ddi Dhibeon bɑ Aiyɑ̀, kí Anɑ̀. Anɑ̀ bene jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yod wɑɑng pïg-ɑ lyëdh kì yij ryɑng, e kwɑy-ɑ ɑderr kì wɑ̈ye." 
Genesis36:25 Anɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Dïcön, ɑ løg kweyi Olibɑmɑ̀ nyɑɑr Anɑ̀." 
Genesis36:26 Wɑ̈ddi Dïcön bɑ Ëmdɑn, Ecbɑn, Ithrɑn, kí Kerɑn. Yïe ɑ́dɑ nyɑre me cwøl ɑ́ Olibɑmɑ̀." 
Genesis36:27 Wɑ̈ddi Edher bɑ Bilɑɑn, Dhɑbɑn, kí Akɑn." 
Genesis36:28 Wɑ̈ddi Dïcɑn bɑ Udh kí Arɑn. 
Genesis36:29 Bene nyingi pëjji Orït ek: Lötɑn, Cöbɑl, Dhibeon, Anɑ̀," 
Genesis36:30 Dïcön, Edher kí Dïcɑn. Jøgɑni bene gen pëjji kɑ̈lli Orït møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì piny Edöm." 
Genesis36:31 Møg bene gen rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì piny Edöm, e tyëng Isrɑil nudd yï gen bong rɑ̈dh, Belɑ̀ wɑ̈d Beor, nyingi pɑɑre cwøl ɑ́ Dinɑbɑ̀. Yöbɑb wɑ̈d Dherɑ̀, pɑɑre bɑ Bodhrɑ̀. Ucɑm kì Temɑn. Adɑd wɑ̈d Bedɑd, kì Abith. (En ɑ ɑ́tyɑm Midyɑn kí Moɑb.) Sɑlmɑ̀ ɑ pɑɑre cwøl ɑ́ Mɑsrekɑ̀. Cɑul ɑ pɑɑre cwøl ɑ́ Reöböth kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt. Bɑɑl Anɑn wɑ̈d Akbör Adɑd jɑl Pɑu, (cyëge cwøl ɑ́ Meëtɑbel nyɑɑr Mɑtred wɑ̈d Medhɑɑb.)" 
Genesis36:32  
Genesis36:33  
Genesis36:34  
Genesis36:35

Genesis36:37  
Genesis36:38  
Genesis36:39  
Genesis36:40 Pëjji Edöm møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì kɑ̈lli gen, kí myërri gen, ge bɑ kwɑrri Isøø. Nyingi gen bɑ: Timnɑ̀, Albɑ̀, Yetheth, Olibɑmɑ̀, Elɑ̀, Pïnön, Kenɑdh, Temɑn, Mibdhɑr, Mɑgdiel kí Irɑm. Bene gen ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ pëjji Edöm. Isøø ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Edöm. Keny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́bëëd yi kɑl kì kelli kɑ̈llɑni nyi cöll-ɑ nyingi gølɑni."

Genesis36:43  
Genesis37:1 Yɑgob ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi wïye kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Genesis37:2 O men bɑ lwöbø kì ri bëëdi gøl Yɑgob, ɑ løg Yosep geki nyiiwɑ̈n. Yosep e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew, ɑ́kwɑy-ɑ dyëg, e nyi køny-ɑ nyiiwɑ̈n, wɑ̈ddi Bilɑ̀ kí Dhilpɑ̀ mɑ̈nni wïye Yɑgob. Kɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi nyiiwɑ̈n nyi köbbe wïye Yɑgob." 
Genesis37:3 Kɑ Yosep mɑɑr yi Yɑgob ki mendwøng kibøli wɑ̈dde bënn, kipe kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ nyelthinh me døøj, o wïje pel, kɑ gø gögge ki ógødh me kïdde myëër." 
Genesis37:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi nyiiwɑ̈n kinni Yosep mɑɑr kibøli gen yi wïyi gen, ɑmɑɑn ge gøn ki mendwøng, kɑ ge ówïyø kwøb ki en." 
Genesis37:5 Kɑ Yosep ólɑ̈gø kì wɑ̈r. Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe lɑ̈ggɑni nyiiwɑ̈n, kɑ ceg-ɑ pëddø ki mɑɑnø yi gen." 
Genesis37:6 Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Lïngu lɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi yi yɑn," 
Genesis37:7 Wɑ ying-ɑ pwödhø, wɑ bënn, wɑ otöjø ki thyɑng. Kɑ thyɑngg-ɑ ɑ́twöj yi yɑn ócungø ri gen cwöödh gen piny. Kɑ wɑ̈thi thyɑnggi wun obëënø, kɑ thyɑnggɑ wen gen dïdyër, ɑbøødh gen ri gen piny.”" 
Genesis37:8 Kɑ pyëj yi nyiiwɑ̈n kinni, “Yï rømm-ɑ kinni yï ógöögø ki rɑ̈dh, kɑ wø jɑɑg yi yïn?” Kɑ pëthi gen ti-ɑ rënyø ki gøn kì bɑng lɑ̈gge, ki kipe kenyi kööbe thyew e nɑ ngɑn pere teg." 
Genesis37:9 Yosep ɑ́cigi lɑ̈gø, ɑköbbe nyiiwɑ̈n kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi këti, kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ cɑ̈ng kí dwɑ̈y, kí kyell pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel, ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bølɑ.”" 
Genesis37:10 Lɑ̈ggɑni ɑ́köbbe wïye thyew, kɑ cɑ̈wwi yi wïye kinni, “Á lɑ̈g mø ngø ɑ bëëdø kinøw? Yï rømm-ɑ kinni meyí kí nyiimyëw, kí yɑn, wø bɑ møg-ɑ óbï, kɑ ri wøn bøødh wøn piny kì bølí?”" 
Genesis37:11 Kɑ nyiiwɑ̈n yethi gen mɑg yi tyiel, de wïye møgɑni mïdhe’ mïdhø kì pyëwe." 
Genesis37:12 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, e nyiiwï Yosep wɑ̈dhi Cekïm be kwɑ̈yø ki jɑmmi wïyi gen," 
Genesis37:13 ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yosep yi Yɑgob kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ öri yïn Cekïm kun-ɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈yyi yi nyiiwöw.” Alöggi Yosep kinni, “Døj, yɑ ókedh.”" 
Genesis37:14 Kɑ wïye okööbø kinni, “Kedh, lidh nyiiwöw mɑ yöd dëlli gen, kí dyëg mɑ nud gen. Kɑ yï dwöög be köbbi yɑn.” Codhe, ɑöre gøn kì Töör Kibrön. Kɑ Yosep wɑ̈dh-ɑ Cekïm," 
Genesis37:15 ɑlidhii e wɑ̈dh-ɑ wïïnø yi jɑl megø. Apyëje gøn kinni, “Á ngø ɑ yɑb yi yïn?”" 
Genesis37:16 Alögge kinni, “Yɑ yɑb-ɑ nyiimïɑ, köbbí yɑn, ge kwɑ̈ɑ̈y ɑ keny?”" 
Genesis37:17 Jɑlɑni ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ge ɑ́kedh kì keny, ge ɑ́lïngi yi yɑn ge okööbø kinni, ‘Kedhi wɑ Döthɑn.’ ” Kɑ Yosep kedh-ɑ bɑng nyiiwɑ̈n, ɑyode gïn kì Döthɑn." 
Genesis37:18 Álidh yi gen e nudd e lɑ̈wi, kɑ ge okööbø ki ri gen, e nuti wɑ̈nhi buti gen kinni, ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gii." 
Genesis37:19 Akööb gen kinni, “Jɑɑl lɑ̈g ɑ́bï!" 
Genesis37:20 Nɑ̈g wɑ en, kɑ leeng wɑ yij yith ɑ́kyel kì kelli yïïth-ɑ thwøwø ek. Wɑ ókööbø kinni, ɑ́cɑm yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l. O lidh yi wɑ mɑ løge’ ngø ɑ ónywøl yi lɑ̈gge!”" 
Genesis37:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Ruben, kɑ ree pɑ̈nye ki yieli Yosep, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ko nɑ̈g wɑ," 
Genesis37:22 wɑ̈dhi wɑ en ki leeng yij yith kì pɑ̈l keny. De ko nyïɑ̈g wɑ.” Møgɑni ɑ́kwøbe ceth, e orumø kinni dwɑdd-ɑ yieli Yosep. O gø dögge wïye." 
Genesis37:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Yosep buti gen, ɑmɑg ge gøn, kɑ ógønh-ɑ rug yi en, luny gen wɑ̈g, eni ógønh-ɑ kïdde myëër." 
Genesis37:24 Kɑ Yosep kɑ̈l gen, ɑleeng ge gøn yij yith me thwøwø." 
Genesis37:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yosep ki leeng yij yith, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki cɑm, kedh Ruben kedh-ɑ be lyeewi dyëg kun-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈mmi yi gen. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd ge ocyɑ̈mø, ɑ́lidh gen kwɑrri Icmɑil møg-ɑ nyi ngyëwi ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gilyɑd, o ge kedh-ɑ Rïp. Kömi ɑmɑlli gen dɑ gïg-ɑ yømi gen med, møg-ɑ nyi kïdhi ri mulø, ni cumɑ̈r ki pïlpïl." 
Genesis37:26 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ nyiimen köbbe kinni, “Á ngø ɑ óyod yi wɑ, ke nɑ̈g wɑ ómïee, kɑ kɑn yi wɑ?" 
Genesis37:27 Ngëwwi wɑ en tyëngngyëwø, o cöge e pɑ nyïɑ̈g yi wɑ, mɑ́ e ceg bëëdø e bɑ ómïee, ki reme geki dële.” Ayïëy nyiimen." 
Genesis37:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi jøngyew møgɑni buti gen, kɑ nyiimëëgɑni Yosep mïïd gen wɑ̈g kì yij yith. Kɑ gø ngëwwi gen tyëngɑni ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Kɑ kïdhi Rïp yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ngewii, gen ɑ kwɑrri Icmɑil mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l Midyɑn." 
Genesis37:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg Ruben wïj yith, ɑyode Yosep e tøøk, kɑ ógødhe kɑge yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe." 
Genesis37:30 Adwööge yï nyiimen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nyelthinh tøøk, o yɑ göög ɑ dï cyee?”" 
Genesis37:31 Codhe, ɑkwɑny gen ógødh kïdø mi Yosep, kɑ ge ngɑ̈dø ki ónywøg me thiinh, kɑ ógønhɑni jwɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yij remø." 
Genesis37:32 Kɑ ógødh kïdø menɑni muuj gen wïyi gen, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Lidh gïn-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wøn. Ngij, bɑ ógødh wɑ̈dí?”" 
Genesis37:33 Kɑ gø ngije, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ngee, bɑ mee! Ácɑm yi lɑ̈y me rɑj. Wɑ̈dɑ Yosep ɑ́cɑm yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l!”" 
Genesis37:34 Kɑ Yɑgob ógødhe kɑge, kɑ ree töjje ki kwɑ̈llì, kɑ ocögø e ywøg-ɑ wɑ̈de ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr." 
Genesis37:35 Wɑ̈dde kí nyige womɑ̈nn bënn ɑ́bï be lugii, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li lugø. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ópïïd yi thøø, yɑ nudd yɑ óywöngø ki wɑ̈dɑ.” Codhe, kɑ tyëg-ɑ piny e óywöngø ki wɑ̈de Yosep." 
Genesis37:36 Kì Rïp, Yosep ɑ́ngëwwi Pøtipɑr yi kwɑrri Icmɑil. Pøtipɑr ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi ɑlɑthkerr møg-ɑ nyi kor gøl rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis38:1 Kì bɑng kenyɑni, kɑ Yeudɑ̀ odhwödhø kì buti nyiimen, kɑ dɑ̈g-ɑ buti jɑl kɑɑl Adulɑm me cwøl ɑ́ Kirɑ̀." 
Genesis38:2 Kɑ nyɑn mɑ nyɑɑr Kɑnɑɑn me nyingi wïye cwøl ɑ́ Cuɑ̀, lidhe kì kunɑni, kɑ gø nywøme." 
Genesis38:3 Kɑ nyɑnɑni óyɑɑjø, ɑnywøle ki wɑ̈d, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Er." 
Genesis38:4 Kɑ cig-ɑ yɑɑjø, ɑnywøle ki wɑ̈d megø, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Onɑ̈n." 
Genesis38:5 Kɑ cig-ɑ yɑɑjø këti, ɑpɑ̈dhe piny kì Akdhïb ki wɑ̈d kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Celɑ̀." 
Genesis38:6 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈de, Er nyel-ɑ kɑyø, nyöme ki dhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Tɑmɑr." 
Genesis38:7 O kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëd Er kɑyi Yeudɑ̀ orøngø, kɑ nɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Genesis38:8 Kɑ Onɑ̈n köbbi yi Yeudɑ̀ kinni, “Kedhu ød wuki cï ómyëw, o ómyëw nyöddi yi yïn ki wïj.”" 
Genesis38:9 Kɑ yod yi Onɑ̈n kinni nywøl koo bëëdø gɑ møge. Kɑ tyew nyi kønye piny kenyi budde ki cï ómen, kipe kinni o wïj ómen cöge gø pɑ nywøl yi en." 
Genesis38:10 Kɑ cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en, ɑnɑ̈ge gøn thyew." 
Genesis38:11 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ kwɑre Tɑmɑr köbbe kinni, “Kedh bëëd kì gøl wïyí, mɑ́ yïí bong jɑlø. Bëëd kì kunɑni gïti keny-ɑ ódøngi Celɑ̀ wɑ̈dɑ.” Mɑ́ e ɑ́rum kinni, óthøw thyew ni nyiimen. Codhe, kɑ Tɑmɑr kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì gøl wïye." 
Genesis38:12 Kì bɑng keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kɑ cï Yeudɑ̀ othøø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume ywøgi cyëge, kɑ kedh-ɑ Timnɑ̀ kun-ɑ teb yëyyi dyëge, geki mɑ̈dhe Kirɑ̀ jɑl Adulɑm." 
Genesis38:13 Kɑ Tɑmɑr köbbi kinni, “Kweyí obëënø e kedh-ɑ be tebi yëyyi dyëge.”" 
Genesis38:14 Kɑ thøll-ɑ ywøøge jɑlgøle lunye wɑ̈g, kɑ wïje kume ki thɑrɑ̀, ɑkode ree ki ógudh, kɑ pëgg-ɑ tøg yuu Enɑim kì kö yuu Timnɑ̀. Mɑ́ gø ngɑ̈nyi yi en kinni, Celɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki døngø, o ɑ́cög ge nuti kïdhi ød ki en." 
Genesis38:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Yeudɑ̀, ɑrume kinni bɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, mɑ́ wïje bɑ ɑkum." 
Genesis38:16 Kɑ kedh-ɑ yïe kì tøg yöö, ɑkööbe kinni, “Døj, yï nyi køøg kɑ ngyëny ɑ́dï?” Ábëëd gø kwïje kinni bɑ cï wɑ̈de. Akööb nyɑnɑni kinni, “Ngø? Yɑ culí ngyëny kɑ̀ buddi wɑ?”" 
Genesis38:17 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ okööbø kinni “Yï óödi yi yɑn ki dyel nyibwøng kì kelli dyëgɑ.” De nyɑnɑni ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑ ceg-ɑ mɑ̈gø ki gïïpiny kì yïí. Ódöggɑ yïn keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l dyel.”" 
Genesis38:18 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Á gïjø mɑ ngø, ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn o mëggɑ yïn?” Kɑ nyɑnɑni ólöggø kinni, “Kitimí geki thøle, kí lodhí.” Codhe, kɑ gï mëgge gøn. Kɑ ge óbuddø, kɑ nyɑnɑni yɑɑj yi en." 
Genesis38:19 Codhe, kɑ nyɑnɑni ókedhø’ wɑ̈ye. Kɑ thɑr-ɑ ɑ́kume wïje kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g, kɑ thøll-ɑ ywøøge jɑlgøle dwøøge ree." 
Genesis38:20 Dyel ɑ́muuj yi Yeudɑ̀ kɑ kɑ̈l yi mɑ̈dhe, jɑl Adulɑm, o pɑ̈ɑ̈de jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi ngɑnɑni, de ngɑnɑni nuti yood en." 
Genesis38:21 Kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni pyëje kinni, “Ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì tøg yöö ying-ɑ keny?” De ge ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Bong ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi mɑ ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ keny.”" 
Genesis38:22 Codhe, ɑdøøge yï Yeudɑ̀, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ngɑnɑni nuti yood yɑn, o tyëng kɑɑlɑni ɑ́kyëëd thyew kinni i bong ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi mɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni.”" 
Genesis38:23 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Wiy mïdhe gïn kipe wɑ ógöögø ki møg ngedhi yi teedø. Ádwɑddɑ’ mëggi dyel men, de ɑ́cög e pɑ yod yi yïn.”" 
Genesis38:24 Kì bɑng dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ Yeudɑ̀ köbbi kinni, “Tɑmɑr cï wɑ̈dí ɑ́göög ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, men-ɑ́ yije dɑ dhɑnhø me yood en ki cwøw-ɑ yɑb yi en.” Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Kïdhu en be rɑ̈bø.”" 
Genesis38:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii e kïdh-ɑ be rɑ̈bø, ɑöde yï kweye kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yɑj yɑn, en ɑ bɑ wïi jɑmmì møg.” Kɑ cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Bɑ mø men eni loonh geki kitim?”" 
Genesis38:26 Ge ɑ́ngij yi Yeudɑ̀, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nyɑnɑni tir kibølɑ, mɑ́ e ɑ́cög e nuti kïdhi ød yi yɑn geki Celɑ̀ wɑ̈dɑ.” Kɑ ocögø e pɑ buddi geki nyɑnɑni këti." 
Genesis38:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën kej pɑ̈dhe piny, ɑ́yod yije dɑ ɑcwegg!" 
Genesis38:28 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd e ceg kɑ gɑmø, kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli ɑcweggɑni cinge cude wɑ̈g. Kɑ cingɑni töjji ki korø me kwɑrø yi gɑ̈ɑ̈mi ɑ́ men ngijii kinni bɑ en ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki bëën wɑ̈g." 
Genesis38:29 De kɑ ɑ́rum korø ki twöjø, kɑ cinge dwøøge, kɑ ómen bï-ɑ wɑ̈g. Kɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈mi okööbø kinni, “Yïde ɑ cɑɑg pönhø ki pönhi dwøng?” Acɑɑg nyinge ɑ́ Peredh." 
Genesis38:30 Alunyi ómen nyel-ɑ cinge di korø ki bëën wɑ̈g, kɑ cɑg ɑ́ Dherɑ̀." 
Genesis39:1 Kwɑrri Icmɑil, keny-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi Yosep Rïp yi gen, gø ɑ́ngëwwi gen Pøtipɑr, jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jyɑ̈ggi tøg buri rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp. En ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi ɑlɑthkerr." 
Genesis39:2 Yosep ɑ́køny yi Jwøk kɑ jɑmm-ɑ nyi gøggi yi en bënn nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen. Ábëëd ɑ gøl jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ngewii, jɑl Rïp." 
Genesis39:3 Kɑ yod yi jɑlɑni kinni, Yosep mɑɑr yi Jwøk, kɑ gwøng-ɑ nyi mëggii nyi gwøge kidøøj." 
Genesis39:4 Pøtipɑr pyëwe ɑ́bëëd e med ki Yosep. Kɑ gø cïbe ɑ́ jɑgø kì kömi gøle. Kɑ jɑmme bënn cïbe cingi Yosep. 
Genesis39:5 Kɑ gøl jɑl Rïp gyëdh yi Jwøk kipe Yosep. Kɑ jɑmme óngënyø. 
Genesis39:6 Pøtipɑr jɑmme ɑ́cïbe cingi Yosep ge bënn, bong gïjø me rømme den-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ cɑm yi en kete, ɑ nyi pëjje jɑlthɑl. Yosep ɑ́bëëd dële døøj, o bøle myëër." 
Genesis39:7 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ Yosep tyer yi cï jɑlkɑl. Kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni, “Bïí ødɑ, o wɑ buddi wɑ.”" 
Genesis39:8 Kɑ óbɑ̈nyø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lidh, jɑmmì bënn ɑ́cïb cingɑ yi jɑldwøng, yɑn ɑ mïdhi jɑmme bënn." 
Genesis39:9 Yïɑ dɑ tegø kì kɑl keny ni jɑlɑni ceth. Dɑ́ yïn, yï ketí ɑ nuti cïb cingɑ yi en, mɑ́ yï bɑ cyëge. Yɑ göög ɑ dï cyee ki gïnrɑj ni men, o bɑ orøg kì bøli Jwøk?”" 
Genesis39:10 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́pëggi ngɑnɑni be kwɑjji Yosep yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, Yosep ɑ́kyëddi wɑ̈g, kɑ døøg-ɑ be këëji ngɑnɑni." 
Genesis39:11 De cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel Yosep ɑ́kedhi øndwøng be yɑ̈bbø ki gïjø megø. O ɑ́bëëd e bong dhɑnhø ki tung-ɑ di ønɑni. Ayood Yosep kunɑni yi ngɑnɑni, kɑ jwɑn-ɑ yïe," 
Genesis39:12 kɑ gø mɑge kì ri ógødhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Bïí o wɑ buddi wɑ.” De Yosep ɑ́bodh kɑ reng-ɑ wɑ̈g lɑwe wiye’ cingi ngɑnɑni." 
Genesis39:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi ngɑnɑni kinni ógødhe ɑ́wiye kɑ órengø," 
Genesis39:14 kɑ bɑ̈ngge cwøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lïdhi wun! Wɑ̈d jur men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l keny yi jɑldwøng, yɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈l yi en. Ábï ødɑ kɑ yɑ dwɑdde mødø. De yɑ ɑ́ryeer ki ryeeri dwøng." 
Genesis39:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kïïwɑ, ɑrenge wɑ̈g ógødhe wiye’ butɑ.”" 
Genesis39:16 Kɑ ógødhe mïdhi yi ngɑnɑni gïti kɑ ɑ́bëën jɑlgøle. 
Genesis39:17 Kɑ gø löbbe mø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe bɑ̈ngg ɑ́tïni, ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ójur men, bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn keny, ɑ́bï ødɑ kɑ yɑ dhɑ̈ɑ̈le." 
Genesis39:18 De keny-ɑ ɑ́kïïwɑ, ɑrenge wɑ̈g ógødhe wiye’ butɑ.”" 
Genesis39:19 Kɑ wïi Yosep dële okïrrø yi liny keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni, i cyëge ódwɑddi mødø yi bɑ̈ng." 
Genesis39:20 Kɑ Yosep kwɑnye kɑ gø leenge ød mɑg, men-ɑ yije nyi kïdhi ɑmɑggi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ Yosep obëëdø kì ød mɑg." 
Genesis39:21 De Yosep ɑ́køny yi Jwøk, kɑ gø gyëdhe. Kɑ jɑngi ød mɑg pyëwe løg-ɑ me med ki en." 
Genesis39:22 Kɑ Yosep kwɑnye ɑ́ jɑngi ɑmɑgg. Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ gøggi bënn kì ød mɑg cïbe cingi Yosep. 
Genesis39:23 Jɑngi ød mɑg pyëwe nuti pɑ̈nyi olïng kipe jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cïbe cingi Yosep, mɑ́ Yosep bɑ dhɑnhi Jwøk, o jɑmm-ɑ nyi gwøg yi en bënn, nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
Genesis40:1 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ jɑngi kɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì geki jɑngi thɑl møg-ɑ gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ogöögø ki bɑ̈jjø mɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëw rɑ̈dh, wïi gen." 
Genesis40:2 Rɑ̈dh pyëwe ɑ́rënyi ki jøgɑni ryeet, ɑ løg jɑngi cɑ̈wwì geki jɑngi thɑl," 
Genesis40:3 kɑ gï kïdhe ød mɑg men-ɑ ying gøl jɑngi ɑlɑthkerr, kì keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Yosep." 
Genesis40:4 Kɑ Yosep kwɑny yi jɑngi ød mɑg ɑ́ ngɑn kɑ̈lli gen. Kɑ ge kɑl-ɑ bëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng kì ød mɑg. 
Genesis40:5 Kɑ jøgɑni ryeet, ɑ løg jɑngi kɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì geki jɑngi tyëngthɑl, ólɑ̈gø kì ød mɑg kì wɑ̈r ɑ́kyel. Ngɑɑn ɑ́lɑ̈gi kì wɑ̈ye, gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni bɑ̈ɑ̈n." 
Genesis40:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Yosep be lidhi gen kì mwøl, ɑyuude gïn ge okïïmø." 
Genesis40:7 Kɑ ge pyëj yi Yosep kinni, “Wude ɑ nënni wun pëthi wun rijjø dicyɑ̈ngtïn?”" 
Genesis40:8 Akööb gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́lɑ̈gi ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈r, de bong ngɑn nyudhi wøn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni.” Kɑ mø gen løøg yi Yosep kinni, “Bɑ Jwøk ɑ nyi nyudhø ki lɑ̈g. Köbbu yɑn lɑ̈ggi wun.”" 
Genesis40:9 Kɑ jɑngi tyëng kɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì lɑ̈gge köbbe Yosep. Gø ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑ, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ byëlø kì bølɑ." 
Genesis40:10 Wïj byëlɑni dɑ ɑ́kɑrr ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge odhɑ̈yø, ɑbug gen ki búr, kɑ ge ómɑ̈rø, ɑcyeg gen." 
Genesis40:11 Óthɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh ɑ́ying-ɑ cingɑ. Kɑ byellɑni jwɑnɑ ki kɑjø, kɑ ge jwɑnɑ’ gwøøg møgø. Kɑ bijɑ. Kɑ kïdhɑ yij óthɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh, kɑ óthɑ̈ngɑni cïbɑ cingi rɑ̈dh.”" 
Genesis40:12 Aköbbii yi Yosep kinni, “Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggí èn: ɑ́kɑrr ɑ́dɑ̈g, bɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Genesis40:13 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, rɑ̈dh pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yïn, kɑ yï dwøøge kej gwøgí, óthɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh ócïb yi yïn cinge ceth ni kenyi göög cøn, ɑ́ yïn ɑ kɑ̈llii." 
Genesis40:14 De pɑ̈ddí rɑ̈dh kiperɑ. Kɑ yɑ køny ki bëën wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg keny-ɑ ódøøg kejí këti. 
Genesis40:15 Thyew, yɑ ɑ́ceg kɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì pödhø me lɑ̈wi, me ying løøg nɑm. De gïn-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø, bɑ kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yɑn ki myenø yøw, kɑ yɑ leeng ød mɑg keny, ngö bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́rënyɑ.”" 
Genesis40:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi jɑngi thɑl kinni lɑ̈ggi jɑl-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́løøg yi Yosep kidøøj, ɑköbbe lɑ̈gge Yosep kinni, “Yɑn thyew, yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi yɑ tyëdd-ɑ ɑ́ridhh ɑ́dɑ̈g kì wïjɑ, ge myeer yɑn mɑl." 
Genesis40:17 Men-ɑ mɑl yije dɑ gïgcɑmm møg-ɑ ɑbul bënn, de ge ocɑmø yi winy kì yij ɑ́ridh kì wïjɑ.”" 
Genesis40:18 Alöggi Yosep kinni, “Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni èn: dhöng ɑ́dɑ̈g bɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Genesis40:19 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, wïjí ókïb wɑ̈g yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ yï ngɑɑb wïj lööj yɑdh, kɑ yï cɑm yi winy.”" 
Genesis40:20 Kɑ jɑggi Rïp ryej yi rɑ̈dh kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kipe pɑri cyɑ̈ng-ɑ́ yije ɑ́nywøølii. Kɑ jɑngi jøkɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì geki jɑngi tyëngthɑl kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg, kɑ ge kïdhi bøli jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis40:21 Kɑ jɑngi jøkɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì dwøøg kej gwøge. Kɑ kedh-ɑ be kɑ̈lli rɑ̈dh. 
Genesis40:22 Kɑ jɑngi tyëngthɑl nɑ̈g ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Yosep ceth. 
Genesis40:23 De jɑngi tyëngkɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì nuti rumø kì ri Yosep, wïje ɑ́wïl ki en." 
Genesis41:1 Bɑng runn ɑ́ryew, kɑ rɑ̈dh ólɑ̈gø e cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi Kiir," 
Genesis41:2 ɑ́lidh-ɑ dhög ɑ́bïryew mø cwiy, o ge lwiy, ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì nɑm, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø cɑm ki lum." 
Genesis41:3 Kɑ dhög ɑ́bïryew møøgø mø pɑ nëënø yi rɑ̈jø, o ge gwɑ̈lø gwɑ̈lø, bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì nɑm, kɑ ge ócungø kì buti dhögi tyeli mɑl." 
Genesis41:4 Kɑ dhög-ɑ cwiy cɑm yi dhög-ɑ gwɑ̈lø kinni tweet. Kɑ rɑ̈dh ócyëwø. 
Genesis41:5 Acige nenø kɑ ólɑ̈gø, ɑ́lidh-ɑ wɑ̈thi byel ɑ́bïryew, kì wïj thyɑngø ɑ́kyel, ri gen pɑ̈ng yi nyingi byel mø myëër." 
Genesis41:6 Kɑ byel ɑ́bïryew møøgø otwïyø kì buti gen, welli gen lewø lewø, o bong byel kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Genesis41:7 Kɑ well-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pɑ̈ng yi nyingi byel mwøøny yi møg-ɑ lewø. Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh ócyëwø. Ce ying-ɑ lɑ̈g!" 
Genesis41:8 Adhwödh rɑ̈dh kì mwøl wïje cungø yi møgɑni. Kɑ öd-ɑ yij Rïp bëne, kɑ ɑ́jwöggì geki tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel cwööl bënn. Kɑ rɑ̈dh lɑ̈gge löbbe gïn. De bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́cuggi köbbi rɑ̈dh gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni." 
Genesis41:9 Kɑ jɑngi tyëngkɑ̈ddø ki cɑ̈wwì rɑ̈dh köbbe kinni, “Wuö, bɑ̈jjɑ ɑ́pɑr yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Genesis41:10 Tyelø ɑ́kyel ówëni, rɑ̈dh pyëwe ɑ́rënyi ki bɑ̈ngge. Kɑ yɑ kïdhe ød mɑg men-ɑ gøl jɑngi ɑlɑthkerr, kyeel ki jɑngi tyëngthɑl." 
Genesis41:11 Kɑ wø ólɑ̈gø kì wɑ̈r ɑ́kyel ki lɑ̈g mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n. 
Genesis41:12 Kɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni köbbi wøn yi nyel megø men-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì løøg nɑm, o bɑ bɑ̈ng jɑngi ɑlɑthkerr, keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈jjii lɑ̈ggɑni yi wøn ceth." 
Genesis41:13 Kɑ møgɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen ceth ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbe gïn. Yɑ ɑ́gøny, kɑ yɑ dwöög kej gwøgɑ, kɑ jɑngi tyëngthɑl nɑ̈g.”" 
Genesis41:14 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh öd-ɑ ød mɑg. Kɑ Yosep jwɑn ki gööny wɑ̈g, kɑ wïje lyel, kɑ ógudhe wil. Akïdhii bøli rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis41:15 Kɑ Yosep köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni. De yɑ ɑ́köbbi, i yïn kenyi lïngí lɑ̈g, gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen nyii cuggø nyodhø yi yïn.”" 
Genesis41:16 Alöggi Yosep kinni, “Pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi yɑn wuö, de Jwøk rɑ̈dh ónyudhe.”" 
Genesis41:17 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yosep yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi yɑ cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi Kiir." 
Genesis41:18 Kɑ dhög ɑ́bïryew mø cwiy, dëlli gen lwiy, bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì nɑm. Kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø’ lum kì gɑ̈d." 
Genesis41:19 Kɑ dhög ɑ́bïryew møøgø mø gwɑ̈lø gwɑ̈lø ólunyø bëën wɑ̈g kì nɑm. Bong dhög mɑ ɑ́lidh yi yɑn ge gwɑ̈lø ni gen kì Rïp keny! 
Genesis41:20 Kɑ dhög-ɑ cwiy gɑ ɑ́bïryew mø tyeli mɑl, cɑm yi dhög-ɑ gwɑ̈lø." 
Genesis41:21 De bong ngɑn cuggi ngïjø kinni dhög-ɑ cwiy ɑ́cɑm-ɑ yi gen, mɑ́ ge nudd ge gwɑ̈lø ceth. Kɑ yɑ ócyëwø." 
Genesis41:22 Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑ møg-ɑ kyeelø, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ byëlø, wïje dɑ wɑ̈thi byel ɑ́bïryew, byell-ɑ wïje myëër cɑrø, o nyingi gen gïïr." 
Genesis41:23 Kɑ byel ɑ́bïryew møøgø otwïyø kì buti gen, welli gen lewø lewø, ge órɑ̈bø yi mel." 
Genesis41:24 Kɑ wɑ̈thi byell-ɑ døj mwøøny yi møg-ɑ rijjø. Ájwöggì ɑ́köbbɑ lɑ̈ggɑni, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen.”" 
Genesis41:25 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Yosep kinni, “Lɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh wɑng-ɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel. Rɑ̈dh ɑ köbbi yi Jwøk ki gïn-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø." 
Genesis41:26 Dhög ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ døj bɑ runn ɑ́bïryew. O wɑ̈thi byel ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ døj bɑ runn ɑ́bïryew. Bɑ lɑ̈g ɑ́kyel. 
Genesis41:27 Dhög-ɑ gwɑ̈lø gɑ ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì cyɑ̈n, bɑ runn ɑ́bïryew, geki wɑ̈thi byel ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ lewø. Ge bɑ runni kɑ̈j ɑ́bïryew." 
Genesis41:28 Nɑ kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ rɑ̈dh ceth. Jwøk nyudh-ɑ rɑ̈dh ki gïn-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø. 
Genesis41:29 Runn ɑ́bïryew mø yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø obëënø. Rïp óyɑ̈ng bëne. 
Genesis41:30 Bɑng gen óbëën yi runn ɑ́bïryew mø kɑ̈j. Kɑ yɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ji ge yɑ̈ngø kì piny Rïp bëne owïlø. Mɑ́ Rïp órënyi yi kɑ̈j bëne. 
Genesis41:31 Kɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́ying yij pödhø ówïl kì wɑ̈thi ji, mɑ́ kɑ̈ny-ɑ óbï kì bɑnge óbëëd e teg ki mendwøng." 
Genesis41:32 Gïn-ɑ pere jøli lɑ̈ggɑni tyel ɑ́ryew, bɑ kinni, Jwøk møgɑni gwøge’ gwøgø ceth kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh." 
Genesis41:33 “Anɑn yɑ̈ɑ̈b rɑ̈dh ki dhɑnhø me døj, o wïje pel, kɑ gø cïbe kömi pödhø bëne." 
Genesis41:34 Kɑ rɑ̈dh kɑ̈bbe thyew ki ji-ɑ ónenni gwøngɑni kì yij pödhø bëne, kì yethi runni yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø gɑ ɑ́bïryew." 
Genesis41:35 Kɑ byel nyi pɑ̈ngi gɑ bud ɑ́bïj, o budø ɑ́kyel nyi cïb piny kì yethi runni yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø gɑ ɑ́bïryew. Köbbí gen o byel cøng yi gen kì yethi runn-ɑ døj bënn, ki nyingi rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis41:36 Kɑ byellɑni kor yi gen kidøøj. Mïdhi byellɑni gɑ møg-ɑ óyieel ji kì yethi runni kɑ̈j, o Rïp cöge, e pɑ nɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j.”" 
Genesis41:37 Kɑ kwøbbi Yosep pwøj yi rɑ̈dh geki jɑggi bure. 
Genesis41:38 Kɑ jɑggɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óyod yi wɑ, me lod Yosep, ngɑn-ɑ ree di wëyi Jwøk.”" 
Genesis41:39 Kɑ Yosep köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Mɑ́ e bɑ yïn ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yi Jwøk ki møgɑni bënn, menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni bɑ yïn ɑ wïjí pel, o yijí dɑ rummì kibøli ji bënn." 
Genesis41:40 Pödhɑ bëne cïbɑ’ cingí. O jiɑ bënn ólïng-ɑ kwøbbí, bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óying mɑl kibølí den-ɑ́ yɑn, yɑ ketɑ.”" 
Genesis41:41 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yosep yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Anɑn yï rønyɑ’ rønyø yïn ɑ́ jɑgø kì kömi Rïp bëne.”" 
Genesis41:42 Kɑ gwelø men-ɑ köme ógweed nyingi rɑ̈dh kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì lwede, kɑ gø bødhe lwedi Yosep. Aruuge gøn ki ógødh men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm. Kɑ yedhe lunyi ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb." 
Genesis41:43 Kɑ mëggi ryeew yɑ̈thi gøl rɑ̈dh, møg-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì, o kɑ̈lli kì yij yɑ̈yɑni bøle orïngø yi ɑlɑthkerr, ge óryeerø kinni, “Wëggu yöö! Wëggu yöö! Rum wun cøngi wun piny kì bøle!” Kinøw, Yosep ɑ́røny ɑ́ jɑngi Rïp bëne." 
Genesis41:44 Kɑ Yosep köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ bene rɑ̈dh, o bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ódi gïn gwøge kì Rïp bëne, yï kwïj wøw.”" 
Genesis41:45 Kɑ Yosep cɑge ɑ́ Dhɑpenɑdh Pɑniyɑ̀. Kɑ gø nënge ki dhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Asenɑth nyɑɑr jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Pøtiperɑ̀ ókwëri On. Kɑ Yosep pere lïngi kì yij Rïp bëne. 
Genesis41:46 Yosep runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈ge’ göggi rɑ̈dh, ɑkedhe e owïïnø kì yij Rïp bëne." 
Genesis41:47 Byel ɑ́cyeg kidyër kì yethi runni yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø gɑ ɑ́bïryew, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yosep ceth." 
Genesis41:48 Kɑ byel congi kì yethi myërri Rïp bënn kì yethi runni yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø gɑ ɑ́bïryew. 
Genesis41:49 Byel ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr cɑrø ki mendwøng. Kɑ Yosep ówïyø rømi gen, mɑ́ byëlø nɑ tør." 
Genesis41:50 Kɑ Yosep nyöddi ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew yi Asenɑth, kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd runni kɑ̈j nuti bëënø." 
Genesis41:51 Kɑ wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ kɑyø cɑge ɑ́ Mɑnɑsè, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøk wïjɑ ɑ́wëgge wïlø ki orɑngɑ, geki gøl wïyɑ bëne.”" 
Genesis41:52 Acɑge ryeew wɑ̈dde ɑ́ Eprɑim, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøk yɑ ɑ́nënge ki nywøl yɑn ɑ́ wëdh.”" 
Genesis41:53 Kɑ runni yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø gɑ ɑ́bïryew, møg-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́bëëd tyëng Rïp ge yɑ̈ngø, óthumø." 
Genesis41:54 Kɑ runni kɑ̈j møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Yosep gɑ ɑ́bïryew ócɑ̈gø bëënø. Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́bëëd yethi gen dɑ kɑ̈j, de ɑ́dɑ gïncɑm kì yij Rïp bëne." 
Genesis41:55 Keny-ɑ ɑ́tëngi kɑ̈j, kɑ ji ywøøg-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh kipe gïncɑm. Kɑ tyëng Rïp bënn köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedhu yï Yosep. Kɑ gïn-ɑ ókwøb yi en gwøg wun ceth.”" 
Genesis41:56 Kɑ kɑ̈j ótëngø ki mendwøng kì yij pödhø bëne, ɑyieeb kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi byel yi Yosep. Kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki ngëwwi tyëng Rïp bënn." 
Genesis41:57 Kɑ kömi piny bëne bï-ɑ Rïp yï Yosep be ngyew ki byel, mɑ́ piny bëne ɑ́mɑg yi kɑ̈j me teeg."
