Genesis42:1 Kɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e teeg cɑrø kì Kɑnɑɑn, e Yɑgob wïyi Yosep nudd e onëënø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Yɑgob kinni dɑ byel kì Rïp, ɑköbbe wɑ̈dde kinni, “Wude ɑ pɑ nyɑg wun ri wun?" 
Genesis42:2 Yɑ olïngø i dɑ byel kì Rïp. Kedhu kunɑni, kɑ wu ngëëw wun ki byel kipe wɑ óywɑj yi kɑ̈j.”" 
Genesis42:3 Codhe, ɑkedh nyiiwï Yosep gɑ pyɑ̈rø, be ngyew ki byel kì Rïp." 
Genesis42:4 De Ben Yɑmïn ómï Yosep, ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n kedhø yi wïyi gen, mɑ́ e ɑ́bwøg kinni nyelthinh ódi gïn-ɑ ókedhi ree." 
Genesis42:5 Wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob ɑ́bï Rïp, geki ji møøgø be ngyew ki byel, mɑ́ kɑ̈j teeg kì piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis42:6 Yosep jɑngi Rïp, en ɑ yïe nyi kedhi yi tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l pödhhi kömi piny bënn, o yïëye kinni thödhi gen ki byel. Kɑ nyiiwï Yosep kedh-ɑ yïe. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny kì bøle, gïti kɑ ɑ́nywɑ̈ddi wɑ̈thi gen ki piny." 
Genesis42:7 Yosep keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe nyiiwɑ̈n, gï ɑ́ngije ceth, de ree nuti nyudh en gïn. Kɑ gï pyëje ki cwɑg mø teeg kinni, “Wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kɑnɑɑn. Wø ɑ́bï-ɑ be ngyew ki byel.”" 
Genesis42:8 Yosep nuti pɑ̈nyø’ ngijø yi gen, ngö ge ɑ́ngij yi Yosep." 
Genesis42:9 Kɑ lɑ̈gg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ge kɑ̈ge dööng pɑɑre. Kɑ nyiiwɑ̈n köbbe kinni, “Wu bɑ yïthhi piny. Wu ɑ́bï-ɑ be lidhi tung-ɑ nyødh pödhø.”" 
Genesis42:10 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Pɑth wuö! Bɑ̈nggí yɑb-ɑ gïncɑm yøw." 
Genesis42:11 Wø bɑ nyiimëëg bënn, wø pɑth ki yïthhi piny wuö, wø bɑ ji mø døøj.”" 
Genesis42:12 Aköbbi gen yi Yosep kinni, “Pɑth, wu ɑ́bï-ɑ be lidhi tung-ɑ nyødh pödhi wøn, o liny tëër wun.”" 
Genesis42:13 Akööb gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́bëëd wø bɑ nyiimëëg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, wøn ɑ́ wɑ̈ddi jɑl ɑ́kyel, ómï wøn ɑ́kyel ɑ́thøw. O nyel-ɑ thinh ɑ́döngi pɑc geki wïyi wøn.”" 
Genesis42:14 Kɑ Yosep okööbø kinni, “Nɑ kɑ ɑ́kööbɑ ceth! Wu bɑ yïthhi piny." 
Genesis42:15 Wu órɑng kinni, yɑ ɑ́köngi ki nyingi rɑ̈dh kinni, wu pɑ kedh ɑnɑn, den-ɑ́ keny-ɑ óbëën ómï wun nyel-ɑ thinh keny, ɑ ókedh wun." 
Genesis42:16 Wiy dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun kedhe be dwɑɑyii. Tyëng-ɑ döng ókor gïti keny-ɑ óyood kwøbbi wun kinni ge bɑ dyër, o ke pɑth gen ki dyër, rɑ̈dh ɑ kwömø, wu bɑ yïthhi piny.”" 
Genesis42:17 Kɑ gï mɑge ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Genesis42:18 Kɑ ge cwööl wɑ̈g yi Yosep kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Yɑ bɑ dhɑnhø me böggi Jwøk. Wu pɑ nɑ̈g keløg kwøbbi wun bɑ dyër. Wu ówiy yi yɑn kɑ per gïjø ɑ́kyel." 
Genesis42:19 Kipe nyodhi kinni wu bɑ ji mø døøj, ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun óbëëdø kì ød mɑg keny-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi wun, kɑ møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn kedhi gen be kɑ̈li byel, o ge yiel gen kɑ̈lli wun møg-ɑ ywɑj yi kɑ̈j." 
Genesis42:20 De muuj wun ómï wun nyel-ɑ thinh yɑn ceth, bene keny-ɑ óyïëyɑ kinni wu kømm-ɑ dyër, o wu cög wun wu pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn.” Kɑ ge oyïëyø." 
Genesis42:21 Kɑ ge okööbø kì ri gen keti gen kinni, “Ngee, ɑnɑn wɑ rɑng ɑ bɑng gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́göggi ómïee yi wɑ, cɑni wɑnge ɑ́lidh yi wɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjje wɑ kinni wiy, de wɑ nuti lïngø. Bene ɑ bɑnge pɑ̈dhi yi wɑ yij orɑng men ɑnɑn. Wɑ ɑ́cyen yi ómïee.”" 
Genesis42:22 Kɑ Ruben okööbø kinni, “Wu ɑ́köbbɑ kinni nyelthinh ko nywɑl, de wu ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngø! Anɑn cyënni nyelthinh ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömee.”" 
Genesis42:23 Kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi gen olïngø yi Yosep bënn, de kwïj yi gen kinni ge di lïngø yi en, mɑ́ ge 'kööb-ɑ dhøg gen, o kwøbb-ɑ kwøb yi gen nyi løg-ɑ yi dhumi. O Yosep 'kööb-ɑ dhøg tyëng Rïp." 
Genesis42:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Yosep kinni bɑ men ywöngi kì bøli gen, ɑkedhe wɑ̈ye kun ywönge, e pɑ nenni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg opɑ̈we piny, ɑdwööge yï gen. Akwɑnye Cimeøn kɑ ɑlɑthkerr köbbe kinni, “Twöj wun cingge.” Kɑ cingge twöj kì bøli gen." 
Genesis42:25 Kɑ jɑngi jøgwøg köbbi yi Yosep kinni, “Pɑ̈ng wun jɑmmi gen ki byel, kɑ ge thödhi ki gïn cɑɑm gen yöö.” Kɑ møgɑni órumø ki gwøgø." 
Genesis42:26 Kɑ nyiimëëgɑni jɑmmi gen cïb gen kömi ɑderri gen. Kɑ ge ókedhø. 
Genesis42:27 Kɑ nyel ɑ́kyel dhø kidhe pɑ̈de kipe kinni o thödhe ɑdere ki byel kì keny-ɑ ɑ́nïni yi gen kì kö yöö. Kɑ ngyënye yode kì wɑ̈thi byel. 
Genesis42:28 Kɑ óryeerø kinni, “Ngyënyyɑ ódöggi yɑn. Gen ɑ yij kidhø èn.” Kɑ dëlli gen ójuurø, kɑ ge okööbø ge óböggø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggi wɑ yi Jwøk ni men?”" 
Genesis42:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen yï wïyi gen kì Kɑnɑɑn, ɑlwøb gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn kinni," 
Genesis42:30 “Jɑngi Rïp ɑ́kööb ki wøn ki kwøb mø rijjø, kɑ wø myene kinni i wø bɑ yïthhi piny møg lyewwi pödhe." 
Genesis42:31 De wø ɑ́kyëëd kinni wø pɑth ki yïthhi piny, wø bɑ ji mø døøj." 
Genesis42:32 Wø ɑ́bëëd wø bɑ nyiimëëg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, wɑ̈ddi jɑl ɑ́kyel.”" 
Genesis42:33 Kɑ jɑlɑni ólöggø kinni, “Bene yuu-ɑ óyodɑ wun èn, keløg wu bɑ ji mø døøj kidyër, ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun ódöng kì butɑ keny. Møgɑk bënn ókedhi be muuji byel kɑ̈lli wun møg-ɑ ywɑj yi kɑ̈j." 
Genesis42:34 Muuju yɑn ómï wun nyel-ɑ thinh. Bene keny-ɑ óyodɑ kinni wu pɑth ki yïthhi piny, de wu bɑ tyëngdøj. Ómï wun ódöggɑ wun, kɑ wu wiy o wu nyi ngëëw wun kì pönhï.”" 
Genesis42:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kuny byel wɑ̈g kì yethi kidhhì, ɑyood ngyënyyi gen bënn, kɑ ge obwøgø geki wïyi gen bënn, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen ngyëny." 
Genesis42:36 Aköbbi gen yi wïyi gen kinni, “Wu dwɑdd-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi nyigɑ bënn? Yosep ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, Cimeøn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, o ɑnɑn wu dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈li Ben Yɑmïn? Yɑ bɑ men nɑ̈g yi ywøg!”" 
Genesis42:37 Kɑ Ruben wïye köbbe kinni, “Keløg Ben Yɑmïn pɑ döggɑ yïn, wɑ̈ddɑ gɑ ɑ́ryew ócuggø nɑ̈gø yi yïn. Cïb cingɑ, ódwöög yi yɑn.”" 
Genesis42:38 De Yɑgob ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ pɑ kedh ki wun. Ómen ɑ́thøw, o bɑ e kete ɑ ɑ́döng. O keløg e dɑ gïn kedhi ree kì yuu-ɑ kïdhu en, yɑ bɑ yu ni men, yɑ ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi rummì ki gööj wun.”" 
Genesis43:1 Kɑ̈j ɑ́tëngi ki mendwøng kì Kɑnɑɑn. 
Genesis43:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi byel møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Rïp kì gøl Yɑgob, kɑ Yɑgob wɑ̈dde köbbe kinni, “Døøg wun be ngëwø ki byel møg cɑm yi wɑ.”" 
Genesis43:3 Aköbbii yi Yeudɑ̀ kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́kyëëd ki menteg kinni, i wø koo wɑ̈dhi bøle, keløg ómï wøn pɑ kɑ̈l." 
Genesis43:4 Keløg e oörø yi yïn, wø ókedhi be ngëwwi yïn ki byel." 
Genesis43:5 De ke pɑ dwɑddií, wø pɑ kedh, mɑ́ jɑlɑni ɑ́kööb kinni i wø ko wɑ̈dhi bute, ke pɑ kɑ̈l wøn nyelthinh.”" 
Genesis43:6 Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Yɑde ɑ muuju yɑn ki göj? Ede ɑ ɑ́köbbu en kinni dɑ ómï wun megø?”" 
Genesis43:7 Alöggi gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni ɑ́pëggi be pyënyi wøn ki bëëdi gøl wøn kinni, ‘Wïyi wun nudd e onëënø? Dɑ ómï wun megø?’ O pyëjje ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ løøgø ceth. Di bëëd e ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kidï kinni ókööbø i kɑ̈ɑ̈l ómï wøn?”" 
Genesis43:8 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ wïye köbbe kinni, “Ör nyelthinh ki wøn, o wø jwɑn wøn dhwödhø. O cöge e bong ngɑn thøw yi kɑ̈j." 
Genesis43:9 Wëyɑ ómuujɑ kipe nyelthinh, ke di gïn cwöb. Yɑ ócungi kì kömi dhøgɑ ceth. Ke pɑ döggɑ en yïn ki tɑrø, kɑ yï ywøøg riɑ." 
Genesis43:10 Lidh, keløg wɑ pɑ di bëëd ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, ti wø rum kɑ̈nø ki byel tyel ɑ́ryew ɑnɑn.”" 
Genesis43:11 Akööb wïyi gen kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, muuj wun jɑlɑni ki jɑmmì møg pwøj wun en, yɑ̈bbu en ki nywøli oløg møg thwøwø, kí nyɑ møøw kïc, kí tugø geki benø, kí jɑmm-ɑ nyi kïdhi ri mulø." 
Genesis43:12 Kɑ ngyënyyi tyeli mɑl dwøøg wun. Kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈d wun ki møg ni gen, mɑ́ wɑ kwïj wøw ki gïn-ɑ bɑ̈jjø." 
Genesis43:13 Kɑ̈l wun ómï wun, dhwödh wun ɑnɑn ceth." 
Genesis43:14 Jɑlɑni pyëwe ódwöög yi Jwøk Áyïmø, kɑ pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki wun, kɑ wu dögge Ben Yɑmïn, geki ómï wun nyel-ɑ kyeelø. Keløg ɑ́ perɑ yøw, cɑgg nyigɑ thumi, ɑ́ ngø ɑ gwøgɑ?”" 
Genesis43:15 Codhe, kɑ nyiimëëgɑni jɑmmi gen kwɑny gen, ɑ løg ngyënyyi tyeli mɑl, kí møg-ɑ kïdhi be ngyew, kí jɑmmi pwøj møg-ɑ muuj. Akedh gen geki Ben Yɑmïn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Rïp, ɑkïdhi gen bøli Yosep." 
Genesis43:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Ben Yɑmïn kì kelli gen yi Yosep, ɑköbbe bɑ̈ng-ɑ mïdhi gøle kinni, “Kïdhí jøg gølɑ. Ge ócyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ kej ɑ́kyel ki yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Köbbí jɑlthɑl kinni tɑ̈ɑ̈de ki rïngø me gïïr. Yɑ óbï kì dicɑ̈ng.”" 
Genesis43:17 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l gen yi jɑlɑni. Kɑ jɑlthɑl köbbe møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yosep. 
Genesis43:18 Ge ɑ́kïdhi kɑl ge óböggø, ge okööbø ki pëthi gen kinni, “Wɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ per ngyëny møg-ɑ ɑ́døøg kì yethi kidhhee cyɑ̈ng-ɑcɑ̀. Ge bɑ møg-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömee, kɑ ɑderree kwɑny gen. Kɑ wɑ gwøøg bɑ̈ngg yi jɑlɑni.”" 
Genesis43:19 Kì ɑ́dyëddi kɑl, ɑköbbi gen jɑl-ɑ kɑ̈lli gen kinni," 
Genesis43:20 “Lïng jɑldwøng, wø ɑ́kwöngi ki bëën be ngyew ki gïncɑm cyɑ̈ng-ɑcinee." 
Genesis43:21 Kɑ kidhhi wøn yieb wøn kì kö yöö keny-ɑ ɑ́nïni yi wøn, kɑ ngɑɑn ngyënyye yode kì wɑ̈thi byelle; gen ceth ki kwɑnni gen, bong gïn tøøk kinni tek. Ngyënyyɑni ɑ́dwöög yi wøn." 
Genesis43:22 Wø ɑ́kɑ̈ni thyew ki ngyëny møg-ɑ óngëëw yi wøn ki gïncɑm. Ngɑn-ɑ dwøøg ngyënyyi wøn yethi kidhhì, kwïj yi wøn.”" 
Genesis43:23 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni okööbø kinni, “Pëthi wun ko lïngi. Wu ko böggi. Jwøøg wun, jwøøg gøl wun, óbëëd ɑ́ en ɑ dwøøg ngyënyyi wun yethi kidhhi wun. Ngyënyyi wun ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi yɑn.” Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le Cimeøn yï gen." 
Genesis43:24 Akïdhi nyiimëëgɑni ød yi bɑ̈ngɑni. Kɑ ge muuj ki pï møg lwøg gen tyelli gen. Kɑ ɑderri gen thödhi ki gïjø me cɑm yi gen. 
Genesis43:25 Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj gen Yosep, mɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki pyëlø, o gï ómëggii keny-ɑ óbëëne kì dicɑ̈ng, mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki köbbø kinni ge ócyɑ̈mø kɑ en." 
Genesis43:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Yosep kɑl, ɑkïdhi gen jɑmmɑni ød yïe. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny ki mendwøng kì bøle." 
Genesis43:27 Apyëje gïn mɑ yöd dëlli gen. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi wun i dɑ wïyi wun me bɑ yu, bëëd ɑ dï? Nudd e onëënø, o dële yööd?”" 
Genesis43:28 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí; wïyi wøn, nudd e onëënø.” Kɑ cøngi gen rum gen piny, ɑkuul gen wɑ̈thi gen piny kì bøle." 
Genesis43:29 Kɑ Yosep lïïdh-ɑ yï Ben Yɑmïn ɑkööbe kinni, “O nyel, bene en ómï wun, nyelthinh men-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wun? Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk nyɑrɑ.”" 
Genesis43:30 Kɑ Yosep ree gwɑre kì buti gen, kɑ jwɑn-ɑ øde be ywøg, mɑ́ yije ɑ́røy kɑ̀ nenne nyiimen. Kɑ óywöngø yi medi pyëwe." 
Genesis43:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume ywøg, ɑlwøge nyinge, kɑ dwöög-ɑ keny-ɑ di gen. Acwøle gïncɑm." 
Genesis43:32 Yosep ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ wïj pɑ̈me kì wɑ̈ye, o nyiimen ying-ɑ wïj pɑ̈m-ɑ kyeelø. Tyëng Rïp møg-ɑ ɑ́ying ød ɑ́nëng ɑ wɑ̈yi gen, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑkerø, ge pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø geki tyëng løøg nɑm." 
Genesis43:33 Nyiimëëgɑni, pɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ɑ́cïb e rwöm ki Yosep. Kɑ yɑɑgɑni cïb ge ówɑdø ki kö pɑ̈m, cɑg kì ri nyel-ɑ dwøng gïti ri nyel-ɑ thinh kì cyɑ̈n. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen pyël-ɑ ópyëël gen, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø yi møgɑni." 
Genesis43:34 Gïncɑm ɑ́ying-ɑ kömi pɑ̈m-ɑ di Yosep, o nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l e ocïmmø kì bøli gen. Ben Yɑmïn bøle nyi cïb-ɑ gïncɑm me dwøng kibøli mø yɑɑg-ɑ kyeelø. Ge ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø geki Yosep gïti kɑ ɑ́wïïn wɑ̈thi gen yi møgi oløg." 
Genesis44:1 Yosep jɑngi jøgwøg ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Kïdhí yethi jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jøgɑni ki byel møg-ɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø ki tyëddø yi ɑderri gen. Kɑ ngyënyyi gen cïb wɑ̈thi byel." 
Genesis44:2 Kɑ óthɑ̈ngɑ, óthɑ̈ng-ɑ bɑ ɑ́tegø kïdhí yij kidhi nyel-ɑ thinh geki ngyëny møge.” Kɑ møgɑni gwøg ni kɑ ɑ́kwøøb gen yi Yosep." 
Genesis44:3 Kì mwøl ceth, ɑwiy nyiimëëgɑni kedh gen ki ɑderri gen." 
Genesis44:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑl gen lɑ̈wø ki kɑɑldwøng, kɑ Yosep bɑ̈ng-ɑ mïdhi gøle köbbe kinni, “Rengí bɑng jøgɑni, opïïd gen kɑ ge pyëëj kinni, ‘Wude ɑ col wun gïndøj ki gïnrɑj?" 
Genesis44:5 Á kipe ngø ɑ kwɑl wun óthɑ̈ngi ɑ́tegø mi wɑ̈ɑ? Bene gøn ɑ yije nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi en. En ɑ bɑ mi kwër kì yïe. Wu ɑ́göög ki orøg! Wu ócɑy ki cɑ́y mø døngø.’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pïïd gen yi bɑ̈ngɑni, ɑkwøbe møgɑni." 
Genesis44:7 Alöggi gen kinni, “Yï kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki kwøbb-ɑ ni møg? Yï wɑng-ɑ ngø jɑldwøng? Yïde ɑ kööb kinøw? Wø ceg-ɑ köngø kinni wø nuti göögø ki gïn ni menɑni." 
Genesis44:8 Yï ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́yod yi wøn kì wɑ̈thi byel ɑ́dögi wun yi wøn, ge ɑ́dwöög yi wøn kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Dɑ́ per ngø cyee, ɑ kwɑ̈ddi wøn ki ɑ́tegø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑɑb gøl wöw?" 
Genesis44:9 Lïng jɑldwøng, ngɑn-ɑ yïe óyoodií kì kelli wøn, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø, o møg-ɑ kyeelø göög gen gɑ bɑ̈nggi wun.”" 
Genesis44:10 Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïëy, de bɑ ngɑn-ɑ yïe óyodɑ óthɑ̈gi, ɑ ókwɑny yi yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈ngɑ. Møg-ɑ kyeelø pɑ mɑg.”" 
Genesis44:11 Codhe, kɑ jɑmmi gen jwɑn gen ki tïng piny kì kömi ɑderr. Kɑ dhøggi kidhhi gen jwɑn gen ki pɑ̈dø." 
Genesis44:12 Kɑ bɑ̈ng Yosep ócɑ̈gø ki yɑb mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Ácɑ̈gi kɑ jɑmmi nyel-ɑ dwøng gïti ri jɑmmi nyel-ɑ thinh. Kɑ óthɑ̈gi yode kì yij kidhi Ben Yɑmïn. 
Genesis44:13 Kɑ nyiimëëgɑni obwøgø ki mendwøng, kɑ ógudhi gen pyëëd gen yi rɑ̈ji pëthi gen. Adwøøg gen jɑmmi gen kömi ɑderr, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ kɑɑldwøng." 
Genesis44:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Yeudɑ̀ gøl Yosep geki nyiimen, Yosep ɑ́yuud yi gen e nudd e ying-ɑ kɑl. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny kì bøle." 
Genesis44:15 Kɑ Yosep okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ kwɑl wun óthɑ̈ngɑ? Kwïj yi wun kinni yïɑ dɑ tegø men yodɑ jɑmm-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn?”" 
Genesis44:16 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ kwøb yi wøn wuö? Wø ópëm ɑ dï? Ri wøn óyiel yi wøn kidï? Bɑ̈jji wøn ɑ́nyodh yi Jwøk. Wø bɑ bɑ̈nggí bënn, pɑth ki nyel-ɑ́ yïe ɑ́yood óthɑ̈gi kete.”" 
Genesis44:17 Yosep ɑ́kööb kinni, “Pöy! Pɑ cuggi, yɑ pɑ dwɑddi wun wu bënn! Ngɑn-ɑ yïe ɑ́yood óthɑ̈gi kete, en ɑ mɑg yi yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈ng.”" 
Genesis44:18 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ kɑl-ɑ nyegi buti Yosep, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn wuö, wiy yɑ kwøbɑ møg-ɑ pyëwɑ. Pyëwí ko rënyi ki yɑn, yï pɑ̈r ki rɑ̈dh ceth." 
Genesis44:19 Wuö, wø ɑ́pyëj yi yïn cøn, kinni, dɑ wïyi wun wɑlɑ̀ ómï wun megø?" 
Genesis44:20 Kɑ wø okööbø kinni, wïyi wøn nud de bɑ yu, ki ómï wøn me thiinh, ɑ́nywøl e wïyi wøn rum yöø. Ómï nyelɑni ɑ́thøw, o bɑ e kete ɑ nud kì yij meye. Mɑɑr yi wïye ki mendwøng." 
Genesis44:21 Kɑ wø köbbí wuö kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun en keny o lidhɑ.’" 
Genesis44:22 Alöggi wøn kinni, ‘Nyelthinh wïye pɑ cuggi wiyø yi en, ke wiye gøn, bɑ men thøw.’" 
Genesis44:23 Kɑ yï okööbø kinni, ‘Wu pɑ wɑ̈nhi bølɑ këti, keløg nyelthinh pɑ bï ki wun.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg wøn yï wïyi wøn, kɑ löbbi wøn møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn." 
Genesis44:25 Codhe, keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi byel, ɑköbbe wøn i dwɑ̈nni wøn ki byel." 
Genesis44:26 Akööb wøn kinni, ‘Wø pɑ kedh, kipe wø pɑ cuggi yïëyø o wø kedhi wøn bøli jɑlɑni, keløg ómï wøn nyelthinh pɑ kedh thyew.’" 
Genesis44:27 Kɑ wïyi wøn okööbø kinni, ‘Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni cyëgɑ Rɑceel, yɑ ɑ́nyölle’ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew keti gen." 
Genesis44:28 Yɑ ɑ́rum ki wiy piny yi ɑ́kyel, ɑ́cɑm yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l, mɑ́ e nuti liidh yɑn kër-ɑ ɑ́kedhe." 
Genesis44:29 Keløg men okɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi wun ɑnɑn, kɑ dɑ gïn kedhi ree, yɑ bɑ yu ni men, yɑ ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi rummì.”" 
Genesis44:30 Kɑ Yeudɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Anɑn wuö, ke døøgɑ yï wïyɑ, kɑ nyelthinh odöngø, wïyɑ ceg-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈gø thøø keny-ɑ ólidhe nyelthinh e tøøk kì kelli wøn, mɑ́ wëye ɑ́cïbe kömi nyelthinh, o ɑ́nyönhi yi döng ki nyönhø me cugge’ nɑ̈gø yi rummì." 
Genesis44:31  
Genesis44:32 Reb ki kinni yɑ ɑ́böyi kinni wëyɑ ómuujɑ kipe nyelthinh ke di gïn cwöb, wïyɑ ɑ́köbbɑ kinni, ‘Keløg nyelthinh pɑ döggɑ yïn ki tɑrø, kɑ yï ywøøg riɑ.’" 
Genesis44:33 Anɑn wuö, yɑ óbëëdø kì keny yɑn ɑ́ kej nyelthinh, kɑ wiy kedhe yï wïye geki nyiimen." 
Genesis44:34 Yɑ ókedhi yï wïyɑ kidï, keløg nyelthinh pɑ døg? Pyëwɑ pɑ løg me med ki bëëni gïnrɑj ni men kömi wïyɑ!”" 
Genesis45:1 Kɑ Yosep pyëwe ónyönhø ki mendwøng keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kwøbbi Yeudɑ̀, kɑ gø yode kinni bɑ men ywöngi, o nuti dwɑddø yi en kinni o lidh yi tyëng Rïp e óywöngø. Aköbbe bɑ̈ng-ɑ mïdhi gøle kinni, “Kedhu wɑ̈g bënn, kɑ yɑ wiy wun wøki wëll møg.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́döng gen keti gen, kɑ Yosep ree köbbe nyiimen, e 'kööb-ɑ dhøg gen." 
Genesis45:2 Aywönge kɑ genge lïngi yi tyëng Rïp kì wɑ̈g, kɑ wöödø wɑ̈dh-ɑ gøldwøng." 
Genesis45:3 Yosep nyiimen ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Bene yɑn Yosep. Wïyee nudd e onëënø?” De keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi nyiiwɑ̈n, ge ɑ́ceg bwøgø ki mendwøng, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø löggø." 
Genesis45:4 Aköbbi gen yi Yosep kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, kɑlu nyïngi keny.” Kɑ ge nyeg-ɑ bute. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Bene yɑn Yosep, ómï wun, nyel-ɑ ɑ́ngëwwu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii Rïp." 
Genesis45:5 Anɑn pëthi wun ko rɑ̈ɑ̈m. Ri wun ko cɑyyi wun kipe kɑ ɑ́ngeew wun yɑn. Bɑ Jwøk kidyër ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn bøli wun be yieli ji. 
Genesis45:6 Men bɑ ryeew runni kɑ̈j kì pönhï, runn ɑ́bïj møøgø nudd ge obëënø, runn-ɑ óbong byel møg-ɑ ócyeg kì yethi gen." 
Genesis45:7 Yɑ ɑ́ör bøli wun yi Jwøk ki yuu-ɑ dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wɑ̈thee èn, kɑ per kinni o wu bødh wun, wuki nyigi wun." 
Genesis45:8 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, pɑth ki wun, de bɑ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn pönhï. Kɑ yɑ cïbe mɑl kibøli jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh bënn, bene yɑn jɑngi Rïp bëne." 
Genesis45:9 “Anɑn jwɑni wun yï wïyɑ, kɑ köbbu kinni, bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wɑ̈dí Yosep ek: ɑ́kööb kinni: ‘Jwøk yɑ ɑ́gwøge yɑn ɑ́ jɑngi Rïp bëne; jwɑn bëën yïɑ, yï ko cwööng." 
Genesis45:10 Wu ócuggø bëëdø kì myërri Göcen, keny-ɑ cuggi wun ki bëëdø wu cyɑ̈gi ki yɑn, wuki nyigí, kí kwɑrrí, kí dyëgi wun, kí dhögi wun, kí jɑmmi wun møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
Genesis45:11 Keny-ɑ óying wun Göcen, wu ócuggø korø yi yɑn. Nudd e dɑ runn ɑ́bïj mø kɑ̈j, o yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni o wu thøw wun yi kɑ̈j, wuki kɑ̈lli wun kí dhögi wun bënn.’ ”" 
Genesis45:12 Kɑ Yosep okööbø kinni, “Anɑn wu bënn, kí yïn thyew Ben Yɑmïn, ɑ́lidh yi wun kinni yɑ bɑ Yosep." 
Genesis45:13 Köbbu wïyɑ, kinni ɑ́ tegø me ni ngø ɑ yïɑ kì Rïp keny! Kɑ köbbu jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun bënn.”" 
Genesis45:14 Kɑ ómen Ben Yɑmïn dööbe kööre e óywöngø. Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́ywöngi thyew keny-ɑ ɑ́dööbii kɑ̈w yi ómen. 
Genesis45:15 Codhe, e pïi nyinge nuti pooj en, ɑcɑ̈ge ki döbbi nyiiwɑ̈n, kɑ gï nuume bënn. Codhe cyee, ɑcɑ̈gi nyiiwɑ̈n ki kwøb ki en." 
Genesis45:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi wöödø gøldwøng, kinni i nyiimï Yosep bëënø, kɑ rɑ̈dh pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng geki jøg-ɑ jɑgg." 
Genesis45:17 Kɑ Yosep köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Köbbí nyiimyëw cïb gen jɑmmi gen kömi ɑderr, kɑ ge døøg gen piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis45:18 Kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wïyi gen geki kɑ̈lli gen, kɑ ge dwöög gen keny. Ge ómëggɑ piny men-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì Rïp. O ge óyïddi ki gïgcɑmm mø gïïr." 
Genesis45:19 Köbbí gen kɑ̈ɑ̈d gen ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th møg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑ̈nni gen kí nyigi gen møg-ɑ thønhø kí wïyi gen. 
Genesis45:20 Pëthi gen ko lïngi kipe jɑmmi gen møg-ɑ ódhɑ̈li wɑ̈nhø, mɑ́ jɑmm-ɑ døj bënn kì Rïp óbëëdø gɑ mø gen.”" 
Genesis45:21 Wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob ɑ́göög ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen ceth. Ge ɑ́nëngi ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th yi Yosep ni kɑ ɑ́kööb rɑ̈dh, kɑ ge thödhi ki gïg cɑɑm gen yöö." 
Genesis45:22 Kɑ ge nëngi yi en ki ógudh møg-ɑ ówil gen ógudh-ɑ rug yi gen kì kö yöö. De Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́mëgge’ ógudh ɑ́bïj, kí ngyëny ɑ́tegg miy ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Genesis45:23 Kɑ wïye öde ki ɑderr pyɑ̈rø, møg pyëjji ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th, kömi gen dɑ jɑmm-ɑ døj mø Rïp. Kí pyɑ̈rø møøgø møg kömi gen di ɑ́bwög, kí ópùni ɑ́bwög, kí gïg møøgø møg-ɑ ócɑɑm yöö." 
Genesis45:24 Aöre nyiimen yöö, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu ko wër kì kö yöö.”" 
Genesis45:25 Kɑ ge odhwödhø kì Rïp, ge døøg-ɑ yï wïyi gen kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑl gen." 
Genesis45:26 Aköbbi gen wïyi gen kinni, “Yosep nudd e onëënø! En ɑ bɑ jɑngi Rïp bëne!” Kɑ Yɑgob ongɑ̈ngø, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø yïëyi kwøbbi gen." 
Genesis45:27 De keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbii kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Yosep bënn, kí kɑ ɑ́lidhe yɑ̈th-ɑ pyejji yi ɑderr møg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Yosep gɑ møg kïdhii Rïp, ɑdwöög pyëwe cyee." 
Genesis45:28 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ngøø, de wɑ̈dɑ Yosep nud e onëënø! Yɑ kedh-ɑ be lidhii kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti thøw yɑn.”" 
Genesis46:1 Isrɑil jɑmme ɑ́cønge bënn kɑ kedh-ɑ Bircebɑ̀. Kɑ Jwøøg wïye Isɑɑk mɑlle kì kunɑni, ɑngɑ̈ɑ̈de ki dhög gɑ gëdhhì." 
Genesis46:2 Aköbbi Isrɑil yi Jwøk kì yethi lɑ̈g kì wɑ̈r kinni, “Yɑgob, Yɑgob.” Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Yɑn èn.”" 
Genesis46:3 Akööb Jwøk kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Jwøøg wïyí, kedhí Rïp. Kwɑrrí ókuun yi yɑn kì kunɑni, kɑ ge ogöögø ki pödhø me dwøng." 
Genesis46:4 Wɑ ókedhi Rïp kyeel. Kwɑrrí ódwöögɑ piny men. Yosep óbëëd e ying-ɑ butí keny-ɑ óthøw.” 
Genesis46:5 Kɑ Yɑgob odhwödhø kì Bircebɑ̀, en, kí othønhø, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn. Ge ɑ́cïb yethi yɑ̈ɑ̈th møg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp gɑ møg-ɑ ókɑ̈l gen." 
Genesis46:6 Dhög kí dyëg, kí jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́lem yi gen kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, ɑ́kïdhi Rïp yi gen. Yɑgob ɑ́kedhi Rïp geki gøle bëne," 
Genesis46:7 Wɑ̈dde, kí kwɑrre, kí nyige møg-ɑ cwøw, kí kwɑrre møg-ɑ mɑ̈nn, ge ɑ́kedh bënn." 
Genesis46:8 Tyëng gøl Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Rïp ki en bɑ, wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ dwøng, ɑ løg Ruben," 
Genesis46:9 kí wɑ̈ddi Ruben, Aɑnök, Pɑlu, Ëdhrön kí Kɑrmì." 
Genesis46:10 Cimeøn kí wɑ̈dde, Yɑmuel, Yɑmïn, Oɑ̈ɑ̈d, Yɑkin, Dhoɑr, kí Cɑul wɑ̈d nyɑɑr Kɑnɑɑn." 
Genesis46:11 Leebì kí wɑ̈dde, Gercön, Kɑ̈ɑ̈th kí Merɑrì." 
Genesis46:12 Kí wɑ̈ddi Yeudɑ̀, Celɑ̀, Peredh kí Dherɑ̀. Wɑ̈ddi Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Er kí Onɑ̈n, ge ɑ́thøw kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Wɑ̈ddi Peredh bɑ Ëdhrön kí Amul." 
Genesis46:13 Kí wɑ̈ddi Isɑkɑr, Tölɑ̀, Puɑ̀, Yɑcub kí Cimrön." 
Genesis46:14 Kí wɑ̈ddi Dhebulun, Sered, Elön kí Yɑliil." 
Genesis46:15 Møgɑk bɑ wɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́nyölli Yɑgob yi Leɑ̀ kì Töör Arɑm, kɑ onywølø ki nyɑre thyew me cwøl ɑ́ Dïnɑ̀. Kwɑrri Yɑgob møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Leɑ̀, kwɑnni gen bënn bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g" 
Genesis46:16 Kí wɑ̈ddi Gɑd, Dhepön, Agì, Cunì, Idhbön, Erì, Aröd, kí Arelì." 
Genesis46:17 Kí wɑ̈ddi Aceer, Imnɑ̀, Icbɑ̀, Icbì, Beriyɑ̀ kí nyimï gen Serɑ̀. Wɑ̈ddi Beriyɑ̀ bɑ Keber kí Mɑlkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel møgɑk bɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Dhilpɑ̀, bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Lɑbɑn e nëng-ɑ nyɑre Leɑ̀." 
Genesis46:19 Wɑ̈ddi Rɑceel bɑ ɑ́ryew, Yosep kí Ben Yɑmïn." 
Genesis46:20 Kɑ Yosep nyöddi ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, Mɑnɑsè kí Eprɑim, yi Asenɑth nyɑɑr Pøtiperɑ̀, ókwëri On." 
Genesis46:21 Kí wɑ̈ddi Ben Yɑmïn bɑ Belɑ̀, Becer, Acbel, Gerɑ̀, Nɑɑmɑn, Ekì, Röc, Mupïm, Upïm kí Ard." 
Genesis46:22 Pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen møgɑk, bɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Rɑceel." 
Genesis46:23 Dɑn kí wɑ̈de Ucim. 
Genesis46:24 Kí wɑ̈ddi Nɑptɑlì, Yɑdhiil, Gunì, Yedher, kí Cilem." 
Genesis46:25 Ábïryew møgɑk bɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Bilɑ̀, bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Lɑbɑn e nëng-ɑ nyɑre Rɑceel." 
Genesis46:26 Kwɑnni møg-ɑ ceg bëëdø gɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob, møg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Rïp, bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel. Mɑ̈nni wɑ̈dde pɑth ki ɑkwɑn." 
Genesis46:27 Wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi Yosep kì Rïp. Gøl Yɑgob kɑ̀ rëbe bëne, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ggi gen Rïp, gwøg-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew." 
Genesis46:28 Kɑ Yɑgob Yeudɑ̀ öre bøle be cwøli Yosep, o bëe be yïddø ki gen keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen Göcen." 
Genesis46:29 Kɑ Yosep pëgg-ɑ yij yɑ̈ye men-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì. Kɑ kedh-ɑ Göcen be yïddø ki wïye. Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge ki wïye, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈re piny kì yij yɑ̈y, kɑ reng-ɑ yïe, kɑ cingge myeene mune, kɑ óywöngø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Genesis46:30 Kɑ Yɑgob Yosep köbbe kinni, “Cɑgg yɑ thøw ɑnɑn, pyëwɑ med kɑ ɑ́rumɑ ki lidhi yïn. Kɑ yod yi yɑn kinni yï nudd yï onëënø.”" 
Genesis46:31 Kɑ Yosep nyiimen geki gøl wïye bëne köbbe kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kedhø, o rɑ̈dh köbbi yi yɑn kinni, nyiimïɑ geki gøl wïyɑ bëne møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Kɑnɑɑn, ge ɑ́bï yïɑ bënn." 
Genesis46:32 Óköbbi yi yɑn kinni wu bɑ tyëngkwɑ̈yø, wu ɑ́bï wu kwøll-ɑ dhögi wun ki dyëgi wun." 
Genesis46:33 Keny-ɑ ócwøøl wun yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ wu pyëj yi en kinni gwøøg wun bɑ ngø?" 
Genesis46:34 Köbbu en ceth kinni gwøøg wøn bɑ kwɑ̈yø ki dyëg geki dhög kër-ɑ ɑ́pïïdh wøn, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd kweyyi wun ceth. Keløg e óköbbi yi wun kinøw, wu ówiy yi en, o wu bëëd wun kì Göcen.” Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi Yosep e ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni tyëng Rïp pɑ nyi dwɑddi bëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel ki tyëngkwɑ̈yø." 
Genesis47:1 Codhe, kɑ Yosep ókɑ̈bbø ki ɑ́bïj kì kelli nyiimen, ɑkïdhe gïn bøli rɑ̈dh, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wïyɑ geki nyiimïɑ ge ɑ́bï kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, kí dhögi gen kí dyëgi gen, kí jɑmmi gen bënn. Ge ying-ɑ Göcen ɑnɑn.”" 
Genesis47:2 Anyudhe nyiimen rɑ̈dh. 
Genesis47:3 Apyëëj gen yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Gwøøg wun bɑ ngø?”" 
Genesis47:4 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni “Wø bɑ tyëngkwɑ̈yø wuö, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd kweyyi wøn. Wø ɑ́bï-ɑ be bëëdø kì pönhï, mɑ́ kɑ̈j rɑɑj kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Dhögi wøn ki dyëgi wøn ɑ́jɑd thyew ki lum men cɑm yi gen. Wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy wø bëëd wøn kì Göcen.”" 
Genesis47:5 Aköbbi Yosep yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Anɑn kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi wïyí geki nyiimyëw," 
Genesis47:6 piny Rïp bɑ mi gen. Wiy ge bëëd gen kì Göcen. Bene en keny-ɑ døøj kì yij pödhø. Kɑ keløg e dɑ ji mø ngɑ̈ny mïdhø kidøøj kì kelli gen, cïb dhögɑ cinggi gen.”" 
Genesis47:7 Codhe, kɑ Yosep wïye kɑ̈ɑ̈le, ɑkïdhe gøn bøli rɑ̈dh. Kɑ rɑ̈dh kwëng yi Yɑgob." 
Genesis47:8 Kɑ pyëj yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Runní bɑ ɑ́dï?”" 
Genesis47:9 Alöggi Yɑgob kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ runn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, yɑ owïïnø ki dhögɑ geki dyëgɑ, runnɑ ceggø, o yɑ ɑ́rɑngi kì yethi gen. Pɑ pɑ̈r ki runn-ɑ́ nyi tyëg yi kweyyɑ.”" 
Genesis47:10 Kɑ rɑ̈dh cigi kwëngø yi Yɑgob, codhe kɑ ókedhø." 
Genesis47:11 Kɑ Yosep wïye geki nyiimen cïbe piny kì Rïp. Gï ɑ́thödhe ki jɑmm-ɑ døj bënn. Kɑ ge ogudø ki kɑɑl kì Rɑmsis, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis47:12 Yosep nyiimen ɑ́thödhe ki gïgcɑmm geki kɑ̈lli gen, kí ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli yi gen bënn, kí møg-ɑ thønhø, bong ngɑn di gïjø mɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ddii." 
Genesis47:13 Kɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e teeg, bong gïncɑm me nud kì keny megø. Kɑ tyëng Rïp geki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ónyönhø yi kɑ̈j." 
Genesis47:14 Kenyi bëën ji be ngyew ki byel, ngyënyy-ɑ ngëëw yi gen nyi ceg kɑ cøngø yi Yosep bënn, kɑ gï nyi kïdhe gøldwøng." 
Genesis47:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi ngyëny kì piny Rïp geki Kɑnɑɑn, ɑbëën tyëng Rïp yï Yosep, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Thödhí wøn ki gïncɑm, wø ko wëggí thøø. Yiel wøn! Ngyënyyi wøn ɑ́thumi.”" 
Genesis47:16 Alöggi Yosep kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun dhögi wun, ge ówil yi yɑn ki byel, keløg ngyënyyi wun thumø.”" 
Genesis47:17 Codhe, kɑ dhögi gen muuj gen Yosep. Møøgø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kyënyì, kí dyëg ɑ́tegg kí römm, kí ɑderr. Runɑni ɑ́tyëg yi gen ge cɑm-ɑ byell-ɑ ɑ́wiil jɑmmi gen." 
Genesis47:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi runɑni, ɑbëën gen yïe kì run-ɑ kyeelø, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Bong gïn kɑ̈nni yïn yi wøn wuö, ngyënyyi wøn ɑ́thumi, o dhög kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ kyeelø bɑ møgí bënn. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng me cuggi mëggi yïn, den-ɑ́ wøn ki dëlli wøn, kí pwödhhi wøn." 
Genesis47:19 Wø ko wëggí thøø. Yiel wøn! Pwödhhi wøn ko wëggi döngi piny. Ngew wøn, wøki pwödhhi wøn. Wø óbëëdø wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh. O pwödhhi wøn óbëëdø gɑ møge. Thödhí wøn ki byel møg cɑm, ki köödh møg kɑ̈g yi wøn, kì yethi pwödhhi wøn.”" 
Genesis47:20 Kɑ Yosep piny Rïp bëne ngewe, kɑ ogöögø ki mi rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis47:21 Yosep ji bënn ɑ́gwøge gɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh, cɑg kì tuung gïti tung-ɑ kyeelø kì piny Rïp." 
Genesis47:22 Pìnyi ókwër ɑ ɑ́cög ge nuti kwɑɑny en keti gen, mɑ́ ókwër ɑ́bëëd ge nyii thödhø ki gïncɑm yi rɑ̈dh, bene ɑ cög pìnyi gen nuti ngeew gen." 
Genesis47:23 Kɑ ji köbbi yi Yosep kinni, “Álidh yi wun? Wu ɑ́ngëwwɑ rɑ̈dh, wuki pìnyi wun bënn. Kwɑnyu köödh møg, kɑ pwödhhi wun kɑ̈g wun." 
Genesis47:24 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ókɑɑj byel, pɑ̈ngu gen gɑ bud ɑ́bïj, kɑ budø ɑ́kyel nyi mëggi rɑ̈dh. Møg-ɑ döng ógwøøg köödh kí gïncɑm yi kɑ̈lli wun.”" 
Genesis47:25 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wëyi wøn ɑ́yiel yi yïn, wø ɑ́mïdhi yi yïn kidøøj wuö. Wø ɑ́yïëy, wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh.”" 
Genesis47:26 Kɑ cïb ɑ́ cigg yi Yosep kinni, nyi mëggi bïïj buddi byel rɑ̈dh. Ciggɑni nudd ge ogöögø dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Pwödhhi ókwër keti gen ɑ ɑ́döng ge pɑth ki mø rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis47:27 Gøl Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd kì Göcen kì Rïp. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ri kì kunɑni, kɑ kwɑnni gen óngënyø ki mendwøng." 
Genesis47:28 Yɑgob ɑ́bëëd kì Rïp ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew, gïti kɑ ɑ́göög runne gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Genesis47:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi kej thøwe, ɑcwøle wɑ̈de Yosep, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Cïb cingí thɑ rɑ̈mɑ, kɑ yï köngí ki mendwøng kinni, yɑ pɑ kony yi yïn kì Rïp." 
Genesis47:30 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ koony keny-ɑ ɑ́koony wëëgɑ. Kïdhí yɑn wɑ̈g kì pönhï, kɑ yɑ koony kun-ɑ ɑ́koony gen.” Kɑ Yosep okööbø kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ógwøg yi yɑn.”" 
Genesis47:31 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Köngí kì bølɑ.” Kɑ Yosep óköngø kì bøle. Kɑ Yɑgob Jwøk mɑlle, e obuddø kì wïj pyëne." 
Genesis48:1 Kɑ Yosep muuj wöödø cyɑ̈ng megø, kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny kinni, “Wïyí ɑ́cöög piny ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële.” Kɑ wɑ̈dde, Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè kwɑnye, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be këëmi Yɑgob." 
Genesis48:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yɑgob kinni wɑ̈de Yosep bëën be lidhii, kɑ ree nyɑge, ɑdhwödhe mɑl kì yij pyën." 
Genesis48:3 Kɑ Yosep köbbi yi Yɑgob kinni, “Jwøk Áyïmø, ɑ́bï yïɑ kì yethi lɑ̈g, keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ Ludh kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ yɑ gyëdhe." 
Genesis48:4 Yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, ‘Yï ónëngi yi yɑn ki nywøl mø gïïr, o kwɑrrí göög gen ki pödhh mø gïïr, piny men ómëggɑ kwɑrrí gïti ɑtheer.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Yosep, wɑ̈ddí ryeet møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì Rïp, yɑ nuti wɑ̈nhi keny, bɑ møgɑ, ɑ løg Mɑnɑsè geki Eprɑim, ge bɑ wɑ̈ddɑ ceth ni Ruben geki Cimeøn." 
Genesis48:6 Ke di wɑ̈ddí møøgø, ge pɑ cölli yɑn, ge pɑ lɑ̈gi ki gïïpiny kì yïɑ, de ge óyïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè." 
Genesis48:7 Yɑ göögø kinøw kɑ per meyí Rɑceel. Yɑ ɑ́ywöngi ki ywøng teg keny-ɑ ɑ́thøwe kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, kì buti Eprɑtɑ̀, yɑ dwöög ɑ Misøpøtɑmiyɑ̀. Kɑ konyɑ kì kenyɑni, kì tøg yuu-ɑ kedhi Eprɑtɑ̀.” (Eprɑtɑ̀ cwølli ɑnɑn ɑ́ Betleem.)" 
Genesis48:8 Yɑgob keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe wɑ̈ddi Yosep, ɑpëjje kinni, “Á møg ek?”" 
Genesis48:9 Alöggi Yosep kinni, “Ge bɑ wɑ̈ddɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gëdhhi yɑn yi Jwøk kì piny Rïp keny.” Kɑ Yɑgob okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen butɑ, o ge mëggɑ gyëdh.”" 
Genesis48:10 Yɑgob nyinge pɑ nëënø kidøøj yi döng, nyinge ceg-ɑ dhïïdhø. Kɑ yɑnythønhø nyiig bute yi Yosep. Kɑ gï dööbe kööre, ɑnuume gïn." 
Genesis48:11 Aköbbi Yosep yi Isrɑil kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́rømm-ɑ kinni yï rum thøø, o yï pɑ lidhɑ këti. Lidh, ɑnɑn Jwøk yɑ ɑ́nyudhe nyigí.”" 
Genesis48:12 Kɑ ge kɑl ki nyiig cyɑ̈n yi Yosep kì ri Yɑgob. Kɑ wïje kuule piny kì bøli wïye, gïti kɑ ɑ́nywɑ̈ddi wïje ki piny." 
Genesis48:13 Yosep Eprɑim ɑ́cïbe wïj cɑɑm Yɑgob, kɑ Mɑnɑsè cïbe wïj kyëje." 
Genesis48:14 De Yɑgob cingge ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈ne, kɑ cingi kyëje cïbe wïj Eprɑim, ngö e bɑ en ɑ thinh. Kɑ cingi cɑɑme cïbe wïj Mɑnɑsè, en ɑ nyeldwøng." 
Genesis48:15 Akwënge Yosep geki wɑ̈dde kinni, “Yɑnythønhø møg ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ́ bøle ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi yi wëëgɑ, Abrɑhɑm geki Isɑɑk. Ge ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kor yɑn kër-ɑ ɑ́wönɑ yɑ thiinh gïti ɑnɑn." 
Genesis48:16 Wiy wëywön-ɑ ɑ́yiel yɑn kì yethi rɑj bënn, kore gen. Wiy nyingɑ kí nyingi wëëgɑ, Abrɑhɑm kí Isɑɑk cungi gen kì kömi gen. Wiy ge yïddi gen ki wɑ̈dd, kí kwɑrr mø gïïr.”" 
Genesis48:17 Yosep pyëwe ɑ́rënyi keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe wïye, e cingi kyëje cïb en wïj Eprɑim. Kɑ cingi wïye mɑɑge, gø cïbe’ wïj Mɑnɑsè." 
Genesis48:18 Aköbbe wïye kinni, “Pɑth, dwöög cingí tuung wïyø, nyeldwøng èn, cïb cingi kyëjí wïje.”" 
Genesis48:19 Kɑ wïye óbɑ̈nyø ɑkööbe kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn wɑ̈dɑ. Kwɑrri Mɑnɑsè ógöögø ki pödhø me dwøng. De gøl ómen nyelthinh ógöögø ki pödhh mø døngø, óbëëd e dwøng kibøle.”" 
Genesis48:20 Codhe, ɑkwënge gïn kì cyɑ̈ngɑni kinni, “Kwɑrri Isrɑil ócwøl-ɑ nyingi wun kenyi kwɑ̈jji gen ki gyëdh. Ge ókwɑ̈jji kinni, ‘Yï ógyëdh ni Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè.’ ” Kinøw, Yɑgob Eprɑim ɑ́cïbe bøli Mɑnɑsè." 
Genesis48:21 Kɑ Yosep köbbi yi Yɑgob kinni, “Ni kɑ̀ nëën, yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki thøø, de yï ókøny yi Jwøk, kɑ yï dwøøge piny kweyyi wun." 
Genesis48:22 Bɑ yïn, pɑth ki nyiimyëw ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ Cekïm, piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med, ɑ ɑ́kɑb yi yɑn kì yï Amör, ki pilø geki weth.”" 
Genesis49:1 Kɑ Yɑgob wɑ̈dde cwøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Nyïngu butɑ, o wu köbbɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø." 
Genesis49:2 Bïu cung wun ri wun, kɑ wu lïng wun, wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob. Lïngu kwøbbi Isrɑil wïyi wun.”" 
Genesis49:3 “Ruben, kɑyɑ, bene yïn tegɑ. Bene yïn ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi yɑn, yɑ bɑ wøb. Yï bɑ jɑlngöönø, nyel-ɑ teg kì kelli wɑ̈ddɑ bënn." 
Genesis49:4 Yï nɑ muud me dhøge di ɑpɑgø. De pɑth ki yïn ɑ óbëëdø perí teg, mɑ́ ɑkwɑnyɑ ɑ́niin yi yïn, Pënni wïyí nuti wøør yïn.”" 
Genesis49:5 “Cimeøn geki Leebì bɑ nyiimëëg, tøngg kɑ̈lli yi gen gɑ møg mud ki ji." 
Genesis49:6 Yɑ pɑ kedhi yethi kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi gen kì wɑ̈yi gen. Wɑlɑ̀ yɑ pɑ kedhi yij buri gen, mɑ́ ge nyi ceg-ɑ nɑ̈ggø kenyi rënyi pëthi gen. Kenyi med pëthi gen, rɑ̈rri tyelli wɑdh nyii kebbø yi gen, o dhɑ̈le’ cyɑ̈dhø." 
Genesis49:7 Keji pëthi gen bɑ mi cyën, mɑ́ e pëddi rɑ̈jø. Ge ókedhhi yi yɑn kì yij piny Isrɑil, kì bɑng rɑ̈ji pëthi gen." 
Genesis49:8 “Yeudɑ̀, yï ópøjji yi nyiimyëw. Cinggí óying muddi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Wɑ̈ddi wïyí ri gen óbødhhi yi gen kì bølí." 
Genesis49:9 Yeudɑ̀ nɑ ngur, nyi nɑ̈ggi e døøg-ɑ øde, kɑ óbuddø ree rïïj en, bong ngɑn pɑ̈nyii ki nywɑlø." 
Genesis49:10 Yeudɑ̀ ɑ ómïdhi kwøøm rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Kwɑrre ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ceth. Pödhh bënn óyömmi yïe. Kwøbbe ólïngi yi jurrì bënn. 
Genesis49:11 Adere mɑɑge’ ri oløg men-ɑ pëddi døøjø. Nyɑɑr ɑdere ying-ɑ ri bɑng-ɑ døøj. Ógudhe nyi lwøg en kɑ møgi oløg men kwɑrø ni remø. 
Genesis49:12 Nyinge kwɑ̈rrø yi møgi oløg. Legge tɑr yi mɑdh ki cɑg. 
Genesis49:13 “Dhebulun óbëëdø kì tøg nɑɑm omelø. Dhøøwɑ̈dhhe bɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈g yi yɑ̈ɑ̈th. Dhøg pinye ówɑ̈dhi Sïdön. 
Genesis49:14 “Isɑkɑr pɑ̈r ki ɑderø me cungi ree ther en köme dɑ jɑmme. 
Genesis49:15 Kɑ̀ lïdhe kinni piny døøj, o lɑ̈bø med kì pödhø, kɑ pyëwe nyi göjje gwøg, kɑ ogöögø e nɑ bɑ̈ng." 
Genesis49:16 “Dɑn óbëëd ɑ́ jɑgø kì kömi jie. Ge óni kɑ̈lli Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø. 
Genesis49:17 Dɑn óbëëd ɑ́ thwöl kì tøg yöö; thwöl mɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g kì tøg yöö, me nyi kɑj tyeli kyeny. O ngɑn-ɑ köme leenge piny." 
Genesis49:18 “Yɑ ngɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëni yïëdø mií, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Genesis49:19 “Gɑd köme ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi kurrì. De ree óluge gïn, kɑ gï cyedde." 
Genesis49:20 “Piny Aceer yije ócyeeg yi jɑmmì mø døj. En ɑ yïe ódi gïgcɑmm møg-ɑ døøj cɑrø, møg-ɑ nyi tyer yi rɑ̈nhì." 
Genesis49:21 “Nɑptɑlì bɑ ɑ́køny me rïngi wïje tɑ̈dø, o nyige óbëëd ge myëër ceth." 
Genesis49:22 “Yosep nɑ odyerø kenyi cunge kì tøg nɑm. Nɑ wɑ̈d kyeny kì kelli kïttì. 
Genesis49:23 Köme opɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki menrɑj kɑ cyeddi yi gen ki wethhi gen. 
Genesis49:24 De wethe mïdhe’ mïdhø ki tegø. Cingge ócwedø ge teeg yi Jwøøg Yɑgob, Jwøng Teg, ɑ yïe kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi tegi Isrɑil." 
Genesis49:25 Bɑ Jwøøg wïyí ɑ korri yïn, Áyïmø ɑ gyëdh yïn ki kønh-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl. Kí pïg-ɑ thɑ piny. Yï ógëdhe dhög kí nywøl." 
Genesis49:26 Yï ógëdhe ɑ́bwög kí okøgg yï ógëdhe kïtt-ɑ weenø. Yï ógëdhe gïg mø pëddi døøjø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kïtt-ɑ weenø. Wiy gyëdhhɑni bï gen kömí Yosep, yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieny kì kelli nyiimyëw." 
Genesis49:27 “Ben Yɑmïn nɑ thwøønh gøøl. Nyii nɑ̈ggø kì mwøl kí böörø, kɑ gëe nyi cɑme.”" 
Genesis49:28 Møgɑk bene gen wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. O bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wïyi gen ɑgɑk, keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge ki thøø." 
Genesis49:29 Kɑ Yɑgob wɑ̈dde cege kinni, “Anɑn yɑ kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyyɑ, yɑ othøø. Koony yɑn buti wëëgɑ, kì yij órøngi kït men-ɑ bɑɑg Eprön kwɑɑr Kit," 
Genesis49:30 kì Mɑkpïlɑ̀, tung-ɑ røøm ki Mɑmɑrɑ̀, kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Órøngi kïnɑni ɑ́ngew-ɑ yi Abrɑhɑm kì yï Eprön ɑ́ men yije nyi koony tyëngthøø." 
Genesis49:31 Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́koony Abrɑhɑm geki Sɑrɑ̀ cyëge, kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́koony Isɑɑk geki Rebekɑ̀ cyëge, o kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́koonyɑ Leɑ̀." 
Genesis49:32 Bɑg menɑni geki órøngi kït, ɑ́ngew-ɑ yï kwɑrri Kit. Koony wun yɑn kunɑni.”" 
Genesis49:33 Yɑgob keny-ɑ ɑ́rume cegi wɑ̈dde, ɑdøøge ki buddø, kɑ wɑnge mije." 
Genesis50:1 Kɑ Yosep ree leenge kömi wïye, e óywöngø, e numm-ɑ gøn." 
Genesis50:2 Acwödde ki ji mø gïny wïye ki møw men-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n dhɑnhø kwɑ̈gø. 
Genesis50:3 Kɑ tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, e ogïnyyø ki møwɑni. Bene gen cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ nyi tyëg yi gwøngɑni, ɑ nyi thwøw dhɑnhø e pɑ kwɑ̈g. Kɑ Yɑgob ywøg yi tyëng Rïp ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew." 
Genesis50:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi cyɑ̈nggi ywøg, kɑ jyɑ̈ggi buri rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Yosep kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, muuj wun wöödø men rɑ̈dh." 
Genesis50:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi wïyɑ ki thøø, yɑ ɑ́köbbe köngø kinni ókïdhɑ be koony yij rörø men-ɑ ɑ́wöd yi en kì yij kït, kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy yɑ kedhɑ be konyi wïyɑ, o rume’ konyø, yɑ ódwöög.”" 
Genesis50:6 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ólöggø kinni, “Kedh, kony wïyí ni kɑ ɑ́köngí.”" 
Genesis50:7 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yosep be konyi wïye. Jyɑ̈ggì bënn, kí jøgdøngi burø, kí pëjji Rïp, ge ɑ́kedh bënn geki Yosep." 
Genesis50:8 Gøle kí nyiimen, kí ji mø gïïr cɑrø, kí gøl wïye, ge ɑ́kedh ki en. Bɑ othønhø, kí dyëg, kí dhög ɑ ɑ́döng kì Göcen." 
Genesis50:9 Cwøw møøgø cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi kyënyì, møøgø ying-ɑ yethi yɑ̈th-ɑ pyejji yi kyënyì. Ábëëd ɑ́ yɑy me dwøng cɑrø." 
Genesis50:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen buti rɑri pwödhi Atɑd, kì kömi Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑgud gen kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge óywöngø ki ywøg me dwøng, ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r. Yosep wïye ɑ́ywøge ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew kì kenyɑni." 
Genesis50:11 Tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́ngɑ̈ng keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen ywøøg gen kì rɑri Atɑd, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á ywøøg ngø ɑ ywøg yi tyëng Rïp kinøw?” Bene ɑ bɑnge cɑɑg kenyɑni ɑ́ Abel Misrɑim." 
Genesis50:12 Kɑ wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi wïyi gen, gwøg yi gen ceth." 
Genesis50:13 Ákɑ̈l yi gen, kɑ gø koony gen yij órøngi kït kì Mɑkpïlɑ̀, kì tung-ɑ døøg kuni Mɑmɑrɑ̀, kì yij bɑng-ɑ ɑ́ngew yi Abrɑhɑm kì yï Eprön kwɑɑr Kit ɑ́ keny nyi koony tyëngthøø." 
Genesis50:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yosep ki konyi wïye, ɑdøøge Rïp, geki nyiimen, kí ji-ɑ ɑ́lwøøgii bënn." 
Genesis50:15 Nyiiwï Yosep keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wïyi gen ki konyø, ge ɑ́kööb ki ri gen kinni, “Wɑ göög ɑ dï, keløg Yosep pyëwe nudd e rɑɑj ki wɑ, kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́göggii yi wɑ, kɑ keje dwɑdde colø?”" 
Genesis50:16 Aödi gen yï Yosep kinni, “Keny-ɑ́ nuti thøw wïyee," 
Genesis50:17 ɑ́kööb i kwɑjji wøn yïn kinni, ‘Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki nyiimyëw kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi gen.’ Anɑn wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ göggi yïn yi wøn, mɑ́ wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi Jwøøg wïyí.” Yosep ɑ́ywöngi keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge møgɑni." 
Genesis50:18 Kɑ nyiiwɑ̈n obëënø cyee, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wøn ɑ bølí èn, wø bɑ bɑ̈nggí.”" 
Genesis50:19 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu ko böggi. Yɑ pɑ cuggi cïbi riɑ kej Jwøk." 
Genesis50:20 Wu ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ göggi yɑn gïnrɑj, de ɑ́løg gïndøj yi Jwøk, kipe mïdhi wëyi ji møg-ɑ nudd ge onëënø ɑnɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kì bɑng kɑ̀ yingɑ keny." 
Genesis50:21 Bong gïn böggi yi wun, wu ókorri yi yɑn wuki nyigi wun bënn.” Kɑ pëthi gen dwöög yi en ki kwøb mø døøj." 
Genesis50:22 Kɑ Yosep obëëdø kì Rïp geki gøl wïye. Runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈rø keny-ɑ ɑ́thøwe. 
Genesis50:23 Ábëëd kɑ wɑ̈ddi Eprɑim, kɑ kwɑrre lidhe. Thyew keny-ɑ ɑ́yïddi Mɑkir wɑ̈d Mɑnɑsè kí wɑ̈dde, Yosep ɑ́bëëd e nudd e onëënø." 
Genesis50:24 Kɑ nyiimen köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki thøø. De wu ókorri yi Jwøk, kɑ wu dwøøge piny-ɑ ɑ́mëgge Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob.”" 
Genesis50:25 Kɑ Yosep tyëng gøl gen köbbe köngi gen, ɑ́kööb kinni, “Köngi wun kì bølɑ kinni, keny-ɑ ópeej wun pinyɑni yi Jwøk, yɑ ókɑ̈l yi wun.”" 
Genesis50:26 Codhe, ɑthøw Yosep kì Rïp, e runne bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈rø. Kɑ gïny ki møw men-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n dhɑnhø kwɑ̈gø. Kɑ kïdhi yij Sɑndug." 
Exodus1:1 Møg bene gen nyingi wɑ̈ddi Yɑgob, jøg-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ggi Rïp geki Yɑgob, ngɑɑn kí gøle, ge bɑ" 
Exodus1:2 Ruben, Cimeøn, Leebì, Yeudɑ̀," 
Exodus1:3 Isɑkɑr, Dhebulun, Ben Yɑmïn," 
Exodus1:4 Dɑn, Nɑptɑlì, Gɑd, kí Aceer." 
Exodus1:5 Kwɑnni gøl Yɑgob, ɑ løg wɑ̈dde geki kwɑrre ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew. Yosep ɑ́ying-ɑ Rïp." 
Exodus1:6 Codhe, kɑ Yosep othøø geki nyiimen ki rïnyɑni bëne." 
Exodus1:7 De kwɑrri gen, tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́nywøl kɑ kwɑnni gen óngënyø kɑ ge ótëngø ki mendwøng, kɑ piny opɑ̈ngø yi gen." 
Exodus1:8 Codhe, kɑ lɑwø kwɑny kì Rïp yi rɑ̈dh me nyɑ̈n me kwïj Yosep." 
Exodus1:9 Kɑ rɑ̈nhɑni jie köbbe kinni, “Lidhu tyëng Isrɑil, ge ɑ́ceg ngënyø kɑ ge ótëngø kibølee." 
Exodus1:10 Ke di liny me bï, ge ócuggø rëbø ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki wɑ, codhe, kɑ ge odhwödhø kì pödhee. Yɑ̈ɑ̈b wɑ ki yöö men mɑ̈ɑ̈n wɑ gen ngënyø.”" 
Exodus1:11 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil cïb cinggi jɑggi gwøg møg cir gen, o köthi gen buudh ki gwøng teg. Kɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Pithöm kí Rɑmsis ger yi gen gɑ møg mïdhi jɑmmi rɑ̈dh." 
Exodus1:12 De tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́yöd ge ceg-ɑ ngënyø keny-ɑ ɑ́pëddi köthi gen ki buudhø, kɑ tyëng Rïp ti-ɑ bwøgø yi gen." 
Exodus1:13 Kɑ yethi tyëng Isrɑil ti ki pɑ̈dø ki gwøng teg. 
Exodus1:14 Yethi gen ɑ́pɑ̈d ki tïj; ge ɑ́cïri gwøøg gyer kí pur kì yethi pwödh, o pëthi tyëng Rïp pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen." 
Exodus1:15 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp gɑ̈mmi mɑ̈nni Isrɑil ryeet, ɑ løg Ciprɑ̀ geki Puɑ̀ köbbe kinni," 
Exodus1:16 “Kenyi gɑm wun ngeti Isrɑil e pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny, nyi nɑ̈gu men-ɑ nywøl keløg ɑ́ jɑlø, de wiy bëëde keløg ɑ́ dhɑjø.”" 
Exodus1:17 De gɑ̈mmɑni ryeet ɑ́bëëd gɑ ji mø böggi Jwøk, kɑ kwøbbi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp pyem yi gen, cwøw ɑ́yöd ge ceg kɑ wiyø yi gen." 
Exodus1:18 Kɑ gɑ̈mmɑni cwøl yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Wude, ɑ göög wun kinnï? Ede møg-ɑ nywøl gɑ cwøw ɑ nyi wiyu gen ge pɑ nɑ̈g yi wun?”" 
Exodus1:19 Kɑ ge ólöggø kinni, “Mɑ̈nni tyëng Ibru pɑ pɑ̈r ki mɑ̈nni Rïp, pɑ̈dhi gen piny yööd, ge nyi pɑ̈dhi piny e gɑ̈ɑ̈mi nuti wɑ̈dhi yï gen.”" 
Exodus1:20 Kɑ gɑ̈mmɑni korri yi Jwøk kidøøj. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil óngënyø ki mendwøng. 
Exodus1:21 Kɑ kɑ̈lli gɑ̈mmɑni tyeny yi Jwøk, mɑ́ ge bɑ ji mø böggi Jwøk." 
Exodus1:22 Kɑ rɑ̈dh tyëng pödhe köbbe kinni, “Kwɑny wun wɑ̈ddi tyëng Ibru møg-ɑ ócer nywølø, kɑ ge leengu Kiir, de wiy møg-ɑ bɑ mɑ̈nn bëëd gen.”" 
Exodus2:1 Kɑ jɑl megø kì gøl Leebì ókedhø, kɑ ónyömø ki nyɑɑr gøl Leebì ni en." 
Exodus2:2 Kɑ nyɑnɑni óyɑɑjø, ɑpɑ̈dhe piny ki wɑ̈d, kɑ gø lidhe e myëër, ɑkɑnne gøn ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Exodus2:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈le kɑnnø, kɑ gø cwɑ̈jje ki dyëëny ókut, ɑmwøne gøn ki dök kí lɑ̈bø. Kɑ nyelthinh pyëële yije, ɑcïbe gøn tøg Kiir kì nɑm kelli lum." 
Exodus2:4 Kɑ nyimen ócungø e lɑ̈wi, e nenn-ɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb." 
Exodus2:5 Kɑ nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh bï-ɑ gɑ̈d be lwøggø e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ bɑ̈ngge, bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn, ɑlidhe dyënyɑni kì kelli lum kì nɑm, kɑ bɑ̈nge ɑ́kyel öre be dwɑɑyii." 
Exodus2:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yɑle gøn, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ nyɑgïnthinh, e óywöngø. Kɑ yij nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh óywöngø kipere, ɑkööbe kinni, “Men óceg bëëdø ɑ́ nyɑɑr tyëng Ibru.”" 
Exodus2:7 Codhe, ɑköbbi nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh yi nyimï nyɑgïnɑni kinni, “Kedhɑ be cwöd ki ngeti Ibru me dhwødhii?”" 
Exodus2:8 Alöggi nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedh kɑ̈ní.” Codhe, kɑ ókedhø, ɑcwööl meyi nyɑgïnthinh." 
Exodus2:9 Aköbbi ngɑnɑni yi nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kwɑny nyelthinh men, kɑ dhwøødh. Pïdhí yɑn, kööngí ómëggɑ yïn.” Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny nyɑgïnɑni yi ngɑnɑni kɑ gø pidhe." 
Exodus2:10 Kɑ nyelthinh ódøngø, ɑmuujii nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh yi ngɑnɑni. Kɑ cɑg yi nyɑɑr rɑ̈dh ɑ́ Mosɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ákɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ nɑm.”" 
Exodus2:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døngi Mosɑ̀, ɑkedhe be lidhi wɑddi gen, ɑ løg tyëng Ibru, o lidhe orɑng-ɑ rɑngi gen. Kɑ jɑl Rïp megø lidhe e gøj-ɑ wɑ̈d Ibru, ɑ løg wɑɑd Mosɑ̀." 
Exodus2:12 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ lïïdh-ɑ tuung kí tuung, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø me lidhe, ɑgøje jɑl Rïp kɑ gø nɑ̈ge. Kɑ gø gööle thɑ ɑyejø." 
Exodus2:13 Acige kedhø dhuki, kɑ wɑ̈ddi Ibru ɑ́ryew yuude ge ónyïɑ̈ggø. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji pyëje kinni, “Ede wɑɑd wun ɑ pwöödií?”" 
Exodus2:14 Alöggi jɑlɑni kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́gwøg yïn, yïn ɑ́ jɑgø me nenni gønyyi wøn? Yï dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn ni wɑ̈d Rïp?” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Ngøø kwøbbɑni óyodø!”" 
Exodus2:15 Kɑ kwøbbɑni lïngi yi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ Mosɑ̀ yɑbe o gø di nɑ̈ge, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r Mosɑ̀ Midyɑn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Mosɑ̀ kunɑni, ɑpëgge wïj yith." 
Exodus2:16 Yethrø, ókwëri Midyɑn ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ nyige womɑ̈nn ɑ́bïryew. Kɑ ge bï-ɑ wïj yith be pɑ̈ngi ɑwöl-ɑ yije nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi dyëgi wïyi gen ki pï." 
Exodus2:17 De kwɑ̈yyi dyëg møøgø ɑ́bï, kɑ womɑ̈nn møgɑni cyeddi yi gen. Adhwödh Mosɑ̀, kɑ gï cwɑge, ɑtömme dyëgi gen ki pï." 
Exodus2:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg gen yï wïyi gen, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Wude ɑ jwɑn wun dwöögø dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng?”" 
Exodus2:19 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑl Rïp megø, wø ɑ́yiele kì cinggi kwɑ̈yyi dyëg. Kɑ wø tömme ki pï thyew, ɑmɑ̈ɑ̈dh dyëg.”" 
Exodus2:20 Kɑ nyige köbbe kinni, “De jɑlɑni ying-ɑ keny? Ede ɑ wiyu en? Cwöölu en o cyɑ̈me ki gïncɑm.”" 
Exodus2:21 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ oyïëyø ki bëëdø kì buti jɑlɑni. Kɑ jɑlɑni nyɑre Dhiporɑ̀ mëgge Mosɑ̀ ɑ́ dhɑjø. 
Exodus2:22 Kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Gercöm mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ bɑ wëdh.”" 
Exodus2:23 Kì bɑng keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp othøø. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil nyingi gen ti ki guudø yi tyëng Rïp. Kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøk." 
Exodus2:24 Kɑ ywøøg gen lïngi yi Jwøk, Jwøk ɑ́bëëd e nudd e mïdh-ɑ lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm gen kí Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob." 
Exodus2:25 Kɑ orɑɑng tyëng Isrɑil lidh yi Jwøk, ɑywöngi yije kipe gïn." 
Exodus3:1 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e kwɑy-ɑ dyëgi Yethrø øre, ókwëri Midyɑn, kɑ dyëg køøle løøg ryɑng tung-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ wïj Kïti Sinɑy, Kïti Jwøk." 
Exodus3:2 Kɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ocwöbø kì bøle kì kunɑni kì yij mɑc kì ri nyɑ kïrø, nyɑ kïrɑni ɑ́lidhe e olyelø, de pɑ rɑ̈bbi." 
Exodus3:3 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Wiy yɑ töng-ɑ be lïdhø ki gïn-ɑ bëëdø kinni, ede nyɑ kïrø ɑ lyele e pɑ rɑ̈bbi?”" 
Exodus3:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ɑ́töngi be lïdhø, ɑcwøle gøn cwɑgge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij nyɑ kïrø, kinni, “Mosɑ̀! Mosɑ̀!” Alöggi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn èn.”" 
Exodus3:5 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yï ko nyïngi keny, kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑrrí wɑ̈g kì tyellí, kipe keny-ɑ di yïn èn bɑ ɑkwër.”" 
Exodus3:6 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Jwøøg kweyyí, Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob.” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ nyinge kume, mɑ́ e ɑ́bwøg ki nenni yï Jwøk." 
Exodus3:7 Codhe, ɑkööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Orɑng men-ɑ rɑngi yi jiɑ kì Rïp ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, kɑ ywøøg gen wɑ̈nh-ɑ yïɑ, guun-ɑ guud nyingi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn." 
Exodus3:8 Abëënɑ piny be yieli gen kì cinggi tyëng Rïp, o ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì pinyɑni, o ge kïdhɑ piny me døj, o lɑɑj, piny me yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, keny-ɑ bëëd yi tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Perïdh, kí tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Yebus." 
Exodus3:9 Anɑn ywøøg tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́wɑ̈nhi yïɑ, o guun-ɑ guud nyingi gen yi tyëng Rïp, ɑ́lidh yi yɑn." 
Exodus3:10 Anɑn yï örɑ’ yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, o jiɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì pinye.”" 
Exodus3:11 Kɑ Jwøk köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn ɑ́ men, ɑ kedhɑ yï rɑ̈dh, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp?”" 
Exodus3:12 Alöggi Jwøk kinni, “Yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki yïn, o keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l jiɑni wɑ̈g kì Rïp, yɑ ómɑlli yi wun kì wïj kït men. Menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji kinni yɑn ɑ ɑ́ör yïn be kɑ̈ɑ̈li gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp.”" 
Exodus3:13 Kɑ Jwøk köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Keny-ɑ ókedhɑ yï tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Jwøøg kweyyi wun, okööb gen kinni nyinge ɑ́ men? Á ngø ɑ óköbbɑ gen?”" 
Exodus3:14 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Yɑn.” Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Kedh, köbbí kwɑrri Isrɑil kinni, ‘Ngɑn-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ “Yɑ bɑ Yɑn” ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yï wun.’ ”" 
Exodus3:15 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ cigi köbbø yi Jwøk kinni, “Bene gen møg-ɑ óköbbí kwɑrri Isrɑil ɑgɑk, kinni, ‘Jwøøg kweyyi wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bɑ Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob, en ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yï wun, bene nyinge møg-ɑ ópɑɑrii ɑnɑn, kì ri rïny kí rïny, gïti ɑtheer.’" 
Exodus3:16 Kedh kɑ jøgdøngi Isrɑil cøng, kɑ ge köbbí kinni, ‘Jwøøg kweyyi wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cwöb kì bølɑ, eni Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, Jwøøg Isɑɑk, Jwøøg Yɑgob. Kɑ okööbø cem e bëën-ɑ be këëmi wun, o orɑɑng wun kì Rïp ɑ́lidh yi en.’" 
Exodus3:17 Kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì yij orɑng-ɑ rɑngi yi wun kì Rïp, o wu kïdhɑ piny tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí piny tyëng Kit, kí piny tyëng Amör, kí piny tyëng Perïdh, kí piny tyëng Kib, kí piny tyëng Yebus; wu ókïdhɑ piny me yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc.’" 
Exodus3:18 “Kwøbbí ólïngi yi jøgdøngi Isrɑil. Kɑ wu kedhu yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp wuki jøgdøngi Isrɑil, kɑ köbbu kinni, ‘Jwøøg tyëng Ibru, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́bï be këëmi wøn, kɑ wø cwøle kinni kedhi wøn yij pɑ̈l keny me cɑɑdh ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, o ngɑ̈ddi yi wøn ki gëdhhì kì kunɑni.’" 
Exodus3:19 De ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp pɑ yïëy ki kedhi wun, de óceg kɑ cïrri møgɑni." 
Exodus3:20 De cingɑ ócïbɑ ri Rïp, ógøj yi yɑn, kɑ göggɑ ki gïïngɑ̈ngø, o wu ógøny yi en cyee." 
Exodus3:21 “Wu ówëggɑ wørø yi tyëng Rïp kì bɑng gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ gen, o wu cög wu pɑ kedh ki cinggi wun." 
Exodus3:22 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nni Isrɑil ókedhi yï mɑ̈nni Rïp møg-ɑ bɑ tyëng byëëg gen, geki møg-ɑ kɑ̈lli gïn bëëd yi gen, kɑ ge ócwöddø ki yëlli dhɑb kí yëlli ɑ́tegg, kí ógudh møg ruug wun nyigi wun, geki wɑ̈ddi wun, o jɑmmi Rïp kɑ̈l yi wun.”" 
Exodus4:1 Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j løøg yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “De keløg tyëng Isrɑil óbɑ̈nyi ki yïëyø, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbb-ɑ óköbbɑ gen, göögɑ kidï, keløg ge ókööbø kinni yï nuti cwöbø kì bølɑ.”" 
Exodus4:2 Apyëjii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Á ngø ɑ cingí ɑnɑn?” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Lodh.”" 
Exodus4:3 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Leeng piny.” Kɑ gø leenge piny. Kɑ ree løge thwöl, kɑ Mosɑ̀ reng-ɑ cyɑ̈n." 
Exodus4:4 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Rïj cingí kɑ mɑɑg kì yëbe.” Kɑ cinge rïïje, ɑmɑge gøn, kɑ ree løge lodh kì cinge." 
Exodus4:5 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Gwøg møgɑni kipe kinni o ge yïëy gen kinni, bɑ Jwøøg kweyyi gen; Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bølí.”" 
Exodus4:6 Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti kinni, “Cød cingí thɑ ógødhí.” Kɑ cinge cøde, kɑ gø dwööge wɑ̈g e tɑr nɑ ɑ́piy." 
Exodus4:7 Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Dwøøg cingí thɑ ógødhí.” Adwøøge gøn, kɑ gø dwööge wɑ̈g e pɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki dële." 
Exodus4:8 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keløg ge pɑ yïëy ki kwøbbí, wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ yïëy ki ngïji tyeli mɑl, ge óyïëy ki ngïny-ɑ kyeelø." 
Exodus4:9 Ocög ge pɑ yïëy ki ngïjjɑni ryeet, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki pïi Kiir, kɑ ge køny piny keny-ɑ thwøwø. Pïgɑni ceg-ɑ gwøg gɑ remø.”" 
Exodus4:10 Kɑ Mosɑ̀, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbe kinni, “Wuö, yɑ kwïj kwøb kër-ɑ ɑ́pïïdhɑ gïti kɑ̀ kööb wɑ ɑnɑn, mɑ́ dhøgɑ peeg geki lebɑ.”" 
Exodus4:11 Aköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́göggi dhɑnhø ki dhøg? O bɑ men ɑ nyi løg dhɑnhø ming, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ nyi wëggii dhɑ̈lø ki kwøb; ɑ nyi løg dhɑnhø ngɑn nëënø wɑlɑ̀ cwør, pɑth ki yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?" 
Exodus4:12 Anɑn kedh, dhøgí ókøny yi yɑn ki kwøb, o yï ópwönyi yi yɑn ki møg-ɑ ókømmi yi yïn.”" 
Exodus4:13 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn Wuö, öd ki ngɑn megø.”" 
Exodus4:14 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑg yi liny ki Mosɑ̀. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Aɑron pɑth ki ómyëw? Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni nyii kööbø kidøøj. Bï-ɑ be yïddø ki yïn ɑnɑn, o pyëwe ómïni keny-ɑ ólidhe yïn." 
Exodus4:15 Wu ókööbø ki en, kɑ köbbí møg-ɑ ókwøbe, wu ókøny yi yɑn ki kwøb, o gïg-ɑ ógwøg yi wun, óköbbɑ wun." 
Exodus4:16 En ɑ ókööbø ki ji ɑ́ kej dhøgí, o yï óbëëdø yï bɑ kej Jwøk kì yïe." 
Exodus4:17 Kɑ lodh men kɑ̈llí kì cingí, en ɑ ógöög yi yïn ki gïïngɑ̈ngø.”" 
Exodus4:18 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ókedhø, kɑ døøg-ɑ yï Yethrø øre, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy yɑ døøgɑ yï wɑddi wøn møg-ɑ Rïp, o ge lidh yi yɑn mɑ nudd ge onëënø.” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Yethrø kinni, “Kedh ki mër.”" 
Exodus4:19 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Midyɑn kinni, “Kedh, døøg Rïp, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yïn ɑ́thøw bënn.”" 
Exodus4:20 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ cyëge kwɑnye geki wɑ̈dde, kɑ gï cïbe kömi ɑderø, codhe, kɑ døøg-ɑ piny Rïp, loodh Jwøk okɑ̈llø yi en kì cinge." 
Exodus4:21 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí Rïp, gwøg gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́cïbɑ cingí kì bøli rɑ̈dh, de pyëwe ógwøgɑ e teeg, o ji cög gï pɑ wëgge kedhø." 
Exodus4:22 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbí kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Isrɑil bɑ wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø." 
Exodus4:23 Yï ɑ́köbbɑ kinni, gøny wɑ̈dɑ o yɑ mɑlle, kɑ yï óbɑ̈nyø ki gønyii, kì bɑng menɑni, wɑ̈dí wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Kì keny-ɑ ɑ́nïni yi gen ge kedh-ɑ Rïp, ɑrøøm Mosɑ̀ geki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Mosɑ̀ gø dwɑdde nɑ̈gø." 
Exodus4:25 Kɑ Dhiporɑ̀ ókɑ̈bbø ki óbɑyi kït me thiinh, kɑ gø ngøle wɑ̈de, kɑ dël-ɑ ɑ́ngule wɑ̈g gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri tyelli Mosɑ̀, kipe kwööng ngøl. Akööb Dhiporɑ̀ kinni, “Yï bɑ jɑlnywööm remø kì yïɑ.” Codhe kɑ Mosɑ̀ wiy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus4:26  
Exodus4:27 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí be pɑɑri Mosɑ̀ yij pɑ̈l.” Kɑ ókedhø, ɑyode gøn kì Kïti Jwøk. Kɑ gø mɑ̈dhe, gø nuume’ nuumø." 
Exodus4:28 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí gïg-ɑ per gen ɑ́örii, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii kinni gwøge gïn." 
Exodus4:29 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ókedhø geki Aɑron, kɑ jøgdøngi Isrɑil cøng yi gen." 
Exodus4:30 Kɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lwøb yi Aɑron bënn, kɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø møgɑni gwøge kì bøli jøgɑni." 
Exodus4:31 Kɑ teedø oyïëyø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bï yï gen, kɑ guun-ɑ guud nyingi gen lidh yi en, ɑbøødh gen ri gen piny, kɑ mɑl yi gen." 
Exodus5:1 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh. Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi gen kinni, “Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Wiy jiɑ kedh gen, o yɑ wøw yi gen kì yij pɑ̈l.’ ”" 
Exodus5:2 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ men, ɑ lïngɑ kwøbbe, ɑ pere gønyɑ Isrɑil? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwïj yi yɑn, o Isrɑil pɑ wiy yi yɑn o kedhe thyew.”" 
Exodus5:3 Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́cwøl-ɑ yi Jwøøg tyëng Ibru. Wiy wø kedhi wøn keny me cɑɑdh ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, kì yij pɑ̈l, o Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi yi wøn ki gëdhhì, kipe wø ónɑ̈g yi en ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, wɑlɑ̀ ki liny.”" 
Exodus5:4 Kɑ ge köbbi yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp kinni, “Mosɑ̀ wuki Aɑron, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈nu ji gwøgi gwøøg gen? Kedhu be tïïj wun.”" 
Exodus5:5 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Tyëngpiny ɑ́ngënyi ɑnɑn, o ge gögg-ɑ yi wun ki gwøøg gen.”" 
Exodus5:6 Kɑ jøg-ɑ nenni gwøg geki jɑggi Isrɑil ceg yi rɑ̈dh kinni," 
Exodus5:7 “Jiɑni ko cigi wun muujø ki nor men-ɑ nyi göög ki thob këti, ni kenyi muuj wun gen cøn. Wiy ge kedhi gen be yɑb ki nor keti gen." 
Exodus5:8 Kɑ wu ko kɑ̈ni wɑ̈g kì ri kwɑnni thob møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen cøn, ko di thob ɑ́kyel me tøøk. Gwøøg gen ceg-ɑ nøg, bene ɑ kööb gen kinni, ‘Wiy wø kedhi wøn be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøøg wøn ki gëdhhì.’" 
Exodus5:9 Thödhu jøgɑni ki gwøg me teeg, o ge jɑ̈ddi gen ki keny lïng gen ki kwøbbi pyed.”" 
Exodus5:10 Codhe, kɑ jøg-ɑ nyi cïrø ki gwøg geki jɑgg-ɑ nenni gwøg ókedhø, kɑ jiɑni köbbi gen kinni, “Rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, i wu ko thödhi ki nor." 
Exodus5:11 Kedh wun, yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun ki nor kì keny-ɑ óyïddi wun, de bong gïjø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì ri kwɑnni thob.”" 
Exodus5:12 Codhe, kɑ teenɑni tɑɑy-ɑ yij piny Rïp be yɑb ki wél møg gwøg ɑ́ nor." 
Exodus5:13 Kɑ ge cir yi jɑggi gwøg kinni, “Nyi tyëgu gwøøg wun ceth, gwøøg cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kí cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd wu nyii thödhø ki nor.”" 
Exodus5:14 Kɑ jɑggi tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb kömi gwøg pwöd yi jɑggi Rïp møg-ɑ cïrø ki gwøg, ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ede kwɑnni thob møg-ɑ dwɑddi, ɑ bɑnyu gen ki tyëgø gwøgø, ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ ki dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ni kenyi göög wun cøn?”" 
Exodus5:15 Kɑ jɑggi tyëng Isrɑil ókedhø, kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ kö rɑ̈dh, ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ede bɑ̈nggí ɑ göggí gen ki gïn ni men?" 
Exodus5:16 Bong nor mɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn, o wø yöd wø ceg kɑ cirø kinni, ‘Gwøgu thob!’ Wø ceg kɑ pwödø, o bɑ̈jjø bɑ mi jií.”" 
Exodus5:17 Alögge kinni, “Wu bɑ rɑjj, bene ɑ kööb wun kinni, ‘Wiy wø kedhi wøn be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì!’" 
Exodus5:18 Dhwödh wun, kedhu be tïj! O wu pɑ thödhi ki nor, de gwøg wun kwɑnni thob men-ɑ dwɑddi kì yï wun ceth!”" 
Exodus5:19 Kɑ jɑggi tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈thi gen ócungø yi cigg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, i kwɑnni thob møg-ɑ nyi gwøg ki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ko dwöög cyɑ̈n kinni tek." 
Exodus5:20 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yuud yi gen ge ócungø kì yöö keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen kì buti rɑ̈dh. 
Exodus5:21 Kɑ gï köbbi gen kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ree óluge wun kɑ wu cɑy yi en, kipe kɑ ɑ́løgu wøn tyëngrijjø kì bøli rɑ̈dh geki jɑgge, kɑ cinggi gen cïbi yi wun ki pilø men nɑ̈g gen wøn.”" 
Exodus5:22 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ døøg-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wuö, ede jií ɑ göggí gen ki gïnrɑj ni men? Á kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn?" 
Exodus5:23 Kër-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ be kwøb wøki rɑ̈dh ki nyingí, ji ceg kɑ göggø yi en ki gïnrɑj, o jií nuti yielø yi yïn kinni tek.”" 
Exodus6:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ólidh yi yïn ɑnɑn, ge ócyeddi yi en ki tegø, gï óryeeme wɑ̈g kì pinye ki tegø.”" 
Exodus6:2 Jwøk ɑ́kööb geki Mosɑ̀, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbe kinni, “Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus6:3 Yɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bøli Abrɑhɑm, kɑ yɑ ocwöbø kì bøli Isɑɑk, kí bøli Yɑgob. Yɑ ɑ́cwølli yi gen yɑn ɑ́ Jwøk Áyïmø, de nyingɑ kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti nyudhi gen yi yɑn." 
Exodus6:4 Kɑ kɑɑm wøn cïbɑ ki lwöbø wøki gen thyew, kinni ge ómëggɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn, piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́bëëd yi gen gɑ wëdhh." 
Exodus6:5 Ywøøg tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́rum ki lïngø yi yɑn, yi gööj bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø men-ɑ ɑ́cïb kömi gen yi tyëng Rïp. O köngɑ ɑ́pɑr yi yɑn." 
Exodus6:6 Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn wɑ̈g kì yij tïny-ɑ ɑ́cïb kömi wun yi ji-ɑ ɑ́cïb kömi wun yi tyëng Rïp, wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. O wu óyiel yi yɑn ki tegø geki cɑ́y mø døngø." 
Exodus6:7 Wu ókwɑny yi yɑn wu bɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑ bɑ Jwøøg wun. O yod yi wun kinni yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì yij piny Rïp." 
Exodus6:8 Wu ókïdhɑ piny-ɑ́ pere ɑ́köngɑ kinni ómëggɑ Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob. O ómuuj yi yɑn ceth, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o lɑg yi wun ceth.”" 
Exodus6:9 Kɑ møgɑni köbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Mosɑ̀, de ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngi kwøbbi Mosɑ̀, mɑ́ köthi gen buudhø yi bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
Exodus6:10 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus6:11 “Bïí kedh köbbí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, o tyëng Isrɑil öre wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp.”" 
Exodus6:12 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lidh tyëng Isrɑil, kwøbbɑ nuti lïngø yi gen, de rɑ̈dh ólïng ɑ dï, yɑ bɑ ngɑn nyi dhɑ̈li kwøb!”" 
Exodus6:13 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron, köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbu tyëng Isrɑil geki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp kinni, bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun kinni peej wun tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp.”" 
Exodus6:14 Møg bene gen wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen: Wɑ̈ddi Ruben, kɑyi Yɑgob, Aɑnök kí Pɑlu, Ëdhrön kí Kɑrmì, bene gen kɑ̈lli Ruben ɑgɑk." 
Exodus6:15 Wɑ̈ddi Cimeøn, Yemuel kí Yɑmïn, kí Oɑ̈ɑ̈d, kí Yɑkin, kí Dhoɑr, kí Cɑul wɑ̈d nyɑɑr Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ̈llɑni cöll-ɑ nyingi kweyyi gen." 
Exodus6:16 Møg bene gen nyingi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Leebì: Gercön, kí Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí Merɑrì. Leebì ɑ́bëëd kɑ runn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Exodus6:17 Wɑ̈ddi Gercön. Libnì kí Cimeì. 
Exodus6:18 Wɑ̈ddi Kɑ̈ɑ̈th bɑ Amrɑm, kí Idhɑr, kí Kibrön, kí Udhiel. Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́bëëd kɑ runn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Exodus6:19 Wɑ̈ddi Merɑrì bɑ Mɑklì, kí Mucì. Møgɑni bene gen wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Leebì ɑgɑk kɑ̀ lwøøb gen." 
Exodus6:20 Kɑ Amrɑm, Yökebed wønye nywøm yi en, ɑnywøle Aɑron geki Mosɑ̀. Amrɑm ɑ́bëëd kɑ runn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Exodus6:21 Wɑ̈ddi Idhɑr bɑ Körɑ̀, kí Nepeg, kí Dhikrì." 
Exodus6:22 Wɑ̈ddi Udhiel bɑ Micɑil, kí Eldhɑpɑn, kí Sïthrì." 
Exodus6:23 Kɑ Alicebɑ̀ nyɑɑr Aminɑdɑb, ɑ bɑ nyimï Nɑɑ̈cön, nywøm yi Aɑron. Anyölle gøn Nɑdɑb, kí Abiu, kí Eliɑdhɑr, kí Ithɑmɑr." 
Exodus6:24 O wɑ̈ddi Körɑ̀ bɑ Asïïr, kí Elkɑnɑ̀, kí Abiyɑsɑp. Bene gen wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Körɑ̀ ɑgɑk." 
Exodus6:25 Kɑ Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d Aɑron ónyömø ki dhɑjø kì kelli nyigi Putiel, ɑnyölle gøn Pineɑs. Møgɑni bene wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Leebì." 
Exodus6:26 Aɑron geki Mosɑ̀, bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu kɑ̈lli Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp.”" 
Exodus6:27 Gen ɑ ɑ́kööb ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, o kɑ̈ɑ̈le tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì cinggi tyëng Rïp, bene gen Mosɑ̀, geki Aɑron kì ri gen." 
Exodus6:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki Mosɑ̀ kì piny Rïp," 
Exodus6:29 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ kööbø, köbbí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ki møg-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn bënn.”" 
Exodus6:30 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Dhøgɑ nyii dhɑ̈lø ki kwøb, o kwøbbɑ ólïngi yi rɑ̈dh kidï!”" 
Exodus7:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn yï nɑ Jwøk kì yï rɑ̈dh, o Aɑron ómyëw bëëde ɑ́ jɑltöngí." 
Exodus7:2 Nyi kwøb møg-ɑ cïgɑ yïn bënn, o Aɑron ómyëw nyi köbbe rɑ̈dh kipe kinni, o tyëng Isrɑil wiye kedh gen kì pinye." 
Exodus7:3 De pyëw rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ógwøgɑ e teeg, o ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø møgɑ gwøgɑ ge gïïr kì piny Rïp." 
Exodus7:4 Keny-ɑ ódhɑ̈li rɑ̈dh ki lïngi kwøbbi wun, cingɑ ócïbɑ ri Rïp, kɑ yɑyɑ, ɑ løg jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp ki cɑ́y mø teg." 
Exodus7:5 O óyod yi tyëng Rïp kinni yɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ócïbɑ cingɑ ri Rïp, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli gen.”" 
Exodus7:6 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron, møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Exodus7:7 Mosɑ̀ runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o Aɑron runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb gen ki rɑ̈dh." 
Exodus7:8 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus7:9 “Keny-ɑ ókööb rɑ̈dh ki wun, kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Nyodh wun ngïjji wun!’ Köbbí Aɑron kinni, ‘Kwɑny lodhí, kɑ leeng piny kì bøli rɑ̈dh.’ Ree órøje thwöl.”" 
Exodus7:10 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kedh-ɑ bøli rɑ̈dh, kɑ ge ogöögø ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Aɑron lodhe leenge piny kì bøli rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈gge, kɑ ree løge thwöl." 
Exodus7:11 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp tyëdde geki ɑ́jwögge cwööle, kɑ ge ogöögø kinøw ki yɑɑdh gen." 
Exodus7:12 Kɑ ɑ́jwöggì lødhi gen leeng gen piny, kɑ ri gen løg gen thöllì. Kɑ lødhi gen mwøøny yi loodh Aɑron." 
Exodus7:13 De pyëw rɑ̈dh ɑ́yöd e ceg-ɑ tëngø, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbbi gen ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus7:14 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Rɑ̈dh wïje teeg, ji ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kedhø." 
Exodus7:15 Kedhí yï rɑ̈dh dhuki kì mwøl keny-ɑ ókedhe gɑ̈d, kɑ yï cungí kì bøle kì gɑ̈d, e lonh-ɑ ɑ́røj ree ɑ́ thwöl okɑ̈llø yi yïn kì cingí.”" 
Exodus7:16 Kɑ köbbí kinni, “Jwøøg tyëng Ibru, yɑ ɑ́öre yïí be kwøb kinni, ‘Wiy jiɑ kedh gen, o yɑ mɑlli yi gen kì yij pɑ̈l.’ De yï ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngø gïti ɑnɑn.”" 
Exodus7:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, i óyod yi yïn kì ri møg ki mɑ løge’ men. Lidh, pïi nɑm ógøj yi yɑn ki lodh men-ɑ cingɑ èn, o pï ri gen løg gen remø." 
Exodus7:18 O rij thøw gen kì Kiir. Kiir ópënni, kɑ tyëng Rïp ódhɑ̈lø mɑdh ki pïi Kiir.”" 
Exodus7:19 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí Aɑron kinni, ‘Kwɑny lodhí kɑ bɑdí rïïj kömi nɑ̈mmi Rïp, kí ɑgɑlle, kí luyyi pï, o pï ri gen løg gen remø. Pï ógöögø’ remø kì Rïp, cɑgg ɑ́ møg ying yethi ɑ́tɑ̈yyi ɑ́bwödd, wɑlɑ̀ yethi ɑ́tɑ̈yyi kïttì.”" 
Exodus7:20 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ogöögø ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Aɑron lodh tïnge, kɑ pïg-ɑ nɑm gøje e onennø yi rɑ̈dh geki bɑ̈ngge, kɑ pïi nɑm bënn ogöögø ki remø." 
Exodus7:21 Kɑ rij othøø kì Kiir. Nɑm ɑ́pëni, kɑ tyëng Rïp ódhɑ̈lø mɑdh kì Kiir. Kɑ pïngø bëne ogöögø ki remø kì piny Rïp." 
Exodus7:22 Kɑ ɑ́jwöggi Rïp ogöögø ni menɑni ki yɑɑdh gen. Kɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh ótëngø, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbbi gen ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus7:23 Kɑ rɑ̈dh kedh-ɑ gøle kì wɑ̈ye e gïgɑni wøye’ wøyø. 
Exodus7:24 Kɑ tyëng Rïp ceg-ɑ kony ki pïg mɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì tøggi nɑm, mɑ́ ge pɑ cuggi mɑdh ki pïi Kiir." 
Exodus7:25 Kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew opödhø kì bɑng gøji nɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Exodus8:1 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí yï rɑ̈dh kɑ köbbí kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Ör jiɑ, o yɑ mɑlli yi gen." 
Exodus8:2 Keløg yï óbɑ̈nyi ki öri gen, myërrí bënn göjjɑ’ ógwɑ̈llì." 
Exodus8:3 Nɑm óngøg ki ógwɑ̈llì, kɑ ógwɑ̈llì turr-ɑ gølí, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ øn-ɑ nyi buud yi yïn. Kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ wïj pyëní, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kɑ̈lli jø tøg burí, kí kɑ̈lli tyëng pödhí, kí yethi udd-ɑ nyi bul ópùn, kí ɑ́tɑ̈yy-ɑ yethi gen nyi nyööm ɑwɑ̈jj." 
Exodus8:4 Ógwɑ̈llì ópɑ̈rri kì kömí, kí kömi jií, kí kömi jø tøg burí bënn.’ ”" 
Exodus8:5 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí Aɑron kinni, ‘Rïj bɑdí ki lodhí kì cingí; rïïj kömi nɑ̈mmì kí ɑgɑll, kí luyyì, kɑ ógwɑ̈llì kɑ̈ɑ̈l kömi piny Rïp.’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Kɑ Aɑron bɑde rïïje kömi pïi Rïp, kɑ ógwɑ̈llì bï-ɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ piny Rïp opɑ̈ngø yi gen, de lɑ̈bø pɑ nënni." 
Exodus8:7 Kɑ ɑ́jwöggì ogöögø kinøw ki yɑɑdh gen, kɑ ge kɑ̈n-ɑ piny Rïp ki ógwɑ̈llì." 
Exodus8:8 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron cwøl yi rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kwɑjju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j o ógwɑ̈llì nyiig yi en kì riɑ, kí ri jiɑ, codhe, o wu ör yi yɑn wuki jii wun, o wu kedhu be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì.”" 
Exodus8:9 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Köbbí yɑn bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjji yi yɑn kiperí, kí per jø tøg burí, kí jií, o ógwɑ̈llì nɑ̈g kì gølí, kí kɑ̈lli jø tøg burí geki kɑ̈lli jií, o dönge ɑ́ møg-ɑ ying Kiir?”" 
Exodus8:10 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Dhuki!” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Nɑ kɑ ɑ́kwøbií, o yod yi yïn kinni bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus8:11 Ógwɑ̈llì ókedh kì butí kí kɑ̈llí, kí kɑ̈lli jø tøg burí, kí kɑ̈lli jií; møg-ɑ Kiir keti gen ɑ ódöng.”" 
Exodus8:12 Akedh Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kì buti rɑ̈dh, kɑ Mosɑ̀ ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kwøbbi ógwɑ̈llì møg-ɑ ɑ́göjje rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp." 
Exodus8:13 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j oyïëyø’ kwøbbi Mosɑ̀, ɑthøw ógwɑ̈llì kì yethi ud, kí yethi kɑ̈llì, kí yethi pwödh." 
Exodus8:14 Kɑ ge congi gɑ börr, kɑ piny ceg-ɑ pënnø yi gen." 
Exodus8:15 De keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi rɑ̈dh kinni ryɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, kɑ wïje ótëngø, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbbi gen ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus8:16 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí Aɑron kinni, ‘Rïj bɑdí kí lodhí kì cingí, kɑ tør kì piny gøøj, o ree løge bɑ̈y kì piny Rïp bëne.’ ”" 
Exodus8:17 Agöög Aɑron kinøw, kɑ bɑde rïje ki lodhe kì cinge, kɑ tør gøje ki lodhe, kɑ bɑ̈yø ceg-ɑ ì thoodh kì kelli ji geki kelli lɑ̈yy. Tør ree ɑ́løge bɑ̈y kì piny Rïp bëne." 
Exodus8:18 Kɑ ɑ́jwöggì ri gen pɑ̈nyi gen ki gwøg kinøw ki yɑɑdh gen, de ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li gwøg ki bɑ̈y kì ri tør, kɑ bɑ̈y tɑɑy-ɑ kömi ji geki lɑ̈yy." 
Exodus8:19 Aköbbi rɑ̈dh yi ɑ́jwöggì kinni, “Men bɑ gwøøg Jwøk!” De pyëw rɑ̈dh nudd e teeg, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbbi gen ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus8:20 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Møøl yï rɑ̈dh dhuki kì mwøl, keny-ɑ óbëëne gɑ̈d, kɑ köbbí kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Wiy jiɑ kedh gen, o yɑ wøw yi gen." 
Exodus8:21 Mɑ́ keløg jiɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈n kedhø yi yïn, yï ógöjjɑ lwɑngì wuki jø tøg burí, kí jií, kí uddí, kí uddi Rïp bënn, men-ɑ́ keny-ɑ ódi gen ópɑ̈ng yi lwɑngø bëne." 
Exodus8:22 De myërri Göcen, kun-ɑ bëëd yi jiɑ, ógeedɑ wɑ̈ye, o óbëëd e bong lwɑngì møg-ɑ óying kunɑni, o yod yi yïn kinni, Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ nud kì piny keny." 
Exodus8:23 O kɑɑm jiɑ geki jií ócïbɑ ki kew. Ngïji menɑni ócwöb dhuki.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lwɑngì ɑ́ceg ì buk kì gøl rɑ̈dh, kí kɑ̈lli jø tøg bure, kí piny Rïp bëne, kɑ piny órënyø yi lwɑngì." 
Exodus8:25 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron cwøl yi rɑ̈dh kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedh wun, ngɑ̈ddu Jwøøg wun kì pönhï.”" 
Exodus8:26 Akööb Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Pɑth ki dyër eni gwøgi gïn ni menɑni, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ óngɑ̈lli wøn Jwøøg wøn ɑ́ gëëdhi, pɑ cuggi nywɑlø yi tyëng Rïp. Keløg wø ongɑ̈dø ki gïjø me pɑ cuggi nywɑlø yi tyëng Rïp kì bøli gen, wø pɑ bɑ̈lli yi gen ki tuggi kïttì!" 
Exodus8:27 Wø ceg-ɑ kedhi yij pɑ̈l kɑɑm me cɑɑdh ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, o Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑ̈ddi yi wøn ki gëdhhì kì kunɑni ni kɑ ɑ́cege wøn.”" 
Exodus8:28 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Wu ówiy yi yɑn o wu kedhu yij pɑ̈l be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì. De wu ko kedhi kun me lɑ̈wi cɑrø. Kɑ wu kwɑ̈jji wun kiperɑ cyee!”" 
Exodus8:29 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ kedh kì bølí èn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókwɑjji yi yɑn kipe kinni o lwɑngì kedh gen kì gølí geki kɑ̈lli jø tøg burí, kí kɑ̈lli jií dhuki. De wø ko cigí wënyø këti, ji ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n kedhi be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì.”" 
Exodus8:30 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ókedhø kì buti rɑ̈dh, ɑkwɑjje Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus8:31 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjji yi Mosɑ̀ yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Akedh lwɑngì kì gøl rɑ̈dh, kí kɑ̈lli jø tøg bure, kí kɑ̈lli jie. Bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng." 
Exodus8:32 De rɑ̈dh wïje ɑ́tëngi thyew këti, kɑ ji mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kedhø." 
Exodus9:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí yï rɑ̈dh kɑ köbbí kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg tyëng Ibru okööbø kinni, Ör jiɑ, o ge kedhi gen be wøwi yɑn." 
Exodus9:2 De keløg yï óbɑ̈nyi këti ki öri gen," 
Exodus9:3 jɑmmí ógøj yi yɑn, dhögí, kí kyënyí, kí ɑderrí, kí ɑmɑllí, kí dyëgí ge óthøw, óbëëd ɑ́ ryɑ̈g me dwøng." 
Exodus9:4 O kɑɑm jɑmmi tyëng Isrɑil geki jɑmmi tyëng Rïp ócïbɑ ki kew, bong gïjø men-ɑ óthøw kì kelli jɑmmi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Exodus9:5 Kɑ bøli kenyɑni cïb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Gïnɑni ógwøg yi yɑn dhuki kì pönhï.’ ”" 
Exodus9:6 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dhuki, kɑ jɑmmi tyëng Rïp othøø, de bong gïjø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́thøw kì ri jɑmmi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Exodus9:7 Kɑ rɑ̈dh oödø kinni liidh jɑmmi tyëng Isrɑil mɑ thøw gen, kɑ yod e bong ɑ́kyel me thøø kì kelli jɑmmi tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh ótëngø, ɑmɑ̈ɑ̈ne tyëng Isrɑil kedhø." 
Exodus9:8 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈bbi wun ki búr cinggi wun pɑ̈ng kì yij purun, kɑ wiiw mɑl yi Mosɑ̀ kì bøli rɑ̈dh." 
Exodus9:9 Ógöögø ki tør me tɑɑy yij piny rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp bëne, dëlli ji kí dëlli lɑ̈yy ómɑg yi børi búrɑni, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ bør ópyëdø ge ololø ki túd.”" 
Exodus9:10 Codhe, kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki búr kì yij purun, ɑcungi gen kì bøli rɑ̈dh, kɑ búrɑni kwøør mɑl yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ ogöögø ki bør, ge ololø ki túd kì ri ji geki lɑ̈yy." 
Exodus9:11 Ájwöggì ɑ́dhɑ̈li gwøg ki gwøng ni menɑni, mɑ́ gen kì ri gen dëlli gen ɑ́mɑg yi bør kyeel ki tyëng Rïp møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Exodus9:12 De pyëw rɑ̈dh ɑ́gwøg e teeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbbi gen ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus9:13 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Møøl yï rɑ̈dh kì mwøl, kɑ köbbí kinni, Jwøøg tyëng Ibru, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Wiy jiɑ kedhi gen be mɑlli yɑn." 
Exodus9:14 Mɑ́ kì bøli keny ɑnɑn, ryɑ̈gɑ tööngɑ’ kömí, wuki jø tøg burí, kí jií bënn, o yod yi yïn kinni bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yɑn kì piny bëne." 
Exodus9:15 Mɑ́ ɑnɑn cingɑ di rïïjɑ kɑ yï nɑ̈g yi yɑn wuki jií bënn, kɑ wɑ̈thi wun di pɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì pönhï." 
Exodus9:16 De yï ɑ́wiy yi yɑn kɑ per kinni, o yï nyudhɑ tegɑ, thyew o nyingɑ geki perɑ yod kì kömi piny bëne." 
Exodus9:17 Anɑn yï nudd yï gengg-ɑ jiɑ, ge mɑ̈ɑ̈ní kedhø!" 
Exodus9:18 Dhuki piny nɑ men, yɑ óöni ki yømi ɑ́piy me dwøng cɑrø, yømi ɑ́piy me ni menɑni nuti pɑ̈nyi könø kì Rïp kër-ɑ ɑ́cöbii gïti ɑnɑn." 
Exodus9:19 Öd kinni kïdhi dhögí kí jɑmmí bënn yethi lwɑ̈gg, kɑ ji kedhi gen yethi ud. Møg-ɑ ópïïd yij pwödhø yi ɑ́piy ceg-ɑ thøø.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bwøg yi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kelli jø rɑ̈dh, ge ɑ́rengi yethi ud, gen ki bɑ̈nggi gen ki jɑmmi gen." 
Exodus9:21 De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pëëm, bɑ̈nggi gen geki jɑmmi gen ɑ́wiy wɑ̈g yi gen." 
Exodus9:22 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Rïïj cingí mɑl, o ɑtuni ɑ́piy pɑ̈dhe kömi Rïp bëne, o ködde kömi dhɑnhø kí lɑ̈y bëne, kí luum pɑ̈l kì piny Rïp bëne.”" 
Exodus9:23 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ lodhe nyoodhe mɑl. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́piy gööje piny, kɑ mɑl opödø kɑ piny rɑ̈be, kɑ yømø me lïb gøøj yij piny Rïp yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus9:24 Kɑ ji othøø yi kööjø e mɑl ceg-ɑ pöd, o mɑc cem-ɑ rɑ̈d, o ɑ́piy odyëmø. Atunø me ni menɑni nuti pɑ̈nyø lidhø kì piny Rïp kër-ɑ ɑ́cööb pönhɑni." 
Exodus9:25 Kɑ ji geki lɑ̈yy møg-ɑ ɑ́yuud wɑ̈g yi ɑtuni ɑ́piy menɑni othøø bënn. Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ twïyø kì yethi pwödh órënyø bënn, kɑ yenh ótørrø bënn." 
Exodus9:26 De bong ɑtuni ɑ́piy mɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud kì piny Göcen, kun-ɑ bëëd yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Exodus9:27 Kɑ rɑ̈dh oödø, ɑcwööl Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji ɑnɑn këti. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ ngɑntir, dɑ́ wøn ɑ rijjø wøki jiɑ." 
Exodus9:28 Kwɑjju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pööd mɑl geki ɑtuni ɑ́piy cungi gen. Wu ówiy yi yɑn o wu kedh wun. Wu koo nudd wu bëëd ɑ keny këti.”" 
Exodus9:29 Aköbbii yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Keny-ɑ ókedhɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, yɑ ókedh kɑ cinggɑ thɑ̈ngɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o mɑl wïye ki pöd, o ɑ́piy cöge e pɑ cigi dyëmø. O yod yi yïn kinni, piny bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus9:30 De ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nudd e pɑ böggi yi wun, wuki jø tøg burí.”" 
Exodus9:31 Kitɑn geki ceir ɑ́rënyi, mɑ́ ceir ɑ́yuud e rum dhɑ̈yø, o kitɑn rum køøg." 
Exodus9:32 De gemè geki gɑthɑnì nuti rënyø mɑ́ ge nyi cyeg-ɑ cyɑ̈n. 
Exodus9:33 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ókedhø kì buti rɑ̈dh kì kɑɑl e cingge thɑ̈ng en Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ pööd mɑl ócungø geki yømø, kɑ kødh ówïyø dyëëm piny." 
Exodus9:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi rɑ̈dh kinni kødh ɑ́cög, kɑ pööd mɑl ócungø geki ɑ́piy, ɑdøøge ki bɑ̈jjø, kɑ pyëwe cwede geki bɑ̈ngge." 
Exodus9:35 Kɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh ótëngø, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ocögø gï pɑ wëgge kedhø, ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Mosɑ̀." 
Exodus10:1 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí yï rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́wëggɑ tëngø geki jø tøg bure, kɑ per kinni o yɑ nyodhɑ ngïjjì møgɑ." 
Exodus10:2 Thyew kiper kinni o møgɑni óköbbí wɑ̈ddí, kí wɑ̈ddi wɑ̈ddí, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ tyëng Rïp, tyëng-ɑ dhëgg, geki ngïjjì møg-ɑ ɑ́nyodh yi yɑn kì kelli gen, o óyod yi wun kinni yɑ bene Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus10:3 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbii yi gen kinni, “Jwøøg tyëng Ibru, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng yï bɑ̈nyi ki dwöögi wïjí piny kì bølɑ? Wiy jiɑ kedh gen, o yɑ mɑlli yi gen." 
Exodus10:4 Mɑ́ keløg yï óbɑ̈nyi ki wiyi jiɑ, myërrí ómuuj yi yɑn ki bɑ̈nyø dhuki." 
Exodus10:5 Piny ókum yi bɑ̈nyø. Kɑ piny ódhɑ̈lø nënnø yi ngenyi bɑ̈nyø. O jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì yï wun kì bɑng ɑtuni ɑ́piy cɑm yi en, o yenh-ɑ twïyø kì yethi bɑ̈gg cɑm yi en." 
Exodus10:6 Kɑ̈llí ópɑ̈ng yi bɑ̈nyø, kí kɑ̈lli jø tøg burí geki kɑ̈lli tyëng Rïp bënn, gïjø me nuti pɑ̈nyø lidhø yi wëëg wun, kí wëëg wëëg wun ki kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gen kì kömi piny, gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn.’ ” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ókedhø kì buti rɑ̈dh." 
Exodus10:7 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi jø tøg bure kinni, “Jɑɑl, gït-ɑ wɑɑng e muuj-ɑ wɑ ki ryɑ̈g! Kwïj yi yïn kinni Rïp ɑ́rënyi? Wiy tyëng Isrɑil kedhi gen be mɑlli Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus10:8 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron dwöög bøli rɑ̈dh. Aköbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedhu be mɑlli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De köbbu yɑn mɑ yinge’ men ki men ɑ kedh?”" 
Exodus10:9 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Wøkí yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb kí jøgdøngi wøn ɑ kedh, kí wɑ̈ddi wøn geki nyigi wøn, kí dyëgi wøn geki dhögi wøn, mɑ́ wø kedh-ɑ be wøwi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus10:10 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ókøny wun ke wiyɑ wun, o wu kedh wun, wuki nyigi wun kì Rïp. Nënni wu dwɑdd-ɑ gwøg ki gïnrɑj." 
Exodus10:11 Pɑth! Jøg-ɑ cwøw keti gen ɑ kedhi be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bene gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi wun.” Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ ryeem wɑ̈g yi rɑ̈dh geki Aɑron kì gøle." 
Exodus10:12 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Tïng cingí mɑl kì kömi piny Rïp, o bɑ̈nyø bëe. Bɑ̈nyø ótɑɑy yij piny Rïp bëne, o lum geki yenh-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑng ɑtuni ɑ́piy cɑm yi en.”" 
Exodus10:13 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ lodhe tïnge mɑl kì kömi piny Rïp, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókönø ki yømø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ cɑ̈ng tyëge e ókwöddø kì pönhɑni kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ wɑ̈r tyëge. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën mwøl, yømɑni rum kɑ̈nø ki bɑ̈nyø." 
Exodus10:14 Kɑ bɑ̈nyø pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi piny Rïp bëne, kɑ ceg-ɑ ì nɑb kì yethi myërri Rïp bënn ɑ́ thïgø thïgø, bong bɑ̈nyø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi bëënø e nɑ menɑni, wɑlɑ̀ bong men-ɑ óbï kì bɑnge e pɑ̈r ki en." 
Exodus10:15 Piny ɑ́dhɑ̈li nennø yi bɑ̈nyø. Kɑ piny ólunyø yi bɑ̈nyø. Kɑ lum geki yenh cɑm yi en kinni tweet, kí yenhi nywøl møg-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑng ɑtuni ɑ́piy. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng e mɑr kì ri lùm geki yenh kì yethi pwödh, kì piny Rïp bëne." 
Exodus10:16 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron jwɑn ki cwølø yi rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji kì bøli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí bøli wun." 
Exodus10:17 Anɑn lɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi wun ki yɑn, kɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwɑjji wun kiperɑ, o gïn-ɑ bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g ni men kɑ̈l yi en kì butɑ.”" 
Exodus10:18 Codhe, ɑkedh Mosɑ̀ kì buti rɑ̈dh, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjje." 
Exodus10:19 Kɑ yømø me teeg cɑrø lug yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kɑ bɑ̈nyø wøøje, kɑ gø cuure Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø. Bong bɑ̈nyø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng kì myërri Rïp bënn." 
Exodus10:20 Kɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh wëggi tëngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcöge tyëng Isrɑil pɑ wëgge kedhø." 
Exodus10:21 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Tïng cingí mɑl kì kömi piny Rïp, o piny gööge ki muudhø, me yije cɑɑg wɑ̈rrø.”" 
Exodus10:22 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ bɑde rïïje mɑl, kɑ muudhø me dwøng bï-ɑ kömi piny Rïp bëne ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Exodus10:23 Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lidh wɑɑd gen; bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́dhwödh kì keje ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g. De kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd yi tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd e dɑ cɑr. 
Exodus10:24 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ cwøl yi rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kedh wun kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlli wun, kɑ dhögi wun geki dyëgi wun wiy, de mɑ̈nni wun geki nyigi wun ócuggø kedhø kí wun.”" 
Exodus10:25 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “De yïn thyew, muuj ki gëdhhì møg-ɑ óngɑ̈lli wøn Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus10:26 Jɑmmi wøn thyew ceg-ɑ kedhø kí wøn, bong dɑdø me döng, mɑ́ gen ɑ ri gen ókɑ̈bbi yi wøn ki møg-ɑ wøw wøn Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kwïj yi wøn eni gïn-ɑ ówøw wøn Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi wøn kunɑni.”" 
Exodus10:27 De pyëw rɑ̈dh ɑ́wëggi tëngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki wëggi gen kedhø." 
Exodus10:28 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedhí wɑ̈g kì keny, kɑ yï ko dwöög këti. Odwöög yïɑ, yï ceg-ɑ thøø!”" 
Exodus10:29 Codhe, ɑköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Gen ɑgɑk, ɑ́kwøb yi yïn, yɑ pɑ dwöög be lidhi yïn këti.”" 
Exodus11:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ádöng ɑ́ ryɑ̈g ɑ́kyel ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi Rïp, codhe o wu ör wɑ̈g yi rɑ̈dh, wu bënn, wu ócire ki cïïr dwøng." 
Exodus11:2 Köbbí jøg-ɑ cwøw geki mɑ̈nni Isrɑil kinni, cwöddi gen ki jɑmm-ɑ bɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø kì yï mɑ̈dhhi gen.”" 
Exodus11:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́wëgge wørø yi tyëng Rïp. Mosɑ̀ thyew mïdhi ɑ́ jɑl me pere teeg cɑrø yi rɑ̈dh geki jø tøg bure, kí ji bënn." 
Exodus11:4 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Tïn kì dïwɑ̈r, yɑ kedh-ɑ kelli Rïp," 
Exodus11:5 wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø bëne ceg-ɑ thøø kì piny Rïp, cɑg kì ri kɑyi rɑ̈dh ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj kwøm, gïti ri kɑyi bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki byel. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑyyi lɑ̈yy thyew, ge ceg-ɑ thøø." 
Exodus11:6 Ywøg me dwøng óbëëd e nud kì piny Rïp bëne. Bong mɑ ɑ́bëëd e nɑ menɑni, o bong men-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l bɑnge e nɑ en." 
Exodus11:7 De bong gwög men-ɑ ógwɑ̈y tyëng Isrɑil, dhɑnhø kí lɑ̈y pɑ gwɑ̈y yi en, o yod yi wun kinni yɑ ɑ́cïb ki kew kì kɑɑm Rïp geki Isrɑil.’ ”" 
Exodus11:8 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Jø tøg burí bënn óbï yïɑ, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bølɑ, ge okööbø kinni, ‘Kedh kɑ jií kɑ̈ɑ̈l bënn.’ Codhe o yɑ kedhɑ cyee.” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ókedhø kì buti rɑ̈dh pyëwe rɑɑj cɑrø." 
Exodus11:9 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kwøbbi wun pɑ lïngi yi rɑ̈dh gïti keny-ɑ óngënyi ngïjjì møgɑ kì piny Rïp.”" 
Exodus11:10 Ngïjjì møgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kì bøli rɑ̈dh, kɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh wëggi tëngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcöge tyëng Isrɑil pɑ wëgge kedhø kì pinye." 
Exodus12:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi kì Rïp yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus12:2 “Dwɑ̈y men bene dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl kì yï wun kibøli dwɑ̈tt bënn. Bene en dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl kì yij run. 
Exodus12:3 Köbbu tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, yɑ̈ɑ̈b dhɑnhø ki órömø kipe tyëng gøle, keny-ɑ ógöög cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y men ki pyɑ̈rø." 
Exodus12:4 Keløg e bong ji mø gïïr kì kɑl møg cuggi tyëgi órömɑni, nywɑg ge gøn ki gøl-ɑ bute, e røøm ki kwɑnni ji. Kwɑn ceth ɑ́ kɑ̈jji dhøggi jiɑni, eni órömø." 
Exodus12:5 Yɑb ɑ́ órömø me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, rune ɑ́kyel. Dyelɑni ócuggø bëëdø ɑ́ órömø wɑlɑ̀ ónywøg." 
Exodus12:6 Kɑ ge mïdhi wun gïti keny-ɑ ógöög cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y men ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen. Ngɑɑl gen yi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn kì böörø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, e piny nuti lunyø." 
Exodus12:7 Kɑ ge kɑ̈bbi gen kì ri remø, kɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈j ri bɑ̈lli ud geki bøli tëdd kì mɑl, kì kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi gen cɑɑm dyelɑni." 
Exodus12:8 Kɑ dyelɑni bul ki mɑc kì wɑ̈rɑni. Kɑ cɑm ki lùm mø keej geki ópun me bɑ ɑbul ɑ́ ɑwɑj me bɑ olwëny. 
Exodus12:9 Ko di gïjø me cɑm kì ree e nuti cyegø, wɑlɑ̀ ko di me thɑl ki pï, de ceg ki bulø ki mɑc, kí wïje geki tyelle, kí cïnne." 
Exodus12:10 Kɑ ko di men wiy yi wun kì ree gïti mwøl, keløg e dɑ men wɑ̈dhi mwøl, rɑ̈b wun en ki mɑc." 
Exodus12:11 Cɑmu en, e wënnì ween wun yethi wun, o wɑrri wun ying-ɑ tyelli wun, o lødhi wun ying-ɑ cinggi wun, bene kër-ɑ ócɑm wun en ɑnɑn, mɑ́ e bɑ Ákɑɑdh mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus12:12 “Yɑ ókɑ̈lli yij piny Rïp bëne kì wɑ̈rɑni, o kɑyyì bënn nɑ̈g yi yɑn, cɑg kì ri kɑyi dhɑnhø, gïti ri kɑyi lɑ̈y. O jwöggi Rïp bënn ócɑy yi yɑn, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus12:13 O remø óbëëd ɑ́ ngïjji kɑ̈ll-ɑ di wun. Gøl-ɑ ree lidhɑ remø, ókɑɑdh yi yɑn. Bong gïn-ɑ ónywɑl wun keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ piny Rïp." 
Exodus12:14 Nyi pɑru cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, kɑ wu nyi tuug wun kì yije wu wøw-ɑ yɑn. Rïjji Isrɑil bënn, wør gen yɑn ki wööwø cyɑ̈ngɑni, cɑg ɑnɑn gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus12:15 “Cyɑ̈nggi wööwø menɑni bɑ ɑ́bïryew, wu cɑm-ɑ olwëny kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun ówɑj wɑ̈g kì yethi kɑ̈lli wun kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl. De ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø ki ówɑj kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, cɑg kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl gïti bïryeew cyɑ̈nggɑni, ngɑnɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli Isrɑil." 
Exodus12:16 Nyi cugi wun ki cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl geki bïryeew cyɑ̈ng; ge bɑ cyɑ̈nggi kwër kì yï wun. Bong gïjø me gwøg kì cyɑ̈nggɑni den-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ cɑm kete ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi wun. 
Exodus12:17 Mïdhu kwëër olwëny, mɑ́ e bɑ cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp. Mïdhu menɑni ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër kì yethi rïjj bënn gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus12:18 Cɑ̈gi wun ki cɑmi olwëny kì dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kì thyënhø, gïti keny-ɑ ógöög cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈yɑni ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́kyel kì thyënhø." 
Exodus12:19 Ko di ówɑj me nud kì kɑ̈lli wun ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. De ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø ki ówɑj kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil cɑgg ɑ́ wëdh, ngøl ngɑn ni menɑni wɑ̈ye." 
Exodus12:20 Wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïjø me wɑj kì yethi kɑ̈lli wun bënn, cɑm wun olwëny kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi kwërɑni.”" 
Exodus12:21 Codhe, kɑ jøgdøngi Isrɑil bënn cwøl yi Mosɑ̀, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Kedh wun, kɑ kɑl kɑ̈bbe ki órömø wɑlɑ̀ wɑ̈dtegø kɑ ge ngɑl wun, o kɑ̈lli wun göög gen ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Exodus12:22 Kɑ wu kɑ̈bbi wun ki yelø, kɑ jwɑ̈ɑ̈g wun yij tɑm-ɑ di remø, kɑ remɑni gɑ̈ɑ̈j wun bɑ̈lli uddi wun geki wɑ̈thi tëdd kì mɑl. Kɑ ko di dhɑnhø kì kelli wun men bɑ̈ɑ̈n ɑ́dyëddi kɑl e bï-ɑ wɑ̈g, gïti keny-ɑ óru wøw." 
Exodus12:23 Keny-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be gøji Rïp, kɑ remø lidh yi en kì bɑ̈lli ød geki wïj tëd kì mɑl, gø ókɑɑdhe, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ nɑ̈gø mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kedhi yethi kɑ̈lli wun be nɑ̈ggø." 
Exodus12:24 Kɑ møgɑni mïdhi wun gɑ cigg kiper wun, wuki wɑ̈ddi wun gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus12:25 O keny-ɑ ókedhu piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gø ómëgge wun, mïdhu guöngɑni ceth kidøøj." 
Exodus12:26 O keny-ɑ ópëjji wɑ̈ddi wun kinni, ‘Guöng bɑ ngø kì yï wun?’" 
Exodus12:27 Kɑ wu kööb wun kì bøli kenyɑni kinni, ‘Bɑ gëëdhi, Ákɑɑdh mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑɑdh kɑ̈lli tyëng Isrɑil kì Rïp, keny-ɑ ɑ́gøje Rïp, de kɑ̈llee ɑ́yiele.’ ” Kɑ ji ri gen bøødh gen piny, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl yi gen." 
Exodus12:28 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ókedhø, ɑgwøg gen møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi gen ceth." 
Exodus12:29 Kì dïwɑ̈rɑni ceth, kɑ kɑyyì bënn nɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny Rïp, cɑg kì ri kɑyi rɑ̈dh men-ɑ ólɑg kwøme, gïti ri kɑyi ɑmɑg men-ɑ ød mɑg, kí kɑyyi lɑ̈yy bënn."
