Exodus12:30 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ócyëwø kì wɑ̈rɑni geki jø tøg bure bënn, kí tyëng Rïp bënn. Ádɑ ywøg me dwøng kì Rïp bëne, bong kɑl me yije jɑdø ki ngɑnthøø." 
Exodus12:31 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron cwøle kì wɑ̈rɑni kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Dhwödh wun, kedhu wɑ̈g kì kelli jiɑ, wuki tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ wu kedhu be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́kööb wun." 
Exodus12:32 Kɑ dhögi wun geki dyëgi wun kwɑny wun thyew ni kɑ ɑ́kööb wun, kɑ wu kedh wun. Kwɑ̈jji wun ki gyëdh kiperɑ thyew.”" 
Exodus12:33 Kɑ Isrɑil jwɑn yi tyëng Rïp ki kwøbbi dhwödhø, ge okööbø kinni, “Jwɑnu kedhø kipe wø óthøw bënn.”" 
Exodus12:34 Codhe, kɑ teedø tɑ̈mmi ɑwɑ̈jji gen pɑ̈ng gen ki ɑwɑj olwëny. Kɑ tɑ̈mmi ɑwɑ̈jj bɑɑn gen yethi ógudh, kɑ gï byel gen." 
Exodus12:35 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́göög ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Mosɑ̀ ceth. Kɑ ge ócwöddø kì yï tyëng Rïp ki jɑmm-ɑ bɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegg, kí ógudhi dhwɑ̈ng." 
Exodus12:36 Kɑ pëthi tyëng Rïp yïëbbi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑmuuj gen jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjji kì yï gen bënn. Kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈r Rïp kɑ̈l yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Exodus12:37 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́dhwödh ki tyelli gen kì Rɑmsis ge kedh-ɑ Suköth. Kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cwøw bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïkyel, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn geki othønhø pɑth ki ɑkwɑn." 
Exodus12:38 Ji møøgø mø kwɑnni gen ngenyø thyew ɑ́kedh ki gen, kɑ ge oköödø ki dhög kí dyëg ɑ́tegg kí römm mø gïïr." 
Exodus12:39 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́bud ki ópun ki ɑwɑny-ɑ olwëny men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen kì Rïp. Awɑnyɑni ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen e nuti wɑ̈nyyø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́ceg kɑ cyeed wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ ge ójɑ̈ddø ki keny göög gen ki gïn cɑɑm yöö." 
Exodus12:40 Kwɑnni runn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd tyëng Isrɑil kì Rïp bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Exodus12:41 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi runnɑni gɑ miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑbëën yɑɑy Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, kí wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lle bënn." 
Exodus12:42 Bɑ wɑ̈r men mïdhi ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp, mïdhi yi tyëng Isrɑil, rïny kí rïny, gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus12:43 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bene Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ɑnɑn. Bong wëdh me cyɑ̈mø ki gïi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Exodus12:44 De bɑ̈ng-ɑ jɑlø men bɑ ɑngew ki ngyëny ócuggø cɑm, ke rum en ki ngølø." 
Exodus12:45 Wëlø geki ngɑn-ɑ bɑ ɑkïr, pɑ cyɑ̈mø kì ree." 
Exodus12:46 Cɑm kì kɑl, ko di rïnge me kïdhi wɑ̈g kì gølɑni, kɑ ko di cögø me tor yi wun kì ri cue." 
Exodus12:47 Nyi gwøøg kwërɑni ceth yi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn. 
Exodus12:48 Ngɑnpɑth men-ɑ bëëdø kì butí ócuggø gwøg ki Ákɑɑdh mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De ngølu møg-ɑ bɑ cwøw bënn; ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rum ki ngølø, ócuggø gwøg mɑ́ e ɑ́göög e nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ónywølø kì pönhï." 
Exodus12:49 Cigg ɑ́kyel ɑ dwɑddi kinni o ge mïdhi yi tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen.” 
Exodus12:50 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́yïëy bënn ki møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gïgɑni nyi gwøg yi gen ceth." 
Exodus12:51 Wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny Rïp kì cyɑ̈ngɑni. 
Exodus13:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus13:2 “Thyëyí yɑn kɑyy-ɑ cwøw bënn kì Isrɑil, ying-ɑ́ dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y, bɑ miɑ.”" 
Exodus13:3 Kɑ teedø köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Pɑrri wun cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. Mɑ́ wu ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ tegø me dwøng." 
Exodus13:4 Wu ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kì dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl. 
Exodus13:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu ókïdhe piny tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, geki piny tyëng Kit, kí piny tyëng Amör, kí piny tyëng Kib, kí piny tyëng Yebus. Bene piny men-ɑ ɑ́könge kweyyi wun kinni gø ómëgge wun, eni piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, nyi gwøgu kwër menɑni kì dwɑ̈ɑ̈n." 
Exodus13:6 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew wu cɑm-ɑ olwëny, o bïryeew cyɑ̈nggɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ wøøw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus13:7 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew wu cɑm-ɑ olwëny, ko di ówɑj wɑlɑ̀ gïjø me wɑj kì yethi kɑ̈lli wun." 
Exodus13:8 Köbbu wɑ̈ddi wun kì cyɑ̈ngɑni kinni, ‘Wööwø men gwøg yi wɑ kɑ per gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëën wɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Exodus13:9 O kwërɑni bëëde e bɑ ngïji kì cinggi wun, e nɑ gïn nyi pɑ̈ddi yïn kì bølí, o Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying gen dhøgí, mɑ́ yï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Rïp kɑ tegø me dwøng." 
Exodus13:10 Kɑ ciggɑni mïdhí, yï nyi gwøg-ɑ kwërɑni kì bøli keje ceth kì yethi runn bënn." 
Exodus13:11 “O keny-ɑ ókïdhi wun piny Kɑnɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe wun, wuki wëëg wun," 
Exodus13:12 kɑ kɑyy-ɑ cwøw, ying gɑ ji wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈yy, thyeey gen gɑ mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus13:13 De nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈d kɑyi ɑderø ki órömø. O keløg e pɑ pɑ̈d yi yïn, tor mune. O kɑyi dhɑnhø ócuggø pɑ̈dø, pɑ̈d kɑyyì møg-ɑ bɑ wɑ̈ddí ceth." 
Exodus13:14 Opyëëj yïn dhuki megø yi wɑ̈dí kinni, ‘Men bɑ ngø?’ Kɑ köbbí kinni, ‘Wɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Rïp, kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kɑ tegø me dwøng." 
Exodus13:15 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ɑ́bëëd wïje teeg, kɑ wɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈ne bëën wɑ̈g. Kɑ kɑyyì bënn møg-ɑ bɑ cwøw, ji ki lɑ̈yy nɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij piny Rïp bëne. Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi thyëyi wɑ wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gëëdhi, o nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈d-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Exodus13:16 Wööwø men pɑ̈r ki gïjø men-ɑ ótwööj cingí, o pɑ̈r ki gïjø men-ɑ ótwööj bølí ɑ́ men nyi pɑ̈ddi yïn kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì Rïp kɑ tegø me dwøng.’ ”" 
Exodus13:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ryeem tyëng Isrɑil yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ge nuti wiyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j o ge kɑ̈l gen yuu piny Pelistiyɑ̀, ngö ɑ́ en ɑ cyɑ̈gi. Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni o ji ópɑ̈di gen, keny-ɑ óyod gen liny, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Rïp." 
Exodus13:18 Kɑ ji wen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki yuu yij pɑ̈l, gï töönge’ Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø. Yɑɑy Isrɑil ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì Rïp e rum duudø." 
Exodus13:19 Kɑ dëël Yosep kwöög yi Mosɑ̀. Mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́köbbi yi Yosep cøn kinni köngi gen ki köngi dwøng, kinni, “Wu bɑ møg-ɑ óyiel yi Jwøk kɑ wu kïdhe wɑ̈g kì keny, okedh wun, kɑ dëlɑ kɑ̈l wun.”" 
Exodus13:20 Akedh gen kì Suköth kɑ ge oywömø kì Ethɑm kì tøg ryɑng. 
Exodus13:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli gen ɑ́ lööj pøølø kì dicɑ̈ng, o nyudhe gen yöö, o bɑ lööj mɑc kì wɑ̈r, o menye yuu gen. Kipe kinni o ge cuggi gen ki cyɑ̈dhø kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r." 
Exodus13:22 Lööj pøølø nuti pɑ̈nyi nyegø kì bøli gen kì dicɑ̈ng, o lööj mɑc nuti nyegø kì wɑ̈r." 
Exodus14:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus14:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil o ge døøg gen ngɑ̈thi gen, kɑ ge gud gen kì bøli Pi Akiröth, kɑɑm Migdöl geki Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø kì buti Bɑɑl Dhepön." 
Exodus14:3 O rɑ̈dh rume kinni i tyëng Isrɑil lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, de ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ wïïnø kì yij pɑ̈l." 
Exodus14:4 Codhe, o pyëw rɑ̈dh cwed yi yɑn, o renge bɑng gen. O yɑ yïddɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng kì bɑng rɑ̈dh geki yɑye, o yod yi tyëng Rïp kinni yɑ bene Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi gen ceth." 
Exodus14:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp kinni, i tyëng Isrɑil kedhø, kɑ rumme wile geki bɑ̈ngge, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ kinnï, ɑ wëggi tyëng Isrɑil kedhø yi wɑ? Bɑ̈nggee ɑ́kedh!”" 
Exodus14:6 Kɑ yɑ̈ye cwøle, kɑ jølinye kwɑnye." 
Exodus14:7 Kɑ oyïënyø kì kelli yɑ̈the ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th miy ɑ́bïkyel. Kɑ yɑ̈thi liny mø Rïp bënn ki pëjji liny kì yethi gen odhwödhø. 
Exodus14:8 Pyëw rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ɑ́cwed yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ reng-ɑ bɑng tyëng Isrɑil, ge ɑ́kedh pëthi gen pɑ lïngø." 
Exodus14:9 Kɑ bɑng gen rengi yi tyëng Rïp. Kɑ ge pïïd yi kyënyì geki yɑ̈thi rɑ̈dh, kí jøg-ɑ kömi kyënyì; ge ɑ́pïïd yi liny rɑ̈dh ge guddø kì kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø kì buti Pi Akiröth, kì bøli Bɑɑl Dhepön." 
Exodus14:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh geki linye, ɑliidh tyëng Rïp yi tyëng Isrɑil ge bï-ɑ kömi gen. Kɑ ge obwøgø ki mendwøng. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus14:11 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggí wøn kinnï? Yïde ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp o wø thøw wøn kì yij pɑ̈l? Wø di jɑ̈ddi ki kɑ̈jj møg koony wøn kì Rïp?" 
Exodus14:12 Pɑth ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn yi wøn kì Rïp, kinni, wiy wøn, o wø göggi wøn tyëng Rïp. Mɑ́ göggi tyëng Rïp lɑ̈w kibøli ke thøw wøn kì yij pɑ̈l?”" 
Exodus14:13 Kɑ ji köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ko böggi! Cungi wun kɑ wu nëën wun ki yiel-ɑ óyieel wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng. Tyëng Rïp møg-ɑ nenni yi wun ek dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, ge pɑ cigi lidhø yi wun gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus14:14 Per wun ónyɑg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Pëthi wun ko lïngi.” 
Exodus14:15 Codhe, ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yïde ɑ ywöög köörɑ? Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni cɑ̈gi gen ki kedhø." 
Exodus14:16 De yïn, kwɑny lodhí kɑ bɑdí rïïj kömi nɑm, o pyëde, o tyëng Isrɑil kedhi gen yije e thwøwø." 
Exodus14:17 O pyëw rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ócwed yi yɑn, o kedhe bɑng gen, o yɑ yïddɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng kì bɑng rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki yɑye, kí yɑ̈the, kí kyënye." 
Exodus14:18 Wiy yod yi tyëng Rïp kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ óyïddɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng kì bɑng rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki yɑye, kí yɑ̈the, kí kyënye.”" 
Exodus14:19 Kɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli kɑɑl Isrɑil ócyɑ̈gø, kɑ døøg-ɑ ngɑ̈thi gen. Kɑ lööj pøølø ócyɑ̈gø kì bøli gen, kɑ døøg-ɑ ngɑ̈thi gen." 
Exodus14:20 Kɑ pëgg-ɑ kɑɑm yɑɑy Rïp geki yɑɑy Isrɑil. Kɑ tung-ɑ di tyëng Rïp gwøge ɑ́ muudhø, de tuung Isrɑil dɑ cɑr kì wɑ̈rɑni, kɑ yɑɑy ocögø e pɑ cyɑ̈ngi ki yɑɑy." 
Exodus14:21 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ cinge tïnge, ɑgööj yømø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ tyëg-ɑ wɑ̈r e ókwöddø, kɑ pï pyëëde, nɑm ree ɑ́løge keny thwøwø." 
Exodus14:22 Akedh tyëng Isrɑil ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij nɑm kì piny me thwøwø, e pï nɑ dör ɑ́ryew, ɑ́kyel kì wɑ̈thi këjji gen, kí ɑ́kyel kì wɑ̈thi cyɑ̈mmi gen." 
Exodus14:23 Kɑ tyëng Rïp kedh-ɑ nɑm bɑng gen, kí yɑ̈thi gen geki kyënyi gen bënn." 
Exodus14:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lïïdh-ɑ kömi yɑɑy Rïp kì yij lööj yïrø geki mɑc, kɑ yɑɑy Rïp omyëlø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Exodus14:25 Kɑ tyelli yɑ̈thi gen dije, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be cyɑ̈dhø ge ywɑjj-ɑ ri gen, kɑ tyëng Rïp okööbø kinni, “Rengi wɑ, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyïɑ̈ggi ki Rïp kɑ per gen.”" 
Exodus14:26 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Tïng cingí kì kömi nɑm, o pï døøg gen kömi tyëng Rïp, geki yɑ̈thi gen, kí jø gen møg-ɑ kömi kyënyì.”" 
Exodus14:27 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ cinge rïïje kömi nɑm, kɑ nɑm døøg-ɑ keje kì ri ru wøw. Kɑ tyëng Rïp órengø yi pï, kɑ ge wøøj nɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus14:28 Pï ɑ́dwöög kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th geki jøg-ɑ kömi kyënyì mud yi gen, eni yɑɑy Rïp men-ɑ ɑ́kedhi nɑm bɑng gen bëne, bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng." 
Exodus14:29 De tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kedh ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ nɑm, e pï bɑ dörø kì wɑ̈thi këjji gen, kí wɑ̈thi cyɑ̈mmi gen." 
Exodus14:30 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́yieel tyëng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cinggi tyëng Rïp ɑnɑn, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni. Kɑ tyëng Rïp lidh yi Isrɑil ge buud ge thøø kì tøggi nɑm." 
Exodus14:31 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil obwøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge Rïp. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wør yi gen geki Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈nge." 
Exodus15:1 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́wör Mosɑ̀ geki tyëng Isrɑil ki wörri pwøj møg lejji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen kinni, “Yɑ owörø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ mɑ̈re ɑ́døngi ki mendwøng. Kyeny geki ngɑn-ɑ köme ɑ́leenge nɑɑm omelø." 
Exodus15:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene ngɑnteg men-ɑ korri yɑn. Bene en ɑ ɑ́yiel yɑn. Bɑ Jwøgɑ; ólejji yi yɑn Jwøøg kweyyɑ, yɑ ówör yɑ lejj-ɑ dönge." 
Exodus15:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ jɑl-liny. Nyinge bɑ “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Exodus15:4 “Yɑ̈thi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki kyënye ɑ́leenge nɑm, pëjji liny geki jödde ɑ́leenge Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø." 
Exodus15:5 Ge ɑ́kum piny yi ɑpɑgø. Ge ɑ́ludhi tyeli nɑm ni kït. 
Exodus15:6 “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cingi kyëjí pëddi tegø; ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyi ngølle’ ngøllø ɑ́ thullì." 
Exodus15:7 Kì yij tyɑ̈m-ɑ dwøng men-ɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, pyëwí ɑ́rënyi, kɑ ge rɑ̈ɑ̈b ni lum." 
Exodus15:8 Pï ri gen ɑ́röör gen mɑl yi yøm-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l órømmí; pïg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ócyɑ̈dhø, ge ɑ́cungi ni dörø; pïi keny-ɑ pɑ̈ng ɑ́göög ge teeg kì dïnɑm." 
Exodus15:9 Ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yɑ órengi bɑng gen, kɑ ge mɑgɑ; jɑmmi gen ópɑ̈ngi yi yɑn, kɑ møg-ɑ dwɑddɑ kwɑnyɑ bënn. Pilɑ ówöödhɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ ge nɑ̈gɑ ki cingɑ.’" 
Exodus15:10 De yï ɑ́yëggi kömi gen, kɑ ge kum piny yi pïi nɑm. Ge ɑ́biil piny ni ɑ́yömø, kɑ ɑpɑgø ceg-ɑ ì bɑɑw kì kömi gen." 
Exodus15:11 “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dɑ jwøg me ni yïn? Yï bɑ Kwërø, bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yïn. Bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yïn kì ri gwøg ki gïïngɑ̈ngø." 
Exodus15:12 Cingi kyëjí ɑ́rïj yi yïn, kɑ ge mwøøny yi lɑ̈bø." 
Exodus15:13 Ji-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn ópyejji yi yïn ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií. Ge ókøøl yi yïn kej bëëdí kwërø ki tegí. 
Exodus15:14 Pödhh bënn ɑ́lïng kɑ dëlli gen ceg-ɑ okïr, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́moom piny." 
Exodus15:15 Pëjji Edöm ɑ́bwøg ki menteg. Yɑɑg-ɑ teg kì Moɑb dëlli gen ɑ́kïïr. tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́thøw yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. 
Exodus15:16 Wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen tegí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ge ɑ́cungi kì kɑ̈jji gen ni kïttì, gïti kɑ ɑ́pöödh jií, gen ɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yïn gɑ møgí." 
Exodus15:17 Jií ópej yi yïn, kɑ ge cïb wïj kït men-ɑ bɑ mií, keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ kej bëëdí; eni Keng-ɑ ɑ́ger yi yïn kirií" 
Exodus15:18 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï óbëëdø yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Exodus15:19 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil nɑɑm omelø bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ tyelli gen, kì keny thwøwø. De keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yɑ̈thi Rïp møg-ɑ pyejji yi kyënyì kí tyëng-ɑ kwølli gen nɑm, kɑ pïi nɑɑm omelø gøøj kömi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge omudø." 
Exodus15:20 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ Miryɑm ngetitöng, nyimï Aɑron ókɑ̈bbø ki nyɑ bul. Kɑ gø pwöde ki cinge, kɑ bɑnge kedhi yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ge opödø ki bullì mø ni menɑni, ge ocöngø." 
Exodus15:21 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Miryɑm kinni, “Wör wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e myëër ki wørø ki mendwøng, kyeny geki ngɑn-ɑ köme ɑ́leenge nɑɑm omelø.”" 
Exodus15:22 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ tyëng Isrɑil peeje kì kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø, gï peeje’ yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Cur. Ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij pɑ̈l, de bong pï mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen." 
Exodus15:23 Codhe, ɑwɑ̈dhi gen Mɑrɑ̀, kɑ ge óyïddø ki pï kì kunɑni, de pïgɑni ɑ́dhɑ̈li mɑdhø yi gen, mɑ́ ge keej cɑrø (Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ cɑɑg kenyɑni ɑ́ Mɑrɑ̀, ɑ wɑngi kinni keej)." 
Exodus15:24 Kɑ ji göny-ɑ yï Mosɑ̀ ge okööbø kinni, “Wø mɑdh-ɑ ngø?”" 
Exodus15:25 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ nyudhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki yɑdh megø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́leeng yɑnhɑni yethi pï yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ pïgɑni yïëy-ɑ mɑdhø. Kunɑni ɑ ɑ́thödhi jiɑni ki cigg geki kwöng men köme bëëd. Kunɑni thyew ɑ ɑ́rɑnge bëëdi tyëngɑni mɑ mïdhi gen cigge." 
Exodus15:26 Ákööb kinni, “Lïngí kwøbbɑ, kɑ gïn-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn nyi gwøøg ceth. Keløg kwøbbɑ geki ciggɑ ómïdhi yi yïn, bong gïjø ɑ́kyel kì kelli gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ tyëng Rïp men-ɑ ógöggɑ yïn. Yɑ bene Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ tuur yïn.”" 
Exodus15:27 Codhe, kɑ tyëngɑni kedh-ɑ Elïm. Kunɑni ɑ́dɑ nying mø rïngi yi pï gɑ ɑ́bïryew, kí yenh benø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew. Codhe, kɑ ge ogudø kì kenyɑni kì buti pï." 
Exodus16:1 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil odhwödhø bënn kì Elïm, kɑ ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yij ryɑng-ɑ kɑɑm Elïm geki Sinɑy. Ge ɑ́dhwödh ɑ cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj kì ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì bɑng dhwödhi gen kì Rïp." 
Exodus16:2 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil göny-ɑ yï Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kì yij pɑ̈l. 
Exodus16:3 Gï ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, “Di bëëd e lɑ̈w ke di nɑ̈ɑ̈g wøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny Rïp. Ádɑ rïngø me nyi cɑm yi wøn, gïg-ɑ dwɑddi cɑmø yi wøn bënn nyii yodø yi wøn. De wu ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wøn yij pɑ̈l keny kipe kinni, o wø thøw wøn yi kɑ̈j kì yije.”" 
Exodus16:4 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gïncɑm ógöjjɑ dyëmø kì mɑl ni kødh, ɑ́ men cɑm yi wun, wu bënn. Nyi kedhi ji be gwen kì tøggi kɑɑl ki gïn-ɑ cɑm yi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ lïdhø men-ɑ ógöög ji ki gïn-ɑ pwönyɑ gen." 
Exodus16:5 Kì bïkyeel cyɑ̈nggi osboo, gwëën ji ki mi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew. Gwëni gen yethi gïg-ɑ nyi gwëni yi gen kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, e yethe bɑ ɑ́ryew.”" 
Exodus16:6 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kinni, “Óyod yi wun tïn kì böörø kinni bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Exodus16:7 Dhuki kì mwøl mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólidh yi wun, mɑ́ wu ɑ́lïngi yi en wu oköörø kì ree, wu nuti köör ɑ ri wøn, den-ɑ́ ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́köör yi wun, mɑ́ wø nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ nyi kwøb yi en.”" 
Exodus16:8 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Wu óthödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rïngø men cɑm yi wun, kì böörø yethi cyɑ̈ng. O kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng, wu óthödhi yi en ki gïncɑm men-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun. Mɑ́ wu ɑ́lïngi yi en keny-ɑ ɑ́köör wun kì ree. Wu nuti köör ɑ riɑ wøki Aɑron, mɑ́ per wøn bogøn, wu ɑ́köör ɑ ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus16:9 Codhe, ɑköbbi Aɑron yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, ‘Cøng wun ri wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ køør wun ɑ́lïngi yi en.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Aɑron e okööbø ki gen, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lidh yi gen kì yij pøølø." 
Exodus16:11 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus16:12 “Køør tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́lïngi yi yɑn; de köbbí gen kinni, kì böörø wu ócyɑ̈mø ki rïngø, o kì mwøl wu ócyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑm kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. O yod yi wun kì bɑng møgɑni kinni bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus16:13 Kɑ ɑkɑrø obëënø kì böörø, kɑ kɑɑl opɑ̈ngø yi en. O kì mwøl, kɑ tøggi kɑɑl dɑ thöjj kì piny." 
Exodus16:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thwøw thöjj, ɑliidh piny e ókumø yi gïjø me ni kwɑ́j." 
Exodus16:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ri gen pyënyi gen kinni, “Bɑ ngø?” Kipe kɑ̀ kwïjjii yi gen mɑ bëëde ɑ́ ngø. Codhe, ɑköbbi gen yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Men bene gïncɑm men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ men cɑm yi wun." 
Exodus16:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cïg kinni, i dhɑnhø gwene men-ɑ dwɑddi yi en ki cɑmø, røthøl ɑ́ngwen kipe dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, kɑ kwɑny ɑ́ kwɑnni ji kì kɑl.”" 
Exodus16:17 Codhe, kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi tyëng Isrɑil, kwï ji ɑ́gwëën ki mø gïïr, møøgø ɑ́gwëën ki mø nøg." 
Exodus16:18 Codhe, kɑ gø røm gen. Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwen mø gïïr møge nuti løg mø ngenyø, o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwen mø nøg, møge nuti jɑdø, kɑ yod yi gen kinni dhɑnhø gween-ɑ kej dhøge ceth." 
Exodus16:19 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ko wïyi kì ree ki men cɑɑm dhuki.”" 
Exodus16:20 De kwï gen ɑ́pëëm ki kwøbbi Mosɑ̀, kɑ ge owïyø ki men cɑɑm dhuki. Menɑni ɑ́mɑg yi kunnì kɑ yøme ópënnø. Kɑ Mosɑ̀ mɑg yi liny ki tyëngɑni ki mendwøng." 
Exodus16:21 Yethi cyɑ̈ng kì mwøl, ngɑn nyi gwen-ɑ men-ɑ dwɑdde cɑmø, de kenyi lënhi cɑ̈ng, men-ɑ piny nyi ceg-ɑ nøyø." 
Exodus16:22 O kì bïkyeel cyɑ̈nggi osboo, kɑ ge gwen-ɑ gïncɑm mi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew. Árøm ɑ́ røthøl ɑ́bïdɑ̈g ɑ bɑ mø dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën pëjji Isrɑil be köbbi møgɑni Mosɑ̀," 
Exodus16:23 kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk, kipe dhuki bɑ Sɑbɑth, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwër yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø. Kyel wun møg-ɑ dwɑddu kyelø, kɑ møg-ɑ dwɑddu bɑ̈gø bɑ̈g wun dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng. Kɑ kwï gïncɑm mïdhi yi wun gïti dhuki.”" 
Exodus16:24 Codhe, kɑ ji owïyø ki men wɑ̈dhi dhuki, ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Mosɑ̀, o bong men mɑ ɑ́pëni kì ree, wɑlɑ̀ bong men mɑ ree ɑ́kedhi yi kunnì." 
Exodus16:25 Kɑ ji köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Cɑm wun gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́gwen yi wun ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø men-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu pɑ yïddi kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Exodus16:26 Gwëën wun ki gïncɑm ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel, de bïryeew cyɑ̈ng bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, bong gïncɑm me nud kì piny.”" 
Exodus16:27 Kɑ kwï ji kedh-ɑ be gwen kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ yïddi." 
Exodus16:28 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wu wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑɑng wu opëmø, wu dhɑ̈li mïdhi ciggɑ geki pwönyɑ?" 
Exodus16:29 Adɑ́ lïng wun, Sɑbɑth ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø me ywöm wun ri wun. O kì bïkyeel cyɑ̈ng, wu óthödhi yi en ki gïncɑɑm cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew. De kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, bëëd dhɑnhø kì gøle, ko di keny kedhe.”" 
Exodus16:30 Codhe, kɑ ji oywömø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng." 
Exodus16:31 Codhe, kɑ gïncɑmɑni cɑg yi tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́ mɑnɑ̀. Mɑnɑ̀ tɑr e nɑ nywøli kɑsbɑrɑ̀, med e nɑ kɑɑk men-ɑ óbulø ki møøw kïc." 
Exodus16:32 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, i cïbi wɑ piny ki mɑnɑ̀ men-ɑ ólidh yi kwɑrree. O gïncɑm men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wɑ ɑ́ men cɑm yi wɑ, lidh yi gen, eni gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́cɑm yi wɑ kì yij pɑ̈l keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp.”" 
Exodus16:33 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki pug kɑ yije kïdhi ki røthøl ɑ́ngwen mø mɑnɑ̀, kɑ cïb bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ mïdhi kiper kwɑrri wun.”" 
Exodus16:34 Codhe, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøg yi Aɑron. Pugi mɑnɑ̀ ɑ́cïbe bøli Sɑnduug Cigg, kinni o mïdhi." 
Exodus16:35 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mɑnɑ̀ ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen keny-ɑ ɑ́pëggi gen piny, ge ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mɑnɑ̀ gïti keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen wïj tuung piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Exodus16:36 (Rumi men-ɑ ɑ́rum, yije nyi røm-ɑ yi røthøl pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen)." 
Exodus17:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil odhwödhø bënn kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Sin, ge cyɑ̈dhi ge nyii ywömø ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ge ɑ́gud kì Repïdïm, kɑ bong-ɑ pï mø mɑdh yi ji." 
Exodus17:2 Codhe, ɑwër gen ki Mosɑ̀, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Nëngí wøn ki pïg mɑdh.” Alöggi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wude ɑ wër wun ki yɑn? Wude ɑ pɑ̈nyi wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
Exodus17:3 De ji ɑ́bëëd ri gen dɑ röödhø ki mendwøng, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be køør kì ri Mosɑ̀. Ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yïde ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp? Bɑ kipe kinni o wø nɑ̈g yi yïn ki röödhø wøki nyigi wøn kí dhögi wøn?”" 
Exodus17:4 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggɑ ji møg? Yɑ óbɑ̈lli yi gen ki kïttì, kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, o yɑ thøwɑ.”" 
Exodus17:5 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki kwï jøgdøngi Isrɑil, kɑ wu pödhu mɑl bøli ji ki gen. Kɑ lodhí men-ɑ ɑ́gøøj Kiir, kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì cingí." 
Exodus17:6 Yɑ ócungi kì bølí kì wïj nyɑ kït, kì buti Kïti Sinɑy. Kɑ kït gøøj, o pï mulli gen wɑ̈g kì yije, o ji mɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen.” Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi Mosɑ̀ e onennø yi jøgdøngi Isrɑil." 
Exodus17:7 Kenyɑni ɑ́cɑg ɑ́ Mɑɑsɑ̀ kí Merïbɑ̀ (Pɑ̈nyø ki Wëërø), mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́wër ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ̈nyi yi gen ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud kì kellee kidyër wɑlɑ̀ tøøk?”" 
Exodus17:8 Abëën kwɑrri Amɑlek kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki Isrɑil kì Repïdïm. 
Exodus17:9 Kɑ Jöcwø köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki kwï jøg-ɑ cwøw, kɑ wu kedhu be nyïɑ̈ggi ki kwɑrri Amɑlek dhuki. Yɑ ócungi kì wïj nyɑ kït ki loodh Jwøk kì cingɑ.”" 
Exodus17:10 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Jöcwø yi Mosɑ̀ gwøge ceth, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki kwɑrri Amɑlek. O Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kí Ur ɑ́ying-ɑ wïj nyɑ kït." 
Exodus17:11 Isrɑil nyi ceg-ɑ tyɑ̈mø kɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëd cinggi Mosɑ̀ gɑ ɑtïng kì mɑl. De kenyi dwöög Mosɑ̀ cingge piny, kɑ kwɑrri Amɑlek nyii tyɑ̈mø." 
Exodus17:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pïd bɑ̈ddi Mosɑ̀, kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki ɑ́tungi kït, kɑ gø cïb gen piny, kɑ Mosɑ̀ pëgg-ɑ köme. O Aɑron geki Ur mïdhi gen cingge kì mɑl, ngɑɑn kì tuung, ngɑɑn kì tuung. Kɑ orïïjø kinøw, cingge ying-ɑ mɑl gïti kɑ ɑ́buddi cɑ̈ng." 
Exodus17:13 Kɑ kwɑrri Amɑlek tyɑm yi Jöcwø kì yij linyɑni. 
Exodus17:14 Codhe, ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gweed kwøbbi liny menɑni yij wɑ̈nyø, o ge cög ge pɑ wïl. Köbbí Jöcwø kinni, kwɑrri Amɑlek ótyëg yi yɑn ki nɑ̈gø.”" 
Exodus17:15 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ogëdø ki këli lɑm, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Bɑ Berɑ.”" 
Exodus17:16 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Tïngu beer Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ócög e ónyïɑ̈ggø ki kwɑrri Amɑlek gïti ɑtheer!”" 
Exodus18:1 Kɑ Yethrø ókwëri Midyɑn, øri Mosɑ̀ olïngø ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́göggi Mosɑ̀ geki jie yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Isrɑil wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Rïp." 
Exodus18:2 Kɑ Yethrø øri Mosɑ̀, Dhiporɑ̀ cï Mosɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈le yï Mosɑ̀, mɑ́ gø ɑ́öre yïe," 
Exodus18:3 kí wɑ̈dde ryeet, Gercöm kí Eliedher. Mosɑ̀ ɑ́ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ bɑ wëdh kì piny me pɑth.” Acɑge wɑ̈de ɑ́ Gercöm." 
Exodus18:4 O nyingi nyel-ɑ kyeelø bɑ Eliedher, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́nywølii, Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøøg wïyɑ bene en ɑ ɑ́køny yɑn. Yɑ ɑ́yiel yi en kì cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp.”" 
Exodus18:5 Yethrø øri Mosɑ̀, wɑ̈ddi Mosɑ̀ geki cï Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le yij pɑ̈l, kun-ɑ ɑ́gudde ki kɑɑl kì thɑ kïti kwër." 
Exodus18:6 Aöde yï Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn, yɑ ørí Yethrø, yɑ bï-ɑ yïí wøki cyëgí kí wɑ̈dde ryeet.”" 
Exodus18:7 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kedh-ɑ be pɑɑri øre, kɑ wïje kuule piny kì bøle, kɑ gø nuume, ɑmɑ̈dh gen ri gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yij kemi Mosɑ̀." 
Exodus18:8 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ øre löbbe gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki tyëng Rïp yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiper tyëng Isrɑil. Kí orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi gen kì kö yöö, ki kër-ɑ ɑ́yieel gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus18:9 Kɑ Yethrø pyëwe ómïnø kipe gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́göggi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ɑ́yiele gïn kì cinggi tyëng Rïp." 
Exodus18:10 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Pwøj wɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel wun kì cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki yɑye, eni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel jie kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø!" 
Exodus18:11 Áyod yi yɑn ɑnɑn kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwøng ɑ́ en kibøli jwögg bënn, kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́nyodhe møg-ɑ ɑ́gøøje kömi Rïp.”" 
Exodus18:12 Codhe, kɑ Yethrø øri Mosɑ̀ omuujø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gëdhhì møøgø mø ngɑ̈lli Jwøk. Kɑ Aɑron geki jøgdøngi Isrɑil bënn bï-ɑ be cɑm geki øri Mosɑ̀ kì bøli Jwøk." 
Exodus18:13 Dhuki ɑpëggi Mosɑ̀ piny be lidhi gønyyi ji, kɑ ji orïïjø ge ócungø kì kömi Mosɑ̀, cɑg kì mwøl gïti böörø." 
Exodus18:14 Kɑ gïg-ɑ gwøg yi Mosɑ̀ bënn, lidh yi øre, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ gögge ji. Akööbe kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggí ji kinnï? Á kipe ngø ɑ bëëd kì piny yï ketí, o ji cungi gen kì kömí, cɑg kì mwøl gïti böörø?”" 
Exodus18:15 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “Kipe kenyi bëën ji yïɑ be pyëji Jwøk, ki kër-ɑ liidh gønyyi gen." 
Exodus18:16 Mɑ́ kenyi di gøny kì kɑɑm dhɑnhø geki wɑɑd gen, ge nyi bï-ɑ yïɑ, o ngɑn-ɑ bɑ̈jjø nyi nyodh yi yɑn, o ge nyi nyudhɑ Ciggi Jwøk geki pwönye.”" 
Exodus18:17 De Mosɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi yi øre kinni, “Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn pɑ døøj." 
Exodus18:18 Yï pïd-ɑ rií, o ji ceg-ɑ pïdø thyew, mɑ́ gwøngɑni peeg kiperí, pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yïn, yï ketí." 
Exodus18:19 Anɑn lïngí kwøbbɑ, yï óköbbɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn o gwøg yi yïn, yï ókøny yi Jwøk. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, bëëd kì bøli Jwøk, kɑ gønyyi ji nyi thërri Jwøk." 
Exodus18:20 Nyi pɑ̈ddí gen ki cigg geki pwönyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ ge pwönyí ki yuu bëëdø men-ɑ døj, ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi kinni o gwøg yi gen." 
Exodus18:21 Kɑ̈bbí kì kelli ji ki jøg mø tir, ji mø böggi Jwøk. Jøg-ɑ dyër, yɑɑg-ɑ mɑɑn ngewø. Cïb gen gɑ jɑgg kì kömi ji, møøgø jɑɑg gen ji ɑ́lïp, møøgø jɑɑg-ɑ miy, o møøgø jɑɑg-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïjj, o møøgø jɑɑg-ɑ pyɑ̈r." 
Exodus18:22 Kɑ wiy jøgɑni nyi lidh gen gønyyi ji kì bøli keny-ɑ di gøny. O kwøbb-ɑ peeg nyi muuj yïn yi gen, o møg-ɑ yööd bënn nyi løøg yi gen. O gwøg yöne kì kömí, mɑ́ gwøg ceg kɑ pɑ̈ngø yi yïn, wuki gen." 
Exodus18:23 Ke gwøøg møgɑni ni kɑ ɑ́ceg yïn yi Jwøk, bene keny-ɑ ólwɑ̈ɑ̈ng gwøgí, kɑ ji bënn nyi døøg-ɑ kɑ̈lli gen, e gønyyi gen rumø ki lidhø.”" 
Exodus18:24 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi øre yïëye bënn. Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe bënn gwøg yi en. 
Exodus18:25 Ákɑ̈bbi ki yɑɑg tir kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ gï gwøge gɑ jɑgg kì kömi ji, kwï gen jɑɑg-ɑ ji ɑ́lïp, møøgø jɑɑg-ɑ miy, møøgø jɑɑg-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïjj, møøgø jɑɑg-ɑ pyɑ̈r." 
Exodus18:26 Kɑ jøgɑni pëgg-ɑ be nenni gønyyi ji. Kɑ gønyy-ɑ teeg nyi muuj gen Mosɑ̀, de gønyy-ɑ yöd nyi lidh-ɑ yi gen keti gen." 
Exodus18:27 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ øre lwøøge yöö, kɑ Yethrø døøg-ɑ pɑɑre." 
Exodus19:1 Kì ri thumi dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g ceth, kì bɑng dhwödhi tyëng Isrɑil kì piny Rïp, ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Sinɑy." 
Exodus19:2 Ge ɑ́dhwödh kì Repïdïm, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Sinɑy. Kɑ Isrɑil ogudø kì pɑ̈lɑni ge rwöm ki kït." 
Exodus19:3 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kedh-ɑ mɑl yï Jwøk. Kɑ Mosɑ̀ cwøl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri kït kinni, “Köbbí gøl Yɑgob, kɑ Isrɑil tönggí kwøb kinni," 
Exodus19:4 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ Rïp ɑ́lidh yi wun; ɑ́lidh yi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp kì kömi obërri cor. Kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ keny. 
Exodus19:5 O ɑnɑn ke lïngu kwøbbɑ, kɑ ciggɑ mïdhi yi wun, wu obëëdø wu bɑ jiɑ, møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëënyɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli jurrì, mɑ́ piny bëne bɑ miɑ." 
Exodus19:6 Wu ógöögø ki pödhɑ; pödhi kwër møg göggi yɑn.” 
Exodus19:7 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ obëënø, kɑ jøgdøngi Isrɑil cwööle, ɑthëre gïn møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn." 
Exodus19:8 Kɑ ji ólöggø bënn wïj ɑ́kyel kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn ógwøg yi wøn.” Kɑ kwøbbi jiɑni döggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Mosɑ̀." 
Exodus19:9 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑn ɑ bï yïí èn kì yij pøølø me looj, kipe kinni o yɑ lïngi yi ji yɑ okööbø ki yïn, o ge yïëy gen ki yïn thyew gïti ɑtheer.” Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi ji, köbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Mosɑ̀." 
Exodus19:10 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí yï ji, kɑ ri wun kwër wun dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kí dhuki, kɑ ógudhi wun lwøg wun." 
Exodus19:11 Kɑ ri gen gwir gen kipe dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, mɑ́ kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, Yɑ óbï piny, o Yɑ lidh yi ji bënn kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy." 
Exodus19:12 De göög ki kew me wen kït. Kɑ ko di dhɑnhø me bɑ̈ɑ̈n kewɑni.” Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ko di ngɑn yedhi wïj kït. Kɑ ko di ngɑn nywɑl tøg kït, ngɑn nywɑl kïnɑni ceg-ɑ thøø ceth." 
Exodus19:13 Ko nywɑl ki cingø; ngɑn nywɑlii, bɑ̈lli ki kïttì o thøwe; wɑlɑ̀ pwöd ki weth, cɑgg ɑ́ dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y, ko wiy, nɑ̈g ceth. Keny-ɑ óywöngi tuung órömø e pɑ jwɑn kudø, ge ócuggø yedhi mɑl wïj kït cyee.”" 
Exodus19:14 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ yïnh-ɑ piny kì wïj kït kɑ ji kwënge, kɑ ógudhi gen lwøg gen." 
Exodus19:15 Kɑ ji köbbe kinni, “Bëëd wun ri wun gwiir wun kipe dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ko di ngɑn kedhi ri ngɑndhɑjø.”" 
Exodus19:16 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kì ri ru wøw, kɑ wïj kït rïïm yi pøølø. Kɑ mɑl omɑ̈rrø, kɑ orɑ̈ɑ̈dø, kɑ cwɑggi kɑng me teeg cɑrø lïngi. Kɑ ji dëlli gen okïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Exodus19:17 Kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Mosɑ̀ kì kɑɑl, o ge yïddi gen ki Jwøk, ócungø kì thɑ kït." 
Exodus19:18 Wïj Kïti Sinɑy ɑ́bëëd e ócyëgø bëne yi yïrø. Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bï köme kì yij mɑc. Kɑ yïrø ceg-ɑ ì dut ni yïri bwörø me dwøng, kɑ kït onhɑ̈nhø ki menteg." 
Exodus19:19 Kɑ cwɑggi kɑng ókedhø ge ótëngø ki mendwøng. Mosɑ̀ okööbø, o møge nyi løøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij omɑ̈ɑ̈r mɑl." 
Exodus19:20 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ piny wïj Kïti Sinɑy, kɑ Mosɑ̀ cwøøle wïj kït, kɑ Mosɑ̀ yedh-ɑ mɑl." 
Exodus19:21 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí piny kyëddí ji, kipe ge ópönhi wïj kït ge bï-ɑ be lïdhø, keløg ge ólïdhø, mø gïïr kì kelli gen ceg-ɑ thøø." 
Exodus19:22 Cɑgg gɑ ókwër, møg cuggi bëën butɑ, kwër gen ri gen. Keløg ri gen pɑ kwër yi gen, ge ócɑy yi yɑn, Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus19:23 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Ji pɑ cuggi bëën mɑl wïj Kïti Sinɑy, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi yïn kinni, ‘Wen kït ki kew, kɑ kwëër.’ ”" 
Exodus19:24 Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh, yedhí piny, kɑ Aɑron kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl. De ókwër geki ji, ri gen ko pɑ̈nyi gen ki bëën mɑl yïɑ, keløg kew óbɑ̈ɑ̈n yi gen, ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø.”" 
Exodus19:25 Codhe kɑ Mosɑ̀ yïnh-ɑ piny yï ji, kɑ gï köbbe møgɑni." 
Exodus20:1 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk ek bënn: 
Exodus20:2 “Yɑ bɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
Exodus20:3 “Yïí ko di Jwögg møøgø den-ɑ́ yɑ ketɑ. 
Exodus20:4 “Rií ko twïgí ki ngïjjì, kɑ yï ko göög ki ngïji gïjø me ying mɑl, wɑlɑ̀ gïjø me ying piny, wɑlɑ̀ gïjø me ying nɑm kì thɑ piny." 
Exodus20:5 Rií ko bøødh bøli gen, kɑ ge ko mɑllí, kipe yɑn yɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ Jwøk me rɑj ki tyiel, körri orøøg wëëg nyi piirɑ’ yï wɑ̈ddi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn, kí kwɑrri gen, kí kwɑrri kwɑrri gen." 
Exodus20:6 De døøjɑ nyi nyudhɑ’ rïjj mø ngenyø, gen ɑ ji møg-ɑ mɑɑr yɑn, o ciggɑ omïdhø yi gen." 
Exodus20:7 “Nyingɑ ko tïng dhøgí ki bɑ̈jjø, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ngɑn-ɑ tïng nyinge dhøge ki bɑ̈jjø." 
Exodus20:8 “Nyi pɑr cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth kɑ nyi kwëër. 
Exodus20:9 Yïí dɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel møg yethi gen gwøøg gwøgí. 
Exodus20:10 De bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, bɑ Sɑbɑth mi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ko di gwøg me tïj yi yïn, wuki wɑ̈dí ki nyɑrí, kí bɑ̈ngí ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, kí dhií, kí wëlø men-ɑ bëëdø kì butí." 
Exodus20:11 Mɑ́ mɑl kí piny, kí jɑmm-ɑ yethi gen bënn ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel. Kɑ oywömø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, bene ɑ bɑnge gyëëdh cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ gø kwëre." 
Exodus20:12 “Wør wïyí ki meyí, o runní óngënyi gen kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus20:13 “Yï ko nɑ̈gi ki dhɑnhø. 
Exodus20:14 “Yï ko niin kí ngɑn nuti nywøøm wun ri wun. 
Exodus20:15 “Yï ko kwɑ̈ddi. 
Exodus20:16 “Wɑɑd wun ko gøøny ki kwøbbi pyed. 
Exodus20:17 “Gøl wɑɑd wun ko tyeer. Cï wɑɑd wun ko tyeer, cɑgg ɑ́ bɑ̈nge, bɑ̈ng-ɑ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø, wɑdhe ko tyeer, wɑlɑ̀ ɑdere. Ko di gïi wɑɑd wun me tyeer yi yïn.”" 
Exodus20:18 Ji keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen omɑ̈ɑ̈r mɑl geki ywøøg kɑng, kɑ ogwel mɑl geki yïrø men-ɑ dung kì ri kït lidh yi gen, kɑ dëlli gen ceg-ɑ okïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ ge ócungø ge lɑ̈wi kì buti kït." 
Exodus20:19 Codhe, ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi gen kinni, “Kööb ɑ́ yïn ki wøn, wø ólïngø. De Jwøk ko kööb ki wøn kipe wø óthøw.”" 
Exodus20:20 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ko böggi, mɑ́ Jwøk ɑ́bï-ɑ be pɑ̈nyi wun, o böögø mee bëëde e nud kì pëthi wun, o wu cög wun, wu pɑ røngi.”" 
Exodus20:21 Ji ɑ́cungi ge lɑ̈wi ki kït, de Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kedhi buti pøøl-ɑ looj, keny-ɑ di Jwøk." 
Exodus20:22 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, köbbe tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Álidh yi wun kì ri wun, keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbɑ kì mɑl ki wun." 
Exodus20:23 Wu ko göög ki ngïji gïïpiny ki dhɑb wɑlɑ̀ ki ɑ́tegø møg göggu ri wun gɑ jwögg, gïgɑni ko mɑlli yi wun kyeel ki yɑn." 
Exodus20:24 Gëddí yɑn ki këlli lɑm ki lɑ̈bø, o wïje ómuuj gëdhh-ɑ rɑ̈bbí yɑn, geki gëdhhi mër kì ri dyëgí kí dhögí. Mɑllí yɑn kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi yɑn, o yɑ bïɑ, o yï gyëdh yi yɑn." 
Exodus20:25 Keløg këli lɑm gërí yɑn ki ɑ́tuggi kïttì, kïtt-ɑ tøggi gen bɑ ɑtweg ki ged ko gëëd yi yïn, otweg gen ki ged, ge ceg yi yïn kɑ bwölø ki ged menɑni." 
Exodus20:26 Yï ko yedhi wïj këlɑ ki yïdhi, kipe thɑrí ónënni kì köme." 
Exodus21:1 “Mëggí tyëng Isrɑil cigg møg: 
Exodus21:2 Keløg yï ongëwø ki bɑ̈ng me bɑ ngeti Ibru, gögge yïn ki runn ɑ́bïkyel. Kɑ gøøny kì bïryeew runn, o kedhe kì wɑ̈ye e bong gïn col." 
Exodus21:3 Keløg e bëënø ɑ́ ɑ́kyel, kedhe e bɑ ɑ́kyel. Keløg e dɑ cyëge me bëënø ki en, kedhe ki en." 
Exodus21:4 De keløg e ónëng-ɑ yi wɑ̈n ki dhɑjø, kɑ nyöddi yi nyɑnɑni ki wɑ̈dd wɑlɑ̀ womɑ̈nn, dhɑjø menɑni bɑ mi wɑ̈n, nyɑnɑni ki nyige bënn bɑ mø wɑ̈n, o nyelɑni kete ɑ kedh." 
Exodus21:5 De keløg bɑ̈ngɑni kiree okööbø kinni, ‘Wɑ̈ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn, geki cyëgɑ kí nyigɑ, yɑ pɑ dwɑddi gønyø o yɑ kedhɑ.’" 
Exodus21:6 Kɑ cïb bøli Jwøk kì ɑ́dyëddi ød yi wɑ̈n, kɑ yïthe twïy ki gïjø me bedh. Codhe cyee, o bɑ̈ngɑni cöge e gögg-ɑ wɑ̈n gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus21:7 “Keløg e dɑ jɑl me ngeew nyɑre wɑ̈g ɑ́ bɑ̈ng. Pɑ gøny ki gønyi bɑ̈ngg-ɑ cwøw. 
Exodus21:8 Ke yodii e pɑ døøj yi wɑ̈n ngö gø ɑ́dwɑddi yi en ɑ́ dhɑjø, døøg ki ngëwwi wɑddi gen, ko ngëwwi tyëngpɑth yi en, mɑ́ gø ɑ́ceg yi en kɑ bɑnyø yøw, e rum yïëyø kì tyeli mɑl." 
Exodus21:9 Keløg e dɑ jɑl me ngëwwi wɑ̈de ki bɑ̈ng ɑ́ dhɑjø, pɑ̈ɑ̈re nyɑnɑni ki nyɑre." 
Exodus21:10 Keløg jɑlø ónyömø ki ryeew mɑ̈nne, ko di gïjø me nungi kì ri ógudh kí gïgcɑmm-ɑ́ nyi mëggi nyɑn-ɑ́ köme ɑ́nyömmi, kɑ ko wïyi ki buddø’ en." 
Exodus21:11 O keløg e óbɑ̈nyø ki muuji gïjø ɑ́kyel kì kelli møgɑk gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, tɑ̈nge gøn, kɑ ko di jɑmme møg dwɑdde kì bɑnge." 
Exodus21:12 “Ngɑn gøj dhɑnhø kɑ gø nɑ̈ge, nɑ̈g thyew." 
Exodus21:13 De keløg e ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø, e nuti dwɑddi nɑ̈gii, yɑ̈bbe ki keny me yömme." 
Exodus21:14 De keløg ngɑnɑni gø cɑɑg en kɑ lebbø, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge, cɑgg e yömmi ri këli lɑmɑ, dwɑɑy kɑ nɑ̈g." 
Exodus21:15 “Ngɑn gøj wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, nɑ̈g." 
Exodus21:16 “Ngɑn kwɑl dhɑnhø kɑ gø ngeewe wɑ̈g, oyodii, nɑ̈g." 
Exodus21:17 “Ngɑn yɑny wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, nɑ̈g." 
Exodus21:18 “Keløg jøg ɑ́ryew ónyïɑ̈ggø kɑ ngɑɑn gøj yi ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ gø bɑ̈le ki tuug, keløg e nuti thøø, de ɑ́buud ki kenɑni," 
Exodus21:19 codhe, kɑ kemø kwɑnye kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø, wiy ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́göjji, de ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́buud ceg kɑ cudø yi en ki wïj kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́buude kì piny, o ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́tuurii col yi en." 
Exodus21:20 “Keløg dhɑnhø bɑ̈nge, bɑ̈ng-ɑ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø ogøjø yi en ki lodh kɑ othøø, kej gøn ceg kɑ colø." 
Exodus21:21 De ke mɑ̈ge ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew e onëënø, keje pɑ col, mɑ́ e ngew yi jɑlɑni kɑ ngyëny." 
Exodus21:22 “Keløg jøg-ɑ cwøw ónyïɑ̈ggø kɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yɑjø gum yi gen, kɑ dhɑnhø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yije, e bong kedø kì ri ngɑnɑni, cud ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gumii ki kwör men-ɑ cwøl yi jɑldhɑjø keløg e oyïëyø yi jɑgg." 
Exodus21:23 De ke di kedø men kedhi ri ngɑndhɑjø menɑni, wëy col kɑ wëy," 
Exodus21:24 Wɑng ki wɑng, lëjø ki lëjø, cingø ki cingø, o tyelø ki tyelø." 
Exodus21:25 Cwɑ̈ɑ̈yø’ mɑc ki cwɑ̈ɑ̈yø’ mɑc, kedø ki kedø, bwödhø ki bwödhø." 
Exodus21:26 “O keløg dhɑnhø bɑ̈nge, bɑ̈ng-ɑ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø ogøjø yi en kì wɑnge, kɑ wɑnge otøyø, gønye gøn o kedhe kì wɑ̈ye, ɑ́ coli kej wɑnge." 
Exodus21:27 O keløg dhɑnhø bɑ̈nge, bɑ̈ng-ɑ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø ogøjø yi en, kɑ lëje bï-ɑ wɑ̈g, gønye gøn o kedhe kì wɑ̈ye, ɑ́ coli kej lëje." 
Exodus21:28 “Keløg dhɑnhø, jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø ocwøbø yi wɑdh, kɑ othøø, bɑ̈lli wɑnhɑni o thøwe, kɑ rïnge ko cɑm, de wïi wɑdh pɑ cɑy." 
Exodus21:29 De keløg wɑnhɑni bëëdø e nyii cööbø, o wɑ̈n óköbbø, de wɑdhe ɑ́dhɑ̈li korø yi en, kɑ ónɑ̈ggø ki dhɑnhø, ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, bɑ̈lli wɑnhɑni geki wɑ̈n thyew, o ge thøw gen ryeet." 
Exodus21:30 Keløg ɑ́ kwör ɑ ócïb köme, cole kwörɑni ceth, kipe yieli wëye." 
Exodus21:31 Thyew keløg e cwøb-ɑ nyelthinh, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑnthinh, bɑ cigg mø ni møgɑni ɑ kömi gen göggi." 
Exodus21:32 O keløg wɑdh cwøb-ɑ bɑ̈ng, ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, cud wïi wɑnhɑni ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, gɑ mø culi wïi bɑ̈ng, kɑ wɑnhɑni bɑ̈lli o thøwe." 
Exodus21:33 “Keløg dhɑnhø wïj yithe owiyø yi en gø nuti kum en, kɑ dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ ɑderø pɑ̈dh-ɑ yije," 
Exodus21:34 jɑl yiinhɑni cude ki ngyëny møg mëgge wïi gïnɑni, o gïn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi yij yith kɑ othøø, bɑ mi jɑl yith." 
Exodus21:35 Keløg wɑɑdh dhɑnhø ócöbbø ki wɑɑdh ngɑn megø, kɑ othøø, ngeew wɑnh-ɑ nëënø wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyënyye pɑ̈ngi yi jøgɑni ryeet. Kɑ rïngi wɑnh-ɑ thøø pɑ̈ngi yi gen thyew." 
Exodus21:36 De keløg e ngɑ̈nyi kinni wɑnhɑni nyii cööbø, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li mɑgø yi wɑ̈n, cole wɑdh men-ɑ ɑ́cwøb yi wɑdhe. O wɑnh-ɑ thøø bɑ mi jɑl wɑnh-ɑ ɑ́cöbbi." 
Exodus22:1 “Keløg dhɑnhø ókwɑ̈ddø ki wɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ órömø kɑ gø ngɑle, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ gø ngeewe wɑ̈g, cole wɑnhɑni ki dhög ɑ́bïj, o órömø col kɑ dyëg ɑ́ngwen." 
Exodus22:2 Cole gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑle ceth. De keløg e bong gïn nud kì yïe, ngeew wɑ̈g ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, o ngyënyyɑni cool gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑl yi en. Keløg gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑl yi en oyodø kì cinge, ying-ɑ́ wɑdh wɑlɑ̀ ɑderø, wɑlɑ̀ órömø ge onëënø, kej gïjø ɑ́kyel col kɑ ɑ́ryew. “Keløg kur kedh-ɑ kɑl megø kì wɑ̈r, kɑ mɑg e ókwɑ̈ddø kɑ nɑ̈g, bong cönge kì cwɑggi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gii. De keløg møgɑni cwöb ɑ dicɑ̈ng, cwɑgge dɑ cögø." 
Exodus22:3  
Exodus22:4  
Exodus22:5 “Keløg dhɑnhø jɑmme køøle pwödhe be cɑm, kɑ jɑmme kedh-ɑ pwödhi ngɑn megø, cud jɑl dhög kì ri jɑmm-ɑ døøj kì pwödhe wɑlɑ̀ kì bɑge." 
Exodus22:6 “Keløg dhɑnhø orɑ̈bø ki mɑc kì pwödhe, kɑ mɑnyɑni ködd-ɑ yij pwödhi ngɑn megø kɑ byel rɑ̈be, ying ge nudd ge ócungø wɑlɑ̀ ge ying-ɑ wïj pëm, byellɑni ceg kɑ colø yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwiny mɑc." 
Exodus22:7 “Keløg dhɑnhø wɑɑd gen kɑ̈nne’ ngyëny, kɑ ngyënyyɑni kwɑl kì gøl ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nni, keløg kur óyod, col yi kurɑni gɑ kɑ̈jj ɑ́ryew." 
Exodus22:8 De keløg kur pɑ yod, kïdhi jɑlkɑl bøli Jwøk be köngø kinni, jɑmmi wɑɑd gen nuti kwɑl-ɑ yi en." 
Exodus22:9 “Keløg ji ɑ́ryew opëmø kì kömi gïïpiny, ngɑn okööbø ce gø bɑ mee, ying-ɑ́ kömi dhyɑng, ɑderø, dyel, ógudh, wɑlɑ̀ gïjø megø me wɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, kïdhi gen ryeet bøli Jwøk. Ngɑn-ɑ ókwøb yi Jwøk kinni bɑ en ɑ bɑ̈jjø, gïnɑni col en ɑ́ kɑ̈jj ɑ́ryew." 
Exodus22:10 “Keløg dhɑnhø kɑ̈nn-ɑ yï wɑɑd gen ki ɑderø, wɑlɑ̀ dhyɑng, wɑlɑ̀ dyel, kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ kyeelø bënn kinni o mɑ̈ggii, kɑ gïnɑni othøø, wɑlɑ̀ otorø, wɑlɑ̀ okɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi ngɑn me nuti lidhø, gïnɑni pɑ col yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nni." 
Exodus22:11 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nni ceg-ɑ köngø kì bøli Jwøk kinni gïn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nnii yi wɑɑd gen nuti kwɑɑny en, kɑ ngeti gïnɑni yïëye ceth, ki köngi wɑɑd gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwönge kì bøli Jwøk. O gïnɑni pɑ col." 
Exodus22:12 De keløg gïnɑni ocɑɑg kɑ kwɑlø kì yïe, gø ceg yi en kɑ culi wɑ̈n." 
Exodus22:13 De keløg e ócɑɑm-ɑ yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l, kɑ̈ni jɑl-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nni ki thulli gïn-ɑ ɑ́cɑm, o gïn-ɑ ɑ́cɑm yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l pɑ col." 
Exodus22:14 “Keløg dhɑnhø ówïdhø ki gïïpiny kì yï wɑɑd gen, kɑ dɑ gïn kedhi ree, wɑlɑ̀ othøø e wɑ̈n tøøk, ngeti gïnɑni ceg kɑ cudø yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wïdhi." 
Exodus22:15 De keløg wïi lɑ̈yɑni nud kì bute, kì bøli kenyɑni, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́wïdhi pɑ cudø. Keløg lɑ̈yɑni ceg kɑ kïrø, ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́kïrii ɑ cyëëg keje." 
Exodus22:16 “Ngɑn kedhi ri nyɑnɑjur me pɑ nywøm, kɑ óbuddø ki gøn, muuje kɑ̈nye kɑ gø nywøme ceth." 
Exodus22:17 De keløg wïyi nyɑnɑni óbɑ̈nyi ki nyömmii en, ngɑnɑni nudd e ceg-ɑ muujø ceth ki kɑ̈ɑ̈ny nyɑnɑjur." 
Exodus22:18 “Nɑ̈gu nyɑdheyɑdh, ko wëggi nënnø." 
Exodus22:19 “Nɑ̈gu ngɑn niin lɑ̈y. 
Exodus22:20 “Ngɑn ngɑ̈ddi jwögg møøgø ki gëëdhi, nɑ̈gu en, nɑ̈g ceth keløg e pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ngɑ̈dde, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus22:21 “Wëdh ko göggí ki gïnrɑj, wɑlɑ̀ ko ruj, mɑ́ yï ɑ́bëëd yï bɑ wëdh kì piny Rïp." 
Exodus22:22 Thwöm wɑlɑ̀ kïj, ko göggí ki gïnrɑj." 
Exodus22:23 Keløg e ógöggi yi yïn ki gïnrɑj, kɑ ywöög-ɑ köörɑ, ywøge lïngɑ’ lïngø," 
Exodus22:24 kɑ pyëwɑ órënyø ki wun, kɑ wu nɑ̈gɑ ki pilø, o mɑ̈nni wun döng gen gɑ thwömm, o wɑ̈ddi wun göög gen ki kïj." 
Exodus22:25 “Keløg jiɑ, tyëng-ɑ jɑdø møg-ɑ bëëdø kì butí ge ówïdhø ki ngyëny kì yïí, ko di møg nywøl yi ngyënyyɑni møg pir yi yïn keny-ɑ ódwöög gen." 
Exodus22:26 Keløg lɑni wɑɑd wun omɑgø yi yïn kipe kwör me ying cwɑgge, döggií keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Exodus22:27 Mɑ́ bene ógønhɑni ɑ nyi kume ree, ke pɑ döggií en, ree ókum yi en kɑ ngø? Keløg e ódi ywöög köörɑ, cwɑgge lïngɑ’ lïngø, mɑ́ pyëwɑ nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø." 
Exodus22:28 “Yï ko kööb ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Jwøk, kɑ jɑngi tyëng pödhi wun ko lɑɑm ki lɑm mø rijjø." 
Exodus22:29 “Yɑ ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n ki gëëdhi kì ri mwölli byellí geki møgi oløg. “Kɑ wɑ̈dí, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø mëggí yɑn." 
Exodus22:30 Mëggí yɑn kɑyyi dyëgí geki kɑyyi dhögí. Wiy kɑy-ɑ jɑlø bëëde ki meye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kɑ muuj yɑn kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng." 
Exodus22:31 “Yï ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki kwɑ̈ɑ̈l me dööngø kì bɑng lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l; de mëggí gwögg. 
Exodus23:1 “Yï ko nyi kööb ki kwøbbi pyed. Keløg yï bɑ cwɑ̈g kì burø, ngɑnrɑj ko køny ki kwøbi kwøbbi pyed." 
Exodus23:2 Yï ko göög ki orøg kipe kɑ̀ gøggii yi ji bënn. Keløg yï bɑ cwɑ̈g kì burø, gøny me døøj ko rënyi yi yïn. Yï ko kööb ki kwøbbi pyed, mɑ́ ji bënn ceg-ɑ pyed." 
Exodus23:3 Yï ko nyi cwɑg ngɑn wɑnge cɑn kì burø, kipe cɑni wɑnge yøw." 
Exodus23:4 “Keløg wɑɑdh ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑdere oyodø yi yïn e ótwɑ̈lø kì pɑ̈l, döggí." 
Exodus23:5 Keløg ɑderi ngɑn me mɑɑn yïn olidhø yi yïn e pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø yi pegi jɑmm-ɑ köme, ko wiy kì kenyɑni, køny ki tïngii mɑl." 
Exodus23:6 “Ngɑn wɑnge cɑn ko ruj kì burø kipe cɑni wɑnge yøw. 
Exodus23:7 Yï ko pëëd keløg yï gøøny-ɑ ngɑn megø kì burø. Ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn kømmi dyër ko wëggí cɑyø ki nɑ̈gø, mɑ́ tyëngorøg pɑ nyi mïdhi yi yɑn ge nɑ ji-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r." 
Exodus23:8 Yï ko yïëy ki ngyënyy-ɑ mëggi yïn yi ngɑn dwɑddi kinni o yï pëëd kì burø, mɑ́ yï ómɑ̈ɑ̈n lidhi gïn-ɑ dyër yi ngyënyyɑni. Ngyënyy-ɑ ni møgɑni, tyëngdøj nyi kölli ge’ kwøb ki kwøbbi pyed." 
Exodus23:9 “Wëdh ko göggí ki gïnrɑj, mɑ́ bëëdi wëdh ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ wëdhh kì piny Rïp." 
Exodus23:10 “Kɑ̈g pinyí kɑ byelle kɑɑj ki runn ɑ́bïkyel. 
Exodus23:11 Kɑ ywööm kì bïryeew runn. (Ke di gïg cyeg kì yije ki wɑɑngɑni), wiy ge cɑm yi tyëng-ɑ jɑdø kì kelli tyëng pödhi wun, o di møg döng kì bɑng gen, ge ócɑm yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l. Göög kinøw ceth ki pwödhi nyïm geki bɑɑg yenhí." 
Exodus23:12 “Gwøg gwøgí ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel, kɑ yï ywööm kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, o wɑdhí (wɑɑdh pur) ywöme geki ɑderí thyew, o bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì gølí geki wënh-ɑ bëëdø kì butí ywöm gen ri gen." 
Exodus23:13 “Mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun bënn. Kɑ nyingi jwögg møøgø ko nyi kwøb yi wun, nyingi gen ko lïngi kì dhøggi wun." 
Exodus23:14 “Wøw yɑn ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij run. 
Exodus23:15 Gwøg kwëër olwëny ni kɑ ɑ́cegɑ yïn. Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew yï cɑm-ɑ olwëny kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi yɑn kì dwɑ̈y Abib, mɑ́ en ɑ yije ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Ko di ngɑn bï be mɑlli yɑn e bong jwödhø me muuje yɑn." 
Exodus23:16 “Gwøg Kwëër Kɑj ki byel, jwöödh jɑmm-ɑ kwøng yi yïn ki kɑjø kì yij pwödhí. “Gwøg Kwëër Akɑnnì kì ri thumi run, kenyi cøng jɑmmi gwøgí kì yij pwödhø." 
Exodus23:17 Jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn nyi kedhi gen be mɑlli Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij run." 
Exodus23:18 “Kenyi ngɑ̈ddí yɑn ki gëëdhi, ko nyi thyeer ki ówɑj. Kɑ dwɑ̈li gënhí ko nin kɑ gït-ɑ mwøl." 
Exodus23:19 “Jɑmm-ɑ kwöngi ki cyegø, gɑ liil kì pinyí, kïdhí gen ød wöw Jwøgí. “Ónywøng dhødh ko thɑɑl ki cɑɑg meye." 
Exodus23:20 “Yɑ óödi bølí ki wëywödø, o yï kor yi en kì yöö, o yï kïdhe keny-ɑ ɑ́pyël yi yɑn." 
Exodus23:21 Mïdhí ki bëëdø me døj, kɑ kwøbbe lïngí. Kɑ dhøge ko pyeem, mɑ́ pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki orøøg wun, mɑ́ tegɑ ying-ɑ ree." 
Exodus23:22 Keløg møg-ɑ kwøb yi en olïngø yi yïn kidøøj, kɑ gïn-ɑ kwøb yi en nyi gwøg yi yïn, Yɑ ómɑ̈ni ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn. Yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn bënn." 
Exodus23:23 Wëywönɑ ócyɑ̈dhi kì bølí, kɑ yï kïdhe piny tyëng Amör, kí piny tyëng Kit, kí piny tyëng Perïdh, kí piny tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí piny tyëng Kib, kí piny tyëng Yebus, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi yɑn bënn." 
Exodus23:24 Rií ko bøødh bøli jwöggi gen, wɑlɑ̀ ge ko mɑl yi yïn. Yï ko bëëd ki bëëdi tyëngɑni. Tørrí ngïjji jwöggi gen. Kɑ löjji gen tørrí." 
Exodus23:25 Ke mɑllu yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïgcɑmmi wun geki pïi wun ógyëdh yi yɑn. Rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi yɑn kì kelli wun." 
Exodus23:26 Bong ngɑndhɑjø me yije dwöög wɑ̈g yi dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ bong bwøj men-ɑ óying me nud kì pinyí. Runní óløgɑ mø ngenyø kì kömi piny." 
Exodus23:27 “Mɑ̈rɑ óörɑ bølí; tyëng-ɑ kelli gen kedhi yi yïn óbwøg yi yɑn. Tyëng-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn, wɑ̈thi gen óbɑ̈nni yi yɑn, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ógöjjɑ cyeddø yi yïn." 
Exodus23:28 Thɑpin óörɑ bølí, kɑ tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng Kit cyeddi yi en kì bølí." 
Exodus23:29 Ge pɑ cyeedɑ wɑ̈g kì bølí ki run ɑ́kyel, kipe piny ódöng nøw, kɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l óngënyø kibøli wun." 
Exodus23:30 Ge ócyeedɑ wɑ̈g kì bølí mɑ̈ɑ̈dh mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, gïti keny-ɑ óngënyi wun, kɑ piny kwɑny yi wun." 
Exodus23:31 Piny men-ɑ mëggɑ yïn dhøge cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø gïti Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, o cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ ryɑng e gït-ɑ Nɑm Porɑt, mɑ́ tyëngpiny ócïbɑ cinggi wun, kɑ ge cyeddi yi wun; ge pɑ cungi kì bøli wun." 
Exodus23:32 Ko di lwöbø me ying kɑɑm wun ki gen, geki jwöggi gen." 
Exodus23:33 Ge ko wëggí bëëdø kì pinyí, kipe yï óthɑɑb be orøg yi gen kì bølɑ, keny-ɑ ómɑlli jwöggi gen, kɑ ge ogöögø ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì møg mɑg yïn.”" 
Exodus24:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bïu yïɑ, yïn kí Aɑron, kí Nɑdɑb, kí Abiu kí ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kì kelli jøgdøngi Isrɑil, kɑ ri wun bøødh wun piny wu nudd wu lɑ̈wi." 
Exodus24:2 Yï ketí ɑ ówɑ̈nhi butɑ, de jøg-ɑ kyeelø ko wɑ̈nhi butɑ, ji ko yedhi wïj kït thyew.”" 
Exodus24:3 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kedh kɑ ji köbbe kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki cigge bënn. Kɑ ji ólöggø bënn wïj ɑ́kyel kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn ógwøg yi wøn!”" 
Exodus24:4 Kɑ kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwed yi Mosɑ̀ ge bënn. Kɑ ogëdø dhuki ki këli lɑm kì thɑ kït, gø ɑ́ger yi en kɑ ɑ́tuggi kïttì mø døngø, gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ge cungi gɑ kwɑnni wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil." 
Exodus24:5 Codhe, ɑöde ki yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb møg kedhi be rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kene men-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈llii, kɑ ge ongɑ̈dø ki dhög kiper mër." 
Exodus24:6 Kɑ budi remø kwɑny yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ gø kïdhe yethi löd. Kɑ bun-ɑ kyeelø kinye ri këli lɑm." 
Exodus24:7 Codhe, ɑkwɑnye wɑ̈nyi lwöbø, wɑ̈ny-ɑ yije ógweed Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ gø rɑ̈nge ji e óryeerø. Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólïngi yi wøn, o gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógwøg yi wøn ge bënn.”" 
Exodus24:8 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny rem-ɑ yethi löd yi Mosɑ̀ kɑ gø wiide ri ji. Akööbe kinni, “Men bɑ rem-ɑ cïb lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm wun ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keje.”" 
Exodus24:9 Kɑ Mosɑ̀, kí Aɑron, kí Nɑdɑb kí Abiu geki jøgdøngi Isrɑil pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew yedh-ɑ mɑl wïj kït." 
Exodus24:10 Kɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil lidh yi gen. Pɑ̈ltyelle bɑ óbɑng nɑ kïdi mɑl, e ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng, e lïw nɑ kïn-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ sɑpir yi dhïw-ɑ dhïwe." 
Exodus24:11 De bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gögge jøgdøngi Isrɑil. Ge ɑ́nenni yï Jwøk kidyër, codhe ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Exodus24:12 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yïnhí yïɑ wïj kït. Kɑ yï bëëd kì keny, yï óthödhɑ ki ópɑ̈nni kït. Kömi ópɑ̈nnɑni ɑ ɑ́gweedɑ ciggɑ, gɑ møg-ɑ ópwönyi ji.”" 
Exodus24:13 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ odhwödhø geki Jöcwø nyel-ɑ nyi kønyii, kɑ Mosɑ̀ yedh-ɑ mɑl wïj Kïti Sinɑy, Kïti Jwøk." 
Exodus24:14 Kɑ jøgdøngø köbbe kinni, “Bëëd wun kì keny gïti keny-ɑ ódwöög wøn yï wun. Aɑron geki Ur ɑ keny èn ki wun, ngɑn yïe di gøny, nyi gönye yï gen.”" 
Exodus24:15 Ayedhi Mosɑ̀ wïj Kïti Sinɑy, kɑ kïnɑni kum yi yïrø." 
Exodus24:16 Kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pëgg-ɑ kömi Kïti Sinɑy. Kɑ obëëdø ɑ́ ɑkum yi yïrø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel. Kɑ Mosɑ̀ cwøl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, e cwɑgge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij yïrø." 
Exodus24:17 O mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nenni yi Isrɑil ɑ́ mɑc me lyel kì wïj kït. 
Exodus24:18 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kedh-ɑ yij yïrɑni. Kɑ Mosɑ̀ obëëdø kì wïj kïnɑni ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kí wɑ̈rr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen." 
Exodus25:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus25:2 “Köbbí wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil kinni, muuj yɑn ki lwøl yi ngɑn pyëwe dwɑddi thödhi yɑn." 
Exodus25:3 Gïg-ɑ cuggi kwɑnyø yi wun kì yï gen bɑ dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí dilɑl," 
Exodus25:4 kí ógudh-ɑ kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí møg kwɑrø, kí ógudh-ɑ bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j gɑ korø, kí møg-ɑ bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j gɑ yëyyi dyëg," 
Exodus25:5 kí pënni dyëg møg-ɑ ójwɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki kïn-ɑ kwɑrø, ki pënn-ɑ yöm, kí yɑdh ɑ́lwiy." 
Exodus25:6 Kí møøw lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, kí mɑ̈th-ɑ nyi gïïny møg-ɑ yømi gen med, kí bɑkur," 
Exodus25:7 kí ócï geki tigg-ɑ kyeelø mø tɑɑg lɑni Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, geki pɑrø." 
Exodus25:8 Gëddi yɑn yi ji ki kej kwër kipe kinni o yɑ bëëdɑ kì kelli gen. 
Exodus25:9 Geru en ceth e pɑ̈r ki kej bëëdø, kí jɑmm-ɑ yije ge nɑ møg-ɑ ónyudhɑ yïn." 
Exodus25:10 “Göög ki Sɑnduug yɑdh ɑ́lwiy bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr miyø kí pyɑ̈rø, o lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel, o döre bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
Exodus25:11 Kɑ gøøj ki dhɑm dhïw kì yije geki köme, kɑ göggí ki dööli dhɑb kì wɑ̈thi tøgge." 
Exodus25:12 Kɑ kunyí ki yëll ɑ́ngwen mø dhɑb, kɑ ge gøød wɑ̈thi tøgge gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ɑ́ryew kì tuung, kí ɑ́ryew kì tung-ɑ kyeelø." 
Exodus25:13 Codhe, kɑ yï tëëng ki lødhi ɑ́lwiy, kɑ ge gøøj ki dhɑb." 
Exodus25:14 Kɑ lødhɑni cød yethi yëll-ɑ tøggi Sɑndug, gɑ møg nyi kɑ̈llii." 
Exodus25:15 Kɑ wiy lødhɑni bëëd gen kì ri yëlli Sɑndug, ge ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì ree." 
Exodus25:16 Kɑ lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi wɑ cïb yij Sɑndungɑni. 
Exodus25:17 “Göggí ki kum ki dhɑm-ɑ dhïw, bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr miyø kí pyɑ̈rø, o lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
Exodus25:18 Kɑ yï thɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki kerobb ɑ́ryew, gwøg gen ki dhɑb, kɑ ge cuung kì wɑ̈thi tøggi kumɑni." 
Exodus25:19 Cïb kerob ɑ́kyel wïj tøg kumɑni kì tuung, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø cïb tøge kì tung-ɑ kyeelø. Mɑɑg gen ri kum, o ge cyɑ̈dhi gen kyeel." 
Exodus25:20 Gwøg kerobb ge nenn-ɑ nyingi gen, e obërri gen tïng gen mɑl, gï peedh gen, ge gëng-ɑ kumɑni, e wɑ̈thi gen nenn-ɑ yï gøn." 
Exodus25:21 Cïb kumɑni kömi Sɑnduug Cigg. Kɑ Ópɑ̈nni Cigg-ɑ ómëggɑ yïn ócïb yij Sɑndungɑni. 
Exodus25:22 Yɑ óyïddi ki yïn kì kenyɑni, o yɑ kööbɑ ki yïn, yɑ ying-ɑ wïj kumɑni, kì kɑɑm kerobbɑni ryeet, kì kömi Sɑnduug Cigg, o møg-ɑ cïgɑ tyëng Isrɑil nyi köbbɑ yïn." 
Exodus25:23 “Göög ki tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ mi gïncɑm ki yɑdh ɑ́lwiy, bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen, o döre bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
Exodus25:24 Kɑ gøøj ki dhɑm dhïw, kɑ tøgge dööl ki dhɑb." 
Exodus25:25 Kɑ göggí ki gël me döre bɑ mïlimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj, kì tøgge bënn. Kɑ gëlɑni dööl ki dhɑb." 
Exodus25:26 Kɑ göggí ki yëlli dhɑb ɑ́ngwen, kɑ ge cïb wɑ̈thi tøggi tɑrɑbenhɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen kì ri, kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ di tyelle gɑ ɑ́ngwen." 
Exodus25:27 Cïb yëll ge cyɑ̈gi ki dööl-ɑ tøggi tɑrɑbedhɑ̀, mɑ́ gen ɑ ómïdhi lødh møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈llii." 
Exodus25:28 Gwøg lødhɑni gɑ ɑ́lwiy, kɑ ge gøøj ki dhɑb, kɑ tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ nyi kɑ̈lli ki lødhɑni." 
Exodus25:29 Kɑ siniy møge, kí thɑnhhe, kí óthɑ̈gge, kí ɑ́thïwwe køny ge bënn gɑ dhɑm dhïw." 
Exodus25:30 Kɑ gïncɑm men-ɑ bɑ lwølɑ nyi cïb kenyɑni ceth, kì kömi tɑrɑbenhɑni." 
Exodus25:31 “Göög ki teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ki dhɑm dhïw, kɑ tyele geki kööre kí bɑ̈dde gwøøg ki dhɑm-ɑ ɑtøg, geki gwedde kí okøgge, wiy bëëd gen gɑ ɑ́kyel bënn, e bong men cuggi puth wɑ̈ye." 
Exodus25:32 Bɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel ɑ kɑr kì wɑ̈thi tùnge, ɑ́dɑ̈g kì tuung kí ɑ́dɑ̈g kì tuung." 
Exodus25:33 Bɑ̈ddɑni bënn ri gen dɑ ɑbuj, kí ɑnɑ̈bb, kí okøgg mø ógwøgø kì ri gen, ge bɑ kɑ̈jj ɑ́dɑ̈g, kì ri bɑ̈dd-ɑ kɑrø bënn." 
Exodus25:34 O bëëde wïj tengi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ ɑ́kyel dɑ ɑbuj ɑ́ngwen mø bɑ ɑ́tug, kí ɑnɑ̈bb, kí okøgg." 
Exodus25:35 Göggí thɑ̈thi bɑ̈dd-ɑ kɑrø ki ɑnɑ̈bb bënn, göggí bɑ̈ddɑni bënn gɑ ɑ́bïkyel." 
Exodus25:36 Wiy tyele geki kööre kí bɑ̈dde bënn, bëëd gen gɑ ɑ́kyel e bong men cuggi puth wɑ̈ye, e bɑ ɑgwøg bëne ki dhɑm dhïw." 
Exodus25:37 Codhe, kɑ yï göög ki lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ɑ́bïryew møg thønhø, kɑ ge cïb wɑ̈thi teggɑni, o ge mënyyi gen bøle." 
Exodus25:38 Gwøg digɑ̈bbe, geki óthɑ̈ngge gɑ dhɑm dhïw." 
Exodus25:39 Dhɑm-ɑ gwøøg teggɑni geki jɑmme bënn røm ɑ́ kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj. 
Exodus25:40 Nëën kidøøj cyee, o men-ɑ ógwøg yi yïn bëëde e nɑ men-ɑ ɑ́nyudhɑ yïn kì wïj kït.”" 
Exodus26:1 “Kɑ Kemi Kwër gwøøg ki sitɑrr pyɑ̈rø mø ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm, ge ókwenø kidøøj. Ri gen dɑ kïddì mø bɑ ówɑw, kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí kïni kwɑrø, ri gen ókwïnnø yi bødhø me cinge døj ki ngïjji kerobb." 
Exodus26:2 Bɑ̈ri sitɑrɑ̀ ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew. Gwøg sitɑrr møgɑni ge pɑ̈r bënn." 
Exodus26:3 Kɑ ɑ́bïj rød kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ ɑ́bïj-ɑ kyeelø rød kej ɑ́kyel thyew." 
Exodus26:4 Thuulí wïj sitɑrr-ɑ ɑ́rød kej ɑ́kyel ki ógødh me kïde bɑ ówɑw, kɑ ri møg-ɑ kyeelø loony ki rudø thyew." 
Exodus26:5 Rudí tøggi ógønh-ɑ bɑ ówɑw ki dölli korø pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj kì thɑ sitɑrɑ̀. Kí dölli korø møøgø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj thyew kì thɑ sitɑr-ɑ kyeelø. Döllɑni bëëd gen ri gen rwööm gen, men røm ki men" 
Exodus26:6 Kɑ yï göög ki odöbbi dhɑb pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj møg mɑɑg buddɑni ryeet kej ɑ́kyel. O tɑni Kemi Kwër bëëde ɑ́ ɑ́kyel. 
Exodus26:7 “Codhe, kɑ yï göög ki tɑnø megø me kum tɑni Kemi Kwër, gwøøg ki sitɑr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel mø ócwɑ̈jø ki yëyyi dyëg." 
Exodus26:8 Bɑ̈ri sitɑrɑ̀ ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew, kɑ ge gwøg ge pɑ̈r." 
Exodus26:9 Kɑ ɑ́bïj rød kej ɑ́kyel, o ge göög gen ki ɑ́kyel. Codhe, kɑ ɑ́bïj loony ki rød kej ɑ́kyel. Bɑn bïkyeel sitɑr yethe ɑ́ryew kì bøli kemɑ̀." 
Exodus26:10 Göög ki dölli korø pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj kì thɑ sitɑrr-ɑ ɑ́rød kej ɑ́kyel. Kɑ møg-ɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø loony ki göggø. 
Exodus26:11 Göög ki yëlli dilɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, kɑ ge kïdhí yethi dölli korø, o ge mɑɑg gen buddɑni ryeet kej ɑ́kyel, o kumɑni bëëde ɑ́ ɑ́kyel." 
Exodus26:12 Kɑ kwï ógønh-ɑ ɑ́döng ɑ́ ɑbɑn ryërre kì cyɑ̈n e gëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Kemi Kwër. 
Exodus26:13 Ógønh-ɑ ɑ́döng e bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj kì wɑ̈thi tùngi Kemi Kwër, wiy bëëde ree cwɑɑl en piny, o gënge tøgge kì tùngɑni ryeet." 
Exodus26:14 “Göög ki kum Kemi Kwër ki pënni dyëg mø ójwɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki kïn-ɑ kwɑrø, kɑ köme kum thyew ki pënnì møg-ɑ órød kej ɑ́kyel." 
Exodus26:15 “Ngud ki yenh ɑ́lwiy møg cwöödh piny, gɑ møg mïdhi Kemi Kwër." 
Exodus26:16 Bɑ̈ri ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen, lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïkyel," 
Exodus26:17 e pɑ̈m dɑ tyelle ɑ́ryew kelli gen cyɑ̈gi. Gwøg gen ge pɑ̈r bënn. 
Exodus26:18 Göög ki yenh pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kipe tung-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl. 
Exodus26:19 Kɑ tyelli yenhɑni cïbí ki tëddi ɑ́tegø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. O yɑdh ɑ́kyel bëëde yïe dɑ tëddì ɑ́ryew kipe tyelle ryeet. Tyellɑni bɑ pij møg-ɑ ócwöödh piny. 
Exodus26:20 Kɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø men-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø göggí ki pɑ̈mmì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew thyew. 
Exodus26:21 Kɑ ge göggí thyew ki tëddi ɑ́tegø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. O yɑdh ɑ́kyel bëëde yïe dɑ tëddì ɑ́ryew kipe tyelle ryeet. 
Exodus26:22 Kɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Kemi Kwër göggí ki yenh ɑ́bïkyel. 
Exodus26:23 Kɑ wɑ̈thi tùnge kïdhí ki yenh ɑ́ryew," 
Exodus26:24 yenhi wɑ̈thi tùng, bëëd gen ge ómɑɑg kej ɑ́kyel kì piny, o wɑ̈thi gen mɑl bɑ ɑmɑg ki döölø me bɑ ngyënyø dødø. Pɑ̈mm-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùng, gwøøg gen ryeet kinøw." 
Exodus26:25 O bëëde ɑ́ pɑ̈mmì ɑ́bïdɑ̈g ɑ ócwöödh piny kì cyɑ̈n. Kí tëddi ɑ́tegø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, tëddì ɑ́ryew kì thɑ pɑ̈m ɑ́kyel." 
Exodus26:26 “Kɑ yï göög ki yenh ɑ́lwiy pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj, ɑ́bïj møg mɑɑg wɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ cungi kì kej ɑ́kyel kì tuung kemɑ̀," 
Exodus26:27 kí ɑ́bïj møøgø kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, kí ɑ́bïj møøgø thyew kì cyɑ̈n kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Exodus26:28 Yɑnh-ɑ bɑ rïwi wiy yinge dïkïl kì wɑ̈thi yenh, kɑ wiy bɑ̈ɑ̈ne gøn kì dyëre e wɑ̈dh-ɑ tuung kí tuung." 
Exodus26:29 Kïdhí ri yenh-ɑ cungi ki yëlli dhɑb møg-ɑ ómïdhi wɑ̈thi gen. Kɑ yenh-ɑ cungi bënn gøøj ki dhɑb. 
Exodus26:30 Ger Kemi Kwër ceth, e nɑ men-ɑ ɑ́nyudhɑ yïn kì wïj kït." 
Exodus26:31 “Göög ki sitɑrɑ̀ ki kor-ɑ yöm, ree dɑ kïddì mø bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl kí kïni kwɑrø, keny-ɑ órum ree ki kwïnø yi bødhø me cinge døøj ki kerobb." 
Exodus26:32 Kɑ ngɑɑb ri löjj ɑ́ngwen mø yɑdh ɑ́lwiy, mø bɑ ɑgøj ki dhɑb, mø ri gen di odöbb, ge ócungø kömi tëddì ɑ́ngwen møg ɑ́tegø." 
Exodus26:33 Kɑ sitɑrɑ̀ yinge me ryërri kì ri odöbb. Codhe, kɑ Sɑnduug Cigg men-ɑ yije di ópɑ̈nni kït ryeet kɑ̈ɑ̈l, kɑ cïb kenyɑni, kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j sitɑrɑ̀, men-ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈ng kej kwër, geki Kejkwërdwøng." 
Exodus26:34 Cïb kum kömi Sɑnduug Cigg. 
Exodus26:35 Kɑ tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ cïb bøli Kej Kwërdwøng kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, kì wɑɑng wuudø. Cïb teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ wɑɑng wurlwɑl e rwööm ki tɑrɑbedhɑ̀." 
Exodus26:36 “Codhe, kɑ dhø kemɑ̀ ngɑ̈bbí ki sitɑrɑ̀ me bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j ki kor-ɑ yöm, e ókwenø ki korø me kïdde di møg bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí møg kwɑrø. Kwen gen yi bødhø me cinge døj." 
Exodus26:37 Cwödhí piny ki löjji ɑ́lwiy ɑ́bïj mø bɑ ɑgøj ki dhɑb. Göggi ri gen ki odöbb mø bɑ dhɑb, møg ri gen mɑɑg sitɑrɑni, kɑ ge göggí ki tëddì ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ókønyø gɑ dilɑl." 
Exodus27:1 “Kɑ këli lɑm gwøøg ki ɑ́lwiy, gwøøg köme mɑl ɑ́ óør, nyingi ngëdde ɑ́ngwen pɑ̈r, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Exodus27:2 Kɑ göggí ki tùng kì wɑ̈thi tøgge gɑ ɑ́ngwen bënn, de cɑɑg gen ki køjø kì ri yɑnh-ɑ gwøøg këli lɑm, kɑ gøøj ki dilɑl." 
Exodus27:3 Kɑ jɑmme bënn thɑ̈dh gɑ dilɑl; ɑ løg tɑ̈mm-ɑ nyi jøøb búr, kí ɑtögge, kí tɑ̈mme, kí odöbbe, kí dikɑ̈bbi mɑc. Gwøøg jɑmmɑni ki dilɑl." 
Exodus27:4 Göggi ki bøøy dilɑl óør, wɑ̈thi tùnge gɑ ɑ́ngwen bënn dɑ yëll, ge ómɑɑg tøgge." 
Exodus27:5 Kɑ cïb piny thɑ tøg këlø, o bëëde e ying-ɑ kuni dïdyër." 
Exodus27:6 Kɑ këlø göggí ki lødh ɑ́ryew mɑ ɑ́lwiy, kɑ ge gøj ki dilɑl." 
Exodus27:7 Kɑ lødhɑni cød yethi yëll-ɑ tøggi këlø gɑ møg nyi kɑ̈llii. 
Exodus27:8 Kɑ këlø gwøg ki pɑ̈mmì, kɑ yije gwøg ɑ́ göl. Gwøg ceth e pɑ̈r ki men-ɑ ɑ́nyudhɑ yïn kì wïj kït." 
Exodus27:9 “Göög ki dörø ki sitɑrɑ̀, ɑ́ kɑl me wen Kemi Kwër. Dör-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl gwøg ɑ́ ógødh mɑ ɑcwɑ̈j ki kor-ɑ yöm, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen." 
Exodus27:10 Ngɑɑb sitɑrɑni ri löjji dilɑl pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kɑ mɑɑg ri gen ki odöbb mø bɑ ɑ́tegø, kɑ twöj ki win ɑ́tegø. Gwøg tëddi löjjɑni ki dilɑl, kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Exodus27:11 Tung-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø dɑ löjji dilɑl mø ni møgɑni, ge ócungø kömi tëddi dilɑl pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o sitɑr mø bɑ̈ri gen bɑ mïtïr, mɑɑg ri gen ki odöbb geki win-ɑ tööj mɑ ɑ́tegø." 
Exodus27:12 Dör-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø bɑ̈ri sitɑre bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, o bɑ ɑngɑb kì ri löjj pyɑ̈rø mø di tëddi pyɑ̈rø." 
Exodus27:13 O dör-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ løg tung-ɑ di dhø kɑl, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew thyew." 
Exodus27:14 Tung ɑ́kyel kì bøli dhø kɑl bɑ̈ri sitɑrre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïkyel kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, ge óngɑɑb-ɑ ri löjj ɑ́dɑ̈g mø di tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Exodus27:15 Sitɑrr møg-ɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø pɑ̈r ki gen, ge bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïkyel kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, ge óngɑɑb-ɑ ri löjj ɑ́dɑ̈g mø di tëddi ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Exodus27:16 Sitɑri dhø kɑl bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, e ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm, me bɑ ɑgwel ki kïddì mø bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl kí møg kwɑrø, o ócwɑ̈j-ɑ yi bødhø me cinge døj. O ngɑɑb ri löjj ɑ́ngwen mø di tyel ɑ́ngwen." 
Exodus27:17 O löjjɑni bënn møg-ɑ tuum kɑl, bɑ ɑrïw ki lødhi ɑ́tegø ri gen dɑ odöbbi ɑ́tegø kí tëddi dilɑl." 
Exodus27:18 Bëëd bɑ̈ri kɑl ceth ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, o döri sitɑre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Exodus27:19 Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ göög kì gølɑni bëëd gen ceth ge bɑ ɑthɑ̈dh ki dilɑl, gen ɑ pijji kemɑ̀ bënn, kɑ löjji dör-ɑ bɑ kɑl bëëd gen gɑ dilɑl bënn." 
Exodus27:20 “Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbí, o yï nëngi yi gen ki møøw dhetun men-ɑ bɑ ɑ́bïj, men mïdhi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi tegg ge olyelø." 
Exodus27:21 Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde mïdhi gen lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ge olyelø kì bølɑ cɑg kì böörø gïti mwøl. Mɑnyɑni yinge yij Kemi Kwër, kì kuni wɑ̈g kì ri sitɑrɑ̀ men-ɑ gëng Sɑnduug Cigg. Ciggɑni mïdhi gen ceth yi tyëng Isrɑil, cɑg ɑnɑn gïti ɑtheer kì ri rïjj bënn.”" 
Exodus28:1 “Köbbí Aɑron ómyëw bëe yïí geki wɑ̈dde, Nɑdɑb, kí Abiu, kí Eliɑdhɑr, kí Ithɑmɑr. Dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø, o ge göggi gen yɑn gɑ ókwër." 
Exodus28:2 Göggí ómyëw Aɑron ki ógudh, o myëre, o wør yi ji." 
Exodus28:3 Köbbí bödhhì bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́thödhi ki peli wïj geki døøji cingø, o Aɑron göggi yi gen ki ógudh mø bëëdi gen ying wɑ̈yi gen. Ógudh møg nyodhii kinni bɑ miɑ, ngɑn göggi yɑn ɑ́ ókwërø." 
Exodus28:4 Ógudh-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn o gï gwøg yi gen ek: Bøj kí pɑrø, kí ɑ́ywönhdwøng, kí ɑ́ywönhthinh, kí thɑgi wïj, kí wëni yij. Göggi ógudh møgɑni Aɑron ómyëw geki wɑ̈dde yi bödhhì, o yɑ göggi yi gen gɑ ókwër." 
Exodus28:5 Cwɑ̈ɑ̈j gen yi bödhhɑni ki korri yëyy mø kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí kïni kwɑrø, ki korri dhɑb, ki kor-ɑ yöm" 
Exodus28:6 “Göög gen ki pɑrø ki korri yëyy mø kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí kïni kwɑrø, ki korri dhɑb, ki kor-ɑ yöm, kɑ ge cwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ywönhdwøng. Cwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógønhɑni yi bödhh-ɑ cinggi gen døøj." 
Exodus28:7 Bëëd wɑ̈thi tøgge ómɑɑg kej ɑ́kyel. 
Exodus28:8 Bëëd wën-ɑ nyi twööjii ɑ́ ɑrød kì ree, e bɑ ɑgwøg ki jɑmm-ɑ ni møgɑni." 
Exodus28:9 Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki ópɑ̈nni kïtt-ɑ nyi göög ki tigg gɑ ɑ́ryew, kɑ nyingi wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil gweed kömi gen," 
Exodus28:10 e kööl ɑ ri ngɑn-ɑ dwøng, ɑ́bïkyel kì kömi kïnï, kí ɑ́bïkyel kì kömi kïn-ɑ kyeelø." 
Exodus28:11 Gweed nyingi wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil kömi ópɑ̈nni kïttɑni ryeet, ge ceg yi yïn kɑ twegø, ni kenyi gwëëd bødhø ki kitim. Kunyi tøggi kïttɑni ki dhɑb men-ɑ ómɑɑg gen ri ógødh kwër." 
Exodus28:12 Codhe, kɑ ópɑ̈nni kïttɑni twööj ri digɑ̈bbi wɑ̈thi tøggi ɑ́ywönhdwøng gɑ møg nyi pɑɑr wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Rug nyingi gen yi Aɑron kì bølɑ gɑ møg nyi pɑɑr wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil." 
Exodus28:13 Göög ki ɑ́tuggi dhɑb ɑ́ryew møg mïdhi kïttɑni. 
Exodus28:14 Kɑ yï göög ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb ɑ́ryew ki dhɑm dhïw. Mɑɑg ɑ́cwecwellɑni ri ɑ́tuggi dhɑb møg-ɑ ri kïttɑni, o ge mïdhi ge gïn." 
Exodus28:15 “Göggi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng ki bøj men nyi kunyi ki løøgi kwøb, gwøg yi bödhhì ni kɑ ɑ́gwøg gen pɑrø, cwɑ̈j ge gøn ki kor-ɑ yöm mø kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí kïni kwɑrø, kí korri dhɑb." 
Exodus28:16 Gwøg bøj ɑ́ óør tùnge pɑ̈r, bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, ɑ́ ɑbɑn yethe ɑ́ryew, o gööge e nɑ jyeb." 
Exodus28:17 Kɑ ree rudi ki lwøbb ɑ́ngwen mø ópɑ̈nni kïtt-ɑ nyi göög ki tigg; lwøm-ɑ mɑl yije dɑ rërø, kí óbwörø, kí ómɑrø." 
Exodus28:18 O ryeew lwøbb yije dɑ ówɑw me kømi lojø, kí óbɑng, kí óbøw." 
Exodus28:19 Dɑ̈ɑ̈g lwøbb yije dɑ ɑ́dwøgø, kí oget, kí ɑ́gør tïl." 
Exodus28:20 Ngween lwøbb yije dɑ ówɑw, kí ditɑ̈ng, kí ɑcwïl. Kɑ ge mɑɑg kej ɑ́kyel bënn ge otumø yi yïn ki dhɑb." 
Exodus28:21 Bëëd kwɑnni ópɑ̈nni kïttɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ceth kì kömi bønyɑni, ɑ́kyel cungi ɑ́ nyingi wɑ̈d Isrɑil ɑ́kyel, men ki kïte men ki kïte. Gweed nyingi ngɑɑn kömi kïte, yï ce tweg-ɑ kitim." 
Exodus28:22 Göög ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑm dhïw, e nɑ thøl ɑkɑ̈d me ngɑɑb bøj." 
Exodus28:23 Göög ki yëlli dhɑb ɑ́ryew, kɑ ge gøød wɑ̈thi tøggi bøj kì mɑl." 
Exodus28:24 Mɑɑg ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb ri yëllɑni. 
Exodus28:25 Mɑɑg dhøggi ɑ́cwecwellɑni ryeet kì tung-ɑ kyeelø ri ɑ́tuggi dhɑb møg-ɑ ri pɑrø, kì ri digɑ̈bbì, kì wɑ̈thi tøg kì bøli pɑrø." 
Exodus28:26 Göög ki yëlli dhɑb ɑ́ryew møøgø kɑ ge gøød wɑ̈thi tøggi bøj kì kuni piny, kì yiny-ɑ yij tung-ɑ kömi pɑrø." 
Exodus28:27 Göög ki yëll ɑ́ryew møøgø, kɑ ge gøød kuni piny kì ri digɑ̈bbì wïj tøg pɑrø, kì kuni bøle, cïb mɑl ri keny-ɑ órød wëni pɑrø." 
Exodus28:28 Twööj yëlli pɑɑrø ri wëëni me kïde bɑ ówɑw, gï orebø ki wëëni kipe kinni o bøj cöge e pɑ lëwwø kì kömi pɑrø." 
Exodus28:29 “Kɑ̈lli nyingi wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil yi Aɑron ceth kì ri bøj, bøj mi löggø. Kɑ̈lle gïn kì ɑ́ngɑne ceth ɑ́ men nyi pɑ̈ddi ji, kì bøli kenyi kedhe kej kwër." 
Exodus28:30 Cïb Urïm geki Thumïm yij bøj, o ge ying gen kömi mini Aɑron kenyi kedhe bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O Aɑron kɑ̈lle jɑmmi løøgi gøny kì Isrɑil kì bølɑ kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus28:31 “Göög ki ɑ́ywönhdwøng, rød ɑ́ ógødh me bɑ ówɑw bëne." 
Exodus28:32 Göggi ki keny me twïyø kì wïje mɑl, me nyi cød wïj Aɑron, kɑ cwɑ̈jji ki munø, kipe e ópyëëd." 
Exodus28:33 Göög ki gïg mø bɑ ɑ́tug ni nywøli romɑn ki kor, mø kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl kí møg kwɑrø, kɑ ge ngɑɑb tøggi ɑ́ywönhdwøng, o ge ryërri gen." 
Exodus28:34 Kɑ kelli gen cwil ki mɑ̈lli dhɑb, (mɑ̈lø ki romɑn gïti keny-ɑ ótuume)." 
Exodus28:35 Rug ógønhɑni yi Aɑron ceth kenyi gööge ɑ́ ókwërø. O ywøøg mɑ̈lli dhɑb nyi lïngi kenyi kedhe, kí kenyi dwööge wɑ̈g kì kej kwër kì bølɑ, o Aɑron cöge e pɑ thøw." 
Exodus28:36 “Göög ki ópɑni dhɑb, kɑ kwøb møg gweed ge twegí ree, yï ce tweg-ɑ kitim kinni, ‘Kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’" 
Exodus28:37 Kɑ twööj bøli thɑɑg ki ɑcwɑdø me kïde bɑ ówɑw. 
Exodus28:38 Nyi rug yi Aɑron ceth kì bøle, o kɑ̈lle körri orøøg tyëng Isrɑil kinøw kì ri jɑmm-ɑ muuj yɑn yi gen. Nyi kɑ̈lli yi Aɑron ceth gø twööj en bøle, kenyi kedhe bølɑ, o jɑmm-ɑ muuj yi ji yïëy yi yɑn." 
Exodus28:39 “Cwɑ̈j ɑ́ywönhthinh ki kor-ɑ yöm, kɑ thɑɑg cwɑ̈j ki kor-ɑ yöm thyew, kɑ wëëni ceg ki kwenø yi bødhø me cinge døj." 
Exodus28:40 “Göggi wɑ̈ddi Aɑron thyew ki ɑ́ywödhh-ɑ thønhø, kí wënni yeth, geki wënni wɑ̈ɑ̈th, kipe kinni o ge nënni gen ge myëër, o ge wør yi ji." 
Exodus28:41 Løny ógudhɑni ri Aɑron ómyëw geki wɑ̈dde. Kɑ ge gïïny ki møøw dhetun. Kɑ ge thyey kipe gwøg men-ɑ gwøg yi gen. Kɑ ge kwër, o ge bëëd gen gɑ ókwër møgɑ." 
Exodus28:42 Kɑ ge göggí ki ɑköjji kor-ɑ yöm, mø kum gen ri gen, e cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ pyer gïti ri cøng." 
Exodus28:43 O ge nyi rug yi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kì thɑ̈thi ɑ́ywödhhi gen kenyi kedhi gen yij Kemi Kwër, kì bøli keny-ɑ kedhi gen buti këli lɑm be gwøg gɑ ókwër kì kej kwër. Kipe ge ókɑ̈ni ki orøg kɑ ge othøø. Møgɑni bɑ cigg møg mïdhi kidøøj yi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kí kwɑrre gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus29:1 “Gwøg møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn èn, kɑ Aɑron kwëër geki wɑ̈dde gɑ ókwër møgɑ, kɑ̈bbí ki wɑdh me thinh, ki órömm ɑ́ryew mø bong gïjø me rɑj kì ri gen." 
Exodus29:2 Kɑ yï göög ki ópun ki møng-ɑ búr gemè e bɑ olwëny, nyöm ɑwɑnyɑni ki møøw dhetun. Göög ki ópùn møg thwøwø, møg bɑ ɑgïny ki møw." 
Exodus29:3 Kɑ ge kïdhi yij ɑ́ridh, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l geki wɑdh, kí órömmɑni ryeet." 
Exodus29:4 “Kɑ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhø Kemi Kwër, kɑ ge lwøøg ki pï." 
Exodus29:5 Kɑ ógudh kwɑɑny, kɑ ɑ́ywönhthinh løny ree, kɑ ɑ́ywönhdwøng løny köme, kɑ ɑköj løny, kí pɑrø. Kɑ ɑköj twööj ree ki wëne men-ɑ bɑ ɑkwen yi bødhø me cinge døj." 
Exodus29:6 Kɑ thɑɑg cïb wïje, kɑ Athyeey Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j twööj kömi thɑɑg kì bøle." 
Exodus29:7 Kɑ møøw röny kwɑɑny, kɑ køny wïje, kɑ gïïny." 
Exodus29:8 “Kɑ wɑ̈dde kɑ̈ɑ̈l, kɑ ɑ́ywödhhi gen løny ri gen." 
Exodus29:9 Kɑ thɑ̈ggì cïb wɑ̈thi gen, kɑ wënnì twööj yethi gen. Aɑron geki kwɑrre óbëëdø gɑ ókwër kì Isrɑil e bɑ cigg møg cɑ̈gi ɑnɑn gïti ɑtheer. Bene kër-ɑ ókwëër Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde ɑnɑn gɑ ókwër." 
Exodus29:10 “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑdh dhø Kemi Kwër. Kɑ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde cïb gen cinggi gen wïj wɑnhɑni. 
Exodus29:11 Kɑ wɑnhɑni ngɑɑl kì bølɑ kì dhø Kemi Kwër. 
Exodus29:12 Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki kwï remi wɑdh, kɑ kiny ri tùngi këli lɑm ki lwedí. Kɑ rem-ɑ döng bëne køny thɑ këli lɑm." 
Exodus29:13 Kɑ dwɑ̈lø men-ɑ yij, kí dhøg ócuny kí dwɑ̈l-ɑ ree, kí røng ryeet geki dwɑ̈l-ɑ kömi gen, kɑ ge rɑ̈ɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm." 
Exodus29:14 Kɑ pyëën wɑdh, kí rïnge geki wɑyye, rɑ̈ɑ̈b kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, bɑ gënhi orøg." 
Exodus29:15 “Kɑ órömø ɑ́kyel kwɑɑny, kɑ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde cinggi gen cïb gen wïje." 
Exodus29:16 Kɑ órömɑni ngɑɑl, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí kì ri reme, kɑ kiny ri këli lɑm, e owenø yi yïn." 
Exodus29:17 Kɑ órömɑni ngølli ɑ́ ɑ́tug, kɑ cïnne lwøøg geki tyelle, kɑ ge cïb wïj këli lɑm kyeel ki wïj órömø." 
Exodus29:18 Kɑ órömɑni rɑ̈ɑ̈b bëne kì wïj këli lɑm, yømi tole twel, bɑ kenɑ." 
Exodus29:19 “Kɑ ryeew órömm kwɑɑny, kɑ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde cinggi gen cïb gen wïje." 
Exodus29:20 Kɑ órömɑni ngɑɑl, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí kì ri reme, kɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈j ri ɑ́kwɑɑn yïth Aɑron, geki ɑ́kwɑnni yïthhi wɑ̈dde, kí ri lwedd-ɑ døngø mø cinggi këjji gen geki tyelli këjji gen bënn. Kɑ rem-ɑ döng kiny ri këli lɑm, e owenø yi yïn." 
Exodus29:21 Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí kì ri rem-ɑ wïj këlø, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí kì ri møøw gïïnyø, kɑ ge kiny ri Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kí ri ógudhi gen bënn. Menɑni ónyodh kinni Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kí ógudhi gen bënn, ɑ́rum ki mëggi yɑn, o ge göggi gen yɑn." 
Exodus29:22 “Codhe, kɑ dwɑ̈li órömɑni kwɑɑny, kí ótïde, kí røng ryeet geki dwɑ̈l-ɑ kömi gen, kí dhøg ócuny kí dwɑ̈l-ɑ ree. Kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m kyëj. Mɑ́ e bɑ órömi röny." 
Exodus29:23 Kɑ̈bbí ki ópuun olwëny ɑ́kyel, kí ópun ɑ́kyel kì ri ópùn-ɑ ɑ́nyöm ki møw, kí kɑɑk ɑ́kyel kì yij dhöng-ɑ bølɑ." 
Exodus29:24 Cïb jɑmmɑni bënn cingi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kɑ ge köbbí o gï kïdhi gen bølɑ, bɑ kenɑ." 
Exodus29:25 Kɑ ge kwɑɑny kì cinggi gen, kɑ ge rɑ̈ɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm, yømi tool gen twel, bɑ kenɑ." 
Exodus29:26 “Kɑ ɑ́ngɑni óröm-ɑ ɑ́røøny Aɑron kwɑɑny, kɑ thyeer bølɑ. Bene en ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ mií." 
Exodus29:27 “Thyer ɑ́ngɑni dyeel röny geki bɑde, kɑ ge kwëër, eni ɑ́ngɑdø geki bɑɑd dyel-ɑ ɑ́røøny Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde." 
Exodus29:28 O ge bëëd gen gɑ mø Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde. Nyi muuj gen ceth yi tyëng Isrɑil gɑ mø ókwër kì ri jɑmm-ɑ nyi ngɑl yi gen gɑ kenɑ gïti ɑtheer. 
Exodus29:29 “Kɑ ógudhi Aɑron møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër mïdhi wun gɑ møg-ɑ órøøny ngɑn-ɑ kwɑny keje kì kelli wɑ̈dde gïti ri kwɑrre. 
Exodus29:30 Ngɑn-ɑ kwɑny keje ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, nyi ruge ógudhɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kenyi kedhe yij Kemi Kwër be gwøg ki kwër." 
Exodus29:31 “Kɑ órömi röny kwɑny, kɑ thɑl kì keny me bɑ ɑkwër." 
Exodus29:32 Kɑ órömi kwër cɑm yi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kì dhø Kemi Kwër, cɑm ge gøn kyeel ki ópùn-ɑ yij dhöngø." 
Exodus29:33 Cɑm gen gënhɑni keti gen, mɑ́ e ɑ́gøøm-ɑ bøli gen keny-ɑ ɑ́thyeey gen, kɑ ge kwër. De ko di ngɑn megø me cyɑ̈mø, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑkwër." 
Exodus29:34 O keløg e dɑ rïngi dyeel röny me döng, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ ópun me döng kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ mwøl, rɑ̈ɑ̈b møg-ɑ ɑ́döng bënn. Ko cɑm, mɑ́ ge bɑ ɑkwër." 
Exodus29:35 “Bene gïn-ɑ ógöggí Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde ɑnɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́cegɑ yïn ceth. Rööny gen tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Exodus29:36 Nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈d ki wɑdh kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki wɑdh, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki wɑdh, ɑ́ men gøøm bøli orøøg Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kɑ këli lɑm kwëër, kɑ köme kunyí ki møw, o gööge ki ɑkwër." 
Exodus29:37 Tyëg cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew yï kwër-ɑ këli lɑm, yï thyey-ɑ en. O këli lɑm gööge ɑ́ ɑkwër, gïn-ɑ nywɑlii ceg-ɑ gwøg ki ɑkwër." 
Exodus29:38 “Bene gïg-ɑ ómuuj yi yïn kì këli lɑm ek: Órömm ɑ́ryew mø runi gen ɑ́kyel, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng, ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Exodus29:39 Nɑ̈g órömø ɑ́kyel kì mwøl, kɑ óröm-ɑ kyeelø nɑ̈ɑ̈g kì böörø." 
Exodus29:40 Kɑ yï muuj ki møng-ɑ búr ɑ́ kïlø ɑ́kyel kí órömi mwøl, kí kïlø megø kí órömi böörø, nyööm møng-ɑ búrɑni ki røthøl ɑ́ryew mø møøw dhetun. Kɑ yï muuj ki møgi oløg røthøl ɑ́ryew" 
Exodus29:41 Nɑ̈g óröm-ɑ kyeelø kì böörø kɑ yï muuj ki møng-ɑ búr, kí møøw dhetun, kí møgi oløg mø pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn kì mwøl. Menɑni bɑ men-ɑ rɑ̈bbi yɑn, yømi tole twel, bɑ kenɑ." 
Exodus29:42 Nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b jɑmmɑni yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ge rɑ̈bb-ɑ yɑn, cɑg ɑnɑn ceth gïti ɑtheer, nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gen kì dhø Kemi Kwër kì bølɑ. Kenyɑni ɑ nyi yïddɑ wøki jiɑ, ɑ kööbɑ wøki yïn." 
Exodus29:43 Wø óyïddi ki tyëng Isrɑil kì kenyɑni, o kenyɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ɑkwër kipe mɑ̈rɑ." 
Exodus29:44 Kemi Kwër geki këli lɑm ókwër yi yɑn. Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde ókwër yi yɑn thyew, o yɑ ógöggi yi gen gɑ ókwër." 
Exodus29:45 Yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ yɑ ogöögø ki Jwøøg gen." 
Exodus29:46 O óyod yi gen kinni yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ Jwøøg gen, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, kipe kinni o yɑ óbëëdɑ kì kelli gen. Bene yɑn Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus30:1 “Göög ki këli bɑkur, gwøøg ki yɑdh ɑ́lwiy." 
Exodus30:2 Gwøg ɑ́ óbɑr, bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïj, o döre bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen, o yïe dɑ tùng mø bɑ ɑkøj kì ri yɑnhɑni." 
Exodus30:3 Kɑ wïje mɑl, kí nyingi ngëdde, kí tùnge gøøj ki dhɑm dhïw. Kɑ ween ki dööli dhɑb." 
Exodus30:4 Kɑ ree göddi ki yëlli dhɑb ɑ́ryew møg nyi kɑ̈llii ki lødh. 
Exodus30:5 Gwøg lødhɑni gɑ yɑdh ɑ́lwiy, kɑ ge gøøj ki dhɑb." 
Exodus30:6 Kɑ këli bɑkur cïb bøli gëng, e rwööm ki Sɑnduug Cigg, ɑ yije di ópɑ̈nni cigg pyɑ̈rø, e rwöm ceth ki kum Sɑndug, keny-ɑ nyi yïddi wɑ." 
Exodus30:7 O köme nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b yi Aɑron ki bɑkur kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kenyi kedhe be nɑ̈gi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈." 
Exodus30:8 Nyi døøge’ rɑ̈b ki bɑkur kì böörø kenyi kedhe be cwinyi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, codhe, o bɑkur nyi duunge kì bølɑ yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kì ri rïjj bënn." 
Exodus30:9 Ko di bɑkur me pɑth ki mi kwër men rɑ̈b kì këlɑni, kɑ ko di kenø me rɑ̈b kì köme, ying-ɑ́ rïngø wɑlɑ̀ byëlø, kɑ ko di gïn køny wïje." 
Exodus30:10 Nyi kwër yi Aɑron tyelø ɑ́kyel kì yij run, o dhïwe. Nyi kwër ceth kì yethi rïjj bënn. Nyi kïnye ri tùnge ki remi gëdhhi orøg. Këlø menɑni bene kej kwër-ɑ dwøng kì yïɑ.”" 
Exodus30:11 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus30:12 “Keny-ɑ ókwɑɑn tyëng Isrɑil, muuj dhɑnhø ki gïn gøøme wëye kipe ri gen ókedhi yi gïnrɑj keny-ɑ ókwɑɑn gen." 
Exodus30:13 Muuj ngɑn-ɑ kwɑɑn kelli ji ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ge røm kɑ rumi kej kwër. 
Exodus30:14 Ngɑn-ɑ kedhi yethi kwɑn, cɑg kì ri ngɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl, ceg-ɑ muujø ceth e thödh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus30:15 Kɑ ngetikɑ̈r ko muuj ki møg ngenyø kibøli ngɑn wɑnge cɑn, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn wɑnge cɑn ko muuj ki møg nøg, mɑ́ e bɑ men mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ men gøøm bøli wëyi wun." 
Exodus30:16 O ɑ́tegø men-ɑ cøng yi yïn kì yï tyëng Isrɑil bëëde ɑ́ men nyi ngëëw ki jɑmm-ɑ dwɑddi kipe Kemi Kwër. O óbëëde ɑ́ pɑɑr kì bøli Wïi wun kinni, tyëng Isrɑil bøli wëyi gen ɑ́gøøm.”" 
Exodus30:17 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus30:18 “Göög ki ɑ́tɑɑy dilɑl, o dööli thɑre bɑ dilɑl thyew, kɑ cïb kɑɑm Kemi Kwër geki këli lɑm, kɑ pɑ̈ng ki pï," 
Exodus30:19 o yije nyi kɑ̈bbi yi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde ki pïg nyi lwøg gen cinggi gen geki tyelli gen," 
Exodus30:20 kenyi bëën gen ge kedh-ɑ yij Kemi Kwër, wɑlɑ̀ kenyi wɑ̈dhi gen buti këli lɑm, kenyi bëëd e dɑ gïn muuj ɑ́ men rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus30:21 Nyi lwøg gen cinggi gen geki tyelli gen, kipe ge óthøw. Mïdhi gen ciggɑni, cɑg ɑnɑn gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Exodus30:22 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus30:23 “Kɑ̈bbí ki ryɑ̈ɑ̈ møg-ɑ yømi gen pëddi medø, gɑ røthøl pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kí budi røthøl; kí ryɑ̈ mor me dhïw, me bɑ cɑ̈wwì. Kí røthøl ɑ́bïryew mø møøw sinɑmön, kí røthøl ɑ́bïryew mø lùm-ɑ yømi gen med." 
Exodus30:24 Kí møøw kɑsiyɑ̀ ɑ́ røthøl pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kí budi røthøl, kí røthøl ɑ́bïdɑ̈g mø møøw dhetun men-ɑ dhïw, røm gen bënn ki rumi kej kwër." 
Exodus30:25 Kɑ ge gwøg gɑ møøw gïïnyø me yøme med, gwøg yi bødhø me cinge døj, o bëëde e bɑ møøw gïïnyø mi kwër." 
Exodus30:26 Gïny Kemi Kwër geki Sɑnduug Cigg ki møwɑni. 
Exodus30:27 Kɑ tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ mi gïncɑm gïïny geki jɑmme bënn, kɑ teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ gïïny geki jɑmmi gen bënn. Kɑ këli bɑkur gïïny." 
Exodus30:28 Kɑ këli lɑm gïïny geki jɑmme bënn, kɑ ɑ́tɑy gïïny geki dööli thɑre." 
Exodus30:29 Kwër gen bënn, o ge göög gen ki jɑmmi Kwëër Dwøng, o gïn nywɑl gen ceg-ɑ gwøg ki gïi kwër." 
Exodus30:30 Kɑ Aɑron gïïny thyew geki wɑ̈dde; kwër gen gɑ ókwërrɑ. 
Exodus30:31 Kɑ wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil köbbí kinni, menɑni bɑ møwɑ, møøw kwër men nyi gïïny kì ri rïjj bënn gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus30:32 Ko gïïny dhɑnhø megø, o ko di møw me gwøg e nɑ en, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑkwër, bëëde ceth ɑ́ ɑkwër kì yï wun." 
Exodus30:33 Ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø ki men ni en, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn kwɑny møwɑni kɑ gø gïnye, e pɑth ki ókwërø, ngøl ngɑnɑni wɑ̈g kì kelli jie.”" 
Exodus30:34 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki yenh-ɑ yømi gen med, kwɑny gen kɑ ge røm ge pɑ̈r bënn, kì ri meɑ̀, kí ɑniicɑ̀, kí gïïnɑ̀, kí lubɑn," 
Exodus30:35 reb gen, kɑ ge gwøøg gɑ bɑkur, me bɑ ɑyöl ki døøji cingø, e thøø yi gwirø kidøøj ɑ́ ɑkwër." 
Exodus30:36 Guur kwëe ɑ́ búr, kɑ kwëe cïb bøli Sɑnduug Cigg kì yij Kemi Kwër, keny-ɑ nyi yïddi wɑ. Bëëd bɑkurɑni ceth ɑ́ gïi kwër me pere teg kì yï wun." 
Exodus30:37 De keny-ɑ ógwøøg bɑkur menɑni, ri wun ko göggi wun ki men ni en, bëëde ɑ́ ɑkwër ceth kì yï wun, ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Exodus30:38 Ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø ki men ni en, ngøl wɑ̈g kì kelli jie.”" 
Exodus31:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus31:2 “Bedhɑlel wɑ̈d Urì wɑ̈d Ur kì gøl Yeudɑ̀, ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi yɑn." 
Exodus31:3 Bedhɑlel ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi yɑn ki wëyi Jwøk, kɑ thödhɑ ki døøji cingø, kɑ thödhɑ ki peli wïj geki tegø me gwøge gïgɑni bënn." 
Exodus31:4 Ócuggø gwøg ki jɑmm-ɑ køny gɑ dhɑb, ki møg-ɑ køny gɑ ɑ́tegø, ki møg-ɑ køny gɑ dilɑl." 
Exodus31:5 Ócuggø gwøg ki tigg kɑ gï roobe ri winø. Ócuggø tyeng ki yenh, kɑ jɑmmì bënn lwɑ̈nge ki gwøgø." 
Exodus31:6 Thyew Oliɑb wɑ̈d Akisɑmɑk, kì gøl Dɑn, ógöögø geki Bedhɑlel. Bödhhɑni ryeet ɑ́thödhɑ ki døøji cingø geki tegi pyëw men gwøg gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn bënn," 
Exodus31:7 ɑ løg Kemi Kwër, kí Sɑnduug Cigg kí kume, geki jɑmm-ɑ yij kemɑni bënn." 
Exodus31:8 Kí tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ geki gïg-ɑ wïje bënn, ki teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ men-ɑ ógwøgø ki dhɑm dhïw, geki jɑmm-ɑ ree bënn, kí tɑrɑbeedh bɑkur," 
Exodus31:9 kí këli lɑm geki jɑmme bënn, kí ɑ́tɑy geki dööle." 
Exodus31:10 Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde ócwɑ̈jji yi gen ki ógudhi ókwër møg nyi rug yi gen kenyi göög gen ki gwøøg kwër. 
Exodus31:11 Møøw röny ógwøg yi gen, geki bɑkur. Gwøg gen jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ yïn bënn.”" 
Exodus31:12 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Exodus31:13 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni mïdhu Sɑbɑth miɑ thyew, mɑ́ e óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji kì kɑɑmee, kì ri rïjj bënn, o yod kinni yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ kwër wun." 
Exodus31:14 Gwøgu Sɑbɑth ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø. Ngɑn koo mïdhii, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø. Ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, ceg kɑ ngøl wɑ̈g kì kelli jie." 
Exodus31:15 Gwøøg tïj ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel, de bïryeew cyɑ̈ng bɑ Sɑbɑth, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø ceth." 
Exodus31:16 Mïdhi Sɑbɑth yi tyëng Isrɑil, e cungi ɑ́ lwöbø ceth, kì ri rïjj bënn gïti ɑtheer." 
Exodus31:17 Bɑ ngïji kì kɑɑm wøn ki tyëng Isrɑil gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ mɑl kí piny ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel. Kɑ ówïyø gwøg kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, kɑ ree ywöme.”" 
Exodus31:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwøb ki gøn kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy, ɑmëgge Mosɑ̀ ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew, ge bɑ ɑgwed ki lwedi Jwøk." 
Exodus32:1 Kɑ lidh yi ji kinni Mosɑ̀ ɑ́cwöngi, e pɑ jwɑn dwöög piny kì wïj kït. Kɑ ji ri gen cøng gen buti Aɑron, ɑköbbii yi gen kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp ɑ́cöög yïnø, kwïj yi wɑ mɑ göög en kidï! Dhwöödh, göggí wɑ ki jwøg men cyɑ̈dhi kì bølee.”" 
Exodus32:2 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Aɑron kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu dhɑb men-ɑ yïthhi mɑ̈nni wun, kí men-ɑ yïthhi wɑ̈ddi wun geki nyigi wun, kɑ̈ɑ̈lu en wɑ̈g kɑ muuju yɑn.”" 
Exodus32:3 Kɑ ji bënn dhɑb kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì yïthhi gen, kɑ gø muuj gen Aɑron." 
Exodus32:4 Kɑ gø kwɑnye kì cinggi gen, kɑ gø lenye, kɑ gø kønye ɑ́ røjø. Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jwøgí ɑnɑn Isrɑil, jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp.”" 
Exodus32:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii kinøw yi Aɑron, ɑgëëde ki këli lɑm kì bøle, kɑ Aɑron óryeerø kinni, “Dhuki bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng wøwi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Exodus32:6 Amøøl gen be ngɑl ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b geki gëdhhi mër. Kɑ ji pëgg-ɑ piny be cɑm, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø, kɑ ge dhwödh-ɑ be ngyëëdø." 
Exodus32:7 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bïí dhwöödh kedhí piny, kipe jií, møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, ge ɑ́døøg cyɑ̈n." 
Exodus32:8 Ge ɑ́jwɑn kedhi wɑ̈g kì yuu-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ gen. Ri gen ɑ́göggi gen ki røjø me bɑ ɑkøny ɑ́ dhɑb, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle, kɑ gø ngɑ̈ddi gen ki jɑmmì ge okööbø kinni, ‘Jwøgí ɑnɑn Isrɑil, bene jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jiɑni ɑ́lidhɑ, ge bɑ ji mø muddi gen teeg." 
Exodus32:10 Anɑn wiy pyëwɑ rënye ki gen, o ge nɑ̈gɑ, codhe o yïn, wuki kwɑrrí, wu gwøg yi yɑn wun ɑ́ pödhø me dwøng.”" 
Exodus32:11 De Mosɑ̀ Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kwɑjje kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jií ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki rɑ̈ji pyëwí, gen ɑ ji møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp ki teng-ɑ dwøng," 
Exodus32:12 ede tyëng Rïp ɑ wëggí gen kwøb kinni, i ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn kɑ rɑ̈ji pyëwí, kiper kinni o ge nɑ̈ɑ̈g yi yïn kelli kïttì, o ge tyëg yi yïn kì kömi piny. Dwöög pyëwí, kɑ pyëwí lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jií." 
Exodus32:13 Pɑr bɑ̈nggí: Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob. Pɑr møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí gen kinni, ‘Nyigi wun ógwøg yi yɑn ge gïïr ni kyelli mɑl, o piny men bëne mëggɑ’ kwɑrri wun, o gø kwɑny gen ɑ́ mi gen gïti ɑtheer.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jie. 
Exodus32:15 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ wïje løge kɑ bï-ɑ piny kì wïj kït e kɑ̈ll-ɑ ópɑ̈nni kït ryeet møg-ɑ kömi gen ɑ́gweed cigg. Ciggɑni ógweed-ɑ kömi ópɑ̈nnɑni ryeet. 
Exodus32:16 Ópɑ̈nnɑni ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi Jwøk, o gwedd-ɑ kömi gen ɑ́gwed-ɑ yi Jwøk, en ɑ ɑ́gwëdi kömi gen ki cigge."
