Leviticus13:20 Rɑng yi ókwërø, o keløg kenyɑni ónënni e ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, o yëyy-ɑ kenyɑni ri gen løg gen ge tɑr, kiiwe gøn ɑ́ ngɑn ywëdhø. Bɑ kenyledh me rɑj ɑ cɑ̈gi ki borɑni." 
Leviticus13:21 De keløg e ólidh yi ókwërø kinni bong yëyy mø tɑr kì yije, o yije pɑ ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, cïbe ngɑnɑni wɑ̈ye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus13:22 Keløg kenyledh menɑni ólɑ̈nyi, kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni ywëdhø, menɑni bɑ cɑ̈gi kenyledh me rɑj." 
Leviticus13:23 De keløg e ocöge ree pɑ wil en, kɑ ocögø e pɑ lɑ̈nyyi, menɑni bɑ bɑlø yøw, kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni dhïw." 
Leviticus13:24 “Keløg dhɑnhø órɑ̈ɑ̈b-ɑ yi mɑc, o keløg dëël kej mɑc ree løge’ me tɑr, wɑlɑ̀ keløg kenyɑni ocögø e ludhø," 
Leviticus13:25 rɑng yi ókwërø. Keløg yëyy ri gen løg gen ge tɑr, o kenyɑni ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, menɑni bɑ kenyledh me rɑj ɑ cɑ̈gi kì kej mɑc, kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni ywëdhø." 
Leviticus13:26 O keløg yëyyi kenyɑni ólidh yi ókwërø kinni ge nuti tɑ̈rø, o kenyɑni pɑ ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, de ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈rø, cïb ngɑnɑni wɑ̈ye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus13:27 Cigi rɑngø yi ókwërø kì ri bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, o keløg e kedh e ceg-ɑ lɑ̈nyyø, bɑ kenyledh me rɑj, kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni ywëdhø." 
Leviticus13:28 De keløg kenyɑni ree pɑ wil en, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ lɑ̈nyyi, o ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈rø, pɑth ki kenyledh me rɑj. Kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni dhïw, mɑ́ menɑni bɑ bɑli kej mɑc yøw." 
Leviticus13:29 “Keløg dhɑnhø, jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø ree dɑ kenyledh kì wïje wɑlɑ̀ tïge," 
Leviticus13:30 rɑɑng kenyɑni yi ókwërø. Keløg e nënni e ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, o yëyye nënni gɑ dibwör, o ge lewø, bɑ kenyledh me rɑj. Kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni ywëdhø. Bɑ kenyledh me rɑj ɑ wïje wɑlɑ̀ tïge." 
Leviticus13:31 De keny-ɑ órɑɑngii yi ókwërø, kɑ gø yode e pɑ ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, de yëyy nënni gɑ poodh kì yije, cïbe ngɑnɑni wɑ̈ye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus13:32 Døøg kenyɑni ki lidhø yi ókwërø këti kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, o keløg e nuti lɑ̈nyyø o bong yëyy mø bɑ dibwör kì yije, o nënni e pɑ ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge," 
Leviticus13:33 lyeel yëyy-ɑ tøggi kenyledh menɑni yi wɑ̈n. Codhe, kɑ døøg ki cïb wɑ̈ye yi ókwërɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møøgø." 
Leviticus13:34 Liidh kenyledh yi ókwërɑni këti kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, o keløg e nuti lɑ̈nyyø, o pɑ nënni e ludhø kibøli dël-ɑ tøgge, kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërɑni kinni dhïw. Ngɑnɑni lwøge ógudhe, ɑ́dhïwi." 
Leviticus13:35 De keløg kenyledh menɑni otugø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rume kiiwø kinni ɑ́dhïwi," 
Leviticus13:36 cigi rɑngø yi ókwërɑni. Keløg kenyledh lɑ̈nyyø, ko yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki yëyy-ɑ bɑ dibwör, ngɑn ni menɑni ywëdhø ceth." 
Leviticus13:37 De ke lidhii yi ókwërø kinni kenyledh menɑni nuti lɑ̈nyyø, o yëyy mø looj twïyø’ yije, kenyledh menɑni ɑ́nøgi, kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni dhïw." 
Leviticus13:38 “Keløg dhɑnhø, jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø dɑ keny me tɑr e omïllø kì dële," 
Leviticus13:39 kɑ rɑng yi ókwërø, kɑ gø yode kinni kɑ̈jjɑni tɑr, ge køm-ɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈jø, menɑni bɑ bögø ɑ cɑ̈gi kì dële, ngɑnɑni dhïw." 
Leviticus13:40 “Keløg ngɑn-ɑ jɑlø wïje obudhø kɑ ogöögø e lïw, ngɑn ni menɑni dhïw." 
Leviticus13:41 Keløg yëyyi wïje obudhø kì kuni bøle wɑlɑ̀ töge, dhïw." 
Leviticus13:42 De keløg keny-ɑ budhø kì wïje dɑ kɑ̈jj mø tɑr, ge køm-ɑ kwɑrø, bɑ wɑɑny ɑ cɑ̈gi kì yij keny-ɑ budhø," 
Leviticus13:43 rɑng yi ókwërø. O keløg e dɑ kɑ̈jj mø ledh, mø tɑr ge køm-ɑ kwɑrø," 
Leviticus13:44 kiiw ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kinni ywëdhø, kipe bɑ wɑɑny ɑ wïje." 
Leviticus13:45 “Ngɑn ree di kenyledh me rɑj, ruge ógudh mø kɑggø, kɑ wiye yëyye ge pɑ pyël, kɑ wïje ko nyi kum, kɑ dhøge, dhø mɑl kume, o yëyyi dhøge cög ge pɑ nënni, kɑ nyi ryeere kinni, “Ywëdhø, ywëdhø!”" 
Leviticus13:46 Kì kɑɑm-ɑ di dëël ngɑnɑni kenyledh menɑni, ngɑnɑni bëëdø e ywëdhø, o kɑ̀ bëëde e ywëdhø, bëëde kì wɑ̈ye kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, e lɑ̈wi ki ji." 
Leviticus13:47 “Ógødh odi ree ɑ́buu, e bɑ ógødh korø wɑlɑ̀ yëyy," 
Leviticus13:48 e bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ bɑ ɑkwen, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ lɑwø wɑlɑ̀ pyën," 
Leviticus13:49 kɑ kïde ree løge me mɑr, wɑlɑ̀ køm-ɑ kwɑrø, bɑ ɑ́buu men-ɑ nyi tɑy. Nyudhi ókwërø ceth." 
Leviticus13:50 Liidh ɑ́buu menɑni yi ókwërø, kɑ ógønhɑni cïbe wɑ̈ye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus13:51 Døøge ɑ́buu menɑni ki lidhø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng. Keløg ɑ́buu tɑyø kì ri ógødh, o ógønh-ɑ bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ ɑkwen, wɑlɑ̀ lɑwø, cɑgg lɑnɑni nyii gwøøg-ɑ ngø, bɑ ɑ́buu men rɑj, ógønhɑni wɑlɑ̀ lɑnɑni ywëdhø." 
Leviticus13:52 Rɑ̈ɑ̈b ógønhɑni yi ókwërø, cɑgg ɑ́ ɑcwɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ ɑkwen, ying-ɑ́ yëyy wɑlɑ̀ korø, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ lɑwø, mɑ́ ɑ́buu kedh e ódøngø; rɑ̈b ceth." 
Leviticus13:53 “Keløg e ólidh yi ókwërɑni kinni ɑ́buu nuti døngø," 
Leviticus13:54 kööbe kinni lwøøg ógønhɑni wɑlɑ̀ lɑnɑni kɑ cïb wɑ̈ye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møøgø. 
Leviticus13:55 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ɑ́buu ki lwøgø, døøg ki lidhø yi ókwërø. Keløg ɑ́buu menɑni nudd e nënni e nɑ keje, gïnɑni ywëdhø, cɑgg ɑ́buu nuti døngø. Rɑ̈bu en ki mɑc, cɑgg ɑ́buu menɑni ying tung ɑ́kyel." 
Leviticus13:56 De keløg ɑ́buu ólidh yi ókwërø e wɑɑjø kì ri ógønhɑni wɑlɑ̀ lɑnɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́rume lwøgø, yööd keny-ɑ di ɑ́buu wɑ̈g yi ókwërø kì ri lɑwø wɑlɑ̀ ógødh, ɑcwɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ ɑkwen." 
Leviticus13:57 De keløg ɑ́buu ódøøg ki cwöbø kì ri ógønhɑni wɑlɑ̀ lɑnɑni, ying-ɑ́ ɑcwɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ ɑkwen, ɑ́buu tɑyø. Rɑ̈ɑ̈b gïn-ɑ ree di ɑ́buu ki mɑc." 
Leviticus13:58 Keløg ógødh, ɑcwɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ ɑkwen, wɑlɑ̀ lɑwø olwøgø, kɑ ɑ́buu ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, cigi lwøgø, codhe, o dhïwe cyee.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Møgɑk bene gen ciggi ɑ́buu kì ri ógødh korø wɑlɑ̀ yëyy wɑlɑ̀ lɑwø, men nyodh kinni dhïw wɑlɑ̀ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus14:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus14:2 “Møg bene gen ciggi dhïwi dhɑnhø men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ree dɑ kenyledh, kɑ muuj ókwërø keny-ɑ ɑ́nøgi kenyɑni. Ngɑnɑni ceg kɑ muuj ókwërø," 
Leviticus14:3 kɑ ókwërɑni kedhe ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di kenyledh lidh yi en. Keløg kenyɑni nøggø," 
Leviticus14:4 cwöddi ókwërø ki winy ɑ́ryew mø dhïw, ge onëënø, kí ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈b yɑdh sɑndɑl, kí kori kwɑrø, kí yelø; ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l gɑ møg wïddi ri ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di kenyledh ki pï, o dhïwe." 
Leviticus14:5 Kɑ ókwërø kööbe kinni ngɑɑl winyø ɑ́kyel kì wïj tɑbø me yije di pï møg tïl. 
Leviticus14:6 Codhe, kɑ winy-ɑ nëënø kwɑny yi ókwërø, kyeel ki ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈b yɑdh sɑndɑl, kí kori kwɑrø, kí yelø; kwɑnye gïn bënn kɑ gï jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge yij remi winy-ɑ ɑ́ngɑl kì kömi pïg-ɑ tïl." 
Leviticus14:7 Kɑ ókwërø wïdde ri ngɑn-ɑ gwøg ki remɑni tyel ɑ́bïryew. Kööbe kinni ngɑnɑni ɑ́dhïwi. Kɑ winyø men-ɑ nëënø wiye o pɑ̈ɑ̈re pɑ̈l. 
Leviticus14:8 Ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́wïddi ki pï lwøge ógudhe, kɑ yëyye lyele bënn, codhe, kɑ lwøgge o dhïwe. Orume cyee, o kedhe kɑɑl, o pëgge wɑ̈g kì dhø kemɑ̀ mee, bëëde kì wɑ̈g ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus14:9 Lyele yëyye bënn kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, ɑ løg yëyyi wïje, kí yëyyi tïge, kí yëyyi nyinge, kí yëyy-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Lwøge ógudhe, kɑ lwøgge, codhe, o dhïwe." 
Leviticus14:10 “Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ̈bbi ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di kenyledh ki órömm ɑ́ryew mø bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen, kí dyel rømø rune ɑ́kyel, me bong gïnrɑj kì ree. Kí møng-ɑ búr me bɑ kïllì ɑ́dɑ̈g, ge bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun, kí røthøl ɑ́kyel mi møøw dhetun, kì yij gïjø megø." 
Leviticus14:11 Kïdhi ngɑn-ɑ ree wïddi ki pï geki jɑmmɑni bënn be thyeer dhø Kemi Kwër yi ókwër-ɑ wïddi ree ki pï. 
Leviticus14:12 Kɑ órömø ɑ́kyel geki røthøl møw kwɑny yi ókwërø gɑ gëdhhi bɑ̈jjø, kɑ gï thyeere bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j" 
Leviticus14:13 Kɑ órömɑni ngɑl kì kej kwër, keny-ɑ yije nyi ngɑɑl gënhi bɑ̈jjø geki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, mɑ́ gënhi orøg nɑ gënhi bɑ̈jjø, ge bɑ mø ókwërø. Bɑ kwër me dwøng kiree." 
Leviticus14:14 Kɑ ókwërø kɑ̈bbe kì ri remi gënhi bɑ̈jjø, kɑ gø gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri ɑ́kwɑɑn yïth kyëëj ngɑn-ɑ kïdhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí ri lwedi cingi kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng, kí lwedi tyeli kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng." 
Leviticus14:15 Kɑ ókwërø kɑ̈bbe kì ri møw, kɑ gø kønye cinge, cingi cɑɑme." 
Leviticus14:16 Kɑ ókwërø lwedi kyëje jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge yij møw men-ɑ cingi cɑɑme, kɑ kïnye piny bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki møw ki lwede tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus14:17 Kɑ kɑ̈bbe kì ri møw-ɑ ɑ́döng kì cinge, kɑ gø gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri ɑ́kwɑɑn yïth ngɑn-ɑ kïdhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïth kyëje, geki lwedi cingi kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng, kí lwedi tyeli kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng, e møw gɑ̈ɑ̈je’ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́gɑ̈jji ki remi gënhi bɑ̈jjø kì kömi remø." 
Leviticus14:18 Kɑ møw-ɑ ɑ́döng kì cingi ókwërø gïïnye wïj ngɑn-ɑ kïdhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni, ngɑnɑni ɑ́rum ki gwøgø yi ókwërø ɑ́ ngɑn dhïw kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus14:19 “Kɑ gënhi orøg thyer yi ókwërø, kɑ guöög dhïwø gwøge. Codhe, kɑ órömɑni ngɑle ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Leviticus14:20 Kɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki møng-ɑ búr rɑ̈be kì wïj këli lɑm, kɑ ókwërø kwɑ̈jje kipere o dhïwe." 
Leviticus14:21 “De keløg ngɑnɑni cinge jɑdø, o pɑ cuggi yïddø ki gëdhhì møgɑk, kɑ̈bbe ki órömø ɑ́kyel me thyer kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gënhi bɑ̈jjø, o nyɑnɑni dhïwe. Kɑ kɑ̈ne thyew ki kïlø ɑ́kyel møng-ɑ búr me bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun, kí røthøl møøw dhetun kì yij gïjø megø." 
Leviticus14:22 Kɑ̈ne ki ɑkùr-ɑ døngø ɑ́ryew; ke bong ge gïn, kɑ̈ne ki ɑkùr ójwɑt ɑ́ryew. Winyø ɑ́kyel bɑ gënhi orøg, o men-ɑ kyeelø bɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Leviticus14:23 Kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen yï ókwërø yi ngɑnɑni kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng kì bɑng dhïwe, kɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn yï ókwërø kì dhø Kemi Kwër bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus14:24 Kɑ óröm-ɑ bɑ gënhi bɑ̈jjø kwɑny yi ókwërø geki røthøl møw, kɑ gï thyeere bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Leviticus14:25 kɑ órömø nɑ̈ge, kɑ kɑ̈bbe ki remø, kɑ gø gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri ɑ́kwɑɑn yïth kyëëj ngɑn-ɑ kïdhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí ri lwedi cingi kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng, kí lwedi tyeli kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng." 
Leviticus14:26 Kɑ ókwërø kɑ̈bbe kì ri møw, kɑ gø kønye cinge, cingi cɑɑme." 
Leviticus14:27 Kɑ ókwërø lwedi kyëje jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge yij møw-ɑ cinge. Kɑ kïnye piny bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki møw ki lwede tyel ɑ́bïryew. 
Leviticus14:28 Kɑ ókwërø kɑ̈bbe kì ri møw-ɑ ɑ́döng kì cinge kɑ gø gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri ɑ́kwɑɑn yïth ngɑn-ɑ kïdhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïth kyëje, geki lwedi cingi kyëje, lwen-ɑ dwøng, ki lwedi tyeli kyëje lwen-ɑ dwøng e møw gɑ̈ɑ̈je’ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́gɑ̈jji ki remi gënhi bɑ̈jjø kì kömi remø." 
Leviticus14:29 Kɑ møw-ɑ ɑ́döng kì cingi ókwërø gïïnye wïj ngɑn-ɑ kïdhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni, ngɑnɑni ɑ́rum ki gwøgø yi ókwërø ɑ́ ngɑn dhïw kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus14:30 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli ɑkùr-ɑ døngø wɑlɑ̀ ɑkùr ójwɑt møg-ɑ ólwɑ̈ng yi en ki yodø," 
Leviticus14:31 ngɑl ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø gwøg ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kyeel geki møng-ɑ búr. Nyi gwøøg dhɑnhø kinøw yi ókwërø o dhïwe kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus14:32 Møgɑni bene gen ciggi gwøgi ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́di kenyledh me rɑj men-ɑ cinge jɑdø kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́dönye. 
Leviticus14:33 “Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus14:34 Piny Kɑnɑɑn mëggɑ’ jii wun. Okedhu yije, eni piny-ɑ mëggɑ wun, ɑ́ men kwɑny yi wun, kɑ keløg yɑ cïb-ɑ ri ød kì piny-ɑ ókwɑny yi wun ki ɑ́buu," 
Leviticus14:35 jɑl-ɑ yïe di ød kedhe be köbbi ókwërø, kɑ kööbe kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki gïjø me ni ɑ́buu kì ri ød.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Codhe, kɑ ókwërø ji köbbe kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑmmì wɑ̈g kì ønɑni e nuti kedhi be lidhi ɑ́buu, mɑ́ ke yuude jɑmmì ød ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni ge ywëdhø bënn. Codhe, kɑ ókwërø kedhe be lidhi ød cyee, keny-ɑ órum jɑmmì ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g." 
Leviticus14:37 Lidhe ɑ́buu, o keløg ɑ́buu nënni kì kö dörø e mɑr wɑlɑ̀ kwɑɑr, o keje nënni e ludhø kì ri dörø," 
Leviticus14:38 kedhe wɑ̈g kì ød, kɑ ønɑni cyëge ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus14:39 Dwöög ókwërø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng be rɑngi ønɑni. Keløg ɑ́buu lɑ̈nyyø kì ri döri ød," 
Leviticus14:40 kɑ ókwërø ji köbbe kinni, kɑ̈ɑ̈l kïtt-ɑ ri gen di ɑ́buu wɑ̈g kì ri döri ød. Kɑ ge weddi keny me ywëdhø kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl." 
Leviticus14:41 Codhe, kɑ kwöjø gööb wɑ̈g kì ri dörø bëne. Kɑ kwöny-ɑ ɑ́gööb wɑ̈g kì ri dörø bëne tër, kɑ weddi keny me ywëdhø kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl." 
Leviticus14:42 Orume kɑ kɑ̈jji kïttì møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g cïbi ki kïttì mø nyɑ̈n, kɑ dörø bëne mwøn ki kwöjø me nyɑ̈n." 
Leviticus14:43 “De keløg ɑ́buu cig-ɑ cwöbø këti kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum kïtt-ɑ́ ri gen ɑ́di ɑ́buu ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g, kɑ kɑ̈jji gen cïbi ki møg nyɑ̈n, kɑ kwöjø gööb wɑ̈g, kɑ dörø mwøn ki kwöjø me nyɑ̈n," 
Leviticus14:44 kedhi ókwërø be lïdhø. O keløg ɑ́buu ólidh yi en e ngënyø, bɑ ɑ́buu me rɑj, ønɑni ywëdhø." 
Leviticus14:45 Cøør ønɑni piny, kɑ kïtte, kí yenhe, kí kwönye yëëg keny me ywëdhø kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl." 
Leviticus14:46 Ngɑn kedhi ønɑni kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e bɑ ɑcyëg, o ji bɑ ɑkerø ki kedhi yije, óbëëd e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus14:47 Ngɑn buddi kì ønɑni, wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈mø kì ønɑni lwøge ógudhe ceth." 
Leviticus14:48 “De keny-ɑ ódwöög ókwërø kɑ ɑ́buu yuude e nuti ngënyø kì ri ød, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum ønɑni ki gwøgø kɑ mwøn, kööbe kinni ønɑni ɑ́dhïwi, mɑ́ ɑ́buu ɑ́rum ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì ree kinni tweet." 
Leviticus14:49 O kipe gwøgi ønɑni e dhïw këti, kɑ̈bbi ókwërø ki winy ɑ́ryew, kí ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈b yɑdh sɑndɑl, kí kori kwɑrø kí yelø." 
Leviticus14:50 Ngɑle winyø ɑ́kyel kì wïj tɑbø me di pïg tïl," 
Leviticus14:51 Codhe, kɑ winy-ɑ nëënø kwɑnye, kí ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈b yɑdh sɑndɑl, kí yelø geki kori kwɑrø, kɑ gï jwɑ̈ɑ̈ge yij remi winy-ɑ ɑ́ngɑl kì wïj tɑbø men-ɑ yije di pïg tïl. Kɑ ókwërø wïdde ri ønɑni ki remø tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus14:52 Ød gwøg yi en e dhïw kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ remi winyø, kí pïg tïl, kí winy-ɑ nëënø, kí ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈b yɑdh sɑndɑl, kí yelø, kí kori kwɑrø." 
Leviticus14:53 Codhe, kɑ winy-ɑ nëënø kïdhe ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ wiy pɑ̈ɑ̈re pɑ̈l. Bene kenyi gwøøg ød e dhïw kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ókwërø ɑnɑn.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Møgɑk bene gen cigg kipe kɑ̈jji ledh møg rijjø kì dël," 
Leviticus14:55 kí ɑ́buu kì ri lɑ̈nì wɑlɑ̀ kì ri ud," 
Leviticus14:56 kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ köddi, kí bør, geki kɑ̈jj-ɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈jø kì ri dël." 
Leviticus14:57 Ciggɑni køny-ɑ ji ki yodi kinni jɑmmì ywëdhø wɑlɑ̀ ge dhïw. Møgɑni bene gen cigg kì ri rɑjjɑni bënn. 
Leviticus15:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus15:2 “Köbbu tyëng Isrɑil kinni, keløg jɑlø jɑmme olwöyø, gïg-ɑ lwöy kì ree ywëdhø," 
Leviticus15:3 cɑgg e nudd e olwöyø wɑlɑ̀ dɑ gïn cuung lwöye, bëëde e ywëdhø ceth." 
Leviticus15:4 Pyën-ɑ yije pëggi yi en, wɑlɑ̀ pyën-ɑ buddi yi en ceg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus15:5 Ngɑn nywɑl pyëne, lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:6 Kɑ ngɑn pëggi wïj gïn-ɑ ɑ́pëggi yi ngɑn jɑmme lwöy, lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø, de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:7 Ngɑn nywɑl ngɑn-ɑ jɑmme lwöy, lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:8 Keløg ngɑn-ɑ jɑmme lwöy ngudd-ɑ ri ngɑn dhïw ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, ngɑn-ɑ ree ɑ́nguddi lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:9 Kwøm-ɑ pëggi yi ngɑn-ɑ jɑmme lwöy kì yij yɑ̈y, wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ köme pëggi yi en kì kömi ɑderø wɑlɑ̀ kyeny, ceg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus15:10 Gïg-ɑ kömi gen pëggi yi ngɑn-ɑ jɑmme lwöy bëëdø ge ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng. O ngɑn kɑ̈lli gïgɑni lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:11 Keløg ngɑn-ɑ jɑmme lwöy cingge nuti lwøøg en ki pï, kɑ ónywɑ̈dø ki dhɑnhø, ngɑn-ɑ nywɑl yi en lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:12 Keløg ngɑn-ɑ jɑmme lwöy ónywɑ̈dø ki gïjø ɑ́kyel kì kelli lɑ̈b, tørri gïnɑni. Keløg e ónywɑ̈dø ki gïjø me bɑ ɑ́bwödø, lwøøg ɑ́bwönɑni ki pï." 
Leviticus15:13 “Keny-ɑ ówïyi jɑmme ki lwöyø, ceg-ɑ bëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, codhe kɑ ógudhe lwøge kɑ kedhe be lwøggø, o dhïwe." 
Leviticus15:14 Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ kɑ̈bbe kí ɑkùr-ɑ døngø ɑ́ryew, wɑlɑ̀ ɑkùr ójwɑt ɑ́ryew, kɑ gï kïdhe dhø Kemi Kwër, kɑ gï mëgge ókwërø." 
Leviticus15:15 Gwøøg ɑ́kyel yi ókwërø ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø gwøg ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Bene kër-ɑ ódwøøgii bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ókwërø ɑnɑn." 
Leviticus15:16 “Keløg jɑlø ódyëddø ki tyew, kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:17 Ógødh wɑlɑ̀ lɑwø keløg ree okedhø yi tyew, ceg ki lwøgø ceth; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:18 Keløg jɑlø óbuddø ki dhɑjø kɑ ódyëddø ki tyew, kedhi gen be lwøggø ryeet; de ge ceg-ɑ bëëdø ge ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:19 “Ngɑndhɑjø keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej kwëre, ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. Ngɑn nywɑlii ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:20 Gïn-ɑ köme pëggi yi ngɑnɑni kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ kwëre, ceg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus15:21 Ngɑn nywɑl pyëne, lwøge ógudhe kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; ngɑnɑni ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:22 Ngɑn nywɑl gïn-ɑ köme pëggi yi ngɑnɑni, lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø, ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:23 Pɑ̈r bënn ceth, keløg dhɑnhø nywɑl-ɑ pyëne wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ köme pëgge, ngɑn-ɑ nywɑ̈ddi ceg-ɑ ywëdhø ceth, bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:24 O keløg jɑlø óbuddø ki en kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ kwëre, jɑlɑni ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. O pyën-ɑ yije buddi yi jɑlɑni ceg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus15:25 “Keløg remø ócyɑ̈dhø kì ri ngɑndhɑjø e pɑth kì bøli kej kwëre, wɑlɑ̀ remi kwëre cɑɑg-ɑ cögø e pɑ cungi, ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi remø kì ree." 
Leviticus15:26 Pyën-ɑ buude kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi remø kì ree, nɑ pyën-ɑ nyi buude e ceg-ɑ kwër, kí gïn-ɑ köme pëgge, ge ywëdhø ni menɑni ceth." 
Leviticus15:27 Ngɑn nywɑl gen lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø; de ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus15:28 Kì bɑng keny-ɑ ócungi remø, ceg-ɑ bëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, o dhïwe cyee." 
Leviticus15:29 Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ kɑ̈bbe kí ɑkùr-ɑ døngø ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑkùr ójwɑt ɑ́ryew kɑ gï kïdhe yï ókwërø kì dhø Kemi Kwër." 
Leviticus15:30 Kɑ ɑ́kyel gwøg yi ókwërø ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø gwøge ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Bene kër-ɑ ódwøøgii bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ókwërø ɑnɑn." 
Leviticus15:31 “Cegu tyëng Isrɑil kinni, lɑ̈ɑ̈w gen ri gen ki gïg-ɑ ywëdh gen, o ge ócög gen ge pɑ thøw, mɑ́ keløg kemɑ, men-ɑ dyëri gen oywëdhø yi gen, ge ceg-ɑ thøø.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Møgɑk bene gen cigg kipe ngɑn jɑmme lwöy geki ngɑn dyëddi ki tyew," 
Leviticus15:33 kí ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ kwër dwɑ̈ye, wɑlɑ̀ jɑlø men buddi ki dhɑjø me ywëdhø." 
Leviticus16:1 Kì bɑng thøwi wɑ̈ddi Aɑron gɑ ɑ́ryew, kipe gööj kɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mɑc me pɑth ki ɑkwër, ɑköbbi møg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Leviticus16:2 gø ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Köbbí Aɑron ómyëw kinni ko nyi rïïj e bï-ɑ yij gëng Kej Kwërdwøng, mɑ́ kenyɑni ɑ nyi cwöbɑ kì yij pøølø kì kömi Sɑnduug Cigg. Keløg e ópëmø ceg-ɑ thøø." 
Leviticus16:3 De ócuggø kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng, keny-ɑ órume ki kɑ̈nø ki nyɑ wɑdh ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kí órömø ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Leviticus16:4 “Lwøgge, kɑ ógudhi ókwërø lønye ree, ɑ løg ɑ́ywönhthinh, kí ɑköj, kí wëni yij geki wëni wïj." 
Leviticus16:5 “Nëngi Aɑron yi tyëng Isrɑil kí ónyögg ɑ́ryew mø gënhi orøg, kí órömø ɑ́kyel mɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Leviticus16:6 Kɑ nyɑ wɑdh gwøg yi Aɑron ɑ́ gënhi orøg, me gøøm bøli orøge kí orøøg tyëng gøle." 
Leviticus16:7 Codhe, kɑ ónyögg ryeet kïdhe dhø Kemi Kwër." 
Leviticus16:8 Kɑ lënge ki gɑgg ɑ́ryew, ɑ́kyel ógwedø kinni “Mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” O men-ɑ kyeelø ógwedø kinni “Mi Adhɑdhel.”" 
Leviticus16:9 Kwɑny Aɑron ónywøg men-ɑ́ wëële ópɑ̈dhi ki gɑng-ɑ ógwedø kinni, “Mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j,” kɑ gø gwøge ɑ́ gënhi orøg." 
Leviticus16:10 Thyeer ónywøng-ɑ pɑ̈dhi ki Adhɑdhel bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ køøl pɑ̈l yï Adhɑdhel, o kɑ̈ɑ̈le orøøg teedø." 
Leviticus16:11 “Aɑron keny-ɑ óngɑle nyɑ wɑnh-ɑ bɑ gënhi orøg kipere geki tyëng gøle," 
Leviticus16:12 kɑ̈bbe ki lelli mɑc kì wïj këli lɑm ki óthɑgø, kɑ kɑ̈bbe thyew ki bɑkur men-ɑ yøme med kì yethi cingge ɑ́ryew kɑ gï kïdhe Kej Kwërdwøng." 
Leviticus16:13 Kɑ bɑkur kïdhe mɑc kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o kum mi Sɑnduug Cigg (ɑ løg kwøøm lɑ̈mpyëw) mɑ̈ɑ̈n nënnø yi yïri bɑkur, kipe gø ólidh yi en kɑ othøø." 
Leviticus16:14 Kɑ̈bbe ki ri remi wɑdh, kɑ kïnye bøli kwøøm lɑ̈mpyëw ki remø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ kïnye piny ki remø ki lwede tyel ɑ́bïryew kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg." 
Leviticus16:15 “Codhe, kɑ ónywøng-ɑ bɑ gënhi orøg ngɑle, kɑ kïdhe Kej Kwërdwøng ki remø, kɑ remɑni kinye ni kɑ ɑ́gwøge remi wɑdh, gø kinye’ piny ki lwede kì bøli Kwøøm Lɑ̈mpyëw tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus16:16 Bene kër-ɑ ógeedhe Kej Kwërdwøng ɑnɑn kipe ywëdhi tyëng Isrɑil, kí gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen kí pëëmø, kí orøøg gen bënn." 
Leviticus16:17 Ko di ngɑn ying yij Kemi Kwër kì bøli keny-ɑ ókedhe Kej Kwërdwøng be gwøgi kwër, gïti keny-ɑ óbëëne wɑ̈g. Orume ki gøømi bøle geki gøle, kí bøli tyëng Isrɑil bënn." 
Leviticus16:18 Codhe, kɑ kedhe wɑ̈g, kɑ këli lɑm men-ɑ bøli Kemi Kwër geedhe, kɑ̈bbe ki remi wɑdh, kɑ kɑ̈bbe ki remi ónywøg kɑ gø gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri tùngi këli lɑm." 
Leviticus16:19 Kɑ kïnye ree ki remø ki lwede tyel ɑ́bïryew. Bene yuu-ɑ lɑɑwe gøn ɑnɑn, kipe orøøg tyëng Isrɑil, o gø kwëre." 
Leviticus16:20 “Keny-ɑ órume ki gedhi kej kwër, ɑ løg Kej Kwërdwøng, kí këli lɑm, kɑ ónywøng-ɑ bɑ mi Adhɑdhel thyeere bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus16:21 Aɑron cïbe cingge ryeet wïj ónywøngɑni, kɑ rɑj, kí orøøg Isrɑil, kí pyëëm Isrɑil gøønye kömi ónywøngɑni, o gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le kì wïje. Codhe, kɑ dyelɑni køøl pɑ̈l yi dhɑnhø me bɑ ɑkwɑny ɑ́ men køølii pɑ̈l." 
Leviticus16:22 Orøøg gen bënn ókïdhi pɑ̈l yi dyelɑni, kɑ dyel wiy e owïïnø kì yij pɑ̈l." 
Leviticus16:23 “Codhe, kɑ Aɑron kedhe yij Kemi Kwër kɑ ógudhi kwër møg-ɑ ɑ́løny yi en ɑ́tïni, e nuti kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng gï lunye wɑ̈g, kɑ gï wiye kì kenyɑni." 
Leviticus16:24 Lwøgge kì keny me bɑ ɑkwër, kɑ ógudh-ɑ bɑ møge lønye ree. Codhe o kedhe wɑ̈g be muuji gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne ɑ́ mi lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøge kí orøøg teedø." 
Leviticus16:25 Kɑ dwɑ̈li gënhi orøg rɑ̈be kì wïj këli lɑm. 
Leviticus16:26 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́køøl dyel pɑ̈l yï Adhɑdhel, lwøge ógudhe, kɑ lwøgge kì pɑ̈l kunɑni, o rume cyee, o bëe kɑɑl." 
Leviticus16:27 Kɑ wɑdh men-ɑ bɑ gënhi orøg geki ónywøg men-ɑ bɑ gënhi orøg møg-ɑ́ remi gen ɑ́kïdhi be gedhi kej kwër, kïdhi ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ ge rɑ̈b ki mɑc, rɑ̈ɑ̈b rïnggi gen bënn, kí pënni gen, kí cïnni gen." 
Leviticus16:28 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ rɑ̈b gen lwøge ógudhe, kɑ lwøgge, kì pɑ̈l kunɑni, o rume cyee, o bëe kɑɑl." 
Leviticus16:29 “Mïdhi cigg møg kì yethi runn bënn. Kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø, tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen, ko di gwøg me gwøg yi gen, kɑ ge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Leviticus16:30 Gwøøg guöög dhïwø kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, o ji dhïwi gen." 
Leviticus16:31 Cyɑ̈ngɑni bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër me dwøng, bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng twöni rek ki gïncɑm, o bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø. Mïdhi cigg møg kì yethi rïjj bënn." 
Leviticus16:32 Guöngɑni gwøg-ɑ yi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, men-ɑ órønyø ɑ́ kej wïye, kɑ ruug ki ógudhi kwër." 
Leviticus16:33 En ɑ lɑw Kej Kwërdwøng, geki Kemi Kwër mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí këli lɑm, kí ókwërr-ɑ kyeelø bënn, kí teedø bëne." 
Leviticus16:34 Mïdhi cigg møgɑk kì yethi runn bënn gïti ɑtheer. Guög men nyi gwøg tyelø ɑ́kyel kì yethi runn bënn, kipe lɑwi dëlli tyëng Isrɑil ki orøøg gen.” Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøg yi Mosɑ̀ bënn." 
Leviticus17:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus17:2 “Köbbí Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, bene møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek:" 
Leviticus17:3 Keløg wɑ̈d gøl Isrɑil ongɑ̈dø ki dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ dyel rømø wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø, kì kɑɑl wɑlɑ̀ pɑ̈l," 
Leviticus17:4 e gø pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le, o gø ngɑle kì dhø Kemi Kwër, o gø mëgge Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gëëdhi, ngɑn ni menɑni cinge dɑ remø, bɑ remø ɑ ɑ́kønye piny, cɑ́y ying-ɑ köme kipe remɑni. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l ngɑn ni menɑni wɑ̈g kì kelli jie." 
Leviticus17:5 Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni tyëng Isrɑil bɑ ɑceg kinni nyi muuj gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lɑ̈yy-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gï ongɑllø yi gen kì pɑ̈l, wu bɑ ɑceg ɑnɑn kinni nyi muuj gen ókwërø kì dhø Kemi Kwër, kɑ ge nyi ngɑ̈lli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gënhi mër." 
Leviticus17:6 Kɑ ókwërø nyi kïnye ri këli lɑm ki remø, kɑ dwɑ̈lø rɑ̈be kì wïj këli lɑm kì dhø Kemi Kwër, e yømi tole bɑ men mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus17:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko cigi wiy piny yi tyëng Isrɑil, ge ko døøg be ngɑ̈ddi wɑ̈li dyel kì pɑ̈l këti. Mïdhi cigg møg yi tyëng Isrɑil gïti ɑtheer." 
Leviticus17:8 “Ko di wɑ̈d Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth me bëëdø kì kelli gen, me ngɑ̈dø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, wɑlɑ̀ gëëdhi megø," 
Leviticus17:9 kɑ ocögø gø pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le be ngɑlø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø kinøw kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kelli jie." 
Leviticus17:10 “Ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø ki remø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth me bëëdø kì kelli gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈je luge’ ngɑnɑni, o bɑ men kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kelli jie." 
Leviticus17:11 Mɑ́ wëyi gïn-ɑ nëënø bëne ying-ɑ ri remø, bene ɑ bɑnge cegɑ wun kinni nyi kiny remø ri këli lɑm ɑ́ men gøøm bøli orøøg wun. Remø, ɑ bɑ wëy, en ɑ lwöög orøg wɑ̈g." 
Leviticus17:12 Bene gïn-ɑ pere ɑ́kyëddɑ tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen kinni ge ko nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki remø. 
Leviticus17:13 “Ngɑn dwɑr lɑ̈y me nyi cɑm, wɑlɑ̀ winyø kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth me bëëdø kì kelli gen, kønye reme piny kɑ gø rïge ki lɑ̈bø." 
Leviticus17:14 Mɑ́ wëyi gïn-ɑ nëënø bëne ying-ɑ ri remø, o tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kyëddɑ kinni, ko di remi gïïpiny me cɑm yi wun, mɑ́ wëyi gïn-ɑ nëënø bëne bɑ reme, o ngɑn cɑmii ceg kɑ ngøl wɑ̈ye." 
Leviticus17:15 “Wɑ̈d Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth me bëëdø kì kelli gen, ke cyɑ̈me ki lɑ̈y me bɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈l, ying e thøø kete wɑlɑ̀ dööng ɑ bɑng lɑ̈y me cyɑ̈mø, lwøge ógudhe, kɑ kedhe be lwøggø, o ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus17:16 De keløg ógudhe pɑ lwøg yi en, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ kedhi be lwøggø, ngɑnɑni ócyɑ̈dhi ki cyënne.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus18:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, bene yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Leviticus18:3 wu ko göög ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi tyëng Rïp kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun. Kɑ wu ko göög ki gïg-ɑ gøggi kì piny Kɑnɑɑn kun-ɑ kïdhɑ wun. Kwööng gen ko ngøy wun. 
Leviticus18:4 Mïdhu ciggɑ, kɑ møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn nyi gwøg wun." 
Leviticus18:5 Mïdhu ciggɑ geki kwöngɑ. Ngɑn-ɑ ómïdhi gen óyïddi ki nënnì kì bɑng gen. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Leviticus18:6 “Ko di ngɑn niin wɑɑd gen. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Leviticus18:7 Wïyí ko yɑ̈ɑ̈r, kì bɑng kɑ niin meyí. Men-ɑ́ meyí ko yɑ̈r yi yïn." 
Leviticus18:8 Mɑ̈nni wïyí ko niin yi yïn. Wør gen ki wør-ɑ wøør wïyí. 
Leviticus18:9 Nyimyëw ko niin yi yïn, ko niin yi yïn kinni tek, cɑgg e ópidh ɑ pɑ̈l." 
Leviticus18:10 Kwɑrí, nyɑɑr wɑ̈dí, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑɑr nyɑrí ko niin yi yïn, menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ɑyɑ̈r kì kömí." 
Leviticus18:11 Nyiwöw ko niin yi yïn, bɑ nyimyëw thyew." 
Leviticus18:12 Wɑɑj wun, nyimï wïyí ko niin yi yïn, bɑ wɑd me cyɑ̈gi kidøøj ki wïyí. Mɑɑy wun, nyimï meyí ko niin yi yïn, mɑ́ e bɑ wɑd me cyɑ̈gi cɑrø ki meyí." 
Leviticus18:13  
Leviticus18:14 Cï ómï wïyí ko niin yi yïn, bɑ meyí thyew." 
Leviticus18:15 Kwɑrí, cï wɑ̈dí ko niin yi yïn." 
Leviticus18:16 Cï ómyëw ko niin yi yïn. 
Leviticus18:17 Nyɑndhɑjø men-ɑ meye óniin yi yïn, ko niin yi yïn, wɑlɑ̀ kwɑɑr ngɑnɑni. Møgɑni bɑ wɑdde mø cyɑ̈gi cɑrø, o menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ɑyɑ̈r kì kömí." 
Leviticus18:18 Nyɑndhɑjø ko nywøøm kömi nyimen, e nyimen men-ɑ köme nyömmi onëënø." 
Leviticus18:19 “Ngɑndhɑjø ko niin yi yïn kì bøli kej kwëre, mɑ́ e ywëdhø." 
Leviticus18:20 Cï jɑlø megø, ko niin yi yïn, yï ceg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus18:21 Nyigí ko rɑ̈bbí Mölek ki mɑc gɑ gëdhhì, kipe nyingi Jwøgí óbwöl yi yïn. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus18:22 Ko di ngɑn niin jɑlø ni en, menɑni mɑɑn yi Jwøk." 
Leviticus18:23 Lɑ̈y ko niin yi yïn, o yï ywëdh yi en. Wɑlɑ̀ ngɑndhɑjø ree ko wëgge niin yi lɑ̈y, menɑni bɑ tøønyi orøg. Gïn ni menɑni ko wöl ki gwøgø." 
Leviticus18:24 “Rií ko ywëëdh ki gïg ni møgɑni, mɑ́ jurr-ɑ cyeddi yi yɑn kì bølí ɑnɑn ɑ́ceg-ɑ ri gen ki ywëdhø." 
Leviticus18:25 Kɑ piny oywëdhø yi gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi gen, ɑ bɑnge cɑyɑ piny, kɑ piny jie ngøøge wɑ̈g." 
Leviticus18:26 De wun, mïdhu ciggɑ, kɑ wu ko göög ki gïgrijjø ni møgɑni, wu bënn kì pönhï, kí tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun." 
Leviticus18:27 Mɑ́ gïgrijjø møgɑni ɑ́gøgg-ɑ yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki bëëdø kì pönhɑni wu nuti kedhi yije, kɑ piny oywëdhø." 
Leviticus18:28 Keløg pinyɑni óywëdh yi wun, wu pɑ lony yi en ki ngøgø ni kɑ ɑ́ngøge jurr-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki ying yije?" 
Leviticus18:29 Ngee, ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø ki gïgrijjø ni møgɑni, pɑ cigi kwɑɑn kelli jii Jwøk.”" 
Leviticus18:30 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Mïdhu ciggɑ kɑ wu ko göög ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying piny menɑni, kɑ ri wun ko ywëdh wun ki gwøgi gïgɑni. Bene yɑn, Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus19:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, bëëd wun wu bɑ ɑkwër, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ Kwërø, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:3 Wør ngɑn meye geki wïye, kɑ Sɑbɑth ɑ bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø mïdhi wun ni kɑ ɑ́cegɑ wun. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:4 “Yɑ ko wiyu piny, kɑ wu ko kedhi be mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, ri wun ko thɑ̈dhhi wun ki jwögg ki ngyënyø gɑ møg mɑlli yi wun. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:5 “Keny-ɑ óngɑ̈ɑ̈d ki gënhi mër, mïdhí cigg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn, o gënhí óyïëy yi yɑn." 
Leviticus19:6 Cɑɑm rïngø kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ngɑɑl jwödhø kí dhuki. O keløg e dɑ men döng kɑ pïïd yi dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, rɑ̈b ki mɑc." 
Leviticus19:7 Mɑ́ e ywëdhø, de keløg e dɑ ngɑn cyɑ̈mø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, rïngɑni bɑ gïn kwɑ̈gø, pɑth ki ɑyïëy." 
Leviticus19:8 O ngɑn cyɑ̈mø ki en ɑ́røngi, mɑ́ e bwöl-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́thyey ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ngɑn ni menɑni ceg kɑ ngøl wɑ̈g kì kelli jie." 
Leviticus19:9 “Keny-ɑ ócɑ̈gi wun ki kɑj ki jɑmm-ɑ ókɑj yi wun kì piny wun, møg-ɑ leggi pwödhø ko nyi kɑj, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ bodh kì bɑng kɑj ko nyi gwen." 
Leviticus19:10 Wu ko nyi døøg be lori bɑ̈ggi wun kenyi rum gen ki pønø, wɑlɑ̀ nywøli yenh møg-ɑ dëëmø ko nyi gwen wun, wïyu gen tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn geki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:11 “Wu ko kwɑ̈ɑ̈d, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko wëëny, kɑ wɑddi wun ko nyi göggi wun ki ɑmolpiny." 
Leviticus19:12 wu ko nyi köngi ki nyingɑ kinni gïn-ɑni ógwøg yi yïn keløg pëthi wun pɑ dwɑddi gwøgii kidyër, menɑni bɑ bwöli nyingɑ. Bene yɑn Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:13 “Ko di ngɑn wɑnge guud yi yïn, wɑlɑ̀ gëe ko kɑɑb. Muuj köggi ngɑn-ɑ kïr yi yïn kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, kɑ ko wëggí wɑ̈dhi dhuki." 
Leviticus19:14 Ming ko yɑɑny wɑlɑ̀ bøli cwør ko cïbí ki gïjø me cwɑny tyele. Lïngu møgɑ, Bene yɑn Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:15 “Nyi cïbu kwøb kɑ̈jji gen kì burø, wu ko nyi wɑ̈dhi ngɑn wɑnge cɑn ki cwɑgø yøw, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko nyi böggi yi ngetikɑ̈r, de nyi lidhu gøøny wɑddi wun kidøøj." 
Leviticus19:16 Wu ko nyi tuum ki gïg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër kì ri wɑddi wun. Kɑ wu ko nyi göög ki gïn bɑnge cuggi wɑɑd wun ki thøø. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Leviticus19:17 “Wɑddi wun ko nyi mɑɑn wun ki pëthi wun. Keløg wɑɑd wun óbɑ̈jjø, köbbí bɑ̈jje, ke pɑ köbbií, yï ócɑy." 
Leviticus19:18 Nyi wïl wɑ̈thi wun ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi göggi wun yi ji møøgø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn göggi yïn ki gïnrɑj ko mɑɑn. De mɑɑr ngɑn-ɑ butí ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr rií. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:19 “Lɑ̈yy-ɑ mïdhi yi wun kì pɑc ko wëggu tïg ki møg bɑ̈ɑ̈n. Wu ko nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈g ki wɑ̈thi köödh ɑ́ryew kì yij pwödhø ɑ́kyel. Wu ko nyi rug ki ógudh mø bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j ki wɑ̈thi jɑmmì ɑ́ryew mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n. 
Leviticus19:20 “Keløg jɑlø óbuddø ki bɑ̈ng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ ólöggi jɑlø megø, cɑgg jɑl-ɑ ɑ́löggii nuti muujø ki jɑmmì, bɑ̈ngɑni kí jɑl-ɑ ɑ́buddi gen ceg kɑ cɑyø. De ge pɑ nɑ̈g, mɑ́ nyɑnɑni nuti pɑ̈dø, nudd ɑ́ bɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus19:21 Kɑ̈ne dhø Kemi Kwër ki órömø me gøøm bøli orøge. 
Leviticus19:22 Órömɑni ógwøg yi ókwërø ɑ́ gënhi orøg, o Jwøk lɑɑwe dwööge piny kipe orøge." 
Leviticus19:23 “Keny-ɑ ókedhu piny Kɑnɑɑn kɑ wu opïdhø ki yenh-ɑ nywøli gen nyi cɑm, møg-ɑ ónywøl yi yenhɑni kì tyeli mɑl bɑ ɑkerø cɑmø yi wun ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. Wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki nywøli yenhɑni ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈gɑni." 
Leviticus19:24 Kì ngween runn, thyey wun nywøli yenhɑni bënn, kɑ ge muuj wun gɑ møg pwøj wun yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:25 De cɑmu gen kì bïïj runn. Keløg møgɑni ógwøg yi wun bënn, yenhi wun ceg-ɑ kɑ̈nø ki nywøl mø gïïr. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:26 “Wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïïpiny e ree dɑ remø. Wu ko nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki ɑ́jwöggì, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko nyi kedhi be pëjjø ki yɑdh." 
Leviticus19:27 Thɑ̈nggi wun ko nyi lyel wun, wɑlɑ̀ yëyyi tïggi wun ko nyi teb wun." 
Leviticus19:28 Dëlli wun ko nyi kɑggi wun kɑ̀ ywøgu ngɑnthøø, wɑlɑ̀ ri wun ko gör wun ki gwedd. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:29 “Ayɑ̈r ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l kömí; nyɑrí ko göjjí gwøg ki ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈j kengø, kipe piny órënyi yi orøg." 
Leviticus19:30 Koru cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kɑ keny-ɑ yije nyi mɑlli yɑn wør wun. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:31 “Wu ko nyi kedhi yï ɑ́jwöggì be pëjjø ki yɑdh, keløg wu kedh-ɑ yï gen, wu ceg-ɑ ywëdhø. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:32 “Lïngu kwøbbi tyëngdøngø, kɑ ge wør wun. Kɑ Jwøøg wun böggi wun. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:33 “Tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì piny wun nyingi gen ko guud wun. 
Leviticus19:34 Mïdhu gen ge pɑ̈r ki wɑddi wun ceth, kɑ ge mɑɑr wun ni kɑ̀ mɑɑr wun ri wun. Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl kinni, wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ tyëngpɑth kì piny Rïp. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus19:35 “Wu ko nyi wëëny kɑ̀ rum wun ki jɑmmì, ying gɑ møg røm bɑ̈r, wɑlɑ̀ pegø, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ yethi gen nyi rum." 
Leviticus19:36 Rømu jɑmmì ki rum-ɑ dyër. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp." 
Leviticus19:37 Mïdhu kwöngɑ geki ciggɑ. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” 
Leviticus20:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus20:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, wɑ̈d Isrɑil wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth men-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun men mëggi nyige Mölek, ceg ki nɑ̈gø, bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì yi teedø bëne, o thøwe." 
Leviticus20:3 Ngɑn mëggi nyige Mölek, kɑ Kemi kwërɑ ywëdhe, kɑ nyingɑ bwöle, ngɑ̈jɑ lugɑ’ en, o pɑ cigi mïdhø yi yɑn ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jiɑ këti." 
Leviticus20:4 De keløg e ówøy yi teedø kɑ ocögø gø pɑ nɑ̈g yi gen," 
Leviticus20:5 ngɑ̈jɑ lugɑ’ ngɑnɑni geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rudi bɑnge bënn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli Mölek. Ge pɑ cigi mïdhø yi yɑn gɑ jiɑ këti." 
Leviticus20:6 “Keløg e dɑ ngɑn kedhi yï ɑjwøgø be pëjjø ki yɑdh, ngɑ̈jɑ lugɑ’ en, o pɑ cigi mïdhø yi yɑn ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jiɑ këti." 
Leviticus20:7 Bëëd wun wu bɑ ɑkwër, mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus20:8 Mïdhu ciggɑ, mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ kwër wun.”" 
Leviticus20:9 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j omuujø ki cigg møg kinni, “Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn yɑny wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, ɑ́yɑny-ɑ wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye, óthøw ki cyënne." 
Leviticus20:10 “Keløg dhɑnhø kedh-ɑ ri cï wɑ̈d Isrɑil, nɑ̈ɑ̈g jɑlɑni geki ngɑndhɑjø ryeet." 
Leviticus20:11 Ngɑn buddi ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli mɑ̈nni wïye, wïye ɑ́yɑ̈r en, nɑ̈g geki ngɑnɑni ryeet. Ge óthøw ki cyënni gen." 
Leviticus20:12 Keløg dhɑnhø kwɑre, cï wɑ̈de oniin yi en, nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ryeet. Ge ɑ́tir-ɑ orøg, o ge óthøw ki cyënni gen." 
Leviticus20:13 Keløg jɑlø oniin yi jɑlø megø, ge ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïjø me mɑɑn yi Jwøk, nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ryeet. Ge óthøw ki cyënni gen." 
Leviticus20:14 Ngɑn-ɑ ónywøøm ngɑndhɑjø kömi nyɑre, o ge göög gen ki mɑ̈nne ryeet, rɑ̈ɑ̈b jɑlɑni geki tyëngɑni ryeet ki mɑc, o ge thøw gen kipe ɑyɑ̈r men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, gïn ni menɑni ko wöl ki gwøgø kì kelli wun." 
Leviticus20:15 Ke di ngɑn niin lɑ̈y, nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑnɑni geki lɑ̈yɑni ryeet." 
Leviticus20:16 Keløg ngɑndhɑjø ree wëgge’ niin yi lɑ̈y, nɑ̈gu ngɑnɑni geki lɑ̈yɑni ryeet, ge óthøw ki cyënni gen." 
Leviticus20:17 “Keløg dhɑnhø nywøm-ɑ nyimen wɑlɑ̀ nyiwɑ̈n, yɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kì bøli ji kɑ ge cyeed wɑ̈yi gen. Ngɑn-ɑ óniin nyimen cyɑ̈dhe ki cyënne." 
Leviticus20:18 Keløg jɑlø óbuddø ki dhɑjø me ceg kwër ki dwɑ̈ye, cyeed gen wɑ̈yi gen kì kelli ji, mɑ́ ngɑnɑni ɑ́buddi ki en e ywëdhø, ree dɑ remø." 
Leviticus20:19 “Keløg dhɑnhø niin-ɑ wønye nyimï wïye, wɑlɑ̀ mɑɑy gen nyimï meye, ge ɑ́tir-ɑ orøg, cɑɑy gen ryeet." 
Leviticus20:20 Keløg dhɑnhø niin-ɑ cï ómï wïye, wïye nuti wøør en, cɑɑy nyelɑni geki ngɑnɑni ryeet, ge ócyɑ̈dhi ki orøøg gen, o ge ceg-ɑ thøø ki wɑ̈thi gen." 
Leviticus20:21 Keløg dhɑnhø kwɑny-ɑ cï ómen, ge ceg-ɑ thøø ki wɑ̈thi gen geki ngɑnɑni. Ágwøg-ɑ gïjø me ywëdhø, kɑ ómen lɑre.”" 
Leviticus20:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Mïdhu kwöngɑ geki ciggɑ, o wu ócög wu pɑ bɑny yi piny Kɑnɑɑn, piny-ɑ yije kïdhɑ wun." 
Leviticus20:23 Wu ko ngöyi ki bëëdi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kunɑni, jurrɑni cyeedɑ’ wɑ̈g kɑ per kinni o wu kïdhɑ pinyɑni. Yɑ køm-ɑ ngwøggø yi gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen." 
Leviticus20:24 De pinyɑni, ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, piny kɑ̈r ɑ́mëggɑ wun ɑ́ mi wun. O mëggɑ’ wun ceth. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́yieny wun kì kelli jurrì." 
Leviticus20:25 Kì bɑng menɑni, lɑ̈yy geki winy møg-ɑ ywëdhø ko cɑm wun. Wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki lɑ̈yy geki winy møg-ɑ ywëdhø. Ge ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ge ywëdhø, o ke cɑm wu gen, wu ceg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Leviticus20:26 Bëëd wun wu bɑ ɑkwër wun ɑ́ møgɑ, mɑ́ yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ kwërø, kɑ wu yïëënyɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli jurrì kipe kinni o wu bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ møgɑ." 
Leviticus20:27 “Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn-ɑ ree di yɑdh, ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, bɑ̈lli gen ki tuggi kïttì o ge thøw gen, ge óthøw ki cyënni gen.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí ókwër, wɑ̈ddi Aɑron kinni ko di ngɑn ywëdh ree kì kelli gen ki cølø," 
Leviticus21:2 de ócuggø kedhi yij cølø keløg ngɑn-ɑ thøø bɑ wɑɑd remø, ɑ́ meye, wɑlɑ̀ wïye, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ̈de, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑre, wɑlɑ̀ ómen," 
Leviticus21:3 kí nyimen nyɑn-ɑ nuti nywømø. 
Leviticus21:4 Ko kedhi yij cølø keløg ngɑn-ɑ thøø bɑ ørø. 
Leviticus21:5 “Ko di ókwërø me lyel budi wïje wɑlɑ̀ teb yëyyi tïge, wɑlɑ̀ dële ko gööre e nyodh-ɑ kinni ceg-ɑ ywøg ki ngɑnthøø." 
Leviticus21:6 Bëëde e bɑ ɑkwër ceth kɑ nyingɑ ko bwöle, mɑ́ gen ɑ nyi muuj jɑmmɑ møg-ɑ nyi muuj ki mɑc. Kì bɑng menɑni bëëd gen ceth ge bɑ ɑkwër." 
Leviticus21:7 Ókwërø ko nyömi ki dhɑjø me kwöngø ki bëëdø ki jɑlø, ko nyömi ki nyɑnɑjur men-ɑ ónywɑlø yi jɑlø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑtɑ̈ng, mɑ́ ókwërø bɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwërri Jwøk." 
Leviticus21:8 Mïdhu ókwërø ɑ́ ɑthyey, mɑ́ en ɑ nyi muuj jɑmmi Jwøøg wun, bëëde ɑ́ ɑkwër ceth, mɑ́ yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ kwër wun, yɑ bɑ kwërø." 
Leviticus21:9 Keløg nyɑɑr ókwërø ogöögø ki ngɑn niin ki köögi, wïye ɑ́bwöl yi en, rɑ̈b ki mɑc." 
Leviticus21:10 “Ókwër-ɑ dwøng wïje ɑ́kunyi ki møøw röny, ɑ́rum ki thyeyø kinni o ruge kí ógudhi kwër, yëyye ko wiy yi en o ge bëëd gen ri gen yölli gen, wɑlɑ̀ ógødhe ko kɑge e nyodh-ɑ kinni ywøg-ɑ ngɑnthøø." 
Leviticus21:11 Ko kedhi kömi ngɑnthøø, kɑ ko kedhi yij cølø cɑgg e bɑ wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye ɑ thøø." 
Leviticus21:12 Ko kedhi wɑ̈g kì kej kwër, wɑlɑ̀ kej kwëër Jwøge ko bwöle, mɑ́ e bɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thyëyi Jwøge keny-ɑ ɑ́kunyi wïje ki møøw röny. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus21:13 Nywøme ngɑn nuti buddø ki jɑlø," 
Leviticus21:14 de ko nyömi ki nyɑn jɑlgøle thøø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑtɑ̈ng, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑn me kwöngø ki bëëdø ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. Nyöme kì kelli jur gen ki nyɑn nuti pɑ̈nyø’ nywɑlø yi jɑlø," 
Leviticus21:15 kipe nyige ko bëëd ge ywëdhø kì kelli jie. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng ɑ́cïbɑ wɑ̈ye kɑ per gwøgɑ.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus21:17 “Köbbí Aɑron kinni, ko di dhɑnhø kì kelli kwɑrre kì yethi rïjj bënn me wëggi kɑ̈ni bøli Jwøge ki gïïpiny keløg ngɑnɑni bɑ bøøl." 
Leviticus21:18 Ngɑn di gïnrɑj kì ree ko cyɑ̈ngi ki kej kwër ying-ɑ́ cwør, wɑlɑ̀ ngwøl, wɑlɑ̀ bøle órënyø, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́cɑj," 
Leviticus21:19 ngɑn cinge ngøølø wɑlɑ̀ tyele ngøølø," 
Leviticus21:20 ɑgøngøtot wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn twilø, kí ngɑn nyinge ledh wɑlɑ̀ ree dɑ kedø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn mɑnne ótøgø ko wɑ̈dhi kej kwër." 
Leviticus21:21 Ko di dhɑnhø kì kelli kwɑrri Aɑron me ree di gïjø me rɑj me wëggi muuji yɑn gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. 
Leviticus21:22 Ngɑn ni menɑni ócuggø cɑm ki jɑmmi Kwëër Dwøng geki jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ kyeelø. 
Leviticus21:23 De mɑ́ e dɑ kenyledh kì ree, ko wɑ̈dhi buti gëng, wɑlɑ̀ ko kedhi buti këli lɑm. Jɑmmi kwër møgɑni ko bwöl en, mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ kwër gen.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Codhe, kɑ møgɑni löbbi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn yi Mosɑ̀." 
Leviticus22:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus22:2 “Köbbí Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kinni nyingɑ ko bwöl gen, wør gen jɑmm-ɑ nyi thyëyi yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus22:3 Ke di dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli kwɑrre, ɑ løg tyëng kwër me kedhi buti jɑmm-ɑ thyëyi yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil, e ywëdhø, pɑ kedhi be gwøg ki jɑmmi kwër kì wïj këli lɑm këti. Mïdhi ciggɑni kì yethi rïjj bënn. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus22:4 “Ko di dhɑnhø kì gøl Aɑron me cyɑ̈mø ki gïi kwër e dële dɑ kenyledh, wɑlɑ̀ e jɑmme olwöyø gïti keny-ɑ ódhïwe. Ókwërø ceg-ɑ ywëdhø keløg e ónywɑ̈dø ki gïn ywëdhø; oywëdhø ke nywɑle ngɑnthøø, oywëdhø yi tyewe kete;" 
Leviticus22:5 oywëdhø ke nywɑle lɑ̈y me mulli kì piny; oywëdhø ke nywɑle ngɑn ywëdhø ki gïn-ɑ ywëëdh en. 
Leviticus22:6 Ngɑn nywɑl gïgɑni ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø gïti keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng. Ngɑn ni menɑni ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïi kwër, de ócuggø cɑm keny-ɑ órume ki lwøggø." 
Leviticus22:7 Ódhïwi keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng. Codhe cyee, o cyɑ̈me ki jɑmmi kwër, mɑ́ gïgcɑmmɑni nyi cɑm-ɑ yi gøl kwër." 
Leviticus22:8 Ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki rïngi lɑ̈y men-ɑ thøw kete, wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y men-ɑ ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l, ree ko ywëdhe ki gen. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus22:9 “Ókwër bënn mïdhi gen cigg møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yɑn. Ke pɑ mïdhi gen, ge ógöögø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́røngi kɑ ge othøø, mɑ́ ciggi kwër ɑ́pyem yi gen. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ kwër gen." 
Leviticus22:10 “Tyëng gøl kwër keti gen ɑ cyɑ̈mø ki jɑmmi kwër, ko di dhɑnhø megø me cyɑ̈mø’ gen, cɑgg ɑ́ ngɑn bëëdø kì gøl ókwërø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn göögø kì cinge ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Leviticus22:11 Bɑ̈ng ókwërø men-ɑ ngeew en ki ngyënye wɑlɑ̀ ónywøøl ɑ gøle ócuggø cɑm ki gïg-ɑ cɑm yi ókwërɑni, gɑ jɑmmi kwër." 
Leviticus22:12 Nyɑɑr ókwërø men-ɑ ónywømø yi ngɑn me pɑth ki ókwërø, pɑ cyɑ̈mø ki jɑmmi kwër." 
Leviticus22:13 De keløg nyɑɑr ókwërø bɑ thwöm wɑlɑ̀ ɑtɑ̈ng, o bong nyɑre, kɑ dwöög-ɑ gøl wïye, o cyɑ̈me kì cinge ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde e thinh, ócuggø cɑm ki gïi kwër men-ɑ cɑm yi wïye. Tyëng gøl kwër keti gen ɑ cyɑ̈mø’ gen." 
Leviticus22:14 “Keløg ngɑn me pɑth ki ngeti gøl kwër ocyɑ̈mø e kwïj wøw, cole gïnɑni kɑ köme kïdhe ki ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj. Cule ókwërø gïi kwër men-ɑ cɑɑm en ceth." 
Leviticus22:15 Jɑmm-ɑ thyëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi tyëng Isrɑil ko wëggi bwölø yi ókwër," 
Leviticus22:16 mɑ́ ke göög gen kinøw, ge göjj-ɑ ji orøg men kɑ̈ni ki cɑ́y. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ kwër gen.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus22:18 “Köbbí Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, ‘Wɑ̈d Isrɑil wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth me bëëdø kì kelli gen, keny-ɑ ódwɑdde kɑ̈nø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, ying gø muuje ɑ́ wïj köngø, wɑlɑ̀ mi mër me rɑ̈bbe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Leviticus22:19 ke kɑ̈ne, kɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn ɑ́ thwønh me bong gïjø me rɑj kì ree, ɑ́ wɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ órömø, wɑlɑ̀ ónywøg, o óyïëy kì yïe." 
Leviticus22:20 Ko kɑ̈ni ki lɑ̈y me di gïjø me rɑj kì ree, ke di gïjø me rɑj kì ree, pɑ yïëy kì yïe." 
Leviticus22:21 Ngɑn kɑ̈ni yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënhi mër, wɑlɑ̀ wïj köngø, ócuggø bëëdø ɑ́ dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ dyel, de bëëde e bong gïjø me rɑj kì ree keløg gø dwɑddi yi en kinni o yïëy." 
Leviticus22:22 Wu ko nyi kɑ̈ni yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïn ngɑl ɑ́ gëëdhi e bɑ cwør, wɑlɑ̀ ree dɑ turø, wɑlɑ̀ ree dɑ kedø, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ kɑ̈jj mø lol kì ree, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ kɑ̈jj mø kwödø, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ kɑ̈jj mø nuti nøggø’ ree, dhøggi gen dɑ pɑ̈ngø. Wu ko muuj ki lɑ̈y me ni møgɑni ɑ́ men rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wïj këli lɑm." 
Leviticus22:23 Wɑdh wɑlɑ̀ órömø me ree di gïjø me nøg wɑlɑ̀ me dwøng (ni tyelø), ócuggø muujø ɑ́ jwödhø, de ke muujii ɑ́ wïj köngø pɑ yïëy." 
Leviticus22:24 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko ngɑ̈ddi wun ki lɑ̈y me mɑnne ótøgø, wɑlɑ̀ mɑnne ónyɑjø, wɑlɑ̀ mɑnne bɑ ɑngøl. Gïn ni menɑni ko gwøg wun kì piny wun." 
Leviticus22:25 “Lɑ̈y me ni møgɑni ko ngew wun kì yï ngɑnpɑth ɑ́ men ngɑ̈llu Jwøøg wun, mɑ́ gø pɑ yïëy yi en ki yï wun, kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde e dɑ gïjø me rɑj kì ree.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus22:27 “Keny-ɑ ónywøøl wɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ órömø wɑlɑ̀ ónywøg, wiy bëëde ki meye ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. De keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, ócuggø ngɑ̈lli yɑn ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì bøli keny-ɑ ódwɑddii." 
Leviticus22:28 De lɑ̈y ko nɑ̈g geki meye kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel cɑgg e bɑ dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ dyel. 
Leviticus22:29 Keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ muuji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënhi pwøj, gwøøg ki yuu-ɑ mïni pyëwe." 
Leviticus22:30 Cɑmu lɑ̈yɑni kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, kɑ ko di rïngø me wiy gïti dhuki. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus22:31 “Nyi gwøgu gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Leviticus22:32 Nyingɑ ko bwöl wun, tyëng Isrɑil bënn ngɑ̈nyi gen wøw kinni yɑ bɑ kwërø. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ kwër wun," 
Leviticus22:33 o bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, o yɑ göögɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wun. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus23:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ cyɑ̈nggi wööwø, mïdhu gen gɑ cyɑ̈nggi kwër. Bene gen cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi yɑn gɑ møgɑ ek:" 
Leviticus23:3 Yï wun dɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel mø yethi gen gwøg wun gwøøg wun, de wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl kinni bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, ɑ løg Sɑbɑth, bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø. Wu ko nyi göög kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, de cøng wu ri wun be mɑ̈ddø. Sɑbɑth bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwëru en kì keny-ɑ bëëd wun." 
Leviticus23:4 Bene gen cyɑ̈nggi kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek, nyi wøwu gen kì bøli kɑ̈jji gen." 
Leviticus23:5 “Bøli kej Kwëër Ákɑɑdh bɑ kì dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl kì ri cɑ̈gi run, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kì böörø. Bɑ Ákɑɑdh mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, (ɑ løg Pisɑ̀)." 
Leviticus23:6 Wööwi ópun-ɑ olwëny cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïïj cyɑ̈ng, o wu tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew wu cɑm-ɑ olwëny." 
Leviticus23:7 Cugi wun kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì ri cyɑ̈nggɑni kipe mɑ̈ddø, kɑ wu ko göög kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ki gwøøg yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus23:8 De nyi nëngu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne men-ɑ nyi muuj ki mɑc kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møgɑni. Cigu ri wun cøng be mɑ̈ddø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, kɑ wu ko göög kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ki gwøøg yethi cyɑ̈ng.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus23:10 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, keny-ɑ ókedhu piny-ɑ mëggɑ wun, kɑ wu okɑ̈jø ki byelle, dhöngø men-ɑ kwøng ki kɑjø kì pwödhø, muuj wu en ókwërø." 
Leviticus23:11 Thyeer dhöngɑni bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ókwërø, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe mïne’ wun. Thyer yi ókwërø kì mwøli cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
Leviticus23:12 Muuj wun thyew ki órömø rune ɑ́kyel me bong gïjø me rɑj kì ree, me gwøg ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ muuju byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus23:13 Muuj wun ki kïllì ɑ́ryew mø møng-ɑ búr, mø bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun kyeel ki órömø. Yømi tole bɑ men mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ wu muuj wun thyew ki óthɑ̈ngi møgi oløg kyeel ki gøn." 
Leviticus23:14 Byell-ɑ nyɑ̈n ko wöl ki belø, ge ko nyɑm ge nuti cyegø, wɑlɑ̀ ge bɑ ɑmɑ̈l ki mɑc, wɑlɑ̀ ɑbul, gïti keny-ɑ ómuuj byëli Jwøgí. Mïdhi cigg møg kì yethi rïjj bënn, kì keny-ɑ bëëd wun gïti ɑtheer." 
Leviticus23:15 “Kɑ wu kwɑ̈ɑ̈n wun ki osboo ɑ́bïryew kì bɑng Sɑbɑth; cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́muuj wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki byëlø. 
Leviticus23:16 Kì ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïïj cyɑ̈ng, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì bɑng thumi osboo ɑ́bïryew, cigu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j muujø ki byëlø megø kì ri byell-ɑ nyɑ̈n." 
Leviticus23:17 Muuj wun kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ki ópùn ɑ́ryew mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun kì kɑ̈lli wun gɑ møg mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gwøøg ópun ɑ́kyel ɑ́ kïllì ɑ́ryew mø ri gen di kɑmïrɑ̀ kɑ muuj ɑ́ byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri byell-ɑ nyɑ̈n. 
Leviticus23:18 Muuj Isrɑil bëne ki órömm ɑ́bïryew runi gen ɑ́kyel e bong gïjø me rɑj kì ri gen, kí wɑdh ówöb ɑ́kyel, kí órömm-ɑ thønhø ɑ́ryew. Göggi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kyeel kí byëlø, kí ópun geki byël-ɑ kunyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o tool gen bɑ men mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus23:19 Muuj wun thyew ki ónywøg me gwøg ɑ́ gënhi orøg, ki órömm ɑ́ryew runi gen ɑ́kyel mø gwøg gɑ jwödhi mër." 
Leviticus23:20 Thyeer gen bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kyeel kí ópun mi byell-ɑ nyɑ̈n yi ókwërø. Ge thërr-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge bɑ mø ókwërø." 
Leviticus23:21 Cøngu ri wun be mɑ̈ddø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ ko di gwøg me gwøg yi wun. Mïdhu cigg møg kì yethi rïjj bënn, kì keny-ɑ bëëd wun gïti ɑtheer." 
Leviticus23:22 “Keny-ɑ ókɑɑj jɑmm-ɑ ókɑ̈g yi yïn kì pinyí, møg-ɑ leggi pwödhø ko kɑɑj. Keløg e dɑ møg dëëm piny ge ko kwɑɑny. Wïyí gen tyëng-ɑ jɑdø geki tyëngpɑth kì yij pödhø. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus23:23 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus23:24 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì ri bïryeew dwɑ̈tt bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø, cugi wun be mɑ̈ddø keny-ɑ ókoodh kɑ̈ngì." 
Leviticus23:25 Ko di gwøg me gwøg yi wun kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi wun ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne.”" 
Leviticus23:26 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus23:27 “Cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, bɑ Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøøm, cøngu ri wun be mɑ̈ddø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ ko di gwøg me gwøg yi wun, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi wun ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Leviticus23:28 Ko di gwøg kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, mɑ́ e bɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ gøøm bøli orøøg wun." 
Leviticus23:29 Ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kelli jie." 
Leviticus23:30 O men-ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ónɑ̈gii. 
Leviticus23:31 Ko di gwøg me gwøg yi wun kinni tek, mïdhu cigg møg kì yethi rïjj bënn, kì keny-ɑ bëëd wun." 
Leviticus23:32 Bëëde ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø me dwøng kì yï wun, cɑg kì ri buddi cɑ̈ng kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y ɑ́bïngwen gïti buddi cɑ̈ng kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus23:34 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Akɑnnì, o wööwɑni tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew gɑ møg yethi gen wøør Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus23:35 Cøngu ri wun be mɑ̈ddø kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl, kɑ ko di gwøg me gwøg yi wun." 
Leviticus23:36 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi ngɑ̈ddi wun ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møgɑni. Cøng wun ri wun be mɑ̈ddø këti kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi wun ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Menɑni bɑ kwër me dwøng, ko di gwøg me gwøg yi wun kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Leviticus23:37 (Møgɑk bene gen cyɑ̈nggi kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ yethi gen nyi cøng wun ri wun be mɑ̈ddø, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi muuj wun ki gëdhhì. Nyi ngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kɑ nyi muuj wun ki byëlø, kí jwödhi mër, ki byël-ɑ kunyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ dwɑddii kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Leviticus23:38 Gëdhhɑni kedh-ɑ kömi mø cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth, reb ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj yi wun gɑ mø gøøm, kí mø wïj köngø, geki møg-ɑ nyi dwɑddi yi pëthi wun ki muujø.)" 
Leviticus23:39 Kì bɑng menɑni, nyi wøwu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cyɑ̈nggi bïryeew dwɑ̈tt gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj, keny-ɑ órum wun ki kɑji jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈g yi wun kì yethi pwödhhi wun. Wøwu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. Ywööm wun kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl geki bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng." 
Leviticus23:40 Kɑ̈ɑ̈d wun kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl ki møg-ɑ døj kì ri nywøli yenhi wun, kí ówɑwwi benø møg mɑr, kí ɑnɑ̈bbi yenh, kí wijø me ree di okøgg, kɑ wu tuug wun ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun." 
Leviticus23:41 Nyi wøwu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinøw ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew kì yethi runn bënn. Mïdhu cigg møg kì yethi rïjj bënn kì keny-ɑ bëëd wun, nyi tuug wun ceth kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt." 
Leviticus23:42 Bëëd wun kì yethi ɑkɑnnì ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, bëëd tyëng Isrɑil bënn kì yethi ɑkɑnnì," 
Leviticus23:43 o yod yi kwɑrri wun kinni tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́göjjɑ bëëdø kì yethi ɑkɑnnì ki kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́löbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Mosɑ̀ ɑnɑn ki cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ yethi gen nyi wøøw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Leviticus24:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus24:2 “Ceg tyëng Isrɑil kinni muuj gen yïn ki møøw dhetun men-ɑ dhïw, me lyel kì yethi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, o mɑc nyi lɑɑnge wɑ̈r e olyelø." 
Leviticus24:3 Nyi cwiny lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ møgɑni yi Aɑron kì böörø o ge lɑng gen wɑ̈r ge olyelø gïti mwøl, kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j gëng, kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg men-ɑ Kej Kwërdwøng. Mïdhi cigg møg gïti ɑtheer." 
Leviticus24:4 Mïdhi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ møgɑni ge olyelø ceth kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Aɑron, kì wɑ̈thi teggi dhɑm dhïw." 
Leviticus24:5 “Kɑ̈bbí ki møng-ɑ búr me ngedhø kɑ yï bud ki ópùn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, gwøg ópun ɑ́kyel ɑ røthøl ɑ́ryew." 
Leviticus24:6 Cïb ópùnɑni wïj tɑrɑbeedh dhɑb kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gɑ lwøbb ɑ́ryew, ópùn ɑ́bïkyel kì yij lwøb ɑ́kyel." 
Leviticus24:7 Kɑ ri lwøbbɑni ryeet kïdhí ki bɑkur me dhïw ɑ́ men-ɑ ókwɑny kej ópùn. 
Leviticus24:8 Nyi cïb ópùn bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth bënn. Bɑ cigg møg mïdhi yi Isrɑil gïti ɑtheer," 
Leviticus24:9 gïncɑmɑni bɑ mi Aɑron geki gøle, nyi cɑm ge gøn kì kej kwër, mɑ́ e bɑ gïi kwër me pere teg kiree, nyi muuj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ per ókwër.”" 
Leviticus24:10 Ádɑ jɑl megø me bɑ wɑ̈d nyɑɑr Isrɑil, mɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil. O wïyi nyelɑni bɑ jɑl Rïp, kɑ wɑ̈d nyɑɑr Isrɑil owërø ki wɑ̈d Isrɑil megø kì kɑɑl." 
Leviticus24:11 Kɑ wɑ̈d nyɑɑr Isrɑil Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑnye ki yɑ̈d mø rijjø. Codhe, kɑ muuj Mosɑ̀, (nyelɑni nyingi meye cwøl ɑ́ Cɑlömith nyɑɑr Dibrì kì gøl Dɑn)." 
Leviticus24:12 Kɑ mïdhi yi gen ɑ́ ɑmɑg ge nenn-ɑ gïn-ɑ óløøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipere. 
Leviticus24:13 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus24:14 “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ddi wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ cinggi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yɑ̈dde cïb gen wïje, kɑ bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì yi teedø bëne gïti keny-ɑ óthøwe." 
Leviticus24:15 Orume, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbí kinni ngɑn-ɑ óyɑny Jwøk, óthøw ki cyënne." 
Leviticus24:16 Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn yɑny Jwøk, bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì yi teedø bëne. Keny-ɑ óyɑɑny Jwøk yi wɑ̈d Isrɑil wɑlɑ̀ yi ngɑnpɑth, nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ddi." 
Leviticus24:17 “Ngɑn nɑ̈g dhɑnhø, lony ki nɑ̈gø," 
Leviticus24:18 ngɑn nɑ̈g gïi ngɑn megø, cole gøn ceth, wëy ki wëy." 
Leviticus24:19 “Ngɑn thödhi wɑɑd gen ki kedø, lony ki thödhø’ kedø ni menɑni." 
Leviticus24:20 Keløg e tor-ɑ cögø, toor cögø ɑ́kyel kì kelli cue, keløg e tøy-ɑ wɑng, tøy wɑnge ɑ́kyel, keløg e tor-ɑ lëjø, toor lëje ɑ́kyel. Ken-ɑ ni men-ɑ ɑ́kïdhe ri ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø, lony ki kïdhi ree." 
Leviticus24:21 Ngɑn nɑ̈g lɑ̈ɑ̈y ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø, cole gøn, de nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn nɑ̈g dhɑnhø." 
Leviticus24:22 Ciggɑni ying-ɑ kömi wun bënn, wu tyëng Isrɑil ki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus24:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Mosɑ̀ ki köbbi ciggɑni bënn tyëng Isrɑil, ɑkwɑny gen nyel-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈d kɑ gø kïdhi gen ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, ɑbɑ̈lli ge gøn ki tuggi kïttì gïti kɑ ɑ́thøwe. Kinøw, møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Leviticus25:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy kinni," 
Leviticus25:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, keny-ɑ ókedhu piny-ɑ mëggɑ wun, nyi ywömu piny e pɑ kɑ̈g yi wun kì bɑng runn ɑ́bïryew, wu wør-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus25:3 Nyi kɑ̈gu pwödhhi wun, kɑ yenhi nywøl møg-ɑ bɑ mø wun nyi teb wun, kɑ pwödhhi wun nyi kɑj wun ki runn ɑ́bïkyel." 
Leviticus25:4 De bïryeew runn, bɑ runi ywömø me dwøng kipe piny, run menɑni ɑ́thyey ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pwödhhi wun ko kɑ̈g wun, wɑlɑ̀ yenhi nywøl møg-ɑ bɑ mø wun ko teb wun kì runɑni." 
Leviticus25:5 Köllì ko wöl ki kɑjø, kɑ nywøli yenh møg-ɑ cyeg e yenh nuti tebø ko lem wun. Bɑ runi ywömø me dwøng me wøru Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus25:6 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd piny e pɑ kɑ̈g ki runɑni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu óthödhe’ gïncɑm ceth, wuki bɑ̈nggi wun, kí tyëng-ɑ kïr yi wun, kí tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun," 
Leviticus25:7 kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ pidh yi wun, kí lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l. Gïg-ɑ ónywøl yi pinyɑni bɑ møg cɑm." 
Leviticus25:8 “Kɑ wu kwɑ̈ɑ̈n wun ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïngwen. 
Leviticus25:9 Codhe, kì pyɑ̈ri cyɑ̈nggi bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Gøøm, öd wun ki ngɑn kodh kɑɑng tung kì yij piny bëne." 
Leviticus25:10 Thyey wun pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïïj runn, kɑ ji gøny wun kì yethi töjji bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kì yij piny bëne. Cwøl ɑ́ runi tung. Döggi ngɑn jɑmme, kɑ ngɑn døøge gøl gen." 
Leviticus25:11 Pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïïj runn bɑ runi medi pëëth kì yï wun. Wu ko kɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑlɑ̀ köllì ko kɑj wun, wɑlɑ̀ nywøli yenh ko lem wun kì runɑni." 
Leviticus25:12 Runɑni bɑ runi kwër kì yï wun. Cɑmu gïg-ɑ nywøl yi piny keti gen. 
Leviticus25:13 “Kì yij Runi Dwöggø menɑni, døøg ngɑn kömi jɑmme møg-ɑ ngeew en wɑ̈g." 
Leviticus25:14 O keløg piny ngëwwií wɑɑd wun wɑ̈d Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ yï ngëëw ɑ yïe, ko di gwem." 
Leviticus25:15 Ngeew piny e gïg-ɑ nywøl en kì yethi runn-ɑ bøli Runi Dwöggø men-ɑ óbï di rømmø. 
Leviticus25:16 Keløg runnɑni nuti ge gïïr, tïng ngyew mɑl, de keløg ɑ́ runn mø nøg ɑ döngø, dwöög ngyew piny, mɑ́ e bɑ gïg-ɑ ónywøl yi piny, ɑ ceg ki ngewø." 
Leviticus25:17 Ko di ngɑn gwem wɑ̈d Isrɑil wɑɑd gen, de mïdhu ciggi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus25:18 “Kì bɑng menɑni nyi mïdhu Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki kwönge, o wu óbëëd wun kì pinyɑni pëthi wun pɑ lïngø." 
Leviticus25:19 Piny ónywøl ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun kipe cɑmø bënn, wu ónin kì yije." 
Leviticus25:20 “Wu ócuggø pëjjø kinni, ‘Keløg wø pɑ kɑ̈gø, o wø pɑ lïmø ki köllì, wø ócɑm-ɑ ngø kì bïryeew runn?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Wu ónëngɑ ki gyëdh mø døngø kì bïkyeel runn, kɑ pwödh ocyegø ki byel mø cɑm ki runn ɑ́ryew." 
Leviticus25:22 Keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈g wun kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runn, wu óbëëdø wu nudd wu cɑm-ɑ byell-ɑ ɑ́cyeg kì bïkyeel runn, o wu obëëdø wu nudd wu ocyɑ̈mø ki byellɑni gïti keny-ɑ ócyeg byell-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈g yi wun." 
Leviticus25:23 “Piny ko ngew e cöög-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ ngewii, mɑ́ piny ceg bëëdø ɑ́ miɑ, mɑ́ wu bɑ tyëngpɑth, o wu bëëd ɑ pinyɑ." 
Leviticus25:24 “Keny-ɑ óngeew piny, ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni ódöggi wɑ̈n." 
Leviticus25:25 Keløg wɑ̈d Isrɑil jɑdø, kɑ pinye ngeewe wɑ̈g, døøg ki ngëwwii yi wɑɑd gen, wɑɑd nyöödø." 
Leviticus25:26 Keløg e bong ngɑn ngëwwii en, de óyïddø ki ngyëny dhuki megø," 
Leviticus25:27 cule jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ngew piny kì yïe ngyënyyi runn-ɑ ɑ́döng kipe bëëni Runi Dwöggø, kɑ døøge pinye." 
Leviticus25:28 De keløg e pɑ yïddi ki ngyëny mø lwɑ̈nge gøn ki døøgø’ ngewø, bëëde kì yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngëëw gïti keny-ɑ óbëën Runi Dwöggø. Döggi piny wɑ̈n kì runɑni." 
Leviticus25:29 “Keløg dhɑnhø ngeew-ɑ øde wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl me ógerø ki dörø, ócuggø døøgø ngewø yi en keny-ɑ óthumi run-ɑ mɑl kì ri ngewii." 
Leviticus25:30 De keløg ønɑni pɑ cuggi døøgø ki ngewø yi en kì runɑni, pɑ cigi døøgø ngëwwii, o ød ceg-ɑ cögø ɑ́ mi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ngewii; ɑ́göög ki mi gøl gen. Pɑ döggi wɑ̈n kì Runi Dwöggø." 
Leviticus25:31 De udd-ɑ pɑ ying kɑɑl dörø; uddi kelli myërr, ge nɑ pwödh, ge ócuggø døøgø ngewø yi wɑ̈n, o ge ceg kɑ döggii kì Runi Dwöggø." 
Leviticus25:32 De Kwɑrri Leebì jɑmmi gen ócuggø døøgø ngewø yi gen kì yethi myërr-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen kì bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen. 
Leviticus25:33 Keløg ød ngeew-ɑ wɑ̈g yi Kwɑɑr Leebì kì yethi myërrɑni, de gø nuti døøg en ki ngëwwi ree, döggii ceth kì Runi Dwöggø, mɑ́ myërri Kwɑrri Leebì bɑ mø gen, mø pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì yï gen kì kelli Isrɑil." 
Leviticus25:34 De pɑ̈l-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi dhög kì tøggi myërri gen ko wöl ki ngeew wɑ̈g, cungi gɑ mø gen ceth gïti ɑtheer." 
Leviticus25:35 “Keløg wɑ̈d Isrɑil me bëëdø kì butí cinge ojɑdø, thödhí ki gïn-ɑ jɑ̈ddii ni kenyi thödhí wëlø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑnpɑth men-ɑ bëëdø kì butí, o ómyëw óbëëde kì butí ceth." 
Leviticus25:36 Ko köbbí col ki mø ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́wïdhii, o ómyëw óbëëde kì butí ceth." 
Leviticus25:37 Ko wëggí col ki møg-ɑ nywøl yi ngyëny, kɑ gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́wïdhii col e nɑ keje ceth." 
Leviticus25:38 Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, o wu mëggɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn, o yɑ óbëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wun." 
Leviticus25:39 “Keløg wɑɑd wun wɑ̈d Isrɑil me bëëdø kì butí ojɑdø kɑ ree ngëwwe yïn ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, ko wëggi gwøg ki gwøøg bɑ̈ng," 
Leviticus25:40 mïdhí ni ngɑn-ɑ kïr, kɑ wiy gögge yïn gïti bøli keny-ɑ óbëën Runi Dwöggø." 
Leviticus25:41 Obëën bøli kenyɑni, kɑ wiy døøge gøl gen kì piny kwɑn, kɑ wiy nyige kɑ̈l yi en." 
Leviticus25:42 Mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil bɑ bɑ̈nggɑ, møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, o ge pɑ cuggi ngewø gɑ bɑ̈ngg." 
Leviticus25:43 Ge ko kwïj cengø, de böggí Jwøgí." 
Leviticus25:44 Keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ ngyew ki bɑ̈ngg, ngëëw wun ki jurr-ɑ kyeelø." 
Leviticus25:45 Wu ócuggø ngyew thyew ki nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, ki møg-ɑ ónywølø yi kɑ̈lli gen ge bëëd ɑ piny wun, ge ócuggø gwøg gɑ mø wun." 
Leviticus25:46 Ge ócuggø lɑgø yi nyigi wun kì bɑng wun, göggi gen kɑ̈lli wun gïti thøø, de wɑddi wun tyëng Isrɑil ko kwïju cengø." 
Leviticus25:47 “Keløg ngɑnpɑth kɑ̈rø, kɑ wɑ̈d Isrɑil me bëëdø kì bute ojɑdø, kɑ ree ngëwwe ngɑnpɑth menɑni, wɑlɑ̀ ree ngëwwe’ wɑɑd ngɑnpɑth menɑni," 
Leviticus25:48 keny-ɑ órume ngewø, ngyew ócuggø pɑ̈dø yi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑddi gen," 
Leviticus25:49 ying-ɑ́ ómï wïye, wɑlɑ̀ ówɑ̈n, wɑlɑ̀ ócuggø pɑ̈dø yi wɑd megø kì gøl gen. Wɑlɑ̀ ke kɑ̈re, ree ócuggø pɑ̈dø yi en, kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́ngewii col yi en." 
Leviticus25:50 Köbbe jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ngewii, kɑ ge kwɑn gen runn, cɑg kì ri keny-ɑ ɑ́ngëwwe ree gøn, gïti Runi Dwöggø men-ɑ óbï, kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́ngewii cole ge kwɑɑn-ɑ ri köggi ngɑn ceg ki kïrø." 
Leviticus25:51 Cole budi ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́ngewii ge kwɑɑn-ɑ ri kwɑnni runn-ɑ ɑ́döng," 
Leviticus25:52  
Leviticus25:53 e dhɑ̈y nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kïr. Ko kwïj cengø yi wɑ̈n ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngewii. 
Leviticus25:54 O ke cöge e pɑ pɑ̈d ki yëëth møgɑk, gøny geki nyige kì Runi Dwöggø men-ɑ óbï." 
Leviticus25:55 Mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil bɑ bɑ̈nggɑ. Ge bɑ bɑ̈nggɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus26:1 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ri wun ko göggi wun ki jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, kɑ ri wun ko twïgi wun ki ngïjjì, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko cwödhi piny ki löj, kɑ wu ko twïg ki kït men mɑlli yi wun. Mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus26:2 Mïdhu cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth møgɑ, kɑ jɑmmi kwër møgɑ böggi wun. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus26:3 “Keløg wu óbëëdø wu mïdh-ɑ ciggɑ geki kwöngɑ," 
Leviticus26:4 wu ómëggɑ kødh kì bøli keje, o piny yije cyeeg yi jɑmmì, o yenh nywøl gen." 
Leviticus26:5 Pwödhhi wun ócyeg kidøøj, ki me pïïd wun yi cyegi nywøli yenh wu nudd wu okɑ̈jø ki byel, kɑ wu pïïd yi kɑ̈g wu nudd wu olïmø ki nywøli yenhi bɑ̈ggi wun. Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun ki cɑmø óbëëdø ge nud kì yï wun, o wu óbëëdø wu pɑ böggi kì piny wun." 
Leviticus26:6 “Wu ónëngi yi yɑn ki mër kì piny wun, o wu ónin wun e bong gïjø me böggi yi wun. Lɑ̈yy-ɑ cyɑ̈mø ónyiig yi yɑn kì pinyɑni, o óbong liny kì yij piny wun." 
Leviticus26:7 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun ócyeddi yi wun, kɑ ge ópɑ̈nhø keny-ɑ ɑ́kebbu gen ki pil." 
Leviticus26:8 Ábïj kì kelli wun tyɑm-ɑ ji miyø, o miyø ɑ́kyel tyɑm-ɑ ji miy pyɑ̈rø." 
Leviticus26:9 Wu ógyëdh yi yɑn kɑ wu nëngɑ ki nywøl mø gïïr, dhøgɑ ómïdhɑ kì ri lwöbø men-ɑ kɑɑmee." 
Leviticus26:10 Byelli wun ócyeg kidøøj, kɑ wu pïïd yi byell-ɑ nyɑ̈n wu ocyɑ̈mø ki wöyyì, kɑ byell-ɑ wöyyì ceg yi wun ki weddø, o yethi óköddì kïdhi byell-ɑ nyɑ̈n." 
Leviticus26:11 Yɑ óbëëdø’ kelli wun kì yij kemɑ, o wu pɑ pɑ̈nyɑ’ lugi ngɑ̈jɑ." 
Leviticus26:12 Yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki wun ceth; Yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wun, o wu óbëëdø wun ɑ́ jiɑ." 
Leviticus26:13 Yɑn yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun, wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg, kɑ lødhi ɑcebbì mø wun tørri yi yɑn, kɑ wu wëggɑ cyɑ̈dhø wu törr-ɑ wɑ̈thi wun." 
Leviticus26:14 “De keløg kwɑbbɑ pɑ lïngi yi wun, kɑ gïg-ɑ cïgɑ wun pɑ nyi gwøg yi wun," 
Leviticus26:15 o keløg ngɑ̈thi wun lugu’ ciggɑ, kɑ kwöngɑ bɑny yi wun, wu bɑny-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ, bene pɑ̈di lwöbø yi wun ɑnɑn." 
Leviticus26:16 O keny-ɑ ópɑ̈d wun lwöbø, bene gïg-ɑ ógöggɑ wun ek: wu ógöjjɑ ryɑ̈g me dwøng, wu ógöjjɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, kí lëdhi dëllì men-ɑ ócør nyingi wun, kɑ wu dhile’ nɑ̈gø. Wu óthuw kɑ̈g ki byel, mɑ́ byellɑni ócɑm-ɑ yi ji mø mɑ̈n ki wun." 
Leviticus26:17 Nyingee ónenni yi wɑ, kɑ wu tyɑm yi ji mø mɑɑn wun, kɑ wu jɑɑg yi ji mø mɑɑn wun; o wu ówɑ̈dhi rengø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø e bong ngɑn me cyeddi wun." 
Leviticus26:18 “O keløg wu óbëëd wu nudd wu opëmø ki kwøbbɑ, kömi cɑ́yi wun ócigɑ kïdhø ki tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus26:19 Ki lɑ̈n-ɑ lɑ̈ddi wun ɑnɑn, wɑ̈thi wun ódwöögɑ piny, óbëëd e bong kødh, piny wun óthwøw kɑ ogöögø’ dødø." 
Leviticus26:20 Cɑgg wu göögø wu teeg, bong gïjø me yod yi wun, mɑ́ e bong gïjø me cyeg kì pinyɑni, o yenh pɑ kɑ̈ni ki nywøl." 
Leviticus26:21 “Keløg wu óyöd wu kɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈yi wun, kɑ wu óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi kwøbbɑ, kömi cɑ́yi wun ócigɑ kïdhø ki tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus26:22 Lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø óörɑ kelli wun, kɑ nyigi wun cɑm yi gen, kɑ dhögi wun cɑm yi gen, kɑ wu odöngø wu nøg, o yëëth döng gen ge bong ji møg cyɑ̈dhi kì yethi gen." 
Leviticus26:23 “O rum cɑ́yɑni ki pɑ̈dhi kömi wun de wu pɑ yewi, wu nudd wu bɑny-ɑ møgɑ," 
Leviticus26:24 wu ceg yi yɑn kɑ cɑyø ki cɑ́y mø lod møgɑni ki tyel ɑ́bïryew. 
Leviticus26:25 Liny óköölɑ kömi wun, liny me cɑɑy wun kipe kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈du lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑmee, o keløg wu pɑ̈n-ɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi dör, wu örɑ’ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì møg-ɑ ójɑ̈ddi ki yɑdh, kɑ wu yömm-ɑ yï ji mø mɑ̈n ki wun." 
Leviticus26:26 Wu ótwönɑ ki gïncɑm, kɑ men-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn pyɑ̈rø rïb-ɑ kömi purun ɑ́kyel, o nyi ceg ki teggø yi gen, o keny-ɑ órume ki cɑmø yi wun bëne, kɑ̈ɑ̈j wun pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Leviticus26:27 “O rum cɑ́yɑni ki pɑ̈dhi kömi wun de wu pɑ yewi, wu nudd wu bɑny-ɑ møgɑ," 
Leviticus26:28 pyëwɑ órënyi kɑ kömi cɑ́yɑni cigɑ kïdhø ki mø pëddi rɑ̈jø, mø lod mø tyeli mɑl ki tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Leviticus26:29 Kɑ̈ɑ̈j wun ótëngi ki mendwøng kɑ nyigi wun cɑm yi wun. 
Leviticus26:30 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø mø wun kì wɑ̈thi ótøng ócøørɑ piny, kɑ këlli bɑkur dhurɑ piny, kɑ wu leengɑ kömi ngïjji jwöggi wun wu thøø, wu ómɑn yi yɑn ki mendwøng." 
Leviticus26:31 Kɑ̈ddi wun ócøørɑ piny geki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø mø wun, o yɑ óbɑ̈nyi ki gëdhh-ɑ ómuuj yi wun." 
Leviticus26:32 Piny wun órënyi yi yɑn ki menteg, kɑ men-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ óbï be kwɑnyii ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø yi rëny-ɑ rëny en." 
Leviticus26:33 Wu óköllɑ liny kɑ wu tɑɑy-ɑ kelli jurrì møøgø. Piny wun ódöng nøw, kɑ kɑ̈ddi wun odöngø ge rënyø." 
Leviticus26:34 Codhe, o piny ree ywöme keny-ɑ ókïdhi wun pödhhi ji mø mɑ̈n ki wun. Piny wun pyëwe ómïni yi ywömø keny-ɑ ódöönge e wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø yøw." 
Leviticus26:35 Piny ree óywöme ki ywömø me lod men-ɑ di mëggu en kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth, keny-ɑ́ nudd wu obëëdø’ yije." 
Leviticus26:36 “Tyëng-ɑ ónudd ge onëënø pëthi gen ónyönhi kì piny tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Ge óbwøg yi yïthhi yɑdh kɑ̀ yɑngi gen yi yømø. Ge órengi e dhɑ̈y ce dɑ ngɑn cyeddi gen ki pilø, kɑ ge ópɑ̈nhø e bong ngɑn cyeddi gen." 
Leviticus26:37 Kɑ ngɑn pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi ngɑn, e ce dɑ ngɑn cyeddi gen ki pilø, ngö e bong ngɑn cyeddi gen. Wu ónyönhi, liny pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi wun." 
Leviticus26:38 Wu óthøw kelli pödhh møøgø, kɑ wu lɑ̈ny-ɑ yethi pödhhi ji mø mɑ̈n ki wun." 
Leviticus26:39 O tyëng-ɑ ódöng ge onëënø kwɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yethi pödhhi ji mø mɑ̈n ki gen kì bɑng orøøg gen. Ge kwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ yïnø thyew kipe orøøg kweyyi gen. 
Leviticus26:40 “De kwɑrri wun oyewi gen ki orøøg gen geki orøøg kweyyi gen, jøg-ɑ ɑ́pyem kwøbbɑ, kɑ ngɑ̈thi gen lugi gen yɑn," 
Leviticus26:41 ɑwëggi gen pyëwɑ rënyø, ɑkøølɑ gen pɑ̈l yij piny ji mø mɑ̈n ki gen. Kì cyɑ̈n cyee keny-ɑ óyömmi kwɑrri wun, kɑ cɑ́yi gen yïëy yi gen," 
Leviticus26:42 lwöm-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm wøn ki Abrɑhɑm ópɑr yi yɑn, kí lwömi wøn ki Isɑɑk, kí lwömi wøn ki Yɑgob, kinni piny ómëggɑ jiɑ." 
Leviticus26:43 Piny ówiy e dööng nøw yi gen, o piny pyëwe mïne kì kɑɑm-ɑ bëëde e ywöm-ɑ ree, o ge yïëy gen ki cɑyø kipe kɑ ɑ́bɑny gen kwöngɑ geki ciggɑ." 
Leviticus26:44 Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw ceth, kɑ̈ng-ɑ óying gen piny ji mø mɑ̈n ki gen, ge pɑ ti yi yɑn ki weddø, wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ nɑ̈gɑ pɑ̈l ge bënn, mɑ́ menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ cögi lwömɑ ki gen, o bene yɑn Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus26:45 Ge ópɑ̈ddɑ ki lwömi tyeli mɑl, lwöm-ɑ ree ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, e jurrì onëënø bënn, kipe kinni o yɑ óløgɑ Jwøøg gen, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Møgɑk bene gen kwöng geki cigg møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy kipe tyëng Isrɑil. 
Leviticus27:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Leviticus27:2 “Köbbí cigg møg tyëng Isrɑil, kinni keny-ɑ órum dhɑnhø ki mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ wïj köngø," 
Leviticus27:3 jɑlø runne pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Røm gen ri ɑ́tuggi ɑ́tegg møg-ɑ ónyodh yi ókwër. 
Leviticus27:4 Ngɑndhɑjø runne pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Leviticus27:5 Nyel-ɑ jɑlø runne ɑ́bïj gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Dhɑjø pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø. 
Leviticus27:6 Nyɑgïnthinh-ɑ jɑlø dwɑ̈ye ɑ́kyel gïti runn ɑ́bïj, pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́bïj. Nyɑgïnthinh-ɑ dhɑjø pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Leviticus27:7 Jɑlø runne pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel gïti mɑl, pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj. O dhɑjø pɑ̈d kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø." 
Leviticus27:8 “Ngɑn dhɑl yi col muuj ókwërø, o ngyënyy-ɑ col en cïb yi ókwërø, ngyënyy-ɑ cuggi lwɑ̈ngø ki colø yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́köngi, ókwøb-ɑ yi ókwërø." 
Leviticus27:9 “Keløg wïj köngø bɑ lɑ̈y me cuggi mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kɑ cyee, gïn-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ gïi kwër." 
Leviticus27:10 Lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́muuj keje ko cïbi, wɑlɑ̀ ko wil, ying e wil kɑ men døj wɑlɑ̀ men rɑj, ke pɑ̈nyii ki wilø, lɑ̈yyɑni ryeet ceg-ɑ gwøg ki mø kwër." 
Leviticus27:11 Lɑ̈yy-ɑ ywëdhø pɑ cuggi mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gëdhhì, o ke di ngɑn kɑ̈ni yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli lɑ̈yyɑni, muuj ókwërø." 
Leviticus27:12 Kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ngeew lɑ̈yɑni cïb yi ókwërø e køøl-ɑ kömi døøje wɑlɑ̀ rɑ̈je, ni kɑ̀ nennii yi ókwërɑni, bene gen ngyënyy-ɑ ókwøb yi ókwërø ɑ ngeewii." 
Leviticus27:13 Keløg ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ni dwɑdd-ɑ dwøøgi gëe, kɑ ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj kì ri ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi ókwërø gɑ møg ngeew lɑ̈yɑni cïb kömi ngyënyy-ɑ col en, o cole mø ngenyø." 
Leviticus27:14 “Keløg dhɑnhø muuj-ɑ øde, gø mëgge’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ mi kwër, cïb ngyënyye yi ókwërø, e ködd-ɑ kömi rɑ̈je wɑlɑ̀ døøje, ngyënyy-ɑ ókwøb yi ókwërø bene gen ngyënyy-ɑ ngeew ønɑni." 
Leviticus27:15 De keløg ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́muuj ød dwɑdd-ɑ døøgi øde ki ngewø, cïb ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj kì ri ngyënyyɑni kömi ngyënyyi ngyew, o cole mø ngenyø. Codhe, o ød døøge ɑ́ mi wɑ̈n këti." 
Leviticus27:16 “Keløg dhɑnhø muuj-ɑ pwödhø kì ri piny gøl gen, ngyënyy-ɑ ngeew pwödhø pɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ngeew köödh møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈gii, kwɑn ɑ́ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø ɑ ngeew gïn ni rummì pyɑ̈rø mø ceir." 
Leviticus27:17 Keløg pwödhø muuj yi ngɑnɑni kì Runi Dwöggø, cungi ngyënyy-ɑ ngeewii gɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi ókwërø ceth." 
Leviticus27:18 De keløg e ómuuj yi ngɑnɑni kì bɑng runi Dwöggø, cïb ngyënyyi ngyew yi ókwërø ge kwɑɑn-ɑ ri runn-ɑ ɑ́döng kipe bëëni Runi Dwöggø. Kɑ kwɑnnɑni ngul wɑ̈g kì ri ngyënyyi ngyew." 
Leviticus27:19 Keløg ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́muujii ɑ dwɑddii døøgø ngewø, cïb ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj kì ri ngyënyyɑni kömi gen, o cole mø ngenyø. Codhe cyee, o pwödhø døøge ɑ́ mi wɑ̈n këti." 
Leviticus27:20 Keløg pwönhɑni pɑ døøg ki ngewø yi wɑ̈n, wɑlɑ̀ keløg e ngew-ɑ yi ngɑn megø, pɑ cigi døøgø ngewø yi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́muujii." 
Leviticus27:21 Keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈d piny kì Runi Dwöggø, pinyɑni ceg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́ mi kwër, bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni piny-ɑ ócɑɑgø mëggii. Ceg-ɑ gwøg ki mi ókwër, ɑ løg gøl kwër." 
Leviticus27:22 “Keløg dhɑnhø mëgg-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny me cɑɑg en ki ngewø, e pɑth ki piny gøl gen," 
Leviticus27:23 kwɑɑn runn-ɑ ɑ́döng kipe bëëni Runi Dwöggø yi ókwërø, kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ ngeew pinyɑni cïbe, kɑ ngyënyyi ngyew muuj kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, ngyënyyɑni bɑ mø kwër, ɑ løg mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus27:24 Keny-ɑ óbëën Runi Dwöggø, pinyɑni døøg-ɑ yï wɑ̈n ngeti tyeli mɑl, yï gøl-ɑ ɑ́ngeew pinyɑni wɑ̈g." 
Leviticus27:25 “Nyi rum wun ki rum-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi kej kwër, kɑ̀ cud wun ki ngyënyyi ngew møgɑk, e bɑ ngyënyø me cuggi pɑ̈ngø gɑ bud pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Leviticus27:26 “Keløg lɑ̈y bɑ kɑyi meye, ceg bëëdø ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ko cigi mëggii yi ji. Keløg ɑ́ dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ dyel, bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus27:27 Keløg lɑ̈yɑni ywëdhø, døøg ki ngewø yi wɑ̈n ki ngyënyy-ɑ ókwøb yi ókwërø. Kɑ kömi ngyëny kïdhi yi ngɑnɑni ki ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj. Keløg e pɑ døøg ki ngewø yi wɑ̈n, ngeew wɑ̈g yi ókwërø ki ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́cïb en." 
Leviticus27:28 “Bong dhɑnhø me cuggi dwøøgi gïn-ɑ ɑ́muuje ki cwɑgge, kɑ gø thyeye ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cɑgg ɑ́ dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y, wɑlɑ̀ pwödhø men-ɑ bɑ mee, wɑlɑ̀ mi gøl gen. Ceg cögø ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, pɑ cuggi døøgø ngewø wɑlɑ̀ pɑ gøøm." 
Leviticus27:29 “Keløg dhɑnhø ómuujø kɑ per nɑ̈gø, pɑ cuggi gøømø, ceg ki nɑ̈gø ceth." 
Leviticus27:30 “Ákyeel pyɑ̈rri byel, geki jɑmm-ɑ pidh bënn, bɑ miɑ, kì ri jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì pwödh geki nywøli yenhi bɑ̈gg. Ákyeel pyɑ̈rri bud menɑni bɑ mi kwër." 
Leviticus27:31 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn dwɑddi dwøøgi ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rrɑni, kömi ngyënyy-ɑ ngewii ceg kɑ kïdhø ki ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj." 
Leviticus27:32 Kwɑɑny ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri lɑ̈yy kì yï dhɑnhø yi ókwërø, ying gɑ dyëg wɑlɑ̀ dhög, o ge bɑ mø kwër, ɑ løg mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Leviticus27:33 Ngɑn-ɑ di lɑ̈yye ko wöl wïïdø, ying-ɑ́ men rɑj ɑ wil ki men døj, wɑlɑ̀ men døj ɑ wil ki men rɑj. Keløg e owïïdø lɑ̈yyɑni ryeet ceg-ɑ gwøg ki mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge pɑ cuggi døøgø ngewø yi wïi gen.”" 
Leviticus27:34 Møgɑk bene gen cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy kipe tyëng Isrɑil. 
Numbers1:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb geki Mosɑ̀ kì yij Kemi Kwër kì yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Sinɑy, kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runni bɑng bëëni gen wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Mosɑ̀ ɑ́köbbe kinni," 
Numbers1:2 “Kwɑnu tyëng Isrɑil wuki Aɑron, kwɑn gɑ wɑ̈thi ud, kí wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, gwedu jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn," 
Numbers1:3 Cɑg kì ri ngɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl, ɑ́ ngɑn cuggi kedhi be liny." 
Numbers1:4 Kɑ̈bbí ki jøgdøngø, ɑ́kyel kì wïj kɑl, gɑ møg køny wun, o bëëde ɑ́ jɑngi gøl gen.”" 
Numbers1:5 Møg bene gen jøg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny kì kelli teedø gɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì kipe gwøngɑni. 
Numbers1:6 Kɑl Jɑngi Kɑl Ruben Elidhur wɑ̈d Cedeur Cimeøn Celumeil wɑ̈d Dhuricɑdɑy Yeudɑ̀ Nɑkcön wɑ̈d Aminɑdɑb Isɑkɑr Nethɑnel wɑ̈d Dhuɑr Dhebulun Eliɑb wɑ̈d Kelön Eprɑim Elicɑmɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amiud Mɑnɑsè Gɑmɑliel wɑ̈d Pedɑdhur Ben Yɑmïn Abidɑn wɑ̈d Gideonì Dɑn Akiedher wɑ̈d Amicɑdɑy Aceer Pɑgiel wɑ̈d Okrɑn Gɑd Eliɑsɑp wɑ̈d Deuel Nɑptɑlì Akirɑ̀ wɑ̈d Enɑn 
Numbers1:7 Kɑ jøgɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew cwøl yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron. 
Numbers1:8 Kɑ pödhø bëne cwøl yi gen kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kɑ ji gwed gɑ wɑ̈thi ud, kí wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì. Jøg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́gwed bënn, cɑg kì ri ngɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl," 
Numbers1:9 ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Nyingi ji ɑ́gwed-ɑ yij Ryɑɑng Sinɑy yi Mosɑ̀. 
Numbers1:10 Jøg-ɑ cwøw cɑg kì ri ngɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl, gen ɑ ji-ɑ cuggi kedhi be liny, men kì wïj ød wïye, kì wïj gøl gen, cɑg kì ri gøl Ruben, wɑ̈d Yɑgob nyel-ɑ kɑyø. Kwɑnni gen bënn ɑ́bëëd gɑ." 
Numbers1:11 Wïj Kɑl Kwɑn Ruben 46,500 Cimeøn 59,300 Gɑd 45,650 Yeudɑ̀ 74,600 Isɑkɑr 54,400 Dhebulun 57,400 Eprɑim 40,500 Mɑnɑsè 32,200 Ben Yɑmïn 35,400 Dɑn 62,700 Aceer 41,500 Nɑptɑlì 53,400 Ge bënn 603,550" 
Numbers1:12 Kwɑrri Leebì nuti gwedø ni kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø, 48kipe kɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, 49“Keny-ɑ ógweed jøg-ɑ kedhi be liny, Kwɑrri Leebì ko gwed. 50Cïb gøl Leebì ɑ́ en ɑ korri Kemi Kwër, o ge nyi byelli gen kemɑni ki jɑmme bënn, nenni ge gïn ceth. Kɑ kemmi gen nyi geer gen bɑdhhe. 51Kenyi dɑ̈ɑ̈g ji, Kemi Kwër nyi pɑ̈d-ɑ yi Kwɑrri Leebì, o kenyi gurii piny, bɑ gen ɑ gurii piny ceth. Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑnpɑth ki Kwɑɑr Leebì men-ɑ ókedhi buti gøn. 52Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø guddi gen piny, gɑ byëgg, ngɑn kì byëëg gen kì buti bere. 53De Kwɑrri Leebì guddi gen bɑdhhi Kemi Kwër, o gø kor gen, o bëëd e bong ngɑn kedhi bute kɑ pyëwɑ órënyø ki tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge ryɑ̈gɑ.” 54Codhe, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøg ceth yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Numbers2:1 Cigg møg-ɑ bï ek ɑ́mëgg-ɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Numbers2:2 Kinni kenyi gud Isrɑil ki kɑɑl, nyi guddi ngɑn byëëg gøl gen, kì buti beer gen. Gur kɑɑl Isrɑil e wen-ɑ Kemi Kwër dyëre kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Numbers2:3 Guddi byëëg Yeudɑ̀ piny ki kemme e lwøøb-ɑ ri döng kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Pyëël gen ni men: Yeudɑ̀ Nɑkcön wɑ̈d Aminɑdɑb 74,600 Isɑkɑr Nethɑnel wɑ̈d Dhuɑr 54,400 Dhebulun Eliɑb wɑ̈d Kelön 57,400 Ge bënn 186,400 Byëëg Yeudɑ̀ nyi kwönge ki wɑ̈ddi yöö." 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5  
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7  
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9  
Numbers2:10 Kɑ byëëg Ruben gudde wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kì bɑng jɑgge geki bere, ni men: Ruben Elidhur wɑ̈d Cedeur 46,500 Cimeøn Celumeil wɑ̈d Dhuricɑdɑy 59,300 Gɑd Eliɑsɑp wɑ̈d Deuel 45,650 Ge bënn 151,450 Byëëg Ruben nyi wɑ̈dde yöö kì bɑng byëëg Yeudɑ̀." 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12  
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14  
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16  
Numbers2:17 Bɑng byëggɑni ryeet løg-ɑ yi gøl Leebì e kɑ̈ll-ɑ Kemi Kwër. Lwøøb wɑ̈dh ceth, ni guddi piny, men kì keje ki bere kì bøle." 
Numbers2:18 Kɑ byëëg Eprɑim gudde wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ki bere geki jɑgge kì bøle, ni men: Eprɑim Elicɑmɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amiud 40,500 Mɑnɑsè Gɑmɑliel wɑ̈d Pedɑdhur 32,200 Ben Yɑmïn Abidɑn wɑ̈d Gideonì 35,400 Ge bënn 108,100 Byëëg Eprɑim ɑ bɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g byëgg. Gen ɑ wɑ̈ddi yöö kì bɑng gøl Leebì." 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20  
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22  
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24  
Numbers2:25 Kɑ byëëg Dɑn gudde wɑɑng wuudø, ki bere geki jɑgge kì bøle, ni men: Dɑn Akiedher wɑ̈d Amicɑdɑy 62,700 Aceer Pɑgiel wɑ̈d Okrɑn 41,500 Nɑptɑlì Akirɑ̀ wɑ̈d Enɑn 53,400 Ge bënn 157,600 Byëëg Dɑn ɑ dhwödh kì cyɑ̈n." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27  
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29  
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31  
Numbers2:32 Kɑ ɑ́gweed gen gɑ byëgg ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ 603,350." 
Numbers2:33 De Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kyëddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i gøl Leebì ko gwed, ni kɑ̈lli Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Numbers2:34 Codhe, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøg ceth yi tyëng Isrɑil. Ge ɑ́gud, byëëng ki bere kì bøle. Kenyi wɑ̈ddi gen yöö, men cyɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl gen." 
Numbers3:1 Wɑ̈ddi Aɑron geki Mosɑ̀ ek, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb Mosɑ̀ geki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Kïti Sinɑy." 
Numbers3:2 Aɑron yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Nɑdɑb nyel-ɑ kɑyø, kí Abiu, kí Eliɑdhɑr, ki Ithɑmɑr." 
Numbers3:3 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́kunyi ki møøw dhetun, kɑ ge røny gɑ ókwër," 
Numbers3:4 de Nɑdɑb geki Abiu ɑ́nɑ̈g kì Ryɑɑng Sinɑy kipe kɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mɑc me pɑth ki ɑkwër. Yï gen ɑ́bong-ɑ nywøl. Ábëëd ɑ́ Eliɑdhɑr geki Ithɑmɑr ɑ ɑ́göög gɑ ókwër keny-ɑ ɑ́nud Aɑron. 
Numbers3:5 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers3:6 “Cwööl gøl Leebì, kɑ wiy ge køny gen ókwërø Aɑron." 
Numbers3:7 Gwøg gen gwøng-ɑ dwɑddi kipe Kemi Kwërɑ, o ge køny gen ókwër geki pödhø bëne." 
Numbers3:8 Gen ɑ kor jɑmmi Kemi Kwër, o gen ɑ gwøg kej Isrɑil bëne." 
Numbers3:9 Gwøøg gøl Leebì bɑ kønyi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde kete. 
Numbers3:10 Kwɑny Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde gɑ ókwër, de ke di ngɑn kedhi buti gen, nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑnɑni.”" 
Numbers3:11 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers3:12 “Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ kɑ̈jji kɑyyì bënn. 
Numbers3:13 Mɑ́ kɑyyì bënn ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ kɑyyi Rïp bënn, kɑ kɑyø bëne kwër yi yɑn kì Isrɑil, cɑg kì ri kɑyi dhɑnhø gïti ri kɑyi lɑ̈y, ge bɑ møgɑ bënn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Numbers3:14 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Ryɑɑng Sinɑy kinni," 
Numbers3:15 i gwede Kwɑrri Leebì gɑ wɑ̈thi ud, i gweed cwøw bënn, cɑg kì ri men-ɑ yïe di dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl." 
Numbers3:16 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi Mosɑ̀. 
Numbers3:17 Leebì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Gercön, kí Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí Merɑrì, gen ɑ cungi gɑ gøl Leebì. Gercön yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew. Libnì kí Cimeì. Kɑ̈ɑ̈th yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen. Amrɑm, kí Idhɑr, kí Kibrön, kí Udhiel. O Merɑrì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew. Mɑklì kí Mucì. Bene wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Leebì ɑgɑk; ge cungi kɑ nyingi gen." 
Numbers3:18  
Numbers3:19  
Numbers3:20  
Numbers3:21 Gøl Gercön yïe dɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ryew. Libnì kí Cimeì. 
Numbers3:22 Kwɑnni cwøw kì gølɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́gweed gen, cɑg kì ri men-ɑ yïe di dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew kí miy ɑ́bïj." 
Numbers3:23 Gølɑni nyi gudd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Kemi Kwër. 
Numbers3:24 Jɑngi gøl Gercön bɑ Eliɑsɑp wɑ̈d Lɑel. 
Numbers3:25 Gen ɑ mïdhi Kemi Kwër, ki gëng men-ɑ yiny-ɑ yij, geki men-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, ki gëëng dhø Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers3:26 Kí ógudh-ɑ nyi geer kɑl men-ɑ wen Kemi Kwër geki këli lɑm, kí gëëng dhø kɑl, gen ɑ gøggi gïgɑni bënn." 
Numbers3:27 Gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th dɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ngwen: Amrɑm, kí Idhɑr, kí Kibrön, kí Udhiel." 
Numbers3:28 Kwɑnni cwøw kì gølɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́gweed gen cɑg kì ri men-ɑ yïe di dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́bïkyel. 
Numbers3:29 Gølɑni nyi gudd-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì buti Kemi Kwër. 
Numbers3:30 Jɑngi gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th bɑ Elidhɑpɑn wɑ̈d Udhiel. 
Numbers3:31 Gen ɑ mïdhi Sɑnduug Cigg kí tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ kí teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, kí këli lɑm, geki jɑmm-ɑ nyi göög yi ókwër kì kej kwër, kí gëng mi Kej Kwërdwøng. Gen ɑ gøggi gïgɑni bënn." 
Numbers3:32 Jɑngi pëjji gøl Leebì men-ɑ jɑɑg tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kì kej kwër, bɑ Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d ókwërø Aɑron." 
Numbers3:33 Gøl Merɑrì bɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ryew: Mɑklì ki Mucì 
Numbers3:34 Kwɑnni cwøw kì gølɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́gweed gen cɑg kì ri ngɑn-ɑ yïe di dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïkyel kí miy ɑ́ryew. 
Numbers3:35 Gølɑni nyi gudd-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì buti Kemi Kwër. Jɑngi gøl Merɑrì bɑ Dhuriel wɑ̈d Abikɑil.
