Numbers3:36 Gen ɑ mïdhi mɑ̈ggi Kemi Kwër, o gen ɑ mïdhi löjj, kí rïwwì ki tëddì geki jɑmm-ɑ nyi mɑɑg gen bënn. Gen ɑ gøggi gïgɑni bënn." 
Numbers3:37 Gen ɑ mïdhi löjj, kí tëddì kí pij kí thølli kɑl thyew." 
Numbers3:38 Mosɑ̀, kí Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, nyi guddi gen wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì bøli Kemi Kwër. Gen ɑ gwøg kwër kì kej kwër kipe tyëng Isrɑil, ke di ngɑn pɑth ki ngeti gølɑni me pɑ̈nyi gwøg ki gwøøg kwër, nɑ̈g." 
Numbers3:39 Kwɑnni Kwɑrri Leebì bënn, cɑg kì ri men yïe di dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl, gen ɑ møg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, keny-ɑ ɑ́gweed gen ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers3:40 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑyyi Isrɑil bɑ møgɑ bënn. Gwed kɑyyi Isrɑil bënn, cɑg kì ri men yïe di dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl. De kì bøli ke di kwɑnyɑ gen, yɑ kwɑny-ɑ Kwɑrri Leebì gɑ møgɑ. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Jɑmmi Kwɑrri Leebì kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø thyew gɑ kɑ̈jji kɑyyi jɑmmi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
Numbers3:41  
Numbers3:42 Møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi Mosɑ̀, codhe ɑgwede kɑyy-ɑ cwøw bënn," 
Numbers3:43 cɑg kì ri men-ɑ bɑ dwɑ̈y kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii gïti mɑl, kwɑnni gen bënn ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Numbers3:44 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers3:45 “Thyey Kwɑrri Leebì gɑ møgɑ kì kɑ̈jji kɑyyi Isrɑil møg-ɑ cwøw, kɑ jɑmmi Kwɑrri Leebì thyëyi yɑn gɑ kɑ̈jji kɑyyi jɑmmi Isrɑil." 
Numbers3:46 Mɑ́ kwɑnni kɑyyi Isrɑil pöödh-ɑ kwɑnni Kwɑrri Leebì ki ji miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kí ɑ́dɑ̈g, gøøny møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi kwɑn ki ngyëny." 
Numbers3:47 Nget ɑ́kyel gøny ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́bïj, ngyënyy-ɑ bɑ ɑyïëy kì kej kwër." 
Numbers3:48 Kɑ ngyënyyɑni mëggi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde.” 
Numbers3:49 Codhe kɑ ngyënyyɑni kwɑny yi Mosɑ̀," 
Numbers3:50 gɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïj. 
Numbers3:51 Kɑ gï mëgge Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde. 
Numbers4:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j 
Numbers4:2 i kwɑne gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th Kwɑrri Leebì," 
Numbers4:3 kɑ gwede cwøw-ɑ runni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ cuggi gwøg kì Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers4:4 Gwøøg gen bɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ per gen teg cɑrø. 
Numbers4:5 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, i obëën kɑɑl e odhwödhø, kedhi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde yij Kemi Kwër, kɑ gëng men-ɑ bøli Sɑnduug Cigg gøny gen, kɑ gø kum gen Sɑndungɑni." 
Numbers4:6 Kɑ köme pëdhi gen ki pyën me yöm, kɑ köme pëdhi ki ógødh me bɑ ówɑw, codhe kɑ lødh-ɑ nyi byellii cød kɑ̈jji gen." 
Numbers4:7 Kɑ tɑrɑbeedh byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köme pëdhi gen ki ógødh me bɑ ówɑw, codhe kɑ tɑ̈mmì, kí ópɑ̈nni bɑkur, kí óthɑ̈ggì geki puggi møgi oløg cïb yij ógønhɑni. Bëëde e dɑ gïncɑm me bɑ ópun ceth kì wïj tɑrɑbenhɑni." 
Numbers4:8 Kɑ kömi jɑmmɑni bënn pëdhi gen ki ógødh me kwɑrø, kɑ kum ki pyën me yöm, codhe kɑ lødh-ɑ nyi byellii cød kɑ̈jji gen." 
Numbers4:9 Kɑ ge kɑ̈bbi gen ki ógødh me bɑ ówɑw, kɑ gø kum gen teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, ki gïg-ɑ nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g mɑc, ki ópɑ̈nni ki gïg-ɑ yethi gen di møøw lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈." 
Numbers4:10 Kɑ gø bɑɑn gen yij pyën me yöm geki jɑmmɑni bënn, codhe kɑ gï cïb gen wɑ̈thi lødh-ɑ nyi byellii." 
Numbers4:11 Kɑ këli dhɑb köme pëdhi gen ki ógødh me bɑ ówɑw, kɑ köme pëdhi ki pyën me yöm, codhe kɑ lødh-ɑ nyi byellii cød ree." 
Numbers4:12 Kwɑny gen jɑmm-ɑ nyi göög kì yij Kemi Kwër bënn, kɑ gï bɑɑn gen yij ógødh me bɑ ówɑw, kɑ ge kum gen ki pyën me yöm, codhe kɑ gø cïb gen kömi lødh-ɑ nyi byellii." 
Numbers4:13 Kɑ búr kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì yij këli lɑm, kɑ kömi këlɑni pëdhi ki ógødh ówɑw." 
Numbers4:14 Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ nyi göög bënn kì wïj këli lɑm bøødh wïje, ɑ løg, dikɑ̈bbì, kí kerr, kí ɑtögg, kí óthɑ̈ggì, kí wïddì. Kɑ gï kum gen ki pyën me yöm, codhe kɑ lødh-ɑ nyi byellii cød ree." 
Numbers4:15 Keny-ɑ ódhwödh kɑɑl, kɑ gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th Kwɑrri Leebì bï gen be kwɑnyi jɑmmi kwër bënn, ge rumø ki kumø yi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde. Jɑmmi kwër ko nywɑl yi gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ki cinggi gen, ke nywɑl ge gïn, ge othøø. Bene gwøøg gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑnɑn kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers4:16 Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d ókwërø Aɑron mïdhe Kemi Kwër kí jɑmme bënn, ɑ løg møøw lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, kí bɑkur, kí byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí møøw röny, kí gïg-ɑ yij Kemi Kwër møg-ɑ rumø ki thyëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers4:17 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers4:18 “Wïj ød Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ko wëggi wun pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì yij gøl Leebì," 
Numbers4:19 de nyi nyudhu gen kenyi kedhi gen kej kwër buti jɑmmi kwër, nyi kedhi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde bøli gen, kɑ ngɑn nyi nyudhi gïn-ɑ byelli yi en." 
Numbers4:20 De keløg e dɑ ngeti gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th me kedhi yij Kemi Kwër, kɑ ókwër lidhe ge ócungø ki jɑmmi kwër, ngɑnɑni ceg-ɑ thøø.”" 
Numbers4:21 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Numbers4:22 i kwɑne gøl Gercön Kwɑrri Leebì," 
Numbers4:23 Kɑ gwede tyëng-ɑ runni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ cuggi gwøg kì Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers4:24 Gwøøg gen bɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmì møg: 
Numbers4:25 Kemi Kwër kí ógødhe men-ɑ yiny-ɑ yij, kí ógønh-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, kí pyën-ɑ yöm men-ɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈j köme, geki gëng-ɑ bɑ thïgi dhø Kemɑni," 
Numbers4:26 kí gëng-ɑ bɑ thïgi dhø kɑl men-ɑ yije di Kemi Kwër geki këli lɑm, geki thølli gëngɑni, kí mɑ̈ggi kɑl møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Bene gwøøg gøl Gercön ɑnɑn kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers4:27 Nenni gwøøg gøl Gercön yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron, o bɑ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde ɑ nyudhi gølɑni gwøge ki gïg-ɑ kɑ̈lli yi gen." 
Numbers4:28 Bene gwøøg gøl Gercön ɑnɑn kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kemi Kwër. Ithɑmɑr wɑ̈d ókwërø Aɑron ɑ nenni gwøøg gen. 
Numbers4:29 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, i kwɑne gøl Merɑrì Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Numbers4:30 Kɑ gwede tyëng-ɑ runni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ cuggi gwøg kì Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers4:31 Gwøøg gen bɑ kɑ̈lli löjj, kí rïwwì, ki mɑ̈ggì geki tëddi löjj mø Kemi Kwër," 
Numbers4:32 geki löjj, kí tëddì, kí pij, kí thølli kɑl men-ɑ yije di Kemi Kwër, geki mɑ̈ggi gen. Dhɑnhø nyi mëgg-ɑ gïn-ɑ kɑ̈lle." 
Numbers4:33 Bene gwøøg gøl Merɑrì ɑnɑn kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kemi Kwër. Ithɑmɑr wɑ̈d ókwërø Aɑron ɑ nenni gwøøg gen. 
Numbers4:34 Kɑ kɑ̈lli Kwɑrri Leebì gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, kwɑn yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ki jɑggi Isrɑil, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑ́kwɑn bɑ gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí gøl Gercön kí gøl Merɑrì. Ge ɑ́kwɑn gɑ wɑ̈thi uddi wëëg, cɑg kì ri ngɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ cuggi gwøg kì yij Kemi Kwër, kwɑnni gen bɑ:" 
Numbers4:35 Kɑl Kwɑn Kɑ̈ɑ̈th 2,750 Gercön 2,630 Merɑrì 3,200 Ge bënn 8,580" 
Numbers4:36 Kɑ̈llɑni ɑ́gwed yi Mosɑ̀ bënn, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gøl mëggi gwøge, wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lle." 
Numbers5:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers5:2 “Ceg tyëng Isrɑil kinni, cyeddi gen ngɑn ree di lɑ̈y wɑlɑ̀ wɑɑny, cyeed wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, geki ngɑn lwöy, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn ree di cølø." 
Numbers5:3 Cyeddi ceth, ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø. Cyeddi gen kipe kɑɑl óbwöl yi gen, eni kɑɑl-ɑ yije bëëdɑ kì kelli jiɑ.”" 
Numbers5:4 Møgɑni ɑ́yïëy yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ gï cyeed gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl." 
Numbers5:5 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers5:6 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni keløg e dɑ ngɑn bɑ̈jji ki dhɑnhø wɑɑd gen, e bɑ orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ngɑnɑni bɑ̈jje yode," 
Numbers5:7 tönge orøg men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en. Kɑ gïnɑni cole bëne, kɑ köme kïdhe ki ɑ́kyeel ɑ́bïj mi gïnɑni, kɑ gø mëgge wɑ̈n." 
Numbers5:8 De keløg wïi gïnɑni thøø, o bong wɑɑd gen men culii, mëggu gïnɑni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ mi ókwërø, reb ki gënhi orøg, men-ɑ gøøm bøli orøge yi ókwërø." 
Numbers5:9 Thyew gïn-ɑ muuj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi tyëng Isrɑil, bɑ mi ókwërø men-ɑ ɑ́thërrii gïnɑni." 
Numbers5:10 Ókwërø kwɑnye gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́thyere.” 
Numbers5:11 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers5:12 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, ke di jɑlø me rumø kinni cyëge oyɑ̈bø ki cwøw," 
Numbers5:13 kɑ gø rømme kinni i buddø ki jɑlø, de ókɑnø yi ngɑnɑni, o ngɑnɑni nuti pïïdø ki jɑlø," 
Numbers5:14 wɑlɑ̀ cɑgg jɑlø mɑg yi tyiel kinni i cyëge oyɑ̈bø ki cwøw, e ngɑnɑni pɑ yɑ̈bø ki cwøw kidyër," 
Numbers5:15 kïdhe ngɑnɑni yï ókwërø. Kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈de thyew ki gëëdhi men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le ngɑnɑni, e bɑ kïlø ɑ́kyel mi møng-ɑ búr ceir, de köme ko kunye ki møøw dhetun, wɑlɑ̀ köme ko cïbe ki bɑkur, mɑ́ e bɑ gëëdhi men muuj yi jɑl yije di tyiel kipe yodi dyër." 
Numbers5:16 “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø kɑ cuung kì bøli këli lɑm. 
Numbers5:17 Kɑ ókwërø kɑ̈bbe ki pïi kwër kì yij tɑbø, kɑ kömi pïgɑni kïdhe ki lɑ̈bø me bɑ tør gø kwɑny en kì piny kì yij Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers5:18 Kɑ yëyyi ngɑnɑni pɑ̈d yi ókwërø, kɑ møng-ɑ búr-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l cïb cingge. Kɑ tɑm-ɑ yije di pïi cyën mïdhi yi ókwërɑni ki cingge." 
Numbers5:19 Codhe, o ngɑnɑni köbbi yi ókwërø kinni yïëye ki köngø ki köng-ɑ ókwøb yi ókwërɑni kinni, ‘Keløg yï nuti buddø ki jɑlø megø, cyën-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi pï møg pɑ kedhi rií." 
Numbers5:20 De keløg yï buddø ki jɑlø megø," 
Numbers5:21 yï ógwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï nyi pɑ̈rr-ɑ cyën yi wɑddi wun. Bɑmmí ógöjje bɑbø, kɑ yijí okwödø." 
Numbers5:22 Pï møg kedh-ɑ yijí, o yijí kwöde yi gen, kɑ bɑmmí obɑbø.’ “Kɑ ngɑnɑni lögge kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́yïëy! Yɑ ɑ́yïëy!’" 
Numbers5:23 Codhe, kɑ lɑmmi cyën møgɑni gwed yi ókwërø, kɑ gweddɑni lwøøge yij tɑbi pïi cyën." 
Numbers5:24 Kɑ pïgɑni mëggi ngɑnɑni yi ókwërø, o gï mɑdhe, o thödhi yi pïgɑni ki cyën, kɑ̀ kedhi gen dële, kɑ óyïddø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël." 
Numbers5:25 Codhe, kɑ møng-ɑ búr tyiel kwɑny yi ókwërø kì cinggi ngɑnɑni, kɑ gø thërre Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø cïbe wïj këli lɑm." 
Numbers5:26 Kɑ kɑ̈bbe kì yij cinge ki men rɑ̈b yi en ɑ́ mi pɑɑr kì wïj këli lɑm. Codhe, o pïgɑni mëgge ngɑnɑni, o gï mɑdhe." 
Numbers5:27 Keløg e buddø ki jɑlø megø, göjj-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël yi pïgɑni, kɑ yije okwödø, kɑ bɑmme obɑbø. Nyinge ópɑ̈rr-ɑ cyën yi wɑddi gen." 
Numbers5:28 De keløg yïe bɑ̈r, bong gïn kedhi ree, ceg-ɑ nywølø.”" 
Numbers5:29 Bene gen cigg ɑgɑk kipe ngɑn jɑlgøle mɑg yi tyiel, kɑ orumø i cyëge oyɑ̈bø ki cwøw. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l ngɑndhɑjø kɑ cuung kì bøli këli lɑm, kɑ guög menɑni gwøg yi ókwërø." 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Bong kwöör orøg kì kömi jɑlø, de ngɑndhɑjø keløg e røngø, bɑ en ɑ órɑngi." 
Numbers6:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers6:2 i köbbe tyëng Isrɑil kinni, ke di ngɑn köngi ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø kinni ree thyëye’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Numbers6:3 Ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg wɑlɑ̀ møgi byel, kɑ ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki pïi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ ko nyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ópùni oløg, wɑlɑ̀ nywøli oløg møg-ɑ cer pønø." 
Numbers6:4 Ki kɑɑm ni kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́thyeye ree bëne, ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïn-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri oløg ying-ɑ́ nywøle wɑlɑ̀ pɑ̈ddi kömi nywøle." 
Numbers6:5 Kì kɑɑm-ɑ nuti thumi cyɑ̈nggi thyeye, yëyyi wïje ko pɑ̈nyi ki lyelø, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́thyëye ree Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wiy yëyyi wïje bɑ̈ri gen, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑthyeey Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers6:6 Ki kɑɑm ni kɑɑm-ɑ bëëde ɑ́ ɑthyeey Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ko kedhi buti ngɑnthøø, kipe ree ókedhi yi cølø." 
Numbers6:7 Ree ko wëgge kedhi yi cølø, cɑgg ɑ́ wïye, wɑlɑ̀ meye, wɑlɑ̀ ómen, wɑlɑ̀ nyimen ɑ thøø, ree ko kïdhe ki cøli gen, mɑ́ yëyy-ɑ wïje nyodh-ɑ kinni bɑ ɑthyeey Jwøge." 
Numbers6:8 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëëd gen gɑ ɑthyeyy, ge bɑ ɑthyeyyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers6:9 Keløg dhɑnhø okegø, e bëëd ɑ bute, bɑ kinni ree ɑ́kedhi yi cølø. Kɑ bëëde ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, othumi cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ yëyyi wïje lyel, o dhïwe." 
Numbers6:10 Kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈de kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng ki ɑkùr ɑ́ryew, wɑlɑ̀ ɑkùr ójwɑt ɑ́ryew, kɑ gï mëgge ókwërø kì dhø Kemi Kwër mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers6:11 Gwøøg ɑ́kyel yi ókwërø ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø gwøge ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kɑ guöög dhïwø gwøg yi ókwërø, o ngɑnɑni dhïwe kipe cølø men-ɑ ɑ́kedhi ree. Kɑ yëyyi wïje kwëre kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth." 
Numbers6:12 Kɑ ree cige thyëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, thyey-ɑ ɑ́pöödh pɑ cigi kwɑnø, mɑ́ yëyy-ɑ ɑ́thyeeyii ɑ́ywëdh yi cølø. Kɑ muuje ki órömø rune ɑ́kyel ɑ́ gënhi orøg." 
Numbers6:13 Møg bɑ cigg kipe ɑthyeyy, kenyi thumi bøli kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́thyeey gen. Nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑthyey dhø Kemi Kwër," 
Numbers6:14 kɑ gënhe mëgge Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e bɑ órömø me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, rune ɑ́kyel ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí dyel rømø me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, rune ɑ́kyel ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kí órömø ɑ́kyel me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, ɑ́ gënhi mër." 
Numbers6:15 Muuje ki kɑɑk kì yij ɑ́ridh, e bɑ ɑgwøg kì ri møng-ɑ búr me ree bong kɑmïrɑ̀: ɑbulø mø bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun, kí ɑbulø mø bɑ ɑgïny ki møøw dhetun, kí kunyi møgi oløg." 
Numbers6:16 Kɑ ge thyeer bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ókwërø, kɑ gënhi orøge muuje geki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne," 
Numbers6:17 Kɑ órömø muuje gø mëgge’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gënhi mër geki gïncɑm, kí ɑ́riidh kɑɑk, kí møgi oløg." 
Numbers6:18 Kɑ ɑthyey lyele yëyyi wïje møg-ɑ ɑ́thyeeyii kì dhø Kemi Kwër, kɑ yëyyɑni kwɑnye kɑ gï kïdhe mɑc men-ɑ köme di gënhi mër kì këli lɑm." 
Numbers6:19 Keny-ɑ óthɑɑl órömø, kɑ ocyegø, kwɑɑny bɑde yi ókwërø, kɑ gø cïbe cinggi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thyey, kyeel ki møng-ɑ ɑbulø olwëny ɑ́kyel, ki kɑɑk ɑ́kyel gø kwɑny en ɑ yij ɑ́ridh, e wïj ɑthyey rumø ki lyelø" 
Numbers6:20 Thërri gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ókwërø, ge bɑ mø kwër møg kwɑny yi ókwërø, reb ki ɑ́ngɑdø, kí rɑ̈m ɑ nyi bëëdø ceth gɑ mø ókwërø kì yij kwöng. Codhe cyee, o ɑthyey cugge mɑdh ki møgi oløg." 
Numbers6:21 Møgɑk bene gen ciggi thyeyi dhɑnhø, de keløg e köngø ki köngø megø thyew kì kömi köngi thyeyø, muuje gënhi wïj köngɑni ceth kyeel ki mi thyeyø." 
Numbers6:22 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers6:23 i köbbe Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde, kinni kenyi kwëng gen tyëng Isrɑil nyi kööb gen kinni," 
Numbers6:24 “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ yï mïdhe. 
Numbers6:25 Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidøøj, kɑ yï thödhe ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
Numbers6:26 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thɑ̈wwe óluge yïn, kɑ yï nënge ki mër." 
Numbers6:27 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keløg nyingɑ ótöng yi gen gɑ kwëng kì kömi Isrɑil ni menɑni, tyëng Isrɑil ógyëdh yi yɑn.”" 
Numbers7:1 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́rum Mosɑ̀ ki cwöödhi kemi kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny, gø ɑ́gïïnye ki møøw dhetun geki jɑmme bënn, kí jɑmmi këli lɑm, kɑ gï thyeye bënn." 
Numbers7:2 Codhe, kɑ jø wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑgg kì Isrɑil, jøg-ɑ ɑ́cungi kì kömi kwɑni ji," 
Numbers7:3 ókɑ̈nø ki gïg muuj gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yɑ̈th-ɑ nyi pyejji gɑ ɑ́bïkyel, kí wɑ̈dhh-ɑ pyejji gen gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Jɑgg ɑ́ryew kì kömi yɑ̈y ɑ́kyel, o jɑgø ɑ́muuj-ɑ wɑdh ɑ́kyel." 
Numbers7:4 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers7:5 “Kwɑny gïgɑni kipe gwøng-ɑ nyi gwøg kì Kemi Kwër. Mëggí gen Kwɑrri Leebì, yï ködd-ɑ kömi gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen.”" 
Numbers7:6 Codhe, kɑ wɑ̈dhh geki yɑ̈ɑ̈th mëggi Kwɑrri Leebì yi Mosɑ̀." 
Numbers7:7 Gøl Gercön ɑ́mëgge yɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ryew, kí wɑ̈dhh ɑ́ngwen." 
Numbers7:8 Kɑ gøl Merɑrì wɑ̈d Aɑron mëgge yɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ngwen kí wɑ̈dhh ɑ́bïdɑ̈g 
Numbers7:9 De gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th nuti nëngø yi Mosɑ̀ ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th wɑlɑ̀ wɑ̈dhh, mɑ́ jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ mïdhi yi gen nyi byel ɑ wɑ̈thi tøg." 
Numbers7:10 Pëjjɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ni thyew ki gïg-ɑ thyeey këli lɑm. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi jɑmmɑni bøli këli lɑm," 
Numbers7:11 ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí gen kinni, ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, bɑ jɑgø ɑ́kyel ɑ nyi muujø kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel ki jɑmme kì këli lɑm.”" 
Numbers8:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers8:2 “Köbbí Aɑron kinni keny-ɑ ócïbe lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ møg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́bïryew wɑ̈thi tegg, cïbe gïn e cɑɑr mɑc mënyy-ɑ bøli gen.”" 
Numbers8:3 Codhe kɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ cïb yi Aɑron ge nenn-ɑ bøli tegg. 
Numbers8:4 Teggɑni bɑ ɑtøg gɑ dhɑb, cɑg kì piny gïti mɑl, ni men-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers8:5 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers8:6 “Kïdhí Kwɑrri Leebì wɑ̈yi gen, dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ge gwøøg o ge bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen." 
Numbers8:7 Gwøg gen ki yöö men: Wïddí ri gen ki pï, kɑ ge köbbí lyel gen yëyy-ɑ dëlli gen bënn, kí wɑ̈thi gen, kɑ ógudhi gen lwøg gen, o bongii gïnrɑj kì ri gen kipe kwër." 
Numbers8:8 Codhe kɑ ge kɑ̈ni gen ki wɑdh ówöb, ki møng-ɑ búr me bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki wɑdh ówöb megø me gwøg ɑ́ gënhi orøg." 
Numbers8:9 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil cwööl bënn, kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì cuung kì dhø Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers8:10 Cïb tyëng Isrɑil cinggi gen wɑ̈thi Kwɑrri Leebì," 
Numbers8:11 kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì thyëyi yɑn yi Aɑron, mëggi gen yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil, o ge gwøg gen gwøgɑ." 
Numbers8:12 Codhe kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì cinggi gen cïb gen wɑ̈thi wɑ̈dhhɑni ryeet, ɑ́kyel muuj ɑ́ gënhi orøg, o men-ɑ kyeelø bɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, o ge gwøøgɑ Kwɑrri Leebì, o gen dhïwi gen." 
Numbers8:13 “Thyëyi Kwɑrri Leebì yɑn, kɑ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde cïb gɑ jɑggi gen." 
Numbers8:14 Kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kwɑrri Leebì wɑ̈g kì kelli Isrɑil gɑ møgɑ. 
Numbers8:15 Keny-ɑ órum Kwɑrri Leebì ki gwøgø kɑ ge thyey, bene en cyee ɑ ógöög gen ge myër ki gwøg kì Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers8:16 Ge ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn gɑ kɑ̈jji kɑyyi Isrɑil bënn, o ge ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn gɑ møgɑ." 
Numbers8:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ kɑyyì bënn kì Rïp, kɑyyi Isrɑil bënn ɑ́kwërɑ gɑ møgɑ geki kɑyyi jɑmmi gen bënn." 
Numbers8:18 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì kwɑny yi yɑn gɑ kɑ̈jji kɑyyi Isrɑil bënn. 
Numbers8:19 Kwɑrri Leebì mëggɑ’ Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde keny-ɑ órum gen ki mëggi yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil, o ge göög gen kì Kemi Kwër, ge gwøg-ɑ bøli tyëng Isrɑil, kipe ge ócɑy yi yɑn keny-ɑ ónyïngi gen buti kej kwër.”" 
Numbers8:20 Codhe kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì thyey yi Mosɑ̀ ki Aɑron geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers8:21 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì ri gen kwër gen, o bëëd e bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen, kɑ ógudhi gen lwøg gen, kɑ ge thyey yi Aɑron gï mëgge’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ gï gwøge thyew ki guöög dhïwø." 
Numbers8:22 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe Kwɑrri Leebì, ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑgöög Kwɑrri Leebì ge myër ki gwøg kì Kemi Kwër, ge jɑɑg-ɑ yi Aɑron geki wɑ̈dde." 
Numbers8:23 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers8:24 “Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ runni gen ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, wiy göög gen kì Kemi Kwërɑ." 
Numbers8:25 O ngɑn runne wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïye ki gwøg. 
Numbers8:26 De ócuggø kønyi wɑdde ki kori Kemi Kwër, e ceg-ɑ kunyø yøw. Bene kër-ɑ nyi thödhi Kwɑrri Leebì ki gwøøg gen ɑnɑn.”" 
Numbers9:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Ryɑɑng Sinɑy, kì kyeel dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runni tyëng Isrɑil ge rum bëën wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑkööbe kinni," 
Numbers9:2 “Wiy tyëng Isrɑil nyi göög gen ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh kì bøli keje ceth. 
Numbers9:3 Nyi gwøg ge gøn kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, kì dwɑ̈ɑ̈n, kì thyënhø, kɑ nyi gwøg ceth kì bøli keje, ki kwëre bëne.”" 
Numbers9:4 Codhe kɑ teedø köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni mïdhi gen Kwëër Ákɑɑdh. 
Numbers9:5 Kɑ gø gwøg gen ceth kì thyënhø, kì cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈y gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kì Ryɑɑng Sinɑy. Codhe, kɑ gïgɑni bënn gwøg yi teedø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers9:6 De ɑ́dɑ ji møøgø mø ri gen di cølø cyɑ̈ngɑni, ge nywɑ̈ddø ki ngɑnthøø, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ göögø ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, ɑkedhi gen yï Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron," 
Numbers9:7 kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́nywɑ̈ddi ki ngɑnthøø, ri wøn dɑ cølø, wø mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ gwøg ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh wø keti wøn kì kelli Isrɑil?”" 
Numbers9:8 Aköbbi gen yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Cungi wun, wiy yɑ lïngɑ møg-ɑ ókwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Numbers9:9 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers9:10 i köbbe tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø dhuki megø me ree di cølø, wɑlɑ̀ ying-ɑ be wel kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, o pyëwe tyer-ɑ gwøgi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh," 
Numbers9:11 gwøge kwërɑni kì ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì thyënhø, cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen. Gwøge gøn ki olwëny, kí lùm-ɑ kej." 
Numbers9:12 Ko di kwï gïncɑm me wiy, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ dhuki e nud. Kɑ ko di cöngi nyɑ órömɑni me tor. Gwøøg Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ni kɑ ɑ́cïgɑ ceth." 
Numbers9:13 De keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø me dhïw, o pɑ ying be wel, kɑ ocögø e pɑ göögø ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, pɑ cigi kwɑɑn kelli jiɑ, mɑ́ yɑ nuti theeg en kì bøli kej theg. Ceg-ɑ orɑng ceth kì bɑng orøge." 
Numbers9:14 “Keløg e dɑ wëdhh mø bëëdø kì kelli wun, o ge dwɑdd-ɑ gwøg ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, gwøg ge gøn ceth ki kwönge geki cigge. Cigg ɑ́kyel ceth ɑ kömi ji bënn, tyëng pödhø geki wëdhh.”" 
Numbers9:15 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ nyi cwöödh Kemi Kwër piny, pøølø nyii bëënø, kɑ gø nyi kume. Obëën wɑ̈r, kɑ pøølɑni ree nyi løge mɑc." 
Numbers9:16  
Numbers9:17 Kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈ny pøølø, tyëng Isrɑil kɑɑl nyi ceg kɑ puthø yi gen, o kenyi cungi pøølø kɑ bï-ɑ piny, en ɑ nyi gud gen ki kɑɑl." 
Numbers9:18 Puthi kɑɑl nyi kwøb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o gure piny nyi kwøb-ɑ yi en thyew. Kì kɑɑm-ɑ bëëd pøølø nud kì kömi Kemi Kwër, kɑɑl nyi bëëd ɑ keje." 
Numbers9:19 Kenyi bëëd pøølø kì kömi Kemi Kwër ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, tyëng Isrɑil nyi ceg-ɑ bëëdø kì kenyɑni, ge pɑ nyi dhwödh, dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ nyi pyem yi gen." 
Numbers9:20 Tyel møøgø, pøølø nyii bëëdø kɑ cyɑ̈ng mø nøg, de ke jwɑne kedhø, ge ceg-ɑ kedhø, ke bëëde ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr, ge ceg-ɑ bëëdø ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers9:21 Tyel møøgø dɑ kɑ̀ bëëd pøølø cɑg kì thyënhø gïti mwøl, o ge nyi ceg-ɑ dhwödhø kì mwølɑni ceth. Wɑlɑ̀ keløg e obëëdø cɑg kì mwøl gïti böörø, bøli keny-ɑ dhwödhe ceth, ge ceg-ɑ dhwödhø." 
Numbers9:22 Cɑgg pøølɑni bëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew, wɑlɑ̀ ki dwɑ̈y, wɑlɑ̀ ki run, tyëng Isrɑil ceg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni ceth, ge pɑ dhwödh e pøølø nud kì kömi Kemi Kwër, de keny-ɑ ódhwödh pøølø ceth, ge ceg-ɑ dhwödhø." 
Numbers9:23 Guri kɑɑl kwøb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o puthi kɑɑl kwøb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïngi yi gen, ni kɑ ɑ́cïgi gen Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers10:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers10:2 “Thɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki kɑ̈ngi ɑ́tegø ɑ́ryew møg nyi cwøøl ji kej ɑ́kyel, kenyi puth kɑɑl." 
Numbers10:3 Kenyi koodh kɑ̈ngɑni ryeet, nyi bï pödhø bëne yïí kì dhø Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers10:4 O keny-ɑ ókoodh ɑ́kyel, nyi bï jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil yïí keti gen." 
Numbers10:5 Keny-ɑ ókoodh kɑng ki köögø, dhwödh byëng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Numbers10:6 Ocigi kɑng kodhø ki köögø, kɑ byëng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl dhwödhe. Kodhi kɑng ki köögø cwɑgge ongøllø ge ceggø, wɑng-ɑ dhwödhø." 
Numbers10:7 De keny-ɑ ódwɑddi pödhø cwølø, nyi koodh kɑng cwɑgge pɑ ngølli ge ceggø." 
Numbers10:8 Nyi koodh kɑ̈ngì yi wɑ̈ddi Aɑron, ɑ løg ókwër. “Mïdhi møg gɑ kwöng kì yethi rïjj bënn." 
Numbers10:9 Keny-ɑ ókedhu be liny kì yij piny wun, wu nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg guud nyingi wun, kodh wun kɑ̈ngì, o wu óyiel yi yɑn kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers10:10 Nyi koodh kɑ̈ngì thyew kì cyɑ̈nggi medi pëëth kì ri pɑ̈ri dwɑ̈y geki cyɑ̈nggi kwër møg-ɑ kyeelø. Nyi koodh kɑ̈ngì kenyi thyer wun gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki gënhi mër mø wun. O wu køny yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Numbers10:11 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryeew cyɑ̈nggi ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runn, kì bɑng bëëni tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp, pøølø ɑ́dhwödh kì kömi Kemi Kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Numbers10:12 kɑ tyëng Isrɑil odhwödhø kì Ryɑɑng Sinɑy. Kɑ pøølɑni pëgg-ɑ piny kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Pɑrɑn. 
Numbers10:13 Dhwönh-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh gen kì kenyɑni bene en dhwönh-ɑ mɑl, ge ɑ́dhwödh ge köbb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge pyejj-ɑ yi Mosɑ̀." 
Numbers10:14 Byëëg Yeudɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́wɑd mɑl, e pyejj-ɑ yi jɑngi gen, Nɑkcön wɑ̈d Aminɑdɑb." 
Numbers10:15 Nethɑnel wɑ̈d Dhuɑr ɑ pyejji gøl Isɑkɑr. 
Numbers10:16 O Eliɑb wɑ̈d Kelön ɑ pyejji gøl Dhebulun. 
Numbers10:17 Codhe, o Kemi Kwër pɑ̈d. Orume, o gøl Gercön geki gøl Merɑrì, kɑ̈ll-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli Kemi Kwër wɑ̈ddi gen yöö." 
Numbers10:18 Codhe, o bɑng gen løg yi byëëg Ruben ge pyejj-ɑ yi jɑngi gen Elidhur wɑ̈d Cedeur." 
Numbers10:19 Celumeil wɑ̈d Dhuricɑdɑy ɑ pyejji gøl Cimeøn. 
Numbers10:20 O Eliɑsɑp wɑ̈d Deuel ɑ pyejji gøl Gɑd. 
Numbers10:21 Codhe, o gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th Kwɑɑr Leebì, ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli jɑmmi kwër løge bɑng gen. Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi gen kɑɑl-ɑ dɑ̈gi, Kemi Kwër yuud yi gen e rumø ki cwöödh piny." 
Numbers10:22 Codhe, o bɑng gen løg yi byëëg Eprɑim, ge pyejj-ɑ yi jɑngi gen Elicɑmɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amiud." 
Numbers10:23 Gɑmɑliel wɑ̈d Pedɑdhur ɑ pyejji gøl Mɑnɑsè," 
Numbers10:24 O Abidɑn wɑ̈d Gideonì ɑ pyejji gøl Ben Yɑmïn. 
Numbers10:25 Byëëg Dɑn ɑ dhwödh kì cyɑ̈n, o gen ɑ korri ngɑ̈thi ji bënn, ge pyejj-ɑ yi jɑngi gen, Akiedher wɑ̈d Amicɑdɑy." 
Numbers10:26 Pɑgiel wɑ̈d Okrɑn ɑ pyejji gøl Aceer," 
Numbers10:27 O Akirɑ̀ wɑ̈d Enɑn ɑ pyejji gøl Nɑptɑlì. 
Numbers10:28 Bene kër-ɑ nyi lwøøb dhwödhi kɑɑl Isrɑil ɑnɑn, nyi dhwödh ɑ́ byëg kì bɑng byëng-ɑ kyeelø" 
Numbers10:29 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ øre ómï cyëge, Kobɑb wɑ̈d Yethrø jɑl Midyɑn köbbe kinni, “Wø ceg-ɑ cɑ̈gø kedhi piny men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gø ómëgge wøn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni Isrɑil ógwøg en kɑ ódönyø, bïí kedh wɑ, døøjø menɑni ónywɑg yi wɑ.”" 
Numbers10:30 Kɑ Kobɑb ólöggø kinni, “Pɑth, yɑ døøg-ɑ piny wøn.”" 
Numbers10:31 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wø ko wiy piny, mɑ́ kɑ̈jj-ɑ døøj ki guddø kì yij ryɑng ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn. Wiy yï óbëëd yïn ɑ́ kej wɑng kì yï wøn." 
Numbers10:32 Keløg yï ócyɑ̈dhi ki wøn, gïgdøj bënn møg-ɑ ógëdhi wøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ceg kɑ nywɑgø yi wɑ ceth.”" 
Numbers10:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh teedø kì Sinɑy, kïti kwër, ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tyëd ɑ mɑl bøli gen, kipe yɑ̈bbi gen ki kej ywömø." 
Numbers10:34 Kenyi dhwödh gen kì kɑɑl ge dɑ̈g-ɑ kɑɑl megø, ge nyi cyɑ̈dhi kì dicɑ̈ng ge ógëngø yi pøøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers10:35 Kenyi cɑ̈gi Sɑnduug Cigg ki dhwödhø, Mosɑ̀ nyi ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Dhwöödh yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cyeddí tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ wiy tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn rengi gen!”" 
Numbers10:36 O kenyi cunge, nyi ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dwöög yï tyëng Isrɑil, tyëng-ɑ kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp mø gïïr cɑrø.”" 
Numbers11:1 Kɑ teedø ócɑ̈gø ki køør kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki køør mɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwe. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑöne kömi gen ki mɑc, kɑ mɑc ceg-ɑ ì twɑ̈ɑ̈g, kɑ tøg kɑɑl rɑ̈be kì tung ɑ́kyel." 
Numbers11:2 Kɑ teedø ywøøg-ɑ kö Mosɑ̀. Akwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ mɑc othøø." 
Numbers11:3 Codhe, ɑcɑɑg kenyɑni ɑ́ Tɑbeerɑ̀, ɑ wɑngi kinni mɑɑc Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lyeel ri gen." 
Numbers11:4 Ádɑ tyëngpɑth mø cyɑ̈dhi ki tyëng Isrɑil. Tyëngɑni ɑ́gööny ce ge dwɑdd-ɑ cɑm ki rïngø, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil óywöngø thyew kinni, “Á men ɑ óthödhi wøn ki rïngø men cɑm?" 
Numbers11:5 Kì Rïp, wø ɑ́bëëd wø ceg-ɑ cɑm ki rij ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii yi wøn, e rij pɑ ceg ki ngewø, kí ɑ́wɑjø men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ ɑjuur, kí ócøyø, kí nɑ̈ɑ̈ybɑsɑl ɑ nyi mïni yømi gïncɑm, kí bɑsɑl, kí bɑsɑl tuum." 
Numbers11:6 De ɑnɑn dëlli wøn ɑ́nyönhi yi bongi gïjø me cɑm, den-ɑ́ mɑnɑ̀ ɑ rïïj e ocɑmø yethi cyɑ̈ng!”" 
Numbers11:7 (Mɑnɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd nyinge thønhø, kïde bɑ ɑyɑw." 
Numbers11:8 Nyi dëëm-ɑ bɑdhhi kɑɑl kì wɑ̈r kyeel geki thöjj. O teedø nyi kedhi gen be gwenii kì mwøl, o guur yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ wöl yi gen kì pɑny, o gööge ki búr. Codhe o dwøl kì dɑg, wɑlɑ̀ nyöm o gwøg e bɑ ɑbulø. Kɑ̀ belii nɑ møng-ɑ ɑbulø ki møøw dhetun.)" 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 Kɑ køør teedø bëne lïngi yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ̀ köör gen kì dhøggi kemmi gen. Ábëëd e ceg-ɑ kïïmø, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́bëëd e rɑɑj ki gen." 
Numbers11:11 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbe kinni, “Yɑde ɑ göggí yɑn ki gïnrɑj ni men? Yïde ɑ rɑj pyëwí ki yɑn? Gede ji møg bënn ɑ ɑ́wëggí gen jɑɑgø yi yɑn?" 
Numbers11:12 Pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j gen, wɑlɑ̀ pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́nywøl gen! Yɑde ɑ gwøøg yɑn yɑ nɑ 'mïdhi me kwööm gen piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí kweyyi gen yi yïn?" 
Numbers11:13 Yɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki rïngø men rømi ri ji møg? Ge jud-ɑ yɑn ki kwøb kinni, ‘Nëngí wøn ki rïngø men cɑm yi wøn.’" 
Numbers11:14 Ji møg pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi yɑn ki mïdhø yɑ ketɑ, menɑni teeg ki kiperɑ!" 
Numbers11:15 Keløg ɑ́ yuu-ɑ mïdhí yɑn èn, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn, kɑ yɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, yɑ ko wëggí nenni orɑng-ɑ rɑngɑ.”" 
Numbers11:16 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cwöddí ki jøgdøngi Isrɑil mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, jøg mø bɑ pëjjì, mø wør yi teedø. Kɑ wu cungi wun ki gen kì bøli Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers11:17 Yɑ óbï kɑ yɑ okööbø ki yïn kì kenyɑni. Yɑ ókɑ̈bbi kì ri wëy-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn ki men kïdhɑ ri gen, o yï ókøny yi gen ki mïdhi ji, kipe gwøngɑni ópɑ̈dhi kömí yï ketí." 
Numbers11:18 Kɑ teedø köbbí kinni, ‘Kwër wun ri wun kipe dhuki wu ócyɑ̈mø ki rïngø, mɑ́ køør wun ɑ́lïngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ̀ kømmu kinni, ‘Wø dwɑdd-ɑ rïngø.’ Kí kinni, ‘Rïp døøj kibøli keny.’ Anɑn wu óthödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rïngø men cɑm yi wun, o ceg kɑ cɑmø yi wun ceth." 
Numbers11:19 Pɑ cɑm yi wun kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew, wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïj, wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø, wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew," 
Numbers11:20 de wu ócyɑ̈mø ki dwɑ̈y gïti keny-ɑ ólɑ̈mmi pëthi wun yi rïngø. Møgɑni ócwöb, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun ɑ́bɑny yi wun, kɑ wu oköörø kinni i bɑ per ngø ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp.’ ”" 
Numbers11:21 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ cyɑ̈dhi kɑ yɑy me kwɑnne bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïkyel, o yï okööbø ce ge óthödhi yi yïn ki rïngø men tyëg dwɑ̈y gø ocɑmø yi gen?" 
Numbers11:22 Bɑ dɑɑg dhög ki dɑɑg dyëg ɑ nɑ̈ggí gen, ɑ óyɑ̈ng gen? Wɑlɑ̀ rijji nɑm bënn ɑ cungí gen, ɑ óyɑ̈ng gen?”" 
Numbers11:23 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Tegɑ dɑ cöge? Ólidh yi yïn ɑnɑn kinni møg-ɑ kømmɑ bɑ dyër, wɑlɑ̀ pɑth ki dyër!”" 
Numbers11:24 Codhe, ɑkedh Mosɑ̀, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbe teedø. Akɑ̈bbe ki jøgdøngi pödhø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kɑ gï cuunge kì bɑdhhi Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers11:25 Codhe, ɑbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny kì yij pøølø, ɑkööbe geki Mosɑ̀. Akɑ̈bbe kì ri wëy-ɑ ɑ́mëgge Mosɑ̀, kɑ gø kïdhe ri jøgɑni gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew. Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi wëyɑni ri gen, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø ki ryeerø ni kenyi göög tyëngtöng, de ge nuti mɑ̈gø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r ge óryeerø." 
Numbers11:26 Jøg ɑ́ryew kì kelli pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryewɑni dööngø kì kɑɑl, ge nuti kedhi dhø Kemi Kwër, nyingi gen bɑ Eldɑd kí Medɑd. Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kedhi ri gen ge ying-ɑ kɑɑl, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø ki ryeerø ni tyëngtöng." 
Numbers11:27 Arengi nyelthinh megø, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbe kinni, “Eldɑd kí Medɑd ceg-ɑ töng kì kɑɑl.”" 
Numbers11:28 Kɑ Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, nyel-ɑ ɑ́wöni e thiinh e nyi køny-ɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Kyëddí gen jɑldwøng!”" 
Numbers11:29 Aköbbii yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Yï mɑg yi tyiel kɑ perɑ? Kì yïɑ, jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ce di bëëd gɑ tyëngtöng bënn, e wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cïb en ri gen.”" 
Numbers11:30 Codhe, ɑdøøg Mosɑ̀ kɑɑl geki jøgdøngɑni." 
Numbers11:31 Kɑ ɑkɑrø ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki yømø mɑ ɑ́köölii kì nɑɑm omelø, e pɑ̈rri e cyɑ̈gi ki piny ki sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Kɑ pëgg-ɑ bɑdhhi kɑɑl, kì ki kɑɑm me bɑ kïlomïtïr mɑ kwɑnn kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Numbers11:32 Codhe, kɑ teedø tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ngɑni kí wɑ̈r, kí dhuki bëne, ge omɑ̈gø ki ɑkɑrø, bong ngɑn me møge nøg kibøli kïllì ɑ́lïp. Kɑ gï mɑ̈j gen kì tøggi kɑɑl." 
Numbers11:33 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd teedø ge ocyɑ̈mø ki rïngø, o rïngø ceg-ɑ twɑ̈lø, kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j órënyø ki gen, kɑ gï göjje yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g me dwøng." 
Numbers11:34 Kenyɑni ɑ́cɑg ɑ́ Kibröt Atɑɑbɑ̀, ɑ wɑngi rörri döngi pëëth, mɑ́ kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́koony tyëng-ɑ́ pëthi gen ɑ́døngi." 
Numbers11:35 Codhe, ɑdhwödh teedø kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge gudd-ɑ Adheröth." 
Numbers12:1 Kɑ Miryɑm geki Aɑron okööbø ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Mosɑ̀, kipe kɑ ɑ́nyöme ki nyɑɑr Kuc." 
Numbers12:2 Ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb ɑ ri Mosɑ̀ kete? Nuti kööbø kì riee thyew?” Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j olïngø." 
Numbers12:3 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mölø kibøli dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny. 
Numbers12:4 Apɑ̈ɑ̈y Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ki Miryɑm piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bïu dhø Kemi Kwër wun ɑ́ ɑ́dɑ̈g.” Kɑ ge ókedhø gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Numbers12:5 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ piny e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kì yij lööj pøølø, kɑ pøølɑni ócungø kì dhø Kemi Kwër, kɑ ócwöddø kinni, “Aɑron! Miryɑm!” Kɑ ge nyeg-ɑ bøli gen ryeet." 
Numbers12:6 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lïngu kwøbbɑ! Ke di tyëngtöng kì kelli wun, riɑ nyi nyudhɑ’ gen kɑ cyɑ̈rø. Wø nyi kööbø kɑ gen kì yethi lɑ̈g." 
Numbers12:7 Pɑ pɑ̈r ki bɑ̈ngɑ Mosɑ̀, ɑ gølɑ bëne, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil cïb yɑn cinge." 
Numbers12:8 Wø nyi kööbø wø lømm-ɑ dhøggi wøn, wøki en, ki kwøbb-ɑ ɑcony. Kɑ bëëdɑ nyi lidhe. Wude ɑ pɑ böggi wun ki kwøb kì ri bɑ̈ngɑ Mosɑ̀ ki kwøb mø rijjø?”" 
Numbers12:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd pyëwe rɑɑj ki gen ryeet, kɑ kì ri dhwönhe ceth," 
Numbers12:10 e pøølø odhwödhø kì Kemi Kwër, kɑ dëël Miryɑm ceg-ɑ ì tɑr ni ɑ́piy, dële ɑ́göög ki wɑɑny. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïïdh Aɑron yï Miryɑm, kɑ gø lidhe dële göögø ki wɑɑny," 
Numbers12:11 ɑköbbe Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wø ko cɑɑy wuö ki gïn ni men, mɑ́ bɑ̈jjø menɑni ɑ́gwøg yi wøn kɑ nøgi wɑ̈thi wøn." 
Numbers12:12 Ko wëggí bëëdø ni ngɑnthøø, men-ɑ ónywølø yi meye budi dële ree cɑɑm en.”" 
Numbers12:13 Aywøøg Mosɑ̀ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøg ngɑnɑni o dönye!”" 
Numbers12:14 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Keløg nyinge di nguddi yi wïye ki lɑ́ɑ̀w, ɑyɑ̈rɑni di kɑ̈lle kì köme ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. Bëëde kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. Kɑ døøge kɑɑl keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈ngɑni.”" 
Numbers12:15 Amïdhi Miryɑm kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kɑ teedø ocögø ge pɑ dhwödh gïti keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Miryɑm kɑɑl." 
Numbers12:16 Codhe, ɑdhwödh gen kì Adheröth, kɑ ge gudd-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈l Pɑrɑn." 
Numbers13:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers13:2 “Öd ki ji møg lyeew piny Kɑnɑɑn, piny-ɑ mëggɑ tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ̈bbí ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì wïj kɑl ɑ́ jɑgø men cungi ɑ́ wïj gøl gen.”" 
Numbers13:3 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi Mosɑ̀ ceth, ɑ́öd ki lyëwwì kì Pɑrɑn, pëjjɑni ek:" 
Numbers13:4 Wïj kɑl Pëëji Ruben Cemuɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhekur Cimeøn Cɑpɑt wɑ̈d Örì Yeudɑ̀ Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ Isɑkɑr Igɑl wɑ̈d Yosep Eprɑim Öciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nun Ben Yɑmïn Pɑltì wɑ̈d Rɑpu Dhebulun Gɑdiel wɑ̈d Södì Mɑnɑsè Gɑdì wɑ̈d Susì Dɑn Amiel wɑ̈d Gemɑlì Aceer Sethur wɑ̈d Mikɑil Nɑptɑlì Nɑbì wɑ̈d Bɑpsì Gɑd Geuel wɑ̈d Mɑkì 
Numbers13:5  
Numbers13:6  
Numbers13:7  
Numbers13:8  
Numbers13:9  
Numbers13:10  
Numbers13:11  
Numbers13:12  
Numbers13:13  
Numbers13:14  
Numbers13:15  
Numbers13:16 Bene gen nyingi jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Mosɑ̀ be lyewwi piny ɑgɑk. Kɑ nyingi Öciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nun, wil yi Mosɑ̀ gɑ Jöcwø." 
Numbers13:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ör gen be lyeewi piny Kɑnɑɑn yi Mosɑ̀, gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Kɑ̈l wun wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kɑ wu kedhu myërri kelli kïttì." 
Numbers13:18 Kɑ pinyɑni lidh wun mɑ bëëde kidï, kí mɑ bëëd tyëng-ɑ yije nyødh wɑlɑ̀ ge teg, kí mɑ nøg gen, kí mɑ ngeeny gen." 
Numbers13:19 Mɑ døøj piny-ɑ bëëd yi gen wɑlɑ̀ rɑɑj, kí mɑ bëëd kɑ̈ddi gen bɑ kemmì, wɑlɑ̀ ɑger ki dör." 
Numbers13:20 Kí mɑ bëëd lɑ̈mɑni med wɑlɑ̀ pɑ med. Kí mɑ di yije thïm wɑlɑ̀ bong gøn. Kɑ wu kɑ̈ni wun ki jɑmm-ɑ nyi cyeg kì pinyɑni.” Ábëëd ɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ nyi cɑ̈gi oløg ki cyegø. 
Numbers13:21 Codhe, ɑkedh gen ge lyeww-ɑ piny, cɑg kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Dhin gïti Reköb kì yuu-ɑ töngi Amɑth." 
Numbers13:22 Kɑ ge kɑ̈l-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl møti, ɑtöngi gen Kibrön. Akimɑn, kí Cecɑy, kí Telmɑ̀; bɑ kwɑrri Anɑk ɑ́bëëd ɑ kunɑni. Kibrön en ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki gerø, O Kɑɑl Dhoɑn kì Rïp ɑ́ger-ɑ bɑnge e bëëdø ki runn ɑ́bïryew." 
Numbers13:23 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Töör Acköl, kɑ ge óngudø kì kunɑni ki bɑɑd oløg me ree di cyɑ̈l, cyɑ̈lɑni ɑ́bëëd e peeg cɑrø, ɑ́byelli yi jøg ɑ́ryew kɑ lodh kì kɑɑm gen. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d thyew ki nywøli romɑn ki nywøli ólɑm." 
Numbers13:24 Törɑni ɑ́cɑg ɑ́ Töör Acköl, ɑ wɑngi Töör Cyɑ̈l, kipe cyɑ̈ɑ̈l oløg men-ɑ ɑ́ngøl yi jø Isrɑil kì kenyɑni." 
Numbers13:25 Adwöög lyëwwì keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki lyewwi pinyɑni ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. 
Numbers13:26 Ge ɑ́dwöög yï Mosɑ̀ kí Aɑron geki gøl Isrɑil bëne, kì Gɑdic kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Pɑrɑn. Kɑ gï dwöggi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen, ɑnyodh gen nywøli yenh-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen." 
Numbers13:27 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi gen kinni “Pinyɑni ɑ́lyewwi yi wøn, kɑ yod yi wøn ɑ́ piny kɑ̈r, me yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, o nywøli yenh-ɑ yije ek." 
Numbers13:28 De ji-ɑ yije teg, o kɑ̈ddi gen døngø ge thøø yi gerø ki dör. Gïn-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø, bɑ kinni kwɑrri Anɑk ɑ́yod wøn kì kunɑni, eni dhɑnh-ɑ bɑ jöd bëne." 
Numbers13:29 Tyëng Amɑlek bëëd ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì pinyɑni geki tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Yebus. O tyëng Amör bëëd ɑ kelli kïttì, o tyëng Kɑnɑɑn bëëd ɑ kuni Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr geki kuni Nɑm Urdun.”" 
Numbers13:30 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́köör kì ri Mosɑ̀ kwøbbi gen ngøl yi Kɑlib. Kɑlib ɑ́kööb kinni, “Pɑ̈ɑ̈r wɑ kömi pinyɑni ɑnɑn ceth, kɑ kwɑny wɑ, wɑ teg, ócugge ki kwɑnyø yi wɑ.”" 
Numbers13:31 De jøg-ɑ ɑ́kedh ki Kɑlib ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Pɑth, wɑ pɑ teg ki tegø me lwɑ̈ng wɑ liny gen, ji møgɑni teeg cɑrø kibølee.”" 
Numbers13:32 Codhe ɑkedhi gen be kɑ̈lli kwøb mø pɑth ki dyër kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil. Ge okööbø kinni, “Tyëngpinyɑni pɑ nyi yɑ̈ng yi gïg-ɑ cyeg kì yije. Ji møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wøn bënn ceg bëëdø ge bɑ̈rrø," 
Numbers13:33 men-ɑ́ wø ɑ́lïdhi thyew ki jödd, kwɑrri Anɑk. Kɑ ri wøn ceg wøn ki lidhø wø nɑ bɑ̈nyy, o wø nenni yi gen ɑ nøw ceth.”" 
Numbers14:1 Kɑ teedø lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r ge oköörø, ge ceg-ɑ ywøg." 
Numbers14:2 Ge ɑ́köör kì ri Mosɑ̀ kí Aɑron ge okööbø kinni, “Lɑ̈w ke di thøw wøn kì Rïp, wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈w ke thøw wøn kì pɑ̈l men." 
Numbers14:3 De wøde ɑ yöd wø kïdh-ɑ piny me nɑ̈ɑ̈g wøn ki pilø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o mɑ̈nni wøn geki nyigi wøn mɑg. Pɑ lɑ̈w døøg Rïp?”" 
Numbers14:4 Kɑ ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Kɑ̈bbi wɑ ki jɑgø, kɑ wɑ døøg wɑ Rïp.”" 
Numbers14:5 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny kì bøli teeni Isrɑil bëne," 
Numbers14:6 kɑ Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun geki Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ying kelli jøg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi be lyewwi piny, ógudhi gen kɑggi gen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi gen," 
Numbers14:7 kɑ teedø köbbi gen kinni, “Piny-ɑ ɑ́lyeew yi wøn bɑ piny me døøj cɑrø." 
Numbers14:8 Keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe med ki wɑ, wɑ ókïdhe kunɑni kɑ pinyɑni mëgge wɑ, eni piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc." 
Numbers14:9 Wu ko ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈yi wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko wiy wun. O wu ko böggi yi tyëng pinyɑni, mɑ́ ge ótyɑm yi wɑ ceth. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ tungee, o jwöggi gen ɑ́rum ki tyɑmø yi en, wu ko böggi.”" 
Numbers14:10 Teedø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ bɑ̈lli gen ki tuggi kïttì o ge thøw gen, de mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ceg ì tɑr kì kömi Kemi Kwër, kɑ lidh yi teenɑni bëne." 
Numbers14:11 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑ gït-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ obɑnyø yi ji møg? Ge gït-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ pɑ gɑ̈n yi gen, e men-ɑ́ yɑ ɑ́göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø ngenyø kì bøli gen?" 
Numbers14:12 Ge ógöjjɑ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g men nɑ̈g gen, de yï ógwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ wïyi pödhø me dwøng, me teeg cɑrø kibøli ji møg.”" 
Numbers14:13 De Mosɑ̀ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Jiɑni bɑ yïn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp ki tegí. Keny-ɑ ólïng tyëng Rïp," 
Numbers14:14 møgɑni óköbbi gen tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pinyɑni. Ge ɑ́rum ki lïngø kinni yïn, yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jií, o rií nyi nyudhí gen, pøølí ying-ɑ kömi gen. O yï nyi cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli gen kì yij lööj pøølø kì dicɑ̈ng, kí yij lööj mɑc kì wɑ̈r." 
Numbers14:15 Ke nɑ̈ɑ̈g jií bënn ɑnɑn, pödhh-ɑ ɑ́lïngi tegi perí ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni," 
Numbers14:16 i jií nɑ̈ɑ̈g yïn pɑ̈l kɑ per kɑ ɑ́dhɑɑl yïn yi kïdhi gen piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn kinni ge ókïdhí yije, kɑ mëggí gen ɑ́ mi gen." 
Numbers14:17 Nyudhí wøn tegí ni kɑ ɑ́kööb ceth kinni," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ pɑ nyi jwɑn ki mɑgø yi liny, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ geki lɑ̈mpyëwɑ pɑ nyi thumi; pyëwɑ nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki orøg geki pëëmø. De ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́røngi pɑ nyi bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn kì ri wëëg gïti ri ngween rïjj.’" 
Numbers14:19 O ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ yï bɑ ngɑn pyëwí nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m, mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií pɑ nyi lwënyi, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, dwöög lɑɑwí piny kipe orøøg ji møg, ni kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki gen kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp.”" 
Numbers14:20 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen ni kɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈jjí." 
Numbers14:21 De yɑn ɑ köngi èn, yɑn ɑ nëënø, ni kɑ̀ pɑ̈ɑ̈ng kömi piny bëne yi mɑ̈rɑ," 
Numbers14:22 bong dhɑnhø kì kelli ji møg men-ɑ ókedhi pinyɑni. Mɑ̈rɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ kì Rïp geki yij ryɑng, de yɑ nyii rɑngø yi gen, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi kwøbbɑ." 
Numbers14:23 Ge pɑ kedhi piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ kweyyi gen kinni ómëggɑ gen. Bong dhɑnhø kì kelli ji-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yɑn ek, men-ɑ ókedhi pinyɑni." 
Numbers14:24 De bɑ̈ngɑ Kɑlib, mɑ́ pyëwe ying-ɑ wɑ̈ye, kɑ ocögø e gɑ̈n-ɑ yɑn, en ɑ ókïdhɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́lyeew yi en, o pinyɑni ólɑg yi kwɑrre." 
Numbers14:25 De mɑ́ törɑni bëëd-ɑ yi tyëng Amɑlek geki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, løgu wɑ̈thi wun dhuki, kɑ wu kedh wun, wu kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij ryɑng, wu døøg-ɑ kuni Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø.”" 
Numbers14:26 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers14:27 “Tyëngrijjø møg gït-ɑ wɑɑng ge oköörø kì riɑ? Yɑ ɑ́pïd yi køør gen! 
Numbers14:28 Anɑn köbbí gen kinni, Yɑ ɑ́köngi, ni kɑ̀ nëënɑ, wu göggɑ’ gïn-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kì yï wun ceth. Yɑn ɑ kööbø, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers14:29 Wu óthøw, kɑ cu wun ótwɑ̈lø kì yij ryɑng men, mɑ́ wu ɑ́köör kì riɑ, bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun, wu tyëng-ɑ runni wun wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl men-ɑ ókedhi pinyɑni." 
Numbers14:30 Yɑ ɑ́kööb cøn kinni wu óbëëdø’ yije, de bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ókedhi yije kì kelli wun den-ɑ́ Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ geki Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun." 
Numbers14:31 Wɑ̈ddi wun ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun kinni i ge ómɑg, ge ókïdhɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi wun, kɑ ge obëëdø kì yije." 
Numbers14:32 De wu óthøw-ɑ yij pɑ̈l. 
Numbers14:33 Nyigi wun ówïïnø kì yij pɑ̈l ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ge órɑngi yi gööj kɑ̀ nuti yïëëy wun, gïti keny-ɑ óthøw wun wu bënn." 
Numbers14:34 Wu órɑngi yi körri orøøg wun ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Pinyɑni ɑ́lyewwi yi wun kɑ cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, o wu ceg-ɑ mɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen kì yij ryɑng men, cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel bɑ run ɑ́kyel, o rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ yod yi wun." 
Numbers14:35 Yɑ ɑ́köngi kinni møgɑni göggɑ’ wun, wun ɑ tyëngrijjø, wun ɑ ɑ́cungi ri wun yɑn. Wu ceg-ɑ thumø ki thøø kì yij ryɑng men.”" 
Numbers14:36 Jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör be lyewwi piny yi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́bï, kɑ ji köbbi gen kwøb mø rijjø mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Codhe ɑgöjji gen rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge othøø." 
Numbers14:37  
Numbers14:38 Bɑ Kɑlib geki Jöcwø ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti thøø kì ri lyëww-ɑ ɑ́ör gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. 
Numbers14:39 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Isrɑil yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ teedø óywöngø ki ywøng teg." 
Numbers14:40 Dhuki kì mwøl, kɑ ge odhwödhø ge kedh-ɑ kuni wɑ̈thi kïttì, ge okööbø kinni, “Anɑn wø kedh-ɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ wø ɑ́yïëy kinni wø ɑ́bɑ̈jji.”" 
Numbers14:41 De ge ɑ́kyëddi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wude ɑ pyem wun dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Menɑni koo cuggi!" 
Numbers14:42 Wu ko kedh. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tøøk kì kelli wun. Wu bɑ møg tyɑm ki menrɑj yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. 
Numbers14:43 Keny-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi wun ki tyëng Amɑlek geki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, wu ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j koo løg me nud kì kelli wun, mɑ́ wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lugø kì bɑnge.”" 
Numbers14:44 De ge ɑ́kedhi myërri wɑ̈thi kïttì kinøw ngö Mosɑ̀ ɑ́döng kì kɑɑl geki Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Numbers14:45 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Amɑlek geki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kunɑni bï-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gen. Kɑ ge tyɑm, kɑ ge cyeddi, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Órmɑ̀ ge ocyeddø." 
Numbers15:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers15:2 i köbbe cigg møg tyëng Isrɑil gɑ møg-ɑ ómïdhi yi gen keny-ɑ ókedhu piny-ɑ mëgge gïn. 
Numbers15:3 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nëngi wun ki wɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ órömø, wɑlɑ̀ ónywøg wɑ̈dtegø, møg muuj gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, wɑlɑ̀ gënhi wïj köngø, wɑlɑ̀ jwödhø, wɑlɑ̀ mø kwër, møg muuj ki mɑc, yømi tool gen bɑ men mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers15:4 Ngɑn muuj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, ying e kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ́ dyel ɑ́tegø wɑlɑ̀ rømø, kɑ̈ne ki byëlø. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ́ kïlø mi møng-ɑ búr me ngedhø, e bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun, kɑ kɑ̈ne ki røthøl ɑ́ryew mø møgi oløg. Gëdhhɑni bɑ mø yømi tool gen mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers15:5  
Numbers15:6 Keny-ɑ ómuuj órömø, thyer kɑ møng-ɑ búr me ngedhø ɑ́ kïllì ɑ́ryew mø bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun me bɑ røthøl ɑ́dɑ̈g," 
Numbers15:7 muuj kyeel ki møgi oløg me bɑ røthøl ɑ́dɑ̈g. Yømi gëdhhɑni med kì pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Numbers15:8 Keny-ɑ ómuuj wɑdh Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ wïj köngø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ keni mër," 
Numbers15:9 thyer ki møng-ɑ búr me yöm ɑ́ kïllì ɑ́dɑ̈g, e bɑ ɑnyöm ki møøw dhetun me bɑ røthøl ɑ́ngwen." 
Numbers15:10 Muuj kyeel ki møgi oløg me bɑ røthøl ɑ́ngwen. Yømi gëdhhɑni med ki pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Numbers15:11 Bene gïg-ɑ nyi muuj kyeel ki wɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ órömø, wɑlɑ̀ dyel rømø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø ɑgɑk." 
Numbers15:12 Kenyi ngeeny gëdhhì, jɑmm-ɑ muuj kyeel ki gen nyi ceg kɑ medø ni kwɑnni gen ceth." 
Numbers15:13 Ngeti pödhø wɑ̈d Isrɑil men muujø ki gïn tole mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøge gïgɑni kinøw ceth." 
Numbers15:14 O kì yethi rïjj bënn, wëdh men bëëdø kì kelli wun, ying e cöög-ɑ kelli wun, wɑlɑ̀ ódhwödh, muuje ki gïn yømi tole mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøge gøn ceth ni kenyi gwøgii yi wun." 
Numbers15:15 Cigg-ɑ kömi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel ceth wuki wëdhh møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun gïti ɑtheer. Wu pɑ̈r ki gen ceth kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Numbers15:16 Cigg kí kwöng ɑ́kyel ceth ɑ kömi wun, wuki gen.”" 
Numbers15:17 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers15:18 i köbbe tyëng Isrɑil kinni, keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi gen piny-ɑ kïdhe gïn," 
Numbers15:19 nyi muuj wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëëdhi kì ri gïgcɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì pinyɑni. 
Numbers15:20 Keny-ɑ óbud wun ki ópùni jɑmm-ɑ cer cyegø, cïb ópun-ɑ kwøng ki bulø wɑ̈ye ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Muuj ceth ni kenyi muuj byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kenyi pwöd wun byel." 
Numbers15:21 Nyi muuj wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri jɑmm-ɑ cer cyegø kì yethi rïjj bënn. 
Numbers15:22 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thyew ki gïn-ɑ ógwøg keløg teedø wɑ̈thi gen owïlø ki mïdhi cigg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24 Keløg bɑ̈jjø menɑni gwøg yi teedø kɑ kwïji wøw, muuj gen ki wɑdh ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, men yømi tole mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, muuj kyeel kí byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí møgi oløg, men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi cigg. Kɑ ge muuj gen thyew ki ónywøg ɑ́ gënhi bɑ̈jjø." 
Numbers15:25 Gwøøg guög menɑni yi ókwërø o ji dhïwi gen, mɑ́ bɑ̈jjø menɑni ɑ́gwøg yi gen kɑ kwïji wøw, muuj gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki gënhi bɑ̈jjø." 
Numbers15:26 Codhe cyee, o lɑ́ɑ̀w dwöög piny kipe tyëng Isrɑil, geki wëdhh møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen, mɑ́ e bɑ teedø bëne ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji." 
Numbers15:27 Keløg nget ɑ́kyel óbɑ̈jjø kì bɑng kwïji wøw, muuje ki dyel ɑ́tegø rune ɑ́kyel, ɑ́ gënhi bɑ̈jjø." 
Numbers15:28 Gwøøg guög menɑni yi ókwërø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o lɑ́ɑ̀w dwöög piny kipe ngɑnɑni." 
Numbers15:29 Ciggɑni ying-ɑ kömi ji bënn, ngɑn bɑ̈jji ying-ɑ́ wɑ̈d Isrɑil wɑlɑ̀ wëdh men-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil." 
Numbers15:30 De ngɑn tir bɑ̈jjø, ying e bɑ wɑ̈d Isrɑil wɑlɑ̀ wëdh ceg ki nɑ̈gø," 
Numbers15:31 mɑ́ e ɑ́bɑny-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cigge tøønye ki pyemø." 
Numbers15:32 Tyelø ɑ́kyel e tyëng Isrɑil ying-ɑ yij ryɑng, jɑl megø ɑ́lidh yi gen e ogwënø ki yugg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Numbers15:33 Kɑ kïdhi bøli Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kí teedø bëne. 
Numbers15:34 Kɑ cïb ød mɑg, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ göggii nuti yodø." 
Numbers15:35 Codhe, ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jɑlɑni ceg-ɑ thøø. Bɑ̈lli yi teedø bëne ki tuggi kïttì kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, o thøwe.”" 
Numbers15:36 Kɑ kïdhi ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl yi teedø bëne, ɑ bɑ̈llii ki tuggi kïttì kɑ othøø, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers15:37 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers15:38 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, göög wun ki ojwɑrr kɑ ge twööj wun tøggi ógudhi wun, kɑ ri ojwɑrrɑni nyi töjji ki nyɑ ógødh me bɑ ówɑw, töjji ri gen bënn, kì yethi rïjj bënn." 
Numbers15:39 Ojwɑrrɑni bɑ møg nyi pɑ̈ddi wun ki ciggɑ, kenyi lidh wun gen, ciggɑ bënn ópɑr yi wun, o wu cög wun wu pɑ tyer gøggi jɑmm-ɑ nenni yi wun, ki møg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi wun." 
Numbers15:40 Wu ópɑ̈ddi yi ojwɑrrɑni ki mïdhi møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi yɑn, o wu óbëëd wun, wun ɑ́ møgɑ ceth kidyër." 
Numbers15:41 Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp, o yɑ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wun. Bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Numbers16:1 Kɑ Körɑ̀ wɑ̈d Idhɑr Kwɑɑr Leebì kì gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, óbɑ̈nyø ki jyɑ̈gi Mosɑ̀. Kɑ jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g kì gøl Ruben órëbø ki en, ɑ løg wɑ̈ddi Eliɑb, Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm, kí On wɑ̈d Peleth. Kí jøg mø bɑ pëjji Isrɑil kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Numbers16:2  
Numbers16:3 Kɑ ri gen cøng gen bøli Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron, ge okööbø kinni, “Mi wun ɑ́pöödh ki mendwøng! Dhɑnhø men bëne bɑ jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ kömee bënn. Dɑ́ kipe ngø Mosɑ̀, ɑ cïb rií mɑl kibøli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
Numbers16:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ ree leenge piny." 
Numbers16:5 Codhe, ɑköbbe Körɑ̀ geki jøge kinni, “Dhuki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngete ónyodhe, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́myege ówiy yi en o kedhe buti këli lɑm." 
Numbers16:6 Dhuki kì mwøl, kɑ̈bbi wun ki ópɑ̈nnì wuki jøgí, kïdhu yethi gen ki lelli mɑc, kɑ kömi gen kïdhi wun ki bɑkur. Kɑ ge kïdhi wun këli lɑm, Codhe o lidh yi wɑ mɑ løge’ men kì kellee ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wu Kwɑrri Leebì, mi wun ɑ́pöödh ki mendwøng!”" 
Numbers16:7  
Numbers16:8 Kɑ Körɑ̀ köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni “Lïng wun, wun ɑ Kwɑrri Leebì!" 
Numbers16:9 Bwøøn wun, eni kwɑny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny wun yi Jwøøg Isrɑil kì kelli Isrɑil bëne, kinni o wu nyi kedhu bøle, o wu gwøgu kwëre kì kömi piny, o wu cungi wun kì bøli teedø wu gwøg-ɑ kej gen?" 
Numbers16:10 Wun ɑ ɑ́mëgge dhwɑ̈ng menɑni bëne, o ɑnɑn wu dwɑdd-ɑ kwɑnyi kej ókwërø thyew!" 
Numbers16:11 Kɑ̀ köör wun kì ri Aɑron, bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ køør yi wun, wuki jøgí.”" 
Numbers16:12 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ öd-ɑ be cwööli Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm wɑ̈ddi Eliɑb. Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wø pɑ bï!" 
Numbers16:13 Wø nuti rumø ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi yïn kì Rïp, o wø nɑ̈g yi yïn kì yij ryɑng men, yï orumø kinni møgɑni lweny? Rií dwɑddí cïb kömi wøn yïn ɑ́ jɑgø thyew?" 
Numbers16:14 Wø nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn piny me yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, wø nuti nëngø yi yïn ki pwödh geki bɑ̈gg, o yï dwɑdd-ɑ wënyi wøn ɑnɑn. Wø pɑ bï!”" 
Numbers16:15 Mosɑ̀ pyëwe ɑ́rënyi ki mendwøng, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbe kinni, “Yï ko yïëy ki gëëdhi men-ɑ ómuuj yi gen. Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́göggɑ ki gïnrɑj kì kelli gen, o bong ɑderi dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́kwɑnyɑ.”" 
Numbers16:16 Kɑ Körɑ̀ köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Bïí dhø Kemi Kwër dhuki wuki jøgí gɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, Aɑron óbëëd e nud kì kenyɑni thyew." 
Numbers16:17 Kɑ̈ni ngɑn ki ópɑne, yije dɑ lelli mɑc kí bɑkur kì köme, kɑ ge thyeer wun këli lɑm.”" 
Numbers16:18 Codhe, kɑ ngɑn ókɑ̈bbø ki ópɑne, kɑ yije kïdhe ki lelli mɑc geki bɑkur, ɑcungi gen kì dhø Kemi Kwër geki Mosɑ̀ ki Aɑron." 
Numbers16:19 Codhe kɑ Körɑ̀ teedø bëne cønge dhø Kemi Kwër. Kɑ ge ócungø ge nenn-ɑ yï Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lidh yi teedø bëne e omënyø," 
Numbers16:20 kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers16:21 “Nyegu cyɑ̈n kì buti tyëng Isrɑil, o ge gwɑɑrɑ piny.”" 
Numbers16:22 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ri gen bødh gen wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny kɑ ge okööbø kinni “Jwøk, bɑ yïn ɑ yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wëy. Ke bɑ̈jji dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, pyëwí rënyi kɑ ji bënn?”" 
Numbers16:23 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers16:24 “Köbbí teedø bënn, kinni nyegi gen kì buti kemmi Körɑ̀, kí Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm.”" 
Numbers16:25 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kedh-ɑ yï Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm ki jøgdøngi Isrɑil kì bɑnge," 
Numbers16:26 kɑ ji köbbe kinni, “Cungi wun wu lɑ̈wi kì buti kemmi jøgi orøg møgɑni. Kɑ gïi gen ko nywɑl wun, kipe wu óbɑɑb ki gen ki gööj orøøg gen.”" 
Numbers16:27 Codhe, ɑnyɑni teedø cyɑ̈n kì buti kemmi Körɑ̀ kí Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm. Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm bëën wɑ̈g, de ge ócungø kì dhøggi kemmi gen geki mɑ̈nni gen kí nyigi gen." 
Numbers16:28 Kɑ ji köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Bene gïn-ɑ ree óyodu en kinni yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be gwøgi gïgɑni bënn, de møgɑni pɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pyëwɑ." 
Numbers16:29 Keløg jøg óthøw kɑ thøw-ɑ nyi thøw yi dhɑnhø bëne, e bong cɑ́yi Jwøk møg nënni, pɑth ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́myeg yɑn." 
Numbers16:30 De ogöög Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïjø me nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø, kɑ piny ree yiebe, kɑ jøgɑni mwønye kí jɑmmi gen bënn, o ge kedhi gen pödhi tyëngthøø ge onëënø, óyod yi wun kinni jøgɑni ɑ́bɑny-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Numbers16:31 Ri rume ki kwøb kinøw ceth, kɑ piny ree yiebe kì thɑ́ tyelli Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm," 
Numbers16:32 Kɑ ge mwøøny yi piny geki kɑ̈lli gen, kyeel ki jii Körɑ̀ geki jɑmmi gen bënn." 
Numbers16:33 Ge ɑ́kedhi piny pödhi tyëngthøø ge onëënø geki jɑmmi gen. Acyëëg piny ree kömi gen kɑ ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. 
Numbers16:34 Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni ɑ́rengi keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen ywøøg gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Wɑ ómwøøny yi piny thyew! Rengi wɑ!”" 
Numbers16:35 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ön-ɑ piny ki mɑc me lyel, ɑrɑ̈be jøg-ɑ ɑ́muuj ki bɑkur gɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Numbers16:36 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers16:37 “Köbbí Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d ókwërø Aɑron kinni, kwɑnye ópɑ̈nni bɑkur møg-ɑ bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl kì ri jøg-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈bi. Kɑ mɑc kedhhe, mɑ́ ópɑ̈nnɑni bɑ ɑkwër." 
Numbers16:38 Ge ɑ́göög ki ɑkwër kɑ ɑ́thyeer gen bøli këli lɑɑm Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kwɑɑny ópɑ̈nni bɑkur mø jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì bɑng orøøg gen, kɑ ópɑ̈nnɑni køny gɑ gïn nyi kum këli lɑm. Ge óbëëdø gɑ ngïji kipe tyëng Isrɑil!”" 
Numbers16:39 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny ópɑ̈nni bɑkur møgɑni yi ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr, kɑ gï kïdhe be thɑ̈dhø gɑ kum këli lɑm." 
Numbers16:40 Menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji kipe tyëng Isrɑil kinni, ko di dhɑnhø me pɑth ki kwɑɑr Aɑron me bï këli lɑm be rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki bɑkur. Ngɑn nyïngi bute, ceg-ɑ thøø ni Körɑ̀ geki jøge. Møgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg ceth ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Eliɑdhɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhø Mosɑ̀." 
Numbers16:41 Dhuki, kɑ teedø bëne oköörø kì ri Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron, ge okööbø kinni, “Jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wun!”" 
Numbers16:42 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cugi teedø bëne be wëërø ki Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron, ge ɑ́lïïdh kuni Kemi Kwër, kɑ gø lidh gen e ókumø yi pøølø. O mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j omënyø." 
Numbers16:43 Akedh Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron kɑ ge ócungø kì dhø Kemi Kwër. 
Numbers16:44 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers16:45 “Lɑ̈ɑ̈w wun ri wun ki ji møg, o ge gwɑɑrɑ piny!” Kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny ryeet wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny." 
Numbers16:46 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Kwɑny ópɑní, kɑ kïdhí ki mɑc kì wïj këli lɑm, kɑ kïdhí ki bɑkur. Codhe kɑ yï jwɑní be gwøg ki guöög dhïwø! Pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki rënyø, o yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ́gøøje kelli ji, yømɑni ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki nɑ̈g, jwɑní!”" 
Numbers16:47 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny ópɑni bɑkur yi Aɑron ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Mosɑ̀, ɑrenge kelli ji. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhe kinni yømø rum cɑ̈gø ki nɑ̈g ki ji, ɑkïdhe bɑkur mɑc kɑ ócɑ̈gø’ guöög dhïwi jiɑni." 
Numbers16:48 Kɑ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g menɑni cuung yi guöngɑni. Adöng Aɑron e ócungø kì kɑɑm tyëngnëënø geki tyëngthøø. 
Numbers16:49 Kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw, bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kí miy ɑ́bïryew, e ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw kì bɑng Körɑ̀ nuti kwɑɑn kelli gen." 
Numbers16:50 Kɑ Aɑron døøg-ɑ yï Mosɑ̀ kì dhø Kemi Kwër keny-ɑ ɑ́rum yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki cung. 
Numbers17:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers17:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni kɑ̈ni gen ki lødh pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ̈ni jɑngi wïj kɑl ki lodh ɑ́ kej gøl gen. Kɑ nyingi kɑl nyi gweed kömi lodhe," 
Numbers17:3 kɑ nyingi Aɑron gweed kömi lonh-ɑ cungi ɑ́ wïj gøl Leebì, lodh ɑ́kyel cungi ɑ́ wïj kɑl ɑ́kyel." 
Numbers17:4 Kɑ ge kïdhí yij Kemi Kwër, kɑ ge cïb bøli keny-ɑ nyi yïddi wɑ." 
Numbers17:5 Loodh ngɑn-ɑ ómyeg yi yɑn ónyog, o køør tyëng Isrɑil kì ri wun cung yi yɑn ki yuuɑni.”" 
Numbers17:6 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbi yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ jɑggi gen omuujø ki lødh; lodh ɑ́kyel cungi ɑ́ wïj kɑl, kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew yi loodh Aɑron." 
Numbers17:7 Codhe, ɑcïb lødhɑni yij Kemi Kwër kì bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Mosɑ̀." 
Numbers17:8 Dhuki keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Mosɑ̀ yij Kemi Kwër, ɑyuude loodh Aɑron lonh-ɑ cungi ɑ́ wïj gøl Leebì e nyogø. Lonhɑni kɑrø kɑ oköögø, kɑ nywøle ocyegø!" 
Numbers17:9 Akwɑɑny lødhɑni bënn yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ gï nyudhe tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ ngɑn lodhe kwɑnye." 
Numbers17:10 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Dwøøg loodh Aɑron bøli Sɑnduug Cigg. Mïdhi ɑ́ ngïji kipe tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ pëmø, kinni ge bɑ møg thøw keløg ge pɑ wïyi ki køør.”" 
Numbers17:11 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøg yi Mosɑ̀. 
Numbers17:12 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Wø ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wø ɑ́thøw bënn!" 
Numbers17:13 Ngɑn nyegi buti Kemi Kwër ceg-ɑ thøø, wø ceg-ɑ thumø ki thøø bënn!”" 
Numbers18:1 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yïn, wuki wɑ̈ddí, kí gøl Leebì, bɑ wun ɑ órɑngi kì bɑng bɑ̈jjø men-ɑ ógwøg kì Kemi Kwër. De bɑ wuki wɑ̈ddí keti wun ɑ órɑngi ki gwøøg ókwër." 
Numbers18:2 Cwööl wɑddí, ɑ løg Kwɑrri Leebì, o yï køny yi gen ki gwøg kì kɑɑm-ɑ nyi bëëd wu göög ɑ yij Kemi Kwër wuki wɑ̈ddí." 
Numbers18:3 Gwøg gen gwøøg gen ge onennø yi yïn kenyi göög gen kì kej kwër. De ge ko nywɑ̈ddi ki jɑmmi kwër kì kej kwër geki këli lɑm. Ke nywɑl gen jɑmmɑni wu ceg-ɑ thøø bënn wuki gen. 
Numbers18:4 Göög gen ge køny-ɑ yïn; gwøg gen gwøng-ɑ bɑ mi gen kì Kemi Kwër, de ko di ngɑnpɑth me göögø ki yïn." 
Numbers18:5 Wukí wɑ̈ddí keti wun ɑ göögø kì kej kwër geki këli lɑm, o yɑ cögɑ pyëwɑ pɑ cigi rënyø ki tyëng Isrɑil." 
Numbers18:6 Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́kwɑny wɑddí, Kwɑrri Leebì kì kelli Isrɑil bëne gɑ møg mëggɑ yïn. Ge ɑ́thyëyi yɑn. O ge göög gen ki gwøøg Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers18:7 Yïn, wuki wɑ̈ddí keti wun ɑ gwøg kwër kì Kemi Kwër geki këli lɑm, kí Kej Kwërdwøng. Møgɑni bene gïg-ɑ gwøg yi yïn, mɑ́ yï ɑ́mëggɑ gwøøg kwër. Ngɑnpɑth men nywɑ̈ddi ki jɑmmi kwër ceg-ɑ thøø.”" 
Numbers18:8 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ɑ́mëggɑ jɑmmi kwër bënn møg-ɑ nyi thërri yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil. Ge ɑ́mëggɑ yïn gɑ møgí, o ge ócög gɑ mø kwɑrrí gïti ɑtheer." 
Numbers18:9 Kinni jɑmmi Kwëër Dwøng møg-ɑ pɑ nyi rɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm, bɑ møgí, ɑ løg gïncɑm, kí gëdhhi bɑ̈jjø, kí gëdhhi orøg, geki gïg-ɑ nyi muuj bënn." 
Numbers18:10 Nyi cɑm wun gïgɑni kì kej kwër, cwøw bënn ócuggø cɑm ki gen, bɑ gïi kwër kì yï wun." 
Numbers18:11 “Thyew, jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ nyi thërri yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́mëggɑ yïn. Ge ɑ́mëggɑ yïn, wuki nyigí yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw geki womɑ̈nn kì yethi rïjj bënn. Tyëng gølí møg-ɑ dhïw, ge ócuggø cɑm ki gïgɑni." 
Numbers18:12 “Yï ɑ́mëggɑ mwölli jɑmm-ɑ nyi cyeg kì yï tyëng Isrɑil kì yethi runn bënn, ɑ løg møøw dhetun kí møgi oløg, kí byel." 
Numbers18:13 Ge bɑ møgí bënn. Tyëng gølí møg-ɑ dhïw, ge ócuggø cɑm ki gïgɑni." 
Numbers18:14 “Gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑthyey bënn kì Isrɑil gɑ møgɑ, bɑ møgí.”" 
Numbers18:15 “Kɑyyi ji, kí kɑyyi dhög, kí kɑyyi dyëg, kí kɑyyi ɑderr møg-ɑ thyëyi yɑn yi Isrɑil bɑ møgí. De kɑyø ócuggø pɑ̈dø ki gïïpiny. Kɑ kɑyyi lɑ̈yy-ɑ ywëdhø nyi pɑ̈d ki ngyëny." 
Numbers18:16 Nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈d othinh kì dwɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii, ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́bïj, ngyënyy-ɑ bɑ ɑyïëy kì kej kwër." 
Numbers18:17 De kɑyyi dhög, kí kɑyyi dyëg römm geki ɑ́tegg ko pɑ̈d, ge bɑ møgɑ ceth, nyi ngɑɑl gen gɑ gëdhhì. Kɑ remmi gen nyi kiny ri këli lɑm, kɑ dwɑ̈li gen nyi rɑ̈b, o pyëwɑ mïne yi yømi tool gen." 
Numbers18:18 Rïnggi gen bɑ møgí, ni ɑ́ngɑdø geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m kyëj mø gëdhh-ɑ nyi thërri yɑn." 
Numbers18:19 “Gïg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn ge muuj-ɑ yɑn, ge ɑ́mëggɑ yïn, wuki nyigí, kí kwɑrrí. Men-ɑ mëggɑ yïn èn bɑ kwöng me pɑ cuggi wiyø yi yïn, wuki nyigí, cwøw geki mɑ̈nn kì yethi rïjj bënn.”" 
Numbers18:20 Kɑ Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bong piny men-ɑ ómëggi yïn, yïn ɑ gøl kwër, jɑmmɑ gen ɑ bɑ møgí.”" 
Numbers18:21 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́mëggɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri gïg-ɑ nyi mëggi yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn. Menɑni bene köögi mi gen kipe gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi gen kì Kemi Kwërɑ." 
Numbers18:22 Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø ko kedhi buti Kemi Kwër këti kipe ge ócɑy ki thøø. 
Numbers18:23 Cɑg ɑnɑn ceth, Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ gwøg gwøøg Kemi Kwër, o gen ɑ korrii kì yethi rïjj bënn, e bɑ kwöng gïti ɑtheer. Kwɑrri Leebì bong piny mɑ mi gen kì Isrɑil," 
Numbers18:24 mɑ́ ge ɑ́mëggɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì møg-ɑ nyi muuj yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil. Bene ɑ pere köbbɑ gen kinni, koo di piny me mëggi gen ɑ́ budi gen kì Isrɑil.”" 
Numbers18:25 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Numbers18:26 i köbbe Kwɑrri Leebì kinni, “Kenyi kɑ̈bbi wun kì yï tyëng Isrɑil ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì gɑ mø wun, nyi mëggu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri gen," 
Numbers18:27 møgɑni ópɑ̈ɑ̈r ceth ki møg-ɑ muuj ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ rɑrø geki møgi oløg men kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì kej bïjø. 
Numbers18:28 Bene en kër-ɑ nëngu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmm-ɑ kwɑny yi wun ki yï tyëng Isrɑil ɑnɑn. Nyi mëggu gïgɑni ókwërø Aɑron. 
Numbers18:29 Nyi muuj wun kì ri jɑmm-ɑ døj kì yï wun. 
Numbers18:30 Keny-ɑ órum wun ki muuji møg-ɑ døj kì ri gen, kɑ møg-ɑ döng mïdhi wun gɑ mø wun, ni ngɑn purø ceth kenyi rume ki muuji byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers18:31 Møg-ɑ ódöng gɑ mø wun ócuggø cɑmø yi wun kì keny-ɑ cɑm wun gen, mɑ́ ge bɑ köggi gwøøg wun kì Kemi Kwër." 
Numbers18:32 Bong körri orøg møg-ɑ óying kömi wun, ke rum wun ki thödhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri møg-ɑ døj kì ri gen. De jɑmmi kwër ko bwöl wun, kɑ wu ocyɑ̈mø kì ri gen e Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti nëngø yi wun kì ri møg-ɑ døj kì ri gen, ke bwöl wun gen, wu ceg-ɑ thøø.”" 
Numbers19:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kí Aɑron köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i köbbi gen tyëng Isrɑil kinni," 
Numbers19:2 i muuj gen Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ki røjø nyilɑlø me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, me köme nuti pɑ̈nyø töjjø ki ɑcebi pur." 
Numbers19:3 Kɑ muuj wun ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr. Kɑ rønyɑni kïdhi ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ ngɑl kì kunɑni kì bøli ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr." 
Numbers19:4 Kɑ Eliɑdhɑr kɑ̈bbe kì ri reme, kɑ gø kinye kuni Kemi Kwër ki lwede tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Numbers19:5 Kɑ rønyɑni rɑ̈b bëne ki pyëne, kí rïnge, kí reme, kí cïnne, e onennø yi ókwërø." 
Numbers19:6 Kɑ ókwërø kɑ̈bbe ki ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈b yɑdh sɑndɑl, geki yelø, kí korø me kwɑrø, kɑ gï leenge yij mɑny-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b røjø." 
Numbers19:7 Orume, kɑ ókwërø ógødhe lwøge, kɑ lwøgge codhe o dwööge kɑɑl. Ceg-ɑ rïïjø, e ywëdhø gïti buddi cɑ̈ng." 
Numbers19:8 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b rønyɑni lwøge ógødhe, kɑ lwøgge; de ceg-ɑ rïïjø e ywëdhø gïti buddi cɑ̈ng." 
Numbers19:9 Codhe, kɑ búr cøng yi jɑl me dhïw, kɑ gø cïbe keny me dhïw ki ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, ree ókɑ̈bbi yi tyëng Isrɑil ki búr men nyi kïdhi ri pïi guöög dhïwø. Guöngɑni bɑ mi lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg." 
Numbers19:10 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́cøng búrɑni lwøge ógødhe, kɑ lwøgge; de ceg-ɑ rïïjø e ywëdhø gïti buddi cɑ̈ng. Menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ kwöng kì yï tyëng Isrɑil geki wëdhh-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen gïti ɑtheer." 
Numbers19:11 Ngɑn nywɑl dhɑnhø me thøø, ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Numbers19:12 Lɑwe ree ki pïi dhïwø, kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng geki bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, codhe o dhïwe cyee. De ngɑn koo lɑw ree kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng geki bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, pɑ dhïwi." 
Numbers19:13 Ngɑn nywɑ̈ddi ki dhɑnhø me thøø, kɑ ocögø ree pɑ lɑwe, cög e ywëdhø, mɑ́ ree nuti wïddø ki pïi dhïwø. Ngɑn ni menɑni bwöl-ɑ Kemi Kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pɑ kwɑɑn kelli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti." 
Numbers19:14 Keløg dhɑnhø othøø kì yij kemɑ̀, ngɑn ying kemɑni kì bøli keny-ɑ thøw dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn kedhi yije, ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Numbers19:15 Jɑmm-ɑ yij kemɑni ying gɑ puggì, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ̈gg møg ri gen nuti töjjø ki ɑ́yömø ceg-ɑ ywëdhø thyew." 
Numbers19:16 O ngɑn nywɑl dhɑnhø men-ɑ ónɑ̈gø, wɑlɑ̀ dhɑnhø me thøø kete, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn nywɑl cöngi dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ rörø, ceg-ɑ bëëdø e ywëdhø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Numbers19:17 Kipe lɑwi cølø, kwɑɑny búr kì ri búr røjø nyilɑlø men-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b ɑ́ gënhi orøg, kɑ köme kunyi ki pïg tïl kì yij lwøl." 
Numbers19:18 Kɑ jɑl me dhïw kɑ̈bbe ki yelø, kɑ gø cøde yethi pïgɑni kɑ ri kem-ɑ́ yije ɑ́thøw yi dhɑnhø geki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́ying yije bënn, kí ji møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni wïdde ki pï. Keløg ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ócɑɑg kɑ nɑ̈gø, wɑlɑ̀ thøø kete, wɑlɑ̀ cöngi dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ rörø ɑ ónywɑlø, wïddi ri ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywɑ̈ddi ki pï yi jɑl me dhïw." 
Numbers19:19 Wïddi ri ngɑn-ɑ ywëdhø yi cølø ki pï yi jɑl-ɑ dhïw kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng geki bïryeew cyɑ̈ng. Orum ree ki wïddø ki pï kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, lwøge ógødhe, kɑ lwøgge; de ceg-ɑ rïïjø e ywëdhø gïti buddi cɑ̈ng." 
Numbers19:20 Ngɑn ywëdh yi cølø, kɑ ocögø ree pɑ lɑwe, cög e ywëdhø, mɑ́ ree nuti wïddø ki pïi dhïwø. Ngɑn ni menɑni bwöl-ɑ Kemi Kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pɑ kwɑɑn kelli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti." 
Numbers19:21 Mïdhu kwöngɑni kì yethi rïjj bënn. Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wïddi ki pï, lwøge ógødhe thyew; ngɑn nywɑl pïgɑni ceg-ɑ rïïjø e ywëdhø gïti buddi cɑ̈ng." 
Numbers19:22 Gïn nywɑl yi ngɑn ywëdhø, ceg-ɑ ywëdhø, o ngɑn nywɑl gïnɑni ceg-ɑ ywëdhø, dhïw-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny-ɑ óbuddi cɑ̈ng." 
Numbers20:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn wɑ̈dh-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈l Sin, kɑ ge ogudø kì Gɑdic. Kɑ Miryɑm othøø kɑ kony kì kenyɑni." 
Numbers20:2 Ábong-ɑ pï kì keny-ɑ ɑ́guddi yi gen, codhe kɑ teedø ri gen cøng gen buti Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron." 
Numbers20:3 Aköör gen kì wïj Mosɑ̀ ge okööbø kinni, “Di løg me lɑ̈w ke di thøw wøn, kì bøli Kemi Kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kyeel ki wɑddi wøn tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw." 
Numbers20:4 Wøde ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn yij ryɑng keny? Wø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lí be thøø wøki dhögi wøn? 
Numbers20:5 Wøde ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn keny-ɑ rɑj ni men, keny bong gïn twïy kì yije? Bong byel, bong nywøli yenh møg cɑm, o men-ɑ́ bong pïg mɑdh!”" 
Numbers20:6 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ odhwödhø kì buti teedø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ dhø Kemi Kwër geki Aɑron. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny bøli gen ónywɑ̈ddø’ piny, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j omënyø kì kömi gen." 
Numbers20:7 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers20:8 “Kwɑny lonh-ɑ bøli Sɑnduug Cigg, kɑ teedø bënn cwööl, wuki Aɑron, kɑ nyɑ kïn-ɑcɑ̀ köbbi wun, ge olïngø kinni, kɑ̈ne wɑ̈g ki pïge. Yï ókɑ̈ni wɑ̈g ki pï kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø geki dhögi gen.”" 
Numbers20:9 Akedh Mosɑ̀ kɑ lodh dwɑɑye ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Numbers20:10 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron teedø bëne cwøøl gen buti nyɑ kït, kɑ Mosɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Anɑn lïng wun tyëngpëëmø, kɑ̈ni wøn wɑ̈g ki pï kì ri nyɑ kït men kiper wun?”" 
Numbers20:11 Codhe ɑgøøj nyɑ kïnɑni yi Mosɑ̀ ki lodhe tyel ɑ́ryew, kɑ pïngø ceg-ɑ ì bɑɑw kì wɑ̈g kì ri nyɑ kït, kɑ teedø bëne omɑ̈dhø geki jɑmmi gen." 
Numbers20:12 De Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ge ɑ́cyɑ̈r yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni “Mɑ́ yɑ nuti yïëëy wun, kɑ yɑ ocögø yɑ pɑ kwër yi wun kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil, ge koo peej-ɑ yi wun piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ gen.”" 
Numbers20:13 Møgɑni ɑ́cwöb-ɑ Merïbɑ̀, mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́köör kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kenyɑni, ɑnyudhe ree gen kinni bɑ Kwërø." 
Numbers20:14 Mosɑ̀ ɑ́öd kì Gɑdic ki jøg mø kedhi yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm, o gø köbbi gen kinni, “Wø nyiiwöw, tyëng Isrɑil wø okööbø kinni, orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi wøn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn," 
Numbers20:15 kër-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh kweyyi wøn, kɑ ge dɑ̈g-ɑ Rïp, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wøn ki runn mø gïïr, thyew nyingi wøn ɑ́guud yi tyëng Rïp," 
Numbers20:16 ɑywøøg wøn kö Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑlïnge, ɑöre wëywön-ɑ ɑ́pëëj wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Anɑn wø ying-ɑ Gɑdic kɑɑl-ɑ tøg pödhí." 
Numbers20:17 Wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn wiy wø bɑ̈ɑ̈n wøn pinyí. Wø pɑ kɑ̈l yij pwödhø, wø pɑ kɑ̈l yij bɑg, de wø óbødh yöö, wø pɑ rudi tuung kyëj wɑlɑ̀ tuung cɑɑm gïti keny-ɑ ópöödh wøn myërrí, o wø pɑ mɑ̈dhi ki pï kì yethi yïïthi wun.”" 
Numbers20:18 De tyëng Edöm ɑ́löggi kinni, “Wø ɑ́bɑ̈nyi, wu pɑ kɑ̈l yij piny wøn. Keløg wu óbï, wɑ ceg-ɑ nyɑɑg.”" 
Numbers20:19 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Wø óbødh yöö, de keløg wø ómɑ̈dhi ki pï wɑlɑ̀ gïg-ɑ kwølli yi wøn ómɑ̈dhø, pïgɑni ceg kɑ colø yi wøn, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wøn bɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈ni piny yøw.”" 
Numbers20:20 Kɑ tyëng Edöm cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Wø ɑ́bɑ̈nyi!” Kɑ ge odhwödhø gɑ yɑy me dwøng ge kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Isrɑil." 
Numbers20:21 Codhe, ɑkëjji tyëng Isrɑil ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ yöö megø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n bɑ̈ɑ̈ni piny Edöm yi tyëng Edöm." 
Numbers20:22 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́dhwödh bënn kì Gɑdic kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Kïti Ör," 
Numbers20:23 ki tøg piny Edöm. Codhe, ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Numbers20:24 “Aɑron pɑ kedhi piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni mëggɑ’ tyëng Isrɑil, ceg-ɑ thøø, mɑ́ dhøgɑ ɑ́pyem yi wun ryeet kì Merïbɑ̀." 
Numbers20:25 Kïdhí Aɑron wïj Kïti Ör geki Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈de," 
Numbers20:26 Kɑ ógudhi kwër mø Aɑron luny wɑ̈g, kɑ ge løny ri Eliɑdhɑr kì kunɑni. Aɑron thøw-ɑ kunɑni ceth.”" 
Numbers20:27 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøg yi Mosɑ̀. Ge ɑ́yedhi wïj Kïti Ör ge onennø yi teedø bëne," 
Numbers20:28 ɑluny ógudhi kwër wɑ̈g yi Mosɑ̀ kì ri Aɑron, kɑ gï lønye ri Eliɑdhɑr. Kɑ Aɑron othøø kì wïj kït kunɑni. Adwöög Mosɑ̀ piny geki Eliɑdhɑr." 
Numbers20:29 Áyod yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni Aɑron thøø, ɑywøøgii yi teedø ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Numbers21:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng Kɑnɑɑn kì Arɑd, kì tuung Kɑnɑɑn kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kinni i tyëng Isrɑil obëënø ki yuu Athɑrïm, ɑkedhe be nyɑɑg ki gïn, kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki kwï gen." 
Numbers21:2 Codhe, ɑköngi tyëng Isrɑil kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni “Wëggí wøn tyɑmi jiɑni, ge thyëyi wø’ yïn kí kɑ̈ddi gen bënn, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi wøn ki jɑmmi gen.”" 
Numbers21:3 Kwøbbi gen ɑ́yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ gï kønye ki tyɑmi tyëng Kɑnɑɑn. Anɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki jɑmmi gen bënn yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ kɑ̈ddi gen cøør piny. Kɑ kenyɑni cɑg ɑ́ Órmɑ̀, ɑ wɑngi ɑthyey." 
Numbers21:4 Kɑ ge odhwödhø ki Kïti Ör ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yuu Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø, kipe kinni o ge wen gen piny Edöm. De teedø pëthi gen ɑ́nyönhi," 
Numbers21:5 kɑ ge oköörø kì ri Jwøk geki Mosɑ̀, ge okööbø kinni, “Wude ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wøn be thøø kì keny-ɑ bong gïncɑm wɑlɑ̀ pï èn? Wø ɑ́ngïr yi gïncɑm-ɑ rɑɑj èn!”" 
Numbers21:6 Agöjji jiɑni thöllì mø bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ ji mø gïïr kì kelli gen kɑ̈ɑ̈j yi thöllɑni kɑ ge othøø. 
Numbers21:7 Kɑ ji kedh-ɑ yï Mosɑ̀, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́bɑ̈jji, wø ɑ́köör kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí rií thyew. Kwɑjjí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiper wøn, o thöllì nyiige.” Codhe ɑkwɑ̈jji Mosɑ̀ kiper tyëng Isrɑil." 
Numbers21:8 Aköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gööge ki thwöl me bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl, kɑ gø ngɑɑbe wïj löj, kɑ ngɑn nyi kɑj yi thwöl nyi lïïdhe ree, o cöge e pɑ thøw." 
Numbers21:9 Codhe ɑgöög Mosɑ̀ ki thwööl dilɑl, kɑ gø cïbe wïj löj. Kenyi kɑɑj dhɑnhø yi thwöl, o nyi lïïdh-ɑ ri thwööl dilɑl, kɑ nyii bødhø ki thøø." 
Numbers21:10 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́dhwödh kɑ ge ogudø kì Oböth. 
Numbers21:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh gen kì kenyɑni, ɑgud gen kì wïj kɑɑl Abɑrïm kì yij ryɑng kì wïj tuung Moɑb kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Numbers21:12 Adhwödh gen kì kenyɑni kɑ ge gudd-ɑ Töör Dhɑred. 
Numbers21:13 Acigi gen dhwödhø kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge gudd-ɑ kömi Nɑm Arnön kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, kì yij pɑ̈l-ɑ göjji myërri piny Amör. Arnön ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ keew Moɑb kí Amör." 
Numbers21:14 Bene ɑ bɑnge kööb Wɑ̈nyi Lìnyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri kɑɑl Wɑyïb kì Supɑ̀ geki Töör Nɑm Arnön. 
Numbers21:15 Kí tör-ɑ ngelli kɑɑl Aɑr geki keew Moɑb. 
Numbers21:16 Adhwödh gen kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ keny me cwøl ɑ́ Yïïth, ɑ yije ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cøng ji o ge nëngɑ ki pï.”" 
Numbers21:17 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́wör ki wör møg kì bøli kenyɑni. “Yïïth, twïy pïi wun, Ge ómɑ̈dh yi wøn ki wör" 
Numbers21:18 Yiinh-ɑ ɑ́kony yi nyiirɑ̈dhh, yiinh-ɑ ɑ́kony yi jɑgg, yiinh-ɑ ɑ́kony ki loodh rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kí lødhi gen thyew.” Ge ɑ́dhwödh kì yij ryɑng kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Mɑtɑnɑ̀." 
Numbers21:19 Adhwödh gen kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Mɑɑ̈liel, ɑdhwödh gen kì Mɑɑ̈liel kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Bɑmöth." 
Numbers21:20 Adhwödh gen kì Bɑmöth kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Töör Moɑb, tör-ɑ bøli Kïti Pisgɑ̀, ɑ rwöm ki ryɑng." 
Numbers21:21 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil öd-ɑ yï Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amör, ki jøgdøngø møg köbbii kinni," 
Numbers21:22 “Wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy wø bɑ̈ɑ̈n wøn pinyí. Wø pɑ kɑ̈l yij pwödhø, wø pɑ kɑ̈l yij bɑg, wø pɑ mɑ̈dhi ki kì yij yith, wø óbødh yöö ceth wø bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ myërri wun.”" 
Numbers21:23 De Sïön nuti yïëyø ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni pinye yi tyëng Isrɑil. Yɑye ɑ́cønge kɑ kedh-ɑ Yɑɑ̈dh yij ryɑng be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Isrɑil. 
Numbers21:24 Kɑ tyɑm yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ji mø gïïr nɑ̈g kì kelli yɑye, cɑg kì kömi Nɑm Arnön gïti Yɑbok. Piny-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Yɑbok bɑ piny tyëng Amön, o myërri Amön teg." 
Numbers21:25 Codhe kɑ myërri tyëng Amör bënn mɑg yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ Kicbön geki myërr-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
Numbers21:26 Kicbön bene kɑɑl-ɑ́ yije ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng Amör, gø ɑ́mɑg en keny-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb cøn, kɑ pinyɑni kwɑnye kì yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb gïti Arnön." 
Numbers21:27 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́cɑɑg wör kinni, “Bïu Kicbön, bïu kɑɑl Rɑ̈dh Sïön! Wø dwɑdd-ɑ gerii o døøge keje." 
Numbers21:28 Tyeli liny ɑ́dhwödh ki Kicbön. Yɑɑy Sïön ɑ́kedh e olyelø ni mɑc, kɑ kɑɑl Aɑr kì Moɑb cɑme, kɑ kïtti kwøømø mwønye." 
Numbers21:29 Ri wun dɑ cyën, wu ɑ́gɑ̈g wu tyëng Moɑb! Wun ɑ mɑlli jwøg Kemöc! Jwøøg wun wɑ̈dde ɑ́wëgge töngi yïnø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ogöögø ki ɑmɑggi Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng Amör." 
Numbers21:30 De ɑnɑn kwɑrri gen ɑ́nɑ̈g, cɑg kì Kicbön kí Dïbön, kɑ cig-ɑ cɑ̈gø kì Nɑcim gïti Nöpɑ̀ kì buti Medebɑ̀.”" 
Numbers21:31 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil pëgg-ɑ myërri tyëng Amör." 
Numbers21:32 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ oödø ki jøg mø kedhi be lyeewi Yedher, kí yɑbi kër-ɑ ómɑgii. Kɑ mɑg yi tyëng Isrɑil, eni kɑɑlɑni geki myërr-ɑ bute. Kɑ tyëng Amör møg-ɑ ɑ́ying myërrɑni cyeddi." 
Numbers21:33 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ri gen løg gen ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yuu Bɑcɑn. Kɑ Og rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑcɑn bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, be nyɑɑg ki gen kì Edrey, ɑ́kedh kɑ yɑye bëne." 
Numbers21:34 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko böggi yi en, ówëggɑ tyɑmø yi yïn, geki yɑye kí pinye bënn. Ógöggi yi yïn ki gïn ni men-ɑ ɑ́göggí Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amör ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Kicbön.”" 
Numbers21:35 Kɑ Og, kí wɑ̈dde, kí jie bënn nɑ̈g yi tyëng Isrɑil, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́bødh, ɑpëggi Isrɑil pinye." 
Numbers22:1 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́dhwödh, kɑ ge gudd-ɑ thwøri Moɑb kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì bøli Yerikö." 
Numbers22:2 Kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi tyëng Amör yi Isrɑil, lïngi yi Rɑ̈dh Bɑlɑk wɑ̈d Dhipor, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng Moɑb." 
Numbers22:3 Kɑ Moɑb obwøgø ki mendwøng yi tyëng Isrɑil, mɑ́ kwɑnni gen ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr." 
Numbers22:4 Kɑ pëjji Midyɑn köbbi yi Moɑb kinni “Nënni gïg-ɑ butee jwɑn kɑ rënyø yi tyëngwïïnø møgɑni, ni wɑdh kenyi nwɑɑje lum dhøge kì pɑ̈l.” Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Bɑlɑk," 
Numbers22:5 oödø ki jøg mø cwööl Bɑlɑɑm wɑ̈d Beor, e ying-ɑ Pethur kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt kì piny Amɑw, gø ɑ́öde ki wöödø kinni, “Dɑ ji mɑ ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp, jiɑni ɑ́tɑɑy yij piny bëne, o ɑnɑn ge bëëdø ge rwööm ki pödhɑ." 
Numbers22:6 Bïí kɑ ge lɑ̈mmí cyën, o ge ótyɑm yi yɑn, men-ɑ́ kwɑnni gen gïïr kibøli wøn. Yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni lɑmmí pɑ nyi pɑ̈dhi piny, ngɑn lɑ̈mmí gyëdh nyi ceg kɑ gyëdhø, o ngɑn lɑ̈mmí cyën, nyi ceg kɑ cyenø.”" 
Numbers22:7 Codhe, kɑ jøgdøngi Moɑb geki jøgdøngi Midyɑn ókedhø ge ókɑ̈ddø ki köggi lɑm. Awɑ̈dhi gen yï Bɑlɑɑm, kɑ gø köbbi gen ciggi Bɑlɑk." 
Numbers22:8 Aköbbi gen yi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Nin wun kì keny, wu ódwöggɑ møg-ɑ óköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dhuki.” Codhe, kɑ jɑggi Moɑb geki jɑggi Midyɑn nïnn-ɑ gøl Bɑlɑɑm." 
Numbers22:9 Kɑ Jwøk bï-ɑ yï Bɑlɑɑm, ɑpëjje kinni, “Jøg-ɑ gølí bɑ møg?”" 
Numbers22:10 Alöggi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Jøgɑni ɑ́ör-ɑ yïɑ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb, Bɑlɑk wɑ̈d Dhipor ki wöödø kinni," 
Numbers22:11 “Dɑ ji mɑ ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp, ge ɑ́tɑɑy yij piny bëne, bïí lɑ̈mmi gen yɑn, o ge tyɑm yi yɑn, o ge cyeddɑ.”" 
Numbers22:12 Aköbbi Bɑlɑɑm yi Jwøk kinni, “Yï ko kedh ki jøgɑni, o tyëng Isrɑil ko lɑɑm ki lɑm mø rijjø, mɑ́ gyëdhhɑ ying-ɑ kömi gen.”" 
Numbers22:13 Akedhi Bɑlɑɑm yï jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Bɑlɑk, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Døøg wun pödhi wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kedhø ki wun.”" 
Numbers22:14 Codhe, ɑdøøg gen yï Bɑlɑk kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Bɑlɑɑm ɑ́bɑ̈nyi bëënø.”" 
Numbers22:15 Codhe, kɑ Bɑlɑk cig-ɑ ör ki jøgdøngø mø kwɑnni gen ngenyø, o per gen teeg kibøli jø tyeli mɑl." 
Numbers22:16 Ge ɑ́kedhi yï Bɑlɑɑm kɑ gø köbbi gen wöön-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen kì yï Bɑlɑk kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn kinni, ko di gïn mɑ̈ɑ̈n yïn bëënø." 
Numbers22:17 Yï ótheg yi yɑn ki mendwøng. O gïg-ɑ ókwøb yi yïn ógwøg yi yɑn ge bënn, lɑ̈mmí yɑn jiɑni.”" 
Numbers22:18 Alöggi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Bɑlɑk, cɑgg yɑ mëgge gøle gø pɑ̈ɑ̈ng en ki dhɑb geki ngyënyø ɑ́tegø, møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pɑ pyem yi yɑn, cɑgg ɑ́ kì ri kwøb mø yöd." 
Numbers22:19 De nin wun kì keny ni jø tyeli mɑl, o yɑ óyodɑ møg-ɑ ócigi köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Numbers22:20 Kɑ Jwøk bï-ɑ yï Bɑlɑɑm kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑkööbe kinni “Keløg jøgɑni bëën-ɑ be dwɑ̈ɑ̈yi yïn, kedh ki gen, de gwøg gïn-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn ceth.”" 
Numbers22:21 Adhwödh Bɑlɑɑm kì mwøl, kɑ pëgg-ɑ kömi ɑdere, ɑkedhe geki jɑggi Moɑb." 
Numbers22:22 Jwøk ɑ́bëëd pyëwe orɑ̈mø ki kedhi Bɑlɑɑm. Bɑlɑɑm ɑ́kedh e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ ɑdere, kí bɑ̈ngge ɑ́ryew kì bɑnge, ɑrødhii yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Numbers22:23 Kɑ wëywönɑni lidh yi ɑdere e ócungø kì dïyöö ki pilø kì cinge, ɑkëjji ɑderø e töng-ɑ yij pwödhø, ɑgøøj ɑderø yi Bɑlɑɑm gø dwööge’ yij yöö." 
Numbers22:24 Codhe, ɑcungi wëywönɑni kì kɑɑm bɑ̈ggi oløg ɑ́ryew mø kelli gen cyɑ̈gi, o dörri gen bɑ ɑger ki kïttì." 
Numbers22:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh wëywödø yi ɑderø, ɑkëjje ree dijje’ ri dörø, kɑ tyeli Bɑlɑɑm pög yi dörɑni. Kɑ ɑderø cigi gøjø yi Bɑlɑɑm." 
Numbers22:26 Kɑ wëywönɑni cig-ɑ kedhi bøli gen, ɑcunge kì kɑɑm me dhiing ki mendwøng, me bong keny këjji." 
Numbers22:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh wëywödø yi ɑderø, ɑbudde kì piny kí Bɑlɑɑm kì köme, ɑrënyi pyëw Bɑlɑɑm kɑ ɑderø gøje." 
Numbers22:28 Codhe, kɑ ɑderø dhøge tug yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑköbbe Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn, ɑ pere gøøj yɑn ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g?”" 
Numbers22:29 Alöggi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Yï ɑ́pwöd yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ ɑ́gwøøg dhëg! Ke di bëëde e dɑ pilø kì cingɑ yï di nɑ̈gɑ.”" 
Numbers22:30 Alöggi ɑderø kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki ɑder-ɑ köme nyi cyɑ̈dhi yi yïn cøn? Dɑ gïjø me ni men mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyɑ ki göggi yïn?” Kɑ Bɑlɑɑm okööbø kinni, “Bong gøn!”" 
Numbers22:31 Codhe, ɑyieeb nyingi Bɑlɑɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wëywönɑni lidhe e ócungø ki pilø kì cinge, ɑleeng Bɑlɑɑm ree piny wïje kuul en piny." 
Numbers22:32 Apëjji wëywödø kinni, “Ede ɑderø ɑ ɑ́gøjí ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g? Yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be cyëëgi yuuí, mɑ́ yï nuti dwɑddø kinni o yï kedh." 
Numbers22:33 De yɑ ɑ́lidh yi ɑderø, ɑkëjje ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g. Keløg e pɑ di këjji, yï di nɑ̈g yi yɑn kɑ ɑderø wiyɑ.”" 
Numbers22:34 Alöggi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́røngi, kwïj yi yɑn kinni yï ócungø kì yuuɑ. De ɑnɑn keløg yï pɑ dwɑddi kinni o yɑ kedhɑ, yɑ ceg-ɑ døøg pɑc.”" 
Numbers22:35 Akööb wëywödø kinni, “Pɑth, kedh wuki jøgɑni, kɑ yï kwøb møg-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn keti gen.” Codhe, ɑkedh Bɑlɑɑm geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Bɑlɑk." 
Numbers22:36 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Bɑlɑk kinni i Bɑlɑɑm obëënø, ɑkedhe be pɑɑrii Aɑr, kɑɑl-ɑ ying kömi Nɑm Arnön kì wïj tuung Moɑb." 
Numbers22:37 Kɑ Bɑlɑɑm pyëje kinni “Yïde ɑ bɑɑny bëënø keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøngɑ yïn ki cwølø? Yï ɑ́ceg-ɑ rumø kinni yï koo theg yi yɑn?” 
Numbers22:38 Aköbbi Bɑlɑk yi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Dɑ́ ngø yɑ ɑ́bï ɑnɑn yøw? O yɑ koo kwøb-ɑ møgɑ, de yɑ ókwøb-ɑ møg-ɑ óköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth.”" 
Numbers22:39 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Bɑlɑk geki Bɑlɑɑm kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kɑɑl Kudhöt." 
Numbers22:40 Kɑ Bɑlɑk ongɑ̈dø ki dhög kí dyëg gɑ gëdhhì, kɑ Bɑlɑɑm geki jyɑ̈gg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en nënge ki rïngø." 
Numbers22:41 Dhuki ɑkïdhi Bɑlɑɑm Bɑmöth Bɑɑl yi Bɑlɑk kun-ɑ nënni kwï tyëng Isrɑil. 
Numbers23:1 Aköbbe Bɑlɑk kinni, “Gëëd ki këlli lɑm ɑ́bïryew kì keny, kɑ yɑ muuj ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́bïryew kí órömm ɑ́bïryew.”" 
Numbers23:2 Kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb gwøg yi Bɑlɑk, kɑ wɑ̈thi këlli lɑm møgɑni rɑ̈ɑ̈b ki gëdhhì. Wɑdh kí órömø ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm ɑ́kyel." 
Numbers23:3 Codhe, ɑköbbi Bɑlɑk yi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Cungí kì buti gënhí, gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kɑ wiy yɑ kedhɑ men-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïɑ, yï óköbbɑ møg-ɑ óyɑ̈lle yɑn bënn.” Codhe, ɑkedhe wïj nyɑ kït e kete." 
Numbers23:4 Kɑ Jwøk bï-ɑ yï Bɑlɑɑm, ɑköbbii yi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́göög ki këlli lɑm ɑ́bïryew, kɑ yɑ orɑ̈bø ki wɑdh kí órömø kì wɑ̈thi gen bënn.”" 
Numbers23:5 Aköbbi Bɑlɑɑm yi Jwøk ki gïn-ɑ óköbbe Bɑlɑk, ɑöre gøn yï Bɑlɑk o gø köbbe møgɑni." 
Numbers23:6 Adøøge, kɑ Bɑlɑk yuude e nudd e ócungø kì buti gënhe, gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí jɑggi Moɑb bënn kì bute." 
Numbers23:7 Atööng møg yi Bɑlɑɑm: “Yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Bɑlɑk rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb, yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Arɑm kì thɑ́ kïtti wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Bïí lɑ̈mmí Isrɑil cyën! Töng cyënni Isrɑil!’" 
Numbers23:8 Ede ngɑn-ɑ ógyëdhø yi Jwøk ɑ lɑ̈mmɑ en cyën? Yɑde ɑ töngɑ cyën mø nuti kwøbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? 
Numbers23:9 Ge onennø yi yɑn yɑ ying-ɑ wïj kït. Ge okwøllø yi yɑn ki nennø yɑ ying-ɑ wïj ótong. Ge bɑ pödhø me bëëde ying wɑ̈ye, ge ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni ge bɑ ɑgyëdh yi Jwøk" 
Numbers23:10 Kwɑrri Yɑgob nɑ tør Ge pɑ cuggi kwɑnø. Wiy yɑ óthøwɑ ki thøwi ngɑntir, wiy yɑ óthøwɑ ki thøwi jii Jwøk.”" 
Numbers23:11 Aköbbi Bɑlɑɑm yi Bɑlɑk kinni, “Á gïn ɑ göggí yɑn kinnï? Yï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ be lɑ̈mmi cyën tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, de yöd yï ceg-ɑ gen ki kwëngø?”" 
Numbers23:12 Alögge kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kwøb-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni kwøbɑ en.”" 
Numbers23:13 Aköbbi Bɑlɑɑm yi Bɑlɑk kinni, “Bïí kedhi wɑ keny megø me cuggí nenní kwï tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ ge lɑ̈mmí cyën kì kenyɑni.”" 
Numbers23:14 Akïdhe gøn pwödhi Dhöpïm kì wïj Kïti Pisgɑ̀. Agëëde kì kenyɑni ki këlli lɑm ɑ́bïryew, kɑ orɑ̈bø kì kömi gen ki gëdhhì, wɑdh ki órömø kì wïj këlø ɑ́kyel." 
Numbers23:15 Aköbbi Bɑlɑk yi Bɑlɑɑm kinni, “Cungí kì buti gënhí, gënh-ɑ rɑ̈b bëne, kɑ wiy yɑ kedhɑ be yïddø wøki Jwøk kì kun-ɑcɑ̀.”" 
Numbers23:16 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ yï Bɑlɑɑm, ɑköbbe gøn ki møg-ɑ óköbbe Bɑlɑk, ɑöre gøn yï Bɑlɑk, o gø köbbe møgɑni." 
Numbers23:17 Adøøge, kɑ Bɑlɑk yuude e nudd e ócungø kì buti gënhe, gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí jɑggi Moɑb bënn kì bute. Apyëjii yi Bɑlɑk kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
Numbers23:18 Atööng møg yi Bɑlɑɑm: “Bïí, Bɑlɑk wɑ̈d Dhepor Kɑ møg-ɑ kwøbɑ lïngí kidøøj." 
Numbers23:19 Jwøk pɑ ni dhɑnhø ɑ nyi pëëdø. Pɑ ni dhɑnhø ɑ nyi wil rumme. Gïn-ɑ kwøbe nyi gwøge’ gwøgø. Kɑ̀ kööbe, nyi kwøb-ɑ dyër." 
Numbers23:20 Yɑ ɑ́köbb-ɑ kwëng. Árum ki gëdhhø, o gyëdhhɑni pɑ cuggi dwøøgø yi yɑn." 
Numbers23:21 Nënni e bong rɑj møg-ɑ óbï kömi Isrɑil. Bong cyën kì ree, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg gen ying-ɑ kömi gen, en ɑ wør yi gen ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen." 
Numbers23:22 Jwøk ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp. O ceg-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggø kiper gen ni wɑnh-ɑ thwønh. 
Numbers23:23 Bong yɑnh lwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Isrɑil ki thyëdhø, keje pɑ cuggi rɑngø, mɑ́ ɑnɑn teedø ɑ́døøg be kwøb kì ree kinni, Jwøøng teeg nɑ ngø!" 
Numbers23:24 Pödhi Isrɑil nɑ ngur me teg, pɑ nyi ywömø e nuti nɑ̈ggø, kɑ gïn-ɑ mɑge nyi cɑme, kɑ reme nyi mɑdhe.”" 
Numbers23:25 Aköbbi Bɑlɑɑm yi Bɑlɑk kinni, “Ge ko yöd ge ceg kɑ kwëngø yi yïn, yï ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki lɑ̈mmi gen cyën!”"
