Deuteronomy6:17 Mïdhu ciggi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Nyi gwøgu gïn-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni døøj ki gwøgø, o bëëd e bong gïn jɑ̈ddi wun, o wu ócuggi wun ki kwɑnyi piny-ɑ døøj, ɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kɑ ji mø mɑ̈n ki wun cyeddi yi wun ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Keny-ɑ ópyëëj yïn yi nyigí dhuki megø kinni, ‘Á cigg mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Kɑ ge köbbí kinni, ‘Wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ bɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, de wɑ ɑ́yïëël wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tegø." 
Deuteronomy6:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø, wø onëënø ki nyingi wøn. Möy! Bɑ gïgrijjø mø ni ngø ɑ ɑ́gögge Rïp geki rɑ̈dhe, kí gøl rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈gge bënn!" 
Deuteronomy6:23 Wɑ ɑ́göönye wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kì Rïp, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ piny men, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyee cøn kinni pinyɑni ómëgge wɑ." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Codhe ɑköbbi wɑ yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i mïdhi wɑ cigg møgɑni bënn, kɑ Jwøgee wør yi wɑ, o wɑ kor yi en, o wɑ óbëëd wɑ ki døøjø e bong gïjø me cɑ̈nni wɑ, ni kɑ̀ bëëd wɑ dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy6:25 O bëëdø men-ɑ døøj kì yïee wɑng-ɑ mïdhi kwöngɑni geki gøggi møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wɑ yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’" 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ókïdhe piny-ɑ óbëëd yi yïn, o jurrì ɑ́bïryew ócyeddi yi en kì yije, keny-ɑ ókedh yï kedh-ɑ yije, kedh gï cyedde’ cyeddø. Ge bɑ jurrì mø døngø kibølí, ɑ løg Kit, kí Girgɑc, kí Amör, kí Kɑnɑɑn, kí Perïdh, kí Kib, kí Yebus." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Keny-ɑ ócïb jurrɑni bënn cingí yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nɑ̈g gen bënn. Wu ko lwööb kí gen, pyëwí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m kí gen." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Rií ko wëggí nyömø ki nyɑɑr gen, kɑ wɑ̈ddí ko nyömi ki nyigi gen, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑrí ko nywøm yi gen," 
Deuteronomy7:4 kipe nyigi wun óthɑɑb yi gen be mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j órënyø, kɑ wu jwɑne ki nɑ̈gø." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Keny-ɑ ómɑg wun pinyɑni, cøør wun këlli lɑm mø gen piny, kɑ yïkki gen pyeed wun piny, kɑ löjji Aceerɑ̀ tørri wun, kɑ ngïjji jwöggi gen rɑ̈b wun ki mɑc." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Gwøgu møgɑni, mɑ́ wu bɑ jii Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wun ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en kì kelli jurri kömi piny bënn, o wu bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ jie." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Pɑth kiper ngenyi kwɑnni wun kibøli jurr-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu yienye wun ɑ́ møge, kwɑnni wun nøg kibøli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kì kömi piny." 
Deuteronomy7:8 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu ɑ́mɑɑre, kɑ lwöm-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑme kí kweyyi wun mïdhe. Bene ɑ bɑnge yiele wun kì cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g ki tegø." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl kinni Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ bɑ Jwøk, ɑ nyi mïdhi kwøbbe geki lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøbe. Lwöbø nyi mïdhe’ mïdhø, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee nyi nyudhe’ ji-ɑ mɑɑrii, ɑ mïdhi cigge kì yethi rïjj ɑ́lïp," 
Deuteronomy7:10 de tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii nyi cɑye’ cɑyø. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Anɑn mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wun, mïdhu cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun bënn dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Keløg ciggɑni olïngø yi wun, kɑ ge mïdhi yi wun kidøøj, Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lwöme ómïdhe kí wun kì bɑng mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee men-ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Wu ómɑɑre kɑ wu gyëdhe, o wu óbëëd wun kì piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med, yï wun dɑ nywøl, kɑ kwɑnni wun óngënyø. Pwödhhi wun ógyëdhe, o wu óbëëd wun yï wun dɑ byel, kí møgi oløg, ki møøw dhetun. Kɑ wu gëdhhe dhög ki dyëg mø ngenyø. Gyëdhhɑni bënn ómëgge wun, kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun, kinni gø ómëgge wun." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Bong pödhø megø kì kömi piny men-ɑ ógyëdh ni wun. Bong bwøj men-ɑ óying me nud kì kelli wun, o bong ɑ́ror men-ɑ óløg me nud kì kelli jɑmmi wun." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Wu ókorri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, wu koo göjje rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëll-ɑ rijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun kì Rïp, de gïgɑni ógöjje tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Rënyu pödhh-ɑ ócïb cinggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nɑ̈gu gen kɑ pëthi wun ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m kí gen. Jwöggi gen ko kwɑjji wun kipe ge ógöögø ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli thøø kì cwɑggi wun." 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Wu ko kööb kinni jurrì møgɑni døngø kibøli wun, o ge pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi wun ki tyɑmø." 
Deuteronomy7:18 Wu ko böggi yi gen, nyi pɑrru gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki tyëng pödhe bënn yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Nyi pɑrru ryɑ̈g men-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun kí nyingi wun, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø, kí ngïjjì møg teg, geki teng-ɑ dwøng men-ɑ ɑ́yieel wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Rëny-ɑ ɑ́rënye Rïp, en ɑ órënye jurr-ɑ böggi yi wun ɑnɑn bënn." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ge ógöjji ryɑ̈g yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ møg-ɑ ópɑ̈nni kì kelli gen nɑ̈ge." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Wu ko böggi yi gen, mɑ́ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ kelli wun, o bɑ Jwøk me dwøng me böggi kiree." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Jurrɑni ónyiige kì bøli wun ceth. De gï koo cyedde wïj ɑ́kyel, kipe kwɑnni lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l óngënyi kibøli kwɑnni wun, kɑ wu óböggø yi gen." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ge ócïb cinggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, mɑ́ gï ógöjje böggø yi wun. Ge ótyɑm yi wun kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi wun." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Rɑ̈nhi gen ówëgge tyɑmø yi wun. Ge ónɑ̈g yi wun kɑ ge owïlø kì wɑ̈ɑ̈th. Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ócungi kì bøli wun gïti keny-ɑ ónɑ̈g wun gen bënn. 
Deuteronomy7:25 Rɑ̈bu ngïjji jwöggi gen, kɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́teng-ɑ ri gen ko kwɑny wun, mɑ́ ge mɑɑn yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge bɑ møg-ɑ ógöögø ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli thøø kì cwɑggi wun." 
Deuteronomy7:26 O gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun yethi kɑ̈lli wun, kipe wu óyïddi ki göj kì bɑng gen. Bɑnyu ngïjji jwöggɑni kɑ ge mɑɑn wun, kipe cyënni gen óbï kömi wun, mɑ́ ge bɑ mø cyën." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Mïdhu cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun bënn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, o wu ónëën wun, o kwɑnni wun óngënyi gen, o wu ókwɑnyu piny men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gø ómëgge kweyyi wun." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Nyi pɑrru kër-ɑ ɑ́pëëj wun wɑ̈g yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì yij wɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun kì Rïp, wu bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ ryɑng ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Kɑ wu nyi rɑnge ki gïg teg, o gø yode mɑ mïdhi wun cigge ceth." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Wu ɑ́göjje kɑ̈j, kɑ wu cɑɑme ki mɑnɑ̀, gïncɑm-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø cɑmø yi wun, wuki kweyyi wun cøn. Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en kɑ per pwönyi wun kinni, pɑth ki gïncɑm kete ɑ nyi mïdhi dhɑnhø e onëënø, den-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Kì yethi runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen møgɑni, ógudhi wun nuti pyëdø, o tyelli wun nuti kwödø yi wɑ̈dh." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Ngɑ̈nyi wun wøw kinni wu ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nɑ dhɑnhø kenyi cege nyige, kɑ gï nyi pwöde." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Nyi gwøgu møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge mïdhi wun, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wør wun." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Wu kïdh-ɑ piny me lɑ̈be med yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, piny me yije di nɑ̈mm-ɑ rïngi kí nyingi pï, kí pïg töngi wɑ̈g kì piny ge mödd-ɑ yij tör, kí kwøømø." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Piny me yije cyeg gemè, kí ceir, kí oløg, kí ólɑm kí romɑn, kí dhetun, kí møøw kïc." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Wu koo pɑ̈nyi ki mɑgø yi kɑ̈j kì kunɑni, wɑlɑ̀ bong gïjø men-ɑ ócɑ̈nni wun. Yethi kïtte dɑ ngyënyø dødø, o wu ócuggø kony ki dilɑl kì wɑ̈thi kwøømme." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Wu ócyɑ̈mø kɑ wu oyɑ̈ngø, kɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pwøj yi wun kipe piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med, ɑ ɑ́mëgge wun." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Wɑ̈thi wun ko wëggu wïlø ki Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ri wun ko wëggu dhɑlø yi mïdhi cigge møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Keny-ɑ óyɑ̈ng wun kɑ wu ogëdø ki ud mø døngø, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ piny," 
Deuteronomy8:13 kɑ dhögi wun óngënyø geki dyëgi wun, kɑ dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø óngënyø kì yï wun, kɑ jɑmmi wun óngënyø bënn," 
Deuteronomy8:14 wɑ̈thi wun ko wëggu tɑ̈dø kí Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́yïëël wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun, wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Wu ɑ́pyejje wu bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ ryɑng-ɑ dwøng, ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø; eni piny-ɑ thwøwø ɑ yije bong pï, kí thölle geki ïïdhe møg-ɑ bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Kɑ wu thödhe ki pï kì yij kït mɑ gïwi." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Wu ɑ́mëgge mɑnɑ̀ kì yij pɑ̈l, o cɑm yi wun, eni gïn nuti pɑ̈nyø cɑmø yi kweyyi wun. Kɑ wu göjje orɑng møti e pɑ̈ny-ɑ wun, kipe kinni o wu ógëdhe gïgdøj cyee." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Kɑ wu ko rum cyee kinni wu ɑ́kɑ̈ri kɑ tegi wun. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Wɑ̈thi wun ko nyi wïl kinni bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, ɑ ɑ́thödhi wun ki tegø men-ɑ bɑnge kɑ̈ri wun, mɑ́ e nudd e mïdh-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑge kí kweyyi wun cøn, ni kɑ̀ bëëde dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy8:19 De keløg wɑ̈thi wun ówïl ki Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, wɑ̈thi wun ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Wu ɑ́rum ki kyëddø yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Keløg kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ lïngi yi wun, wu ónɑ̈g yi en ni jurr-ɑ dwɑdde nɑ̈gø ɑnɑn, kì bøli wun." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Lïng wun, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil! Dicyɑ̈ngtïn Nɑm Urdun obɑ̈ɑ̈nø yi wun, wu kedh-ɑ be kwɑnyi pìnyi jurrì mø døngø, mø teg kibøli wun, pödhø me yije di kɑ̈dd mø døngø, gɑ ɑwen ki dör mø wɑ̈dhi mɑl." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Tyëngpinyɑni, kwɑrri Anɑk, ngëddi gen døngø, o ge bɑ̈rrø, per gen ɑ́lïngi yi wun kinni bong ji mø cuggi cung kì bøli gen." 
Deuteronomy9:3 De ólidh yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli wun, e opɑ̈mmø ni mɑc. Gï ótyɑme, kɑ ge cyeddi yi wun, ge ójwɑn ki nɑ̈gø yi wun ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Keny-ɑ órum gen ki cyeddø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiper wun, kɑ wu ko rum kinni pinyɑni ɑ́mëggi wun kɑ per døøji wun, dɑ́ kipe rɑ̈ji tyëngɑni." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Pɑth kiper bëëdi wun wu tir, o wu gøgg-ɑ dyër ɑ wëggi wun kwɑnyi piny gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gï cyeede wɑ̈g kɑ per rɑ̈ji gen, geki kɑ̀ dwɑdde mïdhi lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi en geki kweyyi wun: Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni piny-ɑ døj ni menɑni nuti mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ per kɑ̀ myër wun kí pinyɑni. Wu ceg bëëdø wu bɑ ji mø muddi wun teeg. 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki kɑ ɑ́wëggu pyëw Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rënyø kì yij pɑ̈l. Wu ɑ́cɑ̈gi pëmø kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh wun kì Rïp gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn wu pemm-ɑ dhøg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Cɑgg ɑ́ kì Kïti Sinɑy, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́wëggi rënyø yi wun ki mendwøng, me di nɑ̈ge wun." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Yɑ ɑ́yedhi wïj kït be dwɑɑyi ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew, ópɑ̈nn-ɑ kömi gen ógweed Cigg, kɑ yɑ obëëdø kì wïj kït ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen yɑ pɑ cyɑ̈mø, o bong pï mɑ ɑ́mɑdhɑ." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Codhe, ɑmëggi yɑn ópɑ̈nni kït møgɑni ryeet, gen ɑ kïtt-ɑ kömi gen ɑ́gweede møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe wun, e kööb ɑ yij mɑc. Gï ɑ́gwede ki cinge, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe wun, wu ócungø kì thɑ kït." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen kí wɑ̈rr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn kïttɑni ryeet, kïtt-ɑ kömi gen ógweed Cigg." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Jwɑn kedhi piny thɑ kït, kipe jií møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn kì Rïp ɑ́rënyi, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïnrɑj. Møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ gen ɑ́jwɑn gen ki wiyø, ri gen ɑ́göggi gen ki ngïji.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Yɑ ɑ́köbbi thyew yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Jiɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni muddi gen teeg." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Yɑ ko pɑ̈nyí jogø, wiy ge nɑ̈gɑ bënn, o nyingi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈nyɑ kì kömi piny, o yï gwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ pödhø me dwøng kibøli gen.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Codhe, ɑløgɑ riɑ kɑ yɑ yïnh-ɑ piny kì wïj kït, yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ kömi gen ógweed Cigg. Kït ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ lyelø ɑ́ mɑc." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Kɑ yodɑ ceth kinni Ciggi Jwøøg wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyeem wun, kɑ ri wun göggi wun ki røjø mɑ dhɑb, ɑ́ ngïji jwøg, wu ɑ́jwɑn pɑ̈dø kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Aleengɑ ópɑ̈nni kït møgɑni ryeet piny kì bøli wun, kɑ ri gen mød gen." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Abøødhɑ riɑ bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kí wɑ̈rr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen ni tyeli mɑl, yɑ nuti cyɑ̈mø, o bong pï mɑ ɑ́mɑdhɑ, ki gööj orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun, ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ óböggø yi rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́rënyi ki mendwøng, ki me di nɑ̈ge wun, de kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑ́cigi lïngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd thyew pyëwe rɑɑj ki Aɑron, ki men di nɑ̈ge gøn, de yɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈jji kipere kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Kɑ gïi orøg men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun, ɑ løg rønyi dhɑb kwɑnyɑ, kɑ leengɑ mɑc. Kɑ tørrɑ, ɑgurɑ en, kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ búr, kɑ búrɑni pwöögɑ nɑm-ɑ rïngi piny kì wïj kït." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Pyëw Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wëggu rënyø thyew keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wun Tɑbeerɑ̀, kí Mɑɑsɑ̀, kí Kibrön Atɑɑbɑ̀." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́öre wun kì Kɑdic Berniyɑ̀, kinni kedhu be kwɑnyi piny-ɑ mëgge wun. Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dhøge ɑ́pyem yi wun, kɑ ocögø e pɑ gɑ̈n yi wun." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Wu ɑ́bëëd wu nyi pemm-ɑ dhøg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, ki kër-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈nyɑ wun." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Codhe, ɑbuudɑ yijɑ rum yɑn piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kí wɑ̈rr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, mɑ́ e ɑ́yodɑ kinni dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi wun." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjjɑ kinni, “Wuö, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jií ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g, gen ɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ki tegí." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Wïjí ko wïl ki bɑ̈nggí: Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob, kɑ yï ko nenni rɑ̈ji ji møg geki tegi muddi gen, kí orøøg gen." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Mɑ́ ke nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen, tyëng Rïp okööbø kinni, i yï ódhɑlø yi kïdhi jií yij piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn kinni ge ókïdhí yije, bene ɑ bɑnge nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi yïn kì yij pɑ̈l. Ge okööbø kinni i jií kïdhi yïn yij pɑ̈l be nɑ̈gø, mɑ́ ge mɑɑn yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy9:29 O bene gen ji-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yïn gɑ jií, ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp ki tegí, teng-ɑ dwøng cɑrø.’" 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Twïg ki ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew ni mø tyeli mɑl, kɑ yï göög ki sɑndug mɑ yɑdh men yije cïb gen. Kɑ yï bï yïɑ mɑl wïj kït," 
Deuteronomy10:2 o kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́ying kömi ópɑ̈nni møg-ɑ ɑ́mød ri gen kɑ ɑ́leeng gen piny, gweedɑ kömi møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn, codhe o ge kïdhi yi yïn yij Sɑndug.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Codhe, ɑgöögɑ ki Sɑndug ki yɑdh ɑ́lwiy, kɑ yɑ otwïgø ki ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew ni mø tyeli mɑl, kɑ ge kïdhɑ mɑl wïj kït." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møg-ɑ ɑ́kwønge ki gwedø kì kömi kïtti tyeli mɑl, gweede kömi mø cyɑ̈n, ɑ løg Cigg-ɑ Pyɑ̈rø møg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wun, wu ying-ɑ thɑ kït, e kööb ɑ yij mɑc, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cugi wun. Ge ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gen ɑ ópɑ̈nni kït møgɑni ryeet," 
Deuteronomy10:5 ɑløgɑ riɑ, kɑ yɑ dwöög-ɑ piny thɑ kït. Kɑ ge cïbɑ yij sɑndung-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn, ɑbëëd gen kì kenyɑni ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́dhwödh kì wɑ̈thi yïïth-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø Beni Yɑɑkɑn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Moserɑ̀. Athøw Aɑron kì kunɑni kɑ kony, kɑ keje, kej Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kwɑny yi wɑ̈de Eliɑdhɑr." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Adhwödh gen kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Gudgɑdɑ̀, kɑ ge odhwödhø këti, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Yotbɑthɑ̀ kun-ɑ ngeeny pï." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny gøl Leebì yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ tyëng kɑ̈lli Sɑnduug Cigg, o ge nyi cungi gen kì bøle ge gögg-ɑ en gɑ ókwër, o ge nyi kwëëng gen ki nyinge. A nudd ɑ́ gwøøg gen gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Bene ɑ ɑ́cög gøl Leebì nuti nëngø ki piny ni kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø, lɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen bɑ bëëdi gen gɑ ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii ceth yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Yɑ ɑ́bëëd kì wïj kït, ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kí wɑ̈rr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen ni kɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ cøn. Kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑ́cigi lïngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu ocögø wu pɑ nɑ̈g yi en." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Codhe, ɑköbbe yɑn i peejɑ wun be kwɑnyi piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun kinni gø ómëgge gïn." 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Anɑn wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, lïngu gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yï wun, Mɑllu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ møg-ɑ nyi kwøbe bënn nyi gwøg wun. Mɑɑr wun en, kɑ göggi wun ki pëthi wun bënn." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Kɑ Cigge bënn mïdhi wun. Ciggɑni bënn mëggɑ’ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn kɑ per kinni, o wu yïddi wun ki døøjø." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Cɑgg ɑ́ mɑl ɑ lɑ̈wi, bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Piny bɑ mee thyew geki jɑmm-ɑ yije bënn." 
Deuteronomy10:15 De kweyyi wun mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mendwøng kibøli tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, ɑmyege wun, wun ɑ́ jie gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, mïdhu kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu ko pëëm këti." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ Jwøk me dwøng kibøli jwögg bënn, bong tegø me pɑ̈r ki tege. Dwøng o ceg kɑ böggø. Pɑ nyi gënyø o pɑ nyi yïëy kwɑjjø ki gïïpiny." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Pɑ nyi dwɑddi kinni, o kïj geki thwöm ruj, tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kellee mɑɑr yi en, kɑ gï nyi thödhe ki gïncɑm kí ógudh." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, mɑɑr wun tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, mɑ́ wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ wëdhh kì Rïp." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Lïngí kwøbbi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ mɑllí, e kete kete. Mïdhí cigge, kɑ yï nyi köngí ki nyinge kete." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Lenhí, bɑ Jwøgí. O men-ɑ́ gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ døngø, møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kiper wun ɑ́lidh yi yïn ki wɑngí." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi kweyyi wun Rïp, kwɑnni gen ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew codhi gen. De ɑnɑn kwɑnni wun nuti gwøgø yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge gïïr ni kyell kì mɑl?" 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Mɑɑru Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cigge bënn mïdhi wun ceth." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Dicyɑ̈ngtïn, pɑr wun møg-ɑ ɑ́dïd yi wun kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Pɑth ki nyigi wun ɑ ɑ́lidh møgɑni, dɑ́ men-ɑ́ wun kì ri wun. Álidh yi wun eni döngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki tege," 
Deuteronomy11:3 kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki pödhe bëne ɑ́lidh yi wun. 
Deuteronomy11:4 Álidh yi wun kër-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge yɑɑy Rïp bëne kí kyënye geki yɑ̈the, keny-ɑ ɑ́rïngi gen bɑng wun, kɑ gï mudde Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij pɑ̈l kiper wun, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi wun keny, ɑ́lidh yi wun." 
Deuteronomy11:6 Pɑru gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge Dɑthɑn geki Abirɑm wɑ̈ddi Eliɑb kì gøl Ruben. A ɑ́yieb piny ree e onennø yi dhɑnhø bëne, kɑ gï mwønye geki kɑ̈lli gen, kí kemmi gen, kí bɑ̈nggi gen geki dhögi gen." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Wun kiri wun ceth, ɑ ɑ́lidh gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Mïdhu cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun bënn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, o wu ócuggi wun ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni nɑm, wu kedh-ɑ be kwɑnyi pinyɑni." 
Deuteronomy11:9 O wu óbëëd wun ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì piny kɑ̈r, piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi kweyyi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gø ómëgge kwɑrri gen." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Piny-ɑ ókwɑny yi wun ɑ́ mi wun, pɑ pɑ̈r ki piny Rïp, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun kɑ̈ge dööng. Kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈g wun kì kunɑni, jɑmm-ɑ kɑ̈g nyi ceg kɑ cɑwwø, o bɑ gwøg me teeg," 
Deuteronomy11:11 de piny-ɑ kedhi yi wun bɑ piny me yije di kïttì, kí törr; piny me yije nyi mɑ̈gi yi kødh." 
Deuteronomy11:12 Pinyɑni kor-ɑ yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij run bëne." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, mïdhu cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑɑru Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ göggi wun ki pëthi wun bënn." 
Deuteronomy11:14 Keny-ɑ ógwøg wun møgɑni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈ni piny ki kødh kì bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddii, o bëëd e bong mel, o bëëd e dɑ byel, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun kì yï wun," 
Deuteronomy11:15 kí lum men cɑm yi dhögi wun. O wu óyɑ̈ng wun. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Ri wun ko wëggu thɑbø, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wiyu piny, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, kɑ ri wun bøødh wun bøli gen." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Ogöög wun ki gïn ni menɑni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe órënyi ki wun, kɑ kødh mɑ̈ɑ̈ne, kɑ wu ojɑdø ki byel. Codhe, kɑ wu jwɑn-ɑ thøø kì kunɑni, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd pinyɑni ɑ́ piny me døj." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Cïbu ciggɑni pëthi wun. Twööj wun gen bɑ̈ddi wun, kɑ ge rug wun gɑ ɑcwɑddì kì wɑ̈thi wun, gɑ møg nyi pɑ̈ddi wun." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Pwönyu gen nyigi wun. Nyi kööb wun kì ri gen kenyi ying wun pɑc, wɑlɑ̀ wu ying-ɑ pɑ̈l, wɑlɑ̀ wu ceg-ɑ ywömø, wɑlɑ̀ wu ogöögø." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Kɑ ge gweed wun ɑ́dyëddi uddi wun kí dhøggi kɑ̈lli wun. 
Deuteronomy11:21 O wu óbëëd wun, wuki nyigi wun ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, gø ómëgge kweyyi wun. Wu óbëëdø kì pinyɑni ki kɑɑm me bɑ̈ɑ̈r ni kɑɑm-ɑ nud mɑl kì kömi piny." 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun, mïdhu gen kidøøj. Mɑɑru Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi gwøgu gïn-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun, kɑ yïëyø mi wun mïdhi wun." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Codhe o jurr-ɑ kyeelø bënn cyedde kì bøli wun, o pödhh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge teg, o ge døngø kibøli wun kwɑny yi wun." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Piny-ɑ ókedhi yi wun, kɑ tyelli wun këël wun yije, ceg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́ mi wun. Piny wun cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij pɑ̈l kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti kïtti Lubnɑn kì wɑɑng wuudø, o cɑ̈ge kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, gïti kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Ji ógöjji bwøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì keny-ɑ kedhi yi wun kì yij pinyɑni, ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe ceth, o bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ólwɑ̈ng wun ki jogø." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Yɑ cïb-ɑ gyëdh geki cyën bøli wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn; 
Deuteronomy11:27 bɑ gyëdh ke mïdhu ciggi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy11:28 De bɑ cyën ke pɑ mïdhi ciggɑni yi wun, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, mø nuti pɑ̈nyø mɑllø yi wun cøn." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Keny-ɑ ókïdhi wun piny-ɑ ókwɑny yi wun ɑ́ mi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wøw wun gyëdh kì Kïti Geridhïm, kɑ cyën wøw wun kì Kïti Ebɑl." 
Deuteronomy11:30 (Kïttɑni ryeet ying-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì piny tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Töör Urdun. Ge ying-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o ge cyɑ̈gi ki yenhi kwër kì Moriyɑ̀ kì buti Gilgɑl)." 
Deuteronomy11:31 Wu bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ Nɑm Urdun, wu kedh-ɑ be kwɑnyi pönh-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ókwɑny yi wun ceth, kɑ wu obëëdø kì yije." 
Deuteronomy11:32 De wu di dwɑddø o wu mïdhu cigg geki kwöng-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mïdhu gen ceth." 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Bene cigg-ɑ ómïdhi yi wun ek, ki runn-ɑ óbëëd wun kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bɑ Jwøøg kweyyi wun ɑ́ men kwɑny yi wun gïti ɑtheer. Mïdhu ciggɑni kidøøj, kɑ wu göög wun kì bɑng gen." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyii mɑ̈ddø yi jurr-ɑ ɑ́ying pinyɑni, cøøru gen piny, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg møgɑni kì wɑ̈thi ótøng cøør wun piny, kí møg-ɑ thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ mɑr." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Cøøru këlli lɑm mø gen piny, kɑ yïkki gen kedhhi wun. Rɑ̈bu ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøøg gen, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø, kɑ ngïji jwögg tørri wun, o ge cög gen ge pɑ cigi mɑllø kì kɑ̈jjɑni." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ko mɑlli wun ki yëth-ɑ mɑlli jwögg-ɑ kyeelø yi jii gen." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈bbi kì kelli pìnyi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli wun, ki kej ɑ́kyel me nyi kedhi yi teedø bëne be mɑllii." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Kenyɑni ɑ kïdhi wun gëdhhi wun, gëdhh-ɑ rɑ̈b geki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø, kí ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun, kí jwödhø, kí wïj köngi wun, kí kɑyyi dhögi wun geki dyëgi wun." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Kenyɑni kì bøli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ógyëëdh wun, kenyɑni ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun, wuki kɑ̈lli wun, o pëthi wun med gen kɑ̀ cɑmu jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun ki kwɑ̈ɑ̈g wun." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, wu koo göögø ki gwøøg cøn, ɑ ɑ́göög dhɑnhø wïje. Gïti ɑnɑn, wu kwɑ̈jj-ɑ yëth-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun," 
Deuteronomy12:9 kipe kɑ̀ nuti kedhu piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, piny-ɑ yije óbëëd yi wun ki mër." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Keny-ɑ óbɑ̈ɑ̈n wun Nɑm Urdun, wu ówëggi bëëdø kì pinyɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ókorri yi en kipe tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn, wu óbëëdø ki mër." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ómëggi ki kej ɑ́kyel ɑ́ keny nyi mɑllii, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cïge wun bënn nyi kïdhu kunɑni, ɑ løg gëdhhì mø wun møg-ɑ rɑ̈b geki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø, kí ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun geki jwödhø, kí wïj köngi wun møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ge ómuuj yi wun." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Bëëd wun pëthi wun omedø kì bøli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wuki nyigi wun, kí bɑ̈nggi wun, kí Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddi wun, mɑ́ yï gen bong piny mɑ ɑ́mëggi gen ɑ́ mi gen, ni wɑ̈thi kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Wu ko nyi wɑ̈dhi ngɑl ki gëëdhi kì keny-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun," 
Deuteronomy12:14 nyi ngɑl wun gen kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij piny kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli wun. Kenyɑni ɑ ómuuj wun ki gëdhh-ɑ rɑ̈b, yije thyew ɑ ógwøøg jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun." 
Deuteronomy12:15 “De wu ócuggø cɑm ki rïnggi jɑmmi wun kì keny-ɑ bëëd wun. Wu ócuggø cɑm ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn, ni kɑ̀ dwɑddu en. Wu ceg-ɑ cɑm ki gen cɑgg wu ywëdhø, wɑlɑ̀ wu dhïw, ni ke di cɑm wun rïngi tɑ̈ng wɑlɑ̀ rïngi ɑ́køny." 
Deuteronomy12:16 De remmi gen ko cɑm wun, kønyu remmi gen piny ni pï." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Jɑmm-ɑ mëggu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko cɑm kì keny megø, cɑgg ɑ́ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri byelli wun, wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ møøw dhetun, kí kɑyyi dyëgi wun geki dhögi wun, kí wïj köngi wun, kí jwödhø, wɑlɑ̀ gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Cɑmu jɑmmɑni kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cɑɑm gen kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi wun, wuki nyigi wun, kí bɑ̈nggi wun, kí Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl wun, kɑ wu bëëd wun pëthi wun omedø kipe gïn-ɑ gwøg yi wun." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Jɑmm-ɑ nyi mëggi Kwɑrri Leebì ko nyi wiy ki muujø kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbëëd wun bënn kì pinyɑni, piny wun." 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Keny-ɑ ólɑɑny piny wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe, wu ócyɑ̈mø ki rïngø ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi wun." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Mɑ́ keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógöögø ki me lɑ̈wi ki wun, dhɑnhø ócuggø ngɑl ki dyel wɑlɑ̀ dhyɑng me cɑm yi en, kì keny-ɑ bëëde, kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu ocyɑ̈mø ki rïngø ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi wun, kì kɑɑl wun ni kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Ngɑn dhïw wɑlɑ̀ ywëdhø ócuggø cɑm ki rïngɑni, ni ke di cɑm wun rïngi tɑ̈ng wɑlɑ̀ rïngi ɑ́køny." 
Deuteronomy12:23 De rïngø ko cɑm wun ki remø kì ree, remø bɑ wëy, ko cɑm wun kyeel ki rïngø." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Remø ko cɑm wun, nyi køny wu en piny ni pï." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Keløg ciggɑni ómïdhi yi wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe óbëëd e med, kɑ bong-ɑ gïn cɑ̈nni wun, wuki kwɑrri wun." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Jwödhø geki wïj köngø bënn, nyi kïdhu gen kej mɑ̈ddø men-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Muuj wun kì kenyɑni kì wïj këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈d wun kì kenyɑni ki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø thyew, gɑ møg cɑm yi wun, kɑ remmi gen nyi køny wïj këli lɑm." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun bënn, o bëëd e bong gïn cɑ̈nni wun, wuki kwɑrri wun gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ wu gwøg-ɑ dyër, gïn-ɑ mïni pyëw Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ónɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun keny-ɑ ókedh wun, wu mɑɑg-ɑ piny gen, kɑ pinyɑni kwɑny yi wun, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ yije." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Keny-ɑ órum jurrɑni ki nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ko ngöyi ki yëth-ɑ nyi kwɑjji gen jwöggi gen, mɑ́ menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ gïn kɑ̈ni ki thøø." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko kwɑjji wun ki yëth-ɑ nyi kwɑjji jurrɑni jwöggi gen, mɑ́ kenyi kwɑjji gen jwöggi gen, ge nyi gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø mø mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Men-ɑ́ nyigi gen nyi rɑ̈bbi ge’ jwöggi gen kì wɑ̈thi këlli lɑm, gɑ gëdhhì." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Gwøgu gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun bënn, kɑ ge ko med wun, wɑlɑ̀ ko di gïn kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì ri gen." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Jøtöng wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ nyi bɑ̈gø ki lɑ̈g ócuggø kwøb ce ge ogöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø," 
Deuteronomy13:2 kipe kinni o wu cɑ̈gi wun ki kwɑjji jwögg mø nuti pɑ̈nyø kwɑjjø yi wun cøn. De cɑgg møg-ɑ kwøb yi gen bï gɑ dyër," 
Deuteronomy13:3 kwøbbi gen ko lïngi wun. Ge bɑ møg rɑɑng wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kipe kinni o yod mɑ́ mɑɑr wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pëthi wun bënn." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Lugi wun kì bɑng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ wør wun, lïngu kwøbbe kɑ cigge mïdhi wun, nyi mɑllu en kɑ yïëyø mi wun mïdhi wun." 
Deuteronomy13:5 De nyi nɑ̈g wun tyëngbɑg ki lɑ̈g, geki tyëngtöng møg-ɑ köbbi wun bɑnyi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́yïëël wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun, wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg. Ji-ɑ ni møgɑni rijjø, ge dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈li wun wɑ̈g kì yij bëëdø men-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ceth, o ri wun yiel wun ki rɑjjɑni." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Cɑgg ɑ́ ómyëw, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ̈dí, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑrí, wɑlɑ̀ cyëgí men-ɑ mɑɑr yi yïn, wɑlɑ̀ mɑ̈dhí mɑ̈nh-ɑ pere teg, yï ócuggø pɑngø yi en kì gød, kɑ yï thɑɑbe be kwɑjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, jwögg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge kwïj yi kweyyi wun." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Ódi ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen me thɑɑb yïn be mɑlli jwöggi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì keny, wɑlɑ̀ jwöggi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kun lɑ̈wi." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Rií ko wëggí thɑbø yi gen, yï ko pɑ̈nyi lïngø ki kwøbbi gen. Pyëwí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen, wɑlɑ̀ yijí ko ywöngi kipere, kɑ ge ko korrí." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Nɑ̈g gen! Wiy bëëde ɑ́ yïn ɑ kwöngi ki bɑ̈ddø, kɑ ge bɑ̈lli yi ji bënn." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Bɑ̈lli gen ki tuggi kïttì o ge thøw gen! Mɑ́ ge dwɑdd-ɑ peeji wun yïnø. O Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wiy yi wun, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel wun kì cingi Rïp kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun, wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Keny-ɑ ólïngi gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb yi tyëng Isrɑil, ge óbwøg, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø me göögø ki orøng ni menɑni këti." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Keny-ɑ ópëggu kɑ̈dd-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ólïngø kinni," 
Deuteronomy13:13 i dɑ ji mø rijjø kì kelli tyëng pödhi wun, mø thɑɑb tyëng kɑɑl gen be mɑlli jwögg mø nuti mɑllø yi wun cøn." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Keløg wu olïngø ki gïg ni møgɑni, yɑbu thɑ́ kwøbbɑni kidøøj, mɑ bëëd gɑ dyër, kinni gïn ni menɑni cwöbø. Keløg ɑ́ dyër," 
Deuteronomy13:15 kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni nɑ̈g wun bënn geki dhögi gen kí dyëgi gen thyew. Rënyu kɑɑlɑni bëne ceth, ko di gïn döng." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Cøngu jɑmmi kɑɑlɑni bënn dïkɑɑl, kɑ ge rɑ̈bbu Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gëëdhi, kɑ kɑɑlɑni wiy bëëde e rënyø gïti ɑtheer, ko cigi gerø këti." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Ko di gïjø me kwɑny yi wun kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kwøb kinni rënyi gen kinni tek, o liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwöje, o pyëwe lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki wun; pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun, kɑ wu óngënyø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun cøn," 
Deuteronomy13:18 keløg cigge bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn ómïdhi yi wun, kɑ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi en nyi gwøg yi wun." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Kenyi ywøg wun wɑddi wun møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw, ri wun ko nyi kɑggi wun ki pɑll, wɑlɑ̀ yëyyi bøli wun ko nyi lyel wun ni kenyi göög teen-ɑ kyeelø." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Wu bɑ jii Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ɑ́yieny yi en kì kelli jurri kömi piny bëne, o wu gwøge wun ɑ́ møge." 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Wu ko pɑ̈nyi cɑm ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ywëdhø. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Wu ócuggø cɑm ki dhög, kí dyëg ɑ́tegg geki römm," 
Deuteronomy14:5 kí nger, kí tenø, kí tɑ̈ng," 
Deuteronomy14:6 geki lɑ̈yy-ɑ yï gen di dɑdd, ɑ nyi dwöögø ki lum." 
Deuteronomy14:7 De lɑ̈yy-ɑ yï gen bong dɑdd, ɑ pɑ nyi dwöögø ki lum, ko pɑ̈nyi ki cɑmø yi wun: Amɑlø, kí ɑ́pwøjø, kí kunikït ge ko cɑm wun, ge ywëdhø, mɑ́ ge odwöögø de yï gen bong dɑdd." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki kundhøngø. Kundhøngø ywëdhø, mɑ́ yïe dɑ dɑdd, de pɑ dwöögø ki lum. Lɑ̈yyɑni ko pɑ̈nyi wun ki cɑmø, wɑlɑ̀ ko pɑ̈nyi wun ki nywɑlø ge thøø." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Wu ócuggø cɑm ki rijj-ɑ ri gen di kwɑ́j, o ri gen dɑ ótùn," 
Deuteronomy14:10 de wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïg-ɑ nɑm, ɑ ri gen bong kwɑ́j kí ótùn, ge ywëdhø." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Wu ócuggø cɑm ki winyy-ɑ dhïw. 
Deuteronomy14:12 De wu bɑ ɑkerø ki cɑmi winy møg: ótïngø, tulø, ólidh, kïïr, ójulø, cor, ɑ́gɑg, wudø, ɑ́bɑmɑc, ówɑngø, ogwørø, bøngø, ɑ́lebø, tögɑcwig kí ɑlïlït." 
Deuteronomy14:13  
Deuteronomy14:14  
Deuteronomy14:15  
Deuteronomy14:16  
Deuteronomy14:17  
Deuteronomy14:18  
Deuteronomy14:19 “Twöngg-ɑ ri gen di obërr bënn ywëdhø, ge ko cɑm wun." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Wu ócuggø cɑm ki twöngg-ɑ dhïw. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki lɑ̈y-ɑ thøw kete. Wiy cɑm yi tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, wɑlɑ̀ ócuggø ngëwwi tyëngpɑth møøgø yi wun. De wu bɑ jii Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. “Nyɑɑr dyel rømø wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø ko thɑl wun ki cɑɑg meye." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Nyi pɑ̈ngu jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì pwödhhi wun bënn gɑ pyɑ̈r, kɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈r nyi kwɑny wun, kɑ cïb wɑ̈ye kì yethi runn bënn." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Codhe, kɑ wu kedhu keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ keny mɑllii, kɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun cɑm kì kenyɑni, kì bøle, cɑɑm gen kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, eni byëlø, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí kɑyyi dhögi wun geki dyëgi wun. Nyi gwøg wun gïn ni menɑni ceth, o wu dïd wun ki wøri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Keløg kej mɑ̈ddø lɑ̈wi ki pɑɑ wun, o jɑmmɑni pɑ cuggi tërø, ngeew ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gëdhhi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g, kɑ ngyënyyɑni kïdhu kej mɑ̈ddø," 
Deuteronomy14:25  
Deuteronomy14:26 Kɑ ge ngëëw wun ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, ying-ɑ́ dhyɑng, wɑlɑ̀ dyel, wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ møgi byel, kɑ jɑmmɑni cɑm wun kì bøli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kunɑni wuki kɑ̈lli wun, ki medi pëëth." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun ko twöön wun, mɑ́ yï gen bong jɑmmì mø bɑ mø gen." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Nyi cøng wun ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun bënn kej ɑ́kyel kì kɑ̈ddi wun, kì ri thumi dɑ̈ɑ̈g runn." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Gïncɑm menɑni bɑ mi Kwɑrri Leebì, mɑ́ yï gen bong jɑmmì, gï nywɑg yi gen kɑ wëdhh, kí kïjj, kí thwömm møg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi wun. Nyi dwɑ̈ni gen ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen bënn. Nyi gwøgu møgɑni ceth, o jɑmm-ɑ gøggi yi wun bënn gyëdh yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Kì ri thumi bïryeew runn, kɑ ngyënyyi wun møg-ɑ cwɑggi ji wïyu gen, ge pɑ col këti." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Kinni ngɑn wïdhi wɑɑd gen ngeti Isrɑil ki ngyëny, wïye kwör ngɑnɑni, ngyënyyɑni ko col këti, kwörɑni ɑ́kyer-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree kinni ko pir." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ngyënyyí møg-ɑ cwɑggi ngɑnpɑth ócuggø pirø yi yïn, de wɑɑd wun ngeti Isrɑil, wïyí kwör-ɑ cwɑgge, ko piir." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny-ɑ mëgge yïn. Bong dhɑnhø kì kelli jii wun men-ɑ óbëëdø wɑnge cɑn," 
Deuteronomy15:5 keløg kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólïngi yi yïn kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn mïdhi yi wun kidøøj. 
Deuteronomy15:6 Wu ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe, pödhh mø gïïr ówïdhi kì yï wun, de wu pɑ wïdhi kì yï gen, pödhh mø gïïr ójɑɑg yi wun, de wu pɑ jɑɑg yi gen." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Keløg e dɑ wɑɑd wun me jɑ̈ddi kì kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈dd-ɑ piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kønyu en ceth." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Nyi wïdhu en ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en ceth. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Kɑ ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n wun, kipe kinni runi wiyi körr cyɑ̈ngø. Rumm-ɑ rijjø ni møgɑni ko wëggu bëën wɑ̈thi wun. Keløg e mɑ̈ɑ̈nu wïdhø, ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøk, kɑ wu óyïddø ki ker." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Thödhí wɑɑd wun yijí bong ɑ́dud, o jɑmmì bënn møg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Ódi tyëng Isrɑil mø nyingi gen cɑn, ge jɑdø ceth, yɑ ceg-ɑ wun cyee, ge ko nyi twöön wun." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Wɑɑd wun, ngeti Isrɑil ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, keløg ree ngëwwe’ yïn ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, gøøny o kedhe keny-ɑ órume ki göggi yïn ki runn ɑ́bïkyel. Gøny keny-ɑ óbëën bïryeew runn." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Keny-ɑ ógønyí, ko wëggí kedhø ki cingge," 
Deuteronomy15:14 nëngí kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gëdhhi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ɑ løg dyëg, kí byel, kí møgi oløg." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Pɑrru kinni wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg kì Rïp, ɑgøøny wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, bene ɑ bɑnge cïgɑ wun møg dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “De keløg bɑ̈ngí óbɑ̈nyø’ kedhø, ócuggø bëëdø, mɑ́ yï mɑɑr yi en wuki gølí, o pyëwe tyer-ɑ bëëdø ki wun." 
Deuteronomy15:17 Cïb ɑ́dyëddi ødí, kɑ yïthe twïy, ceg-ɑ gwøg ki bɑ̈ngí ki runn-ɑ ónëëne bënn. Gwøg bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn kinøw thyew." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Yï ko bëëd yijí teeg ki gønyi bɑ̈ng, mɑ́ yï ɑ́göggi yi en kɑ budi köögi mi ngɑn di kïr, ki runn ɑ́bïkyel. Ogønyií, gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn bënn ógyëdh yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Kɑyy-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ nywøl yi dhögi wun geki dyëgi wun, thyëyu gen Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ko gwøg gɑ møg göögø, wɑlɑ̀ yëyyi gen ko nyɑr." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Nyi cɑmu gen wuki kɑ̈lli wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì keny-ɑ bɑ kej mɑ̈ddø, kì yethi runn bënn." 
Deuteronomy15:21 De ke di gïjø me rɑj kì ree, ying-ɑ́ ngwøl, wɑlɑ̀ cwør, wɑlɑ̀ dɑ gïjø megø me rɑj kì ree, ko pɑ̈nyi ki ngɑ̈lli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Cɑmu møgɑni kì kɑɑl wun, cɑɑm gen yi tyëng-ɑ dhïw geki tyëng-ɑ ywëdhø bënn, ni rïngi ɑ́køny wɑlɑ̀ rïngi tɑ̈ng." 
Deuteronomy15:23 De remmi gen ko cɑm wun, nyi køny piny ni pï." 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Wøw Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì dwɑ̈y Abib; dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl, dwɑ̈n-ɑ́ yije ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Rïp kì wɑ̈r." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Kedhí keny-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ddi, kɑ yï ngɑ̈ɑ̈d kì kenyɑni ki órömø, wɑlɑ̀ wɑdh kì kelli jɑmmí, men cɑm ɑ́ Ákɑɑdh men wøøw Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Cɑm ki ópuun olwëny, cɑm wun olwëny, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ ópuun orɑng, ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, wu pɑr-ɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp wu ójwɑnø, cyɑ̈ngɑni ko pɑ̈nyi wïlø kì wɑ̈thi wun ki cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëën wun kì kömi piny." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Ko di kɑl me yije di ówɑj kì piny wun ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møgɑni, kɑ rïngi dyel wɑlɑ̀ rïngi dhyɑng men-ɑ ónɑ̈g kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl cɑm bëne kì wɑ̈rɑni ceth, ko di men wɑ̈dhi dhuki." 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Ngɑɑl gïi Ákɑɑdh kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø, ko ngɑl kì keny megø, kì yij piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ngɑl cɑ̈ng kedh-ɑ piny, ɑ løg bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Deuteronomy16:6  
Deuteronomy16:7 Thɑɑl rïngø kɑ cɑm kì kej mɑ̈ddø, kɑ yï døøg pɑɑrí dhuki kì mwøl." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Kɑ wu tyëg wun cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel wu cɑm-ɑ olwëny, kɑ ri wun cøng wun be mɑlli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng. Kɑ ko di gwøg kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Kwɑ̈ɑ̈n ki osboo ɑ́bïryew kì ri cɑ̈gi kɑj ki byel. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Codhe, kɑ Kwëër Kɑj gwøøg yï wør-ɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ yï muuj ki jwödhø me kyëëw ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gëdhhi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Kɑ yï bëëd pyëwí med kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wuki nyigí, kí bɑ̈nggí, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí wëdhh, kí kïjj geki thwömm møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl wun." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Mïdhu ciggɑni ceth, kɑ wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl kinni wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg kì Rïp." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Gwøg Kwëër Akɑnnì keny-ɑ órum ki kɑji byellí, kɑ oløg órumø ki bijø. Wøw Kwëër Akɑnnì ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Tug wun kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni wuki nyigí, kí bɑ̈nggí, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí wëdhh, kí kïjj geki thwömm møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl wun." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Wør wun Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwërɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø. Med pëthi wun mɑ́ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun bënn ɑ́gëdhhi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kɑj órumø." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn kì pödhø, nyi cugi gen kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø, tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij run, ɑ løg cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, kí Kwëër Kɑj, kí Kwëër Akɑnnì. Kɑ dhɑnhø nyi kɑ̈ne ki jwödhø," 
Deuteronomy16:17 men-ɑ cuggi yodø yi en, e kyëëw ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gëdhhii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Kɑ wu rööny wun ki jɑggi burø geki jɑgg-ɑ kyeelø kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jøgɑni jɑɑg gen ji yethi gen bong geny." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Ge ko bëëd gɑ tyëngruj wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ nyi gënyø, kɑ ge ko nyi yïëy ki kwɑjjø ki gïïpiny, mɑ́ nyingi dhɑnhø nyii cøørø yi gïg-ɑ mëggii, kɑ gøny rënye, cɑgg e ceg bëëdø ɑ́ ngɑntir." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Bëëd wun wu pɑ gënyø, wu gøgg-ɑ dyër, o wu ókwɑny wun piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu ócög wun wu obëëdø kì yije." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Keny-ɑ óger wun këli lɑm mi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bute ko cïbi wun ki ngïji yɑdh mi Aceerɑ̀, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Kɑ wu ko cwödhi piny ki löj mɑ kït, gïgɑni mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ko nyi ngɑ̈ddi wun ki dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ dyel me ree di gïnrɑj, menɑni mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Wu ólïngø kinni i dɑ dhɑnhø ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, me røngø kɑ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyeme." 
Deuteronomy17:3 Kɑ kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, wɑlɑ̀ cɑ̈ng, wɑlɑ̀ dwɑ̈y wɑlɑ̀ kyell, gïg-ɑ ɑ́kyer yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy17:4 Keny-ɑ ólïngu møgɑni, yɑbu thɑ́ gen kidøøj, keløg ɑ́ dyër kinni gïnrɑj ni menɑni cwöbø kì Isrɑil," 
Deuteronomy17:5 kwɑnyu dhɑnhø menɑni, kɑ kïdhu ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ bɑ̈lli wun ki tuggi kïttì, o thøwe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Nɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ kömi dhøggi ji-ɑ́ buti gen ɑ́gwøøg bɑ̈jjø menɑni gɑ ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ge ngenyø, de ko nɑ̈g keløg ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel ɑ köngi ce lïdhø." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Tyëng-ɑ köngi ce bɑ̈jjø menɑni liidh gen, gen ɑ kwöngi ki bɑ̈ddø ki tuggi kïttì, o teedø lunye’ bɑ̈l kì bɑng gen, bene yuu-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny rɑjjɑni kì kelli wun." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Keløg e dɑ gøny me teeg me dhɑ̈li løøgø yi jɑggi wun, me bɑ gøøny jɑmmì wɑlɑ̀ kedø, wɑlɑ̀ keløg e dhɑ̈lø’ yodø kinni ngɑn-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g dhɑnhø nɑ̈ggø e ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø, wɑlɑ̀ gø cɑɑg en kɑ tøønyø ki nɑ̈gø, kïdhu gøny-ɑ ni menɑni keny-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Kɑ gønyɑni thërri wun ókwër Kwɑrri Leebì, geki jɑngi burø men-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì bøli kenyɑni. Kɑ wiy gønyɑni løøg yi gen." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Gïn-ɑ ókwøb yi gen, en ɑ gwøg yi wun ceth." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Yïëy wun löggi gen, kɑ møg-ɑ ókwøb yi gen gwøg wun ceth, ko di gïn wiyu wɑ̈g kì ri gen." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn pyem dhøg ókwërø, wɑlɑ̀ dhøg jɑngi burø, bene yuu-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny rɑjjɑni kì Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Codhe, o óbëëd e bong ngɑn göögø’ nøw këti." 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Keny-ɑ órum wun ki kwɑnyi piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ yije, wu ókööbø ce wu dwɑdd-ɑ rɑ̈dh me jɑɑg wun ni pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ bɑdhhi wun." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Røny wun ngɑn-ɑ ómyeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kelli wɑddi wun, wu ko rööny ki ngɑnpɑth, ɑ́ rɑ̈dh me jɑɑg wun." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Rɑ̈dh ko bëëd yïe dɑ kyënyi liny mø gïïr, wɑlɑ̀ ko ödi Rïp ki jøg dwɑ̈ddi ki kyënyì, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kyëëd kinni jie ko døøg pönhɑni këti." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Rɑ̈dh ko bëëd yïe dɑ mɑ̈nn mø gïïr kipe pyëwe ókedhi wɑ̈ye kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ yïe ko di dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø mø ngenyø ki mendwøng." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Keny-ɑ ópëgge wïj kwøøm rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ceth, bëëde yïe dɑ wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøk, gwed e kwɑny-ɑ ri men-ɑ yï Kwɑrri Leebì ókwër." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Bëëd wɑ̈nyɑni kì bute ceth, o nyi rɑ̈nge kì yije kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëëne kì kömi piny, o dïde ki wøri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o mïdhe møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn." 
Deuteronomy17:20 O mɑ̈ɑ̈n rumø yi bëëdi wɑ̈nyɑni kì bute, kinni pere teg kibøli tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø, o Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cög gï pɑ pɑ̈nye ki pyemø. Bene keny-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki runn mø gïïr, kɑ Isrɑil jɑɑg yi kwɑrre ki rïjj mø gïïr." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Ókwër, ɑ løg Kwɑrri Leebì, bong piny me mëggi gen kì Isrɑil, de ge cɑm-ɑ jwödhø geki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ nyi mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Bong piny men-ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ mi gen ni kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø. Lɑ̈gø mi gen, bɑ bëëdi gen gɑ ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Kenyi ngɑɑl dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ dyel ɑ́ gëëdhi, nyi mëggi ókwër bɑd, kí lëmø, kí ɑkwej." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Nyi nëngi gen kì ri mwölli byel ceth, geki mwölli møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí yëyyi dyëg." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Gøl Leebì ɑ ɑ́myeg kì kelli kɑ̈lli wun bënn yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ men göggii gɑ ókwër, gïti ɑtheer." 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Ke dhwödh Kwɑɑr Leebì kì kɑɑl-ɑ bëëde kì kelli kɑ̈ddi wun, kɑ dɑ̈g-ɑ keny-ɑ tyer yi pyëwe," 
Deuteronomy18:7 wiy gööge ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni wɑddi gen møg-ɑ göögø kì kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈gge. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Nyi thödhi ceth ki gïncɑm me pɑ̈r ki men-ɑ mëggi ókwërr-ɑ kyeelø, o ke di gïn mëggii yi gøl gen kì kun-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le, bɑ mee." 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Keny-ɑ ókedhu yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ko ngöyi ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi jurr-ɑ bëëdø kì kenyɑni." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Nyigi wun ko rɑ̈b wun gɑ gëdhhì, kɑ ko di ngɑn thëdhø, wɑlɑ̀ rɑ̈ngø ki ɑjwøgø, wɑlɑ̀ kedhi yï tyëdd," 
Deuteronomy18:11 wɑlɑ̀ tyëng wëyrijjø, kɑ ko di ngɑn kedhi be pëjjø ki yɑdh." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki gïgrijjø ni møgɑni mɑɑn yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bene ɑ bɑnge cyeede jurrɑni wɑ̈g, kɑ̀ kedh wu kedh-ɑ pinyɑni." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Mïdhu yïëyø mi wun ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth.” 
Deuteronomy18:14 Codhe, ɑkööb Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Kì piny-ɑ yije kedhi yi wun, ji nyi kedh-ɑ yï ɑ́jwöggì be thyëdh, o ge nyi kedh-ɑ be pëjjø ki yɑdh. De wu bɑ ɑkerø yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gwøg ki gwøng ni menɑni." 
Deuteronomy18:15 De wu óöde ki jɑltöng ni yɑn, men-ɑ ókwɑny yi en kì kelli wun; kɑ kwøbbe ólïngi wun ceth." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cugi wun kì Kïti Sinɑy, wu ɑ́kwɑ̈jji kinni cwɑggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ lïngi wun e okööbø këti, wɑlɑ̀ kinni mɑc men-ɑ yije nude pɑ lidh yi wun këti, mɑ́ wu ɑ́bwøg kinni wu óthøw." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Ge ɑ́kwøb gïjø me døøj." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ge óödɑ ki jɑltöng ni yïn, kì kelli jii gen. Óköbbɑ gïn-ɑ ókwøbe, o ji ólonye’ köbbi møg-ɑ cïgɑ en bënn." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ókööbø kɑ nyingɑ, o ngɑn pɑ lïngi dhøge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø." 
Deuteronomy18:20 De keløg jɑltöng ókööbø ki nyingɑ ki wöödø me nuti köbbii yi yɑn, ceg-ɑ thøø kipe møgɑni. Jɑltöng men-ɑ ókööbø ki nyingi jwögg møøgø, ceg-ɑ thøø thyew.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 “Keløg wu órumø ki pëthi wun kinni óyod yi wun kidï kinni wöödø men pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Deuteronomy18:22 ke 'kööb jɑltöng ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe ocögø ge pɑ pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen, wöönɑni nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jɑltöngɑni 'kööb-ɑ cwɑgge, kɑ ko böggi wun." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Keny-ɑ órum tyëng-ɑ piny gen mëggi wun ki nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kɑ̈ddi gen kí uddi gen kwɑny yi wun, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ yethi gen," 
Deuteronomy19:2 pɑ̈ngu pinyɑni ɑ́ bud ɑ́dɑ̈g, e bunï dɑ kɑɑl me yije cuggi jwɑnø ki wɑ̈dhø yi dhɑnhø. Codhe, o ngɑn nɑ̈g dhɑnhø e ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø, ócugge’ yömmi yij ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni e yieel-ɑ wëye kɑɑlɑni." 
Deuteronomy19:3  
Deuteronomy19:4 Ngɑn cinge gwɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi dhɑnhø, e ɑ́bëëd e bong mɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì kɑɑm gen, yömme kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Nimi keløg ji ɑ́ryew kedh-ɑ wɑg be ngøl ki yenh, kɑ nget ɑ́kyel ongudø ki yɑdh, kɑ dørø pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ri böle, kɑ nyel-ɑ kyeelø nɑ̈g yi en, ngɑn-ɑ́ cinge ɑ́gwɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi dhɑnhø, yömme kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Ke bëëde ɑ́ kɑɑl ɑ́kyel ɑ nyi yömmi, ócuggø bëëdø e lɑ̈wi, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ́ cinge ɑ́gwɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi dhɑnhø ódhɑ̈lø jwɑn wɑ̈dhi yije, kɑ pïïd yi ngɑn-ɑ́ wɑɑd gen ɑ́nɑ̈g, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe, ngö dhɑnhø ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø yøw kì cingi wɑɑd gen." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Bene ɑ bɑnge kööbɑ kinni kɑ̈bbi wun ki kɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Keny-ɑ ólɑɑny piny wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun, kɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gø ómëgge wun bëne muuje," 
Deuteronomy19:9 kɑ wu kɑ̈bbi wun ki kɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g. Wu ómëggi pinyɑni yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keløg møg-ɑ cïgɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn ómïdhi yi wun kidøøj, kɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑɑr yi wun, kɑ wu obëëdø wu mïdh-ɑ cigge geki pwönye." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Gwøgu møgɑni o óbëëd e bong ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r me nɑ̈g kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kipe wu óyïddi ki cyën kì bɑng kɑ̀ nɑ̈g wun ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r, kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy19:11 “De keløg dhɑnhø mɑ̈n ki wɑɑd gen, kɑ gø libe, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge, kɑ reng-ɑ kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni," 
Deuteronomy19:12 öd jøgdøngi kɑɑlɑni, kɑ ngɑnɑni dwöög, kɑ wiy nɑ̈ɑ̈g kej cögø yi wɑddi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi en." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Pëthi wun ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ngɑn tir dhɑnhø ki nɑ̈gø; ko bëëd kì Isrɑil, o óbëëd e bong rɑj kì kömi wun." 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Keew wun ki wɑɑd wun ko cɑɑg yi yïn, kew-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng ko cɑɑg kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Ngɑn köngi ɑ́ ɑ́kyel kinni ngɑn-ɑni ɑ́bɑ̈jji, kwøbbe ko kwɑny gɑ dyër, de ji-ɑ köngi ce ge lïdhø, bëëd gen gɑ ɑ́ryew, o ngɑn-ɑ gøøny ócugge’ nyodhø kinni bɑ̈jjø." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn mënni kömi dhɑnhø ki kwøb kipe kinni o yïdde ki gïnrɑj," 
Deuteronomy19:17 kedhi gen yï ókwër geki jɑggi burø kì kej mɑ̈ddø, o gøøny gen lidh kì kunɑni." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Thɑ́ kwøbbɑni óyɑb yi jɑggi burø kidøøj, o keløg e óyod kinni ngɑnɑni mënn-ɑ kömi wɑ̈d Isrɑil ki kwøb mø pɑth ki dyër," 
Deuteronomy19:19 cɑɑy ngɑnɑni ki cɑ́y-ɑ di cɑɑy ngɑn-ɑ köme ɑ́mënni yi en. Bene yuu-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny wun rɑjj-ɑ ni møgɑni. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Keny-ɑ ólïngi gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb yi teedø, ge óbwøg, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø me göögø ki orøng ni menɑni këti." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Pëthi wun ko nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki møgɑni, cɑ́y bɑ kinni ceth, wëy col kɑ wëy, wɑng col kɑ wɑng, lëjø col kɑ lëjø, cingø col kɑ cingø, tyelø col kɑ tyelø." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Keny-ɑ ókedhu be nyɑɑg ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ wu ólïdhø ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí kyënyì geki yɑy me dwøng, me lod yɑɑy wun, wu ko bwøg yi gen. Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́yïëël wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp, óying tuung wun." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Kedhi ókwërø bøli yɑy, e liny nuti tuumø kɑ kööbe kinni," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Wun ɑ jø Isrɑil, lïng wun! Wu kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Wu ko bwøg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, wɑlɑ̀ pëthi wun ko nyönhi, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko myël." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cyɑ̈dhi kɑ wun, o wu ówëgge tyɑ̈mø.’" 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Codhe, o jɑngi liny köbbe yɑy kinni, “Dɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cer gyer ki ød kì keny, de gø nuti thyeey en? Ke di ngɑn nuti thyeey øde, døøge pɑc, kipe keløg e ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, øde thyey-ɑ yi ngɑn megø." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Dɑ ngɑn cer pïdhø ki bɑg kì keny? Ke di ngɑn pïdhø ki bɑɑg oløg, de nywøli oløg nuti pɑ̈nyø’ lemø yi en, døøge pɑc, kipe keløg e ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, bɑ ngɑn megø ɑ ókwøng møgi oløge ki belø." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Dɑ ngɑn nyömi kì keny? Ke di ngɑn nyömi døøge pɑc, kipe keløg e ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, nyɑn-ɑ nywøm yi en, ónywøm-ɑ yi ngɑn megø.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Pyëëj yɑy thyew yi pëjji liny kinni, ‘Dɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́bwøg kɑ pyëwe ónyönhø? Døøg ngɑnɑni pɑc kipe yɑy pyëwe ónyönhi kì bɑnge.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Keny-ɑ órum pëjji liny ki löggi yɑy, ngølli yɑy, kɑ wïj ɑkud nyi cïbi ki pëëji." 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Kenyi kedhu be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑɑl, nyi köbbu tyëng kɑɑlɑni kinni yömmi gen." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Keløg dhø döri kɑɑl óyieb yi gen, kɑ ge óyömmø, teen-ɑ kɑɑlɑni bëne ceg-ɑ gwøg ki bɑ̈ngg møg göggi wun." 
Deuteronomy20:12 De keløg kɑɑlɑni óbɑ̈nyø ki yömmø, de ge dwɑdd-ɑ nyɑɑg, tyeg wun kɑɑlɑni." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Keny-ɑ ówëggi wun mɑgi kɑɑlɑni yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nɑ̈gu jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn." 
Deuteronomy20:14 De tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn geki othønhø, kí dhög geki jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø bënn ócuggø kwɑnyø yi wun. Kwɑny wun jɑmmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb cinggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Bene kër-ɑ ógwøg wun pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi ki piny-ɑ óbëëd yi wun ɑnɑn. 
Deuteronomy20:16 “De keny-ɑ ómɑg wun kɑ̈dd-ɑ piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nɑ̈gu ji bënn." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Nɑ̈gu jiɑni bënn, ɑ løg tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng Perïdh, kí tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Yebus, nɑ̈gu gen bënn ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Nɑ̈gu gen, o wu cög wu pɑ kölli gen orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yi keny-ɑ ópwönyi gen wun ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen kenyi mɑlli gen jwöggi gen." 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Keny-ɑ ótyeg wun kɑɑl, wu dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgii, yenhi nywøl ko ngøl wun piny, cɑgg tyëg mɑg keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, cɑm wun nywøli yenhɑni, kɑ ge ko ngøl piny, mɑ́ yenh pɑth ki ji mø nyïɑ̈ggi ki wun." 
Deuteronomy20:20 De wu ócuggø ngøl ki yenh-ɑ kyeelø gɑ møg yïdhhi gïti keny-ɑ ómɑg wun kɑɑl. 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Keløg dhɑnhø oyodø e ónɑ̈gø kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ngɑn-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈gii kwïj," 
Deuteronomy21:2 kedh jøgdøngø, kɑ kɑɑm keny-ɑ ɑ́yood dhɑnhø røm ki kɑ̈dd-ɑ cyɑ̈gi." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Kɑ jøgdøngi kɑɑl-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki keny-ɑ ɑ́yood dhɑnhø, kɑ̈bbi gen ki røjø me nuti pɑ̈nyi køøg ki pwödhø." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Kɑ gø kïdhi gen tøg nɑm me pɑ nyi dwön, kì keny me nuti pɑ̈nyø purø. Kɑ mune tor gen." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Bëëd Kwɑrri Leebì ge nud kì kenyɑni thyew, mɑ́ gen ɑ cinggi gen di gøny, gen ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge göggi gen en, o ge nyi kwëng gen ji ki nyinge." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Codhe, kɑ jøgdøngi kɑɑl-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki keny-ɑ ɑ́yood dhɑnhø e ónɑ̈gø, cinggi gen lwøøg gen kömi rønyɑni," 
Deuteronomy21:7 kɑ ge kööb gen kinni ‘Dhɑnhø nuti nɑ̈g-ɑ yi wøn, o ngɑn-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈gii kwïj." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki Isrɑil, jií møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëël yi yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn, kɑ wø ko kwɑ̈nni cyënni ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r.’" 
Deuteronomy21:9 Bene kër-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wun cyënni ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r wɑ̈g kì kömi wun, keny-ɑ ógwøg wun gïndøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Keny-ɑ ówëggi wun tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij liny, kɑ wu ómɑ̈gø ki ji," 
Deuteronomy21:11 kɑ yï ólïdhø ki ngɑndhɑjø me myëër, kɑ dwɑddí ki kwɑnyø ɑ́ dhɑjø," 
Deuteronomy21:12 kïdhí pɑc, kɑ yëyyi wïje lyel, kɑ könggi lwedde teb," 
Deuteronomy21:13 kɑ ógudhe wil. Kɑ wiy bëëde kì gølí ki dwɑ̈y e ywøg-ɑ wɑdde, codhe kɑ kïdhí ød, o gööge ki cyëgí." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Keny-ɑ ógööge e pɑ dwɑddi yi pyëwí, tɑ̈ɑ̈ng, kɑ wiy kedhe, ko ngeew wɑ̈g ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki gwøøg dhɑjø yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Keløg dhɑnhø yïe dɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew, kɑ ge okɑyø ki wɑ̈dd ryeet, de nyel-ɑ dwøng pɑth ki wɑ̈d cyëge men-ɑ mɑɑr yi en," 
Deuteronomy21:16 wɑ̈d nyɑn-ɑ mɑɑr yi en ócuggø kwɑnyø yi en ɑ́ wïj kɑl, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ópɑ̈nge jɑmme møg-ɑ ólɑg." 
Deuteronomy21:17 De nyel-ɑ dwøng, ɑ løg wɑ̈d ɑ́lɑni ceg kɑ mëggi budi jɑmme bënn yi en, mɑ́ en ɑ bɑ kɑyi legge kidyër. Jɑmmì møge cïb gɑ møg di mëggi ji ɑ́ryew, mɑ́ kɑyø ceth ɑ bɑ wïj kɑl." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Keløg dhɑnhø yïe dɑ wɑ̈de me pëmø, mune teeg, o pɑ lïngø’ kwøbbi wïye geki meye, cɑgg gø ceg yi gen," 
Deuteronomy21:19 kɑ̈l yi meye geki wïye, kɑ cïb bøli jøgdøngi kɑɑl-ɑ bëëd yi gen. Kɑ gønye lidh." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Kɑ jøgdøngø köbbi gen kinni, ‘Wɑ̈d wøn ceg-ɑ pëmø, o pɑ lïngø ki kwøbbi wøn, rëny-ɑ jɑmmì, o bɑ mɑ̈dhi møgø.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Codhe kɑ nyelɑni bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì yi jø kɑɑlɑni o thøwe, o rɑjj-ɑ ni møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì kelli wun, o Isrɑil lïnge, o bwøge." 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Keløg dhɑnhø onɑ̈gø kipe gïn bɑɑj en, kɑ ngɑɑb ri lööj yɑdh," 
Deuteronomy21:23 ko wëggi nïnni ri yɑnhɑni; kony kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, mɑ́ dhɑnhø men-ɑ ryërri kì ri yɑdh köme dɑ cyënni Jwøk. Kony ceth, kipe piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbwöl yi wun." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Oliidh dhii wɑ̈d Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ dyele e pɑ̈rø, ko wøøy, döggií." 
Deuteronomy22:2 De keløg wɑ̈n bëëd ɑ keny me lɑ̈wi, wɑlɑ̀ ying wɑ̈n kwïj yi yïn, wiy bëëde kì yïí. Keny-ɑ óbëën wɑ̈n e oyɑ̈bø ki gøn, kɑ mëggií." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Gïi wɑɑd wun, ngeti Isrɑil keny-ɑ óyodií, döggií ceth, ying-ɑ́ ɑderø, wɑlɑ̀ ógødh, wɑlɑ̀ gïjø megø yøw." 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Ke pɑ̈ɑ̈dh dhii ngeti Isrɑil wɑlɑ̀ ɑdere, ko wøøy; køny wɑɑd wun ki tïngii kömi tyelle." 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ko rug ki ógudhi cwøw, kɑ cwøw ko rug ki ógudhi mɑ̈nn, ngɑn gwøg gïn ni menɑni mɑɑn yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Keløg winyø oyodø yi yïn e buud-ɑ kömi nywøle kì wïj yɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ kì piny, ying nywølɑni rumø’ tøgø wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti, meyi gen ko kwɑɑny geki nyige bënn." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Kwɑny nywøl, kɑ wiy meyi gen kedhe, o yï óbëëd kì kömi piny ki tɑrø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Keny-ɑ ógëëd ki ød me nyɑ̈n, gëddí tøgge kì wïje mɑl ki gël, e bɑ ɑwen bëne yi gëlɑni. O yï ócöög yï pɑ cɑy keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø me pɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì wïj ønɑni kɑ othøø." 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Yï ko kɑ̈ggi yij bɑɑg oløg ki gïg møøgø, keløg ge kɑ̈ɑ̈gí bɑg ɑ́kyel, yï bɑ ɑkerø ki cɑmi gen bënn." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Wɑdh ko twööj ri gïjø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ köög ki pwödhø geki ɑderø. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Yï ko rug ki ógødh men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki yëyy geki korø, gɑ ɑreb." 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Rudí wɑ̈thi tùngi ógudhí gɑ ɑ́ngwen bënn ki ojwɑrr. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Ke nyömi jɑlø ki dhɑjø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ ød, kɑ gø bɑnye kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny," 
Deuteronomy22:14 ce gø yood en e ree ókedhø yi jɑlø megø, kɑ gø løge nyɑnrɑj, o kööbe kinni, ‘Nyɑɑn ɑ́nywømɑ kidyër, de keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhɑ ød wøki en, ɑ́yodɑ ree ókedhø yi jɑlø megø.’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Keløg gïn ni menɑni ocwöbø, kedhi wïyi nyɑnɑni burø geki meye, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ ógønh-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi nyɑɑr gen ød, kɑ gø nyudhi gen jɑgg." 
Deuteronomy22:16 Kɑ jɑggɑni köbbi yi wïyi nyɑnɑni kinni, ‘Nyɑrɑ ɑ́mëggɑ jɑɑl ɑ́ dhɑjø, o ɑnɑn gø ɑ́bɑnye," 
Deuteronomy22:17 köme ɑ́mënne ki kwøb, ce gø yood en ree ókedhø yi jɑlø megø, keny-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen ød. De lidh wun ógønh-ɑ ɑ́kïdhii ød èn ki remø kì ree!’" 
Deuteronomy22:18 Pwööd nyelɑni yi jɑggi kɑɑl. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Kɑ köbbi gen cude ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg miyø, kɑ ge mëggi wïyi nyɑnɑni, gɑ møg geedh nyɑre, men-ɑ́ nyɑɑr Isrɑil. O nyɑnɑni ceg-ɑ cögø ɑ́ cyëge, ko pɑ̈nye tɑ̈ngø ki cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëëde bënn kì kömi piny." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “De keløg gønyɑni bɑ dyër kinni, nyɑnɑni ree ókedhø yi jɑlø megø, e nuti nywømø," 
Deuteronomy22:21 kïdhi nyɑnɑni dhøg gøl wïye, kɑ bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì yi jø kɑɑlɑni, o thøwe. Nyɑnɑni ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïnrɑj kì Isrɑil, kɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈be ki cwøw e nuti nywømø; nɑ̈g ceth, o rɑjj-ɑ ni møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì kelli wun." 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Ke mɑɑg jɑlø e niin-ɑ cï jɑlø megø, nɑ̈ɑ̈g jɑlɑni geki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́niine, o rɑjj-ɑ ni møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì kelli wun." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ke mɑɑg jɑlø e niin-ɑ dhɑjø me ceg ki nywømø, ge mɑg-ɑ kɑɑl," 
Deuteronomy22:24 kïdhu gen ryeet dhø pöör, kɑ ge bɑ̈lli wun ki tuggi kïttì, o ge thøw gen. Nyɑndhɑjø thøw kɑ per kɑ̀ nuti kïïw en keny-ɑ ɑ́mødii, ngö e ying-ɑ kɑɑl. O jɑlø thøw kɑ per kɑ ɑ́møde cï wɑɑd gen. Nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ceth, o rɑjj-ɑ ni møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì kelli wun." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “De keløg nyɑndhɑjø men-ɑ nywøm mød-ɑ pɑ̈l yi jɑlɑni, bɑ jɑlø kete ɑ nɑ̈g." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Kɑ ko di gïn göggu nyɑndhɑjø, mɑ́ e bong gïn-ɑ ɑ́bɑje. Menɑni pɑ̈r ki ngɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi dhɑnhø kɑ gø nɑ̈ge." 
Deuteronomy22:27 Nyɑn-ɑ nywøm ɑ́mød-ɑ pɑ̈l yi jɑlɑni, ɑ́kïïw ceth de bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lïngi cwɑgge, mɑ́ kenyɑni bɑ yij pɑ̈l." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Keløg jɑlø omɑgø e mød-ɑ dhɑjø me pɑ nywøm," 
Deuteronomy22:29 mëgge wïyi nyɑnɑni kɑ̈ny ceth, cole ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, kɑ nyɑnɑni gööge ɑ́ cyëge ceth, mɑ́ gø ɑ́ceg yi en kɑ mødø. Ko pɑ̈nye ki tɑ̈ngø ki cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëëne bënn kì kömi piny." 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Ko di ngɑn yɑ̈r wïye, kɑ cï wïye niine." 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Ngɑn bɑ órøj, wɑlɑ̀ cule óngul wɑ̈g, ko kwɑɑn kelli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì wɑ̈g, cɑgg ɑ́ kwɑrre gïti ri rïjj pyɑ̈rø, ko kwɑɑn kelli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Tyëng Amön, kí tyëng Moɑb, cɑgg ɑ́ kwɑrri gen, gïti ri rïjj pyɑ̈rø, ko kwɑɑn kelli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Kipe kɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi gen ki thödhi wun ki pï geki gïncɑm keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp. Kɑ Bɑlɑɑm wɑ̈d Beor jɑl Pethör kì Arɑm kïr yi gen, o wu lɑ̈mme cyën." 
Deuteronomy23:5 De kwøbbi Bɑlɑɑm ɑ́bɑny yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cyën løge gyëdh, mɑ́ wu mɑɑr yi en." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Pödhhɑni ko køny wun, o ge dönyi gen kinni tek." 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Tyëng Edöm ko bɑny wun, ge bɑ wɑddi wun. Kɑ tyëng Rïp ko bɑny wun mɑ́ wu ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny gen cøn." 
Deuteronomy23:8 Kwɑrri gen cɑg kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g rïjj, ócuggø kedhi kelli jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Keny-ɑ óbëëd wun wu ying-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ gur ɑ́ kɑɑl liny, këëj wun gïg-ɑ cuggi ywëdhi wun." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ke di jɑl me lɑ̈gø kì wɑ̈r, kɑ oywëdhø yi kɑ ɑ́kedhi ree yi tyew, rïïje e ying-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Kɑ lwøgge kì böörø, codhe o dwööge kɑɑl cɑ̈ng óbuddø." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Kɑ wu cïb wun ki keny me nyi meej tyel kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Kɑ dhɑnhø kɑ̈dde ki lodh me nyi konye kej cyëdhe, o gø nyi rïge ki lɑ̈bø kenyi rume ki mɑɑgi ree piny." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Mɑ́ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócyɑ̈dhø kì kɑɑl wun, e køny-ɑ wun, o wu tyɑm wun tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Mïdhu kɑɑl wun e dhïw, kipe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólïdhi ki gïn ywëdhø, kɑ ngɑ̈je luge wun." 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Keløg bɑ̈ng opɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì yï wɑ̈n, kɑ yömm-ɑ yï wun, ko döggi wɑ̈n." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Wiy bëëde kì kɑɑl-ɑ dwɑddi yi en kì kelli kɑ̈ddi wun, kɑ wu bëëd wun mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki en." 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Ko di ngeti Isrɑil ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø me göögø ki ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈j kengø. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Thyew ngyëny møg-ɑ yod kì bɑng gïn ni menɑni, ko kïdhi ød Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ wïj köngø. Ámɑ̈jji keng mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Keløg yï wïdh-ɑ wɑɑd wun ngeti Isrɑil ki ngyëny, wɑlɑ̀ gïncɑm, wɑlɑ̀ gïjø megø yøw, köme ko kïdhi keny-ɑ ócolii." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Wu ócuggø kïdhi kömi gïn wïdhi ngɑnpɑth ki ngeti Isrɑil, de gïn-ɑ widh yi ngeti Isrɑil köme ko kïdhi keny-ɑ ócolii; col ɑ́ en ceth. Mïdhu ciggɑni, o jɑmm-ɑ ógøggi yi wun bënn kì piny-ɑ mëgge wun gyëdh yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Keløg yï óköngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøg gïn-ɑ kwöng yi yïn kinni ógwøg yi yïn ceth, köngí ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ cwɑggí ceth, o keløg gïnɑni pɑ gwøg yi yïn, menɑni bɑ orøg." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Pɑth ki orøg keløg yï pɑ köngi kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógöggɑ gïn-ɑni.’" 
Deuteronomy23:23 O keløg yï óköngø, mïdhí köngí ceth." 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Keløg yï ócyɑ̈dhø yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij bɑɑg oløg mi wɑɑd wun, cɑ̈mmí yijí ki oløg, de yï ko kïdhi yij gïjø me kɑ̈lli yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Kɑ keløg yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ pwödhi gemè mi wɑɑd wun, mööd cinggí ki byel mø nyɑm yi yïn, de yï ko nyɑ̈ɑ̈r ki ɑ́ngön." 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Keløg dhɑnhø ónyömø ki dhɑjø, kɑ nyɑnɑni dɑ̈g-ɑ yïe. Kɑ bɑny yi pyëwe ge rum kedhi ød ki gøn, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïdde ki gïnrɑj kì ree, kɑ gø gwëde ki wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng, kɑ gø ryeme kì gøle ki wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng kì cinge," 
Deuteronomy24:2 keny-ɑ ókedhe kɑ nywøm yi jɑlø megø," 
Deuteronomy24:3 kɑ cigi bɑnyø yi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nyömi kì cyɑ̈n, kɑ gø gwëde ki wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng, kɑ gø tɑ̈nge, wɑlɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ cyɑ̈n ceg-ɑ thøø," 
Deuteronomy24:4 pɑ cigi kwɑnyø yi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́kwøngii ki nywømø kɑ gø tɑ̈nge, mɑ́ e ɑ́göög ɑ́ ɑbwöl, gïn ni menɑni bɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko thödhi wun ki ker." 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Keny-ɑ óbëëd dhɑnhø cer-ɑ nywöm, ko wëggi kedhi be liny, wɑlɑ̀ ko göög ki gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yɑy. Wiy bëëde kì gøle ki run ɑ́kyel, o tïïne wɑɑng cyëge." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Keløg yï wïdh-ɑ dhɑnhø ki gïïpiny, kïti ɑwɑɑj gøle ko mɑɑg ɑ́ men döggii keny-ɑ ócole gïnɑni, kipe gøle ójɑd ki gïn guur ɑwɑj, kɑ ge mɑg yi kɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Ngɑn kwɑl ngeti Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ wëdh, kɑ gø kïdhe be ngeew wɑ̈g ɑ́ bɑ̈ng, ceg ki nɑ̈gø. O rɑjj-ɑ ni møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì kelli wun." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Keløg rií dɑ lɑ̈y, gwøg gïn-ɑ köbbi yïn yi ókwër, Kwɑrri Leebì ceth; mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ gen ceth." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Nyi pɑr wun gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Miryɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kö yöö, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp." 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Keny-ɑ ówïdhí wɑɑd wun ki gïïpiny, yï ko kedhi gøle be dwɑɑyi ógødhe men-ɑ mɑg yi yïn gïti keny-ɑ ócool gïnɑni," 
Deuteronomy24:11 de cungí kì wɑ̈g, kɑ wiy gø muuje yïn." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Keløg ɑ́ jɑl me wɑnge cɑn, ógødhe ko nin kì yïí," 
Deuteronomy24:13 nyi döggií kì thyënhø, o ree nyi kume ki gøn. O yï ópøjji yi en, kɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe løg-ɑ me med ki yïn." 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Bɑ̈ng-ɑ göögø kì cingí ki köögi, ko ruj yi yïn, cɑgg e bɑ wɑ̈d Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ wëdh;" 
Deuteronomy24:15 nyi culí köönge cɑ̈ng nuti buddø, yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, mɑ́ ge bɑ ji mø nyingi gen cɑn, kipe óywøøg kö Jwøk, kɑ yï cɑy yi Jwøk." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Wëëg ko nɑ̈g kipe bɑ̈jji wɑ̈ddi gen, o wɑ̈dd ko nɑ̈g kipe bɑ̈jji wëëg gen. Dhɑnhø nɑ̈g kɑ per bɑ̈jjø men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kiree." 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Gïi wëdh kí gïi kïj ko kwɑɑny, kɑ ógødh thwöm ko mɑɑg ɑ́ men-ɑ ódöggii keny-ɑ ócool gïn-ɑ ɑ́widhe kì yïí." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Nyi pɑrru kinni wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg kì Rïp, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene ɑ bɑnge cïgɑ wun møgɑni." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Keny-ɑ ókɑɑj byellí, kɑ óyïddø ki møg rumø’ kɑjø møg wïlø kì pwödhø, møgɑni ko dwɑɑy, wiy ge gwen yi wëdhh kí kïjj, geki thwömm, o yï ógëdhi gïg-ɑ gøggí bënn yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Keny-ɑ órum ki lemi nywøli yenh dhetun møgí, yï ko døøg be lemi møg-ɑ ɑ́bodh, wiy ge lem yi wëdhh kí kïjj, geki thwömm." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Keny-ɑ ólem oløgí, ko loor ki lemø këti, wiy møg-ɑ bodh lem yi wëdhh kí kïjj, geki thwömm." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Nyi pɑru kinni wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg kì Rïp, bene ɑ bɑnge cïgɑ wun møgɑni." 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Keløg tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́ryew kedh-ɑ burø be gøny, kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen cwɑg, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø cɑy," 
Deuteronomy25:2 keløg ngɑnɑni cɑy kɑ pwödø, köbbi yi jɑgø kinni budde yije rum en piny, kɑ pwöd. Kwɑnni dëll-ɑ pwöödii kyëëw kɑ döngi gïn-ɑ ɑ́bɑj yi en." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Ócuggø pwödø ki dëllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, de ko di dhɑnhø me pwöd ki møg pöödh dëllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kipe wɑɑd wun pyëwe ónyönhi kì bøli teedø." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Wɑnh-ɑ pyejji gïn-ɑ pwööd byel dhøge ko nyi twööj. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Keløg nyiimëëg obëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ nyel ɑ́kyel othøø e bong wɑ̈d me wiy yi en, cyëge ko wëggi kedhi wɑ̈g, lɑɑg cyëge yi ómen." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Wɑ̈n-ɑ ókwøng yi gen ki nywølø, cöll-ɑ nyel-ɑ ɑ́thøw kipe wïje ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy25:7 De keløg nyelɑni pɑ dwɑddi lɑgi cï ómen, kedhi nyɑnɑni yï jøgdøngi pɑc, kɑ̀ kööbe kinni, ‘Ómï jɑlgølɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lɑgi yɑn, pɑ dwɑddi nywølø ki wïj ómen kipe wïj ómen ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Codhe kɑ nyelɑni cwööl yi jøgdøngø, kɑ köbbi. O keløg e nudd e óbɑ̈nyø ki lɑgii," 
Deuteronomy25:9 kedhi cï ómen yïe, kɑ wɑri nyelɑni lunye wɑ̈g. Kɑ nyingi nyelɑni ngudde ki lɑ́ɑ̀w kì bøli jøgdøngø ceth, kɑ ngɑnɑni kööbe kinni, ‘Bene gïn-ɑ nyi göggi ngɑn-ɑ bɑ̈nyi ki nyöddi ómen ki wïj ɑnɑn.’" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Gøle ócwøllì kì Isrɑil ɑ́ gøl jɑl-ɑ wɑre óluny wɑ̈g.” 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Keløg cwøw ɑ́ryew ónyïɑ̈ggø, kɑ cï jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen kedh-ɑ be cwɑggi jɑlgøle, kɑ mɑ̈nni jɑl-ɑ kyeelø mɑge," 
Deuteronomy25:12 pëthi wun ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ngɑndhɑjø menɑni, ngølu cinge." 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Yï ko mïdhi ki gïg nyi røm pegø mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n, megø thinh, o megø dwøng, kɑ yï ko mïdhi ki gïg røm bɑ̈r mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n, men bɑ̈r men cyeg." 
Deuteronomy25:14  
Deuteronomy25:15 Mïdhí gïg nyi rum gɑ møg-ɑ dyër, møg pɑ ruj, o yï óbëëd ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Tyëng-ɑ nyi gwëmø mɑɑn yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi wun yi kwɑrri Amɑlek, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun, wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp." 
Deuteronomy25:18 A ɑ́cög gen ge nuti böggø’ Jwøk, kɑ ge wïnn-ɑ ngɑ̈thi wun, ɑnɑ̈g gen tyëng-ɑ dhɑ̈rø yi wɑ̈dh kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n wun." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Codhe cyee, keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi wun piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ piny kidøøj, kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ bɑdhhi wun tyɑm yi wun ge bënn, nɑ̈g wun kwɑrri Amɑlek bënn kinni tweet, o nyingi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gen kì kömi piny. Wɑ̈thi wun ko pɑ̈nyi wïlø ki nɑ̈gi gen." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Keny-ɑ órum wun ki kwɑnyi piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ yije," 
Deuteronomy26:2 nyi kɑ̈bbi dhɑnhø kì ri mwölli jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cyeg kì yïe, ki dhöngø ɑ́kyel kì ri gïjø ɑ́kyel, kɑ gø kïdhe kej mɑ̈ddø." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Kedhe yï ókwërø men-ɑ nud kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́yïëy dicyɑ̈ngtïn kì bøli Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni yɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi yij piny-ɑ ɑ́könge kweyyi wøn kinni gø ómëgge wøn.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Kwɑɑny dhöngø kì cinge yi ókwërø, kɑ gø cïbe bøli këli lɑm mi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Kɑ kwøb møg kwøbe kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Kweyi wøn bɑ jɑl Arɑm, o ɑ́bëëd e owïïnø, kɑ gøle kïdhe Rïp kipe kinni o ge bødh gen. Ge ɑ́kedhi kunɑni kwɑnni gen nøg, de ge ɑ́göög ki pödhø me dwøng, me pere teg." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Kɑ wø göggi gïjø me rɑɑj yi tyëng Rïp, kɑ wø cïrri gwøg ki bɑ̈ngg." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Kɑ wø ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑ Jwøøg kweyyi wøn, kɑ ywøøg wøn lïngi yi en." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Kɑ wø yïëële wɑ̈g ki tegø kì Rïp. Ágöög ki ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø, kí gïg böggi mø døngø." 
Deuteronomy26:9 Kɑ wø kɑ̈ɑ̈le piny men, piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Anɑn yɑ muuj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mwölli jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cyeg kì yïɑ, kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëgge yɑn.’ “Codhe kɑ dhöngø cïb piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ mɑɑl." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Bëëd yï ópwöjjø kipe gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn, wuki gølí yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wiy Kwɑrri Leebì geki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun tuug gen kyeel ki wun." 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Kì bɑng runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, nyi mëggi ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí wëdhh, kí kïj geki thwömm, o ge cög ge bong gïn jɑ̈ddi gen kì kelli tyëng-ɑ bëëd yi gen. Keny-ɑ órum ki gwøgi møgɑni," 
Deuteronomy26:13 kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbí kinni, ‘Bong ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì, ɑ løg jɑmmi kwër mɑ ɑ́döng kì gølɑ, ge ɑ́mëggɑ Kwɑrri Leebì, kí wëdhh, kí kïjj, kí thwömm ni kɑ ɑ́ceg yɑn yi yïn. Ciggi ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì nuti wïlø kì wïjɑ, wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti pyeem yɑn." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Yɑ nuti kɑ̈bbø kì ri gen keny-ɑ ɑ́ywöngɑ, yɑ nuti nywɑ̈ddø ki gen keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ ywëdhø, o yɑ nuti kɑ̈bbø kì ri gen ki men kunyi tyëngthøø, kwøbbí ɑ́mïdhɑ ceth Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi yïn bënn kipe ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì ɑ́gwøgɑ." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Lïïdh piny, yï ying-ɑ kej kwërí kì mɑl, kɑ Isrɑil jií gyëëdh, kɑ piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc; piny kɑ̈r men-ɑ ɑ́mëggí wøn gyëëdh, ni kɑ ɑ́köngí kì bøli kweyyi wøn.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Wu ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni mïdhu cigge bënn, mïdhu gen ceth ki pëthi wun bënn." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Wu ɑ́yïëy dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ Jwøøg wun. Wu ɑ́rum ki yïëyø kinni, kwøbbe ómïdhi yi wun, o gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en bënn ógwøg yi wun." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Wu ɑ́yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wun ɑ́ jie, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe wun, ɑ ɑ́cege wun kinni mïdhu cigge bënn." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Wu ógwøg yi en wu døngø kibøli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈je bënn, o ówør kɑ nyinge lejji kì bɑng wun. Wu óbëëdø wun ɑ́ dïl jie ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Codhe kɑ teedø bëne geki pëjji Isrɑil köbbi yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Mïdhu cigg-ɑ mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn ge bënn." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbɑ̈ɑ̈n wun Nɑm Urdun, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cïbu piny ki ópɑ̈nni kït mø lɑjjø, kɑ kömi gen mwøn wun," 
Deuteronomy27:3 codhe kɑ cigg geki pwönyø men gweed wun kömi gen, keny-ɑ ókedhu piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bɑ Jwøøg kweyyi wun kinni gø ómëgge wun," 
Deuteronomy27:4 kɑ wu órumø ki wɑ̈dhi løøng-ɑcɑ̀, cwöödh wun ópɑ̈nni kïttɑni wïj Kïti Ebɑl ni kɑ̀ köbbɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kɑ ge mwøn wun." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Kɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gëddi wun ki këli lɑm kì kunɑni, ger ki tuggi kïttì mø tøggi gen nuti twïg wɑ̈g ki ngyënyø dødø," 
Deuteronomy27:6 mɑ́ kël-ɑ gëri Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi ger kɑ tuggi kïttì mø nuti twegø. Kömi këlɑni ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b wun ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, wu rɑ̈bb-ɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Kɑ wu muuj wun ki keni mër, kɑ wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun kì kunɑni pëthi wun omedø kì bøli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Kɑ kwøbbi cigg møg bënn gweed kömi ópɑ̈nni kït møg-ɑ bɑ ɑmwøn ge ónënnø kidøøj.” 
Deuteronomy27:9 Codhe, ɑköbbi teedø geki Kwɑrri Leebì ókwër yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Lïngu kwøbbɑ kidøøj wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, wu ɑ́göög ki jii Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, lïngu kwøbbe, kɑ cigge bënn mïdhi wun, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
Deuteronomy27:11 Codhe, ɑköbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Mosɑ̀ kinni," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Keny-ɑ órum wun ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑm Urdun, kɑ̈llì møg cungi gen kì wïj Kïti Geridhïm keny-ɑ ókwøøb kwëng, ɑ løg gøl Cimeøn, kí gøl Leebì, kí gøl Yeudɑ̀, kí gøl Isɑkɑr, kí gøl Yosep, kí gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Keny-ɑ ókwøøb kwøbbi cyën, kɑ gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí gøl Aceer, kí Dhebulun, kí gøl Dɑn, kí gøl Nɑptɑlì, cungi gen kì wïj Kïti Ebɑl." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Kɑ møgɑni kwøb yi Kwɑrri Leebì ki cwɑg mø døngø, ge köbb-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil kinni," 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn göögø ki ngïji mɑ kït wɑlɑ̀ yɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ ngyënyø, ɑ́ men mɑlle kì gød; kwɑjji ngïjjì mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’ “Kɑ teedø bëne lögge kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn pɑ wør wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni ‘Amen!’ 
Deuteronomy27:17 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn cɑɑg keew gen geki wɑɑd gen.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn peej cwør wɑ̈g kì yij yöö.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni ‘Amen!’ 
Deuteronomy27:19 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn ruj wëdh, kí kïj, kí thwöm.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn yɑ̈r wïye, kɑ óbuddø ki cï wïye.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn niin lɑ̈y.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn niin nyimen wɑlɑ̀ nyiwɑ̈n, wïyi gen ɑ́kyel.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn niin øre, meyi cyëge.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn luj dhɑnhø, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn kïr ki ngyëny kipe kinni o nɑ̈ge dhɑnhø me yïe bɑ̈r.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Cyënni Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn pyem Ciggi Jwøk bënn geki pwönye.’ “Kɑ ji bënn löggi gen kinni, ‘Amen!’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “O ke lïngí kwøbbi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cigge møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn mïdhi yi yïn, yï cïb-ɑ mɑl kibøli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Gyëdh møgɑni bënn bï-ɑ kömí ke mïdhí kwøbbi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Yï ócyɑ̈dhi ki gyëdh kì kɑɑl, o yï ócyɑ̈dhi ki gyëdh keny-ɑ óying yij pwödhø." 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Gyëdh óying kömi nyigí geki pwödhhí, yï ógëdhi dhög kí dyëg." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Byel geki gïncɑm-ɑ gwøg yi yïn ki byellɑni ógëdhi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn bënn ógëdhi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ótyɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ óbëën gen be nyɑɑg ki yïn. Ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ tung ɑ́kyel, de ge órengi ge tɑɑy wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Gwøgí ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ thebbí pɑ̈ɑ̈nge ki byëlø bëne. Yï ógyëdh yi en kì piny-ɑ mëgge yïn." 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Ke lïngí kwøbbi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gïg-ɑ cïge yïn bënn nyi gwøg yi yïn, wu ógwøge wun ɑ́ jie ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Codhe o lidh yi jurri kömi piny bënn kinni, wun ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wun ɑ́ jie, kɑ wu böggi yi gen." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Yï ónëngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki nywøl mø gïïr, kí dhög mø gïïr. Byëlø óceg twɑ̈lø kì piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi wun kinni gø ómëgge wun." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Yï óöde ki kønh-ɑ mïdhe kì mɑl kì bøli kej kødh ceth, o yï ócuggí ki wïdhi pödhh mø ngenyø, de yï koo wïdhi kì yï gen." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Yï ógwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bɑ Jwøgí, yïn ɑ́ pëëji mi pödhh mø ngenyø yïn ɑ Isrɑil, de yï koo pyejji, yï ócög yï døøj keløg yïëyí ómïdhi yi yïn, geki cigge bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy28:14 De ciggɑni ko pɑ̈nyi wun ki pyemø, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko pɑ̈nyi kedhi be mɑlli jwögg møøgø." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “De keløg dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ópyem yi yïn, kɑ cigge pyem yi yïn, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, gïgrijjø møg bënn ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi kömi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Kɑ̈ddi wun geki pwödhhi wun ógöjji cyën yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Pwödhhi wun ki gïgcɑmmi wun ógöjji cyën yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Wu ógöjji cyën yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu nywøl-ɑ nywøl mø nøg, kɑ pwödhhi wun ocögø ge pɑ ti cyegø, kɑ dhögi wun kí dyëgi wun løg-ɑ mø nøg." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun bënn ógöjji cyën yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Keløg wu ógöögø ki gïnrɑj kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑny yi wun, wu ógöjje ryɑ̈g, kí muumø, kí ɑkørr kì ri gïg-ɑ ógøggi yi wun bënn, gïti keny-ɑ ójwɑɑn wun ki tyëgø nɑ̈gø." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Ógöjji kömi wun ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, kɑ nyi cig-ɑ önø, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi wun kì piny-ɑ yije kedhi yi wun, ɑ́ men kwɑny yi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Wu ógöjji yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ köddi, kí lëdhi dëllì. Wu ógöjje mel kí ɑtunø me rënyi byelli wun, wu pɑ wiy yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì møgɑni gïti keny-ɑ óthøw wun." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Bong kødh men-ɑ ódëëm; lɑ̈bø ógöögø ɑ́ gïwi ni ngyënyø dødø. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Bøli keny di dëëm kødh, dëëm ɑ́ tør kí ɑyejø gïti keny-ɑ óthøw wun." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ógöjje tyɑmø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Wu ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ tung ɑ́kyel, de wu ócyeddi yi gen, kɑ wu reng-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, kɑ ji bënn kì kömi piny obwøgø keny-ɑ ólidh gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kiper wun." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Keny-ɑ óthøw wun, wu ócɑm-ɑ yi winy geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, bong ngɑn-ɑ óryem gen kì kömi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Wu ógöjji köddi dëllì yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni men-ɑ ɑ́göjje tyëng Rïp. Dëlli wun ógöjje lolø ki túd. Dëlli wun óbëëdø ge bøllø, kɑ dëlli wun ópëddø yïllø, de bong gïn yïëdø." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Wɑ̈thi wun ówëggi nungø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ógöjje cøørø kí muumø." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Wu óthɑ̈mmi kì dicɑ̈ng ni cörr, o yuu-ɑ kedhi yi wun pɑ yod yi wun. Wu koo dönyi cɑgg wu göögø ki gwøng teg. Wu ónyøn kɑ jɑmmi wun kɑbbi, bong ngɑn køny wun." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Yï ócuggø nywöm, de nyɑn-ɑ nywøm ótɑ̈ng yi jɑlø megø. Yï ógëdø ki ød, de yï koo bëëdø kì yije. Yï ógöögø ki bɑg, de nywøli yenhi bɑngɑni koo cɑm-ɑ yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Dhögí óngɑlli ge onennø yi yïn, de yï koo cyɑ̈mø ki rïnggi gen. Aderrí ókɑ̈l ge onennø yi yïn, de ge koo döggi yïn. Dyëgí ómëggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, de bong ngɑn køny yïn." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Wɑ̈ddí geki nyigí womɑ̈nn ómëggi tyëngpɑth gɑ bɑ̈ngg. Nyingí ótöd yi nenni yöö yethi cyɑ̈ng kinni nyigí ódwöög, de ge pɑ dwöög," 
Deuteronomy28:33 Byell-ɑ pur yi yïn bënn ki gwøng teg ókɑ̈l-ɑ yi pödhø megø, o bong gïn yod yi yïn den-ɑ́ orɑng kí rɑ̈ji bëëdø." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Wïjí ómuum kì bɑng orɑngí. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Dëlí ógöjji kɑ̈jjiledh mø pɑ nøggi, kɑ̈jji lol ki túd óbëëdø ge pɑ̈ng dëlí, cɑg kì wïjí gïti ri tyellí." 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Wu ókïdhi pödhø megø me pɑth wuki rɑ̈dhí yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ókïdhe keny me nuti pɑ̈nyø’ bëëdø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ kweyyi wun cøn. Wu ókwɑ̈jji kì kunɑni kì yï jwögg mø ógwøgø kɑ yɑdh geki kït." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ji óngɑ̈ng kì pödhh-ɑ yethi gen ókedhhi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu gɑggi yi gen kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Wu ókɑ̈gø ki byel mø gïïr, de wu ókɑj-ɑ mø nøg yøw, mɑ́ byelli wun ócɑm yi bɑ̈nyø." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Wu ópïdhø ki oløg me gïïr, kɑ ge pur yi wun kidøøj, de wu koo lïmø ki oløg, wɑlɑ̀ wu koo mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, mɑ́ nywøli oløg ócɑm yi twöngø." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Ólɑm ótwïy kì yij pinyí bëne, de yï koo lïmø ki nywøle, mɑ́ ge ódyëm ge nuti cyegø." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Yïi wun ódi wɑ̈dd kí nyigi wun womɑ̈nn, de wu koo bëëdø ki gen, mɑ́ ge ókɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑggi liny." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Nywøli yenhi wun geki byelli wun bënn ócɑm yi twöngø. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì piny wun ókedh ge ótëngø, de wu ókedh wu ónyönhø." 
Deuteronomy28:44 Yïi gen ódi ngyëny mø wïdhi gen wun, de yï wun koo di ngyëny mø wïdhi wun gen. Ge ógöögø gɑ jɑggi wun kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Rɑjjɑni bënn óying kömi wun gïti keny-ɑ óthumi wun bënn, mɑ́ wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun, kɑ wu óbɑ̈nyø ki mïdhi cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wun." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Gen ɑ nyi cɑ̈yyi wun ceth yi Jwøk wuki kwɑrri wun gïti ɑtheer. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Wu ɑ́gëdhhi gïïpiny bëne yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti göggø yi wun ki medi pëthi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:48 De wu ógögg-ɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l kömi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ rume bëëde kinøw, wu ómɑg yi kɑ̈j kí röödhø, kɑ wu cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, kɑ wu cɑ̈nn-ɑ jɑmmi bënn. Nyingi wun óguud yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti keny-ɑ óthumi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Kömi wun ókɑ̈ni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì pödhø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l cögi piny, pödhø me dhøge kwïj yi wun. Ge ócwøøy kömi wun ni cor." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Pëthi gen koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki dhɑnhø, ying-ɑ́ yu wɑlɑ̀ othinh." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Dhögi wun kí byelli wun ócɑm yi gen, de wu óywɑj yi kɑ̈j. Jɑmmi wun ókɑ̈l yi gen bënn, ɑ løg byel kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí dhög, kí dyëg, kɑ wu ywɑj yi kɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Kɑ̈dd bënn kì yij piny-ɑ mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óyɑg yi gen, kɑ dörri kɑ̈dd møg-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun cøør piny." 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Keny-ɑ ótyeeg kɑ̈ddi wun yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, wu ójɑ̈ddi ki gïncɑm, nyigi wun, nyig-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócɑm yi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Cɑgg ɑ́ jöd pyëwe ónyönhi, kɑ dïl nyɑre cɑme, mɑ́ yïe bong gïncɑm. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ónënge ki rïngɑni; ómen pɑ nënge; cyëge cyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑre pɑ nënge; wɑlɑ̀ kwï nyige møg-ɑ ɑ́döng pɑ nënge thyew." 
Deuteronomy28:55  
Deuteronomy28:56 Cɑgg ɑ́ nyɑɑr kɑl me dwøng, mɑ ɑ́ceg tɑ̈bbø kì yij kɑ̈r, ógöögø ni menɑni keny-ɑ ótyeeg kɑɑl gen, nyɑre men-ɑ thinh gø cɑme’ cɑmø. Jɑlgøle jɑl-ɑ mɑɑre geki nyige møg-ɑ kyeelø koo nëngi yi en ki rïngɑni." 
Deuteronomy28:57  
Deuteronomy28:58 “Keløg kwøbbi Jwøk koo mïdhi yi wun kidøøj, kɑ nyingi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ ceg ki böggø pɑ wør yi wun," 
Deuteronomy28:59 wu göjje’ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì mø pɑ cuggi tuurø wuki nyigi wun. Kɑ wu göjje yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g, me pɑ cuggi jogø." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì mø rijjø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun kì Rïp göjje’ wun, dëlli wun pɑ pɑ̈nyi yönø." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Óöni thyew ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì geki yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g mø nuti gwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøk men, wu óthøw."
