Deuteronomy28:62 Cɑgg wu ngënyi ni kyelli mɑl, bɑ ji mø nøg ɑ óbodh kì kelli wun, mɑ́ kwøbbi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti lïngi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe med keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøge wun, kɑ wu ódönyø, kɑ kwɑnni wun óngënyø, nɑ menɑni ceth, pyëwe óløg me med ki rënyi wun geki nɑ̈gi wun. Wu ódhwööy wɑ̈g kì piny-ɑ kwɑɑny yi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Wu ókedhhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kelli pödhh bënn, kì kömi piny; wu ówɑ̈dhi pödhh-ɑ cögi piny, kɑ wu mɑll-ɑ jwögg møg-ɑ ógwøgø kɑ yɑdh geki kït; jwögg mø nuti pɑ̈nyø’ mɑllø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ yi kweyyi wun." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Bong keny yod wun mër, o bong kej wun, wu ógöjji ywøøg yij, kí olïng pëëth yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Wu óbëëdø wu óböggø ki thøø kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng. 
Deuteronomy28:67 Pëthi wun óbëëdø ge opödø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng. Kì dicɑ̈ng wu cem-ɑ wɑ̈r óbï kì wɑɑng? O kì wɑ̈r wu cem-ɑ wøw óru kì wɑɑng? 
Deuteronomy28:68 Wu ódwøøg Rïp yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki yɑ̈thi nɑm, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ rum en ki kwøb kinni wu koo døøg kunɑni këti. Ri wun ópɑ̈nyi yi wun ki ngeew yï tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì kunɑni wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg, de bong ngɑn-ɑ ódwɑddi ngewi wun.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Menɑni bene lwöbø men-ɑ kɑɑm Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki tyëng Isrɑil, lwöm-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, nywɑg ge gøn ki tyëng Isrɑil kì Moɑb, reb ki lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb kì Kïti Sinɑy." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil cwøøl kej ɑ́kyel yi Mosɑ̀, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Álidh yi wun ki ri wun, eni gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki jyɑ̈gge kí pödhe bëne yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Wu ɑ́lïdhi ki ryɑ̈g me dwøng, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø, geki gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy29:4 De wu nuti wëg en yodi tyelli gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi wun. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Wu ɑ́pyejji yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij pɑ̈l ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, o ógudhi wun geki wɑrri wun nuti rënyø." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Yïi wun ɑ́bong-ɑ ópùn møg cɑm yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg geki møgi byel men mɑdh yi wun, de wu nuti ywɑjø yi kɑ̈j, kipe kinni o yod yi wun kinni, bɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kor wun." 
Deuteronomy29:7 O keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi wɑ keny, Rɑ̈dh Sïön, rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Bɑcɑn geki Rɑ̈dh Og, rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Kicbön ge ɑ́tëni kömee ki liny, kɑ ge tyɑm yi wɑ," 
Deuteronomy29:8 ɑkwɑny wɑ piny gen kɑ pɑ̈ngi yi wɑ kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Ruben ki Gɑd, ki budi gøl Mɑnɑsè." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Mïdhu lwöbø men kidøøj, o gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun nyi pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen bënn." 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Dicyɑ̈ngtïn wu ɑ́bëëd wu ócungø kì bøli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu bënn, pëjji wun geki jɑggi wun, cwøw," 
Deuteronomy29:11 kí mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí wëdhh møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, ɑ nyi nguddi wun ki yenh, ɑ nyi tëddi wun ki pï." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Wu ying-ɑ keny wu bënn ɑnɑn kipe kinni o wu lwööb wun ki Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o lwömɑni ómïdhi yi wun ceth," 
Deuteronomy29:13 o wu óyïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ́ jie, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe wun, wuki kweyyi wun: Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Pɑth ki wun keti wun ɑ lwöbø wuki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki lwöbø men, ɑ́ men mïdhi yi wun." 
Deuteronomy29:15 Lwömɑni ying-ɑ kɑɑm ji-ɑ cungi kì keny èn bënn geki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑ kí kwɑrree møg-ɑ nuti nywølø." 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun eni bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi wɑ kì piny Rïp, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́bëën wɑ, wɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ pödhh," 
Deuteronomy29:17 o ngïjji jwögg, gïg lɑ̈mmi pëëth møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí yɑdh ge ɑ́lidh yi wun." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Ko di dhɑnhø, ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, wɑlɑ̀ wïj ød, wɑlɑ̀ wïj kɑl kì kelli tyëng-ɑ lïngi møg kì keny èn, men-ɑ ólugi ngɑ̈je Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Menɑni óni gïn pidh kì pwödhø, kɑ ree løge men nɑ̈g ji keny-ɑ ócyege kɑ cɑm." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Ko di dhɑnhø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ keny èn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, tyëng-ɑ lïngi kwøbbi lwöbø men, men-ɑ órumø kinni bong gïjø me rɑj, cɑgg mune tëngi kɑ kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwöggi pödhhɑni. Ngɑn ni menɑni nɑ̈g-ɑ wun wu bënn, tyëngrijjø kí tyëngdøj." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ngɑn ni menɑni, de rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óceg lyelø ni mɑc, cyënn-ɑ ɑ́gwed kì yij wɑ̈nyø men ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi köme bënn, gïti keny-ɑ ótɑ̈ɑ̈y wïje piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ngɑnɑni ógwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn, o cyënn-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi pwönyø men, ceg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi köme bënn, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Kwɑrri wun kì yethi rïjj-ɑ óbï geki wëdhh-ɑ óbï be bëëdø kì kelli wun, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pìny mø lɑ̈wi, ryɑ̈g geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì møg-ɑ ógöjji wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ólidh yi gen." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Pwödh ógöögø ki ryɑng me yije pɑ̈ng yi kïbrït kí omelø, bong gïjø me kɑ̈g kì yethi gen, cɑgg ɑ́ lum pɑ twïy kì yethi gen. Piny wun ógöögø e nɑ Sødømɑ̀ kí Gømørɑ̀, kɑ nɑ Admɑ̀ kí Dheböïm, ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwe." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Lɑ̈bø bëne ópëjji kinni, ‘Á kipe ngø ɑ gwøøg piny men kinøw yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́wëggi pyëwe rënyø kinøw?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Pyëjjɑni óløøg kinni, ‘Bɑ kipe kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈d lwöbø yi jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni lwöm-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi gen geki Jwøøg kweyyi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ kedhi be mɑlli jwögg mø kwïj yi gen cøn, gen ɑ jwögg-ɑ ɑ́kyer yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ge ko mɑlli yi jie." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Bene ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ göjje piny gen ryɑ̈gg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyø men." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́ceg-ɑ rënyø ki menrɑj, ɑdhööye gïn wɑ̈g kì piny gen, kɑ gï leenge piny me pɑth, keny-ɑ di gen dicyɑ̈ngtïn.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Dɑ møøgø mɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ ɑkɑnn, de cigge ɑ́nyodhe, o ciggɑni di dwɑddø o ge mïdhi yi wɑ, wɑ ki kwɑrree gïti ɑtheer." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Bølí ɑ́cïbɑ jɑmmì ɑ́ryew ɑnɑn, ɑ løg gyëdh kí cyën. Keny-ɑ óbëën gïgɑni kömí, wu bëëd ɑ yethi pödhh møøgø, kì kun-ɑ ókedhhi wun yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, møg-ɑ ɑ́cïbɑ bølí ópɑr yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Keløg yï dwöög-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wuki nyigí, ki pëthi wun bënn, kɑ cigge møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn mïdhi yi wun," 
Deuteronomy30:3 Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun. Kɑ wu dwööge kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhe wun, kɑ wu dwøøge yij kɑ̈r këti." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Wu ódwöög yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cɑgg wu tɑyø, kɑ wu wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùngi piny, kun lɑ̈wi." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Wu ódwööge, o wu kwɑny wun piny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi kweyyi wun cøn. Wu óthödhe ki kɑ̈r kɑ kwɑnni wun óngënyø kibøli kwɑnni kweyyi wun kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Pëthi wun, wuki kwɑrri wun ólug yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑɑr yi wun ki pëthi wun bënn, kí wëyi wun bënn, o wu óyïddi wun ki nënnì." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Kɑ cyën møgɑk bënn gøøj kömi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud wɑngí." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Kɑ yï døøg-ɑ be lïngø ki kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cigge, cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn dicyɑ̈ngtïn mïdhi yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ógëdhe gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn bënn, kɑ nyigí óngënyø, kɑ dhögí kí dyëgí óngënyø, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ kɑ̈g yi yïn bënn nyi ceg-ɑ cyegø kidøøj. Pyëwe óløg me med ki gwøgí, o yï dönyí ni döny-ɑ ɑ́dönyi kweyyi wun." 
Deuteronomy30:10 De lïngu kwøbbe, kɑ cigge bënn mïdhi wun, geki pwönye, ɑ løg møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyø men." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Cigg-ɑ mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn pɑ teeg, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ lɑ̈wi ki wun." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Ciggɑni pɑ ying mɑl, o wu koo pëjji kinni, ‘Á men ɑ ókedhi mɑl be muuji wɑ ciggɑni, o ge lïngi yi wøn, o gïn-ɑ kømmi yi gen gwøg yi wɑ?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 O ge pɑ ying løøg nɑɑm omelø. O wu koo pëjji kinni, ‘Á men ɑ ókedhi løøg nɑɑm omelø be muuji gen wøn, o ge lïngi yi wøn, o gïn-ɑ kømmi yi gen gwøg yi wøn?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Pɑth ki gen, ciggɑni ying-ɑ yïi wun keny, ge nud kì pyëwí, o ge ócuggø kwøbø yi yïn, kɑ gïn-ɑ kømmi yi gen gwøg yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Dicyɑ̈ngtïn bølí cïbɑ’ jɑmmì ɑ́ryew mø kelli gen kɑ̈bbi yi yïn, kɑɑm gïnrɑj kí gïndøj, thøø kí nënnì." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Ke lïngí ciggi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn dicyɑ̈ngtïn; ke mɑɑrií kɑ gïn-ɑ kømme gwøg yi yïn, kɑ cigge bënn mïdhí, wu ódönyø, kɑ wu ogöögø ki pödhø me dwøng. Wu ógyëdh yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij piny-ɑ kwɑɑny yi wun." 
Deuteronomy30:17 De keløg wu ópëmø kɑ wu ódhɑ̈lø lïngø, kɑ wu thɑɑb be kwɑjji jwögg møøgø," 
Deuteronomy30:18 wu órënyi. Wun ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kyëddø yi yɑn èn, ke pëëm wun, wu koo bëëdø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì løøg Nɑm Urdun, piny-ɑ kwɑɑny yi wun." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Anɑn yɑ cwööl-ɑ mɑl geki piny, o ge lïng gen dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni, bøli wun ɑ́cïbɑ’ nënnì geki thøø, kí gyëdh geki cyën. Myeg wun nënnì, o wu ónëën wun, wuki kwɑrri wun!" 
Deuteronomy30:20 Mɑɑr Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ møg-ɑ kømme nyi gwøøg, kɑ yïëyí mïdhí, o yï óbëëd wuki kwɑrrí ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́kwönge kinni gø ómëgge kweyyi wun Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Mosɑ̀ nudd e okööbø ki tyëng Isrɑil," 
Deuteronomy31:2 okööbø kinni, “Runnɑ ɑ́göög ki miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, yɑ ɑ́yöø, yɑ pɑ cuggi bëëdø yɑn ɑ́ pëëji mi wun këti. Yɑ ɑ́köbbi thyew yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i Nɑm Urdun pɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi yɑn." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ócyɑ̈dhi kì bøli wun, kɑ pödhh-ɑ bëëdø kì pinyɑni nɑ̈ge, o piny gen kwɑny yi wun, o bɑ Jöcwø ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ pëëji mi wun ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Pödhhɑni ónɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge Sïön geki Og, rɑ̈nhi tyëng Amör, kɑ pödhi gen tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu ówëgge tyɑmi gen, de gwøgu gen ceth ni møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Cwedu pëthi wun, kɑ wu ko böggi. Wu ko bwøg yi gen, Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ócyɑ̈dhi ki wun. Wu pɑ wøy yi en, o wu pɑ wiye piny.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Codhe, ɑcwøøl Jöcwø yi Mosɑ̀ kɑ gø köbbe kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni, “Cwed pyëwí kɑ yï ko böggi, bɑ yïn ɑ ópeej ji møg be kwɑnyi piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi kweyyi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni gø ómëgge gïn." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Wu ópyejj-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree. Wu pɑ wøy yi en, o wu pɑ wiye piny, de cwed wun pëthi wun, kɑ wu ko böggi.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Codhe, kɑ Ciggi Jwøk gwed yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ gï mëgge Kwɑrri Leebì ókwër, jøg-ɑ mïdhi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, geki jɑggi Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Kɑ gï cege kinni, “Kenyi thumi runn ɑ́bïryew, kenyi bëën run-ɑ nyi wiy körr, nyi rɑɑng cigg møg kì kej wööwi Kwëër Akɑnnì." 
Deuteronomy31:11 Nyi rɑ̈ngu ciggɑni tyëng Isrɑil, kenyi bëën gen be mɑlli Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì keny-ɑ ómyeg yi en ɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Cwööl jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn geki othønhø kí wëdhh møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddi wun, o ciggɑni lïngi yi gen bënn, o Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wør, o cigge geki pwönye mïdhi kidøøj." 
Deuteronomy31:13 O kwɑrri wun, ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi ciggi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki lïngø, lïng gen. O ge dïd gen ki mïdhi kwøbbe kì piny-ɑ ókwɑny yi gen kì løøg Nɑm Urdun.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Codhe, kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kej thøwí ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Cwøl Jöcwø kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhø Kemi Kwër, o ceg yi yɑn.” Kɑ Mosɑ̀ kedh-ɑ dhø Kemi Kwër geki Jöcwø," 
Deuteronomy31:15 Acwöb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli gen kì yij lööj pøølø kì dhø Kemɑni. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki thøø. Ji ódøøg be pëmø kì bɑng thøwí, kɑ lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm wøn ki gen pɑ̈d yi gen. Yɑ ówiy piny yi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwöggi piny-ɑ yije kedhi yi gen." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Keny-ɑ ócwöb gïg ni møgɑni, pyëwɑ órënyi ki gen, kɑ ge wiyɑ piny, o ge rënyi gen, ryɑ̈g me dwøng ópɑ̈dhi kömi gen, o óyod yi gen ceth, kinni rɑjjɑni ɑ́bï kömi gen kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ tøøk kì kelli gen." 
Deuteronomy31:18 O ge koo køny yi yɑn, mɑ́ ge ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø." 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Anɑn gwed wörø men. Kɑ pwönyí tyëng Isrɑil, o ócunge ɑ́ gïn-ɑ köme ócɑ̈yyi gen." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ge ókïdhɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ kweyyi gen kinni gø ómëggɑ gen, eni piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc. Bong gïncɑm men-ɑ ócɑ̈nni gen kì kunɑni, o ge óbëëdø pëthi gen omedø. De wɑ̈thi gen óløg gen be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, yɑ óbɑny yi gen kɑ lwöbø pɑ̈d yi gen," 
Deuteronomy31:21 kɑ ryɑ̈g me dwøng bï-ɑ kömi gen. De wörø men ónudd e owörø ceth, o bɑ wörɑni ɑ ócɑ̈yyi gen. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ nuti kïdhi yɑn gen yij piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni gø ómëggɑ gen ceth, gïn-ɑ rømmi yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Wörɑni ɑ́gwed yi Mosɑ̀ kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, kɑ gø pwönye tyëng Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Codhe, ɑlunyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwøb ki Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Cwed pyëwí kɑ yï ko böggi. Bɑ yïn ɑ ópeej tyëng Isrɑil yij piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni gø ómëggɑ gen ceth, o yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki wun.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Kɑ Ciggi Jwøk gweed yij wɑ̈nyø yi Mosɑ̀, bong nyɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wëgge bodhø." 
Deuteronomy31:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume gwedi gïn, ɑköbbe ókwër Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Kwɑny wun wɑ̈nyø men, wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøk, kɑ cïb wun buti Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o óbëëde ɑ́ gïn-ɑ köme ócɑ̈yyi jii Jwøk." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Tegi muddi wun ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, o wu pëddi pëmø, keløg wu opëmø ki dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ nud ɑnɑn kì kelli wun, óbëëd ɑ dï keny-ɑ óthøwɑ!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Cungu wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli wun kí jɑggi gen bølɑ keny, o ge köbbɑ møgɑni, mɑl kí piny ócwöölɑ, o wu köbbɑ kì bøli gen." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni keny-ɑ órumɑ’ thøø, ji ógöögø ki tyëngrijjø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ gen bɑny yi gen, kɑ ryɑ̈g me dwøng bï-ɑ kömi gen. Mɑ́ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ówëggi gen rënyø, keny-ɑ ógwøg gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́kyer yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Kɑ wörø men wör yi Mosɑ̀, e tyëng Isrɑil bënn olïngø." 
Deuteronomy32:1 “Mɑl wuki piny, lïngu kwøbbɑ, lïngu kwøbbɑ kidøøj." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Kwøbbɑ ódyëm ni kødh, ge ónënni ge nɑ thöjj kì piny. Kwøbbɑ ódyëm ni onywiyì kì kömi ɑ́pöjø, ni onywiyi kødh kì kömi lum me lewø." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólenhi, jie ókööbø ki kwøbbi dönge." 
Deuteronomy32:4 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene ngɑn teg men-ɑ kor wun, ying-ɑ keje o pɑ nyi rujø. Jwøøg wun nyi kømm-ɑ dyër dhøge pɑ nyi wil yi en. Nyi gøgg-ɑ gïgdøj mø bɑ dyër." 
Deuteronomy32:5 De wu pɑ nyi mïdhi ki yïëyø mi wun; wu pɑ døøj ki bëëdø wun ɑ́ jie, wu bɑ pödhi orøg, wu pëddi wëënyø." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Men bene yuu-ɑ mïdhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ wɑ̈thi wun nøg, pëthi wun bong gïn? Bɑ wïyi wun, en ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j wun, kɑ wu gwøge wun ɑ́ pödhø." 
Deuteronomy32:7 “Rum wun kì ri møg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh kɑ̈ge dööng, pyëj wun wëëg wun ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn, pyëj wun tyëngdøngø, o wu köbbi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng, pödhh ɑ́ngude ki pìnyi gen. Keny-ɑ bëëd yi ji kwøb-ɑ yi en. Kömi pödhø nyi cïbe’ cïbø ki ngeti mɑl." 
Deuteronomy32:9 De Yɑgob geki kwɑrre ɑ́kwɑny yi en gɑ jie. 
Deuteronomy32:10 “Gï ɑ́yode ge wïïn ɑ yij pɑ̈l, pɑ̈l me yije kwöddi yi ɑtunø. Gï ɑ́konge kɑ gï korre ki mendwøng, ni kongg-ɑ di kongge ree." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Isrɑil ɑ́korri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni cor ɑ nyi gɑm nyɑre ki obërre kenyi pwönye gøn ki pɑ̈rrø. Isrɑil ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete ɑ ɑ́pyejji jie, bong jwøng pɑth mɑ ɑ́kønyii." 
Deuteronomy32:13 “Gï ɑ́wëgge jɑggi myërri kwøømø ge cɑm-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì yethi pwödh. Ge ɑ́yïddi ki møøw kïc kì kelli kïttì, oløøg gen ɑ́pëddi cyegø kì piny-ɑ di kïttì." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Dhögi gen geki dyëgi gen köthi gen dɑ cɑngø bëne, dhög-ɑ døj kí dyëg römm kí ɑ́tegg ying-ɑ yï gen, kí gemè men-ɑ lwiy geki møgi oløg men-ɑ med." 
Deuteronomy32:15 “Jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kɑ̈ri, de muddi gen teeg, ge cwiy, o ge yɑ̈ngø yɑ̈ngø. Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j gen ɑ́wiy gen piny, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel gen ki tegø ɑ́bɑny gen." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́mɑg yi tyiel, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kwɑjji gen jwögg mø bɑ ngïjjì, pyëwe ɑ́rënyi yi gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Ge ngɑ̈dd-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër ki gëdhhì, jwögg mø nyɑ̈n mø kwïj yi kweyyi gen cøn. jwögg mø kwøbbi gen nuti pɑ̈nyø mïdhø yi Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki Jwøøg gen, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel gen ki tegø, ɑ ɑ́nëngi gen ki wëy." 
Deuteronomy32:19 “Pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rënyi keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe møgɑni, ɑbɑnye wɑ̈dde kí nyige womɑ̈nn." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Ge pɑ cigɑ kønyø, o gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi gen lidhɑ gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ muddi gen teeg, ɑ pɑ nyi mïdhi yïëyø mi gen." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Pyëwɑ ɑ́wëggi gen rënyø yi kɑ̀ kwɑjji gen ngïjji jwögg. Yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi tyiel ki gïg-ɑ cwølli gen gɑ jwögg, gen ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki jwögg kidyër. Pëthi gen ówëggɑ rënyø kɑ pödhø megø, ge ówëggɑ mɑgø yi tyiel ki pödhø me jie bɑ dhëgg." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Linyɑ ólyel ni mɑc, kɑ gïïpiny bëne rɑ̈be kì kömi piny. Mɑnyɑni ówɑ̈dhi piny thɑ lɑ̈bø, kɑ tyelli kïttì rɑ̈be." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Yɑ ógöjji kömi gen ki ryɑ̈ng pɑ thumi, nywøli wethɑ bënn óthumi ri gen." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Ge ónɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j geki lëdhi dël, ge ónɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì mø rijjø. Ge óödɑ ki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l møg cɑm gen, kí thöll-ɑ bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, møg kɑ̈ɑ̈j gen." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ge ónɑ̈g yi liny kì yethi yëëth, bong kɑl men-ɑ ódöng e pɑ ywöngi. Yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb kí wojur óthøw, othønh-ɑ dhødh geki ywödhh pɑ wiy yi yɑn." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ge di ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi yɑn ge bënn, o bëëd e bong ngɑn-ɑ ópɑr gen." 
Deuteronomy32:27 De tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø pɑ wëggɑ pwödi köthi gen ce jiɑ tyɑɑm gen, e ceg bëëdø ɑ́ yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g gen." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Isrɑil bɑ pödhø me pyëwe bong gøn, bong peli wïj kì yï gen kinni tek." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li yodi gïn-ɑ pere ɑ́tyɑɑm gen, gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen," 
Deuteronomy32:30 Ji ɑ́lïp gede ɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm gen yi nget ɑ́kyel, kɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø tyɑm yi ji ɑ́ryew? Ge ɑ́wiy piny yi Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ɑ́weddi yi Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ teg." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Ngɑ̈nyi yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kinni jwögg-ɑ kyeelø nyødh, ge pɑ teg ni Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø rijjø ni tyëng Sødømɑ̀ kí Gømørɑ̀, ge nɑ oløg me nywøl ki nywøl mø keej, mø nɑ̈gø." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Møgi oløg mi gen bɑ kuggi thwöl. 
Deuteronomy32:34 “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi gen yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø pɑ wïl kì wïj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de yïd-ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ócɑye gïn." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Gøølø ócol yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gï ócɑye bøli keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen obëënø, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ryɑ̈g ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki bëën kömi gen." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie óyiele keny-ɑ ólidhe gïn ge nyönhø. Pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki tyëng-ɑ göggii keny-ɑ ólidhe gïn ge dhɑ̈rø. 
Deuteronomy32:37 Codhe, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie pyëje kinni, “Jwögg-ɑ teg møg-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh yi wun ɑ́gøne gen?" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Ge ɑ́cɑɑm yi wun kɑ dwɑ̈lli gëdhhi wun, kɑ ge nyi nëngi wun ki møgi oløg men mɑdh yi gen. Adɑ́ wiy ge bï gen be kønyi wun ɑnɑn, wiy ge rïngi gen be yieli wun." 
Deuteronomy32:39 “ ‘Bɑ yɑn, yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ Jwøk, bong jwøg megø mɑ dyër. Yɑn ɑ nyi nɑ̈gø, ɑ nyi muujø ki wëy, ɑ nyi tuurø. bong ngɑn jog yɑn kɑ yɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈ne gwøgi gïn dwɑddɑ gwøgø." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø cingɑ tïngɑ’ mɑl kɑ yɑ óköngø kinni," 
Deuteronomy32:41 pilɑ, pil-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dø pɑgɑ’ pɑgø, o yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni gøggi dyër ceth. Gøølɑ ócolɑ ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn cɑyɑ’ cɑyø." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Nywøli wethɑ ólɑɑj piny ki remmi gen, tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn bënn, ónɑ̈g yi pilɑ. Ngɑn nyïɑ̈ggi ki yɑn pɑ wiy cɑgg ɑ́ ji mø ri gen di kedd wɑlɑ̀ ɑmɑgg, ge ceg-ɑ thøø.’" 
Deuteronomy32:43 “Wun ɑ pödhh bënn, lenhu jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyëng-ɑ nɑ̈g jie nyi cɑye’ cɑyø. Gøøle nyi cole’ colø ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ lɑɑwe nyi dwööge piny kipe orøøg jie.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Wörɑni ɑ́wör yi Mosɑ̀ geki Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, kɑ gø nyi cigi gen göönyø, kipe kinni o dïd yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Mosɑ̀ ki pwönyi teedø ki kwøbbi Jwøk," 
Deuteronomy32:46 ɑkööbe kinni, “Wɑ̈thi wun ko wëggu wïlø ki mïdhi cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, nyi cigu gen köbbi nyigi wun, o yïëyø mi gen cöge e pɑ wil yi gen, o ge cög gen ge mïdh-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Kwøbbɑni pɑth ki kwøb yøw, bene gen wëyi wun. Mïdhu gen ceth, o wu óbëëd wun ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì piny-ɑ yije kedhi yi wun ɑnɑn wu kedh-ɑ be kwɑnyii.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth kinni," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Kedhí Kïti Abɑrïm kì piny Moɑb, ɑ rwöm ki kɑɑl Yerikö, kɑ yï yedhí wïj Kïti Nebö, kɑ yï lïïdh piny Kɑnɑɑn, piny-ɑ mëggɑ tyëng Isrɑil." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Yï óthøw kì wïj kïnɑni ni ómyëw Aɑron ɑ ɑ́thøw wïj Kïti Ör," 
Deuteronomy32:51 kipe kɑ̀ nuti mïdhu yïëyi wun ki yɑn kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil, yɑ nuti wøør wun kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil kì kömi pïi Merïbɑ̀, kì buti kɑɑl Kɑdic kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Dhin." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Pinyɑni ólidh yi yïn yï lɑ̈wi ki en, de yï pɑ kedhi yij piny-ɑ mëggɑ tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Møg bene kwëngg-ɑ ɑ́kwëëng kɑ̈lli Isrɑil yi Mosɑ̀ jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk. 
Deuteronomy33:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kïti Sinɑy ɑ́tuul ni cɑ̈ng kì Edöm kɑ omënyø kì kömi jie e cɑre kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kïti Pɑrɑn. Ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ wëywödd ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø, kí mɑc me pɑ̈mmø kì wïj kyëje." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie mɑɑr yi en, ji-ɑ bɑ møge korre’ korrø. Bøødh wɑ riee dhøggi tyelle, kɑ cigge mïdhi wɑ." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Mosɑ̀ ómïdhi yi wøn, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ bɑ kɑ̈r kì yï pödhi wøn." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́göög ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng Isrɑil keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen cugø kì kej ɑ́kyel geki jɑggi gen. 
Deuteronomy33:6 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Mosɑ̀ kipe gøl Ruben ek: “Wïj Ruben koo pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd jie ge nøg.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Yeudɑ̀ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lïngí ywøøg gen kɑ̀ kwɑ̈jji gen kipe kønyø. Cigí gen rebø ki kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø. Nyïɑ̈ggí kiper gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ ge køny ki tyɑmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Leebì kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyodh møgí ki Urïm geki Thumïm, kì cinggi bɑ̈nggí, bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mïdhi kwøbbí; Kwɑrri Leebì. Ge ɑ́rɑng yi yïn kì Mɑɑsɑ̀, kɑ ge yod yi yïn ge døøj kì Merïbɑ̀." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Yï ɑ́wør yi gen ki mendwøng, kɑ yï mɑɑr yi gen kibøli wëëg gen geki mëëg gen, kí nyiimï gen wɑlɑ̀ nyigi gen. Kɑ ciggí mïdhi yi gen Lwöbø mií nuti pɑ̈ɑ̈d gen." 
Deuteronomy33:10 O jií ópwönyi yi gen ki mïdhi ciggí, gen ɑ nyi muujø ki gëdhhì kì wïj këli lɑm mií." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wiy gøl gen tënge. Med pyëwí ki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen. Mød tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen bënn, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ko wëggí dhwödhø këti.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Ben Yɑmïn kinni, “Bene gøl-ɑ mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j èn, gøl-ɑ korri yi en. Gï korre’ korrø kì dicɑ̈ng bëne. O bëëd ɑ kelli gen.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Yosep kinni, “Wiy piny gen gëdhhi kødh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kí pïg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l thɑ piny." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Wiy nywøli gïn-ɑ pidh yi gen cyeg gen kidøøj, o nywøli yenh-ɑ døj bëëd ge nud kì yij run bëne kì piny gen." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Wiy wɑ̈thi kwøømmi gen, kwøømm-ɑ weenø bëëd ge pɑ̈ng yi nywøli yenh-ɑ døj." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Wiy piny gen bëëde e pɑ̈ng yi gïg-ɑ døj bënn. Gyëdhhe kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri døøji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kööb kì ri kïrø me lyel ki mɑc. Wiy gyëdhhɑni bï gen kömi gøl Yosep. Mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pëëji kì kelli nyiimen." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yosep teg ni wɑdh; men-ɑ́ tegi tùngi ógïg ɑ yïe! Tùnge bɑ ɑ́lïppi gøl Mɑnɑsè Kí ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r mø Eprɑim. Tùngɑni ɑ cööbe pödhh, Kɑ gï cøøre cögi piny.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Dhebulun geki gøl Isɑkɑr kinni, “Wiy gøl Dhebulun dönye kì bɑng ngyëw-ɑ ngyëwe kì kömi nɑɑm omelø. Kɑ wiy kɑ̈ɑ̈r Isɑkɑr dønge kì yethi myërr." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Tyëngpɑth nyi cwööl ge’ wɑ̈thi kïtti gen. Kɑ ge omuujø ki gëdhh-ɑ dyër kì kunɑni. Kɑ̈ɑ̈r gen yod yi gen ɑ nɑɑm omelø, kí ri ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Gɑd kinni, “Lenhi Jwøk, ɑ ɑ́gwøg piny gen e lɑɑj. Gɑd lïïbø nɑ ngur, men nyi cöd bɑd wɑlɑ̀ rɑ̈m." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Piny-ɑ pëddi døøjø, ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi gen ɑ́ mi gen. Bun-ɑ nyi bëëdø ɑ́ mi jɑgø ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen. Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki kwönge ɑ́mïdhi yi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́cugi pëjji Isrɑil.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Dɑn kinni, “Dɑn bɑ wɑ̈d ngur, pɑ̈r e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Bɑcɑn.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Kɑ okööbø kì ri gøl Nɑptɑlì kinni, “Nɑptɑlì bëëd ɑ yij dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́gëdhhii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Pinye wɑ̈dh-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø geki kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, e kön-ɑ́ɑ̀ Tɑɑy Gɑlelì.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Kɑ okööbø kipe gøl Aceer kinni, “Gøl Aceer bɑ ɑgyëdh kibøli kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø. Wiy e ómɑɑr yi nyiimen. Wiy pinye óbëëde e pɑ̈ng yi yenh dhetun." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Wiy dhøggi dörri kɑ̈dde óbëëd gen ge nyi cyëëg kɑ thïggi ngyënyø dødø. Wiy e óbëëde pyëwe pɑ lïngø.” 
Deuteronomy33:26 Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, bong jwøg me pɑ̈r ki Jwøøg wun, ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki dhwɑ̈ng kì yij mɑl, ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yethi pøøl e bï-ɑ be kønyi yïn." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Bɑ Jwøk ɑ nyi korri yïn ceth. Cingge, cingg-ɑ teg gen ɑ korri yïn ceth. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́cyeede wɑ̈g, kedh yï kedh-ɑ bølí, kɑ yï köbbe kinni nɑ̈g gen bënn." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Bëëd wun ki mër wun ɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob, pëthi wun koo lïngø kì piny-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi byëlø bëne geki møgi oløg. Piny-ɑ nyi thïnyi yi thöjj-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Isrɑil, pyëwí med nɑ ngø! Bong pödhø me pɑ̈r ki yïn. Yï pönh-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ bɑ kwödí geki pilí møg-ɑ korrí rií, o yï tyɑ̈ɑ̈m. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óbï ge kwɑjj-ɑ lɑ̈mpyëw, o ge ónyøn yi yïn." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Kɑ Mosɑ̀ odhwödhø kì thwøri Moɑb, kɑ kedh-ɑ Kïti Nebö, kɑ yedh-ɑ oledh Kïti Pisgɑ̀ kì bøli Yerikö, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Kɑ nyudhi pinyɑni bëne yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ løg piny Gilyɑd, e göjj-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø gïti kɑɑl Dɑn," 
Deuteronomy34:2 kí piny Nɑptɑlì bëne, kí piny Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè, kí piny Yeudɑ̀, e gït-ɑ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr," 
Deuteronomy34:3 kí piny Yeudɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí thwør-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì Dhoɑr gïti Yerikö, kɑɑl benø." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Codhe, ɑköbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bene piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob kinni ómëggɑ kwɑrri gen ceth. Áwëggɑ lidhø yi yïn, de yï koo wëggɑ kedhi yije.”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Codhe, ɑthøw Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny Moɑb, ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni óthøw-ɑ kenyɑni." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Kɑ kony yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij tör kì Moɑb, kenyɑni rwöm ki Betpeor, de bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́yod dïl keny-ɑ ɑ́koonyii gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mosɑ̀ runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew keny-ɑ ɑ́thøwe, de ɑ́bëëd dële nudd e teeg ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde ceth, o nyinge onëënø kidøøj." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Kɑ ywøg yi tyëng Isrɑil kì piny Moɑb ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ peli wïj me dwøng, mɑ́ Mosɑ̀ ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ en ɑ́ ngɑn mɑg keje. Kwøbbi Jöcwø nyii lïngø yi tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Mosɑ̀ mïdhi gen kidøøj." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Bong jɑltöng mɑ ɑ́dhwödh kì Isrɑil me pɑ̈r ki Mosɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́kööb ki Jwøk ge nenn-ɑ nyingi gen." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Bong jɑltöng mɑ ɑ́göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø geki ngïjjì mø døngø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́wëggi gøggø yi Mosɑ̀, keny-ɑ ɑ́örii yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki jyɑ̈gge, kí pödhe bëne yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Bong jɑltöng mɑ ɑ́göög ki gïgdøngø mø böggi ni Mosɑ̀ kì Isrɑil. 
Joshua1:1 Kì bɑng thøwi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑköbbi Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nyi køny-ɑ Mosɑ̀, yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Joshua1:2 “Bɑ̈ngɑ Mosɑ̀ ɑ́thøw. De yïn, wuki tyëng Isrɑil bënn, tyenyu ri wun, kɑ Nɑm Urdun bɑ̈ɑ̈n wun, wu kedh-ɑ piny-ɑ mëggɑ wun." 
Joshua1:3 Ni kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ Mosɑ̀ kinni keny-ɑ ókëël wun tyelli wun, ɑ́mëggɑ wun bëne." 
Joshua1:4 Cögi piny wun ówɑ̈dhi ryɑng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti kïtti Lubnɑn kì wɑɑng wuudø. Cɑg kì Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, e cør-ɑ yij pödhi Kit, gïti Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Joshua1:5 Jöcwø, bong ngɑn tyɑm yïn kinni tek kɑ̈ng-ɑ nëën! Yï ókøny yi yɑn ceth ni kɑ ɑ́kønyɑ Mosɑ̀, yï pɑ wiyɑ piny kinni tek." 
Joshua1:6 Bëëd yï teg, kɑ pyëwí cwed, mɑ́ bene yïn ɑ ópeej ji møg be kwɑnyi piny-ɑ ɑ́köngɑ kweyyi gen." 
Joshua1:7 Bëëd pyëwí teg, pyëwí ko wëggí nyönhø kinni tek, kɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ngɑ mïdhí kidøøj, ko di kwï gen mø wøy yi yïn. O gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn gwøgø nyi lwɑ̈ng yi yïn, kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ócyɑ̈dhi yi yïn bënn." 
Joshua1:8 Nyi kømmí møg-ɑ yij wɑ̈nyi Cigg yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Nyi rømmí møgɑni kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng, nyi mïdhí møgɑni per gen teeg cɑrø ki mendwøng, o yï yïddí ki gïgdøj, o gïg-ɑ nyi dwɑddí gwøgø nyi lwɑ̈ng yi wun." 
Joshua1:9 Rømmí møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn cøn kinni bëëd yï teg, kɑ pyëwí cwed, ko di gïn böggi yi yïn, mɑ́ yï ókøny yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì kun-ɑ ókedhi yi yïn.”" 
Joshua1:10 Kɑ pëjjì köbbi yi Jöcwø kinni," 
Joshua1:11 kedhi gen yethi kemmì bënn, o ji köbbi yi gen kinni, “Gwiru gïgcɑmmi wun, kipe wu kedh-ɑ be bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑm Urdun kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, wu kedh-ɑ be kwɑnyi piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun.”" 
Joshua1:12 Kɑ gøl Ruben, geki gøl Gɑd kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè, köbbi yi Jöcwø kinni," 
Joshua1:13 “Pɑru kwøbb-ɑ köbbi wun yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì ri Nɑm Urdun ómëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, ɑ́ myërri wun." 
Joshua1:14 Wiy wun mɑ̈nni wun, kí nyigi wun, kí dhögi wun, kɑ jøliny mø wun kedhi gen be liny kyeel geki nyiimï gen, tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kedhi løøg Nɑm Urdun." 
Joshua1:15 Gïti keny-ɑ ókwɑny gen piny-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Bene keny-ɑ ódøøg wun myërri wun, myërr-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl.”" 
Joshua1:16 Aløøg gen mø Jöcwø kinni, “Gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wøn bënn, ógwøg yi wøn. Wø ókedhi keny-ɑ ör wøn." 
Joshua1:17 Kwøbbí ólïngi yi wøn, ni kɑ ɑ́lïngi wøn kwøbbi Mosɑ̀, yï ókøny yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́kønye Mosɑ̀!" 
Joshua1:18 Ngɑn-ɑ ótyëddi yïn, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ ópyem møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgí wøn, ónɑ̈g. Bëëd pyëwí teeg, kɑ ko di gïn böggi yi yïn!”" 
Joshua2:1 Codhe, ɑöd Jöcwø kì Cithïm ki jøg ɑ́ryew møg lyeew piny, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedh wun, lidh wun piny Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ kɑɑl Yerikö ti wun ki nennø.” Akedh gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ gøl ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi me nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Rɑɑ̈b, ɑbuddi gen kì gølɑni." 
Joshua2:2 Alïng rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerikö kinni, i dɑ jø Isrɑil mø bëën kɑɑl kì wɑ̈rɑni, ge bï-ɑ be lyewwi piny." 
Joshua2:3 Aödi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerikö yï Rɑɑ̈b kinni i kɑ̈ɑ̈le jøg-ɑ ɑ́bï gøle wɑ̈g, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bï-ɑ be lyewwi piny." 
Joshua2:4 Alöggi Rɑɑ̈b kinni, “Kidyër ɑ́dɑ jøg mɑ ɑ́bï gølɑ, de kwïj yi yɑn mɑ løg gen jø keny. De ge ɑ́kedh kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti cyëëg dhø döri kɑɑl kì wɑɑng thyënhø, o keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi gen kwïj yi yɑn, jwɑnu bɑng gen, ge ópïïd yi wun.” (Jøgɑni rumø ki kïdhi mɑl wïj ød yi Rɑɑ̈b, kɑ gï kɑɑne thɑ́ thyɑnggi kor-ɑ yöm.)" 
Joshua2:5  
Joshua2:6  
Joshua2:7 Akedhi jøg-ɑ yɑ̈bø bɑng jø Isrɑil gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen keny-ɑ nyi lwøød Nɑm Urdun, kì bɑng gen ceth, ɑcyëëg dhøg kɑɑl." 
Joshua2:8 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti buddi jøgɑni, ɑkedhi Rɑɑ̈b yï gen wïj ød," 
Joshua2:9 ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni piny men ɑ́rum ki mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wø ɑ́bwøg yi wun. Jii pönhï bënn ɑ́bwøg ki mendwøng." 
Joshua2:10 Yuu-ɑ ɑ́wëggi Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø thwøwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli wun keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënu wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑ́lïngi yi wøn geki kër-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g wun rɑ̈nhi tyëng Amör ryeet, ɑ løg Sïön geki Og, møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì løøg Nɑm Urdun." 
Joshua2:11 Pëthi wøn ɑ́nyönhi keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi wøn møgɑni, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, bɑ Jwøøg mɑl kí piny." 
Joshua2:12 Anɑn köngi wun ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ni kɑ ɑ́göggɑ wun ki gïndøj, gøl wïyɑ ólony yi wun ki göggø ki gïndøj thyew, kɑ yɑ nëngi wun ki ngïji men nyodh kinni dhøggi wun pɑ wil yi wun." 
Joshua2:13 Köngi wun ɑnɑn kinni, wïyɑ, kí meyɑ kí nyiimïɑ yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, kí wɑddi wøn bënn koo wëggi wun nɑ̈gø!”" 
Joshua2:14 Aköbbi Rɑɑ̈b yi jøgɑni kinni, “Keløg e bong ngɑn köbbi yi yïn ki gwøøg wøn, wiy wø ónɑ̈g yi Jwøk, keløg köng-ɑ ɑ́köngi wøn koo mïdhi yi wøn. Yï ógöggi yi wøn ki gïndøj, keny-ɑ ómëggi wøn piny men yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua2:15 Amiid jøgɑni piny kì ɑwɑj ki thøl yi Rɑɑ̈b, mɑ́ gøle ying-ɑ ri döri kɑɑl." 
Joshua2:16 Aköbbi jøgɑni yi Rɑɑ̈b kinni, “Kɑ̈l wun myërri kelli kïttì, o wu cögu wu pɑ yod yi jø rɑ̈dh møg-ɑ yɑb wun, kɑ ri wun kɑnni wun kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, gïti keny-ɑ ódwöög jøgɑni, codhe o wu lunyi wun ki kedhi yuu wun.”" 
Joshua2:17 Aköbbi Rɑɑ̈b yi jøgɑni kinni, “Köng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi wøn köngø ómïdhi yi wøn ceth." 
Joshua2:18 Keny-ɑ óbëën wøn be mɑgi piny men, twööj thøl-ɑ kwɑrø èn ri ɑwɑny-ɑ ɑ́kïdhí wøn piny. Kɑ wïyí, kí meyí, kí nyiimyëw, kí gøl wïyí bëne cøng gølí." 
Joshua2:19 Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ókedhi wɑ̈g kì gølí, e kedh-ɑ yij yöö, ngɑnɑni ócyen-ɑ ree kete, o wø koo cɑy kipe thøwe, de keløg e dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ónywɑl dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ gølí, cyënni ngɑnɑni óying kömi wøn." 
Joshua2:20 De keløg gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wøn óköbbí ji møøgø, óbong-ɑ cɑ́y kì kömi wøn kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wøn kinni köngi wøn.”" 
Joshua2:21 Akööb Rɑɑ̈b kinni, “Wiy ge bëëd gen ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun ceth.” Aöre gïn yöö. Atwööje thølɑni ri ɑwɑj." 
Joshua2:22 Akedhi jøgɑni kelli kïttì, ɑbëëd gen kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g gïti kɑ ɑ́dwöög jøg-ɑ ɑ́yɑb gen kɑɑl, mɑ́ ge ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈b kì kɑ̈jj bënn, de gï nuti yood gen." 
Joshua2:23 Ayïnhi jøgɑni ryeet piny kì wïj kït, ɑbɑ̈ɑ̈n gen Nɑm Urdun, ɑbëën gen yï Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun. Alwöbbi ge gøn gïg-ɑ ɑ́göög bënn." 
Joshua2:24 Kɑ Jöcwø köbbi gen kinni, “Pinyɑni rumø ki cïb cinggee yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidyër, tyëng pönhɑni ceg-ɑ böggø yi wɑ ki mendwøng.”" 
Joshua3:1 Adhwödh Jöcwø geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn kì mwøl e piny nudd e looj, kì Cithïm, ge kedh-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun, ɑkɑl gen bëëdø kì kenyɑni e nɑm nuti bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen." 
Joshua3:2 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑkedhi pëjji liny kelli kemmì." 
Joshua3:3 Kɑ ji ceg yi gen kinni “Keny-ɑ ólidhu Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun e obyellø yi ókwër, Kwɑrri Leebì, kɑ wu dhwödh wun kì kɑ̈jji wun, kɑ wu løgu bɑnge." 
Joshua3:4 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ nuti pɑ̈nyi wun kɑ̈l yuuɑni tyelø ɑ́kyel, wu ónyudhi yi gen ki yöö, de cyɑ̈dhi wun kì bɑnge e dɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́kyel, kì kɑɑm wun ki Sɑnduug Cigg.”" 
Joshua3:5 Aköbbi ji yi Jöcwø kinni, “Kwëru ri wun ɑnɑn, kipe dhuki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì kelli wun.”" 
Joshua3:6 Codhe, ɑköbbi ókwër yi Jöcwø, o Sɑnduug Cigg kwɑny yi gen, o gø mwøøl gen bøli ji." 
Joshua3:7 Kɑ Jöcwø köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, bɑ gïn-ɑ per ówøør yïn yi tyëng Isrɑil, o yod kinni yï nyii kønyø yi yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́kønyɑ Mosɑ̀." 
Joshua3:8 Ceg ókwërr-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Cigg kinni, keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi gen tøg Nɑm Urdun, kɑ ge cungi gen kì kenyɑni.”" 
Joshua3:9 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbi yi Jöcwø kinni, “Bïu lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun." 
Joshua3:10 O yod yi wun kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø nud kì kelli wun. O tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Perïdh, kí tyëng Girgɑc, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Yebus, gï ócyedde kì bøli wun ceth," 
Joshua3:11 keny-ɑ órum Sɑnduug Ciggi Wïi piny bëne ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑm Urdun, e kɑ̈l ɑ bøli wun." 
Joshua3:12 Kɑ wu yïëëny wun ki jøg-ɑ cwøw pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, jɑl ɑ́kyel kì wïj kɑl ɑ́kyel." 
Joshua3:13 Ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́byelli Sɑnduug Ciggi Wïi piny bëne, en ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ókëël gen tyelli gen yethi pï, Nɑm Urdun ócungi; kɑ pïg-ɑ rïngi piny kì mɑl ri gen cøng gen kej ɑ́kyel.”" 
Joshua3:14 Ábëëd ɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ nyi kɑɑj byel, o nɑm ɑ́bëëd e pɑ̈ng. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n Nɑm Urdun yi ji, ókwër ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ bøli gen, ge byell-ɑ Sɑnduug Cigg. Keny-ɑ ɑ́këël gen tyelli gen nɑm," 
Joshua3:15  
Joshua3:16 ɑcungi pïg-ɑ rïngi kì mɑl, ge lɑ̈wi ki keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Adɑm, ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Dhɑretɑn. Kɑ pïg-ɑ rengi yij Luuy Omelø ceg-ɑ ì lɑɑw. Codhe, ɑbɑ̈ɑ̈n nɑm yi ji kì bøli Yerikö." 
Joshua3:17 Ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́byelli Sɑnduug Cigg ɑ́cungi kì piny me thwøwø kì dyëri Nɑm Urdun, gïti kɑ ɑ́thumi tyëng Isrɑil ki wɑ̈dhi wɑ̈g bënn." 
Joshua4:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum tyëng Isrɑil ki wɑ̈dhi løøg Nɑm Urdun bënn. Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Joshua4:2 “Yïëëny ki ji pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, jɑl ɑ́kyel kì wïj kɑl." 
Joshua4:3 Kɑ ge köbbí kinni, ‘Kɑ̈bbi wun ki tuggi kïttì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì dïdyëri Nɑm Urdun, kì keny-ɑ cungi yi ókwër, kɑ ge tëëru wɑ̈g, kɑ ge cïb wun piny kì keny-ɑ óbuddi yi wun tïn kì wɑ̈r.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Acwööl jøg-ɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jöcwø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil. 
Joshua4:5 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Kedhu bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøng wun, wu kedh-ɑ dïdyëri Nɑm Urdun. Kɑ̈bbi dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun ki tungi kït ɑ́kyel ɑ́ mi wïj gøl gen, kɑ gø byele." 
Joshua4:6 Tuggi kïttɑni óbëëd gɑ ngïjjì kiper wun, kenyi pyëëj wun yi nyigi wun dhuki megø kinni, ‘Kïttì møg bɑ mø ngø kì yï wun cøn?’" 
Joshua4:7 Ge óköbbi yi wun kinni, ‘Pïi Nɑm Urdun ri gen ɑ́pɑ̈ngi gen kì bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ Nɑm Urdun.’ Wiy tuggi kïttɑni nyi pɑ̈ddi gen tyëng Isrɑil ki møgɑni gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Joshua4:8 Codhe, ɑgwøøg møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jöcwø bënn yi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑkwɑnye tuggi kïttì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ni kwɑnni wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, kì dïdyëri Nɑm Urdun ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gï tëër gen keny-ɑ pëggi yi gen, ɑcïb ge gïn piny kì kenyɑni." 
Joshua4:9 Akɑ̈bbi Jöcwø ki tuggi kïttì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew møøgø, kɑ gï cïbe dïdyëri Nɑm Urdun keny-ɑ ɑ́cungi yi ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́byelli Sɑnduug Cigg. Ge nud kì kenyɑni gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua4:10 Ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́byelli Sɑnduug Cigg ɑ́cungi kì dïdyëri Nɑm Urdun, gïti kɑ ɑ́thumi møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gwøgø bënn, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen Jöcwø yi Mosɑ̀ cøn. Ajwɑn ji ri gen ki gwɑɑr wɑ̈g." 
Joshua4:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ji ki wɑ̈dhi løøgø bënn, kɑ ókwërr-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kedh-ɑ bøli gen." 
Joshua4:12 Kɑ jø gøl Ruben, kí jø gøl Gɑd kí budi jø gøl Mɑnɑsè, nɑm bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen ge møøl-ɑ bøli tyëng Isrɑil, ri gen tyeeny gen ceth kipe liny, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Mosɑ̀." 
Joshua4:13 Gïn ni jøliny ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen ɑ́kedhi bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì thwøri Yerikö." 
Joshua4:14 Kì bɑng gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngɑni, Jöcwø ɑ́göög pere teeg kì yï tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ gø gɑ̈nni gen kì yij bëëde bëne, ni kɑ ɑ́gɑ̈nni Mosɑ̀ yi gen." 
Joshua4:15 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Joshua4:16 “Köbbí ókwërr-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Cigg, kinni bï gen wɑ̈g kì nɑm.”" 
Joshua4:17 Aköbbi ókwër yi Jöcwø kinni, “Bïu wɑ̈g kì nɑm.”" 
Joshua4:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ókwërr-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g ceth, kɑ pï døøg-ɑ be ngwej ni kenyi rïngi gen cøn, kɑ tøggi nɑm opɑ̈ngø ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen." 
Joshua4:19 Ji Nɑm Urdun ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen kì pyɑ̈ri cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl. Agud gen ki kemmì kì Gilgɑl kì bøli Yerikö, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua4:20 Kɑ tuggi kïttì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì Nɑm Urdun, cïb Gilgɑl yi Jöcwø." 
Joshua4:21 Aköbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Jöcwø kinni, “Kenyi pyëj kwɑrri wun wëëg gen, kì bøli keny megø kinni, ‘Á tuggi kïttì mø ngø ek?’" 
Joshua4:22 Wiy e óyod yi kwɑrri wun kinni Isrɑil ɑ́kɑ̈l-ɑ keny thwøwø kì Nɑm Urdun. 
Joshua4:23 Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, pïi Nɑm Urdun ɑ́göjje thwøwø, gïti kɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n wun en, ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø, ɑ ɑ́göjje gøn thwøwø kiperee, gïti kɑ ɑ́rum wɑ ki wɑ̈dhi wɑ̈g." 
Joshua4:24 Kipe kinni o tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yod yi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi lɑ̈bø bënn, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun böggi yi wun gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Joshua5:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng rɑ̈nhi tyëng Amör, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kí rɑ̈nhi Kɑnɑɑn bënn møg-ɑ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kinni Nɑm Urdun ógöjji thwøwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen wɑ̈g, ɑbwøg gen yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ yethi gen okïïrø." 
Joshua5:2 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Göög ki pɑlli kïttì, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ngøl.”" 
Joshua5:3 Agöög Jöcwø ki pɑll, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ngøle kì keny me cwøl ɑ́ wïj kwøømi ngøl." 
Joshua5:4 Gïn-ɑ pere ɑ́ngøl gen yi Jöcwø bɑ kinni, jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì Rïp, gɑ jøliny, ge ɑ́thøw bënn kì yij pɑ̈l-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi yi gen kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëën gen wɑ̈g kì pödhi Rïp, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bï kì Rïp rumø ki ngølø bënn, de bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́ngøl kì kelli ji-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi piny keny-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi tyëng Isrɑil kì yij pɑ̈l, ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Dhøg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi gen, ɑköngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gï pɑ wëgge lidhi piny-ɑ ɑ́könge kweyyi gen, piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gø ómëgge gïn." 
Joshua5:5  
Joshua5:6  
Joshua5:7 Acïb wɑ̈ddi gen kɑ̈jji gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; wɑ̈ddi gen ɑ ɑ́ngøl yi Jöcwø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge nuti ngølø kì kö yöö cøn." 
Joshua5:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ji ki ngølø bënn, ɑbëëd gen gïti kɑ nøgi kɑ̈jjɑni." 
Joshua5:9 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ayɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́ying kömi wun kì Rïp, kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ wɑ̈g dicyɑ̈ngtïn.” Bene ɑ cwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Gilgɑl gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua5:10 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd tyëng Isrɑil kì Gilgɑl kì yij thwør-ɑ bøli Yerikö, Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ɑ́gwøg yi gen, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kì wɑɑng thyënhø." 
Joshua5:11 Dhuki kì bɑng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì pönhɑni, ópùn-ɑ ri gen bong kɑmïrɑ̀, ki gemè men-ɑ bɑ ɑgïny." 
Joshua5:12 Dhuki ɑcungi mɑnɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cyeg kì pönhɑni, bong mɑnɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́yod yi tyëng Isrɑil këti, de ge ɑ́cɑm-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cyeg kì piny Kɑnɑɑn kì yij runɑni bëne." 
Joshua5:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying Jöcwø buti Yerikö, ɑtïnge wïje, kɑ ólïdhø ki jɑl megø me cungi kì bøle e cinge dɑ pilø me rumø ki wöödh wɑ̈g kì yij bøje. Kɑ Jöcwø kedh-ɑ yïe, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Yï bɑ ngeti wøn wɑlɑ̀ ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø?”" 
Joshua5:14 Alöggi jɑlɑni kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki gen bënn. Yɑ bɑ pënyi liny Áyïmø.” Abøødh Jöcwø ree piny kì bøli jɑlɑni, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ köbbí bɑ̈ngí wuö?”" 
Joshua5:15 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi pënyi liny Áyïmø kinni, “Gööd wɑrrí wɑ̈g, mɑ́ keny-ɑ cungi yi yïn ɑnɑn bɑ kej kwër.” Kɑ Jöcwø wɑrre gööde wɑ̈g kì tyelle ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii ceth." 
Joshua6:1 Yerikö ɑ́bëëd e bɑ ɑcyëg kipe tyëng Isrɑil. Bong ngɑn cuggi bëën wɑ̈g, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn cuggi kedhi yij kɑɑl." 
Joshua6:2 Kɑ Jöcwø köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lidh, Yerikö ɑ́mëggɑ yïn, kí rɑ̈dhe kí jöddi linye." 
Joshua6:3 Yïn, wuki jølinyí, nyi wen wun kɑɑl tyelø ɑ́kyel kì yij cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel." 
Joshua6:4 Kɑ ókwër ɑ́bïryew mø kɑ̈ddi ki tùngi órömm møg-ɑ nyi kodh, cyɑ̈dhi gen kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg. Kɑ kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, wiinu kɑɑl tyel ɑ́bïryew, tùng okodhø yi ókwër." 
Joshua6:5 Kɑ tùng kodh yi ókwër wïj ɑ́kyel ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kɑ ji ryeer gen bënn ki cwɑg mø døngø keny-ɑ ólïngi gen ywøøg tùng, döri kɑɑl Yerikö ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kinni rup kì piny, kɑ ji kedh-ɑ yij kɑɑl men töng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøle.”" 
Joshua6:6 Acwøøl ókwër yi Jöcwø kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kwɑnyu Sɑnduug Cigg, kɑ ókwër ɑ́bïryew kɑ̈ddi gen ki tùng ɑ́bïryew, kì bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua6:7 Kɑ ji köbbi yi Jöcwø kinni, “Cɑ̈gi wun ki weni kɑɑl, wiy jøliny kedhi gen bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua6:8 Ni kɑ ɑ́ceg ji yi Jöcwø, jøg-ɑ kurø kì bøli teenɑni ɑ ɑ́møøl mɑl geki ókwër ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi ki tùng ɑ́bïryew; bɑng gen dɑ ókwërr-ɑ kɑ̈lli Sɑnduug Cigg; kí jøg-ɑ kurø kì cyɑ̈n kì bɑng gen. Ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi tùng okodhø yi ókwër." 
Joshua6:9  
Joshua6:10 De ji ɑ́köbbi yi Jöcwø kinni, ge ko wøw wɑlɑ̀ cwɑggi gen ko wëggi gen lïngø, wɑlɑ̀ ko di kwøb mø pɑ̈ɑ̈r wɑ̈g kì dhøggi gen, gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óköbbe gïn kinni ryeer gen, codhe o ge ryeer gen." 
Joshua6:11 Awen kɑɑl ki Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyelø ɑ́kyel, ɑdøøg gen yethi kemmi gen, ɑbuddi gen." 
Joshua6:12 Adhwödh Jöcwø dhuki kì mwøl ceth, kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑny yi ókwër." 
Joshua6:13 Kɑ jøliny møg-ɑ kurø kì mɑl wɑ̈d-ɑ yöö, bɑng gen dɑ ókwër ɑ́bïryew ge okudhø ki tùng ɑ́bïryew, o bɑng gen dɑ ókwërr-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen dɑ jøliny møg-ɑ kurø kì cyɑ̈n." 
Joshua6:14 Kì ryeew cyɑ̈ng, ge ɑ́døøg be weni kɑɑl ki tyelø ɑ́kyel, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ yethi kemmi gen. Kɑ Yerikö nyi wen gen tyelø ɑ́kyel cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïkyel." 
Joshua6:15 Kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, ɑdhwödh gen piny nudd e looj, ɑwinni kɑɑl yi gen ni cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh ki tyel ɑ́bïryew. Bene cyɑ̈ngɑni kete ɑ wen gen kɑɑl ki tyel ɑ́bïryew." 
Joshua6:16 Kì bïryeew weni kɑɑl, keny-ɑ ɑ́koodh tùng yi ókwër, ɑköbbi ji yi Jöcwø kinni, “Ryeer wun, mɑ́ kɑɑl ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua6:17 Cøør kɑɑl Yerikö piny, kɑ ji nɑ̈g, ki jɑmm-ɑ yije bënn rënyi gɑ gëdhhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Den-ɑ́ Rɑɑ̈b ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, geki tyëng-ɑ gøle ɑ ówiy ge pɑ nɑ̈g, mɑ́ lyëwwì møg-ɑ ɑ́ör ɑ́kɑn yi en." 
Joshua6:18 De wun lɑ̈ɑ̈w wun ri wun ki jɑmm-ɑ rënyi, wu ko pɑ̈nyi kɑ̈bbø kì ri gen, kipe Isrɑil óyïddi ki ryɑ̈g kì bɑng wun." 
Joshua6:19 De gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑcwɑ̈j ki ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí ngyënyø dilɑl, kí ngyënyø dødø, thyëyi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge kïdhi yij Kemi Kwër.”" 
Joshua6:20 Akoodh tùng yi ókwër, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi ywøøg tùng yi teenɑni, ɑryeer gen ki ryeeri dwøng, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dh dörø kinni rup kì piny, ɑkedhi liny yij kɑɑl, ngɑn töng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøle, ɑmɑg gen kɑɑl." 
Joshua6:21 Arënyi kɑɑl ki menrɑj, kɑ ji bënn, jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí tyëngdøngø, kí dhög, kí dyëg, kí ɑderr nɑ̈g yi gen gɑ gëdhhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua6:22 Aköbbi jøg ɑ́ryew-ɑ ɑ́lyeew piny yi Jöcwø kinni, “Kedhu gøl ngɑn-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g geki tyëng gøl gen, ni kɑ ɑ́köngi wun.”" 
Joshua6:23 Akedhi jøg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ lyëwwì gøl Rɑɑ̈b, kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g, geki wïye, kí meye, kí nyiimen kí wɑddi gen, kí bɑ̈nggi gen bënn. Akɑ̈l ge gïn, kɑ gï cïb gen buti kɑɑl tyëng Isrɑil." 
Joshua6:24 Arɑ̈b gen kɑɑl Yerikö, kí jɑmm-ɑ yije bënn. Gïg-ɑ bɑ dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí ngyënyø dilɑl, kí ngyënyø dødø, gï ɑ́kɑ̈l gen, kɑ gï cïb gen kelli jɑmmi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua6:25 De Rɑɑ̈b ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, geki gøl wïye kí wɑddi gen, ge ɑ́yiel yi Jöcwø kipe kɑ ɑ́kɑne lyëwwì ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́ör Yerikö, ɑbëëd kwɑrri Rɑɑ̈b kì Isrɑil gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua6:26 Aköngi Jöcwø kì bøli kenyɑni kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈nyi Yerikö ki døøgø’ gerø, ree dɑ cyën kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ngɑn-ɑ ókëël tyeli döri kɑɑlɑni piny, wɑ̈de wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø ceg-ɑ thøø; o ngɑn-ɑ óger dhøg döri kɑɑlɑni wɑ̈de wɑ̈n-ɑ kunø ceg-ɑ thøø.”" 
Joshua6:27 Jöcwø ɑ́køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑbëëde e ngɑ̈nyi kì yij pödhø bëne." 
Joshua7:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kyëddi tyëng Isrɑil kinni ge ko kɑ̈bbi ki jɑmmì kì Yerikö, dɑ́ kinni rënyi gïgɑni bënn. De Akɑn wɑ̈d Kɑrmì, wɑ̈d Dhɑbdì, wɑ̈d Dherɑ̀ kì wïj gøl Yeudɑ̀, kɑ̈bbø ki kwï jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyer, ɑrënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki Isrɑil ki mendwøng." 
Joshua7:2 Jöcwø ɑ́öd ki ji kì Yerikö, e öd-ɑ Aɑy, ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Bet Aben, e ying-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì bøli Betiil, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedh wun, kɑ piny lyeew wun.”" 
Joshua7:3 Adwöög gen yï Jöcwø kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Yï ko kedhi Aɑy ki linyí bëne, wiy gïn ni jøg ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kedhi gen be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Aɑy, ji ri gen ko pïd gen ki kedhø bënn, mɑ́ tyëng pönhɑni nøg.”" 
Joshua7:4 Akedh jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge cyeddi yi tyëng Aɑy." 
Joshua7:5 Ge ɑ́cyeddi yi jø Aɑy, cɑg kì dhøg kɑɑl gïti yuu-ɑ töngi piny kì buti kïtti gyer. Anɑ̈ggi jø Aɑy ki ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïkyel kì kelli yɑɑy Isrɑil kì kö yuuɑni. Amɑɑg yɑɑy Isrɑil yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ nyingi gen obɑɑrø ki mendwøng." 
Joshua7:6 Kɑ Jöcwø ógødhe kɑge geki jøgdøngi Isrɑil, ɑ́ nyuudhi mi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi gen. Abuddi gen yethi gen rum gen piny, e wɑ̈thi gen ónywɑ̈ddø’ piny, kì bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wɑ̈thi gen yëddi gen ki tør, kɑ ge gït-ɑ böörø ge obuddø kinøw." 
Joshua7:7 Akööb Jöcwø kinni, “Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ per ngø ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ji møg kì løøg Nɑm Urdun? Bɑ kipe kinni o wø cïb cinggi tyëng Amör, o wø nɑ̈g yi gen? Á kipe ngø ɑ bɑɑny wøn ki wiyø, o wø di bëëd wøn kì løøngɑni?" 
Joshua7:8 Anɑn Wuö, ɑ́ ngø ɑ kwøb yi yɑn e Isrɑil ɑ́cyeddi yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø?" 
Joshua7:9 Mɑ́ tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pönhï bënn, møgɑni ólïngi yi gen, kɑ wø tyeg yi gen, kɑ wø nɑ̈g yi gen. Dɑ́ ngø ɑ ógöggi nyingí, nying-ɑ per gen teg?”" 
Joshua7:10 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Dhwöödh! Yïde ɑ buud kì piny kinnï?" 
Joshua7:11 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́røngi; ciggɑ ɑ́pyem yi gen, ge ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki kwï jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyerɑ, ge ɑ́kwɑ̈ddi o ge ceg-ɑ pyed; men-ɑ́ jɑmmɑni ɑ́ti gen ki kïdhi kelli jɑmmi gen." 
Joshua7:12 Bene ɑ pɑ cuggi tyëng Isrɑil ki cung kì bøli tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Ge ɑ́cyeddi yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mɑ́ ge ceg-ɑ thøø gɑ gëdhhì. Yɑ pɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen këti gïti keny-ɑ órënyu jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kërrɑ wun." 
Joshua7:13 Dhwöödh! Kwër ji kɑ ge köbbí kinni, kwër gen ri gen kipe dhuki, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø i jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyer nudd ge nud kì yï wun. Yïn ɑ Isrɑil, yï pɑ cuggi cung kì bøli tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø gïti keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wun jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyer wɑ̈g kì kelli jɑmmi wun." 
Joshua7:14 Köbbí gen kinni bï gen dhuki kì mwøl, ge bɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, wïj gøl-ɑ ókwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bëe ɑ́ dhøggi kɑ̈llì, dhø gøl-ɑ ókwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bëe ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel ɑ́kyel." 
Joshua7:15 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyer, órɑ̈b ki mɑc geki jɑmme bënn, mɑ́ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi en, kí kipe kɑ ɑ́gögge Isrɑil ki ɑyɑ̈r.”" 
Joshua7:16 Adhwödh Jöcwø kì mwøl ceth, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le Isrɑil gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, ɑkwɑɑny gøl Yeudɑ̀," 
Joshua7:17 ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le gøl Yeudɑ̀, ɑkwɑɑny gøl Dherɑ̀, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le gøl Dherɑ̀ ɑ́ ød kí ød, ɑkwɑɑny ød Dhɑbdì," 
Joshua7:18 ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l gøl Dhɑbdì ɑ́ ɑ́kyel ɑ́kyel, ɑkwɑɑny Akɑn wɑ̈d Kɑrmì wɑ̈d Dhɑbdì wɑ̈d Dherɑ̀ kì gøl Yeudɑ̀." 
Joshua7:19 Aköbbi Akɑn yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ nëngí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ki dhwɑ̈ng, kɑ lejjí. Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, kɑ ko kɑ̈nní yɑn.”" 
Joshua7:20 Alöggi Akɑn kinni, “Kidyër, yɑ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn èn:" 
Joshua7:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhɑ ki jɑmmì mø myëër kì kelli jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyer, ɑ løg ógødh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ men-ɑ ngewe teeg, kí gïn ni kïllì ɑ́ryew ɑ́tegø, kí óbɑɑr dhɑb me bɑ budi kïlø, ɑrengi gen pyëwɑ kɑ ge kwɑnyɑ. Ge bɑ ɑkony kì yij kemɑ̀ miɑ.”" 
Joshua7:22 Kɑ Jöcwø oödø ki ji, ɑkedhi gen yij kemi Akɑn, ɑyod gen jɑmmɑni ge ókoony piny kì yij kemɑ̀." 
Joshua7:23 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì yij kemɑ̀, kɑ ge muuj Jöcwø geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn, ɑthyeer gen bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua7:24 Akwɑɑny Akɑn kí jɑmmɑni bënn yi Jöcwø geki tyëng Isrɑil, en kí wɑ̈dde kí dhöge, kí ɑderre kí dyëge, kí kemɑ̀ mee geki jɑmme bënn, kɑ ge kïdhi Töör Akørr." 
Joshua7:25 Aköbbii yi Jöcwø kinni, “Yïde ɑ kɑ̈ní kömi wøn ki rɑjj-ɑ ni møg? Kömí ɑ́kɑ̈ni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑj ɑnɑn!” Abɑ̈lli Akɑn geki cyëge, kí nyige, ki tuggi kïttì yi ji bënn, kɑ ge othøø. Kɑ ge rɑ̈b kí jɑmme bënn." 
Joshua7:26 Aröri kömi gen ki tuggi kïttì. Tuggi kïttɑni nud gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, bene ɑ cwølli törɑni ɑ́ Töör Akørr. Kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókwöjø." 
Joshua8:1 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko böggi, kɑ yï ko bëëd dëlí juurø, kwɑny jølinyí bënn, kɑ yï dhwöödh kedhí Aɑy. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Aɑy ɑ́cïbɑ cingí, geki kɑɑl-ɑ bëëde, kí jie, kí pinye." 
Joshua8:2 Aɑy kí rɑ̈dhe ógöggi yi yïn ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggí Yerikö geki rɑ̈dhe, de gïg-ɑ óyod yi wun ying gɑ dhög wɑlɑ̀ jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø, óbëëdø gɑ mø wun, tyeny rií kɑ kɑɑlɑni liib piny.”" 
Joshua8:3 Kɑ Jöcwø ree tyenye geki jølinye bënn kipe kedhi Aɑy, kɑ Jöcwø oyïënyø ki jöddi liny gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑöre gïn kì wɑ̈r." 
Joshua8:4 Ge ɑ́köbbi yi Jöcwø kinni, “Tyegu kɑɑl kì ngɑ̈je, tyëng kɑɑlɑni kwïj wøw, wu ko bëëd wu lɑ̈wi ki kɑɑl, de bëëd wun ri wun tyeeny wun kipe liny ceth." 
Joshua8:5 Yɑn, wøki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi wøn, wø ócyɑ̈ngi kì ri kɑɑl Aɑy, o keny-ɑ órïngi tyëng kɑɑlɑni yï wøn, ri wøn óløg yi wøn, kɑ wø órengø ni tyeli mɑl." 
Joshua8:6 Ge órïngi wɑ̈g bɑng wøn, pïd keny-ɑ óthɑ̈ɑ̈b wø gen wɑ̈g kì yij kɑɑl, mɑ́ ge órumø kinni, wø rengi, wø bwøg-ɑ yi gen ni tyeli mɑl." 
Joshua8:7 Codhe, o wu bïu wɑ̈g kì yethi kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nni yi wun, o kɑɑl mɑg yi wun, mɑ́ e ɑ́cïb cinggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun." 
Joshua8:8 Keny-ɑ órum kɑɑl ki mɑgø yi wun, kɑ cwiny wun ki mɑc ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene møg-ɑ cïgɑ wun ɑgɑk.”" 
Joshua8:9 Aör gen yi Jöcwø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈ni yi gen, ɑbuddi gen kì kɑɑm Betiil geki Aɑy, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Kɑ Jöcwø óbuddø kì yij kemɑ̀." 
Joshua8:10 Kɑ Jöcwø odhwödhø dhuki kì mwøl ceth, ɑcønge jøliny, ɑpëggi gen bøli ji geki pëjji Isrɑil, ge kedh-ɑ Aɑy." 
Joshua8:11 Akedh jøliny bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki Jöcwø, kɑ ge bï-ɑ bøli Aɑy. Aguddi gen piny ki kemmì kì wɑɑng wuudø kì bøli Aɑy, ɑ́ tör ɑ kɑɑm gen ki Aɑy." 
Joshua8:12 Kɑ Jöcwø ókɑ̈bbø ki jøliny gïn ni ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj, ɑcïbe gïn kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈ni gen kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì bøli Aɑy, kì kɑɑm Betiil geki Aɑy." 
Joshua8:13 Acïb jøliny, e yɑy-ɑ dwøng ying-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì bøli kɑɑl, kwï yɑy ying-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. De Jöcwø ɑ́nïn-ɑ yij tör kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
Joshua8:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Aɑy geki jie bënn, kɑ jø kɑɑlɑni jwɑn-ɑ bëën wɑ̈g ge bï-ɑ kuni Töör Urdun be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Isrɑil kì kej tyeli mɑl. De kwïj yi gen kinni dɑ kwï yɑy me pɑ̈nnø kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl." 
Joshua8:15 Agöög Jöcwø geki Isrɑil, dhɑ̈y ge ce ceg kɑ cyeddø yi gen, ɑrengi gen kuni ryɑng." 
Joshua8:16 Acwööl tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑl bënn be cyeddi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge ólɑ̈wø ki kɑɑl, ge rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng Jöcwø geki jøge." 
Joshua8:17 Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng e kor-ɑ Aɑy wɑlɑ̀ Betiil, ge ɑ́rengi bɑng Isrɑil bënn, dhø döri kɑɑl ɑ́wiy yi gen ɑ́ ɑyieb, kɑ ge reng-ɑ bɑng Isrɑil." 
Joshua8:18 Codhe ɑköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cem tøng-ɑ cingí ɑnɑn kuni kɑɑl Aɑy, mɑ́ Aɑy cïbɑ’ cingí.” Kɑ Jöcwø tøng ceme kuni Aɑy." 
Joshua8:19 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge pɑ̈nø jwɑn-ɑ dhwödhø kì kɑ̈jji gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́rïj Jöcwø cinge, ɑrengi gen, kɑ kɑɑl mɑg yi gen, ɑjwɑn gen kɑɑl ki cwinyø ki mɑc." 
Joshua8:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïïdh jø Aɑy ngɑ̈thi gen, ɑlidh gen yïri kɑɑl e kwöddi mɑl, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø rengi tuung wɑlɑ̀ tuung, mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́rengi yij ryɑng ɑ́dwöög kömi gen be nɑ̈gi gen." 
Joshua8:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi Jöcwø geki Isrɑil bëne kinni tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ni, kɑɑl ɑ́mɑg gen, o yïri kɑɑl ɑ́lidh gen e kwöddi mɑl, ɑdwöög gen, ɑnɑ̈g gen jø Aɑy." 
Joshua8:22 Abëën jø Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑl wɑ̈g, ɑyod jø Aɑy ri gen ge ótyeeg dïdyër yi tyëng Isrɑil. Anɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wiy, wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́bodh." 
Joshua8:23 De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Aɑy ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen e onëënø, kɑ gø muuj gen Jöcwø." 
Joshua8:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Isrɑil ki nɑ̈gi tyëng Aɑy kì yij ryɑng-ɑ ɑ́rengi yi gen, ɑdøøg gen Aɑy, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì kɑɑlɑni nɑ̈g gen bënn." 
Joshua8:25 Tyëng Aɑy bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g dicyɑ̈ngɑni, cwøw kí mɑ̈nn ge bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Joshua8:26 Jöcwø cinge, cing-ɑ ɑ́rïïje kuni Aɑy ki tøng, nuti dwöög en piny, gïti kɑ ɑ́rum tyëng Aɑy ki nɑ̈gø bënn kinni tweet." 
Joshua8:27 Dhög kí jɑmmi gen ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëng Isrɑil, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua8:28 Aɑy ɑ́rɑ̈b yi Jöcwø geki jølinye, kɑ gø wiy gen e ryɑ̈gø gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua8:29 Angɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Aɑy wïj yɑdh yi Jöcwø pïd böörø. Kɑ Jöcwø jøge köbbe kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l piny kì wïj yɑdh, keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑr cɑ̈ng piny. Kɑ leeng dhø döri Aɑy, kɑ köme rööri ki tuggi kïttì, tuggi kïttɑni nud gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua8:30 Codhe, ɑgëëd Jöcwø ki këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kì wïj Kïti Ebɑl." 
Joshua8:31 Ágwøge ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ógweedii yij wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Këli lɑm nyi ger kɑ tuggi kïttì møg nuti ngølø ki gïn-ɑ ógwøgø ɑ́ ngyënyø.” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́nëngi yi gen kì wïj këli lɑmɑni ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kɑ ge omuujø ki gënhi mër thyew." 
Joshua8:32 Ajøli Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ki gwedø yi Jöcwø kì kömi ópɑ̈nni kït kì kenyɑni, kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil." 
Joshua8:33 Isrɑil bëne, kí jɑgge, kí pëjji liny, kí jyɑ̈ggi gøny, kí tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ kelli gen, ɑ́bëëd ge ócungø kì wɑ̈thi tùngi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì tuung kí tuung, ge rwöm ki ókwërri gøl Leebì møg-ɑ nyi byelli Sɑnduug Cigg. Budi ji cungi ngɑ̈thi gen løg gen kuni Kïti Geridhïm, o bun-ɑ kyeelø ngɑ̈thi gen løg gen kuni Kïti Ebɑl. Ge ɑ́köbb-ɑ yi Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i cungi gen kinøw, o ge kwëng yi ókwër kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti rɑɑng Ciggi Mosɑ̀ yi Jöcwø." 
Joshua8:34 Codhe, ɑrɑɑng Cigg bënn yi Jöcwø e óryeerø, ki gyëdh geki cyën ni kɑ ógweed gen kì yij wɑ̈nyi Cigg." 
Joshua8:35 Ciggi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́rɑng yi Jöcwø bënn, kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil bënn; tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen." 
Joshua9:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng rɑ̈nh-ɑ bëëdø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, geki tyëng myërri kwøømø, kí tyëng myërr-ɑ thwørø, kí tyëng myërri kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kí tyëng myërri Lubnɑn, kí tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng Perïdh, kí tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Yebus; keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen wööni tyɑ̈mi Isrɑil," 
Joshua9:2 ɑcøng gen ri gen bënn kipe nyɑɑg ki Jöcwø geki Isrɑil. 
Joshua9:3 De tyëng Gibeon, ɑ bɑ tyëng Kib, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Yerikö geki Aɑy yi Jöcwø," 
Joshua9:4 ge ɑ́göög ki wëënyø, ɑkedh gen kɑ ge oyɑ̈bø ki gïncɑm me thwøwø, o ree mød en, kɑ gø cïb gen kömi ɑderri gen, kì yethi ocwɑ̈llì mø kɑggø, kí ɑthebbi møgi oløg mø rënyø, o ge ókwøjø." 
Joshua9:5 Kɑ tyelli gen kïdhi gen ki wɑr mø kɑggø, o ge óbuulø. Kɑ ri gen lunyi gen ki ógudh mø kɑggø." 
Joshua9:6 Akedhi gen yï Jöcwø kì kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́gur kì Gilgɑl, ɑköbbi ge gøn geki jø Isrɑil kinni, “Wø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi, de lwööb wɑ.”" 
Joshua9:7 Aköbbi tyëng Gibeon yi jø Isrɑil kinni, “Wɑ lwööb ɑ dï, ying wu bëëd ɑ keny me cyɑ̈gi ɑnɑn ø?”" 
Joshua9:8 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi gen kinni, “Wø bɑ bɑ̈nggí.” Apyëëj gen yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wu bɑ møg? O wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?”" 
Joshua9:9 Kɑ Jöcwø köbbi yi gen kinni, “Wø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun me lɑ̈wi wuö, wø ɑ́lïng-ɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge Rïp bënn, ɑ́lïngi yi wøn," 
Joshua9:10 kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge rɑ̈nhi Amör ryeet, møg-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, Sïön, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kicbön, geki Og, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑcɑn, ɑ bëëdø kì Actɑröth." 
Joshua9:11 Pëjji wøn, kí tyëng pödhi wøn bënn wø ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ɑ̈d wun ki gïncɑm kiper wel, kɑ wu kedhu be yïddø ki gen, kɑ ge köbbi wun kinni, wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi wun, bïu o wɑ lwööb wɑ ɑnɑn.’" 
Joshua9:12 Lidhu gïncɑɑm wøn, ɑ́bëëd e nudd e lëëdh keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny wøn en kì kɑ̈lli wøn, ɑ́ gïncɑɑm wel, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi wøn ki wɑ̈dh, wø bï-ɑ yï wun, de liidh ɑnɑn, ɑ́thwøw o ree ɑ́møde!" 
Joshua9:13 Athebbi møgi oløg møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyɑ̈n keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen yi wøn, ge ɑ́kɑggi. Kɑ wɑrri wøn liidh kí ógudhi wøn, ge ɑ́kɑggi yi lɑ̈wi piny.”" 
Joshua9:14 Kɑ jø Isrɑil ocyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑɑm gen, e Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti pyëëj gen." 
Joshua9:15 Kɑ Jöcwø ogöögø ki mër ki tyëng Gibeon, kɑ olwöbø ki gïn, kinni o ge bëëd gen ki mër. Kɑ pëjji Isrɑil óköngø kinni lwöbø menɑni ómïdhi yi gen." 
Joshua9:16 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g ge rum lwöbø, ɑlïng tyëng Isrɑil kinni tyëngɑni cyɑ̈gi ki gen, ge bëëd ɑ buti gen kidyër." 
Joshua9:17 Abëën tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑl tyëngɑni kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, o kɑ̈ddi gen bɑ Gibeon, kí Kepïrɑ̀, kí Biröth, kí Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm." 
Joshua9:18 De ge nuti nɑ̈gø yi tyëng Isrɑil, mɑ́ pëjji tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kwöng-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, kɑ ji owërø ki pëjjɑni." 
Joshua9:19 Aköbbi gen yi pëjjɑni bënn kinni, “Ge ɑ́köngi wøn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ge pɑ cuggi nywɑlø yi wɑ.”" 
Joshua9:20 Gïn-ɑ ógöggi wɑ gen bɑ kinni, wiy ge nëën gen, kipe wɑ ócɑy yi Jwøk kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́köngi wø gen." 
Joshua9:21 De ge óbëëd ge nyi ngøl-ɑ yenh, o ge nyi tëddi gen ji bënn ki pï, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi pëjjì ceth." 
Joshua9:22 Acwøøl tyëng Gibeon yi Jöcwø, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ wënyu wøn, cem wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun me lɑ̈wi, wu bëëd ɑ buti wøn?" 
Joshua9:23 Anɑn wu ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøk kipe kɑ ɑ́göög wun kinøw, kwï wun ceg-ɑ bëëdø gɑ bɑ̈ngg, ge nyi ngøl-ɑ yenh, o ge nyi tyëdd-ɑ pï mø ød Jwøgɑ yethi cyɑ̈ng.”" 
Joshua9:24 Aløøg gen mø Jöcwø kinni, “Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi wøn wuö, kɑ per kɑ ɑ́lïng wøn kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈nge ɑ́cege kinni piny bëne bɑ men mëgge wun, o tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij pinyɑni bëne bɑ møg nɑ̈g yi en kì bøli wun. Bene ɑ bwøg wøn ki mendwøng. De wø ɑ́göög kinøw kɑ per kinni o wø bødh wøn." 
Joshua9:25 Anɑn, wø ying-ɑ cingí, gwøg gïn-ɑ rømmi yi yïn e døøj kiper wøn.”" 
Joshua9:26 Ayiele gïn kì cinggi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑcög gï nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen." 
Joshua9:27 De ge ɑ́gwøg yi Jöcwø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni gɑ jøngøl ki yenh, kí tyëng nyi tëddi tyëng Isrɑil ki pï, geki këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kì keny-ɑ yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ keny mɑllii." 
Joshua10:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Adönidhedek, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerusɑlem kinni i Jöcwø Aɑy mɑɑg en, o gø rëny en ki rënyi dwøng, o rɑ̈dhe nɑ̈ɑ̈g en, ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge Yerikö geki rɑ̈dhe, kí kinni tyëng Gibeon göögø ki mër geki Isrɑil, o ge bëëd ɑ kej ɑ́kyel," 
Joshua10:2 ɑbwøge ki mendwøng, mɑ́ Gibeon bɑ kɑɑl me dwøng, o bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kí kɑ̀ bëëde e dwøng kibøli Aɑy, o jøge bɑ jödd." 
Joshua10:3 Aödi Adönidhedek yï Oɑ̈ɑ̈m, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kibrön, kí yï Pirɑm, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yɑrmuth, kí yï Yɑpiyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Lɑkic, kí yï Debir, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Eglön, kinni," 
Joshua10:4 “Bïu, kønyu yɑn ki pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Gibeon, mɑ́ tyëng kɑɑlɑni ɑ́göög ki mër ki Jöcwø geki tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
Joshua10:5 Kɑ rɑ̈nhi Amör gɑ ɑ́bïj, ɑ løg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerusɑlem, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kibrön, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yɑrmuth, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Lɑkic, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Eglön, jøliny mø gen bënn cøng gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki Gibeon." 
Joshua10:6 Kɑ Jöcwø ödi ki wöödø yi jø Gibeon, e ying-ɑ Gilgɑl kinni, “Cingí ko lwɑ̈nggí kì ri bɑ̈nggí, jwɑn bëën yï wøn, kɑ wø yieel, køny wøn ki liny, mɑ́ rɑ̈nhi Amör møg-ɑ bëëdø kì myërri kelli kïttì bënn, ri gen ɑ́cøng gen kiper wøn!”" 
Joshua10:7 Kɑ Jöcwø kedh-ɑ Gilgɑl, geki jølinye bënn, kí jöddi linye møg-ɑ pëddi tegø." 
Joshua10:8 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko böggi yi gen, mɑ́ ge cïbɑ’ cingí, bong jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen men-ɑ ócungi kì bølí.”" 
Joshua10:9 Apɑ̈ɑ̈y tyëng Amör piny yi Jöcwø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r ge ócyɑ̈dhø, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gilgɑl." 
Joshua10:10 Agöjji tyëng Amör wɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen tummi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen liny Isrɑil. Anɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi tyëng Isrɑil ki nɑ̈gø me rɑj kì Gibeon. Acyeddi kwï gen kì yuu-ɑ töngi piny kì wïj Kïti Bet Örøn, ge pwööd-ɑ piny gïti Adhekɑ̀ geki Mɑkedɑ̀." 
Joshua10:11 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi tyëng Amör yi Isrɑil kì yuu-ɑ töngi piny kì wïj kït kì Bet Örøn, ge ɑ́bɑ̈lli yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tuggi ɑ́piy mø døngø, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Adhekɑ̀, kɑ ge othøø. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi tuggi ɑ́piy, gïïr kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi jø Isrɑil." 
Joshua10:12 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi gen tyɑmi tyëng Amör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jöcwø ɑ́kööb geki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kɑ okööbø kì bøli jø Isrɑil bënn kinni, “Cɑ̈ng! Cungí kì wïj Gibeon, Dwɑ̈y! Cungí kì wïj Töör Ayɑlön.”" 
Joshua10:13 Acungi cɑ̈ng ceth, kɑ dwɑ̈y obëëdø, gïti kɑ ɑ́col ji gøøli gen ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Møgɑni bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Yɑcɑr kinni, cɑ̈ng ɑ́cungi kì dïmɑl, o nuti kedhi be buddø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kí dönge." 
Joshua10:14 Bong cyɑ̈ng mɑ ɑ́bëëd e nɑ cyɑ̈ngɑni cøn, wɑlɑ̀ kì bɑnge, mɑ ɑ́lïng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ki dhøg dhɑnhø, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ per Isrɑil!" 
Joshua10:15 Adøg Jöcwø geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn, ge døøg-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́gur kì Gilgɑl." 
Joshua10:16 Kɑ rɑ̈nhhɑni gɑ ɑ́bïj órengø, kɑ ge pɑ̈n-ɑ yij órøngi kït kì Mɑkedɑ̀." 
Joshua10:17 Kɑ ge yod, ɑköbbi Jöcwø kinni, “Rɑ̈nhhɑni gɑ ɑ́bïj ɑ́yod, ge pɑ̈ni yij órøngi kït kì Mɑkedɑ̀.”" 
Joshua10:18 Akööb Jöcwø kinni, “Ngyëli dhøg órøngɑni ki tungi kït me dwøng, kɑ kenyɑni cïbi ki jøg mø kurø," 
Joshua10:19 De ko bëëd ɑ́ wun ɑ kurø, cyeddi wun tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, gøju yɑɑy gen kì ngɑ̈je, ge ko wëggu wɑ̈dhi yethi myërri gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki cïb cinggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun.”" 
Joshua10:20 Jöcwø geki jø Isrɑil ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki mø gïïr kì kelli gen, de mø nøg kì kelli gen, ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yethi kɑ̈ddi gen, kɑ̈ddi dör, kɑ ge obødhø." 
Joshua10:21 Codhe, ɑdøøg ji bënn yï Jöcwø kì kɑɑl kì Mɑkedɑ̀, e bong gïnrɑj kiper gen. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì yij pödhø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi dhøge ki tugø ki tyëng Isrɑil." 
Joshua10:22 Kɑ, Jöcwø okööbø kinni, “Yiebu dhøg órøngi kït, kɑ rɑ̈nhhɑni gɑ ɑ́bïj kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g, kɑ ge muuj wun yɑn.”" 
Joshua10:23 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l rɑ̈nhhɑni wɑ̈g gɑ ɑ́bïj kì yij órøngi kït, ɑ løg, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerusɑlem, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kibrön, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yɑrmuth, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Lɑkic, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Eglön." 
Joshua10:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l rɑ̈nhhɑni wɑ̈g yï Jöcwø, ɑcwøøl jø Isrɑil bënn yi Jöcwø, ɑköbbe jyɑ̈ggi jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́kedh kí en kinni, “Bïu, cïb wun tyelli wun muddi rɑ̈nhì møg.” Codhe ɑbëën gen, kɑ tyelli gen cïb gen muddi rɑ̈nhhɑni." 
Joshua10:25 Aköbbi gen yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wu ko böggi, kɑ pëthi wun ko nyönhi, bëëd pëthi wun ge teeg, mɑ́ bene gïg ni møg ɑ göggi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun, ge ɑ́nɑ̈ggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua10:26 Anɑ̈ɑ̈g rɑ̈nhhɑni yi Jöcwø, ɑngɑɑb gen ri yenh ɑ́bïj, ɑwiy gen ge óryërø gïti böörø." 
Joshua10:27 Kì ri buddi cɑ̈ng, ɑmuuj Jöcwø ki cigg kinni, i kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen piny, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l gen piny kì ri yenh, ɑleeng gen yij órøngi kït men-ɑ́ yije ɑ́pɑ̈ni yi gen, kɑ dhøg órøngɑni ngyëdi ki tungi kït me dwøng, tungi kïnɑni, nudd e ying-ɑ kenyɑni dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua10:28 Amɑɑg Mɑkedɑ̀ yi Jöcwø dicyɑ̈ngɑni, ɑnɑ̈ge tyëng kɑɑlɑni bënn, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́bodh. Agögge rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑkedɑ̀ ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerikö." 
Joshua10:29 Codhe, ɑkedh Jöcwø geki Isrɑil bëne, kì Mɑkedɑ̀ ge kedh-ɑ Libnɑ̀, ɑnyïɑ̈gge ki Libnɑ̀." 
Joshua10:30 Acïb Libnɑ̀ geki rɑ̈dhe cingi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëng Libnɑ̀ bënn, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́döng kì yije, ɑgögge rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Libnɑ̀ gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerikö," 
Joshua10:31 Akedh Jöcwø geki Isrɑil bëne kì Libnɑ̀ ge kedh-ɑ Lɑkic, ɑtyege gøn, ɑnyïɑ̈gge ki gøn." 
Joshua10:32 Kɑ Lɑkic cïb cingi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑmɑge gøn kì ryeew cyɑ̈ng, ɑnɑ̈g gen tyëng Lɑkic bënn ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge Libnɑ̀." 
Joshua10:33 Codhe, ɑbëën Örɑm, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gedher be kønyi Lɑkic, kɑ nɑ̈g yi Jöcwø, kɑ jie nɑ̈g thyew, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́wiy yi en." 
Joshua10:34 Akedh Jöcwø kí Isrɑil bëne kì Lɑkic, ge kedh-ɑ Eglön, ɑtyeg ge gøn, ɑnyïɑ̈ggi gen ki gøn." 
Joshua10:35 Anɑ̈g gen jii kɑɑlɑni bënn dicyɑ̈ngɑni, ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Lɑkic." 
Joshua10:36 Akedh Jöcwø kí Isrɑil bëne kì Eglön, ge kedh-ɑ Kibrön, ɑnyïɑ̈ggi gen ki gøn." 
Joshua10:37 Amɑg ge gøn, ɑnɑ̈g gen tyëng Kibrön, ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge Eglön ki myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki gøn, ɑnɑ̈g gen tyëng Kibrön bënn, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng, ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Eglön, gø ɑ́rënyi gen ki mendwøng, kí jie bënn." 
Joshua10:38 Adøøg Jöcwø Debir geki Isrɑil bëne, ɑnyïɑ̈gge ki gøn." 
Joshua10:39 Amɑge gøn geki rɑ̈dhe kí myërre bënn, ɑnɑ̈g gen tyëng Debir ki menrɑj, bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng; gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Kibrön, kí Libnɑ̀ kí rɑ̈nhi gen, en ɑ ɑ́gögge Debir kí rɑ̈dhe thyew." 
Joshua10:40 Kɑ pinyɑni bëne, mɑg yi Jöcwø, gen ɑ myërri kelli kïttì, kí myërr-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí myërri thwørø, kí myërri wɑ̈thi kïttì kí rɑ̈nhi gen bënn. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wiy e onëënø; o bene møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Joshua10:41 Ge ɑ́tyɑm yi Jöcwø cɑg kì Gɑdic Berniyɑ̀ gïti Gɑdhɑ̀ kì kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kí Göcen gïti Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Rɑ̈nhhɑni bënn ɑ́tyɑm yi Jöcwø, kɑ piny gïn kwɑnye wïj ɑ́kyel, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kipe Isrɑil." 
Joshua10:43 Codhe, kɑ Jöcwø døøg-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́gur kì Gilgɑl geki Isrɑil bëne." 
Joshua11:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi wööni tyɑ̈mi Isrɑil yï Yɑbïn, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Adhör, ɑöde yï Yöbɑb, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑdön, kí yï rɑ̈nhi Cimrön geki Akcɑp," 
Joshua11:2 kí yï rɑ̈nhi myërri kïttì kì wɑɑng wuudø, kí Töör Urdun kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí Tɑɑy Gɑlelì, kí thɑ́ kïttì, kí thɑ̈ngi nɑm men-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Dör." 
Joshua11:3 Kɑ öd-ɑ yï tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ki wöödø thyew kì tøggi Nɑm Urdun tuung kí tuung, kí yï tyëng Amör, kí yï tyëng Kit, kí yï tyëng Perïdh, kí yï tyëng Yebus kì myërri kïttì, kí yï tyëng Kib møg-ɑ bëëdø kì thɑ Kïti Kermön kì piny Midhpɑ̀." 
Joshua11:4 Kɑ ge obëënø kí jøliny mø gen bënn, kwɑnni gen gïïr nɑ ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø. Yï gen ɑ́dɑ kyënyì mø gïïr kí yɑ̈thi liny." 
Joshua11:5 Kɑ jøliny mø rɑ̈nhhɑni reb yi gen bënn, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ yethi kemmì kì Dhøg Meröm, ge nenn-ɑ nyɑɑg ki Isrɑil." 
Joshua11:6 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko böggi yi gen. Piny nɑ men dhuki, ge ówëggɑ nɑ̈gø yi Isrɑil ge bënn, kɑ rɑ̈rri tyelli kyënyi gen kebbi yi yïn, kɑ yɑ̈thi liny mø gen rɑ̈b yi yïn.”" 
Joshua11:7 Codhe, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen yi Jöcwø geki jøge bënn kì Dhøg Meröm." 
Joshua11:8 Awëggi Isrɑil tyɑmi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑnɑ̈g ge gïn, kɑ ge cyeed wɑɑng wuudø pïd Misrepöth Mɑim kì Sïdön, gïti Töör Midhpɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Liny ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi gïti kɑ ɑ́bongii ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng e onëënø." 
Joshua11:9 Ge ɑ́göggi yi Jöcwø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, kɑ rɑ̈rri tyelli kyënyi gen kebbe, kɑ yɑ̈thi liny mø gïn rɑ̈be ki mɑc." 
Joshua11:10 Codhe, ɑdwöög Jöcwø, kɑ Adhör kwɑnye kɑ rɑ̈dhe nɑ̈ge, kì bøli kenyɑni Adhör ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ en ɑ teg kì kelli pödhhi rɑ̈nhhɑni bënn." 
Joshua11:11 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑlɑni ɑ́nɑ̈g bënn yi gen, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́wiy e onëënø, kɑ kɑɑl Adhör rɑ̈b." 
Joshua11:12 Kɑ̈ddɑni bënn ɑ́mɑg yi Jöcwø, kɑ rɑ̈nhi gïn nɑ̈ge, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua11:13 De tyëng Isrɑil kɑ̈dd-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì nuti rɑ̈ɑ̈b gen, den-ɑ́ Adhör ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b yi Jöcwø." 
Joshua11:14 Jɑmm-ɑ per gen teg kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni, kí dhög ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëng Isrɑil. De ji ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen bënn, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́wiy e onëënø." 
Joshua11:15 Ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈nge, møgɑni ɑ́mëggi Jöcwø yi Mosɑ̀, kɑ ge mïdhi yi Jöcwø ceth. Kɑ Jöcwø møgɑni gwøge bënn ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua11:16 Akɑɑb piny bëne yi Jöcwø, myërri wɑ̈thi kïttì geki myërri thɑ́ kïttì, kì wɑɑng wuudø geki wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí piny Göcen bëne, kí ryɑng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí Töör Urdun thyew." 
Joshua11:17 Pinyɑni pïd-ɑ Kïti Alɑk kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì buti Edöm, gïti Bɑɑl Gɑd kì yij töör Lubnɑn kì bøli Kïti Kermön kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Jöcwø ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki rɑ̈nhi pinyɑni ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, de gï ɑ́tyɑme, kɑ rɑ̈nhi gïn nɑ̈ge bënn." 
Joshua11:18  
Joshua11:19 Kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́göög ki mër ki tyëng Isrɑil bɑ Gibeon kete, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi kwï tyëng Kib. Kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́kwɑny kɑ liny." 
Joshua11:20 Muddi gen ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ge teeg kipe nyɑɑg ki tyëng Isrɑil, kipe kinni o ge nɑ̈g bënn yi tyëng Isrɑil, e bong lɑ̈mpyëw, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua11:21 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kedh Jöcwø, kɑ tyëng Anɑk nɑ̈ge, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ bɑ jödd bënn, møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì myërri kïttì, kí Kibrön, kí Debir, kí Anɑb, kí myërri kïtti Yeudiyɑ̀ geki kïttì Isrɑil. Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g bënn yi Jöcwø kɑ kɑ̈ddi gïn rënye bënn." 
Joshua11:22 Bong tyëng Anɑk mɑ ɑ́döng kì piny Isrɑil, de ɑ́kyëllì nud mɑ ɑ́döng kì Gɑdhɑ̀, kí Gɑth geki Acdöd." 
Joshua11:23 Pinyɑni bëne ɑ́kwɑny yi Jöcwø, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑmëggi pinyɑni Isrɑil yi Jöcwø ɑ́ mi gen, gø pɑ̈nge ɑ́ bud kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil. Codhe ɑywöm ji ri gen ki liny." 
Joshua12:1 Mosɑ̀ tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́peeje be tyɑmi rɑ̈nhì ɑ́ryew, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì løøg Nɑm Urdun, kipe kinni o piny gen kwɑny. Pinyɑni cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Töör Arnön gïti Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng wuudø, e pïd-ɑ Kïti Kermön." 
Joshua12:2 Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amör ɑ bëëdø kì Kicbön, piny-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg yi en wɑ̈dh-ɑ Aröeer kì tøg töör Arnön, e kɑ̈l-ɑ dyëri Nɑm Arnön gïti Nɑm Yɑbok, wïj keew tyëng Amön, e kwɑny-ɑ budi piny Gilyɑd." 
Joshua12:3 Kew kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø bɑ Töör Urdun, cɑg kì Tɑɑy Gɑlelì kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti Luuy Omelø kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, e kwɑny-ɑ piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Luuy Omelø gïti Bet Yecimöth gïti Kïti Pisgɑ̀." 
Joshua12:4 Og rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑcɑn ɑ́tyɑm yi gen thyew, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ e kete ɑ dööngø kì ri tyëng Repɑim. Ájyɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ Actɑröth geki Edrey." 
Joshua12:5 Ájɑɑg-ɑ Kïti Kermön kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti Sɑlekɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Bɑcɑn bëne ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi en thyew, gïti piny Gecur geki Mɑɑkɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Kí bun-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì ri piny Gilyɑd gïti piny Sïön, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kicbön kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Joshua12:6 Rɑ̈nhhɑni ryeet ɑ́tyɑm yi Mosɑ̀ geki tyëng Isrɑil. Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, piny gïn ɑ́mëgge wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Ruben, kí Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè, gøn-ɑ́ mi gen." 
Joshua12:7 Jöcwø geki tyëng Isrɑil rɑ̈nhi piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì kömi Nɑm Urdun, ɑ́tyɑm yi gen bënn, cɑg kì Bɑɑl Gɑd, kí töör Lubnɑn gïti Kïti Alɑk kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kì buti Edöm. Apɑ̈ngi pinyɑni yi Jöcwø kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì; gøl mëgg-ɑ mee." 
Joshua12:8 Piny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi yi Jöcwø reb-ɑ myërri kïttì, kí myërri thɑ́ kïttì kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kí Töör Urdun geki myërri thɑ́ kïttì, kí myërr-ɑ luung piny kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kí piny-ɑ thwøwø kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Pinyɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pödhi tyëng Kit, kí Amör, kí Kɑnɑɑn, kí Perïdh, kí Kib, kí Yebus." 
Joshua12:9 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́tyɑm-ɑ rɑ̈nhì møg: Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerikö, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Aɑy kì buti Betiil." 
Joshua12:10 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yerusɑlem, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kibrön." 
Joshua12:11 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yɑrmuth, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Lɑkic." 
Joshua12:12 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Eglön, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gedher." 
Joshua12:13 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Debir, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Geder." 
Joshua12:14 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Órmɑ̀, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑd." 
Joshua12:15 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Libnɑ̀, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Adulɑm." 
Joshua12:16 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑkedɑ̀, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Betiil." 
Joshua12:17 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Tɑpuɑ̀, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Eper." 
Joshua12:18 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Ápek, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Lɑcɑrön." 
Joshua12:19 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑdön, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Adhör." 
Joshua12:20 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cimrön Merön, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Akcɑp." 
Joshua12:21 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Tɑɑnɑk, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Megidø." 
Joshua12:22 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kedec, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yokneɑm kì Kɑrmel." 
Joshua12:23 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dör, kì myërri gɑ̈d, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Göyïm kì Gɑlelì." 
Joshua12:24 Kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Tirdhɑ̀. Kwɑnni gen bënn bɑ rɑ̈nhì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́kyel. 
Joshua13:1 Anɑn Jöcwø ɑ́døngi, kɑ runne óngënyø, ɑköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ɑ́døngi, o runní ɑ́ngënyi, de pìny-ɑ dwɑddi kwɑnyø nudd ge gïïr." 
Joshua13:2 Møg bene gen pìny-ɑ ɑ́döng, ɑ nudd ge dwɑdd-ɑ kwɑnyø, piny Pelistiyɑ̀ bëne, kí piny Gecur bëne kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì wïj keew Rïp," 
Joshua13:3 kí piny tyëng Abɑ̀ bëne kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Thyew piny-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì ri Nɑm Cïör kì wïj keew Rïp gïti wɑɑng wuudø, kí Ekrön nuti kwɑnyø, ɑ løg piny Kɑnɑɑn, kí piny-ɑ bëëd yi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́bïj, ɑ kɑ̈ddi gen bɑ Gɑdhɑ̀, kí Acdöd, kí Ackelön, kí Gɑth, kí Ekrön." 
Joshua13:4 Kí piny Kɑnɑɑn geki Meɑrɑ̀, bɑ mi tyëng Sïdön gïti Ápek kì wïj keew tyëng Amör." 
Joshua13:5 Kí piny tyëng Gebɑl, kí piny Lubnɑn bëne kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, cɑg kì Bɑɑl Gɑd ɑ ying kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí Kïti Kermön gïti Ókømi Amɑth." 
Joshua13:6 Kí piny tyëng Sïdön bëne, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli kïttì kì kɑɑm Kïttì Lubnɑn geki Misrepöth Mɑim. Ge ócyeddɑ kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil. Kɑ pìnyɑni pɑ̈ngí kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil ni kɑ ɑ́cegɑ yïn ceth." 
Joshua13:7 Anɑn, pɑ̈ngí piny men kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì ɑ́bïngwen, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè ɑ́ mi gen. Pɑ̈ngí piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì kömi Nɑm Urdun.”" 
Joshua13:8 Gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè møg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ́rum ki yïddø kì piny-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì løøg Nɑm Urdun, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua13:9 Piny gen pïd-ɑ Aröeer kì tøg töör Arnön, kí kɑɑl-ɑ dyëri törɑni, kí tör-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì Medebɑ̀ gïti Dïbön." 
Joshua13:10 Kí kɑ̈ddi Sïön, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amör, ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Kicbön gïti piny Amön." 
Joshua13:11 Kí Gilyɑd, kí piny Gecur geki Mɑɑkɑ̀, kí Kïti Kermön bëne, kí piny Bɑcɑn bëne gïti Sɑlekɑ̀." 
Joshua13:12 Kí piny Rɑ̈dh Og, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ e kete ɑ döngø kì ri tyëng Repɑim, ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Actɑröth kí Edrey. Tyëngɑni bënn ɑ́tyɑm yi Mosɑ̀ kɑ gï cyedde." 
Joshua13:13 Tyëng Gecur, kí tyëng Mɑɑkɑ̀ nuti cyeddø yi tyëng Isrɑil, de ge ɑ́cög ge obëëdø kì Isrɑil gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua13:14 Bong piny mɑ ɑ́mëggi Kwɑrri Leebì yi Mosɑ̀ ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cøn. Ge nyi yïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kì wïj këli lɑm." 
Joshua13:15 Kwï piny ɑ́mëggi wïj gøl Ruben yi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́ mi gen. 
Joshua13:16 Piny gen gït-ɑ Aröeer kì tøg töör Arnön, kí kɑɑl-ɑ dyër törɑni, kí töör Medebɑ̀." 
Joshua13:17 Piny gen reb-ɑ Kicbön, kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ wïj kwøømø bënn, ɑ løg. Dïbön, kí Bɑmöth Bɑɑl, kí Bet Bɑɑlmeon," 
Joshua13:18 kí Yɑɑdh, kí Kedemöth, kí Mepɑɑth," 
Joshua13:19 kí Kiriɑtɑim, kí Sibmɑ̀, kí Dhereth Cɑ̈ɑ̈r kí wɑ̈thi kwøøm kí yij törɑni." 
Joshua13:20 Kí Betpeor, kí myërri tøg Kïti Pisgɑ̀, kí Bet Yecimöth," 
Joshua13:21 e reb-ɑ myërri yij tör bënn, kí piny rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amör, Sïön bëne, gen ɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Kicbön. Ádɑ pëjji jurrì ɑ́bïj mɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Midyɑn, ɑ løg Ebì, kí Rekem, kí Dhur, kí Ur, kí Rebɑ̀. Ge bënn, ge ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sïön." 
Joshua13:22 Jɑɑl rɑng, Bɑlɑɑm wɑ̈d Beor, bɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Isrɑil" 
Joshua13:23 Nɑm Urdun ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ keew gøl Ruben kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, bene myërrɑni ɑ ɑ́mëggi tyëng gøl Ruben gøn ɑ́ mi gen." 
Joshua13:24 Tyëng gøl Gɑd ɑ́nëngi yi Mosɑ̀ thyew ki kwï pinyɑni ɑ́ mi gen. 
Joshua13:25 Pinyɑni ɑ́reb-ɑ Yɑdher, kí kɑ̈ddi Gilyɑd bënn, kí budi piny Amön gïti Aröeer, ɑ ying buti Rɑbɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua13:26 Piny gen cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Kicbön gïti Rɑmɑth Midhpè, kí Betonïm, cɑg kì Mɑɑ̈nɑim gïti keew Debir." 
Joshua13:27 Kì yij Töör Urdun, piny gen reb-ɑ Bet Arɑm, kí Bet Nimrɑ̀, kí Suköth, kí Dhɑpön, kí kwï piny Rɑ̈dh Sïön, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kicbön. Keew gen kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Nɑm Urdun e gït-ɑ Tɑɑy Gɑlelì kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Joshua13:28 Bene kɑ̈ddɑni ɑ ɑ́mëggi tyëng gøl Gɑd gïn ɑ́ mø gen. 
Joshua13:29 Budi gøl Mɑnɑsè ɑ́rum ki nëngø ki piny yi Mosɑ̀. 
Joshua13:30 Piny gen ɑ́gït-ɑ Mɑɑ̈nɑim e reb-ɑ Bɑcɑn bëne, kí piny Rɑ̈dh Og bëne, kí myërri Yɑir gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel bënn thyew." 
Joshua13:31 Áreb-ɑ budi Gilyɑd, kí Actɑröth geki Edrey, kí kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Rɑ̈dh Og, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑcɑn. Møgɑni bënn ɑ́mëggi budi gøl Mɑkir wɑ̈d Mɑnɑsè." 
Joshua13:32 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì bøli Yerikö kì løøg Nɑm Urdun ɑnɑn yi Mosɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́yinge thwøri Moɑb. 
Joshua13:33 De bong piny mɑ ɑ́mëggi kwɑrri Leebì yi Mosɑ̀. Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni ge nyi yïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri gëdhhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Joshua14:1 Ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr, geki Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, kí pëjji kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, gen ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi piny Kɑnɑɑn, piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil." 
Joshua14:2 Ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, piny wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì ɑ́bïngwen kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun ɑ́leng kɑ wél." 
Joshua14:3 Kɑ̈llì ɑ́ryew kí budi kɑl ɑ́rum ki nëngø ki piny, kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl yi Mosɑ̀, de Kwɑrri Leebì bong piny mɑ ɑ́mëgge gïn. Kɑ̈llì ɑ́ryew møgɑni bɑ kwɑrri Yosep, ɑ løg wïj gøl Mɑnɑsè geki wïj gøl Eprɑim. De Kwɑrri Leebì nuti nëngi yi Mosɑ̀ ki piny, de ge ɑ́nëngi ki kɑ̈dd møg bëëd yi gen, kí cɑ̈mmi dhögi gen geki dyëgi gen." 
Joshua14:4  
Joshua14:5 Piny ɑ́pɑ̈ngi yi tyëng Isrɑil ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth. 
Joshua14:6 Kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bï-ɑ yï Jöcwø kì Gilgɑl, kí Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ jɑl Kenidh kì kelli gen. Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Kɑlib kinni, “Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Mosɑ̀, jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiperee kì Gɑdic Berniyɑ̀, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn." 
Joshua14:7 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd runnɑ bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen keny-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn kì Gɑdic Berniyɑ̀, be lyeewi piny yi Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ muujɑ kwøbb-ɑ dyër ceth." 
Joshua14:8 De jøg-ɑ ɑ́kedh wøn, pëthi ji ɑ́thödhi yi gen ki wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ løg-ɑ yɑn, yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgɑ ceth." 
Joshua14:9 Aköngi Mosɑ̀ dicyɑ̈ngɑni kinni, ‘Piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́ywööny tyelí bëne, óbëëd ɑ́ mií, wuki kwɑrrí gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ yï ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgɑ ceth!’" 
Joshua14:10 Anɑn, yɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ onëënø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe Mosɑ̀ kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi Isrɑil kì pɑ̈l. Anɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn yïɑ dɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj." 
Joshua14:11 Yɑ nudd yɑ teeg dicyɑ̈ngtïn ni kɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ teg kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yi Mosɑ̀, yɑ teeg ki liny geki cyɑ̈dhø." 
Joshua14:12 Mëggí yɑn myërri kelli kïttì, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kinni gø ómëgge yɑn. Wu ɑ́köbbi yi wøn kinni myërrɑni bëëd-ɑ yi ji mø døngø, mø cwølli gɑ tyëng Anɑk, ge bëëd ɑ yethi kɑ̈dd mø thøø yi gerø ki dör. Yɑ ócɑɑg kɑ kønyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑwɑnø, ɑcyeddɑ gen ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua14:13 Kɑ Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ kwëng yi Jöcwø, kɑ Kibrön mëgge gøn ɑ́ mee." 
Joshua14:14 Kibrön nudd ɑ́ mi gøl Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ jɑl Kenidh gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ e ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ bɑng Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua14:15 Keny-ɑ́ nuti kwɑɑny Kibrön yi Kɑlib, ɑ́cwøl ɑ́ Kiriɑt Arbɑ̀. O ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ en ɑ dwøng kì kelli kɑ̈ddi kwɑrri Anɑk. Codhe, ɑywöm ji ri gen ki liny." 
Joshua15:1 Gøl Yeudɑ̀ piny-ɑ bɑ mi gen ɑ́leng, e pɑ̈ng ɑ kelli kɑ̈lli gen. Piny gen ɑ́wɑ̈dh-ɑ cögi pɑ̈ɑ̈l Dhin kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kì ri keew Edöm." 
Joshua15:2 Keew gen kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kɑ̈l-ɑ ri cögi Luuy Omelø," 
Joshua15:3 e kedh-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, cɑg kì Ókømi Akrɑbïm gïti Dhin. Rengi e kɑ̈l-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri Gɑdic Berniyɑ̀, e cør-ɑ Ëdhrön gïti Adɑr, e töng-ɑ ri Kɑrkɑ̀," 
Joshua15:4 e kedh-ɑ Adhmön, e kɑ̈l-ɑ ri nɑm-ɑ ri keew Rïp gïti Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, keny-ɑ cöög yi kewɑni. Bene keew Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl ɑnɑn." 
Joshua15:5 Keew piny gøl Yeudɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Luuy Omelø, gïti keny-ɑ töngi Nɑm Urdun ree. Kenyɑni bene cɑ̈gi keew Yeudiyɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wuudø," 
Joshua15:6 gïti Bet Oglɑ̀ e kɑ̈l-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wuudø kì Bet Arbɑ̀. Codhe, o kedhe gïti Kïti Böɑn wɑ̈d Ruben." 
Joshua15:7 O kewɑni cɑ̈ge kì Töör Akørr gïti Debir, o tönge Gilgɑl kì tung-ɑ di Adumïm kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri törɑni. Kewɑni wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri nyingi pïi Ein Cemec gïti Enrögel,"
