Joshua15:8 e kɑ̈l-ɑ yij Töör Kinöm kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kì ri kïn-ɑ köme ógeer Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl tyëng Yebus. O kew pödhe wɑ̈thi ótøng-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri Töör Kinöm, kì ri cögi Töör Repɑim kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Joshua15:9 Kewɑni kɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì gïti nyingi pïi Neptoɑ̀, o cɑ̈ge kì kenyɑni gïti kɑ̈ddi Kïti Eprön, e töng-ɑ kuni Bɑɑlɑ̀, ɑ bɑ Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm," 
Joshua15:10 e wen-ɑ ree kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri Bɑɑlɑ̀ gïti kïtti Edöm, e pödh-ɑ tøg Kïti Yeɑrïm (wɑlɑ̀ Kesɑlön) kì wɑɑng wuudø. Codhe, o tönge piny kì ri Bet Cemec, e pödh-ɑ Timnɑ̀." 
Joshua15:11 Codhe, e kew kɑ̈l-ɑ ri ótong kì kuni wɑɑng wuudø kì ri Ekrön, e töng-ɑ kuni Cikerön, e kɑ̈l-ɑ ri Kïti Bɑɑlɑ̀ gïti Yɑmniyɑ̀. Cög ɑ ri Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr," 
Joshua15:12 menɑni bene keew kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Bene keew piny-ɑ bëëd yi gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑnɑn. 
Joshua15:13 Ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwï piny Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́mëggi Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀, ɑ løg jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jø wïj gøl Yeudɑ̀. Ámëgg-ɑ Kiriɑt Arbɑ̀, wïyi Anɑk, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kibrön." 
Joshua15:14 Acyeddi kwɑrri Anɑk gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g yi Kɑlib kì kenyɑni, ɑ løg gøl Cecɑy, kí Akimɑn, kí Tɑlmɑy," 
Joshua15:15 Akedhi Kɑlib be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Debir. Debir ɑ́cwøl ɑ́ Kiriɑt Seper. 
Joshua15:16 Akööb Kɑlib kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki Kiriɑt Seper kɑ gø mɑge, ómëggɑ nyɑrɑ Aksɑ̀ ɑ́ dhɑjø.”" 
Joshua15:17 Amɑɑg kɑɑlɑni yi Othniel wɑ̈d Kenɑdh ómï Kɑlib. Kɑ mëggi Aksɑ̀ ɑ́ dhɑjø yi Kɑlib. 
Joshua15:18 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng nywöm, ɑcwɑɑg Aksɑ̀ mɑl yi Othniel kinni, kwɑjje wïye kinni dwɑdd-ɑ nyingi pï. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yïnhe piny kì kömi ɑdere, ɑpyëjii yi Kɑlib wïye kinni, “Á ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn?”" 
Joshua15:19 Alögge kinni, “Nëngí yɑn ki nyingi pï, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́cïbí piny me thwøwø.” Kɑ nyingi pïg-ɑ kwøømø geki nyingi pïg-ɑ yij tör mëggii yi Kɑlib." 
Joshua15:20 Møg bene gen pìny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Yeudɑ̀ gïn-ɑ́ mø gen. 
Joshua15:21 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ bɑ mø tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ møg-ɑ wïj tung-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kì kuni keew Edöm ɑ́bëëd gɑ Kɑbdhiil, kí Eder, kí Yɑgur," 
Joshua15:22 kí Kinɑ̀, kí Dimönɑ̀ kí Adɑdɑ̀" 
Joshua15:23 kí Kedec, kí Adhör, kí Ithnɑn." 
Joshua15:24 Kí Dhïp, kí Telem, kí Beɑlöth," 
Joshua15:25 kí Adhör Adɑtɑ̀, kí Keryöth Ëdhrön," 
Joshua15:26 kí Amɑm, kí Cemɑ̀, kí Mölɑdɑ̀," 
Joshua15:27 kí Adhɑr Gɑdɑ̀, kí Ëcmön, kí Betpelet," 
Joshua15:28 kí Adhɑr Cuɑɑl, kí Bircebɑ̀, kí Bidhyöthiyɑ̀," 
Joshua15:29 kí Bɑɑlɑ̀, kí Iim, kí Edhem," 
Joshua15:30 kí Eltölɑd, kí Kesil, kí Órmɑ̀," 
Joshua15:31 kí Dhiglɑg, kí Mɑdmɑnɑ̀, kí Sɑnsɑnɑ̀," 
Joshua15:32 kí Lebɑöth, kí Cilkim, kí Ain, kí Rimön. Ge bënn, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïngwen kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:33 Kɑ̈ddi thɑ́ kïttì bɑ Ectɑol, kí Dhorɑ̀, kí Acnɑ̀," 
Joshua15:34 kí Dhɑnoɑ̀, kí Ein Gɑnïm, kí Tɑpuɑ̀, kí Enɑm," 
Joshua15:35 kí Yɑrmuth, kí Adulɑm, kí Sökö, kí Adhekɑ̀," 
Joshua15:36 kí Cɑɑrɑim, kí Adithɑim, kí Gederɑ̀ geki Gederötɑim, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:37 Kí Dhenɑn thyew, kí Adɑcɑ̀, kí Megdɑlgɑd," 
Joshua15:38 Kí Dileɑn, kí Midhpɑ̀, kí Yoktheel," 
Joshua15:39 Kí Lɑkic, kí Bodhkɑth, kí Eglön" 
Joshua15:40 kí Kɑbön, kí Lɑmɑm, kí Kitlïc," 
Joshua15:41 kí Gederöth, kí Bet Dɑgön, kí Nɑɑmɑ̀ geki Mɑkedɑ̀. Ge bënn ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:42 Kí Libnɑ̀ thyew, kí Ether, kí Acɑn," 
Joshua15:43 kí Iptɑ̀, kí Acnɑ̀, kí Nedhib," 
Joshua15:44 kí Keilɑ̀, kí Akdhïb geki Mɑrecɑ̀, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïngwen kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:45 Kí Ekrön thyew, geki myërre." 
Joshua15:46 Kí kɑ̈dd geki myërri gen bënn møg-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Acdöd, cɑg kì Ekrön gïti Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr." 
Joshua15:47 Kí Acdöd geki Gɑdhɑ̀ thyew, kí myërri gen gïti nɑm-ɑ wïj keew Rïp, kí myërr-ɑ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr." 
Joshua15:48 Kì myërri kelli kïttì, ɑ́dɑ Cɑmïr, kí Yɑtir, kí Sökö," 
Joshua15:49 kí Dɑnɑ̀, kí Kiriɑt Seper (Debir)" 
Joshua15:50 kí Anɑb, kí Ectemoɑ̀, kí Anïm," 
Joshua15:51 kí Göcen, kí Kölön geki Gilø, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:52 Kí Árɑb thyew, kí Dumɑ̀, kí Ecɑn" 
Joshua15:53 kí Yɑnïm, kí Bet Tɑpuɑ̀, kí Ápekɑ̀," 
Joshua15:54 kí Umtɑ̀, kí Kibrön geki Dhiyör, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïngwen kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:55 Kí Mɑon thyew, kí Kɑrmel, kí Dhïp, kí Yutɑ̀," 
Joshua15:56 kí Yidhriil, kí Yokdeɑm, kí Dhɑnoɑ̀," 
Joshua15:57 kí Kɑin, kí Gibeɑ̀ geki Timnɑ̀. Ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:58 Kí Alul, kí Betdhur, kí Gedör" 
Joshua15:59 kí Mɑɑrɑth, kí Betɑnöth geki Eltekön, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:60 Kí Kiriɑt Bɑɑl ɑ bɑ Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, kí Rɑbɑ̀, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:61 Kì yij ryɑng, ɑ́dɑ Bet Árɑbɑ̀, kí Mïdïn, kí Sekɑkɑ̀," 
Joshua15:62 kí Nibcɑn, kí kɑɑl Omelø geki Ein Gedì, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel kí myërri gen." 
Joshua15:63 De tyëng Yebus, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem, nuti cyeddø yi gøl Yeudɑ̀, ge bëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel geki gøl Yeudɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem, gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Joshua16:1 Piny kwɑrri Yosep, kewe kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi Nɑm Urdun kì buti Yerikö kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì buti nyingi pïi Yerikö, e kɑ̈l-ɑ yij pɑ̈l. O døøge ki cɑ̈gø kì Yerikö e kɑ̈l-ɑ yethi myërri kïttì, gïti Betiil." 
Joshua16:2 O døøge ki cɑ̈gø kì Betiil gïti Ludh, e pɑ̈dh-ɑ Atɑröth Adɑr, kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi tyëng Arkì." 
Joshua16:3 Codhe, o kedhe piny tyëng Yɑpleth kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, gïti yij tör kì Bet Örøn. O tönge Gedher, o thøwe kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr." 
Joshua16:4 Kwɑrri Yosep, ɑ løg gøl Eprɑim geki gøl Mɑnɑsè gen ɑ ɑ́mëggi pinyɑni gøn ɑ́ mi gen." 
Joshua16:5 Keew gøl Eprɑim cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Atɑröth Adɑr e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti myërri kwøømi Bet Örøn," 
Joshua16:6 e töng-ɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr gïti Mikmethɑth kì wɑɑng wuudø. O tönge kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Tɑɑnɑth Cilø, e pödh-ɑ Yɑnoɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua16:7 Codhe, o tönge piny kì Yɑnoɑ̀ e pödh-ɑ Atɑröth geki Nɑɑrɑ̀, o thøwe Yerikö kì kömi Nɑm Urdun." 
Joshua16:8 O kewɑni cige kedhø kì Tɑpuɑ̀ e pödh-ɑ dhøg Kɑnɑ̀, o thøwe Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr. Bene piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Eprɑim gøn ɑ́ mi gen ɑnɑn," 
Joshua16:9 de kwï kɑ̈dd-ɑ tøggi pinyɑni geki myërri gen ge ɑ́mëggi gøl Eprɑim. 
Joshua16:10 De tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Gedher nuti cyeddø yi tyëng gøl Eprɑim, ge obëëdø kí gïn gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, de ge ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng gøl Eprɑim gɑ tyëng nyi göggi gen ni bɑ̈ngg." 
Joshua17:1 Kwï piny ɑ́mëggi gøl Mɑnɑsè kì kömi Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø yi Jöcwø, mɑ́ ge bɑ kwɑrri Mɑnɑsè kɑyi Yosep. Mɑkir bɑ kɑyi Mɑnɑsè, o Mɑkir yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de mø cwøl ɑ́ Gilyɑd. Mɑkir ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl-liny me teg, ɑmëggii piny Gilyɑd geki Bɑcɑn yi Jöcwø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì løøg Nɑm Urdun." 
Joshua17:2 Anɑn piny-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ɑ́pɑ̈ngi yi Jöcwø kì kelli gøl Mɑnɑsè møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti nëngø, kwɑrri Mɑnɑsè yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw bɑ Abiedher kí Ëlek, kí Asriel, kí Cekïm, kí Ëper, kí Cemïdɑ̀. Bene gen ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì. Wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen bënn ɑ́nëngi ki piny kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua17:3 Gilyɑd wɑ̈d Mɑkir, wɑ̈d Mɑnɑsè ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ wɑ̈de me cwøl ɑ́ Dhelopekɑd, mɑ́ yïe ɑ́bong-ɑ wɑ̈dd, de yïe ɑ́dɑ nyige womɑ̈nn, nyingi gen bɑ Mɑklɑ̀, kí Nöö, kí Oglɑ̀, kí Milkɑ̀, kí Tirdhɑ̀." 
Joshua17:4 Akedhi woɑni yï ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr, geki Jöcwø kí pëjjì, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Mosɑ̀ ɑ́cege kinni i nëngi wøn ki piny ni kɑ ɑ́nëngi wɑddi wøn yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw.” Anëngi gen ki piny kyeel ki wɑddi gen yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cøn." 
Joshua17:5 Kwɑrri Mɑnɑsè yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw kí womɑ̈nn ɑ́nëngi yi Jöcwø ki piny, bene ɑ ɑ́yïddi tyëng Mɑnɑsè ki piny me bɑ bud pyɑ̈rø kì piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun, reb kí Gilyɑd geki Bɑcɑn kì løøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua17:6  
Joshua17:7 Piny Mɑnɑsè cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ kì Aceer e gït-ɑ Mikmethɑth kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì bøli Cekïm. O kewɑni kɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti nyingi pï kì Tɑpuɑ̀. 
Joshua17:8 Piny-ɑ buti Tɑpuɑ̀ bɑ piny gøl Mɑnɑsè de kɑɑl Tɑpuɑ̀ bɑ mi gøl Eprɑim. 
Joshua17:9 Codhe, o kewɑni kedhe gïti dhøg Kɑnɑ̀. Myërr-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kömi dhøngɑni bɑ mø Eprɑim cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ ying gen piny gøl Mɑnɑsè. Codhe, o keew piny Mɑnɑsè kedhe kì kömi dhøngɑni kì wɑɑng wuudø, o thøwe Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr," 
Joshua17:10 Eprɑim ying-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, O Mɑnɑsè yinge wɑɑng wuudø, o Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr bene keew gen kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Aceer ying-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o Isɑkɑr ying-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua17:11 Kì yij piny Isɑkɑr geki piny Aceer, Mɑnɑsè yïe ɑ́dɑ Betcɑn geki Iblïm, kí myërri gen. Kí Dör geki Tɑɑnɑk, kí Megidø kí myërri gen." 
Joshua17:12 Tyëng gøl Mɑnɑsè, tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑ̈ddɑni nuti cyeddi gen. Ge ɑ́bëëd kì pinyɑni geki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn." 
Joshua17:13 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́tëngi tyëng Isrɑil, tyëng Kɑnɑɑn nuti cyeddi gen, de gï ɑ́gwøg gen gɑ bɑ̈ngg." 
Joshua17:14 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi piny yi Jöcwø kì kelli Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́bëën kwɑrri Yosep yïe, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ji mø gïïr, de wøde ɑ mëggí wøn piny ɑ́ budø ɑ́kyel kete?”" 
Joshua17:15 Alöggi Jöcwø kinni, “Keløg wu gïïr, o myërri kïtti Eprɑim nøg kiper wun, kedhu yij thïm, kɑ ri wun gwëjji wun ki piny, kì piny tyëng Perïdh geki tyëng Repɑim.”" 
Joshua17:16 Alöggi gen kinni, “Myërri kelli kïttì nøg kiper wøn, de tyëng Kɑnɑɑn kì myërri thwørø yï gen dɑ yɑ̈thi liny, møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki ngyënyø dødø, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Betcɑn geki myërre, kí møg-ɑ bëëdø kì yij Töör Yidhriil.”" 
Joshua17:17 Aköbbi gøl Eprɑim geki gøl Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wu gïïr ceth, o wu teeg cɑrø, wu dwɑdd-ɑ piny me dwøng kibøli budø ɑ́kyel." 
Joshua17:18 Myërri kelli kïttì óbëëdø gɑ mø wun, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëde e bɑ thïm, ógwej yi wun, kɑ kwɑny yi wun ɑ́ mi wun, cɑg kì cöge tuung kí tuung. Tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ócyeddi yi wun, cɑgg yï gen di yɑ̈thi liny, o ge teg.”" 
Joshua18:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum piny ki kwɑnyø yi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑcugi gen bënn kì Cilø. Kemi Kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ying-ɑ kenyɑni." 
Joshua18:2 Ábëëd e dɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil ɑ́bïryew mø nuti nëngø ki piny mø gen. 
Joshua18:3 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil pyëj yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wu gït-ɑ wɑɑng wu ogïrrø; kedhu be kwɑnyi piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun?" 
Joshua18:4 Tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki yïddø ki piny gen kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, o kwɑrri Yosep piny gen ying-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø. Wiy kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈llì ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ ɑ́döng bënn, yïënye ki jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g! Kɑ gï ör gen yïɑ. Ge óör yi yɑn, o yɑ gwëdi gen kër-ɑ bëëd yi piny-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen bëne. Pinyɑni ópɑ̈ngi yi gen ɑ́ bud ɑ́bïryew, kɑ ge dwöög gen yïɑ. Codhe, o wél leng yi yɑn kipe kinni o wïj kɑl pɑ̈dhe kì piny-ɑ dwɑddi mëggii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua18:5  
Joshua18:6  
Joshua18:7 Kwɑrri Leebì pɑ nëngi ki piny ni kɑ̈lli wun, mɑ́ lɑ̈gi gen bɑ bëëdi gen gɑ ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O gøl Gɑd, kí gøl Ruben, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè, ge ɑ́rum ki nëngø kí piny kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua18:8 Aköbbi jøg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jöcwø kinni, “Kedhu yij pinyɑni bëne, kɑ kër-ɑ bëëde gwed wun. Codhe, kɑ lwömɑni muuj wun yɑn kì Cilø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ópyëj yi yɑn, kì Cilø keny ki kër-ɑ ópɑ̈ngii kì kɑɑm wun, e leng kɑ wél.”" 
Joshua18:9 Akedhi jøgɑni yij pinyɑni bëne, kɑ kër-ɑ bëëde gwed yi gen, ɑ́ bud ɑ́bïryew. Nyingi myërr-ɑ yij budø ɑ́kyel kì kelli buddɑni ɑ́gweed gen piny thyew. Codhe, ɑdwöög gen yï Jöcwø kì Cilø." 
Joshua18:10 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëj yi Jöcwø, e leng-ɑ wél ki kër-ɑ pɑ̈ngi pinyɑni kì kelli gen. Codhe, kɑ wïj gøl nyi mëgge piny-ɑ pɑ̈dhi ki en." 
Joshua18:11 Gøl Ben Yɑmïn en ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki pɑ̈dhø ki piny. Piny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi ki gen ying-ɑ kɑɑm piny gøl Yeudɑ̀ kí piny gøl Yosep. 
Joshua18:12 Keew gølɑni kì wɑɑng wuudø cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi Nɑm Urdun, e kɑ̈l-ɑ ri Yerikö kì wɑɑng wuudø, e töng-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, e kɑ̈l-ɑ myërri kelli kïttì gïti pɑ̈ɑ̈l Bet Aben." 
Joshua18:13 O kewɑni ree løge wɑɑng wurlwɑl e kɑ̈l-ɑ Ludh, (ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Betiil,) codhe o tönge Atɑröth Adɑr, kì wïj kïn-ɑ Bet Örøn kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Joshua18:14 O kewɑni tönge wɑɑng wurlwɑl e kɑ̈l-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri kïnɑni gïti Bet Örøn, o thøwe Kiriɑt Bɑɑl ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm. O kɑɑlɑni bɑ mi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Joshua18:15 Kew-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ buti Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm e töng-ɑ nyingi pïi Neptoɑ̀. 
Joshua18:16 O kedhe e töng-ɑ piny thɑ kïn-ɑ rwöm ki Töör Kinöm kì cögi Töör Repɑim. Cɑ̈gi kì kenyɑni e kɑ̈l-ɑ yij Töör Kinöm, e rud-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl e bødh-ɑ piny tyëng Yebus gïti nyingi pïi Enrögel." 
Joshua18:17 Codhe, o tönge Ein Cemec e kedh-ɑ Gelilöth, ɑ rwöm ki Ókømi Adumïm. Codhe, o tönge Kïti Böɑn wɑ̈d Ruben." 
Joshua18:18 O pödhe wɑɑng wuudø kì ri kwøøm-ɑ nenni Töör Urdun. 
Joshua18:19 O pödhe wɑɑng wuudø kì ri kwøømi Bet Oglɑ̀ e töng-ɑ keny-ɑ rengi pïi Nɑm Urdun yij Luuy Omelø. Bene keew kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl ɑnɑn. 
Joshua18:20 Nɑm Urdun bene en ɑ bɑ kew kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Bene gen kewwi piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Ben Yɑmïn. 
Joshua18:21 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ bɑ mø gøl Ben Yɑmïn bɑ, Yerikö, kí Bet Oglɑ̀, kí Emek Kedhïdh," 
Joshua18:22 kí Bet Árɑbɑ̀, kí Dhemɑrɑim, kí Betiil" 
Joshua18:23 kí Abɑ̀, kí Pɑrɑ̀, kí Óprɑ̀," 
Joshua18:24 kí Kepɑrɑmönì, kí Ópnì, kí Gebɑ̀. Ge bɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí myërri gen." 
Joshua18:25 Kí Gibeon, kí Rɑmɑ̀, kí Beeröth," 
Joshua18:26 kí Midhpɑ̀, kí Kepïrɑ̀, kí Mödhɑ̀," 
Joshua18:27 kí Rekem, kí Irpiil, kí Tɑrɑlɑ̀," 
Joshua18:28 kí Dhelɑ̀, kí Aɑlep, kí Yebus ɑ bɑ Yerusɑlem, kí Gibeɑ̀, kí Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm. Kɑ̈ddɑni bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kí myërri gen. Bene piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑnɑn ɑ́ mi gen." 
Joshua19:1 Ryeew pìny ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl Cimeøn. Piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen ɑ́kɑ̈bbi kì ri piny gøl Yeudɑ̀. 
Joshua19:2 Pinyɑni reb-ɑ Bircebɑ̀, kí Cebɑ̀, kí Mölɑdɑ̀" 
Joshua19:3 kí Adhɑr Cuɑɑl, kí Bɑlɑ̀, kí Edhem," 
Joshua19:4 kí Eltölɑd, kí Bethul, kí Órmɑ̀," 
Joshua19:5 kí Dhiglɑg, kí Bet Mɑrkɑböt, kí Adhɑr Susɑ̀," 
Joshua19:6 kí Bet Lebɑöth geki Cɑruen: ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, kí myërri gen." 
Joshua19:7 Tyëng gøl Cimeøn ɑ́nëngi ki kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen møøgø thyew, kí myërri gen, kɑ̈ddɑni bɑ Ain, kí Rimön, kí Ether geki Acɑn." 
Joshua19:8 Piny gøl Cimeøn ɑ́reb-ɑ kɑ̈dd, kí myërr-ɑ wɑ̈dhi kɑɑl Bɑɑlɑth Biir, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Rɑmɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Bene piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Cimeøn ɑnɑn." 
Joshua19:9 Jöcwø tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́mëgge’ piny me dwøng kiper gen, bene ɑ mëgge kwï pinyɑni tyëng gøl Cimeøn." 
Joshua19:10 Dɑ̈ɑ̈g pìny ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl Dhebulun. Piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen cög ɑ Sɑrïd 
Joshua19:11 Cɑg kì kenyɑni, kew gït-ɑ Mɑriel kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, e kɑ̈l-ɑ Dɑbeceth geki nɑm-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì ri Yokneɑm." 
Joshua19:12 O kì tung-ɑ kyeelø kì ri Sɑrïd, kɑ̈l-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì ri keew Kislöt Tɑbör, codhe o kedhe Dɑberɑth pïd Yɑpiyɑ̀." 
Joshua19:13 O pödhe kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti Gɑth Eper geki Ethkɑdhin, e töng-ɑ kuni Neɑ̀ kì dhø yuu Rimön." 
Joshua19:14 Kì wɑɑng wuudø kewɑni töng-ɑ kuni Anɑthön o cöge kì Töör Iptɑel. 
Joshua19:15 Pinyɑni reb-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew geki myërri gen. Kwï kɑ̈ddɑni bɑ Kɑtɑth, kí Nɑɑ̈lɑl, kí Cimrön, kí Idɑlɑ̀ geki Betleem." 
Joshua19:16 Bene kɑ̈dd kí myërr-ɑ ying yij piny gøl Dhebulun ɑnɑn. 
Joshua19:17 Ngween pìny ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl Isɑkɑr 
Joshua19:18 Piny Isɑkɑr reb-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Yidhriil, kí Kesulöth, kí Cunem," 
Joshua19:19 kí Eprɑim, kí Cïön, kí Anɑɑrɑth," 
Joshua19:20 kí Rɑbith, kí Kïcïön, kí Ebedh," 
Joshua19:21 kí Remeth, kí Ein Gɑnïm, kí Ein Adɑ̀ geki Betpɑdhedh." 
Joshua19:22 Kewɑni ónywɑ̈ddø Kïti Tɑbör gïti Nɑm Urdun, e kwɑny-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Cɑɑdhumɑ̀ geki Bet Cemec. Pinyɑni bëne reb-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel ki myërri gen bene piny gøl Isɑkɑr." 
Joshua19:23  
Joshua19:24 Bïïj pìny ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl Aceer. 
Joshua19:25 Keew gøl Aceer kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl e kedh-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Ëlkɑth, kí Älì, kí Beten, kí Akcɑp," 
Joshua19:26 kí kɑ̈ddi Alɑmelek, kí Amɑd, kí Micɑl. Kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kewɑni wɑ̈dh-ɑ Kɑrmel geki Cïör Libnɑ̀." 
Joshua19:27 O kew ree løge wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e kɑ̈l-ɑ Bet Dɑgön, e ónywɑ̈dø kì ri piny gøl Dhebulun geki Töör Iptɑel kì dhø yuu-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì ri Betemek geki Neiel, e pödh-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wuudø gïti Kɑbul," 
Joshua19:28 kí Abrön, kí Reköb, kí Amön geki Kɑnɑ̀ gïti Sïdön." 
Joshua19:29 Codhe, o kewɑni ree løge Rɑmɑ̀ pïd kɑɑl Suur kɑɑl-ɑ thøø yi gerø ki dörø, codhe o tönge Ösɑ̀ pïd Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, e reb-ɑ Mɑɑlɑb kí Akdhïb." 
Joshua19:30 Kí Omɑ̀, kí Ápek, kí Reköb, ge bɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew kí myërri gen. Pinyɑni bëne ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Aceer." 
Joshua19:31  
Joshua19:32 Bïkyeel pìny ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl Nɑptɑlì. 
Joshua19:33 Keew pinyɑni cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Ëlep e gït-ɑ óthuri Dhɑɑnɑnïm e pödh-ɑ Adɑminekeb geki Yɑmniyɑ̀, e wɑ̈dh-ɑ Lɑkum, o thøwe kömi Nɑm Urdun." 
Joshua19:34 Codhe, o kew døøge wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø gïti Adhnöth Tɑbör, e pödh-ɑ Okök, e ónywɑ̈dø kì ri piny gøl Dhebulun kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí piny gøl Aceer kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø geki Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua19:35 Piny Nɑptɑlì reb-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Dhidïm, kí Dher, kí Amɑth, kí Rɑkɑth, kí Kinereth," 
Joshua19:36 kí Adɑmɑ̀, kí Rɑmɑ̀, kí Adhör," 
Joshua19:37 kí Kedec, kí Edrey, kí Ein Adhör," 
Joshua19:38 kí Yirön, kí Migdɑlel, Orem, kí Betɑnɑth, kí Bet Cemec." 
Joshua19:39 Kɑ̈ddɑni kí myërri gen ying-ɑ yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Nɑptɑlì 
Joshua19:40 Bïryeew pìny ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ gøl Dɑn. 
Joshua19:41 Piny gølɑni ɑ́reb-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Dhorɑ̀, kí Ectɑol, kí Ircemec," 
Joshua19:42 kí Cɑɑlbïm, kí Ayɑlön, kí Ithlɑ̀," 
Joshua19:43 kí Elön, kí Timnɑ̀, kí Ekrön," 
Joshua19:44 kí Eltekè, kí Gibethön, kí Bɑɑlɑth," 
Joshua19:45 kí Yeuud, kí Beni Berɑk, kí Gɑthrimön," 
Joshua19:46 kí Mejɑrkön geki Rɑkön, geki myërri Yɑpɑ̀." 
Joshua19:47 Kɑ̈ddɑni bënn kí myërri gen ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø gøl Dɑn. De kì bøli keny megø, ge ɑ́dhɑl yi mïdhi pinyɑni. Codhe, ɑkedhi gøl Dɑn kɑɑl Lɑic, kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ köme, kɑ gø mɑg gen. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying yije nɑ̈g gen, kɑ kɑɑlɑni kwɑny yi gen gøn-ɑ́ mi gen. Codhe, ɑcölli ge gøn nyingi kweyi gen, Dɑn." 
Joshua19:48  
Joshua19:49 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum tyëng Isrɑil ki pɑ̈ngi piny, ɑnëngi gen Jöcwø ki piny men-ɑ bɑ mee," 
Joshua19:50 ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth. Gø ɑ́mëggi gen kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi en, ɑ løg Timnɑ̀ Serɑ̀, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim. Adøøge kɑɑlɑni ki gerø, kɑ pëgg-ɑ yije." 
Joshua19:51 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́ceg-ɑ cugø bënn kì dhø Kemi Kwër, ge ɑ́cugi kì kenyɑni kɑ per kinni, o ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr, geki Jöcwø, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, pɑ̈ngi gen piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun. Piny ɑ́pɑ̈ngi yi gen e leng kɑ wél." 
Joshua20:1 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Joshua20:2 “Köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, yïëëny gen ki kɑ̈ddi yömmø møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ Mosɑ̀ cøn." 
Joshua20:3 O ngɑn-ɑ cinge ógwɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi dhɑnhø nyi yömme yethi kɑ̈ddɑni, o bødhe kì cingi wɑɑd ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwɑ̈ny, men-ɑ ódwɑddi cudø ki gøølø." 
Joshua20:4 Ngɑn-ɑ cinge gwɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi dhɑnhø ócuggø yömmi kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni, kɑ kedh-ɑ burø kì dhø döri kɑɑl, kɑ gønye nyudhe jøgdøngø kì kenyɑni. Codhe o wiy yi gen, o kedhe yij kɑɑl be bëëdø." 
Joshua20:5 Keløg ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi col ki gøølø óløg bɑnge, ko mëggii yi tyëng kɑɑlɑni, mɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø, de gø nuti cɑɑg en kɑ tirø ki nɑ̈gø e bong liny kì kɑɑm gen. Codhe, o yiel yi tyëng kɑɑlɑni." 
Joshua20:6 Ócuggø bëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni gïti keny-ɑ óliidh gønye, kɑ yod yïe bɑ̈r. Kɑ bëëde kì kɑɑlɑni gïti keny-ɑ óthøw Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Codhe, o døøge kɑɑl gen, kun-ɑ ɑ́rïnge cøn.”" 
Joshua20:7 Ayieeny kɑ̈dd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø gɑ Kedec kì myërri Gɑlelì, kì kelli kïtti Nɑptɑlì, kí Cekïm kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim, kí Kibrön kì myërri kelli kïtti Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Joshua20:8 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl bɑ Bedher kì piny Ruben, kí Rɑmöth kì Gilyɑd kì piny Gɑd, kí Gölɑn kì Bɑcɑn kì piny Mɑnɑsè." 
Joshua20:9 Ngeti Isrɑil kí ngɑnpɑth men-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, men-ɑ cinge gwɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi dhɑnhø, ócuggø yieeli ree yethi kɑ̈ddɑni. Óbëëdø kì kunɑni gïti keny-ɑ óliidh gønye, o pɑ cuggi nɑ̈gø yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi col ki gøølø, keløg e óyod kinni dhɑnhø cɑɑg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø kidyër." 
Joshua21:1 Abëën jøgdøngi gøl Leebì yï ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr geki Jöcwø, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil." 
Joshua21:2 Aköbbi ge gïn kì Cilø, kì piny Kɑnɑɑn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Mosɑ̀ ɑ́cege kinni i wø ónëngi yi wun piny men yije bëëd yi wøn, kí keny yije nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi jɑmmi wøn.”" 
Joshua21:3 Kì bɑng Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, ɑnëngi gen yi tyëng Isrɑil ki kɑ̈dd møg bëëd yi gen, geki keny yije nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi jɑmmi gen." 
Joshua21:4 Gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, ɑ løg kwɑrri Aɑron, bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki nëngø kì kelli kwɑrri Leebì. Ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kì piny Yeudɑ̀, kí piny Cimeøn, kí piny Ben Yɑmïn." 
Joshua21:5 Kwï wïj gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́nëngi ki kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø møøgø kì piny Eprɑim, kí piny Dɑn, kí piny Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Joshua21:6 Wïj gøl Gercön ɑ́nëngi ki kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kì piny Isɑkɑr, kí piny Aceer, kí piny Nɑptɑlì, kí piny Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua21:7 Wïj Gøl Merɑrì ɑ́nëngi ki kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì piny Ruben, kí piny Gɑd, kí piny Dhebulun." 
Joshua21:8 Piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Kwɑrri Leebì yi tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́ men bëëd yi gen, kí men yije nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi jɑmmi gen, ɑ́leng kɑ wél, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cøn." 
Joshua21:9 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́muuj kì piny Yeudɑ̀, kí piny Cimeøn bɑ:" 
Joshua21:10 Gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki nëngø kì wïj gøl Aɑron. 
Joshua21:11 Ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑɑl Arbɑ̀. Arbɑ̀ ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Anɑk, ɑ løg Kibrön kì myërri kïtti Yeudiyɑ̀, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi jɑmmi gen kì bɑdhhi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Joshua21:12 De pwödhhi kɑ̈ddɑni geki myërre ɑ́mëgg-ɑ Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ gïn ɑ́ møge. 
Joshua21:13 Kibrön, ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø, ɑ́mëgg-ɑ gøl ókwërø Aɑron, reb kí Libnɑ̀," 
Joshua21:14 kí Yɑtir, kí Ectemoɑ̀," 
Joshua21:15 kí Olön, kí Debir," 
Joshua21:16 kí Ain, kí Yutɑ̀ geki Bet Cemec, kí tör-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi jɑmmi gen kì buti kɑ̈ddɑni bënn. Ge bɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïngwen kì piny Yeudɑ̀ geki piny Cimeøn." 
Joshua21:17 Kì piny Ben Yɑmïn, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Gibeon, kí Gebɑ̀," 
Joshua21:18 kí Anɑthöth geki Almön, kí tör-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi jɑmmi gen." 
Joshua21:19 Kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, kí törri gen ɑ ɑ́mëggi ókwërri gøl Aɑron." 
Joshua21:20 Kwï kɑ̈lli wïj gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, kwɑrri Leebì, kí kwï kwɑrri Leebì møøgø, ge ɑ́nëng ɑ ri kɑ̈ddi piny Eprɑim." 
Joshua21:21 Ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Cekïm kí töre, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim. Cekïm bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø, geki Gedher." 
Joshua21:22 Kí Kibdhɑim geki Bet Örøn, kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:23 Kì piny Dɑn, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Eltekè, kí Gibethön," 
Joshua21:24 kí Ayɑlön geki Gɑthrimön, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:25 Kì piny Mɑnɑsè, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Tɑɑnɑk geki Gɑthrimön, kí töör gen." 
Joshua21:26 Kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø kí törri gen, ɑ ɑ́mëggi kwï gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti nëngø kì kelli kwɑrri Leebì." 
Joshua21:27 Kwɑrri Leebì mø wïj gøl Gercön, ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew kì piny Mɑnɑsè, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ løg Gölɑn kí myërri Bɑcɑn, ɑ bɑ kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø. Kí Beecterɑ̀, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:28 Kì piny Isɑkɑr, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Kicïön, kí Dɑberɑth," 
Joshua21:29 kí Yɑrmuth, kí Ein Gɑnïm, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:30 Kì piny Aceer, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Micɑl, kí Abdön," 
Joshua21:31 kí Ëlkɑth, kí Reköb, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:32 Kì piny Nɑptɑlì, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Kɑdic kì myërri Gɑlelì. Kɑdic bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø, kí Amöth Dör, kí Kɑrtɑn, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:33 Kɑ̈lli wïj gøl Gercön ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:34 Kwï Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́döng, ɑ løg gøl Merɑrì, ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen kì piny Dhebulun, ɑ løg Yökneɑm, kí Kɑrtɑ̀," 
Joshua21:35 kí Dimnɑ̀, kí Nɑɑ̈lɑl, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:36 Kì piny Ruben, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Bedher, kí Yɑɑdh," 
Joshua21:37 kí Kedemöth, kí Mepɑɑth, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:38 Kì piny Gɑd, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ Rɑmöth kì Gilyɑd. Rɑmöth bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø, kí Mɑɑ̈nɑim," 
Joshua21:39 kí Kicbön, kí Yɑdher, kí törri gen." 
Joshua21:40 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wïj gøl Merɑrì bënn, bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew." 
Joshua21:41 Kɑ̈ddi Kwɑrri Leebì bënn kì yij piny Isrɑil, bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, kí törri gen. Kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni bënn, kɑɑl yije dɑ töre men nyi kwɑɑy jɑmmì." 
Joshua21:42  
Joshua21:43 Codhe, ɑmëggi piny Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi gen. Akwɑny gen pinyɑni, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ yije." 
Joshua21:44 Anëngi gen ki mër yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì yij pinyɑni bëne, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe kweyyi gen. Bong pödhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli pödhhi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mɑ ɑ́cungi kì bøli gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́wëggi tyɑmi pödhhɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua21:45 Gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn kinni gï ógögge Isrɑil, ɑ́gwøge ceth." 
Joshua22:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum piny kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ki kwɑnyø yi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑcwøøl gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè mø wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl yi Jöcwø." 
Joshua22:2 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gwøgu gen, ɑ́gwøg yi wun ceth, kɑ cigg-ɑ nyi köbbɑ wun bënn nyi mïdhi yi wun thyew." 
Joshua22:3 Kì kɑɑmɑni bëne nyiimï wun, tyëng Isrɑil nuti pɑ̈nyi wun ki wiy piny, de Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun ɑ́mïdhi yi wun ceth kidøøj." 
Joshua22:4 Ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee, nyiimï wun, tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́nënge ki mër. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, døøg wun piny wun, piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Mosɑ̀ kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua22:5 Kɑ wɑ̈thi wun ko nyi wïl ki møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wun yi Mosɑ̀ kinni, ‘Mɑɑr Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí; nyi mïdhí cigge, kɑ nyi gɑ̈nní ceth, kɑ nyi göggí ki pyëwí bëne geki tegí bëne.’ ”" 
Joshua22:6 Akwëëng gen yi Jöcwø, kɑ gï köbbe kedh gen, ɑkedhi gen myërri gen." 
Joshua22:7 Budi gøl Mɑnɑsè ɑ́nëngi yi Mosɑ̀ ki piny kì Bɑcɑn, de bun-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́nëng-ɑ yi Jöcwø geki nyiimï gen kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun. Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen, kinni kedhi gen piny gen thyew yi Jöcwø, ɑkwënge gïn." 
Joshua22:8 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Wun ɑ døøg myërri wun, wu kɑ̈rø ki mendwøng ɑnɑn, o yï wun dɑ dhög mø gïïr, kí dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí dilɑl, kí ngyënyø dødø, kí ógudh mø gïïr, pɑ̈ngi wun jɑmmɑni, bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑb yi wun kì yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø wuki nyiimï wun.” Akedh gen. Budi gøl Mɑnɑsè ɑ́bëëd e rumø ki nëngø yi Mosɑ̀ ki piny kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, de bun-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́nëng-ɑ yi Jöcwø kì løøg Urdun tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kyeel ki kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø." 
Joshua22:9 Akedh gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè, ge wiy-ɑ kwï tyëng Isrɑil Cilø kì piny Kɑnɑɑn, ge døøg-ɑ myërri gen kì piny Gilyɑd, kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti thøw Mosɑ̀, gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o piny men kwɑny yi wun ɑ́ mi wun.”" 
Joshua22:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè buti Nɑm Urdun, kì yij piny Kɑnɑɑn, ge nudd ge ying-ɑ løøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ɑgëëd gen ki këli lɑm me dwøng." 
Joshua22:11 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø olïngø kinni, i gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè, gëdø ki këli lɑm kì kömi Nɑm Urdun kì løøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Joshua22:12 Kɑ kɑ̈lli wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ócugø bënn kì Cilø, kipe kedhi be liny ki kɑ̈lli wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Joshua22:13 Aöd kɑ̈lli wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ki ji møg kedhi yi gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè kì piny Gilyɑd. Ge ɑ́ör kɑ Pineɑs, wɑ̈d ókwërø Eliɑdhɑr, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen. Jɑggɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø, ge bɑ ji mø ceg ki wørø yi kɑ̈lli gen." 
Joshua22:14  
Joshua22:15 Abëën gen Gilyɑd, yï gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè." 
Joshua22:16 Akööb gen kinni ge kööbø gɑ kej dhøggi jii Jwøk bënn, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggu Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ rɑɑj èn? Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi wun, kɑ ɑ́gëddi wun ri wun ki këli lɑm! Wu pɑ nudd wu ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑnge." 
Joshua22:17 Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø ki orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ kì Peor, ɑ bɑnge ɑ́cɑy Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ki yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g? Wɑ nuti cɑɑg-ɑ orɑng kì bɑnge, menɑni ceg-ɑ nøg?" 
Joshua22:18 Wu ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki cyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng? Keløg Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j opyemø yi wun, pyëwe órënyi ki tyëng Isrɑil bënn dhuki." 
Joshua22:19 Keløg piny wun ywëdhø, o yije pɑ cuggi kwɑjji Jwøk, bïu piny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, piny-ɑ yije cungi yi keme, kɑ wu kɑ̈bbi wun ki piny kì kelli wøn. De pɑth ki kinni o wu pyemu Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu gëëd wun ki këli jwøg megø kì kömi këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee." 
Joshua22:20 Pɑth ki Akɑn wɑ̈d Dherɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kyer, ɑ bɑnge ɑ́cɑɑy ji bënn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki thøø ki göje?”" 
Joshua22:21 Kɑ mø pëjji tyëng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø løøg yi gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè kinni," 
Joshua22:22 “Jwøng-ɑ teg bene Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Ngɑ̈nyi yi en eni gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́göög wøn kinøw, o wø dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o wu ngɑ̈nyu wøw thyew. Keløg wø pyem-ɑ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wø nɑ̈g wun." 
Joshua22:23 Keløg wø pyem-ɑ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wø ogëdø ki këli lɑm men nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b wøn ki gëdhhì. Wiy wø cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree." 
Joshua22:24 Menɑni ɑ́gwøg yi wøn kɑ per kinni, dhuki megø keløg kwɑrri wun, kwɑrri wøn óbødh yi gen kinni, ‘Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïe bɑ̈r ki wun." 
Joshua22:25 Nɑm Urdun ɑ́cïbe kɑɑmee ɑ́ kew, kej wun bong gøn kì piny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’ Kɑ kwɑrri wun, kwɑrri wøn mɑ̈ɑ̈n yi gen mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joshua22:26 Këlɑni nuti geer wøn ɑ́ men wïje nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b yi wøn ki gëdhhì. 
Joshua22:27 De ɑ́ger yi wøn ɑ́ men nyudhi jii wun kí jii wøn kì yethi rïjj-ɑ óbï, kinni wɑ nyi mɑll-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli keme, Kemi Kwër kí gëdhhì møgee bënn. Kipe kwɑrri wøn, óköbbi yi kwɑrri wun kinni, ‘Wu pɑth ki jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’" 
Joshua22:28 Këlɑni ɑ́ger yi wøn kɑ per kinni, keløg e ódi kwøb mø ni møgɑni, o kwɑrri wøn ókööb gen kinni, ‘Lidhu kweyyi wøn ɑ́gëëd ki këli lɑm me ni mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pɑth ki men wïje rɑ̈ɑ̈b ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne wɑlɑ̀ gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø, de ɑ́ger ɑ́ ngïji kipe jii wøn geki jii wun.’" 
Joshua22:29 Wø pɑ cuggi pyemi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni tek, kɑ wø ogëdø ki këli lɑm megø, men nyi nëngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì, kì kömi këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ying bøli keme.”" 
Joshua22:30 Ókwërø Pineɑs geki pëjji wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi jø wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl ɑ́lïngi yi gen, kɑ pëthi gen ókwöjø yi lwömɑni." 
Joshua22:31 Aköbbi gen yi ókwërø Pineɑs wɑ̈d Eliɑdhɑr kinni, “Áyod yi wɑ ɑnɑn kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie mïdhe’ mïdhø. Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti pyeem wun, o tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́yiel yi wun ki gwøng ni menɑni, o ge cög ge pɑ cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua22:32 Kɑ Pineɑs odøøgø geki jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, ge kedh-ɑ be dwöggi møgɑni tyëng Isrɑil, kì piny Kɑnɑɑn. Kɑ gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd wiy gen kì Gilyɑd." 
Joshua22:33 Ayïëy tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ Jwøk pwøj yi gen. Kɑ kwøbbi kedhi be nyɑɑg ki gøl Ruben geki gøl Gɑd wiy yi gen." 
Joshua22:34 Akööb gøl Ruben geki gøl Gɑd kinni, “Këli lɑm menɑni bëëde ɑ́ nyuudhi kiperee wɑ bënn kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j en ɑ bɑ Jwøk.” Codhe, kɑ gø cɑg gøn ɑ́ “Nyuudhi.”" 
Joshua23:1 Kɑ Isrɑil ywöm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki liny geki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ bɑdhhi gen, e piny kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun. Kì bøli kenyɑni Jöcwø rum døngø ki mendwøng." 
Joshua23:2 Kɑ Isrɑil cwøl bëne yi Jöcwø, ɑ løg jøgdøngø, kí jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí jɑggi burø, kí pëjji liny, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Anɑn yɑ ɑ́døngi ki mendwøng," 
Joshua23:3 o gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi tyëng-ɑ buti wun bënn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun, ge ɑ́lidh yi wun, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kiper wun." 
Joshua23:4 Piny tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nudd ge obëëdø ɑ́mëggɑ wun ɑ́ mi wun, ni pìnyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́pyejjɑ wun, cɑg kì kömi Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Joshua23:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee ɑ́köngi kinni, ‘Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ówëggɑ rengø kì bøli wun, ge ówëggɑ rengø keny-ɑ ókedh wu obëënø wu kedh-ɑ piny gen, o kwɑny yi wun.’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee köngɑni ómïdhi yi en. Tyëng-ɑ nudd ge obëëdø ócyedde." 
Joshua23:6 Nyi mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀, kɑ ge nyi gwøg wun ceth, e bong kwï gen møg wiy yi wun, ge pɑ gwøg yi wun," 
Joshua23:7 jwöggi gen ko nyi mɑlli wun, wu ko nyi kwɑ̈jji ki nyingi gen, kɑ wu ko nyi köngi ki nyingi gen." 
Joshua23:8 Ni kɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cøn, nyi ngɑ̈dhu en ceth." 
Joshua23:9 Pödhh-ɑ døngø, o ge teg ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli wun, kɑ bong ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cuggi cung kì bøli wun." 
Joshua23:10 Dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun, ji ɑ́lïp nyii cuggø cyeddø yi en, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kiperee ni kɑ ɑ́könge cøn." 
Joshua23:11 Kɑ̀ bëëde kinøw, wɑ̈thi wun ko nyi wïl ki mɑɑri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun kinni tek." 
Joshua23:12 Keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ówiy piny yi wun, kɑ wu órëbø ki kwï tyëng pönhɑni møg-ɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli wun, kɑ ri wun nywøm wun ki gen," 
Joshua23:13 kɑ wu ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, ge pɑ cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti, ge óbëëdø gɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli kì cwɑggi wun, ge óni dël-ɑ nyi pööd kì kömi wun, wɑlɑ̀ ge óni koodh kì nyingi wun, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun, men-ɑ ódöng kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee." 
Joshua23:14 “Anɑn bøli kej thøwɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun bënn kidøøj kinni, gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́köngi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee ɑ́gögge wun ceth. Köng-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi en bënn, ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen, bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji." 
Joshua23:15 De nɑ kɑ ɑ́mïdhe møg-ɑ ɑ́kwönge bënn, óbëëdø kinøw ceth ki köng-ɑ rijjø." 
Joshua23:16 Keløg lwöm-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee pɑ mïdhi yi wun, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, pyëwe órënyi ki wun, kɑ wu cɑye, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wun men-ɑ ódöng kì yij piny-ɑ døj men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wun.”" 
Joshua24:1 Acwööl wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn Cekïm yi Jöcwø, keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen, ɑcwøle jøgdøngø, kí jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí jɑggi burø geki pëjji liny kinni bï gen, o ge cungi gen kì bøli Jwøk." 
Joshua24:2 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Møg bene møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil èn, kinni, ‘Kɑ̈ge dööng, kweyyi wun ɑ́bëëd ɑ løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o ge ɑ́mɑll-ɑ jwögg mø pɑth. Ákyel kì kelli kweyyi wun bɑ Terɑ̀, wïyi Abrɑhɑm geki Nɑor." 
Joshua24:3 Kɑ kweyi wun Abrɑhɑm kwɑnyɑ kì piny-ɑ løøg Nɑm Porɑt, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ en yij piny Kɑnɑɑn. Amëggɑ en wɑ̈de Isɑɑk, kɑ nëngɑ ki kwɑrre mø ngenyø kì ri wɑ̈de Isɑɑk." 
Joshua24:4 Kɑ Isɑɑk nëngɑ ki wɑ̈dde ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Yɑgob geki Isøø. Isøø ɑ́mëggɑ myërri kïtti Edöm gïn-ɑ́ møge, de kweyi wun Yɑgob ɑ́kedh-ɑ Rïp geki nyige." 
Joshua24:5 Kì bøli keny megø, ɑörɑ Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yï kweyyi wun kì Rïp. Akɑ̈nɑ kömi Rïp ki rɑj mø døngø, de kweyyi wun ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Joshua24:6 Kɑ tyëng Rïp reng-ɑ bɑng gen, ki yɑ̈thi liny geki kyënyi liny, keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø," 
Joshua24:7 ɑywøøg gen yïɑ kinni o ge kønyɑ, ɑcïbɑ kelli gen geki tyëng Rïp ki muudhø. Awëggɑ pïi Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø døøg kömi tyëng Rïp, ɑmud gen. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ Rïp ɑ́lidh yi wun ki nyingi wun. “ ‘Kɑ wu obëëdø kì yij pɑ̈l ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Joshua24:8 Akɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun piny tyëng Amör, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Anyïɑ̈ggi gen ki wun, de ge ɑ́wëggɑ tyɑmø yi wun, ge ɑ́rënyɑ kiper wun, ɑkwɑny wun piny gen ɑ́ mi wun." 
Joshua24:9 Kɑ Bɑlɑk wɑ̈d Dhipor, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb ónyïɑ̈ggø ki wun. Aöde yï Bɑlɑɑm kinni o wu di lɑ̈mme cyën." 
Joshua24:10 De nuti wiy yɑn o kömi wun kïdhe ki cyën, de ɑ́yöd e wëggɑ’ gyëdhi wun, ɑbødh wun kì cingi Bɑlɑk." 
Joshua24:11 Abɑ̈ɑ̈n wun Nɑm Urdun, wu kedh-ɑ Yerikö. Anyïɑ̈ggi wun ki jø Yerikö, kí jø Amör, kí jø Perïdh, kí jø Kɑnɑɑn, kí jø Kit, kí jø Girgɑc, kí jø Kib, kí jø Yebus. De ge ɑ́wëggɑ tyɑmø yi wun ge bënn." 
Joshua24:12 Ge ɑ́göjjɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ rɑ̈nhi Amör ryeet cyeddi yi wun. Menɑni pɑth ki tegi wun, wɑlɑ̀ tegi jɑmmi liny mø wun." 
Joshua24:13 Wu ɑ́mëggɑ piny me nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ yi wun, kí kɑ̈dd mø nuti ger-ɑ yi wun. Anɑn wu bëëd ɑ kenyɑni wu ocyɑ̈mø ki nywøli ólɑm geki dhetun møg nuti pidh-ɑ yi wun.’" 
Joshua24:14 Akööb Jöcwø kinni, “Böggi wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi göggu en ki pyëw ɑ́kyel. Wiyu jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑlli yi kweyyi wun ki Misøpøtɑmiyɑ̀ geki Rïp, kɑ wu mɑllu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete." 
Joshua24:15 Keløg wu pɑ dwɑddi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ̈bbi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn ki jwøng-ɑ ómɑlli yi wun, ying gɑ jwögg-ɑ ɑ́mɑlli yi kweyyi wun, wɑlɑ̀ jwöggi Amör, ɑ piny gen bëëd yi wun. De keløg ɑ́ perɑ wøki gølɑ, wø ómɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Joshua24:16 Alöggi ji kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ wiy wøn piny kinni tek, o wø pɑ kedhi be mɑlli jwögg møøgø." 
Joshua24:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wøn bɑ en ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kweyyi wøn wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kì Rïp, gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en kiper gen, ɑ́lïngi yi wøn. Wø ɑ́kor yi en kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi wøn bënn, kì kelli jurr-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli yi wøn." 
Joshua24:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wɑ yij piny men, piny tyëng Amör, ge ɑ́cyeed wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiperee. Kì bɑng menɑni, bene Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ómɑlli yi wɑ kete, mɑ́ bene Jwøgee.”" 
Joshua24:19 Aköbbi ji yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wu pɑ cuggi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e bɑ kwërø, o pëddi tyiel, o pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki orøøg wun geki kerri orøøg wun." 
Joshua24:20 Keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ówiy yi wun, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, ree óluge wun kɑ wu cɑye. Wu órënye, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëde wu nyi gögge’ göggø ki gïgdøj cøn.”" 
Joshua24:21 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi ji kinni, “Pɑth, bene Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ómɑlli yi wøn.”" 
Joshua24:22 Aköbbi gen yi Jöcwø kinni, “Wu ómɑg yi lebbi wun, mɑ́ wu ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Ayïëy gen kinni, “Awøø, wiy wø ómɑg yi lebbi wøn ceth.”" 
Joshua24:23 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Døj, weddi wun ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ yï wun, kɑ pëthi wun cïb wun ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil.”" 
Joshua24:24 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi teedø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, en ɑ ómɑlli yi wøn. Cigge ómïdhi yi wøn.”" 
Joshua24:25 Kɑ lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi gen kì Cekïm dicyɑ̈ngɑni, cïb yi Jöcwø ɑ́ kwöng." 
Joshua24:26 Agweed kwøbbɑni yij wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøk yi Jöcwø. Kɑ Jöcwø ókɑ̈bbø ki tungi kït me dwøng, kɑ gø cïbe thɑ óthur-ɑ buti kej kwër." 
Joshua24:27 Aköbbi ji bënn yi Jöcwø kinni, “Tungi kït men, bene nyuudhi miee; kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi wɑ bënn ɑ́lïngi yi en. Wiy bëëde ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe kinni, o wu ócög wun Ciggi Jwøk pɑ pyem yi wun.”" 
Joshua24:28 Aköbbi ji yi Jöcwø kinni kedh gen, ɑdøøg gen myërri gen bënn." 
Joshua24:29 Kɑ Jöcwø bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, othøø e runne bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈rø." 
Joshua24:30 Kɑ kony yi tyëng Isrɑil, kì pinye kì Timnɑ̀ Serɑ̀, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim, ɑ rwöm ki Kïti Gɑɑc kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Joshua24:31 Isrɑil ɑ́mɑll-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Jöcwø geki pëjj-ɑ ɑ́döng ge obëëdø kì bɑnge, bene gen tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lidh gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn." 
Joshua24:32 Cu Yosep, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen yi tyëng Isrɑil kì Rïp, ge ɑ́koony-ɑ Cekïm, kì yij bɑng-ɑ ɑ́ngew yi Yɑgob kì yï kwɑrri Amör, wïyi Cekïm, ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg miyø. Pinyɑni bɑ mi kwɑrri Yosep." 
Joshua24:33 Kɑ Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d Aɑron othøø, ɑkonyii kì Gibeɑ̀, kɑɑl Pineɑs wɑ̈de, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́mëggii kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim." 
Judges1:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Jöcwø ki thøø, ɑpyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Á tyëng gøl men ɑ ókwöngi ki kedhi be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn?”" 
Judges1:2 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ ókwöngi ki kedhø. Piny cïbɑ’ cinggi gen.”" 
Judges1:3 Aköbbi gøl Cimeøn yi nyiiwï gen, gøl Yeudɑ̀ kinni, “Bïu, kedhi wɑ piny men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn, o wɑ nyïɑ̈ggi wɑ ki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn. O wø ókedh wøn thyew ki wun keny-ɑ ókedhu be nyɑɑg kipe piny men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun.” Codhe, ɑkedh gøl Cimeøn," 
Judges1:4 geki gøl Yeudɑ̀. Ge ɑ́kedh kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki liny kyeel. Athödhi gen ki tegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tyëng Kɑnɑɑn geki tyëng Perïdh tyɑm yi gen. Ge ɑ́tyɑm kì Bedhek e kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø." 
Judges1:5 Ayod gen Adönibedhek kì Bedhek, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki gøn." 
Judges1:6 Arengi Adönibedhek, kɑ ge reng-ɑ bɑnge, ɑmɑgii yi gen, ɑngøl lwedd-ɑ døngø kì cingge geki tyelle." 
Judges1:7 Akööb Adönibedhek kinni, “Rɑ̈nhì pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew mø lwedd-ɑ døngø kì cinggi gen geki tyelli gen bɑ ɑngøl, ɑ́bëëd ge nyii gwënø ki thullì kì thɑ tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ kì tɑwɑ. De ɑnɑn Jwøk yɑ ɑ́gögge gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ gen.” Akïdhii Yerusɑlem kɑ othøø kì kunɑni." 
Judges1:8 Jø gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Yerusɑlem, kɑ mɑg gen. Anɑ̈g gen jie, kɑ kɑɑlɑni rɑ̈b yi gen." 
Judges1:9 Codhe, ɑkedhi gen be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí myërri thɑ́ kïttì, kí tyëng yij ryɑng kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Judges1:10 Apödhi gen be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl Kibrön men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nyi cwøl ɑ́ Kiriɑt Arbɑ̀. Atyɑɑm Cecɑy, kí Akimɑn, kí Tɑlmɑy yi gøl Yeudɑ̀." 
Judges1:11 Kɑ ge pödh-ɑ be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Debir, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde cwøl ɑ́ Kiriɑt Seper." 
Judges1:12 Akööb Kɑlib kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki Kiriɑt Seper kɑ gø mɑge, ómëggɑ nyɑrɑ Aksɑ̀ ɑ́ dhɑjø.”" 
Judges1:13 Kɑ kɑɑlɑni mɑg yi Othniel wɑ̈d Kenɑdh. Kenɑdh bɑ ómï Kɑlib nyel-ɑ thinh. Codhe, kɑ Kɑlib nyɑre Aksɑ̀ mëgge Othniel." 
Judges1:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ggi Aksɑ̀ yï Othniel. Kɑ Aksɑ̀ pɑng yi Othniel kinni, i cwödde ki pwödhø kì yï wïye. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yïnhi Aksɑ̀ piny kì kömi ɑdere, ɑpyëjii yi wïye kinni, “Á gïn ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn?”" 
Judges1:15 Alögge kinni, “Nëngí yɑn ki keny me di nyingi pï, mɑ́ piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí yɑn kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl yije bong pï.” Codhe, ɑmëggii nyingi pï møg-ɑ wïj kwøømø, kí møg-ɑ yij tör yi Kɑlib." 
Judges1:16 Ørri Mosɑ̀, kwɑrri Ken, geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́kedh kì Yerikö, kɑɑl benø, ge kedh-ɑ yij ryɑng kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ yij ryɑng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Arɑd. Ge ɑ́pëggi kelli tyëng Amɑlek." 
Judges1:17 Kɑ gøl Yeudɑ̀ geki nyiiwï gen, gøl Cimeøn kedh-ɑ yï tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl Dhepɑth, kɑ gï tyɑm gen, kɑ kɑɑlɑni rënyi gen. Codhe, kɑ kɑɑlɑni cɑg yi gen ɑ́ Órmɑ̀." 
Judges1:18 De kɑ̈ddi Gɑdhɑ̀, kí Ackelön, kí Ekrön, kí myërri gen nuti mɑɑg gen." 
Judges1:19 Akøny gøl Yeudɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ myërr-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì mɑg yi gen, de tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij tör ɑ́dhɑ̈li cyeed wɑ̈g yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd yï gen dɑ yɑ̈thi liny mɑ ngyënyø dødø." 
Judges1:20 Amëggi Kibrön Kɑlib ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Mosɑ̀. Acyeed kwɑrri Anɑk wɑ̈g gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì ɑ́dɑ̈g yi Kɑlib. 
Judges1:21 De tyëng Yebus, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem nuti cyeed wɑ̈g yi gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ge ɑ́döng ge obëëdø ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Judges1:22 Apɑ̈ɑ̈r gøl Eprɑim geki gøl Mɑnɑsè kömi Betiil, kɑ ge køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges1:23 Kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd e cwøl ɑ́ Ludh kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ oödø ki lyëwwì." 
Judges1:24 Aliidh jɑl megø yi lyëwwɑni e bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Nyudhí wøn yuu-ɑ kedhi kɑɑl, o yï ógöggi yi wøn ki gïndøj.”" 
Judges1:25 Codhe, ɑnyudhe gïn yöö, kɑ ji bënn kì kɑɑlɑni nɑ̈g yi gøl Eprɑim geki gøl Mɑnɑsè, kɑ jɑlɑni geki gøl gen bëne ör wɑ̈g yi gen kinni kedh gen." 
Judges1:26 Akedhi jɑlɑni pödhi tyëng Kit, ɑgëëde ki kɑɑl kì kunɑni, kɑ nyingi kɑɑlɑni cɑge ɑ́ Ludh, nyingɑni ɑ cöllii gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Judges1:27 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑ̈ddi Betcɑn, kí Tɑɑnɑk, kí Dör, kí Ibleɑm, kí Megidø, kí tyëng myërr-ɑ buti gen nuti cyeed wɑ̈g yi gøl Mɑnɑsè, tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́cög ge obëëdø kì kunɑni." 
Judges1:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yïddi tyëng Isrɑil ki tegø, ɑcir gen tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ gï løg gen møg göggi gen, de gï nuti cyeed gen wɑ̈g." 
Judges1:29 Tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Gedher nuti cyeed wɑ̈g yi gøl Eprɑim, de tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́cög ge obëëdø ki gen kì kunɑni." 
Judges1:30 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑ̈ddi Kitrön geki Nɑɑ̈lɑl nuti cyeed wɑ̈g yi gøl Dhebulun, de tyëng Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́cög ge obëëdø kì kunɑni ki gen, kɑ gï løg gen møg göggi gen." 
Judges1:31 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑ̈ddi Ákö, kí Sïdön, kí Alɑb, kí Akdhïb, kí Kelbɑ̀, kí Ápek, kí Reköb nuti cyeed wɑ̈g yi gøl Aceer." 
Judges1:32 Tyëng gøl Aceer ɑ́bëëd kì kej ɑ́kyel ki tyëng Kɑnɑɑn møg-ɑ pönhɑni, gï nuti cyeed gen wɑ̈g." 
Judges1:33 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddi Bet Cemec geki Betɑnɑth, nuti cyeddø yi gøl Nɑptɑlì, gøl Nɑptɑlì ɑ́bëëd kì kelli tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kɑ gï løg gen møg göggi gen." 
Judges1:34 Gøl Dɑn ɑ́cyeed myërr-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì yi tyëng Amör, ge nuti wiyø yi gen o ge dwöög gen thɑ́ kïttì piny këti." 
Judges1:35 Tyëng Amör ɑ́cög ge obëëdø kì Ayɑlön, kí Cɑɑlbïm kì wïj Kïti Ëres, de ge ɑ́jɑɑg yi gøl Eprɑim geki tyëng gøl Mɑnɑsè, kɑ gï løg gen møg göggi gen." 
Judges1:36 Cɑ̈gi dhøg piny tyëng Amör ying-ɑ keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Ókømi Akrɑbïm kì Selɑ̀, e pödh-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø." 
Judges2:1 Wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́dhwödh kì Gilgɑl, kɑ kedh-ɑ Bokïm, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbe kinni, “Yɑn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun pönh-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ kweyyi wun. Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi wɑ pɑ pɑ̈d yi yɑn gïti ɑtheer." 
Judges2:2 Kɑ ko di lwöbø men-ɑ ónywɑg yi wun ki tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pönhɑni. Kɑ këlli lɑmmi jwöggi gen toor wun piny.’ De kwøbbɑ nuti lïngø yi wun, wu ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ngø?" 
Judges2:3 De ɑnɑn wun ɑ köbbi yi yɑn èn kinni, tyëngɑni pɑ cyeddi yi yɑn kì bøli wun keny-ɑ ókedhu yï gen. Ge óbëëdø gɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki wun, kɑ jwöggi gen ogöögø ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì kì cwɑggi wun.”" 
Judges2:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøøb møgɑni yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ócɑ̈gø ki ywøg bënn," 
Judges2:5 bene ɑ cwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Bokïm. Angɑ̈ddi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì. 
Judges2:6 Aör tyëng Isrɑil yi Jöcwø kinni kedh gen, kɑ ngɑn kedhe be kwɑnyi pinye." 
Judges2:7 Tyëng Isrɑil Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́mɑlli gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Jöcwø nuti thøø, kí bɑng thøwe thyew, keny-ɑ́ nuti thøw jøgdøngi Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́mɑlli yi gen." 
Judges2:8 Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́thøw e runne bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈rø." 
Judges2:9 Akoonyii pinye kì Timnɑ̀ Serɑ̀ kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim kì Gɑɑc kì wɑɑng wuudø. 
Judges2:10 Kɑ rïj menɑni bëne othøø thyew, kɑ rïj megø obëënø kì bɑng gen, me kwïj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kipe Isrɑil." 
Judges2:11 Agöög tyëng Isrɑil ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli ngïjji jwøng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Bɑɑl." 
Judges2:12 Ge ɑ́wïyi ki mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen, Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, de ge ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki mɑlli jwögg møøgø, jwöggi tyëng-ɑ ying buti gen, kɑ ri gen nyi bøødh gen piny kì bøli jwöggɑni, kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j órënyø ki gen." 
Judges2:13 Ge ɑ́wïyi ki mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de ge mɑll-ɑ ngïji Bɑɑl geki ngïji jwøng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Actɑröth." 
Judges2:14 Arënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menteg ki Isrɑil, kɑ Isrɑil wiye o köme nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑ̈nyø, ɑkɑɑb jɑmmi gen yi tyëngɑni. Kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn møg-ɑ buti gen thödhe ki tegø, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ódhɑ̈lø yieli ri gen kì cinggi tyëngɑni." 
Judges2:15 Kenyi kedhi gen be nyïɑ̈ggø ki liny, ge nyii cɑyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bɑng rɑ̈ji gen, ni kɑ ɑ́könge ceth. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen omuumø ki mendwøng." 
Judges2:16 Codhe, ɑnëngi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jɑgg møg yielii kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑnyii." 
Judges2:17 De tyëng Isrɑil kwøbbi jɑggi gen nuti lïngø yi gen thyew. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wiy piny yi Isrɑil ni ngɑn wiy gøle piny. Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd ge omïdhø yi wëëg gen, de rïj men-ɑ nyɑ̈n ɑ́jwɑn wïyø ki mïdhi møgɑni." 
Judges2:18 Kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi nëngi Isrɑil ki jɑgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jɑngɑni nyii kønyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil nyi yiele kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëde e onëënø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gen, kenyi ywöngi gen kì yij orɑng men-ɑ guud nyingi gen." 
Judges2:19 De kenyi thøw jɑngɑni, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil nyii døøgø ki gwøg ki gïnrɑj men-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng, me lod men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi rïny-ɑ ɑ́ying bøli gen, ge nyi kedh-ɑ bɑng jwögg møøgø, kɑ gï mɑlli gen, kɑ ge nyii bɑ̈nyø ki wiyi gwøg ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen kɑ̈ge dööng yi tegi muddi gen." 
Judges2:20 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe nyii rënyø ki Isrɑil, kɑ nyii kööbø kinni, “Pönhï, lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi yɑn wøki kweyyi gen ɑ́pɑ̈d yi gen, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen ki lïngø." 
Judges2:21 Pödhh-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti mɑgø kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́thøw Jöcwø, pɑ cyeedɑ wɑ̈g kì bøli gen." 
Judges2:22 Isrɑil órɑng yi yɑn, kɑ tyëngɑni, o lidh yi yɑn mɑ mïdhi gen kwøbbɑ ni kɑ ɑ́mïdhi gen yi kweyyi gen, wɑlɑ̀ koo mïdhi yi gen.”" 
Judges2:23 Awiy tyëngɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ge obëëdø kì pinyɑni, ge nuti wëg en tyɑmø yi Jöcwø, wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti jwɑɑn en ki cyeed wɑ̈g kì pönhɑni, keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Jöcwø ki thøø." 
Judges3:1 Codhe, ɑwiy kwï jurrì møøgø ge obëëdø kì pönhɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kipe kinni o jurrɑni gï rɑɑnge tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi nyɑɑg ki liny kì Kɑnɑɑn." 
Judges3:2 Gïnɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en yøw kipe rïjji Isrɑil bënn, e pwöny-ɑ gen ki liny, de ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ pwönyi rïjj-ɑ nuti nyïɑ̈ggø ki liny cøn." 
Judges3:3 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng ge obëëdø ki pönhɑni bɑ tyëng kɑ̈ddi Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bïj kí tyëng Kɑnɑɑn bënn, kí tyëng Sïdön, kí tyëng Kib møg-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Lubnɑn, cɑ̈gi kì Kïti Bɑɑl Kermön gïti dhø döri Amɑth." 
Judges3:4 Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ møg rɑɑng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ mïdhi gen cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge kweyyi gen kì ri Mosɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ gï pɑ mïdhi yi gen." 
Judges3:5 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil obëëdø kì kelli tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Perïdh, kí tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Yebus." 
Judges3:6 Anywøm gen ri gen ki tyëngɑni, kɑ jwöggi tyëngɑni nyi mɑlli yi gen." 
Judges3:7 Tyëng Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen ɑ́wïl kì wɑ̈thi gen, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Bɑɑl geki Aceerɑ̀ jwögg-ɑ pɑth mɑlli gen." 
Judges3:8 Codhe, ɑrënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menteg ki Isrɑil, kɑ gï cïbe cingi Kucɑn Ricɑthɑim, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Misøpøtɑmiyɑ̀, ɑjɑɑg gen yi rɑ̈nhɑni ki runn ɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
Judges3:9 Aywøøg tyëng Isrɑil kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yiel gen. Jɑlɑni bɑ Othniel wɑ̈d Kenɑdh ómï Kɑlib nyel-ɑ thinh." 
Judges3:10 Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bï ri Othniel ɑgööge ɑ́ jɑngi Isrɑil. Akedhe be nyɑɑg ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Misøpøtɑmiyɑ̀, kɑ thödhi ki tegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ rɑ̈nhɑni tyɑm yi en." 
Judges3:11 Abëëd pödhø ki mër ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Codhe ɑthøw Othniel. 
Judges3:12 Adøøg tyëng Isrɑil be gwøg ki gïgrijjø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Eglön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb wëgge tëngø kibøli tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges3:13 Arëbi Eglön ki tyëng Amɑlek, kí tyëng Amön, kɑ Isrɑil tyɑm yi gen, ɑmɑɑg Yerikö, ɑ løg kɑɑl benø yi gen." 
Judges3:14 Ajɑɑg tyëng Isrɑil yi Eglön ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Judges3:15 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Eud wɑ̈d Gerɑ̀, jɑl mɑ cɑɑm kì wïj gøl Ben Yɑmïn ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be yieli gen. Eud ɑ́ör yï Eglön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈le jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Eglön yi gen." 
Judges3:16 Eud thɑ̈dhø ki pilø me bɑ̈re bɑ gïn ni sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, me bedh kì tùnge bënn, ying-ɑ yij bøje gø twööj en rɑ̈me kì tuung kyëj kì thɑ ógødhe." 
Judges3:17 Codhe, ɑmëgge jɑmmɑni Eglön. Eglön bɑ jɑl me cwiy ki mendwøng." 
Judges3:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jɑmmì ki mëggii yi Eud, ɑköbbe jøg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli jɑmmì kinni, døøg gen pɑc." 
Judges3:19 De Eud ɑ́dwöög kì buti ngïjjì, kì buti Gilgɑl, ɑköbbe Eglön kinni, “Wuö, yïɑ dɑ wöödø me dwɑddɑ köbbi yïn kì wɑ̈yí.” Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh jøge köbbe kinni, “Kedh wun, wiy wø döng wøn keti wøn!” Kɑ jøgɑni kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g bënn." 
Judges3:20 Abëën Eud yï rɑ̈dh, e obëëdø kì wɑ̈ye kì øde, øn-ɑ mɑl, øn-ɑ ngij. Akööbe kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ wöödø me muujɑ yïn, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk.” Adhwödhi rɑ̈dh mɑl." 
Judges3:21 Kɑ Eud pile wöödhe wɑ̈g ki cingi cɑɑme kì ópɑɑb kyëje, kɑ rɑ̈dh cwøbe kì yije." 
Judges3:22 Apödhi pilø yije ki böle, kɑ cïnne røy-ɑ piny. Pilø nuti puth wɑ̈g yi Eud, mɑ́ e cödhø bëne yi dwɑ̈lø." 
Judges3:23 Akedhi Eud wɑ̈g kɑ dhøggi ud bënn dijje köme. 
Judges3:24 Codhe ɑkedhe. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën jøg-ɑ bɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh, ɑlidh gen dhøggi ud gɑ ɑcyëg bënn, de ge ɑ́rum kinni i rɑ̈dh mɑɑg-ɑ ree piny." 
Judges3:25 Ayïd gen kɑ ge opïdø yi yïd, de keny-ɑ ɑ́cwönge e ød nuti yieeb en, ɑkwɑny gen muptɑɑ̀, kɑ dhø ød tug gen. Kɑ wïi gen yood gen e obuddø kì piny e thøø." 
Judges3:26 Eud, kedhø kì wɑ̈ye kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yïd gen. Kedhø e ójwɑnø kì gøddi kïtt-ɑ ótwegø, kɑ kedh-ɑ Seir." 
Judges3:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe myërri kïtti Eprɑim, ɑkodhe tung e cwøl-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil kipe nyɑɑg, ɑpeeje gïn piny thɑ́ kïttì." 
Judges3:28 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Bïu bɑngɑ! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu ɑ́thödhe ki tegø men tyɑm wun tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun, tyëng Moɑb.” Akedhi gen bɑng Eud, kɑ dhøwɑdh men-ɑ di kɑ̈nhi yi tyëng Moɑb wɑ̈g kì Nɑm Urdun mɑg yi gen, bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen o kɑdhe wɑ̈g." 
Judges3:29 Isrɑil ɑ́nɑ̈gi ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø, gɑ jøliny mø teg." 
Judges3:30 Kɑ tyëng Moɑb tyɑm dicyɑ̈ngɑni yi Isrɑil. Kɑ pödhø obëëdø ki mër ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Judges3:31 Bɑng Eud, ɑ ɑ́bëën yi Cɑmgɑr wɑ̈d Anɑth. Isrɑil ɑ́yiel yi en thyew, kɑ ónɑ̈gø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel, ki lodh kïrø men-ɑ nyi kwølle wɑdhe, wɑɑdh pur." 
Judges4:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Eud ki thøø, ɑgöög tyëng Isrɑil ki gïgrijjø këti kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges4:2 Codhe, ɑwëggi gen tyɑmø yi Yɑbïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kɑnɑɑn, ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì kɑɑl Adhör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Pënyi linye ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Siserɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Kɑröceth Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Judges4:3 Yɑbïn ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ yɑ̈thi liny miy ɑ́bïngwen, mø bɑ ngyënyø dødø, kí jøliny mø ngenyø. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil jɑɑge ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kɑ nyingi gïn guude. Codhe, ɑywøøg tyëng Isrɑil kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges4:4 Kì bøli kenyɑni, ngetitöng, Debörɑ̀ cï Lɑpidöt, ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi burø kì Isrɑil." 
Judges4:5 Debörɑ̀ nyi bëëd ɑ thɑ benø, kì kɑɑm Rɑmɑ̀ geki Betiil, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil nyi kedh-ɑ yïe be lidhi gønyyi gen." 
Judges4:6 Aöde yï Bɑrɑk wɑ̈d Abinoɑm kì kɑɑl Kedec kì Nɑptɑlì ki wöödø kinni, “Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ɑ́cege kinni, ‘Kɑ̈bbí ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø kì kelli jø gøl Nɑptɑlì geki gøl Dhebulun, kɑ wu kedhu Kïti Tɑbör." 
Judges4:7 Siserɑ̀, pënyi liny Yɑbïn ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ be nyɑɑg ki yïn, kì kömi Nɑm Gicön. Óbï ki yɑ̈the geki jølinye, de ge ócïbɑ cingí.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 De Bɑrɑk ɑ́löggi kinni, “Keløg yï ókedhø ki yɑn, yɑ ókedh, de keløg yï pɑ kedh, yɑ pɑ kedh thyew.”" 
Judges4:9 Alöggi Debörɑ̀ kinni, “Døj, wɑ ókedh, de bong pwøj møg-ɑ óyod yi yïn, mɑ́ Siserɑ̀ ócïb-ɑ cingi ngɑndhɑjø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Codhe, ɑdhwödh Debörɑ̀ geki Bɑrɑk, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Kɑdic." 
Judges4:10 Acwøøl gøl Dhebulun geki gøl Nɑptɑlì kì Kɑdic yi Bɑrɑk, kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø løg-ɑ bɑnge. Kɑ Debörɑ̀ ókedhø thyew ki gen." 
Judges4:11 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Keber rum dhwödhø kì buti tyëng Ken møg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ løg kwɑrri Köbɑb, ørri Mosɑ̀. Kɑ gudd-ɑ buti óthurø kì Dhɑnɑnïm." 
Judges4:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Siserɑ̀ kinni Bɑrɑk wɑ̈d Abinoɑm kedhi Kïti Tɑbör," 
Judges4:13 kɑ Siserɑ̀ yɑ̈thi linye gɑ miy ɑ́bïngwen, kí jøliny bënn cwööle kì Kɑröceth Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kömi Nɑm Gicön." 
Judges4:14 Aköbbi Bɑrɑk yi Debörɑ̀ kinni, “Dhwöödh kedh, wu opejø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn! Mɑ́ men bene cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cïb Siserɑ̀ cingí yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Abëën Bɑrɑk piny kì wïj Kïti Tɑbör kí jøge, mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø." 
Judges4:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r Bɑrɑk kömi Siserɑ̀ kí yɑ̈the, kí jølinye bënn, ɑmuum wɑ̈thi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Apɑ̈ɑ̈r Siserɑ̀ piny kì yij yɑ̈ye, kɑ órengø ki tyelle." 
Judges4:16 Acyeddi Siserɑ̀ kí jøge kí yɑ̈the yi Bɑrɑk gïti Kɑröceth Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Anɑ̈ɑ̈g jøliny Siserɑ̀ bënn, bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng." 
Judges4:17 Kɑ Siserɑ̀ reng-ɑ kun-ɑ di kemɑ̀ mi Yɑil, cï Keber Kwɑɑr Ken, mɑ́ Yɑbïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kɑnɑɑn, ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Kɑdhör, kɑɑm gen ɑ́dɑ mër ki gøl Keber." 
Judges4:18 Abëën Yɑil wɑ̈g kì yij kemɑ̀, kɑ Siserɑ̀ köbbe kinni, “Bïí jɑldwøng, bïí yij kemɑ̀ miɑ, yï ko böggi.” Codhe, ɑkedhe yij kemɑ̀, kɑ kum ki ógødh dhø kemɑ̀ yi ngɑnɑni." 
Judges4:19 Aköbbe ngɑnɑni kinni, “Døj, nëngí yɑn ki pïg mɑdhɑ, riɑ dɑ röödhø.” Ayiebe dhøg ɑtheeb cɑg, ɑnënge gøn kɑ omɑ̈dhø, ɑdøøgii ki kumø yi ngɑnɑni." 
Judges4:20 Aköbbi ngɑnɑni yi en kinni, “Cungí kì dhø kemɑ̀, kɑ keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbï, kɑ ópëjjø kinni, ‘Dɑ dhɑnhø me nud kì yij kemɑ̀?’ Kɑ kyëddí kinni bong dhɑnhø.”" 
Judges4:21 Siserɑ̀ ɑ́jwɑn nenø, mɑ́ e pïdø ki mendwøng. Kɑ Yɑil cï Keber ókɑ̈bbø ki piji kemɑ̀, kɑ pyëdh cïbe cinge, kɑ kedh-ɑ köme mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, ɑgure pijø thɑ̈nge, kɑ twïy-ɑ wɑ̈g kì thɑ̈nge tung-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ othøø." 
Judges4:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Bɑrɑk e yɑb-ɑ Siserɑ̀, ɑkedhi Yɑil wɑ̈g be mɑ̈dhii, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Bïí o yï nyudhɑ jɑl-ɑ yɑb yi yïn.” Akedhi gen yij kemɑ̀, ɑlidhe Siserɑ̀ e buud-ɑ piny e thøø, kí piji kemɑ̀ e twïy wɑ̈g kì thɑ̈nge." 
Judges4:23 Isrɑil ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk dicyɑ̈ngɑni ki tegø men-ɑ ɑ́tyɑme Yɑbïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kɑnɑɑn. 
Judges4:24 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kedh ge ótëngø ki mendwøng, kɑ̀ nyïɑ̈ggi gen, gïti kɑ ɑ́tyɑm gen Yɑbïn, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen." 
Judges5:1 Debörɑ̀ geki Bɑrɑk wɑ̈d Abinoɑm ɑ́wör ki wörø men kì cyɑ̈ngɑni kinni: 
Judges5:2 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Liny ɑ́pej yi pëjji Isrɑil, ji ri gen ɑ́muuj gen keti gen ki medi pëëth," 
Judges5:3 Lïng wun, wun ɑ rɑ̈nhì! Kyën wun yïthhi wun, wun ɑ jɑgg. Yɑ ówör kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ othumø ki thøm, yɑ otugø kì bøli Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges5:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwöödh, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kïtti Seir, kɑ yï ókedhø kì piny Edöm, piny ɑ́nhɑ̈nhi kɑ kødh ódëëmø, ngee, pï ɑ́ceg ì bɑɑw kì piny ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yethi pøøl." 
Judges5:5 Kïttì ɑ́kïïr kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ Wïi Sinɑy, ge ɑ́nhɑ̈nhi kì bøli Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges5:6 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Cɑmgɑr wɑ̈d Anɑth, kí yethi cyɑ̈nggi Yɑil, yëëth ɑ́wiy ki cɑɑdhø, wëll ɑ́kɑ̈ll-ɑ pɑ̈l." 
Judges5:7 Myërri Isrɑil ɑ́wiy, ge ɑ́bëëd ge lïïwø gïti kɑ ɑ́dhwödhɑ yɑ Debörɑ̀, yɑn ɑ́ meyi Isrɑil." 
Judges5:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈bbi gen ki jwögg mø nyɑ̈n, liny nuti wɑ̈nhi dhøggi kɑ̈ddi gen? Ádɑ kwöd wɑlɑ̀ tøng mɑ ɑ́lidh kì yï jø Isrɑil, ki kwɑnni gen gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen?" 
Judges5:9 Pyëwɑ ying-ɑ kömi pëjji Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj ri gen kì kelli ji. Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! 
Judges5:10 Lïng wun, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì kömi ɑderr-ɑ kïddi gen tɑr, wun ɑ bëëdø kì kömi ódïïb, kí wun ɑ cyɑ̈dhi tyelli wun!" 
Judges5:11 Lïngu cwɑggi tyëng-ɑ wör kì kömi yïïthi pï, ge wör-ɑ wörri tyɑ̈mø men-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Tyɑ̈m-ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m jølinye! Akedhi jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì yethi kɑ̈ddi gen." 
Judges5:12 Pyëjjí, Pyëjjí, Debörɑ̀, Pyëjjí! Gönyí ki wörø! Pödhí bølí Bɑrɑk wɑ̈d Abinoɑm, køøl ɑmɑggí." 
Judges5:13 Kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi dhøggi gen, bï-ɑ yï jɑggi gen; jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bï yïe ri gen gwiir gen kipe liny," 
Judges5:14 Ge ɑ́bï kì Eprɑim ge kedh-ɑ yij tör, ge kedh-ɑ bɑng gøl Ben Yɑmïn geki jie. Pëjji liny ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Mɑkir, gøl Dhebulun ɑ pyejji liny." 
Judges5:15 Pëjji Isɑkɑr ɑ́bï geki Debörɑ̀, Isɑkɑr ɑ́bï kɑ Bɑrɑk obëënø thyew, ge ɑ́pödhi bɑnge kì yij tör. De tyëng gøl Ruben ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen, rummi gen ɑ́dhɑ̈li rëbø kipe kedhi be liny." 
Judges5:16 Gede ɑ döngi gen cyɑ̈n kí dyëg? Kipe kinni o ge lïngi gen cwɑggi jøkwɑ̈yø møg-ɑ kwølli dyëg? Ngee, tyëng gøl Ruben ɑ́bëëd ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen, rummi gen ɑ́dhɑ̈li rëbø kipe kedhi be liny." 
Judges5:17 Tyëng gøl Gɑd ɑ́döng ge obëëdø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, Adöng tyëng gøl Dɑn kì buti sɑpïnnì. Tyëng gøl Aceer ɑ́cöög gɑ̈d, ge ɑ́cög ge bëëd ɑ thɑ̈ngi nɑm." 
Judges5:18 De gøl Dhebulun geki gøl Nɑptɑlì, ge ɑ́böyi ki kedhi be liny." 
Judges5:19 Rɑ̈nhì ɑ́bï kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø kì Tɑɑnɑk, kì kömi Nɑm Megidø, Rɑ̈nhi Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi, de bong ngyënyø ɑ́tegø mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen." 
Judges5:20 Kyell ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kì mɑl, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl ge ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki Siserɑ̀." 
Judges5:21 Ge ɑ́wøøj Nɑm Kicön yi bɑɑyø, eni Kicön nɑm-ɑ göjji bøle Yɑ ópödhi bølɑ ki tegø!" 
Judges5:22 Kɑ kyënyì bï-ɑ köme ge óbeddø, e piny omɑ̈rrø yi gen." 
Judges5:23 Wëywöni Wë okööbø kinni, “Gøøj cyën kömi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Merödh! Mɑ́ ge nuti bëën be kønyi Wë ki nyɑɑg ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ teg.”" 
Judges5:24 Ngɑn-ɑ ree di gyëdh mø døngø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, bɑ Yɑil cï Keber jɑl Ken, en ɑ gyëdhhe døngø kibøli gyëdhhi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì yethi kemmì." 
Judges5:25 Siserɑ̀ ɑ́cwøl-ɑ pï, de ɑ́mëgge’ cɑg; ɑ́mëgge cɑg ɑdïng kì yij lwøøl jɑgg." 
Judges5:26 Piji kemɑ̀ ɑ́kwɑnye ki cingi cɑɑme, o pyëdh ying-ɑ cingi kyëje. Pijø ɑ́gure thɑ̈ngi Siserɑ̀, kɑ wïje ópyëdø, pijø ɑ́gure kɑ twïy-ɑ wɑ̈g kì thɑ̈nge tung-ɑ kyeelø." 
Judges5:27 Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh cønge këële’ piny, ɑ́pɑ̈dhi dhø tyelli Yɑil; Cønge ɑ́rume piny kì bøle kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø; ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh e kegø, kɑ cöög-ɑ kenyɑni." 
Judges5:28 Meyi Siserɑ̀ nenn-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ɑwɑj; ɑ́mëddi kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j wini ɑwɑj, ɑryeere kinni, “Ede yɑ̈ye ɑ cöge e pɑ jwɑn wɑ̈nhø? Gede kyënye ɑ dhɑ̈li gen ki dwöögø?”" 
Judges5:29 Alöggi nyɑn-ɑ wïje pel kì kelli bɑ̈ngge, kɑ löggɑni nyi cigi jølø yi meyi Siserɑ̀ e köbb-ɑ ree kinni," 
Judges5:30 “Ge nudd ge ócunggø ki jɑmmì møg pɑ̈ngi, nyɑnɑjur ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ryew ɑ mëggi jɑl-liny ɑ́kyel, o ógudhi kïdd-ɑ myër ɑ mëggi Siserɑ̀, ógudhi kïddì møg-ɑ ókwenø kì wɑ̈thi tùngi gen bɑ møgɑ.”" 
Judges5:31 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wiy tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn thøw gen kinøw, de wiy tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn mëëny gen ni cɑ̈ng me ceg tuulø! Abëëd pödhø ki mër ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen." 
Judges6:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil cig-ɑ gwøg ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcïb gen cinggi tyëng Midyɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge jɑɑg yi gen ki runn ɑ́bïryew." 
Judges6:2 Tyëng Midyɑn ɑ́bëëd ge teg kibøli tyëng Isrɑil, ɑdøøg tyëng Isrɑil be pɑ̈nnø yi gen kì yethi órøggi kïttì, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ gødd." 
Judges6:3 Kenyi rum tyëng Isrɑil ki kɑ̈g ki byelli gen, tyëng Midyɑn, kí tyëng Amɑlek, kí jurr-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl nyii bëënø kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ köme." 
Judges6:4 Ge nyii guddø ki kɑɑl kì Isrɑil, kɑ jɑmmì nyi kwɑny yi gen gïti buti Gɑdhɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Byel nyii kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi gen, kí jɑmmì bënn, dyëg kí dhög, kí ɑderr, tyëng Isrɑil nyi wiy yi gen kɑ kɑ̈j." 
Judges6:5 Ge nyii bëënø kí dhögi gen, kí kemmi gen, ge nɑ bɑ̈nyø. Gen kí ɑmɑlli gen, ge pɑ cuggi kwɑnø. Ge nyii bëënø kɑ pödhø ryɑ̈g yi gen." 
Judges6:6 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil nyingi gen guud yi tyëng Midyɑn, ɑywøøg gen kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges6:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ywøøg tyëng Isrɑil kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni o gï yiele kì cinggi tyëng Midyɑn," 
Judges6:8 ge ɑ́ödi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ki jɑltöng men köbbi gen kinni, “Yɑn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
Judges6:9 Wu ɑ́yielɑ kì cinggi tyëng Rïp, kí cinggi ji-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki wun bënn. Tyëngɑni ɑ́cyeddɑ kì bøli wun, kɑ piny gen mëggɑ wun." 
Judges6:10 Wu ɑ́köbbɑ kinni, ‘Yɑ bɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jwöggi tyëng Amör, ɑ piny gen bëëd yi wun ko mɑlli wun.’ De kwøbbɑ nuti lïngi wun.”" 
Judges6:11 Abëën wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pëgg-ɑ thɑ óthurø kì Óprɑ̀, yɑnhɑni bɑ mi Yöɑc kì gøl Abiedher. Gideon, wɑ̈de ɑ́bëëd e opödø ki gemè kì bur men-ɑ yije nyi bïïj ki møgi oløg, e kɑnn-ɑ ree kipe ólidh yi tyëng Midyɑn." 
Judges6:12 Acwöb wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli Gideon, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyelteg!”" 
Judges6:13 Alöggi Gideon kinni, “Keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nudd wø mïdhe’ mïdhø, ede gïg ni møg bënn ɑ cwöb gen kiper wøn, wuö? Gïïngɑ̈ngø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gögge kweyyi wøn, kɑ wø wɑ̈jji yi gen, gïgɑni ying-ɑ keny? Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kweyyi wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp kidyër? De ɑnɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wø ɑ́wiye cinggi tyëng Midyɑn.”" 
Judges6:14 Codhe, ɑköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh ki tegí bëne, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil yieel kì cinggi tyëng Midyɑn. Bɑ yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ör yïn.”" 
Judges6:15 Apyëjii yi Gideon kinni, “Isrɑil óyiel yi yɑn kidï, wuö? Gøl wøn bene gøl-ɑ pëddi nyøødhø kì kelli kɑ̈lli gøl Mɑnɑsè kì Isrɑil, o bɑ yɑn ɑ thinh kì gøl wøn.”" 
Judges6:16 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ókøny yi yɑn, kɑ tyëng Midyɑn tyɑm yi yïn, ge nɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel yøw.”" 
Judges6:17 Kɑ møge løøg yi Gideon kinni, “Keløg pyëwí med ki yɑn, nëngí yɑn ki ngïji me nyodh kinni yï bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Judges6:18 Akööbe kinni, “Døj, bëëd yï ko kedh gïti keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ yɑ ókɑ̈ddø ki gëëdhi.” Kɑ wëywönɑni okööbø kinni, “Yɑ óbëëdø gïti keny-ɑ ódwöög.”" 
Judges6:19 Akedhi Gideon gøle, kɑ otɑ̈dø ki nyɑ ónywøg, kɑ kïllì pyɑ̈rø mø møng-ɑ búr gemè nyöme, kɑ gø bule ɑ́ ópùni olwëny, ɑkïdhe rïngø yij ɑ́ridh kɑ cwɑyø kïdhe yij dɑg, kɑ gï muuje wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì thɑ óthurø, kɑ gï mëgge gøn." 
Judges6:20 Aköbbii yi wëywödø kinni, “Cïb rïngø geki ópun kömi kït men, kɑ cwɑyø køny kömi gen.” Agwøøg møgɑni ceth yi Gideon." 
Judges6:21 Kɑ wëywödø, rïngø geki ópun nywɑle ki leeb lonh-ɑ kɑ̈lle kì cinge. Alyel mɑc kì ri kït, kɑ rïngø geki ópun rɑ̈be. Kɑ wëywödø ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì bøle." 
Judges6:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ngijii yi Gideon kinni bɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑbwøge kɑ ogɑ̈ɑ̈yø kinni, “Möy! Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Wëywöní ɑ́lidhɑ, kɑ nyingi wøn kyëël wøn ki en!”" 
Judges6:23 De ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bëëd ki mër, yï ko böggi, yï pɑ thøw!”" 
Judges6:24 Codhe, ɑgëddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki këli lɑm yi Gideon, kɑ kenyɑni cɑge ɑ́, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ mër.” (Këlɑni nudd e ócungø kì Óprɑ̀ pɑɑ gøl Abiedher gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn)." 
Judges6:25 Kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑköbbi Gideon yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kwɑny wɑɑdh wïyí geki wɑdh megø, me runne bɑ ɑ́bïryew, kɑ këli lɑm mi Bɑɑl, men-ɑ bɑ mi wïyí cøør piny, kɑ ngïjji jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø, Aceerɑ̀ men-ɑ bute toor piny." 
Judges6:26 Kɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gëddí ki këli lɑm me myëër kì kömi lɑ̈mɑni. Kɑ wɑnh-ɑ pɑth ki mi wïyí kwɑɑny, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b bëne ɑ́ gëëdhi, gwøg ngïji Aceerɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́tor yi yïn ɑ́ yugg.”" 
Judges6:27 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈bbi Gideon ki ji pyɑ̈rø kì kelli bɑ̈ngge, ɑgwøge møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́gwøg yi en kì wɑ̈r, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e óböggø yi tyëng gøl gen, kí tyëng kɑɑl." 
Judges6:28 Kì mwøl dhuki, keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh tyëng kɑɑl, ɑyuud gen këli lɑm mi Bɑɑl geki ngïji Aceerɑ̀ men-ɑ bute ge ótoor piny, o wɑnh-ɑ pɑth ki mi wïye órɑ̈bø ɑ́ gëëdhi kì kömi këli lɑm men-ɑ ɑ́ger." 
Judges6:29 Kɑ ji ri gen pyënyi gen kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́gwøg gïn ni men?” Apëëj gen, kɑ yod yi gen kinni bɑ Gideon wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ göögø kinøw." 
Judges6:30 Aköbbi Yöɑc yi gen kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈dí wɑ̈g keny, o nɑ̈g yi wøn! Këli lɑm mi Bɑɑl ɑ́cøøre piny, kɑ ngïji Aceerɑ̀ men-ɑ bute toore piny.”" 
Judges6:31 Aköbbi ji bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh ki liny kipere, yi Yöɑc kinni, “Wu nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ per Bɑɑl? Wu cwɑg-ɑ en? Ngɑn-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi kipere ónɑ̈g kì mwøl dhuki! Keløg Bɑɑl bɑ jwøg, wiy nyɑɑge linye, mɑ́ e bɑ këli lɑme ɑ ɑ́cøøre piny.”" 
Judges6:32 Acɑɑg Gideon yi gen dicyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́ Yerubɑɑl, mɑ́ Yöɑc ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wiy Bɑɑl nyïɑ̈gge ki Gideon, mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́cøør kële piny.”" 
Judges6:33 Arëbi tyëng Midyɑn, kí tyëng Amɑlek, kí jurr-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ ge kɑdh-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun, kɑ ri gen cøng gen kì Töör Yidhriil." 
Judges6:34 Abëën wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ri Gideon, kɑ kɑng kodhe e cwøl-ɑ tyëng gøl Abiedher, kinni bï gen bɑnge." 
Judges6:35 Aöde myërri kɑ̈lli Mɑnɑsè ryeet ki tyëngwöödø e cwøl-ɑ gïn kinni bï gen bɑnge. Kɑ öd-ɑ yï gøl Aceer, kí gøl Dhebulun, kí gøl Nɑptɑlì. Abëën gen kɑ ge órëbø ki gøn." 
Judges6:36 Codhe, ɑköbbi Jwøk yi Gideon kinni, “Yï okööbø kinni ce yɑ ógwøøg ngɑn yiel Isrɑil," 
Judges6:37 døj, yɑn ɑ cïb yëyy piny yij rɑri gemè èn; keløg thöjj óying mø nud kì ri yëyy, de piny óbëëd e thwøwø, bene en ɑ óyodɑ en kinni Isrɑil óyiel yi yïn kì riɑ.”" 
Judges6:38 Acwöb gen ceth. Kì mwøl dhuki, ɑbiij yëyy yi Gideon, kɑ lwøl opɑ̈ngø yi pïg-ɑ ɑ́bïïje wɑ̈g kì ri yëyy." 
Judges6:39 Aköbbi Jwøk yi Gideon kinni, “Yï ko mɑg yi liny ki yɑn. Wiy yɑ cigɑ kwøb kinni, wiy yëyy keti gen bëëd ge thwøwø, kɑ wiy piny bëne bëëde e thij yi thöjj.”" 
Judges6:40 Agwøøg møgɑni ceth yi Jwøk kì wɑ̈rɑni. Dhuki kì mwøl, yëyy thwøwø, dɑ́ piny kete ɑ thij yi thöjj." 
Judges7:1 Kɑ Yerubɑɑl, ɑ løg Gideon ókedhø kì mwøl geki jøge bënn, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ kömi wɑɑng pïi Kɑröd. O tyëng Midyɑn ying-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì thɑ Kïti Morè kì yij tör." 
Judges7:2 Aköbbi Gideon yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jií gïïr kì yïɑ kipe tyɑmi tyëng Midyɑn. O Isrɑil cöge e pɑ thwøg kinni ɑ́yiel-ɑ yi tege kete." 
Judges7:3 Anɑn köbbí ji kinni, ‘Ke di dhɑnhø me yije kïïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, døøge pɑc, de wø óbëëdø kì Kïti Gilyɑd keny.’ ” Codhe, ɑdøg ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø odöngø kí en." 
Judges7:4 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Gideon ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Ji nudd ge gïïr, kïdhí gen nɑm, ge óyieny yi yɑn, yï óköbbi yi yɑn kinni, dhɑnhø men kedhe, kɑ men ko kedh. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ókyer yi yɑn ko kedh.”" 
Judges7:5 Codhe, ɑkïdhe gïn nɑm. Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Dɑ̈ɑ̈ng ji møg-ɑ gɑ̈dø ki lebbi gen ni gwögg, ki ji møg-ɑ órum cøngi gen piny kɑ̀ mɑ̈dhi gen.”" 
Judges7:6 Amɑ̈dhi ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g ki pï ge tömm-ɑ dhøggi gen ki cinggi gen. Kɑ møg-ɑ kyeelø ómɑ̈dhø ki dhøggi gen, ge ying-ɑ wɑ̈thi cøngi gen." 
Judges7:7 Aköbbi Gideon yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wu óyiel yi yɑn kì cinggi tyëng Midyɑn kɑ ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈dhi ki cingi gen, kɑ wiy ji møgɑk bënn døøg gen pɑc.”" 
Judges7:8 Codhe, ɑör tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn pɑc yi Gideon. Adöng ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g keti gen, ɑ løg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi jɑmmi liny kí kɑ̈ngì kì cinggi gen. Kì bøli kenyɑni kɑɑl tyëng Midyɑn ɑ́ying-ɑ yij tör." 
Judges7:9 Aköbbi Gideon yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wɑ̈rɑni kinni, “Dhwöödh, kedhí be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑɑlɑni, mɑ́ e ɑ́cïbɑ cinggi wun." 
Judges7:10 De keløg yï óböggø, kedhí kɑɑlɑni møti wuki Purɑ̀ bɑ̈ngí." 
Judges7:11 Yï ólïngø ki møg-ɑ ókømmi yi gen, kɑ pyëwí ótëngø, kɑ yï kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gen.” Codhe, ɑkedh Gideon geki bɑ̈nge Purɑ̀ tøg kɑɑl tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Judges7:12 Tyëng Midyɑn, kí tyëng Amɑlek, kí jurr-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl bënn pëggi yij tör, ge gïïr nɑ bɑ̈nyø. Amɑlli gen gïïr nɑ ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø." 
Judges7:13 Gideon ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ceth, e jɑl megø köbb-ɑ mɑ̈dhe lɑ̈g mø lɑ̈g en kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈g-ɑ ópuun ceir e ngyëël-ɑ ree kɑɑlee, kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi kemɑ̀. Kɑ kemɑni ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø yije reeny en piny.”" 
Judges7:14 Alöggi mɑ̈dhe kinni, “Bong gïjø megø këti, den-ɑ́ pili Gideon wɑ̈d Yöɑc jɑl Isrɑil. Midyɑn geki yɑye bëne ɑ́cïb cinge yi Jwøk!”" 
Judges7:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi lɑ̈ggɑni yi Gideon, kí gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen, ɑbøødhe ree piny, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑle. Adøøge kɑɑl Isrɑil, kɑ jøge köbbe kinni, “Dhwödhu mɑl! Tyëng Midyɑn ɑ́cïb cingge yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!”" 
Judges7:16 Apɑ̈nge jøge, kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́dɑ̈g gɑ ɑkudd ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑcïbe cinggi gen bënn ki kɑ̈ngì, kí puggì mø yethi gen di redhhi mɑc." 
Judges7:17 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nennu yɑn, kɑ gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhɑ tøg kɑɑlɑni, gwøg wun." 
Judges7:18 Keny-ɑ ókodh wøn kɑ̈ngi, wøki jøgɑ, kɑ kɑ̈ngi wun lony wun ki kodhø. Kɑ wu ryeer wun ki ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl kinni, ‘Kipe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki Gideon!’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gideon kí jøge, kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø, ɑ́wɑ̈dhi tøg kɑɑlɑni kì dïwɑ̈r bøli keny-ɑ nyi wiil ji-ɑ kurø. Akodh gen kɑ̈ngì, kɑ puggì nɑ̈g gen." 
Judges7:20 Alunyi ɑkudd-ɑ kyeelø ryeet ki kodhi kɑ̈ngi gen, kɑ puggi gen nɑ̈g gen. Atïng redhhi mɑc mɑl yi gen bënn ki cinggi cyɑ̈mmi gen, o kɑ̈ngì ying-ɑ cinggi këjji gen, ɑryeer gen kinni, “Pili Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki Gideon!”" 
Judges7:21 Acungi jø Gideon kì tøggi kɑɑlɑni, ɑrengi tyëng Midyɑn ge okïïwø." 
Judges7:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́koodh kɑ̈ngì yi jø Gideon, ɑgöjji kɑɑlɑni kebbi ree ki pil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Arengi liny kuni Dhɑretɑn, kɑ ge gït-ɑ Bet Cïtɑ̀, kí kɑɑl Abel Mekölɑ̀, ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Tɑbɑth." 
Judges7:23 Acwøøl tyëng kɑ̈lli Nɑptɑlì, kí gøl Aceer, kí gøl Mɑnɑsè, ɑcyeddi tyëng Midyɑn yi gen." 
Judges7:24 Aöd Gideon ki tyëngwöödø e öd-ɑ myërri kïtti Eprɑim kinni, “Bïu be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Midyɑn, mɑgu kömi Nɑm Urdun geki nɑ̈mm-ɑ thønhø gïti Bet Bɑrɑ̀, o tyëng Midyɑn cög gen, ge pɑ kɑdhi løøgø.” Acøng jøgi Eprɑim ri gen kej ɑ́kyel kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ kömi Nɑm Urdun, geki nɑ̈mm-ɑ thønhø gïti Bet Bɑrɑ̀." 
Judges7:25 Acyeddi tyëng Midyɑn kɑ jɑggi gen ryeet Oreb geki Dhiib, mɑg. Anɑ̈ɑ̈g Oreb kì ri Kïti Oreb. Kɑ Dhiib nɑ̈ɑ̈g keny-ɑ nyi biij oløøg Dhiib. Kɑ wïj Oreb geki wïj Dhiib muuj Gideon yi jøge, e ying-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Judges8:1 Aköbbi Gideon yi jø gøl Eprɑim kinni, “Yïde ɑ göggí wøn ki gïn ni men? Wøde ɑ bɑɑny wøn ki cwølø yi yïn keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhí be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Midyɑn?” Kɑ ge owërø’ en ki menteg." 
Judges8:2 De kwøbbi gen ɑ́løøg yi en kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun. Cɑgg ɑ́ gïjø me gwøøg wun e thiinh wu jø Eprɑim, pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki men-ɑ gwøg yi gøl Abiedher bëne." 
Judges8:3 Oreb geki Dhiib jɑggi Midyɑn ryeet ɑ́cïb cinggi wun yi Jwøk. Á gïn ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn ɑ lod gwøøg wun?” Kì bɑng keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni, ɑkwööj pëthi gen." 
Judges8:4 Gideon ɑ́bëëd e pïdø geki jøge kwɑnni gen miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, keny-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen Nɑm Urdun, de ge ɑ́nudd ge ócyëddø ki liny Midyɑn." 
Judges8:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe Suköth, ɑköbbe jø kɑɑlɑni kinni, “Thödhu jøgɑ ki gïncɑm. Ge ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r, o yɑ nudd yɑ cyedd-ɑ rɑ̈nhi Midyɑn; Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀.”" 
Judges8:6 De ɑ́köbbi yi pëjji Suköth kinni, “Wøde ɑ thödhi wøn jøgí ki gïncɑm, o Dhebɑ̀ nuti mɑɑg yïn geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀?”" 
Judges8:7 Aköbbi gen yi Gideon kinni, “Døj! Keny-ɑ ócïb Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀ cingɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu ópwöd yi yɑn ki koodh kí otwelø.”" 
Judges8:8 Kɑ kedh-ɑ Penuel, ɑcige cwöd ki gïncɑm, de jø Penuel ɑ́kwøb-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi jø Suköth." 
Judges8:9 Codhe, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ ki tɑrø, ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ nyi koor kɑɑl wun ódhurɑ piny.”" 
Judges8:10 Kì bøli kenyɑni Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀ ge ɑ́ying-ɑ Kɑrkör geki jøliny gen mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj. Jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g, kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Judges8:11 Akedhi Gideon yï Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ tøg ryɑng, kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Nöbɑ̀ geki Yogbeɑ̀, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈ye gïn piny." 
Judges8:12 Arengi Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀, rɑ̈nhi Midyɑn ryeet, de ɑ́rengi bɑng gen kɑ gï mɑge, kɑ liny gen kedhhe." 
Judges8:13 Gideon wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ́dwöög kì be nyɑɑg e bï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yuu Ëres. 
Judges8:14 Kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki nyelthinh me kɑ̈ɑ̈l Suköth, kɑ gø pyënye, kɑ nyingi pëjjì geki jøgdøngi Suköth gwëdii yi nyelɑni, kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Judges8:15 Kɑ Gideon obëënø, ɑköbbe jø Suköth kinni, “Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀ ɑ keny èn, tyëng-ɑ́ per gen ɑ́yɑnyu yɑn wu okööbø kinni, ‘Wøde ɑ thödhi wøn jøgí ki gïncɑm, e Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀ nuti mɑɑg yïn?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Amɑɑg jøgdøngi Suköth yi Gideon, kɑ gï pwöde ki koodh kí otwelø." 
Judges8:17 Adhure ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ koor Penuel piny, kɑ jø kɑɑlɑni nɑ̈ge." 
Judges8:18 Kɑ Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀ pyëj yi en kinni, “Á jøg mø bëëdø kidï ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wun kì Tɑbör?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Jøg mø pɑ̈r ki yïn, ge nɑ nyiirɑ̈dhh.”" 
Judges8:19 Alöggi Gideon kinni, “Jøgɑni bɑ nyiimïɑ, meyi wøn ɑ́kyel. Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø kinni, keløg ge pɑ di nɑ̈g yi wun, wu pɑ di nɑ̈g yi yɑn.”" 
Judges8:20 Aluge ree Yether, wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ kɑyø, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kedh, nɑ̈g gen!” De Yether pile nuti wöödh en wɑ̈g kì yij bøj, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e óböggø yi kɑ̀ nudd e thiinh." 
Judges8:21 Aköbbii yi Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀ kinni, “Bïí nɑ̈g wøn, yïn kirií, lɑ̈w nɑ̈gi wøn yi nyelteg ni wøn.” Codhe, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi Gideon, kɑ gïg-ɑ ódhyɑɑw muddi ɑmɑlli gen gï kwɑnye." 
Judges8:22 Aköbbi Gideon yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Jɑɑg wøn, yïn kí wɑ̈dí kí kwɑrí, mɑ́ wø ɑ́yiel yi yïn kì cinggi tyëng Midyɑn.”" 
Judges8:23 De ge ɑ́köbbi yi Gideon kinni, “Wu pɑ jɑɑg yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ wu pɑ jɑɑg yi wɑ̈dɑ. Wu jɑɑg-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Judges8:24 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Dɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel me dwɑddɑ kì yï dhɑnhø bëne kì kelli wun kinni mëggu yɑn dhɑbbi yïthh møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun.” (Ábëëd ɑ́ kwöng kì yï tyëng kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl eni rug ki dhɑbbi yïthh)." 
Judges8:25 Alöggi gen kinni, “Pëthi wøn omedø ki mëggi gen yïn.” Codhe, ɑpëdhi gen piny ki ógødh, kɑ dhɑbbi yïthh møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen, leeng gen yij ógønhɑni." 
Judges8:26 Agöög dhɑbbi yïthh møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi Gideon ki gïn ni kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø; ɑ́cwecwelli yedh, kí yëll ɑ́tegg, kí ógudh-ɑ nyi rug yi rɑ̈nhi Midyɑn, kí jɑmm-ɑ nyi dhyɑɑw muddi ɑmɑl, ge nuti kwɑnø." 
Judges8:27 Agöög dhɑmɑni ki ngïji yi Gideon, kɑ gø cïbe Óprɑ̀ kɑɑl gen. Awiy Jwøk yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli ngïji menɑni kì kunɑni, kɑ ngïji menɑni ogöögø ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli kì cwɑggi Gideon kí gøl gen." 
Judges8:28 Tyëng Midyɑn ɑ́tyɑm yi Isrɑil, ɑcög gen wɑ̈thi gen nuti tïng gen këti. Abëëd pödhø ki mër ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen gïti kɑ ɑ́thøw Gideon." 
Judges8:29 Gideon wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ́døøg pɑɑ gen be bëëdø. 
Judges8:30 Gideon wɑ̈dde ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, mɑ́ mɑ̈nne ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr." 
Judges8:31 Ányöddi thyew ki wɑ̈d yi nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnye kì Cekïm, ɑcɑge gøn ɑ́ Abimelek." 
Judges8:32 Gideon wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ́thøw e yöø ki mendwøng, kɑ koony buti wïye Yöɑc kì Óprɑ̀, kɑɑl gøl Abiedher." 
Judges8:33 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Gideon ki thøø, ɑwiy Jwøk yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli Bɑɑl. Agwøg gen Bɑɑl Berit ɑ́ jwøøg gen." 
Judges8:34 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg gen, ɑ ɑ́yiel gen kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ ɑ́ying bɑdhhi gen, owïlø kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Judges8:35 Bong gïndøj mɑ ɑ́göggi gøl Gideon yi tyëng Isrɑil, kipe gïgdøj bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kiper gen." 
Judges9:1 Abimelek wɑ̈d Yerubɑɑl ɑ́kedhi yï nɑ̈yye kì kɑɑl Cekïm, ɑköbbe gïn bënn kinni," 
Judges9:2 i pyëj gen tyëng Cekïm bënn kinni, “Á men ɑ́ lɑ̈w ki jɑɑgi wun, wɑ̈ddi Yerubɑɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈w jɑɑgi wun yi dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen? Rum wun kinni yɑ bɑ wɑɑd wun, wɑɑd nyöödø.”" 
Judges9:3 Aköbbi tyëng Cekïm bënn kipere yi nɑ̈yye, ɑkedhi pëthi gen kömi Abimelek, mɑ́ e bɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈y gen." 
Judges9:4 Anëngii yi gen ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kì kengi Bɑɑl Berit, kɑ ngyëny ɑ́teggɑni ngëëwe ki jøg mø bong per gen, jøgöj. Akedhi gen bɑnge." 
Judges9:5 Kɑ kedh-ɑ gøl wïye kì Óprɑ̀, ɑnɑ̈ge nyiiwɑ̈n pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, wɑ̈ddi Yerubɑɑl kì kömi kït ɑ́kyel. Kɑ bødh ɑ́ Yöthɑm wɑ̈d Yerubɑɑl nyel-ɑ thinh kete, mɑ́ e ɑ́pɑ̈ni." 
Judges9:6 Kɑ tyëng Cekïm órëbø kí tyëng Bet Milö bënn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ thɑ óthuri kwër kì Cekïm, ɑrøny gen Abimelek ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
Judges9:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yöthɑm møgɑni, ɑyedhe oledh Kïti Geridhïm ɑryeere kinni, “Lïngu møgɑ, wun ɑ tyëng Cekïm, o mø wun ólony ki lïngø yi Jwøk thyew!" 
Judges9:8 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel yenh ɑ́cugi kipe rönyi ri gen ki rɑ̈dh me jɑɑg gen. Aköbbi gen dhetun kinni, ‘Bëëd yï bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn.’" 
Judges9:9 Alöggi dhetun kinni, ‘Keløg yɑ orønyø yi wun, yɑ ceg-ɑ wïyø ki gwøg ki møwɑ; eni møw-ɑ nyi kwëër jwögg geki ji.’" 
Judges9:10 Aköbbi ólɑm yi yenh kinni, ‘Bïí göög ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn.’" 
Judges9:11 De ólɑm ɑ́löggi kinni, ‘Keløg wu ójɑɑg yi yɑn, yɑ ceg-ɑ wïyø ki nywølø ki nyigɑ nyig-ɑ med.’" 
Judges9:12 Codhe, ɑköbbi oløg yi yenh kinni, ‘Bïí o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn.’" 
Judges9:13 De oløg ɑ́löggi kinni, ‘Keløg wu ójɑɑg yi yɑn, yɑ ceg-ɑ wïyø ki gwøg ki møgø miɑ; eni møng-ɑ nyi mïni pëthi jwögg geki ji.’" 
Judges9:14 Codhe cyee, ɑköbbi but yi yenh bënn kinni, ‘Bïí o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn.’" 
Judges9:15 Alöggi but kinni, ‘Keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ yɑn kidyër, o yɑ røny yi wun, yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun, bïu tïbɑ. De keløg wu óbɑ̈nyø, bɑ̈ddɑ, bɑ̈dd-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi koodh óceg ì pɑɑt ki mɑc, kɑ yenh sɑndɑl mø Lubnɑn rɑ̈be.’ ”" 
Judges9:16 Kɑ Yöthɑm cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Anɑn dɑ gɑ̈nø, kí tɑri pëëth kì yï wun, kɑ̀ røny wun Abimelek ɑ́ rɑ̈dh? Gideon ɑ́di wørø yi wun, kɑ pɑrri wun, kɑ gøle göggi wun ki gïndøj men-ɑ myër ki en?" 
Judges9:17 Nyi rum wun kinni wïyɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ per wun. Thøø ɑ́bøye kipe yieli wun kì cinggi tyëng Midyɑn. 
Judges9:18 De wu ɑ́yöd wu töng-ɑ ri gøl wïyɑ dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Anɑ̈g wun wɑ̈dde gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kì kömi kït ɑ́kyel kipe Abimelek wɑ̈de, ɑ meye bɑ ɑkwɑny, mɑ́ e bɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈y wun, ɑgwøgii yi wun ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cekïm." 
Judges9:19 De ɑnɑn, keløg gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Gideon kí gøle yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, gwøøg wun kɑ tɑri pëëth, wu óbëëdø ki medi pëëth wuki Abimelek." 
Judges9:20 De keløg e pɑth ki tɑri pëëth ɑ göög wun, mɑc óceg ì pɑɑt kì ri Abimelek, kɑ jø Cekïm geki jø Bet Milö rɑ̈be. O mɑc óceg ì pɑɑt kì ri jø Cekïm geki jø Bet Milö, kɑ Abimelek rɑ̈be.”" 
Judges9:21 Arengi Yöthɑm kɑ kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì Biir, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e óböggø yi Abimelek ówɑ̈n." 
Judges9:22 Ajɑɑg Isrɑil yi Abimelek ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Judges9:23 Aör wëy mø rijjø kɑɑm Abimelek geki jø Cekïm yi Jwøk, kɑ ge ómɑ̈nø ki ri gen, kɑ ge ogöögø liny ki gøn." 
Judges9:24 Gïnɑni ɑ́cwöb kì kɑɑm Abimelek geki pëjji Cekïm møg-ɑ ɑ́cïïjii ki gwøgi orøng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge nyiiwɑ̈n, wɑ̈ddi Yerubɑɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kipe kinni o kɑ̈jji cu gen col." 
Judges9:25 Acïb jøg mø kurø wïj kït mɑl yi pëjji Cekïm, kɑ jɑmmi tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli yöö nyi kɑb yi gen. Kɑ møgɑni köbbi Abimelek." 
Judges9:26 Awɑ̈dhi Gɑɑl wɑ̈d Ebed bëënø e bï-ɑ Cekïm geki nyiimen, kɑ kwøbbe yïëy yi pëjji Cekïm." 
Judges9:27 Akedhi gen wɑ̈g bënn yethi bɑ̈ggi gen, kɑ ge opunø ki nywøli oløg, ɑgöggi gen ri gen ki møgø kɑ ge otugø. Akedhi gen be cɑm kí mɑdh kì yij kengi jwøøg gen, ɑkööb gen kì kenyɑni kì ri Abimelek, e obenyø yi gen." 
Judges9:28 Kɑ Gɑɑl wɑ̈d Ebed okööbø kinni, “Abimelek ɑ́ men? O wɑ tyëng Cekïm, wɑ ceg bëëd ɑ dï, ɑ jɑɑge wɑ? Pɑth ki wɑ̈d Yerubɑɑl, o pɑth ki Dhebul ɑ bɑ ókwøme? Wɑde ɑ göög wɑ kipere? Gɑ̈nni wɑ kweyee Amör, ɑ ree ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gølee!" 
Judges9:29 Keløg ji møg di pyejj-ɑ yi yɑn, Abimelek di nɑ̈g yi yɑn. Abimelek di köbbɑ kinni, ‘Cwööl linyí bëne, kɑ yï bïí be nyɑɑg!’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Gɑɑl wɑ̈d Ebed, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen yi Dhebul jɑngi kɑɑlɑni, kɑ pyëwe ceg-ɑ rënyø ki menrɑj." 
Judges9:31 Aöde yï Abimelek kì Arumɑ̀ ki wöödø kinni, “Gɑɑl wɑ̈d Ebed geki nyiimen ɑ́bï Cekïm, o yï pɑ wëggi bëën kɑɑl yi gen." 
Judges9:32 De bïí wuki jøgí kì wɑ̈r, kɑ wu pɑ̈ni wun kì yethi pwödh." 
Judges9:33 Kɑ wu dhwönhi wun kì mwøl ri tuuli cɑ̈ng, kɑ wu pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi kɑɑl. Keny-ɑ óbëën Gɑɑl geki jøge be nyɑɑg ki yïn, kɑ ge pwööd piny.”"
