Judges9:34 Codhe, kɑ Abimelek geki jøge bënn ódhwönhø kì wɑ̈r, ɑpɑ̈ni gen kì pɑ̈l kì buti Cekïm gɑ dhøg ɑ́ngwen." 
Judges9:35 Kɑ Gɑɑl wɑ̈d Ebed obëënø, kɑ ócungø kì dhø döri kɑɑl. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Abimelek geki jøge, ɑdhwödhi gen mɑl kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ni yi gen." 
Judges9:36 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gen yi Gɑɑl, ɑköbbe Dhebul kinni, “Lïdhí, dɑ ji mø bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì.” Alöggi Dhebul kinni, “Tïbbi kïttì ɑ nenni yi yïn ge nɑ ji.”" 
Judges9:37 Acigi Gɑɑl kwøb kinni, “Lïdhí, ji ɑ bï ɑcɑ̀ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì. O ɑkud megø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri óthur-ɑ thɑre nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi ɑ́jwöggì.”" 
Judges9:38 Kɑ köbbi yi Dhebul kinni, “Athwøgí ɑ́gøn en ɑnɑn? Pɑth ki yïn ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, Abimelek bɑ men ɑ jɑɑge wɑ? Bene liny-ɑ ɑ́benyi yi yïn ɑnɑn. Kedh nyïɑ̈ggí ki en!”" 
Judges9:39 Codhe, ɑpeej tyëng Cekïm yi Gɑɑl, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki Abimelek." 
Judges9:40 Kɑ Gɑɑl cyeddi gïti dhø pöör yi Abimelek, kɑ ji mø gïïr ri gen kedhi yi kedd." 
Judges9:41 Abëëd Abimelek kì Arumɑ̀, kɑ Gɑɑl geki nyiimen cyeed wɑ̈g yi Dhebul kì Cekïm." 
Judges9:42 Dhuki, ɑlïng Abimelek kinni i tyëng Cekïm dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi wɑ̈g yethi pwödh." 
Judges9:43 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le jøge gï pɑ̈ng en gɑ dhøg ɑ́dɑ̈g. Abuddi gen kì yethi pwödh. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe ji ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kömi gïn kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen." 
Judges9:44 Kɑ Abimelek geki jøge reng-ɑ be mɑgi dhø döri kɑɑl, kedh ɑkudd ɑ́ryew reng-ɑ yethi pwödh be nɑ̈g ki ji." 
Judges9:45 Kɑ liny tyëg-ɑ cɑ̈ng bëne e ónyïɑ̈ggø. Amɑɑg kɑɑl yi Abimelek, ɑnɑ̈ge jii kɑɑlɑni bënn. Atoore kɑɑl piny, kɑ piny wïwe ki omelø, (e lɑm-ɑ gøn kinni o cöge ɑ́ ryɑng)." 
Judges9:46 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi jøg-ɑ bɑ pëjji kì Cekïm, ɑrengi gen be yieeli wëyi gen yij kengi Bɑɑl Berit, ønteg." 
Judges9:47 Aköbbi Abimelek kinni ri gen cøng gen kì kunɑni. 
Judges9:48 Codhe, ɑkedhe wïj Kïti Dhɑlmön geki jøge. Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki dørø, ɑngude ki yungø, kɑ gø cïbe wïj tøge. Aköbbe jøge kinni pyew gen, göög gen ki gïn ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Judges9:49 Codhe, ɑngud dhɑnhø bëne ki yungø, ɑløg gen bɑng Abimelek kɑ yuggɑni röör gen kömi ønteg menɑni. Acwiny kenyɑni yi gen kí ji kì yije, kɑ ji othøø bënn kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel, jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn." 
Judges9:50 Akedhi Abimelek Tebedh, kɑ kɑɑlɑni tyege, ɑmɑge gøn." 
Judges9:51 Kunɑni ɑ́dɑ ønbɑ̈r me teg, o tyëng kɑɑlɑni bënn kí jɑggi gen, rengi yij ønɑni. Kɑ gø cyëëg gen kömi gen, kɑ kwï gen yedh-ɑ wïje." 
Judges9:52 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Abimelek, be mɑgi ønbɑ̈r menɑni, ɑ́ceg-ɑ yedhi mɑl be cwinyii ki mɑc kì dhøge." 
Judges9:53 De ngɑndhɑjø megø, kïn-ɑ nyi gur ɑ́kwɑnye kɑ gø leenge wïj Abimelek, kɑ wïje ópyëdø." 
Judges9:54 Acwøle nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi linye kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l pilø mi wɑ̈g kɑ yɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Yɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni, o yɑ kømmi kinni yɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yi ngɑndhɑjø.” Codhe, ɑcwøbii yi nyelɑni kɑ othøø." 
Judges9:55 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni Abimelek ɑ́thøw, ɑdøøg gen yethi myërri gen." 
Judges9:56 Bɑ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́cɑy Abimelek kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gögge gøl wïye, ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge nyiiwɑ̈n gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew." 
Judges9:57 Tyëng Cekïm ɑ́göjji orɑng yi Jwøk kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, ni kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈mmi gen cyën yi Yöthɑm wɑ̈d Yerubɑɑl." 
Judges10:1 Kì bɑng thøwi Abimelek, ɑdhwödh Tölɑ̀ wɑ̈d Puɑ̀ kwɑɑr Dödö, wɑ̈d gøl Isɑkɑr, e bï-ɑ be yieli Isrɑil. Ábëëd ɑ Cɑmïr kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim." 
Judges10:2 Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑg yi en ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ othøø, ɑkonyii kì Cɑmïr." 
Judges10:3 Bɑng Tölɑ̀, ɑdhwödh Yɑir kì Gilyɑd, ɑjɑɑge Isrɑil ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew." 
Judges10:4 Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, ge nyi cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi ɑderr pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, o yï gen ɑ́dɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, møg-ɑ nudd ge ocwøllø gɑ kɑ̈ddi Yɑir gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn kì myërri Gilyɑd." 
Judges10:5 Athøw Yɑir, kɑ kony kì Kɑmön." 
Judges10:6 Agöög tyëng Isrɑil këti ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Bɑɑl geki Actɑröth mɑlli gen, kí jwöggi tyëng Acuur, kí jwöggi Sïdön, kí jwöggi Moɑb, kí jwöggi Amön, kí jwöggi Pelistiyɑ̀. Aweddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen kɑ ge ówïyø mɑllii." 
Judges10:7 Codhe, ɑrënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menteg ki Isrɑil, kɑ gï göjje tyɑmø yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Amön." 
Judges10:8 Aguud gen nyingi tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ bëëdø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kì piny Amör kì Gilyɑd, ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
Judges10:9 Kɑ tyëng Amön kɑdh-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun be nyɑɑg ki gøl Yeudɑ̀, kí gøl Ben Yɑmïn thyew, kí gøl Eprɑim, kɑ Isrɑil yije obɑɑrø ki mendwøng." 
Judges10:10 Aywøøg tyëng Isrɑil kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ge okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́røngi kì bølí, mɑ́ yï ɑ́weddi yi wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøøg wøn, kɑ Bɑɑl mɑlli wøn.”" 
Judges10:11 Aköbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑn ɑ ɑ́yiel wun kɑ̈ge dööng kì cinggi tyëng Rïp, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Amön, kí tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀," 
Judges10:12 kí tyëng Sïdön, kí tyëng Amɑlek, kí tyëng Moɑb, kɑ ɑ́guud gen nyingi wun, kɑ wu ywöög-ɑ köörɑ. Wu nuti yieel yɑn kì cinggi gen?" 
Judges10:13 De yɑ ɑ́wiyu piny, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wu pɑ yiel yi yɑn këti." 
Judges10:14 Kedh wun, kɑ wu ywøøg wun yï jwögg-ɑ mɑlli yi wun, wiy wu nyi yiel yi gen kenyi yïddi wun ki rɑj.”" 
Judges10:15 De tyëng Isrɑil Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́røngi, de gwøg gïn-ɑ nenni yi yïn e døøj. Wø ókwɑ̈jjø kinni yiel wøn dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
Judges10:16 Codhe, ɑweddi gen jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlli gen, kɑ yije óywöngø kipe bɑɑri nyingi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges10:17 Kɑ liny tyëng Amön ree gwire kipe nyɑɑg, ɑcøng gen ri gen kì Gilyɑd. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ri gen cøng gen, kɑ liny cïb gen Midhpɑ̀ kì Gilyɑd." 
Judges10:18 Kɑ jøgdøngø geki teedø bëne ri gen pyënyi gen kì kenyɑni kinni, “Á men-ɑ ópej liny kɑ̀ kedhi wɑ be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön? Ngɑn-ɑ ópej liny óbëëd ɑ́ jɑngi dhɑnhø bëne kì Gilyɑd!”" 
Judges11:1 Yeptɑɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl-liny me teg kì Gilyɑd, bɑ wɑ̈d ngɑn mɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. Wïyi Yeptɑɑ̀ cwøl ɑ́ Gilyɑd." 
Judges11:2 De Gilyɑd yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dde thyew ki cyëge, keny-ɑ ɑ́døngi wɑ̈dde, ɑcyeed gen Yeptɑɑ̀ wɑ̈g kì pɑc, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Bong gïn-ɑ ólɑg yi yïn kì ri jɑmmi wïyi wøn, mɑ́ yï bɑ wɑ̈d dhɑjø megø.”" 
Judges11:3 Codhe, ɑpɑ̈r Yeptɑɑ̀ kì buti nyiiwɑ̈n, kɑ kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì piny Töb. Acøng jøg-ɑ bong per gen ri gen bɑng Yeptɑɑ̀, kɑ ge nyi kedh-ɑ be mɑ̈nyø ki gïn." 
Judges11:4 Kì bɑng keny megø, ɑkedhi tyëng Amön be nyɑɑg ki Isrɑil." 
Judges11:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r tyëng Amön kömi Isrɑil, ɑkedhi jøgdøngi Gilyɑd piny Töb be dwöögi Yeptɑɑ̀." 
Judges11:6 Kɑ Yeptɑɑ̀ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Bïí o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ pënyi liny wøn, o wɑ kedhi wɑ be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön.”" 
Judges11:7 Aløøg kwøbbi jøgdøngi Gilyɑd yi Yeptɑɑ̀ kinni, “Bɑ wun kì ri wun ɑ ɑ́mɑɑn yɑn, kɑ yɑ cyeed wɑ̈g yi wun kì gøl wïyɑ, wude ɑ bëën wun yïɑ ɑnɑn kɑ̀ ying wun yethi rɑj?”" 
Judges11:8 Aköbbi Yeptɑɑ̀ yi jøgdøngi Gilyɑd kinni, “Kidyër ceth, wø ɑ́dwöög köörí ɑnɑn, keløg yï ókedhø ki wøn, o wɑ nyïɑ̈ggi wɑ ki tyëng Amön, yï óbëëdø yïn ɑ́ pënyi liny Gilyɑd bëne.”" 
Judges11:9 Aköbbi jøgdøngi Gilyɑd yi Yeptɑɑ̀ kinni, “Døj, yɑ dwøøg yi wun kɑ per nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön, de keløg ge ócïb cingɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg ki jɑngi wun.”" 
Judges11:10 Aløøg kwøbbi Yeptɑɑ̀ yi jøgdøngi Gilyɑd kinni, “Wø ɑ́yïëy, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ́ bøle ɑ́lwööb wɑ.”" 
Judges11:11 Codhe, ɑkedh Yeptɑɑ̀ geki jøgdøngi Gilyɑd, ɑgwøgii yi gen ɑ́ pënyi liny, o bɑ jɑgø. Kɑ møgɑni bënn døøg ki kwøbø yi Yeptɑɑ̀ kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Midhpɑ̀." 
Judges11:12 Aödi Yeptɑɑ̀ yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön ki tyëngwöödø, o gø köbbi gen kinni, “Yïde ki wøn? Yïde ɑ bëën be mɑnyi pödhi wøn?”" 
Judges11:13 Aløøg kwøbbi tyëngwöödø mø Yeptɑɑ̀ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Isrɑil kì Rïp, pinyɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi gen, cɑg kì ri Nɑm Arnön gïti Nɑm Yɑbok, kí Nɑm Urdun. Anɑn döggu yɑn kɑ̈jjɑni ki mër.”" 
Judges11:14 Acigi Yeptɑɑ̀ ödi yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön ki tyëngwöödø," 
Judges11:15 e løøg-ɑ kinni, “Isrɑil bong piny Moɑb, wɑlɑ̀ piny tyëng Amön mɑ ɑ́kwɑnye." 
Judges11:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh Isrɑil kì Rïp, ɑ́kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij pɑ̈l, ɑkedhe dhø Gøøli Agɑbɑ̀, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Kɑdic." 
Judges11:17 Kɑ ge öd-ɑ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm kinni o ge wiy ge kedh gen, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yij pödhe. De ge nuti wiyø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm o ge kɑ̈l gen yij pödhe. Angɑ̈j gen rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb, de ɑ́bɑ̈nyi thyew. Codhe, ɑbëëd tyëng Isrɑil kì Kɑdic." 
Judges11:18 Kɑ ge ócyɑ̈dhø ge owïïnø kì yij pɑ̈l, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ tøggi piny Edöm geki Moɑb gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen Moɑb kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kì tøg Nɑm Arnön løøng-ɑ kyeelø. Agur gen kemmi gen piny kì kunɑni, de ge nuti kɑdhi løøg Nɑm Arnön mɑ́ e bɑ keew Moɑb." 
Judges11:19 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil öd-ɑ yï Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amör kì Kicbön ki wöödø kinni o ge wiy ge kedh gen, ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ yij pödhe, ge kedh-ɑ pödhø men-ɑ bɑ mi gen." 
Judges11:20 De Sïön ɑ́bɑ̈nyi. Kɑ linye bëne cønge kì Yɑɑdh, kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Isrɑil." 
Judges11:21 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Isrɑil ɑ́thödhe ki tegø, kɑ Sïön tyɑm kí linye bëne. Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny piny tyëng Amör møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì pönhɑni yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges11:22 Apëggi gen piny Amör bëne, cɑg kì Arnön gïti Yɑbok, o cɑg kì ryɑng gïti Nɑm Urdun." 
Judges11:23 De bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ ɑ́cyeddi tyëng Amör kipe jie tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges11:24 Dwɑddií døøgø ki kwɑnyø? Yï ócuggø kwɑnyi gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi jwøgí Kemöc. De gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn ómïdhi bënn yi wøn." 
Judges11:25 Yï orumø kinni Bɑlɑk wɑ̈d Dhipor rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb lod yi yïn? Ádi wërø ki tyëng Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́di kedhi be nyɑɑg ki gen?" 
Judges11:26 Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd kì Kicbön kí Aröeer, kí myërr-ɑ buti gen, kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ thɑ̈ngi Nɑm Arnön bënn kì runn miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, gede ɑ nuti kwɑɑny gen yi yïn ki kɑɑm-ɑn bëne?" 
Judges11:27 Pɑth, bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn. De mií bɑ bɑ̈jjø kɑ̀ göög ki liny kí yɑn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ en ɑ ólidh møgɑni. Gïn-ɑ kɑɑm tyëng Isrɑil geki kwɑrri Amön ótyëg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
Judges11:28 De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön wööni Yeptɑɑ̀ ɑ́bɑny yi en ki lïngø. 
Judges11:29 Kɑ wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ kömi Yeptɑɑ̀, ɑkedhe myërri Gilyɑd kí Mɑnɑsè kɑ dwöög-ɑ Midhpɑ̀ kì Gilyɑd, kɑ pödh-ɑ Amön." 
Judges11:30 Aköngi Yeptɑɑ̀ kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Keløg tyëng Amön ócïb yi yïn cingɑ," 
Judges11:31 dhɑnhø men-ɑ ókwöngi ki bëën wɑ̈g, kì gølɑ e kedh-ɑ be pɑɑri yɑn keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ ki tɑrø, kì be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön, mëggɑ’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne.”" 
Judges11:32 Akɑdhi Yeptɑɑ̀ løøgø, be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön, kɑ ge cïb cinge yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges11:33 Akedhhe gïn, cɑg kì Aröeer gïti Minith, gɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew bënn, pïd kö yuu Abel Kerɑmïm. Ji mø gïïr ɑ́nɑ̈g kɑ tyëng Amön tyɑm yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges11:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Yeptɑɑ̀ pɑɑre kì Midhpɑ̀, bɑ nyɑre ɑ ɑ́bï wɑ̈g be pɑɑrii, e ocöngø e opödø ki nyɑ bul! Bɑ nyɑn me thinh, o yïe bong nyiimen." 
Judges11:35 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhe, ɑkɑge ógødhe, e yije ceg-ɑ ywøg, ɑkööbe kinni, “Pöy nyɑrɑ! Minɑ ɑ́cöd yi yïn! Ede ɑ bëëde ɑ́ yïn ɑ thödhi yɑn ki orɑng? Yɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yɑ pɑ cuggi døøg cyɑ̈n!”" 
Judges11:36 Akööbe kinni, “Wïyø, göggí yɑn gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi yïn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ yï ɑ́wëgge tyɑmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, ɑ løg tyëng Amön.”" 
Judges11:37 De wïye ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Göggí yɑn gïjø ɑ́kyel men, wiy yɑn, o yɑ bëëdɑ ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ryew, kipe kinni, o yɑ kedhɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì be wïïnø, wøki mɑ̈dhhɑ, o wø kïïm wøn kipe thøwɑ yɑn ɑ́ jùr me nuti nywɑlø yi jɑlø.”" 
Judges11:38 Aköbbii yi wïye kinni kedhe, e ör-ɑ gøn wɑ̈g ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ryew. Akedhe geki mɑ̈dhhe kelli kïttì, kipe kɑ̀ thøwe e nuti nywɑlø yi jɑlø, kí kɑ̀ bong yïe nyɑre." 
Judges11:39 Kì bɑng dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ryew ɑdwööge yï wïye, ɑgwøøg gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi wïye kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ othøø ɑ́ jùr me nuti nywɑlø yi jɑlø. Bene cɑ̈gi kwöngɑni kì Isrɑil," 
Judges11:40 men-ɑ nyi kedhi womɑ̈nn, wɑ̈g ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ngwen kì yij run, o ge kïïm gen kipe nyɑɑr Yeptɑɑ̀ jɑl Gilyɑd." 
Judges12:1 Kɑ jø gøl Eprɑim ri gen cwøl gen, ɑkedhi gen løøg Nɑm Urdun ge kedh-ɑ yï Yeptɑɑ̀ kì Dhɑpön, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n nɑm, kɑ yï kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön, o wø nuti cwøøl yïn? Ød rɑ̈ɑ̈b wø’ kömí.”" 
Judges12:2 Aköbbi gen yi Yeptɑɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn wøki jøgɑ, wø ɑ́wër ki tyëng Amön ki wëërø me teeg, kɑ wu cwølɑ, de wu nuti bëën be cwɑgi yɑn." 
Judges12:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ en kinni yɑ pɑ cwɑg yi wun, ɑböyyɑ kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Amön, ɑcïb gen cingɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De wude ɑ bëën wun be nyɑɑg ki yɑn ɑnɑn?”" 
Judges12:4 Acøng jø Gilyɑd bënn yi Yeptɑɑ̀ kɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki gøl Eprɑim, ɑtyɑɑm gøl Eprɑim yi jø Gilyɑd, mɑ́ gøl Eprɑim ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wun, wu tyëng Gilyɑd, wu bɑ ji mø kɑrri tyelli wun kì kɑɑm Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè.”" 
Judges12:5 Amɑɑg dhøøwɑ̈dhh-ɑ nyi kɑ̈dhhi kì Nɑm Urdun yi jø Gilyɑd, kɑ ngeti Eprɑim men-ɑ nyi bodh ree kinni o kɑdhe nyi pyëj yi jø Gilyɑd kinni, “Yï bɑ jɑl Eprɑim?”" 
Judges12:6 Keløg e okyëdø kinni, “Pɑth.” Nyii köbbø kinni, kööbe kinni, “Cibolet” de nyi kwøb-ɑ, “Sibolet,” mɑ́ e nyii dhɑlø yi kwøbii kidøøj. Kɑ nyi mɑg kɑ nɑ̈g yi gen kì kömi Nɑm Urdun, tyëng gøl Eprɑim møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen ki yuuɑni bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew." 
Judges12:7 Kɑ Isrɑil jɑɑg yi Yeptɑɑ̀ ki runn ɑ́bïkyel, ɑthøwe kɑ kony kì pɑɑre kì Gilyɑd." 
Judges12:8 Kì bɑng Yeptɑɑ̀, ɑjɑɑg Isrɑil yi Ibdhɑn, kì Betleem." 
Judges12:9 Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dde pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí nyige womɑ̈nn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Nyige ɑ́muuje o ge nywøm yi ji mø pɑth ki tyëng gøl gen, kɑ ókɑ̈nø ki womɑ̈nn mø bɑ nyigi jurrì møøgø gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gɑ mɑ̈nni wɑ̈dde. Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑg yi Ibdhɑn ki runn ɑ́bïryew." 
Judges12:10 Kɑ othøø, ɑkonyii kì Betleem." 
Judges12:11 Kì bɑng Ibdhɑn, ɑjɑɑg Isrɑil yi Elön kwɑɑr Dhebulun ki runn pyɑ̈rø." 
Judges12:12 Kɑ Elön othøø, ɑkonyii kì Ayɑlön kì piny Dhebulun." 
Judges12:13 Kì bɑng Elön, ɑjɑɑg Isrɑil yi Abdön wɑ̈d Yilel kì Pirɑthön." 
Judges12:14 Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kí kwɑrre wɑ̈ddi wɑ̈dde pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi kì kömi ɑderr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew. Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑg yi en ki runn ɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
Judges12:15 Kɑ Abdön wɑ̈d Yilel othøø, ɑkonyii kì Pirɑthön kì piny Eprɑim kì myërri kïtti Amɑlek." 
Judges13:1 Adøøg tyëng Isrɑil ki gwøg ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcïb gen cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge jɑɑg yi gen ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen." 
Judges13:2 Ádɑ jɑl megø kì kɑɑl Dhorɑ̀ kì gøl Dɑn me cwøl ɑ́ Mɑnowɑ̀, o cyëge bɑ bwøj, nuti wöl nywølø ki dhɑnhø." 
Judges13:3 Kɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ocwöbø kì bøli ngɑnɑni, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yï bɑ bwøj, yï nuti wöl nywølø ki dhɑnhø; de yï óyɑɑj, kɑ yï pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d." 
Judges13:4 Yï ko pɑ̈nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg kí møgi byel, wɑlɑ̀ ki gïn ree di thɑbø, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko pɑ̈nyi cɑm ki gïgcɑmm møg-ɑ ywëdhø." 
Judges13:5 Keny-ɑ órum wɑ̈dí ki pɑ̈dhi piny yi yïn, yëyyi wïje ko pɑ̈nyi ki lyelø, mɑ́ nyelthinh menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ɑthyeey Jwøk kër-ɑ ónywøølii. En ɑ óyiel Isrɑil kì cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
Judges13:6 Akedh ngɑnɑni kɑ jɑlgøle köbbe kinni, “Jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk ɑ́bï yïɑ, nënni e nɑ wëywöni Jwøk. Dhɑnhø ceg-ɑ böggø yi en. Nuti pyëëj yɑn ki kun-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le, o nyinge nuti köbbi yɑn yi en." 
Judges13:7 De yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, i yɑ óyɑɑj kɑ yɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d. Aköbbe yɑn kinni cɑg ɑnɑn, yɑ ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg wɑlɑ̀ møgi byel, kɑ yɑ ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïg-ɑ ywëdhø, mɑ́ nyelthinh óbëëd ɑ́ ɑthyeey Jwøk kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëëne bënn.”" 
Judges13:8 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjji yi Mɑnowɑ̀ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy dhɑnhø mií men-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yïn dwööge be nyudhi wøn ki gïn-ɑ ógöggi wøn nyelthinh men-ɑ ónywøl.”" 
Judges13:9 Alïngi kwɑ̈jji Mɑnowɑ̀ yi Jwøk, kɑ wëywöni Jwøk dwöög-ɑ yï ngɑnɑni e ying-ɑ yij pwödhø, de jɑlgøle Mɑnowɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e tøøk kì bute." 
Judges13:10 Arengi ngɑnɑni yï jɑlgøle, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Lïdhí, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bølɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑcɑ̀ èn!”" 
Judges13:11 Adhwödh Mɑnowɑ̀, kɑ løg-ɑ bɑng cyëge. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe buti jɑlɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Bɑ yïn ɑ ɑ́kööb ki cyëgɑ?” Kɑ oyïëyø kinni, “Yɑn.”" 
Judges13:12 Codhe, ɑpëjji Mɑnowɑ̀ kinni, “Keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kwøbbí, nyelthinh ócïg-ɑ ngø, o ógwøg-ɑ ngø kì yij bëëde?”" 
Judges13:13 Alöggi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cyëgí gwøge møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ en bënn ceth;" 
Judges13:14 ngɑnɑni ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïn kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri oløg, kɑ ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ møgi byel, wɑlɑ̀ ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïg-ɑ ywëdhø. Gwøge møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ en bënn.”" 
Judges13:15 Ábëëd e kwïj yi Mɑnowɑ̀ kinni menɑni bɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Døj, kɑl bëëdø kì keny, kɑ wiy yï tɑ̈ddi ki nyɑ ónywøg.” De Mɑnowɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Keløg yɑ obëëdø kì keny, yɑ pɑ cuggi cɑm ki gïncɑɑm wun. De ke dwɑddií, cɑɑg ki rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne.”" 
Judges13:16  
Judges13:17 Apyëëj wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Mɑnowɑ̀, kinni, “Nyingí ɑ́ men, o yï ótheg yi wøn keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kwøbbí kɑ̈jji gen?”" 
Judges13:18 Alögge kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ pyënyí nyingɑ? Ge bɑ nying mø bɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø.”" 
Judges13:19 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny nyɑ ónywøg yi Mɑnowɑ̀ geki byëlø, kɑ gï mëgge Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì kömi nyɑ kït me thiinh. Acwöb gïïngɑ̈ngø men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e onennø yi Mɑnowɑ̀ geki cyëge." 
Judges13:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi leeb mɑc mɑl kì wïj këli lɑm, kɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lidh yi Mɑnowɑ̀ geki cyëge e kedh-ɑ mɑl kì yij leeb mɑc. Angijii yi Mɑnowɑ̀ cyee kinni jɑlɑni ce ying-ɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny, wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny. Wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti lidhø yi gen këti." 
Judges13:21  
Judges13:22 Kɑ Mɑnowɑ̀ cyëge köbbe kinni, “Wɑ bɑ møg thøw ceth, kipe kɑ ɑ́liidh Jwøk yi wɑ.”" 
Judges13:23 Alöggi cyëge kinni, “Keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j di dwɑddi nɑ̈gi wɑ, ti gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki byëlø pɑ di yïëy yi en kì cinggee, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ pɑ di nyudhe gïg-ɑk bënn, wɑlɑ̀ bong gïn di köbbe wɑ.”" 
Judges13:24 Kɑ ngɑnɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d, kɑ nyinge cɑge ɑ́ Cimcön. Kɑ nyelthinh ódøngø, kɑ gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges13:25 Kɑ wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócɑ̈gø’ gwøg kì ree keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e ying-ɑ Dɑn, kì kɑɑm Dhorɑ̀ geki Ectɑol." 
Judges14:1 Kɑ Cimcön kedh-ɑ Timnɑ̀, kɑ ólïdhø ki dhɑjø kì kelli nyigi Pelistiyɑ̀." 
Judges14:2 Kɑ ódwöögø, ɑköbbe wïye geki meye kinni, “Dɑ nyɑɑr Pelistiyɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì Timnɑ̀, nyömmu en yɑn.”" 
Judges14:3 Aköbbii yi wïye geki meye kinni, “Bong dhɑjø kì kelli nyigi wɑddee, wɑlɑ̀ kì kelli nyigi tyëng pödhee bënn, ɑ pere tiir kedhi be nywöm ki nyɑɑr Pelistiyɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi ngøl?” De Cimcön wïye ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Nyömmu en yɑn, bɑ en e kete ɑ dir yɑn.”" 
Judges14:4 Wïye geki meye ɑ́bëëd ge kwïj wøw kinni møgɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni o bëëde ɑ́ møg-ɑ ócwɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Isrɑil, mɑ́ Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd e jɑɑg-ɑ yi Pelistiyɑ̀ kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Judges14:5 Akedhi Cimcön Timnɑ̀ geki wïye kí meye. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen ri bɑ̈ggi oløg, kɑ ngur ówöb lïnge e óngɑ̈rrø." 
Judges14:6 Ajwɑn tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bëën köme, kɑ ngur pyëëde ki cingge keti gen, ɑ́ bud ɑ́ryew, e ce pyëëd-ɑ nyɑ ónywøg. De wïye geki meye nuti köbbø yi en ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Judges14:7 Akedhi Cimcön yï nyɑnɑni kɑ ge okööbø, ɑyïëëy Cimcön yi en." 
Judges14:8 Kɑ ódwöögø kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng e bï-ɑ be nywømi nyɑnɑni. Kɑ kej ngur men-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge lyeewe, kɑ ongɑ̈ngø kɑ ɑ́yode kïc geki møøw kïc kì yij kwɑ̈ɑ̈l ngur." 
Judges14:9 Kɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ wɑ̈g ki møøw kïc ki cinge, kɑ ókedhø e ocyɑ̈mø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́pïïde wïye geki meye, ɑnënge gïn ki møøw kïc, kɑ gø cɑm gen. De ge nuti köbbø yi Cimcön kinni, bɑ ri kwɑ̈ɑ̈l ngur ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le møøw kïc menɑni." 
Judges14:10 Akedhi wïye gøl nyɑnɑni, kɑ Cimcön ogöögø ki ryëj men-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb." 
Judges14:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, ɑödi gen yïe ki yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g møg bëëdø kì bute." 
Judges14:12 Aköbbi gen yi Cimcön kinni, “Wiy wu nëngi yi yɑn ki wïjkyeny men-ɑ óbɑgii yi wun, cyɑ̈nggi nywöm gɑ ɑ́bïryew nuti thumø. Keløg e óbɑg yi wun, wu ónëngɑ ki ógudh-ɑ yöm pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí møg-ɑ nyi wiil gen." 
Judges14:13 De keløg e pɑ bɑg yi wun, yɑ ceg kɑ nëngø yi wun ki ógudh-ɑ yöm pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí møg-ɑ ówiil gen.” Akööb gen kinni, “Köbbí wøn wïjkyenyí.”" 
Judges14:14 Akööb Cimcön kinni, “Ri gïn nyi cyɑ̈mø ɑ́bëën yi gïncɑm; ri gïn teg ɑ́bëën yi gïn lwïy.” Kɑ ge ómɑ̈gø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g e wïjkyenyɑni dhɑ̈li bɑgø yi gen." 
Judges14:15 Kì ngween cyɑ̈ng, ɑbëën gen yï cï Cimcön, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Thɑbbí jɑlgølí, o wø nyudhe wïjkyenye. Keløg yï óbɑ̈nyø, gøl wïyí rɑ̈ɑ̈b wø’ kömi wun. Wø ɑ́ryej yi wun kɑ per kinni o jɑmmi wøn kwɑny yi wun? Pɑ cuggi.”" 
Judges14:16 Akedhi cï Cimcön yïe kɑ óywöngø kì bøle e okööbø kinni, “Yɑ mɑɑn yi yïn ceth kidyër, yɑ pɑ mɑɑr yi yïn. Wɑ̈ddi pödhi wøn ɑ́nëngi yi yïn ki wïjkyeny, o men-ɑ́ yɑn, yɑ nuti nyudhø yi yïn.” Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Men-ɑ́ wïyɑ geki meyɑ nuti nyudhø yi yɑn. Yïde ɑ köbbɑ yïn?”" 
Judges14:17 Atyëge cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew bënn mø ryëj e óywöngø. Kɑ wïjkyenyɑni köbbii yi Cimcön kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, mɑ́ kööre ɑ́buudh yi nyɑnɑni. Kɑ tyëng pödhi gen köbbe wïjkyenyɑni." 
Judges14:18 Codhe, kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng, ɑbëën yɑɑgɑni e Cimcön nuti kedhi øn-ɑ nyi buude, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Á gïn ɑ lod møøw kïc ki lwïyø? Á gïn ɑ lod ngur ki tegø?” Alöggi Cimcön kinni, “Keløg wu pɑ di köbb-ɑ yi røjø miɑ, wïjkyenyɑ pɑ di bɑg yi wun.”" 
Judges14:19 Kɑ wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ köme, kɑ ogöögø ki me teeg, ɑkedhe Ackelön kɑ ónɑ̈ggø ki ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ógudhi gen lunye wɑ̈g, ɑmuuje gïn yɑɑg-ɑ ɑ́bɑg wïjkyenye. Codhe, ɑkedhe pɑc pyëwe rɑɑj." 
Judges14:20 Kɑ cyëge mëggi nyel-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mɑ̈dhe kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng nywöme. 
Judges15:1 Kì bɑng keny megø, kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi nyɑɑr gemè, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈bbi Cimcön ki nyɑ ónywøg, kɑ kedh-ɑ be këëmi cyëge. Aköbbe wïyi cyëge kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi ød wøki cyëgɑ.” De jɑlɑni, Cimcön nuti wiy en, o kedhe ød." 
Judges15:2 Kɑ Cimcön köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ rumø kinni nyɑnɑni mɑɑn yi yïn, ɑmëggɑ en mɑ̈dhí. Nyimen nyɑn-ɑ thinh bëëd ɑ dï, pɑ myëër kibøle? Kwɑɑny ɑ́ keje.”" 
Judges15:3 Kɑ Cimcön okööbø kinni, “Wɑngtïn bong gïn-ɑ ócɑ̈yyi yɑn yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ógöggɑ gen ki gïnrɑj.”" 
Judges15:4 Codhe ɑkedhe, kɑ ómɑ̈gø ki ógwøgg miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑgööge ki redhhì, kɑ yëbbi ógwøgg ɑ́ryew nyi twööje kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ redhø nyi twööje ri gen." 
Judges15:5 Kɑ mɑc gweele ri redhhì, kɑ ógwøgg wiye rengi gen yethi pwödhhi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, ɑrɑ̈b gen byell-ɑ rumø kɑjø, kí møg-ɑ nudd ge ócungø, kí bɑ̈ggi oløg geki yenh dhetun." 
Judges15:6 Apëjji tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́gwøg gïn ni men?” Aköbbi gen kinni, “Bɑ Cimcön, øri jɑl Timnɑ̀, kipe kɑ ɑ́mëgge cï Cimcön mɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cimcön.” Akedh tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ nyɑnɑni geki wïye rɑ̈b yi gen ki mɑc." 
Judges15:7 Aköbbi gen yi Cimcön kinni, “Keløg wu göög ɑ nøw! Yɑ pɑ wïyi gïti keny-ɑ ócolɑ kejɑ.”" 
Judges15:8 Anyïɑ̈gge ki nyɑɑg me teg ki gen, kɑ ónɑ̈gø ki ji mø gïïr kì kelli gen. Kɑ kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì órøngi Kïti Atɑm." 
Judges15:9 Abëën tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ ge ogudø kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi kɑɑl Lekì." 
Judges15:10 Apyëëj gen yi jø Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni, “Wude ɑ bëënu be nyɑɑg ki wøn?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́bï-ɑ be dwɑ̈ɑ̈yi Cimcön, o kɑ̈l yi wøn ɑ́ ɑmɑg, o göggi yi wøn gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge wøn.”" 
Judges15:11 Kɑ jø Yeudiyɑ̀ mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kedh-ɑ mɑl yij órøngi Kïti Atɑm, kɑ Cimcön köbbi gen kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni wɑ jɑɑg-ɑ yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, yïde ɑ göggí wøn ki gïn ni men?” Alögge kinni, “Ge ɑ́göggɑ’ gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi gen.”" 
Judges15:12 Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́bï-ɑ be twöji yïn o yï mëggi gen yi wøn.” Akööb Cimcön kinni, “Köngi wun kinni yɑ pɑ nɑ̈g yi wun.”" 
Judges15:13 Alöggi gen kinni, “Pɑth, yï pɑ nɑ̈g yi wøn de yï ótwöj yi wøn yøw, kɑ yï cïb wøn cinggi gen.” Codhe, ɑtwöjii yi gen ki thøll ɑ́ryew mø nyɑ̈n kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì yij órøngi kït." 
Judges15:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe Lekì, ɑbëën tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ yïe ge óryeerø kipere. Ajwɑn wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bëën köme kɑ ótëngø, ɑcödde thøll-ɑ ótwöjii kì bɑ̈dde geki cingge e dhɑ̈y ge nɑ kor mø rɑ̈bbø." 
Judges15:15 Kɑ óyïddø ki lëmi ɑderø me cer thøø. Akuunge piny kɑ gø kwɑnye, kɑ ji ɑ́lïp nɑ̈ge ki gøn." 
Judges15:16 Codhe, ɑwör Cimcön kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gi ki ji ɑ́lïp ki lëmi ɑderø, kɑ ge röörɑ piny gɑ börr.”" 
Judges15:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume wör, ɑleenge lëmi ɑderø piny kì kenyɑni, bene ɑ cwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Rɑmɑth Lekì." 
Judges15:18 Amɑgii yi röödhø, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cwøle kinni, “Tyɑ̈mø men-ɑ dwøng cɑrø èn, ɑ́cïb-ɑ yi yïn cingi bɑ̈ngí, yɑ ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi röödhø o yɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ cinggi tyëng-ɑ nuti ngølø?”" 
Judges15:19 Kɑ keny megø yieb yi Jwøk kì piny kì Lekì, ɑbëën pï wɑ̈g. Amɑ̈dhi Cimcön kɑ dële ókwöjø. Codhe ɑcɑɑg wɑngɑni ɑ́ Akor, nud ɑnɑn kì Lekì." 
Judges15:20 Ajɑɑg Isrɑil yi Cimcön ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew ɑ́ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ mïdhi pödhø. 
Judges16:1 Akedhi Cimcön Gɑdhɑ̀, kɑ ólïdhø ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi kì kunɑni, ɑkedhe ød ki gøn." 
Judges16:2 Ayood pere yi tyëng Gɑdhɑ̀ kinni nud kì kɑɑlɑni, ɑcøng gen ri gen kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ kenyɑni tyeg gen. Akor gen dhø döri kɑɑl kì wɑ̈r bëne, ge okudø, kɑ ge nyii möngø kinni, “Yïd wɑ gïti keny-ɑ ótɑ̈ri piny, o nɑ̈g yi wɑ.”" 
Judges16:3 De Cimcön nuti wɑ̈dhi mwøl kì kenyɑni, ɑ́dhwödh kì dïwɑ̈r, kɑ thïgi döri kɑɑl mɑge, kí rïwwe gɑ ɑ́ryew, kɑ gï puthe wɑ̈g, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn ki winni gen bënn. Kɑ gï byeele mɑl wïj kït men-ɑ buti Kibrön." 
Judges16:4 Codhe, ɑmɑɑre ngɑndhɑjø me cwøl ɑ́ Delïlɑ̀, me bëëdø kì Töör Sörek." 
Judges16:5 Akedhi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ yï ngɑnɑni, kɑ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Thɑb Cimcön, o yï köbbe gïn-ɑ mëggii teng-ɑ dwøng cɑrø, kí gïn-ɑ cuggi göggii o nyönhe, o twöj yi wɑ. Yï ónëngi yi wøn bënn ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg, e dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel muuj-ɑ ɑ́lïp kí miyø.”" 
Judges16:6 Codhe, kɑ Cimcön köbbi yi Delïlɑ̀ kinni, “Köbbí yɑn, ɑ́ gïn ɑ mëggi yïn teng-ɑ dwøng cɑrø? Keløg dhɑnhø dwɑdd-ɑ twöji yïn o yï nyönhí, ɑ́ ngø ógwøg yi en?”" 
Judges16:7 Aköbbii yi Cimcön, “Keløg yɑ otwöjø ki pujji weth ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ nyɑ̈n ge nuti thwøwø, yɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg yɑ nyøødh ni dhɑnhø yøw.”" 
Judges16:8 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ni rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ ki pujji weth ɑ́bïryew mø nyɑ̈n ge nuti thwøwø kɑ gï muuj gen Delïlɑ̀, ɑtwöje Cimcön." 
Judges16:9 Ádɑ jøg møøgø mø lïïbø, o ge pɑ̈n-ɑ øn-ɑ kyeelø, ɑryeere kinni, “Cimcön! Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bï kömí!” De Cimcön pujji weth ɑ́cödde, ni kenyi ngølli kor yi mɑc. Codhe, ɑcög gïn-ɑ mëggii teng-ɑ dwøng nuti yodø yi gen." 
Judges16:10 Aköbbi Cimcön yi Delïlɑ̀ kinni, “Yïde ɑ tuug yɑn, kɑ yɑ köbbí kwøbbi pyed? Köbbí yɑn ɑnɑn, yï cuggi twöjø kɑ ngø?”" 
Judges16:11 Aköbbii yi en kinni, “Keløg yɑ otwöjø ki thøll møg-ɑ nyɑ̈n, ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø ki twöj, yɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg yɑ nyøødh ni dhɑnhø yøw.”" 
Judges16:12 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ni Delïlɑ̀ ki thøll mø nyɑ̈n, kɑ twöj yi en ki gïn, jøg-ɑ lïïbø nud kì øn-ɑ kyeelø. Aryeere kinni, “Cimcön! Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bï kömí!” De Cimcön thøll ɑ́cödde kì bɑ̈dde de ce cödd-ɑ kor." 
Judges16:13 Aköbbii yi Delïlɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ nudd yɑ ceg kɑ tugø yi yïn, yïde ɑ pɑ köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër. Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ cuggi twöji yïn.” Alögge kinni, “Keløg ɑkɑ̈ddi yëyyɑ ɑ́bïryew ódøg yi yïn kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ ge mɑɑg ri loodh lɑ̈nhi korø, kɑ gur piny ki pijø, yɑ ceg-ɑ gwøg yɑ nyøødh ni dhɑnhø yøw.”" 
Judges16:14 Codhe, kɑ thɑb yi Delïlɑ̀, ɑnene. Kɑ ɑkɑ̈ddi yëyye ɑ́bïryew døge ri loodh lɑ̈nhi korø, kɑ gø gure piny ki pijø. Aryeere kinni, “Cimcön! Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bï kömí!” Acyëwe, kɑ yëyye tëële wɑ̈g kì ri pijø," 
Judges16:15 Kɑ köbbi yi en kinni, “Yï ókööbø kinni yɑ mɑɑr yi yïn kidï, keløg yɑ pɑ gɑ̈n yi yïn? Ágöög ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g yi men, yɑ pɑ nyudhí gïn-ɑ mëggi yïn teng-ɑ dwøng cɑrø.”" 
Judges16:16 Kɑ nyi pyënyi yi en yethi cyɑ̈ng e okøørø yi en. Anyönhi pyëwe yi køørɑni. 
Judges16:17 Kì cyɑ̈n cyee, ɑköbbii yi en ki dyër kinni, “Yëyyɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø lyelø, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ ɑthyeey Jwøk kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yɑn. Keløg yëyyɑ olyelø, tegø men-ɑ riɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø, kɑ yɑ ogöögø yɑ nyøødh ni dhɑnhø yøw.”" 
Judges16:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Delïlɑ̀ kinni møg-ɑ pyëwe ɑ́kwøbe bënn, ɑöde yï rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni, “Bïu cyee, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́köbbe møg-ɑ pyëwe bënn.” Abëën rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ yïe ki ngyëny kì cinggi gen." 
Judges16:19 Kɑ Cimcön thɑb yi Delïlɑ̀, ɑnene wïje thɑ̈ɑ̈nh en kömi tyelli nyɑnɑni. Acwödde ki jɑl me lyëël ɑkɑ̈ddi yëyye wɑ̈g gɑ ɑ́bïryew kì wïje. Alɑ̈ɑ̈ny tege kɑ ónyönhø." 
Judges16:20 Codhe, ɑryeer Delïlɑ̀ kinni, “Cimcön! Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bï kömí!” Acyëwe, e orumø i nɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng. De kwïj yi en kinni ówiy piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Judges16:21 Amɑgii yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ nyinge lööl wɑ̈g, ɑkïdhii Gɑdhɑ̀, kɑ twöj ki ɑ́cwecwelli dilɑl. Amëggii gwøøg gur ki byel kì ød mɑg." 
Judges16:22 De yëyyi wïje ɑ́kedh ge ócɑ̈gø ki twïyø, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum gen ki lyelø." 
Judges16:23 Acugi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ kipe tugø, kí nëngi Dɑgön jwøøg gen ki gëdhh-ɑ døngø, ge owörø kinni, “Jwøgee wɑ ɑ́thödhe ki tegø men-ɑ ɑ́tyɑm wɑ Cimcön ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø.”" 
Judges16:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi teenɑni, ɑmɑlli gen jwøøg gen ge okööbø kinni, “Jwøgee ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́cïbe cinggee, eni ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø men-ɑ ɑ́ryɑ̈g pödhee, kɑ ónɑ̈gø kì kellee ki ji mø gïïr.”" 
Judges16:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́mïni pëthi gen, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu Cimcön keny, o cönge kì bølee.” Codhe, kɑ Cimcön pëëj kì ød mɑg, kɑ ocöngø kì bøli gen." 
Judges16:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cuungii kì kɑɑm mënhhì, ɑköbbe nyelthinh men-ɑ ɑ́pyejjii kì cinge kinni, “Cïb yɑn keny-ɑ di mënhh-ɑ mïdhi kengø, o ge nywɑlɑ, o riɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ri gen.”" 
Judges16:27 Yij kengø ɑ́bëëd e pɑ̈ng yi dhɑnhø bëne, jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn. Rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn gɑ ɑ́bïj ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni, wïj óthɑɑng kengø mɑl ɑ́dɑ ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, ge nenn-ɑ Cimcön kɑ̀ cöönge." 
Judges16:28 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjji yi Cimcön kinni, “Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pɑr yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, thödhí yɑn ki tegø tyelø ɑ́kyel yøw, o kej nyingɑ colɑ ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
Judges16:29 Amɑge mënhì ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ dïkengø, ɑ ri gen cungi yi kengø, ɑ́kyel ɑ́mɑge ki cingi kyëje, kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø mɑge ki cingi cɑɑme, ɑdhure gïn," 
Judges16:30 kɑ óryeerø kinni, “Wiy yɑ thøwɑ wøki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀!” Kɑ gï dhure ki tege bëne, kɑ kengø pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ geki ji bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́ying yije. Ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Cimcön kì ri thøwe gïïr kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi en keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e onëënø." 
Judges16:31 Abëën nyiimen geki tyëng gøl gen, ɑkɑ̈l ge gøn, kɑ gø kony gen kì kɑɑm Dhorɑ̀ geki Ectɑol kì buti röri wïye Mɑnowɑ̀. Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑg yi en kɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
Judges17:1 Ádɑ jɑl megø me cwøl ɑ́ Miikɑ̀, jɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ myërri kïtti Eprɑim." 
Judges17:2 Kɑ meye köbbe kinni, “Átuggi ɑ́tegg møgí gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel møg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑl kì yïí, kɑ yï olɑ̈mø, kinni ngɑn-ɑ kwɑɑl gen óyïddi ki cyën, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ olïngø keny-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m. Yɑn ɑ ɑ́kwɑny gen, ge nud kì yïɑ!” Akööb meye kinni, “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑ̈dɑ!”" 
Judges17:3 Adögge ɑ́teggɑni meye, kɑ meye okööbø kinni, “Áteggɑni bënn ɑ́thyëyɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kipe kinni o cyënnɑni cög ge pɑ pɑ̈dhi kömi wɑ̈dɑ. Ógöög ki ngïji mɑ yɑdh, o mwøn ki ɑ́tegø. De ɑnɑn ɑ́tuggi ɑ́teggɑni döggɑ’ yïn.”" 
Judges17:4 Kɑ gï dögge meye. Akɑ̈bbi meye ki ɑ́tuggi ɑ́tegg miy ɑ́ryew, kɑ gï mëgge bødhø, kɑ ogöögø ki ngïji mɑ yɑdh, ɑmwønii ki ɑ́tegø. Acïbii ød kì gøl Miikɑ̀." 
Judges17:5 Miikɑ̀, yïe ɑ́dɑ ød Jwøk. Kɑ ogöögø ki ngïjji geki pɑri kwër, kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈dde gwøge ɑ́ ókwërø." 
Judges17:6 Ábëëd e bong rɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil kì bøli kenyɑni, dhɑnhø bëne ɑ́göög-ɑ wïje ni kɑ̀ dwɑdde gøn." 
Judges17:7 Kì bøli kenyɑni, ɑ́dɑ nyelɑwøb me bɑ Kwɑɑr Leebì, me bëëdø kì Betleem kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Judges17:8 Adhwödh nyelɑni kì Betleem, kɑ kedh-ɑ be yɑb ki kej bëëdø megø. Kɑ töng-ɑ gøl Miikɑ̀ kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim." 
Judges17:9 Apyëjii yi Miikɑ̀ kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Leebì kì Betleem kì Yeudiyɑ̀, yɑ ceg-ɑ yɑb ki kej bëëdø.”" 
Judges17:10 Aköbbii yi Miikɑ̀ kinni, “Bëëd kì butɑ, o yɑ nyi cïj yi yïn, o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ ókwërɑ, o yï nyi thödhɑ ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø kì yij run, kí ógudh geki gïgcɑmmí.”" 
Judges17:11 Ayïëy wɑ̈d gøl Leebì menɑni ki bëëdø kì buti Miikɑ̀, kɑ ogöögø e nɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈dde." 
Judges17:12 Akwëër wɑ̈d gøl Leebì yi Miikɑ̀, kɑ ogöögø ki ókwërø kipere, ɑbëëde kì gøl Miikɑ̀." 
Judges17:13 Akööb Miikɑ̀ kinni, “Anɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́gögge ki gïndøj, mɑ́ ókwërɑ bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Leebì.”" 
Judges18:1 Kì bøli kenyɑni, ɑ́bëëd e bong rɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil. Tyëng gøl Dɑn, ɑ́bëëd kì kenyɑni ge oyɑ̈bø ki piny me yije pëggi yi gen, mɑ́ yï gen ɑ́bong-ɑ piny mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen ni kɑ̈lli Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Judges18:2 Aödi gøl Dɑn wɑ̈g ki jøg ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ teg kì dhøggi kɑ̈lli gen bënn kì Dhorɑ̀ geki Ectɑol, kipe kinni o ge kedhi gen be lyewwi piny. Aköbbi jøgɑni kinni, “Kedh wun, lyeewu piny!” Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen, ɑwɑ̈dhi gen myërri kïtti Eprɑim ɑpëggi gen gøl Miikɑ̀." 
Judges18:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying gen kenyɑni, ɑngij gen nyelɑwøb men-ɑ bɑ Kwɑɑr Leebì kì ri kwøbbe. Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn keny? Á gïn ɑ gwøg yi yïn kì keny?”" 
Judges18:4 Alögge kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kïr yi Miikɑ̀ ki ngyëny o yɑ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ ókwëre.”" 
Judges18:5 Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Døj, pyëj Jwøk o yod yi wøn, men-ɑ óyod wøn gïn-ɑ pere cɑɑdh yi wøn.”" 
Judges18:6 Alöggi ókwërø kinni, “Kedh wun ki mër, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócyɑ̈dhø kì bøli wun.”" 
Judges18:7 Codhe, ɑdhwödh jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́bïj, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Lɑic. Alidh gen ji-ɑ bëëdø kì kunɑni kinni ge bëëdø wɑ̈thi gen kïïdhø, ni bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi tyëng Sïdön. Ge bɑ tyëngmër; ji mø ngɑ̈ny bëëdø, yï gen bong wëërø ki ngɑn megø. Yï gen dɑ jɑmmì bënn møg-ɑ dwɑddi kipe bëëdi gen. Ge bëëd ge lɑ̈wi ki tyëng Sïdön. Bong gïjø me reb gen ki ji møøgø." 
Judges18:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög jøg ɑ́bïj Dhorɑ̀ geki Ectɑol, ɑpyëëj gen yi tyëng pödhi gen kinni, “Wu ɑ́yod-ɑ ngø?”" 
Judges18:9 Alöggi gen kinni, “Bïu, kedhi wɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Lɑic! Piny ɑ́rum ki lidhø yi wøn kinni døøj cɑrø. Wu ko wɑ̈dhi bëëdø yøw! Pyew wun, kedhu be kwɑnyi pinyɑni." 
Judges18:10 Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi wun kunɑni, ji óyuud yi wun wɑ̈thi gen kïïdhø. Bɑ pödhø me dwøng; me bong gïn cɑn kì yije.”" 
Judges18:11 Codhe, kɑ jøliny miy ɑ́bïkyel kì gøl Dɑn, kì Dhorɑ̀ geki Ectɑol kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg." 
Judges18:12 Agur gen kemmi gen piny kì kö yöö kì buti Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm kì Yeudiyɑ̀. Bene ɑ pere cwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Dɑn gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn. 
Judges18:13 Apöödh gen ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ gøl Miikɑ̀, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim." 
Judges18:14 Kɑ jøg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi be lyeewi piny Lɑic, nyiimï gen köbbi gen kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni dɑ ød ɑ́kyel kì kelli udd-ɑcɑ̀ me yije di ngïji yɑdh men-ɑ ómwønø ki ɑ́tegø? Thyew dɑ ngïjjì møøgø kí pɑri kwër. Á ngø ɑ ceg ki gwøgø yi wɑ?”" 
Judges18:15 Kɑ ri gen løg gen ge töng-ɑ gøl Miikɑ̀ keny-ɑ yije bëëd yi nyelɑwøb men-ɑ bɑ Kwɑɑr Leebì, kɑ mɑ̈dh gen ki mër." 
Judges18:16 Kɑ jøliny miy ɑ́bïkyel, jø gøl Dɑn ócungø ki jɑmmi nyɑɑg mø gen kì dhøg kɑl." 
Judges18:17 Akedhi jøg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ɑ́lyeew piny ød, kɑ ngïjji yɑdh men-ɑ ómwønø ki ɑ́tegø, kí ngïjji jwögg-ɑ kyeelø kwɑny yi gen, kí pɑri kwër, e ókwërø geki jøliny miy ɑ́bïkyel, ge ócungø kì dhøg kɑl." 
Judges18:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi jøgɑni ød Miikɑ̀, kɑ jɑmmi kwër kwɑny gen, kɑ ge ɑ́pyëj yi ókwërø kinni, “Á gïn ɑ gwøg yi wun ni men?”" 
Judges18:19 Alöggi gen kinni, “Kud! Mij dhøgí, yï ko pɑ̈nyi kwøb. Bïí kedh wɑ, o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ ókwëri wøn, o wø nyi cïj yi yïn. Pɑ lɑ̈w keløg yï di gögg-ɑ kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil yïn ɑ́ ókwërø, kibøli bëëdí yïn ɑ́ ókwëri dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel?”" 
Judges18:20 Kɑ ókwërø pyëwe ómïnø. Akwɑnye jɑmmi kwër kɑ ókedhø ki gen. 
Judges18:21 Aløg gen ri gen, kɑ ge ókedhø kí nyigi gen, kí jɑmmi gen, kí dhögi gen ge okwøllø kì bøli gen." 
Judges18:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kun me lɑ̈wi ki gøl Miikɑ̀, kɑ jøg-ɑ myërr-ɑ buti gøl Miikɑ̀ ri gen cwøøl gen kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ ge reng-ɑ bɑng jø gøl Dɑn." 
Judges18:23 Aryeer gen ge ócwöddø kì bɑng gen, ɑlug jø gøl Dɑn ri gen, kɑ Miikɑ̀ pyëj gen kinni, “Yɑy men ɑ́ mi ngø?”" 
Judges18:24 Alöggi Miikɑ̀ kinni, “Jwögg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi wun, kí ókwërɑ, kɑ wu ókedhø! Á gïn ɑ ɑ́döng kì yïɑ?”" 
Judges18:25 De jø gøl Dɑn ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yï ko cigi ryeerø këti, kipe ji-ɑ pëthi gen kej ótöngi rií, kɑ wëyí kí wëyi tyëng gølí bënn lɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi gen.”" 
Judges18:26 Codhe, ɑkedh jø gøl Dɑn kì wɑ̈yi gen, kɑ Miikɑ̀ dwöög-ɑ pɑc keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïn kinni ge teg kibøle." 
Judges18:27 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum jwøøg Miikɑ̀ ki kwɑnyø yi jø gøl Dɑn, ɑpödhi gen kömi tyëng Lɑic, ji møg-ɑ lebbi gen bong orøg, ɑ kwïj pyed. Anɑ̈g gen ji, kɑ kɑɑl rɑ̈b gen." 
Judges18:28 Ge nuti yielø, mɑ́ ge bëëdø ge lɑ̈wi ki tyëng Sïdön, o kɑɑm gen bong gïjø me reb gen ki dhɑnhø megø, mɑ́ ge ying-ɑ yij tör kì Betreköb. Kɑ kɑɑlɑni døøg ki gerø yi tyëng gøl Dɑn, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny kì kunɑni." 
Judges18:29 Kɑ kɑɑlɑni cɑg yi gen ki nyingi kweyi gen Dɑn, ɑ bɑ wɑ̈d Yɑgob. Kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd cøn e cwøl ɑ́ Lɑic." 
Judges18:30 Kɑ ngïji cïb piny yi gøl Dɑn, kɑ nyi mɑlli gen, kɑ Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Gercöm wɑ̈d Mosɑ̀ ogöögø ɑ ókwëri gøl Dɑn, kɑ kwɑrre ogöögø gɑ ókwër gïti bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi ji yïnø." 
Judges18:31 Abëëd ngïji men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Miikɑ̀ ki kɑɑmɑni bëne, de kemi Jwøk ɑ́cung ɑ Cilø." 
Judges19:1 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e bong rɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil, ɑ́dɑ jɑl megø mɑ Kwɑɑr Leebì mɑ ɑ́bëëd kì ngɑ̈thi myërri kïtti Eprɑim. Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki dhɑjø kì Betleem kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀," 
Judges19:2 de nyɑnɑni pyëwe ɑ́rënyi ki en, ɑdhwödhe kɑ kedh-ɑ gøl wïye kì Betleem, kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ngwen." 
Judges19:3 Adhwödh jɑlgøle kɑ kedh-ɑ bɑnge be lugii, kinni o dwööge yïe. Ákedh geki bɑ̈nge ki ɑderr ɑ́ryew. Kɑ ge kïdhi ød yi nyɑnɑni kì gøl wïye. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën wïyi nyɑnɑni, ɑmɑ̈dhii kidøøj yi wïyi nyɑnɑni." 
Judges19:4 Ajogii yi wïyi cyëge kɑ obëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g. Ge ɑ́bëëd, o ge ocyɑ̈mø." 
Judges19:5 Kɑ jwɑn-ɑ dhwödhø kì mwøl ceth kì ngween cyɑ̈ng, e dwɑdd-ɑ kedhø. De ɑ́köbbi yi wïyi cyëge kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun møti ki gïncɑm men mɑg wun pëthi wun, o wu ókedh wun cyee.”" 
Judges19:6 Codhe, ɑpëggi jøgɑni piny gɑ ɑ́ryew, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø kì kej ɑ́kyel. Kɑ köbbi yi wïyi nyɑnɑni kinni, “Buddí kì keny, kɑ ko di gïn böggi yi wun.”" 
Judges19:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh Kwɑɑr Leebì kinni o kedhe, ɑjogii yi wïyi cyëge, ɑbëëde kɑ onenø kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
Judges19:8 Kì mwøl ceth, kì ri bïïj cyɑ̈ng, ɑcɑ̈ge ki dhwödhø kinni o di kedhe, ɑköbbii yi wïyi cyëge kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gïncɑm. Bëëd gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi cɑ̈ng dïmɑl.” Codhe, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen gɑ ɑ́ryew kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Judges19:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh jɑlɑni kɑ cyëge kwɑnye geki bɑ̈nge, kinni o ge di kedh gen, ɑkööb wïyi cyëge kinni, “Lidh piny ɑ́göög ɑ́ böörø. Nin wun, wøw ɑ́yuudh. Mïdhu ri wun ki medi pëthi wun. Wu ódhwödh dhuki kì mwøl piny nuti tɑ̈rø, o wu kedhu pödhi wun.”" 
Judges19:10 De jɑlɑni ɑ́bɑ̈nyi nïnni kɑɑlɑni, ɑdhwödhe kɑ ókedhø, ɑwɑ̈dhe bøli Yebus ɑ løg Yerusɑlem, ki ɑderre gɑ ɑ́ryew kömi gen dɑ sïrïj kí jɑmmì, kí cyëge nyɑn-ɑ bɑ ɑkwɑny." 
Judges19:11 Ge ɑ́wɑ̈dhi bøli Yebus, wøw kedh e óyuudhø, kɑ bɑ̈ng wɑ̈n köbbe kinni, “Töngi wɑ kɑɑl tyëng Yebus, o wɑ buddi wɑ gïti mwøl?”" 
Judges19:12 Alöggi wɑ̈n kinni, “Wɑ pɑ töngi kɑɑl tyëngpɑth, pödhi wɑ bølee, wɑ óbuddi kì Gibeɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ Rɑmɑ̀.”" 
Judges19:13  
Judges19:14 Codhe, ɑpöödh gen, ɑbuddi cɑ̈ng ge ying-ɑ bøli Gibeɑ̀ kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Judges19:15 Atöngi gen Gibeɑ̀ kinni, o ge buddi gen gïti mwøl, ɑpëggi gen ódɑ̈ri kɑɑl, de bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen gøle." 
Judges19:16 Kì thyënhø, ɑbëën jɑldwøng mɑ yu, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pwödhe. Jɑlɑni bɑ jɑl myërri kïtti Eprɑim, de ying-ɑ Gibeɑ̀, o tyëng kɑɑlɑni bɑ tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Judges19:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe wëll kì ódɑ̈ri kɑɑl, ɑpëjje kinni, “Yï kedh-ɑ keny? O yï bï yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun?”" 
Judges19:18 Alöggi Kwɑɑr Leebì kinni, “Wø ɑ́ying-ɑ Betleem kì Yeudiyɑ̀, de ɑnɑn wø kedh-ɑ ngɑ̈thi myërri kïtti Eprɑim kun-ɑ bëëdɑ, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cwøøl wøn gøle." 
Judges19:19 Yï wøn dɑ ópun kí møgi oløg kiperɑ wøki cyëgɑ kí bɑ̈ngɑ, o dɑ luum ɑderri wøn. Bong gïn dwɑddi yi wøn, jɑldwøng.”" 
Judges19:20 Aköbbi gen yi jɑldwøngɑni kinni, “Bïu gølɑ, wu ónëngi yi yɑn ki gïn-ɑ ódwɑddi yi wun. Wu pɑ cuggi buddø kì ódɑ̈ri kɑɑl kì wɑ̈r.”" 
Judges19:21 Codhe, ɑkïdhe gïn gøle, kɑ ɑderri gen nënge ki lum. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki lwøgi tyelli gen, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gïncɑm kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø." 
Judges19:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́mïni pëthi gen kɑ ge owɑ̈jø, ɑbëën jøgi orøg kì kɑɑlɑni, kɑ kɑl tyeg gen. Apwöd gen dhøg kɑl, ge óryeerø ge cwøl-ɑ jɑldwøøng kɑl kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bï gølí wɑ̈g, o niin yi wøn.”" 
Judges19:23 Akedhi jɑldwøøng kɑl wɑ̈g yï gen, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Pɑth, køkødh nyiimïɑ, wu ko göög ki gïnrɑj ni men, wëlø menɑni bëëd ɑ tïbɑ. Ayɑ̈r ni men ko gwøg wun." 
Judges19:24 Lïdhi wun, nyɑrɑ èn bɑ jùr geki cyëge. Ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g yï wun, o ge ócuggø göggø yi wun ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun. De jɑɑl ko göggi wun ki ɑyɑ̈r ni menɑni.”" 
Judges19:25 De kwøbbe ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngø yi jøgɑni. Codhe, kɑ jɑlɑni ɑkwɑnye öre wɑ̈g yï jøgɑni, kɑ mød yi gen, ɑtyëg gen wɑ̈r e oniin yi gen, kɑ gø wiy gen kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Judges19:26 Kì mwøl cɑ̈ng nuti tuulø, ɑbëën nyɑnɑni, kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì dhø tëëd øn-ɑ di jɑlgøle kì gøl jɑldwøngɑni. Abuude kì kenyɑni gïti kɑ ɑ́tɑ̈ri piny." 
Judges19:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh jɑlgøle kì mwøl, kɑ ød yiebe kinni o di cïme yuue, ɑyode cyëge e obuddø kì dhøg ød, cingge rïïj en kì wïj tëd." 
Judges19:28 Aköbbe gøn kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl, o wɑ kedh wɑ.” De nuti pɑ̈nyi löggø, ɑcïbe gøn kömi ɑdere, kɑ kedh-ɑ pödhi gen." 
Judges19:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe gøle, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki pɑlø, kɑ ɑkwɑnye ngølle ki cue bënn, ɑ́ ɑ́tug pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Kɑ kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, kì myërri gen gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew öde, gøl öre’ ɑ́tunge." 
Judges19:30 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lidhii bënn, okööbø kinni, “Gïn ni men nuti pɑ̈nyø’ lidhø, wɑlɑ̀ nuti pɑ̈nyø’ gwøgø kì Isrɑil, kër-ɑ ɑ́dhwönhi Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp.” Akööb gen kinni, “Kwøbbɑni ceg kɑ lidhø yi wɑ, dɑ́ ngø ɑ gwøg?”" 
Judges20:1 Tyëng Isrɑil, ɑ́bï wɑ̈g, cɑg kì Dɑn gïti Bircebɑ̀, kí myërri Gilyɑd, ɑrëbi gen bënn, kɑ ri gen cøng gen kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Midhpɑ̀." 
Judges20:2 Jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn, ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì keny-ɑ ɑ́cugi jii Jwøk, ɑ́dɑ jøliny tyel mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ngwen." 
Judges20:3 Alïng tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kinni tyëng Isrɑil ri gen cøng gen Midhpɑ̀. Apëjji tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Köbbu wøn, orøng-ɑ rɑɑj cɑrø èn, ɑ́cwöb-ɑ dï?”" 
Judges20:4 Akööb Kwɑɑr Leebì, jɑlgøl nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kinni, “Yɑn wøki cyëgɑ, wø ɑ́töngi Gibeɑ̀ kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn, kinni o wø nïnni wøn yije." 
Judges20:5 Adhwönhi jø Gibeɑ̀ bɑngɑ kì wɑ̈r, ɑtyeg gen gøl-ɑ́ yije ɑ́di yɑn, ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn, kɑ cyëgɑ mød yi gen, kɑ othøø." 
Judges20:6 Akwɑnyɑ cyëgɑ kɑ ngøllɑ ɑ́ ɑ́tug, kɑ ɑ́tuug ɑ́kyel ör-ɑ kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kipe kinni o yod kinni, jiɑni ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj ki mendwøng kì Isrɑil." 
Judges20:7 Anɑn, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil løøgu kwøbbɑni.”" 
Judges20:8 Adhwödhi tyëng Isrɑil mɑl bënn, kɑ ge ólöggø ki dhøg ɑ́kyel kinni, “Bong ngɑn kedhi gøle kì kellee." 
Judges20:9 De gïn-ɑ nud, ɑ ógöggi wɑ tyëng Gibeɑ̀ bɑ kinni, wɑ ólëngø ki wél, kipe yienyi ji-ɑ ókedhi be liny." 
Judges20:10 Ji pyɑ̈rø ókwɑny yi wɑ kì ri miyø kì wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, kipe kinni o ge thödhi gen yɑy ki gïgcɑmm, o ji-ɑ kyeelø ókedhi be nyɑɑg Gibeɑ̀ ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn, o ge göggi ki gïnrɑj, kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen kì Isrɑil.”" 
Judges20:11 Codhe, ɑcøng Isrɑil ree bëne, kɑ ge órëbø kipe nyɑɑg ki kɑɑlɑni." 
Judges20:12 Aödi tyëng Isrɑil myërri Ben Yɑmïn bëne ki ji, mø pyëj gen kinni, “Wude ɑ göög wun ki gïnrɑj ni men?" 
Judges20:13 Mëggu wøn jø Gibeɑ̀ o ge nɑ̈g yi wøn, kipe kinni o gïnrɑj men-ɑ kömi Isrɑil lɑ̈ɑ̈nye.” De kwøbbi tyëng Isrɑil nuti lïngø yi tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Judges20:14 Codhe, kɑ tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn ri gen cøng gen, kì kɑ̈ddi gen, ɑbëën gen Gibeɑ̀ kipe kinni o ge nyïɑ̈ggi gen ki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Judges20:15 Ge ɑ́yïëëny kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ki jøliny mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïkyel kì kɑ̈ddi gøl Ben Yɑmïn. Tyëng Gibeɑ̀ ɑ́yïëëny thyew ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́bïryew, ge bɑ cyɑ̈mm bënn. Jøgɑni pɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈jø ki lelli bɑ̈ɑ̈di, gïn-ɑ bɑ̈l yi gen cɑgg ɑ́ yëyø, pɑ nyi bɑj yi gen." 
Judges20:16  
Judges20:17 Tyëng Isrɑil kì wɑ̈yi gen e gøl Ben Yɑmïn tøøk, ɑ́cung ki jøliny ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ngwen, ge bɑ jöddi liny bënn." 
Judges20:18 Akedhi tyëng Isrɑil Betiil, kɑ Jwøk pyëj yi gen, ge okööbø kinni, “Á gøl-ɑ́ kì kelli kɑ̈lli wøn, ɑ ókwöngi ki kedhi be nyɑɑg ki tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn?” Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ ókwöngi ki kedhø.”" 
Judges20:19 Dhuki kì mwøl, ɑdhwödh tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ kɑɑl gen gur gen buti Gibeɑ̀." 
Judges20:20 Akedhi tyëng Isrɑil be nyɑɑg ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kɑ liny cïmmi gen ge nenn-ɑ kɑɑlɑni." 
Judges20:21 Abëën gøl Ben Yɑmïn wɑ̈g kì Gibeɑ̀, kɑ ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew odöngø kì piny ge thøø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil dicyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Judges20:22 Akedhi tyëng Isrɑil kej mɑ̈ddø, kɑ ge óywöngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti böörø. Apyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen kinni, “Kedhi wøn be nyɑɑg këti ki nyiimï wøn, gøl Ben Yɑmïn?” Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh wun, nyïɑ̈ggi wun ki gen.” Atëngi pëthi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ liny gen kedh-ɑ wïj këër tyeli mɑl." 
Judges20:23  
Judges20:24 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil liny gen kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn kì ryeew cyɑ̈ng. 
Judges20:25 Kì ryeew cyɑ̈ng menɑni, ɑdøøg liny gøl Ben Yɑmïn ki bëën wɑ̈g kì Gibeɑ̀, kɑ ge ónɑ̈ggø këti ki jii Isrɑil mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, ge bɑ jöddi liny bënn." 
Judges20:26 Akedhi tyëng Isrɑil bënn Betiil, ɑpëggi gen be ywøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ri gen twöön gen ki gïncɑm dicyɑ̈ngɑni, gïti böörø. Anëngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen ki gënhi mër, geki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Judges20:27 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ kenyɑni. Apyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi tyëng Isrɑil," 
Judges20:28 kinni, “Kedhi wøn be nyɑɑg këti ki nyiimï wøn, gøl Ben Yɑmïn, wɑlɑ̀ wø ko kedh?” Pineɑs wɑ̈d Eliɑdhɑr Kwɑɑr Aɑron, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd e bɑ ókwërø. Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh wun! Mɑ́ dhuki kì mwøl ge ócïb yi yɑn cinggi wun.”" 
Judges20:29 Codhe, kɑ jø Isrɑil ókɑ̈bbø ki jøg mø lïïbø kì tøggi Gibeɑ̀ bëne." 
Judges20:30 Akedhi tyëng Isrɑil be nyɑɑg ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ ge ogudø ge rwöm ki Gibeɑ̀ ni tyeli mɑl." 
Judges20:31 Kɑ gøl Ben Yɑmïn bï-ɑ wɑ̈g be liny. Acɑ̈gi gen ki nɑ̈g ki jii Isrɑil ni tyeli mɑl kì yij thwørø, kí kö yuu-ɑ kedhi Betiil geki kö yuu-ɑ kyeelø men-ɑ kedhi Gibeɑ̀. Ji gïn ni pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges20:32 Tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́bëëd ge rømm-ɑ kinni, ge ótyɑ̈mø, ni tyeli mɑl. De tyëng Isrɑil rummi gen ɑ́reb gen kinni, “Rengi wɑ liny wɑ̈g kì buti kɑɑl, o ge pönhi gen wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, ge rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑngee.”" 
Judges20:33 Kɑ liny wøøg cyɑ̈n yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn, ɑreb liny ree kì Bɑɑl Tɑmɑr, kɑ jøg-ɑ lïïbø kì tøggi Gibeɑ̀ pönh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ni yi gen." 
Judges20:34 Kɑ jø Isrɑil ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny kì kelli Isrɑil bëne pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Gibeɑ̀. Anyïɑ̈ggi liny ki nyɑɑg me teeg. Tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́bëëd ge kwïj wøw kinni ryɑ̈g pɑ̈dhi kömi gen. 
Judges20:35 Isrɑil ɑ́thödhi ki tegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gøl Ben Yɑmïn cyedde. Anɑ̈ggi tyëng Isrɑil ki ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj kí miyø ɑ́kyel, kì kelli tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ge bɑ jöddi liny bënn." 
Judges20:36 Alidhii yi gøl Ben Yɑmïn kinni ge ɑ́tyɑm. Liny Isrɑil bëne ree ɑ́wøøge cyɑ̈n kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge gɑ̈nn-ɑ lïbbi gen møg-ɑ tøggi Gibeɑ̀." 
Judges20:37 Apɑ̈ɑ̈r lïbbɑni kömi Gibeɑ̀, kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ tɑɑy kelli Gibeɑ̀, kɑ ji bënn, nɑ̈g yi gen kì kɑɑl." 
Judges20:38 Liny Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd e rum nywɑ̈g ki kwøbbi ngïji. Kinni keny-ɑ óliidh yïrø me dwøng me töngi mɑl ɑ́ pøølø kì kɑɑl," 
Judges20:39 liny Isrɑil bëne men-ɑ wïj kër ree óluge. Tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki nɑ̈ggø ki ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, ɑrum gen kinni, ge ótyɑ̈mø ni liny tyeli mɑl." 
Judges20:40 De ngïji ɑ́cwöb; yïrø mɑ pøølø ɑ́töngi mɑl kì kɑɑl. Alïïdh tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn ngɑ̈thi gen, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø kɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l lebbi mɑc mɑl kì kɑɑl bëne." 
Judges20:41 Alug tyëng Isrɑil ri gen, kɑ tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn mɑg yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, mɑ́ e ɑ́yod yi gen kinni ryɑ̈g ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi gen." 
Judges20:42 Arengi gen kì bøli Isrɑil, ge reng-ɑ yij piny mɑ ryɑng, de ge nuti bodhø. Ge ɑ́tum kej ɑ́kyel yi liny Isrɑil men-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì wïj kër, kí men-ɑ ɑ́bï e dwöög ɑ kɑɑl, kɑ ge nɑ̈g." 
Judges20:43 Tyëng Isrɑil, gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́tyeeg gen kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø wïyø ki cyeddi gen, gïti Gibeɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, mø gïïr kì kelli gen ɑ́nɑ̈g yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges20:44 Jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn møg-ɑ teg, mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g ɑ́nɑ̈g yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Judges20:45 Aløg kwï gen ri gen kɑ ge reng-ɑ piny-ɑ bɑ ryɑng kì kuni Kïti Rimön. Anɑ̈ɑ̈g ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj kì kelli gen. Adhɑ̈li tyëng Isrɑil ki wïyø cyeddi gen, ɑwɑ̈dhi gen Gïdöm, kɑ ge ónɑ̈gø ki ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew." 
Judges20:46 Kwɑnni tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g dicyɑ̈ngɑni, bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, ge bënn ge bɑ jønyɑɑg mø teg." 
Judges20:47 De jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel ɑ́bodh; ge ɑ́rengi myërri yij ryɑng men-ɑ kuni Kïti Rimön, kɑ ge obëëdø ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ngwen kì kunɑni." 
Judges20:48 Adøøg tyëng Isrɑil yï tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kɑ kwï møg-ɑ ɑ́döng nɑ̈g yi gen, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí dhög, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi gen. Kɑ jɑmmì bënn rɑ̈b gen geki kɑ̈dd bënn." 
Judges21:1 Jø Isrɑil ɑ́köngi kì Midhpɑ̀ kinni, “Bong dhɑnhø kì kellee men-ɑ ówëggi nyɑre nywømø yi jɑl gøl Ben Yɑmïn.”" 
Judges21:2 Akedhi ji Betiil, ɑbëëd gen kì kunɑni kì bøli Jwøk gïti böörø." 
Judges21:3 Aryeer gen, ge óywöngø kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ede gïn ni men ɑ cwöbe kì Isrɑil? Ede kɑl ɑ́kyel ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dh wïje dicyɑ̈ngtïn kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil?”" 
Judges21:4 Dhuki kì mwøl, ɑgeer këli lɑm kenyɑni yi ji, ɑmuuj gen ki gënhi mër, kí gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
Judges21:5 Apëjji tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Dɑ kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈llì me nuti bëën bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Midhpɑ̀ keny?” (Mɑ́ ge ɑ́köngi kinni dhɑnhø men-ɑ pɑ kedhi Midhpɑ̀ bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø.)" 
Judges21:6 Kì kenyɑni ceth, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil yethi gen óywöngø kipe nyiimï gen, tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Kɑl ɑ́kyel wïje ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Judges21:7 Á gïn ɑ ógwøg o ge yïddi gen ki mɑ̈nn? Wɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, bong nyigee møg-ɑ ówëggi wɑ nywømø yi gøl Ben Yɑmïn.”" 
Judges21:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pëjji gen mɑ di kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil me nuti bëën kej buri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Midhpɑ̀, ɑyodii yi gen kì kej burø kinni bong dhɑnhø me nud ɑ́ ngeti Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd." 
Judges21:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑm liny, ɑyodii yi gen kinni bong jɑl Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd me nud kì yij burø kì kenyɑni." 
Judges21:10 Codhe, kɑ jønyɑɑg mø teg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ör yi burø, kɑ ge ceg yi burɑni kinni, “Kedh wun, nɑ̈gu tyëng Yɑbic bënn jøg-ɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø." 
Judges21:11 Nɑ̈gu jøg-ɑ cwøw bënn kí mɑ̈nn-ɑ rumø niin yi cwøw.” 
Judges21:12 Kɑ ge óyïddø ki wojur mø nuti nywɑlø yi cwøw, mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen kì kelli tyëng Yɑbic, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l gen Cilø kì piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Judges21:13 Kɑ burø bëne oödø ki wöödø mi mër, e öd-ɑ yï jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn kì Kïti Rimön, kinni liny ɑ́rum." 
Judges21:14 Codhe, ɑdwöög jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn pɑc, ɑmëggi gen wojurri Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd møg-ɑ ɑ́wiy ge nuti nɑ̈gø. De kwɑnni wojurɑni nuti rømi ri gen, mɑ́ ge nøg." 
Judges21:15 Aywöngi yethi ji kipe gøl Ben Yɑmïn, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil ɑ́cïbe ki kew." 
Judges21:16 Akööb jøgdøngi burø kinni, “Göög wɑ kidï kipe kinni o ji møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti yïddø ki mɑ̈nn kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn yïddi gen? Mɑ́ mɑ̈nni gen bënn ɑ́nɑ̈g." 
Judges21:17 Kipe kinni o wïj kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈llì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew cöge e pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, yɑ̈ɑ̈b wɑ ki yöö me tïng wïj gøl Ben Yɑmïn," 
Judges21:18 de wɑ pɑ cuggi yïëyø kinni, o nyigee nywøm yi gen, mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø kinni cyën óying kömi dhɑnhø men-ɑ ómëggi nyɑre jɑlø kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn.”" 
Judges21:19 Arum gen kinni “Kwëër cɑ̈gi run ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki gwøgø kì Cilø.” (Cilø ying-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì bøli Betiil, o ying-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì bøli Libnɑ̀, o ying-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì yuu-ɑ kɑɑm Betiil geki Cekïm)." 
Judges21:20 Aköbbi jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn yi gen kinni, “Kedh wun kɑ wu pɑ̈ni wun kì yethi bɑ̈ggi oløg." 
Judges21:21 Kɑ wu nëën wun. Keny-ɑ óbëën womɑ̈nn Cilø kej kwër be cøng, kɑ wu bïu wɑ̈g kì kelli oløg. Kɑ dhɑnhø nyi pödhe be mɑ̈gø ki dhɑjø ki tege, kɑ wu døøgu myërri Ben Yɑmïn." 
Judges21:22 Keløg wëëg gen wɑlɑ̀ nyiimï gen óbï yï wun be gøny, köbbu gen kinni, ‘Wïyu gen wøn, mɑ́ ge nuti kɑbø yi wøn kɑ liny, o yï wun bɑ̈r, mɑ́ nyigi wun nuti cɑɑg wun kɑ mëggi gen.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g kì kelli womɑ̈nn møg-ɑ ɑ́bï ge kedh-ɑ be cøng, ngɑn mɑg-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ dwɑdde, kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn ɑ́ cyëge. Codhe, ɑdøøg gen yethi myërri gen, kɑ kɑ̈ddi gen døøg yi gen ki gerø, ɑpëggi gen piny." 
Judges21:24 Codhe, ɑdhwödh tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ yethi myërri gen." 
Judges21:25 Ábëëd e bong rɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil kì bøli kenyɑni, de dhɑnhø bëne ɑ́göög-ɑ wïje." 
Ruth1:1 Kɑ̈ge dööng kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Isrɑil jɑɑg-ɑ yi jɑgg, ɑ́dɑ kɑ̈j me dwøng kì pönhɑni. Kɑ jɑl megø kì Betleem kì Yeudiyɑ̀, odhwödhø geki cyëge kí wɑ̈dde ɑ́ryew," 
Ruth1:2 kɑ ge dɑ̈g-ɑ pödhi Moɑb. Nyingi jɑlɑni cwøl ɑ́ Elimelek, cyëge cwøl ɑ́ Nɑomì, o wɑ̈dde ryeet cwølli gɑ Mɑklön kí Kilyön. Ge bɑ tyëng gøl Eprɑtɑ̀ kì Betleem, kì Yeudiyɑ̀. Ge ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Moɑb, kɑ ge obëëdø kì Moɑb." 
Ruth1:3 Athøw Elimelek, kɑ Nɑomì odöngø ki wɑ̈dde ryeet." 
Ruth1:4 Kɑ yɑɑgɑni ónyömø ki nyigi Moɑb, ɑ́kyel cwøl ɑ́ Órpɑ̀, o nyɑn-ɑ kyeelø cwøl ɑ́ Ruth. Kɑ ge obëëdø kì pönhɑni ki gïn ni runn pyɑ̈rø." 
Ruth1:5 Codhe, kɑ jøgɑni ryeet Mɑklön ki Kilyön othøø thyew. Adöng ngɑnɑni ɑ́ thwöm kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thøw jɑlgøle kí wɑ̈dde ɑ́ryew bënn." 
Ruth1:6 Kɑ Nɑomì olïngø, e ying-ɑ Moɑb, i Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie pɑɑr en, kɑ gï thödhe ki gïncɑm. Arume ki kwøbbi døøgø." 
Ruth1:7 Adhwödhe geki kwɑrre kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gen, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Ruth1:8 De kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd ge ócyɑ̈dhø kì kö pönhɑni, Nɑomì kwɑrre ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Døg wun; døøg ngɑɑn gøl meye. Wu ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe bëëndøj men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun kì bøli cwøwi wun, kí kɑ ɑ́döng wɑ ketee." 
Ruth1:9 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu nywøm kì kɑ̈llì mø døøj!” Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Døj kedh wun.” Aywöngi mɑ̈nni wɑ̈dde." 
Ruth1:10 Kɑ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Pɑth, wø dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi pödhi wun ceth ki yïn.”" 
Ruth1:11 Alöggi Nɑomì kinni, “Døg wun nyigɑ! Á kipe ngø, ɑ kedh wun ki yɑn? Yɑ ócuggø nywølø ki wɑ̈dd møg døngi, kɑ ge ogöögø ki cwøwi wun?" 
Ruth1:12 Døg wun nyigɑ; mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́yöø, yɑ pɑ cuggi nywømø këti. Cɑgg yɑ kööbø kinni, yɑ ócuggø nywømø, wɑlɑ̀ cɑgg yɑ nywøm tïn kì wɑ̈r, kɑ yɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈dd," 
Ruth1:13 ge ócuggø yïdø yi wun o ge døngi gen? Ri wun mɑ̈ɑ̈n wu nywømø kiper gen? Pöy! Pɑth en, nyigɑ! Pyëwɑ orɑ̈mø ki mendwøng kiper wun, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́ryɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ruth1:14 Adøøg gen ki ywøg. Kɑ Órpɑ̀ wønge mɑ̈dhe, ɑdøøge gøl gen. De Ruth ɑ́mɑ̈gi kì ri wønge." 
Ruth1:15 Akööb Nɑomì kinni, “Liidh, nyɑ̈gí ɑ́døøg yï gøl gen, ɑ́døøg yï jwögge. Kedhí bɑng nyɑ̈gí.”" 
Ruth1:16 De Ruth ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑ ko kwɑjjí kipe wiyi yïn, kinni o yɑ døøgɑ, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ kedh ki yïn. Mɑ́ yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, keny-ɑ ókedhi yi yïn, en ɑ kedhɑ, o keny-ɑ óbëëd yi yïn, en ɑ bëëdɑ, wɑddí bɑ wɑddɑ, o Jwøgí bɑ Jwøgɑ." 
Ruth1:17 Wɑ thøw-ɑ kej ɑ́kyel, o wɑ koony-ɑ kej ɑ́kyel ceth. Yɑ lɑm-ɑ riɑ ɑnɑn kinni, wiy yɑ ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keløg dhøgɑ ódi wilø yi yɑn. Bong gïn dɑ̈ɑ̈ng wɑ den-ɑ́ thøø kete.”" 
Ruth1:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Nɑomì kinni Ruth pɑ yïëy døøgø, ɑwiye møgɑni." 
Ruth1:19 Codhe, ɑkedh gen. Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Betleem. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Betleem, kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni yïthhi gen otyegø bënn; tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn okööbø kinni, “Men bɑ Nɑomì kidyër?”" 
Ruth1:20 Akööb Nɑomì kinni, “Yɑ ko cwølli wun yɑn ɑ́ Nɑomì, cwøllu yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ Mɑrɑ̀, mɑ́ Áyïmø, bëëdɑ ɑ́løge me keej ni kenø." 
Ruth1:21 Yɑ ɑ́kedh köörɑ pɑ̈ng, ɑdwöög yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j èn, ki cinggɑ. Yɑ ócwølli yi wun yɑn ɑ́ Nɑomì kidï, yɑ ɑ́ryɑ̈g yi Áyïmø!”" 
Ruth1:22 Bene dwöng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Nɑomì ɑnɑn kì piny Moɑb, ge ɑ́dwöög kɑ kwɑre, Ruth nyɑɑr Moɑb. Ge ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Betleem kì ri cɑ̈gi nyɑri ceir." 
Ruth2:1 Nɑomì yïe ɑ́dɑ ywöre, ówï Elimelek, mɑ jɑlkɑ̈r me pere teg kì yij pödhi gen, nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Boɑdh." 
Ruth2:2 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, Ruth nyɑɑr Moɑb, Nɑomì ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi yethi pwödh, men-ɑ óyïddɑ ki ngɑn me døj, me wiy yɑn o yɑ gwënɑ kì yij pwödhe ki byel møg-ɑ nyi dyëm kì bɑng jøgwøg.” Alöggi Nɑomì kinni, “Kedh, nyɑrɑ.”" 
Ruth2:3 Codhe, ɑkedhi Ruth yethi pwödh. Kɑ Ruth ogwënø kì yij pwödhø megø, kì bɑng tyëng-ɑ nyɑ̈rø. Áwɑ̈dh-ɑ töngø yøw, de pwödhø ce ying-ɑ pwödhi Boɑdh, jɑl-ɑ bɑ wɑd ki Elimelek." 
Ruth2:4 Abëën Boɑdh, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Betleem. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ göögø mɑ̈dhe kinni, “Wu ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Alöggi gen kinni, “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ruth2:5 Apyëëj jɑngi jøgwøg yi Boɑdh, kinni, “Á nyɑɑr men ɑnɑn?”" 
Ruth2:6 Alöggi jɑngi jøgwøg kinni, “Bɑ nyɑɑr Moɑb men-ɑ ɑ́bï geki Nɑomì keny-ɑ ɑ́dwööge kì Moɑb." 
Ruth2:7 Ákööb kinni, ‘Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy yɑ gwënɑ kì kɑɑm dhøggi ceir, kì bɑng tyëng-ɑ nyɑ̈rø.’ Ying-ɑ kömi tyelle kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëne ɑ́cøøn. Bene kɑle ree ki ywömø ɑnɑn kì tïbø.”" 
Ruth2:8 Aköbbi Ruth yi Boɑdh kinni, “Lïng nyɑrɑ, yï ko kedhi be gwen yij pwödhø megø. Ko di keny kedhi yi yïn, de bëëd kì kelli wo-ɑ gwënø kì pwödhɑ." 
Ruth2:9 Nenní pwönh-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈j yi yɑɑg ceth, kɑ yï lugí kì bɑng gen; mɑ́ ge ɑ́rum ki kyëddø yi yɑn kinni yï ko nyi dhɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen. Kenyi mɑɑg yïn yi röödhø, nyi mɑ̈dhí kì yethi pugg-ɑ nyi tömmi yi gen ki pï.”" 
Ruth2:10 Kɑ Ruth ree bøødhe wïje kuule’ piny kì bøli Boɑdh, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ køny yɑn kinøw, yɑn ɑ́ nyɑɑr jur megø yøw?”" 
Ruth2:11 Alöggi Boɑdh kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köbbi ki gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́göggí wøngí, kër-ɑ ɑ́thøw jɑlgølí, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́wiy wïyí piny geki meyí, kì keny-ɑ yije ɑ́nywøøl yïn, kɑ yï bï-ɑ yï ji mø kwïj yi yïn." 
Ruth2:12 Yï ókøøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe gwøng-ɑ døj ni men. Yï óyïddi ki köögi kì yï Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ́ tïbe ɑ́yömmi yi yïn!”" 
Ruth2:13 Alögge kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí ɑ́køny yi yïn kidøøj jɑldwøng, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ pɑth ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli bɑ̈nggí kidyër yøw!”" 
Ruth2:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej cɑm, ɑköbbii yi Boɑdh kinni, “Bïí keny, o yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m. Kɑ ópun nyi jwɑ̈ɑ̈g yij mulø.” Codhe, ɑpëgge buti jøgwøg. Kɑ nëngi yi Boɑdh ki ópuun jirɑyø. Kɑ Ruth ocyɑ̈mø, gïti kɑ ɑ́yɑ̈nge, kɑ kwï ópune odöngø." 
Ruth2:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøge be gwen këti, kɑ Boɑdh, jøgwøge cege kinni, “Pɑth ki kinni, o nyɑnɑni wiy yi wun gwëne kì bɑng wun kì kɑɑm dhøggi ceir kete," 
Ruth2:16 de nyi rönhu wɑ̈g kì ri dhøg møg-ɑ töjji yi wun, ki kwï thyɑng mø wɑ̈thi gen di byel, kɑ ge nyi wiyu piny, o gï gwene. Kɑ ko nyi cyɑ̈r wun.”" 
Ruth2:17 Kɑ Ruth ogwënø kì yij pwönhɑni gïti böörø. Codhe, ɑtøge møg-ɑ ɑ́gwene. Ceir men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi en, bɑ gïn ni thɑpiyø ɑ́kyel." 
Ruth2:18 Kɑ gø tëëre pɑc. Kɑ ceir men-ɑ ɑ́gwene lidh yi wønge. Kɑ Ruth gïncɑm men-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑnge ɑ́tïni, mëgge wønge." 
Ruth2:19 Apyëjii yi Nɑomì kinni, “Yï ɑ́gwëën ɑ keny dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng? Yï ɑ́göög ɑ keny? Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́køny yïn ógyëdh yi Jwøk!” Aköbbe wønge ngɑn-ɑ́ pwödhe ɑ́gööge, kinni, “Nyingi jɑl-ɑ́ pwödhe ɑ́göögɑ dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, cwøl ɑ́ Boɑdh.”" 
Ruth2:20 Kɑ Nɑomì kwɑre köbbe kinni, “Ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li wïyø ki kønyi tyëngnëënø, kí tyëngthøø thyew.” Kɑ Nɑomì kwɑre löbbe kër-ɑ bëëd jɑlɑni ɑ́ wɑd kinni, “Jɑlɑni, wɑ bɑ wɑdd ki en; bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ cuggi lɑ̈gø.”" 
Ruth2:21 Kɑ Ruth nyɑɑr Moɑb okööbø kinni, “Men-ɑ́ yɑ ɑ́köbbe thyew kinni, ‘Cöög yï ogwënø ki bɑng jøgwøgɑ, gïti keny-ɑ órum jɑmmɑ bënn ki kɑjø.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Kɑ Nɑomì mø kwɑre løøge kinni, “Lɑ̈w nyɑrɑ, keløg yï cyɑ̈dhi kɑ womɑ̈nni pwödhe, kipe yï ódhɑ̈ɑ̈l kì yij pwödhø megø.”" 
Ruth2:23 Codhe, ɑcög Ruth e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ womɑ̈nni pwödhi Boɑdh. Ágwëën kì yethi pwödhhi Boɑdh gïti kɑ ɑ́thumi ceir ki nyɑrø. Kɑ gemè lony ki nyɑrø, kɑ óthumø. Adøøge be rïïjø kì pɑc geki wønge." 
Ruth3:1 Kɑ Ruth köbbi yi wønge cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kinni, “Nyɑrɑ, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ yɑ̈bbi yïn ki jɑlø, kí keny-ɑ yije ócuggi bëëdø pyëwí omedø." 
Ruth3:2 Anɑn yïee dɑ jɑl mɑ wɑd, ɑ løg Boɑdh, jɑl-ɑ́ pwödhe ɑ́gwëën yi yïn, wuki wo-ɑ kyeelø. Ónïn-ɑ yij rɑrø tïn be kwödø ki ceir." 
Ruth3:3 Lwøggí, kɑ yï gïïny, kɑ yï ruggí kidøøj. Codhe, kɑ yï kedhí rɑrø. De rií ko wëggí lidhø yi jɑlɑni gïti keny-ɑ órume ki cɑm." 
Ruth3:4 Okedhe be buddø, kɑ keny-ɑ buude tiid kidøøj. Onene, kɑ rií liib kun-ɑ di en, yɑl tyelle, kɑ yï buddí kì dhøggi tyelle. Yï óköbbe gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en, o gwøg yi yïn.”" 
Ruth3:5 Alöggi Ruth kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bënn, ógwøg yi yɑn.”" 
Ruth3:6 Akedhe rɑrø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgii yi wønge gwøge ceth." 
Ruth3:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Boɑdh ki cɑm kɑ omɑ̈dhø, ɑdhwödhe pyëwe omedø. Kɑ óbuddø kì buti pëm. Codhe, kɑ Ruth ree liibe yïe mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, kɑ tyelli jɑlɑni yɑle, ɑbudde kì dhøggi tyelle." 
Ruth3:8 Kì dïwɑ̈r keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne e ócyëwø ɑpɑ̈ye, kɑ ongɑ̈ngø yi kɑ̀ di ngɑndhɑjø me buud kì dhøggi tyelle!" 
Ruth3:9 Apëjji Boɑdh kinni, “Yï bɑ men?” Alöggi nyɑnɑni kinni, “Yɑ Ruth bɑ̈ngí. Kum yɑn, mɑ́ yï bɑ ywörɑ, men-ɑ cuggi lɑgi yɑn.”" 
Ruth3:10 Kɑ Boɑdh okööbø kinni, “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyɑrɑ! Gïndøj men-ɑ gwøg yi yïn èn, lod-ɑ men-ɑ ɑ́göggí Nɑomì wøngí, mɑ́ yï nuti yɑb ki wøb me di nywøm yïn, ying-ɑ́ wøm kɑ̈rø wɑlɑ̀ me wɑnge cɑn." 
Ruth3:11 Anɑn yï ko böggi nyɑrɑ, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ógöggɑ yïn ceth. Tyëng kɑɑl keny ngɑ̈ny wøw bënn kinni yï bɑ dhɑnhø me døøj." 
Ruth3:12 Yɑ bɑ ywörí kidyër, de dɑ ywörí megø, me cyɑ̈gi ki yïn kibølɑ." 
Ruth3:13 Buddí kì keny. Ólidh yi wɑ kì mwøl, keløg e oyïëyø ki lɑgi yïn, døøj! Wiy yï lɑg yi en. De keløg e pɑ dwɑddi lɑ̈gø, yɑn ɑ köngi èn, ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, yï lɑgɑ’ lɑgø! Buddí, møgɑni ólidh yi wɑ kì mwøl.”" 
Ruth3:14 Codhe, ɑbuude kì dhøggi tyelli jɑlɑni gïti mwøl. Kɑ nyɑnɑni odhwödhø piny nudd e looj. Boɑdh ɑ́rum thyew kinni, “Wiy cöge, e pɑ yod yi ji kinni nyɑnɑni bëën rɑrø.”" 
Ruth3:15 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Pedh lɑní.” Kɑ Ruth lɑne pedhe. Kɑ yij ógødhe rumi yi Boɑdh ki kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew mø ceir, kɑ gï yeeje wïj Ruth. Kɑ Ruth døøg-ɑ kɑɑl." 
Ruth3:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe kɑl, ɑpyëjii yi wønge kinni, “Yï ɑ́göög ɑ dï nyɑrɑ?” Aköbbe gøn gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jɑlɑni bënn kipere." 
Ruth3:17 Akööbe thyew kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́thödhe ki kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew mø ceir, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yï ko døøg yï wøngí ki cinggí.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Akööb Nɑomì kinni, “Nëën, Ruth nyɑrɑ, gïti keny-ɑ óyod wɑ tung-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi yi kwøb, mɑ́ Boɑdh ree pɑ ywöme dicyɑ̈ngtïn, gïti keny-ɑ ótyëge kwøbbɑni.”" 
Ruth4:1 Amøøl Boɑdh dhø döri Betleem, kej burø, kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny. Alunyi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́wɑngi yi Boɑdh, i bɑ en ɑ di lɑ̈gi ki bëënø. Ábï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ tøg burø. Acwølii yi Boɑdh kinni, “Bïí, kɑ yï pëggí piny wɑ̈d wɑ̈ɑ!” Codhe, ɑbëëne kɑ pëgg-ɑ piny." 
Ruth4:2 Kɑ Boɑdh, jøgdøngø pyɑ̈rø cwööle, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Pëggu piny.” Kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny." 
Ruth4:3 Aköbbe ówɑ̈n kinni, “Anɑn Nɑomì ɑ́dwöög kì Moɑb, o dwɑdd-ɑ ngeewi piny Elimelek wɑ̈g." 
Ruth4:4 Yɑ ɑ́rum kinni lɑ̈w ke thërrɑ møgɑni yïn; kwøb dhøgí kì bøli jøg-ɑ bëëdø kì keny èn, kì yij buri jɑggi pödhee. Keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ ngewii, ngeew! De keløg yï pɑ dwɑddi ngewii, köbbí yɑn, o yɑ ngɑ̈nyɑ wøw. Mɑ́ e bong ngɑn cuggi ngyew, den-ɑ́ yïn ceth. O ke bɑɑnyí, bɑ yɑn ɑ ngewii.” Kɑ nyelɑni okööbø kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ ngewii.”" 
Ruth4:5 Kɑ Boɑdh okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ óngeew piny kì yï Nɑomì, kɑ cingi Ruth cï nyel-ɑ ɑ́thøw mɑɑg ceth, o gølɑni cöge wïje pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dh.”" 
Ruth4:6 Akööb nyelɑni kinni, “Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, pinyɑni pɑ cuggi ngewø yi yɑn, jɑmmɑ órënyi. Kejɑ wïyɑ’ yïn, møgɑni pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi yɑn.”" 
Ruth4:7 Ábëëd ɑ́ kwöng kì bøli kenyɑni kì pödhi Isrɑil, kinni ke di gïn lɑg, wɑlɑ̀ gïn ngew, ngɑn-ɑ yïe ngeew gïïpiny, wɑre ɑ́kyel nyi mëgge’ ngɑn-ɑ ngew gïnɑni. Bene gïn-ɑ́ nyi gwøg kì Isrɑil." 
Ruth4:8 Codhe, kɑ jɑl-ɑ di lɑ̈gi, keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe Boɑdh kinni, “Kwɑɑny,” wɑre ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kɑ gø mëgge Boɑdh." 
Ruth4:9 Aköbbi jøgdøngø geki teedø bëne yi Boɑdh kinni, “Álïngi yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni jɑmmi Elimelek, kí mø wɑ̈dde Kilyön geki Mɑklön ɑ́kwɑnyɑ kì yï Nɑomì." 
Ruth4:10 Ruth nyɑɑr Moɑb, cï Mɑklön, kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø thyew ɑ́ dhɑjø, kipe mïdhi nyingi nyel-ɑ ɑ́thøw kì kömi jɑmme. O nyinge cög ge pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì kelli yɑɑg gen, kì pɑɑ gen. Gen ɑ thumi kì bøli wun èn dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
Ruth4:11 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ burø bënn, kí jøg-ɑ jɑgg ólöggø kinni, “Wø ɑ́yïëy, kwɑjji wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee, o ngɑn-ɑ bï gølí ɑnɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈re ki Rɑceel geki Leɑ̀, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tïng gøl Isrɑil! Yï ókɑ̈ri kɑ yï ódøngø kì pɑɑree Eprɑtɑ̀, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Betleem!" 
Ruth4:12 Gølí ógöögø ni gøl Peredh, wɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́nyölli Yeudɑ̀ yi Tɑmɑr, kì bɑng wɑ̈dd-ɑ ómëggi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri nyɑnthinh men.”" 
Ruth4:13 Codhe, ɑlɑɑg Ruth yi Boɑdh, kɑ ge obëëdø ki gøn. Kɑ nëngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhɑnhø, kɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈d." 
Ruth4:14 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, Nɑomì köbbi gen kinni, “Lejji wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ yï nuti twöön en ki ngɑn tïng wïjí! Wiy nyinge ócungi gen ceth kì Isrɑil." 
Ruth4:15 Yï ónënge ki medi pyëw kì yij döng, mɑ́ e ɑ́nywøl-ɑ yi kwɑrí me mɑɑr yïn ki mendwøng, lɑ̈w kibøli wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew møg-ɑ di nywøl yi yïn.”" 
Ruth4:16 Akwɑɑny nyɑgïnthinh yi Nɑomì. Kɑ gø cïbe kööre. Kɑ gø kuune. 
Ruth4:17 Kɑ cɑ̈ggi ki nying yi mɑ̈nni byëëg gen, ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Nɑomì ɑ́nyöddi ki wɑ̈d.” Acɑg ge gøn ɑ́ Obed, en ɑ bɑ wïyi Yesì, Yesì ɑ bɑ wïyi Debïd." 
Ruth4:18 Men bene lwömi gøl Peredh. Peredh ɑ ɑ́nywøl Ëdhrön. 
Ruth4:19 Ëdhrön ɑ ɑ́nywøl Rɑm, Rɑm ɑ ɑ́nywøl Aminɑdɑb." 
Ruth4:20 Aminɑdɑb ɑ ɑ́nywøl Nɑɑ̈cön, Nɑɑ̈cön ɑ ɑ́nywøl Sɑlmön," 
Ruth4:21 Sɑlmön ɑ ɑ́nywøl Boɑdh, Boɑdh ɑ ɑ́nywøl Obed," 
Ruth4:22 Obed ɑ ɑ́nywøl Yesì. O Yesì ɑ ɑ́nywøl Debïd. 
1Samuel1:1 Ádɑ jɑl megø mɑ wɑ̈d gøl Dhup, kì Rɑmɑ̀, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim, me cwøl ɑ́ Elkɑnɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeroɑm, wɑ̈d Elïu, wɑ̈d Tøu, wɑ̈d Dhup." 
1Samuel1:2 Elkɑnɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew, Anɑ̀ kí Peninɑ̀. Peninɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ nywøl, de Anɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ bwøj." 
1Samuel1:3 Jɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd e nyi kedh-ɑ Cilø yethi runn bënn be mɑ̈ddø, kí be ngɑl ki gënhi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ópenì geki Pineɑs wɑ̈ddi ókwërø Elì ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ókwër mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli kenyɑni." 
1Samuel1:4 Kenyi ngɑɑl gëëdhi, rïngø nyi pɑ̈ngi yi en kì kelli tyëng kɑl e pɑ̈r, ɑ løg Peninɑ̀ geki nyige kí wɑ̈dde," 
1Samuel1:5 de Anɑ̀ nyi mëgge’ mi ji ɑ́ryew mɑ́ gø mɑɑr en, ngö nyöde ɑ́cyëëg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel1:6 De nyii lɑrrø yi nyɑ̈ge kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ bwøj. Kɑ pyëwe nyii rënyø. 
1Samuel1:7 Anɑ̀ nyii lɑrrø yi nyɑ̈ge yethi runn bënn kenyi kedhi gen ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Anɑ̀ nyii ywöngø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe, kɑ nyii konø ki cɑm." 
1Samuel1:8 Kɑ nyi köbbi yi Elkɑnɑ̀ kinni, “Anɑ̀ yï ywøg-ɑ ngø? O yïde ɑ pɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m? Yïde ɑ nyi kïïm? Yɑ pɑ lɑ̈w kì yïí kibøli wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Tyelø ɑ́kyel keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cɑm, ge ying-ɑ Cilø, ɑdhwödh Anɑ̀ e ókwërø Elì bëëd ɑ wïj kwøm kì dhø ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel1:10 Anɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd pyëwe orɑ̈mø ki mendwøng, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjje e óywöngø." 
1Samuel1:11 Akönge kinni, “Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ke liidh orɑɑng bɑ̈ngí, kɑ yɑ pɑr yi yïn, kɑ yɑ nëngi yi yïn ki wɑ̈d, thyëyɑ’ yïn ki cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëëne bënn. O yëyyi wïje pɑ pɑ̈nyi ki lyelø.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Anɑ̀ ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r e ókwɑ̈jjø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o Elì nenn-ɑ dhøge." 
1Samuel1:13 Ákwɑ̈jji kɑ yethi cwɑgge, dhøge onywenø de gïn-ɑ kømme pɑ lïngi. Arum Elì kinni i wïje dɑ møgø." 
1Samuel1:14 Kɑ köbbi yi Elì kinni, “Yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng wïjí dɑ møgø? Wiy mɑdh ki møgø!”" 
1Samuel1:15 Alöggi Anɑ̀ kinni, “Wïjɑ bong møgø jɑldwøng, yɑ nuti mɑ̈dhø ki møgø. Yɑ bɑ ngɑn pyëwe rɑ̈mø. Dɑ́ møg-ɑ pyëwɑ ɑ göny-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel1:16 Yï ko rum kinni yɑ bɑ ngɑn me rɑj, bɑ ngenyi ɑkørr geki muumø ɑ wëggi yɑn kwøb kinøw.”" 
1Samuel1:17 Aløøg møge yi Elì kinni, “Kedh ki mër, gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi yïn ómëggi yïn yi Jwøøg Isrɑil.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Kɑ Anɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Wiy bɑ̈ngí yïdde ki gyëdh kì bɑngí.” Codhe, ɑkedhe kɑ ocyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑm. Nuti cigi ywøg këti." 
1Samuel1:19 Kɑ ge odhwödhø dhuki kì mwøl ceth. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl yi gen, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Rɑmɑ̀. Kɑ Elkɑnɑ̀ óbuddø ki Anɑ̀ cyëge, kɑ Anɑ̀ pɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel1:20 Ayïdde ki dhɑnhø kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d. Kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Sɑmwel, mɑ́ gø ɑ́kwɑjji yi en ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel1:21 Kɑ Elkɑnɑ̀ geki gøle bëne kedh-ɑ Cilø be muuji gënhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí gëdhhi wïj könge." 
1Samuel1:22 De Anɑ̀ nuti kedhø kì runɑni. Jɑlgøle ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ókedh ɑ keny-ɑ ópøn dhɑnhø, o kïdhɑ bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kun-ɑ óbëëde gïti ɑtheer.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Aköbbii yi Elkɑnɑ̀ jɑlgøle kinni, “Gwøg gïn-ɑ rømmi yi yïn e døøj. Bëëd kì pɑc gïti keny-ɑ ópøn dhɑnhø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwøbbe ócïbe kɑ̈jji gen.” Codhe, ɑdöng Anɑ̀ kì pɑc e kun-ɑ wɑ̈de." 
1Samuel1:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døngi Sɑmwel kɑ pøn, ɑkïdhi ge gøn ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Cilø. Ákɑ̈l kɑ wɑdh me runne bɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí kïllì pyɑ̈rø mø møng-ɑ búr, kí ɑtheb me pɑ̈ng yi møgi oløg. Sɑmwel ɑ́kïdhi ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Cilø e nudd e thiinh." 
1Samuel1:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki nɑ̈gi wɑnh-ɑ bɑ gëëdhi, ɑmuuj gen nyelthinh ókwërø Elì." 
1Samuel1:26 Aköbbi Elì yi Anɑ̀ kinni, “Wëyí ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wuö, kidyër bene yɑn ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cungi kì butí keny kɑ̈ge dööng e kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel1:27 Yɑ ɑ́kwɑjj-ɑ dhɑnhø men. Kɑ mëggi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
1Samuel1:28 Anɑn yɑ thyëy-ɑ en Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bëëde ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti keny-ɑ óthøwe.” Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlli yi gen kì Cilø kunɑni." 
1Samuel2:1 Kɑ Anɑ̀ owörø e ómɑ̈ddø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́nënge ki medi pyëw me dwøng cɑrø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́gwøøge ngɑn teg ki mendwøng. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ócuggø lɑrø yi yɑn. Pyëwɑ omedø, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel2:2 Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ kwërø me pɑ̈r ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki en kidyër, Bong kwöd me këëj ni Jwøgee," 
1Samuel2:3 Yï ko kööb yï tɑ̈dø këti, ko di kwøbbi lɑ̈ɑ̈rø mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøgí. Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ Jwøk men-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi jɑmmì bënn, gïg-ɑ gøggi bënn nenne’ nennø." 
1Samuel2:4 Tønggi yɑɑg teg ɑ́tørri, kɑ yɑɑg nyødh óyïddø ki tegø." 
1Samuel2:5 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge yɑ̈ngø cøn, ge ɑ́døøg be gwøg kì cinggi tyëngmøøgø kipe gïncɑm. De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ki kɑ̈j ɑ́yɑ̈ng. Bwøj ɑ́nywøl ki ɑ́bïryew, de meyi nywøl-ɑ ngenyø ɑ́döng ki cingge" 
1Samuel2:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ nyi nɑ̈gi, o en ɑ nyi muuj wëy. En ɑ nyi kïdhi thɑ lɑ̈bø, o en ɑ nyi tïngi mɑl." 
1Samuel2:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑdø, o en ɑ nyi muuj kɑ̈r. En ɑ nyi dwøøg dhɑnhø cyɑ̈n, o en ɑ nyi tïng dhɑnhø mɑl." 
1Samuel2:8 Abuur nyi tïnge’ mɑl kì yij tør, kɑ ngɑn jɑdø tïnge mɑl kì yij búr. Kɑ gï cïbe kej ɑ́kyel ki gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ gï nyi cïbe keny wøør gen. Mɑ́ tyelli piny bɑ mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ ɑ́cïb piny kömi tyellɑni." 
1Samuel2:9 Tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈nii ókor yi en, de tyëngorøg thøw-ɑ yij muudhø, mɑ́ dhɑnhø pɑ nyi tyɑ̈ɑ̈m-ɑ tege." 
1Samuel2:10 Tyëng-ɑ bɑny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókedhhi, ge ópwöde e ying-ɑ mɑl. Gønyyi kömi piny bëne ólidh-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, rɑ̈dhe óthödhe ki tegø. Rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́røny yi en ówëgge tyɑ̈mø.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Codhe, ɑdøøg Elkɑnɑ̀ Rɑmɑ̀ pɑɑ gen. De nyelthinh ɑ́döng kì buti ókwërø Elì, e gögg-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j" 
1Samuel2:12 Wɑ̈ddi Elì ɑ́bëëd gɑ tyëngorøg, Jwøk pɑ böggi yi gen." 
1Samuel2:13 Ciggi ókwër ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ kinni, i ke di ngɑn kɑ̈ni ki gëëdhi, bɑ̈ng ókwërø ceg-ɑ bëënø e rïngø othɑlø, e ókɑ̈ddø ki gɑ̈ɑ̈bi me bɑ keer kì cinge." 
1Samuel2:14 Codhe, o keerɑni cwøøbe yij ɑ́tɑy, wɑlɑ̀ yij dɑg men-ɑ tɑ̈ɑ̈d ki rïngø. Rïngø men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi keerɑni, bene en ɑ bɑ mi ókwërø. Bene kër-ɑ nyi kɑ̈bbi gen ɑnɑn, kì yï tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ nyi bï Cilø, be nëngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì." 
1Samuel2:15 Cɑgg dwɑ̈lø nuti rɑ̈bø, bɑ̈ng nyii bëënø kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ngɑ̈dø ki gëëdhi köbbe kinni, “Nguddí ókwërø ki rïngø men bullii, mɑ́ e pɑ nyi yïëy ki rïng-ɑ bɑ ɑthɑl, den-ɑ́ men-ɑ nuti cyegø ɑ dwɑdde kete kì yïí.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Keløg ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈d ólöggø kinni, “Wiy dwɑ̈li gëëdhi rɑ̈b møti, o rume, o yï kɑ̈bbí ki rïngø men-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn cyee.” Bɑ̈ng nyi løøg-ɑ kinni, “Pɑth, mëggí yɑn ɑnɑn ceth, ke pɑ muujií, ókɑb yi yɑn ki tegø.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Alïdhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni orøøg wɑ̈ddi Elì dwøng cɑrø, mɑ́ gëdhhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ wør yi gen." 
1Samuel2:18 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e ogɑ̈nø yi Sɑmwel, o Sɑmwel ɑ́bëëd e ogöögø kì ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e orugø ki pɑri kwër." 
1Samuel2:19 Nyii muujø yi meye ki ógødh yethi runn bënn, kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi bëën gen be gwøg ki kwër geki jɑlgøle." 
1Samuel2:20 Kɑ ge nyi kwëng yi ókwërø Elì kinni, “Wu ónëngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki nywøl møg cool kej nyelthinh-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi wun.” Codhe, kɑ ge nyi døøg-ɑ pɑc, kenyi rum møgɑni." 
1Samuel2:21 Agyëëdh Anɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø nënge ki nywøl, ɑnywøle ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g ki womɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew. Kɑ Sɑmwel ópïïdhø e gögg-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel2:22 Elì ɑ́døngi ki mendwøng, kɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi göggi tyëng Isrɑil yi wɑ̈dde lïnge bënn, kinni tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ nyi kunyi ki gwøg kì dhø ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyii niin yi gen." 
1Samuel2:23 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lïng ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi wun, kì yï yɑy men bëne. Á kipe ngø ɑ göög wun ki gïg ni møg?" 
1Samuel2:24 Pɑth ki gïg mø døøj ɑ nyi lïngɑ kì ri wun, wiyu orøngɑni nyigɑ! Menɑni bɑ gïjø me pëddi rɑ̈jø. Jii Jwøk bënn okööbø kì ri wun." 
1Samuel2:25 Keløg dhɑnhø óbɑ̈jjø ki ngɑn megø, ócuggø kønyø yi Jwøk. De keløg dhɑnhø bɑ̈jji kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ men-ɑ ókønyiì?” De kwøbbi Elì nuti lïngø yi wɑ̈dde, mɑ́ ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
1Samuel2:26 De Sɑmwel ɑ́døngi e bëëde døøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki bøli ji. 
1Samuel2:27 Kɑ jɑltöng megø bï-ɑ yï Elì, ɑkööbe kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Riɑ ɑ́nyudhɑ gøl kweyi wun Aɑron, kì Rïp, kej bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
1Samuel2:28 Kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn, bɑ gøle ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn gɑ ji møg-ɑ nyi göggi yɑn kì këli lɑm, o ge nyi rɑ̈b gen bɑkur, o ge nyi rug gen pɑ̈rri kwër, o ge nyi töng gen møgɑ. Kɑ ge wiyɑ o ge nyi mïdhi gen gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b møg-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ mø kwër yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
1Samuel2:29 Dɑ́ kipe ngø cyee, ɑ døngi pëthi wun ki jɑmmi kwër geki gëdhhì møg-ɑ nyi cwøl yi yɑn kì yï jiɑ? Á kipe ngø Elì, ɑ wøør wɑ̈ddí kibølɑ? Wude ɑ pidh wun ri wun ki rïngg-ɑ døøj kì ri jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli yɑn yi jiɑ?" 
1Samuel2:30 Yɑn, Yɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́kööb kɑ̈ge dööng kinni, gøl wun óbëëd ɑ́ jiɑ gïti ɑtheer. De ɑnɑn yɑ ɑ́kyëëd; møgɑni pɑ cuggi këti. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yɑ ówør ji møg-ɑ wør yɑn, o ji-ɑ pɑ wør yɑn bɑnyɑ’ bɑnyø." 
1Samuel2:31 Lïng, bøli keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ tegø wɑ̈g kì cingí geki cingi gøl wïyí ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óyöø kì gøl wun." 
1Samuel2:32 Wu órɑngø, kɑ wu mɑg yi tyiel, kipe jɑmm-ɑ ómëggɑ tyëng-ɑ kyeelø kì Isrɑil. De bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ óyöø kì gølí." 
1Samuel2:33 De dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel ówiy yi yɑn e onëënø kì yethi rïjj bënn, o gögge yɑn ɑ́ ókwërø. De nyingí ócør yi ywøg, kɑ pyëwí ónyönhø yi kïïmø, mɑ́ kwɑrrí møg-ɑ kyeelø óthøw bënn ki thøø me rɑj." 
1Samuel2:34 Yï ónyudhɑ kinni, yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër keløg wɑ̈ddí ryeet Ópenì geki Pineɑs óthøw cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel." 
1Samuel2:35 Yɑ ókɑ̈bbi ki ókwërø men nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ köbbɑ en ceth. Ónëngɑ ki kwɑrr møg göggi yɑn kì bøli rɑ̈dh men-ɑ órøny yi yɑn. 
1Samuel2:36 Ngɑn-ɑ ódöng e onëënø kì kelli kwɑrrí, ókwɑ̈jji kì yï ókwërɑni ki ngyëny, kí gïncɑm. Ree ókwɑjje kipe kønyø, o yïdde ki gïncɑm me nøg.”" 
1Samuel3:1 Nyelthinh Sɑmwel ɑ́göög kì ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e ying-ɑ buti ókwërø Elì. Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki wödde ɑ́göög ki møg nungi kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ bong-ɑ gïg mø nyi nyodh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi lɑ̈g." 
1Samuel3:2 Elì ɑ́bëëd nyinge ceg-ɑ dhïïdhø yi döng. Elì ɑ́buud-ɑ keny-ɑ nyi buude kì wɑ̈ye," 
1Samuel3:3 o Mɑɑc Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi bëëd e olyelø, o Sɑmwel buud-ɑ ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì buti Sɑnduug Cigg." 
1Samuel3:4 Kɑ Sɑmwel cwøl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑyïëye kinni, “Yɑn èn.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Kɑ reng-ɑ yï Elì, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑn èn. Pɑth ki yïn ɑ ɑ́cwøl yɑn?” De Elì ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑ nuti cwöddø. Døøg buddí.” Adøøge kɑ óbuddø." 
1Samuel3:6 Acigi Sɑmwel cwølø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Nyelthinh ɑ́bëëd ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwïj yi en, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti kwöngø’ kwøb ki en. Adhwödh Sɑmwel kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Elì. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑn èn. Pɑth ki yïn ɑ ɑ́cwøl yɑn.” Alöggi Elì kinni, “Yɑ nuti cwöddø wɑ̈dɑ, døøg buddí.”" 
1Samuel3:7  
1Samuel3:8 Acigi Sɑmwel cwølø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dɑ̈ɑ̈g cwöd. Adhwödhe, kɑ reng-ɑ yï Elì, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑn èn. Pɑth ki yïn ɑ ɑ́cwøl yɑn?” Kɑ yod yi Elì kinni bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ cwølli nyelthinh." 
1Samuel3:9 Aköbbe Sɑmwel kinni, “Døøg buddí. O keløg yï ócwøl yi en këti, kɑ yï kööb kinni, ‘Kööb yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ̈ngí olïngø.’ ” Akedh Sɑmwel kɑ óbuddø kì keje." 
1Samuel3:10 Abëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ ócungø kì buti Sɑmwel, kɑ ócwöddø ni cwöddi tyeli mɑl kinni “Sɑmwel! Sɑmwel!” Alöggi Sɑmwel kinni, “Kööb yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ̈ngí olïngø.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Kɑ Sɑmwel köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑ ógöögø ki gïïpiny men-ɑ ódhɑl lïngø yi Isrɑil, gïjø men-ɑ óbëëd wɑ̈thi tyëng-ɑ ólïngii ceg-ɑ tïgø." 
1Samuel3:12 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, Elì geki gøle ógöggɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn bënn, cɑg kì ri møg-ɑ mɑl gïti cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen." 
1Samuel3:13 Elì ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn kinni, gøle ócɑy yi yɑn gïti ɑtheer, kipe orøng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi en, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bwöl yi wɑ̈dde, de wɑ̈dde nuti kyëddø yi en." 
1Samuel3:14 Kì bɑng menɑni, yɑ ɑ́köngi kinni, orøøg gøl Elì pɑ cuggi gøømø ki gënh-ɑ ngɑl, wɑlɑ̀ ki byëlø men-ɑ mëggi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel3:15 Kɑ Sɑmwel gït-ɑ mwøl e obuddø kì piny. Codhe, ɑdhwödhe kɑ dhøggi ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yiebe. Ábëëd e óböggø ki köbbi Elì ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel3:16 Kɑ cwøl yi Elì kinni, “Sɑmwel wɑ̈dɑ.” Alöggi Sɑmwel kinni, “Yɑn èn.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Apyëjii yi Elì kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́köbbe yïn? Yɑ ko kɑ̈nní. Yï ócɑy yi Jwøk keløg yɑ ókɑ̈nni yi yïn møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe yïn.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Codhe kɑ møgɑni köbbi Elì yi Sɑmwel, bong kwøb mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈nne gøn. Codhe ɑkööb Elì kinni, “Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wiy gwøge gïn-ɑ nenni yi en e døøj.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Kɑ Sɑmwel ódøngø e okorø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ köme, o bong kwøbbi pyed kì lebe." 
1Samuel3:20 Kɑ yod yi pödhi Isrɑil bëne, cɑg kì tuung gïti tung-ɑ kyeelø, kinni Sɑmwel bɑ jɑltöng mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidyër." 
1Samuel3:21 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ocögø ree nyi nyodhe’ nyodhø kì Cilø. Kunɑni ɑ ɑ́cwöbe kì bøli Sɑmwel, kɑ okööbø ki gøn. Kwøbbi Sɑmwel ɑ́bëëd ge nyii lïngø yi Isrɑil bëne." 
1Samuel4:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Isrɑil ɑ́pëggi keny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Eben Edher, kɑ Pelistiyɑ̀ pëgg-ɑ Ápek." 
1Samuel4:2 Adhwönhi liny Pelistiyɑ̀ kömi Isrɑil, kɑ liny ónyïɑ̈ggø ki menteg. Kɑ Isrɑil tyɑm yi Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ kelli gen nɑ̈gi ki ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen kì wïj kër." 
1Samuel4:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg kwï yɑɑy Isrɑil møg-ɑ bodh kɑɑl gen, kɑ jøgdøngi Isrɑil ópëjjø kinni, “Ede Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ wëgge wɑ tyɑmø yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ dicyɑ̈ngtïn? Kedhi wɑ Cilø be dwɑɑyi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøk. O Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bëe kellee, o wɑ yiel yi en kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Codhe, ɑödi gen Cilø. Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kwömø kì kɑɑm kerobb, kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen geki wɑ̈ddi Elì, ɑ løg Ópenì geki Pineɑs." 
1Samuel4:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Sɑnduug Cigg, kɑ yɑɑy Isrɑil bëne óryeerø ki ryeeri dwøng kɑ piny ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh." 
1Samuel4:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi cwɑggi gen yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, ɑpyënyi gen ri gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì kɑɑl tyëng Ibru ɑ pere kïïw gen?” Kɑ yod yi gen kinni bɑ Sɑnduug Cigg ɑ wɑ̈nhi kɑɑlɑni." 
1Samuel4:7 Kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ obwøgø ge okööbø kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́wɑ̈nhi kɑɑlɑni!” Kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Riee dɑ cyën! Bong gïn ni men mɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn!" 
1Samuel4:8 Gïnrɑj me dwøng ɑ́bï kömee! Á men ɑ óyiel wɑ kì cingi Jwøng ni men. Eni Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g tyëng Rïp kì yij pɑ̈l. 
1Samuel4:9 Cwed wun pëthi wun, wun ɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Ke pɑ cwed wun pëthi wun, wu bɑ møg løg gen bɑ̈ngg ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen gɑ bɑ̈nggee. Bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ cwøw, kɑ wu nyïɑ̈ggi wun.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Kɑ liny Pelistiyɑ̀ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki nyɑɑg me teg, kɑ yɑɑy Isrɑil cyeed yethi myërre. Kɑ ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g nɑ̈g kì kelli liny Isrɑil kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
1Samuel4:11 Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk mɑg yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Kɑ wɑ̈ddi Elì ryeet, ɑ løg Ópenì geki Pineɑs nɑ̈g." 
1Samuel4:12 Kɑ jɑl mɑ wɑ̈d gøl Ben Yɑmïn obëënø e rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ kej liny kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth, kɑ wɑ̈nh-ɑ Cilø, ógudhe kɑggø, o wïje dɑ tør, men nyodh ywøg." 
1Samuel4:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe, Elì ɑ́yuude e obëëdø kì wïj kwøm, e nenn-ɑ yöö, mɑ́ pyëwe olïngø kipe Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi jɑlɑni Cilø, ɑkwøbe wööni tyɑmi Isrɑil. Kɑ pɑc óywöngø bëne." 
1Samuel4:14 Alïngi ywøg yi Elì, kɑ ópëjjø kinni, “Ywøng ni men wɑng-ɑ ngø?” Ajwɑni jɑlɑni be köbbi Elì." 
1Samuel4:15 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Elì runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o nyinge rum cøørø." 
1Samuel4:16 Akööb jɑlɑni kinni, “Bene yɑn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kej liny. Yɑ ɑ́pɑ̈r-ɑ yij liny dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng.” Apëjji Elì kinni, “Liny ɑ́bëëd ɑ dï wɑ̈dɑ?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Alöggi jɑlwöönɑni kinni, “Isrɑil ɑ́cyeddi yi Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ ji mø gïïr nɑ̈g. Wɑ̈ddí ryeet, Ópenì geki Pineɑs ɑ́nɑ̈g thyew. Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk mɑg.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøøb kwøbbi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dh Elì kì wïj kwøm e pɑ̈dh-ɑ ngɑ̈je, kɑ mune otorø kɑ othøø, mɑ́ e yöø, o bɑ jɑl me peg. Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑg yi en kɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen."
