1Samuel4:19 Kwɑɑr Elì, cï wɑ̈de Pineɑs, ɑ́bëëd e bɑ ɑ́yɑjø, dwɑ̈tte rum thumø. Ngɑnɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kwøbbi mɑgi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk, kí thøwi kweye, geki thøwi jɑlgøle Pineɑs, ɑgööge ki men moom piny, kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d." 
1Samuel4:20 Aköbbii yi gɑ̈ɑ̈mi e buud-ɑ piny e cyɑ̈ngø ki thøø kinni, “Yï ko böggi, mɑ́ yï ɑ́nywøl-ɑ wɑ̈d.” De nuti löggø, o kwøbbɑni nuti gɑmø yi pyëwe." 
1Samuel4:21 Acɑge wɑ̈nɑni ɑ́ Ikɑböd, e wɑng-ɑ kinni, mɑ̈r ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì Isrɑil. Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi en kinøw kì bɑng mɑgi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk geki thøwi jɑlgøle geki wïyi jɑlgøle." 
1Samuel4:22 Akööbe kinni, “Dhwɑ̈ng ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì Isrɑil.” Mɑ́ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́kɑ̈l." 
1Samuel5:1 Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk, keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑgii yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, gø ɑ́kɑ̈l gen kì Eben Edher, kɑ gø kïdhi gen Acdöd." 
1Samuel5:2 Akwɑɑny Sɑnduug Cigg yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ gø cïb gen yij kengi Dɑgön, kì buti Dɑgön jwøøg gen." 
1Samuel5:3 Kɑ tyëng Acdöd omøølø kì mwøl, ɑyuud gen Dɑgön e pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, yije rum en piny kì bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Atïng Dɑgön mɑl yi gen, kɑ cïb keje, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde." 
1Samuel5:4 Amøl gen kì mwøl-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ Dɑgön yuud gen e pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø këti kì bøli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wïje geki cingge tørrø, ge ying-ɑ piny kì dhø ød. Den-ɑ́ dële kete ɑ döngø e buud-ɑ piny." 
1Samuel5:5 Bene en ɑ pɑ nyi ywööny wïj tëëd kengi Dɑgön yi ókwër geki tyëng-ɑ kedhi yij kengi Dɑgön kì Acdöd gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn. 
1Samuel5:6 Kɑ tyëng Acdöd geki tyëng myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki gen cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menteg, gï ɑ́göjje köddi dëllì." 
1Samuel5:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, yi tyëng Acdöd, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøøg Isrɑil, pɑ cigi mïdhø yi wɑ kì keny. Jwøk wɑ ɑ́cɑye bënn, wɑki Dɑgön jwøgee.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Acwøøl rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn kej ɑ́kyel yi tyëng Acdöd, kɑ gï pyëj gen kinni, “Gwøg wɑ ngø kipe Sɑnduug Jwøøg Isrɑil?” Alöggi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni, “Kïdhi Gɑth.” Codhe kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøøg Isrɑil kïdhi Gɑth." 
1Samuel5:9 De keny-ɑ ɑ́kïdhii Gɑth, ɑcɑɑy tyëng Gɑth yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ryɑ̈g me dwøng pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi gen, gï ɑ́göjje köddi dëllì, tyëngdøngø geki othønhø bënn dëlli gen ɑ́köddi." 
1Samuel5:10 Aör Sɑnduug Cigg Ekrön, ɑ bɑ kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Pelistiyɑ̀, de keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe kɑɑlɑni, ɑryeer ji kinni, “Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l keny kipe kinni o wɑ nɑ̈ge bënn!”" 
1Samuel5:11 Acwööl rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ kej ɑ́kyel këti yi gen, kɑ ge köbbi yi gen kinni, “Öru Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøøg Isrɑil kun-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii, o wɑ cög wɑ pɑ nɑ̈g yi en wɑ kí kɑ̈llee.” Ábëëd e dɑ ryɑ̈g me dwøng mɑ ɑ́bï kömi jii kɑɑlɑni, mɑ́ e ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøk ki menrɑj." 
1Samuel5:12 Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bødh ki thøø, dëlli gen ɑ́köddi, kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ yï jwöggi gen kipe kinni o ge køny." 
1Samuel6:1 Kɑ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïryew tyëg yi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e ying-ɑ Pelistiyɑ̀. 
1Samuel6:2 Acwøøl ókwër geki tyënglɑ́ɑ̀w yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ gï pyëj gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ gwøg yi wɑ kipe Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Kɑ̈l yi wɑ kɑ ngø? Ör yi wɑ keje kɑ ngø?”" 
1Samuel6:3 Alöggi gen kinni, “Keløg Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøøg Isrɑil oörø yi wun, ör yi wun kɑ gëdhhi orøg, codhe o dëlli wun dönyi gen. Ocög wu pɑ dönyi, o yod yi wun cyee kinni bëëdø e pɑth kiper Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ pere ócɑɑy wun.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Apëjji ji kinni, “Á gëdhhì mɑ ngø ɑ ör yi wɑ kí en?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Ngïjji dhɑb ɑ́bïj mø nyodh kɑ̈jj-ɑ köddi kì dëlli ji, kí ngïjji yëjj ɑ́bïj, mɑ́ ge gøøm-ɑ bøli rɑ̈nhì ɑ́bïj geki jii gen, mɑ́ ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi wun, wuki rɑ̈nhi wun bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
1Samuel6:5 Göög wun ki ngïjji kɑ̈jj-ɑ köddi kì ri wun geki ngïjji yëjj møg-ɑ ɑ́rënyi piny wun, bene kër-ɑ ówør wun Jwøøg Isrɑil, o wu wiy yi en ki cɑyø wuki jwöggi wun kí piny wun." 
1Samuel6:6 Wu ko bëëd wɑ̈thi wun teeg ni wïj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki tyëng pödhe, ɑ ɑ́wëggi tyëng Isrɑil kedhø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cɑyø ki mendwøng yi Jwøk." 
1Samuel6:7 Gud wun ki yɑ̈y, kɑ twööj ri dhög ɑ́nyödd ɑ́ryew mø cer nywølø. Dhögɑni ko bëëd ri gen ókwöngø ki töjjø ki ɑcebbi pur, kɑ dhögɑni twööju ri yɑ̈yɑni, kɑ nyigi gen dwøøg wun pɑc." 
1Samuel6:8 Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑny wun, kɑ cïbu yij yɑ̈yɑni, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ bɑ dhɑb møg-ɑ örii yi wun gɑ gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi wun gɑ møg gøøm orøøg wun, cïb wun bute kì yij Sɑndug megø. Codhe kɑ yɑ̈yɑni ör wun o kedhe ki yuue." 
1Samuel6:9 Codhe, kɑ nenni wun kɑ̀ kedhe, keløg ge ókedhi yuu Bet Cemec, bɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈g menɑni. De ke pɑ kɑ̈l gen yuuɑni, ryɑ̈ngɑni töng ɑ wɑ̈ye.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀; ge ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki dhög ɑ́nyödd ɑ́ryew, kɑ yɑ̈y twööj ri gen, kɑ nyigi gen cyëëg lwɑg kì pɑc." 
1Samuel6:11 Acïb gen Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yij yɑ̈yɑni, geki Sɑndung-ɑ yije di yëjji dhɑb geki ngïjji dhɑb mø gïg-ɑ köddi kì dëlli." 
1Samuel6:12 Dhögɑni ɑ́mɑg yöö, ge cïm-ɑ Bet Cemec. Ge ɑ́bødh-ɑ yöö ɑ́kyel ge óywöngø, ge nuti pɑ̈nyi këjji wïj kyëj wɑlɑ̀ wïj cɑɑm. Aløg rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ bɑng dhögɑni gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen buti Bet Cemec." 
1Samuel6:13 Tyëng Bet Cemec ɑ́bëëd ge onyɑ̈rø ki gemè kì yij bɑ̈j kì bøli kenyɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́tïng gen wɑ̈thi gen, ɑ́lidh gen Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pëthi gen ómïnø ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel6:14 Kɑ yɑ̈yɑni, wɑ̈dh-ɑ yij pwödhi jɑl Bet Cemec me cwøl ɑ́ Jöcwø, ɑcunge kì kenyɑni kì buti tungi kït me dwøng, ɑkɑɑg pɑ̈mmi yɑ̈yɑni yi tyëng Bet Cemec gɑ yugg, kɑ dhögɑni ngɑ̈lli gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
1Samuel6:15 Sɑnduug Cigg ɑ́tïng piny yi Kwɑrri Leebì kyeel ki Sɑndung-ɑ yije di jɑmm-ɑ bɑ dhɑb, kɑ ge cïb kömi tungi kïn-ɑ dwøng menɑni. Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø yi tyëng Bet Cemec." 
1Samuel6:16 Møgɑni ɑ́lidh yi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bïj, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Ekrön kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth." 
1Samuel6:17 Ngïjji gïg-ɑ köddi ɑ́ör gɑ ɑ́bïj yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ gɑ gëdhhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møg gøøm gen orøøg gen, kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø geki myërr-ɑ thønhø møg-ɑ buti gen; kɑ̈ddɑni bɑ Acdöd, kí Gɑdhɑ̀, kí Ackelön, kí Gɑth, kí Ekrön." 
1Samuel6:18 Ge ɑ́öd thyew ki yëjji dhɑb, ɑ́kyel cungi ɑ́ wïj kɑɑl kí myërr-ɑ bute, gen ɑ kɑ̈ddi dör møg-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhhɑni. Tungi kïn-ɑ dwøng kì pwödhi Jöcwø jɑl Bet Cemec, kïn-ɑ́ köme ɑ́cïb Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud dicyɑ̈ngtïn ɑ́ ngïji." 
1Samuel6:19 Kɑ tyëng Bet Cemec cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kɑ ɑ́lïïdh gen yij Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Anɑ̈ggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kì kelli gen. Kɑ tyëng Bet Cemec óywöngø kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
1Samuel6:20 Akööb jø Bet Cemec kinni, “Á men ɑ cuggi cung kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø ni men? Á kun ɑ ör wɑ en o kedhe kì butee?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Codhe, ɑödi gen Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm ki ji mø kööbø kinni, “Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́dwöög yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, bïu dwɑ̈ɑ̈yu en.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Codhe, kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwɑɑy yi tyëng Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, kɑ kïdhi gen gøl jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Abinɑdɑb me pɑɑre ying wïj kït. Kɑ Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d Abinɑdɑb kwër, o mïdhe Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel7:2 Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd kì Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kì kunɑni, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel7:3 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbi yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ dwöög yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pëthi wun bënn, wiy wun jwögg-ɑ pɑth bënn, geki ngïjji Actɑröth, kɑ pëthi wun lugi wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete, o wu yiel yi en, kì cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Kɑ ngïjji Bɑɑl kí ngïjji Actɑröth weddi yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete." 
1Samuel7:5 Kɑ Sɑmwel okööbø kinni, “Cøng wun tyëng Isrɑil Midhpɑ̀. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókwɑjji yi yɑn kiper wun kì kunɑni.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ócugø bënn kì Midhpɑ̀, kɑ ge ótömmø ki pï, kɑ pïgɑni køny gen piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Arïïj gen ki kɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngɑni, ge okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́bɑ̈jji kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Kɑ Sɑmwel obëëdø ɑ́ jɑng-ɑ bøle nyi gööny yi tyëng Isrɑil kì Midhpɑ̀." 
1Samuel7:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni, tyëng Isrɑil ri gen cøng gen Midhpɑ̀, kɑ rɑ̈nhi gen bënn, tëdd-ɑ kömi Isrɑil ki liny. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil obwøgø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen i dɑ liny Pelistiyɑ̀ me bï." 
1Samuel7:8 Kɑ Sɑmwel köbbi yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Wø ko wøøy, kɑ yï ko wïyi ki ywøøg kö Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wɑ yiel yi en kì cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Akɑ̈bbi Sɑmwel ki nyɑ órömø me dhødh, kɑ gø ngɑ̈lle Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Akwɑ̈jji Sɑmwel e ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe Isrɑil. Kɑ kwɑ̈jje yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel7:10 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Sɑmwel e rɑ̈b-ɑ nyɑ órömø, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ pönh-ɑ kömi tyëng Isrɑil, de keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi gen, kɑ ge göjji pwödø yi mɑl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ɑ́pwöd yi mɑl ki menteg. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen omuumø, ɑbwøg gen kɑ ge órengø." 
1Samuel7:11 Arïngi Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Midhpɑ̀. Acyeddi gen tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, gï pwööd ge’ piny gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Betkɑr." 
1Samuel7:12 Kɑ Sɑmwel ókɑ̈bbø ki tungi kït, ɑcïbe gøn kɑɑm Midhpɑ̀ kí Cen, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti kɑ wɑ̈nhi wɑ keny.” Acɑge kenyɑni ɑ́ Eben Edher." 
1Samuel7:13 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́tyɑm kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ dwöög piny Isrɑil këti; tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n bëën piny Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Sɑmwel e onëënø bëne." 
1Samuel7:14 Myërri Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kì kɑɑm Ekrön kí Gɑth kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑ́dwöög gen, kɑ piny Isrɑil døøg-ɑ yïe bëne. Kɑ dɑ mër thyew kì kɑɑm Isrɑil geki tyëng Amör." 
1Samuel7:15 Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑg yi Sɑmwel ki runn-ɑ ɑ́nëëne bënn. 
1Samuel7:16 Nyi kedh-ɑ Betiil, kí Gilgɑl, kí Midhpɑ̀ yethi runn bënn, e nenn-ɑ gønyyi ji kì kɑ̈jjɑni." 
1Samuel7:17 Codhe, o nyi døøge Rɑmɑ̀ pɑɑ gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ jɑngi burø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́gëdde ki ød kì Rɑmɑ̀." 
1Samuel8:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög Sɑmwel ɑ́ yu, ɑgwøge wɑ̈dde ryeet gɑ jɑgg-ɑ bøli gen nyi gööny yi Isrɑil." 
1Samuel8:2 Wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ kɑyø cwøl ɑ́ Yöiil, o nyel-ɑ ngɑ̈je cwøl ɑ́ Abiyɑ̀. Yöiil geki Abiyɑ̀ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ Bircebɑ̀." 
1Samuel8:3 De wɑ̈ddi Sɑmwel nuti bëëdø ni wïyi gen. Ge nyii kɑ̈bbø ki ngyëny kì yï ji møg-ɑ kwɑjji gen kì cyɑ̈n, kipe kinni o gøny cöge e pɑ cïb keje." 
1Samuel8:4 Kɑ jøgdøngi Isrɑil ri gen cøng gen, kɑ ge bï-ɑ yï Sɑmwel kì Rɑmɑ̀." 
1Samuel8:5 Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Yï ɑ́døngi, o wɑ̈ddí pɑ bëëdø ki bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi yïn. Anɑn nëngí wøn ki rɑ̈dh men jɑɑg wøn ni tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
1Samuel8:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb jøgdøngi Isrɑil kinøw, kɑ Sɑmwel pyëwe órënyø yi møgɑni, ɑkwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Sɑmwel." 
1Samuel8:7 Kɑ Sɑmwel köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lïngí gïn-ɑ köbbi yïn yi gen, mɑ́ e pɑth ki yïn ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen, de bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen kinni ge ko jɑɑg yi yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen." 
1Samuel8:8 Gïg-ɑ göggi yïn yi gen ɑnɑn, pɑ̈r ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi gen keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑ ɑ́wiy gen yɑn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø." 
1Samuel8:9 Gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen, de nyudhí gen cyee ki gïg-ɑ ógöggi gen yi rɑ̈nh-ɑ ójɑɑg gen.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Codhe, ɑköbbi tyëng-ɑ cwöddi ki rɑ̈dh yi Sɑmwel møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb bënn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel8:11 Ge ɑ́köbbi yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Keløg yï wun ódi rɑ̈dh men jɑɑg wun, wu ógöggi yi en ki gïg ni møg: wɑ̈ddi wun gï ógwøge gɑ jølinye, møøgø órïng-ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th, møøgø ócyɑ̈dh-ɑ kyënyì, o ge órïngi gen kì mɑl bøli yɑ̈the." 
1Samuel8:12 Kwï wɑ̈ddi wun ógwøg yi rɑ̈nhɑni gɑ pëjji liny mø pyejji ji ɑ́lïp, wɑlɑ̀ ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Kwï wɑ̈ddi wun ógwøge gɑ møg pur pwödhe, o ge nyi kɑj gen byelle. Møøgø ókwɑny en o ge bëëd gen gɑ bödhhì møg thɑ̈dhhii ki tønggi liny." 
1Samuel8:13 Nyigi wun womɑ̈nn ókwɑny yi en, o ge nyi bïjji gen en ki møw, o ge nyi buddi gen en ki ópùn, o ge tɑ̈ddi gen en ki gïgcɑmm." 
1Samuel8:14 Pwödhhi wun møg-ɑ døj, kí bɑ̈ggi wun, gï ókwɑnye kɑ gï mëgge bɑ̈ngge." 
1Samuel8:15 Ókɑ̈bbi ki dhöngø ɑ́kyel kì ri dhöng pyɑ̈rø kì ri jɑmmì møg-ɑ cyeg kì yethi pwödhhi wun kí bɑ̈ggi wun, o gï mëgge pëjji linye." 
1Samuel8:16 Bɑ̈nggi wun, bɑ̈ngg-ɑ cwøw kí womɑ̈nn ókwɑny en, kí dhögi wun møg-ɑ myër, kí ɑderri wun, o ge gwøg gen gwøng-ɑ mee." 
1Samuel8:17 Ókɑ̈bbi ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmí møg-ɑ nud kì lwɑg, kɑ wun kì ri wun, wu ógwøøge bɑ̈ngge." 
1Samuel8:18 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, wu óywöngi, wu ogönyø kipe gïg-ɑ göggi wun yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun, men-ɑ ɑ́røny yi wun, de ywøøg wun koo lïngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel8:19 De bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi Sɑmwel kì kelli tyëngɑni. De ge nyi kwøb-ɑ kinni, “Pɑth, wø dwɑdd-ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
1Samuel8:20 Kipe kinni o wø pɑ̈ɑ̈r wøn ki jii pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Gønyyi wøn ónenni yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn, o wø nyi peeje be nyɑɑg ki liny.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi teedø bënn lïngi yi Sɑmwel, ɑdøøge møgɑni ki köbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel8:22 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen ceth, nëngí gen ki rɑ̈dh.” Codhe, ɑköbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Døøg wun yethi myërri wun.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Ádɑ jɑl megø me cwøl ɑ́ Kïc, wɑ̈d Abiel, wɑ̈d Dherör, wɑ̈d Bekurɑth, wɑ̈d Apiyɑ̀ kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn. Kïc ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl me pere teg." 
1Samuel9:2 Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de me cwøl ɑ́ Cɑul, nyel me døøj, bøle myëër. Cɑul bong ngɑn lodii ki bɑ̈r geki myëërø kì Isrɑil." 
1Samuel9:3 Kɑ ɑderr mø bɑ mø Kïc wïyi Cɑul ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. Aköbbi Cɑul yi Kïc wïye kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli yɑɑg gwøg, kɑ wu kedhu be yɑbi ɑderr.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Codhe, ɑkedhe e kɑ̈ll-ɑ myërri kïtti Eprɑim. Kɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ thwøri Cɑlicɑ̀, de ɑderr nuti yood gen. Akedh gen kɑ ge pödh-ɑ Cɑɑlïm, gï nuti yood gen kì kunɑni. Codhe, ɑbëën gen, ge oyɑ̈bø kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn bënn, de gï nuti yood gen thyew." 
1Samuel9:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen myërri Dhup, kɑ Cɑul bɑ̈nge köbbe kinni, “Bïí døøg wɑ pɑc, kipe wïyɑ ówïyi ki tɑgi kwøbbi ɑderr, kɑ pyëwe ócɑ̈gø ki olïng kiperee.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Alöggi bɑ̈nge kinni, “Dɑ jɑltöng kì kɑɑl-ɑcɑ̀, me ceg ki wørø ki mendwøng, gïn-ɑ kwøb yi en nyi bï ɑ́ dyër. Kedhi wɑ yïe, wɑ óköbbe yuu-ɑ cɑɑdh yi wɑ mɑwɑnø.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Aköbbii yi Cɑul kinni, “Keløg wɑ ókedhø, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ómëggii yi wɑ? Gïgcɑmm møg-ɑ ɑ́ying yethi kidhhee ɑ́thumi. Bong gïn-ɑ ómëggi jɑltöng yi wɑ. Dɑ gïjø me nud kì yïee?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Acigi kwøbbi Cɑul løøgø yi bɑ̈nge kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ nyɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø me thiinh, ómëggi wɑ jɑltöng, kipe kinni o wɑ köbbe ki yuu-ɑ cɑɑdh yi wɑ.”" 
1Samuel9:9 Kɑ̈ge dööng kì Isrɑil, ke di ngɑn dwɑddi pyëjji Jwøk nyii kwøbø kinni, “Bïí kedhi wɑ yï jɑl-ɑ nyi nëënø.” Mɑ́ jɑltöng nyi cwøl ɑ́ jɑl nyi nëënø kɑ̈ge dööng." 
1Samuel9:10 Kɑ Cɑul bɑ̈nge köbbe kinni, “Kwøbbí døøj, kedh wɑ.” Codhe, ɑkedhi gen kɑɑl-ɑ yije bëëd yi jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk." 
1Samuel9:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen, ge yedh-ɑ kwøømø men-ɑ köme ógeer kɑɑlɑni, ɑrøøm gen ki womɑ̈nn mø bï be tömø ki pï. Apyëj ge gïn kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ nyi nëënø nud kì kɑɑl?” (Kì bøli kenyɑni, jɑltöng ɑ́bëëd e nyi cwøl ɑ́ ngɑn nyi nëënø, o ngɑn dwɑddi pyëji Jwøk, nyi kwøb-ɑ kinni, “Kedhi wɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ nyi nëënø.”)" 
1Samuel9:12 Alöggi gen kinni, “Ngee nud kì bøli wun, jwɑni wun ceth, ɑ́ceg-ɑ bëën kɑɑl dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ e dɑ gëëdhi mɑ ɑ́ngɑl yi tyëng kɑɑl kì wïj kwøømø, kej mɑ̈ddø." 
1Samuel9:13 Kedh wun, wu ójwɑnø, o pïïd yi wun e nuti kedhi wïj kwøømø be cɑm, mɑ́ ji pɑ cyɑ̈mø gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhe kunɑni, o rïngi gëëdhi thyey yi en, codhe o ji cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen cyee.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Akedhi Cɑul kɑɑlɑni geki bɑ̈nge. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen tøg kɑɑl, kɑ Sɑmwel bï-ɑ yï gen e kedh-ɑ wïj kwøømø kej mɑ̈ddø." 
1Samuel9:15 Sɑmwel ɑ́bëëd e rumø ki köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e döngø ɑ́ wɑ̈r ɑ́kyel ki kwøbbi bëëni Cɑul kinni," 
1Samuel9:16 “Piny nɑ men dhuki, jɑl megø kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn óörɑ yïn. Kwɑɑny ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ójɑɑg jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil. Jiɑ óyiel yi en kì cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, orɑɑng jiɑ ɑ́lidhɑ, o ywøøg gen ɑ́lïngɑ.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Cɑul yi Sɑmwel, ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bene en jɑl-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn kinni, jiɑ ójɑɑg yi en.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Codhe, ɑkedhi Cɑul yï Sɑmwel, kɑ ge røøm-ɑ dhø pöör, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Köbbí wøn, ɑ́gøne gøl jɑl-ɑ nyi nëënø?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Alöggi Sɑmwel kinni, “Bene yɑn jɑl-ɑ nyi nëënø, kedhí bølɑ kej mɑ̈ddø, mɑ́ yï ócyɑ̈mø kɑ yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn. O dhuki kì mwøl, yï óköbbɑ gïg-ɑ pyëwí, o yï örɑ yöö." 
1Samuel9:20 De ying-ɑ́ per ɑderr-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh, pyëwí ko lïngi kiper gen, ge ɑ́rum ki yodø. Dɑ́ men ɑ dwɑddi yi tyëng Isrɑil ki mendwøng? Bɑ yïn, wuki gøl wïyí.”" 
1Samuel9:21 Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “De yɑ bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Ben Yɑmïn; gøl-ɑ nøg kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, o gøl wïyɑ bene gøl-ɑ pëddi nøgø kì yij gøl Ben Yɑmïn. Yïde ɑ köbbí yɑn kwøbb-ɑ ni møg?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Codhe, ɑkïdhi Cɑul geki bɑ̈nge yij ød me dwøng yi Sɑmwel, kɑ gï cïbe kelli ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kì wïj tɑw." 
1Samuel9:23 Aköbbi jɑlthɑl yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l rïng-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn, men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni cïb wɑ̈ye.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l rɑ̈m bëne yi jɑlthɑl, kɑ gø cïbe bøli Cɑul. Akööb Sɑmwel kinni, “Rïng-ɑ ɑ́wïyi yïn èn, cɑɑm. Ámïdhi yi yɑn ɑ́ men-ɑ ócɑm yi yïn kì bøli wëll-ɑ ɑ́ryejɑ.” Codhe, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m Cɑul geki Sɑmwel dicyɑ̈ngɑni." 
1Samuel9:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg gen kɑɑl, ɑgwøøg keny-ɑ buddi yi Cɑul kì mɑl wïj óthɑɑng ød." 
1Samuel9:26 Kɑ óbuddø kì kunɑni. Kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ɑcwøøl Cɑul yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl, o yï örɑ yuuí.” Adhwödhi Cɑul mɑl kɑ lwøøg yöö yi Sɑmwel." 
1Samuel9:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, ɑköbbi Cɑul yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Köbbí bɑ̈ngí kinni kedhe mɑl bølee. Kɑ yï dööng kì keny, o yï köbbɑ wöödø mɑ ɑ́öri yïn yi Jwøk.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Kɑ tuung møw kwɑny yi Sɑmwel, kɑ møw-ɑ yije kønye wïj Cɑul. Kɑ Cɑul nuume, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ɑ́kwɑnye, yïn ɑ́ jɑngi jie, o ge kor yi yïn, men bene nyudhi." 
1Samuel10:2 Keny-ɑ ókedh dicyɑ̈ngtïn, yï órøøm ki jøg ɑ́ryew, buti röri Rɑceel kì Dheldhɑ̀, kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn, yï óköbbi yi gen kinni, i ɑderr-ɑ ɑ́yɑb yi yïn, ge rumø ki yodø, o wïyí wïyø ki rumø kì ri gen, de pyëwe lïngø kɑ perí, e kømm-ɑ kinni, ‘Yɑ gwøg-ɑ ngø cyee kipe wɑ̈dɑ?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Yï ókedh kì kenyɑni gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhí thɑ óthuri Tɑbör, kì kenyɑni wu órøøm ki jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g møg kedhi Betiil ge wel-ɑ ød Jwøk. Ákyel ókwöddø ki dyëg ɑ́dɑ̈g, ryeew gen ókɑ̈ddø ki ópùn ɑ́dɑ̈g, o dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑtheeb møgi oløg." 
1Samuel10:4 Yï ómɑ̈dh yi gen, kɑ yï nëngi yi gen ki ópùn ɑ́ryew. Kwɑny ópùnɑni kì cinggi gen." 
1Samuel10:5 Codhe kɑ yï kedhí wïj Kïti Jwøk kì Gibeɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́di kɑɑl tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ótöngí pɑc, wu órøøm ki jøtöng mø bï piny ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kej mɑ̈ddø, ge otugø, ge othumø ki thøm, ge opödø ki bullì, ge ocöngø, ge otöngø ki kwøbbi Jwøk." 
1Samuel10:6 Kì bɑng keny me thiinh, wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbï kömí kɑ yï kedh-ɑ kelli jøgɑni, kɑ yï otöngø ki kwøbbi Jwøk kyeel ki gen, kɑ yï ogöögø ki ngɑn megø." 
1Samuel10:7 Keløg ngïjjɑni ócwöb kɑ ge lidh yi yïn, gwøg gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn, mɑ́ yï ókøny yi Jwøk." 
1Samuel10:8 Kɑ yï møøl bølɑ, kedhí Gilgɑl, yɑ óbï yïí kunɑni, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi yi yɑn ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki gënhi mër. Yïd yɑn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. Codhe o yɑ bïɑ, o yï köbbɑ gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn.”" 
1Samuel10:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́løg Cɑul ree e wiy-ɑ Sɑmwel, ɑnëngii ki pyëw megø yi Jwøk. Kɑ ngïjjɑni bënn pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth." 
1Samuel10:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Cɑul Gibeɑ̀, ɑrøøm gen ki jøtöng. Kɑ wëyi Jwøk bï-ɑ kömi Cɑul, kɑ órëbø ki gïn, ɑcɑ̈ge töng ki kwøbbi Jwøk kyeel geki jøtöng møgɑni." 
1Samuel10:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Cɑul yi ji-ɑ ngɑ̈nyii, ɑpyënyi gen ri gen kinni, “Á gïn ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì ri wɑ̈d Kïc? Men-ɑ́ Cɑul ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́ jɑltöng thyew?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Alöggi jɑl megø kì kenyɑni kinni, “O jøtöng møg-ɑ kyeelø, wëëg gen bɑ møg?” Codhe, ɑcög møgɑni gɑ gɑ́j møg nyi kømmi yi teedø kinni, “Cɑul ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́ jɑltöng thyew?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Cɑul ki töng ki kwøbbi Jwøk, ɑkedhe kej mɑ̈ddø." 
1Samuel10:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Cɑul geki bɑ̈nge yi nɑ̈ye, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Wu ɑ́ying-ɑ keny?” Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Wø ɑ́ying-ɑ be yɑb ki ɑderr. Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li gen ki yodø yi wøn, ɑkedhi wøn yï Sɑmwel.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Akööb nɑ̈yi Cɑul kinni, “Köbbu yɑn, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Sɑmwel?”" 
1Samuel10:16 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Ákööb kinni i ɑderr rumø ki yodø.” De nɑ̈ye nuti köbbø yi en ki kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Sɑmwel kinni ógöögø ki rɑ̈dh." 
1Samuel10:17 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn cwøøl Midhpɑ̀, bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Sɑmwel." 
1Samuel10:18 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Møg bɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yɑn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Kɑ wu yielɑ kì cingi Rïp, geki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́buudh köthi wun." 
1Samuel10:19 De Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́yiel wun kì yethi rɑj bënn ɑ́bɑny yi wun dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ wu okööbø ɑnɑn kinni, ‘Pɑth, wø dwɑdd-ɑ rɑ̈dh me jɑɑg wøn.’ Cungi wun ɑnɑn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ́ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì; kí jɑggi wun kì bøli wun.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cøng wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn yi Sɑmwel, ɑkwɑnye wëëli pödhø. Kɑ wëëlø ópɑ̈dhø ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
1Samuel10:21 Apɑ̈ngi gøl Ben Yɑmïn ree ɑ́ dhøggi kɑ̈llì, kɑ wëëlø ópɑ̈dhø ki gøl Mɑtrì. Akwɑɑny wéli jø gøl Mɑtrì, kɑ kwɑɑny ɑ́ wëëli Cɑul wɑ̈d Kïc. Ayɑbii kì kelli ji, kɑ ocögø e pɑ yod." 
1Samuel10:22 Apyëj gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti kinni, “Cɑul ɑ́di bëën keny?” Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ngee ópɑ̈nnø kì gøddi thyɑng kì kun-ɑcɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Codhe, ɑrengi teedø be dwɑɑyii. Keny-ɑ ɑ́cungi Cɑul kì kelli ji, kɑ wïje kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl." 
1Samuel10:24 Aköbbi ji yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Lidhu jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑnɑn. Bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki en kì kellee bënn.” Kɑ ji óryeerø bënn kinni, “Rɑ̈dh ómïdhi yi Jwøk!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Alwöbbi ji ciggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kí yëth-ɑ óbëëd rɑ̈dh yïe dɑ tegø yi Sɑmwel. Kɑ gï gweede yij wɑ̈nyø, kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni cïbe bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Codhe, ɑköbbe ji kinni døøg gen yethi myërri gen." 
1Samuel10:26 Kɑ Cɑul døøg-ɑ Gibeɑ̀, pɑɑ gen thyew. Dɑ jøg pɑ nyi böggi møg pëthi gen ɑ́lug yi Jwøk, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ bɑng Cɑul." 
1Samuel10:27 De Cɑul ɑ́bɑny yi jøgi orøg møøgø; kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ ni men wɑ ócuggø yielø yi en?” Kɑ ge ocögø ge nuti kedhi be gɑ̈jii. De Cɑul ɑ́cög e okudø kì wɑ̈ye." 
1Samuel11:1 Kɑ ɑ́thumi dwɑ̈y, kɑ Nɑkɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön, liny pëëje kɑɑl Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd, kɑ gø tyege ki yɑye. Aköbbi Nɑkɑc yi tyëng Yɑbic bënn kinni, “Nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ ki kwøb, o wø ójɑɑg yi yïn.”" 
1Samuel11:2 Alöggi Nɑkɑc kinni, “Yɑ ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb ki wun keløg wu oyïëyø ki gööli nyingi këjji wun wɑ̈g bënn. Codhe o Isrɑil yɑ̈re bëne.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Aköbbi Nɑkɑc, yi jøgdøngi Yɑbic kinni, “Nëngí wøn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, o wø ödi wøn myërri Isrɑil bënn ki wöödø. O keløg e bong ngɑn bï be yieli wøn, wø óyömmi yïí.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi tyëngwöödø Gibeɑ̀ kun-ɑ bëëd yi Cɑul, kɑ ji köbbi yi gen ki wöönɑni, ɑywöngi gen ki ywøg me teeg cɑrø." 
1Samuel11:5 Kì bøli kenyɑni ceth Cɑul kedh e obëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ be køg ki pwödhe, e ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng wɑ̈dhhe, ɑpëjje kinni, “Á gïn ɑ rɑj, ɑ ywöngi ji?” Codhe, ɑköbbi Cɑul wöön-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Yɑbic." 
1Samuel11:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi Cɑul, kɑ wëyi Jwøk bï-ɑ köme, kɑ mɑg yi liny ki menteg." 
1Samuel11:7 Akɑ̈bbi Cɑul ki wɑ̈dhhe ɑ́ryew, kɑ gï ngølle gɑ ɑ́tug, ɑmëgge ɑ́tuggɑni tyëngwöödø, o gï kïdhi gen yethi myërri Isrɑil bënn, ji köbbi ge’ köbbø kinni, “Bene gïn-ɑ ógöggi dhögi ngɑn pɑ kedhi be liny kyeel ki Cɑul geki Sɑmwel.” Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil obwøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ liny kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g bëne ki pyëw ɑ́kyel." 
1Samuel11:8 Acøng ji bënn kej ɑ́kyel yi Cɑul kì Bedhek. Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, o tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
1Samuel11:9 Aköbbi tyëng Yɑbic møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wöödø kinni, “Köbbu tyëng Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd kinni, ge ódøm dhuki keny-ɑ ólënhi cɑ̈ng.” Codhe, ɑkedh jøwöödø, kɑ tyëng Yɑbic köbbi gen møgɑni kɑ pëthi gen ómïnø." 
1Samuel11:10 Aköbbi Nɑkɑc yi tyëng Yɑbic kinni, “Wø óbï yïí dhuki, o wø göggu gïn-ɑ dwɑddu göggi wøn.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Kì wɑ̈rɑni, kɑ Cɑul jøge pɑ̈nge gɑ ɑkudd ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ ge turr-ɑ dyëri kɑɑl Amön kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ɑtyɑɑm tyëng Amön yi gen e cɑ̈ng nuti lënhø. Tyëng Amön møg-ɑ ɑ́bodh ɑ́rengi ge tɑyø, bong ji ɑ́ryew kì kelli gen mɑ ɑ́rïngi kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
1Samuel11:12 Aköbbi Sɑmwel yi yɑy kinni, “Á møg ɑ nuti dwɑddi bëëdi Cɑul ɑ́ rɑ̈dh? Kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen keny o ge nɑ̈g yi wɑ!”" 
1Samuel11:13 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Pɑth! Bong dhɑnhø me nɑ̈g dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́døm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Aköbbi yɑy yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Bïu kedhi wɑ Gilgɑl, o Cɑul cigi mɑlø yi wɑ ɑ́ rɑ̈dh.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Codhe, ɑkedhi gen Gilgɑl ge bënn, kɑ Cɑul mɑl yi gen ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kì kej kwër kì kunɑni. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi yi gen ki gënhi mër. Kɑ Cɑul otugø geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn ki medi pëthi gen." 
1Samuel12:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil köbbi yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi wun bënn ɑ́yïëy yi yɑn, kɑ wu rönyɑ ki rɑ̈dh." 
1Samuel12:2 Rɑ̈nhɑni ɑ bøli wun ɑnɑn. Keløg ɑ́ kiperɑ, yɑ ɑ́yöø, yëyyɑ ɑ́tɑ̈ri, wɑ̈ddɑ ɑ kelli wun ɑgɑk, yɑ ɑ́wöni yɑ bɑ jɑngi wun, yɑ bɑ wøb gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
1Samuel12:3 Yɑn ɑ cungi kì bøli wun èn. Keløg e dɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel me rɑɑj me gwøøg yɑn, gøønyu yɑn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki rɑ̈dh men-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en. Á dhii men ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ ɑderi men ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn? Á men ɑ ɑ́rujɑ, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́mødɑ? Á cingi men ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈bbɑ ki gïïpiny kipe kinni o gøny cwɑ̈ggɑ en? Ke di gïi dhɑnhø me kɑɑb yɑn, culɑ’ en.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Alöggi gen kinni, “Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́ruj yi yïn, o bong dhɑnhø mɑ gëe ɑ́kɑb yi yïn. Bong gïi dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yïn.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Aköbbi gen yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j en ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun. Rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en ngɑ̈ny wøw thyew dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni, bong gïjø me rɑɑj kì riɑ.” Akööb gen kinni, “Bɑ dyër!”" 
1Samuel12:6 Kɑ Sɑmwel teedø köbbe kinni, “Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́yieny Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron. O en ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kweyyi wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
1Samuel12:7 Anɑn cungi wun kì keny, o wu löbbɑ gïgdøj bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́göggi wun, wuki kweyyi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel12:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Yɑgob Rïp geki gøle, kɑ nyingi gen guud yi tyëng Rïp, ɑywøøg kweyyi wun kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kinni o ge køny, ɑör Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kweyyi wun kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny-ɑ bëëd yi wun èn." 
1Samuel12:9 De wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, codhe, ɑgöjji gen liny ki Siserɑ̀ pënyi liny Adhör, kí tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb. Kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki kweyyi wun, kɑ kweyyi wun tyɑm yi gen." 
1Samuel12:10 Kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge okööbø kinni, ‘Wø ɑ́røngi, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wiy yi wøn, kɑ wø kedh-ɑ be mɑlli Bɑɑl geki ngïjji Actɑröth. Yiel wøn kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Yï ómɑlli yi wøn!’" 
1Samuel12:11 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu öre Gideon, kí Bɑrɑk, kí Yeptɑɑ̀, ɑöre yɑn kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen bënn. Kɑ wu yiel kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ bɑdhhi wun bënn yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ör. Kɑ wu obëëdø ki mër." 
1Samuel12:12 De keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh wun Nɑkɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön e bï-ɑ yï wun ki liny, ɑköbbu yɑn kinni, ‘Nëngí wøn ki rɑ̈dh!’ Á Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ceg bëëdø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun." 
1Samuel12:13 “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun; rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yɑb yi wun èn. Wu ɑ́rum ki nëngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈dh. 
1Samuel12:14 Óbëëd e døøj keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ómɑlli yi wun, kɑ kwøbbe nyi lïngi yi wun, wuki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun." 
1Samuel12:15 De keløg kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ lïngi yi wun, kɑ cigge pyem yi wun, wu ógögge ki gïnrɑj ni men-ɑ ɑ́gögge kweyyi wun." 
1Samuel12:16 De ɑnɑn dhwödh wun, o wu lïdhi wun ki gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ógwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel12:17 Piny bɑ lew ɑnɑn, pɑth kidyër? De Jwøk ókwɑjji yi yɑn, o mɑl pööde, o kødh dëëme. Keløg gïgɑni ócwöb, yod wun en kinni wu ɑ́göög ki orøg me dwøng kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel12:18 Codhe, ɑkwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Sɑmwel, kɑ mɑl göjji pöd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ kødh ómɑ̈gø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ ji obwøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki Sɑmwel ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel12:19 Kɑ Sɑmwel köbbi yi gen kinni, “Døj jɑldwøng, kwɑjjí Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiper wøn, o wø cög wøn wø pɑ thøw. Áyod yi wøn ɑnɑn kinni, wø ɑ́røngi kɑ ɑ́cwöddi wøn ki rɑ̈dh.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Aköbbi gen yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Wu ko böggi, bɑ dyër kinni, wu ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyel mø gïïr, de Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko bɑny wun, göggu en ki pëthi wu bënn." 
1Samuel12:21 Ri wun ko lugi wun jwögg-ɑ pɑth, wu pɑ køny yi jwöggɑni, wɑlɑ̀ wu pɑ yiel yi gen, mɑ́ ge bɑ jwögg mø bong per gen." 
1Samuel12:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kinni, jie pɑ cuggi bɑnyø yi en, mɑ́ wu dwɑdde’ mïdhø wu bɑ jie." 
1Samuel12:23 Yɑ pɑ wïyi ki kwɑ̈jjø kiper wun, mɑ́ menɑni ógöögø ki bɑ̈jjø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wu ópwönyi yi yɑn ki gwøgi gïndøj men-ɑ bɑ dyër." 
1Samuel12:24 Gɑ̈nu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu göög wun ki gïndøj ki pëthi wun bënn." 
1Samuel12:25 De keløg wu, nudd wu ogöögø ki orøg wuki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun bënn, wu ónɑ̈g yi en.”" 
1Samuel13:1 Cɑul runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Kɑ Isrɑil jɑɑg yi en ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew. 
1Samuel13:2 Cɑul ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en kì kelli jø Isrɑil, ɑbëëd gen kì Mikmɑc kì myërri kïtti Betiil. Adöng Yönɑthɑn kí ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel kì Gibeɑ̀, kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn." 
1Samuel13:3 Yönɑthɑn ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi pënyi liny Pelistiyɑ̀ kì Gebɑ̀ kɑ gø nɑ̈ge, kɑ møgɑni lïngi yi tyëng myërr-ɑ kyeelø kì Pelistiyɑ̀. Codhe kɑ Cɑul oödø ki ji mø cwööl tyëng Isrɑil ki kɑng." 
1Samuel13:4 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn olïngø kinni i pënyi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ onɑ̈gø yi Cɑul, o ge mɑɑn yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Codhe, ɑcwøøl tyëng Isrɑil bënn yi Cɑul, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Gilgɑl." 
1Samuel13:5 Acøng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ri gen be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Isrɑil. Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ yï gen ɑ́dɑ yɑ̈thi liny ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí jøliny kyënyì ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïkyel, kí yɑy me dwøng cɑrø. Akedhi gen Mikmɑc, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì bøli Bet Aben. Agud gen ki kɑɑl kì kunɑni." 
1Samuel13:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni linyɑni pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi gen, ɑrengi gen be pɑ̈nnø kì yethi órøggi kïttì, kí yethi burrì, kí kelli kïtt-ɑ thønhø, kí yethi ɑwöll geki yïïth-ɑ rum dwönø." 
1Samuel13:7 Kɑ kwï ji kwɑng-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun kì Gɑd kí Gilyɑd. Cɑul ɑ́nudd e obëëdø kì Gilgɑl, de jøge, dëlli gen ceg-ɑ okïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
1Samuel13:8 Kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew óthumø e Sɑmwel nuti bëënø, Sɑmwel ɑ́kööb cem e yïdii yi Cɑul kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew. De keny-ɑ ɑ́cög Sɑmwel nuti bëën Gilgɑl, kɑ jø Cɑul ócɑ̈gø ki tɑyø." 
1Samuel13:9 Codhe, ɑkööb Cɑul kinni, “Kɑ̈ni wun ki gënh-ɑ rɑ̈b geki gënhi mër.” Codhe, ɑngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Cɑul." 
1Samuel13:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Cɑul ceth, ki rɑ̈bbi gënhɑni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑwɑ̈nhi Sɑmwel kɑ Cɑul kedh-ɑ be pɑɑrii." 
1Samuel13:11 Apëjji Sɑmwel kinni, “Yï ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ngø?” Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Ji ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, ge ócɑ̈gø ki kedhø, yɑ owiyø yi gen, o yï nuti bëënø kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn kinni yï óbï, o tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, ri gen ɑ́cøng gen kì Mikmɑc." 
1Samuel13:12 Arumɑ kinni, tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ bɑ møg bï be nyɑɑg ki yɑn kì Gilgɑl, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mɑlø yi yɑn, bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́böyɑ ki rɑ̈bbii gënhe.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Aköbbii yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Yï ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gwøøg dhëëgø! Ciggi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mïdhø yi yïn, keløg ge di mïdhi yi yïn, lɑwí di cïbe piny kì Isrɑil gïti ɑtheer." 
1Samuel13:14 De ɑnɑn lɑwí pɑ kedhi bøle. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óyɑ̈ɑ̈bø ki ngɑn-ɑ dwɑdde, gwøgø ɑ́ jɑngi jie.”" 
1Samuel13:15 Kɑ Sɑmwel odhwödhø kì Gilgɑl, kɑ kedh-ɑ Gibeɑ̀ kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn. Kɑ Cɑul jøg-ɑ ɑ́döng ki en kwɑne, ɑyode kwɑnni gen ge bɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel." 
1Samuel13:16 Kɑ Cɑul geki wɑ̈de Yönɑthɑn, kí yɑye pëgg-ɑ Gebɑ̀ kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn. O tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑɑl gen ying-ɑ Mikmɑc." 
1Samuel13:17 Kɑ liny Pelistiyɑ̀ bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl gen gɑ dhøg ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ dhøg ɑ́kyel kɑ̈l-ɑ yuu Óprɑ̀, yuu-ɑ kedhi myërr-ɑ piny Cuɑɑl." 
1Samuel13:18 Kɑ dhøng-ɑ kyeelø kedh-ɑ Bet Örøn, kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen kɑ̈l-ɑ wïj kew-ɑ nenni Töör Dheböïm kì yij ryɑng." 
1Samuel13:19 Ábong-ɑ bødhø me nyi thɑ̈dhø kì Isrɑil bëne, mɑ́ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø kinni, keløg Isrɑil óyïddø ki bödhhì, ge ócuggø thɑ̈dh ki tøngg kí pil." 
1Samuel13:20 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd ge nyi kedh-ɑ Pelistiyɑ̀ be tyegi kwërri køøg, kí dørrì, kí ɑ́ngönn, kí gïg-ɑ nyi kuny ki piny." 
1Samuel13:21 Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́bëëd ge nyi tyeg kɑ ngyëny mø nøg. 
1Samuel13:22 De kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny, ɑ́bong-ɑ wɑ̈d Isrɑil me yïe di tøng wɑlɑ̀ pilø, den-ɑ́ Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈de ɑ yï gen ɑ́di pil ki tøngg." 
1Samuel13:23 Kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ oödø ki liny me kor dhø yuu Mikmɑc. 
1Samuel14:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑul, nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi linye ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Bïí kedhi wɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø løøng-ɑ di kɑɑl tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.” De Yönɑthɑn wïye nuti köbbø yi en." 
1Samuel14:2 Cɑul ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ thɑ yɑdh romɑn me ying buti Gibeɑ̀. Kwɑnni jøge bɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel ge ying-ɑ bute ceth. 
1Samuel14:3 Akiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akitub ómï Ikɑböd wɑ̈d Pineɑs wɑ̈d Elì ókwëri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Cilø, ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kwïj yi yɑy kinni Yönɑthɑn kedhø." 
1Samuel14:4 Yuu-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Yönɑthɑn kinni o kɑ̈ɑ̈le yije, e kedh-ɑ kɑɑl Pelistiyɑ̀ dɑ kïttì ɑ́ryew møg pödhi mɑl, ɑ́kyel cwøl ɑ́ Bödhedh, o men-ɑ kyeelø cwøl ɑ́ Senè." 
1Samuel14:5 Tuung kït ɑ́kyel pödh-ɑ mɑl e nenn-ɑ Mikmɑc kì wɑɑng wuudø, o tuung kït men-ɑ kyeelø pödh-ɑ mɑl e nenn-ɑ Gebɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
1Samuel14:6 Aköbbe nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi linye kinni, “Bïí kedhi wɑ kɑɑl jøgɑni, jøg-ɑ nuti ngølø, men-ɑ ókøny wɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keløg wɑ ókøny yi en, bong gïn-ɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈n gen tyɑmø yi wɑ, cɑgg wɑ nøg.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Alöggi nyelɑni kinni, “Gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Akööb Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Døj, kedhi wɑ tung-ɑcɑ̀, o wɑ lidh yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀." 
1Samuel14:9 Keløg wɑ óköbbi yi gen kinni yïd wɑ gen, o wɑ cög wɑ, wɑ obëëdø kì keje." 
1Samuel14:10 De keløg ge ókööbø kinni kedhi wɑ yï gen, o wɑ kedhi wɑ mɑl yï gen, kipe menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji miee kinni ge ɑ́cïb cinggee yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Codhe, ɑnyudhi gen ri gen tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Lïdhi wun! Tyëng Ibru kwï gen ɑ́mulli wɑ̈g kì yethi burrì møg-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nni gen!”" 
1Samuel14:12 Kɑ Yönɑthɑn cwøl gen geki nyel-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en kinni, “Bïu mɑl yï wøn, o wu nyudhi ki gïïpiny!” Codhe, kɑ Yönɑthɑn nyel-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en köbbe kinni, “Yïnhí mɑl bɑngɑ, ge ɑ́mëggi wɑ yi Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Ayedhi Yönɑthɑn mɑl e mull-ɑ cingge, kí nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi liny møge kì bɑnge ceth. Apödhi Yönɑthɑn kömi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ gï cøøre piny kedh ge onɑ̈gø yi nyel-ɑ bɑnge." 
1Samuel14:14 Kì yij liny tyeli mɑl, Yönɑthɑn geki nyel-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli jɑmmi linye ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ gïn ni pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kì keny me thiinh me lɑ̈ji yije bɑ budi pedɑn." 
1Samuel14:15 Kɑ yɑɑy tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ obwøgø ki mendwøng, gen ɑ møg-ɑ kɑɑl ki møg-ɑ be yɑg yethi myërr. Kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø! Ryɑ̈g me dwøng ɑ́ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel14:16 Kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́kor Cɑul kì Gibeɑ̀ kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ lidh gen, ge órïngø ge tumm-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen kì kɑɑl gen." 
1Samuel14:17 Codhe, ɑköbbi Cɑul jøge kinni, “Mɑmu yɑy, o yod mɑ løge’ men ɑ tøøk.” Akwɑn gen yɑy, kɑ Yönɑthɑn geki nyel-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli jɑmmi liny møge yod ge tøøk." 
1Samuel14:18 Codhe ɑköbbi ókwërø Akiyɑ̀ yi Cɑul kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny!” Akiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e kɑ̈ll-ɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil dicyɑ̈ngɑni." 
1Samuel14:19 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Cɑul e okööbø ki ókwërø, ɑtëngi liny ki menteg kì kɑɑl tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, codhe ɑköbbi Akiyɑ̀ yi Cɑul kinni, “Bong keny pyëj wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Kɑ Cɑul yɑye cønge, kɑ pödh-ɑ yij liny. Ayuud gen tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, wɑ̈thi gen muumø de ge kebb-ɑ ri gen keti gen ki pilli gen." 
1Samuel14:21 Kwï tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kelli tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kì kɑɑl gen, ri gen ɑ́løg gen, kɑ ge dwöög-ɑ tung-ɑ di Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn." 
1Samuel14:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ópɑ̈nnø kì kelli kïtti Eprɑim, kinni tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ócyeddø, ɑbëën gen yij liny thyew, kɑ ge reng-ɑ bɑng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀." 
1Samuel14:23 Isrɑil ɑ́køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngɑni kɑ liny gït-ɑ Bet Aben. 
1Samuel14:24 Tyëng Isrɑil bënn ɑ́mɑg yi kɑ̈j ki menteg dicyɑ̈ngɑni, mɑ́ Cɑul köngø kinni, “Ko di dhɑnhø me pɑ̈nyi cɑm ki gïncɑm gïti böörø, keny-ɑ órume ki tyɑmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Keløg e dɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø, ngɑnɑni köme ódi cyën.” Kɑ bong-ɑ wɑ̈d Isrɑil mɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
1Samuel14:25 Awɑ̈dhi yɑy yij thïm, keny me mulli yi møøw kïc kì piny." 
1Samuel14:26 Akɑ̈l gen kömi møøw kïc, de bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́bïdi kì kelli yɑy, mɑ́ ge óböggø ki cyën." 
1Samuel14:27 De Yönɑthɑn kwïj wøw, nuti lïngø ki köng-ɑ ɑ́köngi yi Cɑul. Codhe, ɑcøde lodhe yij møøw kïc kɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ wɑ̈g, ɑcɑme gøn. Kɑ kɑ̈j ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì ree, kɑ nyinge ótɑ̈rø." 
1Samuel14:28 Aköbbi Yönɑthɑn yi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli yɑy kinni, “Wïyí ɑ́köngi, kɑ yɑy kyëdde bëne kinni, ‘Ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈nyi cɑm dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, köme ódi cyën. Bene ɑ ngiin kɑ̈j ceth yi ji.’ ”" 
1Samuel14:29 Alöggi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Wïyɑ pödhø ɑ́kïdhe yij orɑng! Lidh, dëlɑ ɑ́dwöög keny-ɑ ɑ́bïdɑ ki nyɑ me thiinh." 
1Samuel14:30 Di bëëd e lɑ̈w keløg yɑy di cyɑ̈ɑ̈m dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, ki gïgcɑmm møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen kì yï tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. O tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ mø gïïr di nɑ̈g yi wɑ!”" 
1Samuel14:31 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́cyeddi, ge pwööd-ɑ piny yi tyëng Isrɑil, cɑg kì Mikmɑc gïti Ayɑlön, kɑ ge opïdø ki menteg." 
1Samuel14:32 Amɑɑg dyëg, kí dhög, kí røjj mø tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ yi gen. Kì bøli kenyɑni kɑ̈j ɑ́tëngi kì ri gen ki menteg, kɑ dyëg, kí dhög jwɑn yi gen ki nɑ̈gø, kɑ rïngø cɑm yi gen e nuti cyegø, kí remø kì ree." 
1Samuel14:33 Aköbbi Cɑul kinni, “Lidh! Jwøk ɑ́bwöl yi yɑy, kɑ rïngø cɑm e ree dɑ remø.” Akööb Cɑul e óryeerø kinni, “Jwøk ɑ́bwöl yi wun! Ngyëli wun keny ki kït me dwøng!”" 
1Samuel14:34 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Kedhu yï ji, kɑ ge köbbu bënn kinni, kɑ̈ɑ̈l ngɑn dyele wɑlɑ̀ wɑdhe, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge kì keny kɑ gø cɑme. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ ceg yi wun ki bwölø ki cɑm-ɑ cɑm wun rïngø ree dɑ remø?” Akɑ̈ɑ̈l gen dyëgi gen kí dhögi gen kenyɑni kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
1Samuel14:35 Bene kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kwöngi Cɑul ki gyer ki këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Këlɑni bene en men-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki gerø yi en kì tyeli mɑl ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
1Samuel14:36 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Bïu kedhi wɑ bɑng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, o wɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r wɑ kömi gen kì wɑ̈r tïn, o jɑmmi gen mɑg yi wɑ. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ówiy yi wɑ kì kelli gen e onëënø.” Alöggi jøge kinni, “Göög ki gïn-ɑ rømmí yi yïn e døøj.” De ókwërø ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wiy Jwøk pyëj yi wɑ møti.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Codhe, ɑpyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Cɑul kinni, “Rengɑ bɑng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀? Ge ócïb yi yïn cinggi wøn, o ge tyɑm yi wøn?” De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwøbbi Cɑul nuti løøg en, kì bøli kenyɑni." 
1Samuel14:38 Codhe ɑköbbi pëjji liny yi Cɑul kinni, “Bïu keny. Yod wɑ gïn-ɑ bɑ̈jjø dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng." 
1Samuel14:39 Yɑn ɑ köngi èn, ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ ɑ́thödhi Isrɑil ki teng-ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈me, kinni ngɑn-ɑ gwøøg orøg, ceg kɑ cɑyø ki thøø, cɑgg e bɑ wɑ̈dɑ Yönɑthɑn.”" 
1Samuel14:40 Codhe, ɑköbbi gen yi Cɑul kinni, “Cungi wun kì kun-ɑcɑ̀ wu bënn, yɑ ócungi kì keny wøki Yönɑthɑn.” Alöggi gen kinni, “Göög ki gïn-ɑ rømmi yïn e døøj.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Codhe, ɑkwɑjji Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Cɑul kinni, “Nyudhí yɑn gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër.” Apɑ̈dhi wëëlø ki Yönɑthɑn geki Cɑul, kɑ teedø bënn odöngø kì piny." 
1Samuel14:42 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Gïnɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi men kì kelli wøki wɑ̈dɑ Yönɑthɑn?” Kɑ wëëlø ópɑ̈dhø ki Yönɑthɑn." 
1Samuel14:43 Aköbbi Yönɑthɑn yi Cɑul kinni, “Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn.” Alöggi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Bɑ møøw kïc me thiinh ɑ ɑ́bel yi yɑn kì ri lodhɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́cwögɑ en. Yɑn èn, yɑ ócuggø nɑ̈gø.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köngi ki nyingi Jwøk, yï ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø Yönɑthɑn!”" 
1Samuel14:45 De ji Cɑul ɑ́köbbi yi gen kinni, “Á men ɑ nɑ̈g? Yönɑthɑn kiree? Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tyɑm tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀! Pɑ cuggi kinni tek! Ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong yëyi wïje ɑ́kyel me cuggi dëëm piny. Kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, ɑ́gwøg yi en kɑ kunyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Ayieel Yönɑthɑn yi gen, kɑ ocögø e pɑ nɑ̈g." 
1Samuel14:46 Kɑ Cɑul ówïyø cyeddi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ myërri gen." 
1Samuel14:47 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög Cɑul ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Ányïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Moɑb, kí tyëng Amön, kí tyëng Edöm, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dhöbɑ̀, kí tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi Cɑul bënn, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki Isrɑil gï nyi tyɑme’ tyɑmø." 
1Samuel14:48 Ányïɑ̈ggi ki nyɑɑg me teeg cɑrø ki tyëng Amɑlek. Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́yiele kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑb jɑmmi gen. 
1Samuel14:49 Wɑ̈ddi Cɑul bɑ Yönɑthɑn, kí Icbì, kí Mɑlkicuɑ̀. Nyɑre, nyɑn-ɑ dwøng cwøl ɑ́ Merɑb, o nyɑn-ɑ thinh cwøl ɑ́ Mikɑl." 
1Samuel14:50 Cï Cɑul cwøl ɑ́ Akinoɑm nyɑɑr Akimɑɑdh. Abner pënyi linye, bɑ wɑ̈d Ner, ówï wïyi Cɑul." 
1Samuel14:51 Wïyi Cɑul Kïc geki wïyi Abner bɑ wɑ̈ddi Abiel. 
1Samuel14:52 Cɑul keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e onëënø ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ki nyɑɑg me teeg. Kenyi di dhɑnhø me lidh yi Cɑul e teeg, o wïje pel, gø nyi ceg yi en kɑ kïdhi kelli jølinye." 
1Samuel15:1 Kɑ Cɑul köbbi yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be rønyi yïn, yïn ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh jie, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil. Anɑn lïngí kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel15:2 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, kwɑrri Amɑlek bɑ møg cɑy yi en, mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́rødh yi kweyyi gen, kɑ gï mɑ̈ɑ̈n gen bëën piny Kɑnɑɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
1Samuel15:3 Kedh ɑnɑn, kɑ kwɑrri Amɑlek nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Kɑ jɑmmi gen bënn møg-ɑ nud ki yï gen nɑ̈ɑ̈g, o ge bëëd gen gɑ gëdhhì mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ko di gïjø ɑ́kyel me wiy yi wun; nɑ̈g gen bënn, jøg-ɑ cwøw geki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø kí dhög, kí dyëg, kí ɑmɑl, kí ɑderr.”" 
1Samuel15:4 Acwøøl yɑy bëne kej ɑ́kyel yi Cɑul, kì Telɑim. Kwɑnni jø Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd gɑ ji ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi tyelli gen, kí jø Yeudiyɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø." 
1Samuel15:5 Codhe, ɑkedhi Cɑul kɑɑl kwɑrri Amɑlek be liibi gen piny kì yij tör." 
1Samuel15:6 Aköbbi tyëng Ken yi Cɑul kinni, “Kedhu wɑ̈yi wun, wiyu tyëng Amɑlek keti gen, o wu cög wu pɑ nɑ̈g yi wøn kyeel ki gen.” Codhe, ɑdhwödh tyëng Ken." 
1Samuel15:7 Atyɑɑm tyëng Amɑlek yi Cɑul, kɑ ge cyeddi yi en, cɑg kì Abïlɑ̀ gïti Cur kì wïj keew Rïp kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
1Samuel15:8 Kɑ ji bënn nɑ̈ge, ɑmɑge Agɑg e onëënø, de yɑɑy Agɑg gø ɑ́nɑ̈ge bëne, gï kebbe’ kebbø ki pilø." 
1Samuel15:9 Agɑg ɑ́wiy e onëënø yi Cɑul. Dyëg-ɑ døj, kí dhög-ɑ cwiy, kí jɑmm-ɑ døj, gï nuti nɑ̈gø yi gen. Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ rijjø, kí møg-ɑ gwɑ̈lø gwɑ̈lø." 
1Samuel15:10 Aköbbi Sɑmwel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
1Samuel15:11 “Yijɑ ɑ́ywöngi kipe kɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ Cɑul ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, ngɑ̈je ɑ́luge yɑn, ciggɑ ɑ́bɑnye, gï pɑ lïnge.” Amɑɑg Sɑmwel yi liny, kɑ lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r e ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøk." 
1Samuel15:12 Dhuki kì mwøl, ɑdhwödh Sɑmwel kɑ kedh-ɑ be yïddø ki Cɑul. De ɑ́köbbi yi ji kinni i Cɑul kedhi Kɑrmel kun-ɑ gëdde ree ki lyel, codhe kɑ kedh-ɑ Gilgɑl." 
1Samuel15:13 Akedhi Sɑmwel yï Cɑul, ɑkööb Cɑul kinni, “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki gwøgø yi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Apëjji Sɑmwel kinni, “De dhög geki dyëg-ɑ cwɑggi gen lïngɑ ek, ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ keny?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi yɑy, kì yï tyëng Amɑlek. Dyëg geki dhög møg-ɑ myëër ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen, gɑ mø ngɑ̈lli Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de møg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wøn bënn.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Akyëëd Sɑmwel kinni, “Kud, o yï köbbɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈r.” Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Köbbí yɑn.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Kɑ Sɑmwel okööbø kinni, “Cɑgg rií rømmi yi yïn yï thiinh, yïn ɑ bɑ jɑngi Isrɑil. Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́røny yïn, yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bëne." 
1Samuel15:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ör yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï nuti köbbø yi en kinni, ‘Kedh kɑ yï nyïɑ̈ggí ki tyëngorøg, ɑ løg tyëng Amɑlek. Nyïɑ̈ggí ki gen kɑ ge nɑ̈ɑ̈g bënn, ko di gïjø me wiy yi yïn?’" 
1Samuel15:19 Yïde ɑ pyeem kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Yïde ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny jɑmmì møg-ɑ myëër, ɑ göög ki gïn rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti pyeem yɑn. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́gwøgɑ. Tyëng Amɑlek ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ bënn ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Agɑg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ." 
1Samuel15:21 Dɑ́ yɑy ɑ ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ dyëg geki dhög-ɑ døj, o ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gɑ møg ngɑ̈lli Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Gilgɑl gɑ gëdhhì.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Kɑ Sɑmwel ólöggø kinni, “Á gïn ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gëdhh-ɑ ngɑl, wɑlɑ̀ lïngi møg-ɑ kwøb yi en? Gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lɑ̈w kibøli ngɑ̈dde ki gëdhhì." 
1Samuel15:23 Pyemi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑɑj, pɑ̈r ki thyëdh, o ɑthwøg rɑɑj, pɑ̈r ki kwɑjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth. Yï ɑ́bɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï pɑth ki rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ cigge ɑ́bɑny yi yïn.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Codhe, ɑköbbi Sɑmwel yi Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́røngi. Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mïdhø yi yɑn geki kwøbbí. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ óböggø yi yɑy, ɑgwøgɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi gen." 
1Samuel15:25 De ɑnɑn yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí, kɑ wïjí wïle ki orøgɑ, kɑ wɑ døøg wɑ Gilgɑl, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl yi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Alöggi Sɑmwel kinni, “Wɑ pɑ døg. Yï ɑ́pyem-ɑ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yï ɑ́bɑny yi en, yï pɑ bëëdø yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil këti.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Codhe, ɑløg Sɑmwel ree e ókedhø, kɑ mɑg yi Cɑul kì ri bɑɑd ɑ́ywönhdwøng men-ɑ ree, kɑ ɑ́ywödh ópyëdø." 
1Samuel15:28 Aköbbii yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lɑwi Isrɑil ɑ́pyëëde wɑ̈g kì kömí dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kɑ gø mëgge ngɑn megø me lɑ̈w kibølí." 
1Samuel15:29 Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ dwøng pɑ nyi kømmi pyed, mɑ́ e pɑth ki dhɑnhø ɑ nyi wil dhøge.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́røngi, de kɑl yɑn ki wørø kì bøli pëjji yɑy geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn. Bïí døg wɑ, o Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl yi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Codhe, ɑdøøg Sɑmwel Gilgɑl geki Cɑul. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl yi Cɑul." 
1Samuel15:32 Kɑ Sɑmwel okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun Agɑg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amɑlek.” Abëën Agɑg yï Sɑmwel e dële okïrrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, e okööbø ki pyëwe kinni, “Thøø dhøge ledh kidyër!”" 
1Samuel15:33 Kɑ Sɑmwel okööbø kinni, “Pilí mëëg ɑ́gwøøge thwömm, meyí ceg-ɑ lunyø’ gwøg ɑ́ thwöm!” Kɑ Agɑg celle ɑ́ gullì kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Gilgɑl." 
1Samuel15:34 Codhe, ɑkedhi Sɑmwel Rɑmɑ̀, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Cɑul kedh-ɑ pɑɑre kì Gibeɑ̀." 
1Samuel15:35 Rɑ̈dh nuti cigi lidhø yi Sɑmwel, gïti kɑ ɑ́pïïd Sɑmwel yi thøø, De ɑ́bëëd e ywøg-ɑ Cɑul ceth, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yije óywöngø kipe kɑ ɑ́gwøge Cɑul ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
1Samuel16:1 Kɑ Sɑmwel köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng yï óywöngø kipe Cɑul? Ábɑnyɑ, pɑth ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil këti. De ɑnɑn dhwöödh, pɑ̈ng tungí ki møøw dhetun, kɑ yï kedhí Betleem, yï jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Yesì. Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi kì kelli wɑ̈dde ki ngɑn-ɑ ógöögø ɑ́ rɑ̈dh.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Apëjji Sɑmwel kinni, “Yɑ kedh-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï! Keløg møgɑni ólïngi yi Cɑul, yɑ pɑ nɑ̈g yi en?” Aköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki nyɑ wɑdh, kɑ yï kööb kinni yï kedh-ɑ be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëëdhi." 
1Samuel16:3 Kɑ Yesì cwøøl kenyɑni, yï óköbbi yi yɑn ki gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yïn. Wïj nyel-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, ókunyi yi yïn ki møw.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Agwøøg gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Sɑmwel. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Sɑmwel Betleem, kɑ jøgdøngi pɑc bï-ɑ yïe, ge óböggø, kɑ ge ópëjjø kinni, “Yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ tɑrø?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Alöggi Sɑmwel kinni, “Ngee, yɑ cyɑ̈dh-ɑ tɑrø! Yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be ngɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëëdhi. Kwëru ri wun, kɑ wu bïu kej kwër.” Yesì ɑ́köbbi thyew yi en kinni kwër gen ri gen geki wɑ̈dde, kɑ ge kedhi gen kej kwër." 
1Samuel16:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen, kɑ Sɑmwel Eliɑb wɑ̈d Yesì lidhe, ɑrume kinni, “Nyel-ɑ cungi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j èn, bene nyel-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi en.”" 
1Samuel16:7 De ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko nenni bɑ̈re ki myëri dële, ɑ́bɑnyɑ, mɑ́ yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ nyi nenn-ɑ pyëw.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Codhe, kɑ Yesì wɑ̈de Abinɑdɑb cwøle, kɑ gø muuje Sɑmwel. De Sɑmwel ɑ́löggi kinni, “Pɑth, nuti myegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thyew.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Kɑ Cɑmɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïe yi Yesì, ɑdøøg Sɑmwel ki kwøb kinni, “Pɑth nuti myegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thyew.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Kɑ Yesì wɑ̈dde ɑ́bïryew óthumø ki cwöölø yi en, de Sɑmwel ɑ́kyëëd kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mëggø kì kelli gen." 
1Samuel16:11 Apyëjii yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Yïí dɑ wɑ̈dd møøgø?” Alöggi Yesì kinni, “Nyel-ɑ thinh nud, de ying-ɑ bɑng dyëg.” Akööb Sɑmwel kinni, “Öd ki ngɑn dwɑɑyii, mɑ́ wɑ pɑ pëggi piny, gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhe keny.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Codhe, kɑ Yesì öd-ɑ be dwɑɑyii. Bɑ nyelthinh me dële døøj, bøle myëër. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Sɑmwel köbbe kinni, “Bene en ɑnɑn, køny møw wïje.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Akwɑɑny møw yi Sɑmwel, kɑ gø kønye wïj Debïd, kì bøli nyiimen bënn. Kɑ wëyi Jwøk kedh-ɑ ri Debïd kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ obëëdø kì ree. Codhe, kɑ Sɑmwel døøg-ɑ Rɑmɑ̀." 
1Samuel16:14 Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́dhwödh kì ri Cɑul, kɑ ree kedhi yi wëyrɑj mɑ ɑ́örii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel16:15 Aköbbi Cɑul yi bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni, dɑ wëyrɑj mɑ ɑ́ör rií yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kinni, o yï rɑngí." 
1Samuel16:16 De wiy wøn wuö, o wø kedhi wøn be yɑ̈bbi yïn ki dhɑnhø me ngɑ̈ny thumø ki thom kidøøj. O kenyi bëën wëyɑni, o jɑlɑni nyi thume ki thom, o pyëwí nyi dwööge.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Aköbbi gen yi Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ̈bbu yɑn ki jɑl me ngɑ̈ny thumø ki thom kidøøj, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lu yïɑ.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Aköbbii yi nyel ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøg-ɑ kenyɑni kinni, “Yesì, jɑl kɑɑl Betleem yïe dɑ wɑ̈de me nyi thumø ki thom kidøøj. Bɑ nyel me wïje pel thyew, o bøle myëër. Bɑ jɑl-liny me teg, o ngɑ̈ny kwøb kidøøj. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ köme.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Codhe, ɑödi Cɑul yï Yesì kinni, “Örí yɑn wɑ̈dí Debïd, nyel-ɑ kwɑ̈yø ki dyëg.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Aör Debïd yï Cɑul yi Yesì, e ókɑ̈ddø ki ónywøg, kí ɑderø köme pɑ̈ng yi ópùn, kí ɑtheb me pɑ̈ng yi møgi oløg." 
1Samuel16:21 Abëën Debïd yï Cɑul, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki gwøg. Kɑ gwøge pwøj yi Cɑul ki mendwøng, kɑ gø kwɑnye ɑ́ ngɑn nyi kɑ̈lli jɑmmi linye." 
1Samuel16:22 Codhe, ɑödi Cɑul yï Yesì ki wöödø kinni, “Wiy Debïd bëëde kì yij gwøge, mɑ́ e odwɑddø yi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Kenyi bëën wëyɑni ri Cɑul, kɑ Debïd thom nyi kwɑnye, kɑ Cɑul nyii dönyø, kɑ pyëwe nyii dwöögø." 
1Samuel17:1 Kɑ liny tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ree kiwe, ɑcøng gen ri gen Sökö kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ liny gen pëgg-ɑ Epes Dɑmïm kì kɑɑm Sökö geki Adhekɑ̀." 
1Samuel17:2 Kɑ Cɑul gudd-ɑ Töör Elɑ̀ geki liny Isrɑil, ge nenn-ɑ nyɑɑg ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀." 
1Samuel17:3 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ liny ɑ́tɑd yi gen kì tuung, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil liny gen tɑd gen kì tung-ɑ kyeelø, ge nenn-ɑ yij tör bënn." 
1Samuel17:4 Kɑ jɑl megø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl Pelistiyɑ̀, jɑlɑni bɑ jɑl Gɑth kì Pelistiyɑ̀, o cwøl ɑ́ Gölyɑth. Bɑ jɑl me bɑ̈ɑ̈r; bɑ̈re bɑ gïn ni mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
1Samuel17:5 Kööre luny en ki ɑ́dhedheg me pege bɑ gïn ni kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́bïryew, o wïje dɑ ɑcudh mɑ ngyënyø dilɑl." 
1Samuel17:6 Tyelle dɑ ɑ́dhedheg møg-ɑ óbødh ri gen, o yïe dɑ ɑkebïdh mɑ ngyënyø dilɑl kì wïj tøge." 
1Samuel17:7 Bööl ɑkebïdhe dwøøng nɑ leg. O men-ɑ́ ɑkebïnhɑni peeg cɑrø, bɑ gïn ni kïllì ɑ́bïryew. Nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli kwöde cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøle" 
1Samuel17:8 Acungi Gölyɑth, kɑ óryeerø e köbb-ɑ yɑɑy Isrɑil kinni, “Wude ɑ ɑ́bëën wun be liny? Yɑ pɑth ki wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀, o wu pɑth ki bɑ̈nggi Cɑul! Yïëëny wun ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, kɑ ör wun be nyɑɑg ki yɑn." 
1Samuel17:9 Keløg e ócuggø nyɑɑg ki yɑn, kɑ yɑ nɑ̈ge, wø ógöögø ki bɑ̈nggi wun. De keløg ɑ́ en ɑ ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, wu ógöögø wun ɑ́ bɑ̈nggi wøn.”" 
1Samuel17:10 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑɑy Isrɑil ɑ́lɑr yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, ödu yɑn ki ngɑn bï be nyɑɑg ki yɑn.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ yi Cɑul geki tyëng Isrɑil, ɑbwøg gen ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel17:12 Debïd bɑ wɑ̈d Yesì, kì Eprɑtɑ̀, ɑ løg Betleem kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀. Yesì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dde ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì wɑɑng-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Cɑul. Yesì ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑldwøng me rum yöø." 
1Samuel17:13 Wɑ̈dde yɑɑg-ɑ døngø gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ́ying-ɑ kej liny kì kelli yɑɑy Cɑul. Nyel-ɑ kɑyø cwøl ɑ́ Eliɑb, o bɑnge cwøl ɑ́ Abinɑdɑb, o dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen cwøl ɑ́ Cɑmɑ̀." 
1Samuel17:14 Debïd ɑ bɑ kunø. Yesì wɑ̈dde yɑɑg-ɑ døngø gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ́kedhi bɑng Cɑul be liny. 
1Samuel17:15 De Debïd nyi kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di Cɑul kɑ nyi dwöög-ɑ Betleem kun-ɑ bëëde e kwɑy-ɑ dyëgi wïye. 
1Samuel17:16 Kɑ wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, e nyi bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì mwøl kí böörø, yethi cyɑ̈ng, kɑ nyii cungø kì bøli yɑɑy Isrɑil." 
1Samuel17:17 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, kɑ Yesì wɑ̈de Debïd köbbe kinni, “Kwɑny omøddi byel møg, kí ópùn pyɑ̈rø, kɑ ge muuj nyiimyëw kì kɑɑl." 
1Samuel17:18 Kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki ɑ́tuggi jïbnɑ̀ pyɑ̈rø, kɑ ge mëggí jɑl-ɑ pyejji liny geki nyiimyëw. Kedh, lidh nyiimyëw mɑ bëëd gen kidï, kɑ yï kɑ̈ní ki ngïji men nyudhi yɑn kinni ge nud bënn ki yödi dëlli gen." 
1Samuel17:19 Nyiimyëw ying-ɑ kej ɑ́kyel ki Cɑul kí yɑy bëne, kì yij Töör Elɑ̀, ge ceg-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel17:20 Kɑ Debïd odhwödhø kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ dyëg wiye ki jɑlkwɑ̈yø megø. Akwɑnye gïncɑm, kɑ ókedhø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Yesì. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Debïd wïj kër, ɑyuude liny e kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg e okïïwø ki ɑkyeew liny." 
1Samuel17:21 Tyëng Isrɑil ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ cong-ɑ ri gen gɑ køøm, ge nenn-ɑ nyingi gen." 
1Samuel17:22 Awiy gïncɑm yi Debïd kì buti jɑl-ɑ cinge nyi cïb gïgcɑmm, kɑ reng-ɑ wïj kër, o yïdde ki nyiimen." 
1Samuel17:23 Kì bøli kenyɑni e nuti e okööbø ki nyiimen, ɑbëën Gölyɑth wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ jɑl Gɑth. Aryeere e kømm-ɑ gïgrijjø kì ri Isrɑil. Kɑ kwøbbe lïngi yi Debïd." 
1Samuel17:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Gölyɑth yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge obwøgø ɑrengi gen," 
1Samuel17:25 ge okööbø kinni, “Lidhu jɑɑl! Nyi cög e bï-ɑ wɑ̈g be lɑri Isrɑil. Ngɑn-ɑ ónɑ̈gii óthödhi yi rɑ̈dh ki ngyëny mø gïïr. Ngɑn-ɑ ónɑ̈gii ómëgge nyɑre thyew. O gøl gen pɑ cudø ki gwɑ̈j kì Isrɑil.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Kɑ Debïd jɑl-ɑ cungi kì bute pyëje kinni, “Á ngø ɑ køøg ngɑn nɑ̈g wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ men, kɑ ɑyɑ̈r kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì kömi Isrɑil? Ree rømmi yi en ɑ́ ngø, eni wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ men-ɑ nuti ngølø? Ede ɑ lɑrre yɑɑy Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Aköbbi Debïd gïn-ɑ ókøøg jɑl-ɑ ónɑ̈g Gölyɑth. 
1Samuel17:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi Debïd e okööbø ki jøgɑni yi ómen Eliɑb, nyel-ɑ dwøng, ɑrënyi pyëwe ki Debïd. Apyëje Debïd kinni, “Yïde ɑ ɑ́bëën keny? Á men ɑ kor dyëgí kì pɑ̈l? Yï ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, yï bɑ ngeti ɑthwøg kí orøg. Yï ɑ́bï keny kɑ per nenni liny yøw?”" 
1Samuel17:29 Apëjji Debïd kinni, “Gïnrɑj ɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ ɑnɑn? Yɑ pɑ cuggi thyew ki kwøb?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́luge ree jøg møøgø, kɑ gï pyëje ki møgɑni, kɑ tyëngɑni nyi løøg-ɑ møg ni møg-ɑ ɑ́tïni ceth." 
1Samuel17:31 Dɑ ji mɑ ɑ́lïngi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Debïd, kɑ Cɑul köbbi gen møgɑni, ɑöde be dwɑɑyi Debïd." 
1Samuel17:32 Aköbbi Cɑul yi Debïd kinni, “Ko di ngɑn me wɑnge bɑɑr, yɑ ókedhi be nyïɑ̈ggø ki wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ menɑni.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Yï pɑ cuggi kedhi be nyɑɑg ki ngɑn ni wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ menɑni. Yï bɑ nyelthinh yøw. Gölyɑth bɑ ngeti nyɑɑg kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ wøb.”" 
1Samuel17:34 De Cɑul ɑ́köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí mïdh-ɑ dyëgi wïye. Kenyi bëën ngur, wɑlɑ̀ óthwönh, kɑ ógwɑ̈rrø ki dyel kì kelli dyëg," 
1Samuel17:35 yɑ nyi reng-ɑ bɑnge. Wø nyii nyïɑ̈ggø ki gøn, kɑ dyel yielɑ kì dhøge, kɑ̀ nyïɑ̈ggi wøn ki en, nyi mɑgɑ’ mɑgø kì ri yɑ̈re, kɑ tøgɑ, kɑ othøø." 
1Samuel17:36 Bɑ̈ngí ɑ́nɑ̈gi ki ngur, kí óthwönh. O wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ men-ɑ nuti ngølø èn, óni gen, mɑ́ yɑɑy Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø ɑ́lɑr yi en." 
1Samuel17:37 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel yɑn, ɑbødhɑ kì dhø ngur geki óthwönh, yɑ óyiele ki wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ men.” Aköbbi Debïd yi Cɑul kinni, “Kedh, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ókɑ̈l yi en ki tɑrø.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Kɑ Cɑul ɑ́dhedhege kïdhe ri Debïd. Abudhe wïje ki ɑcudh liny mɑ ngyënyø dilɑl, kɑ cinge cïbe ki kwöd." 
1Samuel17:39 Kɑ Debïd, pili Cɑul ngɑɑbe ree. Kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø e pɑ̈ny-ɑ gïn, kɑ dhɑl yi pegi gen, mɑ́ gïgɑni nuti pɑ̈nyø yi en ki rugø. Aköbbe Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ pɑ cuggi kedhø ki gïg, mɑ́ ge nuti pɑ̈nyi yɑn ki rugø.”" 
1Samuel17:40 Kɑ Debïd lodhe cïbe cinge, kɑ ogwënø ki lel ɑ́bïj, mø lïw kì tyeli nɑm. Akïdhe gïn yij ɑthebe, kí bɑ̈ɑ̈di mee kì cinge, codhe ɑkedhe e pödh-ɑ yï wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀." 
1Samuel17:41 Kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kedh wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ bï-ɑ yï Debïd, e nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli kwöde ócyɑ̈dhø kì bøle." 
1Samuel17:42 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Debïd yi Gölyɑth kinni bɑ nyelthinh yøw, mɑ́ gø nenni yi en ɑ́ nyelthinh me bøle myëër." 
1Samuel17:43 Aköbbe Debïd kinni, “Yï orumø kinni yɑ bɑ gwög, me yïe bëën yi yïn ki lodh?” Agwɑdde Debïd gø lɑme’ lɑmø kinni, o göggi yi jwøge ki gïnrɑj." 
1Samuel17:44 Kɑ Debïd köbbe kinni, “Bïí yïɑ, o yï mëggɑ winyy-ɑ pɑ̈rri kì mɑl geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, o yï cɑm yi gen.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Yï bï be nyɑɑg ki yɑn, yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ pilø, kí tøng, kí ɑdïmø, de yɑ bï yïí kɑ nyingi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg yɑ̈yyi Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́bwöl yi yïn." 
1Samuel17:46 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï cïbe’ cingɑ dicyɑ̈ngtïn, yï nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø, wïjí ngulɑ’ wɑ̈g. Yɑɑy Pelistiyɑ̀ ocɑmø yi winyyi mɑl geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l dicyɑ̈ngtïn. O yod yi piny bëne kinni dɑ Jwøk kì Isrɑil." 
1Samuel17:47 O yod yi teenɑni bëne kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tyɑ̈mø nyi muuje’ muujø, cɑgg cingi dhɑnhø bong pilø, wɑlɑ̀ bong tøng. Mɑ́ linyɑni bɑ liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu ócïbe cinggi wøn ceth.”" 
1Samuel17:48 Kɑ Gölyɑth ócyɑ̈ngø e kedh-ɑ yï Debïd, kedh Debïd jwɑn-ɑ rengi yï wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ menɑni." 
1Samuel17:49 Akɑ̈ni Debïd wɑ̈g ki lelø kì yij ɑthebe, kɑ gø cïbe yij bɑ̈ɑ̈di, kɑ gø lewe, ɑbɑ̈dde, kɑ lelø pɑ̈dh-ɑ bøli wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ lelø ceg-ɑ ì cød kì bøle, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dhe yije rum en piny." 
1Samuel17:50 Debïd wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́tyɑme ki bɑ̈ɑ̈di geki lelø yøw, gø ɑ́gøje kɑ gø nɑ̈ge e bong pilø kì cinge." 
1Samuel17:51 Codhe, ɑrengi Debïd, kɑ ócungø kì köme. Awöödhe pili Gölyɑth wɑ̈g kì yij bøje, kɑ wïje ngule wɑ̈g, kɑ othøø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni pënyi liny gen ɑ́thøw, ɑrengi gen." 
1Samuel17:52 Kɑ jø Isrɑil geki jø Yeudiyɑ̀ reng-ɑ bɑng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ge okïïwø, kɑ gï cyeddi gen kì yuu kɑɑl Gɑth gïti dhø döri Ekrön. Kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ odöngø kì piny ge thøø kì kö yuu Cɑɑrɑim gïti Gɑth, kí Ekrön." 
1Samuel17:53 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög tyëng Isrɑil kì be cyeddi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ kɑɑl Pelistiyɑ̀ yɑg yi gen." 
1Samuel17:54 Akïdhi wïj Gölyɑth Yerusɑlem yi Debïd, de ɑkebïdh Gölyɑth geki pile, kí kwöde ɑ́cïbe yij kemɑ̀ mee." 
1Samuel17:55 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Debïd yi Cɑul e kedh-ɑ yï Gölyɑth, ɑpyëje Abner jɑng-ɑ pyejji liny kinni, “Abner, wïyi nyelthinh men ceg bëëdø ɑ́ men?” Alöggi Abner kinni, “Kwïj yi yɑn wuö.”" 
1Samuel17:56 Akööb rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedh pëjjí, mɑ bëëde ɑ́ wɑ̈d men.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Debïd kì be nɑ̈gi Gölyɑth, ɑkïdhii yï Cɑul yi Abner, e wïj Gölyɑth nudd gø mïdhe’ mïdhø kì cinge." 
1Samuel17:58 Apyëjii yi Cɑul kinni, “Nyelthinh, wïyí bɑ men?” Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ bɑ wɑ̈d bɑ̈ngí Yesì kì Betleem.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki kwøb geki Cɑul, ɑgöög Yönɑthɑn ki men pyëwe med ki Debïd, kɑ gø mɑɑre, ni kɑ̀ mɑɑre ree." 
1Samuel18:2 Kɑ Debïd kwɑny yi Cɑul kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, gø ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈ne døøg pɑɑ gen." 
1Samuel18:3 Aköngi Yönɑthɑn geki Debïd kinni ri gen ómɑɑr yi gen ceth ni mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr dhɑnhø ree. 
1Samuel18:4 Kɑ Yönɑthɑn ógønhdwøng mee lunye wɑ̈g, kɑ gø mëgge Debïd, kyeel kí ɑ́dhedhege geki pile, kí wethe, kí wëni yije." 
1Samuel18:5 Debïd nyii tyɑ̈mø kì kɑ̈jji lìny-ɑ ber gen nyi örii yi Cɑul. Codhe, ɑgwøøg Debïd yi Cɑul ɑ́ jɑngi yɑy. Amïni pëthi pëjji liny geki tyëng-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
1Samuel18:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ ki nɑ̈gø yi Debïd, ɑdwööge pɑc geki jøg møøgø. Abëën tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn wɑ̈g bënn kì yethi kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil, ge bï-ɑ be pɑɑri Rɑ̈dh Cɑul, ge ocöngø, o ge owörø ki wörri medi pëëth, o ge opödø ki bullì, kí thøm." 
1Samuel18:7 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́cööng ge owörø kinni, “Cɑul ɑ́lïp mø gïïr ɑ́nɑ̈ge. De Debïd ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Arënyi pyëw Cɑul yi wörri tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn. Árum kinni tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kømm-ɑ kinni, “Debïd ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r. De gïn-ɑ ɑ́döng, ɑ tøøk kipere, bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kete.”" 
1Samuel18:9 Cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ ɑ́göög Cɑul ki men wɑnge cuul ki Debïd. 
1Samuel18:10 Dhuki, kɑ wëyrɑj menɑni pönh-ɑ kömi Cɑul e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki myëlø kì gøle, e Debïd othumø ki thom ni kenyi thume yethi cyɑ̈ng, o Cɑul ɑ́bëëd cinge dɑ tøng." 
1Samuel18:11 Kɑ tøngɑni tïm yi Cɑul, ɑköbbe ree kinni, “Debïd miinɑ’ ri dörø!” Kɑ ókëddø tyel ɑ́ryew, kɑ tøng nyi kyëj yi Debïd." 
1Samuel18:12 Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ying-ɑ ri Debïd, de Cɑul ɑ́wiy yi wëyɑni. Codhe, ɑgöög Cɑul ki men böggi yi Debïd." 
1Samuel18:13 Akɑ̈ɑ̈le Debïd wɑ̈g kì gøle, kɑ gwøg yi en ɑ́ pënyi liny, me pyëjji ki ɑ́lïp. Jø linye ɑ́pyejj-ɑ yi Debïd." 
1Samuel18:14 Gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi Debïd bënn nyi ceg kɑ lwɑ̈ngø yi en, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ köme." 
1Samuel18:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Debïd yi Cɑul e nyii tyɑ̈mø ceth, ɑgööge e ceg-ɑ böggø yi Debïd ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel18:16 De Debïd mɑɑr yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pënyi liny me teg." 
1Samuel18:17 Aköbbi Debïd yi Cɑul kinni, “Nyɑrɑ, Merɑb nyɑn-ɑ kɑyø, ómëggɑ yïn. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn bɑ kinni, bëëd wïjí onëënø, kɑ yï nyɑg liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Cɑul ɑ́kööb ki pyëwe kinni, “Debïd pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn ki cingɑ, wiy e ónɑ̈g yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel18:18 De kwøbbi Cɑul ɑ́løøg yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑn ɑ́ men? O gøl wøn dɑ keje kì Isrɑil, me pere göögɑ ki øri rɑ̈dh?”" 
1Samuel18:19 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli keny-ɑ di mëggi Merɑb Debïd, ɑ́yöd e mëgg-ɑ Adriel jɑl Mekölɑ̀ yi Cɑul." 
1Samuel18:20 Kì bøli kenyɑni Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul ɑ́bëëd Debïd mɑɑr yi en. Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi møgɑni Cɑul, ɑmïni pyëwe." 
1Samuel18:21 Ree ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Ómëggɑ Debïd, o gø nywøme. Codhe, o nyɑnɑni bëëde ɑ́ men-ɑ óthɑbii, o yïdde ki keny nɑ̈gii yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.” Codhe, ɑköbbi Debïd yi Cɑul këti kinni, “Yï ócuggø gwøg ki ørɑ.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Kɑ Cɑul bɑ̈ngge cege kì gød, o ge kööb gen ki Debïd kì cyɑ̈n kinni, “Álidh yi yïn, rɑ̈dh pyëwe med ki yïn, o yï omɑɑrø yi bɑ̈ngge. Rɑ̈dh dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o nyɑre nywøm yi yïn.”" 
1Samuel18:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi møgɑni Debïd yi bɑ̈nggi Cɑul, ɑlöggi Debïd kinni, “Wu orumø kinni nywømi nyirɑ̈dh bɑ gïjø me yöd? Yɑ bɑ ngɑn wɑngɑ cɑn, yɑ bong perɑ.”" 
1Samuel18:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Cɑul møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Debïd, ɑkööbe kinni," 
1Samuel18:25 “Köbbu Debïd kinni bong kɑ̈ny me dwɑddɑ kì yïe. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ bɑ dëlli wɑ̈thi jɑmmi jø Pelistiyɑ̀ gɑ miyø. Møgɑni bene gen ɑ mëggi yɑn ɑ́ kɑ̈ny, gen ɑ cud yi rɑ̈dh ki kɑ̈jji jie møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.” (Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Cɑul kɑ per kinni, o Debïd di nɑ̈g yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.)" 
1Samuel18:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Debïd møgɑni yi bɑ̈nggi Cɑul, ɑmïni pyëwe kinni bɑ men göögø ki øri rɑ̈dh." 
1Samuel18:27 Codhe, ɑkedh Debïd geki jøge, kɑ ge ónɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ miy ɑ́ryew. Akɑ̈ɑ̈l dëlli wɑ̈thi jɑmmi gen gɑ miy ɑ́ryew yi Debïd, kɑ ge kwɑɑn bøli rɑ̈dh, o nyɑre muuje. Codhe, kɑ Cɑul nyɑre Mikɑl mëgge Debïd." 
1Samuel18:28 Áyod yi Cɑul kinni wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud kì ri Debïd, o Debïd omɑɑrø yi nyɑre Mikɑl." 
1Samuel18:29 Kɑ ceg-ɑ pëddø böggi Debïd, kɑ ocögø e Debïd mɑɑn yi en." 
1Samuel18:30 Jɑgg-ɑ pyejji liny Pelistiyɑ̀ nyi tëdd-ɑ kömi Isrɑil ki liny, kɑ Debïd nyi ceg-ɑ pëddø tyɑ̈mø kibøli pëjji liny Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ Debïd pere yöd e ceg-ɑ tëngø ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel19:1 Cɑul wɑ̈de Yönɑthɑn geki bɑ̈ngge bënn gï ɑ́köbbe kinni i nɑ̈g gen Debïd, de Yönɑthɑn Debïd mɑɑr yi en ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel19:2 Kɑ Yönɑthɑn Debïd köbbe kinni, “Wïyɑ Cɑul dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn, kor rií kì wɑ̈r, dhuki kɑ yï pɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
1Samuel19:3 Wø ókedhi yij pwönh-ɑ ópɑ̈ni yi yïn wøki wïyɑ. Wø ócungi kì buti keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ni yi yïn. Wø ókööbø kì rií, o møg-ɑ kømme ólonyɑ ki köbbi yïn.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kööb Yönɑthɑn geki wïye Cɑul, ɑ́köbbe’ gïjø me døøj kì ri Debïd. Yönɑthɑn ɑ́kööb kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí, Debïd ko göggí ki gïnrɑj, mɑ́ e bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gögge yïn. Gïg mø døngø ɑ́gwøge e køny-ɑ yïn." 
1Samuel19:5 Debïd wëye ɑ́muuje keny-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge Gölyɑth wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ Isrɑil thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tegø me tyɑ̈ɑ̈me. Álidh yi yïn kɑ pyëwí ómïnø. Yïde ɑ dwɑddí göggi Debïd ki gïnrɑj? Bɑ dhɑnhø me yïe bɑ̈r. Bong gïjø me pere nɑ̈gii!”" 
1Samuel19:6 Alïngi kwøbbi Yönɑthɑn yi Cɑul kɑ óköngø kinni, “Ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, Debïd pɑ nɑ̈g!”" 
1Samuel19:7 Codhe, ɑcwøøl Debïd yi Yönɑthɑn kɑ gø köbbe gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb bënn. Akɑ̈ɑ̈l Debïd yï Cɑul, ɑdøøg buri Debïd geki Cɑul keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn." 
1Samuel19:8 Kɑ liny døøg-ɑ mɑl këti ki Pelistiyɑ̀, ɑkedhi Debïd be liny, kɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Atyɑme gïn, kɑ gï cyedde." 
1Samuel19:9 De wëyrɑj ɑ́døøg ki pönhi kömi Cɑul, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e Cɑul obëëdø kì gøle ki tønge kì cinge, o Debïd othumø ki thom." 
1Samuel19:10 Apɑ̈nyi Cɑul ree ki lemi Debïd kinni o gø di miine ri dörø ki tøng. De tøng ɑ́kyëj yi Debïd, ɑpɑ̈dhi tøng ri dörø, ɑbodh Debïd kì wɑ̈rɑni, kɑ órengø." 
1Samuel19:11 Aöd Cɑul ki ji møg kedhi be tyegi gøl Debïd, kinni o gø di nɑ̈ge kì mwøl. De Mikɑl cï Debïd, Debïd ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Ceg pɑ̈ɑ̈rø, yï kɑn-ɑ rií. Keløg yï pɑ pɑ̈r ɑnɑn kì wɑ̈r, yï othøø kì mwøl.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Amiide Debïd piny gø kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ wɑɑng ɑwɑj, ɑrenge kɑ opɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
1Samuel19:13 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny ngïji dhɑnhø yi Mikɑl, kɑ gø pyële wïj pyën, kɑ yëyyi dyel cïbe wïje, ɑkume gøn ki ógudh." 
1Samuel19:14 Aöd Cɑul ki ji møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l Debïd ɑ́ ɑmɑg, de Mikɑl ɑ́kööb kinni, “Dële orɑ̈mø.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Adøøge ki ödi be dwɑɑyi Debïd, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu en ki pyëne, o nɑ̈gɑ!”" 
1Samuel19:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi jøgɑni ød Debïd, kɑ ge yod-ɑ ngïji dhɑnhø, me wïje ócïbø ki yëyyi dyel kì wïj pyën." 
1Samuel19:17 Aköbbi Mikɑl yi Cɑul kinni, “Yïde ɑ wëëny yɑn ki yuu-ɑ ni men, ɑwëggí ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø bodhø?” Aløøg kwøbbi Cɑul yi Mikɑl kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Debïd kinni i yɑ ónɑ̈g yi en keløg e pɑ wiy yi yɑn o pɑ̈ɑ̈re.”" 
1Samuel19:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki bodhø kì cingi Cɑul, ɑkedhe Rɑmɑ̀ kun-ɑ di Sɑmwel, ɑlwöbbe Sɑmwel gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggii bënn yi Cɑul. Codhe, kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ Nɑyöth geki Sɑmwel, ɑbëëd gen kì kunɑni." 
1Samuel19:19 Alïng Cɑul kinni Debïd ying-ɑ Nɑyöth kì Rɑmɑ̀. 
1Samuel19:20 Codhe, ɑöde ki ji mø mɑgii. De keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen jøtöng mø töngø, o bɑ Sɑmwel ɑ jɑɑg gen, ɑkedhi wëyi Jwøk ri jø Cɑul, kɑ ge ócɑ̈gø ki cøng ge óryeerø." 
1Samuel19:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Cɑul, ɑöde ki ji møøgø, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be cøng thyew. Acige ör ki jøg møøgø dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen, de gen thyew ge ɑ́pëggi be cøng." 
1Samuel19:22 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Cɑul kiree, kɑ kedh-ɑ Rɑmɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe kömi yith kì Seku, ɑpëjje kinni, “Sɑmwel ying-ɑ keny geki Debïd?” Aköbbii kinni ge ying-ɑ Nɑyöth kì Rɑmɑ̀." 
1Samuel19:23 Akedhe Nɑyöth kì Rɑmɑ̀, kɑ wëyi Jwøk kedh-ɑ ree thyew. Acɑ̈ge ki cøng e óryeerø gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe Nɑyöth." 
1Samuel19:24 Kɑ ógudhe lunye wɑ̈g, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki cøng e óryeerø kì bøli Sɑmwel. Codhe, ɑbudde kɑ tyëg-ɑ dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r e buud-ɑ nøw. Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi kööb ji kinni, “Cɑul ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg ɑ́ jɑltöng thyew?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Kɑ Debïd opɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì Nɑyöth kì Rɑmɑ̀, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Yönɑthɑn, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Gïnrɑj ɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ? Á orøg mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́göggɑ wïyí, ɑ pere dwɑdde nɑ̈gi yɑn? Á ngø ɑ ɑ́bɑj yi yɑn kì bøli wïyí?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Alöggi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Pɑth, yï pɑ thøw! Wïyɑ yɑ nyi köbbe’ köbbø ki kwøbb-ɑ peg kí møg-ɑ yöd bënn, kí gïg-ɑ nyi dwɑdde gwøgø, bong gïn nyi kɑ̈nne yɑn.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Kɑ Debïd óköngø këti, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Men-ɑ med pyëwí ki yɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi wïyí, bene ɑ mïdhe møgɑni kì pyëwe gï pɑ köbbe yïn, kipe pyëwí órënyi. Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, thøø ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki yɑn!”" 
1Samuel20:4 Aköbbi Debïd yi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi pyëwí ógöggɑ yïn.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Dhuki bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwëër cɑ̈gi run, o yɑ bɑ ɑryej yi rɑ̈dh. De keløg e óbëëd e døøj kì yïí, yɑ ókedh kɑ yɑ ópɑ̈nø kì pɑ̈l gïti böörø, kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
1Samuel20:6 Keløg yɑ óyɑb yi wïyí, köbbí kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈j yi Debïd cem e jwɑn-ɑ pɑɑ gen Betleem, mɑ́ gøl gen bëne ceg-ɑ cugø kipe kwëër cɑ̈gi run.’" 
1Samuel20:7 Keløg e ókööbø ki kwøb mø døøj, bene yɑ óbødh ki göggø yi en ki gïnrɑj, de keløg e ómɑg yi liny, kɑ yood ceth kinni yɑ dwɑdde’ göggø ki gïnrɑj!" 
1Samuel20:8 Göggí bɑ̈ngí ki gïndøj, mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́köngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De keløg yɑ bɑ̈jjø nɑ̈g yɑn ɑ́ yïn! Yɑde ɑ kïdhí yɑn be nɑ̈gø yi wïyí?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Alöggi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Yï ko rum kì ri gïn ni menɑni! Keløg e ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn ceth kinni, wïyɑ dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn, yï pɑ di köbbi yi yɑn?”" 
1Samuel20:10 Codhe, ɑpyëjii yi Debïd kinni, “Á men ɑ yïe ólïngɑ, keløg wïyí kwøbbí óløøge ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Alöggi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Bïí kedhi wɑ wɑ̈ye yij pɑ̈l.” Codhe, ɑkedh gen gɑ ɑ́ryew." 
1Samuel20:12 Aköngi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Ki nyingi Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni bɑng dhuki e piny nɑ men, gïn-ɑ pyëw wïyɑ ki yïn óyod yi yɑn. Keløg pyëwe bong gïnrɑj ki yïn, yɑ óöni yïí ki wöödø o yï óbëëd yï ngɑ̈ny wøw." 
1Samuel20:13 De keløg wïyɑ pyëwe dɑ gïnrɑj me dwɑdde göggi yïn, yï ónyudhɑ, kɑ yï örɑ yöö, o yï kedh ki tɑrø. Wiy yɑ ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cɑyi dwøng keløg gïn ni men pɑ göggɑ yïn. Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́mïdhe wïyɑ!" 
1Samuel20:14 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ómïdhí kɑ̈ng-ɑ nëënɑ, de keløg yɑ óthøw, wiy köngɑni cunge kì kömi nyigɑ ceth dhuki megø," 
1Samuel20:15 yï ko wïyi ki göggi gøl wøn ki gïgdøj cɑgg tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn. 
1Samuel20:16 Wiy møg-ɑ nywɑg yi wɑ ek cög ge pɑ pɑ̈d. Keløg ge ópɑ̈d yi yïn, yï ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel20:17 Acigi Debïd köbbø yi Yönɑthɑn kinni, könge këti keløg e mɑɑr yi en, mɑ́ Debïd mɑɑr yi Yönɑthɑn ni mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑre ree." 
1Samuel20:18 Aköbbi Debïd yi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Dhuki bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwëër cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y. Óyod dhuki kinni yï tøøk, mɑ́ kwømí óbëëd e bong dhɑnhø kì wïje." 
1Samuel20:19 Kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ yï kedhí keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nni yi yïn óthyënhø, kɑ yï pëggí buti nyɑ kït." 
1Samuel20:20 Yɑ ógöjji ri nyɑ kïnɑni ki nywøli weth ɑ́dɑ̈g, e dhɑ̈y yɑ ce lem-ɑ gøn." 
1Samuel20:21 Orume, nyelthinh óörɑ be yɑ̈ɑ̈bi nywøli weth. Keløg e óköbbi yi yɑn kinni, nywøli weth ying-ɑ tung-ɑ di yïn, kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen, yï ócuggø bëën wɑ̈g kì keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nní, yï ɑ́bodh. O yɑ ceg-ɑ köngø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø kinni bong gïn nywɑl yïn." 
1Samuel20:22 De keløg nyelthinh óköbbɑ kinni, ‘Nywøli weth ying-ɑ tung-ɑcɑ̀,’ kɑ yï dhwöödh kedh, mɑ́ e bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ör yïn." 
1Samuel20:23 De keløg ɑ́ per lwöm-ɑ kɑɑmee, møgɑni ónenni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti ɑtheer.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Codhe, ɑpɑ̈ni Debïd kì yij pwödhø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwëër cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y, ɑpëggi rɑ̈dh piny kì kej ryëj." 
1Samuel20:25 Ápëgg-ɑ keny-ɑ nyi bëëde yethi cyɑ̈ng kì buti dörø. Apëggi Yönɑthɑn piny e røøm ki wïye, kɑ Abner pëgg-ɑ buti Cɑul, de kej Debïd ɑ́döng e wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø." 
1Samuel20:26 Dicyɑ̈ngɑni Cɑul bong gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe. Mɑ́ e ɑ́rum kinni ódi gïjø megø me mɑ̈ɑ̈n Debïd bëënø, wɑlɑ̀ óbëëd e ywëdhø mɑwɑnø." 
1Samuel20:27 De dhuki cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y bɑ ɑ́ryew, kej Debïd ɑ́bëëd nudd e wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø. Codhe, ɑpyëëj Yönɑthɑn yi Cɑul kinni, “Ede wɑ̈d Yesì ɑ nuti bëën en ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ kí dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Alöggi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Debïd yɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈je cem e kedh-ɑ Betleem," 
1Samuel20:29 ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Wiy yɑ kedhɑ, mɑ́ tyëng gøl wøn yï gen dɑ gëëdhi me ngɑl yi gen kì pɑɑ wøn. Kɑ yɑ ceg yi ómïɑ kinni i kedhɑ kunɑni. Wiy yɑ kedhɑ be këëmi wɑddi wøn.’ Bene gïn-ɑ pere bëëde e tøøk kì tɑɑw rɑ̈dh.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Amɑɑg Cɑul yi liny ki menteg ki Yönɑthɑn, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yï rɑj ki pëmø ni meyí! Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, wɑ̈d Yesì ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn ɑ́ men yɑ̈ɑ̈r rií wuki meyí." 
1Samuel20:31 Keløg wɑ̈d Yesì nudd e onëënø kì kömi piny, yï pɑ cuggi gwøg ki rɑ̈dh kinni tek, wɑlɑ̀ lɑwø pɑ yod yi yïn. Kedh ɑnɑn ceth kɑ muuj yɑn, o nɑ̈gɑ!”" 
1Samuel20:32 Kɑ Yönɑthɑn wïye pyëje kinni, “Ede Debïd ɑ dwɑddií nɑ̈gø? Á gïnrɑj mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøge?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Kɑ tøng cïmmi Yönɑthɑn yi Cɑul, gø dwɑdde’ këlø. Kɑ yod yi Yönɑthɑn kinni wïye dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi Debïd kidyër." 
1Samuel20:34 Arënyi pyëw Yönɑthɑn ki mendwøng yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye kipe Debïd. Abɑ̈nye ki cɑm, kɑ odhwödhø kì tɑw. Cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ryeew cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y." 
1Samuel20:35 Kì mwøl, ɑmøøl Yönɑthɑn yij pwödhø be yïddø ki Debïd ni møg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi gen. Ge ɑ́kedh kɑ nyel me thiinh, ɑkööbe kinni," 
1Samuel20:36 “Rengí yɑɑb nywøli weth møg-ɑ ógøjɑ.” Arengi nyelɑni. Agøøj nyɑɑr weth bøle e nudd e órïngø yi Yönɑthɑn. 
1Samuel20:37 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi nyelɑni kun-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi yi nyɑɑr weth, ɑryeer Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Nyɑɑr weth nudd e ying-ɑ bølí.”" 
1Samuel20:38 Acigi Yönɑthɑn ryeerø kinni, “Pyeew! Jwɑní! Yï ko pëggi be cung.” Apudh nyɑɑr weth yi nyelɑni kɑ gø dögge wɑ̈n." 
1Samuel20:39 Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni kwïj yi nyelɑni, den-ɑ́ Yönɑthɑn geki Debïd keti gen ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw." 
1Samuel20:40 Codhe, ɑmëgge nyelthinh weth geki nywøle ki lodhe geki tøng. Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kedh, døøg kɑɑl.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh nyelthinh, ɑbëën Debïd wɑ̈g kì gøød kït kì tung-ɑ døøg wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Abøødhe ree wïje kuule’ piny tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kì bøli Yönɑthɑn. Codhe, kɑ Debïd geki Yönɑthɑn ri gen nummi gen, ɑywöngi gen ryeet, de Debïd ɑ́ti ywøg ki menteg." 
1Samuel20:42 Aköbbi Debïd yi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Kedh ki tɑrø. Wɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni wɑ ócög wɑ bɑ mɑ̈dhh. Wɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óying kɑɑmee, kí kɑɑm gøl wøn kí gøl wun gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø.” Codhe, ɑkedh Debïd, kɑ Yönɑthɑn døøg-ɑ kɑɑl." 
1Samuel21:1 Akedhi Debïd Nöb yï ókwërø Akimelek. Kɑ Akimelek dhwödh-ɑ be pɑɑri Debïd dële okïrrø, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Yïde ɑ cyɑ̈dhí ketí? Ede ɑ bëëd e bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me cyɑ̈dhi ki yïn?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Aløøg møge yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́thödhi ki cigg mø per gen teg yi rɑ̈dh, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Ko di dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me wëggí lïngi møgɑni.’ Jøgɑ ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn ki keny-ɑ óyïddi wøn ki gen." 
1Samuel21:3 Á gïncɑm mɑ ngø ɑ nud kì yïí ɑnɑn? Nëngí yɑn ki ópùn ɑ́bïj wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ cuggi yodø yi yïn.” 
1Samuel21:4 Aköbbi Debïd yi ókwërø kinni, “Yïɑ bong ópùn møg nyi wɑ̈dhi cɑmø yøw, de møg-ɑ nud kì yïɑ bɑ mø kwër. Ócuggø cɑmø yi wuki jøgí, keløg e bong mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ ócer niin yi wun.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Kidyër ceth, wø bɑ ɑkerø ki kedhi ri tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kenyi bëëd e dɑ keny kedhi yi wøn. Jøgɑni dhïw dicyɑ̈ngtïn geki jɑmmi gen bënn.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Codhe, ɑnëngi Debïd yi ókwërø kì ri ópùni kwër møg-ɑ bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e bong møøgø mø nud kì kenyɑni. Yethi cyɑ̈ng ópùni kwër nyi ceg kɑ wilø ki ópùn mø lëëdh." 
1Samuel21:7 Dicyɑ̈ngɑni, bɑ̈ng Cɑul ɑ́kyel ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kunɑni. Ábëëd ɑ́ ɑmɑg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Cwøl ɑ́ Doeg jɑl Edöm, o bɑ jɑngi jøkwɑ̈yø mø Cɑul." 
1Samuel21:8 Apyëëj Akimelek yi Debïd kinni, “Yïí dɑ tøng wɑlɑ̀ pilø kì keny? Yɑ ɑ́ceg kɑ jwɑɑn yöö yi rɑ̈dh, bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́dhwönhɑ ki cinggɑ.”" 
1Samuel21:9 Alöggi Akimelek kinni, “Pili Gölyɑth wɑ̈d Pelistiyɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn kì Töör Elɑ̀ nud. Bɑ ɑbɑ̈j ki ógødh kì thɑ pɑri kwër. Ócuggø kwɑnyø yi yïn ke dwɑddií. Bong pilø megø kì keny, den-ɑ́ en kete ɑ nud.” Akööb Debïd kinni, “Bong pilø me pɑ̈r ki en. Mëggí yɑn.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Dicyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ ɑ́dhwödh Debïd e lɑ̈ɑ̈w-ɑ ree ki Cɑul. Kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Akïc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gɑth. 
1Samuel21:11 Aköbbi Akïc yi bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Pɑth ki Debïd, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh pödhø èn! En ɑ nyinge nyi wej kinni, ‘Cɑul ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyëllì, de Debïd ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r.’ ”" 
1Samuel21:12 Kwøbbɑni ɑ́lïngi yi Debïd kɑ obwøgø yi Akïc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gɑth. 
1Samuel21:13 Codhe, kɑ Debïd ree gwøge ni dhëg kì bøli Akïc geki bɑ̈ngge. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì bute, ree ɑ́gwøøge e nɑ ngɑn wïje di ɑ́nɑ̈gø, kɑ tyelle pwöde ki piny kì dhø ød, e lɑɑwe kɑ̈ɑ̈w-ɑ piny, kɑ ge møll-ɑ ri yëyyi tïge." 
1Samuel21:14 Kɑ Akïc bɑ̈ngge köbbe kinni, “Lidhu jɑlɑni! Wïje dɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø! Ede ɑ muuj wun en yɑn?" 
1Samuel21:15 Butɑ dɑ tyëngɑnɑ̈gø mø gïïr, ede ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lu en be judi yɑn? Bï-ɑ be bëëdø kì gølɑ?”" 
1Samuel22:1 Apɑ̈r Debïd kì Gɑth kɑ kedh-ɑ yij órøngi kït kì buti kɑɑl Adulɑm. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi pere yi nyiimen geki wɑdde møøgø, kinni nud kì kunɑni, ɑkedhi gen be lidhii." 
1Samuel22:2 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying yij orɑng bënn, kí møg-ɑ nyingi gen guud, kí møg-ɑ cwɑggi gen di körr geki møg-ɑ pëthi gen rɑ̈mø, ri gen ɑ́cøng gen bɑnge, kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ pënyi gen. Kɑ kwɑnni gen ogöögø ki gïn ni miy ɑ́ngwen." 
1Samuel22:3 Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ Midhpɑ̀ kì Moɑb, ɑköbbe rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb kinni, “Wiy wïyɑ geki meyɑ bï gen be bëëdø kì butí gïti keny-ɑ óyodɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi göggi yɑn yi Jwøk.”" 
1Samuel22:4 Codhe, kɑ Debïd wïye geki meye wiye kì buti rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb. Kɑ ge obëëdø kì kunɑni kì kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Debïd e ópɑ̈nnø kì yij órøngi kït." 
1Samuel22:5 Kɑ Gɑd jɑltöng bï-ɑ yï Debïd ɑkööbe kinni, “Yï ko bëëd kì keny, kedhí piny Yeudɑ̀.” Codhe, ɑdhwödh Debïd kɑ kedh-ɑ yij thïm Éreth." 
1Samuel22:6 Cɑul ɑ́ying-ɑ Gibeɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni, Debïd geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en keny-ɑ bëëd gen óyodø. Álïng e bëëd ɑ thɑ yɑdh kì kwøømi Gibeɑ̀ e tønge ying-ɑ cinge, o jøge ócungø kì bute." 
1Samuel22:7 Aköbbi gen yi Cɑul kinni, “Lïng wun, wun ɑ jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn! Wu orumø kinni wu ónëngi yi wɑ̈d Yesì ki pwödh wu bënn, kɑ wu nënge ki bɑ̈ggi oløg? Wu ógwøg yi Debïd wun ɑ́ pëjji liny møg pyejji jøliny ɑ́lïp?" 
1Samuel22:8 Wude ɑ buudh wun yɑn e bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me köbbi yɑn kinni, wɑ̈dɑ dhøggi gen nywɑɑg gen geki wɑ̈d Yesì. Kejɑ bong gøn kì yï wun? Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me köbbi yɑn kinni, bɑ̈ngɑ óköbbø yi wɑ̈dɑ i liibe yɑn piny?”" 
1Samuel22:9 Doeg jɑl Edöm ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni e ócungø kì kelli pëjji liny. Akööbe kinni, “Wɑ̈d Yesì ɑ́lidhɑ. Ábï yï Akimelek wɑ̈d Akitub kì Nöb." 
1Samuel22:10 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjji yi Akimelek kiper Debïd, kɑ gø nënge ki gïncɑm, ɑmëgge gøn pili Gölyɑth jɑl Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel22:11 Codhe, ɑöd rɑ̈dh kinni, i dwɑɑy ókwërø Akimelek wɑ̈d Akitub geki tyëng gøl gen bënn møg-ɑ bɑ ókwër kì Nöb. Kɑ ge bï-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh bënn." 
1Samuel22:12 Aköbbi Akimelek yi Cɑul kinni, “Lïng Akimelek!” Alöggi Akimelek kinni, “Yɑ olïngø wuö.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Akööb Cɑul kinni, “Wude ɑ lød wun yɑn kì piny wuki Debïd? Ede ɑ nëngí ki ópun ki pilø, kɑ Jwøk kwɑjjí kipere? O ɑnɑn Debïd ree ɑ́luge yɑn e oyɑ̈bø ki kej wɑng men nɑ̈ge yɑn.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Alöggi Akimelek kinni, “Á men ɑ pɑ̈r ki Debïd kì kelli bɑ̈nggí? Bɑ dhɑnhø me døj, o bɑ øri rɑ̈dh. Bɑ jɑngi tyëng-ɑ kor yïn. Ceg kɑ wørø yi ji bënn kì gøldwøng." 
1Samuel22:15 Yɑ ɑ́cɑ̈g ɑ dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki kwɑjji Jwøk kiper Debïd? Yï ko töngi riɑ wuö, wɑlɑ̀ ri dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng gøl wøn. Yïɑ bɑ̈r, bong gïn ngɑ̈nyɑ kì ri gïg-ɑ göögø.”" 
1Samuel22:16 De rɑ̈dh ɑ́kööb kinni, “Akimelek, wu ceg-ɑ thøø wuki tyëng gøl wun bënn.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Codhe, ɑköbbe jøg-ɑ cungi kì bute kinni, “Kedh wun, nɑ̈g wun ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ ge ying-ɑ tuung Debïd. Ngɑ̈nyi yi gen kinni, bɑ men pɑ̈r, o ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi köbbi yɑn.” De pëjji liny rɑ̈dh ɑ́bɑ̈nyi nɑ̈gi ókwër." 
1Samuel22:18 Codhe, ɑköbbi Doeg yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedh kɑ ókwër nɑ̈ɑ̈g.” Codhe, ɑkedh Doeg jɑl Edöm, kɑ ókwër nɑ̈ge. Ánɑ̈g-ɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj, gen ɑ møg-ɑ rugø ki pɑ̈rri kwër." 
1Samuel22:19 Kɑ Nöb kɑɑl ókwër nɑ̈g yi Cɑul, jøg-ɑ cwøw, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí ɑderr, kí dyëg, kí dhög, gï ɑ́nɑ̈ge bënn." 
1Samuel22:20 Abiyɑthɑr wɑ̈d Akimelek ɑ́bodh. Akedhe kɑ órëbø ki Debïd. 
1Samuel22:21 Aköbbi Debïd yi Abiyɑthɑr ki kër-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ókwërri Nöb yi Cɑul. 
1Samuel22:22 Codhe, ɑköbbi Abiyɑthɑr yi Debïd kinni, “Doeg jɑl Edöm ɑ́bëëd e nud kì Nöb dicyɑ̈ngɑni, o yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni Cɑul óköbbi yi en ceth. De bɑ perɑ ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëng gøl wun bënn yi Cɑul." 
1Samuel22:23 Bëëd kì butɑ. Yï ko böggi. Cɑul dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi wɑ ryeet. De yï óbødh ke bëëd kì kelli wøn.” 
1Samuel23:1 Kɑ Debïd olïngø kinni, i tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ nyi bï-ɑ kɑɑl Keilɑ̀ be mɑ̈nyø, o ge ceg-ɑ kɑ̈b ki byel kì wɑ̈thi pëmmì." 
1Samuel23:2 Apyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Debïd kinni, “Kedhɑ be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀?” Aløøg møge yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ngee kedh. Pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen, kɑ tyëng Keilɑ̀ døm.”" 
1Samuel23:3 De Debïd ɑ́köbbi yi jøge kinni, “Wɑ óböggø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ keny, óbëëdø kidï keløg wɑ kedh-ɑ Keilɑ̀ kun-ɑ di liny Pelistiyɑ̀!”" 
1Samuel23:4 Acigi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëjø yi Debïd, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggø kinni, “Kedh wun, pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi gen kì Keilɑ̀. Ge ócïbɑ cinggi wun.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Codhe, ɑkedhi Debïd Keilɑ̀ geki jøge, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ dhögi gen kwɑny yi Debïd, tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́tyɑm yi Debïd, kɑ tyëng Keilɑ̀ døme." 
1Samuel23:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Abiyɑthɑr wɑ̈d Akimelek yï Debïd kì Keilɑ̀, ɑ́bï e ókɑ̈ddø ki pɑri kwër." 
1Samuel23:7 Kɑ Cɑul köbbi kinni, i Debïd kedhi Keilɑ̀, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ácïb cingɑ yi Jwøk. Debïd ree ɑ́mɑge kete, ɑ́kedhi kɑɑl me bɑ ɑger ki dörø, e ócyëgø ki win.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Codhe, kɑ Cɑul linye cwøle kej ɑ́kyel, ɑgwir gen ri gen kipe kinni o ge kedhi gen Keilɑ̀ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Debïd geki jøge." 
1Samuel23:9 Kɑ yod yi Debïd kinni Cɑul dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r köme, ɑköbbe ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l pɑri kwër keny.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Akwɑ̈jji Debïd kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́lïng kinni i Cɑul dwɑdd-ɑ bëën be rënyi Keilɑ̀ ki göjɑ." 
1Samuel23:11 Yɑ ódi mëggi Cɑul yi tyëng Keilɑ̀? Cɑul óbï kidyër, ni kɑ ɑ́lïngɑ en? Yïn ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, løøg møgɑ!” Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑul óbï.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Kɑ Debïd cig-ɑ pëjjø kinni, “De tyëng Keilɑ̀ wø ódi mëggi Cɑul yi gen wøki jøgɑ?” Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wu ómuuj yi gen!”" 
1Samuel23:13 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Debïd kì Keilɑ̀ geki jøge gɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel, kɑ ge ócyɑ̈dhø ge cɑngg-ɑ piny. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Cɑul kinni Debïd dhwödhø kì Keilɑ̀, ɑcöge e nuti kedhi kunɑni." 
1Samuel23:14 Apɑ̈nni Debïd kì yethi órøggi kïttì kì kelli kïttì kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Dhïp. Kɑ Cɑul pëgg-ɑ be yɑbi Debïd, de nuti cïb cinge yi Jwøk." 
1Samuel23:15 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Debïd ying-ɑ Örec kì yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Dhïp, ɑyode gøn kinni Cɑul bï-ɑ be nɑ̈gii, kɑ obwøgø."
