1Samuel23:16 De Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑul ɑ́kedhi yï Debïd, ɑcïïje gøn kinni, yïëye kidøøj ki Jwøk." 
1Samuel23:17 Aköbbii yi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Yï ko böggi, mɑ́ wïyɑ yï ko lwɑ̈ng yi en ki nɑ̈gø. Yï ógöögø rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑ bɑ ókwømí. Cɑgg ɑ́ wïyɑ møgɑni ngɑ̈nye.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Aköngi gen gɑ ɑ́ryew kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ge ócög gɑ mɑ̈dhh. Codhe, ɑkedhi Yönɑthɑn pɑc, kɑ Debïd odöngø e obëëdø kì Örec." 
1Samuel23:19 Akedhi tyëng Dhïp yï Cɑul kì Gebɑ̀, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Debïd ópɑ̈nnø kì pödhi wøn. Pɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ Örec, kì wïj Kïti Akïlɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Yecimön." 
1Samuel23:20 Anɑn yïn ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni yï dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgi Debïd ki mendwøng, bïí myërri wøn, ówëggi wøn mɑgø yi yïn!”" 
1Samuel23:21 Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Wu ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe køny-ɑ køny wun yɑn ɑnɑn." 
1Samuel23:22 Kedh wun, kɑ keje yɑb wun kidøøj. Yɑbu keny-ɑ bëëde kɑ nenni wun kidøøj. Yɑ ɑ́lïng kinni i bɑ wëny." 
1Samuel23:23 Yod wun kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈nne bënn, kɑ wu dwöög wun be nyudhi yɑn møgɑni bënn. O yɑ ókedhɑ ki wun. Keløg Debïd nud kì tungɑni ódwɑr yi yɑn kì yethi myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn.”" 
1Samuel23:24 Codhe, ɑkedhi gen Dhïp ge møøl-ɑ bøli Cɑul. Debïd geki jøge, ɑ́ying-ɑ yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Mɑon, kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Yecimön." 
1Samuel23:25 Akedhi Cɑul geki jøge be yɑbi Debïd. De per gen ólïngø yi Debïd, ɑkedhe cyɑ̈n wïj kït, kɑ obëëdø kì yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Mɑon. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Cɑul, ɑløge bɑng Debïd yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Mɑon." 
1Samuel23:26 Cɑul cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kö kït kì tuung, o Debïd geki jøge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ tung-ɑ kyeelø, ge ójwɑnø, ge dwɑdd-ɑ yömi Cɑul, o Cɑul geki jøge dwɑdd-ɑ gengi Debïd, o gø mɑge geki jøge." 
1Samuel23:27 Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën jɑl megø, kɑ Cɑul köbbe kinni, “Bïí jwɑn wɑ døøgø! Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi pödhee!”" 
1Samuel23:28 Codhe, ɑwïyi Cɑul ki ngwej kì bɑng Debïd, ɑkedhe be nyïɑ̈ggø kì tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Bene en ɑ cwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Kïti Dɑ̈ngø." 
1Samuel23:29 Debïd ɑ́dhwödh thyew kì yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Mɑon, kɑ kedh-ɑ be pɑ̈nø kì Ein Gedì." 
1Samuel24:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Cɑul kì be liny ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, ɑköbbii kinni, “Debïd ying-ɑ yij pɑ̈l kì Ein Gedì.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Codhe, ɑyïënye kì kelli jø Isrɑil bënn ki yɑɑg-ɑ teg gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be yɑbi Debïd, kì buti kïn-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Dyëgi Pɑ̈l." 
1Samuel24:3 Abëën Cɑul kyeel dyëg ki tøg yöö. Kenyɑni dɑ órøngi kït, kɑ kedh-ɑ yij órøngi kïnɑni be mɑɑgi ree piny, o Debïd pɑ̈n-ɑ yiny-ɑ cyɑ̈n geki jøge." 
1Samuel24:4 Aköbbi Debïd yi jøgɑni kinni, “Dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ, kɑ cïbɑ cingí. Gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddí göggii.’ ” Codhe, ɑmølli Debïd kun-ɑ di Cɑul mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, kɑ ngud-ɑ wɑ̈g ki nyɑ keny me thiinh kì ri ógødh Cɑul, e Cɑul kwïj wøw." 
1Samuel24:5 Kì cyɑ̈n, ɑywöngi yij Debïd kipe kɑ ɑ́ngude wɑ̈g kì ri ógødh Cɑul." 
1Samuel24:6 Aköbbe jøge kinni, “Bɑ ɑkerø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïn ni men pɑ göggɑ rɑ̈dhɑ! Rønyi Cɑul ɑ́ rɑ̈dh ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Cingɑ pɑ tïnggɑ en, e ɑ́røny-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Kɑ Debïd jøge kyëdde kinni ge ko pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Cɑul. Adhwödhe kì kenyɑni kɑ ókedhø ki yuue. 
1Samuel24:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Debïd wɑ̈g kì yij órøngi kït, ɑryeere e cwøl ɑ́ Cɑul kinni, “Wuö rɑ̈dh!” Alïïdh Cɑul ngɑ̈je, kɑ Debïd ree bøødhe wïje kuule’ piny, e mɑl-ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
1Samuel24:9 Aköbbe Cɑul kinni, “Yïde ɑ nyi lïngí kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ nyi köbbi yïn kinni, ‘Debïd dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn?’" 
1Samuel24:10 Álidh yi yïn kirií dicyɑ̈ngtïn kì yij órøngi kït keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yïn cingɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi jøgɑ kinni i nɑ̈gɑ yïn, dɑ́ yɑn ɑ pyëwɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m. Akööbɑ kinni, wɑ̈ɑ pɑ cuggi nɑ̈gø yi yɑn, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́rønyii ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
1Samuel24:11 Lidh, budi ógødhí men-ɑ cingɑ èn, wïyø! Ángulɑ’ wɑ̈g kì tuung ógødhí, de yɑ nuti dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yïn." 
1Samuel24:12 Wiy Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïn-ɑ kɑɑmee ólidh en, ying-ɑ́ men kì kellee ɑ bɑ̈jjø. Kɑ wiy yï ócɑye kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́göggí yɑn! De yïɑ bɑ̈r ki yïn." 
1Samuel24:13 Dɑ kwøb mø kɑ̈gi gen dööng mø nyi kööbø kinni, ‘Gïgrijjø nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi ji-ɑ rijjø.’ De yɑn, bong gïnrɑj kì yïɑ ki yïn." 
1Samuel24:14 Lidh gïn-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil! Á bɑng men ɑ rïngi yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil? Yï rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng gwöng thøø, wɑlɑ̀ bɑng cwɑrø yøw?" 
1Samuel24:15 Gïn-ɑ kɑɑmee ólidh-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o gïn-ɑ kɑɑmee óngøl-ɑ yi en. Yɑ óyiel yi en kì cingí.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki kwøb, ɑpëjji Cɑul kinni, “Bɑ yïn ceth kidyër ɑ kööbø, Debïd wɑ̈dɑ?” Kɑ ceg-ɑ ì túl ki ywøg." 
1Samuel24:17 Akööbe kinni, “Yï kømm-ɑ dyër, yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji. Yï døøj, de yï ɑ́göggɑ ki gïnrɑj." 
1Samuel24:18 Yɑ ɑ́nyudhi yi yïn dicyɑ̈ngtïn ki gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́göggí yɑn. Yɑ ɑ́rum ki cïb cingí yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de yɑ nuti nɑ̈gø yi yïn." 
1Samuel24:19 Á men ɑ ɑ́yod dhɑnhø men-ɑ mɑ̈n ki en, kɑ gø wiye e bong gïn gögge gøn? Yï ókøøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe gïndøj men-ɑ ɑ́göggí yɑn dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng!" 
1Samuel24:20 Áyod yi yɑn ɑnɑn kinni yï ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø. Kɑ pödhi Isrɑil ódönyø kì rií. 
1Samuel24:21 Köngí ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑnɑn kì bølɑ, kinni kwɑrrɑ koo nɑ̈g yi yïn, o nyingɑ pɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈j yi yïn wɑ̈g kì gøl wïyɑ.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Codhe, ɑköngi Debïd kì bøli Cɑul. Kɑ Cɑul døøg-ɑ pɑc, kɑ Debïd geki jøge, kedh-ɑ yij órøngi kït kej gen." 
1Samuel25:1 Kɑ Sɑmwel othøø, ɑbëën tyëng Isrɑil bënn be ywøgii. Kɑ kony kì Rɑmɑ̀, pɑɑre. Kɑ Debïd dɑ̈g-ɑ yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Pɑrɑn." 
1Samuel25:2 Ádɑ jɑl megø kì kɑɑl Mɑon mɑ jɑlkɑ̈r, o yïe ɑ́dɑ piny kì buti Kɑrmel. Ábëëd e kɑ̈rø ki mendwøng; yïe ɑ́dɑ dyëg römm ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí dyëg ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp. Nyingi jɑlɑni cwøl ɑ́ Nɑbɑl. Bɑ kwɑɑr Kɑlib. Cyëge cwøl ɑ́ Abigɑil, o bɑ nyɑn me wïje pel, o myëër, de Nɑbɑl bɑ cung, o bɑ kenyø, o nyi gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø. Nɑbɑl ɑ́bëëd e onyɑ̈rø ki yëyyi dyëge, dyëg-ɑ römm kì Kɑrmel." 
1Samuel25:3  
1Samuel25:4 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ying Debïd yij pɑ̈l, ɑlïnge kinni Nɑbɑl ceg-ɑ nyɑr ki yëyyi dyëge, dyëg-ɑ römm." 
1Samuel25:5 Codhe, ɑöde ki yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb pyɑ̈rø, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kedhu yï Nɑbɑl kì Kɑrmel, kɑ mɑ̈dh wun." 
1Samuel25:6 Köbbu en kinni Debïd okööbø kinni, ‘Yï óbëëdø ki mër, gølí óbëëdø ki mër, jɑmm-ɑ yïí bënn óbëëdø ki mër!" 
1Samuel25:7 Yɑ ɑ́lïng kinni, i yï ceg-ɑ nyɑr ki yëyyi dyëgí, jøkwɑ̈yø møgí ɑ́cer-ɑ ying buti wøn, ge nuti göggø yi wøn ki gïnrɑj. Bong gïjø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yï gen keny-ɑ ɑ́ying gen Kɑrmel!" 
1Samuel25:8 Pyëj yɑɑg-ɑ wøbbí, yï óköbbi yi gen. Wø bï-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng medi pëëth. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, muuj ki gïndøj men-ɑ cuggi mëggi wøn ɑ bɑ̈nggí, kí wɑ̈dí Debïd.’ ”" 
1Samuel25:9 Kɑ Nɑbɑl köbbi wöönɑni yi jø Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen. 
1Samuel25:10 Aløøg kwøbbi gen yi Nɑbɑl kinni, “Debïd bɑ men? Wɑ̈d Yesì bɑ men cøn? Pere nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø yi yɑn! Pödhø ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi bɑ̈ngg møg-ɑ rengi pɑ̈l kì cinggi wëëg gen yethi cyɑ̈ng møg." 
1Samuel25:11 Yïɑ dɑ pï kí ópùn, o yïɑ dɑ rïngø mi gïn-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈llɑ jøg-ɑ nyɑr yëyyi dyëgɑ. De ge pɑ mëggɑ ji mø kwïj yi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel25:12 Adøøg jø Debïd yïe, kɑ Debïd köbbi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb bënn yi Nɑbɑl." 
1Samuel25:13 Codhe, kɑ Debïd jøge köbbe kinni, “Kwɑnyu pilli wun!” Kɑ pilli gen cïb gen cinggi gen, kɑ Debïd thyew pile kwɑnye. Akedh Debïd ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen wɑ̈dhi ri miy ɑ́ngwen, kɑ miy ɑ́ryew odöngø ge kor-ɑ jɑmmì." 
1Samuel25:14 Aköbbi Abigɑil, cï Nɑbɑl yi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli bɑ̈nggi gen kinni, “Yï ɑ́lïng cøn, kinni i Debïd jøge ör en kinni mɑ̈dh gen wïyee, de ge ɑ́gwɑddi yi Nɑbɑl?" 
1Samuel25:15 Jøgɑni wø ɑ́køny yi gen keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wøn wɑg. Bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggi wøn yi gen. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́kɑb yi gen kì cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wøn kì buti gen. 
1Samuel25:16 Wø ɑ́kor yi gen kì dicɑ̈ng kì wɑ̈r, kɑ ɑ́bëëd wøn kì buti gen, o dyëgee okorrø yi gen." 
1Samuel25:17 Rum kidøøj ki gïn-ɑ cuggi göggi wïyee geki gøle bëne. Nɑbɑl bɑ dhɑnhø me rɑɑj, bong ngɑn kwøbbe cuggi lïngø yi en.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Kɑ Abigɑil ókɑ̈bbø ki ópùn miy ɑ́ryew, kí puggi møgi oløg ɑ́ryew, kí rïnggi dyëg ɑ́bïj mø bɑ ɑbul, kí byel mø bɑ ɑgïny gɑ kïllì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew, kí cyɑ̈lli nywøli yenh mø thwøwø gɑ miyø, ɑköbbe bɑ̈ngge kinni," 
1Samuel25:19 “Kedh wun, yɑ ólunyi ki bëën bɑng wun.” De jɑlgøle nuti köbbø yi en." 
1Samuel25:20 Akedh Abigɑil e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ ɑderø, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ gøddi kïttì. Kɑ ge ceg-ɑ wɑ̈dhi røømø ki Debïd geki jøge, ge bï-ɑ piny yïe." 
1Samuel25:21 Debïd ɑ́bëëd e orumø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́korɑ jɑmmi jɑl ni men kì yij pɑ̈l? Bong gïjø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi ki kwɑlø kì yïe, ɑ yöd e gögg-ɑ yɑn gïn ni men!" 
1Samuel25:22 Wiy yɑ ónɑ̈g yi Jwøk, keløg jøg bënn pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn e wøw nuti ru!”" 
1Samuel25:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Debïd yi Abigɑil, kɑ jwɑn-ɑ bëën piny kì kömi ɑdere, kɑ óbuddø yije reeny en piny" 
1Samuel25:24 kì bøli Debïd, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jɑldwøng lïngí møgɑ, cɑ́y bɑ møgɑ!" 
1Samuel25:25 Jɑldwøng, yï ko lïng ki gïn-ɑ kwøb yi ngɑn bong pere ni Nɑbɑl, pɑ̈r ki nying-ɑ cwøllii ceth. Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi nyinge bɑ kinni dhëg, o kidyër bɑ dhëg. De yɑn, yɑ bɑ̈ngí, jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yïn nuti liidh yɑn." 
1Samuel25:26 Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́jog yïn, ɑ cöög tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø pɑ nɑ̈g yi yïn. De ɑnɑn yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn, kí tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi göggi yïn ki gïgrijjø ócɑy ni Nɑbɑl." 
1Samuel25:27 Jɑldwøng, kwɑny gïn-ɑ muuj yïn èn kipe jøgí." 
1Samuel25:28 Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn jɑldwøng, kipe bɑ̈jjø men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ógwøge yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh wuki kwɑrrí thyew, mɑ́ yï ɑ́nyɑg-ɑ linye." 
1Samuel25:29 Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí e dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn, Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï óyiele, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óleenge wɑ̈yi gen ni lelø kì dhø bɑ̈ɑ̈di." 
1Samuel25:30 Keny-ɑ ógwøøg jɑmm-ɑ døj bënn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiperí, ni kɑ ɑ́könge kinni yï ógwøge, yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil," 
1Samuel25:31 wiy yï ócöög yï pɑ pɑ̈d, wɑlɑ̀ yï pɑ rɑngø, mɑ́ bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn. Yï nuti nɑ̈gø ki ji mø nuti kɑ̈ni ki göj, o bong ji mɑ ɑ́cɑy yi yïn. De wïjí ko wïl ki yɑn cyee jɑldwøng, keny-ɑ ógyëëdh yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Aköbbii yi Debïd kinni, “Lejjí Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yïn be yïddø ki yɑn dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng!" 
1Samuel25:33 Pwøj Jwøk kipe peli wïjí geki døøji rummí kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, keny-ɑ ɑ́joog yɑn, kɑ yɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈n gwøg ki orøg, kɑ cinggɑ di kedhi yi remmi ji." 
1Samuel25:34 Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j en ɑ ɑ́jog yɑn, o wu cög wu pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn. Keløg yï pɑ di jwɑn bëënø be yïddø ki yɑn, bong dhɑnhø kì kelli jø Nɑbɑl me di wɑ̈dhi mwøl e onëënø.”" 
1Samuel25:35 Codhe, ɑyïëëy gïg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le yi Debïd, kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbe kinni, “Kedhí pɑc ki mër. Kwøbbí ɑ́lïngi yi yɑn, bong gïnrɑj men-ɑ ógöggɑ wun.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg Abigɑil yï Nɑbɑl kì pɑc, gø ɑ́yuude e ocyɑ̈mø ni rɑ̈dh. O wïje dɑ møgø, o pyëwe omedø. Codhe ɑcöge e okudø, bong gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbe gøn gïti mwøl." 
1Samuel25:37 Kì mwøl keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wïje bong møgø ɑköbbii yi cyëge ki møgɑni bënn, kɑ mɑg yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ wïje ócungø." 
1Samuel25:38 Bɑng cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g Nɑbɑl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel25:39 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Debïd kinni i Nɑbɑl thøø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Mɑl wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Nɑbɑl ɑ́gwɑdd-ɑ yɑn, de Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́cwɑge! Nɑbɑl ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe orøge.” Codhe, ɑödi Debïd yï Abigɑil ki wöödø kinni, o gööge ki cyëge." 
1Samuel25:40 Bɑ̈ngge ɑ́kedhi Kɑrmel, kɑ Abigɑil köbbi yi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Debïd kinni, i kɑ̈l wøn yïn, o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ cyëge.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Abuddi Abigɑil yije rum en piny, e wïje këël en piny, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ bɑ̈nge, o tyelli bɑ̈ngge ólwøg yi yɑn ceth.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Ajwɑne dhwödhi mɑl, kɑ kɑdh-ɑ kömi ɑderø, ɑkedh gen ki jøg-ɑ ɑ́örii yi Debïd, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́bïj møg göögø kì cinge. Kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ cï Debïd." 
1Samuel25:43 Akinoɑm nyɑɑr Yidhriil ɑ́bëëd e rumø ki nywømø thyew yi Debïd, Abigɑil ɑ́nywøøme’ köme." 
1Samuel25:44 Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cï Debïd thyew, de ɑ́mëggi Pɑltì wɑ̈d Lɑic jɑl Gɑlïm yi wïye Cɑul." 
1Samuel26:1 Kɑ tyëng Dhïp kedh-ɑ yï Cɑul kì Gebɑ̀, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Debïd ópɑ̈nnø kì wïj Kïti Akïlɑ̀, kì pɑ̈ɑ̈l Yeudiyɑ̀.”" 
1Samuel26:2 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Cɑul kɑ kedh-ɑ yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Dhïp e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jöddi Isrɑil kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, ge kedh-ɑ be yɑbi Debïd." 
1Samuel26:3 Kɑ Cɑul pëgg-ɑ wïj Kïti Akïlɑ̀ kì tøg yöö, de Debïd ɑ́cög e obëëdø kì yij pɑ̈l keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni, Cɑul yɑb-ɑ en kì kunɑni." 
1Samuel26:4 Aöde ki lyëwwì mø kedhi be yodi per Cɑul, mɑ wɑ̈nh en Kïti Akïlɑ̀ kidyër." 
1Samuel26:5 Akedhi Debïd kun-ɑ di Cɑul. Alidhe keny-ɑ di Cɑul geki Abner wɑ̈d Ner, pënyi linye ge onenø. Cɑul onenø kì dïdyër e ótɑgø yi linye bëne." 
1Samuel26:6 Apyëëj Akimelek wɑ̈d Kit geki Abicɑy wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀, ómï Yöɑb yi Debïd kinni, “Á men ɑ ókedhi wøn kɑɑl Cɑul.” Alöggi Abicɑy kinni, “Wɑ ókedh!”" 
1Samuel26:7 Codhe, ɑkedhi Debïd kɑɑl Cɑul geki Abicɑy kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑyuud gen Cɑul e onenø kì dïkɑɑl, kí tønge gø cwöödh en piny kì kuni wïje. Abner geki jøliny onenø, e Cɑul tyeeg gen dïdyër." 
1Samuel26:8 Aköbbi Debïd yi Abicɑy kinni, “Dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, Jwøk ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́cïbe cingí. Wiy Cɑul cwøøbɑ piny ki tøngɑ. Pɑ cwøb yi yɑn tyel ɑ́ryew, ceg-ɑ kegø yi cwøbø ɑ́kyel.”" 
1Samuel26:9 De Debïd, Abicɑy ɑ́kyëdde kinni, “Ko di gïnrɑj me göggií! Á men ɑ cuggi tïngi cinge ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ocögø e pɑ cyen?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ Nëënø. Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ónɑ̈gii, wɑlɑ̀ bɑ bøli keje ɑ óbï kɑ othøø, wɑlɑ̀ ókedhi be liny kɑ nɑ̈g." 
1Samuel26:11 De yɑ pɑ göögø ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cingɑ tïnggɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kwɑny wɑ tønge men-ɑ cwöödh en buti wïje ɑnɑn, geki ɑtheeb pï men-ɑ bute, kɑ yï bïí kedh wɑ.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny tøng yi Debïd kí ɑtheeb pï men-ɑ ɑ́ying buti Cɑul, kɑ ge ókedhø. Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lidh gen, wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́yod per gen, wɑlɑ̀ dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́cyëëw, mɑ́ ge ɑ́göjji nenø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel26:13 Codhe, ɑcør piny yi Debïd, kɑ kedh-ɑ tuung kït tung-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ yedh-ɑ mɑl wïj kït, e lɑ̈wi ki gen." 
1Samuel26:14 Aryeer Debïd e cwøll-ɑ liny Cɑul geki Abner wɑ̈d Ner kinni, “Abner! Yï pɑ löggi!” Alöggi Abner kinni, “Yïn ɑ́ men ɑ ryeer ki yïthhi rɑ̈dh èn?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Abner, pɑth ki yïn ɑ bɑ jɑl-ɑ dwøng kì Isrɑil? De yïde ɑ pɑ koor wöw? Mɑ́ e dɑ dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́bï be nɑ̈gi wöw." 
1Samuel26:16 Yï ɑ́dhɑl yi nenni gwøgí Abner! Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu bënn, wu døj ki thøø, mɑ́ ngɑndwøøng wun men-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ rɑ̈dh pɑ kor yi wun kidøøj. Lidh, tøøng rɑ̈dh ying-ɑ keny? Atheeb pï men-ɑ ɑ́ying bute kì kuni wïje ying-ɑ keny?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Angij cwɑggi Debïd yi Cɑul, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Bɑ yïn ɑ kööbø Debïd wɑ̈dɑ?” Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Ngee bɑ yɑn wuö, rɑ̈dhɑ!”" 
1Samuel26:18 Akööb Debïd këti kinni, “Yïde ɑ rïngí kì bɑngɑ wuö? Á gïnrɑj mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn? Á gïn ɑ ɑ́bɑjɑ?" 
1Samuel26:19 Lïngí møg, wuö rɑ̈dhɑ. Keløg ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ wëggi pyëwí rënyø ki yɑn, ke nëngí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëëdhi, pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø. De keløg ɑ́ ji, cyënni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ópɑ̈dhi kömi gen. Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́cyeed pɑ̈l yi gen, o yɑ twɑ̈lɑ kì kömi piny-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑkedhɑ kun kwɑjjɑ jwögg mø pɑth." 
1Samuel26:20 Remɑ ko wëggí dëëmø kì pɑ̈l kun lɑ̈wi ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ede rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ɑ bëëne be nɑ̈gi dhɑnhø me ni yɑn, ɑ pɑ̈r ki cwɑrø yøw? Ede ɑ dwɑre yɑn, de yɑ nɑ winyi pɑ̈l?”" 
1Samuel26:21 Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji, bïí dwöög, Debïd wɑ̈dɑ. Dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng wëyɑ ɑ́wør yi yïn, bong gïnrɑj me göggɑ yïn këti. Yɑn ɑ bɑ dhëg!”" 
1Samuel26:22 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Tøngí èn wuö, wiy dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel bëe be dwɑ̈ɑ̈yii." 
1Samuel26:23 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi køøg-ɑ tyëngtir møg-ɑ mïdhi bëëndøj, yï ɑ́rum ki cïb cingɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn, de yï nuti nywɑɑl yɑn, yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel26:24 Yɑ ólony ki wiyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yɑ yiele ki ɑkørr!”" 
1Samuel26:25 Aköbbi Debïd yi Cɑul kinni, “Yï ógyëdh yi Jwøk wɑ̈dɑ! Gïg-ɑ gwøg yi yïn ópɑ̈dhi bënn.” Codhe, ɑkedh Debïd, kɑ Cɑul døøg-ɑ pɑc." 
1Samuel27:1 Kɑ Debïd ree köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ómɑg yi Cɑul cyɑ̈ng megø. Gïn-ɑ lɑ̈w ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yɑn, bɑ dɑ̈gi Pelistiyɑ̀, o Cɑul wïye ki yɑbi yɑn kì Isrɑil, o riɑ yielɑ.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Debïd geki jøge gɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel kì Isrɑil, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï Akïc wɑ̈d Mɑok rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gɑth." 
1Samuel27:3 Apëggi Debïd Gɑth geki jøge kì buti Akïc. Debïd ɑ́kedh kɑ mɑ̈nne ryeet, ɑ løg Akinoɑm nyɑɑr Yidhriil, kí Abigɑil nyɑɑr Kɑrmel, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cï Nɑbɑl." 
1Samuel27:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Cɑul kinni Debïd pɑ̈ɑ̈r Gɑth, ɑwïye ki yɑbii." 
1Samuel27:5 Aköbbi Akïc yi Debïd kinni, “Keløg pyëwí med ki yɑn, nëngí yɑn ki kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddí, ɑ́ men yije bëëdɑ. Bong gïn pere bëëdɑ kì kej ɑ́kyel ki yïn kì kɑɑldwøng, wuö.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Codhe, ɑmëgge Debïd kɑɑl Dhiglɑg. Kɑ Dhiglɑg ogöögø ki piny rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
1Samuel27:7 Debïd ɑ́bëëd kì Pelistiyɑ̀ ki run ɑ́kyel kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ngwen. 
1Samuel27:8 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Debïd geki jøge nyi kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki pödhi Gecur, kí pödhi Girdhì, kí pödhi Amɑlek. Tyëngɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ pìnyɑni kɑ̈ge dööng. Pödhhɑni nyii yɑgø yi en cɑ̈gi kì Cur gïti Rïp." 
1Samuel27:9 Kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn nyi nɑ̈ge, kɑ dyëgi gen, kí dhögi gen, kí ɑderri gen, kí ɑmɑlli gen, kí ógudhi gen thyew nyi kwɑny yi gen. Codhe, o nyi døøge yï Akïc." 
1Samuel27:10 Kɑ Debïd nyi pyëj yi Akïc kinni, “Á kun ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈nyi yi wun kì yethi cyɑ̈nggï?” Kɑ Akïc nyi köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kedh-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl.” Dɑ kɑ̀ kwøbe pödhi Yerɑmel, wɑlɑ̀ piny-ɑ bëëd yi tyëng Ken." 
1Samuel27:11 Ji bënn nyii nɑ̈gø yi Debïd, jøg-ɑ cwøw, ki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, o bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me nyi kedhi Gɑth be kwøbi gïn-ɑ dyër men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge geki jøge. Bene gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì Pelistiyɑ̀." 
1Samuel27:12 De Debïd ɑ́bëëd e ogɑ̈nø yi Akïc, kɑ ree nyi köbbe kinni, “Debïd mɑɑn yi tyëng pödhi gen, wiy cöge ɑ́ dhɑnhɑ.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Kì bøli keny megø ɑcøng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ liny gen, kipe nyɑɑg ki Isrɑil, ɑköbbi Debïd yi Akïc kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidøøj kinni yïn, wuki jøgí, wu ónyïɑ̈ggi wu køny-ɑ yɑn ki liny.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Bɑ dyër ceth, yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ngí, o gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn ólidh yi yïn kirií.” Akööb Akïc kinni, “Døj! Yï ógwøg yi yɑn yïn ɑ́ ngɑn nyi kor yɑn, yï pɑ pɑ̈nyi ki wilø.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Kì bøli kenyɑni Sɑmwel rum thøø, o tyëng Isrɑil bënn okïïmø kipere, ɑ́kony ɑ Rɑmɑ̀ pɑɑre. Kì bøli kenyɑni, ɑ́jwöggì geki tyëdd rumø ki cyeddø kì Isrɑil yi Cɑul." 
1Samuel28:4 Acøng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ri gen, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ buti kɑɑl Cunem. Kɑ Cɑul tyëng Isrɑil cønge, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ Kïti Gilboɑ̀." 
1Samuel28:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh liny Pelistiyɑ̀ yi Cɑul, ɑbwøge ki mendwøng." 
1Samuel28:6 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëje kipe gïn cuggi gwøgø. De kwøbbe nuti løøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi lɑ̈g, o ge nuti løøg en ki Urïm geki Thumïm, wɑlɑ̀ ki dhøggi tyëngtöng." 
1Samuel28:7 Kɑ Cɑul bɑ̈ngge köbbe kinni, “Yɑ̈bbu yɑn ki dheyɑdh, o yɑ kedhɑ yïe, o pyëj yi yɑn ki gïn-ɑ ócwöb.” Alöggi bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Dheyɑdh nud kì Ein Dör.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Codhe, ɑlunyi Cɑul ree ki ógudh møøgø, kipe kinni o cöge e pɑ ngij, ɑkedhe yï ngɑnɑni kì wɑ̈r geki bɑ̈ngge ɑ́ryew. Aköbbi ngɑnɑni yi Cɑul kinni, “Pyëj yɑdh kiperɑ, kɑ yɑ cöllí ngɑn-ɑ nyinge köbbɑ yïn.”" 
1Samuel28:9 De ɑ́köbbi yi ngɑnɑni kinni “Kidyër ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn eni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Cɑul, kinni ɑ́jwöggì geki tyëdd, kí tyëngtöng ɑ́cyedde kì yij pödhø. Wu dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgi yɑn o yɑ nɑ̈g?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Aköngi Cɑul ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli ngɑnɑni kinni, “Kidyër ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ Nëënø, bong cɑ́y men-ɑ ócɑɑy yïn kipe gwøgi gïnɑni.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Apyëjii yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Cöllɑ yïn nyingi men, o dhwödhe?” Alögge kinni, “Cöllí yɑn nyingi Sɑmwel.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Sɑmwel yi ngɑnɑni, ɑryeere ki mendwøng, kɑ Cɑul köbbe kinni, “Yïde ɑ wëëny yɑn! Yï bɑ Cɑul!”" 
1Samuel28:13 Aköbbii yi Rɑ̈dh Cɑul kinni, “Yï ko böggi, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn?” Aköbbii yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ tïbi dhɑnhø e bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij lɑ̈bø.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Apyëjii yi Cɑul kinni, “Nënni e nɑ ngø?” Alöggi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Jɑl me bɑ yu, ree kood en ki ógødh.” Codhe, ɑyodii yi Cɑul kinni bɑ Sɑmwel, kɑ ree bøødhe wïje kuule’ piny." 
1Samuel28:15 Apyëëj Cɑul yi Sɑmwel kinni, “Yïde ɑ pïd yɑn? Yïde ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn wɑ̈g, o yɑ dwöög mɑl?” Alöggi Cɑul kinni, “Yɑ ying-ɑ yij orɑng! Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ bɑ møg nyïɑ̈ggi ki yɑn, de Jwøk yɑ ɑ́wiye. Kwøbbɑ pɑ nyi løøge këti kì yethi lɑ̈g, wɑlɑ̀ ki dhøggi tyëngtöng, bene ɑ cwølɑ yïn, o yɑ köbbí gïn-ɑ dwɑddi kinni o gwøg yi yɑn.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Akööb Sɑmwel kinni, “Yïde ɑ cwøøl yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhí kinni yï ɑ́wiy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ree løge ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki yïn?" 
1Samuel28:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ɑ́gögge gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi en keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe yïn kinni lɑwø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì cingí, kɑ gø mëgge wɑɑd wun Debïd." 
1Samuel28:18 Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi yïn, kɑ kwɑrri Amɑlek ocögø ge nuti nɑ̈gø yi yïn bënn. O jɑmmi gen nuti rënyø yi yïn. Bene ɑ pere göggi yïn kinøw ɑnɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Samuel28:19 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu cïbe’ cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ wuki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki yïn. Wu óying butɑ wuki wɑ̈ddí dhuki. Yɑɑy Isrɑil ɑ́cïb cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ thyew yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” 
1Samuel28:20 Kɑ Cɑul ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì kenyɑni ceth, ɑ́bwøg yi kwøbbi Sɑmwel. Ábëëd dële nyøødh yi kɑ̈j thyew mɑ́ e nuti cyɑ̈mø kì dicyɑ̈ngɑni bëne, kí wɑ̈re bëne." 
1Samuel28:21 Codhe, ɑbëën ngɑndhɑjø menɑni yï Cɑul, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gøn e dële thøø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lidh yɑn yɑ bɑ̈ngí, dhøgí nuti pyeem yɑn. Wëyɑ ɑ́böyyɑ thøø, kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbí yɑn kinni gwøgɑ en, gwøgɑ." 
1Samuel28:22 Anɑn lïngí møgɑ jɑldwøng, wiy yï nëngɑ ki gïncɑm o dëlí tënge, o yï kedhí yuuí.”" 
1Samuel28:23 De Cɑul ɑ́bɑ̈nyi cɑm, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ pɑ cyɑ̈mø!” Kɑ bɑ̈ngge ókunyø ki kwɑjjii kyeel kí ngɑnɑni kinni cyɑ̈me, kɑ kwøbbi gen lïngi yi en. Codhe, ɑdhwödhe mɑl, kɑ pëgg-ɑ wïj pyën." 
1Samuel28:24 Ngɑnɑni yïe ɑ́dɑ nyɑ wɑdh me piidh en kì gøle, ɑjwɑne gøn ki ngɑlø, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki møng-ɑ búr, kɑ gø jwɑne ki nyömø, ɑbule gøn ɑ́ ópùni møng-ɑ olwëny." 
1Samuel28:25 Acïbe gïncɑmɑni bøli Cɑul geki jøge, kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø. Adhwödh gen kɑ ge ókedhø kì wɑ̈rɑni ceth." 
1Samuel29:1 Liny tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ree ɑ́cønge Ápek, kɑ liny tyëng Isrɑil pëgg-ɑ piny kì buti wɑɑng pïi Töör Yidhriil." 
1Samuel29:2 Acyɑ̈ɑ̈m rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́bïj ki yɑ̈yyi gen, e ri gen køjji gen gɑ miy, kí ɑ́lïp, o Debïd kí jøge ge ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng Akïc." 
1Samuel29:3 Aliidh gen yi pëjji liny Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ ge ópëjjø kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil møg gwøg-ɑ ngø kì keny?” Alöggi Akïc kinni, “Men bɑ Debïd, ɑ́göög kɑ Cɑul rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. De ɑ́bëëd ɑ butɑ ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r. Bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gwøge kër-ɑ ɑ́wiye Cɑul, ɑ ɑ́bëëne keny.”" 
1Samuel29:4 De pëjji liny Pelistiyɑ̀ pëthi gen ɑ́rënyi ki Akïc, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Ör Debïd, døøge keny-ɑ ɑ́mëggií. Pɑ kedhi be liny kyeel ki wɑ. Keløg e ókedhø ree luge’ wɑ kì yij liny. Ree kwɑɑje’ ri rɑ̈dh kinni o pyëwe mïne ki en, kɑ ree luge wɑ, kɑ ji nɑ̈ge." 
1Samuel29:5 Pɑth ki Debïd ɑ nyinge nyi wör yi mɑ̈nni Isrɑil kinni, ‘Cɑul ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyëllì, de Debïd ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r.’ ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Codhe, ɑcwøøl Debïd yi Akïc kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ Nëënø kinni, pyëwí ying-ɑ kömɑ, o wɑ ying-ɑ tung ɑ́kyel. Pyëwɑ ɑ́bëëd e omedø kinni o yï di nyïɑ̈ggí yï køny-ɑ yɑn ki liny. Bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn kër-ɑ ɑ́bëën, ɑbëëd kì buti wøn. De rɑ̈nhì møg-ɑ kyeelø yï ɑ́bɑny yi gen." 
1Samuel29:7 De yïn, døøg pɑc ki mër, kɑ yï ko göög ki gïjø me rɑj men-ɑ órënyi pëthi gen.”" 
1Samuel29:8 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Dɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ? Á gïnrɑj mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́yod yi yïn kì ri bɑ̈ngí, cɑg kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cungɑ kì bølí gïti ɑnɑn, ɑ pere mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn kedhi be nyɑɑg ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø wøki wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Alöggi Akïc kinni, “Áyod yi yɑn kinni, yï nɑ wëywöni Jwøk. De rɑ̈nhì møg-ɑ kyeelø ge okööbø kinni i yï pɑ cuggi kedhi yij liny kyeel ki wøn." 
1Samuel29:10 De kì mwøl dhuki keny-ɑ ótɑ̈ri piny, kɑ yï dhwöödh wuki jøgí, jwɑn dhwödhø ceth kɑ yï kedh.”" 
1Samuel29:11 Codhe, kɑ Debïd odhwödhø geki jøge kì mwøl piny nudd e looj, ɑkedh gen ge døøg-ɑ Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kedh-ɑ Yidhriil." 
1Samuel30:1 Kɑ Debïd wɑ̈dh-ɑ Dhiglɑg bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew geki jøge. Tyëng Amɑlek mɑ̈nyi Yeudiyɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, o ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑɑl Dhiglɑg, kɑ gø rɑ̈b gen." 
1Samuel30:2 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mɑɑg gen geki ji bënn, othønhø kí tyëngdøngø, bong dhɑnhø me nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen, de ji cɑɑg gen kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø." 
1Samuel30:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Debïd Dhiglɑg geki jøge, ɑyuud gen kɑɑl e órɑ̈bø, o mɑ̈nni gen kí wɑ̈ddi gen, kí wojur; ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
1Samuel30:4 Kɑ Debïd geki jøge óywöngø ki ywøng dwøng, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈rø yi ywøg." 
1Samuel30:5 Mɑ̈nni Debïd ryeet Akinoɑm geki Abigɑil ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø thyew. 
1Samuel30:6 Kɑ Debïd ogöögø ki ngɑn ying yij orɑng, mɑ́ jøge bënn pëthi gen ɑ́rënyi yi tøøki wɑ̈ddi gen geki nyigi gen, de ge dwɑdd-ɑ bɑ̈lli Debïd ki tuggi kïttì, de pyëwe ɑ́cwed yi Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ ogöögø e teeg." 
1Samuel30:7 Aköbbi ókwërø, Abiyɑthɑr wɑ̈d Akimelek yi Debïd kinni, “Muuj yɑn pɑri kwër!” Kɑ muujii yi Abiyɑthɑr." 
1Samuel30:8 Codhe, ɑpyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ócuggø rengi bɑng tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møgɑni? Ge ópïïd yi yɑn?” Codhe ɑløøg mø Debïd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Rengí bɑng gen, ge ópïïd yi yïn, o ji ócuggi ki yielø yi yïn kì cinggi gen.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Kɑ Debïd kí jøge gɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel dhwödh-ɑ bɑng gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen dhøg Bisör, ɑdöngi kwï gen cyɑ̈n." 
1Samuel30:10 Apöödh Debïd geki jøg mø bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen. Jøg-ɑ kyeelø gɑ miy ɑ́ryew ɑ́pïd ki mendwøng, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø bɑ̈ɑ̈ni dhøg Bisör, codhe ɑdöngi gen cyɑ̈n." 
1Samuel30:11 Ayïddi jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki Debïd ki jɑl Rïp, kì yethi pwödh, kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen yï Debïd. Anëngii yi gen ki pï kí gïncɑm," 
1Samuel30:12 kɑ nëngi yi gen thyew ki ópuun nywøli yenh, kí cyɑ̈ll ɑ́ryew mø nywøli yenh møg thwøwø. Codhe, ɑlɑ̈ɑ̈ny kɑ̈j kì ree, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd ree dɑ kɑ̈j me teeg, bong gïn cɑɑm en, wɑlɑ̀ pï mø mɑɑdh en ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kí wɑ̈rr ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
1Samuel30:13 Apyëjii yi Debïd kinni, “Wöw bɑ men? Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ bɑ wɑ̈d Rïp, yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ng wɑ̈d Amɑlek. Kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh, wɑ̈ɑ yɑ ɑ́wiye piny kipe kɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlɑ." 
1Samuel30:14 Wø ɑ́kedh-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀, kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, ɑmɑny wøn tyëng Kereth, kí kwɑrri Kɑlib. Arɑ̈b wøn Dhiglɑg.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Apyëjii yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ócuggø nyudhø yi yïn keny-ɑ di tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l mɑ̈nni wøn?” Alögge kinni, “Ngee, keløg Jwøk okwöngø yi yïn kinni yɑ pɑ nɑ̈g yi wun, o yɑ pɑ cïb wun cingi wɑ̈ɑ.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Kɑ Debïd peeje kun-ɑ di tyëng Amɑlek. Ayuud ge gïn kunɑni ge tɑyø, kwï gen ocyɑ̈mø, møøgø omɑ̈dhø, o kwï gen otugø yi medi pëëth kipe jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen ge gïïr kì Pelistiyɑ̀, kí myërri Yeudiyɑ̀." 
1Samuel30:17 Apɑ̈ɑ̈r Debïd kömi gen kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ gït-ɑ böörø dhung-ɑ kyeelø, e onɑ̈gø ki gïn. Bɑ ji miy ɑ́ngwen keti gen ɑ ɑ́bodh; gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi ɑmɑlli gen kɑ ge órengø." 
1Samuel30:18 Ayieel dhɑnhø bëne yi Debïd, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l bënn yi tyëng Amɑlek dwöög, kí mɑ̈nne gɑ ɑ́ryew." 
1Samuel30:19 Bong gïïpiny ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́yuud e tøøk kì ri gen bënn. Debïd nyige, kí jøge, yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb kí womɑ̈nn, kí jɑmmì bënn, møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi tyëng Amɑlek ɑ́dwööge." 
1Samuel30:20 Akwɑɑny dyëg kí dhög yi Debïd, kɑ ge kööl yi jøge kì bøli gen, ge kømm-ɑ kinni, “Møg bɑ mø Debïd!”" 
1Samuel30:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Debïd, yï jøge, møg-ɑ miy ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r yi wɑ̈dh, kɑ ge odöngø kì dhøg Bisör, ɑpɑɑr Debïd yi gen geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́kedh ki en. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe buti gïn, ɑkedhi Debïd be mɑ̈dhi gen." 
1Samuel30:22 De jøg-ɑ yethi gen looj, kí jøgi orøg kì kelli teen-ɑ ɑ́kedh ki Debïd ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Mɑ́ ge nuti kedhø kyeel ki wɑ, ge pɑ pɑ̈ggi ki wɑ ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l. Ge ócuggø kwɑnyi mɑ̈nni gen kí nyigi gen, kɑ ge kedh gen.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Pɑth ki kinøw, wun ɑ nyiimïɑ. Gïn ni men ko gwøg wun, wɑ ɑ́rum ki nëngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wɑ ɑ́kor yi en, kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömee tyɑm yi wɑ." 
1Samuel30:24 Bong ngɑn cuggi yïëyi kwøbbi wun! Pɑ̈ngi jɑmmì ge pɑ̈r kì kelli wun bënn, Ji-ɑ ɑ́döng ge kor-ɑ jɑmmì, geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kedhi be nyïɑ̈ggø ki liny.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Agwøøg menɑni ɑ́ cigg yi Debïd, ɑ nudd ciggɑni omïdhø kì Isrɑil gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
1Samuel30:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Debïd Dhiglɑg, ɑöre kwï jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi en, kì yï tyëng Amɑlek, gï öre’ jøgdøngi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Men bɑ jwödhø men-ɑ mëggɑ wun kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi wøn kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Kɑ Debïd öd-ɑ yï jyɑ̈ggi Betiil, kí jyɑ̈ggi Rɑmɑ̀ ki jɑmmì, kí myërri Yeudiyɑ̀, kí kɑ̈ddi Yɑtir," 
1Samuel30:28 kí Aröeer, kí Sipmöth, kí Ectemoɑ̀" 
1Samuel30:29 geki Rɑkɑl, kí kɑ̈ddi Yerɑmel, kí tyëng Ken." 
1Samuel30:30 Kí myërri Órmɑ̀, kí Börɑcɑn, kí Athɑk." 
1Samuel30:31 Kí Kibrön geki yï tyëng-ɑ kyeelø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi yi Debïd bënn. 
1Samuel31:1 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi geki tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ Isrɑil tyɑm yi gen. Tyëng Isrɑil mø gïïr ɑ́nɑ̈g kì wïj Kïti Gilboɑ̀." 
1Samuel31:2 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki nyɑɑg me teeg. Kɑ Cɑul nɑ̈g kì yij liny geki wɑ̈dde, Yönɑthɑn, kí Abinɑdɑb, kí Mɑlkicuɑ̀." 
1Samuel31:3 Liny ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki nyɑɑg me teeg kì tung-ɑ di Cɑul, ɑpɑ̈dhi nyɑɑr weth ree, kɑ ogöögø ki kedø me rɑɑj cɑrø." 
1Samuel31:4 Aköbbe nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi liny møge kinni, “Wöödh pilí wɑ̈g kɑ yɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ tuug yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ nuti ngølø.” De nyelɑni ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mɑ́ e ɑ́bwøg ki mendwøng. Codhe, kɑ Cɑul pile kwɑnye, kɑ ree møøde köme." 
1Samuel31:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi nyelɑni kinni Cɑul ɑ́thøw, ɑlonye ree ki møød kömi pile, kɑ othøø kyeel ki Cɑul." 
1Samuel31:6 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́thøw Cɑul geki wɑ̈dde gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí nyel-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi liny mø Cɑul dicyɑ̈ngɑni." 
1Samuel31:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Isrɑil, møg-ɑ Töör Yidhriil, kí møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi Nɑm Urdun kinni Cɑul thøø, kí wɑ̈dde bënn gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑbwøg gen, kɑ ge odhwödhø kì myërri gen. Codhe, ɑbëën tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ myërrɑni." 
1Samuel31:8 Dhuki, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ be kwɑnyi jɑmm-ɑ per gen teg kì ri tyëng-ɑ thøø, ɑyod gen Cɑul ki wɑ̈dde gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ge thøø kì wïj Kïti Gilboɑ̀." 
1Samuel31:9 Angul gen wïj Cɑul wɑ̈g, kɑ tønge kí jɑmmi linye kwɑny yi gen, codhe ɑödi gen myërri Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn, ge köbb-ɑ ji kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ mɑlli jwöggi gen." 
1Samuel31:10 Acïb gen jɑmmi liny mø Cɑul yij kengi Actɑröth. Kɑ Cɑul gur gen mɑl kì ri döri Betcɑn. 
1Samuel31:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Cɑul yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀," 
1Samuel31:12 ɑkedhi yɑɑg teg Betcɑn kì wɑ̈r, kɑ Cɑul kí wɑ̈dde kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì ri döri Betcɑn, kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen Yɑbic kɑ gï rɑ̈b gen." 
1Samuel31:13 Codhe, ɑkwɑny gen cu gen, kɑ gï koony gen thɑ yɑdh kì Yɑbic. Kɑ tyëng Yɑbic othuumø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
2Samuel1:1 Debïd ɑ́dwöög keny-ɑ ɑ́rume tyɑmi tyëng Amɑlek, kì bɑng thøwi Cɑul, kɑ obëëdø kì Dhiglɑg ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew." 
2Samuel1:2 Kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ɑbëën nyel me kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑɑl Cɑul. Ógudhe pyëëd en, o wïje kïdh en ki tør. Akedhe yï Debïd, kɑ ree bøødhe wïje kuule’ piny." 
2Samuel1:3 Kɑ pyëj yi Debïd kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́pɑ̈r-ɑ kɑɑl Isrɑil.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb.” Kɑ ólöggø kinni, “Kɑɑlee ɑ́cyeddi, o ji mø gïïr ɑ́nɑ̈g kì kelli jiee. Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈de ɑ́nɑ̈g thyew.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Apëjji Debïd kinni, “Áyod yi yïn kidï kinni Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn thøø?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Alöggi nyelɑni kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ying-ɑ wïj Kïti Gilboɑ̀, ɑlidhɑ Cɑul e ócungø ree mïdh en kɑ ɑkebïdhe, gø cwöödh en piny, o yɑ̈thi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø geki jøg-ɑ kömi kyënyì kedh ge ócyɑ̈ngø ki en." 
2Samuel1:7 Codhe, ɑlïïdhe ngɑ̈je, kɑ yɑ lidhe, ɑcwøle yɑn. Kɑ yɑ ólöggø kinni, yɑn èn wuö!" 
2Samuel1:8 Apyëje yɑn mɑ løgɑ men, kɑ köbbɑ kinni yɑ bɑ kwɑɑr Amɑlek." 
2Samuel1:9 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Bïí nɑ̈g yɑn! Riɑ dɑ kedø me rɑɑj, o wëyɑ nudd ge nud kì riɑ.’" 
2Samuel1:10 Codhe, ɑkedhɑ yïe kɑ nɑ̈gɑ, mɑ́ e ɑ́yod yi yɑn kinni bɑ men thøw ceth keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhe. Codhe, ɑkwɑnyɑ yɑ̈r kì wïje kí ɑ́tegø kì cinge, ɑmuujɑ gen yïn èn wuö.”" 
2Samuel1:11 Kɑ Debïd ógødhe kɑge ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe, kɑ jøge bënn ógudhi gen pyëëd gen." 
2Samuel1:12 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ böörø ge óywöngø, o ge okïïmø, o ge pɑ cyɑ̈mø, ge ywøg-ɑ Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn, kí Isrɑil jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
2Samuel1:13 Apyëëj nyel-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wöödø yi Debïd kinni, “Yï bɑ jɑl keny?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ bɑ kwɑɑr Amɑlek, de yɑ bëëd ɑ pödhi wun.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Apyëjii yi Debïd kinni, “Yïde ɑ pɑ bwøøg ki nɑ̈gi rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Kɑ Debïd nyel ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøge cwøle, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Bïí nɑ̈ɑ̈g!” Kɑ wɑ̈d Amɑlek diny yi nyelɑni ki pilø, kɑ gø kege." 
2Samuel1:16 Aköbbii yi Debïd kinni, “Yï ɑ́nɑ̈g yi lebí, kí bɑng kɑ ɑ́yïëëy kinni yïn ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk ɑ́ rɑ̈dh.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Awör Debïd ki wöri ywøg men, e ywøg-ɑ Cɑul geki wɑ̈de Yönɑthɑn." 
2Samuel1:18 Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni pwönyi wörɑni tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀. (Wörɑni bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Yɑcɑr) 
2Samuel1:19 “Pëjjee ɑ́thøw kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Isrɑil! Jöddi Isrɑil ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! 
2Samuel1:20 Møgɑni ko dwøg kì Gɑth, kɑ ge ko ngɑ̈j kì Ackelön. Pëthi mɑ̈nni Pelistiyɑ̀ ko wëggu mïnø; nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø ko wëggu ngedhø." 
2Samuel1:21 “Bong kødh wɑlɑ̀ thöjj møg-ɑ ódëëm wɑ̈thi kïtti Gilboɑ̀; wiy pwödhhe cög gen gɑ ryɑng. Mɑ́ köddi jödd ɑ́döngi piny kì kunɑni ki ɑyɑ̈r, kwööd Cɑul pɑ mïllø yi møw këti." 
2Samuel1:22 Nyɑɑr weth Yönɑthɑn pɑ nyi dëëm piny, o pili Cɑul pɑ nyi dwöög e tïl, nyi ceg-ɑ pöddi piny ki yɑɑg teg, nɑ̈g-ɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
2Samuel1:23 “Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn yɑɑg døj, jøg-ɑ bëëdi gen med. ge nuti dɑ̈ngø ge onëënø, o ge ɑ́thøw kyeel, yɑɑg-ɑ yöd kibøli cør, yɑɑg-ɑ teg kibøli ngurrì." 
2Samuel1:24 “Ywøgu Cɑul, wun ɑ mɑ̈nni Isrɑil, mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́ruug wun ki ógudh-ɑ myëër, kí tigg geki dhɑb." 
2Samuel1:25 “Jöddi yɑy ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, ge ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny Yönɑthɑn buud e thøø kì kelli kïttì." 
2Samuel1:26 “Yönɑthɑn ómïɑ, yɑ ywøg-ɑ yïn; perí ɑ́bëëd e teeg cɑrø kì yïɑ. Yɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi yïn ki mendwøng, ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me lod mi mɑ̈nn." 
2Samuel1:27 “Jöddi yɑy ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, tønggi gen ɑ́döngi piny, e bong gïn gwøøg gen.”" 
2Samuel2:1 Codhe, ɑpyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Debïd kinni, “Kedhɑ kɑɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀?” Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggø kinni, “Kedh!” Apëjji Debïd kinni, “Kedhɑ kɑɑl-ɑ́?” Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kedhí Kibrön.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Codhe, kɑ Debïd dɑ̈g-ɑ Kibrön geki mɑ̈nne ryeet, Akinoɑm nyɑɑr Yidhriil geki Abigɑil cï Nɑbɑl jɑl Kɑrmel, nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́lɑg yi Debïd." 
2Samuel2:3 Debïd jøge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le thyew, kí tyëng kɑ̈lli gen, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ Kibrön geki myërr-ɑ bute." 
2Samuel2:4 Kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bï-ɑ Kibrön, ɑrøny gen Debïd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, o jɑɑge gøl Yeudɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Debïd kinni bɑ jø Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd ɑ koony Cɑul," 
2Samuel2:5 ɑöde yï jø Yɑbic Gilyɑd ki ngɑn köbbi gen kinni, “Wu ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kɑ ɑ́konyu wïi wun Cɑul, menɑni bɑ wuödø me dwøng." 
2Samuel2:6 Anɑn wu ókorri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ wu mïdhe kidøøj, yɑn thyew yɑ ógöögø ni menɑni." 
2Samuel2:7 Cwed wun pëthi wun kɑ wu bëëd wu teeg, mɑ́ wïi wun Cɑul ɑ́thøw, o yɑ ɑ́røny yi gøl Yeudɑ̀ yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Kɑ Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul kwɑny yi Abner, pënyi liny Cɑul, kɑ gø kïdhe Mɑɑ̈nɑim." 
2Samuel2:9 Kɑ gø rønye ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh myërri Gilyɑd, kí Aceer, kí Yidhriil, kí Eprɑim, kí myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn geki Isrɑil bëne." 
2Samuel2:10 Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn ɑ́ryew. De gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi Debïd." 
2Samuel2:11 Kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Debïd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì Yeudiyɑ̀, bɑ runn ɑ́bïryew kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel e bëëd ɑ Kibrön." 
2Samuel2:12 Kɑ Abner wɑ̈d Ner odhwödhø kì Mɑɑ̈nɑim geki jø Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Gibeon. 
2Samuel2:13 Kɑ Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ geki jø Debïd ókedhø thyew, kɑ ge røøm-ɑ kömi luy. Kɑɑl ɑ́kyel ɑ́pëggi kömi luy tuung, kɑ kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø pëgg-ɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø." 
2Samuel2:14 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yöɑb yi Abner kinni, “Wiy yɑnythønhø dhwödh gen, o ge nyïɑ̈ggi gen kì bølee.” Kɑ Yöɑb okööbø kinni, “Dhwödh gen!”" 
2Samuel2:15 Codhe, ɑdhwödh gen, kɑ ge kwɑn gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì tuung gøl Ben Yɑmïn geki Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul, kí pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì kelli jø Debïd." 
2Samuel2:16 Kɑ ngɑn pödh-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ rwöm ki en, kɑ gø pɑ̈rre kì wïje kedh pile cwøøbe wɑɑng ngëdi ngɑn-ɑ rwöm ki en, kɑ jøgɑni bënn gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen othøø kì kenyɑni ceth. A bɑnge cwølli kenyɑni ɑnɑn kì Gibeon ɑ́ “Pwödhi pil.”" 
2Samuel2:17 Kɑ liny ree pödhe ki menteg, kɑ Abner geki jø Isrɑil tyɑm yi jø Debïd." 
2Samuel2:18 Wɑ̈ddi Dheruyɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni, ɑ løg Yöɑb, kí Abicɑy, kí Asɑiil. Asɑiil pëddi ngwej ni tenø kì pɑ̈l," 
2Samuel2:19 Kɑ Abner cyeddi yi Asɑiil, e ceg-ɑ rïngø e pödh-ɑ yïe ceth." 
2Samuel2:20 Alïïdh Abner ngɑ̈je, kɑ ópëjjø kinni, “Bene yïn Asɑiil?” Akööbe kinni, “Yɑn!”" 
2Samuel2:21 Aköbbii yi Abner kinni, “Këjjí wïj cɑɑmí wɑlɑ̀ wïj kyëjí, pïïd ɑ́kyel kì kelli yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb, kɑ tønge kwɑɑny.” De Asɑiil nuti wïyø ki cyeddii." 
2Samuel2:22 Kɑ cigi cyɑ̈rø yi Abner kinni, “Wïyí ki cyeddi yɑn! Yɑ cïrrí nɑ̈gi yïn kɑ per ngø? Nyingi wøn ólidh yi wøn kidï ki Yöɑb ómyëw, keløg yï onɑ̈gø yi yɑn?”" 
2Samuel2:23 De Asɑiil ɑ́bɑ̈nyi wïyø ki cyeddii, codhe ɑcwøøb Asɑiil yi Abner ki tøng kì yije, kɑ tøng twïy-ɑ wɑ̈g kì köme. Apɑ̈ɑ̈dhe kɑ othøø kì kenyɑni ceth. Ngɑn kɑ̈l keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi yi Asɑiil kɑ othøø, nyi ceg-ɑ cung kɑ̀ wɑ̈dhe kenyɑni." 
2Samuel2:24 De Yöɑb geki Abicɑy ɑ́rengi bɑng Abner, kɑ cɑ̈ng kedh-ɑ piny ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri kïti Amɑ̀, kì buti Giyɑ̀ kì kö yuu pɑ̈ɑ̈l Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:25 Codhe, kɑ jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn ócugø kì buti Abner këti, kɑ liny tɑd gen kì wïj kït." 
2Samuel2:26 Aryeer Abner e köbb-ɑ Yöɑb kinni, “Pilø cög e ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g ceth? Pɑ nenni yi yïn kinni møgɑni pɑ thumi ge med? Jøgí ókyëddi yi yïn kì wɑɑng, o nyiimï gen wiy yi gen ki cyeddø?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Alöggi Yöɑb kinni, “Jwøk ɑ Nëënø! Keløg yï pɑ di kööb, jøgɑni pɑ di wïyi ki cyeddi nyiimï gen gïti mwøl.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Codhe, ɑkoodh kɑng yi Yöɑb, kɑ jøgɑni ócungø bënn, ge ɑ́wïyi ki cyeddi Isrɑil, o ge nuti nyïɑ̈ggø këti." 
2Samuel2:29 Kɑ Abner geki jøge tyëg-ɑ wɑ̈rɑni bëne ge ócyɑ̈dhø ge bødh-ɑ Töör Urdun. Abɑ̈ɑ̈n gen Nɑm Urdun, kɑ ge tyëg-ɑ cɑ̈ng ge ócyɑ̈dhø, codhe ɑwɑ̈dhi gen Mɑɑ̈nɑim." 
2Samuel2:30 Adwöög Yöɑb kì be cyeddi Abner, kɑ jøge mɑme bënn. Asɑiil geki jøg møøgø mø bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïngwen, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge tøøk kì kelli jø Debïd." 
2Samuel2:31 De jø Debïd ɑ́nɑ̈gi ki ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel kì kelli jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn møg-ɑ ɑ́løg bɑng Abner. 
2Samuel2:32 Kɑ Asɑiil kwɑny yi jø Debïd, kɑ gø koony gen buti röri wïye kì Betleem. Codhe, kɑ Yöɑb geki jøge lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r ge ócyɑ̈dhø. Ge ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Kibrön cɑ̈ng ceg-ɑ tuulø." 
2Samuel3:1 Kɑ liny ómɑ̈gø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì kɑɑm Debïd kí jøge kì tuung, geki gøl Cɑul kí tyëng-ɑ köme kì tung-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ jø Debïd ókedhø ge ótëngø, de jøg-ɑ kömi gøl Cɑul kedh ge ónyönhø." 
2Samuel3:2 Debïd ɑ́nyöddi yi mɑ̈nne ki wɑ̈dd kì Kibrön. Nyel-ɑ kɑyø bɑ Amnön, meye bɑ Akinoɑm nyɑɑr Yidhriil." 
2Samuel3:3 Ryeew wɑ̈dde bɑ Kileɑb, meye bɑ Abigɑil cï Nɑbɑl jɑl Kɑrmel, nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́lɑg yi Debïd. Dɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ̈dde bɑ Abcɑlöm, meye bɑ Mɑɑkɑ̀ nyɑɑr Tɑlmɑy, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gecur." 
2Samuel3:4 Ngween gen bɑ Adöniyɑ̀, meye bɑ Agith. Bïïj gen bɑ Cepɑtiyɑ̀, meye bɑ Abitɑl." 
2Samuel3:5 Bïkyeel gen bɑ Ithreɑm, meye bɑ Eglɑ̀, cï Debïd. Wɑ̈ddɑni bënn ɑ́nywøl e Debïd ying-ɑ Kibrön." 
2Samuel3:6 Kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ́ nudd gøl Cɑul ónyïɑ̈ggø geki Debïd, Abner ree ɑ́løge pënyi liny gøl Cɑul." 
2Samuel3:7 Cɑul ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ dhɑjø mɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi en, me cwøl ɑ́ Ridhpɑ̀ nyɑɑr Aiyɑ̀. Kɑ Abner köbbi yi Icböceth kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ gwøøg cï wïyɑ dhɑjø?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Kɑ Abner pyëwe órënyø ki mendwøng yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Icböceth, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ceg bëëdø yɑ ying-ɑ kömi Cɑul geki gøle kí mɑ̈dhhe! Kɑ yï ocögø yï pɑ cïbɑ cingi Debïd. Yɑ pɑth ki ngeti ɑmolpiny me göggi kömi Yeudiyɑ̀! De ɑnɑn yöd yï ceg-ɑ kwøb i dɑ bɑ̈jjø me gwøøg yɑn kipe ngɑndhɑjø men!" 
2Samuel3:9 Debïd ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i lɑwø ókɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì cingi Cɑul, o bong ngɑn jɑ̈ggi kì gøle këti, kɑ Debïd gwøge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, cɑg kì tuung pödhø gïti tung-ɑ kyeelø. Wiy yɑ nɑ̈g yi Jwøk keløg møgɑni pɑ wëggɑ pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen!”" 
2Samuel3:10  
2Samuel3:11 Kɑ Icböceth obwøgø yi Abner ki mendwøng, kɑ ocögø e okudø, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́kwøbe." 
2Samuel3:12 Codhe, kɑ Abner öd-ɑ yï Debïd, e Debïd ying-ɑ Kibrön, ki ji møg pyëjii kinni, “Á men ɑ ójɑɑg piny? Lwööb wɑ! Yï ókøny yi yɑn ki rebi Isrɑil bëne.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Kɑ Debïd ólöggø kinni, “Døj! Wɑ ólwöbø, de bɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn kì yïí. Muuj yɑn Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul keny-ɑ óbëën, ke pɑ muujií yɑn, nyingee pɑ lidh yi wɑ!”" 
2Samuel3:14 Codhe, kɑ Debïd öd-ɑ yï Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul ki ji, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Döggí yɑn Mikɑl cyëgɑ. Árum ki mëggi yɑn, kɑ kɑ̈nye muujɑ ɑ́ dëlli wɑ̈thi jɑmmi jø Pelistiyɑ̀ gɑ miyø.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Codhe, ɑöd Icböceth ki jøg mø dwɑɑy Mikɑl yï Pɑltiel wɑ̈d Lɑic." 
2Samuel3:16 Kɑ jɑlgøl Mikɑl løg-ɑ bɑng cyëge e óywöngø, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑl Bɑkurïm. Codhe, ɑköbbii yi Abner kinni, “Døøg pɑc!” Adøøge pɑc." 
2Samuel3:17 Alwööb Abner geki jøgdøngø. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Cøn wu ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi Debïd ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun." 
2Samuel3:18 Wu yïd-ɑ ngø ɑnɑn! Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Debïd ɑ́köbbe kinni, ‘Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ bene kej cingɑ, en ɑ ree óyielɑ jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil kì cingi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, geki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Kɑ Abner kiree kedh-ɑ be kwøb ki gøl Ben Yɑmïn. Codhe, ɑkedhe Kibrön be köbbi Debïd ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi Isrɑil geki gøl Ben Yɑmïn bëne." 
2Samuel3:20 Kɑ Abner wɑ̈dh-ɑ Kibrön e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Kɑ Abner geki jøge ryej yi Debïd. 
2Samuel3:21 Codhe, ɑköbbi Debïd yi Abner kinni, “Wiy yɑ kedhɑ ɑnɑn ceth, o Isrɑil cungɑ wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh, o yï røny yi gen yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen, o yï ójyɑ̈ɑ̈g ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi pyëwí.” Awiy Abner kedhe yi Debïd ki mër." 
2Samuel3:22 Bøli kenyɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́dwöög Yöɑb geki jø Debïd kì be mɑ̈nyø, ge ɑ́bï ge ókɑ̈ddø ki jɑmmì mø gïïr cɑrø. De Abner nuti pïïd gen buti Debïd kì Kibrön, mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki ör yöö yi Debïd ki mër." 
2Samuel3:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Yöɑb geki jøliny bënn, ɑköbbii kinni, i Abner wɑ̈d Ner bëën yï rɑ̈dh, i de ówiyø yi rɑ̈dh kɑ ókedhø ki mër." 
2Samuel3:24 Kɑ Yöɑb kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á ngø ɑ gwøg yi yïn kinni! Abner ɑ́bï yïí. Á kipe ngø ɑ wëggií kedhø?" 
2Samuel3:25 Abner wɑ̈d Ner ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, ɑ́bï-ɑ be wënyi yïn kipe kinni o bëëdí lidh yi en geki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn bënn.”" 
2Samuel3:26 Adhwödh Yöɑb kì buti Debïd, kɑ öd-ɑ bɑng Abner ki ji. Kɑ gø dwöög gen kì buti yiith Sirɑ̀ e Debïd kwïj wøw." 
2Samuel3:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Abner Kibrön, ɑcwøølii wɑ̈ye yi Yöɑb kì dhø döri kɑɑl, e dhɑ̈y ce dɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn møg köbbe gøn, ɑcwøbe gøn kì yije kɑ othøø, gø nɑ̈ɑ̈ge’ kej cöngi ómen Asɑiil." 
2Samuel3:28 Kì cyɑ̈n cyee keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Debïd ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑn kí pödhɑ bëne, yï wøn bɑ̈r ki thøwi Abner. Møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel3:29 Yöɑb geki gøle ɑ cinggi gen di cöngɑni. Gøle ócög yije dɑ ngɑn jɑmme lwöy, kí ngɑn ree di wɑɑny kì yethi rïjj bënn. Gøle ódi ngɑn kwömi ki kïïl ceth. Kwï tyëng gøle ónɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny. Pɑ jɑd ki ngɑn rɑngi yi kɑ̈j kì gøle kì yethi rïjj bënn.”" 
2Samuel3:30 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g Abner yi Yöɑb geki Abicɑy ómen, gø nɑ̈ɑ̈g ge’ kej ómï gen Asɑiil, nyel-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Abner kì yij liny kì Gibeon." 
2Samuel3:31 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yöɑb geki ji bënn yi Debïd kinni, “Pyëëd wun ógudhi wun, kɑ ri wun lunyi wun ki ocwɑ̈llì, kɑ Abner ywøg wun.” Debïd kiree ɑ́løg bɑng dhɑnhø keny-ɑ ɑ́kïdhii be konyø." 
2Samuel3:32 Abner ɑ́kony kì Kibrön, kɑ Debïd geki ji bënn óywöngø kì wïj röri Abner." 
2Samuel3:33 Kɑ Abner ywøg yi rɑ̈dh ki wör kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ thøw Abner ki thøwi dhëg?" 
2Samuel3:34 Cingge nuti twöjø, o tyelle bong digïddì! Áthøw ki thøwi ngɑn nɑ̈g yi ɑ́muddi ji!” Kɑ ji cig-ɑ døøgø ki ywøg." 
2Samuel3:35 Kɑ ji tyëg-ɑ cɑ̈ng ge kwɑjj-ɑ Debïd kinni cyɑ̈me, de Debïd ɑ́köngi kinni, “Nɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑn yi Jwøk keløg yɑ ódi cɑm ki gïncɑm, wɑlɑ̀ gïjø megø e cɑ̈ng nuti kedhi piny!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑ́lidh yi ji bënn, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi rɑ̈dh yïëy yi gen. Bɑ dyër, pëthi ji nyi løg-ɑ mø med ki gïn-ɑ nyi gwøg yi rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel3:37 Áyod yi jø Debïd geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn kinni Debïd bong cinge kì ri nɑ̈gi Abner. 
2Samuel3:38 Rɑ̈dh jøge ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Nuti yood wun kinni bɑ dhɑnhø me dwøng ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh dicyɑ̈ngtïn kì Isrɑil?" 
2Samuel3:39 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøk èn, pyëwɑ ɑ́nyönhi dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Wɑ̈ddi Dheruyɑ̀ ceg-ɑ teg kibølɑ? Ámuddi ji møgɑni ócɑy yi Jwøk kipe rɑ̈ji gen!”" 
2Samuel4:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul kinni i Abner thøø kì Kibrön, dële ɑ́ceg okïr, kɑ Isrɑil obwøgø bëne." 
2Samuel4:2 Kɑ jøg ɑ́ryew mɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ pëjji liny Cɑul kedh-ɑ yï Icböceth. Ákyel cwøl ɑ́ Bɑnɑ̀, o jɑl-ɑ kyeelø cwøl ɑ́ Rekɑb. Ge bɑ wɑ̈ddi Rimön jɑl Beeröth, jɑlɑni bɑ wɑ̈d gøl Ben Yɑmïn. O Beeröth bɑ pɑɑ myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
2Samuel4:3 Tyëng Beeröth ɑ́ceg-ɑ dɑ̈gi Gitɑim, ge nudd ge bëëd ɑ kunɑni gɑ wëdhh gïti ɑnɑn." 
2Samuel4:4 Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑul yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Mepiböceth. Ábëëd runne bɑ ɑ́bïj keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wöödø kì Yidhriil kinni i Cɑul thøø geki Yönɑthɑn. Akwɑɑny Mepiböceth yi nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́mïdhii, kɑ reng-ɑ pɑ̈l gø kɑ̈lle’ kɑ̈llø. De ɑ́bodh kì yï nyɑnɑni kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, bene ɑ bëëd tyelle ryeet ngøølø ɑnɑn." 
2Samuel4:5 Kɑ Rekɑb geki Bɑnɑ̀, wɑ̈ddi Rimön jɑl Beeröth kedh-ɑ gøl Icböceth e ceg-ɑ nenø kì dicɑ̈ng." 
2Samuel4:6 Ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ kor kɑl nenø yi kɑ ɑ́pïde yi yieg ki gemè, kɑ Rekɑb kedh-ɑ ød geki Bɑnɑ̀, ge ce kedh-ɑ be dwɑ̈ddø ki gemè," 
2Samuel4:7 kɑ ri gen liib gen ød, ɑcwøb ge gøn kì yije kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen, kɑ wïje ngøl gen, kɑ gø kwɑny gen. Codhe, ɑboodh gen ri gen wɑ̈g, kɑ ge ókedhø. Kɑ ge lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r ge ócyɑ̈dhø ge bødh-ɑ yij Töör Urdun." 
2Samuel4:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Kibrön, kɑ wïj Icböceth mëggi gen Debïd, ge okööbø kinni, “Wïj Icböceth wɑ̈d Cɑul ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø èn. Ádwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn! Dicyɑ̈ngtïn Cɑul geki gøle ɑ́kölli yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gööj gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi gen.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Aløøg kwøbbi Rekɑb geki Bɑnɑ̀ yi Debïd kinni, “Ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ Nëënø! En ɑ ɑ́yiel yɑn ki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́ying kömɑ." 
2Samuel4:10 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́muuj yɑn wööni thøwi Cɑul e rømm-ɑ kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wöödø me døøj yïɑ, nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑn kì Dhiglɑg! Bene köögi men-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ en kipe wöödø men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le." 
2Samuel4:11 Anɑn wu bɑ tyëngrijjø ni møg, wu ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ dhɑnhø me tir kì øde, e buud-ɑ yij pyëne, wu nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø!”" 
2Samuel4:12 Codhe, kɑ Debïd jøge köbbe kinni nɑ̈g gen Rekɑb geki Bɑnɑ̀. Kɑ Rekɑb geki Bɑnɑ̀ cinggi gen geki tyelli gen ngul wɑ̈g, kɑ ge ngɑɑb mɑl kì kömi luy kì Kibrön. Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny wïj Icböceth kɑ koony buti röri Abner kì Kibrön." 
2Samuel5:1 Kɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil bënn bï-ɑ yï Debïd kì Kibrön, ɑköbbii yi gen kinni, “Wɑ bɑ remø ɑ́kyel." 
2Samuel5:2 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëd Cɑul e onëënø, yïn ɑ ɑ́pyejji liny Isrɑil. O yï ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Bene yïn ɑ ókwɑy jiɑ, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil. Yï óbëëdø yï bɑ jɑngi gen.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Kɑ wɑ̈thi jøgdøngi Isrɑil bï-ɑ yï Debïd kì Kibrön. Kɑ kwøb nywɑg gen kí Debïd kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Debïd røny yi gen ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. 
2Samuel5:4 Debïd runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈gge. Ájyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. 
2Samuel5:5 Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́jɑɑg yi en ki runn ɑ́bïryew kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel e ying-ɑ Kibrön. Kɑ Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ jɑɑge bënn ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g e ying-ɑ Yerusɑlem. 
2Samuel5:6 Rɑ̈dh geki linye ɑ́kedhi Yerusɑlem kɑɑl tyëng Yebus, ɑ løg tyëngpiny." 
2Samuel5:7 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi tyëng kɑɑlɑni kinni, “Yï pɑ wɑ̈nhi kɑɑl wøn, kɑɑl dör-ɑ teg. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ cörr geki ngöll yï ócuggø jogø yi gen.” Ge ɑ́rum i Debïd pɑ cuggi kedhi kɑɑl gen. De kɑɑl Dhɑyøn ɑ́lwɑ̈ng ki mɑgø yi Debïd, ngö e bɑ ɑwen ki dör mø teg, kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ kɑɑl Debïd." 
2Samuel5:8 Debïd jøge ɑ́ceg kɑ köbbø yi en kì cyɑ̈ngɑni kinni, “Dɑ ngɑn mɑɑn tyëng Yebus ni kɑ̀ mɑɑnɑ gen? O dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi gen? Keløg ɑ́ kinøw, kɑ̈llu wɑɑng wøøl pï, kɑ wu pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi cörr-ɑ bɑ ngöll.” (Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi kømii kinni, “Cörr geki ngöll pɑ cuggi kedhi ød Wë.”)" 
2Samuel5:9 Codhe, kɑ Debïd pëgg-ɑ kɑɑl dör-ɑ teg menɑni, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ kɑɑl Debïd. Bɑdhhi kɑɑlɑni ɑ́gëddi yi Debïd ki ud mø ngenyø, cɑg kì wïj óthør e kön-ɑ yij." 
2Samuel5:10 Kɑ Debïd ceg-ɑ pëddø tëngø, mɑ́ e ɑ́køny yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel5:11 Kirɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Suur ɑ́ödi yï Debïd ki ji kyeel kí yenh sɑndɑl, kí bödhhi pɑ̈mmì geki bödhhi tweg ki kïttì, kɑ Debïd gëddi yi gen ki ød." 
2Samuel5:12 Ayodii yi Debïd kinni ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ lɑ̈ge gwøg e dwøng, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie, tyëng Isrɑil mɑɑr yi en." 
2Samuel5:13 Debïd ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki mɑ̈nn, kɑ ónyömø ki mɑ̈nn keny-ɑ ɑ́rume dɑ̈g kì Kibrön, kɑ pëgg-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Kɑ nyöddi yi mɑ̈nne ki wɑ̈dd geki womɑ̈nn mø gïïr." 
2Samuel5:14 Møg bɑ wɑ̈ddi Debïd yɑɑg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì Yerusɑlem. Cɑmuɑ̀, kí Cöbɑb, kí Nɑthɑn, kí Sølømøn." 
2Samuel5:15 Kí Ibɑɑr, kí Elicuɑ̀, kí Nepeg, kí Yɑpiyɑ̀." 
2Samuel5:16 Kí Elicɑmɑ̀, kí Eliɑdɑ̀, kí Elipelet." 
2Samuel5:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni i Debïd órønyø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn kedh-ɑ be mɑgii. De keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbɑni yi Debïd, ɑkedhe kɑɑl dörø." 
2Samuel5:18 Abëën tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ ge gudd-ɑ Töör Repɑim. 
2Samuel5:19 Apyëëj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Debïd kinni, “Pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kömi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀? Ge ócïb yi yïn cingɑ?” Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh! Ge ócïbɑ cingí ceth.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Akedhi Debïd Bɑɑl Perɑdhïm, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ tyɑme kì kunɑni. Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́möddi kömi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì bølɑ ni kenyi möddi bɑɑyø.” Acɑɑg kenyɑni yi Debïd ɑ́ Bɑɑl Perɑdhïm, (Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́möddi)." 
2Samuel5:21 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ngïjji jwöggi gen ɑ́wiy gen Bɑɑl Perɑdhïm, kɑ ge kwɑny yi Debïd geki jøge." 
2Samuel5:22 Kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ cig-ɑ dwöögø këti, ɑguddi gen Töör Repɑim." 
2Samuel5:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Debïd, ɑlöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko turri kömi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kì bøli gen. Kɑ̈l ngɑ̈thi gen, kɑ yï töngí yï gen kì bøli yenh bɑlsɑm." 
2Samuel5:24 Keny-ɑ ólïngí ywøøg tyel kì wɑ̈thi yenh bɑlsɑm, kɑ yï jwɑn göjjø! Bɑ yɑn, ɑ møøl bølí be tyɑmi liny tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀.”" 
2Samuel5:25 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøg yi Debïd ceth. Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́tyɑme, kɑ gï cyedde kì Gebɑ̀ gïti Gedher." 
2Samuel6:1 Kɑ Debïd jöddi Isrɑil døøge ki cøngø, kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g" 
2Samuel6:2 Kɑ Debïd geki jøge bënn kedh-ɑ Bɑɑlɑ̀ kì Yeudiyɑ̀ be dwɑɑyi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk. Sɑndungɑni cwøl ɑ́ Nying, Nyingi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kwömø kì kɑɑm kerobb." 
2Samuel6:3 Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk kwɑny yi gen, kɑ gø cïb gen yij yɑ̈y me nyɑ̈n. Kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì gøl Abinɑdɑb kì wïj kït. Udhɑ̀ kí Akiyö, wɑ̈ddi Abinɑdɑb ɑ kwølli yɑ̈y-ɑ nyɑ̈n," 
2Samuel6:4 eni yɑ̈y-ɑ kɑ̈lli Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk. Akiyö ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bøli yɑ̈y. 
2Samuel6:5 O Debïd geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn ceg-ɑ yëggø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge opödø ki bullì, kɑ̈ngì okodhø, thøm othomø." 
2Samuel6:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen rɑri pwödhi Nɑkön, kɑ Udhɑ̀ cinge rïïje, ɑmɑge Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk, mɑ́ wɑ̈dhh-ɑ pyejji yɑ̈y ɑ́ceg-ɑ cyerø." 
2Samuel6:7 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe órënyø ki Udhɑ̀, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge kì kenyɑni ceth, kì buti Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk." 
2Samuel6:8 Debïd ɑ́bëëd yije ledh kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g Udhɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kenyɑni cwølli ɑnɑn ɑ́ Cɑ́yi Udhɑ̀. 
2Samuel6:9 Debïd ɑ́bwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ówɑ̈nhi yïɑ kidï ɑnɑn?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Codhe, kɑ Debïd ocögø e Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk pɑ kïdhe Yerusɑlem. Kɑ gø yöd gø kïdhe’ gøl Obed Edöm jɑl Gɑth." 
2Samuel6:11 Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j obëëdø kì gøl Obed Edöm jɑl Gɑth ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ Obed Edöm gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki gøle bëne. 
2Samuel6:12 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi teedø kinni, “Obed Edöm ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki gøle bëne kí jɑmme bënn, kipe kɑ̀ ying Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk gøle.” Codhe, ɑkedh Debïd, kɑ gø kɑ̈ɑ̈le Yerusɑlem ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
2Samuel6:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ddi jøg-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Cigg yöö ki yethi tyel ɑ́bïkyel, kɑ Debïd ongɑ̈dø ki wɑdh kí røjø gɑ gëdhhì." 
2Samuel6:14 Codhe, kɑ Debïd óyëggø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menteg. Debïd ɑ́rug-ɑ ógudhi kwër kì bøli kenyɑni." 
2Samuel6:15 Debïd geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́kɑ̈lli yi gen ge óryeerø, kɑ̈ngì okodhø, o thøm othomø." 
2Samuel6:16 Ri wɑ̈nhi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl Debïd ceth, kɑ Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul ómëddø kì ɑwɑj. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe Debïd e óyëggø, kɑ gø byenye ki pyëwe." 
2Samuel6:17 Kɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cïb keje kì yij Kemɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́gurrii yi Debïd. Kɑ Debïd ongɑ̈dø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki keni mër kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
2Samuel6:18 Kɑ Debïd órumø ki gwøgi gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki keni mër, ɑkwënge ji ki nyingi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel6:19 Apɑ̈nge gïncɑm kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil bënn, jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kɑ ngɑɑn nyi nënge, ki ɑ́tungi rïngø, kí ópun, kí ópuun nywøli yenh. Codhe, kɑ ji kedh-ɑ kɑ̈lli gen." 
2Samuel6:20 Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ be kwëngi gøle, kɑ Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul bï-ɑ wɑ̈g yïe, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ówør dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng! Anyodhe ree kì bøli bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn, ni dhëng-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi ógudhe ki luny wɑ̈g kì bøli ji, e wïje pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y.”" 
2Samuel6:21 Aköbbi Mikɑl yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yëggi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́myeg yɑn, o yɑ jɑɑg-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, de wïyí ɑ́bɑnye geki gøle bëne. Yɑ ceg-ɑ yëggø ceth kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel6:22 Yɑ ócuggø cögø yɑ pɑ wør, wɑlɑ̀ ji ócuggø rumø i yɑ bɑ dhëg, de yɑ ówør yi bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn ɑnɑn!”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul nuti nywølø ki nyir gïti kɑ ɑ́thøwe. 
2Samuel7:1 Kɑ Debïd pëgg-ɑ piny kì gøle kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́thödhii ki mër yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcöge e pɑ jud yi jurr-ɑ bɑdhhi pödhe." 
2Samuel7:2 Codhe, kɑ Nɑthɑn jɑltöng köbbi yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni, “Lidh, yɑ bëëd ɑ ød me bɑ ɑger ki pɑ̈mmi yɑdh sɑndɑl, de Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bëëd ɑ yij kemɑ̀!”" 
2Samuel7:3 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Nɑthɑn kinni, “Gwøg gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi pyëwí bënn, mɑ́ yï bɑ ɑkøny yi Jwøk.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Cyɑ̈ngɑni kì wɑ̈r, ɑköbbi Nɑthɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
2Samuel7:5 “Kedh köbbí bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd kinni, møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: ‘Pɑth ki yïn ɑ ógëddi yɑn ki ød me yije bëëdɑ." 
2Samuel7:6 Kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp gïti ɑnɑn, yɑ nuti bëëdø kì ød. Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì kɑɑmɑni ɑ́ kemɑ̀ ɑ bɑ ødɑ." 
2Samuel7:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhɑ ki tyëng Isrɑil, bong jɑgø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jɑggi gen mɑ ɑ́köbbɑ kinni ede ɑ bɑnye yɑn ki gëddø ki ød yɑdh sɑndɑl.’" 
2Samuel7:8 “Köbbí bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd kinni, møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek, ‘Yï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi yɑn kì bɑng dyëg, o yï göög ki jɑngi jiɑ tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Samuel7:9 Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ yïn kì keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi yïn, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn tyɑ̈mmɑ yïn. Yï ɑ́tïngɑ mɑl kɑ perí ótëngø ni tyëng-ɑ per gen teeg kì kömi piny." 
2Samuel7:10 Thyew tyëng Isrɑil jiɑ ɑ́yɑ̈bbɑ ki kej gen, kɑ ge cïbɑ piny, o ge bëëd gen kì yethi myërri gen. Bong ngɑn nywɑl gen këti. Ge pɑ jud yi tyëngrijjø këti ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen cøn," 
2Samuel7:11 kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈bbɑ ki jɑgg mø jɑɑg Isrɑil jiɑ. Yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn thyew kinni kwɑrrí ógwøg yi yɑn gɑ rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil kì bɑngí. 
2Samuel7:12 Keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈nggí, kɑ yï kedh-ɑ bɑng kweyyí, ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈ddí ógwøg yi yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ pödhe tyenyɑ." 
2Samuel7:13 Yɑ ógëdd-ɑ yi en ki ød, o lɑwe ómïdhi yi yɑn gïti ɑtheer." 
2Samuel7:14 Yɑ óbëëdø yɑ bɑ wïye, o óbëëd e bɑ wɑ̈dɑ. Keny-ɑ órønge, ópwödɑ ni dhɑnhø kenyi pwöde wɑ̈de." 
2Samuel7:15 Yɑ ɑ́wïyi ki mɑɑri Cɑul jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nyiig yi yɑn kì bølí, de yɑ pɑ wïyi ki mɑɑri wɑ̈dí." 
2Samuel7:16 Gølí geki lɑwí ócungi kì bølɑ ceth. Kwømí óbëëd e nud gïti ɑtheer.’ ” 
2Samuel7:17 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk bënn, köbbi Debïd yi Nɑthɑn." 
2Samuel7:18 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd kedh-ɑ yij Kemi Kwër, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ gïn? Gølɑ bɑ gïn? Yɑde ɑ kïdhí yɑn keny ni men?" 
2Samuel7:19 De menɑni bong pere kì yïí, yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yï ɑ́kööb kì ri gøl bɑ̈ngí ki kër-ɑ óbëëde, menɑni bɑ bëëdi dhɑnhø ceth." 
2Samuel7:20 Á ngø ɑ köbbɑ yïn ɑnɑn këti yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e bëëdɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidøøj?" 
2Samuel7:21 Kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn, ni kɑ ɑ́tyerii yi pyëwí, ɑ bɑnge ɑ́gwøøg gïn-ɑ dwøng ni men, ɑ nyudhí møgɑni bɑ̈ngí." 
2Samuel7:22 Yï Dwøng yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Bong jwøg me pɑ̈r ki yïn. Bong jwøg megø den-ɑ́ yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk. 
2Samuel7:23 Bong pödhø me ni Isrɑil kì kömi piny, gen ɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́yïëël yi yïn wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, kipe kinni o ge gwøøg gɑ jií, kɑ yï ogöögø ki gïgdøngø kiper gen." 
2Samuel7:24 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́myeg yi yïn o ge bëëd gen gɑ jií gïti ɑtheer, o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel7:25 “Anɑn yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mïdhí møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn kinni ge ógwøg yi yïn kiperɑ wøki gølɑ gïti ɑtheer. Gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn." 
2Samuel7:26 O yï ówør, o ji nyi kööb gen kinni, ‘Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ Jwøk kì Isrɑil!’ O gøl bɑ̈ngí Debïd cunge kì bølí." 
2Samuel7:27 Mɑ́ bene yïn Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈ddi yïthhi bɑ̈ngí ki kwøb kinni, ‘Gølí ógwøg yi yɑn ɑ́ kɑl me dwøng.’ Bene ɑ bɑnge cwed bɑ̈ngí pyëwe kɑ yï kwɑjje." 
2Samuel7:28 “Anɑn yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ Jwøk, o kwøbbí bɑ dyër. O møg døj møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn, ge ógöggí yɑn ceth." 
2Samuel7:29 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn gyëdh gølɑ. Wiy cöge e ying-ɑ bølí ceth. Yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, møgɑk bɑ møgí. Wiy gyëdhhí cöög gen gølɑ gïti ɑtheer.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ Debïd ónyïɑ̈ggø ki Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ gï tyɑme, ɑdwööge gïn thɑ́ cigge, kɑ pinyɑni kwɑnye kì yï tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀." 
2Samuel8:2 Tyëng Moɑb ɑ́tyɑm yi Debïd thyew. Gï ɑ́cïre buddø kì piny, kɑ gï røme ki thøl. Yethi thøll ɑ́ryew nyi nɑ̈g, o yij thøl ɑ́kyel nyi wiy. Codhe, kɑ tyëng Moɑb ogöögø ki bɑ̈nggi Debïd, ge nyi ceg-ɑ col ki gwɑ̈j." 
2Samuel8:3 Adɑdedher wɑ̈d Reköb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dhöbɑ̀, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe myërri kömi Nɑm Porɑt be dwöögi gen thɑ́ cigge, ɑnyïɑ̈ggi Debïd ki en, kɑ tyɑm yi Debïd." 
2Samuel8:4 Amɑɑg jøkyënye gɑ ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́bïryew yi Debïd, kí jøliny tyel gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Akebbi rɑ̈rri tyelli kyënyì yi Debïd, kɑ wiy-ɑ kyënyì miyø keti gen." 
2Samuel8:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën tyëng Arɑm møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Dimɑceg, be kønyi Rɑ̈dh Adɑdedher ki liny, kɑ Debïd ónɑ̈ggø kì kelli gen ki ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew." 
2Samuel8:6 Kɑ Debïd cïb-ɑ myërri Dimɑceg ki jøge. Codhe, ɑgöög tyëng Dimɑceg ki bɑ̈ngge, kɑ ge nyii muujø ki gwɑ̈j. Debïd ɑ́thödhi ki tegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; nyi ceg-ɑ tyɑ̈mø liny kì keny-ɑ kedhe." 
2Samuel8:7 Köddi dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø pëjji liny Adɑdedher ɑ́kwɑny yi Debïd, kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel8:8 Debïd ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki jɑmmì mø gïïr møg-ɑ óthɑ̈dhø ki dilɑl kì Betɑ̀ kí Beröthɑy, gen ɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg yi Adɑdedher." 
2Samuel8:9 Kɑ Töì rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amɑth olïngø kinni i liny Adɑdedher ótyɑmø yi Debïd. 
2Samuel8:10 Codhe ɑöre wɑ̈de Yörɑm yï Debïd, be köbbi Debïd kinni pyëwe med kɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm Adɑdedher. Mɑ́ Adɑdedher ɑ́bëëd ge mɑ̈n ki Töì. Yörɑm ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki jɑmmì møg-ɑ óthɑ̈dhø gɑ dhɑb, møøgø bɑ ɑ́tegø, møøgø bɑ dilɑl." 
2Samuel8:11 Kɑ jɑmmɑni thyey yi Debïd gɑ mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́thyeye dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø men-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi en kì yï jurr-ɑ kyeelø," 
2Samuel8:12 ɑ́kɑ̈ni kì Edöm, kí Moɑb, kí Amön, kí Pelistiyɑ̀, kí Amɑlek. Kí møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg kì yï Adɑdedher wɑ̈d Reköb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dhöbɑ̀." 
2Samuel8:13 Kɑ Debïd nyinge ti-ɑ kedhi mɑl kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́dwööge kì be pwöödi tyëng Edöm piny, gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì Töör Omelø." 
2Samuel8:14 Kɑ Debïd cïb-ɑ myërri Edöm ki jøge, ɑgöög tyëng Edöm ki bɑ̈ngge, kɑ ge nyii muujø ki gwɑ̈j. Debïd ɑ́thödhi ki tegø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi ceg-ɑ tyɑ̈mø liny kì keny-ɑ kedhe." 
2Samuel8:15 Kɑ Isrɑil bëne jɑɑg yi Debïd kidøøj, e mïdh-ɑ dyër geki lögg-ɑ døj kì yij pödhe bëne." 
2Samuel8:16 Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pënyi liny, o Yöcɑpɑt wɑ̈d Akilud ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ 'mïdhi wɑ̈j." 
2Samuel8:17 Dhɑdök wɑ̈d Akitub geki Akimelek wɑ̈d Abiyɑthɑr ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ókwër. O Serɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ sikriter. 
2Samuel8:18 Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg jøg-ɑ kor Debïd, o wɑ̈ddi Debïd ɑ́bëëd gɑ ókwër." 
2Samuel9:1 Kɑ Debïd ópëjjø cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kinni, “Dɑ dhɑnhø me döngø kì gøl Cɑul? Ke di gøn, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ göggii ki gïndøj kipe Yönɑthɑn.”" 
2Samuel9:2 Ádɑ jɑl mɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ bɑ̈ng Cɑul me cwøl ɑ́ Dhiibɑ̀. Kɑ Dhiibɑ̀ cölli Debïd. Apyëjii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bene yïn Dhiibɑ̀?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑn wuö.”" 
2Samuel9:3 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Dɑ dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́döng kì gøl Cɑul, me cuggi göggø yi yɑn ki gïndøj kipe Yönɑthɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́köngɑ kì bøli Jwøk?” Kɑ Dhiibɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Dɑ ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Yönɑthɑn. Tyelle ryeet ngøølø.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ópëjjø kinni, “Ying-ɑ keny?” Alöggi Dhiibɑ̀ kinni, “Nud kì gøl Mɑkir wɑ̈d Amiel kì Lödebɑr.”" 
2Samuel9:5 Aöd Debïd ki bɑ̈ngg, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lii kì gøl Mɑkir wɑ̈d Amiel kì Lödebɑr." 
2Samuel9:6 Kɑ Mepiböceth wɑ̈d Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑul kedh-ɑ yï Debïd, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ gø mɑle. Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Mepiböceth!” Alögge kinni, “Yɑn wuö.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Aköbbii yi Debïd kinni, “Yï ko böggi. Yï ógöggi yi yɑn ki gïndøj, kiper Yönɑthɑn wïyí. Piny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mi kweyí Cɑul döggɑ’ yïn, o yï ócög yï cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ tɑwɑ.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Kɑ rɑ̈dh mɑl yi Mepiböceth, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ göggí yɑn ki gïndøj yɑ pɑ̈r ki gwöng thøø ni men?”" 
2Samuel9:9 Kɑ Dhiibɑ̀ bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi gøl Cɑul cwøl yi rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø Cɑul geki jɑmmi gøle bëne, mëggɑ’ kwɑɑr wöw." 
2Samuel9:10 Purrí pwödhe en, wuki wɑ̈ddí kí bɑ̈nggí. Kɑ byel nyi muuju en, o gøl kwɑɑr wöw yïdde ki gïncɑm. De Mepiböceth cög e cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ tɑwɑ.” Dhiibɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj, kí bɑ̈ngg pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
2Samuel9:11 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Dhiibɑ̀ kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi rɑ̈dh ógwøg yi bɑ̈nge ceth.” Kɑ Mepiböceth ocögø e cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ tɑɑw rɑ̈dh ni wɑ̈d rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel9:12 Mepiböceth ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ wɑ̈de me thiinh, me cwøl ɑ́ Miikɑ̀. Gøl Dhiibɑ̀ bëne ɑ́göög ki bɑ̈nggi Mepiböceth." 
2Samuel9:13 Kɑ Mepiböceth pëgg-ɑ Yerusɑlem, mɑ́ e ɑ́cög e cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ tɑɑw rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel10:1 Kɑ Nɑkɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön othøø, ɑkwɑɑny lɑne yi Anun wɑ̈de." 
2Samuel10:2 Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ göggi Anun wɑ̈d Nɑkɑc ki gïndøj ni gïndøj men-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi wïye.” Codhe, ɑöd Debïd ki ji møg këëmii ki thøwi wïye. Kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Debïd wɑ̈dh-ɑ piny Amön." 
2Samuel10:3 De jøgdøngi Amön wïi gen Anun ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, “Bɑ per thøwi wïyí ɑ teg kì yï Debïd, ɑöne ki ji møg këëm yïn? Pɑth! Ge ɑ́ör-ɑ be lidhi kɑɑl yi Debïd, o gø tid gen, o ge óbï gen be mɑgii ki liny.”" 
2Samuel10:4 Codhe, kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Debïd mɑg yi Anun. Kɑ budi tïggi gen lyele, kɑ ógudhi gen ngøl ge ruud-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kömi rwödhhi gen. Codhe, kɑ gï öre yöö." 
2Samuel10:5 Aöd Debïd ki ji mø pɑɑr gen, mɑ́ ge cyɑ̈dhi ge yɑ̈rø ki menrɑj. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd okööbø kinni, “Bëëd wun kì Yerikö gïti keny-ɑ ótwïy yëyyi tïggi wun këti. Codhe, kɑ wu dwöög wun.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Kɑ yod yi tyëng Amön kinni Debïd ɑ́mɑ̈ni ki gen. Aödi gen yï tyëng Arɑm, kɑ ge okïrø ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kì Betreköb geki Dhöbɑ̀. Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑɑkɑ̀ obëënø ki ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel, kɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew obëënø kì Töb." 
2Samuel10:7 Alïng Debïd kɑ Yöɑb öre geki jøliny bënn. 
2Samuel10:8 Kɑ jøgi Amön bï-ɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ liny gen ócungø kì dhø pöör, de jøgi Arɑm, geki jø Dhöbɑ̀, kí jø Reköb, kí jø Töb, kí jø Mɑɑkɑ̀ ri gen ɑ́thyeer gen wɑ̈yi gen kì dhø pɑ̈l." 
2Samuel10:9 Kɑ lidh yi Yöɑb kinni bɑ ɑtyeg yi liny, møøgø ying-ɑ bøle, møøgø ying-ɑ ngɑ̈je. Codhe, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki jøg-ɑ teg kì Isrɑil, o ge kedhi gen be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Arɑm." 
2Samuel10:10 Kɑ linyɑni bëne mëgge Abicɑy ómen, o gï pyejje. Codhe, ɑöre gïn be nyïɑ̈ggø ki tyëng Amön." 
2Samuel10:11 Kɑ Abicɑy köbbi yi Yöɑb kinni, “Otëngi Arɑm kibølɑ, kɑ yï bï be kønyi yɑn. O keløg ɑ́ Amön ɑ tëngi kibølí, yɑ óbï be kønyi yïn." 
2Samuel10:12 Cwed pyëwí, kɑ wɑ nyïɑ̈ggi wɑ kipe jiee geki myërri Jwøgee. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógwøg gïn-ɑ nenni yi en e døøj.”" 
2Samuel10:13 Codhe, kɑ Yöɑb geki yɑye pödh-ɑ yï tyëng Arɑm, kɑ tyëng Arɑm órengø." 
2Samuel10:14 Kɑ lidh yi Amön kinni Arɑm ɑ́rengi, codhe ɑlunyi gen ki rengø kì bøli Abicɑy, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ kɑɑl gen. Kɑ Yöɑb ódwöögø kì kun-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge ki tyëng Amön, kɑ bï-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel10:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi tyëng Arɑm kinni ge ɑ́tyɑm yi Debïd, kɑ ri gen cøng gen gɑ yɑy me dwøng." 
2Samuel10:16 Adɑdedher ɑ́öd, kɑ tyëng Arɑm møg-ɑ løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl cwøle, kɑ ge obëënø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Kelɑm ge pyejj-ɑ yi Cöbɑk, pënyi liny Adɑdedher." 
2Samuel10:17 Møgɑni ólïngø yi Debïd, kɑ Isrɑil cønge bëne, ɑbɑ̈ɑ̈n gen Nɑm Urdun kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Kelɑm. Kɑ liny Arɑm odhwödhø kɑ ge pödh-ɑ yï Debïd," 
2Samuel10:18 de tyëng Arɑm ɑ́yöd ge ceg kɑ cyeddø yi Debïd. Kɑ Debïd ónɑ̈ggø ki jøliny yɑ̈ɑ̈th gɑ miy ɑ́bïryew, kí jøkyënyì gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Cöbɑk pënyi liny Adɑdedher ɑ́nɑ̈g thyew kì kenyɑni." 
2Samuel10:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́køny Adɑdedher bënn kinni ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li cung kì bøli Isrɑil, ɑyömmi gen yï Isrɑil. Kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be göggi Isrɑil. Kɑ tyëng Arɑm obwøgø ki kønyi tyëng Amön ki liny këti." 
2Samuel11:1 Kì ri thumi run, bøli keny-ɑ nyi kedhi rɑ̈nhì be mɑ̈nyø, kɑ Yöɑb ki linye geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn ör yi Debïd. Kɑ myërri Amön rënyi yi gen, kɑ kɑɑl Rɑbɑ̀ tyeg gen. De Debïd ɑ́döng e bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel11:2 Kɑ Debïd wɑ̈dh-ɑ dhwödhø cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì böörø, kì keny-ɑ ɑ́buude. Kɑ kedh-ɑ wïj óthɑɑng ød kì gøldwøng. Kɑ ólïdhø e ying-ɑ wïj óthɑɑng ød ki ngɑndhɑjø me lwøg. Ngɑnɑni myëër cɑrø." 
2Samuel11:3 Kɑ Debïd oödø ki ji møg yod ngɑnɑni mɑ løge men. Kɑ gø yode kinni nyɑnɑni bɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ nyɑɑr Eliɑm. O bɑ cï Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit. 
2Samuel11:4 Aöd Debïd ki ngɑn me dwɑɑy Bɑtcebɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne yïe, ɑbudde ki gøn. (Bɑtcebɑ̀ cer-ɑ rumø ki kwëri dwɑ̈ye.) Codhe, kɑ døøg-ɑ gøle." 
2Samuel11:5 Kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ óyɑɑjø, ɑöde yï Debïd kinni, “Yijɑ dɑ dhɑnhø.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Kɑ Debïd öd-ɑ yï Yöɑb ki wöödø kinni, “Örí yɑn Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit.” Kɑ Uriyɑ̀ öri Debïd yi Yöɑb." 
2Samuel11:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Uriyɑ̀, ɑpyëjii yi Debïd mɑ bëëd Yöɑb kidï, kí mɑ bëëd jøge kidï, kí mɑ bëëd liny cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ dï." 
2Samuel11:8 Codhe, ɑköbbi Uriyɑ̀ yi Debïd kinni, “Kedhí gølí kɑ rií ywööm.” Codhe, kɑ Uriyɑ̀ bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì gøldwøng, ɑödi gøle yi rɑ̈dh ki gïi jwödhø." 
2Samuel11:9 De Uriyɑ̀ ɑ́cög e nuti kedhi gøle. Áyöd e ceg-ɑ buddø kì dhø gøldwøng geki jø rɑ̈dh. 
2Samuel11:10 Kɑ Debïd köbbi kinni, “Uriyɑ̀ nuti kedhi gøle.” Kɑ Uriyɑ̀ köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Yï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yöö, yïde ɑ cöög yï pɑ kedhi gølí?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Aköbbi Debïd yi Uriyɑ̀ kinni, “Sɑnduug Cigg, kí Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ ge bëëd ɑ yethi ɑkɑnnì. O Yöɑb geki bɑ̈nggi wɑ̈ɑ ge ying-ɑ pɑ̈l. O yɑ kedhɑ gølɑ, o yɑ cyɑ̈mɑ, o yɑ mɑ̈dhɑ, o yɑ buddɑ ki cyëgɑ? Yɑ ɑ́köngi kinni gïn ni menɑni pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yɑn kinni tek.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Aköbbi Uriyɑ̀ yi Debïd kinni, “Bëëd kì keny dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng. Yï óörɑ kej liny dhuki.” Kɑ Uriyɑ̀ obëëdø kì Yerusɑlem cyɑ̈ngɑni kí dhuki." 
2Samuel11:13 Codhe, ɑcwøøl Uriyɑ̀ yi Debïd, kɑ Uriyɑ̀ ocyɑ̈mø kɑ omɑ̈dhø kì tɑɑw Debïd. Kɑ Uriyɑ̀ kɑɑg yi Debïd ki møgø, kɑ nɑ̈g yi møgø. De Uriyɑ̀ nuti kedhi gøle. Uriyɑ̀ ɑ́buud-ɑ dhø gøldwøng kì wɑ̈rɑni." 
2Samuel11:14 Agwëdi Yöɑb ki wɑ̈nyø yi Debïd. Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni mëgge Uriyɑ̀ o gø kɑ̈l en. 
2Samuel11:15 Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwede bɑ kinni, “Cïb Uriyɑ̀ yedh yɑy kì keny-ɑ di liny-ɑ teeg. Kɑ wu dwöögu cyɑ̈n kì bɑnge, kɑ wiy nɑ̈g.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑtyeg yi Yöɑb, kɑ keny-ɑ di liny-ɑ teeg lidhe, ɑcïbe Uriyɑ̀ kenyɑni." 
2Samuel11:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën jø kɑɑlɑni wɑ̈g be nyïɑ̈ggø ki Yöɑb, ge ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwï jø Debïd. Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g." 
2Samuel11:18 Kɑ Yöɑb öd-ɑ yï Debïd ki kwøbbi kër-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi liny. 
2Samuel11:19 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör yi en ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Keny-ɑ órum ki köbbi rɑ̈dh ki kër-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi liny," 
2Samuel11:20 keløg rɑ̈dh ómɑg yi liny, kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Wude ɑ ti wun cyɑ̈ngø ki dörø wu ónyïɑ̈ggø? Kwïj yi wun kinni ge ócuggø pöd ki wethh ge ying-ɑ wïj dörø?" 
2Samuel11:21 Á men ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g Abimelek wɑ̈d Gideon? Pɑth ki ngɑndhɑjø ɑ ɑ́leeng kïti ɑwɑj köme, e ngɑnɑni ying-ɑ wïj dörø kì Tebedh kɑ gø nɑ̈ge? De wude ɑ ɑ́ti wun cyɑ̈ngø ki dörø?’ Kɑ yï kööb kinni bɑ̈ngí Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit ɑ́nɑ̈g thyew.”" 
2Samuel11:22 Codhe, kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör ókedhø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgii yi Yöɑb köbbe rɑ̈dh bënn." 
2Samuel11:23 Debïd ɑ́köbbi yi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör kinni, “Wø ɑ́ceg kɑ kømi tyɑmø yi jøgi Amön. Kɑ ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl be nyïɑ̈ggø ki wøn, de ge ɑ́cyeddi yi wøn gïti dhø dörø." 
2Samuel11:24 Kɑ bɑ̈nggí pwöd yi gen ki wethh ge ying-ɑ wïj dörø, kɑ kwï jøgí nɑ̈g. Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit ɑ́nɑ̈g thyew.”" 
2Samuel11:25 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wöödø köbbi yi Debïd kinni “Cïj Yöɑb kɑ köbbí kinni pyëwí ko wëggí løgø yi møgɑni, mɑ́ pilø nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈bbø yøw, ying e kwɑny-ɑ men, wɑlɑ̀ men-ɑcɑ̀. Turrí kömi kɑɑlɑni, kɑ mɑɑg.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Kɑ cï Uriyɑ̀ olïngø ki thøwi jɑlgøle, kɑ óywöngø kipere." 
2Samuel11:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi bøli kej ywøge, kɑ Debïd oödø ki bɑ̈ngg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈lii gøle. Kɑ ogöögø ki cï Debïd. Kɑ Debïd nyödde ki wɑ̈d, de gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Debïd ɑ́bɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel12:1 Kɑ Nɑthɑn öri Debïd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe yï Debïd, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ádɑ ji ɑ́ryew mɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑɑl ɑ́kyel. Jɑl ɑ́kyel kɑ̈rø, o jɑl-ɑ kyeelø jɑdø." 
2Samuel12:2 Jɑl-ɑ kɑ̈rø yïe ɑ́dɑ dyëg kí dhög mø gïïr cɑrø. 
2Samuel12:3 De jɑl-ɑ jɑdø yïe ɑ́dɑ órömø ɑ́kyel kete. Gø ɑ́ceg yi en kɑ ngewø, kɑ gø pidhe kyeel ki nyige. Nyɑ órömɑni nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ ri gïncɑme, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ɑ yij köödh pïge, kɑ nyii buddø kì kööre. Nyɑ órömɑni ɑ́bëëd e nɑ nyɑre." 
2Samuel12:4 Codhe, kɑ jɑlkɑ̈r këëm yi wëlø. Jɑlkɑ̈r ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ ngɑ̈ddi wëlø, de nuti dwɑddi kɑ̈bbø kì kelli dyëge, wɑlɑ̀ kì kelli dhöge, de ɑ́yöd e kwɑny-ɑ órömi ɑbuur, kɑ gø thɑ̈lle wële.”" 
2Samuel12:5 Kɑ Debïd pyëwe órënyø ki mendwøng ki jɑlkɑ̈r. Aköbbe Nɑthɑn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ Nëënø. Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gwøg gïn-ɑ ni men di ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø!" 
2Samuel12:6 Cole dyelɑni ki dyëg ɑ́ngwen kipe kɑ ɑ́gööge ki gïn ni men, kí kɑ ɑ́cög pyëwe pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m.”" 
2Samuel12:7 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi Nɑthɑn kinni, “Bene yïn jɑlɑni! Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: ‘Yï ɑ́myeg yi yɑn yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ yï yiel yi yɑn kì cingi Cɑul." 
2Samuel12:8 Amëggɑ yïn gøle geki mɑ̈nne. Kɑ yï gwøg yi yɑn yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀. O ke di bëëd møgɑni nøg, kömi gen di kïdhɑ ki møøgø." 
2Samuel12:9 Yïde ɑ bɑɑny Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Yïde ɑ gwøøg gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en kinni rɑɑj? Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn ki pili tyëng Amön, kɑ cyëge kwɑny yi yïn ɑ́ dhɑjø!" 
2Samuel12:10 Pilø pɑ wïyi ki nɑ̈g kì gølí gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ yɑ nuti wøør yïn, kɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny cï Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kit ɑ́ dhɑjø." 
2Samuel12:11 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: ‘Yï muujɑ’ ɑkørr mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l gølí. Mɑ̈nní ókwɑny yi yɑn kì yïí yï onëënø, kɑ ge mëggɑ dhɑnhø me cyɑ̈gi ki yïn. Mɑ̈nní óniin yi en kì dicɑ̈ng." 
2Samuel12:12 Bɑtcebɑ̀ ɑ́niin ɑ gød yi yïn, de møg ógwøg yi yɑn kì dɑ̈ri cɑ̈ng, kipe kinni o gïn ni menɑni lidh yi Isrɑil bëne.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Kɑ Nɑthɑn köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Aköbbi Debïd yi Nɑthɑn kinni, “Orøgí ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yï pɑ thøw." 
2Samuel12:14 De gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wørø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Kì bɑng menɑni, wɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́nyölli yïn ceg-ɑ thøø.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Codhe, kɑ Nɑthɑn døøg-ɑ pɑɑre. Kɑ wɑ̈d Debïd men-ɑ ɑ́nyöllii yi Bɑtcebɑ̀ cï Uriyɑ̀, göjji rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel12:16 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjji yi Debïd kipe nyelthinh. Kɑ Debïd óbɑ̈nyø cɑm. Ákedhi gøle, kɑ wɑ̈r nyi tyëge e buud-ɑ piny gwög." 
2Samuel12:17 Kɑ jø tøg bure kedh-ɑ yïe be kwɑjjii kinni dhwödhe kì piny, kɑ cyɑ̈me, de ɑ́bɑ̈nyi ki dhwödhø, kɑ óbɑ̈nyø cɑm." 
2Samuel12:18 Kɑ nyelthinh othøø kì bïryeew cyɑ̈ng. Jø Debïd ɑ́bwøg ki köbbii kinni nyelthinh ɑ́thøw. Ge okööbø kinni, “Debïd ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngi kwøbbee e nyelthinh obuddø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële. Keløg e oköbbø yi wɑ kinni nyelthinh ɑ́thøw ócuggø gwøg ki gïjø me rɑɑj.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe bɑ̈ngge ge ómöngø, ɑyode gøn kinni dhɑnhø thøø. Codhe, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Dhɑnhø ɑ́thøw?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Ngee, dhɑnhø ɑ́thøw.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Codhe, ɑdhwödhi Debïd mɑl kì piny. Kɑ kedh-ɑ be lwøggø, kɑ ogïnyø ki møw, ɑwile ógudhe. Kɑ kedh-ɑ ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be mɑ̈ddø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume, ɑkedhe gøle kɑ ócwöddø ki gïncɑm." 
2Samuel12:21 Kɑ Debïd pyëj yi bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́göög kinøw? Keny-ɑ ɑ́nëën dhɑnhø yï ɑ́bɑ̈nyi cɑm, o yï ceg-ɑ ywøg. O ɑnɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́thøw dhɑnhø, yï ɑ́dhwödh kɑ yï ocyɑ̈mø.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́nudd nyelthinh onëënø, yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi cɑm kɑ yɑ pëgg-ɑ be ywøg, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́rum kinni, ɑ́ men ɑ ngɑ̈nyii, pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólɑ̈ɑ̈m mɑwɑnø kɑ nyelthinh wiye nëëne." 
2Samuel12:23 De ɑnɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́rum dhɑnhø ki thøø, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ óbɑ̈nyɑ ki cɑm? Ócuggi dwöög wɑ̈g yi yɑn kì yij thøø? Yɑ ókedhi kun-ɑ di en cyɑ̈ng megø, de pɑ cuggi dwöög yïɑ.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Kɑ Debïd Bɑtcebɑ̀ cyëge luge. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ ød. Ayɑɑje këti kɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈d megø. Kɑ wɑ̈nɑni cɑg yi Debïd ɑ́ Sølømøn. Sølømøn ɑ́mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
2Samuel12:25 Kɑ Nɑthɑn jɑltöng ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be kwøb kinni cɑɑg nyelthinh ɑ́ Yedidiyɑ̀ mɑ́ nyɑnyelɑni mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
2Samuel12:26 Yöɑb ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki Rɑbɑ̀ kɑɑl-ɑ di rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön, kɑ ócyɑ̈ngø ki mɑgø yi en." 
2Samuel12:27 Aödi Yöɑb yï Debïd ki ji møg köbbii kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Rɑbɑ̀, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi dwɑ̈ddi yi gen ki pï mɑgɑ." 
2Samuel12:28 Anɑn kwɑny yɑy-ɑ kyeelø kɑ peej kɑɑlɑni o mɑg yi yïn, kipe ócölli nyingɑ keløg ɑ́ yɑn ɑ mɑgii!”" 
2Samuel12:29 Codhe, kɑ yɑy bëne cøng yi Debïd, ɑkedhe Rɑbɑ̀, ɑnyïɑ̈gge ki kɑɑlɑni, kɑ gø mɑge." 
2Samuel12:30 Kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈r wïj Mölek jwøøg gen kwɑny kì wïje yi Debïd. Kɑ cïb wïj Debïd. Yɑ̈rɑni bɑ dhɑb, o ree dɑ tigg mø ngewi gen teeg, pegi yɑ̈rɑni bɑ kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj. Kɑ Debïd okɑ̈dø ki jɑmmì mø gïïr mø per gen teeg kì kɑɑlɑni." 
2Samuel12:31 Kɑ cinggi tyëng kɑɑlɑni cïbe ki mocɑrr, kí kwërrì, kí dørrì, kɑ gï cïrre gwøg, geki gwøgi thob. Tyëng kɑ̈ddi Amön bënn ɑ́gögge gïn ni menɑni. Codhe, kɑ Debïd dwöög-ɑ Yerusɑlem ki yɑye." 
2Samuel13:1 Abcɑlöm wɑ̈d Debïd yïe ɑ́dɑ nyimen me myëër, me cwøl ɑ́ Tɑmɑr, o nyɑnɑni omɑɑrø yi Amnön wɑ̈d Debïd." 
2Samuel13:2 Gø ɑ́mɑɑr en ki mendwøng, kɑ ceg ki kømi nɑ̈gø yi rumme, mɑ́ nyɑnɑni bɑ nyɑnɑjur, o yode teeg." 
2Samuel13:3 Amnön wɑ̈d Debïd yïe ɑ́dɑ mɑ̈dh me wïje pel, me cwøl ɑ́ Yönɑdɑb, o bɑ wɑ̈d Cɑmɑ̀ ómï Debïd." 
2Samuel13:4 Kɑ Amnön köbbi yi Yönɑdɑb kinni, “Ede dëlí ɑ kedhe e óthumø kinni nyirɑ̈dh? Á ngø ɑ rɑ̈mø kì pyëwí?” Aköbbii yi Amnön kinni, “Tɑmɑr nyimï Abcɑlöm ówɑ̈ɑ, ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Kɑ Amnön köbbi yi Yönɑdɑb kinni, “Göög e dhɑ̈y dëlí ceg-ɑ rɑ̈m, kɑ yï buddí. Keny-ɑ óbëën wïyí be këëmi yïn, köbbí kinni, ‘Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy Tɑmɑr nyiwɑ̈ɑ bëe, o yɑ thödhe ki gïncɑm. Wiy gïncɑm thɑl yi en kì bølɑ, o yɑ cɑɑm yi en.’ ”" 
2Samuel13:6 Codhe, kɑ Amnön ree løge ngɑn dële rɑ̈mø, ɑkedhe be buddø. Kɑ këëm yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd, ɑköbbii yi Amnön kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy Tɑmɑr bëe, o yɑ tɑ̈dde ki gïncɑm kì keny, o gø mëgge yɑn kiree.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Kɑ Tɑmɑr cwööl yi Debïd kì gøldwøng, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kedhí gøl Amnön, kɑ göggí ki gïncɑm.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Akedhe kunɑni kɑ Amnön yuude e budd-ɑ piny. Kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki ɑwɑj kɑ gø pɑme ɑ́ kɑɑk, e bëëd ɑ keny nennii yi Amnön. Codhe, kɑ kɑɑk gø bule," 
2Samuel13:9 kɑ gï kønye yij siniyɑ̀ kì bøli Amnön, o gï cɑme, de ɑ́cög e nuti cɑɑm en." 
2Samuel13:10 Aköbbe Tɑmɑr kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑɑk buti pyënɑ keny, kɑ yï bï cɑɑm yɑn.” Akwɑnye kɑɑk kɑ kedh-ɑ yïe." 
2Samuel13:11 Cem e Tɑmɑr muuj-ɑ kɑɑk, kɑ gø mɑge, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Bïí buddi wɑ!”" 
2Samuel13:12 Kɑ Tɑmɑr okööbø kinni, “Pɑth ómïɑ! Yɑ ko mød! Gïn ni men pɑ nyi gwøg kì Isrɑil, yï ko göög ki ɑyɑ̈ɑ̈r ni men!" 
2Samuel13:13 Wïjɑ ótïng yi yɑn kidï këti kì kelli ji? O yïn ø, yï koo ceg bëëdø yï nɑ dhëgg-ɑ yɑ̈rø kì Isrɑil? Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn köbbí rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ yɑ pɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈ne nywømø yi yïn.”" 
2Samuel13:14 De Amnön ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngi kwøbbi Tɑmɑr. Tɑmɑr ɑ́tyɑm en, kɑ gø møde, mɑ́ e teeg kibøle." 
2Samuel13:15 Kɑ Amnön pyëwe mɑg yi mɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki Tɑmɑr ki menteg, kɑ mɑɑr-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑre gøn lod yi mɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kedhí wɑ̈g!”" 
2Samuel13:16 Kɑ Tɑmɑr okööbø kinni, “Pɑth! Ryem-ɑ ryeem yɑn èn rɑɑj, lod-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ɑnɑn.” De Amnön ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbe." 
2Samuel13:17 Kɑ bɑ̈nge cwøle, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kïdhí ngɑndhɑjø men wɑ̈g, nyiig kì butɑ, kɑ dhøg kɑl cyëëg.”" 
2Samuel13:18 Kɑ Tɑmɑr cøør wɑ̈g yi bɑ̈ngɑni, ɑcyëge kɑl. Tɑmɑr ɑ́bëëd e rug-ɑ ɑ́ywödh me bɑ̈dde bɑ̈rrø; ɑ́ywödhh-ɑ ni menɑni ɑ nyi rug yi nyiirɑ̈dh møg-ɑ nuti nywømø." 
2Samuel13:19 Kɑ Tɑmɑr ókɑ̈bbø ki búr këlø kɑ gø kïdhe wïje, kɑ ɑ́ywödhe men-ɑ ruge pyëde, kɑ ókedhø e okïïwø ki ywøg, cingge cïb en wïje." 
2Samuel13:20 Kɑ Tɑmɑr köbbi yi Abcɑlöm ómen kinni, “Yï ɑ́mød yi Amnön! Kud ɑnɑn nyimïɑ. Nyelɑni bɑ ówöw. Pyëwí ko cïb ri møgɑni.” Kɑ Tɑmɑr pëgg-ɑ gøl ómen Abcɑlöm kì wɑ̈ye." 
2Samuel13:21 Møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kɑ pyëwe órënyø ki mendwøng. 
2Samuel13:22 Amnön bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Abcɑlöm, ying-ɑ́ møg døj wɑlɑ̀ møg rijjø. De Amnön ɑ́mɑɑn en ki pyëwe, kiper ɑyɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́gögge nyimen Tɑmɑr." 
2Samuel13:23 Kì bɑng runn ɑ́ryew, kɑ nyiirɑ̈dh bënn ryej yi Abcɑlöm, kì Bɑɑl Adhör, kì buti kɑɑl Eprɑim, kun-ɑ nyɑɑr yëyyi dyëge." 
2Samuel13:24 Kɑ Abcɑlöm kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yëyyi dyëgi bɑ̈ngí ceg kɑ nyɑrø, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ rɑ̈dh kinni kedhe geki bɑ̈ngge kun-ɑ ryeej gen yi bɑ̈nge.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Kɑ Abcɑlöm köbbi yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni, “Pɑth wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ pɑ kedh bënn, kipe yï ótor yi ngenyi kwɑnni ji.” Kɑ rɑ̈dh dyej yi Abcɑlöm, de rɑ̈dh nuti yïëyø ki kedhø, kɑ muuj-ɑ kwëngge." 
2Samuel13:26 Kɑ Abcɑlöm okööbø kinni, “Keløg yï pɑ kedh, wiy Amnön ówɑ̈ɑ kedhe ki wøn.” Apëjji Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni, “Kedh kɑ per ngø?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Kɑ Abcɑlöm pëgg-ɑ be kwɑjji rɑ̈dh, gïti kɑ ɑ́yïëy rɑ̈dh kinni kedh Amnön geki nyiirɑ̈dh bënn kun-ɑ cwöddi yi Abcɑlöm. Abcɑlöm ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ryëj me dwøng; ryëny ni menɑni nyi theeg-ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel13:28 Kɑ Abcɑlöm jøge cege kinni, “Tidu Amnön. Keny-ɑ ónɑ̈ɑ̈gii yi møgø, wu óköbbi yi yɑn kinni, ‘Nɑ̈gu Amnön.’ Nɑ̈gu en kì bøli kenyɑni ceth! Wu ko böggi, mɑ́ yɑn ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun. Cwedu ri wun, wu ko böggi!”" 
2Samuel13:29 Codhe, kɑ Amnön nɑ̈g yi bɑ̈nggi Abcɑlöm, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg gen. Kɑ nyiirɑ̈dh kɑdh-ɑ kömi ógɑlli gen, kɑ ge órengø." 
2Samuel13:30 Kɑ wöödø wɑ̈nh-ɑ yï Debïd e nyiirɑ̈dh nudd ge ying-ɑ yöö kinni, “Nyiirɑ̈dh ɑ́nɑ̈g bënn yi Abcɑlöm! Bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli gen.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ ógødhe pyëde ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe, ɑleenge ree piny. Kɑ jøge møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni ógudhi gen pyëëd gen bënn." 
2Samuel13:32 De Yönɑdɑb wɑ̈d Cɑmɑ̀ ómï Debïd ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yï ko kööb wuö kinni bɑ nyiirɑ̈dh bënn ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g. Pɑth, bɑ Amnön kete ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g! Gïn ni menɑni ɑ́bëëd e omïdhø yi pyëw Abcɑlöm, kër-ɑ ɑ́mød Tɑmɑr nyimen yi Amnön." 
2Samuel13:33 Yï ko yïëy wuö, kinni nyiirɑ̈dh thøø bënn. Bɑ Amnön kete ɑ ɑ́thøw.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Kɑ Abcɑlöm opɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì bøli kenyɑni. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kurø kì wïj dörø ólïdhø ki ji mø gïïr mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l løøg kït tung-ɑ kyeelø. 
2Samuel13:35 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi Yönɑdɑb kinni, “Lïdhí, yɑ ɑ́kømm-ɑ dyër! Nyiirɑ̈dh obëënø!”" 
2Samuel13:36 Ri rumi Yönɑdɑb ki kwøb ceth, kɑ nyiirɑ̈dh ówɑ̈nhø ge óryeerø ki ywøg. Kɑ Debïd ólunyø ki ywøg geki jøge." 
2Samuel13:37 De Abcɑlöm ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r yï Tɑlmɑy wɑ̈d Amiud, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gecur. Kɑ obëëdø kì kunɑni ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ Debïd tyëg-ɑ keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r e ywøg-ɑ Amnön wɑ̈de." 
2Samuel13:38  
2Samuel13:39 De keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki ywøgi Amnön, kɑ kej Abcɑlöm ódwɑ̈ddø kì yïe ki mendwøng." 
2Samuel14:1 Kɑ yod yi Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ kinni kej Abcɑlöm ɑ́dwɑ̈ddi kì yï Rɑ̈dh Debïd ki mendwøng. 
2Samuel14:2 Kɑ Yöɑb öd-ɑ Tekoɑ̀ be dwɑɑyi ngɑndhɑjø me wïje pel. Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbe kinni, “Gwøg rií yï nɑ ngɑn ceg ywøg. Kɑ muní kïdhí ki thølli kïjjø, kɑ yï ko gïïny ki møw, wɑlɑ̀ yëyyi wïjí ko pyëël. O yï nënní yï nɑ ngɑn me mɑɑg cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr e ywøg-ɑ thøø." 
2Samuel14:3 Codhe, kɑ yï kedhí yï Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kɑ yï kööb kinnï.” Kɑ kwøbb-ɑ ókwøbe cïb dhøge yi Yöɑb." 
2Samuel14:4 Codhe, kɑ ngeti Tekoɑ̀ kedh-ɑ be kwøb ki rɑ̈dh. Ákedh kɑ wïje kuule piny ree bøødhe bøødhø kì bøli rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø mɑle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Køny yɑn, wuö rɑ̈dhɑ.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Yïde?” Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ ngɑn yïe bong jɑlø, jɑlgølɑ ɑ́thøw." 
2Samuel14:6 Bɑ̈ngí yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø keti gen kì wɑg, o bong dhɑnhø me yiel gen. Kɑ nyel ɑ́kyel gøj yi nyel-ɑ kyeelø kɑ gø nɑ̈ge." 
2Samuel14:7 Kɑ wɑddɑ bënn bï-ɑ yïɑ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Mëggí wøn nyel-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g ómen, o nɑ̈g yi wøn kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge ómen, cɑgg wïj gølɑni pɑ̈ɑ̈dh.’ Wɑ̈dɑ menɑni en ɑ ɑ́döng kete, o keløg e onɑ̈gø yi gen, wïj gølɑ ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o nyingi jɑlgølɑ ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì kömi lɑ̈bø.”" 
2Samuel14:8 Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedhí gølí, yɑ ómuujø ki cigg kiperí.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi ngeti Tekoɑ̀ kinni, “Cɑ́y óying kömɑ wøki gøl wøn. Wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh yïe bɑ̈r geki kwøme.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈nyi kwøb ki yïn cɑɑg ki muuj yɑn. O yï pɑ døøg yi en ki nywɑlø këti.”"
