2Samuel14:11 Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Köngí ki nyingi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi kej dhɑnhø cöge wɑ̈dɑ pɑ nɑ̈g yi en.” Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong ngɑn-ɑ ónywɑl wɑ̈dí. Bong yëyi wïje men-ɑ ódëëm piny.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí dɑ gïn dwɑdde kwøbø, yïn ɑ wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh.” Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Kööb!”" 
2Samuel14:13 Codhe, kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Gede jii Jwøk ɑ göggí gen ki bɑ̈jjø me ni men? Wɑ̈dí ɑ́cög e pɑ dwöög yi yïn kì pɑ̈l. Rií ɑ́cɑy yi yïn ɑnɑn ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn." 
2Samuel14:14 Wɑ óthøw bënn. Wɑ nɑ pïg røyø, ɑ bong ngɑn nyi døøg gen ki tømø. Cɑgg ɑ́ Jwøk, dhɑnhø pɑ nyi dwööge mɑl, de rɑ̈dh dhɑnhø ócuggø dwöögø yi en kì yïnø." 
2Samuel14:15 Wuö rɑ̈dh, møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ ɑ́göjji yɑn wɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi teedø! Arumɑ kinni, wiy yɑ kedhɑ be köbbi rɑ̈dh. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn, ógwøg en mɑwɑnø." 
2Samuel14:16 Ólïngø mɑwɑnø. Kɑ wø yiel yi en wøki wɑ̈dɑ kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ dwɑddii nɑ̈gø, o wø di mɑ̈ɑ̈n gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Jwøk." 
2Samuel14:17 Anɑn yɑ okööbø kinni, “Pyëwɑ ɑ́kwööj yi kwøbbi wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh. Yï pɑ̈r ki wëywöni Jwøk, gïn-ɑ rɑj ki gïn-ɑ døj, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn. Yï ókøny yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!”" 
2Samuel14:18 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd okööbø kinni, “Gïn-ɑ pëjjɑ yïn, ko kɑ̈nní yɑn.” Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Pëjjí wuö, rɑ̈dhɑ.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Yöɑb dɑ dhøge kì ri kwøb møg?” Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk, wuö rɑ̈dh, bong keny këjji. Yï kømm-ɑ dyër. Yɑ ɑ́köbb-ɑ yi Yöɑb i kwøbɑ møgɑni." 
2Samuel14:20 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi bɑ̈ngí Yöɑb kɑ per wili kwøb. De wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh pɑ̈r ki wëywöni Jwøk, ɑ ngɑ̈nyi gïg-ɑ nyi cwöb kì piny bëne.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Kɑ Yöɑb köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn ógwøg yi yɑn. Dwöög nyelthinh Abcɑlöm.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Kɑ Yöɑb ree bøødhe bøli rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø mɑle, ɑkwënge rɑ̈dh. Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Áyod yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn kinni pyëwí med ki yɑn, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjji yi yɑn ɑ́gwøg yi yïn.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Kɑ Yöɑb odhwödhø, ɑkedhe Gecur, kɑ Abcɑlöm kɑ̈ɑ̈le Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel14:24 De Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́kööb kinni, “Töngi Abcɑlöm gøle. Nyingi wøn pɑ lidh yi wøn ki en.” Atöngi Abcɑlöm gøle, nyingi gen nuti liidh gen ki rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel14:25 Bong jɑlø mɑ ɑ́bëëd e myër ni Abcɑlöm kì Isrɑil bëne, bong gïnrɑj kì ree cɑ̈gi kì tyele gïti wïje." 
2Samuel14:26 Kenyi thumi run, yëyyi wïj Abcɑlöm nyi ceg yi en kɑ nyɑrø, mɑ́ ge nyi ceg-ɑ gwøg ge bɑ̈rrø, kɑ ge ópëngø. Kɑ̀ røm gen, ge nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn ni røthøl ɑ́bïj ki rumi kej kwër." 
2Samuel14:27 Abcɑlöm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g ki nyɑndhɑjø ɑ́kyel. Nyingi nyɑre cwøl ɑ́ Tɑmɑr, o bɑ nyɑn me myëër cɑrø." 
2Samuel14:28 Kɑ Abcɑlöm obëëdø ki runn ɑ́ryew kì Yerusɑlem, e nyingi gen nuti liidh gen ki rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel14:29 Kɑ Yöɑb cwøl yi Abcɑlöm kinni o gø di öre yï rɑ̈dh, de Yöɑb ɑ́bɑ̈nyi bëën yïe. Kɑ cig-ɑ ödi yïe, kɑ cig-ɑ bɑ̈nyø." 
2Samuel14:30 Kɑ Abcɑlöm bɑ̈ngge köbbe kinni, “Lïdhi wun, pwödhi Yöɑb ying-ɑ buti pwödhɑ, o yïe dɑ ceir kì yije. Kedh wun, kɑ rɑ̈b wun.” Codhe, kɑ pwödhi Yöɑb rɑ̈b yi bɑ̈nggi Abcɑlöm." 
2Samuel14:31 Adhwödh Yöɑb kɑ kedh-ɑ yï Abcɑlöm kì gøle, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b pwödhɑ yi bɑ̈nggí?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Kɑ Abcɑlöm ólöggø kinni, “Lidh, yɑ ɑ́ödi yïí kinni o yï di örɑ yï rɑ̈dh, o di pyëjɑ kinni, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le yɑn kì Gecur. Di løg me lɑ̈w ke di bëëdɑ kì kunɑni! Anɑn wiy yɑ kedhɑ yï rɑ̈dh. Keløg yɑ røngø, wiy yɑ nɑ̈g yi en!”" 
2Samuel14:33 Codhe, kɑ Yöɑb kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbe gøn kwøbbi Abcɑlöm. Acwøøl Abcɑlöm yi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ Abcɑlöm ree bøødhe piny kì bøli rɑ̈dh. Kɑ Abcɑlöm dööb kɑ̈w yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø nuume ki mër." 
2Samuel15:1 Codhe, ɑgöög Abcɑlöm ki yɑ̈y, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki kyënyì mø pyejji yɑ̈yɑni, kí jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj mø rïngi kì bøle." 
2Samuel15:2 Abcɑlöm nyi møøl-ɑ dhø döri kɑɑl, kɑ ngɑn bï e kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh be gøny nyi cwøle, o gø nyi pyëje kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑɑl ɑ́?” Kɑ ngɑnɑni nyii löggø kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí bɑ wɑ̈d kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil.”" 
2Samuel15:3 Kɑ nyi köbbi yi Abcɑlöm kinni, “Nënni gønyí bɑ dyër, de bong jɑngi burø mɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi rɑ̈dh kipe lidhi gønyí.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Kɑ Abcɑlöm nyi köbb-ɑ bøle kinni, “Keløg yɑ di kwɑny yɑn ɑ́ jɑngi burø kì pönhï, gønyyi ji di lidh yi yɑn kidøøj, kɑ ngɑɑn nyi mëggɑ gëe.”" 
2Samuel15:5 O kenyi göög jɑl-ɑ kööb gen e dwɑdd-ɑ mɑlii, kɑ cingge nyi rïïje yïe gø dööbe kööre, kɑ gø nyi nuume." 
2Samuel15:6 Kɑ gïn ni menɑni nyi göggi tyëng Isrɑil bënn møg-ɑ bï yï rɑ̈dh be gøny yi Abcɑlöm. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil pɑng yi Abcɑlöm ki gwøng ni menɑni. 
2Samuel15:7 Kì ri thumi runn ɑ́ngwen, ɑköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Abcɑlöm kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wiy yɑ kedhɑ Kibrön. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi wïj köng-ɑ ɑ́köngi yi yɑn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Kibrön." 
2Samuel15:8 Mɑ́ bɑ̈ngí ɑ́köngi e nudd e obëëdø kì Gecur kinni, keløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ dwøøge’ Yerusɑlem, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑllɑ’ mɑllø kì Kibrön.”" 
2Samuel15:9 Kɑ Abcɑlöm köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedh ki mër.” Codhe, kɑ odhwödhø, ɑkedhe Kibrön." 
2Samuel15:10 Kɑ Abcɑlöm öd-ɑ yï kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil bënn ki ji mø kööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ólïngu cwɑggi kɑng, kɑ wu ryeer wun kinni, ‘Abcɑlöm ɑ́jɑ̈ggi ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì Kibrön!’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ryew ɑ ɑ́kedh ki Abcɑlöm kì Yerusɑlem, ge ɑ́wɑ̈dh-ɑ cwølø yøw de bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi gen." 
2Samuel15:12 Kɑ Abcɑlöm öd-ɑ be cwøli Akithöpel kì Gilø pɑɑ gen, kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd e gwøg-ɑ gëëdhi. Akithöpel ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl tøg buri Debïd. Kɑ per Abcɑlöm ókedhø e ótëngø, kɑ ji óngënyø kì tunge." 
2Samuel15:13 Kɑ Debïd muuj ki wöödø kinni, “Jø Isrɑil ɑ́døøg tuung Abcɑlöm.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Kɑ Debïd jøge møg-ɑ ying Yerusɑlem köbbe kinni, “Jwɑn wɑ dhwödhø! Ke pɑ pyew wɑ bong keny kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wɑ yi Abcɑlöm. Jwɑni wɑ kipe wɑ ópïïd yi en kɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem nɑ̈ge.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Kɑ köbbi yi jøge kinni, “Gïn-ɑ kwøb yi yïn, en ɑ gwøg yi wøn.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ókedhø geki tyëng gøle bënn, de ɑ́wïy ki mɑ̈nn-ɑ ɑkwɑnyy pyɑ̈rø, o ge kor gen gøldwøng." 
2Samuel15:17 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́dhwödh geki jie bënn ki tyel, kɑ ge ócungø kì kɑl megø me lɑ̈wi." 
2Samuel15:18 Bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh ɑ́pöödh bënn, kɑ jøkor, kí teen-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Gɑd bënn opödhø geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́lug bɑnge gɑ miy ɑ́bïkyel." 
2Samuel15:19 Kɑ Itɑy pënyi gen, köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ kedh thyew kí wøn? Døøg kɑ wu bëëd wun ki rɑ̈nh-ɑ nyɑ̈n, mɑ́ yï bɑ wɑ̈d jur megø, o yï ɑ́ceg kɑ cyëëd yïnø kì pödhi wun." 
2Samuel15:20 Yï ɑ́bï-ɑ kì ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ èn, o yï cigi wøn göjji twɑ̈lø kí wøn tïn, o men-ɑ́ keny-ɑ kedhi yi yɑn kwïj yi yɑn? Døøg, kɑ jií dwøøg, wu ókor yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Kɑ mø rɑ̈dh løøg yi Itɑy kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ Nëënø, geki wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh, keny-ɑ kedhi yi wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh, ying-ɑ́ keny yije thøw, wɑlɑ̀ keny nëën, bene keny-ɑ kedhi yi bɑ̈ngí!”" 
2Samuel15:22 Aköbbi Itɑy yi Debïd kinni, “Døj! Pödhí bølí!” Codhe, kɑ Itɑy kwɑɑr Kit pödh-ɑ bøle geki jøge, kí ji-ɑ kɑ̈lli yi gen bënn." 
2Samuel15:23 Kɑ myërrɑni óywöngø keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën yɑye ceg-ɑ pödhø. Kɑ dhøg Kidrön bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi rɑ̈dh, kí yɑye kí bɑnge, kɑ ge töng-ɑ pɑ̈l." 
2Samuel15:24 Ókwërø Dhɑdök ɑ́bëëd e nud geki Kwɑrri Leebì ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ Sɑnduug Cigg. Gø ɑ́cïb gen piny, kɑ ocögø gø pɑ tïng yi gen gïti keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi ji ki bëën wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl. Abiyɑthɑr ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl thyew." 
2Samuel15:25 Kɑ Dhɑdök köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Dwøøg Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk kɑɑl. Keløg pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j med ki yɑn, yɑ ódwööge be lidhii cyɑ̈ng megø, kɑ keny-ɑ bëëde lidhɑ." 
2Samuel15:26 De keløg e ódi kwøb kinni, ‘Yï pɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn.’ Bong gïn ying yïɑ, wiy gwøge gïn-ɑ dwɑdde göggi yɑn.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Aköbbi ókwërø Dhɑdök yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Døøgu kɑɑl wuki Abiyɑthɑr, kí wɑ̈ddi wun ryeet, ɑ løg Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈dí geki Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Abiyɑthɑr." 
2Samuel15:28 Yɑ óyïdø kì dhø pɑ̈l, gïti keny-ɑ óyïddɑ ki yïth kì yï wun.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Codhe, kɑ Sɑnduug Cigg dwøøg kɑɑl yi Dhɑdök geki Abiyɑthɑr, kɑ ge obëëdø kì kɑɑl kunɑni." 
2Samuel15:30 Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ wïj Kïti Dhetun e cyɑ̈dhi e óywöngø, wïje kum en, tyelle bong wɑr. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en bënn kedh-ɑ bɑnge ge óywöngø wɑ̈thi gen kum gen." 
2Samuel15:31 Kɑ Debïd köbbi kinni i Akithöpel rëbø ki Abcɑlöm, ɑkwɑ̈jje kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wiy Akithöpel gööge e pɑ nyi løøg dyër.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Debïd wïj kït, keny-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøk, ɑyuude Kucɑy jɑl Arkì mɑ̈dhe kenyɑni, ógudhe pyëëd en, o wïje kïdh en ki tør." 
2Samuel15:33 Kɑ köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Keløg yï ókedhø ki yɑn, yɑ pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi yïn ki kønyø." 
2Samuel15:34 De yɑ ócuggø kønyø yi yïn ke døøg kɑɑl, kɑ Abcɑlöm köbbí kinni, ‘Yï ógöggi yi yɑn ki pyëw ɑ́kyel ni kɑ ɑ́göggɑ wïyí.’ Kɑ rií pɑ̈nyí kidøøj ki pyemi møg-ɑ nyi løøg yi Akithöpel." 
2Samuel15:35 Ókwërø Dhɑdök, geki Abiyɑthɑr óbëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni, nyi köbbí gen møg-ɑ nyi lïngi yi yïn kì gøldwøng." 
2Samuel15:36 Wɑ̈ddi gen, ɑ løg Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈d Dhɑdök geki Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Abiyɑthɑr nud kì buti gen, nyi öru gen yïɑ, o yɑ nyi köbbi yi gen ki gïg-ɑ nyi lïngi yi wun bënn.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Codhe, kɑ Kucɑy mɑ̈ɑ̈dh Debïd døøg-ɑ kɑɑl, kedh Abcɑlöm wɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑlɑni." 
2Samuel16:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑl Debïd yedhi piny kì wïj kït, ɑrøøm gen ki Dhiibɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Mepiböceth, e ókwöddø ki ɑderr ɑ́ryew kömi gen dɑ ópùn miy ɑ́ryew, kí cyɑ̈lli nywøli yenh møg thwøwø gɑ miyø, kí cyɑ̈lli nywøli yenh møg thij gɑ miyø, kí ɑtheb me pɑ̈ng yi møgi oløg." 
2Samuel16:2 Apyëjii yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni, “Gïg-ɑk bënn bɑ møg gwøøg ngø yi yïn?” Alöggi Dhiibɑ̀ kinni, “Aderr bɑ møg kömi gen ócyɑ̈dhi yi gølí, ópùn geki nywøli yenh bɑ møg cɑm yi jøgí, o møgø bɑ men-ɑ ómɑdh yi gen keny-ɑ ópïd gen kì yij pɑ̈l.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Apëjji rɑ̈dh kinni, “Mepiböceth kwɑɑr wöw Rɑ̈dh Cɑul ying-ɑ keny?” Alöggi Dhiibɑ̀ kinni, “Ying-ɑ Yerusɑlem, mɑ́ e orumø kinni lɑni kweye, Rɑ̈dh Cɑul ódöggii dicyɑ̈ngtïn yi tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø Mepiböceth bënn bɑ møgí.” Kɑ Dhiibɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ngí, wiy pyëwí cöge e med ki yɑn!”" 
2Samuel16:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Debïd Bekurïm, kɑ jɑl gøl Cɑul me cwøl ɑ́ Cimeì wɑ̈d Gerɑ̀ bï-ɑ yïe e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑɑlɑni, e gwɑdd-ɑ Debïd." 
2Samuel16:6 Kɑ Cimeì ócɑ̈gø ki bɑ̈lli Debïd geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki Debïd, o Debïd kwï jöddi linye ying-ɑ wïj kyëje møøgø ying-ɑ wïj cɑɑme." 
2Samuel16:7 Cimeì ɑ́kööb e ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈dø kinni, “Kedh! Kedh! Jɑlnɑ̈g ki ji! Ámuddi ji!" 
2Samuel16:8 Yï ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ lɑwi Cɑul, o ɑnɑn yï ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cyee kipe remmi ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn kì gøl Cɑul. Lɑwí ɑ́mëggi wɑ̈dí Abcɑlöm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ɑ́gɑ̈g cyee, jɑlnɑ̈g ki ji!”" 
2Samuel16:9 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Abicɑy, ɑ meye cwøl ɑ́ Dheruyɑ̀ kinni, “Ede ɑ wëggí gwɑddi yïn ni men wuö? Wiy yɑ kedhɑ yïe, o wïje ngulɑ wɑ̈g!”" 
2Samuel16:10 Kɑ Abicɑy geki ómen Yöɑb köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Menɑni pɑth ki gwøøg wun wɑ̈ddi Dheruyɑ̀. Keløg yɑ ɑ́gwɑddi yi en e óköbb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi pëjjø kinni ede ɑ gööge kinøw?”" 
2Samuel16:11 Kɑ Debïd, Abicɑy geki jøge bënn köbbe kinni, “Men-ɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yɑn, de wude ki wɑ̈d gøl Ben Yɑmïn men? Wiy gwɑ̈de, mɑ́ e ɑ́köbb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel16:12 Cɑni wɑngɑ ólidh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑwɑnø. Kɑ rɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈mme yɑn løg gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” 
2Samuel16:13 Codhe, kɑ Debïd geki jøge opödhø ki yuu gen. Kɑ Cimeì ócyɑ̈dhø e kɑ̈ll-ɑ wïj kwøømø, wïje pɑ̈ɑ̈r en ki gen, gï bɑ̈lle’ bɑ̈llø ki tuggì, kɑ tør nyi kwøøre yï gen." 
2Samuel16:14 Rɑ̈dh geki jøge bënn ɑ́wɑ̈dhi kömi Nɑm Urdun ge pïdø, codhe ɑywööm gen kì kunɑni." 
2Samuel16:15 Kɑ Abcɑlöm geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en, wɑ̈dh-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Akithöpel ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kɑ gen." 
2Samuel16:16 Kucɑy jɑl Arkì, mɑ̈ɑ̈dh Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́yïddi gen ki Abcɑlöm, kɑ ceg-ɑ ryeerø kinni, “Rɑ̈dh ókwöömø! Rɑ̈dh ókwöömø!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Apyëjii yi Abcɑlöm kinni, “Wu ɑ́ceg-ɑ dɑ̈ngø wuki Debïd mɑ̈dhí? Yïde ɑ bɑɑny kedhø wuki en?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Alöggi Kucɑy kinni, “Yɑ kedh kɑ per ngø? Yɑ ying-ɑ kömi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi ji møg, geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn. Yɑ óbëëdø kì butí." 
2Samuel16:19 Yɑ di gögg-ɑ men cøn, keløg e pɑth ki wɑ̈d wɑ̈ɑ? Yï göggɑ’ göggø ni kɑ ɑ́göggɑ wïyí.”" 
2Samuel16:20 Codhe, kɑ Abcɑlöm ree luge Akithöpel, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi keny ɑnɑn, yï rømm-ɑ ngø ɑ døøj ki gwøgø yi wɑ?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Aköbbi Abcɑlöm yi Akithöpel kinni, “Kedh, kɑ yï buddí ki mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkwɑnyyi wïyí møg-ɑ ɑ́wiye gøldwøng. O yod yi ji bënn kì Isrɑil kinni wu ɑ́mɑ̈ni ki wïyí, o ji-ɑ bɑngí tëngi gen.”" 
2Samuel16:22 Codhe, kɑ Abcɑlöm guddi ki kemɑ̀ kì wïj óthɑɑng ød kì gøldwøng. Kɑ Abcɑlöm nyi kedh-ɑ be buddø ki ɑkwɑnyyi wïye kì yij kemɑni, o onennø yi dhɑnhø bëne." 
2Samuel16:23 Møg-ɑ nyi kwøb yi Akithöpel ɑ́bëëd ge nyi ceg kɑ yïëyø bënn, kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, de ge nɑ møg-ɑ ókwøb-ɑ yi Jwøk. Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kwøb ɑgɑk, kì yï Debïd geki Abcɑlöm; dhøg Akithöpel pɑ nyi pyem yi gen." 
2Samuel17:1 Kɑ Abcɑlöm köbbi yi Akithöpel kinni, “Wiy yɑ kɑ̈bbɑ ki jøg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, o yɑ kedhɑ bɑng Debïd tïn kì wɑ̈r." 
2Samuel17:2 O yɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ köme kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd e pïdø, pyëwe ngɑnyø. Óbwøg kɑ jøge bënn órengø, o yɑ ónɑ̈gɑ rɑ̈dh kete." 
2Samuel17:3 Codhe, o ji bënn döggɑ yïn. Thøwi ngɑnɑni wɑng-ɑ dwöögi ji bënn yïí, bong gïnrɑj men ɑ ókedhi ri ji.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Kɑ Abcɑlöm geki jøgdøngi Isrɑil, møgɑni lidh gen ge nɑ dyër." 
2Samuel17:5 Kɑ Abcɑlöm okööbø kinni, “Cwølu Kucɑy jɑl Arkì, o møg-ɑ kwøbe lony yi wɑ ki lïngø thyew.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Kɑ Kucɑy kedh-ɑ yï Abcɑlöm. Kɑ köbbi yi Abcɑlöm kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wøn yi Akithöpel ek: Kɑ̈l wøn bɑng dhøge? Keløg wø pɑ kɑ̈l bɑng dhøge, kwøb møgí.”" 
2Samuel17:7 Alöggi Kucɑy kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Akithöpel dicyɑ̈ngtïn pɑ døøj." 
2Samuel17:8 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni Debïd wïyí, geki jøge bɑ yɑɑg teg ki liny, o ge keej ni mɑɑdh ngur men nywøle ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì yïe. Wïyí bɑ jɑl me ngɑ̈ny yëthi liny, o pɑ nyi buddi kì kej ɑ́kyel geki jøliny kì wɑ̈r." 
2Samuel17:9 Kɑ̀ kööb wɑ ɑnɑn, rum pɑ̈ni yij órøngi kït, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ̈ni keny me pɑ yodii. Ke kwöngi wïyí ki pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi yɑyí, ngɑn lïngi møgɑni ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni yɑɑy Abcɑlöm ɑ́tyɑm yi Debïd." 
2Samuel17:10 Kɑ jøg-ɑ pëddi tegø obwøgø, jøg-ɑ teg ni ngurrì ceg-ɑ bwøgø, mɑ́ Isrɑil bëne ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni wïyí geki jøge bɑ jöddi liny mø teg." 
2Samuel17:11 Møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn bɑ kinni, cøng yɑɑy Isrɑil bëne, cɑg kì tuung gïti tung-ɑ kyeelø, ge gïïr ni tør, kɑ ge peej yij liny yi yïn kirií ceth." 
2Samuel17:12 Debïd ceg yi wɑ kɑ yodø kì keny-ɑ bëëde, o wɑ ceg wɑ ì jɑɑj kì kömi gen ni bøy kenyi kume rij piny, o thøwe ki jøge bënn, bong ngɑn bodh kì ri gen." 
2Samuel17:13 O keløg e yömm-ɑ kɑɑl, Isrɑil ceg-ɑ kedhø bëne. Kɑ kɑɑlɑni cøøre piny yij tör, kɑ keje odöngø ɑ́ ryɑng.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Kɑ Abcɑlöm geki jø Isrɑil bënn okööbø kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Kucɑy lɑ̈w kibøli mø Akithöpel.” Árum ki cïbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni o møg-ɑ døøj ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Akithöpel cög gen ge pɑ gwøg, o ryɑ̈g pɑ̈dhe kömi Abcɑlöm." 
2Samuel17:15 Codhe, ɑköbbi ókwërø Dhɑdök geki Abiyɑthɑr yi Kucɑy ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe Abcɑlöm geki tyëng Isrɑil, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Akithöpel." 
2Samuel17:16 Akööb Kucɑy kinni, “Pyew wun ɑnɑn, jwɑnu ödi yï Debïd ki wöödø, kinni nïnne løøg nɑm tïn. O cöge e pɑ mɑg kɑ nɑ̈g geki jøge.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Abiyɑthɑr geki Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈d Dhɑdök ɑ́bëëd ɑ Enrögel, o ge nyi muuj wöödø yi nyɑnthinh mɑ bɑ̈ng, o wöönɑni nyi lony gen ki muuj Rɑ̈dh Debïd. Mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø ki lidhø ge kedh-ɑ kɑɑl." 
2Samuel17:18 Kɑ ge lidh yi nyel me thiinh, ɑkedhe be köbbi Abcɑlöm, ɑjwɑn gen dhwödhø kɑ ge kedh-ɑ gøl jɑl megø kì Bekurïm. Jɑlɑni yïe ɑ́dɑ yith kì gøle, codhe kɑ ge yedh-ɑ yij yiinhɑni." 
2Samuel17:19 Kɑ wïj yith kum yi cï jɑlɑni, kɑ wïje këdhhe ki byel, o ge cög ge pɑ yod." 
2Samuel17:20 Kɑ jøgi Abcɑlöm kedh-ɑ gølɑni, kɑ ngɑnɑni pyëj gen kinni, “Ágøne Akimɑɑdh geki Yönɑthɑn?” Kɑ ge köbbi yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Ge ɑ́löddi wɑ̈g kì yij dhøg.” Ayɑ̈ɑ̈b gen, kɑ Akimɑɑdh geki Yönɑthɑn ocögø gï pɑ yod yi gen, ɑdøøg gen Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel17:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg jø Abcɑlöm, ɑyïnhi Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈g geki Yönɑthɑn kì yij yith. Akedh gen kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd köbbi gen. Kɑ löbbi yi gen ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi Akithöpel, codhe ɑköbbi gen rɑ̈dh kinni, “Pyeew, jwɑn kedhi løøg nɑm.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Acɑ̈gi Debïd geki jøge ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑm Urdun. Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈g bënn kì ri tɑ̈ri piny. 
2Samuel17:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi Akithöpel kinni kwøbbe ɑ́bɑny, ɑtwööje sïrïj kömi ɑdere, kɑ kedh-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́nywølii ki ɑdere. Kɑ ɑ́rume gwiri jɑmme, ɑngɑbe ree. Kɑ koony kelli lɑ̈bbi tyëng gøl gen." 
2Samuel17:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n Nɑm Urdun yi Abcɑlöm geki yɑɑy Isrɑil, Debïd rum wɑ̈dhi Mɑɑ̈nɑim geki jøge." 
2Samuel17:25 Amɑsɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́cïb kej Yöɑb yi Abcɑlöm ɑ́ pënyi liny. Amɑsɑ̀ bɑ wɑ̈d jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Yether kwɑɑr Icmɑil. En ɑ ɑ́nywøm Abigɑil nyɑɑr Nɑkɑc, o Abigɑil bɑ nyimï Dheruyɑ̀ meyi Yöɑb." 
2Samuel17:26 Kɑ Abcɑlöm geki yɑɑy Isrɑil gudd-ɑ piny Gilyɑd ki kemmi gen. 
2Samuel17:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Debïd Mɑɑ̈nɑim, ɑkedhi Cöbì wɑ̈d Nɑkɑc, jɑl Rɑbɑ̀ kì piny Amön yïe, kí Mɑkir wɑ̈d Amiel kì Lödebɑr, kí Bɑrdhilɑy jɑl Rögelïm kì piny Gilyɑd." 
2Samuel17:28 Ge ɑ́bï yï Debïd ge ókɑ̈ddø ki pënn-ɑ nyi buud, kí tɑ̈mmì, kí puggì, kí gemè, kí ceir, kí møng-ɑ búr, kí pulø, kí ɑ́dɑs, kí byel ɑgïny." 
2Samuel17:29 Kí møøw kïc, kí møøw bwöbø, kí dyëg, kí cɑɑg dhyɑng. Gïgɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen gɑ møg cɑm yi Debïd geki jøge, mɑ́ ge ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni Debïd geki jøge óbëëd ge ómɑgø yi kɑ̈j, o ge ódhɑ̈rø yi röödhø kì yij pɑ̈l." 
2Samuel18:1 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd jøge cønge kej ɑ́kyel, ɑpɑ̈nge gïn gɑ ɑkudd mø yethi gen di ji ɑ́lïp, møøgø dɑ miyø, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen cïbe ki pëjji liny." 
2Samuel18:2 Codhe, ɑöre gïn wɑ̈g gɑ kɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ̈ddɑni pyejj-ɑ yi Yöɑb, kí Abicɑy ómï Yöɑb, kí Itɑy jɑl Gɑth, e men kwøll-ɑ kɑɑle. Kɑ rɑ̈dh jøge köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø kí wun.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Kɑ jøgɑni okööbø kinni, “Yï pɑ kedh ki wøn. Bong per wøn kì yï tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ke cyeddi wøn, cɑgg budi wøn nɑ̈g yi gen, de yï pɑ̈r kɑ ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø kì kelli wøn. Lɑ̈w keløg yï pëgg-ɑ kɑɑl keny, o wø óceg ki kønyø yi yïn.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ ógwøg gïn-ɑ nenni yi wun e døøj.” Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh ócungø kì dhø döri kɑɑl e nenn-ɑ linye kɑ̀ kedhe wɑ̈g ɑ́ ɑkuddi miyø kí ɑkuddi ɑ́lïp." 
2Samuel18:5 Kɑ Yöɑb, kí Abicɑy, kí Itɑy ceg yi Debïd kinni, “Ko di gïnrɑj me göggu nyelthinh Abcɑlöm. Kipe pyëwɑ óngɑny.” Kɑ ji bënn olïngø ki ciggi Debïd kiper Abcɑlöm." 
2Samuel18:6 Kɑ yɑɑy Debïd kedh-ɑ thïm Eprɑim be nyɑɑg ki Isrɑil. 
2Samuel18:7 Kɑ Isrɑil tyɑm yi jø Debïd ki tyɑmø me rɑj. Kelli Isrɑil ɑ́nɑ̈gi ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew dicyɑ̈ngɑni. 
2Samuel18:8 Kɑ liny tɑɑy-ɑ kelli myërr. Ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw kì yij thïm kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi pilø." 
2Samuel18:9 Kɑ Abcɑlöm órøømø ki jø Debïd kì yij liny. Abcɑlöm ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ kömi ógɑlø. Kɑ ógɑlø kɑ̈l-ɑ thɑ ɑ̈r me dwøng, kɑ wïj Abcɑlöm mɑg yi ɑ̈r, kɑ ógɑlø opödhø. Adöng Abcɑlöm e óryërø." 
2Samuel18:10 Kɑ lidh yi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jø Debïd, ɑkedhe be köbbi Yöɑb kinni, “Abcɑlöm ɑ́lidh yi yɑn e óryërø kì ri ɑ̈r.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́köbbii gø köbbe kinni, “Keløg e liidh yïn, ede ɑ bɑɑnyí ki nɑ̈gø ceth? Yï di nëngi yi yɑn ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø, kí wëëni ɑ́kyel.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Kɑ Yöɑb köbbi yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Cɑgg yɑ nëngi yi yïn ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp, cingɑ pɑ di tïnggɑ wɑ̈d rɑ̈dh. Rɑ̈dh ɑ́lïngi yi wøn keny-ɑ ɑ́cege yïn, wuki Abicɑy kí Itɑy kinni, ‘Ko di gïnrɑj me göggu nyelthinh Abcɑlöm kipe pyëwɑ óngɑny.’" 
2Samuel18:13 Keløg ciggi rɑ̈dh di pyem yi yɑn, kɑ Abcɑlöm nɑ̈gɑ, rɑ̈dh di lïng, o yɑ pɑ di køny yi yïn ki gøny.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Akööb Yöɑb kinni, “Yɑ pɑ tyëg piny yɑ opëmø ki yïn.” Akɑ̈bbe ki tøngg ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ gï këële ɑ́ngɑni Abcɑlöm e óryërø kì ri ɑ̈r e onëënø." 
2Samuel18:15 Codhe, kɑ Abcɑlöm cööb yi ji pyɑ̈rø kì kelli jø Yöɑb, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen." 
2Samuel18:16 Codhe, ɑkoodh kɑng yi Yöɑb, kɑ liny ódwöögø kì kun-ɑ ɑ́cyëddi gen ki Isrɑil." 
2Samuel18:17 Akwɑny gen Abcɑlöm kɑ gø kïdhi gen yij bur me ludhø kì yij thïm. Kɑ burɑni köme röri gen ki kïttì mø gïïr. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil órengø, men reng-ɑ gøle kì wɑ̈ye." 
2Samuel18:18 Abcɑlöm kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e onëënø, ree ɑ́gëdde ki lyel kì yij Töör Rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ yïe bong wɑ̈de me nyinge ócöllii. Acɑge lyelɑni ki nying-ɑ cwøllii gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, ɑ́ lyeel Abcɑlöm." 
2Samuel18:19 Codhe, ɑköbbi Yöɑb yi Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈d Dhɑdök kinni, “Wiy yɑ rengɑ o yɑ köbbɑ wöön-ɑ med èn rɑ̈dh, kinni rɑ̈dh ɑ́yiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Kɑ Yöɑb okööbø kinni, “Pɑth, dicyɑ̈ngtïn yï pɑ kedhi be kɑ̈li wöödø. Yï ókedh cyɑ̈ng megø, de pɑth ki dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, mɑ́ e bɑ wɑ̈d rɑ̈dh ɑ ɑ́thøw.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Codhe, ɑköbbe wɑ̈d Kuc kinni, “Kedh kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbí ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn.” Kɑ bɑ̈ngɑni ree bøødhe, ɑdhwödhe kɑ órengø." 
2Samuel18:22 De Yöɑb ɑ́cigi köbbø yi Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈d Dhɑdök kinni, “Cwɑggɑ bong gøn ki gïn-ɑ ócwöb, wiy yɑ rengɑ be kɑ̈li wöödø thyew.” Apyëjii yi Yöɑb kinni, “Yï rengi kɑ per ngø wɑ̈dɑ? Bong köögi men-ɑ óyod yi yïn kiper wöönɑni.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Kɑ Akimɑɑdh okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ceg-ɑ rengø ceth.” Akööb Yöɑb kinni, “Adɑ́ rengí.” Codhe, ɑrengi Akimɑɑdh e bødh-ɑ thwørø kì kömi Nɑm Urdun, kɑ wɑ̈d Kuc yöme." 
2Samuel18:24 Debïd ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ thɑ ɑkɑnø kì dhø döri kɑɑl. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kurø kì wïj ɑkɑni dhø dörø, kedh-ɑ wïj döri kɑɑl, ɑtïnge wïje, kɑ ólïdhø ki dhɑnhø me rïngi kete." 
2Samuel18:25 Alënge dhøge jøg-ɑ piny, kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbe. Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Keløg e bɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wöödø me døøj.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe e ócyɑ̈ngø." 
2Samuel18:26 Acigi jɑlkor lïdhø ki dhɑnhø megø me rïngi. Kɑ jɑlkor jɑldhøkɑl köbbe kinni, “Dɑ dhɑnhø megø me rïngi kete.” Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Jɑlɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wöödø me døøj thyew.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Kɑ jɑlkor okööbø kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ mɑl nenni yi yɑn e ce rïng ɑ́ Akimɑɑdh wɑ̈d Dhɑdök.” Akööb rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bɑ jɑldøj, bï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöödø me døøj.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Kɑ Akimɑɑdh ree bøødhe kì bøli rɑ̈dh, kɑ rɑ̈dh mɑle. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Lejjí Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thödhi yïn ki teng-ɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tïnggi cinge rɑ̈dh.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Apëjji rɑ̈dh kinni, “Nyelthinh Abcɑlöm nud?” Alöggi Akimɑɑdh kinni, “Wuö, keny-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yi bɑ̈ngí Yöɑb, dɑ teedø mø gïïr mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ ge cong-ɑ ri gen, de gïn-ɑ pere congi gen ri gen kwïj yi yɑn.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Aköbbii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Døj, cungí kì keny-ɑn.” Codhe, kɑ kɑl-ɑ nyegi cyɑ̈n, ɑcunge kì kenyɑni." 
2Samuel18:31 Awɑ̈nhi wɑ̈d Kuc, kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ngɑ̈jɑ yïn wuö, kinni, yï ɑ́cwɑg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tïnggi cinggi gen yïn tyɑm yi yïn!”" 
2Samuel18:32 Apyëëj wɑ̈d Kuc yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Nyelthinh Abcɑlöm nud?” Alöggi wɑ̈d Kuc kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn rɑ̈dh, geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh ge gögg-ɑ rɑ̈dh ki gïnrɑj, ce di ceg-ɑ gwøg ni Abcɑlöm.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Kɑ rɑ̈dh pyëwe ongɑɑnyø. Kɑ yedh-ɑ øn-ɑ mɑl kì wïj dhø döri kɑɑl, e óywöngø kinni, “Yeki wɑ̈dɑ yø! Wɑ̈dɑ Abcɑlöm! Abcɑlöm wɑ̈dɑ! Lɑ̈w ke di thøwɑ yɑn ɑ́ kejí yøw! Wɑ̈dɑ! Abcɑlöm wɑ̈dɑ!”" 
2Samuel19:1 Kɑ Yöɑb köbbi kinni, i rɑ̈dh ceg-ɑ ywøg ki Abcɑlöm wɑ̈de." 
2Samuel19:2 Kɑ medi pyëw tyɑ̈mø ree løge rɑ̈ji pyëw dicyɑ̈ngɑni, kì yï yɑy bëne, mɑ́ yɑy ɑ́lïng bëne kinni rɑ̈dh ceg-ɑ ywøg kipe wɑ̈de." 
2Samuel19:3 Kɑ yɑy ree liibe kɑɑl ni ji-ɑ ócyeddø kì yij liny. 
2Samuel19:4 Rɑ̈dh wïje ɑ́kume kɑ pëgg-ɑ be ywøg ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Yeki wɑ̈dɑ yø! Wɑ̈dɑ Abcɑlöm! Abcɑlöm wɑ̈dɑ!”" 
2Samuel19:5 Kɑ Yöɑb kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh kì gøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jií ɑ́yɑ̈r yi yïn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, ngö ge ɑ́yiel-ɑ wëyí, kí wëyi wɑ̈ddí, kí wëyi mɑ̈nní geki wëyi ɑkwɑnyyí! Mɑ́ yï mɑɑr-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn, o yï mɑɑn tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn." 
2Samuel19:6 Ányodh yi yïn dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kinni tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn mɑɑn yi yïn, o yï køny-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn! Ányodh yi yïn kinni pëjji liny geki yɑy bëne bong per gen kì yïí. Álidh yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kinni, yï di bëëd pyëwí med, keløg wø di thøw bënn, o Abcɑlöm wɑ̈dí di bëëde e onëënø!" 
2Samuel19:7 Dhwöödh ɑnɑn, kɑ yï kedhí be dwöögi pyëw yɑyí, mɑ́ keløg yï pɑ kedhi yï gen, yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong dhɑnhø me nin kì butí kì wɑ̈ɑ̈r tïn. O gïn ni menɑni óbëëd e pëddi rɑ̈jø kibøli rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì yij bëëdí bëne!”" 
2Samuel19:8 Adhwödh rɑ̈dh kɑ pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøme kì dïkɑɑl. Kɑ yɑy bëne ngɑ̈j kinni, i rɑ̈dh okwömø kì dïkɑɑl, ɑkedh gen kɑ ri gen cøng bute. Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́rengi yethi myërri gen" 
2Samuel19:9 Kɑ ji pëgg-ɑ be wërø kì yethi myërri gen ge cem-ɑ, “Wɑ ɑ́yiel yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Wɑ ɑ́yiele kì cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. O ɑnɑn ɑ́yöd e cyeed-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij pödhø yi Abcɑlöm!" 
2Samuel19:10 Abcɑlöm ɑ́røny yi wɑ ɑ́ rɑ̈dhee, de ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny. Ede Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ pɑ dwöögii?”" 
2Samuel19:11 Kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi tyëng Isrɑil lïngi yi rɑ̈dh. Codhe, ɑöre ókwërø Dhɑdök geki Abiyɑthɑr yï jøgdøngi Yeudiyɑ̀, o gï pyëj gen kinni “Wude ɑ cwöng wun, rɑ̈dh pɑ dwöög yi wun gøle, o møg-ɑ kømmi yi Isrɑil ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yïthhi rɑ̈dh?" 
2Samuel19:12 Wu bɑ wɑddɑ, wɑ bɑ remø ɑ́kyel, wu yöm-ɑ dï yi Isrɑil, ki kwøbbi dwöögi yɑn?”" 
2Samuel19:13 Ge ɑ́köbbi yi Debïd thyew kinni, “Köbbu Amɑsɑ̀ kinni, ‘Wɑ pɑth ki remø ɑ́kyel? Yï ógwøg yi yɑn yï bɑ pënyi liny kì kej Yöɑb. Wiy yɑ ónɑ̈g yi Jwøk keløg møgɑni pɑ gwøg yi yɑn!’ ”" 
2Samuel19:14 Kwøbbi Debïd ɑ́yïëy yi jø Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, kɑ ge öd-ɑ yïe kinni bëe geki pëjji linye bënn." 
2Samuel19:15 Adhwödh rɑ̈dh e ceg-ɑ dwöögø, kɑ røøm-ɑ kömi Nɑm Urdun ki jø Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́pɑɑrii. Ge ɑ́bï Gilgɑl kɑ per kɑ̈ɑ̈li rɑ̈dh kì løøg Nɑm Urdun." 
2Samuel19:16 Kɑ Cimeì wɑ̈d Gerɑ̀, kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kì Bekurïm, jwɑn-ɑ be pɑɑri Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
2Samuel19:17 Ácyɑ̈dhi kɑ jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp. Kɑ Dhiibɑ̀ bɑ̈ng gøl Rɑ̈dh Cɑul, obëënø thyew geki wɑ̈dde gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj, kí bɑ̈ngge gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Kɑ ge ókwöngø ki wɑ̈dhi kömi Nɑm Urdun e rɑ̈dh nuti wɑ̈nhø." 
2Samuel19:18 Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ løøg nɑm, kinni o rɑ̈dh ókɑ̈ɑ̈l løøng yi gen, o gïn-ɑ ódwɑddi yi rɑ̈dh ógwøg yi gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Debïd e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ nɑm, kɑ Cimeì ree bøødhe piny kì bøle," 
2Samuel19:19 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Wuö rɑ̈dh, wïl wïjí ki gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëën wɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem. Møgɑni ko nudd ge omïdhø yi yïn, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko rum kì ri gen." 
2Samuel19:20 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn wuö, kinni yɑ ɑ́røngi, bene ɑ bɑnge bëëde ɑ́ yɑn ɑ kwöngi ki bëën be yïddø ki yïn kibøli tyëng myërri Isrɑil bënn, ɑ yingɑ bølí dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
2Samuel19:21 Alöggi Abicɑy wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ kinni, “Cimeì pɑ ceg ki nɑ̈gø kipe gwɑnn-ɑ ɑ́gwɑdde rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Kɑ Abicɑy geki Yöɑb ómen köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Wude ki yɑn wɑ̈ddi Dheruyɑ̀? Dɑ dhɑnhø me cuggi nɑ̈gø kì Isrɑil dicyɑ̈ngtïn? Bene yɑn ɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh ɑnɑn, bong dhɑnhø me nɑ̈g tïn.”" 
2Samuel19:23 Kɑ Cimeì köbbe kinni, “Yïn ɑ köbbɑ èn. Yï pɑ nɑ̈g.”" 
2Samuel19:24 Codhe, kɑ Mepiböceth kwɑɑr Cɑul bï-ɑ be pɑɑri rɑ̈dh. Könggi lweddi tyelle nuti teb en, o yëyyi tïge nuti lyeel en, o ógudhe nuti lwøøg en kër-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh rɑ̈dh kì Yerusɑlem gïti kɑ ɑ́dwööge e rum tyɑ̈mø." 
2Samuel19:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Mepiböceth be pɑɑri rɑ̈dh e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem, ɑpyëjii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Mepiböceth, yïde ɑ bɑɑny kedhø kyeel ki yɑn?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Alögge kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn wuö, yɑ bɑ pudh. Bɑ̈ngɑ ɑ́köbbɑ ceth kinni cïbe sïrïj kömi ɑderø, o yɑ di kɑdhɑ köme, o yɑ di kedhɑ bɑngí, de yɑ ɑ́yöd yɑ ceg kɑ twɑnyø yi bɑ̈ngɑni." 
2Samuel19:27 Kɑ yï gönye gøny me pɑth ki dyër, de yï pɑ̈r ki wëywöni Jwøk. Gwøg gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn." 
2Samuel19:28 Gøl wïyɑ bëne myër kɑ nɑ̈gø yi yïn wuö, de yɑ ce ɑ́di nëngø yi yïn ki dhwɑ̈ng me cyɑ̈ɑ̈mɑ kì tɑwí? Dɑ gïjø me cigɑ kwɑjjø kì yïí këti wuö?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Bong gïn di kwøb yi yïn këti, yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni pɑ̈ngi jɑmmi Cɑul yi wuki Dhiibɑ̀.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Kɑ Mepiböceth okööbø kinni, “Wiy ge kwɑny yi Dhiibɑ̀ bënn. Dwööngí ki mër, en ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi yɑn.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Bɑrdhilɑy jɑl Gilyɑd ɑ́bï thyew e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rögelïm, e bï-ɑ be kønyi rɑ̈dh ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑm Urdun." 
2Samuel19:32 Bɑrdhilɑy bɑ jɑl me yöø ki mendwøng, runne wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Ábëëd e kɑ̈rø ki mendwøng, rɑ̈dh ɑ́bëëd gø nyii muujø yi en ki gïgcɑmm keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd rɑ̈dh ying-ɑ Mɑɑ̈nɑim." 
2Samuel19:33 Kɑ köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bïí kedhi wɑ Yerusɑlem, yï ókorri yi yɑn kì kunɑni.”" 
2Samuel19:34 De Bɑrdhilɑy ɑ́löggi kinni, “Á runn ɑ́dï ɑ ótyëg yi yɑn yɑ onëënø, ɑ kedhɑ Yerusɑlem wøki rɑ̈dh?" 
2Samuel19:35 Runnɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, bong gïjø me nëngi yɑn ki medi pyëw këti. Dɑ medi gïncɑm me ngɑ̈nyi yi bɑ̈ngí këti? Dɑ wör mø cigɑ lïngø këti wuö? Rɑ̈dh koo yöd e ceg-ɑ torø yi yɑn?" 
2Samuel19:36 Kööng-ɑ dwøng ni men pɑ døøj. Yï ókɑl yi yɑn ki lwøøgø gïti løøg Nɑm Urdun. 
2Samuel19:37 Orume, kɑ yɑ wiy, o yɑ døøgɑ pɑc, o yɑ thøwɑ kì pɑɑ wøn, o yɑ koony buti rörri wïyɑ geki meyɑ. Kimɑɑm wɑ̈dɑ ókedh ki yïn wuö, óbëëd ɑ́ bɑ̈ngí, kwɑɑny, kɑ̈ɑ̈l wuö, kɑ göggí gïn-ɑ rømmi yi yïn e døøj kipere.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Ókɑ̈l yi yɑn, o gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn kipere göggɑ’ en. O gïn-ɑ cwøl yi yïn göggɑ’ yïn ceth.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Codhe, kɑ Nɑm Urdun bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi Debïd geki jøge bënn. Amɑ̈dhe Bɑrdhilɑy kɑ gø kwënge. Codhe, kɑ Bɑrdhilɑy døøg-ɑ pɑɑre." 
2Samuel19:40 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n Nɑm Urdun yi rɑ̈dh, kí jø Yeudiyɑ̀ geki budi jø Isrɑil, ɑkedhe Gilgɑl, kɑ Kimɑɑm ókedhø ki en." 
2Samuel19:41 Kɑ jø Isrɑil bënn kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Wuö, ede nyiimï wøn jø Isrɑil ɑ rum gen ce bɑ gen ɑ yï gen di dyër, ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n ge yïn nɑm wuki gølí kɑ yï kɑ̈l yi gen?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Alöggi jø Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni, “Wø ɑ́göög kinøw mɑ́ rɑ̈dh bɑ wɑɑd wøn. O pëthi wun rɑ̈mø kɑ per ngø? Bong gïncɑm mɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi rɑ̈dh, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nye ki mëggi wøn.”" 
2Samuel19:43 Kɑ jø Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Wø ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli wun ki tyel pyɑ̈rø. Pɑth ki wøn ɑ ɑ́kwøng kwøbbi dwöögi rɑ̈dh ki kømmø?” Kɑ kwøbbi jø Yeudiyɑ̀ løg-ɑ mø teg kibøli mø jø Isrɑil." 
2Samuel20:1 Ádɑ jɑlgöj me cwøl ɑ́ Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn. Jɑlɑni kɑng ɑ́kodhe, kɑ óryeerø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ yod yi wɑ kì bɑng Debïd! Bong gïn-ɑ ólɑg yi wɑ kì bɑng wɑ̈d Yesì? Isrɑil, kedhí myërrí! Debïd, dööng yï nenn-ɑ gølí!”" 
2Samuel20:2 Kɑ Debïd wiy yi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑløg gen bɑng Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì, de tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ rɑ̈dh ɑ́lwøøg yi gen, cɑg kì kömi Nɑm Urdun gïti Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel20:3 Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ gøle kì Yerusɑlem, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le ɑkwɑnyy-ɑ pyɑ̈rø møg-ɑ ɑ́wiy yi en ge kor-ɑ gøldwøng, kɑ gï cïbe keny me koor gen. Ge ɑ́bëëd kì kenyɑni gïti kɑ ɑ́thøw gen, e rɑ̈dh nuti kedhi ri gen; ge ɑ́thøw gɑ thwömm." 
2Samuel20:4 Kɑ Amɑsɑ̀ köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedh cöllí yɑn jø Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ yï dwöög bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amɑsɑ̀ ɑ́kedhi be cwööli Yeudiyɑ̀, de ɑ́cög e pɑ dwöög kì ri cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Debïd." 
2Samuel20:6 Aköbbi Abicɑy yi Debïd kinni, “Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì, wɑ ómuuje ki göj me lod gööj Abcɑlöm. Tug liny kɑ yï løg bɑnge, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti yïd en ki kɑɑl dörø me yije kedhe kɑ obodhø kì cinggee.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Akedhi bɑnge yi Yöɑb geki liny kyënyì, kí liny tyel, geki pëjji liny bënn, ge ɑ́dhwödh kì Yerusɑlem ge løg-ɑ bɑng Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì." 
2Samuel20:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen buti kïn-ɑ dwøng kì Gibeon, kɑ Amɑsɑ̀ wɑ̈dh-ɑ ì nyɑn kì bøli gen. Yöɑb ɑ́bëëd e rug-ɑ jɑmmi liny, kömi gïn twööj en wëne, o pilø ying-ɑ yij bøje, kɑ pilø bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij bøj kɑ ódëëmø." 
2Samuel20:9 Aköbbi Amɑsɑ̀ yi Yöɑb kinni, “Ómïɑ, dëlí yööd?” Kɑ tïg Amɑsɑ̀ mɑg yi Yöɑb ki cingi kyëje o gø nuume." 
2Samuel20:10 De pilø nuti lidhø yi Amɑsɑ̀ kì cingi Yöɑb. Kɑ cwøb yi Yöɑb kì yije ki pilø, kɑ cïnne røy-ɑ piny, gø nuti jøl en ki cwøbø, codhe kɑ othøø. Kɑ Yöɑb geki Abicɑy ómen jwɑn-ɑ be pïïdi Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì." 
2Samuel20:11 Jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jø Yöɑb ɑ́cungi kì buti Amɑsɑ̀, e óryeerø kinni, “Ngɑn ying tuung Yöɑb, kí ngɑn ying kömi Debïd, løge bɑng Yöɑb!”" 
2Samuel20:12 Amɑsɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e buud-ɑ tøg yöö kì yij reme. Jɑl-ɑ kurø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhe kinni ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈l yöö nyi ceg-ɑ cung kì kenyɑni, ɑkwɑnye Amɑsɑ̀ kì tøg yöö kɑ gø ywɑɑje yij pwödhø me cyɑ̈gi, ɑkume gøn ki ógødh." 
2Samuel20:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Amɑsɑ̀ ki ywɑjø kì tøg yöö, kɑ jøgɑni wɑ̈d-ɑ yöö bënn, ge kedh-ɑ bɑng Yöɑb be pïïdi Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì." 
2Samuel20:14 Cebɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yethi myërri Isrɑil bënn kɑ kedh-ɑ Abel kì Bet Mɑɑkɑ̀, kɑ jø gøl Bikrì ri gen cøng gen bënn, kɑ ge løg-ɑ bɑnge." 
2Samuel20:15 Jø Yöɑb ɑ́kedh, kɑ Abel kì Bet Mɑɑkɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi Cebɑ̀, tyeg yi gen. Kɑ ge othurø ki kɑ̈jj mø nenni wïj dörø, kɑ thɑ dörø kony gen thyew kipe kinni o pɑ̈dhe." 
2Samuel20:16 Kɑ ngɑndhɑjø me wïje pel ócwöddø e ying-ɑ yiny-ɑ kɑɑl kinni, “Lïng wun! Lïng wun! Köbbu Yöɑb bëe keny, o köbbi yi yɑn.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Kɑ Yöɑb kedh-ɑ yïe. Kɑ ngɑnɑni ópëjjø kinni, “Bene yïn Yöɑb?” Kɑ Yöɑb ólöggø kinni, “Bene yɑn!” Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Lïngí møg-ɑ kwøb yi bɑ̈ngí.” Kɑ Yöɑb okööbø kinni, “Yɑ olïngø.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Ábëëd e nyii kømmø kɑ̈ge dööng kinni, ‘Kwøbbí óløøg kì Abel.’ Kɑ møgɑni nyii bëënø gɑ dyër." 
2Samuel20:19 Kɑɑl wøn bɑ kɑɑl me dwøng. O bɑ kɑɑl me mɑɑr mër kì Isrɑil! Yïde ɑ dwɑddí rënyi jɑmm-ɑ bɑ mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?” 
2Samuel20:20 Alöggi Yöɑb kinni, “Bong kwøbbi nɑ̈g, wɑlɑ̀ rënyi kɑɑl kì pyëwɑ!" 
2Samuel20:21 Bong gøn kinni tek! De bɑ jɑl megø kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim, me cwøl ɑ́ Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì, ɑ ɑ́tïnggi cinge Rɑ̈dh Debïd. Mëggu jɑlɑni wøn, e kete. Omuuju en, ji møg ódwøøg yi yɑn.” Kɑ Yöɑb köbbi yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Wïje ólëngi yïn ki wïj dörø.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Akedhi ngɑnɑni yï ji bënn, kɑ gï köbbe møgɑni. Kɑ wïj Cebɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bikrì ngøl, kɑ lëngi Yöɑb ki wïj dörø. Codhe ɑkoodh kɑng yi Yöɑb, kɑ yɑy ópyëdø, ɑdøøg teedø myërri gen. Kɑ Yöɑb døøg-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel20:23 Yöɑb ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi liny Isrɑil bëne, Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi jøg-ɑ kor rɑ̈dh." 
2Samuel20:24 Adönirɑm ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi jøgwøg. Yöcɑpɑt wɑ̈d Akilud ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ 'mïdhi wɑ̈j. 
2Samuel20:25 Cebɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ sikriter. O Dhɑdök geki Abiyɑthɑr ɑ́bëëd gɑ ókwër. 
2Samuel20:26 Irɑ̀ jɑl Yɑir ɑ́bëëd thyew ɑ́ ókwëri Debïd kì gøldwøng. 
2Samuel21:1 Ádɑ kɑ̈j mɑ ɑ́mɑ̈gi kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Debïd, kɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn ɑ́dɑ̈g ge lwøb-ɑ ri gen. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëj yi Debïd. Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bɑ cyënni ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Cɑul geki gøle. Dɑ tyëng Gibeon mɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi en.”" 
2Samuel21:2 (Tyëng Gibeon pɑth ki gøl Isrɑil, de ge bɑ ɑ́kyëll-ɑ ɑ́döng kì ri tyëng Amör, tyëng Isrɑil rum köngø kinni gï ówiy yi gen ge pɑ nɑ̈g. De Cɑul ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ tɑ̈ɑ̈yi wɑ̈thi gen piny, mɑ́ e tyiel-ɑ per Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀.)" 
2Samuel21:3 Kɑ tyëng Gibeon pyëj yi Debïd kinni, “Gwøgɑ ngø kiper wun? Wu ógedh kɑ ngø? O jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwëng yi wun?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Kɑ tyëng Gibeon ólöggø kinni, “Bong ɑ́tegø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑb me dwɑddi yi wøn kì yï Cɑul geki gøle. O bong dhɑnhi kɑl megø me nywɑl yi wøn kì Isrɑil.” Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Gïn-ɑ kwøb yi wun, ógöggɑ wun.”" 
2Samuel21:5 Codhe, ɑköbbi rɑ̈dh yi gen kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g wøn, ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi tɑ̈ɑ̈yi wɑ̈thi wøn piny kipe kinni o di bëëd e bong kej wøn kì Isrɑil," 
2Samuel21:6 thödhu wøn ki wɑ̈ddi gøle ɑ́bïryew, o ge ngɑb yi wøn, kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì Gibeɑ̀ kɑɑl Cɑul rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Ge ómëggɑ wun.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Rɑ̈dh Mepiböceth wɑ̈d Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑul ɑ́wiy yi en, kipe köng-ɑ ɑ́köngi yi Yönɑthɑn geki Debïd kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel21:8 Kɑ rɑ̈dh kwɑny-ɑ Armönì geki Mepiböceth wɑ̈ddi Ridhpɑ̀ nyɑɑr Aiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́nyölle Cɑul. Kí wɑ̈ddi Merɑb nyɑɑr Cɑul gɑ ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ɑ́nyölle Adriel wɑ̈d Bɑrdhilɑy, jɑl Mekölɑ̀." 
2Samuel21:9 Kɑ gï mëgge tyëng Gibeon. Angɑɑb gen kì wïj kït kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ɑ́thøw gɑ ɑ́bïryew bënn wïj ɑ́kyel. Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ ri cɑ̈gi ceir ki nyɑrø." 
2Samuel21:10 Codhe, kɑ Ridhpɑ̀ nyɑɑr Aiyɑ̀ ókɑ̈bbø ki ocwɑ̈lø, kɑ gø gwøøge ɑkɑnø kì wïj kït, kɑ pëgg-ɑ kenyɑni be kori ji, cɑg kì ri cɑ̈gi nyɑri ceir gïti kɑ ɑ́dëëm kødh, ji nuti wëg en cɑmø yi winy kì dicɑ̈ng, wɑlɑ̀ yi lɑ̈yy kì wɑ̈r." 
2Samuel21:11 Debïd óköbbi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Ridhpɑ̀ nyɑɑr Aiyɑ̀ ɑkwɑɑny Cɑul. 
2Samuel21:12 Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ be dwɑɑyi cu Cɑul geki cu Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑul kì yï tyëng Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑl gen kì ri döri Betcɑn, kun-ɑ ɑ́ngɑɑb gen yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g gen Cɑul geki Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈de kì wïj Kïti Gilboɑ̀." 
2Samuel21:13 Cu Cɑul geki cu Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈de ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi en kì kenyɑni, kɑ cu jøg-ɑ ɑ́ngɑb thyew gɑ ɑ́bïryew cønge." 
2Samuel21:14 Codhe, kɑ cu Cɑul kí cu Yönɑthɑn kony kì keny-ɑ ɑ́koony Kïc wïyi Cɑul, kì Dhelɑ̀, kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi rɑ̈dh bënn ki gwøgø, ɑløøg kwɑ̈jji pödhø cyee yi Jwøk." 
2Samuel21:15 Kɑ Isrɑil cig-ɑ këddø ki Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ Debïd kí jøge kedh-ɑ be linyɑni, ɑnyïɑ̈ggi gen ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Kɑ Debïd ódhɑ̈rø yi liny." 
2Samuel21:16 Kɑ jöd ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Rɑpɑ̀ me cwøl ɑ́ Icbibenöb me kɑ̈lli tøng me dwøng, me peg; pege bɑ kïllì ɑ́dɑ̈g ki budi kïlø; o ókɑ̈ddø ki pilø me nyɑ̈n, orumø ce Debïd nɑ̈ge’ nɑ̈gø." 
2Samuel21:17 De Abicɑy wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀, Debïd ɑ́kønye, kɑ jönɑni nɑ̈ge. Aköbbi Debïd yi jøge kinni, “Köngí kinni yï pɑ kedhi be liny kyeel ki wøn këti, kipe mɑɑc Isrɑil óthøw.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Kì bɑng linyɑni, kɑ liny megø otugø kì kɑɑm tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil kì Göb. Bene yij linyɑni ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g jöd me cwøl ɑ́ Sɑp yi Sibekɑy jɑl Ucɑ̀." 
2Samuel21:19 Kɑ liny megø cig-ɑ tugø kì Göb, ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g Gölyɑth jɑl Gɑth, jɑl-ɑ bööl ɑkebïdhe ni leg, ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yi Elɑɑnɑn wɑ̈d Yɑir jɑl Betleem." 
2Samuel21:20 Liny megø ɑ́cigi tuumø kì Gɑth, linyɑni ɑ yije ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g jöd me mɑɑr liny. Jönɑni lweddi cingge bɑ ɑ́bïkyel kí ɑ́bïkyel, o lweddi tyelle bɑ ɑ́bïkyel kí ɑ́bïkyel, lweddi tyelle kí lweddi cingge bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen." 
2Samuel21:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lɑre Isrɑil, kɑ nɑ̈g yi Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑmɑ̀ ómï Debïd." 
2Samuel21:22 Jöddɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen bɑ wɑ̈ddi Rɑpɑ̀ ki Gɑth, ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yi Debïd geki jøge." 
2Samuel22:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cingi Cɑul geki cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑwöre e lenh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör møg:" 
2Samuel22:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ kor yɑn, bene dörɑ dör-ɑ teg," 
2Samuel22:3 Jwøgɑ bene en ɑ kor yɑn, keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ bute, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́nywɑl yɑn. Yɑ gëngge’ gënggø ni kwöd, ónyïɑ̈ggø kiperɑ, bong gïn nywɑl yɑn, Bɑ yïënɑ, Yɑ korre’ korrø, kɑ yɑ nyi yiele ki rɑj bënn." 
2Samuel22:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyinge ɑ́cwølɑ kɑ yɑ yiel yi en, kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ lenhɑ ki mendwøng!" 
2Samuel22:5 Yɑ ɑ́wen yi ngwölli thøø, ngwölli ryɑ̈g ri gen ɑ́bɑɑb gen kömɑ." 
2Samuel22:6 Böögi thøø yɑ wen en, rörø ying-ɑ bølɑ ni ɑ́kɑ̈llì." 
2Samuel22:7 Nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cwølɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́tyeeg yɑn yi ɑkørr, Jwøgɑ ɑ́cwølɑ o yɑ yiel yi en. Cwɑggɑ ɑ́lïnge kì Kenge, ywøgɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yïthhe." 
2Samuel22:8 Codhe, kɑ piny okïrrø kɑ onhɑ̈nhø, tyelli mɑl ɑ́kïïr kɑ ge okennø, mɑ́ Jwøk pyëwe ɑ́rënyi!" 
2Samuel22:9 Yïrø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l órømme, kɑ mɑc me rɑ̈bi kí cug mø lyel kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhøge." 
2Samuel22:10 Mɑl ɑ́pyëde kɑ bï-ɑ piny, kí pøølø me looj kì thɑ́ tyelle." 
2Samuel22:11 Ápɑ̈rri e ying-ɑ kömi kerob, ɑ́lidh e ying-ɑ wɑ̈thi obërri yømø." 
2Samuel22:12 Ree ɑ́kume ki muudhø, ɑ́wen yi pøøl mø looj mø ri gen di pï." 
2Samuel22:13 Cug ɑ́ceg ì pɑ̈b ki mɑc kì ri cɑr-ɑ mëënyø kì bøle. 
2Samuel22:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́mɑ̈r kì mɑl, cwɑggi Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng ɑ́lïngi." 
2Samuel22:15 Ágöjji ki wethe kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø cyedde, mɑ̈re ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈d kì kömi gen kɑ ge ceg-ɑ ì dïr ki ngwej." 
2Samuel22:16 Tyeli nɑɑm omelø ɑ́döng ɑ́ tɑngdɑr, kɑ tyelli piny ri gen yɑl gen keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈r tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi gen ki liny." 
2Samuel22:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge ɑ́rïïje piny kɑ yɑ mɑge, yɑ ɑ́tëële wɑ̈g kì yethi pï mø ngenyø." 
2Samuel22:18 Yɑ ɑ́yiele kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg teg, geki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn bënn, ge ɑ́bëëd ge teeg cɑrø kibølɑ." 
2Samuel22:19 Ge ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́di kömɑ ɑkørr, de yɑ ɑ́kor yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel22:20 Yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì yethi rɑj, yɑ ɑ́yiele, mɑ́ pyëwe med ki yɑn." 
2Samuel22:21 Yɑ ɑ́køøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́gøgg-ɑ dyër, yɑ ɑ́gyëdhe mɑ́ yïɑ bɑ̈r." 
2Samuel22:22 Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́mïdhɑ, ngɑ̈jɑ nuti lugi yɑn Jwøgɑ" 
2Samuel22:23 Cigge ɑ́mïdhɑ bënn, cigge nuti pyeem yɑn." 
2Samuel22:24 Ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni bong gïn-ɑ ɑ́bɑj yi yɑn, ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ lɑ̈wi ki orøg." 
2Samuel22:25 A bɑnge køøge yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́gøgg-ɑ dyër, mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi en kinni yïɑ bɑ̈r." 
2Samuel22:26 Tyëng-ɑ lïngi kwøbbí omïdhø yi yïn Wuö, o tyëng-ɑ bëëdi gen døøj, okorø yi yïn kidøøj." 
2Samuel22:27 Ngɑntir nyi göggií gïgtir, ngeti ɑ́wenɑwenø nyii wenø yi yïn." 
2Samuel22:28 Tyëng-ɑ mööl nyii yielø yi yïn, kɑ tyëng-ɑ tɑ̈dø nyi dwøøg cyɑ̈n." 
2Samuel22:29 Yï bɑ cɑrɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, muudhɑ nyi løgí cɑr." 
2Samuel22:30 Ki tegí, yɑ ócuggø pödhi kömi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, dörri tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø cøørɑ’ piny ki tegi Jwøgɑ!" 
2Samuel22:31 Yuu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ óbödh. Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tir. Bɑ kwöd kì yï tyëng-ɑ nyi yömmi yïe. 
2Samuel22:32 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete ɑ bɑ Jwøk. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete ɑ nyi nyïɑ̈ggi kiperee. 
2Samuel22:33 Jwøøng bene keny teg, ɑ yije yömmɑ, yëthɑ nyi gwøge’ gwøgø gɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ bong böögø." 
2Samuel22:34 Tyellɑ nyi løge’ mø teg ni tyelli ɑ́køny, yɑ nyi løge’ me cuggi cung kì wɑ̈thi ótøng." 
2Samuel22:35 Yɑ nyi pwönye’ pwönyø ki liny. Kɑ wenh teg nyi lwɑ̈ngɑ ki gøjø. 
2Samuel22:36 Wuö, yɑ nyii korø yi yïn, kɑ yɑ yiel yi yïn, perɑ ɑ́tëngi kì bɑng kunyí." 
2Samuel22:37 Yɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n yi yïn mɑgø, o yɑ nuti pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
2Samuel22:38 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn nyi cyeddɑ’ cyeddø, kɑ ge tyɑmɑ. Yɑ pɑ nyi wïyi ki cyëddø gïti kenyi nɑ̈gɑ gen." 
2Samuel22:39 Ge ɑ́pwöödɑ piny; ge pɑ cuggi dhwödhø; ge buud-ɑ thɑ́ tyellɑ gɑ ɑtyɑm," 
2Samuel22:40 Kɑ yɑ thödhi yi yïn ki tegø me nyïɑ̈ggɑ ki liny, tegø me tyɑɑmɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn." 
2Samuel22:41 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́göjjí rïngø kì yïɑ, tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ." 
2Samuel22:42 Ge oyɑ̈bø ki kønyø, de bong ngɑn yiel gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ocwøllø yi gen, de pɑ löggi." 
2Samuel22:43 Ge ɑ́mødɑ kɑ ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki tør. Ge ɑ́nyønɑ ni lɑ̈bø kì yethi yëëth. 
2Samuel22:44 Yɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn ki ji-ɑ ɑ́tïnggi cinggi gen yɑn, kɑ jurrì jɑɑg yi yɑn, ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge kwïjɑ, ɑ́göög ki møg jɑɑg yi yɑn." 
2Samuel22:45 Jurr-ɑ kyeelø kull-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen kì piny kì bølɑ, kenyi lïngi gen kwøbbɑ, gï pɑ nyi pyem yi gen." 
2Samuel22:46 Ge nyii bwøgø kɑ ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g, kì yethi dörri gen dëlli gen okïrrø." 
2Samuel22:47 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ Nëënø! Ngɑn-ɑ nyi yiel yɑn lenhɑ’ lenhø! Wøwu döngi Jwøng teg, Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́yiel yɑn!" 
2Samuel22:48 Yɑ ɑ́thödhe ki tegø me tyɑɑmɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, jurrì ɑ́dwööge thɑ́ ciggɑ," 
2Samuel22:49 kɑ yɑ yiele kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn. Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́thödhí ki tegø me tyɑɑmɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn, kɑ yɑ kor yi yïn ki jøg-ɑ mudø ki ji." 
2Samuel22:50 Alejjɑ yïn kì kelli jurrì, yɑ wör yɑ lenh-ɑ yïn." 
2Samuel22:51 Jwøk rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́rønye ɑ́mëgge tyɑ̈mø ki mendwøng, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yienye ɑ́mɑɑre ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me pɑ lwënyi. Debïd ɑ mɑɑr yi en geki kwɑrre gïti ɑtheer." 
2Samuel23:1 Debïd wɑ̈d Yesì bene jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk e dwøng; ɑ́yieny yi Jwøøg Yɑgob ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, o ɑ́bëëd thyew ɑ́ ɑcɑ̈ɑ̈g wör mø myër kì Isrɑil. Møg bene gen cyɑ̈ɑ̈n kwøbbi Debïd:" 
2Samuel23:2 Wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kì riɑ, wööne ying-ɑ dhøgɑ" 
2Samuel23:3 Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kööb; ngɑn-ɑ kor Isrɑil yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Rɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø e gøgg-ɑ dyër, ɑ jyɑ̈gø e wør-ɑ Jwøk," 
2Samuel23:4 pɑ̈r ki yeeri cɑ̈ng kì mwøl, e bong pøøl kì mɑl, cɑ̈ng ɑ nyi wëggi lum omɑ̈l, kɑ̀ cer kødh mɑ̈gø.”" 
2Samuel23:5 Bene kër-ɑ ógyëëdh kwɑrrɑ yi Jwøk, mɑ́ kɑɑm wøn ɑ́cïbi wøn ki lwöbø wøki Jwøk gïti ɑtheer, lwöbø me pɑ pɑ̈d, kwöng me pɑ wil. Bene codhi gïn-ɑ tyer yi yɑn menɑni ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ tyɑ̈mɑ, o møgɑni ómuuj yi Jwøk ceth." 
2Samuel23:6 De jøg-ɑ yï gen bong jwøg nɑ koodh ɑ nyi weddi pɑ̈l, bong ngɑn nywɑl gen ki cinge," 
2Samuel23:7 ngɑn nywɑl gen nywɑ̈ddi kɑ keer kí dikøg; ge órɑ̈bbi kì kenyɑni ceth! 
2Samuel23:8 Nyingi pëjji liny Debïd ek: Jɑl-ɑ mɑl bɑ Yöceeb Bɑscebeth wɑ̈d gøl Tɑkemön, en ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki ji miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kɑ gï nɑ̈ge, gï cöbe’ cöbø ki ɑkebïdhe." 
2Samuel23:9 Ryeew gen bɑ Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d Dödö kì gøl Ákö. Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ mø cøng ri gen kipe liny ɑ́tøøny yi en geki Debïd. Kɑ Isrɑil nyɑɑny cyɑ̈n 
2Samuel23:10 de nuti nyegø kì keje. Ányïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ gï pwööde piny ki pile, kɑ cinge tööd-ɑ ri pilø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mendwøng dicyɑ̈ngɑni. Codhe, ɑdwöög yɑy keny-ɑ di Eliɑdhɑr, de ge ɑ́dwöög-ɑ be kwɑnyi pilli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yøw." 
2Samuel23:11 Dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bɑ Cɑmɑ̀ wɑ̈d Ageè jɑl Arɑr. Jø Pelistiyɑ̀ ri gen ɑ́cøng gen Lekì, kì keny mɑ ɑ́di pwödhi ngöör. Kɑ Isrɑil cyeddi yi Pelistiyɑ̀," 
2Samuel23:12 de Cɑmɑ̀ ɑ́cungi kì yij pwönhɑni e nyɑg-ɑ per pwödhø, kɑ jø Pelistiyɑ̀ nɑ̈ge. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mendwøng dicyɑ̈ngɑni." 
2Samuel23:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi kɑj ki byel, kɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ mɑl kì wɑ̈thi pëjji pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kedh-ɑ Adulɑm kun-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi Debïd, kì bøli kenyɑni ɑ́dɑ kɑɑl Pelistiyɑ̀ kì Töör Repɑim." 
2Samuel23:14 Debïd ɑ́bëëd ɑ wïj kït mɑ gël, kɑ Betleem mɑg yi ɑkuud Pelistiyɑ̀." 
2Samuel23:15 Kɑ Debïd nɑ̈g yi rummi pɑc, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ce di bëëd e dɑ ngɑn muuj yɑn ki pï mø mɑdh yi yɑn kì yij yiinh-ɑ dhø döri Betleem!”" 
2Samuel23:16 Kɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ mɑl kì kelli pëjjì, yuu gen nyɑny gen ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ kɑɑl Pelistiyɑ̀, ɑtömi gen ki pï kì yij yiinhɑni, ɑmuuj gen pïgɑni Debïd. De pïgɑni nuti mɑɑdh en, pï ɑ́yöd gï kunye’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gëëdhi," 
2Samuel23:17 ɑkööbe kinni, “Wuö, pïg pɑ cuggi mɑdhø yi yɑn! Óni remmi jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ mɑɑdh yɑn, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bøy-ɑ thøø!” Codhe, ɑcöge gï pɑ mɑdhe. Bene gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jöddi liny, yɑɑg ɑ́dɑ̈g møg pɑ nyi böggi ɑgɑk." 
2Samuel23:18 Abicɑy ómï Yöɑb (ɑ meyi gen cwøl ɑ́ Dheruyɑ̀) ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pëëji, ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kɑ gï nɑ̈ge bënn, ɑkwɑɑnii kelli jöddi liny pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi kì yij pödhø." 
2Samuel23:19 En ɑ ti ki ngɑ̈nyø kì kelli jöddɑni gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, de nyinge nuti ti pödhi mɑl ni nyingi ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ mɑl." 
2Samuel23:20 Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀, jɑl Kɑbdhiil ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl-liny me pere nud, pɑ nyi böggi, o ɑ́göög ki gïg teg mø ngenyø. Kí nɑ̈gi jöddi liny Moɑb ɑ́ryew. Ákedhi yij ød ngur cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel e piny pɑ̈ng yi ɑ́piy, kɑ ngurɑni nɑ̈ge." 
2Samuel23:21 Jööd Rïp me ngëde dwøng, me cinge di ɑkebïdh gø ɑ́nɑ̈ge thyew. Benɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́kedhi yïe kɑ lodh, ɑgwɑre ɑkebïdh ki yï jööd Rïp, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge ki tøngɑni." 
2Samuel23:22 Benɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jödd-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, o bene gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en ɑgɑk." 
2Samuel23:23 Ábëëd nyinge ying-ɑ mɑl kì kelli gen, de nyinge nuti ti pödhi mɑl ni nyingi ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ mɑl. Ácïb yi Debïd ɑ́ jɑngi jøg-ɑ korrii." 
2Samuel24:1 Kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cig-ɑ rënyø ki Isrɑil, ɑwëgge Debïd kɑ̈ni kömi tyëng Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ ki göj, kɑ Debïd köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh, kwɑn tyëng Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Kɑ Yöɑb jɑngi pëjji liny köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedhí yethi myërri Isrɑil, cɑg kì Dɑn gïti Bircebɑ̀, kɑ ji kwɑɑn, o kwɑnni gen yod yi yɑn.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Aløøg kwøbbi rɑ̈dh yi Yöɑb kinni, “Jií ómed yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyel miyø, o yï ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti keny-ɑ óliidh møgɑni wuö! Á kipe ngø ɑ dwɑddí gwøgi gïn ni men?”" 
2Samuel24:4 De Yöɑb ɑ́cir yi rɑ̈dh geki pëjji liny, codhe ɑdhwödh gen kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be kwɑni tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Samuel24:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki bɑ̈ɑ̈ni Nɑm Urdun, ɑguddi gen buti Aröeer ki kemmi gen, kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì yij bɑ̈j. Kɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ kö Gɑd geki Yɑdher." 
2Samuel24:6 Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Gilyɑd geki piny Tɑɑtïm Kodcïm, kí Dɑn, kɑ ge wïnn-ɑ Sïdön." 
2Samuel24:7 Ge ɑ́kedhi kɑɑl döri Suur, kí myërri tyëng Kib, kí myërri tyëng Kɑnɑɑn. Kì cyɑ̈n cyee, ɑkedhi gen Bircebɑ̀ kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Samuel24:8 Kɑ piny tyëg gen ki cɑɑdhø kì bɑng dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïngwen kí cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Codhe, ɑdwöög gen Yerusɑlem." 
2Samuel24:9 Kɑ wɑ̈nyi kwɑnni ji mëggi rɑ̈dh yi Yöɑb. Kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cuggi nyïɑ̈ggø ki pil, bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì Isrɑil, kí ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïj kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Samuel24:10 Debïd ree ɑ́cɑye keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwɑnyi wɑ̈nyi kwɑnni ji. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́røngi ki mendwøng ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn, yɑn ɑ bɑ̈ngí, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́göög-ɑ nøgi wïjɑ.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Kɑ Gɑd, jɑltööng Debïd köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh, köbbí Debïd kinni, yï mëggɑ’ jɑmmì ɑ́dɑ̈g, o yï kɑ̈bbí kì kelli gen. Gïn-ɑ kwɑny yi yïn ɑ göggɑ yïn.” Dhuki kì mwøl keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki dhwödhi mɑl," 
2Samuel24:12  
2Samuel24:13 ɑkedhi Gɑd yïe, kɑ gø köbbe møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gø ɑ́pyëje kinni, “Á ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn o bëe? Mɑ̈gi kɑ̈j ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kì piny? Wɑlɑ̀ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g, yï ocyeddø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø? Wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g e yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g onɑ̈gø ji kì pinyí? Jwɑn rumø ɑnɑn, kɑ yɑ köbbí lögg-ɑ muujɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́dhing yi møgɑni! De yɑ pɑ dwɑddi pɑ̈dhi cingi dhɑnhø. Wiy yɑ pɑ̈dhɑ cingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree, mɑ lɑ̈mpyëwe pɑ nyi thumi.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Codhe, ɑör yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ɑ́cɑ̈gi kì mwølɑni gïti bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi en. Kɑ yømɑni tɑɑy-ɑ yij pödhø bëne, cɑg kì tuung gïti tung-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ onɑ̈gø ki jøg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew." 
2Samuel24:16 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ nɑ̈gø cinge rïïje kömi Yerusɑlem o gø di nɑ̈ge, de Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki ji, ɑkyëdde wëywön-ɑ nɑ̈gø kinni, “Cungí! Árum! Dwøøg cingí piny!” Kì bøli kenyɑni wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ying-ɑ yij rɑri pwödhi Arɑunɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yebus." 
2Samuel24:17 Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe wëywön-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g ji, ɑköbbe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́røngi; yɑn ɑ ɑ́göög ki bɑ̈jjø. Ji møg ɑ́wɑ̈dh-ɑ løg bɑngɑ yøw ni kenyi lugi dyëg-ɑ römm. Bong bɑ̈jjø mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen. Cɑy yɑn wøki gølɑ.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Kɑ Gɑd bï-ɑ yï Debïd kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kedh, kɑ Wë gëddí ki këli lɑm kì yij rɑri pwödhi Arɑunɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yebus.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Codhe, ɑkedhi Debïd be gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Gɑd ni møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Samuel24:20 Kɑ Arɑunɑ̀ wïje tïnge, ɑlidhe rɑ̈dh geki bɑ̈ngge ge bï-ɑ yïe. Codhe, ɑkedh Arɑunɑ̀ kɑ rɑ̈dh mɑle ree bøødhe’ piny." 
2Samuel24:21 Kɑ Arɑunɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø, ɑ bëën wɑ̈ɑ rɑ̈dh yïɑ?” Alöggi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be ngewi rɑri pwödhí, o yije gëddɑ ki këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yøm-ɑ nɑ̈gø cunge.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi Arɑunɑ̀ kinni, “Wuö rɑ̈dhɑ, kwɑny gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn kipe këli lɑm. Wɑ̈dhh ek møg nɑ̈g gɑ gëdhhì. O lëggi cøg ki byel ek, geki ɑcebbi gen, kwɑny gen gɑ yugg." 
2Samuel24:23 Jɑmmɑni bënn ɑ́mëggɑ yïn, rɑ̈dhɑ.” Kɑ Arɑunɑ̀ rɑ̈dh köbbe thyew kinni, “Wiy kwɑ̈jjí yïëy yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki medi pyëwe.”" 
2Samuel24:24 De kwøbbi Arɑunɑ̀ ɑ́løøg yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Pɑth, yï ócuddɑ kipe piny. Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ cuggi mëggi gïg nuti ngeew yɑn ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne.” Codhe, kɑ rɑrø geki wɑ̈dhh ngew yi Debïd ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
2Samuel24:25 Codhe, ɑgëdde Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki këli lɑm, kɑ ongɑ̈dø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, geki keni mër. Kɑ kwɑ̈jje løøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yøm-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Isrɑil ócungø." 
1Kings1:1 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd oyöø ki mendwøng, dële pɑ nyi lënhi kenyi kumii ki ógudh." 
1Kings1:2 Kɑ köbbi yi bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Wuö, wiy yï yɑ̈bbi yi wøn ki nyɑndhɑjø me bëëdø ki yïn, o nyi buude kì butí, o dëlí nyi murre.”" 
1Kings1:3 Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yethi myërri Isrɑil be yɑb ki nyɑndhɑjø me myëër. Ayod gen nyɑn me cwøl ɑ́ Abicɑg kì Cunem, kɑ gø muuj gen rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings1:4 Nyɑnɑni myëër cɑrø. Kɑ pëgg-ɑ be kɑ̈lli rɑ̈dh. Dëël rɑ̈dh nyii murrø yi en de gø nuti gwøøg en dhɑjø. 
1Kings1:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Abcɑlöm ki thøø, kɑ Adöniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Agith ree tïnge cem ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Kɑ ree gögge ki yɑ̈y, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki kyënyì mø pyejji yɑ̈yɑni, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj møg rïngi kì bøle." 
1Kings1:6 Nuti pɑ̈nyø cyɑ̈rø yi wïye cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kinni, “Yïde ɑ göög kinøw!” Ábëëd bøle myëër thyew, o bɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Abcɑlöm." 
1Kings1:7 Adöniyɑ̀ kwøb ɑ́nywɑg yi en kɑ Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀, kí ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr." 
1Kings1:8 De ókwërø Dhɑdök, kí Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀, kí Nɑthɑn jɑltöng, kí Cimeì, kí Reì, kí jøg-ɑ kor Rɑ̈dh Debïd; kwøbbi Adöniyɑ̀ nuti yïëëy gen." 
1Kings1:9 Kɑ Adöniyɑ̀ ongɑ̈dø cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel ki dhög kí dyëg, kí røjj-ɑ cwiy gɑ gëdhhì, kì kömi nyɑ Kïti Dhökel kì buti Enrögel. Kɑ wɑ̈ddi rɑ̈dh ryeje bënn geki jø Yeudiyɑ̀." 
1Kings1:10 De Nɑthɑn jɑltöng, kí Benɑiyɑ̀, kí jøg-ɑ kor rɑ̈dh geki Sølømøn nuti cwøøl en." 
1Kings1:11 Codhe, ɑköbbi Bɑtcebɑ̀ meyi Sølømøn yi Nɑthɑn kinni, “Yï nuti lïngø kinni i Adöniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Agith göögø ki rɑ̈dh e Debïd wïye kwïj wøw!" 
1Kings1:12 Gïn-ɑ köbbɑ yïn bɑ kinni keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ yieli wëyí geki wëyi Sølømøn wɑ̈dí," 
1Kings1:13 jwɑn kedhi yï Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑnɑn ceth, kɑ pyëëj kinni, ‘Yɑ nuti köbbø yi yïn wuö, kinni wɑ̈dɑ Sølømøn, bɑ en ɑ ójɑ̈ggi ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì bɑngí? Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ göög Adöniyɑ̀ ki rɑ̈dh?’" 
1Kings1:14 O kɑ̈ng-ɑ ónudd wu okööbø ki rɑ̈dh, yɑ óbï, o nyudhɑ kinni yï kømm-ɑ dyër.”" 
1Kings1:15 Codhe, kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ kedh-ɑ ød yï rɑ̈dh. Rɑ̈dh yöø ki mendwøng, o okɑ̈llø yi Abicɑg nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Cunem." 
1Kings1:16 Kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ ree bøødhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh mɑle. Apyëjii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yï dwɑdd-ɑ ngø?”" 
1Kings1:17 Alögge kinni, “Wuö, yɑ nuti köbbø yi yïn kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dɑ Sølømøn bɑ en ɑ ójɑ̈ggi ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì bɑngɑ!’ Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi yïn, kɑ yï óköngø ki nyingi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni ge ómïdhi yi yïn ceth." 
1Kings1:18 De liidh ɑnɑn, Adöniyɑ̀ ree ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, yï kwïj wøw." 
1Kings1:19 Ángɑ̈ɑ̈d ki dhög mø gïïr, kí røjj-ɑ cwiy kí dyëg gɑ gëdhhì, kɑ wɑ̈ddi rɑ̈dh ryeje bënn, geki ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr, kí Yöɑb pënyi liny, de bɑ̈ngí Sølømøn nuti ryeej en." 
1Kings1:20 O ɑnɑn wuö rɑ̈dh, Isrɑil bëne nenn-ɑ yïí, o ge köbbi yi yïn ki ngɑn-ɑ ópëggi wïj kwøm kì bɑngí." 
1Kings1:21 Ke pɑ löggí, kɑ rɑ̈dh kɑ̈l yi Jwøk, wø ókwɑny wøn ɑ́ tyëngrijjø wøki Sølømøn wɑ̈dɑ.”" 
1Kings1:22 Kɑ pïïd e nudd e okööbø geki rɑ̈dh yi Nɑthɑn jɑltöng. 
1Kings1:23 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbe kinni “Nɑthɑn jɑltöng ɑ́wɑ̈nhi.” Kɑ Nɑthɑn kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑbøødhe ree, kɑ rɑ̈dh mɑle." 
1Kings1:24 Akööb Nɑthɑn kinni, “Wuö, yï ɑ́di kwøb kinni Adöniyɑ̀ bɑ en ɑ ójɑ̈ggi kì bɑngí?" 
1Kings1:25 Adöniyɑ̀ ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈d dicyɑ̈ngtïn ki dhög mø gïïr, kí røjj-ɑ cwiy, kí dyëg, kɑ wɑ̈ddí møg-ɑ kyeelø ryeje bënn, geki pëjji liny kí ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr. Ge ceg-ɑ cɑm geki Adöniyɑ̀ ɑnɑn. Ge okööbø kinni, ‘Rɑ̈dh Adöniyɑ̀ ómïdhi yi Jwøk!’" 
1Kings1:26 De yɑ nuti ryeej en, yɑn ɑ bɑ̈ngí. O ókwërø Dhɑdök, kí Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀, o wɑ̈dí Sølømøn nuti ryeej en thyew." 
1Kings1:27 Møgɑni ɑ́yïëy yi yïn, e bɑ̈nggí nuti köbbi yïn ngɑn-ɑ ójɑ̈ggi kì bɑngí?”" 
1Kings1:28 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd okööbø kinni, “Cöllí yɑn Bɑtcebɑ̀.” Kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ bï-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, kɑ ócungø kì bøle." 
1Kings1:29 Kɑ rɑ̈dh óköngø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel wëyɑ kì yethi rɑj bënn." 
1Kings1:30 Yï ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi yɑn kì bøli Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni wɑ̈dí Sølømøn bɑ en ɑ ójɑ̈ggi kì bɑngɑ, o bɑ en ɑ pëggi wïj kwømɑ ceth dicyɑ̈ngtïn!”" 
1Kings1:31 Kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ ree bøødhe piny, kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbe kinni, “Wɑ̈ɑ ómïdhi yi Jwøk gïti ɑtheer.”" 
1Kings1:32 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Cöllu yɑn ókwërø Dhɑdök, geki Nɑthɑn jɑltöng, kí Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀.” Codhe, kɑ ge bï-ɑ bøli rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings1:33 Kɑ ge köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Cwølu bɑ̈nggɑ, jø tøg burø, kɑ Sølømøn wɑ̈dɑ cïb wun kömi ógɑlø miɑ, kɑ kïdhu kömi wɑɑng pï kì Gekön." 
1Kings1:34 Kɑ wïje kunyi ki møw e røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil yi Dhɑdök geki Nɑthɑn. Kɑ kɑng kodh wun, kɑ wu ryeer wun kinni, ‘Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ómïdhi yi Jwøk!’" 
1Kings1:35 Kɑ wu bï wun wu ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑnge keny-ɑ óbëëne be pëggi wïj kwømɑ kì keny. En ɑ jɑ̈ggi kì kejɑ, mɑ́ en ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn ɑ́ jɑngi Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀.”" 
1Kings1:36 Kɑ Benɑiyɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “Møgɑni ógwøg ceth. O ge óyïëy yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
1Kings1:37 Sølømøn ókorri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni korr-ɑ ɑ́korre yïn wuö, kɑ kwøme ódøngø kibøli kwømí.”" 
1Kings1:38 Codhe, kɑ Sølømøn kwɑny yi ókwërø Dhɑdök geki Nɑthɑn jɑltöng, kí Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀, kí bölidhh. Kɑ gø cïb gen kömi ógɑli rɑ̈dh, ɑkïdhi ge gøn kömi wɑɑng pï kì Gekön." 
1Kings1:39 Kɑ ókwërø Dhɑdök okɑ̈dø ki tuung møw kì yij Kemi Kwër. Kɑ møw kønye wïj Sølømøn gø rønye’ rønyø ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Kɑ kɑng kodh. Kɑ teedø bëne óryeerø kinni, “Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ómïdhi yi Jwøk!”" 
1Kings1:40 Ge ɑ́ryeer yi medi pëthi gen, kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø yi cwɑggi gen." 
1Kings1:41 Kɑ ywøøg kɑng lïngi yi Adöniyɑ̀ geki jøg-ɑ ɑ́ryej yi en bënn, kedh ge ceg-ɑ rumø ki cɑm. Kɑ Yöɑb ópëjjø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge ywøøg kɑng, kinni, “Awøw-ɑ wøw ji kì kɑɑl wɑng-ɑ ngø?”" 
1Kings1:42 Kɑ Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr ówɑ̈nhø, e Yöɑb nudd e okööbø. Akööb Adöniyɑ̀ kinni, “Bïí, ɑdhwɑ̈ng! Yï óbëëd yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöödø me med.”" 
1Kings1:43 Kɑ Adöniyɑ̀ köbbi yi Yönɑthɑn kinni, “Bong wöödø me med. Sølømøn ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ rɑ̈dh yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
1Kings1:44 Ókwërø Dhɑdök geki Nɑthɑn jɑltöng, kí Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ geki bölidhh ɑ́öre, kɑ Sølømøn cïb kömi ógɑli rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings1:45 Kɑ wïje kunyi ki møw yi ókwërø Dhɑdök geki Nɑthɑn jɑltöng kì kömi wɑɑng pï kì Gekön. Adwöög gen kì kunɑni pëthi gen omedø, kɑ kɑɑl ceg-ɑ dhwödhø bëne. Bene ɑwøwɑni ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun." 
1Kings1:46 Sølømøn ɑ́rum ki pëggi wïj kwøøm rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. 
1Kings1:47 Bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh ɑ́bï be pwøji Rɑ̈dh Debïd ge okööbø kinni, ‘Nyingi Sølømøn ótïng mɑl yi Jwøgí kibøli nyingí, kɑ kwøme gwøge e dwøng kibøli kwømí.’ Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd ómɑ̈ddø e ying-ɑ yij pyëne." 
1Kings1:48 Kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Lenhi wɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́muuj dicyɑ̈ngtïn ki ngɑn pëggi wïj kwømɑ, yɑ nudd yɑ onëënø.’ ”" 
1Kings1:49 Codhe, kɑ wëlli Adöniyɑ̀ obwøgø, ɑdhwödh gen kɑ men ókedhø ki yuue kì wɑ̈ye." 
1Kings1:50 Kɑ Adöniyɑ̀ obwøgø ki mendwøng yi Sølømøn, ɑdhwödhe kɑ kedh-ɑ yij Kemi Kwër, be mïdhi tùngi këli lɑm." 
1Kings1:51 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn köbbi kinni, Adöniyɑ̀ ceg-ɑ böggø, o mïdh-ɑ tùngi këli lɑm, i kööbø kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni köngi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn møti kinni yɑ koo nɑ̈g yi en.”" 
1Kings1:52 Alöggi Sølømøn kinni, “Obëëde ɑ́ jöd, bong yëyø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ódëëm kì wïje, de obëëde e rɑj, bɑ men thøw.”" 
1Kings1:53 Aöd Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, kɑ Adöniyɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l piny kì wïj këli lɑm. Kɑ obëënø, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn mɑle. Aköbbii yi Sølømøn kinni, “Kedhí gølí.”" 
1Kings2:1 Kɑ Debïd ócyɑ̈ngø ki thøø. Acege wɑ̈de Sølømøn kinni," 
1Kings2:2 “Kej thøwɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, yɑ kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ nyi kedhi yi dhɑnhø bëne. Bëëd yï teeg ni jɑlø." 
1Kings2:3 Gwøg gwøøg Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yï cyɑ̈dhí kì yuue, yï mïdh-ɑ cigge geki kwönge kí pwönye, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi Mosɑ̀, kipe kinni o gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yïn kì keny-ɑ kedhi yi yïn, nyi lwɑ̈ng yi yïn." 
1Kings2:4 Keløg møgɑni ómïdhi yi yïn kidøøj, møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen, kinni, keløg kwøbbe ómïdhi yi wɑ̈ddɑ kidyër ki pëthi gen, gen ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ceth kì Isrɑil." 
1Kings2:5 “Yï ngɑ̈ny wøw thyew ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge pëjji liny Isrɑil ɑ́ryew kipe gïjø me rënyi gen kì yij liny cøn, ɑ løg Abner wɑ̈d Ner, kí Amɑsɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yether, e piny dɑ mër. Jøgɑni ryeet ɑ́wɑ̈dhe’ nɑ̈gø, o cɑ́yi Jwøk bï gen kömɑ." 
1Kings2:6 Göög peli wïjí, kɑ ko wëggi thøø ki mër, e wïje tɑr yi wɑ́r." 
1Kings2:7 “De göggí wɑ̈ddi Bɑrdhilɑy jɑl Gilyɑd ki gïndøj, kɑ wiy ge nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen kì tɑwí, kipe gïndøj men-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi gen kì Mɑɑ̈nɑim, keny-ɑ ɑ́cyeed yɑn pɑ̈l yi Abcɑlöm ówöw." 
1Kings2:8 “Cimeì wɑ̈d Gerɑ̀ jɑl gøl Ben Yɑmïn kì kɑɑl Bekurïm, yɑ ɑ́gwɑdde ki gwɑddø me ledh, yɑ kedh-ɑ Mɑɑ̈nɑim, de ɑ́kedhi be kwɑjji yɑn kì kömi Nɑm Urdun, kɑ yɑ óköngø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn." 
1Kings2:9 De ɑnɑn ko wiy, mɑ́ yï bɑ ngɑn wïjí pel, nɑ̈ɑ̈g o kedhe yij rörø wɑ́ri wïje cödhø yi remø.”" 
1Kings2:10 Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyye, ɑkonyii kì kɑɑl Debïd." 
1Kings2:11 Ábëëd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Ájyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki runn ɑ́bïryew kì Kibrön, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem." 
1Kings2:12 Sølømøn ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì bɑng Debïd wïye. Kɑ lɑwe cïbe piny kidøøj. 
1Kings2:13 Kɑ Adöniyɑ̀, ɑ meye cwøl ɑ́ Agith kedh-ɑ yï Bɑtcebɑ̀ meyi Sølømøn. Kɑ pyëj yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ mër?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ cyɑ̈dh-ɑ mër!”" 
1Kings2:14 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Dɑ gïjø me kwɑjji yi yɑn kì yïí.” Kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Kwøøb!”" 
1Kings2:15 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø di bëëd ɑ́ miɑ, o bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi Isrɑil bëne, kinni yɑn ɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. De lɑwø ɑ́yöd e kedh-ɑ yï ówɑ̈ɑ, mɑ́ møgɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Kings2:16 O ɑnɑn bɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel ɑ kwɑjjɑ kì yïí. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn!” Apëjji Bɑtcebɑ̀ kinni, “Yï kwɑjj-ɑ ngø?”" 
1Kings2:17 Alögge kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, kedhí yï Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, o yɑ mëgge Abicɑg ɑ́ dhɑjø, nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Cunem. Yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni gïn-ɑ cwøl yi yïn kì yïe pɑ cugge mɑ̈ɑ̈n yïn!”" 
1Kings2:18 Kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Døj, yɑ ókedhi be köbbi kwøbbí rɑ̈dh.”" 
1Kings2:19 Codhe, kɑ Bɑtcebɑ̀ kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh be köbbii kwøbbi Adöniyɑ̀. Kɑ rɑ̈dh dhwödh-ɑ be pɑɑrii, ɑmɑ̈dhe gøn. Kɑ Sølømøn pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøme. Kɑ meye muuj ki kwøm megø, kɑ kwømɑni cïb wïj kyëëj rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings2:20 Kɑ meyi rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Dɑ nyɑ gïjø me thiinh me kwɑjjɑ kì yïí. Kɑ ko mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn.” Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kwøb gïnɑni meyø, gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi yïn pɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ yïn!”" 
1Kings2:21 Kɑ meye okööbø kinni, “Wiy Abicɑg nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Cunem mëggi Adöniyɑ̀ ówöw ɑ́ dhɑjø.”" 
1Kings2:22 Kɑ Sølømøn meye köbbe kinni, “Ede Adöniyɑ̀ ɑ kwɑ̈jjií Abicɑg kete? Ede ɑ pɑ kwɑ̈jjií lɑwø thyew, mɑ́ e bɑ ówɑ̈ɑ nyeldwøng? Ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr geki Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ pɑ ying köme?”" 
1Kings2:23 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn óköngø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wiy yɑ ócɑy yi Jwøk keløg Adöniyɑ̀ pɑ thuw møgɑni!" 
1Kings2:24 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́cïbe wïj kwøøm wïyɑ Debïd, dhøge ɑ́mïdhe ceth kɑ gø mëgge yɑn. Adöniyɑ̀ onɑ̈gø dicyɑ̈ngtïn!”" 
1Kings2:25 Kɑ Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ ör yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, ɑnɑ̈ge Adöniyɑ̀." 
1Kings2:26 Kɑ ókwërø Abiyɑthɑr köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kedhí Anɑthöth pɑɑrí! Yï di ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø, de yï pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ yï ɑ́kɑ̈ll-ɑ Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli wïyɑ Debïd, kɑ yï ongïnø ki orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi yi wïyɑ bëne.”" 
1Kings2:27 Kɑ Abiyɑthɑr kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Sølømøn kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ ókwëri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri gøl ókwërø Elì kì Cilø pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen. 
1Kings2:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yöɑb, ɑrenge yij Kemi Kwër, kɑ ómɑ̈gø kì ri tùngi këli lɑm. Yöɑb ɑ́ying-ɑ kömi Adöniyɑ̀ cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ nuti kedh en bɑng Abcɑlöm kɑ̈ge dööng." 
1Kings2:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kinni Yöɑb rengi yij Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ying-ɑ buti këli lɑm, ɑöde ki dhɑnhø me pyëjii kinni, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ renge buti këli lɑm. Kɑ Yöɑb ólöggø kinni ɑ́rengi yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e bwøg-ɑ Sølømøn. Codhe kɑ Benɑiyɑ̀ ör be nɑ̈gi Yöɑb yi Sølømøn." 
1Kings2:30 Akedhi Benɑiyɑ̀ Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Yöɑb köbbe kinni, “Rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni i bïí wɑ̈g!” Alöggi Yöɑb kinni, “Köbbí rɑ̈dh kinni, yɑ pɑ bï wɑ̈g! Yɑ thøw-ɑ keny!” Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yöɑb dwöggi rɑ̈dh yi Benɑiyɑ̀." 
1Kings2:31 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Göggí Yöɑb gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en ceth. Nɑ̈ɑ̈g kì kenyɑni, kɑ koony! O cyënni ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Yöɑb bï gen wɑ̈g kì gølɑ geki gøl wïyɑ." 
1Kings2:32 Cyënne ɑ́dwøøg köme yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ jøgtir ɑ́ryew, jøg mø døj kibøle ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi en e wïyɑ Debïd kwïj wøw, ɑ løg Abner wɑ̈d Ner pënyi liny Isrɑil, kí Amɑsɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yether pënyi liny Yeudiyɑ̀." 
1Kings2:33 Cyënni gen døøg-ɑ wïj Yöɑb geki gøle gïti ɑtheer. O gøl Debïd óthödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki døøjø gïti ɑtheer.” 
1Kings2:34 Codhe, ɑkedhi Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Yöɑb nɑ̈ge. Kɑ Yöɑb koony pɑɑre kì myërri thwørø." 
1Kings2:35 Kɑ Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ cïb kej Yöɑb ɑ́ pënyi liny yi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ ókwërø Dhɑdök cïbe kej Abiyɑthɑr. 
1Kings2:36 Kɑ rɑ̈dh oödø, ɑcwööl Cimeì, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Gëddí rií ki ød kì Yerusɑlem. Kɑ yï bëëd kì Yerusɑlem, yï ko pɑ̈nyi kedhi wɑ̈g kì yije." 
1Kings2:37 De cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókedhí wɑ̈g kɑ dhøg Kidrön bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi yïn, ngɑ̈nyí wøw kinni yï ceg-ɑ thøø, o yï ócyɑ̈dhi ki cyënní.”" 
1Kings2:38 Alöggi Cimeì kinni, “Døj wuö, gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ógwøg yi yɑn.” Kɑ Cimeì obëëdø kì Yerusɑlem ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
1Kings2:39 Kɑ kì ri thumi runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑpɑ̈r bɑ̈nggi Cimeì ɑ́ryew, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï Akïc wɑ̈d Mɑɑkɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Gɑth. Kɑ olïngø kinni bɑ̈ngge ying-ɑ Gɑth." 
1Kings2:40 Kɑ pëgg-ɑ kömi ɑdere, ɑkedhe Gɑth yï Rɑ̈dh Akïc be yɑɑbi bɑ̈ngge. Gï ɑ́yode kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le kì Gɑth." 
1Kings2:41 Kɑ Sølømøn olïngø kinni i Cimeì kedhi Gɑth, kɑ ódwöögø." 
1Kings2:42 Kɑ rɑ̈dh oödø, ɑcwööl Cimeì. Kɑ Cimeì köbbe kinni, “Yï nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni köngí ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni yï pɑ kedhi wɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem. Kɑ yï köbbi yi yɑn kì bøli teedø kinni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókedhi wɑ̈g, ngɑ̈nyí wøw kinni yï ceg-ɑ thøø? Kɑ yï okööbø kinni ‘Døj, gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ógwøg yi yɑn.’" 
1Kings2:43 O gede møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi yïn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑɑny gen ki mïdhø geki cigg-ɑ ɑ́cegɑ yïn? 
1Kings2:44 Gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggí wïyɑ Debïd ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidøøj. Rɑjjɑni ɑ dwøøg kömí yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑnɑn. 
1Kings2:45 Yɑ ógyëdh yi en, o kwøøm Debïd ócungi kì keje gïti ɑtheer.”" 
1Kings2:46 Codhe, ɑköbbi Benɑiyɑ̀ yi rɑ̈dh, ɑkedhe kɑ Cimeì nɑ̈ge. Kɑ lɑwø cïb piny kidøøj yi Sølømøn." 
1Kings3:1 Kɑ Sølømøn onywɑ̈gø ki kwøb geki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ɑnywøme nyɑɑr rɑ̈nhɑni, kɑ gø cïbe kɑɑl Debïd, o bëëde kì kenyɑni gïti keny-ɑ órum gøle ki gerø, geki ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí döri kɑɑl Yerusɑlem." 
1Kings3:2 Ji ɑ́bëëd ge nudd ge nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈d ɑ kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø ki gëdhhì, mɑ́ ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e bong gøn men-ɑ ógerø." 
1Kings3:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e mɑɑr yi Sølømøn. Kɑ obëëdø ki bëëdi wïye Debïd. De ɑ́bëëd e nudd e nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈d ɑ kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø ki gëdhhì, kɑ nyii rɑ̈bø kì kɑ̈jjɑni ki bɑkur." 
1Kings3:4 Kɑ rɑ̈dh kedh-ɑ Gibeon tyelø ɑ́kyel, be ngɑl ki gëdhhì, mɑ́ kej mɑ̈ddø men-ɑ Gibeon ɑ dwøng. Sølømøn ɑ́wöni e nyii ngɑ̈dø kì kenyɑni ki gëdhhì mø gïïr cɑrø." 
1Kings3:5 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ yï Sølømøn kì yethi lɑ̈g kì Gibeon kì wɑ̈r. Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Yï kwɑjj-ɑ ngø, o mëggɑ yïn?”" 
1Kings3:6 Alöggi Sølømøn kinni, “Bɑ̈ngí, wïyɑ Debïd ɑ́mɑɑr yi yïn ki mendwøng, keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhe kì bølí ki pyëw ɑ́kyel, e mïdh-ɑ dyër, yije bong ɑ́dud. Mɑɑr-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑrií nuti lwënyø, mɑ́ wɑ̈de ɑ́røny yi yïn, kɑ cïb yi yïn wïj kwøme, ɑ jyɑ̈ge dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
1Kings3:7 Anɑn Yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ yɑ cïb yi yïn wïj kwøøm wïyɑ Debïd, de yɑ bɑ othinh, yɑ kwïj jyɑ̈gø." 
1Kings3:8 O yɑ ying-ɑ kelli jií, ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn, gen ɑ ji-ɑ pɑ cuggi ki kwɑnø yi ngenyi gen," 
1Kings3:9 thödhí yɑn ki peli wïj men jɑɑgɑ jií, o gïndøj kí gïnrɑj nyi ngijɑ, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi jɑɑgi jií, eni yɑy-ɑ dwøng ni men?”" 
1Kings3:10 Kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ómïnø yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Sølømøn. 
1Kings3:11 Kɑ köbbi yi Jwøk kinni, “Mɑ́ yï ɑ́cwøl-ɑ peli wïj me jɑɑg ji kidøøj, o yï nuti cwøøl ngenyi runn kì kömi piny, kí kɑ̈r, kí thøwi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø," 
1Kings3:12 gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi yïn mëggɑ’ yïn, yï ɑ́thödhɑ ki peli wïj geki tïïdø ki kwøb, bong dhɑnhø me yïe ɑ́di peli wïnyɑni, wɑlɑ̀ bong dhɑnhø me yïe ódi peli wïny ni menɑni men-ɑ óbï kì bɑngí." 
1Kings3:13 Yï óthödhɑ ki gïg-ɑ nuti cwølø yi yïn thyew. Yï óthödhɑ ki kɑ̈r geki dhwɑ̈ng, bong rɑ̈dh men-ɑ óni yïn." 
1Kings3:14 Keløg yï ócyɑ̈dhi kì yuuɑ, yï mïdh-ɑ ciggɑ geki kwöngɑ, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd wïyí Debïd, runní óløgɑ mø ngenyø kì kömi piny.”" 
1Kings3:15 Acyëëw Sølømøn, kɑ gø yode kinni bɑ Jwøk ɑ kööbø kí en kì yethi lɑ̈g. Codhe ɑkedhe Yerusɑlem kɑ ócungø kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈dde ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki gënhi mër, codhe, kɑ jyɑ̈gge ryeje bënn." 
1Kings3:16 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi ɑ́ryew ɑ́bï bøli Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn." 
1Kings3:17 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen okööbø kinni, “Wuö, wø bëëd ɑ ød ɑ́kyel wøki ngɑɑn, kɑ yɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d, e nud kì kenyɑni." 
1Kings3:18 Alunyi ngɑnɑni ki pɑ̈dhi piny ki wɑ̈d kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, yɑ rum pɑ̈dhi piny. Wø keti wøn ɑ ɑ́ying ønɑni, bong dhɑnhø megø." 
1Kings3:19 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì wɑ̈r, ngɑnɑni ree ngyeel en kömi wɑ̈de, kɑ othøø." 
1Kings3:20 Adhwödhe kì wɑ̈rɑni, kɑ wɑ̈dɑ kwɑnye kì butɑ yɑ onenø, kɑ gø pyëële bute. Kɑ wɑ̈de wɑ̈n-ɑ thøø pyëële butɑ." 
1Kings3:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödhɑ kì mwøl kinni o yɑ dhwødhɑ wɑ̈dɑ, ɑlidhɑ dhɑnhø e thøø. Kɑ yɑ nenn-ɑ ree kidøøj, ɑngijɑ en e pɑth ki wɑ̈dɑ.”" 
1Kings3:22 De ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́kööb kinni, “Pɑth! Dhɑnhø men-ɑ nëënø bɑ wɑ̈dɑ, o men-ɑ thøø bɑ wɑ̈dí!” Alöggi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki kwøb kinni, “Pɑth! Dhɑnhø men-ɑ thøø bɑ mií, o men-ɑ nëënø bɑ miɑ!” Codhe kɑ ge opëmø kì bøli rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings3:23 Codhe ɑkööb Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kinni, “Wu ɑ́köngi ryeet, ngɑn okööbø ce dhɑnhø men-ɑ nëënø bɑ wɑ̈de, o dhɑnhø men-ɑ thøø bɑ wɑ̈d ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
1Kings3:24 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Muuju yɑn ki pilø.” Kɑ pilø kɑ̈ɑ̈l bøli rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings3:25 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Kɑgu dhɑnhø men-ɑ nëënø ɑ́ ɑ́ryew, kɑ budø mëggi ngɑɑn, kɑ bun-ɑ kyeelø mëggi ngɑɑn.”" 
1Kings3:26 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ wɑ̈de nëënø, yije okïïrø kipe wɑ̈de, kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbe kinni, “Wuö, mëggu dhɑnhø men-ɑ nëënø ngɑnɑni! Ko nɑ̈g!” De ngɑn-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́kwøb-ɑ kinni, “Ko di ngɑn mëggii kì kelli wøn. Kɑgu en!”" 
1Kings3:27 Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Dhɑnhø ko nɑ̈g! Mëggi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kyer nɑ̈ge, en ɑ bɑ meye kidyër!”" 
1Kings3:28 Kɑ yuu-ɑ ɑ́yieel gønyɑni yi rɑ̈dh lïngi yi Isrɑil bëne. Kɑ ji døøg-ɑ be böggi rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ gø ɑ́lidh gen kinni ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki peli wïj men nenne gønyy." 
1Kings4:1 Isrɑil bëne ɑ́jɑɑg yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn. 
1Kings4:2 O jøg, bene gen ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki en: Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhɑdök, ɑ bɑ ókwërø." 
1Kings4:3 Elikörep geki Akiyɑ̀ wɑ̈ddi Cicɑ̀ bɑ sikriterr. Yöcɑpɑt wɑ̈d Akilud ɑ bɑ 'mïdhi wɑ̈j. 
1Kings4:4 Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ ɑ bɑ pënyi liny. O Dhɑdök geki Abiyɑthɑr ɑ bɑ ókwër. 
1Kings4:5 Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nɑthɑn, ɑ dwøng kì kelli jɑggi yethi myërr. Dhɑbud wɑ̈d Nɑthɑn ɑ bɑ ókwëri gøldwøng." 
1Kings4:6 Akicɑr ɑ bɑ jɑngi gøldwøng. Adönirɑm wɑ̈d Abdɑ̀ ɑ bɑ jɑngi tïj. 
1Kings4:7 Sølømøn ɑ́rööny ki jɑggi yethi myërr, mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, gen ɑ jɑɑg myërri Isrɑil bënn. Gen ɑ nyi muuj gøldwøng ki gïgcɑmm, ge kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ yethi myërr-ɑ jɑɑg yi gen, jɑl ɑ́kyel gøldwøng nyi kɑ̈lli yi en kɑ dwɑ̈y ɑ́kyel kì yij run." 
1Kings4:8 Nyingi jøgɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew ek: Benkur, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri kïtti Eprɑim." 
1Kings4:9 Bendeker, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Mɑkɑdh, kí Cɑɑlbïm, kí Bet Cemec, kí Elön kí Bet Aɑnɑn." 
1Kings4:10 Benkesed, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Aruböth, kí Sökö geki myërri Ëper bënn." 
1Kings4:11 Ben Abinɑdɑb, ɑ ɑ́nywøm Tɑpɑth nyɑɑr Sølømøn, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri Dör bënn." 
1Kings4:12 Bɑnɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akilud, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Tɑɑnɑk, kí Megidø, geki myërri Betcɑn, ɑ buti kɑɑl Dhɑretɑn, kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl Yidhriil kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, cɑg kì myërri Betcɑn gïti Abel Mekölɑ̀, e pïd-ɑ løøg Yokmeɑm." 
1Kings4:13 Ben Geber, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ Rɑmöth Gilyɑd, geki myërri gøl Yɑir kì piny Gilyɑd, kí myërri Argöb bënn, kí Bɑcɑn geki kɑ̈dde, kɑ̈dd-ɑ ówenø ki dör, dhøggi gen ócyëgø kɑ thïggi ngyënyø dilɑl." 
1Kings4:14 Akinɑdɑb wɑ̈d Idö, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri Mɑɑ̈nɑim." 
1Kings4:15 Akimɑɑdh, ɑ ɑ́nywøm Bɑsemɑth nyɑɑr Sølømøn, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri Nɑptɑlì." 
1Kings4:16 Bɑnɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kucɑy, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri Aceer geki kɑɑl Beɑlöth." 
1Kings4:17 Yöcɑpɑt wɑ̈d Pɑruɑ̀, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri Isɑkɑr." 
1Kings4:18 Cimeì wɑ̈d Elɑ̀, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
1Kings4:19 Geber wɑ̈d Urì, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ myërri Gilyɑd møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge jɑɑg-ɑ yi Rɑ̈dh Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng Amör geki Og rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑcɑn. Ádɑ jɑngi dwøng ɑ́kyel me jɑɑg pödhø bëne." 
1Kings4:20 Kɑ kwɑnni ji ceg-ɑ ngënyø ki mendwøng, ni ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø, kì Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ dhɑnhø oyɑ̈ngø bëne de pyëwe ceg-ɑ medø." 
1Kings4:21 Lɑ̈gi Sølømøn ɑ́døngi ki mendwøng, kɑ pödhh-ɑ thɑ́ cigge bënn nyi kɑ̈n-ɑ yïe ki gwɑ̈j, cɑg kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt gïti Pelistiyɑ̀, gïti tøg Rïp, ge ɑ́cög ge ocudø ki gwɑ̈j kì kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́nëën Sølømøn bëne." 
1Kings4:22 Bɑ gïgcɑmm mø ngenyø ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyii cɑmø cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì gøldwøng. Jɑmmɑni kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel bɑ: røthøl ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø mø møng-ɑ búr-ɑ ngedhø, kí ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew mø møng-ɑ búr-ɑ nuti ti ngedhø." 
1Kings4:23 Wɑ̈dhh-ɑ pidh kì lwɑg gɑ pyɑ̈rø, kí wɑ̈dhh-ɑ cyɑ̈mø kì pɑ̈l gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kí órömm miyø, reb ki lɑ̈yyi dwɑr geki gyen." 
1Kings4:24 Piny-ɑ kömi Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi Sølømøn, cɑg kì Tipsɑ̀ kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt e gït-ɑ Gɑdhɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Ábëëd e mër ki rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì pinyɑni. Ádɑ mër kì kɑɑm gen geki pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi bënn." 
1Kings4:25 Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́böggi yi Isrɑil bëne, ɑ́bëëd e kɑl yïe dɑ keje kí bɑ̈ggi oløge kì wɑ̈ye." 
1Kings4:26 Sølømøn yïe ɑ́dɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, gïg yethi gen nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi kyënyì møg-ɑ nyi pyejji yɑ̈the. Kí ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, jøg rïngi ki kyënyì." 
1Kings4:27 Jɑggi yethi myërr ɑ́bëëd ge nyi kɑ̈n-ɑ gøldwøng ki gïgcɑmm, men kì dwɑ̈ye men kì dwɑ̈ye, ɑ́bëëd e bong gïjø me nyi jɑ̈ddi kì gøldwøng." 
1Kings4:28 Jɑng-ɑ kɑ̈ddi ki gïgcɑmm, en ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki ceir geki lum men-ɑ cɑm yi kyënyì kì kɑ̈jji gen." 
1Kings4:29 Kɑ Sølømøn thödhi yi Jwøk ki peli wïj me dwøng, kí tïïdø’ kwøb, kí dïdø me dwøng me bong gïn pɑ̈ɑ̈rii." 
1Kings4:30 Sølømøn ɑ́bëëd wïje pel ki mendwøng kibøli jøg wɑ̈thi gen pel møg-ɑ ɑ́ying pödhh-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki Rïp. 
1Kings4:31 Wïje pel kibøli dhɑnhø bëne, wïje pel kibøli Ethɑn jɑl Edhrɑ̀, kí wɑ̈ddi Mɑköl, kí Ëmɑn, kí Kɑlköl, kí Dɑrdɑ̀." 
1Kings4:32 Ákööb ki gɑ́j ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ ocyɑ̈gø ki wör ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel kí ɑ́bïj. 
1Kings4:33 Kɑ okööbø kì ri yenh, cɑg kì ri yɑdh sɑndɑl men-ɑ Lubnɑn gïti ri ɑ́buu men-ɑ nyi twïy kì ri dörø, kɑ okööbø kì ri lɑ̈yy, kí winy, kí gïg-ɑ mulli, kí rij." 
1Kings4:34 Kwøbbi peli wïje ɑ́lïngi yi rɑ̈nhi kömi piny, kɑ ge oödø ki ji møg kedhi be lïngi kwøbbi peli wïje." 
1Kings5:1 Kɑ Kirɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Suur öd-ɑ yï Sølømøn ki cwɑ̈gg keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni i Sølømøn órøøny kej wïye, Rɑ̈dh Debïd. Kirɑm ɑ́wöni gɑ mɑ̈dhh geki Debïd." 
1Kings5:2 Kɑ Sølømøn ólunyø ör ki wöödø kinni," 
1Kings5:3 “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni Debïd wïyɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li gyer ki ød Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e ónyïɑ̈ggø ki liny geki pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhe bënn, gïti kɑ ɑ́konyii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ gï tyɑme." 
1Kings5:4 De ɑnɑn yɑ ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mër, wøki pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhi pödhɑ bënn, bong mɑ̈ɑ̈nø o bong rɑj." 
1Kings5:5 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ gëddi Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ød, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe wïyɑ Debïd kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dí men-ɑ ócïbɑ kejí kì wïj kwømí, en ɑ ógëddi yɑn ki ød.’" 
1Kings5:6 Anɑn kööb, o yɑ nguddi ki yenh sɑndɑl kì Lubnɑn, o bɑ̈nggɑ ógöög gen kyeel ki bɑ̈nggí. Köggi bɑ̈nggí ómëggɑ gen. Ge ómëggɑ gïn-ɑ kwøb yi yïn, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni bong tyëng pödhɑ møg ngɑ̈ny ngøl ki yenh ni tyëng Sïdön.”" 
1Kings5:7 Kɑ Kirɑm pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kwøbbi Sølømøn, ɑkööbe kinni, “Pwøj wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́thödhi Debïd ki wɑ̈d me wïje pel men bëëdø kì wïj kwøme dicyɑ̈ngtïn e jɑɑg-ɑ dhɑnh-ɑ ngenyø ni men.”" 
1Kings5:8 Codhe, kɑ Kirɑm öd-ɑ yï Sølømøn kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yïn ɑ́lïngɑ. Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn bënn ógwøg yi yɑn, yï ónguddi ki yenh sɑndɑl kí ɑmedh." 
1Kings5:9 Ge ókɑ̈l yi bɑ̈nggɑ kì Lubnɑn, gï kïdhi ge’ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr. Ge ógwøg gɑ óthyɑgg kì nɑm. O ge ómɑɑg keny-ɑ ókwøb yi yïn. O gï nyi pɑ̈d gen kì kunɑni, o ge yëg yi bɑ̈nggí. O yï nyi lunyí thyew ki thödhi jøgɑ ki gïncɑm.”" 
1Kings5:10 Codhe, kɑ Sølømøn nyi muuj yi Kirɑm ki yenh sɑndɑl kí ɑmedh møg-ɑ dwɑdde," 
1Kings5:11 o Sølømøn nyi nënge Kirɑm ki ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew tøn mø gemè, kí møøw dhetun ɑ́ røthøl ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, gɑ møg cɑm yi jøge kì yij runï kí runï." 
1Kings5:12 Kɑ Sølømøn thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki peli wïj ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe gøn. Kɑ Kirɑm ocögø ge mër ki Sølømøn, kɑɑm gen ɑ́dɑ lwöbø." 
1Kings5:13 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ókɑ̈bbø ki jøtïj kì yij Isrɑil bëne, kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
1Kings5:14 Kɑ Adönirɑm kwɑnye ɑ́ jɑngi tïj. Kɑ ge pɑ̈nge gɑ ɑkudd ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑkud ɑ́kyel yije dɑ ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø. O ɑkud ɑ́kyel nyi kedhe be gwøg kì Lubnɑn ki dwɑ̈y ɑ́kyel, o nyi bëëde kì pɑc ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ryew." 
1Kings5:15 Sølømøn yïe ɑ́dɑ ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g møg twïgø ki kïttì, kí ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew møg yëëg kïttɑni kɑɑl." 
1Kings5:16 Reb kí jøg-ɑ kwølli jøgwøg, kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
1Kings5:17 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni i twïg gen ki ópɑddi kïttì mø døngø, ge tweg ge lïw, gɑ møg cïb tyeli ød." 
1Kings5:18 Kɑ ópɑddi kïttɑni tweg yi bödhhi Sølømøn geki bödhhi Kirɑm, kí jø Gibɑl. Codhe, kɑ kïttì geki yenh-ɑ geer Kengø órumø ki pyëlø." 
1Kings6:1 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ócɑ̈gø ki gëddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ød, kì ngween runne kì yij lɑwø, kì Dhïp (ɑ løg ryeew dwɑ̈tti Yeud.) Kì bøli kenyɑni tyëng Isrɑil yï gen ɑ́dɑ runn miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, kër-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
1Kings6:2 Øn-ɑ ɑ́gërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn bɑ ɑ́bɑ̈rø, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, o döre bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
1Kings6:3 Øn-ɑ yïëbbi yij Kengø lɑ̈je e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri Kengø, bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj e reng-ɑ piny, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, e rwöm kɑ lɑ̈ji Kengø." 
1Kings6:4 Kɑ Kengø göggi ki ɑwɑjj møg-ɑ órïwwø ki dëddi. 
1Kings6:5 Sølømøn ɑ́gëëd thyew ki ud møg-ɑ ómyeer mɑl, ge wen-ɑ Kengø ge bødh-ɑ ri dörø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, bɑ̈ri dörri uddɑni bënn pɑ̈r, ge bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
1Kings6:6 Øn-ɑ piny lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o øn-ɑ dïdyër lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, o øn-ɑ mɑl lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈rø. Uddɑni ócïb-ɑ ri nyïɑ̈rø me cöddi wɑ̈g kì ri döri Kengø de pɑth ki ɑmin kì ri dörø." 
1Kings6:7 Kïtt-ɑ ɑ́geer Kengø ɑ́tweg-ɑ pɑ̈l keny-ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny gen ceth kì ri kït. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ge cïb-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen, bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́bëëd e bong ywøøg ɑ́bɑny, wɑlɑ̀ dørø, wɑlɑ̀ gïi gwøg megø mɑ ɑ́lïngi keny-ɑ ɑ́geer Kengø." 
1Kings6:8 Dhøng-ɑ töngi øn-ɑ piny ying-ɑ wïj kyëëj Kengø, kenyɑni ɑ di pɑ̈ltyel møg-ɑ yedhi yij øn-ɑ dïdyër geki øn-ɑ mɑl." 
1Kings6:9 Codhe kɑ Kengø órumø ki gerø yi Sølømøn. Kɑ tɑnø gënge ki pɑ̈mmì geki mënhhi yɑdh sɑndɑl. 
1Kings6:10 Dörr-ɑ nyingi ngëddi Kengø ge ómyerø gɑ dör ɑ́dɑ̈g, bɑ̈ri dörø ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o ge ógerø ge ying-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ri döri Kengø, o ge ómɑɑg ree kɑ pɑ̈mmi yɑdh sɑndɑl." 
1Kings6:11 Kɑ Sølømøn köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
1Kings6:12 “Kí øn-ɑ geer yïn èn, keløg yï ócög kwöngɑ ogwøgø yi yïn, kɑ gïn-ɑ kwøbɑ nyi gwøg yi yïn, kɑ ciggɑ mïdhi yi yïn bënn, møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ Debïd wïyí kiperí ógwøg yi yɑn." 
1Kings6:13 Yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil. O jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil pɑ wiyɑ piny kinni tek.”" 
1Kings6:14 Codhe kɑ Kengø órumø ki gerø yi Sølømøn. 
1Kings6:15 Kɑ döri Kengø geki tɑne tɑg kì yiny-ɑ ød ki pɑ̈mmi yɑdh sɑndɑl, kɑ piny pedh ki pɑ̈mmi yɑdh ɑmedh." 
1Kings6:16 Kɑ tɑtyeel gëddi ki gëng, Kej Kwërdwøng, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, ógerø kɑ pɑ̈mmi yɑdh sɑndɑl cɑ̈gi kì piny gïti ri tɑnø." 
1Kings6:17 O yij ød men-ɑ ɑ́döng, kì bøli Kej Kwërdwøng, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
1Kings6:18 Pɑ̈mmi yɑdh sɑndɑl møg-ɑ ótɑɑg dörø bɑ ɑtweg ki ngïjji kenø mø ri gen di okøgg. Dörø bëne bɑ ɑtɑg ki pɑ̈mmi yɑdh sɑndɑl, kït pɑ nënni." 
1Kings6:19 Kej Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ger e bɑ nyɑ ød me thiinh kì tɑtyeel. 
1Kings6:20 Gëngɑni bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen. Kɑ yiny-ɑ ød bëne mwøn ki dhɑm dhïw. Këli lɑm men-ɑ Kej Kwërdwøng bɑ ɑtɑg ki yɑdh sɑndɑl." 
1Kings6:21 Kɑ Kengø mwøn yi Sølømøn ki dhɑb kì yiny-ɑ ød. Kɑ thïgi gëng ree gödde ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb, thïngɑni bɑ ɑmwøn ki dhɑb thyew." 
1Kings6:22 Kɑ ød bëne tyëge ki mwønø ki dhɑb. Kɑ këli lɑm men-ɑ Kej Kwërdwøng mwøn bëne ki dhɑb. Codhe kɑ ød óthumø bëne ki mwønø ki dhɑb. 
1Kings6:23 Kɑ ngïjji kerobb ɑ́ryew tyeng gɑ yɑdh dhetun, bɑ̈ri ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Kɑ ge cïb Kej Kwërdwøng." 
1Kings6:24 Ákyel yïe dɑ obërr ɑ́ryew, bɑ̈ri obërø ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kɑɑm obërre tuung kí tuung, bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Kerobbɑni ryeet döngi ngëddi gen pɑ̈r, o bɑ̈ri gen pɑ̈r. Bɑ̈ri kerob ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o men-ɑ kyeelø pɑ̈r ki en." 
1Kings6:25  
1Kings6:26  
1Kings6:27 Kerobbɑni ryeet ɑ́cïb Kej Kwërdwøng men ying-ɑ buti men, obëri kerob ɑ́kyel nywɑll-ɑ dörø, o obër-ɑ kyeelø nywɑll-ɑ tøg obëri kerom-ɑ kyeelø. O kerom-ɑ kyeelø cungi e nɑ menɑni, obëre ɑ́kyel nywɑll-ɑ dörø kì tuung, o obër-ɑ kyeelø nywɑll-ɑ tøg obëri kerom-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Kings6:28 Kɑ kerobbɑni ryeet mwøn ki dhɑb. 
1Kings6:29 Kɑ dörø bëne kì yiny-ɑ ød kí yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g ngweg ki ngïjji kerobb geki yenh benø kí okøgg. 
1Kings6:30 Kɑ yij ød kì piny mwøn ki dhɑb bëne. 
1Kings6:31 Kɑ dhø Kej Kwërdwøng kïdhi ki thïgø ɑ́buddiryew, me bɑ yɑdh dhetun me bɑ ɑtɑg, ɑ́ ɑdöl kì mɑl." 
1Kings6:32 Buddi thïgi gëng ryeet bɑ ɑngweg ki ngïjji kerobb, geki yenh benø kí okøgg. Kɑ thïngɑni mwøn ki dhɑb geki ngïjji kerobb møg-ɑ ree, kí yɑdh benø kí okøgg." 
1Kings6:33 Kɑ rïwi thïgi dhø Kengø gwøg ɑ́ yɑdh dhetun, ɑ́ ɑ́bɑ̈rø." 
1Kings6:34 Kɑ kïdhi ki thïgø ɑ́buddiryew mɑ yɑdh ɑmedh. 
1Kings6:35 Kɑ kömi thïngɑni ngweg ki ngïjji kerobb, kí yenh benø kí okøgg. Kɑ ge mwøn ki dhɑb." 
1Kings6:36 Kɑ bøli Kengø gëddi ki ódɑ̈rø, ɑ́ ɑger ki löjji yenh sɑndɑl geki kïttì, e bɑ ɑgwel, yɑdh ɑ́kyel kí kïttì ɑ́dɑ̈g ge myeer-ɑ mɑl." 
1Kings6:37 Tyeli Kengø ɑ́cïb kì ngween runni Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kì yij lɑwø, kì Dhïp (ɑ løg ryeew dwɑ̈tti Yeud)."
