1Kings21:25 (Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́göög ki gïgrijjø ni møg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Akɑɑb ɑ́kwøll-ɑ yi cyëge Yidhɑbel. 
1Kings21:26 Ágöög ki ɑyɑ̈r me dwøng keny-ɑ ɑ́døøge be mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng Amör, ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny men, kedh tyëng Isrɑil bï-ɑ yije)." 
1Kings21:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Eliyɑ̀ ki kwøb, kɑ Akɑɑb ógudhe pyëëde wɑ̈g, kɑ ree lunye ki ocwɑ̈llì. Kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki cɑm, e buud-ɑ yethi ocwɑ̈llì, kɑ døøg-ɑ be cyɑ̈dhø e ólyebbø." 
1Kings21:28 Aköbbi Eliyɑ̀ jɑltöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
1Kings21:29 “Akɑɑb nuti liidh yïn, kɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ mölø kì bølɑ? Ryɑ̈g pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn kömi gøle e nudd e onëënø, kipe kɑ ɑ́gööge kinøw, ryɑ̈ngɑni ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn kömi gøle kì ri wɑ̈de.”" 
1Kings22:1 Runn ɑ́ryew ɑ́pöödh e bong liny kì kɑɑm Isrɑil geki Arɑm. 
1Kings22:2 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ wël-ɑ yï Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runn. 
1Kings22:3 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb jøge pyëje kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni Rɑmöth Gilyɑd bɑ miee? Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ lwɑ̈r wɑ riee, ɑ pɑ kwɑny wɑ en kì cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm?”" 
1Kings22:4 Apyëëj Yöcɑpɑt yi Akɑɑb kinni, “Yï ókedhi Rɑmöth Gilyɑd be liny kyeel ki wøn?” Alöggi Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Ke kedh, yɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø! Ke kedh yɑyí, yɑyɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø! O ke kedh kyënyí, kyënyɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø!" 
1Kings22:5 De pyëj wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møti.” 
1Kings22:6 Codhe kɑ jøtöng cwööl yi Akɑɑb kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Kedhɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rɑmöth Gilyɑd ki liny, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ ko kedh?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Kedh! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ówëgge tyɑ̈mø.”" 
1Kings22:7 Apëjji Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Bong jɑltöng megø, mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j me nud, o wɑ pëjji wɑ kì yïe?”" 
1Kings22:8 Alöggi Akɑɑb kinni, “Dɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel me cwøl ɑ́ Mikɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Imlɑ̀. De mɑɑn yi yɑn kipe bong gïndøj me nyi töng yi en kiperɑ, nyi töng-ɑ gïnrɑj ceth.” Alöggi Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Yï ko kööb kinøw!”" 
1Kings22:9 Codhe ɑ cwöddi Akɑɑb ki jɑngi tøg burø ɑ́kyel, kɑ gø öre kinni, jwɑne be dwɑɑyi Mikɑiyɑ̀." 
1Kings22:10 Rɑ̈nhhɑni ryeet ɑ́bëëd ge orugø ki ógudhi jyɑ̈ɑ̈gø, ge bëëd ɑ wɑ̈thi kwømmi gen, kì dhø döri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kì buti rɑrø, o jøtöng bënn ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ töng kì bøli gen." 
1Kings22:11 Ákyel kì kelli gen me cwøl ɑ́ Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kenɑɑnɑ̀, ree ɑ́gögge ki tùngi ngyënyø dødø, kɑ Akɑɑb köbbe kinni, “Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek; yï ónyïɑ̈ggi ki Arɑm ki tùng møg, kɑ tyɑm yi yïn ki menteg.”" 
1Kings22:12 Kɑ jøtöng-ɑ kyeelø kwøb-ɑ møg ni møgɑni. Ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Kedh nyïɑ̈ggí! Rɑmöth Gilyɑd ócïb cingí yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Kings22:13 Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ köbbi yi jɑngi tøg burø men-ɑ ɑ́örii kinni, “Jøtöng møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn, ɑ́kööb kinni i rɑ̈dh ótyɑ̈mø! Yïn thyew kööb kinøw.”" 
1Kings22:14 De Mikɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́løøg-ɑ kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köngi ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, gïn-ɑ óköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ ókwøb yi yɑn!”" 
1Kings22:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Mikɑiyɑ̀ bøli Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, ɑpyëjii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Mikɑiyɑ̀, kedhɑ wøki Yöcɑpɑt be nyɑɑg ki Rɑmöth Gilyɑd, wɑlɑ̀ wø ko kedh?” Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Kedh, pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen! Yï ówëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Kings22:16 De Akɑɑb ɑ́løøg-ɑ kinni, “Kenyi kööb ki yɑn, yï 'kööb-ɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi kwøb dyër! Yï ɑ́köbbi yi yɑn kinøw tyel ɑ́dï?”" 
1Kings22:17 Akööb Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Isrɑil bëne ɑ́lidh yi yɑn e tɑɑy wɑ̈thi kïttì, ni dyëg møg bong ngɑn kwɑy gen. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Jøgɑni bong pënyi gen, wiy ge døøg gen yethi myërri gen ki mër.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Aköbbi Yöcɑpɑt yi Akɑɑb kinni, “Yï nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni, pɑ nyi töng gïjø me døøj kiperɑ, den-ɑ́ gïnrɑj ceth?”" 
1Kings22:19 Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Anɑn lïngí møg-ɑ kømmi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lidhɑ e obëëdø kì wïj kwøme kì pɑɑre mɑl kí wëywödde ge ócungø kì bɑdhhe." 
1Kings22:20 Apëjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Á men ɑ óthɑb Akɑɑb, o kedhe be nɑ̈gø kì Rɑmöth Gilyɑd?’ Kɑ kwï wëywödd kwøb-ɑ gïn, kɑ møøgø kwøb-ɑ gïjø megø." 
1Kings22:21 Kɑ wëywödø megø kedh-ɑ bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Óthɑb yi yɑn.’" 
1Kings22:22 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ópëjjø kinni, ‘Óthɑb yi yïn kidï?’ Alöggi wëywönɑni kinni, ‘Yɑ ókedh, o jøtööng Akɑɑb göjjɑ pyed bënn.’ Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Kedh! Ólwɑ̈ng yi yïn ki thɑbø!’ ”" 
1Kings22:23 Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ kwøbbe ngøle kinni, “Bene gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑgɑk: Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jøtöng møgí ɑ́göjje pyed, o yï nyi köbbi kwøbbi pyed yi gen. De yï ɑ́rum ki nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!”" 
1Kings22:24 Codhe, kɑ jɑltöng Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kenɑɑnɑ̀ kedh-ɑ yï Mikɑiyɑ̀, kɑ gø gøje kì pïne, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́wiy ɑ́wën yi wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kööbe kì rií?”" 
1Kings22:25 Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Óyod yi yïn cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókedhí be pɑ̈nø kì tɑtyeel.”" 
1Kings22:26 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli pëjji linye köbbe kinni, “Mɑg Mikɑiyɑ̀, kɑ muuj Amön, jɑngi kɑɑl geki nyirɑ̈dh Yöɑc." 
1Kings22:27 Köbbí gen kinni kïdhi ød mɑg, kɑ wiy cyɑ̈me pï gïti keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ ki tɑrø.”" 
1Kings22:28 Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Keløg yï ódwöög ki tɑrø, pɑth ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kööb kì riɑ!” Kɑ dhøge cige lengø kinni, “Lïng wun bënn ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn!”" 
1Kings22:29 Codhe kɑ Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, geki Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki Rɑmöth Gilyɑd." 
1Kings22:30 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt köbbi yi Akɑɑb kinni, “Yɑ ókedhi be liny riɑ kɑɑng yɑn, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ ngij, de yïn kedhí be liny ki ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø.” Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kedh-ɑ be liny ree kɑɑng en." 
1Kings22:31 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm pëjji linye gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew ceg yi en kinni, i coony gen liny kömi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kete." 
1Kings22:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen Yöcɑpɑt, ɑrum gen kinni en ɑ bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Kɑ ri gen lugi ge gøn, kɑ Yöcɑpɑt óryeerø." 
1Kings22:33 Kɑ ngij yi gen kinni pɑth ki en ɑ bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, Codhe ɑdwøøg gen liny cyɑ̈n." 
1Kings22:34 Jɑl-liny Arɑm megø ɑ́wɑ̈dhi göjjø ki weth, kɑ weth pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑɑm köjji ɑ́dhedheg-ɑ ri Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kwølli kyënyi yɑ̈ye köbbe kinni, “Riɑ ɑ́kedhi yi kedø! Wir yɑ̈y kɑ yɑ kïdhí wɑ̈g kì yij liny.”" 
1Kings22:35 Kɑ liny ótëngø ki mendwøng dicyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb ocögø e bëëd ɑ yij yɑ̈ye, e nenn-ɑ kuni Arɑm. De kedø men-ɑ ree okyërø, kɑ yij yɑ̈y opɑ̈ngø yi remø. Codhe ɑthøwe kì böörø." 
1Kings22:36 Kɑ kɑɑl Isrɑil kiw kì bøli kej buddi cɑ̈ng kinni, “Døøg gen myërri gen!”" 
1Kings22:37 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́thøw Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb ɑnɑn, ɑkïdhii Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kɑ kony kì kunɑni." 
1Kings22:38 Alwöög remø wɑ̈g kì yij yɑ̈yɑni, kì tøg luuy Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, luy-ɑ yije nyi lwøøg yi ɑ́mɑ̈jj kì pönhɑni. Kɑ reme nɑng yi gwögg ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Kings22:39 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb bënn, kí gøldwøng men-ɑ ɑ́dhyɑw yi en ki leggi lyej, kí myërr-ɑ ɑ́ger yi en bënn, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
1Kings22:40 Kɑ Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. 
1Kings22:41 Yöcɑpɑt wɑ̈d Asɑ̀ ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, e runni Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bɑ ɑ́ngwen kì yij lɑwø." 
1Kings22:42 Árøny runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Adhubɑ̀ nyɑɑr Cilkì. 
1Kings22:43 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni wïye, de kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth nuti dhur en piny, o ji nudd ge nyii ngɑ̈dø ki gëdhhì, o ge nudd ge nyii rɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì kɑ̈jjɑni." 
1Kings22:44 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́bëëd kɑɑm gen dɑ mër ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. 
1Kings22:45 Jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöcɑpɑt, kí lìny-ɑ ɑ́nyɑge, kí tege kenyi tyɑ̈me, ge bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
1Kings22:46 Ámɑ̈jji keng møg-ɑ bɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑ̈jji lɑmmi jwögg-ɑ pɑth, møg döngø kì bɑng wïye, ɑ́cyeede wɑ̈g kì yij pödhø." 
1Kings22:47 Ábëëd e bong rɑ̈dh ki Edöm kì bøli kenyɑni. De ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi ókwøm me nyi røny yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀. 
1Kings22:48 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́gud ki sɑpïnnì mø døngø, møg nyi kyewi kì nɑ̈mmi omel-ɑ døngø, yɑ̈thɑni ɑ́gwøg gɑ møg nyi dwɑ̈ddi Opir ki dhɑb. De ge ɑ́cög ge nuti wɑ̈dhi pönhɑni, ge ɑ́tørri kì Edhïön Geber." 
1Kings22:49 Codhe, kɑ Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akɑɑb, ɑ løg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil omuujø ki jøkëw, mø di køny jø Yöcɑpɑt. De møgɑni ɑ́bɑny yi Yöcɑpɑt." 
1Kings22:50 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl Debïd kweye. Arøøny wɑ̈de Yeörɑm keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
1Kings22:51 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akɑɑb ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, e runni Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kì yij lɑwø. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn ɑ́ryew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
1Kings22:52 Ágöög ki gïgrijjø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Akɑɑb wïye geki Yidhɑbel meye. Kɑ ge nɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeroboɑm, ɑ ɑ́göjji tyëng Isrɑil orøg." 
1Kings22:53 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́mɑll-ɑ Bɑɑl, kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rënye ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøgge ni møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wïye." 
2Kings1:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thøw Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ pödhi Moɑb ngɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈ye." 
2Kings1:2 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh kì ød mɑl kì gøldwøng, kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kɑ ree kedhi yi kedø me teeg. Codhe, ɑöde ki ji møg kedhi be pyëji Bɑɑldhebub, jwøøg Ekrön kì Pelistiyɑ̀, o yod yi en men-ɑ ódhwödhe mɑl kì yij buddø ki ken-ɑ ree." 
2Kings1:3 De Eliyɑ̀ jɑl Ticbì ɑ́köbbi yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni kedhe be rødhi jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀, o gï pyëje kinni, “Wude ɑ kedhu be pyëji Bɑɑldhebub, jwøøg Ekrön? Wu orumø kinni bong Jwøk kì Isrɑil?" 
2Kings1:4 Köbbu rɑ̈dh kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ken-ɑ rií pɑ nøggi; yï ceg-ɑ thøø ceth.’ ” Akedh Eliyɑ̀, kɑ jøgɑni köbbe." 
2Kings1:5 Adøøg jøgɑni yï rɑ̈dh. Kɑ ge pyëj yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Wude ɑ dwöög wun?”" 
2Kings1:6 Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø ɑ́røøm ki jɑl megø, mɑ ɑ́köbbi wøn kinni, i dwöög wøn yïí, kɑ yï köbbi wøn kinni, yïde ɑ öd ki ji møg pyëj Bɑɑldhebub, jwøøg Ekrön? Bɑ kipe rumm-ɑ rømmi yi yïn kinni bong jwøg kì Isrɑil? Ken-ɑ rií pɑ nøggi; yï ceg-ɑ thøø ceth!”" 
2Kings1:7 Apëjji rɑ̈dh kinni, “Jɑlɑni bëëd ɑ dï?”" 
2Kings1:8 Alöggi gen kinni, “Jɑlɑni dële pɑ̈ng yi yëyy, o rug-ɑ lɑwi lɑ̈y, o wëni yije bɑ dël.” Akööbe kinni, “Bɑ Eliyɑ̀!”" 
2Kings1:9 Codhe, ɑöd rɑ̈dh ki pënyi liny, e ókɑ̈ddø ki jøliny gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. O ge kedhi gen be dwɑɑyi Eliyɑ̀. Kɑ yuud yi pënyɑni e obëëdø kì wïj nyɑ kït. Aköbbii yi pënyɑni kinni, “Bïí piny jɑltöng, yï odwɑddø yi rɑ̈dh.”" 
2Kings1:10 Kɑ Eliyɑ̀, okööbø kinni, “Keløg yɑ bɑ jɑltöng, wiy mɑc dëëme kì mɑl, o wu nɑ̈g yi en wuki jøgí.” Adëëm mɑc kì mɑl, kɑ jøgɑni cɑm yi mɑc bënn." 
2Kings1:11 Acigi rɑ̈dh önø ki pëëji megø, kí jøliny gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Akedhi gen mɑl wïj nyɑ kïnɑni. Aköbbi Eliyɑ̀ yi pënyɑni kinni, “Jɑltöng, rɑ̈dh okööbø i jwɑn bëënø.”" 
2Kings1:12 Alöggi Eliyɑ̀ kinni, “Keløg yɑ bɑ jɑltöng, wiy mɑc dëëme kì mɑl, o wu nɑ̈g yi en wuki jøgí!” Kɑ mɑɑc Jwøk ódëëmø kì mɑl kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ pënyɑni nɑ̈ge geki jøge bënn." 
2Kings1:13 Acigi rɑ̈dh önø ki pëëji megø ki jøliny gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Akedh pënyi liny menɑni, kɑ yedh-ɑ mɑl yï Eliyɑ̀. Abøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ gø kwɑjje kinni, “Jɑltöng, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn wøki jiɑ. Wø ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g!" 
2Kings1:14 Pëjji liny møg-ɑ ɑ́bï ryeet geki jø gen, ge ɑ́rɑ̈b yi mɑny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl. De lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn!”" 
2Kings1:15 Aköbbi Eliyɑ̀ yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh wuki en, yï ko böggi.” Ayïnhi Eliyɑ̀ piny. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings1:16 Aköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Eliyɑ̀ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Mɑ́ yï ɑ́ödi be pyëji Bɑɑldhebub, jwøøg Ekrön, de ce bong-ɑ jwøg kì Isrɑil me cuggi pyëjø, yï pɑ dönyi kinni tek, yï ceg-ɑ thøø!’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Kɑ Akɑdhiyɑ̀ othøø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg Eliyɑ̀. Akɑdhiyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́bong-ɑ wɑ̈d, bene ɑ bɑnge røøny Yörɑm ómen keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kì ryeew runni Yeörɑm wɑ̈d Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø." 
2Kings1:18 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings2:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën bøli kej kïdhi Eliyɑ̀ mɑl kì yij ɑ́kødɑkødø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Eliyɑ̀ geki Elicɑ̀ odhwödhø kì Gilgɑl." 
2Kings2:2 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ köbbi yi Eliyɑ̀ kì kö yöö kinni, “Bëëd kì keny, yɑ ɑ́ör Betiil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” De Elicɑ̀ ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï pɑ wiyɑ ketí.” Codhe ɑkedhi gen Betiil." 
2Kings2:3 Kɑ jøtöng mø ying Betiil kedh-ɑ yï Elicɑ̀, ɑköbbi ge gøn kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni, wöw ókɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì butí dicyɑ̈ngtïn?” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kud wun, ngɑ̈nyɑ.”" 
2Kings2:4 Codhe, kɑ Elicɑ̀ köbbi yi Eliyɑ̀ kinni, “Bëëd kì keny, yɑ ɑ́ör Yerikö yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” De Elicɑ̀ ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï pɑ wiyɑ ketí.” Codhe kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Yerikö." 
2Kings2:5 Kɑ jøtöng mø ying Yerikö kedh-ɑ yï Elicɑ̀, ɑköbbi ge gøn kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni wöw ókɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì butí dicyɑ̈ngtïn?” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kud wun, ngɑ̈nyɑ.”" 
2Kings2:6 Codhe, kɑ Elicɑ̀ köbbi yi Eliyɑ̀, kinni, “Bëëd kì keny, yɑ ɑ́ör kömi Nɑm Urdun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” De Elicɑ̀ ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï pɑ wiyɑ ketí.” Codhe ɑkedh gen." 
2Kings2:7 Kɑ bɑng gen løg gɑ̈d yi jøtöng pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Kɑ ge ócungø kì keny me cyɑ̈gi ki Eliyɑ̀ geki Elicɑ̀ kì gɑ̈d. 
2Kings2:8 Codhe, kɑ Eliyɑ̀ lɑwe lunye wɑ̈g, kɑ gø døge, kɑ pï gøje ki gøn. Kɑ pï ópyëdø møg døøg-ɑ tuung, møg døøg-ɑ tuung. Kɑ kedh-ɑ løøgø geki Elicɑ̀ ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ keny thwøwø." 
2Kings2:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki wɑ̈dhi løøgø, ɑpyëëj Elicɑ̀ yi Eliyɑ̀ kinni, “Á ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o göggɑ yïn kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti kɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn kì butí?” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Wiy yɑ lɑgɑ tegí, o yɑ göögɑ yɑn ɑ́ kejí.”" 
2Kings2:10 Alöggi Eliyɑ̀ kinni, “Yï ɑ́cwøl gïjø me muuje teeg. De keløg yɑ ólidh yi yïn keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn kì butí, tengɑni bɑ men mëggi yïn, o ke pɑ liidh yɑn, pɑ mëggi yïn.”" 
2Kings2:11 Akedh gen ge ócyɑ̈dhø ge okööbø, kɑ yɑ̈y me bɑ mɑc, me pyejji yi kyënyì mø bɑ mɑc, ceg-ɑ ì rïg kì kɑɑm gen, kɑ Eliyɑ̀ kïdhi mɑl kì yij ɑ́kødɑkødø." 
2Kings2:12 Kɑ lidh yi Elicɑ̀, ɑryeere kinni, “Wïyø! Wïyø! Yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nyɑg per Isrɑil, yï ɑ́kedh!” Eliyɑ̀ nuti cigi lidhø yi en. Kɑ Elicɑ̀ ógødhe kɑge ɑ́ ɑ́ryew, yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe." 
2Kings2:13 Kɑ lɑwi Eliyɑ̀ lɑw-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kì yïe, kwɑny yi Elicɑ̀. Adøøge, kɑ ócungø kì kömi Nɑm Urdun." 
2Kings2:14 Kɑ pï gøje ki lɑni Eliyɑ̀, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jwøøg Eliyɑ̀, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ying-ɑ keny?” Acige pï gøjø, kɑ pï ópyëdø møg døøg-ɑ tuung kí tuung. Kɑ Elicɑ̀ kedh-ɑ løøgø e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny thwøwø." 
2Kings2:15 Kɑ lidh yi jøtöng-ɑ ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerikö, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Tegi Eliyɑ̀ ying-ɑ kömi Elicɑ̀!” Codhe, ɑkedhi gen be yïddø ki gøn. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny kì bøle," 
2Kings2:16 ge okööbø kinni, “Wø bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, wø teeg bënn. Wiy wø kedhi wøn be yɑbi wöw. Óbëëd e ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø leenge wïj kït, wɑlɑ̀ yij tör.” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ko kedh.”" 
2Kings2:17 De ge ɑ́dyëëj gïti kɑ ɑ́buudh kööre kɑ oyïëyø. Akööbe kinni, “Døj kedh wun.” Codhe ɑkedh gen gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj bënn be yɑbi Eliyɑ̀. Kɑ ge oyɑ̈bø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, de gø nuti yood gen." 
2Kings2:18 Codhe ɑdøøg gen yï Elicɑ̀, kɑ gø yuud gen e døøg Yerikö, ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Wu nuti kyëddi yɑn kinni wu ko kedh?”" 
2Kings2:19 Kɑ kwï jø Yerikö kedh-ɑ yï Elicɑ̀, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn wuö kinni kɑɑl men, bɑ kɑɑl me døøj. De pïge rijjø; gïg-ɑ nyi pidh pɑ nyi twïy.”" 
2Kings2:20 Aköbbi gen yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kɑ̈ni wun ki lwøl me nyɑ̈n, kɑ yije kïdhi wun ki omelø.” Kɑ muujii." 
2Kings2:21 Codhe ɑkedhe wɑɑng pï, kɑ omelø kønye wɑɑng pïgɑni. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Pïg ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn ge døøj, ge pɑ kɑ̈ni ki thøø këti, wɑlɑ̀ gïg-ɑ nyi pidh pɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈n twïyø yi gen.’ ”" 
2Kings2:22 Kɑ pïgɑni ódönyø, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Elicɑ̀. Kɑ ge ocögø ge døøj." 
2Kings2:23 Adhwödh Elicɑ̀ kì Yerikö e kedh-ɑ Betiil. Kɑ gɑggi kì kö yöö yi yɑnythønhø mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l pɑc megø, ge ceg-ɑ ryeerø, ge okööbø kinni, “Kedh kì keny, wɑ̈d wïj ɑbudh!”" 
2Kings2:24 Aløg Elicɑ̀ ree, kɑ lïïdh-ɑ yï gen, kɑ gï lɑme ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ lɑ̈yy dub ɑ́ryew mø bɑ mɑdhh, bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij thïm. Kɑ yɑnythønhø pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew nyɑɑr gen piny." 
2Kings2:25 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ pödh-ɑ Kïti Kɑrmel, codhe ɑdøøge Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings3:1 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Yörɑm wɑ̈d Akɑɑb ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings3:2 Yörɑm ɑ́göög ki gïgrijjø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de nuti bëëdø e rɑɑj cɑrø ni wïye geki meye Yidhɑbel. Mɑ́ ngïji Bɑɑl men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye ɑ́dhure piny." 
2Kings3:3 Yörɑm Isrɑil ɑ́peeje yij orøg ni Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt cøn, kɑ Yörɑm ódhɑ̈lø wïyø ki orøg." 
2Kings3:4 Mecɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ römm. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil nyii muujø yi en ki órömm-ɑ thønhø ɑ́lïp miyø, kí yëyyi dyëg ɑ́tegg gɑ ɑ́lïp miyø yethi runn bënn ɑ́ gwɑ̈j." 
2Kings3:5 De keny-ɑ ɑ́thøw Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye." 
2Kings3:6 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kedh Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kɑ liny Isrɑil bëne cønge." 
2Kings3:7 Aödi Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm yï Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ki wöödø kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye. Yï ócuggø rëbø ki yɑn, o wɑ kedhi wɑ be nyɑɑg ki en?” Alöggi Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Yɑ ókedh. Yɑ nɑ yïn, o jiɑ nɑ jií, o kyënyɑ nɑ kyënyí." 
2Kings3:8 Wɑ ókɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Kɑ Yörɑm okööbø kinni, “Wɑ ókɑ̈l-ɑ yij pɑ̈ɑ̈l Edöm.”" 
2Kings3:9 Akedh Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm geki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm. Kì bɑng wɑ̈ɑ̈dh cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kɑ ge ójɑ̈ddø ki pïg mɑdh yi gen geki jøliny, kí jɑmmi gen." 
2Kings3:10 Agɑ̈y Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm kinni, “Pöy! Wɑ ɑ́ceg kɑ cïb cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e men-ɑ́ wɑ bɑ rɑ̈nhì ɑ́dɑ̈g?”" 
2Kings3:11 Apëjji Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Dɑ jɑltöng me nud kì keny, me cuggi pyëji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?” Alöggi pënyi liny ɑ́kyel kì kelli pëjji liny Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm kinni, “Elicɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑpɑt nud, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nyi køny-ɑ Eliyɑ̀.”" 
2Kings3:12 Akööb Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Bɑ jɑltöng kidyër!” Akedhi rɑ̈nhhɑni yï Elicɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
2Kings3:13 Apyëëj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yïde ki yɑn? Kedhí be pyëji jøtöng møg-ɑ́ nyi pyëj yi wïyí geki meyí.” Alöggi Yörɑm kinni, “Pɑth! Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́cïb wøn cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb, wøn ɑ́ rɑ̈nhì ɑ́dɑ̈g.”" 
2Kings3:14 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ bøle göögɑ yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈nge, møgí pɑ di løøg yi yɑn, keløg e pɑth ki Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki yïn, en ɑ wør yi yɑn." 
2Kings3:15 Muuj wun yɑn ki bødhi thom.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́thoom thom, ɑbëën tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömi Elicɑ̀." 
2Kings3:16 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Kuny wun ki ɑwöll kì tyeli nɑm keny-ɑ thwøwø èn." 
2Kings3:17 Cɑgg e bong kødh, wɑlɑ̀ yømø men-ɑ ólidh yi wun, tyeli nɑmɑni ópɑ̈ng yi pï, kɑ wu omɑ̈dhø ki pï, wuki jɑmm-ɑ kwølli yi wun, geki møg-ɑ tyëddi jɑmmi wun.’ ”" 
2Kings3:18 Akööb Elicɑ̀ këti kinni, “Menɑni bɑ gïjø me gwøge yööd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wu ówëgge tyɑmi tyëng Moɑb thyew." 
2Kings3:19 Kɑ̈ddi tyëng Moɑb, kɑ̈dd-ɑ thøø yi gerø ówëgge mɑgø yi wun. Yenhi gen, yenh-ɑ nywøli gen nyi cɑm, óngøl piny yi wun, kɑ nyingi pï mø gen rïg yi wun. Yethi pwödhhi gen, pwödhh-ɑ døøj ólëngi yi wun ki tuggi kïttì, kɑ ge rënyi yi wun.”" 
2Kings3:20 Dhuki kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi muuj gënhi mwøl, ɑmwöj pï kì kuni Edöm, kɑ piny opɑ̈ngø yi pï." 
2Kings3:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Moɑb kinni rɑ̈nhì ɑ́dɑ̈g bï-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ cuggi nyïɑ̈ggø, yɑɑg døngø, kí remthinh cøng, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ wïj tuung pödhi gen." 
2Kings3:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyëëw gen kì mwøl cɑ̈ng ótuulø, cɑre göjj-ɑ kömi pï, ɑliidh pï yi tyëng Moɑb, ge kwɑɑr nɑ remø." 
2Kings3:23 Aryeer gen kinni, “Menɑni bɑ remø! Jøliny mø rɑ̈nhhɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g ri gen nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen. Bïu kedhi wɑ kɑɑl gen be kwɑnyi jɑmmi gen!”" 
2Kings3:24 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kɑɑl Isrɑil, kɑ ge jöny yi liny Isrɑil. Adwøøg gen yöö ge pwööd-ɑ piny yi liny Isrɑil." 
2Kings3:25 Kɑ kɑ̈ddi gen rënyi. Kenyi yood pwödhø me døøj yi jø Isrɑil, ge nyi ceg-ɑ lëngi yije ki tuggi kïttì, kɑ pwödh órënyø. Nyingi pï ɑ́rïg yi gen thyew. Kɑ yenh-ɑ nywøli gen nyi cɑm ngøl gen piny. Kɑ döng ɑ́ kɑɑl Kïr Ëres, kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng kete ɑ nuti cøør piny, de ɑ́tyeg yi jøg-ɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈dø ki bɑ̈ddi lel, kɑ gø bɑ̈lli gen." 
2Kings3:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb kinni nënni e otyɑmø, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki jøliny pil gɑ miy ɑ́bïryew, kinni o di turre wɑ̈g e cør-ɑ yij liny Isrɑil, o di pɑ̈ɑ̈re yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li twïy wɑ̈g." 
2Kings3:27 Codhe ɑkwɑnye wɑ̈de, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø, ɑ di lɑg keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø rɑ̈bbe jwøøg Moɑb ɑ́ gëëdhi, kì wïj döri kɑɑlɑni. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil obwøgø ki mendwøng yi gïn ni menɑni, ɑdøøg gen myërri gen." 
2Kings4:1 Ngɑn jɑdø me jɑlgøle thøø, o jɑlɑni bëëdø ɑ́ jɑltöng, ɑ́kedhi yï Elicɑ̀, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jɑlgølɑ ɑ́thøw wuö! Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni ɑ́bëëd e bögg-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De ɑnɑn, jɑl me pirii ɑ́bï be kɑ̈li wɑ̈ddɑ ryeet, o gï gwøge gɑ bɑ̈ngg, gɑ wïj kwör-ɑ cwɑggi jɑlgølɑ.”" 
2Kings4:2 Aköbbii yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Göggɑ yïn ngø? Köbbí yɑn, ɑ́ ngø ɑ nud kì yïí kì gølí?” Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Bong gïjø me nud kinni tek, den-ɑ́ pugi møøw dhetun me thiinh ɑ nud kete.”" 
2Kings4:3 Akööb Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kedh, kɑ yï kwɑ̈jjí kì yï tyëng byëëg wun bënn ki puggì mø gïïr." 
2Kings4:4 Kɑ gølí cyëëg kömí wuki wɑ̈ddí, kɑ puggɑni bënn kunyí ki møwɑni, kɑ men-ɑ nyi pɑ̈ng nyi cïb wɑ̈ye.”" 
2Kings4:5 Akedhi ngɑnɑni gøle, kɑ gøle cyëëge köme geki wɑ̈dde. Kɑ pung-ɑ yije di møw kwɑny yi ngɑnɑni, kɑ møw nyi kønye yethi pugg-ɑ nyi gɑ̈mmii yi wɑ̈dde." 
2Kings4:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ng puggɑni bënn, ɑpëjji ngɑnɑni mɑ bëëd e dɑ puggì møøgø. Alöggi wɑ̈de ɑ́kyel kinni, “Bong megø mɑ ɑ́döng.” Kɑ møw ócungø." 
2Kings4:7 Akedh ngɑnɑni, kɑ jɑltöng lwöbbe. Aköbbi ngɑnɑni yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kedh, kɑ møwɑni ngeew wɑ̈g, o yï yïddí ki ngyëny møg cool kwör-ɑ kömí. Ngyënyy-ɑ döng ócɑm yi yïn, wuki wɑ̈ddí.”" 
2Kings4:8 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel Elicɑ̀ ɑ́kedhi Cunem, ɑ́dɑ ngɑndhɑjø me kɑ̈rø kì kɑɑlɑni. Kɑ ryej yi ngɑnɑni. Kì bɑng kenyɑni, kɑ nyi døøg-ɑ be cɑm kì gøl ngɑnɑni kenyi wele Cunem." 
2Kings4:9 Kɑ ngɑnɑni jɑlgøle köbbe kinni, “Men-ɑ́ jɑl-ɑ nyi bï gølee èn, be ngeti kwër." 
2Kings4:10 Gëëd wɑ ki ød me thiinh kì wïj óthɑɑng ød, kɑ yije cïbi ki pyën, kí tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ kí kwøm, kí lɑ̈mbɑ̈, o nyi bëëde kì ønɑni kenyi bëëne be këëmi wɑ.”" 
2Kings4:11 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel Elicɑ̀ ɑ́weli Cunem, kɑ yedh-ɑ øde be ywömø." 
2Kings4:12 Kɑ bɑ̈nge, Gïëdhì öre be cwööli ngɑnɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe," 
2Kings4:13 ɑköbbe Gïëdhì kinni, “Pyëj ngɑnɑni, ɑ́ ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi en, o göggɑ en, wïj gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge wɑ ek bënn? Dɑ gïn cuggɑ ki köbbi rɑ̈dh wɑlɑ̀ pënyi liny, wɑlɑ̀ jɑgø kipere?” Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Bong gïjø me jɑ̈ddi yɑn kì kelli wɑddi wøn kì keny.”" 
2Kings4:14 Apyëëj Gïëdhì yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Á ngø ɑ cuggi göggii yi yɑn cyee?” Alöggi Gïëdhì kinni, “Men-ɑ́ en, yïe bong wɑ̈d, o jɑlgøle bɑ yu.”" 
2Kings4:15 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Köbbí bëe!” Kɑ cwøl yi Gïëdhì. Codhe, ɑbëëne kɑ ócungø kì dhø ød." 
2Kings4:16 Aköbbii yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Run-ɑ bï piny nɑ men, yï óbëëdø yï ómïdhø ki wɑ̈d kì köörí.” Agɑ̈ye kinni, “Möy! Yï bɑ jɑltöng, yɑ ko köbbí ki kwøbbi pyed!”" 
2Kings4:17 De ngɑnɑni ɑ́yɑɑj, ɑnywøle ki wɑ̈d kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Elicɑ̀ ceth." 
2Kings4:18 Kɑ nyelthinh ódøngø. Kɑ kedh-ɑ pwödhø yï wïye cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel byel okɑjø. 
2Kings4:19 Kɑ wïye köbbe kinni, “Wïjɑ orɑ̈mø! Wïjɑ orɑ̈mø!”" 
2Kings4:20 Kɑ bɑ̈ng köbbi yi wïye kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l, muuj meye.” Codhe kɑ nyelthinh byeel yï meye yi bɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ mïdhi kì kɑ̈w yi meye gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi cɑ̈ng dïmɑl. Codhe, ɑmije wɑnge." 
2Kings4:21 Kɑ gø kïdhe ød mɑl, kɑ gø pyëële yij pyëën Elicɑ̀ jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ ød cyëëge köme." 
2Kings4:22 Acwøle jɑlgøle kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Ödí yɑn ki bɑ̈ng kí ɑderø, o yɑ jwɑnɑ yï jɑltöng, yɑ ójwɑn dwöögø.”" 
2Kings4:23 Kɑ jɑlgøle okööbø kinni, “Yïde ɑ kedh dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, e pɑth ki cyɑ̈ng kwëër Sɑbɑth, wɑlɑ̀ pɑth ki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y?” Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Wiy yɑ kedhɑ yøw.”" 
2Kings4:24 Codhe kɑ ɑderø muujii kí jɑmme kì köme, ɑköbbe bɑ̈ngɑni kinni, “Pwööd ɑderø yöö, kɑ ko wëggí cyɑ̈dhø mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, keløg e pɑth ki yɑn ɑ kööbø kinni nwöngí wɑ̈dh.”" 
2Kings4:25 Codhe, ɑdhwödhe kɑ kedh-ɑ Kɑrmel yï jɑltöng. Kɑ lidh yi Elicɑ̀ e obëënø e nudd e lɑ̈wi, ɑköbbe bɑ̈nge Gïëdhì kinni, “Lidh ngeti Cunem ɑ bï ɑcinee." 
2Kings4:26 Jwɑní yïe kɑ pyëëj mɑ yöd dële geki jɑlgøle kí wɑ̈de.” Kɑ Gïëdhì köbbi yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Bong gïnrɑj.”" 
2Kings4:27 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe wïj kït yï Elicɑ̀, ɑbøødhe ree piny kì bøle, kɑ tyelli Elicɑ̀ mɑge. Kɑ Gïëdhì kedh-ɑ be teelii cyɑ̈n, de ɑ́kyëddi yi jɑltöng kinni, “Wiy! Pɑ nenni yi yïn pyëwe cödø? O bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri møgɑni.”" 
2Kings4:28 Kɑ ngɑnɑni okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́di cwöd ki wɑ̈d kì yïí, wuö? Yï nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni yɑ ko wëëny?”" 
2Kings4:29 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ ree luge Gïëdhì, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Pyeew, kwɑny lodhɑ kɑ yï kedh. Yï ko pɑ̈nyi cung yï mɑ̈dh-ɑ dhɑnhø, omɑ̈ɑ̈dh yïn kɑ yï ko löggi, kedh pödhí ød, kɑ lodhɑ cïb wïj nyelthinh kì bøle.”" 
2Kings4:30 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ köbbi yi ngɑnɑni kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, yï pɑ wiy yi yɑn kinni tek!” Codhe ɑkedh Elicɑ̀ geki ngɑnɑni." 
2Kings4:31 Gïëdhì ɑ́møøl bøli gen, kɑ lodh bøødhe wïj nyelthinh, de nyelthinh ɑ́cög e ì lek, o pɑ pɑ̈nyi onywen. Adwööge yï Elicɑ̀ kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Nyelthinh nuti dhwödhø.”" 
2Kings4:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Elicɑ̀, ɑkedhe ød, ɑlidhe nyelthinh e obuddø kì yij pyën e thøø." 
2Kings4:33 Acyëge ød kömi gen, gɑ ɑ́ryew, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjje." 
2Kings4:34 Codhe, ɑbudde ree rïïj en kì kömi nyelɑni, dhøge rwööm en ki dhøg gøn, o nyinge rwööm en ki nyingi gøn, o cingge rwööm en ki cinggi gøn. Kɑ dëël nyelthinh ócɑ̈gø ki lënhø." 
2Kings4:35 Adhwödhi Elicɑ̀ mɑl, kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø e owïïnø kì yij ød, ɑdøøge ree ki rïïj kömi nyelthinh, ɑjerri nyelthinh tyel ɑ́bïryew, codhe kɑ nyinge yiebe." 
2Kings4:36 Acwøøl Gïëdhì yi Elicɑ̀, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, cwøle meyi nyelɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne yïe, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kwɑny wɑ̈dí ɑnɑn.”" 
2Kings4:37 Kɑ ngɑnɑni ree bøødhe wïje këële’ piny kì bøli Elicɑ̀, codhe ɑkwɑnye wɑ̈de, ɑkedhe." 
2Kings4:38 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ døøg-ɑ Gilgɑl. Piny ɑ́bëëd e dɑ kɑ̈j kì bøli kenyɑni. Elicɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e pwöny-ɑ jøtöng, ɑköbbe bɑ̈nge kinni tɑ̈ɑ̈de ki gïjø me cɑm yi gen kì yij dɑg me dwøng." 
2Kings4:39 Akedhi nget ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen yij pwödhø be pøn ki lum, ɑyïdde ki lum me mulli, kɑ opunø ki nywøli gøn. Akɑ̈ɑ̈le gïn, kɑ gï ngøle dɑg, de gï kwïje, mɑ bëëd gɑ ngø." 
2Kings4:40 Atööge gïncɑm wɑ̈g kinni o jøgɑni cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen. De keny-ɑ ɑ́bel gen gïncɑmɑni, ɑryeer gen, ge göny-ɑ Elicɑ̀, kinni, “Gïncɑmɑni bɑ men nɑ̈g ji!” Kɑ ódhɑ̈lø cɑmø yi gen." 
2Kings4:41 Acwöddi Elicɑ̀ ki møng-ɑ búr, kɑ gø leenge dɑg, ɑkööbe kinni, “Töggí gen ki gïncɑm.” Kɑ gïncɑmɑni ogöögø e bong gïnrɑj kì ree." 
2Kings4:42 Kɑ jɑl megø obëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Bɑɑl Cɑlicɑ̀, e muuj-ɑ Elicɑ̀ ki ópùn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew mø mwölli ceir, kí wɑ̈thi byel mø mɑr. Kɑ Elicɑ̀ bɑ̈nge köbbe kinni, nënge jøtöng ki gïncɑm yi gen kì ri jɑmmɑni." 
2Kings4:43 Alögge kinni, “Yï orumø kinni gïgcɑmmɑni órømmi ri ji miyø?” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Nëngí gen, o ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, i ge ócyɑ̈mø, kɑ kwï gïncɑmɑni odöngø.”" 
2Kings4:44 Codhe ɑmuuje gïncɑm, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen, kɑ kwï gïncɑm odöngø, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
2Kings5:1 Nɑɑmɑn pënyi liny Arɑm ɑ́bëëd pere teeg kì yï wɑ̈n, mɑ́ en ɑ ree ɑ́wëggi Arɑm tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ábëëd ɑ́ jɑl me teg ki mendwøng, de ree ɑ́dɑ wɑɑny." 
2Kings5:2 Kì bøli keny megø, tyëng Arɑm mɑ̈nyi Isrɑil, kɑ nyɑnthinh megø kɑ̈l yi gen kì pödhi Isrɑil. Kɑ gwøg ɑ́ bɑ̈ng yi cï Nɑɑmɑn." 
2Kings5:3 Kɑ wɑ̈n köbbe cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kinni, “Wɑ̈ɑ ce di ceg-ɑ kedhi yï jɑltöng men-ɑ bëëdø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Di yiel yi jɑltöngɑni ki wɑɑny men-ɑ ree.”" 
2Kings5:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Nɑɑmɑn. Akedhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbe møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi nyɑnthinh." 
2Kings5:5 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Kedhí yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Yï ógwëdɑ ki wɑ̈nyø men muujií.” Codhe, ɑkedh Nɑɑmɑn e ókɑ̈ddø ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí ngyëny dhɑb gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïkyel, kí ógudh mø myëër gɑ pyɑ̈rø." 
2Kings5:6 Wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi en ógwedø kinni, “Wɑ̈nyø men örɑ’ yïn kí Nɑɑmɑn bɑ̈ngɑ; örɑ’ yïí kipe kinni o yiel yi yïn ki wɑɑny men-ɑ ree.”" 
2Kings5:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑɑng wɑ̈nyɑni yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ ógødhe pyëde, mɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈m yi møgɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kɑ̈n-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki rumm-ɑ ni møg, kinni jɑɑl ócuggø yielø yi yɑn ki wɑɑny men-ɑ ree? Ceg-ɑ rumø kinni yɑ bɑ Jwøk me cuggi nɑ̈ggø, wɑlɑ̀ me cuggi muujø ki wëy? Nënni e yɑb-ɑ wëërø ki yɑn!”" 
2Kings5:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Elicɑ̀ jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk, ɑöde yï rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yïde ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí, kɑ ógudhí pyëëd? Wiy bëe yïɑ, o nyudhɑ kinni dɑ jɑltöng kì Isrɑil!”" 
2Kings5:9 Codhe, ɑkedh Nɑɑmɑn kí kyënye geki yɑ̈the, kɑ ócungø kì dhø gøl Elicɑ̀." 
2Kings5:10 Kɑ Elicɑ̀ öd-ɑ yïe ki bɑ̈ng men köbbii kinni i kedhe be lwøggø kì Nɑm Urdun, kɑ rønye ki tyel ɑ́bïryew, o dële døøge keje, o wɑɑny lɑ̈ɑ̈nye kì ree." 
2Kings5:11 De Nɑɑmɑn pyëwe ɑ́yöd e ceg-ɑ rënyø, kɑ ókedhø e okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́rømm-ɑ kinni di ceg-ɑ bëën wɑ̈g yïɑ, o Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j di kwɑjje, o cinge di winne kì mɑl kömi kɑ̈jj-ɑ ledh, o gïn-ɑ riɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nye." 
2Kings5:12 O thyew cøn, Abɑnɑ̀ geki Pɑrpɑr nɑ̈mmi Dimɑceg pɑ lɑ̈w kibøli nɑ̈mmi Isrɑil? Yɑ pɑ di lwøg kì yethi gen kɑ dëlɑ di dönyi?”" 
2Kings5:13 Akedhi bɑ̈nge yïe, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Wuö, keløg yï di köbb-ɑ gïjø me gwøge teeg yi jɑltöng, pɑ di gwøg yi yïn? De ɑnɑn yï ɑ́köbbe’ lwøggø yøw, yïde ɑ pɑ lwøøg ceth, o dëlí dönye?”" 
2Kings5:14 Akedhi Nɑɑmɑn Nɑm Urdun, kɑ røny-ɑ nɑm ki tyel ɑ́bïryew ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk, kɑ dële ceg-ɑ dönyø bëne. Kɑ dële døøg-ɑ keje e dhïw ni dëël othinh." 
2Kings5:15 Codhe, ɑdwööge geki jøge, ɑköbbe jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk kinni, “Áyod yi yɑn, ɑnɑn cyee, kinni bong jwøg me nud, den-ɑ́ Jwøøg Isrɑil kete! De yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn wuö, yïëy gïn-ɑ mëggɑ yïn èn.”" 
2Kings5:16 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn, ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ bøle göögɑ yɑ bɑ bɑ̈nge, yɑ pɑ pɑ̈nyi kɑ̈bbø ki gïïpiny.” Elicɑ̀ ɑ́dyej yi Nɑɑmɑn kinni o di yïëye, de nuti yïëyø kinni tek." 
2Kings5:17 Codhe, ɑkööb Nɑɑmɑn kinni, “Keløg gïn-ɑ mëggɑ yïn pɑ yïëy yi yïn, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, thödhí yɑn ki lɑ̈bø men cuggi tërø yi ɑderr ɑ́ryew, men kïdhɑ pödhi wøn, kipe kinni cɑg ɑnɑn, bong jwøg men nëngi yi yɑn ki jwödhø, wɑlɑ̀ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne den-ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete." 
2Kings5:18 Wiy pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki yɑn kenyi lwøøgɑ rɑ̈dh kengi Rimön jwøøg Arɑm, kí kenyi bøødhɑ riɑ piny kyeel ki en, mɑ́ e nyi døm-ɑ yi yɑn ki cingɑ.”" 
2Kings5:19 Akööb Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kedh ki mër.” Akedh Nɑɑmɑn. Nɑɑmɑn ɑ́bëëd e nuti wɑ̈dhi keny me lɑ̈wi," 
2Kings5:20 Kɑ Gïëdhì bɑ̈ng Elicɑ̀ jɑltöng, ree köbbe kinni, “Wɑ̈ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi kɑ̈bbø kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Nɑɑmɑn jɑl Arɑm, ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ceg-ɑ rengi bɑnge, o yɑ kɑ̈bbɑ ki gïïpiny kì yïe.”" 
2Kings5:21 Codhe, ɑløge bɑng Nɑɑmɑn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi Nɑɑmɑn kinni dɑ dhɑnhø me rïngi kì bɑnge, ɑyïnhe piny kì yij yɑ̈ye, kɑ døøg-ɑ be pɑɑri ngɑnɑni. Apyëje gøn kinni, “Dɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji?”" 
2Kings5:22 Kɑ Gïëdhì okööbø kinni, “Bong gøn! De yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi wɑ̈ɑ i köbbɑ yïn kinni dɑ jøtöng ɑ́ryew møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l myërri kïtti Eprɑim, i nëngí gen ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, ki ógudh ɑ́ryew møg myër.”" 
2Kings5:23 Adyejii yi Nɑɑmɑn kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïkyel.” Kɑ ngyënyyɑni twööj yethi kidhhì ɑ́ryew yi Nɑɑmɑn, kí ógudh ɑ́ryew kí møg nyi wiil gen thyew. Kɑ gï mëgge bɑ̈ngge ɑ́ryew, o gï tyëddi gen kì bøli Gïëdhì." 
2Kings5:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen buti kït, keny-ɑ bëëd yi Elicɑ̀, ɑkwɑɑny kidhhɑni ryeet yi Gïëdhì, ɑkïdhe gïn kɑl. Codhe ɑköbbe bɑ̈nggi Nɑɑmɑn kinni døg gen." 
2Kings5:25 Akedhe kɑ ócungø kì bøli wɑ̈n, kɑ pyëj yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny, Gïëdhì?” Alöggi Gïëdhì kinni, “Bong keny mɑ ɑ́kedhɑ.”" 
2Kings5:26 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yï orumø tïbɑ nuti ying-ɑ kunɑni ɑ́tïni, keny-ɑ ɑ́yïnhi jɑlɑni piny kì yij yɑ̈ye, e bï-ɑ yïí? Men bɑ bøli keny kɑ̈bbi ki ngyëny møg ngëëw ki pwödh, kí bɑ̈ggi yenh dhetun, kí dyëg geki dhög, kí bɑ̈ngg-ɑ cwøw geki bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn?" 
2Kings5:27 De ɑnɑn wɑɑny Nɑɑmɑn ceg-ɑ mɑ̈gø kì rií, wuki kwɑrrí gïti ɑtheer.” Akedhe kì buti Elicɑ̀ e tɑr ni ɑ́piy yi wɑɑny." 
2Kings6:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, e ɑkuud jøtöng obëëdø kì buti Elicɑ̀, kɑ gönyi yi gen kinni, “Keny-ɑ bëëd yi wøn twij!" 
2Kings6:2 Wiy wø kedhi wøn kömi Nɑm Urdun be ngøl ki yenh, o wø gëëd wøn ki keny bëëd yi wøn.” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Døj, kedh wun.”" 
2Kings6:3 Kɑ jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen Elicɑ̀ kwɑjje, kinni kedhe ki gen, ɑyïëye." 
2Kings6:4 Kɑ ge ókedhø kyeel. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kömi Nɑm Urdun, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki ngøl ki yenh." 
2Kings6:5 De cem jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøgɑni ngøl-ɑ yɑdh, ɑör dørø, kɑ dëëm-ɑ yethi pï. Aywøøg jɑlɑni kö Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kɑ yɑ göög ɑ dï cyee, wuö? E dørɑni ɑ́ceg yi yɑn kɑ widhø!”" 
2Kings6:6 Apyëjii yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Ádëëm ɑ keny?” Anyudhii kenyɑni yi jɑlɑni. Angud Elicɑ̀ ki okewi yɑdh, kɑ gø leenge kenyɑni, kɑ dørø othwørø." 
2Kings6:7 Aköbbi jɑlɑni yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kwɑɑny, kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g!” Arïïj jɑlɑni cinge, kɑ dørø kwɑnye." 
2Kings6:8 Kì bøli kenyɑni rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ nyɑɑg ki Isrɑil, kɑ pëjji linye pyëje kinni, “Wɑ gudd-ɑ keny ki kɑɑl?” Codhe ɑmyeg gen kej kɑɑl gen." 
2Kings6:9 De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ɑ́kyëddi yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, ko kɑ̈l buti kenyɑni, mɑ́ yöö óbuddø yi tyëng Arɑm." 
2Kings6:10 Codhe, kɑ tyëng myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki kenyɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kinni bëëd gen ge tid-ɑ yuuɑni. Kɑ ogöögø ki tyel mø gïïr, e nyi köbb-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ni møgɑni yi jɑltöng." 
2Kings6:11 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm pyëwe órënyø yi møgɑni, ɑcwøle pëjji linye, kɑ gï pyëje kinni, “Á men kì kelli wun ɑ nyi töddi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil?”" 
2Kings6:12 Alöggi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen kinni, “Bong ngɑn nyi töddii kì kelli wøn wuö, den-ɑ́ Elicɑ̀ jɑltöng men-ɑ bëëdø kì Isrɑil, ɑ nyi köbbi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ki gïg-ɑ nyi kømmi yi yïn, cɑgg ɑ́ kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi yïn kì ødí.”" 
2Kings6:13 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm okööbø kinni, “Yɑbu keny-ɑ bëëde, o mɑg yi yɑn.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbii kinni i Elicɑ̀ ying-ɑ Döthɑn," 
2Kings6:14 ɑöde ki kyënyì geki yɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí yɑy me dwøng. Kɑ ge ókedhø, ɑwɑ̈dhi gen kɑɑlɑni kì wɑ̈r, kɑ gø tyeg gen." 
2Kings6:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhwödh bɑ̈ng Elicɑ̀, dhuki kì mwøl, kɑ bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ød, ɑlidhe kɑɑl e bɑ ɑtyeg yi yɑy, kí kyënyi gen geki yɑ̈thi gen. Kɑ døøg-ɑ yï Elicɑ̀, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wɑ göög ɑ dï wuö?”" 
2Kings6:16 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yï ko böggi. Linyee dwøng kibøli liny gen!”" 
2Kings6:17 Codhe, ɑkwɑ̈jji Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yieb nyinge, o lïdhe!” Kɑ nyingi bɑ̈ng Elicɑ̀ yieb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑtïnge wïje kɑ tøggi kït lidhe ge pɑ̈ng yi kyënyì geki yɑ̈thi mɑc, Elicɑ̀ ówenø yi gen kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
2Kings6:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën jø Arɑm ge dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Elicɑ̀, ɑkwɑ̈jji Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, göjjí gen cøørø!” Kɑ ge göjji cøørø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings6:19 Akedhi Elicɑ̀ yï gen, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Wu ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny ki yöö, men pɑth ki kɑɑl-ɑ yɑb yi wun. Lug wun bɑngɑ o wu nyudhɑ jɑl-ɑ yɑb yi wun.” Apeeje gïn Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings6:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen dïdyëri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ceth, ɑkwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yieb nyingi gen, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wiy ge lïdhi gen.” Kɑ nyingi gen yieb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑlïdhi gen kinni ge ying-ɑ dïdyëri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings6:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh gen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑpyëje Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Nɑ̈gɑ gen wuö? Nɑ̈gɑ gen wuö?”" 
2Kings6:22 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Ge ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Gede ɑ dwɑddí gen nɑ̈gø, e pɑth ki yïn ɑ ɑ́mɑg gen ki tegí? Ceg gen ki nëngø ki gïncɑm, kí pï, kɑ wiy ge døøg gen yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen.”" 
2Kings6:23 Codhe, ɑmuuj gen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ki gïgcɑmm mø ngenyø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki cɑm, ɑwiy gen døøg gen yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm. Kì bɑng kenyɑni, kɑ liny Arɑm ówïyø bëën be mɑ̈nyø pödhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings6:24 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ Benɑdɑd rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, jølinye cønge bënn, ɑbëëne kɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ tyege." 
2Kings6:25 Atëngi kɑ̈j ki mendwøng kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́tyegii ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kɑ ngewi wïj ɑderø wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Kɑ ngewi yij cingø ɑ́kyel mi cyedhhi ɑkur wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́bïj." 
2Kings6:26 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wïj döri kɑɑl, ɑryeer ngɑndhɑjø megø e cwøl-ɑ gøn kinni, “Køny yɑn wuö rɑ̈dhɑ!”" 
2Kings6:27 Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Keløg yï nuti kønyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ yïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki gïn kønyɑ yïn? Dɑ gemè wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg me nud kì yïɑ?”" 
2Kings6:28 Apyëjii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Á gïn ɑ rɑj cøn?” Alögge kinni, “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑcɑ̀ yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi ngɑɑn, i cɑm wøn wɑ̈dɑ, o wɑ̈de ólony yi wøn ki cɑmø dhuki." 
2Kings6:29 Codhe, ɑthɑl wøn wɑ̈dɑ, kɑ cɑm yi wøn. Dhuki keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ en kinni, kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈de o cɑm yi wøn, wɑ̈de gø kɑɑn en.”" 
2Kings6:30 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi rɑ̈dh, ɑkɑge ógødhe, mɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈m yi kwøbbɑni. Kɑ lidh yi tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈gi kì ri dörø e rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈lø kì thɑ ógødhe." 
2Kings6:31 Akönge kinni, “Wiy yɑ nɑ̈g yi Jwøk, keløg wïj Elicɑ̀ pɑ ngulɑ wɑ̈g dicyɑ̈ngtïn!”" 
2Kings6:32 Aöde ki ngɑn dwɑɑy Elicɑ̀. Elicɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ gøle geki kwï jøgdøngø møg këëmii. Aköbbi jøgɑni yi Elicɑ̀, e ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi rɑ̈dh nuti wɑ̈nhø, kinni, “Wɑ̈d jɑlnɑ̈g ki ji menɑni ɑ́öni ki ngɑn bï be nɑ̈gi yɑn. De keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhe, kɑ ød cyëëg wun, o cöge e pɑ cuggi bëën ød. Rɑ̈dh kiree ɑ bï kì bɑnge.”" 
2Kings6:33 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd Elicɑ̀ okööbø ki gen, ɑwɑ̈nhi jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör, kedh rɑ̈dh ówɑ̈nhø kì bɑnge ceth. Akööb rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈g men kömee! Dɑ́ ngø ɑ gɑ̈nni yi yɑn kì yïe?”" 
2Kings7:1 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Lïng wun ki møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Dhuki piny nɑ men, kïllì ɑ́dɑ̈g mø gemè me døøj óngew kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel, o kïllì ɑ́bïkyel mø ceir óngew kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel thyew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀!”" 
2Kings7:2 Alöggi pënyi liny men-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki rɑ̈dh kinni, “Gïn ni menɑni pɑ cuggi kinni tek, cɑgg mɑl ceg ki yiebø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ byel kunye piny!” Kɑ Elicɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Ólidh yi yïn ki wɑngí keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi møgɑni kɑ̈jji gen, de yï koo cyɑ̈mø ki gïgcɑmmɑni.”" 
2Kings7:3 Ádɑ jøg ɑ́ngwen mø ri gen di wɑɑny, mø nyi bëëdø kì dhø döri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Kɑ jøgɑni ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Wɑ pïd-ɑ wɑɑng wɑ obëëdø kì keny?" 
2Kings7:4 Bong gïjø me pere kedhi wɑ kɑɑl, mɑ́ wɑ bɑ møg nɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j kì kɑɑlɑni. De ke bëëd wɑ kì keny thyew, wɑ bɑ møg thøw. Ceg wɑ kedhi kɑɑl Arɑm. Keløg wɑ owiyø yi gen, døøj. De keløg wɑ onɑ̈gø yi gen wɑ óthøw.”" 
2Kings7:5 Codhe ɑdhwödh gen, kedh piny ólunyø, ge kedh-ɑ kɑɑl Arɑm. De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen wïj tuung kɑɑlɑni, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen." 
2Kings7:6 Jøliny Arɑm ógöjji lïngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cwɑg mø ni cwɑggi yɑ̈thi liny, geki cwɑggi kyënyì, kí ɑwøw me ni ɑwøøw yɑy me dwøng, me bï kömi gen. Arum gen kinni i rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm geki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp gï kïr en, o ge bï-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gen." 
2Kings7:7 Amwöj gen ki ngwej kì wɑɑng thyënh ge yiel-ɑ ri gen. Kɑ kyënyì geki ɑderr wiy gen ge ómɑɑg piny, kɑ kemmì odöngø ge ócungø kì kɑ̈jji gen." 
2Kings7:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi jøgɑni tøg kɑɑlɑni, gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ɑkedhi gen yij kemɑ̀ megø, kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø ki gïgcɑmm møg döngø kì kenyɑni. Kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki ógudh, kí dhɑb, geki ngyëny ɑ́tegg møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi gen kì kenyɑni. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yij kem-ɑ kyeelø, ɑyïddi gen ki gïg ni møg-ɑ ɑ́tïni." 
2Kings7:9 Aköbbi gen ri gen kinni, “Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi wɑ èn pɑ døøj! Yïee dɑ wöödø me med dicyɑ̈ngtïn, de ede ɑ kɑn wɑ en? Keløg wöönɑni ómïdhi yi wɑ gïti mwøl, wɑ bɑ møg cɑy ceth. Kedh wɑ, kɑ pëjji liny rɑ̈dh köbbi wɑ!”" 
2Kings7:10 Codhe ɑdhwödh gen kì kɑɑl Arɑm, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Aryeer gen ge cwøll-ɑ jøg-ɑ kor kɑɑl kinni, “Wø ɑ́kedhi kɑɑl Arɑm de bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lidh yi wøn, bong cwɑggi dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wøn thyew. Kyënyì geki ɑderr nudd ge ómɑɑg piny, o kemmì nudd ge ying-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen.”" 
2Kings7:11 Acwöddi jøkor ki tyëng kïdhi wöönɑni gøldwøng. 
2Kings7:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi rɑ̈dh, ɑdhwödhe kì wɑ̈rɑni, ɑköbbe jøge kinni, “Wiy wu köbbi yi yɑn ki gïn-ɑ rømmi yi tyëng Arɑm, kí gïn-ɑ dwɑddi göggi wɑ yi gen! Ngɑ̈nyi yi gen kinni pödhee dɑ kɑ̈j, bene ɑ kedhi gen ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl gen be pɑ̈nø. Ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ rumø kinni wɑ óbï wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlee, kɑ wɑ kedh-ɑ be yɑb ki gïgcɑmm, codhe o ge bï gen, o wɑ kɑ̈l yi gen wɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg. Codhe, o kɑɑlee mɑg yi gen.”" 
2Kings7:13 Alöggi jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøge kinni, “Wiy jøg kɑ̈bbi gen ki kyënyì ɑ́bïj kì kelli kyëny-ɑ ɑ́döng, o ge kedhi gen be lidhi gïn-ɑ cwöbø. Tyëng-ɑ keny pɑ̈r ki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw? O ge pɑ nudd gɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw thyew?”" 
2Kings7:14 Akɑ̈bbi gen ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen nøg. Aör gen yi rɑ̈dh kì yethi yɑ̈thi liny ɑ́ryew. Kɑ gï cege kinni, “Kedh wun, kɑ gïn-ɑ cwöbø kì kɑɑl Arɑm lidh wun.”" 
2Kings7:15 Akedh gen, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi Nɑm Urdun, kɑ yöö yuud gen e pɑ̈ng yi ógudh kí jɑmm-ɑ dyëmø kì yï liny Arɑm kɑ̀ rïngi gen. Adwöög gen kɑ møgɑni köbbi rɑ̈dh yi gen." 
2Kings7:16 Arïngi tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈g, kɑ ge reng-ɑ kɑɑl Arɑm. Kɑ jɑmmi kɑɑlɑni kɑ̈l yi gen. Kɑ kïllì gemè ɑ́dɑ̈g ngew ki ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel, kɑ kïlli ceir ɑ́bïkyel ngew ki ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel thyew ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
2Kings7:17 Pënyi liny men-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki rɑ̈dh, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen yï Elicɑ̀, ókwɑnyø yi rɑ̈dh o kore dhø döri kɑɑl. Kɑ nyøn yi ji kɑ othøø, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Elicɑ̀." 
2Kings7:18 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́köbbi yi Elicɑ̀ cøn kinni, “Dhuki piny nɑ men, kïllì ɑ́dɑ̈g mø gemè me døøj, óngew kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel, o kïllì ɑ́bïkyel mø ceir, óngew kɑ ngyënyø ɑ́tegø ɑ́kyel thyew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀.”" 
2Kings7:19 Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kööb pënyɑni kinni, “Gïn ni menɑni pɑ cuggi kinni tek. Cɑgg mɑl ceg ki yiebø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ byel kunye piny!” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Ólidh yi yïn ki wɑngí keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi møgɑni kɑ̈jji gen, de yï koo cyɑ̈mø ki gïgcɑmmɑni.”" 
2Kings7:20 Gïn ni menɑni ɑ́cwöb ceth; pënyɑni ɑ́nyøn yi ji kì dhø döri kɑɑlɑni, kɑ othøø." 
2Kings8:1 Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ́ wɑ̈de ɑ́tug kì yij thøø yi Elicɑ̀, köbbi yi Elicɑ̀ kinni dhwödhe geki gøle, kɑ ge kedhi gen be bëëdø kì pödhø megø. Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceg-ɑ öni kömi pönhɑni ki kɑ̈j me tyëg runn ɑ́bïryew." 
2Kings8:2 Alïngi kwøbbi Elicɑ̀ yi ngɑnɑni. Kɑ odhwödhø geki gøle, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì Pelistiyɑ̀ ki runn ɑ́bïryew." 
2Kings8:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög ngɑnɑni Isrɑil, kì bɑng runn ɑ́bïryew møgɑni, ɑkedhe yï rɑ̈dh kipe kinni o kej øde kí pinye döggii." 
2Kings8:4 Ayuude rɑ̈dh e okööbø geki Gïëdhì, bɑ̈ng Elicɑ̀, e dwɑdd-ɑ yodi gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Elicɑ̀ kì yï Gïëdhì." 
2Kings8:5 De kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd Gïëdhì löbb-ɑ rɑ̈dh, ki kwøbbi dhɑnhø men-ɑ ótugø kì yij thøø yi Elicɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëën ngɑnɑni yï rɑ̈dh be gøny. Akööb Gïëdhì kinni, “Wuö rɑ̈dh, ngɑnɑni èn, geki wɑ̈de wɑ̈n-ɑ ɑ́tug kì yij thøø yi Elicɑ̀!”" 
2Kings8:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pyëëj ngɑnɑni yi rɑ̈dh ki møgɑni, ɑløøge gïn kinni i ge bɑ dyër ceth. Acwöddi rɑ̈dh ki jɑgø, kɑ gø köbbe kinni i döggi ngɑnɑni jɑmme bënn, ki kwɑnni ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cyeg kì yethi pwödhhe, cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe gïti ɑnɑn." 
2Kings8:7 Akedhi Elicɑ̀ Dimɑceg. Benɑdɑd rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm dële ɑ́bëëd e orɑ̈mø kì bøli kenyɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge kinni Elicɑ̀ nud," 
2Kings8:8 ɑöre Adhɑil, jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jyɑ̈ge, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki gïïpiny men mëggí jɑltöng, kɑ köbbí kinni pyëje Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, men-ɑ óyöni dëlɑ.”" 
2Kings8:9 Akïdhi kömi ɑmɑl pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen yi Adhɑil ki jɑmm-ɑ døj kì Dimɑceg, e kömi ɑmɑlø dɑ møg-ɑ lwɑ̈ng yi en ki tërø. Akedhe yï Elicɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yïddi gen, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ be pyëji yïn yi bɑ̈ngí, Rɑ̈dh Benɑdɑd, ki men-ɑ óyöni dële.”" 
2Kings8:10 Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́nyudhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ceg-ɑ thøø, de kedh kɑ köbbí kinni dële óyöni.”" 
2Kings8:11 Codhe, ɑti Elicɑ̀ nenni yï Adhɑil, kɑ Adhɑil wïje ólɑ̈ɑ̈yø yi nënnɑni. Kɑ jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk ceg-ɑ ì túl ki ywøg." 
2Kings8:12 Apyëëj Elicɑ̀ yi Adhɑil kinni, “Yïde ɑ ywöngí, wuö?” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kipe ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni tyëng Isrɑil bɑ møg-ɑ ógöggi yi yïn ki gïgrijjø. Myërri gen møg-ɑ ógerø kidøøj órɑ̈b yi yïn, kɑ wøbbi gen nɑ̈g yi yïn, kɑ nyigi gen pwöd yi yïn pïd keny-ɑ óthøw gen, kɑ yethi ɑ́yɑjji gen kɑg yi yïn.”" 
2Kings8:13 Apëjji Adhɑil kinni, “Gwöng ni yɑn óyïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny ki teng-ɑ ni men?” Alöggi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́nyudhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni yï órøny yïn-ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm.”" 
2Kings8:14 Adøøg Adhɑil yï Benɑdɑd, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn yi Elicɑ̀?” Alöggi Adhɑil kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi en, i dëlí óyöni.”" 
2Kings8:15 Dhuki kì mwøl ɑkɑ̈bbi Adhɑil ki ógødh me bɑ dhïl, kɑ gø bïle ki pï, ɑpeedhe gøn bøli rɑ̈dh, órømme kí dhøge kum en, ɑthøwe. Kɑ Adhɑil røøny kej Benɑdɑd ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm." 
2Kings8:16 Kì bïïj runni Yörɑm wɑ̈d Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Yeörɑm wɑ̈d Yöcɑpɑt kì Yeudiyɑ̀" 
2Kings8:17 Ájɑ̈ggi e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem. 
2Kings8:18 Cyëge bɑ nyɑɑr Akɑɑb. Kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij orøøg gøl Akɑɑb ni rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø. Árøngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
2Kings8:19 de Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti dwɑddi ryɑ̈gi Yeudiyɑ̀, mɑ́ Debïd bɑ̈nge ɑ́köbbe kinni, kwɑrre ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ceth kì yethi runn bënn." 
2Kings8:20 Kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeörɑm, Edöm ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye kì ri Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ree rönye ki rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings8:21 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Yeörɑm ki yɑ̈the bënn e kedh-ɑ Dhɑir. Kɑ ge tyeeg kunɑni yi liny Edöm. Kɑ ge turr-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli liny Edöm kì wɑ̈r, codhe ɑpɑ̈r gen ki yɑ̈thi gen, kɑ yɑɑy rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil tɑɑy-ɑ yethi myërre." 
2Kings8:22 Acög Edöm ɑ́ pödhø kì wɑ̈ye, këër kenyɑni. Kɑ kɑɑl Libnɑ̀ ngɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈ye thyew kì bøli kenyɑni." 
2Kings8:23 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeörɑm bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings8:24 Akedhi Yeörɑm kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì kɑɑl Debïd. Kɑ Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings8:25 Kì ri pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew runni jyɑ̈gi Yörɑm wɑ̈d Akɑɑb ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́göög Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeörɑm ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀," 
2Kings8:26 e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki run ɑ́kyel. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Athɑliyɑ̀, nyɑɑr Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, kwɑɑr Ómrì rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
2Kings8:27 Kipe kɑ ɑ́bëëd Akɑdhiyɑ̀ gɑ ør geki Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gøl Akɑɑb." 
2Kings8:28 Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́kedh geki Yörɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil be nyïɑ̈ggø ki Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm. Atuum liny kì Rɑmöth Gilyɑd, kɑ Yörɑm ree kedhi yi kedø kì yij liny." 
2Kings8:29 Adøøge kɑɑl Yidhriil be tuuri kede. Akedhi Akɑdhiyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ Yidhriil be këëmii." 
2Kings9:1 Acwöddi Elicɑ̀ jɑltöng ki ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøtöng-ɑ thønhø, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Dhwöödh, kedhí Rɑmöth Gilyɑd. Kɑ̈l tuung møw men." 
2Kings9:2 Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhí kunɑni, yɑb Yeeu wɑ̈d Yöcɑpɑt, wɑ̈d Nimcì. Cwøøl wɑ̈ye kì buti jø gen kɑ wu kedhu ød megø wu keti wun." 
2Kings9:3 Kɑ møw men køny wïje. Kɑ köbbí kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni ce yï røøny en yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil.’ Kɑ ød yieeb kɑ yï jwɑn kedhø kì kenyɑni.”" 
2Kings9:4 Akedhi jɑltöngɑni Rɑmöth Gilyɑd," 
2Kings9:5 Ayuude pëjji liny ge bëëd ɑ kej ɑ́kyel. Kɑ Yeeu köbbe kinni, “Dɑ gïn köbbɑ yïn jɑldwøng!” Apëjji Yeeu kinni, “Yï kööbø kɑ men kì kelli wøn?” Kɑ jɑltöng okööbø kinni, “Yɑ kööbø kɑ yïn jɑldwøng!”" 
2Kings9:6 Codhe ɑkedhi gen ød gɑ ɑ́ryew, ɑkønye møw wïj Yeeu, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø ce yï røøny en yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh jie, tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Kings9:7 Yïn ɑ ódhur gøl wöw Akɑɑb piny. O gøølɑ colɑ ki Yidhɑbel ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g jøtöng møgɑ, geki bɑ̈nggɑ møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
2Kings9:8 Wïj gøl Akɑɑb ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw bënn kì gølɑni nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø. 
2Kings9:9 Gøl Akɑɑb ógöggɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ gøl Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, geki gøl Rɑ̈dh Bɑcɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akiyɑ̀ kì Isrɑil." 
2Kings9:10 Yidhɑbel ócɑm yi gwögg kì Yidhriil, bong ngɑn-ɑ ókonyii kinni tek.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑyiebe ød kɑ órengø." 
2Kings9:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Yeeu, ɑ pyëjii yi jø gen kinni, “Dɑ gïnrɑj? Jɑɑl ɑ́nɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bï-ɑ be ngø?” Alöggi Yeeu kinni, “Jɑlɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi wun, o gïn-ɑ kømme ngɑ̈nyi yi wun.”" 
2Kings9:12 Alöggi gen kinni, “Kwïj yi wøn, köbbí wøn gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en!” Kɑ Yeeu okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni i Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́røny yi yɑn, yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Kɑ ógudhi gen jwɑn gen ki peedh wïj tëd, o Yeeu cunge kì kömi gen. Akoodh kɑng, kɑ ge óryeerø kinni, “Yeeu bɑ rɑ̈dh!”" 
2Kings9:14 Kɑ Yörɑm göggi ki ɑmolpiny yi Yeeu wɑ̈d Yöcɑpɑt," 
2Kings9:15 e Yörɑm ying-ɑ Yidhriil kun-ɑ ɑ́kedhe be tuuri keddi liny-ɑ ɑ́nyɑg yi en geki Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kì Rɑmöth Gilyɑd. Yeeu jølinye ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Keløg wu ying-ɑ kömɑ, ko di ngɑn dhwödh, kɑ kedh-ɑ Yidhriil be töddi jiɑni.”" 
2Kings9:16 Codhe ɑkɑdhi Yeeu yij yɑ̈ye, kɑ kedh-ɑ Yidhriil kun-ɑ buud yi Yörɑm, e Akɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ bëën Yidhriil be këëmi Yörɑm, o nudd e nud kì Yidhriil." 
2Kings9:17 Jɑl-ɑ kurø kì ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ koor kɑɑl Yidhriil, Yeeu ɑ́lidhe geki jøge ge obëënø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dɑ jøg mø nenni yi yɑn ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ kyënyì.” Alöggi Yörɑm kinni, “Öd ki ngɑn kedhi yï gen ki kyeny, kɑ renge be lidhi gen, ying gɑ wɑdd wɑlɑ̀ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.”" 
2Kings9:18 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör kedh-ɑ yï Yeeu ki kyeny, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Rɑ̈dh okööbø i yï cyɑ̈dhi kɑ mër?” Alöggi Yeeu kinni, “Cwɑggí ɑ́ ngø? Wir kyenyí kɑ yï døøg ngɑ̈jɑ!” Kɑ jɑlkor men-ɑ nëënø kì øn-ɑ koor kɑɑl okööbø kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yï gen, de nuti dwöögø.”" 
2Kings9:19 Kɑ ge cig-ɑ ör ki jɑl megø. Akedhe yï gen, ɑkööbe kinni, “Rɑ̈dh okööbø i yï cyɑ̈dhi kɑ mër?” Acigi Yeeu löggø kinni, “Cwɑggí ɑ́ ngø? Wir kyenyí kɑ yï døøg ngɑ̈jɑ!”" 
2Kings9:20 Kɑ jɑlkor cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́ör ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yï gen, de nuti dwöögø.” Kedh dhøge olengø yi en kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ pyejji jøgɑni, yɑ̈y kyewe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø, nënni e nɑ Yeeu ceth!”" 
2Kings9:21 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm okööbø kinni, “Gwir wun yɑ̈yɑ.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume gwirø ɑkɑdhe yij yɑ̈y. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kɑdh-ɑ yij yɑ̈ye thyew, ɑkedhi gen be pɑɑri Yeeu, men kì yij yɑ̈ye. Kɑ ge røøm-ɑ buti pwönh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mi Nɑboth." 
2Kings9:22 Apyëëj Yeeu yi Yörɑm, kinni, “Yï cyɑ̈dhi kɑ mër?” Alöggi Yeeu kinni, “Mër óying me nud kidï, e meyí Yidhɑbel nudd e mɑll-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth, o nudd e ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhø kì yï ɑ́jwöggì?”" 
2Kings9:23 Aryeer Yörɑm kinni, “Men bɑ rënyi pödhø, Akɑdhiyɑ̀!” Kedh yɑ̈ye oløgø yi en e órengø." 
2Kings9:24 Kɑ Yeeu wethe kwɑnye, kɑ gø tënne ki tege bëne, kɑ weth pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi Yörɑm kì kelli bɑ̈dde, kɑ twïy-ɑ wɑ̈g mine pyëde’ pyëdø. Kɑ Yörɑm pɑ̈dh-ɑ yij yɑ̈ye e kegø." 
2Kings9:25 Kɑ Bidkɑr pënyi liny köbbi yi Yeeu kinni, “Kwɑnyu en kɑ leeng wun yij pwönh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mi Nɑboth. Pɑr cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi wɑ kì bɑng Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb wïyi Yörɑm, ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
2Kings9:26 ‘Nɑ̈gi Nɑboth geki wɑ̈dde ɑ́lidh yi yɑn ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈, Yɑn ɑ kööbø èn, yï ónɑ̈g-ɑ yij pwödhø men ceth.’ Kwɑnyu Yörɑm kɑ leeng wun yij pwönh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mi Nɑboth, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen.”" 
2Kings9:27 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑrenge e kɑ̈l-ɑ kuni kɑɑl Bet Agɑn. Kɑ Yeeu løg-ɑ bɑnge, ɑköbbe jøge kinni, “Gøju en thyew!” Kɑ ree kïdhi gen ki kedø, e kedh-ɑ yuu Gur kì buti Iblïm. De ɑ́dyëëj ki wɑ̈dh pïd kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe Megidø, ɑthøwe kì kunɑni." 
2Kings9:28 Akïdhii Yerusɑlem yi jøge ki yɑ̈y, kɑ koony buti kweyye kì kɑɑl Debïd." 
2Kings9:29 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ e runni Yörɑm wɑ̈d Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kì yij lɑwø. 
2Kings9:30 Yeeu ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Yidhriil. Kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb lïngi yi Yidhɑbel, ɑgide nyinge, kɑ yëyye pyële kidøøj. Kɑ ócungø e nenn-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ɑwɑj," 
2Kings9:31 kedh Yeeu bï-ɑ kɑl. Akööb Yidhɑbel kinni, “Dɑ mër ki yïn, yï ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ wöw ni Dhimrì?”" 
2Kings9:32 Kɑ Yeeu wïje tïnge e lïïdh-ɑ yï Yidhɑbel. Alïïdh jøg ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì kelli bɑ̈ngg-ɑ bɑ órøj piny kì ɑwɑj, kɑ ge lidh yi Yeeu." 
2Kings9:33 Kɑ Yeeu okööbø kinni, “Cøøru en piny!” Kɑ gø leeng gen piny. Kɑ reme ceg-ɑ ì thiidh kì ri dörø geki kyënyì. Kɑ yɑ̈y kɑ̈ɑ̈l köme yi Yeeu." 
2Kings9:34 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yeeu ød kɑ ocyɑ̈mø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume, ɑkööbe kinni, “Kwɑnyu nyɑdhey cyën menɑni, kɑ kony wun. Mɑ́ e bɑ nyirɑ̈dh.”" 
2Kings9:35 De keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen, ge ɑ́yod-ɑ tɑngdɑre geki cu tyelle kí cingge." 
2Kings9:36 Adøøg gen be köbbi Yeeu ki møgɑni. Kɑ Yeeu okööbø kinni, “Bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑnɑn kinni i ócwöb, ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yidhɑbel ócɑm yi gwögg kì Yidhriil." 
2Kings9:37 Yidhɑbel ódhong kì piny ni cyëdhø kì Yidhriil, bong ngɑn-ɑ óngijii kinni men bɑ Yidhɑbel.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Ádɑ yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, mɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Agwëëd Yeeu ki wɑ̈j møg ör Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, e gwëd-ɑ jɑgg geki jøgdøngø, kí tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen di yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb kinni," 
2Kings10:2 “Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhi wɑ̈nyø men yï wun, mɑ́ yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb ying-ɑ yï wun, o yï wun dɑ yɑ̈thi liny, kí kyënyì kí myërr-ɑ thøø yi gerø, kí jɑmmi liny," 
2Kings10:3 yïëëny wun ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ døj kì kelli wɑ̈ddi wïi wun, kɑ cïb wun wïj kwøøm wïye, kɑ wu nyïɑ̈ggi wun kipe gøl wïi wun.”" 
2Kings10:4 Abwøg jɑggi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Dhø Yeeu pyem-ɑ dï yi wɑ, e ɑ́dhɑ̈li lwɑ̈ngø yi Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm geki Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀?”" 
2Kings10:5 Codhe kɑ jɑngi gøl rɑ̈dh, kí jɑngi kɑɑl, kí jøgdøngø, kí tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen di yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb öd-ɑ yï Yeeu kinni, “Wø bɑ bɑ̈nggí, gïn-ɑ köbbí wøn, ógwøg yi wøn. De wø pɑ pɑ̈nyi røny ki rɑ̈dh. Gwøg gïn-ɑ rømmi yi yïn e døøj.”" 
2Kings10:6 Agwëde gïn ki ryeew wɑ̈j kinni, “Keløg wu ying-ɑ tungɑ, keløg kwøbbɑ ólïngi yi wun, ngul wun wɑ̈thi yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb wɑ̈g, kɑ ge muuj wun yɑn kì Yidhriil dhuki piny nɑ men.” Yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew ɑ́bëëd ɑ buti jøg-ɑ mïdhi gen." 
2Kings10:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi wɑ̈nyø yï gen, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑɑg gøl rɑ̈dh bënn gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew. Kɑ wɑ̈thi gen cïb yethi dhöng, ɑöri gen Yeeu kì Yidhriil." 
2Kings10:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́muuj wöödø Yeeu kinni wɑ̈thi yɑɑg gøl Akɑɑb ɑ́rum ki kɑ̈ɑ̈lø, ɑkööbe kinni i cøng gen piny gɑ börr ɑ́ryew kì dhø döri kɑɑl, kɑ ge wiy bëëd gen kì kenyɑni gïti dhuki kì mwøl." 
2Kings10:9 Kì mwøl, ɑkedhi Yeeu dhø döri kɑɑl, ɑköbbe tyëng-ɑ ying kenyɑni kinni, “Yï wun bɑ̈r, yɑn ɑ ɑ́wen Rɑ̈dh Yörɑm, kɑ nɑ̈gɑ. Dɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g ji møg bënn?" 
2Kings10:10 Men nyodh-ɑ kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe gøl Akɑɑb ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg jɑltönge Eliyɑ̀ ɑ́gwøg yi en.” 
2Kings10:11 Codhe, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑddi Akɑɑb bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́ying Yidhriil, kí pëjji linye, kí mɑ̈dhhe, kí ókwërre yi Yeeu. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wiy yi en kì kelli gen." 
2Kings10:12 Adhwödh Yeeu kì Yidhriil, e kedh-ɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe Bet Eked, ɑ wɑngi kɑɑl kwɑ̈yyi dyëg," 
2Kings10:13 ɑrwööm gen ki kwï wɑddi Akɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Wun-ɑ́ møg?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Wø bɑ wɑddi Akɑdhiyɑ̀, wø kedh-ɑ Yidhriil be këëmi nyigi Yidhɑbel, kí tyëng gøl rɑ̈dh møg-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
2Kings10:14 Kɑ Yeeu jøge köbbe kinni, “Mɑgu gen!” Amɑg ge gïn, kɑ gï ngɑl gen kì buti wɑɑng pï, gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew, bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen." 
2Kings10:15 Adhwödh Yeeu kì kenyɑni, kɑ ge órwömø ki Yönɑdɑb wɑ̈d Rekɑb, e bï-ɑ yïe. Amɑ̈dhe Yönɑdɑb kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Yijí bong ɑ́dud ki yɑn ni kɑ̀ bong yijɑ ɑ́dud ki yïn?” Ayïëy Yönɑdɑb kinni, “Ngee, yijɑ bong ɑ́dud ki yïn.” Aköbbii yi Yeeu kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l cingí.” Amɑɑg cinge yi Yeeu, kɑ gø kønye ki yedhi yij yɑ̈y." 
2Kings10:16 Aköbbii yi Yeeu kinni, “Kedh wɑ, o tyiel-ɑ yijɑ kipe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lidh yi yïn.” Akedhi gen Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kyeel" 
2Kings10:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑddi Akɑɑb bënn yi Yeeu, bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́wiy yi en, ɑpɑ̈dhi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg Eliyɑ̀ kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
2Kings10:18 Tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́cwøøl kej ɑ́kyel yi Yeeu, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Bɑɑl jwøg ɑ́mɑlli yi Akɑɑb kɑ mɑllø me nøg, de ómɑlli yi yɑn ki mɑllø me dwøng." 
2Kings10:19 Cwööl wun jøtööng Bɑɑl bënn, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑllii bënn, kí ókwërre bënn. Ko di ngɑn wiy, mɑ́ yïɑ dɑ gëëdhi me dwøng men mëggɑ Bɑɑl, o ngɑn-ɑ óbëëd e tøøk ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø.” (Menɑni ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ wëënyø yi Yeeu kipe kinni o nɑ̈ge jii Bɑɑl.)" 
2Kings10:20 Codhe, ɑkööb Yeeu kinni, “Kwøbu cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ówøøw Bɑɑl!” Kɑ cyɑ̈ngɑni kwøb." 
2Kings10:21 Kɑ öd-ɑ myërri Isrɑil bënn ki wööni wööwø. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli Bɑɑl obëënø bënn, bong dhɑnhø kì kelli gen mɑ ɑ́cög e nuti bëënø. Akedhi gen kengi Bɑɑl, kɑ kengɑni opɑ̈ngø kinni dhij." 
2Kings10:22 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng köbbi yi Yeeu kinni, kɑ̈ɑ̈le ógudhi kwër wɑ̈g, kɑ gï mëgge bɑ̈nggi Bɑɑl. Kɑ ógudhɑni muuje gïn." 
2Kings10:23 Kɑ Yeeu geki Yönɑdɑb wɑ̈d Rekɑb kedh-ɑ yij kengi Bɑɑl. Aköbbi bɑ̈nggi Bɑɑl yi Yeeu kinni, “Nennu kelli wun kidøøj, ying e dɑ bɑ̈nggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mø nud, wiy bëëde ɑ́ bɑ̈nggi Bɑɑl keti gen ɑ nud.”" 
2Kings10:24 Codhe ɑkedhe be muuji gëëdhi geki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì kengi Bɑɑl. Yeeu cïbi ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kengɑni ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o ge óköbbø yi en kinni, “Kɑ ge nɑ̈g wun bënn, ngɑn-ɑ ówëggi dhɑnhø bodhø, nɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ kej ngɑnɑni!”" 
2Kings10:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yeeu ki muuji gëëdhi ceth, ɑköbbe jøg-ɑ kurø geki pëjji liny kinni, “Kedhu ød kɑ ge nɑ̈g wun bënn, ko di ngɑn wëggu bodhø!” Akedhi gen ød ki pilli gen kì cinggi gen, kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen bënn, kɑ gï ywɑ̈ɑ̈j gen wɑ̈g. Codhe, ɑkedhi gen yij gëëng Kengø," 
2Kings10:26 kɑ lööj kwër kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g, kɑ gø rɑ̈b gen." 
2Kings10:27 Lööj kwër ɑ́rɑ̈b, kɑ kengø cøør piny, kɑ gwøg ɑ́ kej pyellø gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Kings10:28 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l nyingi Bɑɑl wɑ̈g kì Isrɑil ɑnɑn yi Yeeu. 
2Kings10:29 De Yeeu ɑ́göög ki orøøg Yeroboɑm, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́göjji Isrɑil orøg, kɑ cïb-ɑ Betiil geki Dɑn ki røjø dhɑb ɑ́ men mɑlli." 
2Kings10:30 Kɑ Yeeu köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kipe kɑ ɑ́göggí gøl Akɑɑb ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́tyer yi pyëwɑ, gølí ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì Isrɑil kì yethi rïjj ɑ́ngwen.”" 
2Kings10:31 De Yeeu nuti cyɑ̈dhø kì bøli Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pyëwe bëne, ɑ́yöd e ngøy-ɑ bëëdi Yeroboɑm ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́göjji Isrɑil orøg." 
2Kings10:32 Kì bøli kenyɑni, piny Isrɑil kwëe ɑ́cööd wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kwï piny Isrɑil ɑ́kɑbe." 
2Kings10:33 Cɑg kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì kömi Nɑm Urdun, gïti kɑɑl Aröeer kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kömi Nɑm Arnön, menɑni reb-ɑ myërri Gilyɑd kí Bɑcɑn, piny-ɑ bëëd yi gøl Gɑd, kí gøl Ruben, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè." 
2Kings10:34 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeeu, ki tege bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings10:35 Akedhi Yeeu kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑrøøny Yöɑkɑdh wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings10:36 Yeeu ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. 
2Kings11:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Athɑliyɑ̀ meyi Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kinni wɑ̈de ónɑ̈gø, ɑkööbe kinni i nɑ̈ɑ̈g yɑɑg gøl rɑ̈dh bënn." 
2Kings11:2 Yöcebɑ̀ nyɑɑr Rɑ̈dh Yeörɑm, nyiwï Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wïyi gen ɑ́kyel, Yöɑc wɑ̈d Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́kwɑɑle wɑ̈g kì kelli nyiirɑ̈dh møg-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø. Akwɑnye gøn geki 'mïnhe, kɑ gï kɑɑne yij ød megø kì yij Kengø kipe Athɑliyɑ̀." 
2Kings11:3 Kɑ Yöɑc kɑnni kì yij Kengø yi Yöcebɑ̀ ki runn ɑ́bïkyel møg-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Athɑliyɑ̀. 
2Kings11:4 De kì ri bïryeew runn, ɑödi ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀ yï pëjji liny møg-ɑ nyi kor gøldwøng, ɑcwööle gïn yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑköbbe gïn kinni köngi gen kinni ge óyïëy ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi en, ɑnyudhe gïn nyirɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen." 
2Kings11:5 Aköbbi jøgɑni yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëënu be kwëri cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, wiy kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g wun kor gen gøldwøng," 
2Kings11:6 Kɑ kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g wun men-ɑ kyeelø kore Dhøg Sur, kɑ kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g wun men-ɑ döng, kore dhøng-ɑ pwödhø." 
2Kings11:7 Kɑ ɑkudd ɑ́ryew mø jøkor, møg-ɑ di kedhi kɑ̈lli gen kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø, kor gen Kengø, ge kor-ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings11:8 Kor gen rɑ̈dh e jɑmmi liny mø gen ying-ɑ cinggi gen ceth. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈ngi nɑ̈g. Koru rɑ̈dh wu cyɑ̈dhi kɑ en, kenyi kedhe wɑ̈g, kí kenyi døøge ød.”" 
2Kings11:9 Alïngi kwøbbi Yöyɑdɑ̀ yi pëjjɑni, kɑ jø gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen yïe, jøg-ɑ ɑ́bï be gwøg, ki møg-ɑ di kedhi kɑ̈lli gen." 
2Kings11:10 Kɑ tøngg kí ködd møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø Rɑ̈dh Debïd mëggi gen yi Yöyɑdɑ̀, ókwëri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings11:11 Kɑ jøkor cung, ngɑn ki jɑmme kì cinge kì bɑdhhi Kengø, ge kor-ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings11:12 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l nyirɑ̈dh wɑ̈g yi Yöyɑdɑ̀, kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈r rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø cïbe wïje, ɑrønyii ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ mëggi wɑ̈nyi ciggi jyɑ̈gø. Ateng ji cinggi gen, kɑ ge óryeerø kinni, “Rɑ̈dh ómïdhi yi Jwøk!”" 
2Kings11:13 Kɑ cwɑggi ji geki jøkor lïngi yi Rɑ̈dh Athɑliyɑ̀, ɑjwɑne Kengø kun-ɑ cugi teedø." 
2Kings11:14 Alidhe rɑ̈nh-ɑ nyɑ̈n e ócungø kì buti lööj dhø Kengø, ni kenyi cungi rɑ̈dh, kí jøg-ɑ jɑgg kì bɑdhhe, ji óryeerø ki medi pëëth, kɑ̈ngì okodhø. Kɑ Athɑliyɑ̀ ógødhe kɑge e óryeerø kinni, “Amolpiny! Amolpiny!”" 
2Kings11:15 Yöyɑdɑ̀ nuti dwɑddi kinni o Athɑliyɑ̀ nɑ̈g kì buti Kengø, ɑköbbe pëjji liny kinni, “Kïdhu en wɑ̈g e bɑ ɑtyeg yi liny, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ódwɑddi yielii nɑ̈g wun.”" 
2Kings11:16 Kɑ gø mɑg gen, ɑkïdhii gøldwøng, kɑ nɑ̈g kì Dhøg Kyënyì." 
2Kings11:17 Kɑ kwøb thuunh yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ kì kɑɑm ji geki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kinni ge óbëëdø gɑ jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh köbbe nywɑ̈g ki kwøb geki ji thyew. 
2Kings11:18 Codhe, ɑkedhi teedø kengi Bɑɑl, kɑ gø cøør gen piny, këlli lɑm ɑ́dhur gen piny geki ngïji Bɑɑl. Anɑ̈g gen Mɑtɑn, ókwëri Bɑɑl kì bøli këlli Bɑɑl. Kɑ Yöyɑdɑ̀ ókɑ̈bbø ki jøg-ɑ kor Kengø." 
2Kings11:19 Kɑ rɑ̈dh lwøøg gøldwøng yi en geki jyɑ̈ggì, kí liny-ɑ kor gøldwøng, ge ɑ́dhwödh-ɑ Kengø kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ gøldwøng, o teedø ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng gen. Kɑ Yöɑc kɑ̈l-ɑ Dhøg Jøkor, kɑ pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøm." 
2Kings11:20 Kɑ pëthi ji ómïnø bënn, kɑ kɑɑl ókwöjø, mɑ́ Athɑliyɑ̀ rumø ki nɑ̈gø kì gøldwøng." 
2Kings11:21 Yöɑc ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, e runne bɑ ɑ́bïryew." 
2Kings12:1 Kì bïryeew runni jyɑ̈gi Yeeu rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Yöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀. Yöɑc ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen kì Yerusɑlem. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Dhibiyɑ̀ kì Bircebɑ̀." 
2Kings12:2 Yöɑc ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij bëëde bëne, mɑ́ e nyi köbb-ɑ yi ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀." 
2Kings12:3 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø nuti dhur en piny, tyëngɑni nudd ge nyii muujø ki gëdhhì, o ge orɑ̈bø ki bɑkur." 
2Kings12:4 Aköbbi ókwër yi Yöɑc kinni, ngyënyy-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ gëdhhi Kengø, kí ngyënyy-ɑ nyi gwɑj yi ji, kí jwödhø men-ɑ nyi muuj yi ji," 
2Kings12:5 nyi mïdhi gen bënn yi ókwërø, o ge nyi thïg Kengø, kenyi di keny me rɑj kì ree." 
2Kings12:6 De gïti ri runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g ri jɑ̈ggi Yöɑc, bong keny mɑ ɑ́thïg yi ókwër kì ri Kengø." 
2Kings12:7 Acwøøl Yöyɑdɑ̀ geki ókwër yi Yöɑc, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ bëëd e bong keny mɑ ɑ́thïg yi wun kì ri Kengø? Cɑg ɑnɑn ngyëny pɑ mëggi wun këti, kinni o ge mïdhi wun, muuj wun gen, o kɑ̈jj-ɑ ódwɑddi gwøgø gwøg.”" 
2Kings12:8 Ayïëy ókwër ki møgɑni, kí kinni kɑ̈jj-ɑ rijjø koo gwøg-ɑ yi gen." 
2Kings12:9 Akɑ̈bbi ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀ ki sɑndug, kɑ kömi gøn twïye, ɑcïbe gøn buti këli lɑm kì tuung kyëj kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e dhɑnhø kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g. Codhe kɑ ngyënyy-ɑ nyi muuj yi ji, nyi cïb yije yi ókwërr-ɑ nyi göögø." 
2Kings12:10 Kenyi lidh ge gøn kinni ngyëny ɑ́ngënyi kì yij sɑdungɑni, o jɑngi gøldwøng geki Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng nyi kedhi gen be kwɑni ngyëny, o gï twööj gen yethi kidhhì kì Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings12:11 Ngyënyy-ɑ rum ki kwɑnø nyi mëgg-ɑ jøg-ɑ cinggi gen di gwøøg Kengø, o gï lony gen ki mëggi tyëng-ɑ gëdø." 
2Kings12:12 O jøg-ɑ nyi twïgø ki ópɑddi kïttì, kí pɑ̈m nyi ngëëw gen ki jɑmmɑni bënn." 
2Kings12:13 Bong kwï ngyënyyɑni mɑ ɑ́muuj gɑ møg ngëëw ki ɑ́tegø men thɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki óthɑ̈ggì, kí tɑ̈mmì, kí kɑ̈ngì, kí jɑmm-ɑ nyi gwøøg mɑny-ɑ nyi lyel, wɑlɑ̀ jɑmmi ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb møøgø." 
2Kings12:14 Ngyënyyɑni bënn nyi cul-ɑ jøg-ɑ nyi gwøg Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
2Kings12:15 Jøg-ɑ mïdhi gwøngɑni ɑ́bëëd cinggi gen tɑr, bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́bëëd e bong ngɑn nyi pïd gen ki kwøbbi kwɑnni ngyëny." 
2Kings12:16 Ngyënyyi gënhi bɑ̈jjø, kí gënhi orøg pɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge nyi mëgg-ɑ ókwër." 
2Kings12:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kömi kɑɑl Gɑth, kɑ gø mɑge. Ádwɑdd-ɑ bëën be nyïɑ̈ggø ki Yerusɑlem," 
2Kings12:18 Akwɑɑny gëdhhì bënn yi Yöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, gen ɑ gëdhhi Yöcɑpɑt, kí Yeörɑm ɑ bɑnge ɑ́jɑ̈gge, kí gëdhhi Akɑdhiyɑ̀ wïye, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́thyey yi en. Kí gëdhhe, kí dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi en kì yij Sɑndug kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gï mëgge Adhɑil. Adøg Adhɑil, ɑcöge e pɑ bï Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings12:19 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings12:20 Anywɑ̈ggi Yöɑc dhøg yi bɑ̈ngge, kɑ nɑ̈g yi ɑ́ryew kì kelli gen, ɑ løg Yödhɑker wɑ̈d Cimeɑth geki Yödhɑbɑd wɑ̈d Cömer kì yij øn-ɑ ɑ́ying wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Yerusɑlem, kì yuu-ɑ kedhi Silɑ̀. Akoony Yöɑc kì kɑɑl Debïd, ɑrøøny Amɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings12:21  
2Kings13:1 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yöɑc wɑ̈d Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́røøny Yöɑkɑdh wɑ̈d Yeeu ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Ajyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings13:2 Rɑ̈dh Yöɑkɑdh ɑ́göög ki orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Isrɑil peeje yij orøg, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø wïyø ki orøg ni Rɑ̈dh Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt." 
2Kings13:3 Codhe, ɑrënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki Isrɑil, kɑ gø wëgge tyɑmø yi Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm geki wɑ̈de Benɑdɑd tyel mø gïïr." 
2Kings13:4 Akwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Yöɑkɑdh, ɑløøg kwɑ̈jje yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́göggi tyëng Isrɑil yi Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ɑ́lidh yi en." 
2Kings13:5 Anëngi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pëëji men yielii ki orɑnge kì cinggi tyëng Arɑm, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil døøg-ɑ be bëëdø kì yethi myërri gen ki mër ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen cøn." 
2Kings13:6 De tyëng Isrɑil nuti wïyø ki orøng-ɑ́ yije ɑ́peej gen yi Yeroboɑm, de ge nudd ge ceg-ɑ orøg ceth, ngïji Aceerɑ̀ nudd e nud kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings13:7 Bong jøliny mɑ ɑ́döng kì yï Yöɑkɑdh, den-ɑ́ jøkyënyì pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj kí yɑ̈thi liny pyɑ̈rø, kí jøliny tyel gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́tyëg ki nɑ̈gø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, gï ɑ́nyøne ni ɑyejø kì piny." 
2Kings13:8 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöɑkɑdh, kí tege bëne bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings13:9 Akedhi Yöɑkɑdh kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑrøøny wɑ̈de Yeöɑc keje ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings13:10 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryeew runni Yöɑc wɑ̈d Yöɑkɑdh, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Yeöɑc wɑ̈d Yöɑkɑdh rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings13:11 Ágöög ki gïgrijjø thyew kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni orøøg Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́peej Isrɑil yij orøg." 
2Kings13:12 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ gwøg yi Yeöɑc, kí tege kí linye geki Amɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings13:13 Akedhi Yeöɑc kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑrøøny wɑ̈de Ryeew Yeroboɑm keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings13:14 Kɑ dëël Elicɑ̀ jɑltöng ócɑ̈gø ki rɑ̈m, o bene rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël menɑni ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gii, kɑ këëm yi Rɑ̈dh Yeöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑywöngi rɑ̈dh kì bute kinni, “Wïyø! Wïyø! Bene yïn ngɑn teg men-ɑ ɑ́korri Isrɑil!”" 
2Kings13:15 Akööb Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kɑ̈ní ki weth kí nywøle.” Akɑ̈ni Yeöɑc." 
2Kings13:16 Aköbbi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, tënní weth, kɑ gø tënne; kɑ Elicɑ̀ cingge cïbe köme cinggi rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings13:17 Akööb Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Yieb ɑwɑj kì tung-ɑ kuni Arɑm.” Ayiebe gøn. Codhe, ɑkööb Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Gøj weth!” Agöjje. Akööb Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Weth Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ótyɑɑm Arɑm. Wu ónyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Arɑm kì Ápek pïd keny-ɑ ótyɑɑm gen.”" 
2Kings13:18 Aköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Elicɑ̀ kinni, “Kwɑny nywøli weth møg-ɑ ɑ́döng kɑ ge gøøj piny!” Kɑ göjj-ɑ piny ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ówïyø." 
2Kings13:19 Amɑɑg jɑltöng yi liny ki gøn, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Yï di göjji kɑ tyel ɑ́bïj wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́bïkyel, bene ɑ di tyɑɑm Arɑm ki tyɑmi dwøng, de ɑnɑn ge ótyɑm yi yïn kɑ tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g kete.”" 
2Kings13:20 Athøw Elicɑ̀, kɑ kony. Ádɑ jø Moɑb møg nyi bï be mɑ̈nyø Isrɑil kì ri cɑ̈gi run." 
2Kings13:21 Jøgɑni ɑ́bï cyɑ̈ng megø ji ceg-ɑ kony ki jɑl me thøø, ɑleengii yij buur Elicɑ̀ yi jøg-ɑ kunyø, kɑ ge órengø. Kɑ ɑ́nywɑɑl cu Elicɑ̀ yi jɑl-ɑ thøø, ɑcyɑ̈re, kɑ dhwödh-ɑ kömi tyelle." 
2Kings13:22 Kì ri jyɑ̈gi Yöɑkɑdh bëne, nyingi tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́guud yi Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm." 
2Kings13:23 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ gï nyi kønye kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́könge Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob, ɑcöge gï nuti wiy en piny gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Kings13:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thøw Adhɑil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, ɑrøøny Benɑdɑd wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings13:25 Codhe, ɑdøøg myërr-ɑ ɑ́kɑb yi Adhɑil ki dwöögø yi Yeöɑc wɑ̈d Yöɑkɑdh kì cingi Benɑdɑd ki liny. Benɑdɑd ɑ́tyɑm yi Yeöɑc ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ myërri Isrɑil bënn, møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi Benɑdɑd kì ri jyɑ̈gi Yöɑkɑdh wïye dwööge." 
2Kings14:1 Kì ryeew runni Yeöɑc wɑ̈d Yöɑkɑdh ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́göög Amɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀," 
2Kings14:2 ɑ́göög ki rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïngwen. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Yöɑdïn kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings14:3 Ágöög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j de pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki kwɑn Debïd, mɑ́ e ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïg ni møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi Yöɑc wïye." 
2Kings14:4 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø nuti cøør en piny, o ji ɑ́bëëd ge nyi kedh-ɑ kɑ̈jjɑni be muujø ki gëdhhì kí be rɑ̈b ki bɑkur." 
2Kings14:5 Amɑdhiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́rume cïbi lɑwø piny ceth, ɑnɑ̈ge jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g wïye," 
2Kings14:6 De nyigi jøgɑni nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g en, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑkerø kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wëëg ko nyi nɑ̈g kipe gïn bɑj yi nyigi gen. Kɑ othønhø ko nyi nɑ̈g kipe gïn bɑj yi wëëg gen. Dhɑnhø nɑ̈g kɑ per gïn-ɑ bɑj yi en kiree.”" 
2Kings14:7 Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́nɑ̈gi kì kelli liny Edöm ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø kì yij töör Luuy Omelø. Kɑ kɑɑl Selɑ̀ mɑge kì yij linyɑni, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Yoktheel, nudd e cwølli kɑ nyingɑni gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Kings14:8 Codhe, kɑ Amɑdhiyɑ̀ öd-ɑ yï Rɑ̈dh Yeöɑc wɑ̈d Yöɑkɑdh ki ji mø köbbii kinni, “Bïí pɑ̈nyi wɑ riee!”" 
2Kings14:9 De ɑ́lony ki ödø ki wöödø yi Rɑ̈dh Yeöɑc kinni, “Tyelø ɑ́kyel kì wɑ̈thi Kïti Lubnɑn, otwelø ɑ́ödi yi óthurø ki wöödø kinni, ‘Mëggí nyɑrí wɑ̈dɑ ɑ́ dhɑjø.’ Kɑ lɑ̈y me dwøng obëënø e ócyɑ̈dhø kɑ otwelɑni nyøøne piny." 
2Kings14:10 Amɑdhiyɑ̀, yï ɑ́tɑ̈d kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm tyëng Edöm. Cöög ki dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ yïí, kɑ yï pëggí pɑɑrí, yïde ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki göny rënyi yïn, wuki jií.”" 
2Kings14:11 De Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngø. Codhe, ɑdhwödhi Rɑ̈dh Yeöɑc, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil be nyɑɑg ki en, kì Bet Cemec kì myërri Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings14:12 Kɑ Amɑdhiyɑ̀ tyɑm, kɑ jølinye otɑyø men reng-ɑ pɑɑ gen." 
2Kings14:13 Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́mɑg yi Yeöɑc kì yij linyɑni kì Bet Cemec kɑ gø køøle Yerusɑlem. Kɑ döri kɑɑl cøøre piny, cɑg kì Dhøg Eprɑim gïti Dhøg Wïj Tung, kɑɑmɑni bɑ̈ri kööre bɑ mïtïr miy ɑ́ryew." 
2Kings14:14 Kɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø bëne men-ɑ ɑ́yode kwɑnye, jɑmmi Kengø geki mø gøldwøng ɑ́kwɑny en, kɑ gï kïdhe Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Kɑ oköödø ki ɑmɑgg thyew." 
2Kings14:15 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeöɑc, kí tegi linye, kí liny gen ki Amɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ge bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings14:16 Kɑ Yeöɑc kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony ki rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Kɑ wɑ̈de, Ryeew Yeroboɑm røøny keje." 
2Kings14:17 Rɑ̈dh Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́döng e onëënø keny-ɑ ɑ́thøw Rɑ̈dh Yeöɑc, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑ lunye ki thøø kì bɑng runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj." 
2Kings14:18 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Amɑdhiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings14:19 Ádɑ ɑmolpiny mɑ ɑ́göggi Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kinni o di nɑ̈g, codhe ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈re Lɑkic, de tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́løg bɑnge kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen kì kunɑni." 
2Kings14:20 Kɑ kïdhi Yerusɑlem e thøø, gø okɑ̈llø yi gen kì kömi kyeny. Kɑ koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì kɑɑl Debïd." 
2Kings14:21 Kɑ Udhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amɑdhiyɑ̀ røøny kej wïye ɑ rɑ̈dh yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
2Kings14:22 Kɑ Elɑth døøg ki mɑgø yi Udhiyɑ̀ e wïye rum thøø, kɑ gø cige gerø." 
2Kings14:23 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïïj runni Amɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Yeöɑc ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́kyel." 
2Kings14:24 Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Yeöɑc ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt cøn, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́peej Isrɑil yij orøg." 
2Kings14:25 Pìny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ mø Isrɑil ɑ́dwööge bënn, cɑg kì Amɑth kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti Luuy Omelø kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl ni kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ki dhø bɑ̈nge Yönɑ̀, wɑ̈d Amitɑy, jɑltööng Gɑth Ëper." 
2Kings14:26 Orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi tyëng Isrɑil e bong ngɑn køny gen ɑ́lidh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
2Kings14:27 De ɑ́bëëd e pɑth ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni o Isrɑil nyinge lɑ̈ɑ̈nye kì kömi piny. Bene ɑ yiele gïn kì ri Ryeew Yeroboɑm." 
2Kings14:28 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Ryeew Yeroboɑm, ɑ løg tege, kí yëth-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge, kí kɑ ɑ́dwööge Dimɑceg geki Amɑth, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings14:29 Akedhi Yeroboɑm kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, ɑrøøny Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings15:1 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryeew runni Ryeew Yeroboɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Udhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:2 Ájɑ̈ggi e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́ryew kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings15:3 Ágöög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni wïye Amɑdhiyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:4 De kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø nuti dhur en piny, o ji ɑ́nudd ge nyii muujø ki gëëdhi, o ge orɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì kɑ̈jjɑni." 
2Kings15:5 Agöjji Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀ wɑɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ dële ocögø ɑ́ wɑɑny gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́thøwe. Ábëëd ɑ øde kì wɑ̈ye. Pödhø ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi Yöthɑm wɑ̈de." 
2Kings15:6 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Udhiyɑ̀, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:7 Akedhi Udhiyɑ̀ kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony buti kweyye kì kɑɑl Debïd. Arøøny Yöthɑm wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings15:8 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Udhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Ryeew Yeroboɑm ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:9 Ágöög ki gïgrijjø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni wïye, ɑ́røngi ni Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́peej Isrɑil yij orøg." 
2Kings15:10 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Dhekɑriyɑ̀ göggi ki ɑmolpiny yi Cɑlum wɑ̈d Yɑbic, ɑgøøje gøn piny kì Iblïm kɑ gø nɑ̈ge, kɑ ójɑ̈ggø kì keje." 
2Kings15:11 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil. 
2Kings15:12 Apɑ̈dhi møg-ɑ ɑ́köngi Yeeu yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gøle ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì yethi rïjj ɑ́ngwen. 
2Kings15:13 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïngween runni Udhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Cɑlum wɑ̈d Yɑbic ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki dwɑ̈y ɑ́kyel kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:14 Codhe ɑbëën Menɑim wɑ̈d Gɑdì e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Tirdhɑ̀, ɑnɑ̈ge Cɑlum wɑ̈d Yɑbic kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑjɑ̈gge kì keje." 
2Kings15:15 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Cɑlum wɑ̈d Yɑbic, kí ɑ́wenɑwenø men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings15:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Menɑim e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Tirdhɑ̀, ɑrënye kɑɑl Tɑpuɑ̀ ki rënyi teg, tyëng kɑɑlɑni, kí myërr-ɑ bute ɑ́nɑ̈ge bënn, mɑ́ tyëng kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bɑ̈nyi yömmi yïe, kɑ yethi ɑ́yɑjj kɑge thyew." 
2Kings15:17 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïngwen runni Udhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Menɑim wɑ̈d Gɑdì ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki runn pyɑ̈rø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:18 Menɑim ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij bëëde bëne, ki orøng ni orøøg Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́peej Isrɑil yij orøg." 
2Kings15:19 Abëën Tiglɑth Pileser, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Isrɑil, ɑnëngii yi Menɑim ki ɑ́tegø ɑ́ kïllì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen, kipe kinni o Menɑim køny yi en, o nëngi ki tegø men jɑɑge pödhø." 
2Kings15:20 Jøkɑ̈rì kì Isrɑil ɑ́gwɑj yi Menɑim, jɑl ɑ́kyel yïe ɑ́kɑ̈bbe ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj mø mëgge rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, codhe ɑdøøg rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur pödhe." 
2Kings15:21 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Menɑim bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil. 
2Kings15:22 Akedhi Menɑim kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony buti kweyye, ɑrøøny Pekɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings15:23 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïïj runni Udhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Pekɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Menɑim ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki runn ɑ́ryew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:24 Pekɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́peej Isrɑil yij orøg." 
2Kings15:25 Pënyi liny me cwøl ɑ́ Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀, ɑ́göög ki ɑmolpiny geki jøliny mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj kì Gilyɑd, kɑ Pekɑiyɑ̀ nɑ̈g yi gen, kì øn-ɑ teg kì gøldwøng kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑkwɑɑny kej Pekɑiyɑ̀ yi Pekɑ̀ kɑ ree gwøge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
2Kings15:26 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Pekɑiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil. 
2Kings15:27 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́ryeew runni Udhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:28 Pekɑ̀ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, ɑ ɑ́peej Isrɑil yij orøg." 
2Kings15:29 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi jyɑ̈gi Pekɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ɑ ɑ́bëën Tiglɑth Pileser rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ Iyön kí Abel Bet Mɑɑkɑ̀, kí Yɑnoɑ̀, kí Kedec, kí Adhör, kí Gilyɑd, kí Gɑlelì, kí myërri Nɑptɑlì gï mɑge bënn, kɑ jii myërrɑni kïdhe Acuur gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
2Kings15:30 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngween runni Yöthɑm wɑ̈d Udhiyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́thuub Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀ yi Öciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Elɑ̀, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge, ɑjɑ̈gge kì keje." 
2Kings15:31 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Pekɑ̀ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil. 
2Kings15:32 Kì ryeew runni Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Yöthɑm wɑ̈d Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings15:33 Árøny runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel kì Yerusɑlem. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Yerucɑ̀ nyɑɑr Dhɑdök." 
2Kings15:34 Yöthɑm ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni wïye Udhiyɑ̀. 
2Kings15:35 De kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø nuti dhur en piny, ɑ́bëëd ji nudd ge nyii muujø ki gëdhhì kì kɑ̈jjɑni, kɑ ge nyii rɑ̈bø ki bɑkur. Yöthɑm en ɑ ɑ́ger Dhøg Wɑɑng Wuudø, men-ɑ yïëbbi Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings15:36 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöthɑm bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings15:37 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni ɑ ɑ́ör Redhïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm geki Pekɑiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be nyïɑ̈ggø ki Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings15:38 Akedhi Yöthɑm kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony buti kweyye kì kɑɑl Debïd, ɑrøøny Akɑɑdh wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings16:1 Kì bïryeew runni Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́göög Akɑɑdh wɑ̈d Yöthɑm ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings16:2 Akɑɑdh ɑ́göög ki rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel. Nuti göögø ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kwɑn Debïd," 
2Kings16:3 de ɑ́ngøy-ɑ bëëdi rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil. Wɑ̈de ɑ́rɑ̈be thyew ɑ́ gëëdhi, e ngøy-ɑ kwööng jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeed wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Kings16:4 Kɑ nyii rɑ̈bø ki gëdhhì, kí bɑkur kì kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø, geki wɑ̈thi kïttì kí thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ tïbbi gen døngø." 
2Kings16:5 Redhïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm geki Pekɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ɑ́kedhi be nyɑɑg ki Akɑɑdh kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ Yerusɑlem tyeg yi gen de Akɑɑdh nuti tyɑɑm gen." 
2Kings16:6 Kɑ Elɑth døøg-ɑ yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì yije cyeede wɑ̈g. Kɑ tyëng Edöm pëgg-ɑ yije, o ge nudd ge bëëd ɑ yije dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Kings16:7 Akɑɑdh ɑ́ödi yï Tiglɑth Pileser rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, ki ji møg köbbii kinni, “Yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ngí ceth. Bïí yiel yɑn ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm geki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil; wɑngɑ ɑ́guud yi gen.”" 
2Kings16:8 Dhɑb geki ɑ́tegø ɑ́kwɑny yi Akɑɑdh kì Kengø geki gøldwøng, kɑ gï öre rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, gɑ møg kwɑjjii." 
2Kings16:9 Kɑ rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur oyïëyø. Aöde Dimɑceg ki liny, kɑ döre cøør piny, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Redhïn nɑ̈g." 
2Kings16:10 Kɑ Akɑɑdh kedh-ɑ Dimɑceg be yïddø ki Rɑ̈nhdwøng Tiglɑth Pileser. Kɑ ólïdhø ki këli lɑm kì kɑɑlɑni, ɑöre ngïje Yerusɑlem yï ókwërø Uriyɑ̀, ki kër-ɑ ógerii." 
2Kings16:11 Codhe, kɑ Uriyɑ̀ ogëdø ki këli lɑm me ni menɑni. Kɑ órumø ki gerø e Akɑɑdh nudd e tøøk, ɑ́ger en e pɑ̈r ki ngïny-ɑ ɑ́örii kinni tïp." 
2Kings16:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh kì Dimɑceg, ɑyuude këli lɑm e rumø ki gerø." 
2Kings16:13 Kɑ ongɑ̈dø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì köme, kɑ orɑ̈bø ki byëlø thyew. Kɑ köme kunye ki remi gënhi mër geki møgi oløg." 
2Kings16:14 Këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ bɑ dilɑl ɑ́ying-ɑ kɑɑm këli lɑm men-ɑ nyɑ̈n geki Kengø, kɑ nyiig yi Akɑɑdh gø dwøøge’ kuni wɑɑng wuudø kì buti këli lɑm men-ɑ mee." 
2Kings16:15 Codhe, ɑ köbbe Uriyɑ̀ kinni, “Nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑmɑ, men-ɑ lɑɑj èn ki gëdhhi mwøl geki byëli böörø, kɑ yï nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈d kì wïje ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne mi rɑ̈dh, kí mø ji, kɑ byël-ɑ muuj yi rɑ̈dh nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b kì wïje, kɑ wïje nyi kunyí ki møgi oløg geki remi gënhi mër, kɑ nyi kunyí ki remmi gëdhhì bënn. De mïdhí këli lɑm men-ɑ bɑ dilɑl ɑ́ men nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b yi rɑ̈dh ki gëdhhì kenyi di gïn pyëj yi en kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Kings16:16 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh gwøg yi Uriyɑ̀ ceth. 
2Kings16:17 Yɑ̈thi dilɑl ɑ́nyiig yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh, kɑ ɑ́tɑ̈yyì kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì wɑ̈thi gen. Kɑ luy dilɑl tïnge piny kì kömi wɑ̈dhh møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkøny gɑ dilɑl, kɑ gø cïbe wɑ̈thi ɑ́tuggi kïttì." 
2Kings16:18 Kɑ óthør-ɑ wïje nyi cïb kwøøm rɑ̈dh kì yij Kengø pööge wɑ̈g, kɑ dhøng-ɑ nyi bëën rɑ̈dh Kengø cyëge, kipe kinni o pyëw rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur mïne." 
2Kings16:19 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings16:20 Akedhi Akɑɑdh kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì kɑɑl Debïd, kɑ wɑ̈de Kedhekiyɑ̀ røøny keje ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings17:1 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew runni Akɑɑdh rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Öciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Elɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ki runn ɑ́bïngwen kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings17:2 Öciyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de orøge nuti pɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki orøøg rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì bøle." 
2Kings17:3 Cɑlmɑneser, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi geki Öciyɑ̀, ɑyömmi Öciyɑ̀ yïe, kɑ gø nyi cude ki gwɑ̈j yethi runn bënn." 
2Kings17:4 De kì yij run megø, Öciyɑ̀ ɑ́ödi yi Sö rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ki ji kipe kinni o køny, kɑ Öciyɑ̀ ocögø e rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur pɑ cude ki gwɑ̈j. Keny-ɑ ɑ́yood møgɑni yi Cɑlmɑneser, ɑleenge Öciyɑ̀ ød mɑg." 
2Kings17:5 Amɑɑny Isrɑil yi Cɑlmɑneser, kɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ tyege. Kɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ mɑge kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni tyëg menɑni."
