2Kings17:6 Kì bïngween runni Öciyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil kïdhe Acuur gɑ ɑmɑgg. Acïbe kwï gïn kɑɑl Alɑ̀, kɑ møøgø cïbe kömi Nɑm Abör kì myërri Gödhɑn, kɑ møøgø cïbe kɑ̈ddi Mɑdɑy." 
2Kings17:7 Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́mɑg kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́røngi tyëng Isrɑil kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni Jwøøg gen Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg mø pɑth." 
2Kings17:8 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́døøg be cyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng kwööng jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli gen, kɑ ge oyïëyø ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Kings17:9 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́göög ki gïg mø pɑth ki dyër, mø pɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ge ɑ́gëëd ki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø kì yethi myërri gen bënn, cɑg kì myërr-ɑ thønhø gïti kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø bënn." 
2Kings17:10 Tyëng Isrɑil ri gen ɑ́göggi gen ki löjj geki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ kì wɑ̈thi ótøng, kí thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ di tïbbì bënn." 
2Kings17:11 Kɑ ge nyii rɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møgɑni, ni jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïgrijjø mɑ ɑ́rënyi gen pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings17:12 Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi gen. Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́kërri gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni gï ko mɑlli gen." 
2Kings17:13 Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́rum ki kyëddø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì ri tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ör yi en geki tyëng tyëngtöng kinni, “Wiyu yëthi orøg, kɑ ciggɑ mïdhi wun, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi wun, kɑ ge nyi örɑ wun ki bɑ̈nggɑ, jøtöng.”" 
2Kings17:14 De ge pɑ lïngø, muddi gen teeg ni kweyyi gen, tyëng-ɑ bɑ̈nyi ki lïngi dhø Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings17:15 Cigge ɑ́bɑny yi gen, köng-ɑ ɑ́könge kweyyi gïn nuti mïdhø yi gen. Kyën-ɑ ɑ́kyëde nuti lïngi gen. Ge ɑ́kedhi be mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ bong per gen, kɑ ge ogöögø ge bong per gen, kɑ ge óngöyø ki bëëdi jurr-ɑ buti gen, jurr-ɑ ɑ́kyëddi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ge ko ngöyi ki bëëdi gïn." 
2Kings17:16 Ciggi Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi gen, kɑ ri gen thɑ̈dhhi gen ki røjji ngyënyø ɑ́ryew, gɑ møg mɑlli yi gen, kɑ ge ogöögø thyew ki ngïji Aceerɑ̀, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø, kɑ kyell mɑlli yi gen, kɑ Bɑɑl mɑlli gen." 
2Kings17:17 Wɑ̈ddi gen geki nyigi gen ɑ́rɑ̈bbi gen jwögg-ɑ pɑth gɑ gëdhhì, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be rɑng yï ɑ́jwöggì, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïgrijjø ki mendwøng kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Arënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gen." 
2Kings17:18 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyëng Isrɑil, ɑcyeede gïn yïnø, ɑdönge ɑ́ gøl Yeudɑ̀ kete." 
2Kings17:19 De tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ ciggi jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mïdhi gen thyew, de ge ɑ́ngøy-ɑ kwöng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Kings17:20 Abɑɑny tyëng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gï cɑye, kɑ gï cïbe cinggi tyëngrijjø pïd kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny gen kì bøle." 
2Kings17:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Isrɑil ki dɑ̈ngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki gøl Debïd, ɑrønye Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, ɑpeej Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì yuu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, kɑ ji göjje gwøg ki orøg me dwøng." 
2Kings17:22 Aløg tyëng Isrɑil bɑng orøøg Yeroboɑm, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø wiyø yi gen." 
2Kings17:23 Pïd kɑ ɑ́nyiig tyëng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøle, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni cøn ki dhøggi bɑ̈ngge, jøtöng. Codhe, ɑtööng Isrɑil yïnø; ɑ́kïdhi Acuur, kun-ɑ bëëd yi gen dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Kings17:24 Akɑ̈ni rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ki ji kì Bɑbïl, kí Cuth, kí Abɑ̀, kí Amɑth, kí Sepɑrbɑim, kɑ gï cïbe Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kɑ̈jji tyëng Isrɑil. Akwɑny gen Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, geki myërre." 
2Kings17:25 Kì yij cɑ̈gi gen ki bëëdø, ge ɑ́bëëd Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ nyi mɑlli yi gen. Codhe kɑ kelli gen ödi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ngurrì, kɑ kwï gen nɑ̈g yi ngurrɑni." 
2Kings17:26 Aödi yï rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi yïn myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ciggi jwøøg pönhɑni kwïj yi gen, bene ɑ bɑnge öde gïn ki ngurrì mø nɑ̈g gen.”" 
2Kings17:27 Codhe, ɑkööb rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kinni, “Öd wun ki ókwërø ɑ́kyel kì kelli ókwër møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì kunɑni gɑ ɑmɑgg, o døøge be bëëdø kì kunɑni, o tyëngɑni pwönye ki ciggi jwøøg pönhɑni.”" 
2Kings17:28 Abëën ókwërø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ be bëëdø kì Betiil, ɑpwönye tyëngɑni ki yuu-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings17:29 De tyëng-ɑ bëëdø ki Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ge nudd ge ogöögø ki jwöggi cwɑggi gen. Kɑ gï cïb gen yethi kengg-ɑ ɑ́ger yi tyëng Isrɑil. Tyëng kɑɑl nyi gögg-ɑ ri gen ki jwøøg gen kì kɑɑl-ɑ bëëd gen. 
2Kings17:30 Tyëng Bɑbïl ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ngïji Suköth Benöth, tyëng Cuth ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ngïji Nergɑl geki Acïmɑ̀, jwöggi tyëng Amɑth." 
2Kings17:31 Tyëng Abɑ̀ ɑ́gwøg-ɑ ngïjji Nibɑdh geki Tɑrtɑk, tyëng Sepɑrbɑim nyigi gen nyi rɑ̈bbi ge’ jwöggi gen, Adrɑmelek geki Anɑmelek gɑ gëdhhì." 
2Kings17:32 Jiɑni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd gø nyii mɑllø yi gen thyew, kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki ji kì kelli gen mø bëëdø gɑ ókwër møg nyi muuj gëdhhì kì kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø." 
2Kings17:33 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e nyii mɑllø yi gen, de jwöggi gen di mɑllø yi gen thyew, ni kwööng pönh-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen." 
2Kings17:34 Kwööng gen nudd gø omïdhø yi gen pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ nyi mɑlli yi gen, o cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge kwɑrri Yɑgob ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cɑg yi en ɑ́ Isrɑil pɑ mïdhi yi gen." 
2Kings17:35 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøb geki tyëng-ɑ Isrɑil, kɑ ge köbbe kinni, “Wu ko kwɑ̈jji ki jwögg mø pɑth, ri wun ko nyi bøødh wun piny kì bøli gen, ge ko göggi wun wɑlɑ̀ ge ko nyi nëngi wun ki gëdhhì." 
2Kings17:36 De ngɑ̈dhu yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp ki tengi dwøng, nyi bøødh wun ri wun piny kì bølɑ, kɑ yɑ nyi nëngi wun ki gëdhhì." 
2Kings17:37 Kɑ ciggɑ geki kwöngɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́gwëdɑ wun mïdhi wun yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Wu ko nyi ngɑ̈dh jwögg-ɑ pɑth. 
2Kings17:38 Kɑ wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki møg-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi wɑ. 
2Kings17:39 Nyi lïngu kwøbbɑ, yɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu óyiel yi yɑn kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.”" 
2Kings17:40 De tyëngɑni nuti lïngø, ge nudd ge mïdh-ɑ kwööng pönh-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen." 
2Kings17:41 Tyëngɑni ɑ́bëëd Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyii mɑllø yi gen, de ge kedh ge mɑll-ɑ ngïjji jwöggi gen thyew, o gïn ni menɑni nudd e ogwøgø yi kwɑrri gen pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Kings18:1 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Öciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Elɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́göög Kedhekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akɑɑdh ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings18:2 Ágöög ki rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïngwen. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Abì nyɑɑr Dhekɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings18:3 Ágöög ki dyër kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kwɑn Debïd. 
2Kings18:4 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø ɑ́cøøre piny, kɑ yïkk cøøre piny, kɑ ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ ngøle piny. Ngïji thwöl men-ɑ ɑ́køny yi Mosɑ̀ ki dilɑl ɑ́tørre thyew, thwölɑni ɑ́bëëd e cwøl ɑ́ Nekuctɑn. Thwölɑni ɑ́bëëd e nudd e omɑllø yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ nyi rɑ̈bbi gen ki bɑkur." 
2Kings18:5 Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yeudiyɑ̀ nuti pɑ̈nyi yïddø ki rɑ̈dh me ni en, o pɑth ki men-ɑ óyïddi këti ki rɑ̈nh ni en." 
2Kings18:6 Ábëëd e wør-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti pɑ̈nyø en ki pyemø. Cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Mosɑ̀ ɑ́mïdhe bënn." 
2Kings18:7 Akønyii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gïg-ɑ gwøg yi en nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen bënn. Ángɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi kwøbbi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur." 
2Kings18:8 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́tyɑme kɑ myërri gen yɑge, cɑg kì pɑn-ɑ thinh gïti kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng, reb ki Gɑdhɑ̀ geki myërre bënn." 
2Kings18:9 Kì ngween runni Kedhekiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ bɑ bïryeew runni Rɑ̈dh Öciyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́bëën Cɑlmɑneser rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur Isrɑil ki liny, kɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ tyege." 
2Kings18:10 Kɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni tyëngɑni, e Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ yïe dɑ runn ɑ́bïkyel kì yij lɑwø, o bɑ bïngween runni Öciyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø." 
2Kings18:11 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑgg yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ kwï gïn cïbe Alɑ̀, kɑ kwï gïn cïbe kömi Nɑm Abör kì myërri Gödhɑn, kɑ kwï gïn cïbe Mɑdɑy." 
2Kings18:12 Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti wørø yi gen, kɑ lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm gen ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ̈d yi gen, kɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Mosɑ̀ bënn pyem gen, eni Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li lïngø, o ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi gen." 
2Kings18:13 Senɑkerib, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑ̈ddi dörri Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ gï mɑge kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïngween runni Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø." 
2Kings18:14 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ öd-ɑ yï rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ki wöödø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji, døøg kɑ yɑ wiy. Yï ómëggɑ gïn-ɑ cwøl yi yïn kì yïɑ.” Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ köbbi yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kinni cude ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg gɑ kïllì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø, kí kïllì ɑ́lïp mø dhɑb." 
2Kings18:15 Kɑ ɑ́teng-ɑ Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bëne geki men-ɑ kɑ̈nni gøldwøng kwɑny yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kɑ gø muuje. 
2Kings18:16 Dhɑm-ɑ ódhyɑɑw Kengø ɑ́yööde wɑ̈g thyew, geki dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́mwøøn dëddi dhø Kengø yi en kiree, kɑ gï öre Senɑkerib bënn." 
2Kings18:17 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́öd kì Lɑkic ki yɑy me dwøng me bï Yerusɑlem be nyɑɑg ki Kedhekiyɑ̀, linyɑni ɑ́pyejj-ɑ yi pëjj-ɑ døngø ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ yuu-ɑ nyi löög ki ógudh, kì kömi wøl-ɑ kɑ̈ni kɑɑl ki pï." 
2Kings18:18 Kɑ rɑ̈dh cwøl yi gen, ɑöri gen Eliɑkim wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀, jɑngi gøldwøng, geki Cebnɑ̀, jɑlgwed, kí 'mïdhi wɑ̈j, Yöɑ̀ wɑ̈d Asɑp." 
2Kings18:19 Kɑ pëny-ɑ mɑl kì kelli pëjji liny Acuur okööbø kinni, “Köbbu Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, ‘Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur okööbø i yï gɑ̈nn-ɑ ngø?" 
2Kings18:20 Yï orumø kinni kwøbbi dhøg ócuggø pɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki nyɑɑg, kɑ gïn gwøg ki tegø lwɑ̈ng yi kwøb yøw? Yï orumø ce yïn ɑ́ men, ɑ pyeem kwøbbi Acuur?" 
2Kings18:21 Yï orumø ce yï ókøny yi Rïp? De menɑni ko ni kwɑnyi okewi obej ɑ́ kemø. Ke kwömmí ki en, ree møde’ mødø kɑ cingí rodhe. Bene kenyi bëëd rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ke cöllii kunyø yi ngɑn gɑ̈nnii.”" 
2Kings18:22 Kɑ pënyi liny Acuur cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Wɑlɑ̀ wu dwɑdd-ɑ köbbi yɑn kinni wu gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Pɑth ki Kenge geki këlli lɑm møge ɑ ɑ́cøør piny yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem kinni nyi kwɑ̈jji wun kì wïj këli lɑm men kete kì Yerusɑlem?" 
2Kings18:23 Nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ ki kwøb ki nyingi rɑ̈nhdwøng, yï ónëngɑ ki kyënyì ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew men-ɑ óyïddí ki ji møg kɑdhi kömi gen!" 
2Kings18:24 Wu pɑ kyëëw ki ngɑn-ɑ thinh kì kelli pëjji liny Acuur, o yï yöd yï ngɑ̈dh-ɑ Rïp kinni yï óöde ki yɑ̈thi liny geki jøkyënyì!" 
2Kings18:25 Wu orumø kinni yɑ nuti køny-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kömi myërri wun kɑ ge rënyɑ? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn i pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kömi gen kɑ ge rënyɑ.” 
2Kings18:26 Codhe, ɑköbbi pënyi linyɑni yi Eliɑkim, geki Cebnɑ̀ kí Yöɑ̀ kinni, “Kööb ki dhøg Arɑm wuö, yï ko 'kööb dhøg Ibru, mɑ́ dhøg Arɑm olïngø yi wøn, o tyëng-ɑ kömi dörø olïngø ki dhøngɑni thyew.”" 
2Kings18:27 Alögge kinni, “Wu orumø kinni yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yï wun yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, o bɑ wuki rɑ̈dh keti wun ɑ köbbi møgɑni bënn? Pɑth, yɑ kööbø thyew kɑ teen-ɑ kömi dörø ɑnɑn, mɑ́ cyedhhi gen bɑ møg cɑm yi gen, kɑ lɑ́ji gen mɑdh gen kyeel ki wun.”" 
2Kings18:28 Codhe, kɑ pënyi linyɑni dhwödh-ɑ mɑl kɑ óryeerø ki dhøg Ibru kinni, “Lïng wun ki møg-ɑ köbbi wun yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur!" 
2Kings18:29 Kyëdd-ɑ wun kinni ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi Kedhekiyɑ̀, mɑ́ wu pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi en ki yielø kì cinge." 
2Kings18:30 Kɑ wu ko yïëy ki köbbø yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni ngɑ̈dhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí kinni wɑ óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur." 
2Kings18:31 Kwøbbi Kedhekiyɑ̀ ko lïngi wun. Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur okööbø i bï wun wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, ko wu yömmi wun. Wu ówiy yi en, o wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki nywøli oløøg wun geki nywøli yenhi bɑ̈ggi wun, o wu mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun ki pï kì yethi yïïthi wun," 
2Kings18:32 gïti keny-ɑ ócïb wun pödhø me ni pödhi wun yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, kun di oløg me göög ki møgø, kí byel mø cɑm, bɑ piny me pɑ̈ng yi oløg, kí dhetun, kí møøw kïc. Lïngu kwøbbe o wu bødh wun, ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni wu óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings18:33 Dɑ pödhø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi ki yielø yi jwögge kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur? 
2Kings18:34 Jwöggi Amɑth geki Arpɑd ying-ɑ keny ɑnɑn? Jwöggi Sepɑrbɑim, Ënɑ̀ geki Ibɑ̀ ge ying-ɑ keny? Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́di yielø yi gen kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøng?" 
2Kings18:35 Á men kì kelli jwöggi pödhhɑni, ɑ ɑ́yiel pödhe kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng wøn, ɑ rum wun kinni Yerusɑlem óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
2Kings18:36 Teedø ɑ́cög ge okudø, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́løøg kwøbbe, mɑ́ ji rumø ki kyëddø yi rɑ̈dh kinni ko di ngɑn löggi." 
2Kings18:37 Kɑ Eliɑkim, kí Cebɑ̀ geki Yöɑ̀ ógudhi gen pyëëd gen, codhe ɑkedh gen, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi pënyi liny Acuur löbbi rɑ̈dh yi gen." 
2Kings19:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀, ɑkɑge ógødhe yi rɑ̈ji pyëwe, kɑ orugø ki ocwɑ̈lø, ɑkedhe yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings19:2 Aöre Eliɑkim jɑngi gøldwøng geki Cebɑ̀ jɑlgwed, kí ókwërr-ɑ døngø yï Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh, jɑltöng ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì thyew." 
2Kings19:3 Aköbbi ge gøn i rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng orɑng, wɑ ceg kɑ cɑyø, o wɑ yɑ̈rø, wɑ nɑ ngɑn kømi pɑ̈dhi piny, de nyøødh, cøli dhɑnhø pɑ cuggi yïe." 
2Kings19:4 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur pëny-ɑ dwøng mi linye ɑ́öre be gwɑddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, wiy yɑ̈ddɑni lïngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, codhe o tyëng-ɑ yɑ̈dø cɑye. Kwɑjjí Jwøk kipe tyëng-ɑ döngø møg-ɑ nud.”" 
2Kings19:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi bɑ̈nggi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ yï Icɑyɑ̀," 
2Kings19:6 ɑköbbe gïn kinni, “Köbbu wïi wun kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Yï ko böggi yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kí møg-ɑ kømme kinni yï pɑ yiel yi yɑn." 
2Kings19:7 Óödɑ ki wëy me wëggii lïngi kwøbbi pyed, o døøge pödhi gen, o óköllɑ nɑ̈gø kì kunɑni.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Alïng pënyi liny Acuur kinni i rɑ̈nhdwøøng gen dhwödhø kì Lɑkic, o ceg-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggø ki kɑɑl Libnɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Lɑkic. Codhe, ɑdhwödhe e døøg-ɑ be pyëji rɑ̈nhɑni." 
2Kings19:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kinni Terɑ̈kɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kuc bï-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki en, ɑöde Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ki ji këti kinni," 
2Kings19:10 “Jwøng-ɑ gɑ̈nni yi yïn yï ɑ́köbbe kinni Yerusɑlem koo cïbe cingɑ, de rií ko wëggí wënyø yi møgɑni." 
2Kings19:11 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́lïngi yi yïn, kí kɑ ɑ́rënye gïn ki rënyi dwøng, dɑ́ yïn ɑ óbodh?" 
2Kings19:12 Kɑ̈ddi Gödhɑn, kí Arɑn, kí Redhep ɑ́rënyi yi kweyyɑ, kɑ tyëng Bet Eden møg-ɑ ying Telɑsɑr nɑ̈g gen. Ge ɑ́di yielø yi jwöggi gen?" 
2Kings19:13 Ágøne rɑ̈nhi kɑ̈ddi Amɑth, kí Arpɑd, kí Sepɑrbɑim, kí Ënɑ̀, kí Ibɑ̀?”" 
2Kings19:14 Akwɑɑny wɑ̈nyɑni yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kì yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii, kɑ gø rɑnge. Akedhe yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcïbe wɑ̈nyɑni bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings19:15 Akwɑ̈jji Kedhekiyɑ̀ kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kwömø kì kɑɑm kerobb. Bene yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk, yïn ɑ jɑɑg piny bëne. Yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny." 
2Kings19:16 Kyën pɑ̈ddí, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yï lïng. Kɑ nyingí yieeb, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yï nëën. Kɑ kwøbbi Senɑkerib møg-ɑ gwɑdde yïn, yï Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø lïngí." 
2Kings19:17 Kidyër, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur jurrì mø gïïr ɑ́rënye, geki pödhhi gen." 
2Kings19:18 Kɑ jwöggi gïn rɑ̈be, mɑ́ ge pɑth ki jwögg, de bɑ ngïjjì møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki yenh geki kïttì yøw, ge ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi dhɑnhø ki cingge." 
2Kings19:19 Anɑn Yïn ɑ Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yiel wøn kì cinggi tyëng Acuur, o yod yi kömi piny bëne kinni Yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk.”" 
2Kings19:20 Codhe, ɑödi Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh yï Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀, ki wöödø e løøg-ɑ kwɑ̈jji rɑ̈dh, kinni" 
2Kings19:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yï ceg kɑ gɑggø yi kɑɑldwøng Yerusɑlem, Senɑkerib, o yï ceg kɑ dhɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi en." 
2Kings19:22 Á men ɑ ɑ́gɑggi yi yïn, kɑ yɑnyyí? Yɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ bɑ Kwërø, yɑ nuti wøør yïn!" 
2Kings19:23 Kɑ yï tir-ɑ önø ki ji møg kööbø kinni, i yï kedhø ki yɑ̈thi linyí møg-ɑ gïïr, kɑ yï wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïtti Lubnɑn, kïtt-ɑ bɑ̈rrø. Kɑ köörí pwööd ce yenh-ɑ bɑ̈rrø, sɑndɑl geki ɑmedh ngøl yïn piny, kɑ yij thïmɑni tyëëg bëne;" 
2Kings19:24 yï pwöd-ɑ köörí ce yï kunyø ki yïïth, kɑ yï omɑ̈dhø ki pïi pìny mø pɑth, kɑ pïi Kiir othwøwø yi tyelli yɑyí." 
2Kings19:25 “Yï nuti lïngø cøn, kinni yɑn ɑ ɑ́pyël møgɑni kɑ̈ge dööng? O møgɑni ɑ́gwøgɑ ɑnɑn cyee. Kɑ yï thödhɑ ki tegø men gwøøg kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø gɑ thur." 
2Kings19:26 Tyëng kɑ̈ddɑni ɑ́bëëd yï gen bong tegø, ge ceg-ɑ böggø o ge yɑ̈rø. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge nɑ lum me twïyø kì wïj óthɑɑng ød, o keny-ɑ ɑ́köddi kömi gen yi yømi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, yøm-ɑ lyëdh kɑ ceg-ɑ thwøwø e nuti døngø." 
2Kings19:27 “De bëëdí ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, kí gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn, kí keny-ɑ kedhi yi yïn. O linyí ki yɑn ngɑ̈nyɑ." 
2Kings19:28 Kwøbbi linyí ki yɑn, ɑ́muuj yɑn, kɑ kwøbbi tɑ̈dí wɑ̈nh-ɑ yïɑ. Abɑdhɑ ngöönɑ’ órømí, kɑ ɑcebɑ gøødɑ dhøgí, o yï dwøøgɑ ki yuu-ɑ ɑ́bëën yi yïn.”" 
2Kings19:29 Aköbbi Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀ yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Men bene ngïji gïn-ɑ ócwöb kipere. Run men kí men-ɑ óbï, wu ócɑm-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ nyi twïy keti gen, de runn-ɑ óbï kì bɑng gen, wu ókɑ̈gø ki gemè, kɑ kɑj yi wun, o wu ópïdhø ki oløg kɑ nywøle cɑm yi wun." 
2Kings19:30 Tyëng-ɑ óbodh kì gøl Yeudɑ̀, ge ónyog ni yɑnh byerre niyeeng piny, o ree dɑ nywøl." 
2Kings19:31 Ódi ji kì Yerusɑlem, kí Kïti Dhɑyøn, møgɑni ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen, mɑ́ e dwɑdd-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings19:32 “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: ‘Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, pɑ pɑ̈nyi bëën kɑɑl, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ göjji yije ki weth, koo kɑ̈ni ki jølinye mø kɑ̈ddi ki ködd, wɑlɑ̀ kɑɑlɑni koo gëdde ki kɑ̈jji tyege gøn." 
2Kings19:33 Ódøøg ki yuu-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le, e pɑ kedhi kɑɑlɑni." 
2Kings19:34 Kɑɑlɑni ócwɑg yi yɑn kipe nyingɑ geki nyingi bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd.’ ” 
2Kings19:35 Kɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kedh-ɑ kɑɑl jøliny Acuur, ɑnɑ̈gge ki ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj kì kelli gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́cyëëw gen kì mwøl, ji buud-ɑ piny ge thøø." 
2Kings19:36 Codhe, ɑdøg Senɑkerib rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ kedh-ɑ Ninɑwɑ̀." 
2Kings19:37 Kɑ Senɑkerib nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈dde ɑ́ryew, Adrɑmelek geki Cɑredher ki pil, cyɑ̈ng megø e mɑll-ɑ Nisrök jwøge kì yij kenge. Kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ piny Arɑrɑt. Arøøny Esɑrɑdön wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
2Kings20:1 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ dële orɑ̈mø ki menrɑj, e nënni ɑ́ thøø ɑ bï köme, kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni. Kɑ jɑltöng Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh kedh-ɑ yïe, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø i ceg gølí, mɑ́ yï ceg-ɑ thøø, yï pɑ bødh.”" 
2Kings20:2 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ wïje løge ri dörø, ɑkwɑjje Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
2Kings20:3 “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni yɑ ɑ́bëëd ceth yɑ wør-ɑ yïn, o yɑ gɑ̈nn-ɑ yïn, o kwøbbí mïdhɑ’ mïdhø kì pyëwɑ, dhøgí nuti pyeem yɑn kinni tek, o yɑ nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn.” Kɑ óywöngø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe." 
2Kings20:4 Icɑyɑ̀ ɑ́dhwödh kì buti rɑ̈dh, de cem e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng, ɑköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j" 
2Kings20:5 kinni, i døøge yï Kedhekiyɑ̀, jɑngi jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngɑ, o pïi nyingí ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Debïd kweyí. Yï óyiel yi yɑn ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlí. Yï ókedhi Kengø kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
2Kings20:6 Yï óbëëdø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj. Yï óyiel yi yɑn, wuki kɑɑl men kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur. Kɑɑl men ókor yi yɑn kipe wøri nyingɑ geki per Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ en.”" 
2Kings20:7 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ tuur rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, kɑ̈bbi gen ki ópuun nywøli ólɑm kɑ gø nyøng gen kɑ̈jj-ɑ twɑgø, o ge nøgi gen." 
2Kings20:8 Apëjji Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Á ngø ɑ muuj ɑ́ ngïji men-ɑ nyodh kinni yɑ óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlɑ, kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ Kengø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng?”" 
2Kings20:9 Alöggi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Yï ónyudhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ngïji me nyodh kinni dhøge ómïdhe. Yï dwɑdd-ɑ kinni tïbø men døøge cyɑ̈n, wɑlɑ̀ kedhe mɑl ki pɑ̈ltyel pyɑ̈rø?”" 
2Kings20:10 Alöggi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Cøøri tïbø mɑl ki pɑ̈ltyel pyɑ̈rø yööd! Wiy døøge cyɑ̈n ki pɑ̈ltyel pyɑ̈rø.”" 
2Kings20:11 Akwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Icɑyɑ̀, kɑ tïbø dwøøg cyɑ̈n yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pɑ̈ltyel pyɑ̈rø, kì kömi yïdhi men-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh ɑ́ men nyi røm cyɑ̈dhi cɑ̈ng." 
2Kings20:12 Wɑɑngɑni ɑ ɑ́öni rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, Merodɑk Bɑlɑdɑn, wɑ̈d Bɑlɑdɑn ki jøg këëm Kedhekiyɑ̀ ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële, ge ókɑ̈ddø ki wɑ̈nyø geki gïn muujii." 
2Kings20:13 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ jøgɑni cwøøle gøle, kɑ gï nyudhe kɑ̈re bëne; gï ɑ́nyudhe ngyënyyi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, kí yenh geki mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med bënn, kí jɑmmi liny bënn. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng gø nuti nyudh en gïn kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ mïdhi jɑmme bënn, kí gøldwøng, geki yij pödhe bëne." 
2Kings20:14 Codhe, ɑkedhi Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng yï Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Jøgɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny, o bɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́köbbí gen?” Alöggi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.”" 
2Kings20:15 Kɑ Icɑyɑ̀ ópëjjø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen kì gøldwøng?” Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ ólöggø kinni, “Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́lidh yi gen, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng e nuti nyudhi gen yi yɑn kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kɑnni jɑmmì, kí gøldwøng.”" 
2Kings20:16 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ köbbi yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni," 
2Kings20:17 Bøli keny megø óbï, obëën bøli kenyɑni, jɑmm-ɑ gølí bënn ótëër Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, geki gïg-ɑ ɑ́congi yi kweyyí bënn gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Bong gïjø me döng e pɑ kɑ̈l." 
2Kings20:18 Kwï kwɑrrí ókïdhi be gwøg gɑ órøj møg göögø kì gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.” 
2Kings20:19 Kɑ yod yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni møgɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni, ódi mër kì yethi runn-ɑ ónëëne, ɑlögge kinni, “Wöön-ɑ ɑ́muuj yɑn kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j døøj.”" 
2Kings20:20 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ bënn, kí kwøbbi tegi pyëwe, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́gööge ki luy, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́kunye ki wøl me kɑ̈ɑ̈l pï kɑɑl, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings20:21 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyye, ɑrøøny wɑ̈de Mɑnɑsè keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings21:1 Mɑnɑsè ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́bïj kì Yerusɑlem. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Ëpdhibɑ̀." 
2Kings21:2 Mɑnɑsè ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki orøng ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil. 
2Kings21:3 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møg-ɑ ɑ́dhur piny yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ wïye ɑ́døøge ki gerø, kɑ ogëdø ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi lɑɑm Bɑɑl, kí ngïjji Aceerɑ̀. Ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, Mɑnɑsè kyelli mɑl ɑ́mɑlle." 
2Kings21:4 Mɑnɑsè ɑ́gëëd kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø, eni keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Nyingɑ ócïbɑ Yerusɑlem.”" 
2Kings21:5 Kɑ ogëdø ki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø mø jwöggɑni bënn kì yethi ódɑ̈rri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ryeet. 
2Kings21:6 Wɑ̈de ɑ́rɑ̈be ɑ́ gëëdhi, kɑ nyii rɑ̈ngø ki ɑ́jwöggì, kɑ nyii pëëjø ki yɑdh. Mɑnɑsè ɑ́göög ki orøg me dwøng kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wëgge rënyø." 
2Kings21:7 Ngïji Aceerɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mɑnɑsè, gø ɑ́cïbe yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Keng-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Debïd geki wɑ̈de Sølømøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kengø men, kì Yerusɑlem, en ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn kì kelli pìnyi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ɑ́ keny nyi mɑlli nyingɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
2Kings21:8 Tyëng Isrɑil pɑ wëggɑ cyeed wɑ̈g kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi gen, keløg ciggɑ ómïdhi yi gen kidøøj, kɑ cigg bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ngɑ mïdhi yi gen.”" 
2Kings21:9 De tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mïdhi gen, kɑ ge peej yij orøg me dwøng yi Mɑnɑsè, orøg me lod orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Kings21:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb ki dhøggi bɑ̈ngge jøtöng kinni," 
2Kings21:11 “Mɑnɑsè rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng, kɑ ogöögø ki gïgrijjø mø lod møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng Amör, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ peeje yij orøg, be mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth.”" 
2Kings21:12 Codhe ɑkööb Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑ ceg-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem ki ryɑ̈g men-ɑ óbëëd ngɑn lïngi kwøbbɑni wïje cem-ɑ dïïng." 
2Kings21:13 Yerusɑlem cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ni kɑ ɑ́cɑyɑ Isrɑil kí Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb geki gøle. Tyëng Yerusɑlem ókïdhɑ yïnø, Yerusɑlem óced yi yɑn ni kenyi ced tɑbø, kɑ döng-ɑ nøw, kɑ rum piny." 
2Kings21:14 Kwï tyëng-ɑ óbodh kì kelli jiɑ, óweddi yi yɑn, ge ócïbɑ cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o ge yɑg, o ge rënyi yi tyëngɑni." 
2Kings21:15 Møgɑni ógöggɑ jiɑ, mɑ́ ge ɑ́göög ki gïgrijjø kì bølɑ, kɑ nyingɑ rënyi yi gen, cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën kweyyi gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn.”" 
2Kings21:16 Mɑnɑsè ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji mø yï gen bɑ̈r, kɑ remø ómølø kì Yerusɑlem, kedh e peej-ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ yij orøg, ɑdøøg gen be mɑlli jwögg mø pɑth." 
2Kings21:17 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mɑnɑsè, ki orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings21:18 Akedhi Mɑnɑsè kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony yij bɑɑg gøldwøng, bɑɑg Udhɑ̀. Arøøny Amön wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings21:19 Amön ɑ́røny runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn ɑ́ryew kì Yerusɑlem. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Meculemeth nyɑɑr Aɑrudh kì kɑɑl Yotbɑ̀." 
2Kings21:20 Amön ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki orøng ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye Mɑnɑsè. 
2Kings21:21 Amön ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ yij yuu-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi yi wïye, jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑlli yi wïye ɑ́mɑlle thyew, kɑ ree bøødhe piny kì bøli gïn." 
2Kings21:22 Amön Jwøøg kweyye, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wiye piny, kɑ ocögø e pɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yuu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings21:23 Kɑ Amön mol yi bɑ̈ngge, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen kì gøldwøng." 
2Kings21:24 Codhe, ɑloony jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g Amön ki nɑ̈gø yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈de røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings21:25 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Amön bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings21:26 Akoony Amön kì yij bɑɑg Udhɑ̀, ɑkwɑɑny keje yi Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈de." 
2Kings22:1 Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́kyel. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Yedidɑ̀ nyɑɑr Adɑiyɑ̀ kì Bodhkɑth." 
2Kings22:2 Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nuti pɑ̈nyi ruudø, o dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti pɑ̈ny en ki pyemø, ɑ́bëëd ceth e nɑ kwɑn Debïd." 
2Kings22:3 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́öre jɑlgwed, Cɑpɑn wɑ̈d Adhɑliyɑ̀, o bɑ kwɑɑr Meculɑm, gø öre’ Kengø, kɑ gø köbbe kinni," 
2Kings22:4 “Kedhí yï Kilkiyɑ̀, Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Kɑ pyëëj kiper ngyëny møg-ɑ nyi cøng yi ókwër-ɑ dhø Kengø kì yï teedø." 
2Kings22:5 Kɑ köbbí mëgge ngyënyyɑni jøg-ɑ kwølli tyëng-ɑ thïg Kengø. Wiy ri gïn nyi cudi gen," 
2Kings22:6 bödhhi yiedh ki yenh, kí bödhhi gyer geki bödhhi mön, kɑ ri gïn ngëëw gen ki pɑ̈m geki kïtt-ɑ thïg Kengø." 
2Kings22:7 Jøg-ɑ kwølli jøgwøg yethi gen bong ɑ́dud, ge pɑth ki møg pyëj ki kër-ɑ mïdhi ngyëny yi gen.”" 
2Kings22:8 Kɑ Cɑpɑn jɑlgwed köbbi yi Kilkiyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kinni, “Wɑ̈nyi Cigg ɑ́yod yi yɑn kì Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni mëgge Cɑpɑn, ɑrɑngii yi Cɑpɑn." 
2Kings22:9 Codhe, kɑ døøg-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑkööbe kinni, “Ngyëny møg-ɑ ying Kengø ɑ́kwɑny yi bɑ̈ngí, kɑ gï mëgge jøg-ɑ thïg Kengø.”" 
2Kings22:10 Codhe ɑköbbe rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yïɑ dɑ wɑ̈nyø mɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Kilkiyɑ̀, wɑ̈nyɑni nud kì yïɑ kì keny.” Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni rɑng yi Cɑpɑn kì bøli rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings22:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi Wɑ̈nyi Cigg yi rɑ̈dh, ɑkɑge ógødhe yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe," 
2Kings22:12 ɑköbbe ókwërø Kilkiyɑ̀, kí Akikɑm wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn, kí Akbör wɑ̈d Mikɑiyɑ̀, kí Cɑpɑn jɑlgwed, kí Asɑiyɑ̀ jɑngi gøldwøng kinni," 
2Kings22:13 “Kedhu Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn kipe gïg-ɑ pwönyi yi wɑ̈nyø men. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe rɑɑj ki wɑ, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ̈nyø men nuti gwøgø yi kweyyee. Cigg-ɑ ɑ́cïb kömee nuti mïdhø yi wɑ.”" 
2Kings22:14 Kɑ ókwërø Kilkiyɑ̀, kí Akikɑm, kí Akbör, kí Cɑpɑn, kí Asɑiyɑ̀ ge kedh-ɑ yï Kuldɑ̀ ngetitöng, cï Cɑlum wɑ̈d Tikbɑ̀ wɑ̈d Arkɑs jɑl-ɑ mïdhi ógudhi kwër. Ngɑnɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem kì byëng-ɑ ɑ́cer gerø. Kɑ gø löbbi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb." 
2Kings22:15 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni døøg gen yï rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni," 
2Kings22:16 bene wöön-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j èn: “Yerusɑlem óryɑ̈g yi yɑn geki jie bënn, ni kër-ɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyø men-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings22:17 Yɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ ge nëng-ɑ jwögg mø pɑth ki gëdhhì, kɑ pyëwɑ rënyi yi gen, kɑ yɑ mɑg yi liny kì bɑng gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen. Yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi liny ki Yerusɑlem, linyɑni pɑ cög." 
2Kings22:18 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör wun köbbu kinni, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́lïng ki møg-ɑ ɑ́rɑng kì yij wɑ̈nyø," 
2Kings22:19 kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yewí, kɑ rií gwøøg mölø kì bølɑ, kɑ ógudhí pyëëd wɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí, kɑ yï óywöngø, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng kinni, kɑɑl Yerusɑlem óryɑ̈g yi yɑn geki jie, kɑ köme pɑ̈dhi yi cyën kɑ rënyi. De kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngɑ." 
2Kings22:20 Cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi gen, gïti keny-ɑ óthøw. Yï ówiy yi yɑn, o yï thøw ki mër.” Kɑ kwøbbɑni muuj Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ yi jøgɑni." 
2Kings23:1 Aöd Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ kinni cöllii jøgdøngi Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem bënn. 
2Kings23:2 Akedh rɑ̈dh geki jø Yeudiyɑ̀, kí ókwër, kí jøtöng, kí ji bënn, othønhø kí tyëngdøngø kí tyëngkɑ̈rì kí ɑbuur, ge ɑ́kedhi yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Arɑ̈nggi gen kwøbb-ɑ yij Wɑ̈nyi Cigg bënn, eni wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́yod kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi rɑ̈dh, ge olïngø kidøøj." 
2Kings23:3 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ócungø kì ri lööj rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, ɑkönge kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ócyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cigge geki kwönge mïdhe ki pyëwe, kí tege bëne. Kí kinni kwöng-ɑ ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyɑni ómïdhi yi en, kɑ ji oyïëyø ki mïdhi kwöngɑni." 
2Kings23:4 Codhe, ɑköbbe Kilkiyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng geki ókwërr-ɑ kɑ̈lli bɑnge, kí jøg-ɑ nyi kor dhø Kengø kinni, kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen lööj Aceerɑ̀, kí jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jji Bɑɑl, bënn wɑ̈g kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Arɑ̈ɑ̈b gen yi Yöciyɑ̀ kì wɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem kì yij töör Kidrön, ɑtëër beli gen Betiil." 
2Kings23:5 Apɑ̈de ókwërri jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́røny yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ nyi rɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Yerusɑlem. Ókwërr-ɑ nyi rɑ̈bbi Bɑɑl, kí cɑ̈ng, kí dwɑ̈y, kí kyell, kí jɑmmi mɑl møg-ɑ kyeelø ki bɑkur bënn, ge ɑ́pɑ̈d yi Yöciyɑ̀." 
2Kings23:6 Akɑ̈ɑ̈le ngïji Aceerɑ̀ wɑ̈g kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø kïdhe wɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem, ɑkïdhe gøn yij töör Kidrön, kɑ gø rɑ̈be kì kunɑni, ɑtøgii kɑ ogöögø ki búr, ɑweddi búrɑni wɑ̈thi rörri ji." 
2Kings23:7 Adhure uddi ɑ́mɑ̈jji keng møg-ɑ bɑdhhi Kengø piny. (Kɑ̈jjɑni ɑ nyi cwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ki bøjji lööj Aceerɑ̀.) 
2Kings23:8 Ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́ying yethi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le Yerusɑlem, ɑdhure kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møg-ɑ nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b ki gëdhhì geki bɑkur piny bënn, kì yij pödhø bëne. Kɑ këlli lɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́gërri wɑ̈li dyel kì dhø döri kɑɑl, dhøng-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Jöcwø, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi kɑɑlɑni, dhur piny yi Yöciyɑ̀. Këllɑni ɑ́ying-ɑ wïj kyëj kì dhøngɑni, e dhɑnhø kedh-ɑ kɑɑl." 
2Kings23:9 Ókwërrɑni pɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi buti këli Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Yerusɑlem, de ge nyii cyɑ̈mø ki ópùni kwër kì kelli ókwër, wɑddi gen." 
2Kings23:10 Abwööl Töpeth, kì yij Töör Kinöm yi Yöciyɑ̀, kipe kinni o bëëde e bong ngɑn rɑ̈b wɑ̈de wɑlɑ̀ nyɑre kì kenyɑni ɑ́ gënhi Mölek." 
2Kings23:11 Kɑ kyëny-ɑ ɑ́thyëyi jwøøg cɑ̈ng yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ nyiig yi Yöciyɑ̀, kɑ yɑ̈thi kyënyɑni rɑ̈be. (Ge ɑ ɑ́ying-ɑ dhø döri kɑɑl, dhøng-ɑ kedhi Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì buti ød jɑgø Nɑthɑn Melek.)" 
2Kings23:12 Kɑ këli lɑm men-ɑ ɑ́ger yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ kì wïj óthɑɑng øn-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Akɑɑdh, geki këlli lɑm ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mɑnɑsè kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ ri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dhur piny yi Yöciyɑ̀, kɑ gï tørre, kɑ lɑ̈bbi gïn wedde yij töör Kidrön." 
2Kings23:13 Kɑ këlli lɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Sølømøn kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Yerusɑlem, kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri Kïti Dhetun, møg-ɑ ɑ́gërri jwögg-ɑ rijjø, ɑ løg Actöreth jwøøg tyëng Sïdön, kí Kemöc jwøøg tyëng Moɑb, kí Milköm jwøøg tyëng Amön, ge ɑ́bwöl yi Yöciyɑ̀." 
2Kings23:14 Kɑ löjji Aceerɑ̀ toore piny, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́di gen pɑ̈ɑ̈nge ki cu ji." 
2Kings23:15 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møg-ɑ Betiil møg-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwøng Isrɑil ki peej yij orøg, ɑ́toor piny yi Yöciyɑ̀ thyew, kɑ gï tøge, pïd kɑ ɑ́göög gen ki ɑyejø, kɑ ngïji Aceerɑ̀ rɑ̈be." 
2Kings23:16 Aløg Yöciyɑ̀ ree, kɑ ólïdhø ki rörri ji kì wïj kït, ɑöde kɑ cu kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì yethi rörrɑni, ɑrɑ̈be gïn kì wïj këli lɑm e bwöl-ɑ gøn, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg jɑltöng cøn." 
2Kings23:17 Codhe, ɑpëjji Yöciyɑ̀ kinni, “Á röri men ɑ nennɑ ɑcɑ̀?” Aköbbii yi jø Betiil kinni, “Bɑ röri jɑltöng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́töng møg-ɑ ɑ́göggí këlli lɑm men.”" 
2Kings23:18 Akööb Yöciyɑ̀ kinni, “Wiyu en, cu jɑlɑni ko kɑ̈ɑ̈lu wɑ̈g.” Codhe ɑwiy gen cue, geki cu jɑltöng men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Kings23:19 Kɑ keng geki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́ying myërri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger yi rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil, ɑ bɑnge ɑ́rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dhur piny yi Yöciyɑ̀. Gï ɑ́gögge gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kì Betiil." 
2Kings23:20 Kɑ ókwërri jwögg-ɑ pɑth nɑ̈ge kì wɑ̈thi këlli lɑm. Kɑ këlli lɑm møgɑni, wɑ̈thi gïn rɑ̈be ki cu ji. Codhe ɑdwööge Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings23:21 Kɑ ji ceg yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ kiper gwøgi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, geki wøri Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij wɑ̈nyi lwöbø." 
2Kings23:22 Bong Kwëër Ákɑɑdh mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi ki gwøgø ni menɑni yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kër-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg pödhø yi Jɑgg." 
2Kings23:23 Anɑn kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny cyee, ɑ ɑ́gwøøg Kwëër Ákɑɑdh yi Yöciyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings23:24 Kɑ tyëdd geki ɑ́jwöggì, kí jwöggi kɑ̈llì, kí ngïjji jwögg geki ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth bënn, kì Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne nyiig; gïgrijjø møgɑni bënn ɑ́weddi yi Yöciyɑ̀. Kipe kinni o kwøbbi Wɑ̈nyi Cigg men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi Kilkiyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng kì Kengø, cïb kɑ̈jji gen." 
2Kings23:25 Bong rɑ̈dh mɑ ɑ́bëëd ni en cøn, mɑ ɑ́døøg kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pyëwe bëne, geki rumme kí tege bëne, e mïdh-ɑ Ciggi Mosɑ̀ bënn, o bong rɑ̈dh mɑ ɑ́göög ni en kì bɑnge." 
2Kings23:26 De pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e nudd e rɑɑj ceth ki Yeudiyɑ̀, kì bɑng gööj orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Mɑnɑsè." 
2Kings23:27 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yeudiyɑ̀ ógöggɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ Isrɑil. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ónyiigɑ kì bølɑ, Yerusɑlem óbɑny yi yɑn, eni men-ɑ́ kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ geki Kengø men-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni yɑ ómɑlli kì yije.”" 
2Kings23:28 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings23:29 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Nekö, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp bï-ɑ kömi Nɑm Porɑt e bï-ɑ be kønyi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ rødh yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ kì Megidø. Kɑ Yöciyɑ̀ nɑ̈g kì kenyɑni." 
2Kings23:30 Acïbii yij yɑ̈y yi pëjji linye, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l Yerusɑlem, ɑkonyii kì kej rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Kɑ Yöɑkɑdh wɑ̈de røny yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì keje." 
2Kings23:31 Yöɑkɑdh ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Amutɑl nyɑɑr Jermɑyɑ̀ kì Libnɑ̀." 
2Kings23:32 Árøngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyye. 
2Kings23:33 Lɑwe ɑ́cög-ɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑgii yi Nekö rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp kì Riblɑ̀, kì piny Amɑth, kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ köbbe col ki kïlli ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí miy ɑ́ngwen, geki kïlli dhɑb pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen, gɑ gwɑ̈j." 
2Kings23:34 Kɑ Eliɑkim wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Nekö, kì kej Yöɑkɑdh. Kɑ nyingi Eliɑkim wil yi Nekö ɑ́ Yöyɑkim. Kɑ Yöɑkɑdh kïdhi Rïp yi Rɑ̈dh Nekö ɑ́ ɑmɑg, kɑ othøø kì kunɑni." 
2Kings23:35 Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim gwɑ̈j nyi cøng yi en kì yï ji e bɑ̈ɑ̈n, gø nyi køøle kömi jɑmm-ɑ yï dhɑnhø, o gwɑ̈nyɑni bɑ men nyi culi Rïp." 
2Kings23:36 Yöyɑkim ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Dhebïdɑ̀ nyɑɑr Pedɑiyɑ̀ kì Rumɑ̀." 
2Kings23:37 Yöyɑkim ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kweyye. 
2Kings24:1 Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́bï be mɑgi piny Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́ Yöyɑkim ɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh, kɑ Yöyɑkim døøg-ɑ thɑ́ cigge ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, codhe ɑngɑ̈nye wɑ̈ye." 
2Kings24:2 Kɑ liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí liny Arɑm, kí liny Moɑb, kí liny Amön ör kömi Yöyɑkim yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, be rënyi Yeudiyɑ̀, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøggi bɑ̈ngge, jøtöng kinni gø ógwøge." 
2Kings24:3 Ryɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bï kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ e ɑ́kwøb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kinni o nyiige tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kì bøle, kiper orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Mɑnɑsè," 
2Kings24:4 kí per remmi tyëng-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge thyew. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe pɑ cuggi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki Mɑnɑsè kì bɑng orøngɑni. 
2Kings24:5 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöyɑkim bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Kings24:6 Kɑ Yöyɑkim kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyye, ɑrøøny Yöyɑkin wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Kings24:7 Yɑɑy Rïp nuti cigi bëën wɑ̈g kì pödhe, mɑ́ piny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e jɑɑg-ɑ yi Rïp bëne, jɑɑg-ɑ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, cɑg kì Nɑm Porɑt gïti tøg Rïp." 
2Kings24:8 Yöyɑkin ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Nekuctɑ̀, nyɑɑr Elnɑthɑn kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings24:9 Kɑ Yöyɑkin ogöögø ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wïye. 
2Kings24:10 Bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ɑ ɑ́bëën liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ e kwøll-ɑ yi pëjji liny Nebukɑdnesɑr, kɑ kɑɑl Yerusɑlem tyeg yi linyɑni." 
2Kings24:11 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr bï-ɑ Yerusɑlem e kɑɑl bɑ ɑtyeg yi linye. 
2Kings24:12 Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Nebukɑdnesɑr kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin ɑ́ ɑmɑg. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin geki meye, kí wɑ̈dde, kí jyɑ̈gge, kí jɑggi gøldwøng, ge kïdhi Bɑbïl ge rum yömmi yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
2Kings24:13 Kɑ kɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́ying Kengø geki gøldwøng kïdhi Bɑbïl yi Nebukɑdnesɑr. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Sølømøn ki dhɑb gɑ mø Kengø, ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Kings24:14 Kɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem kɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑgg yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, kí nyiirɑ̈dh, kí jøg-ɑ bɑ pëjji bënn, kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́køøl bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø. Bödhh-ɑ cinggi gen døj ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le bënn, geki bödhhi thɑ̈dh. Tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen pëddi cɑnø ɑ ɑ́wiy kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings24:15 Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin ɑ́kïdhi Bɑbïl ɑ́ ɑmɑg yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, en kí meye, kí mɑ̈nne, kí jyɑ̈gge geki pëjji Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings24:16 Jöddi liny mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew, ɑ́kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr. Kɑ bödhh-ɑ cinggi gen døj gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel kɑ̈ɑ̈le, kí bödhhi thɑ̈dh kì kelli gen, ge bɑ jøg teg bënn, møg cuggi nyïɑ̈ggø ki liny." 
2Kings24:17 Kɑ Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, ómï wïyi Yöyɑkin røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, kɑ nyinge wile gøn ɑ́ Dhedekiyɑ̀." 
2Kings24:18 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́kyel keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel. Meye cwøl ɑ́ Amutɑl nyɑɑr Jermɑyɑ̀ kì Libnɑ̀." 
2Kings24:19 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni Yöyɑkim. 
2Kings24:20 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́ceg-ɑ rënyø ki tyëng Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ nyiige gïn kì bøle." 
2Kings25:1 Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ ngɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈ye kì ri Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr obëënø ki yɑɑy pödhe bëne, kì pyɑ̈ri cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, kì bïngween runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø. Kɑ kɑɑl Yerusɑlem tyege, kɑ gø gële, o bëëd e bong ngɑn kedhi wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl." 
2Kings25:2 Kɑ kɑɑl obëëdø ɑ́ ɑtyeg kinøw gïti pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyeel runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø. 
2Kings25:3 Kì bïngween cyɑ̈nggi ngween dwɑ̈tt, keny-ɑ ɑ́tëngi kɑ̈j kɑ bong-ɑ gïncɑm," 
2Kings25:4 kɑ jøliny turr-ɑ wɑ̈g, ɑpɑ̈r gen bënn kì wɑ̈rɑni, ngö kɑɑl bɑ ɑtyeg yi yɑɑy Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈l yuu bɑɑg rɑ̈dh, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ kɑɑm dör, ge kedh-ɑ kuni Töör Urdun." 
2Kings25:5 De liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́rengi bɑng Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀, kɑ gø mɑɑg gen thwøri Yerikö, kɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈y yi jølinye." 
2Kings25:6 Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ mɑg kɑ kïdhi yï Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì kɑɑl Riblɑ̀, kɑ gønye lidh kì kunɑni." 
2Kings25:7 Codhe, kɑ wɑ̈ddi Dhedekiyɑ̀ nɑ̈g gï nenne’ nennø, kɑ nyingi Dhedekiyɑ̀ tøy, kɑ mɑg ki ɑ́cwecwel, ɑkïdhii Bɑbïl." 
2Kings25:8 Kì bïryeew cyɑ̈nggi bïïj dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïngween runni Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́bëën Nebudhɑrɑdɑn jɑngi liny-ɑ kor gøldwøng, ɑ bɑ jɑngi tøg burø. Ábï Yerusɑlem," 
2Kings25:9 kɑ Kengø rɑ̈be geki gøldwøng, kí kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø bënn kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Kings25:10 Kɑ döri Yerusɑlem cøør piny yi yɑye. 
2Kings25:11 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Yerusɑlem cøn, geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yömmi yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí tyëng-ɑ kyeelø bënn, mɑg yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn jɑngi liny-ɑ kor gøldwøng, kɑ gï køøle Bɑbïl." 
2Kings25:12 De kwï tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen pëddi cɑnø, kì yij pödhø, ɑ́wiye o ge pur gen bɑ̈ggi oløg geki pwödh." 
2Kings25:13 Kɑ löjji dilɑl kì dhø Kengø tørri yi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí yɑ̈thi dilɑl møg-ɑ ɑ́ying dhø Kengø, kí luy dilɑl, luy-ɑ dwøng. Kɑ dilɑlɑni bëne kïdhi gen Bɑbïl." 
2Kings25:14 Atöggi mɑc, kí ópɑ̈nni búr, kí dikɑ̈bbì, kí gïg-ɑ nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g mɑc, kí óthɑ̈ggì, kí ópɑ̈nni bɑkur, geki gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́køny ki dilɑl, ɑ nyi göög bënn kì Kengø, ge ɑ́kɑ̈l bënn." 
2Kings25:15 Gïg-ɑ bɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø bënn ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen, cɑg kì ri óthɑ̈gg-ɑ thønhø geki ópɑ̈nn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli lelli mɑc." 
2Kings25:16 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi Kengø yi Sølømøn ki dilɑl, ɑ løg löjji dilɑl ryeet, kí yɑ̈ɑ̈th geki luuy pï ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li rømø, mɑ́ ge peeg cɑrø." 
2Kings25:17 Löjjɑni ryeet ɑ́bëëd ge pɑ̈r, ɑ́kyel bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, kí yɑ̈ɑ̈r dilɑl kì wïje, e bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Tøggi yɑ̈ɑ̈r dilɑl menɑni bɑ ɑwen ki nywøli yɑdh romɑn mø ógwøgø gɑ dilɑl." 
2Kings25:18 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng Serɑiyɑ̀, kí ókwër-ɑ bɑnge, Dhepɑniyɑ̀ geki jyɑ̈ggi Kengø ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ̈l yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn pënyi liny Bɑbïl." 
2Kings25:19 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pënyi liny kì kɑɑl ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le, kí jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh gɑ ɑ́bïj, kí jɑl-ɑ bɑng pënyi liny, ɑ ɑ́mïdhi wɑ̈jji nyingi jøliny, kí jöddi kɑɑlɑni gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel." 
2Kings25:20 Ge ɑ́kɑ̈l yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, kɑ gï muuje rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì Riblɑ̀," 
2Kings25:21 kì piny Amɑth, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì Riblɑ̀. Codhe, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ óthumø ki kïdhi yïnø kinøw kì piny gen." 
2Kings25:22 Kɑ Gedɑliyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akikɑm wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn gwøg ɑ́ jɑngi Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o jɑɑge ji-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti kïdhi yïnø kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Kings25:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng pëjji liny geki jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́cög ge nuti yömmø, kinni i Gedɑliyɑ̀ órønyø, ɑkedhi gen be rëbø ki Gedɑliyɑ̀ kì Midhpɑ̀. Pëjjì møgɑni bɑ, Icmɑil wɑ̈d Nethɑniyɑ̀, kí Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Kɑreɑ̀, kí Serɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Tɑnumet kì Netöpɑ̀, kí Yedhɑniyɑ̀ jɑl Mɑɑkɑ̀." 
2Kings25:24 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Gedɑliyɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ko böggi yi pëjji liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, pëggu pönhï, kɑ wu göggu rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, yɑn ɑ köngi èn, bong gïjø me nywɑl wun.”" 
2Kings25:25 De kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt kì runɑni, Icmɑil wɑ̈d Nethɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Elicɑmɑ̀, o bɑ wɑ̈d gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, ɑ́dhwödh kɑ kedh-ɑ Midhpɑ̀ geki jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈rø. Kɑ Gedɑliyɑ̀ nɑ̈g gen. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Bɑbïl møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Midhpɑ̀ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen thyew." 
2Kings25:26 Codhe, kɑ ji odhwödhø bënn, tyëngkɑ̈rì kí tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Rïp, geki pëjji liny, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg yi tyëng Bɑbïl." 
2Kings25:27 Kì bɑng keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kì run-ɑ ɑ́göög Ebilmerodɑk ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki Yöyɑkin rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ gø göönye wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg. Gø ɑ́gønye kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew, e runni Yöyɑkin göögø ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryew ɑ́ ɑmɑg." 
2Kings25:28 Aköbbii yi Ebilmerodɑk ki kwøb mø døøj, kɑ gø cïbe mɑl kibøli rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bënn." 
2Kings25:29 Kɑ ógudh-ɑ ɑ́rug yi Yöyɑkin kì ød mɑg wil, ɑruugii kɑ cwøøl be cɑm kì tɑɑw rɑ̈dh. Nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ tɑɑw rɑ̈dh ceth kɑ̈ng-ɑ nëëne." 
2Kings25:30 Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi en ɑ́bëëd ge nyi mëgg-ɑ en ceth gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́thøwe. 
1Chronicles1:1 Adɑm bɑ wïyi Ceeth, Ceeth bɑ wïyi Enöc, Enöc bɑ wïyi Kenɑn," 
1Chronicles1:2 Kenɑn bɑ wïyi Mɑɑ̈lɑlel, Mɑɑ̈lɑlel bɑ wïyi Yɑred." 
1Chronicles1:3 Yɑred bɑ wïyi Enök, en ɑ bɑ wïyi Metucelɑ̀. Metucelɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Lɑmek," 
1Chronicles1:4 Lɑmek bɑ wïyi Nöö, Nöö yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Cem, kí Kɑm, kí Yɑpeth." 
1Chronicles1:5 Wɑ̈ddi Yɑpeth bɑ Gömer, kí Mɑgög kí Mɑdɑy, kí Yɑbɑn, kí Tubɑl, kí Mecek, kí Tirɑs, ge bɑ kweyyi jurr-ɑ cwølli ki nyingi gen." 
1Chronicles1:6 Kwɑrri Gömer bɑ tyëng Ackenɑdh, kí Rïpɑth, kí Tögɑrmɑ̀." 
1Chronicles1:7 Kwɑrri Yɑbɑn bɑ tyëng gøl Elicɑɑ̀, kí Tɑrcic, kí Kïtïm, kí Dödɑnïm," 
1Chronicles1:8 Wɑ̈ddi Kɑm bɑ Kuc, kí Misrɑim, kí Put, kí Kɑnɑɑn, ge bɑ kweyyi tyëng-ɑ cwølli ki nyingi gen." 
1Chronicles1:9 Kwɑrri Kuc bɑ tyëng Sebɑ̀, kí Abïlɑ̀, kí Sɑbtɑ̀, kí Rɑmɑ̀ kí Sɑbtekɑ̀. Kwɑrri Rɑmɑ̀ ɑ bɑ tyëng Sebɑ̀ kí Dedɑn." 
1Chronicles1:10 (Kuc yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de me cwøl ɑ́ Nimröd, bɑ dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́ying mɑɑl tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m kì kömi piny bëne)." 
1Chronicles1:11 Kwɑrri Misrɑim bɑ tyëng Lud, kí Anɑm, kí Leɑb, kí Nɑptu," 
1Chronicles1:12 kí Pɑthrus, kí Kɑslu, kí Kɑptör, (ɑ ri gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀)." 
1Chronicles1:13 Wɑ̈ddi Kɑnɑɑn, nyel-ɑ kɑyø bɑ Sïdön, kí Keth, ge bɑ kweyyi tyëng-ɑ cwølli ki nyingi gen." 
1Chronicles1:14 Kɑnɑɑn thyew bɑ kweyi tyëng Yebus, kí Amör, kí Girgɑc," 
1Chronicles1:15 kí Kib, kí Arkì, kí Sin," 
1Chronicles1:16 kí tyëng Arbɑd, kí tyëng Dhemɑr, kí tyëng Amɑth." 
1Chronicles1:17 Wɑ̈ddi Cem bɑ Elɑm, kí Acuur, kí Arpɑkcɑd, kí Lud, kí Arɑm, kí Udh, kí Uul, kí Gether, kí Mecek, ge bɑ kweyyi tyëng-ɑ cwølli ki nyingi gen." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpɑkcɑd bɑ wïyi Celɑ̀, ɑ bɑ wïyi Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Eber yïe dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew; ɑ́kyel bɑ Peleg, mɑ́ jii kömi piny ɑ́bëëd ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen kì bøli kenyɑni, o nyel-ɑ kyeelø bɑ Yoktɑn." 
1Chronicles1:20 Kwɑrri Yoktɑn bɑ tyëng Almödɑd, kí Celep, kí Adhɑrmɑbeth, kí Yerɑ̀," 
1Chronicles1:21 kí Adörɑm, kí Udhɑl, kí Diklɑ̀," 
1Chronicles1:22 kí Ebɑl, kí Abimɑil, kí Cebɑ̀," 
1Chronicles1:23 kí Opir, kí Abïlɑ̀, kí Yöbɑb. Jiɑni bënn bɑ kwɑrri Yoktɑn." 
1Chronicles1:24 Gøl Cem e køøl-ɑ mɑl ri Abrɑhɑm bɑ, Cem, Arpɑkcɑd, Celɑ̀," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber, Peleg, Reu," 
1Chronicles1:26 Serug, Nɑor, Terɑ̀," 
1Chronicles1:27 kí Abrɑm (ɑ cwølli thyew ɑ́ Abrɑhɑm). 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrɑhɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Isɑɑk, kí Icmɑil." 
1Chronicles1:29 Wɑ̈ddi Icmɑil ɑ́göög ki wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, (cɑg kì ri nyel-ɑ dwøng), Nebɑyoth, Kedɑr, Adbeel, Mibsɑm," 
1Chronicles1:30 Micmɑ̀, Dumɑ̀, Mɑsɑ̀, Adɑd, Temɑ̀," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yetur, Nɑpic kí Kedemɑ̀." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abrɑhɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ ɑkwɑny, me cwøl ɑ́ Keturɑ̀. Abrɑhɑm ɑ́nyöddi yi ngɑnɑni ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel, nyingi gen bɑ: Dhimrɑn, Yokcɑn, Medɑn, Midyɑn, Icbɑk, kí Cuɑ̀. Yokcɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Cebɑ̀ kí Dedɑn" 
1Chronicles1:33 O wɑ̈ddi Midyɑn bɑ ɑ́bïj: Epɑ̀, Eper, Aɑnök, Abïdɑ̀, kí Eldɑ̀. Møgɑni bënn bɑ kwɑrri Keturɑ̀." 
1Chronicles1:34 Isɑɑk wɑ̈d Abrɑhɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Isøø kí Yɑgob. 
1Chronicles1:35 Wɑ̈ddi Isøø bɑ Elipɑdh, kí Reuel, kí Yeuc, kí Yɑlɑm, kí Körɑ̀." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elipɑdh ɑ bɑ kweyi ji møg: Temɑn, Omɑr, Dhepì, Gɑtɑm, Kenɑdh, Timnɑ̀ kí Amɑlek," 
1Chronicles1:37 O Reuel, en ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Nɑɑ̈th, kí Dherɑ̀, kí Cɑmɑ̀, kí Midhɑ̀" 
1Chronicles1:38 Tyeli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Edöm kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri wɑ̈ddi Seir. Lötɑn ɑ bɑ kweyi Örì kí Ömɑm. (Lötɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ nyimen me cwøl ɑ́ Timnɑ̀.) Cöbɑl, ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Albɑn, Mɑnɑɑth, Ebɑl, Cepì kí Onɑm. Dhibeon, yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Aiyɑ̀, kí Anɑ̀. Anɑ̀ ɑ bɑ wïyi Dïcön, o Dïcön bɑ kweyi tyëng Amrɑn, Ecbɑn, Ithrɑn, kí Kerɑn. Edher, ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Bilɑn, kí Dhɑɑpɑn kí Yɑɑkɑn. Dïcɑn ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Udh kí Arɑn." 
1Chronicles1:39  
1Chronicles1:40  
1Chronicles1:41  
1Chronicles1:42  
1Chronicles1:43 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e bong rɑ̈nhì kì Isrɑil, Edöm ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi rɑ̈nhì møg: Belɑ̀ wɑ̈d Beor, kì Dinɑbɑ̀. Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dherɑ̀, kì Bodhrɑ̀. Ucɑm kì myërri Temɑn. Adɑd wɑ̈d Bedɑd, kì Abith (en ɑ ɑ́tyɑm tyëng Moɑb). Sɑmlɑ̀ kì Mɑsrekɑ̀. Cɑul kì Reöböth kì kömi nɑm. Bɑɑl Anɑn wɑ̈d Akbör. Adɑd jɑl Pɑu, (cyëge bɑ Meëtɑbel nyɑɑr Mɑtred wɑ̈d Medhɑɑb)." 
1Chronicles1:44  
1Chronicles1:45  
1Chronicles1:46  
1Chronicles1:47  
1Chronicles1:48  
1Chronicles1:49  
1Chronicles1:50  
1Chronicles1:51 Tyëng Edöm ɑ́bëëd ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen gɑ jurrì møg: Timnɑ̀, Albɑ̀, Yetheth," 
1Chronicles1:52 Olibɑmɑ̀, Elɑ̀, Pïnön," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenɑdh, Temɑn, Mibdhɑr," 
1Chronicles1:54 Mɑgdiel, kí Irɑm." 
1Chronicles2:1 Yɑgob yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew: Ruben, Cimeøn, Leebì, Yeudɑ̀, Isɑkɑr, Dhebulun," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dɑn, Yosep, Ben Yɑmïn, Nɑptɑlì, Gɑd kí Aceer." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yeudɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ɑ́nyöllii yi cyëge Bɑtcuɑ̀ nyɑɑr Kɑnɑɑn. Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Er, Onɑ̈n, kí Celɑ̀. Er, Wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀ nyel-ɑ dwøng ɑ́bëëd e rɑj, kɑ nɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles2:4 Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́nyöddi ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, yi Tɑmɑr kwɑre, cï wɑ̈de: Peredh kí Dherɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:5 Peredh yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Ëdhrön kí Amul 
1Chronicles2:6 Dherɑ̀ ómï Peredh, yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj: Dhimrì, Ethɑn, Ëmɑn, Kɑlköl, kí Dɑrdɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:7 Akɑn wɑ̈d Kɑrmì, wɑ̈d Dhɑbedì, wɑ̈d Dherɑ̀ kì gøl Yeudɑ̀, ɑ́kɑ̈ni kömi tyëng Isrɑil ki göj kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈bbe kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg kì yij liny, gɑ møg thyëyi Jwøk." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ethɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d ɑ́kyel, me cwøl ɑ́ Adhɑriyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:9 Ëdhrön yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Yerɑmel, Rɑm, kí Kɑlib." 
1Chronicles2:10 Gølɑni cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri Rɑm gïti ri Yesì kinnï: Rɑm, Aminɑdɑb, Nɑkcön (jɑldwøøng wïj gøl Yeudɑ̀)," 
1Chronicles2:11 Sɑlmön, Boɑdh," 
1Chronicles2:12 Obed, kí Yesì." 
1Chronicles2:13 Yesì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew, ge lwøøb-ɑ ri döng, ge bɑ Eliɑb, Abinɑdɑb, Cɑmɑ̀," 
1Chronicles2:14 Nethɑnel, Rɑdɑy," 
1Chronicles2:15 Odhem, kí Debïd." 
1Chronicles2:16 Yesì thyew yïe ɑ́dɑ nywøle ɑ́ryew: Dheruyɑ̀ kí Abigɑil. Nyɑɑr Yesì, Dheruyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Abicɑy, Yöɑb, kí Asɑiil." 
1Chronicles2:17 Nyɑre, Abigɑil ɑ́nywøm-ɑ yi Yether, kwɑɑr Icmɑil, kɑ ge onywølø wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Amɑsɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:18 Ëdhrön yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d, me cwøl ɑ́ Kɑlib, ɑ ɑ́nywøm Adhubɑ̀, kɑ onywølø ki nyɑre me cwøl ɑ́ Yeriöth. Anywøl Yeriöth ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Yecer, Cöbɑb kí Ardön." 
1Chronicles2:19 Kì bɑng thøwi Adhubɑ̀, ɑnywøøm Eprɑtɑ̀ yi Kɑlib, ɑnywøl gen ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Ur" 
1Chronicles2:20 Urì bɑ wɑ̈d Ur, o kwɑre bɑ Bedhɑlel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög runni Ëdhrön ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, ɑnywøme nyɑɑr Mɑkir, nyimï Gilyɑd. Anywøl gen ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Segub." 
1Chronicles2:22 O Segub yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Yɑir. Yɑir ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kì myërri Gilyɑd. 
1Chronicles2:23 De rɑ̈nhi Gecur kí Arɑm ge ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel kì kunɑni, e reb-ɑ myërri Yɑir kí Kenɑth, kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki gen. Ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kenyɑni bënn, bɑ kwɑrri Mɑkir wïyi Gilyɑd." 
1Chronicles2:24 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Ëdhrön ki thøø, ɑlɑɑg cyëge Abiyɑ̀ yi wɑ̈de Kɑlib. Ayïddi gen ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Ackur, en ɑ ɑ́cöb kɑɑl Tekoɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerɑmel, wɑ̈d Ëdhrön nyel-ɑ dwøng, yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj: Rɑm ɑ dwøng, kí Bunɑ̀, Oren, Odhem kí Akiyɑ̀" 
1Chronicles2:26 Rɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Mɑɑdh, Yɑmïn, kí Eker. Yerɑmel yïe ɑ́dɑ cyëge nyɑnthinh, nyɑnɑni cwøl ɑ́ Atɑrɑ̀, o yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Onɑm." 
1Chronicles2:27  
1Chronicles2:28 Onɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Nɑdɑb ki Abicur. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abicur ɑ́nyömi ki ngɑn me cwøl ɑ́ Abikɑil, o yï gen ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew, Akbɑn, kí Mölïd." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nɑdɑb ómï Abicur yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Seled kí Apɑim, de Seled ɑ́thøw e bong wɑ̈dde." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apɑim bɑ wïyi Icì, o Icì bɑ wïyi Cecɑn, o Cecɑn bɑ wïyi Alɑy." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yɑdɑ̀ ómï Cɑmɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Yether kí Yönɑthɑn, de Yether ɑ́thøw e bong wɑ̈dde." 
1Chronicles2:33 Yönɑthɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Peleth kí Dhɑdhɑ̀. Ge bɑ kwɑrri Yerɑmel bënn. 
1Chronicles2:34 Cecɑn yïe bong wɑ̈dde, de ɑ́nywøl-ɑ mɑ̈nn keti gen. Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d Rïp me bɑ bɑ̈ng nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Yɑrɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:35 Cecɑn nyɑre ɑ́mëgge bɑ̈nge Yɑrɑ̀ ɑ́ dhɑjø, kɑ nyöddi yi nyɑnɑni ki wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Atɑy." 
1Chronicles2:36 Cɑ̈gi kɑl kì ri Atɑy gïti ri Elicɑmɑ̀ bɑ Atɑy, Nɑthɑn, Dhɑbɑd," 
1Chronicles2:37 Eplɑl, Obed," 
1Chronicles2:38 Yeeu, Adhɑriyɑ̀" 
1Chronicles2:39 Keledh, Eleɑsɑ̀," 
1Chronicles2:40 Sismɑy, Cɑlum," 
1Chronicles2:41 Yekɑmiyɑ̀, kí Elicɑmɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:42 Wɑ̈d Kɑlib nyel-ɑ dwøng bɑ Yerɑmel, o yïe dɑ ómen me cwøl ɑ́ Mecɑ̀. Mecɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Dhïp ɑ bɑ wïyi Mɑrecɑ̀, ɑ bɑ wïyi Kibrön." 
1Chronicles2:43 Kibrön yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Körɑ̀, Tɑpuɑ̀, Rekem, kí Cemɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:44 Cemɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́nywøl Rɑɑm, wïyi Yorkeɑm. Rekem bɑ ómï Cemɑ̀ ɑ løg wïyi Cɑmɑy," 
1Chronicles2:45 ɑ bɑ wïyi Mɑon, ɑ bɑ wïyi Betdhur." 
1Chronicles2:46 Kɑlib yïe ɑ́dɑ dhɑjø mɑ ɑ́kwɑnye, nyinge bɑ Epɑ̀, kɑ nyöddi yi ngɑnɑni ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Arɑn, Mödhɑ̀ kí Gɑdhedh. Arɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Gɑdhedh thyew." 
1Chronicles2:47 (Jɑl megø me cwøl ɑ́ Yɑdɑy yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel: Regem, Yöthɑm, Gecɑn, Pelet, Epɑ̀, kí Cɑɑp.)" 
1Chronicles2:48 Kɑlib yïe ɑ́dɑ ɑkwɑny megø me cwøl ɑ́ Mɑɑkɑ̀, mɑ ɑ́nyöddii ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Ceber kí Tirɑnɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:49 Kɑ cig-ɑ nywølø ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Cɑɑp, ɑ ɑ́cöb Mɑdmɑnɑ̀, kí Cebɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́cöb Mɑcbenɑ̀ kí kɑɑl Gibeɑ̀. Thyew, Kɑlib yïe ɑ́dɑ nyɑre me cwøl ɑ́ Aksɑ̀." 
1Chronicles2:50 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Kɑlib: Ur bɑ wɑ̈d Kɑlib nyel-ɑ dwøng, o meye bɑ Eprɑtɑ̀. Cöbɑl wɑ̈d Ur bɑ en ɑ ɑ́cöb Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm." 
1Chronicles2:51 Sɑlmɑ̀ wɑ̈de, ɑ bɑng nyeldwøng ɑ ɑ́cöb Betleem, o Arep dɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ̈dde ɑ ɑ́cöb Betgɑder." 
1Chronicles2:52 Cöbɑl, ɑ ɑ́cöb Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, en ɑ bɑ kweyi tyëng Aroè, ɑ bɑ budi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Menuöth," 
1Chronicles2:53 ge bɑ kwï kɑ̈ll-ɑ bëëdø kì Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, ɑ løg tyëng Ithrì, Puthit, Cumɑth kí Micrɑit. (Tyëng Kɑ̈ddi Dhörɑ̀ kí Ectɑol ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kɑ̈llɑni)." 
1Chronicles2:54 Sɑlmɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́cöb Betleem bɑ kweyi tyëng Netöpɑ̀ mø Atröth Bet Yöɑb, kí tyëng Dhör ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈llɑni ryeet kì Mɑnɑɑth." 
1Chronicles2:55 (Wɑ̈thi kɑ̈ll-ɑ bɑ bödhhi gwed ɑ́bëëd ɑ kɑɑl Yɑbedh, ɑ løg gøl Tirɑs, Cimeɑth, kí Sukɑth. Ge bɑ tyëng Ken møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøm ri gen ki tyëng Rekɑb)." 
1Chronicles3:1 Møg bɑ tyëng gøl Debïd, ge bɑ wɑ̈dde møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ying gen Kibrön. Amnön, ɑ meye bɑ Akinoɑm kì Yidhriil Dɑniel, ɑ meye bɑ Abigɑil kì Kɑrmel, Abcɑlöm, ɑ meye bɑ Mɑɑkɑ̀, nyɑɑr Rɑ̈dh Tɑlmɑy kì Gecur Adöniyɑ̀, ɑ meye bɑ Agith Cepɑtiyɑ̀, ɑ meye bɑ Abitɑl Ithreɑm, ɑ meye bɑ Eglɑ̀." 
1Chronicles3:2  
1Chronicles3:3  
1Chronicles3:4 Yɑɑgɑni gɑ ɑ́bïkyel ge ɑ́nywøl-ɑ Kibrön, kun-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Debïd ki runn ɑ́bïryew kí dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel. Debïd ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g," 
1Chronicles3:5 wɑ̈dde møg-ɑ ngenyø ɑ́nywøl-ɑ kunɑni. Debïd ɑ́nyöddi yi cyëge, Bɑtcebɑ̀ nyɑɑr Amiel, ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg. Cimeɑ̀, Cöbɑb, Nɑthɑn, kí Sølømøn." 
1Chronicles3:6 Debïd yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd møøgø gɑ ɑ́bïngwen, ɑ løg: Ibɑɑr, Elicuɑ̀, Elpelet," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nögɑ̀, Nepeg, Yɑpiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elicɑmɑ̀, Eliɑdɑ̀, kí Elipelet." 
1Chronicles3:9 Debïd yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd mɑ ɑ́nyöllii yi ɑkwɑnyye. Yïe ɑ́dɑ nyɑre thyew me cwøl ɑ́ Tɑmɑr. 
1Chronicles3:10 Men bɑ gøl Sølømøn, e myer ɑ́ dhɑnhø kí wɑ̈de: Sølømøn, Reöboɑm, Abiyɑ̀, Asɑ̀, Yöcɑpɑt," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yeörɑm, Akɑdhiyɑ̀, Yöɑc," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amɑdhiyɑ̀, Udhiyɑ̀, Yöthɑm," 
1Chronicles3:13 Akɑɑdh, Kedhekiyɑ̀, Mɑnɑsè." 
1Chronicles3:14 Amön kí Yöciyɑ̀. 
1Chronicles3:15 Yöciyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Yöɑnɑn, Yöyɑkim, Dhedekiyɑ̀, kí Yöɑkɑdh." 
1Chronicles3:16 Yöyɑkim yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Yöyɑkin kí Dhedekiyɑ̀. 
1Chronicles3:17 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l ɑ́ ɑmɑg yi tyëng Bɑbïl. Yöyɑkin yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew: Ceɑltiel," 
1Chronicles3:18 Mɑlkirɑm, Pedɑiyɑ̀, Cenɑdhɑr, Yekɑmiyɑ̀, Öcɑmɑ̀, kí Nedɑbiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles3:19 Pedɑiyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Dherubɑbïl, kí Cimeì. Dherubɑbïl bɑ wïyi yɑɑg ɑ́ryew: Meculɑm kí Anɑniyɑ̀ kí nyɑre ɑ́kyel me cwøl ɑ́ Celömith." 
1Chronicles3:20 Dherubɑbïl yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj møøgø: Acubɑ̀, Oel, Berekiyɑ̀, Aɑsɑdiyɑ̀, kí Yucɑb Ësed." 
1Chronicles3:21 Anɑniyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Pelɑtiyɑ̀, kí Yecɑiyɑ̀. Yecɑiyɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Repɑiyɑ̀, ɑ bɑ wïyi Arnɑn, wïyi Obɑdiyɑ̀ wïyi Cekɑniyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles3:22 Cekɑniyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d ɑ́kyel: Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí kwɑrre ɑ́bïj: Atuc, Igɑl, Bɑriyɑ̀, Neɑriyɑ̀, kí Cɑpɑt." 
1Chronicles3:23 Neɑriyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Eliönɑy, Kedhekiyɑ̀ kí Adhrikɑm." 
1Chronicles3:24 Eliönɑy yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew: Ödɑbiyɑ̀, Eliɑcïb, Pelɑiyɑ̀, Akkub, Yöɑnɑn, Delɑiyɑ̀, kí Anɑnì." 
1Chronicles4:1 Møg bɑ kwï kwɑrri Yeudɑ̀: Peredh, Ëdhrön, Kɑrmì, Ur, kí Cöbɑl." 
1Chronicles4:2 Cöbɑl bɑ wïyi Reɑiyɑ̀; en ɑ bɑ wïyi Yɑɑth, wïyi Akumɑy geki Lɑɑd; gen ɑ bɑ kweyyi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Dhörɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ur bɑ wɑ̈d Kɑlib nyel-ɑ dwøng, wɑ̈d cyëge Eprɑtɑ̀, o bene kwɑrre ɑ ɑ́cöb Betleem kɑɑldwøng. Ur yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Etɑm, Penuel, kí Edher. Etɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g thyew: Yidhriil, Icmɑ̀, kí Idbɑc, kí nyɑre me cwøl ɑ́ Adhelelpönì. Penuel en ɑ ɑ́cöb Gedör, o Edher ɑ ɑ́cöb Ucɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Ackur, ɑ ɑ́cöb kɑɑl Tekoɑ̀, yïe ɑ́dɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew: Kelɑ̀, kí Nɑɑrɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:6 Ackur geki Nɑɑrɑ̀ yï gen ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Akudhɑm, Ëper, Temenì, ki Akɑctɑrì," 
1Chronicles4:7 O Ackur geki Kelɑ̀ yï gen ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Dhereth, Idhɑr, kí Ethnɑn." 
1Chronicles4:8 Ködh bɑ wïyi Anub kí Dhöbebɑ̀, gølɑni ɑ ree kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Aɑrel wɑ̈d Aɑrum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Ádɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Yɑbedh, mɑ ɑ́bëëd e ceg kɑ wørø ki mendwøng yi tyëng gøl gen. Ácɑg-ɑ yi meye ɑ́ Yɑbedh, nyingɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëd pɑ̈dhe piny teeg." 
1Chronicles4:10 De Yɑbedh Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kwɑjje kinni, “Gyëdh yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, kɑ yɑ nëngí ki piny me lɑɑj. Korrí yɑn ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ki orɑng.” Kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjje mëggii yi Jwøk." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kɑlib ómï Cuɑ̀, yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Meir, Meir ɑ bɑ wïyi Ectön," 
1Chronicles4:12 Ectön yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Betrɑpɑ̀, Pɑseɑ̀ kí Teinɑ̀. Teinɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́cöb Nɑkɑc. Kwɑrri jiɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ Rekɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:13 Kenɑdh yïe dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Othniel kí Serɑiyɑ̀. Othniel thyew yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Athɑth kí Meonöthɑy. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meonöthɑy ɑ bɑ wïyi Óprɑ̀. Serɑiyɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Yöɑb, ɑ ɑ́cöb Töör Bödhhì, kun-ɑ di bödhhi gïg nyi gøggi kí møg-ɑ thɑ̈dhhi bënn." 
1Chronicles4:15 Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Iru, Elɑ̀ kí Nɑɑm. Elɑ̀ ɑ bɑ wïyi Kenɑdh." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yeɑlelel yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Dhïp, Dhïpɑ̀, Tiriyɑ̀, kí Asɑrel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Edhrɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Yether, Mered, Eper, kí Yɑlön. Mered ɑ́nywøm-ɑ Bithiyɑ̀, nyɑɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, o yï gen ɑ́dɑ nyɑɑr gen, me cwøl ɑ́ Miryɑm, kí wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Cɑmɑy, kí Icbɑ̀. Icbɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́cöb Ictemoɑ̀. Mered ɑ́nyömi thyew ki dhɑjø kì gøl Yeudɑ̀, o yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Yered, ɑ ɑ́cöb Gedör; kí Keber ɑ ɑ́cöb Sökö; kí Yekuthiel ɑ ɑ́cöb Dhɑnoɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Ödiyɑ̀ ɑ́nywøm-ɑ nyimï Nɑɑm. Kwɑrri gen ɑ bɑ gøl Gɑrm, ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Keilɑ̀, kí gøl Mɑɑkɑth ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Ectemoɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:20 Cimön yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Amnön, Rinɑ̀, Benɑnɑn kí Tïlön. Icì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Dhöketh kí Bendhöketh." 
1Chronicles4:21 Celɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Yeudɑ̀, kwɑrre bɑ Er ɑ ɑ́cöb Lekɑ̀, kí Lɑɑdɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́cöb Mɑrecɑ̀; kwɑrre ɑ bɑ bödhhi cwɑ̈j ki ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm, o ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ kɑɑl Bet Acbeɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:22 Yökim kí ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑɑl Ködhebɑ̀, kí Yöɑc geki Sɑrɑp ɑ́nyömi ki nyɑɑr Moɑb, ge ɑ́pëggi Betleem. (Menɑni bɑ kwöng me kɑ̈ge dööng.)" 
1Chronicles4:23 Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ bödhhi lɑ̈b møg-ɑ nyi cwɑ̈jji rɑ̈dh, o ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ kɑ̈ddi Netɑim kí Gederɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:24 Cimeøn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj: Nemuel, Yɑmïn, Yɑrïb, Dherɑ̀, kí Cɑul." 
1Chronicles4:25 Wɑ̈d Cɑul bɑ Cɑlum, kwɑre bɑ Mibsɑm, o wɑ̈d kwɑre bɑ Micmɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:26 Kì bɑng møgɑni gøl Micmɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri wɑ̈dde. Amuel, Dhɑkur kí Cimeì." 
1Chronicles4:27 Cimeì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, kí nyige womɑ̈nn ɑ́bïkyel. De tyëng gøl gen yï gen bong nywøl mø ngenyø, o gøl Cimeøn nuti døngø ni gøl Yeudɑ̀." 
1Chronicles4:28 Gïti bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Debïd, kwɑrri Cimeøn ɑ́bëëd ɑ kɑ̈dd møg: Bircebɑ̀, Mölɑdɑ̀ kí Adhɑr Cuɑl," 
1Chronicles4:29 Bilɑ̀, Edhem, Tölɑd." 
1Chronicles4:30 Bethuel, Órmɑ̀, Dhiklɑg," 
1Chronicles4:31 Bet Mɑrkɑböt, Adhɑr Susïm, Bet Birì, kí Cɑɑrɑim." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ge ɑ́bëëd thyew kì yethi kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj møøgø: Etɑm, Ain, Rimön, Töcen, kí Acɑn." 
1Chronicles4:33 Kí myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi kì buti gen gïti kɑɑl Bɑɑlɑth. Møgɑk bene møg-ɑ ɑ́gweed piny kipe mïdhi lwömi kɑ̈lli gen kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ́ yethi gïn ɑ́bëëd yi gen. 
1Chronicles4:34 Jøg bene gen ɑ bɑ jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen: Mecöbɑb, Yɑmlek, Yöcɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amɑdhiyɑ̀. Yöiil, Yeeu (wɑ̈d Yöcibiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Serɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Asiel), Eliönɑy, Yɑɑköbɑ̀, Yecöɑiyɑ̀, Asɑiyɑ̀, Adiel, Yesimiel, Benɑiyɑ̀. Dhidhɑ̀, (wɑ̈d Cipì, wɑ̈d Alön, ɑ bɑ wɑ̈d Yedɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Cimrì, wɑ̈d Cemɑiyɑ̀). Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kedh kɑ̈lli gen ge ódøngø," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 ɑtɑɑy gen kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kɑ ge ócyɑ̈ngø ki Gerɑr, kɑ dyëgi gen kwɑɑy gen yij töör-ɑ tøge ógeer kɑɑlɑni kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ge ɑ́yïddi ki piny me lɑ̈be med, o lɑɑj. Kì yij pödhø me bëëdø ki mër. Bɑ kwɑrri Kɑm ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki bëëdø kì pinyɑni." 
1Chronicles4:41 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Kedhekiyɑ̀, kɑ̈ll-ɑ nyingi gen bɑ ɑgwed ɑ́kedhi Gerɑr, kɑ kemmì geki uddi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pinyɑni rënyi yi gen. Kɑ ji cyeed gen wɑ̈g kì yije, codhe ɑpëggi gen kenyɑni, mɑ́ yije ɑ́dɑ lum me gïïr me cɑm yi dyëgi gen." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ji miy ɑ́bïj møøgø kì gøl Cimeøn ɑ́kedhi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Edöm. Ge ɑ́pej-ɑ yi wɑ̈ddi Icì: Pelɑtiyɑ̀, Neɑriyɑ̀, Repɑiyɑ̀ kí Udhiel." 
1Chronicles4:43 Kɑ tyëng Amɑlek møg-ɑ ɑ́ying pinyɑni nɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ ge obëëdø kì kenyɑni gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
1Chronicles5:1 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Ruben kɑyi Yɑgob. (Kej kɑyø ɑ́kwɑny kì yïe, kipe kɑ ɑ́kedhe yethi pënni wïye. Kɑ kej kɑyø mëggi wɑ̈ddi Yosep yi Yɑgob, bene ɑ bɑnge pɑ nyi kwɑnii ɑ́ wïj kɑl," 
1Chronicles5:2 cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́kedhi nyingi Yeudɑ̀ mɑl kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́ying lɑwø gøle, bɑ Yosep ɑ ɑ́cungi ceth ɑ́ wïj kɑl)," 
1Chronicles5:3 Ruben, wɑ̈d Yɑgob, nyel-ɑ kɑyø, yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Aɑnök, Pɑlu, Ëdhrön kí Kɑrmì." 
1Chronicles5:4 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Yöiil, cɑg kì ri rïny gïti rïny-ɑ kyeelø: Cemɑiyɑ̀, Gög, Cimeì, Miikɑ̀, Reɑiyɑ̀, Bɑɑl, kí Beerɑ̀. Beerɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi kɑl, ɑ́mɑg yi Tiglɑth Pileser, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ gø køøle yïnø." 
1Chronicles5:5  
1Chronicles5:6  
1Chronicles5:7 Pëjji gøl Ruben møg ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyi lwøbi kɑl bɑ: Yeiel, Dhekɑriyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles5:8 kí Belɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adhɑdh, wɑ̈d Cemɑ̀, wɑ̈d Yöiil. Gølɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ Aröeer kí Nebö kí Bɑɑl Meon kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
1Chronicles5:9 Yï gen ɑ́dɑ dhög mø gïïr kì piny Gilyɑd, kɑ pinyɑni kwɑny yi gen gïti yij ryɑng kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, e ködd-ɑ kömi Nɑm Porɑt." 
1Chronicles5:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Cɑul ɑ jyɑ̈gø, gøl Ruben ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Ägerïm kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen, ɑkwɑny gen piny gen, eni piny-ɑ buti Gilyɑd kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
1Chronicles5:11 Gøl Gɑd ɑ́bëëd ɑ buti piny gøl Ruben kì wɑɑng wuudø, kì piny Bɑcɑn, e wɑ̈dh-ɑ Sɑlekɑ̀ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
1Chronicles5:12 Kì piny Bɑcɑn, Yöiil ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi kɑl, o Cɑpɑm bɑ jɑngi kɑl megø, o Yɑnɑy bɑ jɑngi wïj gøl-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Chronicles5:13 Kɑ̈llì ɑ́bïryew møg, bɑ kwï wïj gølɑni, ɑ løg gøl: Mikɑil, Meculɑm, Cebɑ̀, Yörɑy, Yɑkɑn, Dhiyɑ̀, kí Eber." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ge bɑ kwɑrri Abikɑil wɑ̈d Urì, kweyi gen døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n ri ji møg: Abikɑil, Urì, Yɑroɑ̀, Gilyɑd, Mikɑil, Yecicɑy, Yɑɑdö kí Budh." 
1Chronicles5:15 Akì wɑ̈d Abdiel, wɑ̈d Gunì, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑng-ɑ jɑɑg kɑ̈llɑni bënn." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ myërri Bɑcɑn geki Gilyɑd kí kɑ̈ddi gen, kí cɑ̈mmi dhög bëne kì piny Cɑrön." 
1Chronicles5:17 Lwöbø menɑni ɑ́gwed-ɑ ri Rɑ̈dh Yöthɑm, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Rɑ̈dh Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Yöɑc, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles5:18 Gøl Ruben, kí gøl Gɑd, kí gøl Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, yï gen ɑ́dɑ jøliny ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ngwen, kí miy ɑ́bïryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, mø ngɑ̈ny nyɑɑg ki liny ködd, kí pil, kí wethh." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ge ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki Kwɑrri Äjer ɑ løg tyëng Yetur, kí tyëng Nɑpic, kí tyëng Nödɑb." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ägerïm geki jurr-ɑ ɑ́køny gen ɑ́tyɑm yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøk kɑ gø kwɑjji gen kipe kønyø." 
1Chronicles5:21 Jɑmmi jurrɑni ɑ́kɑb: ɑmɑl ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj; kí dyëg ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj; kí ɑderr ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew; kɑ ge ómɑ̈gø ki ji ɑ́lïp miyø. 
1Chronicles5:22 Ge ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji mø gïïr kì kelli jølinyɑni. Kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be bëëdø kì pinyɑni gïti kɑ ɑ́køøl gen yïnø. 
1Chronicles5:23 Tyëng gøl Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny Bɑcɑn e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø gïti Bɑɑl Kermön, kí Senïr, kí Kïti Kermön, kɑ kwɑnni gen óngënyø ki mendwøng." 
1Chronicles5:24 Møg bene jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen: Eper, Icì, Eliel, Adhriel, Jermɑyɑ̀, Ödɑbiyɑ̀, kí Yɑdiel. Jøgɑni ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑgg mø teg, o ge wør yi kɑ̈lli gen." 
1Chronicles5:25 De tyëngɑni Jwøøg kweyyi gen ɑ́wiy yi gen, kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde e bong yïëyø, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be kwɑjji jwöggi jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøk kì pinyɑni." 
1Chronicles5:26 Codhe, ɑrënyi pyëw Jwøk, kɑ Pul rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Tiglɑth Pileser wiye o tyëng gøl Ruben, kí Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè cyeede wɑ̈g kì pödhe, kɑ gï kïdhe Alɑ̀, kí Abör, kí Arɑ̀, geki myërr-ɑ kömi Nɑm Gödhɑn, kunɑni ɑ bëëd yi gen gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
1Chronicles6:1 Leebì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Gercön, Kɑ̈ɑ̈th kí Merɑrì." 
1Chronicles6:2 Kɑ̈ɑ̈th yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Amrɑm, Idhɑr, Kibrön kí Udhiel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amrɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Aɑron, kí Mosɑ̀, kí nyɑre ɑ́kyel, Miryɑm. Aɑron yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Nɑdɑb, Abiu, Eliɑdhɑr, kí Ithɑmɑr." 
1Chronicles6:4 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Eliɑdhɑr cɑ̈gi kì ri rïny kí rïny: Pineɑs, Abicuɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:5 Bukì, Udhì," 
1Chronicles6:6 Dherɑiyɑ̀, Merɑyöth," 
1Chronicles6:7 Amɑriyɑ̀, Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:8 Dhɑdök, Akimɑɑdh," 
1Chronicles6:9 Adhɑriyɑ̀, Yöɑnɑn" 
1Chronicles6:10 Adhɑriyɑ̀, (ɑ ɑ́göög kì Keng-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Sølømøn kì Yerusɑlem)." 
1Chronicles6:11 Amɑriyɑ̀, Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:12 Dhɑdök, Cɑlum," 
1Chronicles6:13 Kilkiyɑ̀, Adhɑriyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:14 Serɑiyɑ̀, Yödhɑdɑk." 
1Chronicles6:15 Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, Yödhɑdɑk ɑ́køøle geki kwï ji-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi yïnø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles6:16 Leebì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Gercön, Kɑ̈ɑ̈th kí Merɑrì." 
1Chronicles6:17 Yï gen ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd: Gercön bɑ wïyi Libnì kí Cimeì. 
1Chronicles6:18 Kɑ̈ɑ̈th bɑ wïyi Amrɑm, Idhɑr, Kibrön, kí Udhiel." 
1Chronicles6:19 O Merɑrì bɑ wïyi Mɑklì kí Mucì. 
1Chronicles6:20 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Gercön, cɑ̈gi kì ri rïny gïti rïny: Libnì, Yɑɑth kí Dhimɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:21 Yöɑ̀, Idö, Dherɑ̀, kí Yeɑtherɑy." 
1Chronicles6:22 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, cɑ̈gi kì ri rïny gïti rïny: Aminɑdɑb, Körɑ̀, Asïïr," 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkɑnɑ̀, Abiyɑsɑp, Asïïr," 
1Chronicles6:24 Tɑɑth, Uriel, Udhiyɑ̀, Cɑul." 
1Chronicles6:25 Elkɑnɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Amɑsɑy kí Akimöth. 
1Chronicles6:26 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Akimöth, cɑ̈gi kì ri rïny gïti rïny: Elkɑnɑ̀, Dhöpɑy, Nɑɑ̈th," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliɑb, Yeroɑm kí Elkɑnɑ̀." 
1Chronicles6:28 Sɑmwel yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Yöiil nyel-ɑ dwøng, kí Abiyɑ̀ ɑ thinh." 
1Chronicles6:29 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Merɑrì cɑ̈gi kì ri rïny gïti rïny: Mɑklì, Libnì, Cimeì, Udhɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:30 Cimeɑ̀, Agiyɑ̀ kí Asɑiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles6:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Sɑnduug Cigg ki kïdhi Yerusɑlem, ɑkɑ̈bbi Rɑ̈dh Debïd ki bödhhi thømi kej mɑ̈ddø." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ge nyi göögø ge luny-ɑ gwøg kì Kemi Kwër, kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Kengø nuti gerø yi Sølømøn." 
1Chronicles6:33 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg jøgɑni bɑ: Kì gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th: Ëmɑn wɑ̈d Yöiil, wɑ̈d Sɑmwel, ɑ bɑ pënyi ɑkun-ɑ mɑl. Gøl gen kɑ̀ lwøbii e wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri Yɑgob èn: Ëmɑn, Yöiil, Sɑmwel," 
1Chronicles6:34 Elkɑnɑ̀, Yeroɑm, Eliel, Toɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:35 Dhup, Elkɑnɑ̀, Mɑɑ̈th, Amɑsɑy," 
1Chronicles6:36 Elkɑnɑ̀, Yöiil, Adhɑriyɑ̀, Dhepɑniyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:37 Tɑɑth, Asïïr, Abiyɑsɑp, Körɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:38 Idhɑr, Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, Leebì, kí Yɑgob." 
1Chronicles6:39 Asɑp ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ryeew pëjji jøwör. Gøl gen kɑ̀ lwøbii e wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri Leebì èn: Asɑp, Berekiyɑ̀, Cimeɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:40 Mikɑil, Bɑɑseiyɑ̀, Mɑlkiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:41 Ethnì, Dherɑ̀, Adɑiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:42 Ethɑn, Dhimɑ̀, Cimeì," 
1Chronicles6:43 Yɑɑth, Gercön kí Leebì." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ethɑn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri gøl Merɑrì, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ dɑ̈ɑ̈g pëjji jøwör. Gøl gen kɑ̀ lwøbii e wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri Leebì èn: Ethɑn, Kïcì, Abdì, Mɑluk," 
1Chronicles6:45 Acɑbiyɑ̀, Amɑdhiyɑ̀, Kilkiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:46 Amdhì, Bɑnì, Cemer," 
1Chronicles6:47 Mɑklì, Mucì, Merɑrì, kí Leebì." 
1Chronicles6:48 Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn ɑ́nëngi ki gwøg kì kej mɑ̈ddø. 
1Chronicles6:49 Gøl Aɑron ɑ nyi muuj gëdhhi bɑkur kí gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm. Gen ɑ mïdhi gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj kì Kej Kwërdwøng, kí gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ møg gøøm bøli tyëng Isrɑil. Møgɑni nyi gwøg yi gen ceth ge ködd-ɑ kömi cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Mosɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøk." 
1Chronicles6:50 Møg bɑ jø gøl Aɑron gɑ ɑlwøb: Eliɑdhɑr, Pineɑs, Abicuɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:51 Bukì, Udhì, Dhekɑriyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:52 Merɑyöth, Amɑriyɑ̀, Akitub," 
1Chronicles6:53 Dhɑdök, Akimɑɑdh." 
1Chronicles6:54 Men bɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Aɑron, møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Kɑ̈ɑ̈th. Gen ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki nëngø ki piny, kì gøl Leebì." 
1Chronicles6:55 Pinyɑni reb-ɑ Kibrön kì yij piny Yeudiyɑ̀, kí cɑ̈mmi dhög men-ɑ bɑdhhe." 
1Chronicles6:56 Kɑlib wɑ̈d Yepunɑ̀ ɑ́mëggi pwödh geki myërr-ɑ bɑdhhi kɑɑlɑni. 
1Chronicles6:57 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́mëggi kwɑrri Aɑron ek: Kibrön, ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø, kí Yɑtir, kí myërri Libnɑ̀, kí Ectemoɑ̀, kí Kilen, kí Debir, kí Acɑn, kí Bet Cemec kí cɑ̈mmi dhög men-ɑ bödhhi gen." 
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60 Gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd møg kí cɑ̈mmi dhög møg-ɑ bɑdhhi gen: Gebɑ̀, Alemeth, kí Anɑthöth. Kɑ̈ddɑni bënn bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, gɑ møg bëëd yi kɑ̈lli gen bënn." 
1Chronicles6:61 Kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø kì myërri Mɑnɑsè, kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ ɑ́mëggi gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, e leng kɑ wél." 
1Chronicles6:62 Gøl Gercön, ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, ge leng kɑ wél, kì piny Isɑkɑr, kí Aceer, kí Nɑptɑlì, kí ri piny gøl Mɑnɑsè kì myërri Bɑcɑn kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
1Chronicles6:63 Gøl Merɑrì, ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì piny gøl Ruben, kí Gɑd, kí Dhebulun." 
1Chronicles6:64 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́nëngi Kwɑrri Leebì yi tyëng Isrɑil ki piny men bëëd yi gen ɑnɑn. Reb ki cɑ̈mmi dhög møg-ɑ bɑdhhi kɑ̈ddɑni. 
1Chronicles6:65 (Kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́muuj kì piny gøl Yeudɑ̀, kí gøl Cimeøn, kí gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ge ɑ́leng kɑ wél thyew)." 
1Chronicles6:66 Kwï gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́nëng ɑ ri piny gøl Eprɑim ki kɑ̈dd geki cɑ̈mmi dhög men-ɑ bɑdhhi gen, ɑ løg:" 
1Chronicles6:67 Cekïm, ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddi yömmø, kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim, kí Gedher," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yokmeɑm kí cɑ̈mmi dhöge, Bet Örøn kí cɑ̈mmi dhöge," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayɑlön kí cɑ̈mmi dhöge, Gɑth Rimön kí cɑ̈mmi dhöge." 
1Chronicles6:70 Kì piny Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Aner, kí Bileɑm, kí cɑ̈mmi dhög møg-ɑ bɑdhhi gen." 
1Chronicles6:71 Gøl Gercön ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd møg, kí cɑ̈mmi dhög møg-ɑ bɑdhhi gen: Kì piny Mɑnɑsè kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl: Gölɑn kí Bɑcɑn, kí Actɑröth." 
1Chronicles6:72 Kì piny Isɑkɑr: Kedec, kí Dɑberɑth," 
1Chronicles6:73 Rɑmöth, kí Anem." 
1Chronicles6:74 Kì piny Aceer: Mɑcɑl, Abdön," 
1Chronicles6:75 Ukök, kí Reköb." 
1Chronicles6:76 Kì piny Nɑptɑlì: Kedec kì Gɑlelì, Amön, kí Kiriɑtɑim." 
1Chronicles6:77 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì gøl Merɑrì ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ kɑ̈dd møg geki cɑ̈mmi dhög møg-ɑ bɑdhhi gen: Kì piny gøl Dhebulun: Rimönö kí Tɑbör. 
1Chronicles6:78 Kì piny gøl Ruben kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Yerikö, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ Bedher kì wïj kwøømø, kí Yɑɑdhɑ̀," 
1Chronicles6:79 kí Kedemöth kí Mepɑɑth. 
1Chronicles6:80 Kì piny gøl Gɑd: Rɑmöth kì Gilyɑd, kí Mɑɑ̈nɑim," 
1Chronicles6:81 kí Kicbön kí Yɑdher. 
1Chronicles7:1 Isɑkɑr yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Tölɑ̀, Puɑ̀, Yɑcub, kí Cimrön." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tölɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel: Udhì, Repɑiyɑ̀, Yeriel, Yɑmɑy, Ibsɑm, kí Cemuel. Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gøl Tölɑ̀ møg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi gɑ jøliny. Kwɑnni kwɑrri gen ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ri ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́bïkyel, e Debïd bɑ Rɑ̈dh." 
1Chronicles7:3 Udhì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de ɑ́kyel: Idhrɑiyɑ̀. O Idhrɑiyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Mikɑil, kí Obɑdiyɑ̀, kí Yöiil, kí Iciyɑ̀. O ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen." 
1Chronicles7:4 Yï gen ɑ́dɑ mɑ̈nn mø gïïr, kí nywøl mø gïïr, kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cwøw møg-ɑ ɑ́göög gɑ jøliny, wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
1Chronicles7:5 Kwɑnni jøliny møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwedd kì gøl Isɑkɑr bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryew. 
1Chronicles7:6 Ben Yɑmïn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Belɑ̀, Becer kí Yediyɑil." 
1Chronicles7:7 Belɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj: Edhbön, Udhì, Udhiel, Yerimöth kí Irì. Ge bɑ jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen, o ge bɑ jøliny mø teg. Kwɑnni kwɑrri gen ɑ́wɑ̈dhi ri ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen." 
1Chronicles7:8 Becer yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïngwen: Dhemirɑ̀, Yöɑc, Eliedher, Eliönɑy, Omrì, Yeremöth, Abiyɑ̀, Anɑthöth, kí Alemeth." 
1Chronicles7:9 Kwɑnni jø kɑ̈llɑni møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed gɑ jøliny bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́ryew. 
1Chronicles7:10 Yediyɑil yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d ɑ́kyel: Bilɑɑn. Bilɑɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew: Yeuc, Ben Yɑmïn, Eud, Kenɑɑnɑ̀, Dhethɑn, Tɑrcic, kí Akicɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen. Kwɑnni kwɑrri gen møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed gɑ jøliny bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kí miy ɑ́ryew. 
1Chronicles7:12 Cupïm kí Upïm kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri gølɑni thyew. Dɑn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d ɑ́kyel me cwøl ɑ́ Upïm. 
1Chronicles7:13 Nɑptɑlì yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Yɑdhiel, Gunì, Yedher kí Cɑlum. (Ge bɑ kwɑrri Bilɑ̀)" 
1Chronicles7:14 Mɑnɑsè yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Asriel, kí Mɑkir, ge ɑ́nywøl-ɑ yi ɑkwɑnye, ngeti Arɑm. Mɑkir ɑ bɑ wïyi Gilyɑd." 
1Chronicles7:15 Upïm geki Cupïm ɑ́nyömi yi Mɑkir. Nyimen nyinge bɑ Mɑɑkɑ̀. Dhelopekɑd wɑ̈d Mɑkir ɑ́nywøl-ɑ womɑ̈nn keti gen. 
1Chronicles7:16 Perec geki Cerec bɑ wɑ̈ddi Mɑkir møg-ɑ ɑ́nyöllii yi cyëge Mɑɑkɑ̀. Perec yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Ulɑm kí Rɑkem. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulɑm yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Bedɑn. Møg bënn, bɑ kwɑrri Gilyɑd, wɑ̈d Mɑkir wɑ̈d Mɑnɑsè:" 
1Chronicles7:18 Amöleceth nyimï Gilyɑd yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Icöd, Abiedher kí Mɑklɑ̀." 
1Chronicles7:19 (Cemïdɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Akiyɑn, Cekem, Lïkì kí Aniyɑm.)" 
1Chronicles7:20 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Eprɑim cɑg kì ri rïny gïti rïny: Cuthelɑ̀, Bered, Tɑɑth, Eleɑdɑ̀, Tɑɑth," 
1Chronicles7:21 Dhɑbɑd, Cuthelɑ̀. Eprɑim yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Edher kí Eleɑd. Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen be kwɑli dhögi tyëng Gɑth." 
1Chronicles7:22 Kɑ ge ywøg yi Eprɑim wïyi gen ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr, kɑ wɑdde kedh-ɑ be lugii." 
1Chronicles7:23 Codhe, ɑdøøge ød ki cyëge kɑ ngɑnɑni ongølø ki dhɑnhø, ɑnywøle ki wɑ̈d, kɑ gø cɑge ɑ́ Beriyɑ̀, kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́bï kömi gøl gen." 
1Chronicles7:24 Eprɑim yïe ɑ́dɑ nyɑre me cwøl ɑ́ Cerɑ̀. En ɑ ɑ́ger myërri Bet Örøn møg-ɑ wïj kwøømø kí møg-ɑ yij tör, kí Udhen Cerɑ̀." 
1Chronicles7:25 Eprɑim yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈d me cwøl ɑ́ Repɑ̀, møg bɑ kwɑrre: Recep, Telɑ̀, Tɑɑn," 
1Chronicles7:26 Lɑdɑn, Amiud, Elicɑmɑ̀," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun, Jöcwø." 
1Chronicles7:28 Kɑ Betiil kí myërr-ɑ bute kwɑny yi gen gïti Nɑɑrɑn kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ gït-ɑ Gedher kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø geki myërr-ɑ bute. Cekem, kí Ayɑ̀ kí myërr-ɑ buti gen, ɑ́kwɑny yi gen thyew." 
1Chronicles7:29 Betcɑn, Tɑɑnɑk, Megidø, kì Dör kí myërr-ɑ buti gen, ge ɑ́kwɑny yi gøl Mɑnɑsè. Gøl Yosep wɑ̈d Yɑgob ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddɑni bënn." 
1Chronicles7:30 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Aceer. Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Imnɑ̀, Icbɑ̀, Icbì, Beriyɑ̀, kí nyɑre ɑ́kyel, Serɑ̀." 
1Chronicles7:31 Beriyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Keber, kí Mɑlkiel (ɑ ɑ́cöb kɑɑl Birdhɑit.)" 
1Chronicles7:32 Keber yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Yɑplet, Cömer, Othɑm, kí nyɑre ɑ́kyel Cuɑ̀." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yɑplet yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g thyew: Pɑsɑk, Bimɑ̈l, kí Acbɑth." 
1Chronicles7:34 Cömer ómen yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Rögɑ̀, Yeubɑ̀, kí Arɑm." 
1Chronicles7:35 Othɑm ómen yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Dhöpɑ̀, Imnɑ̀, Celec, kí Amɑl." 
1Chronicles7:36 Kwɑrri Dhöpɑ̀ bɑ: Suɑ̀, Arneper, Cuɑɑl, Berì, Imrɑ̀" 
1Chronicles7:37 Bedher, Öd, Cɑmɑ̀, Cilcɑ̀, Ithrɑn, kí Beerɑ̀." 
1Chronicles7:38 Kwɑrri Yether bɑ: Yepunɑ̀, Pispɑ̀, kí Arɑ̀," 
1Chronicles7:39 o kwɑrri Ulɑ̀ bɑ Arɑ̀, Aniel, kí Ridhiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles7:40 Jiɑni bënn bɑ kwɑrri Aceer. Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen, jɑgg mø teg, kwɑnni kwɑrri Aceer møg-ɑ bɑ jøliny bɑ 26,000." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ben Yɑmïn yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj: Belɑ̀, Acbel, Akrɑk," 
1Chronicles8:2 Nöö, kí Rɑpɑ̀." 
1Chronicles8:3 Kwɑrri Belɑ̀ bɑ: Adɑr, Gerɑ̀, Abiud," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abicuɑ̀, Nɑɑmɑn, Akoɑ̀," 
1Chronicles8:5 Gerɑ̀, Cepupɑn, kí Urɑm." 
1Chronicles8:6 O kwɑrri Eud bɑ Nɑɑmɑn, kí Akiyɑ̀, kí Gerɑ̀. Ge bɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen kì Gebɑ̀. De keny-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi gen kì Gebɑ̀, ge ɑ́bëëd kì Mɑnɑɑth. Gerɑ̀ wïyi Udhɑ̀ kí Akiud ɑ ɑ́pyejji gen." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Cɑɑrɑim mɑ̈nne ɑ́ryew ɑ́tɑ̈nge, Ucim kí Bɑɑrɑ̀. De kì cyɑ̈n keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì Moɑb, ɑnywøme cyëge Ödec, kɑ nyöddi yi ngɑnɑni ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew. Yöbɑb, Dhibiyɑ̀, Mecɑ̀, Mɑlkɑm," 
1Chronicles8:9  
1Chronicles8:10 Yeudh, Sɑkiyɑ̀, kí Mirmɑ̀. Wɑ̈ddɑni bënn ɑ́bëëd gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen." 
1Chronicles8:11 Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew møøgø mɑ ɑ́nyöllii yi Ucim: Abitub kí Elpɑɑl. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpɑɑl yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Eber, Micɑm, kí Cemed. Bɑ Cemed ɑ ɑ́cöb kɑɑl Önö kí Lod kí myërr-ɑ buti gen." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriyɑ̀ kí Cemɑ̀ ge bɑ jø wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen kì kɑɑl Ayɑlön. Gen ɑ ɑ́cyeddi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Gɑth. 
1Chronicles8:14 Møg bɑ kwɑrri Beriyɑ̀ thyew: Akiyö, Cɑcɑk, Yeremöth," 
1Chronicles8:15 Dhebɑdiyɑ̀, Arɑd, Eder," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikɑil, Icpɑ̀, kí Yöɑ̀." 
1Chronicles8:17 Kwɑrri Elpɑɑl bɑ Dhebɑdiyɑ̀, Meculɑm, Idhkì, Keber," 
1Chronicles8:18 Icmerɑy, Idhliyɑ̀, kí Yöbɑb." 
1Chronicles8:19 Kwɑrri Cimeì bɑ Yɑkim, Dhikrì, Dhɑbdì," 
1Chronicles8:20 Elienɑy, Dhilethɑy, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adɑiyɑ̀, Berɑiyɑ̀, kí Cimrɑth." 
1Chronicles8:22 Kwɑrri Cɑcɑk bɑ Icpɑn, Eber, Eliel," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abdön, Dhikrì, Aɑnɑn," 
1Chronicles8:24 Anɑniyɑ̀, Elɑm, Anthöthiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles8:25 Ipdeiyɑ̀, kí Penuel." 
1Chronicles8:26 Kwɑrri Yeroɑm bɑ Cɑmcerɑy, Ceɑriyɑ̀, kí Athɑliyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yɑɑreciyɑ̀, Eliyɑ̀, kí Dhikrì." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ge bɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem. 
1Chronicles8:29 Gibeon ɑ́cöb-ɑ yi Yeiel, kɑ pëgg-ɑ yije. Cyëge cwøl ɑ́ Mɑɑkɑ̀." 
1Chronicles8:30 Wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ kɑyø cwøl ɑ́ Abdön. Wɑ̈dde møg-ɑ kyeelø bɑ Dhur, Kïc, Bɑɑl, Ner, Nɑdɑb," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gedör, Akiyö, Dheker," 
1Chronicles8:32 kí Miklöth wïyi Cimeɑ̀. Kwɑrri gen ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem kì buti wɑddi gen. 
1Chronicles8:33 Ner wïyi Kïc. O Kïc bɑ wïyi Rɑ̈dh Cɑul. Cɑul yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Yönɑthɑn, Mɑlkicuɑ̀, Abinɑdɑb, kí Icböceth." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yönɑthɑn bɑ wïyi Mepiböceth, o Mepiböceth bɑ wïyi Miikɑ̀." 
1Chronicles8:35 Miikɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Pithön, Melek, Tɑreɑ̀, kí Akɑɑdh." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akɑɑdh bɑ wïyi Yeöɑdɑ̀. Yeöɑdɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Alemeth, Adhmɑbeth, kí Dhimrì. Dhimrì bɑ wïyi Mödhɑ̀." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mödhɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Bineɑ̀. Kí wɑ̈de Rɑpɑ̀, kí wɑ̈de Eleɑsɑ̀, kí wɑ̈de Adhel." 
1Chronicles8:38 Adhel yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel: Adhrikɑm, Bökeru, Icmɑil, Ceɑriyɑ̀, Obɑdiyɑ̀, kí Aɑnɑn." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ecek ómï Adhel yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Ulɑm, Yeuc, kí Elipelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Wɑ̈ddi Ulɑm ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøliny mø teg. Kwɑrri Ulɑm bënn bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Ji møgɑk bënn bɑ kwɑrri Ben Yɑmïn. 
1Chronicles9:1 Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil en ɑ yije di kwøb møg-ɑ ógwedø kipe tyëng Isrɑil, kí kɑ̈lli gen bënn. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøk, kɑ ge kïdhi Bɑbïl, kì bɑng orøøg gen." 
1Chronicles9:2 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki dwöög pödhi Isrɑil, bɑ ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ji-ɑ nyi göögø kì yij Kengø." 
1Chronicles9:3 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kedhi be bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem bɑ kɑ̈lli Yeudɑ̀, Ben Yɑmïn, kí Eprɑim, kí Mɑnɑsè." 
1Chronicles9:4 Gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ ji miy ɑ́bïkyel kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen mɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem. Uthɑy wɑ̈d Amiud wɑ̈d Omrì, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi gøl Peredh wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀. Imrì geki Bɑnì bɑ kweyye møg-ɑ kyeelø. Asɑiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi gøl Celɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀. Yöiil ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi gøl Dherɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀." 
1Chronicles9:5  
1Chronicles9:6  
1Chronicles9:7 Møg bɑ tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem: Sɑlu wɑ̈d Meculɑm, Meculɑm wɑ̈d Ödɑbiyɑ̀, Ödɑbiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Asenuɑ̀, Ibneiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeroɑm. Elɑ̀ wɑ̈d Udhì, wɑ̈d Mikrì, Meculɑm wɑ̈d Cepɑtiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Reuel, wɑ̈d Ibneiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles9:8  
1Chronicles9:9 Wɑ̈thi ud 956 mø gølɑni ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kunɑni, jøg-ɑ nyingi gen bɑ ɑgwed ɑnɑn bɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen." 
1Chronicles9:10 Møg bɑ ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem. Yedɑiyɑ̀, Yöyɑrïb, Yɑkin Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀ (jɑngi Kengi Jwøk) kweyye bɑ Meculɑm, Dhɑdök, Merɑyöth, kí Akitub. Adɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeroɑm, wɑ̈d Pɑcur, wɑ̈d Mɑlkiyɑ̀ Mɑɑsɑy wɑ̈d Adiel, ɑ kweyye bɑ Yɑdherɑ̀, Meculɑm, Mecilemith, kí Imer." 
1Chronicles9:11  
1Chronicles9:12  
1Chronicles9:13 Ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen, kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́bïryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel. Gïg-ɑ gøggi kì Kengø bënn, ɑ́bëëd gwøgi gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi gen bënn." 
1Chronicles9:14 Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem. Cemɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Acub, wɑ̈d Adhrikɑm, wɑ̈d Acɑbiyɑ̀, kì gøl Merɑrì, Bɑkbɑkɑr, Ërec, kí Gɑlɑl, Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Miikɑ̀, wɑ̈d Dhikrì, wɑ̈d Asɑp, Obɑdiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cemɑiyɑ̀, ɑ kweyye bɑ Gɑlɑl, kí Yeduthun. Berekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Asɑ̀, wɑ̈d Elkɑnɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Netöpɑ̀." 
1Chronicles9:15  
1Chronicles9:16  
1Chronicles9:17 Møg bɑ nyingi jøkori Kengø møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem: Cɑlum, Akub, Tɑlmön, kí Akimɑn. Cɑlum ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi gen." 
1Chronicles9:18 Cɑ̈gi kì bøli kenyɑni gïti ɑnɑn, tyëng kɑ̈lli gen ɑ́bëëd ɑ Dhøg Rɑ̈dh, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Gen ɑ ɑ́bëëd cøn ge kor-ɑ byëëg Kwɑrri Leebì, keny-ɑ ɑ́nudd ge bëëd ɑ yethi kemmì." 
1Chronicles9:19 Cɑlum wɑ̈d Körè, wɑ̈d Abiyɑsɑp, geki wɑdde tyëng gøl Körɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge kor-ɑ dhø Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd kweyyi gen, ge kor-ɑ Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
1Chronicles9:20 Pineɑs wɑ̈d Eliɑdhɑr, gøle ókorri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! En ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi gen cøn." 
1Chronicles9:21 Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mecelemiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd thyew e kor-ɑ dhø Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
1Chronicles9:22 Ji bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny o ge korri gen dhøggi dörø bɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Ge bɑ ɑgwedd kí myërr-ɑ bëëd yi gen. Ábëëd ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh Debïd geki jɑltöng Sɑmwel ɑ ɑ́kwɑny kweyyi gen gɑ jɑggi kɑ̈jjɑni. 
1Chronicles9:23 Gen kí kwɑrri gen, ge ɑ́cög gɑ tyëng dhø Kengø." 
1Chronicles9:24 Ádɑ dhøg møg nenni wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, dɑ men yïëbbi wɑɑng wuudø, kí wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kí wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, dhøggɑni bënn dɑ jɑggi jøkor."
