1Chronicles9:25 Jøkor møgɑni nyii kønyø yi tyëng kɑ̈lli gen, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì myërri gen. Kɑ ge nyii kurø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, e ceg kɑ lunyø." 
1Chronicles9:26 Jɑggi jøkor ɑ́ngwen møgɑni bɑ Kwɑrri Leebì, yï gen ɑ́dɑ tegø. O yï gen ɑ́dɑ tegø kì kömi udd-ɑ yij Kengø kí jɑmmì bënn." 
1Chronicles9:27 Gøl Leebì nyi bëëd ɑ buti Kengø mɑ́ gwøøg gen bɑ kori Kengø kí yiebi dhøge kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng. 
1Chronicles9:28 Gøl Leebì gwøøg gen bɑ mïdhi jɑmmi kej kwër. Kí rɑngi jɑmmɑni, kí kïdhi gen yij Kengø, kí dwøøgi gen kɑ̈jji gen kenyi rum gwøg." 
1Chronicles9:29 Kwï gen ɑ́bëëd gwøøg gen bɑ mïdhi jɑmmi kwër, ni møng-ɑ búr, kí byëlø, kí møgi oløg, kí bɑkur, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med." 
1Chronicles9:30 De ókwër gwøøg gen bɑ yöli yenh-ɑ yømi gen med. 
1Chronicles9:31 Kwɑɑr Leebì me cwøl ɑ́ Mɑtithiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑlum nyel-ɑ dwøng kì gøl Körɑ̀, en ɑ ɑ́mïdhi byël-ɑ bɑ ɑbulø." 
1Chronicles9:32 O ópùni kwër nyi pyël-ɑ yi gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth bënn. 
1Chronicles9:33 Kwï tyëng gøl Leebì bɑ bödhhi thøm kì yij Kengø. O jɑggi kɑ̈llɑni nyi bëëd ɑ yethi udd-ɑ bɑdhhi Kengø, o yï gen bong gwøg megø, mɑ́ ge ceg-ɑ gwøg kì yij Kengø kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r." 
1Chronicles9:34 Jøg-ɑ nyingi gen bɑ ɑgwed ɑgɑk, bɑ jɑggi kɑ̈lli Kwɑrri Leebì, ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeiel bene en ɑ ɑ́cöb Gibeon kɑ pëgg-ɑ yije. Cyëge cwøl ɑ́ Mɑɑkɑ̀. 
1Chronicles9:36 Wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ kɑyø, cwøl ɑ́ Abdön, o wɑ̈dde yɑɑg-ɑ kyeelø bɑ Dhur, Kïc, Bɑɑl, Ner, Nɑdɑb," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gedör, Akiyö, Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Miklöth," 
1Chronicles9:38 wïyi Cimeɑ̀. Gølɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem kì buti wɑddi gen Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø. 
1Chronicles9:39 Ner bɑ wïyi Kïc, o Kïc bɑ wïyi Cɑul. Cɑul yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen. Yönɑthɑn, Mɑlkicuɑ̀, Abinɑdɑb, kí Icböceth." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yönɑthɑn bɑ wïyi Mepiböceth, o Mepiböceth bɑ wïyi Miikɑ̀." 
1Chronicles9:41 Miikɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Pithön, Melek, Tɑreɑ̀ kí Akɑɑdh." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akɑɑdh ɑ bɑ wïyi Yɑrɑ̀, o Yɑrɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g: Alemeth, Adhmɑbeth, kí Dhimrì. Dhimrì bɑ wïyi Mödhɑ̀," 
1Chronicles9:43 Mödhɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Bineɑ̀, kí wɑ̈de Repɑiyɑ̀, kí wɑ̈de Eleɑsɑ̀, kí wɑ̈de Adhel." 
1Chronicles9:44 Adhel yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïkyel: Adhrikɑm, Bökeru, Icmɑil, Ceɑriyɑ̀, Obɑdiyɑ̀, kí Aɑnɑn." 
1Chronicles10:1 Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Isrɑil kì wïj Kïti Gilboɑ̀. Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil mø gïïr nɑ̈g, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Cɑul cyeddi geki wɑ̈dde ki kwï yɑye." 
1Chronicles10:2 De ge ɑ́pïïd yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ wɑ̈ddi Cɑul ɑ́dɑ̈g: Yönɑthɑn, Abinɑdɑb, kí Mɑlkicuɑ̀ nɑ̈g." 
1Chronicles10:3 Cɑul ɑ́tyeg yi liny, kɑ ree pɑ̈dhi yi nyɑɑr weth. Kedø menɑni ɑ́bëëd e teeg cɑrø kì ri Cɑul." 
1Chronicles10:4 Kɑ nyelɑwøb men-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi liny mø Cɑul, köbbe kinni, “Wöödh pilí wɑ̈g kì yij bøje, kɑ yɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, kipe yɑ ótuug yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kwïj Jwøk.” De nyelɑni ɑ́bwøg ki nɑ̈ge. Codhe, kɑ Cɑul pile kwɑnye, kɑ ree møøde köme, ɑthøwe." 
1Chronicles10:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi wømɑni kinni Cɑul ɑ́thøw, ɑlonye ree ki møød kömi pile thyew, ɑthøwe." 
1Chronicles10:6 Cɑul ɑ́thøw geki wɑ̈dde gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g bënn, o bong wɑ̈de mɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi kì bɑnge." 
1Chronicles10:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Töör Yidhriil kinni i liny ócyeddø, kɑ Cɑul geki wɑ̈dde nɑ̈g bënn, ɑwiy gen kɑ̈ddi gen piny, kɑ ge órengø. Kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ obëënø, ɑpëggi gen kɑ̈ddɑni." 
1Chronicles10:8 Dhuki, ɑkedhi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ be yɑgi ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw, kɑ Cɑul geki wɑ̈dde yod gen kì wïj Kïti Gilboɑ̀." 
1Chronicles10:9 Kɑ wïj Cɑul ngul wɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ ɑ́dhedheg linye luny gen wɑ̈g thyew kì ree, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ öd-ɑ myërri gen ki wööni tyɑ̈mø, ge ngɑ̈j-ɑ jwöggi gen geki jii gen." 
1Chronicles10:10 Kɑ jɑmmi liny mø Cɑul cïb gen yij kengi jwøøg gen, kɑ wïje ngɑɑb gen dhø kengi Dɑgön, jwøøg gen." 
1Chronicles10:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Yɑbic kì Gilyɑd ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi Cɑul yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles10:12 ɑdhwödh yɑɑg-ɑ teg, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be dwɑɑyii geki wɑ̈dde, kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen Yɑbic. Akoony gen thɑ óthurø, kɑ ge othuumø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
1Chronicles10:13 Cɑul ɑ́thuw-ɑ bɑng kɑ̀ nuti mïdh en Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi en, kɑ døøg-ɑ be rɑng ki ɑ́jwöggì." 
1Chronicles10:14 Nuti pyëj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de ɑ́öd-ɑ yï ɑ́jwöggì. Kɑ nɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ lɑwe mëgge Debïd wɑ̈d Yesì." 
1Chronicles11:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn kedh-ɑ yï Debïd kì Kibrön, kɑ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Wø bɑ dëlí geki remí." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kɑ̈ge dööng cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëd Cɑul ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, bɑ yïn ɑ ɑ́pyejji Isrɑil kì yij liny, kɑ yï köbbi yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni jie ópyejj-ɑ yi yïn, yï óbëëdø yïn ɑ́ jɑngi gen.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Kɑ jɑggi Isrɑil kedh-ɑ yï Rɑ̈dh Debïd kì Kibrön. Areb gen kwøb kí Debïd, kɑ gø røny gen ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg Sɑmwel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Akedh Rɑ̈dh Debïd kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn, kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi kɑɑl Yerusɑlem. Yerusɑlem ɑ́bëëd e cwøl ɑ́ Yebus. O tyëng Yebus, ɑ bɑ tyëngpiny, ɑ́bëëd ge nudd ge obëëdø kì pinyɑni." 
1Chronicles11:5 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi tyëng Yebus kinni pɑ cuggi wɑ̈dhi kɑɑl dörɑni kinni tek; de döri Dhɑyøn ɑ́mɑg yi Debïd, kɑ døøg-ɑ be cwøllø ɑ́ “Kɑɑl Debïd”." 
1Chronicles11:6 Debïd ɑ́ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ ókwöngi ki nɑ̈ggø kì kelli tyëng Yebus, ógwøg ɑ́ pënyi liny!” Kɑ liny pej yi Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀, kɑ gwøg ɑ́ pënyi liny." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dörɑni ɑ́døøg be cwøllø ɑ́ Kɑɑl Debïd, kipe kɑ ɑ́pëggi Debïd be bëëdø kì yije." 
1Chronicles11:8 Kɑ kɑɑlɑni døøg ki gerø yi Debïd, cɑg kì ri tung-ɑ bɑ ɑthør kì ri kït, kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ bun-ɑ ɑ́döng tyëg ki gerø yi Yöɑb." 
1Chronicles11:9 Debïd ɑ́kedh e ótëngø mɑ́ e ɑ́køny yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles11:10 Møg bɑ nyingi jøliny Debïd yɑɑg-ɑ ti ki ngɑ̈nyø. Bɑ gen geki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ ɑ́gwøg Debïd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pödhø cïb gen piny kidøøj." 
1Chronicles11:11 Yɑcobeɑm kì gøl Acmön bɑ en ɑ mɑl, o en ɑ bɑ jɑngi pëjj-ɑ mɑl gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, møg-ɑ pëddi tegø. En ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kɑ gï nɑ̈ge ki ɑkebïdhe." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ryeew pëjj-ɑ mɑl gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, bɑ Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d Dödö kì gøl Ákö." 
1Chronicles11:13 En geki Debïd ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kì Pɑs Dɑmïm. O ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ yij pwödhi ceir keny-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi Isrɑil yi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀," 
1Chronicles11:14 codhe, ɑcunge geki jøge kì dïpwödhø, ɑnyïɑ̈ggi gen ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Kɑ wëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles11:15 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g kì kelli pëjji liny møg-ɑ mɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ́kedhi keny-ɑ di nyɑ kït kun-ɑ bëëd yi Debïd kì buti órøngi kït kì Adulɑm, e jøliny tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ nudd ge ying-ɑ Töör Repɑim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Betleem ɑ́mɑg yi liny Pelistiyɑ̀ kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Debïd ying-ɑ be ywömi ree wïj nyɑ kït. 
1Chronicles11:17 Kɑ Debïd mɑg yi rummi døøg pɑc, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ mɑ̈dhø ki pïi yith men-ɑ ying dhø döri Betleem, dɑ́ men ɑ ómuuj yɑn!”" 
1Chronicles11:18 Codhe, ɑbëën jøg teg ɑ́dɑ̈g wɑ̈g, kɑ ge cør-ɑ kɑɑl liny Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ ge mïdd-ɑ wɑ̈g ki pï kì yij yith, kɑ pïgɑni muuj gen Debïd. De gï nuti mɑɑdh en, gï ɑ́kunye Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gëëdhi." 
1Chronicles11:19 Akööbe kinni, “Pïg pɑ mɑdh yi yɑn kinni tek, mɑ́ mɑdhi pïgɑni nɑ mɑdhi remmi jøg-ɑ ɑ́muuj wëyi gen!” Codhe, ɑbɑ̈nye ki mɑdhi pïgɑni. Møgɑni nyodh-ɑ tegi jøliny ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ti ki ngɑ̈nyø." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abicɑy ómï Yöɑb ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi jøliny møg-ɑ mɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Ányïɑ̈ggi e kete ki ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ gï cööbe ki ɑkebïdhe, kɑ gï nɑ̈ge bënn." 
1Chronicles11:21 Ngɑ̈nyi kì bɑng tege kì kelli jøliny pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ mɑl, kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ jɑngi gen, de pɑ ti ki ngɑ̈nyø kibøli ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ mɑl." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ kì Kɑbdhiil ɑ́bëëd e ngɑ̈nyi ki tegø, ɑ́göög ki jɑmmì mø teeg, jöddi liny ɑ́ryew kì kelli liny tyëng Moɑb ɑ́nɑ̈g yi en. Kɑ kedh-ɑ ød ngur cyɑ̈ng megø kì yij ɑ́piy, ɑnɑ̈ge ngur." 
1Chronicles11:23 Kɑ jɑl Rïp me bɑ̈ɑ̈r cɑrø, bɑ̈re pöödh-ɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew, o ngëde dwøng gø nɑ̈ge, o yïe ɑ́dɑ ɑkebïdh me dwøng eni jɑl Rïp menɑni. Köme ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi Benɑiyɑ̀ ki lodhe kɑ ɑkebïdhe gwɑre, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge ki ɑkebïnhɑni." 
1Chronicles11:24 Benɑiyɑ̀ bɑ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøliny pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Møgɑk bënn bɑ gïg teg møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en. 
1Chronicles11:25 Ákwɑny yi Debïd ɑ́ jɑngi jøg-ɑ korii. Ábëëd nyinge ying-ɑ mɑl kì kelli jøliny møg-ɑ mɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, de pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ mɑl." 
1Chronicles12:1 Debïd ɑ́bëëd ɑ Dhiglɑg keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈re yïnø kɑ ɑ́dwɑddii nɑ̈gø yi Cɑul wɑ̈d Kïc, dɑ jøliny mø ngɑ̈nyi yëthi liny, o ge pɑ nyi døøg cyɑ̈n mɑ ɑ́rëbi ki en." 
1Chronicles12:2 Jøgɑni bɑ yɑɑg gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ɑ ying gøl yɑɑ Cɑul. Ge pɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈jø ki tøngg wɑlɑ̀ ki wethh, wɑlɑ̀ ki bɑ̈ddì, o ge bɑ nywɑnyy bënn." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge pyejj-ɑ yi wɑ̈ddi Cemɑ̀ kì Gibeɑ̀, ɑ løg Akiedher geki Yöɑc. Jøliny møgɑni ek: Yedhiel kí Pelet, wɑ̈ddi Adhmɑbeth Berɑkɑ̀ kí Yeeu kì Anɑthöth. Icmɑiyɑ̀ kì Gibeon. Bɑ jɑl-liny mɑ ɑ́bëëd e ngɑ̈nyi, o ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑ́kyel kì kelli pëjji liny møg-ɑ mɑl gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Jermɑyɑ̀, kí Yɑɑdhiel, kí Yöɑnɑn, kí Yödhɑbɑd kì Gederɑ̀. Eludhɑy, kí Yerimöth, kí Beɑliyɑ̀, kí Cemɑriyɑ̀, kí Cepɑtiyɑ̀ jɑl Arïp. Elkɑnɑ̀, kí Iciyɑ̀, kí Adhɑrel, kí Yöedher, kí Yɑcobeɑm, kì gøl Körɑ̀. Kí wɑ̈ddi Yeroɑm kì Gedör, ɑ løg Yöilɑ̀ kí Dhebɑdiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles12:4  
1Chronicles12:5  
1Chronicles12:6  
1Chronicles12:7  
1Chronicles12:8 Møg bɑ nyingi jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi yëthi liny kì gøl Gɑd, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi kömi yɑɑy Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì yij ønteg kì yij pɑ̈l. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge ngɑ̈ny nyɑɑg ki ködd kí tøngg, ge teg ni ngurrì kɑ̀ nënni gen, o ge yöd ni ɑ́køøny wïj kït, kɑ̀ rïngi gen." 
1Chronicles12:9 Ge ómyeerø, o ge ópyëlø ni men: Edher, Obɑdiyɑ̀, Eliɑb, Micmɑnɑ̀, Jermɑyɑ̀, Atɑy, Eliel, Yöɑnɑn, Eldhɑbɑd, Jermɑyɑ̀, kí Mɑkbɑnɑy." 
1Chronicles12:10  
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14 Kwï jø gøl Gɑd møgɑni ɑ́pyejj-ɑ ji ɑ́lïp, møøgø ɑ́pyejj-ɑ miyø." 
1Chronicles12:15 Kì dwɑ̈y Abib, e Nɑm Urdun pɑ̈ngø kɑ obeedhø, nɑmɑni ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì yij tör kedhhi gen kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kí wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
1Chronicles12:16 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel Debïd yïe ɑ́bëën kì ønteg keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde, yi jøg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l gøl Ben Yɑmïn kí gøl Yeudɑ̀." 
1Chronicles12:17 Kɑ Debïd bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ød, be yïddø ki jøgɑni, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Keløg wu bï kɑ mër, wu dwɑdd-ɑ kønyi yɑn, døøj! De keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ twɑ̈nyi yɑn tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, e bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́göggɑ wun, møgɑni óbëëd ge ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøøg kweyyee, o wu cɑye’ cɑyø.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Codhe, kɑ Amɑsɑy, ɑ ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ jɑngi jøliny møg-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, köme bëën yi wëyi Jwøk, ɑkööbe kinni, “Debïd wɑ̈d Yesì, wø bɑ jií! Yï óbëëdø ki mër, wuki ji-ɑ køny yïn! Yï bɑ ɑkøny yi Jwøk.” Kɑ jøgɑni cwøl yi Debïd, kɑ gï gwøge gɑ pëjji linye." 
1Chronicles12:19 Kwï jøliny kì gøl Mɑnɑsè møg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi kömi Debïd keny-ɑ ɑ́rëbe ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki Cɑul. De Debïd ɑ́bɑny yi rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ köbbi kinni døøge pɑc, mɑ́ rɑ̈nhi Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø kinni Debïd ódøøg kömi Rɑ̈dh Cɑul, ɑdøøg Debïd Dhiglɑg." 
1Chronicles12:20 Møg bɑ jøliny kì gøl Mɑnɑsè møg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi kömi Debïd, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe Dhiglɑg: Adnɑɑ̀, Yödhɑbɑd, Yediyɑil, Mikɑil, Yödhɑbɑd, Elïu, kí Dhilethɑy. Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ pëjji ɑ́lïp kì gøl Mɑnɑsè." 
1Chronicles12:21 Debïd ɑ́køny yi gen ki nyɑɑg ki tyëng-ɑ nyi röödhø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ pëjji liny mø teg." 
1Chronicles12:22 Jøliny Debïd ɑ́kedh ge óngënyø, mɑ́ e dɑ ji møg nyi bï kömi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng. Kɑ yɑyɑni ódøngø ki mendwøng." 
1Chronicles12:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying Debïd Kibrön, jøliny mø gïïr ɑ́kedhi köme be kønyii, o bëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì kej Cɑul, ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kwɑnni gen ek:" 
1Chronicles12:24 Gøl Yeudɑ̀. 6,800, jøg mø ngɑ̈ny liny ködd kí tøngg. Gøl Cimeøn. 7,100 jøg mø dïdø ki liny. Gøl Leebì. 4,600 jøliny. Jøbɑng Yöyɑdɑ̀, ɑ løg kwɑrri Aɑron, ge bɑ 3,700 Jøg-ɑ teg møg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki Dhɑdök, bɑ 22. Gøl Ben Yɑmïn, ɑ bɑ gøl yɑɑ Cɑul bɑ 3,000, ji mø ngenyø kì kelli gen ɑ́cög yethi gen bong ɑ́dud ki gøl Cɑul. Gøl Eprɑim bɑ 20,800, o ge bɑ jøg mø ngɑ̈ny liny kì wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen. Kì gøl Mɑnɑsè men-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, yije ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki jøliny 18,000 gɑ møg kedhi be gwøgi Debïd ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh. Gøl Isɑkɑr bɑ 200, ge bɑ pëjji liny ge bënn, kí jøg-ɑ pyejji yi gen, pëjjɑni ngɑ̈ny wøw ki gïn-ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi tyëng Isrɑil kì bøli keny-ɑ døj ki gwøgii. Gøl Dhebulun bɑ 50,000, jøg mø yethi gen bong ɑ́dud, o ge ngɑ̈nyi yëthi liny. Gøl Nɑptɑlì bɑ 1,000 pëjji liny, kí 37,000 jøliny ködd kí tøngg. Gøl Dɑn bɑ 28,600, jøliny mø rumø ki pwönyø. Gøl Aceer bɑ 40,000, jøg mø cuggi nyɑɑg ki liny. Tyëng løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, bɑ gøl Ruben kí Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè, jöddi liny kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew (120,000)." 
1Chronicles12:25 Jøliny møgɑni bënn ɑ́kedhi Kibrön be gwøgi Debïd ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bëne. Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ møgɑni ceth. 
1Chronicles12:26 Ge ɑ́bëëd ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kì buti Debïd, ge cɑm-ɑ gïgcɑmm kí gïg mɑdh møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi tyëng Isrɑil kipe gen." 
1Chronicles12:27 Gøl Isɑkɑr, kí Dhebulun, kí Nɑptɑlì møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑɑng wuudø kun lɑ̈wi, ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki gïgcɑmm, kí møng-ɑ búr, kí nywøli ólɑm møg thij, kí møg thwøwø, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun. Gï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen ɑ kömi ɑderr, kí ɑmɑl, kí ógɑll, kí wɑ̈dhh. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni thyew ki dhög kí dyëg. O ge nɑ̈g gɑ møg cɑm. Møg bënn nyodh-ɑ medi pëëth kì yij pödhø bëne." 
1Chronicles13:1 Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́kööb ki pëjji liny bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg jøliny ɑ́lïp, kí pëjji miy." 
1Chronicles13:2 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn köbbe kinni, “Keløg wu oyïëyø, o bɑ gïn dwɑddi yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ödi wɑ yï wɑddee geki ókwër kí Kwɑrri Leebì kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ bëëd yi gen ki wöödø kinni bï gen, o wɑ cugi wɑ kì keny." 
1Chronicles13:3 Codhe, o wɑ kedhi wɑ be yɑɑbi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk, ɑ ɑ́bëëd e ówøyø kɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Cɑul.”" 
1Chronicles13:4 Kɑ ji pëthi gen ómïnø yi møgɑni, ɑyïëy gen." 
1Chronicles13:5 Acøng tyëng Isrɑil bënn yi Debïd, cɑg kì keew Rïp kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, gïti Amɑth kì wɑɑng wuudø kipe kɑ̈ɑ̈li Sɑnduug Cigg kì Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles13:6 Codhe, kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ Bɑɑlɑ̀ geki teedø bëne, o Bɑɑlɑ̀ bene Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, kì Yeudiyɑ̀, ge kedh-ɑ be dwɑɑyi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk, ɑ cungi ɑ́ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kwömø kì kɑɑm kerobb." 
1Chronicles13:7 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l gen Sɑnduug Cigg wɑ̈g kì gøl Abinɑdɑb, kɑ gø cïb gen yij yɑ̈y me nyɑ̈n. Kɑ yɑ̈yɑni køøl yi Udhɑ̀ geki Akiyö." 
1Chronicles13:8 Debïd ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ yëggø geki teedø ge lenh-ɑ Jwøk, ge owörø ki thøm kí kɑ̈ngì." 
1Chronicles13:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen rɑri pwödhi Kïdön, kɑ wɑ̈dhh ocyerø, Kɑ Udhɑ̀ cinge rïïje, kɑ Sɑnduug Cigg mɑge." 
1Chronicles13:10 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe órënyø, ɑnɑ̈ge Udhɑ̀ kipe kɑ ɑ́nywɑle Sɑnduug Cigg. Áthøw kì kenyɑni kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
1Chronicles13:11 ɑcɑɑg kenyɑni ɑ́ Peredh Udhɑ̀, nyingɑni wɑng-ɑ “Cɑ́yi Udhɑ̀.” Kwøbbi nɑ̈gi Udhɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e ledh kì yï Debïd." 
1Chronicles13:12 Codhe, ɑbwøg Debïd yi Jwøk, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Sɑnduug Cigg ókɑ̈l yi yɑn kidï ɑnɑn?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Acöge e nuti kïdhi Yerusɑlem yi Debïd. De ɑ́yöd gø cïbe’ gøl jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Obed Edöm, jɑl Gɑth." 
1Chronicles13:14 Kɑ obëëdø kì gølɑni ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑgyëëdh gøl Obed Edöm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kí jɑmme bënn." 
1Chronicles14:1 Kirɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Suur ɑ́ödi yï Debïd ki jøngyew, kɑ ödi yi en ki yenh sɑndɑl, kí bödhhi tweg ki kïddi geki bödhhi pɑ̈mmì, møg gëddi Debïd ki ød." 
1Chronicles14:2 Kɑ yod yi Debïd kinni ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ lɑ̈ge gwøge e dwøng kipe jie." 
1Chronicles14:3 Kɑ Debïd ónyömø ki mɑ̈nn mø gïïr kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ nyöddi yi mɑ̈nnɑni ki wɑ̈dd geki womɑ̈nn mø gïïr." 
1Chronicles14:4 Møg bɑ nywøl møg-ɑ ɑ́nyöddii keny-ɑ ɑ́yinge Yerusɑlem: Cɑmuɑ̀, Cöbɑb, Nɑthɑn, Sølømøn," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibɑɑr, Elicuɑ̀, kí Elpelet," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nögɑ̀, Nepeg, Yɑpiyɑ̀" 
1Chronicles14:7 Elicɑmɑ̀, Beelyɑdɑ̀, kí Elipelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kinni Debïd ógwøgø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bëne, ɑkedhi jøliny be mɑgii. Kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ be tuumø ki gen." 
1Chronicles14:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ Töör Repɑim, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki yɑg." 
1Chronicles14:10 Apyëëj Jwøk yi Debïd kinni, “Pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kömi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀? Ge ówëggí tyɑmø yi yɑn?” Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ngee, pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen! Ge ówëggɑ tyɑmø yi yïn!”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Codhe, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r Debïd kömi gen kì Bɑɑl Perɑdhïm, ɑtyɑme gïn. Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́wëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøk kɑ yɑ mödd-ɑ kelli tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ni bɑɑyø.” Acwølli kenyɑni ɑ́ Bɑɑl Perɑdhïm." 
1Chronicles14:12 De keny-ɑ ɑ́rengi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, ngïjji jwöggi gen ɑ́wiy gen piny, ɑkööb Debïd kinni i rɑ̈ɑ̈b ngïjji jwöggɑni." 
1Chronicles14:13 Acigi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ dwöög yij törɑni be yɑg. 
1Chronicles14:14 Apyëëj Jwøk yi Debïd, kɑ Jwøk ólöggø kinni, “Wu ko pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen wu ying-ɑ tuung, de kɑ̈l wun ngɑ̈thi gen, kɑ wu pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi gen wu kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø, wu rwööm ki yenh bɑlsɑm." 
1Chronicles14:15 Keny-ɑ ólïng ki ywøøg tyel kì mɑl wɑ̈thi yenh, kɑ wu pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi gen, mɑ́ yɑ ómøøl mɑl bøli wun, be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, o ge tyɑm.”" 
1Chronicles14:16 Kɑ Debïd møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøk gwøge, ɑcyedde tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, cɑg kì Gibeon gïti Gedher." 
1Chronicles14:17 Atɑɑy nyingi Debïd kömi piny bëne, kɑ pödhh bënn göjji böggi Debïd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles15:1 Debïd ree ɑ́gëdde ki ød kì Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́mɑge kì yï tyëng Yebus, ɑ løg tyëngpinyɑni, ɑtyenye kej Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk thyew, kɑ gudd-ɑ piny ki kemɑ̀." 
1Chronicles15:2 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Sɑnduug Cigg óbyell-ɑ yi Kwɑrri Leebì keti gen, mɑ́ gen ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o gø nyi byelli gen, o keje nyi tyeny yi gen, gïti ɑtheer.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Kɑ Debïd tyëng Isrɑil bënn cwøøle Yerusɑlem, o Sɑnduug Cigg kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen keny-ɑ ɑ́rum keje ki tyenyø yi en, kipere." 
1Chronicles15:4 Codhe, ɑöde yï Kwɑrri Aɑron geki Kwɑrri Leebì." 
1Chronicles15:5 Ji miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew ɑ ɑ́bï kì gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Uriel." 
1Chronicles15:6 Ji miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew ɑ ɑ́bï kì gøl Merɑrì, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Asɑiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles15:7 Ji miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ ɑ́bï kì gøl Gercön, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Yöiil." 
1Chronicles15:8 Gøl Elidhɑpɑn ɑ́bï gɑ miy ɑ́ryew, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Cemɑiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles15:9 Gøl Kibrön ɑ́bï gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Eliel." 
1Chronicles15:10 Gøl Udhiel ɑ́bï gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Aminɑdɑb." 
1Chronicles15:11 Kɑ ókwër ryeet, Dhɑdök kí Abiyɑthɑr cwøl yi Debïd, geki Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́bïkyel, ɑ løg Uriel, Asɑiyɑ̀, Yöiil, Cemɑiyɑ̀, Eliel kí Aminɑdɑb." 
1Chronicles15:12 Aköbbe pëjji Kwɑrri Leebì kinni, “Wun ɑ bɑ jɑggi gøl Leebì. Kwëru ri wun, wuki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø, o Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun, o cïb keny-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi yɑn kipere." 
1Chronicles15:13 Wɑ ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ per kɑ ɑ́bëëd e pɑth ki wun ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lii, o nuti kwërø kidøøj.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Codhe, kɑ ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì ri gen kwër gen kipe kɑ̈ɑ̈li Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles15:15 Kɑ byëël yi Kwɑrri Leebì ki lødh, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles15:16 Kɑ jɑggi gøl Leebì köbbi yi Debïd kinni kɑ̈bbi gen ki Kwɑrri Leebì møg wör ki thøm, ki medi pëëth." 
1Chronicles15:17 Kì kelli tyëng gøl Merɑrì, ge ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ Ëmɑn wɑ̈d Yöiil, kí Asɑp wɑ̈d Berekiyɑ̀, kí Ethɑn wɑ̈d Kucɑiyɑ̀. O kì kelli jøg-ɑ thom thøm-ɑ cwɑggi gen ying mɑl, ge ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ Dhekɑriyɑ̀, Yɑɑdhiel, Cemirɑmöth, Yekiel, Unì, Eliɑb, Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ kí Benɑiyɑ̀. O kì kelli jøg-ɑ thom thøm-ɑ cwɑggi gen ying piny, ge ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ Mɑtithiyɑ̀, Elipeleu, Mikneiyɑ̀, Adhɑdhiyɑ̀. O kì kelli jøg-ɑ nyi kor Kengø, ge ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ Obed Edöm kí Yeiel." 
1Chronicles15:18  
1Chronicles15:19  
1Chronicles15:20  
1Chronicles15:21  
1Chronicles15:22 Kɑ Kenɑniyɑ̀ kwɑny ɑ́ jɑngi jø gøl Leebì møg-ɑ bɑ bödhhi thøm, mɑ́ en ɑ luudø kì kelli gen." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiyɑ̀, kí Elkɑnɑ̀, kí Obed Edöm, kí Yekiyɑ̀, bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́kwɑny o ge kor gen Sɑnduug Cigg. Cebɑniyɑ̀, Yöcɑpɑt, Nethɑnel, Amɑsɑy, Dhekɑriyɑ̀, Benɑiyɑ̀, kí Eliedher, bene gen ókwërr-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny o ge nyi kodh gen kɑ̈ngì kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg." 
1Chronicles15:24  
1Chronicles15:25 Adhwödh Rɑ̈dh Debïd geki jɑggi Isrɑil, kí pëjji liny, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ gøl Obed Edöm be kɑ̈ɑ̈li Sɑnduug Cigg, kɑ ge otugø ki mendwøng." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kɑ ge ongɑ̈dø ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́bïryew kí órömm ɑ́bïryew gɑ gëdhhì, kipe kinni o Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Cigg ókøny yi Jwøk." 
1Chronicles15:27 Debïd ɑ́bëëd e rug-ɑ ógødh men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm geki bödhhi thøm, kí Kenɑniyɑ̀ jɑngi gen, geki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ byelli Sɑnduug Cigg. Debïd ɑ́bëëd e orugø thyew ki pɑri kwër men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm." 
1Chronicles15:28 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Yerusɑlem yi tyëng Isrɑil, ge óryeerø ki medi pëthi gen, kɑ̈ngì okodhø, bullì opwödø, o thøm othomø." 
1Chronicles15:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Sɑnduug Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, kɑ Mikɑl nyɑɑr Cɑul ómëddø kì ɑwɑj, ɑlidhe Rɑ̈dh Debïd, e óyëggø pyëwe omedø, kɑ gø byenye ki pyëwe." 
1Chronicles16:1 Akïdhi gen Sɑnduug Cigg yij kem-ɑ ɑ́gurrii yi Debïd. Codhe ɑgeedh Jwøk ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b geki gëdhhi mër. 
1Chronicles16:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Debïd ki muuji gëdhhì, ɑkwënge ji ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles16:3 Anënge teen-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni; cwøw kí mɑ̈nn; ngɑn mëgg-ɑ ópun kí nyɑ ɑ́tungi rïngø ɑ́kyel, kí ópùni benø." 
1Chronicles16:4 Akɑ̈bbi Debïd ki kwï Kwɑrri Leebì møg nyi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg ki wör, o gø nyi lejji gen." 
1Chronicles16:5 Akwɑɑny Asɑp ɑ́ jɑgø, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́ ókwøme. O Yeiel, kí Cemirɑmöth, kí Yekiel, kí Mɑtithiyɑ̀, kí Eliɑb, kí Benɑiyɑ̀, kí Obed Edöm, kí Yeiel gen ɑ thom thøm, O kɑng-ɑ kwɑ̈ɑ̈n nyi kodh-ɑ yi Asɑp." 
1Chronicles16:6 O kɑ̈ngì nyi kodh-ɑ yi ókwër ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Benɑiyɑ̀ geki Yɑɑdhiel kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg." 
1Chronicles16:7 Cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny Asɑp geki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø, o ge nyi lenhi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles16:8 Pøjju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ dönge lejji wun köbbu pödhh bënn ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøgge." 
1Chronicles16:9 Wör wun wu lejj-ɑ en kwøbu gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøgge. 
1Chronicles16:10 Med pëthi wun mɑ́ wɑ bɑ møge wiy pëthi tyëng-ɑ mɑllii mïni gen. 
1Chronicles16:11 Kedhu yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j o wu kønye, kɑ nyi mɑlli wun ceth." 
1Chronicles16:12 Wu kwɑrri Yɑgob bɑ̈ng Jwøk, wu kwɑrri Isrɑil, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøk, pɑru gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi Jwøk, geki cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuje." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ Jwøgee, Cigge bɑ kipe kömi piny bëne." 
1Chronicles16:15 Wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl ki lwömi Jwøk, eni lwöm-ɑ ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ men gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles16:16 Lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøbe geki Abrɑhɑm, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́könge Isɑɑk." 
1Chronicles16:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lwööb geki Yɑgob, ge ɑ́lwööb ki Isrɑil ki lwöm-ɑ gïti ɑtheer," 
1Chronicles16:18 Gø ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yï ómëggɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn, pinyɑni óbëëd ɑ́ mií.”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Kwɑnni jii Jwøk ɑ́bëëd ge nøg, ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ tyëngpɑth kì piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
1Chronicles16:20 Ge ɑ́wïïn kì yethi pödhh, ge nyii dhwödhø kì pönhï kí pönhï." 
1Chronicles16:21 De yïn ɑ Jwøk, nyingi gen ko wëggí guudø; kɑ rɑ̈nhì nyi ceg kinni kor ge gïn:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ gɑ bɑ̈nggɑ ko göggi wun ki gïgrijjø, tyëngtöng møgɑ ko nywɑl wun.”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Lejjí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör, yïn ɑ kömi piny bëne! Kømmu kwøbbi yïëne yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
1Chronicles16:24 Köbbu pödhh kwøbbi dhwɑ̈nge, kí gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gögge jie!" 
1Chronicles16:25 Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwøng, o ceg kɑ lenhø, o ceg kɑ wørø kibøli jwögg bënn." 
1Chronicles16:26 Jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn bɑ ngïjji yøw, dɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́gwøg mɑl." 
1Chronicles16:27 Dhwɑ̈ng geki döng ying-ɑ bɑdhhe, Kenge pɑ̈ngø yi tegø geki medi pyëw." 
1Chronicles16:28 Lejju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ tyëng kömi piny bënn, lejju dönge geki tege." 
1Chronicles16:29 Lejju dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ̈ni wun ki gëdhhì, kɑ wu bïu bøle. Dwöög wun köthi wun piny, kì bøli Ákyel-ɑ bɑ Kwërø keny-ɑ ócwöbe." 
1Chronicles16:30 Kömi piny bëne, okïïrø kì bøle! Piny ɑ́cïbe keje e pɑ nhɑ̈nhø, o pɑ cuggi ki nyigø." 
1Chronicles16:31 Mïni pëthi wun, wun ɑ mɑl kí piny! Köbbu pödhh bënn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ rɑ̈dh.”" 
1Chronicles16:32 Wiy nɑɑm omelø ngɑ̈rre geki lɑ̈yy-ɑ yije bënn, mïni pyëw thïm geki gïg-ɑ yije bënn!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Codhe o yenh kïïw gen kì yij thïm ki medi pëthi gen, keny-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be jɑɑgi kömi piny." 
1Chronicles16:34 Pwøj wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e døøj, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee gït-ɑ ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles16:35 Köbbu en kinni, “Yiel wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøk yïëni wøn, cøng wøn kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ wø yieel kì cinggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o yï pwøj yi wøn, o nyingí kwërø lejji.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Lejju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil! Lejju en ɑnɑn gïti ɑtheer! Kɑ ji bënn okööbø kinni, “Amen” kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lenhi gen." 
1Chronicles16:37 Acïb Asɑp geki wɑdde Kwɑrri Leebì yi Debïd gɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi lɑ̈mø kì bøli Sɑnduug Lwömi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì keny-ɑ ɑ́mïdhii. O gwøøg gen nyi gwøg yi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng. 
1Chronicles16:38 Ge nyi køny-ɑ yi Obed Edöm wɑ̈d Yeduthun geki jø gøl gen mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Ösɑ̀ geki Obed Edöm ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg tyëng-ɑ kor dhøggi döri kɑɑl. 
1Chronicles16:39 Dhɑdök geki wɑdde ókwër ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kej mɑ̈ddø kì Gibeon. 
1Chronicles16:40 Kì yethi cyɑ̈ng kì mwøl kí böörø, ɑ nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhì bënn kì wïj këli lɑm ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi tyëng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles16:41 Ëmɑn geki Yeduthun ɑ́bëëd ge nud geki ji-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny o ge nyi lejji gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör, kipe mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee men-ɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles16:42 Thyew Ëmɑn geki Yeduthun ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg thømi wörri lejji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Tyëng gøl yɑɑ Yeduthun ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg tyëng-ɑ korri dhøggi döri kɑɑl. 
1Chronicles16:43 Codhe, kɑ ji bënn kedh-ɑ pɑc, kɑ Debïd kedh-ɑ be kwëngi gøle." 
1Chronicles17:1 Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ gøle, ɑöde yï jɑltöng Nɑthɑn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yɑ bëëd ɑ ød mɑ ɑger ki sɑndɑl, yɑnh-ɑ myëër kì keny, de Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mïdh ɑ yij kemɑ̀!”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Alöggi Nɑthɑn kinni, “Gwøg gïn-ɑ rømmi yi yïn, mɑ́ yï ókøny yi Jwøk.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 De Nɑthɑn ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk kì wɑ̈rɑni kinni," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Kedh kɑ kwøbbɑ köbbí Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ kinni, ‘Pɑth ki en ɑ ger Kengø men-ɑ yije bëëdɑ." 
1Chronicles17:5 Yɑ nuti bëëdø kì yij Kengø kinni tek, kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp gïti ɑnɑn. Yɑ nyi bëëd ɑ yethi kemmì, kɑ yɑ nyi cyɑ̈g-ɑ keny kí keny." 
1Chronicles17:6 Kì yij wɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑdhɑ bëne kí tyëng Isrɑil, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyɑ pyëjø, kì kelli jɑgg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn kinni, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ pɑ gëddí yɑn ki Kengø men-ɑ ógerø ki sɑndɑl yɑnh-ɑ myëër.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “De köbbí bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd kinni, ‘Yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong gïn dhɑl yɑn kinni tek. Yï ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn, yï kwɑy-ɑ dyëg kì pɑ̈l, kɑ yï kwɑnyɑ yïn ɑ́ jɑngi tyëng Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles17:8 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nud kì butí, kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kedhí, kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn tyɑmɑ. Nyingí ɑ́tïngɑ mɑl ni nyingi tyëng-ɑ per gen teg, kí jɑgg-ɑ døngø kì kömi piny." 
1Chronicles17:9 Yɑ ɑ́mëggi ki keny cïbɑ jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil, kí keny-ɑ óbëëd gen nyingi gen pɑ guud këti. Kömi gen ɑ́bëëd e nyi ceg kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi tyëngrijjø kër-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen piny men, de gïn ni menɑni koo cwöb këti, yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ótyɑm yi yɑn, kɑ wu nëngɑ ki kwɑrr." 
1Chronicles17:10  
1Chronicles17:11 Keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈nggí kɑ yï kedh-ɑ kun-ɑ di kweyyí, dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈ddí ógwøgɑ ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, o pödhø ómïdhi yi en e teeg." 
1Chronicles17:12 Bene en ɑ ógëddi yɑn ki Kengø, o rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mee ómïdhi yi yɑn gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles17:13 Yɑ óbëëd yɑn ɑ́ wïye, o óbëëd ɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ, pɑ wiy yi yɑn ki kønyø ni kɑ ɑ́wiyɑ Cɑul, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi yɑn kɑ yï cïbɑ keje." 
1Chronicles17:14 Ócïb yi yɑn ɑ́ jɑngi jiɑ geki pödhɑ gïti ɑtheer, rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mee óbong cöge gïti ɑtheer.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Kɑ Debïd köbbi yi Nɑthɑn ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøk bënn. 
1Chronicles17:16 Codhe, ɑkedhi Rɑ̈dh Debïd yij Kemi Wë, ɑpëgge piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ́ men Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? O gøl wøn ɑ́ ngø, ɑ göggí yɑn ki gïndøj ni men?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Anɑn yï nudd yï ogöögø ki mø gïïr, yï ɑ́kööb kipe kwɑrrɑ kì yethi runn møøgø møg-ɑ óbï, o yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi yïn ni dhɑnhø me dwøng." 
1Chronicles17:18 Á ngø këti ɑ cuggi köbbi yïn yi yɑn! Yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kidøøj, de yɑ ɑ́theg yi yïn ceth yɑn ɑ bɑ̈ngí." 
1Chronicles17:19 Bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi yïn ɑ ɑ́göggí yɑn, kɑ yɑ nyudhí møg-ɑ ócwöb kipe gølɑ dhuki megø." 
1Chronicles17:20 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong ngɑn ni yïn, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk." 
1Chronicles17:21 Bong pödhø me ni Isrɑil kì kömi piny, mɑ́ ge ɑ́yiel yi yïn kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kì Rïp, kɑ ge gwøg yi yïn gɑ jií. Kɑ nyingí tɑɑy-ɑ kömi piny bëne, kiper gïgdøngø kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggí gen." 
1Chronicles17:22 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́gwøg yi yïn gɑ jií gïti ɑtheer, o yïn, yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑ Jwøøg gen." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Anɑn yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí yɑn bënn kinni, ge ógöggí yɑn wøki kwɑrrɑ, kɑ wiy møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen." 
1Chronicles17:24 Perí ólïngi, kɑ ji nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Áyïmø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene Jwøøg Isrɑil.’ O lɑ̈gi gøl bɑ̈ngí Debïd ómïdhi yi yïn gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles17:25 Pyëwɑ ɑ́ceg yi yɑn kɑ cwedø, ɑkwɑjjɑ møg kì bølí, yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́yɑ̈llí møgɑni bënn, yɑn ɑ bɑ̈ngí. Kɑ yɑ köbbí kinni kwɑrrɑ óbëëd gɑ rɑ̈nhì." 
1Chronicles17:26 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ Jwøk kidyër, mɑ́ gïgdøj møgɑni ɑ́köbbí yɑn." 
1Chronicles17:27 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, gyëdh gølɑ, o ócöge e døj ceth. Ge ɑ́gyëdh yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o gyëdhhí møgɑni óbëëdø kì kömi gen ceth gïti ɑtheer.”" 
1Chronicles18:1 Kì bɑng keny me nøg, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kɑ gï tyɑme. Akwɑnye Gɑth geki myërr-ɑ bute kì cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles18:2 Thyew, kɑ tyëng Moɑb tyɑme, kɑ gï jɑɑge, kɑ nyi cudi yi gen ki gwɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles18:3 Kɑ Debïd pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Rɑ̈dh Adɑdedher rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dhöbɑ̀ kì buti Amɑth, mɑ́ Adɑdedher ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgi myërri kwøøm-ɑ kömi Nɑm Porɑt." 
1Chronicles18:4 Kɑ Debïd ómɑ̈gø ki yɑ̈thi liny gɑ ɑ́lïp, kí jøkyënyì gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew, kí jøliny tyel ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Akɑ̈bbe ki kyënyì møg pyëjji ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th miyø, kɑ rɑ̈rri tyelli kyëny-ɑ ɑ́döng bënn kebbe." 
1Chronicles18:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́öni tyëng Arɑm kì Dimɑceg ki jøliny mø køny Rɑ̈dh Adɑdedher, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r Debïd kömi linyɑni, kɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew nɑ̈ge," 
1Chronicles18:6 Codhe, ɑgud Debïd ki kɑɑl kì yij piny gen, kɑ gï jɑɑge kɑ cudi ki gwɑ̈j yi gen. Debïd ɑ́wëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge bënn." 
1Chronicles18:7 Kɑ köddi dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli yi jøliny Adɑdedher mɑg yi Debïd, kɑ gï kïdhe Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Thyew ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki ngyënyø dilɑl me gïïr cɑrø kì Tibɑ̈ɑ̈th kí Kun, gen ɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg yi Adɑdedher. (Dilɑlɑni ɑ ɑ́göög yi Sølømøn ki luy dilɑl, kí löjj, kí jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gwøg ki dilɑl gɑ mø Kengø.)" 
1Chronicles18:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Töì rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amɑth kinni liny Adɑdedher bëne ótyɑmø yi Debïd," 
1Chronicles18:10 ɑöre wɑ̈de Yörɑm be mɑ̈dhi Rɑ̈dh Debïd, o gø pwøje kipe kɑ ɑ́tyɑme Adɑdedher. Adɑdedher ɑ́bëëd ge nyi ceg-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggø ki Töì tyel mø gïïr. Kɑ Debïd muuj yi Töì ki gïg møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki ɑ́tegø, kí dilɑl, kí dhɑb gɑ møg pwøje Debïd." 
1Chronicles18:11 Kɑ jɑmmɑni thyey yi Debïd gɑ mø kwër, geki ngyëny ɑ́tegg, kí dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le kì pödhh-ɑ ɑ́mɑge, ɑ løg Edöm, kí Moɑb, kí Amön, kí Pelistiyɑ̀, kí Amɑlek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Tyëng Edöm gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Abicɑy wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀ kì Töör Omelø. 
1Chronicles18:13 Agudde yij piny Edöm, kɑ tyëng-ɑ pönhɑni ogöögø ki bɑ̈nggi Rɑ̈dh Debïd. Kɑ Debïd nyi wëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi kedhe bënn." 
1Chronicles18:14 Codhe, kɑ Isrɑil bëne jɑɑg yi Debïd, jie ɑ́jɑɑge kidøøj." 
1Chronicles18:15 Yöɑb ómï Abicɑy ɑ bɑ pënyi liny, Yöcɑpɑt wɑ̈d Akilud ɑ bɑ 'mïdhi wɑ̈j," 
1Chronicles18:16 Dhɑdök wɑ̈d Akitub geki Akimelek wɑ̈d Abiyɑthɑr ɑ bɑ ókwër, Serɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ sikriter." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑdɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg jøg-ɑ kor Debïd, o wɑ̈ddi Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́mïdh-ɑ lɑ̈ww-ɑ døngø kì yij pödhø." 
1Chronicles19:1 Kì bɑng keny megø piny kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun, ɑthøw Nɑkɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön, ɑrøøny Anun wɑ̈de ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
1Chronicles19:2 Akööb Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni, “Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ göggi Anun ki gïndøj ni kɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi wïye Nɑkɑc ki gïndøj.” Codhe, kɑ Debïd oödø ki tyëngwöödø møg kedhi be këëmii ki thøwi wïye. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Debïd wɑ̈dh-ɑ yï Rɑ̈dh Anun kì pödhi Amön," 
1Chronicles19:3 Aköbbi rɑ̈dh yi jɑggi tyëng Amön kinni, “Yï orumø kinni bɑ kipe wøri wïyí, ɑ ɑ́ör jøg be këëmi yïn yi Debïd? Pɑth! Gï ɑ́öre gɑ lyëwwì møg lyewwi piny, kipe kinni, o gø mɑge ki liny.”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kɑ tyëngwöödø mø Debïd mɑg yi Anun, kɑ yëyyi tïggi gïn lyele, kɑ ógudhi gïn ruude kì thɑ̈thi gen, kɑ gï öre yöö." 
1Chronicles19:5 Wɑ̈thi jøgɑni ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈y ki mendwøng, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø døøg myërri gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Debïd, ɑöde yï gen kinni, bëëd gen kì Yerikö, kɑ ge ko dwöög gïti keny-ɑ ódøøg yëyyi tïggi gen ki døngø." 
1Chronicles19:6 Kɑ yod yi Rɑ̈dh Anun geki tyëng Amön kinni, Debïd ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Codhe, kɑ ge ocudø ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg gɑ kïllì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen, møg kïr yɑ̈ɑ̈th kí tyëng-ɑ kwølli gen kì Mesøpøtɑmiyɑ̀. Kí myërri Arɑm, ɑ løg Mɑɑkɑ̀, kí Dhöbɑ̀." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ge ɑ́kïr ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑɑkɑ̀ kïr yi gen geki jølinye, kɑ ge obëënø, ɑguddi gen bøli Medebɑ̀. Kɑ tyëng Amön bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi kɑ̈ddi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be liny." 
1Chronicles19:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Debïd, ɑöre Yöɑb geki linye bëne." 
1Chronicles19:9 Tyëng Amön ɑ́kedhi wɑ̈g, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ dhø döri Rɑbɑ̀ kɑɑl gen, kɑ rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́bï be kunyø ki liny pëgg-ɑ kuni pɑ̈l." 
1Chronicles19:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Yöɑb kinni tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nud kì bøle kí ngɑ̈je, ɑyïënye ki jödd mø teg, kɑ gï cïbe tung-ɑ rwöm ki tyëng Arɑm." 
1Chronicles19:11 Kɑ jølinye møg-ɑ kyeelø mëgge ómen Abicɑy o gï pyejje, ɑcïbe gïn ge rwöm ki tyëng Amön." 
1Chronicles19:12 Aköbbii yi Yöɑb kinni, “Keløg e ólidh yi yïn kinni yɑ køm-ɑ tyɑmø yi tyëng Arɑm, kɑ yï bïí be kønyi yɑn, de keløg ɑ́ yïn ɑ ótyɑm yi tyëng Amön, yɑ óbï be kønyi yïn." 
1Chronicles19:13 Bëëd yï teeg kɑ yï ko böggi! Ti wɑ nyɑɑg ki menteg, kipe jiee, kí kɑ̈ddi Jwøgee. Kɑ wiy Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwøge gïn-ɑ døj kì yïe.”" 
1Chronicles19:14 Codhe, kɑ Yöɑb geki jøge kedh-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi tyëng Arɑm. Kɑ tyëngɑni órengø" 
1Chronicles19:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh tyëng Arɑm ge órengø yi tyëng Amön, ɑbwøg gen yi Abicɑy, kɑ ge reng-ɑ yij kɑɑl gen. Codhe kɑ Yöɑb døøg-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Áyod yi tyëng Arɑm kinni ge bɑ møg tyɑm yi tyëng Isrɑil. Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ni gen ki jøliny kì kɑ̈ddi tyëng Arɑm møg-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì løøg Nɑm Porɑt, o ge pyejji yi Cöbɑk pënyi liny Adɑdedher rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dhöbɑ̀." 
1Chronicles19:17 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Debïd, ɑcønge jøliny Isrɑil, kɑ Nɑm Urdun bɑ̈ɑ̈n gen, ɑcïbe gïn ge rwöm ki tyëng Arɑm. Kɑ liny ócɑ̈gø," 
1Chronicles19:18 ɑnyɑɑn liny Arɑm cyɑ̈n yi liny Isrɑil, kɑ Debïd geki jøge ónɑ̈ggø ki jøliny yɑ̈ɑ̈th gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew, kí jøliny tyel gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Cöbɑk pënyi liny Arɑm, ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen thyew." 
1Chronicles19:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi Rɑ̈dh Adɑdedher, kinni ge ɑ́tyɑm yi Isrɑil, ɑgöög gen ge mër ki Debïd, kɑ ge ogöögø gɑ jie. Kɑ tyëng Arɑm døøg-ɑ be bɑ̈nyø ki kønyi tyëng Amön ki liny." 
1Chronicles20:1 Kì ri thumi run, bøli keny-ɑ nyi kedhi rɑ̈nhì be liny, kɑ liny peej be mɑgi piny Amön yi Yöɑb. De Rɑ̈dh Debïd, ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem. Atyeg gen kɑɑldwøng Rɑbɑ̀, kɑ Yöɑb pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ köme, ɑmɑge gøn." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ngïji Mölek, jwøøg tyëng Amön yïe ɑ́dɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈r dhɑb, me pege bɑ gïn ni kïllì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen, ree ɑ́dɑ tigø me pere teeg, ɑkwɑɑny tingɑni yi Debïd kɑ gø kïdhe ri yɑ̈ɑ̈r wïje. Ákɑ̈bbi thyew ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑb mø gïïr kì kɑɑldwøng." 
1Chronicles20:3 Tyëng kɑɑldwøng ɑ́kwɑnye, kɑ gï mëgge gwøøg mocɑrr, kí kwërrì, kí dørrì. Gïg ni møgɑni ɑ́gögge tyëng kɑ̈ddi Amön møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Codhe, ɑdøøge Yerusɑlem geki jøge." 
1Chronicles20:4 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ liny døøg-ɑ mɑl ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kì Gedher. Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g jöd me cwøl ɑ́ Sipɑy yi Sibekɑy jɑl Ucɑ̀. Kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ tyɑm." 
1Chronicles20:5 Kɑ kì yij liny-ɑ kyeelø ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, linyɑni ɑ yije ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g Lɑkmì ómï Gölyɑth jɑl Gɑth yi Elɑɑnɑn wɑ̈d Yɑir, jɑlɑni bööl ɑkebïdhe ngëde dwøøng nɑ leg." 
1Chronicles20:6 Liny-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́nyïɑ̈g ɑ Gɑth, ɑ́dɑ jöd me lweddi cingge bɑ ɑ́bïkyel, ɑ cingï kí cingï. O lweddi tyelle bɑ ɑ́bïkyel ɑ tyelï kí tyelï. Jɑlɑni bɑ kwɑɑr jödd-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈ngi." 
1Chronicles20:7 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́lɑrre, kɑ nɑ̈g yi Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Cɑmɑ̀ ómï Debïd." 
1Chronicles20:8 Jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g yi Debïd geki jøge, ɑ́bëëd gɑ kwɑrri jödd kì Gɑth." 
1Chronicles21:1 Cethɑn ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömi Isrɑil ki rɑj. Codhe, kɑ Debïd wëgge kwɑni tyëng Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles21:2 Amëggi cigg Yöɑb geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ kyeelø yi Debïd kinni, “Kedhu kelli Isrɑil, cɑg kì wïj tuung pödhø gïti wïj tung-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ji kwɑn wun. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ yodi kwɑnni gen.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Alöggi Yöɑb kinni, “Wiy kwɑnni tyëng Isrɑil med yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyel miy mø ngenyø, kibøli kwɑnni gen møg-ɑ nud ɑnɑn! Ge bɑ bɑ̈nggí bënn wuö. Á kipe ngø ɑ dwɑddí gwøg ki gïn ni men, o pödhø bëne wëggí bɑ̈jjø?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 De rɑ̈dh ɑ́kööb ce lïngi cigge yi Yöɑb, ɑkedhe kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø e kwɑn-ɑ ji kì yij pödhi Isrɑil bëne. Codhe, ɑdwööge Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Adwöggi møgɑni Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni kwɑnni jøg-ɑ cuggi nyɑɑg ki liny kì Isrɑil bɑ mïlyön ɑ́kyel kí ɑ́lïp miyø (1,100,000). Kí ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew (470,000) kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles21:6 Mɑ́ ciggi rɑ̈dh nuti yïëyø yi Yöɑb, gøl Leebì geki gøl Ben Yɑmïn nuti kwɑɑn en." 
1Chronicles21:7 Jwøk ɑ́bëëd pyëwe pɑ med ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg. Codhe, ɑcɑye Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles21:8 Aköbbi Jwøk yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji ki bɑ̈jjø me dwøng kɑ ɑ́göögɑ ki gïn ni men! Wuö dwöög lɑɑwí piny kiperɑ, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́göög-ɑ nøgi wïjɑ.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Aköbbi Gɑd jɑltööng Debïd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Kedh kɑ Debïd köbbí kinni ödɑ’ ödø ki jɑmmì ɑ́dɑ̈g møg kelli gen kɑ̈bbi yi en, men-ɑ ókwɑny yi en, ɑ ógöggɑ en.”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Akedhi Gɑd yï Debïd, kɑ gø köbbe møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Apëjje kinni, “Yï kwɑny-ɑ men-ɑ́?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Runn ɑ́dɑ̈g mø kɑ̈j? Wɑlɑ̀ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g wu ocyeddø yi liny tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wun? Wɑlɑ̀ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g gøøje kömi pödhi wun, keny-ɑ óöre wëywöne be kɑ̈ɑ̈li thøø kömi Isrɑil? Á ngø ɑ kwɑny yi yïn, o wöödø döggɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Aløøg mø Gɑd yi Debïd kinni, “Yɑ ying-ɑ yij orɑng me teg! De yɑ pɑ dwɑddi cɑyø yi dhɑnhø, wiy bëëde ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete ɑ cɑy yɑn, mɑ́ pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g gøøje kömi tyëng Isrɑil, ɑthøw ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew kì kelli gen." 
1Chronicles21:15 Kɑ Jwøk óönø ki wëywödø me nɑ̈g Yerusɑlem, de rumme ɑ́wile, ɑköbbe wëywönɑni kinni, “Árum! Møg gïïr!” Wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì buti rɑr-ɑ nyi pwööd gemè kì pwödhi Arɑunɑ̀, wɑ̈d Yebus." 
1Chronicles21:16 Wëywödø ɑ́lidh yi Debïd kì yij yømø, e ómïdhø ki pilø kì cinge, gø tiim en kipe nɑ̈gi Yerusɑlem. Codhe, kɑ Debïd geki jøgdøngø ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì, wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny e bøli gen nywɑll-ɑ lɑ̈bø." 
1Chronicles21:17 Akwɑ̈jji Debïd kinni, “Wuö Jwøk, bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji. Yɑn ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni kwɑɑn ji. Á ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r ek? Yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cɑy yɑn wøki gølɑ, kɑ jií wiy.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Aköbbi Gɑd yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí Debïd kinni, kedhe kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gëdde ki këli lɑm kì pwödhi Arɑunɑ̀ kì yij rɑr-ɑ nyi pwööd gemè.”" 
1Chronicles21:19 Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïngi yi Debïd, ɑkedhe ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Gɑd." 
1Chronicles21:20 Arɑunɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e opödø ki gemè geki wɑ̈dde ɑ́ngwen, kì rɑri pwödi gemè, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen wëywödø, ɑrengi wɑ̈dde kɑ ge ópɑ̈nø." 
1Chronicles21:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh Rɑ̈dh Debïd e ócyɑ̈ngø yi Arɑunɑ̀, ɑnyege kì yij rɑrø, kɑ óbuddø yije rum en piny, e bøle nywɑll-ɑ lɑ̈bø." 
1Chronicles21:22 Aköbbii yi Debïd kinni, “Ngëwwí yɑn rɑrí, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gëddɑ ki këli lɑm kì yije, o yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g cuunge. Gïn-ɑ ngeewii ómëggɑ yïn bëne.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Kɑ Arɑunɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Kwɑɑny! Kɑ yï göög ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn. Kwɑny wɑ̈dhh thyew, kɑ ge ngɑɑl gɑ gëdhhì møg rɑ̈b kì wïj këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ lødhi pöd møg cwɑɑg gɑ yugg. Kɑ gemè men muuj ɑ́ gëëdhi, ge ɑ́mëggɑ yïn bënn.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Codhe, ɑlöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Pɑth, yï ómëggɑ gïn-ɑ ngeewii bëne. Gïí pɑ cuggi mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi yɑn ɑ́ gëëdhi, mɑ́ keløg ɑ́ gïi ngɑn megø ɑ mëggɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́muujɑ!”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Acude Arɑunɑ̀ ki ngyënyyi dhɑb miy ɑ́bïkyel, gɑ møg ngeew rɑri gemè mee." 
1Chronicles21:26 Agëddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Debïd ki këli lɑm kì kenyɑni, ɑmuuje ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gënhi mër. Akwɑ̈jje, kɑ kwɑ̈jje yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mɑc kì mɑl, men rɑ̈b gëdhhì kì wïj këli lɑm." 
1Chronicles21:27 Aköbbi wëywödø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni dwøøge pilø yij bøj. Kɑ gø dwøøge. 
1Chronicles21:28 Kɑ yod yi Debïd kinni kwɑ̈jje ɑ́løøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Codhe, ɑmuuje ki gëdhhì kì wïj këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì rɑri gemè mi Arɑunɑ̀ jɑl Yebus." 
1Chronicles21:29 Kì bøli kenyɑni Kemi Kwër men-ɑ ɑ́gur yi Mosɑ̀ kì yij ryɑng, kí kël-ɑ wïje nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhì, ge ɑ́bëëd ge nudd ge ying-ɑ Gibeon." 
1Chronicles21:30 De Debïd nuti kedhi kunɑni be lɑm, mɑ́ e óböggø yi pili wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles22:1 Codhe, ɑkööb Debïd kinni, “Kengi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óying-ɑ keny. Men bene këlø men-ɑ wïje ómuuj gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne yi tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ wëdhh kì Yerusɑlem köbbi yi Debïd kinni, cøng gen ri gen. Kɑ gï nënge ki gwøg. Kwï gen ɑ́tweg-ɑ ópɑddi kïttì møg geer Kengø." 
1Chronicles22:3 Amuuje ki ngyënyø dødø me thɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki gedd kí mɑ̈gi møg gur thïg, kí ngyënyø dilɑl me ngenyø, me bong ngɑn cuggi rømii." 
1Chronicles22:4 Tyëng Suur geki tyëng Sïdön ɑ́köbbe kinni kɑ̈ni gen ki yenh sɑndɑl mø ngenyø. 
1Chronicles22:5 Arum Debïd kinni, “Kengø men-ɑ ógërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi wɑ̈dɑ Sølømøn óceg bëëdø e dwøng, o bɑ̈r. De bɑ othinh, o nuti dïdø, de yɑ ceg-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ gëëd ki gwirø.” Codhe, kɑ Debïd ocungø ki jɑmmì mø gïïr kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nuti thøw en." 
1Chronicles22:6 Acwööle wɑ̈de Sølømøn, kɑ gø köbbe kinni, gëdde Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ki kengø." 
1Chronicles22:7 Áköbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ, yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ gyer ki kengø men pwøøj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgɑ." 
1Chronicles22:8 De yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni yɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji mø gïïr cɑrø, kɑ yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki liny mø døngø. Bene bɑnge mɑ̈ɑ̈ne yɑn gyer ki kengø, mɑ́ cingɑ dɑ rem mø gïïr." 
1Chronicles22:9 Yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, ‘Yïí ódi wɑ̈d men-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki mër, mɑ́ e óthödhɑ ki mër ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn. Nyinge ócwøl ɑ́ Sølømøn, mɑ́ kì kɑɑm-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈ge bëne, Isrɑil óthödhɑ ki mër, o óbëëd e bong liny." 
1Chronicles22:10 Yɑ ógëdde ki kengø. Óbëëd ɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ wïye. Isrɑil ójɑɑg yi kwɑrre gïti ɑtheer.’ ”" 
1Chronicles22:11 Kɑ Debïd okööbø kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ, yï ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí, dhøge ómïdhe o yï cuggi ki gëddii ki kengø." 
1Chronicles22:12 O yï óthödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí ki ngɑ̈nyi bëëdø, kí peli wïj men-ɑ ójɑɑg Isrɑil kì kömi cigge." 
1Chronicles22:13 Møgɑni ócuggi, keløg cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn ómïdhi yi yïn. Dyëëj, kɑ pyëwí bëëd e teeg, kɑ ko di gïn böggi yi yïn." 
1Chronicles22:14 De keløg ɑ́ per geri Kengø, yɑ ɑ́cïbi piny ki dhɑb me wɑ̈dhi ri tøn ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́ngwen, kí ɑ́tegø me wɑ̈dhi ri tøn ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen, reb ki dilɑl geki ngyënyø dødø mø bong cögi gen. Yïɑ dɑ pɑ̈mmi gyer kí kïttì, de yï ceg-ɑ yɑ̈bbi kömi gen ceth." 
1Chronicles22:15 Yïí dɑ jøgwøg mø gïïr, dɑ jøg mø twïgø ki kïtti gyer, kí bödhhi gyer, kí bödhhi yiedh ki pɑ̈mmì, kí bödhhi thɑ̈dh ki jɑmmì bënn," 
1Chronicles22:16 kí dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí dilɑl, kí dødø. Cɑ̈gí ki gwøg, yï ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
1Chronicles22:17 Kɑ jyɑ̈ggi Isrɑil bënn ceg yi Debïd kinni køny gen Sølømøn. 
1Chronicles22:18 Gï ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Wu ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, kɑ wu thödhe ki mër kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. Yɑ ɑ́wëgge mɑgi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì piny men bënn, ɑnɑn ge bɑ jii wun, o ge bɑ jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles22:19 Anɑn göggu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun ki pëthi wun, kí wëyi wun. Kɑ wu cɑ̈gi wun ki geri Kengø, kipe kinni, o Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí jɑmmi kwër cïb yije.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yöø Rɑ̈dh Debïd ki mendwøng, ɑgwøge wɑ̈de Sølømøn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles23:2 Acøng jɑggi Isrɑil bënn, kí ókwër bënn, kí Kwɑrri Leebì yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd" 
1Chronicles23:3 Akwɑne Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ runni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
1Chronicles23:4 Kɑ gwøøg kori kengø mëggi ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen yi rɑ̈dh, o ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïkyel nyi mïdhi gen wɑ̈j geki nenni gønyy." 
1Chronicles23:5 Kí ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen mø gwøøg gen bɑ kur, o ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen nyi lenhi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör ki thøm møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi rɑ̈dh kipe gwøngɑni." 
1Chronicles23:6 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì pɑ̈ngi yi Debïd gɑ ɑkudd ɑ́dɑ̈g, gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, gøl Gercön, kí gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí gøl Merɑrì." 
1Chronicles23:7 Gercön wɑ̈dde ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Lɑdɑn, kí Cimeì." 
1Chronicles23:8 Lɑdɑn wɑ̈dde bɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Yekiel, kí Dhethɑm, kí Yöiil," 
1Chronicles23:9 gen ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi gøl Lɑdɑn. (Cimeì wɑ̈dde ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Celömöth, kí Adhiel, kí Arɑn.)" 
1Chronicles23:10 Wɑ̈ddi Cimeì bɑ ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Yɑɑth, kí Dhinɑ̀, kí Yeuc, kí Beriyɑ̀. Yeuc geki Beriyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd kwɑrri gen nøg, bene ɑ reb gen gɑ kɑl ɑ́kyel." 
1Chronicles23:11  
1Chronicles23:12 Wɑ̈ddi Kɑ̈ɑ̈th bɑ ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Amrɑm, kí Idhɑr, kí Kibrön, kí Udhiel." 
1Chronicles23:13 Wɑ̈de Amrɑm nyel-ɑ kɑyø ɑ bɑ wïyi Aɑron geki Mosɑ̀. (Aɑron geki kwɑrre ɑ́cïb wɑ̈yi gen gɑ jɑggi kwër, o ge nyi rɑ̈b gen bɑkur kenyi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge göggi gen en, o ji nyi kwëng yi gen ki nyinge." 
1Chronicles23:14 De kwɑrri Mosɑ̀ jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk ɑ́kwɑɑn-ɑ kelli Kwɑrri Leebì.) 
1Chronicles23:15 Wɑ̈ddi Mosɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́ryew; Gercöm kí Eliedher. 
1Chronicles23:16 Nyel-ɑ bɑ jɑgø kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Gercöm bɑ Cebuel. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliedher yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de ɑ́kyel me cwøl ɑ́ Reɑbiyɑ̀, de Reɑbiyɑ̀ kwɑrre gïïr." 
1Chronicles23:18 Kɑ̈ɑ̈th wɑ̈de nyel-ɑ bɑng kɑyø, Idhɑr yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈de me cwøl ɑ́ Celömith, en bɑ jɑngi kɑl." 
1Chronicles23:19 Dɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ̈ddi Kɑ̈ɑ̈th, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kibrön, yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Yeriyɑ̀, kí Amɑriyɑ̀, kí Yɑɑdhiel, kí Yekɑmeɑm," 
1Chronicles23:20 Ngween wɑ̈ddi Kɑ̈ɑ̈th bɑ Udhiel, o yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ryew: Miikɑ̀ geki Iciyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles23:21 Wɑ̈ddi Merɑrì bɑ ɑ́ryew: Mɑklì kí Mucì. Thyew Mɑklì wɑ̈dde bɑ ɑ́ryew: Eliɑdhɑr kí Kïc," 
1Chronicles23:22 de Eliɑdhɑr ɑ́thøw e yïe bong wɑ̈dde, dɑ́ nywøle womɑ̈nn keti gen ɑ nud. Nywøle møgɑni ɑ́nywøm-ɑ yi nyiiwï gen, wɑ̈ddi Kïc." 
1Chronicles23:23 Ryeew wɑ̈ddi Merɑrì, Mucì, wɑ̈dde bɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Mɑklì, kí Eder, kí Yeremöth." 
1Chronicles23:24 Møgɑk bɑ Kwɑrri Leebì kí kɑ̈lli gen, gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gwed nyingi gen, e ngɑn gwëëd-ɑ cwɑgge, ngɑn-ɑ wɑ̈dhi ri runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl, yïe dɑ gwøg me gwøg yi en kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles23:25 Akööb Debïd kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil mër ɑ́mëgge jie, o en kiree óbëëdø kì Yerusɑlem gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles23:26 De bong gïn pere ótyëddi Kemi Kwër geki jɑmm-ɑ nyi göög ki kwër bënn yi Kwɑrri Leebì.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Debïd, Kwɑrri Leebì bënn møg-ɑ runni gen wɑ̈dhi ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew ɑ nyi gwed kipe gwøg." 
1Chronicles23:28 O gwøng-ɑ nyi mëggi gen bɑ, kønyi ókwër møg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri Aɑron ki gwøøg kwër kì Kengø, kí korri ódɑ̈rri Kengø geki udde, kí korri jɑmmi kwër bënn, o ge cög ge pɑ bwöl," 
1Chronicles23:29 o ge mïdhi gen ópùn-ɑ nyi mëggi Jwøk, kí møg-ɑ búr men-ɑ nyi muuj kí gëdhhì, kí ópùn-ɑ ri gen bong kɑmïrɑ̀, kí ópùn-ɑ bɑ ɑbul, kí møg-ɑ búr men-ɑ nyi nyöm ki møøw dhetun, o jɑmm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kengø nyi røm yi gen," 
1Chronicles23:30 o ge nyi lenhi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o nyi lejji yi gen, o nyi pøjji yi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng kì mwøl kí böörø," 
1Chronicles23:31 o kenyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, kí cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈n-ɑ nyɑ̈n geki wööwø møg-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ ge thödhi ki ciggi gwøngɑni, ki kwɑnni Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ nyi cïb kipe gwøgi gwøngɑni, kí bøli keny-ɑ nyi gwøgii. Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́mëggi gwøøg mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
1Chronicles23:32 Ge ɑ́mëggi gwøøg korri kemɑ̀ geki Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí kønyi wɑddi gen geki ókwër kwɑrri Aɑron ki gwøg kì Kengø." 
1Chronicles24:1 Møg bɑ ɑkuddi kwɑrri Aɑron: wɑ̈ddi Aɑron bɑ ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Nɑdɑb, kí Abiu, kí Eliɑdhɑr, kí Ithɑmɑr" 
1Chronicles24:2 Nɑdɑb geki Abiu ɑ́kwöngi ki thøø kibøli wïyi gen, o ɑ́bong-ɑ kwɑrri gen mɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen. Codhe, ɑgöög nyiimï gen, Eliɑdhɑr geki Ithɑmɑr gɑ ókwër." 
1Chronicles24:3 Kɑ kwɑrri Aɑron pɑ̈ngi yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd gɑ ɑkudd e køøl-ɑ ri gwøng-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen. Ákøny-ɑ yi Dhɑdök kwɑɑr Eliɑdhɑr geki Akimelek kwɑɑr Ithɑmɑr. 
1Chronicles24:4 Kwɑrri Eliɑdhɑr ɑ́pɑ̈ngi gɑ ɑkudd pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, o kwɑrri Ithɑmɑr ɑ́pɑ̈ngi gɑ ɑkudd ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, mɑ́ wïj gøl Eliɑdhɑr dɑ cwøw mø gïïr." 
1Chronicles24:5 Gwøg ɑ́pɑ̈ngi e leng kɑ wél, mɑ́ e dɑ jɑggi dhø Kengø, kí tyëng kwër kì gøl Eliɑdhɑr geki Ithɑmɑr." 
1Chronicles24:6 Kwɑrri Eliɑdhɑr geki kwɑrri Ithɑmɑr wél ɑ́leng yi gen e ceg kɑ lunyø. Codhe, ɑgweed gen yi sikriter, Cemɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nethɑnel Kwɑɑr Leebì. Ge ɑ́gwed-ɑ bøli Rɑ̈dh ceth geki jyɑ̈gge, kí Ókwërø Dhɑdök, kí Akimelek wɑ̈d Abiyɑthɑr, kí jɑggi kɑ̈lli ókwër, kí jɑggi kɑ̈lli Kwɑrri Leebì." 
1Chronicles24:7 Men bene kër-ɑ ópyëël ɑkuddi kɑ̈llɑni gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, keny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen gwøøg gen:" 
1Chronicles24:8 1. Yöyɑrïb 2. Yedɑiyɑ̀ 3. Arïm 4. Seorïm 5. Mɑlkiyɑ̀ 6. Miyɑmïn 7. Aködh 8. Abiyɑ̀ 9. Jöcwø 10. Cekɑniyɑ̀ 11. Eliɑcïb 12. Yɑkim 13. Upɑ̀ 14. Yecebeɑb 15. Bilgɑ̀ 16. Imer 17. Kedhïr 18. Apidhedh 19. Pethɑiyɑ̀ 20. Yeedhkel 21. Yɑkin 22. Gɑmul 23. Delɑiyɑ̀ 24. Mɑɑdhiyɑ̀ 
1Chronicles24:9 Nyingi jøg ɑ́gwed kɑ tïj men-ɑ bɑ gwøøg gen kì Kengø, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyyi gen kwɑrri Aɑron, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles24:10 Møg bɑ nyingi jɑggi gøl Leebì møøgø: Yedeiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Cebuel kì gøl Amrɑm." 
1Chronicles24:11 Iciyɑ̀, kì gøl Reɑbiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles24:12 Kì gøl Idhɑr, Yɑɑth ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Celömith." 
1Chronicles24:13 Yeriyɑ̀, kí Amɑriyɑ̀, ki Yɑɑdhiel, ki Yekɑmeɑm." 
1Chronicles24:14 Kì gøl Udhiel: Cɑmïr, kí Iciyɑ̀ ómï Miikɑ̀;" 
1Chronicles24:15 Dhekɑriyɑ̀ kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Iciyɑ̀ ómï Miikɑ̀. 
1Chronicles24:16 Gøl Merɑrì dɑ Mɑklì, kí Mucì, kí Yɑɑdhiyɑ̀." 
1Chronicles24:17 Wɑ̈ddi Yɑɑdhiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Coɑm, kí Dhɑkur, kí Ibrì" 
1Chronicles24:18 wɑ̈ddi Mɑklì bɑ ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Eliɑdhɑr, kí Kïc. Eliɑdhɑr yïe bong wɑ̈de, de Kïc wɑ̈de bɑ ɑ́kyel, ɑ løg Yerɑmel." 
1Chronicles24:19 Mucì wɑ̈dde bɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Mɑklì, kí Eder, kí Yeremöth. Møgɑk bɑ jɑggi gøl Leebì." 
1Chronicles24:20 Jɑngi kɑl kí dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli nyiimen møg-ɑ thønhø ɑ nyi kwɑny wéli tïïj gen, geki wɑddi gen, ɑ løg ókwër kwɑrri Aɑron. Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg-ɑ bøli Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kí Dhɑdök, kí Akimelek, kí jɑggi kɑ̈lli ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì." 
1Chronicles25:1 Rɑ̈dh Debïd geki jɑggi Kwɑrri Leebì, ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki jøg nyi wör kì Kengø. Jøg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny bɑ Asɑp, kí Ëmɑn, kí Yeduthun, o ge nyi töng gen wööni Jwøk kenyi thoom thøm kɑ bullì pwöd. Møg bɑ nyingi ji-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny kipe gwøøg kwër kì kej mɑ̈ddø, ɑkuun ki gwøge, ɑkuun ki gwøge." 
1Chronicles25:2 Wɑ̈ddi Asɑp, Dhɑkur, kí Yosep, kí Nethɑniyɑ̀, kí Acɑrelɑ̀. Ge ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi Asɑp, jɑl-ɑ nyi töng wööni Jwøk kì bøli rɑ̈dh." 
1Chronicles25:3 Wɑ̈ddi Yeduthun bɑ ɑ́bïkyel, ɑ løg Gedɑliyɑ̀, kí Dherì, kí Yecɑiyɑ̀, kì Cimeì, kí Acɑbiyɑ̀, kí Mɑtithiyɑ̀. Ge pyejj-ɑ yi wïyi gen, o ge nyii töngø ki wööni Jwøk kenyi thoom thøm kɑ bullì pwöd, ge owörø ge lenh-ɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge pøjj-ɑ en." 
1Chronicles25:4 Wɑ̈ddi Ëmɑn bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Bukiyɑ̀, kí Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, kí Udhiel, kí Cebuel, kí Yerimöth, kí Aɑnɑniyɑ̀, kí Aɑnɑnì, kí Eliɑthɑ̀, kí Gidɑltì, kí Romɑmtì Edher, kí Yöcbekɑcɑ̀, kí Mɑlöthì, kí Othir, kí Mɑɑdhiöth." 
1Chronicles25:5 Ëmɑn, jɑltööng rɑ̈dh, ɑ́mëggi wɑ̈ddɑni gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, kí womɑ̈nn ɑ́dɑ̈g, yi Jwøk, kɑ per kinni o bëëde e teeg ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe kinni gø ógwøge e teeg." 
1Chronicles25:6 Wɑ̈dde bënn nyii pöödø ki bullì, o ge nyii thumø, ge pyejj-ɑ yi wïyi gen kì kej kwër. O Asɑp, kí Yeduthun, kí Ëmɑn ge nyi gwøg-ɑ møg-ɑ kwøb yi rɑ̈dh." 
1Chronicles25:7 Jøgɑni bënn gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, geki wɑddi gen Kwɑrri Leebì, ɑ́bëëd ge dïdø kidøøj ki thøm. Kwɑnni jøgɑni bënn, ɑ́bëëd gɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
1Chronicles25:8 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge nyi ceg kɑ lengø ki wél, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ kedhi kej kwër, ge bënn, cɑg kì ri møg-ɑ thønhø, gïti ri møg-ɑ døngø, kí møg dïdø kidøøj kí møg cer cɑ̈gø." 
1Chronicles26:1 Møg bɑ gïg-ɑ gwøg yi Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kor Kengø. Gøl Körɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ Mecelemiyɑ̀ kì yij ɑkuud Asɑp 
1Chronicles26:2 Wɑ̈dde ɑ́bïryew, kɑ̀ myeer gen e kööl ɑ ri döng bɑ: Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Yediyɑil, kí Dhebɑdiyɑ̀, kí Yɑthniel," 
1Chronicles26:3 kí Elɑm, kí Yöɑnɑn, kí Eliönɑy." 
1Chronicles26:4 Thyew ɑ́dɑ Obed Edöm jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøk kɑ gø nënge ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, kɑ̀ myeer gen ge kööl ɑ ri döng, bɑ: Cemɑiyɑ̀ ɑ bɑ kɑyø, bɑnge dɑ Yödhɑbɑd, kí Yöɑ̀, kí Sɑkɑr, kí Nethɑnel," 
1Chronicles26:5 kí Amiel, kí Isɑkɑr, kí Peulethɑy ɑ bɑ bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g gen." 
1Chronicles26:6 Cemɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Obed Edöm nyel-ɑ kɑyø wɑ̈dde bɑ ɑ́bïkyel, ɑ løg Othnì, kí Repɑil, kí Obed, kí Eldhɑbɑd, kí Elïu, kí Semɑkiyɑ̀. Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøg mø per gen teg, mɑ́ ge bɑ yɑɑg teg. Yɑɑg-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen ɑ́bëëd wɑ̈thi gen pel ki mendwøng." 
1Chronicles26:7  
1Chronicles26:8 Gøl Obed Edöm ɑ́muuj-ɑ ji pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́ryew, mø dïdø kidøøj." 
1Chronicles26:9 Gøl Mecelemiyɑ̀ ɑ́muuj-ɑ ji pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g mø dïdø. 
1Chronicles26:10 Gøl Merɑrì ɑ́dɑ Ösɑ̀, o yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen: Cimrì (en ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye ɑ́ jɑgø ngö e pɑth ki nyel-ɑ dwøng)," 
1Chronicles26:11 Kilkiyɑ̀ ɑ bɑ ryeew gen, bɑnge dɑ Tebɑliyɑ̀, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀. Kwɑnni jø gøl Ösɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøkori Kengø bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g bënn." 
1Chronicles26:12 Tyëng-ɑ nyi kor Kengø ɑ́pɑ̈ngi gɑ ɑkudd kì wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, ɑmëggi gen gwøøg kori Kengø, e gwøg ceg kɑ lunyø ni gwøøg Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Chronicles26:13 Kɑl nyi kor-ɑ dhøng-ɑ wëële pɑ̈dhi ki en, cɑgg gølɑni kwɑnni jie nøg." 
1Chronicles26:14 Celemiyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ wëëli dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ wɑ̈de Dhekɑriyɑ̀ jɑlcïïjø, pɑ̈dhi kɑ wëëli dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obed Edöm ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, o wɑ̈dde ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ udd-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmì." 
1Chronicles26:16 Cupïm geki Ösɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kí Dhøg Cɑleketh ɑ yïëbbi yuu-ɑ töngi kwøømø. Gwøøg jøkor ɑ́pɑ̈ngi ɑ́ kɑɑm, e ceg kɑ lunyø." 
1Chronicles26:17 Tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ́bëëd e nyi kor-ɑ yi ji ɑ́bïkyel ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. Wɑɑng wuudø dɑ ji ɑ́ngwen, o wɑɑng wurlwɑl dɑ ji ɑ́ngwen, o dhøggi udd-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmì kor-ɑ yi ji ɑ́ngwen, ɑ́ryew kì dhø øn, kí ɑ́ryew kì dhø øn-ɑ kyeelø." 
1Chronicles26:18 Pɑb men-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kor-ɑ yi ji ɑ́ngwen kì tøg yöö, kí ɑ́ryew kì yij pɑmɑni kiree." 
1Chronicles26:19 Bene kër-ɑ ɑ́pyëël gwøøg jøkor ɑnɑn, gen ɑ jø gøl Körɑ̀ kí gøl Merɑrì." 
1Chronicles26:20 Akiyɑ̀ Kwɑɑr Leebì ɑ ɑ́mïdhi kɑ̈nni Kengø, kí udd-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmi pwøj møg-ɑ bɑ mø Jwøk." 
1Chronicles26:21 Lɑdɑn wɑ̈d Gercön yïe ɑ́dɑ kwɑrr mø gïïr, reb kí gøl wɑ̈de Yekiel." 
1Chronicles26:22 Wɑ̈ddi Lɑdɑn ɑ́ryew-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ løg Dhethɑm geki Yöiil, ɑ ɑ́mïdhi kɑ̈nni Kengø, kí udd-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmì." 
1Chronicles26:23 Kwɑrri Amrɑm, kí kwɑrri Idhɑr, kí kwɑrri Kibrön, kí kwɑrri Udhiel ge ɑ́mëggi gwøøg gen thyew." 
1Chronicles26:24 Cebuel wɑ̈d Gercöm kì gøl Mosɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi dwøng men-ɑ jɑɑg jɑmmi kɑ̈nni Kengø. 
1Chronicles26:25 Celömith bɑ wɑɑd gen kì ri Gercöm ómï Eliedher. Eliedher bɑ wïyi Reɑbiyɑ̀, Reɑbiyɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Yecɑiyɑ̀, Yecɑiyɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Yörɑm, Yörɑm bɑ wïyi Dhikrì, Dhikrì bɑ wïyi Celömith." 
1Chronicles26:26 Jɑmmi pwøj bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́thërri Jwøk yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kí jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí jøgdøngø, kí pëjji liny ge ɑ́mïdh-ɑ yi Celömith geki tyëng gøl gen." 
1Chronicles26:27 Akɑ̈bbi gen ki kwï jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen kì yij liny, kɑ gï kwër gen kipe kinni o ge göög kì yij Kengø." 
1Chronicles26:28 Jɑmm-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër bënn kipe gwøøg Kengø, kí jɑmmi pwøj møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑltöng Sɑmwel, kí Rɑ̈dh Cɑul, kí Abner wɑ̈d Ner, kí Yöɑb wɑ̈d Dheruyɑ̀, ge ɑ́mïdh-ɑ yi Celömith geki tyëng gøl gen." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kì kelli kwɑrri Idhɑr, bɑ Kenɑniyɑ̀ geki wɑ̈dde ɑ ɑ́gwøg gɑ jɑggi gwøg, gen ɑ mïdhi wɑ̈j, o gen ɑ nenni gønyyi tyëng Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles26:30 Acɑbiyɑ̀ kì kelli kwɑrri Kibrön, kí tyëng gøl gen gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel kí miy ɑ́bïryew, yɑɑg tir bënn, gen ɑ ɑ́gwøg gɑ jɑggi kwër bënn, kí nenni gønyyi teedø kì løøg Nɑm Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑngi gøl Kibrön. Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngween runni Rɑ̈dh Debïd kì yij lɑwø, thɑ lwömi gøl Kibrön ɑ́yɑb, kɑ ge óyïddø ki jöddi liny kì gølɑni, o ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yɑdher kì piny Gilyɑd." 
1Chronicles26:32 Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki jøg tir kì kelli jø gøl Yeriyɑ̀ gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́bïryew, kɑ gï gwøge gɑ jɑggi kwër, o ge nyi lidh gen gønyy kì myërri Isrɑil møg-ɑ løøg Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑ løg piny Ruben, kí Gɑd, kí budi gøl Mɑnɑsè." 
1Chronicles27:1 Møg bɑ jɑgg-ɑ døngø geki jɑgg-ɑ thønhø kì Isrɑil, kí jøgwøg møg-ɑ gwøg gwøøg pödhø. Kì yij dwɑ̈y ɑ́kyel kì yij run, pënyi liny ɑ́kyel ɑ nyi göögø, e pyejj-ɑ jøliny ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, otyëge dwɑ̈nɑni o nyi ywöme geki jøge, o keje nyi kwɑny yi ngɑn-ɑ bɑnge." 
1Chronicles28:1 Kɑ jyɑ̈ggi gøldwøng, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí pëjji liny, kí jɑgg-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmì, cwööl Yerusɑlem bënn yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
1Chronicles28:2 Acungi Debïd kì bøli gen, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Nyiimïɑ, lïngu kwøbbɑ. Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ gëddi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ød men bëëde, keny yije ywööm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee. Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ gëddii ki Kengø men wørii, kɑ jɑmmi gyer pyëlɑ bënn." 
1Chronicles28:3 De yɑ ɑ́kyëdde kinni yɑ ko gëëd, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ jɑl-liny, o yɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji mø gïïr." 
1Chronicles28:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil yɑ ɑ́kwɑnye wøki gølɑ, o yɑ jɑɑgɑ Isrɑil gïti ɑtheer. Gøl Yeudɑ̀ ɑ́kwɑnye ɑ́ gøl jyɑ̈gø, kɑ ød wïyɑ kwɑnye kì gøl Yeudɑ̀ bëne. Pyëwe ɑ́med kɑ yɑn kì gøl wïyɑ, ɑkwɑnye yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh men jɑɑg Isrɑil bëne." 
1Chronicles28:5 Kɑ yɑ nënge ki wɑ̈dd mø gïïr, kɑ kwɑny-ɑ Sølømøn kì kelli wɑ̈ddɑ bënn, o jɑɑge Isrɑil, pödhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles28:6 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, ‘Wɑ̈dí Sølømøn, bɑ en ɑ ógëddi yɑn ki kengø, ɑ́kwɑny yi yɑn ɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ, o yɑ bɑ wïye." 
1Chronicles28:7 Lɑ̈ge ówiy yi yɑn o bëëde gïti ɑtheer, keløg e óbëëd e mïdh-ɑ ciggɑ ni kɑ̀ bëëde ɑnɑn.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “De ɑnɑn, wun ɑ wɑddɑ, kì bøli Jwøgee kí bøli Isrɑil bëne, wun ɑ jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee, o piny-ɑ med men ócöge ɑ́ mi wun ceth, kì yethi rïjj bënn.”" 
1Chronicles28:9 Aköbbe Sølømøn kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ, wør Jwøøg wïyí kɑ göggí ki pyëwí bëne, kí rummí bënn. Rummee bënn kí gïg-ɑ tyer yi wɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi en. Keløg yï ywøøg-ɑ kööre, yï ókøny yi en, de keløg ngɑ̈jí ólugii, yï óbɑny yi en gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles28:10 Bëëd yï ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, yï ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yï ger Kengi kwëre. Gwøøg ceth ki tegi pyëwí.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Anyudhi Sølømøn yi Debïd ki kër-ɑ ógeer Kengø, kí uddi jɑmmì geki udd-ɑ kyeelø, kí Kej Kwërdwøng ɑ bɑ kej dwöögi lɑ́ɑ̀w piny." 
1Chronicles28:12 Kɑ gø nyudhe ki kër-ɑ ógeer ódɑ̈rri Kengø geki udd-ɑ buti gen, kí uddi mïdhi jɑmmì, kí jɑmmi Kengø, kí jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ møg pwøøj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles28:13 Anyudhii yi Debïd thyew ki yëth-ɑ ópyële gwøøg ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kí kër-ɑ ógwøg gen gwøøg gen, kí gwøgi gwøøg Kengø, kí nenni jɑmm-ɑ nyi göög bënn kì Kengø." 
1Chronicles28:14 Akwøbe këër dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø men-ɑ óthɑ̈ɑ̈dh jɑmm-ɑ ógöög kì Kengø, ɑ løg:" 
1Chronicles28:15 men-ɑ óthɑ̈ɑ̈dh lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ kí tegi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈," 
1Chronicles28:16 kí men-ɑ gwøøg tɑrɑbeedh dhɑb ɑ́kyel, kì ri møg-ɑ kömi gen nyi cïb ópùn møg-ɑ nyi thyëyi Jwøk." 
1Chronicles28:17 Kɑ këër dhɑm dhïw men-ɑ óthɑ̈ɑ̈dh gɑ̈bbì, kí óthɑ̈ggì, kí puggì, kí tɑ̈mmì." 
1Chronicles28:18 Kí dhɑm dhïw men-ɑ óthɑ̈ɑ̈dh këli bɑkur, kí kerobb møg-ɑ peedh obërri gen kömi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles28:19 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd okööbø kinni, “Møgɑni bënn ɑ́nyudhi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree, gɑ møg gwøg.”" 
1Chronicles28:20 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd wɑ̈de Sølømøn köbbe kinni, “Pyëwí ko lïngi, kɑ yï ko böggi, kɑ yï cɑ̈gí ki gwøg, kɑ ko di gïn cuung yïn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ókøny yi en. Yï koo wiye piny, de yï ókøny yi en ceth gïti keny-ɑ óthumi gwøøg Kengø." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ókwër kí Kwɑrri Leebì gïg-ɑ gwøg yi gen kì Kengø ɑ́mëggi gen. Jøgwøg mø ngɑ̈ny gwøg ki jɑmmi mø gïïr nenn-ɑ kønyi yïn, ji bënn geki jyɑ̈ggi gen ying-ɑ thɑ́ ciggí.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Aköbbi burø bëne yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kinni, “Wɑ̈dɑ Sølømøn bene ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøk, de nudd e thiinh, o bong gïn ngɑ̈nye. Men bɑ gwøg me dwøng cɑrø, mɑ́ e pɑth ki ød dhɑnhø ɑ ger, den-ɑ́ Kengi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
1Chronicles29:2 Yɑ ɑ́rum ki cøngi jɑmmi geri Kengø, jɑmmɑni bɑ dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø kí dilɑl kí dødø, kí pɑ̈mmì, kí ópɑddi kïttì møg-ɑ mïllø, kí ópɑddi kïttì møg-ɑ ógwelø, kí ópɑddi kïtt-ɑ nyi tweg kì ri dörø yi bödhhi tweg." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kɑ yɑ omuujø thyew ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb kì ri jɑmm-ɑ bɑ møgɑ, kipe kɑ̀ mɑɑrɑ Kengi Jwøk." 
1Chronicles29:4 Yɑ ɑ́muuj ki dhɑm dhïw me ngenyø kibøli tøn miyø, kí ɑ́teng-ɑ dhïw ɑ́ men dhyɑɑw döri Kengø ɑ́ tøn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen," 
1Chronicles29:5 kwëe ógöög ki gïg-ɑ ógwøg yi bödhhì, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi ɑ́ dhɑb gwøg ki dhɑb, o gïn dwɑddi ɑ́ ɑ́tegø gwøg ki ɑ́tegø. Anɑn, ɑ́ men ɑ dwɑddi thegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tɑri pyëwe?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Codhe, kɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì geki jɑgg-ɑ thønhø, kí pëjji liny, kí jɑggi gøldwøng omuujø ki jɑmmì." 
1Chronicles29:7 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi gen kipe gwøøg Kengø bɑ Dhɑb ɑ́ tøn miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, kí ɑ́tegø ɑ́ tøn miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, kí dilɑl ɑ́ tøn miy ɑ́bïkyel kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kí dødø ɑ́ tøn ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́ngwen." 
1Chronicles29:8 Tyëng-ɑ́ yï gen ɑ́di ópɑddi kïtt-ɑ mïllø ɑ́mëggi gen tyëng-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmi Kengø, ɑ jɑngi gen bɑ Yekiel Kwɑɑr Leebì kì gøl Gercön." 
1Chronicles29:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́nëngi yi ji ki medi pëthi gen, ge ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med ki muujø. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng." 
1Chronicles29:10 Alenhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kì bøli teedø. Akööbe kinni, “Yɑ lenh-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyi wøn Yɑgob, yï ólejji gïti ɑtheer." 
1Chronicles29:11 Yï dwøng, o yï teeg cɑrø, yï bɑ mɑ̈r, yï døj. Gïg-ɑ mɑl kí møg-ɑ piny bɑ møgí bënn, o yï bɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑ jɑɑg jɑmmì bënn." 
1Chronicles29:12 Kɑ̈rì kí jɑmmì bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïí, jɑmmì bënn jɑɑg yi yïn kɑ döngí geki tegí, o ngɑn dwɑddi yi yïn ócuggø gwøgø yi yïn e dwøng o teeg." 
1Chronicles29:13 Anɑn, Jwøøg wøn, wø pwøj-ɑ yïn, o wø lenh-ɑ nyingí, nying-ɑ myëër ki lejjø." 
1Chronicles29:14 “Thyew, bong gïn ceg ki mëggi yïn yi yɑn wøki jiɑ, mɑ́ jɑmmì bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïí, o wø dögg-ɑ yïn jɑmmì mø ceg bëëdø gɑ møgí." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, wø ɑ́bëëd wø nɑ ji mø ying yïnø, o wø nɑ wëdhh. Cyɑ̈nggi wøn kì kömi piny nyi pödhø nɑ tïbø, o bong keny kyëëj wøn thøø." 
1Chronicles29:16 Yïn ɑ Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wøn keny bënn, ge bɑ møg gëddi yïn ki Kengø, men lejji wøn nyingí kwërø, de jɑmmɑni bënn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïí, o ge bɑ møgí bënn." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni pëthi ji bënn nyii rɑngø yi yïn, o pyëwí med kɑ tyëngtir. Gïg bënn mëggɑ’ yïn ki medi pyëwɑ, o ɑ́lidh yi yɑn kinni jií møg-ɑ keny bënn, ge ɑ́muuj-ɑ medi pëthi gen." 
1Chronicles29:18 Yïn ɑ Jwøøg kweyyi wøn Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob mïdhí rummɑni kì pëthi jií, kɑ pëthi gen lugí yïn." 
1Chronicles29:19 Nëngí wɑ̈dɑ Sølømøn ki tegi pyëw, o ciggí ómïdhe bënn, o gïg-ɑ ɑ́pyëlɑ bënn kipe geri Kengø tyëg yi en ki gwøgø.”" 
1Chronicles29:20 Codhe, kɑ ji köbbi yi Debïd kinni, “Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun!” Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lenhi yi ji bënn, kɑ Jwøøg kweyyi gen mɑl yi gen. Kɑ rɑ̈dh mɑl gen thyew." 
1Chronicles29:21 Dhuki cyɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ge ongɑ̈dø ki gëdhhì, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑ̈bbi yi gen ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Codhe, ɑmëggi rïnggɑni ji o gï cɑm gen. Kɑ ge ongɑ̈dø thyew ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́lïp, kí ónyögg ɑ́lïp, kí órömm ɑ́lïp møg-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm. Kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki kunyi møgi oløg," 
1Chronicles29:22 Kɑ ge orïïjø pëthi gen omedø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Sølømøn cigi mɑlø yi gen ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Arøøny Sølømøn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Dhɑdök røny ɑ́ ókwërø." 
1Chronicles29:23 Codhe, kɑ Sølømøn pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøm-ɑ ɑ́cöb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ójɑ̈ggø kì kej wïye Debïd, Sølømøn ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh me døøj, kɑ wør yi pödhi Isrɑil bëne." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ayïëy jøgdøngø geki pëjji liny, kí wɑ̈ddi Debïd møg-ɑ kyeelø kinni, Sølømøn ówør yi gen ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
1Chronicles29:25 Kɑ pödhø bëne göjji wøri Sølømøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø gwøge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh me pëddi döng, me lod rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g bënn kì Isrɑil." 
1Chronicles29:26 Isrɑil bëne ɑ́jɑɑg yi Debïd wɑ̈d Yesì 
1Chronicles29:27 ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Ájyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Kibrön ki runn ɑ́bïryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem." 
1Chronicles29:28 Debïd ɑ́thøw kì yij kɑ̈r e yöø, o ceg kɑ wørø. Wɑ̈de Sølømøn ɑ ɑ́røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
1Chronicles29:29 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd kër-ɑ cɑ̈ge gïti thume, bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi wɑ̈jji jøtöng ɑ løg Sɑmwel, kí Nɑthɑn, kí Gɑd." 
1Chronicles29:30 Gïg-ɑ ógwedø nyodh-ɑ yëth-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈ge, kí tege, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipere, kí per Isrɑil, kí pödhh-ɑ bute." 
2Chronicles1:1 Sølømøn wɑ̈d Rɑ̈dh Debïd, Isrɑil ɑ́jɑɑge kidøøj, ɑgyëdhii yi Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑgwøge gøn e teeg cɑrø." 
2Chronicles1:2 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn, ɑ løg pëjji liny møg-ɑ kwølli ɑ́lïp, kí møg-ɑ kwølli miy, kí jyɑ̈ggi gøldwøng, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì cwøl yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn," 
2Chronicles1:3 kinni kedhi gen Gibeon be mɑlli Jwøk kyeel kí en. Ge ɑ́kedh-ɑ kunɑni mɑ́ Kemi Kwër ying-ɑ kunɑni, eni kem-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kì yij pɑ̈l yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles1:4 (De Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem kì yij kemɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́gur piny yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Sɑndungɑni kì Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm.)" 
2Chronicles1:5 Këli dilɑl men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Bedhɑlel, wɑ̈d Urì, wɑ̈d Ur ɑ́bëëd ɑ Gibeon kì bøli Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlli kì kunɑni yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn geki ji bënn." 
2Chronicles1:6 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi yi Sølømøn ki gëdhhì gɑ ɑ́lïp, kɑ gï rɑ̈be kì wïj këli dilɑl." 
2Chronicles1:7 Wɑ̈rɑni ɑ ɑ́cwöb Jwøk kì bøli Sølømøn, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Á ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o mëggɑ yïn?”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Alöggi Sølømøn kinni, “Wïyɑ Debïd ɑ́mɑɑr yi yïn ki mendwøng, kɑ yɑ cïb yi yïn keje yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles1:9 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wïyɑ. Yɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh jií møg-ɑ gïïr cɑrø, o ge pɑ cuggi kwɑnø," 
2Chronicles1:10 de thödhí yɑn ki peli wïj geki dïdø men-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn, o jɑɑgɑ gen; ji-ɑ gïïr cɑrø ni møg ólwɑ̈ng yi yɑn ki jɑɑgø kidï!”" 
2Chronicles1:11 Aløøg kwɑ̈jji Sølømøn yi Jwøk kinni, “Yï ɑ́kwɑny gïn-ɑ dyër. Mɑ́ yï nuti cwøl-ɑ kɑ̈r, kí jɑmmì, wɑlɑ̀ mɑ̈r, kí nɑ̈gi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o yï nuti cwøl-ɑ bëëdø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, de yï ɑ́cwøl-ɑ peli wïj geki dïdø møg jɑɑg jiɑ møg-ɑ́ kömi gen ɑ́cïbɑ yïn, yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles1:12 Yï ómëggɑ peli wïj geki dïdø. O yï óthödhɑ thyew ki kɑ̈r, kí jɑmmì, kí mɑ̈r me dwøng, me nuti yodø yi rɑ̈nhì møg-ɑ ɑ́ying bølí kì tyeli mɑl, o óbong-ɑ dhɑnhø me yïe ódi jɑmmì mø ni møgɑni kì bɑngí.”" 
2Chronicles1:13 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Sølømøn kì Gibeon kun-ɑ di Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ døøg-ɑ Yerusɑlem kun-ɑ jɑɑge Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles1:14 Acønge yɑ̈th-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì gɑ ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́ngwen, kí jøliny kyënyì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew. Kɑ kwï jøliny cïb Yerusɑlem, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́döng cïb kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø." 
2Chronicles1:15 Kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, ngyënyø ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb ɑ́bëëd ge ngenyø ni lel kì Yerusɑlem. Kɑ sɑndɑl, yɑnh-ɑ myëër gwøge e gïïr ni ólɑm." 
2Chronicles1:16 Kyënyì nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ Rïp kí Kilikiyɑ̀ yi jøngyew mø Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn," 
2Chronicles1:17 o yɑ̈thi kyënyì nyi ngew-ɑ Rïp yi gen. Kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th kí kyënyì nyi lony gen ki ngëwwi rɑ̈nhi tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Arɑm e yɑ̈y ngew kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg miy ɑ́bïkyel, o kyeny ngew kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
2Chronicles2:1 Akööb Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kinni geer Kengø men yije mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O ree gëdde ki gøldwøng men yije bëëde. 
2Chronicles2:2 Akɑ̈bbe ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew møg yëg jɑmmi gyer, kí ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g møg tweg kïttì. Ádɑ ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́bïkyel møg nenni gwøg." 
2Chronicles2:3 Aödi Sølømøn yï Kirɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Suur ki wöödø kinni, “Køny wɑ riee ceth, ni kɑ ɑ́køny wun ri wun ki wïyɑ, Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kɑ ngëwwi yi yïn ki yenh sɑndɑl møg geer gøldwøng." 
2Chronicles2:4 Yɑ ger-ɑ Kengø me yije mɑllɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgɑ. Óbëëd ɑ́ kej kwër, keny yije mɑllii yi yɑn wøki jiɑ, ɑ rɑ̈bbii ki bɑkur, ɑ ngɑ̈ddii ki gëdhhì kì mwøl kí böörø, kí cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth, kí cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y, geki cyɑ̈nggi kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møg-ɑ kyeelø. Isrɑil ɑ́rum ki cegø yi en kinni nyi gwøøg møgɑni ceth, gïti ɑtheer." 
2Chronicles2:5 Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ gyer ki Kengø me dwøng cɑrø, mɑ́ Jwøgee dwøng cɑrø kibøli Jwögg-ɑ kyeelø." 
2Chronicles2:6 Dɑ́ men ɑ cuggi gëddi Jwøk ki Kengø kidyër, e men-ɑ́ mɑl ki dönge bëne nøg kipere! Yɑ bɑ men, ɑ cuggɑ ki gëddii ki Kengø? Yɑ ger-ɑ keny rɑ̈bbii ki bɑkur yøw!" 
2Chronicles2:7 Anɑn ödí yɑn ki bødhø me ngɑ̈ny gwøg ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, kí dilɑl, kí dødø. O ngɑ̈ny gwøg ki ógudh møg-ɑ bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl kí møg kwɑrø. Bønhɑni ógöögø geki bödhhi Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem, gen ɑ bödhh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi wïyɑ Debïd." 
2Chronicles2:8 Ödí yɑn ki yenh sɑndɑl, kí ɑmedh, kí yenh sɑndɑl kì Lubnɑn. Jøgwøg møgɑ óörɑ yï wun, o ge ngud gen kyeel ki yenh geki jøgí," 
2Chronicles2:9 o ge pyël gen yenh-ɑ geer Kengø men-ɑ ger yi yɑn e dwøng, o myër." 
2Chronicles2:10 Yï óödɑ ki gemè ɑ́ tøn ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí ceir ɑ́ tøn ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew, kí møgi oløg ɑ́ tøn ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, kí møøw dhetun ɑ́ tøn ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g.”" 
2Chronicles2:11 Aløøg møgɑni yi Kirɑm ki wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́gwëde Sølømøn kinni, “Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie mɑɑr yi en, yï ɑ́rønye yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh," 
2Chronicles2:12 Lenhi wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny! Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́nënge ki wɑ̈d me wïje pel, me tir, me dïdø, me göögø ɑnɑn kì ri geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí gëddi ree ki gøldwøng." 
2Chronicles2:13 Yï örɑ’ bødhø me dwøng, me wïje pel, me dïdø, me cwøl ɑ́ Kurɑm." 
2Chronicles2:14 Meye bɑ nyɑɑr gøl Dɑn, o wïye bɑ jɑl Suur. Ngɑ̈ny gwøg ki jɑmmì ki dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø kí dilɑl, kí dødø, kí kïttì, kí pɑ̈mmì, o ócuggø gwøg ki ógudh-ɑ bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, kí møg kwɑrø. O ócuggø cwɑ̈j ki ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm. Ócuggø gwøg ki wɑ̈thi jɑmm-ɑ nyi tweg bënn, o gïn-ɑ köbbii nyii gwøgø yi en ceth. Wiy gööge geki bödhhí, kí bödhh-ɑ ɑ́göggi wïyí, Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
2Chronicles2:15 De ɑnɑn örí wøn gemè, kí ceir, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn." 
2Chronicles2:16 Wø ónguddi piny kì Lubnɑn, ki yenh sɑndɑl møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn. Ge ógwøg kì Yɑpɑ̀ gɑ óthyɑg, o ge ókïdhi Yerusɑlem.”" 
2Chronicles2:17 Kɑ tyëngpɑth bënn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì piny Isrɑil gwed yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ni gwen-ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki gwedø yi wïye Debïd. Kɑ kwɑnni tyëngpɑth ogöögø ki ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́dɑ̈g. 
2Chronicles2:18 Kɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kì kelli gen mëgge gwøøg yëgi jɑmmi gyer, o ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g tweg gen kïttì kì pɑ̈l. Kɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́bïkyel kwɑnye gɑ jøg nenni gwøg." 
2Chronicles3:1 Codhe, ɑcɑ̈gi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ki geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì Yerusɑlem kì wïj Kïti Moriyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́cwööb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli wïye Debïd, kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ rɑri Arɑunɑ̀ jɑl Yebus." 
2Chronicles3:2 Kengø ɑ́cɑg ki gerø yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kì ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì ri ngween runne ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles3:3 Keng-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen." 
2Chronicles3:4 Øn-ɑ yïëbbi Kengø bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen ni lɑ̈ji Kengø, o döre bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́ngwen. O yije bɑ ɑmwøn ki dhɑb." 
2Chronicles3:5 Yij øn-ɑ dwøng ótɑgø ki pɑ̈mmi sɑndɑl, o ógøjø ki dhɑm dhïw, kí ngïjji yenh benø geki ɑ́cwecwel." 
2Chronicles3:6 Kengø ɑ́dhyɑw yi rɑ̈dh ki kïtt-ɑ myër møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì piny Pɑrbɑim. 
2Chronicles3:7 Döri Kengø kí rïwwi ɑwɑjj geki thïggi Kengø gï ɑ́gøje ki dhɑb. Kɑ ri dörø gögge ki ngïjji kerobb. 
2Chronicles3:8 Kej Kwërdwøng bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen e nɑ lɑ̈ji Kengø." 
2Chronicles3:9 Gedd ɑ́gwøg kɑ grɑmm mø dhɑb miy ɑ́bïj kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, dörri udd-ɑ mɑl ɑ́gøj kɑ dhɑb thyew." 
2Chronicles3:10 Rɑ̈dh jøgwøg ɑ́köbbe kinni göög gen ki ngïjji kerobb ki dødø, kɑ ge gøj ki dhɑb, kɑ ge cïb Kej Kwërdwøng," 
2Chronicles3:11 ge cungi ge nenn-ɑ dhø ød. Ákyel obërre bɑ ɑ́ryew, obërø ɑ́kyel bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, obërrɑni ópedhø, o obëri men nywɑll-ɑ obëri men-ɑ kyeelø, o obër-ɑ kyeelø nywɑll-ɑ dörø." 
2Chronicles3:12  
2Chronicles3:13  
2Chronicles3:14 Gëëng Kej Kwërdwøng ɑ́gwøg kɑ ógødh kor-ɑ yöm, e bɑ ɑgwel ki kïddì mø bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl kí møg kwɑrø, o ree ókwïnnø ki ngïjji kerobb." 
2Chronicles3:15 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́göög ki löjji dilɑl ɑ́ryew, ɑ́kyel bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, kɑ gï cïbe bøli Kengø, wɑ̈thi löjjɑni dɑ ɑtɑ̈nyy mø bɑ̈ri gen bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
2Chronicles3:16 Wɑ̈thi löjjɑni ryeet ódhyɑwø ki ɑ́cwecwel, kí ngïjji nywøli yɑdh romɑn møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki ngyënyø dilɑl gɑ miyø." 
2Chronicles3:17 Kɑ löjjɑni cïb dhø Kengø. Kɑ men-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl cɑg ɑ́ Yɑkin, kɑ men-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø cɑg ɑ́ Boɑdh." 
2Chronicles4:1 Këli lɑm mi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ógerø kɑ dilɑl, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen ɑ́ óbɑr, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
2Chronicles4:2 Kɑ ogöögø ki luy me bɑ ɑ́dulø ki dilɑl, men yije nyi kïdhi pï. Rïwi dööle bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o bɑ̈ri dööle bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
2Chronicles4:3 Wɑ̈thi tøggi luyɑni yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g bëne bɑ ɑdöl ki lwøbb ɑ́ryew mø ngïjjì, ɑ́kyel kì kömi men-ɑ kyeelø. Gïg-ɑ ógweed kömi luyɑni bɑ ngïjji wɑ̈dhh." 
2Chronicles4:4 Luyɑni ócïb-ɑ kömi wɑ̈dhhi dilɑl pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ge nenn-ɑ wɑ̈g, ɑ́dɑ̈g nenn-ɑ tung ɑ́kyel." 
2Chronicles4:5 Luyɑni bɑ dhïl ki mïlimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj, nyɑ̈re nɑ nyɑ̈ri kubɑyɑ̀, ɑ́ ɑtɑ̈ny ni okøgg. Luyɑni yije røm-ɑ yi pï røthøl ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew." 
2Chronicles4:6 Agöög gen ki ɑ́tɑ̈yyì pyɑ̈rø, kɑ ɑ́bïj cïb wïj tuung Kengø kì wɑɑng wuudø, kɑ ɑ́bïj-ɑ kyeelø cïb wïj tuung Kengø kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Pïgɑni nyi lwøøg-ɑ rïngg-ɑ rɑ̈b gɑ gëdhhì. Pïg-ɑ yij luy dilɑl nyi löög-ɑ yi ókwër." 
2Chronicles4:7 Athɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ki teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø bɑ dhɑb, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii ceth, kí tɑrɑbedhh pyɑ̈rø kɑ ge cïb yij Kengø, ɑ́bïj kì tuung kí ɑ́bïj kì tung-ɑ kyeelø. Ge ɑ́thɑ̈ɑ̈dh thyew ki tɑ̈mmi dhɑb miyø." 
2Chronicles4:8  
2Chronicles4:9 Agëddi ókwër ki ódɑ̈rø kì yij Kengø, kí ódɑ̈rø megø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g. Thïggi ódɑ̈rrɑni bɑ ɑmwøn ki dilɑl." 
2Chronicles4:10 Luuy dilɑl ɑ́cïb-ɑ tuung Kengø men-ɑ døøg wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. 
2Chronicles4:11 Kurɑm ɑ́göög ki puggì, kí ɑtögg, kí tɑ̈mmì, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kinni gï ógwøge gɑ mø Kengø, kɑ gï tyëge ki gwøgø bënn. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge bɑ: löjj ɑ́ryew Atɑ̈nyyi wɑ̈thi löjjɑni ryeet Bøøy dilɑl mi ɑtɑ̈nyyi löjjɑni ryeet Ngïjji nywøli romɑn gɑ miy ɑ́ngwen, møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb ri ɑtɑ̈nyɑni gɑ lwøbb ɑ́ryew Yɑ̈thi dilɑl gɑ pyɑ̈rø Átɑ̈yyì pyɑ̈rø Luuy dilɑl Wɑ̈dhh pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew møg-ɑ kömi gen ócïb luy dilɑl puggì, kí ɑtögg, kí gɑ̈bbì Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́thɑ̈dh-ɑ yi bødhø Kurɑm ki dilɑl me dhïw gɑ mø Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ceth." 
2Chronicles4:12  
2Chronicles4:13  
2Chronicles4:14  
2Chronicles4:15  
2Chronicles4:16  
2Chronicles4:17 Jɑmmɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg-ɑ thwør-ɑ kɑɑm Suköth geki Dhered kì kömi Nɑm Urdun ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi rɑ̈dh. 
2Chronicles4:18 Jɑmmɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg yi Sølømøn ge gïïr, o pegi dilɑl nuti rømø mɑ́ e gïïr cɑrø." 
2Chronicles4:19 Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ɑ́göög ki jɑmmi Kengø ki dhɑb, ɑ løg këli lɑm, kí tɑrɑbedhhi ópun men-ɑ nyi mëggi Jwøk," 
2Chronicles4:20 kí teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ geki lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø dhɑm-ɑ dhïw møg-ɑ nyi lyel kì bøli Kej Kwërdwøng, ni kɑ ókwøbii ceth," 
2Chronicles4:21 kí ngïjji okøgg, kí lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, ki dikɑ̈bbì;" 
2Chronicles4:22 kí gïg-ɑ nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, kí tɑ̈mmì, kí ópɑ̈nni bɑkur, kí ɑtöggi mɑc. Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg kɑ dhɑm dhïw. Thïggi dhø Kengø møg-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g geki thïgi Kej Kwërdwøng bɑ ɑmwøn ki dhɑb." 
2Chronicles5:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ki gwøøg Kengø bëne, ɑcïbe jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́thyëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi wïye Rɑ̈dh Debïd yije, ɑ løg ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí jɑmmì møøgø." 
2Chronicles5:2 Codhe, ɑcøng jøgdøngø, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí jɑgg-ɑ thønhø bënn yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn. Gï ɑ́cwööle Yerusɑlem be kïdhi Sɑnduug Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Kengø, kì kɑɑl Debïd kì Dhɑyøn." 
2Chronicles5:3 Ge ɑ́cugi bøli rɑ̈dh bënn kì bøli kej Kwër Akɑnnì. 
2Chronicles5:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi pëjjì bënn, ɑtïng Sɑnduug Cigg yi Kwɑrri Leebì," 
2Chronicles5:5 kɑ gø kïdhi gen Kengø. Thyew kɑ Kemi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jɑmme bënn tëër Kengø yi ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì. 
2Chronicles5:6 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn ge ócugø kì bøli Sɑnduug Cigg, kɑ ongɑ̈dø ki gëdhhì mø ngenyø; dyëg, kí dhög." 
2Chronicles5:7 Codhe, kɑ Sɑnduug Cigg tïng yi ókwër kɑ gø cïb gen Kej Kwërdwøng, kì thɑ̈thi obërri kerobb." 
2Chronicles5:8 Sɑndug geki lødh-ɑ nyi byellii bɑ ɑgëng yi obërri gen møg-ɑ ópedhø. 
2Chronicles5:9 Wɑ̈thi lødh nenn-ɑ yi ngɑn cungi kì yij Kengø, e rwöm ki dhø Kej Kwërdwøng, de ge pɑ nënni kì wɑ̈g. (Ge nud kì kenyɑni gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn.)" 
2Chronicles5:10 Ábong-ɑ gïn nud kì yij Sɑnduug Cigg, den-ɑ́ ópɑ̈nni kït ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Mosɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́ying gen Kïti Sinɑy, keny-ɑ ɑ́lwööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kí tyëng Isrɑil ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ókwër ɑ́bëëd ri gen kwëër gen. Kí bödhhi thøm; Kwɑrri Leebì bënn, ɑ løg Asɑp, kí Ëmɑn, kí Yeduthun, kí tyëng kɑ̈lli gen, ge rug-ɑ ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm. Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́cung ɑ tung-ɑ døøg kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì kej kwër kí bullì, kí thøm. Kelli gen dɑ ókwër miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew mø kudhø ki kɑ̈ngì. Cwɑggi tyëng-ɑ wör ɑ́lwøngi kɑ kɑ̈ngì, kí bullì, kí jɑmmi wör møøgø kɑ ɑ́wör gen ge lenh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑ́ e døøj o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee gït-ɑ ɑtheer.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi ókwër ki bëën wɑ̈g kì Kengø, kɑ Kengø yije ceg-ɑ ì loj yi pöölø, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j omënyø kì yij pøølɑni. Kɑ ókwër ówïyø ki gwøg mɑ́ Kengø ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles5:12  
2Chronicles5:13  
2Chronicles5:14  
2Chronicles6:1 Codhe, ɑkwɑ̈jji Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kinni, “Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ɑ́myeg bëëdø kì yethi pøøl, kí bëëdø kì yij muudhø." 
2Chronicles6:2 Yï ɑ́gëddɑ ki Kengø ɑ́ keny bëëd yi yïn gïti ɑtheer.” 
2Chronicles6:3 Tyëng Isrɑil bënn ɑ́cung ɑ kenyɑni kɑ rɑ̈dh ree luge yï gen, ɑcwööle gyëdhhi Jwøk kömi gïn." 
2Chronicles6:4 Akööbe kinni, “Pwøju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil! Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbe wïyɑ Rɑ̈dh Debïd ɑ́mïdhe, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe gøn kinni," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ jiɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp gïti ɑnɑn, bong kɑɑl mɑ ɑ́myegɑ kì piny Isrɑil ɑ́ keny gëddi ki ød me yije ómɑlli yɑn, o ɑ́bong-ɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yienyɑ ɑ́ ngɑn jɑɑg jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles6:6 De ɑnɑn Yerusɑlem ɑ́myegɑ ɑ́ keny mɑlli yɑn, kɑ yï kwɑnyɑ Debïd, yïn ɑ́ ngɑn jɑɑg jiɑ.’ ”" 
2Chronicles6:7 Akööb Sølømøn kinni, “Wïyɑ Debïd ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ geri Kengø ɑ́ men yije mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil," 
2Chronicles6:8 de ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi gïjø me døøj, kɑ ɑ́dwɑddí gëddi yɑn ki kengø," 
2Chronicles6:9 de koo ger-ɑ yi yïn, bɑ wɑ̈dí ceth ɑ óger Kengɑ.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 “Anɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwøbbe ɑ́mïdhe, kej wïyɑ ɑ́kwɑnyɑ yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑgerɑ Keng-ɑ yije mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles6:11 Sɑnduug Cigg men-ɑ yije di ópɑddi kïtti lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́cïbɑ yij Kengø.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Codhe, ɑcungi Sølømøn kì bøli këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil bënn, kɑ cingge thɑɑnge mɑl." 
2Chronicles6:13 Sølømøn ɑ́bëëd e rum gwøg ki gyeem dilɑl. Gyemɑni bɑ óør, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ gø cïbe dïdyëri ódɑ̈rø. Ayedhe wïj gyemɑni, kɑ cønge rume piny e onennø yi ji bënn, kɑ cingge thɑɑnge mɑl."
