2Chronicles6:14 Akwɑ̈jje kinni, “Bong Jwøk me ni yïn kì mɑl kí piny bëne yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil. Lwömí ki jií ɑ́mïdhí, kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií nyudhí gen, kɑ̀ bëëd gen ge gɑ̈nn-ɑ yïn ki pëthi gen bënn." 
2Chronicles6:15 Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wïyɑ Debïd ɑ́mïdhí ceth, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bënn ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Chronicles6:16 Anɑn mïdhí kwøbbí møg-ɑ kyeelø, møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wïyɑ Debïd, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi yïn kinni, rɑ̈nh-ɑ ójɑɑg Isrɑil kì yethi rïjj bënn, óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri kwɑrre, keløg ciggí ómïdhi yi gen kidøøj ni kɑ ɑ́mïdhe gïn." 
2Chronicles6:17 De ɑnɑn wiy møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí bɑ̈ngí Debïd pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen bënn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles6:18 “De yïn ɑ Jwøk, yï ócuggø bëëdø kì kömi piny kì kelli ji, e men-ɑ́ mɑl ki dönge bëne nøg kiperí? Yï røm-ɑ yij Keng-ɑ geer yɑn èn?" 
2Chronicles6:19 Wuö Jwøgɑ, yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ngí. Lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ, kɑ gïg-ɑ kwɑjjɑ mëggí yɑn." 
2Chronicles6:20 Kor Kengø men kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r. Yï ɑ́kööb kinni, bene keny-ɑ yije ómɑlli yïn èn. Nyi lïngí kwøbbɑ kenyi kwɑ̈jjɑ wïjɑ lugi yɑn Kengø men." 
2Chronicles6:21 Lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ kí kwɑ̈jji jií tyëng Isrɑil kenyi lugi gen ri gen keny, kɑ ge ókwɑ̈jjø, lïngí kwɑ̈jji wøn kɑ lɑɑwí dwöög piny kipe wøn kì pɑɑrí mɑl." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Keløg dhɑnhø óbɑ̈jjø ki wɑɑd gen, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wïj këli lɑm mií kì Kengø men, kipe kinni o könge kinni yïe bɑ̈r," 
2Chronicles6:23 lïngí kwøbbe kì pɑɑrí mɑl, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gøøny gen liidh, cɑy ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji ki cɑ́y-ɑ kyëëw ki bɑ̈jje, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ yïe bɑ̈r wiy." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Keny-ɑ ótyɑɑm jií tyëng Isrɑil yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́røngi kì bølí, kɑ ge dwöög-ɑ köörí, kɑ ge bï-ɑ yij Kengø men, ge yömm-ɑ yïí kipe dwöögi lɑɑwí piny," 
2Chronicles6:25 lïngí kwøbbi gen kì pɑɑrí mɑl, kɑ ge dwöög piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí gen geki kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Keny-ɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈n kødh yi yïn, kipe kɑ ɑ́røngi jií kì bølí, kɑ ge óyewø, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen lugi gen Kengi men, ge kwɑjj-ɑ yïn ki möölø," 
2Chronicles6:27 lïngí kwøbbi gen kì pɑɑrí mɑl, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ lɑɑwí dwöög piny kipe orøøg bɑ̈nggí tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge pwönyí ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër, kɑ kødh ör kömi piny men, eni piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí jií ɑ́ mi gen gïti ɑtheer." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Keny-ɑ ónud kɑ̈j kì pödhø, wɑlɑ̀ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g, wɑlɑ̀ byel orënyø yi yømø me teg, wɑlɑ̀ ge cɑm-ɑ yi bɑ̈nyø, wɑlɑ̀ kenyi pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi jií yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, wɑlɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì," 
2Chronicles6:29 lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen. Keløg jií, wɑlɑ̀ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jií tyëng Isrɑil cingge tïnge’ mɑl e wïje lug en Kengø, e ókwɑ̈jjø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe," 
2Chronicles6:30 lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen, lïngí kwøbbi gen kì pɑɑrí mɑl, kɑ lɑɑwí dwöög piny kipe gen. Bɑ yï ketí ɑ ngɑ̈nyi rumm-ɑ ying pyëw dhɑnhø. Göggí dhɑnhø ki gïn-ɑ kyëëw ki en," 
2Chronicles6:31 kipe kinni o yï wør yi ji, o yï gɑ̈nni yi gen ceth, kɑ̀ bëëd gen kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí kweyyi wøn." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Keløg perí olïngø yi tyëngpɑth kì kun lɑ̈wi, kinni yï dwøng o yï teg, o yï pɑ nyi cwööng ki kunyø, kɑ ge bï-ɑ be kwɑ̈jjø kì Kengø men," 
2Chronicles6:33 lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen. Lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen kì pɑɑrí mɑl, kɑ ge göggí gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi gen, kipe kinni, o yï yod yi tyëng kömi piny, o yï gɑ̈n yi gen, ni kɑ̀ gɑ̈ɑ̈n yïn yi jií tyëng Isrɑil. O yod yi gen kinni Kengø men-ɑ geer yɑn èn, bene keny-ɑ mɑlli yïn." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Keny-ɑ óköbbí jií kinni nyïɑ̈ggi gen ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ yï kwɑjji yi gen, kì keny-ɑ ódi gen, e wɑ̈thi gen lug gen kɑɑldwøng, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yïn, kí Kengø men-ɑ ɑ́gërrɑ yïn," 
2Chronicles6:35 lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen. Lïngí kwøbbi gen kì pɑɑrí mɑl, kɑ ge wëggí tyɑ̈mø." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Keny-ɑ órøngi jií kì bølí, kɑ bong-ɑ ngɑn nuti røngø, keny-ɑ órënyi pyëwí kɑ ge wëggí tyɑmø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ ge køøl pödhø megø gɑ ɑmɑgg, cɑgg pönhɑni lɑ̈wi," 
2Chronicles6:37 lïngí kwɑ̈jji jií. Keløg ge óyewø kì pönhɑni kɑ yï kwɑjji yi gen, ge yïëyø ki bɑ̈jji gen, lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles6:38 Keløg ge óyewø kì pönhɑni e bong wëënyø kì pëthi gen, kɑ yï kwɑjji yi gen e wɑ̈thi gen lug gen piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí kweyyi wøn, kí kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yïn èn, kí Keng-ɑ ɑ́gërrɑ yïn èn," 
2Chronicles6:39 lïngí kwɑ̈jji gen. Lïngí kwøbbi gen kì pɑɑrí mɑl, kɑ pyëwí lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki gen, kɑ lɑɑwí dwöög piny kipe orøøg jií bënn." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Anɑn yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, lug thɑ̈wwí, kɑ kwɑny-ɑ kwɑjji yïn yi wøn kì keny lïngí." 
2Chronicles6:41 Dhwöödh ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yï kedhí yij Kengø, kɑ yï bëëd kì yije wuki Sɑnduug Cigg, ɑ bɑ ngïji tegí gïti ɑtheer. Nyi gëdhhí ókwërrí gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen bënn, kɑ wiy pëthi jií bënn med gen kipe kor-ɑ koor gen." 
2Chronicles6:42 Rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yïn ko bɑɑny yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pɑrrí mɑɑr-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr bɑ̈ngí Debïd.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ki kwɑ̈jjø, ɑbëën mɑc piny e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, kɑ gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́muuj rɑ̈be, ɑmeeny yij Kengø yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles7:2 Ókwër ɑ́cög ge pɑ kedhi Kengø, mɑ́ Kengø ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles7:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh mɑc e ódëëmø kì mɑl yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ Kengø opɑ̈ngø yi cɑr, ɑbøødh gen ri gen piny wɑ̈thi gen ónywɑ̈ddø’ piny, ge mɑll-ɑ Jwøk, e olenhø yi gen kipe døøje, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee men-ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi gïti ɑtheer." 
2Chronicles7:4 Codhe, ɑnëngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì yi Sølømøn, geki ji bënn." 
2Chronicles7:5 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ongɑ̈dø ki dhög ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, kí dyëg ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gɑ gëdhhì. Kɑ Kengø thyey yi Sølømøn geki ji bënn." 
2Chronicles7:6 Ókwër ɑ́cung ɑ kɑ̈jji gen ge nenn-ɑ nyingi gen geki Kwɑrri Leebì. Kwɑrri Leebì lejj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jɑmmi wör møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd gɑ møg nyi lenhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wöri mɑ̈ddø kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee bong cöge, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg gen yi Debïd. Akoodh kɑ̈ngì yi Kwɑrri Leebì, ji ócungø bënn." 
2Chronicles7:7 Athyeey ódɑ̈r-ɑ bøli Kengø yi Sølømøn, ɑmuuje kì kenyɑni ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí byëlø, kí dwɑ̈li gënhi mër. Gï ɑ́gwøge kinøw, mɑ́ këli lɑm men-ɑ ɑ́gwøge ki dilɑl thiinh, gëdhhɑni bënn pɑ cuggi rømi wïje." 
2Chronicles7:8 Agwøøg Kwëër Akɑnnì ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew yi Sølømøn geki tyëng Isrɑil bënn. Ádɑ ji mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l pödhh mø lɑ̈wi ge gïïr, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Amɑth kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti wïj keew Rïp, kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
2Chronicles7:9 Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, kɑ ji bënn bï-ɑ be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ këli lɑm ɑ́thyey kɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, o Kwëër Akɑnnì ɑ́tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
2Chronicles7:10 Kì cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, ɑör ji myërri gen yi Sølømøn. Akedh gen pëthi gen med cɑrø kipe gïgdøj bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́göggi tyëng Isrɑil geki Debïd, kí Sølømøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles7:11 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum Kengø geki gøldwøng ki gerø yi Sølømøn, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́rømme bënn kipe gïn tyëge ki tɑrø," 
2Chronicles7:12 ɑcigi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cwöbø kì bøle kì wɑ̈r, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngɑ, Kengø men ɑ́yïëyɑ ɑ́ keny yije ómëggi yɑn gëdhhì." 
2Chronicles7:13 Keny-ɑ ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ kødh, kɑ bɑ̈nyø örɑ be cɑmi byel, wɑlɑ̀ kömi jiɑ örɑ’ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g," 
2Chronicles7:14 keløg yɑ okwɑjjø yi gen, kɑ ge óyewø ki orøg, kwøbbi gen ólïngɑ kì pɑɑrɑ mɑl, kɑ lɑɑwɑ dwöögɑ piny kipe orøøg gen, kɑ pödhi gen døøgɑ ki tyenyø." 
2Chronicles7:15 Kengø men ónennɑ, yïthhɑ óbëëd ge kyëën yɑn kipe lïngi gïg-ɑ ókwɑjji kì keny bënn." 
2Chronicles7:16 Mɑ́ Kengɑni ɑ́rum ki gerø, kɑ kwërɑ ɑ́ keny yije ómɑlli yɑn gïti ɑtheer, ónennɑ kɑ korɑ kì bøli kɑ̈jj bënn." 
2Chronicles7:17 Keløg yɑ ógöggi yi wun e yethi wun bong ɑ́dud ni kɑ ɑ́mïdhi ciggɑ yi Debïd, kɑ gïg-ɑ nyi köbbɑ wun nyi gwøg yi wun," 
2Chronicles7:18 dhøgɑ ómïdhɑ kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wïyí Debïd kinni Isrɑil óbëëd e jɑɑg-ɑ yi kwɑrre kì yethi rïjj bënn; gwøgɑ ceth. 
2Chronicles7:19 De keløg jií óbɑ̈nyi ki mïdhi ciggɑ geki kwøbb-ɑ mëgg-ɑ wun, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg mø pɑth," 
2Chronicles7:20 wu ónyiigɑ kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun, kɑ Keng-ɑ ɑ́kwër yi yɑn kinni yije ómɑlli yɑn, wiyɑ piny thyew. Kɑ Kengɑni gɑggi yi ji, kɑ ogöögø e bong nyinge." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Kengø dwøng ɑnɑn, de órënyi kɑ ji-ɑ nyi kɑ̈l bute nyi ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈ngø, kɑ ri gen nyi pyënyi gen kinni, ‘Ede pönhï geki Kengø men ɑ gwøøg gen kinni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Kɑ ji ólöggø kinni, ‘Bɑ kipe kɑ ɑ́wiy gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen, eni Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kweyyi gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø. Akɑ̈ni kömi gen ki ryɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Geri Kengø geki gøldwøng yi Sølømøn ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. 
2Chronicles8:2 Kɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Rɑ̈dh Kirɑm døøge ki gerø thyew, ɑöde ki tyëng Isrɑil møg bëëdø kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
2Chronicles8:3 Kɑ myërri Amɑth geki Dhöbɑ̀ mɑg yi Sølømøn," 
2Chronicles8:4 kɑ kɑɑl Pɑlmur kì yij ryɑng gëdde ki dörø me teg. Kɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ myërri Amɑth bënn døøge ki gerø gɑ møg yethi gen nyi mïdhi jɑmmì. 
2Chronicles8:5 Møg bɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ ɑ́døøg ki gerø thyew yi Sølømøn: Bet Örøn men-ɑ kwøømø, kí Bet Örøn men-ɑ yij tör (Kɑ̈ddɑni bɑ ɑwen ki dör mø teg, o dhøggi gen dɑ thïggi ngyënyø dødø)," 
2Chronicles8:6 kí kɑɑl Bɑɑlɑth, geki kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø bënn møg-ɑ yethi gen nyi mïdhi jɑmmì, kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ yethi gen bëëd yi kyënyì geki jøkyënyì. Kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde gerø bënn, gï ɑ́gere, kì Yerusɑlem, kí Lubnɑn, kí myërr-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg yi en bënn." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ji-ɑ ɑ́döng bënn kì ri jurr-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ løg tyëng Kit, kí tyëng Amör, kí tyëng Perïdh, kí tyëng Kib, kí tyëng Yebus," 
2Chronicles8:8 ɑ løg tyëngpiny møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti nɑ̈gø yi tyëng Isrɑil, ge ɑ́kwɑny yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn gɑ jøtïj gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Chronicles8:9 Tyëng Isrɑil nuti gwøgø gɑ jøtïj, de ge ɑ́kwɑny gɑ jøliny, kí pëjji liny, kí jøg kwølli yɑ̈th-ɑ pyejji yi kyënyì." 
2Chronicles8:10 Ji miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj ɑ ɑ́kwɑny gɑ tyëng-ɑ nenni gwøøg gyer ki ud mø bɑ̈nni. 
2Chronicles8:11 Cï Sølømøn, nyɑɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, gø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le kì kɑɑl Debïd, kɑ gø kïdhe øn-ɑ ɑ́gërre gøn. Akööbe kinni, “Ngɑnɑni pɑ cuggi bëëdø kì gøldwøng men-ɑ bɑ mi Debïd rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, mɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi Sɑnduug Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ki kwërø.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Sølømøn ɑ́muuj ki gëdhhì kì wïj këli lɑm men-ɑ ɑ́ger yi en kì bøli Kengø. 
2Chronicles8:13 Ámuuj ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne ni kɑ ókwøbii kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀, kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi kwër bënn, ɑ løg Sɑbɑth, kí Kwëër Cɑ̈gi Dwɑ̈y, kí Kwëër Cɑ̈gi Run, kí Kwëër Olwëny, ki Kwëër Kɑj, kí Kwëër Akɑnnì." 
2Chronicles8:14 Møg bɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd, wïyi Sølømøn, cigg-ɑ ɑ́pyëële gwøøg ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ nyi køny ókwër ki wör, geki gwøøg gen kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Apyële jøg-ɑ nyi lunyi kori dhøggi Kengø kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Debïd bɑ̈ng Jwøk." 
2Chronicles8:15 Cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Debïd kipe gwøøg ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kí mïdhi jɑmmì bënn, nuti pyeem gen." 
2Chronicles8:16 Kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi Sølømøn tyëge bënn, cɑg kì ri këëli tyeli ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny, gïti kɑ ɑ́thumi gwøngɑni bëne." 
2Chronicles8:17 Codhe, ɑkedhi Sølømøn Edhïön Geber kí Elɑth, kì kömi Gøøli Agɑbɑ̀, kì piny Edöm." 
2Chronicles8:18 Sølømøn ɑ́ödi ki yɑ̈thi nɑm yi Rɑ̈dh Kirɑm, yɑ̈thɑni ɑ́kyeww-ɑ yi jøge, jøg-ɑ ngɑ̈ny këw, o nɑm ngɑ̈nyi yi gen. Ge ɑ́kedhi Opir geki jø Sølømøn. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn muuj gen ki dhɑb kïllì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj." 
2Chronicles9:1 Kɑ per Sølømøn lïngi yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cebɑ̀ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, ɑkedhe Yerusɑlem be rɑngii ki pyëj mø teg. Rɑ̈nhɑni ɑ́bï Yerusɑlem e lwøngg-ɑ yi ji mø ngenyø. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki ɑmɑl mø kömi gen di yenh-ɑ yømi gen med, kí tigg mø per gen teg, kí dhɑb me gïïr cɑrø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø menɑni buti Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, kɑ gø pyënye ki pyëj møg-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi en." 
2Chronicles9:2 Aløøg gen bënn yi Sølømøn, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́dhɑlii." 
2Chronicles9:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh peli wïj Sølømøn yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cebɑ̀ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, kɑ gøldwøng men-ɑ ɑ́gere lidhe," 
2Chronicles9:4 kí gïgcɑmm-ɑ tɑwe, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd yi jyɑ̈gge, kí kër-ɑ ópyëël gwøøg bɑ̈ngge, kí ógudh-ɑ rug yi gen, kí gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuje kì Kengø, kɑ pyëwe ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
2Chronicles9:5 Aköbbe rɑ̈dh kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi yɑn kì pödhɑ kiperí geki peli wïjí bɑ dyër." 
2Chronicles9:6 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nuti yïëyø ki møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn gïti kɑ ɑ́bëënɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki wɑngɑ. Møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kì ri kwøbbi peli wïjí nøg kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́yodɑ kì keny." 
2Chronicles9:7 Jií ri gen dɑ gyëdh, o jøgwøg møg-ɑ göggi yïn ri gen dɑ gyëdh, mɑ́ ge bëëd ɑ butí ge lïng-ɑ kwøbbi peli wïjí." 
2Chronicles9:8 Lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí! Kipe kɑ̀ med pyëwe ki yïn, kɑ yï gwøge yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, o yï jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki nyinge. Mɑ́ jie tyëng Isrɑil mɑɑr yi en, o ge okorø yi en ceth. Yï ɑ́gwøge yïn-ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen kipe kinni o yï ómïdhí cigge geki gøggi dyër.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn nëngi yi rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø ki kïlli dhɑb ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med geki tigg-ɑ per gen teg mø ngenyø ki mendwøng. Bong yenh mø yømi gen med mø lod møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cebɑ̀ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø." 
2Chronicles9:10 Jø Rɑ̈dh Kirɑm geki jø Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑ̈ddi Opir ki dhɑb, ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni thyew ki yenh ɑ́lɑl kí tigg-ɑ per gen teg." 
2Chronicles9:11 Yenh ɑ́lɑl ɑ́göög yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ki pɑ̈ltyel mø Kengø kí gøldwøng, kí thøm. Bong gïg ni møgɑni mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi ki lidhø kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles9:12 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Cebɑ̀ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø ɑ́mëggi gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwøle bënn yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn. Møgɑni bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi kömi jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́wil ki møg-ɑ ɑ́muuje Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn. Codhe, ɑdøøge piny Cebɑ̀ ki yɑy-ɑ ɑ́lwöögii." 
2Chronicles9:13 Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn nyii yïddø kì run ɑ́kyel ki dhɑb mø bɑ kïllì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g," 
2Chronicles9:14 reb ki gwɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi kwɑny kì yï jøngyëwø. Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ɑ́muuj thyew ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb yi rɑ̈nhi Árɑb geki jɑggi pödhi Isrɑil. 
2Chronicles9:15 Sølømøn ɑ́thɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki ködd miy ɑ́ryew mø døngø, kɑ kömi kwöd ɑ́kyel nyi mwøn ki dhɑb kïllì ɑ́bïryew," 
2Chronicles9:16 kɑ othɑ̈dhø ki ködd mø thønhø, kɑ kömi kwöd ɑ́kyel nyi mwøn ki dhɑb kïllì ɑ́dɑ̈g. Köddɑni bënn ɑ́cïbe yij øn-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Wɑɑg Lubnɑn." 
2Chronicles9:17 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́göög thyew ki kwøøm lëji lyej me dwøng, kɑ gø mwøne ki dhɑm dhïw." 
2Chronicles9:18 Kwømɑni yïe dɑ pɑ̈ltyel ɑ́bïkyel møg nyi yedhi wïje, o ree dɑ thɑ̈nhi tyel, e ómwønø ki dhɑb. Dɑ kɑ̈jji bɑ̈dd kì wɑ̈thi tùngi kwøm, o dɑ ngïji ngur kì wɑ̈thi tùngi kwømɑni ryeet; ɑ́kyel kì tuung kí ɑ́kyel kì tuung." 
2Chronicles9:19 Dɑ ngïjji ngurrì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì wɑ̈thi tøggi pɑ̈ltyel, pɑ̈ltyelø wïj tøge dɑ ngïjji ɑ́ryew, ɑ́kyel kì tuung kí ɑ́kyel kì tung-ɑ kyeelø. Bong kwøm me ni menɑni mɑ ɑ́bëëd e nud kì pödhø megø kinni tek." 
2Chronicles9:20 Óthɑ̈ggi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn bënn ógwøgø kɑ dhɑb, o jɑmmì bënn møg-ɑ yij ød Wɑɑg Lubnɑn ógwøgø kɑ dhɑm dhïw. Átegø ɑ́bëëd e bong pere kì bøli keny-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn." 
2Chronicles9:21 Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn yïe ɑ́dɑ yɑ̈thi nɑm møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ddi ki jɑmmi ngyew, jø Sølømøn nyii kønyø yi jø Kirɑm. Ge nyi kedh-ɑ Tɑrcic kɑ ge nyii dwöögø kì bɑng runn ɑ́dɑ̈g ge ókɑ̈ddø ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, kí leggi lyej, kí ɑ́ywömmì, kí ɑtwɑg." 
2Chronicles9:22 Bong rɑ̈dh me lod Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn ki kɑ̈r geki peli wïj. 
2Chronicles9:23 Nyii pyëjø yi rɑ̈nhì bënn, o ge lïngi gen ki peli wïj men-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk." 
2Chronicles9:24 Kì yethi runn bënn, Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn nyii muujø yi rɑ̈nhhɑni ki jɑmmì møg-ɑ ógwøgø gɑ ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí ógudh, kí jɑmmi liny, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med, kí kyënyì, ki ógɑll." 
2Chronicles9:25 Sølømøn yïe ɑ́dɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen gïg yethi gen nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi kyënyì møg-ɑ nyi pyejji yɑ̈the. Kí ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew jøg rïngi ki kyënyì. Kɑ gï pɑ̈nge kì yethi kɑ̈dd mø gïïr, kɑ kwï gen mïdhe kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles9:26 En ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg rɑ̈nhì bënn kì pödhh-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt kí Pelistiyɑ̀ gïti keew Rïp. 
2Chronicles9:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn kì Yerusɑlem, ɑ́tegø ɑ́bëëd e nɑ tør, o yɑdh sɑndɑl ɑ́bëëd e pere bogøn ni ólɑ̈mm-ɑ ying wɑ̈thi kïtti Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles9:28 Kyënyi Sølømøn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ Rïp kí pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. 
2Chronicles9:29 Wɑ́ji gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, cɑg kì ri cɑ̈gi jyɑ̈ge gïti thume, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Nɑthɑn Jɑltöng, kí yethi Møg-ɑ Átöng yi Akiyɑ̀ kì Cilø, kí Møg-ɑ Ácɑ̈rri Idö Jɑltöng, ɑ kööbø thyew kì ri jyɑ̈gi Rɑ̈dh Yeroboɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles9:30 Isrɑil bëne ɑ́jɑɑg yi Sølømøn ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, e bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles9:31 Codhe, ɑkedhi Sølømøn kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì kɑɑl Debïd, ɑloony keje ki kwɑnyø yi Reöboɑm wɑ̈de." 
2Chronicles10:1 Akedhi Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm Cekïm kun-ɑ ɑ́cøng tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑɑng wuudø be rønyii ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. 
2Chronicles10:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt kì Rïp kun-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈re kipe Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn, ɑdwööge pɑc." 
2Chronicles10:3 Aödi yïe yi tyëng myërri wɑɑng wuudø, ɑkedhi gen yï Reöboɑm, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Wø ɑ́thödhi yi wïyí ki gwøg me teeg cɑrø, me dhɑ̈li lwɑ̈ngø yi wøn. De keløg wø óthödhi yi yïn ki gwøg me yöd me lwɑ̈ng gwøgø yi wøn, me wëggi bëëdø yönø, wø óbëëdø wø bɑ ji mø göggi yïn.”" 
2Chronicles10:5 Alöggi Reöboɑm kinni, “Wiyu yɑn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, o yɑ rumɑ kì ri møgɑni. Kɑ wu dwöög wun.” Codhe, ɑkedh teedø." 
2Chronicles10:6 Kɑ Reöboɑm jøgdøng-ɑ ɑ́ying tøg buri wïye Sølømøn pyëje kinni, “Á gïn ɑ kwøb yi wun, o köbbɑ ji møg?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Alöggi gen kinni, “Keløg bëëdí óbëëd e døøj ki ji møg, kɑ ge nyi göggi yi yïn ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen, kɑ kwøbbi gen nyi løøg yi yïn ki yöö me døøj, yï ógöggi yi gen kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 De kwøbbi jøgdøngø ɑ́bɑny yi en, kɑ yöd e kedh-ɑ yï yɑɑg-ɑ ɑ́pïïdh gen møg-ɑ nyi kønyii ki kwøb." 
2Chronicles10:9 Gï ɑ́pyëje kinni, “Á gïn ɑ kwøb yi wun, o köbbɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn kinni, i løgɑ gwøng-ɑ ɑ́cïb kömi gen e peeg yi wïyɑ, ɑ́ gwøg me yööd?”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Alöggi yɑɑgɑni kinni, “Köbbí gen kinni, ‘Ngëdi lwedɑ, lwen-ɑ ɑkïj, dwøng kibøli pyeer wïyɑ.’" 
2Chronicles10:11 Köbbí gen kinni, ‘Wu ɑ́mëgg-ɑ gwøg me teeg yi wïyɑ, o gwøngɑni köme kïdhɑ’ kïdhø o tie pëngø. Wu ɑ́pwöd yi wïyɑ kɑ wunn, de wu ópwöd yi yɑn kɑ dëllì!’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ɑdwöög Yeroboɑm geki ji bënn yï Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn." 
2Chronicles10:13 Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi jøgdøngi ɑ́wiye, kɑ kwøbbi teedø løøge ki yöö me rɑɑj," 
2Chronicles10:14 ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi yɑɑg-ɑ thønhø kinni, köbbe ji kinni, “Wu ɑ́mëgg-ɑ gwøg me teeg yi wïyɑ, o gwøngɑni köme kïdhɑ’ kïdhø o tie tëngø. Wu ɑ́pwöd yi wïyɑ kɑ wunn, de wu ópwöd yi yɑn kɑ dëllì!”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Møgɑni ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pyëwe kinni o møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe Rɑ̈dh Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt ki dhøg Akiyɑ̀ jɑltöng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen." 
2Chronicles10:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi ji kinni, kwøbbi gen nuti lïngø yi rɑ̈dh, ɑryeer gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ yod yi wɑ kì bɑng Debïd! Bong gïn-ɑ ólɑg yi wɑ kì bɑng wɑ̈d Yesì? Isrɑil, kedhí myërrí! Debïd, dööng yï nenn-ɑ gølí!” Codhe, ɑngɑ̈nyi tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈yi gen," 
2Chronicles10:17 Adöng Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ keti gen. 
2Chronicles10:18 Codhe, ɑör Adönirɑm, jɑngi tïj, kinni kedhe yï tyëng Isrɑil, de ɑ́bɑ̈lli yi gen ki tuggi kïttì kɑ othøø. Ajwɑn Reöboɑm dhwödhø, ɑkɑdhe yij yɑ̈ɑ̈y kyenye kɑ reng-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles10:19 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi tyëng Isrɑil ki bɑnyi gøl Debïd, pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
2Chronicles11:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm Yerusɑlem, ɑcwøle jøliny møg-ɑ teg gɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn geki gøl Yeudɑ̀. Reöboɑm ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Isrɑil o gø jɑɑge." 
2Chronicles11:2 De Cemɑiyɑ̀ jɑltöng ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j 
2Chronicles11:3 kinni köbbe Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm kí tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ geki gøl Ben Yɑmïn kinni," 
2Chronicles11:4 “Wu ko kedhi be nyɑɑg ki wɑddi wun, tyëng Isrɑil. Døøg wun myërri wun bënn. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ.” Alïngi gen kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ kedhi be nyɑɑg ki Yeroboɑm." 
2Chronicles11:5 Reöboɑm ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem, kɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Ben Yɑmïn gëdde ki dör." 
2Chronicles11:6 Kɑ̈ddɑni ek: Betleem, Etɑm, Tekoɑ̀," 
2Chronicles11:7 Betdhur, Sökö, Adulɑm," 
2Chronicles11:8 Gɑth, Mɑrecɑ̀, Dhïp," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adörɑim, Lɑkic, Adhekɑ̀," 
2Chronicles11:10 Dhorɑ̀, Ayɑlön kí Kibrön." 
2Chronicles11:11 Kɑ̈ddɑni ɑ́gëdde ki dör mø teg, kɑ yethi gïn cïbe ki pëjjì, kɑ gï thödhe ki gïgcɑmm, kí møøw dhetun, kí møgi oløg," 
2Chronicles11:12 Kɑ gï nënge ki ködd kí tøngg. Kɑ myërri Ben Yɑmïn geki myërri Yeudɑ̀ kore kidøøj ki yuu ni menɑni. 
2Chronicles11:13 Abëën ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì Yeudiyɑ̀ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ myërri Isrɑil bënn. 
2Chronicles11:14 Kwɑrri Leebì kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi dhögi gen ɑ́wiy gen piny, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem, mɑ́ ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n gwøg gɑ ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Yeroboɑm geki wɑ̈dde." 
2Chronicles11:15 Kɑ Yeroboɑm orönyø ki ókwër møge, møg göögø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli wëyrijjø mø bɑ ngïjji wɑ̈dhh." 
2Chronicles11:16 Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil yethi gen bong ɑ́dud, ge ɑ́løg bɑng Kwɑrri Leebì Yerusɑlem, o ge ngɑ̈ddi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen, ki gëdhhì." 
2Chronicles11:17 Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́yïddi ki tegø kì bɑng bëënɑni, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm wɑ̈d Sølømøn kwøbbe lïngi yi gen kì runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge obëëdø ni kɑ ɑ́jɑɑg gen yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd geki Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn." 
2Chronicles11:18 Reöboɑm ɑ́nywøm-ɑ Mɑɑ̈lɑt nyɑɑr Yerimöth wɑ̈d Debïd, ɑ meye cwøl ɑ́ Abikɑil, nyɑɑr Eliɑb wɑ̈d Yesì." 
2Chronicles11:19 Yï gen ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑ løg Yeuc, kí Cemɑriyɑ̀, kí Dhɑɑ̈m." 
2Chronicles11:20 Anywøme Mɑɑkɑ̀ nyɑɑr Abcɑlöm kì cyɑ̈n, kɑ ge óyïddø ki wɑ̈dd ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg: Abiyɑ̀, kí Atɑy, kí Dhïdhɑ̀, kí Celömith." 
2Chronicles11:21 Mɑ̈nni Reöboɑm bënn bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o ɑkwɑnyy bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, o wɑ̈dde bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o nywøle womɑ̈nn bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel. Kì kelli mɑ̈nne geki ɑkwɑnyye bënn, Mɑɑkɑ̀ nyɑɑr Abcɑlöm ɑ ti yi en ki mɑɑrø." 
2Chronicles11:22 O kì kelli nyige bënn, Abiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑkɑ̀ ɑ ti yi en ki mɑɑrø. Abiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi en ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ órøny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì bɑnge." 
2Chronicles11:23 Reöboɑm ɑ́göög-ɑ peli wïje, kɑ wɑ̈dde nënge ki gwøg. Kɑ gï pɑ̈nge kì kelli myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Ben Yɑmïn, kí kɑ̈ddi dör. Gï ɑ́nënge ki jɑmmì, kɑ gï nyöme ki mɑ̈nn." 
2Chronicles12:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Reöboɑm ki cïbi pödhe piny, kɑ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑny yi en geki jie bënn." 
2Chronicles12:2 Kɑ ge cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bïïj runni Reöboɑm kì yij lɑwø, kɑ Cicɑk rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Yerusɑlem," 
2Chronicles12:3 ki yɑ̈thi kyënyì ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́ryew, kí jøkyënyì gɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, kí jøliny tyel mø pɑ cuggi kwɑnø, reb ki jøliny Lïbiyɑ̀, kí jøliny Suk, kí jøliny Kuc." 
2Chronicles12:4 Kɑ kɑ̈ddi dör mɑge kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles12:5 Codhe, ɑkedhi Cemɑiyɑ̀ jɑltöng yï Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm geki jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́cøng ri gen Yerusɑlem keny-ɑ ɑ́rengi gen ge bwøg-ɑ Rɑ̈dh Cicɑk. Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Bene wöön-ɑ muuj wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j èn: ‘Yɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi wun, o ɑnɑn wu ɑ́lonyɑ ki wiy cingi Cicɑk.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh oyïëyø geki jyɑ̈ggì kinni ge ɑ́røngi, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ dyër ceth.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh møgɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑköbbe Cemɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Mɑ́ ge ɑ́yïëy ki orøøg gen, ge koo nɑ̈g yi yɑn. De keløg Cicɑk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen, ge ócög ge pɑ thøw. Rënyi pyëwɑ ócög e pɑ yod yi tyëng Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles12:8 De ge ótyɑm yi Cicɑk, o gïn-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kɑɑm göggi yɑn kí göggi rɑ̈nhi kömi piny yod yi gen.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Codhe, ɑbëën Rɑ̈dh Cicɑk Yerusɑlem kɑ jɑmm-ɑ per gen teg kwɑnye kì yij Kengø, kí yij gøldwøng. Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́kwɑnye, geki köddi dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn." 
2Chronicles12:10 Kɑ kɑ̈jji gen kïdhi yi Rɑ̈dh Reöboɑm ki ködd møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki ngyënyø dilɑl, kɑ gï mëgge pëjji liny-ɑ nyi kor dhø gøldwøng." 
2Chronicles12:11 Kenyi kedhi rɑ̈dh yij Kengø, jøg-ɑ kurø ködd nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ge’ wɑ̈g, kɑ gï nyi dwøøg gen øn-ɑ nyi koor gen." 
2Chronicles12:12 Reöboɑm ɑ́bëëd ree mëg en Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑcöge e nuti nyɑ̈ɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles12:13 Reöboɑm ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ Yerusɑlem, kɑ ókedhø e ótëngø keny-ɑ ɑ́ngënyi runne ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Runne ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́kyel keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kì Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil bënn ɑ́ keny mɑllii. Meyi Reöboɑm bɑ Nɑɑmɑ̀ nyɑɑr Amön." 
2Chronicles12:14 Reöboɑm ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj, mɑ́ pyëwe nuti cïb en ri yodi mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles12:15 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Reöboɑm kì cɑ̈gi lɑwe gïti thume, geki mø tyëng gøle bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Kwøbbi Cemɑiyɑ̀ Jɑltöng, kí Wɑ̈nyi Idö Jɑltöng. Reöboɑm geki Yeroboɑm ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ nyɑɑg ceth ki ri gen." 
2Chronicles12:16 Akedhi Reöboɑm kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì kɑɑl Debïd, kɑ Abiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles13:1 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yeroboɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́røøny Abiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀," 
2Chronicles13:2 kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem. Meye bɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ nyɑɑr Uriel kì Gibeɑ̀. Kɑ liny ocwöbø kì kɑɑm Abiyɑ̀ geki Yeroboɑm. 
2Chronicles13:3 Jøliny Abiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ngwen, o jøliny Yeroboɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́kedhi be nyɑɑg ki liny Abiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles13:4 Linyɑni ɑ́røøm-ɑ myërri kïtti Eprɑim. Ayedhi Rɑ̈dh Abiyɑ̀ wïj Kïti Dhemɑrɑim, ɑryeere e köbb-ɑ Yeroboɑm geki tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Lïngu kwøbbɑ!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kwïj yi wun kinni Debïd ɑ́köbbe ki kwøb mø pɑ cuggi pɑ̈dø keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøge gøn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bëne, men jyɑ̈gø geki kwɑrre gïti ɑtheer?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Nebɑt ɑ́ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye, e bɑny-ɑ Sølømøn rɑ̈dhe." 
2Chronicles13:7 Codhe, ɑcunge ki ji mø bong kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ kwøbbi Reöboɑm wɑ̈d Sølømøn pyem yi gen kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëde e nudd ɑ́ nyelthinh, o bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi en." 
2Chronicles13:8 Anɑn, wu dwɑdd-ɑ nyɑɑg ki rɑ̈dh men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi kwɑrri Debïd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yï wun dɑ liny me ngenyø ki mendwøng, o yï wun dɑ røjji dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yeroboɑm gɑ jwöggi wun." 
2Chronicles13:9 Ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyeddi yi wun, gen ɑ kwɑrri Aɑron; Kwɑrri Leebì. Kɑ kɑ̈jji gen kïdhi wun ki ókwër ge kwɑny yi wun kɑ yuu-ɑ nyi göög yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ ngɑn kɑ̈ni ki wɑdh wɑlɑ̀ dyëg ɑ́bïryew nyi røny ɑ́ ókwëri gïg-ɑ cwøl yi wun gɑ jwöggi wun." 
2Chronicles13:10 “De wø nudd wø mɑll-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, o wø nuti wiy en piny. Ókwërr-ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Aɑron ɑ gwøg kwër, o ge okønyø yi Kwɑrri Leebì." 
2Chronicles13:11 Gen ɑ nyi rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki bɑkur kí gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì mwøl kí böörø. Gen ɑ nyi cïb ópuun byëlø me bɑ ɑkwër kömi tɑrɑbedhɑ̀, kɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ nyi cwiny yi gen kì wɑɑng thyënhø, kɑ gï nyi cïb gen wɑ̈thi teggi dhɑb. Wø nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wiyu piny." 
2Chronicles13:12 Jwøk kiree ɑ pyejji wøn, o ókwërre nud kì keny ki kɑ̈ngì kì cinggi gen, okodh gen kɑ̈ngì, wø ceg-ɑ pödhi kömi wun. Tyëng Isrɑil, wu ko nyïɑ̈ggi ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun! Wu pɑ cuggi tyɑ̈mø!”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Yeroboɑm ödø ki kwï linye me pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi liny Yeudiyɑ̀ kì ngɑ̈thi gen, kedh kwï linye kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ bøli gen." 
2Chronicles13:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi liny Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni ge ótyegø yi liny. Aywøøg gen kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ókwër kɑ̈ngì kødh gen." 
2Chronicles13:15 Aryeer tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki cwɑg mø døngø, ɑpeej liny yi Abiyɑ̀, ɑtyɑɑm liny Yeroboɑm geki Isrɑil yi Jwøk." 
2Chronicles13:16 Acyeddi liny Isrɑil yi liny Yeudiyɑ̀. Ge ɑ́cïb cingi Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Jwøk. 
2Chronicles13:17 Liny Isrɑil ɑ́tyɑm yi liny Abiyɑ̀ ki tyɑmø me rɑj, kɑ kelli gen nɑ̈gi ki jöddi liny ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́bïj." 
2Chronicles13:18 Codhe, ɑtyɑɑm tyëng Isrɑil yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ mɑ́ ri gen jyɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøk kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles13:19 Liny Yeroboɑm ɑ́cyeddi yi Abiyɑ̀, kɑ kwï kɑ̈dde mɑg yi en, kí Betiil, kí Yecɑnɑ̀, kí Eprön geki myërr-ɑ buti gen." 
2Chronicles13:20 Yeroboɑm nuti døøgø tëngø kinni tek, kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Abiyɑ̀ e ojyɑ̈gø. Kì cyɑ̈n, ɑgøøj Yeroboɑm piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ othøø." 
2Chronicles13:21 Abiyɑ̀ ɑ́tëngi ki mendwøng. Yïe ɑ́dɑ mɑ̈nn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, kí wɑ̈dd pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, kí nyige womɑ̈nn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
2Chronicles13:22 Kwï kwøbbi Abiyɑ̀, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi en, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Kwøbbi Idö Jɑltöng." 
2Chronicles14:1 Akedhi Abiyɑ̀ kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì rörri rɑ̈nhì kì Yerusɑlem kɑɑl Debïd. Arøøny Asɑ̀ wɑ̈de ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Kɑ piny obëëdø ki mër ki runn pyɑ̈rø keny-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Asɑ̀." 
2Chronicles14:2 Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́bëëd pyëwe med ki en kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́gøgge dyër geki gïgdøj" 
2Chronicles14:3 Këlli lɑm mø jwögg-ɑ pɑth ɑ́dhure piny geki kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli gen, kɑ löjj geki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ tørre." 
2Chronicles14:4 Aköbbe tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni, gwøg gen gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen, kɑ kwönge geki cigge mïdhi gen." 
2Chronicles14:5 Piny ɑ́bëëd e dɑ mër kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rënye kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø geki këlli bɑkur kì yethi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn. 
2Chronicles14:6 Kɑ kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ gëdde ki dör keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈ge, kɑ obëëdø e bong liny kì yethi runn mø ngenyø, mɑ́ e ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mër." 
2Chronicles14:7 Aköbbe tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni, “Gëddi wɑ kɑ̈dd ki dör mø bɑ̈rrø, kí thïg mø cuggi cyëgø kɑ ge dëd. Piny ójɑɑg yi wɑ, mɑ́ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee ɑ nyi gwøg yi wɑ. Wɑ okorø yi en, o wɑ ɑ́thödhe ki mër kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn.” Codhe, ɑgëëd gen kɑ ge ókɑ̈rø." 
2Chronicles14:8 Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ jøliny ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kì Yeudiyɑ̀, o yï gen ɑ́dɑ ködd ki tøng, o kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn yïe ɑ́dɑ jøliny ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew yï gen dɑ ködd kí wethh, jølinyɑni bënn ge bɑ jøg mø teg, o ge thøø yi pwönyø kidøøj." 
2Chronicles14:9 Jɑl Kuc me cwøl ɑ́ Dherɑ̀, ɑ́tëni kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ ki liny, kwɑnni jøge bɑ milyön, kí yɑ̈thi kyënyì miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Mɑrecɑ̀." 
2Chronicles14:10 Kɑ Asɑ̀ kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gøn. Kɑ liny ótuumø kì yij Töör Dhepɑthɑ̀ kì buti Mɑrecɑ̀. 
2Chronicles14:11 Kɑ Asɑ̀ Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwɑjje kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kønyi liny-ɑ nyødh yöd kì yïí ni kønyi liny-ɑ teg. Køny wøn ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, mɑ́ ri wøn jyɑ̈ɑ̈ng wøn rií, o wø kedhi wøn be nyɑɑg ki liny-ɑ ngenyø èn kɑ nyingí. Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ Jwøøg wøn, rií ko wëggí tyɑmø yi dhɑnhø yøw.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Kɑ liny Kuc tyɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r Asɑ̀ kí liny Yeudiyɑ̀ kömi gen. Kɑ ge órengø. 
2Chronicles14:13 Kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Gerɑr ge ocyeddø yi Asɑ̀ geki jølinye. Kɑ kelli tyëng Kuc nɑ̈ggi ki ji mø gïïr. Kɑ ge tyɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menrɑj, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́döng e onëënø. Jɑmmì mø gïïr cɑrø ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kì bɑng linyɑni." 
2Chronicles14:14 Codhe, kɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ buti Gerɑr rënyi yi gen, mɑ́ tyëng kɑ̈ddɑni ɑ́bwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ kɑ̈ddɑni bënn yɑg yi liny Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ge okɑ̈dø ki jɑmmì mø gïïr cɑrø." 
2Chronicles14:15 Ge ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi jødyëg thyew, kɑ ge ómɑ̈gø ki dyëg mø gïïr kí ɑmɑl. Codhe, ɑdwöög gen Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Kɑ wëyi Jwøk bï-ɑ kömi Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Oded. 
2Chronicles15:2 Akedhe be yïddø ki Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀. Kɑ ócwöddø kinni, “Lïngu møgɑ Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀, wuki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí gøl Ben Yɑmïn! Wu okorø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bɑng kɑ̀ lïngu kwøbbe. Keløg e óyɑb yi wun, óyod yi wun ceth, de keløg e ówiy yi wun, wu ólony yi en ki wiyø." 
2Chronicles15:3 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd ki kɑɑm me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, yï gen bong Jwøng-ɑ dyër, o yï gen bong ókwër møg pwönyi gen ki cigg." 
2Chronicles15:4 De kenyi bëën ɑkørr kömi gen, ge nyi døøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil. Nyii yɑbø yi gen kɑ nyi yod yi gen." 
2Chronicles15:5 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, ɑ́bëëd e bong dhɑnhø me nyi weli, mɑ́ piny bëne ɑ́bëëd e ceg-ɑ böggø." 
2Chronicles15:6 Pödhh ɑ́bëëd ge mɑ̈n ki ri gen, kɑɑl guud-ɑ wɑɑng kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ kömi gen ɑ́göjji yi Jwøk ki ɑkørr mø ngenyø." 
2Chronicles15:7 De cwed wun pëthi wun, kɑ wu bëëd wu teeg, mɑ́ wu óyïddi ki köögi kipe gwøøg wun.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Kɑ Asɑ̀ pyëwe ótëngø yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jɑltöng, Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Oded, ɑkedhe kɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ rijjø kì yij piny Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Ben Yɑmïn, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi en kì myërri kïtti Eprɑim kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g bënn. Kɑ këli lɑm men-ɑ bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ying ódɑ̈ri Kengø thïge." 
2Chronicles15:9 Kɑ ji mø gïïr kì Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè døøg-ɑ tuung Asɑ̀. Kɑ gøl Cimeøn ɑ ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ kömi Isrɑil dwöög-ɑ yïe, mɑ́ e ɑ́yod yi gen kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ köme." 
2Chronicles15:10 Kɑ pödhø ócugø bëne kì Yerusɑlem kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïïj runni Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø." 
2Chronicles15:11 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈ddi yi gen ki gëdhhì kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög gen kì be liny. Ge ɑ́ngɑl-ɑ dhög miy ɑ́bïryew, kí dyëg ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew." 
2Chronicles15:12 Anywɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki kwøb kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen ómɑlli yi gen ki pëthi gen kí wëyi gen bënn." 
2Chronicles15:13 O ngɑn koo lïngi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ying-ɑ́ othinh wɑlɑ̀ ngɑndwøng, jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø." 
2Chronicles15:14 Aköngi gen ge óryeerø ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi gen ómïdhi yi gen ceth. Codhe, kɑ kɑ̈ngì kodh." 
2Chronicles15:15 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med, mɑ́ møgɑni ɑ́yïëy yi gen kɑ pëthi gen bënn. Kɑ pëthi gen løg-ɑ mø med ki mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ kwɑ̈jji gen yïëy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gï thödhe ki mër kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
2Chronicles15:16 Mɑɑkɑ̀ wøngi Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀ ɑ́nyiige kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, mɑ́ e ɑ́göög ki gïgrijjø, kɑ ogöögø ki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø. Angøl ngïjji jwøngɑni piny yi Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀, kɑ gï rɑ̈be kì yij töör Kidrön." 
2Chronicles15:17 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ nuti cøør kɑ̈jji mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth piny bënn kì yij pödhø yi Asɑ̀, ɑ́cungi ceth kì kömi yïëy-ɑ ɑ́yïëye Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì yij bëëde bëne." 
2Chronicles15:18 Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ bɑ wïj könge bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́thyëye Jwøk, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́thyey yi wïye Abiyɑ̀ kïdhe yij Kengø, ɑ løg jɑmmi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ábëëd e bong liny mɑ ɑ́nyɑg gïti kɑ ɑ́göög runni Asɑ̀ ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj kì yij lɑwø. 
2Chronicles16:1 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïkyeel runni Asɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, kɑ Bɑcɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bï-ɑ kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ ki liny. Kɑ kɑɑl Rɑmɑ̀ gëdde ki dörø, e cyëëg-ɑ yuu-ɑ kedhi myërri Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles16:2 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀ ókɑ̈bbø ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb kì kɑ̈nni Kengø geki gøldwøng, kɑ gï öre Rɑ̈dh Benɑdɑd, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kì Dimɑceg, kɑ oödø ki wöödø kinni," 
2Chronicles16:3 “Rëbi wɑ ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd wëëgee. Kwɑny dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ örɑ yïn èn. Pɑ̈d lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm wuki Bɑcɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, o dhwödhe kì pinyɑ.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Ayïëëy kwøbbi Asɑ̀ yi Benɑdɑd, kɑ pëjji linye öre be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil. Amɑg gen Iyön, kí Dɑn, kí Abel Bet Mɑɑkɑ̀ geki kɑ̈ddi Nɑptɑlì bënn kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mïdhi gïgcɑmm." 
2Chronicles16:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Rɑ̈dh Bɑcɑ̀ ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, ɑwïye ki geri Rɑmɑ̀, kɑ gwøg cuunge." 
2Chronicles16:6 Codhe, ɑcøng jøg-ɑ cwøw kì yij Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne yi Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀, kɑ gï öre be kɑ̈ɑ̈li kïttì geki yenh sɑndɑl møg-ɑ ɑ́gëëd yi Bɑcɑ̀. Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l gen kɑ gï geere Gebɑ̀ geki Midhpɑ̀." 
2Chronicles16:7 Kì bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kedhi Aɑnɑnì jɑltöng yï Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀ kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Mɑ́ yï ɑ́ngɑ̈dh-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, kibøli ke di ngɑ̈ɑ̈dh Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, liny Arɑm ɑ́pɑ̈r kɑ yï wiye piny." 
2Chronicles16:8 Liny Kuc geki liny Lïbiyɑ̀ nuti bëëd ge gïïr, yï gen dɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th kí kyënyì mø ngenyø? De ge nuti tyɑɑm yïn kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́gɑ̈nní Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?" 
2Chronicles16:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nenn-ɑ kömi piny bëne, o tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen tyerii nyii thödhø yi en ki tegø. Yï ɑ́göög-ɑ nøgi wïj, kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, o cɑg ɑnɑn ceth, yï ceg-ɑ cögø yï ónyïɑ̈ggø liny.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Amɑɑg Asɑ̀ yi liny ki jɑltöng, kɑ gø twöje ki ɑ́cwecwel. Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́rënyi bëëdi Asɑ̀ ki ji." 
2Chronicles16:11 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́göög bënn kì ri cɑ̈gi jyɑ̈gi Asɑ̀ gïti cöge, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles16:12 Kɑ Asɑ̀ dële ócɑ̈gø rɑ̈m, kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïngween runne kì yij lɑwø; tyele ɑ́kwöd ki menrɑj, de nuti ywøøg kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe yiele, de ɑ́yɑb-ɑ ɑkïmm." 
2Chronicles16:13 Akedhi Asɑ̀ kun-ɑ di kweyye, kì bɑng runn ɑ́ryew, (ɑ løg pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́kyeel runne kì yij lɑwø)." 
2Chronicles16:14 Kɑ koony yij órøngi kït men-ɑ ɑ́tweg yi en kì Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl Debïd. Kɑ gïny ki mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med, ɑrubbii ki bwöri koodhø me dwøng." 
2Chronicles17:1 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt røøny kej wïye ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ ree gwøge e teg kibøli Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles17:2 Kɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi dör kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne cïbe ki jøliny, gen ɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi Asɑ̀ kì piny Eprɑim." 
2Chronicles17:3 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ bɑng bëën-ɑ ɑ́beed yi kwɑn Debïd, o Bɑɑl nuti mɑllø yi en." 
2Chronicles17:4 Ámɑll-ɑ Jwøøg wïye, kɑ cigge nyi mïdhe, o nuti göögø ni rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles17:5 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tegø men jɑɑge Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ muuj yi ji bënn ki jɑmmì, codhe, kɑ óyïddø ki kɑ̈r geki dhwɑ̈ng." 
2Chronicles17:6 Göggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cïbe mɑl kibøli jɑmmì bënn, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth rënye geki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles17:7 Kɑ öd-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ki jøpwönyø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runne kì yij lɑwø, møg pwönyi kì kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀. Jøpwönyɑni bɑ Benkɑil, kí Obɑdiyɑ̀, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Nethɑnel, kí Mikɑiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles17:8 Ge ɑ́kedh kyeel kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́bïngwen, nyingi gen bɑ: Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Nethɑniyɑ̀, kí Dhebɑdiyɑ̀, kí Asɑiil, kí Cemirɑmöth, kí Yönɑthɑn, kí Adöniyɑ̀, kí Töbiyɑ̀, kí Töbɑdöniyɑ̀. Kí ókwër ɑ́ryew, nyingi gen bɑ: Elicɑmɑ̀, kí Yeörɑm." 
2Chronicles17:9 Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen, kɑ ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yethi myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, ge pwöny-ɑ ji." 
2Chronicles17:10 Pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhi Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́göjji böögø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge cög gen ge pɑ nyïɑ̈ggi ki Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt." 
2Chronicles17:11 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt muuj yi kwï tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ki jɑmmì, kɑ gø muuj gen ki ɑ́tegø ɑ́ gwɑ̈j. Ámuuj yi kwï Árɑb thyew ki dyëg römm ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew kí miy ɑ́bïryew, kí dyëg ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew kí miy ɑ́bïryew." 
2Chronicles17:12 Codhe, kɑ Yöcɑpɑt ókedhø e ótëngø ki mendwøng. Kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne yije gëdde ki kɑ̈ddi dör," 
2Chronicles17:13 gɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmì geki gïgcɑmm. Kɑ cïb-ɑ Yerusɑlem ki jöddi liny mø pëddi tegø," 
2Chronicles17:14 ge kwɑny gɑ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen. Adnɑɑ̀ bɑ pënyi jø gøl Yeudɑ̀, ɑ́pyejj-ɑ jøliny ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles17:15 Bɑnge dɑ Yöɑnɑn e pyejj-ɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g," 
2Chronicles17:16 dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bɑ Amɑsiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhikrì, e pyejj-ɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew. (Amɑsiyɑ̀ ree ɑ́ceg yi en kɑ muujø, o gögge Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j)." 
2Chronicles17:17 Eliɑdɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́pyejji jø gøl Ben Yɑmïn, bɑ pënyi liny me pëddi, ɑ́pyejj-ɑ jøliny ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew mø cinggi gen di ködd kí wethh." 
2Chronicles17:18 Bɑnge dɑ Yödhɑbɑd, e pyejj-ɑ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, mø cinggi gen di jɑmmi liny mø døj." 
2Chronicles17:19 Jøgɑni bënn, ge ɑ́ying-ɑ buti rɑ̈dh kì Yerusɑlem, o jøliny møøgø ɑ́bëëd ge ópɑ̈ngø kì kelli kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
2Chronicles18:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ri Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ nyinge tɑɑy-ɑ kömi piny bëne, kɑ ogöögø ki øri Akɑɑb rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles18:2 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ Yöcɑpɑt kedh-ɑ kɑɑl Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ be këëmi Akɑɑb. Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt geki ji-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki en theg yi Akɑɑb ki dyëg kí dhög. Codhe, kɑ Yöcɑpɑt dyej yi Akɑɑb kinni, o ge kedhi gen be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rɑmöth kì Gilyɑd." 
2Chronicles18:3 Apyëje gøn kinni, “Wɑ ókedhi be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rɑmöth?” Alöggi Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Yɑ ókedh keløg yï ókedhø, o jølinyɑ ókedh keløg jølinyí ókedhø. Wø óbï be rëbø kì yij liny.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Codhe, ɑlenge dhøge kinni, “De pyëj wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møti.”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Codhe, ɑcwööl jøtöng gɑ miy ɑ́ngwen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ɑpyëje gïn kinni, “Kedhɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rɑmöth wɑlɑ̀ yɑ ko kedh?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Kedh, ócïb cingi rɑ̈dh yi Jwøk.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Akööb Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Bong jɑltöng megø kì keny, me cuggi pyëji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Alöggi Akɑɑb kinni, “Dɑ jɑltöng me cwøl ɑ́ Mikɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yimlɑ̀. De mɑɑn yi yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ pɑ nyi tönge ki gïndøj, den-ɑ́ gïgrijjø ɑ nyi tönge yɑn.” Alöggi Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Yï ko kööb kinøw!”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Codhe, ɑcwøøl jɑngi tøg burø yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, kɑ gø köbbe kinni jwɑne be dwɑɑyi Mikɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yimlɑ̀." 
2Chronicles18:9 Rɑ̈nhhɑni ryeet, ge rugø ki ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o ge pëggi piny kì wɑ̈thi kwømmi gen kì ódɑ̈ri dhø döri Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, o jøtöng otöngø kì bøli gen." 
2Chronicles18:10 Kɑ jɑltöng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kenɑɑnɑ̀ ogöögø ki tùngi ngyënyø dødø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Yï ónyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Arɑm ki gïg, kɑ ge tyëg yi yïn ki nɑ̈gø kinni tweet.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Møg ni møgɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jøtöng bënn, ge ɑ́kööb bënn kinni, “Kedhí be nyɑɑg ki Rɑmöth, ócïb cingí yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Kɑ Mikɑiyɑ̀ köbbi yi jɑngi tøg burø men-ɑ ɑ́dwɑɑyii kinni, “Jøtöng bënn ɑ́töng-ɑ kwøbbi tyɑ̈mi rɑ̈dh. Kööb ki møg ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi gen thyew.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Alöggi Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gïn-ɑ óköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk bɑ en ɑ ókwøbɑ!”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cunge kì bøli Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, ɑpyëjii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Mikɑiyɑ̀, kedhɑ wøki Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rɑmöth wɑlɑ̀ wø ko kedh?” Alöggi Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun köme! Wu ótyɑ̈mø. Wu ówëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Akööb Akɑɑb kinni, “Yï óköbbi köngø kɑ tyel ɑ́dï, kinni nyi kømmi dyër kenyi köbbí yɑn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Alöggi Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Liny Isrɑil nenni yi yɑn e tɑyø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì ni dyëg møg bong ngɑn kwɑy gen. Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Jøgɑni yï gen bong pëëji, wiy ge døøg gen myërri gen ki mër.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Aköbbi Yöcɑpɑt yi Akɑɑb kinni, “Yï nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni bong gïndøj me nyi töng yi en kiperɑ kinni tek, den-ɑ́ gïgrijjø?”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Akööb Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Anɑn lïngí møg-ɑ köbbi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lidh yi yɑn e obëëdø kì wïj kwøme kì pɑɑre mɑl, o wëywödde ócungø kì bute, møøgø ying-ɑ wïj kyëje, o møg-ɑ kyeelø ying-ɑ wïj cɑɑme." 
2Chronicles18:19 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Á men ɑ óthɑb Akɑɑb, o kedhe Rɑmöth kun nɑ̈ɑ̈gii?’ Kɑ dhøggi wëywöddɑni óbɑ̈nnø." 
2Chronicles18:20 Kɑ wëy megø obëënø, kɑ ócungø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Óthɑb yi yɑn.’ Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Óthɑb yi yïn, kidï?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Alöggi wëyɑni kinni, ‘Yɑ ókedhi be gwøg ki wëyi pyed kì dhøggi jøtööng Akɑɑb bënn, o ge pëëd gen.’ Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Kedhí be thɑbii! Ólwɑ̈ng yi yïn.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:22 Kɑ møgɑni ngøl yi Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn, møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yï köbbi gen kwøbbi pyed. De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ́kööb kinni, i kömí óbëën yi ryɑ̈g!”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Codhe, ɑkedhi jɑltöng, Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kenɑɑnɑ̀ yï Mikɑiyɑ̀, kɑ gø gøje kì thɑ̈nge, ɑkööbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́wiy ɑ́wën yi wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ døøge be kwøb kì rií?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Akööb Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Óyod yi yïn keny-ɑ ókedhí be pɑ̈ni tɑtyeel.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Codhe, ɑköbbi ɑ́kyel kì kelli pëjji liny yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb kinni, “Mɑg Mikɑiyɑ̀ kɑ kïdhí yï Amön jɑngi kɑɑl geki Yöɑc nyirɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles18:26 Köbbí gen kinni i kïdhi jɑlɑni ød mɑg, kɑ nyi mëggi møgi pï gïti keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ kì mër.”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Aköbbi Akɑɑb yi Mikɑiyɑ̀ kinni, “Keløg yï ódwöög ki mër, pɑth ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kööb kì riɑ!” Alënge dhøge teedø kinni, “Lïngu møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ, wu bënn!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb geki Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kedh-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rɑmöth Gilyɑd. 
2Chronicles18:29 Aköbbi Yöcɑpɑt yi Akɑɑb kinni, “Keny-ɑ ókedhi wɑ be liny, riɑ ólunyɑ ki ógudh møøgø o yɑ ódhɑ̈lɑ ki ngijø yi gen, de yïn, rug ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø.” Codhe, ɑkedhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil be liny e ree kɑɑng en." 
2Chronicles18:30 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm pëjji linye rumø ki köbbø yi en kinni bong dhɑnhø megø den-ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kete ɑ nyïɑ̈ggi ki gen. 
2Chronicles18:31 Codhe, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt, ɑrum gen i bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ gø tyeg gen. Aryeer Yöcɑpɑt, kɑ køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ jøgɑni jog yi Jwøk, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen løg gen." 
2Chronicles18:32 Álidh yi pëjji liny kinni pɑth ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, codhe kɑ wiy yi gen ki cyeddø." 
2Chronicles18:33 De jɑl-liny ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøliny Arɑm, ɑ́wɑ̈dhi göjjø ki weth, kɑ köjji ɑ́dhedheg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil twïy yi nyɑɑr weth, kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ ri gøn. Aköbbe jɑl-ɑ kyewi yɑ̈ɑ̈y kyënye kinni, “Riɑ ɑ́kedhi yi kedø. Løg rií kɑ yɑ kïdhí wɑ̈g!”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Kɑ liny ótëngø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, de Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb ɑ́cög e buud-ɑ yij yɑ̈ye, e nenn-ɑ kun-ɑ di liny Arɑm. Athøwe cɑ̈ng óbuddø." 
2Chronicles19:1 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ døøg-ɑ gøldwøng kì Yerusɑlem ki mër. 
2Chronicles19:2 Kɑ jɑltöng, Yeeu wɑ̈d Aɑnɑnì kedh-ɑ be yïddø ki rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yï orumø kinni bɑ gïndøj ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn kɑ ɑ́køny tyëngrijjø, kɑ yï órëbø ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rënyi ki yïn kì bɑng gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn." 
2Chronicles19:3 De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw yï døøj. Ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e omɑllø yi ji ɑ́nyiig yi yïn, kɑ yï døøg-ɑ be gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem, de nyii cyɑ̈dhø kì kelli ji, cɑg kì wïj tuung pödhø kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti wïj tuung myërri kïtti Eprɑim kì wɑɑng wuudø. Nyi kedh-ɑ be köbbi ji kinni dwöög gen kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles19:5 Árööny ki jɑgg kì yethi kɑ̈ddi dör kì Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne. 
2Chronicles19:6 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Nyi nennu gøny kidøøj, wu pɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g tegi dhɑnhø, den-ɑ́ tegi Wë ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi wun, o nud kì buti wun kenyi løøgu gøny." 
2Chronicles19:7 Nyi wøru Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidøøj kenyi nennu gøny, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee kwïj guumø ki ruj, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi gënyø, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi yïëy ki kumi dhøg.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́rööny kì Yerusɑlem ki Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ókwër, kí kwï pëjjì gɑ jɑgg møg-ɑ nyi nenni gønyy-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ri pyemi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí kwøbb-ɑ nyi kømmi kì dïkɑɑl." 
2Chronicles19:9 Acege gïn kinni, “Wøru Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ wu göög wun, e bong ɑ́dud kì pëthi wun, kɑ kwøbbe nyi lïngi wun." 
2Chronicles19:10 Keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ni wɑddi wun kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø ki ngɑn nɑ̈ɑ̈g dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ pyem-ɑ cigg, köbbu gen kidøøj ki yuu-ɑ óbëëd gen kì keny-ɑ ógøøny gøny, o ge cög ge pɑ røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pyëwe órënyø ki wun, wuki nyigi wun." 
2Chronicles19:11 Amɑriyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng ɑ jɑɑg wun, ɑ nyi løøg møg-ɑ kööbø kì ri Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O Dhebɑdiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Icmɑil, ɑ jɑɑg Yeudiyɑ̀ en ɑ nenni ɑkørri gøldwøng. Ókøny yi Kwɑrri Leebì. Göög wun pëthi wun teeg, wu ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gøggi dyër!”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Codhe, ɑcøng tyëng Moɑb, kí tyëng Amön ri gen geki tyëng-ɑ ying tuung gen, kipe mɑ̈nyi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles20:2 Kɑ jøg møøgø bï-ɑ yï Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt, ɑköbbii yi gen kinni, “Liny me dwøng obëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Edöm kì løøg Luuy Omelø, bï-ɑ be mɑ̈nyø. Ge ɑ́rum ki mɑgi kɑɑl Adhɑdhöt Tɑmɑr.” (Kɑɑlɑni ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Ein Gedì)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt obwøgø, ɑkwɑjje Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Codhe, kɑ ji köbbe kì yij pödhø bëne kinni, twöön gen ri gen ki gïncɑm." 
2Chronicles20:4 Ajwɑni tyëng kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn Yerusɑlem be pyëji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïn-ɑ cuggi gwøgø," 
2Chronicles20:5 kɑ ri gen cøng gen ódɑ̈ri Kengø geki tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt ókedhø kɑ ócungø kì bøli gïn," 
2Chronicles20:6 ɑkwɑ̈jje ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wøn, piny bëne kí ji-ɑ yije jɑɑg yi yïn, yï ying-ɑ pɑɑrí mɑl. Yï teeg cɑrø, o bong dhɑnhø me tyɑm yïn." 
2Chronicles20:7 Yï bɑ Jwøøg wøn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën tyëng Isrɑil yij piny men, ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì piny keny ɑ́cyeed yi yïn wɑ̈g, kɑ pinyɑni mëggí kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm mɑ̈dhí, o bëëde ɑ́ mi gen gïti ɑtheer." 
2Chronicles20:8 Ge ɑ́bëëd kì keny, kɑ yï gëddi gen ki Kengø mɑ mi nyingí. O ge ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni," 
2Chronicles20:9 keløg e dɑ rɑj mø pɑ̈dhi kömi gen, wɑlɑ̀ liny, wɑlɑ̀ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈j, ge óbï be cung kì bøli Kengø men, keny-ɑ nyi mɑlli yïn. Kɑ yï kwɑjji yi gen kɑ̀ ying gen yij orɑng, kɑ kwɑ̈jjø mi gen lïng yi yïn, kɑ ge yiel yi yïn." 
2Chronicles20:10 “Anɑn tyëng Amön geki tyëng Moɑb, kí tyëng Edöm ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wøn. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën kweyyi wøn kì Rïp, ge nuti wëggi kedhi piny tyëngɑni yi yïn, de ge ɑ́ceg kɑ wenø yi kweyyi wøn, kɑ ge ocögø gï nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen." 
2Chronicles20:11 O ɑnɑn wø yöd wø ceg kɑ cyeed wɑ̈g yi gen kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí wøn. 
2Chronicles20:12 Yï bɑ Jwøøg wøn! Cɑy gen, mɑ́ linyɑni dwøng cɑrø, wø pɑ cuggi cung kì bøli gen. Bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn me cuggi gwøgø yi wøn, de wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, køny wøn.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, jøg-ɑ cwøw kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kí othønhø, ɑ́bëëd ge ócungø kì bøli Kengø." 
2Chronicles20:14 Abëën wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömi Kwɑɑr Leebì mɑ ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì kelli ji mø ngenyø. Nyingi Kwɑɑr Leebì menɑni bɑ Yɑɑdhiel wɑ̈d Dhekɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Yeiel, wɑ̈d Benɑiyɑ̀ kì kelli kwɑrri Asɑp." 
2Chronicles20:15 Akööb Yɑɑdhiel kinni, “Yïn ɑ Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt wuki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni i pëthi wun ko lïngi, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko böggi yi ngenyi linyɑni; bɑ Jwøk ɑ ónyɑg liny, de pɑth ki wun." 
2Chronicles20:16 Pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi gen dhuki, keny-ɑ óbëën gen ge töng-ɑ mɑl kì Dhidh, wu órwööm ki gen kì cögi tör men-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki thïm Yeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Pɑth ki wun ɑ ónyɑg linyɑni. Wɑ̈dhu pëggi kɑ̈jji wun, kɑ wu yïd wun, o lidh yi wun kinni, wu ówëggi tyɑ̈mø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wun ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Yerusɑlem, wu ko lyebbi wɑlɑ̀ wu ko böggi. Kedhu be liny, wu ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt wïje kuule piny geki ji bënn, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl yi gen." 
2Chronicles20:19 Adhwödhi Kwɑrri Leebì mɑl, ɑ løg tyëng gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th kí tyëng gøl Körɑ̀, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil lenhi gen ki cwɑg mø døngø." 
2Chronicles20:20 Dhuki kì mwøl ɑmøøl liny yij pɑ̈l-ɑ buti Tekoɑ̀. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen, ɑköbbi gen yi Yöcɑpɑt kinni, “Wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Yerusɑlem ngɑ̈dhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee, o wu ócungi wun wu teg. Yïëyu møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun yi jøtöng møge.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Kɑ ɑ́rume nywɑgi kwøb ki ji, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki ji møg wör ki wörri lenhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge cyɑ̈dhi gen kì bøli yɑy, ge owörø kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee gït-ɑ ɑtheer.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi gen ki wör ceth, kɑ liny-ɑ ɑ́bï kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne göjji otwɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j" 
2Chronicles20:23 Kɑ liny Amön geki Moɑb pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi liny Edöm, kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen kinni tweet. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki nɑ̈gi tyëng Edöm, kɑ ge töng-ɑ ri gen, kɑ ri gen nɑ̈g gen." 
2Chronicles20:24 Keny-ɑ wɑ̈nhi liny Yeudiyɑ̀ ønbɑ̈r, ɑ́lïïdh gen kun-ɑ di tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ gï lidh gen ge buud-ɑ piny ge thøø. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me bodhø." 
2Chronicles20:25 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt kí linye kedh-ɑ be kwɑnyi jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑng linyɑni, kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki dhög, kí gïgcɑmm, kí ógudh, kí jɑmmì mø ngewi gen teeg. Ge ɑ́tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g ge ceg-ɑ cøng ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì bɑng linyɑni, de jɑmmɑni ɑ́dhɑ̈li kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi gen bënn mɑ́ ge ngenyø." 
2Chronicles20:26 Kɑ kì ri ngween cyɑ̈ng, ɑcøng gen ri gen kì yij Töör Berɑkɑ̀, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lejji gen kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en. Bene ɑ cwølli törɑni ɑ́ Berɑkɑ̀." 
2Chronicles20:27 Apeej liny Yerusɑlem yi Yöcɑpɑt ki medi pyëw me dwøng, mɑ́ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́tyɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles20:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen kɑɑldwøng, ɑkedhi gen yij Kengø, ge othumø ki thøm, o ge okudhø ki kɑ̈ngì." 
2Chronicles20:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ki kër-ɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ceg-ɑ bwøgø ki mendwøng." 
2Chronicles20:30 Codhe, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yöcɑpɑt ki mër, kɑ thödhi yi Jwøk ki mër kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
2Chronicles20:31 Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj. Meye bɑ Adhubɑ̀ nyɑɑr Cilkì." 
2Chronicles20:32 Jyɑ̈gi Yöcɑpɑt pɑ̈r ki jyɑ̈gi Asɑ̀ wïye, ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles20:33 De kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth nuti rëny en. Ji ɑ́bëëd ge nuti dwöög be mɑlli Jwøøg kweyyi gen ki pëthi gen bënn. 
2Chronicles20:34 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gwøg bënn yi Yöcɑpɑt kì ri cɑ̈gi jyɑ̈ge gïti cöge, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Yeeu wɑ̈d Aɑnɑnì, wɑ̈nyɑni bɑ budi Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles20:35 Kɑ Yöcɑpɑt órëbø kì bøli keny megø ki Akɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́göög ki gïgrijjø." 
2Chronicles20:36 Kɑ ge ogudø kì Edhïön Geber, ki yɑ̈thi nɑɑm omeli dwøng, møg nyi kedhi Tɑrcic." 
2Chronicles20:37 De jɑltöng, Eliedher wɑ̈d Dödɑbɑu kì Mɑrecɑ̀, Yöcɑpɑt ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Mɑ́ yï ɑ́rëbi ki Akɑdhiyɑ̀, yɑ̈th-ɑ ógur yi yïn ótørri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn.” Kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th ótørrø, kɑ ge ocögø ge nuti kedhi Tɑrcic." 
2Chronicles21:1 Akedhi Yöcɑpɑt kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì kɑɑl Debïd kì rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ wɑ̈de Yeörɑm røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì keje." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yeörɑm wɑ̈d Yöcɑpɑt rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ nyiimëëg ɑ́bïkyel: Adhɑriyɑ̀, Yekiel, Dhekɑriyɑ̀, Adhɑryɑu, Mikɑil, kí Cepɑtiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ge ɑ́thödhi yi wïyi gen Yöcɑpɑt ki ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí jɑmmì mø ngewi gen teg, kí kɑ̈ddi dör kì Yeudiyɑ̀. De lɑwø ɑ́mëgge Yeörɑm, mɑ́ en ɑ bɑ nyeldwøng, ɑ ójɑ̈ggi kì bɑnge." 
2Chronicles21:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeörɑm ki tegø, nyiimen ɑ́nɑ̈ge bënn geki kwï pëjji Isrɑil thyew." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yeörɑm ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn ɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles21:6 Ágöög ki gïgrijjø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb, kí kwï rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil møøgø, ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kɑ ɑ́nyöme kì kelli nyigi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb." 
2Chronicles21:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti dwɑddi ryɑ̈gi gøl Debïd, mɑ́ e ɑ́köngi kinni kwɑrri Debïd ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì yethi rïjj bënn." 
2Chronicles21:8 Kì ri jyɑ̈gi Yeörɑm, Edöm ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye kì ri Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ree rönye ki rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles21:9 Codhe, ɑkedh Yeörɑm geki pëjji linye, kí yɑ̈thi kyënyì kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Edöm. Kɑ ge tyeg yi liny Edöm kì wɑ̈r, de ge ɑ́turri wɑ̈g kì wɑ̈rɑni ceth kɑ ge obodhø." 
2Chronicles21:10 Kɑ Edöm ódhɑ̈lø dwöög thɑ́ ciggi Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ kɑɑl Libnɑ̀ ngɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈ye kì bøli kenyɑni thyew, mɑ́ Yeörɑm Jwøøg kweyyi gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́wiye piny." 
2Chronicles21:11 Kɑ ogëdø ki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møg nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem peeje be gwøg ki orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles21:12 Aödi Yeörɑm ki wɑ̈nyø yi Eliyɑ̀ jɑltöng, wɑ̈nyɑni okööbø kinni, “Yï ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyí Debïd, mɑ́ yï nuti bëëdø ni wïyí Rɑ̈dh Yöcɑpɑt, wɑlɑ̀ yï nuti bëëdø ni kweyí Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀." 
2Chronicles21:13 De yï ɑ́yöd yï ngøy-ɑ bëëdi rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem göjjí pyemi kwøbbi Jwøk, ni kɑ ɑ́göjji Isrɑil pyemi kwøbbi Jwøk yi Akɑɑb geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi kì bɑnge. Kɑ nyiimyëw møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge døøj kibølí nɑ̈g yi yïn bënn." 
2Chronicles21:14 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, jií kí nyigí, kí mɑ̈nní, ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mendwøng, o jɑmmí órënyi yi en." 
2Chronicles21:15 Yï órɑngi yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m yijí ki menteg, o dëlí ókedh e órënyø yethi cyɑ̈ng.”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Kɑ pëthi kwï tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kí Árɑb møg-ɑ bëëdø kì buti tyëng Kuc kì kömi nɑm, göjji rënyø ki Yeörɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles21:17 Kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ gøldwøng yɑg gen, kɑ mɑ̈nni rɑ̈dh bënn geki wɑ̈dde kɑ̈l yi gen gɑ ɑmɑgg, den-ɑ́ Akɑdhiyɑ̀, nyel-ɑ thinh kete ɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen." 
2Chronicles21:18 Codhe, ɑgöjji rɑ̈dh rɑ̈ɑ̈m yij yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles21:19 Kɑ tyëg-ɑ runn ɑ́ryew e obuddø ki yije. Codhe, ɑthøwe; ɑ́nɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m yije. Nuti rubø ki bwöri koodhø ni kweyye." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yeörɑm ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́ywöngi keny-ɑ ɑ́thøwe. Akonyii kì kɑɑl Debïd, de nuti koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
2Chronicles22:1 Tyëng Árɑb ɑ́kedhi be kɑbi jɑmmi Rɑ̈dh Yeörɑm, kɑ wɑ̈dde nɑ̈g yi gen, den-ɑ́ Akɑdhiyɑ̀ nyel-ɑ thinh ɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen kete. Codhe, ɑrøøny Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì kej wïye yi tyëng Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles22:2 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki run ɑ́kyel kì Yerusɑlem. Meye bɑ Athɑliyɑ̀, nyɑɑr Akɑɑb wɑ̈d Omrì rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles22:3 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ki bëëdi gøl Akɑɑb, mɑ́ meye ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ en nyi köbbii gwøg ki gïn-ɑ bɑ orøg." 
2Chronicles22:4 Árøngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ kì bɑng thøwi wïye, tyëng gøl Akɑɑb ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ji-ɑ nyi kønyii ki kwøb, kɑ órënyø kì bɑng kwøbbi jiɑni." 
2Chronicles22:5 Kɑ thɑb yi jiɑni, ɑrëbe kí Yörɑm rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki Asɑiil rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm. Kɑ linyɑni ótuumø kì Rɑmöth kì Gilyɑd, kɑ Yörɑm ree kedhi yi kedø kì yij linyɑni." 
2Chronicles22:6 Adwööge kɑɑl Yidhriil be tuuri kedde, ɑkedhi Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kunɑni be këëmii." 
2Chronicles22:7 Këëmi Yörɑm yi Akɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ göj me tɑ̈ɑ̈yii piny. Mɑ́ kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yinge kunɑni geki Yörɑm, yï gen ɑ́bëën yi Yeeu wɑ̈d Nimcì, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ ngɑn nɑ̈g tyëng gøl Akɑɑb bënn." 
2Chronicles22:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi Yeeu ki nɑ̈gi tyëng gøl Akɑɑb, ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑrøøme ki pëjji Yeudiyɑ̀ ge ócyɑ̈dhø ki wɑ̈ddi ómï Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kì kelli gen. Ge ɑ́bï-ɑ be lwöögi Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kɑ ɑ́kedhe be këëmø. Kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi Yeeu bënn." 
2Chronicles22:9 Ayɑbe Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kɑ gø yode e pɑ̈nø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Akɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn yï Yeeu, kɑ gø nɑ̈ge. De ɑ́kony, mɑ́ e ɑ́wør-ɑ kweye Yöcɑpɑt kipe gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gøgge kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́döng kì gøl Akɑdhiyɑ̀ me di kwɑny lɑwø." 
2Chronicles22:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Athɑliyɑ̀ meyi Rɑ̈dh Akɑdhiyɑ̀ kinni wɑ̈de ónɑ̈gø, ɑkööbe kinni nɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëng gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles22:11 Akɑdhiyɑ̀ yïe ɑ́dɑ nyiwɑ̈n me cwøl ɑ́ Yöcebɑ̀, o bɑ cï ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀. Kɑ nyel ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Akɑdhiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø, kwɑl yi Yöcebɑ̀. Kɑ gø kɑɑne øn nyi buud kì buti Kengø. Gø ɑ́yiele ki thøø kì cingi Athɑliyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles22:12 Kɑ obëëdø ɑ́ ɑkɑn kì Kengø ki runn ɑ́bïkyel, ɑ́ Athɑliyɑ̀ ɑ jyɑ̈gø ɑ́ rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø." 
2Chronicles23:1 Kì bɑng runn ɑ́bïryew, ɑkööb ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀ kinni, bøli keny-ɑ cɑ̈gi ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Codhe, ɑnywɑge kwøb geki pëjji liny ɑ́bïj ɑ løg. Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeroɑm, kí Icmɑil wɑ̈d Yöɑnɑn, kí Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Obed, kí Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adɑiyɑ̀, kí Elicɑpɑt wɑ̈d Dhikrì." 
2Chronicles23:2 Akedhi gen yethi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì geki jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli cwööl gen Yerusɑlem. 
2Chronicles23:3 Acøng gen ri gen bënn yij Kengø, kɑ ge onywɑ̈gø ki kwøb geki Yöɑc, wɑ̈d rɑ̈dh. Aköbbi gen yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ kinni, “Nyel bɑ wɑ̈d rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́thøw! Røny ɑnɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, kwɑrri Rɑ̈dh Debïd óbëëd ɑ́ gen ɑ jyɑ̈gø ceth." 
2Chronicles23:4 Gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi wøn èn: Keny-ɑ óbëën ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì be gwøg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, pɑ̈ngu ri wun, wun ɑ́ ɑkudd ɑ́dɑ̈g; ɑkud ɑ́kyel kore dhøggi Kengø," 
2Chronicles23:5 kɑ ɑkun-ɑ ryew kore gøldwøng, kɑ ɑkun-ɑ ɑ́döng kore Dhøg Wɑɑng Pï. Ji bënn ri gen ócøng gen ódɑ̈ri Kengø." 
2Chronicles23:6 Ko di dhɑnhø me kedhi Kengø den-ɑ́ ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ göögø keti gen ɑ ókedhi Kengø, mɑ́ ge bɑ ɑkwër, de lïngi ji bënn kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge bëëd gen kì wɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles23:7 Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kurø, cungi gen kì bɑdhhi rɑ̈dh, ki pilli gen kì cinggi gen, kɑ ge nyi kedh gen ki rɑ̈dh kun-ɑ kedhe. Nɑ̈ɑ̈g ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈nyi kedhi yij Kengø.”" 
2Chronicles23:8 Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ ɑ́yïëy yi Kwɑrri Leebì geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ møgɑni gwøg gen ceth. Jøg-ɑ nyi rum ki gwøg pɑ nyi kedhi yethi kɑ̈lli gen kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, de pëjjì bënn nyi bëëd ge nud, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ göögø kí møg-ɑ di kedhi kɑ̈lli gen." 
2Chronicles23:9 Tønggi Debïd geki ködde møg-ɑ ɑ́ying yij Kengø, ɑ́mëggi pëjji liny yi Yöyɑdɑ̀." 
2Chronicles23:10 Jøg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́cïb bøli Kengø yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ ri gen wen gen, o pilli gen tiim gen, ge kor-ɑ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles23:11 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l Yöɑc wɑ̈g yi Yöyɑdɑ̀, ɑcïbe yɑ̈r wïje, ɑmëgge gøn wɑ̈nyi cigg-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi rɑ̈dh. Codhe, ɑrønyii ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Yöɑc ɑ́røny yi ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀ geki wɑ̈dde, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne óryeerø kinni, “Rɑ̈dh ómïdhi yi Jwøk!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Alïngi ryeeri ji yi Athɑliyɑ̀. Codhe, ɑjwɑne Kengø, keny-ɑ cøng ji ri gen." 
2Chronicles23:13 Alidhe rɑ̈nh-ɑ nyɑ̈n e ócungø kì dhø Kengø, kì buti löjj møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb kipe rɑ̈nhì, e bɑ ɑwen yi pëjji liny, e kɑ̈ngì okodhø. Ji bënn ɑ́ryeer ki medi pëthi gen, ge okudhø ki kɑ̈ngì, ji owörø, thøm othomø. Kɑ Athɑliyɑ̀ ógødhe kɑge, ɑryeere kinni, “Amolpiny! Amolpiny!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yöyɑdɑ̀ nuti dwɑddi nɑ̈gi Athɑliyɑ̀ kì dhø Kengø. Codhe, ɑcwøle pëjji liny kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Kwɑnyu en kɑ kïdhu wɑ̈g kì kɑɑm ɑtødd ɑ́ryew møg korii, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ódwɑddi yielii nɑ̈g wun.”" 
2Chronicles23:15 Amɑg ge gøn, kɑ gø køøl gen gøldwøng, ɑnɑ̈g ge gøn kì Dhøg Kyënyì." 
2Chronicles23:16 Anywɑ̈ɑ̈g ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀ ki kwøb geki Rɑ̈dh Yöɑc kí ji bënn kinni, ge óbëëdø gɑ jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth." 
2Chronicles23:17 Codhe, ɑkedhi gen kengi Bɑɑl, kɑ gø cøør gen piny. Acøør gen këlli lɑm piny kɑ ngïjjì tørri gen, ɑnɑ̈g gen Mɑtɑn ókwëri Bɑɑl kì buti këlli lɑm." 
2Chronicles23:18 Akwɑɑny ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì yi Yöyɑdɑ̀, o ge kor gen gwøg kì yij Kengø. Gwøng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd, o ge nyi rɑ̈b gen gënh-ɑ nyi mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀. Gen ɑ wör, ɑ thom thøm, ɑ gwøg kwër kì cyɑ̈nggi kwër." 
2Chronicles23:19 Dhø Kengø ɑ́cïbi yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ ki jøg mø kurø, kipe kinni o ngɑn pɑ dhïw nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n kedhi yij Kengø." 
2Chronicles23:20 Abëën pëjji liny, kí jøgdøngø geki kwï ji bënn be rëbø ki Yöyɑdɑ̀, ɑkwɑny gen rɑ̈dh kì Kengø, kɑ gø kïdhi gen gøldwøng. Ákɑ̈l yi gen kɑ dhøng-ɑ dwøng, kɑ rɑ̈dh pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøøm rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
2Chronicles23:21 Ji bënn ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med, kɑ ɑ́rum Athɑliyɑ̀ ki nɑ̈gø, kɑ kɑɑl ókwöjø." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yöɑc ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ e runne bɑ ɑ́bïryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen kì Yerusɑlem. Meye bɑ Dhibiyɑ̀ kì Bircebɑ̀." 
2Chronicles24:2 Yöɑc ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yöyɑdɑ̀ nudd e onëënø 
2Chronicles24:3 Yöɑc ɑ́nyömmi ki mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew yi ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀, kɑ Yöɑc nyöddi yi mɑ̈nnɑni ki wɑ̈dd geki womɑ̈nn." 
2Chronicles24:4 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum Yöɑc ki rønyø ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, ɑkööbe kinni dwɑdd-ɑ thïgi Kengø." 
2Chronicles24:5 Aköbbe ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì kinni, kedhi gen yethi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ge cung gen ki ngyëny mø gïïr kì yï ji, o ngyënyyɑni nyi thïg Kengø kì yethi runn. Kɑ okööbø kinni gwøøg møgɑni ceth. De Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́buddi kì kömi kwøb." 
2Chronicles24:6 Codhe, ɑcwøle Yöyɑdɑ̀ jɑngi ókwër, kɑ gø pyëje kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ bɑɑny ókwër ki köbbø kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen gwɑ̈j kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni nyi muuj ji ki gwɑ̈ɑ̈j Kemi Kwër?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Mɑ́ nyigi Athɑliyɑ̀, ngɑn-ɑ rɑj, ɑ́kedhi ød Jwøk, kɑ jɑmmi kwër kì ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kïdhi gen be mɑlli Bɑɑl." 
2Chronicles24:8 Aköbbi Kwɑrri Leebì yi rɑ̈dh kinni, göög gen ki Sɑndug kɑ cïb dhø Kengø." 
2Chronicles24:9 Aödi gen Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀ ki wöödø kinni kɑ̈ni dhɑnhø bëne ki gwɑ̈j men mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ni møg-ɑ ɑ́cøng kì tyeli mɑl kì yij ryɑng yi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
2Chronicles24:10 Kɑ ji pëthi gen ómïnø geki pëjji gen yi møgɑni, kɑ gwɑ̈ɑ̈j gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen, kɑ gø kïdhi gen yij sɑndungɑni, kɑ ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ngø." 
2Chronicles24:11 Sɑndungɑni nyi ceg kɑ muuj jɑngi gøldwøng yethi cyɑ̈ng yi Kwɑrri Leebì. O kenyi pɑ̈ng sɑndug yi ngyëny, ngyëny nyii kwɑnyø yi jɑngi gøldwøng geki Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ Sɑndug nyi dwøøg keje yi gen. Kɑ ge ocungø ki ngyëny mø ngenyø ki mendwøng." 
2Chronicles24:12 Ngyëny nyi mëgg-ɑ jøg-ɑ thïg Kengø yi rɑ̈dh geki Yöyɑdɑ̀, kɑ ge okïrø ki jøg-ɑ nyi twïgø ki kïttì, kí bödhhi pɑ̈m, kí jøg-ɑ nyi thɑ̈dhø ki ngyëny, o ge thïg gen Kengø." 
2Chronicles24:13 Ge ɑ́göög bënn ki gwøg me teeg cɑrø, kɑ Kengø thïg gen, kɑ døøg-ɑ keje ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde e teg cøn." 
2Chronicles24:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jøg-ɑ thïg Kengø ki gwøg, ɑmëggi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø men-ɑ ɑ́döng rɑ̈dh geki Yöyɑdɑ̀. Kɑ gï göög gen ki tɑ̈mmì kí jɑmmi Kengø møg-ɑ kyeelø. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yöyɑdɑ̀ e onëënø, gëdhhì ɑ́bëëd ge nyii muujø kì yij Kengø kì bøli kej gen ceth, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
2Chronicles24:15 Yöyɑdɑ̀ ɑ́yöø ki mendwøng, kɑ runne ogöögø ki miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, codhe ɑthøwe." 
2Chronicles24:16 Akoonyii kej rörri rorr kì kɑɑl Debïd, ɑ́ pwøj kipe gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gögge tyëng Isrɑil, kí Jwøk kí Kengø." 
2Chronicles24:17 De keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Yöyɑdɑ̀ ki thøø, ɑköbbi Rɑ̈dh Yöɑc yi pëjji Yeudiyɑ̀ ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi en, kɑ mø gen yïëy yi rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles24:18 Codhe, kɑ ji ówïyø ki mɑ̈ddø kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be mɑlli ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ Jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø. Arënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́göög gen ki orøg." 
2Chronicles24:19 Aöd Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jøtöng møg köbbi gen kinni døøg gen kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De ji ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi møgɑni. 
2Chronicles24:20 Codhe, ɑbëën wëyi Jwøk kömi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀. Acunge kì keny me cugge nenni yi ji, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni gede kwøbbe ɑ pyeem gen yi wun, ɑ kɑ̈nu kömi wun ki ryɑ̈g! Mɑ́ e ɑ́wiy piny yi wun, wu lonye kɑ wiy piny!”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Kɑ Dhekɑriyɑ̀ köme mënni ki kwøb. Amuuj rɑ̈dh ki cigg kɑ Dhekɑriyɑ̀ bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø, ɑthøwe." 
2Chronicles24:22 Wïj Rɑ̈dh Yöɑc ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø ki gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöyɑdɑ̀ wïyi Dhekɑriyɑ̀, ɑnɑ̈ge Dhekɑriyɑ̀. Keny-ɑ cyɑ̈ngi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ki thøø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólïdhi kɑ ócɑ̈yyø!”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Kì ri thumi runɑni ceth, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r liny Arɑm kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem, kɑ pëjji liny bënn nɑ̈g, kɑ jɑmmì mø ngenyø kɑ̈l kɑ ge muuj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kì Dimɑceg." 
2Chronicles24:24 Liny Arɑm ɑ́bëëd e nøg cɑrø kibøli liny Yeudiyɑ̀, de liny Arɑm ɑ́wëggi tyɑmi liny Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́wiy gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen. Menɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cɑ́y kiper Rɑ̈dh Yöɑc." 
2Chronicles24:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg liny Arɑm, Yöɑc ɑ́döng e ree dɑ kedø me rɑɑj cɑrø, kɑ pëjji liny ɑ́ryew ri gen lugi ge gøn, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen kì yij pyëne, ɑ́ kej cöngi wɑ̈d ókwërø Yöyɑdɑ̀. Akonyii kì kɑɑl Debïd, de nuti koony-ɑ kej rörri rorr." 
2Chronicles24:26 (Jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g Yöɑc bɑ Dhɑbɑd wɑ̈d Cimeɑth jɑl Amön, kí Yödhɑbɑd wɑ̈d Cimrit ngeti Moɑb)." 
2Chronicles24:27 Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhì yije dɑ wɑ́ji wɑ̈ddi Yöɑc, geki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́töng kipere, kí møg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì ri kër-ɑ ɑ́thïge Kengø. Arøøny Amɑdhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì bɑnge." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïngwen. Meye bɑ Yöɑdïn kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles25:2 Ágöög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De nuti göögø kɑ pyëwe bëne. 
2Chronicles25:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume cïbi lɑwø piny ceth, ɑnɑ̈ge jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g wïye." 
2Chronicles25:4 Nyigi jøgɑni nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g en, de ɑ́göög ceth kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ kinni, “Wëëg geki mëëg ko nɑ̈g kiper orøng-ɑ gwøg yi nyigi gøn, o nywøl ko nɑ̈g kiper orøng-ɑ gwøg yi wëëg gen geki mëëg gen, de nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g dhɑnhø kete kiper orøng-ɑ gwøg yi en.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Jøliny Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́cøng yi Rɑ̈dh Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kɑ gï cïmme gɑ køøm kì wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen, kɑ kömi jøliny ɑ́lïp geki jøliny miyø cïbe ki pëjji gen. Jølinyɑni bënn kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, mø runni gen cɑ̈gi kì ri runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl. Ge bɑ jøliny møg-ɑ óyienyø kidøøj, ri gen tiim gen kiper liny, ge ngɑ̈ny këddø kí tøngg geki ködd." 
2Chronicles25:6 Kɑ kömi linyɑni kïrre ki ɑ́lïp miyø kì Isrɑil, ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́ngwen." 
2Chronicles25:7 De jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk ɑ́kedhi yï rɑ̈dh kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Jøliny Isrɑil ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tøøk kì kelli liny-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles25:8 Yï orumø kinni, ce yï ógöögø yï teg yi gen kì yij liny, de bɑ Jwøk ɑ yïe di tegø me wëggi dhɑnhø tyɑ̈mø wɑlɑ̀ ɑ wëggi dhɑnhø tyɑmø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Apyëëj jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk menɑni yi Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kinni, “De ngyëny ɑ́tegg møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ gen gwøg-ɑ dï?” Alöggi jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk kinni, “Yï óthödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mø ngenyø kibøli møgɑni!”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Codhe, kɑ liny Isrɑil men-ɑ ɑ́kïr yi Rɑ̈dh Amɑdhiyɑ̀, gï köbbe kinni døøg gen myërri gen. Kɑ pëthi gen órënyø ki mendwøng ki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen kinni døøg wun yethi myërri wun." 
2Chronicles25:11 De Amɑdhiyɑ̀ pyëwe ɑ́cwede, kɑ linye peeje yij Töör Omelø. Anyïɑ̈ggi gen kì kunɑni, kɑ ge ónɑ̈ggø ki ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø kì kelli liny Edöm." 
2Chronicles25:12 Kɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø møøgø mɑg yi gen. Akɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑmɑggɑni yi gen, kɑ gï kïdhi gen oledh Kïti Selɑ̀, kɑ gï dhur gen piny kì wïj kïnɑni. Kɑ ge othøø kì thɑ kït." 
2Chronicles25:13 Jøliny Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n kedhi be liny yi Amɑdhiyɑ̀, ge ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kɑɑm Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ geki Bet Örøn, kɑ ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g nɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ jɑmmì mø ngenyø ki mendwøng kɑ̈l yi gen." 
2Chronicles25:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kì be tyɑmi liny Edöm, kɑ ngïjji jwöggi Edöm kɑ̈ɑ̈le, kɑ gï gwøge gɑ jwögge, kɑ gï nyi rɑ̈bbe ki bɑkur kɑ gï mɑlle." 
2Chronicles25:15 Kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j órënyø ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en, ɑöde yï Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ki jɑltöng. Aköbbii yi jɑltöng kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ mɑllí jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li yieli jii gen kì cingí?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Kɑ kyëddi yi Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kinni, “Á ɑ́wën ɑ ɑ́gwøøg yïn, yïn ɑ́ jɑl tøg buri rɑ̈dh? Kud, ke pɑ kud yï ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø!” Akud jɑltöng, de ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni, Jwøk yï ɑ́rum ki nɑ̈gø yi en, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bɑɑny kwøbbɑ ki lïngø.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Amɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ geki jøg-ɑ nyi kønyii ki kwøb, kwøb ɑ́nywɑg gen kinni ge kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki Isrɑil. Codhe, ɑöde rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, Yeöɑc wɑ̈d Yöɑkɑdh, ki wöödø kinni bëe be nyɑɑg ki en." 
2Chronicles25:18 Aløøg kwøbbi Amɑdhiyɑ̀ yi Yeöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kinni, “Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, yɑdh sɑndɑl ɑ́ödi ki wöödø yi otwelø kì kïtti Lubnɑn kinni, muuj nyɑrí o nywøm yi wɑ̈dɑ. De dɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l me dwøng mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kenyɑni kɑ otwelø ywöönye piny." 
2Chronicles25:19 Anɑn, Amɑdhiyɑ̀ yï pwöd-ɑ köörí ce dɑ tyëng Edöm mø tyɑɑm yïn, de yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, bëëd kì kɑɑlí. Á kipe ngø ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki göj men-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈g kömí wuki jií.”" 
2Chronicles25:20 De Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngø. Ábëëd ɑ́ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøk, eni tyɑmi Amɑdhiyɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́døøg be mɑlli jwöggi Edöm." 
2Chronicles25:21 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yeöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil be nyɑɑg ki Amɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ ge røøm-ɑ Bet Cemec kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles25:22 Atyɑɑm liny Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ jø Yeudiyɑ̀ reng-ɑ yethi myërri gen." 
2Chronicles25:23 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Amɑdhiyɑ̀ mɑg yi Rɑ̈dh Yeöɑc kì Bet Cemec, kɑ gø kïdhe Yerusɑlem, kɑ budi döri Yerusɑlem cøøre piny, cɑg kì Dhøg Eprɑim gïti Dhøg Wïj Tung, kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́dhure piny bɑ mïtïr miy ɑ́ryew." 
2Chronicles25:24 Akwɑnye dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi Obed Edöm kì yij Kengø, kí jɑmmi Kengø bënn, kí jɑmmi gøldwøng møg-ɑ per gen teg, kɑ gï kïdhe Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Ákɑ̈ɑ̈d thyew ki ɑmɑgg." 
2Chronicles25:25 Amɑdhiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj kì bɑng thøwi Yeöɑc rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. 
2Chronicles25:26 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Amɑdhiyɑ̀ cɑg kì ri jɑ̈gge gïti thume bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀. 
2Chronicles25:27 Cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈ge ki pyemi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ́göggi ki ɑmolpiny kì Yerusɑlem kì cyɑ̈n, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈re kɑɑl Lɑkic, de tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́løg bɑnge, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen kì kunɑni." 
2Chronicles25:28 Akɑ̈ɑ̈lii Yerusɑlem kì kömi kyeny, kɑ kony kì kej rörri rorr, kì kɑɑl Debïd." 
2Chronicles26:1 Kɑ Udhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kwɑny yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, kɑ gø røøny gen kej wïye ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles26:2 Kì bɑng thøwi Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Elɑth yi Udhiyɑ̀ kɑ gø døøge ki gerø. 
2Chronicles26:3 Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́ryew. Meye bɑ Yekoliyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles26:4 Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ki gïndøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni wïye. 
2Chronicles26:5 Ábëëd e nyi kedh-ɑ be lïngi kwøbbi Jwøk kì yï Dhekɑriyɑ̀. O keny-ɑ ɑ́tyer pyëwe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e yije bong ɑ́dud, ɑgyëdhii yi Jwøk." 
2Chronicles26:6 Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́kedhi be nyɑɑg ki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀. Kɑ dörri kɑ̈ddi Gɑth, kí Yɑmniyɑ̀, kí Acdöd cøøre piny, kɑ ogëdø ki kɑ̈ddi dör kì buti Acdöd, kí kɑ̈dd møøgø kì Pelistiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles26:7 Ákøny yi Jwøk ki tyɑmi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kí Árɑb møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Gurbɑɑl kí tyëng Meun." 
2Chronicles26:8 Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e nyii thödhø yi tyëng Amön ki gwɑ̈j, kɑ ceg-ɑ ti tëngø, kɑ pere wɑ̈dh-ɑ Rïp." 
2Chronicles26:9 Yerusɑlem ɑ́gwøg yi Udhiyɑ̀ e teg, kɑ gø gëdde ki dör mø bɑ̈rrø kì Dhøg Wïj Tung, kí Dhøg Tör, kí ɑ́duud dörø." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ágëëd thyew ki kɑ̈ddi dör mø bɑ̈rrø kì yij ryɑng, kɑ okunyø ki yïïth mø gïïr, mɑ́ yïe ɑ́dɑ dhög mø ngenyø ki mendwøng kì thɑ́ kïttì kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kí piny-ɑ wïje pɑ̈r. Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́bëëde e mɑɑr-ɑ pur, ji ɑ́cïje ki pïdhø ki bɑ̈ggi oløg kì myërri kelli kïttì, kɑ gï cïje kí puri piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med." 
2Chronicles26:11 Yïe ɑ́dɑ liny me dwøng me ree tiim en kipe nyɑɑg. Yeiel geki Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ ɑ bɑ pëjji linyɑni, ge jɑɑg-ɑ yi Anɑniyɑ̀, jɑl tøg buri rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles26:12 Linyɑni pyejj-ɑ yi pëjjì ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́bïkyel," 
2Chronicles26:13 kwɑnni jøliny-ɑ pyejji yi gen bɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí ɑ́bïryew, kí miy ɑ́bïj ge ócuggø nyɑɑg ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles26:14 Jøliny ɑ́nëngi yi Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀ kí ködd, kí tøngg, kí ɑcudh, kí ɑ́dhedheg, kí wethh, kí nywøli wethh, kí lel mø bɑ̈ddì." 
2Chronicles26:15 Bödhhi thɑ̈dh ɑ́göög ki jɑmmì møg-ɑ nyi pööd ki wethh, kí møg-ɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈d ki tuggi kïttì mø døngø kì wïj dörø, kì wɑ̈thi tùngi döri kɑɑl. Kɑ pere tɑɑy-ɑ kömi piny bëne, kɑ ótëngø ki mendwøng, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kønyii yi Jwøk." 
2Chronicles26:16 De keny-ɑ ɑ́tëngi Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀, ɑmɑgii yi ɑthwøg, bene ɑthwøngɑni ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l pɑ̈ɑ̈nhe. Dhø Jwøk ɑ́pyem yi Udhiyɑ̀ kɑ kedh-ɑ yij Kengø be rɑ̈b ki bɑkur kì wïj këli bɑkur." 
2Chronicles26:17 Kɑ ókwërø Adhɑriyɑ̀ geki ókwër pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g mø teg, løg-ɑ bɑng rɑ̈dh," 
2Chronicles26:18 be kyëddii, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Udhiyɑ̀! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pɑ rɑ̈bbi yi yïn ki bɑkur, den-ɑ́ ókwër keti gen. Ókwërr-ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Aɑron bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́kwër kipe gwøngɑni. Dhwöödh kì kej kwër keny. Pyëw Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rënyi yi yïn, bong gyëdhe me yod yi yïn kinni tek.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì yij Kengø kì buti këli bɑkur, o ópɑni bɑkur omïdhø yi en kì cinge. Kɑ mɑg yi liny ki ókwër, kɑ bøle mɑg yi wɑɑny kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
2Chronicles26:20 Abwøg Adhɑriyɑ̀ geki ókwër keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen bøli rɑ̈dh, codhe ɑjwɑn ge gøn ki kïdhi wɑ̈g kì yij Kengø, mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki cɑyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles26:21 Kwï runni Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́tyëg yi en e ywëdhø, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mɑgii yi wɑɑny, pɑ cuggi kedhi yij Kengø këti. Ábëëd ɑ gøle, e bong gwøg me gwøg yi en. Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny lɑwø yi wɑ̈de." 
2Chronicles26:22 Kwï jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde e ojyɑ̈gø, bɑ ɑgwed yi jɑltöng, Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh." 
2Chronicles26:23 Akedhi Udhiyɑ̀ kun-ɑ di kweyye, de nuti koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kì bɑng wɑɑny men-ɑ ɑ́mɑgii. Yöthɑm wɑ̈de ɑ ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì bɑnge." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yöthɑm ɑ́göög ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel. Meye bɑ Yerucɑ̀, nyɑɑr Dhɑdök." 
2Chronicles27:2 Kɑ ogöögø ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye, de nuti røngø ni wïye ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈b ki bɑkur kì yij Kengø. De ji ɑ́cög ge ogöögø ki orøg." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yöthɑm ɑ ɑ́ger Dhøg Wɑɑng Wuudø, dhøng-ɑ yïëbbi Kengø. Kɑ döri Yerusɑlem thïge kì keny-ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Opel." 
2Chronicles27:4 Ágëëd ki kɑ̈dd kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ogëdø ki dör mø bɑ̈rrø møg-ɑ nyi kur." 
2Chronicles27:5 Ányïɑ̈ggi ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön, kɑ gø tyɑme geki linye. Codhe, kɑ tyëng Amön cir yi en o ge thödhi ge gøn ki gwɑ̈j kì yij run, ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. Gwɑ̈nyɑni kì run ɑ́kyel bɑ kïllì ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́ngwen møgi ɑ́tegø, kí tøn ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel mø gemè, kí tøn ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel mø ceir." 
2Chronicles27:6 Yöthɑm ɑ́göög e teg, mɑ́ e ɑ́mïdh-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles27:7 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì ri jyɑ̈gi Yöthɑm, kí lìny-ɑ nyɑge, kí yëthi jyɑ̈ge bënn, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles27:8 Runni Yöthɑm ɑ́bëëd gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel." 
2Chronicles27:9 Akedhi Yöthɑm kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony kɑɑl Debïd, kɑ Akɑɑdh wɑ̈de røny ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles28:1 Akɑɑdh ɑ́göög ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel. Nuti göögø ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kweye Debïd." 
2Chronicles28:2 De ɑ́ngøy-ɑ bëëdi rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil. Yïe ɑ́dɑ ngïjji Bɑɑl møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki ngyënyø dødø," 
2Chronicles28:3 kɑ orɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì Töör Kinöm, kɑ wɑ̈dde mëgge Bɑɑl gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, e ngøy-ɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng-ɑ cyeed wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny, keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles28:4 Akɑɑdh ɑ́muuj ki gëdhhì, kɑ orɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ yethi gen nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, kí wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí thɑ́ yenh-ɑ di tïb." 
2Chronicles28:5 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́røngi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh, ɑgöjjii tyɑmø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Átyɑm yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ mø gïïr kïdhe Dimɑceg gɑ ɑmɑgg. Kɑ tyɑm thyew yi Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles28:6 Kɑ jöddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew nɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel yi Pekɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Gïn ni menɑni, ɑ́wëggi cwöbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen, mɑ́ e ɑ́wiy piny yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles28:7 Kɑ Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh, kí Adhrikɑm jɑngi gøldwøng kí Elkɑnɑ̀ ókwøøm rɑ̈dh, ge nɑ̈g yi Dhikrì ge bënn." 
2Chronicles28:8 Ngö tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ wɑdd ki tyëng Isrɑil, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kí othønhø mø bɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, gɑ ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́ryew ɑ́mɑg yi tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ gï kïdhi gen Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kyeel kí jɑmmì mø ngenyø." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ádɑ jɑltööng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j me cwøl ɑ́ Oded, kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Árøøm dhø döri kɑɑl ki liny Isrɑil ge kwøll-ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen. Akööbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun ɑ́bëëd pyëwe rɑɑj ki Yeudiyɑ̀, bene ɑ cïbe gïn cinggi wun, de ɑnɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïng ki rɑ̈ji nɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gu gen." 
2Chronicles28:10 O ɑnɑn wu dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi cwøw kí mɑ̈nni Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀ gɑ bɑ̈nggi wun. Wu kwïj wøw thyew kinni wu ɑ́røngi ni gen kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? 
2Chronicles28:11 Anɑn lïngu kwøbbɑ, kɑ wɑddi wun møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun gɑ ɑmɑgg, wiy ge døøg gen myërri gen. Ke pɑ wiyu gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe órënyi, kɑ wu cɑy yi en.”" 
2Chronicles28:12 Kɑ pëjji gøl Eprɑim ɑ́ngwen: Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöɑnɑn, kí Berekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mecilemöth, kí Kedhekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑlum, kí Amɑsɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adlɑy, óbɑ̈nyø thyew ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi liny Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles28:13 Akööb gen kinni, “Amɑggɑni ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun Sɑmɑriyɑ̀! Wɑ ɑ́rum ki orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pyëwe órënyø ki men cugge cɑyi wɑ.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Codhe, kɑ ɑmɑgg geki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Yeudiyɑ̀, mëggi teedø geki jɑggi gen yi liny Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles28:15 Kɑ jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen kwɑny o ge thödhi gen ɑmɑgg ki ógudh kì ri ógudh-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g. Kɑ ɑmɑgg thödhi gen ki ógudh, kí wɑr, kí gïgcɑmm, kí pï. Kɑ keddi gen gïny ki møøw dhetun. Ji-ɑ dhɑl yi cyɑ̈dhø ki tyelli gen, ɑ́cïb kömi ɑderr, kɑ ɑmɑgg bënn dwøøg Yerikö, kɑɑl benø kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀. Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil dwöög-ɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles28:16 Kɑ tyëng Edöm pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ji mø gïïr kɑ̈l yi gen gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
2Chronicles28:17 Kɑ Akɑɑdh öd-ɑ yï Tiglɑth Pileser, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kinni o køny yi en." 
2Chronicles28:18 Kì bøli kenyɑni, tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ge nyi mɑ̈ny-ɑ myërri thɑ́ kïttì kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Kɑ kɑ̈ddi Bet Cemec kí Ayɑlön, kí Gederöth geki kɑ̈ddi Sökö, kí Timnɑ̀, kí Gimdhö geki myërri gen mɑg yi gen, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ be bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddɑni." 
2Chronicles28:19 Kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́kïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ryɑ̈g, mɑ́ Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh jie nuti göggø yi en ki gïndøj, kɑ dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyeme." 
2Chronicles28:20 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́bɑ̈nyi kønyi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh, kɑ yöd gø gögge’ ryɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles28:21 Codhe, kɑ dhɑb kwɑny yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh kì yij Kengø, kí gøldwøng, kí kɑ̈lli jɑgg, kɑ gï mëgge rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, de nuti kønyø yi rɑ̈nhdwøngɑni." 
2Chronicles28:22 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ti ɑkørr ngënyø kì kömi Akɑɑdh, kɑ ceg-ɑ pëddø ki orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles28:23 Jwöggi Arɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́tyɑmii, ɑ́nënge ki gëdhhì. Mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb kinni, “Rɑ̈nhi Arɑm ɑ́køny yi jwöggi Arɑm, o ke thödhɑ gen ki gëdhhì, yɑ ócuggø kønyø yi gen thyew.” Menɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ni köme ki rɑj geki pödhe." 
2Chronicles28:24 Jɑmmi Kengø ɑ́kwɑny yi Akɑɑdh kɑ gï tørre kinni tweet, kɑ dhø Kengø cyëëg yi en, kɑ ree gëdde ki këlli lɑm kì Yerusɑlem bëne." 
2Chronicles28:25 Akɑɑdh ɑ́gëëd ki keny nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì yethi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki myërre bënn, kɑ̈jjɑni ɑ yethi gen nyi rɑ̈bbe gïn ki bɑkur, e rëny-ɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles28:26 Jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø bënn cɑg kì ri cɑ̈gi jyɑ̈ge gïti thume, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈jji Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil."
