2Chronicles28:27 Akedhi Akɑɑdh kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Arøøny Kedhekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈de ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles29:1 Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ɑ́ rɑ̈dh e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïngwen. Meye bɑ Abiyɑ̀ nyɑɑr Dhekɑriyɑ̀. 
2Chronicles29:2 Ágöög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kweye Rɑ̈dh Debïd. 
2Chronicles29:3 Kì kyeel dwɑ̈tt kì yij run-ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Kedhekiyɑ̀, dhøggi Kengø ɑ́døøge ki yiebø, kɑ gï thïge." 
2Chronicles29:4 Ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́cønge kej ɑ́kyel kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. 
2Chronicles29:5 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Wun ɑ Kwɑrri Leebì, kwëru ri wun kɑ Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun kwër wun thyew. Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu gïg-ɑ óywëëdh Kengø wɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles29:6 Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dhøge ɑ́pyem yi kweyyee, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïnrɑj kì bøle. Áwiy piny yi gen, kɑ ngɑ̈thi gen lugi gen keny-ɑ bëëde." 
2Chronicles29:7 Dhøggi Kengø ɑ́cyëëg gen, kɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ wëggi gen thøø, kɑ ge ówïyø rɑ̈b ki bɑkur geki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì yij Kengi Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles29:8 Arënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem, ɑgöggi gen ki gïnrɑj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne obwøgø, kì bɑng gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kidøøj." 
2Chronicles29:9 Wëëgee ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny, kɑ mɑ̈nnee kí nyigee kɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
2Chronicles29:10 “Anɑn, pyëwɑ dwɑdd-ɑ nywɑ̈g ki kwøb ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, o gööge pyëwe pɑ rɑɑj ki wɑ." 
2Chronicles29:11 Wɑ̈ddɑ, piny ko wëggu pöödhø. Bɑ wun ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu nyi rɑ̈bbu en ki bɑkur, o wu nyi peeju ji be mɑllii.”" 
2Chronicles29:12 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Kwɑrri Leebì møg: Mɑɑ̈th wɑ̈d Amɑsɑy, kí Yöiil wɑ̈d Adhɑriyɑ̀ kì gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th. Kïc wɑ̈d Abdì, kí Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeɑlelel kì gøl Merɑrì. Yöɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhimnɑ̀, kí Eden wɑ̈d Yöɑ̀, kì gøl Gercön. Cimrì kí Yeiel kì gøl Elidhɑpɑn. Dhekɑriyɑ̀ kí Mɑtɑniyɑ̀ kì gøl Asɑp. Yëuel kí Cimeì kì gøl Ëmɑn. Cemɑiyɑ̀ kí Udhiel kì gøl Yeduthun." 
2Chronicles29:13  
2Chronicles29:14  
2Chronicles29:15 Kwɑrri Leebì møgɑni, wɑddi gen ɑ́cøng gen, kɑ ri gen kwër gen. Codhe, kɑ Kengø kwër yi gen ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh, ni kɑ ókwøbii kì yethi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles29:16 Akedhi ókwër yij Kengø be kwërii, kɑ gïg-ɑ ywëdhø bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì yij Kengø, kɑ gï cïb gen yij ódɑ̈ri gøl Kengø. Akwɑɑny gen yi Kwɑrri Leebì kì kenyɑni kɑ gï kïdhi gen yij töör Kidrön." 
2Chronicles29:17 Kwëri Kengø ɑ́cɑ̈g ɑ kyeel cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl, kɑ óthumø bëne kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng. Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kwër bëne kí øn-ɑ kedhi yij Kengø. Codhe, ɑdøøg gen ki gwøg ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïdɑ̈g møøgø, kɑ ge gït-ɑ cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel, ge gwir-ɑ Kengø kipe mɑ̈ddø" 
2Chronicles29:18 Akedhi Kwɑrri Leebì yï Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Kengø bëne ɑ́rum ki kwërø yi wøn, geki kël-ɑ wïje nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhì, kí tɑrɑbeedh ópuun kwër, kí jɑmmi gen bënn." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g bënn yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́pyeme dhø Jwøk dwöög yi wøn, kɑ ge døøg wøn ki kwërø. Jɑmmɑni bënn nud kì bøli këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Chronicles29:20 Codhe ɑjwɑɑn pëjji kɑɑl ki cøngø yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yij Kengø bënn." 
2Chronicles29:21 Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́bïryew, kí órömm-ɑ døngø ɑ́bïryew, kí órömm-ɑ thønhø ɑ́bïryew, gɑ gëdhhi orøg, mø gøøm bøli rɑ̈dh kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki kwëri Kengø. Aköbbi ókwër kwɑrri Aɑron yi rɑ̈dh kinni, ngɑl gen jɑmmɑni gɑ gëdhhì kì wïj këli lɑm." 
2Chronicles29:22 Wɑ̈dhh ɑ ɑ́kwøng ki ngɑlø yi ókwër, codhe ɑngɑl gen órömm-ɑ døngø, keny-ɑ ɑ́rume ɑngɑl gen órömm-ɑ thønhø. Kɑ remmi gëdhhɑni kiny gen ri këli lɑm." 
2Chronicles29:23 Kì cyɑ̈n, ɑmuuj gen ónyögg rɑ̈dh geki ji-ɑ mɑ̈ddi, kɑ cinggi gen thɑɑny gen kömi ónyöggɑni." 
2Chronicles29:24 Codhe, ɑngɑɑl ónyöggɑni yi ókwër kɑ remmi gen køny gen kömi këli lɑm, ɑ́ gëëdhi men gøøm orøøg ji bënn, mɑ́ rɑ̈dh ɑ́kööb kinni, i muuj gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kí gënhi orøg kipe tyëng Isrɑil bënn." 
2Chronicles29:25 Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Rɑ̈dh Debïd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg jɑltöng Gɑd, kí jɑltöng Nɑthɑn, ge ɑ́mïdhi yi rɑ̈dh ceth. Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì cïbe yij Kengø ki thøm." 
2Chronicles29:26 Thøm mø ni møgɑni ɑ ɑ́ying yï Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kɑ ókwër ócungø thyew ki kɑ̈ngì kì cinggi gen." 
2Chronicles29:27 Akööb Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, i muuj gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́muuj gëëdhi, ɑmɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör yi ji, ki thøm kɑ kɑ̈ngì kodh." 
2Chronicles29:28 Ji ɑ́kedhi be mɑ̈ddø bënn, ge nuti wïyø wör, o thøm nuti ywömø gïti kɑ ɑ́rɑ̈bi gëdhhì bënn." 
2Chronicles29:29 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kí ji bënn ri gen bøødh gen piny kɑ Jwøk mɑl yi gen." 
2Chronicles29:30 Aköbbi Kwɑrri Leebì yi rɑ̈dh geki jɑggi pödhø kinni, i mɑlli gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd geki Asɑp jɑltöng. Kɑ ji owörø bënn ki wör pëthi gen omedø, ri gen bøødh gen, ge mɑll-ɑ Jwøk." 
2Chronicles29:31 Aköbbi ji yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Anɑn wu ɑ́rum ki kwërø, o wu dhïw, kɑ̈ɑ̈lu gëdhhi pwøj mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Agwøg gen møgɑni, kɑ kwï gen ókɑ̈nø thyew ki jɑmmì møg ngɑl gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, ngö ge nuti köbbø kinni kɑ̈ni gen." 
2Chronicles29:32 Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki wɑ̈dhh pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, kí ɑ́tegg miyø kí römm miy ɑ́ryew, gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, men rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
2Chronicles29:33 ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni thyew ki wɑ̈dhh miy ɑ́bïkyel, kí dyëg ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, gɑ gëdhhì mër." 
2Chronicles29:34 De kɑ ɑ́bëëde e bong ókwër mø ngenyø møg ngɑl jɑmmɑni, ɑkøny gen yi Kwɑrri Leebì gïti kɑ ɑ́rum gwøg. Kì bøli kenyɑni ókwër ɑ́bëëd ri gen kwëër gen, (Kwɑrri Leebì ókwër ɑ́lod gen ki gwøgi kwër)." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ábëëd ɑ́ ókwër ɑ nyi rɑ̈b dwɑ̈li gëdhhi mër, kí gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, o gen ɑ nyi køny møgi oløg men-ɑ nyi muuj kyeel ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne. Codhe, ɑcigi mɑ̈ddø cɑ̈gø kì Kengø." 
2Chronicles29:36 Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki ji ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med, mɑ́ ge ɑ́køny yi Jwøk, kɑ jɑmmɑni jwɑn ki gwøgø." 
2Chronicles30:1 Aödi tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki wɑ̈nyø yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀, geki tyëng Eprɑim, kí tyëng Mɑnɑsè thyew, i bï gen Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kì Yerusɑlem be gwøgi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh." 
2Chronicles30:2 Ayïëy rɑ̈dh geki pëjji tyëng Isrɑil kí Yerusɑlem kinni, Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ógwøg yi gen kì ryeew dwɑ̈tt." 
2Chronicles30:3 Kwëër Ákɑɑdh nuti gwøgø yi gen kì bøli keje, mɑ́ ókwër ɑ́bëëd ri gen nuti kwëër gen bënn, o ji ɑ́bëëd ri gen nuti cøng gen kì Yerusɑlem bënn." 
2Chronicles30:4 Rɑ̈dh geki ji ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med ki møgɑni," 
2Chronicles30:5 codhe, ɑcwøøl tyëng Isrɑil bënn, cɑg kì Dɑn kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti Bircebɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, i bï gen Yerusɑlem be gwøgi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, i bï gen kwɑnni gen gïïr kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyii bëënø cøn." 
2Chronicles30:6 Akedhi jøwöödø be ngɑ̈ji ji ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh geki jɑgg, kinni kedhi gen be köbbi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn geki Isrɑil kinni: “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, dwöög wun kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Abrɑhɑm, kí Isɑɑk, kí Yɑgob, o ódwööge yï wun, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bodh kì cinggi rɑ̈nhi Acuur." 
2Chronicles30:7 Wu ko bëëd ni kweyyi wun geki wɑddi wun tyëng Isrɑil, møg-ɑ ɑ́pyem dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun. Ni kɑ̀ nennu en, gï ɑ́cɑye ki cɑ́y mø teeg cɑrø." 
2Chronicles30:8 Wu ko bëëd muddi wun teeg ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen, de lïngu kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Bïu Kengø kì Yerusɑlem, eni keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ kej kwër gïti ɑtheer, kɑ mɑlli wun, o pyëwe lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki wun." 
2Chronicles30:9 Keløg wu dwöög-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l wɑddi wun gɑ ɑmɑgg yethi gen óywöngi ki gïn, ko gï wiy gen, o ge dwöög gen pönhï. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun døj, o yije nyii ywöngø, keløg wu døøg-ɑ kööre, wu óyïëy yi en.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Akedhi jøwöödø yethi kɑ̈ddi Eprɑim geki Mɑnɑsè, gïti gøl Dhebulun kì wɑɑng wuudø, de ge ɑ́gɑggi kɑ ge gwɑddi yi ji." 
2Chronicles30:11 De ɑ́dɑ ɑ́kyëlli ji kì gøl Aceer, kí gøl Mɑnɑsè, kí gøl Dhebulun mɑ ɑ́dwøøg pëthi gen piny, kɑ ge bï-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles30:12 Jwøk ɑ́bëëd e ogöögø thyew kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ji wëgge rebi dhøggi gen kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi gen kinni, kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ómïdhi yi gen kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈gge." 
2Chronicles30:13 Ji mø gïïr ri gen ɑ́cøng gen Yerusɑlem kì ryeew dwɑ̈tt, be gwøgi Kwëër Olwëny." 
2Chronicles30:14 Akwɑny gen këlli lɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́ying Yerusɑlem bënn, ɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ̈thi gen nyii rɑ̈bø ki gëdhhì geki bɑkur, kɑ gï leeng gen yij töör Kidrön." 
2Chronicles30:15 Kɑ órömi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ngɑl kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi ryeew dwɑ̈tt. Kɑ ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ri gen nuti kwëër gen wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈yø. Codhe, ɑkwër gen ri gen kɑ ge kïdh-ɑ yij Kengø, bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne." 
2Chronicles30:16 Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kì yij Kengø ni kɑ ókwøbii kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀, jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk. Kɑ ókwër gɑ̈mmi remmi gëdhhì yi Kwɑrri Leebì, kɑ gø kiny gen ri këli lɑm." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́bëëd ri gen nuti kwëër gen, o órömmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen, pɑ cuggi ngɑlø yi gen, codhe, ɑngɑ̈lli órömmɑni gen yi Kwɑrri Leebì, kɑ gï thyëyi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ji mø gïïr kì myërri Eprɑim, kí Mɑnɑsè, kí Isɑkɑr, kí Dhebulun ɑ́bëëd ri gen nuti kwëër gen kɑ gwøgi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh yi gen ódhɑ̈lø pɑ̈dhi keje. Akwɑ̈jji Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kiper gen kinni," 
2Chronicles30:19 “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wøn, yï døj, dwöög lɑɑwí piny kipe ji møg-ɑ mɑlli yïn ki pëthi gen bënn, cɑgg ge ywëdhø.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Aløøg kwɑ̈jji Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ lɑɑwe dwööge piny, ɑcöge gï nuti cɑɑy en." 
2Chronicles30:21 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cøng ri gen Yerusɑlem, Kwëër Olwëny ɑ́gwøg yi gen ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew ki medi pyëw me dwøng. Kwɑrri Leebì geki ókwër, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyii lenhø yi gen kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni bënn ki tegi gen bëne." 
2Chronicles30:22 Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́pwøj yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kipe kɑ ɑ́mɑlli gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mɑll-ɑ dyër. Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, ɑmuuj gen ki gëdhhì gɑ møg lenhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles30:23 Kɑ teedø oyïëyø kinni kwër ócigi gwøgø yi gen ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew møøgø. Codhe, ɑcigi gen kwër gwøgø ki medi pëthi gen." 
2Chronicles30:24 Anëngi ji yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́lïp, kí dyëg ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew møg nɑ̈g o ge cɑm, kɑ ge nëngi yi jɑgg ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́lïp møøgø. Kɑ ókwër mø ngenyø ri gen thyey gen." 
2Chronicles30:25 Ji bënn ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen omedø, ɑ løg tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ji-ɑ ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ piny Isrɑil, kí tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles30:26 Ji ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen omedø kì Yerusɑlem, mɑ́ e bong gïn ni menɑni mɑ ɑ́cwöb, kër-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn wɑ̈d Debïd." 
2Chronicles30:27 Codhe, ɑdhwödh ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì kɑ teedø kwëng gen. Kɑ kwɑ̈jji gen lïngi yi Jwøk kì pɑɑre mɑl, kɑ gø yïëye." 
2Chronicles31:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum kwër, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil kedh-ɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, kɑ löjj bënn geki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ mød gen piny, kɑ këlli lɑm geki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø kedhhi gen. Gïn ni menɑni ɑ́gwøg yi gen kì Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne, geki myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kí Eprɑim, kí Mɑnɑsè. Codhe, ɑdøøg tyëng Isrɑil kɑ̈ddi gen." 
2Chronicles31:2 Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́døøge ki pyëlø, kɑ ngɑn nyi mëgge gwøge. Gïg-ɑ gøggi bɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gënhi mër, kí mɑ̈ddø kì yij Kengø, kí lenhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí pwøje." 
2Chronicles31:3 Kɑ omuujø kì kelli dhöge kí dyëge ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b kì mwøl kí böörø, kí mø Sɑbɑth, kí møg-ɑ nyi muuj kì Kwëër Dwɑ̈n-ɑ Nyɑ̈n, kí gëdhhi cyɑ̈nggi kwër møg-ɑ kyeelø, ni kɑ ókwøbii kì yethi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles31:4 Kɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, kɑ̈ni gen ki jɑmm-ɑ nyi mëggi Kwɑrri Leebì, codhe, o ge muuj gen ri gen kipe gwøgi gwøngɑni, ni kɑ ókwøbii kì yethi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles31:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum ji ki köbbø, ɑkɑ̈ni gen ki mwölli byel, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí møøw kïc, kí jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ cyeg kì yethi pwödhhi gen. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni thyew ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmm-ɑ nud bënn kì yï gen." 
2Chronicles31:6 Ji-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri dhögi gen geki dyëgi gen, kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø thyew ki jɑmmì mø ngenyø ki mendwøng, kɑ gï thyëyi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles31:7 Muunyi jɑmmì ɑ́cɑ̈g ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g dwɑ̈tt kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ bïryeew dwɑ̈tt ji nudd ge ókɑ̈ddø ki jɑmmì. 
2Chronicles31:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh ngenyi jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki jyɑ̈gge, ɑmɑl gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil pwøj yi gen." 
2Chronicles31:9 Apyëëj ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì yi rɑ̈dh kipe møgɑni. 
2Chronicles31:10 Alöggi Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, Adhɑriyɑ̀ kwɑɑr Dhɑdök kinni, “Kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi ji ki kɑ̈ni yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi gen, wø ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ wø oyɑ̈ngø, kɑ møøgø odöngø kì ri jɑmmɑni bënn, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́gyëdhe.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Kɑ ocïgø kinni gëëd teedø ki udd-ɑ ókïdhi jɑmmì kì buti Kengø, codhe ɑgëëd gen." 
2Chronicles31:12 Akïdhi jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj, kí ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmì yethi uddɑni. Kɑ ge cïb cingi Könɑniyɑ̀ Kwɑɑr Leebì, o ómen Cimeì ɑ bɑ ókwøme." 
2Chronicles31:13 Kwɑrri Leebì pyɑ̈rø ɑ́kwɑny o ge køny ge gïn, jøgɑni bɑ: Yekiel, Adhɑdhiyɑ̀, Nɑɑ̈th, Asɑiil, Yerimöth, Yödhɑbɑd, Eliel, Ismɑkiyɑ̀, Mɑɑ̈th, kí Benɑiyɑ̀. Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki Adhɑriyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng." 
2Chronicles31:14 Körè wɑ̈d Imnɑ̀, Kwɑɑr Leebì, en ɑ bɑ jɑgø men-ɑ kor Dhøg Wɑɑng Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Mwøl, dhøng-ɑ yïëbbi Kengø, en ɑ cinge nyi cïb jɑmm-ɑ muuj Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o en ɑ nyi pɑ̈ngi gen." 
2Chronicles31:15 Kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ kyeelø Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ nyi pɑ̈ngi jɑmmì yethi gen bong ɑ́dud, ge bɑ Eden, kí Miniɑmïn, kí Jöcwø, kí Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Amɑriyɑ̀, kí Cekɑniyɑ̀. Gïncɑm nyi pɑ̈ngi yi gen kì kelli Kwɑrri Leebì wɑddi gen, e køøl-ɑ kömi gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi gen," 
2Chronicles31:16 o pɑ pɑ̈ngi ɑ́ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì. Cwøw bënn møg-ɑ runni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gïti mɑl, dhɑnhø nyi mëgg-ɑ gïn-ɑ kyëëw ki gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi en kì yij Kengø." 
2Chronicles31:17 Ókwërø nyi mëggi gwøge e myer ɑ́ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli gen, o Kwɑrri Leebì cɑg kì ri ngɑn runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl, ge nyi mëggi gwøøg gen gɑ ɑkudd." 
2Chronicles31:18 Nyingi gen bɑ ɑgwed kì kej ɑ́kyel ki mɑ̈nni gen, kí nyigi gen, kí wɑddi gen møg-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ ge di dwɑddø kinni bëëd gen ri gen gwiir gen kipe gwøgi kwër kì bøli keje." 
2Chronicles31:19 Ókwërr-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ bɑ mø kwɑrri Aɑron, wɑlɑ̀ kì pìny-ɑ yethi gen cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi dhögi kɑ̈ddɑni, dɑ jøg nyi pɑ̈ngi gïgcɑmm kì kelli kɑ̈lli gen geki kɑ̈lli Kwɑrri Leebì." 
2Chronicles31:20 Kì yij Yeudiyɑ̀ bëne, Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj mɑ ɑ́mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles31:21 Gwøge ɑ́pɑ̈dhi keje, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøgge kipe Kengø nyi gwøg yi en e ködd-ɑ kömi cigg. Ágöög thyew e gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøge, o yije bong ɑ́dud." 
2Chronicles32:1 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rum gïg-ɑ dyër møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kipe nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑbëën Rɑ̈nhdwøng Senɑkerib, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur be mɑgi Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ kɑ̈ddi dör tyeg yi linye, kɑ jøge köbbe kinni, i dhur gen dör piny, kɑ ge kedhi gen yethi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
2Chronicles32:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhii yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, Senɑkerib dwɑdd-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Yerusɑlem thyew," 
2Chronicles32:3 ɑnywɑ̈ge ki kwøb geki pëjji liny kinni rïg nyingi pï kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl, o liny Acuur ójɑde ki pï keny-ɑ ócyɑ̈ngi gen ki Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles32:4 Acøng ji mø gïïr yi pëjjì, kɑ nyingi pï rïg gen." 
2Chronicles32:5 Pyëw rɑ̈dh ɑ́tëngi keny-ɑ ɑ́thïge döri kɑɑl, kɑ wïj dörø gëdde ki ud mø bɑ̈rrø, kɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j dör-ɑ weenø gëdde ki dörø megø. Kɑ othɑ̈dhø thyew ki tøngg mø ngenyø kí ködd." 
2Chronicles32:6 Kɑ orönyø ki pëjji liny, ɑcwøle teedø ódɑ̈ri kɑɑl. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Cwed wun pëthi wun, kɑ wu ko böggi yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur. Wɑlɑ̀ wu ko bwøg yi liny-ɑ pyejji yi en. Yïee dɑ tegø me dwøng kì tungee, me lod teng-ɑ ying tuung gen." 
2Chronicles32:8 Yïe dɑ tegi dhɑnhø, de yïee dɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee. Wɑ ókøny yi en, o ónyïɑ̈ggi kiperee.” Kɑ pëthi ji ótëngø yi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen." 
2Chronicles32:9 Kì bɑng kenyɑni, e Senɑkerib nudd e ying-ɑ Lɑkic geki linye, ɑöde Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem ki kwøb kinni," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Yɑ Rɑ̈nhdwøng Senɑkerib, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, ɑ pëjji kinni, ɑ́ gïn ɑ thödhi wun ki tegi pëëth, ɑ bëëd wun kì Yerusɑlem, e ótyegø yi liny." 
2Chronicles32:11 Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun kinni wu óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun ki cinggi wøn! De wu ɑ́wëny yi Kedhekiyɑ̀, wu ónɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j geki röödhø." 
2Chronicles32:12 Pɑth ki Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́rënyi kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki këlli lɑm. Kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem köbbe kinni, i mɑ̈ddi gen kɑ ge rɑ̈ɑ̈b gen ki bɑkur kì wïj këli lɑm ɑ́kyel?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø yi kweyyɑ, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ gen kwïj yi wun? Dɑ jwøg mɑ ɑ́yiel gen kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Á ɑ́wën ɑ ɑ́di pödhø mɑ ɑ́yiel yi jwøge kì cinggi wøn? Á gïn ɑ wëggi wun rumø kinni wu óyiel yi Jwøøg wun kì cingɑ? 
2Chronicles32:15 Ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi Kedhekiyɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ ri wun ko wëggu peej pɑ̈l yi en. Wu ko yïëy ki kwøbbe! Bong pödhø ɑ́kyel mɑ jie ɑ́yiel yi jwøøg gen kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur. O bɑ dyër ceth, wu koo yiel yi Jwøøg wun!”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Pëjji Acuur ɑ́kööb ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki Kedhekiyɑ̀, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles32:17 Wɑ̈nyø men-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́bwöle. Wɑ̈nyɑni okööbø kinni, “Jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø jii gen nuti yieel gen kì cingɑ, o Jwøøg Kedhekiyɑ̀ jie koo yiele kì cingɑ!”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb yi pëjjɑni ge óryeerø ki dhøg Ibru, kipe kinni o pëthi tyëng Yerusɑlem møg-ɑ ying wïj döri kɑɑl mɑg yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, codhe o mɑgi kɑɑl gööge e yööd." 
2Chronicles32:19 Ge ɑ́kööb kì ri Jwøøg Yerusɑlem ni kenyi kööb gen kì ri jwöggi pödhhi kömi piny, gen ɑ jwögg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwøg ki cinggi ji." 
2Chronicles32:20 Codhe, ɑkwɑjji Jwøk yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki jɑltöng, Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh, kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ kööre kipe kinni o ge køny yi en." 
2Chronicles32:21 Aöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wëywödø me nɑ̈g jøliny geki pëjji liny Acuur, ɑdøøg rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur pödhe e yɑ̈rø. Kɑ kedh-ɑ yij kengi jwøge, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈gii yij kengɑni yi men-ɑ́ dïl wɑ̈dde ki pilli gen." 
2Chronicles32:22 Men bene yuu-ɑ ɑ́yieel Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cingi Senɑkerib, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur. Kɑ gï wëgge bëëdø ki mër geki tyëng pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhi gen bënn." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ji mø ngenyø ɑ́bï Yerusɑlem be muuji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì. Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ muuj gen ki jɑmmì. Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ pere ótëngø kì yï pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kì bɑng kenyɑni. 
2Chronicles32:24 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ dële ócɑ̈gø rɑ̈m kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, kɑ køm-ɑ thøø. Akwɑ̈jje, kɑ nëngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ngïji men nyodh kinni dële ódönyi." 
2Chronicles32:25 De Kedhekiyɑ̀ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti pwøøj en kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggii, kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ jɑlngöönø. Kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem orɑngø kì bɑng bëëdø menɑni." 
2Chronicles32:26 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem ówïyø ngöönø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, codhe ɑcög ji ge nuti cɑyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïti kɑ ɑ́thøw Kedhekiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles32:27 Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́kɑ̈ri ki mendwøng, kɑ gɑ̈nni yi dhɑnhø bëne. Kɑ ogëdø ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mïdhi dhɑbe, kí ɑ́tegø, kí tigg-ɑ per gen teg, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med, kí ködd, kí jɑmm-ɑ ngewi gen teeg." 
2Chronicles32:28 Ágëëd thyew ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mïdhi byelle, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí lwɑ̈ggi dhöge, geki dyëge." 
2Chronicles32:29 Áthödhi yi Jwøk thyew ki ngenyi dyel kí dhyɑng bëne, kí ngenyi gïïpiny bëne, kɑ ogëdø ki kɑ̈dd mø ngenyø." 
2Chronicles32:30 Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́thør wɑɑng pïi Gïön, kɑ okunyø ki wøøl pïgɑni gø kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ thɑ döri Yerusɑlem, o pï töngi gen yij kɑɑl. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi bënn yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
2Chronicles32:31 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën tyëngwöödø møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l Bɑbïl, ge bï-ɑ be lidhi gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì yij pinyɑni, kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ wiy yi Jwøk o gwøge gïn-ɑ pyëwe, e rɑng-ɑ gøn." 
2Chronicles32:32 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ bënn, kí kɑ ɑ́mëgge ree Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Møg-ɑ Áyɑ̈lli Jɑltöng, Icɑyɑ̀ Wɑ̈d Amodh, kí Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles32:33 Akedhi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ koony rörri gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kì tung-ɑ bɑ ótong. Kɑ ywøg yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn. Wɑ̈de Mɑnɑsè ɑ ɑ́røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles33:1 Mɑnɑsè ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́bïj kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles33:2 Mɑnɑsè ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki orøng ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jurr-ɑ ɑ́cyeed wɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli tyëng Isrɑil. 
2Chronicles33:3 Kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́rënyi yi wïye Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́døøge ki gerø. Ágëëd ki këlli lɑm møg-ɑ nyi mɑlli Bɑɑl, kɑ ogöögø ki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø, kɑ kyell mɑlle." 
2Chronicles33:4 Ágëëd ki këlli lɑm mø jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì yij Kengø, keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni bene keny-ɑ yije ómɑllii gïti ɑtheer." 
2Chronicles33:5 Ágëëd ki këlli lɑm møg nyi mɑlle kyell kì ódɑ̈rri Kengø ryeet. 
2Chronicles33:6 Wɑ̈dde ɑ́muuje gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b kì yij Töör Kinöm, kɑ nyii rɑ̈ngø ki ɑ́jwöggì, kɑ nyii pëjjø ki yɑdh. Mɑnɑsè ɑ́göög ki orøng dwøng kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wëgge rënyø." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth ɑ́cïbe yij Kengø, keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Debïd geki wɑ̈de Sølømøn yi Jwøk kinni, “Kengø men kì Yerusɑlem, bene keny-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yɑn kì kelli pìnyi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ɑ́ keny nyi mɑlli yɑn gïti ɑtheer." 
2Chronicles33:8 De keløg kwøbbɑ ómïdhi yi tyëng Isrɑil kɑ ciggɑ bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yi bɑ̈ngɑ Mosɑ̀ mïdhi yi gen, ge koo wëggɑ cyeed wɑ̈g kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi gen.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́peej yij orøng dwøng yi Mɑnɑsè; orøg me lod orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́cyeddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli gen. 
2Chronicles33:10 Mɑnɑsè geki jie ɑ́rum ki kyëddø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, wiy gen gwøg ki orøg, de ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngø." 
2Chronicles33:11 Codhe, kɑ pëjji liny Acuur kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑmɑg gen Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ Mɑnɑsè mɑg, kɑ ngön ki ɑ́bɑ̈dhh, kɑ peej Bɑbïl ɑ́ ɑtwöj ki ɑ́cwecwel." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ágöög ki mölø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rɑnge, kɑ ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøge, ɑkwɑ̈jje kipe kønyø." 
2Chronicles33:13 Kwɑ̈jji Mɑnɑsè ɑ́yïëy yi Jwøk, kɑ gø wiye døøge Yerusɑlem be jyɑ̈gø." 
2Chronicles33:14 Codhe, kɑ wïj döri kɑɑl Debïd kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ng mwøl tïng yi Mɑnɑsè, o bɑ̈re, cɑg kì yij tör-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki nyingi pïi Gïön kì wɑɑng wuudø, kì bøli Dhøg Rij, kí kɑɑl men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Opel. Kɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi dör kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kïdhe thyew ki pëjji liny." 
2Chronicles33:15 Ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi en yij Kengø ɑ́nyiige, ɑnyiige këlli lɑm mø jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́ying wïj kïn-ɑ köme ógeer Kengø kì Yerusɑlem. Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ gï wedde." 
2Chronicles33:16 Kɑ këli lɑm men-ɑ wïje nyi rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thïg yi en, kɑ omuujø ki gënhi mër, kí gëdhhi pwøj kì wïj këlɑni. Aköbbe tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn kinni mɑlli gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles33:17 Ji ɑ́bëëd ge nyii muujø ki gëdhhì kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ yethi gen nyi mɑ̈ddi, ge nyi ngɑ̈dd-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete." 
2Chronicles33:18 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mɑnɑsè, ɑ løg kwɑ̈jjø men-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjje Jwøge, kí kwøbbi jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ge bɑ ɑgwed bënn kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kwɑ̈jji rɑ̈dh, kí løøgi kwɑ̈nyɑni yi Jwøk, kí orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nute yewø, kí rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ yethi gen nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kí ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi en, kí ngïjjì møg-ɑ nyi mɑlli yi en, ge bɑ ɑgwed bënn kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Kwøbbi Tyëngtöng." 
2Chronicles33:20 Akedhi Mɑnɑsè kun-ɑ di kweyye, kɑ kony kì gøldwøng. Arøøny Amön wɑ̈de keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amön ɑ́røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn ɑ́ryew." 
2Chronicles33:22 Amön ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mɑnɑsè wïye. Kɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑlli yi wïye gï mɑlle." 
2Chronicles33:23 De pɑ pɑ̈r ki wïye, nuti gwøg ki mölø, o nuti ywøøg kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de ɑ́røngi ki orøg me dwøng kibøli men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye." 
2Chronicles33:24 Kɑ Amön mol yi bɑ̈ngge, kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen kì gøldwøng." 
2Chronicles33:25 Aloony jøg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g Amön ki nɑ̈gø yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈de røøny keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles34:1 Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́kyel." 
2Chronicles34:2 Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ɑ́bëëd ceth e nɑ kwɑn Debïd; Ciggi Jwøk bënn ɑ́mïdhe ki menteg. 
2Chronicles34:3 Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yöciyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, e nud ɑ́ nyelthinh, ɑcɑ̈ge ki mɑlli Jwøøg kweye Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kɑ kì bɑng runn ɑ́ngwen, ɑcɑ̈ge ki tørri kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kí ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø, kí ngïjji jwögg-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
2Chronicles34:4 Kɑ këlli lɑm møg-ɑ nyi mɑlli Bɑɑl toor piny yi jø Yöciyɑ̀, kɑ këlli bɑkur møg-ɑ ying buti gen toor piny. Ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ ɑ́mød gen piny kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr, kí ngïjji jwögg-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Codhe kɑ búr menɑni kedhhi gen kì wɑ̈thi rörri ji-ɑ ɑ́nëngi jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki gëdhhì." 
2Chronicles34:5 Kɑ cu ókwërri jwögg-ɑ pɑth rɑ̈b yi Yöciyɑ̀ kì wɑ̈thi këlli lɑm møg-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ddi yi gen. Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem ɑ́göög ge dhïw kì bɑng gwøngɑni. 
2Chronicles34:6 Gïn ni menɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en kì yethi kɑ̈ddi Mɑnɑsè møg-ɑ ryɑ̈gø, kí kɑ̈ddi Eprɑim, kí kɑ̈ddi Cimeøn gïti Nɑptɑlì kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
2Chronicles34:7 Këlli lɑm bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́ying Isrɑil ɑ́toore piny, kɑ ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ møde kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr, kɑ këlli bɑkur kedhhe, codhe ɑdøøge Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles34:8 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yöciyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, keny-ɑ ɑ́rum piny ki kwërø geki Kengø, bene cögi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth, ɑöd Yöciyɑ̀ ki jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g møg thïg Kengi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ løg Cɑpɑn wɑ̈d Adhɑliyɑ̀, kí Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ jɑngi Yerusɑlem, kí Yöɑ̀ wɑ̈d Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng Yöɑkɑdh." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ngyëny møg-ɑ ɑ́cøng kì yij Kengø yi ókwërr-ɑ nyi kor Kengø, ge ɑ́mëgg-ɑ Kilkiyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, ngyënyyɑni ɑ́cøng-ɑ yi gøl Eprɑim kí gøl Mɑnɑsè, kí kwï tyëng Isrɑil, kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kí gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kí tyëng Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Codhe, ɑmëggi ngyënyyɑni jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ thïg Kengø, kɑ gï lony gen," 
2Chronicles34:11 ki mëggi bödhhi yiedh ki pɑ̈mmì, geki bödhhi gyer, o ngëëw yi gen ki ópɑddi kïttì geki pɑ̈mm-ɑ thïg udd-ɑ ɑ́wëggi rënyø yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles34:12 Jøg-ɑ gëdø yethi gen bong ɑ́dud. Ge ɑ́kwøll-ɑ yi Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́ngwen, ɑ løg Yɑɑth, kí Obɑdiyɑ̀ kì gøl Merɑrì, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Meculɑm kì gøl Kɑ̈ɑ̈th. (Kwɑrri Leebì bënn ɑ́bëëd gɑ bödhhi thøm.)" 
2Chronicles34:13 Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́bëëd ge nenn-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ göög, o møøgø kwøll-ɑ jøgwøg, møøgø gwed-ɑ jɑmmì, møøgø ceg-ɑ kur." 
2Chronicles34:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑɑy ngyëny øn-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi gen, ɑyood Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Kilkiyɑ̀, eni wɑ̈nyi cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøk." 
2Chronicles34:15 Aköbbi Cɑpɑn yi Kilkiyɑ̀ kinni, “Wɑ̈nyi Cigg ɑ́yod yi yɑn kì yij Kengø.” Wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́mëggi Cɑpɑn yi Kilkiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles34:16 Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni muuj rɑ̈dh yi Cɑpɑn. Adwögge gøn møg-ɑ́ per gïn ɑ́öri gen kinni, “Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bënn ɑ́gwøg yi wøn." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ngyënyy-ɑ ɑ́ying yij Kengø ɑ́mëggi wøn tyëng-ɑ göögø geki jøg-ɑ kwølli gen.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Codhe, ɑköbbe rɑ̈dh kinni, “Dɑ wɑ̈nyø mɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Kilkiyɑ̀, nud kì yïɑ kì keny.” Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni rɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh yi Cɑpɑn." 
2Chronicles34:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbi Wɑ̈nyi Cigg yi rɑ̈dh, ɑkɑge ógødhe yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe," 
2Chronicles34:20 Kɑ Kilkiyɑ̀, kí Akikɑm wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn, kí Abdön wɑ̈d Mikɑiyɑ̀, kí Cɑpɑn jɑlgwed, kí Asɑiyɑ̀ jɑngi gøldwøng, köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Kedhu be pyëji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiperɑ geki kiper ji møg-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀. Lidhu gïn-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Cigg. Pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑɑj ki wɑ, mɑ́ Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nuti mïdhø yi kweyyee, o gïn ógwedø kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Cigg kinni, gwøg yi gen nuti gwøøg gen.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Kɑ Kilkiyɑ̀ geki jøg-ɑ kyeelø kedh-ɑ be pyëji Kuldɑ̀ ngetitöng ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh. Ngɑnɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ Yerusɑlem kì byëng-ɑ ɑ́cer gerø. (Nyingi jɑlgøle cwøl ɑ́ Cɑlum wɑ̈d Tikbɑ̀, wɑ̈d Arkɑs jɑl-ɑ mïdhi ógudhi kwër). Kɑ ngɑnɑni köbbi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb," 
2Chronicles34:23 ɑköbbe jøgɑni i døøg gen kun-ɑ di rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni," 
2Chronicles34:24 wöödø men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ kinni, “Cyënn-ɑ ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ngi rɑ̈dh, kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles34:25 Yɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth nëngi gen ki gëdhhì, kɑ pyëwɑ rënyi yi gen ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen. Pyëwɑ ɑ́mɑg yi liny ki Yerusɑlem, o linyɑni pɑ cög." 
2Chronicles34:26 Keløg ɑ́ per rɑ̈dh kiree, møg-ɑ köbbɑ en, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil bɑ kinni: møg-ɑ ɑ́rɑng kì yij wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́lïngi yi yïn," 
2Chronicles34:27 kɑ yï óyewø, kɑ rií gwøøg mölø kì bølɑ, kɑ ógudhí pyëëd wɑ̈g kì bɑng rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng kinni, Yerusɑlem bɑ men ryɑ̈gɑ geki jie. Kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngɑ," 
2Chronicles34:28 o cɑ́y møg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l kömi Yerusɑlem, pɑ bï ɑnɑn; ge óbï yï rum thøø. Yï ówiy yi yɑn o yï thøw ki mër.” Kɑ kwøbbɑni muuj Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ yi jøgɑni." 
2Chronicles34:29 Aöd Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀, kɑ jøgdøngi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem cwööl." 
2Chronicles34:30 Kɑ rɑ̈dh geki ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, ki ji bënn tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur kí tyëngkɑ̈rì kedh-ɑ yij Kengø. Arɑ̈nggi gen kwøbb-ɑ yij Wɑ̈nyi Cigg, eni wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́yod kì yij Kengø." 
2Chronicles34:31 Acungi rɑ̈dh kì ri lööj rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ óköngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ócyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cigge geki kwönge mïdhe ki pyëwe, kí tege bëne, kí gøggi kwöng-ɑ ógwedø kì yij wɑ̈nyɑni." 
2Chronicles34:32 Kɑ tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn kí tyëng-ɑ nud kì Yerusɑlem köbbe köngø kinni Ciggɑni ómïdhi yi gen. Codhe, kɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem oyïëyø ki mïdhi kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi gen ki Jwøøg kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles34:33 Kɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth bënn dhur piny yi Yöciyɑ̀ kì yij pödhi Isrɑil, kɑ ji köbbe kinni göggi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen." 
2Chronicles35:1 Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ɑ́gwøg yi Yöciyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem kiper wøri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́gwøg yi en kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt, kɑ ge ongɑ̈dø ki gëdhhì mø gïïr." 
2Chronicles35:2 Ókwër ɑ́thödhi yi en ki gwøøg gen kì yij Kengø, kɑ gï köbbe kinni gwøg gen gïgɑni kidøøj." 
2Chronicles35:3 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì geki jøpwönyi Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ri gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbbe kinni, “Cïb Sɑnduug Cigg yij Kengø men-ɑ ɑ́ger yi Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn wɑ̈d Debïd. Sɑnduug Cigg ko rïïj e ocɑngø yi wun, de göggu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun geki jie tyëng Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles35:4 Kwɑnyu kɑ̈jji wun kì yij Kengø wun ɑ́ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, ni kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi gwøøg wun yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd geki wɑ̈de Sølømøn," 
2Chronicles35:5 kɑ ri wun gwir wun, o wu nyi bëëd wun wu nud ceth, wu køny-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn." 
2Chronicles35:6 Wu óngɑ̈dø ki órömm kí ónyöggi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh. De kwëru ri wun, o wu göög wun wu dhïw, kɑ gëdhhì gwir wun kipe nyiimï wun tyëng Isrɑil, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg Mosɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Kɑ ji nëngi yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ ki jɑmmi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh; ɑ́muuj kì ri jɑmme ki dyëg ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g mø bɑ órömm-ɑ døngø, kí órömm-ɑ thønhø, kí ónyögg. Kɑ omuujø ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles35:8 Kɑ ji, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì thödhi ki jɑmmì yi jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ ókwër nëngi yi jɑggi Kengø, ɑ løg Kilkiyɑ̀ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Yekiel, ki dyëg ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́bïkyel, kí wɑ̈dhh miy ɑ́dɑ̈g møg ngɑl gɑ gëdhhì kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi kwër." 
2Chronicles35:9 Jɑggi Kwɑrri Leebì, Könɑniyɑ̀, kí Cemɑiyɑ̀ geki ómen Nethɑnel, kí Acɑbiyɑ̀, kí Yeiel, kí Yödhɑbɑd, ge ɑ́muuj ki órömm ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj, kelli gen dɑ ónyögg-ɑ thønhø, kí wɑ̈dhh gɑ miy ɑ́bïj mø kelli gen di ónyögg, møg ngɑl gɑ gëdhhì yi Kwɑrri Leebì." 
2Chronicles35:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jɑmm-ɑ gwøøg Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ki gwirø bënn, ɑpëggi ókwër kɑ̈jji gen geki Kwɑrri Leebì, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles35:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum órömm geki ónyögg ki ngɑlø, ɑyeej gen yi Kwɑrri Leebì, kɑ ri këli lɑm wïddi ki rem yi ókwër." 
2Chronicles35:12 Apɑ̈ngi gëdhhì kì kelli teedø e pɑ̈ngi ɑ́ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, o ge muuj gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀." 
2Chronicles35:13 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì obudø ki rïngø, kɑ kwëe thɑl kì yethi ɑ́tɑ̈yyì kí dɑ̈gg, ni kenyi gwøøg jɑmmi kwër ceth. Codhe, ɑpɑ̈ngi rïngø kì kelli teedø." 
2Chronicles35:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum teedø ki nëngø cyee, ɑkɑ̈bbi Kwɑrri Leebì geki ókwër, kwɑrri Aɑron ki rïngø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́tyëg cɑ̈ng ge orɑ̈bø ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki dwɑ̈li gëdhhi mër." 
2Chronicles35:15 Bödhhi thøm møg, jø gøl Asɑp Kwɑɑr Leebì, ɑ́ying-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen, ni kɑ ɑ́pyëël møgɑni yi Rɑ̈dh Debïd cøn ge ómyerø; ɑkuud Asɑp, kí ɑkuud Ëmɑn, kí ɑkuud Yeduthun, ɑ bɑ jɑltöng mi rɑ̈dh. Jøg-ɑ kor dhøggi Kengø ɑ́ying-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen ceth, ge nuti pɑ̈nyi nyegø kì kɑ̈jji gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ kɑ̈llø kidøøj yi wɑddi gen, ɑ løg Kwɑrri Leebì." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀, órumø ki gwøgø kipe mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí kwööng Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, kí muuji gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì wïj këli lɑm." 
2Chronicles35:17 Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, kí Kwëër Olwëny, ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni gɑ ɑ́bïryew." 
2Chronicles35:18 Kööl kì ri cyɑ̈nggi Sɑmwel jɑltöng, bong Kwëër Ákɑɑdh mɑ ɑ́gwøg ni menɑni kinni tek. Bong rɑ̈dh kì kelli rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g cøn, mɑ ɑ́göög ki Kwëër Ákɑɑdh ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀, geki ókwër, kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kí tyëng Isrɑil, kí tyëng Yerusɑlem," 
2Chronicles35:19 kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yöciyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø. 
2Chronicles35:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jɑmmi Kengø bënn ki gwøgø yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Nekö rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp liny pëëje be nyɑɑg ki Kɑrkemec kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt. Arødhii yi Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles35:21 De Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́ödi yi Nekö ki kwøb kinni, “Yïn ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, yïɑ bɑ̈r ki yïn, pɑth ki wɑ ɑ nyïɑ̈ggi. De yɑ nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki yɑn, o Jwøk yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni jwɑnɑ. Yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ yi Jwøk, de yï ko rïwwi kì bøli Jwøk, kipe yï ónɑ̈g yi en.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 De Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd pyëwe tyer-ɑ nyɑɑg. Kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk ki dhøg Rɑ̈dh Nekö. Codhe, kɑ ree kɑɑnge, ɑkedhe be nyɑɑg kì yij Töör Megidø." 
2Chronicles35:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi liny, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ ree pɑ̈dhi yi weth liny Rïp. Aköbbe bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Kɑ̈lu yɑn, riɑ dɑ kedø me rɑj!”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l piny yi bɑ̈ngge kì yij yɑ̈ye, kɑ gø cïb gen yij yɑ̈y megø. Kɑ gø kïdhi gen Yerusɑlem. Athøwe kì kunɑni, kɑ koony buti kweyye. Kɑ ywøg yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki wör møg ywøøge Yöciyɑ̀. Codhe, ɑgööge ki kwöng kì Isrɑil, kinni nyi wöör wörɑni kenyi wøøw Yöciyɑ̀. Wörɑni nud kì kelli wörri ywøg." 
2Chronicles35:26 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöciyɑ̀, kí mëgge ree Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, geki mïdhi cigg yi en," 
2Chronicles35:27 kí wɑ́je kì ri cɑ̈gi gen gïti cögi gen, ge bɑ ɑgwed bënn kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀." 
2Chronicles36:1 Yöɑkɑdh wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́yieny yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ gø røny gen ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì Yerusɑlem. 
2Chronicles36:2 Yöɑkɑdh ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
2Chronicles36:3 Kɑ kɑ̈l yi Nekö rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ɑ́ ɑmɑg, kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ köbbe col ki kïlli ɑ́tegø ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́ngwen, geki kïlli dhɑb pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen." 
2Chronicles36:4 Kɑ Eliɑkim ómï Yöɑkɑdh røny yi Nekö ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ nyinge wile ɑ́ Yöyɑkim. Akïdhi Yöɑkɑdh Rïp yi Nekö. 
2Chronicles36:5 Yöyɑkim ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kì Yerusɑlem, Yöyɑkim ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøge." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́bï be mɑgi piny Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ Yöyɑkim kïdhe Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́ ɑtwöj ki ɑ́cwecwel." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukɑdnesɑr jɑmmi Kengø ɑ́kwɑnye kɑ gï cïbe gøldwøng kì Bɑbïl. 
2Chronicles36:8 Gïg-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Yöyɑkim, geki gïgrijjø møg ɑ́gwøg yi en, kí orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, ge bɑ ɑgwed kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. Arøøny wɑ̈de Yöyɑkin keje ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yöyɑkin ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g keny-ɑ gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g kí cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø kì Yerusɑlem. Kɑ ogöögø thyew ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles36:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën dhødïng, ɑkïdhi Yöyɑkin Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́ ɑmɑg yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, kɑ kɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́ying yij Kengø kɑ̈ɑ̈le. Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ ómï wïyi Yöyɑkin røny ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem yi Nebukɑdnesɑr." 
2Chronicles36:11 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́kyel keny-ɑ ɑ́jɑ̈gge, kɑ ojyɑ̈gø ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kì Yerusɑlem." 
2Chronicles36:12 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø lïngi kwøbbi Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng, ngɑn-ɑ kømmi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
2Chronicles36:13 Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ ngɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈ye kì ri Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïrii köngø ki nyingi Jwøk kinni, ce gø ówør yi en. Dhedekiyɑ̀ mune teeg, ɑ́bɑ̈nyi yewø, o di døøge kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kɑ pëjji Yeudiyɑ̀, geki ókwër, kí ji bënn ogöögø ki gïgrijjø ni jurr-ɑ bɑdhhi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ Keng-ɑ ɑ́kwër yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bwöl yi gen." 
2Chronicles36:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi gen ɑ́bëëd e jie nyii ödø yi en ki jøtöng møg-ɑ nyi kyëddi gen, mɑ́ e ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kori jie geki Kenge." 
2Chronicles36:16 De jøwööni Jwøk nyi ceg kɑ gɑggø yi gen, kɑ kwøbbe bɑny yi gen, gïti kɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jie ki mendwøng." 
2Chronicles36:17 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ yɑnythønhø nɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì yij Kengø. Yije nuti ywøg kipe dhɑnhø bëne, ying-ɑ́ nyelthinh, wɑlɑ̀ yu, jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, ngɑn dële rɑ̈mø wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn dële yöd. Ji bënn ɑ́cïb cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Jwøk." 
2Chronicles36:18 Kɑ jɑmmi Kengø bënn kwɑny yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí kɑ̈ɑ̈r Kengø, kí jɑmmi gøldwøng geki jɑmmi jyɑ̈gge, kɑ gïgɑni bënn kïdhi Bɑbïl." 
2Chronicles36:19 Kɑ Kengø, kí kɑɑl geki udde kí jɑmmì bënn rɑ̈b yi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kɑ döri kɑɑl dhur gen piny." 
2Chronicles36:20 Kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́bødh ki nɑ̈gø kïdhe Bɑbïl, kun-ɑ ɑ́göög gen ki bɑ̈ngge kí bɑ̈nggi wɑ̈dde, gïti kɑ ɑ́døøg rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø Pɑres." 
2Chronicles36:21 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen, kinni, “Piny ódöng e bong gïn ying yije, o óbëëdø kinøw ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, o piny ree ywöme.”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Kì kyeel runni Körec rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres kì yij lɑwø, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen. Kɑ pyëw Rɑ̈nhdwøng Körec yiebe, kɑ tyëng pödhe gwëde kwøb møg kinni," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Møg bɑ kwøbbi Körec rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres. Yɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg mɑl, yɑn ɑ́ jɑngi kömi piny bëne, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, i gerɑ Kenge kì Yerusɑlem kì Yeudiyɑ̀. Anɑn, wu jii Jwøk bënn, kedhu kunɑni, wu ókøny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun.”" 
Ezra1:1 Kì kyeel runni jyɑ̈gi Körec jɑl Pɑres ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng, ɑ ɑ́wiy møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki töngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhøg Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltönge, o ge pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen. Körec ɑ́kölli muujø ki cigg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij pödhe bëne, ciggɑni ɑ́gwede, kɑ gï öre wɑ̈g, o ge rɑ̈ngi ji bënn ki cwɑg mø døngø, kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Ezra1:2 “Møg bene gen ciggi Körec, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres: Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg mɑl, yɑ ɑ́mëgge lɑ̈gi piny bëne, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni gëddɑ en ki Kengø kì Yerusɑlem, kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Ezra1:3 Wiy wu ómïdhi yi Jwøk, wun ɑ jie bënn, kɑ wu wëgge døøg Yerusɑlem, kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ger yi wun. Bene en Jwøng-ɑ ying Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra1:4 Tyëng-ɑ døøg, køny gen yi wɑddi gen ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ tyëddi ki jɑmmì, kí gëdhhì møg-ɑ óthyer kì Kengi Jwøk kì Yerusɑlem.”" 
Ezra1:5 Codhe, ɑdhwödh jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Yeudɑ̀ geki Ben Yɑmïn, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ji bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́cïj yi wëyi Jwøk, ge kedh-ɑ be geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra1:6 Ge ɑ́køny yi tyëng-ɑ buti gen bënn ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg, kí dhɑb, kí dhög geki dyëg, kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ kɑ̈ddi ki jɑmmì ki gïg-ɑ per gen teg, gïgɑni ɑ́muuj yi tyëngɑni kɑ medi pëthi gen." 
Ezra1:7 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi Nebukɑdnesɑr kì Yerusɑlem kì yij Kengø, kɑ gï cïbe yij kengi jwøge, ge ɑ́dwöög yi Körec." 
Ezra1:8 Gï ɑ́mëgge Mithredɑth jɑl-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmì, o gï kwɑ̈nne Cecbɑdhɑr, jɑng-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmi gøldwøng kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Ezra1:9 Gïgɑni bɑ: Tɑ̈mmi dhɑb mø gëdhhì 30 Tɑ̈mmi ɑ́tegø mø gëdhhì 1,000 Pɑll 29 Tɑ̈mmi dhɑb møg thønhø 30 Tɑ̈mmi ɑ́tegø møg thønhø 410 Jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø 1,000" 
Ezra1:10  
Ezra1:11 Kwɑnni jɑmmi dhɑb geki jɑmmi ɑ́tegø bënn bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïj kí miy ɑ́ngwen. Bene jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Cecbɑdhɑr keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ying yïnø kì Bɑbïl e gï kïdhe’ Yerusɑlem. 
Ezra2:1 Møg bene tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kun-ɑ ɑ́køøl gen gɑ ɑmɑgg yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ge dwöög-ɑ Yerusɑlem kì Yeudiyɑ̀, ngɑn nyi døøg-ɑ pɑɑ gen." 
Ezra2:2 Ge ɑ́dwöög kɑ pëjji gen, Dherubɑbïl, kí Jöcwø, kí Nëmɑyɑ̀, kí Serɑiyɑ̀, kí Reelɑiyɑ̀, kí Mordekɑy, kí Bilcɑn, kí Mispɑr, kí Bigbɑy, kí Reum, kí Bɑnɑ̀. Møg bɑ nyingi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́dwöög, jɑngi kɑl kí kwɑnni jie:" 
Ezra3:1 Kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt e tyëng Isrɑil rum pëggi yethi myërri gen bënn, ɑcugi ji kì Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra3:2 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Jöcwø wɑ̈d Yödhɑdɑk, kí ókwërr-ɑ kyeelø, kí Dherubɑbïl wɑ̈d Ceɑltiel, ɑger gen këli lɑm mi Jwøøg Isrɑil, kinni o wïje nyi rɑ̈b gen gëdhhì ni kɑ ógwedii kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk." 
Ezra3:3 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø yi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pönhɑni, këli lɑm ɑ́døøg gen ki geer keje cøn, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be rɑ̈b ki gëdhhi mwøl geki gënhi böörø." 
Ezra3:4 Kɑ Kwëër Akɑnnì gwøg yi gen ni kɑ ɑ́cegii ceth, kɑ gëdhhì møg-ɑ dwɑddi nyi gwøg yi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng ceth." 
Ezra3:5 Kɑ ge nyii muujø ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b kì bøli kɑ̈jji gen ceth, kí gëdhhi cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y, geki gëdhhi kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møg-ɑ per gen nyi cugi yi ji bënn, kí jwödhø møg-ɑ nyi muuj yi ji." 
Ezra3:6 Kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki nëngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn, ngö tyelli Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd ge nuti këël piny." 
Ezra3:7 Amuuj ji ki ngyëny, ge thödh-ɑ jøg-ɑ nyi twïgø ki kïttì, kí jøg-ɑ nyi yïëdhø ki pɑ̈mmì, kɑ ge omuujø ki gïgcɑmm, kí møw, kí gïgmɑdh, gɑ møg ör kɑ̈ddi Suur geki Sïdön, o ge wil ki yenh sɑndɑl kì Lubnɑn, o yenhɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l Yɑpɑ̀ ki nɑm. Møgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøg ge rumø ki yïëyø yi Körec, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres." 
Ezra3:8 Codhe, kì ri ryeew dwɑ̈tt kì yij run, ɑkedhi gen kej Kengø kì Yerusɑlem, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki gwøg. Dherubɑbïl, kí Jöcwø, kí jø pödhi gen bënn, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Yerusɑlem bënn, ge ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki gwøg. Kwɑrri Leebì bënn møg-ɑ runni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew gïti mɑl, gen ɑ́ cinggi gen ɑ́cïb gwøg døøgi Kengø ki gerø." 
Ezra3:9 Jöcwø geki wɑ̈dde, kí Kɑdmiel geki wɑ̈dde, kí wɑddi gøn, kí Binuy, kí Ödɑbiyɑ̀, ge bënn ɑ ɑ́nenni gwøøg Kengø, kyeel geki wɑ̈ddi Ënɑdɑd, ɑ løg Kwɑrri Leebì bënn, geki wɑ̈ddi gen, kí wɑddi gen. Ge ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ nenni gwøøg geri ød Jwøk." 
Ezra3:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi jøg-ɑ gëdø ki geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑbëën ókwër mɑl ki ógudhi kwër kì ri gen, kí kɑ̈ngì kì cinggi gen. Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì mø wïj gøl Asɑp ki thømi gen bï-ɑ be lejji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Debïd, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil." 
Ezra3:11 Awör gen ge lejj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge pøjj-ɑ en kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j døøj, o Isrɑil mɑɑr yi en gïti ɑtheer.” Kɑ ji óryeerø, ngɑn ryeer kɑ döngi cwɑgge bëne, e lejj-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi gwøøg geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezra3:12 Ókwër mø gïïr, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, møg-ɑ ɑ́lidh Kengi tyeli mɑl, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen tyelli Kengø ge këël-ɑ piny, ɑywöngi gen ki ywøng dwøng. De tyëng-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́ying kenyɑni kïïw-ɑ medi pëthi gen." 
Ezra3:13 Kɑ bong-ɑ ngɑn cuggi yodi ryeeri medi pyëw kí men-ɑ töngi ɑ́ ywøg, mɑ́ cwɑggi ji ɑ́wɑ̈dhi mɑl kidøøj, kɑ ge lïngi kì kun lɑ̈wi." 
Ezra4:1 Alïng tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Ben Yɑmïn kinni i tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög ceg-ɑ døøgø ki gyer ki Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Ezra4:2 Abëën gen yï Dherubɑbïl geki jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, ɑköbbi ge gïn kinni, “Wiy wu køny yi wøn ki geri Kengø. Wø nyi mɑll-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ nyi mɑlli yi wun thyew, kɑ nyi nëngi yi wøn ki gëdhhì kër-ɑ ɑ́ör wøn be bëëdø keny yi Esɑrɑdön, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur.”" 
Ezra4:3 Kɑ Dherubɑbïl geki Jöcwø, kí jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì ólöggø kinni, “Wø pɑ dwɑddi kønyø yi wun ki geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, de Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, gëdd-ɑ yi wøn keti wøn, ni kɑ ɑ́ceg wøn yi Körec, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres.”" 
Ezra4:4 Codhe, ɑlunyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yood piny ki bɑ̈nni wɑ̈thi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ gï nyi nɑ̈ni gen kinni, o ge bwøg gen ki gyer." 
Ezra4:5 Kɑ tyëng Pɑres møg-ɑ døngø kì kɑ̈jji gwøg, kwɑjji yi gen ki ngyëny, kipe kinni o gwøg cung yi gen. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge göög ɑ nøw ceth kì ri jyɑ̈gi Körec gïti kɑ ɑ́jɑ̈ggi Dɑryøs." 
Ezra4:6 Kì ri cɑ̈gi jyɑ̈gi Rɑ̈nhdwøng Kerkes, ɑ ɑ́gwëëd tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møgɑni ki wɑ̈nyø, ge gøøny-ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra4:7 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes ɑ ɑ́gwëëd Biclɑm, kí Mithredɑth, kí Tɑbiil, kí kwï jø gen møg-ɑ kyeelø ki wɑ̈nyø, ge gwëd-ɑ Artɑkerkes, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres, wɑ̈nyɑni bɑ ɑgwed ki dhøg tyëng Arɑm, o óceg kɑ løgø keny-ɑ órɑngii." 
Ezra4:8 Thyew jɑgø Reum, kí Cimcɑy jɑlgwed, ge ɑ́gwëdi yï Artɑkerkes ki wɑ̈nyø me gøøny gen tyëng Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra4:9 Gø ɑ́gwed gen kinni, “Wɑ̈nyø men kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï jɑgø Reum, geki Cimcɑy jɑlgwed, kí kwï jø gen møg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ løg jyɑ̈ggi gøny, kí jɑggi gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Erek, kí Bɑbïl, kí Susɑ̀, kì Elɑm," 
Ezra4:10 kí kwï tyëng-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑldwøng, jɑlteg Acuurbɑnibɑl, kɑ gï cïbe kɑ̈ddi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kí kwï myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø.”" 
Ezra4:11 Bene møg-ɑ ógweed yij wɑ̈nyɑni ek: “Wɑ̈nyø gwëd-ɑ Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes yi bɑ̈ngge, jø myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Ezra4:12 “Wø ngɑ̈j-ɑ yïn wuö kinni, tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun-ɑ di wun, ɑ ɑ́bï Yerusɑlem, ge ceg-ɑ døøgø ki geri kɑɑlɑni, kɑɑl orøg, kɑɑl-ɑ mune teg. Ge køm-ɑ rumø ki geri dörø." 
Ezra4:13 Keny-ɑ órum kɑɑlɑni ki døøgø gerø, kɑ döre ger, tyëngɑni pɑ cudø ki gwɑ̈j këti, o ngyënyyi gøldwøng ceg-ɑ nungø." 
Ezra4:14 Mɑ́ wø bɑ jií, wø pɑ dwɑddi kinni o gïn ni menɑni cwöbe, bene ɑödi wøn yïí ki wöödø men," 
Ezra4:15 kinni muuj ki cigg kinni yɑɑb yethi wɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi kweyyí, o yod yi yïn kinni kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd e mune teg, kɑ rɑ̈nhì nyi gögge ki rɑj. Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́dhur kɑɑlɑni piny." 
Ezra4:16 Bene ɑ dwɑddi wøn nyudhi yïn kinni keløg e odøøgø ki gerø, kɑ döre ócungø, myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, pɑ cuggi jɑɑgø yi yïn këti.”" 
Ezra4:17 Codhe, ɑlöggi rɑ̈nhdwøng kinni, “Yɑ gwëd-ɑ jɑgø Reum, kí Cimcɑy jɑlgwed, kí jø gen møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kí myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, yɑ mɑ̈dh-ɑ wun." 
Ezra4:18 “Wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́ör yi wun ɑ́løg, kɑ rɑ̈ngi yɑn." 
Ezra4:19 Kɑ yɑ omuujø ki cigg kinni yɑɑb yethi wɑ̈j. Kɑ yod ceth kinni Yerusɑlem ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ kɑɑl me mune teg, kwøbbi rɑ̈nhì nyii pyemø yi en, tyëngɑni muddi gen teg o ge bɑ jii göj." 
Ezra4:20 Ájɑɑg-ɑ yi rɑ̈nhì mø teg, kɑ modïri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhhɑni thyew kɑ ge nyii kɑ̈bbø ki gwɑ̈j kí jɑmmì møøgø." 
Ezra4:21 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, muuj wun ki cigg kinni cuung gyer yi jøgɑni, gïti keny-ɑ ómuujɑ ki cigg møøgø." 
Ezra4:22 Jwɑɑn møgɑni ki gwøgø, o óbëëd e bong rɑj møg cwöb kì yij pödhɑ.”" 
Ezra4:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ngi wɑ̈nyi Rɑ̈dh Artɑkerkes, Reum, kí Cimcɑy jɑlgwed, kí jø gen, ɑjwɑni gen yï tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ gï cïrri gen cuungi gwøg." 
Ezra4:24 Gwøøg geri Kengø ɑ́bëëd e rum cung kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ ocögø e bong gyer gïti ri ryeew runni Dɑryøs, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres kì yij lɑwø." 
Ezra5:1 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi jøtöng ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Agɑy, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Idö ki kwøb ki nyingi Jwøøg Isrɑil, ge köbb-ɑ Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra5:2 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Dherubɑbïl wɑ̈d Ceɑltiel geki Jöcwø wɑ̈d Yödhɑdɑk keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen mø jøtöng, kɑ ge ódøøgø ki cɑ̈gø ki gyer ki Kengø kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge køny yi jøtöngɑni ryeet." 
Ezra5:3 Bøli kenyɑni ceth ɑ ɑ́bëën Tɑtenɑy, jɑngi myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, geki Cethɑr Bodhenɑy, kí jø gen, ge bï-ɑ yï jøg-ɑ gëdø, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun kinni gëëd wun, ɑ tyëgu dörø men?”" 
Ezra5:4 Jøgɑni ɑ́pëjji thyew ki nyingi ji møg-ɑ ɑ́kunyi ki geri Kengø bënn. 
Ezra5:5 De jøgdøngi Yeud ɑ́bëëd ge okorø yi Jwøøg gen, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jɑggi Pɑres, ge ɑ́yïd-ɑ møg-ɑ óløøg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Ezra5:6 Men bene wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́öri rɑ̈nhdwøng yi gen. 
Ezra5:7 “Wø öd-ɑ yï Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs. Yï ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki mër. 
Ezra5:8 “Wiy yod yi rɑ̈nhdwøng kinni, wø ɑ́kedhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ yod yi wøn kinni Kengi Jwøng-ɑ dwøng ceg kɑ gerø ki kïttì mø døngø, e pɑ̈mmì cïb-ɑ ri döre. Gyerɑni nënni e pödh-ɑ bøle kidøøj." 
Ezra5:9 “Jøgdøngi tyëngɑni ɑ́pyëj yi wøn, ki ngɑn-ɑ muujø ki cigg kinni døøg Kengø men ki gerø." 
Ezra5:10 Kɑ ge pyëj yi wøn ki nyingi gen thyew, kipe kinni o nyingi pëjji gen gwëdi wøn yïn." 
Ezra5:11 “Alöggi gen kinni, ‘Wø bɑ bɑ̈nggi Jwøøg mɑl kí piny, o wø døøg-ɑ Keng-ɑ ɑ́ger yi rɑ̈nh teg, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil kɑ̈ge dööng ki gerø." 
Ezra5:12 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wëggi pyëw Jwøøg mɑl rënyø yi kweyyi wøn, ɑcïbe gïn cingi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, jɑl Kildɑn, ɑdhure Kengø men piny, ɑkïdhe ji yïnø, Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Ezra5:13 Kì kyeel runni Körec rɑ̈nhdwøøng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́muuje ki cigg kinni døøg Kengi Jwøk ki gerø." 
Ezra5:14 Cɑgg ɑ́ jɑmmi Kengi Jwøk, ɑ løg dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi Nebukɑdnesɑr kì Kengi Yerusɑlem, kɑ gï kïdhe kengi Bɑbïl, ge ɑ́mëggi Cecbɑdhɑr yi Körec, kɑ gï mëgge jɑngi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Ezra5:15 Aköbbe gøn kinni, kwɑnye jɑmmɑni, kɑ ge dwøøg kɑ̈jji gen kì yij Kengø kì Yerusɑlem. Kɑ Kengi Jwøk døøg ki geer keje ceth." 
Ezra5:16 Codhe, ɑbëën Cecbɑdhɑr kɑ tyelli Kengø këële piny, ɑcɑ̈gi gyer kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, de Kengø nuti thumø.’" 
Ezra5:17 “Anɑn, keløg pyëwí med, wiy yɑb kì yethi wɑ̈jji gøldwøng kì Bɑbïl, keløg e dɑ ciggi døøgi Kengi Yerusɑlem ki gerø møg-ɑ ómuujø yi Körec, kɑ wiy wø lïngi wøn löggi rɑ̈dh kì ri kwøbbɑni.”" 
Ezra6:1 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs omuujø ki cigg kinni i yɑɑb wɑ̈jji gøldwøng møg-ɑ nud kì Bɑbïl." 
Ezra6:2 De wɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi bɑn ɑ́yod-ɑ kɑɑldwøng Ekbɑtɑnɑ̀, kì Modïri Mɑdɑy, e yije dɑ møg-ɑ ógwedø kinni:" 
Ezra6:3 “Rɑ̈nhdwøng Körec ɑ́muuj ki cigg, kì kyeel runne kì yij lɑwø kinni i døøg Kengø ki gerø kì Yerusɑlem ɑ́ keny nyi muuj gëdhhì, ɑ yije nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhì. Geer Kengø döre bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Ezra6:4 Geer dörø e cïmmi ɑ́ lwøøb ópɑddi kïttì ɑ́dɑ̈g, kömi gen cïb-ɑ lwøøb yenh ɑ́kyel. Jɑmm-ɑ gëëd bënn ngew kɑ ngyënyyi gøldwøng." 
Ezra6:5 Kɑ jɑmmi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Bɑbïl yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr kì Kengø kì Yerusɑlem, dwøøg kɑ̈jji gen kì yij Kengi Yerusɑlem.”" 
Ezra6:6 Codhe, ɑöd Dɑryøs ki wɑ̈nyø kinni, “Yɑ gwëd-ɑ Tɑtenɑy, jɑngi myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. “Lɑ̈ɑ̈w wun ri wun ki Kengø, wuki Cethɑr Bodhenɑy, kí jø wun." 
Ezra6:7 Wu ko ludhi yethi kwøbbi geri Kengi Jwøk. Wiy jyɑ̈ggì geki tyëngdøngi Yeud døøg gen Kengi Jwøk ki gerø kì keje ceth. 
Ezra6:8 Thyew yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kipe gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi wun kipe Yeud møg-ɑ døøg Kengi Jwøk ki gerø, gïg-ɑ dwɑddi kipe gyer jwɑnu gen ki muujø. Colu gen bënn kì ri ngyënyyi gøldwøng, geki gwɑ̈ɑ̈j modïri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Ezra6:9 Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi, ying gɑ dyëg-ɑ römm, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ̈dhh, wɑlɑ̀ órömm-ɑ thønhø møg rɑ̈bbi Jwøøg mɑl, wɑlɑ̀ gemè, wɑlɑ̀ omelø, wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ møøw dhetun møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi ókwëri Yerusɑlem, nyi mëggi gï gen ceth yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Ezra6:10 Kipe o ge nyi muuj gen ki gëdhh-ɑ dwɑddi yi pyëw Jwøøg mɑl, o ge kwɑ̈jji gen kiperɑ wøki wɑ̈ddɑ." 
Ezra6:11 Cigg møg-ɑ muujɑ thyew, bɑ kinni ngɑn-ɑ ópyem ciggɑni yɑdh ówöödh wɑ̈g kì ri øde, o dhø yɑnhɑni tyeng e bedh, o ngɑnɑni cwøb ki yɑnhɑni, o twïye wɑ̈g kì ree, codhe o gøle gwøg ɑ́ thur." 
Ezra6:12 Wiy Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́myeg Yerusɑlem ɑ́ keny nyi mɑllii nɑ̈ge rɑ̈nh-ɑ ópëmø, wɑlɑ̀ pönh-ɑ ópyem ciggɑni, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn-ɑ ódwɑddi dhuri Kengi Jwøk men-ɑ Yerusɑlem piny. Yɑn yɑ Dɑryøs ɑ ɑ́muuj cigg møg, mïdhi gen ceth.”" 
Ezra6:13 Kɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́öri Tɑtenɑy, jɑngi myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, geki Cethɑr Bodhenɑy, kí jø gen yi Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs, yïëy yi gen ni kɑ ɑ́ceg gen ceth." 
Ezra6:14 Kɑ geri Kengø yi pëjji Yeud, pödh-ɑ bøle kidøøj, ge ocïjø yi jøtöng ryeet, ɑ løg Agɑy geki Dhekɑriyɑ̀. Kengø ɑ́tyëg yi gen ni kɑ ɑ́ceg gen yi Jwøøg Isrɑil, kí Körec, geki Dɑryøs, kí Artɑkerkes rɑ̈nhi Pɑres." 
Ezra6:15 Atyëg gen geri Kengø kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y Adɑr, kì bïkyeel runni Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs kì yij lɑwø." 
Ezra6:16 Codhe, ɑthyeey Kengi Jwøk ki medi pëëth yi ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ji bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø." 
Ezra6:17 Kì ri thyeyi Kengi Jwøk, ge ɑ́muuj-ɑ wɑ̈dhh 100, kí dyëg 200, kí órömm 400 gɑ gëdhhì, kí ónyögg 12 gɑ gëdhhi orøg, dyel ɑ́kyel kipe wïj kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil." 
Ezra6:18 Kɑ ge orönyø ki ókwërø, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kɑ ge pɑ̈ngi gɑ ɑkudd, kipe gwøøg Kengø kì Yerusɑlem ni kɑ ógweedii yij Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀." 
Ezra6:19 Agwøøg Kwëër Ákɑɑdh yi tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt." 
Ezra6:20 Mɑ́ ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, ri gen ɑ́rum ki kwërø yi gen, o ge dhïwi gen." 
Ezra6:21 Gëdhhì ɑ́cɑm-ɑ yi tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø bënn. 
Ezra6:22 Kɑ Kwëër Ákɑɑdh gwøg yi gen ki medi pëëth, ge cɑm-ɑ olwëny ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, mɑ́ pëthi gen ɑ́wëggi mïnø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pyëw rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur luge gïn, kɑ gï thödhe ki tegø men tyëg gen gwøøg geri Kengi Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Ezra7:1 Anɑn kì bɑng runn mø gïïr, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Artɑkerkes bɑ rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres, ɑ́dɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Edhrɑ̀ me kɑ̈ɑ̈l thɑ gøl Aɑron Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng. Edhrɑ̀ bɑ wɑ̈d Serɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Adhɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀," 
Ezra7:2 wɑ̈d Cɑlum, wɑ̈d Dhɑdök, wɑ̈d Akitub," 
Ezra7:3 wɑ̈d Amɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Adhɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Merɑyöth," 
Ezra7:4 wɑ̈d Dherɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Udhì, wɑ̈d Bukì," 
Ezra7:5 wɑ̈d Abicuɑ̀, wɑ̈d Pineɑs, wɑ̈d Eliɑdhɑr, wɑ̈d Aɑron." 
Ezra7:6 Edhrɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl me dïdø, me ngɑ̈nyi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, møg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge Mosɑ̀. Edhrɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑgyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde bënn mëggii yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, ɑkedhe kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Ezra7:7 Akedh tyëng Isrɑil kyeel ki gøn, gen ɑ ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí jøwör, kí jøkor, kí jøgwøøg Kengø. Ge ɑ́kedhi Yerusɑlem, kì bïryeew runni Artɑkerkes kì yij lɑwø." 
Ezra7:8 Ge ɑ́dhwödh kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt. Ge ɑ́køny yi Jwøk, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Yerusɑlem kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi bïïj dwɑ̈tt." 
Ezra7:9  
Ezra7:10 Edhrɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd pyëwe cïb en ri rɑngi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi ciggɑni, kí pwönyi tyëng Isrɑil ki ciggɑni bënn." 
Ezra7:11 Møg bɑ wɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ókwërø Edhrɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ nyi gwëdi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tyëng Isrɑil, men-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Artɑkerkes, ógwedø kinni:" 
Ezra7:12 “Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes gwëd-ɑ ókwërø Edhrɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ nyi gwed ciggi Jwøøg mɑl." 
Ezra7:13 “Yɑn ɑ muujø ki cigg èn, ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi døøg Yerusɑlem kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, kì yij pödhɑ, kí ókwër, geki Kwɑrri Leebì wiy døg gen." 
Ezra7:14 Yï ör-ɑ yi yɑn wøki jø tøg burø gɑ ɑ́bïryew, kipe kinni o yï lidh bëën-ɑ bëëd ji kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem, mɑ mïdhi ciggi Jwøgí yi teedø," 
Ezra7:15 o yï kɑ̈l dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi rɑ̈dh geki jø tøg bure, ge nëng-ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ Kenge ying Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra7:16 Átegø kí dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́yod yi yïn kì kɑɑl Bɑbïl bëne geki myërre, kí gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi tyëng Isrɑil, geki ókwër gɑ mø Kengi Jwøøg gen kì Yerusɑlem, ókɑ̈l yi yïn thyew." 
Ezra7:17 “Mïdhí ngyënyyɑni kidøøj, o ge óngëëw yi yïn ki wɑ̈dhh, kí órömm-ɑ døngø, kí órömm-ɑ thønhø, kí gemè, kí møgi oløg, møg muuj gɑ gëdhhì kì wïj këli lɑm, kì Kengi Jwøgí men-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra7:18 Átegø kí dhɑm-ɑ döng ócuggø gwøøg yi wun ki gïn-ɑ ódwɑddi yi wun ki gwøgø, ɑ́ gïjø me cyɑ̈dhi kì yuu Jwøk." 
Ezra7:19 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun bënn gɑ møg göög kì Kengi Jwøøg wun, thërru gen Jwøk kì Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra7:20 O keløg e dɑ gïg møøgø møg-ɑ ódwɑddi yi yïn kipe Kengø, kwɑnyu gen kì ri jɑmmi gøldwøng." 
Ezra7:21 “Yɑ ceg-ɑ jɑgg-ɑ mïdhi ngyëny kì myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kinni, nyi mëggi gen Edhrɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ nyi gwed ciggi Jwøøg Mɑl, gïn-ɑ nyi cwøl yi en ceth," 
Ezra7:22 gïti keny-ɑ ógööge ki kïllì ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí miy ɑ́ngwen mø ɑ́tegø, kí kïllì ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø mø gemè, kí møgi oløg ɑ́ røthøl ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen, kí møøw dhetun ɑ́ røthøl ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen, kí omelø men-ɑ ódwɑddi." 
Ezra7:23 Nyi muuj gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøøg Mɑl kipe Kenge ceth, o cöge e pyëwe pɑ rënyi ki yɑn, wøki tyëng-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì bɑngɑ." 
Ezra7:24 Wu pɑth ki ɑyïëy ki kɑ̈bbø ki gwɑ̈j kì yï ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kí jøwör, ki jøkor, kí jøgwøg, kí jøg-ɑ nyi göögø kì yij Kengø." 
Ezra7:25 “Yïn, Edhrɑ̀, ki peli wïj men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Jwøgí, kɑ̈bbí ki jɑggi kɑ̈dd geki jɑggi myërr, kì myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, gɑ tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi ciggi Jwøgí bënn, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kwïj ciggɑni, pwönyi yi gen." 
Ezra7:26 Ngɑn-ɑ ócög e pɑ kɑ̈lli bɑng ciggi Jwøgí, wɑlɑ̀ bɑng ciggi pödhø, cɑy ki thøø, wɑlɑ̀ ör yïnø, wɑlɑ̀ cude ki ngyëny, wɑlɑ̀ mɑg.”" 
Ezra7:27 Akööb Edhrɑ̀ kinni, “Pwøj wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyee, mɑ́ pyëw rɑ̈dh ɑ́wëgge okøn kipe thyeyi Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra7:28 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑre yɑn ɑ́nyodhe kì bøli rɑ̈nhdwøng geki jø tøg bure, kɑ pyëwɑ wëgge tëngø, ɑcøngɑ pëjji Isrɑil, o wø dwöög wøn ki gen.”" 
Ezra8:1 Møg bɑ nyingi jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, møg-ɑ ɑ́dwöög Yerusɑlem geki Edhrɑ̀, ge dwöög ɑ yïnø kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes." 
Ezra8:2 Gercöm kì wïj gøl Pineɑs. Dɑniel kì wïj gøl Ithɑmɑr Atuc wɑ̈d Cekɑniyɑ̀ kì wïj gøl Debïd Dhekɑriyɑ̀ kì wïj gøl Pɑröc, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 150 Eliönɑy wɑ̈d Dherɑiyɑ̀, kì wïj gøl Pɑkɑth Moɑb, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 200 Cekɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yɑɑdhiel, kì wïj gøl Dhɑtu, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 300 Ebed wɑ̈d Yönɑthɑn, kì wïj gøl Adïn, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 50 Yecɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Athɑliyɑ̀, kì wïj gøl Elɑm, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 70 Dhebɑdiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mikɑil, kì wïj gøl Cepɑtiyɑ̀, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 80 Obɑdiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yekiel, kì wïj gøl Yöɑb, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 218 Celömith wɑ̈d Yosipiyɑ̀, kì wïj gøl Bɑnì, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 160 Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bebɑy, kì wïj gøl Bebɑy, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 28 Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Akɑtɑn, kì wïj gøl Adhgɑd, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 110 Elipelet, Yeuel, kí Cemɑiyɑ̀, kì gøl Adönikɑm, ge ɑ́dwöög kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ 60 (ge ɑ́bï-ɑ cyɑ̈n) Uthɑy geki Dhɑkur, kì wïj gøl Bigbɑy, kí jø gøl gen gɑ 70" 
Ezra8:3  
Ezra8:4  
Ezra8:5  
Ezra8:6  
Ezra8:7  
Ezra8:8  
Ezra8:9  
Ezra8:10  
Ezra8:11  
Ezra8:12  
Ezra8:13  
Ezra8:14  
Ezra8:15 Kɑ ji cøngɑ bënn, kì kömi nɑm-ɑ rengi kɑɑl Aɑbɑ̀, ɑbëëd wøn kì kunɑni ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ yodɑ kinni dɑ ókwër kì kelli ji, de bong Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Ezra8:16 Aödɑ be cwööli Eliedher, kí Ariel, kí Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Elnɑthɑn, kí Yöyɑrïb, kí Elnɑthɑn, kí Nɑthɑn, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Meculɑm. Kɑ yɑ öd-ɑ be cwööli jøpwönyø ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Yöyɑrïb geki Elnɑthɑn." 
Ezra8:17 Aörɑ gen yï Idö, jɑngi Kɑsipiyɑ̀, kɑ ge köbbɑ møg-ɑ óköbbi Kɑsipiyɑ̀ geki jøge yi gen, ɑ løg bɑ̈nggi Kengø kì Kɑsipiyɑ̀, kinni ödi wøn yi gen ki ji møg göögø kì yij Kengø Jwøgee." 
Ezra8:18 Wø ɑ́køny yi Jwøk, kɑ wø öri gen Cerebiyɑ̀ Kwɑɑr Leebì, jɑl me cuggi gwøg, o bɑ jɑl wïj gøl Mɑklì, ɑ́bï kɑ wɑ̈dde geki myiimen, gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
Ezra8:19 Acɑbiyɑ̀ geki Yecɑiyɑ̀, jø wïj gøl Merɑrì ɑ́ör yi gen thyew geki wɑddi gen gɑ 20." 
Ezra8:20 Thyew ɑ́dɑ bɑ̈nggi Kengø 220, møg-ɑ́ kweyyi gen ɑ́cïb wɑ̈yi gen yi Debïd geki jyɑ̈gge, o ge køny gen Kwɑrri Leebì. Ge bɑ ɑgwed ki nyingi gen bënn." 
Ezra8:21 Acïgɑ kinni thuum ji bënn kì kömi Nɑm Aɑbɑ̀, o ri wøn dwöög wøn piny kì bøli Jwøgee, wø kwɑjj-ɑ en kinni, kore wøn, wøki nyigi wøn, kí jɑmmì bënn, o wø kɑ̈l yi en ki tɑrø." 
Ezra8:22 Wïjɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈yø ki cwöd kì yï rɑ̈nhdwøng, ki jøliny møg cyɑ̈dhi tyelli gen kí møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì kömi kyënyì, gɑ møg di kor wøn ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì kö yöö, mɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng ɑ́köbbi yi wøn kinni, “Jwøøg wøn nyi gyëdh-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ gɑ̈nii, de pyëwe pɑ nyi med ki ngɑn-ɑ nyi wiyii piny.”" 
Ezra8:23 Codhe, ɑthuum wøn, kɑ møgɑni kwɑjji wøn kì yï Jwøgee, ɑ løøge kwɑ̈jji wøn." 
Ezra8:24 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈bbɑ kì kelli pëjji ókwër ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, ɑ løg, Cerebiyɑ̀, kí Acɑbiyɑ̀, kí pyɑ̈rø kì kelli wɑddi gen." 
Ezra8:25 Kɑ ge rumɑ ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí jɑmmì møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, geki jø tøg bure, kí jyɑ̈gge, kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn gɑ møg göög kì Kengi Jwøgee. Kɑ ge mëggɑ ókwër." 
Ezra8:26 Møg bene gen jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ ókwër: Átegø —– tøn 22 Jɑmm-ɑ óthɑ̈dhø ki ɑ́tegø, kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø —– kïllì 70 dhɑb —– kïllì 3,400 tɑ̈mmi dhɑb, kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew —– kïllì 8.4 tɑ̈mmi dilɑl mø myër, gɑ ɑ́ryew, mø ngewi gen pɑ̈r ki ngewi tɑ̈mmi dhɑb." 
Ezra8:27  
Ezra8:28 Aköbbɑ gen kinni, “Wu bɑ ɑkwër wun ɑ́ mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun, o jɑmmì møg bɑ ɑkwër thyew, o dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj ge mëgg-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun." 
Ezra8:29 Koru gen kidøøj gïti keny-ɑ órøm wun gen kì bøli ókwërr-ɑ døngø geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kí jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi wɑ Yerusɑlem. Ge órøm kì yij kɑ̈ni Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezra8:30 Codhe, ɑkwɑɑny ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø yi ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kinni o gï kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen Kengi Jwøgee, kì Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra8:31 Adhwödh wøn kì kömi Nɑm Aɑbɑ̀ kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt, wø kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem. Wø ɑ́kwɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wø korre ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kí ji-ɑ di cuggi buddø kì yethi yëthi wøn thyew, kì yij weel wøn." 
Ezra8:32 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi wøn Yerusɑlem, ɑywöm wøn ri wøn ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Ezra8:33 Kì ngween cyɑ̈ng, ɑrøm wøn ɑ́tegø, kí dhɑb, kí jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø kì Kengi Jwøgee. Kɑ ge mëggi wøn ókwërø Meremöth wɑ̈d Uriyɑ̀ geki Eliɑdhɑr wɑ̈d Pineɑs, kí Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́ryew, ɑ løg Yödhɑbɑd wɑ̈d Jöcwø geki Noɑdiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Binuy." 
Ezra8:34 Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́kwɑn kɑ ge røm. Codhe, ɑgweed møgɑni bënn kì bøli kenyɑni ceth." 
Ezra8:35 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø bënn omuujø ki gëdhhì møg rɑ̈bbi Jwøøg Isrɑil. Ge ɑ́muuj-ɑ wɑ̈dhh pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kipe Isrɑil bëne, kí órömm-ɑ døngø pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïkyel, kí órömm-ɑ thønhø pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïryew, kí ónyögg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew gɑ gëdhhi orøg. Møgɑni bënn ge ɑ́rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gëdhhì." 
Ezra8:36 Wɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes, e gwëd-ɑ jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh, kí jøg-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì yij mïïrì, kí jɑggi myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ɑ́muuj gen. Kɑ ge køny yi tyëngɑni, ki gwøøg Kengi Jwøk, ni kɑ ɑ́cïg rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Ezra9:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jɑmmɑni ki gwøgø bënn, kɑ kwï jɑggi tyëng Isrɑil bï-ɑ yïɑ, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́bëëd ri gen nuti dɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ki tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì piny men geki rɑjji gen, ɑ løg tyëng Amön, kí Moɑb, kí Rïp, kí Kɑnɑɑn, kí Kit, kí Perïdh, kí Yebus, kí Amör. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi jiɑni." 
Ezra9:2 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́nyömi ki nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ jii Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́kwër oywëdhø, bɑ pëjjì geki jyɑ̈ggi mïïri ɑ ɑ́cɑg møgɑni.”" 
Ezra9:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ møgɑni ɑkɑgɑ ógudhɑ, kɑ yëyyi wïjɑ geki yëyyi tïgɑ pyedɑ, ɑpëggɑ piny yɑ juudø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ." 
Ezra9:4 Abëën tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bwøg yi kwøbbi Jwøøg Isrɑil, kí gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø, kɑ ri gen cøng gen butɑ, yɑ obëëdø kì piny yɑ juudø gïti bøli kej gënhi böörø." 
Ezra9:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej gënhi böörø, ɑdhwödhɑ mɑl kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ juudø, kí ógudh møg-ɑ kɑgø kì riɑ, ɑbøødhɑ riɑ piny, kɑ cinggɑ thɑ̈ngɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgɑ," 
Ezra9:6 Akööbɑ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøk, wïjɑ ólɑ̈yyø, yɑ óböggø ki tïngi wïjɑ mɑl kì bøli, mɑ́ orøøg wøn dwøng cɑrø, wɑ̈thi wøn pöödh en." 
Ezra9:7 Wø ɑ́røngi ki orøg me dwøng, cɑg kì ri kweyyi wøn, pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Kì bɑng orøøg wøn, wøki rɑ̈nhi wøn, kí ókwërri wøn, ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi wøn cinggi rɑ̈nhì mø pɑth, o wø nɑ̈g yi gen, o wø køøl yïnø, o jɑmmi wøn kɑb yi gen, o wø göggi ki ɑyɑ̈r yi gen, ni gïg-ɑ nudd ge ogøggø yi wøn gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Ezra9:8 De ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, wø ɑ́göggí ki gïndøj kɑ keny me thiinh, yï ɑ́wïyi ki kwï ji møg döng ge nuti kïdhi yïnø, kɑ wø wëggí bëëdø kì kej kwër, e bong gïn böggi yi wøn. Wø ɑ́gøny yi yïn kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, kɑ wø nëngí ki nënnì mø nyɑ̈n." 
Ezra9:9 Wø ɑ́bëëd wø bɑ bɑ̈ngg, de wø nuti wëggi yïn cöög yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. Wø ɑ́wëggí wørø yi rɑ̈nhi Pɑres, ɑwëggi wøn bëëdø kì pönhï yi gen, o Kengí, Keng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e rënyø ger yi wøn, o wø bëëd wøn wø pɑ böggi kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra9:10 “Anɑn yïn ɑ Jwøk, ɑ́ ngø ɑ ókwøb yi wøn kì bɑng møg? Ciggí ɑ́pyem yi wøn." 
Ezra9:11 Cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggí wøn ki cinggi bɑ̈nggí, tyëngtöng kinni, piny-ɑ yije kedhi yi wøn, ɑ́ men kwɑny yi wøn, bɑ piny me rɑj; pinyɑni bëne ɑ́rum ki rënyø yi ji-ɑ bëëdø kì yije, ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi gen." 
Ezra9:12 Wø ɑ́kyëddi yi gen kinni, wɑ̈ddi wøn ko nyömi ki nyigi tyëngɑni, kɑ nyigi wøn ko nywøm yi wɑ̈ddi gen. I wø ko wöl rumø kì ri kwøbbi mër kí gïndøj ki per gen. Kipe kinni o wø óbëëd wøn wø teg, o gïgdøj mø pinyɑni ócɑm yi wøn, o pinyɑni óbëëde ɑ́ mi kwɑrri wøn gïti ɑtheer." 
Ezra9:13 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́bï kömi wøn bënn bɑ gööj orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wøn, orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wøn, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni yï bɑ Jwøøg wøn, ɑ nyi cɑy wøn ki cɑ́y mø nøg kibøli orøøg wøn, wø nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g yïn." 
Ezra9:14 Ciggí ɑ́døøg ki pyemø yi wøn kidï këti, ɑnyömi wøn ki nyigi jurr-ɑ rijjø ni møg? Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni keløg wø ogöögø ki gïn ni menɑni, pyëwí órënyi, kɑ wø nɑ̈g yi yïn wø bënn, e bong ngɑn wiy yi yïn e onëënø." 
Ezra9:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, bene yïn ɑ døj, mɑ́ wø ɑ́wiy yi yïn wø onëënø, wøn ɑ bølí ek ki orøøg wøn, wø pɑ døøj ki cung kì bølí.”" 
Ezra10:1 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Edhrɑ̀ ree bøødh en piny kì bøli Kengi Jwøk, e óywöngø e gøny-ɑ orøngɑni, ɑbëën tyëng Isrɑil mø gïïr yïe. Tyëngɑni kelli gen dɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, mɑ́ ji ɑ́ywöngi ki ywøg me teeg." 
Ezra10:2 Aköbbi Edhrɑ̀ yi Cekɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yekiel, wɑ̈d Elɑm kinni, “Yïëyø mi wøn ki Jwøk ɑ́wiy yi wøn keny-ɑ ɑ́nyömi wøn ki nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, Isrɑil nudd yïe dɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Ezra10:3 Wø ceg-ɑ köngø kì bøli Jwøgee kinni, mɑ̈nn-ɑ pɑth møgɑni ge ceg kɑ tɑ̈ngø yi wøn, ge ócyeddi yi wøn, geki nyigi gen. Gïn-ɑ óköbbí wøn wuki tyëng-ɑ böggi Jwøk ógwøg yi wøn, gen ɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi Ciggi Jwøk." 
Ezra10:4 Edhrɑ̀, gwøg ying-ɑ cingí, göög yï ókøny yi wøn.”" 
Ezra10:5 Codhe, kɑ pëjjì kí ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kí kwï tyëng-ɑ kyeelø bënn, köbbi köngø yi Edhrɑ̀ kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Cekɑniyɑ̀ ógwøg yi gen ceth." 
Ezra10:6 Adhwödh Edhrɑ̀ kì bøli Kengi Jwøk, kɑ kedh-ɑ keny-ɑ nyi bëëd yi Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Eliɑcïb, ɑlɑnge wɑ̈r pyëwe orɑ̈mø yi gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø. Edhrɑ̀ nuti cyɑ̈mø wɑlɑ̀ nuti mɑ̈dhø ki gïïpiny." 
Ezra10:7 Aör wöödø Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn kinni, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø bënn cøng gen ri gen Yerusɑlem." 
Ezra10:8 Ngɑn-ɑ pɑ bï kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi pëjjì, jɑmme bënn ceg kɑ kwɑnyø, o en kiree, pɑ bëëdø ɑ́ dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli teen-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø." 
Ezra10:9 Codhe, kɑ jøg-ɑ bëëdø kì piny Ben Yɑmïn geki Yeudɑ̀ bënn ri gen cøng gen, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, kì bïngween dwɑ̈tt, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew. Ge ɑ́cug ɑ Yerusɑlem kì bøli Kengi Jwøk, dëlli gen okïïrø yi tegi kødh geki tegi kwøbb-ɑ́ per gen ɑ́cugi." 
Ezra10:10 Adhwödhi ókwërø Edhrɑ̀ mɑl, kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Cigg nuti mïdhø yi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́nyömi wun ki nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ bɑ̈jji Isrɑil med yi wun." 
Ezra10:11 Anɑn yewi wun ki orøøg wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyyi wun. Kɑ wu nyi gwøgu gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi en, kɑ ri wun lɑ̈ɑ̈w wun ki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì pinyee, kɑ mɑ̈nni wun, ɑ løg nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø tɑ̈ng wun.”" 
Ezra10:12 Alöggi ji bënn ge óryeerø kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wøn, ógwøg yi wøn ceth.”" 
Ezra10:13 Akööb gen kinni, “Kødh dwøng, o ji pɑ cuggi cung kì wɑ̈g. Gwøg men pɑ cuggi tyëgø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ryew, mɑ́ ji mø gïïr kì kelli wøn ɑ ɑ́røngi." 
Ezra10:14 Wiy jɑggi wøn bëëd gen kì Yerusɑlem, ge nenn-ɑ møgɑni. O jøg-ɑ yï gen di nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø bï gen kì bøli keny-ɑ ókwøb geki jøgdøngø kí jɑgg. Codhe, o cɑ́yi Jwøgee bï gen wɑ̈g kì kömee.”" 
Ezra10:15 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́bɑny møgɑni, den-ɑ́ Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Asɑiil geki Yɑɑdheiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Tikbɑ̀ keti gen, kɑ mø gen yïëy yi Meculɑm geki Cɑbethɑy Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Ezra10:16 Møgɑni ɑ́yïëy yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø, ɑyïëy ókwërø Edhrɑ̀ kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, mø gwed nyingi gïn. Ge ɑ́cɑ̈g ɑ kyeel cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, ɑpëggi gen piny be yɑbi thɑ́ møgɑni." 
Ezra10:17 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyömø ki nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø óthumø ki yodø kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì kyeel dwɑ̈tt. 
Ezra10:18 Møg bene gen nyingi jøg-ɑ yï gen ɑ́di nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø: Wïj gøl Jöcwø geki kɑ̈lli nyiimen yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw, wɑ̈ddi Yödhɑdɑk. Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, kí Eliedher, kí Yɑrïb kí Gedɑliyɑ̀." 
Ezra10:19 Ge ɑ́yïëy kinni mɑ̈nni gen ótɑ̈ng yi gen ceth, kɑ ge omuujø ki dyel ɑ́ gënhi orøøg gen." 
Ezra10:20 Gøl Imer: Aɑnɑnì geki Dhebɑdiyɑ̀. 
Ezra10:21 Gøl Arïm: Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, Eliyɑ̀, Cemɑiyɑ̀, Yekiel, kí Udhiyɑ̀." 
Ezra10:22 Gøl Pɑcur: Eliönɑy, Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, Icmɑil, Nethɑnel, Yödhɑbɑd, kí Elɑsɑ̀." 
Ezra10:23 Yödhɑbɑd, Cimeì, Kelɑiyɑ̀ (ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kelitɑ̀), Pethɑiyɑ̀, Yeudɑ̀, kí Eliedher." 
Ezra10:24 bɑ Eliɑcïb Cɑlum, Telem, kí Urì." 
Ezra10:25 Gøl Pɑröc: Rɑmiyɑ̀, Idhiyɑ̀, Mɑlkiyɑ̀, Miyɑmïn, Eliɑdhɑr, kí Mɑlkiyɑ̀, kí Benɑiyɑ̀." 
Ezra10:26 Gøl Elɑm: Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, Dhekɑriyɑ̀, Yekiel, Abdì, Yeremöth, kí Eliyɑ̀" 
Ezra10:27 Gøl Dhɑtu: Eliönɑy, Eliɑcïb, Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, Yeremöth, Dhɑbɑd, kí Adhïdhɑ̀." 
Ezra10:28 Gøl Bebɑy: Yöɑnɑn, Aɑnɑniyɑ̀, Dhɑbɑy, kí Athlɑy." 
Ezra10:29 Gøl Bɑnì: Meculɑm, Mɑluk, Adɑiyɑ̀, Yɑcub, Ceɑl kí Yeremöth." 
Ezra10:30 Gøl Pɑkɑth Moɑb: Adnɑ̀, Kelɑl, Benɑiyɑ̀, Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, Bedhɑlel, Binuy, kí Mɑnɑsè." 
Ezra10:31 Gøl Arïm: Eliedher, Iciyɑ̀, Mɑlkiyɑ̀, Cemɑiyɑ̀, Cimeøn, Ben Yɑmïn, Mɑluk kí Cemɑriyɑ̀." 
Ezra10:32  
Ezra10:33 Gøl Acum: Mɑtenɑy, Mɑtɑtɑ̀, Dhɑbɑd, Elipelet, Yeremɑy, Mɑnɑsè, kí Cimeì." 
Ezra10:34 Gøl Bɑnì: Mɑɑdɑy, Amrɑm, Uel, Benɑiyɑ̀, Bedeiyɑ̀, Keluì, Bɑniyɑ̀, Meremöth, Eliɑcïb, Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, Mɑtenɑy, kí Yɑɑsu." 
Ezra10:35  
Ezra10:36  
Ezra10:37  
Ezra10:38 Gøl Binuy: Cimeì, Celemiyɑ̀, Nɑthɑn, Adɑiyɑ̀, Mɑknɑdebɑy, Cɑcɑy, Cɑrɑy, Adhɑrel, Celemiyɑ̀, Cemɑriyɑ̀, Cɑlum, Amɑriyɑ̀, kí Yosep." 
Ezra10:39  
Ezra10:40  
Ezra10:41  
Ezra10:42  
Ezra10:43 Gøl Nebö: Yeiel, Mɑtithiyɑ̀, Dhɑbɑd, Dhebïnɑ̀, Yɑdɑy, Yöiil, kí Benɑiyɑ̀." 
Ezra10:44 Jøgɑni bënn ge ɑ́nywøm-ɑ nyigi jurrì møøgø, kɑ mɑ̈nnɑni ryem gen bënn geki nyigi gen." 
Nehemiah1:1 Møg bene gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Nëmɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akɑliyɑ̀. Kì dwɑ̈y Kisleb, e Artɑkerkes, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres yïe dɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kì yij lɑwø, yɑn yɑ Nëmɑyɑ̀, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ ying-ɑ Susɑ̀ kɑɑldwøng." 
Nehemiah1:2 Kɑ Aɑnɑnì ómïɑ obëënø, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ geki ji møøgø. Kɑ pyëjɑ kiper Yerusɑlem, kí wɑddi wøn, Yeud møg-ɑ ɑ́bodh kɑ ge odøøgø kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kun-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen." 
Nehemiah1:3 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi gen kinni i tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi pödhi wøn ying-ɑ yij orɑng me teg, kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëd ge óyɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi tyëngpɑth. Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi gen thyew i döri Yerusɑlem nudd e pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o thïggi döre bɑ ɑrɑ̈b." 
Nehemiah1:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ møgɑni bënn, ɑpëggɑ piny kɑ yɑ óywöngø. Yɑ ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr yɑ okïïmø, o yɑ nuti cyɑ̈mø. Kɑ Jwøk kwɑjjɑ kinni," 
Nehemiah1:5 “Wuö Jwøøg Mɑl! Yï dwøng, o wø óböggø yi yïn. Møg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi yïn nyii mïdhø yi yïn kidøøj, kipe tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn ge mïdh-ɑ ciggí." 
Nehemiah1:6 Lugí thɑ̈wwí yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kwɑ̈jjɑ lïngí, kenyi kwɑ̈jjɑ kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng kipe bɑ̈nggí, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil. Yɑ ɑ́yïëy kinni, wø ɑ́røngi, wø tyëng Isrɑil, wø ɑ́røngi wøki kweyyi wøn." 
Nehemiah1:7 Wø ɑ́göög ki gïjø me rɑj kì bølí, o wø nuti gwøg ki møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wøn, ciggí møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi bɑ̈ngí Mosɑ̀ nuti mïdhø yi wøn." 
Nehemiah1:8 Anɑn pɑr møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí Mosɑ̀ kinni, ‘Wu tyëng Isrɑil, keløg ciggɑ koo mïdhi yi wun, wu kedhhɑ’ kedhhø kì kelli pödhh." 
Nehemiah1:9 De keløg wu dwöög-ɑ köörɑ, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun gwøg yi wun, wu dwöögɑ’ keny-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn ɑ́ keny nyi mɑlli yɑn, cɑgg wu tɑɑy kömi piny.’" 
Nehemiah1:10 “Wuö, møg bɑ bɑ̈nggí, jií ceth. Ge ɑ́yiel-ɑ yi yïn ki tegí, teng-ɑ dwøng." 
Nehemiah1:11 Lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ kí kwɑ̈jji bɑ̈nggí møg-ɑ wør yïn bënn. Wiy yɑ yodɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kɑ wiy rɑ̈nhdwøng pyëwe lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki yɑn.” Ábëëd ɑ́ yɑn ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli møgi oløg mi rɑ̈nhdwøng kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni." 
Nehemiah2:1 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì bɑng dwɑ̈tt ɑ́ngwen, e Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes ocyɑ̈mø, ɑmuujɑ en ki møgi oløg. Yɑ nuti liidh en cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel e pyëwɑ nënne e pɑ med." 
Nehemiah2:2 Codhe, ɑpyëje yɑn kinni, “Yïde ɑ nënní yï juudø, o dëlí pɑ rɑ̈mø? Men bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw.” Kɑ yɑ obwøgø," 
Nehemiah2:3 ɑlöggɑ kinni, “Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk wuö gïti ɑtheer, yɑ óbëëdø pyëwɑ med kidï, e kɑɑl-ɑ́ yije ɑ́koony kweyyi wøn ótørrø, o thïgge órɑ̈bø ki mɑc?”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Apëjji rɑ̈nhdwøng kinni, “Á gïn ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn?” Kɑ Jwøøg Mɑl kwɑjjɑ." 
Nehemiah2:5 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ rɑ̈nhdwøng kinni, “Keløg pyëwí med ki yɑn wuö, o yï dwɑdd-ɑ muuji gïn-ɑ kwɑjjɑ, ör yɑn Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́koony kweyyɑ, o døøgɑ ki gerø.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Aköbbi yɑn yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, (e bɑ̈rɑ̈dh obëëdø kì bute) kinni, “Yï ótyëg-ɑ keny me bëëdø kidï yï tøøk, o yï ódwöög kì wɑɑng?” Kɑ köbbɑ." 
Nehemiah2:7 Akwɑjjɑ en kinni gwëde yɑn ki wɑ̈j møg muujɑ jɑggi myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, møg köbbi gen kinni wiy gen yɑn, o yɑ kedhɑ Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah2:8 Yɑ ɑ́cwöddi thyew ki wɑ̈nyø men mëggɑ Asɑp, jɑl-ɑ mïdhi thïm rɑ̈nhdwøng, o yɑ nënge ki yenh møg gwøøg thïggi ønteg men-ɑ nyi koor Kengø, kí thïggi dhøggi döri kɑɑl, kí thïggi gøl-ɑ óbëëdɑ. Kɑ yɑ mëggi gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwøl yi yɑn bënn yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́ceg kɑ kønyø yi Jwøk." 
Nehemiah2:9 Rɑ̈nhdwøng ɑ́muuj ki pëjji jøliny tyel, kí jøkyënyì møg lwøøg wøn. Kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Kɑ wɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́gwëdi jɑggi myërrɑni yi rɑ̈nhdwøng mëggɑ gen." 
Nehemiah2:10 De Sɑnbɑlɑt jɑl kɑɑl Bet Örøn geki Töbiyɑ̀ jɑl myërri Amön, pëthi gen ɑ́ceg rënyø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen kinni i dɑ dhɑnhø me bëën be göggi tyëng Isrɑil ki gïndøj." 
Nehemiah2:11 Yɑ ɑ́kedhi Yerusɑlem, kɑ yɑ obëëdø ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g," 
Nehemiah2:12 e bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́köbbɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn yi Jwøk gɑ møg göggɑ Yerusɑlem. Kɑ yɑ odhwödhø kì dïwɑ̈r, yɑ ɑ́cwøl-ɑ ji mø nøg kì kelli jøgɑ. Aderø kete ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi wøn, ɑ́ men köme cyɑ̈dhɑ." 
Nehemiah2:13 Yɑ ɑ́kedhi wɑ̈g kì wɑ̈r, kɑ yɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ Dhøg Tör kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kɑ wø yöd-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kɑ wø kɑ̈l-ɑ buti Wɑɑng Pï, wø pödh-ɑ Dhøg Thur. Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi yɑ nenn-ɑ döri kɑɑl keny-ɑ ótørrii, kí thïgge keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈b gen ki mɑc." 
Nehemiah2:14 Codhe, ɑkedhɑ Dhøg Wɑɑng Pï, geki Luuy Rɑ̈dh kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø. Kɑ ɑder-ɑ köme cyɑ̈dhɑ ojɑdø ki keny kɑ̈ɑ̈le yi tuggì," 
Nehemiah2:15 ɑdøøgɑ yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij töör Kidrön, yɑ nenn-ɑ dörø. Codhe, ɑløgɑ riɑ yuu-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ, kɑ yɑ døøg-ɑ kɑɑl yɑ kɑ̈l-ɑ Dhøg Tör." 
Nehemiah2:16 Bong dhɑnhø kì kelli jɑggi kɑɑlɑni mɑ ɑ́yod kun-ɑ ɑ́kedhɑ, wɑlɑ̀ gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ, thyew ɑ́bëëd e bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wɑddi wøn Yeud, ɑ løg ókwër, kí jɑgg, kí pëjjì, kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kunyi ki gwøg bënn." 
Nehemiah2:17 Aköbbɑ gen kinni, “Wu onëënø ki rɑj møg-ɑ yethi gen di wɑ, kí bëëdi Yerusɑlem e rënyø, thïgge bɑ ɑrɑ̈b ki mɑc. Ger wɑ döri Yerusɑlem, o ɑyɑ̈r men-ɑ kömee lɑ̈ɑ̈nye.”" 
Nehemiah2:18 Kɑ ge köbbɑ ki kër-ɑ ɑ́køny yɑn yi Jwøk, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi rɑ̈nhdwøng. Alöggi gen kinni, “Cɑ̈gi wɑ ki gyer!” Kɑ pëthi gen cwïddi gen gwøg." 
Nehemiah2:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Sɑnbɑlɑt, geki Töbiyɑ̀, kí wɑ̈d Árɑb me cwøl ɑ́ Gecem, ɑgɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ge okööbø kinni, “Wu orumø kinni wu gwøg-ɑ ngø? Wu pɑ pyem-ɑ kwøbbi rɑ̈nhdwøng?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Alöggɑ kinni, “Wø ókøny yi Jwøøg Mɑl, kɑ gwøngɑni tyëg yi wøn. Wø bɑ bɑ̈ngge, o wø ceg-ɑ cɑ̈gø ki gyer ceth. De bong gïi wun kì Yerusɑlem, o bong kwööng wun kì yije.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Møg bɑ kwøbbi kër-ɑ ɑ́døøg döri kɑɑldwøng ki gerø. Eliɑcïb, Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng geki ókwër, ge ɑ́ger-ɑ tung-ɑ Dhøg Dyëg, kɑ thïgge cïb gen, kɑ gø thyey gen. Dörø ɑ́thyey yi gen gïti Ønbɑ̈r mi Miyø, ki Ønbɑ̈r mi Anɑnel." 
Nehemiah3:2 Kɑ bun-ɑ bɑnge ger yi jø Yerikö. Kɑ bun-ɑ bɑnge ger yi Dhɑkur wɑ̈d Imrì. 
Nehemiah3:3 Gøl Asenɑ̀ ɑ́ger-ɑ tung-ɑ Dhøg Rij. Kɑ win geki thïg cïb gen kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ rïwwi geki ɑdëdd cïb gen." 
Nehemiah3:4 Meremöth wɑ̈d Uriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Aködh, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge. Meculɑm wɑ̈d Berekiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mecedhɑbel, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge. Bɑnge ɑ ɑ́gëëd yi Dhɑdök wɑ̈d Bɑɑnɑ̀." 
Nehemiah3:5 Bun-ɑ bɑnge ɑ́ger-ɑ yi jø Tekoɑ̀, de jɑggi kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bɑ̈nyi geri keny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen yi jyɑ̈ggi gwøg." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yöyɑdɑ̀ wɑ̈d Pɑseɑ̀ geki Meculɑm wɑ̈d Besodeiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger tung-ɑ Dhøg Yecɑnɑ̀. Kɑ win geki thïg cïb gen kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ rïwwi geki ɑdëdd cïb gen." 
Nehemiah3:7 Melɑtiyɑ̀ jɑl Gibeon, kí Yɑdön jɑl Merönöth, kí jø Gibeon kí Midhpɑ̀, gen ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge gïti gøl jɑngi myërri løøg Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Nehemiah3:8 Udhiel wɑ̈d Kɑrɑiyɑ̀, ɑ bɑ bødhi dhɑb, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge. Aɑnɑniyɑ̀, jɑlgwøg ki mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge gïti Dör-ɑ bɑ Dhïl." 
Nehemiah3:9 Repɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Ur jɑngi budi Mɑrkɑdh Yerusɑlem, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge." 
Nehemiah3:10 Yedɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Arumɑp, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, o bunɑni ɑ́ying-ɑ buti gøle. Atuc wɑ̈d Aɑcɑbneiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge." 
Nehemiah3:11 Mɑlkiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Arïm geki Acub wɑ̈d Pɑkɑth Moɑb, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge geki Ønbɑ̈r mi Purun." 
Nehemiah3:12 Cɑlum wɑ̈d Alöec jɑngi budi Mɑrkɑdh Yerusɑlem bun-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge. (Ákøny-ɑ yi nyige, womɑ̈nn ki gwøg.)" 
Nehemiah3:13 Anun geki ji møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl Dhɑnoɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́ger tung-ɑ Dhøg Tör. Kɑ win geki thïg cïb gen kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ rïwwi geki ɑ́dëdd cïb gen, kɑ dörø thïg yi gen, e bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, e gït-ɑ buti Dhøg Thur." 
Nehemiah3:14 Mɑlkiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Rekɑb, jɑngi Bet Akerem, ɑ ɑ́thïg dör-ɑ tung-ɑ Dhøg Thur, kɑ thïgge cïbe, kɑ ɑdëdde, kí rïwwe cïbe." 
Nehemiah3:15 Cɑlum wɑ̈d Kölödhè, jɑngi Midhpɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger Dhøg Wɑɑng Pï. Kí yuu-ɑ kedhi dhøngɑni, kɑ thïgge cïbe, kí ɑdëdde, kí rïwwe. Kɑ dör-ɑ buti bɑɑg gøldwøng men-ɑ nyi cwøl ɑ́ Luuy Celɑ̀ gere gïti buti yuu-ɑ nyi yethi pɑ Debïd." 
Nehemiah3:16 Nëmɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adhbuk jɑl-ɑ jɑɑg budi kɑɑl Betdhur, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, e gït-ɑ röri Debïd, kí luy, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi bëëd yi jøliny." 
Nehemiah3:17 Kɑ kwï dörø men-ɑ ɑ́döng ger yi Kwɑrri Leebì møg: Reum wɑ̈d Bɑnì, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, Ageer bun-ɑ bɑnge yi Acɑbiyɑ̀, jɑngi budi kɑɑl Keilɑ̀, e ger-ɑ kej kɑɑl gen." 
Nehemiah3:18 Bɑbɑy wɑ̈d Ënɑdɑd jɑl-ɑ jɑɑg budi Keilɑ̀ bun-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge." 
Nehemiah3:19 Edher wɑ̈d Yëcuɑ̀, jɑngi Midhpɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì ri ød jɑmmi liny gïti ɑ́duud dörø." 
Nehemiah3:20 Bɑruk wɑ̈d Dhɑbɑy ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, cɑg kì ri ɑ́dunɑni gïti gøl Eliɑcïb, Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng." 
Nehemiah3:21 Meremöth wɑ̈d Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Aködh ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge gïti cögi gøl Eliɑcïb. 
Nehemiah3:22 Budi dörø men-ɑ bɑnge, ɑ́ger-ɑ yi ókwër møg: Ókwërr-ɑ bëëdø kì myërr-ɑ buti Yerusɑlem, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge." 
Nehemiah3:23 Ben Yɑmïn geki Acub, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ buti kɑ̈lli gen. O Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Anɑniyɑ̀, ɑ́ger-ɑ dör-ɑ buti gøle." 
Nehemiah3:24 Binuy wɑ̈d Ënɑdɑd, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, cɑg kì buti gøl Adhɑriyɑ̀, gïti ɑ́duud dörø." 
Nehemiah3:25 Pɑlɑl wɑ̈d Udhɑy, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, cɑg kì ɑ́duud dörø, kí ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ buti gøldwøng, kì ri ódɑ̈ri jøkor. Pedɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Pɑröc, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, gïti buti Dhøg Pï, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ koor Kengø. (Kenyɑni ying-ɑ buti byëng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Opel, ɑ yije bëëd yi jøg-ɑ göögø kì Kengø.)" 
Nehemiah3:26  
Nehemiah3:27 Jø Tekoɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, e reb kɑ bun-ɑ ɑ́kwøng yi gen ki gerø, cɑg kì ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ dwøng, ɑ koor Kengø, e pïd-ɑ ri ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ buti Opel." 
Nehemiah3:28 Kɑ bun-ɑ kedhi kuni Dhøg Kyënyì ger yi ókwër, e ngɑn ger-ɑ keny-ɑ røøm ki gøle." 
Nehemiah3:29 Dhɑdök wɑ̈d Imer, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, o bunɑni røøm kɑ gøle. Cemɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cekɑniyɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ kor Dhøg Wɑɑng Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Mwøl, en ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge." 
Nehemiah3:30 Aɑnɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Celemiyɑ̀ geki Anun, ɑ løg bïkyeel wɑ̈ddi Dhɑlɑp, gen ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, o bɑ ryeew gyer kì yï gen. Meculɑm wɑ̈d Berekiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, bunɑni røøm ki gøle." 
Nehemiah3:31 Mɑlkiyɑ̀ bødhi dhɑb, ɑ ɑ́ger bun-ɑ bɑnge, gïti buti øn-ɑ bɑ kej ngyew yi tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kì Kengø, kì buti Dhøg Mipkɑd, kì buti øn-ɑ kömi wïj tøg dörø, kì wɑɑng wuudø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Nehemiah3:32 Bun-ɑ cyɑ̈n ɑ́ger-ɑ yi bödhhi dhɑb geki jøngyew, cɑg kì ɑ́duud dörø gïti Dhøg Dyëg." 
Nehemiah4:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Sɑnbɑlɑt kinni wø Yeud, wø cɑ̈gø ki gyer ki dörø, ɑrënyi pyëwe ki mendwøng, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki benyi wøn." 
Nehemiah4:2 Akööbe kì bøli mɑ̈dhhe geki jøliny kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ceg ki dwɑddi gwøgø yi Yeud, ge nyødh ni møg? Ge dwɑdd-ɑ døøgi kɑɑlɑni ki gerø? Ge orumø kinni ke muuj gen ki gëdhhì, kɑɑlɑni ogerø yi gen ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel? Ópɑddi kïtt-ɑ ɑ́ying ri dörø ócuggø dwøøg be gyer yi gen ge rɑ̈bbø rɑ̈bbø?”"
