Nehemiah4:3 Töbiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì bute, ɑkööbe kinni, “Á dörø me ni ngø ɑ ger yi gen? Cɑgg ɑ́ ógwøgø, ke yedhe wïj dörɑni, gø pɑ dhure piny!”" 
Nehemiah4:4 Akwɑjjɑ Jwøk kinni, “Wuö, Jwøk! Wiy byënyi gen døøge wɑ̈thi gen, wiy jɑmmi gen kɑb bënn, kɑ wiy ge kïdhi pödhh møøgø gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Nehemiah4:5 Lɑɑwí ko dwöög piny kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, kɑ wïjí ko wïl ki orøøg gen, mɑ́ wø ɑ́gwɑddi yi gen wøn ɑ tyëng-ɑ gëdø.”" 
Nehemiah4:6 Kɑ wø ogëdø ki dörø. Kɑ dörø wɑ̈dh-ɑ kööre kì bɑng keny me thiinh, mɑ́ pëthi ji dɑ gwøg." 
Nehemiah4:7 De Sɑnbɑlɑt, kí Töbiyɑ̀, kí Árɑb, kí tyëng Amön, kí tyëng Acdöd keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen kinni döri Yerusɑlem ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki rumø ki gerø yi wøn, o kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì ri dörø ɑ́rum ki thïgø, kɑ pëthi gen ceg-ɑ rënyø ki mendwøng." 
Nehemiah4:8 Kɑ ge oyɑ̈bø ki yuu-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kömi Yerusɑlem, o gwøg rënyi yi gen," 
Nehemiah4:9 de Jwøøg wøn ɑ́kwɑjji yi wøn, kɑ wø ókɑ̈bbø ki ji møg kurø kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng." 
Nehemiah4:10 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ yï gen ɑ́dɑ wör mø kööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́nyönhi yi tyëddø ki gïgpeg, Dɑ börri kïttì møg dwɑddi yëëg pɑ̈l. Dörø óger yi wøn kidï dicyɑ̈ngtïn?”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wøn ɑ́rum kinni i ge pɑ nenni yi wøn, wɑlɑ̀ ce gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen kwïj yi wøn, gïti ke di wɑ̈nhi gen kömi wøn, o wø di nɑ̈g yi gen, o gwøøg wøn di cung yi gen." 
Nehemiah4:12 De Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, nyi bï-ɑ be köbbi wøn, ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi göggi wøn yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Nehemiah4:13 Codhe, ɑcïbɑ cinggi ji ki pil, kí tøngg, kí wethh, kɑ ge cïmmɑ gɑ dhøggi kɑ̈llì kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j dörø, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ nuti thumø ki gerø." 
Nehemiah4:14 Kɑ ɑ́lïdhɑ kinni ji ɑ́bwøg, ɑköbbɑ gen, geki tyëngdøngø kí jøgwøg kinni, “Wu ko böggi yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wɑ, pɑr wun Jwøge kí dönge, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ nyi gwøge, kɑ wu nyïɑ̈ggi wun, kipe nyigi wun geki mɑ̈nni wun, kí kɑ̈lli wun thyew.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Kɑ yod yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wøn kinni gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen yood wøn, kɑ yod yi gen thyew kinni rummi gen ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Jwøk. Codhe, kɑ wø døøg-ɑ be gyer ki dörø wø bënn." 
Nehemiah4:16 Cɑ̈gi kì bøli kenyɑni, jøgɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngɑ gɑ bud ɑ́ryew, kɑ̀ gëëd budø ɑ́kyel, bun-ɑ kyeelø ceg-ɑ kur, ge orugø ki ɑ́dhedheg, kí tøngg, kí ködd, kí wethh kì cinggi gen. Kɑ ji cïj yi jɑggi gen kidøøj." 
Nehemiah4:17 Ji møg-ɑ gëdø, kí ji møg-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmm-ɑ gëëd, dhɑnhø ɑ́göög-ɑ cingø ɑ́kyel, o cing-ɑ kyeelø mïdhe’ jɑmmi liny," 
Nehemiah4:18 kí pile gø twööj en pyere. Jɑl-ɑ ókodh kɑng ɑ́ying-ɑ butɑ. 
Nehemiah4:19 Kɑ jøgdøngø geki jɑgg kí ji bënn köbbɑ kinni, “Wɑ göögø kellee lɑ̈wi, o riee wɑɑd wɑ kö dörø." 
Nehemiah4:20 Keny-ɑ ólïngi wun ywøøg kɑng, kɑ ri wun cung wun butɑ, Jwøgee ónyïɑ̈ggi kiperee.”" 
Nehemiah4:21 Kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, wø nyi cɑ̈gi ki gwøg piny bɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ wø nyii rïïjø wø ogöögø gïti kenyi yuudh wøw kɑ kyell ónënnø, budi ji ceg-ɑ gyer ki dörø, o bun-ɑ kyeelø ceg-ɑ kur kí tøngg kì cinggi gen." 
Nehemiah4:22 Aköbbɑ jøg-ɑ cinggi gen di gwøg, geki jøg-ɑ nyi køny gen kinni, nyi bëëd gen kì Yerusɑlem kì wɑ̈r, ge okurø, o gwøg nyi gwøg kì dicɑ̈ng." 
Nehemiah4:23 Ógudhɑ pɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈g, cɑgg ɑ́ kì wɑ̈r, jøg-ɑ göög wøn, kí jøg-ɑ kurø, ógudhi gen pɑ nyi luny gen wɑ̈g thyew. Jɑmmi liny mø wøn pɑ nyi cïb wøn piny." 
Nehemiah5:1 Kì bɑng keny me thiinh, ɑcɑ̈gi ji mø gïïr ki køør, cwøw kí mɑ̈nn kì ri gïg-ɑ göggi gen yi wɑddi gen Yeud." 
Nehemiah5:2 Kwï gen ɑ́kööb kinni, “Kwɑnni wøn gïïr kì yethi kɑ̈lli wøn, wø dwɑdd-ɑ byel møg cɑm yi wøn kipe wø óywɑj yi kɑ̈j.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Kɑ møøgø okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́muuj ki pwödh, kí bɑ̈ggi oløg, kí kɑ̈lli wøn, ge ɑ́mëggi wøn tyëngmøøgø, kipe kinni o wø yïddi wøn ki byel møg cɑ̈mmi kɑ̈j yi wøn.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Kɑ kwï møøgø okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïdhø ki ngyëny møg col wøn gwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑ̈dh men-ɑ ɑ́cïb kipe pwödhhi wøn, kí bɑ̈ggi oløg thyew." 
Nehemiah5:5 Wø bɑ Yeud ni gen, nyigi wøn pɑ pɑ̈r ki nyigi gen? De nyigi wøn ce ɑ́di rumø ki ngëwwi gen yi wøn gɑ bɑ̈ngg? Bong gïn cuggi ki gwøgø yi wøn, mɑ́ pwödhhi wøn kí bɑ̈ggi oløg ɑ́rum ki kwɑnyø kì cinggi wøn yi tyëng-ɑ́ ngyënyyi gen ɑ́widh yi wøn.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Arënyi pyëwɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ gøøny gen," 
Nehemiah5:7 kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni møgɑni ólidh yi yɑn. Kɑ jøgdøngø cɑyɑ geki jyɑ̈ggì bënn, kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, “Wude ɑ guud wun nyingi nyiimï wun, Yeud?” Kɑ yɑ ócwöddø ki burø me dwøng kipe ɑkørrɑni." 
Nehemiah5:8 Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́dwöög-ɑ nyiimïee wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kì cinggi tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́ngew gen. De wude ɑ yöd wu dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o nyiimïee ri gen ngëwwi gen wun?” Kɑ jɑgg okudø, ge ɑ́jɑd ki gïn kwøb yi gen." 
Nehemiah5:9 Aköbbɑ gen kinni, “Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi wun rɑɑj! Yïëy wun Jwøk kɑ wu gwøg wun gïndøj. Kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, ɑ bɑ tyëngpɑth ko wëggi wun ki yöö men benyi gen wɑ." 
Nehemiah5:10 Ji møøgø ɑ́wïdhɑ ki ngyëny kí byel, kɑ ji møøgø ówïdhø kì yï mɑ̈dhhɑ. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ göögø ki yɑn, ji møøgø wïdhi gen ki ngyëny kí byel. Anɑn wiy wɑ møg-ɑ di culi wɑ bënn." 
Nehemiah5:11 Wiyu møg-ɑ ɑ́wïdhu ji bënn; ngyëny, kí byel, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun. Kɑ pwödhhi gen döggu gen, kí bɑ̈ggi gen, kí yenh dhetun, kí uddi gen bënn, ɑnɑn ceth!”" 
Nehemiah5:12 Kɑ jɑgg ólöggø kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ógwøg yi wøn. Jɑmmì ódöggi wøn wëëg gen, o jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́widh ócög ge pɑ culi wøn.” Acwöölɑ ókwër, kɑ jɑgg köbbɑ o ge köngi gen kì bøli ókwërrɑni, kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi gen ómïdhi yi gen ceth." 
Nehemiah5:13 Codhe, kɑ ɑcwɑdø men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e twööj yɑn yijɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈g kɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ. Aköbbɑ gen kinni, “Men bene gïn-ɑ ógöggi dhɑnhø men-ɑ koo mïdhi møgɑni kì kelli wun yi Jwøk èn. Jwøk uddi wun kí jɑmmi wun ókwɑny yi en kì yï wun, kɑ wu wiye ki cinggi wun.” Akööb ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud bënn kinni, “Amen.” Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lenhi yi gen. Kɑ jyɑ̈ggì köngi gen mïdhi gen ceth." 
Nehemiah5:14 Ki kër-ɑ ɑ́kwɑɑny yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ jɑngi Yeudiyɑ̀, cɑg kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryeew runni Rɑ̈nhdwøng Artɑkerkes, gïti pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryeew runne kì yij lɑwø, yɑ nuti kɑ̈bbø kì yï ji ki gwɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi kwɑny ɑ́ mi gïgcɑmmi jɑgø, men di cɑm yi yɑn wøki jyɑ̈ggɑ," 
Nehemiah5:15 jøg-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki jyɑ̈gø kì bølɑ bënn, ge ɑ́bëëd ji orɑngø kì cinggi gen. Ge nyi cwøl-ɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, gɑ møg ngeew gïncɑm kí møgi oløg. Cɑgg ɑ́ bɑ̈nggi gen, nyingi ji ɑ́guud yi gen. De yɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki gen, mɑ́ yɑ wør-ɑ Jwøk." 
Nehemiah5:16 Tegɑ kí rummɑ ɑ́cïbɑ kömi geri dörø, ɑcögɑ e bong kɑ̈r mɑ ɑ́yodɑ. Kɑ jøgɑ bënn pëgg-ɑ be gwøg." 
Nehemiah5:17 Tɑwɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m-ɑ yi Yeud mø kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj geki pëjji gen, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l pödhh-ɑ buti wøn kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Nehemiah5:18 Yɑ nyi ngɑl-ɑ wɑdh, kí römm-ɑ cwɑɑdhø ɑ́bïkyel, kí gyen mø gïïr cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. Kɑ yɑ nyii muujø ki møgi oløg me nyɑ̈n, kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø. De gïg-ɑ peg kì kömi ji ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, bene ɑ cögɑ yɑ nuti cwöddø ki jɑmm-ɑ nyi mëggi ngɑn-ɑ bɑ jɑgø." 
Nehemiah5:19 Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, nyi pɑr yɑn kipe gïndøj men-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ ji møg." 
Nehemiah6:1 Kɑ Sɑnbɑlɑt geki Töbiyɑ̀ kí Gecem, kí tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møøgø, olïngø kinni i dörø rumø ki gerø, o bong kɑɑm mɑ ɑ́döng kì ree, ngö thïggi dhøggi dörø nuti cïb kɑ̈jji gen." 
Nehemiah6:2 Codhe, kɑ Sɑnbɑlɑt kí Gecem ön-ɑ yïɑ ki wöödø kinni, “Bïí o wɑ yïddi wɑ kì myërri Thwøri Önö.” Menɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ wëënyø, kipe kinni o yɑ göggi gen ki gïnrɑj." 
Nehemiah6:3 Kɑ ge ödɑ ki ji møg köbbi gen kinni, “Yɑ gwøg-ɑ gwøg me pere teg, yɑ pɑ cuggi kedhi kunɑni. Gwøg pɑ cung yi yɑn kipe kinni, o yɑ bïɑ kun-ɑ di wun.”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Kɑ yɑ ödi gen ki wöödø me ni menɑni tyel ɑ́ngwen, kɑ ge nyi løøgɑ ni menɑni." 
Nehemiah6:5 Kɑ Sɑnbɑlɑt ön-ɑ yïɑ ki bïïj wööd, wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi ɑ́kyel kì kelli bɑ̈ngge, e wɑ̈nyø bɑ ɑyieb." 
Nehemiah6:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑngɑ wɑ̈nyɑni, møg-ɑ ógwedø bɑ kinni, “Dɑ wöödø me cyɑ̈dhi kì yethi pödhh bënn, kɑ kwøb yi Gecem thyew kinni møgɑni bɑ dyër, i yï dwɑdd-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈yí wuki Yeud, bene ɑ bɑnge døøg wun dörø ki gerø. Ákööb thyew i rií dwɑddí gwøgø yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
Nehemiah6:7 O yï ɑ́rum ki kɑ̈bbø jøtöng møg töngø kì Yerusɑlem kinni, i yï bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀. Kwøbbɑni koo bɑ̈jji ki lïngø yi rɑ̈dh. De bïí o wɑ lwööb wɑ kì ri møgɑni kì kej ɑ́kyel.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Aløøgɑ møge kinni, “Kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi yïn pɑth ki dyër. Bɑ yï ketí ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j møgɑni.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ ri gen ki pɑ̈nyø lwɑ̈ggi wøn o wø di bwøg wøn, o gwøg di wiy yi wøn. Kɑ yɑ ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “De ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, wiy cingɑ tënge.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́kedhɑ be këëmi Cemɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Delɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Meëtɑbel, o ɑ́bëëd e pɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi. Kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Wɑ ceg-ɑ kedhi be pɑ̈ni kej kwër kì yij Kengø. O thïgø cyëëg wɑ kömee, mɑ́ ge bɑ møg-ɑ óbï be nɑ̈gi yïn ceth e piny bɑ wɑ̈r.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Alöggɑ kinni, “Pɑth ki ngɑn ni yɑn ɑ cuggi rengø kɑ pɑ̈n-ɑ yij Kengø. Gïn ni menɑni pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yɑn.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́tiɑ rumø kì ri møgɑni, kɑ yodɑ kinni Cemɑiyɑ̀ nuti köbb-ɑ yi Jwøk, de bɑ Töbiyɑ̀ geki Sɑnbɑlɑt ɑ kwɑjjii ki ngyëny kipe kinni, o yɑ köbbe kinøw." 
Nehemiah6:13 Cemɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́kïr gen ki ngyëny kɑ per kinni, o yɑ göjje böggø, o yɑ di göögɑ ki orøg, codhe, o yɑ di gɑggi yi teedø." 
Nehemiah6:14 Akwɑ̈jjɑ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøk, pɑr gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Töbiyɑ̀ geki Sɑnbɑlɑt, kɑ ge cɑɑy. Pɑr ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Noɑdiyɑ̀, kí tyëngtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi ri gen ki göjji yɑn wɑ̈ɑ̈rø.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Kɑ dörø óthumø ki gerø, kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj wïdɑ́ryew, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y Elul, pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Nehemiah6:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kì pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki wøn, kɑ ge obwøgø, mɑ́ gø ɑ́yod gen kinni, gwøngɑni ógwøgø kɑ kunyi Jwøk." 
Nehemiah6:17 Kì bøli kenyɑni, jøgdøngi Yeud ɑ́bëëd ge okööbø ki Töbiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́ying-ɑ tunge, mɑ́ øre Cekɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Arɑ̀ bɑ ngeti Yeud. Thyew wɑ̈de Yöɑnɑn ɑ́nywøm-ɑ nyɑɑr Meculɑm wɑ̈d Berekiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah6:19 Ji nyii kööbø kì bølɑ ki gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Töbiyɑ̀, kɑ gïg-ɑ kømmɑ bënn nyi köbbii, kɑ yɑ nyi öde ki wɑ̈j møg pɑ̈nye yɑn, kinni o yɑ di bwøgɑ." 
Nehemiah7:1 Anɑn dörø ɑ́rum ki gerø, kɑ thïggi dhøge tïng mɑl, kɑ jøg-ɑ kor dhøggi dörø, kí jøwör, kí Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ kyeelø, órumø ki mëggi gwögg-ɑ gwøg yi gen." 
Nehemiah7:2 Kɑ yɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki jøg ɑ́ryew, o ge jɑɑg gen kɑɑldwøng Yerusɑlem, ɑ løg ómïɑ Aɑnɑnì geki Aɑnɑniyɑ̀, pënyi liny-ɑ kor kɑɑl. Aɑnɑniyɑ̀ bɑ jɑl nyi gøggi dyër, o Jwøk böggi yi en ki mendwøng." 
Nehemiah7:3 Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, thïggi dhøggi döri Yerusɑlem ko nyi yieb yi wun, gïti kenyi tuul cɑ̈ng, kɑ ge nyi cyëëg e jøkor nuti kedhi kɑ̈lli gen. Kɑ ge köbbɑ thyew kinni kwɑny gen tyëng-ɑ nyi kurø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ ngɑn nyi cïb keny-ɑ kor yi en, o møg-ɑ kyeelø kor gen kɑ̈lli gen." 
Nehemiah7:4 Yerusɑlem bɑ kɑɑl me yije lɑɑj, de tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yije kwɑnni gen nøg, o bong ud møg-ɑ ógerø ge gïïr." 
Nehemiah7:5 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni cøngɑ ji, kí jøgdøngi pödhø, kí jɑgg geki jyɑ̈ggi mïïri, kɑ ge gwed ki kɑ̈lli gen. Kɑ wɑ̈nyø men-ɑ yije ógweed kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki dwöögø kì yïnø yodɑ, møg-ɑ ógweed yije ek:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø ge bï-ɑ Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀, ge ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen gɑ ɑmɑgg yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr. Ngɑn ɑ́bï e døøg-ɑ kɑɑl gen." 
Nehemiah7:7 Jɑggi gen bɑ: Dherubɑbïl, kí Jöcwø, kí Nëmɑyɑ̀, kí Adhɑriyɑ̀, kí Rɑɑmiyɑ̀, kí Nɑɑ̈mɑnì, kí Mordekɑy, kí Bilcɑn, kí Mispereth, kí Bigbɑy, kí Neum, kí Bɑɑnɑ̀." 
Nehemiah8:1 Kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd ge rum pëggi piny kì yethi kɑ̈ddi gen. Kɑ ji bënn ócugø kì Yerusɑlem kì ódɑ̈ri Dhøg Pï, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì yij dwɑ̈yɑni. Kɑ ókwërø Edhrɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ mïdhi wɑ̈nyi cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cingi Mosɑ̀, köbbi yi gen kinni dwɑɑye wɑ̈nyi Cigg." 
Nehemiah8:2 Codhe, kɑ Edhrɑ̀ wɑ̈nyi Cigg kɑ̈ɑ̈le bøli teedø, cwøw, kí mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø møg-ɑ cuggi ki lïngø, cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt." 
Nehemiah8:3 Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni rɑnge kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ Dhøg Pï, kì bøli teenɑni bëne, ɑ́cɑ̈g ɑ mwøl ki rɑng kɑ gït-ɑ dicɑ̈ng, teedø olïngø bënn." 
Nehemiah8:4 Edhrɑ̀ ɑ́cung ɑ wïj gyeem pɑ̈m men-ɑ ógurø kipe gwøngɑni. Jøg-ɑ ɑ́cungi kì wïj cingi kyëje bɑ: Mɑtithiyɑ̀, kí Cemɑ̀, kí Anɑiyɑ̀, kí Uriyɑ̀, kí Kilkiyɑ̀ geki Mɑɑseiyɑ̀. O wïj cingi cɑɑme cung-ɑ yi Pedɑiyɑ̀, kí Micɑil, kí Mɑlkiyɑ̀, kí Acum, kí Acbɑdɑnɑ̀, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Meculɑm." 
Nehemiah8:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́cungi Edhrɑ̀ kì wïj gyeem pɑ̈m-ɑ ɑ́gwøg e bɑ̈r, kɑ wïje kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kì kelli ji, kɑ teedø nenn-ɑ yïe bënn, kɑ teedø dhwödh-ɑ mɑl bënn keny-ɑ ɑ́yiebe wɑ̈nyø." 
Nehemiah8:6 Akööb Edhrɑ̀ kinni, “Lenhi wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ dwøng.” Kɑ ji bënn cinggi gen thɑɑng gen mɑl, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Amen! Amen!” Kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny ge mɑl-ɑ Jwøk wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny." 
Nehemiah8:7 Adhwödhi gen mɑl kɑ ge ócungø kì kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ cigg löbbi gen yi Kwɑrri Leebì møg: Jöcwø, kí Bɑnì, kí Cerebiyɑ̀, kí Yɑmïn, kí Akkub, kí Cɑbethɑy, kí Ödiyɑ̀, kí Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, kí Kelitɑ̀, kí Adhɑriyɑ̀, kí Yödhɑbɑd, kí Aɑnɑn, kí Pelɑiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ciggi Jwøk ɑ́rɑng gï löbb-ɑ gen, o møg-ɑ rɑng lïngi yi gen kidøøj." 
Nehemiah8:9 Kɑ jɑgø Nëmɑyɑ̀, kí ókwërø Edhrɑ̀ o bɑ jɑlgwed ki Cigg, kí Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi, ji köbbi gen kinni, “Cyɑ̈ngtïn bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwëër Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, wu ko kïïm wɑlɑ̀ wu ko ywöngi.” Mɑ́ ji ɑ́ywöngi keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gen Cigg." 
Nehemiah8:10 Aköbbi ge gïn kinni, “Kedhu myërri wun, kɑ wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun, kɑ wu yɑ̈ng wun, kɑ wu mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun ki mugg-ɑ med, kɑ tyëng-ɑ jɑdø nëngi wun, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ngtïn bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwëër Jwøgee; de wu ko kïïm, mɑ́ medi pyëw-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene tegi wun.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì kedh-ɑ kelli ji be cïji gen, o pëthi gen dwöög gen. Aköbbi ge gïn kinni, “Pëthi wun ko bëëd ge rijjø, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ngtïn bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Codhe, kɑ ji bënn kedh-ɑ yethi myërri gen, kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø, e pëthi gen omedø, kɑ ge onywɑ̈gø ki ji-ɑ bong gïg nud kì yï gen, mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ngi gen ɑ́lïngi yi gen." 
Nehemiah8:13 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ jøgdøngø kí jyɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì kedh-ɑ yï Edhrɑ̀ o gï pwönye ki Cigg." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ayod ge gøn kinni cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki cingi Mosɑ̀, ceg-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil kinni nyi bëëd gen kì thɑ̈thi ɑkɑnnì kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Akɑnnì." 
Nehemiah8:15 Codhe, ɑceg gen ji bënn, kì Yerusɑlem, kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø kinni, “Kedhu wɑ̈thi kïttì, kɑ wu kɑ̈ni wun ki bɑ̈ddi dhetun, kí sɑnober, kí ówɑwwi benø geki yenh-ɑ mɑr, kɑ wu gëëd wun ki ɑkɑnnì, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi cigg.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ni ji ki bɑ̈ddi yenh, kɑ ge ogëdø ki ɑkɑnnì kì óthɑɑng wɑ̈thi uddi gen, kí ódɑ̈ri Kengø, kí ódɑ̈rri kɑɑl, kí ódɑ̈ri Dhøg Pï, kí ódɑ̈ri Dhøg Eprɑim." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ji bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïnø, ɑ́gëëd ki ɑkɑnnì, kɑ ge obëëdø kì yethi ɑkɑnnɑni. Men bene kwøngi kwërɑni ki gwøgø, kër-ɑ ɑ́gwøøgii keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Jöcwø wɑ̈d Nun. Ji bënn ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med cɑrø." 
Nehemiah8:18 Cɑg kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi Kwëër Akɑnnì, gïti cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́thume, ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ rɑng kì ri wɑ̈nyi Jwøk yethi cyɑ̈ng. Ge ɑ́tug ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kɑ ge cug-ɑ be mɑ̈ddø kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Cigg." 
Nehemiah9:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ócugø kipe kinni o ge thuum gen, o ge nyodh gen ywøøg yethi gen kipe orøøg gen, kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈yɑni. Ri gen ɑ́rum ki lɑ̈ɑ̈wø yi gen ki tyëngpɑth. Ge ɑ́rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì, o wɑ̈thi gen buug gen ki búr ɑ́ ngïji kïïmø. Codhe, kɑ ge dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki töngi orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen geki kweyyi gen." 
Nehemiah9:2  
Nehemiah9:3 Kɑ ge rɑ̈ngi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen ki sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ sɑɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g møøgø tyëg gen ge töng-ɑ orøøg gen, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen mɑlli gen." 
Nehemiah9:4 Dɑ ótong mɑ ɑ́thør ɑ́ kej Kwɑrri Leebì, kɑ Jöcwø ócungø kì wïj ótongɑni, geki Bɑnì, kí Kɑdmiel, kí Cebɑniyɑ̀, kí Bunì, kí Cerebiyɑ̀, kí Bɑnì, kí Kenɑnì. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg gen, kwɑjji gen ge óryeerø." 
Nehemiah9:5 Codhe, kɑ ji löggi yi Kwɑrri Leebì: Jöcwø, Kɑdmiel, Bɑnì, Aɑcɑbneiyɑ̀, Cerebiyɑ̀, Ödiyɑ̀, Cebɑniyɑ̀, kí Pethɑiyɑ̀, ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Dhwödhu mɑl, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun lenhi wun! Lenhu en gïti ɑtheer! Wiy nyinge kwërø lenhi yi ji bënn, cɑgg pwøjj-ɑ pwøjii yi ji pɑ kyëëw ki dönge.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ókwɑ̈jjø kinni, “Wuö, yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl, kí kyelli mɑl. Yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j piny kí nɑɑm omelø kí jɑmm-ɑ yethi gen bënn. Kɑ ge thödhí bënn ki wëy. Gïg-ɑ teg kì mɑl ri gen nyi bøødh ge’ piny kɑ yï mɑlli yi gen." 
Nehemiah9:7 Kɑ Abrɑm myeg yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì Ur kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kɑ nyinge wil yi yïn gɑ Abrɑhɑm." 
Nehemiah9:8 Kɑ yod yi yïn kinni mïdh-ɑ kwøbbí kɑ wu olwöbø ki en. Kɑ köbbí kinni, ómëggí piny tyëng Kɑnɑɑn, kí piny tyëng Kit, kí piny tyëng Amör, kí piny tyëng Perïdh, kí piny tyëng Yebus, kí piny tyëng Girgɑc, o bëëde ɑ́ piny-ɑ óbëëd yi kwɑrre. Kɑ kwøbbí mïdhi yi yïn ceth, mɑ́ yï tir." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Orɑɑng kweyyi wøn kì Rïp ɑ́lidh yi yïn, kɑ kwɑ̈jji gen kipe yielø lïngí kì Nɑɑm Omeli Kwɑrø." 
Nehemiah9:10 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki bɑ̈ngge, kí tyëng pödhe ge ɑ́göggí ki ngïjjì kí gïïngɑ̈ngø, mɑ́ kër-ɑ ɑ́guude nyingi jií ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn. Kɑ nyingi gen tïng yi yïn mɑl gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Nehemiah9:11 Kɑ jií yïëbbí ki yöö kì nɑɑm omelø kɑ ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yij pyëën nɑm e thwøwø. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rïngi kì bɑng gen, omudø kì nɑm, ge ɑ́biil piny ni tungi kït, kɑ ɑpɑgø ceg-ɑ ì bɑɑw kì kömi gen." 
Nehemiah9:12 Ge ɑ́pyejji yi yïn kɑ pøølø kì dicɑ̈ng, kɑ yuu gen nyi meny yi yïn ki mɑc kì wɑ̈r." 
Nehemiah9:13 Yï ɑ́bï piny, yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl kì wïj Kïti Sinɑy, kɑ yï okööbø ki jií, kɑ ge thödhí ki cigg-ɑ dyër, kí pwöny-ɑ dyër." 
Nehemiah9:14 Ge ɑ́pwönyí ki mïdhi Sɑbɑth ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër, kɑ ciggí mëggí gen ki cingi Mosɑ̀ bɑngí." 
Nehemiah9:15 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ri gen dɑ kɑ̈j, ge ɑ́thödhí ki gïncɑm me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl, kɑ yï kɑ̈n-ɑ wɑ̈g ki pï kì yij kït, keny-ɑ ɑ́di ri gen röödhø. Ge ɑ́köbbí kinni kwɑny gen pinyɑni; eni piny-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi yïn kinni ómëggí gen." 
Nehemiah9:16 De kweyyi wøn ɑ́thwøg kɑ muddi gen ótëngø, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki mïdhi ciggí." 
Nehemiah9:17 Ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi wuödø, wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl, ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn bënn, wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn. Kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki pëëji, men dwøøg gen Rïp yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. De yï bɑ Jwøng pyëwí nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m, yï døj o yï pëddi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, o yï pɑ nyi jwɑn ki mɑgø yi liny. Lɑɑwí ɑ́dwøøg piny, ge nuti cɑɑy yïn." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ge ɑ́göög ki ngïji wɑdh, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, i bene jwøng-ɑ ɑ́pëëj gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Kɑ ge ogöögø ki ɑyɑ̈r me dwøng." 
Nehemiah9:19 De ge nuti wiy yïn piny kì yij ryɑng, mɑ́ lɑ̈mpyëwí bong cöge. Lööj pøølø geki mɑc nuti mɑ̈ɑ̈n yïn gen, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ nyi nyudhi gen yöö kì dicɑ̈ng, kí wɑ̈r." 
Nehemiah9:20 Kì bɑng døøjí, ge ɑ́köbbí gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi gen, ge ɑ́mëggí mɑnɑ̀ ɑ́ men cɑm yi gen, kɑ ge nëngí ki pïg mɑdh yi gen." 
Nehemiah9:21 Kì yethi runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen kì yij ryɑng, ge ɑ́thödhí ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi gen bënn, ógudhi gen nuti wöl kɑggø, o tyelli gen nuti kwödø yi wɑ̈dh." 
Nehemiah9:22 “Ge ɑ́wëggí tyɑmi pödhh møg jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhì, eni pìny-ɑ ɑ́cïb gen kew. Piny Sïön rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kicbön ɑ́mɑg gen, geki piny Og rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑcɑn." 
Nehemiah9:23 Ge ɑ́nëngí ki nywøl mø gïïr ni kyelli mɑl, kɑ ge thödhí ki tegø men-ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen, kɑ ge cïb piny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi kweyyi gen kinni gø ómëggí gen." 
Nehemiah9:24 Piny Kɑnɑɑn ɑ́kɑb yi gen, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì yije tyɑm yi yïn. Jií ɑ́thödhí ki tegø men cuggi gen ki gwøgi gïn dwɑddi yi gen gø göggi ge’ tyëng Kɑnɑɑn kí rɑ̈nhi gen." 
Nehemiah9:25 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ ógerø ki dör ɑ́mɑg yi jií, kɑ piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med, kí udd-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi jɑmmì kwɑny gen, kí ɑwölli pï mø rumø ki konyø, kí yenh dhetun, kí yenhi nywøl, kí bɑ̈ggi oløg. Ge ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, kɑ ge ócwïyø. Pëthi gen ɑ́mïni yi gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggí gen." 
Nehemiah9:26 “De jií ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈yi gen, kɑ kwøbbí pyem yi gen; ngɑ̈thi gen ɑ́lugi gen ciggí. Kɑ jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́kyëddi gen nɑ̈g gen. tyëng-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen kinni dwöög gen köörí ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen. Kɑ yï nyi gwɑddi yi gen." 
Nehemiah9:27 Codhe, ɑwëggí gen tyɑmø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o gï jɑɑg gen. Kɑ ge orɑngø kì cinggi tyëngɑni, ɑywøøg gen köörí, kɑ kwɑ̈jji gen løøg yi yïn, yï ying-ɑ pɑɑrí mɑl. Pyëwí ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen kɑ ge ödí ki pëjjì, møg yiel gen kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Nehemiah9:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög mër, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be orøg, ɑcigí gen wëggi tyɑmø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. De kenyi yewi gen kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ köörí, kwɑ̈jji gen nyii lïngø yi yïn kì pɑɑrí mɑl, kɑ ge nyi yiel yi yïn." 
Nehemiah9:29 Ge nyii cegø yi yïn kinni mïdhi gen ciggí, de ge nyii thwøgø, kɑ ciggí bɑny yi gen, ngö mïdhi ciggí bɑ nënnì. Muddi gen teeg, o ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi møgí." 
Nehemiah9:30 Ge nyi kyëddí kyëddø yethi runn bënn, yï pɑ ngïr yi gen. Jøtöng møgí nyi nyudhí gïn-ɑ kwøb yi gen, de jií nuti lïngø, codhe, ɑwëggí gen tyɑmø yi pödhh møøgø." 
Nehemiah9:31 “De lɑ̈mpyëwí pɑ nyi thumi ge nuti wiy piny yi yïn, wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g yïn, Mɑ́ yï bɑ Jwøng pyëwí yöd." 
Nehemiah9:32 “Wuö Jwøk, Jwøøg wøn, bong gïn lod yïn ki döng! Yï ceg kɑ böggø mɑ́ yï teg. Lwömí ɑ́mïdhí ki tɑri pyëwí. Cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi wøn yi rɑ̈nhi Acuur, cɑgg ɑ́ ɑnɑn, wø nudd wø ceg-ɑ orɑng! Wøkí rɑ̈nhi wøn, kí jɑggi wøn, kí ókwërri wøn, kí jøtöng mø wøn, kí kweyyi wøn, kí jii wøn bënn. Pɑr orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi wøn bëne!" 
Nehemiah9:33 Yï ɑ́gwøg-ɑ dyër kɑ ɑ́cɑɑy wøn, yï ɑ́bëëd pyëwí tɑr, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́røngi wøn." 
Nehemiah9:34 Kweyyi wøn, kí rɑ̈nhi wøn, kí jɑggi wøn, kí ókwërri wøn, ciggí nuti mïdhi gen. O møg-ɑ nyi köbbí gen pɑ nyi lïngi yi gen." 
Nehemiah9:35 Jií jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhì kɑ gyëdhhí, kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí gen; piny-ɑ lɑɑj, ɑ lɑ̈be med; de yï nuti göggi gen ki pyëw ɑ́kyel, o ge nuti wïyø ki orøg." 
Nehemiah9:36 Anɑn, wø bɑ bɑ̈ngg kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggí kweyyi wøn, eni piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med, ɑ di thödhi wøn ki gïncɑm." 
Nehemiah9:37 Byell-ɑ cyeg kì pinyɑni nyi cɑm-ɑ yi rɑ̈nhì møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi yïn kömi wøn, kì bɑng orøøg wøn. O rɑ̈nhhɑni wø nyi göggi ge’ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen, wøki jɑmmi wøn, wø ying-ɑ yij ɑbɑɑrø me dwøng!”" 
Nehemiah9:38 Kì bɑng møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn, wø tyëng Isrɑil, wø gweed-ɑ lwömi wøn piny wøki jɑggi wøn, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ókwërri wøn, cinggi wøn thɑɑny wø’ kömi lwöm-ɑ ɑ́yïëy yi wøn èn." 
Nehemiah10:1 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwøng nyingi gen ki gwedø bɑ, jɑgø Nëmɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akɑliyɑ̀, kí Dhedekiyɑ̀. Ji møg thyew nyingi gen ɑ́gwed gen:" 
Nehemiah10:2 Serɑiyɑ̀, Adhɑriyɑ̀, Jermɑyɑ̀, Pɑcur, Amɑriyɑ̀, Mɑlkiyɑ̀, Atuc, Cebɑniyɑ̀, Mɑluk, Arïm, Meremöth, Obɑdiyɑ̀, Dɑniel, Ginethön, Bɑruk, Meculɑm, Abiyɑ̀, Miyɑmïn, Mɑɑdhiyɑ̀, Bilgɑy, Cemɑiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah10:3 Jöcwø wɑ̈d Adhɑniyɑ̀, Binuy kì gøl Ënɑdɑd, Kɑdmiel, Cebɑniyɑ̀, Ödiyɑ̀ Kelitɑ̀, Pelɑiyɑ̀, Aɑnɑn, Miikɑ̀, Reköb, Acɑbiyɑ̀ Dhɑkur, Cerebiyɑ̀, Cebɑniyɑ̀ Ödiyɑ̀, Bɑnì, kí Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:4 Jɑggi tyëng Isrɑil: Pɑröc, Pɑkɑth Moɑb, Elɑm, Dhɑtu, Bɑnì. Bunì, Adhgɑd, Bebɑy, Adöniyɑ̀, Bigbɑy, Adïn, Ater, Kedhekiyɑ̀, Adhur, Ödiyɑ̀, Acum, Bedhɑy, Arïp, Anɑthöth, Nebɑy. Mɑgpiɑc, Meculɑm, Kedhïr, Mecedhɑbel, Dhɑdök, Yɑduɑ̀, Pelɑtiyɑ̀, Aɑnɑn, Anɑiyɑ̀. Öciyɑ̀, Anɑniyɑ̀, Acub, Alöec, Pilkɑ̀, Cöbek, Reum, Acɑbnɑ̀, Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, Akiyɑ̀, Aɑnɑn, Anɑn, Mɑluk, Arïm, kí Bɑnɑ̀." 
Nehemiah10:5 Wø tyëng Isrɑil, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí tyëng-ɑ kor dhøggi döri kɑɑl, kí tyëng-ɑ kor Kengø, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi wör kì Kengø, kí tyëng-ɑ göögø kì Kengø, kí tyëng-ɑ mïdhi Ciggi Jwøk; wøn ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈w ri wøn ki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì piny wøn, kí mɑ̈nni wøn, geki nyigi wøn bënn, møg-ɑ ɑ́døngi, ɑ cuggi ki lïngø, dhøggi wøn bënn èn:" 
Nehemiah10:6 wø ɑ́köngi kinni Ciggi Jwøk ómïdhi yi wøn, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggí Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ngí, o gïg-ɑ nyi kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, kí kwönge ógwøg yi wøn, geki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi en bënn." 
Nehemiah10:7 Ri wøn koo nywøm yi wøn ki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì piny wøn. 
Nehemiah10:8 Keløg tyëngpɑth ókɑ̈nø ki byel wɑlɑ̀ gïjø me ngew yi wøn cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, wɑlɑ̀ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër megø, ge pɑ ngew yi wøn kì yï gen. Piny koo pur yi wøn kì bïryeew runn, o körri wøn bënn møg-ɑ cwɑggi ji, ówiy yi wøn." 
Nehemiah10:9 Wø ómuujø ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́bïj møg-ɑ bɑ ɑcïb gɑ gwɑ̈ɑ̈j Kengø kì yij run. 
Nehemiah10:10 Wø ókïdhi Kengø ki ópuun kwër, kí byëlø, kí gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑl yethi cyɑ̈ng, geki cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth, kí cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y, kí cyɑ̈nggi kwër møg-ɑ kyeelø. Wø ómuujø thyew ki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn geki gëdhhi orøg, kí gïg-ɑ ódwɑddi kipe Kengø." 
Nehemiah10:11 Wø ólëngø ki wél kì kelli ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí ji bënn kipe kwɑnyi tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ni ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee ki yugg, e leng ɑ́ wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì kì runï kí runï, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Cigg." 
Nehemiah10:12 Wø ókïdhi yij Kengø ki mwölli gïg-ɑ cyeg kì piny wøn, kí mwölli nywøli yenh kì yethi runn bënn." 
Nehemiah10:13 Wɑ̈ddi wøn møg-ɑ bɑ kɑyyì bënn, kí kɑyyi dhögi wøn geki dyëgi wøn møg-ɑ nywøl gɑ cwøw, ge ómuuj wøn ókwër-ɑ göögø kì ød Jwøgee ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Cigg." 
Nehemiah10:14 Kì yij run, wø ómuujø ki ɑwɑɑj byell-ɑ kwøng ki kɑjø kì yethi pwödhhi wøn, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí nywøli yenh, gïgɑni bënn ómuuj wøn ókwër kì ød Jwøgee. Kwɑrri Leebì ómuuj ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì yethi pwödh," 
Nehemiah10:15 O ókwër, møg-ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Aɑron, bëëd ge nud keny-ɑ óthyeer ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈r yi Kwɑrri Leebì, orum gen ki cungø kì yï teedø, codhe, o ge kïdhi kɑ̈nni Kengø." 
Nehemiah10:16 Jɑmm-ɑ ógwɑj; ɑ løg byel, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun ókïdh-ɑ yethi udd-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmì yi tyëng Isrɑil geki Kwɑrri Leebì, kì keny-ɑ nyi di jɑmmi thɑl mø Kengø, kí keny-ɑ nyi bëëd yi ókwërr-ɑ göögø, kí jøg-ɑ kor Kengø, kí jøwör. Ød Jwøøg wøn pɑ cuggi wøyø yi wøn." 
Nehemiah11:1 Codhe, kɑ jɑggi Isrɑil dɑ̈g-ɑ Yerusɑlem, de tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́ceg-ɑ leng ki wél, o ji pyɑ̈rø kelli gen nyi kwɑɑny dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel, ɑ́ men bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem kɑɑl kwër, o møg-ɑ kyeelø bëëd gen kì yethi myërr." 
Nehemiah11:2 Kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́yïëy bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem kwëng yi teedø bëne. 
Nehemiah11:3 Tyëng Isrɑil, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, kí jøgwøøg Kengø, kí kwɑrri bɑ̈nggi Sølømøn ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ pìnyi gen kì myërri gen kí kɑ̈ddi gen. Møg bɑ nyingi jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem." 
Nehemiah11:4 Athɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Udhiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhekɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Amɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Cepɑtiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mɑɑ̈lɑlel, wɑ̈d Peredh, wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀." 
Nehemiah11:5 Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Bɑruk, wɑ̈d Kölödhè, wɑ̈d Adhɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Adɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Yöyɑrïb, wɑ̈d Dhekɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Celɑ̀, wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀." 
Nehemiah11:6 Jøg-ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Peredh, møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem, kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g." 
Nehemiah11:7 Sɑlu wɑ̈d Meculɑm, wɑ̈d Yöiid, wɑ̈d Pedɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Kolɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Ithiel, wɑ̈d Yecɑiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah11:8 Bɑng gen dɑ wɑddi Gɑbɑy kí Sɑlɑy. Kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́bïngwen kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Nehemiah11:9 Pënyi gen ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Yöiil wɑ̈d Dhikrì, o ókwøme bɑ Yeudɑ̀ wɑ̈d Asenuɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem." 
Nehemiah11:10 Yedɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑrïb, wɑ̈d Yɑcin," 
Nehemiah11:11 kí Serɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Meculɑm, wɑ̈d Dhɑdök, wɑ̈d Merɑyöth, wɑ̈d Akitub ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng." 
Nehemiah11:12 Kwɑrri gen møg-ɑ ɑ́göög kì Kengø kwɑnni gen bɑ miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew, Adɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeroɑm, wɑ̈d Pelɑliyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Amdhì, wɑ̈d Dhekɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Pɑcur, wɑ̈d Mɑlkiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah11:13 Kwɑnni gen bënn, bɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́ryew, ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì. Amɑcsɑy wɑ̈d Adhɑrel, wɑ̈d Adhɑy, wɑ̈d Mecilemöth, wɑ̈d Imer." 
Nehemiah11:14 Gølɑni yije ɑ́dɑ jøg mø teg ki liny, kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈g, pënyi gen bɑ Dhɑbdiel wɑ̈d Agɑdölïm." 
Nehemiah11:15 Cemɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Acub, wɑ̈d Adhrikɑm, wɑ̈d Acɑbiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Bunì." 
Nehemiah11:16 Cɑbethɑy, geki Yödhɑbɑd ge bɑ pëjji Kwɑrri Leebì, o gen ɑ nenni gwøøg thïgi Kengø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Nehemiah11:17 Mɑtɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Miikɑ̀, wɑ̈d Dhebedì, wɑ̈d Asɑp, en ɑ nyi kwɑn wörri pwøj. Bɑkbukiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́køny Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, kí Abdɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑmuɑ̀, wɑ̈d Gɑlɑl, wɑ̈d Yeduthun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem kɑɑl kwër, kwɑnni gen bënn bɑ miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́ngwen." 
Nehemiah11:19 Akkub, kí Tɑlmön, kí wɑddi gen møg-ɑ kurø bënn, kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́ryew." 
Nehemiah11:20 Tyëng Isrɑil, kí ókwër, kí Kwɑrri Leebì, møg-ɑ ngenyø ɑ́bëëd ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kì yethi kɑ̈dd, kí yethi myërri Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah11:21 Tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø kì Kengø, ɑ́bëëd ɑ byëng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Opel kì Yerusɑlem, o ge ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi Dhïɑ̀ geki Gicpɑ̀." 
Nehemiah11:22 Jɑl-ɑ kwølli Kwɑrri Leebì kì Yerusɑlem ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Udhì wɑ̈d Bɑnì, wɑ̈d Acɑbiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Miikɑ̀, kì gøl Asɑp, gen ɑ nyi wör ki thøm kì Kengø." 
Nehemiah11:23 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́cïg kiper gen kinni, i nyi wil gen tyëng-ɑ wör kì Kengø yethi cyɑ̈ng, e ceg kɑ lunyø." 
Nehemiah11:24 Pethɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mecedhɑbel, kì gøl Dherɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeudɑ̀, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ kej wɑɑng tyëng Isrɑil kì tøg buri Pɑres." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́bëëd ɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi gen kì buti pwödhhi gen. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ Kiriɑt Arbɑ̀ geki myërre, kí Dïbön kí myërre, kí Yekɑbdhiil geki myërre," 
Nehemiah11:26 kí Yëcuɑ̀, kí Mölɑdɑ̀, kí Betpelet," 
Nehemiah11:27 kí Adhɑr Cuɑl, kí Bircebɑ̀ geki myërre," 
Nehemiah11:28 kí Dhiklɑg, kí Mekönɑ̀ geki myërre," 
Nehemiah11:29 kí Enrimön, kí Dhörɑ̀, kí Yɑrmuth," 
Nehemiah11:30 kí Dhɑnoɑ̀, kí Adulɑm geki myërri gen. Kí Lɑkic kí pwödhhe møg-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́dɑ̈ggi, kí Adhekɑ̀ kí myërre. Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny-ɑ kɑɑm Bircebɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, gïti Töör Kinöm kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Nehemiah11:31 Tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn ɑ́bëëd ɑ Gebɑ̀, Mikmɑc, Aɑy, Betiil myërri gen," 
Nehemiah11:32 Anɑthöth, Nöb, Anɑniyɑ̀," 
Nehemiah11:33 Adhör, Rɑmɑ̀, Gitɑim," 
Nehemiah11:34 Adid, Dheböïm, Nebɑlɑt," 
Nehemiah11:35 Löd, Önö, kí yij Töör Bödhhì." 
Nehemiah11:36 Kwï Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ́cïb-ɑ kelli gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Nehemiah12:1 Ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø, kyeel kí Dherubɑbïl wɑ̈d Ceɑltiel, kí Jöcwø Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng bɑ:" 
Nehemiah12:2 Serɑiyɑ̀, Jermɑyɑ̀, Edhrɑ̀, Amɑriyɑ̀, Mɑluk, Atuc, Cekɑniyɑ̀, Reum, Meremöth, Idö, Ginethɑy, Abiyɑ̀, Miyɑmïn, Mɑɑdiyɑ̀, Bilgɑ̀, Cemɑiyɑ̀, Yöyɑrïb, Yedɑiyɑ̀, Sɑlu, Amök, Kilkiyɑ̀, kí Yedɑiyɑ̀. Jøgɑni ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi ókwër keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Jöcwø ɑ jyɑ̈gø." 
Nehemiah12:3  
Nehemiah12:4  
Nehemiah12:5  
Nehemiah12:6  
Nehemiah12:7  
Nehemiah12:8 Jøg bɑ gen ɑ nyi kwɑn wörri pwøj: Jöcwø, kí Binuy, kí Kɑdmiel, kí Cerebiyɑ̀, kí Yeudɑ̀, kí Mɑtɑniyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah12:9 Tyëng-ɑ nyi wör bɑ: Bɑkbukiyɑ̀, kí Unö, kí wɑddi gen Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Nehemiah12:10 Jöcwø bɑ wïyi Yöyɑkim, Yöyɑkim bɑ wïyi Eliɑcïb, Eliɑcïb bɑ wïyi Yöyɑdɑ̀," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yöyɑdɑ̀ bɑ wïyi Yönɑthɑn, Yönɑthɑn bɑ wïyi Yɑduɑ̀." 
Nehemiah12:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yöyɑkim ɑ́ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, ókwër møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ jɑggi kɑ̈lli gen bɑ: Merɑiyɑ̀ Serɑiyɑ̀ Aɑnɑniyɑ̀ Jermɑyɑ̀ Meculɑm Edhrɑ̀ Yöɑnɑn Amɑriyɑ̀ Yönɑthɑn Mɑlucì Yosep Cebɑniyɑ̀ Adnɑ̀ Arïm Ëlkɑy Merɑyöth Dhekɑriyɑ̀ Idö Meculɑm Ginethön Dhikrì Abiyɑ̀ (bong nying kì yij wɑ̈nyi Ibru) Miniɑmïn Piltɑy Moɑdiyɑ̀ Cɑmuɑ̀ Bilgɑ̀ Yönɑthɑn Cemɑiyɑ̀ Mɑtenɑy Yöyɑrïb Udhì Yedɑiyɑ̀ Kɑlɑy Sɑlɑy Eber Amök Acɑbiyɑ̀ Kilkiyɑ̀ Nethɑnel Yedɑiyɑ̀" 
Nehemiah12:13  
Nehemiah12:14  
Nehemiah12:15  
Nehemiah12:16  
Nehemiah12:17  
Nehemiah12:18  
Nehemiah12:19  
Nehemiah12:20  
Nehemiah12:21  
Nehemiah12:22 Wɑ̈nyi nyingi kɑ̈lli ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ókwërr-ɑ døngø møg onëënø bɑ Eliɑcïb, kí Yöyɑdɑ̀, kí Yönɑthɑn, kí Yɑduɑ̀. Gwedi wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́thum ɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Dɑryøs ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres." 
Nehemiah12:23 Jɑggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́gweed yij Wɑ̈nyi Kwøbbi Cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yönɑthɑn wɑ̈d Eliɑcïb. 
Nehemiah12:24 Jɑggi Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ́bëëd gɑ: Acɑbiyɑ̀, kí Cerebiyɑ̀, kí Jöcwø, kí Binuy, kí Kɑdmiel. Ge ɑ́bëëd ri gen pɑ̈ngi gen gɑ ɑkudd, ɑkudd ɑ́ryew ɑ nyi lenhi Jwøk wïj ɑ́kyel ge lømm-ɑ dhøggi gen, o Jwøk nyi pwøj yi gen, ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Rɑ̈dh Debïd, jɑlkwøbbi Jwøk." 
Nehemiah12:25 Jøkori Kengø, møg-ɑ nyi kor udd-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmì, kì buti Kengø bɑ: Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, kí Bɑkbukiyɑ̀, kí Obɑdiyɑ̀, kí Meculɑm, kí Tɑlmön, kí Akkub." 
Nehemiah12:26 Jøgɑni ɑ́göög ɑ bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yöyɑkim Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, wɑ̈d Jöcwø, wɑ̈d Yödhɑdɑk, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Nëmɑyɑ̀ ɑ́ jɑgø, o Edhrɑ̀ ɑ bɑ jɑlgwed ki Cigg." 
Nehemiah12:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thyeey döri Yerusɑlem, ɑcwööl Kwɑrri Leebì kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ di gen bënn, o ge thyey gen döri Yerusɑlem ki wörri pwøj, kí kɑ̈ngì geki thøm, kí bullì (ki jɑmmi wör møg-ɑ kyeelø.)" 
Nehemiah12:28 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ nyi wör ri gen cung gen kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd yi gen kì bɑdhhi Yerusɑlem, kí myërr-ɑ bɑdhhi Netöpɑ̀," 
Nehemiah12:29 kí Bet Gilgɑl, kí Gebɑ̀, kí Adhmɑbeth." 
Nehemiah12:30 Ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì ri gen ɑ́kwër gen, kɑ ji kwër gen, kí dhøggi dörø, kí dörø." 
Nehemiah12:31 Kɑ jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ cøngɑ wïj dörø mɑl, kɑ ge cïbɑ bøli ɑkudd ɑ́ryew, o ge cyɑ̈dhi gen ge wen-ɑ döri kɑɑldwøng, ge pwøj-ɑ Jwøk. Akun-ɑ mɑl ɑ́kɑ̈l-ɑ tuung kyëj kì wïj dörø ge kedh-ɑ Dhøg Thur." 
Nehemiah12:32 Öcɑiyɑ̀ ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ bɑng jøwör, kí jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ kì bɑng gen." 
Nehemiah12:33 Ókwërr-ɑ kødhhi kɑ̈ngì kì bɑng gen bɑ: Adhɑriyɑ̀, kí Edhrɑ̀, kí Meculɑm, kí Yeudɑ̀, kí Ben Yɑmïn, kí Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Jermɑyɑ̀. Bɑng gen ɑ bëën yi Dhekɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Yönɑthɑn, wɑ̈d Cemɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mɑtɑniyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Mikɑiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Dhɑkur, wɑ̈d Asɑp." 
Nehemiah12:34  
Nehemiah12:35  
Nehemiah12:36 Kí jø gøl gen møg kì bɑnge, ɑ løg; Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Adhɑrel, kí Milɑlɑy, kí Gilɑlɑy, kí Mɑɑy, kí Nethɑnel, kí Yeudɑ̀, kí Aɑnɑnì. Jøgɑni bënn cinggi gen ɑ́dɑ thøm mø ni thoom Debïd, bɑ̈ng Jwøk. Akunɑni ɑ́pyejj-ɑ yi Edhrɑ̀ jɑlgwed ki Cigg." 
Nehemiah12:37 Kɑ ge ókedhø kì Dhøg Wɑɑng Pï, ge yedh-ɑ mɑl kɑɑl Debïd, kɑ gøldwøng pöödh gen, kedh ge døøg-ɑ kuni Dhøg Wɑɑng Pï kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Nehemiah12:38 Kɑ ɑkuud pwøj men-ɑ kyeelø kɑ̈l-ɑ tuung cɑɑm, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ wïj dörø, kɑ yɑ løg-ɑ bɑng gen wøki kwï ji-ɑ ɑ́döng. Wø ɑ́kɑ̈l wïj dörø, kɑ wø ókedhø wø pöödh-ɑ Ønbɑ̈r mi Purun, wø kedh-ɑ kuni dör-ɑ peg," 
Nehemiah12:39 kɑ wø ókedhø wø pöödh-ɑ Dhøg Eprɑim, kí Dhøng-ɑ Weenø, kí Dhøg Rij kí Ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ cölli Anɑnel, kí Ønbɑ̈r mi Miyø, kɑ wø wɑ̈dh-ɑ Dhøg Dyëg. Acungi wøn kì dhøng-ɑ yïëbbi Kengø." 
Nehemiah12:40 Codhe, kɑ ɑkudd-ɑ ɑ́pwøj Jwøk ryeet, wɑ̈dh-ɑ dhø Kengø. Kɑ ge órëbø ki wøki jøg-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi wøn." 
Nehemiah12:41 Akun-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn yije ɑ́dɑ ókwër mø kudhø ki kɑ̈ngì, ɑ løg, Eliɑkim, kí Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, kí Miniɑmïn, kí Mikɑiyɑ̀, kí Eliönɑy, kí Dhekɑriyɑ̀, kí Aɑnɑniyɑ̀," 
Nehemiah12:42 bɑng gen ɑ́dɑ Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, kí Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Eliɑdhɑr, kí Udhì, kí Yöɑnɑn, kí Mɑlkiyɑ̀, kí Elɑm, kí Edher. Jøwör møg-ɑ ɑ́pyejji yi Yedhrɑiyɑ̀, ɑ́wör ge óryeerø." 
Nehemiah12:43 Dicyɑ̈ngɑni, gëdhhì mø gïïr ɑ́muuj, kɑ ge otugø ki medi pëthi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki medi pyëw me dwøng. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn bï-ɑ be tugø geki othønhø, kɑ cwɑggi ji wɑ̈dh-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi cɑrø." 
Nehemiah12:44 Kì bøli kenyɑni, ɑ́dɑ jøg mɑ ɑ́kwɑny gɑ jɑggi udd-ɑ mïdhi jɑmm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l gɑ gwɑ̈ɑ̈j Kengø, kí ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri byel, kí mwölli nywøli yenh møg-ɑ nyi kwöngi ki cyegø kì yij run. Jøgɑni ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøg-ɑ nyi cøng gwɑ̈j kì yethi pwödh, kí kɑ̈dd, kipe ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, ni kɑ ógwedii kì yethi Cigg. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ɑ́bëëd pëthi med ki ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì," 
Nehemiah12:45 mɑ́ gen ɑ nyi göggi Jwøøg gen, kí guöög dhïwi dëllì. Jøwör, kí jøg-ɑ kurø kì dhø Kengø, ɑ́bëëd ge gwøg-ɑ gwøøg gen ni kɑ ɑ́cïg Debïd geki wɑ̈de Sølømøn." 
Nehemiah12:46 Cɑ̈gi kì ri Rɑ̈dh Debïd kí bødhi thom Asɑp cøn, Jwøk nyii lejjø yi gen, kɑ nyi pwøj yi gen ki wör." 
Nehemiah12:47 Thyew kì ri Dherubɑbïl, kí Nëmɑyɑ̀, bödhhi thøm geki tyëng-ɑ kor Kengø, ge ɑ́bëëd ge nyi mëgg-ɑ gïgcɑmmi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn. Kwɑrri Leebì ɑ nyi mëggi jɑmmi kwër, kɑ ókwër nyi mëggi budi gen yi Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Nehemiah13:1 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Wɑ̈nyi Ciggi Mosɑ̀ orɑngø, ɑyood keny-ɑ kööbø kinni, tyëng Amön, kí tyëng Moɑb ko rëbi ki jii Jwøk gïti ɑtheer," 
Nehemiah13:2 mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil nuti pɑɑr gen ki gïgcɑmm geki pï keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, de ge ɑ́yöd ge kïr-ɑ Bɑlɑɑm, kinni o gï lɑ̈mme cyën, kɑ cyën løg ɑ́ gyëdh yi Jwøgee." 
Nehemiah13:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi ciggɑni yi Isrɑil, kɑ tyëngpɑth bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g kì kelli gen." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ókwërø Eliɑcïb, ɑ ɑ́mïdhi jɑmmi Kengø, ɑ́bëëd e mër ki Töbiyɑ̀." 
Nehemiah13:5 Kɑ gø wiye o bëëde kì ød me yije lɑɑj, men-ɑ ɑ́ger ɑ́ men yije nyi mïdhi byëlø, kí bɑkur, kí jɑmm-ɑ nyi göög kì Kengø, kí gïg-ɑ nyi mëggi ókwër, kí ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈ri byel, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw Dhetun møg-ɑ nyi mëggi Kwɑrri Leebì kí jøwör, kí jøg-ɑ kor Kengø." 
Nehemiah13:6 Gïgɑni ɑ́cwöb yɑ tøøk kì Yerusɑlem. Kì bøli kenyɑni Artɑkerkes rɑ̈nhdwøøng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew kì yij lɑwø, o yɑ ɑ́kedh-ɑ be dwöggii gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg. Kɑ ngɑ̈jɑ kinni yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ døøgø." 
Nehemiah13:7 Codhe, ɑdwöögɑ Yerusɑlem, kɑ yɑ ongɑ̈ngø, keny-ɑ ɑ́yodɑ en kinni, Eliɑcïb Töbiyɑ̀ nëng en ki ød kì buti Kengø." 
Nehemiah13:8 Arënyi pyëwɑ ki mendwøng, kɑ jɑmmi Töbiyɑ̀ bënn leengɑ wɑ̈g kì ønɑni." 
Nehemiah13:9 Codhe, ɑmuujɑ ki cigg kinni, lɑɑw yethi ud, kɑ jɑmmi Kengø, kí byëlø, kí bɑkur dwøøg kɑ̈jji gen." 
Nehemiah13:10 Kɑ yodɑ thyew kinni, kwï Kwɑrri Leebì kí jøwör dhwödhø kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ myërri gen, mɑ́ ge pɑ nyi nëngi yi teedø ki gïgcɑmm." 
Nehemiah13:11 Awërɑ ki jɑggi gwøg, kɑ ge pyëjɑ kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ wøy wun Kengø?” Acwöölɑ Kwɑrri Leebì geki jøwör kɑ ge dwøøgɑ kɑ̈jji gen." 
Nehemiah13:12 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn døøg-ɑ be kïdhi yethi udd-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmì ki ɑ́kyel pyɑ̈r mø gemè, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun." 
Nehemiah13:13 Codhe, ɑkwɑnyɑ ókwërø Celemiyɑ̀, kí Dhɑdök jɑlgwed ki Cigg, kí Pedɑiyɑ̀ Kwɑɑr Leebì gɑ jɑggi udd-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmì. Kɑ Aɑnɑn wɑ̈d Dhɑkur wɑ̈d Mɑtɑniyɑ̀ kwɑnyɑ thyew ɑ́ ngɑn nyi køny gen, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni jøgɑni ócuggø ngɑ̈dhø ceth, o gïgcɑmm ópɑ̈ngi yi gen kì kelli wɑddi gen e yethi gen bong ɑ́dud." 
Nehemiah13:14 Yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, pɑrrí gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ kipe Kengí kí mɑlli yïn." 
Nehemiah13:15 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ ji lidhɑ kì Yeudiyɑ̀ ge obïïjø ki oløg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. O ji møøgø cïb-ɑ kömi ɑderri gen ki byel, kí møgi oløg, kí oløg, kí nywøli ólɑm, kí jɑmmì møøgø ge kïdh-ɑ Yerusɑlem; kɑ ge kyëddɑ kinni ge ko nyi ngyëwi kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kwï tyëng Suur møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki rij kí jɑmmì mø ngew, kɑ gï ngëwwi gen tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Nehemiah13:17 Kɑ jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ deddɑ, ɑpyëjɑ gen kinni, “Á gïn ɑ gwøg yi wun ɑ rɑj ni men? Wude ɑ bwöl wun cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Pɑth ki gïg ni møgɑni ɑ́ per gen ɑ́cɑɑy kweyyi wun yi Jwøk, ɑbëën ryɑ̈g kömi kɑɑl men? O ɑnɑn wu dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömi Isrɑil ki göj me wëggi pyëw Jwøk rënyø, kɑ̀ bwöl wun cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth?”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Kɑ yɑ omuujø ki cigg kinni, nyi cyëëg dhøggi döri Yerusɑlem, kenyi cɑ̈gi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth (kì ri buddi cɑ̈ng,) kɑ ge ko nyi yieb gïti kenyi thumi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Kɑ kwï jøgɑ cïbɑ dhøggi dörø, o ge mɑ̈ɑ̈n gen kɑ̈ɑ̈li jɑmmì kɑɑl kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Nehemiah13:20 Kɑ jøngyëwø nïnn-ɑ wɑ̈g kì Yerusɑlem, tyelø ɑ́kyel, wɑlɑ̀ tyel ɑ́ryew." 
Nehemiah13:21 Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, “Wude ɑ buddi wun kì dhø döri kɑɑl? Keløg wu ócigi buddø kì kenyɑni, wu mɑgɑ’ mɑgø.” Cɑg kì bøli kenyɑni, ge nuti dwöögø cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth." 
Nehemiah13:22 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì cegɑ kinni, kwër gen ri gen, o ge bï gen be kori dhøggi dörø kipe kinni o cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth mïdhi ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër ceth. Yïn ɑ Jwøk, pɑr yɑn kipe møg thyew, kɑ yɑ korrí, mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií dwøng cɑrø." 
Nehemiah13:23 Kɑ yodɑ kì yethi runnɑni thyew, kinni Yeud nyömø ki nyigi tyëng Acdöd, kí Amön, kí Moɑb," 
Nehemiah13:24 o budi nyigi gen 'kööb-ɑ dhøg Acdöd, o ge pɑ cuggi kwøb ki dhøg wøn, de ge 'kööb-ɑ dhøggi ji møøgø." 
Nehemiah13:25 Kɑ ge deddɑ, kɑ ge lɑ̈mmɑ cyën, kɑ kwï gen pwödɑ, kɑ yëyyi gen pyedɑ. Codhe, kɑ ge köbbɑ köngø ki nyingi Jwøk, kinni ri gen koo nywøm yi gen ki jurrɑni." 
Nehemiah13:26 Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, “Bɑ mɑ̈nni Sølømøn, møg-ɑ bɑ nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø ɑ ɑ́peejii yij orøg. Ngö e ɑ́bong-ɑ rɑ̈dh me ni en kì yethi pödhh bënn, o ɑ́bëëd e mɑɑr yi Jwøge, kɑ gwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bëne, de nuti peej yij orøg yi mɑ̈nne, nyigi jurr-ɑ kyeelø?" 
Nehemiah13:27 Ngøy wøn gwøøg wun, o kwøbbi Jwøgee pyem yi wɑ kɑ̀ nyömi wɑ ki nyigi jurr-ɑ pɑth?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Nyel ɑ́kyel kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Yöyɑdɑ̀, wɑ̈d Eliɑcïb Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, nywøøm-ɑ nyɑɑr Sɑnbɑlɑt jɑl kɑɑl Bet Örøn. Kɑ Yöyɑdɑ̀ köbbɑ dhwödhe kì Yerusɑlem." 
Nehemiah13:29 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, pɑrrí kër-ɑ ɑ́ywëëdh lɑwi ókwërø yi jiɑni, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi yïn kipe ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì pɑ̈d yi gen." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kɑ ji kwërɑ kipe gïg-ɑ pɑth bënn, kɑ gwøøg ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì pyëlɑ kidøøj, kɑ ngɑn mëggɑ gwøge," 
Nehemiah13:31 kɑ yɑ nyii muujø, ki yugg møg nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhì geki mwölli gïg-ɑ nyi cyeg, kì bøli kɑ̈jj-ɑ dwɑddi gen. Yïn ɑ Jwøk, nyi pɑ̈r yɑn kipe møgɑni bënn, kɑ yɑ thödhí ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
Esther1:1 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Rɑ̈nhdwøng Kerkes, e bëëd ɑ Susɑ̀, ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ pödhh 127 cɑ̈gi kì Ïndì gïti Kuc." 
Esther1:2  
Esther1:3 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Kerkes kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́gööge ki thyëg me dwøng, e ryej-ɑ jɑggi mïïre geki pëjji liny. Jøliny Pɑres kí Mɑdɑy, kí jøgdøngø geki jyɑ̈ggì bënn ɑ́bëëd ge nud thyew." 
Esther1:4 Átyëg-ɑ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel e nyodh-ɑ kɑ̈re, kí dhwɑ̈nge, kí tege." 
Esther1:5 Kì bɑng ryëj menɑni ɑlunyi rɑ̈nhɑni ki ryeji tyëng kɑɑldwøng Susɑ̀. Áryej-ɑ ji bënn; tyëngkɑ̈rì kí ɑbuur. Ryënyɑni ɑ́tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, ji otugø kì yethi bɑ̈ggi gøldwøng." 
Esther1:6 Kɑ ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng cørri ki sitɑrr mø kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí óbøw møg-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm, ge ómɑɑg ri löjji kïtt-ɑ myër ki yëlli ɑ́tegg, kí thølli kor-ɑ yöm mø kïddi gen bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl. Kɑ ódɑ̈rɑni cïbi ki kwømm møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, o piny ótɑgø kɑ ópɑddi kïtt-ɑ myër e kïddi gen bɑ̈nni, ge ógwelø ki tigg mø per gen teg, mø ceg orɑ̈ng." 
Esther1:7 Møgø ɑ́mɑdh kɑ óthɑ̈ggi dhɑb mø bëëdi gen bɑ̈nni; bong ɑ́ryew mø pɑ̈r kinni tek. Møgø ɑ́gwøg kì gøldwøng e gïïr cɑrø. 
Esther1:8 Gïg mɑdh ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr ki mendwøng, mɑ́ rɑ̈dh bɑ̈ngge ɑ́cege kinni gwøøg jɑmmì ge gïïr, o bëëd e bong ngɑn pɑ yɑ̈ng." 
Esther1:9 Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryeje thyew kì gøldwøng, kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Esther1:10 Kì bïryeew cyɑ̈nggi ryëj, Rɑ̈nhdwøng Kerkes ɑ́bëëd e omɑ̈dhø, kɑ pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng, kɑ jøg-ɑ bɑ órøj møg-ɑ göögø kì gøldwøng gɑ ɑ́bïryew gï cwööle. Jøgɑni nyingi gen bɑ: Meumɑn, Bidhthɑ̀, Arbönɑ̀, Bigthɑ̀, Abɑgthɑ̀, Dhethɑr kí Kɑrkɑs." 
Esther1:11 Kɑ bɑ̈nggɑni köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni i kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì, e orugø ki ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kí yɑ̈r kì wïje. Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh menɑni ɑ́bëëd e myëër cɑrø, o rɑ̈dh ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ nyudhi jyɑ̈gge bënn ki myëri Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì." 
Esther1:12 De kɑ ɑ́köbbi Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì yi bɑ̈ngg ki møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi rɑ̈dh, ɑbɑ̈nye ki bëën yï rɑ̈dh. Kɑ rɑ̈dh pyëwe órënyø ki mendwøng." 
Esther1:13 Codhe, kɑ jøgdøngø møg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi cigg pyëj yi rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ kwöng ceth kinni rɑ̈dh nyii pëjjø ki tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kidøøj." 
Esther1:14 O jøg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni bɑ Kɑrcenɑ̀, Cethɑr, Admɑthɑ̀, Tɑrcic, Meres, Mɑrsenɑ̀ kí Memukɑn. Bene gen jɑgg-ɑ døngø gɑ ɑ́bïryew kì Mɑdɑy geki Pɑres." 
Esther1:15 Kɑ jøgɑni köbbe kinni, “Yɑ Rɑ̈dh Kerkes, bɑ̈nggɑ ɑ́örɑ be cwööli Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì, de ngɑnɑni ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbɑ! Cigg okööbø kinni i göggi ngø?”" 
Esther1:16 Kɑ Memukɑn ólöggø kinni, “Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì nuti bɑɑny-ɑ kwøbbi rɑ̈dh kete; dɑ́ rɑ̈dh kí jyɑ̈gge, kí ji-ɑ yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈dh bënn ɑ ɑ́bɑny yi en." 
Esther1:17 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng bënn, ceg-ɑ døøg be pëmø ki kwøbbi gen, keny-ɑ ólïngi gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi bɑ̈rɑ̈dh. Ge ókööbø kinni, ‘Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì ɑ́cwøl yi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki kedhi yïe.’" 
Esther1:18 Keny-ɑ ólïng mɑ̈nni jɑggi Pɑres geki Mɑdɑy ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi bɑ̈rɑ̈dh, ge ódøøg be pëmø ki kwøbbi jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh, o bong keny-ɑ ócöög yi linyɑni!" 
Esther1:19 Keløg e døøj kì yïí wuö, gwëdí piny ki cigg kinni Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì pɑ cigi bëën bøli rɑ̈dh. Kɑ møgɑni gweed piny gɑ ciggi Pɑres kí Mɑdɑy, o ge cög ge pɑ wil. Kɑ kej Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì mëggi ngɑndhɑjø megø me lɑ̈w kibøle." 
Esther1:20 Keny-ɑ óyood ciggɑni yi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng bënn, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn cwøwi gen ówør yi gen ki mendwøng, cɑgg cwøwɑni kɑ̈rø wɑlɑ̀ ge jɑdø.”" 
Esther1:21 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Memukɑn yïëy yi rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈ggì bënn. 
Esther1:22 Kɑ pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng gwëdi ki wɑ̈j bënn, men gwëdi kɑ dhøge, kinni jɑlø bɑ en ɑ bɑ jɑgø kì gøle, o en ɑ kwøbbe lïngi." 
Esther2:1 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́bëëd e nudd e orumø kì ri gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì, kí cigg-ɑ ɑ́gweede piny, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́døøg linye piny." 
Esther2:2 Codhe, ɑköbbi rɑ̈dh yi jø tøg bure kinni, “Yïde ɑ pɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki womɑ̈nn mø myëër, mø nuti pɑ̈nyø’ nywɑlø yi cwøw?" 
Esther2:3 Ödí yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng ki ji møg yɑ̈bø ki womɑ̈nn mø myër, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l Susɑ̀ keny, kɑ ge cïb cingi Ëgɑy, órøny-ɑ jɑɑg gøldwøng, o ge temmi." 
Esther2:4 Orum gen ki temmø kidøøj, o yï kɑ̈bbí kì kelli gen ki nyɑn cïb kej Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì.” Møgɑni ɑ́yïëy yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ ogöögø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii." 
Esther2:5 Ádɑ jɑl mɑ Yeudì kì Susɑ̀, me cwøl ɑ́ Mordekɑy wɑ̈d Yɑir, wɑ̈d Cimeì, wɑ̈d Kïc kì gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Esther2:6 Mordekɑy ɑ́kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ cøn kyeel kɑ Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïl, kí ji-ɑ ɑ́mɑg bënn." 
Esther2:7 Mordekɑy yïe ɑ́dɑ nyiwɑ̈n mɑ kïj, mɑ ɑ́pidh yi en. Nyɑnɑni bɑ Ester, o cwøl ɑ́ Adɑsɑ̀ ki dhøg Ibru. Bɑ nyɑn me myëër, o dële døøj." 
Esther2:8 Ester ɑ́kïdhi kelli womɑ̈nn møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Susɑ̀, kì bɑng ciggi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ cïb cingi Ëgɑy kì gøldwøng." 
Esther2:9 Ëgɑy pyëwe ɑ́bëëd e med ki Ester, kɑ gø jwɑne ki yɑ̈bbø ki keny me døøj kì gøldwøng, kí womɑ̈nn ɑ́bïryew møg kɑ̈llii, o ge temmi gen dële." 
Esther2:10 Ester nuti kwøb kinni bɑ nyɑɑr Yeud, mɑ́ e rumø ki cegø yi Mordekɑy kinni ree ko nyodhe." 
Esther2:11 Mordekɑy ɑ́bëëd e nyii cyɑ̈dhø e bɑ̈nn-ɑ dhøg ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng, tung-ɑ mïdhi womɑ̈nn, kipe kinni o nyi lidhe Ester mɑ bëëde kidï." 
Esther2:12 Kɑ dëlli womɑ̈nn møgɑni tyëg-ɑ run ge otemmø; ge ɑ́demmi ki ryɑ̈ mor, møw-ɑ yøme med ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel. Kɑ ge lony ki demmø ki bɑlsɑm møw-ɑ yøme med ki dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïkyel møøgø. Codhe cyee, kɑ womɑ̈nn møgɑni cɑg ki muuj Rɑ̈dh Kerkes, e nyi kɑ̈l ɑ́ ɑ́kyel." 
Esther2:13 Kɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈l nyɑnɑjur e kïdh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, bɑ ɑyïëy kinni ruge ki ógønh-ɑ dwɑddi yi pyëwe." 
Esther2:14 Nyɑn-ɑ kɑ̈l, nyi kɑ̈l ɑ böörø, o dwööge dhuki kì mwøl. De keny-ɑ ódwööge, kïdh-ɑ tung-ɑ jɑɑg yi órøny-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Cɑɑcgɑdh, jɑl-ɑ mïdhi ɑkwɑnyyi rɑ̈dh. Nyɑnɑni pɑ døøg yï rɑ̈dh, keløg e pɑ ceg ki cwølø yi rɑ̈dh ki nyinge." 
Esther2:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej nyiwï Mordekɑy, nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́pidh yi en e nɑ nyɑre; eni Ester nyɑɑr Abikɑil; keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi bøli kej kïdhe yï rɑ̈dh, ɑ́løny-ɑ ógudh-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Ëgɑy, jɑl-ɑ cinge di gen. Ester ɑ́bëëd e mɑɑr yi teenɑni bëne." 
Esther2:16 Ester ɑ́kïdhi yï Rɑ̈dh Kerkes kì gøldwøng, kì dwɑ̈y Tebet, e Rɑ̈dh Kerkes runne bɑ ɑ́bïryew kì yij lɑwø." 
Esther2:17 Ester ɑ́mɑɑr yi rɑ̈dh ki mendwøng kibøli tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn bënn. Kɑ pyëwe kwɑny yi Ester. Acïbe yɑ̈ɑ̈r rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø wïj Ester, kɑ gø kwɑnye ɑ́ kej Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Bɑctì." 
Esther2:18 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ogöögø ki thyëg me dwøng kiper Ester, kɑ jyɑ̈gge ryeje bënn. Kɑ cyɑ̈ngɑni gwøge ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi en bënn, kɑ omuujø ki jɑmmì mø kyëëw ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Esther2:19 Mordekɑy ɑ́bëëd e rumø ki rønyø ɑ́ jɑgø kì gøldwøng yi rɑ̈dh. 
Esther2:20 De Ester ɑ́bëëd ree nuti nyoodh en kinni bɑ nyɑɑr Yeud, mɑ́ e ɑ́köbbi yi Mordekɑy kinni ko di ngɑn köbbi yi en. Kwøbbi Mordekɑy ɑ́bëëd gï nyi lïnge’ lïngø ceth, kër-ɑ ɑ́wöne e thiinh." 
Esther2:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Mordekɑy e nenn-ɑ gwøg kì gøldwøng, kɑ Bigthɑnɑ̀ geki Terec, órøjj-ɑ nyi kor dhøng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi rɑ̈dh kì gøldwøng, ogöögø ki møg mɑɑn Rɑ̈dh Kerkes, kɑ ge onywɑ̈gø ki kwøbbi nɑ̈gi rɑ̈dh." 
Esther2:22 Møgɑni óyodø yi Mordekɑy, kɑ Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester köbbe, ɑloony rɑ̈dh ki köbbø yi Ester." 
Esther2:23 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yɑɑb thɑ́ møgɑni, kɑ ge yod gɑ dyër, ɑngɑɑb jøgɑni ryeet wɑ̈thi bɑ̈rr-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈bbi. Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni i gweed kwøbbɑni yij wɑ̈nyi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Esther3:1 Kì bɑng keny megø, kɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Ämɑn røny yi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes ɑ́ jɑng-ɑ dwøng. Ämɑn bɑ wɑ̈d jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Amedɑthɑ̀, kwɑɑr Agɑg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amɑlek." 
Esther3:2 Kɑ jø tøg burø bënn, köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni i mɑl gen Ämɑn, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny kì bøli Ämɑn. Kɑ jøgɑni oyïëyø bënn, de ciggɑni ɑ́bɑny yi Mordekɑy." 
Esther3:3 Apyëëj Mordekɑy yi jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yïde ɑ bɑɑny ciggi rɑ̈dh?”" 
Esther3:4 Kɑ jøgɑni pëgg-ɑ be kwɑjji Mordekɑy yethi cyɑ̈ng kinni yïëye ki ciggi rɑ̈dh. De kwøbbi gen pɑ nyi yïëy yi Mordekɑy. Kɑ gï nyi kyëdde kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Yeudì, o Ämɑn pɑ cuggi mɑlø yi yɑn.” Akedh gen kɑ møgɑni köbbi gen Ämɑn. Ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yodi kinni kwøbbi Mordekɑy óløøg ɑ dï yi Ämɑn." 
Esther3:5 Ämɑn ɑ́bëëd pyëwe rɑɑj cɑrø keny-ɑ ɑ́yode kinni Mordekɑy bɑ̈nyø ki bɑ̈nyi dwøng ki mɑlii geki kuuli wïje piny kì bøle. 
Esther3:6 De kɑ ɑ́yode gøn kinni Mordekɑy bɑ Yeudì, ɑyɑ̈be ki yöö men nɑ̈ge Mordekɑy kí wɑdde bënn; ɑ løg Yeud bënn, møg-ɑ yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi Kerkes." 
Esther3:7 Kì dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl (Nisɑn) kì yij runn, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew runni Kerkes kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́kööb Ämɑn kinni leeng wél (ɑ cwøl ɑ́ purïm) o dwɑ̈y geki cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ógögge Yeud ki gïnrɑj yod. Codhe, ɑ leeng wél, kɑ ge pɑ̈dhi kɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew dwɑ̈tt (Adɑr)." 
Esther3:8 Aköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Ämɑn kinni, “Dɑ jur me tɑɑy yij pödhí, ge nud kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi yïn bënn, ge mïdh-ɑ kwöng me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki köngi ji bënn. O ge pɑ nyi yïëy ki ciggi pödhí. Yï ko kud kì kömi møgɑni." 
Esther3:9 Keløg e ócuggø wuö, muuj ki cigg kinni nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen bënn. Keløg ge ónɑ̈g yi yïn, yɑ ómuujø ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg gɑ kïllì ɑ́lïp miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen møg kïdhi kömi ngyënyyi gøldwøng.”" 
Esther3:10 Kɑ rɑ̈dh gweli lwede, men-ɑ bɑ kitim budhe wɑ̈g, kɑ gø mëgge ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑn Yeud; ɑ løg Ämɑn wɑ̈d Amedɑthɑ̀, kwɑɑr Agɑg." 
Esther3:11 Kɑ Ämɑn köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Jiɑni bɑ møgí geki ngyënyyi gen bënn; göggí gen gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn.”" 
Esther3:12 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt, ɑ ɑ́cwøøl jøgwed mø rɑ̈dh yi Ämɑn, kɑ gï köbbe kinni gwed gen ciggɑni, kɑ ge løg ki dhøggi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, kɑ ge ör yethi pödhh bënn. Ciggɑni ɑ́ör kɑ nyingi rɑ̈dh, o wɑ̈nyɑni bɑ ɑthɑny ki kitim mi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes." 
Esther3:13 Ciggɑni ɑ́kɑ̈l-ɑ yi jøg-ɑ nyi rïngi kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng bënn. Ciggɑni bɑ kinni, kì yij cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, ɑ bɑ cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y (Adɑr) pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g, nɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeud bënn; othønhø kí tyëngdøngø, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kí møg-ɑ dhødh. Ko di ngɑn pyëwe lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen; ngɑlli gen bënn, kɑ jɑmmi gen kwɑny." 
Esther3:14 Ngɑ̈ɑ̈j ciggɑni kì yethi pödhh bënn, o ji óbëëd ri gen gwiir gen kipe cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Esther3:15 Kɑ ciggɑni ngɑ̈jji teedø bëne kì Susɑ̀ ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi rɑ̈dh. Kɑ wɑ̈nyi ciggɑni kïdhi yethi pödhh bënn yi jøngwej. Kɑ Rɑ̈dh pëgg-ɑ be mɑdh ki møgø geki Ämɑn, de ji wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́muum kì Susɑ̀." 
Esther4:1 Mordekɑy, keny-ɑ ɑ́yode gïg-ɑ ógwøgø bënn, kɑ ógudhe pyëde yi rɑ̈ji pyëwe. Kɑ ree lunye ki ocwɑ̈lø, kɑ wïje buge ki belø, kɑ ókedhø e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ kɑɑl e óywöngø ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe," 
Esther4:2 gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe dhø gøldwøng, de ɑ́cög e nuti kedhi gølɑni, mɑ́ e pɑ wëggi kedhi kɑl, e rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈lø." 
Esther4:3 Wöönɑni ɑ́wɑ̈dhi yethi pödhh bënn, o kenyi lïngi ciggɑni yi Yeud, ge nyi ceg-ɑ ywøg. Kɑ ri gen twöön gen ki gïncɑm, ge óywöngø, ge okïïwø. Kɑ mø gïïr kì kelli gen orugø ki ocwɑ̈llì, kɑ ge obuddø kì yij belø." 
Esther4:4 Kɑ Ester köbbi yi mɑ̈nn geki órøjj-ɑ gøldwøng ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mordekɑy. Kɑ pyëwe ceg-ɑ rënyø, ɑöde ki ógudh møg løny ri Mordekɑy, de ógudhɑni ɑ́bɑny yi Mordekɑy." 
Esther4:5 Kɑ órøj me cwøl ɑ́ Athɑk cwøl yi Ester, ɑköbbe gøn kinni kedhe yï Mordekɑy, o yode gïn-ɑ cwöbø." 
Esther4:6 Kɑ Athɑk kedh-ɑ yï Mordekɑy kì dhø gøldwøng. 
Esther4:7 Aköbbii yi Mordekɑy ki gïg-ɑ göögø, kí kwɑnni ngyënyy-ɑ ómuuj yi Ämɑn gɑ møg kïdhi kömi ngyënyyi gøldwøng, keløg Yeud ónɑ̈g bënn." 
Esther4:8 Kɑ Athɑk mëgge wɑ̈nyi ciggɑni, eni men-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈j ji kì Susɑ̀ kinni nɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeud. Kɑ köbbi yi Mordekɑy kinni mëgge gøn Ester, kɑ gø nyudhe ki gïg-ɑ göögø bënn. Orume, kɑ Ester kedhe yï rɑ̈dh be kwɑjjii, o lɑɑwe dwööge piny kipe wɑdde, Yeud." 
Esther4:9 Kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi Athɑk. 
Esther4:10 Kɑ Athɑk ör yï Mordekɑy yi Ester, o gø köbbe kinni," 
Esther4:11 “Keløg e dɑ dhɑnhø, ying-ɑ́ jɑlø wɑlɑ̀ dhɑjø, men kedhi gøldwøng yï rɑ̈dh, kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ yij gøldwøng e nuti cwølø, ngɑnɑni nyi ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø. Ciggɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh kí ji bënn. Ngɑn bødh ki nɑ̈gø kì bɑng ciggɑni, bɑ ngɑn tïngi loodh dhɑb yi rɑ̈dh. De ɑ́göög ki dwɑ̈y ɑnɑn kër-ɑ ɑ́cwøøl yɑn yi rɑ̈dh.”" 
Esther4:12 Kɑ ɑ́yood wööni Ester yi Mordekɑy," 
Esther4:13 ɑöde gøn ki kwøb kinni, “Yï ko rum kinni yï óyiel yi kɑ̀ bëëd yï ying-ɑ gøldwøng, dɑ́ Yeud møg-ɑ kyeelø ɑ ónɑ̈g." 
Esther4:14 Keløg yï okudø kì bøli keny ni men, ngɑn-ɑ óyiel Yeud óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, de yï ceg-ɑ thøø, o wïj gøl wïyí ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Dɑ́ men ɑ ngɑ̈nyii, ying-ɑ́ per bøli keny ni men, ɑ ógwøøg yïn, yïn ɑ́ bɑ̈rɑ̈dh!”" 
Esther4:15 Aløøg mø Mordekɑy yi Ester kinni," 
Esther4:16 “Kedh, kɑ Yeud cøng bënn kì Susɑ̀, thuum wun kɑ wu kwɑ̈jji wun kiperɑ; wu ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wɑlɑ̀ wu ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki gïïpiny ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí wɑ̈rr ɑ́dɑ̈g. Yɑ óthuumø wøki wo-ɑ butɑ, o wø ókwɑ̈jji thyew. Othumi cyɑ̈nggɑni, yɑ ókedhi yï rɑ̈dh, cɑgg møgɑni bɑ ɑkerø yi cigg. Keløg yɑ othøø kipe kɑ̀ göögɑ kinøw, wiy yɑ thøwɑ.”" 
Esther4:17 Adhwödh Mordekɑy, kɑ kedh-ɑ be gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Ester." 
Esther5:1 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi thuumi Ester, kɑ ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø møge lønye ree, ɑkedhe kɑ ócungø kì ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng kì tuung rɑ̈dh, e nenn-ɑ øn-ɑ di kwøøm jyɑ̈gø. Rɑ̈dh ɑ́bëëd e nud kì ønɑni e obëëdø kì wïj kwøm e nenn-ɑ dhøng-ɑ yïëbbi ódɑ̈rɑni." 
Esther5:2 Kɑ ɑ́liidh Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester yi rɑ̈dh e ócungø kì wɑ̈g, ɑtyerii yi pyëwe, kɑ loodh dhɑb tïnge, ɑkedh Ester kɑ wïj lodh nywɑle." 
Esther5:3 Kɑ pyëj yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Á gïn Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester? Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, cɑgg ɑ́ budi pödhɑ, mëgg-ɑ yïn.”" 
Esther5:4 Alöggi Ester kinni, “Keløg e ócuggø wuö, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni rɑ̈dh geki Ämɑn bï gen gølɑ keny-ɑ ryejɑ wun tïn kì thyënhø.”" 
Esther5:5 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh öd-ɑ yï Ämɑn kinni jwɑne bëënø, o ge kedhi gen kej ryëëj Ester. Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh kedh-ɑ kej ryëëj Ester geki Ämɑn." 
Esther5:6 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ki møgø, ɑpyëëj ngɑnɑni yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o mëgg-ɑ yïn ceth. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn mëggɑ’ yïn, cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ budi pödhɑ.”" 
Esther5:7 Alöggi Ester kinni, “Gïn-ɑ kwɑjjɑ; ɑ yɑb yi yɑn bɑ kinni," 
Esther5:8 keløg pyëwí med ki yɑn wuö, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ døøgi yïn ki ryejø dhuki wuki Ämɑn. Yï óköbbɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ kì bøli kenyɑni.”" 
Esther5:9 Ämɑn ɑ́dhwödh kì kej ryëj e pyëwe ceg-ɑ medø ki mendwøng. De kɑ ɑ́lidhe Mordekɑy kì dhø gøldwøng, kɑ Mordekɑy ocögø e pɑ dhwödhi mɑl kipere, wɑlɑ̀ wïje nuti kuul en piny e wør-ɑ gøn, kɑ Ämɑn pyëwe ceg-ɑ rënyø ki mendwøng ki en." 
Esther5:10 De pyëwe ɑ́mɑge kɑ kedh-ɑ gøle. Kɑ mɑ̈dhhe cwøøle gøle, kɑ cyëge me cwøl ɑ́ Dherec, cwøle o bëëde kì buti gen." 
Esther5:11 Kɑ othwøgø kì bøli gïn kipe kɑ̈re, kí ngenyi wɑ̈dde, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́tïngii mɑl yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ røny ɑ́ jɑngi dwøng. Kí kinni pere teeg kibøli jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Esther5:12 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́ryeje geki rɑ̈dh, den-ɑ́ yɑ ketɑ. O wø ócige ryejø dhuki." 
Esther5:13 De bong gïn wɑngi yi møgɑni bënn, mɑ́ pyëwɑ pɑ med kenyi nennɑ Mordekɑy wɑ̈d Yeud, e obëëdø kì dhø gøldwøng.”" 
Esther5:14 Kɑ köbbi yi cyëge Dherec geki mɑ̈dhhe bënn kinni, “Yïde ɑ pɑ cwödhí piny ki gïn-ɑ nyi ngɑɑb ji, me bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew? O Rɑ̈dh köbbi yi yïn dhuki kì mwøl, kinni ngɑɑb Mordekɑy wïje. Codhe, o yï kedhí kej ryëj pyëwí omedø.” Kɑ Ämɑn pyëwe ómïnø yi kwøbbɑni, ɑcwödhhe piny ki gïn-ɑ ree nyi ngɑ̈bbi." 
Esther6:1 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́dhɑ̈li nenø kì wɑ̈rɑni. Aköbbe jøgwøg kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi gweed kwøbb-ɑ per gen teg kì yij pödhø, kɑ rɑ̈ngii." 
Esther6:2 Bun-ɑ ɑ́rɑng kööb ɑ ri møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mordekɑy, kɑ ɑ́nyodhe kwøbbi dwɑddi rɑ̈dh ki nɑ̈gø yi órøjj-ɑ kor gøldwøng, ɑ løg Bigthɑnɑ̀ geki Terec." 
Esther6:3 Apëjji rɑ̈dh kinni, “Mordekɑy ɑ́pwøj yi wɑ kɑ ngø?” Aløøg møgɑni yi bɑ̈ngge kinni, “Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́göggii.”" 
Esther6:4 Apëjji rɑ̈dh kinni, “Dɑ jøgdøngø mø nud kì gøldwøng?” Kedh Ämɑn wɑ̈nh-ɑ ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng, kì bøli kenyɑni ceth. Ábï-ɑ be kwɑjji rɑ̈dh kipe ngɑɑbi Mordekɑy wïj gï ngɑb, men-ɑ ɑ́rum ki cwöödh piny yi en." 
Esther6:5 Alöggi bɑ̈nggɑni kinni, “Ämɑn nud kì keny. Dwɑdd-ɑ yïddø ki yïn.” Akööb rɑ̈dh kinni, “Wiy bëe ød.”" 
Esther6:6 Kɑ Ämɑn bï-ɑ ød. Kɑ köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Dɑ dhɑnhø me dwɑddɑ pwøjø ki mendwøng. Á ngø ɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yɑn, kipe jɑl ni menɑni?” Kɑ Ämɑn okööbø ki pyëwe kinni, “Anɑn, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi dwɑddø yi rɑ̈dh ki pwøjø? Bɑ yɑn ceth.”" 
Esther6:7 Aløøge kwøbbi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Cwöddí ki ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kí yɑ̈r møg ruug jɑlɑni. Kɑ cïb kömi kyenyí." 
Esther6:8  
Esther6:9 Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki dhɑnhø kì kelli jyɑ̈gg-ɑ døngø, o ruuge jɑlɑni. Codhe, o kyeny pyejje kì kelli kɑɑl, e jɑl-ɑ pwøj obëëdø kì kömi kyeny. Kɑ wiy jɑldwøng-ɑ pyejji kyeny cyɑ̈dhe e óryeerø e köbb-ɑ ji kinni, ‘Lidhu kër-ɑ nyi pwøøj dhɑnhø yi rɑ̈dh!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Aköbbi Ämɑn yi Rɑ̈dh kinni, “Jwɑní kɑ ógudh kɑ̈ɑ̈l geki kyeny, kɑ pwøj møgɑni göggí Mordekɑy wɑ̈d Yeud. Göggí gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bënn. Óyuud yi yïn e obëëdø kì dhø gøldwøng.”" 
Esther6:11 Akɑ̈ɑ̈l ógudh kí kyeny yi Ämɑn, kɑ Mordekɑy ruuge, kɑ gø cïbe kömi kyeny. Kɑ kyeny pyejji yi Ämɑn kì kelli kɑɑl, e óryeerø e köbb-ɑ ji kinni, “Lidhu kër-ɑ nyi pwøøj dhɑnhø yi rɑ̈dh.”" 
Esther6:12 Codhe, ɑdøøg Mordekɑy dhø gøldwøng, kɑ Ämɑn jwɑn-ɑ gøle e kwiiwø wïje kum en." 
Esther6:13 Kɑ cyëge geki mɑ̈dhhe bënn köbbe ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipere. Aköbbii yi cyëge geki mɑ̈dhhe ki kwøbbi peli wïj kinni, “Keløg Mordekɑy men-ɑ cɑ̈gi ki tyɑmi yïn èn bɑ Yeudì kidyër, yï pɑ cuggi cung kì bøle; yï bɑ men tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny ceth.”" 
Esther6:14 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nud ge okööbø, kɑ órøjji gøldwøng ówɑ̈nhø, ge dwɑ̈ɑ̈y-ɑ Ämɑn, kinni o kedhe kun-ɑ rëëj yi Ester." 
Esther7:1 Akedh rɑ̈dh geki Ämɑn, ge kedh-ɑ be ryëëj Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester." 
Esther7:2 Kì ryeew cyɑ̈ng, kɑ̈ng-ɑ́ nudd ge omɑ̈dhø ki møgø, ɑpyëëj Ester yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester, ɑ́ gïn ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn? Köbbí yɑn, o mëggi yïn ceth, cɑgg ɑ́ budi pödhɑ.”" 
Esther7:3 Aløøg møge yi Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester kinni, “Keløg e di dwɑddø yi yïn wuö, o pyëwí med ki yɑn, wiy yɑ nëënɑ, kɑ wiy wɑddɑ nëën gen." 
Esther7:4 Yɑ ɑ́rum ki ngewø wøki wɑddi wøn, wøn ɑ́ møg ngɑl. Ke di cɑɑg wøn ki ngewø wøn ɑ́ bɑ̈ngg, yï pɑ di jud yi yɑn, de wø ceg kɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø kinni tweet!”" 
Esther7:5 Apyëëj Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester yi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes kinni, “Á men ɑ dwɑddi gwøgi gïn ni men? Jɑlɑni ying-ɑ keny?”" 
Esther7:6 Alöggi Ester kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑn wøn, ɑ dwɑddi wøn nɑ̈gø bɑ jɑl-ɑ rɑj èn, Ämɑn!” Kɑ Ämɑn nyinge otøngø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, e nenn-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh geki bɑ̈rɑ̈dh," 
Esther7:7 Kɑ rɑ̈dh dhwödh-ɑ mɑl pyëwe rɑɑj ki mendwøng, kɑ kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ød, ɑkedhe yij bɑɑg gøldwøng. Kɑ yod yi Ämɑn kinni, rɑ̈dh dwɑdd-ɑ cɑyii kipe møgɑni, codhe ɑdönge e kwɑjj-ɑ Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester kipe kinni o wëye yiel." 
Esther7:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög rɑ̈dh kì yij bɑg, Ämɑn ɑ́yuude e obuddø kì wïj pyën-ɑ bëëd yi Ester e kwɑjj-ɑ gøn kinni o wiy. Kɑ ɑ́lïdhi rɑ̈dh, ɑryeere kinni, “Jɑɑl dwɑdd-ɑ mødi bɑ̈rɑ̈dh kì butɑ; kì men-ɑ́ gøldwøng?” E rɑ̈dh nudd e ceg-ɑ kwøb ceth, kɑ nyingi Ämɑn kum yi órøjji gøldwøng." 
Esther7:9 Kɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, me cwøl ɑ́ Arbönɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Pɑth ki møg keti gen, de men-ɑ́ Ämɑn ɑ́rum ki cwödhi piny ki gïn-ɑ wïje nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈b, ɑ́ men ngɑɑb Mordekɑy, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yiel wëyí wuö. Bɑ̈ri ngɑ̈ɑ̈bi menɑni bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ryew.” Amuuj rɑ̈dh ki cigg kinni, “Ngɑɑb Ämɑn wïj gïnɑni.”" 
Esther7:10 Codhe, ɑngɑɑb Ämɑn wïj ngɑ̈ɑ̈bi men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödhe piny ɑ́ men di ngɑɑb Mordekɑy. Kɑ liny rɑ̈dh ókwöjø." 
Esther8:1 Kɑ jɑmmi Ämɑn jɑl-ɑ ɑ́mɑn Yeud mëggi Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester yi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth. Aköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Ester kinni Mordekɑy bɑ wɑɑd gen. Kɑ Mordekɑy yïëy kinni nyi kedhe bøli rɑ̈dh. 
Esther8:2 Kɑ gwelø men-ɑ bɑ kitim rɑ̈dh budhe wɑ̈g kì lwede (gwelɑni ɑ́cer-ɑ kwɑnyø kì yï Ämɑn) kɑ gø mëgge Mordekɑy. Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ møgi Ämɑn, cïb cingi Mordekɑy yi Ester." 
Esther8:3 Acigi Ester kwøb ki rɑ̈dh. Kɑ ree leenge dhøggi tyelli rɑ̈dh e óywöngø. Kɑ rɑ̈dh kwɑjje kinni kyere gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi göggi Yeud yi Ämɑn, kwɑɑr Agɑg." 
Esther8:4 Kɑ rɑ̈dh loodh dhɑb tïnge Ester, kɑ Ester dhwödh-ɑ mɑl, ɑkööbe kinni," 
Esther8:5 “Keløg e di dwɑddø yi yïn wuö, o keløg perɑ teeg kì yïí, muuj ki cigg møg kyer gïg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi Ämɑn; gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi wɑ̈d Amedɑthɑ̀ kwɑɑr Agɑg kinni i nɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeud bënn kì yij pödhø bëne." 
Esther8:6 Møgɑni óngin yi yɑn kidï, keløg gïnrɑj menɑni bï-ɑ kömi wɑddɑ kɑ ge nɑ̈g!”" 
Esther8:7 Aköbbi Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester geki Mordekɑy yi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes kinni, “Ämɑn ɑ́ngɑb yi yɑn kɑ per gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́dwɑdde göggi Yeud, kɑ jɑmme mëggɑ Ester." 
Esther8:8 De cigg møg-ɑ nyi gwed ki nyingi rɑ̈dh, kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni thɑny ki kitim rɑ̈dh, pɑ cuggi wilø. Wu ócuggø gwëdi Yeud ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, kɑ gwed ki nyingɑ, kɑ thɑny ki kitim rɑ̈dh.”" 
Esther8:9 Møgɑni ɑ́cwöb-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi dɑ̈ɑ̈g dwɑ̈tt (Sibɑn). Kɑ jøgweed rɑ̈dh bënn cwøl yi Mordekɑy, kɑ gï köbbe kinni gwëdi gen Yeud kí jyɑ̈ggi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew, ki wɑ̈j; cɑ̈gi kì Ïndì gïti Kuc. Kɑ wɑ̈j gwed ki dhøg bënn, ki yëth-ɑ nyi gwëëd yi pödhhɑni; men gwëdi kɑ dhøge. Kɑ Yeud gwëdi ki dhøg gen thyew, ki yëth-ɑ nyi gwëëd gen." 
Esther8:10 Mordekɑy, ɑ́kööb kinni gweed wɑ̈j bënn ki nyingi Rɑ̈dh Kerkes, kɑ wɑ̈jjɑni thɑnye ki kitim rɑ̈dh, men-ɑ yïe. Kɑ wɑ̈jjɑni kɑ̈l yi jøg mø cyɑ̈dhi kì kömi kyënyi gøldwøng, møg-ɑ pëddi ngwej." 
Esther8:11 Wɑ̈jjɑni ógwedø kinni, Yeud kì yethi myërr bënn ge ɑ́wiy yi rɑ̈dh, o ri gen cøng yi gen, kipe kinni o ge nyɑg gen ri gen keny-ɑ ódwɑddi gen nɑ̈gø. Keløg e dɑ ji mø pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Yeud, cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, kì pönh-ɑ bëëd yi gen, nyïɑ̈ggi Yeud kɑ tyëng-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen nɑ̈g gen, ko di ngɑn wiy yi gen. Kɑ jɑmmi gïn kwɑny gen." 
Esther8:12 Ciggɑni bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑ̈gi ki gwøg kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cïb ɑ́ men yije ónɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeud bënn, kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi Rɑ̈nhdwøng Kerkes, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew dwɑ̈tt (Adɑr)." 
Esther8:13 Ngɑ̈ɑ̈j ciggɑni kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng bënn, kipe kinni o Yeud óbëëd ri gen gwiir gen, kipe coli kɑ̈jji gen keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ kömi gen pɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Esther8:14 Kì bɑng kwøbbi rɑ̈dh ceth, kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi kyënyì, ɑkedh gen ge órïngø ki ngweny rɑj. Kɑ ciggɑni köbbi ji bënn kì kɑɑl Susɑ̀ thyew." 
Esther8:15 Mordekɑy ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì gøldwøng e rug-ɑ ógudhi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, mø kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí óbøw, kí ógønhdwøng me bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl, men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm, kí yɑ̈ɑ̈r dhɑb me myër kì wïje. Kɑ ɑyoy ceg-ɑ ì pɑɑt kì Susɑ̀, teedø ceg-ɑ ryeerø ki medi pëthi gen." 
Esther8:16 Mɑ́ Yeud pëthi gen ɑ́mïni, kinni ge ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Esther8:17 Kì yethi pödhh bënn, kenyi rɑɑng ciggi rɑ̈dh, Yeud nyi ceg-ɑ ywömø cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ ge otugø ki medi pëthi gen. Kidyër, men-ɑ́ kwï ji møøgø ɑ́göög ki Yeud, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg." 
Esther9:1 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew dwɑ̈tt (Adɑr), ɑ bɑ bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb ɑ́ men yije di nɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeud, ni kɑ ɑ́gwedii kì yethi ciggi rɑ̈dh; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Yeud kinni o gï di mød yi gen, de ɑ́yöd ɑ́ gen ɑ tyɑm yi Yeud." 
Esther9:2 Yeud ri gen ɑ́cøng gen kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi gen, kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng bënn. Kipe kinni o ri gen ónyɑg yi gen, ke di ji mø pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen. De ji ɑ́bwøg yi Yeud kì kɑ̈jj bënn. Kɑ bong-ɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cungi kì bøli gen." 
Esther9:3 Kidyër, jɑggi pödhh, kí jɑggi yethi myërr, kí jɑgg-ɑ thønhø bënn, ge ɑ́cwɑg-ɑ Yeud, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø yi Mordekɑy." 
Esther9:4 Ábëëd e ngɑ̈nyi kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng kinni Mordekɑy bɑ en ɑ yïe di tegø kì gøldwøng, o kedh e ceg-ɑ tëngø thyew." 
Esther9:5 Kɑ Yeud pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen ki pil kì cinggi gen, kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen." 
Esther9:6 Yeud ɑ́nɑ̈gi ki ji miy ɑ́bïj kì kɑɑl Susɑ̀. 
Esther9:7 Kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g dɑ wɑ̈ddi Ämɑn wɑ̈d Amedɑthɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́mɑn Yeud. Wɑ̈dde møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g gɑ pyɑ̈rø, nyingi gen bɑ: Pɑrcɑndɑthɑ̀, Dɑlpön, Aspɑthɑ̀, Pörɑthɑ̀, Adɑliyɑ̀, Arïdɑthɑ̀, Pɑrmɑctɑ̀, Arïsɑy, Arïdɑy kí Bɑydhɑthɑ̀. De Yeud nuti kɑ̈bbø ki jɑmmì." 
Esther9:8  
Esther9:9  
Esther9:10  
Esther9:11 Kɑ kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì Susɑ̀ köbbi rɑ̈dh, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni ceth." 
Esther9:12 Aköbbi Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Ji miy ɑ́bïj ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Yeud kì Susɑ̀ kete, kelli gen dɑ wɑ̈ddi Ämɑn pyɑ̈rø. Óbëëd ɑ́ ngø ɑ ógwøgø yi gen kì yethi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø? Á ngø ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ɑnɑn, o mëggi yïn? Kwøb gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o göggi yïn!”" 
Esther9:13 Aløøg møge yi Ester kinni, “Keløg e di dwɑddø yi yïn, wiy Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Susɑ̀ göög gen dhuki ki gïn ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Kɑ yï muuj ki cigg, o dëlli wɑ̈ddi Ämɑn gɑ pyɑ̈rø, ngɑɑb wïj gïn-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈b ki ji.”" 
Esther9:14 Kɑ rɑ̈dh omuujø ki cigg kinni gwøøg møgɑni. Kɑ ciggɑni ngɑ̈j kì Susɑ̀. Kɑ dëlli wɑ̈ddi Ämɑn gɑ pyɑ̈rø ngɑb. 
Esther9:15 Kɑ Yeud ri gen cigi gen cøngø kì Susɑ̀, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y Adɑr, kɑ ge ónɑ̈ggø ki ji miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, de ge nuti kɑ̈bbø ki jɑmmì thyew." 
Esther9:16 Yeud ri gen ɑ́cøng gen kì yethi pödhh, kɑ ge ónɑ̈gø ki ji ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj kì kelli tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen. De ge nuti kɑ̈bbø ki jɑmmì." 
Esther9:17 Menɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y Adɑr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g. Ábong-ɑ nɑ̈g kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen; de gø ɑ́gwøg gen ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tugø. 
Esther9:18 Yeud mø Susɑ̀ cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj ɑ́gwøg yi gen ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø, mɑ́ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́ngɑlli gen kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kí cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, ɑcungi gen kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj." 
Esther9:19 Bɑ bɑng menɑni ɑ nyi bëëd Yeud møg-ɑ bëëdø kì myërr-ɑ thønhø mïdh-ɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi Adɑr, ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng medi pëëth, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø, men yije tuug, kí muujø ki gïgcɑmm." 
Esther9:20 Mordekɑy møgɑni bënn ɑ́kwøbe kinni gweed gen piny, kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni öri Yeud; møg-ɑ cyɑ̈gi kí møg-ɑ lɑ̈wi kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres bënn." 
Esther9:21 Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed bɑ kinni, pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen kí pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïïj cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y Adɑr bɑ cyɑ̈nggi ywömø, kì yethi runn bënn." 
Esther9:22 Bene cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø yi Yeud. Men bene dwɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́løg kïïmø ree medi pëëth kì yï Yeud. Ge ɑ́köbbi kinni mïdhi gen cyɑ̈nggɑni gɑ cyɑ̈nggi tugø, kí muujø ki gïgcɑmm, kí kønyi ji-ɑ jɑdø." 
Esther9:23 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Mordekɑy ɑ́yïëy yi Yeud, kɑ tungɑni ogöögø ɑ́ kwöng, me nyi gwøg kì yethi runn bënn." 
Esther9:24 Ämɑn wɑ̈d Amedɑthɑ̀ kwɑɑr Agɑg, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mɑn Yeud ɑ́ceg-ɑ leng ki wél (ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Purïm) kipe kinni o yode cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ónɑ̈ge Yeud kinni tweet." 
Esther9:25 De Ester ɑ́kedhi yï rɑ̈dh, kɑ rɑ̈dh ogwëdø ki cigg mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l thøwi Ämɑn, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi nɑ̈gi Yeud. Kɑ ngɑb geki wɑ̈dde." 
Esther9:26 Bene ɑ bɑnge cwølli cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø menɑni ɑ́ Purïm, kipe wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́gwed yi Mordekɑy, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn." 
Esther9:27 Møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi Yeud kipe gen, kí kwɑrri gen, kí ji-ɑ ógöögø ki Yeud, kinni kì bøli keny-ɑni kì yij run, dɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew mø ywömø mɑ ɑ́ceg yi Mordekɑy." 
Esther9:28 Ágweed piny kinni mïdhi cyɑ̈nggi Purïm kì yethi rïjj bënn yi Yeud møg-ɑ yethi myërr, kí kɑ̈dd bënn, kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres bënn." 
Esther9:29 Kì bɑng menɑni, ɑgwëëd Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester nyɑɑr Abikɑil geki Mordekɑy, ki wɑ̈nyø me nyodh yïëyø kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mordekɑy kipe cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Purïm." 
Esther9:30 Wɑ̈nyø menɑni ɑ́gwëd-ɑ Yeud bënn, kɑ surɑ̀ mi wɑ̈nyɑni ör yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres gɑ miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Esther9:31 Kɑ cïb ɑ́ kwöng kinni mïdhi cyɑ̈nggi Purïm kì bøli kej gen ceth, ni kɑ̀ mïdhi cigg-ɑ kööbø kì ri thuumø geki ywøg. Møgɑni ɑ́ceg-ɑ yi Mordekɑy geki Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh Ester." 
Esther9:32 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi Ester kipe cyɑ̈nggi Purïm gweed yij wɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi bɑn. 
Esther10:1 Rɑ̈dh Kerkes, tyëng pödhe ɑ́cïre gwøg, geki tyëng myërri kömi nɑ̈mmì." 
Esther10:2 Gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge bënn, kí lwøbi kër-ɑ ɑ́rønye Mordekɑy, ge bɑ ɑgwed kì yij wɑ̈nyi gwøøg rɑ̈nhi Pɑres geki Mɑdɑy." 
Esther10:3 Mordekɑy wɑ̈d Yeud, en ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ókwøøm Rɑ̈dh Kerkes kiree. Ábëëd e ceg kɑ wørø yi wɑdde, Yeud. Ábëëd per wɑdde teeg kì yïe, o gï ɑ́korre ki mendwøng. Ágöög ki gïgdøj kipe wɑdde, geki nyigi gen kì yethi rïjj-ɑ óbï." 
Job1:1 Ádɑ jɑl me cwøl ɑ́ Ayub, bɑ jɑl Udh, ɑ́bëëd e nyi mɑll-ɑ Jwøk ki pyëwe bëne, Ciggi Jwøk di mïdhø yi en kidøøj, o pɑ nyi göögø ki gïnrɑj." 
Job1:2 Yïe ɑ́dɑ wɑ̈dd ɑ́bïryew ki womɑ̈nn ɑ́dɑ̈g. 
Job1:3 Yïe ɑ́dɑ dyëg ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïryew, kí ɑmɑl ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g, kí dhög ɑ́lïp ɑ́kyel, kí ɑderr miy ɑ́bïj. Ábëëd yïe dɑ bɑ̈ngg mø ngenyø thyew, ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ en ɑ kɑ̈rø ki mendwøng kì pödhh-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Job1:4 Wɑ̈ddi Ayub ɑ́bëëd ge nyii göögø ki ryëj kì gøl nyel ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, gø lunyi ge’ lunyø. Nyiimï gen, womɑ̈nn gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g, nyii cwølø yi gen o ge nywɑ̈ɑ̈g gen." 
Job1:5 Kenyi thumi cyɑ̈nggi ryëj, Ayub nyii dhwödhø kì mwøl, kɑ ongɑ̈dø ki gëdhhì møg rɑ̈bbe Jwøk, kipe nyige bënn. Ayub nyi rømm-ɑ kinni nyige óbëëd ge göögø ki orøg, wɑlɑ̀ Jwøk yɑɑny gen, ge kwïj wøw mɑwɑnø." 
Job1:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bëëni nyigi Jwøk, ɑbëën gen bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o Cethɑn ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni thyew." 
Job1:7 Apyëëj Cethɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Alöggi Cethɑn kinni, “Yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ be wïïnø’ piny.”" 
Job1:8 Kɑ Cethɑn pyëj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Pyëwí ɑ́di cïb yi yïn kömi Ayub bɑ̈ngɑ? Bong dhɑnhø me døj, me mïdhi cigg ni en kì kömi piny. Yɑ nyii mɑllø yi en, o pɑ nyi göögø ki gïnrɑj.”" 
Job1:9 Alöggi Cethɑn kinni, “Yï di wɑ̈dh-ɑ mɑllø yi Ayub, keløg e bong gïn nyi yod yi en kì yïí?" 
Job1:10 Pɑth kipe kenyi korrií geki gøle, kí jɑmme bënn? Kɑ gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi en bënn nyi gyëdh yi yïn, kɑ thödhí ki jɑmmì mø gïïr mø pɑ̈ng yij pödhø bëne." 
Job1:11 De ke cïb cingí ri jɑmme, yï otøønyø yi en ki yɑnyø!”" 
Job1:12 Aköbbi Cethɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Døj, jɑmm-ɑ yïe bënn ɑ́wïyɑ yïn, de Ayub kiree, ko pɑ̈nyí nyïɑ̈gø.” Codhe, ɑkedh Cethɑn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Job1:13 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, keny-ɑ ɑ́ying nyigi Ayub gøl ómï gen nyel-ɑ dwøng, ge ocyɑ̈mø, o ge omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg," 
Job1:14 Abëën jɑlwöödø yï Ayub kì gøle, ɑkööbe kinni, “Wø ɑ́bëëd wø opurø ki pwödhø ki kwërr-ɑ nyi ywɑjji yi wɑ̈dhh, o ɑderr ocyɑ̈mø kì keny me cyɑ̈gi." 
Job1:15 Codhe, kɑ tyëng Cebɑ̀, møg-ɑ nyi wïïnø kì pɑ̈l, ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈bø ki jɑmmi ji, pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi wøn, kɑ bɑ̈ngg nɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ jɑmmì kɑ̈l yi gen. Yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́bodh, ɑbëënɑ be köbbi yïn èn.”" 
Job1:16 E ngeti wööni tyeli mɑl nudd e okööbø, ɑbëën bɑ̈ng megø, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Dyëg geki kwɑ̈yyi dyëg ɑ́gøj yi mɑl, ge ɑ́thøw bënn, den-ɑ́ yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́bodh, ɑbëënɑ be köbbi yïn èn.”" 
Job1:17 E ngeti ryeew wööd nudd e okööbø, ɑbëën bɑ̈ng megø, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Akudd ɑ́dɑ̈g mø tyëng Kildɑn møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈bø ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wøn. Kɑ bɑ̈ngg bënn nɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ ɑmɑl kɑ̈l yi gen. Yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́bodh, ɑbëënɑ be köbbi yïn èn.”" 
Job1:18 E jɑlɑni nudd e okööbø, ɑbëën bɑ̈ng megø thyew, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Nyigí ɑ́bëëd ge ocyɑ̈mø, o ge omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg kì gøl ómï gen nyel-ɑ dwøng." 
Job1:19 Kɑ ɑtunø ókönø kì yij ryɑng, ɑdhure ød kömi nyigí, kɑ ge othøø bënn. Yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́bodh, ɑbëënɑ be köbbi yïn èn.”" 
Job1:20 Codhe, ɑdhwödhi Ayub mɑl, kɑ ógødhe kɑge, yi ywøøg yije. Kɑ wïje lyele, kɑ ree leenge piny bøle këële’ piny." 
Job1:21 Akööbe kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́nywøl yïɑ bong gïïpiny, o yɑ óthøw yïɑ bong gïïpiny. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́muuj, o en ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d ɑnɑn. Wiy nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lejji!”" 
Job1:22 Kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́cwöb bënn, Ayub nuti pɑ̈nyi gwøg ki orøg, e cɑy-ɑ Jwøk kipe møgɑni." 
Job2:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́døøg wëywöddi Jwøk ki cugø cyɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø, Cethɑn ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kelli gen thyew." 
Job2:2 Apyëjii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ be wïïnø’ piny.”" 
Job2:3 Apëjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Pyëwí ɑ́di cïb yi yïn ri Ayub bɑ̈ngɑ? Bong dhɑnhø me døj, me mïdhi ciggɑ ni en kì kömi piny. Yɑ nyii mɑllø yi en, o pɑ nyi göögø ki gïnrɑj. Yɑ ɑ́kwɑjji yi yïn kinni o Ayub göggí ki rɑj, e bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́rënye yøw. De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, Ayub cigg nudd gï mïdhe’ mïdhø ceth.”" 
Job2:4 Alöggi Cethɑn kinni, “Dhɑnhø jɑmme bënn ócuggø muujø yi en kipe kinni o nëëne." 
Job2:5 De keløg dële onywɑlø yi yïn, yï otøønyø yi en ki yɑnyø.”" 
Job2:6 Aköbbi Cethɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Døj, göggí ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, de wëye ko pɑ̈nyí ki nywɑlø.”" 
Job2:7 Codhe, ɑkedh Cethɑn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑgöjje dëël Ayub bëne mɑgø yi gwønyø me rɑj." 
Job2:8 Akedh Ayub, kɑ pëgg-ɑ yij búr, kɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki ɑ́bɑlthɑgø me gwønye kɑ̈jj-ɑ ledh kì dële." 
Job2:9 Aköbbi Ayub yi cyëge kinni, “Yï nudd yï mïdh-ɑ cigg ceth? Yɑny Jwøk o yï thøw.”" 
Job2:10 Alöggi Ayub kinni, “Yï dwøngg-ɑ yɑnggì! Gïgdøj møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Jwøk bene gen ɑ nyi yïëy? Wɑde ɑ nyi gööny wɑ kenyi bëëd e dɑ rɑj?” Kì yij orɑngɑni bëne, Ayub bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́kwøbe kì ri Jwøk." 
Job2:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng mɑ̈dhhi Ayub gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g ki rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́bï köme, ɑcøng gen ri gen, Jøgɑni bɑ Elipɑdh jɑl Temɑn, kí Bildɑd jɑl Cuɑ̀, kí Dhöpɑr jɑl Nɑɑmɑ̀. Kɑ ri gen köbbi gen kinni, o ge kedhi gen be lugii." 
Job2:12 Kɑ Ayub lidh yi gen ge nudd ge lɑ̈wi, de gø nuti ngij gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́ngij ge gøn, ɑywöngi gen, ge okïïwø. Akɑg gen ógudhi gen, kɑ tør kwøør gen wɑ̈thi gen, kì bɑng rɑ̈ɑ̈m pëthi gen kipe Ayub." 
Job2:13 Abëëd gen kì buti Ayub ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kí wɑ̈rr ɑ́bïryew, e bong dhɑnhø me löggi, mɑ́ gø ɑ́lidh yi gen kinni orɑɑng Ayub dwøng cɑrø." 
Job3:1 Codhe, ɑtug Ayub dhøge, ɑyɑnye cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywølii." 
Job3:2 Wiy cyɑ̈ng-ɑ́ yije ɑ́nywøøl yɑn lɑ̈ɑ̈nye geki wɑ̈r-ɑ́ yije ɑ́yood yɑn. 
Job3:3  
Job3:4 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, wiy cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yɑn gööge ɑ́ muudhø. Cyɑ̈ngɑni koo pɑrrí këti, wiy bëëd e bong cɑr me mënyø kì yije këti." 
Job3:5 Wiy kɑb yi muudhø geki muudhi thøø, wiy rïm yi pøøl, kɑ cyɑ̈nge gëëng." 
Job3:6 Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈rɑni wɑ̈g kì yij run, kɑ ko wëggí kwɑɑn kelli cyɑ̈ng geki dwɑ̈tti run," 
Job3:7 wiy bëëd e bong dhɑnhø me cigi yodø kì wɑ̈rɑni këti, o bong medi pëëth kì yije." 
Job3:8 Wiy cyɑ̈ngɑni thyëdh yi jøyenh, tyëng-ɑ dïdø ki tunggi Lebiyɑthɑn" 
Job3:9 Mɑ̈ɑ̈n kyeli ru wøw meny kì yije, wiy wɑ̈rɑni cöge wøwe pɑ ru." 
Job3:10 Göjjí wɑ̈rɑni cyën, kipe kɑ ɑ́wëgge yɑn nywølø yi meyɑ, kɑ yɑ göjje ryɑ̈g ki ywøøg yij." 
Job3:11 Yɑde ɑ ɑ́bɑnyɑ thøø kì yij meyɑ? Yɑde ɑ ɑ́bɑnyɑ thøø kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi yɑn piny ceth? 
Job3:12 Á kipe ngø, ɑ ɑ́mïdhi yɑn yi meyɑ kì kööre? Á kipe ngø, ɑ ɑ́dhwødhe yɑn ki thïnhe?" 
Job3:13 Ti riɑ ywööm yɑn ke di thøwɑ," 
Job3:14 ti yɑ buud nɑ rorr geki jɑgg møg-ɑ ɑ́gëëd ki kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø kɑ̈ge dööng. 
Job3:15 Yɑ di buud nɑ nyiirɑ̈dhh møg-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ng kɑ̈lli gen ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø cøn," 
Job3:16 wɑlɑ̀ ti yɑ buud nɑ dhɑnhø men-ɑ ónywølø e thøø. 
Job3:17 Tyëngrijjø pɑ nyi røngø kì yij rörø, o tyëng-ɑ pïdø yi gwøg, nyii ywömø kenyi thøw gen." 
Job3:18 Cɑgg ɑ́ ɑmɑgg, ge nyii yïddø ki mër, mɑ́ e bong jɑnggø kí cigg mø teg." 
Job3:19 Ji bënn, tyëng-ɑ bong per gen, kí tyëng-ɑ per gen teg pɑ̈r, bong dhɑnhø me bɑ bɑ̈ng ngɑn megø." 
Job3:20 Á kipe ngø ɑ thödhi dhɑnhø me ying yij orɑng ki cɑr? Á kipe ngø ɑ thödhi tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen pɑ med ki nënnì. 
Job3:21 Tyëng-ɑ cwølli thøø, de pɑ bï. Ge dwɑdd-ɑ thøø kibøli kɑ̈r." 
Job3:22 Pëthi gen nyi mïn-ɑ́ɑ̀ kenyi rum gen ki thøø; 
Job3:23 Gïn-ɑ óbï kömi gen dhuki megø, bɑ ɑkɑn yi Jwøk; yëthi gen bɑ ɑcyëg yi Jwøk kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Job3:24 Yɑ pɑ cuggi cɑm yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ geki mïïdø. Mïïdø men-ɑ pyëwɑ pɑ thumi. 
Job3:25 Gïn-ɑ nyi böggi yi yɑn ki mendwøng nyi bï ɑ́ dyër. 
Job3:26 Yïɑ bong mër kí ywömø, o ɑkørrɑ pɑ thumi." 
Job4:1 Ayub, pyëwí ódi rënyø keløg yɑ okööbø ki yïn? Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, yɑ pɑ kudø thyew." 
Job4:2  
Job4:3 Ji mø gïïr ɑ́pwönyi yi yïn, tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen nyøødh ɑ́cïj yi yïn." 
Job4:4 Kwøbbí, ngɑn thɑ̈mmi ɑ́nyudhi yi gen ki yöö, kɑ ótëngø kɑ ɑ́cïïjii yi yïn." 
Job4:5 Anɑn bɑ yïn ɑ lunyi yïddø ki ɑkørr; pyëwí ede ɑ nyönhe keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën rɑj kömí? 
Job4:6 Yï nyi kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk, o bëëdí døøj. Adɑ́ bëëd yïí dɑ yïëyø geki ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Job4:7 Kwøb ngɑndøj mɑ ɑ́wöl ki nɑ̈gø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑntir me wïje pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Job4:8 Áyod yi yɑn kinni tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈g rɑj, bɑ rɑj ɑ nyi kɑj yi gen; ɑnɑn ge kɑj-ɑ gïgrijjø geki rɑj." 
Job4:9 Jwøk kenyi rënyi pyëwe, nyi ködd-ɑ kömi gen ni ɑtunø, kɑ gï nɑ̈ge." 
Job4:10 Tyëngrijjø nyi ngɑ̈rri nɑ ngurrì, de dhøggi gen nyii mijø yi Jwøk, kɑ leggi gïn nyi tørre." 
Job4:11 Ngur, ɑ teg nyii thøø kenyi bëëd e bong lɑ̈y me mɑg yi en, mɑɑdh ngur nywøle nyii tɑyø yi kɑ̈j." 
Job4:12 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel wöödø ɑ́kwɑ̈ɑ̈l yïɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, møg-ɑ ɑ́möngi ɑ́lïngɑ, ge nɑ lɑ̈ggi wɑ̈r," 
Job4:13 Yɑ nyi tyëg wɑ̈r yɑ ceg-ɑ pɑ̈yyø," 
Job4:14 kɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø me dwøng bï-ɑ kömɑ, kɑ dëlɑ nyii kïïrø bëne." 
Job4:15 Yømø ɑ́göjji yethi nyingɑ, kɑ dëlɑ ceg-ɑ ì dïïng." 
Job4:16 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki gïïpiny me cungi kì bølɑ, de nuti ngij yɑn mɑ løge’ ngø. Codhe, ɑlïngɑ ki cwɑg mø kööbø kinni," 
Job4:17 “Dɑ dhɑnhø me tir kibøli Jwøk? Dɑ dhɑnhø me døøj kibøli Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jii? 
Job4:18 Jwøk nyii yïddø ki bɑ̈jjø kì ri bɑ̈ngge kì mɑl, cɑgg ɑ́ kì ri wëywödde thyew." 
Job4:19 Yï orumø kinni bene tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j ki lɑ̈bø ɑ óngɑ̈dh yi en, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ lɑ̈bø me cuggi nyøngø ni ɑ́cungø?" 
Job4:20 Dhɑnhø ócuggø bëëdø e nud kì mwøl, kɑ othøø kì böörø e kwïj, kɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø gïti ɑtheer." 
Job4:21 Kɑ jɑmme bënn kwɑny, ɑ́thøw e peli wïj men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk, nuti yood en.”" 
Job5:1 Pɑ̈nyí cwöd ɑnɑn Ayub, men-ɑ ódi ngɑn-ɑ ólöggi, dɑ wëywödd mø yï gen óyömmi yi yïn?" 
Job5:2 Mɑngø yi liny nyi nɑ̈g-ɑ ngɑn wïje nøg, o good nyi nɑ̈g-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ pyëwe nøg." 
Job5:3 Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki ngɑn wïje nøg me pëggi piny kidøøj, de cyën nyi jwɑn-ɑ bëën köme." 
Job5:4 Kɑ nywøle nyi wiye piny, e bong ngɑn køny gen ki gøny kì burø." 
Job5:5 Kɑ jɑmme cɑm yi tyëng-ɑ ri gen di kɑ̈j, cɑgg ɑ́ byell-ɑ twïyø kì kelli koodh, kɑ kɑ̈re mod yi tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen døngø." 
Job5:6 Rɑj pɑ nyi twïy kì yij lɑ̈bø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑkørr pɑ nyi twïy kì piny." 
Job5:7 De dhɑnhø nyi nyöll-ɑ orɑng, ni lebbi mɑc ɑ nyi töngi mɑl." 
Job5:8 Keløg yɑ bɑ yïn, yɑ di døøg-ɑ kö Jwøk, kɑ møgɑ gönyɑ en." 
Job5:9 Gïgdøngø møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi en, pɑ nyi gɑm yi wɑ̈thee, gïïngɑ̈ngø møge pɑ cuggi kwɑnø." 
Job5:10 Piny nyi nënge’ nëngø ki kødh, kɑ pwödh nënge ki pï." 
Job5:11 Tyëng-ɑ bɑ mööl nyi tïnge’ mɑl, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kïïmø nyi thödhe ki medi pëëth." 
Job5:12 Rɑjji tyëngrijjø nyi ngwøje’ ngwøjø, cɑgg ge pel ni ngø, gï nyii mɑgø yi en ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli gen, kɑ gïg-ɑ di gwøg yi gen nyii dhɑ̈lø." 
Job5:13  
Job5:14 Ge thɑ̈m-ɑ́ɑ̀ yij muudhø, cɑgg piny bɑ dicɑ̈ng." 
Job5:15 De tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn nyii yielø yi Jwøk kì yij thøø, kɑ gï nyi yiele kenyi guud nyingi gen." 
Job5:16 Tyëng-ɑ jɑdø nyi wëgge’ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ dhøggi tyëngrijjø mije." 
Job5:17 Ngɑn-ɑ nyi tyeny yi Jwøk ree dɑ gyëdh! Yï ko bɑny cegø yi Áyïmø. 
Job5:18 Jwøk, kedd-ɑ nyi muuje, nyi kode kodø. Nyii kɑ̈nø ki kedø, kɑ gø nyi wëgge nøggø." 
Job5:19 Yï órïïj yï yiele yielø kì yethi rɑj. 
Job5:20 Yï óyiel yi en ki thøø kì yij kɑ̈j, kɑ yï yiele ki thøø kì yij liny." 
Job5:21 Yï óyiel yi en ki gööj lebbi ji møøgø, kɑ yï yiele kenyi bëën ryɑ̈g." 
Job5:22 Yï óngedhi kì yij kɑ̈j kí yij ryɑ̈g, yï koo böggi yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Job5:23 Pwödhí óbong mødø kì yije, kömí koo pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Job5:24 Yï óbëëdø ki mër, bong dyelí men-ɑ óyɑb yi yïn e tøøk." 
Job5:25 Kwɑnni nyigí óbëëd ge gïïr ni yïthhi lum kì pɑ̈l. 
Job5:26 Yï ókony yï yöø, ni kenyi cyeg gemè bøli kej nyɑre ceth." 
Job5:27 Ayub, møgɑni thɑ́ gen ɑ́yɑb yi wøn kɑ keny me bɑ̈r. Ge bɑ dyër; yïëy gen ɑnɑn." 
Job6:1 Ke røm ryɑ̈gɑ geki orɑngɑ ki midhɑn," 
Job6:2  
Job6:3 ge di bëëd ge peeg kibøli ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø, wu ko ngɑ̈ng yi rɑ̈ji kwøbbɑ." 
Job6:4 Áyïmø yɑ ɑ́gøje ki weth, kɑ yɑ kuug yi nyɑɑr weth. Jwøk yɑ ɑ́kölle böggø yi rɑjj-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈le kömɑ." 
Job6:5 Aderø pɑ nyi ywöngi kenyi di lum me cɑm yi en, wɑlɑ̀ dhyɑng pɑ nyi ywöngi e ocyɑ̈mø ki lum." 
Job6:6 Gïn bɑd ócuggø’ cɑmø ree bong omelø? Wɑlɑ̀ dɑ medø kì ri ólɑmi tøng gyenø? 
Job6:7 Gïgcɑmm-ɑ ni møgɑni pɑ kønø kì pyëwɑ, pyëwɑ ceg-ɑ lɑ̈mmø yi gen." 
Job6:8 Ede Jwøk ɑ pɑ mëgge yɑn gïn-ɑ cwøllɑ? Ede kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑ pɑ løøge gøn? 
Job6:9 Keløg e ócuggø, pödhe bøle, kɑ yɑ nɑ̈ge!" 
Job6:10 Keløg e ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yɑ ónɑ̈g yi en, yɑ di pɑ̈rri yi medi pyëw, cɑgg dëlɑ rɑ̈mø ni ngø. Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni Jwøk bɑ kwërø, o kwøbbe nuti pyeem yɑn." 
Job6:11 Dɑ tegø me nudd e mïdh-ɑ yɑn yɑ onëënø? Á kipe ngø ɑ nudd yɑ onëënø, e bong gïn ngɑ̈dh yi yɑn?" 
Job6:12 Dëlɑ teg nɑ kït wɑlɑ̀ bɑ ngyënyø? 
Job6:13 Bong tegø kì yïɑ men yieelɑ riɑ, bong keny yömmɑ kipe kinni o yɑ køny." 
Job6:14 Kì yethi rɑj mø ni møg, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ mɑ̈dhh mø døøj, cɑgg Áyïmø wiy yɑn piny wɑlɑ̀ nuti." 
Job6:15 De yɑ ɑ́wëny yi wun mɑ̈dhhɑ, ni nɑ̈mmì møg-ɑ nyi dwön kenyi bëëd e bong kødh." 
Job6:16 Nɑ̈mm-ɑ nyi pɑ̈ng kì cwir," 
Job6:17 de kenyi lënhi piny, pï nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, kɑ yij pyëën nɑm odöngø e thwøwø, e bong gïn ying yije." 
Job6:18 Kɑ wëll-ɑ yɑ̈bø ki pï wɑ̈nyy-ɑ pɑ̈l, kɑ ge othøø." 
Job6:19 Kwï wëllɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Cebɑ̀ kí Temɑ̀, ge oyɑ̈bø ki pï," 
Job6:20 de wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́muum keny-ɑ ɑ́yuud gen nɑ̈mmì ge thwøwø. 
Job6:21 Kì yïɑ, wu nɑ nɑ̈mmɑni ceth, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh wun orɑngɑ, wu ɑ́yöd wu ceg-ɑ bwøgø." 
Job6:22 Yɑ ɑ́di kwøb kinni thödhu yɑn ki gïïpiny? Wɑlɑ̀ kinni kwɑjji wun ngɑn megø ki ngyëny kiperɑ? 
Job6:23 Wɑlɑ̀ kinni yielu yɑn kì cingi ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn teg kibølɑ?" 
Job6:24 Døj, pwönyu yɑn, nyudhu yɑn bɑ̈jjɑ, o yɑ kudɑ." 
Job6:25 Kwøbb-ɑ yethi gen bong ɑ́dud, yï gen dɑ tegø, dɑ́ ngø ɑ ógwøg yi cɑ́y-ɑ cɑyyu yɑn?"
