Psalms59:9 Yɑ gɑ̈nn-ɑ tegí, yïn ɑ yïí nyi yömmɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøk." 
Psalms59:10 Yɑ mɑɑr yi Jwøgɑ, óbï be kønyi yɑn, yɑ ówëgge lidhi tyɑmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms59:11 Ge ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g Jwøgɑ, kipe wɑ̈thi jiɑ ówïl. Kedhhí gen ki tegí, kɑ ge tyɑɑm. Wuö bene yïn ngɑn-ɑ korri wøn." 
Psalms59:12 Dhøggi gen dɑ orøg, kwøbbi gen bënn bɑ kwøbbi orøg. Wiy ge mɑg yi orøøg gen, mɑ́ ge ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈dø o ge ceg-ɑ pyed," 
Psalms59:13 nɑ̈g gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwí, nɑ̈g gen kinni tweet. O yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni bɑ Jwøk ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì Isrɑil, o lɑ̈ge tyëg-ɑ kömi piny bëne." 
Psalms59:14 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyi dwöög-ɑ́ɑ̀ böörø, ge gwɑ̈yø nɑ gwögg, kɑ̀ wïïn gen kì tøggi kɑɑl," 
Psalms59:15 ge nɑ gwögg møg yɑ̈bø ki gïncɑm, ge nyi ceg-ɑ ngɑ̈rrø ke nøg gïncɑmɑni." 
Psalms59:16 De yɑn, yɑ ówör yɑ lejj-ɑ tegí, yɑ ówör yɑ óryeerø yethi cyɑ̈ng kipe kɑ̀ mɑɑr yɑn. Bɑ yïn ɑ yïí nyi yömmɑ, yï bɑ kwödɑ kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj." 
Psalms59:17 Yï ólenhɑ, yïn ɑ nyi korri yɑn. Jwøk ɑ yïe nyi yömmɑ, yɑ nyi yömm-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ mɑɑr yɑn." 
Psalms60:1 Wø ɑ́bɑny yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, pyëwí ɑ́rënyi ki wøn, de ɑnɑn, dwöög yï wøn." 
Psalms60:2 Piny ɑ́wëggí onhɑ̈nh, kɑ wëggí kɑggø, ɑnɑn wiy cige tëngø, kɑ burre cyëëg." 
Psalms60:3 Jií ɑ́köllí orɑng me dwøng, me cyerri gen ni tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø." 
Psalms60:4 Tyëng-ɑ böggi yïn ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki nyudhø o rɑj kyëj gen. 
Psalms60:5 Yiel wøn ki tegí, løøg kwɑ̈jji wøn, o tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn yiel." 
Psalms60:6 Jwøk ɑ́kööb kì kej kwëre kinni, “Cekïm ópɑ̈ng yi yɑn ki tegɑ, kɑ Töör Suköth pɑ̈ngɑ kì kelli jiɑ." 
Psalms60:7 Gilyɑd geki Mɑnɑsè bɑ møgɑ, Eprɑim bɑ ɑcudh wïjɑ. o Yeudɑ̀ bɑ lodhɑ." 
Psalms60:8 Moɑb bɑ luy-ɑ nyi lwøggɑ, Edöm bɑ miɑ, wɑrrɑ óleengɑ yije, yɑ nyodh-ɑ kinni bɑ miɑ. Pelistiyɑ̀ ótyɑmɑ kɑ yɑ otwɑyø kì yije.”" 
Psalms60:9 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, ɑ́ men ókïdhi yɑn kɑɑl-ɑ thøø yi gerø? Á men ɑ ópeej yɑn Edöm?" 
Psalms60:10 Wø ɑ́ceg kɑ bɑnyø yi yïn kidyër? Yï ókedhi be kønyi wøn ki liny? 
Psalms60:11 Køny wøn ki liny ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mɑ́ kunyi dhɑnhø bong døøje." 
Psalms60:12 Wø ótyɑ̈mø, mɑ́ Jwøk ying-ɑ tuung wøn, bɑ en ɑ ótyɑm tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms61:1 Yïn ɑ Jwøk lïngí ywøgɑ. Lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ! 
Psalms61:2 Kì yij pɑ̈l, e minɑ cödø, ɑ ɑ́cwølɑ yïn! Yieel yɑn keny døj," 
Psalms61:3 mɑ́ yïn ɑ nyi korri yɑn, yïn ɑ korri yɑn kipe tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms61:4 Wiy yɑ bëëdɑ kì kej kwërí, kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëënɑ bënn, wiy yɑ nyi pɑ̈nɑ thɑ̈thi obërrí." 
Psalms61:5 Köngɑ ɑ́lïngí, yïn ɑ Jwøk, kɑ yɑ thödhí ki gïg-ɑ nyi mëggí tyëng-ɑ böggi yïn." 
Psalms61:6 Med runni rɑ̈dh o ge ngënyi gen wiy lɑ̈ge wɑ̈dhe ri kwɑrre! 
Psalms61:7 Wiy jyɑ̈ge kì bølí gïti ɑtheer, Korrí ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií geki dyër møgí" 
Psalms61:8 Nyingí ólenhɑ ki wör gïti ɑtheer, kenyi mëggɑ yïn gïg-ɑ ɑ́köngɑ yïn yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Psalms62:1 Yɑ yïd-ɑ Jwøk, yɑ okudø, mɑ́ e kete ɑ óyiel yɑn." 
Psalms62:2 E kete ɑ korri yɑn, yɑ óyiele, en ɑ nyi cwɑg yɑn o yɑ koo tyɑm kinni tek." 
Psalms62:3 Wu gït-ɑ wɑɑng wu cyedd-ɑ dhɑnhø me ni dörø me pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø? 
Psalms62:4 Wu dwɑdd-ɑ cøørii piny kì kej dhwɑ̈nge, wu mɑɑr-ɑ pyed, wu kømm-ɑ gyëdh ki dhøggi wun, de wu lɑmm-ɑ cyën ki pëthi wun." 
Psalms62:5 Yɑ yïd-ɑ Jwøk yɑ okudø mɑ́ e kete ɑ ngɑ̈dhɑ. 
Psalms62:6 E kete ɑ korri yɑn, yɑ óyiele en ɑ nyi cwɑg yɑn, o yɑ koo tyɑm kinni tek." 
Psalms62:7 Yɑ óyiel-ɑ yi Jwøk, dhwɑ̈ngɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïe, en ɑ nyi korri yɑn kidøøj, en ɑ yïe nyi yömmɑ." 
Psalms62:8 Gɑ̈nnu Jwøk yethi cyɑ̈ng, wun ɑ teedø. Kïdhu rɑjji wun bënn bøle, mɑ́ en ɑ yïe nyi yömmi." 
Psalms62:9 Dhɑnhø bëne nɑ kudhø ki yømø, møg-ɑ døngø ki møg-ɑ thønhø, pɑ̈r bënn. Ke røm gen ki rumi, ge yööd kibøli kudhø ki yømø." 
Psalms62:10 Wu ko gɑ̈nni tegi wun, wu ko ngɑ̈dh kɑ̈b, pëthi wun ko cïb wun kömi kɑ̈rì cɑgg ge ngenyø ni ngø." 
Psalms62:11 Jwøk ɑ́lïngɑ e okööbø tyel mø gïïr kinni, tegø bɑ mee," 
Psalms62:12 o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee bong cöge. Men-ɑ́ yïn kirií, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dhɑnhø bëne nyi mëggí köggi gwøge ceth." 
Psalms63:1 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, bene yïn Jwøgɑ, yïn ɑ kønø kì pyëwɑ. Dëlɑ bëne dwɑdd-ɑ yïn, pyëwɑ bëne kønø kɑ perí, ni piny-ɑ thwøwø kenyi dwɑdde pï." 
Psalms63:2 Wiy tegí lidhɑ geki dhwɑ̈ngí, wiy yï lidhɑ kì kej kwërí." 
Psalms63:3 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií lɑ̈w kibøli nënnì kiree, o yï ólenhɑ kì bɑng døøjí." 
Psalms63:4 Yï ópøjjɑ kì kɑɑm-ɑ nëënɑ bëne, cinggɑ ótïngɑ mɑl, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn." 
Psalms63:5 Pyëwɑ óyɑ̈ng kɑ bong-ɑ gïn cɑ̈nnii yï ólenhɑ ki wörri medi pyëw. 
Psalms63:6 Yï nyii pɑrø yi yɑn kenyi buddɑ, yɑ nyi tyëg wɑ̈r bëne yɑ rømm-ɑ yïn," 
Psalms63:7 mɑ́ yïn ɑ nyi køny yɑn ceth. Yɑ nyii wörø ki medi pyëwɑ kì tïbí. 
Psalms63:8 Pyëwɑ ying-ɑ rií, o yɑ korri yi yïn kɑ tegí." 
Psalms63:9 De tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yɑn, ge ókedhi piny pödhi tyëngthøø." 
Psalms63:10 Ge ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, kɑ ge cɑm yi óthönhì." 
Psalms63:11 De rɑ̈dh pyëwe ówëggi mïnø yi Jwøk, kipe kɑ ɑ́wëgge gøn tyɑ̈mø. Jwøk ólenhi yi tyëng-ɑ nyi köngi ki nyinge, de tyëngpyed dhøggi gen ócyëëg." 
Psalms64:1 Lïngí cwɑggɑ yïn ɑ Jwøk; yɑ ying-ɑ yethi rɑj! Yɑ bögg-ɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, yiel wëyɑ!" 
Psalms64:2 Korrí yɑn ki rɑjj-ɑ dwɑddi göggi yɑn yi tyëngrijjø. 
Psalms64:3 Lebbi gen ɑ́pɑg gen ni pil, kwøbbi gen rijjø ni wethh." 
Psalms64:4 Ge nyi tuumø ge pɑ böggi ki ɑyɑ̈r; ge nyi tyer-ɑ rënyi tyëngdøj ki kwøbbi pyed. 
Psalms64:5 Ge cïjj-ɑ ri gen ki gøggi rɑj, ge kømm-ɑ kwøbbi cegi ji ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli gen ge okööbø kinni, “Bong ngɑn lidh ɑ́kɑ̈llɑni.”" 
Psalms64:6 Ge rømm-ɑ gøggi rɑj, ge okööbø kinni, “Gwøgi rɑjjɑni ɑ́pyël yi wɑ kidøøj.” Rumm-ɑ pyëw dhɑnhø pɑ cuggi yodø." 
Psalms64:7 De ge ópwöd ki weth yi Jwøk, kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ yïddø ki kedd." 
Psalms64:8 Gï órënye kì bɑng rɑ̈ji lebbi gen, tyëng-ɑ ólidh gen bënn, wɑ̈thi gen óken yi gen." 
Psalms64:9 Codhe, o ji bënn bwøg gen, o ge rum gen kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk, o gï nyi köbbi gen ji." 
Psalms64:10 Wiy pëthi tyëngtir mïni gen, kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Ge óyömmi yïe, ólenhi yi tyëngdøj bënn." 
Psalms65:1 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, yï myëër ki lenhø yi wøn kì Dhɑyøn, wø mïdh-ɑ köngi wøn kiperí," 
Psalms65:2 mɑ́ yïn ɑ nyi løøg kwɑ̈jji wøn! Ji óbï yïí ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑ̈jj bënn 
Psalms65:3 kipe lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøøg gen, Wø nyii tyɑmø yi orøøg wøn, de lɑɑwí nyi dwöögí piny kiper wøn." 
Psalms65:4 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn ri gen dɑ gyëdh, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn be bëëdø kì kej kwërí. Wø óyɑ̈ng yi gïgdøj mø ødí, wø óyɑ̈ng yi gyëdhhi Kengí kwërø." 
Psalms65:5 Kwɑ̈jji wøn nyi løøg yi yïn kɑ wëggi wøn tyɑ̈mø, kɑ yï nyii göögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kipe yieli wøn. Ji kì kömi piny bëne, kí tyëng-ɑ løøg nɑ̈mmi omelø møg-ɑ lɑ̈wi ge gɑ̈nn-ɑ yïn." 
Psalms65:6 Kïttì ɑ́cïb-ɑ yi yïn kɑ̈jji gen ki tegí, yï nyodh-ɑ tegí, teng-ɑ dwøng." 
Psalms65:7 Apɑgi nɑ̈mmi omelø nyii cuungø yi yïn, kɑ ge nyi ceg-ɑ ì lïïw, kɑ tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø nyi göjjí kudø." 
Psalms65:8 Lɑ̈bø bëne óböggø yi gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn. Gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yïn, ge nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ medi pëëth kì yij piny bëne." 
Psalms65:9 Piny ɑ́këëm yi yïn kɑ nëngí ki kødh, kɑ gwøg yi yïn ɑ́ piny me lɑ̈be med. Nɑ̈mmì ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi yïn ki pï, kɑ piny thödhí ki byel. Bene kër-ɑ nyi gwøgí ɑnɑn." 
Psalms65:10 Pwödh ɑ́ödí ki kødh me ngenyø, kɑ ge wëggí cung ki pï, lɑ̈bø ɑ́wëggí nyönhø yi kødh, kɑ byel wëggí twïyø." 
Psalms65:11 Piny ɑ́thödhí ki byel mø ngenyø ki mendwøng mø twɑ̈li kì yij piny bëne. 
Psalms65:12 Cɑ̈mmi dhög ɑ́mɑ̈rri yi lum, tyëng thɑ̈thi kïttì pëthi gen ɑ́mïni." 
Psalms65:13 Tör pɑ̈ng yi dyëg, pwödh pɑ̈ng yi gemè. Jɑmmì bënn ceg-ɑ wör pëthi gen omedø." 
Psalms66:1 Lenhu Jwøk ki wöri medi pyëw, wun ɑ ji bënn!" 
Psalms66:2 Lenhu dönge ki wör, lenhu döngi dhwɑ̈nge!" 
Psalms66:3 Köbbu Jwøk kinni, “Yï nyi gøgg-ɑ gïg mø pëddi döng, Tegí dwøng cɑrø nyi wëgg-ɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bøødhi ri gen piny kì bølí." 
Psalms66:4 Dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny mɑll-ɑ yïn, ge lenh-ɑ yïn ki wör, ge lenh-ɑ nyingí ki wör!”" 
Psalms66:5 Bïu lidhu gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk, lidhu gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge kipe dhɑnhø." 
Psalms66:6 Nɑɑm omelø ɑ́løge keny thwøwø, nɑm ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi kweyyee ki tyelli gen. Pëthee ɑ́mïni kì kunɑni kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Psalms66:7 Jyɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ tege e gïti ɑtheer kɑ pödhh bënn nyi nenne ceth. Wiy bëëd e bong ji mø muddi gen tëngi ki en. 
Psalms66:8 Lenhu Jwøgee, wun ɑ pödhh bënn, wiy cwɑgg-ɑ lenhii lïngi." 
Psalms66:9 Wɑ ɑ́mïdhe wɑ onëënø, wɑ nuti mëggi thøø yi en." 
Psalms66:10 Wø ɑ́rɑng yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, ni kenyi leeny ɑ́tegø ki mɑc, o dhïwe, wø ɑ́rɑng yi yïn ni menɑni." 
Psalms66:11 Wø ɑ́kïdhí yethi ɑ́kɑ̈llì kɑ wø tor yi yïn ki tyëddi gïg mø peeg. 
Psalms66:12 Wø ɑ́wëggí nyønø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ wø wëggí twïy wɑ̈g kì yij mɑc geki pï, codhe ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn yij piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med." 
Psalms66:13 Yɑ ókɑ̈ni ødí ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b, kɑ köngɑ nyi mïdhɑ ceth." 
Psalms66:14 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ge ógwøgɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ yethi rɑj, ge ógöggɑ yïn ceth." 
Psalms66:15 Yï ónëngɑ ki dyëg mø rɑ̈b kì wïj këli lɑm, kɑ yï ngɑ̈dd-ɑ ki dyëg geki dhög gɑ gëdhhì kɑ tol wɑ̈dh-ɑ mɑl." 
Psalms66:16 Bïu lïng wun, wu tyëng-ɑ böggi Jwøk bënn, o wu köbbɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge yɑn." 
Psalms66:17 Yɑ ɑ́ywøøg kööre kinni kønye yɑn, kɑ lenhɑ ki wör." 
Psalms66:18 Keløg orøgɑ di kɑn yi yɑn, cwɑggɑ pɑ di lïngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms66:19 De cwɑggɑ ɑ́lïngi yi Jwøk kidyër, kɑ kwɑ̈jjɑ lïnge." 
Psalms66:20 Yɑ lenh-ɑ Jwøk, mɑ́ kwɑ̈jjɑ nuti bɑɑny en, pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ceth ki yɑn." 
Psalms67:1 Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn yïn ɑ Jwøk kɑ wø gyëëdh, lug thɑ̈wwí, kɑ pyëwí lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki wøn," 
Psalms67:2 o gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn yod yi lɑ̈bø bëne, o yïëdø mií yod yi pödhh bënn." 
Psalms67:3 Wiy yï lenhi yi dhɑnhø bëne, yïn ɑ Jwøk, wiy yï lenhi yi ji bënn!" 
Psalms67:4 Wiy ji bënn lejji gen yïn ki medi pëëth, mɑ́ ji jɑɑg yi yïn kɑ gøggi dyër yïn ɑ bɑ pënyi ji bënn kì kömi piny." 
Psalms67:5 Wiy yï lenhi yi dhɑnhø bëne, yïn ɑ Jwøk, wiy yï lenhi yi ji bënn." 
Psalms67:6 Byel ɑ́cyeg kì yij piny bëne, Jwøk wɑ ɑ́gyëdhe; wɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøgee." 
Psalms67:7 Wɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi Jwøk, wiy wør yi ji bënn kì kömi piny bëne." 
Psalms68:1 Jwøk ɑ́dhwödhi mɑl kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kedhhe. Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii ɑ́tyɑme kɑ ge órengø. 
Psalms68:2 Ge nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈ny nɑ yïrø kenyi køølii yi yømø, tyëngrijjø pɑ nyi cungi kì bøli Jwøk ge nyi nøy nɑ kenyi leeny cemɑ̀ yi mɑc." 
Psalms68:3 De tyëngtir pëthi gen nyii mïnø kɑ ge otugø kì bøle. 
Psalms68:4 Lenhu nyingi Jwøk ki wör, tyenyu yuu ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈lli yethi pøøl nyinge bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, med pëthi wun kì bøle!" 
Psalms68:5 Ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì kej kwëre, en ɑ konggi kïjj geki thwömm." 
Psalms68:6 Tyëng-ɑ bong wɑddi gen nyi nënge’ nëngø ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd gen, ɑmɑgg nyi göönye’ wɑ̈g, kɑ pëthi gen nyii mïnø yi kɑ ɑ́gøøny gen, de tyëng-ɑ muddi gen teeg, óbëëd ɑ yij piny me lïïwø." 
Psalms68:7 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, keny-ɑ ɑ́pyejji jií, keny-ɑ ɑ́cør yij ryɑng," 
Psalms68:8 piny ɑ́kïïr, kɑ kødh me dwøng ómɑ̈gø, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Jwøøg Sinɑy; møgɑni ɑ́cwöb kì ri bëëni Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Psalms68:9 Yï ɑ́muuj ki kødh me ngenyø, kɑ pinyí, piny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi døøg ki tyenyø." 
Psalms68:10 Kɑ jií pëgg-ɑ yij pinyɑni, kɑ ge thödhí ki gïncɑm kì bɑng døøjí." 
Psalms68:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́muuj cigg, kɑ kwøbbɑni kɑ̈lli yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mø gïïr kinni," 
Psalms68:12 “Rɑ̈nhì ɑ́rengi geki yɑ̈yyi gen!” Kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑb pɑ̈ngi yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn kì pɑc. 
Psalms68:13 wu óni ɑkur men-ɑ ódhyɑɑwø ki ɑ́tegø o obërre ógidø ki dhɑb me rɑ̈nggø. (Gede kwï wun ɑ ɑ́pëggi gen yethi lwɑ̈ggi dyëg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny?) 
Psalms68:14 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhhi rɑ̈nhì yi Áyïmø kì Kïti Dhɑlmön, ɑ́piy ɑ́göjje dyëëm piny kì kenyɑni." 
Psalms68:15 Kïti Bɑcɑn, yï bɑ kït me teg, me oledhhe gïïr." 
Psalms68:16 Yïde ɑ nëën yï ceg-ɑ byënyø kipe kɑ̀ bëëd yï bɑ̈r? Yïde ɑ benyi kïn-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøk ɑ́ keny bëëde? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëdø kì wïje gïti ɑtheer! 
Psalms68:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ kej kwëre, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Sinɑy e kɑ̈l-ɑ yɑ̈thi liny mø gïïr mø teg." 
Psalms68:18 Kedhi Kïti Dhɑyøn e ókɑ̈dø ki ɑmɑgg, ɑ́thödhi ki jɑmmì yi ji-ɑ muddi gen teg. Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëdø kì kunɑni." 
Psalms68:19 Lenhu Wë ngɑn-ɑ tyëddi ɑkørree yethi cyɑ̈ng, en ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ nyi yiel wɑ." 
Psalms68:20 Jwøgee bɑ Jwøng nyi yïëdø bene Wë, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ nyi yiel wɑ ki thøø." 
Psalms68:21 Jwøk wɑ̈thi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ómøde ceth, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ tyer yuu orøg." 
Psalms68:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun ódwöögɑ kì Bɑcɑn, ge ódwöögɑ kì tyeli nɑɑm omeli dwøng," 
Psalms68:23 o wu lwöddi wun kì yethi remmi gen, o ge cɑm yi gwöggi wun pïd keny-ɑ óyɑ̈ng gen.”" 
Psalms68:24 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, tyɑ̈mí ɑ́lidh yi dhɑnhø bëne, eni kedhi Jwøk, rɑ̈dhɑ kej kwëre." 
Psalms68:25 Jøwör ɑ mɑl, o bödhhi thøm ɑ cyɑ̈n, womɑ̈nn ying-ɑ dïdyër, ge pwöd-ɑ bull-ɑ thønhø, ge owörø kinni," 
Psalms68:26 “Lenhu Jwøk kì yij buri jie, lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob bënn!”" 
Psalms68:27 Gøl Ben Yɑmïn, gøl-ɑ nøg, ɑ kwöngi ki bëënø codhe o pëjji Yeudiyɑ̀ geki jii gen lunyi gen ki bëënø, o bɑng gen bëën yi pëjji Dhebulun geki Nɑptɑlì." 
Psalms68:28 Nyodh tegí yïn ɑ Jwøk, teng-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg kipe wøn," 
Psalms68:29 kì Kengí kì Yerusɑlem, kun-ɑ muuj yïn ki jɑmmì yi rɑ̈nhì." 
Psalms68:30 Cɑ̈wwí Rïp, eni lɑ̈y-ɑ ying kelli ókud, cɑ̈wwí pödhh-ɑ teg ɑ ni wɑ̈dhh, gïti keny-ɑ óbøødh gen ri gen piny kì bølí, kɑ yï muuj gen ki ɑ́tegø. Kedhhí tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen med ki liny!" 
Psalms68:31 Ji óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp, tyëng Kuc, cinggi gen tïng gen mɑl ge kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk." 
Psalms68:32 Wör wun wu lenh-ɑ Jwøk, wun ɑ pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhì kì kömi piny, lenhu Wë ki wör," 
Psalms68:33 eni ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈lli mɑl mɑl, ngɑn-ɑ kɑ̈lli mɑl-ɑ weenø. Lïngu en kɑ̀ kööbe cwɑgge teeg." 
Psalms68:34 Töng wun kwøbbi tegi Jwøk, geki dönge kì Isrɑil, kí tege kì mɑl." 
Psalms68:35 Jwøk böggi nɑ ngø kenyi bëëne kì kej kwëre! Jwøøg Isrɑil! Jie nyi thödhe’ thödhø ki tegø. Lenhu Jwøk! 
Psalms69:1 Yiel yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøk! Mɑ́ pï ɑ́wɑ̈nhi munɑ." 
Psalms69:2 Yɑ ɑ́ludhi yij ɑ́bubudh, bong keny këëlɑ tyelɑ, Yɑ ying-ɑ yij lol, o yɑ køm-ɑ mudø yi ɑpɑgø." 
Psalms69:3 Yɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r yi ywøg, cwɑggɑ ɑ́thwøw. Nyingɑ ɑ́töd, ge ɑ́dhëg yi yɑbi kunyí, yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ." 
Psalms69:4 Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈dhi yɑn ki mɑɑnø, kwɑnni gen gïïr kibøli yëyyi wïjɑ, Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kømm-ɑ yɑn ki pyed, ge teeg, o ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn. Yɑ ɑ́cïri gen col ki jɑmmì mø nuti kwɑɑl-ɑ yi yɑn." 
Psalms69:5 Orøgɑ pɑ cuggi kɑ̈nni yïn, dhëëgɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk." 
Psalms69:6 Tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈nni yïn ko wëggí yɑ̈rø kì bɑngɑ, yïn ɑ Wɑ̈ɑ, Jwøk, Wïlɑ̈bø; wiy tyëng-ɑ mɑlli yïn cög ge pɑ yɑ̈r kì bɑngɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil!" 
Psalms69:7 Yɑ gwɑddi kɑ perí, ɑyɑ̈rɑ ni men." 
Psalms69:8 Yɑ ɑ́göög yɑ nɑ ngɑnpɑth kì yï wɑddi wøn, Yɑ nɑ ngɑnpɑth kì yï tyëng gøl wøn." 
Psalms69:9 Mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑrɑ Kengí, lyel nɑ mɑc kì pyëwɑ, gwɑnn-ɑ gwɑddi yïn, pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömɑ." 
Psalms69:10 Riɑ nyi dwöögɑ’ piny, kɑ riɑ nyi twönɑ ki gïncɑm, kɑ yɑ nyi gɑggi yi ji." 
Psalms69:11 Yɑ ɑ́gɑggi yi gen kipe kɑ̀ rugɑ kwɑ̈llì, mɑ́ yɑ kïïm-ɑ thøø." 
Psalms69:12 Yɑ ceg kɑ kømmø yi gen kì yethi yëëth, yɑ ɑ́cɑg ki wör yi tyëng-ɑ mɑdhhi møgø." 
Psalms69:13 De yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, løøg kwɑ̈jjɑ kì bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddí, yïn ɑ Jwøk. Løøg kwɑ̈jjɑ kì bɑng döngi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií, yiel yɑn, mɑ́ ciggí mïdhɑ’ mïdhø." 
Psalms69:14 Yiel yɑn ki ɑ́bubudh, kor yɑn ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, yiel yɑn ki lol." 
Psalms69:15 Yɑ ko wëggí mudø yi bɑɑyø, yɑ ko wëggí mwønyø yi pïi lol, wɑlɑ̀, yɑ ko wëggí ludhi yij bur." 
Psalms69:16 Løøg kwɑ̈jjɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií dwøng, Lïïdh yïɑ kì bɑng ngenyi lɑ̈mpyëwí." 
Psalms69:17 Rií ko kɑ̈nní bɑ̈ngí, yɑ ying-ɑ yethi rɑj, løøg kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑnɑn!" 
Psalms69:18 Bïí kɑ yɑ yieel, yiel yɑn ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms69:19 Gwɑnn-ɑ ɑ́gwɑddi yɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈r yɑn, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bënn onennø yi yïn." 
Psalms69:20 Minɑ ɑ́cöd yi gwɑddø, yɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r. Yɑ yɑb-ɑ ngɑn yije ywöngi kiperɑ, de bong dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn lug yɑn, de bong ngɑn yodɑ." 
Psalms69:21 Kenyi di riɑ kɑ̈j, yɑ nyi mëgg-ɑ gïncɑm me lwɑɑng yɑn; o yɑ nyi mëgg-ɑ møgi oløg me wɑj." 
Psalms69:22 Wiy ge rënyi yi gïgcɑmm-ɑ rëëj gen, wiy ge wëggi pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø yi jɑmmi kwër møg-ɑ cɑmmi yi gen." 
Psalms69:23 Wiy nyingi gen lunyi gen, o ge dhɑ̈li gen ki nënnø! Wiy kömi gen ri gen cwøny gen, yi nyødhi gen!" 
Psalms69:24 Pwöög linyí kömi gen, wiy ge pïïd yi keji linyí." 
Psalms69:25 Wiy kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́gur yi gen döng gen gɑ ryɑng, wiy bëëd e bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me döng e onëënø kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Psalms69:26 Mɑ́ ge guud-ɑ nyingi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cɑy yi yïn, ge kømm-ɑ kwøbbi orɑɑng tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thödhi yi yïn ki kedd." 
Psalms69:27 Gweed orøøg gen piny bëne, kɑ ge ko yieel." 
Psalms69:28 Wiy nyingi gen rɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì yij wɑ̈nyi nënnì, wiy ge cög ge pɑ kwɑɑn kelli jií." 
Psalms69:29 De yɑ ying-ɑ yij orɑng, o wɑngɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ni, tïng yɑn mɑl kɑ yɑ yieel, yïn ɑ Jwøk." 
Psalms69:30 Nyingi Jwøk ólenhɑ ki wör, dönge ónyodhɑ kɑ̀ pwøjɑ en." 
Psalms69:31 Pyëwe ómïni ki menɑni kibøli ke di mëggii dhyɑng wɑlɑ̀ kibøli ke di ngɑ̈llii wɑdh me dwøng. 
Psalms69:32 Keny-ɑ óliidh møgɑni yi tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen nyi guud, pëthi gen ómïni, tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli Jwøk pëthi gen ótëngi." 
Psalms69:33 Mɑ́ kwɑ̈jji tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn nyii lïngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o jie møg-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg pɑ nyi wïl kì wïje." 
Psalms69:34 Lenhu Jwøk wun ɑ mɑl kí piny, kí nɑ̈mmi omelø, kí gïg-ɑ nëënø bënn kì yethi gen." 
Psalms69:35 Mɑ́ Yerusɑlem ɑ́yiele, kɑ kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ døøge ki gerø. Jie óbëëdø kì kunɑni, kɑ piny kwɑny yi gen," 
Psalms69:36 pinyɑni ólɑg yi kwɑrri bɑ̈ngge, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑrii óbëëdø kì pinyɑni." 
Psalms70:1 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, yiel yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jwɑn yɑn ki kønyø!" 
Psalms70:2 Wiy tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yɑn tyɑm o wɑ̈thi gen muum gen. Wiy tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen med kɑ ɑ́yïddɑ ki rɑj, døøg gen cyɑ̈n, o ge yɑ̈r gen." 
Psalms70:3 Wiy tyëng-ɑ gɑggi yɑn yɑ̈r gen, kì bɑng kɑ̀ tyɑɑm gen." 
Psalms70:4 De wiy tyëng-ɑ nyi bï yïí, bëëd gen pëthi gen med. Wiy tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïëdø mií, nyi kööb gen kinni, “Jwøk dwøng nɑ ngø!”" 
Psalms70:5 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, yɑ nyødh, o wɑngɑ cɑn, jwɑn bëën yïɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøk. Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ bɑ yïënɑ bïí jwɑ̈ní be kønyi yɑn!" 
Psalms71:1 Yïn ɑ yïí nyi yömmɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ko wëggí tyɑmø kinni tek!" 
Psalms71:2 Køny yɑn ki døøjí, kɑ yɑ yieel. Kënní pɑ̈ddí yɑn, kɑ yɑ yieel!" 
Psalms71:3 Bëëd ɑ́ yïn ɑ kor yɑn; bëëd yïn ɑ́ dörɑ, dör-ɑ teg; bɑ yïn ɑ yïí nyi yömmɑ, o bɑ yïn ɑ kor yɑn." 
Psalms71:4 Yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, yiel yɑn kì cinggi tyëngrijjø, yiel yɑn ki rɑjji tyëngrijjø geki ɑ́muddi ji." 
Psalms71:5 Mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈dh-ɑ yïn Wuö, yɑ gɑ̈nn-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kër-ɑ ɑ́wönɑ yɑ thiinh." 
Psalms71:6 Riɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈ng yɑn rií kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yɑn. Yɑ ɑ́korrí kër-ɑ ɑ́yingɑ yij meyɑ. Yï ólenhɑ yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. 
Psalms71:7 Bëëdɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi ji mø gïïr ɑ́ nyudhi, kì bɑng kɑ̀ korrí yɑn ki korrø me dwøng." 
Psalms71:8 Yɑ órïïjø yɑ lenh-ɑ yïn, yɑ töng-ɑ dhwɑ̈ngí." 
Psalms71:9 Yɑ ko bɑɑny kɑ̀ yöø yɑn ni men, yɑ ko wiy piny kɑ̀ nyönhɑ kinnï." 
Psalms71:10 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn, yɑ ɑ́thub yi tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yɑn." 
Psalms71:11 Ge okööbø kinni, “Áwiy piny yi Jwøk, kedh wɑ o mɑg yi wɑ, bong ngɑn-ɑ ódømii.”" 
Psalms71:12 Rií ko lɑ̈ɑ̈w ki yɑn cɑrø, yïn ɑ Jwøk, jwɑn yɑn ki kønyø, Jwøgɑ!" 
Psalms71:13 Wiy tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi gøønyi yɑn yɑ̈r gen, wiy ge thøw gen. Wiy tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi rënyi yɑn yɑ̈r gen, o wɑ̈thi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen." 
Psalms71:14 De yɑ órïïjø yɑ ngɑ̈dh-ɑ yïn, yɑ ópëddi ki lenhi yïn." 
Psalms71:15 Døøjí ólenhɑ, yɑ órïïj yɑ okööbø kì ri yïëdø mií, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd e dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wïjɑ." 
Psalms71:16 Tegí ólejjɑ yïn ɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ólenh-ɑ døøjí kete." 
Psalms71:17 Yɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi yïn yɑ nudd yɑ thiinh, o gïti ɑnɑn yɑ nudd yɑ kømmɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø møgí." 
Psalms71:18 Anɑn yɑ ɑ́yöø kɑ wïjɑ mɑg yi wɑ́r, yɑ ko wiy piny, yïn ɑ Jwøk! Mïdhí yɑn, kɑ̈ng-ɑ kømmɑ kwøbbi tegí; kwøbbɑni óköbbɑ rïjj-ɑ óbï bënn." 
Psalms71:19 Døøjí gït-ɑ mɑl, Jwøk, yï ɑ́göög ki gïgdøngø, bong ngɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yïn." 
Psalms71:20 Kömɑ ɑ́ödí ki rɑj geki orɑng, de yɑ ówëggí døøgø ki tëngø, kɑ yɑ yiel yi yïn ki thøø." 
Psalms71:21 Perɑ ówëggí tëngø kibøli mi tyeli mɑl, kɑ yɑ døøg yi yïn ki cïjø." 
Psalms71:22 Yï ólenhɑ ki thøm, døøjí ólenhɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, Yï ólenhɑ ki wör ki thømɑ, yïn ɑ Kwërø mi Isrɑil." 
Psalms71:23 Yï ólenhɑ, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn ki medi pyëwɑ bëne; yɑ ówör ki tegɑ bëne, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn." 
Psalms71:24 Yɑ órïïj yɑ ókööbø kì ri døøjí, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi rënyi yɑn, ge ɑ́tyɑm, kɑ ge oyɑ̈rø." 
Psalms72:1 Pwönyí rɑ̈dh ki nenni gønyy kidøøj, yïn ɑ Jwøk, kɑ nyudhí ki gøggi dyër kì bɑng døøjí," 
Psalms72:2 o jií jɑɑge ki gøggi dyër, o tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud jɑɑge kidøøj." 
Psalms72:3 Wiy piny dönye, wiy yïdde ki mër." 
Psalms72:4 Wiy rɑ̈dh gønyyi tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn nyi cïbe kɑ̈jji gen, wiy tyëng-ɑ jɑdø nyi kønye, wiy tyëngruj mɑ̈ɑ̈ne ruj." 
Psalms72:5 Wiy yï mɑlli yi jií kɑ̈ng-ɑ mëëny cɑ̈ng, kí kɑ̈ng-ɑ mëëny dwɑ̈y, kì yethi rïjj bënn." 
Psalms72:6 Wiy rɑ̈dh bëëde e nɑ mɑ̈gi kødh kì yethi pwödh, wiy bëëd e nɑ mɑ̈gi kødh kì piny!" 
Psalms72:7 Kì yij jyɑ̈ge, wiy piny pɑ̈nge yi døøjø, wiy bëëd e dɑ mër ceth." 
Psalms72:8 Wiy lɑ̈ge cɑ̈ge ki nɑɑm omelï, gïti nɑɑm omel-ɑ kyeelø, wiy cɑ̈ge kì Porɑt gïti cögi piny." 
Psalms72:9 Wiy tyëng ryɑng ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøle, wiy tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ri gen leeng gen piny." 
Psalms72:10 Ómuuj ki jɑmmì yi rɑ̈nhi Tɑrcic geki rɑ̈nhi muj, wiy muuj ki jɑmmì yi rɑ̈nhi Cebɑ̀ geki rɑ̈nhi Kuc." 
Psalms72:11 Rɑ̈nhì bënn ri gen óbøødh gen piny kì bøle, o ómɑlli yi pödhh bënn." 
Psalms72:12 Ngɑn wɑnge cɑn men-ɑ nyi yömmi yïe, nyi yiele’ yielø, geki tyëng-ɑ jɑdø, kí møg-ɑ bong ngɑn køny gen." 
Psalms72:13 Yije nyii ywöngø kipe tyëng-ɑ nyødh geki tyëng-ɑ jɑdø. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ jɑdø nyi yiele. 
Psalms72:14 Gï nyi yiele’ yielø kenyi guud nyingi gen, kí kenyi ruj gen, per gen teeg kì yïe." 
Psalms72:15 Wiy rɑ̈dh nëëne! Wiy muuj ki dhɑb kì Cebɑ̀, wiy pere nyi kwɑjji yethi cyɑ̈ng, wiy gyëdhhi Jwøk ying gen köme ceth!" 
Psalms72:16 Wiy byel cyeg gen kì yij piny bëne, wiy wɑ̈thi kïttì pɑ̈ng gen yi byel, ni kenyi cyeg gen kì Lubnɑn. Wiy kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø pɑ̈ng gen yi ji ni kenyi pɑ̈ng pwödh yi lum." 
Psalms72:17 Wiy nyingi rɑ̈dh cög ge pɑ wïl, wiy pere bëëde e nud ni kɑ̀ nud cɑ̈ng ceth. Wiy nyi kwɑ̈jji gyëdh yi pödhh bënn kì yï Jwøk, wiy cwølli yi pödhh bënn ɑ́ ɑgyëdh." 
Psalms72:18 Lenhi wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil! Mɑ́ e kete ɑ nyi göögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø." 
Psalms72:19 Lenhu nyinge, nying-ɑ di mɑ̈r gïti ɑtheer! Wiy yij piny bëne pɑ̈ng yi dhwɑ̈nge. Amen! Amen!" 
Psalms72:20 Men bene cögi kwɑ̈jji Debïd, wɑ̈d Yesì." 
Psalms73:1 Kidyër Jwøøg Isrɑil døøj, tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen tir korre’ korrø." 
Psalms73:2 De men-ɑ́ yɑn, pyëwɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki nyönhø, yïëyø køm-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì pyëwɑ," 
Psalms73:3 kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́modɑ tyëngɑthwøg, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ dönyi tyëngrijjø." 
Psalms73:4 Ge pɑ rɑngø, o dëlli gen pɑ rɑ̈mø, dëlli gen yööd." 
Psalms73:5 Ge pɑ rɑngø ni tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, ge pɑ nyi yïddi ki rɑj ni tyëng-ɑ kyeelø." 
Psalms73:6 Bene ɑ rug gen ɑthwøg e nɑ tigø kì muddi gen, o ruj rug yi gen e nɑ ógødh." 
Psalms73:7 Nyingi gen kwödø yi cwɑɑdhø, o pëthi gen rømm-ɑ gøggi rɑj ceth." 
Psalms73:8 Tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ceg kɑ gɑggø yi gen, ge kööb ɑ ri gøggi gïgrijjø, ge ceg-ɑ thwøgø, ge rømm-ɑ ruji tyëng-ɑ kyeelø." 
Psalms73:9 Ge nyi kømm-ɑ kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Jwøk kì mɑl, kɑ ji nyi cir gen kì piny," 
Psalms73:10 bene ɑ nyi døøg jii Jwøk yï gen kɑ ge nyii yïëyø ki kwøbbi gen. 
Psalms73:11 Ge okööbø kinni, “Møgɑni koo yod yi Jwøk, Ngɑn-ɑ Pëddi Döng kwïj wøw.”" 
Psalms73:12 Bene bëëdi tyëngrijjø ɑnɑn. Ge pëggi piny kidøøj, o kɑ̈rri gen kedh ge óngënyø." 
Psalms73:13 Bong gïn pere ómïdhɑ pyëwɑ e tir, o cinggɑ tɑr e yïɑ bɑ̈r." 
Psalms73:14 Mɑ́ yïn ɑ Jwøk, yɑ rïïj yɑ mëggí orɑng, yɑ ceg kɑ cɑyyø yi yïn yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Psalms73:15 Keløg yɑ di kööb ki gïg ni møgɑni, yɑ pɑ di göög ni dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jií." 
Psalms73:16 Yɑ ɑ́rum kì ri kwøbbɑni, de ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wïjɑ," 
Psalms73:17 pïd kɑ ɑ́kedhɑ yij Kengí. Codhe, cyee ɑyodɑ gïn-ɑ óbï kömi tyëngrijjø kì cyɑ̈n." 
Psalms73:18 Ge ócïb yi yïn keny me pødh, o ge renyyi gen, o ge pɑ̈nhhi gen!" 
Psalms73:19 Ge nyi jwɑn-ɑ thøø, ge nyii thøø ki thøø me rɑj." 
Psalms73:20 Ge nɑ lɑ̈g ɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì mwøl, kenyi dhwödhí mɑl, Wuö, ge nyi ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Psalms73:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yijɑ orɑ̈mø, o pyëwɑ keej," 
Psalms73:22 yɑ ɑ́bëëd rummɑ nøg ni rummi lɑ̈y, kɑ kwøbbí ódhɑ̈lø gɑmø yi wïjɑ." 
Psalms73:23 Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ cyɑ̈gi ki yïn, kɑ yɑ nyi mïdhi yi yïn kì cingɑ." 
Psalms73:24 Yɑ nyi nyudh-ɑ yuu-ɑ døj yi ciggí, o yɑ óthödhi yi yïn ceth ki kej dhwɑ̈ng kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny." 
Psalms73:25 Yïɑ bong gïn dwɑddɑ kì mɑl den-ɑ́ yïn! O bong gïn dwɑddɑ kì piny mɑ́ yï ying-ɑ butɑ. 
Psalms73:26 Rummɑ ɑ́cungi, o dëlɑ ɑ́nyönhi, de Jwøk bene tegɑ; E kete ɑ dwɑddɑ." 
Psalms73:27 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy yïn piny óthøw ceth, tyëng-ɑ pɑ mïdhi kwøbbí, gen ɑ ónɑ̈g yi yïn." 
Psalms73:28 De yɑ myër kɑ bëëdø yɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Jwøk, Wɑ̈ɑ Jwøk, ɑ yïe nyi yömmɑ, o yɑ lejj-ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge!" 
Psalms74:1 Wøde ɑ wiy wøn piny kinni, yïn ɑ Jwøk? Pyëwí ɑ́rënyi ki jií gïti ɑtheer?" 
Psalms74:2 Pɑr jií møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn cøn, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kipe kinni o ge bëëd gɑ jií ceth. Pɑr Kïti Dhɑyøn keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd cøn." 
Psalms74:3 Dhwöödh, lidh gïg-ɑ ɑ́rënyi bënn, jɑmmi Kengø bënn ɑ́rënyi yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki menrɑj!" 
Psalms74:4 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kïïw ɑ kej kwërí, berri gen ɑ́tïng gen mɑl ɑ́ ngïjji tyɑ̈mi gen." 
Psalms74:5 Pɑ̈mmi Kengø ɑ́ngølli yi gen ki dørri gen de ge nɑ ji mø ngøl thïm piny. 
Psalms74:6 Jɑmm-ɑ ódhyɑɑw pɑ̈mmì bënn, gï ɑ́tørri gen ki dørrì kí ɑ́bɑ̈nyì." 
Psalms74:7 Kengí ɑ́rɑ̈b yi gen ki mɑc, kej kwërí ɑ́bwöl yi gen." 
Psalms74:8 Ge ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi wøn kinni tweet, kɑ̈jji kwër bënn kì yij pödhø ɑ́rɑ̈b yi gen." 
Psalms74:9 Ngïjji kwër mø wøn bënn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, bong jɑltöng mɑ ɑ́döng, o bong ngɑn ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni gïgɑni ógït-ɑ wɑɑng." 
Psalms74:10 Wø gït-ɑ wɑɑng wø ogɑggø, yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk? Nyingí ógwɑddi yi gen gïti ɑtheer?" 
Psalms74:11 Cinggí gede ɑ dwööd gen ngɑ̈jí? Yïde ɑ bɑ̈nyí ki kønyi wøn? 
Psalms74:12 Á yïn ɑ ɑ́bëëd yïn ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn cøn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, wø ɑ́yiel yi yïn tyel mø gïïr." 
Psalms74:13 Nɑɑm omelø ɑ́pyëëd yi yïn ki tegí, kɑ wɑ̈thi lɑ̈yy-ɑ døngø kì nɑm mød yi yïn." 
Psalms74:14 Wïj Lebiyɑthɑn lɑ̈y-ɑ rɑj ɑ́mød yi yïn, kɑ wëggí cɑmø yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Psalms74:15 Yïn ɑ ɑ́yieb kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́mulli pï wɑ̈g kì piny, geki nyingi pï, kɑ nɑ̈mmì wëggí thwøwø." 
Psalms74:16 Yïn ɑ ɑ́gwøg dicɑ̈ng geki wɑ̈r, kɑ cɑ̈ng geki dwɑ̈y cïb yi yïn kɑ̈jji gen." 
Psalms74:17 Yïn ɑ ɑ́cïb kyelli mɑl, kɑ lew geki wuudø gwøøg." 
Psalms74:18 De pɑ̈ddí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø gɑgg-ɑ yïn, ge bɑ ji mø kwïj wøw, o ge bwöl-ɑ nyingí." 
Psalms74:19 Jií nyødh, ge ko wïyí tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ yethi gen wöny, wïjí ko wïl ki jií møg-ɑ nyingi gen guud!" 
Psalms74:20 Pɑr lwömí wuki gen, mɑ́ e dɑ mød kì gødd-ɑ looj kì yij piny bëne." 
Psalms74:21 Wɑ̈thi tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud koo lɑ̈ɑ̈y, wiy yï lenhi yi tyëng-ɑ jɑdø geki tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn." 
Psalms74:22 Dhwödhí mɑl yïn ɑ Jwøk, løøg kwøbbi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø! Pɑr kër-ɑ rïïj yï ogɑggø yi tyëng-ɑ kwïj wøw!" 
Psalms74:23 Wïjí ko wïl ki ɑkyeew tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kenyi bëën gen ki liny, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyi rïïj ge owøwø." 
Psalms75:1 Wø pwøj-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, wø pwøj-ɑ yïn! Wø wøw-ɑ döngí geki gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg." 
Psalms75:2 Jwøk okööbø kinni, “Bøli kej gøny ɑ́cïbɑ, o gønyy ócïbɑ kɑ̈jji gen kidøøj." 
Psalms75:3 Cɑgg piny kïïr geki gïg-ɑ yije bënn, kɑ piny bëne rungi, tyelle ómïdhɑ kì kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
Psalms75:4 Tyëngrijjø ɑ́köbbɑ kinni, ge ko tɑ̈d," 
Psalms75:5 ge ɑ́köbbɑ kinni, wiy gen thwøgø.”" 
Psalms75:6 Cɑ́y koo kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, wɑlɑ̀ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, wɑlɑ̀ wɑɑng wuudø, wɑlɑ̀ wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Psalms75:7 Den-ɑ́ Jwøk kiree ɑ ólidh gønyy, men ógøøje piny kɑ men tïnge mɑl." 
Psalms75:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge dɑ óthɑ̈gi, me pɑ̈ng yi møgi linye me teg, Gø ókunye wɑ̈g, o mɑdh yi tyëngrijjø bënn, ómɑdh yi gen kí ɑnïre bëne." 
Psalms75:9 De yɑ pɑ wïyi ki kwøb kì ri Jwøøg Yɑgob, ólenhɑ ki wör." 
Psalms75:10 Tegi tyëngrijjø órënye, de tegi tyëngtir ómed yi en." 
Psalms76:1 Per Jwøk ngɑ̈nyi kì Yeudiyɑ̀, nyinge nyii lenhø kì Isrɑil!" 
Psalms76:2 Kej bëëde ying-ɑ Yerusɑlem, bëëd ɑ Kïti Dhɑyøn." 
Psalms76:3 Kunɑni ɑ ɑ́tørre wethhi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, geki köddi gen, kí pilli gen, kí jɑmmi liny mø gen bënn." 
Psalms76:4 Yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dø nɑ ngø, yïn ɑ Jwøk! Yï dwøng nɑ ngø, kɑ ɑ́dwöög kì wɑ̈thi kïttì, kun-ɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms76:5 Jøliny gen, jøg-ɑ teg jɑmmi gen bënn ɑ́kɑb, ge buud kì piny ge thøø, ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li yielø yi tegi gen." 
Psalms76:6 Jøkyënyì geki kyënyi gen ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh ge thøø, keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈wwí gen, yïn ɑ Jwøøg Yɑgob." 
Psalms76:7 De yï ceg kɑ böggø ki mendwøng, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Bong ngɑn cuggi cung kì bølí kenyi rënyi pyëwí." 
Psalms76:8 Cɑ́yí ɑ́kwøøb, yï kööb ɑ mɑl pɑɑrí, kɑ piny obwøgø, kɑ ceg-ɑ ì dïw," 
Psalms76:9 keny-ɑ dhwödhí be muuji cɑ́y, kipe yieli tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud kì kömi piny." 
Psalms76:10 Rɑ̈ji pyëw dhɑnhø nyi nywøl-ɑ lenhi yïn; tyëng-ɑ óbødh kì yethi lìny, yï ómɑlli yi gen." 
Psalms76:11 Mëggu Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi wun, kinni ge ómëggu en, muuj wun en ki jɑmmì, wun ɑ pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi bënn. Jwøk ji bënn nyi göjje’ böögø;" 
Psalms76:12 nyiirɑ̈dhh nyi dwööge’ piny, kɑ rɑ̈nhh-ɑ døngø göjje böögø." 
Psalms77:1 Yɑ ɑ́ywøøg kö Jwøk, yɑ óryeerø, kɑ cwɑggɑ lïnge." 
Psalms77:2 Yɑ nyi kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøk kenyi yingɑ yethi rɑj; yɑ nyi lɑng-ɑ wɑ̈r yɑ tïnggɑ cinggɑ, yɑ ókwɑ̈jjø, de pyëwɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li kwöjø." 
Psalms77:3 Kenyi rummɑ kì ri Jwøk, yɑ nyii kïïmø, kɑ pyëwɑ nyii nyönhø." 
Psalms77:4 Yɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈ne nenø kì yij wɑ̈r bëne, yɑ ying-ɑ yethi rɑj, bene ɑ pɑ cuggɑ ki kwøb." 
Psalms77:5 Yɑ rum ɑ ri cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh kɑ̈ge dööng, yɑ pɑrr-ɑ runn-ɑ ɑ́pöödh kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Psalms77:6 Kɑ wɑ̈r nyi tyëgɑ yɑ ceg-ɑ rumø ki pyëwɑ, kɑ riɑ nyi pyëjɑ kinni," 
Psalms77:7 “Wɑ órïïj wɑ obɑnyø yi Wë? Pyëwe pɑ cigi mïnø ki wɑ? 
Psalms77:8 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïti ɑtheer? Könge ɑ́ceg kɑ pɑ̈dø yi en? 
Psalms77:9 Jwøk wïje ɑ́wïl ki konggi wɑ? Kej lɑ̈mpyëwe ɑ́ceg kɑ kwɑnyø yi rënyi pyëw?” 
Psalms77:10 Codhe ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Gïn-ɑ rɑ̈mø ki pyëwɑ cɑrø bɑ kinni tegi Jwøk ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny.”" 
Psalms77:11 Gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg cøn ópɑrrɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn cøn ópɑrrɑ." 
Psalms77:12 Yɑ órumø kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg bënn, geki gïg teg møgí bënn." 
Psalms77:13 Gïg-ɑ nyi gøggí bënn bɑ ɑkwër, yïn ɑ Jwøk, bong Jwøk me dwøng ni yïn." 
Psalms77:14 Yï bɑ Jwøk men-ɑ nyi göögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø; tegí ɑ́nyodh yi yïn kì kelli pödhh. 
Psalms77:15 Jií ɑ́yieel ki tegí, ɑ løg kwɑrri Yɑgob geki kwɑrri Yosep." 
Psalms77:16 Pï ɑ́bwøg keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, kɑ tyeli nɑɑm omelø okïïrø." 
Psalms77:17 Pøøl ɑ́kunyi piny ki kødh, mɑl ɑ́pööd, kɑ ogwelø, kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Psalms77:18 Piny ɑ́nhɑ̈nhi yi pööd mɑl, kɑ piny ótɑ̈rø yi ogwel mɑl, kɑ piny okïïrø kɑ onhɑ̈nhø." 
Psalms77:19 Yï ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì kömi ɑpɑgø, kɑ nɑɑm omelø ɑ pɑ̈ng nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈n, de pɑ̈ltyellí pɑ nënni." 
Psalms77:20 Jií ɑ́kwɑɑy ni kenyi kwɑ̈ɑ̈y jɑldyëg, ge pyejj-ɑ yi Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron." 
Psalms78:1 Lïngu pwönyɑ, wun ɑ jiɑ, kënnu yïthhi wun kwøbbɑ!" 
Psalms78:2 Dhøgɑ ótug yi yɑn kɑ gɑ́j, o kwøbb-ɑ peg møg-ɑ weenø ólwøbɑ," 
Psalms78:3 gen ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wɑ kɑ ge yod wɑ, gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wɑ yi wëëgee." 
Psalms78:4 Kwøbbɑni koo kɑ̈nni wøn nyigi wøn; rïny-ɑ óbï óköbbi wøn kwøbbi tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kí mɑ̈re geki gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge. 
Psalms78:5 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́thödhe ki kwöng, kɑ kwɑrri Yɑgob nënge ki cigg. Kweyyee ɑ́cege kinni, pwönyi gen nyigi gen ki ciggɑni." 
Psalms78:6 o ge dïd yi rïny-ɑ óbï, o nyigi gen ólony yi gen ki pwönyø," 
Psalms78:7 o ge gɑ̈nni gen Jwøk, o wɑ̈thi gen cög ge pɑ wïl ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, de ge órïïj ge mïdh-ɑ cigge ceth." 
Psalms78:8 Ge koo bëëdø ge nɑ kweyyi gen, ɑ ɑ́bëëd muddi gen teeg, o kwøbbi Jwøk nuti lïngi gen, pëthi gen nuti cïb gen ri kwøbbɑni, o Jwøk nuti gɑ̈nni gen ceth." 
Psalms78:9 Liny gøl Eprɑim møg-ɑ yï gen di wethh ki nywøli wethh ɑ́cyeddi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny. 
Psalms78:10 Lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm gen ki Jwøk nuti mïdhi gen, ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi cigge." 
Psalms78:11 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhe gïn." 
Psalms78:12 Ágöög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì bøli kweyyi gen kì thwøri Dhoɑn kì piny Rïp. 
Psalms78:13 Nɑɑm omelø ɑ́yiebe kɑ gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le yije, pï ɑ́cuunge ni dör." 
Psalms78:14 Gï ɑ́pyejje kɑ pøølø kì dicɑ̈ng kɑ gï pyejje ki mɑc kì wɑ̈r bëne. 
Psalms78:15 Kït ɑ́yiebe kì yij ryɑng, kɑ gï nënge ki pï mø töngi kì piny." 
Psalms78:16 Pï ɑ́wëgge rïngi wɑ̈g kì yij kït, ge rïngi nɑ pïi nɑm." 
Psalms78:17 De ge ɑ́døøg be pëmø ki kwøbbe, muddi gen ɑ́tëngi ki Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng kì yij ryɑng." 
Psalms78:18 Jwøk ɑ́ceg kɑ rɑngø yi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́cwöddi gen ki gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi gen." 
Psalms78:19 Ge ɑ́kööb kì ri Jwøk kinni, “Jwøk ócuggø muujø ki gïncɑm kì yij ryɑng?" 
Psalms78:20 Kidyër kït ɑ́gøj yi en, kɑ pï mwööj-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yije, kɑ tör opɑ̈ngø, de wø ócuggø thödhø ki gïncɑm, kɑ jie thödhe ki rïngø?”" 
Psalms78:21 Arënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge møgɑni, ɑwëgge mɑc lyelø kì kömi jie, pyëwe ɑ́ti rënyø ki gen," 
Psalms78:22 mɑ́ kwøbbe nuti yïëyø yi gen, o ge nuti yïëyø kinni gï óyiele," 
Psalms78:23 de mɑl ɑ́köbbe, kɑ dhøge yiebe," 
Psalms78:24 kɑ gï muuje ki gïncɑm kì mɑl; mɑnɑ̀ ɑ́öre piny ɑ́ men cɑm yi gen. 
Psalms78:25 Codhe, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gïncɑɑm wëywödd, kɑ gï thödhe ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen bënn." 
Psalms78:26 Agööje yømi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ yømi wɑɑng wurlwɑl wëgge könø ki tege," 
Psalms78:27 kɑ jie öde ki winyø me ngenyø ni ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø," 
Psalms78:28 gï ɑ́wëgge dyëëm dïkɑɑl gen geki bɑdhhi kemmì bënn. 
Psalms78:29 Codhe, ɑcyɑ̈ɑ̈m ji kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, ge ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki gïncɑm-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi gen." 
Psalms78:30 De ge nuti yɑ̈ngø; ge nuti wïyø ki cɑm kɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ng gen," 
Psalms78:31 ɑrënyi pyëw Jwøk ki gen, ɑnɑ̈ge jøg-ɑ teg kì kelli gen geki wøbb-ɑ døj kì Isrɑil." 
Psalms78:32 Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ji nudd ge ceg-ɑ orøg, nuti gɑ̈nni gen, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́gööge ki gïïngɑ̈ngø." 
Psalms78:33 Codhe, ɑngøle cyɑ̈nggi gïn ni yëgø kɑ nënni gïn ngøle ki ryɑ̈g." 
Psalms78:34 Kenyi nɑ̈ge kwï gïn, møg-ɑ döng nyii døøg-ɑ kööre, ge nyii yewø kɑ gø kwɑjji gen ki kwɑnyi dwøng." 
Psalms78:35 Kɑ ge ópɑ̈dø kinni Jwøk bene ɑ korri gen, Ngɑn-ɑ Pëddi Döng ɑ bɑ dumi mi gen." 
Psalms78:36 De kwøbbi gen bënn bɑ pyed, bong dyër kì yethi gen." 
Psalms78:37 Pëthi gen nuti ying-ɑ köme, lwöm-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm gen nuti mïdhi gen." 
Psalms78:38 De Jwøk yije nyii ywöngø kipe jie, kɑ lɑɑwe nyi dwööge piny kipe orøøg gen gï pɑ nyi nɑ̈g yi en. Pyëwe nyii mɑgø yi en tyel mø gïïr, linye pɑ nyi ngööge wɑ̈g bëne." 
Psalms78:39 Nyii pɑ̈dø kinni ge bɑ ji-ɑ nyi thøw yøw, ge nɑ yømø ɑ nyi köni e opödhø e pɑ dwöög." 
Psalms78:40 Á tyel ɑ́dï ɑ ɑ́pyem gen kwøbbe kì yij ryɑng? Á tyel ɑ́dï ɑ ɑ́wëggi gen pyëwe rënyø! 
Psalms78:41 Jwøk ɑ́pɑ̈nyi yi gen, kɑ gø nyi cigi gen pɑ̈nyø, kɑ pyëw kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil nyii rɑ̈mø." 
Psalms78:42 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki tege, kí cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́yiele gïn kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø," 
Psalms78:43 ɑ ɑ́gööge ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø kì thwøri Dhoɑn kì piny Rïp. 
Psalms78:44 Nɑ̈mmì ɑ́løge remø, kɑ tyëng Rïp ojɑdø ki pïg mɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen." 
Psalms78:45 Gï ɑ́öde ki bɑ̈yø bëne kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen, kí ógwɑ̈llì mø rënyi piny gen." 
Psalms78:46 Gï ɑ́öde ki bɑ̈nyø me cɑm byelli gen, kɑ pwödhhi gen órënyø." 
Psalms78:47 Bɑ̈ggi oløøg gen ɑ́nɑ̈ge ki ɑtunø, kɑ ólɑ̈mmi gen nɑ̈ge ki ɑ́piy." 
Psalms78:48 Dhögi gen ɑ́nɑ̈ge ki yømø, kɑ dyëgi gen nɑ̈ge ki ogwel mɑl." 
Psalms78:49 Gï ɑ́göjje rɑj mø døngø, kɑ ɑ́kønye linye kömi gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe, linyɑni ɑ́bï e nɑ ngɑn kɑ̈lli wöddi thøø." 
Psalms78:50 Linye nuti joog gen, gï nuti wiy en ge pɑ thøw, de gï ɑ́kölle ryɑ̈ng nɑ̈g gen." 
Psalms78:51 Kɑyy-ɑ cwøw bënn ɑ́nɑ̈ge kì yethi kɑ̈lli Rïp bënn. 
Psalms78:52 Jie ɑ́kööle wɑ̈g, ni kwöddi jɑldyëg, kɑ gï pyejje kì yij ryɑng." 
Psalms78:53 Gï ɑ́pyejje kidøøj ge pɑ böggi, de pï ɑ́ceg ì bɑɑw kì kömi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms78:54 Ge ɑ́kïdhe piny kwëre, gï ɑ́kïdhe wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnye." 
Psalms78:55 Pödhh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì pinyɑni ɑ́cyedde kì bøli gïn. Piny gen ɑ́pɑ̈nge kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, kɑ uddi gïn mëgge jie." 
Psalms78:56 De Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ dhøge pyem gen. Cigge ɑ́bɑny yi gen ki mïdhø," 
Psalms78:57 muddi gen ɑ́tëngi kɑ cigge pyem gen ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyyi gen, ge ɑ́göög ni nyɑɑr weth me bɑ ódwøl." 
Psalms78:58 Pyëwe ɑ́wëggi rënyø yi gen ki kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møg-ɑ pɑth kidyër, kí ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ mɑɑn yi en." 
Psalms78:59 Jwøk pyëwe ɑ́rënyi keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïgɑni, bene ɑ bɑnye jie ki bɑnyi teg." 
Psalms78:60 Awiye Keme piny kì Cilø, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì kellee." 
Psalms78:61 Awëgge Sɑnduug Cigg kwɑnyø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, eni ngïji tege geki dhwɑ̈nge." 
Psalms78:62 Pyëwe ɑ́rënyi ki jie, kɑ gï wëgge nɑ̈gø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms78:63 Yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny, kɑ wojur ojɑdø ki cwøw møg nywøm gen." 
Psalms78:64 Ókwër ɑ́nɑ̈g ki pilø, kɑ mɑ̈nni gen mɑ̈ɑ̈n ywøgi gen." 
Psalms78:65 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, ɑdhwödh Wë, e ce cyëëw ɑ́ jɑlteg men-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø," 
Psalms78:66 ɑdyële tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kɑ ge órengø, ge ɑ́rengi ge yɑ̈rø yi kɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm gen." 
Psalms78:67 De gøl Yosep ɑ́bɑnye, gøl Eprɑim nuti myeeg en." 
Psalms78:68 De ɑ́myeg-ɑ gøl Yeudɑ̀, kí Kïti Dhɑyøn men-ɑ mɑɑr yi en." 
Psalms78:69 Kenyɑni ɑ ɑ́gere Kenge e nɑ pɑɑre kì mɑl, ɑ́gwøge e teg ni piny kiree, e pɑ nhɑ̈nhø gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms78:70 Ayienye bɑ̈nge Debïd, gø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le kì bɑng dyëg," 
Psalms78:71 kun-ɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈ɑ̈ye ki dyëge, ɑgwøge gøn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, jɑl-ɑ kwɑy jii Jwøk." 
Psalms78:72 Amïdhi gen yi Debïd ki pyëw ɑ́kyel, gï ɑ́pyejje kɑ yuu-ɑ døj." 
Psalms79:1 Pinyí ɑ́kɑb yi pödhh mø pɑth, yïn ɑ Jwøk. Kengí kwërø ɑ́bwöl yi gen kɑ Yerusɑlem rënyi gen." 
Psalms79:2 Bɑ̈nggí ɑ́wëggi gen cɑmø yi cor, jií ɑ́wïyi gen cɑmø yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Psalms79:3 Remmi jií ɑ́wëggi gen mullø ni pï; remø ɑ́mulli ni pï kì yij Yerusɑlem bëne, o bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́wiy o konye tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g." 
Psalms79:4 Wø ɑ́yɑ̈r yi pödhh-ɑ buti wøn, wø ceg kɑ ngedhø, wø ogɑggø yi gen." 
Psalms79:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng pyëwí rɑɑj ki wøn? Linyí gït-ɑ wɑɑng e lyel nɑ mɑc?" 
Psalms79:6 Ngøøg linyí kömi pödhh-ɑ kwïj yïn, ɑ pɑ mɑlli yïn." 
Psalms79:7 Mɑ́ jií ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen; kɑ pödhí rënyi gen. 
Psalms79:8 Wø ko cɑ̈yyí orøøg kweyyi wøn, de lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn ɑnɑn, mɑ́ pëthi wøn ɑ́nyönhi." 
Psalms79:9 Køny wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøk kɑ wø yieel, yiel wøn kɑ lɑɑwí dwöög piny kipe orøøg wøn, o nyingí ólenhi." 
Psalms79:10 Á kipe ngø ɑ köbbi wøn yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni, “Ágøne Jwøøg wun?” Wiy yï lidh yi wøn yï cɑy-ɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g gen bɑ̈nggí." 
Psalms79:11 Wiy ywøøg tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg wɑ̈dhe bølí, kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑcɑy ki thøø døm ki tegí." 
Psalms79:12 Wuö, cɑy pödhh-ɑ kyeelø tyel ɑ́bïryew kipe gwɑnn-ɑ ɑ́gwɑddi yïn yi gen." 
Psalms79:13 Codhe o wøn ɑ bɑ jií, dyëgi kɑɑlí, yï pøjji yi wøn gïti ɑtheer, o yï lenhi yi wøn kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ bøli wøn bënn." 
Psalms80:1 Lïngí kwɑ̈jji wøn, yïn ɑ Jɑl-ɑ kwɑy Isrɑil; lïngí cwɑggi wøn, yï ngɑn-ɑ kwølli dyëg. Yï bëëd ɑ wïj kwømí kì kömi kerobb," 
Psalms80:2 nyudhí ri gøl Eprɑim geki gøl Ben Yɑmïn kí gøl Mɑnɑsè. Nyudhí wøn tegí, bïí kɑ wø yieel!" 
Psalms80:3 Dwöög wøn yïn ɑ Jwøk! Ywöngi yijí kiper wøn, o wø óyiel!" 
Psalms80:4 Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng pyëwí rɑɑj ki kwɑ̈jji jií?" 
Psalms80:5 Ge ɑ́wëggí cɑmi pïi nyingi gen ge mɑdh-ɑ pïi nyingi gen ni pï. 
Psalms80:6 Pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki wøn ɑ́wëggí nyɑɑg kì kömi piny wøn, wø ɑ́wëggí gɑggø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms80:7 Dwöög wøn yïn ɑ Jwøk! Ywöngi yijí kiper wøn, o wø yiel!" 
Psalms80:8 Oløg ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì Rïp, pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́cyeddí, kɑ piidh piny gen." 
Psalms80:9 Keje ɑ́tyeny yi yïn kipe kinni o dønge, kɑ byerre niyeeng-ɑ piny, kɑ ódøngø kɑ piny bëne kɑbe." 
Psalms80:10 Kɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì kume ki tïbe, kɑ yenh sɑndɑl, yenh-ɑ døngø rïm yi bɑ̈dde." 
Psalms80:11 Bɑ̈dde ɑ́wɑ̈dhi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kɑ bɑ̈dde wɑ̈dh-ɑ Nɑm Porɑt." 
Psalms80:12 Á kipe ngø ɑ dhur kyel-ɑ ɑ́bɑɑgí piny? Anɑn nywøle ceg kɑ kwɑllø yi tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli yöö," 
Psalms80:13 o ceg kɑ nyønø yi kul, o ceg kɑ cɑmø yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Psalms80:14 Lugí thɑ̈wwí wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøk, Wïlɑ̈bø! Lïïdh piny kì mɑl, kɑ yï bïí be yieli jií!" 
Psalms80:15 Bïí yiel oløng-ɑ ɑ́pidh yi yïn ki cingí, kɑ wëggí døngø, o tënge!" 
Psalms80:16 Árɑ̈b yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki mɑc, kɑ gø ngøl gen piny, lïïdh yï gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwí, kɑ ge nɑ̈ɑ̈g!" 
Psalms80:17 De mïdhí ji-ɑ ɑ́yieeny, kɑ ge koor, eni pönh-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn e teg." 
Psalms80:18 Wø pɑ cigi døøg cyɑ̈n, thödhí wøn ki nënnì, o yï ólenhi yi wøn." 
Psalms80:19 Dwöög wøn, yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ywöngi yijí kiper wøn, kɑ wø yieel." 
Psalms81:1 Ryeer wun, wu lejj-ɑ Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ nyɑg peree, wör wun, wu lenh-ɑ Jwøøg Yɑgob!" 
Psalms81:2 Thomu thøm, pwödu bullì, wör wun ki medi pëëth." 
Psalms81:3 Koodh kɑng kì ri pɑ̈ri dwɑ̈y, kɑ kodh kì ri rɑ̈we cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng wööwø." 
Psalms81:4 Menɑni bɑ cigg kì Isrɑil, ciggi Jwøøg Yɑgob." 
Psalms81:5 Ciggɑni ɑ́mëgge’ tyëng Isrɑil, keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi piny Rïp. Yɑ ɑ́lïng ki cwɑg mø kwïjɑ, ge okööbø kinni;" 
Psalms81:6 “Wu ɑ́yielɑ ki tyëddi gïg peg, wu ɑ́yielɑ ki tyëddi thob." 
Psalms81:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́ying wun yethi rɑj, yɑ ɑ́cwøl yi wun, kɑ wu yielɑ, yɑ ying-ɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nɑ kì yij ɑtunø. Wu ɑ́rɑngɑ kì wɑɑng pïi Merïbɑ̀." 
Psalms81:8 Lïng wun, wun ɑ jiɑ kɑ̀ kyëddɑ wun, Isrɑil, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni lïngí kwøbbɑ!" 
Psalms81:9 Yï ko wöl kwɑ̈jjø kì yï jwøg megø. 
Psalms81:10 Bene yɑn Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Ngɑm dhøgí o kïdhɑ ki gïncɑm." 
Psalms81:11 “De kwøbbɑ pɑ lïngi yi jiɑ. Ciggɑ pɑ mïdhi yi Isrɑil. 
Psalms81:12 Awiyɑ gen, o ge kedh gen ki tegi wɑ̈thi gen, o ge gwøg gen gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen." 
Psalms81:13 Di bëëd e døøj ke di lïngi gen kwøbbɑ, yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o ciggɑ di mïdhi gen!" 
Psalms81:14 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø di jwɑnɑ ki tyɑmø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen di mɑgɑ bënn." 
Psalms81:15 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn ri gen di bøødh gen bølɑ ki böögø, cɑ́yi gen di gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms81:16 De wu di cɑɑm yi yɑn ki gemè men-ɑ døøj cɑrø, kɑ wu di yɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki møøw kïc.”" 
Psalms82:1 Jwøk ɑ́pëggi wïj kwøme kì buri mɑl, cɑ́ye ɑ́kwøbe kì buri jwögg kinni," 
Psalms82:2 “Wu gït-ɑ wɑɑng wu orujø, wu cwɑngg-ɑ tyëngrijjø?" 
Psalms82:3 Nyɑgu per tyëng nyingi gen cɑn geki kïjj, pyël wun gønyyi tyëng-ɑ jɑdø geki tyëng-ɑ yï gen bong tegø." 
Psalms82:4 Yiel wun gen kì cinggi tyëngrijjø. 
Psalms82:5 “Wu kwïj wøw! Wɑ̈thi wun nøg! Piny ɑ́rënyi yi wun, kɑ dyër ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì kömi piny." 
Psalms82:6 Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Wu bɑ jwögg, wu bɑ nyigi Ngɑn-ɑ Pëddi Döng.’" 
Psalms82:7 De wu ceg-ɑ thøø ni ji yøw, wu óthøw ni nyiirɑ̈dh.”" 
Psalms82:8 Bïí, yïn ɑ Jwøk, jɑɑg kömi piny; pödhh bënn bɑ møgí." 
Psalms83:1 Yï ko kud yïn ɑ Jwøk, yï ko pëggi piny, rií ko dhïïg!" 
Psalms83:2 Lidh tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́dhwödh, ge ceg-ɑ wøwø wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́tëngi." 
Psalms83:3 Ge rum ɑ ri göggi jií ki rɑj, ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi ji-ɑ korri yi yïn." 
Psalms83:4 Ge okööbø kinni, “Bïu nɑ̈g wɑ pönhɑni, o Isrɑil wïle gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Psalms83:5 Ri gen ɑ́löggi gen, ge ɑ́rëbi kömí." 
Psalms83:6 tyëng Edöm geki kwɑrri Icmɑil, kí tyëng Moɑb geki Ägerïm," 
Psalms83:7 kí tyëng Gibɑl geki Amön, kí Amɑlek, geki Pelistiyɑ̀ kí Suur." 
Psalms83:8 Tyëng Acuur ɑ́rëbi ki gen, ge køny-ɑ ri gen ki kwɑrri Amön, kí kwɑrri Moɑb, ɑ løg Kwɑrri Lot." 
Psalms83:9 Göggí gen ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggí Midyɑn, geki Siserɑ̀, kí Yɑbïn kì kömi Nɑm Kicön." 
Psalms83:10 Ge ɑ́tyɑm yi yïn kì Ein Dör, kɑ ge kwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ piny." 
Psalms83:11 Gwøg pëjji gen ni Oreb geki Dhiib, tyɑm jyɑ̈gi gen bënn ni kɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm Dhebɑ̀ geki Dhɑlmunɑ̀," 
Psalms83:12 ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Kwɑny wɑ en ɑ́ miee, eni piny-ɑ bɑ mi Jwøk.”" 
Psalms83:13 Kedhhí gen ni tør yïn ɑ Jwøk, kedhhí gen ni kedhhi wél yi yømø." 
Psalms83:14 Rɑ̈b gen ni rɑ̈bi thïm, ni rɑ̈bi wɑ̈thi kïttì," 
Psalms83:15 cyeddí gen ki ɑtuní, göjjí gen böggø yi yømí, yøm-ɑ teg." 
Psalms83:16 Wiy wɑ̈thi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wiy tegí lidh yi gen." 
Psalms83:17 Wiy ge bëëd gɑ ɑtyɑm gïti ɑtheer, wiy ge thøw gen ki ɑyɑ̈r." 
Psalms83:18 Wiy yod yi gen kinni nyingí bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yï ketí ɑ dwøng kì kömi piny bëne." 
Psalms84:1 Kengí mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng, yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Psalms84:2 Yɑ tyer-ɑ bëëdø kì Kengí! Yɑ tyer-ɑ bëëdø kì Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yɑ wör kɑ medi pyëwɑ, kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø." 
Psalms84:3 Cɑgg ɑ́ ɑdhëg ɑ́gëëd ki ød; o nyɑwɑ̈nyø yïe dɑ keny bëëde; nyigi gen mïdhi yi gen ɑ buti këlli lɑm møgí; Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; yï bɑ rɑ̈dhɑ, o yï bɑ Jwøgɑ." 
Psalms84:4 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì bɑdhhi Kengí ri gen dɑ gyëdh, ge nyi rïïj ge owörø ge lejj-ɑ yïn." 
Psalms84:5 Tyëng-ɑ tegi gen nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïí, ri gen dɑ gyëdh, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ tyer weli Kïti Dhɑyøn." 
Psalms84:6 Kɑ̀ kɑ̈l gen bɑ̈ɑ̈j Bɑcɑ̀ ree nyi løge’ keny mulli yi pï nyii pɑ̈ɑ̈ngø yi kødh cwir ki luyyi pï. 
Psalms84:7 Ji nyi kedh ge ótëngø kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhi gen, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ bøli Jwøøg jwögg kì Dhɑyøn." 
Psalms84:8 Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ, Yïn ɑ Jwøøg Yɑgob, lïngí møgɑ." 
Psalms84:9 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, gyëdh rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn, eni rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn." 
Psalms84:10 Tyëgi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel e dhɑnhø ying-ɑ yij Kengí, lɑ̈w kibøli cyɑ̈ng ɑ́lïp møg tyëg yi dhɑnhø e ying-ɑ keny megø. Lɑ̈w ke bëëdɑ kì wɑ̈g kì dhø ød Jwøgɑ, kibøli ke di bëëdɑ kì kɑ̈lli tyëngrijjø." 
Psalms84:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑ rɑ̈dhee, en ɑ kor wɑ; wɑ ɑ́gëdhhe døøjø kí dhwɑ̈ng, Gïndøj pɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈ne tyëng-ɑ nyi gøggi gïgdøj, pɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈ne." 
Psalms84:12 Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈nni yïn ri gen dɑ gyëdh!" 
Psalms85:1 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwí nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki pinyí; Isrɑil ɑ́gwøg yi yïn kɑ ódönyø." 
Psalms85:2 Pyëwí ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ orøøg jií lɑ̈ɑ̈ny; orøøg gen bëne ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g yi yïn." 
Psalms85:3 Linyí ki gen ɑ́mwøøny yi yïn, pyëwí ɑ́dwöög ki gen." 
Psalms85:4 Dwöög wøn köörí, yïn ɑ Jwøk yïëni wøn, kɑ pyëwí koo rɑj ki wøn këti!" 
Psalms85:5 Yï ógïti ɑtheer pyëwí rɑj ki wøn? Linyí ki wøn pɑ cög? 
Psalms85:6 Wëggí wøn tëngø këti, o yï lenhi yi jií." 
Psalms85:7 Nyudhí wøn mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií, mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi, Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wø yieel." 
Psalms85:8 Kwøbbi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lïngɑ’ lïngø, okööbø kinni wɑ jie, wɑ óthödhe ki mër, keløg wɑ pɑ døøg ri bëëdi nøgi wɑ̈ɑ̈th." 
Psalms85:9 Tyëng-ɑ böggii nyi jwɑne kɑ yielø ceth, o gyëdhhe geki dhwɑ̈nge óbëëdø ceth kì kömi pinyee." 
Psalms85:10 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø ɑ́røøm geki dyër, døøjø geki mër ri gen ɑ́döb gen." 
Psalms85:11 Dyër ótwïy kì piny, kɑ kedh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ bëëntir mi Jwøk kì mɑl, lïïdh-ɑ piny." 
Psalms85:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ ówëgge dönyø kɑ byëlø ocyegø kì pinyee. 
Psalms85:13 Døøjø ócyɑ̈dhi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yuue tyenye." 
Psalms86:1 Kënní pɑ̈ddí yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kwɑ̈jjɑ løøg, mɑ́ yɑ nyøødh o wɑngɑ ocɑnø." 
Psalms86:2 Yiel yɑn ki thøø, mɑ́ yɑ mïdh-ɑ kwøbbí, yiel yɑn mɑ́ yɑ bɑ bɑ̈ngí men-ɑ gɑ̈nni yïn." 
Psalms86:3 Yï bɑ Jwøgɑ, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki yɑn mɑ́ yɑ nyi rïïj yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn." 
Psalms86:4 Wiy pyëw bɑ̈ngí mïne, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ kwɑ̈jjɑ nyi bï-ɑ yïí mɑl." 
Psalms86:5 Yï døøj, o lɑɑwí nyi dwöögí piny kiper wøn, o tyëng-ɑ nyi kwɑjji yïn bënn mɑɑr yi yïn." 
Psalms86:6 Lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lïngí ywøgɑ kɑ̀ kwɑjjɑ kønyø." 
Psalms86:7 Yɑ nyi cwøl-ɑ yïn kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj, mɑ́ kwɑ̈jjɑ nyii løøgø yi yïn." 
Psalms86:8 Bong Jwøk me ni yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong Jwøk mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi gwøg ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg." 
Psalms86:9 Pödhh-ɑ ɑ́cöb yi yïn bënn, óbï kɑ yï mɑl yi gen, kɑ döngí lenhi yi gen," 
Psalms86:10 mɑ́ yïn ɑ teg, o yï nyii göögø ki gïgdøngø, bene yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk." 
Psalms86:11 Pwönyí yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn, o gwøøgɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o møg-ɑ pwönyí yɑn ógwøg yi yɑn ceth, pwönyí yɑn ki göggi yïn ki pyëw ɑ́kyel." 
Psalms86:12 Yï ólenhɑ ki pyëwɑ bëne, yïn ɑ Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, döngí ólenhɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms86:13 Yɑ mɑɑr yi yïn ki mendwøng, wëyɑ ɑ́yïëël yi yïn wɑ̈g kì pödhi tyëngthøø." 
Psalms86:14 Tyëngɑthwøg ɑ́bï kömɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøk, ɑkuud tyëng-ɑ yethi gen wöny dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yɑn, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ pɑ gɑ̈nni yïn." 
Psalms86:15 De yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ Jwøng mɑɑr ji, Jwøng pyëwe nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií dwøng." 
Psalms86:16 Lïïdh yïɑ kɑ pyëwí lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki yɑn, thödhí yɑn ki tegø kɑ yɑ yieel, mɑ́ yɑ gögg-ɑ yïn ni kɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi meyɑ." 
Psalms86:17 Nyudhí yɑn døøjí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn, wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈y gen, keny-ɑ ólïdhi gen kinni yɑ ɑ́lug yi yïn, kɑ yɑ køny yi yïn." 
Psalms87:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑle ɑ́geere wïj kïti kwër," 
Psalms87:2 Yerusɑlem mɑɑr yi en, kibøli kɑ̈dd-ɑ kyeelø kì Isrɑil." 
Psalms87:3 Lïng, yïn ɑ kɑɑl Jwøk, ki gïgdøj møg-ɑ kømme kì rií kinni:" 
Psalms87:4 “Rïp geki Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ókwɑɑnɑ kelli pödhh-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yɑn, kí Pelistiyɑ̀ geki Suur, kí Kuc, jii gen óreb ki tyëng Yerusɑlem.”" 
Psalms87:5 Dhɑyøn ókwøb kinni, i pödhh bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yije, mɑ́ e ówëggi tëngø yi Ngɑn-ɑ Pëddi Döng." 
Psalms87:6 Nyingi jii pödhh bënn ógwed yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o gï órebe bënn ki tyëng Yerusɑlem." 
Psalms87:7 Ge cöngø ge owörø kinni, “Gyëdhhee bënn, kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Dhɑyøn.”" 
Psalms88:1 Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïënɑ, yɑ rïïj yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn kì dicɑ̈ng, o yɑ nyi bï-ɑ bølí kì wɑ̈r." 
Psalms88:2 Lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ, lïngí cwɑggɑ, kɑ̀ ywöngɑ kipe kønyø." 
Psalms88:3 Kömɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi yi rɑj mø ngenyø, yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki thøø." 
Psalms88:4 Yɑ ɑ́göög ni tyëng-ɑ kømi thøø, bong tegø mɑ ɑ́döng kì riɑ." 
Psalms88:5 Yɑ ɑ́wiy kelli tyëngthøø, yɑ nɑ ji møg rumø nɑ̈gø, o ge buud-ɑ yethi burri gen, jiɑni rum wïlø kì wïjí ge pɑ cuggi kønyø yi yïn këti." 
Psalms88:6 yɑ ɑ́leeng yij rörø me ludhø cɑrø, me bɑ muunhi dwøng." 
Psalms88:7 Linyí ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömɑ ki mendwøng, yɑ ɑ́mud yi ɑpɑgi linyí." 
Psalms88:8 Mɑ̈dhhɑ ɑ́nyiig yi yïn kì butɑ, yɑ ɑ́wëggí böggø yi gen. Yɑ ɑ́cyëëg ød, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ pɑ̈r." 
Psalms88:9 nyingɑ ɑ́lunyi yi orɑng. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn yethi cyɑ̈ng, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e cinggɑ thɑ̈ngi yɑn yïn." 
Psalms88:10 Tyëngthøø nyii göggø yi yïn ki gïïngɑ̈ngø? Ge ódi dhwödhø o yï lenhi yi gen? 
Psalms88:11 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií men-ɑ dwøng pere nyii kømmø kì yij rörø? Wɑlɑ̀ døøjí pere nyii kømmø kì kej thøø? 
Psalms88:12 Gïïngɑ̈ngø møgí ngɑ̈nyi kì kej muudhø? Wɑlɑ̀ døøjí ngɑ̈nyi kì piny tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wïl? 
Psalms88:13 Yɑ nyi ywøøg-ɑ köörí yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni køny yɑn, yï nyi kwɑjjɑ’ kwɑjjø kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Psalms88:14 Yɑde ɑ bɑɑny yɑn, Wuö? Yɑde ɑ lugí yɑn ngɑ̈jí?" 
Psalms88:15 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ orɑngø kër-ɑ ɑ́wönɑ yɑ thiinh, kɑ yɑ nyii cyɑ̈ngø ki thøø, yɑ ɑ́nyönhi yi cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy yɑn yi yïn." 
Psalms88:16 Yɑ ɑ́nyøng yi linyí, yɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn ki linyí." 
Psalms88:17 Yɑ ɑ́köllí rïïjø yɑ ótyegø yi böögø, kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn ni tyëëg bɑɑyø." 
Psalms88:18 Mɑ̈dhhɑ, mɑ̈dhh-ɑ døngø ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈w yi yïn ki yɑn, yɑ ɑ́döng wø 'lwööb kɑ muudhø." 
Psalms89:1 Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ócög yɑ wör-ɑ wörri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií. yï ólejjɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms89:2 Yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií bong cöge, ying-ɑ keje gïti ɑtheer, døøjí ying-ɑ keje ceth, ni kɑ̀ bëëd mɑl kì keje." 
Psalms89:3 Yï ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lwööb wøki jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ; Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ ɑ́köbbɑ kinni," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ócög e dɑ kwɑrí me bɑ rɑ̈dh, kwømí ócïbɑ keje gïti ɑtheer.’ ”" 
Psalms89:5 Mɑl wör e lejj-ɑ gïg-ɑ pëddi myëërø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, per døøjí wör-ɑ yi tyëng kwërø, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms89:6 Bong ngɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yïn kì mɑl, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong ngɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yïn kì kelli tyëng mɑl." 
Psalms89:7 Yï ceg kɑ böggø kì buri tyëng kwërø, ge ceg-ɑ kïïrø bënn kì bølí." 
Psalms89:8 Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong ngɑn dwøng ni yïn, bong ngɑn gøggi dyër ni yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms89:9 Yïn ɑ jɑɑg nɑɑm omelø ɑ rɑj, yïn ɑ nyi wëggi tegi ɑpɑge kwöjø." 
Psalms89:10 Lebiyɑthɑn nyii nyøngø yi yïn kɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyii tyɑmø yi yïn ki tegí." 
Psalms89:11 Mɑl geki piny bɑ møgí, yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j piny geki gïg-ɑ yije bënn!" 
Psalms89:12 Yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j wɑɑng wuudø geki wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Kïti Tɑbör geki Kïti Kermön lenh-ɑ yïn ki wörri medi pëëth. 
Psalms89:13 Yï teg nɑ ngø! O tegí dwøng nɑ ngø! 
Psalms89:14 Døøjø geki dyër bene tyelli kwømí o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø geki gøggi dyër ónënnø kì ri gwøgí bëne. 
Psalms89:15 Tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli yïn ki wör ri gen dɑ gyëdh, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij cɑɑr døøjí!" 
Psalms89:16 Ge nyi rïïj ge lenh-ɑ nyingí ki medi pëëth, kɑ yï nyi lenhi gen kipe døøjí." 
Psalms89:17 Wø nyi wëggí tyɑ̈mø, kɑ wɑ̈thi wøn tïng yi yïn mɑl, mɑ́ wø mɑɑr yi yïn." 
Psalms89:18 Mɑ́ yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ myeg ngɑn-ɑ korri wøn, yï kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́thödhi wøn ki rɑ̈dh." 
Psalms89:19 Bɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́böggi yïn ɑ́cɑ̈rrí cøn kinni, “Jɑl-liny men-ɑ teg ɑ́kønyɑ, kwøøm jyɑ̈gø ɑ́mëggɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ kì kelli jiɑ." 
Psalms89:20 Bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd ɑ́rønyɑ ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, ɑ́gïnyɑ ki møøw kwër." 
Psalms89:21 Tegɑ óbëëd e ying-ɑ köme yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ótëngi yi tegɑ." 
Psalms89:22 Koo pɑ̈nyi ki lodø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, koo tyɑm yi tyëngrijjø." 
Psalms89:23 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii ónyøng yi yɑn o tyëng-ɑ yethi gen di ɑter ki en, ónɑ̈g yi yɑn bënn." 
Psalms89:24 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ geki døøjɑ óbëëdø kì köme, ówëggɑ tyɑ̈mø ceth." 
Psalms89:25 Pödhe ólɑny yi yɑn e cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr gïti kömi Nɑm Porɑt. 
Psalms89:26 Óywøøg yïɑ kinni, ‘Yï bɑ wïyɑ, o yï bɑ Jwøgɑ yïn ɑ korri yɑn, o yïn ɑ nyi yiel yɑn.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ógwøgɑ ɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø, e ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli rɑ̈nhi kömi piny bënn." 
Psalms89:28 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöngɑ kipere ómïdhɑ ceth, lwömɑ ki en ógïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms89:29 Kwøme óbëëdø kì keje ceth ni mɑl, o bëëd e dɑ kwɑre me bɑ rɑ̈dh ceth." 
Psalms89:30 “De keløg ciggɑ ówiy piny yi kwɑrre, kɑ ge pɑ bëëdø kì kömi ciggɑ;" 
Psalms89:31 keløg ciggɑ ópyem yi gen, kɑ ge ocögø gï pɑ mïdhi gen," 
Psalms89:32 ge ócɑyɑ kipe orøøg gen, ge ówëggɑ orɑng kipe bɑ̈jji gen." 
Psalms89:33 De yɑ pɑ wïyi ki mɑɑri Debïd o møg-ɑ ɑ́köngɑ en pɑ pɑ̈d yi yɑn. 
Psalms89:34 Lwömi wøn ki en pɑ pɑ̈d yi yɑn, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni gï ógöggɑ en, pɑ wil yi yɑn." 
Psalms89:35 “Yɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø ki nyingɑ kwërø kinni, Debïd pɑ köbbɑ pyed." 
Psalms89:36 Yïe ódi kwɑrr ceth, lɑ̈ge ókorɑ ceth ni nudi cɑ̈ng kì mɑl." 
Psalms89:37 Ócïbɑ keje ceth ni dwɑ̈y kì mɑl; ni dwɑ̈y ɑ bɑ cwɑ̈gɑ kì yij mɑl.” 
Psalms89:38 De pyëwí ɑ́rënyi ki rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn; ɑwiyií piny kɑ bɑɑny. 
Psalms89:39 Lwömí ki bɑ̈ngí ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈d, yɑ̈re ɑ́leeng yij tør." 
Psalms89:40 Döri kɑɑle ɑ́dhur piny, kɑ dörre döng gɑ thur." 
Psalms89:41 Jɑmme bënn ɑ́yɑg yi tyëng-ɑ nyi bï ge opödhø, ceg kɑ gɑggø yi tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki en." 
Psalms89:42 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́wëggí tyɑ̈mø, pëthi gen ɑ́wëggí mïnø." 
Psalms89:43 Jɑmmi liny møge ɑ́tørrí, kɑ wëggí tyɑmø kì yij liny." 
Psalms89:44 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mee ɑ́rënyí, kɑ kwøme tɑ̈ɑ̈y piny." 
Psalms89:45 Áwëggí jwɑn yöø, kɑ wëggí yɑ̈rø" 
Psalms89:46 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng yï kɑnn-ɑ rií? Linyí gït-ɑ wɑɑng e lyel nɑ mɑc?" 
Psalms89:47 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni wø pɑ nyi ti bëëdø kì kömi piny o wø ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi yïn, wøn ɑ́ ji mø nyi thøw!" 
Psalms89:48 Á men ɑ cuggi bëëdø e pɑ thøw? Á men ɑ cuggi yieli wëye ki thøø? 
Psalms89:49 Wuö, ɑ́gøne mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií cøn? Ágøne møg-ɑ ɑ́köngí Debïd?" 
Psalms89:50 Pɑr, gwɑnn-ɑ gwɑddi yɑn, yɑ bɑ̈ngí Wuö, kí yëth-ɑ nginɑ yɑ̈ddi tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Psalms89:51 Rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn! Ceg kɑ gɑggø yi gen kì keny-ɑ kedhe. 
Psalms89:52 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti ɑtheer! Amen! Amen! 
Psalms90:1 Wuö, bɑ yïn ɑ yïí nyi yömmi kì yethi rïjj bënn." 
Psalms90:2 Yï ɑ́wöni yï nud e men-ɑ́ kïttì nuti cwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn, o lɑ̈bø nuti cwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn, yï ɑ́bëëd yïn ɑ́ Jwøk ceth o yï gïti ɑtheer yïn ɑ́ Jwøk." 
Psalms90:3 Wø nyi dwøøgí ri gïn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn wø nyi dwøøgí ri lɑ̈bø. 
Psalms90:4 Runn ɑ́lïp nɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kì yïí, ge nɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ kì yïí, ge ɑ́pöödh, nɑ sɑɑ̀ me cyeeg kì wɑ̈r." 
Psalms90:5 Wø ɑ́wøj yi yïn ni wöjji bɑɑyø, wø ɑ́kedh wø nɑ lɑ̈g, wø nɑ lum-ɑ nyi lidh e twïyø kì mwøl," 
Psalms90:6 lum-ɑ nyi jwɑn døngø, kɑ nyi jwɑn-ɑ thwøwø kɑ nyii thøø kì böörø." 
Psalms90:7 Wø ɑ́rënyi yi rɑ̈ji pyëwí, wø ɑ́bwøg yi linyí." 
Psalms90:8 Orøøg wøn ɑ́cïb yi yïn bølí, keny nenní orøng-ɑ gwøøg wøn kì gød." 
Psalms90:9 Runn-ɑ nëën wøn nyii ngølø ge cyeg yi linyí, nyi kedh e nɑ möngø." 
Psalms90:10 Runni wøn bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew yøw, wɑlɑ̀ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g keløg dëlli wøn teeg, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ge beed yi wøn kɑ orɑng geki kïïmø, ge nyi jwɑn-ɑ thumø, kɑ wø ókedhø." 
Psalms90:11 Á men ɑ ɑ́yod tegi linyí? Á men ɑ ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi linyí? 
Psalms90:12 Nyudhí wøn kinni runni wøn ceggø, o wø göög wøn wɑ̈thi wøn pel." 
Psalms90:13 Linyí gït-ɑ wɑɑng? Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki bɑ̈nggí!" 
Psalms90:14 Pɑ̈ng wøn ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií, o wø wör wøn pëthi wøn omedø kì yij bëëdi wøn bëne." 
Psalms90:15 Thödhí wøn ki medi pyëw me ni rɑ̈ji pyëw men-ɑ ɑ́mëggí wøn kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́kïïm wøn bënn. 
Psalms90:16 Wiy gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn yod yi wøn, wøn ɑ bɑ̈nggí, wiy dhwɑ̈ngí geki tegí lidh yi kwɑrri wøn." 
Psalms90:17 Yïn ɑ Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gyëdh wøn. Wiy gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wøn bënn nyi pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen!" 
Psalms91:1 Ngɑn-ɑ yömmi yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ korri yi Áyïmø," 
Psalms91:2 ócuggø köbbii kinni, “Bene yïn cwɑ̈gɑ, o yïn ɑ korri yɑn. Yïn ɑ bɑ Jwøgɑ, yïn ɑ gɑ̈nnɑ.”" 
Psalms91:3 Yï óyiele ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ kwïj yi yïn kɑ yï korre ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì. 
Psalms91:4 Yï ókume ki obërre, yï ókonge ceth, døøje bɑ kwödí, en ɑ nyi yiel yïn." 
Psalms91:5 Bong gïn böggí kì wɑ̈r, o bong gïn pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí kì dicɑ̈ng," 
Psalms91:6 wɑlɑ̀ bong yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g me göjji kì yij muudhø, wɑlɑ̀ rɑjj-ɑ nyi nɑ̈gi kì dicɑ̈ng." 
Psalms91:7 Ji ɑ́lïp ócuggø pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ge thøø kì butí, kí ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø møg tyeeg yïn, de bong gïnrɑj men-ɑ ónywɑl yïn." 
Psalms91:8 Yï ólïdhi ki wɑngí, ki kër-ɑ cɑɑy tyëngrijjø." 
Psalms91:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ɑ́ ngɑn nyi cwɑg yïn, Ngɑn-ɑ Pëddi Döng ɑ korri yïn." 
Psalms91:10 Bene ɑ bëëd e bong rɑj mø bï kömí, bong ngɑnrɑj me cyɑ̈ngi ki gølí," 
Psalms91:11 mɑ́ Jwøk wëywödde óöre yïí be kori yïn kì keny-ɑ kedhí. 
Psalms91:12 Yï ókwɑg yi gen ki cinggi gen, o tyellí cög ge pɑ pög yi tuggi kïttì." 
Psalms91:13 Ngurrì mø rijjø geki thöllì mɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, ge óyööny yi yïn ki tyellí." 
Psalms91:14 Jwøk okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yɑn, ge óyielɑ, o tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yɑn, yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ókongɑ." 
Psalms91:15 Kwøbbi gen óløøgɑ keny-ɑ ócwøøl yɑn yi gen, ge óyiel yi yɑn keny-ɑ óbëën kömi gen yi ɑkørr, ge ódøm yi yɑn kɑ ge nëngɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng." 
Psalms91:16 Ge ówëggɑ bëëdø ki runn mø gïïr, ge óyielɑ.”" 
Psalms92:1 Pwøjí døøj cɑrø, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lenhi yïn ki wör døøj, yïn Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng," 
Psalms92:2 kí lejji mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií kì mwøl, kí pøjji døøjí kì wɑ̈r," 
Psalms92:3 kí wörri thømi pujj geki oten kɑng. 
Psalms92:4 Pyëwɑ nyii mïnø yi gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ nyii wörø ki medi pyëwɑ, kì bɑng gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yïn." 
Psalms92:5 Gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yïn døngø cɑrø! Rummí dhɑ̈li pïïdø. 
Psalms92:6 De møgɑni pɑ cuggi yodø yi dhëg, ge pɑ gɑm yi wïj ngɑn rumme nøg kinni," 
Psalms92:7 tyëngrijjø ócuggø jwɑn døngø ni lum, tyëng-ɑ gøggi rɑj ócuggø dönyø; de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ge ónɑ̈g kinni tweet." 
Psalms92:8 Dɑ́ yïn, yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ óbëëdø yï dwøng gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms92:9 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn óthøw, o tyëngrijjø bënn ótyɑm." 
Psalms92:10 Yɑ ɑ́wëggí tëngø ni wɑdh, yɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi yïn ki medi pyëw!" 
Psalms92:11 Tyɑmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́lidhɑ ki wɑngɑ, ywøøg tyëngrijjø ɑ́lïngɑ ki yïthhɑ." 
Psalms92:12 Tyëngtir ódönyi ni yenh benø, kɑ ge ódøngø ni yenh sɑndɑl mø Lubnɑn." 
Psalms92:13 Ge nɑ yenh-ɑ ópiidhø kì ød Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ nyi døngi kì Kengi Jwøgee," 
Psalms92:14 ge nyii yöø ge nudd ge onywølø, ge nyi cög ge mɑr, o ge teeg." 
Psalms92:15 Menɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër, o bong ruj kì yij ngɑn-ɑ kor yɑn." 
Psalms93:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ rɑ̈dh. Rug-ɑ döng geki tegø. Piny ɑ́cïb keje kidøøj, o pɑ cuggi lëggø." 
Psalms93:2 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwømí ying-ɑ keje ceth kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑg piny, o yï nud keny-ɑ́ nudd e bong piny." 
Psalms93:3 Cwɑggi nɑ̈mmi omel-ɑ døngø ɑ́wɑ̈dhi mɑl, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cwɑggi gen ɑ́tïng gen, ge ceg-ɑ ruurø." 
Psalms93:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jyɑ̈gø ɑ́ ngɑndwøng kì pɑɑre mɑl, dwøng kibøli ruuri cwɑggi nɑɑm omeli dwøng, teeg cɑrø kibøli ɑpɑgi nɑɑm omelø." 
Psalms93:5 Ciggí gït-ɑ ɑtheer, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o Kengí bɑ kej kwër me dwøng, e gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms94:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ Jwøng nyii cudø ki gøølø, nyodh linyí!" 
Psalms94:2 Yïn ɑ jɑɑg ji bënn, dhwöödh cɑy tyëngɑthwøg ki cɑ́y-ɑ kyëëw ki gen!" 
Psalms94:3 Tyëngrijjø gït-ɑ wɑɑng pëthi gen omedø? Ge gït-ɑ wɑɑng pëthi gen omedø, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?" 
Psalms94:4 Tyëngorøg gït-ɑ wɑɑng ge othwøgø ge pwöd-ɑ köthi gen kipe gøggi rɑj? 
Psalms94:5 Jií ceg kɑ nyønø yi gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge guud-ɑ nyingi ji-ɑ bɑ møgí." 
Psalms94:6 Ge nɑ̈g-ɑ thwömm geki kïjj, ge luj-ɑ tyëngpɑth kì yij pödhø." 
Psalms94:7 Ge okööbø kinni, “Wɑ pɑ nenni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil bong gïn lidhe.”" 
Psalms94:8 Jiɑ, wude ɑ bëëd wɑ̈thi wun nøg, o wu bɑ dhëgg? Wu ódïd-ɑ wɑɑng?" 
Psalms94:9 Jwøk ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïthhee, ódhɑ̈lø lïngø? En ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j nyingee, ódhɑ̈lø nënnø?" 
Psalms94:10 En ɑ nyi ceg pödhh, gï ócög gï pɑ cɑye? En ɑ nyi pwönyi ji, óbëëd e kwïj wøw?" 
Psalms94:11 Nøgi rummi ji ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑ̈nyi yi en kinni dëlli gen pɑ nyi juur, o ge kwïj yɑbi thɑ́ kwøb." 
Psalms94:12 Tyëng-ɑ nyi ceg yi yïn ri gen dɑ gyëdh, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi pwönyí ki ciggí!" 
Psalms94:13 Ge ɑ́wëggí ywömi ri gen kì cyɑ̈nggi rɑj, gïti keny-ɑ ókunyyi tyëngrijjø ki bur men yije pɑ̈dhi yi gen." 
Psalms94:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie koo bɑny yi en, ji-ɑ bɑ møge koo wiye piny." 
Psalms94:15 Gønyy ódøøg be cïb kɑ̈jji gen ki burø, møgɑni ógwøg yi tyëngtir." 
Psalms94:16 Á men ɑ ɑ́cwɑg yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggɑ ki tyëngrijjø møgɑni? Á men ɑ ɑ́ying tungɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́byëddɑ ki tyëng-ɑ gøggi rɑj? 
Psalms94:17 Keløg yɑ pɑ di køny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wëyɑ di jwɑni pödhi tyëngthøø." 
Psalms94:18 Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ bɑ men pɑ̈ɑ̈dh,” de yɑ ɑ́tïng mɑl yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms94:19 Kenyi lïngi pyëwɑ kɑ yɑ orɑngø, yɑ nyii lugø yi yïn kɑ pyëwɑ nyii mïnø." 
Psalms94:20 Yï pɑ cuggi rëbø ki jɑggi burø møg-ɑ rijjø, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi gwøg ruj e nɑ cigg," 
Psalms94:21 ɑ nyi rømmi göggi tyëngdøj ki rɑj, kɑ ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r nyi cɑy gen ki thøø." 
Psalms94:22 Den-ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ nyɑg perɑ, Jwøgɑ ɑ korri yɑn." 
Psalms94:23 Gï ócɑye kì bɑng rɑ̈ji gen, kɑ gï nɑ̈ge kì bɑng orøøg gen, ge ónɑ̈g yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms95:1 Bïu lenhi wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör! Wör wɑ ki medi pëëth kì bøli ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yiel wɑ! 
Psalms95:2 Kedhi wɑ bøle ki wörri pwøj wɑ lenh-ɑ en ki wörri medi pëëth. 
Psalms95:3 Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ Jwøng teg, en ɑ teg kibøli jwögg bënn." 
Psalms95:4 En ɑ jɑɑg piny bëne, cɑg kì thɑ piny gïti wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ bɑ̈rrø cɑrø." 
Psalms95:5 En ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j nɑɑm omelø, o jɑɑg-ɑ yi en, o piny-ɑ thwøwø ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ yi en thyew." 
Psalms95:6 Bïu bøødh wɑ riee piny kɑ mɑlli wɑ, rum wɑ cøngee piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j wɑ!" 
Psalms95:7 En ɑ bɑ Jwøgee, bene wɑ ji-ɑ konggi yi en, bene wɑ dyëg-ɑ kwɑye. Lïngu møg-ɑ kwøbe dicyɑ̈ngtïn, okööbø kinni," 
Psalms95:8 “Muddi wun ko tëngi ni kweyyi wun kì Merïbɑ̀, ni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen kì yij pɑ̈l kì Mɑɑsɑ̀." 
Psalms95:9 Yɑ ɑ́tïm yi kweyyi wun kì kunɑni, ngö gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ kiper gen rumø’ lidhø yi gen." 
Psalms95:10 Yɑ ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen köörɑ buudhø yi rïnyɑni Akööbɑ kinni, ‘Á ji kidï ɑ bong pëthi gen kinøw! Ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi ciggɑ.’" 
Psalms95:11 Bene ɑ köngɑ ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ kinni, ‘Wu pɑ pɑ̈nyi kedhi yij pinyɑni kun-ɑ di nëngɑ wun ki ywömø.’ ”" 
Psalms96:1 Wör wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wörø me nyɑ̈n, Wöör kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ piny bëne." 
Psalms96:2 Wör wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu lenh-ɑ en, kømmu kwøbbi dönge kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn." 
Psalms96:3 Ngɑ̈j wun kwøbbi dönge kì yethi pödhh bënn, kɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge köbbi wun dhɑnhø bëne." 
Psalms96:4 Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwøng, o ceg kɑ lenhø ki mendwøng, wør ki mendwøng kibøli jwögg bënn." 
Psalms96:5 Mɑ́ jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn bɑ ngïjjì, den-ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl." 
Psalms96:6 Ótyegø yi mɑ̈r geki dhwɑ̈ng, o Kenge pɑ̈ng yi tegø geki myëërø." 
Psalms96:7 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ tyëng kömi piny bënn. lenhu mɑ̈re geki tege." 
Psalms96:8 Lenhu mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ nyinge lejji, muuj wun en ki gëdhhì, kɑ wu bïu Kenge." 
Psalms96:9 Bøødhu ri wun piny kì bøli ngɑn-ɑ bɑ Kwërø, kïrri dëlí kì bøle, yïn ɑ piny bëne!" 
Psalms96:10 Köbbu pödhh bënn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ rɑ̈dh! Piny ɑ́cïb keje, o pɑ nhɑ̈nhø, gønyyi ji nyi cïbe’ kɑ̈jji gen.”" 
Psalms96:11 Mïni pëthi wun, wun ɑ mɑl kí piny! Ruur yïn ɑ nɑɑm omelø wuki gïg-ɑ yijí bënn," 
Psalms96:12 mïni pëthi wun, wun ɑ pwödh wuki gïg-ɑ yethi wun bënn! Yenh óryeer ki medi pëthi gen kì yij thïm," 
Psalms96:13 keny-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be jɑɑgi piny bëne. Jii kömi piny ójɑɑg yi en kɑ gøggi dyër geki bongi geny. 
Psalms97:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ rɑ̈dh, wiy piny bëne pyëwe mïne, wiy mujji nɑ̈mmi omelø pëthi gen mïni gen!" 
Psalms97:2 Órïïmø yi pøøl geki muudhø, kwøme bëëd ɑ kömi døøjø geki gøggi dyër." 
Psalms97:3 Mɑc ócyɑ̈dhø kì bøle kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyi rɑ̈b yi mɑnyɑni. 
Psalms97:4 Piny ɑ́meny yi ogwele, piny ɑ́lïdhi kɑ okïïrø." 
Psalms97:5 Kïttì ɑ́leny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni cemɑ̀, ge ɑ́leny kì bøli Wïi piny bëne." 
Psalms97:6 Mɑl nyodh-ɑ gøgge dyër, dhwɑ̈nge ɑ́lidh yi pödhh bënn." 
Psalms97:7 Tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli ngïjjì ɑ́yɑ̈r bënn, jwögg bënn ri gen ɑ́bøødh gen piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms97:8 Tyëng Dhɑyøn pëthi gen ɑ́mïni, kɑ pëthi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ómïnø, kipe cɑ̈yí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms97:9 Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yïn ɑ jɑɑg kömi piny bëne, yï ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli jwögg bënn." 
Psalms97:10 Mɑɑnu rɑj, wu tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wëyi jie nyi korre’ korrø, gï nyi yiele yielø kì cinggi tyëngrijjø." 
Psalms97:11 Cɑr nyii mënyø kì kömi tyëngtir, pëthi tyëngdøj nyii mïnø." 
Psalms97:12 Med pëthi wun, wun ɑ tyëngtir, kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Pɑru gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk kwërø, kɑ pwøj wun." 
Psalms98:1 Wör wun ki wörø me nyɑ̈n kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e ɑ́göög ki gïg mø myër! Átyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki mendwøng kì yij liny, kì bɑng kɑ̀ tege, o bɑ kwërø." 
Psalms98:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyɑ̈me ɑ́nyodhe, teng-ɑ yïëde ɑ́nyudhe pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Psalms98:3 Møg-ɑ ɑ́könge Isrɑil gï mïdhe’ mïdhø geki døøje kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee. Tyɑ̈mi Jwøgee ɑ́lidh yi ji bënn. 
Psalms98:4 Wöör kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï lenh-ɑ en, yïn ɑ piny bëne, lenhu en ki wörri medi pëëth!" 
Psalms98:5 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör! Thum wun ki thøm! 
Psalms98:6 Kodhu kɑ̈ngì geki tùng, kɑ wu ryeer wun ki medi pëëth kì bøli rɑ̈dhee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms98:7 Ruur yïn ɑ nɑɑm omelø wuki gïg-ɑ yijí bënn, wöör yïn ɑ piny geki gïg-ɑ bëëdø kì kömí bënn!" 
Psalms98:8 Teng wun cinggi wun, wun ɑ nɑ̈mmì, wun ɑ kïttì, wör wun bënn ki medi pëëth kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Psalms98:9 mɑ́ e bï-ɑ be jɑɑgi piny. Jii kömi piny ójɑɑg yi en kɑ gøggi dyër geki bongi geny. 
Psalms99:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ rɑ̈dh, dëlli ji ceg-ɑ kïïrø kì bøle. Kwööm ɑ kömi kerobb, o piny ceg-ɑ kïïrø." 
Psalms99:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ dwøng kì Dhɑyøn, en ɑ jɑɑg ji bënn." 
Psalms99:3 Nyinge geki dönge ólenhi yi ji bënn, Bɑ kwërø!" 
Psalms99:4 Yï rɑ̈nh teg, yï mɑɑr-ɑ dyër, gøggi dyër ɑ́cïb yi yïn piny kì Isrɑil, yï ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki døøjø geki bongi geny." 
Psalms99:5 Lenhu Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Mɑ̈ddi wun kì bøli kwøme! Bɑ kwërø!" 
Psalms99:6 Mosɑ̀ geki Aɑron ɑ́bëëd gɑ ókwërre, o Sɑmwel ɑ́kwɑjj-ɑ en, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd e nyii kwɑjjø yi gen, kɑ kwøbbi gïn nyi løøge." 
Psalms99:7 Ákööb ki gïn kì yij lööj pøølø. Cigg geki kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́köbbe gïn, ɑ́mïdhi yi gen." 
Psalms99:8 Yïn ɑ Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwøbbi jií nyi løøgí løøgø, pyëwí ɑ́bëëd e nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gen, cɑgg ɑ́ kenyi cɑɑy gen kipe orøøg gen." 
Psalms99:9 Lenhu Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu mɑ̈ddi wun kì kïti kwëre. Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ kwërø." 
Psalms100:1 Wöör kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn ɑ lɑ̈bø bëne! 
Psalms100:2 Mɑllu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki medi pëëth, bïu bøle ki wörri medi pyëw!" 
Psalms100:3 Ngɑ̈ny wun wøw kinni bene Wë, ɑ bɑ Jwøk. En ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j wɑ, o wɑ bɑ møge, wɑ bɑ jie, o wɑ bɑ dyëge." 
Psalms100:4 Bïu yij Kenge wu kɑ̈ll-ɑ pwøj, bïu bøle e lenhu lenhø. Pwøj wun en kɑ lenhi wun." 
Psalms100:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j døøj, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee gït-ɑ ɑtheer, o lwöme ki jie, koo pɑ̈d yi en gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms101:1 Yɑ wör-ɑ wöri tɑri pyëw geki gøggi dyër, yɑ wör-ɑ bølí yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms101:2 Yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi kì yuu-ɑ døj ceth. Yï óbï yïɑ kì wɑɑng? Yɑ óbëëdø ki tɑri pyëw kì gølɑ," 
Psalms101:3 o yɑ ko yïëy ki gïgrijjø kinni tek. Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi tyëng-ɑ nyi lugi ngɑ̈thi gen Jwøk mɑɑn yi yɑn, bong gïn reb yɑn ki gen." 
Psalms101:4 Yɑ óbëëdø ceth yijɑ bong ɑ́dud, o yɑ koo rëbi ki tyëngrijjø." 
Psalms101:5 Ngɑn-ɑ nyi tummi wɑɑd gen ónɑ̈g yi yɑn; eni ngɑn-ɑ nyi kwɑ̈dhhi ngɑn megø. Ngeti ɑthwøg, men-ɑ tɑ̈dø bëëde koo ngin yi yɑn." 
Psalms101:6 Tyëng-ɑ yethi gen bong ɑ́dud ki Jwøk ónennɑ, ge ówëggɑ bëëdø kì gøldwøng. Tyëng-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi kì yuu-ɑ døj, ówëggɑ göggi yɑn." 
Psalms101:7 Bong ngeti pyed men-ɑ ówëggɑ bëëdø kì gøldwøng, bong ngeti pyed men-ɑ ówëggɑ bëëdø kì butɑ." 
Psalms101:8 Tyëngrijjø kì yij pödhø órïïj ge nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø, tyëng-ɑ rijjø ónɑ̈gɑ kì piny men. Tyëng-ɑ gøggi rɑj ócyeedɑ yïnø kì kɑɑl Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Psalms102:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ, kɑ ywøgɑ kipe kønyø lïngí!" 
Psalms102:2 Ngɑ̈jí ko lugí yɑn kɑ̀ yingɑ yethi rɑj! Kënní pɑ̈ddí yɑn kɑ̀ cwöddɑ, jwɑn kwøbbɑ ki løøgø kɑ̀ cwöddɑ!" 
Psalms102:3 Wëyɑ ceg-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ni yïrø, dëlɑ lyel nɑ mɑc." 
Psalms102:4 Yɑ ɑ́pwööd piny ni lum me thwøwø, gïncɑm pɑ kønø kì pyëwɑ." 
Psalms102:5 Yɑ ceg-ɑ currø, yɑ ɑ́döng yɑn ɑ́ cögø yøw." 
Psalms102:6 Yɑ ɑ́göög ni winyi pɑ̈l, yɑ nɑ tulø kì ød me wɑ̈n dɑ̈ɑ̈gø." 
Psalms102:7 Yɑ buud yɑ onëënø, yɑ nɑ winyø me bëëdø e kete kì wïj ød." 
Psalms102:8 Yɑ rïïj yɑ ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, tyëng-ɑ nyi gɑggi yɑn ceg-ɑ yethi gen ki kejjø kiperɑ." 
Psalms102:9 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwí, ɑgöögɑ yɑ cɑm-ɑ búr ɑ́ gïncɑm, o pïi nyingɑ ri gen yööl gen ki gïn-ɑ mɑdhɑ. Yɑ ɑ́tïng yi yïn mɑl, kɑ yɑ leeng piny." 
Psalms102:10  
Psalms102:11 Wëyɑ nɑ tïbi böörø, ɑ pɑ nyi cwööng ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, yɑ ɑ́thwøw ni lum." 
Psalms102:12 De yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ yïn ɑ kwömø gïti ɑtheer, yï ópɑrri yi rïjj bënn." 
Psalms102:13 Yï ódhwödh kɑ pyëwí ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki Dhɑyøn, bøli keny-ɑ ywöngi yijí kipere ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, bene bøli kenyɑni èn ceth," 
Psalms102:14 mɑ́ e mɑɑr yi bɑ̈nggí, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ rëny en, yethi gen óywöngø kipere, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëde ɑ́ thur." 
Psalms102:15 O Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j böggi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o tege böggi yi rɑ̈nhi piny bënn." 
Psalms102:16 Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ónyodhe, keny-ɑ ódøøge Dhɑyøn ki gerø." 
Psalms102:17 Cwɑggi jie, ji-ɑ nyingi gen bɑɑrø ólïnge, odhɑɑm gïn koo bɑny yi en." 
Psalms102:18 Gwëdu rïny-ɑ óbï møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ólenhi yi tyëng-ɑ nuti nywølø ɑnɑn." 
Psalms102:19 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïïdh piny kì kej kwëre, keny-ɑ mɑldwøng, ɑ́lïïdh kömi piny e ying-ɑ mɑl." 
Psalms102:20 Kɑ ywøøg ɑmɑgg lïnge kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kuum ki thøø göönye wɑ̈g. 
Psalms102:21 Codhe, o nyinge wøw kì Dhɑyøn, o ólenhi kì Yerusɑlem," 
Psalms102:22 keny-ɑ ócugi pödhh bënn, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlli yi gen." 
Psalms102:23 Yɑ ɑ́gwøg yɑ nyøødh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ nudd yɑ thiinh, runnɑ ɑ́gwøge ge nøg." 
Psalms102:24 Yɑ ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑnɑn yïn ɑ Jwøk, yɑ nuti yöø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ yïn ɑ bëëdø gïti ɑtheer," 
Psalms102:25 Yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j piny cøn, o mɑl ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi yïn ki cinggí." 
Psalms102:26 Ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, dɑ́ yïn ɑ óbëëdø, ge órënyi ni ógødh, Ge óweddí ni ógudh mø rënyø kɑ ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Psalms102:27 De yï nɑ kërí ceth, o runní bong cögi gen." 
Psalms102:28 Nyigi wøn óbëëdø ki mër, ge ókorri yi yïn, kwɑrri gen óbëëdø ki tɑrø." 
Psalms103:1 Lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ pyëwɑ! Lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ bëëdɑ bëne!" 
Psalms103:2 Lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ pyëwɑ, kɑ døøje ko wïl kì wïjí." 
Psalms103:3 Lɑɑwe nyi dwøøge’ piny kipe orøgɑ, kɑ yɑ nyi yiele ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlɑ." 
Psalms103:4 Wëyɑ nyi yiele’ yielø ki thøø, kɑ yɑ gëdhhe mɑ̈ɑ̈dø geki lɑ̈mpyëw." 
Psalms103:5 Yɑ nyi yɑ̈ɑ̈nge’ yɑ̈ɑ̈ngø ki gïgdøj kì yij bëëdɑ bëne, o yɑ bëëdɑ yɑ nɑ wøb; yɑ teg ni ógɑngi cor." 
Psalms103:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi cwɑg-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ruj, o jɑmmi gen nyi dögge’ gïn." 
Psalms103:7 Yëthe ɑ́nyudhe Mosɑ̀, kɑ gïgdøngø møge wëgge lidhø yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Psalms103:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yije nyii ywöngø, o bɑ ɑdhwɑ̈ng, pyëwe pɑ nyi jwɑn rënyø, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee pɑ nyi lwënyi." 
Psalms103:9 Pɑ nyi rïïj e ócɑ̈ɑ̈yø, o linye pɑ nyi gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms103:10 Cɑ́y-ɑ nyii cɑɑye wɑ pɑ kyëëw ki orøgee, o wɑ pɑ nyi cule gïn rwööm ki orøgee." 
Psalms103:11 Mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑre tyëng-ɑ böggii bong cöge nɑ lɑ̈wi kɑɑm mɑl geki piny. 
Psalms103:12 Orøgee nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈we’ lɑ̈ɑ̈wø ki wɑ, ni lɑ̈wi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Psalms103:13 Døøji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tyëng-ɑ nyi böggii nɑ døøji wïy ki nyige. 
Psalms103:14 Ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni wɑ ócwɑ̈jø kɑ ngø, pɑ wïl kì wïje kinni wɑ bɑ lɑ̈bø." 
Psalms103:15 De dhɑnhø nɑ lum; nyi twïy nɑ okøøg lum kì pɑ̈l," 
Psalms103:16 kɑ nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kɑ̀ köddi köme yi yømø; bong ngɑn cigii lidhø. 
Psalms103:17 De tyëng-ɑ wør Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gï mɑɑr yi en gït-ɑ ɑtheer, o døøje nyi tyëg-ɑ rïjj bënn," 
Psalms103:18 ki tyëng-ɑ mïdhi lwöme, geki cigge ki mïnh-ɑ dyër." 
Psalms103:19 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwøme ɑ́cïbe mɑl, en ɑ bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh ji bënn." 
Psalms103:20 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ wëywödd møg-ɑ teg, ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng cigge, ɑ nyi lïngi møge ceth." 
Psalms103:21 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wun ɑ yɑy-ɑ teg kì mɑl, wun ɑ bɑ̈ngge, bɑ̈ngg-ɑ nyi gwøg gwøge ceth." 
Psalms103:22 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge bënn, kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ jyɑ̈ge bënn Lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ pyëwɑ!" 
Psalms104:1 Pyëwɑ, lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï dwøng nɑ ngø! Yï órïïmø yi dhwɑ̈ng geki mɑ̈r," 
Psalms104:2 rií ɑ́bɑɑn yij cɑr e nɑ ógødh. Mɑl ɑ́peedh ni kemɑ̀," 
Psalms104:3 pɑɑrí ɑ́geer kömi pïi mɑl. Pøøl ɑ́gwøøg gɑ yɑ̈thi liny møgí, o yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi obërri yømø." 
Psalms104:4 Yømø ɑ bɑ tyëngwöddí, ogwel mɑl ɑ bɑ bɑ̈nggí." 
Psalms104:5 Yïn ɑ ɑ́cïb tyelli piny kɑ̈jji gen ceth, o cöge e pɑ nhɑ̈nhø gïti ɑtheer." 
Psalms104:6 Kɑ kum yi yïn ki nɑɑm omeli dwøng ni ógødh, o kïttì bɑ ɑkum yi pï." 
Psalms104:7 Pï ɑ́rengi kɑ ɑ́cɑ̈wwí gen, ge nyii rengø kenyi ryeer, yï köbb-ɑ gen." 
Psalms104:8 Ge nyii rengø ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì, kɑ ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ törr, gen ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn kiper gen." 
Psalms104:9 Pï ɑ́cïbí ki kew me pɑ cuggi kɑdhø yi gen, o piny cöge e pɑ kum yi gen këti." 
Psalms104:10 Nyingi pï ɑ́wëggí ngwej kì yij tör, kɑ nɑ̈mmì órïngø kì kɑɑm kïtt-ɑ thønhø." 
Psalms104:11 Lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ɑ kɑ̈jjɑni, odyerø rönhe nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈ge’ kɑ̈jjɑni." 
Psalms104:12 Winy nyi gëdd-ɑ wɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki uddi gen, kɑ ge nyii wörø kì bɑ̈ddi yenhɑni." 
Psalms104:13 Wɑ̈thi kïttì nyi ödí ödø ki kødh kì mɑl, kɑ piny pɑ̈ng yi yïn ki gyëdhhí." 
Psalms104:14 Luum dhög nyi wëggí twïyø, geki lum-ɑ nyi cɑm yi ji, kipe kinni o ge nyi pïïdh gen ki byelli gen." 
Psalms104:15 kɑ ge nyii göögø ki møgi oløg men mïni pëthi gen; geki møøw dhetun, men nyi mïni bëëdi gen, kí møg-ɑ nyi göög ki gïncɑm, men thödhi gen ki tegø." 
Psalms104:16 Yenhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyii yïddø ki pï mø ngenyø ɑ løg yenh sɑndɑl Lubnɑn møg-ɑ ɑ́pidhe. 
Psalms104:17 Ákej nyi gëdd-ɑ bɑ̈ddi yenhɑni o ówɑngø nyii gëdø ki øde kì wɑ̈thi gen thyew. 
Psalms104:18 Tenø bëëd ɑ wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ bɑ̈rrø o kunikït bëëd ɑ yethi órøggi kïttì. 
Psalms104:19 Dwɑ̈y ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j o ree nyi kwɑɑn dwɑ̈tt, kí cɑ̈ng o ree nyi kwɑɑn cyɑ̈ng." 
Psalms104:20 Wɑ̈r ɑ́gwøøg, o kì yij muudhø, lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l bënn nyi bï gen wɑ̈g." 
Psalms104:21 Nywøli ngurrì nyii ngɑ̈rrø kɑ̀ dwɑ̈ɑ̈r gen, ge yɑb-ɑ gïncɑm-ɑ mëggi gen yi Jwøk." 
Psalms104:22 Ge nyi døøg-ɑ yethi uddi gen kenyi tuul cɑ̈ng, kɑ ge óbuddø kì yethi uddi gen." 
Psalms104:23 Codhe, o ji kedhi gen be gwøøg gen o ge göög gen pïd böörø." 
Psalms104:24 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ɑ́göög ki gïg mø døngø cɑrø! Ge ɑ́gwøg yi yïn bënn kɑ peli wïjí! Kömi piny pɑ̈ng yi gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi yïn." 
Psalms104:25 Keny dɑ nɑɑm omeli dwøng; e dwøng o lɑɑj, gïg-ɑ bëëdø kì yije pɑ kwɑn, møg døngø kí møg thønhø bënn." 
Psalms104:26 Yɑ̈th-ɑ døngø kɑ̈ll-ɑ yije, o Lebiyɑthɑn bëëd ɑ yije, eni lɑ̈y-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j e dwøng dwøng." 
Psalms104:27 Ge bëëd ɑ rií bënn, yïn ɑ nyi thödhi gen ki gïgcɑmm-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen." 
Psalms104:28 Yïn ɑ nyi thödhi gen, o ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen, yïn ɑ nyi thödhi gen ki gïncɑm, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø." 
Psalms104:29 Kenyi lugí ngɑ̈jí gen, ge nyii böggø, kenyi kwɑɑny wëyi gen, ge nyii thøø kɑ ge døøg-ɑ ri lɑ̈m-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j gen." 
Psalms104:30 De kenyi muuj ki wëy, dhɑnhø nyi nywølø, kɑ gïg nyɑ̈n nywøl kì kömi piny." 
Psalms104:31 Dhwɑ̈ng bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti ɑtheer! Wiy pyëwe mede ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge! 
Psalms104:32 En ɑ nyi lïïdh piny, kɑ piny okïïrø, kenyi nywɑle kïttì, ge nyi ceg-ɑ dungø ki yïrø." 
Psalms104:33 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólenhɑ ki wör kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ónëënɑ bënn, Jwøk ólenhɑ ki wör kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudɑ." 
Psalms104:34 Wiy pyëwe mede ki wörɑ, mɑ́ medi pyëwɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïe." 
Psalms104:35 Wiy tyëngorøg nɑ̈g kì kömi piny, wiy bëëd e bong tyëngrijjø këti. Pyëwɑ, lenhí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Psalms105:1 Pwøju Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wøw wun dönge, nyudhu pödhh-ɑ kyeelø gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Psalms105:2 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör, kømmu gïg myër møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Psalms105:3 Thödhu kwërø ki dhwɑ̈ng, wiy pëthi tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑllii bënn, mïni gen." 
Psalms105:4 Yɑbu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki tege, kɑ nyi mɑlli wun ceth." 
Psalms105:5 Wun ɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm bɑ̈nge, wu kwɑrri Yɑgob jɑl-ɑ ɑ́yienye, pɑrru gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk, ki cɑ́y-ɑ nyi cɑɑye tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑ Jwøgee, cigge bɑ kiper kömi piny bëne." 
Psalms105:8 Lwöme ómïdhe gïti ɑtheer kwönge gït-ɑ ri rïjj ɑ́lïp. 
Psalms105:9 Lwöbø mi gen kí Abrɑhɑm mïdhe’ mïdhø geki møg-ɑ ɑ́könge Isɑɑk. 
Psalms105:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lwööb geki Yɑgob cøn lwömɑni gït-ɑ ɑtheer. 
Psalms105:11 Ákööb kinni, “Yï ómëggɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn, óbëëd ɑ́ mií.”" 
Psalms105:12 Jii Jwøk ɑ́bëëd kwɑnni gen nøg yøw, ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ tyëngpɑth kì piny Kɑnɑɑn." 
Psalms105:13 Ge ɑ́twɑ̈l ɑ yethi pödhh, ge nyi dɑ̈g-ɑ pönhï kí pönhï." 
Psalms105:14 De ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n mødø yi Jwøk; nyingi rɑ̈nhì ɑ́ceme kiper gïn. 
Psalms105:15 Ákööb kinni, “Bɑ̈nggɑ, bɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ ko nywɑl wun, tyëngtöng møgɑ ko nywɑl wun.”" 
Psalms105:16 Pödhi gen ɑ́kölli kɑ̈j yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gïgcɑmm bënn wëgge thumø." 
Psalms105:17 De bøli gïn ɑ́öde ki dhɑnhø, eni Yosep, ɑ ɑ́ngeew wɑ̈g ɑ́ bɑ̈ng." 
Psalms105:18 Tyelle ɑ́twöj ki ɑ́cwecwel, kɑ mune mɑg ki yëël dødø," 
Psalms105:19 gïti kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kɑ̈jji gen. Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bï gɑ dyër. 
Psalms105:20 Kɑ gøny yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ɑ́gøny yi jɑngi pödhh bënn." 
Psalms105:21 Acïbe gøn ɑ́ jɑngi mïïre, o jɑɑge piny bëne," 
Psalms105:22 gø ɑ́thödhe ki tegø kì kömi jyɑ̈ggi bɑnge, geki jøgdøng-ɑ nyi kønyii ki kwøb." 
Psalms105:23 Codhe, ɑkedhi Yɑgob Rïp, ɑpëgge pönhɑni." 
Psalms105:24 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie nënge ki nywøl mø ngenyø kɑ gï wëgge tëngø kibøli tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. 
Psalms105:25 Tyëng Rïp ɑ́göjje mɑɑni jie, o gï mïdhi gen ki yuu wëënyø." 
Psalms105:26 Codhe, ɑöre Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈nge geki Aɑron ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yienye." 
Psalms105:27 Agöög gen ki gïgdøngø kì ri tegi Jwøk, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì Rïp." 
Psalms105:28 Muudhø ɑ́öre kömi pönhɑni, de dhøge ɑ́pyem yi tyëng Rïp." 
Psalms105:29 Nɑ̈mmi gen ɑ́løge remø, kɑ rijji gïn nɑ̈ge." 
Psalms105:30 Piny gen ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi ógwɑ̈llì, cɑgg ɑ́ gøldwøng, ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi gen." 
Psalms105:31 Jwøk ɑ́kööb, kɑ pödhø bëne opɑ̈ngø yi lwɑngì geki bɑ̈y." 
Psalms105:32 Gï ɑ́göjje ɑtuni ɑ́piy, ɑ́piy ɑ́bï piny ɑ́ kej kødh," 
Psalms105:33 bɑ̈ggi oløøg gen ɑ́rënye geki ólɑ̈mmi gen, kɑ yenh bënn toore piny." 
Psalms105:34 Ákööb, kɑ bɑ̈nyø obëënø, e nɑ tør," 
Psalms105:35 kɑ gïg-ɑ mɑr kì yij pödhø bënn cɑme, kɑ byel cɑme bënn." 
Psalms105:36 Kɑyy-ɑ cwøw ɑ́nɑ̈ge, kì yethi kɑ̈lli Rïp bënn." 
Psalms105:37 Codhe, ɑpeeje tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g, kɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø kɑ̈l gen, ge ɑ́bëëd dëlli gen yöd, o ge teeg bënn." 
Psalms105:38 Pëthi tyëng Rïp ɑ́mïni keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bwøg yi gïn." 
Psalms105:39 Jwøk jie ɑ́rïïme ki pøølø, kɑ gï nënge ki mɑc men thödhi gen ki cɑr kì wɑ̈r." 
Psalms105:40 Ge ɑ́cwöddi ki rïngø, kɑ gï öde ki ɑkɑrø, ɑthödhe gïn ki gïncɑɑm mɑl, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø." 
Psalms105:41 Kït ɑ́yiebe kɑ pï rïng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yije, pï ɑ́mulli kì yij ryɑng ni nɑm." 
Psalms105:42 Apɑre könge kwërø, møg-ɑ ɑ́könge Abrɑhɑm bɑ̈nge." 
Psalms105:43 Kɑ jie møg-ɑ ɑ́yienye peeje wɑ̈g, ge owörø, ge óryeerø ki medi pëthi gen." 
Psalms105:44 Gï ɑ́mëgge pìnyi ji møøgø, kɑ pwödhhi gïn wëgge kwɑnyø yi gen," 
Psalms105:45 kipe kinni o kwøbbe ólïngi yi jie o cigge bënn mïdhi yi gen. Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! 
Psalms106:1 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Pwøj wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e døøj; mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee gït-ɑ ɑtheer." 
Psalms106:2 Á men ɑ cuggi kwøbi gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Á men ɑ cuggi lenhii kidøøj? 
Psalms106:3 Ree dɑ gyëdh eni ngɑn-ɑ nyi mïdhi cigge, ɑ gøggi dyër ceth." 
Psalms106:4 Pɑr yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ókøny jií, yiel yɑn kyeel ki gen."
