Ecclesiastes5:2 Lebí ko nyi jwɑni, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko nyi köngi ki pyëwí kì bøli Jwøk, ki gïn pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yïn. Mɑ́ Jwøk ying-ɑ mɑl, o yï ying-ɑ piny, wiy kwøbbí nyi bëëd ge nøg." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Rumm-ɑ gïïr nyii kɑ̈nø ki lɑ̈g mø rijjø, o kwøbb-ɑ gïïr nyi wëgg-ɑ dhɑnhø kwøb ki kwøbbi dhëëgø." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Keløg e dɑ gïn könggí Jwøk, jwɑɑn ki gwøgø ceth, mɑ́ pyëwe pɑ nyi med ki dhëëgø." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Lɑ̈w ke cöög yï pɑ köngi kibøli ke köngí ki gïn pɑ cuggi gwøgø yi yïn. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Rií ko wëggí kïdhi yij orøg yi lebí, o yï cöög yï pɑ kööbø kì bøli ókwëri Jwøk kinni, yï ɑ́wɑ̈dh-ɑ kwøb yøw. Ede Jwøk ɑ wëggí mɑgø yi liny ki yïn, o gwøgí bëne gø rënye?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Bong dyër kì ri ngenyi lɑ̈g geki ngenyi dwøg, ceg Jwøk ki böggø." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Keløg ngɑn wɑnge cɑn ólidh yi yïn e orujø yi ngɑn-ɑ jyɑ̈gø, o bong dyër geki gøggi dyër, yï ko ngɑ̈ng yi møgɑni, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ dwøng ojɑɑgø yi ngɑn megø me dwøng kibøle, o dɑ ngɑn megø me dwøng kibøli gen bënn." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Cɑgg ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, nyi yiel-ɑ yi gïg-ɑ cyeg kì pinye." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Ngɑn mɑɑr ngyëny, pɑ nyi yɑ̈ng yi ngyëny, nɑ ngɑn mɑɑr dhög ceth, o menɑni bong gïndøj kì ree thyew." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ke ngënyi kɑ̈rí, tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈mø ceg-ɑ ngënyø thyew. Gïn-ɑ yod yi yïn, bɑ ngɑ̈nyí wøw kinni yïí dɑ kɑ̈r." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ngeti gwøg nyii nenø ki neni dwøng, cɑgg e yɑ̈ngø wɑlɑ̀ nuti. De tyëngkɑ̈rì pɑ nyi neni yi rummi jɑmmi gen." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki gïnrɑj kì kömi piny, kinni ji nyi cung-ɑ piny ki ngyëny møg-ɑ ógwøg gen gïn-ɑ ódwɑddi yi gen kì bøli keny megø," 
Ecclesiastes5:14 kɑ ngyënyyɑni nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, kɑ dhɑnhø nyii döngø ki cingge, kɑ ojɑdø ki gïn lɑg yi wɑ̈de kì bɑnge." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Dhɑnhø nyi døg e nɑ kɑ ɑ́bëëne wɑ̈g kì yij meye; nyi døg e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, bong gïn nyi kɑ̈l yi en kì kömi piny kì ri jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́lem yi en." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Nënni e bong gïndøj me yod yi dhɑnhø kì bɑng gwøge, den-ɑ́ yømø yøw, nyi kedh nɑ kɑ ɑ́bëëne ceth. Bong gïn kɑ̈l yi en kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Bëëdee bëne kì kömi piny thumi ɑ́ muudhø, kí kïïmø, kí liny geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́yodɑ bɑ kinni: gïn-ɑ døj bɑ kinni, o dhɑnhø cyɑ̈me, o mɑ̈dhe, o pyëwe mede ki gwøng-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk, kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ nøg møg-ɑ bëëde kì kömi piny, mɑ́ menɑni bene köögi miee." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki kɑ̈r, kɑ gø wëgge tɑ̈bbø kì yij kɑ̈rɑni, o pyëwe mede ki pïde, bëëde pyëwe med ceth, mɑ́ menɑni bɑ muunyi Jwøk." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Wiy bëëd e bong gïn rømme kì ri nøgi runne kì kömi piny, mɑ́ e ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki medi pyëw." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Dɑ rɑj møøgø mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ thyew kì kömi piny, rɑj mø wëggi ji mø gïïr orɑng." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Dɑ dhɑnhø me thödhi yi Jwøk ki kɑ̈r me dwøng. Bong gïn cɑ̈nnii. De ɑ́cög e pɑ thödhi yi Jwøk ki medi pyëw me di tɑ̈bbe kì yij kɑ̈rɑni, de yöd e cɑm-ɑ yi ngɑnpɑth. Menɑni bɑ gïjø me rɑɑj cɑrø." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Cɑgg dhɑnhø nyige bɑ miyø, kɑ obëëdø kì kömi piny ki runn mø gïïr, de bong medi pyëw kì yïe ki jɑmm-ɑ døøj kì kömi piny, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ ocögø e pɑ kony ki dhwɑ̈ng, yɑ orumø kinni dhɑnhø men-ɑ ɑ́nywøl e thøø lɑ̈w kibøle." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Bong gïndøj kipe dhɑnhø men-ɑ nywøl e thøø, mɑ́ e kedh-ɑ yij muudhø kun wïle." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Bëëdi kömi piny nuti yood en, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́lidhe kì yije, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ɑ́yïddi ki ywömø kibøli jɑlkɑ̈rɑni." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Cɑgg e di bëëd kì kömi piny ki runn ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew, e bong medi pyëw me yode, bong gïn wɑnge, mɑ́ ge kedh-ɑ kej ɑ́kyel ryeet." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wɑ pïd yi gwøg kɑ per kinni o wɑ yïddi wɑ ki gïncɑm, de wɑ pɑ wïyi ki dwɑddi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi wɑ." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Døøji ngɑn wïje pel bɑ ngø kibøli dhëg? O ɑ́ ngø ɑ nyi yod yi ngɑn jɑdø, men-ɑ ngɑ̈ny bëëdø ki bëëndøj?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Menɑni bong gïndøj kì ree, nɑ ngwej kì bɑng yømø. Lɑ̈w ke med pyëw dhɑnhø ki gïn-ɑ nud kì yïe, kibøli ke tyer pyëwe gïjø megø yøw." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Gïg-ɑ cwöb bënn, ɑ́cïb kɑ̈ge dööng, o ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ kinni dhɑnhø pɑ cuggi gøny ki ngɑn teg kibøle." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Kɑ̀ mɑ̈gí ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r yï ogönyø ki en, ceg-ɑ kedhø e órënyø, o bong gïn med me yod yi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Á men ɑ ngɑ̈nyi gïn-ɑ døj kipe dhɑnhø ki bëën-ɑ nøg, men-ɑ nyi wɑ̈ɑ̈ny ni tïbø? Á men ɑ cuggi kwøbi gïn-ɑ ócwöb kipere kì bɑng keny-ɑ óthøwe?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Døøji bëëdø lɑ̈w kibøli møw-ɑ yøme med, men-ɑ ngewe teeg; cyɑ̈ng-ɑ thøw dhɑnhø lɑ̈w kibøli cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywøølii." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Lɑ̈w kedhi gøl-ɑ di thøø kibøli kedhi kej ryëj, mɑ́ wɑ óthøw bënn, rømmi wɑ møgɑni kidøøj." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kïïmø lɑ̈w kibøli ngyerø, mɑ́ kïïmø nyi pwöny-ɑ wɑ ki gïg mø per gen teg." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel nyii rumø kì ri thøø, de dhëgg nyi rømm-ɑ bëëdi medi pëëth yøw." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Köbbi yïn bɑ̈jjí yi ngɑn wïje pel, lɑ̈w kibøli lenhi yïn ki wör yi dhëgg." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ngedhi dhëg nɑ cwɑggi koodh mø rɑ̈b yi mɑc, bong gïn wɑngi yi en." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ruj nyi wëgg-ɑ rummi ngɑn wïje pel nungø, kwɑjji dhɑnhø ki ngyëny nyi rëny-ɑ nyinge." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Cögi gïïpiny døøj kibøli cɑ̈ge. Ngïïnø lɑ̈w kibøli thwøgø. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Rií ko nyi wëggí jwɑnø ki mɑgø yi liny, mɑ́ mɑngø yi liny bɑ nøgi wïj." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Yï ko kööb kinni cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh gede ɑ døøj gen kibøli cyɑ̈nggi ɑnɑn. Kipe pyëjjɑni bong peli wïj kì ri gen. Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel pɑ nyi pëëjø kinøw. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Peli wïj døj nɑ gïn lɑg, bɑ døøjø, o wëy nyi mïdhe’ mïdhø," 
Ecclesiastes7:12 o yï korre’ korrø ni ke di korri yïn yi ngyëny. Yï nyii korrø yi peli wïj, bene ɑ bɑnge døøje." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Rum kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk; gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøk ɑ́ ódwøl ócuggø tyenyø yi yïn? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Nyi bëëd pyëwí e med cyɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëd jɑmmì døøj, kɑ kenyi bëën rɑj nyi pɑr kinni, døøjø geki ɑkørr nyi ör-ɑ yi Jwøk; o gïn-ɑ ólunyi cwöbø kì bɑng gen, kwïj yi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́lidhɑ, dɑ tyëngtir møg nyi thøw ki døøji gen, o dɑ tyëngrijjø møg runni gen ngënyi ge rijjø ceth." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Yï ko bëëd yï døøj ki mendwøng, wɑlɑ̀ peli wïjí ko pɑg, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g rií?" 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Yï ko göög ki rɑj ki menrɑj, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko bëëd wïjí nøg cɑrø, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ thøw e bøli kejí nuti?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Lɑ̈w ke mïdhí gen ryeet, mɑ́ keløg Jwøk owørø yi yïn, bong gïn dhɑl yïn." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Peli wïj, dhɑnhø nyi thödhe’ thödhø ki tegø me lod tegi kɑɑl me jɑɑg yi jyɑ̈ggì pyɑ̈rø." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Bong ngɑntir kì kömi piny, me cuggi gwøg ki gïndøj e pɑ røngi." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Yï ko pëggi be bidh ki møg-ɑ kømmi yi teedø, kipe yï ólïngø kinni, i yï ógwɑddø yi bɑ̈ngí." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Mɑ́ e ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn ki pyëwí kinni dɑ ji møøgø mɑ ɑ́gwɑddi yi yïn tyel mø gïïr. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́rɑngɑ ki peli wïj, kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, wïjɑ ópïlli, de yɑ ɑ́dhɑl yi riɑ." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Gïg-ɑ göögø bënn kì kömi piny dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wïj dhɑnhø. Á men ɑ cuggi yodi gen bënn? 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Acïbɑ pyëwɑ ri kwøbbi ngɑ̈nyi wøw geki yɑb ki thɑ́ kwøb, yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yodi peli wïj kí løøgi møg-ɑ pyënyɑ riɑ, o yɑ yodɑ kinni gøggi rɑj bɑ dhëëgø, o nøgi wïj bɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ayïddɑ ki gïjø me rɑɑj kibøli thøø, ɑ løg ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ pɑ̈r ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì. Mine bɑ ɑbyëg kí bøy, cingge bɑ digïddì, bɑ ngɑn mɑɑr yi Jwøk ɑ óbodh kì cinge, de jɑlorøg nyi mɑge’ mɑgø." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́yodɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́yɑbɑ thɑ́ kwøb mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Thɑ́ kwøb møøgø ɑ́yɑbɑ thyew, de ge nuti yood yɑn. Yɑ ɑ́yïddi ki jɑlø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́lïp, men cuggi wørø, de bong ngɑndhɑjø mɑ ɑ́yodɑ." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́yodɑ kete bɑ kinni, ji ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøk ge døøj, de ge ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki yëëth møøgø." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ngɑn wïje pel bene en ɑ ngɑ̈nyi lwøbi thɑ́ kwøb, o nyi wëgg-ɑ bønyø yi peli wïj, kɑ loji bøle nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Nyi gwøg gïn-ɑ kwøb yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ yï ko nyi wɑ̈dhi köngø ki nyingi Jwøk kinni gïn-ɑni ógwøg yi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Yï ko nyi jwɑn kedhø kì buti rɑ̈dh, yï nuti ti rumø kì ri gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn, mɑ́ yï ócuggø göggø yi en ki gïn-ɑ dwɑdde göggi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Rɑ̈dh yïe dɑ tegø, o bong ngɑn cuggi tyëddii men kew kwøbbe." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Kenyi mïdhi cigg yi dhɑnhø, nyi bong-ɑ rɑj mø bï köme. Ngɑn wïje pel ngɑ̈ny wøw ki bøli keny-ɑ døøj ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Jɑmmì bënn dɑ bøli kej gwøgi gen, de bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Wɑ kwïj wøw ki gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki, o bong ngɑn köbbi wɑ." 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Bong ngɑn cuggi cungi thøwe, o bong ngɑn cuggi yienyi bøli keny-ɑ óthøwe." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Møg bënn ɑ́yodɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́rumɑ kì ri gïg-ɑ gøggi kì kömi piny men, keny-ɑ bëëd ji møøgø yï gen dɑ tegø kì kömi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, o tyëngɑni rɑngi gen kì cinggi gen." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ngee, yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki tyëngrijjø ge okonyø, de keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög ji kì be kony, ge ɑ́dwöög ge pøjj-ɑ tyëngrijjø møgɑni, ge ɑ́tir ki pøjjø kì kɑɑl-ɑ́ yije ɑ́göög gen ki rɑj. Menɑni bong gïndøj kì ree." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Tyëng-ɑ gøggi rɑj pɑ nyi jwɑn ki cɑyø, bene ɑ bëëd pëthi ji mɑɑr-ɑ gwøg ki rɑj." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Ngetorøg nyii røngø tyel miyø, kɑ ocögø e pɑ thøw. Gïn-ɑ nyi kømmi yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; ge nyii kööbø kinni, i yï ócuggø bëëdø ki tɑrø ke lïngí kwøbbi Jwøk," 
Ecclesiastes8:13 de tyëngrijjø pɑ nyi yïddi ki døøjø. Bëëdi gen kì kömi piny nyi jwɑn-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ni tïbø, o ge óthøw ge thønhø, mɑ́ Jwøk pɑ böggi yi gen." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 De menɑni bong gïndøj kì ree. Dɑ gïjø megø kì kömi piny keny, me pɑ cuggi gɑmø yi wïj dhɑnhø, cyɑ̈ng møøgø cɑ́yi tyëngrijjø nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi tyëngtir. Kɑ tyëngrijjø óyïddø ki köögi, de ge nɑ tyëngtir. Menɑni bong gïndøj kì ree." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kɑ̀ bëëd møgɑni kinøw, lɑ̈w bëëdi dhɑnhø pyëwe omedø kì kömi piny. Mɑ́ cɑm geki mɑdh, kí medi pyëw, bene gen ɑ pëddi døøjø kì kömi piny. Bene gïn-ɑ cuggi yodø yi dhɑnhø kì bɑng pïde, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøk, gɑ møg bëëde kì kömi piny." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Kenyi yɑbɑ wïjɑ kipe yodi peli wïj, kí yodi gïg-ɑ gøggi yi ji kì kömi piny, kɑ yodɑ kinni dhɑnhø ócuggø bëëdø e pɑ neni kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng," 
Ecclesiastes8:17 de gïg-ɑ gøggi yi Jwøk pɑ cuggi gɑmø yi wïje. Cɑgg ree pɑ̈nye kidï, pɑ yod yi en kinni tek. Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel okööbø ce ge ngɑ̈ny wøw, de ge kwïj wøw." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Yɑ ɑ́rum kì ri møgɑni bënn, kɑ yodɑ kinni tyëngtir geki tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen bënn, ying-ɑ cingi Jwøk. Bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki, cɑgg ɑ́ ri gïg-ɑ mɑɑr yi en, kí gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi en." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bong gïn bɑ̈ɑ̈n, gïg-ɑ óbï kömi tyëngtir geki tyëngrijjø, kí tyëngdøj geki tyëngrijjø, kí tyëng kwøbbi Jwøk geki tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi muujø ki gëdhhì geki tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi muujø. Bong gïn bëëd ngɑndøj e lɑ̈w kibøli ngɑnrɑj; ngɑn-ɑ nyi köngi pɑ lɑ̈w kibøli ngɑn-ɑ nyi böggi ki köngø." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Gïn-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø kì kömi piny bɑ kinni, gïg-ɑ óbï kömi ji bënn dhuki megø pɑ̈r. O pëthi ji pɑ̈ng yi rɑj geki dhëëgø, codhe o ge nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈y piny yi thøø." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 De tyëng-ɑ nëënø yï gen dɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø; gwöng nëënø lɑ̈w kibøli ngur men-ɑ thøø. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nëënø ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni ge óthøw, de tyëngthøø bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi gen, bong köögi me nud kiper gen këti, ge ɑ́wïl ki mendwøng." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kí mɑ̈ɑ̈nø geki tyiel møg-ɑ ɑ́ying pëthi gen ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïti ɑtheer. Bong gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi gen kì kelli gïg-ɑ gøggi kì kömi piny këti. 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, cɑm gïncɑmí kɑ møgi oløgí mɑɑdh ki medi pyëwí, mɑ́ bene gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk kiperí." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Bëëd ógudhí ge tɑr yethi cyɑ̈ng, kɑ wïjí nyi kunyi ki møw-ɑ yøme med." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Bëëd pyëwí med yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn ki cyëgí men-ɑ mɑɑr yi yïn, ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Jwøk, mɑ́ e bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Jwøk kì yij bëëdi orɑngí kì kömi piny." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Gwøng-ɑ yod yi yïn, gwøøg ki tegí bëne, mɑ́ e bong gwøg wɑlɑ̀ rummì wɑlɑ̀ dïdø, wɑlɑ̀ peli wïj kì piny kun-ɑ ókedhi yi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Kɑ yodɑ këti kinni, kì kömi piny, pɑth ki ngɑn-ɑ nyi rïngi kidøøj ɑ nyi tyɑ̈mø. Pɑth ki liny-ɑ teg ɑ nyi tyɑ̈mø. Pɑth ki tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel ɑ nyi yïddi ki gïncɑm. Pɑth ki tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw ɑ nyi kɑ̈ri. Pɑth ki tyëng-ɑ cuggi gwøg, ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi mɑl. De rɑj nyii cwöbø kipe ji bënn." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Mɑ́ e bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi bøli keje. Nyi nɑ mɑgi winyø yi ɑ́kɑ̈llì, kɑ nɑ mɑgi rëjø yi bøy, dhɑnhø nyi liib-ɑ piny yi thøø, kì bøli keny me nuti rømmø yi en." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Dɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ thyew, ɑ løg tegi per peli wïj kì kömi piny." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Ádɑ kɑɑl me thiinh mɑ ɑ́tyeg yi rɑ̈dh me teg kinni, o di pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi kɑɑlɑni, o döre di dhure piny." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Ádɑ jɑl me wïje pel me wɑnge cɑn kì kɑɑlɑni, me di yiel kɑɑl ki peli wïje. De bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑr jɑlɑni." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 De yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, peli wïj lɑ̈w kibøli tegø, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd e bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑr peli wïj jɑl-ɑ wɑnge cɑn, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lïngi kwøbbe." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Lɑ̈w lïngi kwøbbi ngɑn wïje pel, kibøli lïngi ryeeri jɑgø kì bøli ji mø wɑ̈thi gen nøg." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Peli wïj døøj kibøli jɑmmi liny, de ngetorøg ɑ́kyel gïgdøj mø ngenyø nyi rënye’ rënyø." 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Møw-ɑ yøme med nyii pënnø yi lwɑngg-ɑ thøw yije, nɑ menɑni ceth, dhëëgø me nøg nyi rëny-ɑ peli wïj me dwøng." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Pyëw ngɑn wïje pel nyi tyer-ɑ gøggi dyër, de pyëw dhëg nyi yɑb-ɑ gøggi rɑj." 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Dhëg cɑgg e ceg cyɑ̈dhø kì yij yöö, nøgi pyëwe ceg-ɑ nënnø ceth, dhëëgø mee nyi nyudhe’ ji." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Keløg jɑngí omɑgø yi liny ki yïn, yï ko kon ki gwøgí, cɑgg yï bɑ̈jjø, pyëwe ócuggø lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki yïn ke cöög yï okudø." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Dɑ gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kömi piny, ɑ løg møn-ɑ mød ji yi tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen nøg nyi mëgg-ɑ lɑ̈ww-ɑ døngø, o tyëngkɑ̈rì kwɑny gen kɑ̈jj-ɑ bong per gen." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Bɑ̈ngg ɑ́lidhɑ ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ kyënyì, o nyiirɑ̈dhh cyɑ̈dh-ɑ tyelli gen ni bɑ̈ngg." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ngɑn-ɑ nyi kony bur nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ yije, o ngɑn-ɑ nyi dhur dörø piny, nyii kɑjø yi thwöl." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Ngɑn-ɑ nyi tweg kït nyii yïddø ki kedø, o ngɑn kɑg yenh nyii yïddø ki kedø thyew." 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Keløg dørí gug, o nuti pɑɑg yïn, göög yi yïn kɑ tegø me dwøng. De peli wïj gwøge nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ keje ceth. Kër-ɑ gwøøg gwøg nyi gwir e gwøngɑni nuti cɑ̈gø." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ngɑ̈nyi tuuri dhø thwöl bong døøje keløg thwöl rum kɑ̈jjø. 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Kwøbbi ngɑn wïje pel nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wøre, de kwøbbi dhëg nyi rëny-ɑ en." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Kwøbbi dhëg nyi cɑ̈gi kɑ dhëëgø, o nyi cög kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø me rɑj." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Dhëg kwøbbe pɑ nyi thumi. Bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki, bong ngɑn köbbi wɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb kì bɑng keny-ɑ óthøw wɑ." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Dhëg nyi ceg-ɑ pïdø yi gwøg, kɑ ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ki yuu pɑc." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Pödhø nyii rënyø keløg rɑ̈dhe bɑ nyelthinh, o wøw nyi ru e pëjje ceg-ɑ cɑm." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 De pödhø ree nyi dɑ gyëdh keløg rɑ̈dhe ngɑ̈ny löggø, o pëjje nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ bøli kej cɑm ceth, o ri gen pɑ nyi wëggi gen nɑ̈gø yi møgø." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Keløg dhɑnhø dële ledh, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø thïgi øde, ønɑni nyii pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Cɑm geki mɑdh ki møgi oløg nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ medi pyëw, de ge pɑ yod yi yïn e yïí bong ngyëny." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Rɑ̈dh ko yɑɑny cɑgg ɑ́ ki pyëwí, o ngetikɑ̈r ko yɑɑny cɑgg yï ying ødí yï ketí. Mɑ́ kwøbbí ócuggø kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi winyø, kɑ gï muuje gïn." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Nyi muuj, mɑ́ yï óyïddi ki köögi kì bøli keny megø." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Nyi cïb jɑmmí kɑ̈jj mø gïïr, mɑ́ rɑjj-ɑ óbï kömí kwïj yi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Yɑdh nyi cöög-ɑ tung-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhe ceth. Kenyi lunyi pøøl, kødh nyi ceg-ɑ mɑ̈gø ceth." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Keløg yï yïd-ɑ yømø o cunge, o piny kwöje, yï pɑ kɑ̈gø, o bong byel møg-ɑ ókɑj yi yïn." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi Jwøk, o gïn-ɑ gwøg yi en, pɑ cuggi gɑmø yi wïjí, kwïj yi yïn kër-ɑ nyi gwøøg cu dhɑnhø kì yij meye." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈g kì mwøl kí böörø, mɑ́ e kwïj yi yïn keløg ɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́wën ɑ ótwïy kì kelli gen, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ ócyeg kidøøj." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Bëëdi dhɑnhø e onëënø bɑ gïjø me myër, nenni cɑ̈ng myëër cɑrø." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Bëëd pyëwí med yethi cyɑ̈ng, mɑ́ thøø óbï, o thøø bɑ̈r kibøli nënnì. Bong gïndøj me cuggi ngɑ̈dhø." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Yɑɑg thønhø, med pëthi wun ki bëëdi wööbø geki jurø. Gwøgu gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi pëthi wun, ɑ nenni yi wun. De ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, kwøbbi wun ólidh yi Jwøk e ködd-ɑ kömi gïgɑni bënn." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Yï ko nyi kïïm, kɑ pyëwí ko nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈m, mɑ́ yï koo cög yï thiinh." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Wïjí ko wïl ki Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïn kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd yï thiinh, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti bëën cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ rijjø, bøli keny-ɑ ókööb kinni, “Bong medi pyëw me nud kiperɑ këti.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Bene bøli keny-ɑ ólunyi cɑɑr cɑ̈ng geki dwɑ̈y kí kyell kì nyingí, o pølli kødh koo wɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Codhe kɑ cinggí, cingg-ɑ ɑ́korri yïn døøg-ɑ be okïr, kɑ tyellí tyell-ɑ teg ɑnɑn ónyönhø, kɑ leggí ódhɑ̈lø nyɑm, kɑ nyingí ódhɑ̈lø nënnø kidøøj." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Yïthhí ópëngi, kɑ yï ódhɑ̈lø lïngi cwɑggi tyëng-ɑ wör kì yöö. O cwɑggi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ wïj pɑny ódhɑ̈li ki lïngi yi yïn. De cɑgg ɑ́ ywøøg ɑ́kej, yï ceg kɑ cyëëwø yi en." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Yï ódøøg be böggø yi kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ ótøng, kɑ yï óböggø ki cyɑ̈dhø. Yëyyi wïjí ri gen óløg gen wɑ́r, kɑ yï døøg-ɑ be yɑ̈jjø kì piny, bong gïn-ɑ ótyer yi pyëwí këti. Wɑ kedh-ɑ kej ywömee, keny-ɑ óbëëd yi wɑ gïti ɑtheer. Codhe, o ji ywöngi gen kì yethi yëëth." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Kì bɑng keny me nøg, wëy ócöd ni ɑ́cwecwelli ɑ́tegø, wɑlɑ̀ ni tørri tɑbi dhɑb, thøl ócöd kɑ ɑtöög pï ree møde." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 O lɑ̈bø døøge piny keje, o wëy døøg gen yï Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́mëggi gen wɑ." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Tïddi Kwøb ɑ́kööb kinni i bong gïndøj kinni tek, møgɑni bënn bong gïndøj kì ri gen." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Kì bɑng peli wïj Tïddi kwøb, ji ɑ́pwönye ki gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi en. Thɑ́ gɑ́j ɑ́ti yi en ki yɑbø kidøøj, kipe yodi dyër kì ri gen." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Tïddi kwøb ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yodi kwøbbi døøjø, de kwøbb-ɑ bɑ dyër ceth ɑ́gwed yi en." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel bedh nɑ ɑthiyø, men-ɑ nyi cørri dyëg. Ge nɑ musmɑ̈rr møg thøø yi gurø, ge ɑ́muuj-ɑ yi Jwøk, ngɑn-ɑ kwɑy wɑ bënn." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Wɑ̈dɑ, dɑ gïjø me dwɑddi tidø yi yïn kidøøj. Gwed ki wɑ̈j bong cöge, o rɑng-ɑ gïïr nyi pïd-ɑ dhɑnhø." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kì bɑng møg bënn, dɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel me dwɑdd-ɑ kwøbø, böggí Jwøk, kɑ gïn-ɑ kwøbe nyi gwøøg ceth, mɑ́ bene gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j dhɑnhø." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wɑ bënn ólidh-ɑ yi Jwøk, ying ge døøj wɑlɑ̀ ge rijjø, gï ólidhe bënn cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ ógwøgø kì gødd." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Wörr-ɑ pëddi døøjø, wörri Sølømøn." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Nuum yɑn, kɑ yɑ nyi døøg ki nuumø, mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií med kibøli møgi oløg." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Yømí med cɑrø, kɑ̀ cwøøl nyingí, møw-ɑ yøme med nyi ceg kɑ pɑrø, bene ɑ pere mɑɑr yïn yi mɑ̈nn bënn." 
SongOfSongs1:4 Kɑ̈l yɑn, o wɑ pɑ̈r wɑ, bëëd yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈dhɑ, kɑ yɑ kïdhí ødí. O wɑ bëëd wɑ pëthee omedø, o wɑ thøw wɑ yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø; mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií med kibøli møgi oløg, bene ɑ pere mɑɑr yïn yi mɑ̈nn." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Nywøli Yerusɑlem, yɑ looj, de yɑ myëër, yɑ looj ni kemmi Kedɑr, de yɑ myëër ni ógønh-ɑ bɑ gëëng gøldwøøng Sølømøn." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Yɑ ko benyi wun kipe kïdɑ, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́luny-ɑ yi cɑ̈ng. Nyiimïɑ yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́mɑg yi liny ki yɑn, kɑ yɑ cïrri gen gwøg kì bɑɑg oløg, ɑjɑdɑ ki keny korɑ dëlɑ." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Köbbí yɑn, ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, yï ókwɑ̈yy-ɑ keny ki dyëgí dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng? Yï óywöm ɑ keny dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng? Á kipe ngø ɑ yɑbɑ yïn kì kelli kwɑ̈yyi dyëg møg-ɑ kyeelø?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Kenyɑni kwïj yi yïn, nyɑn-ɑ mɑɑr kì kelli mɑ̈nn bënn? Kedh kɑ yï lugí kì bɑng dyëg, yɑ̈bbí dyëgí ki kej lum-ɑ døj, kì buti kemmi kwɑ̈yyi dyëg." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ámɑɑrɑ, yï dir-ɑ cwøw, ni kenyi diir kyeny yi yɑ̈thi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Yï ɑ́pëddi myëërø yi gïi yïthh, geki gïi yedhí men-ɑ bɑ ɑ́tegø." 
SongOfSongs1:11 De yï ógöggi yi wøn ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb kí jɑmmi dhwɑ̈ng møg-ɑ ódhyɑwø ki ɑ́tegø. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Rɑ̈dhɑ buud-ɑ wïj pyëne, kɑ piny bëne kwɑny yi yømi møwɑ." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ámɑɑrɑ yøme omedø ni ryɑ̈ mor kenyi buude kì köörɑ. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ámɑɑrɑ nɑ okøgg møg-ɑ nyi twïy kì bɑ̈ggi Ein Gedì. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Yï myëër cɑrø, ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, nyingí yööm ni nyingi ɑkur!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Yï myëër cɑrø, yeki ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, pyëwɑ nyii mïnø yi nenni yïn! Lum-ɑ mɑr óbëëd ɑ́ pyënee," 
SongOfSongs1:17 o yenh sɑndɑl óbëëdø gɑ mɑ̈ggi tɑni ødee, o yenh ɑmedh ɑ ótɑɑg tɑnø." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Yɑ bɑ okøøg pɑ̈l me twïyø kì Cɑrön, okøg me ying yij tör." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ámɑɑrɑ kì kelli mɑ̈nn nɑ okøg kì kelli koodh. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ámɑɑrɑ kì kelli cwøw, nɑ yɑdh tupɑɑ̀ kì kelli yenhi wɑg, Yɑ nyi mɑɑr-ɑ bëëdø kì tïbe, yɑnhɑni nywøle omedø kì dhøgɑ." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le kej ryëje, ji ɑ́nyudhe kër-ɑ mɑɑre yɑn." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Thödhí yɑn ki ópuun nywøli yenh, o dëlɑ tënge, kɑ yɑ thödhí ki tupɑɑ̀! Yɑ ɑ́nyönhi yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Wïjɑ mïdhe kɑ cingi cɑɑme, o yɑ ɑ́dööbe kööre ki cingi kyëje" 
SongOfSongs2:7 Nywøli Yerusɑlem, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, köngi wun ki nyingi ɑ́køny geki tenø kinni, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wøn koo rënyi yi wun gïti keny-ɑ órum wøn." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Cwɑggi ɑ́mɑɑrɑ ɑ́lïngɑ. Bï e órïngø kì wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ døngø, o kïtt-ɑ thønhø kɑ̈dhhe’ kɑ̈dhhø." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ámɑɑrɑ nɑ ɑ́køny, o nɑ tenø. En ɑ cungi kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑl ɑnɑn. Ámëddi kì ɑwɑj wɑnge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kelli sitɑrɑ̀." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ámɑɑrɑ kööbø kɑ yɑn. Bïí ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, nyɑn-ɑ myër, bïí kedh wɑ." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Cwir ɑ́thumi, kødh ɑ́tem." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Piny ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi okøgg. Bene bøli kej wör èn, cwɑggi ɑkur lïngɑ’ lïngø kì yij piny bëne" 
SongOfSongs2:13 Ólɑm ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki cyegø, yømi piny ceg-ɑ medø yi okøggi oløg. Bïí ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, bïí kedh wɑ." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Akurɑ, yï lɑ̈wi, yï ying-ɑ yij órøngi kït. Wiy yɑ lidhɑ myëri bølí, wiy yɑ lïngɑ medi cwɑggí." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Mɑgu nywøli ógwøgg møg-ɑ keny-ɑn, kipe bɑɑg oløøg wøn órënyi yi gen, e oløg ceg-ɑ køøg." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ámɑɑrɑ bɑ miɑ, o yɑ bɑ mee, dyëge nyi kwɑɑye’ kelli okøgg," 
SongOfSongs2:17 pïd kenyi pyëëd piny, kɑ muudhø ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. Døøg ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, jwɑní ni ɑ́køny geki tenø kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Bedher." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Kenyi buudɑ kì yij pyënɑ kì wɑ̈r, yɑ nyi lɑ̈g-ɑ jɑl-ɑ mɑɑr yi pyëwɑ, yɑ ɑ́yɑb-ɑ en, de nuti yood yɑn." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Áyɑbɑ kì yij kɑɑl bëne, kí yethi yëëth. Yɑ ɑ́yɑb-ɑ jɑl-ɑ mɑɑr yi pyëwɑ, ɑ́yɑbɑ de nuti yood yɑn." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Kɑ yɑ yod yi jøg-ɑ kor kɑɑl. Apyëjɑ gen kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ mɑɑr yi pyëwɑ ɑ́di lidhø yi wun?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́pöödhɑ gen ceth, ɑyodɑ en. Amɑgɑ en kɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ kedhø, gïti kɑ ɑ́kïdhɑ en ød meyɑ, øn-ɑ́ yije ɑ́nywøøl yɑn." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Nywøli Yerusɑlem, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, köngi wun ki nyingi ɑ́køny geki tenø kinni, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wøn koo rënyi yi wun gïti keny-ɑ órum wøn." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Á men ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij ryɑng e nɑ yïrø ɑcɑ̀, e yøme omedø ni yømi ryɑ̈ mor geki bɑkur, kí mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med bënn, møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli yi jøngyew?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Sølømøn ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l e otyëddø kì wïj kwøme, kor-ɑ yi jödd pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, kor-ɑ yi jödd-ɑ pëddi tegø kì Isrɑil." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Jöddɑni thøø yi pwönyø ki nyɑɑg ki pilø, ge pëddi ki liny. Pilli gen ryër-ɑ́ɑ̀ nyingi ngëddi gen, ge nenn-ɑ liny-ɑ óbï kì wɑ̈r." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn tyëd ɑ wïj kwøm men-ɑ ógwøgø ki yenh mø myër. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Tyelli kwømɑni bɑ ɑ́tegø, men-ɑ ógøjø ki dhɑb, ógødh yije thøø yi gwelø ki dhɑb. Thɑ̈nhhe óbojø kɑ ógødh me bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl, men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø e myëër yi nywøli Yerusɑlem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Nywøli Dhɑyøn, bïu lidhu Rɑ̈dh Sølømøn. Rug-ɑ yɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́cïb wïje yi meye, kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng nywöme; cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng medi pyëwe." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Yï myëër cɑrø ɑ́mɑɑrɑ! Nyingí yöm ni nyingi ɑkur, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kelli thɑrɑ̀ men-ɑ kum yïn wïjí. Yëyyí looj ge nɑ dɑɑg dyëg, me yïnhi piny kì wïj Kïti Gilyɑd." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Leggí tɑr nɑ cɑg, wɑ̈thi gen pɑ̈r kinni tïp. Bong men tøøk kì kelli gen, ge myëër bënn." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Dhøgí, dhø mɑl kí piny bɑ ɑcwïl, ge nyi nënni ge myëër kenyi kööb Pïnní ceg-ɑ omïl, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kelli thɑrɑ̀." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Muní bɑ̈r nɑ ønbɑ̈r men-ɑ koor kɑɑl Debïd, bɑ ɑ́dulø e lwiy gïï yïthhí nɑ ködd ɑ́lïp møg-ɑ óngɑɑb ri dörɑni." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Thïnhhí nɑ ɑ́kønyy, ge nɑ ɑcweggi ɑ́køny, møg cyɑ̈mø kì kelli okøgg." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Yɑ óbëëdø kì wïj kwøømi ryɑ̈ mor, kí wïj kwøømi bɑkur, gïti keny-ɑ ópyëëd piny kɑ muudhø ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Yï myëër cɑrø ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, bong keny me gwɑ̈ɑ̈d kì rií!" 
SongOfSongs4:8 Bïí kedh wɑ ɑ́mɑɑrɑ kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Lubnɑn, bïí kedh wɑ kì Lubnɑn. Bïí piny kì wïj Kïti Amɑnɑ̀, kì Kïti Senïr geki Kïti Kermön, kun-ɑ bëëd yi ngurrì geki kwɑ̈nyì." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Nënn-ɑ nëën yi yïn yeki ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, nyɑn-ɑ nywømɑ, geki gïi yedh men-ɑ rug yi yïn, pyëwɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi gen." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií omedø kì yïɑ, yeki ɑ́mɑɑrɑ. Med cɑrø kibøli møgi oløg, yømí omedø kibøli gïg-ɑ yømi gen med bënn." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Ámɑɑrɑ, dhøgí med nɑ møøw kïc. lebí nɑ cɑg kí møøw kïc kì dhøgɑ. Yømi ógudhí med nɑ yømi Lubnɑn." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Nyimïɑ, yï bɑ bɑg men-ɑ ógeer keny kwïj, yï nɑ bɑg men-ɑ ówenø ki dörø, yï nɑ wɑɑng pïi wɑ̈n kete," 
SongOfSongs4:13 keny-ɑ yije nyi cyeg yenh kidøøj. Bɑng-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi yenh-ɑ med, o bong wïj yɑdh me tøøk kì yije. Bong gïn tøøk kì yije: inɑ̀ geki nɑrd," 
SongOfSongs4:14 kí sɑprön, kɑlɑmus, kí sinɑmön kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med bënn. Mor kí ɑløy nyi twïy-ɑ kunɑni kí ryɑ̈ɑ̈ møg-ɑ yømi gen pëddi medø" 
SongOfSongs4:15 kí nyingi pï mø cɑw bɑg, kí wøll mø rïngi yi pï, kí dhøg me rïngi piny kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Lubnɑn." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Cyëëw wuudø! Köní yij bɑgɑ, wurlwɑl, wiy yømi piny mïne. Wiy ɑ́mɑɑrɑ bëe yij bɑge, o cɑme nywøli yenh-ɑ døj." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Yɑ ɑ́bï bɑgɑ nyimïɑ, yeki ɑ́mɑɑrɑ nyɑn-ɑ nywømɑ. Yɑ cong-ɑ yenh-ɑ yømi gen med geki ryɑ̈ mor, yɑ cɑm-ɑ møøw kïc kì ri ɑdhudhhi kïc yɑ mɑdh-ɑ møgi oløgɑ geki cɑgɑ. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈dø, cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun, kɑ wu mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun, pïd keny-ɑ óthøw wun yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Yɑ ɑ́neni pyëwɑ onëënø. Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑrɑ e ócwöddø kì dhø ød. Yïëbbí yɑn ød nyimïɑ, ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, ɑkurɑ nyɑn-ɑ myër. Wïjɑ ɑ́thïnyi yi thöjj, o yëyyɑ ɑ́göög ge teeg yi lwij." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Yɑ ɑ́rum ki lunyi wɑ̈g ki ógudhɑ, ɑ́ kiper ngø ɑ døøgɑ gen ki løny riɑ? Yɑ ɑ́rum ki lwøgi tyellɑ, ɑ́ kiper ngø ɑ cödhɑ gen këti?" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ámɑɑrɑ cinge ɑ́cïbe ri thïgø, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈r pyëwɑ mɑl yi kɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈nge." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Adhwödhɑ be yïëbbii ød. Cinggɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑgïny ki ryɑ̈ mor, lweddɑ lɑɑj-ɑ piny ki ryɑ̈ mor, ɑmɑgɑ thïgø." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Kɑ ød yïëbbɑ ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, de ɑ́mɑɑrɑ rum kedhø. Pyëwɑ ɑ́tyer-ɑ lïngi cwɑgge! Ayɑbɑ en, de nuti yood yɑn, ɑcwøllɑ en, de nuti löggø." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Ayood yɑn yi jøg-ɑ kor kɑɑl, ɑpwööd yɑn yi gen, kɑ riɑ kïdhi gen ki kedd, kɑ thɑrɑ̀ mi wïjɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l gen wɑ̈g." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Köngi wun nywøli Yerusɑlem, kinni, keny-ɑ óyod wun ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, óköbbi yi wun kinni yɑ ɑ́nyönhi yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Nyɑn-ɑ myër kì kelli mɑ̈nn, tyëng-ɑ kyeelø lod kɑ ngø yi ɑ́mɑɑrí? Á ngø ɑ døj kì ree, ɑ pere köbbí wøn köngø?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ámɑɑrɑ myër o teg, pëddi ki myëërø kì kelli cwøw ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈rø." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Wïje nɑ dhɑm myër, yëyye ri gen nyølli gen, ge looj nɑ ɑ́gɑng-ɑ cwɑ̈yø." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Nyinge nɑ ɑkùr ɑ́ryew kì tøg nɑm me rïngi yi thew, ge ce ólwøgø kɑ cɑg, o ge thøø yi pyëlø." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Pïnne myëër ni bɑg, yømi gen med nɑ bɑɑg yenh-ɑ med. Dhøge nɑ okøgg møg-ɑ ócɑwø ki ryɑ̈ mor." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Cingge ópyëlø kidøøj, cingge dɑ yëlli dhɑb mø ri gen di tiggi dhɑbɑrjɑd. Dële lïw nɑ lëji lyej men-ɑ ódhyɑwø ki yɑgut." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Tyelle nɑ kïtti ɑ́gør mø lïw, møg-ɑ ócïb yij ɑwööl dhɑb. Bɑ ócɑw ni Kïtti Lubnɑn geki yenh sɑndɑl møg-ɑ bɑ̈rrø kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Dhøge omedø kɑ̀ nuumii, o ceg-ɑ okøn kì pyëw. Bene bëëdi ɑ́mɑɑrɑ ɑnɑn, wun ɑ nywøli Yerusɑlem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Nyɑn-ɑ myër kì kelli mɑ̈nn, ɑ́mɑɑrí ɑ́kedh-ɑ keny? Köbbí wøn yuu-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi ɑ́mɑɑrí, o yï køny yi wøn ki yɑbii." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Ámɑɑrɑ ɑ́kedhi yij bɑge, keny-ɑ twïy yenh bɑlsɑm. Kwɑy-ɑ dyëge kì yij bɑngɑni, o opunø ki okøgg." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Ámɑɑrɑ bɑ miɑ, o yɑ bɑ mee, dyëge nyi kwɑɑye’ kelli okøgg." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ámɑɑrɑ, yï myëër ni Yerusɑlem, yï mɑɑr yi yɑn nɑ Tirdhɑ̀, pyëwɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yïn ni kɑ̈ddɑni ryeet." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Løg wïjí, yï ko nenni yïɑ mɑ́ pyëwɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi nenn-ɑ nennɑ nyingí. Yëyyí looj ge nɑ dɑɑg dyëg, me yïnhi piny kì wïj kwøømi Gilyɑd." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Leggí tɑr nɑ dɑɑg dyëg, me kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì be lwøgø, Bong ɑ́kyel me tøøk kì kelli gen, wɑ̈thi gen pɑ̈r kinni tïp." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Pïnní ceg-ɑ omïl kì kelli thɑrɑ̀ men-ɑ kum yïn wïjí. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, kí ɑkwɑnyy pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o møg-ɑ nudd gɑ wojur pɑ cuggi kwɑnø." 
SongOfSongs6:9 De yɑ mɑɑr-ɑ ɑ́kyel kete, o myëër ni ɑkur. E kete ɑ bɑ dhɑjø kì kelli nyiimen, ti ki mɑɑrø yi meye ki mendwøng. Álidh yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn bënn kɑ gø lenhi gen, ɑ́lenhi ki wör yi bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈dh geki ɑkwɑnyyi rɑ̈dh." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ge okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ bï ni ru wøw ɑcɑ̀? Myëër o rɑw, myëër nɑ dwɑ̈y, o ce tuul ɑ́ cɑ̈ng.”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Yɑ ɑ́bï kelli yenh ɑkemel be lidhi yenh-ɑ thønhø kì yij tör, o yɑ lidhɑ oløg geki romɑn mɑ twïy yïthhi gen, kí mɑ köög gen." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Dëlɑ ceg-ɑ kïïrø, pyëwɑ ɑ́wëggí okøn ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni okøn pyëw jɑl-ɑ kyewi yɑ̈thi liny." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Cööng, cööng nyɑɑr Culɑm, Wiy yï lidh yi wøn kɑ̀ cööng. Á kipe ngø ɑ dwɑddu nenni yɑn, kɑ̀ cöngɑ kì kɑɑm ɑtøddi ɑnënnì ɑ́ryew?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Yï bɑ dhɑjø me myëër cɑrø! Tyellí myër nɑ ngø kì yethi wɑr! Rɑ̈mmí bɑ ɑ́dul, ge ce ógwøg-ɑ yi bødhø me cinge døj." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Gudí nɑ tɑbø mɑ ɑ́dulø, me pɑ̈ng yi møgø me thøø yi gwøgø, yijí bɑ ɑ́dulø e nɑ gemè men-ɑ óröör piny, e tøgge dɑ okøgg." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Thïnhhí nɑ ɑ́kønyy ɑ́ryew, mø cyɑ̈mø kì kelli okøgg." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Muní bɑ ɑwel e lïw ni lëji lyej. Nyingí nɑ luyyi Kicbön ryeet, kì buti dhø döri kɑɑldwøng menɑni. Órømmí nɑ ønbɑ̈r kì Lubnɑn, kì dhø dörø, dhøng-ɑ nenni Dimɑceg." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Wïjí ying-ɑ mɑl ni Kïti Kɑrmel, Akɑ̈ddi wïjí ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng Myëri gen dir-ɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ámɑɑrɑ, yï myëër cɑrø! Bong keny pɑ myër kì rií." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Yï bɑ ɑ́nɑyø ni yɑdh benø, o thïnhhí nɑ cyɑ̈lli benø." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Yɑ óyedhi wïj benø, o nywøle pønɑ. Thïnhhí nɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈l oløg, yøm-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l órømmí kɑ̀ yëëg, med nɑ yømi tupɑɑ̀," 
SongOfSongs7:9 o nuumí med kì dhøgɑ, ni møgi oløg me pëddi døøjø. Wiy møgi oløg renge dhøg ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, ree bɑɑwe’ kömi dhøge geki legge." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Yɑ bɑ mií ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, o yɑ tyer yi en." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Bïí ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, bïí kedhi wɑ yethi myërr, o wɑ nïnni wɑ pɑc." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Wɑ ómøøl be lidhi bɑ̈ggi oløg mɑ twïy oløg kì yethi gen, kí mɑ cɑ̈gi gen ki køøg, kí mɑ köög yenh romɑn. Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ ómëggɑ yïn kì kunɑni." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Yømi okøggi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø óngwɑ̈j yi yïn, o nywøli yenh-ɑ med bënn ying-ɑ dhø gølee. Ámɑɑrɑ, mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ ɑ́mïdhi yi yɑn kɑ perí, jɑmmɑ møg-ɑ nyɑ̈n kí møg-ɑ kɑ̈gi gen dööng ɑ́mïdhɑ kɑ perí!" 
SongOfSongs8:1 Yï ce di bëëd yï bɑ ómïɑ, yï dhøødh-ɑ thïnhhi meyɑ. O yï di nuumɑ ke di røøm wɑ kì yij yöö, yï di nuumɑ e bong ngɑn cɑy yɑn." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Yï di kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ, kɑ yï kïdhɑ ød meyɑ, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yɑn ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø. Yï di thödhɑ ki møgi oløg me med møng-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ ki romɑn." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Wïjɑ thɑ̈ɑ̈nh yɑn ki cingi cɑɑmí, o yɑ dööb yïn ki cingi kyëjí!" 
SongOfSongs8:4 Nywøli Yerusɑlem, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun kinni mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wøn ko rënyi wun." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Á men ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij ryɑng ɑcɑ̀, ge kwɑgg-ɑ ri gen geki ɑ́mɑɑre? Yï ɑ́tugɑ kì thɑ yɑdh tupɑɑ̀, kì keny-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yïn." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Wiy bëëde ɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ ɑ ying pyëwí kete, ko di ngɑn dööb yi yïn köörí den-ɑ́ yɑ ketɑ. Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø teg nɑ thøø, o tyëëdø nɑ ölø me ludhø ludhø. Nyi cɑ̈gi e nɑ opelø kɑ nyi ceg-ɑ ì pyɑɑt ɑ́ mɑc me ceg rɑ̈b." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Bong pï møg cuggi cɑwi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, bong bɑɑyø me cuggi mudii. Cɑgg dhɑnhø muuj kɑ̈re bëne kiper mɑ̈ɑ̈dø, nudd ɑ́ men byeny ceth." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Yï wøn dɑ nyimï wøn me thiinh, thïnhhe nudd ge ceg-ɑ twïyø. Á ngø ɑ ógöggii yi wøn, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëën jɑl-ɑ myegii?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Keløg e bɑ dhø dörø, ógëddi yi wøn ki ønbɑ̈r, me bɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg men-ɑ koorii. De keløg e bɑ dhø döri kɑɑl, ógöggi yi wøn ki ɑdëddi yenh sɑndɑl møg korrii." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Yɑ bɑ dörø, o thïnhhɑ bɑ udd-ɑ bɑ̈rrø møg-ɑ koorii. Bene ɑ ɑ́yodii yi ɑ́mɑɑrɑ kinni yɑ ɑ́døngi." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Sølømøn yïe ɑ́dɑ bɑɑg oløg kì Bɑɑl Amön. Akïrre gøn jøpur, nget ɑ́kyel nyi cul-ɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Ngyëny ɑ́lïp bɑ mø Sølømøn, o miy ɑ́ryew mëggi jøpur. Yïɑ dɑ bɑɑg oløg, me bɑ miɑ yɑ ketɑ!" 
SongOfSongs8:13 Ámɑɑrɑ, wiy cwɑggí lïngɑ yï ying-ɑ yij bɑg, tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi wøn yïd-ɑ lïngi cwɑggí, yï okööbø, ɑ́mɑɑrɑ." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Bïí yïɑ, ni ɑ́køny, ɑ́mɑɑrɑ, bïí yï nɑ tenø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì, kun-ɑ nyi twïy yi yenh-ɑ yømi gen med." 
Isaiah1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men bɑ wööd kì ri Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem, wöddɑni ɑ́cɑ̈rr-ɑ Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh yi Jwøk kì runn-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Udhiyɑ̀, kí Yöthɑm, kí Akɑɑdh, kí Kedhekiyɑ̀ gɑ rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Isaiah1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun, wun ɑ mɑl kí piny! Lïngu møg-ɑ kwøbɑ! Othønhø møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kì Rïp ɑ́døøg cwɑggɑ." 
Isaiah1:3 Dhög wëëg gen ngɑ̈nyi yi gen, o ɑderr keny-ɑ nyi kɑ̈nni yi wïi gen ki gïncɑɑm gen, ngɑ̈nyi yi gen. De Isrɑil kwïj wøw; jiɑ bong gïn gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Yï pödhi orøg, yï ɑ́gɑ̈g. Yïn, yï pödhi orøg! Wu tɑ̈ɑ̈y-ɑ piny yi orøøg wun. Wu ɑ́bɑny-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwërø. Eni men-ɑ́ Jwøøg Isrɑil, kɑ ngɑ̈thi wun lugu en." 
Isaiah1:5 Wude ɑ rïïj wu opëmø? Wu ócuggi cɑyø kidï? Yïn ɑ Isrɑil, wïjí pɑ̈ng yi kɑ̈jjiledh, o miní kí ngedhí ge ceg-ɑ rɑ̈m." 
Isaiah1:6 Bong keny døj kì rií, cɑg kì ri wïjí gïti tyelí. Dëlí pɑ̈ng yi kɑ̈jjiledh; kɑ̈jjiledh møg-ɑ rií nuti pɑ̈nyø lwøgø, wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti koodø. Ge nuti kïdhø ki yɑdh." 
Isaiah1:7 Pödhi wun ɑ́döng nøw kɑ̈ddi wun ɑ́rɑ̈b ki mɑc. Piny wun okwɑnyø yi tyëngpɑth, o jɑmmì bënn orënyø yi gen, wu onëënø yøw." 
Isaiah1:8 Yerusɑlem ɑ́döng kete, e bɑ ɑtyeg, o bong gïn korrii ni ød tyëng-ɑ nyi kor bɑɑg oløg, wɑlɑ̀ ɑkɑnø kì yij bɑɑg cwir." 
Isaiah1:9 Ke di bëëd e pɑth ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng teg, ɑ ɑ́wïyi ki kwï ji, Yerusɑlem di nɑ̈g bëne ni Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀." 
Isaiah1:10 Yerusɑlem, jií nɑ tyëng Sødømɑ̀ kí Gømørɑ̀ ceth. Lïngí gïn-ɑ köbbi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kyën yïthhí kɑ gïn-ɑ pwönyi yïn yi Jwøgee lïngí." 
Isaiah1:11 Okööbø kinni, “Yï orumø kinni gëdhh-ɑ nyi rïïj ge mëggí yɑn ɑnɑn di dwɑddø yi yɑn? Yɑ ɑ́ngïr yi órömm-ɑ nyi rɑ̈bbí yɑn gɑ gëdhhì, kí dwɑ̈lli dhögí. Pyëwɑ pɑ med ki remmi dhögi wun geki dyëgi wun." 
Isaiah1:12 Á men ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun kinni nyi nyøn wun Kengɑ, kenyi bëën wun be mɑlli yɑn? Á men ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun kinni nyønu Kengɑ?" 
Isaiah1:13 Bong gïn gwøg yi kɑ̈nø ki gëdhhì. Pyëwɑ nyii lɑ̈mmø yi yømi bɑkur men-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b yi wun. Pyëwɑ pɑ med ki tugi kwëër dwɑ̈n nyɑ̈n geki Sɑbɑth, kí kwërr-ɑ kyeelø; ge ɑ́rënyi yi orøøg wun." 
Isaiah1:14 Kwëër cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈n-ɑ nyɑ̈n geki cyɑ̈nggi kwër mø wun mɑɑn yi yɑn; yɑ ɑ́ngïr yi gen. 
Isaiah1:15 “Keny-ɑ ótïng wun cinggi wun mɑl wu ómɑ̈ddø, yɑ pɑ lïïdh yï wun. Cɑgg wu kwɑ̈jji kidï, kwɑ̈jji wun pɑ lïngɑ, mɑ́ cinggi wun dɑ rem." 
Isaiah1:16 Lɑw wun ri wun o wu dhïwi wun. Wiyu gïgrijjø møg-ɑ nennɑ ge ogøggø yi wun ɑnɑn. Wiy wun gwøg ki gïgrijjø," 
Isaiah1:17 kɑ wu dïd wun ki gøggi dyër. Gwøøg dyër ceth; kønyu tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud, kɑ jɑmmi kïjj mëggu gen, kɑ thwömm-ɑ mɑ̈nn nyi cwɑg wun.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëg wɑ kwøbbɑni. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd wu kwɑɑr yi orøg, wu ólwøg yi yɑn kɑ wu ótɑ̈rø ni ɑ́piy. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd orøøg wun kwɑrø, ógöögø e pɑ̈r ki yëyyi dyëg mø tɑr cɑrø." 
Isaiah1:19 Keløg kwøbbɑ olïngø yi wun, wu ócyɑ̈mø ki jɑmm-ɑ døj møg-ɑ cyeg kì piny men." 
Isaiah1:20 De keløg yɑ óbɑny yi wun, kɑ wu tyeer-ɑ wɑ̈yi wun, wu bɑ møg thøw. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e mïdh-ɑ yïëyø, ɑ́göög e nɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi! Ábëëd yije pɑ̈ng yi tyëngtir kì bøli keny megø, de ɑ́döng ɑ́ tyëngnɑ̈g ki ji kì yije." 
Isaiah1:22 Yerusɑlem, kɑ̈ge dööng yï ɑ́bëëd yï nɑ ɑ́tegø ɑ pere teg, de ɑnɑn yï ɑ́göög yï bong perí; yï ɑ́bëëd yï nɑ møgi oløg me døj, de ɑnɑn yï bɑ pï yøw." 
Isaiah1:23 Jɑggí bɑ tyëngpëëmø, o ge bɑ mɑ̈dhh ki kurrì. Ge nyi rïïj ge yïëy-ɑ gïg-ɑ mëggi gen kɑ dhøggi gen nyi kum ki ngyëny. Kïj pere pɑ nyi nyɑg yi gen kì burø, o thwöm gønye pɑ nyi lïngi yi gen." 
Isaiah1:24 Anɑn lïngu møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ teg, okööbø kinni, “Gøølɑ ócolɑ kì wun, wu tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o yɑ koo jud yi wun këti." 
Isaiah1:25 Wu ógöggɑ gïi wun, wu óliilɑ ni kenyi liil ngyënyø, o gïg-ɑ ywëëdh wun bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g." 
Isaiah1:26 Wu óthödhɑ ki jɑgg kí tïddi kwøb, mø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́ying yï wun kɑ̈ge dööng. O Yerusɑlem døøgɑ be cwølø ɑ́ kɑɑltir, kɑɑl-ɑ mïdhi yïëye.”" 
Isaiah1:27 Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tir, Yerusɑlem óyiel yi en, geki tyëng-ɑ óyewi." 
Isaiah1:28 De ngɑn-ɑ órøngi kɑ opëmø ónyøn yi en. Ngɑn-ɑ ówiyii piny ónɑ̈g yi en. 
Isaiah1:29 Wu ópɑ̈di kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́kwɑjji wun yenh, kɑ bɑ̈ggi wun yulli wun jwögg møøgø." 
Isaiah1:30 Wu ówøw ni yɑdh, wu ógöögø ni bɑg me yije bong pï." 
Isaiah1:31 Tyëng-ɑ teg óthøw; ge óni lum ɑ nyi rɑ̈b yi opeli mɑc, bong ngɑn-ɑ óyiel gen." 
Isaiah2:1 Men bene wöön-ɑ ɑ́mëggi Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh yi Jwøk kiper Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem. 
Isaiah2:2 Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, kïn-ɑ köme cungi yi Kengø ógöögø e bɑ̈r kibøli kïttì bënn; wïje ókɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl kì kelli kïttì. Pödhh mø ngenyø óceg ì buk kì wïje," 
Isaiah2:3 ge okööbø kinni, “Yedhi wɑ wïj kwøømi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kedhi wɑ Kengi Jwøøg Isrɑil. Wɑ ópwönye ki gïn-ɑ dwɑdde kinni gwøg yi wɑ, wɑ ókɑ̈lli yëth-ɑ ɑ́myege. Mɑ́ pwönyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem; kööbø ki jie e ying-ɑ Dhɑyøn.”" 
Isaiah2:4 Liny jurrì mø døngø óyiele. Pilli gen óthɑ̈dh yi gen gɑ kwërri pur, o tønggi gen løg gen pɑlli kɑj ki byel. Pödhh pɑ cigi kedhi be liny, ri gen koo gwir yi gen kipe liny." 
Isaiah2:5 Anɑn yïn ɑ gøl Yɑgob, bïu cyɑ̈dhi wɑ kì yij cɑr-ɑ mëggi wɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah2:6 Jií, kwɑrri Yɑgob ɑ́wiy yi yïn piny yïn ɑ Jwøk! Piny ceg-ɑ thyëdh bëne, cɑg kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ ókönø kì Pelistiyɑ̀. Ji mïdh-ɑ kwöng me pɑth." 
Isaiah2:7 Piny gen pɑ̈ng yi ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb, o kɑ̈r bong cöge kì yï gen. Piny gen pɑ̈ng yi kyënyì, o yɑ̈thi gen bong cögi gen." 
Isaiah2:8 Piny gen pɑ̈ng yi ngïjji jwögg, o ge mɑll-ɑ gïg gwøøg gen ki cinggi gen." 
Isaiah2:9 Ji wɑ̈thi gen ódwöög cyɑ̈n, kɑ ge oyɑ̈rø. Pyëwí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Isaiah2:10 Ge ópɑ̈nni kì yethi órøggi kïttì, wɑlɑ̀ ge ókunyø ki burrì møg yethi gen pɑ̈nni yi gen, keny-ɑ órënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gen, keny-ɑ órënyi pyëwe ki menteg!" 
Isaiah2:11 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ódwöög wïj dhɑnhø cyɑ̈n, kɑ mune pɑ cigi tëngø këti, ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Codhe, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lenhi kete." 
Isaiah2:12 Ngɑn teg wïje dwöög-ɑ cyɑ̈n yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni geki ngɑn wïje tɑ̈dø men bong gïn gɑ̈nne." 
Isaiah2:13 Yenh sɑndɑl møg-ɑ bɑ̈rrø kì Lubnɑn ódhure piny, geki óthurr-ɑ Bɑcɑn bënn." 
Isaiah2:14 Kïtt-ɑ døngø geki møg-ɑ thønhø ónyɑɑge piny, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ópɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki piny," 
Isaiah2:15 kí udd-ɑ teg møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen nyi kur bënn. 
Isaiah2:16 Sɑpïnnì ómud yi en cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ døngø ɑ myër. 
Isaiah2:17 Tɑ̈di wɑ̈thi ji, ódwöög cyɑ̈n kɑ ge oyɑ̈rø. Ngïjji jwögg ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny bënn, o bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete ɑ ólenhi kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Isaiah2:18  
Isaiah2:19 Ji ópɑ̈nni kì yethi órøggi kïttì, wɑlɑ̀ ge ókunyø ki burrì møg yethi gen pɑ̈nni yi gen, keny-ɑ órënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gen, kɑ bï-ɑ yï gen ki mɑ̈r geki tegø, keny-ɑ óbëëne be rungi piny." 
Isaiah2:20 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, ngïjji jwögg-ɑ bɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen óweddi yi gen, kɑ gï wïyi gen yëjj geki ɑlïlït." 
Isaiah2:21 Keny-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be rungi piny, ji ópɑ̈ni yethi órøggi kïttì geki burrì, ge reng-ɑ yi rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ge ceg-ɑ rengø yi tege geki mɑ̈re." 
Isaiah2:22 Ji møg-ɑ óthøw ko ngɑ̈dh yi yïn, døøjø mi gen bɑ ngø?" 
Isaiah3:1 Anɑn Wë, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jɑmm-ɑ ri gen bëëd yi ji kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem gï kɑ̈ɑ̈le kɑ̈ɑ̈lø. Gïncɑm geki pï ókɑ̈l yi en," 
Isaiah3:2 kí yɑ̈thi kyënyi gen, kí ɑlɑthker, kí jɑggi burri gen geki jøtöng, kí ɑ́jwöggi gen, kí jöddi pödhø," 
Isaiah3:3 kí pëjji liny, kí jɑggi pödhø, kí tyëngken ki kwøb geki bɑ̈nyy." 
Isaiah3:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ji ówëgge jɑɑgø yi yɑɑg thønhø mø rummi gen nuti cyegø. 
Isaiah3:5 Ji nyingi gen óguud yi gen, ngɑn guud-ɑ wɑɑng wɑɑd gen. Jøgdøngø koo wør yi yɑɑg thønhø, o jödd-ɑ per gen teg koo wør yi tyëng-ɑ bong per gen." 
Isaiah3:6 Bøli keny megø óbï, men-ɑ óköbbi dhɑnhø yi wɑddi gen kinni, “Yïn ɑ yïí di gïjø me rug yi yïn, bëëd yï bɑ jɑngi wøn kì piny-ɑ rɑɑj èn.”" 
Isaiah3:7 De ólöggi kinni, “Pɑth, wu pɑ cuggi jɑɑgø yi yɑn. Yïɑ bong gïncɑm, wɑlɑ̀ yïɑ bong ógudh thyew. Yɑ ko gwøg wun yɑn ɑ́ jɑgø.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Yerusɑlem ceg-ɑ thɑ̈mmø! Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Mɑ́ ge gwɑdd-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen, kí møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen. Men-ɑ́ Jwøk kiree nyii tøønyø ki yɑnyø yi gen." 
Isaiah3:9 Ge rëny-ɑ yi rɑ̈ji buri gen, ge nɑ tyëng Sødømɑ̀, orøøg gen pɑ kɑnni yi gen. Ge ógɑ̈g mɑ́ gen ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l rɑj kömi gen!" 
Isaiah3:10 Tyëngtir óbëëdø pëthi gen med; bong gïjø men-ɑ ócɑ̈nni gen. Gïg-ɑ gwøg yi gen ócɑm yi gen. 
Isaiah3:11 De tyëngrijjø ɑ́gɑ̈g, gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi tyëngmøøgø yi gen, ólony ki göggi gen." 
Isaiah3:12 Tyëng-ɑ yï gen nyi wïdhi ki ngyëny guud-ɑ nyingi jiɑ, o ge nyi ceg kɑ rujø yi tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈nni yi gen ki ngyëny. Wun ɑ jiɑ, wu ɑ́peej pɑ̈l yi jɑggi wun, wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́bɑ̈nni yi gen kɑ wu ódhɑ̈lø yïddø yöö." 
Isaiah3:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bøli keny-ɑ ógønye gønye ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Bøli keny-ɑ ólidhe gøøny jie ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. 
Isaiah3:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jøgdøngø geki pëjji jie kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ burø be gøønyø kinni, “Bɑ̈gg mø pɑth ɑ́yɑy yi wun, o kɑ̈lli wun pɑ̈ng yi gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi wun kì yï ɑbuur." 
Isaiah3:15 Wude ɑ mød wun jiɑ, ɑ kɑbbi wun jɑmmi tyëng-ɑ dhɑl yi kwøb. Yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah3:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lidh mɑ̈nni Yerusɑlem dhɑ̈ɑ̈w ɑ dï! Ge cyɑ̈dhi ge törr-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen, ge negg-ɑ nyingi gen, ge pwöd-ɑ tyelli gen kì piny, de tyel ceg-ɑ jiingø yi yëll." 
Isaiah3:17 Ge ócɑy yi yɑn, wɑ̈thi gen ólyel yi yɑn, o ge döng gen ge lïw.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókwɑɑny jɑmm-ɑ per gen dhɑ̈ɑ̈w mɑ̈nni Yerusɑlem yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j obëënø, gen ɑ yëll-ɑ rug yi gen kì tyelli gen, kí gïg-ɑ dhyɑɑw gen wɑ̈thi gen geki muddi gen," 
Isaiah3:19 kí møg-ɑ rug yi gen kì ngɑ̈thi gen. Acwɑddi wɑ̈thi gen ókwɑny yi en," 
Isaiah3:20 kí thɑ̈ggi wɑ̈thi gen, kí wënni gen, kí gyelli gen," 
Isaiah3:21 kí gwell-ɑ rug yi gen kì lweddi gen kí órømmi gen," 
Isaiah3:22 kí ógudhi gen bënn; ɑ́ywödhh kí lɑ̈nì, kí pødhì," 
Isaiah3:23 kí ógudh-ɑ reb, kí mɑndïll, kí ceridhh, kí thɑrr-ɑ nyi rug yi gen kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Isaiah3:24 Ge ópënni kibøli ke di gïïny gen ki mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med; yëyy-ɑ myëër ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì wɑ̈thi gen, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen odöngø ge budhø. Ge órug thøll mø gwɑy gɑ wënnì. Ge órug ocwɑ́llì gɑ kɑ̈jji ógudh-ɑ yöm ɑnɑn; myëërø mi gen óløg ɑyɑ̈r!" 
Isaiah3:25 Jøg-ɑ cwøwi kɑɑl, cɑgg ɑ́ yɑɑg teg, ónɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Isaiah3:26 Thïggi dhøggi döri kɑɑl, ókïïmø kɑ ge óywöngø, o men-ɑ́ kɑɑl kiree, óni ngɑndhɑjø me bëëdø kì piny e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw." 
Isaiah4:1 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́bïryew ómɑ̈gi kì ri jɑlø ɑ́kyel ge okööbø kinni, “Wø óyɑ̈bø ki gïgcɑmmi wøn, kí ógudhi wøn, de wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn yøw, wiy yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ jɑlwøn, kipe wø óbëëd wø yɑ̈rø yi kɑ̀ nuti nywøøm wøn.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Bøli keny-ɑ ówëggi yenh bënn døngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ómyërrø ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ óbodh bënn, óyïddi ki medi pyëw, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be ngwønø, kì bɑng jɑmmì møg-ɑ ócyeg kì yij piny." 
Isaiah4:3 Ngɑn-ɑ ódöng kì Yerusɑlem, ɑ ówëggi bodhø yi Jwøk, ócwøl ɑ́ ngeti kwërø." 
Isaiah4:4 Kwøbbi pödhø óløøg yi Wë, kɑ remm-ɑ ɑ́dëëm piny kì Yerusɑlem lwööge wɑ̈g, o gïg-ɑ ywëëdh tyëng Isrɑil ólwøge kɑ dëlli gen ótɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah4:5 Codhe, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j öne ki pøølø kì dicɑ̈ng, kí yïrø geki mɑc me tɑr kì wɑ̈r, møg korri Kïti Dhɑyøn geki ji-ɑ cugø kì kenyɑni. Mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøk óying kömi kɑɑlɑni bëne kɑ gø korre." 
Isaiah4:6 Kɑɑl ógëng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mɑ̈re kì dicɑ̈ng, kɑ gø gwøøge keny yije bong olïng pëëth, kɑ gø gënge kipe kødh kí ɑtunø." 
Isaiah5:1 Lïng wun ki wör-ɑ wör yi yɑn èn, wöri mɑ̈dhɑ geki bɑɑg oløge. Mɑ̈dhɑ yïe ɑ́dɑ bɑɑg oløg kì wïj kwøømø me lɑ̈be med." 
Isaiah5:2 Kej bɑngɑni ɑ́køge kɑ kïttì yëëge wɑ̈g kì yije. Kɑ gø pïdhe ki oløg me pëddi døøjø. Kɑ ogëdø kí ønbɑ̈r me koor bɑngɑni, ɑkunye ki keny nyi biij oløg. Kɑ pëgg-ɑ be yïddi cyegi oløg, de oløg bëne ɑ́göög e owɑjø." 
Isaiah5:3 Codhe, ɑkööb mɑ̈dhɑ kinni, “Wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem kí Yeudiyɑ̀, løøg wun gønyɑ wøki bɑɑg oløgɑ." 
Isaiah5:4 Á gïn ɑ nuti göggi yɑn en? De ede ɑ nywøle oløg me wɑj? Ede ɑ bɑnye nywølø ki nywøli oløg mø døøj, ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ en?" 
Isaiah5:5 “Wiy wu köbbɑ gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ bɑɑg oløgɑ; kyel-ɑ óbɑgii óputh yi yɑn, kɑ dör-ɑ korrii cøørɑ piny, kɑ wiyɑ o cɑm yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, o gø nyøøn gen piny." 
Isaiah5:6 Ówiy yi yɑn, o yije twïy yi lum bëne. Pɑ cigɑ purø, wɑlɑ̀ oløge pɑ teb yi yɑn, ówiy yi yɑn o yije kɑb yi okurø geki koodh. Pøøl óköbbɑ kinni yije ko dëëm yi kødh.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Isrɑil bene bɑɑg oløøg Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bene gen oløg men-ɑ ɑ́pidh yi en. Gï ɑ́dwɑdde kinni o ge di göög gen ki gïgdøj, de ge ɑ́yöd ge nɑ̈g-ɑ ji. Gï ɑ́dwɑdde kinni o ge di gøggi gen dyër, de ji ɑ́yöd ge ceg-ɑ ywøg yi gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen." 
Isaiah5:8 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wun ɑ nyi ngëwø ki ud geki pwödh møg kïdhu kömi møg-ɑ nud kì yï wun. O ji-ɑ kyeelø ójɑd gen ki keny bëëd yi gen kì bɑng keny me thinh, o ódöng ɑ́ wu keti wun ɑ bëëdø kì pinyɑni." 
Isaiah5:9 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïngɑ e okööbø kinni, “Udd-ɑ døngø, ɑ myëër ɑnɑn bënn, ódöng nøw ge rënyø." 
Isaiah5:10 Bɑ̈gg-ɑ døngø, ɑ lɑjjø yethi gen bɑ pedɑnn pyɑ̈rø, ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ røthøl pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel mø møgi oløg. Köödh møg pidh gɑ røthøl miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ røthøl pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïkyel mø byel.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wun ɑ nyi møøl be mɑdh ki møgi oløg kì mwøl, kɑ wu wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈r wu omɑ̈dhø." 
Isaiah5:12 Wu pwöd-ɑ bullì kí thøm, wu kødhh-ɑ kɑ̈ngì kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tugø, wu mɑdh-ɑ møgi oløg. De gïn-ɑ gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi wun," 
Isaiah5:13 bene ɑ bɑnge ókøøl wun yïnø wu bɑ ɑmɑgg. Jɑggi wun ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi kɑ̈j, o teen-ɑ kyeelø ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi röödhø." 
Isaiah5:14 Pödhi tyëngthøø pyëwe ongɑɑmø kipe gen, dhøge yieeb en. Gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mwønye’ mwønyø geki ji-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
Isaiah5:15 Dhɑnhø bëne óyɑ̈r, tyëng-ɑ tɑ̈dø ogöögø ki mööl." 
Isaiah5:16 De Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dönge ónyodh yi en kɑ gøggi dyër. O bëëde kwërø nyodh yi en kɑ lidhi gøøny jie." 
Isaiah5:17 Wɑ̈thi kɑ̈dd ócyɑ̈ɑ̈m-ɑ yi dyëg ki lum, nywøli dyëg ɑ́tegg óyïddi lum kì wɑ̈thi kɑ̈dd." 
Isaiah5:18 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wu pɑ cuggi pɑ̈di ri wun kì yethi töjji orøg. 
Isaiah5:19 Wu okööbø kinni, “Wiy Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyewe ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe ce gø ógwøge, o lidh yi wɑ. Wiy Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø gwøge gïg-ɑ ɑ́rum ki pyëlø yi en; wiy gïn-ɑ rømme yod yi wɑ.”" 
Isaiah5:20 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wu cwøll-ɑ gïnrɑj ɑ́ gïndøj, o gïndøj cwølli yi wun ɑ́ gïnrɑj! Wu nyi løg-ɑ muudhø cɑr, kɑ cɑr nyi løgu muudhø! Gïn-ɑ kej nyi gwøøgu men med, kɑ gïn med nyi gwøøgu men kej." 
Isaiah5:21 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wu orumø ce wɑ̈thi wun pel ki mendwøng. 
Isaiah5:22 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wu yɑɑg-ɑ teg ki mɑdhi møgi ɑdhɑ̈dh! Wu teg kɑ mɑdh ki muggì yøw! 
Isaiah5:23 De wu nyi wiy-ɑ men-ɑ́ ngɑn bɑ̈jjø e pɑ cɑy yi wun kipe kɑ ɑ́muuje ki gïn kum dhøggi wun! Kɑ gïi ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r nyi ti wun ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø! 
Isaiah5:24 Kì bɑng menɑni, ni kenyi cɑɑm lum-ɑ thwøwø yi mɑc, kɑ gø gøøje piny, nɑ menɑni ceth, byerri wun ókwɑ̈g, kɑ okøggi wun køøl yi yømø ni búr mɑc, mɑ́ ciggi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́bɑny yi wun, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́pwönyi wɑ yi Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Isaiah5:25 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe rɑɑj ki jie, cinge ɑ́tïnge e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑyi gen. Kïttì ónhɑ̈nhi, o tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈g óbëëd ge buud-ɑ yethi yëëth, ni gïg-ɑ nyi weddi. De cɑgg møgɑni cwöb, pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëd e nudd e rɑɑj, o cinge ónudd ɑ́ ɑtïng e cɑy-ɑ gen." 
Isaiah5:26 Ber ótïngi pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pödhh-ɑ cögi piny ókudhe kɑng, kɑ ge obëënø ge ójwɑnø!" 
Isaiah5:27 Bong ngɑn pïd wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn cyerri kì kelli gen, bong ngɑn dhɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ ónenø. Bong wëëni me pɑ̈d, wɑlɑ̀ bong wɑrø me cöd." 
Isaiah5:28 Nywøli wethhi gen bedh, o men-ɑ́ wethhi gen tënni gen. Tyelli kyënyi gen teeg cɑrø; o tyelli yɑ̈thi gen wïïnø nɑ yømø ɑ́kødɑkødø." 
Isaiah5:29 Jøliny gen ngɑ̈rri nɑ ngurrì mø mɑɑg lɑ̈y, o bong ngɑn kɑ̈bbi kì cinggi gen." 
Isaiah5:30 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, ge óruur kömi Isrɑil ni ɑpɑgi nɑɑm omelø. Lidh, pönhï ógöögø ɑ́ muudhø me rɑj, cɑre ree óløge muudhø." 
Isaiah6:1 Wë ɑ́lidhɑ kì run-ɑ ɑ́thøw Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀. Álidhɑ e bëëd ɑ wïj kwøme; kwøm me bɑ̈r, me myër o Kengø bëne ópɑ̈ɑ̈ngø yi ógødhe, ógønhdwøng," 
Isaiah6:2 kí Serɑpïm mø cungi kì bute kì tuung kí tuung, ɑ́kyel yïe dɑ obërr ɑ́bïkyel; obërr ɑ́ryew møg kume nyinge, o ɑ́ryew kume tyelle, o ɑ́ryew pɑ̈rre." 
Isaiah6:3 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge óryeerø ge köbb-ɑ ri gen kinni, “Kwërø, kwërø, kwërø! Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ kwërø, piny bëne pɑ̈ngø yi mɑ̈re.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Kɑ Kengø ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh yi cwɑggi gen, kɑ Kengø opɑ̈ngø yi yïrø." 
Isaiah6:5 Akööbɑ kinni, “Bong gïn yiel yɑn! Mɑ́ møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøgɑ bënn bɑ kwøbbi orøg, o kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ kelli gen bëëdɑ bɑ kwøbbi orøg. O men-ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́lidhɑ, yɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Codhe, kɑ Serɑp ɑ́kyel bï-ɑ yïɑ e ópɑ̈rrø, e ókɑ̈ddø ki leli mɑc mɑ ɑ́kwɑnye ki dikɑ̈bbì kì wïj këli lɑm." 
Isaiah6:7 Kɑ dhøgɑ nywɑle ki leli mɑc menɑni, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dhøgí ɑ́rum ki nywɑlø yi gïn, ɑnɑn orøgí ɑ́rum ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, o lɑ́ɑ̀w ɑ́dwöög piny kipe orøgí.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Codhe, ɑlïngɑ Wë e okööbø kinni, “Wɑ ör-ɑ men? Á men ɑ ógöögø ɑ́ jɑlwöönee?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Yɑ èn! Ör yɑn!”" 
Isaiah6:9 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Kedh, kɑ ji köbbí kinni, cɑgg wu lïngø kidï, møg-ɑ lïngi yi wun pɑ gɑm yi wɑ̈thi wun. Cɑgg wu nëënø kidï, gïn-ɑ göögø pɑ ngij yi wun.”" 
Isaiah6:10 Codhe ɑköbbe yɑn kinni, “Gwøg wɑ̈thi jiɑni ge gug, kɑ yïthhi gen meng, kɑ nyingi gen cøør, kipe kinni o ge cög ge pɑ lïngø, o ge pɑ nëënø, o bëëd e bong gïjø me gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen. O ge cög ge pɑ ywöög köörɑ, mɑ́ pyëwɑ di lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen, kɑ ge di tuurɑ.”" 
Isaiah6:11 Apëjjɑ kinni, “Møgɑni ógïti wɑɑng ge bëëd ɑ nøw Wuö?” Alögge kinni, “Gïti keny-ɑ órënyi kɑ̈dd, kɑ ge döng-ɑ nøw. O piny kiree cöge e pɑ bëëd." 
Isaiah6:12 Ji ókïdhɑ kun me lɑ̈wi, kɑ piny döng-ɑ nøw bëne." 
Isaiah6:13 Cɑgg dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel döng kì ri ji pyɑ̈rø e obëëdø kì yij piny, óbëëd e rënyø ni yɑdh óthurø men-ɑ óngøl piny.” (Otug yɑnhɑni cungi ɑ́ cɑ̈gi bëëdø men-ɑ nyɑ̈n kì yï jii Jwøk.)" 
Isaiah7:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh wɑ̈d Yöthɑm wɑ̈d Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ jyɑ̈gø, Redhïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm kí Pekɑ̀ wɑ̈d Remɑliyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil, ge ɑ́bï be nyɑɑg ki Yeudiyɑ̀, de gø nuti tyɑɑm gen." 
Isaiah7:2 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni i Arɑm rëbø ki Isrɑil, kɑ obwøgø geki jie bënn, kɑ dëlli gen ceg-ɑ okïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ni kenyi wøjji bɑ̈ddi yenh yi ɑtunø." 
Isaiah7:3 Kɑ Icɑyɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí yï Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh, wuki Ceɑr Yɑcub wɑ̈dí Óyuud yi wun tøg dhøng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij luy-ɑ kwøømø, kì yuu-ɑ kedhi kej bödhhi cwɑ̈j kí ógudh." 
Isaiah7:4 Kɑ köbbí kinni, bëëde ree gwiir en, e opɑ̈we dwøøg en piny, kɑ ko böggi wɑlɑ̀ ko twɑ̈lli. Liny Rɑ̈dh Redhïn rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm geki Rɑ̈dh Pekɑ̀ bong gïn gwøg yi gen, linyɑni nɑ yïrø me dung kì ri okewwi yenh ɑ́ryew yøw." 
Isaiah7:5 Arɑm ɑ́rëbi ki Isrɑil. 
Isaiah7:6 Ge dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgi Yeudiyɑ̀, ge dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o ji bwøg gen, o ge døøg gen tuung gen, o wɑ̈d Tɑbiil cïb wïj kwøm." 
Isaiah7:7 “De yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ kwøb-ɑ kinni gïn ni menɑni pɑ cwöb." 
Isaiah7:8 Mɑ́ Arɑm pɑ teeg kibøli Dimɑceg kɑɑl-ɑ jɑɑgii, o Dimɑceg pɑ teeg kibøli Rɑ̈dh Redhïn. De keløg ɑ́ per Isrɑil, Isrɑil ókedhhi, pɑ bëëdø ɑ́ pödhø këti kì bɑng runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́bïj." 
Isaiah7:9 Isrɑil pɑ teeg kibøli Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kɑɑl-ɑ jɑɑgii, o Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ pɑ teeg kibøli Rɑ̈dh Pekɑ̀. “Keløg yïëyí pɑ teeg, yï pɑ cuggi ngïnø.”" 
Isaiah7:10 Acigi Akɑɑdh ödø ki wöödø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Isaiah7:11 “Cwöddi ki ngïji kì yï Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ócuggø bëëdø e ying-ɑ piny kì pödhi tyëngthøø, wɑlɑ̀ ying-ɑ mɑl kun lɑ̈wi.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Alöggi Akɑɑdh kinni, “Yɑ pɑ cwöddi ki ngïji; Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ rɑng yi yɑn.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Aløøg møgɑni yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Adɑ́ lïng wun, wu tyëng gøl Debïd! Wu ɑ́bëëd wu jud-ɑ ji ceth, de ɑnɑn wu dwɑdd-ɑ judi Jwøk thyew?" 
Isaiah7:14 Døj, men-ɑ́ Wë kiree ɑ óthödhi wun ki ngïji; nyɑnɑjur me nuti pɑ̈nyø nywɑlø yi jɑlø, óngøl ki dhɑnhø, kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ piny ki wɑ̈d, o nyinge ócɑg yi en ɑ́ Imɑnwel." 
Isaiah7:15 Kì bøli keny-ɑ ódønge kɑ odïdø ki tyelli kwøb, ji óbëëd ge omɑ̈dhø ki cɑg, ge ocyɑ̈mø ki møøw kïc." 
Isaiah7:16 De cɑgg bøli kenyɑni nuti wɑ̈nhø, pìnyi rɑ̈nhh-ɑ böggi yi yïn ryeet ódöng nøw." 
Isaiah7:17 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈ni kömí ki ryɑ̈g wuki jií, kí gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø bëne; ryɑ̈g me dwøng me nuti pɑ̈nyi cwöbø kër-ɑ ɑ́dɑ̈ngi Isrɑil kí Yeudiyɑ̀; rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Acuur kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø." 
Isaiah7:18 “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, tyëng Rïp ólwij yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge bï gen ge nɑ lwɑngì ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kö Kiir. Kɑ tyëng Acuur lwije, o ge bï gen kì pödhi gen, ge nɑ dɑɑg kïc." 
Isaiah7:19 Törr ópɑ̈ng yi gen, kí órøggi kïttì; yenh geki lum óbëëd ge pɑ nënni yi gen." 
Isaiah7:20 “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, Wë ókïrø ki ngɑn lëëdø, men-ɑ óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Porɑt, men-ɑ ólyëël yëyyi wun wɑ̈g kì tïggi wun, kí yëyyi wɑ̈thi wun kí dëlli wun. Ngɑnɑni bɑ rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur." 
Isaiah7:21 “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, cɑgg dhɑnhø yïe ódööng-ɑ yi dhyɑng kí dyëg ɑ́ryew," 
Isaiah7:22 cɑg óbëëd ge gïïr. Ngee, ji-ɑ óbodh kwɑnni gen nøg kì piny men, ge ócɑmm-ɑ cɑg kí møøw kïc." 
Isaiah7:23 “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, bɑ̈ggi oløg mø myër, me ɑ́kyel, kì kelli gen yije di oløg ɑ́lïp, óngew kɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg ɑ́lïp, yethi gen óbëëd ge pɑ̈ng yi koodh kí okurø." 
Isaiah7:24 Jøg-ɑ cwøw ókedhi kunɑni ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ wethh, mɑ́ pinyɑni bëne óbëëd e pɑ̈ng yi koodh kí okurø." 
Isaiah7:25 Wïj kwøømø men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pwödhø, bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ókedhi yije, mɑ́ óbëëd e pɑ̈ng yi koodh kí okurø. Ógöögø ɑ́ keny cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi dhög kí dyëg.”" 
Isaiah8:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈bbí ki ópɑn-ɑ köme nyi gwëëd, kɑ gweed ki gwedd mø ngëddi gen døngø kinni, ‘Jwɑn ki mɑnyø, yɑg.’" 
Isaiah8:2 Kɑ̈bbí ki jøg nyi cungi kì kömi dhøggi gen gɑ ɑ́ryew, kwɑny ókwërø Uriyɑ̀ geki Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yeberekiyɑ̀, o ge bëëd gɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lïdhi.”" 
Isaiah8:3 Kɑ cyëgɑ ongølø ki dhɑnhø kì bøli keny megø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhe piny ki wɑ̈d, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑɑg ɑ́ ‘Jwɑn ki mɑnyø, yɑg.’" 
Isaiah8:4 E nyelɑni dhøge nuti twïyø kɑ ócwöddø kinni, ‘Wïyø! Meyø!’ Kɑ̈ɑ̈r Dimɑceg kí jɑmm-ɑ ókïdhi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ cøn, ge ókɑ̈l bënn yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cig-ɑ kwøb ki yɑn. 
Isaiah8:6 Yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Mɑ́ tyëngɑni ɑ́bɑny-ɑ pïi Cilöɑ̀, pïg-ɑ mulli mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ge bögg-ɑ Rɑ̈dh Redhïn kí Rɑ̈dh Pekɑ̀," 
Isaiah8:7 yɑn, yɑ Wïi wun, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø kí yɑye bëne, o pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi Yeudiyɑ̀. Ge óbï ni bɑɑyø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l Nɑm Porɑt, e ceg-ɑ beedhø." 
Isaiah8:8 Yeudiyɑ̀ ówøj yi pïgɑni, pï ólwøddi ge ying-ɑ wɑ̈thi tøg.” “Wɑ ókøny yi Jwøk! Pinyee ókorri yi obërre møg-ɑ peedh en!”" 
Isaiah8:9 Wun ɑ pödhh, congu ri wun yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø! Wu kɑ̈jj-ɑ lɑ̈wi kì kömi piny, lïng wun. Congu ri wun kipe liny, de böggi wun! Ngee, gwiru ri wun, de böggi wun!" 
Isaiah8:10 Gwiru gïg-ɑ dwɑddu gwøgø! De møgɑni pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi wun ki gwøgø! Kööb wun ni kɑ̀ dwɑddu en! De bong gïjø me gwøg yi kwøbbɑni, mɑ́ Jwøk ying-ɑ kelli wøn." 
Isaiah8:11 Yɑ ɑ́kyëddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tege kinni i yɑ ko kedhi yij yuu-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi jiɑni. Ákööb kinni," 
Isaiah8:12 “Yï ko kedhi be gwøg ki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi jiɑni, kɑ yï ko böggi yi gïg-ɑ böggi yi gen." 
Isaiah8:13 Wïjí ko wïl kinni yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ kwërø, bɑ yɑn ɑ böggi yi wun." 
Isaiah8:14 Yɑ nɑ tungi kït men köme pɑ̈nhhi yi ji, kipe kɑ̀ böggi bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ kwërø, yɑ nɑ ɑ́kɑ̈llì møg mɑ̈gø ki tyëng myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Isrɑil, kí Yerusɑlem." 
Isaiah8:15 Ji mø gïïr ócyerri; ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kɑ ge mød piny. Ge ómɑg yi ɑ́kɑ̈llì.” 
Isaiah8:16 Wun, wu jøbɑngɑ, korru Ciggi Jwøk geki wödde møg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge yɑn." 
Isaiah8:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pɑ̈ni, o cöge e pɑ yod yi jie, de ongɑ̈dhø yi yɑn." 
Isaiah8:18 Yɑn èn, wøki othønh-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wø ɑ́öri tyëng Isrɑil yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kwøme ying wïj Kïti Dhɑyøn, wøn ɑ́ wöödø me nëënø." 
Isaiah8:19 De wu óköbbi yi jiɑni kinni i rɑ̈ɑ̈ng wun ki ɑ́jwöggì, kɑ wu pëjji wun ki yenh-ɑ nyi giidh, ɑ nyi luul. Ge ókööbø kinni, “Ji, jwöggi gen ko pyëj yi gen? Ji ko pëëj ki wɑddi gen tyëngthøø?”" 
Isaiah8:20 Løøg wun kwøbbi gen kinni, “Lïngu møg-ɑ pwönyi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Wu ko lïngi kwøbbi ɑ́jwöggì. Akørr pɑ cuggi jogø yi møg-ɑ kwøb yi gen.”" 
Isaiah8:21 Ji óbëëd ge owïïnø kì yij piny, wɑ̈thi gen cungø, o ri gen dɑ kɑ̈j. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen geki Jwøøg gen óyɑny yi gen, kì bɑng kɑ̈ny-ɑ ri gen geki rɑ̈ji pëthi gen. Ge ólïïdh mɑl," 
Isaiah8:22 kɑ ge lïïdh-ɑ piny, de ge ólidh-ɑ ɑkørr kí muudhø me böggi, eni muunh-ɑ yije ókïdhi gen." 
Isaiah9:1 Bong yöö men-ɑ óyieel gen kì bøli kej ɑkørrɑni. Piny gøl Dhebulun geki Nɑptɑlì ɑ́bëëd e yɑ̈rø kì bøli keny megø, de dhwɑ̈nge óbï dhuki megø, eni piny-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, e yöd-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, gïti piny-ɑ løøg Nɑm Urdun, e wɑ̈dh-ɑ men-ɑ́ Gɑlelì kiree, piny-ɑ bëëd yi jurr-ɑ pɑth." 
Isaiah9:2 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi kì yij muudhø ɑ́lïdhi ki cɑr me dwøng. Ge ɑ́bëëd ɑ piny tïbbì de ɑnɑn cɑr omënyø kì kömi gen. 
Isaiah9:3 Ge ɑ́thödhi yi yïn ki medi pyëw me dwøng, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pëthi gen ɑ́løg mø med yi yïn. Pëthi gen ɑ́mïni yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, ni kenyi mïni pëthi ji kɑ̀ kɑj gen byelli gen, wɑlɑ̀ kenyi pɑ̈ngi gen jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen kì yij liny." 
Isaiah9:4 Mɑ́ ɑ́cebø men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge torø ɑ́tørri yi yïn, kyeel ki lonh-ɑ ɑ́pwööd gen. Pönhɑni ɑ́tyɑm yi yïn eni pönh-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi jií, ni kɑ ɑ́tyɑɑm yɑɑy Midyɑn kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Isaiah9:5 Wɑrri liny-ɑ mɑ̈nyi, kí ógudhi gen møg-ɑ cödhø yi remø, ge órɑ̈b bënn ki mɑc." 
Isaiah9:6 Wɑ ɑ́nyöddi ki dhɑnhø! Wɑ ɑ́nëngi ki wɑ̈d! O ógöögø ɑ́ jɑngee. Ócwølli ɑ́ “Ngɑn wïje pel, Jɑlcïïjø”, “Jwøng Teg”, “Wïy ɑ gïti Atheer” “Nyirɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mër”." 
Isaiah9:7 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mee ókedh e ódøngø, pödhe ócög e bëëd ɑ yij mër. Óbëëdø kì wïj kwøøm kwɑn Debïd, ki bëëntir kí gøggi dyër cɑg ɑnɑn gïti thumi piny. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi gïgɑni bënn ceth." 
Isaiah9:8 Cɑ́yi pödhi Isrɑil ɑ́kwøb yi Wë; cɑ́yi kwɑrri Yɑgob ɑ́kwøb. 
Isaiah9:9 Óyod yi tyëng Isrɑil, kí tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, kinni møgɑni ɑ́gwøge. Anɑn ge ceg-ɑ ngwønø ge tɑ̈dø, o ge cem-ɑ," 
Isaiah9:10 “Uddi thob ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, de kej gen ógëddi wøn ki uddi kïtt-ɑ nyi tweg. Kwɑ̈rr-ɑ bɑ ólɑm ɑ́tørri, de kej gen ócïbi yi wøn ki yenh sɑndɑl.”" 
Isaiah9:11 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn Isrɑil ɑ́tug yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen köme." 
Isaiah9:12 Arɑm kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kí Pelistiyɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø dhøggi gen yieeb gen, ge dwɑdd-ɑ mwønyi Isrɑil. De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw ceth, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge nudd gø tïng en, e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑ̈yø." 
Isaiah9:13 Tyëng Isrɑil nuti yewø, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́cɑɑy gen yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge nuti døøg kööre." 
Isaiah9:14 Jɑggi Isrɑil geki tyëng Isrɑil ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. Gï óngøle piny, eni wïj geki yëb." 
Isaiah9:15 Jøgdøngø geki jödd-ɑ wør bene gen ɑ bɑ wïj, o yëb bɑ jøtöng møg-ɑ kɑ̈lli wöddi pyed!" 
Isaiah9:16 Ji ɑ́thɑɑb yïnø yi tyëng-ɑ bɑ pëjji gen, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen muum yi pëjjɑni." 
Isaiah9:17 Kì bɑng menɑni, bong yɑɑg thønhø møg-ɑ óbodh, o pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki thwömm geki kïjj, mɑ́ ji bënn kømm-ɑ pyed, o ge gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø. De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge nudd gø tïng en e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑ̈yø." 
Isaiah9:18 Orøøg ji lyel nɑ mɑc men rɑ̈b thïm me yije pɑ̈ng yi koodhø bëne kí okurø. Nɑ mɑc men rɑ̈b thïm e yïrø töng-ɑ mɑl ni löjj. 
Isaiah9:19 Mɑ́ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwe rɑɑj, cɑ́ye lyel nɑ mɑc kì yij pödhø bëne, ji rɑ̈be’ rɑ̈bø; ngɑn óngellø kɑ ongele." 
Isaiah9:20 Ji óbëëd ge gwɑrr-ɑ gïgcɑmm kì yij pödhø bëne, de kɑ̈j pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì ri gen. Men-ɑ́ nyigi gen ócɑm yi gen!" 
Isaiah9:21 Gøl Mɑnɑsè kí gøl Eprɑim ri gen ónɑ̈g yi gen, kɑ ge nyi rëb-ɑ kömi Yeudiyɑ̀. De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge nudd gø tïng en e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑ̈yø." 
Isaiah10:1 Wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wun ɑ nyi muuj cigg-ɑ guud wun nyingi jiɑ. 
Isaiah10:2 Wu mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn jɑmmi gen, o bong dyër me göggi gen yi wun, kɑ jɑmmi thwömm geki kïjj nyi kwɑny wun." 
Isaiah10:3 Wu ógöög ɑ dï keny-ɑ ócɑɑy wun yi Jwøk? Wu ógöög ɑ dï, keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈le ryɑ̈g kömi wun, gø ör yi en ɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi? Wu óreng-ɑ keny, ɑ óyïddi wun ki ngɑn kunyi? Kɑ̈ɑ̈r wun ókɑɑnu’ keny?" 
Isaiah10:4 Wu ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, wɑlɑ̀ wu ókɑ̈l wun ɑ́ ɑmɑgg. De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge nudd gø tïng en e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑ̈yø." 
Isaiah10:5 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Acuur ɑ bɑ lodh men-ɑ pwöödɑ tyëng-ɑ pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki gen." 
Isaiah10:6 Acuur ɑ örɑ pönh-ɑ pɑ wør Jwøk, pödhi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi pyëwɑ rënyø, o jɑmmi gen kwɑny, o ge nyøn ni tuggi ki yethi yëëth.”" 
Isaiah10:7 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kiree yïe dɑ rummì mø teg. Dwɑdd-ɑ tɑ̈ɑ̈yi pödhh mø gïïr piny. 
Isaiah10:8 Kööre nyi pwöde pwödø e cem-ɑ, “Pëjji linyɑ bɑ rɑ̈nhì ge bënn!" 
Isaiah10:9 Kɑ̈ddi Kɑlnö, kí Kɑrkemec, kí Amɑth, kí Arpɑd ge ɑ́mɑgɑ. Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́mɑgɑ geki Dimɑceg." 
Isaiah10:10 Cingɑ ɑ́tïngɑ kɑ pödhh-ɑ kwɑjji ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër cɑyɑ, ge bɑ ngïjji jwögg mø ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ Yerusɑlem geki Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
Isaiah10:11 Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈yɑ piny geki ngïjji jwögge, gïn ni menɑni ɑ ógöggɑ Yerusɑlem geki ngïjj-ɑ mɑlli kì yije.”" 
Isaiah10:12 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ótyëgɑ gïg-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn kì Kïti Dhɑyøn, geki Yerusɑlem, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ócɑy yi yɑn kipe kɑ ɑ́tɑ̈d wïje kɑ døøg-ɑ be pwödi kööre.”" 
Isaiah10:13 Rɑ̈nhdwøng Acuur pwöd-ɑ kööre e cem-ɑ, “Ge ɑ́gwøgɑ bënn kɑ tegɑ; yɑ teg, wïjɑ pel, o rummɑ gïïr. Yɑ nyi pödhh-ɑ kömi pödhh ni wɑnh-ɑ thwønh kɑ jɑmmi gen kwɑnyɑ, kí piny gen bëne." 
Isaiah10:14 Pödhhi kömi piny nɑ uddi winy kì yïɑ, kɑ̈rri gen ɑ́lemɑ ni kenyi lem nywøli winy; ge ɑ́lemɑ e bong ywøøg obërø me lïngɑ, wɑlɑ̀ bong gïn ryeer kì wïjɑ e mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ yɑn kwɑnyi gen!”" 
Isaiah10:15 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Dørø ócuggø kwøb kinni pere teg kibøli ngɑn-ɑ nguddii? Mocɑr pere teg kibøli ngɑn-ɑ nguddii? Pɑth ki lodh ɑ nyi kwɑny dhɑnhø, de bɑ dhɑnhø ɑ nyi kwɑny lodh.”" 
Isaiah10:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óöni ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì mø cɑɑye tyëng-ɑ cɑmmi gïgdøj ɑnɑn. Ódi mɑc me lyel kì dëlli gen. 
Isaiah10:17 Jwøk, ɑ løg cɑɑr Isrɑil ógöögø ɑ́ mɑc. Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ bɑ kwërø ólyel cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, kɑ jɑmmì bënn rɑ̈be kì cyɑ̈ngɑni geki koodh kí okurø bënn." 
Isaiah10:18 Thïm-ɑ døj geki pwödh órɑ̈bbi kinni tweet, ni kenyi keg dhɑnhø kɑ othøø kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel yøw." 
Isaiah10:19 Ódöng ɑ́ yenh møg cuggi kwɑnø yi othinh. 
Isaiah10:20 Bøli keny-ɑ ówïyi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bodh kì Isrɑil ki bëëdø kì ri tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rënyi gen ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Ge óngɑ̈dh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwërø, ɑ bɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil kidyër." 
Isaiah10:21 Mø nøg kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil ódwöög kö Jwøøg gen, Jwøng teg." 
Isaiah10:22 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd tyëng Isrɑil ge nɑ tør ɑnɑn, bɑ mø nøg yøw ɑ ódwöög. Ryɑ̈g ɑ́rum ki kwøbø kinni obëënø, ryɑ̈g obëënø e nɑ bɑɑyø." 
Isaiah10:23 Ngee, Wïlɑ̈bø Wë, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ókɑ̈ni yij pödhø bëne ki ryɑ̈g ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe." 
Isaiah10:24 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, köbb-ɑ jie møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Dhɑyøn kinni, “Wu ko böggi yi Acuur, cɑgg nyingi wun guud yi gen ni kɑ ɑ́guud nyingi wun yi tyëng Rïp cøn." 
Isaiah10:25 Yɑ órum ki cɑyi wun kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, codhe, o ge nɑ̈gɑ." 
Isaiah10:26 Ge ópwöd yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ge ópwöd yi yɑn ki dël ni kɑ ɑ́pwödɑ tyëng Midyɑn kì Kïti Örëb. Acuur ócɑy yi yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́cɑyɑ Rïp." 
Isaiah10:27 Obëën bøli kenyɑni, wu ógøny yi yɑn kì cingi Acuur. Acebbi gen óbï wɑ̈g kì muddi wun.”" 
Isaiah10:28 Kɑɑl Aɑy ɑ́mɑg yi jøliny tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø! Migrön ɑ́pöödh yi gen! Jɑmmi gen ɑ́wiy gen Mikmɑc! 
Isaiah10:29 Kew ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi gen, o ge ónïn-ɑ Gebɑ̀! Tyëng Rɑmɑ̀ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, o tyëng Gibeɑ̀ kɑɑl Cɑul ɑ́rengi." 
Isaiah10:30 Kïïw wun tyëng Gɑlïm! Lïng wun tyëng Lɑkic! Löggi wun tyëng Anɑthöth! 
Isaiah10:31 Tyëng Mɑdmenɑ̀ geki tyëng Gebïm rïngi ge yiel-ɑ wëyi gen. 
Isaiah10:32 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ying-ɑ Nöb dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, ge tïngg-ɑ cinggi gen, ge nenn-ɑ kuni Kïti Dhɑyøn, Kɑɑl Yerusɑlem." 
Isaiah10:33 Ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gï møde’ piny ni bɑɑd yɑdh kenyi dëëme, kɑ̀ ngølii. Men-ɑ tɑ̈dø, ɑ pëddi bɑ̈r kì kelli gen, óngøl kɑ ceg-ɑ ì rɑɑp kì piny e yɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah10:34 Ge óngøl piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni yenh kì dïdyëri thïm, kɑ̀ nyi ngøl gen ki dørø, ni men-ɑ́ yenh-ɑ døngø kì Lubnɑn." 
Isaiah11:1 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mi gøl Rɑ̈dh Debïd nɑ yɑdh men-ɑ óngøl piny, de ni kɑ̀ nyi twïy bɑ̈dd mø nyɑ̈n kì ri otug yɑdh, rɑ̈dh me nyɑ̈n ócwöb kì kelli kwɑrri Debïd." 
Isaiah11:2 Ónëngi ki peli wïj yi wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí dïdø kí ngɑ̈nyi wøw me jɑɑge jie, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëd gø ngɑ̈nye, o gø ówøre," 
Isaiah11:3 óyïddi ki medi pyëw kì ri mïdhi Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Koo cwɑ̈ggi kɑ per døøji dëël dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ kømmi kì ri ngɑnɑni," 
Isaiah11:4 gøøny ɑbuur ólidhe kidøøj, ngɑn nyødh ómëgge gëe. Ji ócɑy-ɑ keny-ɑ ókööbe o tyëngrijjø ceg-ɑ thøø." 
Isaiah11:5 Jie ójɑɑg yi en kɑ gøggi dyër geki tɑri pyëw. 
Isaiah11:6 Óthönhì geki dyëg óbëëdø kì kej ɑ́kyel ki mër, kwɑ̈nyì óbuud kì kej ɑ́kyel geki nywøli dyëg. Røjj ócyɑ̈mø kì kej ɑ́kyel geki nywøli ngur, ge kwɑy-ɑ yi othinh." 
Isaiah11:7 Dhög ócyɑ̈mø kì kej ɑ́kyel geki ngurrì, nyigi gen óbuud kì kej ɑ́kyel ki mër. Ngurrì ócɑm lum ni dhög." 
Isaiah11:8 Othinh me dhødh ótuug kì buti ød thwöl, kɑ othinh-ɑ pønø cinge cøde ød thwöl de bong gïn kedhi ree." 
Isaiah11:9 Bong gïjø men-ɑ óbëëd e rɑj kì Dhɑyøn kïti kwëër Jwøk, bong gïnrɑj men-ɑ óböggi. Piny óbëëd e dïdø ki pwönyø mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ̀ bëëd nɑ̈mmi omelø ge pɑ̈ng yi pï." 
Isaiah11:10 Bøli keny-ɑ ógöög rɑ̈nh-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l thɑ gøl Debïd ki ngïji kipe pödhh ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Ri gen ócøng gen kɑɑl-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ge ywöör-ɑ dönge. 
Isaiah11:11 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, Wë jie møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi yïnø ódwööge; gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi Acuur kí Rïp, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi pìnyi Pɑthrös geki Kuc, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi Elɑm, kí Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí Amɑth, kí piny-ɑ kömi nɑɑm omelø geki yethi mujji nɑ̈mmi omelø." 
Isaiah11:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ótïngi mɑl ki ber, e nyudh-ɑ pödhh bënn kinni jie møg-ɑ tɑɑy wɑ̈thi tùngi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen gï cønge’ cøngø; tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ dwööge’ dwöögø." 
Isaiah11:13 Isrɑil pɑ cigi mɑgø yi tyiel ki Yeudiyɑ̀ këti, o Yeudiyɑ̀ koo bëëd ge mɑ̈n ki Isrɑil." 
Isaiah11:14 Ge órëbi kömi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, kɑ tyëng myërr-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl yɑg yi gen. Piny Edöm geki Moɑb ómɑg yi gen, o kwøbbi gen ólïngi yi tyëng Amön." 
Isaiah11:15 Gøøli Siwes ógöjji dwönø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ókɑ̈ni ki yømø me lëëdh men-ɑ ódwön Nɑm Porɑt, kɑ óngøllø ɑ́ kɑ̈jj ɑ́bïryew møg yethi gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi ji." 
Isaiah11:16 Tyëng-ɑ óbodh møg-ɑ ódwöög kì Acuur, yuu gen óceg ngedhø, ɑ́ yöö me dwøng, ni yuu-ɑ ɑ́bëën wɑ̈g kì Rïp yi kweyyi gen kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Isaiah12:1 Ácyɑ̈ngi eni bøli keny-ɑ ówör ji kinni, “Yɑ lenh-ɑ yïn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Yï ɑ́bëëd pyëwí rɑɑj ki yɑn, de ɑnɑn yɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn, pyëwí pɑ rɑɑj ki yɑn këti." 
Isaiah12:2 Jwøk, en ɑ bɑ yïënɑ; óngɑ̈dhɑ, o yɑ koo böggi. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ thödhi yɑn ki tegø, en ɑ bɑ yïënɑ." 
Isaiah12:3 Jii Jwøk pëthi gen nyii mïnø kenyi yiele gïn, ni kenyi mïni pyëw ngɑn ree di röödhø kenyi mɑ̈dhe ki pï.”" 
Isaiah12:4 Ácyɑ̈ngi eni bøli keny-ɑ ókööb ji kinni, “Pwøj wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Cwøl wun en o wu køny yi en! Köbbu pödhh bënn ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Köbbu gen kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwøng!" 
Isaiah12:5 Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wör, kipe gïgdøngø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge bënn. Wiy wöönɑni lïngi yi lɑ̈bø bëne." 
Isaiah12:6 Wör tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Dhɑyøn bënn ge óryeerø! Jwøøg Isrɑil bɑ kwërø, o pëddi döng, o bëëd ɑ kelli jie.”" 
Isaiah13:1 Men bene wöön-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk gø öre’ Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh kipe Bɑbïl. 
Isaiah13:2 Tïng wun beer liny mɑl kì wïj kït! Kiw wun liny wun, kɑ kɑng kodh, o wu pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi kɑɑl-ɑ tɑ̈dø." 
Isaiah13:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j linye, liny-ɑ tɑ̈dø ɑ́kiwe o ge nyɑg gen linye kwërø." 
Isaiah13:4 Lïngu cwɑgg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wïj kït, bɑ cwɑggi pödhh kɑ̀ cøng gen ri gen. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑye ɑ́kiwe kipe liny." 
Isaiah13:5 Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhh mø lɑ̈wi kì cögi piny. Pönhɑni bëne órënyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe. 
Isaiah13:6 Ywöngi wun, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókɑ̈ne ki ryɑ̈g." 
Isaiah13:7 Cinggi ji óceg ì lwɑj kì piny, kɑ pëthi ji ongɑɑnyø." 
Isaiah13:8 Ge órɑngi ni ngɑndhɑjø men pɑ̈dhi piny. Ge ónenni nyingi gen ki wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ge nënni ge yɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah13:9 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j obëënø; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëd pyëwe e rɑɑj. Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni piny ódöng nøw, o tyëngorøg ónɑ̈g bënn." 
Isaiah13:10 Kyelli mɑl bënn koo mënyø, cɑ̈ng ólunyi keny-ɑ ótuule, kɑ dwɑ̈y ogöögø e bong cɑre." 
Isaiah13:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ryɑ̈g ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi piny, kɑ tyëngorøg cɑyɑ bënn kipe orøøg gen. Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen tɑ̈dø ódwøøgɑ cyɑ̈n, kɑ tyëngɑthwøg cɑyɑ." 
Isaiah13:12 Tyëng-ɑ óbodh óbëëd kwɑnni gen nøg, o yodi gen óbëëd e teeg ni dhɑb." 
Isaiah13:13 Mɑl ógöjjɑ onhɑ̈nh, o piny órungi kì keje dicyɑ̈ngɑni, keny-ɑ ónyodhɑ rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah13:14 “Wëdhh møg-ɑ Bɑbïl órengi pödhhi gen ge tɑɑyø, ni ɑ́køny kenyi cyeddii yi jødwɑr, o ge óni dyëg mø bong ngɑn kwɑy gen." 
Isaiah13:15 Ngɑn mɑg ceg kɑ cööbø kɑ othøø. 
Isaiah13:16 Nyigi gen ónɑ̈g gï onennø yi gen, kɑ mɑ̈nni gen mød kì bøli gen, kɑ kɑ̈lli gen yɑg.”" 
Isaiah13:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Liny Mɑdɑy ótug yi yɑn, o kedhe be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Bɑbïl; tyëngɑni yï gen bɑ̈r ki ɑ́tegø, o dhɑb pɑ kønø kì pëthi gen." 
Isaiah13:18 Yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb ónɑ̈g yi gen ki wethhi gen. Pëthi gen koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki møg-ɑ dhødh wɑlɑ̀ ki othønhø. 
Isaiah13:19 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bene pönh-ɑ pëddi myëërø, tyëng pönhɑni thwøgø thwøgø. De Bɑbïl ócøørɑ piny, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀!" 
Isaiah13:20 Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì kenyɑni. Árɑb koo gudø ki kɑɑl kì wïj Bɑbïl, o bong tyëng-ɑ ókwɑ̈yø kì kenyɑni ki dyëg." 
Isaiah13:21 Óbëëd ɑ́ keny cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, o tulø ógëdø ki udde kì kenyɑni. O wudø óbëëdø kì kenyɑni, tenø ópɑ̈rri kì wïj kɑɑlɑni." 
Isaiah13:22 Uddi kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø yethi gen óywöngi yi óthönhì geki ógwøgg. Bøli kej Bɑbïl ɑ́bï; cyɑ̈ngge ɑ́thumi.” 
Isaiah14:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ócigi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ gï myege gɑ jie. Ge ówiy yi en o ge døøg gen be bëëdø kì piny gen. Tyëngpɑth óbï be bëëdø kì kelli gen." 
Isaiah14:2 Isrɑil ókøny yi pödhh mø gïïr ki døøg pinye, piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O Isrɑil ógöggi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø gɑ bɑ̈ngge. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg Isrɑil cøn, ólony ki mɑgø yi Isrɑil, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud wɑɑng Isrɑil ójɑɑg yi Isrɑil." 
Isaiah14:3 Tyëng Isrɑil óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki orɑɑng gen geki gwøng teg men-ɑ ɑ́cïri gen. 
Isaiah14:4 Keny-ɑ ógwøge møgɑni, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ógɑggi yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Rɑ̈nh-ɑ yije wöny ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh!" 
Isaiah14:5 Tegi jɑgg-ɑ rijjø ɑ́cuung yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Isaiah14:6 gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi ji-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen. 
Isaiah14:7 De ɑnɑn piny bëne bëëdø kɑ mër; dhɑnhø bëne wör pyëwe omedø. 
Isaiah14:8 Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ ɑmedh geki sɑndɑl mø Lubnɑn, ge ókööbø kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, bong ngɑn-ɑ ócigi wøn ngøl piny!’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Pödhi tyëngthøø dhwödh-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈ri yïn, yïn ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Rorr-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg kömi piny cøn, gï ɑ́tuge o ge pɑɑr gen yïn." 
Isaiah14:10 Ge okööbø ge bënn kinni, ‘Anɑn yï ɑ́göög yi nyøødh ni wøn! Yï ɑ́göög ni wøn!" 
Isaiah14:11 Yï ɑ́bëëd yï nyi mɑ̈dh kɑ kɑng, de ɑnɑn yï pɑ ying pödhi tyëngthøø? Yï buud-ɑ kömi kunnì, o kömí mull-ɑ yi twöng.’" 
Isaiah14:12 “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, yï ce ɑ́bëëd yï nɑ kyeli ru wøw, de yï ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh ɑ dï? Yï ɑ́bëëd yï mɑng-ɑ pödhh cøn, de yï nuti leeng piny ɑnɑn?" 
Isaiah14:13 Yï ce ɑ́bëëd yï dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi mɑl, o kwømí di cïb kömi kyell-ɑ lɑ̈wi cɑrø? Yï nuti dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi wïj kïn-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o yï di pëggí kelli jwögg." 
Isaiah14:14 Yï ɑ́kööb ce yï dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi wɑ̈thi pøøl o yï di pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki Áyïmø! 
Isaiah14:15 De yï ce ɑ́yöd yï kïdh-ɑ piny pödhi tyëngthøø? 
Isaiah14:16 “Tyëng-ɑ thøø óceg dɑɑyø ge nenn-ɑ yïn, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Bene jɑl-ɑ ɑ́rungi piny èn, ɑ ɑ́bëëd pödhh ceg-ɑ kïïrø kì yïe?" 
Isaiah14:17 Bene jɑl-ɑ ɑ́rënyi kɑ̈dd èn, ɑ ɑ́gwøg kömi piny ɑ́ ryɑng? Bene jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑmɑgge pɑ nyi gønye, o gï pɑ nyi wëgge kedhi kɑ̈lli gen?" 
Isaiah14:18 Rɑ̈nhi kömi piny bënn buud-ɑ yethi kenggi gen, kengg-ɑ́ yethi gïn ɑ́koony gen," 
Isaiah14:19 de yïí bong deebø, yï ɑ́ceg kɑ weddø o yï kwɑ̈ɑ̈g. Kömí óröör-ɑ ɑ́lɑthkerr møg-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi liny, wu ɑ́leeng-ɑ yij luy me tyele bɑ kït, o wu nyɑɑj piny." 
Isaiah14:20 Mɑ́ pödhí ɑ́rënyi yi yïn, kɑ jií nɑ̈ɑ̈g, yï pɑ kony ki konyi rɑ̈nhì. Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ódöng e onëënø kì gølí gøl-ɑ rɑj." 
Isaiah14:21 Wiy jɑl-ɑ nɑ̈gø cɑ̈ge ki nɑ̈g! Wɑ̈ddi rɑ̈dh ceg-ɑ thøø ki gööj orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyyi gen. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ójɑɑg piny kì kelli gen, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈ng piny ki kɑ̈dd.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Bɑbïl, kɑ rënyɑ. Bong gïjø men-ɑ ówiyɑ, bong othinh me wiyɑ; bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ówiyɑ kinni tek. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Isaiah14:23 Bɑbïl óløgɑ bɑ̈j, o wïje óbëëd-ɑ yi tulø. Bɑbïl óyej yi yɑn ki ókwɑngø, bong gïjø men-ɑ ódöng kì keje, e nuti yeej wɑ̈g. Yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah14:24 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́rum ki gwirø yi yɑn ócwöb ceth. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni ógwøgɑ, gwøgɑ’ gwøgø." 
Isaiah14:25 Tyëng Acuur ónɑ̈g yi yɑn kì pinyɑ, piny Isrɑil, kɑ ge nyønɑ kì wɑ̈thi kïttɑ. Jiɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi ɑcebbi tyëng Acuur, geki gïg-ɑ bëëd ge torø torø." 
Isaiah14:26 Bene gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ gwøgø kì kömi piny, o cingɑ tïng yɑn, yɑ cɑy-ɑ pödhhi kömi piny.”" 
Isaiah14:27 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi møgɑni ceth, cinge ɑ́tïnge e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑ̈yø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ójogii." 
Isaiah14:28 Men bene wöödø men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli kì run-ɑ ɑ́thøw Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh. 
Isaiah14:29 Wu tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, lonh-ɑ ɑ́pwöd wun ɑ́tor, de wɑ̈de óbëëd e pëddi rɑ̈jø kiper wun! Wɑ̈de óbëëd ɑ́ nɑ̈ɑ̈g." 
Isaiah14:30 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑbuur kì kelli jie ókorre, kɑ gï wëgge bëëdø ki mër, de wu ógöjje kɑ̈j me rɑj, wun ɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, bong ngɑn-ɑ óbødh kì kelli wun e pɑ nɑ̈g yi kɑ̈nyɑni." 
Isaiah14:31 Kïïw wun wu kwɑjj-ɑ kønyø wun ɑ kɑ̈ddi Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn! Bwøg wun bënn! Dɑ tør me bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, bɑ liny me kelle bong wɑ̈rrì." 
Isaiah14:32 Kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ óör yi Pelistiyɑ̀ óløøg yi wɑ kidï? Ge óköbbi yi wɑ kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Dhɑyøn ɑ́geere keje, o jie møg-ɑ rɑngø óthödhe ki mër kì kunɑni." 
Isaiah15:1 Men bene wöön-ɑ ɑ́kwøb kipe Moɑb. Kɑ̈ddi Aɑr kí Kïr ɑ́rënyi kì wɑ̈r ɑ́kyel, kɑ piny Moɑb ceg-ɑ lïïwø." 
Isaiah15:2 Tyëng Dïbön yedh-ɑ wïj kït be ywøgi kengø. Tyëng Moɑb ywøg-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Nebö kí Medebɑ̀, yëyyi wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́lyel gen geki yëyyi tïggi gen, ge ceg-ɑ ywøg." 
Isaiah15:3 Ji cyɑ̈dhi kì yöö ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì. Kì kɑɑl, ji ywöngi ge okïïwø kì wɑ̈thi ud." 
Isaiah15:4 Tyëng kɑ̈ddi Kicbön kí Eleɑlè ceg-ɑ kïïwø, cwɑggi gen lïng ɑ Yɑ̈ɑ̈dh kun lɑ̈wi. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ jöddi liny, ge ceg-ɑ kïïrø, pëthi gen ɑ́nyönhi." 
Isaiah15:5 Yijɑ óywöngø kipe Moɑb! Ji ɑ́rengi Dhoɑr, kí Eglɑth Celiciyɑ̀. Kwï gen reng-ɑ mɑl yuu Lukith, ge cyɑ̈dhi ge óywöngø, møøgø ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r Örønɑim, ge ceg-ɑ kïïwø ki ywøg." 
Isaiah15:6 Dhøg Nïmrïm ɑ́dwön, lum ɑ́thwøw kì tøgge, bong gïn mɑr me nud." 
Isaiah15:7 Ji ɑ́kedh ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ Töör Wijø, ge tyëdd-ɑ jɑmmi gen; ge ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah15:8 Akyew di lïngø kì bɑdhhi Moɑb. Akyew kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Eglɑim kí Biir Elïm. 
Isaiah15:9 Nɑm ɑ́kwɑ̈rri yi remø kì bøli Dïbön, o Jwøk thyew yïe dɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ógögge teedø kì myërrɑni. Ngee, ji ónɑ̈g ki menrɑj, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ódöng kì Moɑb." 
Isaiah16:1 Tyëng Moɑb óödø ki órömm kì Selɑ̀, gï öri ge’ ngɑn-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem." 
Isaiah16:2 Nywøli Moɑb yïd ɑ kömi Nɑm Arnön ge owïïnø; ge nyi kedh-ɑ tuung kí tuung ni winyy-ɑ ócyeddø kì uddi gen. 
Isaiah16:3 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, “Nyudhu wøn gïn-ɑ gwøg yi wøn. Wiy wø bï wøn tïbi wun, kɑ wiy tïbi wun løge me ngij kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëd piny lëëdh. Wø ceg-ɑ yömmø, kɑɑnu wøn keny pɑ yood wøn." 
Isaiah16:4 Wiy wø bëëd wøn kì piny wun. Koru wøn ki tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi wøn.” (Guun-ɑ guud nyingi wun ócungi, kɑ ryɑ̈g ókedhø, o tyëng-ɑ yɑg pödhø ókedh." 
Isaiah16:5 O ɑ́kyel kì kelli kwɑrri Debïd gööge’ rɑ̈dh, o ji jɑɑge e mïdh-ɑ yïëyø geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø. Ójwɑn gwøg ki gïn-ɑ bɑ dyër, o ódwɑdd-ɑ kinni gøggi dyër ceth.)" 
Isaiah16:6 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Wø ɑ́lïng kinni i tyëng Moɑb tɑ̈dø ki mendwøng. Ge ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kinni ge bɑ tyëngɑthwøg, o ge nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ tøllø yøw, de møg-ɑ kømmi yi gen pɑth ki dyër.”" 
Isaiah16:7 Tyëng Moɑb óywöngi yi ɑkørr-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi gen. Ge óywöngi keny-ɑ ópɑr gen gïncɑm-ɑ døøj, men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gø ocɑmø yi gen kì Kïr Ëres. Yethi gen óbɑɑr." 
Isaiah16:8 Pwödhh-ɑ buti Kicbön kí bɑ̈ggi oløg møg-ɑ Sibmɑ̀ ɑ́rënyi, gen ɑ bɑ̈gg-ɑ́ yethi gen nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l møgi oløg, men-ɑ nyi nɑ̈g jɑggi pödhh. Bɑ̈ggɑni ɑ́bëëd ge lɑjjø ge pïd-ɑ Yɑdher, kɑ ge pïd-ɑ yij ryɑng kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Kɑ ge pïd-ɑ Luuy Omelø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Isaiah16:9 Yɑ ywøg-ɑ bɑ̈ggi oløg mø Sibmɑ̀, yɑ ywøg-ɑ Yɑdher. Pïi nyingɑ ɑ́dëëm kipe Kicbön geki Eleɑlè, mɑ́ e bong byel mɑ ɑ́cyeg møg wëggi pëthi ji mïnø." 
Isaiah16:10 Bong dhɑnhø me pyëwe med kì yethi pwödhh-ɑ lɑ̈bi gen med. Bong ngɑn ryeer wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn wör kì yethi bɑ̈ggi oløg. Bong ngɑn bïjø ki oløg o gööge ki møgø; ryeer-ɑ nyi ryeer ki medi pëëth ɑ́cungi. 
Isaiah16:11 Yɑ óywöngø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ kipe Moɑb, yɑ okïïmø kipe Kïr Ëres." 
Isaiah16:12 Tyëng Moɑb pïd-ɑ ri gen ki kedhi yethi kenggi gen møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí yethi kengg-ɑ kyeelø be mɑ̈ddø, de bong døøjø men-ɑ óyod yi gen." 
Isaiah16:13 Bene wöön-ɑ ɑ́kwøb cøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe Moɑb èn. 
Isaiah16:14 O ɑnɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈r Moɑb ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì bɑng runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. Ódöng ɑ́ mø nøg kì kelli jie møg-ɑ gïïr ɑnɑn, o ge óbëëdø ge nyøødh.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Dimɑceg koo bëëdø ɑ́ kɑɑldwøng këti, ódöng ɑ́ tuggì ɑ keje." 
Isaiah17:2 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø kì Arɑm ócög yethi gen pɑ bëëd gïti ɑtheer. Wɑ̈thi kɑ̈ddɑni ócyɑ̈ɑ̈m-ɑ yi dhög geki dyëg; bong ngɑn-ɑ ókøøl gen wɑ̈g kì kenyɑni. 
Isaiah17:3 Isrɑil bong gïn-ɑ ókorii, o Dimɑceg ójɑɑg yi pödhø megø. Tyëng-ɑ ódöng ge onëënø kì Arɑm, ge óbëëdø ge yɑ̈ɑ̈rø ni tyëng Isrɑil. Yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah17:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókedh døøji Isrɑil ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, o kej kɑ̈r lunyi yi kɑ̈j." 
Isaiah17:5 Isrɑil ódöng e nɑ pwödhø me byelle ótööng piny, ge rumø’ kɑjø; ógöögø e nɑ pwödhø me byelle óputh piny kì Töör Repɑim." 
Isaiah17:6 Óbodh ɑ́ ji mø nøg, o Isrɑil ódöng e nɑ oløg me nywøle ópønø, o döngø ɑ́ nywøl ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́dɑ̈g kì kööre mɑl, wɑlɑ̀ mø nøg mø döngø kì ri bɑ̈dd-ɑ piny. Yɑn yɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah17:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, ji óywøøg kö ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j gen, ɑ løg kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Isaiah17:8 Ge koo ngɑ̈dh këlli lɑm møg-ɑ ɑ́ger yi gen ki cinggi gen këti, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo ngɑ̈dh ngïjji Aceerɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ këlli bɑkur." 
Isaiah17:9 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ̈dd-ɑ teg, ji ódhwödh kì yethi gen, kɑ ge wiy piny ge rënyø ni kɑ̈ddi tyëng Kib kí Amör ɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny kɑ ge órengø ge bwøg-ɑ yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Isaiah17:10 Yïn ɑ Isrɑil, wïjí ɑ́wïl ki Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́yiel yïn, kɑ yï korre, eni kïn-ɑ teg, ɑ gøde ɑ́pɑ̈nni yi yïn. Kɑ yï yöd yï pïdh-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki bɑ̈gg-ɑ yethi gen nyi mɑllí gen." 
Isaiah17:11 De cɑgg yenhɑni døngi dicyɑ̈ng-ɑ pidhu gen, kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki okøgg, bong nywøli gen møg-ɑ ópøn thyew. De óbëëd ɑ́ ɑkørr ɑ nud geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì møg pɑ yiel ki yɑdh." 
Isaiah17:12 Pödhh-ɑ døngø, ɑ teg ceg-ɑ wöörø, cwɑggi gen lïngi e nɑ ɑpɑgi nɑɑm omelø, ge bɑ̈bb-ɑ piny ni ɑpɑgø." 
Isaiah17:13 Pödhhɑni ɑ́bï ge nɑ ɑpɑgø ge bɑ̈bb-ɑ piny, de ge ɑ́cɑ̈wwi yi Jwøk kɑ ge døøg-ɑ ngɑ̈thi gen, ni ɑyeny-ɑ nyi køøl yi ɑtunø kì buti kït me thinh, ni wél kenyi kwølli gen yi ɑ́kødɑkødø." 
Isaiah17:14 Ji ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø yi gen kì böörø, de ge ɑ́yod ge rum kedhø keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën mwøl. Bene gïn-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi ngɑn yɑg pinyee ɑnɑn." 
Isaiah18:1 Piny-ɑ yije lïngi ywøøg obërr; eni piny-ɑ ócørrø yi nɑ̈mmì; Kuc wɑnge óbɑɑr. 
Isaiah18:2 Tyëngwöödø mø kyewi óthyɑggi obej, óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pönhɑni. Døøg wun pönh-ɑ ócørrø yi nɑ̈mmì, wun ɑ tyëngwöödø møg-ɑ yöd, døøg wun pönh-ɑ jie bɑ̈rrø, ji-ɑ teg, ɑ dëlli gen lwiy, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ böggi yi kömi piny bëne." 
Isaiah18:3 Lïng dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny! Ber ótïng kì wïj kït, kɑ wu olïngø ki ywøøg kɑng."
