Isaiah18:4 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑ ólïïdh piny mɑ̈ɑ̈dh, yɑ ying-ɑ pɑɑrɑ mɑl; mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ni cɑ̈ng kenyi wɑ̈dhe dïmɑl, o ni pølli ɑyɑr ɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh kenyi bëëd piny lëëdh.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Tyëng Kuc ónɑ̈g yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki gen, kɑ ge odhoongø kì piny, ni bɑ̈ddi oløg møg-ɑ ócel piny ki pɑlø, e nywøle køm-ɑ cyegø." 
Isaiah18:6 Tyëng Kuc ócɑm yi cor kì lew, o ge ócɑm-ɑ yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l kì wuudø." 
Isaiah18:7 Obëën bøli kenyɑni, tyëng-ɑ bɑ̈rrø, ɑ dëlli gen lwiy, ɑ ceg ki böggø yi kömi piny bëne mɑ́ ge teg; ge óbï Kïti Dhɑyøn, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhi gen, pönh-ɑ ócørrø yi nɑ̈mmì. Kɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, muuj gen ki jɑmmi jwödhø kì keny-ɑ mɑllii." 
Isaiah19:1 Men bɑ wöödø kipe Rïp, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ Rïp e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi pøølø me jwɑni ki mendwøng. Ngïjji jwöggi Rïp ceg-ɑ kïïrø kì bøle, kɑ tyëng Rïp obwøgø ki mendwøng." 
Isaiah19:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ji ócwɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ kì Rïp, kɑ ge ónyïɑ̈ggø ki ri gen; dhɑnhø ónyïɑ̈ggi ki ómen, kɑ tyëng byëg ɑ́kyel ónyïɑ̈ggø keti gen. Kɑɑl ónyïɑ̈ggi ki kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ rɑ̈nhì ónyïɑ̈ggø kipe lɑwø." 
Isaiah19:3 Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi teedø kì Rïp ódöddɑ, kɑ pëthi gen wëggɑ nyönhø. Ngïjji jwöggi Rïp ókwɑjji yi gen kipe kønyi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be rɑng kí ɑ́jwöggì, kí be pyëj ki yɑdh, kipe kinni o ge nyudhi gïn-ɑ gwøg." 
Isaiah19:4 Rïp ówëggɑ jɑɑgø yi ngɑnrɑj; ócïbɑ cingi rɑ̈dh me yije wöny. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Pï ónungi kì yij Kiir, kɑ nɑm odwönø." 
Isaiah19:6 Luyy-ɑ tøggi nɑm yømi gen ópënni kɑ̀ kedh pï ge odwönø. Obej óthøw geki møødø," 
Isaiah19:7 kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ópiidhø kì tøggi nɑm othwøwø, kɑ ge køøl yi yømø, kɑ ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Isaiah19:8 Óyïnnì geki tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑ̈yø wɑ̈thi gen ócungi, bong gïn-ɑ ógwøg ki bøyyi gen geki ɑ́bɑ̈dhhi gen." 
Isaiah19:9 Tyëng-ɑ nyi cwɑ̈jø kí ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm ólëngi piny; 
Isaiah19:10 tyëng-ɑ nyi cwɑ̈jø kí ógudh, ɑ cinggi gen døøj, bong gïjø men-ɑ óngɑ̈dh yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ bong gïn-ɑ ókwɑny yi gen." 
Isaiah19:11 Pëjji Dhoɑn, kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng bɑ dhëgg! Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel kì Rïp cïïj-ɑ dhëëgø! Gede ɑ köbbi gen Rɑ̈dh kinni bɑ gen ɑ kwɑɑny kɑ̈jji tyëng-ɑ dïdø møg-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈ngi, geki kɑ̈jji rorr?" 
Isaiah19:12 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp! Tyëngcïïjø møgí, jøg-ɑ rummi gen ngenyø ying-ɑ keny? Yï pɑ cuggi köbbø yi gen mɑwɑnø ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi göggi Rïp yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?" 
Isaiah19:13 Pëjji Dhoɑn kí pëjji Mɑmpis bɑ dhëgg. Gen ɑ di pyejji pödhø kidøøj, de pödhø ɑ́yöd gø peej ge’ pɑ̈l." 
Isaiah19:14 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́bɑ̈nni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø löggø kidøøj. Bene ɑ bɑnge nyi bɑ̈jji gïg-ɑ gøggi yi Rïp. O Rïp ceg-ɑ thɑ̈mmø ni ngɑn wïje di møgø, me renyyi kì yethi ngwøgge." 
Isaiah19:15 Bong dhɑnhø kì Rïp, cɑgg e bɑ ngetikɑ̈r, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn wɑnge cɑn, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn pere teg, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn kwïj, me cuggi kunyø." 
Isaiah19:16 Obëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, cwøwi Rïp ógöögø ni mɑ̈nn, dëlli gen ókïrrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, keny-ɑ ólïdhi gen kinni Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge tïng en, e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑyi gen." 
Isaiah19:17 Tyëng Rïp óbëëd ge óböggø yi Yeudiyɑ̀, kenyi lïngi gen kwøbbi ryɑ̈g men-ɑ nyi dwɑddi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kömi gen yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah19:18 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, dhøg Ibru ókööb kì kɑ̈dd ɑ́bïj kì Rïp, teedø óköngi kɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni. Ákyel kì kelli kɑ̈ddɑni ócwølli ɑ́ “Kɑɑldwøng, Kɑɑl Cɑ̈ng.”" 
Isaiah19:19 Obëën bøli kenyɑni, ódi këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì piny Rïp, o ódi lööj pɑrre men-ɑ ócwöödh piny kì wïj keew Rïp." 
Isaiah19:20 Gïgɑni ónyodh-ɑ bëëdi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e nud kì Rïp. Keny-ɑ óguud nyingi ji kì kunɑni, kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gï óöde ki ngɑn yiel gen." 
Isaiah19:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ree ónyudhe tyëng Rïp, o óyod yi gen ceth, kɑ gø mɑlli gen, kɑ gø muuj gen ki gëdhhì geki jwödhø. Kɑ ge óköngø ki kwöng kì bøle, kɑ gïn-ɑ kwöng yi gen kinni gø ógwøg yi gen, nyi gwøg gen." 
Isaiah19:22 Rïp ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de gø óyiele kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny; ge ódwöög kööre ge ókwɑ̈jjø, kɑ gï yiele." 
Isaiah19:23 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, ódi yuu wëll kì kɑɑm Rïp geki Acuur men reb gen, o tyëng pödhhɑni ryeet ómɑ̈ddi kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Isaiah19:24 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, Isrɑil kí Rïp geki Acuur ópɑ̈ɑ̈r, kɑ ge løg-ɑ gyëdh kipe kömi piny bëne." 
Isaiah19:25 O ge ógyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ókööbe kinni, “Wu jiɑ, wun ɑ tyëng Rïp, wu ógyëdh yi yɑn, wuki Acuur ji-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jɑ, kí Isrɑil, ji-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Kì wɑɑngɑni, kɑ Sɑrjön pënyi liny Acuur ör yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kinni bëe be mɑgi Acdöd kì Pelistiyɑ̀." 
Isaiah20:2 Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh ɑ́bëëd e rumø ki köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì runn ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh kinni, i kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑrre wɑ̈g kì tyelle, kɑ ocwɑ̈l-ɑ ɑ́rug yi en lunye wɑ̈g. Kɑ Icɑyɑ̀ oyïëyø, kɑ pëgg-ɑ be wïïnø e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, o tyelle bong wɑr." 
Isaiah20:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Acdöd, ɑkööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Icɑyɑ̀ bɑ̈ngɑ ɑ́bëëd e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, o tyelle bong wɑr ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g. Menɑni bɑ ngïji kipe gïn-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi Rïp geki Kuc." 
Isaiah20:4 Tyëng-ɑ ómɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kì pödhhɑni ryeet, ókøøl yi en gɑ ɑmɑgg ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, o tyelli gen bong wɑr, e rwödhhi gen ónënnø; menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji ɑyɑ̈ɑ̈r Rïp." 
Isaiah20:5 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh Kuc, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́tɑ̈d kì bɑng Rïp, wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈y o bong gïn-ɑ óngɑ̈dh yi gen." 
Isaiah20:6 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi nɑɑm omelø kì Pelistiyɑ̀ ókööbø kinni, ‘Lidhu gïn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi wɑ kinni wɑ ókor yi gen kipe rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur! De wɑ óbødh kidï?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Men bɑ wöödø me kööbø kì ri Bɑbïl. Ryɑ̈g óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me böggi, óbï e nɑ yømø ɑ́kødɑkødø me nwɑjji piny kì yij ryɑng." 
Isaiah21:2 Yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈rri ki gïg mø cwöb ge rijjø, ɑ løg twɑnyi rek geki ryɑ̈g. Liny Elɑm, pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen! Liny Mɑdɑy, mɑg kɑ̈dd! Orɑng-ɑ ɑ́göjji ji yi Bɑbïl ócuung yi Jwøk." 
Isaiah21:3 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kì yij cyɑ̈rø menɑni, yɑ ɑ́thödhi yi gen ki wɑ̈ɑ̈rø me dwøng geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw me dhøge ledh ni pɑ̈dhi ngɑndhɑjø piny ki dhɑnhø." 
Isaiah21:4 Wïjɑ ɑ́ceg wïïnø, kɑ dëlɑ okïrrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ yïd-ɑ bëëni wɑ̈r de ɑ́yöd e muuj-ɑ yɑn wɑ̈ɑ̈rø kete." 
Isaiah21:5 Kì yij cɑ̈rrø menɑni, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ gïgcɑmmi ryëj ge thøø yi gwirø, kwømm-ɑ pëggi yi wëll ócïb kɑ̈jji gen, o ge ɑ́pëggi piny ge ocyɑ̈mø o ge omɑ̈dhø. Kɑ teedø pɑ̈ɑ̈y piny yi cigg kinni, “Wun ɑ pëjji liny, pyël wun ködd!”" 
Isaiah21:6 Codhe, kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Wë kinni, “Kedh kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki ngɑn nenni yöö, kɑ köbbí kinni nyi kwøbe gïn-ɑ lidh yi en ceth;" 
Isaiah21:7 ólïdhi ki jøg mø bï ge ying-ɑ kömi kyënyì, ge cyɑ̈dhi gɑ ɑ́ryew ɑ́ryew, o ólïdhi ki jøg mø ying kömi ɑderr kí ɑmɑl.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kurø okööbø kinni, “Jɑldwøng, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ okurø kì keny kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng.”" 
Isaiah21:9 Ge ɑ́ceg ì rïïd kì keny! Ge ɑ́bï ge ying-ɑ kömi kyënyì, ge cyɑ̈dhi gɑ ɑ́ryew ɑ́ryew. Kɑ jɑl-ɑ kurø omuujø ki wöödø kinni, “Bɑbïl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Ngïjji jwögg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjje buud-ɑ piny ge ótørrø.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Wun ɑ tyëng pödhi wøn, wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu ɑ́bëëd wu ceg kɑ nyønø, de ɑnɑn wu ɑ́muujɑ wöödø men-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ kì yï Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, o bɑ wöödø me døøj." 
Isaiah21:11 Wöön-ɑ kööbø kì ri Edöm èn: Ngɑn me kɑ̈ɑ̈l Edöm opëjø kinni, “Jɑl-ɑ kurø, wøw óru kì wɑɑng? Köbbí yɑn, wɑ̈r óthumi kì wɑɑng?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Alöggɑ kinni, “Mwøl obëënø, de wɑ̈r ócigi dwöögø. Keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ pëjjø këti, kedh kɑ yï ódwöög be pëjjø.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Wöön-ɑ kööbø kì ri pödhi Árɑb èn: Wun, wu tyëng Dedɑn, wun ɑ nyi guddø ki kɑ̈dd kì yij ryɑng, kì pödhi Árɑb," 
Isaiah21:14 thödhu tyëng-ɑ bï yï wun ri gen dɑ röödhø ki pï. Wu tyëng Temɑ̀, thödhu tyëng-ɑ yömmi yï wun ki gïncɑm." 
Isaiah21:15 Ji reng-ɑ kun yömmi yi gen, ge bögg-ɑ pil møg-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi gen, geki wethh møg-ɑ dwɑddi göjø; ge bögg-ɑ liny." 
Isaiah21:16 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Wë kinni, “Döng geki tegi jur-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kedɑr ócög kì bɑng run ɑ́kyel." 
Isaiah21:17 Jøg-ɑ nyi pöödø ki wethh bene gen ɑ teg kì Kedɑr, de ge ódöng ge nøg. Yɑn yɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah22:1 Men bɑ wöödø me kööbø kì ri Töör Cyɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Á ngø ɑ ɑ́cwöb? Ede tyëng kɑɑl ɑ tuug gen ge ying-ɑ wɑ̈thi óthɑɑng ud? 
Isaiah22:2 Kɑɑl bëne ceg-ɑ wøwø, pyëwe omedø. Jii wun møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny." 
Isaiah22:3 Pëjji wun bënn ɑ́rengi, kɑ ge mɑg ge nuti pɑ̈nyi göjjø ki nyɑɑr weth ɑ́kyel." 
Isaiah22:4 Wiyu yɑn, o yɑ ywöngɑ ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ, yɑ ywøg-ɑ jiɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw. Yɑ ko pɑ̈nyi wun ki lugø." 
Isaiah22:5 Menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ bøli kej pɑ̈yyø kí tummi wɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí tyɑmø kì yij töör cyɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈ngɑni kömee. Döri kɑɑlee ɑ́cøør piny kɑ ɑ́lɑngi cwɑggi ji kɑ̀ kïïw gen gɑmmi yi kïttì." 
Isaiah22:6 Yɑɑy Elɑm ɑ́bï e ying-ɑ kömi kyënyì, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ wethh mø ngenyø. Yɑɑy Kïr ɑ́bï cinggi gen dɑ ködd." 
Isaiah22:7 Töör Yeudiyɑ̀, tör-ɑ lɑ̈be med ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi yɑ̈thi kyënyì. Alɑthker mø ying kömi kyënyì ócungø kì dhø döri Yerusɑlem." 
Isaiah22:8 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kor Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Kɑ wu reng-ɑ øn-ɑ mïdhi jɑmmi liny be yɑɑbi jɑmmɑni. 
Isaiah22:9 Kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ rënyø kì ri döri Yerusɑlem yɑb wun o ge thïg. Kɑ uddi Yerusɑlem rɑnggi yi wun bënn, kɑ kwï gen cøør wun piny, o kïtti gen thïg döri kɑɑl. Kɑ kipe kinni o wu cïbu piny ki pï," 
Isaiah22:10  
Isaiah22:11 wu ɑ́gëëd ki ótïngø me gëël pïi luy-ɑ kɑ̈ge dööng, o pï cög ge pɑ rengi wɑ̈g. De wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́wïl ki Jwøk ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́pyël møgɑni kɑ gï wëgge cwöbø." 
Isaiah22:12 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, wu ɑ́cwøl yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu köbbe kinni i ywöngi wun, kɑ wu kïïm wun, kɑ wɑ̈thi wun lyel wun ɑ́ ngïji ywøg, kɑ wu rug wun kí ocwɑ̈llì." 
Isaiah22:13 De wu ɑ́yöd wu óngedhø, kɑ wu otugø. Kɑ wu ongɑ̈dø ki dyëg, kí dhög, kɑ wu omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg. Wu ɑ́kööb kinni, “Lɑ̈w ke cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wɑ, o wɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wɑ, mɑ́ wɑ óbëëd wɑ thøø dhuki.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kiree, yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Pyëwɑ pɑ cuggi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø kí orøng ni men, ki runn-ɑ óbëëd gen kì kömi piny. Yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah22:15 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Wë, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni i kedhɑ yï Cebnɑ̀ jɑngi gøldwøng, kɑ köbbɑ kinni," 
Isaiah22:16 “Yï orumø ce yïn ɑ́ men, ɑ twïgí rií ki rörø kì ri kït kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑl?" 
Isaiah22:17 Yï ócuggø bëëdø perí teeg, de yï ókwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ yï wedde pɑ̈l." 
Isaiah22:18 Yï ókwɑny yi en ni kurɑ̀, kɑ yï leenge yij pödhø me lɑɑj. Yï óthøw kunɑni kì buti yɑ̈thi kyëny-ɑ per gen ɑ́bëëd yï ótøllø. Gøl wöw óyɑ̈r kì bɑngí." 
Isaiah22:19 Lɑwí ópɑ̈d yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yï dwööge cyɑ̈n.”" 
Isaiah22:20 Cebnɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, bɑ̈ngɑ Eliɑkim wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀ ócwöölɑ." 
Isaiah22:21 Kɑ lɑwí geki wëní kïdhɑ ree, kɑ teng-ɑ ɑ́ying yïí bëne mëggɑ en. Óbëëd e bɑ wïyi tyëng Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Isaiah22:22 Óthödhɑ ki tegø me jyɑ̈ɑ̈ge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì gøl Debïd, en ɑ yïe ódi muptɑɑ̀; bong ngɑn yieb gïn-ɑ cyëge, o bong ngɑn cyëëg gïn yiebe." 
Isaiah22:23 Ócwöödhɑ piny kidøøj ni gɑrø, kɑ gøl gen bëne óyïddø ki dhwɑ̈ng kì bɑnge." 
Isaiah22:24 “De kööre óbuudh yi tyëng gøl gen, ge ómɑ̈gi kì ree ni löd geki ɑ́dɑ̈lì møg-ɑ óngɑɑb ri gɑrø!" 
Isaiah22:25 Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, gɑrø men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e teeg kì piny óör kɑ ópɑ̈dhø, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́ying ree othøø.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Isaiah23:1 Men bɑ wöödø me kööbø kì ri Suur. Ywöngi wun, wu tyëng-ɑ weli ki yɑ̈thi Tɑrcic møg-ɑ yij nɑɑm omeli dwøng! Suur kɑɑl wun, kɑɑl-ɑ kömi nɑɑm omelø ɑ́rënyi; udde ɑ́cøør piny. Wöönɑni ólïngi yi wun, wu dwöög-ɑ’ Kobros." 
Isaiah23:2 Ywöngi wun, wu jøngyew kì Sïdön! Wu nyii ödø ki ji" 
Isaiah23:3 møg bɑ̈nni nɑ̈mmi omelø, kɑ ge nyii ngëwø ki byelli Rïp, kɑ ge nyii kedhø ge óngyëwø kì yethi pödhh bënn." 
Isaiah23:4 Kɑɑl Sïdön, yï ɑ́yɑ̈r! Mɑ́ yï ɑ́bɑny yi nɑɑm omelø, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yïɑ bong nyigɑ. Yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi pïdhø ki wɑ̈dd wɑlɑ̀ womɑ̈nn.”" 
Isaiah23:5 Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng Rïp, ge óbwøg ki mendwøng keny-ɑ ólïng gen kinni i Suur órënyø." 
Isaiah23:6 Ywöngi wun, wu tyëng Pinikiyɑ̀, pɑ̈nyu ri wun ki pɑ̈ɑ̈r Tɑrcic!" 
Isaiah23:7 Men bene Suur, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́ger kɑ̈ge dööng? Bene kɑɑl-ɑ́ yije ɑ́dhwödh ji èn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be gyer ki pödhh kì kun lɑ̈wi?" 
Isaiah23:8 Á men ɑ ɑ́cɑg møg-ɑ pɑ̈dhi kömi Suur kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng, ɑ jøngyew møge ɑ́bëëd ge owørø yi ji bënn kì kömi piny?" 
Isaiah23:9 Møgɑni ɑ́gwir-ɑ yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gï ɑ́gwir yi en kɑ per dwöögi wɑ̈thi gen cyɑ̈n, mɑ́ ge tɑ̈dø, o ge göög gen gɑ mööl." 
Isaiah23:10 Ceg wu døøg be pur, wun ɑ tyëng Tɑrcic, mɑ́ dhøwɑnh-ɑ nyi mɑɑg yɑ̈thi wun ɑ́rënyi." 
Isaiah23:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge ɑ́tïnge kömi nɑɑm omelø, kɑ pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhì tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny. En ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni i cøør kɑɑl ngyew mi Pinikiyɑ̀ piny." 
Isaiah23:12 Yïn ɑ kɑɑl Sïdön, medi pyëwí ɑ́cög; jií nyingi gen ɑ́guud. Cɑgg ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈r Kobros, ge pɑ bødh thyew." 
Isaiah23:13 Bɑ tyëng Bɑbïl, de pɑth ki tyëng Acuur ɑ ɑ́wëggi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l bëën Suur. Bɑ tyëng Bɑbïl ɑ ɑ́tyeg Suur, kɑ ge ogëdø ki ótøng møg koor kɑɑlɑni, kɑ dörre cøør gen piny, ɑwiy ge gøn e rënyø." 
Isaiah23:14 Ywöngi wun, wu tyëng-ɑ kyëwi ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th kì nɑɑm omeli dwøng! Kɑɑl-ɑ́ ree ɑ́teeg yi wun ɑ́rënyi!" 
Isaiah23:15 Bøli keny-ɑ ówïl Suur kì wɑ̈ɑ̈th ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, kwɑnni runni rɑ̈dh ɑ́kyel. Keny-ɑ óthumi runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew møgɑni, Suur óni ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, men-ɑ ɑ́cɑg ki wör kinni," 
Isaiah23:16 “Kwɑny thomí, kɑ kɑɑl wen yï othumø, yïn ɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi! Thum ki thom kɑ yï wöör këti o yïí ódwöög yi cwøw.”" 
Isaiah23:17 Keny-ɑ óthumi runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew møgɑni, Suur ówëggi døøg keje cøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ree kïrre pödhhi kömi piny bënn." 
Isaiah23:18 Ngyënyy-ɑ ónywøl yi jɑmm-ɑ ngyewe óthyëyyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ngyënyyɑni koo kɑnne, de ge óngëëw-ɑ yi tyëng-ɑ mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïncɑm kí ógudh møg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen." 
Isaiah24:1 Piny ótwer yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ döng-ɑ nøw. Bëëdi piny ówil yi en, kɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø yij piny kedhhe," 
Isaiah24:2 Gïjø ɑ́kyel ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi dhɑnhø bëne, ɑ løg ókwër kí tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki ókwër, bɑ̈ngg kí wëëg gen; tyëng-ɑ ngyëwi kí tyëng-ɑ ngëwø; tyëng-ɑ yï gen wïdhi kí tyëng-ɑ ceg ki wïdhø, kí tyëngkɑ̈rì geki ɑbuur." 
Isaiah24:3 Piny ókedhhi kɑ rënyi bëne, mɑ́ møgɑni ɑ́kwøb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah24:4 Piny óthwøw kɑ othøø; kömi piny ónyönhi kɑ othøø; pëjj-ɑ teg kì yij piny men ónyönhi. 
Isaiah24:5 Piny ɑ́rënyi yi ji, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́pyem gen Ciggi Jwøk, kɑ lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm geki Jwøk, lwöm-ɑ di bëëd gïti ɑtheer pɑ̈d yi gen." 
Isaiah24:6 Bene ɑ bɑnge göjji piny cyën yi Jwøk, o ji rɑngi gen yi gööj orøøg gen, o döng ɑ́ ji mø nøg ge onëënø." 
Isaiah24:7 Bɑ̈ggi oløg ɑ́thøw, o møgi oløg ɑ́kedh e ónungø. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd pëthi gen med, ɑ́göög pëthi gen pɑ med," 
Isaiah24:8 o thømi gen geki bulli gen ɑ́ceg ì lïïw. 
Isaiah24:9 Bong ji mø wör pëthi gen omedø kì kömi møgø këti. 
Isaiah24:10 Kɑɑldwøng, ɑ ɑ́bëëd e owøwø ɑ́ceg ì lïïw; kɑ̈llì ɑ́cyëëg." 
Isaiah24:11 Ji ceg-ɑ kïïwø kì yethi yëëth, mɑ́ møgi oløg bong gøn. Medi pyëw ɑ́kedh gïti ɑtheer, medi pyëw ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yij piny." 
Isaiah24:12 Kɑɑldwøng ɑ́rënyi; thïggi dhøggi döre buud-ɑ piny ge tørrø. 
Isaiah24:13 Bene gïn-ɑ ócwöb kì kɑ̈ddi kömi piny bënn. Óni kenyi rum oløg ki lemø geki ólɑm kɑ bong-ɑ nywøl kì köthi gen. 
Isaiah24:14 Tyëng-ɑ óbodh ówör ki medi pëthi gen. Tyëng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø ówör ge lejj-ɑ döngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Isaiah24:15 Kɑ lenhi yi tyëng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ólenhi yi tyëng myërri kömi nɑɑm omelø." 
Isaiah24:16 Wöri lenhi Isrɑil, pönh-ɑ tir ólïngi yi wɑ kì pödhh mø lɑ̈wi lɑ̈wi. De bong gïn yiel kì riɑ! Yɑ ceg-ɑ thøø! Yɑ ceg-ɑ thøø! Tyëngɑmolpiny ri gen ɑ́lugi gen yɑn!" 
Isaiah24:17 Lïngu kwøbbɑ wu bënn! Dɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, dɑ burrì kí ɑ́kɑ̈llì mɑ ɑ́ceg wun." 
Isaiah24:18 Ngɑn rengi yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, pɑ̈dh-ɑ bur, o ngɑn bodh yi bur pɑ̈dh-ɑ yethi ɑ́kɑ̈llì. Kødh me dwøng cɑrø ódëëm kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø." 
Isaiah24:19 Piny ókɑggi kɑ ókedhhø. 
Isaiah24:20 Piny ócyerri ni ngɑn thɑ̈mmi yi møgø, kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ni ød me tɑɑr piny yi yømø. Kömi piny onɑ̈gø yi orøge, o pɑ ciggi dhwödhø këti." 
Isaiah24:21 Bøli keny-ɑ ócɑɑy gïg-ɑ teg kì mɑl geki jɑggi piny yi Wë ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. 
Isaiah24:22 Rɑ̈nhì óröör kej ɑ́kyel kì yij bur ni ɑmɑgg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gï ócyëëge ød mɑg gïti keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej cɑyi gen. 
Isaiah24:23 Dwɑ̈y óluuj o cɑ̈ng pɑ cigi cyɑ̈rø, mɑ́ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. Ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem kì Kïti Dhɑyøn, o mɑ̈re ólidh yi jɑggi pödhh bënn." 
Isaiah25:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ Jwøgɑ yï ólenhɑ kɑ nyingí lejjɑ. Yï ɑ́göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø; møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir yi yïn cøn kidøøj ɑ́gwøg yi yïn bënn." 
Isaiah25:2 Kɑ̈dd ɑ́gwøg gɑ thur yi yïn, kɑ dörr-ɑ korri gen rënyi yi yïn. Kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ ɑ́ger yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wøn ge ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïti ɑtheer." 
Isaiah25:3 Yï ólenhi yi tyëng pödhh-ɑ teg, yï óböggi yi pödhh-ɑ yethi gen wöny." 
Isaiah25:4 Tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn geki tyëng-ɑ bong ngɑn køny gen, ɑ́rïngi yïí; kɑ ge obødhø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj. Ge ɑ́gëng yi yïn kipe ɑtunø kɑ ge nëngí ki tïbø kì yij lëdhi cɑ̈ng. Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ yethi gen wöny nɑ ɑtunø kenyi göjje ri dörø," 
Isaiah25:5 o nɑ mel kì yij piny-ɑ thwøwø. De tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wøn ɑ́göjjí kudø; yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑkyeew tyëng-ɑ yethi gen wöny ɑ́cung yi yïn, ni pøølø kenyi wëgge piny kwöjø." 
Isaiah25:6 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j órëëjø kì wïj Kïti Dhɑyøn, e ryej-ɑ pödhhi kömi piny; ryënyɑni óbëëd yije cɑɑm-ɑ gïg mø døøj cɑrø, kí møgi oløg me pëddi døøjø." 
Isaiah25:7 Pøøli ywøøg yij men-ɑ ɑ́gëng pödhh bënn ójwɑne ki nyiigø. 
Isaiah25:8 Thøø ónɑ̈g yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti ɑtheer! Pï ópoj yi en kì nyingi ji bënn; ɑyɑ̈r ókɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì kömi ji-ɑ rɑngø kì kömi piny bëne. Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́kööb!" 
Isaiah25:9 Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, teedø bëne ókööbø kinni, “Bɑ Jwøgee! En ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh yi wɑ, o wɑ ɑ́døme. Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑ ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ en, o ɑnɑn pëthee omedø kipe kɑ ɑ́yiele wɑ.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Kïti Dhɑyøn ókorri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de tyëng Moɑb ónyøøn piny, ni kenyi nyøøn wél-ɑ nywøøb lɑ̈bø." 
Isaiah25:11 Cinggi gen órïj yi gen dhɑ̈y ge ce ceg-ɑ kwɑng, de ge óyɑ̈r yi Jwøk kɑ cinggi gen ceg-ɑ ì lɑ̈b." 
Isaiah25:12 Dörr-ɑ bɑ̈rrø møg-ɑ korri Moɑb ócøøre piny. 
Isaiah26:1 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, wör møg ówör kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀: Kɑɑl wøn teeg! Dörre korr-ɑ yi Jwøk kiree!" 
Isaiah26:2 Yiebu dhøggi döri kɑɑl, kɑ wiy pönh-ɑ mïdhi yïëyø kedhe yije, eni pönh-ɑ jie nyi gøggi dyër." 
Isaiah26:3 Ngɑn-ɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́cïbe kömí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́nëngí ki mër-ɑ dyër, mɑ́ e ngɑ̈dh-ɑ yïn." 
Isaiah26:4 Gɑ̈nnu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti ɑtheer; wɑ ókorre yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. 
Isaiah26:5 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge tɑ̈dø ɑ́gwøge gɑ mööl, kɑɑl-ɑ teg, ɑ yije ɑ́bëëd yi gen ɑ́rënye, kɑ dörre møde piny." 
Isaiah26:6 Tyëng-ɑ́ nyingi gen ɑ́guud cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ köme, ɑ́nyøn yi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur." 
Isaiah26:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yuu tyëng-ɑ døj ɑ́gwøg yi yïn yije bong gøngì, yuu-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi gen wïje pɑ̈r." 
Isaiah26:8 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn ɑ nyi gwøg yi wøn, yï ketí ɑ tyer yi pëthi wøn." 
Isaiah26:9 Yï nyii tyerø yi yɑn ki pyëwɑ kì wɑ̈r; keny-ɑ óliidh gøøny lɑ̈bø geki jie, ge ódïd ki gøggi dyër." 
Isaiah26:10 Cɑgg ɑ́ kenyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki tyëngrijjø, ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li dïdø ki gøggi dyër. Cɑgg ɑ́ kì piny tyëngtir keny, döngí ɑ́dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wɑ̈thi gen." 
Isaiah26:11 Kwïj yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn kinni ge ócɑy yi yïn. Wiy ge yɑ̈r gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wiy ge rɑngi gen, wiy ge pɑ̈dhi gen yij orɑng-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi yïn kiper gen. Nyudhí gen kër-ɑ mɑɑr jií." 
Isaiah26:12 Wø óthödhi yi yïn ki døøjø, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïn-ɑ nyi cuggi gwøgø yi wøn nyi gwøg yi wøn kɑ kunyí." 
Isaiah26:13 Yïn ɑ Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wø ɑ́jɑɑg-ɑ yi ji møøgø, de bɑ yï ketí ɑ bɑ Wïi wøn." 
Isaiah26:14 Ge ɑ́thøw ɑnɑn, o ge koo dwöög be nënni këti, tïbbi gen koo dhwödh, mɑ́ ge ɑ́cɑy yi yïn kɑ ge nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Bong ngɑn pɑrri gen këti." 
Isaiah26:15 De pödhi wøn ɑ́wëggí døngø, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; pinye ɑ́lɑny yi yïn kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, ɑ bɑnge lejji yïn." 
Isaiah26:16 Jií ɑ́cɑɑy, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ köörí kì yij orɑɑng gen." 
Isaiah26:17 Wø ɑ́göjjí ywøg, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni ngɑndhɑjø kenyi ryeere yi ledhi dhøg pɑ̈dhi piny." 
Isaiah26:18 Wø ɑ́bëëd wø orɑngø ni ngɑndhɑjø men pɑ̈dhi piny, de bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́nywøl. Pödhi wøn nuti yieel wøn, o tyëng kömi piny nuti pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Isaiah26:19 Jií møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw ódwöög be nënnì! Ge ódhwödh ki dëlli gen. Tyëng-ɑ buud bënn kì yethi burrì ódhwödh ge owörø ki medi pëthi gen. Ge ótug mɑl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni lum kenyi dhwödhe yi thöjj. 
Isaiah26:20 Kedhu yethi uddi wun jiɑ, kɑ ud cyëëg wun kömi wun. Kɑlu ri wun ki kɑnø gïti keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny liny Jwøk." 
Isaiah26:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ piny kì keny-ɑ bëëde kì mɑl, bï-ɑ be cɑyi jii kömi piny kipe orøøg gen. Ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g ónyodh yi lɑ̈bø gï pɑ cige kumø këti." 
Isaiah27:1 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni Lebiyɑthɑn lɑ̈y-ɑ nyi pɑ̈rri, e døjj-ɑ ree, ɑ bëëdø kì nɑɑm omelø, ónɑ̈g yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pile, pil-ɑ dwøng ɑ pɑ nyi bøm." 
Isaiah27:2 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑɑg oløge ókømme kinni," 
Isaiah27:3 “Ákor yi yɑn kɑ nyi cɑwwɑ. Ákorrɑ kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng, o bëëd e bong ngɑn rënyii." 
Isaiah27:4 Pyëwɑ pɑ nudd e rɑɑj ki bɑngɑni. Ke di bëëde ɑ́ koodh geki okurø ɑ nyïɑ̈ggi ki yɑn, yɑ di pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen kɑ ge rɑ̈bɑ kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Isaiah27:5 De keløg tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki jiɑ dwɑdd-ɑ korrø yi yɑn, kwɑ̈ɑ̈j gen mër yïɑ, o kwøbbi mër nywɑgɑ wøki gen.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbï, tyëng Isrɑil, kwɑrri Yɑgob byerri gen óniyeeng piny ni byerri yɑdh, kɑ bɑ̈ddi gen okɑrø, kɑ piny bëne pɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi gen ki nywøl." 
Isaiah27:7 Isrɑil nuti cɑyø ki mendwøng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki en, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ kyeelø." 
Isaiah27:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́cɑy yi en kɑ kïdhi gen yïnø. Gï ɑ́wøøje wɑ̈g kɑ yømø me yije wöny. 
Isaiah27:9 De orøøg Isrɑil ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny keny-ɑ óguur kïtti këlli lɑm mø jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr, kɑ bong-ɑ këlli bɑkur geki ngïjji Aceerɑ̀, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø mø nud." 
Isaiah27:10 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø, møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑger ki dör ɑ́döng gɑ tuggì, o bong ji mø bëëdø kì yethi gen; ɑ́döng e nɑ pɑ̈l. Ágöög ɑ́ cɑ̈mmi dhög kí keny nyi ywööm gen." 
Isaiah27:11 Bɑ̈ddi yenh ɑ́nɑ̈r kɑ ge owøwø, kɑ ge mød yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn gɑ yugg, mɑ́ ji bong pëthi gen, Jwøk ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j gen pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen." 
Isaiah27:12 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ógwëëne kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt geki keew Rïp ni kenyi gween byel kì kelli cong. 
Isaiah27:13 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑng men-ɑ cwööl ji kì Acuur geki Rïp ókodh, e cwööl-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ yïnø kì pödhhɑni. Ge óbï kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑlli yi gen kì Yerusɑlem, kì wïj kïti kwëre." 
Isaiah28:1 Pödhi Isrɑil ɑ́gɑ̈g! Døøje ɑ́kedh e onɑ̈rø ni yɑ̈ɑ̈r okøgg kì wɑ̈thi pëjji mø thøø yi møgø; wɑ̈thi gen, wɑ̈th-ɑ tɑ̈dø ógïnyø ki mɑ̈ɑ̈th mø yømi gen med, de ge buud-ɑ piny ge thøø yi møgø." 
Isaiah28:2 Wë yïe dɑ ngɑn me teg, ngɑn me bï ni ɑtunø me wöjji ni bɑɑyø, gïïpiny bëne ócøøre piny ki tegø." 
Isaiah28:3 Yɑ̈rri wɑ̈thi jɑgg-ɑ thøø yi møgø møgɑni ónyøn ki tyel. 
Isaiah28:4 Leny-ɑ lejji pëjjɑni, pëjj-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen tɑ̈dø ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny ni nywøli ólɑm møg-ɑ nyi kwöngi ki cyegø, ɑ nyi pøn kɑ ge cɑm kì ri cyegi gen ceth." 
Isaiah28:5 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëëd Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e nɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈r dhwɑ̈ng men-ɑ ógwøgø ɑ́ okøgg kì wɑ̈thi jie møg-ɑ óbodh ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. 
Isaiah28:6 Jɑggi burø ówëgge gøggi dyër, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kor kɑɑldwøng thödhe ki tegi pyëw, keny-ɑ óbëën liny." 
Isaiah28:7 Cɑgg ɑ́ jøtöng geki ókwër ge ócyerø yi møgø. Ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg geki mugg-ɑ teg mø gïïr. Jøtöng ɑ́dhɑ̈li yodi møg-ɑ nyi cɑ̈rri gen yi Jwøk kì bɑng kɑ bëëd wɑ̈thi gen dɑ møgø, o ókwër ɑ́dhɑl yi løøgi gønyy-ɑ nyi kïdhi bøli gen ki gööj møgø." 
Isaiah28:8 Wɑ̈thi tɑrɑbedhh møg-ɑ nyi gwëëd yi gen kì burø pɑ̈ng yi ngwøg, bong keny me döngø e nuti cödhø." 
Isaiah28:9 Ge köörø kì riɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Jɑlɑni orumø kinni pwöny-ɑ men? Á men ɑ dwɑddi kwøbb-ɑ kɑ̈lle? Kwøbbɑni døøj kɑ per othønh-ɑ ócer pønø!" 
Isaiah28:10 Dwɑdd-ɑ pwönyi wɑ gwedø kí gwedø, ɑtød kí ɑtød, pwönyø kí pwönyø.”" 
Isaiah28:11 Keløg kwøbbɑ pɑ lïngi yi wun, Jwøk óöni ki tyëngpɑth, mø dhøggi gen nywɑnggø møg pwönyi wun." 
Isaiah28:12 Wu ɑ́mëgge ywömø wu bënn, de wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbe." 
Isaiah28:13 Bene ɑ bɑnge dwɑddi wun pwönyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwedø kí gwedø, ɑtød kí ɑtød, pwönyø kí pwönyø. Codhe, o wu thɑ̈mmi wun. Wu óyïddi ki kedd, kɑ wu mɑg ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì, kɑ wu kɑ̈l wu bɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Isaiah28:14 Anɑn wu tyëngɑthwøg møg-ɑ jɑɑg ji møg kì Yerusɑlem, lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Isaiah28:15 Wu okööbø kinni ce wu rum nywɑ̈g ki kwøb wuki thøø, kɑ wu olwöbø wuki pödhi tyëngthøø. Wu okööbø ce wu ówiy yi ryɑ̈g keny-ɑ óbëëne, mɑ́ wu ngɑ̈dh-ɑ pyed geki wëënyø kinni wu óyiel-ɑ yi gen." 
Isaiah28:16 Bene møg-ɑ kwøb ɑnɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek, “Yɑ cïb-ɑ Dhɑyøn ki kït me teeg, me köme gëddi kì Dhɑyøn, Kït me köme ógwëdø ki kwøb møg: ‘Yïëyø men-ɑ teeg bɑ ngïïnø thyew.’" 
Isaiah28:17 Gøggi dyër en ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ rumi men-ɑ røm kïn-ɑ köme gëddi menɑni, o bongi yij ɑ́dud en ɑ órøm bëëde e pɑ ol.” Pyed men-ɑ ree bëëd yi wun ɑnɑn ókøøl yi ɑtunø, o kɑ̈jji bëëdi wun órënyi yi bɑɑyø." 
Isaiah28:18 Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg yi wun, wuki thøø ówiy, o lwömí wuki pödhi tyëngthøø ópɑ̈d. Keny-ɑ óbëën bɑɑyø, wu óbɑɑbe piny." 
Isaiah28:19 Wu ógøøje piny kɑ wu cige gøøj piny, dhuki kí dhung-ɑ kyeelø. Ryɑ̈ngɑni óying kömi wun kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r. Wöön-ɑ bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøk, nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø!" 
Isaiah28:20 Mɑ́ pyën cyeeg, tyel pɑ cuggi rïïjø kì yije, o ógødh cyeeg pɑ rømi ki kum." 
Isaiah28:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ónyïɑ̈ggi ni kɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge kì Kïti Perɑdhïm, kí kɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge kì Töör Gibeon, kipe kinni o gwøge gïn-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø, cɑgg gïg-ɑ gøgge ónënni gɑ ngɑ̈ngø. Gwøge ótyëge, eni gwøng-ɑ bɑ ngɑ̈ngø." 
Isaiah28:22 Wu ko ngedhi yi møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun! Keløg wu óngedhi, rengi kun bodh wun óbëëd e teeg. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wë Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni pödhø rënye’ rënyø ɑ́lïngɑ." 
Isaiah28:23 Kyënu yïthhi wun kɑ møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun lïngi wun. 
Isaiah28:24 Bong ngɑn nyi cög e køg-ɑ pwödhe. 
Isaiah28:25 De kɑ̀ rume ki køg, nyi ceg-ɑ wïïwø ki nɑnɑɑ̀ kɑ owïïwø ki gemè kì yethi lwøbbe, kí ceir kì keje, kɑ tøggi pwödhø kɑ̈ge ki gɑthɑnì." 
Isaiah28:26 Yëth-ɑ gwøøge gwøge ngɑ̈nye, mɑ́ e ɑ́pwönyi yi Jwøk." 
Isaiah28:27 Pɑ nyi pööd-ɑ lodh me peeg ki ceir, de gø nyi pwöd en kɑ lodh me yööd." 
Isaiah28:28 Gemè pɑ nyi rënye kenyi pwödii; nyingi gemè pɑ nyi ngɑg yi gïn-ɑ ywɑjji kì köme. 
Isaiah28:29 Peli wïnyɑni bëne kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gïg-ɑ nyi gwir yi Jwøk gɑ møg-ɑ ógwøg, nyi pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen ceth!" 
Isaiah29:1 Këli lɑm mi Jwøk kiree, ɑ løg Yerusɑlem ɑ́gɑ̈g! Kɑɑldwøng men-ɑ ɑ́gud yi Debïd ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wiy run ɑ́kyel wɑlɑ̀ runn ɑ́ryew bï gen, o ge pöödh gen ki kwëër gen geki tungi gen," 
Isaiah29:2 codhe o Jwøk kɑ̈ne kömi kɑɑldwøng menɑni ki ryɑ̈g, eni kɑɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ “Këli lɑm mi Jwøk.” Kenyɑni ódi ywøg geki ɑkyew, o kɑɑldwøng óni këli lɑm me cödhø yi remø." 
Isaiah29:3 Jwøk ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑɑldwøng, kɑ gø tyege, kɑ gø mɑge." 
Isaiah29:4 Yerusɑlem óni ngɑnthøø me pɑ̈nyi ree ki kwøb kì thɑ lɑ̈bø; cwɑg mø werø ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l thɑ lɑ̈bø. 
Isaiah29:5 Yerusɑlem, tyëngpɑth bënn møg-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí, ówøøj pɑ̈l ni tør yi ɑtunø, kɑ jøliny gen køøl ni wél yi yømø. Møgɑni bënn óceg-ɑ ji ki pɑ̈ɑ̈y piny." 
Isaiah29:6 Wu óyiel yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ tegø, kí pööd mɑl geki onhɑ̈ɑ̈nh piny, kí ɑgwɑg me dwøng, kí ɑtunø, kí mɑc me pɑ̈mmø e cɑ̈mm-ɑ bøle," 
Isaiah29:7 codhe o liny-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑɑl këli Jwøk, kí jɑmmi linye bënn, lɑ̈ɑ̈nye ni lɑ̈g, ni gïn-ɑ nyi lɑ̈gi kì wɑ̈r." 
Isaiah29:8 Pödhh-ɑ ɑ́cung ri gen be mɑgi Yerusɑlem, óni ngɑn ree di kɑ̈j me lɑ̈gi e ceg-ɑ cɑm; de kɑ ɑ́cyëëwe, nudd ree dɑ kɑ̈j. O óni ngɑn ree di röödhø me lɑ̈gi e ceg-ɑ mɑdh ki pï; de kɑ ɑ́cyëëwe, cwɑgge nudd ge thwøwø." 
Isaiah29:9 Adɑ́ cög wun wu bɑ dhëgg! Cög wun wu bɑ cörr! Pëggu ri mɑdh ki muggì! Cyerri wun wu nuti bïddø ki møgø! 
Isaiah29:10 Wu ɑ́wëggi nwɑyyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu køm-ɑ nenø ki neni dwøng. Bɑ jøtöng ɑ di bëëd gɑ kɑ̈jji nyingi ji, de ge ɑ́göjji cøørø yi Jwøk." 
Isaiah29:11 Gïg-ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ cɑ̈rri jɑltöng ɑ́kɑ̈nni wun, óni wɑ̈nyø men-ɑ ómuulø; ke mëggii ngɑn ngɑ̈ny rɑng kinni o gø rɑnge," 
Isaiah29:12 ceg-ɑ kyëdø kinni pɑ cuggi rɑngø yi en, mɑ́ e bɑ ɑmul." 
Isaiah29:13 Wë ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ji møg okööbø ce ge mɑll-ɑ yɑn, de bong gïn wɑngi yi kwøbbi gen, o pëthi gen ying-ɑ kun megø. Mɑ̈ddø mi gen bɑ kwööng ji yøw, o bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́dïd yi gen." 
Isaiah29:14 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yɑ pɑ wïyi ki göggi ji møgɑni ki gïg cungi wɑ̈thi gen, peli wïj ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yï tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, bong gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi peli wɑ̈thi gen.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Tyëng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈nni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen, ri gen dɑ cyën! Ge göög ɑ gød, ge orumø ce bong ngɑn nenni gen, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi gïn-ɑ gwøg yi gen." 
Isaiah29:16 Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́lung yi gen. Á men ɑ pere teg, lɑ̈bø wɑlɑ̀ bønh-ɑ cwɑ̈j lɑ̈bø? Dɑ gïjø me köbbi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jii kinni, “Yɑ nuti cwɑ̈ɑ̈j-ɑ yi yïn?” Wɑlɑ̀ kinni, “Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn kwïj yi yïn?”" 
Isaiah29:17 Kì bɑng keny me nøg, thïm ógöögø ki pwödhø, kɑ pwödhø ree løge thïm." 
Isaiah29:18 Obëën bøli kenyɑni, ming ólïngø ki wɑ̈nyø kɑ̀ rɑngii cwɑg ying-ɑ mɑl, kɑ cörr møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì yij muudhø nyingi gen yieb gen kɑ ge onëënø." 
Isaiah29:19 Abuur geki mööl ócigi yïddø ki medi pyëw men-ɑ muuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø." 
Isaiah29:20 Menɑni ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ thumi tyëng-ɑ guud nying ji, geki tyëng-ɑ benyi Jwøk. Tyëngorøg ónɑ̈g bënn." 
Isaiah29:21 Tyëng-ɑ nyi mënni kömi ji ki kwøb, ɑ nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈n tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji cɑyø, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi kømmi pyed kipe kinni o ngɑndøj mɑ̈ɑ̈n gëe, ge ócɑy yi Jwøk bënn." 
Isaiah29:22 Anɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ ɑ́yiel Abrɑhɑm ki ɑkørr, okööbø kinni, “Jiɑ, wu pɑ bëëdø wu yɑ̈ɑ̈rø këti, wu pɑ cigi cyɑ̈dhø wu kull-ɑ wɑ̈thi wun kì piny yi ɑyɑ̈r." 
Isaiah29:23 Keny-ɑ ólidh wun nyig-ɑ ómëggɑ wun, óyod yi wun kinni, yɑ bene kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil. Yɑ ówør yi wun, kɑ yɑ böggi yi wun." 
Isaiah29:24 Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen nøg ódïd ki yodi kwøb, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ køør pëthi gen ómïni kɑ ge yïëy-ɑ pwönyø.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ ri gen dɑ cyën, mɑ́ dhøgɑ ɑ́pyem yi gen. Ge nyi gøgg-ɑ gïg nuti dwɑdd-ɑ yi yɑn, kɑ ge onywɑ̈gø kwøb ki pödhh møøgø e møgɑni nuti tyeer-ɑ yi yɑn, kɑ orøøng nyi kïdhi kömi orøøng." 
Isaiah30:2 Ge kedh-ɑ Rïp be kwɑjjii kinni o ge køny. Ge dwɑdd-ɑ kønyø yi Rïp, mɑ́ ge ngɑ̈dh-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp." 
Isaiah30:3 De rɑ̈nhɑni yïe óbong tegø men-ɑ ókunye, o wu óyöd wu ceg-ɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah30:4 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́rum ji-ɑ ɑ́ör yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki wɑ̈dhi kɑɑl Dhoɑn geki kɑɑl Anes kì Rïp," 
Isaiah30:5 ge nudd gɑ møg-ɑ ópɑ̈di kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh gen pönh-ɑ pɑ cuggi ngɑ̈dhø; pönh-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈y wɑ̈thi gen, ngö gø ɑ́ngɑ̈dh gen kinni ókunyi.”" 
Isaiah30:6 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøk ek, kipe lɑ̈yyi Yeudiyɑ̀ kì tung-ɑ døøg kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl. “Ji ɑ́ör ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yij pɑ̈l me rɑj, pɑ̈l-ɑ di ngurrì, kí thöll-ɑ bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, geki thöll-ɑ nyi pɑ̈rri. Kömi ɑderri gen kí ɑmɑlli gen pɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ki jɑmmì mø ngewi gen teeg, gï muuj ge’ pödhø me pɑ cuggi kønyi gen." 
Isaiah30:7 Kuny-ɑ kunyi yi Rïp bong gïn gwøge. Bene ɑ bɑnge cɑ̈ggɑ Rïp ki nyingi ɑngøl kinni, ‘Nɑ̈ɑ̈ynyɑng-ɑ bɑ Abɑ̈ng.’ ”" 
Isaiah30:8 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøk i gweedɑ bëën-ɑ beed yi ji yij wɑ̈nyø, o bëëd e dɑ gïjø me bɑ ɑgwed ceth men nyodh rɑ̈ji jiɑni." 
Isaiah30:9 Ge cög ge opëmø ki dhøg Jwøk; ge ceg-ɑ pyed; ge bɑ̈nyi ki lïngi møg-ɑ pwönyi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Isaiah30:10 Kɑ tyëngcyɑ̈rø nyi köbbi gen kinni, “Wø ko nyi köbbu møg-ɑ dyër. Köbbu wøn møg-ɑ med ki lïngø yi wøn, nyi cɑ̈rru wøn møg-ɑ nënni ge døøj kì yï wøn." 
Isaiah30:11 Nyegi wun kì yuu wøn, wø ko jog wun. Wiyu wøn ki köbbø kì ri kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil.”" 
Isaiah30:12 De bene møg-ɑ kwøb yi kwërø. Jwøøg Isrɑil ek, “Møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun nyi ceg kɑ wøyø yi wun, kɑ wu døøg-ɑ be ngɑ̈dhi tegi wun geki wëënyø." 
Isaiah30:13 Wu ɑ́røngi. Wu nɑ dörø me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, me kɑgø kì mɑl e gït-ɑ piny, wu óceg ì tungdur kì piny." 
Isaiah30:14 Wu ókedhhi ni pug kenyi dëëme kɑ ókedhhø e bong ópɑdø me döng kì ree me cuggi kɑ̈ddø ki mɑc, wɑlɑ̀ men cuggi tömø ki pï.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; Kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil köbb-ɑ ji kinni, “Dwöögu köörɑ kɑ yɑ gɑ̈n wun. O wu óbëëd wu teg e bong gïjø me böggi yi wun.” De wu ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki gwøgi møgɑni!" 
Isaiah30:16 Wu okööbø ce wu órengi ki kyënyì. Wu órengi ceth, de tyëng-ɑ cyeddi wun óbëëd ge pëddi ngwej." 
Isaiah30:17 Ji ɑ́lïp kì kelli wun ceg-ɑ rengø, keny-ɑ ólidh gen ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́kyel. O yɑɑy wun bëne ceg-ɑ rengø bëne keny-ɑ ólïdhe ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́bïj. Ódöng ɑ́ lööj ber kì wïj kwøømø kì bɑng wun." 
Isaiah30:18 De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun. Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ Jwøng nyi gøggi dyër; tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈nnii ri gen dɑ gyëdh." 
Isaiah30:19 Wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, wu koo ywöngi këti. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ ngɑn pyëwe nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m; keny-ɑ óywøøg wun kööre, kwɑ̈jji wun óløøg yi en." 
Isaiah30:20 Cɑgg wu thödhi yi Wë ki orɑng, koo pɑ̈ni këti; óbëëd e nud o wu pwönye, o koo cigi yɑbø yi wun e tøøk." 
Isaiah30:21 Keløg yöö obɑjø yi wun, kɑ wu rud-ɑ wïj kyëj wɑlɑ̀ wïj cɑm, cwɑgge ólïngi yi wun kì ngɑ̈thi wun, e köbb-ɑ wun kinni, “Yöö èn, kɑ̈lli wun yije.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth mø wun møg-ɑ ómwønø ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø ókwɑny yi wun kɑ ge weddu pɑ̈l ni gïg cödhø, wu okööbø kinni, “Kedh wun!”" 
Isaiah30:23 Kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈g byellí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈ni ki kødh, kɑ byellí nyii cyegø kidøøj, o dhögí yï gen ódi lum me gïïr men cɑm yi gen." 
Isaiah30:24 Wɑ̈dhhí geki ɑderr-ɑ nyi køøg pwödhhí, yï gen ódi lum me pëddi døøjø." 
Isaiah30:25 Wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ døngø geki kïtt-ɑ thønhø ótwïy yi nyingi pï, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kɑ̈ddi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Isaiah30:26 Dwɑ̈y ógöögø e omënyø ni cɑ̈ng, o cɑ̈ng ópëddi meny ki tyel ɑ́bïryew, e nɑ cɑɑr cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew ɑ óreb ri cɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. Møgɑni ócwöb keny-ɑ ókood kedd, kɑ ge wëggi nøggø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; gen ɑ kedd-ɑ ɑ́mëgge jie." 
Isaiah30:27 Tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki mɑ̈re nyii nennø kì kun me lɑ̈wi. Mɑc geki yïrø nyodh-ɑ liny-ɑ pyëwe. Kɑ̀ kööbe, kwøbbe lyel nɑ mɑc me rɑ̈ɑ̈bø." 
Isaiah30:28 Atunø nyi öre’ bøle ni pïi bɑɑyø ɑ nyi køøl jɑmmì. Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø óbɑɑbe piny kɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen ocögø. 
Isaiah30:29 De wun ɑ jii Jwøk, wu óbëëd pëthi wun med, o wu ceg-ɑ wör ni kenyi bëëd ji kì wɑ̈r-ɑ nyi ngɑɑl jɑmmi kwër. Wu óbëëd pëthi wun med ni ji mø cyɑ̈dhi e kɑ̈ngì okodhø, ge kedh-ɑ Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ korri Isrɑil." 
Isaiah30:30 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cwɑgge ówëgge lïngø, kɑ tegi linye yod yi dhɑnhø bëne. Ódi mɑc me lyel, kí pøøl, kí lelli ɑ́piy, kí kødh me dwøng." 
Isaiah30:31 Tyëng Acuur óbwøg ki mendwøng keny-ɑ ólïngi gen cwɑggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tegi cɑ́ye yod yi gen." 
Isaiah30:32 Ge ópwööd piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e jie pwöd-ɑ bullì kí thøm; Jwøk kiree ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Acuur. 
Isaiah30:33 Keny-ɑ yije órɑ̈ɑ̈b rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́rum ki gwirø kɑ̈ge dööng; kenyɑni ludhø, o lɑɑj, órörø ki yugg. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókudhi kömi yuggɑni ki mɑc men rɑ̈b gen." 
Isaiah31:1 Tyëng-ɑ kedhi Rïp kipe kønyø ɑ́gɑ̈g! Ge ngɑ̈dh-ɑ yɑɑy Rïp kí tege geki kyënye, kí yɑ̈the, kí ɑlɑthkerre, de ge pɑ ngɑ̈dh Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil, o kwɑjji yi gen o kunye." 
Isaiah31:2 Gïn-ɑ gwøge ngɑ̈nye! Nyii önø ki ryɑ̈g. Ócɑ̈yyi ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe; tyëngrijjø ócɑye geki tyëng-ɑ køny gen. 
Isaiah31:3 Tyëng Rïp pɑth ki jwögg, ge bɑ ji yøw. O kyënyi gen bɑ kyënyì yøw, ge pɑth ki jwögg. Keny-ɑ ótïng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cinge, ngɑn-ɑ kunyi ócyer, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ køny ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kɑ ge othøø kyeel." 
Isaiah31:4 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑgg tyëngkwɑ̈yø ryeer wɑlɑ̀ ge kïïwø, ngur pɑ bwøg, o gïn-ɑ mɑɑg en pɑ wiye piny. Nɑ menɑni ceth, yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong gïn mɑ̈ɑ̈n yɑn kori Kïti Dhɑyøn." 
Isaiah31:5 Dhɑyøn ókor yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø kipere, ni winyø ɑ nyi wïïnø kì mɑl kömi øde, e korr-ɑ nywøle.”" 
Isaiah31:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu ɑ́røngi kɑ kwøbbɑ pyem yi wun. De dwöög wun yïɑ ɑnɑn!" 
Isaiah31:7 Bøli keny-ɑ óweddi ngïjji orøg møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun gɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø obëënø. 
Isaiah31:8 Acuur órënyi yi liny, de pɑth ki tegi dhɑnhø. Acuur ócyeddi yi liny kɑ wɑ̈dde mɑg gɑ bɑ̈ngg." 
Isaiah31:9 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng gen órengi yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Jɑggi gen óbwøg kɑ ge órengø berri gen wiy ge’ piny.” Bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ mɑc mee lyel kì Dhɑyøn, o kële ying-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Isaiah32:1 Rɑ̈nh tir men-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki jyɑ̈ng-ɑ dyër óbï geki jyɑ̈gge møg bëëdi gen bɑ óbödh. 
Isaiah32:2 Ge óbëëd ge nɑ ɑryëg men nyi gëng yømø, o bɑ keny pɑ̈ni kenyi bëën ɑtunø. Ge óni nɑm men mulli kì yij ryɑng, kɑ ge nɑ tïbi kït me dwøng cɑrø kì yij ryɑng thwøwø." 
Isaiah32:3 Codhe, o Isrɑil wɑnge yiebe, o Jwøge lidhe. O Jwøk cwɑgge lïngi yi jie." 
Isaiah32:4 Ge ówïyi ki jwɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o ge ógøgg-ɑ gïg ngɑ̈nyi yi gen." 
Isaiah32:5 Ngetigɑg koo cwølli këti ɑ́ jöd, wɑlɑ̀ wëny koo cwølli ɑ ngɑndøj." 
Isaiah32:6 Dhëg nyi 'kööb-ɑ dhëëgø e rømm-ɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø. Gwɑdd-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïg-ɑ gøgge bënn, o ngɑn ree di kɑ̈j pɑ thödhe ki gïncɑm wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn ree di röödhø pɑ nënge ki pï." 
Isaiah32:7 Ngɑn wïje nøg, nyi gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø, e rømm-ɑ gwøgi gïg rënye tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn, kɑ gï nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈ne yodi jɑmm-ɑ bɑ mø gen." 
Isaiah32:8 De ngɑntir pɑ nyi göögø ki wëënyø; nyi cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi dyër ceth. 
Isaiah32:9 Wu tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ yɑ̈ngø, ɑ bong gïn tɑg yi wun, lïngu kwøbbɑ." 
Isaiah32:10 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd wu yɑ̈ngø ɑnɑn, wɑ̈thi wun ócungi kì run-ɑ óbï piny nɑ men, mɑ́ e bong oløg men-ɑ ólem yi wun." 
Isaiah32:11 Wu ɑ́bëëd wu yɑ̈ngø e bong gïn tɑg yi wun, de ɑnɑn kïrri dëlli wun yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø! Pyëëd wun ógudhi wun wɑ̈g kì ri wun, kɑ wu rug wun ki kwɑ̈llì." 
Isaiah32:12 Pwödu ri wun wu ceg-ɑ ywøg, mɑ́ pwödh ɑ́rënyi geki bɑ̈ggi oløg," 
Isaiah32:13 koodh geki okurø ì dut kì pwödhhi jiɑ. Ywøg wun udd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́bëëd yi ji pëthi gen omedø, kɑ kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e pɑ̈ng yi ji ywøg wun." 
Isaiah32:14 Cɑgg ɑ́ gøldwøng, ji ódhwödh kì yije, kɑ kɑɑldwøng döng-ɑ nøw. Ud geki kɑ̈llì ódöng ge rënyø gïti ɑtheer. Odyerø ówïïnø kì wïj kɑɑlɑni, kɑ wïje cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi dyëg." 
Isaiah32:15 De Jwøk wɑ óöre wëye. Piny ódøøg ki mïnø, kɑ pwödh ocyëgø kidøøj." 
Isaiah32:16 Ji ógøgg-ɑ dyër kì yij piny bëne. 
Isaiah32:17 Mɑ́ dhɑnhø bëne ógøgg-ɑ dyër, ódi mër kɑ bong-ɑ liny gïti ɑtheer." 
Isaiah32:18 Jii Jwøk bong gïjø men-ɑ ótɑg yi gen, o kɑ̈lli gen óbëëdø ki tɑrø geki mër." 
Isaiah32:19 Cɑgg thïm ótoor piny yi ɑtunø, kɑ kɑɑldwøng mød piny," 
Isaiah32:20 wu ógöögø ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gyëdh, wu ókɑ̈gø ki byelli wun kì bøli kej kɑ̈g, dhögi wun kí ɑderri wun óbëëd ge yɑ̈ngø yi lum." 
Isaiah33:1 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g! Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈b kɑ ge otwɑ̈nyø ki ji, e bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kɑb jɑmmi gen, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́twɑny gen. Keny-ɑ órum gen ki kɑ̈b geki twɑ̈nyø ɑ́wɑ̈nhi; jɑmmi gen ólony ki kɑbbø kɑ ge lony ki twɑnyø." 
Isaiah33:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn. Wø gɑ̈nn-ɑ yïn. Korrí wøn yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kɑ wø yieel kí ɑkørr." 
Isaiah33:3 Kenyi nyïɑ̈ggí kiper wøn, pödhh-ɑ kyeelø nyii rengø kɑ̀ lïngi gen cwɑggi liny." 
Isaiah33:4 Kɑ jɑmmi gen mɑg yi liny wøn. 
Isaiah33:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwøng kidï! En ɑ jɑɑg gïïpiny bëne; Yerusɑlem ójɑɑg yi en ki tirø geki gøggi dyër," 
Isaiah33:6 kɑ pödhø cïbe piny ki mër. Jie nyi korre’ korrø kɑ gï thödhe ki peli wïj geki dïdø. Wøri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ en ɑ pere teg kì yï jie." 
Isaiah33:7 Yɑɑg teg ceg-ɑ kïïwø ge dwɑdd-ɑ kønyø. Jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör be kwøbbi mër ceg-ɑ ywøg ki menteg. 
Isaiah33:8 Yëthi wëll ceg kɑ böggø, bong ngɑn weli e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi gen. Kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́nywɑg ɑ́pɑ̈d, kɑ lwöbø wiy. Bong ngɑn wør këti." 
Isaiah33:9 Piny wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø; ji ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g kì yije. Thïm Lubnɑn ɑ́cur. Töör Cɑrön ɑ́döng ɑ́ ryɑng. O yïthhi yenh ceg-ɑ wewi piny kì Bɑcɑn geki wïj Kïti Kɑrmel. 
Isaiah33:10 Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø di köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑ ócɑ̈gi ɑnɑn. Tegɑ nyodhɑ’ nyodhø." 
Isaiah33:11 Gïg-ɑ rømmi yi wun kinni ge ógwøg yi wun, bong gïjø me cuggi kì ri gen. Wëyɑ bɑ mɑc men rɑ̈b wun." 
Isaiah33:12 Wu ómøy ni kïtt-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b gɑ møg gwøøg jïr, kɑ nɑ koodh møg rɑ̈b kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr." 
Isaiah33:13 Wiy dhɑnhø bëne men-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki men lɑ̈wi lidhe tegɑ.” 
Isaiah33:14 Tyëngorøg møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Dhɑyøn dëlli ceg-ɑ okïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ge okööbø kinni, “Cɑ́yi Jwøk lyel nɑ mɑc me gïti ɑtheer e olyelø. Dɑ ngɑn cuggi bodhø kì kellee e pɑ rɑ̈b yi mɑc menɑni?”" 
Isaiah33:15 Wu ócuggø bodhø keløg wu kømm-ɑ dyër, o wu gøgg-ɑ dyër. Jɑmmi tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn ko kɑbbi wun ki tegø, kɑ wu ko nyi yïëy kwɑjjø ki ngyëny kipe løgi gøny. Wu ko rëbi ki tyëng-ɑ nyi rømmi kwøbbi nɑ̈g ki ji, wɑlɑ̀ ji-ɑ nyi gøggi gïgrijjø møøgø." 
Isaiah33:16 Obëëd wun kinøw, wu óbodh, kɑ bong-ɑ gïn nywɑl wun, ni tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì øn döre teg. Wu óbëëd yï wun dɑ gïncɑm kí pïg mɑdh." 
Isaiah33:17 Wu ócigi yïddø ki rɑ̈dh men-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki dhwɑ̈ng kì yij piny-ɑ ólɑ̈nyi kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. 
Isaiah33:18 Wu ódöng wu pyëny-ɑ ri wun kinni, “Ágøne jøgwɑ̈j mø pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́buudh köthee?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Wu pɑ cigi lïdhø këti ki ji mø tɑ̈dø, møg dhum dhøg megø; dhøng pɑ lïngi yi wun." 
Isaiah33:20 Lidhu Dhɑyøn keny-ɑ nyi göög yi wɑ ki kwëër Jwøgee. Lidhu Yerusɑlem! Óbëëd ɑ́ keny bëëd pëëth pɑ lïngø! Óbëëd e nɑ kemɑ̀ me pɑ cuggi rungø; pijje pɑ cuggi örø, o thølle pɑ cuggi cöddø." 
Isaiah33:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑ ónyudhe dönge. Wɑ óbëëdø kì kömi nɑ̈mmì mø lɑjjø, o wɑ koo jud yi yɑ̈thi tyëngrijjø møg-ɑ ócyɑ̈dhi kì nɑ̈mmɑni." 
Isaiah33:22 Mɑ́ Wë ɑ ólidh gønyyee, Wë en ɑ bɑ jɑngee, Wë ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ rɑ̈dhee; wɑ ójɑɑg yi en." 
Isaiah33:23 De opëër morkɑb ree ɑ́lwɑɑje piny; ɑ́dhɑ̈li ki peri ree. Jɑmmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, jɑmm-ɑ ngenyø, ómɑg yi wɑ kɑ ge pɑ̈ngi. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ ngöll ceg-ɑ yïddø kì ri gen." 
Isaiah33:24 Bong dhɑnhø me dële órɑ̈mø kì pinyee, o orøg ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kelli ji." 
Isaiah34:1 Lïng wun, wu tyëng pödhh bënn! Cung wun ri wun, kɑ wu lïng wun. Wiy piny ki dhɑnh-ɑ yije bëne bëe kɑ lïnge." 
Isaiah34:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe rɑɑj ki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn geki yɑ̈yyi gen. Gï göjje’ ryɑ̈g. 
Isaiah34:3 Ji koo kony, de ge ókwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ piny, o kïttì óbëëd ge kwɑɑr yi remø." 
Isaiah34:4 Cɑ̈ng kí dwɑ̈y geki kyell ri gen óløg gen búr. Mɑl ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny de ce óbɑnø ɑ́ wɑ̈nyø, o kyell ódyëm ni yïthhi oløg wɑlɑ̀ yïthhi ólɑm." 
Isaiah34:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pile ɑ́tïnge kì mɑl e dwɑdd-ɑ göjjø, Edöm gøje’ gøjø, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́göjje ryɑ̈g." 
Isaiah34:6 Pile óbëëd e cödhø bëne yi remmi gen geki dwɑ̈li gen; óni remmi órömm kí ónyögg møg nyi ngɑl gɑ gëdhhì. Gëëdhi menɑni ómuuj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kɑɑldwøng Bodhrɑ̀, nɑ̈ng ni menɑni ɑ ónɑ̈ɑ̈ge kì Edöm." 
Isaiah34:7 Ji ópɑ̈nhi ni ógïgg, kɑ piny ogöögø e kwɑɑr yi remø, o pɑ̈ng yi dwɑ̈lø." 
Isaiah34:8 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ óyieel Dhɑyøn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o gøølø cole ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Isaiah34:9 Nɑ̈mmi Edöm ri gen óløg gen dök, kɑ lɑ̈bi gen ree løge kïbrït. Pönhɑni bëne órɑ̈bbi ni dök." 
Isaiah34:10 Ótyëg wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng e órɑ̈bbø, e yïrø töng-ɑ mɑl kì ree gïti ɑtheer. Pinyɑni ódöng nøw kì yij rïny kí rïny. Óbong ngɑn-ɑ óweli e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ yije." 
Isaiah34:11 Pinyɑni ólɑg-ɑ yi tulø geki ɑ́gɑ̈ggì. Ówiy e dööng kinøw yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e bong gïn ying yije ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd piny nuti cwɑ̈jø." 
Isaiah34:12 Bong rɑ̈dh men-ɑ ójɑɑg pönhɑni, o jɑɑg óbëëd ge thumø bënn." 
Isaiah34:13 Koodh geki okurø óbëëd ge ì dut kì yethi kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ ówenø ki dör, yethi gen óbëëd yi ógwøgg geki tulø." 
Isaiah34:14 Lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l ówïïnø kì yije, kɑ wɑ̈l ri gen cwølli gen kì kenyɑni. Wɑ̈li wɑ̈r ówïïnø kì yije e yɑb-ɑ keny ywööme." 
Isaiah34:15 Tulø ógëdø kì yije, kɑ onywølø, kɑ nywøle tøge, kɑ ge ódøngø kì kenyɑni. Cør ri gen ócøng gen kenyɑni." 
Isaiah34:16 Yɑb wun yij wɑ̈nyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ wu rɑ̈ɑ̈ng wun ki møg-ɑ kømme kì ri lɑ̈yyɑni. Bong ɑ́kyel kì kelli gïgɑni men-ɑ óløg me tøøk. O bong ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ójɑ̈ddi ki mɑdhe wɑlɑ̀ thwønhe, mɑ́ møgɑni ɑ́kwøb-ɑ yi en, o bɑ en ɑ ócøng gen kej ɑ́kyel" 
Isaiah34:17 Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ópɑ̈ngi pinyɑni kì kɑɑm gen, o men mëgge mee. Ge óbëëdø kì pinyɑni kì yij rïny kí rïny, o óbëëd ɑ́ mi gen gïti ɑtheer." 
Isaiah35:1 Ryɑng pyëwe ómïni, kɑ ókøgg odhɑ̈yø kì yij pɑ̈l." 
Isaiah35:2 Ryɑng ówör kɑ óryeerø yi medi pyëw; ógöögø e myëër ni Kïtti Lubnɑn, kɑ ómɑ̈rø ni pwödhhi Kɑrmel geki Cɑrön. Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólidh yi dhɑnhø bëne; döngi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólidh geki tege." 
Isaiah35:3 Wiy cingg-ɑ dhɑ̈rø tëngi gen kɑ wiy cøng-ɑ kïrrø tëngi gen. 
Isaiah35:4 Köbbu tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen nyönhø kinni, “Cwed wun ri wun, wu ko böggi! Jwøk bï-ɑ be yieli wun, bï-ɑ be cɑyi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wun.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Cwør ócuggi nënnø kɑ ming olïngø. 
Isaiah35:6 Pudh órujji kɑ ocöngø, o tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi kööbø ge óryeer yi medi pëëth. Nɑ̈mmì ómulli kì yij ryɑng," 
Isaiah35:7 ɑyeny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e lëëdh, ógöögø ki luuy pï, o piny-ɑ thwøwø ópɑ̈ng yi nyingi pï. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi ógwøgg, ógöögø ki bɑ̈j me yije twïy yi lum geki obej." 
Isaiah35:8 Ódi yuu wëll kì kunɑni, ócwøl ɑ́ “Yuu Kwër.” Bong ngetorøg men-ɑ ókɑ̈lli yuuɑni, dhëg koo lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yij yuuɑni." 
Isaiah35:9 Bong ngurrì kì yuuɑni; bong lɑ̈y me rɑj men-ɑ ókɑ̈l yije. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́døm yi Wë, bɑ gen ɑ ódwöög pɑc ki yuuɑni." 
Isaiah35:10 Ge ówɑ̈nhi Yerusɑlem ki medi pëëth, ge wör ge óryeerø yi medi pëëth. Ge ócög pëthi gen omedø gïti ɑtheer, ge pɑ mïïdø wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ kïïmø." 
Isaiah36:1 Senɑkerib, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ̈dd-ɑ ówenø ki dör kɑ gï mɑge, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween runni Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø." 
Isaiah36:2 Kɑ jɑngi linye öre kì Lɑkic gø öre’ Yerusɑlem e ókwöddø ki liny me dwøng, o köbbe Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni yömme. Kɑ pënyi linyɑni pëgg-ɑ yuu tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki ógudh, kì buti wøl-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l pï kì luy-ɑ kwøømø." 
Isaiah36:3 Kɑ yïe kedhi yi jø Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ løg Eliɑkim wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ bɑ jɑngi gøldwøng, kí Cebnɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ bɑ jɑlgwed kì burø, kí Yöɑ̀ wɑ̈d Asɑp jɑl-ɑ nyi gwed kwøbbi cyɑ̈ng," 
Isaiah36:4 Kɑ ge köbbi yi jɑngi liny Acuur kinni, i rɑ̈nhdwøng dwɑdd-ɑ yodi gïn-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈n pyëwe olïng." 
Isaiah36:5 Ápëjji kinni, “Wu orumø kwøbbi dhøg yøw ócuggø pɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki yɑy-ɑ teg? Wu orumø kinni ɑ́ men ɑ ókøny wun ɑ pere pëëm wun ki kwøbbi Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Acuur?" 
Isaiah36:6 Wu orumø kinni wu ókøny yi Rïp, o men-ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp nɑ obej ɑ nyi tor kɑ yöd e ngɑl-ɑ cingi ngɑn-ɑ kwömii ɑ́ keemø. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp pɑth ki ngɑn ngɑ̈dh!”" 
Isaiah36:7 Kɑ jɑngi liny Acuur cig-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Wɑlɑ̀ wu orumø kinni wu ngɑ̈dh-ɑ Wë, Jwøøg wun? Pɑth ki debbe geki këlli lɑm møge ɑ ɑ́rënyi yi Kedhekiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbe tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni i ngɑ̈ɑ̈d gen kì wïj këli lɑm ɑ́kyel kete?" 
Isaiah36:8 Yɑ ógöögø ki gwøøg ngyew ki nyingi rɑ̈nhdwøng. Wu óthödhi yi yɑn ki kyënyì gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew men-ɑ óyïddi wun ki ji mø kɑdhi kömi gen. 
Isaiah36:9 Yɑɑy wun pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yɑy-ɑ kwølli yi pëny-ɑ thinh kì yij liny Acuur; ɑ ngɑ̈dhu Rïp kinni wu óöde ki yɑ̈th-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì geki jøg nyïɑ̈ggi ki kyënyì. 
Isaiah36:10 Wu orumø yɑ nuti køny-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kömi kɑ̈ddi wun kɑ ge mɑgɑ? Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn kinni pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kömi gen kɑ ge nɑ̈gɑ.”" 
Isaiah36:11 Codhe, ɑköbbi jɑngi linyɑni yi Eliɑkim geki Cebnɑ̀ kí Yöɑ̀ kinni, “'Kööb ki dhøg tyëng Arɑm, yï ko kööb ki wøn ki dhøg tyëng Ibru; tyëng-ɑ wïj dörø bënn olïngø.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Alögge kinni, “Wu orumø kinni bɑ wuki rɑ̈dh keti wun ɑ́ yï wun ɑ́ör yɑn yi rɑ̈nhdwøng kinni o wu köbbɑ møgɑni? Pɑth, yɑ köbb-ɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj dörø ki møgɑni thyew, mɑ́ ge ócyɑ̈mø ki cyedhhi gen, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø ki lɑ́ji gen ni wun ceth.”" 
Isaiah36:13 Codhe, ɑdhwödhi jɑngi linyɑni mɑl, kɑ óryeerø ki dhøg Ibru kinni, “Lïngu møg-ɑ köbbi wun yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur." 
Isaiah36:14 Kyëdd-ɑ wun kinni ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi Kedhekiyɑ̀. Wu pɑ yiel yi Kedhekiyɑ̀. 
Isaiah36:15 Kɑ ri wun ko wëggu thɑbø yi en, kinni ngɑ̈dhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wu ko rum kinni wu óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ liny Acuur mɑ̈ɑ̈ne mɑgi kɑɑldwøng mi wun." 
Isaiah36:16 Kwøbbi Kedhekiyɑ̀ ko lïngi wun! Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur köbb-ɑ wun kinni, bïu wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl, kɑ wu yömmi wun. Wu ówiy o wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki nywøli oløøg wun, geki nywøli ólɑ̈mmi wun, o wu mɑdh wun pïi yïïthi wun," 
Isaiah36:17 gïti keny-ɑ ócïb wun yij pödhø me pɑ̈r ki pödhi wun yi rɑ̈nhdwøng, kun di oløg men göög ki møgø, geki byel møg cɑm." 
Isaiah36:18 Ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi Kedhekiyɑ̀, kɑ wu orumø kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbï be yieli wun. Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́di yielø yi jwöggi gen kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur?" 
Isaiah36:19 Ge ying-ɑ keny ɑnɑn, gen ɑ jwöggi Amɑth kí Arpɑd? Ágøne jwöggi Sepɑrbɑim? Dɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yiel Sɑmɑriyɑ̀?" 
Isaiah36:20 Á men kì kelli jwöggi pödhhɑni ɑ ɑ́yiel pödhe kì cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn? O bɑ ngø ɑ wëggi wun rumø kinni Yerusɑlem ócuggø yielø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?” 
Isaiah36:21 Teedø ɑ́cög ge okudø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Kedhekiyɑ̀, ge nuti pɑ̈nyi löggø." 
Isaiah36:22 Codhe, kɑ Eliɑkim geki Cebnɑ̀ kí Yöɑ̀ ógudhi gen kɑg gen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw, ɑkedhi gen be dwöggi rɑ̈dh ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi jɑngi liny." 
Isaiah37:1 Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge møg-ɑ ɑ́dwøg yi gen, kɑ ógødhe kɑge yi rɑ̈ji pyëwe kí ywøøg yij, ɑlunye ree ki ocwɑ̈lø, kɑ kedh-ɑ Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah37:2 Kɑ Eliɑkim jɑngi gøldwøng, geki Cebnɑ̀, jɑl-ɑ nyi gwëdø kì burø, kí ókwërr-ɑ døngø öre yi Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì thyew." 
Isaiah37:3 Aköbbi Icɑyɑ̀ yi gen kinni, “Kedhekiyɑ̀ okööbø kinni: dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng orɑng; wɑ ceg kɑ cɑyø, o wɑ yɑ̈rø yɑ̈rø. Wɑ nɑ nyɑndhɑjø men-ɑ ópïïdø yi pɑ̈dhi piny, de ɑ́dhɑl yi dële." 
Isaiah37:4 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, jɑngi linye ɑ́öre be gwɑddi Jwøk. Yɑ̈ddɑni óbëëd ge ólïngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑwɑnø, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gwɑ̈ɑ̈d cɑye. De kwɑjjí Jwøk kipe jiee møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge onëënø.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng Icɑyɑ̀ ki wöödø men-ɑ ɑ́örii yi Kedhekiyɑ̀," 
Isaiah37:6 ɑløøge møge ki wöödø men, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: yï ko bwøg yi kwøbb-ɑ lwɑ̈ggi yïn yi tyëng Acuur, kinni yi pɑ yiel yi en." 
Isaiah37:7 Rɑ̈nhɑni ówëggi lïngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwøb møg-ɑ ódwøøgii pödhe, o ógöjji nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kunɑni.”" 
Isaiah37:8 Kɑ jɑngi liny Acuur olïngø i rɑ̈nhdwøng dhwödhø kì Lɑkic, o ónyïɑ̈ggø ki kɑɑl me cyɑ̈gi me cwøl ɑ́ Libnɑ̀, codhe ɑkedhi jɑngɑni kunɑni be pyëji rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Isaiah37:9 Kɑ wöödø megø lïngi yi tyëng Acuur kinni i liny Rïp obëënø e pyejj-ɑ yi Rɑ̈dh Terɑ̈kɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Kuc, e bï-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, ɑöde Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀," 
Isaiah37:10 rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ki wɑ̈nyø me kööbø kinni, “Yï ɑ́köbbi yi jwøng-ɑ gɑ̈n yi yïn, kinni yï pɑ pɑ̈dhi cingɑ, de rií ko wëggí thɑbø yi møgɑni." 
Isaiah37:11 Yï ɑ́lïng ki gïn-ɑ nyi gwøg yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur kenyi rënye pönh-ɑ dwɑdde rënyø. Yï orumø kinni yï óbodh? 
Isaiah37:12 Kɑ̈ddi Gödhɑn, kí Arɑn, kí Redhep ɑ́cøør piny yi kweyyɑ, kɑ tyëng Bet Eden møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Telɑsɑr nɑ̈g yi gen, e bong jwøg mɑ ɑ́yiel gen kì kelli jwöggi gen." 
Isaiah37:13 Rɑ̈nhi kɑ̈ddi Amɑth, Arpɑd, Sepɑrbɑim, Ënɑ̀ kí Ibɑ̀ ge ying-ɑ keny?”" 
Isaiah37:14 Wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́kwɑny yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kɑ gø rɑnge. Codhe ɑkedhe Kengø, kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni cïbe bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Isaiah37:15 ɑkwɑ̈jje kinni," 
Isaiah37:16 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ kwömø kì kɑɑm kerobb. Yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk, o yïn ɑ jyɑ̈gø yïn ɑ́ Rɑ̈dh kì kömi pödhhi kömi lɑ̈bø bënn. Yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny." 
Isaiah37:17 Anɑn yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, lïngí odhɑɑm wøn kɑ wø yieel ki gïn-ɑ bï kömi wøn èn. Lïngí gïg-ɑ kømmi yi Senɑkerib e gwɑdd-ɑ yïn, yï Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø." 
Isaiah37:18 Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur pödhh mø gïïr ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny kɑ pìnyi gen döng-ɑ nøw," 
Isaiah37:19 kɑ jwöggi gen rɑ̈be, de jwöggɑni pɑth ki jwögg-ɑ dyër kinni tek, ge bɑ ngïjji yøw mø bɑ yɑdh kí kït, o ge ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi dhɑnhø ki cinge." 
Isaiah37:20 Anɑn yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wøn, yiel wøn kì cinggi tyëng Acuur, o yod yi pödhhi kömi piny bënn kinni bɑ yï ketí ɑ bɑ Jwøk.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Codhe, ɑödi Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh yï Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ ki wöödø kinni," 
Isaiah37:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Yï ceg kɑ gɑggø yi kɑɑldwøng kɑɑl Yerusɑlem, yïn ɑ Senɑkerib, o yï cedhe cedhø." 
Isaiah37:23 Yï orumø kinni yï ɑ́gwɑdd-ɑ men? Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ men ɑ nyinge ɑ́bwöl yi yïn? Yɑ nuti wørø yi yïn, yɑ kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Isaiah37:24 Kɑ bɑ̈nggí ör be gwɑddi yɑn, yï pwöd-ɑ köörí ce kïtti Lubnɑn kïtt-ɑ bɑ̈rrø mɑɑg yïn kɑ yɑ̈thí. Kɑ köörí pwööd ce yenh sɑndɑl, yenh-ɑ bɑ̈rrø geki ɑmenh-ɑ dhïw ngøl yïn piny, kɑ yï wɑ̈dh-ɑ yij thïm." 
Isaiah37:25 Köörí ɑ́pwööd ce yï kunyø ki yïïth, kɑ yï omɑ̈dhø ki pïi piny me pɑth, kɑ Kiir odwönø yi tyelli yɑyí." 
Isaiah37:26 “Kwïj yi yïn kinni møgɑni ɑ́gwir-ɑ yi yɑn kɑ̈ge dööng gɑ møg-ɑ ócwöb? O bɑ gen ɑ gwøg yi yɑn ɑnɑn, ɑnëngɑ yïn ki tegø men cøør kɑ̈dd-ɑ ówenø ki dör piny, o kɑ̈jji gen dööng yi tuggì." 
Isaiah37:27 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kɑ̈jjɑni nyødh, o ge ɑ́bwøg ki menteg, ge nyøødh ni wél, ni lum kì wïj ød kenyi wøjjii yi yømø." 
Isaiah37:28 “De bong gïn kwïjɑ kì rií, gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yïn, kì keny-ɑ kedhi yi yïn ngɑ̈nyɑ. Rɑ̈ji pyëwí ki yɑn ngɑ̈nyɑ." 
Isaiah37:29 Kwøbbi linyɑni geki ɑthwøgí ɑ́wɑ̈nhi yïɑ. Anɑn órømí ógöddɑ kí ɑbɑdh, kɑ dhøgí göddɑ ki yël, o yï dwøøgɑ ki yuu-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn.”" 
Isaiah37:30 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ köbbi yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “O men óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji kiperí, wu ócɑm-ɑ lum kì run men geki run-ɑ óbï, de wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì run-ɑ ócigi bëënø ki byel geki oløg, kɑ ge kɑj yi wun kɑ ge cɑm yi wun." 
Isaiah37:31 Tyëng-ɑ ódöng ge onëënø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ ónyog ni yenh, kɑ byerri gen niyeeng-ɑ piny, kɑ ge ókɑ̈nø ki nywøl mø ngenyø." 
Isaiah37:32 Óyïddi ki ji møg bodh kì Yerusɑlem geki Kïti Dhɑyøn, mɑ́ møgɑni dwɑdd-ɑ yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni o ge cwöb gen." 
Isaiah37:33 “Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur ek: ‘Pɑ pɑ̈nyi wɑ̈nhi kɑɑldwøng kinni tek, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ pɑ̈nyi göjji kɑɑldwøng ki nyɑr weth ɑ́kyel kinni tek. Bong ɑlɑthkerr mø cinggi gen di ködd møg-ɑ ówɑ̈nhi buti kɑɑldwøng, wɑlɑ̀ bong dörr-ɑ nyi koor kɑɑl kɑ̀ dwɑddii mɑgø møg-ɑ óger kì bɑdhhe." 
Isaiah37:34 Ódøg kɑ yuu-ɑ ɑ́bëëne, e tyele nuti ywööny kɑɑl men." 
Isaiah37:35 Kɑɑl men ókor yi yɑn, kipe kinni o yɑ wør, thyew kipe møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:36 Kɑ wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kedh-ɑ kɑɑl tyëng Acuur, kɑ ɑlɑthkerr ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj nɑ̈ge. Ge ɑ́yod ge thøø bënn keny-ɑ ɑ́ru wøw dhuki!" 
Isaiah37:37 Codhe, ɑdhwödh Senɑkerib, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kɑ døøg-ɑ Ninɑwɑ̀." 
Isaiah37:38 Cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel e ómɑ̈ddø, kì kengi Nisrök jwøge, kɑ wɑ̈dde ɑ́ryew, Adrɑmelek geki Cɑredher kedh-ɑ köme kɑ gø nɑ̈g gen ki pil kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ piny Arɑrɑt. Kɑ lɑwe kwɑny yi wɑ̈de me cwøl ɑ́ Esɑrɑdön, ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng." 
Isaiah38:1 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ mɑg yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dële kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ ócyɑ̈ngø ki thøø. Kɑ jɑltöng Icɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amodh kedh-ɑ yïe kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø i ceg gølí mɑ́ yï bɑ men thøw ceth; gwir rií.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ wïje løge ri dörø, ɑkwɑ̈jje kinni," 
Isaiah38:3 “Wïjí ko wïl yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni yɑ ɑ́bëëd ceth yɑ mïdh-ɑ kwøbbí ki pyëwɑ bëne, yɑ nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn.” Kɑ óywöngø ki menteg." 
Isaiah38:4 Codhe, kɑ Icɑyɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Isaiah38:5 døøge yï Kedhekiyɑ̀ kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngɑ, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg kweyí Debïd, kɑ pïi nyingí lidhɑ, yï ówiy yi yɑn, kɑ kömi runní kïdhɑ ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj." 
Isaiah38:6 Yï óyiel yi yɑn wuki kɑɑl men; Yerusɑlem kì cingi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, o wu ókorrɑ ceth wuki kɑɑl men.”" 
Isaiah38:7 Alöggi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Yï óthödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ngïji me nyodh kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe ógwøg yi en." 
Isaiah38:8 Tïbø ówëggi døøg cyɑ̈n yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kömi pɑ̈ltyel møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑdh ki yethi pɑ̈ltyel pyɑ̈rø.” Kɑ tïbø døøg-ɑ cyɑ̈n ki yethi pɑ̈ltyel pyɑ̈rø. 
Isaiah38:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yöni dëël Kedhekiyɑ̀, ɑgwede wöri pwøj men;" 
Isaiah38:10 Yɑ ɑ́rum kinni yɑ óthøw kì yethi runn-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì yïɑ, kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ pödhi tyëngthøø kun-ɑ pɑ nyi dwöög." 
Isaiah38:11 Yɑ ɑ́rum kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ cigɑ lidhø kì piny tyëng-ɑ nëënø, ji pɑ cigɑ lidhø këti kì kömi piny." 
Isaiah38:12 Wëyɑ ɑ́ngøl; ge ɑ́thumi, ni kemɑ̀ kenyi pɑ̈ɑ̈dii, ni ógødh kenyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈bii wɑ̈g kì wïj kɑɑdi. Yɑ ɑ́rum kinni wëyɑ ɑ́cuung yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah38:13 Yɑ nyi tyëg wɑ̈r yɑ óywöngø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël, de nɑ ngur ɑ tørri cuɑ. Yɑ ɑ́rum kinni wëyɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah38:14 Cwɑggɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li töngi wɑ̈g kidøøj. Yɑ minni nɑ ɑkur. Nyingɑ ɑ́töd yi nenni mɑl Wuö, yiel yɑn ki rɑj møg." 
Isaiah38:15 Yɑ kwøb-ɑ ngø? Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́gwøg møgɑni. Pyëwɑ orɑ̈mø, o yɑ dhɑ̈li nenø." 
Isaiah38:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ óbëëdø kɑ nyingí yï ketí; Yiel yɑn ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlɑ kɑ wiy yɑ nëënɑ." 
Isaiah38:17 Rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ ree óløge medi pyëw. Yɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn ki rɑj bënn. Orøgɑ bëne ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi yïn. 
Isaiah38:18 Bong ngɑn cuggi lenhi yïn kì pödhi tyëngthøø; yï pɑ cuggi ngɑ̈dhø yi tyëngthøø, kɑ yï gɑ̈nni yi gen." 
Isaiah38:19 Bɑ tyëng-ɑ nëënø ɑ lenhi yïn, Nɑ kɑ̀ lenhɑ yïn ɑnɑn. Wëëg ɑ nyi köbbi nyigi gen kinni yï bɑ Jwøng tir." 
Isaiah38:20 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́tur yi yïn. Wø óthumø ki thøm wø lenh-ɑ yïn ki wör. Wø ówör kì Kengí wø lenh-ɑ yïn ki runn-ɑ ónëën wøn bënn." 
Isaiah38:21 Kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbi yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni wødhe keny-ɑ ledh ki nywøli ólɑm, o nøgge." 
Isaiah38:22 Codhe, ɑpëjji Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Ngïji bɑ ngø kinni, yɑ ócuggø kedhi Kengø?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, Merodɑk Bɑlɑdɑn, wɑ̈d Bɑlɑdɑn olïngø kinni i Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ dële bëëdø e orɑ̈mø kɑ ódönyø. Codhe, kɑ gø öde ki wɑ̈nyø geki jɑmmì." 
Isaiah39:2 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ pyëwe løg-ɑ me mïni yi wëli gen, kɑ gï nyudhe kɑ̈re, ɑ løg dhɑbe kí ɑ́tenge, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med, kí mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med, geki jɑmmi linye bënn. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng gø nuti nyudh en wëllɑni kì kɑ̈nni jɑmme kì yij pödhe bëne." 
Isaiah39:3 Codhe, kɑ Icɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng kedh-ɑ yï Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀, ɑpyëje gøn kinni, “Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny? O yï ɑ́köbb-ɑ ngø yi gen?” Alöggi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Apëjji Icɑyɑ̀ kinni “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́lidh yi gen kì gøldwøng?” Alöggi Kedhekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Jɑmmì bënn ɑ́lidh yi gen. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng kì kɑ̈nni jɑmmì gø nuti nyudhi gen yi yɑn.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Codhe, ɑköbbi rɑ̈dh yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni" 
Isaiah39:6 i bøli keny megø obëënø, obëën bøli kenyɑni, jɑmmì møg-ɑ gølí bënn kí jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́congi yi kweyyí, ge bɑ møg-ɑ ókïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ge bënn. Bong gïjø men-ɑ ówiy." 
Isaiah39:7 Kwï wɑ̈ddí møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi yïn ókɑ̈l kɑ ge gwøøg órøj møg göögø kì gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.” 
Isaiah39:8 Kɑ Kedhekiyɑ̀ köbbi yi Icɑyɑ̀ kinni, “Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn døøj.” Møgɑni ɑ́løøge mɑ́ gø ɑ́yode kinni ódi mër kì runn-ɑ ónudd e onëënø." 
Isaiah40:1 Jwøgee okööbø kinni, “Lug jiɑ! Dwöög pëthi gen!" 
Isaiah40:2 Cïj tyëng Yerusɑlem. Köbbí gen kinni ge ɑ́rum ki orɑng ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, o orøøg gen ɑ́rum ki lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ɑnɑn. Ge ɑ́rum ceth ki cɑyø yi yɑn kipe orøøg gen.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Cwɑg møøgø ócwöddø kì yij pɑ̈l kinni, “Gwiru yuu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij pɑ̈l. Göggu Wë ki yöö me bɑ óbödh kì yij pɑ̈l!" 
Isaiah40:4 Thør yij tör; pɑ̈ɑ̈r wɑ̈thi kïttì. Ótøng ógöögø ki thwørø, kɑ piny-ɑ bɑ gøngì ogöögø e lïw." 
Isaiah40:5 Codhe, o mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyodh, o lidh yi dhɑnhø bëne. Møgɑni ɑ́kwøb-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Kɑ cwɑg møøgø óryeerø kinni, “Kööb ki wöödø!” Apëjjɑ kinni, “Á wöödø mɑ ngø ɑ kwøb yi yɑn?” Alöggi cwɑggɑni kinni, “Kööb kinni ji bënn ge nɑ lum; ge pɑ nyi bëëdø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r kibøli okøggi lum kì pɑ̈l." 
Isaiah40:7 Lum nyii thøø kɑ okøgg onɑ̈rø, kenyi köddi kömi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki yømø. Ji pɑ teeg kibøli lum." 
Isaiah40:8 Ngee, lum nyii thøø kɑ othwøwø, de kwøbbi Jwøgee nyi bëëd ge teeg gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Yerusɑlem, yedhí mɑl wïj kït kɑ wöön-ɑ døj menɑni kwøøb! Dhɑyøn, ryeer ki cwɑg mø døngø; töng kwøbbi wöndøj menɑni! Köbbí wɑ̈g; yï ko böggi. Köbbí kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀, kinni Jwøøg gen obëënø!" 
Isaiah40:10 Wë Áyïmø bï-ɑ be jyɑ̈gø ki tegø, ji-ɑ ɑ́yiele ókwööge keny-ɑ óbëëne." 
Isaiah40:11 Dyëge ókorre ni jɑldyëg ceth, nywøli römm ócønge kej ɑ́kyel, kɑ gï kwɑ̈gge mëëg gen mëëg gen ókwølle mɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
Isaiah40:12 Á men ɑ ɑ́røm nɑɑm omeli dwøng ki yij cinge, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́røm mɑl ki lweddi cinge? Lɑ̈bi piny bëne ócuggø rømø ki ködh yi dhɑnhø, wɑlɑ̀ kïttì ócuggø rømø ki midhɑn?" 
Isaiah40:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócuggø köbbø yi dhɑnhø ki gïn gwøge? Á men ɑ cuggi pwönyii wɑlɑ̀ ɑ cuggi tyenyii? 
Isaiah40:14 Jwøk nyi køny-ɑ yi men ki rummì, o yode thɑ́ møg-ɑ dhɑ̈li gɑmø wïje, o yode yëth-ɑ nyi gwøøg jɑmmì?" 
Isaiah40:15 Pödhh bënn pɑth ki gïïpiny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ge nɑ nyɑ wɑɑng pïngø yøw, mujj-ɑ lɑ̈wi nɑ nyɑ tør me thinh kì yïe." 
Isaiah40:16 Lɑ̈yy-ɑ wɑɑg Lubnɑn bënn, nøg yi gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj Jwøgee, o yenhi thïme bënn nøg yi yugge." 
Isaiah40:17 Pödhh bënn bong nyingi gen kì yïe. 
Isaiah40:18 Jwøk pɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ men? Bëëde ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yïn kɑ ngø? 
Isaiah40:19 Pɑ pɑ̈r ki ngïny-ɑ nyi gwøg yi bødhø, eni ngïny-ɑ nyi gwøg ki ngyënyø dødø, kɑ dhyɑw ki dhɑb, kɑ gïn-ɑ köme cunge gwøg ɑ́ ɑ́tegø." 
Isaiah40:20 Ngɑn-ɑ pɑ cuggi ngewi dhɑb wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́tegø, kwɑny-ɑ yɑnh-ɑ pɑ nyi kwɑ̈g. O yɑ̈ɑ̈be ki bødhø me cinge døøj men göggii ki ngïji me pɑ pɑ̈nhhi." 
Isaiah40:21 Kwïj yi wun? Wu nuti lïngø cøn? Wu nuti lïngø kinni piny cɑ̈g ɑ dï? 
Isaiah40:22 Piny ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì wïj kwøme e lɑ̈wi ki piny kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑl; ji nenne kì kömi piny ge nɑ ɑ́cungì. Mɑl ɑ́pedhe e nɑ sitɑrɑ̀, kɑ gø gure piny ni kemɑ̀ men yije bëëd." 
Isaiah40:23 Jɑgg-ɑ teg nyi dwööge’ piny, kɑ gï løge møg bong per gen." 
Isaiah40:24 Ge nɑ lum me cer twïyø, byerri gen nuti niyeeng piny. Kenyi gööj yømø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge nyi ceg-ɑ thwøwø, kɑ ge køøl yi yømø ni wél." 
Isaiah40:25 Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø pɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ men? Dɑ ngɑn ni en? 
Isaiah40:26 Lïïdh wun mɑl! Á men ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j kyell-ɑ nenni yi wun ek? Eni ngɑn-ɑ nyi pyejji gen ni yɑy, kwɑnni gïn ngɑ̈nye; o gï cwølle kɑ nyingi gen! Tege dwøng cɑrø, bong men lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì kelli kyellɑni!" 
Isaiah40:27 De yïn ɑ Isrɑil, yïde ɑ gööny, kinni ɑkørrí kwïj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ perí pɑ nyi rømme, keny bëën kömí yi ɑkørr?" 
Isaiah40:28 Kwïj yi yïn? Yï nuti lïngø? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene Jwøng-ɑ nud gïti ɑtheer; Lɑ̈bø bëne ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ yi en. Pɑ nyi pïd wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi dhɑ̈ɑ̈r. Bong ngɑn yod rumme. 
Isaiah40:29 Tyëng-ɑ pïdø, ɑ dhɑ̈ɑ̈rø nyii thödhi yi en ki tegø." 
Isaiah40:30 Cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ thønhø ge nyii nyönhø; yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb nyii dhɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Isaiah40:31 De tyëng-ɑ nyi gɑ̈n kønyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dëlli gen nyi cig-ɑ tëngø. Ge nyii pɑ̈rrø kì yij yømø ni cor, ge nyii rïngø ge pɑ pïd; ge nyii cyɑ̈dhø ge pɑ dhɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Isaiah41:1 Jwøk okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi, kud wun kɑ møgɑ lïngi wun! Gwiru ri wun kipe kïdhi gøny burø, wu ówëggi löggø. Pëggi wɑ piny kì kej ɑ́kyel o ngɑn-ɑ kømmi dyër yod yi wɑ." 
Isaiah41:2 “Á men ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́tyɑ̈ɑ̈m kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ gø wëgge tyɑ̈mø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kedhe? Á men ɑ nyi wëggii tyɑmi rɑ̈nhì geki pödhh? Ge nyi pwööd-ɑ piny yi pile ni kenyi teeng tør piny. Ge nyii kedhhø yi nywøli wethe ni kenyi kedhhi wél yi yømø." 
Isaiah41:3 Gï nyi cyedde’ cyeddø e bong gïn nywɑlii, rïngi e yöd dhɑ̈y tyelle pɑ nywɑ̈ddi ki piny!" 
Isaiah41:4 Á men ɑ ɑ́wëggi gïgɑni cwöbø? Á men ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g møgɑni ki gwirø kipe kinni o ge ócwöb gen? Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nud kì ri cɑ̈gi gen, o yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ óbëëd yɑ nud kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen." 
Isaiah41:5 “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn ɑ́lidh yi pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi; ge ɑ́bwøg kɑ dëlli gen ceg-ɑ okïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Codhe ɑcøng gen ri gen kɑ ge obëënø. 
Isaiah41:6 Bödhhì nyi cïj-ɑ ri gen, kɑ ri gen nyi køny yi gen." 
Isaiah41:7 Kɑ bødhi dhɑb nyi köbbi yi bødhi pɑ̈mmì kinni, ‘Ágwøg yi yïn kidøøj.’ Ngɑn-ɑ nyi tøg ngïji o lïwe, nyi cïj-ɑ bødhø men-ɑ gurii kej ɑ́kyel. Ge nyi kømm-ɑ kinni, ‘Bɑ ɑkøny kidøøj,’ codhe kɑ gø nyi gur gen keje ki gedd." 
Isaiah41:8 “De yïn ɑ Isrɑil bɑ̈ngɑ, bene wun ji-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ, wun ɑ kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm mɑ̈dhɑ." 
Isaiah41:9 Yï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kì cögi piny; yï ɑ́cwöölɑ kì gøddi piny kun lɑ̈wi, kɑ yï köbbɑ kinni, ‘Yï bɑ bɑ̈ngɑ.’ Yï nuti bɑɑny yɑn, de yï ɑ́cɑɑgɑ kɑ myegø." 
Isaiah41:10 Yï ko böggi. Yɑ nud kì butí! Yɑ bɑ Jwøgí. Ko di gïn böggi yi yïn! Yï ógwøøgɑ yï teg kɑ yï kønyɑ, yï ókorrɑ kɑ yï yielɑ." 
Isaiah41:11 “Tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen rijjø ki yïn, ɑyɑ̈ɑ̈r tyɑmø óyod yi gen. Tyëng-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn óthøw," 
Isaiah41:12 kɑ ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì kömi piny. 
Isaiah41:13 Bene yɑn Wöw Jwøgí; Yï ɑ́nëngɑ ki tegø, kɑ yï köbbɑ kinni, ‘Yï ko böggi; yï ókøny yi yɑn.’ ”" 
Isaiah41:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd yï thiinh o yï nyøødh, yïn ɑ Isrɑil, yï ko böggi, yï ókøny yi yɑn. Yɑn, yɑ kwërø jwøøg Isrɑil, bɑ yɑn ɑ óyiel yïn." 
Isaiah41:15 Yï ógwøøgɑ yï nɑ pɑ̈m-ɑ nyi nyøng byel kì rɑrø me ree di leg mø nyɑ̈n, o ge bedh; Kïtt-ɑ døngø ónyøng yi yïn, kɑ ge mød piny, kïtt-ɑ thønhø ómød kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr." 
Isaiah41:16 Ge ókwøør mɑl yi yïn, kɑ ge køøl yi yømø, kɑ ge kedhhi yi ɑtunø. Codhe o pyëwí mïne, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ Jwøgí, yɑ ólenhi yi yïn, yɑ kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Isaiah41:17 “Keny-ɑ óyɑ̈ɑ̈b jiɑ ki pï; othwøw cwɑggi gen yi röödhø, kwɑ̈jji gen óløøg yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ge pɑ wiyɑ piny, yɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Isaiah41:18 Nɑ̈mmì ówëggɑ möddi wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ thønhø møg-ɑ bɑ ryɑng, kɑ pï ótöngø kì piny, kɑ ge mull-ɑ yethi törr. Ryɑng óløgɑ luyyi pï kɑ piny-ɑ thwøwø yije løgɑ men töngi wɑ̈g yi pï." 
Isaiah41:19 Yɑ ópïdhi yij ryɑng ki yenh sɑndɑl, geki ɑ́lwiy kí bɑlsɑm, kí dhetun. Piny-ɑ bɑ ryɑng ótwïy yi thïm; thïm sɑru, kí sendiyɑn, kí ɑmedh." 
Isaiah41:20 Møgɑni ólidh yi ji kɑ gø yod gen kinni bɑ yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́gwøgii. Óyod yi gen kinni bɑ kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ ɑ́wëggi gïgɑni cwöbø.”" 
Isaiah41:21 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ek: “Wu jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, nyodh wun gøøny wun, kwøb wun gøny-ɑ med ki gønyø yi wun!" 
Isaiah41:22 Bɑg wun gïn-ɑ ócwöb, o yod yi wɑ eni bøli keny-ɑ ócwöbe. Nyodhu møg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn, kɑ tyelli gen lwøb wun. Kɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen nyodh wun." 
Isaiah41:23 Köbbu wøn møg-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø, o yod yi wøn cyee kinni wu bɑ jwögg! Göög wun ki gïndøj wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈ni wun ki ryɑ̈g, wëggu wøn bwøgø o wø thøw wøn yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø!" 
Isaiah41:24 Wu bong per wun, wuki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun bënn, pyëw nyi ceg-ɑ lɑ̈mmø yi ji-ɑ mɑlli wun!" 
Isaiah41:25 “Yɑ ómëggi ki jɑl me bëëdø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn o pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi kɑɑl ki liny e töng-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑɑng wuudø. Tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ónyøn yi en ni tuggì kì piny, ni bødhi lɑ̈b kenyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈be lɑ̈bø." 
Isaiah41:26 Á men ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ggi kì kelli wun kinni møgɑni ócwöb, o wø kööb wøn kinni wu kømm-ɑ dyër? Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kööb kì ree kì kelli wun; bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lïng ki gïjø mɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun." 
Isaiah41:27 Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kwøng Dhɑyøn ki köbbi wöönɑni, Yɑ ɑ́ödi Yerusɑlem ki jɑlwöödø me kööbø kinni, ‘Jií obëënø! Ge bï-ɑ pɑc!’" 
Isaiah41:28 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïïdhɑ kelli jwögg, bong men di gïn kwøbe, bong ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen mɑ ɑ́løøg pyëjjɑ." 
Isaiah41:29 Jwögg møg bënn bong per gen; bong gïjø me cuggi gwøgø yi gen ngïjjɑni nyøødh, o bong tegø kì yï gen.”" 
Isaiah42:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bɑ̈ngɑ èn, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́thödhɑ ki tegø, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ, o pyëwɑ med ki en. Ápɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki wëyɑ, o pödhh bënn ówëgge gøggi dyër." 
Isaiah42:2 Koo ryeer wɑlɑ̀ cwɑgge koo tïnge, wɑlɑ̀ koo kööbø e óryeerø kì yethi yëëth." 
Isaiah42:3 Koo turri ki obej me bøømø wɑlɑ̀ mɑɑc lɑ̈mbɑ̈ e køm-ɑ thøø pɑ nɑ̈ge. Ji bënn ówëgge gøggi dyër men pɑ cög. 
Isaiah42:4 Koo wïyi ki ngɑ̈dhø, wɑlɑ̀ pyëwe koo nyönhi, gøggi dyër me pɑ cög ókɑ̈ɑ̈le kömi piny. Pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi nenn-ɑ bëëni pwönye.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Jwøk ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kɑ gø pedhe, piny ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi en geki jɑmm-ɑ bëëdø kì yije bënn. Kɑ jii piny bënn thödhe ki nënnì geki wëy. O ɑnɑn Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, köbb-ɑ bɑ̈nge kinni," 
Isaiah42:6 “Yï ɑ́cwøl-ɑ yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ yï thödhɑ ki tegø, tegø me nenní kinni, dyër ogøggø kì kömi piny. Wø ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb wøki ji bënn kì rií; pödhh bënn óthödhɑ ki cɑr kì rií." 
Isaiah42:7 Nyingi cörr óyieb yi yïn, kɑ ɑmɑgg-ɑ ying uddi mɑg møg-ɑ bɑ muudhø gööny yi yïn wɑ̈g." 
Isaiah42:8 “Yɑn, yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ wöw Jwøgí. Bong jwøg ɑ́kyel men nywɑg wøn dhwɑ̈ngɑ, ngïjji jwögg koo wëggɑ lenhø kyeel ki yɑn." 
Isaiah42:9 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ ki kwøbø cøn kinni ge ócwöb, ge ɑ́cwöb kidyër. Anɑn wu köbbɑ’ köbbø ki gïg mø nyɑ̈n; ge köbbɑ’ wun ge nuti cwöbø.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Wör wun ki wörø me nyɑ̈n wu lenh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; wöör yï lenh-ɑ en, yïn ɑ piny bëne! Wiy nɑɑm omelø ruure geki gïg-ɑ yije bënn, kí myërr-ɑ kömi nɑɑm omelø geki ji-ɑ yethi gen bënn!" 
Isaiah42:11 Wiy ryɑng geki tyëng-ɑ yije lenhi gen Jwøk, wiy lenhi yi tyëng Kedɑr! Wiy tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Selɑ̀ ryeer gen ki medi pëthi gen kì wɑ̈thi kïtti!" 
Isaiah42:12 Wiy tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pìny-ɑ lɑ̈wi lenhi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gø lejji ge lejjø! 
Isaiah42:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi kedh-ɑ be liny e nɑ jɑl-liny, me ree gwiir en, pyëwe tyer-ɑ liny. Liny nyi kiwe kiwø, e pödh-ɑ kömi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Isaiah42:14 Jwøk okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kud kì keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, e jiɑ kwɑ̈jji gen nuti løøg yɑn. De bøli kej løøgi kwøbbi gen ɑ́bï ɑnɑn, yɑ ryeer nɑ ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny." 
Isaiah42:15 Kïttì bënn møg døngø kí møg thønhø ókedhhɑ, kɑ lum geki yenh göjjɑ thwøwø. Törr møg-ɑ mulli yi nɑ̈mmì óløgɑ ryɑng, kɑ luyyì wëggɑ thwøwø." 
Isaiah42:16 “Jiɑ ji-ɑ bɑ cörr ópyejjɑ ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yöö me yije nuti pɑ̈nyi gen ki kɑ̈ɑ̈lø. Muudhi gen óløgɑ cɑr kɑ piny-ɑ bɑ tuggi gwøøgɑ e lïw kiper gen. Bene møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn ɑgɑk kinni ge ógwøgɑ, o ge ógwøgɑ ceth; dhøgɑ pɑ wilɑ." 
Isaiah42:17 Tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈dh ngïjjì, ɑ cwølli ngïjjì gɑ jwöggi gen ge ódøøg cyɑ̈n kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈yø.”" 
Isaiah42:18 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun, wun ɑ mïng! Lïdhi wun kidøøj, wun ɑ cörr!" 
Isaiah42:19 Dɑ ngɑn lod bɑ̈ngɑ ki cøørø! Dɑ ngɑn lod ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́ör yi yɑn ki mïngø? 
Isaiah42:20 Isrɑil, yï ɑ́lïdhi ki gïg mø gïïr, de ge ɑ́wɑng-ɑ ngø kì yïí? Yïí dɑ yïthh møg lïng, de yï ɑ́lïng-ɑ ngø?”" 
Isaiah42:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene Jwøng-ɑ pyëwe med ki yïëdø, cigge geki pwönye ɑ́gwøøge per gen teeg, o ge di dwɑddø yi en kinni wøør gen yi jie." 
Isaiah42:22 De ɑnɑn jie ɑ́yɑg; ge bɑ ɑmɑgg, ge ócyëëg uddi piny. Ge ɑ́yɑg kɑ jɑmmi gen kwɑny, e bong ngɑn døm gen." 
Isaiah42:23 Dɑ ngɑn ólïngi møgɑni kì kelli wun? Cɑg ɑnɑn gïti dhuki megø, møgɑni ólïngi yi wun?" 
Isaiah42:24 Á men ɑ ɑ́cïb Isrɑil cinggi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yɑgii? Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ree, ngɑn-ɑ́ bøle ɑ́røngi yi wɑ! Wɑ nuti bëëdø ki bëëdø men-ɑ dwɑddi yi en, o cigg-ɑ ɑ́pwönye wɑ nuti mïdhø yi wɑ." 
Isaiah42:25 Codhe ɑwëgge wɑ lidhi tegi linye o wɑ rɑngi wɑ yi nyɑɑg. Rɑ̈ji pyëwe ɑ́lyel ni mɑc kì kömi Isrɑil bëne, de gïn-ɑ cwöb ɑ́bëëd e nuti yodø yi wɑ; bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́dïd yi wɑ̈thee kì bɑnge kinni tek." 
Isaiah43:1 Yïn ɑ Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïn okööbø kinni, “Yï ko böggi, yï óyiel yi yɑn. Yï ɑ́cwøl yi yɑn kɑ nyingí, yï bɑ miɑ." 
Isaiah43:2 Keny-ɑ óbɑ̈ɑ̈n nɑm e pɑ̈ng, yɑ óying butí; yï pɑ mud. Cɑgg yï kɑ̈l yij mɑc, yï pɑ rɑ̈bbi, wɑlɑ̀ yï pɑ gwɑr yi mɑc." 
Isaiah43:3 Bene yɑn Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø ɑ yiel yïn. Rïp ógøømɑ bølí, Kuc geki Sebɑ̀ ócoolɑ kejí." 
Isaiah43:4 Pödhh bënn ówiy yi yɑn kipe yieli wëyí, mɑ́ perí teeg kì yïɑ; yï mɑɑr yi yɑn, o yï owørø yi yɑn." 
Isaiah43:5 Yï ko böggi, yɑ nud kì buti! “Jií ódwöögɑ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kí kun lɑ̈wi kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Isaiah43:6 Wɑɑng wuudø óköbbɑ o gï wëgge dwöögø, o wɑɑng wurlwɑl köbbɑ kinni ge ko mɑ̈ɑ̈ne døøgø. Wiy jiɑ dwöög gen kì pìny-ɑ lɑ̈wi; wiy ge dwöög gen kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́tɑɑy yi gen kì kömi piny." 
Isaiah43:7 Ge bɑ dïl jiɑ, ge ɑ́cwɑ̈jɑ kɑ per kinni o döngɑ nënne.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Jwøk okööbø kinni, “Gøønyu jiɑ kì burø. Yï gen dɑ nying, de ge bɑ cörr, yï gen dɑ yïthh, de ge bɑ mïng!" 
Isaiah43:9 Gøøny pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kì burø. Á jwøng-ɑ́ kì kelli jwöggi gen, ɑ cuggi kwøbi gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø? Á jwøng-ɑ́ kì kelli gen ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn ki kwøbø cøn? Wiy jwöggɑni kɑ̈ni gen ki cwɑ̈ggi gen, o gø nyodh gen kinni ge kømm-ɑ dyër, o kwøbbi gen nyodh yi cwɑ̈ggɑni kinni ge bɑ dyër." 
Isaiah43:10 “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu bɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ; Yïn ɑ Isrɑil, yï ókwɑnyɑ yïn ɑ́ bɑ̈ngɑ, kipe kinni o bëëdɑ yod yi yïn, o yï yïëëy ki yɑn, o gɑm yi wïjí kinni bɑ yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ Jwøk. Bong jwøg mɑ ɑ́ying me nud kì bølɑ, o koo di men-ɑ óying me nud kì bɑngɑ." 
Isaiah43:11 “Yɑ ketɑ, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ cuggi yieli yïn." 
Isaiah43:12 Gïn-ɑ ócwöb ɑ́rum ki kwøbø yi yɑn, codhe ɑbëënɑ be yieli yïn. Bong jwøg mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi gwøg ki gïn ni menɑni; wu bɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ." 
Isaiah43:13 Yɑ bɑ Jwøk, o yɑ ócög yɑn ɑ́ Jwøk ceth. Bong ngɑn yïëdø kì cingɑ; bong ngɑn cuggi wili gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn.”" 
Isaiah43:14 Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́yiel yïn okööbø kinni, “Yɑ óödi kömi Bɑbïl ki liny, o yï yielɑ, thïggi dhøggi döri kɑɑlɑni ótoorɑ piny, kɑ ɑkyeew jie ree løge ywøg." 
Isaiah43:15 Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; yɑ Jwøgí kwërø. Yï ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ yi yɑn, yïn ɑ Isrɑil, o yɑ bɑ rɑ̈dhí.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́göög ki yöö kì nɑɑm omelø kɑ̈ge dööng, ɑ́göög ki yöö kì dïdyëri pï mø tulli ri gen." 
Isaiah43:17 Yɑy me teg, yɑɑy ryɑ̈g ɑ́peje, eni yɑɑy yɑ̈ɑ̈th kí kyënyì. Ge ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh ge pɑ cigi dhwödhø; ge ɑ́kodh kɑ ge ceg-ɑ ì mïj ni mɑɑc lɑ̈mbɑ̈!" 
Isaiah43:18 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu ko mɑ̈gi kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh, wɑlɑ̀ wu ko cöög ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Isaiah43:19 Lïdhi wun, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ gwøg ki gïjø me nyɑ̈n. Gïnɑni ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki cwöbø; onennø yi wun ɑnɑn! Yɑ ógöögø ki yöö kì yij pɑ̈l, kɑ wu thödhɑ ki nɑ̈mmì kì kunɑni." 
Isaiah43:20 Cɑgg ɑ́ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, yɑ ówør yi gen; yɑ ólenhi yi ógwøgg geki wudø keny-ɑ ógöögɑ ki nɑ̈mmì mø rïngi kì yij pɑ̈l; nɑ̈mmì møg nëngi jiɑ, ji-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ ki pï." 
Isaiah43:21 Ge bɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ riɑ, o ge ówör gen ge lenh-ɑ yɑn!”" 
Isaiah43:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “De yï ce ɑ́di ngïrø yi yɑn, Isrɑil; kɑ yɑ ocögø yɑ pɑ mɑlli yi yïn." 
Isaiah43:23 Yɑ nuti muuj yïn ki órömm-ɑ nyi mëggí yɑn gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, yɑ nuti wøør yïn ki gëdhhí. Yï nuti jud yɑn ki cwöd ki gëdhhì, wɑlɑ̀ yï nuti pïd yɑn ki cwølli bɑkur." 
Isaiah43:24 Yɑ nuti ngëwwi yïn ki bɑkur wɑlɑ̀ pyëwɑ nuti wëggi yïn mïnø yi dwɑ̈li dyëgí. De yɑ ɑ́yöd yɑ ceg kɑ torø yi yïn ki orøgí; yɑ ɑ́jud yi yïn kɑ̀ nyi rïïj yï óbɑ̈jjø. 
Isaiah43:25 De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, yɑ bene Jwøng-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny orøgí, o menɑni gwøg yi yɑn kɑ per kɑ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøk. Orøgí pɑ mïdhi yi yɑn ɑ́ cɑ́y kì kömí." 
Isaiah43:26 “Kedhi wɑ burø; kɑ̈ɑ̈l gønyí! Nyodh gønyí kinni bɑ dyër! 
Isaiah43:27 Kweyyí ɑ́røngi kɑ̈ge dööng; jɑggí ɑ́røngi kì bølɑ," 
Isaiah43:28 o kej kwërɑ ɑ́bwöl yi pëjji wun. Codhe ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ ryɑ̈g kömi Isrɑil, kɑ jiɑ göjjɑ gwɑddø.”" 
Isaiah44:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïng ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Isrɑil bɑ̈ngɑ wu jiɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ, kwɑrri Yɑgob." 
Isaiah44:2 Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïn, yï ɑ́wöni yï okønyø yi yɑn kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yïn. Yï ko böggi, yï bɑ bɑ̈ngɑ, jiɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ, ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn." 
Isaiah44:3 “Piny-ɑ thøø yi röödhø óthödhɑ ki pï kɑ nɑ̈mmì wëggɑ mullø kì piny-ɑ thwøwø. Wëyɑ ókønyɑ kömi nyigi wun kɑ gyëdhhɑ kønyɑ kömi kwɑrri wun. 
Isaiah44:4 Ge ónyog ni lum me thɑre di pï, kɑ ge nɑ wijø kì tøggi nɑm." 
Isaiah44:5 “Ngɑn ókööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’ Ge óbï be rëbø ki tyëng Isrɑil. Nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógweed yi gen bɑ̈ddi gen, kɑ ri gen cwølli gen gɑ wɑddi jii Jwøk.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ jɑɑg Isrɑil gø korre korrø, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑn ɑ mɑl, o yɑn ɑ cyɑ̈n, yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ Jwøk; bong jwøg megø den-ɑ́ yɑ ketɑ." 
Isaiah44:7 Dɑ ngɑn di cuggi gwøgi gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ? Á men ɑ di mɑ̈ɑ̈g gïg-ɑ ócwöb ki kwøbø, cɑg kì ri cɑ̈gi piny gïti thumi piny?" 
Isaiah44:8 Jiɑ wu ko böggi! Ngɑ̈nyi yi wun kinni, kër-ɑ ɑ́wöne kɑ̈ge dööng gïti ɑnɑn gïg-ɑ ócwöb bënn ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ ki kwøbø, o wu bɑ cwɑ̈ggɑ. Dɑ jwøg megø? Dɑ jwøg me teg me pere nuti lïngi yɑn?”" 
Isaiah44:9 Tyëng-ɑ gøggi ngïjji jwögg per gen bong gïn, o jwögg-ɑ rømmi yi gen per gen teg, bong per gen. Tyëng-ɑ mɑlli jwöggɑni bɑ cörr, o ge kwïj wøw, ge óyɑ̈r." 
Isaiah44:10 Gwøg ki ngïji mɑ ngyënyø me kwɑjji ɑ́ jwøg bong gïjø me døøj kì ree! 
Isaiah44:11 Ngɑn kwɑjjii óyɑ̈r. Tyëng-ɑ göögø ki ngïjji jwögg bɑ ji yøw. Bï gen o gøøny gen lidh, ge órɑngi kɑ ge oyɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah44:12 Bødhø kenyi kwɑnye ngyënyø gø nyi kïdhe’ mɑc. Codhe, o gø tøge ki ɑ́bɑny ki cinge, cing-ɑ teeg gø gwøøge ngïji. Kɑ̀ gööge nyii mɑgø yi kɑ̈j kí röödhø, kɑ nyii pïdø." 
Isaiah44:13 Bødhi tyeng, yɑdh nyi kwɑnye kwɑnyø kɑ gø gedde ki cugø, kɑ gø tyenge ɑ́ ngïji dhɑnhø me myëër, o gø cïbe øde." 
Isaiah44:14 Ócuggø ngøl ki yɑdh sɑndɑl, wɑlɑ̀ óthurø, wɑlɑ̀ ɑmedh kì wɑg. Yɑdh sɑndɑl nyi pidhe’ pidhø, o dønge yi kødh." 
Isaiah44:15 Dhɑnhø kwï yɑnhɑni nyi cwɑge’ cwɑgø ki mɑc, o kwëe tyeng ɑ́ ngïji! Kɑ kwëe gwøøge yugg møg röjje ki mɑc, o kwëe tɑ̈ɑ̈de ki gïncɑm, o kwëe gwøøge jwøg men mɑlle." 
Isaiah44:16 Kwï yɑnhɑni ɑ́gwøøge yugg møg thɑle gïncɑm kɑ obudø ki rïngø kɑ ocyɑ̈mø, kɑ oyɑ̈ngø. Kɑ oröjø ki mɑc, kɑ dële ólënhø, o nyi kööbe kinni, “Dëlɑ ɑ́murri! Mɑc døøj!”" 
Isaiah44:17 O kwï yɑnhɑni men-ɑ ɑ́döng gø gwøøge ɑ́ ngïji, codhe o ree bøødhe, o gø mɑlle, gø kwɑjje’ kwɑjjø kinni, “Yï bɑ jwøgɑ, yiel yɑn!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Tyëng-ɑ ni møgɑni wɑ̈thi gen nøg cɑrø, gïn-ɑ gwøg yi gen kwïj yi gen, mɑ́ nyingi gen bɑ ɑkum; ge pɑ nëënø. O wɑ̈thi gen ódijø; bong gïn gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen." 
Isaiah44:19 Ngɑn-ɑ göögø ki ngïjjì ree nuti pɑ̈nyø pyëjø yi en kinni, “Kwï yɑnhɑni ce ɑ́di rɑ̈bø yi yɑn. Kɑ kwëe bulɑ ópun geki rïngø men cɑm yi yɑn. Agwøgɑ men-ɑ ɑ́döng ɑ́ ngïji, ɑnɑn yɑ pɑ mɑll-ɑ duli yɑdh!”" 
Isaiah44:20 Menɑni wɑɑd ki ngɑn nøm búr. Átööng pɑ̈l yi nøgi rumme, o pɑ cuggi yielø. Ádhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wïje kinni ngïji men-ɑ mïdhe kì cinge pɑth ki jwøg kinni tek." 
Isaiah44:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pɑrrí møg, yïn ɑ Isrɑil, pɑrrí kinni yï bɑ bɑ̈ngɑ. Yï ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi yɑn kɑ per kinni, o yï bëëd yïn ɑ́ bɑ̈ngɑ, o yï pɑ wïl kì wïjɑ." 
Isaiah44:22 Orøgí ɑ́wøøjɑ wɑ̈g ni pøølø. Dwöög yïɑ; bɑ yɑn ɑ yiel yïn.” 
Isaiah44:23 Ryeer ki medi pyëw yïn ɑ mɑl. Ryeer wun, wu kɑ̈jj-ɑ ludhø kì piny. Ryeer wun ki medi pëëth wun ɑ kïttì, kí yɑnh-ɑ pɑ̈l bëne! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dönge ɑ́nyodhe kɑ yieli jie tyëng Isrɑil." 
Isaiah44:24 “Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïëní, Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïn. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn, yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́pedh mɑl, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́køny yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ piny." 
Isaiah44:25 Tyëng-ɑ nyi bɑ̈gø ki gïg-ɑ ócwöb nyi gwøøgɑ’ dhëgg kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi rɑ̈ngø ki kyell wɑ̈thi gen nyi cuungɑ. Bɑ̈jji tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel nyi nyodhɑ’ nyodhø, kɑ ge nyi nyudhɑ kinni peli wɑ̈thi gen bɑ dhëëgø." 
Isaiah44:26 De kenyi kööb bɑ̈ngɑ ki gïn-ɑ ócwöb; kenyi örɑ bɑ̈ngɑ be nyodhi møg-ɑ ɑ́gwirɑ, møgɑni nyi wëggɑ’ pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen. Yɑ köbb-ɑ Yerusɑlem kinni, ji ódøøg be bëëdø kì yije kɑ myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ köbbɑ kinni ge ódøøg ki gerø; kɑ̈ddɑni ódhwödh, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ dööng gen gɑ tuggì." 
Isaiah44:27 Nɑɑm omeli dwøng nyii dwönø kɑ̀ kööbɑ. 
Isaiah44:28 Kɑ Körec köbbɑ kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø yïn ɑ́ kejɑ; yï gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn kinni o gwøg, yïn ɑ ókööbø kinni døøg Yerusɑlem ki gerø, kí kinni këël tyelli Kengø piny.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Körec ɑ́røny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j o bëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈dh! Árønye o tyɑme pödhh; ɑ́öre’ be pɑ̈di rɑ̈nhì; óyïëbbi dhøggi dörri kɑ̈dd yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Körec di köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Isaiah45:2 “Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ógwir yuuí, kïttì ónyɑɑgɑ piny geki ótøng. Thïggi dörri kɑ̈dd møg-ɑ bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl toorɑ’ piny, kɑ rïwwi gen møg-ɑ bɑ ngyënyø dødø tørrɑ." 
Isaiah45:3 Yï ómuujɑ ki kɑ̈r, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn ɑ kɑ̈nø me yije bɑ muudhø, o yod yi yïn kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kí kinni yï ɑ́cwööl kɑ nyingí yi Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Isaiah45:4 Yï ɑ́kwɑnyɑ o yï køny bɑ̈ngɑ Isrɑil, gen ɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn. Yï ɑ́thödhɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng me dwøng, ngö yɑ kwïj yi yïn." 
Isaiah45:5 “Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong jwøg megø. Yï óthödhɑ ki tegø, o bëëd e bong gïn dhɑl yïn." 
Isaiah45:6 Gïn ni menɑni gwøg yi yɑn kɑ per kinni, o yod yi piny bëne kinni yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; o bong jwøg megø." 
Isaiah45:7 Yɑn ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l cɑr geki muudhø; yɑn ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l gyëdh geki cyën. Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ nyi gwøg gïgɑni bënn. 
Isaiah45:8 Tyɑ̈mø örɑ’ örø kì mɑl ni kødh; piny ree óyiebe o gø gɑme, kɑ piny ótɑ̈bbø kɑ yije gøggi dyër. gïgɑni ówëggɑ cwöbø ceth, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Gïn-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ɑ́ lɑ̈bø ócuggø pëëmø geki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jii, eni pung-ɑ pɑ̈r ki pugg-ɑ kyeelø? Lɑ̈bø, bødhi lɑ̈b nyii pyëjø yi en kinni gwøg-ɑ ngø? Pug nyii göönyø kinni ngɑn-ɑ cwɑ̈jii cinge rɑɑj?" 
Isaiah45:10 Dɑ ngɑn pɑ̈nyi wïye geki meye ki köbbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ gwøgu yɑn kinnï?”" 
Isaiah45:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, ngɑn-ɑ pyël gïg-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø okööbø kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki ngɑn pyënyi yi wun kipe nyigɑ, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ pɑ köbbi yi wun ki gïn-ɑ gwøgɑ!" 
Isaiah45:12 Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́gwøg piny, ɑcwɑ̈jɑ ji kipe kinni o ge bëëd gen kì yije. Mɑl ɑ́pedhɑ ki tegɑ; yɑn ɑ mïdhi cɑ̈ng kí dwɑ̈y kí kyell."
