Isaiah45:13 Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ɑ́tug Körec, o gwøge gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ, o jɑmmì tyenye. Yëth-ɑ cyɑ̈dhe bënn ógwøgɑ gɑ óbödh. Yerusɑlem, kɑɑlɑ ódøøg yi en ki gerø, kɑ jiɑ gønye kì yethi töjjì. Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kïrii wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́ngewii kipe gwøgi gïnɑni.” Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Isaiah45:14 Isrɑil ɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈r Rïp, kí kɑ̈ɑ̈r Kuc óbëëd gɑ møgí; o jøg-ɑ bɑ̈rrø kì Sebɑ̀ óbëëd gɑ bɑ̈nggí; ge ólugi kì bɑngí gɑ ɑtwöj ki ɑ́cwecwel. Ri gen óbøødh gen bølí, kɑ ge oyïëyø kinni, ‘Yï wun dɑ Jwøk kidyër, e kete ɑ bɑ Jwøk." 
Isaiah45:15 Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ nyi yiel jie, bɑ Jwøng-ɑ nyi kɑn ree." 
Isaiah45:16 Tyëng-ɑ göögø ki ngïjjì óyɑ̈r bënn; óbong dhwɑ̈ng kì yï gen bënn. 
Isaiah45:17 De Isrɑil bɑ ɑyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ócög e otyɑ̈mø gïti ɑtheer; tyëng Isrɑil koo jɑ̈ddi ki dhwɑ̈ng.’ ” 
Isaiah45:18 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl; bene en ɑ bɑ Jwøk! En ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j piny ki bëën-ɑ bëëde, gø ɑ́gwøge e teeg o pɑ rënyi. Gø nuti gwøøg en e wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø yøw, de gø ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ keny bëëd yi ji. En ɑ kööbø kinni, “Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bong jwøg megø." 
Isaiah45:19 Yɑ nuti kööb ɑ gød, wɑlɑ̀ møgɑ nuti kɑnnø yi yɑn. Tyëng Isrɑil nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni yɑb gen yɑn kì yij pɑ̈l me bong ji. Yɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yɑ nyi kømm-ɑ dyër, gïn-ɑ dyër nyi wëggɑ’ yodø.”" 
Isaiah45:20 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bïu cøng wun ri wun, wu tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø; wun ɑ ɑ́bodh kì bɑng pɑ̈ɑ̈dhi pönh-ɑ dwøng; bï wun o gøøny wun lidh! Tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli ngïjj-ɑ ógwøgø gɑ yɑdh, o ge mɑll-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑ cuggi yieli gen, ge bɑ ji mø bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi gen kinni tek." 
Isaiah45:21 Bïu kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun gønyyi wun burø; wiy tyëng-ɑ cwɑg ri gen kööb gen keti gen. Á men ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøbbi cwöbi gïgɑni cøn? Pɑth ki yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ nyi yiel jie? Bong jwøg megø." 
Isaiah45:22 “Dwöög wun yïɑ ɑnɑn, o wu bødh wun, wun ɑ tyëng kömi piny bënn. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ nud yɑ ketɑ." 
Isaiah45:23 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ge ógwøgɑ bɑ dyër, o pɑ cuggi wilø. Yɑ ɑ́köngi ki riɑ kinni; dhɑnhø bëne óbï kɑ ree bøødhe bølɑ, kɑ ge óköngø kinni møgɑ ómïdhi yi gen." 
Isaiah45:24 “Ge ókööbø kinni bɑ kì riɑ yɑ ketɑ ɑ cuggi tyɑ̈mø geki tegø ki yodø, de tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn bënn, ge óyɑ̈r ki mendwøng." 
Isaiah45:25 Kwɑrri Yɑgob óyielɑ bënn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; o yɑ ólenhi yi gen." 
Isaiah46:1 “Men bene rumi jwöggi Bɑbïl! Bel geki Nebö ɑ́bëëd ge omɑllø cøn, de ɑnɑn ge ɑ́cïb kömi ɑderr, ge ɑ́göög ki møg toor lɑ̈yy-ɑ pïdø." 
Isaiah46:2 Ngïjjɑni ri gen pɑ yiel yi gen, ge ɑ́mɑg kɑ ge tëër kun megø. Men bene rumi jwöggi Bɑbïl!" 
Isaiah46:3 “Lïngu møgɑ wu kwɑrri Yɑgob, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli jiɑ. Wu ɑ́korrɑ ki kër-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl wun." 
Isaiah46:4 Yɑ bɑ jwøøg wun, o wu ókorri yi yɑn, gïti keny-ɑ ódøngi wun kɑ wɑ̈thi wun mɑg yi wɑ́r. Wu ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ yi yɑn, o wu ókor yi yɑn, wu ókøny yi yɑn kɑ wu dømɑ." 
Isaiah46:5 “Yɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi wun kɑ men? Dɑ ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yɑn? 
Isaiah46:6 Teedø pødhhi gen nyii yiebø yi gen kɑ ge kuny-ɑ wɑ̈g ki dhɑb; kɑ dhɑmɑni røm ki midhɑn. Kɑ ge okïrø ki bødhø men thɑ̈dhø ki jwøg, codhe o ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bøli jwøngɑni o gø mɑl gen!" 
Isaiah46:7 Nyii byelø yi gen, kɑ gø kɑ̈l gen, kɑ nyi cöög-ɑ keny-ɑ cïbii yi gen, o pɑ cuggi nyegø kete kì kenyɑni. Ke kwɑjjii yi dhɑnhø pɑ löggi, o pɑ cuggi yïëdø ki rɑj." 
Isaiah46:8 “Nyi pɑrri wun møg wun ɑ tyëngorøg, nennu gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn." 
Isaiah46:9 Pɑrri wun gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn; kɑ wu yïëy wun kinni bene yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ Jwøk o bong jwøg me ni yɑn. 
Isaiah46:10 Gïg-ɑ óbï ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ ki kwøbø kɑ̈ge dööng, gïg-ɑ ócwöb ɑ́kwøbɑ cøn. Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni gïg-ɑ dwɑddɑ gwøgø pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji, gïg-ɑ dwɑddɑ gwøgø nyi gwøgɑ’ gwøgø ceth." 
Isaiah46:11 Yɑ cwøll-ɑ jɑl megø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl; ócwøøy piny ni ótïngø o gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwirɑ gɑ møg gwøg, gwøge. Yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb, o ge bɑ møg gwøg ceth." 
Isaiah46:12 “Lïngu møgɑ, wu tyëng-ɑ muddi wun teeg, wu tyëng-ɑ rumø i tyɑ̈mø nudd e lɑ̈wi." 
Isaiah46:13 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tyɑ̈mø ɑ́nyïïg yi yɑn pɑ lɑ̈wi kinni tek. Medi pyëw-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi tyɑ̈m-ɑ muujɑ pɑ cwööng. Yerusɑlem óyiel yi yɑn, kɑ mɑ̈rɑ cïbɑ Isrɑil.”" 
Isaiah47:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bïí piny kì wïj kwømí, Bɑbïl, kɑ yï pëggí piny yij tør. Yï ɑ́bëëd yï nɑ nyɑnɑjur me nuti nywɑlø yi jɑlø; kɑɑl me nuti mɑgø, de dëlí pɑ nudd e yööm! Anɑn yï bɑ bɑ̈ng!" 
Isaiah47:2 Kwɑny pil! Gur ɑwɑj! Yɑl thɑrɑ̀ kì wïjí! Luny ógudh-ɑ myëër ek wɑ̈g! Yøy ócyëní o nɑm lwød yi yïn! 
Isaiah47:3 Yï ólidh yi ji yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, yï ólidh yi gen wïjí lɑ̈ɑ̈yø, o yï yɑ̈rø. Gøølɑ ócolɑ, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ójog yɑn.”" 
Isaiah47:4 Wɑ døm-ɑ yi kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil, nyinge bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø." 
Isaiah47:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ Bɑbïl kinni, “Pëggí piny yï okudø kì yij muudhø; yï pɑ cigi cwøllø këti yïn ɑ́ nyirɑ̈ɑ̈dh pödhh!" 
Isaiah47:6 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki jiɑ, kɑ ge mïdhɑ de ge ce pɑth kɑ jiɑ. Ge ɑ́cïbɑ cingí, o pyëwí nuti lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gen, cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ bɑ ywödhh, ge nuti wøør yïn." 
Isaiah47:7 Yï ɑ́rum ce yï ócög yïn ɑ́ nyirɑ̈dh ceth, o møgɑni nuti gɑmø yi pyëwí, wɑlɑ̀ yï nuti rumø kinni ge ócög kidï." 
Isaiah47:8 “Lïng ɑnɑn, yï ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr medi pyëw, yï orumø ce kejí døøj, o bong gïn nywɑl yïn. Yï okööbø ce yï dwøng ni Jwøk, o bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yïn. Yï ɑ́rum ce yï koo göögø ki thwöm, o nyigí koo thøw." 
Isaiah47:9 De yï ópɑ̈ɑ̈y piny yi gïgɑni ryeet ge ócwöb kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. Cɑgg yï thëdhø, jɑlgølí óthøw ceth geki nyigí." 
Isaiah47:10 “Yï ɑ́pëgg-ɑ be gøggi rɑjjí; wïjí ɑ́kïïdh yï okööbø ce bong ngɑn nenni yi yïn. Yï ɑ́tööng pɑ̈l yi peli wïjí geki dïdí, kɑ rií ti ki köbbø kinni, ‘Yɑ bɑ Jwøk, bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yɑn.’" 
Isaiah47:11 Ryɑ̈g óbï kömí, o yï pɑ yiel yi thyëdh. Rɑ̈jø óceg ì buk kì kömí, kɑ yï órënyø ki rënyø me nuti rømmø yi yïn!" 
Isaiah47:12 Mïdhí yɑdhí kí wɑ̈llí; ge ɑ́bëëd ge ogöögø yi yïn kër-ɑ ɑ́wöní yï thiinh. Yï ókøny yi gen mɑwɑnø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn obwøgø yi yïn." 
Isaiah47:13 Bong gïn lwɑ̈ng yi yïn ki gwøgø cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ cïïj yïn. Wiy yï yiel yi ɑ́jwöggí møg-ɑ nyi rɑ̈ngø ki kyell, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi nenni bëëdi kyell kɑ yij mɑl nyi rɑnggi gen, kɑ yï nyi köbbi gen kì dwɑ̈ɑ̈n kí dwɑ̈ɑ̈n ki gïn-ɑ ócwöb kiperí." 
Isaiah47:14 “Ge óbëëd ge nɑ wél, ge órɑ̈b yi mɑc! Ri gen koo yiel yi gen; mɑnyɑni óbëëd e lëëdh cɑrø, pɑ pɑ̈r ki mɑny-ɑ nyi wöj." 
Isaiah47:15 Bene gïndøj men-ɑ ógöggi yïn, yi tyëng-ɑ nyi rɑ̈ngø ki ngïjji piny kì yethi kyell, ji-ɑ ɑ́wöni ge gögg-ɑ yïn. Yï ówiy gen piny kɑ men ókedhø ki yuue, o bong ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ódöng, o yï di yiele.”" 
Isaiah48:1 Lïngu møg wu tyëng Isrɑil, wun ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Yeudɑ̀; wun ɑ nyi köngi ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu okööbø ce wu mɑll-ɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, de møgɑni pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l pëthi wun, o wu pɑ kømmi dyër." 
Isaiah48:2 O men-ɑ́ wun, wu tɑ̈dø, wu pwöd-ɑ köthi wun ce wu bɑ tyëng kɑɑl kwër, kí kinni wu kor-ɑ yi Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Isaiah48:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ Isrɑil kinni, “Gïg-ɑ ócwöb ɑ́rum ki kwøbø yi yɑn kɑ̈ge dööng; codhe ɑwëggɑ gen cwöbø." 
Isaiah48:4 Ábëëd e ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni muní ótëngi ni ngyënyø dødø, kɑ wïjí ótëngø ni dilɑl." 
Isaiah48:5 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́kwøbɑ gïg-ɑ ócwöb kiperí gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑ́kwøbɑ e bøli kej cwöbi gen nuti bëënø, kipe yï ókööbø kinni i bɑ ngïjji jwöggí ɑ wëggi gen cwöbø." 
Isaiah48:6 “Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ bënn ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn; yïëëy ceth kinni møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ ki kwøbø ɑ́bï gɑ dyër. Anɑn yï óköbbɑ ki møg nyɑ̈n møg-ɑ óbï, gïg mø nuti yɑɑl yɑn cøn." 
Isaiah48:7 Ge wëggɑ’ cwöbø ɑnɑn kete, bong gïn ni menɑni mɑ ɑ́cwöb kɑ̈ge dööng. Ke di bëëd e dɑ gïn ni menɑni mø cwöbø cøn, yï di kööb kinni ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn." 
Isaiah48:8 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni yï pɑth ki ngɑn ngɑ̈dh, yï ngɑ̈nyɑ ceth yïn ɑ́ ngeti pëëmø. Bene ɑ bɑnge cöög møgɑni nuti lïngø yi yïn kinni tek, ɑ bëëd e bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́lïngi yi yïn kì ri gen." 
Isaiah48:9 “De linyɑ ónwöngɑ, kɑ pyëwɑ mɑgɑ, kipe kinni o yɑ ólenhi yi ji." 
Isaiah48:10 Yï ɑ́rɑng yi yɑn kɑ mɑc, ni kenyi leeny ɑ́tegø ki mɑc. De yï ɑ́yodɑ yï bong perí." 
Isaiah48:11 Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn gwøgɑ kɑ per kwöngɑ. Nyingɑ pɑ wëggɑ rënyø, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn nywɑg wøn mɑ̈rɑ; mɑ̈rɑni bɑ mi nyingɑ yɑ ketɑ.”" 
Isaiah48:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïngí møgɑ yïn ɑ Isrɑil, wun ɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́cwöölɑ! Yɑ bɑ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ mɑl, ɑ cyɑ̈n, ɑ bɑ Jwøk kete!" 
Isaiah48:13 Cinggɑ ɑ ɑ́gwøg tyelli piny, kɑ mɑl pedhɑ. Kɑ̀ cwöölɑ mɑl geki piny, ge ceg-ɑ bëën bølɑ ceth." 
Isaiah48:14 “Cung wun ri wun, kɑ wu lïng wun bënn! Á men kì kelli ngïjji jwöggɑni ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni jɑl-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Bɑbïl, kɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ gwøg yi en." 
Isaiah48:15 Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́kööb; yɑn ɑ ɑ́cwöölii, kɑ peejɑ be tyɑ̈mø." 
Isaiah48:16 “Nyïngu butɑ, lïngu møg. Yɑ ɑ́kööb e bong gïn kɑn yi yɑn kì ri cɑ̈gø ceth, kɑ kwøbbɑ nyi wëggɑ bëënø gɑ dyër ceth.” (Anɑn yɑ ɑ́thödhi yi Wë, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tege, kɑ yɑ öre.)" 
Isaiah48:17 Kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ yiel yïn okööbø kinni, “Bene yɑn Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi pwönyi yïn o yï dönyí, o yï nyudhe yuu-ɑ kedh yi yïn." 
Isaiah48:18 “Keløg ciggɑ di lïngi yi yïn yøw! Gyëdh di mulli kömí ni nɑm men pɑ dwön! Yï di bɑ̈bbi piny kɑ yï otyɑ̈mø ni ɑpɑng-ɑ nyi göjji wɑ̈g. 
Isaiah48:19 Kwɑrrí di bëëd ge nɑ tør, o bong gïn di ryɑ̈g gen.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Kedhu wɑ̈g kì Bɑbïl, kedh wun wu ótɑ̈bbø! Kɑ̈llu wöödø wu óryeerø kì yethi kɑ̈jj bënn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ̈nge Isrɑil ɑ́yiele!”" 
Isaiah48:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lle jie kì yij ryɑng-ɑ lëëdh, ɑ thwøwø thwøwø, bong röödhø mɑ ɑ́mɑg gen. Pï ɑ́wëgge bëën wɑ̈g kì yij kït kiper gen; kït ɑ́kɑge kɑ pï rïng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yije." 
Isaiah48:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bong gïn yiel tyëngorøg.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Lïngu møgɑ, wu pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi, wu ji-ɑ bëëdø kì kun lɑ̈wi! Yɑ ɑ́myeg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ nuti nywølø, kɑ yɑ kwɑnye yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈nge." 
Isaiah49:2 Kɑ kwøbbi dhøgɑ løge møg bedh ni pilø, kɑ yɑ kongge. Yɑ gwøge yɑ nɑ nyɑɑr weth, me bedh, o nenn-ɑ göjjø." 
Isaiah49:3 Yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Isrɑil, yï bɑ bɑ̈ngɑ, yɑ ólenhi yi ji kiperí.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́göög, dɑ́ ngø ɑ ɑ́yodɑ kì bɑng gwøngɑni! Yɑ ɑ́göög ki tegɑ, de bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́lwɑ̈ngɑ ki gwøgø.” De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógɑ̈nnɑ kinni perɑ ónyɑge; yɑ ókøøg yi en kipe gïn-ɑ gwøgɑ." 
Isaiah49:5 Yɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ nudd yɑ ying-ɑ yij; yɑ ɑ́kwɑnye yɑn ɑ́ bɑ̈nge, o yɑ dwöögɑ jie, o yɑ dwöögɑ tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ tɑɑyø. Yɑ ɑ́nëngi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhwɑ̈ng, kɑ yɑ thödhe ki tegø." 
Isaiah49:6 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Dɑ tïj men mëggɑ yïn, bɑ̈ngɑ. Yï koo dwöög-ɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Isrɑil kete, kí tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́bodh; de yï ɑ́gwøøgɑ yïn ɑ́ cɑr kipe pödhh-ɑ kyeelø; kipe kinni o kömi piny yiel bëne.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Jwøk kwërø, yïëni Isrɑil köbb-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ cedh ki menteg, ɑ mɑɑn yi pödhh, o bɑ bɑ̈ng jɑgg, kinni, “Yï ólidh yi rɑ̈nhì yï bɑ ɑgøny; rɑ̈nhì óbï kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bølí; gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen ólidh yi nyiirɑ̈dhh, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen bølí thyew.” Møgɑni ócwöb mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ̈nge ɑ́myege, kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil, gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe nyi gwøge’ gwøgø." 
Isaiah49:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej yieli wun, mø wun ólïngɑ o kwɑ̈jji wun ólïngɑ kɑ wu yielɑ. Wu ókorrɑ kɑ wu konggɑ, kɑ wø olwöbø ki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kì rií. Yï ówëggɑ døøgø ki pëggi pinyí, eni piny-ɑ dööng nøw ɑnɑn." 
Isaiah49:9 Amɑgg óköbbɑ kinni, ‘Kedh wun, wu ɑ́gøny!’ Kɑ tyëng-ɑ yij muudhø köbbɑ kinni, ‘Bï wun wɑ̈g yij cɑr!’ Ge óni dyëg møg cyɑ̈mø kì wïj kwøømø," 
Isaiah49:10 ge koo mɑg yi kɑ̈j wɑlɑ̀ röödhø. Ge koo nɑ̈g yi lëdhi cɑ̈ng geki lëdhi ryɑng, mɑ́ ge ópyejj-ɑ yi ngɑn mɑɑr gen. Gï ópeeje kömi nɑ̈mmì møg rïngi yi pï." 
Isaiah49:11 “Yɑ ógöögø ki yuu wëll me bɑ̈ɑ̈n kïttì, kɑ yɑ ogöögø ki yöö men yije cyɑ̈dhi yi jiɑ." 
Isaiah49:12 Jiɑ óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun me lɑ̈wi, kwï gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, kí wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Aswɑn, kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Wöör yïn ɑ mɑl! Ryeer yi medi pyëw yïn ɑ piny! Wiy kïttì gönyi gen ki wör! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ókøny yi en; pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki jie møg-ɑ rɑngø. 
Isaiah49:14 De tyëng Yerusɑlem ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Wɑ ɑ́wïl kì wïje!”" 
Isaiah49:15 Codhe, ɑlöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ányödø nyɑre ócuggø wïlø kì wïje kɑ nyɑɑr yije ocögø gø pɑ mɑɑre? Cɑgg ɑ́nyödø wïje wïl ki nyɑre, wu pɑ wïl kì wïjɑ." 
Isaiah49:16 Wïjɑ pɑ wïl ki yïn, Yerusɑlem! Nyingí ɑ́gweedɑ yethi cinggɑ." 
Isaiah49:17 “Tyëng-ɑ ódøøg yïn ki gerø ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki bëënø, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rënyi yïn ókedh." 
Isaiah49:18 Lïïdh bɑdhhí kɑ gïn-ɑ cwöb liidh! Jií cong-ɑ ri gen; ge ceg-ɑ bëën yïí! Yɑn ɑ köngi èn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, yï óbëëd yï ótøllø kipe jií, ni kenyi tølli nyɑdhɑy nywöm kipe tigge." 
Isaiah49:19 “Isrɑil, pödhí ɑ́rënyi kɑ döng-ɑ nøw, de ógöögø e dhiing ɑnɑn; yi ji-ɑ dwöög be bëëdø kì yije. O tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rënyi yïn ge ókïdhi kun me lɑ̈wi." 
Isaiah49:20 Jií møg-ɑ dwöög kì yïnø, yï óköbbi yi gen cyɑ̈ng megø kinni, ‘Piny men thiinh cɑrø, wø dwɑdd-ɑ keny lɑj me bëëd yi wøn!’" 
Isaiah49:21 Codhe, o rií köbbí kinni, ‘Á men ɑ ɑ́nyölli yɑn nywøl møg bënn? Nyigɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kɑ yɑ odöngø yïɑ bong nywøl. Yɑ ɑ́kïdhi yïnø; ɑ́ men ɑ ɑ́pidh nywøl møg? Yɑ ɑ́wiy yɑ ketɑ, nywøl møg ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie kinni, “Cingɑ ótïngɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o nyigi wun dwöög pɑc yi gen." 
Isaiah49:23 Rɑ̈nhì óbëëd ge nɑ wëëg kì yï wun; kɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈nhì nɑ mëëg kì yi wun. Ri gen óbøødh gen bøli wun kɑ wu wør yi gen, ge ógöögø ni mööl yi kɑ wør gen wun. Codhe o yod yi wun kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn nenni kønyø yi yɑn, wïje pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈y.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi jöd kì yij liny ócuggø kwɑnyø? Amɑgg ócuggø kwɑnyø kì cingi jɑgø mɑ ɑ́muddi ji? 
Isaiah49:25 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggi kinni, “Bene gïn-ɑ ócwöb ɑnɑn ceth. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg kì yij liny ókɑ̈l, o jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi jɑng-ɑ bɑ ɑ́muddi ji ókwɑny kì yïe. Yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki ngɑn-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn, o nyigí óyiel yi yɑn kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Isaiah49:26 Tyëng-ɑ guud wɑngí ógöjjɑ nɑ̈gi ri gen, wɑ̈thi gen ówïïnø yi rem. Codhe o yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ yiel wun, en ɑ gööny wun wɑ̈g kì yethi töjjì. Óyod yi gen kinni bene yɑn Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ teg.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu orumø kinni jiɑ ryeem yɑn ni kenyi tɑ̈ɑ̈ng nyɑndhɑjø yi jɑlø? De wɑ̈nyi tɑ̈ng ying-ɑ keny? Wu orumø kinni wu ɑ́ceg yi yɑn kɑ ngeew wɑ̈g, ni jɑl me ngeew nyige gɑ bɑ̈ngg? Pɑth, wu ɑ́kɑ̈l wu bɑ ɑmɑgg kɑ gööj orøøg wun. Wu ɑ́køøl yïnø kɑ per rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun." 
Isaiah50:2 “Á kipe ngø ɑ bɑɑny yɑn ki ywöörø yi jiɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ be yieli gen? Gede ɑ ɑ́bɑny gen yïëyø keny-ɑ ɑ́cwølɑ gen? Yɑ ceg-ɑ nyøødhø ge pɑ cuggi yielø yi yɑn? Nɑɑm omelø ócuggø thwøwø yi kwøbbi dhøgɑ, kɑ nɑ̈mm-ɑ rïngi løgɑ ryɑng, kɑ rij othøø kì yethi gen yi kɑ̀ bëëde e bong pï." 
Isaiah50:3 Mɑl ócuggø gwøgø yi yɑn e looj e ce ywøg-ɑ thøø.” 
Isaiah50:4 Yɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki møg-ɑ ókwøbɑ, kipe kinni o yɑ cïjɑ ngɑn köme di ɑkørr. Pyëwɑ nyi wëgge’ okøn kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng ki lïngi møg-ɑ pwönye yɑn." 
Isaiah50:5 Yɑ ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dïdø, o yɑ nuti pëmø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑ̈jɑ nuti lugi yɑn en." 
Isaiah50:6 Kömɑ ɑ́yɑ̈llɑ tyëng-ɑ pwöd yɑn, ge nuti kyëddi yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́gwɑddi yɑn yi gen, yɑ nuti löggø keny-ɑ ɑ́punhi yëyyi tïgɑ yi gen, kɑ ge ngudd-ɑ nyingɑ ki lɑ́ɑ̀w." 
Isaiah50:7 De pyëwɑ nuti rënyø yi ɑgwɑddi gen, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́køny yi Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ yɑ ocögø yɑ pɑ wïyi ki dyëjø, mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni yɑ koo yɑ̈r," 
Isaiah50:8 mɑ́ Jwøk cyɑ̈gi kì butɑ, o ónyodh yi en kinni yïɑ bɑ̈r. Dɑ ngɑn cuggi gøønyi yɑn? Wiy wø kedhi wøn burø ki en, kɑ wiy kwøbe gønye!" 
Isaiah50:9 Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́cwɑg yɑn, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi nyodhi kinni yɑ bɑ̈jjø? Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gøøny yɑn ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny bënn, ge órënyi ni ógønh-ɑ ócɑmø yi rob." 
Isaiah50:10 Wu tyëng-ɑ wør Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn, lïngu kwøbbi bɑ̈nge. Yuu-ɑ yije kɑ̈lli yi wun ócuggø bëëdø ɑ́ muudhø kidyër, de ngɑ̈dhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ̈gi wun kì ri Jwøøg wun." 
Isaiah50:11 Wu tyëng-ɑ tuumø kipe rënyi tyëngmøøgø, wu óryɑ̈g-ɑ yi gïg-ɑ rømmi yi wun kipe göggi tyëngɑni. Møgɑni ówëggi cwöbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree; wu óthøw wu orɑngø." 
Isaiah51:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïngu møgɑ, wu tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi yielø, wu tyëng-ɑ bï yïɑ be kønyø. Rømmu kït men-ɑ́ ree ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun, eni bur men-ɑ́ yije ɑ́kuuny wun kì yij kït." 
Isaiah51:2 Rømmu kweyi wun, Abrɑhɑm, kí Sɑrɑ̀ ɑ́ ree ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wun. Abrɑhɑm ɑ́bëëd yïe bong nyir keny-ɑ ɑ́cwølɑ en, de ɑ́gyëdhɑ kɑ nëngɑ ki nywøl, kɑ kwɑrre gwøgɑ ge gïïr." 
Isaiah51:3 “Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki Yerusɑlem, kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yethi ɑruggì kì yije piny bɑ ryɑng. Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ göög pinye ɑ́ ryɑng, ógwøg yi yɑn ɑ́ bɑg, óbëëd e nɑ bɑng-ɑ ɑ́pidhɑ kì Eden. Medi pyëw óløg me nud kì yije, kɑ yɑ pøjji yɑ olenhø ki wör." 
Isaiah51:4 “Lïngu kwøbbɑ, wun ɑ jiɑ, lïngu møg-ɑ kwøbɑ; mɑ́ pödhh ceg-ɑ yi yɑn, ge ónëngi ki cɑr yi ciggɑ." 
Isaiah51:5 Yɑ ójwɑn bëën be yieli gen, bøli keny-ɑ tyɑ̈ɑ̈mɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ójɑɑg pödhh. Pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi nenn-ɑ bëënɑ, ge yïdø ge ongɑ̈dhø kinni ge óyiel yi yɑn ceth." 
Isaiah51:6 Lidh wun mɑl, kɑ piny lidh wun; mɑl ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny ni yïrø, piny órënyi ni ógødh kenyi døngi kɑ̈ge, o jie óthøw bënn ni lwɑngì. De yïëdø men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïɑ gït-ɑ ɑtheer." 
Isaiah51:7 “Lïngu møg, wu tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi dyër, wu tyëng-ɑ ciggɑ ócïb yethi pëthi gen. Pëthi wun ko nyi lïngi kenyi dhɑ̈ɑ̈l wun kɑ wu gwɑddi yi teedø," 
Isaiah51:8 mɑ́ ge ócɑm yi rob ni ógødh, kɑ ge cɑm yi lyedø ni yëyy. De yïënɑ gït-ɑ ɑtheer, o tyɑ̈mɑ tyëg-ɑ rïj bënn.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Dhwöödh Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wø køny! Göög tegí, kɑ wø yieel, göög ki tengɑni ni kɑ ɑ́göögí kɑ̈ge dööng cøn. Bɑ yïn ɑ ɑ́kebbi Lebiyɑthɑn lɑ̈y-ɑ ditïngdïr." 
Isaiah51:10 Bɑ yïn thyew ɑ ɑ́wëggi nɑɑm omelø dwönø, kɑ yï ogöögø ki yöö men bɑ̈ɑ̈n pï, o ji-ɑ yiel yi yïn kɑ̈l gen yij yuuɑni." 
Isaiah51:11 Ji-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi yïn ódøøg Yerusɑlem pëthi gen omedø, ge owörø, ge óryeerø yi medi pëëth. Ge óbëëd pëthi gen med; ge pɑ ywöngi o ge pɑ kïïmø gïti ɑtheer." 
Isaiah51:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́nëngi wun ki tegø. Á kipe ngø ɑ böggu dhɑnhø ɑ nyi thøw, e nɑ lum ɑ pɑ nyi cwööng ki thøø?" 
Isaiah51:13 Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø ki Jwøk ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j wun? Eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́pedh mɑl, kɑ tyelli piny tɑ̈ɑ̈ge? Á kipe ngø ɑ cög wu óböggø yi tyëng-ɑ guud nyingi wun? Wu bögg-ɑ rɑ̈ji gen ki tegi gen?" 
Isaiah51:14 Tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki gønyø, ge óbëëdø kì kömi piny ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, o bong gïncɑm men-ɑ ójɑ̈ddi gen." 
Isaiah51:15 “Mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøøg wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑn ɑ nyi öjji nɑɑm omelø, kɑ ɑpɑge nyi wëggɑ ruurø. Nyingɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Isaiah51:16 Yɑn ɑ ɑ́pedh mɑl kɑ tyelli piny tɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ. Yɑ köbb-ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni, ‘Wu bɑ jiɑ! Kwøbbɑ ɑ́pwönyɑ wun kɑ wu korrɑ ki cinggɑ.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Yerusɑlem, cyëëw! Mej rií kɑ yï dhwödhí mɑl! Yï ɑ́rum ki mɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ngi cɑ́y men-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe kinni mɑɑdh; ɑ́mɑdh yi yïn kɑ yï wëgge cyerrø." 
Isaiah51:18 Bong ngɑn pyejji yïn, bong dhɑnhø kì kelli jií men mɑg cingí kɑ yï pyejje." 
Isaiah51:19 Ryɑ̈g me dwøng ɑ́rum ki pɑ̈dhi kömí; pinyí ɑ́rënyi yi liny, kɑ jií ywɑj yi kɑ̈j. Bong ngɑn mɑ pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yïn." 
Isaiah51:20 Nyigí ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r, ge ceg-ɑ pɑ̈nhhø kì yethi yëëth bënn, ge nɑ ɑ́køny men-ɑ ómɑgø yi wunn. Tegi rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lidh yi gen." 
Isaiah51:21 Wu tyëng-ɑ rɑngø kì Yerusɑlem, wu cyerri nɑ tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø." 
Isaiah51:22 Wu ócwɑg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ókööbø kinni, “Óthɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø kì yïí. Yï koo cigi mɑ̈dhø ki møng-ɑ nyi wëggi yïn cyerrø." 
Isaiah51:23 Óthɑ̈ngɑni ómëggɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud wɑngí; mëggɑ’ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́göjji yïn buddø kì piny kì yethi yëëth, kɑ yï nyøn gen, de yï nɑ tuggì.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Yerusɑlem, dhwöödh! Dhwöödh! Løny ógødhí, ógønh-ɑ myër rií! Ji-ɑ kwïj Jwøk pɑ kedhi yij dörí këti." 
Isaiah52:2 Gøny rií kì yethi töjjì, Yerusɑlem! Dhwöödh kì yij tør, kɑ yï pëggí wïj kwømí. Pɑ̈ɑ̈d wun ɑcebbì wɑ̈g kì muddi wun, wu tyëng Dhɑyøn møg-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg!" 
Isaiah52:3 Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́göög wun ki bɑ̈ngg, bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́ngeew wun; bong gïjø men-ɑ ócol thyew ɑ́ men gøøny wun." 
Isaiah52:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhu Rïp be bëëdø wun ɑ́ wëdhh, wu ɑ́kedh kɑ wɑ̈thi wun. Wu ɑ́kɑ̈l kɑ tegø thyew yi tyëng Acuur, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́col yi gen." 
Isaiah52:5 Gïn ni menɑni ɑ ɑ́cwöb ɑnɑn kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, wu bɑ ɑmɑgg, o bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́col yi gen kiper wun. Tyëng-ɑ jɑɑg wun törr-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen ki ɑjyedh, o ge beny-ɑ yɑn yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Isaiah52:6 Óyod yi wun kì bøli keny megø kinni bene yɑn Jwøk, o yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb ki wun.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Døøj nɑ ngø, eni lidhi jɑlwöödø, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kelli kïtti, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöödø me med, wööni mër! Bï-ɑ be köbbi Dhɑyøn kinni, “Jwøgí bɑ rɑ̈dh!”" 
Isaiah52:8 Tyëng-ɑ kor kɑɑldwøng óryeerø, ge ryeer-ɑ́ɑ̀ wïj ɑ́kyel ki medi pëëth! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j onennø yi gen ki nyingi gen kɑ̀ dwööge Dhɑyøn!" 
Isaiah52:9 Ryeer wun ki medi pëëth, wun ɑ ɑruggi Yerusɑlem! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑɑle, kɑɑldwøng ódøme kɑ jie wëgge ywömø." 
Isaiah52:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógöög-ɑ tege kwërø; jie óyiel yi en, kɑ kömi piny bëne ólïdhø." 
Isaiah52:11 Dhwödh wun! Dhwödh wun kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, wu tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli jɑmmi kwër mø kengø! Wu ko nywɑ̈ddi ki gïn ywëdhø, kwër wun ri wun kɑ wu kedh wun ceth." 
Isaiah52:12 Wu koo yöllø kipe wɑ̈dh, mɑ́ wu pɑ ceg pɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Wu ópyejj-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun, o wu ókorre kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Isaiah52:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bɑ̈ngɑ tïje ɑ́tyëge kidøøj, kɑ wør ki mendwøng." 
Isaiah52:14 Ji mø gïïr dëlli gen ɑ́juur keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh ge gøn cøn, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd e ce pɑ nënni ɑ́ dhɑnhø yi kɑ órënyi bøle." 
Isaiah52:15 De ɑnɑn pödhh mø gïïr óngɑ̈ng keny-ɑ ólidhii yi gen, rɑ̈nhì dhøggi gen óngɑm, keny-ɑ ólïdhi gen ki gïjø me nuti pɑ̈nyø’ köbbi gen, kɑ gïjø me nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø yi gen gɑm yi wɑ̈thi gen.”" 
Isaiah53:1 Kɑ teedø ólöggø kinni, “Á men ɑ yïëy møg-ɑ dwøg yi wøn ek? Á men ɑ cuggi lidhi kej cingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri møgɑni?" 
Isaiah53:2 Bɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, o bɑ̈nge dønge ni yɑdh me byerre niyeeng piny. Yïe ɑ́bong-ɑ døøjø kí dhwɑ̈ng, mø per gen di wør wɑ en. Bong gïjø me pere di tyeerii bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́wëggi wɑ tyeri nyegi bute." 
Isaiah53:3 Ábɑny yi ji kɑ benyi yi gen; ɑ́rɑngi kɑ okïïmø e ceg-ɑ ngïnø. Bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi lïïdh yïe, ɑ́wøy yi ji de ce bong-ɑ keje." 
Isaiah53:4 “De orɑngɑni ɑ́ngine, eni orɑng-ɑ di rɑngi wɑ. Wɑ ɑ́rum kinni orɑng-ɑ rɑnge bɑ cɑ́y mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøk." 
Isaiah53:5 De bɑ gööj orøgee ɑ ɑ́yïdde ki kedø, ɑ́pwöd kɑ per rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ. Wɑ ɑ́bødh kì bɑng cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́ngine, dëllee ɑ́yöni kì bɑng pwön-ɑ ɑ́pwöödii." 
Isaiah53:6 Wɑ bënn, wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ nɑ dyëg møg lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø, men twɑ̈l-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈ye. De cɑ́y ɑ́gøøj köme yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni cɑ́y-ɑ di bëëd gɑ møgee." 
Isaiah53:7 “Ágöggi gïjø me rɑj, de gø ɑ́ngine ki möölø, dhøge nuti pɑ̈ny en ki tugø. Ábëëd e nɑ órömø men kïdhi be ngɑlø, nɑ dyel rømø kì bøli ngɑn nyɑr yëyye, nuti pɑ̈nyi löggø." 
Isaiah53:8 Ámɑg kɑ cɑy ki thøø, kɑ kïdhi be nɑ̈gø, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́nyɑg keje. Ánɑ̈g kɑ per orøøg jiee." 
Isaiah53:9 Röre ɑ́cïb kelli rörri tyëngrijjø, ɑ́koony kelli tyëng kɑ̈rì, ngö e bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gwøøge, o bong pyed mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l dhøge.”" 
Isaiah53:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ádwɑdd-ɑ yi yɑn kinni rɑnge, thøw ɑ́ gëëdhi men gøøm orøøg tyëng-ɑ kyeelø. Óbëëdø ki døøjø kɑ kwɑrre lidhe; óbëëdø kì kömi piny ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r o gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ, gwøgɑ kì ree." 
Isaiah53:11 Ódøøg ki yïddø ki medi pyëw kì bɑng orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑnge, o óyod yi en kinni orɑnge dɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́nywøle. Bɑ̈ngɑ, bɑ̈ng-ɑ dyër, ngɑn-ɑ pyëwɑ med ki en; óngïnø kipe ji mø gïïr, o pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen kipere." 
Isaiah53:12 Ócïbɑ keny wørii, kì kelli tyëng-ɑ døngø, ɑ yï gen di tegø. Wëye ɑ́muuje kɑ kwɑɑn kelli tyëngrijjø. Ree ɑ́gøøme bøli tyëngorøg mø ngenyø, kɑ ókwɑ̈jjø o lɑ́ɑ̀w dwöög piny kiper gen.”" 
Isaiah54:1 Yerusɑlem, yï ɑ́bëëd yï nɑ ngɑndhɑjø me kööre bong nywøl, de ɑnɑn yï ócuggø wör pyëwí omedø. Anɑn yïí ódi nywøl mø ngenyø kibøli ngɑndhɑjø me nuti pɑ̈nyø wiy piny yi jɑlgøle!" 
Isaiah54:2 Lɑny kemɑ̀ men-ɑ yije bëëd yi yïn, gwøg thølle ge bɑ̈rrø, kɑ pijje gwøøg ge teeg." 
Isaiah54:3 Kewí ócøør cyɑ̈n yi yïn kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn; Jií pìnyi gen ódøøg yi gen ki kwɑnyø kì yï tyëng-ɑ kwɑɑny gen ɑnɑn. Kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ wɑ̈dhi bëëdø ɑnɑn, ópɑ̈ng yi ji." 
Isaiah54:4 Yï ko böggi, yï pɑ cigi yɑ̈rø, yï pɑ thɑɑny piny këti. Bëën-ɑ ɑ́kwïj bëëdø yï cer-ɑ dɑ̈ngø ówïl kì wïjí, geki muum-ɑ ɑ́muum, e yïí bong jɑlø." 
Isaiah54:5 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïn óbëëd ɑ́ jɑlgølí nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yï óyiel yi kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil, en ɑ jɑɑg kömi piny bëne." 
Isaiah54:6 Isrɑil, yï nɑ ngɑn cer dɑ̈ngø men-ɑ ówiy piny yije bɑɑrø yi jɑlgøle. De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ɑ́cwööle yïe, ɑ́kööb kinni," 
Isaiah54:7 “Yï ɑ́wiyɑ kɑ nyɑ kɑɑm me nøg, yï dwöögɑ’ dwöögø ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me dwøng." 
Isaiah54:8 Ngɑ̈jɑ ɑ́løgɑ pyëwɑ rɑɑj, kɑ nyɑ keny me nøg yøw, de ɑnɑn yï mɑɑrɑ’ mɑɑrø gïti ɑtheer.” Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn-ɑ døm yïn." 
Isaiah54:9 “Yɑ ɑ́kyëëd kì ri Nöö kinni piny pɑ cigɑ mudø ki bɑɑyø këti. Anɑn yɑ ɑ́kyëëd kinni pyëwɑ pɑ cigi rënyø ki yïn; yï pɑ cyɑ̈r yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ yï pɑ cɑy yi yɑn." 
Isaiah54:10 Kïtt-ɑ døngø kí møg-ɑ thønhø ri gen ómød yi gen, de mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑrɑ yïn pɑ thumi; mër-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kiperí ómïdhɑ ceth.” Bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr yïn." 
Isaiah54:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yerusɑlem, yï kɑɑldwøng, yïn ɑ wïjí cungø yi orɑng, e bong ngɑn lug yïn, yï ódøøgɑ ki gerø ki kïttì møg per gen teg." 
Isaiah54:12 Dörr-ɑ bɑ̈rrø møg-ɑ kur ógërrɑ yïn ki kïttì mø rɑ̈nggø, dhøggi dörí óger yi yɑn ki kïttì mø rɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni mɑc, o dör-ɑ wen yïn gerɑ ki tigg-ɑ per gen teg." 
Isaiah54:13 “Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ópwönyi jií, o ge óthödhɑ ki døøjø kí mër." 
Isaiah54:14 Yï ótëngi yi bëëntir, wɑngí koo guud, wɑlɑ̀ bong gïn-ɑ óböggi yi yïn." 
Isaiah54:15 Ngɑn bï be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí, pɑth ki yɑn ɑ örii, ngɑn nyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Isaiah54:16 “Yɑn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j bødhi ngyënyø, ɑ nyi kudhø ki mɑc kɑ othɑ̈dhø ki jɑmmi liny, yɑn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑl-liny thyew, jɑl-ɑ nɑ̈gø ki ji ki jɑmmi liny møgɑni." 
Isaiah54:17 De bong gïi liny men-ɑ ónyïɑ̈g yïn, ngɑn gøøny yïn, yï óyïddi ki møg løøg kwøbbe. Yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi kiper bɑ̈nggɑ, kɑ ge wëggɑ tyɑ̈mø.” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Isaiah55:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bï wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ri wun di röödhø bënn, pï ɑ keny èn! Bï wun, wu tyëng-ɑ yï wun bong ngyëny, ngëëw wun ki byel kɑ wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun! Bï wun, kɑ wu ngëëw wun ki møgi oløg geki cɑg, bong gïn kɑ̈l yi gen kì yï wun!" 
Isaiah55:2 Á kipe ngø ɑ ngew wun ngyëny gïg-ɑ pɑ yɑ̈ng wun? Ede ngyënyyi gwøøg wun ɑ ngëëw wun gen ki gïncɑm, o wu nudd ri wun dɑ kɑ̈j? Lïngu møgɑ, kɑ gïn-ɑ köbbɑ wun gwøg wun, o wu óyɑ̈ng wun yi gïgcɑmm møg døj." 
Isaiah55:3 “Lïng wun jiɑ, kɑ wu bïu yïɑ; bïu yïɑ o wu yïddi wun ki nënnì! Wɑ ólwöbø ki lwöbø men gïti ɑtheer, kɑ wu mëggɑ gyëdhh-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ge ómëggɑ Debïd." 
Isaiah55:4 Ágwøg yi yɑn ɑ́ jɑgø men pyejji pödhh, kɑ ge nyudhɑ tegɑ kì ree." 
Isaiah55:5 Anɑn yï cwøll-ɑ pödhh mø kwïj yi yïn, o yï ɑ́bëëd yï kwïj yi gen, de ge óbï yïí ge órïngø ɑnɑn. Yɑn yɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil, gïgɑni ówëggɑ cwöbø; yï ónëngɑ ki dhwɑ̈ng geki mɑ̈r.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Døøg wun kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ mɑlli wun, kɑ̀ bëëde e cyɑ̈gi ɑnɑn." 
Isaiah55:7 Wiy bëënrɑj wiy yi tyëngrijjø, kɑ rummi gen wil gen. Døøg gen kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee, pyëwe yöd, pyëwe nyi jwɑn-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈mø." 
Isaiah55:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Rummɑ pɑ pɑ̈r ki rummi wun, o yëth-ɑ göögɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki yëth-ɑ göög yi wun." 
Isaiah55:9 Rummɑ ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli rummi wun, ni kɑɑm mɑl kí piny." 
Isaiah55:10 “Kwøbbɑ nɑ ɑ́piy kí kødh ɑ nyi bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, kɑ piny cɑw yi gen. Kɑ byel otwïyø yi gen, kɑ gïncɑm yod kí köödh møg-ɑ ókɑ̈g." 
Isaiah55:11 Kwøbbɑ bëëd ɑ nøw ceth; gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ kipere pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji, gïn-ɑ pere örɑ en nyi gwøge’ gwøgø ceth." 
Isaiah55:12 “Wu ódhwödh kì Bɑbïl ki medi pëëth, wu ówëggi kedhi wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni ki mër, Kïtt-ɑ døngø kí kïtt-ɑ thønhø ócɑ̈gi ki wör kɑ yenh owörø ge óryeerø ki medi pëthi gen." 
Isaiah55:13 Thïm-ɑ bɑ ɑ́lɑl, ɑ yije pɑ̈ng yi koodh ɑnɑn, keje ótwïy yi yenh sɑndɑl geki óthurø. Menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ ngïji me gïti ɑtheer, ngïji me pɑ̈ddi ji ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie kinni, “Bëëd wun wu gøgg-ɑ dyër, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki yïëdø, o yɑ nyodhɑ bëëdɑ yɑ gøgg-ɑ dyër." 
Isaiah56:2 Tyëng-ɑ nyi mïdhi Sɑbɑth kidøøj ri gen dɑ gyëdh. Tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi göögø ki gïgrijjø ógyëdh yi yɑn.” 
Isaiah56:3 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́rëbi ki jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j koo kööbø kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ koo wëgge mɑ̈ddø kyeel ki jie.” Jɑl-ɑ bɑ órøj koo pɑ̈nyi rumø kinni, mɑ́ e pɑ cuggi nywølø, pɑ cuggi ying kelli jii Jwøk." 
Isaiah56:4 Jɑl-ɑ ni menɑni di köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Keløg yɑ owørø yi yïn ki mïdhi Sɑbɑth, o keløg yï gøgg-ɑ gïg med kì pyëwɑ kɑ ciggɑ mïdhi yi yïn kidøøj," 
Isaiah56:5 nyingí ópɑrri kì Kengɑ geki kelli jiɑ ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, kibøli ke di bëëd yïí dɑ wɑ̈ddí kí nyigí. Yï pɑ pɑ̈nyi wïlø.”" 
Isaiah56:6 O Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ rëbi ki jie, kɑ mɑɑr yi gen kɑ göggi yi gen, kɑ ciggi Sɑbɑth geki lwöbø mïdhi yi gen; gï köbbe’ köbbø kinni," 
Isaiah56:7 “Wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ Dhɑyøn kïti kwërɑ, wu ónëngɑ ki medi pyëw kì øn-ɑ mɑlli yɑn; o gëdhh-ɑ muuj yi wun kì wïj këli lɑm miɑ óyïëy yi yɑn. Kengɑ ócwøl ɑ́ ød mɑ̈ddø, men yije mɑ̈ddi yi jii pödhh bënn.”" 
Isaiah56:8 Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́dwöög jie tyëng Isrɑil kì yïnø, ɑ́kööb kinni ókɑ̈ni kömi gen ki ji møøgø møg rëbi ki gen." 
Isaiah56:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́rum ki köbbø yi en kinni, óöni kömi jie ki pödhh møøgø møg cɑm gen ni kenyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Isaiah56:10 Okööbø kinni, “Pëjjì bënn møg-ɑ di kyëddi jiɑ ge bɑ cörr! Bong gïjø me ngɑ̈nyi yi gen. Ge nɑ gwögg møg kurø, de ge pɑ nyi gwɑ̈yø, ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ buddø kì piny ge ceg-ɑ lɑ̈g. Ge nyi mɑɑr-ɑ nenø!" 
Isaiah56:11 Ge nɑ gwögg møg yethi gen lɑw. Pëjjɑni wɑ̈thi gen bong gïn. Ge bëëdø, men gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ døj kipere kì wɑ̈ye." 
Isaiah56:12 Jømøgø møgɑni kømm-ɑ kinni, “Dwɑ̈ddi wɑ ki møgi oløg men mɑdh yi wɑ, møng-ɑ óyod yi wɑ, ómɑdh yi wɑ bëne! Dhuki óbëëd e lɑ̈w kibøli dicyɑ̈ngtïn!”" 
Isaiah57:1 Tyëngdøj nyii thøø kɑ nyi bong-ɑ ngɑn cïb møgɑni pyëwe. De kenyi thøw gen bong ryɑ̈g me nyi bï kömi gen. 
Isaiah57:2 Tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑɑr gøggi gïgdøj, nyii yïddø ki mër geki ywömø kì yij thøø." 
Isaiah57:3 Wu tyëngorøg, bïu keny, o kwøbbi wun løøg! Wu pɑ lɑ̈w kibøli ɑ́jwöggì geki tyëng-ɑ yɑ̈bø ki mɑ̈nni tyëngmøøgø geki mɑ̈nn-ɑ nyi yɑ̈ɑ̈bø cwøwi tyëngmøøgø, kí tyëng-ɑ niin ki köögi." 
Isaiah57:4 Wu gɑgg-ɑ men? Á men ɑ benyi yi wun? 
Isaiah57:5 Wu kwɑjj-ɑ jwöggi nyöödø wu niin-ɑ ri wun kì thɑ̈thi yenh. Kɑ nyigi wun nyi muuj wun gɑ gëdhhì kì órøggi kïttì geki tyelli nɑ̈mm-ɑ dwönø. 
Isaiah57:6 Kɑ wu nyii kɑ̈bbø ki kïtt-ɑ lïw kì tyelli nɑ̈mmɑni gɑ møg mɑlli yi wun gɑ jwögg. Kɑ ge nyi kunyi wun ki møgi oløg, kɑ ge nyi muuj wun ki gïncɑm. Wu orumø kinni pyëwɑ med ki møgɑni bënn?" 
Isaiah57:7 Kɑ wu nyi kedh-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ bɑ̈rrø be muujø ki gëdhhì, kɑ ri wun nyi niin wun kì kunɑni." 
Isaiah57:8 Ngïjji jwöggi wun ɑ́cïb wun yethi uddi wun, kɑ yɑ wiy yi wun, kɑ wɑrri wun luny wun wɑ̈g o wu kedhu yethi pënni ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr wun ri wun, ge ceg kɑ cudø ki ngyëny, o wu niin yi gen." 
Isaiah57:9 Kɑ wu ogïnyø ki mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwøng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Mölek. Kɑ wu öd-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi, cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ pödhi tyëngthøø, ki ji møg yɑ̈bbi wun ki jwögg mø mɑlli yi wun." 
Isaiah57:10 Wu ɑ́pïd yi yɑb ki jwögg møg mɑlli yi wun, de wu ɑ́dhɑ̈li wïyø. Wu ɑ́rum kinni wu óthödhi ki tegø yi ngïjji jwöggi wun, bene ɑ dhɑ̈li wun ki pïdø." 
Isaiah57:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jwögg-ɑ böggi yi wun bɑ møg, ɑ wïl wɑ̈thi wun ki yɑn? Yɑ ɑ́wiy yi wun ki wørø kipe kɑ ɑ́kudɑ ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r?" 
Isaiah57:12 Wu orumø ce gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun bɑ dyër, de bëëdi wun ónyodh yi yɑn, o wu koo køny yi ngïjji jwöggi wun." 
Isaiah57:13 Keny-ɑ óywøg wun kønyø, wiy wu køny yi jwöggɑni! Ge ókøøl yi yømø! De tyëng-ɑ óngɑ̈dh yɑn, ge óbëëdø kì piny men, kɑ yɑ mɑlli yi gen kì Kengɑ.”" 
Isaiah57:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wiy jiɑ dwöög gen yïɑ. Yïëbbu gen yöö! Gweej yöö o bëëde e døøj!" 
Isaiah57:15 “Yɑn ɑ mɑl, yɑ bɑ Jwøk kwërø, ɑ bëëdø gïti ɑtheer. Yɑ bëëd ɑ mɑl kej kwër, de yɑ obëëdø thyew kì kelli ji-ɑ bɑ mööl, ɑ nyi yewi, kipe kinni o pëthi gen nyi dwöögɑ, o ge nyi yïddi gen ki ngɑ̈dhø." 
Isaiah57:16 Jiɑ ónëngɑ ki wëy, o ge pɑ cög ge ocɑyyø yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ pyëwɑ pɑ cög e rɑɑj ki gen gïti ɑtheer." 
Isaiah57:17 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki gen kì bɑng orøøg gen, geki döngi pëthi gen, bene ɑ bɑnge cɑyɑ gen kɑ ge wiyɑ piny. De ge ɑ́bëëd muddi gen teeg, ge tyeer-ɑ wɑ̈yi gen." 
Isaiah57:18 “Kër-ɑ ɑ́göög gen ɑ́lidh yi yɑn, de ge ɑ́yiel yi yɑn. Ge ópyejji yi yɑn kɑ ge kønyɑ, kɑ pëthi tyëng-ɑ kïïmø rïn yi yɑn." 
Isaiah57:19 Ji-ɑ lɑ̈wi kí møg-ɑ cyɑ̈gi nyi nëngɑ’ nëngø ki mër! Jiɑ óyiel yi yɑn. 
Isaiah57:20 De tyëngorøg nɑ nɑɑm omelø me ɑpɑge pɑ døøg piny, e göjj-ɑ nɑm ki gïg cödhø geki lɑ̈bø." 
Isaiah57:21 Bong keny yömmi yi tyëngrijjø.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Isaiah58:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ryeer ki ryeeri dwøng! Köbbí jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil, köbbí gen orøøg gen!" 
Isaiah58:2 Yɑ omɑllø yi gen yethi cyɑ̈ng, ge okööbø ce ge tyer-ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ geki mïdhi ciggɑ. Ge okööbø ce thödhɑ gen ki cigg-ɑ dyër o pëthi gen med gen ki mɑlli yɑn.”" 
Isaiah58:3 Ji opëjø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ twöön wɑ riee, keløg møgɑni pɑ ywøør yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Á kipe ngø ɑ twöön wɑ riee ki gïncɑm, keløg cwɑgge bong gøn ki wɑ?” Ge oköbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kenyi twöön wun ri wun, wu nudd wu rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng gïg-ɑ tyer yi wun; wu guud-ɑ nyingi tyëng-ɑ göögø kì cinggi wun." 
Isaiah58:4 Kenyi twöön wun ri wun ki gïncɑm, wu nyi gøgg-ɑ liny, kɑ wu ónyïɑ̈ggø. Wu orumø kinni thuumø me ni menɑni pyëwɑ ócuggø mïnø yi en, kɑ kwɑ̈jji wun lïngi yi yɑn?" 
Isaiah58:5 Kenyi thuum wun, ri wun nyi wëggi wu’ nennø yi teedø wu orɑngø. Kɑ wɑ̈thi wun nyi wëggu noor piny ni yïthhi lum, kɑ wu pëdh-ɑ piny ki ocwɑ̈llì møg yethi gen bëëd yi wun, wu bugø ki belø. Bene gïn-ɑ cwølli yi wun ɑ́ thuumø? Wu orumø kinni pyëwɑ óbëëd e med ki møgɑni?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Thuum-ɑ dwɑddɑ èn: Pɑ̈ɑ̈d töjjì, kɑ ɑcebbì pɑ̈ɑ̈d wɑ̈g kì muddi tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud, kɑ ge wiy kedh gen kì wɑ̈yi gen." 
Isaiah58:7 Nywɑg wun gïgcɑmm wuki tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn, kɑ tyëng-ɑ bong keny bëëd yi gen cwööl wun kɑ̈lli wun. Nëngu tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi nøw ki ógudh, kɑ wɑddi wun nyi køny wun." 
Isaiah58:8 “Codhe, o dhwɑ̈ngɑ mëënye kì kömi wun ni cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o keddi wun jwɑn ki tuurø, o ge ónøggi gen. Yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun, o wu nyi yielɑ; wu ókorri yi bëëdɑ yɑ nud kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Isaiah58:9 Kenyi kwɑ̈jji wun, kwɑ̈jji wun óløøg yi yɑn. Yɑ óyïëy keny-ɑ ócwøl wun nyingɑ. “Keløg wu ówïyø ki guudi nyingi ji, kɑ wu ówïyø ki ɑthwøg geki kwøbb-ɑ rijjø," 
Isaiah58:10 ke thödhu tyëng-ɑ ri gen di kɑ̈j kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, muudhø men-ɑ yije di wun ree løge’ cɑɑr dicɑ̈ng." 
Isaiah58:11 Wu pyejjɑ’ pyejjø yethi cyɑ̈ng, kɑ wu yɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki gïgdøj bënn. Wu mïdhɑ’ mïdhø wu teg, o dëlli wun yöd. Wu óbëëdø wu nɑ bɑg me cɑwwi, kɑ wu nɑ wɑɑng pï me pïge pɑ nyi dwön." 
Isaiah58:12 Udd-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh cøn ódøøg ki gerø, ge geer-ɑ wɑ̈thi udd-ɑ weenø. Kɑ wu cwølli wun ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi døøg dör ki tïngø, ɑ nyi døøg udd-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki gerø.”" 
Isaiah58:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keløg Sɑbɑth ómïdhi yi wun kidøøj ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër, kɑ wu ocögø wu pɑ rïngi kì bɑng gïg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi wun kì cyɑ̈ngɑni; keløg cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwërɑ ómïdhi yi wun ɑ́ ɑkwër, kɑ wu ocögø wu pɑ weli, o wu pɑ göögø, o wu pɑ kømmi óbɑɑd kì cyɑ̈ngɑni," 
Isaiah58:14 medi pyëw men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi göggi yɑn oyodø yi wun. Wu wëggɑ’ wørø yi kömi piny bëne, kɑ wu obëëdø ki medi pëëth kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ Yɑgob kweyi wun. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Wu ko rum kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyøødh, wu pɑ cuggi yielø yi en! Wɑlɑ̀ wu ko rum kinni bɑ ming, kwɑ̈jji wun pɑ lïngi yi en; kɑ̀ kwɑ̈jji wun kipe kønyø!" 
Isaiah59:2 Bɑ gööj orøng-ɑ gøggi yi wun ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈nii lïngø. Bɑ orøøg wun ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈ng wun ki Jwøk kenyi pɑ̈nyi wun mɑllii. 
Isaiah59:3 Kömi wun dɑ kerri pyed, kí mød ki ji geki nɑ̈g." 
Isaiah59:4 Wu ɑ́kedhi burø kɑ wu ocögø wu pɑ cwɑg. Wu gööny-ɑ pyed kipe kinni o wu cwɑg. Wu nyi rømm-ɑ göggi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø ki rɑj. 
Isaiah59:5 Gïgrijjø møg-ɑ rømmi yi wun kipe göggi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø nɑ tøngi thwöl; kɑ̀ tøg tøngø menɑni, bɑ thwöl ɑ bï wɑ̈g! De gïg-ɑ rømmi yi wun ki gwøgø, bong døøjø men-ɑ ómëggi wun yi gen; ge nɑ ógødh men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki bøøy órɑb!" 
Isaiah59:6  
Isaiah59:7 Wu nyi rïïj wu rømm-ɑ gøggi gïgrijjø, o wu pɑ nyi cwööng ki gwøgi gïgɑni. Wu pɑ nyi cwööng ki nɑ̈gi tyëng-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r. Keny-ɑ kedhi yi wun nyi döng e rɑɑj," 
Isaiah59:8 o bong ngɑn bødh kì keny-ɑ nud yi wun. Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun bënn pɑth ki dyër. Yëth-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi wun bɑ ɑ́dud, o bong ngɑn kɑ̈l yuuɑni kɑ obødhø." 
Isaiah59:9 Teedø okööbø kinni, “Gïn-ɑ pere pɑ yieel wøn yi Jwøk kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ guud nyingi wøn, ɑ́yod yi wøn ɑnɑn. Wø ngɑ̈dh-ɑ kinni wø ócyɑ̈dhi kì yij cɑr, de bɑ muudhø ɑ nud kete." 
Isaiah59:10 Kɑ wø ceg-ɑ thɑ̈mmø ni cörr. Wø ɑ́thɑ̈mmi kì dicɑ̈ng de piny nɑ muudhø kì pödhi tyëngthøø. 
Isaiah59:11 Wø ɑ́bwøg kɑ wɑ̈thi wøn ócungø. Wø yïd-ɑ Jwøk, o wø yiel yi en ki guun-ɑ guud nyingi wøn, de bong yielø." 
Isaiah59:12 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ̈jjø men-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn yi wøn dwøng. Orøøg wøn cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli wøn; ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn kidøøj." 
Isaiah59:13 Ciggí ɑ́pyem yi wøn kɑ yï bɑny yi wøn, kɑ wø óbɑ̈nyø ki lugø kì bɑngí. Tyëng-ɑ kyeelø nyingi gen ɑ́guud yi wøn, kɑ ngɑ̈thi wøn lugi wøn yïn. Wø pɑ rømmi dyër, o wø nyi kømm-ɑ pyed." 
Isaiah59:14 Gøggi dyër ɑ́wiy, o dyër pɑ cyɑ̈ngi. Bong dyër me gøggi kì burø, o bong ngɑn kømmi dyër." 
Isaiah59:15 Bong dyër, cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ wïyi ki gøggi orøg, nyi yöd ɑ́ gen ɑ göggi gïnrɑj.” Møgɑni ɑ́lidh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ pyëwe órënyø kipe kɑ̀ pɑ gøggi dyër." 
Isaiah59:16 Ángɑ̈ng yi kɑ̀ bëëd e bong ngɑn køny tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud. Ge ceg kɑ yielø yi en ki tege, o ge tyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen." 
Isaiah59:17 Dyër rug yi en e nɑ ɑ́dhedheg, o teng-ɑ yïëdø rug yi en e nɑ ɑcudh. Jɑmmì bënn ótyenye, kɑ kɑ̈jji ji-ɑ rɑngø cole." 
Isaiah59:18 Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii ócɑy yi en kɑ cɑ́y mø kyëëw ki bɑ̈jji gen; gï ócɑye ceth cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ bëëdø kì pìny mø lɑ̈wi. 
Isaiah59:19 Cɑg kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ji ceg-ɑ böggø yi tege. Óbï e nɑ nɑm me thewe teg, o nɑ ɑtunø me teg." 
Isaiah59:20 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie kinni, “Yɑ óbï Yerusɑlem be nyɑgi per wun, o yɑ yielɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wïyi ki orøg kì kelli wun." 
Isaiah59:21 O wɑ lwööb wɑ, o wɑ nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑ ki kwøb; wu ɑ́mëggɑ tegɑ geki ciggɑ, o ge bëëd gen gɑ mø wun gïti ɑtheer. Cɑg ɑnɑn ceth, lïngu kwøbbɑ, kɑ nyigi wun kí kwɑrri wun pwönyi wun ki mïdhi ciggɑ kì yethi rïj bënn, gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Dhwöödh, Yerusɑlem kɑ yï mëëny ni cɑ̈ng mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j omënyø kì kömí!" 
Isaiah60:2 Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ókum yi muudhø, de kömí ómëëny yi cɑɑr Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Bëëdi cɑre e nud kì butí, ónënni kì kömí." 
Isaiah60:3 Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ótëël yi cɑrí, kɑ rɑ̈nhì tëël yi tuuli cyɑ̈ngí." 
Isaiah60:4 Lïdhí bɑdhhí kɑ gïn-ɑ cwöb liidh, Jií cong-ɑ ri gen ge dwɑdd-ɑ dwöög pɑc! Wɑ̈ddí óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun me lɑ̈wi. Nyigí womɑ̈nn óceg kɑ kwömmø ni othønhø." 
Isaiah60:5 Møgɑni ólidh yi yïn, kɑ pyëwí ómïnø ki mendwøng, mɑ́ kɑ̈ɑ̈r pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn ómuuj yïn, kɑ̈rì óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ løøg nɑɑm omelø." 
Isaiah60:6 Amɑl mø gïïr óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Midyɑn geki Epɑ̀, ge ókɑ̈ddø ki jɑmmì. Møøgø óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Cebɑ̀, ge ókɑ̈ddø ki dhɑb geki bɑkur. Wöddi gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈lli yi teedø!" 
Isaiah60:7 Dyëg-ɑ römm mø Kedɑr geki Nebɑyoth, ómuuj yïn gɑ gëdhhì, kɑ ge muuj kì këli lɑm gɑ møg mïni pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j mɑ̈ɑ̈r Kenge ówëgge døngø ki men lod döngi cøn." 
Isaiah60:8 Á yɑ̈thi ngø ɑ bï ge nɑ pøøl kinnï, ɑ ni gen ɑkùr møg dwöög pɑc?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ge bɑ yɑ̈thi nɑm møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun lɑ̈wi Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ jii Jwøk pödhi gen. Ge bï ge ókɑ̈ddø ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb møg wøør Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ bɑ kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́göjji pödhh-ɑ kyeelø wøri jie." 
Isaiah60:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ Yerusɑlem kinni, “Dörrí óger-ɑ yi tyëngpɑth, O yï ógöggi yi rɑ̈nhi tyëngɑni. Wu ɑ́cɑyɑ kɑ rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ. De ɑnɑn pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun." 
Isaiah60:11 Dhøggi döri kɑɑl wun óbëëdø gɑ ɑyieb kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r. O yï muuj ki kɑ̈r yi rɑ̈nhi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. 
Isaiah60:12 De pödhh-ɑ koo göggi yïn ónɑ̈g kinni tweet. 
Isaiah60:13 “Yenh-ɑ døj kì Lubnɑn, ɑ løg ɑkemel kí ɑ́lɑl, kí ɑmedh, yenh-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì wɑɑg Lubnɑn, ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l be geri yïn, yïn ɑ Yerusɑlem, o Kengɑ myërre, o kɑɑlɑ dönye." 
Isaiah60:14 Kwɑrri tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud wɑngí óbï, kɑ ri gen bøødh gen piny kì bølí, yï ómɑl yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tuug yïn cøn yï ócwølli yi gen yïn ɑ́ ‘Kɑɑldwøng! Kɑɑl Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j,’ ‘Dhɑyøn kɑɑldwøng, kɑɑl kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil.’" 
Isaiah60:15 “Yï koo wiy piny, o yï koo mɑɑn këti, yï kɑɑl-ɑ jie dhwödhø kɑ döng-ɑ nøw, yï ógwøgɑ yï dwøng, o yï myëër, yïn ɑ́ keny yije di medi pyëw-ɑ pɑ thumi." 
Isaiah60:16 Yï ókorri yi pödhh geki rɑ̈nhì mø ngenyø, yï ókorri yi gen ni kenyi korri othinh yi meye. O yod yi yïn kinni yï ɑ́yiel-ɑ yi yɑn; Jwøøg Isrɑil Jwøng-ɑ teg ɑ ɑ́gøny yïn kì yethi töjjì." 
Isaiah60:17 “Yï ómuujɑ ki dhɑb ɑ́ kej dilɑl kí ɑ́tegø geki dilɑl gɑ kej yenh, kí ngyënyø dødø ɑ́ kej kïttì. Wɑngí pɑ guud yi jɑggí këti. Ge ówëggɑ jyɑ̈gø ge gøgg-ɑ dyër kí mër." 
Isaiah60:18 Kwøbbi mød koo lïngi këti; pödhí pɑ cigi rënyø. Yï ókorrɑ ni kenyi korri dörø, o yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi kiperí. Yɑ ólenhi yi yïn kipe kɑ ɑ́yielɑ yïn." 
Isaiah60:19 “Pɑth ki cɑ̈ng ɑ ócɑr yïn kì dicɑ̈ng, wɑlɑ̀ pɑth ki dwɑ̈y ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ cɑrí kì wɑ̈r, men-ɑ́ yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ cɑrí gïti ɑtheer. Yï ómeny yi cɑɑr mɑ̈rɑ." 
Isaiah60:20 Yï koo cigi kïïmø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ cɑrí gïti ɑtheer. Cɑre pɑ thumi; o lod-ɑ cɑɑr cɑ̈ng geki dwɑ̈y. 
Isaiah60:21 Jií bënn óbëëd ge gøgg-ɑ dyër. Piny ókwɑny yi gen gïti ɑtheer. Bene gen yɑnh-ɑ ɑ́pidhɑ, ɑ́gwøgɑ ki cinggɑ ɑ́ men nyodhɑ döngɑ." 
Isaiah60:22 Gøl-ɑ thiinh ódøngi kɑ kwɑnne ogöögø ki ɑ́lïp, kɑ gøl-ɑ nyødh ogöögø ki pödhø me teg. Obëën bøli kenyɑni, gïgɑni ówëggɑ jwɑn cwöbø Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!”" 
Isaiah61:1 Wëyi Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ kömɑ. Yɑ ɑ́myege o yɑ öre be muuji wöndøj ɑbuur. O yɑ yielɑ tyëng-ɑ minni gen cödø o ɑmɑggi liny köbbɑ kinni ge ɑ́gøny. O tyëng-ɑ ød mɑg köbb-ɑ kinni ge ɑ́gööny wɑ̈g. 
Isaiah61:2 Yɑ ɑ́öre be kwøbi kinni bøli keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie yiele’ yielø. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ótyɑm yi en. Yɑ ɑ́öre’ be rïni pëthi tyëng-ɑ kïïmø bënn." 
Isaiah61:3 O tyëng-ɑ kïïmø kì Dhɑyøn nëngɑ ki medi pyëw, o ge wör gen ki medi pëëth. Ge óni yenh møg-ɑ ópidh-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree. Ge óbëëd ge gøgg-ɑ dyër ge bënn, o Jwøk ólenhi kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Isaiah61:4 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kɑ̈ge dööng, ócigi gerø yi gen." 
Isaiah61:5 Jiɑ, wu ógöggi yi tyëngpɑth Dhögi wun kí dyëgi wun ókwɑy yi gen. Kɑ pwödhhi wun, kí bɑ̈ggi wun pur yi gen." 
Isaiah61:6 O wu ócwølli wun ɑ́ ókwërri Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Bɑ̈nggi Jwøgee. Wu ótɑ̈bbi kì yethi kɑ̈rri pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ köthi wun pwöd wun kinni kɑ̈rrɑni bɑ mø wun." 
Isaiah61:7 Ayɑ̈ɑ̈r wun geki lɑ̈ɑ̈yi wɑ̈thi wun ge ɑ́thumi. Wu óbëëdø kì piny-ɑ bɑ mi wun kɑ̈ɑ̈r wun ómed tyel ɑ́ryew; medi pëthi wun gït-ɑ ɑtheer. 
Isaiah61:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ mɑɑr-ɑ gøggi dyër, o guudi nying geki gøggi rɑj mɑɑn yi yɑn. Jiɑ ókøøg yi yɑn kidøøj, kɑ wø olwöbø ki lwöbø me pɑ pɑ̈d ki gen." 
Isaiah61:9 Ge óbëëd ge ngɑ̈nyi yi pödhh bënn. O yod yi ngɑn lidh gen kinni, ge bɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́gyëdh yi yɑn.”" 
Isaiah61:10 Yerusɑlem pyëwe ɑ́mïni yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nɑ nyɑdhey nywöm me thøø yi ruugø. Áruug yi Jwøk ki yielø geki tyɑ̈mø." 
Isaiah61:11 Mɑ́ ni kɑ̀ pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji köödh ki twïyø, Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie óyiele kɑ lenhi yi pödhh bënn." 
Isaiah62:1 Yɑ pɑ kudø kiper Yerusɑlem, o yɑ pɑ ywöömø gïti keny-ɑ óyielii kɑ otyɑ̈mø, kɑ omënyø ni ɑ́menyø kì wɑ̈r." 
Isaiah62:2 Yerusɑlem, yï ólidh yï otyɑ̈mø yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø! Mɑ̈rí ólidh yi rɑ̈nhi gen bënn, yï ócwølli kɑ nying møg nyɑ̈n, nyingɑni ócɑg-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree." 
Isaiah62:3 Yï ógöögø yïn ɑ́ yɑ̈r me myëër kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Isaiah62:4 Yï koo cigi cwølli këti yïn ɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi jɑlgøle. Wɑlɑ̀ yï koo cwølli këti yïn ɑ́ pönh-ɑ órënyø. Nyingí nying-ɑ nyɑ̈n ócwøl ɑ́ “Ngɑn-ɑ pyëw Jwøk med ki en.” Pinyí ócwøl ɑ́ “Anywøm ki nywöm-ɑ døj.” Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe med ki yïn, o óbëëd e nɑ jɑlgøl pinyí." 
Isaiah62:5 Yï ónywøm yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yïn ni nyel me nywøm nyɑn nuti nywɑlø yi jɑlø, Jwøk pyëwe ómed ki yïn ni kenyi med pyëw nyelɑwøb ki nyɑn-ɑ nywøme." 
Isaiah62:6 Yerusɑlem, wïj dörí ɑ́cïbɑ ki ji mø kurø. Ge koo pɑ̈nyi kudø kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng. Ge bɑ møg pɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gï ógwøge, wïje koo wëggi wïlø yi gen." 
Isaiah62:7 Koo wëggi ywömø yi gen gïti keny-ɑ ódwøøge Yerusɑlem keje. Kɑ gø gwøge ɑ́ kɑɑldwøng me lenhi yi kömi piny bëne. 
Isaiah62:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kinni møgɑni ógwøg yi en ki tege; o okööbø kinni, “Byellí koo cɑm-ɑ yi ji mø mɑ̈n ki yïn këti. Møgi oløgí koo mɑdh-ɑ yi tyëngpɑth këti." 
Isaiah62:9 Dɑ́ yïn, yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈g byel kɑ ge kɑj yi yïn, yïn ɑ ócɑm byellɑni, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lenhi yi yïn. Yïn ɑ ɑ́pidh oløg kɑ lem yi yïn, bɑ yïn ɑ ómɑdh møgi oløngɑni kì yij gøl Kengɑ.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, bïu kedhu be gweji yöö men-ɑ yije kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jii wun møg-ɑ dwöög pɑc. Gwej wun yöö kɑ tuggi kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì yije! Kɑ wu guddu piny ki ngïjji yöö, møg-ɑ ónenni yi tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Isaiah62:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑ̈j-ɑ piny bëne kinni, “Köbbu tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ be yieli wun, Bï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́døme.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Wu ócwølli wun ɑ́ “Jii Jwøk kwërø,” “Ji-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Yerusɑlem ócwøl ɑ́ “Kɑɑldwøng men-ɑ mɑɑr yi Jwøk,” “Kɑɑldwøng men-ɑ nuti wiy piny yi Jwøk.”" 
Isaiah63:1 “Á men ɑ bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Bodhrɑ̀ kì Edöm? Á men ɑ thøø yi rugø ki ógudh-ɑ kwɑrø èn, ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki tegø kinnï?” “Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bï be yïëdø ki tegø, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ wööni tyɑ̈me.”" 
Isaiah63:2 “Ede ɑ cyɑ̈dhe e kwɑɑr ni ngɑn nyøn oløg e bij-ɑ møgi oløg?” 
Isaiah63:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggø kinni, “Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́nyønɑ ni oløg, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́bï be kønyi yɑn, ge ɑ́nyønɑ ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ kɑ ógudhɑ cödh yi remmi gen." 
Isaiah63:4 Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni bøli kej yieli jiɑ ɑ́bï, o bɑ bøli kenyɑni ɑ cɑɑy tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki gen." 
Isaiah63:5 Yɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ng kɑ ɑ́lïdhɑ kinni bong ngɑn bï be kønyi yɑn. De yɑ ɑ́tëngi yi liny-ɑ pyëwɑ kɑ ge tyɑmɑ yɑ ketɑ. 
Isaiah63:6 Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ɑ́nyønɑ ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, kɑ ge kedhhɑ bënn. Remmi gen ɑ bɑ wëyi gen ɑ́bɑɑwɑ piny.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi møge ówɑjjɑ; ólejjɑ kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge wɑ bënn. Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́gyëdh ki kɑ̈r bëne, kì bɑng lɑ̈mpyëwe geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee men-ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi." 
Isaiah63:8 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ge bɑ jiɑ, yɑ pɑ wëny yi gen.” Codhe ɑyiele gïn" 
Isaiah63:9 kì yij orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi gen. Pɑth ki wëywödø, den-ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́yiel gen. Gï ɑ́døme kì bɑng mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑre gïn, kɑ pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gen. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge okorrø yi en ceth kɑ̈ge dööng," 
Isaiah63:10 de dhøge ɑ́pyem yi gen, kɑ pyëw wëye kwërø wëggi rënyø yi gen. Codhe ɑløg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ree ngɑn mɑ̈n ki gen, kɑ yöd-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki gen." 
Isaiah63:11 Codhe, ɑpɑr gen mø kɑ̈ge dööng; gen ɑ cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud. Apëjji gen kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́yiel jie kì nɑɑm omelø ying-ɑ keny ɑnɑn? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́mëggi wëye Mosɑ̀ ying-ɑ keny?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ágøne Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́nyodh tege kì ri Mosɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́pyëde nɑɑm omelø kɑ jie yïëbbe ki yöö kì yethi pï, kipe kinni o nyinge lenhi gïti ɑtheer?” Ge ɑ́pyejj-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ócyɑ̈dhø tyelli gen teeg ni tyelli kyënyì, o ge pɑ pɑ̈nyi cyerrø." 
Isaiah63:13  
Isaiah63:14 Ge ɑ́korri yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidøøj ni dhög-ɑ nyi køøl yij tör. Jie ɑ́pyejje kidøøj kɑ wør. 
Isaiah63:15 Lidh wøn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï lïdh-ɑ́ɑ̀ pɑɑrí mɑl, kej kwërí geki mɑ̈rí. Ágøne tegi per wøn kì yïí? Ágøne tegí? Lɑ̈mpyëwí geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií ying-ɑ keny? Wø ko wøøy." 
Isaiah63:16 Yï bɑ wïyi wøn. Kweyyi wøn, Abrɑhɑm geki Yɑgob wø pɑ pɑr yi gen, de bɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑ wïyi wøn, yïn ɑ ngɑn nyi døm wøn." 
Isaiah63:17 Wøde ɑ wëggí wøn kedhi wɑ̈g kì yij yuuí? Ede muddi wøn ɑ wëggí gen tëngø kɑ ngɑ̈thi wøn lugi wøn yïn? Dwöög kipe ji-ɑ göggi yïn, dwöög kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ møgí ceth." 
Isaiah63:18 Wøn, wø jií, wø ɑ́cyeddi yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ Kengí bwöl yi gen." 
Isaiah63:19 Á kipe ngø ɑ gwøøg wøn kinøw, de yï ce nuti bëëdø yïn ɑ́ jɑngi wøn, dhɑ̈y wø ce nuti pɑ̈nyi bëëdø wøn ɑ́ jií!" 
Isaiah64:1 Ede mɑl ɑ pɑ pyëëdií kɑ yï bï piny? Yï ólidh yi kïttì kɑ ge okïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. 
Isaiah64:2 Ge ókïrrø ni pïg twɑg yi mɑc me lëëdh. Bïí nyudhí tegí tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn; wiy pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kïïr gen kì bølí! 
Isaiah64:3 Dɑ bøli keny mɑ ɑ́bëën yi yïn kɑ yï ogöögø ki gïgdøngø møg böggi, kɑ kïttì okïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen yïn." 
Isaiah64:4 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lïng wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki Jwøk me ni yïn, Jwøng-ɑ göögø ki gïg ni møg kipe ji-ɑ gɑ̈nii." 
Isaiah64:5 Tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen nyi tyer gøggi dyër nyii gɑmø yi yïn, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pɑ nyi wïl ki bëëdø ki bëën-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn. Yï ɑ́bëëd pyëwí rɑɑj ki wøn, de wø nuti wïyø ki orøg. Wø nuti wïyø ki orøg ki kër-ɑ ɑ́wën, ngö e ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn eni rɑ̈ji pyëwí." 
Isaiah64:6 Wø ɑ́wöni ceth wø pëddi ki orøg, cɑgg gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wøn ge orømmø yi wøn ge døj, ge rijjø. Wø ɑ́göög wø nɑ yïthhi yɑdh møg thwøwø; wø ɑ́køøl yi yømø kì bɑng orøøg wøn." 
Isaiah64:7 Bong ngɑn nyi mɑlli yïn, bong ngɑn nyi kwɑjji yïn kipe kønyø, mɑ́ rií ɑ́kɑn yi yïn, kɑ wø wiy piny kì bɑng orøøg wøn." 
Isaiah64:8 Dɑ́ yïn ɑ bɑ wïyi wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wø nɑ lɑ̈bø, o yï nɑ bødhi lɑ̈b. Wø ɑ́cwɑ̈j-ɑ yi yïn," 
Isaiah64:9 pyëwí ko ti rënyø ki wøn, wɑlɑ̀ orøøg wøn ko cög e kwɑ̈nnií wøn gïti ɑtheer. Wø bɑ jií, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn." 
Isaiah64:10 Kɑ̈ddi kwërí ɑ́göög ki ryɑng, Yerusɑlem ɑ́döng nøw e rënyø," 
Isaiah64:11 o ød kwëër wøn øn-ɑ́ yije ɑ́lenhi yïn yi kweyyi wøn, ɑ́rum ki cɑmø yi mɑc. Kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi wøn bënn ɑ́rënyi." 
Isaiah64:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwí pɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈mø yi møgɑni bënn? Bong gïn gwøg yi yïn, wø wïyí orɑng-ɑ pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi wøn ki nginø kinnï?" 
Isaiah65:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ yïd-ɑ kwɑ̈jji ji o di løøgɑ, de ge nuti kwɑ̈jjø. Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yɑ di yod yi gen, de yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø yɑbø yi gen. Yɑ nuti kwɑjjø yi pönhï, ngö kwɑ̈jje bɑ men di løøgɑ ceth kinni, ‘Yɑn èn; yï ókøny yi yɑn.’" 
Isaiah65:2 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd ceth yɑ nenn-ɑ pɑɑri jiɑ, ji-ɑ nyi rïïj ge gøgg-ɑ bɑ̈jjø, o ge tyeer-ɑ wɑ̈yi gen muddi gen teeg." 
Isaiah65:3 Ge cög ge gøgg-ɑ gïg rënyi pyëwɑ; ge ngɑ̈dd-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki gëdhhì kì yethi bɑ̈gg, ge rɑ̈mm-ɑ bɑkur kì kömi kïttì," 
Isaiah65:4 Ge nyi kedh-ɑ yethi órøggi kïttì geki yethi debb, be pyëj ki yɑdh kì wɑ̈r. Ge cɑm-ɑ rïngi kundhøngø o ge wedh-ɑ cwɑyi gëdhhi jwögg-ɑ pɑth." 
Isaiah65:5 Orume, o tyëng-ɑ kyeelø nyi tøny gen ki köbbø kinni, ‘Nyegi wun kì buti wøn, wø ko nywɑl wun, wø bɑ tyëng kwër!’ Pyëwɑ pɑ mɑg yi yɑn kipe ji møgɑni, rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ki gen nɑ mɑc men pɑ yïëy nɑ̈gø." 
Isaiah65:6 “Yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøbi cɑ́yi gen, cɑ́yɑni ɑ́rum ki gweed piny. Ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ceth kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen;" 
Isaiah65:7 ge cɑ̈yy-ɑ orøøg gen, kí orøøg kweyyi gen. Ge ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈b ki bɑkur kì debbi jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ ge okööbø kì riɑ ki kwøb mø rijjø. Ge bɑ møg cɑy yi yɑn ceth kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bong ngɑn nyi rënyi oløg men-ɑ døj, de oløngɑni nyi gwøg ɑ́ møgø. Cɑgg ɑ́ yɑn thyew, jiɑ pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn ge bënn, tyëng-ɑ göggi yɑn óyiel yi yɑn." 
Isaiah65:9 Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ bɑ gøl Yeudɑ̀ ógyëdh yi yɑn, o pödhɑ, pödhi kïttì ólɑg yi kwɑrri gen. Jiɑ møg-ɑ göggi yɑn óbëëdø kì pinyɑni." 
Isaiah65:10 Yɑ ómɑlli yi gen, kɑ dhögi gen nyi køøl gen be cɑm kì Töör Cɑrön kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl geki Töör Akørr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Isaiah65:11 “De wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑny yɑn, ɑ ɑ́wøy Dhɑyøn kïti kwërɑ;" 
Isaiah65:12 wu óthøw ki thøø me rɑj, mɑ́ wu nuti yïëyø keny-ɑ ɑ́cwølɑ wun, wɑlɑ̀ wu nuti lïngø keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbɑ. Wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbɑ; kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ be gøggi rɑj." 
Isaiah65:13 Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni tyëng-ɑ mɑlli yɑn, ɑ mïdhi ciggɑ, yï gen ódi gïgcɑmm kí gïg mɑdh mø gïïr. De wu ómɑg yi kɑ̈j geki röödhø. Ge óbëëd pëthi gen med, de wu óbëëd wu yɑ̈rø." 
Isaiah65:14 Ge óbëëd ge owörø ki medi pëëth, de wu óbëëd wu óywöngø minni wun cödø." 
Isaiah65:15 Nyingi wun ópɑ̈rr-ɑ cyën yi jiɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ. Wu ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. De tyëng-ɑ mïdhi ciggɑ ócɑ̈ggɑ ki nying møg nyɑ̈n." 
Isaiah65:16 Ngɑn-ɑ ókwɑjji gyëdh kì pinyɑni, ókwɑ̈jji kɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ nyi mïdhi dhøge. Ngɑn köngi, köngi kɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ nyi mïdhi dhøge. Akørr-ɑ weenø ókedh kɑ ge owïlø.”" 
Isaiah65:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ceg-ɑ cwɑ̈j ki piny me nyɑ̈n, kí mɑl me nyɑ̈n. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn ceg-ɑ wïlø bënn." 
Isaiah65:18 Mïni pëthi wun kɑ wu bëëd wun ki medi pëëth gïti ɑtheer, kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi yɑn. Yerusɑlem men nyɑ̈n men-ɑ cwɑ̈j yi yɑn, óbëëd e pɑ̈ng yi medi pyëw, o tyëng-ɑ yije óbëëd pëthi gen omedø." 
Isaiah65:19 Men-ɑ́ yɑn kiriɑ, yɑ óbëëd pyëwɑ med kipe Yerusɑlem geki ji-ɑ yije. Óbëëd e bong ywøg kì yije wɑlɑ̀ bong cwöd kipe kønyø." 
Isaiah65:20 Othønhø koo thøw ge odhødhø këti, o ji bënn ceg-ɑ døngø kɑ ge oyöø. Møg-ɑ runni gen wɑ̈dhi ri miyø ócwølli ge nudd ge thønhø. Tyëng-ɑ thøw runni gen nuti wɑ̈dhi kenyɑni, wɑng-ɑ kinni ge bɑ ɑcɑy yi yɑn." 
Isaiah65:21 Ji ógëdø ki ud kɑ yethi uddɑni bëëd yi gen kiri gen; de pɑth ki ji møøgø ɑ óbëëdø kì yethi gen. Ge ópïdhø ki bɑ̈gg, kɑ møgi oløøg bɑ̈ggɑni mɑdh yi gen kiri gen; koo mɑdh-ɑ yi ji møøgø. Jiɑ óbëëdø ki runn mø gïïr ni runni yenh. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen ócɑm yi gen." 
Isaiah65:22  
Isaiah65:23 Gwøng-ɑ gwøg yi gen ópɑ̈dhi keje, o bong ryɑ̈g men-ɑ óbï kömi nyigi gen. Ge ógyëdh yi yɑn geki kwɑrri gen gïti ɑtheer." 
Isaiah65:24 Kwɑ̈jji gen óløøg yi yɑn ge nudd ge ókwɑ̈jjø ceth. 
Isaiah65:25 Óthönhì geki dyëg römm ócyɑ̈mø kì kej ɑ́kyel. Ngurrì ócyɑ̈mø ki lum ni dhög, o thöllì koo bëëdø gɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g këti. Bong gïjø mɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g wɑlɑ̀ gïnrɑj men-ɑ óying Dhɑyøn kì wïj kïti kwërɑ.”" 
Isaiah66:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Mɑl bɑ kwømɑ, o piny bɑ thɑ̈nhi tyellɑ. Á ød mɑ ngø ɑ cuggi gëri yɑn yi wun ɑ́ men yije bëëdɑ?" 
Isaiah66:2 Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j lɑ̈bø bëne! Pyëwɑ med ki tyëng-ɑ bɑ mööl, ɑ nyi yewi ki orøøg gen; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ wør yɑn, ɑ lïngi kwøbbɑ." 
Isaiah66:3 “Ji ɑ́døøg ge gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ med kì pëthi gen. Pɑ̈r kì yï gen cɑgg dhɑnhø ngɑl wɑdh ɑ́ gëëdhi wɑlɑ̀ ngɑl dhɑnhø ɑ́ gëëdhi, pɑ̈r thyew cɑgg dhɑnhø gëëdh dyel wɑlɑ̀ tor muni gwög, cɑgg ge gëëdh byëlø wɑlɑ̀ remi kundhøngø, wɑlɑ̀ ge muuj bɑkur wɑlɑ̀ ge mɑll-ɑ ngïji jwøg, pëthi gen med kɑ yëthi mɑ̈ddø møg-ɑ rijjø." 
Isaiah66:4 Kì bɑng gwøng ni menɑni, kömi gen ógöjjɑ ki ryɑ̈g, ge ógöjjɑ gïg-ɑ böggi yi gen, mɑ́ e bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yïëy keny-ɑ ɑ́cwöddɑ, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lïng keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbɑ. Ge ɑ́bɑny-ɑ yɑn, kɑ ge kwɑny-ɑ gwøg ki rɑj.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wë, wu tyëng-ɑ böggii kɑ kwøbbe nyi lïngi yi gen. Wë okööbø kinni, “Wu mɑɑn yi teedø kɑ per kɑ mïdhu kwøbbɑ. Agwɑddi wun yi gen ge okööbø kinni, ‘Wë nyodhe tege, kɑ wiy wu yiel yi en, o wu lidh yi wøn pëthi wun omedø.’ Dɑ́ gen kiri gen ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈r!" 
Isaiah66:6 Lïngu cwɑgg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl ge døngø kì kɑɑldwøng, lïngu cwɑgg-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kengø. Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ cɑy tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii!" 
Isaiah66:7 “Kɑɑl kwër nɑ ngɑn ngog yi pɑ̈dhi piny, e pyere nuti rɑ̈mø." 
Isaiah66:8 Dɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi lïngø ki gïg ni møgɑni? Dɑ pödhø mɑ ɑ́nywøl kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel? Dhɑyøn koo rɑngø ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r e pödhø nuti nywølø. 
Isaiah66:9 Wu ko rum kinni jiɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ bøli kej pɑ̈dhi piny, kɑ ge mɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ nywølø.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Isaiah66:10 Mïni pëthi wun kyeel ki Yerusɑlem, wu tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr kɑɑlɑni! Mïni pëthi wun kyeel ki en ɑnɑn, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ywöngi cøn kyeel ki en!" 
Isaiah66:11 Pëthi wun ómïni yi døøje, ni kenyi med pyëw othinh kì kö meye." 
Isaiah66:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ónëngɑ ki døøjø me pɑ thumi, kɑ̈ɑ̈r pödhh bënn ómulli yïí ni nɑm me pɑ nyi dwön. Yï óni othinh me dhødh kì kö meye, e di mɑɑrø." 
Isaiah66:13 Wu ónëngɑ ki medi pyëw kì Yerusɑlem, ni othinh kenyi med pyëwe kì kö meye." 
Isaiah66:14 Keny-ɑ ólidh wun møgɑni, pëthi wun ómïni, kɑ wu ótëngø, kɑ dëlli wun óyönø. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni, yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑn lïngi kwøbbɑ nyi kønyɑ’ kønyø, o tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn nyi cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbï kɑ mɑc, óbï e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij ɑtunø, e bï-ɑ be cɑyi tyëng-ɑ pyëwe rɑj ki gïn." 
Isaiah66:16 Ji ócɑy yi en kì kömi piny kɑ pilø kí mɑc; tyëng-ɑ óyode ge røngø, gï nɑ̈ge’ nɑ̈gø." 
Isaiah66:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ nyi gwir ri gen kipe mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth, bøli kej gen ɑ́thumi; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi myeer ri gen yethi bɑ̈gg, kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø ki kundhøngø kí yëjj, gïg-ɑ nyi kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø." 
Isaiah66:18 Gïg-ɑ rømmi yi gen kí gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn. Yɑ bï-ɑ be cøngi jii pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn, o ge bï gen, o gïn-ɑ nyi gwøg yi tegɑ lidh yi gen," 
Isaiah66:19 o yod yi gen kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ cɑy gen. “De kwï gen ówiy yi yɑn, o ge örɑ pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi; pödhh-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi perɑ ki lïngø, wɑlɑ̀ gïgdøngø møg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi yɑn nuti liidh gen, ge óörɑ Tɑrcic, kí Lïbiyɑ̀, kí Lud; pödhhi tyëng-ɑ pëddi pöd ki weth. Møøgø óörɑ Tubɑl kí Yönɑn. Kwøbbi döngɑ ókømmi yi gen kì pödhhɑni." 
Isaiah66:20 Wɑddi wun, tyëng Isrɑil ódwöög yi gen kì yethi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø; gï muuj ge’ yɑn. Gï ómuuj gen yɑn kì wïj kïti kwër kì Yerusɑlem, ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ kyënyì, kí ógɑll, kí ɑmɑl, kí uddi kömi ɑmɑl, kí yɑ̈th-ɑ nyi pyejji yi kyënyì, ni kenyi kɑ̈ni tyëng Isrɑil yij Kengø ki gemè kì yethi yɑ̈ɑ̈th møg bɑ ɑkwër kidøøj." 
Isaiah66:21 Kwï gen ógwøøgɑ gɑ ókwër, kɑ møøgø gwøøgɑ gɑ Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Isaiah66:22 “Kwɑrri wun óbëëdø nyingi gen pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, ni kɑ̀ nud piny-ɑ nyɑ̈n geki mɑl-ɑ nyɑ̈n møg-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jɑ ki tegɑ." 
Isaiah66:23 Jii pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn óbï Yerusɑlem keny be wøwi yɑn kì wïj tuung dwɑ̈y geki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. 
Isaiah66:24 Keny-ɑ ókedh gen ge døøg-ɑ pödhhi gen, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pyem ciggɑ ólidh yi gen ge thøø. Kunn-ɑ cɑm gen pɑ thøw, o mɑny-ɑ rɑ̈b gen pɑ thøw, pëthi ji bënn ceg-ɑ lɑ̈mmø yi gen.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Jeremiah1:1 Wɑ̈nyø men bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jermɑyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀, jɑl mɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ókwërø kì Anɑthöth kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Jeremiah1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb geki Jermɑyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amön bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ e runne bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij lɑwø. 
Jeremiah1:3 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cig-ɑ kwøb ki en keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöyɑkim bɑ rɑ̈dh. Kì bɑng kenyɑni, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyii kööbø ki en tyel mø gïïr, gïti kɑ ɑ́göög runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kì yij lɑwø. Wɑɑngɑni kì bïïj dwɑ̈tt ɑ ɑ́kïdhi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ yïnø." 
Jeremiah1:4 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Yï ɑ́myegɑ cøn, yï nuti nëngø yi yɑn ki wëy, kɑ yï yieenyɑ wɑ̈yí, yï nuti nywølø, kipe kinni o yï gwøøgɑ yïn ɑ́ jɑltöng kì kömi pödhh bënn.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Alöggɑ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøk, yɑ bɑ othinh, yɑ kwïj kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah1:7 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yï ko kööb kinni yï bɑ othinh, de kedhí yï tyëng-ɑ yï gen örɑ yïn, kɑ ge köbbí møg-ɑ cïgɑ yïn bënn." 
Jeremiah1:8 Yï ko böggi yi gen, mɑ́ yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki yïn, yɑ kor-ɑ yïn.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk!" 
Jeremiah1:9 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cönge rïïje, ɑnywɑle dhøgɑ, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Lïng! Kwøbb-ɑ ókømmi yi yïn ɑ cïbɑ dhøgí èn." 
Jeremiah1:10 Yï ɑ́thödhɑ ki tegø dicyɑ̈ngtïn kì kömi pödhh bënn; tegø men puthí wɑ̈g, kɑ yï cöd-ɑ piny, kí tegø men gëëd kɑ yï mïn-ɑ piny.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, yï nenn-ɑ ngø?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Bɑɑd yɑdh ɑkemel.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ɑ́lidh dyër, o yɑ yïd-ɑ kinni o kwøbbɑ bï gen gɑ dyër.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Codhe, ɑcigi yɑn köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Á ngø këti ɑ nenni yi yïn?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Yɑ nenn-ɑ dɑg me twɑg kì wɑɑng wuudø e wuul-ɑ tuung.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ryɑ̈g ótwɑɑg kömi tyëng-ɑ piny men, e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø," 
Jeremiah1:15 mɑ́ yɑ cwööl-ɑ tyëng wɑɑng wuudø bënn kinni bï gen keny. Rɑ̈nhi pödhhɑni kwømmi gen ócïb dhøggi döri Yerusɑlem kí bɑdhhi döre, geki bɑdhhi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah1:16 Jiɑ cɑyɑ’ cɑyø mɑ́ ge ɑ́røngi, yɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, kɑ gï ngɑ̈ddi gen ki gëdhhì. Ge ɑ́göög ki ngïjji jwögg møg mɑlli yi gen." 
Jeremiah1:17 Anɑn dhwöödh Jermɑyɑ̀, kɑ yï kedhí be köbbi gen møg-ɑ cïgɑ yïn bënn, yï ko böggi yi gen, kipe yï ógöjjɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì bøli gen." 
Jeremiah1:18 Lïng Jermɑyɑ̀! Yï óbëëd yï mɑɑn yi ji bënn kì piny men, yï ómɑn yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí jɑgge geki ji bënn, ge óbëëd ge mɑ̈n ki yïn. De dicyɑ̈ngtïn, yï thödhɑ’ thödhø ki tegø men guum kwøbbi gen. Yï óni kɑɑl-ɑ ówenø ki dörø, kɑ yï nɑ lööj ngyënyø dødø, kɑ yï nɑ döri ngyënyø dilɑl. Yï koo tyɑm yi gen, mɑ́ yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi ki yïn kɑ yï korrɑ. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah1:19  
Jeremiah2:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah2:2 i kedhɑ kɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem köbbɑ bënn kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yï thiinh yï mïdh-ɑ kwøb, nudd e opɑrrø yi yɑn, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́cerɑ yïn nywømø, yï ɑ́lugi kì bɑngɑ kì yij ryɑng, yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ yij piny me nuti pɑ̈nyø purø." 
Jeremiah2:3 Isrɑil, yï bɑ miɑ yɑ ketɑ, yï ɑ́bëëd yï bɑ ɑkwër yïn ɑ́ miɑ, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn ki rɑj kömi gen ödɑ ki orɑng geki ryɑ̈g. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Yïn ɑ gøl Yɑgob, lïngí wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah2:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ ɑ́yod yi kweyyi wun e rɑɑj kì riɑ, ɑ wiy yɑn piny yi gen? Gede ɑ kedhi gen be mɑlli ngïjji jwögg møg bong per gen, ɑ bɑnge göög gen thyew ge bong per gen?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Gede ɑ pɑ pɑ̈nyi gen kwøb kinni, ‘Ágøne Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́yïëël wɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑ ɑ́pyejji wɑ kì yij ryɑng men-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi ɑyejø kí burrì, piny-ɑ yije bong pï, ɑ bɑ muudhø, piny-ɑ bong ngɑn nyi kɑ̈l yije, piny-ɑ bong ngɑn bëëdø kì yije?’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ piny-ɑ yije pɑ̈ng yi gïïpiny bëne, o wu cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki gïg-ɑ døøj kì yije. De pinyɑ ɑ́yöd e ceg kɑ rënyø yi wun; piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun, ɑ́bwöl yi wun." 
Jeremiah2:8 Ókwër nuti pɑ̈nyi pëjjø kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ keny?’ Yɑ kwïj yi ókwërɑ. Yɑ ɑ́bɑny yi tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈gø. Jøtöng tööngø kɑ nyingi Bɑɑl, o ge mɑll-ɑ ngïjji jwögg møg bong per gen." 
Jeremiah2:9 “O yɑn, yɑ Áyïmø, yɑ nudd yɑ ogönyø ki wun, o yɑ ógönyø ki kwɑrri wun." 
Jeremiah2:10 Bɑ̈ɑ̈nu nɑm, kedhu Kobros, kɑ wu lïdhi wun, kɑ wu ödu Kedɑr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl ki dhɑnhø. O yod yi wun kinni bong gïn ni men mɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn." 
Jeremiah2:11 Bong pödhø mɑ ɑ́wil jwögge, ngö ge pɑth ki jwögg kidyër. De jiɑ yɑ ɑ́wil gen ki jwögg møøgø. Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́thödhi gen ki dhwɑ̈ng ɑ́wil gen ki jwögg møg bong per gen." 
Jeremiah2:12 Aköbbɑ mɑl kinni nhɑ̈nhe yi böögø, o ngɑ̈nge, o wïje cunge," 
Jeremiah2:13 mɑ́ jiɑ ɑ́göög ki orøg tyel ɑ́ryew, yɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny, yɑ bɑ wɑɑng pïg-ɑ tïl, kɑ ge okunyø ki ɑwöll, ɑwöll mø kɑggø ge pɑ cuggi mïdhø ki pï kinni tek." 
Jeremiah2:14 “Isrɑil pɑth ki bɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑngew, nuti nywøøl-ɑ yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. De ede bɑnge ɑ rïngii yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø?" 
Jeremiah2:15 Ge ɑ́ngɑ̈rrì kì köme ni ngur, pinye ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ ryɑng yi gen, kɑ kɑ̈dde cøør piny kɑ ji odɑ̈gø kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Jeremiah2:16 Yɑ̈ɑ̈r wïjí ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi tyëng kɑɑl Mɑmpis geki tyëng Tɑpɑnes," 
Jeremiah2:17 Isrɑil, yïn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l gïgɑni kömí kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́wiy yɑn piny, yɑ Wöw Jwøgí, yɑ pyejj-ɑ yïn kì yöö." 
Jeremiah2:18 Yï orumø kinni ɑ́ ngø ɑ óyod yi yïn keny-ɑ ókedhi Rïp be mɑdh ki pïi Kiir? Á ngø ɑ óyod yi yïn, keny-ɑ ókedhi Acuur yï kedh-ɑ be mɑdh ki pïi Porɑt?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Yï ócɑy-ɑ yi rɑ̈jí, yï ócɑy yi wiy-ɑ ɑ́wiy yɑn piny. Rɑ̈ji wiyí yɑn piny, yɑ Áyïmø Jwøgí, óyod yi yïn ki keny-ɑ keje, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́wïyí ki mïdhi kwøbbɑ.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wë Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Jeremiah2:20 Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Isrɑil, yï ɑ́bɑ̈nyi jɑɑgø yi yɑn kɑ̈ge dööng ceth, yï ɑ́bɑ̈nyi gwøgi gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn, kɑ yï óbɑ̈nyø mɑlli yɑn. Yï ɑ́pëggi be mɑlli jwöggi nyöödø kì wɑ̈thi ótøng geki thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ mɑr." 
Jeremiah2:21 Yï ɑ́pidhɑ yïn ɑ́ oløg me pëddi døøjø, yï ɑ́pidhɑ yïn ɑ́ köödhø me døj cɑrø. De lidh, rií ɑ́løg ngø! Yï pɑ̈r ki oløg me kwɑ̈gø." 
Jeremiah2:22 Cɑgg yï di lwøg ki sɑbon me teg, kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́cödh yi orøgí di bëëd ge nudd ge onennø yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah2:23 Yï kyëëd ɑ dï, kinni rií nuti bwööl yïn, kí kinni Bɑɑl nuti mɑllø yi yïn? Yï ɑ́røng ɑ dï kì yij tör, lidh gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn. Yï nɑ ɑmɑlø ɑ nyi tummi wïje kenyi bëën bøli kej tige." 
Jeremiah2:24 Yï nɑ mɑɑdh ɑderø ɑ nyi rengi pɑ̈l kenyi bëën bøli kej tige, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi mɑɑgii piny? Bong thwønh me pïd ree ki yɑbii, mɑ́ e nyi bëëd e nud ceth kì bøli kej tïg." 
Jeremiah2:25 Isrɑil, tyellí ko pïd, cwɑggí ko wëggí thwøwø yi rïngø kì bɑng jwögg møg pɑth. De yï okööbø kinni, ‘Pɑth, yɑ pɑ døøg cyɑ̈n. Yɑ kedh-ɑ bɑng jwögg-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn ceth.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:26 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï óyɑ̈r yï gøl Isrɑil, ni kenyi yɑ̈r kur kenyi mɑgii, yï óyɑ̈r wuki rɑ̈nhí, kí jɑggí, kí ókwërí, kí jøtöng møgí." 
Jeremiah2:27 Yï óyɑ̈r yï bëní, mɑ́ yï okööbø ce wïyí bɑ yɑdh, o kït bɑ meyí. Yɑ ɑ́lugí ngɑ̈jí, de kenyi bëën rɑj kömí, o yï nyi dwöög yïɑ yï kwɑjj-ɑ yɑn kinni yielɑ yïn." 
Jeremiah2:28 “Ágøne jwögg-ɑ ɑ́göggu ri wun? Wiy wu yiel yi gen kenyi bëën rɑj kömi wun, keløg ge ócuggø yïëdø! Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ́ ngø kwɑnni jwöggí nɑ kwɑnni kɑ̈ddí?" 
Jeremiah2:29 Wude ɑ gönyu yɑn, yɑ ɑ́rum ki bɑnyø yi wun?" 
Jeremiah2:30 Wu ɑ́cɑyɑ, de bong gïndøj mɑ ɑ́bï, wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi tyenyø yi yɑn. Yïn ɑ gøl Isrɑil, jøtöng møgí ɑ́cɑm yi pilí ni kenyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ngur." 
Jeremiah2:31 Wu tyëng Isrɑil, lïngu møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nɑ ryɑng kì yï wun, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ nɑ piny me rɑj, me bɑ muudhø. De wude ɑ kööb wun kinni wu ógöögø ki wɑ̈thi wun ni kɑ̀ dwɑddu en, o wu pɑ dwöög köörɑ?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nyɑnɑjur wïje nyii wïlø ki tigge? Nyɑndhɑjø wïje ówïl ki ógødh cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng nywöme? De jiɑ yɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi gen, ki cyɑ̈ng mø pɑ yïëy kwɑnø." 
Jeremiah2:33 Yï Isrɑil, yï nɑ ngɑn ngɑ̈ny rïngø kì bɑng cwøw, cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ rijjø ge ócuggø pwönyø yi yïn ki yɑb ki cwøw." 
Jeremiah2:34 Ógudhí cödhø yi remmi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur geki tyëng-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nuti mɑgø ge kɑb-ɑ gïïpiny. “De møgɑni bënn ɑ́kyer yi yïn," 
Jeremiah2:35 yï okööbø kinni, ‘Yïɑ bɑ̈r, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe pɑ nudd e rɑɑj ki yɑn.’ De yï bɑ men cɑy yi yɑn ceth, mɑ́ yï ɑ́kyëëd ce yï nuti røngø." 
Jeremiah2:36 Yï ɑ́yöni kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rengí bɑng jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Yï óyɑ̈ɑ̈r yi Rïp ni kɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈r yïn yi Acuur. 
Jeremiah2:37 Yï órengi yi Rïp yï yɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi yïn ɑ́rum ki bɑnyø yi yɑn, yɑ Áyïmø; bong gïjø men-ɑ óyod yi yïn kì bɑng gen.”" 
Jeremiah3:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keløg dhɑnhø cyëge otɑ̈ngø yi en, kɑ ókedhø kɑ ogöögø ki cï jɑlø megø, pɑ cige dwöög yïe. Piny bɑ men bwöl yi gïn ni menɑni. De yïn yï Isrɑil, cwøwí gïïr, o ɑnɑn yï dwɑddí dwöög yïɑ!" 
Jeremiah3:2 Lïïdh wɑ̈thi ótøng, dɑ keny mɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli gen yï nuti göögø ki ngɑn niin ki köögi kì yije? Yï nyi yïd-ɑ cwøw kì tøggi yëëth ni kenyi lïïb kur kì yöö ki ji mø rødh yi gen. Piny ɑ́bwöl yi yïn kì bɑng gwøøgí yïn ɑ́ ngɑn niin ki köögi." 
Jeremiah3:3 Bene ɑ bɑnge mɑ̈ɑ̈n kødh, kɑ bong-ɑ onywiyì. O men-ɑ́ yï nënni yïn ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi ceth; yï kwïj ɑyɑ̈r." 
Jeremiah3:4 “O yï ti kwøb ɑnɑn kinni, ‘Yï bɑ wïyɑ, o yɑ ɑ́wöni yɑ omɑɑrø yi yïn ceth kër-ɑ ɑ́wönɑ yɑ thiinh." 
Jeremiah3:5 Yï ócög pyëwí rɑɑj ki yɑn? Linyí ógïti ɑtheer?’ Isrɑil, bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn, de yï ɑ́göög ki gïgrijjø ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddí.”" 
Jeremiah3:6 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh, kinni, “Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ kwïj bëëdø, Isrɑil, ɑ́lidh yi yïn? Ngɑ̈je ɑ́luge yɑn kɑ ogöögø ki ngɑn niin ki köögi kì wɑ̈thi ótøng geki thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ mɑr bënn." 
Jeremiah3:7 Yɑ ɑ́rum ceth kinni kɑ ɑ́rume gwøgi møgɑni bënn, bɑ men dwöög yïɑ. De nuti dwöögø. Gwøngɑni ɑ́lidh yi Yeudiyɑ̀ nyimen nyɑn-ɑ kwïj bëëdø." 
Jeremiah3:8 Álidh yi Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni Isrɑil ɑ́tɑ̈ng yi yɑn, de nuti bwøgø. Áyöd e ceg-ɑ gwøg ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi thyew," 
Jeremiah3:9 wïje nuti pɑ̈nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈yø. Piny ɑ́bwöl yi en; ɑ́røngi kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mɑlle kïttì kí yenh. 
Jeremiah3:10 O kì bɑng møgɑni bënn, Yeudiyɑ̀ nyimï Isrɑil kööbe cem e dwöög-ɑ yïɑ, de yije dɑ ɑ́dud. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ cige köbbø kinni, i cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́wiyii piny yi Isrɑil, Isrɑil óløg me lɑ̈w kibøli Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah3:12 Yɑ ɑ́köbbe i lïïdhɑ wɑɑng wuudø, kɑ yɑ ryeerɑ kinni, “Isrɑil cɑgg dhøgí pɑ nyi mïdhi yi yïn, dwöög yïɑ, mɑ́ pyëwɑ nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø, o yɑ koo bëëdø pyëwe dɑ liny. Yɑ pɑ cög pyëwɑ dɑ liny ki yïn gïti ɑtheer." 
Jeremiah3:13 Yïëëy yøw kinni yï ɑ́bɑ̈jji, kɑ kwøbbɑ pyem yi yïn, yɑ Jwøgí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ yï yïëëy kinni yï ɑ́røngi kì thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ mɑr bënn, kɑ yï ómɑ̈ddø kì bøli jwögg mø pɑth, o kwøbbɑ nuti lïngø yi yïn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Wu tyëng-ɑ kwïj bëëdø, dwöög wun yïɑ, wu bɑ møgɑ, yɑ ókɑ̈bbi ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì yethi kɑ̈ddi wun, kɑ yɑ ókɑ̈bbø ki ji ɑ́ryew kì wïj kɑl, kɑ wu dwöög-ɑ Kïti Dhɑyøn." 
Jeremiah3:15 Wu óthödhɑ ki jɑgg møg-ɑ ólïngi kwøbbɑ, o wu ókwɑy yi gen ki peli wïj geki dïdø." 
Jeremiah3:16 Codhe, keny-ɑ óngënyi wun kì pinyɑni, ji koo kööbø këti kì ri Sɑnduug Cigg men-ɑ bɑ miɑ, ji koo rumø kì ree, wɑlɑ̀ koo pɑrri yi gen, koo dwɑddi yi gen thyew, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo göögø ki megø." 
Jeremiah3:17 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, Yerusɑlem, ócwøl ɑ́ ‘Kwøøm Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j,’ o pödhh bënn ócugi yije be mɑlli yɑn. Ge koo bëëdø ge gwøg-ɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ tyer yi pëthi gen ki tegi wɑ̈ɑ̈th këti." 
Jeremiah3:18 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, Isrɑil órëbi ki Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ge ódwöögø kì yïnø kyeel, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me ying wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ ge dwöög-ɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi gen ɑ́ mi gen gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Jeremiah3:19 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Isrɑil, yï ɑ́dwɑddɑ’ kwɑnyø yïn ɑ́ nyɑrɑ. Kɑ yï nëngɑ ki piny me døj, piny me pëddi døøjø kì kömi piny bëne. Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yɑ cwølli yi yïn yɑn ɑ́ wïyí. O ngɑ̈jí pɑ lugí yɑn këti." 
Jeremiah3:20 De yï nuti bëëdø kidøøj kì bølɑ, yï ɑ́göög ki dhɑjø me rɑj. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Cwɑg olïngø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì, bɑ cwɑggi tyëng Isrɑil, ge ceg-ɑ kïïwø, ge odhɑmmø mɑ́ ge ɑ́bëëd ge orøngø kɑ wɑ̈thi gen owïlø ki Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah3:22 Dwöög wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lugi ngɑ̈thi wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu ótuure kɑ wu wëgge mïdhi kwøbbe. Wu okööbø kinni, “Awøø, wø kedh-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e bɑ Jwøøg wøn." 
Jeremiah3:23 Wø nuti yielø yi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì wɑ̈thi kïttì. Kønyi Isrɑil kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete." 
Jeremiah3:24 De mɑlli Bɑɑl wø ɑ́göjje’ ɑyɑ̈r, kí lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi dhög kí dyëg, kí nyigi wøn geki wɑ̈ddi wøn, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́lem yi kweyyi wøn cøn," 
Jeremiah3:25 Wø ɑ́yɑ̈r ki yɑ̈rø me dwøng. Wø ɑ́wöni wø orøngø ceth wøki kweyyi wøn, kì bøli Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; cigge nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø yi wøn.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, keløg wu dwɑdd-ɑ dwöögø, dwöög wun yïɑ; keløg kwøbbɑ olïngø yi wun kɑ ngïjj-ɑ mɑɑn yi yɑn weddi yi wun," 
Jeremiah4:2 wu ócuggø köngø ki nyingɑ kidyër. Kɑ yɑ kwɑjji yi pödhh bënn o ge gyëdh yi yɑn, o yɑ lenhi yi gen.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni, “Gweju pwödhhi wun møg-ɑ nuti gwejø, byel ko kɑ̈ɑ̈g wun kelli koodh." 
Jeremiah4:4 Mïdhu lwömi wun ki yɑn, yɑ Wïi wun, kɑ ri wun thyëyu yɑn, wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem kí Yeudiyɑ̀. Ke pɑ göög wun kinøw, rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ólyel ni mɑc kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun. Olyel mɑnyɑni, bong ngɑn-ɑ ólwɑ̈ngii ki nɑ̈gø.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Koodh kɑ̈ngì kì yij piny bëne! Kiiw ɑkyew! Köbbi Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem kinni rengi gen kɑ̈dd-ɑ ówenø ki dör. 
Jeremiah4:6 Nyoodh yuu Dhɑyøn! Rengí, yieel wëyí kunɑni! Yï ko cwööng! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈nø ki ryɑ̈ng-ɑ rënyi piny, gø kɑ̈ɑ̈l en ɑ wɑɑng wuudø." 
Jeremiah4:7 Ngɑn-ɑ bï be rënyi piny ɑ́bï ni ngur me kɑ̈ɑ̈l keny-ɑ pɑ̈n en. Bï-ɑ be rënyi Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ódöng ge rënyø, o bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì yethi gen." 
Jeremiah4:8 Lunyu ri wun ki ocwɑ̈llì kɑ wu ywöngi wun, kɑ wu kïïw wun, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe nudd e rɑɑj ki mendwøng ki Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah4:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Rɑ̈nhì geki jɑgg óbwøg dicyɑ̈ngɑni, ókwër wɑ̈thi gen ómuum, kɑ jøtöng ongɑ̈ngø ki menteg.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Codhe ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Wuö, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyëng Yerusɑlem ɑ́wëny yi yïn bënn! Yï ɑ́kööb kinni i ódi mër, de yöd ɑ́ pilø ɑ muddi gen.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Bøli keny-ɑ óköbbi tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni ɑtunø me lëëdh obëënø, ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, óköni kömi gen e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij ryɑng. Koo bï ɑ́ yømø me nøg, men køøl cong keti gen." 
Jeremiah4:12 Atun-ɑ bï e gööj-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbëëd e teg ki mendwøng! Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́kwøb kwøbbi cɑyi jie. 
Jeremiah4:13 Lidh tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́bï ge nɑ pøøl, yɑ̈thi liny mø gen nɑ ɑtunø, kyënyi gen yöd kibøli cør. Wɑ ɑ́cyen! Wɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Yerusɑlem, lwöög orøg wɑ̈g kì miní, o yï yiel. Yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng yï rømm-ɑ rummì mø rijjø?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Tyëngwöödø møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l Dɑn kí myërri kïtti Eprɑim ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki wöödø me rɑɑj. 
Jeremiah4:16 Ge ɑ́bï-ɑ be köbbi pödhh geki Yerusɑlem kinni tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møgɑni ówøøw kömi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀," 
Jeremiah4:17 o Yerusɑlem tyeg yi gen ni tyëng-ɑ nyi kor pwödhø, mɑ́ jie ɑ́pyem-ɑ dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Jeremiah4:18 Yeudiyɑ̀, yï ketí ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈ngɑni kömí ki bëëdí geki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn, orøgí ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ni kömí ki orɑng menɑni bëne, miní ɑ́pyëde ki tøng." 
Jeremiah4:19 Minɑ ɑ́cöd! Pyëwɑ ceg-ɑ pöd, Yɑ ceg-ɑ orɑng Yɑ nyi cem-ɑ jwɑ̈y kì mɑl kenyi lïngɑ ywøøg kɑ̈ngi liny." 
Jeremiah4:20 Ryɑ̈ɑ̈ng bɑnge dɑ megø, pödhø bëne ɑ́döng e ryɑ̈gø. Kemmi wøn ɑ́jwɑn ki ywɑɑd piny, sitɑrri gen ɑ́döng gɑ thullì." 
Jeremiah4:21 Yɑ gït-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ nenn-ɑ liny e ónyïɑ̈ggø, e kɑ̈ngì okodhø?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ji møgɑ wɑ̈thi gen nøg, yɑ kwïj yi gen. Ge nɑ othønhø mø bɑ dhëgg; bong gïn ngɑ̈nyi yi wɑ̈thi gen. Ge ngɑ̈ny-ɑ gwøgi gïnrɑj, de ge nyii dhɑlø yi gwøgi gïndøj.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Yɑ ɑ́lïïdh kömi piny kɑ lidhɑ e bɑ ryɑng, kɑ yɑ lïïdh-ɑ mɑl, bong cɑr kì mɑl." 
Jeremiah4:24 Kɑ kïtt-ɑ døngø lidhɑ ge onhɑ̈nhø, o kïtt-ɑ thønhø nïng-ɑ ri gen." 
Jeremiah4:25 Bong ji mɑ ɑ́lidhɑ, cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ winy, ge pɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Jeremiah4:26 Piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med göögø ki ryɑng; kɑ̈dde rum rënyø, kì bɑng kɑ̀ rɑj pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mendwøng." 
Jeremiah4:27 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni i piny bëne ódöng nøw, kɑ ogöögø ki ryɑng. De gø koo rënye ki rënyi dwøng." 
Jeremiah4:28 Piny óywöngi ki ywøøg thøø, kɑ mɑl ogöögø e looj. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb, o dhøge pɑ wile. Gïn-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø ɑ́kwøbe, o pɑ døøg cyɑ̈n." 
Jeremiah4:29 Oliidh jøkyënyì geki jøg-ɑ nyi pöödø ki weth, ji órengi. Møøgø órengi yij thïm, møøgø óyedhi wɑ̈thi kïttì. Kɑ̈dd bënn ódöng nøw, o bong ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø kì yethi gen këti." 
Jeremiah4:30 Yerusɑlem yï ɑ́gɑ̈g! Yïde ɑ rug ki ɑ́cwïcwïl? Yïde ɑ rug ki tigg, kɑ nyingí giid? Bong gïn pere göög yi yïn ki dhwɑ̈ng! Yï ɑ́bɑny yi cwøwí, o ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi yïn." 
Jeremiah4:31 Yɑ ɑ́lïng ki cwɑg mø ni ywøøg ngɑn pɑ̈dhi piny, nɑ ywøøg ngɑn ceg kɑɑyø. Bɑ ywøøg Yerusɑlem, e opɑ̈we køm-ɑ cung, o cinge rïïj en, e okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g! Ge bï-ɑ be nɑ̈gi yɑn!”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Tyëng Yerusɑlem, rïngi wun, wu tumm-ɑ wɑ̈thi wun kì yethi yëëth, yɑ̈ɑ̈b wun kì kɑ̈jji ngyew! Wu ócuggø yïddø dhɑnhø, men gøggi dyër, men pɑ̈nyi ree ki mïdhi kwøbbi Jwøk? Ke yïddi wun, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki Yerusɑlem." 
Jeremiah5:2 Cɑgg wu kööbø ce wu mɑll-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu kømm-ɑ gïn pɑ gwøg yi wun." 
Jeremiah5:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nyi yɑb-ɑ ji-ɑ gøggi dyër ceth. Wu ɑ́gøj yi en, de gönyɑni nuti ywöör yi dëlli wun, wu ɑ́nyønge, de wu ɑ́dhɑ̈li dïdø. Wu ɑ́bëëd muddi wun teeg, kɑ wu ódhɑ̈lø wïyø ki orøg." 
Jeremiah5:4 Codhe ɑrumɑ kinni, “Møg bɑ ji mø nyingi gen cɑn yøw, o ge kwïj wøw. Ge göög-ɑ nøgi wɑ̈thi gen; gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøøg gen kwïj yi gen, men-ɑ́ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni o gwøg yi gen, kwïj yi gen." 
Jeremiah5:5 Yɑ ókedhi yï tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø, kɑ wø okööbø ki gen. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøøg gen óbëëdø gø ngɑ̈nyi yi gen ceth, eni gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni o gwøg yi gen.” De ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi bënn ki jyɑ̈gi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi kwøbbe." 
Jeremiah5:6 Bene ɑ bɑnge óbëën ngurrì kì pɑ̈l be nɑ̈gi gen, ge ókɑggi yi óthönhì møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l yij pɑ̈l, o kwɑ̈nyì ócyɑ̈dhi ge olïïbø kì yethi kɑ̈ddi gen. Ngɑn kedhi wɑ̈g bɑ men cɑm, mɑ́ orøøg gen dwøng, o ge nyi cög ge lug-ɑ ngɑ̈thi gen Jwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah5:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pëjji kinni, “Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki jiɑ kɑ per ngø? Yɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møg pɑth ki dyër. Jiɑ ɑ́cɑɑmɑ kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø, de ge ɑ́yöd ge kedh-ɑ be orøg, kɑ ge ocögø ge bëëdø kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi." 
Jeremiah5:8 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge nɑ thönhi kyënyì mø cwɑɑdhø; men nɑ̈g-ɑ yi ngööng cï wɑɑd gen. 
Jeremiah5:9 Ge ko cɑy yi yɑn kipe gïg ni møgɑni? Gøølɑ ko colɑ ki pönh-ɑ ni men? 
Jeremiah5:10 Yɑ óöni ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg keb bɑ̈ggi jiɑ piny, de gï koo rënyi yi gen ki mendwøng. Ge óköbbɑ kinni celli gen bɑ̈dd, mɑ́ bɑ̈ddɑni pɑth ki møgɑ." 
Jeremiah5:11 Yɑ ɑ́twɑny yi tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki mendwøng. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah5:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bɑny yi jie, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Bong gïn cuggi gwøgø yi en kidyër. Bong orɑng o bong liny, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈j men-ɑ ómɑg wɑ.”" 
Jeremiah5:13 Ge okööbø i kwøbbi jøtöng bɑ yømø yøw, o bong wöödø mɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen kì yï Jwøk." 
Jeremiah5:14 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, mɑ́ ji møgɑni kømm-ɑ gïg ni møg, kwøbbɑ ógwøøgɑ ge nɑ mɑc kì dhøgí. Ji óni yugg, o ge órɑ̈b yi mɑnyɑni.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Tyëng Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókɑ̈nø ki pödhø megø kì kun lɑ̈wi e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí. Bɑ pödhø me teg, o kɑ̈ge dööng, o dhøg gen kwïj yi wun." 
Jeremiah5:16 Jøge, jøg-ɑ nyi pöödø ki wethh bɑ yɑɑg teg, o ge nyi nɑ̈gø pëthi gen pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Jeremiah5:17 Byelli wun ócɑm yi gen geki gïgcɑmmi wun bënn; wɑ̈ddi wun ónɑ̈g yi gen geki nyigi wun. Jɑmmi wun óngɑlli yi gen, kɑ oløggi wun geki ólɑ̈mmi wun rënyi yi gen. Kɑ̈ddi wun kɑ̈dd-ɑ ógerø ki dör, møg-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun ócøør piny yi liny gen." 
Jeremiah5:18 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “De cɑgg ɑ́ kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, jiɑ pɑ tyëg ki nɑ̈gø yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah5:19 Keny-ɑ ópëjji gen kinni ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ gïgɑni bënn, köbbí gen Jermɑyɑ̀, kinni ni kɑ ɑ́lugi gen ngɑ̈thi gen yɑn kì piny gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, ge bɑ møg kïdhi be göggi tyëngpɑth, kì piny me pɑth ki mi gen.”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Köbbu kwɑrri Yɑgob, köbbu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni," 
Jeremiah5:21 Yiebu nyingi wun, wu ji-ɑ bɑ dhëgg, o pëthi wun bong gïn. Yï wun dɑ nying de wu pɑ nëënø, o yï wun dɑ yïthh de wu pɑ lïngø." 
Jeremiah5:22 Á kipe ngø ɑ pɑ böggu yɑn, yɑ bɑ Wïi wun? Á kipe ngø ɑ pɑ kïrri dëlli wun kì bølɑ? Ayejø ɑ́cïbɑ ɑ́ keew nɑɑm omelø; bɑ kew men gïti ɑtheer gø pɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈ne. Nɑɑm omelø ócuggø lenggi ree, de kewɑni pɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈ne, kɑ ɑpɑgø óngɑ̈rrø, o kewɑni pɑ pöödhe." 
Jeremiah5:23 De men-ɑ́ wun ɑ bɑ ji, muddi wun teeg, o wu bɑ tyëngpëëmø. Wu ɑ́këjji wɑ̈yi wun, kɑ yɑ wiyu piny." 
Jeremiah5:24 Yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø wørø yi wun, ngö wu nyi ödɑ’ ödø ki kødh kì cwir geki ɑyɑr, kɑ wu nyi thödhɑ ki byel yethi runn bënn." 
Jeremiah5:25 De wu ɑ́yöd wu mɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ gïgɑni bënn yi orøøg wun. 
Jeremiah5:26 “Tyëng-ɑ nyi gøggi gïgrijjø obëëdø kì kelli jiɑ, ge nëënø nɑ ji mø kor ɑ́kɑ̈llì, de pɑth ki winy ɑ ceg yi gen den-ɑ́ ji." 
Jeremiah5:27 Uddi gen ɑ́pɑ̈ng gen ki gïg-ɑ kɑbbi yi gen, ni jɑlceg ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli kenyi pɑ̈ɑ̈nge dhönge ki winy. Bene ɑ bɑnge kɑ̈ri gen kɑ ge ótëngø," 
Jeremiah5:28 ɑ bëëd ge cwiy cwiy, o ge yɑ̈ngø yɑ̈ngø. Gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen bong cögi gen. Jɑmmi kïjj ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n ge gïn, o ge pɑ gøggi dyër kipe tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen guud." 
Jeremiah5:29 “Dɑ́ yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ócɑy gen kipe møgɑni, gøølɑ ócolɑ ki pönhï." 
Jeremiah5:30 Gïjø me böggi, me kïïr dëllì ɑ́cwöb kì piny men," 
Jeremiah5:31 jøtöng kømm-ɑ kwøbbi pyed, ókwër jyɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi jøtöng, o møgɑni pɑ bɑny yi jiɑ. De ge ógöög ɑ dï kì bɑng keny-ɑ órum møgɑni?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Wu tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn, rengi wun, yiel wun wëyi wun! Rengi wun kì Yerusɑlem! Kodhu kɑ̈ngì kì Tekoɑ̀, kɑ wu rub wun ki mɑny-ɑ ólidh kì Bet Akerem. Pöli rek obëënø geki ryɑ̈g, ge bï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø." 
Jeremiah6:2 Yerusɑlem myëër, de órënyi," 
Jeremiah6:3 ji møøgø óköni ki jɑmmi gen, kɑ ge gudd-ɑ bɑdhhi kɑɑl, ngɑn gudd-ɑ keny-ɑ dwɑdde, kɑ byelli wun cɑm gen."
