Jeremiah6:4 Ge ókööbø kinni, “Gwiru ri wun kipe pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Yerusɑlem! Gwiru ri wun! Wɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r köme cɑ̈ng gudø ki löj!” De obëën bøli kenyɑni ge ókööbø kinni, “Piny ɑ́pöödh, tïbbì ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
Jeremiah6:5 Wɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r köme kì wɑ̈r, o dörr-ɑ korri kɑɑldwøng cøør wɑ piny.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Áyïmø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́köbbi jiɑni kinni i ngøl gen yenh piny, o ge göög ki rïwwì møg tyeeg kɑɑldwøng. Ákööb kinni, “Yerusɑlem ócɑy yi yɑn mɑ́ yije guud-ɑ nyingi ji." 
Jeremiah6:7 Yerusɑlem mïdh-ɑ gïgrijjø ni yith ɑ nyi mïdhi pï. Yɑ lïng-ɑ orɑng kí ryɑ̈g kì kɑɑldwøng. Rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì kí kedd ɑ nennɑ keti gen. 
Jeremiah6:8 Wu tyëng Yerusɑlem, wiy wu wëggi yewø yi ɑkørrɑni, de ke pɑ yewi wun, wu wiyɑ’ piny, kɑ kɑɑldwøng mi wun løgɑ ryɑng me yije pɑ cuggi bëëdø.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Áyïmø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Isrɑil óyɑy kɑ nɑ oløg men nywøle rumø ki pønø. Yɑ̈ɑ̈b kì kelli oløg kɑ bɑ̈dde yɑllí, men-ɑ óbëëd e dɑ nywøl mø döngø.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Alöggɑ kinni, “Á men ɑ ólïngi kwøbbɑ ke kyëddɑ gen? Muddi gen teeg, o ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbí, kwøbbí pɑ dwɑddi yi gen." 
Jeremiah6:11 Liny-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yïn nud kì pyëwɑ thyew, o pyëwɑ pɑ cuggi mɑgø yi yɑn këti.” Codhe ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Køny linyɑ kömi othønhø geki yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb kì yethi yëëth. Cwøw ókïdhi yïnø geki mɑ̈nn, cɑgg ɑ́ ywödhh, ge koo wiy thyew." 
Jeremiah6:12 Uddi gen ómëggi tyëngmøøgø geki pwödhhi gen kí mɑ̈nni gen. Tyëngpiny men cɑyɑ’ cɑyø. 
Jeremiah6:13 Ji bënn; tyëngdøngø kí othønhø ge wëny-ɑ ji kipe ngyëny, cɑgg ɑ́ jøtöng geki ókwër ge wëny-ɑ ji." 
Jeremiah6:14 Kedd-ɑ døngø kì ri jiɑ nenni yi gen ge nɑ kɑ̈jj mø bøllø yøw. Ge okööbø kinni, ‘Bong gïnrɑj,’ e dɑ rɑj." 
Jeremiah6:15 Wɑ̈thi gen pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y yi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen? Bong gøn, wɑ̈thi gen nuti lɑ̈ɑ̈yø, ge kwïj lɑ̈ɑ̈yi wïj! O ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh ni ji-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø; keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ gen, menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ thumi gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Cungi wun kì ɑ́kɑrri yëëth, kɑ wu lïdhi wun. Pyëju yëth-ɑ kɑ̈gi gen dööng, ki yuu-ɑ pëddi døøjø, kɑ wu kɑ̈llu yije, o wu óbëëd wun ki mër.” De ge ɑ́kwøb-ɑ kinni, “Pɑth, wø ɑ́bɑ̈nyi!”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki ngɑn nenni kodhi kɑng ki köögø. De ge ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wø koo lïngø.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Codhe, ɑkööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lïng wun, wun ɑ pödhh, kɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb kipe jiɑ lidh wun." 
Jeremiah6:19 Lïng yïn ɑ piny! Ryɑ̈g kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi ji møg, kipe rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi gen, kí kipe kɑ ɑ́bɑny gen pwönyɑ, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi ciggɑ." 
Jeremiah6:20 Cwɑggɑ ɑ́ ngø ki bɑkur men-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen kì Cebɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ ki yenh-ɑ yømi gen med møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì kun lɑ̈wi? Yɑ koo yïëy ki gïg-ɑ muuj yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ pyëwɑ koo med ki gëdhhi gen." 
Jeremiah6:21 Ji møg ówëggɑ cyerrø kɑ ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Ji óthøw kyeel ki nyigi gen, kɑ mɑ̈dhh othøø kyeel geki tyëng byëëg gen.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ji obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me ying wɑɑng wuudø, pödhø me teg kì wɑɑng wuudø kun lɑ̈wi ree ɑ́gwire kipe liny." 
Jeremiah6:23 Wethhi gen ɑ́kwɑny gen geki pilli gen, ge bɑ ji mø rijjø, o pëthi gen kwïj lɑ̈ɑ̈mø. Ywøøg tyelli kyënyì kí cwɑggi gen, lïngi e nɑ ruuri nɑɑm omelø. Ri gen gwiir gen kipe nyɑɑg ki Yerusɑlem.”" 
Jeremiah6:24 Tyëng Yerusɑlem okööbø kinni, “Wöödø menɑni ɑ́lïngi wøn, kɑ dëlli wøn ceg-ɑ ì lɑ̈b, wø ɑ́mɑg yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ wø orɑngø ni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny." 
Jeremiah6:25 Wø pɑ nyi kedhi yethi pwödh, wø pɑ nyi cyɑ̈dhi kì yethi yëëth, mɑ́ wø bɑ ɑtyeg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø cinggi gen dɑ pil; dɑ böögø me dwøng.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Lunyu ri wun ki ocwɑ̈llì, kɑ ri wun ngyelli wun kì yij belø. Ywöngi wun ki pïi nyingi wun, wu ce ywøg-ɑ wɑ̈d wun wɑ̈dkyel, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wun óceg-ɑ pɑ̈yyi piny." 
Jeremiah6:27 Jermɑyɑ̀, rɑng jiɑ, yï ce rɑng-ɑ ngyënyø dødø, kɑ ge yood mɑ bëëd gen kidï." 
Jeremiah6:28 Ge bɑ tyëngpëëmø mø muddi gen teeg ge bënn, muddi gen teeg ni ngyënyø dilɑl geki dødø. Ge rënyø ge bënn, mɑ́ ge wïïnø ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑtum." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mɑc lëëdh cɑrø kì purun, de ngyënyø dhɑ̈li lenyø, cyedhhe ɑ́dhɑ̈li bëën wɑ̈g. Jiɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li; tyëngrijjø ɑ́dhɑ̈li kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kelli gen." 
Jeremiah6:30 Ge ócwølli gɑ ji mø bong per gen, mɑ ge ɑ́bɑny yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́öre Kengø keny-ɑ nyi mɑ̈ddi yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni i cungɑ kì kenyɑni kɑ ge köbbɑ møg-ɑ köbbi gen yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni, “Wil wun yëth-ɑ bëëd wun geki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun, o wu wiy yi yɑn, o wu bëëd wun kì piny men." 
Jeremiah7:2  
Jeremiah7:3  
Jeremiah7:4 Wu ko yïëy këti ki kwøbb-ɑ wëëny wun kinni, ‘Bong gïn nywɑl wɑ! Men bɑ Kengi Wë! Men bɑ Kengi Wë! Men bɑ Kengi Wë!’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Wil wun yëth-ɑ bëëd wun, kɑ gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun ɑnɑn wiy wun. Nyi göggu ri wun gïgdøj." 
Jeremiah7:6 Kɑ cɑmmi jɑmmi kïjj geki thwömm, wiy wun. Kɑ nɑ̈nggi ji-ɑ yï gen bɑ̈r kì piny men, wiy wun. Kɑ kwɑjji jwögg møøgø, wiy wun; mɑ́ wu órënyi yi gïn ni menɑni." 
Jeremiah7:7 Ke wil wun bëëdi wun, wu owiyø yi yɑn, o wu bëëd wun kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi wun, ɑ́ mi gen gïti ɑtheer." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Wu ko ngɑ̈dh kwøbb-ɑ wëëny wun. 
Jeremiah7:9 Wu nudd wu okwɑ̈dø, o wu onɑ̈gø ki ji, wu nudd wu oniin ki tyëng-ɑ nuti nywøøm wun ri wun, wu nyii köngø ki pyed, o wu ngɑ̈dd-ɑ Bɑɑl ki gëdhhì, kɑ jwögg mɑ ɑ́bëëd ge kwïj yi wun cøn mɑlli wun." 
Jeremiah7:10 Wu gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi yɑn, o wu nyi bï wun be cung kì bølɑ, kì Kengø wu okööbø kinni, ‘Bong gïn nywɑl wɑ!’" 
Jeremiah7:11 Wu orumø kinni Kengɑ bɑ keny nyi pɑ̈nni yi kurrì? Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun ɑ́rum ki lidhø yi yɑn. 
Jeremiah7:12 Kedhu Cilø keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøngɑ ki myegø ɑ́ keny mɑlli yɑn, kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ en kipe orøøg jiɑ tyëng Isrɑil lidh wun." 
Jeremiah7:13 Orøngɑni bëne ɑ́gwøg yi wun, o wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbɑ, ngö yɑ nyii kööbø, kɑ yɑ nyi cig-ɑ kwøb. Wu nuti yïëyø keny-ɑ ɑ́cwølɑ wun." 
Jeremiah7:14 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ Cilø göggɑ’ Kengø men, eni keny-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ Cilø gwøgɑ’ gwøgø kì keny, eni keny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi wun geki wun." 
Jeremiah7:15 Wu cyeddɑ’ cyeddø kì butɑ, ni kɑ ɑ́cyeddɑ wɑddi wun, tyëng Isrɑil. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah7:16 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, yï ko kwɑ̈jji kipe jiɑni. Ge ko ywøøg, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈jji gen ko kwɑjjí; rií ko pïd ki odhɑm kì bølɑ, mɑ́ yɑ koo yïëy ki lïngi kwøbbí." 
Jeremiah7:17 Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem pɑ nenni yi yïn? 
Jeremiah7:18 Yɑnythønhø gwen-ɑ yugg, o wëëg cwɑg gen mɑc, o tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn nyöm gen ɑwɑj men bul ɑ́ kɑɑk, ge bud-ɑ jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑl. Ge nyi kuny-ɑ jwögg mø pɑth ki møgi oløg, ge dwɑdd-ɑ göggi yɑn ki gïnrɑj." 
Jeremiah7:19 De bɑ yɑn ɑ göggi yi gen ki gïnrɑj kidyër? Pɑth ki yɑn, ge gögg-ɑ ri gen ki gïnrɑj, o ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ɑyɑ̈r kömi gen." 
Jeremiah7:20 O yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, linyɑ liny-ɑ rɑj kønyɑ’ kömi gen geki Kengø men. Linyɑ kønyɑ’ kömi ji geki lɑ̈yy, kí men-ɑ́ yenh geki byel. Linyɑ óni mɑc me bong ngɑn lwɑ̈ngii ki nɑ̈gø." 
Jeremiah7:21 “Wun ɑ jiɑ, dɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì wïj këli lɑm, o dɑ gëdhhì møg rïnggi gen bɑ ɑyïëy ki cɑmø yi wun. De gïn-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ kinni, gëdhhɑni ryeet ócuggø cɑmø yi wun." 
Jeremiah7:22 Mɑ́ kweyyi wun nuti cïgi yɑn kwøbbi gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp. 
Jeremiah7:23 De ge ɑ́cïgɑ’ kinni, lïngi gen kwøbbɑ, o yɑ óbëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, o ge óbëëd gen gɑ jiɑ." 
Jeremiah7:24 De kwøbbɑ nuti lïngø yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ gï nuti ywøør gen. Ge ɑ́yöd ge gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ tyer yi gen ki tegi muddi gen, kɑ ge yöd ge ceg-ɑ rënyø kibøli ke di dönyi gen." 
Jeremiah7:25 Wu nyi ödɑ’ ödø ki bɑ̈nggɑ jøtöng këër cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kweyyi wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp. 
Jeremiah7:26 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lïng wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́ywøør kwøbbi gen thyew. De wu yöd muddi wun ceg-ɑ tëngø, kɑ wu ópëddø pëëmø kibøli kweyyi wun." 
Jeremiah7:27 “Jermɑyɑ̀, köbbí kwøbbɑni bënn jiɑ, de kwøbbí koo lïngi yi gen ceth, ge ócwøl yi yïn de ge koo yïëy." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ge óköbbi yi yïn kinni kwøbbɑ pɑ lïngi yi pödhi gen, yɑn ɑ Jwøøg gen, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ dïd kì bɑng cɑ́y-ɑ nyi cɑɑy gen. Pëthi gen ɑ́thøw. Bong mïdhi dhøg me nud wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn kööbø kì ree." 
Jeremiah7:29 “Ywöngi wun, wu tyëng Yerusɑlem, pyëëdu yëyyi wɑ̈thi wun wɑ̈g, kɑ ge weddi wun. Wör wun ki wörri ywøg kì wɑ̈thi ótøng, mɑ́ yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwɑ rɑɑj, o jiɑ ɑ́bɑnyɑ." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj, ngïjji jwöggi gen, gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi yɑn ɑ́cïb gen yij Kengɑ, kɑ gø bwöl gen." 
Jeremiah7:31 Kɑ ge ogëdø kì Töör Kinöm ki këli lɑm me cwøl ɑ́ Töpeth, men köme nyi rɑ̈b gen wɑ̈ddi gen ki nyigi gen womɑ̈nn gɑ gëdhhì. Ge nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni göög gen ki gïn ni menɑni, rumm-ɑ ni møgɑni nuti pɑ̈nyi bëën wïjɑ." 
Jeremiah7:32 Bøli keny megø óbï men koo cwøllii ɑ́ Töpeth wɑlɑ̀ Töör Kinöm, de ódøøg be cwøllø ɑ́ Töör Ngɑl. Ge ókuny-ɑ kunɑni ki ji, mɑ́ e bong keny megø men-ɑ ókoony gen." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ji ócɑm-ɑ yi winy geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, o bong ngɑn-ɑ óryem gen kì kömi ji." 
Jeremiah7:34 Piny ógöögø ki ryɑng, mɑ́ medi pyëw geki tugø, kí medi pëëth kí nywöm, ge ócuung yi yɑn kì Yerusɑlem geki kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah8:1 “Obëën bøli kenyɑni, cu rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí cu jɑgge, kí cu ókwër geki cu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Yerusɑlem bënn ógööl wɑ̈g kì yethi rörri gen." 
Jeremiah8:2 Ge koo døøg ki cøngø kɑ ge kony, de ge óceg kɑ wiyø ge odhoongø kì piny ni cyedh. Cu jiɑni óbëëd ge tɑyø kì piny, o ge nenni yi cɑ̈ng geki dwɑ̈y kí kyell. Mɑ́ teenɑni ɑ́mɑɑr-ɑ cɑ̈ng kí dwɑ̈y kí kyell kɑ gï göggi gen, kɑ gï nyi kwɑjji gen, kɑ gï mɑlli gen." 
Jeremiah8:3 O tyëng pönh-ɑ rɑj èn møg-ɑ ɑ́döng ge onëënø kì yïnø, kun-ɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ gen, ge ócwøl thøø kibøli nënnì. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah8:4 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i köbbɑ jie kinni, “Kenyi pɑ̈ɑ̈dh dhɑnhø, pɑ nyi dhwödh këti? Keløg dhɑnhø ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ki yöö, pɑ nyi døøg ngɑ̈je?" 
Jeremiah8:5 De wude jiɑ, ɑ wiyu yɑn piny, kɑ wu ódhɑ̈lø dwöög yïɑ? Wude ɑ mɑ̈gi wun kì ri ngïjji jwöggi wun, kɑ wu óbɑ̈nyø ki dwöög yïɑ?" 
Jeremiah8:6 Yïthhɑ ɑ́kyënɑ kidøøj, de bong dyër mɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun. Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yïëy rɑ̈je, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pëjji kì kelli wun kinni, ‘Á ngø ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ e rɑj?’ De ngɑn cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yuue ni kyeny men pödhhi yij liny." 
Jeremiah8:7 Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ ɑ́mɑ̈dh bøli kej dwöönge ngɑ̈nyi yi en. O ɑkur, kí nyɑwɑ̈nyø, kí ɑ́kej, bøli kej bëëni gen ngɑ̈nyi yi gen. De men-ɑ́ wun jiɑ, cigg-ɑ jɑɑgɑ wun kwïj yi wun." 
Jeremiah8:8 Wude ɑ kööb wun kinni wɑ̈thi wun pel, o ciggɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi wun? Lidhu ciggɑ kɑ ɑ́wiil gen yi bödhhi gwed." 
Jeremiah8:9 Jø wun jøg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel ɑ́yɑ̈r, wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́muum kɑ ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ yethi ɑ́kɑ̈llì. De ɑ́gøne peli wïj men-ɑ ɑ́yod yi gen kɑ ɑ́bɑny gen yɑn?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Kì bɑng menɑni, pwödhhi gen ómëggɑ tyëngmøøgø, kɑ mɑ̈nni gen mëggɑ cwøw møøgø. Mɑ́ teedø bëne; ngɑndwøng kí othinh yɑb-ɑ kɑ̈rø ki wëënyø. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ jøtöng geki ókwër ge wëny-ɑ ji." 
Jeremiah8:11 Kedd-ɑ ri jiɑ nenni yi gen, ge nɑ kɑ̈jj møg pöggø yøw. Ge okööbø kinni, ‘Piny døøj!’ Ngö e bong gïndøj." 
Jeremiah8:12 Jiɑ, wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́di lɑ̈ɑ̈yø keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøg wun gïgɑni, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø? Bong gøn, wɑ̈thi wun nuti lɑ̈ɑ̈yø kinni tek, men-ɑ́ lɑ̈ɑ̈yi wïj kwïj yi wun! Kì bɑng menɑni, wu ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh ni tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, wu óceg ì rɑy kì piny keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ wun. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ congi jiɑ ni kenyi congi dhɑnhø byelli pwödhe, de ge nɑ oløg me kööre bong nywøl, o ge nɑ ólɑm me ree bong nywøl, o yïthhe wewø wewø. Bene ɑ bɑnge wëggɑ pinyɑni kwɑnyø yi tyëngpɑth.”" 
Jeremiah8:14 Jii Jwøk okööbø kinni, “Á kipe ngø ɑ nudd wɑ obëëdø kì piny? Bïu rengi wɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ bɑ ɑger ki dör, o wɑ thøw wɑ kì kunɑni. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee wɑ ɑ́cɑye ki thøø, wɑ ɑ́wëgge mɑdhi sïm, mɑ́ wɑ ɑ́røngi kì bøle." 
Jeremiah8:15 Wɑ ɑ́kwɑjj-ɑ mër, o keddee di tuur, de ɑ́yöd kömee pɑ̈dh-ɑ yi böögø me dwøng." 
Jeremiah8:16 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́wɑ̈nhi Dɑn, cwɑggi kyënyi gen olïngø yi wɑ. Piny bëne ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh kɑ̀ ywöngi kyënyi gen. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́bï be rënyi pinyee, kí jɑmm-ɑ yije bënn, kí kɑ̈llee geki jie bënn.”" 
Jeremiah8:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Nennu yöö kidøøj, kelli wun ödɑ’ ödø ki thöllì mø bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, møg pɑ cuggi thyëdhø, o wu bɑ møg kɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen ceth.”" 
Jeremiah8:18 “Rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ bong gïn lɑ̈ɑ̈nyii; minɑ ɑ́cöd. 
Jeremiah8:19 Lïng wun! Kì yij pödhø bëne yɑ lïng-ɑ jiɑ ge óywöngø kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tøøk kì Dhɑyøn! Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dhɑyøn ceg bëëdø e tøøk!’ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ólöggi kinni, “Ede pyëwɑ ɑ wëggu en rënyø kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mɑllu ngïjji jwögg? Kí kɑ ɑ́bøødh wun ri wun bøli jwöggi wun jwögg-ɑ pɑth?”" 
Jeremiah8:20 Ji óywöngø kinni, “Kødh ɑ́teem! Byel ɑ́rum ki kɑjø, de wɑ nuti yielø.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Minɑ ɑ́cöd, mɑ́ jiɑ ɑ́mød piny, yɑ ceg-ɑ ywøg, wïjɑ ɑ́muum." 
Jeremiah8:22 Bong yɑdh me yïëdø kì Gilyɑd? Bong ɑkïmm kì kunɑni? De jiɑ gede ɑ cög gen ge pɑ yiel ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì! 
Jeremiah9:1 Wïjɑ ce di bëëd ɑ́ yiith pï, o nyingɑ ce di bëëd gɑ wøl me rïngi wɑ̈g e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng pï, o yɑ di pëggɑ be ywøg kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r, yɑ ywøg-ɑ jiɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah9:2 Ce di bëëd e dɑ keny bëëdɑ kì yij pɑ̈l, kun lɑ̈ɑ̈wɑ riɑ ki jiɑ. Ge pɑ nyi cungi kì kömi dhøggi gen, ge bɑ tyëngpyed bënn." 
Jeremiah9:3 Ge nyi kømm-ɑ pyed yøw, bëëdi ɑ́dud ɑ ceg ki beedø kì pönhï. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jiɑ gøgg-ɑ rɑj o yɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li yïëyø yi gen yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen.”" 
Jeremiah9:4 Dhɑnhø tid-ɑ ree ki mɑ̈dhe, o bong ngɑn ngɑ̈dh ómen, mɑ́ nyiimïee bënn ɑ́göög ki wëëny ni Yɑgob, o dhɑnhø bëne kwɑ̈dhh-ɑ mɑ̈dhhe." 
Jeremiah9:5 Ge wëny-ɑ mɑ̈dhhi gen bënn, o bong ngɑn kømmi dyër; lebbi gen ɑ́pwönyi yi gen ki kømmi pyed, o ge pɑ wïyi ki orøg. Ge gøgg-ɑ rɑj kí wëënyø, ge dhɑ̈li wïyø ki orøg. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø cem e óbɑnyø yi jie." 
Jeremiah9:6  
Jeremiah9:7 Bene ɑ pere kööb Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jiɑ óleny yi yɑn ni ngyënyø, o ge orɑng yi yɑn. Jiɑ ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj, ge gwøøgɑ’ ngø këti?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Lebbi gen nɑ nywøli weth mø bɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g, ge cög ge kømm-ɑ pyed. Ji bënn nënni, ngɑɑn kööb ɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki mɑ̈dhe, de kedh e ceg-ɑ mɑ̈dhe ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì møg mɑgii." 
Jeremiah9:9 Ge pɑ cɑy yi yɑn kipe møgɑni? Gøølɑ pɑ colɑ ki pönh-ɑ ni men! Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah9:10 Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yɑ óywöngi kipe kïttì, yɑ ókïïmø kipe cɑ̈mmi dhög, mɑ́ ge ɑ́thwøw, o bong ngɑn nyi weli e kɑ̈ll-ɑ kɑ̈jjɑni. Ywøøg dhög pɑ nyi lïngi këti, winy ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g geki lɑ̈yy.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yerusɑlem ógwøgɑ ɑ́ thuur tuggì, ógwøg yi yɑn ɑ́ keny bëëd yi ógwøgg, kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ógöögø ki ryɑng, keny yije pɑ cuggi bëëdø.”" 
Jeremiah9:12 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëjɑ kinni, “Ede piny ɑ döönge nøw, e thwøwø ni ryɑng, o bong ngɑn nyi weli e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yije? Á men ɑ wïje pel ɑ cuggi yodi thɑ́ møgɑni? Møgɑni ɑ́löbbí men, o gï ólonye ki köbbi wøn?”" 
Jeremiah9:13 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gïn ni menɑni ɑ́cwöb kɑ per kɑ ɑ́wiy cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ jiɑ yi gen. Kwøbbɑ nuti lïngi gen, o gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ gen nuti gwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah9:14 De ge ɑ́yöd muddi gen ceg-ɑ tëngø, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli ngïji Bɑɑl ni kɑ ɑ́pwönyi gen yi kweyyi gen." 
Jeremiah9:15 Adɑ́ lïng ɑnɑn ki gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; jiɑ ómëggɑ lum ɑ́ kej gïncɑm, o ge ómëggɑ sïm, o mɑdh yi gen ɑ́ kej pï." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ge ókedhhɑ kì pödhh møg per gen nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ yi kweyyi gen, o kömi gen óödɑ ki liny gïti keny-ɑ ótyëgɑ gen ki nɑ̈gø.”" 
Jeremiah9:17 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Rum wun kì ri gïg-ɑ ócwöb! Cwöddi wun ki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg ywöngi ki thøø.”" 
Jeremiah9:18 Kɑ ji okööbø kinni, “Köbbu gen jwɑn gen bëën be wör ki wörri ywøg, gïti keny-ɑ óywöngi wøn, kɑ nyingi wøn opɑ̈ngø yi pï, kɑ yëyyi nyingi wøn onebø yi pïi nying.”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Lïng ki ywøg kì Dhɑyøn kinni, “Wø ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wø ɑ́yɑ̈r ki mendwøng! Wø ceg-ɑ dhwödhø kì pinyee. Myërree ɑ́rum ki cøør piny.”" 
Jeremiah9:20 Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, lïngu kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ møg-ɑ kømme lïngi wun kidøøj. Pwönyu nyigi wun ki ywøg, kɑ mɑ̈dhhi wun pwönyi wun ki wörri ywøg." 
Jeremiah9:21 Thøø ɑ́bï yethi uddee e kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑwɑjj, kɑ kedh-ɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd yi wɑ. Othønhø ɑ́pwööde piny kì yethi yëëth, kɑ wøbb pwööde piny kì kɑ̈jji ngyew." 
Jeremiah9:22 Tyëngthøø buud-ɑ piny kì kɑ̈jj bënn, ge twɑ̈li kì piny ge nɑ cyedh, ge buud nɑ byell-ɑ ókɑɑj piny e bong ngɑn cøng gen. Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i kwøbɑ gen ɑgɑk.”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, köthi gen ko pwöd gen, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ teg ri gen ko lejji gen, kɑ tyëngkɑ̈rì ko thwøg kipe kɑ̈rri gen." 
Jeremiah9:24 Ke di ngɑn dwɑddi pwödi kööre, pwöde kööre kinni yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi en, o møgɑ yood en, mɑ́ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø miɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi, o yɑ nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër. Bene gen møg-ɑ med kì pyëwɑ ɑgɑk. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah9:25 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ tyëng Rïp obëënø, ge ócɑy yi yɑn geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kí tyëng Edöm, kí tyëng Amön, kí tyëng Moɑb geki tyëng-ɑ yëyyi wɑ̈thi gen ótebø, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì yij ryɑng. Jiɑni bënn bɑ ɑngøl, de lwöm-ɑ pere ɑ́ngøl gen nuti mïdhø yi gen. Lwömɑ nuti mïdhø yi jiɑni geki tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
Jeremiah9:26  
Jeremiah10:1 Wu tyëng Isrɑil, lïngu wöön-ɑ öri wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah10:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bëëdi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ko ngøy wun, wu ko böggi yi ngïjj-ɑ nyi nënni gɑ gïïngɑ̈ngø kì mɑl, cɑgg pödhh-ɑ kyeelø böggi." 
Jeremiah10:3 Kwøbbi jwöggi jiɑni bong per gen. Bɑ yɑdh ɑ ɑ́ngul kì wɑg, o tyeng ki døøji cingø yi bødhø," 
Jeremiah10:4 o gø dhyɑwe ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø. Bɑ ɑgur kì piny ki gedd kipe kinni o cöge e pɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dh. 
Jeremiah10:5 Ngïjji jwöggɑni nɑ óryëmmi kì yij bɑɑg ócøyø, ge pɑ kööbø; ge nyi ceg kɑ tyëddø, mɑ́ ge pɑ cuggi cyɑ̈dhø. Wu ko böggi yi gen; bong gïnrɑj me cuggi göggi wun yi gen, o bong gïndøj me cuggi göggi wun yi gen thyew.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yïn, yï teeg cɑrø ki mendwøng, o perí teeg ki mendwøng." 
Jeremiah10:7 Á men ɑ pɑ wør yïn; yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh pödhh bënn? Yï døøj ki wørø. Bong ngɑn pɑ̈r ki yïn, kì kelli tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel kì yethi pödhh bënn, wɑlɑ̀ kì kelli rɑ̈nhi gen." 
Jeremiah10:8 Ge bɑ ɑbɑ̈ngg o ge bɑ dhëgg bënn. Ge dïd-ɑ ngø kì yï ngïjj-ɑ ótyengø gɑ yenh? 
Jeremiah10:9 Ngïjj-ɑ ógøjø ki ɑ́tegø men-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì Tɑrcic, kí dhɑb men-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì Upɑdh, o bɑ gwøøg bødhø yøw. Ge bɑ ɑruug ki ógudh møg kïddi gen bɑ ówɑw kí ɑ́cwïcwïl, møg-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø yi bødhø me cinge døøj." 
Jeremiah10:10 De yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yïn Jwøng-ɑ dyër. Bene yïn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø yï rɑ̈nh-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mee gïti ɑtheer. Kömi piny bëne nyi ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh kenyi bëëd pyëwí rɑɑj; rɑ̈ji pyëwí pɑ cuggi nginø yi pödhh." 
Jeremiah10:11 (Köbbu gen kinni jwögg-ɑ nuti cwɑ̈ɑ̈j piny geki mɑl órënyi kɑ nyingi gen owïlø. Bong keny-ɑ óbëëd yi gen kì kömi piny.) 
Jeremiah10:12 Piny ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ tege, lɑ̈bø ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi en kɑ peli wïje, kɑ mɑl pedhe." 
Jeremiah10:13 Pï nyi ceg-ɑ ruurø kì mɑl kɑ̀ kööbe, pøøl nyii kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi en kì cögi piny. Mɑl nyi wëgge’ ogwel kì yij kødh, kɑ yømø nyi öre kì keny-ɑ mïdhii." 
Jeremiah10:14 Ji nyii muumø yi møgɑni kɑ wɑ̈thi gen ócungø, tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki ngïjjì ceg-ɑ meemø, mɑ́ jwögg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen pɑth ki jwögg-ɑ dyër o ri gen bong wëy." 
Jeremiah10:15 Bong gïn gwøøg gen, o ge døøj ki bɑnyø ceth. Ge ótørri keny-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be lidhi kwøbbi gen." 
Jeremiah10:16 Jwøøg Yɑgob pɑ pɑ̈r ki gen, bene Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j jɑmmì bënn, Isrɑil ɑ́myege o bëëde ɑ́ dïl jie, nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah10:17 Wu tyëng Yerusɑlem, wu bɑ ɑtyeg! Cøng wun jɑmmi wun." 
Jeremiah10:18 Wu leeng-ɑ wɑ̈g kì piny men yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu møde’ piny, bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ódöng. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah10:19 Tyëng Yerusɑlem okïïwø kinni, “Wɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈g! Keddee pɑ nøggi. Wɑ ɑ́rømm-ɑ kinni møgɑni ócuggø nginø yi wɑ!" 
Jeremiah10:20 Kemmee ɑ́rënyi; thøll-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi gen ɑ́cöddi. Nyigee ɑ́kedh ge bënn; bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́döng men-ɑ ótïng kemmee këti; bong ngɑn ngɑb sitɑrri kemmì.” 
Jeremiah10:21 Alöggɑ kinni, “Jɑggee wɑ̈thi gen nøg; Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ nyi kwɑjji yi gen, o gï di nyudhe. Bene ɑ dhɑ̈li gen ki gwøg, kɑ jie kedhhi." 
Jeremiah10:22 Lïng wun! Wöödø ɑ́bï! Dɑ ɑgwɑg me dwøng kì pödhø me ying wɑɑng wuudø, kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ óløg ryɑng yi liny pönhɑni, ge ódöng ge bëëd-ɑ yi ógwøgg.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni dhɑnhø yuue kwïje, bong ngɑn wëye ying cinge." 
Jeremiah10:24 Cɑy jií yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ yï tyeny-ɑ gen, de wø ko tií ki twijø, wɑlɑ̀ wø ko nyi cɑɑy e pyëwí rɑɑj, mɑ́ ke cɑɑy wøn e pyëwí rɑɑj; wø bɑ møg thumi." 
Jeremiah10:25 Wiy pyëwí bëëd e rɑɑj ki pödhh-ɑ pɑ mɑlli yïn, geki tyëng-ɑ bɑny yïn. Jií ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen; wø ɑ́rënyi yi gen ki mendwøng, kɑ pödhi wøn odöngø e ryɑ̈gø." 
Jeremiah11:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Lïngí møg-ɑ ying yij lwöbø. Köbbí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni," 
Jeremiah11:3 yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́cïbi kömi tyëng-ɑ pɑ mïdhi møg-ɑ ying yij lwöbø ki cyën." 
Jeremiah11:4 Bene lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi yɑn wøki kweyyi gen keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́bëëd gen, ge ce bëëd ɑ yij purun me yije lyeel yi mɑc. Ge ɑ́köbbɑ kinni lïngi gen kwøbbɑ, kɑ gïn-ɑ köbbɑ gen nyi gwøg gen. Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, keløg møgɑni ógwøg yi gen, ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah11:5 Codhe, o yɑ gwøgɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köngɑ kweyyi gen kinni, ge óthödhɑ ki piny me yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, o bene pinyɑni ɑ yije di gen ɑnɑn.” Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, “Gen ɑgɑk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kí yethi yëthi Yerusɑlem. Kɑ teedø köbbí kinni, lïngi gen møg-ɑ yij lwöbø, kɑ gïg-ɑ kømme gwøg gen." 
Jeremiah11:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kweyyi gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ge ɑ́cegɑ ki menteg kinni, mïdhi gen ciggɑ, o yɑ nuti wïyø ki pɑ̈ddi wɑ̈thi gen gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Jeremiah11:8 De ge nuti lïngø, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ nyi köbbɑ gen pɑ nyi gwøg yi gen. De ge ɑ́yöd muddi gen ceg-ɑ tëngø, kɑ ge ópëddø gwøg ki gïgrijjø. Ge ɑ́köbbɑ kinni mïdhi gen cigg de ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi. Codhe ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ cɑ́y-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yij lwömɑni kömi gen.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem gøgg-ɑ ɑmolpiny ki perɑ." 
Jeremiah11:10 Ge ɑ́døøg be gwøg ki orøng-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi kweyyi gen cøn, ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi gen ki gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø. Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀, lwöbø ɑ́pɑ̈d yi gen ryeet, eni lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi yɑn wøki kweyyi gen." 
Jeremiah11:11 Anɑn yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ gen ki köbbø kinni, ryɑ̈g kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi gen, o ge pɑ bodh. O keny-ɑ óywöög gen köörɑ ge kwɑjj-ɑ kønyø, kwøbbi gen pɑ lïngɑ," 
Jeremiah11:12 Codhe, o tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem kedhi gen yï jwögg-ɑ nyi thödhi yi gen ki gëdhhì, gï ókwɑjji yi gen kinni, kunyi gen. De ge koo yiel yi jwöggɑni, keny-ɑ óbëën ryɑ̈g kömi gen." 
Jeremiah11:13 Kwɑnni jwöggi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ nɑ kwɑnni kɑ̈ddi gen kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø. O tyëng Yerusɑlem gëdø ki këlli lɑm kì yethi yëëth bënn kì kɑɑlɑni, møg nyi gedh gen Bɑɑl, jwøng-ɑ kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø." 
Jeremiah11:14 Jermɑyɑ̀, yɑ ko kwɑjjí, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko dhɑmmi kì bølɑ kipe jiɑni, mɑ́ pyëwɑ koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen. Keny-ɑ órɑngi gen yi ɑkørr kɑ ge ywöög-ɑ köörɑ, kwøbbi gen koo lïngɑ.”" 
Jeremiah11:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ji-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø. Yï gen dɑ dyër o ge bëëd gen kì Kengɑ? Ge ceg-ɑ rumø kinni ryɑ̈ng-ɑ bï kömi gen ócuggø jogø yi møg-ɑ nyi kwöng yi gen, geki gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj yi gen? Pëthi gen ceg-ɑ medø ki gïgɑni?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Ge ɑ́cwøllɑ cøn gɑ ólɑm me nyogø, me kööre pɑ̈ng yi nywøl mø myëër, de ɑnɑn yïthhe ógöjjɑ kedhhø yi mɑc me ce pöödø ɑ́ mɑl, kɑ bɑ̈dde ngøllɑ." 
Jeremiah11:17 “Yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́göjji Isrɑil ryɑ̈g. Gen ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈ngɑni kömi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́göög ki bɑ̈jjø; pyëwɑ ɑ́wëggi rënyø yi gen, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈ddi Bɑɑl yi gen ki gëdhhì.”" 
Jeremiah11:18 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwøbbi ɑmolpiny men-ɑ gøggi yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kipe nɑ̈gi yɑn. 
Jeremiah11:19 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ bong gïn lïngø kì pyëwɑ, ni órömø me kïdhi be nɑ̈gø, ɑ́bëëd e kwïj yi yɑn kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ göggi yi gen ki gïnrɑj ni menɑni. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge okööbø kinni, “Ngøl wɑ yɑnhɑni piny kɑ̈ng-ɑ nudd e mɑr, nɑ̈g wɑ en o óbëëd e bong ngɑn pɑrii këti.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Codhe ɑkwɑ̈jjɑ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ jɑgø me ngɑ̈ny löggø, rummi ji kí bëëdi gen nyii nennø yi yïn. Gønyɑ ɑ́cïbɑ cingí, wiy gøølɑ lidhɑ e ocolø yi yïn, ki jiɑni.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Tyëng Anɑthöth ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yɑ nɑ̈g, o yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi gen kinni yɑ ónɑ̈g yi gen keløg yɑ nudd yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah11:22 Codhe, ɑ́kööb Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ge ócɑy yi yɑn! Wɑ̈ddi gen ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, nyigi gen óywɑj yi kɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah11:23 Bøli keny-ɑ ógöjjɑ Anɑthöth ryɑ̈g ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi yɑn; keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, bong ngɑn bødh kì kelli gen.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ke göönyɑ ki yïn, ceg kɑ yodø kinni bɑ yïn ɑ gøggi dyër. De yï pyëjɑ’ pyëjø ceth kipe gøggi dyër. Gede tyëngrijjø ɑ di yï gen gïgdøj? Gede gïg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi tyëngrijjø ɑ nyi pɑ̈dhi gen?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Ge ɑ́miin piny yi yïn kɑ byerri gen otwïyø, ge ɑ́døngi kɑ ge onywølø. Ge nyi kømm-ɑ kwøb mø døøj kì rií, de yï tøøk kì pëthi gen kidyër." 
Jeremiah12:3 De yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïn-ɑ gwøg yi yɑn onennø yi yïn, o kër-ɑ mɑɑrɑ yïn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn. Ji-ɑ rijjø møgɑni ywɑj gen ni dyëg møg kïdhi be ngɑlø; kɑ ge korrí gïti keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej ngɑli gen." 
Jeremiah12:4 Piny wøn gït-ɑ wɑɑng e thwøwø thwøwø, e lum thøø kì yethi pwödh bënn? Lɑ̈yy ɑ́thøw geki winy kì bɑng gööj rɑ̈ji jii wøn, gen ɑ ji-ɑ nyi kööbø kinni, ‘Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wɑ pɑ nenni yi Jwøk.’ ”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggø kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, keløg yï pïdø yi rɑɑdø ki ji, yï órɑɑd kidï ki kyënyì? Keløg yï pɑ̈nh-ɑ́ɑ̀ keny-ɑ tɑr, óbëëd ɑ dï keny-ɑ óying yij thïm kì kömi Nɑm Urdun?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Cɑgg ɑ́ wɑddí, yï ótwɑny yi gen, kɑ ge órëbø ki tyëng-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn. Ge ko ngɑ̈ɑ̈dh kinni tek, cɑgg ge kööbø ki kwøb mø døøj.”" 
Jeremiah12:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Isrɑil ɑ́wiyɑ piny, pönh-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ ɑ́bɑnyɑ. Ji-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi yɑn ge ɑ́cïbɑ cinggi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki gen." 
Jeremiah12:8 Jiɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ ɑ́døøg cwɑggɑ, ge ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈r cwɑggɑ ni ngur; kenyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈re kì yij thïm, bene ɑ bɑnge mɑɑnɑ gen." 
Jeremiah12:9 Jiɑ nɑ winyø me yïe pödhi yi ótïngø ɑ́ngwen ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. Cwööl lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l o ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen! 
Jeremiah12:10 Jyɑ̈ggi pödhh-ɑ pɑth mø gïïr, bɑɑg oløgɑ ɑ́rënyi yi gen; pwödhɑ ɑ́nyøn yi gen; pinyɑ, piny-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑrɑ ɑ́gwøg gen ɑ́ ryɑng." 
Jeremiah12:11 Piny bëne ɑ́göög ki pɑ̈l; piny ɑ́döng nøw, nennɑ ɑ́ ryɑng; piny bëne ɑ́göög ki ryɑng; de bong ngɑn pyëwe rɑ̈mø kipere." 
Jeremiah12:12 Tyëng-ɑ yɑ̈gø ɑ́bï ge ge böödh-ɑ wɑ̈thi ótøng kì yij ryɑng. Yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki liny men rënyi pödhø bëne, bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø ki mër." 
Jeremiah12:13 Jiɑ kɑ̈g-ɑ gemè, de ge nyɑr-ɑ lum, ge ɑ́pur ki menteg, de bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́yod yi gen. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈g yi gen nuti cyegø, kipe kɑ̀ bëëd pyëwɑ rɑɑj.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Dɑ gïn kwøbɑ kipe pödhh-ɑ buti Isrɑil, gen ɑ pödhh-ɑ órënyi piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil. Tyëngɑni ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì pödhhɑni, ni kenyi dhwööy yɑdh wɑ̈g ki byerre, kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ yielɑ kì cinggi gen." 
Jeremiah12:15 De keny-ɑ órum gen ki kïdhi wɑ̈g yi yɑn, pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m; kɑ jiɑni dwöögɑ yethi pìnyi gen kì yethi pödhhi gen." 
Jeremiah12:16 Keløg ge órëbø ki jiɑ, kɑ kwøbbi Jwøøg jiɑ yïëy yi gen, kɑ dïd yi gen kɑ ge nyii köngø kinni, ‘Ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ Nëënø,’ ni kɑ ɑ́pwönyi jiɑ yi gen cøn, kɑ ge nyii köngø ki nyingi Bɑɑl, ge ceg-ɑ gwøg ki ɑ́kyel ki jiɑ, kɑ ge ódönyø." 
Jeremiah12:17 De keløg e ódi pödhø men pëmø, pönhɑni dhwööyɑ’ wɑ̈g kɑ nɑ̈gɑ. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i kedhɑ kɑ yɑ ngëwɑ ki ɑkööj kor-ɑ yöm, kɑ lønyɑ ngɑ̈jɑ, i de ko wëggɑ kedhø yi pï." 
Jeremiah13:2 Codhe, ɑngewɑ en kɑ lønyɑ ngɑ̈jɑ." 
Jeremiah13:3 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cig-ɑ kwøb ki yɑn, ɑkööbe kinni," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Kedhí kömi Nɑm Porɑt, kɑ ɑkönyɑni kɑɑn yij órøngi kït.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Codhe, ɑkedhɑ kɑ ɑkönyɑni kɑɑnɑ yij órøngi kït kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt." 
Jeremiah13:6 Dhungi piny kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i dwɑɑyɑ ɑkönyɑni." 
Jeremiah13:7 Codhe, ɑdøøgɑ be yɑɑbii keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑɑnɑ en, kɑ yuudɑ e rënyø, o pɑ cuggi rugø." 
Jeremiah13:8 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Bene kër-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyɑ tɑ̈dø mi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem ɑnɑn. 
Jeremiah13:10 Tyëngrijjø møgɑni ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbɑ. Ge nudd muddi gen teeg ni kɑ ɑ́wöni gen, ge ɑ́kedhi be göggi jwögg møøgø, kɑ gï mɑlli gen. Ge ceg-ɑ gwøg ceth ge nɑ ɑkönyɑni ɑ bong gïn gwøøgii." 
Jeremiah13:11 Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ kinni tyëng Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ yɑ di bëëd yɑ bɑ ɑtwij yi gen ni ɑköj kenyi twije kì rɑw, o ge di bëëd gen gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ di lenhi yi gen, o yɑ di wør yi gen, de ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbɑ.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni pɑ̈ɑ̈ng puggì bënn ki møgi oløg! Ge ólöggi bënn kinni ngɑ̈nyi yi gen kinni puggi bënn di dwɑddø o ge bëëd ge pɑ̈ng yi møgi oløg." 
Jeremiah13:13 Codhe, kɑ ge köbbí kinni, yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyëng pönhï yethi gen pɑ̈ngɑ’ pɑ̈ngø ki møgi oløg, gïti keny-ɑ ónɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi møgø, ge bënn. Rɑ̈nhì ɑ løg kwɑrri Debïd, kí ókwër, kí jøtöng, kí tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn, ge ónɑ̈g yi møgø bënn." 
Jeremiah13:14 Codhe, o ge gøøjɑ kej ɑ́kyel, o ri gen mød yi gen, gen ɑ jøgdøngø geki yɑnythønhø bënn. Ge nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø, pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Wu tyëng Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb! Bëëd wun wu bɑ mööl kɑ kwøbbe lïngi wun." 
Jeremiah13:16 Wør wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti kɑ̈ni en ki muudhø men wëggi wun cyerrø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì; kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti løg en cɑr ɑ́ muudhø eni cɑr men-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun." 
Jeremiah13:17 Keløg wu pɑ lïngø, yɑ óywöngi kì gød yi gööj tɑ̈dø mi wun. Yɑ óywöngi ki menteg, kɑ pï nyingɑ ómullø, kipe kɑ ɑ́køøl jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Jeremiah13:18 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí rɑ̈dh geki meye kinni dhwödh gen kì wɑ̈thi kwømmi gen, mɑ́ yɑ̈rri gen møg-ɑ myëër ɑ́dëëm piny kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Jeremiah13:19 Kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ̈dd-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl bɑ ɑtyeg, bong ngɑn cuggi kedhi yethi gen. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ɑ́kïdhi yïnø.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Lïdhí Yerusɑlem! Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø! Ágøne ji-ɑ ɑ́korri yi yïn, gen ɑ ji-ɑ per gen ɑ́bëëd yï tɑ̈dø?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Yï ókööb ɑ dï, keny-ɑ óbëën ji-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi yïn kinni ge bɑ mɑ̈dhhí, kɑ yï mɑg gen, kɑ yï jɑɑg gen? Yï koo rɑngø ni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Keløg yï ópëjjø kinni gede gïgɑni ɑ pɑ̈dhi gen kömí, ɑ pyëëd ógudhí wɑ̈g kì rií kɑ yï mød! Bɑ kinni møgɑni ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömí kɑ per kɑ̀ bëëd orøgí dwøng, o pëddi rɑ̈jø." 
Jeremiah13:23 Wɑ̈d Kuc kïde ócuggø wilø yi en? Wɑlɑ̀ kwej kïdd-ɑ ócwinyyii ócuggø kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi en? Yï nɑ gen ceth Yerusɑlem! Rií pɑ cuggi wilø yi yïn, kɑ yï døøg-ɑ be gwøg ki gïgdøj, mɑ́ yï ɑ́wɑ̈dh ki gwøg ki gïgrijjø." 
Jeremiah13:24 Wu ókedhhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni wél kenyi kedhhi gen yi yømø me köni kì yij ryɑng. 
Jeremiah13:25 Árum ki kwøb kinni møgɑni óbï kömi wun ceth. Bene gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gø gögge’ wun, mɑ́ e ɑ́wïl kì wɑ̈thi wun, kɑ wu ngɑ̈dh-ɑ jwögg mø pɑth ki dyër." 
Jeremiah13:26 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ópyëëd ógudhi wun wɑ̈g kì ri wun kɑ wu göjje ɑyɑ̈r. 
Jeremiah13:27 Wu ɑ́lidhe wu gøgg-ɑ gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi en. Wu ɑ́lidhe wu kedh-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì kí yethi pwödh, wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, ni jɑl me nɑ̈g yi ngööng cï gøl-ɑ bute, wɑlɑ̀ ni ógɑl-ɑ thwønh kenyi rïnge kì bɑng ógɑl-ɑ dhɑjø. Tyëng Yerusɑlem, wu ɑ́gɑ̈g! Wu ókɑl dhïwø kì wɑɑng?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwøbbi mel kinni," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Yeudiyɑ̀ ceg-ɑ ywøg kɑ̈dde ceg-ɑ thøø jie buud-ɑ piny yethi gen bɑɑrø, o Yerusɑlem ywøg-ɑ kønyø." 
Jeremiah14:3 Tyëngkɑ̈rì ör-ɑ bɑ̈nggi gen be dwɑ̈ddø ki pï, ge ɑ́kedhi wïj yith de ge pɑ yïddi ki pï, ge dwöög e bong gïn ying yethi puggi gen. Pëthi gen ɑ́nyönhi kɑ ge omuumø, ɑkum gen wɑ̈thi gen." 
Jeremiah14:4 Kì bɑng kɑ̀ bongii kødh o piny thwøwø thwøwø Tyëngpwödh wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́cungi ge kull-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen kì piny. 
Jeremiah14:5 Tenø kì wɑg nyɑre ɑ́wiye piny yi kɑ̀ bëëd e bong lum. 
Jeremiah14:6 Aderr cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ wïj kwøømø kì pɑ̈l, ge yëgø nɑ ógwøgg; nyingi gen ceg-ɑ dhïïdhø mɑ́ e bong gïn cɑm yi gen." 
Jeremiah14:7 Jiɑ ywöög-ɑ köörɑ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Cɑgg wø gøøny yi orøøg wøn, køny wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kɑ ɑ́kööb. Ngɑ̈thi wøn ɑ́lugi wøn yïn tyel mø gïïr; wø ɑ́røngi kì bølí." 
Jeremiah14:8 Yï ketí ɑ gɑ̈n yi Isrɑil, yïn ɑ yiel wøn ki ryɑ̈g. Yïde ɑ bëëd yï nɑ wëlø kì piny wøn; ɑ bëëd yï nɑ wël-ɑ ninø ki wɑ̈r ɑ́kyel?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Yïde ɑ bëëd yï nɑ ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈y piny, ɑ bëëd yï nɑ jɑl-liny me dhɑ̈ɑ̈rø? Ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni yï nud kì kelli wøn! Wø bɑ jií, wø ko wiy piny.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kì ri jiɑni kinni, “Ge nyi mɑɑr-ɑ rengø kì butɑ, o ge dhɑ̈li bëëdø kì butɑ. Bene ɑ bëëdɑ pyëwɑ rɑj ki gen. Orøøg gen pɑ wïl kì wïjɑ, o ge bɑ møg-ɑ ócɑy yi yɑn ceth.”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ko kwɑ̈jji kinni kønyɑ jiɑni." 
Jeremiah14:12 Cɑgg ri gen twöön yi gen ki gïncɑm, kwɑ̈jji gen pɑ lïngɑ, o ge pɑ kønyɑ; o cɑgg yɑ muuj yi gen ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b geki byëlø, pyëwɑ pɑ mïni ki gen. Ge óyöd ge ceg yi yɑn kɑ nɑ̈gø ki liny, kí kɑ̈j geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì.”" 
Jeremiah14:13 Codhe ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Wuö, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn kinni jøtöng köbb-ɑ ji kinni i óbong liny kí kɑ̈j, mɑ́ yï ɑ́kööb kinøw, ge okööbø i bɑ mër kete ɑ óying yij piny.”" 
Jeremiah14:14 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́löggi kinni, “Jøtöng kømm-ɑ pyed ki nyingɑ, ge nuti ör-ɑ yi yɑn, o ge nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni kööb gen. Cyɑ̈r-ɑ kømmi yi gen nuti kedh ɑ yïɑ. Gïg-ɑ nyi bɑg yi gen kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen." 
Jeremiah14:15 Yï di köbbø yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; yï köbbɑ’ gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ jøtöng møg-ɑ kööbø ki nyingɑ, o ge nuti ör-ɑ yi yɑn, ɑ kööb gen kinni bong liny wɑlɑ̀ bong kɑ̈j men-ɑ ónɑ̈gø kì piny men. Ge ónɑ̈g yi yɑn kì yij liny kí kɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ji-ɑ ɑ́köbbi møgɑni yi gen ge ónɑ̈g ni gen ceth. Ge óbuud kì piny ge thøø kì yethi yëthi Yerusɑlem; bong ngɑn-ɑ ókony gen, ge bënn kí mɑ̈nni gen, kí wɑ̈ddi gen, kí nyigi gen womɑ̈nn. Ge ócɑy yi yɑn ceth.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i köbbɑ ji ki møg-ɑ rɑ̈mø kì pyëwɑ, i kööbɑ kinni, “Wiy nyingɑ rïngi gen ki pï kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r, wiy yɑ cöögɑ yɑ pɑ wïyi ki ywøg, mɑ́ ken-ɑ ri jiɑ bɑ kedø me dwøng." 
Jeremiah14:18 Kenyi kedhɑ pɑ̈l, yɑ nyi lidh-ɑ jøg-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi liny. Kenyi bëënɑ kɑɑl, yɑ nyi lidh-ɑ ji ge oywɑjø yi kɑ̈j. Jøtöng geki ókwër göög-ɑ cwɑggi gen, de gïn-ɑ gwøg yi gen kwïj yi gen.”" 
Jeremiah14:19 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́ceg yi yïn kɑ bɑnyø ki mendwøng? Tyëng Dhɑyøn mɑɑn yi yïn? Wøde ɑ nyïɑ̈ɑ̈g wøn ki menrɑj kinnï, ɑ thödhi wøn ki kedø me pɑ nøggi? Wø kwɑjj-ɑ mër de bong gïndøj me cwöb, wø ngɑ̈dh-ɑ kinni wø ótuur, de yöd ɑ́ böögø ɑ bï." 
Jeremiah14:20 Rɑ̈ji wøn ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kerri orøøg kweyyi wøn ying-ɑ kömi wøn, mɑ́ wø ɑ́røngi kì bølí." 
Jeremiah14:21 Pɑr møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi yïn cøn, kɑ wø ko bɑɑny; Yerusɑlem ko yɑ̈ɑ̈r; kej kwøøm dhwɑ̈ngí ko yɑ̈ɑ̈r. Lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi wɑ ko pɑ̈ɑ̈d." 
Jeremiah14:22 Ngïjji jwöggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, bong men kɑ̈ni ki kødh kì kelli gen, mɑl pɑ cuggi lëngi piny ki kødh kete. Wø ngɑ̈dh-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn, mɑ́ e bɑ yïn ɑ nyi gwøg gïgɑni bënn." 
Jeremiah15:1 Codhe, ɑ köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑgg e di bëëd ɑ́ Mosɑ̀ geki Sɑmwel ɑ cungi kì bølɑ ge odhɑmmø kipe ji møg, pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki jiɑni. Wiy ge kedh gen, wiy ge nyegi gen kì bølɑ." 
Jeremiah15:2 Opyëj ge yïn kinni ge kedh-ɑ keny? Köbbí gen kinni yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Møøgø nɑ̈g-ɑ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì; bene kun-ɑ ókedhi yi gen! Møøgø ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi pilø, bene kun-ɑ ókedhi yi gen! Møøgø nɑ̈g-ɑ yi kɑ̈j, bene kun-ɑ ókedhi yi gen! Møøgø kïdh-ɑ yïnø gɑ ɑmɑgg, bene kun-ɑ ókedhi yi gen!" 
Jeremiah15:3 Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki cïb ki gïg pëddi rɑ̈jø gɑ ɑ́ngwen møg pɑ̈dhi kömi gen; ge ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, kɑ ge ywɑjji ge thøø yi gwögg, ge ócɑm yi winy geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Jeremiah15:4 Jii kömi piny bënn ógöjjɑ böggø yi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ógöggɑ gen, kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Mɑnɑsè wɑ̈d Kedhekiyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈dh.”" 
Jeremiah15:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Á men ɑ yije óywöngi kipe wun, wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem, ɑ́ men ɑ ókïïmø kiper wun? Á men ɑ ócungi, kɑ per wun pyëje?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Yɑ ɑ́bɑny yi wun, ngɑ̈thi wun ɑ́lugi wun yɑn. Bene ɑ bɑnge rïjjɑ cingɑ wun kɑ wu nyøngɑ, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́pïd yi ngïïnø." 
Jeremiah15:7 Wu ɑ́kwøørɑ wɑ̈g ni wél kì yethi kɑ̈ddi pödhø bënn, wu ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ jiɑ, nyigi wun ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ, mɑ́ wu ɑ́dhɑ̈li wïyø gøggi rɑj." 
Jeremiah15:8 Thwömm-ɑ mɑ̈nn ngenyø kì yij piny wun ge nɑ ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø. Wøbbi pödhø ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ, kɑ mëëg gen göjjɑ orɑng. Ge ɑ́gwɑɑrɑ piny kɑ ge göjjɑ orɑng kí wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Jeremiah15:9 Ngɑndhɑjø mɑ nyige ɑ́nɑ̈g gɑ ɑ́bïryew ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh mine cödø, e ceg-ɑ gɑm ki yëgø. Dicɑ̈ng ree ɑ́løge wɑ̈r kì nyinge, dële ɑ́ceg ì ywɑd, o wïje ɑ́muum. Tyëng-ɑ nudd ge onëënø kì kelli wun ógöjjɑ nɑ̈gø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wun. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Yɑ bɑ dhɑnhø me pyëwe pɑ med! Yɑde ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn kömi piny yi meyɑ? Yɑ ceg-ɑ wërø wø gönyø kɑ dhɑnhø bëne kì yij pödhø. Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́wïdhɑ ki ngyëny, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn yïe ɑ́wïdhɑ, de yɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ lɑ̈mmi cyën yi ji yøw." 
Jeremiah15:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wiy cyënnɑni pɑ̈dhi gen kömɑ keløg yï nuti göggø yi yɑn kidøøj, kí keløg yɑ nuti dhɑmmø kì bølí kipe tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi gen yi ɑkørr." 
Jeremiah15:12 (Bong ngɑn cuggi tori winø, pɑ tor kinni tek, ke bëëde e bɑ dødø, e bɑ ɑyöl ki dilɑl.)" 
Jeremiah15:13 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑ óöni ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg kɑ̈l jɑmmi jiɑ geki kɑ̈rri gen, e bɑ cɑ́y kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen kì yij pödhø bëne." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ge ógöjjɑ göggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì yij piny me kwïj yi gen, mɑ́ linyɑ nɑ mɑc, o ceg-ɑ lyelø gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Jeremiah15:15 Codhe, ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ngɑ̈ny wøw. Wïjí ko wïl ki yɑn, køny yɑn. Wiy gøølɑ colɑ ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn. Yɑ ko wëggi nɑ̈gø yi gen, pyëwí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen. Yɑ gwɑddi kɑ perí." 
Jeremiah15:16 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi yïn, kɑ kwøbbí lïngɑ bënn. Yɑ bɑ mií, yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pyëwɑ med cɑrø yi kwøbbí." 
Jeremiah15:17 Yɑ nuti pëggi be ngedhø kì kelli ji, e pyëwɑ med. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ lïngɑ kwøbbí, o yɑ nyi bëëd ɑ wɑ̈yɑ pyëwɑ pɑ med." 
Jeremiah15:18 Yɑde ɑ cögɑ yɑ orɑngø? Gede keddɑ ɑ pɑ nøggi gen? Yï óni nɑm me pïge dwönø, kɑ yï nɑ wɑɑng pï me cungø?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Aløøg møgɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Keløg yï ódwögø, yï kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø, kɑ yï cigɑ gwøgø yïn ɑ́ bɑ̈ngɑ. Óbëëd e døøj keløg yï kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöönɑ kì kelli ji, kibøli kɑ̀ pëggí be kømmi yɑnggì. Ji di bï-ɑ yïí, pɑth ki yïn ɑ di kedhi yï gen." 
Jeremiah15:20 Yï ógwøgɑ yï teg kibøli gen, yï óni döri ngyënyø dilɑl. Ge ónyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn, de yï pɑ tyɑm yi gen. Yï ókorri yi yɑn, bong gïn-ɑ ónywɑl yïn." 
Jeremiah15:21 Yï óyiel yi yɑn kì cinggi tyëngrijjø møg-ɑ yethi gen wöny. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah16:1 Acigi wøn kwøb ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ okööbø kinni," 
Jeremiah16:2 “Yï ko nyömi wɑlɑ̀ yï ko bëëd yïí dɑ nyigí kì piny-ɑ ni men," 
Jeremiah16:3 Yï óköbbɑ gïn-ɑ óbï kömi othønh-ɑ nywøl kì piny men geki wëëg gen kí mëëg gen. 
Jeremiah16:4 Ge ónɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì mø rijjø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ óywøg gen, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn-ɑ ókony gen. Ge ótwɑ̈li ni cyedh kì piny ge thøø. Ge ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, o ge óywɑj yi kɑ̈j, o ge ócɑm yi winyyi mɑl geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Yï ko kedhi kɑl me yije ywøøg dhɑnhø. Ko di ngɑnthøø me ywøg yi yïn. Jiɑ pɑ gëdhhɑ mër këti; ge pɑ mɑɑrɑ wɑlɑ̀ pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen. 
Jeremiah16:6 Tyëngkɑ̈rì geki tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur óthøw bënn kì piny men, de bong ngɑn-ɑ ókony gen wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn ywøg gen. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ókɑggi dële wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn-ɑ ólyel wïje e ywøg-ɑ thøø." 
Jeremiah16:7 Bong ngɑn-ɑ ókëëm ngɑn wɑɑd gen thøø, kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø ki gøn. Bong ngɑn yije óywöngi ki ngɑn megø, cɑgg ɑ́ wïye wɑlɑ̀ meye ɑ thøø." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Yï ko kedhi kɑl me yije di thyëg. Yï ko pëggi kelli gen be cɑm kí mɑdh. 
Jeremiah16:9 Lïngí gïn-ɑ kømmɑ, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wörri medi pyëw kí tugø mi nywöm, ócuung yi yɑn. Gïgɑni ólidh ge ocwöbø ceth yi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pönhï." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Keny-ɑ óköbbí gen møgɑni, yï ópyëj yi gen kinni, ɑ́ per ngø ɑ cɑyɑ gen ki cɑ́y-ɑ døngø ni møg. Ge ópëjji kinni ɑ́ gïjø mɑ ngø ɑ ɑ́bɑj yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ orøg me bëëdø dï, ɑ gwøøg gen kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah16:11 Codhe, kɑ ge köbbí kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́wiy yi kweyyi wun kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, ge gögg-ɑ jwöggɑni. Yɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki mïdhi ciggɑ." 
Jeremiah16:12 De wu ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïg mø pëddi rɑ̈jø kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyyi wun. Wu bënn, wɑ̈thi wun teeg, o wu rijjø, o kwøbbɑ pɑ lïngi yi wun." 
Jeremiah16:13 Kì bɑng gïn ni menɑni, wu leengɑ’ wɑ̈g kì yij piny men, wu óleengɑ yij pödhø me kwïj yi wun, wuki kweyyi wun. Wu ópëggi be göggi jwögg mø pɑth kì kunɑni, kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r, o pyëwɑ koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun.’ ”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ówiy nyingɑ ki kwöngø, yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì piny Rïp ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Jeremiah16:15 De ge óköngi ki nyingɑ, yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì yethi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn, ɑ løg yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhh-ɑ gen. Ge ódwöögɑ pödhi gen, piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi ge cøn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah16:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ óöni ki jømɑy møg mɑg ji møg. Codhe, o yɑ önɑ ki jødwɑr møg dwɑr gen kì wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí yethi órøggi kïttì." 
Jeremiah16:17 Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen bënn nennɑ’ nennø. Orøøg gen nennɑ’ nennø ceth; bong gïn cuggi kɑnø kɑ ocögø e pɑ lidhɑ. 
Jeremiah16:18 Gøøli orøøg gen colɑ’ colø bëne, mɑ́ pinyɑ ɑ́bwöl yi gen ki ngïjji jwögg-ɑ ni tyëngthøø; piny ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi gen ki jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër.”" 
Jeremiah16:19 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ korri yɑn, yïn ɑ nyi thödhi yɑn ki tegø, yïn ɑ nyi yiel yɑn ki ɑkørr. Pödhh møøgø óbï yïí ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ cögi piny kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Bɑ jwögg møg bong per gen ɑ ɑ́ying yï kweyyi wøn; ngïjjì møg bong per gen." 
Jeremiah16:20 Ji ócuggø gwøg ki jwöggi gen? Bong gøn, ke göög gen, jwöggɑni pɑth ki dyër.”" 
Jeremiah16:21 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ göögø ki ngïjji jwögg ónyudhi yi yɑn. Ge ónyudhɑ mɑ̈rɑ kí tegɑ. O yod yi gen kinni yɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Jeremiah17:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, orøøg wun bɑ ɑgwed ki gɑlɑm mɑ winø dødø; orøøg wun bɑ ɑtweg ki gïjø me bedh kì kömi minni wun, minn-ɑ bɑ kït; orøøg wun bɑ ɑgwed kì tøggi këlli lɑm mø wun." 
Jeremiah17:2 Wu mɑll-ɑ ngïjji Aceerɑ̀ møg-ɑ ócïb thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ mɑr geki wɑ̈thi ótøng," 
Jeremiah17:3 geki wɑ̈thi kïttì kì yij pödhø bëne. 
Jeremiah17:4 Piny wun omuujø yi yɑn, eni piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun; wu ógöjjɑ göggi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wun kì yij piny me kwïj yi wun, mɑ́ rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ nɑ mɑc, o ceg-ɑ lyelø gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́lugi ngɑ̈thi gen yɑn ge ócɑyɑ, kɑ ge göjjɑ ngɑ̈dhi ji, ge óngɑ̈dh-ɑ tegi ji ɑ nyi thøw." 
Jeremiah17:6 Ge óni ɑ́lɑ̈llì møg twïyø kì yij ryɑng, kì yij piny me bɑ omelø, o bong gïn twïy kì yije. Bong gïndøj men-ɑ ócwöb kiper gen." 
Jeremiah17:7 “De tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈n yɑn ge ógyëdhɑ. 
Jeremiah17:8 Ge óni yenh mø twïyø kì tøg nɑm, byerri gen wɑ̈dhi yethi pï. Ge pɑ böggi kenyi bëëd piny e lëëdh, mɑ́ yïthhi gen nyi cög ge mɑr ceth; pëthi gen pɑ lïngø yi kɑ̀ bëëde e bong kødh; ge nyi ceg-ɑ nywølø ceth." 
Jeremiah17:9 “Á men ɑ cuggi yodi gïn-ɑ pyëw dhɑnhø? Bong gïjø me lod pyëw ki wëënyø; pɑ cuggi gwøgø kɑ ódönyø. 
Jeremiah17:10 Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëw dhɑnhø yije nyi yɑbɑ’ yɑbø, kɑ rummi dhɑnhø nyi yɑbɑ, kɑ pyëwe rɑngɑ. Gïg-ɑ nyi göggɑ dhɑnhø nyi køølɑ’ ri bëëde, e kyëëw kɑ gïg-ɑ gøgge.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Ngɑn kwɑny ngyëny ki wëënyø, nɑ winyø me bob nywøl mø nuti nywøl-ɑ yi en. Wiy-ɑ piny yi ngyënyyɑni e nuti yöø; ceg-ɑ gwøg ki dhëg keny-ɑ ócyɑ̈ngi thøwe." 
Jeremiah17:12 Kengɑ nɑ kwøøm lejø, ɑ́wön ɑ weenø e cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi kït me bɑ̈r." 
Jeremiah17:13 Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ yïn ɑ gɑ̈nni yi Isrɑil, tyëng-ɑ wiy yïn piny óyɑ̈r ge bënn. Ge ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny ni nying-ɑ ógweed kömi tør, mɑ́ yï ɑ́wiy piny yi gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ceg bëëdø yïn ɑ́ wɑɑng pï men-ɑ yije mulli wɑ̈g yi pïg tïl." 
Jeremiah17:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gwøg dëlɑ o yöne, yiel yɑn, o bëëd e bong gïn nywɑl yɑn. Bene yïn ɑ lenhɑ!" 
Jeremiah17:15 Yɑ nyii köbbø yi ji kinni, “Ágøne rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i ge óbï kömi wøn? Gwøge gïg-ɑ ɑ́kømme ɑnɑn!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 De yï pɑ cuggi jwɑɑnø yi yɑn kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈ngɑni kömi gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; yɑ nuti lɑ̈mø kinni bï rɑj kömi gen. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn." 
Jeremiah17:17 Yɑ ko wëggí böggø yi yïn, bene yïn keny-ɑ nyi yömmi yi yɑn kenyi bëën rɑj." 
Jeremiah17:18 Wiy tyëng-ɑ guud wɑngɑ yɑ̈r gen, de wiy yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wiy ge böggi gen ki mendwøng, de yɑ ko wëggí böggø. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈g kömi gen kɑ ge kedhhí." 
Jeremiah17:19 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh Jermɑyɑ̀, kɑ wöönɑ kïdhí Dhøg Teedø, dhøng-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ yï kedhí dhøggi dörri Yerusɑlem møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah17:20 Köbbí rɑ̈nhì, geki teedø bëne kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, kí ngɑn bï yije, kinni lïngi gen møg-ɑ kømmɑ." 
Jeremiah17:21 Köbbí gen kinni keløg wëyi gen omɑɑrø yi gen, ge ko tyëddi ki gïjø me peeg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth; ko di gïjø me peeg me bɑ̈ɑ̈n dhøggi döri Yerusɑlem;" 
Jeremiah17:22 ko di gïn tïng wɑ̈g kì yethi ud kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Ge ko göög kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth, mïdhi ge gøn ceth ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër, ni kɑ ɑ́cegɑ kweyyi gen." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kwøbbɑ nuti lïngø yi kweyyi gen, wɑlɑ̀ gï nuti ywöör gen. De ge ɑ́yöd muddi gen ceg-ɑ tëngø; gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ gen nuti gwøøg gen, wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti dïdø kì yïɑ." 
Jeremiah17:24 “Köbbí ji bënn kinni lïngi gen kwøbbɑ. Ge ko tyëddi ki gïg mø peeg ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ dhø döri kɑɑldwøng kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Mïdhi gen Sɑbɑth ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër, kɑ ko di gïn gwøg kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Jeremiah17:25 Codhe, o rɑ̈nhi gen geki jɑggi gen nyi kedhi gen dhø dörø ge ngwøni kɑ ngwøni rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kí teng-ɑ ɑ́ying yï Debïd. Ge ócyɑ̈dhi ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th kí kyënyì geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem, o kɑɑldwøng Yerusɑlem óbëëdø ceth e pɑ̈ng yi ji." 
Jeremiah17:26 Ji óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki myërr-ɑ bɑdhhi Yerusɑlem, møøgø óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, møøgø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ thɑ̈thi kïttì, geki wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí myërr-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Yeudiyɑ̀. Ge ókɑ̈ni Kengɑ ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gënhi mër, kí byëlø kí bɑkur kí gëdhhi pwøj." 
Jeremiah17:27 De gwøg gen gïn-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn, kɑ Sɑbɑth mïdhi gen ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër, ge ko tyëddi ki gïjø me peeg ge bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ dhø döri kɑɑldwøng kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, de keløg møgɑ pɑ gwøg yi gen, thïggi döri Yerusɑlem rɑ̈bɑ’ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc. Udd-ɑ døngø kì Yerusɑlem órɑ̈b yi mɑc, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ócuggi nɑ̈gi mɑnyɑni.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Kedhí gøl bødhi lɑ̈b, yï óköbbɑ kì kunɑni.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Codhe, ɑkedhɑ kunɑni, kɑ bønhɑni yuudɑ e ogöögø." 
Jeremiah18:4 Kenyi dhɑ̈li gïn-ɑ dwɑdde cwɑ̈jø ki pɑ̈dhø, lɑ̈mɑni nyi cwɑ̈ɑ̈je gïjø megø." 
Jeremiah18:5 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Yïɑ bong dyër, o tyëng Isrɑil göggɑ gïn-ɑ nyi göggi lɑ̈bø yi bødhi lɑ̈b? Wu nɑ lɑ̈bø kì cingɑ ceth ni lɑ̈bø kì cingi bødhi lɑ̈b." 
Jeremiah18:7 Keløg yɑ okööbø kinni kɑɑl-ɑni wɑlɑ̀ pönh-ɑni ódhwøy yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ kinni toorɑ’ piny, wɑlɑ̀ rënyɑ’ rënyø," 
Jeremiah18:8 kɑ pönhɑni ówïyø ki orøge, gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ógwøgɑ pɑ gwøgɑ." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ke kööbɑ thyew kinni yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ pïdhø, wɑlɑ̀ kinni yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ gyer, wɑlɑ̀ kinni pönh-ɑni dwɑddɑ’ gerø," 
Jeremiah18:10 de kwøbbɑ opyemø yi pönhɑni, kɑ ogöögø ki gïnrɑj, gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ gwøgø pɑ gwøg yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah18:11 Köbbí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem ɑnɑn kinni, dɑ gïnrɑj me dwɑddɑ göggi gen; riɑ gwirɑ’ gwirø kipe cɑyi gen. Köbbí gen kinni wiy gen bëënrɑj, kɑ bëëdi gen ki gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen wil gen." 
Jeremiah18:12 Ge ólöggi kinni, ‘Á kipe ngø? Wø ceg-ɑ bëëdø muddi wøn teeg ceth; wø gøgg-ɑ rɑj ni kɑ̀ dwɑddii yi wøn.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pyëj wun pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ying gïn ni men pɑ̈nyi cwöbø. Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́göög ki gïjø me rɑɑj!" 
Jeremiah18:14 Wɑ̈thi kïtti Lubnɑn ɑ́pɑ̈nyi bëëdø ge bong ɑ́piy? Nɑ̈mm-ɑ pïi gen lïb møg-ɑ rïngi piny kì wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́pɑ̈nyi dwönø? 
Jeremiah18:15 De men-ɑ́ jiɑ wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́wïl ki yɑn, ge rɑ̈bb-ɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër ki bɑkur. yöö ɑ́bɑj yi gen, ge ɑ́wïyi ki kɑ̈lli yethi yëth-ɑ weenø, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ yethi yëëth mø bong ngïjji yöö." 
Jeremiah18:16 Piny ɑ́rënyi yi gen ki menrɑj, piny gen ócög e yɑ̈rø gïti ɑtheer; tyëng-ɑ ókɑ̈lli yij pinyɑni, ge ócyɑ̈dhi ge óböggø." 
Jeremiah18:17 Jiɑ ókedhhɑ kì bøli tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ni tør kenyi kwøørii yi yømi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Ngɑ̈jɑ ólugɑ gen; ge koo køny yi yɑn keny-ɑ óbëën ryɑ̈g kömi gen.” 
Jeremiah18:18 Codhe, ɑkööb ji kinni, “Göggi wɑ Jermɑyɑ̀ ki gïïpiny! Óbëëdø ceth e dɑ ókwër møg nyi nyudhi wɑ, kí ji mø wɑ̈thi gen pel møg nyi thödhi wɑ ki rummì, kí jøtöng møg nyi kɑ̈lli wööni Jwøk. Gøøny wɑ Jermɑyɑ̀ wɑ bɑny-ɑ kwøbbe, kɑ møg-ɑ kømme ko yïëy wɑ.”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Codhe, ɑkwɑ̈jjɑ kinni, “Lïngí møgɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kwøbb-ɑ kømmi kì riɑ yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø lïngí." 
Jeremiah18:20 Gïndøj nyi col kɑ gïnrɑj? Ge ɑ́yöd ge kuny-ɑ yɑn ki bur men yije pɑ̈dhɑ. Pɑr kɑ ɑ́kööbɑ ki yïn, yɑ nyɑ̈gg-ɑ kömi gen, ɑ ɑ́kwɑjjɑ yïn kinni ge ko cɑɑy ki rɑ̈ji pyëwí." 
Jeremiah18:21 De ɑnɑn yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wiy nyigi gen ywɑj yi kɑ̈j, wiy jøgdøngø thøw gen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, kɑ wiy yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb nɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Jeremiah18:22 Ödí kömi gen ki yɑy men pɑ̈ɑ̈y gen piny, o uddi gen yɑg yi yɑyɑni. Kɑ wiy ge kïïw gen yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́kunyi gen ki bur me yije pɑ̈dhɑ, kɑ yɑ ceg yi gen ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì." 
Jeremiah18:23 De gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen kipe nɑ̈gɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Pyëwí ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m kipe rɑj geki orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen; de cɑy gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwí.”" 
Jeremiah19:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i ngëwɑ ki pug me nyɑ̈n. Yɑ ɑ́köbbe thyew i kɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ ki jøgdøngø kí ókwër mø yöø. 
Jeremiah19:2 Kɑ wø kɑ̈l wøn Dhøg Ópɑdø, wø kedh-ɑ Töör Kinöm. Møg-ɑ óköbbe yɑn ótöng yi yɑn kì kunɑni." 
Jeremiah19:3 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i kööbɑ kinni, “Wu rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, lïngu møg-ɑ kwøbɑ, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil; yɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ keny ki ryɑ̈g men-ɑ óbëëd yïthhi tyëng-ɑ ólïngi pere cem-ɑ pëëw." 
Jeremiah19:4 Gïnɑni ógwøgɑ ceth, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wiy piny yi ji, kɑ ge ogöögø ki gïnrɑj kì keny, kɑ gø bwöl gen ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi mëggi gen jwögg mɑ ɑ́bëëd ge kwïj yi kweyyi gen geki rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀ cøn, kɑ piny pɑ̈ng yi gen ki remmi ji mø yï gen bɑ̈r." 
Jeremiah19:5 Kɑ Bɑɑl gëddi yi gen ki këlli lɑm møg kömi gen nyi rɑ̈b gen nyigi gen gɑ gëdhhì. Ge nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni göög gen kinøw, yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi rumø kì ri gïn ni menɑni." 
Jeremiah19:6 Bøli keny-ɑ ówiy Töör men ki cwøl ɑ́ Töpeth, wɑlɑ̀ Töör Kinöm óbï, kɑ døøg-ɑ be cwøllø ɑ́ Töör Ngɑl." 
Jeremiah19:7 Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem kì kenyɑni ge órënyɑ. Ge ówëggɑ tyɑmø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki gen, kɑ ge nɑ̈g kì yij liny. Ge ówëggɑ cɑmø yi lɑ̈yy geki winy." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ryɑ̈ng-ɑ rɑj ni menɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi kɑɑl men ceth. Ji óbëëd ge óböggø kenyi bëën gen ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ kenyɑni. 
Jeremiah19:9 Kɑɑl ótyeg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gi jie. Tyëg menɑni óbëëd e rɑɑj cɑrø, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kɑɑl døøg-ɑ be cɑmi ri gen, cɑgg ɑ́ nyɑɑr dhɑnhø gø cɑme’ cɑmø.”" 
Jeremiah19:10 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Nɑ̈g pungɑni kì bøli jøg-ɑ ɑ́bëën wun," 
Jeremiah19:11 kɑ ge köbbí kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ji møg geki kɑɑl men ri gen ómød yi gen ni pug men, eni pung-ɑ pɑ cuggi cemø këti. Ji-ɑ thøø ójɑ̈ddi ki keny-ɑ ókoony gen, kɑ ge koony men-ɑ́ yij Töpeth." 
Jeremiah19:12 Møg-ɑ kwøbɑ bɑ kinni kɑɑldwøng Yerusɑlem geki jie, ge ógwøg yi yɑn ge nɑ Töpeth." 
Jeremiah19:13 Ud bënn kì Yerusɑlem, kí uddi rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí udd-ɑ bɑ óthɑɑng, gen ɑ udd-ɑ́ wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈b ki bɑkur e rɑ̈bb-ɑ kyell, kɑ jwögg-ɑ kyeelø kunyi ki møgi oløg, ge ceg-ɑ ywëdhø bënn ni Töpeth.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Codhe, ɑkedhɑ kì Töpeth kun-ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, be kwøbi wöönɑni. Yɑ ɑ́kedh kɑ yɑ ócungø kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø, ɑköbbɑ ji bënn" 
Jeremiah19:15 kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi kɑɑldwøng men geki myërr-ɑ bɑdhhe, mɑ́ muddi wun teeg, o wu pɑ dwɑddi lïngi kwøbbɑ.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yɑn yɑ töng-ɑ møgɑni yi Pɑcur wɑ̈d Imer, ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑng-ɑ dwøng kì dhø Kengø," 
Jeremiah20:2 ɑkööbe kinni i pwööd yɑn, kɑ yɑ cïb buti Dhøg Ben Yɑmïn kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø yɑ ótwöjø." 
Jeremiah20:3 Dhuki keny-ɑ ɑ́rumɑ ki pɑ̈dø yi Pɑcur kì yethi töjjì, ɑköbbɑ en kinni, “Yï nuti cɑgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn ɑ́ Pɑcur. Nying-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gge yïn bɑ ‘Böögø Kì Kɑ̈jj Bënn.’" 
Jeremiah20:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yï ógwøg yi yɑn yïn ɑ́ men böggi rií, kɑ yï løgɑ men böggi yi mɑ̈dhhí, o ge ólidh yi yïn ge bɑ ɑnɑ̈g yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn cïbɑ’ cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, møøgø ókïdhe pödhe gɑ ɑmɑgg, o møøgø ónɑ̈g yi en." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ge ówëggɑ yɑgø, kɑ jɑmmi gen kɑ̈l bënn, eni kɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑɑldwøng, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̈ɑ̈r rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, ge kïdh-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bënn." 
Jeremiah20:6 O men-ɑ́ yïn, yï Pɑcur, yï kïdh-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yï bɑ ɑmɑg wuki gølí bëne. Yï óthøw kunɑni, kɑ yï koony kej ɑ́kyel wuki mɑ̈dhhí møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbí kwøbbi pyed.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́wëny yi yïn, kɑ yɑ yïëy-ɑ wënyø, yï teg kibølɑ, o yɑ ɑ́tyɑm yi yïn. Ji bënn bøli gen looj ki yɑn, ge tyëg cɑ̈ng ge gwɑdd-ɑ yɑn." 
Jeremiah20:8 Kenyi kööbɑ, yɑ nyi ceg-ɑ ryeerø yɑ okïïwø kinni, “Liny! Ryɑ̈g!” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ ɑbiw yi teedø, o yɑ ceg kɑ benyø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, kipe kɑ kɑ̈llɑ wööní." 
Jeremiah20:9 De kenyi kööbɑ kinni, “Wïjɑ ówïl ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yɑ pɑ cigi kwøb ki nyinge,” kɑ wööní nyi ceg-ɑ gwøg e nɑ mɑc me lyel kì yijɑ kɑ nyi pɑ̈nyɑ ki dij piny, de nyi ceg-ɑ dhɑ̈lø ki dij piny." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ji lïngɑ’ lïngø ge okööbø kinni, “Böögø ying-ɑ kɑ̈jj bënn! Gøøny wɑ en yï tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø!” Cɑgg ɑ́ mɑ̈dhhɑ, ge dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o yɑ pɑ̈dhɑ. Ge okööbø kinni, “Ócuggø wënyø mɑwɑnø, codhe o mɑg yi wɑ, o göggi wɑ gwøge.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 De yï nud kì butɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki tegí bëne, o tyëng-ɑ guud wɑngɑ bɑ møg-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Ge óbëëd ge yɑ̈rø gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gen gwøgø pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi gen. Ayɑ̈ɑ̈r gen pɑ wɑj." 
Jeremiah20:12 De yïn, yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ji nyi rɑng yi yïn kɑ dyër, gïg-ɑ pëthi gen kí møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn. Wiy yï lidhɑ yï ocudø ki gøølø kì ri gen, mɑ́ yï ɑ́rum ki gönyø yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah20:13 Wör wun kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Lenhu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Ngɑn-ɑ wɑnge guud nyi yiele’ yielø kì cinggi tyëngrijjø. 
Jeremiah20:14 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yɑn bɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng cyën! Wiy cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yɑn yi meyɑ wïle! 
Jeremiah20:15 Gøøj cyën kömi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wëggi pyëw wïyɑ mïnø eni ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́köbbii kinni, “Bɑ nyel-ɑ jɑlø! Mïni pyëwí!”" 
Jeremiah20:16 Wiy jɑlɑni bëëde e nɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́rënyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe. Wiy e ólïnge ywøg kì mwøl, o lïnge ɑkyew kì dɑ̈ri cɑ̈ng," 
Jeremiah20:17 kipe kɑ̀ nuti nɑ̈ɑ̈g en yɑn kì yij, o yij meyɑ di bëëde ɑ́ rörɑ." 
Jeremiah20:18 Yɑ ɑ́nywøl kɑ per ngø? Yɑ ɑ́nyöll-ɑ órɑng kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m yij, o yɑ thøwɑ ki ɑyɑ̈r?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Kɑ Pɑcur wɑ̈d Mɑlkiyɑ̀ geki Dhepɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ ör yïɑ yi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, o yɑ kwɑjji yi gen kinni," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Kwɑjjí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiper wøn, mɑ́ Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kɑɑldwøng ɑ́tyege ki yɑye. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógöögø ki gïïngɑ̈ngø møge mɑwɑnø kɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr göjje døøgø.”" 
Jeremiah21:3 Codhe, ɑkööb wøn ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́ör yïɑ köbbɑ," 
Jeremiah21:4 kinni köbbi gen Dhedekiyɑ̀ ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni, “Dhedekiyɑ̀, linyí, liny-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggí ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki yɑye ótyɑm yi yɑn. Jɑmmi liny mø yɑyí óröörɑ piny kì dïkɑɑl." 
Jeremiah21:5 Yɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki yïn ki tegɑ bëne, kí rɑ̈ji pyëw geki liny me pëddi." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ji-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl men ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, gen ɑ ji kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ ying kɑɑldwøng, ge óthøw ki thøø me rɑj." 
Jeremiah21:7 De men-ɑ́ yïn, wuki jyɑ̈ggí, kí ji-ɑ óbødh kì dhø liny geki kɑ̈j kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì bënn, ge ówëggɑ mɑgø yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, en geki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi wun. Wu ónɑ̈g yi Nebukɑdnesɑr; bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ówiy yi en, wɑlɑ̀ pyëwe koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i köbbɑ ji kinni, “Lïng wun! Bøli wun cïbɑ’ jɑmmì ɑ́ryew, yuu-ɑ kedhi yï wëy ki yuu-ɑ kedhi yï thøø." 
Jeremiah21:9 Tyëng-ɑ óbëëdø kì kɑɑldwøng ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi kɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì. De tyëng-ɑ ókedhi be yömmi yï tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ møg-ɑ tyeeg kɑɑldwøng pɑ thøw, ge óbodh." 
Jeremiah21:10 Kɑɑl men pɑ wiy yi yɑn; rënyɑ’ rënyø ceth. Kɑɑldwøng mëggɑ’ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ o gø rɑ̈be kinni tweet. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i muujɑ gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kwɑrri Debïd kì Yeudiyɑ̀ ki wöödø kinni, “Lïngu møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gøggu dyër kì burø yethi cyɑ̈ng. Nyi cwɑɑg ngɑn-ɑ ruj. Ke pɑ gwøg wun møgɑni, rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ólyel ni mɑc me pɑ cuggi nɑ̈gø." 
Jeremiah21:12  
Jeremiah21:13 Yerusɑlem, yï cungi kì kömi tör de yï nɑ kït kì thwørø. Yï okööbø ce bong ngɑn tyɑm yïn wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn cuggi wɑ̈nhi kelli linyí." 
Jeremiah21:14 De yï ócɑy yi yɑn kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn; keny-ɑ bëëd yi yïn ócwiny ki mɑc, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ yije órɑ̈bbø bënn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i kedhɑ gøldwøng kì Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ løg gøl kwɑɑr Debïd, i kɑ rɑ̈dh köbbɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah22:2  
Jeremiah22:3 “Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ceg-ɑ yïn kinni gøggí dyër; nyi cwɑg ngɑn-ɑ ruj kɑ nyingi wëdhh ko guud geki kïjj kí thwömm, kɑ ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r ko nyi nɑ̈g kì keny." 
Jeremiah22:4 Keløg møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn ógwøg yi wun, kwɑrri Debïd ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ceth gɑ rɑ̈nhì. Kɑ ge nyi ngøøn-ɑ wɑ̈g kì keny geki jyɑ̈ggi gen kì kömi kyënyì geki yɑ̈th-ɑ pyejji." 
Jeremiah22:5 De keløg ciggɑ pɑ mïdhi yi wun, yɑn ɑ köngi èn, gøldwøng ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø! Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah22:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Gøldwøng kì Yeudiyɑ̀ nenni yi yɑn e myëër nɑ piny Gilyɑd, o nɑ Kïtti Lubnɑn, de bɑ men göjjɑ dööng nøw, e bong ngɑn bëëdø kì yije." 
Jeremiah22:7 Yɑ ókɑ̈ni ki ji møg rënyii. Ge óbï ge ókɑ̈ddø ki dørrì, kɑ löjje møg-ɑ bɑ yɑdh sɑndɑl ngøl gen piny, kɑ gï leeng gen mɑc." 
Jeremiah22:8 “Orume, tyëngpɑth mø ngenyø ri gen ópyënyi yi gen kinni, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ göggɑ kɑɑldwøng ki gïn ni menɑni.”" 
Jeremiah22:9 Mø gen óløøg yi yɑn kinni, “Bɑ kipe kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈d wun lwöbø ki yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg wun, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg møøgø.”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, wu ko ywøg Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀, mɑ́ e ɑ́rum ki thøø. De ywøg wun wɑ̈de Rɑ̈dh Yöɑkɑdh, ngɑn-ɑ ókïdhi yïnø kun koo dwööge; piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́nywøølii koo cige lidhø." 
Jeremiah22:11 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe Rɑ̈dh Yöɑkɑdh wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ bɑ kinni, “Ákedh e pɑ dwöög." 
Jeremiah22:12 Óthøw-ɑ pönh-ɑ ɑ́kïdhii, o piny men pɑ cige lidhø.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 Ree dɑ cyën eni ngɑn-ɑ ger øde ki ruj, kɑ gø lɑnye ki jɑmmi wëënyø; eni ngɑn-ɑ nyi pïd tyëng pödhe ki gwøg, e gï pɑ nyi mëgge köggi gen." 
Jeremiah22:14 Ree dɑ cyën eni ngɑn-ɑ kööbø kinni, “Riɑ ógëddɑ ki øndwøng ɑ́dörri ryew, e dör-ɑ mɑl yethi udde lɑjjø.” Kɑ ri udde kïdhe ki ɑwɑjj mø lɑjjø, o tøggi gen dhyɑw ki yɑdh sɑndɑl, o ge gøj ki kïdø men kwɑrø." 
Jeremiah22:15 Yï løg-ɑ me lɑ̈w kibøli rɑ̈nhh-ɑ kyeelø keløg rií ogëdø yi yïn ki ød yɑdh sɑndɑl, me lod uddi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø? Wïyí ɑ́bëëd kɑ bëëdø me døøj, o nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër, kɑ ódönyø kɑ jɑmme óngënyø." 
Jeremiah22:16 Tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur gønyyi gen nyi lidhe’ lidhø kidøøj, kɑ piny ókedhø e døøj kì yïe. Bene gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi ngɑ̈nyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑnɑn." 
Jeremiah22:17 De yï gögg-ɑ rií ketí; yï nyi nɑ̈g-ɑ ngɑn yïe bɑ̈r, o yï guud-ɑ nyingi jií. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah22:18 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ kinni, “Bong ngɑn-ɑ óywøg thøwe, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn-ɑ ókööbø kinni, ‘Yeki wɑɑd wøn ø!’ Bong ngɑn-ɑ óywöngi kipere wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn-ɑ ókööbø kinni, ‘Yeki rɑ̈dhɑ yø!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 Óywɑɑj pɑ̈l ni ɑderø keny-ɑ óthøwe, kɑ weddi ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Yerusɑlem.”" 
Jeremiah22:20 Wu tyëng Yerusɑlem, kedhu Lubnɑn kɑ wu kïïw wun, kedhu piny Bɑcɑn kɑ wu ywöngi wun, kïïw wun kì wïj Kïti Abɑrïm, mɑ́ cwɑ̈ggi wun ɑ́tyɑm." 
Jeremiah22:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb ki wun keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kej wun døøj, de wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi møge. Bene kër-ɑ bëëd wun ceth ɑnɑn, gïn-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ nyi gwøg yi wun." 
Jeremiah22:22 Pëjji wun ókøøl yi yømø, cwɑ̈ggi wun ókɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑggi liny. Kɑɑl wun órënyi kɑ odöngø e yɑ̈rø, ki gööj rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun." 
Jeremiah22:23 Wu buud wu otɑrø kì kelli yenh sɑndɑl møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Lubnɑn, de nyingi wun koo bɑɑr keny-ɑ óbëën orɑng kömi wun? Wu koo bëëd wu orɑngø ni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny?" 
Jeremiah22:24 Kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin, wɑ̈d Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim, köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, kinni cɑgg yï di bëëd yï nɑ gwelø kì lwedi cingi kyëjɑ, yï di budhɑ wɑ̈g," 
Jeremiah22:25 kɑ yï mëggɑ tyëng-ɑ böggi yi yïn, gen ɑ ji-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yïn. Yï mëggɑ’ Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki linye." 
Jeremiah22:26 Yï cøørɑ’ yïnø wuki meyí. Wu kedh-ɑ pödhø me bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́nywøl kì yije kì kelli wun, o wu óthøw kunɑni ryeet." 
Jeremiah22:27 Pyëwí ókønø ki dwöög piny men, de yï koo dwöög.”" 
Jeremiah22:28 Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, “Yöyɑkin ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwøg e nɑ pug me thøø? Bene ɑ kïdhi nywøle yïnø piny-ɑ kwïj yi gen?”" 
Jeremiah22:29 Piny, piny, piny! Lïngí møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Jeremiah22:30 “Jɑlɑni óni thwöm, o bong gïjø men-ɑ ólwɑ̈ng yi en ki gwøgø. Óbong kwɑrre møg-ɑ ójɑ̈ggi kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kì wïj kwøøm Debïd. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Jɑgg-ɑ rënyi ji, ɑ kedhhi gen ri gen dɑ cyën, ge ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki menrɑj!" 
Jeremiah23:2 Bene møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kipe tyëng-ɑ jɑɑg Isrɑil kinni, “Jiɑ nuti koor wun, ge ɑ́kedhhi yi wun, kɑ ge cyeed wun pɑ̈l. Anɑn wu cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun." 
Jeremiah23:3 Jiɑ ócungɑ kì pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ gen, o ge dwöögɑ pödhi gen. Ge ónywøl kɑ kwɑnni gen óngënyø." 
Jeremiah23:4 Yɑ órönyø ki jɑgg møg jɑɑg gen. Jiɑ pɑ cigi böggø, wɑlɑ̀ pëthi gen koo lïngø, o ge pɑ cigɑ cɑyø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ácyɑ̈ngi eni bøli keny-ɑ ókɑ̈bbɑ ki rɑ̈dh men tir kì kelli kwɑrri Debïd. Rɑ̈nhɑni ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki peli wïj, o ógøgg-ɑ dyër kì pönhï bëne." 
Jeremiah23:6 Bong gïjø men-ɑ ónywɑl tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ keny-ɑ óbëëde ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, o tyëng Isrɑil óbëëdø ki mër. Ócwølli ɑ́ ‘Wë Yïënee?’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ówiy nyingɑ ki kwöngø, yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l jii Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì Rïp obëënø." 
Jeremiah23:8 Ge ódøøg be köngø ki nyingɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ ɑ́dwöög jii Isrɑil wɑ̈g kì pönh-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø geki pödhh-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́kedhhɑ gen. Codhe, o ge bëëd gen kì piny-ɑ bɑ mi gen.”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Minɑ ɑ́cöd, dëlɑ ceg-ɑ okïr, kipe Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kipe kwøbbe kwërø. Yɑ nɑ jɑl-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø yɑ nɑ ngɑn pɑ̈ɑ̈ng yije ki møgi oløg." 
Jeremiah23:10 Piny pɑ̈ng yi tyëng-ɑ pɑ mïdhi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jiɑni bëëd-ɑ bëëdø me rɑɑj, o ge ceg-ɑ mød ki ji. Piny óywöngø bëne, bong lum me cɑm yi dhög, mɑ́ piny ɑ́göjji cyën yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah23:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jøtöng geki ókwër, Jwøk pɑ böggi yi gen. Ge ɑ́yodɑ ge gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø kì yij Kengø." 
Jeremiah23:12 Ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yethi yëëth mø looj, ge ówëggɑ cyerrø o ge pɑ̈nhhi gen. Yɑ ógöjji kömi gen ki ryɑ̈g, bøli kej cɑyi gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah23:13 Orøøg jøtöng kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́lidhɑ, ge ɑ́tööng ki nyingi Bɑɑl kɑ jiɑ peej gen pɑ̈l." 
Jeremiah23:14 De gïg-ɑ gøggi yi ji kì Yerusɑlem pëddi rɑ̈jø, ge oniin ki tyëng nuti nywøøm gen ri gen, o ge ceg-ɑ pyed, ge nyudh-ɑ ji ki gwøg ki rɑj o bong ngɑn köbbi ji wïyø ki gøggi rɑj. Ge nennɑ ge rijjø bënn ni tyëng Sødømɑ̀ kí Gømørɑ̀." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïn-ɑ kwøbɑ kipe jøtöng kì Yerusɑlem bɑ kinni: ge ómëggɑ lùm møg kej ɑ́ gïn cɑm yi gen, o ge mëggɑ sïm ɑ́ gïn mɑdh yi gen, mɑ́ ji ɑ́göjji gen orøg kì yij pödhø bëne.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi yi jøtöng ko lïngi wun, ge pɑ̈ng-ɑ yïthhi wun ki kwøbbi ngɑ̈dhi gïn koo bï. Wu nyi köbbi ge’ møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen, de pɑth ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah23:17 Tyëng-ɑ pɑ dwɑddi lïngi kwøbbɑ nyii köbbø yi gen kinni, i bong rɑj men-ɑ óbï kömi gen. Kɑ tyëng-ɑ muddi gen teeg nyi köbbi gen kinni, i bong ryɑ̈g men-ɑ ópɑ̈nyi bëën kömi gen.”" 
Jeremiah23:18 Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, “Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøtöng møgɑni, me ngɑ̈nyi rumm-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn gɑ mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Bong, ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́lïng, wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́yod gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi wööne, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lïng, wɑlɑ̀ mɑ ɑ́ywøør møg-ɑ kømme." 
Jeremiah23:19 Rɑ̈ji pyëwe bɑ ɑtunø me teeg cɑrø, óceg ì dut kì wɑ̈thi tyëngrijjø," 
Jeremiah23:20 o pɑ cungi gïti keny-ɑ órume ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑdde gwøgø. Møgɑni óyod yi jie kidøøj kì yethi cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbï.” 
Jeremiah23:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jøtöng møgɑni nuti ör-ɑ yi yɑn, de ge ɑ́rengi ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöddi gen, o ge yöd ge 'kööb-ɑ nyingɑ." 
Jeremiah23:22 Keløg ge di bëëd rummɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑnn ngɑ̈nyi yi gen, wöönɑ di muuj jiɑ yi gen, kɑ ji di wïyi ki bëëdi orøg geki gøggi gïgrijjø." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Yɑ bɑ Jwøk me nud kì kɑ̈jj bënn, de yɑ pɑ ying kej ɑ́kyel." 
Jeremiah23:24 Bong ngɑn cuggi pɑ̈ni keny me pɑ nennɑ en. Kwïj yi wun kinni yɑ ying-ɑ kɑ̈jj bënn kì mɑl kí piny? 
Jeremiah23:25 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi jøtöng møgɑni ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ kømmi yi gen ge ceg-ɑ pyed ki nyingɑ, ge okööbø ce ge nyii köbb-ɑ yi yɑn kì yethi lɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah23:26 Jøtöng møgɑni gït-ɑ wɑɑng, ge rëny-ɑ wɑ̈thi jiɑ ki kwøbbi pyed møg-ɑ nyi myen yi gen?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Ge orumø kinni jiɑ wɑ̈thi gen ówïl ki yɑn kì bɑng lɑ̈gg-ɑ kømmi yi gen, ni kɑ ɑ́wïl wɑ̈thi kweyyi gen ki yɑn cøn, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli Bɑɑl." 
Jeremiah23:28 Jøtöng møg-ɑ nyi lɑ̈gi, kööb gen kinni møgɑni bɑ lɑ̈g yøw, de jɑltöng men-ɑ ólïngi wöönɑ, kwøbe gøn ceth. Dɑ gïn reb lum ki gemè?" 
Jeremiah23:29 Wöönɑ nɑ mɑc, o nɑ ɑ́bɑny ɑ nyi tørri kït." 
Jeremiah23:30 Yɑ ceg-ɑ wërø ki jøtöng møg-ɑ nyi kwɑlli kwøbbi gen keti gen, o ge nyi kööb gen i bɑ wöönɑ." 
Jeremiah23:31 Yɑ ceg-ɑ wërø thyew ki jøtöng møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli kwøbbi gen ge okööbø i kwøbbɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ. 
Jeremiah23:32 Lïngu møg-ɑ kømmɑ yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki jøtöng møg-ɑ kømmi lɑ̈ggi gen, ge kømm-ɑ pyed. Ge dwøngg-ɑ lɑ̈ggɑni, ge peej-ɑ jiɑ pɑ̈l ki pyed geki pwödi kööth. Ge nuti ör-ɑ yi yɑn wɑlɑ̀ ge nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni kedh gen; ji pɑ køny yi gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah23:33 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, keny-ɑ ópyëëj yïn yi ji wɑlɑ̀ yi jøtöng wɑlɑ̀ yi ókwër kinni, ‘Wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ ngø?’ Köbbí gen kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j torø yi wun, o wu dwɑdde’ yeej piny.’" 
Jeremiah23:34 Keløg e dɑ ngɑn kööbø kì ri, ‘Tori Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j’, kì kelli jiɑ, ying-ɑ́ jɑltöng, wɑlɑ̀ ókwërø, ngɑnɑni cɑyɑ’ cɑyø geki gøle bëne." 
Jeremiah23:35 De wiy ge nyi pyënyi gen ri gen geki mɑ̈dhhi gen kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́løøg-ɑ ngø? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kwøb-ɑ ngø?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Ge ko kööb këti kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́tor’, ko pɑ̈nyi ki kwøbø yi dhɑnhø, kipe wöönɑ óløgɑ me peeg kì kömi gen. Ji kwøbbi Jwøøg gen, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, ɑ́wil yi gen." 
Jeremiah23:37 Jermɑyɑ̀, pyëj jøtöng kinni, ‘Mø wun ɑ́løøg ɑ dï yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kwøb-ɑ ngø?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 O keløg kwøbbɑ ópyem yi gen, kɑ kwøbbi ‘tori Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j’ pɑ̈nyi ki kwøbø yi gen, köbbí gen kinni," 
Jeremiah23:39 Ge kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø kɑ ge leengɑ kun me lɑ̈wi, ge weddɑ’ weddø bënn geki kɑɑldwøng kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ gen geki kweyyi gen." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ge óthödhɑ ki ɑyɑ̈r me pɑ wɑj.” 
Jeremiah24:1 Kɑ yɑ nyudhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki dhöng ɑ́ryew mø yethi gen di nywøli ólɑm ge ócïb dhø Kengø (kì bøli kenyɑni, Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin wɑ̈d Yöyɑkim rumø ki kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, ɑ́kɑ̈l-ɑ kyeel geki bödhhì, kí tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen døøj ki gwøg.)" 
Jeremiah24:2 Dhöngø ɑ́kyel yije dɑ nywøli ólɑm mø døøj, møg-ɑ kwöngø ki cyegø, o dhöng-ɑ kyeelø yije dɑ nywøli ólɑm mø rijjø, ge pɑ cuggi cɑmø yi rɑ̈ji gen." 
Jeremiah24:3 Codhe ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, yï nenn-ɑ ngø?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Nywøli ólɑm, møg-ɑ døøj, døøj cɑrø, o møg-ɑ rijjø, rijjø ki mendwøng, ge pɑ cuggi cɑmø yi rɑ̈ji gen.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, kì yïɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ge nɑ nywøli ólɑm møg-ɑ døøj, o ge ómïdhɑ kidøøj." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ge ókor yi yɑn kɑ ge dwöögɑ piny men. Ge ótyeny yi yɑn, ge pɑ tɑ̈ɑ̈yɑ piny." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ge ówëggɑ tyeri yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Codhe, o ge bëëd gen gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑ bɑ Jwøøg gen, mɑ́ ge ódwöög yïɑ ki pëthi gen bënn." 
Jeremiah24:8 “De Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ kí jyɑ̈gge kí teen-ɑ kyeelø, kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Rïp, kì yïɑ yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge nɑ nywøli ólɑm møg-ɑ rijjø, ɑ pɑ cuggi cɑmø yi rɑ̈ji gen." 
Jeremiah24:9 Kömi gen ókɑ̈ni yi yɑn ki ryɑ̈g men-ɑ óbëëd pödhh bënn ge óböggø. Ge ógwɑddi kɑ ge gɑggi yi ji kì kɑ̈jj bënn, o nyingi gen nyi pɑ̈rri cyën kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ókïdhɑ gen bënn." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ge ógöjjɑ nɑ̈gø yi liny kí kɑ̈j, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi gen bënn, kɑ bong-ɑ dhɑnhø kì kelli gen me döng kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ gen geki kweyyi gen.”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Yɑ ɑ́ödi ki wöödø me kööbø kì ri Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e runni Yöyɑkim wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́ngwen kì yij lɑwø. (Runi Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì yij lɑwø wɑɑngɑni.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn geki tyëng Yerusɑlem ɑ köbbɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Yɑ ɑ́tyëg-ɑ runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g yɑ okööbø ki wun, cɑg kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amön kì yij lɑwø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn, yɑ nyii köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ møgɑni nyi köbbɑ wun ceth. De wu nuti lïngø." 
Jeremiah25:4 Wu nuti pɑ̈nyi lïngø, ngö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́bëëd wu nyi öde’ ödø ki bɑ̈ngge, ɑ løg jøtöng." 
Jeremiah25:5 Wu nyi köbbi ge’ köbbø kinni wiyu bëënrɑj; kɑ gøggi rɑj wiy wun; o wu ócög wun wu óbëëdø kì piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wuki kweyyi wun ɑ́ mi wun gïti ɑtheer." 
Jeremiah25:6 Wu ɑ́köbbi yi gen kinni wu ko kedhi be mɑlli jwögg møøgø; Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ko wëggu rënyø kɑ̀ mɑllu jwögg-ɑ gwøg yi wun. Keløg kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j di lïngi yi wun, wu pɑ di cɑy yi en." 
Jeremiah25:7 Dɑ́ men-ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni wu ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbe. Kɑ wu yöd wu rëny-ɑ pyëwe ki ngïjji jwögg, ɑ bɑnge kɑ̈ne kömi wun ki cɑ́y." 
Jeremiah25:8 “O kì bɑng kɑ̀ nuti lïngu kwøbbe, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni," 
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Yɑ öd-ɑ be cwööli tyëng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø bënn, kí bɑ̈ngɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ be nyɑɑg ki Yeudiyɑ̀ kí pinye bëne, kí pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ying bɑdhhe. Pönhï rënyɑ’ rënyø geki pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhe bënn, o ge ówëggɑ rënyø gïti ɑtheer, ki rɑ̈jø men-ɑ óbëëd ji óböggø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ge ówëggɑ kudø, ge pɑ cigi ryeerø këti wɑlɑ̀ pëthi gen koo ying mø med, o óbong thyëëg nywöm men-ɑ ógwøg. Ge ójɑd ki møw men lyel kì yethi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ mø gen, o yï gen óbong byel." 
Jeremiah25:11 Piny men ódöng nøw bëne, ji óbëëd ge óböggø yi rëny-ɑ órënye, o pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhi Isrɑil óbëëd gɑ bɑ̈nggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew." 
Jeremiah25:12 Othumi runnɑni, tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ólony yi yɑn ki cɑyø kipe orøøg gen. Pönhɑni órënyi yi yɑn, kɑ wiy yi yɑn e rënyø gïti ɑtheer." 
Jeremiah25:13 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ógöjjɑ ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ bëne kinni óbï kömi pödhh, ge ɑ́köbbɑ Jermɑyɑ̀, gen ɑ ryɑ̈gg-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed bënn kì yij wɑ̈nyø men." 
Jeremiah25:14 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ógöggɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gögge pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn. O ge ógwøg gɑ bɑ̈ngg yi pödhh møøgø geki rɑ̈nhh-ɑ teg.’ ” 
Jeremiah25:15 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni, “Kwɑny óthɑ̈ngi møgi oløg men-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi linyɑ èn, kɑ muuj pödhh-ɑ yï gen óörɑ yïn, kɑ wiy ge mɑ̈dhi gen kì yije." 
Jeremiah25:16 Keny-ɑ ómɑ̈dhi gen kì yije, ge ócyerri kɑ wɑ̈thi gen omuumø yi kwøbbi liny men-ɑ óörɑ kömi gen.”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Codhe, ɑkwɑnyɑ óthɑ̈ngɑni kì cingi Wë, kɑ muujɑ pödhh-ɑ́ yï gen ɑ́öre yɑn, ɑwëggɑ gen mɑ̈dhø kì yije." 
Jeremiah25:18 Yerusɑlem geki myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ómɑ̈dhi kì yije, kí rɑ̈nhe geki jɑgge, o ge ógöög gen ki ryɑng me rɑj, o nyingi gen ócög ge pɑ̈rr-ɑ cyën yi ji, ni kenyi kømmii ɑnɑn." 
Jeremiah25:19 Møg bɑ nyingi kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ómɑ̈dhi kì yij óthɑ̈ngɑni. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, kí jyɑ̈gge geki pëjji pödhe, kí tyëng Rïp bënn geki wëdhh møg-ɑ yije. Kí rɑ̈nhi piny Udh bënn, kí rɑ̈nhi kɑ̈ddi Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn; ɑ løg Ackelön, kí Gɑdhɑ̀, kí Ekrön kí møg-ɑ döngø kì Acdöd, kí Edöm, kí Moɑb, kí Amön, kí rɑ̈nhi Suur kí Sïdön bënn, kí rɑ̈nh-ɑ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kí kɑ̈ddi Dedɑn kí Temɑ̀, kí Budh, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi teb yëyyi gen bënn, kí rɑ̈nhi pödhi Árɑb bënn, kí rɑ̈nhi pödhh-ɑ yij ryɑng, kí rɑ̈nhi Dhimrì, kí Elɑm, kí Mɑdɑy, kí rɑ̈nhi pödhh-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø møg-ɑ cyɑ̈gi kí møg-ɑ lɑ̈wi. Mɑ̈dhi pödhh-ɑ kömi piny bënn kì yije. O rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ mɑ̈dhe kì yije cyee kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n gen." 
Jeremiah25:20  
Jeremiah25:21  
Jeremiah25:22  
Jeremiah25:23  
Jeremiah25:24  
Jeremiah25:25  
Jeremiah25:26  
Jeremiah25:27 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Köbbí teedø kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, i mɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi møgø, kɑ ge ngwøggi gen, kɑ ge pɑ̈nhhi gen, o ge dhɑ̈li gen ki dhwödhø, ki gööj liny men-ɑ örɑ kömi gen." 
Jeremiah25:28 O keløg ge óbɑ̈nyi ki mɑ̈dhø kì yije, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nudd e okööbø i ge bɑ møg mɑ̈dhi ceth kì yije." 
Jeremiah25:29 Yɑ bï-ɑ be gwøg ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ o kɑɑlɑ rënyɑ, wu orumø kinni wu óbødh ki cɑyø? Pɑth, wu pɑ bødh ki cɑyø, mɑ́ liny örɑ’ kömi piny bëne. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah25:30 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yïn, Jermɑyɑ̀, nyi töng møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn ceth. Köbbí ji møgɑni ceth kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óngɑ̈ɑ̈r kì pɑɑre mɑl, kɑ opödø ni mɑl. Óngɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi jie; óryeer ni ji mø bij oløg ki tyelli gen. Cwɑgge ólïngi yi dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny," 
Jeremiah25:31 kɑ ɑ́lɑngi cwɑgge wɑ̈dh-ɑ cögi piny. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïe dɑ gøny kí pödhh bënn. Ji bënn ókïdhe burø, kɑ tyëngrijjø nɑ̈ge.’ ” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Jeremiah25:32 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, okööbø kinni i ryɑ̈g bï-ɑ kömi pödhh bënn, óbï ɑ́ ɑtunø me dwøng, e cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ wïj tuung piny e nyi gøj-ɑ pönhï kí pönhï gïti keny-ɑ ótyëge pödhh bënn." 
Jeremiah25:33 Tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈g yi ryɑ̈ngɑni óbëëdø piny bëne pɑ̈ngø yi gen, bong ngɑn-ɑ óywøg gen, o bong ngɑn kony gen; ji óbëëdø ge odhoongø kì piny ni cyedh." 
Jeremiah25:34 Ywöngi wun, wun ɑ jɑgg; ywöngi wun wu tyëng-ɑ kwɑy jiɑ. Ywöngi wun wu óryeerø kɑ ri wun ngyelli wun kì piny. Bøli kej nɑ̈gi wun ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, o wu bɑ møg ngɑlli ni órömm." 
Jeremiah25:35 Wu pɑ yïddi ki keny pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi wun. 
Jeremiah25:36 Wu óywöngi yethi wun bɑɑrø, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu ɑ́nɑ̈ge ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe, kɑ pödhi wun, pönh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ki mër rënye." 
Jeremiah25:37  
Jeremiah25:38 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́wiye piny, ni ngur men wiy órøngi kït men-ɑ́ yije ɑ́bëëde. Piny ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ ryɑng yi böögø geki liny-ɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe." 
Jeremiah26:1 Bɑng gwøøg Yöyɑkim wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ceth," 
Jeremiah26:2 ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cungí kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn kinni köbbí gen ji kwøøb bënn, köbbí gen tyëng myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ bï be mɑ̈ddø. Ko di gïjø me wiy yi yïn, kwøb gen ceth, kɑ ko di gïn wiy yi yïn wɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah26:3 Ji ólïngø mɑwɑnø, kɑ ge ówïyø ki gøggi rɑj. Keløg ge óyewi, pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m kɑ ryɑ̈g men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni ógöjjɑ gen kipe rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi gen, ocögø e pɑ göjjɑ gen.”" 
Jeremiah26:4 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i köbbɑ ji kinni, “Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb kinni lïngu kwøbbɑ, kɑ gïn-ɑ köbbɑ wun nyi gwøg wun." 
Jeremiah26:5 Kɑ kwøbbi bɑ̈nggɑ, ɑ løg jøtöng nyi lïngi wun. De kenyi örɑ gen wun kwøbbi gen nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø yi wun." 
Jeremiah26:6 Keløg wu óbëëdø wu nudd wu pɑ lïngø ki kwøbbi gen, Kengø men göggɑ’ gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ Cilø, kɑ nyingi kɑɑl men ogöögø e nyi pɑ̈rr-ɑ cyën.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Kɑ yɑ lïngi yɑ kømm-ɑ møgɑni yi ókwër geki jøtöng, kí teedø." 
Jeremiah26:8 Kɑ ɑ́rumɑ ki kwøbi møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth, ɑmɑɑg yɑn yi teenɑni, kɑ ge óryeerø kinni, “Yï ceg-ɑ thøø!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Yïde ɑ ɑ́kööb ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni Kengø ógöögø ni Cilø, kí kinni kɑɑl men órënyi, o bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì yije?” Codhe, ɑtyeeg yɑn kej ɑ́kyel yi teedø." 
Jeremiah26:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb yi jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑjwɑni gen Kengø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gøldwøng, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ nyɑ̈n." 
Jeremiah26:11 Codhe, ɑköbbi jɑggɑni yi ókwër geki jøtöng kinni, “Jɑɑl, ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb i ódi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi kɑɑlee. O møge ɑ́lïngi yi wun ki yïthhi wun.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Codhe ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ be kwøbi møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngi yi wun kipe Kengø geki kɑɑl men yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah26:13 Wiy wun bëën-ɑ bëëd wun ɑnɑn, kɑ wu lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Keløg wu óyewi, pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈m, kɑ ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni óbï ocögø e pɑ bï." 
Jeremiah26:14 De keløg ɑ́ perɑ, göggu yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun, yɑn ɑ cinggi wun èn!" 
Jeremiah26:15 Ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni, keløg yɑ onɑ̈gø yi wun, wu ɑ́nɑ̈g dhɑnhø me yïe bɑ̈r, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i muujɑ wun wöödø menɑni.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Codhe, ɑköbbi ókwër geki jøtöng yi jɑgg ki teedø bëne kinni, “Jɑɑl, wɑ ɑ́köbbe’ kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøge, ko nɑ̈g.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Adhwödhi kwï jøgdøngø mɑl, kɑ teedø köbbi gen kinni," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ji bënn ɑ́köbbi yi jɑltöng Miikɑ̀, jɑl Möreceth i Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Dhɑyøn ókøøg ni pwödhø, uddi Yerusɑlem ódhong kì piny, o kïn-ɑ köme ógeer Kengø ógöögø ki thïm.’" 
Jeremiah26:19 Miikɑ̀ nuti nɑ̈gø yi Rɑ̈dh Kedhekiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, de Kedhekiyɑ̀ ɑ́bwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ døøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø, ɑcöge ryɑ̈g pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le kömi gïn. Anɑn, nënni wɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömee ki ryɑ̈g me rɑj!”" 
Jeremiah26:20 (Ádɑ jɑl megø me cwøl ɑ́ Uriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cemɑiyɑ̀, kì Kiriɑt Yeɑrïm, jɑlɑni ɑ́kööb ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, i dɑ rɑj møg bï kömi kɑɑl men geki pödhø, ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jermɑyɑ̀ ceth." 
Jeremiah26:21 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Uriyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim geki jyɑ̈gge, kɑ Uriyɑ̀ dwɑddi nɑ̈gø yi rɑ̈dh. De møgɑni ɑ́lïngi yi Uriyɑ̀, kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ Rïp." 
Jeremiah26:22 Kɑ Elnɑthɑn wɑ̈d Akbör ör Rïp geki jøg møøgø be yɑɑbi Uriyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim," 
Jeremiah26:23 Kɑ gø dwöög gen yï Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim, kɑ nɑ̈g, kɑ leeng wɑ̈thi lɑ̈bbi ji.)" 
Jeremiah26:24 De yɑ ɑ́cög yɑ nuti cïb en cinggi teedø, o yɑ di nɑ̈g, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́cwɑg yi Akikɑm wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn." 
Jeremiah27:1 Ri rumi Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhedekiyɑ̀ ki rønyø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ceth, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah27:2 i göögɑ ki ɑcebø, e gwøg kɑ dëllì geki rïwwi yenh, kɑ ge twööjɑ munɑ." 
Jeremiah27:3 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i ödɑ yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Suur, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Sïdön ki wöödø; i kɑ̈ɑ̈l wöönɑni yi tyëng-ɑ óör kì pödhhɑni ge bï-ɑ be këëmi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah27:4 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni i köbbɑ jii rɑ̈nhhɑni kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni," 
Jeremiah27:5 “Lɑ̈bø ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi yɑn kɑ tegɑ, geki ji kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi piny, o mëggɑ’ ngɑn mëggɑ en." 
Jeremiah27:6 Yɑn ɑ ɑ́cïb pödhhɑni bënn cingi bɑ̈ngɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gï kwɑnye ki tegø, kɑ men-ɑ́ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l wëggɑ göggii." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ógöggi yi pödhh bënn, en geki wɑ̈de, kí kwɑre gïti keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej pɑ̈ɑ̈dhi pödhe. Codhe, o pödhe gööge ki men göggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø geki rɑ̈nhh-ɑ døngø." 
Jeremiah27:8 “De keløg e dɑ pödhø men-ɑ óbɑ̈nyi ki jɑɑgø yi en, pönhɑni cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ki liny geki kɑ̈j, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, gïti keny-ɑ ówëggɑ en rënyø yi Nebukɑdnesɑr kinni tweet."
