Jeremiah27:9 Wu ko lïng ki kwøbbi jøtöng, geki ɑ́jwöggì møg-ɑ nyi rɑ̈ngø, kí møg-ɑ nyi pëëjø ki rorr, geki tyëng-ɑ nyi ceg lɑ̈g, ge okööbø i wu ko yïëy jɑɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ge ceg-ɑ wun ki wënyø, o ge bɑ møg kɑ̈ni kömi wun ki göj men bɑnge ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wun kì pödhi wun. Wu ókøølɑ wɑ̈g kɑ wu nɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah27:11 De pönh-ɑ óyïëy jɑɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ówiy yi yɑn kì pinye, o gø pure, o bëëde kì yije. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Møgɑni ɑ́köbbɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kinni, “Yïëy jɑɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Göggí wuki jií bënn, o wu bødh wun." 
Jeremiah27:13 Wude ɑ wëggu ri wun nɑ̈gø yi liny kí kɑ̈j geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì? Mɑ́ bene gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ge ópɑ̈dhi kömi pönh-ɑ óbɑ̈nyi ki jɑɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah27:14 Wu ko yïëy ki kwøbbi jøtöng møg-ɑ kööbø i bɑ̈nyi wun ki jɑɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Wu ceg kɑ wënyø yi gen. 
Jeremiah27:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ɑ ɑ́kööb kinni ge nuti ör-ɑ yi en, o ge ceg-ɑ wun ki wënyø ki nyinge. O wu ókøøle wɑ̈g ceth, kɑ wu nɑ̈g wuki jøtöng møgɑni, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi köbbi wun pyed.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ ókwër geki teedø bëne kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wu ko yïëy ki møg-ɑ kømmi yi jøtöng kinni i jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l kì yij Kengø ójwɑn ki dwöögø kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Ge wëny-ɑ wun." 
Jeremiah27:17 Kwøbbi gen ko lïngi wun! Yïëy wun jɑɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o wu bødh wun! Á kipe ngø ɑ wëggu kɑɑl men rënyø." 
Jeremiah27:18 Keløg ge bɑ jøtöng kidyër, wɑlɑ̀ keløg ɑ́ wöönɑ ɑ kɑ̈lli yi gen, wiy yɑ kwɑjji yi gen, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kinni jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì yij Kengø, kí møg-ɑ gøldwøng cög gen ge pɑ kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.”" 
Jeremiah27:19 (Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, Yöyɑkin wɑ̈d Yöyɑkim, geki jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem, ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, löjj ɑ́wiy yi en, kí luy dilɑl, kí yɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí jɑmmì møøgø kì Kengø.)" 
Jeremiah27:20  
Jeremiah27:21 “Lïngu møg-ɑ kømmɑ yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, kipe jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Kengø, kí jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́döng kì gøldwøng." 
Jeremiah27:22 Ge ókïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o ge óbëëdø kì kunɑni gïti keny-ɑ óløøgɑ kwøbbi gen. Codhe, o ge dwöögɑ, o ge cïbɑ kɑ̈jji gen kì keny. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Kì runɑni ceth, kì bïïj dwɑ̈tt e runni Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́ngwen kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́kööb Anɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adhur, ɑ bɑ jɑltöng e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Gibeon, yɑ ɑ́köbbe kì Kengø kì bøli ókwër geki teedø bëne," 
Jeremiah28:2 i Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil kööbø kinni, “Acebø men-ɑ ɑ́twööj muni Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ɑ́tor yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah28:3 Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l yi Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì Kengø, ódwöög yi yɑn kì bɑng runn ɑ́ryew." 
Jeremiah28:4 Yöyɑkin wɑ̈d Yöyɑkim, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ódwöögɑ thyew geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi yïnø kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, mɑ́ ɑcebi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ men-ɑ ɑ́twööje muni Yeudiyɑ̀ torɑ’ torø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ Anɑniyɑ̀ kì bøli ókwër geki teedø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì ódɑ̈ri Kengø kinni," 
Jeremiah28:6 “Pëddi døøjø! Døøj keløg gïn ni menɑni ogwøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o møg-ɑ ɑ́töng yi yïn bï gen gɑ dyër, kɑ ji dwööge kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki jɑmmi Kengø bënn." 
Jeremiah28:7 De lïngí gïn-ɑ köbbɑ yïn, wuki teedø bënn." 
Jeremiah28:8 Jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki töng kì bølee, ge ɑ́kööb kinni i liny, kí kɑ̈j kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì bɑ møg-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi pödhh bënn geki pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhh-ɑ teg." 
Jeremiah28:9 De jɑltöng men-ɑ ɑ́kømmi dyër, óyod kinni óör-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kidyër, keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi møgɑni.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑcebø wɑ̈g kì munɑ yi Anɑniyɑ̀, kɑ gø tørre," 
Jeremiah28:11 Akööbe kì bøli ji bënn kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, bene kër-ɑ ótørre ɑcebb-ɑ ɑ́cïb muddi pödhh bënn yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑnɑn, o møgɑni ógwøg yi en kì bɑng runn ɑ́ryew.” Codhe ɑkedhɑ." 
Jeremiah28:12 Kì bɑng keny megø e ɑcebø rumø ki tørrø yi Anɑniyɑ̀, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Jeremiah28:13 i kedhɑ be köbbi Anɑniyɑ̀ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø i yï ócuggø tørri ɑcebø mɑ yɑdh, de gø wile’ wilø ki ɑcebø me bɑ ngyënyø dødø." 
Jeremiah28:14 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, muddi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn ótöjje ki ɑcebbì mø bɑ ngyënyø dødø, o ge ógögg-ɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni i cɑgg ɑ́ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, ge bɑ møg-ɑ ówëgge göggi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ møgɑni Anɑniyɑ̀, kɑ köbbɑ thyew kinni, “Lïng Anɑniyɑ̀! Yï nuti örø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yï dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o ji møg yïëy gen ki kwøbbi pyed." 
Jeremiah28:16 Bene ɑ bɑnge kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni yï dwɑdde’ nyiigø. Yï óthøw e run men nuti thumø, mɑ́ ji ɑ́köbbi yi yïn kinni bɑny gen kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Kɑ Anɑniyɑ̀ othøø kì wɑɑngɑni ceth, kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt." 
Jeremiah29:1 Kɑ yɑ gwëd-ɑ yï ókwër geki jøtöng kí jɑgg, kí tyëng-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Nebukɑdnesɑr gɑ ɑmɑgg, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Jeremiah29:2 Wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́gwed yi yɑn, e Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin geki meye kí jɑggi tøg burø, kí jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem, kí bödhhì geki tyëng-ɑ cinggi gen døj ki gwøg rumø ki kïdhi yïnø." 
Jeremiah29:3 Wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́mëggɑ’ Elɑsɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn geki Gemɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kilkiyɑ̀, keny-ɑ ɑ́ör gen Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yï Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr yi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, wɑ̈nyɑni okööbø kinni," 
Jeremiah29:4 “Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil köbb-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wëgge kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi Nebukɑdnesɑr kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ gï kïdhe Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kinni," 
Jeremiah29:5 ‘Gëëd wun ki ud kɑ wu pëggu piny. Pur wun kɑ wu pïïdh wun ki yenh kɑ nywøli gen cɑm wun. 
Jeremiah29:6 Nyömi wun kɑ wu nywøl wun. Kɑ wɑ̈ddi wun nyömi gen, kɑ nyigi wun nywøm, kɑ ge nywøl gen. Ngënyi kwɑnni wun kɑ ge ko wëggi nungø." 
Jeremiah29:7 Göggu kɑ̈dd-ɑ yethi gen ɑ́kïdhɑ wun ki gïgdøj. Nyi kwɑjji wun yɑn kiper kɑ̈ddɑni, mɑ́ døøji wun ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ri døøji gen." 
Jeremiah29:8 Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, yɑ kyëdd-ɑ wun kinni ri wun ko wëggu wënyø yi jøtöng møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, geki tyëng-ɑ nyi kööbø ce gïn-ɑ óbï ngɑ̈nyi yi gen. Lɑ̈gg-ɑ nyi lɑ̈gi yi gen ko nyi yïëy wun." 
Jeremiah29:9 Bɑ pyed ɑ köbbi wun yi gen ki nyingɑ. Ge nuti örø yi yɑn. Yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Keny-ɑ óthumi runni Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, kwøbbi wun ólidh yi yɑn, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni wu ódwöögɑ pödhi wun, ge ómïdhi yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah29:11 Bɑ yɑn, yɑ ketɑ ɑ ngɑ̈nyi gïg-ɑ dwɑddɑ göggi wun, o bɑ døøjø de pɑth ki ryɑ̈g, o gïg-ɑ ngɑ̈dh yi wun yod yi wun." 
Jeremiah29:12 Codhe, o yɑ mɑlli yi wun, gïn-ɑ kwɑjji yi wun ómëggɑ wun." 
Jeremiah29:13 Yɑ óyɑb yi wun kɑ yɑ yod yi wun, mɑ́ yɑ óyɑb yi wun kɑ pëthi wun bënn." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ngee, yɑ óyod yi wun, kɑ wu dwøøgɑ piny wun. Wu ócung yi yɑn kì pödhh geki kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kïdhɑ wun bënn, kɑ wu dwöögɑ piny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun, wu kïdhɑ’ yïnø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah29:15 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Wu okööbø ce wu ónëngø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki jøtöng kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah29:16 Adɑ́ lïngu møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe rɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì piny-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg yi Debïd, kí møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kipe ji-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni, ɑ løg wɑddi wun møg-ɑ ɑ́cög ge nuti kïdhi yïnø gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Jeremiah29:17 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Ge göjjɑ’ liny, kí kɑ̈j, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, kɑ ge gwøgɑ ge nɑ nywøli ólɑm møg kwɑ̈gø, møg pɑ cuggi cɑmø yi rɑ̈ji gen." 
Jeremiah29:18 Yɑ órïngi kì bɑng gen, yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ liny, kí kɑ̈j geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, o pödhhi kömi piny bënn óbwøg keny-ɑ ólidh ge gïn. Ji bënn óbwøg yi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ógöggɑ gen, kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen, ge ócwølli gɑ ɑcyen yi ji bënn." 
Jeremiah29:19 Gïgɑni pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi gen ceth, kipe kɑ̀ nuti lïngi gen kwøbbɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gï nyi örɑ’ gen ki bɑ̈nggɑ jøtöng. Ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki lïngø." 
Jeremiah29:20 Wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kïdhɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bënn, lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Lïngu møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kipe Akɑɑb wɑ̈d Kolɑiyɑ̀, kí Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, jøg-ɑ nyi köbbi wun kwøbbi pyed ki nyinge. Ákööb kinni gï ócïbe cingi Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gï nɑ̈g yi en ceth kì bøli wun ge onennø yi wun." 
Jeremiah29:22 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́køøl kì Yerusɑlem kɑ ge kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, keløg dhɑnhø dwɑdd-ɑ lɑ̈mmi cyën yi gen, ge ókööbø kinni, ‘Yï ógwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni Akɑɑb geki Dhedekiyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bul yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ge onëënø!’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ cɑ́yi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́røngi ki orøg me rɑj. Mɑ̈nni ji møøgø ɑ́niin yi gen, ge ɑ́kööb thyew ki kwøbbi pyed ce ge óör-ɑ yi yɑn, o ge nuti ör yɑn, ge gönyø kɑ yɑn ceth.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Jeremiah29:24 Kɑ yɑ thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ki wöödø men muujɑ Cemɑiyɑ̀ jɑl Nëlɑm, jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gwëëd ki wɑ̈nyø ki nyinge, e gwëd-ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem, geki ókwërø Dhepɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀, kí ókwërr-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwëde Dhepɑniyɑ̀ kì yij wɑ̈nyɑni bɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah29:25  
Jeremiah29:26 “Yï ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï bɑ ókwërø kì kej Yöyɑdɑ̀, o ɑnɑn yï bɑ jɑngi Kengø, jɑng-ɑ dwøng. Yï ócuggø mɑgi ngɑn wïje di ɑ́nɑ̈gø men kööbø cem e bɑ jɑltöng. Dij tyelle ri digïddì, kɑ mɑɑg kì mune ki ɑ́cwecwel." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ede gïn ni menɑni ɑ pɑ göggí Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑl Anɑthöth, eni jɑl-ɑ nyi kööbø ki ji de nɑ jɑltöng?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Mɑɑg jɑlɑni kipe kɑ ɑ́köbbe tyëng-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kinni i ge óbëëdø kì kunɑni ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, i gëëd gen ki ud, kɑ ge pur gen, kɑ ge pïïdh gen ki yenh, kɑ ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki gïg-ɑ cyeg kì yethi pwödhhi gen geki bɑ̈ggi gen.”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Wɑ̈nyɑni ɑ́rɑ̈ngi yɑn yi Dhepɑniyɑ̀," 
Jeremiah29:30 ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah29:31 i ödɑ yï ɑmɑgg-ɑ ying Bɑbïl bënn ki wöödø me kööbø kì ri Cemɑiyɑ̀, kinni, “Cemɑiyɑ̀ geki kwɑrre ócɑy-ɑ yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Nuti ör yɑn, de ɑ́kööb ki wun e nɑ jɑltöng, kɑ wu wëgge yïëyø ki pyede. Yïe óbong kwɑrre møg-ɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun. Koo bëëdø kɑ gïgdøj møg-ɑ dwɑddɑ göggi jiɑ lidh yi en, mɑ́ gï ɑ́köbbe i pyem gen dhøgɑ. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah29:32  
Jeremiah30:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil," 
Jeremiah30:2 yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Gweed møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn bënn yij wɑ̈nyø," 
Jeremiah30:3 mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ ódwøøgɑ jiɑ, ɑ løg Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ kej gen obëënø. Ge ódwøøgɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi gen, kɑ gø kwɑny gen këti. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Yɑ ɑ́lïng ki ɑkyew; bɑ böögø me dwøng o bong gïn yïëdø. 
Jeremiah30:6 Anɑn rum wun kidøøj! Jɑlø ócuggø pɑ̈dhi piny ki dhɑnhø! De gede cwøw ɑ nennɑ gen cinggi gen cïb gen yethi gen, ni ngɑn kømi pɑ̈dhi piny? Ede dhɑnhø bëne ɑ juud en?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Cyɑ̈ng me rɑj obëënø, bong cyɑ̈ng megø men-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈r ki en. Bɑ bøli keny-ɑ ómuum wɑ̈thi jiɑ, de ge óbodh.”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, ɑcebb-ɑ muddi gen ógöönyɑ wɑ̈g, o ge pɑ cigi bëëdø gɑ bɑ̈nggi tyëngpɑth." 
Jeremiah30:9 De ge ógögg-ɑ yɑn yɑ Wïi gen, Jwøøg gen wøki kwɑɑr Debïd men-ɑ ómyeg yi yɑn ɑ́ rɑ̈dh." 
Jeremiah30:10 Wu ko böggi jiɑ; tyëng Isrɑil, wu ko nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø wu óyïëël yi yɑn kì piny-ɑ lɑ̈wi, wu ódwöögɑ kì kun-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg wun. Wu ódwöög pödhi wun, kɑ wu óbëëdø ki mër, bong gïn-ɑ ónywɑl wun, o bong ngɑn wëggi wun böggø." 
Jeremiah30:11 Yɑ óbï yï wun kɑ wu yielɑ. Pödhh bënn órënyɑ; pödhh-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́kedhhɑ wun órënyɑ ge bënn, de wu koo rënyɑ. Wu pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, de pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ wun. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie kinni, “Keddi wun pɑ cuggi tuurø, kɑ̈jj-ɑ ledh kì ri wun pɑ cuggi nøggø." 
Jeremiah30:13 Bong ngɑn me tuur wun, bong gïn yiel kì ri kɑ̈jj-ɑ lol kì ri wun, bong yɑdh me yïëdø." 
Jeremiah30:14 Wu ɑ́wïl kì wɑ̈thi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr wun, cwɑggi gen bong gøn ki wun. Yɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wun ni ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø, cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy wun ɑ́bëëd ge teeg, mɑ́ orøøg wun dwøng, o rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi wun døngø." 
Jeremiah30:15 Wu ko gööny kipe kedd-ɑ ri wun, bong gïn yiel wun ki gen, wu ɑ́cɑy yi yɑn kinøw kɑ per kɑ̀ bëëd orøøg wun dwøng, o rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi wun døngø." 
Jeremiah30:16 De ɑnɑn ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cɑm wun lony kɑ cɑmø o tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wun ókɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑgg. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud nyingi wun bënn, nyingi gen óguud, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yɑg wun yɑg." 
Jeremiah30:17 Kej wun ótyeny yi yɑn këti, keddi wun ótuur yi yɑn, cɑgg tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn wun kømm-ɑ kinni, ‘Dhɑyøn bɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cyeed pɑ̈l, bong ngɑn di cwɑgge ki en.’ Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jiɑ ódwøøgɑ piny gen pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki kɑ̈llɑni bënn Yerusɑlem ódøøg ki gerø, kɑ gøldwøng cigi gerø kì yije." 
Jeremiah30:19 Tyëng-ɑ yije ówör ki medi pëëth, ge óryeer ki medi pëthi gen. Ge ógyëdh kɑ kwɑnni gen óngënyø, ge ówëggi wørø kì bɑng gyëdhɑ." 
Jeremiah30:20 Pödhø ógwøg yi yɑn e teg, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn, kɑ cïbɑ piny kidøøj. Tyëng-ɑ guud nyingi gen, ócɑyɑ ge bënn." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ngɑn-ɑ jɑɑg gen ókwɑny-ɑ kelli gen kì yij pödhi gen, o nyirɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen bɑ nyɑɑr gen. Óbï butɑ kenyi cwølɑ en; ɑ́ men ɑ pɑ̈nyi bëën butɑ e nuti cwøøl yɑn? Ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah30:22  
Jeremiah30:23 Rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ ɑtunø, bɑ yømø me teg kɑ̀ dunne kì wɑ̈thi tyëngrijjø, yømɑni pɑ cungi gïti keny-ɑ órume ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ dwɑdde. Møgɑni ógɑm yi wɑ̈thi jie kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbï." 
Jeremiah30:24  
Jeremiah31:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ógöögɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil obëënø, kɑ ge ogöögø ki jiɑ." 
Jeremiah31:2 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bodh kì dhø thøø, pyëwɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen kì yij ryɑng. Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi tyëng Isrɑil ywömø," 
Jeremiah31:3 yɑ ɑ́cwöb kì bøli gen yɑ lɑ̈wi. Wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu ɑ́wöni wu omɑɑrø yi yɑn, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ mɑɑrɑ wun pɑ lwënyi." 
Jeremiah31:4 Yï ódøøgɑ ki gerø. Bullí ódøøg yi yïn ki pwödø kɑ yï ocöngø ki medi pyëwí. 
Jeremiah31:5 Yï ódøøg be pïïdhø ki bɑ̈ggi oløg kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pïïdh, gen ɑ ócɑm nywøli oløngɑni." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ngee, obëënø eni bøli keny-ɑ óryeer jɑl-ɑ kurø kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Eprɑim kinni, ‘Kedhi wɑ Dhɑyøn, yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wör wun ki medi pëëth kipe Isrɑil, jɑngi pödhh bënn. Wör wun ki wörri dhwøm kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́yiele, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bodh ɑ́døme.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 Ge ódwöögɑ kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, kɑ ge cungɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny. Cörr geki ngöll ódwöög kyeel ki gen, kí ɑ́yɑjj; cɑgg ɑ́ møg-ɑ cyɑ̈ngø ki pɑ̈dhi piny. Ge ódwöög gɑ pödhø me dwøng." 
Jeremiah31:9 Jiɑ ódwöög ge óywöngø; ge ócyɑ̈dhi ge ómɑ̈ddø kɑ̀ pëëjɑ gen. Ge ópeejɑ kömi nɑm ki yöö me bɑ óbödh me yije bong tuggì møg cwɑnyyi tyel. Yɑ nɑ wïyi Isrɑil o Eprɑim ɑ bɑ wɑ̈dɑ, nyeldwøng.”" 
Jeremiah31:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ pödhh bënn, lïngu kwøbbɑ, kɑ ge kɑ̈lli wun kì kömi nɑ̈mmì møg-ɑ lɑ̈wi. Jiɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ, de ge ócøngɑ kɑ ge korrɑ ni jɑlkwɑ̈yø kenyi korre dyëge." 
Jeremiah31:11 Tyëng Isrɑil ógöönyɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi töjji, kɑ ge dɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈g kì cinggi pödhh mø teg." 
Jeremiah31:12 Ge óbï kɑ ge owörø ki wörri medi pëëth kì Dhɑyøn, kɑ pëthi gen løg-ɑ mø med ki gïg-ɑ muujɑ, ge ómëggɑ byel, kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, kí dyëg geki dhög. Ge óni bɑg men-ɑ ócɑwø kidøøj, gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen bënn óyod yi gen." 
Jeremiah31:13 Kɑ wojur ocöngø ki medi pëëth, kɑ wøbb pëthi gen ómïnø geki jøgdøngø bënn. Ge ólug yi yɑn, kɑ ywøng-ɑ ywøg yi gen løgɑ medi pyëw. Kɑ kïïmø løgɑ omøy." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ókwër óyɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki gïgcɑmm-ɑ døj, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ dwɑddi yi jiɑ bënn mëggɑ gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah31:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cwɑg olïngø kì Rɑmɑ̀, cwɑggɑni bɑ ywøg me teg. Rɑceel ywøg-ɑ nyige, nyige ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, o ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lugø." 
Jeremiah31:16 “Yï ko ywöngi, poj pïi nyingí. Gwøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn bëne kipe nyigí, yï ókøøg kipere; nyigí ódwöög kì pödhi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Jeremiah31:17 Døøjø óbï dhuki megø, nyigí ódwöög pödhi gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah31:18 “Tyëng Isrɑil lïngɑ’ lïngø ge okööbø ki rɑ̈ji pëthi gen kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wø ɑ́bëëd wø nɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, de wø ɑ́pwönyi yi yïn ki lïngi kwøbbí. Dwöög wøn yïí; wø dwɑdd-ɑ dwöög köörí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wøn." 
Jeremiah31:19 Yï ɑ́wiy piny yi wøn, de wø dwɑdd-ɑ jwɑn dwöög yïí. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wøn ki pwödø yi yïn, wɑ̈thi wøn ɑ́kuul wøn piny kɑ wø óyewø. Wø ɑ́yɑ̈r kɑ wɑ̈thi wøn ólɑ̈ɑ̈yø kì bɑng orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wøn, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wø thønhø.’" 
Jeremiah31:20 “Isrɑil, yï bɑ wɑ̈n-ɑ pere teg kì yïɑ; wɑ̈n-ɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng. Kenyi kwøbɑ nyingí, yï nyi ti kɑ tyerø yi pyëwɑ. Pyëwɑ tyer-ɑ yïn ceth, pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yïn." 
Jeremiah31:21 Cwödhu piny ki ngïjjì møg nyodh yöö, wu kwøbb-ɑ yöö men-ɑ́ yije ɑ́køøl wun yïnø. Dwöög wun, tyëng Isrɑil, dwöög wun kɑ̈ddi wun; kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́wiyu piny cøn." 
Jeremiah31:22 wu gït-ɑ wɑɑng wu ólyebbø? Yɑ ɑ́göög ki gïjø me nyɑ̈n, me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki jɑmmì bënn, ni ke di bëëde ɑ́ dhɑjø ɑ korri jɑlø.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ ji piny gen, ge ódøøg be kwøb kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀ geki kɑ̈dde kinni, ‘Wiy Yerusɑlem kïti kwër gyëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni kej kwër, keny-ɑ yije bëëde.’" 
Jeremiah31:24 Ji óbëëdø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kí kɑ̈dde, kɑ ge opurø ki pwödh kɑ yï gen dɑ dyëg kí dhög." 
Jeremiah31:25 Tyëng-ɑ pïdø óthödhɑ ki ywömø, kɑ møg-ɑ nyönhø yi kɑ̈j thödhɑ ki gïncɑm." 
Jeremiah31:26 Codhe, o ji ókööb gen kì bøli kenyɑni kinni, ‘Yɑ ɑ́kedhi be buddø, kɑ yɑ ócyëwø dëlɑ yööd.’" 
Jeremiah31:27 “Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ kwøb-ɑ kinni, bøli keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ piny Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Isrɑil ki ji, kí dhög obëënø." 
Jeremiah31:28 Óni kɑ ɑ́puthɑ gen wɑ̈g kì piny, kɑ ge weddɑ, kɑ ge rënyɑ, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen tɑ̈ɑ̈yɑ piny, ge ódøøgɑ ki miin piny kɑ ge tyenyɑ." 
Jeremiah31:29 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, ji koo cigi kwøb kinni, ‘Oløng-ɑ wɑj ɑ́cɑm-ɑ yi tyëngdøngø, kɑ yöd ɑ́ othønhø ɑ dhøggi gen wɑ̈nyyi.’" 
Jeremiah31:30 De ngɑn-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø ki oløg me wɑj, bɑ legge ɑ óywɑ̈ɑ̈yø, o dhɑnhø óthøw kɑ gööj orøge.”" 
Jeremiah31:31 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ólwööb wøn ki lwöbø me nyɑ̈n wøki tyëng Isrɑil ki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ obëënø." 
Jeremiah31:32 Koo bëëdø e nɑ lwömi tyeli mɑl keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp ge pyejjɑ’ pyejjø kì cinggi gen. Lwömɑni nuti mïdhø yi gen, ngö yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nɑ cwøør gen." 
Jeremiah31:33 Lwöm-ɑ nyɑ̈n men-ɑ ólwøb yi wøki tyëng Isrɑil, óni men: Ciggɑ ócïbɑ ri gen, kɑ gweedɑ kömi minni gen. Yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, o ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ." 
Jeremiah31:34 Bong ngɑn-ɑ ónyudhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑɑd gen, mɑ́ yɑ óbëëdø yɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi ji bënn, cɑg kì ri men-ɑ thinh gïti ri ngɑndwøng. Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki orøøg gen, o gïg-ɑ bɑjji yi gen koo pɑrri yi yɑn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cɑ̈ng ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ men muujø ki cɑr kì dicɑ̈ng, kɑ dwɑ̈y geki kyell gwøge gɑ møg mënyø kì wɑ̈r. Nɑɑm omelø nyi pwöje pwöjø kɑ ɑpɑge oruurø, nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah31:36 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, i kɑ̀ nud gïgɑni bënn kì kɑ̈jji gen, Isrɑil óbëëd e nud ceth ɑ́ pödhø." 
Jeremiah31:37 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ órøm mɑl, kɑ tyelli piny thɑ́ gen yod, bene bøli keny-ɑ óbɑnyɑ tyëng Isrɑil mɑwɑnø, kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen bënn. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Jeremiah31:38 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ódøøg Yerusɑlem kɑɑlɑ ki gerø obëënø, cɑg kì ri Ønbɑ̈r mi Anɑnel gïti Dhøg Wïj Tung." 
Jeremiah31:39 O kew cige kedhø kì kenyɑni gïti Kïti Gɑreb kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, gø wene’ wenø e gït-ɑ Goɑ̀" 
Jeremiah31:40 Tör bëne, kí wɑ̈thi rörri ji geki wïj thur, gïti Dhøg Kyënyì kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl ógöögø ɑ kej kwër. Kɑɑlɑni koo cigi cøør piny, wɑlɑ̀ koo rënyi.”" 
Jeremiah32:1 Kɑ wø okööbø ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì ri pyɑ̈ri runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑ løg wɑɑng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd runni Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïkyel kì yij lɑwø." 
Jeremiah32:2 Kì bøli kenyɑni, Yerusɑlem ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑtyeg yi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg kì gøldwøng, ød ódij kömɑ." 
Jeremiah32:3 Yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ kɑ per kɑ ɑ́köbbii i yɑ kööbø kinni, i Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kɑɑldwøng men ówëggɑ mɑgø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀," 
Jeremiah32:4 o Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ pɑ bodh. Ómɑg kɑ muuj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀; gø ólidhe ceth kɑ ge okööbø. 
Jeremiah32:5 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ókïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o óbëëdø kì kunɑni gïti keny-ɑ óløøgɑ kwøbbe. Cɑgg e ónyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, linyɑni koo lwɑ̈ng yi en. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah32:7 “Anɑnel wɑ̈d Cɑlöm, Cɑlöm ómï wïyí obëënø e dwɑdd-ɑ ngëwwi yïn pwödhe, pwönh-ɑ ying Anɑthöth kì myërri Ben Yɑmïn, mɑ́ yïn ɑ bɑ wɑɑd nyöödø kì yïe.”" 
Jeremiah32:8 Codhe, kɑ Anɑnel bï-ɑ yïɑ, kɑ yɑ yuude kej jøg-ɑ nyi kurø, ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Ngew pwödhɑ, pwönh-ɑ ying Anɑthöth kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, mɑ́ yïn ɑ ngewii kipe e ókedhi wɑ̈g kì kɑl, ngeew ceth.” Kɑ yodɑ ceth kinni kwøbbɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah32:9 Codhe, ɑngewɑ pwönhɑni kì yï Anɑnel, kɑ ngyëny mëggɑ en, ngyënyyɑni bɑ ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew." 
Jeremiah32:10 Kɑ wɑ̈nyi ngyew thɑnyɑ ki kitim men-ɑ köme di nyingɑ geki mø tyëng-ɑ buti gen ɑ́ngëëw," 
Jeremiah32:11 Codhe, ɑkwɑnyɑ wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́cyëëg kí men-ɑ bɑ ɑyieb kí lwöm-ɑ yije bëne," 
Jeremiah32:12 ɑmëggɑ gen Bɑruk wɑ̈d Neriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀. Ge ɑ́muujɑ ceth kì bøli Anɑnel geki tyëng-ɑ buti gen ɑ́ngëëw, jøg-ɑ ɑ́gøj wɑ̈nyø ki kitim mø nyingi gen, kí jøg-ɑ ɑ́ying keny-ɑ ɑ́kømmi kwøb." 
Jeremiah32:13 Aköbbɑ Bɑruk kì bøli gen bënn kinni," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb i kwɑny wɑ̈jji ngyew møg ryeet, men-ɑ bɑ ɑcyëg ki men-ɑ bɑ ɑyieb, kɑ ge muul yij pug kipe kinni o ge bëëd gen ge pɑ rënyi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Jeremiah32:15 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kööb kinni i pwödh geki bɑ̈gg ódøøg be ngyewø kì piny Isrɑil.”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rumɑ ki mëggi wɑ̈nyi ngyew Bɑruk, ɑkwɑ̈jjɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah32:17 “Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïn ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny ki tegí, teng-ɑ dwøng, bong gïn dhɑ̈li gwøgø yi yïn." 
Jeremiah32:18 Ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø ɑ́mɑɑr yi yïn ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me pɑ lwënyi, de ji møøgø thyew ɑ́cɑy yi yïn kipe orøøg kweyyi gen. Yï bɑ Jwøk me dwøng me pëddi tegø, bene yïn Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah32:19 Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi yïn nyii gwirø yi yïn kidøøj, kɑ yï nyii göögø ki gïg mø døngø. Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi ji bënn onennø yi yïn, kɑ ngɑn nyi mëggi köggi gwøge." 
Jeremiah32:20 Yï ɑ́göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø kì Rïp kɑ̈ge dööng, o yï nudd yï ogöögø ki gïg ni møgɑni pïd dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kì pödhi Isrɑil geki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kipe kinni o perí bëëde e ngɑ̈nyi kì kɑ̈jj bënn." 
Jeremiah32:21 Jií ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp kɑ tegø me dwøng, kí gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø, kɑ tyëng Rïp göjjí wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Jeremiah32:22 Kɑ jií mëggí piny men, ni kɑ ɑ́köngí kì bøli kweyyi gen, kinni gø ómëggí gen, eni piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc." 
Jeremiah32:23 De keny-ɑ ɑ́rum gen ki kwɑnyi piny, ciggí ɑ́cög gï pɑ mïdhi yi gen, o ge nuti bëëdø ki bëën-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn; ge ɑ́göög-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen, bene ɑ bɑ̈nge göjjí gen ryɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Kɑɑldwøng ótyeg yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o ge óthurø ki kɑ̈jj møg nenni gen kɑɑl, ge dwɑdd-ɑ mɑgii. Kɑɑl bɑ men pɑ̈ɑ̈dh ceth yi liny kí kɑ̈j, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ɑ́bï gɑ dyër." 
Jeremiah32:25 De bɑ yïn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn i ngewɑ piny kì bøli ji, cɑgg kɑɑldwøng nënni ɑ́ men tɑ̈ɑ̈y piny yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg dhɑnhø bëne. Bong gïn dhɑ̈li gwøgø yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah32:28 Kɑɑl men mëggɑ’ Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki linye, o bɑ men mɑg yi en ceth," 
Jeremiah32:29 kɑ rɑ̈b yi gen ki mɑc. Kɑɑl órɑ̈b kɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kí udde, udd-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́rɑ̈bbi gen Bɑɑl ki bɑkur, kɑ yethi gen kunyi gen jwögg møøgø ki møgi oløg." 
Jeremiah32:30 Tyëng Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́wöni ge gøgg-ɑ gïg nyi rënyi pyëwɑ. 
Jeremiah32:31 Tyëng kɑɑl men ɑ́wöni kër-ɑ ɑ́gerii ge gøgg-ɑ gïg nyi rënyi pyëwɑ ki mendwøng. Ceg yi yɑn kɑ rënyø ceth," 
Jeremiah32:32 kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́wöni ge ogøggø yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem geki rɑ̈nhi gen, kí jɑggi gen, kí ókwër, geki jøtöng." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ngɑ̈thi gen ɑ́lugi gen yɑn, ge ɑ́pwönyɑ de ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li dïdø." 
Jeremiah32:34 Kɑ ge tir-ɑ kïdhi yij Keng-ɑ ɑ́ger ɑ́ keny mɑlli yɑn ki ngïjji gen gïg-ɑ kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø, kɑ gø bwöl gen." 
Jeremiah32:35 Kɑ Bɑɑl gëddi gen ki këlli lɑm kì Töör Kinöm, gɑ møg kömi gen nyi rɑ̈b gen nyigi gen womɑ̈nn, kí wɑ̈ddi gen gɑ gëdhhì møg mëggi jwøng-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Mölek. Ge nuti köbbø yi yɑn kinni göög gen kinøw, wɑlɑ̀ møgɑni nuti pɑ̈nyi bëën wïjɑ, kinni ge ógöögø kinøw, kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ göjji orøg.”" 
Jeremiah32:36 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀, kɑɑl men ópɑ̈dhi cingi Nebukɑdnesɑr yi gööj liny, kí kɑ̈j geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì. Anɑn lïng, yïɑ dɑ møøgø møg dwɑddɑ kwøbø." 
Jeremiah32:37 Ji ódøøgɑ ki cungø kì pödhh-ɑ ókedhhɑ gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, kɑ ge dwöögɑ piny men kɑ ge obëëdø’ yije e bong gïn böggi yi gen." 
Jeremiah32:38 Codhe, o ge bëëd gen gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah32:39 Pyëwɑ ócög e med ki göggi gen ki gïgdøj, o ge ócïbɑ piny kidøøj kì piny men." 
Jeremiah32:40 Wø ólwöbø ki gen ki lwöbø me gïti ɑtheer. Yɑ pɑ wïyi ki göggi gen ki gïgdøj, o ge ógöjjɑ wøri yɑn ki pëthi gen bënn, o ngɑ̈thi gen koo lugi gen yɑn këti." 
Jeremiah32:41 Pyëwɑ ócög e med ki göggi gen ki gïgdøj, o ge ócïbɑ piny kidøøj kì piny men." 
Jeremiah32:42 “Gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn kinni ómëggɑ gen muujɑ’ muujø ni kɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ bëëni ryɑ̈g ceth, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi gen." 
Jeremiah32:43 Ji okööbø i piny men ógöögø e nɑ ryɑng, keny bong dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l men bëëdø kì yije. Kí kinni ómëggi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. De pwödh bɑ møg-ɑ ódøøg be ngewø kì pönhï." 
Jeremiah32:44 Ji óngëwø ki pwödh ceth, kɑ wɑ̈jji ngyew nyi gwed, kɑ ge nyi thɑny ki nyingi tyëng-ɑ bøli gen ngëëw. Gïn ni menɑni ógwøg kì myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn kí myërr-ɑ bɑdhhi Yerusɑlem, kí kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí kɑ̈ddi myërri kelli kïttì, geki myërri kelli kïttì. Ji ódwøøgɑ piny gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëdɑ yɑ nudd yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg kì ódɑ̈ri burø, ɑ ɑ́bëën wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïɑ këti." 
Jeremiah33:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j piny kɑ gø cïbe keje, ɑ́kööb ki yɑn. Ngɑn-ɑ nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni," 
Jeremiah33:3 “Cwøl nyingɑ, kwøbbí óløøgɑ, yï óköbbɑ ki gïg mø pëddi døøjø; møg nuti bëëdø ge ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn cøn." 
Jeremiah33:4 Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, yɑ kwøb-ɑ kinni, Yerusɑlem geki gøldwøng kì Yeudiyɑ̀ cøør-ɑ piny yi tyëg." 
Jeremiah33:5 Dɑ ji møg-ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o ge ógöjjɑ nɑ̈gø yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ mɑ pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki gen, kɑ piny opɑ̈ngø yi tyëngthøø. Ngɑ̈jɑ ólugɑ kɑɑl men kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jie." 
Jeremiah33:6 De kɑɑl men ótuur yi yɑn kɑ døøg-ɑ keje. Ge óthödhɑ ki mër kɑ bong-ɑ ólïng pëëth kì yï gen. 
Jeremiah33:7 Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil ómëggɑ døøjø, kɑ ge døøgɑ ki gerø ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen cøn." 
Jeremiah33:8 Orøng-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn yi gen órɑ̈ɑ̈jɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gen, kɑ ge gwøgɑ ge dhïw." 
Jeremiah33:9 Yerusɑlem ógöögø ki kej medi pyëw kí dhwɑ̈ng geki ngöönø, o pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kì kömi piny ge óbwøg keny-ɑ ólïngi gen gïgdøj møg-ɑ ógöggɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem geki dhwɑ̈ng men-ɑ ómëggɑ kɑɑlɑni.”" 
Jeremiah33:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Teedø okööbø i kenyɑni döngø ɑ́ ryɑng, i bong ji wɑlɑ̀ bong lɑ̈yy møg bëëdø kì yije. O ge kømm-ɑ dyër; kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem dööng nøw, bong ji wɑlɑ̀ bong lɑ̈yy møg bëëdø kì yethi gen. De cwɑg ódøøg be lïngø kì kɑ̈jjɑni," 
Jeremiah33:11 men-ɑ́ cwɑggi ji mø cöngø ki medi pëëth, kí cwɑggi tyëng nywöm ódøøg be lïngø. Ji ólïngi, ge cyɑ̈dhi ge owörø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gëdhhi pwøj yij Kengɑ, ge cem-ɑ, ‘Pwøj wun Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e døøj, o mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee gït-ɑ ɑtheer.’ Piny men ówëggɑ dönyø kɑ døøg-ɑ keje cøn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Piny-ɑ döngø ɑ́ ryɑng èn, ɑ yije bong dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ bong lɑ̈y, lume ótwïy kɑ yije døøg be kwɑ̈yø ki dyëg." 
Jeremiah33:13 Tyëngdyëg ódøøg be kwɑnni dyëgi gen kì yethi kɑ̈ddi wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí kɑ̈ddi thɑ̈thi kïttì, kí myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, kí myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí myërr-ɑ bɑdhhi Yerusɑlem, kí myërri Yeudiyɑ̀. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah33:14 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ógwøøg møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, obëënø." 
Jeremiah33:15 Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhi bøli kenyɑni, yɑ órönyø ki ngɑntir ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kì kelli kwɑrri Debïd. Rɑ̈nhɑni óbëëd e gøgg-ɑ dyër kì yij pödhø bëne." 
Jeremiah33:16 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng Yerusɑlem ódøm, kɑ ge óbëëdø e bong gïn lïngø kì pëthi gen. Kɑɑlɑni ócwølli ɑ́ ‘Wë Yïënee.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, óbëëd e dɑ kwɑɑr Debïd men-ɑ óbëëdø ceth ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil," 
Jeremiah33:18 o óbëëd e dɑ Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ óbëëdø ceth gɑ ókwër ge gögg-ɑ yɑn, o ge nyi nëngi gen yɑn ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí byëlø, kí gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
Jeremiah33:19 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Wø ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøb wøki dicɑ̈ng geki wɑ̈r kinni nyi bï gen kì bøli kɑ̈jji bëëni gen ceth, o kwøbbɑni pɑ cuggi pɑ̈dø." 
Jeremiah33:21 Ki yuu-ɑ ni menɑni ceth, wø ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøb wøki bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd, kinni óbëëd e dɑ kwɑre ceth men-ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ rɑ̈dh. O wø ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøb wøki ókwër, Kwɑrri Leebì kinni ge óbëëdø gɑ bɑ̈nggɑ, o lwöbø menɑni bëne pɑ cuggi pɑ̈dø." 
Jeremiah33:22 Kwɑnni kwɑrri Debïd geki Kwɑrri Leebì ómed yi yɑn, kɑ ge ódhɑ̈lø kwɑnø yi ngenyi gen, ni kɑ̀ pɑ cuggi kyell geki ɑyejø kì thɑ̈ngi nɑɑm omelø ki kwɑnø.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Nuti yood wun kinni ji okööbø i dɑ Isrɑil me wiy yɑn geki Yeudiyɑ̀, gen ɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn ryeet? Codhe ɑdøøg gen be buyyi jiɑ, kɑ gï wiy gen ki ngɑ̈dhø gɑ pödhø." 
Jeremiah33:25 De yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï wøn dɑ lwöbø wøki dicɑ̈ng geki wɑ̈r, o yɑ ɑ́rum ki muujø ki cigg møg-ɑ mïdhi mɑl geki piny." 
Jeremiah33:26 O ni kɑ̀ mïdhɑ møgɑk bënn, lwömɑ ki kwɑrri Yɑgob ómïdhi yi yɑn ceth, geki lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm wøn ki bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd. Yɑ ókɑ̈bbi kì gøl Debïd ki ngɑn-ɑ ójɑɑg kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm geki kwɑrri Isɑɑk kí Yɑgob. Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki jiɑ, kɑ ge wëggɑ dönyø këti.”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb ki yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yerusɑlem geki kɑ̈dd-ɑ bɑdhhe bɑ ɑtyeg yi liny Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki lìnyi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi en bënn. 
Jeremiah34:2 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil i kedhɑ kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ köbbɑ kinni, “Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑɑldwøng men mëggɑ’ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gø rɑ̈be kinni tweet." 
Jeremiah34:3 Yï koo bodh; yï ómɑg kɑ yï muujii. Ólidh yi yïn ki wɑngí, kɑ wu okööbø ki en. Codhe, o yï kedhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah34:4 Dhedekiyɑ̀ lïngí møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn kiperí, yï ko mɑg yi liny." 
Jeremiah34:5 Yï óthøw kɑ mër, o nɑ kɑ ɑ́rɑ̈bbi kweyyí ki bɑkur keny-ɑ ɑ́koony gen gɑ rɑ̈nhì, yï ókony-ɑ nøw ceth, kɑ yï rɑ̈bbi ki bɑkur. Yï óywøg yi gen ge cem-ɑ, ‘Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøn ɑ́thøw!’ Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Codhe, ɑmuujɑ wöödø Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ kì Yerusɑlem," 
Jeremiah34:7 e Yerusɑlem bɑ ɑtyeg yi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Lɑkic geki Adhekɑ̀, ɑ́bëëd gɑ ɑtyeg geki kɑ̈ddi dör møg-ɑ kyeelø kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah34:8 Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøb geki tyëng Yerusɑlem bënn, kinni gøøny bɑ̈ngg" 
Jeremiah34:9 møg-ɑ bɑ tyëng Isrɑil ying gɑ cwøw wɑlɑ̀ mɑ̈nn, o bëëd e bong ngeti Isrɑil me yïe di bɑ̈ng mɑ ngeti Isrɑil." 
Jeremiah34:10 Kɑ ji oyïëyø bënn geki jɑggi gen kinni gøøny bɑ̈ngg-ɑ bɑ tyëng Isrɑil bënn, kɑ ge ko cigi dwøøg yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. Ge ɑ́gøny gen kidyër," 
Jeremiah34:11 de rummi gen ɑ́wil yi gen këti, kɑ bɑ̈nggɑni dwøøg gen yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
Jeremiah34:12 Codhe, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Jeremiah34:13 Jwøøg Isrɑil yɑ köbbe kinni i köbbɑ tyëng Isrɑil kinni, “Wø ɑ́lwööb ki kweyyi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ ge göönyɑ wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. Ge ɑ́köbbɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah34:14 nyi gøøny bɑ̈ng-ɑ bɑ ngeti Isrɑil men-ɑ ɑ́rum ki gwøg ki gwøøg bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø kì bïryeew runn, e rum gwøg ki runn ɑ́bïkyel. De kwøbbɑ nuti ywöörø yi kweyyi wun, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ nuti lïngi gen." 
Jeremiah34:15 Dɑ́ yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́pöödh ɑ ɑ́wil wun rummi wun, kɑ wu ogöögø ki gïjø mɑ ɑ́mïni pyëwɑ. Wu ɑ́yïëy wu bënn ki gønyi wɑddi wun, tyëng Isrɑil kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. Møgɑni ɑ́nywɑg yi wun kì bølɑ, kì yij Keng-ɑ mɑlli yɑn." 
Jeremiah34:16 De rummi wun ɑ́cigi wilø yi wun, kɑ yɑ ocögø yɑ pɑ wør yi wun. Bɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́gøny yi wun bënn, ge ɑ́dwøøg wun yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø." 
Jeremiah34:17 Anɑn yɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb kinni dhøgɑ ɑ́pyem yi wun, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wɑddi wun, tyëng Isrɑil bɑny yi wun ki gööny wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø. Døj, wu mëggɑ nɑ̈gø yi liny, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì kí kɑ̈j, jurri kömi piny óbëëd wɑ̈thi gen otïgø yi gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ wun." 
Jeremiah34:18 Jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki jɑggi Yerusɑlem, kí jɑggi gøldwøng kí ókwër, kí pëjjì bënn, ge ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g ki kwøb ki yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l gen kɑɑm buddi wɑdh men-ɑ ɑ́kɑg yi gen ɑ́ ɑ́ryew. De lwömɑni ɑ́pɑ̈d yi gen. Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, jiɑni ógöggɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi wɑnhɑni yi gen." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Ge cïbɑ’ cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, møg-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi gen, ge ónɑ̈g kɑ ge cɑm yi winy geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Jeremiah34:21 Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ geki jyɑ̈gge, ge mëggɑ’ tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi gen thyew. Ge ócïbɑ cingi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, eni tyëg men-ɑ ɑ́wiy wun ki tyegø." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ge ódøøgɑ’ cwölø, o ge dwöög gen kɑɑl men. Ótyeg yi gen, o gø mɑg gen, o gø rɑ̈b gen ki mɑc kinni tweet. Kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ógwøg yi yɑn ge nɑ ryɑng, keny yije pɑ bëëd. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Yöyɑkim wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni," 
Jeremiah35:2 “Kedhí be kwøb ki tyëng gøl Rekɑb. Kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l ød ɑ́kyel kì kelli udd-ɑ bɑdhhi Kengø, kɑ ge thödhí ki møgi oløg.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Codhe, ɑ́kwɑnyɑ jø gøl Rekɑb, ɑ løg Yɑdhɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Abɑdhiniyɑ̀, en kí nyiimen kí wɑ̈ddi gen." 
Jeremiah35:4 Kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ Kengø. Kɑ ge kïdhɑ øn-ɑ yije nyi bëëd yi jøbɑng jɑltöng Aɑnɑn wɑ̈d Igdɑliyɑ̀. Ønɑnì ying-ɑ mɑl kì kömi øn-ɑ yije bëëd yi Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑlum, jɑlɑni bɑ jɑgø me pere teg kì Kengø, o ønɑni cyɑ̈gi ki uddi jɑgg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah35:5 Codhe, kɑ gøl Rekɑb muujɑ ki møgi oløg kì yethi löd, kɑ ge muujɑ ki ɑ́ludhhì, ɑköbbɑ gen kinni, “Mɑ̈dhi wun ki møgi oløg.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 De ge ɑ́löggi kinni, “Kweyi wøn, Yönɑdɑb wɑ̈d Rekɑb, ɑ́kyëëd i wø ko mɑ̈ɑ̈dh wøki kwɑrri wøn ki møgi oløg." 
Jeremiah35:7 Wø ɑ́kyëdde thyew kinni i wø ko gëëd ki ud, wɑlɑ̀ wø ko pur ki pwödh, kɑ wø ko pïïdh ki bɑ̈ggi oløg, kɑ wø ko ngëëw ki gen. Wø ɑ́ceg yi en thyew i bëëd wøn kì yethi kemmì ceth, kipe kinni o wø óbëëd wøn kì piny men, wø nɑ wëdhh." 
Jeremiah35:8 Cigg-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wøn yi Yönɑdɑb bënn omïdhø yi wøn. Wø nuti pɑ̈nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg wøki mɑ̈nni wøn, kí wɑ̈ddi wøn kí nyigi wøn." 
Jeremiah35:9 Wø pɑ nyi gëdø ki ud møg bëëd yi wøn, wø bëëd ɑ yethi kemmì, o yï wøn bong bɑ̈gg kí pwödh, wɑlɑ̀ yï wøn bong byel. Møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgi wøn yi Yönɑdɑb omïdhø yi wøn bënn." 
Jeremiah35:10  
Jeremiah35:11 Dɑ́ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr be mɑgi pödhø, ɑ ɑ́bëën wøn be bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, wø bwøg-ɑ liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki liny Arɑm. Bene ɑ bɑnge bëëd wøn kì Yerusɑlem.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni, i kedhɑ kɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem köbbɑ kinni, “Wun ɑ pyëj yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ pɑ lïngi wun kwøbbɑ; gede møg-ɑ nyi ciggɑ wun ɑ pɑ nyi gwøgu gen?" 
Jeremiah35:13  
Jeremiah35:14 Yönɑdɑb cigge omïdhø yi kwɑrre, o ge ɑ́cög ge pɑ mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg kì kelli gen gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn. De yɑ ceg-ɑ kwøb ki wun ki dhøggi bɑ̈nggɑ jøtöng, o kwøbbɑ nuti lïngi wun." 
Jeremiah35:15 Yɑ nuti wïyø ki ödi wun ki bɑ̈nggɑ jøtöng, o wu nyii köbbø yi gen kinni wiyu bëën-ɑ rɑj, kɑ wu døøg wun be gøggi dyër. Wu ɑ́kyëddi yi gen kinni wu ko nyi kedhi be mɑlli jwögg møøgø, kipe kinni o wu óbëëd wun ceth kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ wun, wuki kweyyi wun. De kwøbbɑ nuti lïngi wun, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ cïgɑ wun pɑ lïngi yi wun." 
Jeremiah35:16 Kwɑrri Yönɑdɑb ciggi kweyi gen ɑ́mïdhi yi gen; de men-ɑ́ wun, kwøbbɑ nuti lïngi wun," 
Jeremiah35:17 O ɑnɑn wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi wun. Møgɑni gwøgɑ’ gwøgø, mɑ́ wu nuti lïngø, keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun, o wu nuti yïëyø keny-ɑ ɑ́cwølɑ wun.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ jø gøl Rekɑb kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wu ɑ́mïdh-ɑ møgɑ ɑ́cïgi wun yi Yönɑdɑb kweyi wun, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïge wun mïdhi yi wun kidøøj." 
Jeremiah35:19 Kì bɑng menɑni, yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, yɑ kwøb-ɑ kinni, Yönɑdɑb wɑ̈d Rekɑb yïe ócög e dɑ kwɑre mɑ jɑlø men göggi yɑn ceth.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Kì ngween runni Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki wɑ̈nyø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn bënn kì ri Isrɑil kí Yeudiyɑ̀ geki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø gweed yije. Gwed møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn bënn kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gɑ ki kwøb ki yïn, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ Yöciyɑ̀ ɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh gïti dicyɑ̈ngtïn." 
Jeremiah36:3 Men-ɑ ólïng tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki kwøbbi ryɑ̈ng-ɑ dwɑddɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l kömi gen, kɑ ge óyewø, kɑ ge ówïyø gwøg ki rɑj. Codhe o pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈me ki gen, o orøøg gen lɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi yɑn.”" 
Jeremiah36:4 Codhe, ɑcwølɑ Bɑruk wɑ̈d Neriyɑ̀, kɑ köbbɑ kinni gwede møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ge bënn. Codhe, ɑgweed gen yij wɑ̈nyø yi Bɑruk." 
Jeremiah36:5 Acegɑ Bɑruk kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki ɑyïëy këti ki kedhi yij Kengø." 
Jeremiah36:6 De yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ yïn o yï ókedhi Kengø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng twöni rek ki gïncɑm. Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni rɑɑng ki cwɑg mø døngø, o møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́gweed yij wɑ̈nyɑni yi yïn, lïngi yi gen. Rɑɑng kì keny me lïngi møgɑni yi teedø bëne geki tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah36:7 Men-ɑ ólïngi gen kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ówïyø bëën-ɑ rɑj, kɑ ge ywøøg-ɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni gï ócɑye ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe.”" 
Jeremiah36:8 Codhe, kɑ kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j rɑng yi Bɑruk kì Kengø ni kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ en ceth." 
Jeremiah36:9 Kì bïngween dwɑ̈tt, kì bïïj runni Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, teedø ri gen ɑ́twöön gen ki gïncɑm, men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem bënn geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø" 
Jeremiah36:10 Kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn rɑng yi Bɑruk, teedø olïngø bënn. Árɑ̈ɑ̈ng e ying-ɑ Kengø kì øn-ɑ bëëd yi Gemɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn, jɑngi burø, øde ying-ɑ mɑl e nenn-ɑ dhø Kengø dhøng-ɑ nyɑ̈n." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Gemɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lïnge kì yij wɑ̈nyɑni. 
Jeremiah36:12 Codhe, ɑkedhe gøldwøng, kɑ pödh-ɑ ódɑ̈ri burø keny-ɑ cugi yi jɑgg bënn. Jɑng-ɑ dwøng Elicɑmɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e nud kì kenyɑni geki jɑgg-ɑ kyeelø, ɑ løg Delɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cemɑiyɑ̀, kí Elnɑthɑn wɑ̈d Akbör, kí Gemɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn, kí Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Anɑniyɑ̀, kí pëjj-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nud kì kenyɑni." 
Jeremiah36:13 Ge ɑ́köbbi yi Mikɑiyɑ̀ ki møg-ɑ ɑ́lïnge bënn, ge rɑ̈ng-ɑ ji yi Bɑruk." 
Jeremiah36:14 Codhe, ɑör Yeudì (wɑ̈d Nethɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Celemiyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Kuc) be köbbi Bɑruk kinni kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈nge teedø. Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Bɑruk." 
Jeremiah36:15 Kɑ Bɑruk köbbi yi jɑgg kinni, “Pëggí piny, kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni rɑ̈ngí wøn.” Codhe, ɑrɑ̈ngii gen yi Bɑruk." 
Jeremiah36:16 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume rɑ̈ngi gen yi Bɑruk, ɑlïïdh gen nyingi gen, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, “Møg ceg kɑ köbbi rɑ̈dh yi wɑ.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Apyëjii yi gen kinni, “Köbbí wøn, gïg bënn ɑ́gwed-ɑ dï yi yïn? Yï ɑ́köbb-ɑ yi Jermɑyɑ̀?”" 
Jeremiah36:18 Alöggi Bɑruk kinni, “Jermɑyɑ̀ nyi ceg-ɑ kwøb, o gïn-ɑ kwøb yi en nyi gweedɑ yij wɑ̈nyø.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Codhe ɑköbbii yi gen kinni, “Kedhu be pɑ̈nnø wuki Jermɑyɑ̀. Kɑ kej wun ko wëggu yodø yi dhɑnhø megø.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni cïb ød Elicɑmɑ̀ jɑngi buri jɑgg, codhe ɑkedhi gen buri rɑ̈dh, kɑ møgɑni dwøg yi gen bënn." 
Jeremiah36:21 Codhe, ɑör Yeudì be dwɑɑyi wɑ̈nyɑni yi rɑ̈dh. Akwɑɑny wɑ̈nyɑni kì ød Elicɑmɑ̀ yi Yeudì kɑ gø rɑ̈nge rɑ̈dh geki jɑgg-ɑ bute." 
Jeremiah36:22 Piny ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ wuudø, o rɑ̈dh bëëd ɑ øn-ɑ nyi bëëde kì wuudø e oröjø ki mɑc." 
Jeremiah36:23 Ri rumi Yeudì ki rɑngi lwøbb ɑ́dɑ̈g wɑlɑ̀ ɑ́ngwen kinni ceth, kɑ lwøbbɑni ngøl yi rɑ̈dh ki pɑlø, kɑ gï leenge mɑc. Kɑ nyi cig-ɑ ngudø ki lwøbb-ɑ nyi rum ki rɑngø, gïti kɑ ɑ́tyëge wɑ̈nyø ki rɑ̈bø." 
Jeremiah36:24 De rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈ggì dëlli gen nuti juurø yi møg-ɑ ɑ́rɑng. 
Jeremiah36:25 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́kwɑjji yi Elnɑthɑn, kí Delɑiyɑ̀, kí Gemɑriyɑ̀ kinni wɑ̈nyɑni ko rɑ̈b yi en, de rɑ̈dh nuti yïëyø." 
Jeremiah36:26 Codhe, ɑköbbi nyirɑ̈dh Yerɑmel kí Serɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adhriel, kí Celemiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Abdiil i mɑg gen yɑn wøki Bɑruk. De wø ɑ́kɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah36:27 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum wɑ̈ny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ Bɑruk o gø gweede dhøgɑ ki rɑ̈bø yi Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah36:28 i kɑ̈bbɑ ki wɑ̈nyø megø, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́ying yij wɑ̈nyi tyeli mɑl gweedɑ yije bënn." 
Jeremiah36:29 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i köbbɑ rɑ̈dh kinni, “Wɑ̈nyø ɑ́rɑ̈b yi yïn, yi okööbø i ede Jermɑyɑ̀ ɑ gwëde kinni rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ óbï kɑ pönhï rënye, kɑ ji geki lɑ̈yy nɑ̈ge." 
Jeremiah36:30 O ɑnɑn yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Yöyɑkim kinni, bong kwɑrí men-ɑ ópëggi wïj kwøøm Debïd, keny-ɑ óthøw yï óceg kɑ ywɑɑj pɑ̈l, o kömí ryeer yi cɑ̈ng kì dicɑ̈ng, o kömí nyi dëëm yi ɑ́piy kì wɑ̈r." 
Jeremiah36:31 Yï ócɑy yi yɑn wuki kwɑrrí kí jyɑ̈ggí kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun. Møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun, wuki tyëng Yerusɑlem kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn nuti lïngø yi wun. Ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn bï-ɑ kömi wun ceth, mɑ́ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun nuti lïngi wun.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Codhe ɑkɑ̈bbɑ ki wɑ̈nyø megø, kɑ mëggɑ Bɑruk bødhi gwed, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ en kì yij wɑ̈nyi tyeli mɑl bënn gweede yij wɑ̈nyɑni ge pɑ̈r ceth." 
Jeremiah37:1 Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ gwøg ɑ́ rɑ̈dh yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o jɑɑge Yeudiyɑ̀ e røøny-ɑ kej Yöyɑkin wɑ̈d Yöyɑkim." 
Jeremiah37:2 De wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́muujɑ nuti lïngø yi Dhedekiyɑ̀, geki jyɑ̈gge kí teedø." 
Jeremiah37:3 Kɑ yɑ öri Yökɑl wɑ̈d Celemiyɑ̀ geki ókwërø Dhepɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ yi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀, kinni o yɑ kwɑjji yi gen, kinni kwɑjjɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe pödhi wøn." 
Jeremiah37:4 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ nuti kïdhi ød mɑg kì bøli kenyɑni, o yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ ócyɑ̈dhø kì kelli ji." 
Jeremiah37:5 Yerusɑlem ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ɑtyeg yi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, de keny-ɑ ɑ́lïng gen kinni i liny Rïp obëënø, ɑwiy gen kɑɑl, kɑ ge odøøgø." 
Jeremiah37:6 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni," 
Jeremiah37:7 i köbbɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Liny Rïp bï-ɑ be kønyi yïn, de ódøøg pödhe." 
Jeremiah37:8 Kɑ tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ódwöögø, kɑ kɑɑl tyeg yi gen, kɑ gø mɑg gen, kɑ gø rɑ̈b gen." 
Jeremiah37:9 Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni wu ko rum kinni tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ pɑ dwöög, mɑ́ ge ódwöög ceth." 
Jeremiah37:10 Cɑgg liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ tyɑm yi wun bëne, kɑ̀ bødh ji-ɑ ri gen di kedd, ge obuddø kì yethi kemmi gen, jøgɑni bɑ møg dhwödh ceth, kɑ kɑɑl men rɑ̈b yi gen kinni tweet.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́døøg kì Yerusɑlem, mɑ́ liny Rïp obëënø." 
Jeremiah37:12 Codhe, ɑdhwödhɑ kì Yerusɑlem, yɑ kedh-ɑ myërri gøl Ben Yɑmïn, be kwɑnyi gïg-ɑ bɑ møgɑ kì ri jɑmmi gøl wøn." 
Jeremiah37:13 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhɑ Dhøg Ben Yɑmïn, ɑjoog yɑn yi pënyi liny men-ɑ kor dhøngɑni me nyinge cwøl ɑ́ Iriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Celemiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Anɑniyɑ̀; ɑ́kööb kinni, “Yï kedh-ɑ be rëbø ki tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Alöggɑ kinni, “Pɑth! Yɑ pɑ kedhi be rëbø ki gen!” De kwøbbɑ nuti yïëyø yi Iriyɑ̀, ɑmɑge yɑn kɑ yɑ muuje jɑgg." 
Jeremiah37:15 Kɑ pëthi gen órënyø ki mendwøng ki yɑn, ɑkööb gen i pwööd yɑn, kɑ yɑ dij ød kì gøl Yönɑthɑn, jɑngi burø, e gøle rumø’ løg ød mɑg." 
Jeremiah37:16 Yɑ ɑ́kïdhi ød piny, kɑ yɑ mïdhi kì yije ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r." 
Jeremiah37:17 Kɑ yɑ cwööl gøldwøng yi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ e piny kɑ̈ɑ̈l kun, ɑpyëje yɑn kì gød kinni, “Dɑ wöödø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Ngee nud!” Kedh yɑ okööbø kinni, “Yï ómɑg, kɑ yï muuj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀?”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Kɑ pyëjɑ kinni, “Á ngø ɑ rɑj, ɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn, wuki jyɑ̈ggí kí tyëng pönhï, ɑ pere mɑɑg yɑn?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Á ngø ɑ ɑ́cwöb kipe jøtöng møgí, møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yïn i rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ koo bï be nyɑɑg ki yïn, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo bï pönhï?" 
Jeremiah37:20 O ɑnɑn, yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn wuö, kɑ gïn-ɑ kwɑjj-ɑ göggi yɑn. Yɑ ko dwøøg ød mɑg men-ɑ gøl Yönɑthɑn. Ke dwøøg yɑn, yɑ bɑ men thøw kì kunɑni!”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Codhe, ɑmuuj Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ ki cigg kinni i dij yɑn yij ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd kì kenyɑni, kɑ yɑ nyi muuj ki ópun men nyi cɑm yi yɑn yethi cyɑ̈ng, gïti kɑ ɑ́thumi gïgcɑmm kì kɑɑldwøng." 
Jeremiah38:1 Kɑ Cepɑtiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑtɑn, geki Gedɑliyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Pɑcur, kí Yökɑl wɑ̈d Celemiyɑ̀, kí Pɑcur wɑ̈d Mɑlkiyɑ̀ ge olïngø i ji köbbi yɑn kinni," 
Jeremiah38:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø kì kɑɑl keny ónɑ̈g yi liny, wɑlɑ̀ óthøw yi kɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ ónɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël. De tyëng-ɑ ókedhi be yömmi yï tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ wëyi gen óyiel yi gen.”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ köbb-ɑ gen kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Kɑɑl men mëgg-ɑ tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gø mɑg gen.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Codhe, ɑkedhi jɑggɑni yï rɑ̈dh kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Nɑ̈ɑ̈g jɑlɑni. Jøliny pëthi gen ceg-ɑ nyönhø yi møg-ɑ kømmi yi en, o tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑl keny nyi köbbe’ møgɑni. Pɑ dwɑddi cïji ji, de dwɑdd-ɑ kinni o pëthi gen nyönhi gen.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Alöggi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Døj, kwɑny wun en, kɑ göggu gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wun. Wu pɑ cuggi jogø yi yɑn.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Codhe, ɑkwɑny gen yɑn, kɑ yɑ luudh gen yij yith me dwönø ki thøll. Yiinhɑni bɑ mi Nyirɑ̈dh Mɑlkiyɑ̀, ying-ɑ ódɑ̈ri burø. Bong pï kì yije, kɑ yɑ ceg-ɑ niyeeng yij ɑ́bubudh." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kɑ Ebedmelek, jɑl Kuc, ɑ bɑ órøny-ɑ göögø kì gøldwøng olïngø kinni i yɑ óluudh yij yith. Rɑ̈dh ɑ́bëëd e ying-ɑ burø kì Dhøg Ben Yɑmïn." 
Jeremiah38:8 Kɑ Ebedmelek kedh-ɑ kunɑni, ɑköbbe rɑ̈dh kinni," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Jøgɑni ɑ́göög ki gïjø me rɑɑj wuö. Jermɑyɑ̀ ɑ́luudh gen yij yith kun thøwe yi kɑ̈j, e men-ɑ́ bong gïgcɑmm kì kɑɑl.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Aköbbi Ebedmelek yi rɑ̈dh kinni kɑ̈bbe ki jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ yɑ mïïd gen wɑ̈g kì yij yith kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti thøw yɑn." 
Jeremiah38:11 Codhe, ɑkedh Ebedmelek geki jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ øn-ɑ nyi mïdhi jɑmmì kì gøldwøng, kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki kwɑ̈lli ógudh. Kɑ gï luudh gen piny ki thøl." 
Jeremiah38:12 Kɑ yɑ köbbe i cïbɑ ógudhɑni nyingi ywödhhɑ, kipe yɑ óbwödh yi thøll. Kɑ ge cïbɑ," 
Jeremiah38:13 ɑmïïd gen yɑn wɑ̈g kì yij yiinhɑni. Codhe, ɑmïdhi yɑn kì ódɑ̈ri burø." 
Jeremiah38:14 Kɑ rɑ̈dh oödø, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l Jermɑyɑ̀ yïe, e bëëd ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g dhøggi gøl Kengø, e kete. Aköbbi Jermɑyɑ̀ yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ pyëj-ɑ yïn, kɑ ko di gïn kɑ̈nní yɑn.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Alöggɑ kinni, “Ke köbbɑ yïn dyër, yɑ ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi yïn. O ke köbbɑ yïn gïn-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø, pɑ gwøg yi yïn.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Codhe, kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ kì gød kinni, “Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, Jwøng-ɑ thödhi wɑ ki wëy, kinni yï pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn, wɑlɑ̀ yï pɑ cïbɑ cinggi tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi yïn.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kööb kinni, “Keløg yï yömm-ɑ yï jɑggi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, wëyí óyiel, kɑ kɑɑl men ocögø e pɑ rɑ̈b. Yï óyiel wuki gølí." 
Jeremiah38:18 De keløg yï pɑ yömmi, kɑɑl men cïb-ɑ cinggi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gø rɑ̈b gen, o yï pɑ bodh kì cinggi gen.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 De rɑ̈dh ɑ́löggi kinni, “Yɑ óböggø yï tyëng pödhee møg-ɑ ɑ́yömmi yï tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Yɑ ócuggø cïb cinggi gen, kɑ yɑ göggi gen ki gïnrɑj.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Akööbɑ kinni, “Yï pɑ cïb cinggi gen. Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, yïëy wööni Jwøk, o óbëëd e bong gïn nywɑl yïn, o yï bødh." 
Jeremiah38:21 De yɑ ɑ́nyudhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïn-ɑ ócwöb e nɑ lɑ̈g, keløg yï óbɑ̈nyi ki yömmø." 
Jeremiah38:22 Kì yethi møgɑni, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì gøldwøng, ge okwøllø yi jɑggi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Lïngí møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi gen; ge ɑ́cyɑ̈dhi ge okööbø kinni, ‘Rɑ̈dh ɑ́wëny yi mɑ̈dhhe, kɑ rumme wil yi gen. De ɑ́wiy piny yi gen kɑ ɑ́niyeeng tyelle yij ɑ́bubudh.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:23 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ en thyew kinni, “Mɑ̈nní ókɑ̈l geki nyigí bënn, kɑ ge muuj tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o men-ɑ́ yï pɑ bodh kì cinggi gen. Yï ókɑ̈l yï bɑ ɑmɑg yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o kɑɑl men órɑ̈b ki mɑc kinni tweet.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Alöggi Dhedekiyɑ̀ kinni, “Møg-ɑ kømmi yi wɑ ek, ko wëggí yodø yi dhɑnhø megø, o yï cöög yi pɑ thøw." 
Jeremiah38:25 Keløg jɑggi liny olïngø kinni i wɑ kööbø, ge ceg-ɑ bëën be pyëji yïn ki møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wɑ. Kɑ yï köbbi yi gen kinni yï pɑ nɑ̈g yi gen keløg ge óköbbí dyër." 
Jeremiah38:26 Köbbí gen kinni yï ɑ́kwɑjj-ɑ yɑn kinni yï ko dwøøg ød mɑg kun thøw yi yïn.” 
Jeremiah38:27 Codhe, kɑ jɑggi liny bënn bï-ɑ yïɑ kɑ yɑ pyënyi gen, ɑköbbɑ gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi rɑ̈dh i kwøbɑ gen. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, kipe bong ngɑn megø mɑ ɑ́lïngi møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wøki rɑ̈dh." 
Jeremiah38:28 Kɑ yɑ mïdhi yɑn ɑ́ ɑmɑg kì ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng gïti kɑ ɑ́mɑɑg kɑɑldwøng, Yerusɑlem." 
Jeremiah39:1 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ obëënø ki linye bëne, kɑ Yerusɑlem tyege, kì pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, e runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́bïngwen kì yij lɑwø." 
Jeremiah39:2 Kɑ ge turr-ɑ kɑɑl, kì bïngween cyɑ̈nggi ngween dwɑ̈tt, e runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kì yij lɑwø." 
Jeremiah39:3 (Keny-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Yerusɑlem, jɑggi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ jɑgg-ɑ døngø gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ge ɑ́kedh kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ Dhøg Dïdyër; pëjjɑni bɑ Nergɑl kí Sɑredher, kí Cɑmgɑr Nebö, kí Sɑrsekïm, kí Nergɑl megø.)" 
Jeremiah39:4 Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ geki linye, keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb, kɑ ge opɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì wɑ̈r. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈l-ɑ yij bɑɑg gøldwøng, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ dhøng-ɑ kɑɑm dör, ge kedh-ɑ kuni Töör Urdun." 
Jeremiah39:5 De jøliny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́rengi bɑng gen, kɑ ge mɑg kì thwør-ɑ buti Yerikö. Codhe, ɑkïdhii bøli Nebukɑdnesɑr, e ying-ɑ Riblɑ̀ kì myërri Amɑth. Kɑ cɑ́ye kwøb yi Nebukɑdnesɑr kì kunɑni." 
Jeremiah39:6 Wɑ̈ddi Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́nɑ̈ge ge onennø yi Dhedekiyɑ̀, kɑ jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ nɑ̈ge thyew." 
Jeremiah39:7 Atøy nyingi Dhedekiyɑ̀ kɑ twöj ki ɑ́cwecwel, o køøl Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah39:8 Kɑ gøldwøng rɑ̈b yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí uddi teedø kɑ döri Yerusɑlem cøør piny." 
Jeremiah39:9 Codhe cyee, ɑkøøl tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Yerusɑlem geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yömmi yï Nebudhɑrɑdɑn gï køøle’ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah39:10 Áwïy ki tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn kì Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ gï thödhe ki bɑ̈ggi oløg, kí pwödh." 
Jeremiah39:11 Kɑ Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, ɑ løg pënyi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ceg yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr kinni," 
Jeremiah39:12 “Kedh, yɑb Jermɑyɑ̀, kɑ ko göggí ki gïjø me rɑɑj, de göggi gïn-ɑ ódwɑddi yi en.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Codhe, kɑ Nebudhɑrɑdɑn geki jɑgg-ɑ døngø ɑ løg Nebucɑdhbɑn, kí Nergɑl Sɑredher geki jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ møøgø obëënø," 
Jeremiah39:14 kɑ yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g yi gen kì ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng. Kɑ yɑ cïb gen cingi Gedɑliyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akikɑm wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn, o yɑ køny yi en ki kwøbbi kedhi pɑɑ wøn. Codhe, ɑkedhɑ kɑ yɑ obëëdø kì kelli wɑddi wøn." 
Jeremiah39:15 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg kì ódɑ̈ri gøldwøng," 
Jeremiah39:16 i köbbɑ Ebedmelek jɑl Kuc kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Yɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ kömi kɑɑl men ki ryɑ̈g ni kɑ ɑ́kööbɑ ceth, pɑth ki døøjø ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ, o møgɑni ólidh yi yïn ki wɑngí keny-ɑ ócwöb gen." 
Jeremiah39:17 De yï ókorri yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yï koo cïb cinggi tyëng-ɑ böggi yi yïn" 
Jeremiah39:18 Yï ómïdhɑ ki tɑrø, o yï pɑ nɑ̈g. Yï óbodh kɑ wëyí yiel, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́gɑ̈nni yi yïn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb ki yɑn keny-ɑ ɑ́rumɑ ki gønyø kì Rɑmɑ̀ yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn pënyi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Yɑ ɑ́kïdhi Rɑmɑ̀ cinggɑ bɑ ɑtwöj ki ɑ́cwecwel wøki tyëngmøøgø møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l kì Yerusɑlem geki Yeudiyɑ̀, ge kïdh-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Jeremiah40:2 Kɑ yɑ cwøøl wɑ̈yɑ yi pënyi liny, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgí, piny men ɑ́göjje ryɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah40:3 O ɑnɑn møgɑni ɑ́gwøg yi en. Gïgɑni ɑ́cwöb kɑ per kɑ ɑ́røngi ji kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kwøbbe ocögø gï pɑ lïngi yi gen." 
Jeremiah40:4 Yï ceg yi yɑn kɑ gønyø ɑnɑn, ɑ́cwecwel pɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ’ wɑ̈g kì cinggí. Keløg yï dwɑdd-ɑ kedhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, wɑ ceg-ɑ kedhø, o yï ókor yi yɑn. De yï ceg-ɑ bëëdø keløg yï pɑ dwɑddi kedhø. Yï ócuggø bëëdø kì pönhï ni kɑ̀ dwɑddií.”" 
Jeremiah40:5 Kɑ yɑ ocögø yɑ okudø, ɑkööb Nebudhɑrɑdɑn kinni, “Døøg yï Gedɑliyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Akikɑm, wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn jɑl-ɑ ɑ́gwøg ɑ́ jɑngi kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Yï ócuggø bëëdø kì bute kì kelli ji wɑlɑ̀ yï ócuggø kedhi keny-ɑ dwɑddi yi yïn.” Codhe, kɑ yɑ thödhe ki gïi pwøj, kí gïgcɑmm, codhe ɑkedhɑ kì wɑ̈yɑ." 
Jeremiah40:6 Kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ yï Gedɑliyɑ̀ kì Midhpɑ̀, ɑbëëdɑ kì bute kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì yij piny." 
Jeremiah40:7 Kɑ pëjji liny geki jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́cög ge nuti yömmø, olïngø kinni i Gedɑliyɑ̀ ógwøgø ɑ́ jɑngi Yeudiyɑ̀ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o jɑɑge ji-ɑ ɑ́döng ge nuti kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ɑ løg tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur." 
Jeremiah40:8 Codhe, kɑ Icmɑil wɑ̈d Nethɑniyɑ̀, kí Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Kɑreɑ̀, kí Serɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Tɑnumet, kí wɑ̈ddi Epɑy kì Netöpɑ̀, kí Yedhɑniyɑ̀ kì Mɑɑkɑ̀, ge kedh-ɑ yï Gedɑliyɑ̀ kì Midhpɑ̀ geki jø gen." 
Jeremiah40:9 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Gedɑliyɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ceg yi yɑn kɑ köbbø kinni wu ko böggi ki yömmi yï tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Pëggu piny kì pönhï, kɑ wu göggi wun rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o bëëd e bong gïn nywɑl wun." 
Jeremiah40:10 Yɑn kiriɑ, yɑ óbëëdø kì Midhpɑ̀, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ kej dhøggi wun keny-ɑ óbëën tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. O wu ócuggø lem ki nywøli oløg, kɑ wu ogöögø ki møgø, kɑ wu olïmø ki nywøli yenh, kí dhetun, kɑ wu obëëdø kì yethi myërr-ɑ ɑ́pëggi yi wun.”" 
Jeremiah40:11 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kɑ tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́ying Moɑb, kí Amön, kí Edöm olïngø kì pödhhɑni kinni, i Gedɑliyɑ̀ ógwøgø ɑ́ jɑngi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy kì piny yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah40:12 Kɑ ge odhwödhø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́tɑɑy yi gen, kɑ ge dwöög-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀. Kɑ ge bï-ɑ yï Gedɑliyɑ̀ kì Midhpɑ̀ ge ókɑ̈ddø ki møgi oløg kí nywøli yenh mø gïïr." 
Jeremiah40:13 Codhe, kɑ Yöɑnɑn geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ ɑ́cög ge nuti yömmø, bï-ɑ yï Gedɑliyɑ̀ kì Midhpɑ̀." 
Jeremiah40:14 Kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, “Kwïj yi yïn kinni Icmɑil ɑ́ör-ɑ be nɑ̈gi yïn yi Bɑɑlis rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amön?” De Gedɑliyɑ̀ ɑ́cög møgɑni nuti yïëëy en." 
Jeremiah40:15 Codhe, ɑköbbii yi Yöɑnɑn ge ying-ɑ wɑ̈yi gen kinni, “Wiy yɑ kedh-ɑ be nɑ̈gi Icmɑil, o bong ngɑn-ɑ óyod ngɑn-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈gii. Á kipe ngø, ɑ wëggií nɑ̈gi yïn? Keløg yï onɑ̈gø, ji-ɑ ɑ́cugi kì butí pɑ ceg kedhhø bënn? O gïn ni menɑni pɑ kɑ̈ni kömi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ki ryɑ̈g?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 De Gedɑliyɑ̀ ɑ́löggi kinni, “Ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g! Møg-ɑ kømmi yi yïn kì ree bɑ kwøbbi pyed!”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Kì runɑni ceth, kì bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, kɑ Icmɑil wɑ̈d Nethɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Elicɑmɑ̀, kì gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o bɑ pënyi liny, kedh-ɑ Midhpɑ̀ be këëmi Gedɑliyɑ̀, e cyɑ̈dhi kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈rø. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ocyɑ̈mø kì kej ɑ́kyel," 
Jeremiah41:2 kɑ Icmɑil geki jøge gɑ pyɑ̈rø, pilli gen wöödh gen wɑ̈g, kɑ Gedɑliyɑ̀ nɑ̈g gen." 
Jeremiah41:3 Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Midhpɑ̀ kì buti Gedɑliyɑ̀, kí kwï jøliny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ge ɑ́nɑ̈g bënn yi Icmɑil." 
Jeremiah41:4 Dhuki ji nuti lïngø ki kwøbbi nɑ̈gi Gedɑliyɑ̀," 
Jeremiah41:5 kɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïdɑ̈g obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Cekïm, kí Cilø, kí Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Yëyyi tïggi gen lyeel gen, o ógudhi gen kɑggi gen, o dëlli gen kɑggi gen. Ge ɑ́kedh ge ókɑ̈ddø ki byel, kí bɑkur møg kïdhi Kengø." 
Jeremiah41:6 Codhe, kɑ ge rødh yi Icmɑil kì Midhpɑ̀, e cyɑ̈dhi e óywöngø. Kɑ gï köbbe kinni, “Yɑ kwɑjj-ɑ wun, bïu lidh wun Gedɑliyɑ̀.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen kɑɑl ceth, ɑnɑ̈ɑ̈g gen yi Icmɑil geki jøge, kɑ gï leenge yij yith me thwøwø." 
Jeremiah41:8 De dɑ jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ pyɑ̈rø kì kelli gen mɑ ɑ́köbbi Icmɑil kinni, “Wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, wø ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g! Yï wøn dɑ gemè, kí ceir, kí møøw dhetun, kí møøw kïc mø bɑ ɑkɑnn kì yethi pwödh.” Kɑ gï wiye." 
Jeremiah41:9 Yiinh-ɑ́ yije ɑ́leeng tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi Icmɑil bɑ yith me yije lɑɑj, yiinhɑni ɑ́kony-ɑ yi Rɑ̈dh Asɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e bɑ ɑtyeg yi Bɑcɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Yiinhɑni ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈ng yi Icmɑil ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah41:10 Codhe, kɑ nyiirɑ̈dh kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy Midhpɑ̀ bënn yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, kì buti Gedɑliyɑ̀ mɑg yi Icmɑil. Kɑ gï køøle gɑ ɑmɑgg, gï køøle’ kuni myërri Amön." 
Jeremiah41:11 Kɑ Yöɑnɑn olïngø geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en, ki orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Icmɑil." 
Jeremiah41:12 Codhe, ɑrengi gen bɑnge, kɑ gø pïïd gen buti luy me dwøng kì Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:13 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg pëthi gen ómïnø keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen Yöɑnɑn geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en. 
Jeremiah41:14 Kɑ ri gen løg gen bënn, ɑrengi gen yï Yöɑnɑn geki jøg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en." 
Jeremiah41:15 De Icmɑil ki jøg mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, ge ɑ́bodh, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ piny Amön." 
Jeremiah41:16 Kɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi Icmɑil kì Midhpɑ̀ gɑ ɑmɑgg keny-ɑ ɑ́rume nɑ̈gi Gedɑliyɑ̀, kwɑny yi Yöɑnɑn geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en, jiɑni bɑ jøliny, kí tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí órøj." 
Jeremiah41:17 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge óböggø kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g Gedɑliyɑ̀ yi Icmɑil e ɑ́røny-ɑ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ o jɑɑge piny. Bene ɑ bɑnge dhwödh gen ge kedh-ɑ Rïp, o ge cög ge pɑ yod yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Kɑ ge oywömø kì Kimɑɑm, kì buti Betleem." 
Jeremiah41:18  
Jeremiah42:1 Kɑ yïɑ bëën yi pëjji liny bënn kí Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Kɑreɑ̀ kì kelli gen, kí Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kecɑiyɑ̀, kí wïj dhɑnhø bëne," 
Jeremiah42:2 ge ɑ́bï yïɑ, kɑ yɑ köbbi gen kinni, “Wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn, kwɑjjí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee kiper wøn, wø tyëng-ɑ döngø èn bënn. Wø ɑ́bëëd wø gïïr, o ɑnɑn lidh wø ɑ́döng wø nøg." 
Jeremiah42:3 Kwɑjjí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee, o wø nyudhe yuu-ɑ kedhi yi wøn, kí gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi wøn.”" 
Jeremiah42:4 Alöggɑ kinni, “Døj, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee ókwɑjjɑ kiper wun, o wu óköbbɑ møg-ɑ ókwøb yi en. Bong gïjø men-ɑ ókɑ̈nnɑ wun.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Kɑ yɑ köbbi gen kinni, “Møgɑni ónenn-ɑ yi Jwøk, mɑ́ wø ólïng-ɑ møg-ɑ ókwøb yi en, møg-ɑ ómëggi yïn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gen ɑ ógwøg." 
Jeremiah42:6 Møg-ɑ ókwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógwøg yi wøn ceth, cɑgg ge døøj kì yï wøn wɑlɑ̀ ge rijjø, oløøge kwɑ̈jjø menɑni. Bong gïn-ɑ ónywɑl wøn keløg kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j olïngø yi wøn.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø ki yɑn kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø," 
Jeremiah42:8 codhe ɑcwølɑ Yöɑnɑn geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ ɑ́ying bute geki ji bënn." 
Jeremiah42:9 Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil, ɑ yïe ɑ́ör wun yɑn, ɑ́kööb kinni," 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Keløg wu ócög wu óbëëdø kì piny men, wu ókøny yi yɑn, wu pɑ wiyɑ piny; wu ógurɑ piny, wu pɑ puthɑ wɑ̈g. Yijɑ ɑ́ywöngi ki mendwøng kì bɑng ryɑ̈g men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi wun." 
Jeremiah42:11 Wu ko böggi yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, wu ókøny yi yɑn, kɑ wu yielɑ kì cinge." 
Jeremiah42:12 Pyëwe ówëggɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki wun, kɑ wu dwøøge piny wun, mɑ́ pyëwɑ nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.’ ”" 
Jeremiah42:13 “De wun wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun ko pyem wun, wu ko bɑ̈nyi ki bëëdø kì piny men. Wu ko pɑ̈nyi kwøb kinni, ‘Wø kedh-ɑ Rïp kun-ɑ bong liny, wɑlɑ̀ bong ɑkyew, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈j.’ Keløg wu ókööbø kinøw, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ókwøb-ɑ kinni, “Keløg wu tyer-ɑ kedhi Rïp ceth," 
Jeremiah42:14  
Jeremiah42:15  
Jeremiah42:16 wu ópïïd yi liny-ɑ böggi yi wun, o kɑ̈ny-ɑ ti ki böggø yi wun lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng wun; wu thøw-ɑ Rïp." 
Jeremiah42:17 Tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi kedhi be bëëdø kì Rïp bënn, ónɑ̈g yi liny, wɑlɑ̀ yi kɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì. Bong ɑ́kyel men-ɑ óbodh kì kelli gen kì dhøg ryɑ̈ng-ɑ örɑ kömi gen.”" 
Jeremiah42:18 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Linyɑ kønyɑ’ kömi tyëng-ɑ kedhi Rïp, ni kɑ ɑ́kønyɑ en kömi tyëng Yerusɑlem. Ge óbëëd ge pɑ nëënø yi rɑ̈jø kì nyingi ji; ge óbenyi kɑ gɑ cwølli gɑ tyëngcyën. O pönhï pɑ cigi lidhø yi gen.”" 
Jeremiah42:19 Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, “Wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Yeudiyɑ̀, wu ɑ́kyëddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni wu ko kedhi Rïp." 
Jeremiah42:20 Wu ɑ́rum ki kyëddø yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngtïn, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́kwɑjj-ɑ yi wun kinni kwɑjjɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee, kɑ wu okööbø ce gïn-ɑ ókwøb yi en ógwøg yi wun." 
Jeremiah42:21 O ɑnɑn wu ɑ́köbbɑ, de wu ceg-ɑ bɑ̈nyø ki lïngi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgee kinni i köbbɑ gen wun." 
Jeremiah42:22 De wɑ̈thi wun ko wïl kinni wu kedh-ɑ be nɑ̈gø yi liny, wɑlɑ̀ yi kɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì kì piny-ɑ yije kedhi yi wun.”" 
Jeremiah43:1 Kɑ yɑ órumø ki köbbi teedø møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb bënn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah43:2 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Adhɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Öcɑiyɑ̀, geki Yöɑnɑn wɑ̈d Kɑreɑ̀, kí jøg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen teeg bënn kinni, “Yï ceg-ɑ pyed. Yï nuti köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee kinni, i bïí be köbbi wøn kinni wø ko kedhi be bëëdø kì Rïp." 
Jeremiah43:3 Yï ɑ́ceg kɑ cörri wøn yi Bɑruk wɑ̈d Neriyɑ̀, o wø göjjí mɑgø yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o wø nɑ̈g yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ o wø kïdhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi gen wø bɑ ɑmɑgg.”" 
Jeremiah43:4 Kɑ dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyem yi Yöɑnɑn geki pëjji liny, kí teedø bëne, ɑbɑ̈nyi gen ki bëëdø kì piny Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah43:5 Codhe, kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Yeudiyɑ̀ geki ji-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì pödhh-ɑ ɑ́tɑɑy yi gen; cwøw, kí mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø, kí nyigi rɑ̈dh køøl Rïp yi Yöɑnɑn geki pëjji liny møg-ɑ kyeelø. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy cingi Gedɑliyɑ̀ yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, pënyi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ge ɑ́køøl Rïp. Yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l thyew wøki Bɑruk." 
Jeremiah43:6  
Jeremiah43:7 Dhø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pyem yi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be bëëdø kì Rïp kì Tɑpɑnes." 
Jeremiah43:8 Kɑ yɑ köbbi kì kunɑni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Kɑ̈bbí ki ɑ́tuggi kïttì mø døngø, kɑ ge koony dhøg ød mïïri kì kɑɑl keny, kɑ wiy yï lidh yi kwï tyëng Isrɑil yi koony-ɑ gen piny." 
Jeremiah43:10 Kɑ ge köbbí kinni, yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, bɑ̈ngɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ keny, kɑ kwøme cïbe kömi kïtt-ɑ koony piny yi yïn ɑnɑn, kɑ kemɑ̀ mi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø cwöödhe kömi gen." 
Jeremiah43:11 Nebukɑdnesɑr óbï kɑ Rïp tyɑm yi en. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cïb gɑ møg nɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì ceth, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́cïb gɑ møg køøl gɑ ɑmɑgg, ge ókøøl ceth, o møg-ɑ ɑ́cïb gɑ møg nɑ̈g yi liny, ge ónɑ̈g ceth." 
Jeremiah43:12 Kenggi jwöggi Rïp órɑ̈b yi yɑn; jwöggɑni órɑ̈b yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ gï ókɑ̈l yi en. Jɑmmi piny Rïp ógwen yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ni kenyi pøn nywögg kì ri ógødh, kɑ odøøgø e rum tyɑ̈mø." 
Jeremiah43:13 Ngïjji kwër møg-ɑ bɑ kïttì órënyi yi en, kì Ëliyøpøløs kì Rïp kɑ kenggi jwöggi Rïp rɑ̈be.”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kí yɑn kipe tyëng Isrɑil bënn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Rïp kì kɑ̈ddi Migdöl kí Tɑpɑnes, kí Mempis geki myërr-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Jeremiah44:2 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kööb kinni, “Álidh yi wun kiri wun, eni ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi Yerusɑlem geki kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø. Ge nudd ge bɑ thur ɑnɑn, o bong ngɑn bëëdø kì yethi gen," 
Jeremiah44:3 mɑ́ jii kɑ̈ddɑni ɑ́göög ki rɑj kɑ pyëwɑ rënyi yi gen. Jwögg mø pɑth ɑ́ngɑ̈ddi yi gen ki gëdhhì kɑ gï mɑlli gen, gen ɑ jwögg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nuti mɑllø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ yi kweyyi wun." 
Jeremiah44:4 Kɑ wu nyi ödɑ ki jøtöng bɑ̈nggɑ, o ge nyi kyëddi gen wun kinni wu ko göög ki gïnrɑj ni menɑni, mɑ́ e mɑɑn yi yɑn," 
Jeremiah44:5 De wu nuti lïngø, wɑlɑ̀ kwøbbɑ nuti ywöör wun. Gïnrɑj men-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun, ɑ nyi mɑlli wun jwögg-ɑ pɑth nuti wiyø yi wun." 
Jeremiah44:6 Arënyi pyëwɑ ki mendwøng kɑ Yerusɑlem geki kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ rɑ̈b yi yɑn ki mɑc, ɑ nudd ge odhoongø kì piny ɑnɑn." 
Jeremiah44:7 “O ɑnɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, yɑ ceg-ɑ pëjjø kinni, ɑ́ kipe ngø, ɑ göggi wun ri wun ki gïnrɑj ni menɑni. Wu dwɑdd-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömi ji cwøw, kí mɑ̈nn, kí othønhø ki ryɑ̈g, o bëëd e bong ngɑn döng e onëënø kì kelli jii wun?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Á kipe ngø ɑ wëggu pyëwɑ rënyø, ɑ mɑlli wun ngïjji jwögg geki jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì Rïp keny? Wu dwɑdd-ɑ rënyi ri wun, o wu gɑggi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kinni ri wun dɑ cyën?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kì kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki yethi yëthi Yerusɑlem yi kweyyi wun, geki rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí wun, wuki mɑ̈nni wun?" 
Jeremiah44:10 De wu ɑ́cög muddi wun teeg. Yɑ nuti wørø yi wun, wɑlɑ̀ kwöngɑ geki ciggɑ nuti mïdhø wun, wuki kweyyi wun." 
Jeremiah44:11 “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, Yeudiyɑ̀ rënyɑ’ rënyø yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil." 
Jeremiah44:12 O tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ dwɑddi bëën be bëëdø kì Rïp, ge nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø bënn. Ge thøw-ɑ Rïp bënn; ge ónɑ̈g yi liny, wɑlɑ̀ yi kɑ̈j, ge bënn, møg per gen teg kí møg-ɑ per gen bong gøn. Wu ógɑggi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni ri gen dɑ cyën." 
Jeremiah44:13 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Rïp ócɑy yi yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́cɑyɑ Yerusɑlem ki nɑ̈gø yi liny, kí kɑ̈j geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì." 
Jeremiah44:14 Bong dhɑnhø kì kelli tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́bï Rïp men-ɑ óbodh, wɑlɑ̀ men-ɑ ódöng e onëënø. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ódøøg Yeudiyɑ̀ kì kelli gen cɑgg pëthi gen ódwɑddi døøgø, dɑ́ mø nøg cɑrø ɑ óbodh kɑ ge odøøgø.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi jøg-ɑ́ mɑ̈nni gen ɑ́bëëd ge nyi rɑ̈bb-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki bɑkur geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ócungø kì kenyɑni, kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Rïp; yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi gen kinni," 
Jeremiah44:16 “Cwɑggi wøn ɑ́ ngø, cɑgg yï kööbø ki nyingi Wë? Wø pɑ dwɑddi lïngø!" 
Jeremiah44:17 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wøn kinni ge ógwøg yi wøn ceg kɑ gwøgø ceth yi wøn. Jwøøg wøn; Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑl Rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø ceg yi wøn kɑ rɑ̈bbø ki bɑkur, o ceg kɑ kunyø yi wøn ki møgi oløg, ni kenyi kunyii yi kweyyi wøn geki rɑ̈nhi wøn kì kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí yethi yëthi Yerusɑlem. O wø ɑ́ceg dönyø kɑ gïgcɑmm ceg-ɑ twɑ̈lø." 
Jeremiah44:18 De kër-ɑ ɑ́wiy wøn rɑ̈bbi Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑl rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø ki bɑkur, kɑ wø ówïyø kunyii ki møgi oløg, wø nuti jɑdø, kɑ jii wøn nɑ̈g yi liny kí kɑ̈j?”" 
Jeremiah44:19 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møgɑni okööbø thyew kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wøn wø nyii budø ki kɑɑk men-ɑ ógwøgø ɑ́ ngïjji Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑl rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, kɑ nyi nëngi yi wøn ki gëdhhì, kɑ nyi kunyi yi wøn ki møgi oløg, cwøwi wøn ɑ́bëëd ge yïëyø ki møgɑni.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Codhe, kɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw geki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ ɑ́løøg kwøbbɑ kinøw köbbɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Keløg ɑ́ per gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyii muujø yi kweyyi wun, kí rɑ̈nhi wun, kí jyɑ̈ggi wun, kí ji bënn kì yij piny Yeudiyɑ̀ kí yethi yëthi Yerusɑlem, wu orumø kinni ge ɑ́bëëd ge kwïj yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïlø kì wïje?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Piny wun nuti dööng nøw, dɑ ngɑn bëëdø kì yije dicyɑ̈ngtïn? Pinyɑni ɑ́döng e rɑɑj cɑrø, cwøl ɑ́ ɑcyen, mɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́ceg-ɑ rënyø yi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ryɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi wun kɑ per kɑ ɑ́mɑlli wun jwögg mø pɑth, kɑ wu orøngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu óbɑ̈nyø ki mïdhi cigge.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn, møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Rïp; cwøw kí mɑ̈nn ge ɑ́köbbɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kinni, “Wu ɑ́rum ki kwøb kinni wu ómɑll-ɑ Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑl rɑ̈nh-ɑ dhɑjø, wu ɑ́kööb kinni óngɑ̈ddi yi wun ki gëdhhì, kɑ kunyi yi wun ki møgi oløg, kɑ møgɑni gwøg yi wun ceth. Adɑ́ mïdhu møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöng yi wun ceth. Gwøgu møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wun!" 
Jeremiah44:25  
Jeremiah44:26 De lïngi wun møg-ɑ kwöng yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́köngi kinni wun wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Rïp, wu pɑ cigɑ wëggi köngø ki nyingɑ kinni, ‘Yɑn ɑ köngi èn ki nyingi Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Wu pɑ wëggɑ dönyø, de wu ceg-ɑ rënyø. Wu óthøw wu bënn ying wu nɑ̈g-ɑ yi liny, wɑlɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, gïti keny-ɑ óthumi wun." 
Jeremiah44:28 De óyïddi ki mø nøg kì kelli wun møg-ɑ óbodh kɑ ge døøg-ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀. Codhe, o yod yi tyëng-ɑ óbodh kinni bɑ kwøbbi men ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen; kwøbbɑ wɑlɑ̀ kwøbbi gen?" 
Jeremiah44:29 Ónyodh yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni kwøbbɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ wun kì pönhï, kɑ kömi wun göjj-ɑ ki ryɑ̈g, o yod yi wun kinni yɑ kømm-ɑ dyër," 
Jeremiah44:30 Rɑ̈dh Óprɑ̀ ɑ jɑɑg Rïp, ócïbɑ cinggi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki en, møg-ɑ dwɑddii nɑ̈gø, ni kɑ ɑ́cïbɑ Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ cingi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́bëëd e mɑ̈n ki en.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Kì ngween runni Yöyɑkim wɑ̈d Yöciyɑ̀ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́gweed møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yɑn yij wɑ̈nyø yi Bɑruk. Codhe, ɑköbbɑ en kinni" 
Jeremiah45:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́kööb kinni Bɑruk," 
Jeremiah45:3 yï cem-ɑ ‘Yɑ ɑ́pïd! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömi ɑkørrɑ ɑ́kïdhe ki kïïmø, yɑ ɑ́pïd yi minnø, yɑ ɑ́jɑd ki ywömø!’" 
Jeremiah45:4 “De yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ceg-ɑ cödi piny ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́ger yi yɑn, o gïn-ɑ ɑ́miinɑ piny puthɑ’ wɑ̈g, pinyɑni bëne gwøgɑ’ gwøgø kinøw." 
Jeremiah45:5 Yï dwɑdd-ɑ kinni mïdhɑ yïn, yï bɑ̈n ki tyëng-ɑ kyeelø? Møgɑni ko pɑ̈nyí ki kwøbø. Yɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ kömi dhɑnhø bëne ki ryɑ̈g, de yïn kirií, yï óbodh kì keny-ɑ ókedhi yi yïn! Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwøbbi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø," 
Jeremiah46:2 e cɑ̈gi kɑ Rïp. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kì ri liny Nekö rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, ɑ ɑ́tyɑm yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì ngween runni Yöyɑkim rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, bɑ kinni," 
Jeremiah46:3 “Jɑggi Rïp okïïwø kinni, ‘Kwɑnyu köddi wun kɑ wu kedhu be liny!" 
Jeremiah46:4 Ruug wun kyënyì kɑ wu kɑdhu kömi gen! Wɑɑd wun ri wun yöö, kɑ ɑcudhhi wun cïb wun wɑ̈thi wun. Pɑg wun tønggi wun! Kɑ ɑ́dhedheg kïdhi wun ri wun!”" 
Jeremiah46:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ópëjjø kinni, “De gede ɑ nennɑ gen ge órïngø? Ge ceg-ɑ dwöögø ge órïngø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Liny gen ɑ́cyëëd, ge rïngi ge yömm-ɑ ri gen, ge pɑ lïïdh ngɑ̈thi gen yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Jeremiah46:6 Dëër ɑ́dhɑ̈li bodhø; jøliny ɑ́pïïd, tyelli gen ɑ́cwɑnyyi gen kɑ ge ópɑ̈nhø, kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Jeremiah46:7 Á men ɑ beedhø ni Kiir èn, ɑ ni nɑm me pïge möddi wɑ̈g?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Bɑ Rïp ɑ beedhø ni Kiir, ɑ ni nɑm me pïge möddi wɑ̈g. Rïp ɑ́kööb kinni, ‘Yɑ óbeedh kɑ kömi piny bëne mudɑ, kɑ̈dd ócøørɑ piny kɑ tyëng-ɑ yethi gen nɑ̈gɑ." 
Jeremiah46:9 Gøøj wun kyënyì yöö, kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th pej! Ör wun jøliny yöö, öru jø Kuc kí Lïbiyɑ̀ ki ködd kì cinggi gen, kí jø Lud, jøg-ɑ pɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈jø ki wethh.’ ”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Men bɑ Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Wë, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kej gøøle cole’ colø dicyɑ̈ngtïn; tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø cɑye’ cɑyø dicyɑ̈ngtïn. Ge ócɑm yi pile kɑ pile ceg-ɑ yɑ̈ngø, kɑ remmi gen mɑdhe kɑ rönhe ówɑ̈ɑ̈nyø. Jiɑni ógëëdh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dicyɑ̈ngtïn, kì kömi Nɑm Porɑt kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Jeremiah46:11 Wu tyëng Rïp kedhu Gilyɑd be yɑb ki yɑdh! Yenh-ɑ yï wun pɑ yïëdø; bong gïn tuur wun. 
Jeremiah46:12 Ayɑ̈ɑ̈r wun ɑ́lïngi yi pödhh; ywøøg wun ɑ́lïngi yi dhɑnhø bëne. Jɑl-liny pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi megø, kɑ ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ryeet." 
Jeremiah46:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rïp, yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jeremiah46:14 “Ngɑ̈j møgɑni kì kɑ̈ddi Rïp ngɑ̈j gen kì Migdöl, kí Mempis kí Tɑpɑnes kinni; ‘Nyɑgu ri wun! Jɑmmi wun órënyi yi liny!" 
Jeremiah46:15 Ede Apis jwøøg wun, jwøng-ɑ teg ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe? Ágøøj piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!’" 
Jeremiah46:16 Jøliny wun ɑ́cyerri kɑ ge ópɑ̈nhø, kɑ ri gen köbbi gen kinni, ‘Jwɑni wɑ pödhee yï jiee, o wɑ bødh wɑ kì dhø pili ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø!’" 
Jeremiah46:17 Døøg rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ki cɑgø, cɑg ɑ́ ‘Ngeti Awøw-ɑ Ápöödh yi piny.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 Yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø. Yɑ nɑ Kïti Tɑbör ɑ pöödh wɑ̈thi kïttì bënn kɑ yɑ nɑ Kïti Kɑrmel ɑ cungi e bɑ̈ɑ̈r kì kömi nɑɑm omelø, yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ tegø men tyɑm wun tyëng-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wun." 
Jeremiah46:19 Wu tyëng Rïp, gwir wun ri wun, wu ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki køølø wu bɑ ɑmɑgg! Mempis ógöögø ɑ́ ryɑng, óbëëd ɑ́ thur, bong ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø kì yije." 
Jeremiah46:20 Rïp óni dhyɑng me dwøng me kɑ̈ɑ̈j yi ngurø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑɑng wuudø. 
Jeremiah46:21 Cɑgg ɑ́ jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́kïre, ge cungi nɑ røjj. Ge pɑ kunyi ki liny; ngɑ̈thi gen ɑ́løg gen, kɑ ge órengø. Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ryɑ̈g ɑ́wɑ̈nhi kömi gen, bøli kej thøwi gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi." 
Jeremiah46:22 Rïp rïngi yije oyieyø ni yij thwöl, kɑ̀ cyeddii yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Rïp ɑ́keb piny ni kenyi ngøl yenh ki dørø," 
Jeremiah46:23 kɑ thïm óthumø. Jøliny pɑ cuggi kwɑnø; kwɑnni bɑ̈nyø nøg yi gen. 
Jeremiah46:24 Tyëng Rïp ɑ́yɑ̈r; ge ɑ́mɑg yi tyëng wɑɑng wuudø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil okööbø kinni, “Amun, jwøøg Thibɑ̀ cɑyɑ’ cɑyø, geki Rïp bëne, kí jwögge, kí rɑ̈nhe. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø geki tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈dhii bënn." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ge muujɑ’ Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki linye, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gii. De ji bɑ møg-ɑ ódøøg be bëëdø kì Rïp, ni kɑ ɑ́wöne cøn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 “Wu ko böggi jiɑ; pëthi wun ko lïngi wu tyëng Isrɑil, Wu óyïëëlɑ kì piny-ɑ lɑ̈wi ni menɑni; piny-ɑ kïdhi wun, wu bɑ ɑmɑgg. Wu ódwöög pɑc kɑ wu obëëdø ki mër, wu óbëëdø ki tɑrø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ óböggi yi wun." 
Jeremiah46:28 Yɑ óbï kɑ wu yielɑ; pödhh bënn møg-ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ́kedhhɑ wun, ge órënyɑ, de wu koo nyïɑ̈g yi yɑn. Wu pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, de pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ wun. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Yɑ ɑ́löbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Pelistiyɑ̀, e rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp nuti pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Gɑdhɑ̀." 
Jeremiah47:2 Ákööb kinni, “Pï ɑ ngënyi ɑnɑn kì wɑɑng wuudø. Pïgɑni ómöddi ɑ́ bɑɑyø. Piny kí jɑmm-ɑ yije ómud yi gen, kí kɑ̈dd kí ji-ɑ yethi gen. Ji óbëëd ge okïïwø kinni yieel gen; dhɑnhø bëne óywöngi ki menteg." 
Jeremiah47:3 Ywøøg tyelli kyënyì, kí ruuri yɑ̈thi liny, kí odun tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th ólïngi yi gen. Ji koo lïïdh cyɑ̈n yï nyigi gen; ge ódhɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑ cinggi gen ceg-ɑ ì lwɑj kì piny." 
Jeremiah47:4 Bøli kej rënyi Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi kɑ̈ddi Suur kí Sïdön órënyi, ge koo cigi kønyø, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ónɑ̈g tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l Kɑptör kì kömi nɑ̈mmi Kirit." 
Jeremiah47:5 Ryɑ̈g me dwøng pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi tyëng Gɑdhɑ̀ Ackelön óceg ì lïïw. Pelistiyɑ̀ gït-ɑ wɑɑng e óywöngø? 
Jeremiah47:6 Wu ókïïwø kinni, ‘Pili Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Yï pïd-ɑ wɑɑng yï orɑ̈ɑ̈dø? Døøg yij bøjí, kɑ rií ywööm!’" 
Jeremiah47:7 De pilɑni óywömø kidï, e ɑ́rum ki thödhø ki gwøg yi yɑn? Árum ki köbbø yi yɑn kinni pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi Ackelön, kí kömi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi nɑɑm omelø.”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Moɑb ek: “Ywøg wun tyëng Nebö kɑɑl gen ɑ́rënyi! Kiriɑtɑim ɑ́mɑg, uddi dörr-ɑ teg ɑ́cøør piny, jie ɑ́yɑ̈r," 
Jeremiah48:2 døøji Moɑb ɑ́kedh. Kicbön ɑ́mɑg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø o ge dwɑdd-ɑ rënyi pödhi Moɑb Kɑɑl tyëngɑnɑ̈gø ódöng e lïïwø, liny me dwøng óbï köme." 
Jeremiah48:3 Tyëng Örønɑim óywöngø ge cem-ɑ ‘Liny me rɑɑj! Piny ɑ́rënyi!’ 
Jeremiah48:4 “Moɑb ɑ́rënyi! Lïngu ywøøg othønhø," 
Jeremiah48:5 ge bødh-ɑ yuu Lukith ge óywöngø, ge kømm-ɑ kwøbbi ryɑ̈ngɑni, ge óywöngi yethi gen bɑɑrø, ge kedh-ɑ Örønɑim." 
Jeremiah48:6 Ge okööbø kinni, ‘Rengi wɑ! Yieel wɑ riee yij pɑ̈l!’" 
Jeremiah48:7 “Moɑb, yï ɑ́ngɑ̈dh-ɑ tegí geki kɑ̈rí, de yï otyɑmø ɑnɑn, Kemöc jwøgí kedh-ɑ yïnø, geki nyiirɑ̈dhh kí ókwër." 
Jeremiah48:8 Bong kɑɑl men-ɑ ódöng kì dhø ryɑ̈ngɑni, myërri thwørø kí myërri tör órënyi. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah48:9 Kony wun röri Moɑb, bɑ men jwɑn ki rënyø. Kɑ̈dde ódöng gɑ thur, o bong ngɑn-ɑ óbëëdø kì kɑ̈jjɑni këti.”" 
Jeremiah48:10 (Ngɑn-ɑ gwøg gwøøg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yije dɑ ɑ́dud, ree dɑ cyën! Ngɑn-ɑ koo nɑ̈gø ki pile ree dɑ cyën!)" 
Jeremiah48:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Moɑb ɑ́bëëd e bong gïn bögge, o nuti pɑ̈nyø kïdhi yïnø. Moɑb ɑ́bëëd e nuti pɑ̈nyø ki køøl yïnø, nudd e med ceth, nɑ møgø me nuti ool yij pug megø." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Anɑn bøli keny-ɑ önɑ ki ji møg kuny Moɑb wɑ̈g ni møgi oløg kì yij pug ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Møgi oløge ókuny wɑ̈g kì yethi pugge, kɑ puggɑni nɑ̈g, kɑ ge mød." 
Jeremiah48:13 Codhe, o tyëng Moɑb wɑ̈thi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen ki Kemöc jwøøg gen, ni kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈y wɑ̈thi tyëng Isrɑil ki jwøøg Betiil, jwøng-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dh yi gen." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Wu jø Moɑb, wude ɑ kööb wun ce wun ɑ́ jödd; ce wu ngɑ̈ny nyɑɑg?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Moɑb ɑ́rënyi geki kɑ̈dde; wøbbe, wøbb-ɑ dhïw ɑ́nɑ̈g. Bene yɑ rɑ̈dh, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah48:16 Cyënni Moɑb obëënø; ryɑ̈ge ówɑ̈nhi köme kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh. 
Jeremiah48:17 “Ywøgu pönhɑni wu tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki en, ywøgu en, wu tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi døøny-ɑ døøje. Kööb wun kinni, ‘Átyɑm-ɑ dï ki teng-ɑ tege? Tege geki mɑ̈re ɑ́kedh!’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Yï ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì Dïbön, bïí piny kì wïj kwømí kɑ yï pëggí piny yij tør. Ngɑn-ɑ rënyi Moɑb ɑ keny èn, dörri Moɑb ɑ́wiye gɑ thur." 
Jeremiah48:19 Yï ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø kì Aröeer, cungí kì tøg yöö kɑ yï nëën, kɑ tyëng-ɑ rengi pyëëj, mɑ løge’ ngø ɑ cwöbø." 
Jeremiah48:20 Ge ólöggi kinni, ‘Moɑb ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, ywöngí kipere mɑ́ e ɑ́rënyi, ɑ́yɑ̈r. Ngɑ̈ju møgɑni kì kömi Nɑm Arnön kinni Moɑb ɑ́rënyi!’" 
Jeremiah48:21 “Cɑ́y ɑ́bï kömi myërri kwøømø; ɑ løg, Kölön, Yɑɑdhɑ̀, kí Mepɑth" 
Jeremiah48:22 kí Dïbön, kí Nebö, kí Bet Diblɑtɑim," 
Jeremiah48:23 kí Kiriɑtɑim, kí Betgɑmul, kí Betmeon," 
Jeremiah48:24 kí Keryöth, kí Bodhrɑ̀. Cɑ́y ɑ́bï kömi kɑ̈ddi Moɑb bënn, møg-ɑ lɑ̈wi kí møg-ɑ cyɑ̈gi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Tùngi Moɑb ɑ́tørri, bong tegø kì yïe këti! Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah48:26 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wëggi Moɑb nɑ̈gø yi møgø, mɑ́ kwøbbɑ ɑ́bɑny yi en. Moɑb óbuud kì kömi ngwøgge, kɑ gɑggi yi ji." 
Jeremiah48:27 Moɑb, pɑrrí cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́gɑggí tyëng Isrɑil. Ge ɑ́gɑggi yi yïn de ge nɑ ji møg-ɑ ómɑgø ge rødhh-ɑ ji kì yethi yëëth." 
Jeremiah48:28 “Wu tyëng Moɑb, dhwödh wun kì yethi kɑ̈ddi wun! Kedh wun, kɑ wu bëëd wun kì wɑ̈thi kïttì! Bëëd wun ni ɑkur ɑ nyi gëddi kömi nɑm ki øde." 
Jeremiah48:29 Moɑb tɑ̈dø ki mendwøng! Kwøbbi tɑ̈de kí ɑthwøge, kí tølle kì kömi ji ɑ́lïngɑ, kí kër-ɑ rømmi gen ri gen." 
Jeremiah48:30 Athwøøg gen ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Bong gïn kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi tølli gen, o jɑmm-ɑ gøggi yi gen koo tyëg piny ge nud." 
Jeremiah48:31 Yɑ óywøg-ɑ tyëng-ɑ Moɑb bënn geki tyëng Kïr Ëres. 
Jeremiah48:32 Yɑ óywöngi kipe tyëng Sibmɑ̀ ki mendwøng kibøli ywøng-ɑ óywøøgɑ tyëng Yɑdher. Kɑɑl Sibmɑ̀, yï nɑ oløg; bɑ̈ddí ɑ́mølli kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi Luuy Omelø, kɑ ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ Yɑdher. De ɑnɑn nywølí møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì cwir, ge ɑ́rënyi." 
Jeremiah48:33 Medi pyëw geki medi bëëdø ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì Moɑb, piny-ɑ lɑ̈be med. Møgi oløg ɑ́cuung yi yɑn, pɑ mulli këti kì keny-ɑ́ yije nyi bijii, bong ngɑn göögø ki møgi oløg, kɑ óryeerø yi medi pyëwe." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Ywøng-ɑ ywøg kì Kicbön di lïngø kì Eleɑlè geki Yɑɑ̈dh, di lïngø kì Dhoɑr, o di lïngø kì Örønɑim geki Eglɑth Celiciyɑ̀, mɑ́ dhøg Nïmrïm ɑ́dwön thyew." 
Jeremiah48:35 Tyëng Moɑb ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ rɑ̈bbi jwöggi gen ki gëdhhì kì kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah48:36 “Yijɑ ɑ́ywöngi ki mendwøng kipe Moɑb geki tyëng Kïr Ëres, ni ngɑn wör e óywöngø, mɑ́ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́ying yï gen bënn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Jeremiah48:37 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́lyel gen bënn, kɑ yëyyi tïggi gen pyëëd gen wɑ̈g kì ri gen ɑ́ ngïjji ywøg. Kɑ ri gen kɑggi gen ki pɑll, o ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì bënn." 
Jeremiah48:38 Teedø okïïwø kì wɑ̈thi ud geki yethi yëëth kì Moɑb, bong gïn lïngi den-ɑ́ ywøg kete, mɑ́ Moɑb ɑ́tøgɑ ni pug me bong ngɑn dwɑddii." 
Jeremiah48:39 Moɑb ɑ́kedhhi! Ywöngi wun! Moɑb ɑ́yɑ̈r. Ágöög ki thur, o ceg kɑ gɑggø yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah48:40 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, i pödhø megø ócwøøy kömi Moɑb ni cor, obërre peedh en," 
Jeremiah48:41 o kɑ̈ddi dör ómɑg geki dörr-ɑ koor gen. Jøliny Moɑb ómɑg yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø dicyɑ̈ngɑni. 
Jeremiah48:42 Moɑb ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh, pɑ cigi bëëdø ɑ́ pödhø këti, mɑ́ dhøgɑ ɑ́pyem yi en." 
Jeremiah48:43 Böögø, kí burr-ɑ ludhø, kí ɑ́kɑ̈llì yïd-ɑ tyëng Moɑb. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ngɑn bwøg, kɑ órengø kɑ pɑ̈dh-ɑ bur, kɑ mull-ɑ wɑ̈g kì yij bur, ómɑg yi ɑ́kɑ̈llì, mɑ́ bøli kej rënyi Moɑb ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah48:45 Ji ri gen ópɑ̈nyi yi gen ki rengi be yömmi Kicbön, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi Sïön kɑ̈ge dööng, de kɑɑlɑni ceg-ɑ lyelø ɑ́ mɑc. Dör geki kïttì ocɑmø yi mɑc, eni piny tyëng Moɑb, tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr liny!" 
Jeremiah48:46 Tyëng Moɑb ɑ́gɑ̈g, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑlli Kemöc, nyigi gen køøl-ɑ yïnø gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Jeremiah48:47 De Moɑb ócigi wëggi dönyø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì bɑng keny megø. Møgɑk bënn bene gen, møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
Jeremiah49:1 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Amön ek: Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jø Isrɑil ying-ɑ keny? Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel yøw me nyɑg per piny gen? Á kipe ngø ɑ wëggi gen tyëng-ɑ mɑlli Mölek mɑgi piny Gɑd, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ yij pinyɑni?" 
Jeremiah49:2 De bøli keny-ɑ ówëggɑ tyëng Rɑbɑ̀ kɑɑldwøng lïngø ki cwɑggi liny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Kɑɑl Rɑbɑ̀ ódöng ɑ́ thur kɑ myërre rɑ̈b. Codhe, o piny Isrɑil døøg yi gen ki kwɑnyø kì yï tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnyii." 
Jeremiah49:3 Wu tyëng Kicbön, ywöngi wun! Aɑy ɑ́rënyi! Kïïw wun mɑ̈nni Rɑbɑ̀! Rug wun ki ocwɑ̈llì, kɑ wu ywöngi wun, wu órïngø wu tumm-ɑ wɑ̈thi wun. Mölek jwøøg wun kïdh-ɑ yïnø, geki ókwërre, kí jɑgge." 
Jeremiah49:4 Á kipe ngø ɑ pwöd wun köthi wun ki tɑ̈dø, wu okööbø ce bong ngɑn cuggi pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi wun? Kwïj yi wun kinni tegi wun ɑ́kedh?"
