Jeremiah49:5 Wu ógöjjɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. Kɑ wu órengø wu bënn. Megø órengi e yiel-ɑ wëye; o bong ngɑn-ɑ ólwɑ̈ng liny wun ki cøngø këti. 
Jeremiah49:6 “De Amön ówëggɑ døøgø ki dönyø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah49:7 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì ri Edöm ek: Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Tyëng Edöm wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́ceg-ɑ nungø? Bong gïn gwøg yi gen?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Wu tyëng Dedɑn, løg wun ri wun. Rengi wun! Pɑ̈ni wun! Kwɑrri Isøø nyïɑ̈gɑ’ nyïɑ̈gø, mɑ́ bøli kej cɑyi gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi." 
Jeremiah49:9 Kenyi pøn nywøli oløg nyii yïddø ki møg bodh, o kenyi kedhi kurrì kɑl kì wɑ̈r ge nyi kwɑny-ɑ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen keti gen." 
Jeremiah49:10 De gøl Isøø ɑ́yɑgɑ bëne, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈nni yi gen nyodhɑ, o ge cög ge pɑ pɑ̈ni këti. Tyëng Edöm ɑ́nɑ̈g bënn; bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli gen." 
Jeremiah49:11 Wïyu kïjji wun yɑn, ge ókuun yi yɑn. Mɑ̈nn-ɑ́ cwøwi gen ɑ́nɑ̈g ókorri yi yɑn thyew." 
Jeremiah49:12 “Cɑgg ɑ́ ji mø pɑ di cɑy, ge bɑ møg mɑ̈dhi ceth kì yij óthɑ̈ngi orɑng; wu orumø kinni wu ócög wu pɑ cɑy? Pɑth, wu ceg-ɑ mɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ngɑni ceth!" 
Jeremiah49:13 Yɑ ɑ́rum ki köngø kinni kɑɑl Bodhrɑ̀, ódöng ɑ́ thur; ógöögø ki ryɑng. Ji wɑ̈thi gen óbëëd ge otïgø, kɑ kɑɑlɑni nyi pɑ̈rri cyën. Myërr-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ócög ge rënyø gïti ɑtheer. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Edöm, yɑ ɑ́lïng ki wöödø kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Áöni ki wöödø kinni i cøng pödhh bënn lìnyi gen, kɑ ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kömí." 
Jeremiah49:15 Yï ówëggi nyönhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ówør yïn," 
Jeremiah49:16 Yï ɑ́thɑɑb mɑl yi wëënyí. Bong ngɑn böggi yi yïn ni kɑ̀ rømmí. Yï bëëd ɑ wïj kït kì mɑl, de cɑgg yï bëëdø kì mɑl ni cor, yï dwöög-ɑ piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceth. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah49:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ryɑ̈ng-ɑ óbï kömi Edöm, ryɑ̈ngɑni óbëëd e dwøng cɑrø, men-ɑ óbëëd tyëng-ɑ ókɑ̈lli bute ge óböggø ki mendwøng." 
Jeremiah49:18 Gïn-ɑ óbï kömi Edöm óbëëd e nɑ men-ɑ ɑ́bï kömi Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀. Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ócigi bëëdø kì kenyɑni. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah49:19 Yɑ óni ngur me bï wɑ̈g kì yij thïm Urdun, e böödh-ɑ yij tör, yɑ óbï kɑ tyëng Edöm órengø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, pödhi gen wiy ge’ piny. Codhe, o jɑng-ɑ ómyeg yi yɑn, jɑɑge pödhø. Á men ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yɑn? Á men ɑ cuggi tøønyi yɑn? Á jɑng-ɑ́, ɑ cuggi cung kì bølɑ?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Lïngu gïg-ɑ dwɑddɑ göggi tyëng Edöm, kí møg-ɑ dwɑddɑ göggi tyëng Temɑn. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ nyigi gen, ge óywɑɑj yïnø, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne ceg-ɑ bwøgø." 
Jeremiah49:21 Piny bëne óceg onhɑ̈nh keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm, kɑ cwɑggi pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe lïngi kì Gøøli Agɑbɑ̀." 
Jeremiah49:22 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óbï kömi Bodhrɑ̀ ni cor kenyi cwøøye piny e obërre peer en. Jøliny kì Edöm óbëëd ge okïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ni nyɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny.” 
Jeremiah49:23 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Dimɑceg ek: Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Ji pëthi gen ceg-ɑ olïng, o ge ceg-ɑ böggø kì kɑ̈ddi Amɑth geki Arpɑd, mɑ́ ge ɑ́lïng ki wöödø me rɑɑj. Pëthi gen ceg-ɑ olïng ki mendwøng, ge dhɑ̈li nenø." 
Jeremiah49:24 Tyëng Dimɑceg nyøødh, ge ɑ́rengi yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ge ceg-ɑ orɑng ni nyɑndhɑjø me ceg pɑ̈dhi piny." 
Jeremiah49:25 Kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd pyëwe med, ɑ́wiy piny kɑ döng-ɑ nøw." 
Jeremiah49:26 Wøbbe ónɑ̈g kì yethi yëëth, kɑ jølinye nɑ̈g bënn kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Jeremiah49:27 Döri Dimɑceg órɑ̈b yi yɑn ki mɑc, kɑ gøl Rɑ̈dh Benɑdɑd rɑ̈bɑ. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah49:28 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri jur-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Kedɑr, geki myërr-ɑ ɑ́jɑɑg kì Adhör, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ek: “Pɑ̈ɑ̈r wun kömi tyëng Kedɑr, kɑ jur-ɑ bëëdø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl nɑ̈g wun." 
Jeremiah49:29 Mɑg wun kemmi gen kí jɑmm-ɑ yethi gen, kí sitɑrr, geki dhögi gen, kí kyënyi gen. Kwɑny wun ɑmɑlli gen, kɑ ji köbbi wun kinni, ‘Böögø ying-ɑ kɑ̈jj bënn kì bɑdhhi wun!’" 
Jeremiah49:30 “Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ wun, wu tyëng Adhör kinni, rengi wun pɑ̈l kɑ wu pɑ̈ni wun. Kwøbbi wun ɑ́rum ki kømmø yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, okööbø kinni," 
Jeremiah49:31 ‘Bïu! Kedhi wɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø wɑ̈thi gen kïïdhø! Döri kɑɑl gen dhøge bong thïgø, pɑ nyi dij, bong gïn korii.’" 
Jeremiah49:32 “Kwɑny wun ɑmɑlli gen kí dhögi gen bënn! Ji-ɑ nyi teb yëyyi wɑ̈thi gen, yɑ ókɑ̈ni kömi gen ki ryɑ̈g, ge ókedhhɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Jeremiah49:33 Adhör ócög ɑ́ ryɑng gïti ɑtheer, óbëëd ɑ́ keny yije bëëd yi ógwøgg. Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ócigi bëëdø kì kenyɑni. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah49:34 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum Dhedekiyɑ̀ ki rønyø ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ceth, ɑköbbi yɑn møg-ɑ óbï kömi Elɑm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah49:35 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jøliny wethh møg-ɑ ri gen bëëd yi Elɑm e teeg, ge ónɑ̈g yi yɑn." 
Jeremiah49:36 Elɑm ógöjjɑ yømø kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, ókedhhɑ kɑ jie tɑɑy-ɑ kɑ̈jj bënn, gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi gen yethi pödhh bënn." 
Jeremiah49:37 Tyëng Elɑm ógöjjɑ böggø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, møg-ɑ dwɑddi nɑ̈gi gen. Ge óryɑ̈g yi yɑn ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, kɑ kömi gen nyi ödɑ ki liny gïti keny-ɑ óthumi gen." 
Jeremiah49:38 Rɑ̈nhi gen geki jɑggi gen ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, kɑ kwømɑ cïbɑ kenyɑni." 
Jeremiah49:39 De tyëng Elɑm ódwøøgɑ kej gen kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, kɑ ge thödhɑ ki døøjø këti. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Bene wöödø men-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe Bɑbïl geki jie èn: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Muuju wöödø pödhh bënn! Ngɑ̈ju møgɑni! Tïngu cinggi wun kɑ wöödø kwøb wun! Møgɑni ko kɑnni wun! Bɑbïl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh! Mɑrduk jwøge ɑ́tørri! Ngïjji jwöggi Bɑbïl ɑ́yɑ̈r, ngïjje møg-ɑ kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø ɑ́mød piny!" 
Jeremiah50:3 “Ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑɑng wuudø ɑ́bï kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gø gwøge’ gwøgø ɑ́ ryɑng. Ji órengi pɑ̈l geki lɑ̈yy, o bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì pönhɑni këti.”" 
Jeremiah50:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Obëën bøli kenyɑni, yɑ óyɑb yi tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀; ge óbï ge óywöngø ge yɑb-ɑ yɑn, yɑ Jwøøg gen." 
Jeremiah50:5 Yuu-ɑ kedhi Dhɑyøn ópyënyi yi gen, kɑ ge cïm-ɑ tung-ɑ ónyudhi gen. Ge ólwöbø ki yɑn ki lwöbø men gïti ɑtheer, me pɑ pɑ̈nyi ki pɑ̈dø." 
Jeremiah50:6 “Jiɑ nɑ dyëg møg-ɑ ówëggi wɑ̈ɑ̈nyø kì kelli kïttì yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kwɑy gen. Ge ɑ́wïïn ɑ kelli kïttì ni dyëg, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen owïlø ki yuu pɑc." 
Jeremiah50:7 Kömi gen nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi tyëng-ɑ yod gen. Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen okööbø kinni, ‘Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wɑ pɑth ki bɑ̈jjø, mɑ́ ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ orøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ge di ceg-ɑ bëëdø ni kweyyi gen ɑ ɑ́gɑ̈n Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, rengi wun kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀! Dhwödh wun, kì pönhɑni! Kwöngi wun ki dhwödhø!" 
Jeremiah50:9 Pödhh mø teg, kì wɑɑng wuudø, ge ótug yi yɑn, o ge köllɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Ri gen ójɑɑj gen kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kɑ gø mɑg gen. Ge bɑ jøliny wethh møg pɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈jø, nyɑ keny-ɑ dwɑddi gøjø yi gen kì ri gïïpiny pɑ nyi bɑj yi gen." 
Jeremiah50:10 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ óyɑg, kɑ jɑmm-ɑ yije bënn kɑ̈l yi tyëng-ɑ mɑnyii. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, pödhɑ ɑ́yɑg yi wun pëthi wun omedø, wu ceg-ɑ ngwønø ni wɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ kyeny," 
Jeremiah50:12 de men-ɑ́ kɑɑl wun, kɑɑldwøng bɑ men wïje dwøøg cyɑ̈n kɑ oyɑ̈rø. Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ógöögø ɑ́ pönh-ɑ bong pere kì kelli pödhh bënn, ógöögø ɑ́ ryɑng me yije bong pï." 
Jeremiah50:13 Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì Bɑbïl kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwɑ, ódöng ɑ́ thur, o tyëng-ɑ ókɑ̈l keny-ɑ ɑ́di en dëlli gen óceg juurø yi ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ryɑ̈ɑ̈g en." 
Jeremiah50:14 “Bɑbïl ɑ́tyeg yi liny. Pwööd wun nywøli wethhi wun bënn kömi Bɑbïl, mɑ́ e ɑ́røngi kì bølɑ, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah50:15 Kiiw ɑkyew kì bɑdhhi Kɑɑldwøng! Bɑbïl ɑ́dhɑl yi liny. Döre ɑ́cøør piny. Yɑ col-ɑ gøølɑ ki tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Colu kɑ̈jji wun, kɑ ge göggu gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggi tyëng-ɑ kyeelø yi gen." 
Jeremiah50:16 Byel ko wëggu kɑ̈gø kì pinyɑni, wɑlɑ̀ ko di byel møg kɑj. Wëdhh bënn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì pönhɑni óbwøg yi liny, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ pödhhi gen.”" 
Jeremiah50:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil nɑ dyëg møg cyeddi yi ngur. Kömi gen ɑ́kwøng ki pɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, ɑnyøøn gen yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah50:18 Kipe møgɑni bënn, yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr cɑyɑ’ cɑyø geki pödhe, ni kɑ ɑ́cɑyɑ rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur." 
Jeremiah50:19 Tyëng Isrɑil ódwøøgɑ piny gen. Ge ócyɑ̈mø ki gïg-ɑ cyeg kì Kïti Kɑrmel, geki myërri Bɑcɑn, kɑ ge ocyɑ̈mø ki gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen kì ri jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì myërri Eprɑim geki Gilyɑd." 
Jeremiah50:20 Obëën bøli kenyɑni óbëëd e bong orøg kì Isrɑil, o bong rɑj kì Yeudiyɑ̀, mɑ́ pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki tyëng-ɑ́ wëyi gen ɑ́mïdhi yi yɑn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah50:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pɑ̈ɑ̈ru kömi Merɑtɑim geki Peköd. Nɑ̈gu gen kɑ piny gen rënyi wun. Gwøgu gïg-ɑ köbbɑ wun bënn. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah50:22 Cwɑggi liny olïngø kì pinyɑni, dɑ ryɑ̈g me dwøng." 
Jeremiah50:23 Pödhhi kömi piny bënn ɑ́tøg yi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ cøn, o ɑnɑn ɑ́bɑnyɑni ɑ́lony ki tøgø! Ji óbëëd ge ngɑ̈ngø yi ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah50:24 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀! Yï ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ yɑn, o yï ɑ́mɑg yi ɑ́kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi yɑn, cɑgg e bëëdø e kwïj yi yïn kinni yï nyïɑ̈ggi kɑ yɑn." 
Jeremiah50:25 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑnnɑ jɑmmi liny møgɑ, ɑ́yieb yi yɑn, kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwɑ. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yïɑ dɑ gwøg me gwøgɑ kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah50:26 Pɑ̈ɑ̈ru köme kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ kɑnne byelle yɑb wun! Röör wun jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́yɑg yi wun piny! Rënyu pönhɑni! Ko di gïjø me wiy yi wun kinni tek!" 
Jeremiah50:27 Nɑ̈gu jølinye bënn! Ngɑllu gen! Tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́gɑ̈g! Bøli kej cɑyi gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi!” 
Jeremiah50:28 (Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi yïnø, ódwöög kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ge dwöög-ɑ Yerusɑlem, o kër-ɑ ɑ́cool gøøli gen ókwøb yi gen; eni cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Jwøgee, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe kɑ ɑ́rënyi gen Kenge.)" 
Jeremiah50:29 “Köbbu jøliny møg-ɑ pɑ nyi bɑ̈ɑ̈jø ki wethh kinni, pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kömi Bɑbïl. Tyeeg, kɑɑlɑni, kɑ ko di ngɑn wëggi bodhø. Cool wïj gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøge cøn, kɑ göggu gïn-ɑ ɑ́gögge tyëng-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ e ɑ́göög-ɑ tɑ̈dø kì bølɑ, yɑ kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil!" 
Jeremiah50:30 Wøbbe ónɑ̈g kì yethi yëëth, o jølinye ónɑ̈g bënn kì cyɑ̈ngɑni. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, yï tɑ̈dø ki mendwøng, bene ɑ bɑnge mɑɑnɑ yïn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Bøli keny-ɑ cɑyɑ yïn ɑ́wɑ̈nhi." 
Jeremiah50:32 Yï tɑ̈dø, de yï ócyer kɑ yï ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ókøny yïn ki dhwödhi mɑl. Kɑ̈ddí órɑ̈b yi yɑn ki mɑc, kɑ jɑmmí rënyɑ bënn.”" 
Jeremiah50:33 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ nyingi gen ɑ́guud. Ge ceg kɑ nennø yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg gen, o ge pɑ cuggi wëggi kedhø." 
Jeremiah50:34 De ngɑn-ɑ óbï be yieli gen teg. Nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. En kiree ɑ ónyïɑ̈ggi ki per gen, o piny bëne óthödhe ki mër, de ryɑ̈g pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ othøø! Jie othøø! Jɑgge kí tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel othøø." 
Jeremiah50:36 Jøtöng møg-ɑ nyi pëëdø ceg-ɑ thøø, wɑ̈thi gen pɑ nøg? Jølinye ceg-ɑ thøø. lidh bwøng-ɑ ɑ́bwøg gen!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Nɑ̈gu kyënye, kɑ yɑ̈thi linye tørri wun! Jølinye møg-ɑ kïr nyøødh, o ge ceg-ɑ thøø! Rënyu kɑ̈re, yɑgu en kɑ jɑmme kwɑny wun!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Wiy pinye mɑg yi mel kɑ wiy nɑ̈mme dwön gen. Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ pɑ̈ng yi ngïjj-ɑ rijjø, ngïjj-ɑ ɑ́göjji tyëng pönhɑni dhëëgø." 
Jeremiah50:39 “O Bɑbïl yije óbëëd-ɑ yi óthönhì geki tulø, bong ji møg-ɑ ócigi bëëdø kì yije gïti ɑtheer." 
Jeremiah50:40 Gïn ni men-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi Sødømɑ̀ kí Gømørɑ̀ keny-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ gen geki myërr-ɑ buti gen, bɑ en ɑ óbï kömi Bɑbïl. Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì kenyɑni këti. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah50:41 “Ji obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø megø kì wɑɑng wuudø, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ pödhø me teg, o lɑ̈wi, rɑ̈nhì mø gïïr gwir-ɑ ri gen kipe liny." 
Jeremiah50:42 Wethhi gen geki pilli gen ɑ́kwɑny gen. Yethi gen wöny, o pëthi gen pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m. Ge ruur nɑ nɑɑm omelø, kɑ̀ rïngi gen ki kyënyi gen. Ge bɑ møg nyïɑ̈ggi ki Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah50:43 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́lïng ki wööni gen. Kɑ cingge ceg-ɑ ì lɑ̈b, kɑ ceg-ɑ órɑng ni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Yɑ óceg ì wɑj kì wɑ̈g ni ngur kì yij thïm kömi Nɑm Urdun, e dwɑdd-ɑ cɑ̈mmø ki dyel; yɑ óceg ì nyɑn kì kömi Bɑbïl, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tyëng Bɑbïl ceg-ɑ ì dïr ki ngwej. Codhe, o jɑng-ɑ ómyegɑ jɑɑge pönhɑni. Á men ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yɑn. Á men ɑ cuggi pyemi kwøbbɑ? Dɑ jɑgø me cuggi tïngi cinge yɑn ki liny?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Lïngu møg-ɑ ɑ́gwir kipe pɑ̈ɑ̈dhi Bɑbïl, kí gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ göggi jie. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ nyigi gen ge ceg kɑ ywɑɑj pɑ̈l, o dhɑnhø bëne óceg bwøgø." 
Jeremiah50:46 Piny bëne óceg onhɑ̈nh keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïl, kɑ ywøge lïngi yi pödhh bënn.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ geki tyëng-ɑ bëëde kì yije ki ryɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah51:2 Yɑ ókɑ̈ni ki ji møg rënyi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, jiɑni óni yømø ɑ nyi kwør wél. Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ryɑ̈ngɑni, piny ódöng ɑ́ ryɑng, o linyɑni ótöngi kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn." 
Jeremiah51:3 Jølinye ko wëggi göjjø ki weth, wɑlɑ̀ ge ko wëggi lønyi ɑ́dhedheg ri gen. Yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb ko wiy wun! Nɑ̈gu jøliny bënn!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Ri gen ókedhi yi kedd, kɑ ge thøw-ɑ yethi yëëth kì kɑ̈ddi gen." 
Jeremiah51:5 Isrɑil geki Yeudiyɑ̀ nuti wiy yɑn piny, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøøg gen, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́røngi gen kì bølɑ, yɑ Kwërø Jwøøg Isrɑil!" 
Jeremiah51:6 Rengi wun wɑ̈g kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, yieel wun wëyi wun wɑ̈g! Ri wun ko wëggu thøø kì gööj orøøg Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Yɑ col-ɑ gøølɑ, o yɑ cɑy-ɑ en kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Jeremiah51:7 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd e nɑ óthɑ̈ngi dhɑb kì cingɑ, kömi piny bëne ɑ́mɑ̈dhi kì yij óthɑ̈ngɑni ki møgø, kɑ ge nɑ̈g yi møgø. Møgi óthɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́mɑdh yi pödhh bënn, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen órënyø." 
Jeremiah51:8 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́ceg ì rup kì piny kɑ ree møde! Ywøg wun en! Yɑ̈bbu kedde ki yɑdh men-ɑ ónøgi gen. 
Jeremiah51:9 Tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ yije ókööbø kinni, ‘Wɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yieli Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li yielø. Wiy wɑ en, kɑ wɑ døøg wɑ pödhhee. Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́cɑy yi Jwøk ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe kɑ gø ryɑ̈ge ki menteg.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jiɑ kööbø ge óryeerø kinni, ‘Ányodh yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni wɑ gøgg-ɑ dyër. Kedh wɑ o tyëng-ɑ Yerusɑlem köbbi yi wɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’ ”" 
Jeremiah51:11 Rɑ̈nhi Mɑdɑy ɑ́tug yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e dwɑdd-ɑ ryɑ̈gi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Bene kër-ɑ ócole gøøle wïj kɑ ɑ́rënyi Kenge. Pëjji liny-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r köme ceg-ɑ ryeerø kinni, “Pɑg wun nywøli wethhi wun! Kwɑnyu ködd!" 
Jeremiah51:12 Tugu yɑy kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀! Tyegu en! Cïmmi liny! Kɑ̈bbi wun ki tyëng-ɑ buddi kì yöö!” Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni gø ógögge tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́gwøge. 
Jeremiah51:13 Pönhɑni yïe dɑ nɑ̈mmì kí kɑ̈r bëne, de bøli keje ɑ́thumi, o ceg-ɑ thøø ceth." 
Jeremiah51:14 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kiree kinni bɑ men kɑ̈ni kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ki liny me ngenyø ni bɑ̈nyø, men wøøw köme, o gø tyɑme." 
Jeremiah51:15 Piny ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi Jwøk kɑ tege, Lɑ̈bø ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi en kɑ peli wïje kɑ mɑl peedhe keje." 
Jeremiah51:16 Kɑ̀ köbbe pïg-ɑ mɑl, ge nyi ceg-ɑ ruurø, kɑ pøøl nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈le kì cögi piny. Mɑl nyi wëgge’ ogwel kì yij kødh Kɑ yømø nyi öre kì keny-ɑ mïdhe gøn." 
Jeremiah51:17 Ji wɑ̈thi gen nyi ceg-ɑ cung kenyi lidh gen møgɑni, tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki ngïjji wɑ̈thi gen nøg, mɑ́ jwögg-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen pɑth ki jwögg-ɑ dyër, o ri gen bong wëy." 
Jeremiah51:18 Ge bong per gen, o ge ceg kɑ gɑggø yi teedø. Ge bɑ møg-ɑ órënyi keny-ɑ óbëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be lidhi kwøbbi gen." 
Jeremiah51:19 Jwøøg Yɑgob pɑ ni gen; bɑ en ɑ ɑ́gwøg jɑmmì bënn, o tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́myege gɑ jie Nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah51:20 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, yï bɑ ólelɑ. Bene yïn ólel-ɑ ɑ́tøgɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah51:21 Yïn ɑ ɑ́cyeddɑ kyënyì geki tyëng-ɑ kömi gen. Kɑ yɑ̈ɑ̈th cyeddɑ geki tyëng-ɑ kwølli kyëny-ɑ pyejji gen. 
Jeremiah51:22 Yïn ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn, kí jøgdøngø, kí wøbb kí othønh-ɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn." 
Jeremiah51:23 Yïn ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ tyëngdyëg geki dyëgi gen; yïn ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ tyëng-ɑ köögø ki pwödh geki kyëny-ɑ ywɑjji kwërri køøg. Yïn ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ jɑgg geki yɑ̈yyi gen.” 
Jeremiah51:24 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ólidh yi wun, eni kër-ɑ ócɑyɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kí tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Kildɑn, kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gögge Yerusɑlem." 
Jeremiah51:25 Yï Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, yï nɑ kït men-ɑ ɑ́mød pödhhi kömi piny bënn. De yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ mɑ̈n ki yïn. Yï ókwɑny yi yɑn kɑ yï mødɑ piny, kɑ yï gwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ belø." 
Jeremiah51:26 Bong kït ɑ́kyel kì kelli kïtt-ɑ ɑ́geer yïn men-ɑ ócigi gyer këti. Yï ógöögø ki ryɑng, o yi ócög kinøw gïti ɑtheer. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah51:27 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tïngu ber! Kodhu kɑng, o pödhh bënn lïng gen! Wiy pödhh bënn ri gen cøng gen be nyɑɑg ki Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀! Köbbu pödhi Arɑrɑt, kí pödhi Mïnì, kí pödhi Ackenɑdh; köbbu gen kinni pɑ̈ɑ̈r gen kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Kɑ̈bbi wun ki ngɑn pyejji liny. Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu kyënyì ge ngenyø ni bɑ̈nyø." 
Jeremiah51:28 Gwiru pödhh bënn o ge kedhi gen be liny ki Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Cwöölu rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Mɑdɑy geki pëjji linye, kí lìnyi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi en bënn." 
Jeremiah51:29 Piny ceg-ɑ kïïrø, o ceg-ɑ ónhɑ̈nh, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwɑdd-ɑ gwøgi gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gï ógögge Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gø gwøge ɑ́ ryɑng me yije pɑ bëëd yi dhɑnhø." 
Jeremiah51:30 Jøliny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́wïyi ki nyɑɑg kɑ ge cöög-ɑ kɑ̈jji gen. Ge ɑ́nyönhi ni tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn. Thïggi kɑɑldwøng ɑ́tørri, ud ceg-ɑ rɑ̈bø." 
Jeremiah51:31 Tyëngwöödø nyi cig-ɑ rengi be köbbi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kinni kɑɑldwøng yije ɑ́turri kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. 
Jeremiah51:32 Dhøggi wɑ̈dhh ɑ́mɑg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ udd-ɑ teg møg-ɑ koor kɑɑl rɑ̈b bënn. Jøliny Bɑbïl ceg-ɑ myëlø." 
Jeremiah51:33 Ge ópwööd piny yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh, kɑ ge nyøn ni kenyi nyøøn byel kì yij rɑrø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ Yerusɑlem ɑ́ngølle kɑ gø cɑme. Kɑɑlɑni ɑ́döng nøw ni pug me jɑmm-ɑ yije ókøny piny. Gø ɑ́mwønye ni kenyi mwönyi ngwɑ̈l. Jɑmm-ɑ dwɑdde ɑ́cöög yije, kɑ møg-ɑ pɑ dwɑdde ngööge wɑ̈g." 
Jeremiah51:35 Wiy tyëng Dhɑyøn kööb gen kinni, “Gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggi wøn bënn bɑ gööj Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀!” Wiy tyëng Yerusɑlem kööb gen kinni, “Orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi wøn bɑ gööj Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀!”" 
Jeremiah51:36 Codhe, ɑköbbi tyëng Isrɑil yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wu ócwɑg yi yɑn, o Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ócɑy yi yɑn ceth. Nɑ̈mmi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ówëggɑ thwøwø, o nyingi pïi gen ówëggɑ cung." 
Jeremiah51:37 Wïj Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ódöng ɑ́ thur, yije óbëëd-ɑ yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l. Ógöögø e pɑ nëënø yi rɑ̈jø, bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbëëdø kì yije, o ngɑn lidhii óceg bwøgø." 
Jeremiah51:38 Tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ngɑ̈rri nɑ ngurrì, o ge ce wöör ɑ́ nywøli ngur." 
Jeremiah51:39 Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j! Ge óyɑ̈bbɑ ki gïn yɑ̈ng gen kɑ ge thödhɑ ki møgi oløg men nɑ̈g wɑ̈thi gen. Ge ókedhi be buddø, kɑ ge ónenø, o ge koo cyëëw." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ge ókïdhɑ be ngɑlø ni órömm kí ónyögg. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kì ri Bɑbïl kinni, “Kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́lenhi yi kömi piny bëne ɑ́mɑg! Ji nuti bwøgø yi gïn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi Bɑbïl?" 
Jeremiah51:42 Nɑɑm omelø ɑ́möddi kömi Bɑbïl, kɑ gø mudde piny, ki ɑpɑgø me dwøng." 
Jeremiah51:43 Kɑ̈dd ɑ́rënyi kɑ ge ógöögø ki ryɑng, keny yije pɑ bëëd, o bong ngɑn weli e kɑ̈l-ɑ yije." 
Jeremiah51:44 Bel, jwøøg Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ cɑyɑ’ cɑyø. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑle bënn ómuuj yi en, o pɑ cigi mɑllø yi pödhh bënn. “Döri Bɑbïl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
Jeremiah51:45 Wu tyëng Isrɑil rengu wɑ̈g kì kenyɑni! Pyëwɑ ɑ́rënyi ki mendwøng ki kɑɑlɑni, de yieel wun wëyi wun wɑ̈g kì yije." 
Jeremiah51:46 Pëthi wun ko nyönhi, mɑ́ wööd mø pɑth ki dyër ɑ́tɑɑy yij pödhø, de wu ko bwøg. Run men nyi bï kɑ wödde; i dɑ liny, i dɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑni me nyïɑ̈ggi ki rɑ̈nh-ɑni." 
Jeremiah51:47 Bøli keny-ɑ óløøgɑ kwøbbi ngïjji jwöggi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ obëënø; pinye óyɑ̈r bëne, kɑ jie nɑ̈g bënn." 
Jeremiah51:48 Gïg-ɑ piny kí møg-ɑ mɑl pëthi gen ómïni bënn, keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ cinggi tyëng-ɑ óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ge bï-ɑ be dhurii piny." 
Jeremiah51:49 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ceg-ɑ thøø kipe kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge ki ji mø gïïr kì kömi piny, kɑ ji mø gïïr nɑ̈ge kì Isrɑil. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah51:50 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ jie møg-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kinni, “Wu ɑ́bødh ki thøø! Dhwödh wun, kedh wun, ko di gïn yïd yi wun! Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd wu lɑ̈wi ki pödhi wun, pɑr wun yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Yerusɑlem pɑr wun" 
Jeremiah51:51 Á ngø wu nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng wøn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, wø ɑ́yɑ̈r, bong gïn yiel yi wøn, mɑ́ Kengø kej kwër kì Yerusɑlem ɑ́kwɑny yi tyëngpɑth.’" 
Jeremiah51:52 De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, bøli keny-ɑ óløøgɑ kwøbbi jwöggi Bɑbïl obëënø, o ji óbëëd ge okïïwø kì pönhɑni bëne." 
Jeremiah51:53 Cɑgg Bɑbïl kedhi men-ɑ́ mɑl, kɑ ree gëdde ki dörø kì kunɑni, yɑ ceg-ɑ ör ki ji møg rënyii. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah51:54 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïngu ywøng-ɑ ywöngi kì Bɑbïl. Bɑ ryɑ̈ɑ̈g pinyɑni ɑ ywøg." 
Jeremiah51:55 Bɑbïl rënyɑ’ rënyø; ócɑg ì lïïw. Liny ɑ́ruur kömi Bɑbïl ni ɑpɑgø ki ɑkyew me dwøng. 
Jeremiah51:56 Ge bï-ɑ be rënyi Bɑbïl. Jøliny Bɑbïl ómɑg kɑ wethhi gen tørri. Yɑ bɑ Jwøk men nyi cɑ̈yi kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ gwøg, o Bɑbïl mëggɑ cɑ́y-ɑ kyëëw ki orøge." 
Jeremiah51:57 Jɑggi Bɑbïl geki tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel kí pëjji liny, ge ógöjjɑ nɑ̈gø yi møgø. Ge ókedhi be buddø, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ cyëw. Kwøbbɑ ɑgɑk, yɑ rɑ̈dh. Bene yɑn Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jeremiah51:58 Dörri Bɑbïl, dörr-ɑ teg, ge ócøør piny, kɑ thïggi döre, thïg-ɑ bɑ̈rrø rɑ̈b ki mɑc. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi pödhh bënn ɑ́gɑ̈g, ge bɑ møg cɑm yi mɑc. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Serɑiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Nëriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Mɑɑseiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ókwøøm Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀, ɑ́weli Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ e lwøøg-ɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ kì ngween runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø. Kɑ Serɑiyɑ̀ köbbɑ gïn-ɑ ógwøge." 
Jeremiah51:60 Kwøbbi ryɑ̈ng-ɑ óbï kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ɑ́gweedɑ yij wɑ̈nyø, kí gïg-ɑ kööbø kì ri Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah51:61 Kɑ Serɑiyɑ̀ köbbɑ kinni, “Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhí Bɑbïl, kɑ wɑ̈nyø men rɑ̈ngí ji bënn, o møg-ɑ yije lïngi yi gen." 
Jeremiah51:62 Orume kɑ yï kwɑ̈jjí kinni, ‘Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï ɑ́kööb kinni, keny órënyi yi yïn, o cöge yije pɑ bëëd yi ji geki lɑ̈yy, o óbëëd ɑ́ ryɑng gïti ɑtheer.’" 
Jeremiah51:63 Serɑiyɑ̀, keny-ɑ órum ki rɑ̈ngi wɑ̈nyø men teedø, töjji ree ki kït, kɑ leeng Nɑm Porɑt," 
Jeremiah51:64 kɑ yï kööb kinni, ‘Bene gïn-ɑ óbï kömi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ èn; óbïïl, o pɑ cigi thwørø këti, kì bɑng ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ógöggii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’ ” Kwøbbi Jermɑyɑ̀ ɑ́thumi." 
Jeremiah52:1 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́kyel keny-ɑ ɑ́gööge ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, ɑjyɑ̈ɑ̈ge kì Yerusɑlem ki runn pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel. Nyingi Meye cwøl ɑ́ Amutɑl nyɑɑr Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì Libnɑ̀." 
Jeremiah52:2 Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki orøng ni men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim. 
Jeremiah52:3 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe órënyø ki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki kɑɑldwøng Yerusɑlem, kɑ gï nyige kì bute. Dhedekiyɑ̀ ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye kì ri Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀," 
Jeremiah52:4 codhe ɑbëën Nebukɑdnesɑr ki linye bëne, kɑ Yerusɑlem tyege, kì pyɑ̈ri cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, e runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ bɑ ɑ́bïngwen kì yij lɑwø. Ge ɑ́bï kɑ ge gudd-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Yerusɑlem, kɑ ge othurø ki óthør møg nenni gen kɑɑl," 
Jeremiah52:5 kɑ Yerusɑlem obëëdø ɑ́ ɑtyeg gïti kɑ ɑ́göög runni Dhedekiyɑ̀ ki pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyel kì yij lɑwø. 
Jeremiah52:6 Kì bïngween cyɑ̈nggi ngween dwɑ̈tt kì yij run, kì wɑɑngɑni ceth, keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi gïgcɑmm kɑ ji ónyönhø yi kɑ̈j," 
Jeremiah52:7 ɑtoor döri kɑɑldwøng piny. Jøliny bënn ɑ́thumi ki pɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ngö kɑɑldwøng ɑ́bëëd e bɑ ɑtyeg yi liny Bɑbïl. Ge nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈r piny bɑ wɑ̈r, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ yij bɑɑg gøldwøng, kì dhøng-ɑ kɑɑm dör, ge töng-ɑ Töör Urdun." 
Jeremiah52:8 De liny Bɑbïl ɑ́rengi bɑng Rɑ̈dh Dhedekiyɑ̀, kɑ gø mɑg gen kì thwøri Yerikö, kɑ wiy piny yi jølinye bënn." 
Jeremiah52:9 Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ kïdhi bøli Nebukɑdnesɑr kì kɑɑl Riblɑ̀ kì myërri Amɑth, ɑløøg kwøbbe yi Nebukɑdnesɑr." 
Jeremiah52:10 Kɑ wɑ̈ddi Dhedekiyɑ̀ nɑ̈g yi Nebukɑdnesɑr kì bøli wïyi gen, kɑ jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ nɑ̈g thyew kì kenyɑni ceth." 
Jeremiah52:11 Codhe, ɑtøy nyingi Dhedekiyɑ̀, kɑ cingge twöj ki ɑ́cwecwel, kɑ kïdhi Bɑbïl. Kɑ Dhedekiyɑ̀ obëëdø ɑ́ ɑmɑg kì Bɑbïl gïti kɑ ɑ́thøwe." 
Jeremiah52:12 Kì bïryeew cyɑ̈nggi bïïj dwɑ̈tt kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïngween runni Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́bëën Nebudhɑrɑdɑn jɑngi gøldwøng kì Bɑbïl, o en ɑ bɑ pënyi liny, kɑ kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem." 
Jeremiah52:13 Kɑ Kengø rɑ̈be geki gøldwøng, kí kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø bënn kì Yerusɑlem." 
Jeremiah52:14 Kɑ döri kɑɑldwøng cøør piny yi jølinye. 
Jeremiah52:15 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Yerusɑlem cøn, geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yömmi yï Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kí tyëng-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ bɑ bödhhì mɑg yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, kɑ gï køøle Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah52:16 De tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn ɑ́wiy yi en kì Yeudiyɑ̀, o ge pur gen bɑ̈gg geki pwödh." 
Jeremiah52:17 Kɑ löjji dilɑl møg-ɑ dhø Kengø tørri yi tyëng Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, geki yɑ̈thi dilɑl, kí luy dilɑl, kɑ dilɑlɑni bëne kïdhi Bɑbïl." 
Jeremiah52:18 Kɑ ɑtöggi mɑc, kí ópɑ̈nni búr kí dikɑ̈bbì, kí gïg-ɑ nyi nɑ̈ɑ̈g mɑc, kí óthɑ̈ggì, kí ópɑ̈nni bɑkur, kí gïg-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkøny gɑ dilɑl, møg-ɑ nyi göög bënn kì yij Kengø kɑ̈l yi gen." 
Jeremiah52:19 Gïg-ɑ bɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø ɑ́kɑ̈l yi gen bënn, cɑg kì ri óthɑ̈gg-ɑ thønhø geki ópɑ̈nn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈lli lelli mɑc, kí tɑ̈mm-ɑ nyi kïdhi remmi gëdhhì, kí ópɑ̈nni búr kí teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈, kí ópɑ̈nni bɑkur, kí óthɑ̈ggi møgi oløg." 
Jeremiah52:20 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi Kengø yi Sølømøn, ɑ løg löjji dilɑl ryeet, kí yɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí luy dilɑl geki wɑ̈dhh-ɑ kömi gen cungi yi en, ge ɑ́bëëd ge peeg cɑrø, ge nuti rømø." 
Jeremiah52:21 Löjjɑni ryeet ɑ́bëëd ge pɑ̈r, bɑ̈ri men kí men bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïdɑ̈g, o dööle bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïj kí sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Yethi gen bɑ wɑ̈w, o bɑ dhïl ki mïlimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Jeremiah52:22  
Jeremiah52:23 Wɑ̈thi gen dɑ ɑtɑ̈ny me bɑ̈r, tøge bɑ ɑwen ki nywøli yɑdh romɑn møg-ɑ ógwøgø ki dilɑl, kwɑnni gen bɑ miyø, o pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen wïdɑ́bïkyel kì ri gen, ɑ́bëëd ge ónënnø e dhɑnhø cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ piny." 
Jeremiah52:24 Kɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, ɑ løg Serɑiyɑ̀, kí Dhepɑniyɑ̀, ókwër-ɑ bɑnge, kí jɑggi Kengø ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ̈l yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, pënyi liny Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Jeremiah52:25 Jɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pënyi liny kì kɑɑldwøng kí jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh ɑ́bïj, kí jɑl-ɑ bɑng pënyi liny, ɑ mïdhi wɑ̈jji liny, kí jöddi kɑɑlɑni gɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel, gï ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le." 
Jeremiah52:26 Kɑ ge muuj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì Riblɑ̀ 
Jeremiah52:27 kì myërri Amɑth yi Nebudhɑrɑdɑn, kɑ rɑ̈dh omuujø ki cigg kinni i nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen, kɑ ge nɑ̈g. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́kïdhi wɑ̈g kì piny gen, kɑ ge køøl yïnø." 
Jeremiah52:28 Møg bene kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l gɑ ɑmɑgg yi Nebukɑdnesɑr, kì bïryeew runne kì yij lɑwø, ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈d ki ji ɑ́lïp ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈g," 
Jeremiah52:29 kɑ okɑ̈dø ki ji miy ɑ́bïdɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́ryew kì Yerusɑlem kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g runne kì yij lɑwø," 
Jeremiah52:30 kɑ okɑ̈dø kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g runne kì yij lɑwø ki ji miy ɑ́bïryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen wïdɑ́bïj. Kwɑnni ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l bënn bɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ngwen kí miy ɑ́bïj kɑ̀ reb gen. 
Jeremiah52:31 Kì run-ɑ ɑ́göög Abilmerodɑk ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki Yöyɑkin rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ gø göönye wɑ̈g kì ød mɑg. Gø ɑ́gønye kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, e runni Yöyɑkin göögø ki pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïryew kì ød mɑg." 
Jeremiah52:32 Áköbbi yi Abilmerodɑk ki kwøb mø døøj, kɑ gø cïbe mɑl kibøli rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bënn, kɑ gø ruuge kidøøj kibøli rɑ̈nhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jeremiah52:33 Kɑ ógudh-ɑ ɑ́rug yi Yöyɑkin kì ød mɑg wil ki møøgø mø myëër, kɑ døøg-ɑ be cɑm kì tɑɑw rɑ̈dh ki cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́bëëde kì kunɑni bënn." 
Jeremiah52:34 Gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi en bënn ɑ́bëëd ge nyi mëgg-ɑ en ceth. 
Lamentations1:1 Kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e pɑ̈ng yi dhɑnhø bëne, ɑ́döng e lïïwø. Kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e owørø yi kömi piny bëne, ɑ́döng e nɑ thwöm! Ábëëd e nɑ nyirɑ̈dh cøn, de ɑnɑn ɑ́mëggi gwøøg bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø!" 
Lamentations1:2 Nyi lɑng wɑ̈r e óywöngø, pï rɑɑr-ɑ piny kì nyinge. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng kì kelli cwøwe me lugii. Ámol kì piny yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki kwøb; ge ɑ́yöd ge ómɑ̈nø ki en." 
Lamentations1:3 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bong gïn yiel gen kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø; ge ɑ́ciir wɑ̈g kì yij pödhi gen. Ge bëëd ɑ piny megø, e bong piny men cölli nyingi gen. Ge bɑ ɑtyeg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, bong yöö men pɑ̈r yi gen." 
Lamentations1:4 Bong ngɑn nyi kedhi Kengø be mɑ̈ddø kì cyɑ̈nggi kwër. Mɑ̈nn-ɑ thønhø møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge nyii wörø ceg-ɑ orɑng, o ókwër ceg-ɑ ngunø yøw. Dhøggi dörø wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø yøw, o Dhɑyøn ceg-ɑ orɑng." 
Lamentations1:5 Átyɑm ki tegø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Áwëggi orɑng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kipe ngenyi orøge. Nyige ɑ́mɑg kɑ ge kïdhi yïnø." 
Lamentations1:6 Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Yerusɑlem ɑ́kedh. Jøgdøngø ɑ́göög ge nɑ tenø me nyönhø yi kɑ̈j, ge ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r yi cyeddø yi jødwɑr." 
Lamentations1:7 Yerusɑlem ópɑrr-ɑ dhwɑ̈nge men-ɑ weenø, de bong gïn yiel. Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yielii, keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhe cingi ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø; ɑ́ceg kɑ gɑggø yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈yii piny." 
Lamentations1:8 Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Yerusɑlem ɑ́kedh, ɑ́döng e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw. Ceg-ɑ ywøg e kull-ɑ wïje kì piny yi ɑyɑ̈r. Yerusɑlem ree ɑ́cödhe ki orøg" 
Lamentations1:9 Ceg nënnø e cödhø, de rɑ̈je pɑ rømme. Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø me rɑj, o bong ngɑn lugii. Átyɑm yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, o ceg-ɑ ywøøg kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e kwɑjj-ɑ lɑ̈mpyëw." 
Lamentations1:10 Kɑ̈re ɑ́kɑ̈l bëne yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Gï ɑ́lidhe ge kedh-ɑ men-ɑ́ yij Kengø kiree, eni keny-ɑ ɑ́kyer yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ko kedhi yi jurr-ɑ kyeelø." 
Lamentations1:11 Tyëng Yerusɑlem cyɑ̈dhi ge óywöngø kɑ̀ yɑ̈ɑ̈b gen ki gïncɑm. Ge nyi wil-ɑ jɑmmi gen ki gïncɑm kipe ge óywɑj yi kɑ̈j. Kɑɑl ceg-ɑ ywøg kinni, “Lidh orɑngɑ yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Lamentations1:12 Kɑ ngɑn kɑ̈l yöö nyi köbbe kinni, “Lidh orɑngɑ! Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́rɑngi ni yɑn! Yɑ ɑ́rɑngi yi ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kömɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe." 
Lamentations1:13 “Áöni ki mɑc kì mɑl, mɑnyɑni ceg-ɑ lyelø kì yijɑ. Yɑ ɑ́cege ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli, kɑ yɑ tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny. Kɑ yɑ wiye kì yij orɑng me bong cöge." 
Lamentations1:14 “Orøgɑ ɑ́lidhe bënn, kɑ gï twööje kej ɑ́kyel. Gï ɑ́ngɑɑbe munɑ, o yɑ ceg-ɑ noor piny yi pegi gen. Yɑ ɑ́cïb cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yɑ tyɑm yi gen." 
Lamentations1:15 “Yɑɑg linyɑ, yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb ɑ́bɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́öni ki liny men nɑ̈g wøbbɑ. Jiɑ ɑ́nyøne ni kenyi nyøøn nywøli oløg kenyi biij gen." 
Lamentations1:16 “Bene ɑ bɑnge lol nyingɑ ki pï. Bong ngɑn lug yɑn, bong ngɑn cïj yɑn. Yɑ ɑ́mɑg yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø; jiɑ ɑ́döng ki cinggi gen" 
Lamentations1:17 “Cinggɑ ɑ́thɑngɑ, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́køny yɑn. Kömɑ ɑ́cwøøl tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, yɑ nenni yi gen yɑ nɑ gïn cödhø." 
Lamentations1:18 “De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́gwøg-ɑ dyër, mɑ́ yɑn ɑ ɑ́pyem dhøge. Lïngu kwøbbɑ wun ɑ teedø bëne, lidhu yɑn kɑ̀ rɑngɑ. Wøbbɑ geki wojur ɑ́kïdhi yïnø gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Lamentations1:19 “Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nywɑ̈ɑ̈g wøn ki kwøb ɑ́cwöölɑ be kønyi yɑn, de ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi. Ókwër geki jɑgg ge ɑ́thøw-ɑ yethi yëëth kì kɑɑldwøng, ge pɑ̈nhhi ge yɑb-ɑ gïncɑm yi gen kipe ge óywɑj yi kɑ̈j." 
Lamentations1:20 “Lidh orɑng-ɑ rɑngɑ yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e pyëwɑ cödø! Minɑ ɑ́cöd yi ywøg kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ. Ji ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø kì yethi yëëth, møøgø thøw-ɑ yethi ud." 
Lamentations1:21 “Lïngí ywøgɑ, bong ngɑn lug yɑn, Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø pëthi gen med kipe kɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈g kömɑ. Wiy cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn bëe; kɑ wiy tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø rɑngi gen ni yɑn." 
Lamentations1:22 “Cɑy gen kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen. Cɑy gen ni kɑ ɑ́cɑɑy yɑn kipe orøgɑ. Yɑ ywöngi yɑ ceg-ɑ orɑng; minɑ ɑ́cöd.” 
Lamentations2:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwe ki Dhɑyøn, ɑrïïme gøn ki muudhø. Dhwɑ̈nge dhwɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl ɑ́løge thur. Cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ́ Kenge, gø ɑ́wiye piny keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwe." 
Lamentations2:2 Myërri Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ɑ́rënyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe; kɑ dörr-ɑ ɑ́korri pödhø dhure piny. Ayɑ̈r ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le kömi pödhø geki jɑgge. 
Lamentations2:3 Isrɑil ɑ́kedhhe keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwe ki menteg. Ábɑ̈nyi kønyi wɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Ábï kömee e nɑ mɑc, gïn-ɑ bøle bëne rɑ̈be rɑ̈bø." 
Lamentations2:4 Nywøli wethe ɑ́cïme wɑ, de nɑ ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Tyëng-ɑ bëëdi gen med kì pëthee ɑ́nɑ̈ge bënn. Rɑ̈ji pyëwe ɑ́lidh yi wɑ, wɑ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem." 
Lamentations2:5 Isrɑil ɑ́rënyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de nɑ ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø, dörr-ɑ ɑ́korrii geki kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø ɑ́wiye, gɑ thur. Ákɑ̈ni kömi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki ywøøg yij me pɑ thumi." 
Lamentations2:6 Keng-ɑ yije ɑ́mɑlli wɑ en ɑ́møde piny. Cyɑ̈nggi kwër geki cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth ɑ́wiye. Rɑ̈ji pyëwe ɑ́lidh yi rɑ̈dh geki ókwër. 
Lamentations2:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këli lɑme ɑ́bɑnye, kɑ Kengi kwër wiye piny. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́wëgge cøøri dörre piny. Ge ɑ́wör ki wörri tyɑmi wɑ kì keny-ɑ́ yije nyi mɑ̈ddi yi wɑ e pëthee omedø kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Lamentations2:8 Ádwɑdd-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni cøør döri Dhɑyøn piny; gø ɑ́røme, o këër dönge yode, codhe o gø rënye bëne. Uddi kur kí dör-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e wen-ɑ gøn, ge buud-ɑ piny bënn ɑnɑn gɑ thur." 
Lamentations2:9 Thïg buud-ɑ piny ge tørrø, dëddi gen ri gen mød gen. Rɑ̈dh geki jø kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø ying-ɑ yïnø. Cigg pɑ pwönyi këti, o bong gïn nyi cɑ̈rri jøtöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations2:10 Jøgdøngi Yerusɑlem ɑ́pëggi piny ge okudø, wɑ̈thi gen dɑ belø, ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì. Mɑ̈nn-ɑ thønhø kull-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen kì piny." 
Lamentations2:11 Nyingɑ ɑ́dhëg yi ywøg, yɑ ceg-ɑ orɑng. Pyëwɑ orɑ̈mø, kɑ̀ nennɑ wɑddi wøn ge onɑ̈gø. Othønhø, kí møg-ɑ dhødh ceg-ɑ thøø kì yethi yëëth." 
Lamentations2:12 Ge ywøg-ɑ kɑ̈j kí röödhø, de bong gïn kwɑ̈nyyi gen yi mëëg gen. Ge pɑ̈nhhi kì yethi yëëth ge nɑ ji mø ri gen di kedd, kɑ ge nyi thøw-ɑ köthi mëëg gen." 
Lamentations2:13 Á ngø ɑ cuggi kwøbø yi yɑn, yïn ɑ Yerusɑlem? Yï ólug yi yɑn kidï? Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi orɑng ni yïn, ki orɑng-ɑ ni men. Ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömí bong cöge; nɑ nɑɑm omeli dwøng." 
Lamentations2:14 Jøtöng møgí yï nyi köbbi ge’ pyed kete, yï ɑ́wëny yi pwönyø mi gen, kì bɑng kɑ̀ pɑ nyi nyudhi gen yïn orøgí. Yï ɑ́wëggi rumø yi gen kinni bong yewø men dwɑddi kì yïí." 
Lamentations2:15 Tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈lli bøli kɑɑldwøng ceg-ɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈gø. Wɑ̈thi gen nyi ceg kɑ kenø yi gen kenyi lidh gen Yerusɑlem ɑ́ thur, ge okööbø kinni, “Bene kɑɑl-ɑ bɑ ɑ́mɑɑrø èn? Bene kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́pëddi døøjø kì kömi piny èn?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Yï ceg kɑ lɑrrø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ̀ nenni yïn yi gen; ge kööbø ge thönyy-ɑ dhøggi gen, ge cem-ɑ, “Árënyi yi wøn! Ápɑ̈ɑ̈dh dicyɑ̈ngtïn, ɑ́lidh yi wøn! O bene pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe ɑ ɑ́yïd yi wøn!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe kinni gï ógwøge, ɑ́gwøge cyee, wɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ge e pyëwe pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbe wɑ ceth kɑ̈ge dööng. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́thödhe ki tegø me tyɑɑm wɑ yi gen, o pëthi gen med gen kɑ̀ pɑ̈ɑ̈dh wɑ." 
Lamentations2:18 Yerusɑlem, wiy dörrí ywøøg gen kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Wiy pïi nyingí rïngi gen ni nɑ̈mmì kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng. Wiy yï thøw yi ywøg geki kïïmø." 
Lamentations2:19 Nyi dhwödhí mɑl kì wɑ̈r kɑ yï nyi ywøøg kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Køny yijí piny ki ywøg yï ókwɑ̈jjø kipe nyigí. Othønhø ceg-ɑ thøø yi kɑ̈j kì tøggi yëëth! 
Lamentations2:20 Á kipe ngø ɑ cɑɑy wøn kinnï, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, nyigi gen, nyig-ɑ mɑɑr yi gen, ceg kɑ cɑmø yi gen! Ókwër geki jøtöng ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø kì yij Kengø kiree!" 
Lamentations2:21 Tyëngdøngø kí othønhø buud ge thøø kì yethi yëëth! Wojur kí wøbb ɑ́nɑ̈g yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø! Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yi yïn keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwí. 
Lamentations2:22 Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́cwööl-ɑ yi yïn, o ge rujji gen kì kömɑ; bong ngɑn bødh kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑ̈ji pyëwí. Nyigɑ, nyig-ɑ ɑ́pidhɑ ge mɑɑrɑ’ mɑɑrø ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen." 
Lamentations3:1 Bɑ yɑn ɑ ngɑ̈nyi ledhi dhøggi cɑ́yi Jwøk. 
Lamentations3:2 Yɑ ɑ́kïdhe piny piny, yij muudhø." 
Lamentations3:3 Kɑ yɑ pwöde pyëwe pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m. 
Lamentations3:4 Kɑ yɑ wiye dëlɑ kɑggø, o cuɑ tørrø." 
Lamentations3:5 Yɑ ɑ́cyëëge ød mɑg keny-ɑ rɑj, keny yije rɑngɑ." 
Lamentations3:6 Yɑ ɑ́göjje bëëdø kì yij muudhi thøø. 
Lamentations3:7 Yɑ ɑ́twöje ki ɑ́cwecwel, yɑ bɑ ɑmɑg men pɑ cuggi pɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Lamentations3:8 Yɑ ywöngi, yɑ odhɑmmø, de Jwøk ɑ́bɑ̈nyi kønyi yɑn;" 
Lamentations3:9 yɑ cyɑ̈dhi yɑ ócyerø, kɑ yuuɑ nyi cyëëg yi tuggi kïttì mø døngø, kì tung-ɑ nyi løgɑ wïjɑ." 
Lamentations3:10 Buud-ɑ yuuɑ ni lɑ̈y dub; ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömɑ ni ngur. 
Lamentations3:11 Yɑ ɑ́ywɑɑje wɑ̈g kì yij yöö, ɑkɑgge yɑn kɑ yɑ wiye kì kenyɑni." 
Lamentations3:12 Wethe ɑ́kwɑnye, kɑ nywøli wethe tyëëge riɑ." 
Lamentations3:13 Nywøli wethe ɑ́ì cød kì riɑ. 
Lamentations3:14 Teedø rïïjø ge gɑgg-ɑ yɑn," 
Lamentations3:15 yɑ nuti thödhø yi en ki gïncɑm, den-ɑ́ orɑng ɑ ɑ́mëgge yɑn ɑ́ kej gïncɑm geki pï." 
Lamentations3:16 Bølɑ ɑ́nyønge kì piny kɑ leggɑ ótørrø yi lel. 
Lamentations3:17 Yödi dël, geki mër kí medi pyëw, ge ɑ́wïl kì wïjɑ." 
Lamentations3:18 Yɑ pɑ nëënø këti, bong gïn ngɑ̈dhɑ kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations3:19 Ledhi dhøg orɑng geki bëëdɑ yïɑ bong keny pëggɑ, bong gïn pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ ki en." 
Lamentations3:20 Yɑ rïïjø yɑ rømm-ɑ gen, minɑ cödø cödø." 
Lamentations3:21 De pyëwɑ nyii dwöögø kenyi pɑ̈ddɑ riɑ kinni: 
Lamentations3:22 Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ nyi thumi geki lɑ̈mpyëwe; ge nudd ge nud," 
Lamentations3:23 ge nud ceth ni wøw ɑ pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji ki ruø, kɑ nɑ cɑ̈ng ɑ pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji ki tuulø." 
Lamentations3:24 Yɑ ngɑ̈ny-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete, e kete ɑ ngɑ̈dhɑ." 
Lamentations3:25 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈nnii bënn nyi gögge’ gïndøj." 
Lamentations3:26 O lɑ̈w keløg wɑ nenn-ɑ yïe, mɑ́ wɑ bɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́yiel yi en." 
Lamentations3:27 O lɑ̈w keløg wɑ odïdø ki ngïïnø, wɑ nudd wɑ bɑ wøbb." 
Lamentations3:28 Lɑ̈w keløg wɑ pëgg-ɑ piny wɑ okudø, kenyi rɑngi wɑ;" 
Lamentations3:29 lɑ̈w ke kuul wɑ wɑ̈thee piny, cɑ́yee yïëëy wɑ, mɑ́ yïee dɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Lamentations3:30 Yïëy wɑ møgɑni bënn cɑgg wɑ gwɑddi kɑ wɑ pwöd. 
Lamentations3:31 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwe nyii lɑ̈ɑ̈mø, wɑ koo bɑny yi en gïti ɑtheer." 
Lamentations3:32 Wɑ ócuggø thödhi yi en ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m yij, de wɑ mɑɑr yi en ceth ki mendwøng." 
Lamentations3:33 Pyëwe pɑ med ki wëggi wɑ orɑng geki kïïmø. 
Lamentations3:34 Ngɑ̈nyi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni bøli keny-ɑ nyi bëëd wëyee gɑ ɑmɑgg, o ge torø torø." 
Lamentations3:35 Ngɑ̈nyi yi en kenyi twöön wɑ ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëgge wɑ. 
Lamentations3:36 Ngɑ̈nyi yi en kenyi di ruj kì burø. 
Lamentations3:37 Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bɑ en ɑ nyi gwøg ceth." 
Lamentations3:38 Bɑ en ɑ nyi wëggi gïgrijjø kí gïgdøj cwöbø. 
Lamentations3:39 Á kipe ngø ɑ gööny wɑ, wɑ ɑ́cɑy kɑ per orøgee?" 
Lamentations3:40 Wil wɑ bëëdee, kɑ wɑ døøg wɑ kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations3:41 Yïëbbi wɑ pëthee Jwøk, ɑ ying mɑl, kɑ wɑ kwɑ̈jji wɑ kinni," 
Lamentations3:42 “Wø ɑ́røngi; dhøgí ɑ́pyem yi wøn, o pyëwí nuti lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations3:43 “Wø ɑ́cyeddi yi yïn kɑ wø nɑ̈g yi yïn, kɑ lɑ̈mpyëwí mɑ̈ɑ̈n yi rɑ̈ji pyëwí." 
Lamentations3:44 Rɑ̈ji pyëwí nɑ pøølø me dwøng men mɑ̈ɑ̈n kwɑ̈jji wøn wɑ̈nhi yïí. 
Lamentations3:45 Wø ɑ́wëggí gwøgø wøn ɑ́ thur yi pödhh bënn. 
Lamentations3:46 “Wø ceg kɑ yɑnyyø, o wø ceg kɑ gwɑddø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Lamentations3:47 wø ɑ́ryɑ̈g, o wø bëëd ɑ yij böögø." 
Lamentations3:48 Nyingɑ ceg-ɑ lolø ki pï ni nɑm, kɑ̀ nennɑ ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi wɑddi wøn." 
Lamentations3:49 “Pïi nyingɑ ceg-ɑ mullø ge pɑ cungi," 
Lamentations3:50 gïti keny-ɑ ólug Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thɑ̈wwe, kɑ ólïdhø e ying-ɑ pɑɑre mɑl," 
Lamentations3:51 pyëwɑ nyi ceg-ɑ rɑ̈m kenyi lidhɑ orɑɑng mɑ̈nni kɑɑldwøng. 
Lamentations3:52 “Yɑ ɑ́ceg ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì ni winyø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mø bong gïn pere mɑɑn yɑn yi gen." 
Lamentations3:53 Yɑ ɑ́luudh yij yith yi gen, kɑ dhø yith ngyëdi gen ki tungi kït." 
Lamentations3:54 Kɑ pï ócɑ̈gø ki mudi yɑn, ɑrumɑ kinni thøø ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Lamentations3:55 “Kɑ yɑ ywøøg-ɑ köörí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ying-ɑ tyeli yith," 
Lamentations3:56 ɑkwɑjjɑ yïn, kɑ kwɑ̈jjɑ lïngi yi yïn." 
Lamentations3:57 Kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑ́løøg yi yïn, ɑköbbí yɑn kinni yɑ ko böggi." 
Lamentations3:58 “Yï ɑ́bï be dømi yɑn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wëyɑ yiel yi yïn." 
Lamentations3:59 Cwɑg yɑn, mɑ́ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggi yɑn, ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn bënn." 
Lamentations3:60 Mɑɑn-ɑ mɑɑn yɑn yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, o rɑjj-ɑ dwɑddi gen göggi yɑn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn bënn." 
Lamentations3:61 “Ge ɑ́lïngi yi yïn ge gwɑdd-ɑ yɑn; ɑmolpiny mi gen bëne ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations3:62 Ge nyi tyëg cɑ̈ng ge kømm-ɑ yɑn, ge dwøngg-ɑ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi gwøgø yi gen." 
Lamentations3:63 Yɑ ceg kɑ kwøllø ki nennø yi gen kì wɑ̈r kí dicɑ̈ng. 
Lamentations3:64 “Cɑy gen kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations3:65 Göjjí gen cyën, kɑ wiy yethi gen bɑɑr gen!" 
Lamentations3:66 Dwɑr gen, kɑ nyingi gen rɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì kömi piny!”" 
Lamentations4:1 Dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e orɑ̈ɑ̈dø, ɑ́luuj; kïtt-ɑ ɑ́geer Kengø buud ge kedhhø kì yethi yëëth." 
Lamentations4:2 Wøbbi Dhɑyøn ɑ́bëëd per gen teg kì yï wøn ni dhɑb, de ɑnɑn ge ɑ́døøg ge nɑ tɑ̈mmi lɑ̈b yøw." 
Lamentations4:3 Cɑgg ɑ́ gøøl, nyige nyi korre’ korrø, de jiɑ nɑ wudø ɑ nyi tönggi nyige." 
Lamentations4:4 Nyigi gen ɑ́wëggi gen nɑ̈gø yi kɑ̈j geki röödhø; othønhø ceg-ɑ kwɑ̈jjø ki gïgcɑmm, de bong ngɑn thödhi gen." 
Lamentations4:5 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge cɑmm-ɑ gïg-ɑ pëddi døøjø, ɑ́göög ge ceg-ɑ pɑ̈nhhø yi kɑ̈j kì yethi yëëth. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́tɑ̈bbi kì yij kɑ̈r, ɑ́døøg be gwen." 
Lamentations4:6 Jiɑ ɑ́cɑy ki cɑ́y mø døngø kibøli cɑ́yi Sødømɑ̀, møg-ɑ ɑ́gwɑɑr piny yi cingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations4:7 Nyiirɑ̈nhi wøn ɑ́bëëd ge dhïw ni ɑ́piy, ge ceg-ɑ ngwønø, dëlli gen lwiy." 
Lamentations4:8 Anɑn kɑ̈jj-ɑ buud yi gen kwïj kì yethi yëëth, ge nënni ge nɑ tyëngthøø, ge bɑ cu, o ge wɑ̈ɑ̈jø; dëlli gen pöggø." 
Lamentations4:9 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw kì yij liny lɑ̈w kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw kì cyɑ̈n, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ywɑj yi kɑ̈j kì yethi yëëth." 
Lamentations4:10 Ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi jiɑ, ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki böögø me dwøng, mëëg, nyigi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yi gen ɑ́thɑl yi gen kɑ gï cɑm gen." 
Lamentations4:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j linye ɑ́ngøøge piny kömi Dhɑyøn ɑ́ mɑc, kɑ gø rɑ̈be kinni tweet." 
Lamentations4:12 Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́rum, cɑgg ɑ́ kì kelli jɑggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni dɑ ngɑn cuggi turri yij Yerusɑlem ki liny." 
Lamentations4:13 De møgɑni ɑ́cwöb kipe kɑ ɑ́røngi jøtöng møge, kɑ ji mø yï gen bɑ̈r, othøø ki gööj kerri orøøg ókwër." 
Lamentations4:14 Pëjje ɑ́bëëd ge óthɑ̈mmø kì yethi yëëth ni cörr, ge cödhø cödhø yi remø, kɑ bong-ɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́nywɑl gen." 
Lamentations4:15 Kɑ ge nyi cyɑ̈r yi ji kinni, “Kedh wun! Wu cödhø! Yɑ ko nywɑl wun!” Codhe, ɑpëggi gen be wïïnø kì yethi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, e bong ngɑn cwøøl gen gøle." 
Lamentations4:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cwɑgge tøøk ki gïn, bɑ en kiree ɑ ɑ́kedhhi gen. Ókwërree geki pëjjee bong per gen kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Lamentations4:17 Wɑ ɑ́pïd yi nënnì, e bong ngɑn bï be kunyø. Wɑ ɑ́rømm-ɑ kinni wɑ ókøny yi pödhø me bong gïn kunye." 
Lamentations4:18 Wɑ ɑ́bëëd wɑ ceg kɑ korø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø; wɑ pɑ cuggi cyɑ̈dhø kì yethi yëëth. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́döng, thøø ɑ́bï." 
Lamentations4:19 Kɑ ge cwøøy-ɑ kömee ni cor. Kɑ wɑ dwɑr yi gen kì kelli kïttì, kɑ wɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈y gen piny kì yij pɑ̈l." 
Lamentations4:20 Ngɑn-ɑ́ ree ɑ́bëëd yi wɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen, eni rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, en ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi wɑ kinni wɑ ókor yi en ki ngɑn bï be mɑ̈nyø." 
Lamentations4:21 Gɑ̈ɑ̈g wun, wu tyëng Edöm kí Udh, med pëthi wun. Ryɑ̈ɑ̈g wun obëënø thyew; wu ócyerri wu cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, wu yɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Lamentations4:22 Dhɑyøn ɑ́rum ki coli kej bɑ̈jje, wø pɑ cigi mïdhø kì yïnø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti. De yïn, Edöm, yï ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ónyodhe." 
Lamentations5:1 Lidh gïn-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi wøn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Lidh wøn, wø ɑ́yɑ̈r." 
Lamentations5:2 Jɑmmi wøn ying-ɑ cinggi tyëngpɑth, kɑ̈lli wøn bëëd-ɑ yi tyëngpɑth." 
Lamentations5:3 Wëëg wøn ɑ́nɑ̈g yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mëëg ɑ́döng gɑ kïjj." 
Lamentations5:4 Wø ceg-ɑ ngyew ki pïg-ɑ mɑdh yi wøn wø ceg-ɑ ngyew ki yugg-ɑ tɑ̈ɑ̈d yi wøn. 
Lamentations5:5 Wø pïdø ni ɑderr geki ɑmɑl; wø pɑ nyi wëggi ywömø. 
Lamentations5:6 Gïncɑm-ɑ yiel wøn ki kɑ̈j, nyi kwɑɑj wø’ Rïp geki Acuur." 
Lamentations5:7 Kweyyi wøn ɑ ɑ́røngi, de ɑnɑn ge ɑ́rum ki kedhø, ɑdöng wøn wø orɑngø yi gööj orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Lamentations5:8 Wø jɑɑg-ɑ yi ji møg pɑ̈r ki bɑ̈ngg, o bong ngɑn yiel wøn kì cinggi gen." 
Lamentations5:9 Tyëng-ɑ nɑ̈gø ki ji wïïn ɑ bɑdhhi myërr, de wø nyi bøy-ɑ thøø kenyi kedhi wøn be yɑb ki gïncɑm." 
Lamentations5:10 Kwɑ̈g ceg-ɑ olwɑny kì ri wøn yi kɑ̈j, o dëlli wøn ceg-ɑ lyelø ni mɑc." 
Lamentations5:11 Mɑ̈nni wøn ɑ́mød kì men-ɑ́ wïj Kïti Dhɑyøn kiree, o wojur ceg kɑ mødø kì kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Lamentations5:12 Jɑggi wøn ɑ́kɑ̈l kɑ ge ngɑb, jøgdøngi wøn pɑ wør." 
Lamentations5:13 Wøbbi wøn ɑ́cïri rɑ̈ɑ̈gø ki byel ni bɑ̈ngg, yɑnythønhø cyɑ̈dhi ge ócyerrø yi pegi yugg-ɑ tyëddi yi gen." 
Lamentations5:14 Jøgdøngø ɑ́wïyi ki bëëdø kì dïpɑc, o yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb ɑ́wïyi ki thom ki thøm." 
Lamentations5:15 Bong medi pyëw me nud këti kì yï wøn, den-ɑ́ kïïmø ceth ɑ nud." 
Lamentations5:16 Jɑmm-ɑ́ per gen ɑ́pwöd wøn köthi wøn ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny, wø ɑ́røngi, o ɑnɑn wø ɑ́gɑ̈g." 
Lamentations5:17 Minni wøn ɑ́cöd, o nyingi wøn ɑ́cøør yi ywøg." 
Lamentations5:18 Mɑ́ Kïti Dhɑyøn ɑ́döng kete, ji ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g, bɑ ógwøgg ɑ ɑ́döng ge óywöngø kì yije." 
Lamentations5:19 De yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yï bɑ rɑ̈dh gïti ɑtheer, o yï ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ceth gïti thumi piny." 
Lamentations5:20 Á kipe ngø ɑ wiy wøn piny ki kɑɑm-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈r ni men? Wø ócigi pɑrø yi yïn këti? 
Lamentations5:21 Dwøøg wøn köörí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Dwøøg wøn köörí! Dwøøg dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng wøn keje ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn." 
Lamentations5:22 Wɑlɑ̀ wø ɑ́ceg kɑ bɑnyø yi yïn gïti ɑtheer? Rɑ̈ji pyëwí bong cöge? 
Ezekiel1:1 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g runn, kì bïïj cyɑ̈nggi ngween dwɑ̈tt, e yɑn, yɑ ókwërø Idhkiel, wɑ̈d Budhì, yɑ obëëdø kì kelli Yeud kì yïnø, kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr kì Bɑbïl. Mɑl ree ɑ́yiebe, kɑ yɑ cɑ̈rri yi Jwøk." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ábëëd ɑ́ bïïj runni Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkin kì yïnø. 
Ezekiel1:3 Kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr, ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ cwɑggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e okööbø ki yɑn, yɑ Idhkiel wɑ̈d Budhì, kɑ tege yodɑ." 
Ezekiel1:4 Alïïdhɑ mɑl, kɑ ɑtunø lidh-ɑ e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, o mɑl ogwelø kì yij pøølø me dwøng, e tøge omënyø, o dyëre dɑ gïjø me rɑ̈nggø ni ngyënyø dilɑl." 
Ezekiel1:5 Kɑ yɑ ólïdhø kì dïdyër ɑtunɑni ki gïg mø ni kerobb ɑ́ngwen, o ge nënni ge nɑ ji," 
Ezekiel1:6 de yï gen bënn dɑ bøll ɑ́ngwen kí obërr ɑ́ngwen. 
Ezekiel1:7 Tyelli gen bɑ ócimø, o dɑddi gen nɑ dɑddi wɑdh, o ge ceg-ɑ omïl ni ngyënyø dilɑl me thøø yi yojø." 
Ezekiel1:8 O yï gen bënn dɑ cing mø ni cinggi dhɑnhø, gɑ ɑ́ngwen, cingø ɑ́kyel kì thɑ obërø ɑ́kyel." 
Ezekiel1:9 Obërr ɑ́ryew kì ri kerob ɑ́kyel bɑ ɑper, o ge tuum gen ki obëri kerom-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhi gen, ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kej ɑ́kyel e bong ngɑn løg ree." 
Ezekiel1:10 Kerob ɑ́kyel yïe dɑ bøll ɑ́ngwen. Bøli dhɑnhø ɑ bøle, kí bøli ngur kì wïj tuung kyëj, kí bøli wɑdh kí wïj tuung cɑɑm, o bøli cor ɑ ying ngɑ̈je." 
Ezekiel1:11 Obërr ɑ́ryew bɑ ɑper, o ge rwööm gen ki obërri kerom-ɑ kyeelø, obërr ɑ́ryew-ɑ kyeelø bøødh gen ri gen." 
Ezekiel1:12 Ge cungi ge rwöm ceth, o ge ócuggø kedhi tung-ɑ dwɑddi kedhø yi gen, e ri gen pɑ løg yi gen." 
Ezekiel1:13 Kelli kerobbɑni dɑ gïjø me mënyø ni ɑ́menyø, e ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhø kì kelli gen, o ceg-ɑ ogwel e pödh-ɑ mɑl." 
Ezekiel1:14 Kerobbɑni ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhø; ge nyi kedh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ ge nyi dwöög-ɑ cyɑ̈n, ge jwɑni nɑ ogwel mɑl." 
Ezekiel1:15 Alïdhɑ ki tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ngwen, ge nywɑll-ɑ piny; tyelø ɑ́kyel ying-ɑ buti kerob ɑ́kyel." 
Ezekiel1:16 Tyelli yɑ̈thɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen pɑ̈r, ge ceg-ɑ ogwel ni tigg-ɑ per gen teg, o tyelø ɑ́kyel yïe dɑ tyelø megø me twïyø kì ɑ́dude," 
Ezekiel1:17 kipe kinni o tyellɑni cuggi gen ki kedhi wɑ̈thi tùng ɑ́ngwen bënn. 
Ezekiel1:18 Tøggi tyelli yɑ̈thɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen pɑ̈ng yi nying. 
Ezekiel1:19 Kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhi kerobbɑni kì piny, tyell-ɑ wïnnø møgɑni ceg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhø kyeel ki gen; kɑ̀ kedhi kerobbɑni mɑl, tyel ceg-ɑ kedhi mɑl thyew." 
Ezekiel1:20 Gïn-ɑ gwøg yi kerobbɑni, en ceth ɑ gwøg yi tyel, mɑ́ tyel mïdh-ɑ yi kerobbɑni." 
Ezekiel1:21 Keløg Kerobbɑni ócungø, tyel ceg-ɑ cung, keløg ge kedh-ɑ mɑl yij yømø, tyel ceg-ɑ kedhi mɑl thyew." 
Ezekiel1:22 Wɑ̈thi kerobbɑni dɑ gïjø me ree rïïm en mɑl, me tïl o ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng." 
Ezekiel1:23 Kerobbɑni ying-ɑ thɑ gïnɑni, e kerob obërre ɑ́ryew rïïj en, o ge rwööm gen ki obërri kerom-ɑ kyeelø, o ɑ́ryew-ɑ kyeelø kum en ree." 
Ezekiel1:24 Alïngɑ cwɑggi obërri gen kɑ̀ pɑ̈rri gen, ge ruur nɑ cwɑggi nɑɑm omelø, o nɑ cwɑggi jøliny mø gïïr cɑrø, o ge nɑ cwɑggi Áyïmø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wïyi gen ki pɑ̈rrø, kɑ obërri gen bidh gen," 
Ezekiel1:25 de dɑ cwɑg mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l kömi gïn-ɑ rïïm wɑ̈thi gen kì mɑl. 
Ezekiel1:26 Kömi gïn-ɑ wɑ̈thi kerobbɑni dɑ gïjø me ni kwøm, men-ɑ ógwøgø ki tigg-ɑ per gen teg me tïl, o kïde bɑ ówɑw, o dɑ gïjø me bëëdø kì wïj kwøm me ni dhɑnhø." 
Ezekiel1:27 Gïnɑni nënni e nɑ ngyënyø dilɑl, me ying yij mɑc, o kì piny nënni e nɑ mɑc me mënyø ki cɑr me tɑr," 
Ezekiel1:28 me ree di kïddi órøngø bënn. Bene cɑr menɑni ɑ nyodh kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud. Keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dhɑ wïjɑ këëlɑ’ piny. Alïngɑ ki cwɑg" 
Ezekiel2:1 mø kööbø kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, dhwödhí mɑl. Yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kwøb ki yïn.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kööb cwɑggɑni, ɑkedhi wëyi Jwøk riɑ, kɑ yɑ tïng gen kömi tyellɑ, ɑlïngɑ cwɑggɑni ge okööbø kinni," 
Ezekiel2:3 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, yï örɑ’ yï tyëng Isrɑil, pönh-ɑ mune teeg, ɑ ɑ́pyem kwøbbɑ ni kɑ ɑ́pyeem gen yi kweyyi gen cøn." 
Ezekiel2:4 Muddi gen teeg, o yɑ pɑ wør yi gen, o yï örɑ’ yï gen, o ge köbbí gïg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel2:5 Cɑgg kwøbbí lïngi yi tyëngpëëmø møgɑni, wɑlɑ̀ gï pɑ lïngi yi gen, óyod yi gen kinni kelli gen dɑ jɑltöng." 
Ezekiel2:6 “De yïn, wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, yï ko böggi yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ yi kwøbbi gen. Yï ógwɑddi yi gen, kɑ kwøbbí bɑny yi gen; yï óbëëd, yï ce ying-ɑ kelli ïïdh. De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, yï ko bwøg yi kwøbbi tyëngpëëmø møgɑni." 
Ezekiel2:7 Gïn-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn, óköbbí gen, cɑgg gø lïngi gen, wɑlɑ̀ koo lïngi gen. Bëëd yï ngɑ̈ny wøw ceth kinni ge bɑ tyëngpëëmø." 
Ezekiel2:8 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïngí kwøbb-ɑ köbbɑ yïn. Yï ko pëëm ni gen. Yieb dhøgí kɑ gïn-ɑ mëggɑ yïn cɑɑm.”" 
Ezekiel2:9 Alïdhɑ ki cingø me órïïj yïɑ, e ómïdhø ki wɑ̈nyø." 
Ezekiel2:10 Ayiebe wɑ̈nyɑni, kɑ lidhɑ e ógwedø kì yije geki köme kinni, ‘Ywøg geki kïïmø kí ɑkiw.’" 
Ezekiel3:1 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, nyɑm wɑ̈nyø men, o yï kedhí be köbbi tyëng Isrɑil.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Codhe, ɑngɑmɑ dhøgɑ kɑ wɑ̈nyɑni kïdhe dhøgɑ." 
Ezekiel3:3 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, cɑm wɑ̈ny-ɑ mëggɑ yïn èn, pɑ̈ng yijí ki gøn.” Acɑmɑ en, kɑ ogöögø e ceg-ɑ lwïyø ni møøw kïc kì dhøgɑ." 
Ezekiel3:4 Codhe, ɑköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø kedhí yï tyëng Isrɑil, kɑ ge köbbí kwøbb-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn bënn;" 
Ezekiel3:5 mɑ́ yï pɑ örɑ’ yï ji mø 'kööb dhøg me pɑth, den-ɑ́ yï tyëng Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel3:6 Keløg yï di örɑ’ yï ji mø 'kööb dhøg me teeg, me pɑ lïngi yi yïn, kwøbbí di lïngi yi gen." 
Ezekiel3:7 De kwøbbí koo lïngi yi tyëng Isrɑil, cɑgg ɑ́ kwøbbɑ gï koo lïngi yi gen thyew. Mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil muddi gen teeg, o ge bɑ tyëngpëëmø." 
Ezekiel3:8 Yï ógwøgɑ muní teeg ni gen. 
Ezekiel3:9 Yï ówëggɑ tëngø ni kït geki mɑs, yï ko böggi yi ji-ɑ muddi gen teeg møgɑni.”" 
Ezekiel3:10 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ti møg ki lïngø, kɑ ge rømmi kidøøj." 
Ezekiel3:11 Codhe kɑ yï kedhí yï jø pödhi wun møg-ɑ yïnø, kɑ ge köbbí møg-ɑ köbbɑ gen, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kööb ceth, cɑgg kwøbbí lïngi yi gen wɑlɑ̀ pɑ lïngi yi gen.”" 
Ezekiel3:12 Codhe, ɑtïng yɑn mɑl yi wëyi Jwøk, ɑlïngɑ ki cwɑg mø ngɑ̈rri ge óryeerø kì ngɑ̈jɑ kinni, “Lenhi dhwɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì mɑl!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Alïngɑ cwɑggi obërri kerobb kɑ̀ pwöd gen ri gen kì yij yømø, kí cwɑggi tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th, ge nɑ onhɑ̈ɑ̈nh piny." 
Ezekiel3:14 Abëën tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömɑ ki menteg, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn yi wëye, e pyëwɑ rɑɑj." 
Ezekiel3:15 Codhe, ɑbëënɑ Tel Abib kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr, kun-ɑ bëëd yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïnø, ɑbëëdɑ ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew e wïjɑ cungø yi gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kí møg-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ." 
Ezekiel3:16 Kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, yï ɑ́kwɑnyɑ yïn ɑ́ jɑl-ɑ kor Isrɑil. Kwɑny kwøbbɑ kɑ ge kyëddí yïn ɑ́ kejɑ." 
Ezekiel3:18 Keløg yɑ okööbø kinni ngetorøg ceg-ɑ thøø, kɑ ocögø e pɑ kyëddi yi yïn kinni wïye ki orøg, o wëye yiele; ceg-ɑ thøw yij orøge ceth, de cyënne ócïbɑ kömí." 
Ezekiel3:19 Keløg e ókyëddi yi yïn de pɑ wïyi ki orøg, óthøw kì yij orøge, de wëyí óbødh." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Keløg ngɑntir døøg-ɑ be orøg, kɑ cïbɑ yij orɑng, ceg-ɑ thøø keløg e pɑ kyëddi yi yïn, o thuw-ɑ orøge, o gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge pɑ pɑr yi yɑn. O cyënne cïbɑ’ kömí." 
Ezekiel3:21 Keløg ngɑntir okyëddø yi yïn kinni ko røngi, kɑ olïngø kɑ ocögø e pɑ røngi, ónëënø, o wëyí óyiel thyew.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Abëën tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömɑ, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl kɑ yï kedhí yij tör, yï óköbbɑ kì kunɑni.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Codhe, ɑkedhɑ yij tör, ɑlidhɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kunɑni ni kɑ ɑ́lidhɑ en kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr. Abøødhɑ riɑ e wïjɑ kuul yɑn piny," 
Ezekiel3:24 de wëyi Jwøk ɑ́bï kömɑ, ɑtïng gen yɑn mɑl kömi tyellɑ. Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedhí pɑc kɑ ødí cyëëg kömí." 
Ezekiel3:25 Yï ótwöj ki thøll wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, o yï ódhɑ̈li ki kedhi kelli ji." 
Ezekiel3:26 Lebí ótwöj yi yɑn, o yï dhɑ̈lí ki kyëddi ji-ɑ muddi gen teeg møgɑni." 
Ezekiel3:27 Codhe, o keny-ɑ ótugɑ dhøgí, ge óköbbí møg-ɑ ókwøbɑ, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kwï gen ólïngø, de møøgø óbɑ̈nyi, mɑ́ ge bɑ pödhi pëëmø.”" 
Ezekiel4:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø kɑ̈ní ki thob ɑ́kyel kɑ cïb bølí, kɑ Yerusɑlem suur kì köme." 
Ezekiel4:2 Codhe, kɑ suur e ótyegø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki óthør mø bɑ̈rrø, kí burr-ɑ yethi gen nyi pɑ̈ni, kí gënggi ngyënyø møg gëng gen ri gen." 
Ezekiel4:3 Kɑ̈bbí ki ngyënyø dødø mɑ ópɑdø, kɑ cïb ɑ́ dörø kì kɑɑm wun ki kɑɑlɑni; kɑɑl bɑ ɑtyeg, o bɑ yïn ɑ tyegii. Menɑni bɑ nyuudhi kipe pödhi Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel4:4 “Codhe, kɑ yï buddí kì wïj cingi cɑɑmí, o bɑ̈jji pödhi Isrɑil cïbɑ kömí. Yï óbëëdø kinøw ki cyɑ̈ng 390, yï orɑngø kipe bɑ̈jji gen. Kɑ̀ cɑyɑ yïn, cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kwɑn ɑ́ kej run ɑ́kyel men-ɑ di cɑɑy gen kipe bɑ̈jji gen." 
Ezekiel4:5  
Ezekiel4:6 Keny-ɑ órum cɑ́yɑni, kɑ rií løg wïj cingi kyëjí, o yï rɑngi ki cyɑ̈ng 40, kipe bɑ̈jji Yeudiyɑ̀, cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel bɑ kej run ɑ́kyel mi cɑ́yi gen." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Lugí rií kɑɑlɑni kɑ cïmmí cingí, kɑ ryɑ̈ge tööng." 
Ezekiel4:8 Yï twöjɑ’ twöjø, o yï cöög rií pɑ løg yi yïn, pïd keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈nggi tyegi kɑɑlɑni." 
Ezekiel4:9 “Kɑ̈bbí ki gemè, kí ceir, kí ngöör, kí ɑ́dɑs, kí rɑw. Yöl gen gɑ møg cɑm yi yïn ki cyɑ̈ng miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen møg-ɑ óbuud kì wïj cingi cɑɑmí." 
Ezekiel4:10 Yï ómëgg-ɑ ópun me pege bɑ grɑmm miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g kì cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, o yï ócigi nëng ɑ dhuki." 
Ezekiel4:11 Yï ómɑdh-ɑ pï mø nøg; ɑ́ludhhì ɑ́ryew cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel. 
Ezekiel4:12 Yï óbud-ɑ cyedh ki ópun, o ócɑm yi yïn kì bøli ji.”" 
Ezekiel4:13 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Menɑni nyodh-ɑ kër-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈m tyëng Isrɑil ki gïgcɑmm-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø, keny-ɑ ókedhhɑ gen kì yethi pödhh mø pɑth.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 De yɑ ɑ́löggi kinni, “Pɑth ki kinøw, yïn ɑ Wɑ̈ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Riɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi yɑn ki bwölø ki kër-ɑ́ thiinhɑ, pïd ɑnɑn yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi cɑm ki gïnthøø, wɑlɑ̀ yɑ nuti cyɑ̈mø ki kwɑ̈ɑ̈l. Yɑ nuti pɑ̈nyi cɑm ki gïn ywëdhø.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Codhe, ɑkööb Jwøk kinni, “Døj, yï ómëggɑ wɑ̈r gɑ kej cyedh, o ge bul ópuní.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø gïgcɑmm ɑ́cungɑ kipe Yerusɑlem. Ji órɑngø yi kɑ̀ cɑɑg gïgcɑmm geki pï ki rømø." 
Ezekiel4:17 Ge ójɑ̈ddi ki gïgcɑmm kí pï, wɑ̈thi gen ómuum kɑ ge othøø yi gööj orøøg gen.”" 
Ezekiel5:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, kɑ̈bbí ki pilø me bedh, kɑ yëyyi wïjí geki yëyyi tïgí teb ki gøn. Codhe, kɑ yëyyɑni røm ki midhɑn, kɑ ge pɑ̈ngí gɑ kɑ̈jj ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel5:2 Rɑ̈b kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈gɑni kì kɑɑl keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈nggi tyege. Kɑ ryeew ɑ́dɑ̈gɑni pwööd ki pilø, yï kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl. Kɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈g ɑ́dɑ̈gɑni kedhhí kì yij yømø, o yɑ rengɑ bɑnge ki pilɑ." 
Ezekiel5:3 Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki yëyy mø nøg, kɑ ge twööj bɑɑd ógødhí." 
Ezekiel5:4 Codhe, kɑ yï cigí kɑ̈bbø ki mø nøg kì ri gen, kɑ ge leeng mɑc, o ge rɑ̈bbi gen. Mɑc óköödø kì ri gen, kɑ tɑɑy-ɑ yij pödhi Isrɑil bëne.”" 
Ezekiel5:5 Akööb Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Lidh Yerusɑlem, ɑ́cïbɑ dïdyëri pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o tyeeg dïdyërø yi pödhhɑni." 
Ezekiel5:6 De Yerusɑlem ciggɑ ɑ́pyeme, e nyudh-ɑ rɑ̈je pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kinni pëddi pëëmø kibøli pödhhɑni; o mune pëddi tegø kibøli gen. Yerusɑlem ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi ciggɑ, kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki gwøgi gïn-ɑ köbbɑ en." 
Ezekiel5:7 Anɑn Yerusɑlem, lïngí møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, kɑ̀ bɑɑny ciggɑ ki mïdhø, gööjí ceg-ɑ døngø kibøli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ yï ɑ́kwɑny-ɑ kwööng pödhhɑni." 
Ezekiel5:8 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, yï köbbɑ’ köbbø kinni, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki yïn. Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kì bøli pödhh bënn." 
Ezekiel5:9 Yï ócɑyɑ kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́göög ki gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi yɑn. Yerusɑlem ócɑyɑ ki cɑ́y mø nuti pɑ̈nyø cɑ̈yø yi yɑn cøn, o ge pɑ cigɑ cɑ̈yø." 
Ezekiel5:10 Wëëg geki mëëg nyigi gen ócɑm yi gen kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ wëëg kí mëëg cɑm yi nywøl. Yï ócɑyɑ kɑ jií møg-ɑ ɑ́bødh kedhhɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny bënn." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, mɑ́ Kengɑ ɑ́bwöl yi yïn ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn, yï dhurɑ’ piny e pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Ezekiel5:12 Ákyeel ɑ́dɑ̈ɑ̈g jií ónɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì geki kɑ̈j, o ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈g men-ɑ kyeelø ónɑ̈g yi liny, o ɑ́kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈g-ɑ ɑ́döng ókedhhɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny, o yɑ órïngi kì bɑng gen ki pilø." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ óti ki yodø yi yïn, pïd keny-ɑ ókwööj pyëwɑ. Keny-ɑ ócwöb gïgɑni bënn, o yod yi yïn kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pyëwɑ ɑ́ceg-ɑ rënyø kì bɑng kɑ̀ pɑ lïngí kwøbbɑ." 
Ezekiel5:14 Yï ógɑggi yi tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi kì yöö, o ge ócungi ge lɑ̈wi." 
Ezekiel5:15 “Keny-ɑ órënyi pyëwɑ kɑ yï cɑyɑ, pödhh-ɑ butí bënn óbwøg. Yï óbenyi kɑ yï gɑggi yi gen." 
Ezekiel5:16 Yï ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ ki gïgcɑmm, o yï nɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j; kɑ̈j órɑ̈mø ki rií ni rɑ̈ɑ̈m nywøli weth møg-ɑ bedh, ɑ nyi nɑ̈g dhɑnhø." 
Ezekiel5:17 Yï óörɑ kɑ̈j geki lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø, o nyigí nɑ̈g yi gen. Yï ógöjjɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì geki nɑ̈gø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel6:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïïdh kuni kïtti Isrɑil, kɑ wöönɑ köbbí gen kinni," 
Ezekiel6:3 lïngu kwøbbi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wun ɑ kïttì, kí ótøng, kí órøggi kïttì kí töör kinni, yɑ óöni kömi kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki liny me rënyi gen." 
Ezekiel6:4 Këlli lɑm geki kɑ̈jji bɑkur ótoor piny. Tyëng-ɑ kɑ̈jjɑni bënn ónɑ̈g kì bøli ngïjji jwöggi gen. 
Ezekiel6:5 Tyëngthøø ókedhhɑ kì Isrɑil; cu gen ókedhhɑ kì tøggi këlli lɑm. 
Ezekiel6:6 Kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil bënn órënyi, o jwögg-ɑ pɑth mø gen geki këlli lɑm mø gen bënn tørri; këlli bɑkur mø gen ókedhhi, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen bënn órënyø." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ji ónɑ̈g kì kɑ̈jj mø gïïr, o óyod yi tyëng-ɑ óbodh kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel6:8 “Kwï ji ówëggɑ bødhø, ge ótɑɑy kelli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø," 
Ezekiel6:9 kun-ɑ óbëëd gen kì yïnø. Yɑ ópɑr yi gen kì kunɑni, o óyod yi gen kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́cɑy gen, kɑ ge yɑ̈rɑ, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth. Pëthi gen órënyi ki ri gen kì bɑng gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Ezekiel6:10 Óyod yi gen kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o yɑ nuti cɑɑg-ɑ nɑ̈n keny-ɑ ɑ́kyëddɑ gen.”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Teng cinggí! Pwöd tyellí kì piny! Kɑ yï ywöngí kipe orøøg tyëng Isrɑil bënn, mɑ́ ge ónɑ̈g yi liny kí kɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel6:12 Tyëng-ɑ lɑ̈wi ónɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, o tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ónɑ̈g yi liny; tyëng-ɑ óbodh ónɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel6:13 Tyëngthøø ókedhhi kì kelli jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì tøggi këlli lɑm, ge ókedhhi kì wɑ̈thi ótøng, kí wɑ̈thi kïttì bënn, kí thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ mɑr geki thɑ̈thi óthurr-ɑ døngø, kí kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi rɑ̈bbi gen jwögg-ɑ pɑth mø gen ki gëdhhì. Codhe, o yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel6:14 Cingɑ órïj yi yɑn, kɑ Isrɑil rënyɑ. Ódöng nøw, cɑg kì ryɑng wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti Riblɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wuudø, bong keny-ɑ ówiy yi yɑn kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ bëëd gen bënn. Codhe, o yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, bene møg-ɑ köbbɑ Isrɑil ek: yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ kinni, rënyi piny Isrɑil bëne ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi!" 
Ezekiel7:3 “Isrɑil, cögí ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ólidh yi yïn, mɑ́ yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg; gøøli rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn colɑ’ colø." 
Ezekiel7:4 Yï pɑ wiy yi yɑn, pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yïn. Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn. Codhe o yod yi yïn kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel7:5 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Rɑj mø bong cögi gen bï-ɑ kömí." 
Ezekiel7:6 Kwøb ɑ́thumi. Men bene cögí, yï ɑ́rum." 
Ezekiel7:7 Cögi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pönhï obëënø. Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi; cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tummi wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, bong cwɑggi tugø men-ɑ ólïngi këti kì kenggi wɑ̈thi kïttì." 
Ezekiel7:8 “Rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki lidhø yi yïn. Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg. Gøøli rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn colɑ’ colø. 
Ezekiel7:9 Yï pɑ wiy yi yɑn, o pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yïn. Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg, codhe o yod yi yïn kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ cɑy yïn.”" 
Ezekiel7:10 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rënyi Isrɑil ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi; cɑ́y bï-ɑ köme kipe møn-ɑ ɑ́møde ji ki tɑ̈dø. 
Ezekiel7:11 Ruj nyi nywøl-ɑ rɑj mø ngenyø. Bong jɑmmì møg-ɑ ódöng, wɑlɑ̀ kɑ̈r; bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ódöng me ywøg yïn." 
Ezekiel7:12 Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́bï, cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi; ngɑn-ɑ ngëwø pyëwe pɑ mïni, o ngɑn-ɑ ngëwwi pyëwe pɑ rënyi, mɑ́ rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bï-ɑ kömi ji bënn." 
Ezekiel7:13 Bong ngeti ngyew men-ɑ óbëëdø pïd keny-ɑ ódøøge gïg-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yïe ki yodø, mɑ́ rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk ying-ɑ kömi ji bënn. Tyëngrijjø koo bodh." 
Ezekiel7:14 Keny-ɑ ókoodh kɑng, ji ri gen ótyeny yi gen. De bong ngɑn kedhi be liny, mɑ́ rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk bï-ɑ kömi ji bënn." 
Ezekiel7:15 “Yethi yëëth dɑ liny, o yethi kɑ̈llì dɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì geki kɑ̈j. Ngɑn-ɑ wɑ̈g ónɑ̈g yi liny, o ngɑn-ɑ yij kɑɑl ónɑ̈g yi kɑ̈j geki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël." 
Ezekiel7:16 Møøgø óbodh, kɑ ge reng-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì ni ɑkùr møg bwøg kì yij tör, e ngɑn ywøg-ɑ orøge." 
Ezekiel7:17 Cinggi ji ónyönhi kɑ cøngi gen okïïrø. 
Ezekiel7:18 Ge órugø ki ocwɑ̈llì; dëlli gen okïïrø. Wɑ̈thi gen ólyel, kɑ ge oyɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel7:19 Dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø mø gen óweddi gen yethi yëëth, mɑ́ ge pɑ cuggi yielø yi gïn kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Ge pɑ yɑ̈ng yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ yethi gen pɑ pɑ̈ng yi gen, mɑ́ e bɑ dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø ɑ ɑ́peej gen yij orøg." 
Ezekiel7:20 Ge ɑ́tɑ̈d kì bɑng jɑmmɑni, ɑ nyi göög gen ki jwögg-ɑ rijjø kì ri gïn. Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́pɑ̈dhi gen yij orøg." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Jɑmmi Isrɑil ówëggɑ kɑbø yi tyëngpɑth; kɑ̈re bëne ókwɑny yi tyëngrijjø, kɑ gø bwöl gen." 
Ezekiel7:22 Yɑ koo löggi keny-ɑ óturri kurrì Kengɑ, Keng-ɑ pere teg, kɑ gø bwöl gen." 
Ezekiel7:23 “Göggi wun jiɑ ki yëll, mɑ́ piny yije ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi nɑ̈g, o ji ceg kɑ mødø kì yethi kɑ̈dd." 
Ezekiel7:24 Pödhh-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi wun, o kɑ̈lli wun kwɑny yi gen. Jöddi wun pëthi gen ónyönhi, keny-ɑ óbwööl kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø mø wun yi pödhhɑni." 
Ezekiel7:25 Böögø obëënø; mër óyɑb yi wun, de pɑ yod yi wun." 
Ezekiel7:26 Ryɑ̈g óbï e myer-ɑ ree, o wöddi rɑj pɑ cög. Jøtöng ókwɑjji yi wun, o wu nyudhi gen gïg-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈g ki lidhø yi gen. Bong gïn-ɑ ópwönyi ji yi ókwër, o bong gïn-ɑ ócïïj ji yi tyëngdøngø." 
Ezekiel7:27 Rɑ̈dh ókïïmø, kɑ jɑgø wïje omuumø, kɑ dëlli ji okïïrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Wu ócɑyɑ kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun bënn, kí kipe kɑ ɑ́cɑy wun ji møøgø. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Kì bïkyeel runn, kì bïïj cyɑ̈nggi bïkyeel dwɑ̈tt, yɑ ɑ́ying-ɑ gølɑ wøki pëjji Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yïnø. Abëën tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömɑ." 
Ezekiel8:2 Alïïdhɑ mɑl, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki dhɑnhø me bɑ mɑc; cɑg kì pyere gïti piny bɑ mɑc, o cɑg kì pyere gïti mɑl rɑ̈ɑ̈dø nɑ ngyënyø dilɑl." 
Ezekiel8:3 Arïïje gïjø me ni cingø. Kɑ yɑ mɑge kì ri yëyyɑ. Codhe, ɑtïng yɑn mɑl yij yømø yi wëyi Jwøk, kɑ yɑ kïdhe Yerusɑlem. Yɑ ɑ́kïdhe dhøg Kengø, dhøng-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød kì wɑɑng wuudø, keny-ɑ di ngïji men-ɑ mɑɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel8:4 Alidhɑ cɑr men-ɑ nyodh nudi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil kì kenyɑni, e nɑ men-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì yij tör." 
Ezekiel8:5 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïïdh wɑɑng wuudø.” Alidhɑ ngïji jwøng-ɑ pɑth men-ɑ nyi rënyi pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e ying-ɑ buti këli lɑm, kì dhøg Kengø kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Ezekiel8:6 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen ɑ́lidh yi yïn? Bene gen gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́cyeed gen yɑn pɑ̈l kì kej kwërɑ. O yï ólïdhi ki gïgrijjø mø lod møg.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Akïdhe yɑn dhøg döri Kengø men-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, ɑnyudhe yɑn keny me twïyø kì ri döre." 
Ezekiel8:8 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, kedhí wɑ̈g ki keny-ɑ twïyø kì ri dörø.” Codhe ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kenyɑni, kɑ yɑ óyïddø ki dhøg megø." 
Ezekiel8:9 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Kedhí ød, kɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi kì kenyɑni liidh.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Akedhɑ yiny-ɑ ød, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki ngïjji thöllì kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ ywëdhø møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn, kí ngïjji gïg-ɑ nyii mɑllø yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel8:11 Pëjji Isrɑil pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, kí Yɑɑdhɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Cɑpɑn kì kelli gen, ge ɑ́yodɑ kì kunɑni, cinggi gen bënn dɑ ópɑ̈nni bɑkur, de yïrø töng-ɑ mɑl." 
Ezekiel8:12 Kɑ yɑ pyëj yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gïg-ɑ gøggi yi pëjji Isrɑil kì gød, ɑ́lidh yi yïn? Ge mɑ̈d-ɑ́ɑ̀ ød me pɑ̈ng yi ngïjjì. Mɑ́ ge okööbø kinni, ‘Wɑ pɑ nenni yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Ákedh kɑ pödhee wiye piny.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ge ólidh yi yïn ge ogöögø ki gïg mø lod møg ki rɑ̈jø.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Akïdhe yɑn dhøg Kengø kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, kɑ yɑ nyudhe tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg ywøg thøwi jwøg Tɑmudh." 
Ezekiel8:15 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gïgrijjø møgɑni ɑ́lidh yi yïn? Yï ólïdhi ki mø rijjø kibøli møg.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Akïdhe yɑn ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ kɑl kì Kengø. Kì kenyɑni kì buti dhø kej kwër, kì kɑɑm gen ki këli lɑm, ɑ́dɑ jøg-ɑ cwøw pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj mø ngɑ̈thi gen lugi gen Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ri gen bøødh gen piny, ge nenn-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ge mɑll-ɑ cɑ̈ng kɑ̀ tuule." 
Ezekiel8:17 Apyëëj yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gwøg yi gen ɑ́lidh yi yïn? Pɑth ki gïjø me rɑj ɑ gwøg yi gøl Yeudɑ̀ kì keny? Piny ɑ́rënyi yi gen, o ge ɑ́kɑ̈ni yij Kengɑ ki gïg rënyi pyëwɑ." 
Ezekiel8:18 Rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ólidh yi gen. Ge pɑ wiy yi yɑn, o pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen. Ge óryeer ge kwɑjj-ɑ yɑn, de kwɑ̈jji gen koo lïngɑ.”" 
Ezekiel9:1 Alïngɑ ki cwɑg mø ryeer kinni, “Bïu keny, wu jøg-ɑ kedhi be cɑyi kɑɑl. Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu jɑmmi liny mø wun.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Abëën jøg ɑ́bïkyel ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhøg Kengø kì wɑɑng wuudø, e ngɑn ókɑ̈ddø ki jɑmmi liny. O kelli gen dɑ jɑl me rug ógødh kor-ɑ yöm, e ókɑ̈ddø ki gïn gwëde. Abëën gen bënn, kɑ ge ócungø kì buti këli lɑm-ɑ bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl." 
Ezekiel9:3 Codhe, ɑdhwödh cɑɑr Jwøøg Isrɑil, eni cɑr-ɑ mënyø kì buti kerobb kì keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde, ɑkedhe dhøg Kengø. Acwøøl jɑl-ɑ rug ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ gø köbbe kinni," 
Ezekiel9:4 “Kedhí yij Yerusɑlem bëne, kɑ bøli tyëng-ɑ pëthi gen rɑ̈mø yi rɑjj-ɑ gøggi kì yij kɑɑlɑni bënn, kïdhí ki ngïjjì.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Alïngɑ Jwøk e köbb-ɑ jøg-ɑ kyeelø kinni, “Kedhu bɑnge kɑ ji nɑ̈g wun. Ko di ngɑn wiy yi wun, pëthi wun ko lɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Ezekiel9:6 Nɑ̈g wun jøgdøngø, kí wøbb, kí wojur, kí mëëg, kí othønhø. De tyëng-ɑ bølli gen di ngïjjì bënn ko nywɑl wun. Cɑ̈gi wun kì yij Kengɑ.”" 
Ezekiel9:7 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Bwölu Kengø. Pɑ̈ngu ódɑ̈rre ki tyëngthøø. Cɑ̈gi wun ki gwøg!” Codhe, ɑcɑ̈gi gen ki nɑ̈g ki ji kì kɑɑlɑni." 
Ezekiel9:8 Kɑ yɑ odöngø yɑ ketɑ kì kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ji onɑ̈gø. Abøødhɑ riɑ e wïjɑ kuul yɑn piny, kɑ yɑ óryeerø kinni, “Wuö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Isrɑil ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi yïn bënn, kipe kɑ̀ rɑj pyëwí ki Yerusɑlem?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng. Ge ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g kì ji kì yij pödhø bëne, piny ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi remø geki ruj. Ge okööbø ce pödhi gen wiy yɑn piny, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge pɑ nennɑ." 
Ezekiel9:10 O pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen thyew, ge göggɑ’ gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi ji møøgø yi gen.”" 
Ezekiel9:11 Kɑ jɑl-ɑ rugø ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm døøg-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn ɑ́gwøgɑ.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Codhe, ɑlïïdhɑ mɑl ri gïn-ɑ rïïm wɑ̈thi kerobb, ɑlïdhɑ ki gïjø me ni kwøm men-ɑ ógwøgø ki sɑpir, kïn-ɑ pere teg." 
Ezekiel10:2 Aköbbi jɑl-ɑ rug ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm yi Jwøk kinni, “Kedhí thɑ́ tyelli yɑ̈thi kerobb kɑ cingí pɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki mɑɑc cug. Kɑ ge wiiw yij kɑɑl.” Akedhe e nennɑ’ nennø." 
Ezekiel10:3 Kerobbɑni ɑ́bëëd ge cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri Kengø, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe ódɑ̈r-ɑ yij Kengø, kɑ ódɑ̈rɑni opɑ̈ngø yi pøølø." 
Ezekiel10:4 Adhwödh mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, eni cɑr-ɑ mënyø kì keny-ɑ ɑ́di kerobb, kɑ kedh-ɑ dhøg Kengø, codhe ɑpɑ̈ng Kengø yi pøølø, kɑ mɑ̈r omënyø kì ódɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel10:5 Ywøøg obërri kerobb ɑ́bëëd e olïngø kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, e lïngi nɑ cwɑggi Jwøk Áyïmø kenyi kööbe." 
Ezekiel10:6 Keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbi jɑl-ɑ rug ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni kɑ̈bbe ki mɑɑc cug kì kɑɑm tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th, ɑkedhe kɑ ócungø kì buti tyelø ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th." 
Ezekiel10:7 Ákyel kì kelli kerobb cinge ɑ́rïïje, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki mɑɑc cug men-ɑ dïdyëri gen, kɑ gø cïbe cingi jɑl-ɑ rug ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm. Akwɑnye mɑɑc cug kɑ ókedhø." 
Ezekiel10:8 Kɑ kerobbɑni bënn lidhɑ yï gen dɑ gïjø me ni cingi dhɑnhø kì thɑ́ obërri gen," 
Ezekiel10:9 Kɑ lidhɑ kinni dɑ tyelli yɑ̈y ɑ́ngwen, tyellɑni pɑ̈ɑ̈r bënn; o dɑ tyelø ɑ́kyel kì wɑɑng ngëdø. Tyellɑni ceg-ɑ omïl ni tigg-ɑ per gen teg, o tyelø ɑ́kyel bɑ ɑtwöj kì ri tyel-ɑ kyeelø kì dïdyëre." 
Ezekiel10:10  
Ezekiel10:11 Kerobbɑni nyii cuggø kedhi tung-ɑ dwɑddi kedhø yi gen, e ri gen pɑ gir yi gen." 
Ezekiel10:12 Dëlli gen, kí kömmi gen, kí cinggi gen kí tyelli yɑ̈ɑ̈th pɑ̈ng yi nying." 
Ezekiel10:13 Alïngɑ ki cwɑg mø cwöddi kinni, “Tyell-ɑ Wïnnø.”" 
Ezekiel10:14 Kerobbɑni bënn yï gen dɑ bøll ɑ́ngwen, bølø ɑ́kyel bɑ bøli wɑdh, o ryeew bøll bɑ bøli dhɑnhø, o dɑ̈ɑ̈g bøll bɑ bøli ngur, o ngween bøll bɑ bøli cor." 
Ezekiel10:15 (Ge bɑ kerobb-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr.) Kɑ̀ dhwödh kerobbɑni kì mɑl yij yømø," 
Ezekiel10:16 kɑ ge ókedhø, tyellɑni ceg-ɑ kedhø kyeel ki gen. Kenyi per gen, obërri gen kinni o ge pɑ̈r gen, tyel nyi ceg-ɑ kedhø ki gen thyew." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kɑ̀ cungi kerobb, tyel ceg-ɑ cung, o kɑ̀ pɑ̈r gen, tyel ceg-ɑ pɑ̈rø thyew, mɑ́ tyel mïdh-ɑ yi kerobbɑni." 
Ezekiel10:18 Codhe, ɑdhwödh cɑɑr Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ mënyø kì dhø Kengø kɑ ócungø kì wɑ̈thi kerobb." 
Ezekiel10:19 Kɑ kerobb obërri gen per gen, kɑ ge opɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ge nennɑ’ nënnø, kɑ tyell-ɑ wïnnø ókedhø ki gen, ɑkɑl gen cung kì dhø Kengø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøøg Isrɑil omënyø kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Ezekiel10:20 Kɑ ngijɑ kinni bɑ kerobbɑni ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr e Jwøøg Isrɑil ying-ɑ kömi gen. 
Ezekiel10:21 Yï gen bënn dɑ bøll ɑ́ngwen kí obërr, kí gïjø me ni cingi dhɑnhø ki thɑ̈thi obërri gen bënn." 
Ezekiel10:22 Bølli gen bɑ bølli gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr. Men cɑ̈dhh-ɑ bøle. 
Ezekiel11:1 Codhe, ɑtïng yɑn mɑl yi wëyi Jwøk, kɑ yɑ kïdhi gen dhøg Kengø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Alïdhɑ ki jøg-ɑ cwøw pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj kì buti dhøg Kengø kenyɑni kí Yɑɑdhɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Adhur geki Pelɑtiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Benɑiyɑ̀ kì kelli gen, o jøg ɑ́ryew møgɑni bɑ pëjji pödhø." 
Ezekiel11:2 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø bene gen jøg-ɑ thɑɑb ji be gwøg ki gïgrijjø kì kɑɑl men." 
Ezekiel11:3 Ge okööbø kinni, ‘Bøli kej gyer ki ud kì yij kɑɑl men nuti bëënø; kɑɑl men bɑ dɑg, o wøn ɑ bɑ rïngø.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Anɑn töng rɑjj-ɑ óbï kömi gen; töngí gen wɑ̈d dhɑnhø.” 
Ezekiel11:5 Abëën wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömɑ, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni i köbbɑ ji kinni, “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi wun geki rumm-ɑ rømmi yi wun ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn." 
Ezekiel11:6 Wu ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji mø gïïr kì yij kɑɑl, yethi yëëth ɑ́pɑ̈ng wun ki tyëngthøø." 
Ezekiel11:7 “Bene møg-ɑ köbbɑ wun, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø ek: Kɑɑl men bɑ dɑg kidyër, o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wun ɑ bɑ rïngø, de wu bɑ møg kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì yije!" 
Ezekiel11:8 Wu óböggø yi pilø? Pilø kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kömi wun. 
Ezekiel11:9 Wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni, kɑ wu cïbɑ cinggi tyëngpɑth. Wu ɑ́cɑyɑ ki thøø." 
Ezekiel11:10 Wu ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø kì yij liny kì pödhi wun, o yod yi ji bënn kinni bene yɑn, ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel11:11 Kɑɑl men wu koo kore, ni dɑg kenyi kore rïng-ɑ yije. Wu ócɑyɑ kì keny-ɑ di wun kì yij piny Isrɑil bëne." 
Ezekiel11:12 Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ke mïdhi wun ciggi pödhh-ɑ buti wun, bɑ ciggɑ ɑ pyem yi wun, o wu nuti cyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng gen.”" 
Ezekiel11:13 Keny-ɑ ɑ́töngɑ kwøbbɑni, ɑpɑ̈ɑ̈dh Pelɑtiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Benɑiyɑ̀ kɑ othøø. Aleengɑ riɑ piny, wïjɑ këël yɑn piny, ɑryeerɑ kinni, “Wuö, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì Isrɑil ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø yi yïn bënn?”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki yɑn kinni," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem kööb ɑ rií wuki tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ yïnø. Ge okööbø kinni, ‘Ge ɑ́lɑ̈wi ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o piny men ɑ́mëgge wɑ ɑ́ miee.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 “Anɑn köbbí møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn ek, tyëng-ɑ bëëd wun kì yïnø. Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen be bëëdø kì pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi, kɑ ge kedhhɑ kì kelli pödhh møøgø, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli gen kì yethi pödhh-ɑ bëëd yi gen kɑ̈ng-ɑ tïni." 
Ezekiel11:17 “Köbbí gen kinni yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ okööbø kinni, ge ódøøgɑ ki cungø kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ gen, kɑ piny Isrɑil döggɑ gen." 
Ezekiel11:18 Keny-ɑ ódwöög gen, weddi gen jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ cödhø, ɑ kømi pyëw lɑ̈mmø." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ge óthödhɑ ki minø me nyɑ̈n kí rummì nyɑ̈n; min-ɑ bɑ kït men-ɑ teeg ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì ri gen, kɑ ge nëngɑ ki minø me bɑ rïngø." 
Ezekiel11:20 Codhe, o ciggɑ mïdhi yi gen, o ge ógöög gen kì bɑng ciggɑni. Ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen." 
Ezekiel11:21 De tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth, jwögg-ɑ cödhø, ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel11:22 Codhe, ɑpɑ̈r kerobb, kɑ tyell-ɑ wïnnø ókedhø ki gen, geki mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøøg Isrɑil kì mɑl wɑ̈thi gen." 
Ezekiel11:23 Kɑ cɑr-ɑ nyi mënyø odhwödhø kì kɑɑl, ɑcunge kì wïj kït kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Ezekiel11:24 Atïng yɑn mɑl yi wëyi Jwøk kì yij cyɑ̈rø, kɑ yɑ dwøøg gen yïnø Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ pödhi tyëng Kildɑn. Codhe ɑwɑ̈ɑ̈ny cyɑ̈rɑni." 
Ezekiel11:25 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ yïnø köbbɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn. 
Ezekiel12:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, yï bëëd ɑ kelli tyëngpëëmø, mø yï gen di nyingi gen, de ge pɑ nëënø, yï gen dɑ yïthh, de ge pɑ lïngø, mɑ́ ge bɑ tyëngpëëmø." 
Ezekiel12:3 “Anɑn, wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gwir jɑmmí ni ngɑn kedhi be bëëdø pödhø me pɑth. Kɑ yï dhwöödh kì dicɑ̈ng, kì bøli gen, yï kedh-ɑ be bëëdø pödhø megø, men-ɑ óyodii yi gen kinni ge bɑ tyëngpëëmø." 
Ezekiel12:4 Kɑ jɑmmí, jɑmmi wel kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì dicɑ̈ng, e gï nenni ge’ nennø, kɑ wiy yï lidh yi gen yï odhwödhø kì böörø ni kenyi kedh ngɑn töngi yïnø ceth." 
Ezekiel12:5 Twïy döri ødí kì bøli gen, kɑ yï kɑ̈l keny-ɑ ótwïy yi yïn." 
Ezekiel12:6 Kɑ jɑmmí kwɑɑny ge onëënø, kɑ ge byeel kì yij muudhø; kɑ nyingí kum kipe kinni, o piny cöge e pɑ nenni yi yïn, mɑ́ yï ɑ́gwøgɑ yï bɑ ngïji kipe gøl Isrɑil.”" 
Ezekiel12:7 Agwøgɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; jɑmmì ɑ́twöjɑ kì dicɑ̈ng ni ngɑn töngi yïnø, kì böörø e piny køm-ɑ lunyø, ɑtwïyɑ dörø ki cinggɑ, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́twïyɑ. Abyeelɑ jɑmmɑ wïj tøgɑ, kɑ yɑ ókedhø yɑ onennø yi ji bënn." 
Ezekiel12:8 Dhuki kì mwøl, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ɑnɑn mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil bɑ tyëngpëëmø, o ge pyëny-ɑ yïn kinni, ‘Yï gwøg-ɑ ngø?’" 
Ezekiel12:10 Köbbí gen gïn-ɑ kwøbɑ kinni, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ gen kinni: Wöödø men bɑ men muuj nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì Yerusɑlem geki tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni." 
Ezekiel12:11 Köbbí gen kinni gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn bɑ ngïji mi gïn-ɑ óbï kömi gen. Ge ógöögø gɑ wëdhh kí ɑmɑgg. 
Ezekiel12:12 Nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jɑɑg gen jɑmme ótër yi en kì wïj tøge kì yij muudhø, ókɑ̈l keny-ɑ ótwïy yi gen kipere kì ri dörø, nyinge ókum yi en o cöge piny pɑ nenne." 
Ezekiel12:13 De bøyɑ óleengɑ köme kɑ mɑgɑ ki gøn. Codhe, o kïdhɑ Bɑbïl, kun-ɑ óthøwe e gø pɑ lidhe." 
Ezekiel12:14 Jø tøg bure kí jøg-ɑ nyi köbbii, kí jøg-ɑ nyi korrii, ge ókedhhɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny bënn, ge óyɑb yi ji ge dwɑdd-ɑ nɑ̈gø yi jiɑni." 
Ezekiel12:15 “Keny-ɑ ókedhhɑ gen kì yethi pödhh-ɑ pɑth, kí kelli tyëngpɑth, óyod yi gen kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kwï mø nøg kì kelli gen ówiy yi yɑn kì bɑng liny geki kɑ̈j, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, o ge ókööb gen kì kelli pödhh-ɑ ókedhi yi gen, kinni ɑ́yod yi gen kinni ge ɑ́gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø; o yod yi gen kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, nyi kïrri dëlí yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø kɑ̀ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kí kɑ̀ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki pï." 
Ezekiel12:19 Köbbí pödhø bëne wöödø men kinni bene møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e köbb-ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem, møg-ɑ nudd ge obëëdø kì pìnyi gen ek: Dëlli gen ókïrrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø kɑ̀ cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen, kí kɑ̀ mɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ki pï. Piny gen órënyi kɑ döng-ɑ nøw, mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yije ceg-ɑ mød ki ji." 
Ezekiel12:20 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi ji ɑnɑn órënyi; pödhø ódöng ɑ́ ryɑng, codhe o yod yi gen kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel12:22 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ rïïj gɑ́j møg okømmø yi tyëng Isrɑil kinni, ‘Piny ceg-ɑ pödhø e møg-ɑ ɑ́töng nuti pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen?’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Köbbí gen kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni gɑ́jɑni cuungɑ’ cuungø; ge pɑ cigi kømmø kì Isrɑil kinni tek. Köbbí gen kinni bøli keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kwøb kɑ̈jji gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi! 
Ezekiel12:24 “Kipe bong møg-ɑ ótöng, o bong møg-ɑ ócɑr mø bï gɑ pyed kì Isrɑil këti." 
Ezekiel12:25 Ge óköbbɑ, o møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth. Ge koo cwööng; ge ócwöb kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi wun, wu tyëngpëëmø; møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ ógwøgɑ kì bøli kɑ̈jji gen ceth.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel12:26 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tyëng Isrɑil orumø kinni i møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rrí gen geki møg-ɑ ɑ́töng yi yïn ɑ́mɑ̈gi ki keny me lɑɑj, ge pɑ pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen." 
Ezekiel12:28 De köbbí gen kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ge pɑ cwööng këti. Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ bënn ceg kɑ gwøgø. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb!”" 
Ezekiel13:1 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí jøtöng mø pyed kì Isrɑil, gen ɑ jøg-ɑ nyi töng møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen. Köbbí gen kinni lïngi gen mø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jøtöng mø pyed ri gen dɑ cyën! Ge nyi töng-ɑ møg-ɑ rømmi yi gen keti gen, de pɑth ki møg-ɑ cɑ̈rri gen." 
Ezekiel13:4 Isrɑil, jøtöng møgí nɑ ógwøgg mø bëëdø kì wïj thur." 
Ezekiel13:5 Kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì ri dörø pɑ kor yi gen, o döri Isrɑil nuti døøg gen ki gerø, o di cugge cung e teeg keny-ɑ óbëën liny kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel13:6 Gïg-ɑ cɑr yi gen geki gïg-ɑ rɑng yi gen bɑ pyed. Ge okööbø ce ge kømm-ɑ wöönɑ, de pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́ör gen. O cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, ge orumø kinni møgɑni ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen!" 
Ezekiel13:7 Ge köbbɑ’ köbbø kinni: Møg-ɑ cɑrri yi wun pɑth kidyër, o møg-ɑ rømmi yi wun bɑ pyed. Wu okööbø kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́köbbi wun, de wu nuti köbbi yɑn!”" 
Ezekiel13:8 Bene ɑ köbbi gen yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kwøbbi wun pɑth ki dyër, o møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑr yi wun bɑ pyed, kì bɑng menɑni riɑ lugɑ’ wun." 
Ezekiel13:9 Wu cɑyɑ’ cɑyø, wu jøtöng møg-ɑ cɑr kwøbb-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, ɑ rɑng kwøbbi pyed. Wu pɑ cuggi bëëdø kì kelli jiɑ; nyingi wun pɑ gweed kelli tyëng Isrɑil, wu pɑ kedhi yij piny Isrɑil. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Jiɑ ɑ́buudh yi jøtöng kɑ̀ kööb gen i dɑ mër, o mër bong gøn! Jiɑ ɑ́gëëd ki dörø ki tuggi kïtti mø lɑngø kì kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ gøj yi jøtöng ki jïr." 
Ezekiel13:11 Köbbí jøtöng møgɑni kinni dörø mi gen ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Yɑ óöni ki kødh me teg, o pï ódyëm, kɑ ɑtunø kön-ɑ ri dörɑni." 
Ezekiel13:12 Dörɑni ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kɑ ji ópëjjø kinni, ɑ́gøne gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi jïr-ɑ ɑ́gøjii?”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: “Yɑ ókɑ̈ni ki yømø me teeg, kí ɑ́piy, kí kødh me teeg ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, o ge dhur gen dörɑni piny." 
Ezekiel13:14 Dör-ɑ ɑ́gøj yi gen ki jïr dhurɑ’ piny, o wïje pɑ̈ɑ̈re ki piny, o tuggi kïtt-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑg tyele döng gen ge ónënnø. Ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh kɑ wu nɑ̈ge bënn. Codhe, o yod yi ji bënn kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel13:15 “O tegɑ yod yi dörɑni geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gøjii ki jïr. Codhe, o wu köbbɑ kinni dörø ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́gøjii ki jïr," 
Ezekiel13:16 ɑ løg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Yerusɑlem kinni i dɑ mër e bong mër yøw!” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Ezekiel13:17 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Anɑn, wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lidh nyigi pödhi wun møg-ɑ nyi töng kwøbb-ɑ rømmi yi gen, kɑ ge köbbí kinni: Áyïmø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni;" 
Ezekiel13:18 Ri wun dɑ cyën, wu tyëng-ɑ köjji ji ki wɑ̈jji bɑ̈dd geki wënni wɑ̈ɑ̈th, kipe kinni o wu bëëd wun, yï wun dɑ tegø kì kömi wëyi gen. Wu yɑb-ɑ wëyi jiɑ, o wu dwɑddu yieli wëyi wun."
