Ezekiel13:19 Kɑ yɑ nyi bwöl wun kì bøli jiɑ kipe kinni o wu yïddi wun ki ceir geki ópùn mø nøg yøw. Wu nɑ̈g-ɑ tyëng-ɑ pɑ dwɑddi kinni o ge thøw gen, o wu wiy wun tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi kinni o ge thøw gen; kí kenyi köbbu jiɑ ki pyed, kɑ gø nyi yïëy gen.”" 
Ezekiel13:20 Anɑn Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi gwøg yi wun gɑ møg mïdhi wun wëyi ji, mɑɑn yi yɑn;" 
Ezekiel13:21 ge ócöödɑ wɑ̈g kì bɑ̈ddi wun, kɑ jiɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈g kì cinggi wun. Ge pɑ cigi mïdhø yi wun; codhe o yod yi wun kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel13:22 “Pëthi tyëngdøj ɑ́wëggu nyönhø yi kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi wun, e pɑth ki yɑn ɑ ɑ́dwɑddii kinøw. Kɑ tyëngrijjø cwɑg wun, o ge cög ge pɑ wïyi ki yëth-ɑ rijjø mø gen, o ge di yiel." 
Ezekiel13:23 Kì bɑng menɑni, cyɑ̈ri pyed geki rɑɑng wun, kej gen ɑ́pöödh. Jiɑ yielɑ’ yielø kì cinggi wun, codhe o yod yi wun kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Abëën jøgdøngi Isrɑil møøgø be pyëji yɑn ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Ezekiel14:2 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, jøg pëthi gen ɑ́mëggi gen ngïjji jwögg, o ri gen ɑ́wëggi gen peej yij orøg yi jwöggɑni. Ge orumø kinni pyëjji gen óløøg yi yɑn?" 
Ezekiel14:4 “Anɑn köbbí gen møg-ɑ köbbɑ gen, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: ngeti Isrɑil men-ɑ́ pyëwe ɑ́mëgge ngïjji jwögg, kɑ ree wëgge peej yij orøg yi gïn, kɑ bï-ɑ be pëjjø ki jɑltöng, møge óløøgɑ, de ge óløøgɑ kɑ møg-ɑ di løøgɑ kwøbbi ngïjji jwögge!" 
Ezekiel14:5 Ngïjji jwöggɑni tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́peej gen pɑ̈l kì yij yuuɑ, de pëthi gen ódwöög yij yuuɑ yi møg-ɑ óløøg yi yɑn." 
Ezekiel14:6 “Anɑn, köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Dwöög wun kɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ rijjø mø wun, wiy wun." 
Ezekiel14:7 “Dhɑnhø bëne kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli gen men-ɑ ólugi ngɑ̈je yɑn, kɑ mɑll-ɑ jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ kedh-ɑ be pëjjø ki jɑltöng, yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ óløøg møge!" 
Ezekiel14:8 Riɑ ólugɑ en kɑ gwøgɑ ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe ji, ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli jiɑ, codhe o yod yi wun kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Keløg jɑltöng óthɑb kɑ otöngø ki kwøb mø pɑth ki dyër, bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́thɑbii. Cingɑ órïjjɑ en, kɑ nɑ̈gɑ kì kelli jiɑ tyëng Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel14:10 Jɑltöng geki jɑl-ɑ ɑ́pyëjjii, cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑy gen bɑ ɑ́kyel." 
Ezekiel14:11 Møgɑni ógwøg yi yɑn, kipe kinni o bëëd e bong ngɑn ywëdh ree ki orøg. Ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel14:12 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, keløg pödhø ógöögø ki orøg kɑ ciggɑ ocögø gï pɑ mïdhe, cingɑ órïïjɑ kɑ gïgcɑmmi gen rënyɑ. Yɑ óöni ki kɑ̈j kɑ ji nɑ̈gɑ kyeel geki lɑ̈yy." 
Ezekiel14:14 Cɑgg jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g møg di bëëd ge nud kì kelli gen, ɑ løg Nöö, kí Dɑniel, kí Ayub, døøji gen di yiel-ɑ wëyi gen keti gen.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel14:15 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wɑlɑ̀ yɑ ócuggø önø ki lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø, kɑ piny rënyi gen, kɑ bong-ɑ ji mø weli kì yij pödhø," 
Ezekiel14:16 cɑgg jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g di bëëd ge nud, yɑn ɑ kööbø, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, nyigi gen pɑ di cuggi yielø yi gen; ge di yiel-ɑ ri gen keti gen, kɑ piny di döng ɑ́ ryɑng." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Wɑlɑ̀ yɑ di kɑ̈ni yij pödhø ki liny me nɑ̈g ji kyeel geki lɑ̈yy," 
Ezekiel14:18 o cɑgg jøgɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g di løg-ɑ mø nud kì pönhɑni, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, nyigi gen pɑ di cuggi yielø yi gen; ge di yiel-ɑ ri gen keti gen." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Keløg yɑ di ör-ɑ yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g yij pödhø, kɑ ji mø gïïr nɑ̈gɑ ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, kí lɑ̈yy thyew," 
Ezekiel14:20 cɑgg Nöö, kí Dɑniel, kí Ayub di bëëd ɑ pönhɑni, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; ge pɑ di cuggi yieli nyigi gen; døøji gen di yiel-ɑ wëyi gen keti gen.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cɑ́yɑ, cɑ́y-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ge óörɑ kömi Yerusɑlem, ɑ løg liny, kí kɑ̈j kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø, kí rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, o ji nɑ̈g yi gen kyeel geki jɑmmi gen." 
Ezekiel14:22 Keløg e ódi dhɑnhø men-ɑ óbodh, kɑ nyige yiele, ge ólidh yi wun keny-ɑ óbëën gen yï wun, o óyod yi wun kinni cɑ́y-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi Yerusɑlem bɑ dyër ceth," 
Ezekiel14:23 codhe o yod yi wun kinni ge nuti wɑ̈dhi yɑn kɑ cɑyø yøw.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel15:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ɑ́ ngø ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r oløg geki yɑdh? Á ngø ɑ døøj kì ri bɑ̈ddi oløg, ɑ cuggi gen ki pɑ̈rø ki yenhi wɑg?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Dɑ gïn cuggi gwøgø ki bɑɑd oløg? Yï ócuggø gwøg ki gɑrø me ree nyi ngɑ̈bbi ki jɑmmì ki bɑɑd oløg? 
Ezekiel15:4 Døøj kɑ cwɑgi mɑc yøw. O kɑ̀ rum bɑ̈dde geki tyele ki rɑ̈bø kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ belø, dɑ gïn døj me gwøgii?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ábëëd e bong gïndøj kì ree ceth e nuti rɑ̈bø. Anɑn kɑ ɑ́rume rɑ̈bø kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ belø, ɑ́ti gwøg e bong pere.”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Anɑn Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ni kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l oløg kì wɑg kɑ rɑ̈b, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem ókwɑny yi yɑn," 
Ezekiel15:7 kɑ ge cɑyɑ. Ge ɑ́bodh kì dhø mɑc, o ge ceg kɑ cɑmø ceth yi mɑny-ɑ kyeelø. Óyod yi wun keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ gen, kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel15:8 Pönhï ówiy yi yɑn e dööng nøw, mɑ́ ciggɑ nuti mïdhø yi gen.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel16:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti kinni," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, nyudhí Yerusɑlem rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Ezekiel16:3 Köbbí Yerusɑlem kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ɑ́nywøl-ɑ piny Kɑnɑɑn. Wïyí bɑ kwɑɑr Amör, o meyí bɑ kwɑɑr Kit." 
Ezekiel16:4 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yïn, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́ngøl gudí, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kwër yïn kinni o dëlí di dhïwe, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́nyøng yïn ki omelø, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́kum yïn ki ógødh." 
Ezekiel16:5 Bong ngɑn mɑ yije ɑ́ywöngi kiperí, kɑ yï gögge jɑmmɑni. Keny-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yïn, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yïn. Yï ɑ́wedd-ɑ pɑ̈l." 
Ezekiel16:6 “Codhe ɑbëënɑ yɑ cyɑ̈dhi kɑ wɑ̈dhɑ, ɑlidhɑ yïn yï owɑnyyø kì yij remí. Yï ɑ́bëëd yï cödhø yi remø, de yï nuti wiy yɑn, o yï thøw." 
Ezekiel16:7 Kɑ yï wëggɑ piidhø ni yɑdh. Agöög yï pëddi myëërø. Yï ɑ́døngi kɑ yï ójurrø. Thïnhhí ɑ́twïy kɑ yëyyí óbɑ̈rø, de yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw ri bong ógødh." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́cigɑ dwöögø, ɑlidhɑ en kinni bøli kej mɑ̈ɑ̈dø ɑ́bï kì yïí. Akumɑ yïn ki ógødhɑ kipe kɑ̀ cyɑ̈dhí nøw. Codhe, ɑköngɑ kinni yï ónywømɑ, ɑgöög yïn ɑ́ miɑ.” Bene gen møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Codhe ɑkɑ̈bbɑ ki pï, kɑ remɑni lwöögɑ wɑ̈g kì rií. Agïnyɑ yïn ki møøw dhetun." 
Ezekiel16:10 Kɑ yï ruugɑ ki ógødh me thøø yi kwenø, kɑ yï nëngɑ ki wɑrri dël mø myëër, kí thɑrɑ̀ men-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm, kí ɑ́ywödh me bɑ ɑrir." 
Ezekiel16:11 Kɑ cinggí geki yedhí ruugɑ ki tigg-ɑ per gen teg. 
Ezekiel16:12 Kɑ yï nëngɑ ki gweli órøm geki gïi yïthh, kí bɑrukɑ̀ me myëër." 
Ezekiel16:13 Kɑ yï nëngɑ ki jɑmmi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, o yï nyi rug-ɑ ógudh mø myëër mø thøø yi cwɑ̈jø ki kor-ɑ yöm, kí ɑrir. Yï ɑ́cɑm-ɑ ɑwɑj me pëddi døøjø, kí møøw kïc geki møøw dhetun. Kɑ yï ómyërrø; de yï ceg-ɑ ogwel ni bɑ̈rɑ̈dh." 
Ezekiel16:14 Kɑ per myërí lïngi kì yethi pödhh bënn, mɑ́ yɑn ɑ ɑ́gwøg yïn yï myëër cɑrø kinøw.” Bene gen møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel16:15 “De myërí geki ngɑ̈nyi perí ɑ́göög gɑ møg yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki cwøw; kɑ yï nyi wɑ̈dhi niin yi jɑl bï e cyɑ̈dhi ɑ́ wëli yöö. 
Ezekiel16:16 Kɑ kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø pëdhí ki ógudhí, o ge myërri gen. Kɑ yï ogöögø yïn ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, ki yöö me nuti pɑ̈nyø lidhø, wɑlɑ̀ me koo døøg lidhø këti." 
Ezekiel16:17 Kɑ jɑmmi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn göög ki ngïjji cwøw, kɑ yï niin yi gen." 
Ezekiel16:18 Kɑ ógudh-ɑ thøø yi rødø møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn kwɑɑny, kɑ ge kum ngïjjɑni, kɑ møøw dhetun geki bɑkur cïb bøli gen." 
Ezekiel16:19 Kɑ gïncɑm-ɑ døj, kí møøw dhetun, ki møøw kïc møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ yïn mëggí gen gɑ gëdhhì mø mïni pëthi gen.” Bene gen møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel16:20 “Codhe, kɑ nywøl-ɑ ɑ́nyöllí yɑn gɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn ngɑ̈llí ngïjjɑni gɑ gëdhhì. Yï orumø kinni yɑɑbí ki cwøw kì bølɑ bɑ gïjø me lweny?" 
Ezekiel16:21 Kɑ nyigɑ tiir ki ngɑ̈lli ngïjjì! 
Ezekiel16:22 Ki bëën-ɑ bëëd yi yïn, yïn ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi ɑnɑn, yï nuti wöl pɑ̈dø ki bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e yïí bong ógødh, yï wɑnyy-ɑ yij remí.”" 
Ezekiel16:23 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Rií dɑ cyën! Yï ɑ́göög ki rɑj mø døngø," 
Ezekiel16:24 Yï ɑ́gëëd ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì tøggi yëëth, kɑ yï ogöögø ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi." 
Ezekiel16:25 Myërí ɑ́rënyi, kɑ rií nyi mëggí cwøw møg-ɑ nyi bï bënn yethi cyɑ̈ng, ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi ɑ́lod yi yïn." 
Ezekiel16:26 Yï ɑ́niin yi jø Rïp pönh-ɑ butí, jøg-ɑ ngëti gen døngø, kɑ pyëwɑ wëggi rënyø yi orøgí." 
Ezekiel16:27 “Anɑn cingɑ ɑ́tïngɑ mɑl kipe cɑyi yïn, kí kwɑnyi gyëdh kì yïí. Kì bɑng rɑ̈ji bëëdí, yï ɑ́cïbɑ cinggi tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Yï ɑ́niin yi jøgi Acuur, mɑ́ yijí nuti kwöjø yi møg-ɑ kyeelø, de pyëwí nuti kwöjø thyew." 
Ezekiel16:29 Yï ɑ́niin yi jø Bɑbïl jøngyew, de yijí nuti kwöjø yi gen thyew.”" 
Ezekiel16:30 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Á pyëw me cödhø ni ngø ɑ yïí, ɑgöög ki rɑj mø ni møg, yï bɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi me wïje pɑ nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈y!" 
Ezekiel16:31 Yï ɑ́gëëd ki kɑ̈jji mɑlli ngïjjì kì tøggi yëëth, kɑ yï ogöögø ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. De yï pɑ yɑb ngyëny ni tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel16:32 Yï nɑ ngɑn nyi niin yi cwøw møøgø kibøli ke di mɑɑre jɑlgøle. 
Ezekiel16:33 Ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi bɑ en ɑ nyi thödhi ki ngyëny yi cwøw, de yöd ɑ́ yïn ɑ nyi thödhi cwøwí ki jɑmmì, o ge bï gen be niin ki yïn kì wɑ̈thi ótøng bënn." 
Ezekiel16:34 Yï bɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi me bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki møg-ɑ kyeelø. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïri yïn bëëdø yïn ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. O yï pɑ nyi køøg, dɑ́ yïn ɑ cudi gen! Yï bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi.”" 
Ezekiel16:35 Anɑn, Yerusɑlem, ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi! Lïngi møg-ɑ kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel16:36 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ógudhí ɑ́pyëëd wɑ̈g ni ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, kɑ rií mëggí cwøwí geki ngïjjí, ngïjj-ɑ cödhø, kɑ nyigí ngɑ̈lli gen gɑ gëdhhì." 
Ezekiel16:37 Kipe møgɑni bënn, cwøwí ócungɑ; cwøw-ɑ mɑɑr yi yïn geki møg-ɑ mɑɑn yi yïn. Yï ówëggɑ tyeeg dïdyërø yi gen, o ógudhí pyëëdɑ wɑ̈g, o yï lidh yi gen yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw." 
Ezekiel16:38 Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe yɑb ki cwøw geki nɑ̈g ki ji, yï cɑy yi yɑn kɑ thøø, o pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m." 
Ezekiel16:39 Yï cïbɑ’ cinggi gen, o kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møgí dhur gen piny, kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki cwøw, ɑ yethi gen ɑ́mɑlli ngïjjì. Jɑmmi dhwɑ̈ngí geki ógudhí ókwɑny yi gen, kɑ yï odöngø yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Yï ókölli gen ji, o yï bɑ̈lli ki tuggi kïttì, o yï ngølli yi gen ki pil." 
Ezekiel16:41 Kɑ̈llí órɑ̈b yi gen ki mɑc, kɑ cɑ́yí wëggi gen lidhø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn bënn. Yɑɑbí ki cwøw ócuungɑ; o yï ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ thödhi cwøwí ki jɑmmì geki ngyëny." 
Ezekiel16:42 O pyëwɑ kwöje, o yɑ cögɑ yɑ pɑ mɑg yi liny geki tyiel këti." 
Ezekiel16:43 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́wiil wïjí, ki gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ yïn keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yï thinh, kɑ pyëwɑ wëggí rënyø yi gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn. Bene ɑ wëggɑ yïn coli møgɑni ki orɑng. Á kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́kedhí be yɑb ki cwøw kì kömi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg bënn?” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel16:44 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ógɑj yi ji ki gɑ́j møg: Yerusɑlem, ‘Nyɑn-ɑ bɑ cyɑ̈ni meye.’" 
Ezekiel16:45 Yï bɑ nyɑɑr meyí kidyër. Jɑlgøle geki nyige mɑɑn yi en. Yï nɑ nyiimyëw womɑ̈nn-ɑ mɑɑn cwøwi gen geki nyigi gen. Yïn, wuki kɑ̈dd-ɑ butí, meyi wun bɑ kwɑɑr Kit, o wïyi wun bɑ kwɑɑr Amör." 
Ezekiel16:46 “Nyimyëw nyɑndwøng bɑ Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ geki myërre kì wɑɑng wuudø. Nyimyëw nyɑnthinh bɑ Sødømɑ̀ geki myërre kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl. 
Ezekiel16:47 Yï ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ ngøyi rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen? Mø gen nøg, mií ɑ́pëddi rɑ̈jø.”" 
Ezekiel16:48 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, okööbø kinni, “Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; yɑ kwøb-ɑ kinni nyimyëw Sødømɑ̀ geki myërre nuti göögø ki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn." 
Ezekiel16:49 Sødømɑ̀ geki nywøle ɑ́bëëd ge ceg-ɑ thwøgø mɑ́ yï gen ɑ́dɑ gïgcɑmm mø ngenyø, o ge ɑ́ying-ɑ yij mër, e bong gïn böggi yi gen, de ge nuti rumø kiper tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn geki tyëng-ɑ jɑdø." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ge ɑ́thwøg kɑ muddi gen ótëngø, ɑgöög gen ki gïg-ɑ mɑɑn yi yɑn, codhe ɑrënyɑ gen ni kɑ̀ ngɑ̈nyií." 
Ezekiel16:51 “Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ nuti göögø ki budi orøgí. Rií ɑ́cöödh kibøli gen. Kɑ̀ pɑ̈ɑ̈r yïn ki gen, ge nënni e dhɑ̈y ce bong rɑj mø gwøøg gen." 
Ezekiel16:52 Anɑn tyëddí ɑyɑ̈rí. Orøgí dwøng cɑrø kibøli orøøg nyiimyëw, ge nënni yï gen bɑ̈r kibølí; tyëddí ɑyɑ̈rí mɑ́ nyiimyëw nënni ge dhïw.”" 
Ezekiel16:53 Yerusɑlem ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ge ówëggɑ dönyø këti, eni Sødømɑ̀ geki myërre, kí Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ geki myërre. O yï ódwøøgɑ kejí thyew." 
Ezekiel16:54 Yï óyɑ̈r, o ɑyɑ̈rí bɑ en ɑ ónyodh døøji nyiimyëw." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ge ódøøg ki dönyø geki myërri gen, kí yïn, wuki myërrí thyew." 
Ezekiel16:56 Sødømɑ̀ nuti gɑggø yi yïn kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́thwøøg; 
Ezekiel16:57 kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg nuti nyodhø? Anɑn yï ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki en, yï ceg kɑ gɑggø yi tyëng Edöm geki tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, kí pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi, ɑ mɑɑn yïn." 
Ezekiel16:58 Wiy yï rɑngí kì bɑng gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel16:59 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï göggɑ’ gïg ni gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, mɑ́ lwöbø ɑ́pɑ̈d yi yïn kɑ cigg pyem yi yïn." 
Ezekiel16:60 De lwöm-ɑ kɑɑmee ómïdhɑ; eni lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi wɑ yï nudd yï thiinh, o ócïb yi yɑn ceth ɑ́ lwöm-ɑ ógïti ɑtheer." 
Ezekiel16:61 Codhe, o rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøøg pɑɑr, o wïjí lɑ̈ɑ̈ye keny-ɑ ódøøg nyiimyëw kɑ̈jji gen, eni nyɑndwøng geki nyɑnthinh. Ge ówëggɑ bëëdø ni nyigí, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ nuti lwøøb wɑ møgɑni." 
Ezekiel16:62 Lwöbø miee ódwøøg wɑ keje, o yod yi yïn kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel16:63 Lɑɑwɑ ódwöögɑ piny kipe bɑ̈jjí, de ge ópɑɑr yi yïn kɑ dhøgí ódhɑ̈lø yiebø kì bɑng ɑyɑ̈rí.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel17:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí gɑ́j møg tyëng Isrɑil," 
Ezekiel17:3 o gïn-ɑ köbbɑ gen, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yod yi gen. Ádɑ cor me dwøng, me óköne myëër, o obërre dɑdɑɑr. Obërre ɑ́pere, kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ Kïtti Lubnɑn ɑkɑ̈bbe ki bɑɑd yɑdh sɑndɑl," 
Ezekiel17:4 kɑ gø kïdhe piny Kɑnɑɑn, pödhi tyëng ngyew." 
Ezekiel17:5 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈bbe ki okewi oløg kì piny Isrɑil, ɑmiine gøn yij lɑ̈bø me med, me yije di pï mø gïïr." 
Ezekiel17:6 Kɑ okewɑni onyogø, kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ oløg me mulli. Bɑ̈dde ɑ́mølli wɑ̈thi gen nenn-ɑ mɑl kun-ɑ di cor, kɑ byerre otwïyø ge töng-ɑ piny. Kɑ tyeli oløngɑni kum yi bɑ̈dd geki yïthh." 
Ezekiel17:7 “Ádɑ cor megø me dwøng thyew, me obërre dɑdɑɑr, o óköne gïïr. Codhe, kɑ oløngɑni byerre geki yïthhe løge o ge nenni gen tuung corɑni, e orumø cem e ónëngi yi corɑni ki pï mø ngenyø kibøli møg-ɑ ying yij bɑng-ɑ ɑ́twïye." 
Ezekiel17:8 De oløngɑni ɑ́rum ki pidhø kì yij lɑ̈m-ɑ med, ɑ pɑ̈ng yi pï kipe kinni o yïthhe twïy gen, o kɑ̈ne ki nywøl, o bëëde ɑ́ oløg me myër." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Codhe, ɑpëjjɑ yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: oløngɑni óbëëdø kɑ ódøngø? Ócög e pɑ puth wɑ̈g yi coor tyeli mɑl, kɑ nywøle pune wɑ̈g, kɑ bɑ̈dde ngølle o thwøwe? Puthe óbëëd e yööd; koo dwɑddi pödhø me teg wɑlɑ̀ tegø me dwøng." 
Ezekiel17:10 Bɑ ɑpidh kidyër, de óbëëdø kɑ ódøngø? Koo thwøw keny-ɑ óköddi köme yi yømi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl? Koo thwøøw keje?”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Pyëj gøl pëëmø menɑni, keløg gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gɑ́jɑni yood gen. Köbbí gen kinni rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́bï Yerusɑlem, kɑ rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈gge kïdhe Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Ezekiel17:13 Kɑ ge olwöbø ki kɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈lli rɑ̈dh, kɑ gø köbbe köngø kinni lwömɑni ómïdhi yi en. Kɑ okɑ̈dø ki jøg per gen teg gɑ ɑmɑgg," 
Ezekiel17:14 Kipe kinni o pödhø cöge e pɑ dhwödhi mɑl këti, o köngɑni mïdhi ceth." 
Ezekiel17:15 De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́ngɑ̈nyi wɑ̈ye, kɑ öd-ɑ Rïp ki ji kinni o thödhi ki kyënyì kí jøliny. Møge ópɑ̈dhi? Ódi twïy wɑ̈g? Lwöbø ópɑ̈d yi en kɑ obodhø e pɑ cɑy?" 
Ezekiel17:16 “Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; Rɑ̈nhɑni thøw-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, mɑ́ lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm gen ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ɑ ɑ́rønyii, ɑ́pɑ̈d yi en." 
Ezekiel17:17 Cɑgg ɑ́ liny-ɑ dwøng, liny rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp pɑ cuggi kønyii ki nyɑɑg ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ keny-ɑ ókuny gen ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈nni, kɑ ge othurø ki óthørr-ɑ nenni kɑɑl, kipe kinni o ge nɑ̈ɑ̈g gen ki ji mø gïïr." 
Ezekiel17:18 Ápɑ̈d-ɑ könge geki lwöbø. Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́gwøge, o pɑ pɑ̈nyi bødhø.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈de lwöm-ɑ́ ree ɑ́könge ki nyingɑ ce gø ómïdhe." 
Ezekiel17:20 Bøyɑ leengɑ’ köme, o mɑg yi gøn; kïdhɑ’ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o cɑyɑ kì kunɑni, mɑ́ ciggɑ nuti mïdhø yi en." 
Ezekiel17:21 Jølinye ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, møg-ɑ óbodh ótɑɑy wɑ̈thi tùngi piny bënn. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ókɑ̈bbi kì ri yɑdh sɑndɑl me bɑ̈r kì oledhe yɑ ótor men-ɑ yöm; o piidhɑ wïj kït me bɑ̈r." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ópiidhɑ wïj kïn-ɑ bɑ̈r kì Isrɑil. Bɑ̈dde ótwïy kɑ onywølø kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ yɑdh sɑndɑl me dwøng. Winy bënn óbëëdø kì wïje ge óywömø kì tïbe. 
Ezekiel17:24 Óyod yi yenh-ɑ pinyɑni bënn kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yenh-ɑ bɑ̈rrø nyi ngølɑ’ piny kɑ yenh-ɑ thønhø wëggɑ døngø. Yenh-ɑ mɑr nyi göjjɑ’ wøwø kɑ yenh-ɑ wøwø wëggɑ mɑ̈rø. Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ ógwøgɑ ceth.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Wude ɑ cög wu kømm-ɑ gɑ́j møg kì yij piny Isrɑil? ‘Oløng-ɑ wɑj ɑ́cɑm-ɑ yi tyëngdøngø, kɑ yöd ɑ́ othønhø ɑ dhøggi gen wɑ̈nyyi.’" 
Ezekiel18:3 “Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø; gɑ́jɑni koo kømmi kì Isrɑil këti." 
Ezekiel18:4 Wëyi ji bënn ying-ɑ cingɑ, wëyi wëëg geki mëëg, kí wëyi nywøl. Ngɑn-ɑ órøngø, en ɑ óthøw." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Keløg dhɑnhø tir, o gøgg-ɑ dyër ceth;" 
Ezekiel18:6 o ngïjji jwöggi Isrɑil pɑ nyi mɑlli yi en, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwöggɑni kì yethi kenggi gen; o cï jɑlø megø pɑ nyi nywɑl yi en, wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi buddi ki ngɑn kwër dwɑ̈ye;" 
Ezekiel18:7 o pɑ nyi rujø, o pɑ nyi kɑ̈bbi ki gïi ngɑn megø; de gïn-ɑ wïdhii nyi dögge’ wɑ̈n, o ngɑn ree di kɑ̈j nyii thödhø yi en ki gïncɑm, kɑ ngɑn cyɑ̈dhi nøw nyi nënge ki ógødh;" 
Ezekiel18:8 o gïn-ɑ ɑ́wïdhe dhɑnhø pɑ nyi col e nywølø, o pɑ nyi yïëy ki gwøg ki rɑj, o nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër kì kelli ji," 
Ezekiel18:9 o ciggɑ mïdhe’ mïdhø ceth; bene ngɑntir o nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër, ngɑnɑni ónëënø.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Ke nywøle ki wɑ̈d me rujø o ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g, o ogöögø ki gïgrijjø bënn," 
Ezekiel18:11 møg-ɑ nuti gwøgø yi wïye, o ocyɑ̈mø ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg kì yethi kenggi gen, o nyi kedh-ɑ ri mɑ̈nni ji møøgø," 
Ezekiel18:12 o tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn nyii rujø yi en, kɑ jɑmmi gïn nyi kɑbe; o gïn-ɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ggii pɑ nyi dögge wɑ̈n; nyi kedh-ɑ yethi kenggi jwögg-ɑ pɑth kɑ gï nyi mɑlle," 
Ezekiel18:13 o gïn-ɑ ɑ́wïdhe dhɑnhø nyi col e nywølø; ngɑnɑni koo nëënø, mɑ́ e ɑ́göög ki rɑj; ceg-ɑ thøø, o cyënne óying-ɑ köme." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Ke nywøle ki wɑ̈de kɑ orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wïye bëne lidhe, de nuti ngöyø ki orɑngɑni," 
Ezekiel18:15 o nuti mɑlli ngïjji jwöggi Isrɑil, o nuti cɑm ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli gen kì yethi kenggi gen; o bong cï jɑlø megø mɑ ɑ́nywɑle;" 
Ezekiel18:16 wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́ruje, o gïn-ɑ mɑ̈ggii nyi dwøøge’ dwøøgø; o ngɑn ree di kɑ̈j nyii nëngø yi en ki gïncɑm, kɑ ngɑn cyɑ̈dhi nøw nënge ki ógødh;" 
Ezekiel18:17 o nyii bɑ̈nyø ki gwøg ki rɑj, o gïn-ɑ wïdhe dhɑnhø pɑ nyi col e nywølø; o ciggɑ nyi mïdhe’ mïdhø ceth; pɑ thøw kipe orøøg wïye de ónëënø ceth." 
Ezekiel18:18 De wïye, mɑ́ e ɑ́ruj kɑ okɑ̈ɑ̈bø, kɑ ogöögø ki rɑj kì kelli ji, en ɑ óthøw kì bɑng orøge." 
Ezekiel18:19 “De wu okööbø kinni, ‘Ede wɑ̈d ɑ pɑ thuwe orøøg wïye?’ Wɑ̈d ɑ́gøgg-ɑ dyër; ciggɑ ɑ́mïdhe bënn, kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng gïn, bene ɑ bɑnge nëëne ceth." 
Ezekiel18:20 Ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́røngi en ɑ óthøw, wɑ̈d pɑ thuw orøøg wïye, o wïy pɑ thuw orøøg wɑ̈de. Ngɑntir ókøøg kipe døøje, o ngɑnrɑj ócɑy kì bɑng rɑ̈je." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Keløg ngetorøg ówïyø ki orøg, kɑ døøg-ɑ be gwøg ki gïgdøj, kɑ ciggɑ mïdhe kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø kì bɑng gïn, ngɑnɑni ónëënø ceth." 
Ezekiel18:22 Lɑ́ɑ̀w ódwöög piny kipe orøge bëne, kɑ onëënø mɑ́ e ɑ́göög ki gïgdøj.”" 
Ezekiel18:23 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëj-ɑ wun kinni, “Wu orumø kinni pyëwɑ med ki lidhi ngɑn rɑj e othøø? Pɑth, lɑ̈w-ɑ́ ke lidhɑ en e óyewø kipe kinni o nëëne." 
Ezekiel18:24 “De keløg ngɑntir ówïyø ki gøggi gïgdøj, kɑ døøg-ɑ be gøggi rɑj, ónëënø? Pɑth! Pɑ nëënø, bong ngɑn ópɑrri gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge, mɑ́ e ɑ́wïyi ki mïdhi yïëye, kɑ døøg-ɑ be orøg." 
Ezekiel18:25 “De wu okööbø kinni i gïn-ɑ gwøg yi Jwøk pɑth ki dyër. Adɑ́ lïngu kwøbbɑ wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, gïg-ɑ gøggɑ ɑ pɑth ki dyër, wɑlɑ̀ gïg-ɑ gøggi yi wun ɑ pɑth ki dyër?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Keløg ngɑntir ówïyø gwøg ki gwøngdøj, kɑ døøg-ɑ be gwøg ki orøg kɑ othøø, thuw-ɑ orøge." 
Ezekiel18:27 Keløg ngɑnrɑj ówïyø ki orøg, kɑ døøg-ɑ be gwøg ki gïgdøj, wëye ɑ́yiele." 
Ezekiel18:28 Orøge ɑ́yode, ɑwiye gøn, bene ɑ koo thøwe, de ónëënø ceth." 
Ezekiel18:29 De wun, wu tyëng Isrɑil wu okööbø i Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ gøggi dyër. Yɑn ɑ pɑ gøggi dyër, wɑlɑ̀ wun ɑ pɑ gøggi dyër?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Anɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu cɑyɑ’ cɑyø, wu tyëng Isrɑil. De yewi wun, kɑ orøg wiy wun; o wu cög wu pɑ thøw." 
Ezekiel18:31 Wiyu orøng-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun bëne, kɑ ri wun göggi wun ki pëëth mø nyɑ̈n, wude ɑ dwɑddu thøø, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Pyëwɑ pɑ med ki thøwi dhɑnhø. Wiy wun orøg, o wu nëën wun.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel19:1 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i wörɑ wör møg, yɑ ywøg-ɑ nyiirɑ̈dhhi Isrɑil ɑ́ryew." 
Ezekiel19:2 Meyí ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ mɑɑdh ngur me ni ngø! Nyige ɑ́pidhe kì kelli ngurrì. 
Ezekiel19:3 Ákyel ɑ́pidhe kɑ gø pwönye ki dwɑr, kɑ odïdø ki cɑm ki ji." 
Ezekiel19:4 keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi pere yi pödhh, kɑ gø kunyi gen ki bur. Apeej ge gøn Rïp ki odöbb." 
Ezekiel19:5 Kɑ opïdø yi yïd geki ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Codhe ɑpwönye megø kì kelli nyige, kɑ ogöögø ɑ́ ngur me rɑj." 
Ezekiel19:6 keny-ɑ ɑ́dønge nyi cyɑ̈dhi kɑ ngurrì møøgø. Adïde ki dwɑr, kí cɑm ki ji thyew." 
Ezekiel19:7 Adhure ud piny kɑ kɑ̈dd rënye Jii pinyɑni nyi ceg-ɑ bwøgø kenyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈re. 
Ezekiel19:8 Acugi pödhh bënn be nyɑɑg ki gøn, ji ɑ́bï kì yij piny bëne. Aceg ge gøn ki ɑ́kɑ̈lli, kɑ gø mɑg gen." 
Ezekiel19:9 Akïdhi ge gøn yij ød me bɑ win, kɑ gø muuj gen rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀. Ámïdhi e ceg kɑ korø, o ngɑ̈re cöge e pɑ lïngi këti, kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel19:10 Meyí ɑ́bëëd e nɑ oløg men-ɑ ópiidh tøg nɑm Yïthhe geki nywøle ɑ́bëëd ge ngenyø mɑ́ pï ɑ́bëëd ge gïïr. 
Ezekiel19:11 Bɑ̈dde ɑ́bëëd ge teeg, ge ócuggø gwøgø gɑ loodh rɑ̈dh. Oløngɑni ɑ́bɑ̈ri kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ yij pøølø, kɑ ngenyi yïthhe geki bɑ̈re lidh yi ji bënn." 
Ezekiel19:12 De ɑ́puth ki rɑ̈ji pëëth, kɑ leeng piny. Nywøle ɑ́thwøw yi yømi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl Bɑ̈dde ɑ́tørri, kɑ ge othwøwø, kɑ ge rɑ̈b." 
Ezekiel19:13 Ópiidh-ɑ yij ryɑng ɑnɑn, yij piny-ɑ thwøwø, ɑ bong pï." 
Ezekiel19:14 Bɑ̈dde ɑ́gɑ̈mmi ki mɑc, kɑ yïthhe geki nywøle órɑ̈bø. Bɑ̈dde pɑ cigi tëngø, ge pɑ cuggi gwøgø gɑ loodh rɑ̈dh këti. Bene wöri ywøøg yij èn, nyi ceg kɑ wörø kɑ nyi cigi wörø." 
Ezekiel20:1 Kì pyɑ̈ri cyɑ̈nggi bïïj dwɑ̈tt, kì bïryeew runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́bëën kwï pëjji Isrɑil be pyëji yɑn ki gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny kì bølɑ." 
Ezekiel20:2 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí pëjji Isrɑil kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: wu ɑ́bï-ɑ be pyëji yɑn? Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, wu pɑ wëggɑ pyëji yɑn kipe gïïpiny. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel20:4 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ge ócuggø cɑyø yi yïn? Cɑy gen. Nyudhí gen rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kweyyi gen." 
Ezekiel20:5 Köbbí gen kinni yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, yɑ okööbø kinni, keny-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ Isrɑil, yɑ ɑ́köngi kipere. Kɑ riɑ nyudhɑ gen kì Rïp, kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen." 
Ezekiel20:6 Bɑ bøli kenyɑni, ɑ ɑ́köngɑ kinni ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp, o ge kïdhɑ yij piny-ɑ ɑ́myegɑ kiper gen; piny-ɑ yij mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, piny-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì kelli piny bënn." 
Ezekiel20:7 Aköbbɑ gen kinni weddi gen ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ ri gen ko bwöl gen ki gïn, mɑ́ bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen." 
Ezekiel20:8 De muddi gen ɑ́tëngi kɑ kwøbbɑ bɑny yi gen. Ngïjji gen nuti weddi gen, o jwöggi Rïp nuti bɑɑny gen. Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ cɑyi gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ kì Rïp." 
Ezekiel20:9 De ge nuti cɑɑy yɑn kipe nyingɑ ócödh kì yï tyëng-ɑ buti gïn bëëd yi gen. Anyudhɑ riɑ tyëngɑni keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp. 
Ezekiel20:10 “Codhe, ɑpëëjɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ ge kïdhɑ yij pɑ̈l." 
Ezekiel20:11 Aköbbɑ gen kwöngɑ kɑ ciggɑ pwönyɑ gen, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ nyi thödhi ngɑn-ɑ nyi mïdhi gen ki nënnì." 
Ezekiel20:12 Amëggɑ gen Sɑbɑth ɑ́ ngïji kì kɑɑm wøn, men nyi pɑ̈ddi gen kinni, bene yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ yɑn ɑ kwër gen." 
Ezekiel20:13 De tyëng Isrɑil muddi gen ɑ́tëngi ki yɑn kì yij ryɑng, ciggɑ ɑ́pyem gen, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki mïdhi kwöngɑ, eni kwöng-ɑ nyi thödhi ngɑn-ɑ mïdhii ki nënnì. Sɑbɑth ɑ́bwöl yi gen. Akööbɑ kinni rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ nyudhɑ’ gen, o ge nɑ̈gɑ kì yij ryɑng." 
Ezekiel20:14 De ge ɑ́wiy yi yɑn kipe nyingɑ ócödh kì kelli pödhh-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Ezekiel20:15 Codhe, ɑköngɑ kì yij ryɑng kinni ge pɑ kïdhɑ piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ gen; piny-ɑ yije mulli yi cɑg geki møøw kïc, piny-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì kelli pìny bënn," 
Ezekiel20:16 mɑ́ ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi ciggɑ, kɑ Sɑbɑth bwöl yi gen, mɑ́ pëthi gen ɑ́kedhi bɑng ngïjji jwöggi gen." 
Ezekiel20:17 “De pyëwɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn kì yij ryɑng." 
Ezekiel20:18 Aköbbɑ nyigi gen kinni: wu ko cyɑ̈dhi kì bɑng kwööng kweyyi wun, kɑ ciggi gen ko mïdhi wun, kɑ ri wun ko bwöl wun ki ngïjji jwöggi gen." 
Ezekiel20:19 Bene yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, nyi gwøg wun kwöngɑ kɑ ciggɑ mïdhi wun." 
Ezekiel20:20 Mïdhu Sɑbɑth ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër, o bëëde ɑ́ ngïji kì kɑɑmee, o nyi pɑ̈dde wun kinni, bene yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun." 
Ezekiel20:21 “De yɑ ɑ́bwöl yi rïnyɑni thyew. Ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi ciggɑ, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ nyi thödhi ngɑn-ɑ mïdhi gen ki nënnì. Sɑbɑth ɑ́bwöl gen. Akööbɑ kinni, rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ nyudhɑ’ gen, o ge di nɑ̈gɑ kì yij ryɑng." 
Ezekiel20:22 De ge ɑ́wiy yi yɑn kipe nyingɑ ócödh kì kelli pödhh-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ gen wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Ezekiel20:23 Aköngɑ kì yij ryɑng kinni ge ókedhhɑ kì kömi piny bëne," 
Ezekiel20:24 mɑ́ ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi mïdhi kwöngɑ, o ciggɑ ɑ́pyem yi gen. Kɑ Sɑbɑth bwöl gen, kɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth mɑlli gen ni kweyyi gen." 
Ezekiel20:25 “Codhe, ɑthödhɑ gen ki kwöng me pɑ døøj, kí cigg mø pɑ thödhi ngɑn-ɑ mïdhi gen ki nënnì." 
Ezekiel20:26 Awëggɑ gen ywëdhi ri gen ki gëdhhi gen, kɑ ge wëggɑ rɑ̈bi kɑyyi gen kɑyy-ɑ cwøw gɑ gëdhhì. Menɑni bɑ cɑ́yi gen kipe kinni o yod yi gen kinni yɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel20:27 “Anɑn wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, men bɑ yöö megø men-ɑ ɑ́bwööl yɑn yi kweyyi wun, kɑ yɑ wiy gen piny ni ngɑn wiy jɑlgøle piny." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ yij piny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbɑ kinni ómëggɑ gen. De keny-ɑ ɑ́lidh gen kïttì geki yenh-ɑ mɑr, ge ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈d ki gëdhhì kì thɑ̈thi gen bënn. Pyëwɑ ɑ́wëggi gen rënyø ki gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈b yi gen e yømi gen med geki kunyi møgi oløg." 
Ezekiel20:29 Apyëjɑ gen kinni; Á wɑ̈thi ótøng ɑ́, ɑ nyi kedhi yi wun? Codhe, ɑcwølli gen gɑ ótøng, këër bøli kenyɑni." 
Ezekiel20:30 Anɑn köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ okööbø kinni, ri wun ɑ́bwöl wun ni kweyyi wun, kɑ wu reng-ɑ bɑng ngïjji jwöggi gen." 
Ezekiel20:31 Kɑ wu omuujø ki gëdhhì, kɑ ri wun ywëdh wun ki rɑ̈bbi nyigi wun ngïjjɑni gɑ gëdhhì. O wu nudd wu bï-ɑ be pyëji gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn! Yɑn ɑ nëënø, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ pɑ yïëy ki pyëjø yi wun ki gïïpiny." 
Ezekiel20:32 Rumm-ɑ rømmi yi wun kinni wu ópɑ̈ɑ̈r ki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o wu nɑ jurri kömi piny, ɑ mɑlli yenh geki kïttì. De møgɑni koo cwöb." 
Ezekiel20:33 “Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bene Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø. O yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, wu jɑɑgɑ’ jɑɑgø ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ geki tegi cingɑ kí tegɑ bëne." 
Ezekiel20:34 Tegɑ geki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ ónyudhɑ wun, keny-ɑ ódwöögɑ wun kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́tɑɑy wun bënn." 
Ezekiel20:35 Wu ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ yij “Ryɑɑng pödhh” o wu cɑyɑ kì kunɑni wɑ nenn-ɑ nyingee ceth. 
Ezekiel20:36 Wu cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ɑnɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́cɑyɑ kweyyi wun kì yij Ryɑɑng Sinɑy.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Wu ókwøllɑ ki lodh, kɑ wu wëggɑ lïngi ciggɑ." 
Ezekiel20:38 Tyëngpëëmø geki tyëngorøg ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli wun. Ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì yij piny-ɑ yije bëëd yi gen ɑnɑn, de ge koo wëggɑ døøg piny Isrɑil, codhe o yod yi gen kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel20:39 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wun, wu tyëng Isrɑil, kedhi ngɑn be mɑlli ngïjji jwögge! De yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, keny-ɑ órum møgɑni, ciggɑ bɑ møg-ɑ ómïdhi yi wun ceth, o nyingɑ kwërø koo ywëdh yi wun ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi mëggu ngïjji jwöggi wun." 
Ezekiel20:40 Kì yij pödhø kì kunɑni, kì kïti kwërɑ, kïti Isrɑil kïn-ɑ bɑ̈r, yɑ ómɑl yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn, pyëwɑ ómïni ki gen, kɑ yɑ ócwöddø ki gëdhhì, kɑ gëdhhɑni geki gïgdøj møg-ɑ nyi muuj yi wun, kí jɑmmi kwër yïëyɑ." 
Ezekiel20:41 Keny-ɑ órumɑ ki dwöögi wun kì pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ wun, kɑ wu cøngɑ kej ɑ́kyel, gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b yi wun óyïëyɑ, o ólidh yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni yɑ bɑ kwërø." 
Ezekiel20:42 Óyod yi wun kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun piny Isrɑil; piny-ɑ ɑ́köngɑ kweyyi wun kinni ómëggɑ gen." 
Ezekiel20:43 Codhe, o gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun pɑr yi wun, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́ywëdh wun ri wun. Pëthi wun órënyi ki ri wun, kì bɑng rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun." 
Ezekiel20:44 Keny-ɑ ógöggɑ wun ki gïïpiny kipe nyingɑ, de pɑth kipe yëth-ɑ rijjø kí gïgrijjø mø wun, o yod yi wun, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil kinni yɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel20:45 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïïdh wɑɑng wurlwɑl kɑ yï tööng ki rɑjj-ɑ óbï köme geki thïm-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Ezekiel20:47 Köbbí thïm-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kinni lïnge kwøbb-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, yɑ kɑ̈n-ɑ kömí ki mɑc, yenh-ɑ yijí bënn rɑ̈bɑ’ rɑ̈bø; gen ɑ yenh-ɑ mɑr geki yenh-ɑ wøwø bënn. Bong gïn cuggi nɑ̈gii. Óköni kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti wɑɑng wuudø, o lëdhe óyod yi dhɑnhø bëne." 
Ezekiel20:48 O yod yi ji bënn kinni yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ni ki mɑnyɑni, o bong gïn cuggi nɑ̈gii.”" 
Ezekiel20:49 De yɑ ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Wuö Jwøk yɑ ko mëggi gwøg kinøw! Ji ceg-ɑ gøny i yɑ nyii ceg-ɑ gɑ́j.”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïïdh Yerusɑlem kɑ yï tööng ki rɑjj-ɑ óbï köme geki kɑ̈jji kwëre, kí piny Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel21:3 Köbbí piny Isrɑil kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki yïn. Pilø wöödhɑ’ wɑ̈g kì yij bøje, o wu nɑ̈gɑ bënn, tyëngdøj geki tyëngrijjø bënn." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ji bënn nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø ki pilɑ, cɑg kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl gïti wɑɑng wuudø." 
Ezekiel21:5 O yod yi ji bënn kinni yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pilɑ ɑ́wöödhɑ wɑ̈g, o pɑ dwøøgɑ yij bøj." 
Ezekiel21:6 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gööny ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí. Gööny ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí kì bøli ji bënn." 
Ezekiel21:7 Keløg yï ópyëj yi gen kinni, ‘Yïde ɑ gööny?’ Köbbí gen kinni yɑ gönyø kɑ per wöön-ɑ óbï; keny-ɑ óbëëne pëthi gen ópɑ̈ng yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, Cinggi gen ónyönhi kɑ pëthi gen ónyönhø thyew, cøngi gen ókïïr. Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́bï, ɑ́wɑ̈nhi.” Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel21:8 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø tööng; köbbí ji kinni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Pilø, pilø opɑgø, ocodhø." 
Ezekiel21:10 Opɑgø ɑ́ men nɑ̈ɑ̈g, ocodhø o gwele ni mɑl. Bong medi pëëth, mɑ́ jiɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li kyëddø, o cɑ́y bong per gen kì yï gen." 
Ezekiel21:11 Pilø ceg kɑ codhø ɑ́ men nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Ápɑg kɑ codh ɑ́ men cïb cingi nɑ̈ɑ̈g. 
Ezekiel21:12 Ywöngí kɑ yï kïïw, wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, pilɑni bɑ men nɑ̈ɑ̈g jiɑ geki pëjji Isrɑil bënn. Ge ceg kɑ nɑ̈gø geki ji-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Bong gïn ngɑ̈dh yi wun këti!" 
Ezekiel21:13 Yɑ rɑng-ɑ jiɑ, o keløg ge pɑ yewi, rɑjjɑni bënn pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi gen." 
Ezekiel21:14 “Anɑn wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tööng. Teng cinggí, o pilø nyi cige göjjø. Bɑ pilø me nɑ̈gø, o ceg kɑ böggø." 
Ezekiel21:15 Jiɑ ɑ́göjje böggø kɑ ge okïïrø. Kɑɑl gen göjjɑ’ böggø yi pilø, me rɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni mɑl, o bɑ mi nɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel21:16 Kïbí kì tuung cɑɑm geki tuung kyëj, yïn ɑ pil-ɑ bedh! Kïb kì wɑ̈thi tùng-ɑ løg rií bënn." 
Ezekiel21:17 Cinggɑ ópɑmɑ thyew, o pyëwɑ kwöje. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel21:18 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gwëëj ki yëëth ɑ́ryew møg yethi gen ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ e kɑ̈ll-ɑ pile. Yëthɑni ryeet cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ kej ɑ́kyel. Kɑ yï göög ki ngïji kì tøg yuu-ɑ kedhi kɑɑl." 
Ezekiel21:20 Yöö ɑ́kyel kedh-ɑ Rɑbɑ̀ kɑɑl tyëng Amön, o men-ɑ kyeelø kedhe Yeudiyɑ̀, e kedh-ɑ Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl dörø." 
Ezekiel21:21 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ócungø kì ɑ́kɑrri yëëth, e dwɑdd-ɑ yodi yuu-ɑ kedhe, ceg-ɑ tïm ki nywøli weth, o ceg-ɑ pyëj ki ngïjji jwögge, ceg-ɑ rɑng kì ri ócuny gënh-ɑ ɑ́ngɑle." 
Ezekiel21:22 Nywøli weth møg-ɑ cingi kyëje ɑ́nyudh-ɑ kuni Yerusɑlem, ge köbb-ɑ gøn kinni kedhe Yerusɑlem be liny. Kɑ linye kiwe, o kunye ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi pɑ̈ni, o ge cïbi gen piny ki gënggi ngyënyø møg gëng gen ri gen, kì bøli thïggi dörø." 
Ezekiel21:23 Tyëng Yerusɑlem koo yïëy ki møgɑni, mɑ́ ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ lwöm-ɑ ɑ́lwøb yi gen ki pɑ̈dø. De bɑ kipe pɑ̈ddi gen ki orøøg gen, kí kinni ge ómɑg." 
Ezekiel21:24 Bene møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: Orøøg wun ɑ́nyodh. Bɑ̈jji wun ngɑ̈nyi yi ji bënn. Orøøg wun ónënnø kì ri gwøøg wun. Wu ɑ́rum ki cɑyø, o wu cïbɑ’ cinggi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki wun." 
Ezekiel21:25 “Yïn, yï jɑngi Isrɑil, jɑng-ɑ cödhø, ɑ rɑj, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cɑɑy yïn obëënø." 
Ezekiel21:26 Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb. Kɑ̈ɑ̈l wëni wïjí wɑ̈g geki yɑ̈ɑ̈r wïjí. Jɑmmì koo ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen. Tïng tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈n mɑl! Kɑ tyëng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø dwöög cyɑ̈n!" 
Ezekiel21:27 Rɑj, rɑj! Kɑɑlɑni rënyɑ’ rënyø. De gïgɑni ógwøg-ɑ keny-ɑ óbëën ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ kipe cɑyi kɑɑlɑni. Codhe, o gø mëggɑ en." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Yïn, wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töng møg-ɑ kømmɑ, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, töng møg-ɑ köbbɑ tyëng Amön, tyëng-ɑ gwɑddi Isrɑil. Köbbí gen kinni, ‘Pilø, pilø rumø ki kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g; ɑ́ men nɑ̈ɑ̈g; ócodhø ɑ́ men nɑ̈ɑ̈g, o gwelle ni mɑl." 
Ezekiel21:29 Gïg-ɑ nenni yi wun pɑth ki dyër, o gïg-ɑ rømmi yi wun bɑ pyed. Wu rijjø, o cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng cɑyi wun obëënø. Pilø pɑ̈dh-ɑ muddi wun." 
Ezekiel21:30 “ ‘Cïb pilø piny! Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kì keny-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn, kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́nywøøl yïn." 
Ezekiel21:31 Rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ óngøøgɑ kömí e lyel nɑ mɑc. Yï ócïbɑ cinggi jøg mø yethi gen wöny, mø pëddi nɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel21:32 Remí ómulli kì yij pödhi wun. Yï órɑ̈b ki mɑc, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ópɑr yïn këti.’ ” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel22:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, rií gwiir yïn kipe cɑyi kɑɑl remø men? Nyudhí gïgrijjø bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Ezekiel22:3 Köbbí kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Mɑ́ ji mø gïïr ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn, kɑ rií bwööl kɑ ɑ́mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, bøli kejí ɑ́bï." 
Ezekiel22:4 Yï ɑ́bɑ̈jji kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g ki ji, kɑ rií bwööl kɑ ɑ́mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kiper kinøw cyɑ̈ngí ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, bøli kejí ɑ́wɑ̈nhi! Bene ɑ wëggɑ yïn gɑggø yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø geki kömi piny bëne." 
Ezekiel22:5 Yï ceg kɑ gɑggø yi pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi geki pödhh-ɑ lɑ̈wi, kì bɑng kɑ̀ pɑ mïdhí cigg kí kɑ ɑ́ywëëdh rií." 
Ezekiel22:6 Pëjji Isrɑil bënn ngɑ̈dh-ɑ tegi gen, o ge ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g ki ji." 
Ezekiel22:7 Wëëg tyëng kɑɑlɑni geki mëëg gen pɑ wør yi gen. Wëdhh nyi ceg kɑ rujø yi gen, kɑ thwömm geki kïjj nyingi gïn guud gen." 
Ezekiel22:8 Kɑ̈jji kwër pɑ wør yi gen, o cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth pɑ nyi mïdhi yi gen." 
Ezekiel22:9 Kwï wun ji møøgø nyi wɑ̈dhi ge’ gønyø ki pyed kipe kinni o ge nɑ̈g. Møøgø nyii cyɑ̈mø ki gëdhh-ɑ óngɑ̈lli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, o møøgø gøgg-ɑ rɑjj-ɑ kønø kì pëthi gen." 
Ezekiel22:10 Møøgø niin-ɑ mɑ̈nni wëëg gen. Møøgø mød-ɑ ngɑndhɑjø e ree dɑ kwër. 
Ezekiel22:11 Megø kedh-ɑ ri cï wɑɑd gen, megø niin-ɑ cï wɑ̈de, o megø niin-ɑ nyiwɑ̈n nyɑɑr wïye." 
Ezekiel22:12 Møøgø nɑ̈g ji ge kïr kɑ ngyëny, møøgø ngyënyyi gen nyi col ge nywølø yi wɑddi gen tyëng Isrɑil, kipe kinni o ge kɑ̈ri gen ki yëth-ɑ rijjø ni møgɑni. Yɑ ɑ́wïl kì wɑ̈thi gen.” Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Cingɑ gøøjɑ’ kömi kɑ̈m-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈b yi yïn, geki nɑ̈ng-ɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g yi wun ki ji." 
Ezekiel22:14 Wu orumø kinni wu óyïddi ki tegi pëëth, me tïng wun cinggi wun keny-ɑ ógöggɑ wun ki gïn ni menɑni? Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb, o dhøgɑ pɑ nyi wil yi yɑn." 
Ezekiel22:15 Jií kedhhɑ’ kedhhø kì yethi pödhh bënn, kipe kinni o yɑ cuungɑ gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi wun." 
Ezekiel22:16 Codhe, o wu cög wun, wu pɑ wør yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, de óyod yi wun kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́göög ge bong kɑ̈jji gen kì yïɑ. Ge ɑ́göög ni ngyëny-ɑ cyedhhe nudd ge ying-ɑ ree, ni dilɑl, kí dhïngkì, kí dødø geki ɑ́yömø; ge nɑ cyedhh-ɑ nyi döngi piny kì ri ɑ́tegø kenyi rume ki lenyø." 
Ezekiel22:19 Anɑn yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ köbbi gen kinni ge ɑ́göög kɑ̈jji gen bogïn kì yïɑ; de ge cøngɑ’ Yerusɑlem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ni kenyi kïdhi dilɑl, kí dhïngkì, kí dødø geki ɑ́yömø yij purun, o ge leny yi yɑn ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ge cøngɑ’ Yerusɑlem o kömi gen kɑ̈n-ɑ ki mɑc ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ, o ge leny gen." 
Ezekiel22:22 Ge óleny kì Yerusɑlem ni kenyi leeny ɑ́tegø kì yij purun, codhe o yod yi gen kinni bene yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́ngøøg linyɑ kömi gen.”" 
Ezekiel22:23 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti kinni," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni piny gen pɑth ki ɑkwër, kì bɑng menɑni ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ." 
Ezekiel22:25 Pëjji Isrɑil ngɑ̈rri nɑ ngurrì kì kömi lɑ̈yy-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen. Ge ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g ki ji, o jɑmmi ji geki ngyëny nyi kwɑny yi gen, ji mø gïïr ɑ́göög ki thwömm kì bɑng gen." 
Ezekiel22:26 Ciggɑ ɑ́pyem yi ókwër, o gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër pɑ wør yi gen. Ge pɑ pwönyi kì ri gïg-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër geki gïg-ɑ ywëdhø. Sɑbɑth miɑ bong pere kì yï gen. Bene ɑ pɑ wøør yɑn yi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel22:27 Jɑggi Isrɑil nɑ óthönhì, kenyi kɑggi gen lɑ̈yy-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen. Ge ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g kipe kinni o ge kɑ̈ri gen." 
Ezekiel22:28 Jøtöng, orøøg tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kum yi gen ni kenyi gøøj dörø ki jïr. Ge ceg-ɑ pyed, ge okööbø kinni ge töng-ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de ge nuti köbbø yi yɑn." 
Ezekiel22:29 Tyëngkɑ̈rì ceg-ɑ kɑ̈b. Tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn geki tyëngpɑth ɑ́ruj yi gen. 
Ezekiel22:30 Yɑ ɑ́yɑ̈ɑ̈b ki ngɑn di ger dörø, o di kore kɑ̈jj-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, o di nyïɑ̈gge kipe piny keny-ɑ órënyi pyëwɑ, de bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́yodɑ." 
Ezekiel22:31 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, linyɑ óngøøgɑ kömi gen ni mɑc. O ge nɑ̈gɑ kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen.” Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel23:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ɑ́dɑ nyiimëëg ɑ́ryew." 
Ezekiel23:3 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge yɑb-ɑ cwøw kì Rïp, ge bɑ wojur, ri gen ɑ́rënyi gen, kɑ ge ogöögø ki tyëng nyi niin ki köögi." 
Ezekiel23:4 Nyɑndwøng cwøl ɑ́ Ölɑ̀, o nyɑnthinh cwøl ɑ́ Ölibɑ̀ Ge ɑ́nywømɑ ryeet, kɑ ge onywølø ki nywøl." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ölɑ̀ ɑ́cög ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi kër-ɑ ɑ́nywømɑ en, pyëwe nyii kønø cɑrø ki cwøw; jøgi Acuur." 
Ezekiel23:6 Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøliny, ge rug-ɑ ógudh mø bɑ ówɑw mø pɑ̈r, ge bɑ pëjji liny, ge myër bënn, ge bɑ wøbb, o ge bɑ jøkyënyì." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ábëëd ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi yi pëjji liny Acuur, kɑ thɑb yi okøn pyëwe, ɑwëgge ree kedhi be mɑlli ngïjji jwöggi tyëng Acuur." 
Ezekiel23:8 Yɑbe ki cwøw ni men-ɑ ɑ́gøgge kì Rïp nuti wiy en, mɑ́ e ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi ɑ́ jùr, ɑrënyi jurø mee, mɑ́ e ɑ́niin yi cwøw e thiinh." 
Ezekiel23:9 Codhe, ɑmëggɑ en pëjji liny Acuur møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑre cɑrø." 
Ezekiel23:10 Codhe, ɑpyëëd gen ógudhe wɑ̈g, kɑ odöngø e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, kɑ nyige kɑ̈l gen, kɑ nɑ̈g yi gen ki pilø. Agööge ɑ́ kwøbbe ɑ nyi wɑjji yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, gen ɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑyii." 
Ezekiel23:11 “Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́lidh yi Ölibɑ̀ nyimen, de ɑ́yöd e ceg-ɑ pëddø ki yɑb ki cwøw." 
Ezekiel23:12 En thyew yïe ɑ́dɑ okøn pyëw me dwøng kipe pëjji liny Acuur, møg-ɑ rug ógudh-ɑ bɑ ówɑw, jøkyënyì, jøg-ɑ myër." 
Ezekiel23:13 Kɑ lidhɑ kinni yɑbe ki cwøw ɑ́pëddi; ge rijjø bënn, geki nyimen nyɑndwøng." 
Ezekiel23:14 “De yɑbe ki cwøw ɑ́pëddi ki mendwøng. Adiirii yi ngïjji jø Bɑbïl, tyëng Kildɑn møg-ɑ ótwegø kì ri dörø, o ge ógøjø ki kïdø me kwɑɑr, kí wënni yethi gen, kí wënni wɑ̈ɑ̈th mø myër kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Ezekiel23:15  
Ezekiel23:16 Pyëwe ɑ́køni kipe gen keny-ɑ ɑ́lidhe gïn. Codhe, ɑöde yï gen ki ji kì Bɑbïl, piny Kildɑn." 
Ezekiel23:17 Abëën jø Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, ɑniinii yi gen kɑ gø ywëdh gen, ɑlɑ̈mmi pyëwe ki gen kì cyɑ̈n." 
Ezekiel23:18 Kɑ ceg ki yodø yi ji bënn, kinni bɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. Codhe, ɑlɑ̈mmi pyëwɑ ki en, ni kɑ ɑ́lɑ̈mmi pyëwɑ ki nyimen." 
Ezekiel23:19 Áti pëddø gwøg ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi; ɑ́göög ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi ki Rïp e nudd ɑ́ jùr. 
Ezekiel23:20 Pyëwe nyi ceg-ɑ okøn ki niin yi jøg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́mɑ̈jj, ni ɑderr geki kyënyì.”" 
Ezekiel23:21 (Ölibɑ̀, yï ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yɑb ki cwøw ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd yïn ɑ́ jùr kì Rïp, ɑ nyi tuug yïn yi cwøw kɑ yï órënyø.)" 
Ezekiel23:22 “Anɑn Ölibɑ̀, bene møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: Yï cwɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ’ cwɑ̈ɑ̈gø wuki cwøwí, cwøw-ɑ́ pyëwí ɑ́lɑ̈mmi yi gen, o yï tyeg yi gen." 
Ezekiel23:23 Jø Kildɑn geki jø Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì Peköd, kí Cöɑ̀, kí Köɑ̀, kí jøgi Acuur bënn. Jøg-ɑ myër møgɑni cøngɑ’ cøngø bënn. Nyiirɑ̈dhh kí pëjji liny, jøg-ɑ per gen teg, kí jøkyënyì." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø ki yɑ̈thi liny, kí yɑ̈thi kɑ̈ddø ki jɑmmi liny mø gïïr cɑrø. Yï gen dɑ ködd kí ɑcudh; yï ótyeg yi gen. Yï ówïyɑ gen, o yï cɑy yi gen ki ciggi gen." 
Ezekiel23:25 Mɑ́ pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki yïn, yï wïyɑ’ gen, o yï nyudhi gen ki liny. Órømmí óngøl yi gen geki yïthhí, kɑ nyigí tøy yi gen. Wɑ̈ddí geki nyigí ókwɑny yi gen, kɑ gï rɑ̈b gen ge onëënø." 
Ezekiel23:26 Ógudhí óyööd gen wɑ̈g kì rií, kɑ jɑmmi dhwɑ̈ngí kwɑny yi gen." 
Ezekiel23:27 Yï ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ yɑb ki cwøw geki okøn pyëw ki cwøw, møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi yïn kì Rïp. Yï koo nenni ri ngïjji jwögg këti, wɑlɑ̀ yï koo rumø kì ri Rïp këti.”" 
Ezekiel23:28 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ómëggɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yi yïn, ɑ pyëwí kømi lɑ̈mmø yi gen." 
Ezekiel23:29 Kipe kɑ̀ mɑɑn yïn yi gen, jɑmmí bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn ki kwɑ̈gí ókɑ̈l yi gen; yï ówiy yi gen yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, o orøgí nënne geki rɑjj-ɑ gøggí bënn." 
Ezekiel23:30 Kì bɑng okøn pyëwí ki cwøw, geki yɑbi cwøw, rií ɑ́tuug kɑ pödhh, kɑ rií ywëëdh ki ngïjji jwögg." 
Ezekiel23:31 Yï ɑ́kɑ̈l bɑng nyimyëw; bene ɑ cɑyɑ yïn ki cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑyɑ en.” 
Ezekiel23:32 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ómɑ̈ɑ̈dhø kì yij óthɑ̈ngi nyimyëw; óthɑ̈ngɑni dwøng o yije ludhø. Yï ógɑggi yi ji bënn; mɑ́ óthɑ̈ngɑni pɑ̈ng." 
Ezekiel23:33 Yï ónɑ̈g yi møgø geki kïïmø óthɑ̈ngɑni bɑ óthɑ̈ngi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø geki ryɑ̈g, eni óthɑ̈ngi nyimyëw Sɑmɑriyɑ̀." 
Ezekiel23:34 Ómɑdh yi yïn kɑ tyëg yi yïn kinni liiw kɑ ópɑ̈nne kwɑɑny, kɑ ge kɑggí ɑ́ngɑní. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel23:35 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: “Mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wïl kì wïjí, kɑ ngɑ̈jí lugí yɑn, yï órɑngø kì bɑng okøn pyëwí ki cwøw geki yɑbí ki cwøw.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, Ölɑ̀ geki Ölibɑ̀ ócɑy yi yïn? Töng cɑ́yi gen kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Ezekiel23:37 Mɑ́ ge ɑ́røngi ki cwøw, kɑ ge onɑ̈gø ki ji; ge ɑ́røngi kɑ ngïjji jwögg, o wɑ̈ddɑ, wɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́nywøl yi gen ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen. Wɑ̈ddɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈lli gen ngïjji jwöggi gen." 
Ezekiel23:38 Ge nuti cög-ɑ møgɑni keti gen; de men-ɑ́ Kengɑ ɑ́bwöl yi gen, kɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́muujɑ gɑ ciggi Sɑbɑth pyem gen!" 
Ezekiel23:39 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈lli nyigɑ ngïjji jwögg yi gen, ge ɑ́bï yij Kengɑ kɑ gø bwöl gen!" 
Ezekiel23:40 “Cwøw nyii ödø yi gen ki ji møg cwööl gen kì kun lɑ̈wi. Keny-ɑ óbëën gen, o nyiimëëgɑni ryeet lwøg gen, o nyingi gen gid gen, o ge ruggi gen ki jɑmmi dhwɑ̈ng møg-ɑ per gen teg." 
Ezekiel23:41 O ge pëggi gen wïj pyën me myër, kí tɑrɑbedhɑ̀ me pɑ̈ng yi jɑmm-ɑ døøj kì bøli gen, kí bɑkur geki møøw dhetun møg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ gen." 
Ezekiel23:42 Cwɑggi tyëng-ɑ nyi wɑ̈dhi wøwø yøw ɑ́lïngi, ge bɑ ɑkuud jøg-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø kì pɑ̈l. Kɑ cinggi nyiimëëgɑni budhi gen ki yëll, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen kïdhi gen ki bɑrukì mø myër." 
Ezekiel23:43 Aköbbɑ riɑ kinni, jøg ɑ́røngi kɑ̀ bëëd gen ki tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ge nyi kedh-ɑ yï tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi møgɑni tyel mø gïïr; ge nyi kedh-ɑ yï Ölɑ̀ geki Ölibɑ̀, mɑ̈nn-ɑ rijjø." 
Ezekiel23:45 Ge ócɑy yi jøgtir kipe yɑb ki cwøw geki nɑ̈g ki ji.” 
Ezekiel23:46 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: “Kömi gen ókönɑ ki yɑy, o ge bwøg gen, o jɑmmi gen kɑb." 
Ezekiel23:47 O ge bɑ̈lli, o kömi gen pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki pilø, o nyigi gen nɑ̈g, o uddi gen rɑ̈b." 
Ezekiel23:48 Yɑb ki cwøw cuungɑ’ cuungø kì yij pödhø, o bëëd e bong ngɑndhɑjø me yɑ̈bø ki cwøw ni gen." 
Ezekiel23:49 Wu cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kì bɑng bëënrɑj mi wun geki mɑlli ngïjji jwögg. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Kì pyɑ̈ri cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, kì bïngween runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, gweed cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng piny mɑ́ bene cyɑ̈ng-ɑ cɑ̈gi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ki tyegi Yerusɑlem." 
Ezekiel24:3 Köbbí jiɑ, tyëngpëëmø gɑ́j-ɑ köbbɑ gen ek; yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Cïb dɑg wɑ̈thi tugø kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki pï." 
Ezekiel24:4 Kïdhí yije ki rïng-ɑ døj, kwɑny bɑ̈dd geki rɑ̈mm kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈ng ki cu-ɑ døj" 
Ezekiel24:5 Kɑ̈bbí ki rïnggi dyëg-ɑ myër kɑ yugg röör thɑ dɑg. Wiy dɑg twɑge; thɑl cu geki rïngø.” 
Ezekiel24:6 Møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: “Kɑɑl nɑ̈g ree dɑ cyën! Nɑ dɑg me rënyø; me yije óyɑɑy rïngø; bong ɑ́kyel mɑ ɑ́döng. 
Ezekiel24:7 Ji ɑ́nɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni, de remø nuti dëëm-ɑ piny, o di kum yi ɑyejø, de ɑ́dëëm-ɑ kömi kït." 
Ezekiel24:8 Yɑn ɑ ɑ́wiy remø kì keny-ɑ pɑ cugge kɑnø, kipe kinni o pïïde ki coli gøølø.”" 
Ezekiel24:9 Møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: “Kɑɑl nɑ̈g ree dɑ cyën! Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ órööri piny ki yugg." 
Ezekiel24:10 Kɑ̈ní ki yugg mø gïïr! Kwɑdh mɑc! Thɑl rïngø, køny cwɑyø! Rɑ̈b cu!" 
Ezekiel24:11 Anɑn cïb dɑng-ɑ bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl men-ɑ bong gïn ying yije kömi mɑɑc cug, kɑ wiy kwɑ̈rre. Codhe, o døøge ki dhïwø keny-ɑ óbëën nyɑllì wɑ̈g kì ree," 
Ezekiel24:12 cɑgg nyɑllɑni koo bï wɑ̈g bënn. 
Ezekiel24:13 Yerusɑlem, yï ɑ́bwöl yi bëënrɑj mií cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyɑ riɑ ki gwøgi yïn yï dhïw, yï nudd yï ywëdhø ceth gïti keny-ɑ óyood tegi linyɑ." 
Ezekiel24:14 Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb. Bøli keny-ɑ ógwøgɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, orøgí pɑ wiy yi yɑn; yijɑ pɑ ywöngi kiperí, o pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki yïn. Yï ócɑy kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn.” Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel24:15 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑr yi yïn ki mendwøng kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø. Yï ko gööny, yï ko ywöngi, wɑlɑ̀ pï wɑngí ko dëëm." 
Ezekiel24:17 Gengí ko wëggí lïngø, yï ko cyɑ̈dhi e bong wɑr ki tyellí, wɑlɑ̀ e bong gïn kum yïn wïjí, o yï ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m kì kej ywøg.”" 
Ezekiel24:18 Kɑ teedø köbbɑ kì mwøl, kɑ cyëgɑ othøø kì böörø. Dhuki kì mwøl ɑgwøgɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn." 
Ezekiel24:19 Apyëëj yɑn yi ji kinni, “Á ngø ɑ gwøg yi yïn kinnï?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Alöggɑ kinni, “Wë yɑ ɑ́köbbe" 
Ezekiel24:21 i köbbɑ wöödø men tyëng Isrɑil kinni: Wu thwøg kɑ per tegi Kengø. Wu nyi mɑɑr-ɑ nenne geki këëmii, de bɑ men bwöl yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O wɑ̈ddi wun geki nyigi wun møg-ɑ ɑ́wiy wun kunɑni ge ónɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel24:22 Codhe, o wu ógwøg wun gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ. Wɑ̈thi wun pɑ kum yi wun, o wu pɑ cyɑ̈mø kì kej ywøg." 
Ezekiel24:23 Wu koo cyɑ̈dhi tyelli wun bong wɑr, o wu koo kïïmø, o wu pɑ ywöngi. Wu óthuw orøøg wun, o wu ónguni ki ri wun." 
Ezekiel24:24 O yɑ ógöögɑ yɑn ɑ́ nyuudhi kiper wun; gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ bënn ógwøg yi wun. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni; óyod yi wun keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, kinni en ɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Anɑn wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, Keng-ɑ́ pere ɑ́thwøg gen, ɑ mɑɑr yi gen ki nennø, kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø kì yï gen. O wɑ̈ddi gen kí nyigi gen kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø thyew." 
Ezekiel24:26 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ógwøgɑ møgɑni, ngɑn megø óbodh kɑ bï-ɑ be köbbi wun ki møgɑni." 
Ezekiel24:27 Kì dicyɑ̈ngɑni, wu ódøøg be kwøb, kɑ wu okööbø ki ngɑnɑni kì ri møgɑni; wu óbëëd wun ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe ji, o óyod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töng cɑ́yi pödhi Amön." 
Ezekiel25:3 Köbbí gen kinni lïngu kwøbbi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Mɑ́ pëthi wun ɑ́mïni keny-ɑ ɑ́bwööl Kengɑ, kí kɑ ɑ́rënyi piny Isrɑil, kí kɑ ɑ́kïdhi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ yïnø," 
Ezekiel25:4 wu cïbɑ’ cinggi pödhhi yij ryɑng møg-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o wu tyɑm yi gen. Nywøli yenhi wun ócɑm yi gen, kɑ cɑg mɑdh gen." 
Ezekiel25:5 Kɑɑl Rɑbɑ̀ óløgɑ keny nyi buud yi ɑmɑl, kɑ pödhi Amön bëne løgɑ keny nyi kwɑɑy dyëg, codhe o yod yi wun kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel25:6 “Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Cinggí ɑ́teeng kɑ yï órujjø yi medi pyëw, kɑ pyëwí ómïnø kipe rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel25:7 Kipe kɑ ɑ́göög kinøw, yï cïbɑ’ cinggi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o yï yɑg yi gen, o jɑmmí kɑb yi gen. Jií nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø kì yij pödhø bëne, o yï cöög yï pɑ kwɑn yïn ɑ́ pödhø, o bëëd e bong pödhí me nud. Codhe, o yod yi yïn kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Mɑ́ Moɑb okööbø i Yeudiyɑ̀ nɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn." 
Ezekiel25:9 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ nyi koor keew Moɑb kömi gen ówëggɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̈dd-ɑ pëddi myëërø, ɑ løg Bet Yecimöth, kí Bɑɑl Meon, kí Kiriɑtɑim." 
Ezekiel25:10 Moɑb geki Amön ówëggɑ tyɑmø yi pödhhi ryɑɑng wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o Moɑb gööge e pɑth ki pödhø këti." 
Ezekiel25:11 Moɑb ócɑyɑ, o yod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel25:12 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kipe kɑ ɑ́cud tyëng Edöm ki gøølø kì ri Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ gø göggi gen ki rɑj," 
Ezekiel25:13 tyëng Edöm cɑyɑ’ cɑyø; ji bënn kí lɑ̈yy bënn ge nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø; ódöng ɑ́ ryɑng, cɑg kì Temɑn gïti Dedɑn, o ji ónɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel25:14 Jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil kejɑ ócol yi gen kì ri Edöm, linyɑ óyod yi Edöm kì ri gen. Codhe o yod yi Edöm kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ gøøli gen ɑ́col gen ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn gen, kɑ gï nɑ̈g gen," 
Ezekiel25:16 bene ɑ kööb Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø; o tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng ge onëënø kì thwøri Pelistiyɑ̀ nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø bënn." 
Ezekiel25:17 Gøølɑ ócolɑ kì ri gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ. Codhe o yod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyeel runni wøn kì yïnø, kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel26:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, mɑ́ Suur pyëwe ɑ́mïni ki rënyi Yerusɑlem, kɑ óryeerø kinni ‘Yerusɑlem ɑ́kedhhi! Ngyew men-ɑ nyi ngëëw kì yije ɑ́rënyi! Nyingi wøn pɑ tyëëm yi wøn ki en këti!’" 
Ezekiel26:3 “Anɑn bene møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: Suur, yɑ bɑ ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ki yïn, pödhh mø gïïr ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömí; ge óbï ge nɑ ɑpɑgi nɑɑm omelø." 
Ezekiel26:4 Dörri kɑ̈ddí ódhur gen piny, kɑ udd-ɑ koor gen toor gen piny. Codhe, o lɑ̈bø bëne yeejɑ wɑ̈g, o dönge ɑ́ kïttì keti gen." 
Ezekiel26:5 Jømɑy, bøyyi gen ómɑ̈j yi gen kì yije, kì keny-ɑ bëëde kì dïnɑɑm omelø, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Suur órënyi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø," 
Ezekiel26:6 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yije ónɑ̈g ki pilø. Codhe, o yod yi Suur kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel26:7 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ wëggɑ’ pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Suur. Óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø ki liny me dwøng, kí kyënyì, kí yɑ̈thi liny." 
Ezekiel26:8 Tyëng-ɑ ying yethi kɑ̈dd kì yij pödhø ónɑ̈g kì yij linyɑni. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ókunyø ki burrì, kɑ ge ógöögø ki óthør møg nenni kɑɑl, kɑ köddi gen ogöögø ki dörø mɑ gëng." 
Ezekiel26:9 Dörí ówööl yij yi gen ki gënggi ngyënyø, kɑ ud, udd-ɑ bɑ̈rrø pwööd gen piny ki lødhi ngyënyø dødø." 
Ezekiel26:10 Yï ólɑ̈nyyi yij tør tyelli kyënye, dörrí ónhɑ̈nhi yi cwɑggi jøkyënyì geki yɑ̈thi liny keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l gen dhøggi dörí møg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Ezekiel26:11 Yëthí bënn ónyøn yi dɑddi kyënye, ji ónɑ̈g yi gen ki pilø. Kɑ löjjí löjj-ɑ teg tørri." 
Ezekiel26:12 Kɑ̈rí geki jɑmm-ɑ nyi ngew ókɑb yi gen. Dörrí ócøør gen piny, kɑ uddí udd-ɑ myër dhur piny. Tuggi kïttí geki pɑ̈mmí, kí lɑ̈bbí ócøør gen nɑɑm omelø." 
Ezekiel26:13 Wörrí ócuung yi yɑn, o cwɑggi thømí koo lïngi këti." 
Ezekiel26:14 Yï ógwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ kït me wïje nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈j bøyy yi jømɑy. Yï koo cigi gerø, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel26:15 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Suur ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Pödhh-ɑ kömi nɑɑm omelø óbwøg yi ywøøg tyëng-ɑ óngɑl keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
Ezekiel26:16 Rɑ̈nhi pödhhɑni bënn óbï piny kì wɑ̈thi kwømmi gen, ógudhi gen ógudh-ɑ thøø yi rødø óluny gen wɑ̈g, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ piny dëlli gen okïïrø. Ge óbwøg yi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömí, kɑ ge ongɑ̈ngø yi møgɑni." 
Ezekiel26:17 O yï óywøg yi gen ki wöri ywøg kinni: Kɑɑl-ɑ pere teg ɑ́rënyi! Yɑ̈the ɑ́køøl yi yømø kì nɑɑm omelø. Jii kɑɑlɑni ɑ́bëëd nɑ̈mmi omelø jɑɑg-ɑ yi gen. o tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi nɑm bënn ɑ́bögg-ɑ gen. 
Ezekiel26:18 Anɑn, keny-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe, kɑggì ceg-ɑ kïïrø. O tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑggɑni ɑ́bwøg kɑ ɑ́rënyi gen.”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ógwøgɑ ni kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́rënyi, kɑ ge odöngø gɑ ryɑng. Yï ómud yi yɑn ki pï mø gïïr." 
Ezekiel26:20 Yï ókïdhɑ piny pödhi tyëngthøø, o yï rëbí ki tyëng-ɑ ócyɑ̈ɑ̈ngi. Yï ócïbɑ be bëëdø kì kunɑni, kì kelli gïg-ɑ ɑ́rënyi gïti ɑtheer, o yijí cöge e pɑ bëëd këti, o bëëd e bong kejí kì pödhi tyëngnëënø." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ji ówëggɑ böggø kenyi lïngi gen kwøbbi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́bï kömí, o menɑni óbëëd ɑ́ cögí. Yï óyɑb yi ji, de yï koo yod yi gen.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel27:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ywøg Suur ki wöri ywøg," 
Ezekiel27:3 eni kɑɑl-ɑ ying kömi nɑɑm omelø, ɑ nyi ngëwwi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ kömi nɑɑm omelø ki jɑmmì. Köbbí gïg-ɑ kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Suur, yïn ɑ thwøg kipe myërí." 
Ezekiel27:4 Myërrí ying-ɑ dïnɑɑm omelø uddí ɑ́ger yi yïn ge nɑ sɑpïnɑ̀ me myëër. 
Ezekiel27:5 Ge ɑ́gur kɑ pɑ̈mmi ɑkemel men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Kïti Kermön, kɑ cure gur ki sɑndɑl men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Lubnɑn." 
Ezekiel27:6 Lɑwwi yɑ̈y ɑ́tyeng kɑ óthurri Bɑcɑn, kɑ pyëën yije gwøg ki ɑmedh mø Kobros, kɑ dhyɑw ki leggi lyej kì yiny-ɑ ød." 
Ezekiel27:7 Opërri yɑ̈thí bɑ ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm Ge thøø yi kwenø kì Rïp, ge nyi ceg kɑ ngijø ge nudd ge lɑ̈wi. Ógudh-ɑ nyi kum kwømmí bɑ ógudh mø myër, o ge bɑ ɑ́cwïcwïl, ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑ muji Kobros." 
Ezekiel27:8 Yɑ̈thí nyi kyew-ɑ yi jø kɑ̈ddi Sïdön kí Arbɑd. Yɑ̈thí ɑ́bëëd ge kyew-ɑ yi jøg mø pëddi këw. 
Ezekiel27:9 Jøg-ɑ nyi guddø ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th, ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jø Bïbløs mø thøø yi pwönyø. Jøg mø ngɑ̈ny këw kì yethi nɑ̈mmi omelø bënn ɑ ɑ́ngyewi jɑmmí kì kɑ̈jji ngyew." 
Ezekiel27:10 “Jø Pɑres kí Lud, kí Lïbiyɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøliny, köddi gen geki ɑcudhhi gen nyi ngɑɑb ge’ ri kɑ̈ddi jølinyí. Gen ɑ ɑ́thödhi yïn ki dhwɑ̈ng," 
Ezekiel27:11 Jøliny Arbɑd ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ gen ɑ nyi kor dörrí, o dörr-ɑ bɑ̈rrø møgí ɑ́bëëd ge nyi korr-ɑ yi jø Gɑmɑd. Köddi gen nyi ngɑɑb ge’ ri dörrí. Gen ɑ ɑ́gwøg yïn yï myëër." 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tɑrcic ɑ́ngëëw ki jɑmmì kì yïí kɑ yï óyïddø ki ɑ́tegø, kí dødø, kí dhïngkì, kí ɑ́yömø." 
Ezekiel27:13 Yï ɑ́ngyëwi ki jɑmmí kì kɑ̈ddi Yönɑn, kí kɑ̈ddi Tubɑl, kí Mecec, kɑ jɑmmí nyi ngëëw ki bɑ̈ngg, kí jɑmmì mø bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl." 
Ezekiel27:14 Bet Tögɑrmɑ̀ ɑ́kɑ̈ni yïí ki yɑ̈thi kyënyì, kí kyënyi liny, kí ógɑll mø ngew ki jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel27:15 Tyëng Dedɑn yï gen ɑ́dɑ ngyew ki tyëng-ɑ kömi nɑɑm omelø mø gïïr, ge nyi wil-ɑ leggi lyej geki nyɑj ki jɑmm-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel27:16 Ádɑ ngyew kì kɑɑm wun, wuki Arɑm, kipe jɑmmí møg-ɑ ngenyø; ge nyii kɑ̈nø ki ógudh-ɑ myër geki tigg-ɑ per gen teg, møg wil ki kyënyi liny." 
Ezekiel27:17 Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ gemè, kí møøw dhetun, kí møøw kïc, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med mø wil ki jɑmmí." 
Ezekiel27:18 Dimɑceg nyi ngyew-ɑ møgi oløg men-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Kelbön geki yëyyi dyëg mø tɑr møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Sɑ̈ɑ̈r, o nyi wil yi gen ki jɑmmí, jɑmm-ɑ ngenyø ki mendwøng." 
Ezekiel27:19  
Ezekiel27:20 Dedɑn nyi wil-ɑ sïrïj ki jɑmmí. 
Ezekiel27:21 Árɑb geki jɑggi Kedɑr, jɑmmí nyi wil yi gen kɑ dyëg römm kí ɑ́tegg." 
Ezekiel27:22 Jøngyeew Cebɑ̀ geki Rɑmɑ̀, jɑmmí nyi wil yi gen kɑ tigg-ɑ per gen teg geki dhɑb, kí yenh-ɑ yømi gen med cɑrø." 
Ezekiel27:23 Kɑ̈ddi Arɑn, kí Kɑnè, kí Eden, kí jøngyew mø Cebɑ̀ kí Acuur kí Kilmɑd ɑ́bëëd yï wun dɑ ngyew ki gen." 
Ezekiel27:24 Ge ɑ́bëëd ge nyi ngëww-ɑ yïn ógudh-ɑ ngewi gen teeg, kí ógudh-ɑ thøø yi rødø, kí gïg-ɑ nyi peedh piny kì yethi ud, ɑ kïddi gen myëër, kí thøll-ɑ ógwøgø ge myëër." 
Ezekiel27:25 Jɑmm-ɑ nyi ngew kì yïí ɑ́bëëd ge nyi kɑ̈l-ɑ yethi sɑpïnnì mø døngø. Yï ɑ́bëëd yï nɑ sɑpïnɑ̀ kì nɑɑm omelø; sɑpïnɑ̀ me yije ópɑ̈ngø ki jɑmmì. 
Ezekiel27:26 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kyëëw yïn wɑ̈g yi jøgí kì nɑɑm omelø, Yï ɑ́kɑggi yi yømi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì dïnɑm." 
Ezekiel27:27 Kɑ̈rí, kɑ̈r-ɑ nyi ngyewí, kí jøg-ɑ nyi kyewi yɑ̈thí bënn, kí jøg-ɑ nyi guddø ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th, geki jøngyew, kí jøliny bënn møg-ɑ ɑ́ying yij sɑpïnɑ̀, ge ɑ́lɑ̈nyyi nɑɑm omelø bënn, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑggi sɑpïnɑ̀." 
Ezekiel27:28 Álɑngi cwɑggi jøkëw møg-ɑ ɑ́mud ɑ́lïngi kì kömi nɑɑm omelø. 
Ezekiel27:29 “Yɑ̈th-ɑ døngø ɑ́wiy bënn, jøkëw bënn ɑ́kedhi wɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel27:30 Yï ceg kɑ ywøgø yi gen bënn ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m pëëth. Ge ywöngi wɑ̈thi gen kïdhi gen ki belø, ge ngyell-ɑ ri gen kì yij tør." 
Ezekiel27:31 Wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́lyel gen kiperí o ge rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì. Ge ywøg-ɑ yïn ki ywøøg rɑ̈ɑ̈m pëëth. 
Ezekiel27:32 Ge ywøg-ɑ yïn ki wörri ywøg kinni, ‘Á men ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yïn Suur, ɑ bëëdø e kudø kì nɑɑm omelø?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l jɑmmi ngyew møgí løøg nɑɑm omelø, Pödhh bënn nyii yɑ̈ngø yi kɑ̈rí. Kɑ rɑ̈nhì ókɑ̈rø yi kɑ̈r-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑmm-ɑ ngyewi yi yïn." 
Ezekiel27:34 Anɑn rií ɑ́mød kì nɑɑm omelø; yï ɑ́bïïl tyeli nɑɑm omeli dwøng. Jɑmmí kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́göggi yïn bënn ge ɑ́bïïl tyeli nɑɑm omelø.’ 
Ezekiel27:35 “Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi nɑm bënn ɑ́bwøg yi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́bï kömí. Cɑgg ɑ́ rɑ̈nhi gen ɑ́bwøg thyew, wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ceg-ɑ nënnø kì nyingi gen." 
Ezekiel27:36 Yï ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny gïti ɑtheer. Jøngyew kì kömi piny bëne ɑ́bwøg, kinni kömi gen óbëën yi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́bï kömí.”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí jɑngi Suur møg-ɑ köbbɑ en yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Yï ceg-ɑ thwøgø ce yï bɑ jwøg. Yï okööbø ce yï bëëd ɑ wïj kwøm ni jwøg, yï ótyegø yi nɑm. De yï bɑ dhɑnhø yøw, yï pɑth ki jwøg." 
Ezekiel28:3 Yï orumø ce wïjí pel kibøli Dɑniel; ce bong gïn cuggi kɑnø kɑ ocögø e pɑ yod yi yïn! 
Ezekiel28:4 Yï okööbø cem ɑ́ peli wïjí ɑ mëggi yïn kɑ̈ɑ̈r dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø. 
Ezekiel28:5 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́ngeew peli wïj, yï ɑ́yïddi ki kɑ̈r me dwøng. Yï ceg-ɑ thwøgø kipe kɑ̈rí!" 
Ezekiel28:6 “Møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ kinni: Mɑ́ yï orumø ce wïjí pel ni jwøg," 
Ezekiel28:7 Yɑ ceg-ɑ kɑ̈ni kömí ki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø mø rijjø. Jɑmm-ɑ myëër møgí bënn órënyi yi gen, gen ɑ jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́yɑb yi yïn ki peli wïjí geki dïdí." 
Ezekiel28:8 Yï ónɑ̈g kɑ yï othøø ki thøwi ji-ɑ ɑ́thøw nɑm. 
Ezekiel28:9 Yï ónudd yï okööbø ce yï bɑ jwøg? Kì bøli tyëng-ɑ nɑ̈g yïn, yï óbëëd yïn ɑ́ dhɑnhø yøw, o yï pɑth ki jwøg." 
Ezekiel28:10 Yï ónɑ̈g ki nɑ̈gi gwög yi tyëngpɑth. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti kinni," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ywöngí kipe rɑjj-ɑ óbï kömi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Suur, köbbí møg-ɑ köbbɑ en ek: Yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ okööbø kinni: Yï ɑ́bëëd yï pëddi myëërø, e wïjí pel ki mendwøng!" 
Ezekiel28:13 Yï ɑ́bëëd ɑ yij bɑɑg Eden, bɑɑg Jwøk, yï rug-ɑ tigg-ɑ per gen teg mø kïddi gen bɑ̈nni, kí mɑs, kí dhebɑrjed, kí yedhè, kí yeceb, kí bɑrmɑn, kí dhemred. Yï ɑ́dɑ jɑmmi dhwɑ̈ng mø bɑ dhɑb. Ge ɑ́gwøg kɑ perí dicyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn." 
Ezekiel28:14 Yï ɑ́cïbɑ yïn ɑ́ kerob me kor kïti kwëër Jwøk. Yï ɑ́bëëd kì kïti kwërɑ kɑ yï ócyɑ̈dhø kì kɑɑm tuggi kïtt-ɑ mëënyø. 
Ezekiel28:15 Yï ɑ́bëëd yï døøj këër cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn pïd keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gí ki gwøg ki rɑj. 
Ezekiel28:16 Kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́cïb rummí ri ngyew, yijí ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi ruj, kɑ yï óbɑ̈jjø, ɑcyeddɑ yïn kì kïti kwërɑ, kɑ yï cyeed wɑ̈g kì kelli tuggi kïtt-ɑ mëënyø yi wëywön-ɑ ɑ́kor yïn." 
Ezekiel28:17 Yï ɑ́ceg-ɑ thwøgø kipe myërí. Kɑ yï gwøøg dhëg yi peli wïjí. Bene ɑ bɑnge leengɑ yïn piny, o yï óbëëd yïn ɑ́ nyuudhi kipe rɑ̈nhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel28:18 Kɑ̈jji mɑ̈ddø møgí ɑ́ywëdh yi gïg-ɑ gwøg yi yïn kì yij gwøøg ngyew. Codhe, ɑkɑ̈nɑ kömi kɑɑl ki mɑc kɑ rɑ̈bɑ, ɑgwøgɑ en ɑ́ búr." 
Ezekiel28:19 Tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yïn bënn wɑ̈thi gen ómuum yi rëny-ɑ ɑ́rënyí, o yï koo yod këti gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töng cɑ́yi Sïdön." 
Ezekiel28:22 Köbbí tyëng pönhɑni møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Yɑ mɑ̈n ki yïn Sïdön, yɑ ólenhi kì bɑng gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ yïn. Óyod yi ji kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, keny-ɑ ónyodhɑ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ kwërø, ki cɑyi ji-ɑ bëëdø kì yijí." 
Ezekiel28:23 Kömí ókɑ̈ni yi yɑn ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì, kɑ remø wëggɑ mullø kì yethi yëthí. Kömí ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. Codhe, o yod yi yïn kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel28:24 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Bong pödhø kì kelli pödhh-ɑ ɑ́guud wɑɑng Isrɑil men-ɑ óni wëëlø me cwög wɑnge, wɑlɑ̀ koodhø men-ɑ ónɑ̈gii këti. O yod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel28:25 Akööb Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil ódwöögɑ kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ gen, o yod yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni yɑ bɑ kwërø. Tyëng Isrɑil óbëëdø kì yij piny gen, piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ bɑ̈ngɑ Yɑgob." 
Ezekiel28:26 Ge óbëëd e bong gïn böggi yi gen; ge ógëdø ki ud, kɑ ge opïdhø ki bɑ̈ggi oløg. Pödhh-ɑ buti gen møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑn gen ócɑy yi yɑn, de Isrɑil óbëëdø ki tɑrø. Codhe, o yod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈ri runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töng cɑ́yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp; cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑyii geki Rïp bëne." 
Ezekiel29:3 Köbbí kinni Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki yïn, yïn ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp. Yï nyɑng-ɑ dwøng, ɑ buud kì nɑm. Yï okööbø ce Kiir bɑ mií, cem ɑ́ yïn ɑ gwøgii." 
Ezekiel29:4 Yï ngönɑ’ ngönø ki ɑbɑdh kì yethi cwɑggí, o rijji nɑm wëggɑ mɑ̈gø kì ri gɑ̈nggí, o yï ywɑ̈ɑ̈jɑ wɑ̈g kì nɑm e rij bënn mɑ̈gø kì rií." 
Ezekiel29:5 O yï leengɑ yij ryɑng wuki rijji nɑm bënn. Yï ódöng kì kenyɑni; bong ngɑn-ɑ ókony yïn. Yï ócɑm-ɑ yi lɑ̈yy geki winy. 
Ezekiel29:6 Codhe, o yod yi tyëng Rïp kinni, bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Isrɑil ɑ́rum cem e ókøny-ɑ yi yïn, de yï bɑ obej yøw." 
Ezekiel29:7 Ke jyɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen ri gen rií, yï ceg-ɑ torø, kɑ nyingi ywödhhi gen cööb yi yïn, kɑ ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi thɑ̈thi gen, kɑ përri gen ótørrø." 
Ezekiel29:8 Anɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, yɑ óöni ki jøliny mø cinggi gen di pil, kɑ jií kí lɑ̈yyí nɑ̈g yi gen." 
Ezekiel29:9 Rïp ódöng ɑ́ ryɑng. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. “Mɑ́ yï ɑ́kööb ce Kiir bɑ mií, cem ɑ́ yïn ɑ gwøgii," 
Ezekiel29:10 yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki yïn, o yɑ mɑ̈n ki Kiir thyew. Rïp bëne gwøgɑ’ gwøgø ɑ́ ryɑng, cɑg kì Migdöl kì wɑɑng wuudø, gïti Aswɑn kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, e wɑ̈dh-ɑ keew Kuc." 
Ezekiel29:11 Bong dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y men-ɑ ókɑ̈l kenyɑni. Yije koo bëëd ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. 
Ezekiel29:12 Rïp ógwøgɑ ɑ́ ryɑng-ɑ pëddi döng kì kömi piny bëne. Kɑ̈dde óbëëd gɑ ryɑng ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, ge óbëëd gɑ thur kibøli kɑ̈dd-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Tyëng Rïp ókedhhɑ kì kelli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø; ge ówëggɑ rengi yethi pödhh møøgø.”" 
Ezekiel29:13 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì bɑng runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen møgɑni, tyëng Rïp ódwöögɑ kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ gen," 
Ezekiel29:14 kɑ ge cïbɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Rïp, eni keny-ɑ ceg bëëdø ɑ́ piny gen. Ge óbëëdø gɑ pödhø me bong pere." 
Ezekiel29:15 Óbëëd ɑ́ pönh-ɑ nyødh kì kelli pödhh bënn; bong pödhø men-ɑ ópɑ̈nyi ki cirø yi en. Ge ógwøgɑ ge bong kɑ̈jji gen kì kelli pödhh. 
Ezekiel29:16 Isrɑil koo køny yi gen këti. Rɑjj-ɑ óbï kömi Rïp, Isrɑil ópɑ̈ddi yi gen kinni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ bɑ̈jjø kɑ ɑ́gɑ̈nne Rïp. Codhe, o yod yi Isrɑil kinni, bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryeew runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, liny Nebukɑdnesɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Suur, wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́budh kɑ wɑ̈thi tøggi gen obwödhø yi byëddø ki jɑmmì, de bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́yod yi rɑ̈dh wɑlɑ̀ linye kipe gwøngɑni." 
Ezekiel29:19 Møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: Rïp mëggɑ’ Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, o gø yɑge, o kɑ̈re kɑ̈ɑ̈le ɑ́ köögi mi jølinye." 
Ezekiel29:20 Rïp mëggɑ’ en ɑ́ köögi, mɑ́ jølinye ɑ́gögg-ɑ yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, Isrɑil ówëggɑ tëngø, o yïn Idhkiel, kedh kɑ yï kööb kì bøli gen bënn. Codhe, o yod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töng møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kwøb gen, yï óryeerø kinni: Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi; cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ólöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng pøøl geki muudhø, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng cyën kipe pödhh." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ódi liny kì Rïp, kí wɑ̈ɑ̈rø me dwøng kì Kuc. Ji mø gïïr ónɑ̈g kì Rïp, Rïp óyɑg kɑ kɑ̈re kɑ̈l kɑ wiy ɑ́ thur." 
Ezekiel30:5 “Jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́kïr kì Kuc, kí Lud, kí Put, kí pödhi Árɑb, kí Kub, cɑgg ɑ́ kì kelli jiɑ, ge ónɑ̈g kì yij linyɑni.”" 
Ezekiel30:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ nyi cwɑg Rïp bënn ónɑ̈g, cɑg kì Migdöl kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti Aswɑn kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì Rïp, o jølinye jøg-ɑ tɑ̈dø ónɑ̈g. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel30:7 Rïp ógöögø ɑ́ ryɑng-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø kì kömi piny bëne; o kɑ̈dde ódöng gɑ thur. 
Ezekiel30:8 Keny-ɑ órɑ̈bɑ Rïp, kɑ tyëng-ɑ cwɑgii bënn nɑ̈g, bene keny-ɑ óyodii yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel30:9 “Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni kɑ Rïp nɑ̈g, yɑ óödø ki tyëngwöödø kì yethi yɑ̈thi nɑm, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöödø men-ɑ ówëggi tyëng Kuc; tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen kïïdhø bwøgø. Mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen obëënø thyew!”" 
Ezekiel30:10 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ be rënyi kɑ̈ɑ̈r Rïp." 
Ezekiel30:11 En geki jøge jøg-ɑ böggi yi kömi piny bëne, ge bï-ɑ be rënyi piny. Ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ kömi Rïp ki pil, o piny pɑ̈ng gen ki tyëngthøø." 
Ezekiel30:12 Kiir göjjɑ’ thwøwø, o piny Rïp cïbɑ’ cinggi tyëngrijjø. Pinyɑni órënyi yi tyëngpɑth. Yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì Mempis órënyɑ. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ójɑɑg Rïp; piny ógöjjɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel30:14 Wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì pödhi Rïp ógwøgɑ ɑ́ ryɑng, kɑ Dhoɑn kɑɑl-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø köme ödɑ ki mɑc, kɑɑldwøng No ócɑyɑ." 
Ezekiel30:15 Kɑɑl Sin, kɑɑl-ɑ teg kì Rïp, keji linyɑ óyod yi en. Kɑ̈ɑ̈r kɑɑldwøng No órënyɑ." 
Ezekiel30:16 Rïp köme óödɑ ki mɑc, kɑ Sin orɑngø, o döri No dhur piny, o kɑɑlɑni mude." 
Ezekiel30:17 Wøbbi kɑ̈ddi On geki Pïbestɑ̀ ónɑ̈g kì yij liny, o møøgø ókøøl gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Ezekiel30:18 Muudhø ópɑ̈dhi kömi Tɑpɑnes keny-ɑ ótorɑ tegi Rïp, kɑ ɑthwøge ocögø. Rïp órïm yi pøølø, kɑ jii kɑ̈dde bënn køøl gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Ezekiel30:19 Keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ Rïp kinøw, óyod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel30:20 Kì bïryeew cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyeel runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, cingi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ɑ́rum ki torø yi yɑn. Bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́pyëdhii o di nøgge; o di cugge mɑgi pilø." 
Ezekiel30:22 Anɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, møg-ɑ kwøbɑ bɑ kinni: Yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp. Cingge tørrɑ’ tørrø bënn, eni cing-ɑ døj geki men-ɑ torø, o pilø dëëme kì cinge." 
Ezekiel30:23 Tyëng Rïp ókedhhɑ kì kelli pödhh kì kömi piny bëne. 
Ezekiel30:24 Codhe, o cinggi Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ wëggɑ tëngø, o pilɑ cïbɑ cinge. De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp cingge ótørrɑ, o ócurri kɑ othøø kì bøli ngɑn-ɑ mɑ̈n ki en." 
Ezekiel30:25 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ówëggɑ tëngø ceth, keny-ɑ ómëggɑ en pilɑ, kɑ gø ceme Rïp, o yod yi ji bënn kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel30:26 Tyëng Rïp ókedhhɑ kì kömi piny bëne. Codhe, o yod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel31:1 Kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi dɑ̈ɑ̈g dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyeel runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki yɑye kinni: Yï teg nɑ ngø! Yï pɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ kɑ ngø?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Yï nɑ yɑdh sɑndɑl kì Lubnɑn Me yïthhe myër gɑ dïng, Yɑdh me bɑ̈r cɑrø e wɑ̈dh-ɑ yethi pøøl." 
Ezekiel31:4 Ádɑ pï mø pidhii Kɑ wëggi bɑ̈rrø yi pïi piny. Pï nud kì kej yɑnhɑni O pïgɑni pödd-ɑ yï yenhi wɑg bënn 
Ezekiel31:5 Ádøngi kibøli yenh-ɑ kyeelø mɑ́ pïge gïïr. Bɑ̈dde bɑ dhïl, ge bɑ̈rrø" 
Ezekiel31:6 Winy bënn ɑ́gëëd ki uddi gen kì bɑ̈dde, Lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l nyi nywøl-ɑ tïbe, pödhhi kömi piny ɑ́ywööm ɑ tïbe." 
Ezekiel31:7 Yɑnhɑni myëër cɑrø o bɑ̈dde bɑ̈rrø, mɑ́ byerre wɑ̈dhi piny, keny-ɑ di pïg-ɑ ngenyø." 
Ezekiel31:8 Yɑdh sɑndɑl men-ɑ yij bɑɑg Jwøk pɑ rwööm ki gøn. Bong yɑdh ɑkemel me bɑ̈dde pɑ̈r ki bɑ̈dde Bong yɑdh tugø me lodii Bong yɑdh me myër ni en kì yij bɑɑg Jwøk. 
Ezekiel31:9 Ágwøgɑ e myëër bɑ̈dde peedh en. Ceg kɑ modø yi yenh bënn kì Eden, bɑɑg Jwøk." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Anɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ kwøb-ɑ kinni: Gïn-ɑ ócwöb kipe yɑnh-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈ri kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ yethi pøøl kwøbɑ’ kwøbø, mɑ́ e ɑ́tɑ̈d keny-ɑ ɑ́kedhe e óbɑ̈rø;" 
Ezekiel31:11 ɑ́bɑnyɑ, o ómëggɑ jɑgø me pɑth. Ógöggi yi jɑngɑni ki gïn-ɑ kyëëw ki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Ezekiel31:12 Óngøl piny yi tyëngpɑth; tyëng-ɑ yethi gen wöny, kɑ gø wiy gen piny. Bɑ̈dde ótørri kɑ ge odyëmø, kɑ ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì bënn, kí yethi törr bënn kì yij pödhø. Pödhh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì tïbe ódhwödh, kɑ ge ókedhø." 
Ezekiel31:13 Anɑ̈bbe óputh yi winy, kɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l ócyɑ̈dhø kì kömi bɑ̈dde." 
Ezekiel31:14 O óbëëd e bong yɑdh men-ɑ ócigi døngø ni en, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ yethi pøøl, cɑgg keje di pï mø ngenyø. Ge ceg-ɑ thøø bënn ni møg-ɑ kyeelø, o ge kedhi gen piny pödhi tyëngthøø.”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókedhi yɑnhɑni pödhi tyëngthøø, nɑ̈mmì ówëggɑ ywøg kipere, kɑ kumɑ ki pïi thɑ lɑ̈bø. Nɑ̈mmì ógöjjɑ cung, kɑ pïg-ɑ ngenyø ówïyø ngwej. Kömi Lubnɑn ókɑ̈nɑ ki muudhø kɑ yenhi wɑg göjjɑ nɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel31:16 Pödhh óbwøg kɑ ge okïïrø yi cwɑggi pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe, keny-ɑ ókedhe piny pödhi tyëngthøø. Yenhi Eden bënn, kí yenh-ɑ ɑ́yieny kì Lubnɑn; gen ɑ yenh-ɑ byerri gen ɑ́ying yethi pï, gen ɑ yenh-ɑ ɑ́kedhi pödhi tyëngthøø; pëthi gen ómïni keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhe." 
Ezekiel31:17 Ge ókedhi pödhi tyëngthøø kyeel ki gøn; o ge kedhi gen kömi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöngi ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. O pödhh-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì tïbe bënn ókedhhi kì kelli pödhh. 
Ezekiel31:18 “Yɑnhɑni bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp geki yɑye bëne. Bong yenhi Eden mɑ ɑ́bëëd ge bɑ̈rrø kinøw, de ókedhi piny pödhi tyëngthøø, o rëbe ki tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny. Yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel32:1 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ mɑl kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, kyëddí rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ki kyëni dwøng. Köbbí wöödø men kinni: Rií ɑ́gwøøg yï nɑ ngur kì kelli pödhh, de yï ceg bëëdø yï nɑ nyɑng me pwöj pï kì nɑm. Pï ɑ́dub yi yïn ki lɑ̈bø ki tyellí, kɑ nɑm cöödh." 
Ezekiel32:3 Bøyɑ óleengɑ kömí, kɑ yï wëggɑ ywɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g yi pödhh keny-ɑ ócugi gen." 
Ezekiel32:4 Yï óleengɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ winy geki lɑ̈yyi kömi piny bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ be cɑmi yïn." 
Ezekiel32:5 Rïngí, rïng-ɑ kwɑ̈gø ópɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì kí yethi törr." 
Ezekiel32:6 Remí ókønyɑ piny, kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ wɑ̈thi kïttì kɑ nɑ̈mmì opɑ̈ngø yi en." 
Ezekiel32:7 Keny-ɑ ónɑ̈gɑ yïn, mɑl ókum yi yɑn kɑ kyell ólunyø. Cɑ̈ng ópɑ̈nni ngɑ̈thi pøøl, o cɑɑr dwɑ̈y koo mënyø." 
Ezekiel32:8 Gïg-ɑ mënyø kì mɑl bënn ówëggɑ lunyø, kɑ piny løgɑ muudhø. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel32:9 “Pödhh óbëëd ge óböggø keny-ɑ óköbbɑ gen rëny-ɑ ɑ́rënyɑ yïn; gen ɑ pödhh-ɑ per gen nuti pɑ̈nyø lïngø yi yïn cøn. 
Ezekiel32:10 Pödhh mø gïïr óbwøg yi gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ yïn. Rɑ̈nhì dëlli gen ókïrrø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø keny-ɑ ótïngɑ pilɑ. Ge ókïïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ge tɑg-ɑ ri gen, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh.”" 
Ezekiel32:11 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Wu ceg-ɑ tumø ki pili rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀." 
Ezekiel32:12 Yɑ ókɑ̈ni kömí ki liny pödhh-ɑ yethi gen wöny, o jií bënn nɑ̈g yi gen. Jií ónɑ̈g kɑ jɑmm-ɑ per gen thwøøg rënyi." 
Ezekiel32:13 Dhögí, dhög-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø kì kömi nɑm ónɑ̈g yi yɑn. Bong dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ dhyɑng men-ɑ ócödh pï ki lɑ̈bø këti." 
Ezekiel32:14 Pïgí ówëggɑ nïërø, kɑ ge ogöögø ge tïl, kɑ nɑ̈mmí wëggɑ ngwej mɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel32:15 Keny-ɑ ógwøgɑ Rïp ɑ́ thur, kɑ tyëng-ɑ yije bënn nɑ̈gɑ, bene ɑ óyodii yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel32:16 Kyëdø men ógöögø ɑ́ wöri ywøg. Ówör yi nyigi pödhh bënn ɑ́ men ywøg gen Rïp kí jie bënn. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel32:17 Kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïïj cyɑ̈nggi kyeel dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ywöngí kipe tyëng Rïp. Ör gen piny pödhi tyëngthøø geki pödhh-ɑ teg møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel32:19 Köbbí Rïp kinni, ‘Yï orumø kinni yï pëddi myëërø kibøli pödhh bënn? Yï ókedhi piny pödhi tyëngthøø kɑ yï obuddø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk.’" 
Ezekiel32:20 “Tyëng Rïp ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny. Pilø nenn-ɑ nɑ̈gi gen bënn. 
Ezekiel32:21 Jödd-ɑ teg geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́køny gen ki nyɑɑg; tyëng Rïp ɑ́cwøøl gen pödhi tyëngthøø, ge ceg-ɑ ryeerø kinni tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny ɑ́bï keny, gen ɑ buud kì keny ek!" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Acuur nud kì kunɑni e ótyegø yi rörri jølinye. Ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny bënn," 
Ezekiel32:23 o rörri gen ying-ɑ piny piny kì pödhi tyëngthøø. Jølinye bënn ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny, o röre bɑ ɑtyeg yi rörri gen. Bene gen tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ böggø kì piny tyëngnëënø." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Elɑm nud kì kunɑni e röre ótyegø yi rörri jølinye; ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny bënn, ɑkedhi gen piny pödhi tyëngthøø, ge nuti ngølø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́nëën gen ge ɑ́ceg kɑ böggø, de ɑnɑn ge buud ge thøø ge yɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel32:25 Elɑm buud-ɑ piny kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny, ótyegø yi rörri jølinye. Ge pɑth ki ɑngøl bënn, ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ böggø kì kömi piny, de ɑnɑn ge buud ge yɑ̈rø ni tyëng-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mecek geki Tubɑl nud kì kunɑni thyew, ge ótyegø yi rörri jøliny mø gen. Ge pɑth ki ɑngøl bënn, ge ɑ́nɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny bënn, ngö ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ böggø yi ji cøn." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ge nuti konyø kɑ dhwɑ̈ng ni jöddi liny mø kɑ̈ge dööng; ge nuti kumø ki ködd, ngö ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ böggø yi ji cøn." 
Ezekiel32:28 “Bene kër-ɑ óbuud Rïp e ónyøngø ɑnɑn, kì kelli jøg-ɑ nuti ngølø møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edöm nud kì kunɑni geki rɑ̈dhe, kí jɑgge. Ge ɑ́bëëd gɑ jøg mø teg, de ɑnɑn ge buud-ɑ pödhi tyëngthøø geki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Nyiirɑ̈dhhi wɑɑng wuudø bënn nud kì kunɑni geki tyëng Sïdön. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge ceg kɑ böggø yi ji, de ɑnɑn ge ɑ́kedhi piny ki ɑyɑ̈r kyeel ki tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki ɑngøl møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny. Ge ɑ́kɑ̈bbi ki ɑyɑ̈ɑ̈r tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kedhi piny pödhi tyëngthøø." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Keny-ɑ óliidh tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, pyëwe ótëngi geki yɑye.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel32:32 “Ji ɑ́wëggɑ böggø yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp, de ónɑ̈g geki jølinye bënn, kɑ ge obuddø kì kelli tyëng-ɑ pɑth ki ɑngøl møg-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì yij liny.” Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel33:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí jií gïg-ɑ ócwöb keny-ɑ ókɑ̈nɑ kömi pödhø ki liny. Ji ókɑ̈bbi ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me göögø ɑ́ jɑlkor." 
Ezekiel33:3 Kenyi lidhe ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø e obëënø, o kɑng nyi kodhe ɑ́ men köbbi ji." 
Ezekiel33:4 Ngɑn-ɑ ólïngi ywøøg kɑng, de gø pɑ ywööre, owɑ̈nhi ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø kɑ nɑ̈g, cyënne óying köme kete." 
Ezekiel33:5 Thøw-ɑ bɑng bɑ̈jje, mɑ́ ke di lïnge, di bødh. Cyënne ying-ɑ köme." 
Ezekiel33:6 De keløg jɑlkor ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ólidh yi en e obëënø, kɑ ocögø e kɑng pɑ kodh yi en, kɑ tyëngorøg møgɑni nɑ̈g yi ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø, cyënni gen cïbɑ’ kömi jɑlkor menɑni." 
Ezekiel33:7 “Anɑn wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, yï ɑ́gwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ jɑlkor, o ge nyi kyëddi yi yïn." 
Ezekiel33:8 Keløg ngetorøg óköbbɑ kinni ceg-ɑ thøø, kɑ ocögø e pɑ kyëddi yi yïn kinni wïye ki orøge, kɑ othøø kì yij orøg, cyënne cïbɑ’ kömí." 
Ezekiel33:9 Keløg ngetorøg okyëddø yi yïn kɑ óbɑ̈nyø ki wïyø ki orøg, ceg-ɑ thøø kì yij orøg, de yïn wëyí óyiel.”" 
Ezekiel33:10 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí tyëng Isrɑil kinni wu rïïj wu okööbø kinni, ‘Orøøg wøn ying-ɑ kömi wøn, wø othøø, wø óbëëdø kidï?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Köbbí gen kinni yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, pyëwɑ pɑ med ki thøwi dhɑnhø kì yij orøge, dɑ́ kinni yewe ki orøge, o bødhe. Isrɑil, wïyí ki orøg. Á kipe ngø ɑ dwɑddí thøø?" 
Ezekiel33:12 “Anɑn wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí Isrɑil kinni, keløg ngɑndøj ócɑ̈gø ki orøg, pɑ yiel yi gïgtir møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge cøn. Keløg ngetorøg ówïyø ki orøg pɑ cɑy këti, o keløg ngɑntir ócɑ̈gø ki orøg wëye pɑ yiel." 
Ezekiel33:13 Keløg ngɑntir oköbbø yi yɑn kinni yï ónëënø, kɑ ócɑ̈gø ki orøg, gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge cøn pɑ pɑr yi yɑn këti. Ceg-ɑ thøø kipe orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøge." 
Ezekiel33:14 Keløg ngetorøg oköbbø yi yɑn kinni ceg-ɑ thøø. Kɑ ówïyø ki orøg, kɑ døøg-ɑ be gøggi dyër geki gïgdøj," 
Ezekiel33:15 ni keløg gïg-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi en, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́kwɑle gï dögge’ wëëg gen, kɑ ówïyø ki orøg, kɑ døøg-ɑ be mïdhi cigg-ɑ nyi muujø ki nënnì, ceg-ɑ nënnø; pɑ thøw." 
Ezekiel33:16 Orøge ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi yɑn, o ónëënø, mɑ́ e ɑ́göög ki gwøng tir." 
Ezekiel33:17 “Jií okööbø i yɑ pɑ gøggi dyër! Pɑth, bɑ gen ɑ pɑ gøggi dyër." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ke wïyi ngɑntir ki gwøg ki gwøng tir, kɑ ócɑ̈gø gwøg ki orøg, thuw-ɑ orøge." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ke wïyi ngetorøg ki gwøg ki orøg, kɑ døøg-ɑ be gøggi dyër geki gwøng tir, wëye ɑ́yiele." 
Ezekiel33:20 De yïn Isrɑil, yï okööbø i yɑ pɑ gøggi dyër. Yï ócɑy yi yɑn kɑ per gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Kì bïïj cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryeew runni wøn kì yïnø, ɑ ɑ́bëën ngɑn me pɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì Yerusɑlem, kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, i kɑɑlɑni pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø." 
Ezekiel33:22 Kömɑ ɑ́bëën yi wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì böörø, e jɑlɑni nuti bëënø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi jɑlɑni kì mwøl, ɑwiy yɑn o yɑ døøgɑ be kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel33:23 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil, kɑ̈dd-ɑ rënyø okööbø kinni, ‘Abrɑhɑm ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ jɑl ɑ́kyel, kɑ piny bëne mëggii. Anɑn wø gïïr; piny bɑ mi wøn.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 “Köbbí gen møg-ɑ kwøb yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Wu cɑm-ɑ rïngø ki remø kì ree. Wu mɑll-ɑ ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth. Wu ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g ki ji. Á ngø ɑ wëggi wun rumø kinni piny bɑ mi wun?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Wu bëëd ɑ ri pilli wun. Wu gøgg-ɑ rɑj, ngɑn nyi kwɑny-ɑ cï wɑɑd gen. Piny óbëëd ɑ́ mi wun?" 
Ezekiel33:27 “Köbbí gen kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Yɑn ɑ Nëënø, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈dd-ɑ rënyø ónɑ̈g. Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì pɑ̈l ócɑm yi lɑ̈yy. Tyëng-ɑ pɑ̈nni kì yethi órøggi kïttì ónɑ̈g yi rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì." 
Ezekiel33:28 Pödhø ógwøgɑ ɑ́ ryɑng, kɑ tegø men-ɑ pere thwøg gen cuungɑ. Kïtti Isrɑil ri gen óløg gen pɑ̈l me bong wëll møg kɑ̈lli yethi gen." 
Ezekiel33:29 Keny-ɑ ócɑyɑ ji kì bɑng orøøg gen, kɑ pödhø odöngø ɑ́ ryɑng, óyod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel33:30 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tyëng pödhi wun kööb ɑ rií kenyi rwööm gen kì dhøggi dörri kɑɑl geki dhøggi kɑ̈lli gen, ge okööbø kinni, ‘Anɑn, kedhi wɑ be lïngi møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.’" 
Ezekiel33:31 Codhe, o jiɑ bï gen yïí, o ge lïngi gen kwøbbí, de gïn-ɑ köbbí gen pɑ gwøg yi gïn. Dhøggi gen wɑ̈dh-ɑ bëëdø ge med yøw, de döngi pëëth pɑ wiy yi gen." 
Ezekiel33:32 Yï nenni yi gen yï nɑ ngɑn wör wöri mɑ̈ɑ̈dø yøw; ngɑn cwɑgge med me thumø ki thom. Kwøbbí nyii lïngø yi gen, de bong gïjø ɑ́kyel men nyi gwøg yi gen kì ri gïn." 
Ezekiel33:33 De keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kwøbbí bënn kɑ̈jji gen; o ge ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth, codhe o yod yi gen kinni ɑ́dɑ jɑltöng kì kelli gen.”" 
Ezekiel34:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí jøg-ɑ kwɑy Isrɑil, köbbí gen kinni Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni i wun, wu kwɑ̈yyi Isrɑil, ri wun dɑ cyën! Wu kor-ɑ ri wun, de dyëg pɑ kor yi wun." 
Ezekiel34:3 Wu cɑm-ɑ dyëg-ɑ cwɑɑdhø, o wu rug-ɑ ógudhi yëyyi dyëg, o wu mɑdhh-ɑ cɑg, de dyëg pɑ kwɑy yi wun."
