Ezekiel34:4 Møg-ɑ dëlli gen rɑ̈mø nuti tuur wun, o møg-ɑ ri gen di kedd, keddi gen nuti kood wun, møg-ɑ torø nuti pyëëdh wun, o møg-ɑ ɑ́töngi pɑ̈l nuti dwöög wun. Møg-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny nuti yɑɑb wun, de ge mïdhi yi wun kɑ yuu-ɑ rɑj." 
Ezekiel34:5 Kɑ dyëg otɑyø kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde e bong jɑlkwɑ̈yø; ɑcɑɑm gen yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l. 
Ezekiel34:6 Codhe, ɑtɑɑy dyëgɑ kelli kïttì geki kömi piny bëne, e bong ngɑn nenni gen wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn yɑb gen." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Anɑn, wu jøkwɑ̈yø, lïngu møg-ɑ köbb-ɑ wun, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel34:8 Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, lɑ̈w ke di lïngu kwøbbɑ. Dyëgɑ kömi gen ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l kɑ gï cɑm gen, kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëde e bong jɑlkwɑ̈yø. Jøkwɑ̈yø møgɑ dyëg nuti yɑbø yi gen. Ge kor-ɑ ri gen, de dyëg pɑ kwɑy yi gen." 
Ezekiel34:9 Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, lïngu kwøbbɑ wun ɑ jøkwɑ̈yø." 
Ezekiel34:10 Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki wun. Dyëg kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø kì yï wun. Wu pɑ cigɑ gwøgø wun ɑ́ jøkwɑ̈yø mø gen. Wu pɑ wëggɑ korri ri wun këti. Dyëgɑ óyielɑ kì cinggi wun, o ge cög gen ge pɑ cɑm yi wun." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Wu köbbɑ’ köbbø, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ónenni dyëgɑ o ge ókorɑ," 
Ezekiel34:12 ni kenyi yɑb jɑlkwɑ̈yø dyëge møg-ɑ ɑ́tɑy, kɑ gï dwööge kej ɑ́kyel. Ge ódwöögɑ kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ looj møg-ɑ ɑ́tɑɑy yi gen bënn." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì pödhh-ɑ pɑth, kɑ ge cøngɑ, o ge dwöögɑ piny gen. Ge ókwɑyɑ kì wɑ̈thi kïttì geki yethi törr, kì yij piny Isrɑil bëne." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ge ókwɑyɑ kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ di lum-ɑ døøj, geki wɑ̈thi kïtti Isrɑil, kïtt-ɑ bɑ̈rrø e bong gïn böggi yi gen. Ge ócyɑ̈mø kì yij tör-ɑ mɑr kì yij piny Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel34:15 Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ókwɑy dyëgɑ, o ge óyɑ̈bbɑ ki keny ywööm gen. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel34:16 “Møg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny óyɑɑbɑ, o møg-ɑ ɑ́tɑy óbïïdhɑ, o møg-ɑ ɑ́tor ópyëdhɑ, o møg-ɑ ri gen di kedd, keddi gen ókodɑ. De møg-ɑ cwɑɑdhø, ɑ teg nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø, mɑ́ yɑ bɑ jɑlkwɑ̈yø men-ɑ dyër." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Anɑn, wun ɑ dyëgɑ, wu cɑyɑ’ cɑyø; møg døj dɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ’ dɑ̈ɑ̈ngø ki møg rijjø, o ɑ́tegg ódɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki römm." 
Ezekiel34:18 Kwï wun pɑ yɑ̈ng yi cɑm ki lum-ɑ døøj, o men-ɑ pɑ cɑm yi wun yöd e nyøøn wu’ piny! Wu mɑdh-ɑ pïg-ɑ tïl, o møg-ɑ pɑ mɑdh yi wun, nyi cödh yi wun!" 
Ezekiel34:19 O dyëgɑ møg-ɑ kyeelø cɑm gen lum-ɑ ɑ́nyøn yi wun, o ge mɑdh gen pïg-ɑ ɑ́cödh yi wun." 
Ezekiel34:20 “Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, wun ɑ köbbɑ yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, yɑn ɑ ólidh gøøny dyëg-ɑ cwɑɑdhø geki dyëg-ɑ gwɑ̈lø." 
Ezekiel34:21 Mɑ́ dyëg-ɑ gwɑ̈lø ɑ́dhur wun wɑ̈g ki wɑ̈thi tøggi wun; ge ɑ́cööb wun, kɑ ge cyeed wun wɑ̈yi gen." 
Ezekiel34:22 De dyëgɑ óyiel yi yɑn; ge koo wëggɑ mïdhø ki mïnh-ɑ rɑj këti. Yɑn ɑ ócɑy men kí men, o møg-ɑ døj ódɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki møg-ɑ rijjø." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ge óthödhɑ ki rɑ̈dh me ni bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd, o bëëde ɑ́ en ɑ bɑ kwɑ̈yi gen kete; en ɑ ókorri gen." 
Ezekiel34:24 Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ Jwøøg gen, o rɑ̈nh-ɑ ni bɑ̈ngɑ Debïd bene rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen. Yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel34:25 Wø ólwöbø ki lwömi mër ki gen, kɑ lɑ̈yy-ɑ rijjø kɑ̈l kì yij piny, o dyëg bëëd gen ge bong gïn böggi yi gen, cɑgg ge buddi kì yethi pwödh, wɑlɑ̀ ge buud-ɑ wɑg." 
Ezekiel34:26 “Ge ógyëdhɑ, kɑ ge wëggɑ bëëdø kì bɑdhhi kïti kwërɑ. Ge ónëngɑ ki kødh kì bøli keje ceth, e bɑ kødh gyëdh." 
Ezekiel34:27 Yenh ónywøl kɑ pwödh ocyegø. Ge óbëëdø kì piny gen e bong gïn böggi yi gen. Keny-ɑ ógöönyɑ gen wɑ̈g kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø, kɑ ge yielɑ kì cinggi tyëng-ɑ mïdhi gen gɑ bɑ̈ngg, óyod yi gen kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel34:28 Jɑmmi gen koo kɑbbi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, wɑlɑ̀ ge pɑ cɑm yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l. Ge óbëëdø ki mër e bong gïn böggi yi gen." 
Ezekiel34:29 Pwödhhi gen ówëggɑ cyegø, o óbëëd e bong kɑ̈j kì yij pödhø. Ge koo gwɑddi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø këti." 
Ezekiel34:30 O yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni Isrɑil bɑ miɑ, o korr-ɑ yi yɑn. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Wu bɑ dyëgɑ, dyëg-ɑ nyi kwɑy yi yɑn, wu bɑ jiɑ, o yɑ bɑ Jwøøg wun.” Møg-ɑ kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel35:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí pödhi Edöm cɑ́ye." 
Ezekiel35:3 Köbbí gen møg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Yɑ mɑ̈n ki wun, wun ɑ kïtti Edöm! Wu gwøgɑ’ gwøgø wun ɑ́ ryɑng." 
Ezekiel35:4 Kɑ̈ddí órënyɑ kɑ ge gwøgɑ gɑ thur. O pinyí dönge ɑ́ ryɑng; codhe o yod yi yïn kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel35:5 “Yï ɑ́mɑn-ɑ Isrɑil kɑ wëggí nɑ̈gø keny-ɑ ɑ́yinge yethi rɑj, kɑ ɑ́cɑɑyii ki cɑ́y-ɑ cyɑ̈n kipe orøge." 
Ezekiel35:6 Yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, yï pɑ wiy yi thøø kinni tek, mɑ́ yï ɑ́ceg-ɑ nɑ̈g, thøø ólugi kì bɑngí." 
Ezekiel35:7 Kïtti Edöm ógwøgɑ gɑ ryɑng, o tyëng-ɑ ókɑ̈lli kɑ̈jjɑni ónɑ̈gɑ bënn." 
Ezekiel35:8 Wɑ̈thi kïttì ópɑ̈ng yi yɑn ki tyëngthøø, kɑ yethi törr pɑ̈ngɑ ki tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel35:9 Yï ógwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ ryɑng gïti ɑtheer, yethi kɑ̈ddí pɑ bëëd këti. Codhe o yod yi yïn kinni, yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Yï okööbø kinni Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil, kí pìnyi gen bɑ møgí, ce ge ókwɑny yi yïn cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ Jwøøg gen." 
Ezekiel35:11 Kì bɑng kwøbbɑni, yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø, yï ócɑyɑ kipe liny geki mud, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈nø møg-ɑ ɑ́göggí jiɑ. O yod yi gen kinni yï cɑy yi yɑn kɑ per gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggí gen." 
Ezekiel35:12 Codhe o yod yi yïn kinni gïg-ɑ ɑ́kømmí kinni, kïtti Isrɑil ɑ́döng nøw, o ge bɑ møg kwɑny yi yïn, ge ɑ́lïngɑ yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel35:13 Kwøbbi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wun kì riɑ geki ɑthwøøg wun, ge ɑ́lïngɑ.”" 
Ezekiel35:14 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï ógwøgɑ yïn ɑ́ ryɑng, o kömi piny bëne pyëwe mïne kipe gïn-ɑ ógöggɑ yïn," 
Ezekiel35:15 ni kɑ ɑ́mïni pyëwí ki rënyi Isrɑil, ɑ ceg bëëdø ɑ́ miɑ. Kïtti Seir, kì piny Edöm bëne ceg-ɑ döng nøw. Codhe, o yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí kïtti Isrɑil, köbbí gen kinni lïngi gen wöön-ɑ köbbɑ gen," 
Ezekiel36:2 yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø okööbø kinni, ‘Kïtt-ɑ weenø ɑ́göög gɑ møgee!’" 
Ezekiel36:3 “Mɑ́ ge okööbø kinøw, köbbí gen møg-ɑ kømmɑ, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi Isrɑil yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kɑ gø mɑg gen, Isrɑil ɑ́yɑnyyi yi gen ge bënn." 
Ezekiel36:4 Kì bɑng menɑni, lïngu møg-ɑ kømmi yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wun ɑ kïtti Isrɑil, kí dhøg, kí törr, kí kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́rënyi, ɑ ɑ́yɑg kɑ ge odöngø gɑ thur, kɑ ge gɑggi yi pödhh-ɑ buti wun bënn." 
Ezekiel36:5 “Yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni pyëwɑ ɑ́rënyi ki pödhh-ɑ butí bënn, o pyëwɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø kɑ tyëng Edöm, kipe kɑ ɑ́kwɑny gen pinyɑ ɑ́ mi gen, kí törre bënn, de pëthi gen ceg-ɑ medø." 
Ezekiel36:6 “Kì bɑng menɑni töngí Isrɑil; köbbí kïtt-ɑ døngø, kí kïtt-ɑ thønhø, kí dhøg, kí törr kinni, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ 'kööb-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ, o pyëwɑ rɑɑj kipe kɑ ɑ́yɑnyyi gen yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ge yɑ̈r yi pödhhɑni." 
Ezekiel36:7 Yɑ ɑ́köngi yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni pödhh-ɑ buti wun óyɑ̈r." 
Ezekiel36:8 De yenh ócigi twïyø kɑ ge onywølø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì Isrɑil, gɑ mø wun wu jiɑ tyëng Isrɑil. Wu bɑ møg jwɑn dwöög pödhi wun." 
Ezekiel36:9 Yɑ ying-ɑ kömi wun, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ lidhi piny wun e okɑ̈gø, o köödh opidhø." 
Ezekiel36:10 Kwɑnni wun ówëggɑ ngënyø. Wu óbëëdø kì yethi kɑ̈dd kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́rënyi bënn ger yi wun. 
Ezekiel36:11 Ji geki dhög ówëggɑ ngënyø. Wu óngënyi kibøli men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun cøn; nyigi wun óngënyi. Wu ówëggɑ bëëdø ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd wun cøn, kɑ wu wëggɑ dönyø kibøli men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wun. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel36:12 Jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ pödhi gen, o ge bëëd gen kì yije. Pinyɑni óbëëd ɑ́ mi gen, o nyigi gen koo wëggɑ nɑ̈gø yi kɑ̈j këti." 
Ezekiel36:13 “Yɑ okööbø yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Bɑ dyër ɑ nyi kømmi yi ji kinni piny ceg-ɑ cɑm ki ji, kɑ nyigi pödhø nyi kɑbe." 
Ezekiel36:14 De cɑg ɑnɑn, koo cyɑ̈mø ki ji, o nyigi wun koo kɑbe. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel36:15 Wu koo wëggɑ lïngø ki gɑɑg pödhh-ɑ kyeelø këti, wɑlɑ̀ wu koo yɑnyyi yi gen. Nywøli wun koo kɑb yi piny këti. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel36:17 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd tyëng Isrɑil kì yij piny gen, gø ɑ́ywëdh gen ki yëth-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gen. Bëëdi gen ge ywëdhø pɑ̈ɑ̈r yi yɑn kɑ kenyi bëëd ngɑndhɑjø ree dɑ kwëër dwɑ̈ye." 
Ezekiel36:18 Akønyɑ linyɑ kömi gen, kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen kì yij pinyɑni, kí ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth møg-ɑ ɑ́ywëdh gen piny." 
Ezekiel36:19 Acɑyɑ gen kì bɑng bëën-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gen, ɑkedhhɑ gen kì yethi pödhh-ɑ pɑth." 
Ezekiel36:20 Kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi gen, nyingɑ kwërø ɑ́yɑ̈r yi gen, mɑ́ ji nyii kööbø kinni, ‘Møg bɑ jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw ge ɑ́bï wɑ̈g kì yij pinyɑni.’" 
Ezekiel36:21 Bene ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwɑ kipe nyingɑ kwërø óyɑ̈r yi tyëng Isrɑil, kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi gen." 
Ezekiel36:22 “O ɑnɑn köbbí gøl Isrɑil kinni: Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, gïn-ɑ dwɑddɑ gwøgø pɑth kiper wun, wu tyëng Isrɑil, den-ɑ́ kipe nyingɑ kwërø; nyingɑ ɑ́yɑ̈r yi wun, kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi wun." 
Ezekiel36:23 Keny-ɑ ónyudhɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bëëdi nyingɑ gɑ kwërø, eni nying-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈r yi wun kì kelli gen, óyod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb. Ge ónyudhɑ kì ri wun, kinni yɑ bɑ kwërø." 
Ezekiel36:24 Wu ókwɑnyɑ kì pödhhɑni bënn; wu ócøngɑ, kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ pödhi wun." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ri wun ówïddɑ ki pïg dhïw, o wu dhïwi wun ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun geki ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth bënn." 
Ezekiel36:26 Wu ónëngɑ ki pëëth mø nyɑ̈n geki rummì mø nyɑ̈n. Minni wun møg-ɑ teg ni tuggi kïttì ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ wu nëngɑ ki min møøgø mø bɑ rïngø." 
Ezekiel36:27 Wëyɑ ócïbɑ ri wun, kɑ wu wëggɑ mïdhi ciggɑ, kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ wun bënn mïdhi yi wun." 
Ezekiel36:28 Codhe o wu óbëëd wun kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ kweyyi wun. O wu bëëd wun, wun ɑ́ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wun." 
Ezekiel36:29 Wu óyielɑ ki jɑmm-ɑ nyi ywëdh wun, kɑ gemè wëggɑ cyegø, o bëëd e bong kɑ̈j men-ɑ ómɑg wun këti." 
Ezekiel36:30 Nywøli yenh ówëggɑ ngënyø kɑ jɑmmì wëggɑ cyegø, o bëëd e bong kɑ̈j men-ɑ óyɑ̈r wun këti kì kelli pödhh-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel36:31 O yëth-ɑ rijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun nyi pɑr yi wun geki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun, o pëthi wun nyi rënyi gen ki ri wun, kì bɑng orøøg wun." 
Ezekiel36:32 Wu tyëng Isrɑil, yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni, o yod yi wun kinni pɑth ki kiper wun ɑ gwøgɑ møgɑni bënn. Dɑ́ kipe kinni o wɑ̈thi wun lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen kì bɑng rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi wun. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel36:33 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyɑ orøøg wun, kɑ wu gwøgɑ wu dhïw, wu ówëggɑ bëëdø kì yethi kɑ̈ddi wun, kɑ kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́rënyi ger yi wun." 
Ezekiel36:34 Piny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ ryɑng ópur këti. 
Ezekiel36:35 Ji bënn ókööbø kinni piny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ pɑ̈l ɑ́göög ni bɑɑg Eden. O kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ryɑng ɑ́ger ki dör, o yethi gen obëëdø yi ji." 
Ezekiel36:36 Codhe, o yod yi pödhh-ɑ buti wun, møg-ɑ ɑ́döng kinni, yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́ger kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́rënyi, kɑ pwödh døøgɑ ki pidhø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb, o møgɑni gwøgɑ’ gwøgø.”" 
Ezekiel36:37 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Isrɑil ócigɑ wëggi kwɑjji yɑn kipe kønye, kwɑnni gen ówëggɑ ngënyø ni kwɑnni dyëg." 
Ezekiel36:38 Kɑ̈dd-ɑ rënyø ɑnɑn, ópɑ̈ng yi ji ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd Yerusɑlem, e pɑ̈ng yi dyëg-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ gëdhhi kwër. Codhe, o yod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ying-ɑ kömɑ kɑ yɑ kɑ̈l yi wëye, ɑcïb gen yɑn piny kì yij tör me pɑ̈ng yi cu." 
Ezekiel37:2 Kɑ yɑ kɑ̈lle kì kelli gïn, ɑlidhɑ cu ge gïïr cɑrø, o ge thwøwø kinni gɑng." 
Ezekiel37:3 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, cu møg ócuggø døøg be nënnø?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Yï ketí ɑ ngɑ̈nyi møgɑni, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Töngí gen. Köbbí cu-ɑ thwøwø møgɑni kinni lïngi gen kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j" 
Ezekiel37:5 Töngí gen møg-ɑ köbbɑ gen, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni: Wu thödhɑ’ thödhø ki wëy, o wu døøg wun be nënnø." 
Ezekiel37:6 Wu óthödhɑ ki rɑ̈r geki rïng, o kömi gen kumɑ ki dël. Wu óthödhɑ ki wëy, o wu døøg wun be nënnø. Codhe, o yod yi wun kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Codhe, ɑtöngɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ okööbø, ɑlïngɑ ki cwɑg mø ywöngi kinni røk røk, kɑ cu ri gen cøng gen kej ɑ́kyel." 
Ezekiel37:8 Kɑ cu kum yi rɑ̈r geki rïngø, yɑ nudd yɑ onëënø, ɑkum gen yi dël. De bong wëy kì ri gen." 
Ezekiel37:9 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí yømø kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni yømø, köní kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny gɑ ɑ́ngwen, kɑ yï köddí ri tyëng-ɑ thøø ɑnɑn, o ge cɑ̈r gen.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Codhe, ɑtöngɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi yɑn. Akedhi wëy ri gen, ɑcɑ̈r gen, kɑ ge dhwödh-ɑ mɑl kömi tyelli gen. Ge bɑ yɑy me dwøng cɑrø." 
Ezekiel37:11 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøk kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, tyëng Isrɑil nɑ cuɑni. Ge okööbø ce ge thwøwø, o bong gïn ngɑ̈dh yi gen kipe dhuki megø." 
Ezekiel37:12 De köbbí jiɑ tyëng Isrɑil kinni, ge ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi rörri gen, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ piny Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel37:13 Keny-ɑ óyiebɑ rörri gen kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g, óyod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel37:14 Wëyɑ ókoodhɑ ri gen, o ge cɑ̈r gen, o ge ówëggɑ bëëdø kì yij piny gen. Codhe, o yod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Møgɑni ɑ́kwøbɑ, o ge gwøgɑ’ gwøgø. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j këti kinni," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, kɑ̈bbí ki lodh kɑ köme gweed kinni, ‘Pödhi Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀.’ Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki lodh megø, kɑ köme gweed kinni, ‘Pödhi Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil.’" 
Ezekiel37:17 Kɑ lødhɑni ryeet mɑɑg e wɑ̈thi gen pɑ̈r, o ge nënni gen ge nɑ lodh ɑ́kyel." 
Ezekiel37:18 Keny-ɑ ópyëëj yïn yi tyëng pödhi wun ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni," 
Ezekiel37:19 kɑ ge köbbí kinni: Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, loodh pödhi Isrɑil óreb yi yɑn geki loodh Yeudiyɑ̀. Ge ógwøgɑ gɑ lodh ɑ́kyel, o mïdhɑ kì cingɑ." 
Ezekiel37:20 “Mɑg lødhɑni ryeet kì cingí, kɑ wiy ge lidh yi ji." 
Ezekiel37:21 Codhe, kɑ ge köbbí kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni: Jiɑ bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ wɑ̈g kì yethi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhi yi gen, ge ócungɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny bënn, o ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ piny gen." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ge ógwøgɑ gɑ pödhø ɑ́kyel kì wɑ̈thi kïtti Isrɑil. Ge ójɑɑg yi rɑ̈dh ɑ́kyel, ri gen koo cigi gen pɑ̈ngø gɑ pödhh ɑ́ryew." 
Ezekiel37:23 Ri gen koo bwöl yi gen ki ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth; ngïjj-ɑ rijjø këti. Ge óyielɑ kì yij orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen. Ge ówëggɑ dhïwø. Ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen." 
Ezekiel37:24 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen óni Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ. Ge óreb yi jɑgø ɑ́kyel, kɑ ciggɑ mïdhi yi gen kidøøj." 
Ezekiel37:25 Ge óbëëdø kì yij piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ bɑ̈ngɑ Yɑgob; eni piny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi kweyyi gen cøn. Ge óbëëdø kì yije gïti ɑtheer geki nyigi gen kí kwɑrri gen thyew. Ge ójɑɑg yi rɑ̈dh me ni Debïd bɑ̈ngɑ gïti ɑtheer. 
Ezekiel37:26 Ge ónëngɑ ki mër gïti ɑtheer. Ge ócïbɑ piny kɑ kwɑnni gen wëggɑ ngënyø. Kengɑ ócïbɑ piny gen gïti ɑtheer. 
Ezekiel37:27 Yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli gen; yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, o ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ." 
Ezekiel37:28 Keny-ɑ ócïbɑ Kengø kelli gen gïti ɑtheer, óyod yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Isrɑil ɑ́myegɑ gɑ jiɑ.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí Gög, jɑngi Mecec geki Tubɑl kì pödhi Mɑgög. Töngí," 
Ezekiel38:3 kɑ köbbí kinni, yɑn yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki en." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ówinnɑ, kɑ órøme ngönɑ ki ɑbɑdh, kɑ dhurɑ wɑ̈g geki linye bëne. Linye geki kyënyi gen, kí jøkyënyì møg-ɑ rugø ki ógudh-ɑ myër ge ngenyø ki mendwøng, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ ködd bënn kí pil." 
Ezekiel38:5 Jø Pɑres, kí jø Kuc, kí jø Put cyɑ̈dhi kɑ gøn, yï gen bënn dɑ ködd kí ɑcudh kì wɑ̈thi gen." 
Ezekiel38:6 Kí liny Gömer bëne geki Bet Tögɑrmɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wuudø, ge cyɑ̈dhi kɑ gøn, kí tyëng pödhh møøgø mø gïïr." 
Ezekiel38:7 Köbbí tyenye ree geki linye bëne. 
Ezekiel38:8 Kì bɑng runn mø gïïr, óköbbɑ mɑgi pönh-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ji-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o ge óbëëd ge bong liny me böggi yi gen. Kïtti Isrɑil ómɑg yi en; gen ɑ kïtt-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ryɑng ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, ɑ wɑ̈thi gen bëëd ɑnɑn e bong böögø." 
Ezekiel38:9 En geki linye kí tyëng pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn møg-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki en, ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi pönhɑni ni ɑtunø kɑ piny kum gen ni pøølø.”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Møg-ɑ köbbi Gög yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, wïjí óbëën yi rummì mø rijjø." 
Ezekiel38:11 Yï ókööbø kinni yï kedh-ɑ be pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi pödhø me bëëdø kì yij mër, e bong gïn böggi yi en; o bëëd ɑ yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ nuti wenø ki dör, o bong gïn kor gen." 
Ezekiel38:12 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yethi kɑ̈dd-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ ryɑng óyɑg yi yïn, kɑ jɑmmi gen kɑɑb. Ge ɑ́cungɑ kì kelli pödhh, o ɑnɑn yï gen dɑ dhög kí jɑmmì, o ge bëëd ɑ kì ɑ́kɑrri yëthi piny." 
Ezekiel38:13 Yï ópyëj yi tyëng Cebɑ̀, kí Dedɑn, kí jøngyew mø pödhi Tɑrcic kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́bï-ɑ be yɑg geki kɑ̈b? Yï ɑ́bï-ɑ be kɑ̈l ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb, kí dhög geki jɑmmì mø ngenyø?’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:14 Codhe, ɑör yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, be köbbi Gög kinni, “Kedh ɑnɑn kɑ̀ bëëd jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈thi gen kïïdhø," 
Ezekiel38:15 kɑ̈l wɑɑng wuudø kun-ɑ lɑ̈wi, yï kwøll-ɑ liny me dwøng, liny teg, mɑ ɑ́cung kì kelli pödhh bënn, ge cyɑ̈dh-ɑ kyënyì bënn." 
Ezekiel38:16 Kɑ yï pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi jiɑ tyëng Isrɑil, ni ɑtunø me köni yij piny. Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni yï ówëggɑ yɑgi pinyɑ, o yɑ óyod yi pödhh, o bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ kwërø nyodhɑ kì rií." 
Ezekiel38:17 Bene yïn ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ cøn, keny-ɑ ɑ́töngɑ møgɑni ki dhøggi bɑ̈nggɑ, jøtöng mø Isrɑil kinni, kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbï, yɑ ókɑ̈ni ki dhɑnhø me pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Isrɑil.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel38:18 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëën Gög be yɑgi Isrɑil, yɑ ómɑg yi liny." 
Ezekiel38:19 Yɑ 'kööb-ɑ rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ kinni, kì cyɑ̈ngɑni piny ónhɑ̈nhi ki menrɑj kì Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel38:20 Rij bënn kí winy, kí lɑ̈yy-ɑ døngø geki møg-ɑ thønhø, kí dhɑnhø bëne kì wïj piny, ge ókïïr kì bølɑ. Kïttì ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh, kɑ gëlli kïttì ri gen møy gen, kɑ dör ópɑ̈nhø." 
Ezekiel38:21 Rɑj bënn ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kömi Gög, ji ri gen ónɑ̈nggi yi gen." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ócɑyɑ ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël geki nɑ̈gi rek, kí kønh teg, kí ɑ́piy geki ɑtunø, kí mɑc geki kïbrït; ge ókønyɑ köme geki linye kí pödhh-ɑ ngenyø møg-ɑ ying tunge bënn." 
Ezekiel38:23 Bene yuu-ɑ ónyudhɑ döngɑ geki bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ kwërø pödhh-ɑ kyeelø. Codhe, o yod yi gen kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 Aköbbi yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, töngí Gög, jɑngi Mecec geki Tubɑl, köbbí kinni yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki en." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ódwøøgɑ e kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ’ tung megø, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kì wɑɑng wuudø kun-ɑ lɑ̈wi, kɑ kïdhɑ kïtti Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel39:3 Wethe ógøøjɑ piny kì cingi cɑɑme, kɑ nywøli wethe gøøjɑ piny kì cingi kyëje." 
Ezekiel39:4 Gög geki linye, kí tyëng-ɑ ying tunge bënn, ge ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh ge thøø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì Isrɑil, kɑ ge göjjɑ cɑmø yi winy geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l." 
Ezekiel39:5 Ge ópɑ̈dhi pɑ̈l. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel39:6 Yɑ óödi kömi piny Mɑgög ki mɑc, geki kömi tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi nɑ̈mmì e bong gïn tunggi gen, o óyod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel39:7 Nyingɑ kwërø ówëggɑ bëëdø ge ngɑ̈nyi kì Isrɑil, o nyingɑ kwërø koo wëggɑ bwölø këti. Codhe, o yod yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ bɑ kwërø, Jwøøg Isrɑil.”" 
Ezekiel39:8 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́kømmɑ óbï ceth." 
Ezekiel39:9 Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ddi Isrɑil, ókedhi be gwen ki jɑmmi liny møg-ɑ döngø kì piny gɑ yugg. Ge ócwɑ̈gø ki mɑc ki ködd geki weth, ki nywøli weth, kí tøngg, kí lødh; gï ócwɑg yi gen ki runn ɑ́bïryew." 
Ezekiel39:10 Ge koo gwënø ki yugg, o ge koo ngudø ki yenh, mɑ́ yï gen ódi jɑmmi liny mø gïïr møg cwɑg yi gen. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yɑg gen kɑ jɑmmi gen kɑb gen, ólony yi gen ki yɑgø kɑ jɑmmi gïn kɑb gen.” Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel39:11 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni bënn, Gög óthödhɑ ki keny konyii kì Isrɑil, kì yij Töör Wëll, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì buti Luuy Omelø. Gög geki linye bëne ókony-ɑ kunɑni. Codhe o törɑni cɑg ɑ́ “Töör Yɑɑy Gög.”" 
Ezekiel39:12 Isrɑil ótyëg-ɑ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïryew e okunyø ki ji, o piny dönye cyee." 
Ezekiel39:13 Tyëng pödhø bënn ókunyø; óbëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng tyɑ̈mi Isrɑil; cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ónyodhɑ dhwɑ̈ngɑ.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑgɑk." 
Ezekiel39:14 Kì bɑng dwɑ̈tt ɑ́bïryew, ódi jøg-ɑ óyieny, o ge cyɑ̈dhi gen kì yij pödhø, ge yɑb-ɑ tyëng-ɑ döngø ge nuti konyø, o ge kony, o piny dönye." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ge ócyɑ̈dhi kì yij pödhø, o kenyi lidh gen cu dhɑnhø, o ge nyi cïbi gen bute ki ngïji, codhe o kunyì nyi bï gen, o cuɑni nyi koony yi gen Töör Yɑɑy Gög." 
Ezekiel39:16 Ódi kɑɑl me cyɑ̈gi men-ɑ ócɑ̈ggi nyingi linyɑni, codhe o piny døøge ki dönyø.”" 
Ezekiel39:17 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, köbbí winy bënn geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l bënn kinni bï gen be cɑm ki gëdhhì møg-ɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈llɑ gen. Bɑ ryëj me dwøng kì wɑ̈thi kïttì Isrɑil, o ge cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen ki rïngø, o ge mɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ki remø." 
Ezekiel39:18 Ge cɑm-ɑ jøliny, o ge mɑdh-ɑ remmi jɑggi kömi piny, møg-ɑ ónɑ̈g bënn ni römm wɑlɑ̀ dyëg kí wɑ̈dhh-ɑ cwɑɑdhø." 
Ezekiel39:19 Keny-ɑ ónɑ̈gɑ ji ni kenyi ngɑɑl gëdhhì, winy geki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l ócyɑ̈mø ki rïng-ɑ rørø, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø; ge ómɑ̈ɑ̈dhø ki remø, kɑ wɑ̈thi gen owïïnø yi gøn." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ge ócyɑ̈mø kì tɑwɑ ki kyënyì, kí jøkyënyì, kí jøliny, kɑ ge oyɑ̈ngø. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel39:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Dhwɑ̈ngɑ ónyudhɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ ge wëggɑ lidhi tegɑ geki cɑ́yɑ møg-ɑ bɑ dyër." 
Ezekiel39:22 O yod yi Isrɑil kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen; cɑg kì cyɑ̈ngɑni gïti dhuki megø." 
Ezekiel39:23 O yod yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kïdhi yïnø kɑ per orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen kì bølɑ. Alugɑ ngɑ̈jɑ gen, ɑwëggɑ gen tyɑmø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki gen, kɑ ge nɑ̈g kì yij liny." 
Ezekiel39:24 Bɑ kì bɑng rɑ̈ji gen geki cödhi gen, ɑ ɑ́göggɑ gen gïn ni menɑni, ɑlugɑ ngɑ̈jɑ gen.”" 
Ezekiel39:25 Akööb Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “De ɑnɑn yijɑ óywöngi kipe kwɑrri Yɑgob; tyëng Isrɑil, ówëggɑ dönyø këti. Nyingɑ kwërø ókorrɑ." 
Ezekiel39:26 Keny-ɑ ópëggi gen yij piny gen e bong gïn-ɑ óböggi yi gen, o bong ngɑn tunggi gen, wɑ̈thi gen ówïl ki ɑyɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́wiy gen yɑn piny." 
Ezekiel39:27 Kipe nyudhi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kinni yɑ bɑ kwërø, jiɑ ódwöögɑ kì pödhhi tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈n ki gen." 
Ezekiel39:28 Codhe, o yod yi jiɑ kinni yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen; mɑ́ ge ɑ́kïdhɑ pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, o ɑnɑn ge cøngɑ’ cøngø kipe kinni o ge dwöögɑ piny gen, e bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel kì kelli gen, me döngi yïnø." 
Ezekiel39:29 Wëyɑ ókønyɑ kömi tyëng Isrɑil, o ge pɑ lugɑ ngɑ̈jɑ këti. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïïj runni wøn kì yïnø, kì cyɑ̈nggi runn-ɑ nyɑ̈n pyɑ̈rø, o bɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngween runn kì bɑng mɑgi Yerusɑlem; cyɑ̈ngɑni ɑ ɑ́bëën tegi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kömɑ." 
Ezekiel40:2 Akïdhi yɑn piny Isrɑil yi Jwøk, kɑ yɑ cïbe wïj kït me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, ɑlïdhɑ ki ud mø ni kɑɑl kì bølɑ." 
Ezekiel40:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́nyiige yɑn buti kɑɑlɑni, ɑlidhɑ jɑl me rɑ̈nggø ni ngyënyø dilɑl, o cinge dɑ kor-ɑ yöm me bɑ ɑlɑdh, kí lonh-ɑ nyi rum; jɑlɑni cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ dhø döri kɑɑl." 
Ezekiel40:4 Aköbbi yɑn yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïng kidøøj kɑ pyëwí cïb ri møg-ɑ nyudhɑ yïn bënn, kipe bene per gen ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yïn keny. Yïn ɑ óköbbi tyëng Isrɑil gïg-ɑ ólidh yi yïn bënn.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Alidhɑ Kengø e ówenø ki dörø. Kɑ lonh-ɑ nyi rum kwɑny jɑlɑni, lonhɑni bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g, ɑrøme dörø. Ayode gøn e döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g, o pege bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g," 
Ezekiel40:6 Codhe, ɑbëëne dhøng-ɑ nenni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ yedh-ɑ mɑl, ɑrøme dhøngɑni kì mɑl; bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g eni bɑ̈re e rïng-ɑ piny." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ngɑ̈je ɑ́dɑ udd-ɑ nyi kur ɑ́dɑ̈g kì tuung kí ɑ́dɑ̈g kì tuung, uddɑni bɑ óør, o bɑ̈ri ngëdø ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g; o dör-ɑ kɑɑm gen bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr. Kɑ̀ pöödh uddɑni dɑ kɑɑm me kedhi yiny-ɑ ød, e rwöm ki Kengø; bɑ̈ri kɑɑmɑni bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel40:8 Arøme ønɑni, ɑyode bɑ̈re men-ɑ rïngi piny ɑ́ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen. Cɑ̈gi kì ri cögi kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l men-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki Kengø, kì kuni cöge kì cyɑ̈n, pegi döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel." 
Ezekiel40:9  
Ezekiel40:10 (Udd-ɑ nyi kur møg-ɑ ying tøggi kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, lɑ̈ji yethi gen pɑ̈r bënn, o pegi dörr-ɑ kɑɑm gen pɑ̈r bënn thyew.)" 
Ezekiel40:11 Codhe, ɑrøm lɑ̈ji yij kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi jɑlɑni, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr ɑ́bïkyel kí budi mïtïr, o kɑɑm dhøng-ɑ kedhi wɑ̈g bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel40:12 Kì bøli udd-ɑ nyi kur bënn dɑ dörø me cyeg, me bɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o pege bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj thyew, (lɑ̈ji yethi uddi kur møgɑni bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g.)" 
Ezekiel40:13 Codhe, ɑrøme kɑɑm-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì ri dör-ɑ cyɑ̈n kì ri uddɑni e cør-ɑ dïdyëri kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel40:14 Arøme øn-ɑ cyɑ̈n kì yuu-ɑ kedhi wɑ̈g, ɑyode lɑ̈ji yije ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel40:15 Bɑ̈ri kö yuu dhøng-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g bëne, cɑg kì ri dör-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ri dhøg, pïd øn-ɑ cyɑ̈n bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel40:16 Dɑ ɑwɑjj kì ri dörr-ɑ wɑ̈g kì ri uddɑni bënn geki ri dörr-ɑ ying kɑɑm uddɑni kì yiny-ɑ ød. Dɑ ngïjji yenh benø møg-ɑ ótwegø kì ri dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, ɑ nenni kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l." 
Ezekiel40:17 Akïdhi yɑn ódɑ̈rø yi jɑlɑni wø kɑ̈l-ɑ dhøng-ɑ kedhi wɑ̈g. Dɑ ud pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ógerø ni dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, bøli gen dɑ keny me di ópɑddi kïttì" 
Ezekiel40:18 me pödhø e wen-ɑ ódɑ̈rø. Ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g bɑ mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kì bøli ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød. 
Ezekiel40:19 Ádɑ dhøg me ying kuni mɑl me kedhi ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød. Kɑ kɑɑm dhøggɑni gɑ ɑ́ryew røm yi jɑlɑni, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel40:20 Codhe, ɑrøm dhøg yuu-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø men-ɑ kedhi ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g yi jɑlɑni." 
Ezekiel40:21 Kí ud ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ tøggi kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l gɑ ɑ́ryew, kí dörr-ɑ kɑɑm gen, kí øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l. Ayode gïn ge pɑ̈r ki udd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl bënn. Bɑ̈ri dhø kɑl bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈ji yije bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel40:22 Øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, kí ɑwɑjj, kí ngïjji yenh benø møg-ɑ ótwegø nɑ møg-ɑ ying dhøg wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Dɑ pɑ̈ltyel møg nyi yedhi mɑl gɑ ɑ́bïryew, møg kedhi dhøg dörø, o øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ying-ɑ cyɑ̈n, e nenn-ɑ ódɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel40:23 Kì kɑɑm-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n ódɑ̈rɑni kì dhøg wɑɑng wuudø, dɑ dhøg megø me kedhi ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, ni men-ɑ dhøg wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl ceth. Arøm kɑɑm dhøggɑni gɑ ɑ́ryew yi jɑlɑni, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel40:24 Codhe, ɑkïdhi yɑn tung-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl yi jɑlɑni, ɑlïdhɑ ki dhøg megø kì kunɑni, ɑrøme dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, geki øn-ɑ ri dhøg. Ayode gïn ge nɑ møg-ɑ kyeelø ceth." 
Ezekiel40:25 Dɑ ɑwɑjj kì ri ud ni møg-ɑ kyeelø. Bɑ̈ri kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l bëne bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj; o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr. 
Ezekiel40:26 Dɑ pɑ̈ltyel møg nyi yedhi mɑl gɑ ɑ́bïryew, møg kedhi dhøg ódɑ̈rø thyew. Dɑ ngïjji yenh benø møg-ɑ ótwegø kì ri dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, mø nenni yuu-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l." 
Ezekiel40:27 Dɑ yöö thyew me kedhi dhøg ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød. Arøm kɑɑm dhøggɑni, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel40:28 Akïdhi yɑn yiny-ɑ ød yi jɑlɑni, yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ dhøg wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Arøme yij yuuɑni, o yode gøn e pɑ̈r ki yuu-ɑ ying dhøng-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel40:29 Udd-ɑ nyi kur møge, kí øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, kí dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ ying dhøgg-ɑ kyeelø. Dɑ ɑwɑjj kì ri udd-ɑ dhøngɑni thyew. Bɑ̈re bëne bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈ji yije bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel40:30  
Ezekiel40:31 Øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l nenn-ɑ ódɑ̈r-ɑ kyeelø. Dɑ ngïjji yenh benø møg-ɑ ótwegø kì ri dörri kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l; pɑ̈ltyel møg-ɑ yedhi dhøngɑni bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Ezekiel40:32 Akïdhi yɑn ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød yi jɑlɑni, yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhøg wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Arøme dhøngɑni, ɑyode gøn e pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel40:33 Udd-ɑ nyi kur, kí øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, kí dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ ying dhøgg-ɑ kyeelø. Øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ówenø yi ɑwɑjj. Bɑ̈ri dhøng-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈ji yije bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel40:34 Øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l nenn-ɑ ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g. Dɑ ngïjji yenh benø møg-ɑ ótwegø kì ri dörri kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l; pɑ̈ltyel møg-ɑ nyi yedhi dhøngɑni bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Ezekiel40:35 Akïdhi yɑn dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø yi jɑlɑni. Arøme gøn, ɑyode gøn e pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ kyeelø." 
Ezekiel40:36 Pɑ̈r ki gen; yije dɑ ud, kí dörr-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, kí kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l. Bɑ̈re bëne bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈ji yije bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel40:37 Øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l nenn-ɑ ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g. Dɑ ngïjji yenh benø møg-ɑ ótwegø kì ri dörri kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l; pɑ̈ltyel møg-ɑ nyi yedhi dhøngɑni bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g. 
Ezekiel40:38 Kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ wɑ̈g, dɑ ød me ying ri dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø. Øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, nenn-ɑ ódɑ̈rɑni, o bɑ yije ɑ nyi lwøøg lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bënn gɑ gëdhhì." 
Ezekiel40:39 Yij øn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l menɑni dɑ tɑrɑbedhh ɑ́ngwen, ɑ́ryew kì tuung, kí ɑ́ryew kì tuung. Lɑ̈yy-ɑ muuj gɑ gëdhhì nyi nɑ̈g-ɑ wɑ̈thi tɑrɑdhhɑni, ying gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, wɑlɑ̀ gëdhhi orøg, wɑlɑ̀ gëdhhi bɑ̈jjø." 
Ezekiel40:40 Dɑ tɑrɑbedhh ɑ́ngwen mø ni mø tyeli mɑl kì wɑ̈g, ɑ́ryew kì tuung kí ɑ́ryew kì tuung kì ri yuu-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø." 
Ezekiel40:41 Tɑrɑbedhh-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen nyi ngɑɑl lɑ̈yy-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ gëdhhi bënn, bɑ ɑ́bïdɑ̈g; ɑ́ngwen ɑ ying ød, o ɑ́ngwen ɑ ying wɑ̈g kì ódɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel40:42 Tɑrɑbedhh ɑ́ngwen møg-ɑ ød, bɑ møg kömi gen nyi gwiir gënh-ɑ rɑ̈b bëne, tɑrɑbedhhɑni bɑ ɑngøl kì ri kït. Bɑ̈ri gen bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈ji wɑ̈thi gen bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj. Gïg-ɑ nyi ngɑɑl lɑ̈yyɑni bënn nyi ying-ɑ wɑ̈thi tɑrɑbedhhɑni." 
Ezekiel40:43 Dɑ odöbb mø lɑ̈ji yethi gen bɑ mïlimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew wïdɑ́bïj, møg-ɑ ówen tøggi tɑrɑbedhhɑni. Rïng-ɑ dwɑddi muujø ɑ́ gëëdhi nyi cïb-ɑ wɑ̈thi tɑrɑbedhhɑni." 
Ezekiel40:44 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le yɑn ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød. Dɑ ud ɑ́ryew kì kenyɑni, ɑ́kyel nenn-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì buti dhøg wɑɑng wuudø, o men-ɑ kyeelø nenn-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì buti dhø wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Ezekiel40:45 Aköbbi yɑn yi jɑlɑni kinni i øn-ɑ nenni wɑɑng wurlwɑl bɑ mi ókwërr-ɑ nyi göögø kì yij Kengø. 
Ezekiel40:46 O øn-ɑ nenni wɑɑng wuudø bɑ mi ókwërr-ɑ nyi göögø kì wïj këli lɑm. Ókwërrɑni bënn bɑ kwɑrri Dhɑdök, bene gen jø gøl Leebì møg-ɑ bɑ ɑyïëy ki kedhi be gwøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel40:47 Arøm ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød yi jɑlɑni, ɑyode lɑ̈ji yije ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj. Kengø ying-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o këli lɑm ying-ɑ bøle." 
Ezekiel40:48 Akïdhe yɑn øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ji kedh-ɑ Kengø, ɑrøme gøn, ɑyode gøn e ludhø ki mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïryew, o pegi dörre bɑ mïtïr kí budi mïtïr kì wɑ̈thi tùnge gɑ ɑ́ryew." 
Ezekiel40:49 Dɑ pɑ̈ltyel møg-ɑ kedhi ønɑni; lɑ̈ji ønɑni bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø, o bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïkyel e reng-ɑ piny. Dɑ löjj ɑ́ryew kì dhø ønɑni; ɑ́kyel kì tuung kí ɑ́kyel kì tuung." 
Ezekiel41:1 Codhe, ɑkïdhi yɑn øn-ɑ dïdyër, ɑ bɑ Kej Kwërdwøng, yi jɑlɑni. Arøme yuu-ɑ kedhi ønɑni, ɑyode bɑ̈re ɑ́ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g," 
Ezekiel41:2 o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïj, o pegi döre bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr, kì wɑ̈thi tùnge ryeet. Kɑ ønɑni røme, kɑ bɑ̈re yode ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel41:3 Codhe ɑkedhe ønɑni, kɑ kɑɑm-ɑ kedhi yije røme; ludhø ki mïtïr ɑ́kyel, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g, o pegi döre kì wɑ̈thi tùnge ryeet bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel41:4 Arøme ød, kɑ gø yode ɑ́ óør, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø. Ønɑni ying-ɑ ngɑ̈ɑ̈j øn-ɑ dïdyër. Codhe, ɑköbbe yɑn kinni, “Øn, bene Kej Kwërdwøng.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Arøm pegi döri Kengø kì yiny-ɑ ød yi jɑlɑni, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g. Dörɑni bëne ówenø ki ud møg-ɑ ómyerø, lɑ̈ji ød ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew." 
Ezekiel41:6 Uddɑni ógerø gɑ ɑtødd ɑ́dɑ̈g, ge ómyeer mɑl, o ɑtød ɑ́kyel yije dɑ ud pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g. Döri Kengø men-ɑ ying ɑtøn-ɑ mɑl reeb kibøli men-ɑ wïje di en, kipe kinni o ud ying gen kömi nyïɑ̈rø, ge pɑth ki ɑmin kì ri döri Kengø." 
Ezekiel41:7 Kɑ̀ liidh döri Kengø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, nënni pege pɑ̈r cɑg kì piny gïti mɑl. Dɑ pɑ̈ltyel møg nyi yedhi mɑl gɑ ɑ́ryew kì nyingi ngëddi Kengø gɑ mø nyi kedhi ɑtøød udd-ɑ dïdyër geki ɑtøn-ɑ mɑl." 
Ezekiel41:8 Pegi döri uddɑni men-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr. Dɑ dhøg me kedhi uddɑni kì wɑɑng wuudø kì ri Kengø, kí dhøg megø me kedhi yethi gen kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri Kengø. Alïdhɑ ki keny me ówiyø ɑ́ ɑyieb me wen Kengø bëne, lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr, o bɑ ɑtïng kì mɑl ki mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g, o lɑ̈je ópɑ̈rø kɑ tyelli uddɑni kì ri döri Kengø. Kɑɑm keny-ɑ bɑ ɑwiy ɑ́ ɑyieb kì bøli uddɑni geki udd-ɑ nyi göög yi ókwër dɑ ódɑ̈rø me bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø kì wɑɑng ngëdi Kengø." 
Ezekiel41:9  
Ezekiel41:10  
Ezekiel41:11  
Ezekiel41:12 Kì cögi dörɑni kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri Kengø dɑ ød men-ɑ ógerø, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj, o döre bëne pege bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi mïtïr." 
Ezekiel41:13 Arøm Kengø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g yi jɑlɑni, ɑyode bɑ̈re ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. O cɑg kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Kengø, e cør-ɑ ódɑ̈rø gïti cögi Kengø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj thyew." 
Ezekiel41:14 Keny-ɑ kɑ̈l bøli Kengø reb ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ ɑyieb kì nyingi ngëdde, bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj thyew." 
Ezekiel41:15 Arøme keny-ɑ ógerø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, reb ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ bɑ ɑyieb kì wɑ̈thi tùnge ryeet, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj thyew. Øn-ɑ yije nyi kedhi Kengø geki kej kwër, kí Kej Kwërdwøng" 
Ezekiel41:16 ge bɑ ɑtɑg ki yenh kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, cɑg kì piny gïti ri ɑwɑjj." 
Ezekiel41:17 Döri Kengø kì yiny-ɑ ød bëne, e wɑ̈dh-ɑ wïj dhø ød," 
Ezekiel41:18 ótwïggø bëne ki ngïjji yenh benø geki kerobb, ge ómyerø; ngïji yɑdh benø kí ngïji kerob. Kerob ɑ́kyel yïe dɑ bøll ɑ́ryew;" 
Ezekiel41:19 yïe dɑ bøli dhɑnhø me nenni yï yɑdh benø kì tuung, kí bøli ngur me nenni yï yɑdh benø kì tung-ɑ kyeelø. Dörø ówenø kinøw bëne," 
Ezekiel41:20 cɑg kì piny gïti wɑ̈thi dhøggi ud kì mɑl. 
Ezekiel41:21 Wɑ̈thi tùngi rïwwi dhø Kej Kwërdwøng gɑ ɑ́ngwen pɑ̈r. Bøli dhøng-ɑ kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng, dɑ gïjø me ni" 
Ezekiel41:22 këli lɑm me bɑ pɑ̈m. Bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel kí budi mïtïr, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel. Wɑ̈thi tùnge, kí thɑre geki tøgge bënn bɑ pɑ̈m. Aköbbi yɑn yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Men bene tɑrɑbenh-ɑ nyi ying bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Kì cɑ̈gi kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, dɑ dhøg me kedhi Kej Kwër, kí dhøg me kedhi Kej Kwërdwøng." 
Ezekiel41:24 Thïggi dhøggɑni ryeet bɑ ɑ́buddiryew, e yïëbb-ɑ tuung kí tuung." 
Ezekiel41:25 Dɑ ngïjji yenh benø kí kerobb møg-ɑ ótwegø kì kömi thïgi Kej Kwërdwøng, ni møg-ɑ ri dörø. O dɑ gëng mɑ pɑ̈m kì wɑ̈g kì bøli dhøg øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l." 
Ezekiel41:26 Dɑ ɑwɑjj kì nyingi ngëddi ønɑni, o dörø bëne ótwïggø ki ngïjji yenh benø." 
Ezekiel42:1 Codhe, ɑkïdhi yɑn ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g yi jɑlɑni, kɑ yɑ kïdhe øn-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø kì buti Kengø, ønɑni pɑ lɑ̈wi ki øn-ɑ cögi Kengø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Ezekiel42:2 Bɑ̈ri ønɑni bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel42:3 Kì tung megø ønɑni nenn-ɑ ódɑ̈rø me bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø, me kɑ̈l ri Kengø, o kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g nenn-ɑ yuu ódɑ̈ri wɑ̈g. Bɑ ɑger ɑ́ ɑtødd ɑ́dɑ̈g, o ge kedh-ɑ mɑl, ɑtøn-ɑ mɑl cɑ̈mm-ɑ cyɑ̈n kibøli men-ɑ wïje di en." 
Ezekiel42:4 Kì wɑɑng wuudø kì ri ønɑni dɑ keny nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l me bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o dhøge yïëbb-ɑ tungɑni." 
Ezekiel42:5 Udd-ɑ mɑl yethi gen nøg kibøli mø dïdyër geki møg-ɑ piny, mɑ́ møgɑni cɑ̈mm-ɑ ri gen." 
Ezekiel42:6 Udd-ɑ mɑl mïdh-ɑ yi møg-ɑ ying piny, bene ɑ bëëd møg-ɑ ying ɑtøn-ɑ dïdyër geki møg-ɑ ying ɑtøn-ɑ mɑl bong löjj mø mïdhi gen ni udd-ɑ ying ódɑ̈rø." 
Ezekiel42:7 Kì ɑtøn-ɑ piny dör-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g cungi ɑ́ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj, ɑ løg budi bɑ̈re, o dɑ ud kì ri mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj møg-ɑ ɑ́döng. O ɑtøn-ɑ mɑl bɑ ød bëne." 
Ezekiel42:8  
Ezekiel42:9 Kì thɑ́ uddɑni ryeet kì cögi gen, keny-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi yi döri ódɑ̈rø, dɑ dhøg me kedhi ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g. Kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri Kengø, ɑ́dɑ ød me pɑ̈r ki møg-ɑ kyeelø kì ri wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri Kengø." 
Ezekiel42:10  
Ezekiel42:11 Bøli uddɑni, ɑ́dɑ kɑɑm-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l me pɑ̈r ki men-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø; lɑ̈ji gen pɑ̈r, geri gen pɑ̈r, o dhøggi gen pɑ̈r thyew." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ádɑ dhøg kì thɑ́ uddɑni kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl keny-ɑ cɑ̈gi yi dörɑni. 
Ezekiel42:13 Aköbbi yɑn yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Ud møg bënn bɑ uddi kwër. Yethi gen ɑ nyi cɑɑm jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́muuj gɑ mø kwër yi ókwërr-ɑ nyi kedhi be gwøg kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kì bɑng kɑ̀ bëëd uddɑni gɑ kɑ̈jji kwër, jɑmmi kwëër dwøng nyi cïb-ɑ yethi gen yi ókwër, ɑ løg. Byel geki gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj gɑ mø orøg geki mø bɑ̈jjø." 
Ezekiel42:14 Kenyi dwɑddi ókwër bëën wɑ̈g kì Kengø, ógudhi kwër møg-ɑ ɑ́göög yi gen kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi wiy-ɑ uddi kwër yi gen. Ri gen nyi ceg kɑ kïdhø yi gen ki ógudh møøgø, codhe o ge kedhi gen keny-ɑ di ji.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rum jɑlɑni ki rømi kej Kengø kì yiny-ɑ ød, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈le yɑn wɑ̈g ki dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, codhe ɑrøme kej Kengø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Ezekiel42:16 Akwɑnye rumi kɑ tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl røme, ɑyode gøn ɑ́ mïtïr miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj" 
Ezekiel42:17 Codhe, ɑrøme tung-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, kí tung-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ɑyode bɑ̈ri gïn bënn ge pɑ̈r, ge bɑ mïtïr miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj kì wɑ̈thi tùngɑni bënn." 
Ezekiel42:18  
Ezekiel42:19  
Ezekiel42:20 Kipe kinni o tùnge bënn gɑ ɑ́ngwen bëëd ge pɑ̈r gɑ mïtïr miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj. Dörø bɑ en ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈ng kej kwër geki keny-ɑ pɑth ki kej kwër. 
Ezekiel43:1 Akïdhi yɑn dhøng-ɑ nenni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl yi jɑlɑni," 
Ezekiel43:2 mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́bëëd e omënyø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ tungɑni. Cwɑggi Jwøk nɑ ɑpɑgi nɑɑm omelø, kɑ piny meny yi cɑrɑni." 
Ezekiel43:3 Møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri yɑn kì keny nɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën Jwøk be rënyi Yerusɑlem, geki møg-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kì kömi Nɑm Kebɑr. Codhe, ɑleengɑ riɑ piny e wïjɑ këël yɑn piny." 
Ezekiel43:4 Abëën cɑɑr Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yij Kengø ki dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. 
Ezekiel43:5 Kɑ yɑ tïng mɑl yi wëyi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ yɑ kïdhi gen ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, ɑlidhɑ Kengø e pɑ̈ngø yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel43:6 Acungi jɑlɑni kì butɑ, ɑlïngɑ Wë e kööbø kɑ yɑn kì yij Kengø kinni," 
Ezekiel43:7 “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, men bene kwømɑ, keny-ɑ óbëëdɑ kì kelli tyëng Isrɑil, o ge jɑɑgɑ gïti ɑtheer. Nyingɑ kwërø koo bwöl yi tyëng Isrɑil këti ki mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth geki konyi rɑ̈nhi gen kì kɑ̈jji mɑlli jwöggɑni." 
Ezekiel43:8 Kí kɑ ɑ́geer gen tëddi uddi gen ri tëëd ødɑ, o rïwwi uddi gen ying-ɑ ri rïwwi ødɑ, o bɑ dörø ɑ kɑɑm wøn, ɑbwöl gen nyingɑ kwërø, ɑ bɑnge nɑ̈gɑ gen ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ." 
Ezekiel43:9 Wïyi gen ɑnɑn ceth ki mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ rɑ̈nhi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́thøw nyiing gen, o yɑ bëëdɑ kì kelli gen gïti ɑtheer." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Yïn wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, ceg tyëng Isrɑil kipe Kengø, o këër gwiri gwøge yod yi gen. O wɑ̈thi gen lɑ̈ɑ̈y gen kì bɑng orøøg gen." 
Ezekiel43:11 Keny-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈y wɑ̈thi gen yi gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, kɑ ge nyudhí kër-ɑ ógeer Kengø; ɑ løg yëth-ɑ ógwiirii, kí dhøgg-ɑ nyi kedhi yije geki dhøgg-ɑ nyi dwöög wɑ̈g, kí bëëde bëne, kí pyëli jɑmmì bënn, kí cigge bënn. Gwëdí møgɑni gen bënn, o gï yod gen; gen ɑ yëth-ɑ nyi gwøøg gen, o møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg bënn cuggi gen ki gwøgø yi gen." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ciggi Kengø ek: Keny-ɑ bɑdhhe bëne kì wïj kït bɑ kej kwër.” 
Ezekiel43:13 Bëëdi këli lɑm èn: kɑ̀ rømii ki rum-ɑ ɑ́røm Kengø; yije ludhø ki sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o lɑ̈je bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o nyɑ̈re kì tøgge yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel43:14 Kɑɑm cɑ̈gi këli lɑm kì piny kì thɑw-ɑ mɑl, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́kyel. Bun-ɑ kyeelø cöd-ɑ cyɑ̈n kì tøgge bënn ki sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew. O bun-ɑ bɑnge cöd-ɑ cyɑ̈n thyew kì tøgge bënn ki sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel43:15 Tung-ɑ mɑl, ɑ wïje nyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b gëdhhì, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ryew, wɑ̈thi tøgge gɑ ɑ́ngwen dɑ tùng mø töngi mɑl." 
Ezekiel43:16 Wïj këlø bɑ óør, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïkyel kì wɑ̈thi tùnge bënn." 
Ezekiel43:17 Dïdyëre kì mɑl bɑ óør thyew, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïryew, o lɑ̈je nɑ menɑni, o nyɑ̈rø kì yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj. (Lɑ̈ji nyɑ̈re bɑ sentimïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj,) o pɑ̈ltyell-ɑ nyi yedhi mɑl kì ri këli lɑm ying-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl." 
Ezekiel43:18 Aköbbi yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, lïngí møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn. Keny-ɑ ógeer këli lɑm kɑ ókwëër, yï rɑ̈b-ɑ gëëdhi kì wïje, kɑ ree wïddí ki remi gëëdhi." 
Ezekiel43:19 Ókwërr-ɑ bɑ wɑ̈ddi gøl Leebì, ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Dhɑdök keti gen ɑ bɑ ɑyïëy ki bëën bølɑ be gwøg. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́kwøb møgɑni. Kɑ ge nëngí ki wɑdh ówöb me muuj ɑ́ gënhi orøg." 
Ezekiel43:20 Kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki kwï reme, kɑ gɑ̈ɑ̈j ri tøggi këlø, kì wɑ̈thi tùnge bënn, kí wɑ̈thi tùngi yiny-ɑ ludhø, geki tøggi këlø bënn. Bene kër-ɑ ókwëër këlø ɑnɑn, kipe kinni o dhïwe." 
Ezekiel43:21 Kɑ wɑdh kwɑɑny kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b kì keny-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kipe gwøngɑni kì wɑ̈g. 
Ezekiel43:22 Dhuki kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki ónywøg me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, kɑ muuj ɑ́ gënhi orøg, o këlø dhïwe ni kɑ ɑ́gwøøg wɑdh." 
Ezekiel43:23 Keny-ɑ órum ki gwøgi gwøngɑni bëne, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki wɑdh kí órömø mø bɑ ówöbb e bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen," 
Ezekiel43:24 kɑ ge muuj yɑn. Ri gen ókïnyi ki omelø yi ókwër, o gï rɑ̈bbi gen yɑn gɑ gëdhhì." 
Ezekiel43:25 Nyi muuj ki wɑdh kí órömø, mø bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen, yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew; gɑ gëdhhi orøg." 
Ezekiel43:26 Kwëër këli lɑm yi ókwër ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, o cugge gwøg cyee." 
Ezekiel43:27 Keny-ɑ óthumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kɑ ókwër cɑ̈gi gen ki rɑ̈b kì wïje kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng ki gënh-ɑ rɑ̈b bëne geki gënhi mër møg-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi ji. Codhe, o pyëwɑ mïne ki wun bënn. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel44:1 Adwøøg yɑn dhøng-ɑ yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g yi jɑlɑni kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì ri Kengø. Dhøngɑni bɑ ɑcyëg," 
Ezekiel44:2 ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Dhøng ócög ɑ́ ɑcyëg ceth, koo wöl ki yiebø. Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ówiy o nyi kɑ̈lle kenyɑni, mɑ́ e ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yi yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ Kengø. Bëëde ɑ́ ɑcyëg ceth." 
Ezekiel44:3 De jɑng-ɑ jyɑ̈gø ócuggø kedhi kenyɑni be cɑm ki jɑmmi kwër kì bølɑ, nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈le yuu øn-ɑ yije nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì cyɑ̈n, kɑ nyi dwööge wɑ̈g ki yuuɑni.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Codhe, ɑkïdhi yɑn bøli Kengø yi jɑlɑni, yɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ dhøg wɑɑng wuudø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́tïngɑ wïjɑ, ɑlidhɑ Kengø e pɑ̈ngø yi mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Aleengɑ riɑ piny, wïjɑ këël yɑn piny." 
Ezekiel44:5 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø, cïb pyëwí ri gïg-ɑ ólïngí geki gïg-ɑ nenni yi yïn; yï köbbɑ’ ciggi Kengø geki kwönge. Cïb pyëwí ri tyëng-ɑ cuggi bëën Kengø geki tyëng-ɑ pɑ cuggi." 
Ezekiel44:6 “Köbbí tyëng gøl Isrɑil, tyëngpëëmø, kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwøb-ɑ kinni; pyëwɑ pɑ mɑg yi yɑn këti ki rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi wun." 
Ezekiel44:7 Kengɑ ɑ́bwöl yi wun keny-ɑ ɑ́wëggu tyëng-ɑ nuti ngølø; ɑ pɑ wør yɑn, bëën yije e dwɑ̈lø geki remmi gëdhhì mëgg-ɑ yɑn. Kɑ ciggɑ pyem yi jiɑ ki rɑj møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen." 
Ezekiel44:8 Jɑmmi kwër møgɑ nuti gwøg-ɑ yi gen, de gï ɑ́wïyi gen tyëngpɑth." 
Ezekiel44:9 “Yɑn, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́kyëëd kinni, ko di ngɑnpɑth me nuti ngølø, me pɑ wør yɑn, me bï yij Kengɑ, cɑgg ɑ́ tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun.”" 
Ezekiel44:10 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kwɑrri Leebì møg, cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kyeel ki tyëng Isrɑil, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wiy gen piny, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ be mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth." 
Ezekiel44:11 Ge ócuggø gwøg kì yij Kengø, ge kor-ɑ dhøggi Kengø. Ge ócuggø ngɑl ki gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj yi ji gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne geki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø, o bɑ gen ɑ ógöggi ji." 
Ezekiel44:12 De mɑ́ ge ɑ́göög kì ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth, kɑ ji peej gen yij orøg, yɑ ceg-ɑ köngø ki köngi dwøng; yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ceth." 
Ezekiel44:13 Yɑ koo göggi yi gen gɑ ókwërrɑ, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo cyɑ̈ngi kì ri jɑmmi kwër møgɑ, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo wɑ̈nhi Kej Kwërdwøng. Menɑni bɑ cɑ́y kipe rɑj møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen." 
Ezekiel44:14 Ge mëggɑ’ korri Kengø geki gwøng-ɑ nyi gwøg bëne kì yije.” 
Ezekiel44:15 Akööb Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ókwërri wïj gøl Leebì, møg-ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Dhɑdök, bɑ gen ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge gögg-ɑ yɑn kì yij Kengø, ki pëthi gen bënn, keny-ɑ ɑ́wiy yɑn piny yi tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ kyeelø. O ɑnɑn bɑ gen ɑ ógöggi yɑn; gen ɑ óbï bølɑ be mëggi yɑn dwɑ̈lø geki remmi gëdhhi." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ge keti gen ɑ óbï yij Kengɑ, ɑ ógöögø kì wïj këli lɑmɑ, o gen ɑ ólɑ̈mø kì yij Kengø." 
Ezekiel44:17 Kenyi wɑ̈nhi gen dhø Kengø, dhøng-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, nyi rug gen ki ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm. Ge ko rug ki gïn-ɑ ógwøgø ki yëyyi dyëg kɑ̀ bëëd ge ogöögø kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød, wɑlɑ̀ kì yij Kengø." 
Ezekiel44:18 Kipe ge ópir ki kwɑ̈g, rug gen ki wënni wɑ̈ɑ̈th, kí ɑköjji kor-ɑ yöm, de yethi gen ko wen ki wënnì." 
Ezekiel44:19 Nyi luny gen ógudh-ɑ ɑ́rug yi gen kì yij Kengø wɑ̈g, kɑ gï nyi wiy gen yethi uddi kwër. Nyi rug gen ógudh møøgø kenyi kedhi gen kun-ɑ di ji, kipe ji ódoy yi ógudhi kwër." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Yëyyi wɑ̈thi ókwër ko nyi lyel yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ ge ko nyi wëggi bɑ̈rrø, de nyi mïdhi gen ge døøj ceth." 
Ezekiel44:21 Ókwërø ko nyi mɑ̈ɑ̈dh ki møgi oløg e kedh-ɑ ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød. 
Ezekiel44:22 Ko di ókwërø me nyömi ki ɑtɑ̈ng; nywøme nyɑɑr Isrɑil ɑ́ jùr, wɑlɑ̀ cï ókwërø me jɑlgøle thøø." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Ókwër pwönyi gen jiɑ ki gïg-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kelli gïn-ɑ bɑ gï kwër geki gïn-ɑ pɑth ki gï kwër, kí gïn-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kelli gïn-ɑ ywëdhø geki gïn-ɑ dhïw." 
Ezekiel44:24 Keløg e ódi wëërø, bɑ gen ɑ ólidh gøny, cɑ́y ómuuj yi gen, ge ködd-ɑ kömi ciggɑ. Gen ɑ ómïdhi cyɑ̈nggi kwër ni kɑ̀ yinge yethi cigg; o gen ɑ ómïdhi cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth gɑ cyɑ̈nggi kwër." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Ókwërø ree ko ywëdh yi en ki cølø, de ócuggø kedhi kömi ngɑnthøø ke bëëde ɑ́ wïye, wɑlɑ̀ meye, wɑlɑ̀ wɑ̈de, wɑlɑ̀ nyɑre wɑlɑ̀ ómen, wɑlɑ̀ nyimen me nuti nywømø." 
Ezekiel44:26 Kɑ bëëde ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew kì bɑng keny-ɑ ódhïwe," 
Ezekiel44:27 codhe kɑ kedhe yij Kengø be muujø ki gëëdhi mi dhïwe, o rume cyee, o døøge be gwøg kì Kengø. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Ókwër gwøøg gen bɑ gwøøg kwër, kì ri gïg-ɑ ɑ́mëggɑ Isrɑil gɑ møg lɑg yi rïny kí rïny. Bong gïjø mɑ mi gen kì Isrɑil, bene yɑn ɑ bɑ mi gen." 
Ezekiel44:29 Gen ɑ nyi cɑm byël-ɑ nyi muuj, kí gëdhhi orøg, kí gëdhhi bɑ̈jjø. Gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïb wɑ̈yi gen bënn gɑ mø kwër kì Isrɑil bɑ mø gen." 
Ezekiel44:30 Gïgdøj møg-ɑ nyi kwøng ki kɑjø bënn bɑ mø ókwër. Ópun-ɑ nyi kwøng ki bulø, nyi mëgg-ɑ ókwër ɑ́ gëdhhì, o gyëdhhɑ óying gen kɑ̈lli wun." 
Ezekiel44:31 Ókwër ko cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki winyø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y men thøw kete, wɑlɑ̀ men-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi lɑ̈y megø.”" 
Ezekiel45:1 Keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ngu piny kì kelli kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, nëngu Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki keny me kwër ɑ́ mee, e bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø. Pinyɑni bëne bɑ ɑkwër." 
Ezekiel45:2 Kì yij pinyɑni, ódi kej Kengø me bɑ óør, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, e ówenø bëne yi keny me wɑ̈dhi bëëdø me lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel45:3 Budi pinyɑni, ɑ løg kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́bïj, en ɑ bɑ Kengø, ɑ løg Kej Kwërdwøng." 
Ezekiel45:4 En ɑ óbëëd ɑ́ mi ókwër møg-ɑ nyi göögø ki gwøøg Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yij Kengø. Óbëëd ɑ́ kej uddi gen geki Kengø. 
Ezekiel45:5 Bun-ɑ ɑ́döng bɑ mi Kwɑrri Leebì møg-ɑ nyi göögø kì yij Kengø, óbëëd ɑ́ kej uddi gen." 
Ezekiel45:6 Kì buti kej kwër, dɑ piny me bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, me cïb wɑ̈ye ɑ́ men bëëd yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn." 
Ezekiel45:7 Bëëde e dɑ piny me cïb wɑ̈ye ɑ́ mi rɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø. Cɑg kì keew kej kwër kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø e kedh-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kí wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e gït-ɑ wïj keew pödhø kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. O bɑ̈re bëëde e pɑ̈r ki bɑ̈ri piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi tyëng Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel45:8 Bene piny rɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø ɑnɑn kì ri piny Isrɑil, kipe o cöge gï pɑ mode wɑlɑ̀ gï pɑ ruje, o piny-ɑ ɑ́döng bëëde ɑ́ mi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil." 
Ezekiel45:9 Akööb Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wu ɑ́røngi ki keny me bɑ̈ɑ̈r, wu rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil! Wiy wun mød geki ruj. Gøggu gïgdøj geki dyër. Jiɑ ko cyeed wun wɑ̈g kì yij piny gen këti. Yɑn ɑ köbbi wun, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Göög ji bënn ki rummì møg-ɑ pɑ ruj ki ji. 
Ezekiel45:11 “Bëëd Epɑ̀ ɑ́ men-ɑ bɑ dyër, kɑ bɑth bëëde ɑ́ men-ɑ bɑ dyër, kɑ omer bëëde ɑ́ men-ɑ bɑ dyër." 
Ezekiel45:12 “Bëëd rummi wun ge nɑ møg: gerɑ̀ 20 pɑ̈r ki cekel ɑ́kyel cekel 60 pɑ̈r ki minɑ̀ ɑ́kyel 
Ezekiel45:13 “Bene men-ɑ muuj wun kì ri jɑmm-ɑ cyeg kì yï wun keny-ɑ ópwööd byel ek: Gemè: ɑ́kyel kì ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel Ceir: ɑ́kyel kì ri pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel Møøw dhetun: ɑ́kyel kì ri miyø Römm: ɑ́kyel kì ri römm miy ɑ́ryew ɑ muuj kì yij piny Isrɑil. “Wu ceg-ɑ muujø ki byëlø, kí gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gënhi mër, o orøøg wun lɑ̈ɑ̈ny. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ceg møgɑni." 
Ezekiel45:14  
Ezekiel45:15  
Ezekiel45:16 “Muuj gëdhhɑni rɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn. 
Ezekiel45:17 Bɑ en ɑ ómuuj gëdhh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b, kí byëlø, kí kunyi møgi oløg mø pödhi Isrɑil bëne, kenyi liidh dwɑ̈y, kí yethi cyɑ̈nggi kwër, kí yethi cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth. En ɑ ómuujø ki gëdhhì, kí byëlø, kí gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí gëdhhi mër, kipe kinni o orøøg tyëng Isrɑil lɑ̈ɑ̈ny.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈n-ɑ nyɑ̈n, kɑ yï kɑ̈bbí ki wɑdh me bong gïnrɑj kì ree, kɑ Kengø kwëër o dhïwe." 
Ezekiel45:19 O ókwërø kɑ̈bbe ki remi gënhi orøg menɑni, o gø gɑ̈ɑ̈je ri dhø Kengø kì mɑl, kí wɑ̈thi tùngi këli lɑm gɑ ɑ́ngwen, kí ri dhøg ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød." 
Ezekiel45:20 Kì bïryeew cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈yɑni, døøg wun ki muujø ki gëdhhì kipe ngɑn bɑ̈jjø e kwïj wøw wɑlɑ̀ ceg-ɑ gwɑ̈nyø. Bene ɑ óbëëd Kengø e bɑ ɑkwër." 
Ezekiel45:21 “Cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈yɑni pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ngwen, bene cɑ̈gi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh. Ji bënn cɑm-ɑ olwëny ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew." 
Ezekiel45:22 Kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi Kwëër Ákɑɑdh, muuj nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø ki wɑdh ɑ́ gënhi orøge kí orøøg ji bënn." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kì yethi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew mø Kwëër Ákɑɑdh bënn, nyi muuj wun ki wɑ̈dhh ɑ́bïryew, kí órömm ɑ́bïryew mø bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen, gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni bënn. Kí ónywøg ɑ́kyel kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni bënn ɑ́ gënhi orøg." 
Ezekiel45:24 Wɑdh ɑ́kyel kí órömø ɑ́kyel møg-ɑ muuj gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, ɑ́kyel kɑ̈l kɑ røthøl pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj mø gemè, kí røthøl ɑ́bïkyel mø møøw dhetun." 
Ezekiel45:25 “Kipe Kwëër Akɑnnì, ɑ nyi cɑ̈gi kì pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïïj cyɑ̈nggi bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, nyirɑ̈dh ceg-ɑ muujø yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn, ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́bïryew, kí gëdhhi orøg, kí gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, kí byëlø, kí møøw dhetun mø ni mø Kwëër Ákɑɑdh.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Dhøng-ɑ kedhi ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl bëëde ɑ́ ɑcyëg kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi gwøg gɑ ɑ́bïkyel, de nyi yieb kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth geki kyeel cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y." 
Ezekiel46:2 O nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø bëe e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g, e bɑ̈ɑ̈n-ɑ yij øn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l, o cunge kì ri löjji dhøngɑni e gëdhhi møge møg-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne orɑ̈bø yi ókwër, o gëdhhi mër møge muuj yi gen. O mɑ̈dde kì kenyɑni, codhe o døøge wɑ̈g. Dhøngɑni ko cyëëg gïti böörø." 
Ezekiel46:3 Nyi mɑ̈ddi ji kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cyɑ̈nggi Sɑbɑth geki cɑ̈gi dwɑ̈y, kì ódɑ̈r-ɑ dhø döri kɑɑl." 
Ezekiel46:4 “Nyi kɑ̈ni rɑ̈dh kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth ki gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne men mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kɑ̈ɑ̈le gøn ɑ́ órömm ɑ́bïkyel mø bong gïnrɑj kì ri gen. 
Ezekiel46:5 Órömø ɑ́kyel kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ lïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kí budi lïtïr mø møng-ɑ búr, kɑ muuje kyeel ki órömø kí gïn-ɑ dwɑdde muujø ki pyëwe. Byëlø menɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ lïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g mø møøw dhetun." 
Ezekiel46:6 Kipe Kwëër Cɑ̈gi Dwɑ̈y, nyi muuje ki wɑdh, kí órömm ɑ́bïkyel, kí nyɑ órömø me thiinh." 
Ezekiel46:7 Wɑdh kí órömø kɑ̈ɑ̈l kɑ lïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kí budi lïtïr mø møng-ɑ búr, de ócuggø muujø ki men-ɑ dwɑdde muujø ki óröm-ɑ thinh. Møng-ɑ búrɑni nyi muuj kɑ lïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g mø møøw dhetun." 
Ezekiel46:8 Nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø, nyi døøge wɑ̈g ki dhøng-ɑ ɑ́bëëne ceth." 
Ezekiel46:9 “Keny-ɑ óbëën ji be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì bøli kej wööwø, tyëng-ɑ óbï kì dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, ókedh kɑ dhøng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl. Ko di ngɑn kedhi wɑ̈g ki dhøng-ɑ ɑ́bëëne." 
Ezekiel46:10 Bï nyirɑ̈dh ji rum bëënø, kɑ kedhe ge rum kedhø." 
Ezekiel46:11 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggi wööwø geki cyɑ̈nggi kwër, møng-ɑ búr nyi muuj ɑ́ lïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïryew kí budi lïtïr, kipe wɑdh ɑ́kyel kí órömø ɑ́kyel, kí gïn-ɑ dwɑddi muujø yi dhɑnhø ki pyëwe kyeel ki órömø ɑ́kyel. Møng-ɑ búrɑni nyi muuj kɑ lïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g mø møøw dhetun." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Keløg nyirɑ̈dh dwɑdd-ɑ thödhi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gïïpiny ki pyëwe, ying-ɑ́ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b bëne, wɑlɑ̀ gënhi mër, yïëbbi dhøng-ɑ kedhi ódɑ̈r-ɑ yiny-ɑ ød kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. O gënhɑni gwøg yi en ni mi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Sɑbɑth. Codhe, o dhøngɑni cyëëg keny-ɑ órume ki døøg wɑ̈g.”" 
Ezekiel46:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì yethi cyɑ̈ng kì mwøl, órömø me bong gïnrɑj kì ree nyi rɑ̈bbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bëne, kì yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn ceth." 
Ezekiel46:14 Nyi muuj kɑ møng-ɑ búr me bɑ kïllì ɑ́ryew, kí lïtïr ɑ́kyel mi møøw dhetun, me yöl ki møng-ɑ búrɑni. Mïdhi ciggi gëëdhi gïti ɑtheer." 
Ezekiel46:15 Órömø, kí møng-ɑ búr, kí møøw dhetun, bɑ møg nyi mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn kì mwøl gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Ezekiel46:16 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cïg kinni, “Keløg nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø wɑ̈de onëngø yi en kì ri pinye, pinyɑni óbëëd ɑ́ mi nyelɑni, e bɑ mi gøl gen." 
Ezekiel46:17 De keløg rɑ̈dh nëng-ɑ dhɑnhø kì kelli bɑ̈ngge, pinyɑni ceg-ɑ døøg yï nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø kì Runi Dwöggø, mɑ́ wɑ̈dde bene gen ɑ cuggi lɑgi pinyɑni." 
Ezekiel46:18 Rɑ̈dh koo kɑ̈bbi ki piny ji. Nënge wɑ̈dde kì ri pinye, o cöge ji pɑ ruje ki kwɑnyi pìnyi gen.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Codhe, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑn yi jɑlɑni kɑ yɑ kïdhe yiny-ɑ di uddi ókwër kì wɑɑng wuudø kì ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ ød. Anyudhe yɑn keny me ying wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri uddɑni," 
Ezekiel46:20 kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Bene keny-ɑ nyi thɑɑl rïnggi gëdhhì yi ókwër èn, gen ɑ rïnggi gëdhhi orøg geki gëdhhi bɑ̈jjø, kí ópun, o ge cög ge pɑ kïdhi yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g kipe ji ódoy yi jɑmmi kwër.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Codhe, ɑkïdhe yɑn ódɑ̈ri yiny-ɑ wɑ̈g kɑ yɑ nyudhe kinni wɑ̈thi tùnge gɑ ɑ́ngwen, dɑ ódɑ̈rr mø thønhø, mø bɑ̈ri gen bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, o lɑ̈ji gen bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel46:22  
Ezekiel46:23 Ge bɑ ɑwen ki dörri kïtti bënn, o këlli mɑc mø gen ógeer-ɑ ri dörø." 
Ezekiel46:24 Aköbbi yɑn yi jɑlɑni kinni, “Gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj yi ji, nyi thɑl-ɑ yethi uddɑni yi bɑ̈nggi Kengø.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Adwøøg yɑn dhøg Kengø yi jɑlɑni. Alïdhɑ ki pï mø rengi piny kì dhøg Kengø, ge reng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, mɑ́ Kengø nenn-ɑ tungɑni. Pï rïngi ge kɑ̈l-ɑ wïj kyëëj Kengø, ge kɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri këli lɑm." 
Ezekiel47:2 Codhe, ɑkïdhi yɑn wɑ̈g yi jɑlɑni ki dhøg wɑɑng wuudø, ɑwene yɑn dhøg wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Alïdhɑ ki nyɑ nɑm me rïngi wɑ̈g kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri dhøg Kengø." 
Ezekiel47:3 Arøme nyɑ nɑmɑni ɑ́ mïtïr miy ɑ́bïj e reng-ɑ piny kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, ɑköbbe yɑn kinni lwødɑ nyɑ nɑmɑni. Pï ɑ́ying-ɑ nyɑjɑ̈nggi tyellɑ." 
Ezekiel47:4 Adøøge ki røm ki mïtïr miy ɑ́bïj møøgø. Kɑ pï wɑ̈dh-ɑ ri cøngɑ. Kɑ cig-ɑ røm ki mïtïr miy ɑ́bïj, ɑwɑ̈nhi pï pyerɑ." 
Ezekiel47:5 Adøøge ki røm ki mïtïr miy ɑ́bïj møøgø, ɑngënyi pï kɑ yɑ ódhɑ̈lø lödø, kɑ yɑ ceg-ɑ kwɑng." 
Ezekiel47:6 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Wɑ̈d dhɑnhø ti gen ki rømmø kidøøj.” Codhe, ɑdwøøg yɑn kömi nɑmɑni yi jɑlɑni," 
Ezekiel47:7 Alïdhɑ ki yenh mø gïïr cɑrø kì kömi nɑm tuung kí tuung. 
Ezekiel47:8 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Pï cør-ɑ yij piny, ge reng-ɑ Töör Urdun kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o ge kedhi gen Luuy Omelø. Keny-ɑ ówɑ̈dhi gen Luuy Omelø, pïge óløg gen pï mø døøj, mø pɑth ki pïi omelø." 
Ezekiel47:9 Keny-ɑ rengi yi nɑmɑni, ódi wïj rëjø bëne kí wïj lɑ̈y bëne. Nyɑ nɑmɑni pïi Luuy Omelø ówëgge mïnø, o nyi muuj-ɑ wëy kì keny-ɑ renge." 
Ezekiel47:10 Cɑg kì nyingi pïi Ein Gedì gïti nyingi pïi Eglɑim, ódi jømɑy kì kömi nɑɑm omelø; bøyyi gen ómɑ̈j yi gen kì kenyɑni. Ódi wïj rëjø bëne kì kenyɑni, mø ni møg-ɑ ying Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr." 
Ezekiel47:11 De pïg-ɑ ying yij tör geki yethi luyyì pɑ gwøg o ge dönyi gen. Ge ócög gɑ omelø. 
Ezekiel47:12 Wɑ̈thi yenh bënn ótwïy gɑ møg cɑm, kì kömi nɑm kì tuung kí tuung. Yïthhi gen koo thwøw, o ge ceg-ɑ nywølø kì yethi dwɑ̈tt bënn, mɑ́ ge cɑw-ɑ yi nɑm-ɑ rïngi e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kengø. Yenhɑni óbëëdø gɑ gïncɑm, o yïthhi gen bɑ yɑnh tuur ki ji.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Akööb Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Møg bene gen kewwi piny-ɑ ópɑ̈ngi kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil gɑ pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, e wïj gøl Yosep mëgg-ɑ mi kɑ̈llì ɑ́ryew." 
Ezekiel47:14 Yɑ ɑ́köngi kinni pinyɑni ómëggɑ kweyyi wun, ɑnɑn pɑ̈ngu en kì kelli wun e pɑ̈r." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Keew pinyɑni kì wɑɑng wuudø, cɑ̈gi kì Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr e reng-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti Ëthlön gïti Amɑth, e gït-ɑ Dhedɑd," 
Ezekiel47:16 gïti kɑ̈ddi Beröthɑ̀ geki Sibriɑm (ge ying-ɑ piny Dimɑceg geki piny Amɑth,) e gït-ɑ Tikön (ɑ ying wïj keew myërri Aurɑn)." 
Ezekiel47:17 Keew wɑɑng wuudø, cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr e gït-ɑ Enön, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, e pödh-ɑ keew piny Dimɑceg geki Amɑth kì wɑɑng wuudø." 
Ezekiel47:18 “Keew wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, reng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kɑɑm piny Dimɑceg geki Aurɑn, kí Nɑm Urdun, e gwøg-ɑ kew kì kɑɑm piny Isrɑil kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø geki Gilyɑd kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti Tɑmɑr kì kömi Luuy Omelø." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Keew wɑɑng wurlwɑl reng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø cɑg kì Tɑmɑr gïti luuy Kɑdic Merïbɑ̀, gïti keew Rïp kì kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, kì wɑɑng wuudø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Kew wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø bɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr e reng-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø gïti wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri Ókømi Amɑth. 
Ezekiel47:21 “Pɑ̈ngu pinyɑni kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil. 
Ezekiel47:22 Pinyɑni ócög ɑ́ mi wun ceth. Kɑ tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, møg-ɑ yï gen di nyigi gen møg-ɑ ɑ́nywøl kì kelli wun, nëngi wun kì ri pinyɑni. Lëëng gen ki wél, o ge yïddi gen ki piny ni tyëng Isrɑil ceth." 
Ezekiel47:23 Ngɑnpɑth yïd-ɑ́ɑ̀ ri piny wïj gøl-ɑ kelle bëëde. Yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Ezekiel48:1 Keew piny kì wɑɑng wuudø reng-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr gïti Ëthlön, gïti Ókømi Amɑth, pïd Enön, gïti kew-ɑ kɑɑm piny rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Dimɑceg geki piny rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Amɑth. Wïj kɑl ɑ́kyel nëng ɑ ri piny-ɑ cɑ̈gi kì keew wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e ködd-ɑ kömi Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, e bɑ ɑpyël ni men, cɑg kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti wɑɑng wurlwɑl: Piny Dɑn Piny Aceer piny Nɑptɑlì piny Mɑnɑsè piny Eprɑim piny Ruben piny Yeudiyɑ̀" 
Ezekiel48:2  
Ezekiel48:3  
Ezekiel48:4  
Ezekiel48:5  
Ezekiel48:6  
Ezekiel48:7  
Ezekiel48:8 Cïb kwï piny wɑ̈ye kì dïdyër; bëëde ɑ́ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr; eni lɑ̈je, cɑg kì wɑɑng wuudø e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, o bɑ̈re nɑ menɑni thyew, cɑg kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri piny-ɑ mëggi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì; pinyɑni ɑ yije ógeer Kengø." 
Ezekiel48:9 Kì dïdyëri pinyɑni, wiy keny megø, me bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø ɑ́ men mëggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel48:10 Nëngi ókwër kì ri piny kwër menɑni. Wiy pinyɑni ɑ́ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, cɑg kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o kì wɑɑng wuudø e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl, bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́bïj. Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ógeer-ɑ dïdyëri pinyɑni." 
Ezekiel48:11 Kej kwër bɑ mi ókwërr-ɑ bɑ kwɑrri Dhɑdök, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́göggi yi gen yethi gen bong ɑ́dud, o ge nuti gwøg ki orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi kwï tyëng Isrɑil geki Kwɑrri Leebì." 
Ezekiel48:12 Kɑ Kwɑrri Leebì nëngi ki piny gen, kì buti ókwër kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, pinyɑni ɑ bɑ Kej Kwërdwøng." 
Ezekiel48:13 Wïyi Kwɑrri Leebì ki piny me cïb wɑ̈ye, me ying wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri piny ókwër. Bëëd bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, cɑg kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́bïj, cɑg kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø." 
Ezekiel48:14 Piny-ɑ ɑ́mëggi wɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene piny-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì yij pinyɑni bëne, ko di men ngeew wɑ̈g kì ree, wɑlɑ̀ men wil ki ngɑn megø. Bɑ piny kwër, o bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Ezekiel48:15 Men-ɑ ódöng kì ri piny-ɑ ɑ́cïb wɑ̈ye, ɑ bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr, pɑth ki kej kwër, de ócuggø kwɑnyø yi ji ɑ́ men yije bëëd. Kɑɑl óying-ɑ dïdyëri kenyɑni," 
Ezekiel48:16 óbëëd ɑ́ óør, e bɑ̈ri tunge ɑ́kyel bɑ mïtïr ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Ezekiel48:17 Ódi kɑɑm men-ɑ ówiy kì wɑ̈thi tùngi kɑɑl gɑ ɑ́ngwen me lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïj. 
Ezekiel48:18 Piny-ɑ ódöng keny-ɑ órum kɑɑl ki gerø, ɑ ying wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri piny kwër, ɑ bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́bïj kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o lɑ̈je bɑ kïlomïtïr ɑ́ryew kí budø, kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, óbëëd ɑ́ pwödhhi ji." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ji bënn møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑɑlɑni, ɑ løg tyëng wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì bënn, ge ócuggø kɑ̈g kì yij pinyɑni." 
Ezekiel48:20 Piny-ɑ ɑ́cïb wɑ̈ye kì dïdyër; ɑ bɑ óør, ɑ bɑ̈re bɑ kïlomïtïr pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kí budi kïlomïtïr kì wɑ̈thi tùnge bënn, bɑ en ɑ yije di kɑɑlɑni." 
Ezekiel48:21 Piny-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kì ri piny-ɑ geer Kengø, bɑ piny ókwër geki Kwɑrri Leebì, piny-ɑ döng bɑ mi nyirɑ̈nh-ɑ jyɑ̈gø. Wɑ̈dh-ɑ keew wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, o wɑ̈dh-ɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì tung-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o gëng-ɑ yi piny Yeudiyɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wuudø, kí piny Ben Yɑmïn kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Ezekiel48:22  
Ezekiel48:23 Piny-ɑ ɑ́cïb wɑ̈ye kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, wɑ̈thi kɑ̈ll-ɑ döng nëng ɑ ree, e rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ keew wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl e ködd-ɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, pyël nɑ men e cɑ̈g-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑɑng wuudø e ködd-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl: Piny Ben Yɑmïn Piny Cimeøn Piny Isɑkɑr Piny Dhebulun Piny Gɑd." 
Ezekiel48:24  
Ezekiel48:25  
Ezekiel48:26  
Ezekiel48:27  
Ezekiel48:28 Kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì ri piny gøl Gɑd, kew reng-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, cɑg kì Tɑmɑr e ködd-ɑ luuy Kɑdic, o kì wɑɑng wuudø kì kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø kɑ̈l-ɑ ri keew Rïp e ködd-ɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr." 
Ezekiel48:29 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Bene kër-ɑ ópɑ̈ngi piny kì kelli wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Isrɑil ɑnɑn.”" 
Ezekiel48:30 Dɑ dhøg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew kì Yerusɑlem; döri tung ɑ́kyel kì kelli tùnge gɑ ɑ́ngwen bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj, o ree dɑ dhøg ɑ́dɑ̈g, ge cwølli kɑ nyingi wɑ̈thi kɑ̈llì. Dhøgg-ɑ yïëbbi wɑɑng wuudø cöll-ɑ Ruben, kí Yeudɑ̀, kí Leebì; dhøgg-ɑ yïëbbi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl cöll-ɑ Yosep, kí Ben Yɑmïn, kí Dɑn; dhøgg-ɑ yïëbbi wɑɑng wurlwɑl cöll-ɑ Cimeøn, kí Isɑkɑr, kí Dhebulun; dhøgg-ɑ yïëbbi wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø cöll-ɑ Gɑd, kí Aceer, kí Nɑptɑlì." 
Ezekiel48:31  
Ezekiel48:32  
Ezekiel48:33  
Ezekiel48:34  
Ezekiel48:35 Bɑ̈ri dörø bëne kì wɑ̈thi tùngi kɑɑl gɑ ɑ́ngwen bɑ mïtïr ɑ́lïp ɑ́bïngwen. Nyingi kɑɑlɑni cɑg ki cwøllø ɑnɑn ceth ɑ́ “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Nud kì Keny!” 
Daniel1:1 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Yöyɑkim rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́bëën Nebukɑdnesɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kɑ Yerusɑlem tyege." 
Daniel1:2 Kɑ wëggi mɑgi Rɑ̈dh Yöyɑkim yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kwï jɑmmi Kengø kwɑnye. Ákɑ̈ɑ̈d ki ɑmɑgg møg kïdhe kengi jwögge kì Bɑbïl, kɑ kɑ̈r-ɑ ɑ́kwɑnye cïbe yethi kɑ̈nni kengɑni." 
Daniel1:3 Kɑ Acpenɑdh, jɑng-ɑ dwøng kì kelli jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh köbbe kinni, i yïënye kì kelli yɑɑg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Isrɑil, kì gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø geki kwï kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø." 
Daniel1:4 Bëëd gen gɑ yɑɑg mø myër, wɑ̈thi gen pel, o ge dïdø, møg cuggi pwönyø kɑ ge jwɑn-ɑ dïdø, o ge ócuggø jwɑn dïdø ki dhøg tyëng Bɑbïl, o dëlli gen døøj, gɑ møg cuggi gwøg kì gøldwøng." 
Daniel1:5 Rɑ̈dh ɑ́kööb thyew kinni i kɑ ge nyi thödhi ki gïncɑm geki møgi oløg mø pɑ̈r ki gïgcɑmm-ɑ nyi mëggi tyëng-ɑ gøldwøng. Orum gen ki pwönyø ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g, o ge kïdhi bøli rɑ̈dh." 
Daniel1:6 Dɑniel, Anɑniyɑ̀, Micɑil kí Adhɑriyɑ̀ ge nud kì kelli yɑɑg-ɑ ɑ́yieny kì kelli wɑ̈ddi Yeudɑ̀." 
Daniel1:7 Kɑ ge cɑ̈ggi ki nying mø nyɑ̈n yi jɑng-ɑ dwøng; Dɑniel ɑ́cɑge ɑ́ Beltecɑdhɑr, kɑ Anɑniyɑ̀ cɑge ɑ́ Cɑdrɑk, kɑ Micɑil cɑge ɑ́ Micɑk, kɑ Adhɑriyɑ̀ cɑge ɑ́ Abednegö." 
Daniel1:8 Dɑniel ɑ́bɑ̈nyi bwöli ree ki gïgcɑmm geki møgi oløøg gøldwøng. Kɑ jɑng-ɑ dwøng kwɑjje kipe kinni ko wëggi bwöli ree," 
Daniel1:9 kɑ pyëw Acpenɑdh wëggi medø ki Dɑniel yi Jwøk. 
Daniel1:10 Acpenɑdh ɑ́bëëd e óböggø yi rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbe Dɑniel kinni, “Rɑ̈dh ɑ ɑ́kwøb gïn-ɑ cɑm yi wun geki gïn-ɑ mɑdh yi wun, o keløg wu ónënni wu gwɑ̈lø kibøli yɑɑg-ɑ kyeelø, yɑ bɑ men nɑ̈g yi en.”" 
Daniel1:11 Codhe, kɑ Dɑniel kedh-ɑ yï jɑl-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Acpenɑdh, ɑ́ ngɑn nyi kɑ̈lli gïgcɑmmi gen geki mɑ̈dhhe, kɑ gø köbbe kinni," 
Daniel1:12 “Pɑ̈nyí wøn ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø, wø cɑm-ɑ lùm, o wø mɑdh-ɑ pïg tïl." 
Daniel1:13 Codhe, othumi cyɑ̈nggɑni kɑ wø pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki yɑɑg-ɑ cyɑ̈mø ki gïgcɑmmi gøldwøng, kɑ wø liidh men-ɑ óbëëd wøn kidï, o yï óngɑ̈ɑ̈ny löggø.”" 
Daniel1:14 Ayïëy jɑlɑni ki kwøbbi gen, kɑ gï pɑ̈nye ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈rø." 
Daniel1:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi cyɑ̈nggɑni, yɑɑgɑni ɑ́nënni dëlli gen døøj, o ge teg kibøli yɑɑg-ɑ cyɑ̈mø ki gïgcɑmmi gøldwøng." 
Daniel1:16 Codhe, kɑ ge ocögø ge nyi muuj-ɑ lùm yi jɑl-ɑ kɑ̈lli gïgcɑmmi gen." 
Daniel1:17 Yɑɑgɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen, ge ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøk ki dïdø geki peli wïj, kí ngɑ̈nyi kwøb. Kɑ Dɑniel thödhi yi Jwøk ki dïdø kí nyodhi gïg-ɑ kømmi yi lɑ̈g, geki cyɑ̈rø kí gïg-ɑ óbï dhuki megø." 
Daniel1:18 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi runn ɑ́dɑ̈g møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi rɑ̈dh, ɑkïdhi yɑɑgɑni bënn bøli Nebukɑdnesɑr yi Acpenɑdh." 
Daniel1:19 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø ki gen bënn. Kɑ møg-ɑ kømmi yi Dɑniel, kí Anɑniyɑ̀, kí Micɑil kí Adhɑriyɑ̀ reng-ɑ pyëw rɑ̈dh, kibøli møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi yɑɑg-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Codhe, kɑ ge gwøg gɑ jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh." 
Daniel1:20 Cɑgg rɑ̈dh pyëj ngø wɑlɑ̀ ngø, nyi yod e ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑɑgɑni gɑ ɑ́ngwen; ge lod-ɑ ɑ́jwögg-ɑ rɑ̈ngø kí møg-ɑ bɑ̈gø kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhɑni bënn." 
Daniel1:21 Dɑniel ɑ́cög e ying-ɑ tøg burø gïti run-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑg Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ yi Körec, rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres." 
Daniel2:1 Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑ́lɑ̈gi kì ryeew runne kì yij lɑwø. Kɑ wïje ceg-ɑ cung yi lɑ̈ggɑni, kɑ ódhɑ̈lø nenø." 
Daniel2:2 Aöde be cwööli tyëngbɑg, kí ɑ́jwöggì, kí tyëdd, kí jøyenh, o ge bï gen be köbbii gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni. Abëën gen kɑ ge ócungø kì bøli rɑ̈dh." 
Daniel2:3 Kɑ ge köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi ki lɑ̈g mɑ ɑ́cuung wïjɑ, o yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ yodi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen.”" 
Daniel2:4 Aløøg kwøbbi rɑ̈dh yi gen ki dhøg Arɑm kinni, “Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk wuö, köbbí wøn lɑ̈ggí, o yï köbbi wøn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen.”" 
Daniel2:5 Aløøg mø gen yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kwøbbɑ ceth bɑ kinni: Keløg yɑ pɑ köbbu lɑ̈ggɑni geki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen, wu ceg kɑ ngøllø wun ɑ́ gullì, o uddi wun ceg kɑ cøør piny." 
Daniel2:6 De keløg yɑ köbbu’ lɑ̈ggɑni geki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen, wu óthödhi ki jɑmmi pwøj, kɑ wu theg yi yɑn ki mendwøng. Anɑn köbbu yɑn lɑ̈ggɑni geki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen.”" 
Daniel2:7 Acigi kwøbbe løøgø yi gen kinni, “Ke köbbí wøn lɑ̈ggɑni wuö, gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen köbbi wø’ yïn.”" 
Daniel2:8 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ólöggø kinni, “Pɑth ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́rømmɑ ceth! Wu dwɑdd-ɑ cöngi kwøb, mɑ́ e ɑ́lidh yi wun kinni wïjɑ cyëëg yɑn," 
Daniel2:9 kinni, wu cɑy yi yɑn kɑ gïjø ɑ́kyel wu bënn; keløg yɑ pɑ köbbu lɑ̈ggɑni. Dhøggi wun ɑ́ceg yi wun kɑ rebø kinni o yɑ köbbu kwøbbi pyed o piny kedhe e ócyɑ̈dhø, o jɑmmì ri gen wil yi gen. Köbbu yɑn lɑ̈ggɑni møti, o yod yi yɑn cyee kinni gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen ócuggø yodø yi wun thyew.”" 
Daniel2:10 Kɑ jøgɑni ólöggø kinni, “Bong dhɑnhø kì kömi piny, me cuggi köbbi yïn møg-ɑ dwɑddí yodø èn wuö. Bong rɑ̈dh ɑ́kyel, cɑgg ɑ́ rɑ̈nh teg kidï, mɑ ɑ́köbbi tyëngbɑg, kí ɑ́jwöggì, kí tyëdd geki jøyenh kinni göög gen ki gïn ni men." 
Daniel2:11 Møg-ɑ pyëj yi yïn ɑnɑn wuö, peeg cɑrø ki mendwøng, møgɑni løøg-ɑ yi jwögg, pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi dhɑnhø, o jwögg pɑ nyi bëëdø kì kelli ji.”" 
Daniel2:12 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi rɑ̈dh, kɑ ceg ki mɑgø yi liny ki menrɑj, ɑkööbe kinni i nɑ̈ɑ̈g jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh kì Bɑbïl, ge bënn." 
Daniel2:13 Codhe, kɑ cigg muuj kinni i nɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel bënn, kí Dɑniel geki mɑ̈dhhe thyew." 
Daniel2:14 Codhe, kɑ Dɑniel kedh-ɑ yï Aryök, jɑngi ɑlɑthker men-ɑ ɑ́köbbi nɑ̈gi jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh kì Bɑbïl, ki dhøg me med," 
Daniel2:15 ɑpyëje Aryök mɑ løge per ngø ɑ kɑ̈ni rɑ̈dh ki kwøbb-ɑ peeg ni møgɑni. Aköbbi Dɑniel yi Aryök ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb. 
Daniel2:16 Codhe, kɑ Dɑniel jwɑn-ɑ be kwɑjji rɑ̈dh kinni thödhi ki nyɑ keny me thiinh, o lɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh kí gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen óköbbii yi en." 
Daniel2:17 Kɑ Dɑniel kedh-ɑ gøle, ɑ köbbe gïn-ɑ ɑ́cwöb mɑ̈dhhe, ɑ løg Anɑniyɑ̀, kí Micɑil, kí Adhɑriyɑ̀." 
Daniel2:18 Kɑ gï köbbe kinni kwɑjji gen Jwøøg Mɑl o pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈me, kɑ kwɑjji gen o gïg-ɑ ókɑnø yɑ̈lle gen, o ge cög ge pɑ nɑ̈g kyeel kí jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh kì Bɑbïl." 
Daniel2:19 Kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn møgɑni ɑ́nyudhi Dɑniel kì wɑ̈rɑni yi Jwøøg Mɑl e dhɑ̈y nɑ lɑ̈g. Kɑ Jwøk lejje kinni," 
Daniel2:20 “Wiy nyingi Jwøk lenhi gïti ɑtheer, mɑ́ peli wïj geki tegø bɑ møge." 
Daniel2:21 En ɑ nyi wil bëëdi piny. A nyi nyiig rɑ̈ɑ̈nh kɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈nh cïbe keje, En ɑ nyi muuj peli wïj geki ngɑ̈nyi wøw." 
Daniel2:22 Jɑmm-ɑ piny møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn nyi yɑle yɑlø, gïn-ɑ yij muudhø ngɑ̈nyi yi en, o bëëd ɑ dïdyëri cɑr." 
Daniel2:23 Yɑ ngɑ̈ny-ɑ yïn, o yɑ lenh-ɑ yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøøg kweyyɑ. Yïn ɑ ɑ́thödhi yɑn ki peli wïj kí tegø, kwɑ̈jjɑ ɑ́lïngi yi yïn, kɑ yɑ nyudhí gïn-ɑ óköbbi wøn rɑ̈dh.”" 
Daniel2:24 Kɑ Dɑniel kedh-ɑ yï Aryök jɑng-ɑ ɑ́köbbi nɑ̈gi jø tøg buri rɑ̈dh kì Bɑbïl. Kɑ gø köbbe kinni, “Ge ko nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Kïdhí yɑn bøli rɑ̈dh, gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni óköbbɑ en.”" 
Daniel2:25 Kɑ Dɑniel kïdhi bøli Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr yi Aryök kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, ɑköbbe rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́yïddi kì kelli ji-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Yeudiyɑ̀ ki ngɑn cuggi nyudhi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggí yïn wuö.”" 
Daniel2:26 Apyëëj Dɑniel, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Beltecɑdhɑr yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Yɑ ócuggø köbbi lɑ̈ggɑ yi yïn geki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen?”" 
Daniel2:27 Alöggi Dɑniel kinni, “Wuö, bong jɑlyɑdh, wɑlɑ̀ ɑjwøgø, wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn nyi bɑ̈gø, cɑgg ɑ́ ngɑn nyi nenni ngïjji piny kì ri kyelli mɑl me cuggi köbbi yïn møgɑni." 
Daniel2:28 De dɑ Jwøk kì mɑl; en ɑ nyi nyodh gïg-ɑ ɑkɑnn. Yï ɑ́ceg yi en kɑ köbbø wuö, ki gïg-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø. Anɑn yï óköbbɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni." 
Daniel2:29 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yï onenø wuö, yï ɑ́lɑ̈gi ki kwøbb-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø, o Jwøk ngɑn nyi kwøb ɑkɑnn, yï ɑ́nyudhe gïn-ɑ ócwöb." 
Daniel2:30 Møgɑni nuti nyudhi yɑn kɑ per kinni, wïjɑ pel kibøli ji-ɑ kyeelø, dɑ́ kipe kinni o gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni yod yi yïn wuö, o rumm-ɑ ɑ́bï yïí gɑm yi wïjí." 
Daniel2:31 “Wuö, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yï onenø, yï ɑ́lidh-ɑ ngïji me dwøng cɑrø, e ócungø kì bølí, e ceg-ɑ orɑ̈ng, ree dɑ cɑr, dhɑnhø óböggø ki nenni yïe." 
Daniel2:32 Wïje ógwøgø kɑ dhɑm dhïw, kööre geki bɑ̈dde ógwøgø kɑ ɑ́tegø, pyere geki rwödhhe ógwøgø kɑ dilɑl," 
Daniel2:33 twel tyelle bɑ ngyënyø dødø, o cɑ̈dhhi tyelle kɑ̈jj møøgø kì ri gen bɑ ngyënyø dødø, o kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø bɑ lɑ̈bø." 
Daniel2:34 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yï nenn-ɑ ree, kɑ tungi kït me dwøng rïng-ɑ piny kì mɑl wïj kït e bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́nywɑlii, ɑgume tyell-ɑ bɑ ngyënyø dødø geki lɑ̈bø kì ri ngïji menɑni, kɑ gï kedhhe." 
Daniel2:35 Codhe, kɑ ngyënyø dødø, kí lɑ̈bø, kí dilɑl, kí dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø ri gen mød gen, kedh ge ogöögø ni puni byel kì yij rɑrø, kɑ ge køøl yi yømø kinni tweet, kɑ kenyɑni döng-ɑ nøw. De tungi kït men-ɑ ɑ́gum ngïji menɑni ɑ́døngi kɑ piny pɑ̈nge bëne." 
Daniel2:36 “Bene gen lɑ̈ggɑni ɑgɑk. Anɑn yï óköbbɑ wuö, ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen." 
Daniel2:37 Wuö, bɑ yïn ɑ dwøng kibøli rɑ̈nhì bënn. Jwøøg Mɑl yï ɑ́gwøge yïn ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng, kɑ yï thödhe ki tegø, geki döng, kí mɑ̈r." 
Daniel2:38 Yï ɑ́gwøge yïn ɑ́ jɑngi piny bëne, o yï jɑɑg-ɑ lɑ̈yy kí winy. Yïn ɑ bɑ wïj dhɑb." 
Daniel2:39 Bɑngí ódhwöödh yi pödhø megø, koo bëëdø e teg ni pödhí; bɑnge ódhwöödh yi dɑ̈ɑ̈g pödhh, lɑ̈ge ɑ bɑ dilɑl, kömi piny bëne ójɑɑg yi en." 
Daniel2:40 Ngween pödhh óbëëd e teg ni ngyënyø dødø, men-ɑ ómød gïïpiny bëne kɑ kedhhe. Ni kedhhi gïïpiny bëne yi ngyënyø dødø, pödhh-ɑ ɑ́yuude ókedhhe bënn." 
Daniel2:41 Álidh yi yïn thyew kinni tyel geki lwedd kwï gen bɑ ngyënyø dødø kwï gen bɑ lɑ̈bø. Menɑni nyodh-ɑ kinni pönhɑni óbëëd ree pɑ̈ng en. Yïe ódi tegi ngyënyø dødø, mɑ́ e dɑ ngyënyø dødø me ree yööl en ki lɑ̈bø." 
Daniel2:42 Bëëdi kɑ̈jj møøgø bɑ dødø, o møøgø bɑ lɑ̈bø kì ri lwedd, wɑng-ɑ kinni, budi pönhɑni óbëëd e teeg, o bun-ɑ kyeelø nyøødh." 
Daniel2:43 Álidh yi yïn thyew kinni ngyënyø dødø ree yööl en ki lɑ̈bø. Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni, rɑ̈nhh-ɑ ójɑɑg pödhhɑni ri gen ópɑ̈nyi yi gen rebø kɑ nywømi kɑ̈lli gen ri gen, de ri gen ko mɑg yi gen ni ngyënyø dødø ɑ pɑ nyi mɑ̈gi kì ri lɑ̈bø." 
Daniel2:44 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ónud pödhhɑni, Jwøøg Mɑl ótïngø ki pödhø me pɑ cuggi tyɑmø, o lɑ̈ge pɑ cög, de pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn ótyɑm yi en kɑ gï tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny, o en kiree, óbëëdø gïti ɑtheer." 
Daniel2:45 Álidh yi yïn ki kër-ɑ ɑ́rïngi tungi kït piny kì mɑl e bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́nywɑlii, kɑ ngïji møde, eni ngïny-ɑ ógwøgø ki ngyënyø dødø, kí dilɑl, kí lɑ̈bø, kí dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø. Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng köbb-ɑ yïn gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø wuö. Møg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi yi yïn ɑ́köbbɑ yïn ki këër gen ceth, o gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen kidyër ɑ́nyudhɑ yïn.”" 
Daniel2:46 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ree bøødhe piny, kɑ Dɑniel mɑle. Akööbe i thödhi Dɑniel ki gëëdhi kɑ rɑ̈bbi ki bɑkur." 
Daniel2:47 Aköbbi Dɑniel yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Kidyër Jwøøg wun bene en ɑ bɑ Jwøøg jwögg, en ɑ bɑ wïi rɑ̈nhì, en ɑ nyi yɑl møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkɑnn, mɑ́ ɑkɑnn møg ɑ́lwɑ̈ng yi yïn ki nyodhø.”" 
Daniel2:48 Codhe, kɑ Dɑniel thödhi yi rɑ̈dh ki lɑwø me dwøng, kɑ thödhi kí gïg mø ngenyø, kɑ gø gwøge ɑ́ jɑngi Bɑbïl; gø ɑ́gwøge thyew ɑ́ jɑngi tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel." 
Daniel2:49 Kɑ rɑ̈dh kwɑjji yi Dɑniel, ɑgwøøg Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑil, kí Abednegö gɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi nenni gïg-ɑ gøggi kì Bɑbïl. De Dɑniel ɑ́cög e bëëd ɑ buri rɑ̈dh." 
Daniel3:1 Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑ́göög ki ngïji dhɑb bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïryew, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́dɑ̈g, kɑ cwöödh piny kì thwøri Durɑ̀ kì Modïri Bɑbïl." 
Daniel3:2 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh ocïgø kinni i cugi ji bënn; nyiirɑ̈dhh, kí jɑgg-ɑ døngø, ki jøg-ɑ bɑng jɑgg-ɑ døngø, kí wɑkïll, kí jøg-ɑ mïdhi ngyëny, kí jɑggi burø, kí ómdɑɑ̀, kí tyëng-ɑ göögø kì yij mïïri kì yethi pödhh-ɑ jɑɑg yi rɑ̈nhdwøng bënn. Ge ɑ́cwööl bënn i bï gen be thyeyi ngïji dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg kɑ cwöödh piny yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr." 
Daniel3:3 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi teenɑni bëne," 
Daniel3:4 kɑ ngeti ngɑ̈j óryeerø ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng pödhh bënn, kí jurrì; jur ki dhøge." 
Daniel3:5 Keny-ɑ ólïngi wun ywøøg kɑ̈ngì kí thøm geki cwɑggi gïg-ɑ nyi kødhhi bënn, kɑ ri wun bøødh wun piny, kɑ ngïji dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödh piny yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr mɑl wun." 
Daniel3:6 Ngɑn-ɑ ócög ree pɑ bøødhe piny kɑ ngïji mɑle, leeng-ɑ yij purun me yije di mɑc me lëëdh cɑrø kì bøli kenyɑni ceth.”" 
Daniel3:7 Codhe, keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi ywøøg thøm ceth, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne ki pödhhe, kí jurre, ree bøødhe piny ge mɑl-ɑ ngïji dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödh piny yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr." 
Daniel3:8 Kì bøli kenyɑni, kwï tyëng Bɑbïl ɑ́kedh kɑ Yeud gøøny gen." 
Daniel3:9 Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑ́köbbi gen kinni, “Wuö rɑ̈dh, yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk gïti ɑtheer." 
Daniel3:10 Yï ɑ́muuj ki cigg kinni keny-ɑ óywöngi thøm ceth, kɑ dhɑnhø bëne ree bøødhe piny ge mɑl-ɑ ngïji dhɑb," 
Daniel3:11 kí kinni i ngɑn-ɑ ócög ree pɑ bøødhe piny kɑ gø mɑle, leeng-ɑ yij purun me mɑc mee lëëdh cɑrø." 
Daniel3:12 Dɑ kwï Yeud mɑ ɑ́cïb yi yïn gɑ møg nenni gïg-ɑ gøggi kì Bɑbïl, ɑ løg Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk kí Abednegö, cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn ɑ́pyem gen. Jwøgí pɑ mɑlli yi gen, wɑlɑ̀ ri gen nuti bøødh gen piny kì bøli ngïji dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödh piny yi yïn.”" 
Daniel3:13 Kɑ rɑ̈dh ójɑwwø ki menteg, ɑöde kinni i kɑ̈ɑ̈l yɑɑgɑni bøle." 
Daniel3:14 Kɑ ge pyëj yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bɑ dyër, Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö, kinni wu bɑ̈nyø ki mɑlli jwøgɑ, kɑ wu ocögø ri wun nuti bøødh wun piny kì bøli ngïji dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödhɑ piny?" 
Daniel3:15 Adɑ́ ɑnɑn keny-ɑ ólïngu ywøøg kɑ̈ngì kí thøm geki cwɑggi gïg-ɑ nyi kødhhi bënn, bøødhu ri wun piny kɑ ngïji dhɑb mɑl wun. Keløg e pɑ mɑl yi wun, wu leeng-ɑ yij purun me lyel ki mɑc. Wu orumø kinni dɑ jwøg men-ɑ óyiel wun?”" 
Daniel3:16 Alöggi Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö kinni, “Wuö, per wøn pɑ nyɑg yi wøn." 
Daniel3:17 Keløg wø ócuggø yielø yi Jwøng-ɑ nyi mɑlli yi wøn ki purun-ɑ lyel geki cingí, wø oyielø yi en." 
Daniel3:18 De cɑgg wø pɑ yiel yi en, ngɑ̈nyi yi wøn ceth kinni jwøgí pɑ mɑl yi wøn, wɑlɑ̀ ri wøn pɑ bøødh wøn piny kì bøli ngïji dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́cwöödh piny yi yïn.”" 
Daniel3:19 Kɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr mɑg yi liny ki menrɑj, kɑ nyinge ókwɑ̈rrø ki Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö, ɑkööbe i ti purun ki cwɑgø o lënhe ki mendwøng." 
Daniel3:20 Kɑ jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g, jøg-ɑ pëddi tegø kì kelli jølinye köbbe twöj gen yɑɑgɑni gɑ ɑ́dɑ̈g. Kɑ gï leeng gen mɑɑc purun e ceg-ɑ lyelø." 
Daniel3:21 Codhe, ɑtwööj gen ki ógudhi gen kì ri gen; ɑ́ywödhh-ɑ thønhø, kí ɑ́ywödhh-ɑ døngø, kí thɑ̈ggì kí ógudh-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Kɑ ge leeng yij mɑɑc purun e olyelø." 
Daniel3:22 Mɑɑc purun ɑ́ceg kɑ rubø ki menrɑj, mɑ́ e bɑ rɑ̈dh ɑ ɑ́kööb i rub kinøw. Kɑ jøliny møg-ɑ ɑ́leeng yɑɑgɑni yij purun gwɑr yi leeb mɑc kɑ ge órɑ̈bbø." 
Daniel3:23 Codhe, kɑ Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö pɑ̈dh-ɑ dïdyëri purun e olyelø, ge nudd gɑ ɑtwöj." 
Daniel3:24 Kɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr ongɑ̈ngø kɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ mɑl kì wïj kwøm, ɑpyëje jyɑ̈gge kinni, “Pɑth ki jøg ɑ́dɑ̈g ɑ ɑ́twöj yi wɑ, kɑ ge leeng wɑ yij purun-ɑ lyel?” Alöggi gen kinni, “Awøø, wuö.”" 
Daniel3:25 Apëjje kinni, “De yɑ ce nenn-ɑ jøg ɑ́ngwen ge ócyɑ̈dhø kì yij mɑc? Ge pɑth ki ɑtwöj, o bong gïn nywɑɑl gen, o ngween gen nënni e nɑ wëywödø!”" 
Daniel3:26 Codhe, kɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr kedh-ɑ dhø purun, ɑcwödde kinni, “Cɑdrɑk! Micɑk! Abednegö! Bɑ̈nggi Jwøng-ɑ Pëddi Döng! Bïu wɑ̈g!” Kɑ ge bï-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Daniel3:27 Kɑ nyiirɑ̈dhh bënn, kí jɑgg-ɑ døngø, kí jɑgg-ɑ bɑng jɑgg-ɑ døngø, geki jyɑ̈ggi rɑ̈dh møg-ɑ kyeelø kedh-ɑ be lidhi jøg ɑ́dɑ̈gɑni, jøg-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li rɑ̈bø yi mɑc; wɑ̈thi yëyyi gen nuti gwɑrø yi mɑc, ógudhi gen nuti rɑ̈bbø, o bong yømi yïrø men ngwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri gen." 
Daniel3:28 Kɑ rɑ̈dh okööbø kinni, “Lenhi Jwøøg Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö, ɑ ɑ́ör wëywöne be yieli tyëng-ɑ gɑ̈nnii. Ciggi rɑ̈dh ɑ́pyem gen, kɑ ge bøy-ɑ thøø kibøli ke di bøødh gen ri gen piny, kɑ jwøg me pɑth ki jwøøg gen di mɑl yi gen." 
Daniel3:29 “Yɑn ɑ muujø ki cigg èn kinni, ke di dhɑnhø me kööbø ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Jwøøg Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö kì yij pödhø, wɑlɑ̀ kì yij jur, wɑlɑ̀ ji mø 'kööb dhøng-ɑ́, bɑ men ngølli ɑ́ gullì, kɑ gøle cøør piny. Bong jwøg megø me cuggi yïëdø ni men.”" 
Daniel3:30 Codhe, kɑ Cɑdrɑk, kí Micɑk, kí Abednegö tïng mɑl yi rɑ̈dh kì modïri Bɑbïl." 
Daniel4:1 Wɑ̈nyi wöödø men ɑ́ör yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr e öd-ɑ pödhh bënn, kí jurrì bënn; jur ki dhøge kì kömi Lɑ̈bø. “Mɑ̈dhu ri wun!" 
Daniel4:2 Lïng wun ki ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng. 
Daniel4:3 “Bɑ ngïjjì ki gïïngɑ̈ngø mø døngø ɑ nyi gwøg yi Jwøk! Jwøk ɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh, en ɑ jyɑ̈gø gïti ɑtheer." 
Daniel4:4 “Yɑ ɑ́bëëd pyëwɑ omedø kì gølɑ, nyingɑ pɑ̈ng yi kɑ̈r bëne." 
Daniel4:5 De men-ɑ́ yɑ ɑ́ceg lɑ̈gø kì wɑ̈r, ki lɑ̈g mø peg, kɑ yɑ obwøgø ki menrɑj." 
Daniel4:6 Kɑ jøg-ɑ bɑ tïddì kì Bɑbïl cwöölɑ bënn, o yɑ nyudhi gen gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni." 
Daniel4:7 Codhe, kɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi bɑ̈gø, kí ɑ́jwöggì, kí jøyenh, kí tyëdd kɑ̈ɑ̈l bølɑ. Kɑ ge köbbɑ lɑ̈ggɑ, de gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni ɑ́dhɑ̈li nyudhi yɑn yi gen." 
Daniel4:8 Codhe, ɑbëën Dɑniel. (Cwølli thyew ɑ́ Beltecɑdhɑr ni nyingi jwøgɑ.) Ree dɑ wëyi jwögg kwërø, ɑnyodhe møg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi yi yɑn. Áköbbɑ kinni:" 
Daniel4:9 Beltecɑdhɑr, jɑngi tyëngbɑg, ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kinni wëyi jwögg kwërø ying-ɑ rií, o kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn bënn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn. Lɑ̈ggɑ ek; köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen." 
Daniel4:10 “Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi, yɑ lɑ̈g-ɑ yɑdh me dwøng cɑrø me cungi kì dïdyëri piny." 
Daniel4:11 Kɑ yɑnhɑni ókedhø e ceg-ɑ pëddø døngø, gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe mɑl, kɑ nenni yi dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny." 
Daniel4:12 Yïthhi yɑnhɑni myëër, o kööre pɑ̈ng yi ɑnyøddø bëne, mø cɑm yi ji bënn kì kömi piny. Lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l buud-ɑ tïbe, o winy bëëd ɑ bɑ̈dde, jɑmmi kömi piny bëne cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ɑ ri nywøle." 
Daniel4:13 “Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ orumø kì ri møgɑni, ɑlïdhɑ ki wëywödø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl e otïïdø kidøøj." 
Daniel4:14 Akööbe ki cwɑg mø døngø kinni, ‘Ngølu yɑnhɑni piny kɑ bɑ̈dde kebbi wun, rodhu yïthhe kɑ nywøle kedhhi wun, cyeed wun lɑ̈yy wɑ̈g kì thɑre geki winy kì bɑ̈dde." 
Daniel4:15 De wiy wun tyele kì piny ɑ́ ɑkod ki ɑ́cwecwelli ngyënyø dødø geki ɑ́cwecwelli dilɑl. Wiy bëëde kì pɑ̈l kinøw kì kelli lum. “ ‘Wiy köme bëën yi thöjji mɑl, kɑ wiy bëëde kì kelli lɑ̈yy geki lum." 
Daniel4:16 Koo rumø ki rummi dhɑnhø den-ɑ́ rummi lɑ̈y ɑ órømme ki runn ɑ́bïryew. 
Daniel4:17 Møg bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi wëywödd møg-ɑ nyi tïïdø kidøøj. Wiy yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kì kɑ̈jj bënn kinni Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi pödhh bënn, o pödhhɑni nyi mëgge’ ngɑn-ɑ dwɑdde; cɑgg gï mëgge ji mø per gen pɑ ti teg.’" 
Daniel4:18 “Bene gen lɑ̈ggɑ ɑgɑk. Anɑn yïn ɑ Beltecɑdhɑr, köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen. Jø tøg burɑ ɑ́dhɑl yi köbbi yɑn gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni, de ócuggø kwøbø yi yïn, mɑ́ rií dɑ wëyi jwögg kwërø.”"
