Daniel4:19 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngi møgɑni yi Dɑniel, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Beltecɑdhɑr, kɑ ceg-ɑ thengø; ɑ́dhɑ̈li kwøb. Aköbbii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Beltecɑdhɑr, yï ko theng yi lɑ̈ggɑni geki nyodhi gen.” Alöggi Beltecɑdhɑr kinni, “Wuö, lɑ̈ggɑni ke di töngi gen kömi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn, di bëëd e døøj!" 
Daniel4:20 Yɑnh-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn e wɑ̈dhi mɑl, e ócuggø nennø yi dhɑnhø bëne kì kömi piny." 
Daniel4:21 Yïthhe ɑ́bëëd ge myëër, o kööre dɑ ɑnyøddø bëne, me cɑm yi kömi piny bëne. Lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l ɑ́ywööm kì tïbe, kɑ winy ogëdø ki ud kì bɑ̈dde." 
Daniel4:22 “Bene yïn ɑ bɑ yɑnhɑni wuö, yɑnh-ɑ bɑ̈r, ɑ teg. Yï ɑ́døngi ki mendwøng kɑ yï wɑ̈dh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ lɑ̈gí wɑ̈dh-ɑ cögi piny." 
Daniel4:23 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yï onëënø wuö, wëywödø ɑ́bï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl, ɑkööbe kinni, ‘Ngølu yɑdh piny, kɑ bɑ̈dde kebbi wun, kɑ tyele wiy wun kì piny, kɑ wiy bëëde kì pɑ̈l kì kelli lum, e ókodø ki ɑ́cwecwelli ngyënyø dødø geki dilɑl. Wiy thöjj dyëëm gen köme, kɑ wiy bëëde kì pɑ̈lɑni geki lɑ̈yy ki runn ɑ́bïryew.’" 
Daniel4:24 “O gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni èn wuö, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́nyodh yi Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng kinni i ge óbï kömí." 
Daniel4:25 Yï ócyeed wɑ̈g kì kelli ji, kɑ yï obëëdø kì pɑ̈l wuki lɑ̈yy. Yï ócɑm lum ni wɑdh, kɑ yï onebø yi thöjj, ki runn ɑ́bïryew; gïti keny-ɑ óyodií kinni Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng, bɑ en ɑ jɑɑg pödhh-ɑ kömi piny bënn, o gï nyi mëgge’ ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en." 
Daniel4:26 Wëywödø ɑ́kööb i wiy tyeli yɑdh kì piny. Menɑni wɑng-ɑ kinni, lɑwí ódöggi yïn keny-ɑ óyïëëy kinni bɑ Jwøk ɑ jɑɑg kömi piny bëne." 
Daniel4:27 Adɑ́ lïngí kwøbbɑ cyee wuö, wïyí ki gwøg ki orøg, gøggí dyër, kɑ pyëwí nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈me ki ngɑn jɑdø, o yï ókedh yï ódönyø.”" 
Daniel4:28 Gïgɑni bënn ɑ́cwöb kɑ ge pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr. 
Daniel4:29 Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi dwɑ̈tt pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́ryew, rɑ̈dh ɑ́bëëd e ócyɑ̈dhø kì wïj óthɑɑng ød kì gøldwøng kì Bɑbïl," 
Daniel4:30 ɑkööbe kinni, “Lidh, Bɑbïl bëëd ɑ dï! Eni kɑɑldwøng kɑɑl-ɑ geer yɑn ki tegɑ ɑ́ kɑɑl jyɑ̈gø, keny nënni döngi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø miɑ geki tegɑ.”" 
Daniel4:31 Kɑ cwɑg obëënø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ mɑl e nudd e okööbø ceth; cwɑggɑni okööbø kinni, “Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr, lïng! Lɑwi rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø mií ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì rií." 
Daniel4:32 O yï ócyeed wɑ̈g kì kelli ji, yï óbëëdø kɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, yï cɑm-ɑ lum ni wɑdh, ki runn ɑ́bïryew, gïti keny-ɑ óyïëëy kinni Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi pödhhi kömi piny bënn, o gï ócuggø mëggi yi en ngɑn-ɑ dwɑdde.”" 
Daniel4:33 Møgɑni ɑ́bï gɑ dyër ceth, Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑ́cyeed wɑ̈g kì kelli ji, kɑ cɑm-ɑ lum ni wɑdh. Köme ɑ́dyëëm yi thöjj, kɑ yëyye óbɑ̈rø ni obërri cor, kɑ könggi lwedde ogöögø ni lweddi winyø." 
Daniel4:34 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́thumi runn ɑ́bïryew, ɑtïngɑ wïjɑ kɑ yɑ lïïdh-ɑ mɑl, kɑ rummɑ ódwöögø. Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng lejjɑ; eni ngɑn-ɑ bëëdø gïti ɑtheer; ɑ́lejjɑ kɑ lenhɑ kinni, “Ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø gïti ɑtheer, Lɑ̈ge pɑ cög." 
Daniel4:35 Ji nenni yi en kì piny ge bong per gen, Wëywödd kì mɑl geki ji kì piny jɑɑg-ɑ yi en, bong ngɑn cuggi jogii. Bong ngɑn mɑ̈ɑ̈nii gïn dwɑdde gwøgø wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn pëjjii gïn-ɑ gwøge" 
Daniel4:36 “Keny-ɑ ɑ́dwöög rummɑ, kɑ dhwɑ̈ngɑ dwöög-ɑ yïɑ kí rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø geki lɑ̈gɑ, kí mɑ̈rɑ geki pödhɑ. Kɑ yɑ yɑb yi jyɑ̈ggɑ geki jø tøg burɑ, kɑ yɑ cïb wïj kwømɑ, kɑ lɑwɑ döggi yɑn ki dhwɑ̈ng me lod men-ɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn." 
Daniel4:37 “O ɑnɑn, yɑ Nebukɑdnesɑr, yɑ lenh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng, o yɑ lejj-ɑ en. Gïg-ɑ gøgge bënn pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji, o ge bɑ dyër, o ngɑn tɑ̈dø wïje nyi dwööge’ cyɑ̈n.”" 
Daniel5:1 Tyelø ɑ́kyel kì thyënhø Rɑ̈dh Belcɑdhɑr jyɑ̈gge ɑ́ryeje kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg kì kej ɑ́kyel." 
Daniel5:2 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd ge omɑ̈dhø, kɑ Belcɑdhɑr omuujø ki cigg kinni i kɑ̈ɑ̈l óthɑ̈ggi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø kí tɑ̈mmì møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wïye Nebukɑdnesɑr kì Kengi Yerusɑlem, o yethi gïn mɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈gge, kí mɑ̈nne geki ɑkwɑnyye." 
Daniel5:3 Kɑ óthɑ̈ggɑni kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø bënn ki møgi oløg kì yethi gen," 
Daniel5:4 kɑ jwögg-ɑ ógwøgø gɑ dhɑb, kí jwöggi ɑ́tegø, kí jwöggi dilɑl kí ngyënyø dødø, kí jwöggi yɑdh kí jwöggi kït mɑlli yi gen." 
Daniel5:5 Kɑ cingi dhɑnhø ocwöbø, ɑcɑ̈ge ki gwed kì kö döri gøldwøng, kì keny-ɑ ti ki cɑrø yi mɑc. Kɑ cingɑni lidh yi rɑ̈dh e ogwëdø." 
Daniel5:6 Kɑ rɑ̈dh obwøgø ki mendwøng, kɑ dële okïïrø, kɑ cønge odennø yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Daniel5:7 Kɑ ócwöddø e óryeerø ki ngɑn rengi be cwööli ɑ́jwöggì, kí jøyenh geki tyëdd. Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi gen, ɑköbbi gen yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Ngɑn-ɑ órɑng gwedd møg, kɑ yɑ köbbe gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gweddɑni, óruug ki ógudh ɑ́cwïcwïlli rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ ruug ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb mø dhwɑ̈ng, o gwøg ɑ́ jɑl-ɑ bɑng ókwøm.”" 
Daniel5:8 Kɑ tïddi rɑ̈dh nyeg-ɑ kenyɑni, de bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́lwɑ̈ng gweddɑni ki rɑngø, wɑlɑ̀ bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́köbbi rɑ̈dh gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen." 
Daniel5:9 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Belcɑdhɑr obwøgø ki mendwøng, kɑ dële ójuurø, kɑ dëlli jyɑ̈gge ójuurø." 
Daniel5:10 Cwɑggi rɑ̈dh geki jyɑ̈gge ɑ́lïngi yi meyi rɑ̈dh, kɑ kedh-ɑ ódɑ̈r-ɑ di jøg-ɑ ɑ́ryej. Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk gïti ɑtheer wuö! Yï ko bwøg kɑ dëlí ko juur." 
Daniel5:11 Dɑ jɑl megø kì pödhí me ree di wëyi jwögg kwërø. Keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd wïyí ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, jɑlɑni ɑ́nyuudh ki peli wïj me ni peli wɑ̈thi jwögg. Kɑ gwøg yi Rɑ̈dh Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑ́ jɑngi tyëngbɑg, geki ɑ́jwöggì, kí jøyenh geki tyëdd." 
Daniel5:12 Yïe dɑ tegø megø kì wɑ̈ye, o wïje pel, ngɑ̈ny gïn-ɑ nyi wɑngi yi lɑ̈g, ngɑ̈ny bɑg ki kwøbb-ɑ teg, o kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn ngɑ̈nye, öd kɑ jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Dɑniel cwööl, en ɑ ɑ́cɑg yi rɑ̈dh ɑ́ Beltecɑdhɑr, yï óköbbe gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑk bënn.”" 
Daniel5:13 Kɑ Dɑniel jwɑn ki kïdhi bøli rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbii yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Bene yïn Dɑniel wɑ̈d Yeud men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi wïyɑ rɑ̈dh kì Yeudiyɑ̀?" 
Daniel5:14 Yɑ ɑ́lïng i wëyi jwögg kwërø ying-ɑ rií, o yï ngɑ̈ny kwøb, o wïjí pel." 
Daniel5:15 Tyëdd geki ɑ́jwöggì ɑ́cwööl keny kipe kinni o gwedd møg rɑng yi gen, o yɑ köbbi gen gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gweddɑni. De ge ɑ́dhɑl yi yodi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gweddɑni." 
Daniel5:16 Yɑ ɑ́lïng ɑnɑn kinni i yï ócuggø nyudhø ki kwøbb-ɑ ɑkɑnn geki møg teg. Keløg yï ócuggø rɑngi gweddï, kɑ yɑ köbbí gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen, yï óruug ki ógudh ɑ́cwïcwïlli rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kí ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb mø dhwɑ̈ng kì yedhí, o yï ógöögø ki jɑl-ɑ bɑng ókwøm.”" 
Daniel5:17 Alöggi Dɑniel kinni, “Mïdhí jɑmmí, wɑlɑ̀ mëggí gen ngɑn megø. Yï órɑ̈ngɑ gïg-ɑ ógwedø, o yï ónyudhɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen." 
Daniel5:18 “Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng wïyí Nebukɑdnesɑr ɑ́gwøge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh me dwøng, kɑ gø thödhe ki dhwɑ̈ng geki mɑ̈r." 
Daniel5:19 Ábëëd e dwøng cɑrø kɑ ji bënn, kí pödhh, kí jurrì bënn óböggø yi en. Kenyi di ngɑn dwɑdde nɑ̈gø, gø nyi nɑ̈ge nɑ̈gø, ke di ngɑn dwɑdde wiyø, gø nyi wiye wiyø." 
Daniel5:20 De keny-ɑ ɑ́tɑ̈de kɑ wïje ótëngø, kɑ yije órönyø, ɑkɑ̈ɑ̈lii wɑ̈g kì yij dhwɑ̈nge." 
Daniel5:21 Ácyeed wɑ̈g kì kelli ji, kɑ rumme ogöögø ni rummi lɑ̈y. Ábëëd ɑ kelli ɑderri pɑ̈l, e cɑm-ɑ lum ni wɑdh, nyi buud-ɑ tɑngdɑɑr piny e bong gïjø me kume ree kiper thöjj. Ayïëye kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny cyee kinni Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng en ɑ mïdhi pödhh bënn, o gï nyi mëgge’ ngɑn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en." 
Daniel5:22 “De men-ɑ́ yïn ɑ wɑ̈de, wïjí nuti dwöög yïn cyɑ̈n, ngö møgɑni bënn ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn." 
Daniel5:23 Yï ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj kì bøli wïi mɑl, óthɑ̈ggì geki tɑ̈mmi dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Kenge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yïn. Kɑ yï omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg kì yethi gen wuki jyɑ̈ggí, kí mɑ̈nní, geki ɑkwɑnyyí, kɑ jwöggi dhɑb, kí jwöggi ɑ́tegø, kí jwöggi dilɑl, kí jwöggi ngyënyø dødø, kí jwöggi yenh, kí jwöggi kïttì mɑlli yi wun. Eni jwögg-ɑ pɑ nëënø, o ge pɑ lïngø, o bong gïjø me ngɑ̈nyi yi gen. De men-ɑ́ wïjí ɑ́wïl ki Jwøng-ɑ cinge di wëyí, kí gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn bënn." 
Daniel5:24 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́ör cingɑni yi Jwøk, o gwede kwøb møg." 
Daniel5:25 “Møg-ɑ ɑ́gwed ek: ‘Kwɑn, kwɑn, røm, pɑ̈g.’" 
Daniel5:26 O gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen ek: kwɑn; cyɑ̈nggi jyɑ̈gí ɑ́kwɑn yi Jwøk kɑ ge óthumø," 
Daniel5:27 røm: yï ɑ́røm ki midhɑn kɑ yï yod yï oyödø," 
Daniel5:28 pɑ̈g: pödhí ɑ́pɑ̈ngi kɑ mëggi tyëng Pɑres geki Mɑdɑy.” 
Daniel5:29 Kɑ Belcɑdhɑr omuujø’ cigg kì bøli kenyɑni ceth, i ruug Dɑniel ki ógudh ɑ́cwïcwïlli rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ yedhe kïdhi ki ɑ́cwecwelli dhɑb mø dhwɑ̈ng. Kɑ gø gwøge ɑ́ jɑl-ɑ bɑng ókwøm." 
Daniel5:30 Rɑ̈dh Belcɑdhɑr, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́nɑ̈g kì wɑ̈rɑni ceth." 
Daniel5:31 Kɑ lɑwø kwɑny yi Dɑryøs jɑl Mɑdɑy e runne bɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́ryew. 
Daniel6:1 Dɑryøs ɑ́rööny ki jyɑ̈ggì miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew kì yij pödhe," 
Daniel6:2 ɑrönye ki jɑgg ɑ́dɑ̈g møg jɑɑg jyɑ̈ggɑni, o ge nenni gen gwøøg rɑ̈dh, Dɑniel bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jɑggɑni." 
Daniel6:3 Kɑ Dɑniel oluudø kì kelli jɑggɑni geki jyɑ̈gg-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ gwøge ɑ́tyëëm ki døøjø, kɑ rɑ̈dh orumø kinni, o di gwøg ɑ́ jɑngi pödhø bëne." 
Daniel6:4 Codhe, kɑ jyɑ̈gg-ɑ døngø geki jɑgg-ɑ kyeelø oyɑ̈bø ki gïn ree di gøøny Dɑniel kì ri yëth-ɑ jɑɑge pödhø, de ge ɑ́jɑ̈ddi, mɑ́ Dɑniel gwøge døøj, o pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji, o yije bong wëënyø." 
Daniel6:5 Codhe, kɑ jøgɑni ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Bong gïjø me pere gøøny wɑ en kì ri gwøge, den-ɑ́ ri ciggi Jwøge ɑ cuggi wɑ ki yodii.”" 
Daniel6:6 Kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑköbbi ge gøn kinni, “Rɑ̈dh Dɑryøs, yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk gïti ɑtheer!" 
Daniel6:7 Wøn, wø jɑgg-ɑ døngø, kí jɑggi yethi myërr geki jɑggi bɑnggi gen, kí jɑgg-ɑ kyeelø bënn, dhøggi wøn ɑ́reb yi wøn kinni, gwëëd rɑ̈dh ki cigg gɑ cigg møg mïdhi ki menteg. Muuj ki cigg kinni, ko di dhɑnhø me kwɑ̈jji kì yï jwøg megø, wɑlɑ̀ kì yï dhɑnhø megø ki gïïpiny, ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, den-ɑ́ kì yïí ketí wuö. Ngɑn-ɑ ópyem ciggɑni leeng-ɑ yij buur ngurrì." 
Daniel6:8 Gwed wɑ̈nyi ciggɑni kɑ nyingí thɑɑny yije, o göög ceth ɑ́ ciggi Mɑdɑy geki Pɑres, cigg-ɑ pɑ nyi wil.”" 
Daniel6:9 Codhe, kɑ Rɑ̈dh Dɑryøs nyinge thɑɑnye yij wɑ̈nyi ciggɑni." 
Daniel6:10 Keny-ɑ ɑ́yodii yi Dɑniel kinni wɑ̈nyø ɑ́rum ki thɑnyø, ɑkedhe gøle. Yïe dɑ ɑwɑj kì ød mɑl kì gøle, ɑwɑnyɑni yïëbb-ɑ tung-ɑ døøg kuni Yerusɑlem, kɑ cønge rume piny kì kenyɑni ni kenyi gööge kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng, ɑ nyi mɑlle Jwøk ki tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel." 
Daniel6:11 Kɑ jøgɑni dhøggi gen nywɑg gen, kɑ ge ókedhø, ɑyuud gen Dɑniel cønge rum en piny e kwɑjj-ɑ Jwøge," 
Daniel6:12 ɑkedhi gen be gøønyi Dɑniel yï rɑ̈dh, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Wuö, nyingí ɑ́thɑɑny yij wɑ̈nyi cigg-ɑ kööbø kinni ko di ngɑn kwɑ̈jji ki gïïpiny kì yï jwøg megø, wɑlɑ̀ kì yï dhɑnhø den-ɑ́ yïí ketí, ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, o ngɑn-ɑ ko mïdhi ciggɑni leeng-ɑ buur ngurrì.” Alöggi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Ngee, ge bɑ cigg mø teg, ciggi Mɑdɑy geki Pɑres, cigg-ɑ pɑ nyi wil.”" 
Daniel6:13 Codhe, ɑköbbi rɑ̈dh yi gen kinni, “Dɑniel, jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì Yeudiyɑ̀, yï pɑ wør yi en, o cigg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn ɑ́pyeme. Nyi ceg-ɑ kwɑ̈jjø tyel ɑ́dɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel.”" 
Daniel6:14 Kɑ rɑ̈dh pyëwe ceg-ɑ rënyø keny-ɑ ɑ́lïnge møgɑni, ɑyɑ̈be ki yöö men yiele Dɑniel; ree ɑ́pɑ̈nye ceth gïti kɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi cɑ̈ng piny." 
Daniel6:15 Kɑ jøg-ɑ mɑɑn Dɑniel døøg-ɑ yï rɑ̈dh, ɑkööb gen kinni, “Ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn wuö, kì ri ciggi Mɑdɑy geki Pɑres, kinni cigg-ɑ nyi muuj yi rɑ̈dh pɑ nyi wil.”" 
Daniel6:16 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh omuujø ki cigg kinni i mɑɑg Dɑniel, kɑ leeng yij buur ngurrì. Dɑniel ɑ́köbbi yi rɑ̈dh kinni, “Wiy yï óyiel yi Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ nyi rïïj e omɑllø yi yïn.”" 
Daniel6:17 Kɑ dhø bur cïbi ki kït. Kɑ kitim mi rɑ̈dh geki mø jyɑ̈gge thɑɑny ri kïnɑni, kinni o óbëëd e bong ngɑn yiel Dɑniel." 
Daniel6:18 Codhe, kɑ rɑ̈dh døøg-ɑ gøldwøng, ɑbɑ̈nye ki gïncɑm wɑlɑ̀ gïn mɑdh, kɑ wɑ̈r tyëge e nuti nenø." 
Daniel6:19 Dhuki kì ri tɑ̈ri piny ceth, kɑ rɑ̈dh jwɑn-ɑ buur ngurrì." 
Daniel6:20 Keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhe buti bur men-ɑ ɑ́leeng Dɑniel, ɑryeere mine cödø e cwøll-ɑ Dɑniel kinni, “Dɑniel, bɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø! Jwøng-ɑ nyi rïïj e omɑllø yi yïn, yï ɑ́yiele kì dhøggi ngurrì?”" 
Daniel6:21 Alöggi Dɑniel kinni, “Yï ómïdhi yi Jwøk wuö gïti ɑtheer!" 
Daniel6:22 Jwøgɑ wëywöne ɑ́öre be cyëgi dhøggi ngurrì, kipe yɑ ónyïɑ̈g yi gen, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́yod yi Jwøk yïɑ bong cɑ́y kì bøle, geki bølí thyew wuö rɑ̈dh. Bong gïnrɑj mɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ.”" 
Daniel6:23 Kɑ rɑ̈dh pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng, ɑmuuje cigg kinni i mïïd Dɑniel wɑ̈g kì yij burɑni. Codhe ɑmïïdii wɑ̈g, bong gïn nywɑɑlii mɑ́ e ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ Jwøk." 
Daniel6:24 Kɑ rɑ̈dh omuujø ki cigg kinni mɑɑg jøg-ɑ ɑ́gøøny Dɑniel bënn, kɑ ge leeng yij bur me pɑ̈ng yi ngurrì, geki mɑ̈nni gen kí nyigi gen. Kɑ ge ceg ki gɑmmø yi ngurrì ge nuti wɑ̈dhi tyeli burɑni, kɑ cu gen mwöd yi ngurrì." 
Daniel6:25 Kɑ Rɑ̈dh Dɑryøs gwëd-ɑ yï pödhh bënn, kí jurrì bënn, kí dhøg bënn, kì kömi piny kinni, “Mɑ̈dhu ri wun!" 
Daniel6:26 Yɑn ɑ muujø ki cigg èn, kinni dhɑnhø bëne kì yij pödhɑ bögge, kɑ wøre Jwøøg Dɑniel. “Bɑ Jwøk me nëënø, o ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø gïti ɑtheer. Lɑ̈ge pɑ cuggi tɑ̈ɑ̈y piny, o jyɑ̈ge pɑ cög." 
Daniel6:27 Nyii yïëdø, kɑ nyii dumø; nyii göögø ki ngïjjì geki gïïngɑ̈ngø, kì mɑl kí piny. En ɑ ɑ́yiel Dɑniel kì dhøggi ngurrì.”" 
Daniel6:28 Kɑ Dɑniel pere ceg-ɑ pëddø tëngø kì kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Dɑryøs geki kɑɑm-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Körec jɑl Pɑres. 
Daniel7:1 Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gi kì kyeel runni Belcɑdhɑr rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ kì yij lɑwø. Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈g ɑ wɑ̈r, kɑ lɑ̈ggɑni gweedɑ yij wɑ̈nyø, gweddɑni ek:" 
Daniel7:2 ge bɑ wɑ́ji gïg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gɑ kì wɑ̈rɑni. Yɑ ɑ́lɑ̈g-ɑ yømø e ókwöddø kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn, kɑ nɑɑm omeli dwøng pwöje." 
Daniel7:3 Kɑ lɑ̈yy ɑ́ngwen bï-ɑ wɑ̈g kì nɑmɑni, ge bɑ lɑ̈yy mø døngø mø bɑ̈ɑ̈n." 
Daniel7:4 Men-ɑ kyeel gen nënni e nɑ ngur, de yïe dɑ obërr ni cor. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ nenn-ɑ kenyɑni, kɑ obërre puth wɑ̈g. Kɑ lɑ̈yɑni tïng mɑl o cunge kì kömi tyelli cyɑ̈n ni dhɑnhø, kɑ thödhi ki rummi dhɑnhø." 
Daniel7:5 Ryeew lɑ̈yyɑni nënni e nɑ lɑ̈y dub, e ócungø kì kömi tyelli cyɑ̈n. Dhøge dɑ ngëd ɑ́dɑ̈g gï mïdhe’ mïdhø ki legge. Kɑ köbbi yi cwɑg møøgø kinni, “Göggí bølí, cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki rïngø me gïïr!”" 
Daniel7:6 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ nenn-ɑ kenyɑni, kɑ lɑ̈y me ni kwej obëënø, de köme dɑ obërr ɑ́ngwen mø ni obërri winyø, o yïe dɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈th ɑ́ngwen, kɑ thödhi ki lɑwø." 
Daniel7:7 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ nenn-ɑ kenyɑni, kɑ ngween lɑ̈yyɑni obëënø, bɑ lɑ̈y me dwøng o teeg cɑrø, o legge bɑ ngyënyø dødø ge døngø cɑrø, ceg kɑ böggø ki mendwøng. Kɑ lɑ̈yy-ɑ kyeelø nyøne gï mwöde mwödø ki legge, leggi ngyënyø dødø møg-ɑ pëddi tegø. Bëëde bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki lɑ̈yy-ɑ ɑ́bï kì bøle, yïe dɑ tùng pyɑ̈rø." 
Daniel7:8 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ nenn-ɑ ri tùngɑni, kɑ tung me thinh lidhɑ e otwïyø kì kelli tùngɑni. Kɑ tùng ɑ́dɑ̈g puthe wɑ̈g kì kelli tùng-ɑ ɑ́yuude kenyɑni. Tung-ɑ ɑ́twïy kì cyɑ̈n yïe dɑ nyingi dhɑnhø, kí dhøg me tïnggi ki kwøb mø døngø." 
Daniel7:9 Kɑ kwømm cïb piny, yɑ nudd yɑ onëënø. Kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wöni weenø e onëënø pëgg-ɑ wïj kwøm ɑ́kyel. Ógudhe tɑr nɑ ɑ́piy, o yëyye dhïw. Tyelli kwøme bɑ mɑc me lyel," 
Daniel7:10 mɑc opɑ̈mmø kì ri gen. Dɑ ji ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø møg kɑ̈llii, o møg-ɑ cungi kì bøle pɑ yïëy kwɑnø, ge bɑ ɑ́lïp pyɑ̈r mø ngenyø. Kɑ burø ócɑ̈gø, kɑ wɑ̈j yieb." 
Daniel7:11 Yɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ ócungø yɑ lïng-ɑ kwøbb-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ kømmi yi tung-ɑ thinh. Kɑ ngween lɑ̈yy nɑ̈g yɑ nudd yɑ onëënø, kɑ leeng mɑc o rɑ̈bbe." 
Daniel7:12 Lɑ̈yy-ɑ kyeelø lɑwø ɑ́kwɑny kì cinggi gen, de ge ɑ́wiy bëëd gen ki keny me nøg." 
Daniel7:13 Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni kì wɑ̈r, yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki gïjø me nënni e nɑ dhɑnhø. Kɑ bï-ɑ yïɑ e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ yethi pølli mɑl, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wöni weenø e onëënø, ɑkïdhii bøle." 
Daniel7:14 Kɑ thödhi ki tegø, kí dhwɑ̈ng, kí lɑ̈gø, o tyëng pödhh bënn, kí jurrì bënn, jur ki dhøge mɑlli gen en. Jyɑ̈ge gïti ɑtheer, o lɑ̈ge pɑ thumi." 
Daniel7:15 Yɑ ɑ́tyɑj yi lɑ̈gg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gɑ, kɑ wïjɑ ócungø ki mendwøng." 
Daniel7:16 Kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ yï jɑl ɑ́kyel kì kelli jøg-ɑ cungi kì kenyɑni, ɑpyëjɑ en ki gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni bënn. Kɑ yɑ nyudhe gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni." 
Daniel7:17 Ákööb kinni, “Lɑ̈yy-ɑ døngø ɑ́ngwen møgɑni bɑ pödhh ɑ́ngwen mø døngø møg-ɑ ódhwödh kì kömi piny." 
Daniel7:18 De lɑ̈gø ókwɑny yi jii Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ gø mïdhi gen gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Daniel7:19 Yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yodi dyër kì ri ngween lɑ̈yy, ɑ ɑ́bëëd e bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki møg-ɑ kyeelø, lɑ̈y-ɑ dwøng, ɑ teeg cɑrø, ɑ legge bɑ ngyënyø dødø, o lwedde bɑ ngyënyø dilɑl, ɑ ɑ́mød lɑ̈yy-ɑ kyeelø bënn kɑ gï nyøne." 
Daniel7:20 Thyew yɑ ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ yodi dyër kì ri tùng-ɑ bɑ pyɑ̈rø kì wïje, geki tung-ɑ ɑ́twïy kɑ tùng ɑ́dɑ̈g dhööye wɑ̈g. Yïe ɑ́dɑ nying kí dhøg me tïnggi ki kwøb mø døngø. Ábëëd e dwøng cɑrø kibøli lɑ̈yy-ɑ kyeelø." 
Daniel7:21 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ nenn-ɑ kenyɑni kɑ tungɑni ónyïɑ̈ggø ki jii Jwøk, kɑ gï tyɑme." 
Daniel7:22 Codhe, kɑ ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́wöni weenø e onëënø gøny lidhe, ɑcwɑge jii Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ bøli keny-ɑ kwɑɑny lɑ̈gø yi jii Jwøk ówɑ̈nhø." 
Daniel7:23 Bene møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbe yɑn ek: “Ngween lɑ̈yy, bɑ ngween pödhh-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ ódhwödh kì kömi piny, o óbëëd e bɑ̈ɑ̈n ki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ómøde bënn kì kömi piny, kɑ gï nyøne." 
Daniel7:24 Tùng-ɑ bɑ pyɑ̈rø, bɑ rɑ̈nhì pyɑ̈rø møg-ɑ ójɑɑg pönhɑni. Codhe, o rɑ̈dh megø cwöbe. Rɑ̈nhɑni óbëëd e bɑ̈ɑ̈n cɑrø ki rɑ̈nhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ rɑ̈nhì ɑ́dɑ̈g kì kelli gen tɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny." 
Daniel7:25 Ókööbø ki kwøb mø rijjø kì ri Jwøng-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ jii Jwøk jude. Ree ópɑ̈nye ki wili ciggi Jwøøg gen geki kwëër gen, kɑ jii Jwøk jɑɑge ki runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kí budi run." 
Daniel7:26 De burø ópëggi piny be lidhi gøny, kɑ lɑwe pɑ̈d; lɑ̈ge óbong nyinge gïti ɑtheer." 
Daniel7:27 Lɑ̈gø bëne, kí dhwɑ̈ng mëgg-ɑ jii Jwøk kì yethi pödhh bënn kì kömi piny. Lɑ̈gi gen pɑ cög, o ge ógöggi yi pödhh bënn kɑ kwøbbi gen lïngi yi pödhhɑni.”" 
Daniel7:28 Codhi møgɑni ɑnɑn. Yɑ ɑ́bwøg ki mendwøng kɑ dëlɑ ceg-ɑ juurø, de møgɑni ɑ́mïdhɑ kì wïje." 
Daniel8:1 Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Rɑ̈dh Belcɑdhɑr kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈gɑ ki ryeew lɑ̈g." 
Daniel8:2 Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni, yɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dh-ɑ riɑ ki yodø kì yij Susɑ̀, kì modïri Elɑm. Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ ócungø kì kömi dhøg Ulɑy." 
Daniel8:3 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki órömø me tùnge bɑ̈rrø, tung ɑ́kyel bɑ̈ɑ̈r e cer-ɑ twïyø." 
Daniel8:4 Kɑ órömɑni lidhɑ e cöbb-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø, geki wɑɑng wurlwɑl ki tùnge. Bong lɑ̈y me cuggi lwɑ̈ngi linye, wɑlɑ̀ me cuggi cung kì bøle. Göög-ɑ wïje ki gïg-ɑ dwɑdde, kɑ ceg-ɑ pëddø tëngø." 
Daniel8:5 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ orumø kì ri møgɑni, kɑ ónywøg me dwøng obëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, e ceg-ɑ ngwej ki menteg dhɑ̈y tyelle ce pɑ nywɑ̈ddi ki piny. Yïe dɑ tung me nënni kì ɑ́kɑrri nyinge." 
Daniel8:6 Kɑ pödh-ɑ yï órömø men-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ e ócungø kì kömi dhøg, e pyëwe rɑɑj." 
Daniel8:7 Kɑ pödh-ɑ kömi órömɑni, kɑ tùnge ryeet tore. Órömø ɑ́dhɑl yi linye; ɑ́cøør piny kɑ nyøn, bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́yielii." 
Daniel8:8 Kɑ ónywøngɑni ókedhø e ceg-ɑ tɑ̈dø, codhe kɑ tunge otorø. Kɑ keje twïy yi tùng ɑ́ngwen, men nyudh-ɑ tung megø kì wɑ̈ye." 
Daniel8:9 Kɑ tung me thinh otwïyø kì ri ɑ́kyel kì kelli tùngɑni, kɑ lɑ̈ge wɑ̈dh-ɑ kuni wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki Piny-ɑ Ámuuj cøn." 
Daniel8:10 Átëngi ki mendwøng, kɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki yɑɑy mɑl, men-ɑ́ kyell kì ri gen, kɑ kwï gen lëënge piny kɑ gï nyøne." 
Daniel8:11 Kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ yï nyirɑ̈ɑ̈dh yɑɑy mɑl. Kɑ gëdhh-ɑ nyi muujii yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn cuunge, kɑ Kengø bwöle." 
Daniel8:12 Kɑ ji orøngø, ɑcög gen ge pɑ muujø ki gëdhhì, kɑ kwøbbi Jwøk weddi piny. Kɑ gïn-ɑ gwøg yi tungɑni nyi lwɑ̈nge ceth." 
Daniel8:13 Kɑ wëywödø ɑ́kyel lïngɑ e pyëj-ɑ wëywödø megø kinni, “Gïg-ɑ yethi lɑ̈g ek gït-ɑ wɑɑng ge nud? Orøng-ɑ rɑj ni men pïd-ɑ wɑɑng e ócungø kì kej gëdhhì; yɑɑy mɑl geki Kengø pïd-ɑ wɑɑng ge onyønø?”" 
Daniel8:14 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ kyeelø lïngɑ e ólöggø kinni, “Gïgɑni ótyëg-ɑ wɑ̈rr kí dicɑ̈ngg gɑ ɑ́lïp ɑ́ryew kí miy ɑ́dɑ̈g, bong gëëdhi men-ɑ ómuuj kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni. Othumi cyɑ̈nggɑni cyee, o Kengø dwøøg keje.”" 
Daniel8:15 Yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ orumø kì ri gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi lɑ̈ggɑni, kɑ ngɑn megø wɑ̈dhɑ ki lidhø e ócungø kì butɑ." 
Daniel8:16 Alïngɑ cwɑggi dhɑnhø ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ løøg dhøg Ulɑy e okööbø kinni, “Gɑbriel, löbbí gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ ɑ́lidhe.”" 
Daniel8:17 Codhe, kɑ Gɑbriel nyïng-ɑ keny-ɑ cungɑ, kɑ yɑ obwøgø keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhe butɑ, kɑ yɑ ópɑ̈ɑ̈dhø. Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Jɑl, yï bɑ dhɑnhø yøw, de ngɑ̈nyí wøw kinni gïg-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn kööb ɑ ri cögi piny.”" 
Daniel8:18 Yɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh keny-ɑ ɑ́kööbe e dëlɑ ì ywɑd. De yɑ ɑ́mɑge kɑ yɑ tïnge wɑ̈thi tyellɑ," 
Daniel8:19 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ nyudh-ɑ yïn gïn-ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøk. Lɑ̈ggɑni kööb ɑ ri cögi piny." 
Daniel8:20 “Órömø men-ɑ ɑ́lidh yi yïn wïje dɑ tùng ɑ́ryew, bɑ Mɑdɑy geki Pɑres." 
Daniel8:21 Ónywøg bɑ Yönɑn, o tung-ɑ nënni kì ɑ́kɑrri nyinge bɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑ mɑl kì yij pönhɑni." 
Daniel8:22 Tùng ɑ́ngwen møg-ɑ ɑ́twïy keny-ɑ ɑ́tor tungɑni, bɑ pödhh møg-ɑ ódhwödh keny-ɑ ópɑ̈ngi pönhɑni ree ɑ́ ɑ́ngwen. Pödhhɑni koo bëëd ge teg ni pönh-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ngi ree." 
Daniel8:23 “Keny-ɑ ócyɑ̈ngi cögi pödhhɑni, ge rum rënyø yi orøg, kɑ kej cɑyi gen obëënø, ódi rɑ̈dh me wïje teg, me bɑ ɑtɑ̈d, o bɑ wëny." 
Daniel8:24 Rɑ̈nhɑni ótëngi ki mendwøng, de koo bëëdø ɑ́ tege kete. Piny órënye ki menrɑj, kɑ gïg-ɑ gwøge nyi lwɑ̈nge bënn. Yɑɑg teg ótyɑm yi en, kɑ jii Jwøk tyɑme." 
Daniel8:25 Gïg-ɑ gøgge ki yëthi wëënyø ólwɑ̈ng yi en mɑ́ e bɑ jɑlpel, óbëëd e ceg-ɑ tøllø, kɑ ji nyi pɑ̈ɑ̈ye piny ki ryɑ̈g. Cinge ótïnge rɑ̈nh-ɑ dwøng thyew, de koo tyɑm kɑ tegi dhɑnhø." 
Daniel8:26 Møg-ɑ ɑ́nyodh kì ri gëdhhi mwøl geki gëdhhi böörø, óbï gɑ dyër. De mïdhí gen gɑ ɑkɑnn ɑnɑn, mɑ́ bøli kej cwöbi gen nudd e lɑ̈wi.”" 
Daniel8:27 Yɑ ɑ́jud kɑ yɑ obuddø ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dël ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr. Codhe ɑdhwödhɑ, kɑ yɑ kedh-ɑ be gwøg ki gwøng-ɑ ɑ́mëggi yɑn yi rɑ̈dh, de yɑ ɑ́bëëd wïjɑ cungø yi lɑ̈ggɑni ceth, o ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li gɑmø yi wïjɑ." 
Daniel9:1 Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ́jɑɑg yi Dɑryøs wɑ̈d Kerkes jɑl Mɑdɑy. 
Daniel9:2 Kì kyeel runne kì yij lɑwø, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ orɑ̈ngø ki wɑ̈jji kwërø, yɑ orumø kì ri Yerusɑlem kɑ ɑ́mɑ̈ge ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew e pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, ni møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbi Jermɑyɑ̀ jɑltöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Daniel9:3 Kɑ Wë Jwøk kwɑjjɑ ki menteg, yɑ ogönyø ki en, e riɑ twöön yɑn ki gïncɑm, yɑ rug-ɑ ocwɑ̈llì, o yɑ bëëd ɑ yij belø." 
Daniel9:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgɑ ɑ́kwɑjjɑ, kɑ orøøg jiɑ gönyɑ en. Yɑ ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wuö Jwøk, yï dwøng, wø wør-ɑ yïn. Lwömí pɑ nyi wil yi yïn, pyëwí med ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr yïn, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ mïdhi ciggí." 
Daniel9:5 “Wø ɑ́røngi, wø ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj, wø ɑ́bɑ̈jji. Wø ɑ́bɑ̈nyi gwøgi møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgí wøn, kɑ ngɑ̈thi wøn lugi wøn møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhí wøn gɑ dyër." 
Daniel9:6 Kwøbbi bɑ̈nggí jøtöng; jøg-ɑ ɑ́kööb ki nyingí, nuti lïngø yi rɑ̈nhi wøn, kí jɑggi wøn, kí kweyyi wøn geki pödhi wøn bëne." 
Daniel9:7 Yï nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër ceth wuö, dɑ́ wøn ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑyɑ̈r kömi wøn. Bɑ dyër, wø ɑ́røngi bënn, tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem, kí tyëng Isrɑil bënn møg-ɑ tɑyø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ cyɑ̈gi geki kɑ̈jj-ɑ lɑ̈wi bënn kì yïnø kun-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li mïdhi kwøbbí." 
Daniel9:8 Rɑ̈nhi wøn, kí jɑggi wøn, ge ɑ́göög ki ɑyɑ̈r, kɑ ge orøngø kì bølí, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Daniel9:9 Pyëwí pɑ nyi cwööng ki lɑ̈ɑ̈mø, o bɑ̈jji wøn nyii wiyø yi yïn cɑgg wø nyi røngø kì bølí." 
Daniel9:10 Kwøbbí nuti lïngø yi wøn, Wuö Jwøøg wøn, keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbí wøn kinni mïdhi wøn møg-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn ki dhøggi jøtöng, bɑ̈nggí." 
Daniel9:11 Ciggí ɑ́pyem yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn, kɑ ge óbɑ̈nyø ki lïngi kwøbbí. Wø ɑ́røngi kì bølí, bene ɑ bɑnge kɑ̈ɑ̈l cyënn-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed kì yethi ciggi bɑ̈ngí Mosɑ̀ kömi wøn." 
Daniel9:12 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi yïn kinni ógöggí wøn, wøki jɑggi wøn, en ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn. Yerusɑlem ɑ́cɑy yi yïn ki cɑ́y mø døngø kibøli cɑ́yi kɑ̈dd-ɑ kyeelø bënn kì kömi piny," 
Daniel9:13 wø ɑ́mëggí cɑ́y-ɑ bɑ ɑgwed bënn, kì yethi Ciggi Mosɑ̀. De cɑgg ɑ́ ɑnɑn, Wuö Jwøøg wøn, wø nuti pɑ̈nyi gwøg ki gïn mïni pyëwí, wɑlɑ̀ wø nuti wïyø ki orøg, kɑ wø dwöög-ɑ köörí." 
Daniel9:14 Yï ɑ́dwɑdd-ɑ cɑyi wøn, Wuö Jwøøg wøn, kɑ wø cɑy yi yïn ceth, mɑ́ yï nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër, o kwøbbí nuti mïdhø yi wøn." 
Daniel9:15 “Wuö Jwøøg wøn, tegí ɑ́nyodh yi yïn keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l jií wɑ̈g kì Rïp, o tegí nudd e opɑrrø. Wø ɑ́røngi, wø ɑ́göög ki bɑ̈jjø." 
Daniel9:16 Wø ɑ́korri yi yïn kɑ̈ge dööng kidyër, de pyëwí ko nudd e rɑɑj ki Yerusɑlem këti. Bɑ kɑɑlí, kïti kwërí. Pödhh-ɑ buti wøn bënn beny-ɑ Yerusɑlem kí jii wøn kipe orøøg wøn geki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi kweyyi wøn." 
Daniel9:17 Yïn ɑ Jwøk, lïngí kwɑ̈jjɑ geki odhɑmɑ. Dwøøg Kengí keje, eni Keng-ɑ ɑ́rënyi, o yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni yï bɑ Jwøk." 
Daniel9:18 Lïngí kwɑ̈jji wøn yïn ɑ Jwøk, kɑ ɑkørri wøn kí orɑng-ɑ rɑngi kɑɑl-ɑ cölli nyingí liidh. Wø kwɑjj-ɑ yïn mɑ́ pyëwí pɑ nyi cwööng ki lɑ̈ɑ̈mø, de pɑth ki kinni wø gøgg-ɑ dyër." 
Daniel9:19 Lïngí kwɑ̈jji wøn Wuö, lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki wøn Wuö, kɑ wø køny! O yod yi dhɑnhø bëne kinni yï bɑ Jwøk. Yï ko cwööng! Kɑɑlɑni geki jiɑni bɑ møgí.”" 
Daniel9:20 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ ókwɑ̈jjø, yɑ töng-ɑ orøgɑ geki orøøg jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil, yɑ odhɑmmø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgɑ, kipe kinni o Kengø dwøøge keje," 
Daniel9:21 kɑ Gɑbriel ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́kwøng yi yɑn ki lidhø kì ri lɑ̈ggi tyeli mɑl, bï-ɑ piny keny-ɑ di yɑn e ópɑ̈rrø. Ábëëd ɑ́ bøli kej gëdhhi böörø." 
Daniel9:22 Kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Dɑniel, yɑ ɑ́bï keny kɑ per kønyi yïn ki yodi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møg-ɑ ɑ́nyudhi yïn." 
Daniel9:23 Kwøbbí ɑ́lïngi yi Jwøk keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑmí kì bøle. Yï mɑɑr yi Jwøk, bene ɑ bɑnge bëënɑ be köbbi yïn møgɑni." 
Daniel9:24 “Runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew tyel ɑ́bïryew bene gen cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk gɑ møg-ɑ bɑng gen óyieel kɑɑl wun geki jii wun kì yij orøg kí rɑj. Orøg ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny kɑ dyër cïb keje yi Jwøk gïti ɑtheer, o møg-ɑ ɑ́nyodh geki møg-ɑ ɑ́töng pɑ̈dhi gen kɑ̈jji gen, o Kengø døøg ki thyeyø." 
Daniel9:25 Adɑ́ ngɑ̈ɑ̈ny wøw kɑ yood kinni, cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ómuuj cigg kinni geer Yerusɑlem, gïti keny-ɑ óbëën jɑgø men-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk, runn ɑ́bïryew tyel ɑ́bïryew ópödhø. Yerusɑlem ódøøg ki gerø, ki yëthe geki uddi dörre, o ócungi ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïkyel wïdɑ́ryew tyel ɑ́bïryew, de ge óbëëdø gɑ runni orɑng." 
Daniel9:26 Keny-ɑ óthumi runnɑni, jɑng-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk ówɑ̈dhi ki nɑ̈gø yøw e bong gïjø me rëny en. Kengø ócøør piny geki kɑɑldwøng yi liny jɑgø me teg me kɑ̈ɑ̈l pödhø megø. Kɑɑl geki Kenge óbëëdø ge ce órëny-ɑ yi bɑɑyø. Linyɑni pɑ cungi gïti keny-ɑ óthumi runnɑni. Bɑ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈ngɑni." 
Daniel9:27 Jɑngɑni ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb kipe mër geki ji mø gïïr, o keny-ɑ óthumi budi runnɑni, gëdhhì geki byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócuung yi en. Kɑ cïb-ɑ oledh Kengø ki gïjø me böggi, gïnɑni óbëëdø kì kenyɑni gïti keny-ɑ ónyiig ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cïbii kenyɑni yi Jwøk, ni kɑ ɑ́pyële kwøbbɑni.”" 
Daniel10:1 (Kì dɑ̈ɑ̈g runni Körec rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́nyudhi Dɑniel, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Beltecɑdhɑr ki kwøb. Wöönɑni ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ dyër, de yodi gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi en teeg cɑrø ki mendwøng. Gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi møgɑni ɑ́löbbi Dɑniel e nɑ lɑ̈g.)" 
Daniel10:2 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni yɑn, yɑ Dɑniel, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yijɑ óywöngø ki osboo ɑ́dɑ̈g," 
Daniel10:3 yɑ pɑ nyi cyɑ̈mø ki gïncɑm me døøj, kí rïngø. Yɑ pɑ nyi mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ yëyyi wïjɑ pɑ nyi pyël yi yɑn gïti kɑ ɑ́thumi osboo ɑ́dɑ̈g møgɑni." 
Daniel10:4 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈n-ɑ mɑl kì yij run, yɑ ɑ́bëëd yɑ ócungø kì gɑ̈ɑ̈d Tigrì." 
Daniel10:5 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki jɑl me rugø ki ógudhi kor-ɑ yöm, kí wëni dhɑm dhïw kì yije." 
Daniel10:6 Dële orɑ̈ngø ni tigø. Bøle orɑ̈ɑ̈dø ni loodh mɑl, o nyinge ceg-ɑ lyelø ni mɑc. Bɑ̈dde geki twel tyelle rɑw ni dilɑl me thøø yi yojø, o cwɑgge nɑ kenyi gwɑg teedø mø ngenyø." 
Daniel10:7 Bɑ yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́nyudhi møgɑni. Bong gïjø mɑ ɑ́lidh yi tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi ki yɑn, de ge ɑ́bwøg kɑ ge reng-ɑ be pɑ̈nø." 
Daniel10:8 Kɑ yɑ odöngø yɑ ketɑ kì kenyɑni, yɑ onëënø ki gïg mɑ ɑ́cuung wïjɑ ki mendwøng, kɑ dëlɑ ceg-ɑ thøø kinni lɑ̈p, bëëdɑ ree ɑ́wile; bong ngɑn cuggi ngiji yɑn." 
Daniel10:9 Keny-ɑ ɑ́lïngɑ cwɑgge, kɑ yɑ ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø pyëwɑ tøøk, yɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø yijɑ rum yɑn piny." 
Daniel10:10 Kɑ yɑ mɑg yi cingø megø, ɑtïnge yɑn kömi cøngɑ e cinggɑ thɑɑny yɑn piny, e dëlɑ nudd e okïrrø." 
Daniel10:11 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, “Dɑniel, yï mɑɑr yi Jwøk. Dhwödhí mɑl kɑ yï lïng kidøøj ki møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn. Yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yïí.” Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni, kɑ yɑ dhwödh-ɑ mɑl dëlɑ nudd e okïrrø." 
Daniel10:12 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Dɑniel, yï ko böggi. Kwɑ̈jjí ɑ́lïngi yi Jwøk ceth kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi ki gwøgi rií mölø kipe yodi kwøbbɑni. Bɑ løøgi kwɑ̈jjí ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn." 
Daniel10:13 Yɑ ɑ́cöngi yi wëywön-ɑ kor Pɑres ki cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́kyel. Codhe, ɑbëën Mikɑil, ɑ bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli jɑggi wëywödd be kønyi yɑn, mɑ́ yɑ ketɑ ɑ ɑ́nud kì Pɑres." 
Daniel10:14 Yɑ ɑ́bï-ɑ be nyudhi yïn ki gïn-ɑ óbï kömi jií dhuki megø. Møg-ɑ nyudhi yïn, bɑ møg-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø.”" 
Daniel10:15 Keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni, kɑ yɑ lïïdh-ɑ piny yɑ okudø." 
Daniel10:16 Wëywönɑni nënni e nɑ dhɑnhø, kɑ cinge rïïje, ɑnywɑle dhøgɑ, kɑ köbbɑ kinni, “Wuö, gïg-ɑ nyudhi yɑn èn, yɑ ɑ́nyönhi yi gen, o dëlɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈li wïyø ki okïr." 
Daniel10:17 Yɑ nɑ bɑ̈ng me cungi kì bøli wɑ̈n. Yɑ kööb ɑ dï ki yïn? Yïɑ bong tegø, yɑ nɑ ngɑnthøø.”" 
Daniel10:18 Acige yɑ mɑgø, kɑ dëlɑ kɑl-ɑ tëngø." 
Daniel10:19 Akööbe kinni, “Yï mɑɑr yi Jwøk, ko di gïn lïngø kì pyëwí, wɑlɑ̀ ko di gïn böggi yi yïn.” Kɑ yɑ ti-ɑ tëngø keny-ɑ ɑ́kwøbe møgɑni, ɑköbbɑ en kinni, “Wuö, köbbí yɑn gïn-ɑ dwɑddí kwøbø. Yɑ ɑ́gwøg yɑ teeg yi yïn.”" 
Daniel10:20 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Gïn-ɑ pere ɑ́bëënɑ yïí ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn? Bɑ kipe kinni o yï yɑ̈llɑ gïg-ɑ ógwedø kì yij Wɑ̈nyi Dyër. Anɑn yɑ døøg-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki wëywöni Pɑres. Bɑnge ócwööb yi wëywöni Yönɑn. Bong ngɑn køny yɑn den-ɑ́ Mikɑil wëywöni Isrɑil." 
Daniel10:21  
Daniel11:1 En ɑ cungi kipe kønyi yɑn, geki nyɑɑg kiperɑ." 
Daniel11:2 Møg-ɑ dwɑddɑ köbbi yïn ɑnɑn, bɑ dyër.” Akööb wëywönɑni kinni, “Dɑ rɑ̈nhì ɑ́dɑ̈g møøgø møg-ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì Pɑres, ngween gen óbëëd e kɑ̈rø kibøli møg-ɑ kyeelø bënn. Pödhi Yönɑn ótyëddi yi en keny-ɑ ótënge kɑ ókɑ̈rø kidøøj." 
Daniel11:3 “Codhe, o rɑ̈dh me teeg cɑrø cwöbe. Rɑ̈nhɑni ójɑɑg-ɑ pödhø me dwøng cɑrø, o ógöög-ɑ wïje ki gïg-ɑ dwɑdde." 
Daniel11:4 De keny-ɑ ótënge ki mendwøng, pödhe ree ópɑ̈nge ɑ́ bud ɑ́ngwen. Rɑ̈nhì mø pɑth ki wɑdde ɑ ójyɑ̈ɑ̈gø kì keje, de ge koo bëëd ge teg ni en keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde.”" 
Daniel11:5 “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp óbëëd e teg. Ákyel kì kelli pëjji linye ópëddi tegø, kɑ pödhø me dwøng jɑɑge." 
Daniel11:6 Kì bɑng runn møøgø, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb geki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, kɑ nyɑre mëgge rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ɑ́ dhɑjø. De ge koo cög ge onywɑ̈gø ki kwøb; nyɑnɑni, kí jɑlgøle, kí nyɑre geki bɑ̈ngg-ɑ ɑ́kedh ki en ónɑ̈g bënn." 
Daniel11:7 Ákyel kì kelli wɑdde ógöögø ki rɑ̈dh kì bɑng keny me thiinh. Ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi liny Arɑm kɑ kedh-ɑ yethi kɑ̈ddi dörri gen kɑ gï tyɑme. 
Daniel11:8 Ngïjji jwöggi gen ókïdhe Rïp geki jɑmmi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø møg-ɑ óthyëyyi jwöggɑni. Runni mër mø gïïr ópödhø, kì bɑng gen," 
Daniel11:9 rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Rïp, de ólwɑ̈ng ki nyɑɑn cyɑ̈n kɑ døøg-ɑ ngɑ̈je." 
Daniel11:10 “Wɑ̈ddi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ri gen ógwir gen kipe liny, kɑ ge ocungø ki yɑy me dwøng. Ákyel kì kelli wɑ̈dde óbëëd e nyi pödh-ɑ kömi ngetimɑ̈ɑ̈nø ni pïi bɑɑyø, kɑ dörre bɑɑbe piny." 
Daniel11:11 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ómɑg yi liny kɑ kedh-ɑ be nyɑɑg ki rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm, kɑ yɑɑy Arɑm ki dönge bëne tyɑme." 
Daniel11:12 Pyëwe ómïni yi tyɑ̈me, kí nɑ̈ge ki jøliny mø ngenyø, de koo rïïjø e otyɑ̈mø." 
Daniel11:13 “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ócigi cøng ki yɑy me lod mi tyeli mɑl ki döng. Obëën bøli kenyɑni kì bɑng runn mø gïïr, óbï ki yɑy me kɑ̈ddi ki jɑmmi liny mø ngenyø." 
Daniel11:14 Kì bøli kenyɑni ji mø gïïr óngɑ̈nyyi wɑ̈yi gen kì ri Rïp. Kɑ yɑɑg-ɑ pëthi gen kej kì pödhi wun Dɑniel, ngɑ̈ny-ɑ wɑ̈g yi gïg-ɑ ócɑ̈rri gen, de ge ótyɑm." 
Daniel11:15 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ótëggi ki kɑɑl me bɑ ɑger ki dörø kɑ gø mɑge. Jøliny Rïp ódhɑl yi nyɑɑg, cɑgg ɑ́ jödd, ge ónyönhi." 
Daniel11:16 Liny Arɑm keny-ɑ ómɑ̈nyye, gï ógögge gïn-ɑ dwɑdde; bong ngɑn cungi kì bøle. Rɑ̈nhɑni piny-ɑ ɑ́muuj cøn ómɑg yi en ki linye, yïe ódi tegø me rënye gøn." 
Daniel11:17 “Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ógwïïdø ki kwøbbi mɑ̈nyø, en kí yɑye bëne. Ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb geki tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kɑ per kinni o pödhi gen órënye, nyɑre ómuuje ɑ́ dhɑjø, de møgɑni koo pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen." 
Daniel11:18 Codhe, cyee o pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi pödhhi kömi nɑɑm omelø; ómɑ̈gi ki mø ngenyø kì kelli gen. De pënyi liny pödhø megø óbï kɑ wïj rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm dwööge." 
Daniel11:19 Rɑ̈nhɑni ódøøg pinye de ótyɑm, tege ólɑ̈ɑ̈ny, kɑ pere koo lïngi këti." 
Daniel11:20 “Keje ókwɑny yi rɑ̈dh men-ɑ óbuudh köthi ji ki gwɑ̈j men meede kɑ̈ɑ̈r pödhe. Rɑ̈nhɑni ójwɑn ki nɑ̈gø, de koo nɑ̈g-ɑ yij liny.”" 
Daniel11:21 Kɑ wëywönɑni okööbø kinni, “Keje ójɑ̈ggi yi rɑ̈dh me rɑj, jɑl me pɑ di cuggi gwøg ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, de lɑwø ókwɑny yi en kɑ ɑmolpiny." 
Daniel11:22 Ngɑn rïwwi bøle, cɑgg ɑ́ men-ɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng mi Jwøk, gø bɑɑbe’ piny kɑ gø nyiige wɑ̈ye." 
Daniel11:23 Ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb ki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø ki wëënyø, o ókedh e ótëngø, cɑgg e ójɑɑg pödhø me thiinh." 
Daniel11:24 Modïrr-ɑ kɑ̈rø liibe’ piny, kɑ ogöögø ki gïg mø nuti pɑ̈nyø gwøgø yi kweyye. O jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑge kì yij liny nyi pɑ̈nge kì kelli jøge. Óbëëd e nyii yɑ̈bø ki yëëth møg pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi kɑ̈ddi dör, de jyɑ̈ge ócög e cyeeg." 
Daniel11:25 “Ócungø ki yɑy me dwøng cɑrø men pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi Rïp. De ónyɑɑn cyɑ̈n yi Rïp ki yɑy me dwøng cɑrø me pëddi tegø. De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp ówëny kɑ tyɑm. 
Daniel11:26 Óbuudh yi jø tøg bure. Yɑye ócyeddi kɑ mø gïïr nɑ̈g kì kelli jølinye. 
Daniel11:27 Rɑ̈nhhɑni ryeet óbëëd yethi gen dɑ ɑ́buudhø ki ri gen, cɑgg ge ócyɑ̈mø kì tɑw ɑ́kyel. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen koo yod yi gen, mɑ́ bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk nuti wɑ̈nhø." 
Daniel11:28 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ódwöög e ókɑ̈ddø ki jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mɑge kì yij liny, e pyëwe dɑ rënyi yïëyi jii Jwøk. Ógöögø ni kɑ̀ dwɑdde gøn, codhe o kedhe pödhe." 
Daniel11:29 “Ócigi døøg be mɑ̈nyi Rïp, de koo tyɑ̈mø ni tyeli mɑl." 
Daniel11:30 Tyëng Römɑ̀ óbï ki yɑ̈ɑ̈th kɑ joj yi gen, kɑ obwøgø. “Codhe, o dwööge pyëwe rɑɑj, o wɑɑnge kömi jii Jwøk. Ólïngø ki kwøbbi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy yuu Jwøk." 
Daniel11:31 Kengø óbwöl yi kwï jølinye. Gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj yethi cyɑ̈ng ócuung yi gen, kɑ ji göjji gen gwøg ki gïgrijjø, o ge mɑlli gen jwögg-ɑ pɑth kì kej kwër." 
Daniel11:32 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wiy Jwøøg gen ówëny yi rɑ̈nhɑni, de tyëng-ɑ mïdhi kwøbbi Jwøk ócungi kì kɑ̈jji gen, kɑ ge ogöögø ki møg nyɑg ri gen." 
Daniel11:33 Tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, ópwönyi ki ji mø gïïr, cɑgg ge ónɑ̈g ki pilø wɑlɑ̀ ge rɑ̈b, wɑlɑ̀ ge mɑg, wɑlɑ̀ jɑmmi gen kɑbbi." 
Daniel11:34 Keny-ɑ ópɑ̈nhi gen kì yij liny, bɑ kønyø me nøg ɑ óyod yi gen, kelli gen ókedhi yi tyëngɑdud." 
Daniel11:35 Kwï pëjj-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel møgɑni ónɑ̈g, de nɑ̈gi gen ókɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ dhïwi ji. Møgɑni ócyɑ̈dhi kinøw gïti bëëni bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi Jwøk." 
Daniel11:36 “Rɑ̈nhɑni ree ótïnge mɑl ki mendwøng, kɑ göög-ɑ wïje, bong jwøg men-ɑ ógɑ̈n yi en. O ókööbø ki gïg dhɑ̈li lïngø kì ri Jwøøg jwögg. Óbëëd e teg gïti keny-ɑ óthumi kej rɑ̈ji pyëw, o Jwøk ógwøg-ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cïb yi en ceth." 
Daniel11:37 Jwöggi kweyye óbong per gen kì yïe, geki jwögg-ɑ mɑɑr yi mɑ̈nn. Bong jwøg men-ɑ ógɑ̈n yi en, ree ótïnge mɑl kibøli gen bënn." 
Daniel11:38 De ógɑ̈nn-ɑ jwøøg dörr-ɑ korri kɑɑl; jwøng-ɑ nuti pɑ̈nyø kwɑjjø yi kweyye, ótheg yi en ki dhɑb, kí ɑ́tegø, kí tigg geki jɑmm-ɑ ngewi gen teg." 
Daniel11:39 Ókøny-ɑ yi jwøg me pɑth ki korri kɑɑle. O tyëng-ɑ óyïëyii ɑ́ jɑngi gen ótheg yi en kidøøj. Gï ówëgge jɑɑgi ji mø gïïr, kɑ gï thödhe ki piny ɑ́ kööngi gen." 
Daniel11:40 “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kej rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm e óthumø, köme ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Rïp. De rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Arɑm ócööd köme ni ɑtunø ki yɑ̈thi wɑ̈g kí yɑ̈thi nɑm møge. Pödhh mø gïïr ómɑg yi en kɑ gï bɑɑbe piny ni bɑɑyø." 
Daniel11:41 Piny-ɑ myër ómɑg yi en thyew. Pödhh mø gïïr ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh, de Edöm kí Moɑb geki møg-ɑ ódöng kì kelli tyëng Amön óyiel kì cinge." 
Daniel11:42 Pödhh mø gïïr ójɑɑg yi en, cɑgg ɑ́ Rïp thyew pɑ bodh." 
Daniel11:43 Kɑ̈ɑ̈r Rïp; dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, kí gïg-ɑ per gen teg bënn ókwɑny yi en. Kɑ Kuc geki Lïbiyɑ̀ mɑge." 
Daniel11:44 De óbwøg yi wödd-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kí wɑɑng wuudø. Kɑ ónyïɑ̈ggø ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe, kɑ onɑ̈gø ki ji mø gïïr." 
Daniel11:45 Kɑɑle, kɑɑl rɑ̈dh ógure kɑɑm nɑ̈mmi omelø, kì wïj kïti kwër-ɑ myër. De óthøw ceth, bong ngɑn-ɑ ókønyii.”" 
Daniel12:1 Akööb wëywön-ɑ rug ógødh kor-ɑ yöm kinni, “Kì bøli kenyɑni, Mikɑil wëywön-ɑ dwøng, ɑ kor pödhi wun, ódhwödh. Ódi ywøøg yij me dwøng, ywøøg yiny ni menɑni nuti pɑ̈nyø’ lïngø kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi pödhh. De kì bøli kenyɑni, tyëng pödhi wun bënn møg-ɑ nyingi gen ógweed yij wɑ̈nyø óyiel." 
Daniel12:2 Mø gïïr kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́thøw ódhwödh, møøgø ónëënø këti gïti ɑtheer, møg-ɑ kyeelø ókedh-ɑ yij orɑng-ɑ pɑ thumi." 
Daniel12:3 Jɑgg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel, óbëëd ge tɑr ni mɑl, o møg-ɑ ɑ́pyejji ji ki yuu-ɑ dyër ómënyø ni kyelli mɑl gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Daniel12:4 Kɑ yɑ köbbe kinni, “Anɑn Dɑniel, cyëëg wɑ̈nyø kɑ dhøge muul, óbëëdø ɑ́ ɑmul gïti keny-ɑ óthumi piny. Kì kɑɑmɑni, møøgø óbëëdø ge nyi kedh-ɑ keny kí keny ge yɑb-ɑ dïdø.”" 
Daniel12:5 Codhe, kɑ jøg ɑ́ryew lidhɑ ge ócungø kì kömi nɑm, men ying-ɑ løøng, o men ying-ɑ løøng-ɑcɑ̀." 
Daniel12:6 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ rugø ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm, ɑ ying wɑ̈thi pïi nɑm kì mɑl pyëj yi wëywön-ɑ kyeelø kinni, “Á kɑɑm me bëëdø kidï ɑ óthumi, o gïïngɑ̈ngø møg cwöb gen?”" 
Daniel12:7 Kɑ wëywön-ɑ rugø ki ógødh kor-ɑ yöm, ɑ ying wɑ̈thi pïi nɑm kì mɑl cingge ryeet tïnge, kɑ lïngɑ e óköngø ki nyingi ngɑn-ɑ nëënø gïti ɑtheer, ɑkööbe kinni, “Bɑ runn ɑ́dɑ̈g kí budi run. Møgɑni ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ɑ keny-ɑ órum tyëng kwërø ki tyɑmø.”" 
Daniel12:8 Møgɑni bënn ɑ́lïngɑ, de ge nuti gɑmø yi wïjɑ. Apëjjɑ kinni, “Gïgɑni bënn ónywøl-ɑ ngø, wuö?”" 
Daniel12:9 Alögge kinni, “Wiy wɑ møgɑni Dɑniel, mɑ́ wɑ̈nyø ɑ́rum ki cyëgø kɑ mul, óbëëdø ɑ́ ɑcyëg gïti keny-ɑ óthumi piny." 
Daniel12:10 Ji mø gïïr óliil kɑ ge ogöögø ge dhïw, de tyëngrijjø ócög ge rijjø. Bong ngɑnrɑj me wïje ógɑm møgɑni, den-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen pel." 
Daniel12:11 “Cɑg kì bøli keny-ɑ ócuung gëdhhi yethi cyɑ̈ng, kɑ ngïji jwøng pɑth cwöödh oledh Kengø, bɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́ryew kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïngwen ɑ ópödhø." 
Daniel12:12 Tyëng-ɑ ómïdhi yïëyi gen gïti ri thumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́lïp kí miy ɑ́dɑ̈g kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g wïdɑ́bïj, ri gen dɑ gyëdh!" 
Daniel12:13 “O yïn, yï Dɑniel, mïdhí yïëyí, gïti keny-ɑ ówɑ̈nhi bøli kenyɑni. Yï óthøw kɑ yï odhwödhø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈n piny, o yï kwɑny kööngí.”" 
Hosea1:1 Men bene wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́köbbe Odheyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Beerì, kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Udhiyɑ̀ kí Yöthɑm, kí Akɑɑdh, kí Kedhekiyɑ̀ gɑ rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀; yethi runnɑni ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Yöɑc ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì Isrɑil." 
Hosea1:2 Cɑ̈gi wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Odheyɑ̀. Odheyɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Kedh kɑ̈bbí ki dhɑjø men-ɑ óyɑ̈bø ki cwøw, kɑ ókɑ̈nø ki nywøl kì wɑ̈g, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wiy piny yi pönhï, kɑ ji kedh-ɑ bɑng jwögg møøgø.”" 
Hosea1:3 Codhe, ɑkedhe kɑ Gömer nyɑɑr Diblɑim kwɑnye, ɑyɑɑje kɑ gø nyödde ki wɑ̈d." 
Hosea1:4 Kɑ Odheyɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑɑg ɑ́ Yidhriil (ɑ wɑngi kinni ókedhhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j,) mɑ́ yɑ óbï be coli rem-ɑ ɑ́dëëm kì Yidhriil kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thinh kì gøl Yeeu, o jyɑ̈gi gøl Yeeu tɑ̈ɑ̈yɑ piny." 
Hosea1:5 Mɑ́ keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, weth gøl Isrɑil ótor yi yɑn kì töör Yidhriil.”" 
Hosea1:6 Kɑ Gömer cig-ɑ yɑɑjø, ɑnywøle ki nyɑndhɑjø. Kɑ Odheyɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑɑg ɑ́ Lö Ruɑ̈mɑ̀ (wɑng-ɑ kinni bong lɑ̈mpyëw,) mɑ́ pyëwɑ pɑ cigi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø kì gøl Isrɑil, wɑlɑ̀ körri orøøg gen pɑ wiy yi yɑn." 
Hosea1:7 De pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ yiel yi yɑn, de ge pɑ yiel yi yɑn kɑ tøng, wɑlɑ̀ pilø wɑlɑ̀ ki liny, wɑlɑ̀ ki kyënyì, wɑlɑ̀ ki jøliny kyënyì.”" 
Hosea1:8 Apøne Lö Ruɑ̈mɑ̀ kɑ onywølø ki wɑ̈d. 
Hosea1:9 Kɑ Odheyɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cɑɑg ɑ́ Lö Amì “pɑth ki jiɑ”, mɑ́ wu pɑth ki jiɑ. O yɑ koo bëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg wun.”" 
Hosea1:10 De tyëng Isrɑil óngënyi ni tør. O kì keny-ɑ́ nyi köbbi gen kinni, Lö Amì “pɑth ki jiɑ”, ge ócwølli gɑ nyigi Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø." 
Hosea1:11 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Isrɑil ge órëbi, kɑ ri gen rönyi gen ki jɑgø ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ójɑɑg gen bënn, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Yidhriil óbëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ng me dwøng." 
Hosea2:1 Cwøllu ómï wun ɑ́ Amì “Jiɑ.” Kɑ nyimï wun cwøl wun ɑ́ Ruɑ̈mɑ̀ “Lɑ̈mpyëw”. 
Hosea2:2 Gööny wun ki meyi wun, gøønyu en, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́kyëëd kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki jɑlgøle.” Köbbu en wïye ki bëënrɑj kɑ wïye ki yɑb ki cwøw." 
Hosea2:3 Keløg e pɑ wïyi, ólony yi yɑn, kɑ döng-ɑ nøw ree bong ógødh ni kɑ ɑ́nywølii. Ógwøg yi yɑn ɑ́ thwørø me bɑ ryɑng me yije bong pï, kɑ nɑ̈g yi yɑn ki röödhø." 
Hosea2:4 Pyëwɑ koo lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wun, wu nyig-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l kì wɑ̈g." 
Hosea2:5 Mɑ́ meyi wun ɑ́göög ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, o kwïj ɑyɑ̈r, kɑ nyi tir-ɑ kwøb kinni, “Yɑ ókedhi yï cwøwɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́mɑɑr yɑn, yɑ óthödhi yi gen ki gïncɑm, kí pï, kí møgi oløg, kí ógudh bënn, kí møøw dhetun.”" 
Hosea2:6 Kì bɑng menɑni yuue óbɑg yi yɑn ki koodh. Ógëddɑ ki dörø, kɑ wen dïdyër, o jɑde ki yöö men kedhe yï cwøwe." 
Hosea2:7 Óyɑ̈bø ki yöö men kedhe yï cwøwe møg-ɑ mɑɑr yi en, de gï koo pïïde. Ge óyɑb yi en de gï koo yode. Codhe o kööbe kinni, “Yɑ døøg-ɑ yï jɑlgølɑ jɑl-ɑ ɑ́kwøng yɑn ki nywømø.”" 
Hosea2:8 Nuti pɑ̈ny en ki yodø kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́thödhii ki byel geki møøw dhetun. Anëngɑ en ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøge gɑ mø Bɑɑl. 
Hosea2:9 Byellɑ ódwøøgɑ kì bøli keny-ɑ nyi cyeg gen, kɑ møgi oløgɑ dwøøgɑ kì bøli kej mɑdhe, kɑ ógudhɑ wɑɑrɑ, gen ɑ ógudh-ɑ nyi kume ree." 
Hosea2:10 Anɑn ɑyɑ̈re ónyodh yi yɑn kì bøli cwøwe; bong ngɑn-ɑ óyielii kì cingɑ. 
Hosea2:11 Tung-ɑ nyi rïïj ge otugø ɑnɑn, ɑ løg kwëër tuung run, kí kwëër tuung dwɑ̈y, kí Kwëër Sɑbɑth, geki tung-ɑ nyi tuug kì cyɑ̈nggi kwër møg-ɑ kyeelø, ge ócuung yi yɑn." 
Hosea2:12 Bɑ̈ggi oløg møg-ɑ rømme ce gï yood en ɑ yï cwøwe órënyi yi yɑn, kɑ ge gwøg yi yɑn gɑ thïm koodh, kɑ yethi gen cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi lɑ̈yy." 
Hosea2:13 Bene kër-ɑ ócɑyɑ en ɑnɑn, kipe cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈be ki bɑkur, kɑ orugø ki gwel geki gïïyïthh, kɑ ocöngø ki thømi Bɑɑl, e thøø yi rugø ki gwel geki gïïyïthh, kɑ kedh-ɑ yï cwøwe wïje wïlø ki yɑn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Hosea2:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Orum møgɑni, ópɑng yi yɑn kɑ peejɑ yij ryɑng, o wɑ̈jji yi yɑn ki kwøb mø med." 
Hosea2:15 Kɑ bɑ̈gge döggɑ en kì kunɑni, kɑ Töör Akørr gwøgɑ ɑ́ kej gɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ døøg-ɑ be kwøb ki kwøb mø døøj ki yɑn, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ jùr keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Hosea2:16 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni yɑ ócwøl yi en kinni, “Jɑlgølɑ.” O pɑ cwöddi këti kinni, “Bɑɑl wɑ̈ɑ.”" 
Hosea2:17 Mɑ́ nyingi Bɑɑl ókɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì dhøge. Nyingɑni pɑ cigi cwøllø yi en. 
Hosea2:18 Wø ónywɑ̈gø ki kwøb wøki lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, kí winyyi mɑl, kí gïg-ɑ mulli kì piny kipere, kɑ pilø geki tøng bënn torɑ, kɑ liny cung yi yɑn kì kömi piny, kɑ ji wëggɑ buddø pëthi gen pɑ lïngø." 
Hosea2:19 Isrɑil, yï nyömmɑ’ riɑ gïti ɑtheer, ki nywöm-ɑ dyër kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø geki yödi pyëw, o yï løgɑ miɑ gïti ɑtheer." 
Hosea2:20 Yï nywømɑ’ nywømø yijɑ bong ɑ́dud, o bëëdi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yod yi yïn." 
Hosea2:21 Kwɑ̈jji jiɑ, tyëng Isrɑil ólïngi yi yɑn dicyɑ̈ngɑni, piny gen ópɑ̈ng yi yɑn ki kødh, kɑ byel, kí oløg, kí ólɑm ocyegø kì yij piny." 
Hosea2:22  
Hosea2:23 Jiɑ, ócïbɑ piny, Ji-ɑ ɑ́cwølli kinni, Lö Amì “pɑth ki jiɑ” ócwølli kinni, Amì “Jiɑ”. Ge óköbbɑ kinni, “Wu bɑ jiɑ.” Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi gen kinni, “Yï bɑ Jwøøg wøn.”" 
Hosea3:1 Kɑ Odheyɑ̀ köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Døøg cyëgí ki mɑɑrø, cɑgg e rum kedhi yï jɑlø megø, o bɑ nyɑn kwïj bëëdø. Mɑɑr ni kɑ̀ mɑɑrɑ tyëng Isrɑil, ngö ge ɑ́kedhi bɑng jwögg møøgø, ge tyer-ɑ cɑmi ópùni Bɑɑl, ge rømm-ɑ kinni bene gïn-ɑ ówëggi gen nywølø ki nywøl mø gïïr.”" 
Hosea3:2 Kɑ Gömer dwöög yi Odheyɑ̀ ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́bïj, kí kïlli ceir miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïj." 
Hosea3:3 Kɑ Gömer köbbi yi Odheyɑ̀ kinni, “Yï óbëëdø ki yɑn ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr, kɑ yï ko bëëd yï bɑ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi, wɑlɑ̀ yï ko buddi ki jɑlø megø, cɑgg ɑ́ yɑn thyew, yɑ pɑ buddi kì yij pyën ɑ́kyel wøki yïn," 
Hosea3:4 mɑ́ tyëng Isrɑil óbëëdø ni menɑni ki cyɑ̈ng mø gïïr, yï gen bong rɑ̈dh, wɑlɑ̀ jɑgg, o bong gëdhhì wɑlɑ̀ këli lɑm, o bong yuu pyëëj gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Hosea3:5 Codhe, o gøl Isrɑil dwööge, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen yɑb yi gen geki kwɑɑr Debïd rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen. Ge óbï yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen dëlli gen okïrrø, ge yɑb-ɑ dhwɑ̈nge.”" 
Hosea4:1 Lïngu kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïe dɑ cɑ́y møg cɑɑye tyëng pönhï, kipe bong dyër kí kønyi rek mø gøggi, kɑ ji wɑ̈thi gen owïlø ki Jwøk." 
Hosea4:2 Lɑmm-ɑ rijjø, kí köngi pyed geki wëënyø kí nɑ̈g ki ji, kí kwɑl geki liny, kí yɑb ki mɑ̈nni ji møøgø, bene gen gïg-ɑ ceg ki gøggø yi wun." 
Hosea4:3 Kipe gïgɑni bënn, piny ócyënni mel, kɑ gïn-ɑ bëëdø kì piny bëne othøø, kí lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l geki winyyi mɑl, cɑgg ɑ́ rij kì nɑm, ge bɑ møg thøw." 
Hosea4:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ko di dhɑnhø me gøøny wɑɑd gen, kɑ ko di ngɑn me kööbø kì ri ngɑn megø. Yɑ gönyø kɑ wun, wun ɑ ókwër!" 
Hosea4:5 Wu óthɑ̈mmi kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r thyew, kɑ jøtöng óthɑ̈mmø kyeel ki wun. Isrɑil meyi wun bɑ men nɑ̈g yi yɑn." 
Hosea4:6 Jiɑ ri gen dɑ cyën, kì bɑng kɑ̀ kwïj gen Jwøk. Wun ɑ ókwër, yɑ ɑ́bɑny yi wun, kɑ pwönyɑ bɑny yi wun, wu ceg kɑ lonyø ki bɑnyø yi yɑn, o wɑ̈ddi wun pɑ yïëy yi yɑn gɑ ókwërrɑ." 
Hosea4:7 “Kɑ̀ ngënyi kwɑnni wun, yöd wu ceg-ɑ pëddø ki orøg! Wør-ɑ wøør wun yi ji ɑnɑn óløgɑ ɑyɑ̈r." 
Hosea4:8 Kɑ̀ cɑm wun gëdhhi orøøg jiɑ, bene ɑ tyeru kinni, o ge røngi gen kinøw, kipe kinni o ge nyi kɑ̈ni gen ki gëdhhì." 
Hosea4:9 De ji ɑ́göög ge pɑ̈r ki ókwër. Ge ócɑy yi yɑn ge bënn kipe rɑ̈ji buri gen. Ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø kipe gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen. 
Hosea4:10 Wu ócyɑ̈mø ki gëdhhì ceth, de wu pɑ yɑ̈ng. Mɑ̈nni wun óniin yi wun, de wu pɑ ngënyi, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wiy yi wun, kɑ wu kedh-ɑ bɑng jwögg møøgø.”" 
Hosea4:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jiɑ ɑ́døøg ri mɑ̈j geki møgø, gïg nyi rënyi wɑ̈thi ji. Ge nyi kedh-ɑ be pyëji ngïji mɑ yɑdh. Gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yodø yi gen pyëj yi gen ɑ yï lööj yɑnhɑni yøw. Yɑ ɑ́wiyu piny, kɑ wu ogöögø wu nɑ ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ nyi wiy jɑlgøle piny. Ri wun ɑ́mëggu jwögg møøgø." 
Hosea4:12  
Hosea4:13 Wu ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈d kì wɑ̈thi kïttì, kɑ wu orɑ̈bø ki gëdhhì kì wɑ̈thi ótøng, kɑ wu orɑ̈bø ki bɑkur kì thɑ̈thi yenh-ɑ døngø kipe døøji tïbbi gen. “Bene ɑ bɑnge göög nyigi wun geki mɑ̈nni wun, gɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi." 
Hosea4:14 De nyigi wun geki mɑ̈nni wun pɑ cɑy yi yɑn kipe gwøøg gen kinøw, mɑ́ men-ɑ́ cwøw mɑ̈nni gen ɑ́wiy gen piny, kɑ ge kedh-ɑ yï ɑ́mɑ̈jji keng, kɑ ge ongɑ̈dø kyeel ki gen ki gëdhhi jwögg-ɑ pɑth. Ji-ɑ pëthi gen bong gïn, ge bɑ møg pïïd yi ryɑ̈g ceth." 
Hosea4:15 “De cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ rum yïn ki bɑ̈jjø, yïn ɑ Isrɑil, Yeudiyɑ̀ koo røngi thyew. Wu ko nyi kedhi Gilgɑl, wu ko nyi kedhi Bet Aben, kɑ wu ko nyi köngi kì kunɑni ki nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø." 
Hosea4:16 Tyëng Isrɑil wɑ̈thi gen teg ni wïj dhyɑng mɑ ɑmyël. Ge ókwɑy kidï ni órömø mɑ mölø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? 
Hosea4:17 Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́pëggi be kwɑjji ngïjjì yøw, wiy ge bëëd gen ki bëëdi gen." 
Hosea4:18 Kɑ̀ yɑ̈ng gen yi møgi oløg, ge nyi døøg-ɑ ri mɑ̈j, ge tyer-ɑ gïg-ɑ rijjø kibøli dhwɑ̈ng." 
Hosea4:19 Ge ókøøl ni kenyi köddi yømø ɑ́kødɑkødø mɑl. Ge óyɑ̈r kì bɑng kenyi thödhi gen jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki gëdhhì. 
Hosea5:1 “Lïngu møg, wun ɑ ókwër. Kyën wun yïthhi wun, wu tyëng Isrɑil; lïng wun, wun ɑ tyëng gøl rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, cɑ́y bɑ møg pɑ̈dhi kömi wun, kipe kɑ̀ pɑ nyi cïbu kwøb kɑ̈jji gen kì burø. Mɑ́ wu ɑ́bëëd wu bɑ ɑ́kɑ̈lli kì Midhpɑ̀, kɑ wu obëëdø wu bɑ bøyy møg-ɑ ócegø kì Tɑbör." 
Hosea5:2 Wu ɑ́göög ki bur me ludhi yi ji kì Cethïm. 
Hosea5:3 Gïg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn, yïn ɑ Isrɑil onennø yi yɑn. Bong gïn cuggi gwøgø yi yïn e pɑ nenni yi yɑn. Isrɑil ɑ́göög e nɑ ngɑn nyi yɑ̈bø ki cwøw, wiy-ɑ jɑlgøle piny. Isrɑil ree ɑ́ywëdhe.”" 
Hosea5:4 Ge ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n døøg kö Jwøk yi orøøg gen. Mɑ́ pëthi gen ɑ́kwɑny yi orøg, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑny yi gen." 
Hosea5:5 Ngöni Isrɑil nyodh-ɑ orøge, ge óthɑ̈mmi yi gööj orøøg gen. Kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ óthɑ̈mmø ki gen thyew." 
Hosea5:6 Ge ókedhi be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge ókwöddø ki dhögi gen kí dyëgi gen, de kwɑ̈jji gen pɑ løøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e ɑ́kedh kì buti gen." 
Hosea5:7 Kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ mïdhi yi gen, nyigi gen nyi yulli ge’ Bɑɑl. Tung-ɑ nyi tuug gen kì tuung dwɑ̈y bɑ orøg. Byelli gen órënyi kì bɑng orøøg gen." 
Hosea5:8 Kodhu tung kì kɑɑl Gibeɑ̀, pwödu bul ki köögø, kɑ kɑɑng ɑ́tegø kodh wun kì kɑɑl Rɑmɑ̀. Kiwu liny kì Bet Aben. Wu tyëng gøl Ben Yɑmïn, tëddu bøli wun ki liny." 
Hosea5:9 Isrɑil ódhur piny cyɑ̈ng-ɑ óliidh kwøb, lïng wun, wu kɑ̈lli Isrɑil, gïg-ɑ kømmi yi yɑn ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth." 
Hosea5:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ nɑ ji møg-ɑ nyi cɑnggi kew. Kì bɑng menɑni, cɑ́y ókønyɑ kömi gen ni pïi bɑɑyø." 
Hosea5:11 Isrɑil ópïïd yi ryɑ̈ng dwøng, ryɑ̈ngɑni bï-ɑ köme kɑ̀ wëënye ree, ɑ rïnge kì bɑng jwögg-ɑ pɑth." 
Hosea5:12 Kì bɑng menɑni, yɑ óni tyemtuk kì ri Isrɑil, kɑ yɑ nɑ twöng-ɑ nyi cɑm leg kì ri Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Hosea5:13 “Jɑggi Isrɑil nyødhi gen ɑ́yod yi gen, kɑ yod yi jɑggi Yeudiyɑ̀ kì bøli kenyɑni kinni liny gen ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈r, kɑ jɑggi Isrɑil öd-ɑ yï rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, kinni o ge di køny yi en. De Isrɑil nuti kønyø yi rɑ̈nhɑni, o Yeudiyɑ̀ nuti yielø kɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈re." 
Hosea5:14 Yɑ óni thwøønh ngur kì kömi Isrɑil, kɑ yɑ nɑ mɑɑdh ngur kì kömi Yeudiyɑ̀. Ge óngølli yi yɑn gɑ thullì, yɑ kedh yɑ ókedhø. Yɑ cɑ̈mmi yɑ ókedhø; kɑ̀ gwɑ̈rrɑ bong ngɑn yïëdø." 
Hosea5:15 “Kì bɑng menɑni, jiɑ ówiyɑ piny o ge rɑngi gen, gïti keny-ɑ óyewi gen, kɑ ge dwöög-ɑ köörɑ.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Hosea6:1 Kɑ tyëng Isrɑil ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Bïu, døøg wɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Wɑ ɑ́ngølle wɑ bɑ thullì, kɑ wɑ thödhe ki kedd, de wɑ órøde kej ɑ́kyel këti, kɑ keddee tuur yi en." 
Hosea6:2 Wɑ óthödhe ki wëyi kì bɑng cyɑ̈ng ɑ́ryew, kì ri dɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈ng wɑ ódwøøge kejee." 
Hosea6:3 Pɑ̈nyi wɑ riee kidøøj ki yodi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bëe be kønyi wɑ, pɑ bɑ̈jji, óbï ceth ni cɑ̈ng ɑ pɑ nyi bɑ̈jji ki bëënø kì bøli keje, óni kødh ɑyɑr ɑ nyi kwööj piny.”" 
Hosea6:4 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wun, wu tyëng Eprɑim kí tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, wu göggɑ’ ngø o yɑ døøg be gɑ̈nø yi wun? Mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mi wun men-ɑ mɑɑr wun yɑn nyi jwɑn-ɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈nyø ni pølli mwøl, o nyi jwɑn-ɑ thwøwø ni thöjji mwøl." 
Hosea6:5 Bene ɑ bɑnge ɑ́ngøllɑ wun ki jøtöng møgɑ, wu ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ ki kwøbbi dhøgɑ. Cɑ́yɑ pɑ cwöng ki bëën kömi wun; wu pɑ̈ɑ̈yɑ’ piny ni göjji mɑl." 
Hosea6:6 Mɑ́ yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ kinni lïngi kwøbbɑ, de pɑth ki gëdhhì ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn. Yodi møgɑ ying-ɑ mɑl kibøli gëdhh-ɑ rɑ̈bbi yɑn." 
Hosea6:7 “De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈dhi gen Adɑm ceth, ɑpɑ̈d gen lwöm-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm wøn ki gen." 
Hosea6:8 Gilyɑd bɑ kɑɑl tyëngrijjø mø wɑ̈dhø nɑ̈g ki ji. 
Hosea6:9 Ókwër ɑ́göög ki ɑkuud kurrì møg nyi buddi kì yethi yëëth, ge orödhø ki ji-ɑ kɑ̈lli yuu Cekïm, o gï nɑ̈g yi gen. Ge gøgg-ɑ ɑyɑ̈r me pɑ døøj ki gøggø yi ókwër." 
Hosea6:10 Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki gïjø me rɑɑj cɑrø kì gøl Isrɑil, Eprɑim ɑ́göög ki ɑ́dheycwøw, o Isrɑil ree ɑ́ywëdhe." 
Hosea6:11 “Yïn thyew, Yeudiyɑ̀, yï ócɑy kipe gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi yïn. Bøli kej cɑ́yɑni ɑ́rum ki cïbø yi yɑn." 
Hosea7:1 “Pyëwɑ nyi dwɑdd-ɑ gyëdhi jiɑ Isrɑil, o ge dwøøgɑ yij bëëndøj men-ɑ ɑ́bëëd yi gen. De kenyi dwɑdd-ɑ dwöögi gen yïɑ, nyii yodø yi yɑn kinni, ge pɑ cuggi dwöögø, mɑ́ bëëdi tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kedh e ceg-ɑ rënyø; ge ceg-ɑ pëddø ki orøg. Tyëng Isrɑil ruj-ɑ ri gen. Ud nyii tørrø yi gen, kɑ ge okwɑ̈dø. Kɑ jɑmmi ji nyi kɑbbi yi gen kì yëthi wëll." 
Hosea7:2 De ɑ́dhɑ̈li kedhi wɑ̈thi gen kinni, rɑjj-ɑ gøggi yi gen bënn pɑ wïl kì wïjɑ, ge bëëdø ge ótyeeg dïdyër yi rɑjjɑni, mɑ́ rɑjjɑni ying-ɑ bølɑ ceth.”" 
Hosea7:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pyëw rɑ̈dh nyi mïn-ɑ yi orøøg gen, o pëthi jɑgg nyi mïn-ɑ yi wënyi gen." 
Hosea7:4 Ge bɑ tyëngrijjø bënn; pëthi gen lëëdh kipe gwøgi gïgrijjø, lëdhi pëthi gen kipe gwøgi orøg nɑ lëdhi mɑɑc purun ɑ pɑ nyi thuuj kër-ɑ nyööm ɑwɑj gïti kɑ̀ kwöde." 
Hosea7:5 Jɑgg ɑ́nɑ̈g yi møgi oløg kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng tungi rɑ̈dh, kɑ rɑ̈dh kedh-ɑ kelli jɑgg, kɑ órëbø ki tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yɑnyyi Áyïmø." 
Hosea7:6 Pëthi gen rijjø nɑ lëdhi mɑc; liny gen nyi lwëny-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈r, de nyii pëddø lënhø ni mɑc kì mwøl." 
Hosea7:7 “Ge lëëdh nɑ mɑɑc purun, ge nyi cɑm-ɑ jɑggi gen, ge nɑ̈ngg-ɑ rɑ̈nhi gen, o bong ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cwøl nyingɑ kì kelli rɑ̈nhhɑni.”" 
Hosea7:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Eprɑim nyii rëbø ki jurrì møøgø. Eprɑim nɑ ɑbulø me nuti løgø; pɑ kønø kì pyëw, bude megø nuti cyegø." 
Hosea7:9 Tege ɑ́tyëg mɑ̈ɑ̈dh yi jurrɑni, de gø kwïje kinni nyönhø, nɑ jɑl me wïje mɑg yi wɑ́ri döng, de ree kwïje kinni yöø." 
Hosea7:10 Rɑ̈ji Isrɑil cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøle ceth, o nuti døøg kö wɑ̈n Jwøge; nuti yömmi yïe." 
Hosea7:11 Eprɑim nɑ gyenø, wïje nøg, dɑ kɑ̀ renge yï Rïp, o dɑ kɑ̀ cige rengi yï Acuur e dwɑdd-ɑ kønyø." 
Hosea7:12 Keny-ɑ ókedh gen, bøyɑ óleengɑ kömi gen, kɑ ge tëëlɑ piny ni winyyi mɑl. Ge ócɑy yi yɑn ki menrɑj kipe orøøg gen." 
Hosea7:13 “Ri gen dɑ cyën, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wiy yi gen! Ge othøø, mɑ́ ngɑ̈thi gen ɑ́lugi gen yɑn, ngö yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ dømi gen. Ge kømm-ɑ kwøbbi pyed kì riɑ" 
Hosea7:14 Ge nuti ywöög yïɑ ki pëthi gen; ri gen lɑ̈ɑ̈w gen ki yɑn. Ge ceg-ɑ ri gen ki lenggø kì piny ni kenyi göög tyëng-ɑ kwïj Jwøk. 
Hosea7:15 Ge ɑ́pwönyi yi yɑn, kɑ ge thödhɑ ki tegø, de ge ɑ́yöd ge bɑny-ɑ gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́göggɑ gen." 
Hosea7:16 Yɑ cög yɑ wiy ge’ piny, kɑ ge nyi kedh-ɑ yï jwøg me yïe bong tegø. Ge pɑ cuggi ngɑ̈dhø, mɑ́ ge nɑ böltøng me bøømø. Mɑ́ jɑggi gen nyi kømm-ɑ kwøbbi ɑthwøg, ge bɑ møg-ɑ óthumi ki nɑ̈gø ki pil, kì bɑng rɑ̈ji lebbi gen. Ge ógɑggi yi tyëng Rïp!”" 
Hosea8:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cïb kɑng dhøgí, kiw liny, de cor wïïn ɑ mɑl, mɑ́ lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm wøn ki ji ɑ́pɑ̈d yi gen, kɑ pwönyɑ ódhɑ̈lø mïdhø yi gen. Kɑ ciggɑ bɑny yi gen." 
Hosea8:2 Isrɑil kïïw ɑ wïjɑ, ge okööbø ce gɑ jiɑ, o ge ngɑ̈ny-ɑ yɑn, yɑn ɑ Jwøøg gen." 
Hosea8:3 De Isrɑil døøjø ɑ́bɑnye, bene ɑ bɑnge cyeddii yi ngɑn-ɑ mɑɑnii." 
Hosea8:4 “Jiɑ ɑ́rööny ki rɑ̈nhì, e rɑ̈nhhɑni nuti myeg-ɑ yi yɑn. Kɑ ge ókɑ̈bbø ki jɑgg yɑ nuti yïëyø. Dhɑbbi gen kí ɑ́teggi gen ɑ́gwøg gen gɑ ngïjji jwögg. Ge ónɑ̈g kɑ per møgɑni bënn." 
Hosea8:5 Rønyi dhɑb men-ɑ mɑlli yi tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ mɑɑn yi yɑn. Pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki gen. Ge gït-ɑ wɑɑng ge mɑll-ɑ ngïjjì? 
Hosea8:6 Ngïnyɑni ɑ́gwøg-ɑ yi bødhø yøw, o pɑth ki jwøg kinni tek! Rønyi dhɑb men-ɑ mɑlli yi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ómød, kɑ ogöögø ki gullì." 
Hosea8:7 Kɑ̀ kɑ̈gu yømø, wu kɑj-ɑ ɑ́kødɑkødø. Thyɑng cungi wɑ̈thi gen bong byel. Ge pɑ kɑ̈ni ki gïncɑm, ke bëëd e dɑ mø kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi gen, ge cɑm-ɑ yi tyëngpɑth." 
Hosea8:8 Isrɑil ɑ́göög e nɑ jurr-ɑ kyeelø; ɑ́göög e nɑ pug me thøø, bong pere kì yïɑ." 
Hosea8:9 Isrɑil ɑ́rengi; ɑ́töngi yïnø ni ɑderø me rengi pɑ̈l. Árengi Acuur. Ree ɑ́kïrre ki ngɑn korrii ni ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi men yɑb ngyëny kì yï cwøwe. 
Hosea8:10 De cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ tɑɑy Isrɑil kelli jurrì møøgø ɑnɑn, ge bɑ møg-ɑ ócøng yi yɑn, o ge cɑyɑ. Ge ónyönhi keny-ɑ óguud nyingi gen yi rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur." 
Hosea8:11 “Isrɑil ɑ́pëggi be gyer ki këlli lɑm gɑ kɑ̈jji lɑ̈ɑ̈nyi orøg, de këllɑni kiri gen ceg bëëdø gɑ këlli orøg." 
Hosea8:12 Ge ɑ́gwëdɑ ki cigg møgɑ mø gïïr, de gï cwølli yi gen gɑ møg pɑth." 
Hosea8:13 Gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑ̈lli gen yɑn ɑnɑn, nyi ngɑlli yi gen gɑ rïngø men cɑm yi gen yøw, de pyëwɑ pɑ med ki gen, wïjɑ pɑ wïl ki orøøg gen; ge bɑ møg cɑy yi yɑn ceth. Ge ódøøg ki gwøg gɑ bɑ̈ngg ni kɑ ɑ́ying gen Rïp." 
Hosea8:14 “Isrɑil wïje ɑ́wïl ki ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́gwøgii, kɑ pëgg-ɑ be gyer ki ud mø døngø. O Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́pëggi be gyer ki kɑ̈dd-ɑ ówenø ki dör, de uddɑni geki kɑ̈ddɑni ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc." 
Hosea9:1 “Pyëwí ko med, yï ko tuug ni jurr-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ yï ɑ́pɑ̈d kì ri Jwøgí ni ngɑn bɑny jɑlgøle, mɑ́ yï rømm-ɑ kinni, byel ɑ́mëggi yïn ɑ yi jwögg møøgø." 
Hosea9:2 De kì bɑng nyɑ keny me thiinh ceth, rɑrø ójɑd ki byel, kɑ ɑ́tɑy ojɑdø ki møgø." 
Hosea9:3 Wu pɑ cög wu obëëdø kì piny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wu døøg-ɑ yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø ni kɑ ɑ́ying wun Rïp. Wu kïdh-ɑ Acuur kun cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun ki gïg pɑ nyi cɑm yi jii Jwøk." 
Hosea9:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ kunyi yi wun ki møgi oløg kì kunɑni. Bong gëdhhì møg-ɑ ómuuj yi wun. Gïgcɑmmi wun ywëdh-ɑ ngɑn-ɑ ócɑm gen, óni dyeel bɑ̈ɑ̈g; bɑ men nɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑ̈j yøw, bong møg kïdhi Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gɑ gëdhhì." 
Hosea9:5 Á ngø ɑ ógwøg yi wun kipe cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kwër? Á ngø ɑ ógwøg yi wun kipe cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j keny-ɑ ókïdhi wun Acuur? 
Hosea9:6 Cɑgg wu bodh kì dhø ryɑ̈ngɑni, wu ócøng kej ɑ́kyel yi Rïp, kɑ wu kony kì Mɑmpis, kì kunɑni myërri wun geki kɑ̈rri wun ólɑg-ɑ yi lum; yenhi koodh ɑ ókwɑny myërri wun.”" 
Hosea9:7 Bøli kej cɑ́y ɑ́bï, bøli keny-ɑ ókwɑny ji köggi orøøg gen ɑ́wɑ̈nhi. Ngɑ̈nyi Isrɑil wøw kinni møgɑni obëënø, mɑ́ wu okööbø kinni, “Jɑltöng bɑ dhëg, jɑlwëy wïje dɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gø!” Wu mɑɑn-ɑ yɑn mɑ́ orøøg wun dwøng cɑrø." 
Hosea9:8 Yɑ ɑ́ör yi Jwøk yɑn ɑ́ jɑltöng me köbbi jie, Isrɑil. De yëthɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈ng wun ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì, yɑ ceg kɑ judø yi wun, jɑltöng ceg kɑ mɑɑnø yi ji, cɑgg ɑ́ kì Kengi Jwøk." 
Hosea9:9 Ge ɑ́rënyi yi gïg-ɑ gøggi yi gen, ge pɑ yiel, ge ɑ́røngi ni tyëng Gibeɑ̀, orøøg gen pɑ wïl kì yï Jwøk. O ge ócɑy yi Jwøk ceth kì bɑng orøngɑni." 
Hosea9:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ábëëd e nɑ kenyi yood oløg kì yij ryɑng kì lew, eni yon-ɑ ɑ́yodɑ Isrɑil, nɑ kenyi liidh yɑdh kɑ̀ cɑ̈ge ki nywølø, eni linh-ɑ ɑ́lidhɑ kweyyi wun, de ge ɑ́mɑ̈gi kì ri Bɑɑl Peor, kɑ ri gen kwɑɑj gen ri ngïji yøw, gïi ɑyɑ̈r, kɑ ge órënyø; ge ɑ́ywëdh ni jwögg-ɑ mɑɑr yi gen." 
Hosea9:11 Dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Isrɑil ópɑ̈r ni winyø, bong ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ óngøl ki dhɑnhø, o bong ngɑndhɑjø men-ɑ óyɑɑj, o bong nywøl møg-ɑ ónywøl yi gen." 
Hosea9:12 De cɑgg ge yïddi ki nywøl, nywølɑni ókɑ̈l yi yɑn kì yï gen, bong men-ɑ ówiy yi yɑn e onëënø. Keny-ɑ ólugɑ ngɑ̈jɑ gen, gïg mø rijjø ócwöb kiper gen.”" 
Hosea9:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ nenn-ɑ nyigi Isrɑil ge muuj-ɑ ngɑn nɑ̈g gen." 
Hosea9:14 Á ngø ɑ kwɑjjɑ kì yïí, o göggi ji-ɑ ni møg? Wiy ji dwöög gen wɑ̈g kì yethi mɑ̈nni gen! Wiy cɑg dwön gen kì thïnhhi mɑ̈nni gen!" 
Hosea9:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bɑng orøøg gen ɑ ɑ́cɑɑgɑ gen ki mɑɑnø kì Gilgɑl. Ge ɑ́cɑg yi yɑn ki mɑɑnø kì kunɑni. Ge ókøølɑ wɑ̈g kì ødɑ kipe gïnrɑj men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen. Ge pɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn këti, mɑ́ jɑggi gen bënn ɑ́pëëm ki kwøbbɑ, ge ɑ́göög ki gïnrɑj." 
Hosea9:16 Isrɑil nɑ yɑdh me nɑ̈rø, køm-ɑ wøwø, men-ɑ́ pɑ cuggi kɑ̈nø ki nywøl, de cɑgg ge yïddi ki nyigi gen, nyigɑni ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, eni men-ɑ́ nyig-ɑ mɑɑr yi gen.”" 
Hosea9:17 Jwøng-ɑ bøle cungɑ jie óbɑny yi en, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngi kwøbbe. Ge ógöjji twɑ̈lø kì kelli jurrì." 
Hosea10:1 Isrɑil nɑ oløg me lɑ̈be med, o nywøle gïïr. Kɑ̀ cyeg jɑmme kidøøj nyi døøg-ɑ be gyer ki këlli lɑmmi jwögg mø pɑth, kɑ nyii pëddø ki ruugi löjji jwögge." 
Hosea10:2 Pëthi gen pɑ̈ng yi wëënyø, cɑ́yi orøøg gen pɑ̈dh-ɑ kömi gen ceth. Këlli lɑmmi gen kɑ̈jj-ɑ kwɑ̈jji gen ki jwögg-ɑ pɑth, ócøør piny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑ ngïjji gen tørre." 
Hosea10:3 Ge ókööbø cyee kinni, “Yï wøn bong rɑ̈dh, mɑ́ wø pɑ böggi Jwøk. O cɑgg wø di bëëd yï wøn dɑ rɑ̈dh cøn, ɑ́ ngø ɑ di gwøge kiper wøn?”" 
Hosea10:4 Ge nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ köngø yøw ki köngi pyed. Lebbi gen pɑ nyi mïdhi yi gen. Ge rïïj ge peej-ɑ ri gen bur ge gøøny-ɑ ri gen. Ge rijjø nɑ mødø, lum-ɑ nyi nɑ̈g pwödhø e rumø ki purø." 
Hosea10:5 Tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ óywöngi geki jɑggi gen keny-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l rønyi gen kì Bet Aben, kɑ ngïjje tørri yi rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Acuur. Óbong ɑwøøw medi pëëth, Isrɑil wïje ólɑ̈ɑ̈y kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́ngɑ̈dhe rønyɑni." 
Hosea10:6  
Hosea10:7 Rɑ̈nh-ɑ bëëdø kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ókøøl Acuur geki jie, ni kenyi kwølli pɑ̈di yɑdh yi thew." 
Hosea10:8 Wɑ̈thi ótøng møg-ɑ di kengi Aben, kun-ɑ kwɑjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër yi tyëng Isrɑil, ócøør piny bënn. Koodh geki lum óceg ì dut kì wɑ̈thi këlli lɑmmi gen. Kɑ kïttì köbbi yi gen kinni “Kɑnu wøn!” Kɑ ótøng köbbi yi gen kinni, “Kumu wøn!”" 
Hosea10:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu nuti wïyø ki orøg, këër orøng-ɑ ɑ́gwøg wun kì Gibeɑ̀, wu ɑ́cög kinøw, wu pɑ dwöög köörɑ. Tyëngorøg nuti nɑ̈gø yi liny ki Gibeɑ̀?" 
Hosea10:10 Tyëngorøg møgɑni ócɑy yi yɑn kì bøli keny-ɑ ódwɑddɑ en, kömi gen ópɑ̈ɑ̈r yi jurrì møøgø, kɑ ge cɑy kipe orøng-ɑ dwøng men-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen, ge ókɑ̈l gɑ ɑtwöj." 
Hosea10:11 “Eprɑim bɑ nyɑ wɑdh me mɑɑr gwøng-ɑ yöd yøw. De ɑcebø cïbɑ’ mune, mun-ɑ rɑw èn, døøg-ɑ be gwøg ki gwøng teg. Eprɑim ɑ gwej pwödhø, o Yeudiyɑ̀ pure pwönhɑni! Yɑgob ɑ ódwøgii!" 
Hosea10:12 Pɑ̈ggi wun ri wun ki pwödh kidøøj, kɑj wun gïg-ɑ nywøl yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ dyër. Pur wun ki pur-ɑ dyër, mɑ́ men bene bøli kej kwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Gïti keny-ɑ óbëëne, o wu pwönye ki kwøbb-ɑ tir." 
Hosea10:13 Wu ɑ́kɑ̈g-ɑ rɑ̈jø, kɑ wu kɑj-ɑ wëënyø. Wu ócɑm-ɑ gïg-ɑ nywøl yi wëënyø. “Mɑ́ wu ɑ́gɑ̈nn-ɑ yɑ̈thi liny geki yɑy-ɑ dwøng kì yï wun," 
Hosea10:14 Kömi jii wun óbëën yi liny, kɑ dörri wun cøør piny. Óbëëd e nɑ cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g kɑɑl Bet Arbel yi Rɑ̈dh Cɑlmɑn, ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈ɑ̈g othønhø geki mëëg gen." 
Hosea10:15 Bene gïn-ɑ ógöggi yïn ɑnɑn, yïn ɑ Betiil, kipe orøgí, orøng-ɑ pëddi rɑ̈jø. Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil ónɑ̈g kì ri tuumi liny ceth.”" 
Hosea11:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Isrɑil ɑ́mɑɑr yi yɑn e nudd e thiinh cɑrø. Kɑ cwöölɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp, ɑ́ wɑ̈dɑ ceth." 
Hosea11:2 De kɑ̀ cwöölɑ en yïɑ, nyi yöd e ceg-ɑ pëddø kedhø kì butɑ. Jiɑ ngɑ̈dd-ɑ Bɑɑl ki gëdhhì ge ngɑ̈dd-ɑ ngïjjì ki gëdhhì." 
Hosea11:3 Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́pwönyi Isrɑil ki cyɑ̈dhø. Áthɑ̈ɑ̈yɑ e pyejjɑ’ pyejjø kì cinge, de ɑ́dhɑ̈li yodø yi en kinni korr-ɑ yi yɑn." 
Hosea11:4 Ge ɑ́dööbɑ köörɑ ki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø me dwøng kɑ ge kwömmɑ, kɑ köörɑ dwøøgɑ piny, kɑ ge cɑɑm yi yɑn." 
Hosea11:5 “Ge døøg-ɑ be gwøgø gɑ bɑ̈ngg ni kɑ ɑ́ying gen Rïp. Ge ójɑɑg yi Acuur, mɑ́ ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi yewø." 
Hosea11:6 Pil óbëëd ge cem-ɑ rɑ̈d kì kɑ̈dde, kɑ̈dde ócøør piny, kɑ ge nɑ̈g." 
Hosea11:7 Ge ɑ́bɑ̈nyi dwöög yïɑ. Ge bɑ møg-ɑ óywöngi yi ɑcebb-ɑ muddi gen, de bong ngɑn-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l ɑcebbɑni piny kì muddi gen." 
Hosea11:8 “Yɑ óngïr kidï yi yïn, yïn ɑ Isrɑil? Yï ówiyɑ piny kidï? Yï ócuggø nɑ̈gø yi yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ Admɑ̀, wɑlɑ̀ yï ócuggø gwøgø yi yɑn ni kɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ Dheböïm? Pyëwɑ pɑ yïëy ki göggi yïn gïn ni menɑni! Mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑrɑ yïn dwøng cɑrø!" 
Hosea11:9 Bong gïn gwøgɑ e pyëwɑ rɑɑj; Isrɑil pɑ cigɑ rënyø. Mɑ́ yɑ pɑth ki dhɑnhø; de yɑ bɑ Jwøk; yɑ bɑ kwërø, o yɑ nud kì buti wun. Yɑ pɑ bï yï wun ki rɑ̈ji pyëw." 
Hosea11:10 “Keny-ɑ ócwöölɑ gen, cwɑggɑ ólïngi yi gen kì kun lɑ̈wi ni ngɑ̈rri ngur. Kɑ ge bï-ɑ yïɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi dëlli gen okïrrø." 
Hosea11:11 Ge óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Rïp kí Acuur, ge jwɑni nɑ kenyi pɑ̈rri winy. Ge ódwöögɑ myërri gen. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb.”" 
Hosea11:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil yɑ tyeeg gen kɑ kwøbbi pyed kí wëënyø. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ nudd ge pemm-ɑ kwøbbɑ, yɑn ɑ́ Jwøk kwërø ɑ nyi mïdhi kwøbbe." 
Hosea12:1 Eprɑim gøgg-ɑ óbɑɑd, ni ngɑn cɑɑm ree ki yømø. Tyëg cɑ̈ng e rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑng wuudø. Reb-ɑ wëënyø kí liny. Nyii nywɑ̈gø kwøb ki tyëng Acuur kí tyëng Rïp, kɑ nyi öd-ɑ yï gen ki møw, kinni o kor yi pödhhɑni.”" 
Hosea12:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïe dɑ gøny geki Yeudiyɑ̀, o Yɑgob ócɑy kipe rɑjj-ɑ gøgge." 
Hosea12:3 Yɑgob kweyi wun ɑ́byëddi geki ómen ge nudd ge ying-ɑ yij meyi gen. Keny-ɑ ɑ́dønge, kɑ ge óbyëddø ki wëywödø, ɑ bɑ Jwøk." 
Hosea12:4 Ge ɑ́byëddi ki wëywödø kɑ ódhɑ̈lø tyɑmø yi wëywönɑni, kɑ óywöngø e kwɑjj-ɑ gyëdh kì yï wëywönɑni. Ayoodii Betiil yi Jwøk kɑ okööbø ki en kì kunɑni." 
Hosea12:5 Bene en Wïlɑ̈bø, nying-ɑ mɑllii bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Hosea12:6 De yïn ɑ gøl Yɑgob, døøg kö Jwøgí, kɑ yï yewí! Mïdhí døøjø geki dyër, kɑ yï gɑ̈n Jwøgí ceth yethi cyɑ̈ng." 
Hosea12:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Eprɑim nɑ ngɑn yïe nyi ngëëw ki jɑmmì. Kɑ̈ll-ɑ rumi me wëënye ji, mɑ́ e mɑɑr-ɑ gwem.”" 
Hosea12:8 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Yɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ri, yɑ ɑ́yïddi ki tegø, o bong ngɑn-ɑ ókööbø kinni kɑ̈rɑ yood yɑn kɑ gwem!”" 
Hosea12:9 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “De yɑn, yɑ Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́pëëj yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp, yï dwøøgɑ’ be bëëdø kì yethi kemmì këti, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd keny-ɑ ɑ́bëënɑ yïí kì yij ryɑng." 
Hosea12:10 “Jøtöng ɑ́köbbɑ, kɑ ge nyudhɑ ki lɑ̈g mø gïïr. Kɑ gɑ́j mø gïïr kwøøbɑ dhøggi gen." 
Hosea12:11 Dɑ gïnrɑj kì Gilyɑd? Ge bɑ ji mø rijjø, ge ónɑ̈g yi orøøg gen. Ge ngɑ̈dd-ɑ Bɑɑl ki wɑ̈dhh gɑ gëdhhì kì Gilgɑl. Bene ɑ bëëd këlli gëdhhì mø gen nɑ kïttì møg-ɑ óröör piny kì yethi pwödh møg-ɑ ókøøgø.”" 
Hosea12:12 Yɑgob kweyi wun ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r piny Arɑm kun-ɑ ɑ́kwɑ̈yye ki dyëg kipe kinni, o nyöme ki dhɑjø. Isrɑil thyew ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì Rïp yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e kwɑy-ɑ yi jɑltöng. O Isrɑil ɑ́korri kɑ jɑltöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Hosea12:13  
Hosea12:14 Isrɑil pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wëgge rënyø ki menrɑj, døj kɑ thøø kipe orøg. Ócɑy yi Jwøge, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe remmi ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi en." 
Hosea13:1 Gøl Eprɑim ɑ́bëëd e kømm-ɑ kwøb mø tir, ɑböggii kɑ tïng mɑl yi tyëng Isrɑil bënn. De ge ɑ́døøg be mɑlli Bɑɑl. O ge bɑ møg thøw kì bɑng menɑni." 
Hosea13:2 Ge nudd ge ogöögø ki orøg me dwøng. Kɑ ɑ́tegø yøw nyi køny ɑ́ ngïjji røjj yi gen, ge gwøg-ɑ yi bödhhì mø wɑ̈thi gen pel. Kɑ ge nyi tir-ɑ ngɑl ki ji gɑ gëdhhì! Ge mɑll-ɑ røjjɑni!" 
Hosea13:3 Bene kipe møgɑni ɑ ótɑy gen ni pølli mwøl, kɑ ge nɑ thöjj ɑ nyi jwɑn thwøwø. Ge óni cong ɑ nyi køøl yi yømø kì rɑrø, kenyi kwøør byel. Ge óni yïrø ɑ nyi køøl yi yømø." 
Hosea13:4 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “De bene yɑn Jwøgí, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ketɑ ɑ bɑ Jwøgí, ki kër-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ yïn wɑ̈g kì Rïp. Bong jwøg megø me ngɑ̈nyi yi yïn, den-ɑ́ yɑn ceth. Bong ngɑn me yiel yïn, den-ɑ́ yɑn ceth." 
Hosea13:5 Wu ɑ́korrɑ kì yij ryɑng, piny-ɑ yije bong pï." 
Hosea13:6 De keny-ɑ ɑ́wɑ̈nhi wun piny-ɑ døj, kɑ wu oyɑ̈ngø, codhe, ɑtɑ̈d wɑ̈thi wun." 
Hosea13:7 Kì bɑng menɑni, yɑ ópönhi yï wun ni ngur. Yɑ óbuddi kì yuu wun ni kenyi lïïb kwej." 
Hosea13:8 Wu ókedhhi yi yɑn ni kenyi kedhhi ji yi ngur me nyɑre ónɑ̈gø. Wu ócɑm yi yɑn ni kenyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m mɑɑdh ngur. Wu óngølli yi yɑn wun-ɑ́ thullì ni kenyi ngud lɑ̈ɑ̈y pɑ̈l. 
Hosea13:9 “Yï othøø, yïn ɑ Isrɑil kipe kɑ ɑ́bɑɑny yɑn, bene yɑn ɑ ɑ́køny yïn!" 
Hosea13:10 Rɑ̈dhí ying-ɑ keny ɑnɑn? Ede ɑ pɑ yiele yïn? Eni rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́kwɑjji yi yïn, yï okööbø kinni, ‘Thödhí yɑn ki rɑ̈dh geki jɑgg.’" 
Hosea13:11 Yï ɑ́thödhɑ ki rɑ̈dh pyëwɑ rɑɑj, kɑ wɑɑrɑ kɑ ɑ́mɑɑg yɑn yi liny." 
Hosea13:12 “Kerri Isrɑil bɑ ɑcøng; orøge mïdh ɑ keje kì wɑ̈ye," 
Hosea13:13 ócɑy yi yɑn ki mendwøng, óni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny, de dhɑnhø dhɑ̈li bëën wɑ̈g, bɑ ɑlwöng. Kɑ pɑ̈dhi piny e thøø." 
Hosea13:14 Wu pɑ yïëëlɑ wɑ̈g kì yij thøø. Wu pɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì dhø thøø, yïn ɑ thøø ɑ́gøne møgí? Yïn ɑ thøø, kɑ̈ɑ̈l ryɑ̈gí! Pyëwɑ pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m këti ki jiɑni." 
Hosea13:15 Cɑgg Isrɑil jwɑn døngø ni lum, yɑ óöni ki yømø me lëëdh kì yij ryɑng, kɑ nɑ̈mmi gen geki luyyi gen odwönø yi yømɑni. Jɑmm-ɑ døøj bënn ónɑ̈g yi yømɑni, eni yøm-ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn, yømi wɑɑng wuudø." 
Hosea13:16 Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ngïïne ki kerre ceth, mɑ́ Jwøge ɑ́bwöl yi en. Ge ópɑ̈nhi yi pilø. Nyigi gen møg-ɑ thønhø óngølli gɑ thullì, kɑ yethi ɑ́yɑjj kɑg.”" 
Hosea14:1 Dwöög wun yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil. Wu ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈y piny-ɑ yi orøøg wun." 
Hosea14:2 Døøg wun yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wu kööb wun kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈l kerri orøøg wøn wɑ̈g, kɑ kwɑ̈jji wøn yïëëy. Wiy leny-ɑ lejji wøn yïn ki dhøggi wøn, bëëde ɑ́ gëdhhì møg-ɑ mëggi yïn yi wøn, de pɑth ki gëdhhì møg-ɑ ngɑlli." 
Hosea14:3 Wø pɑ yiel yi Acuur, wø pɑ yiel këti yi kyënyi liny. Wø pɑ cigi kwøb këti kinni, ‘Møg bɑ jwöggi wøn!’ Mɑ́ ge bɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg ki cing. Mɑ́ yïn yï ketí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ yïí nyi yïddi yi kïj ki gïn-ɑ jɑ̈ddii.”" 
Hosea14:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jiɑ ódwöögɑ yïɑ. Ge ómɑɑr yi yɑn ki pyëwɑ bëne; pyëwɑ pɑ cigi bëëdø e rɑɑj ki gen." 
Hosea14:5 Yɑ óbëëdø kì yï tyëng Isrɑil yɑ nɑ kødh cwir. Ge ódhɑ̈y ni okøggi lum. Byerri gen óniyeeng piny, ni byerri yenhi Lubnɑn." 
Hosea14:6 Bɑ̈ddi gen ópedh yi gen, ge ógöögø ge nɑ ólɑm me myëër, Ge óbëëd yømi gen med ni yømi yenh sɑndɑl mø Lubnɑn." 
Hosea14:7 Ge ódwöög tïbɑ. Ge ókɑ̈gø ki byel këti, ge óngënyi ni nywøli oløg. Per gen ótëngi ni møgi oløøg Lubnɑn." 
Hosea14:8 Bong gïn-ɑ ógwøg yi tyëng Isrɑil ki ngïjjì këti; kwɑ̈jji gen óløøgɑ, kɑ ge korrɑ; Ge óbëëdø kì tïbɑ, mɑ́ yɑ nɑ yɑdh me yïthhe pɑ nyi wew. Gyëdhh-ɑ yï gen bënn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yïɑ.”" 
Hosea14:9 Ngɑn wïje pel, mïdhe kwøb møg. Ngɑn nyi lïngø, yode møgɑni, mɑ́ yëthi Jwøk bɑ óbödhh. Yëthɑni cyɑ̈dh-ɑ yi tyëngtir. De tyëngorøg ópɑ̈nhø kì yethi gen." 
Joel1:1 Men bene wööni Wë, wöön-ɑ ɑ́mëgge Yöiil wɑ̈d Pethuel." 
Joel1:2 Lïng wun, wun ɑ tyëngdøngø. Kyënu yïthhi wun, wun ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀. Dɑ gïn ni men mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi cwöbø kɑ lidh yi wun, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́nud kweyyi wun?" 
Joel1:3 Köbbu møgɑni nyigi wun, o nyigi gen ólony ki köbbø yi gen, o rïny-ɑ óbï ólony ki köbbø yi gen." 
Joel1:4 Dɑɑg bɑ̈nyø ɑ́pëggi kömi byel; kɑ keny-ɑ nyi döng kì bɑng dɑɑng, nyi cɑm yi dɑɑng-ɑ bï kì bɑnge." 
Joel1:5 Cyëëw wun, wun ɑ tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø; ywöngi wun, wun ɑ tyëngmɑdh ki møgø; oløng-ɑ di gwøøg møng-ɑ nyɑ̈n ɑ́rënyi." 
Joel1:6 Dɑɑg bɑ̈nyø ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi pinyee; bɑ bɑ̈nyø me ngenyø, o pɑ cuggi kwɑnø; leggi gen bedh nɑ leggi ngur." 
Joel1:7 Bɑ̈ggi oløgee ɑ́rënyi gen, o ólɑm ɑ́nyɑm gen. Pɑ̈ddi yenh ɑ́wej gen, yenh ɑ́döng ge tɑr." 
Joel1:8 Ywöngi wun, ni kɑy me ywøg thøwi jɑlgøle ɑ́ wøb, eni jɑl-ɑ di nywømii." 
Joel1:9 Bong byëli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kí møgi oløg me muuj kì yij Kengø; ókwër ceg-ɑ ywøg, mɑ́ e bong gëdhhì mø mëggi gen Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Joel1:10 Pwödh tɑr; piny ceg-ɑ ywøg mɑ́ byel ɑ́rënyi, oløg ɑ́thwøw, o yenh dhetun ɑ́nɑ̈r." 
Joel1:11 Ywöngi wun, wun ɑ jøpur; ywöngi wun, wun ɑ jøg-ɑ kor bɑ̈ggi oløg, mɑ́ gemè geki ceir, kí gïg-ɑ nyi cyeg bënn ɑ́rënyi." 
Joel1:12 Oløg ɑ́thwøw, o ólɑm ɑ́nɑ̈r; yenhi bɑ̈gg bënn ɑ́thwøw. Medi pëthi ji ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny." 
Joel1:13 Rug wun ki ocwɑ̈llì kɑ wu ywöngi wun, wun ɑ ókwërr-ɑ nyi göögø kì Kengø. Kɑ wu lɑngu wɑ̈r wu óywöngø kì Kengø! Bong møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ byëlø møg mëggu Jwøøg wun." 
Joel1:14 Muuj wun ki cigg kipe twöni rek; cwøølu ji bënn kej ɑ́kyel! Cøngu jɑgg bënn geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn; Cøngu gen yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun, kɑ wu ywøøg wun kööre." 
Joel1:15 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ókɑ̈ni Wïlɑ̈bø ki ryɑ̈g, óbëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj me ni ngø!" 
Joel1:16 Byelli wøn ɑ́rënyi ge onennø yi wøn. Bong medi pëëth kì yij Kengi Jwøøg wun. 
Joel1:17 Köödh ɑ́kwɑ̈ɑ̈g piny; Bong byel kì yethi óköddì; o óköddì ɑ́rënyi, e bong byel kì yethi gen." 
Joel1:18 Dhög geki dyëg ceg-ɑ ywøg, bong lum me cɑm yi gen; ge ceg-ɑ orɑng." 
Joel1:19 Yɑ ywøøg-ɑ köörí yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ lum geki yenh ɑ́thwøw, ge ce órɑ̈bø kɑ mɑc." 
Joel1:20 Cɑgg ɑ́ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l ge ywøøg-ɑ yïí mɑ́ nɑ̈mm-ɑ thønhø ɑ́dwön. 
Joel2:1 Kodhu kɑng ki köögø kì Dhɑyøn, kïti kwëër Jwøk. Bwøg wun, wun ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀! Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Joel2:2 Óbëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng muudhø me rɑj me pɑ̈ng yi pøøl mø looj. Liny bɑ̈nyø me dwøng obëënø e nɑ muudhø kenyi rïïme wɑ̈thi kïttì. Bong gïjø me ni menɑni mɑ ɑ́pɑ̈nyi cwöbø, o bong gøn men-ɑ ócwöb këti." 
Joel2:3 Gïg-ɑ twïyø cɑm yi gen nɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈b mɑc; piny-ɑ bøli gen nɑ bɑɑg Eden, de bɑ ryɑng kì ngɑ̈thi gen. Bong gïn bodh kì bɑng gen." 
Joel2:4 Ge nɑ kyënyì; o ge rïngi nɑ kyënyi liny. 
Joel2:5 Ge pɑ̈r-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈thi kïttì; cwɑggi gen nɑ yɑ̈thi liny; ge tɑyyi nɑ lum-ɑ thwøwø kenyi rɑ̈bii yi mɑc. Ri gen jɑɑj gen ni jøg kedhi be liny. 
Joel2:6 Ji ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø ge nudd ge obëënø, kɑ nyingi gen pönh-ɑ wɑ̈g." 
Joel2:7 Ge rïngi nɑ jøliny; ge yidh-ɑ dör. Ge pödh-ɑ bøli gen ceth yuu gen pɑ wil yi gen," 
Joel2:8 o bong men rïw bøli megø. Ge pödh-ɑ yij liny, o bong gïn cung gen." 
Joel2:9 Ge pödhi kömi kɑɑl; ge rïng-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi dör; ge yïdh-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈thi ud, ge kɑ̈ll-ɑ ɑwɑjj ni kurrì." 
Joel2:10 Piny ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh kì bøli gen; o mɑl ceg-ɑ kïïrø. Cɑ̈ng ɑ́lunyi geki dwɑ̈y, o kyell pɑ mënyø këti." 
Joel2:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j liny ɑ́thödhe ki cigg, e cwɑgge ce pööd ɑ́ mɑl. Liny-ɑ kwølle gïïr cɑrø, o teg. Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwøng, o böggi nɑ ngø! Á men ɑ óbødh kì yije?" 
Joel2:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, okööbø kinni, “Yewi wun ki yew-ɑ dyër kɑ wu dwöög wun yïɑ ki twöni rek geki ywøg kí kïïmø." 
Joel2:13 Wiy ywøøg wun nyodhe yewi wun; kɑggi ógudhi wun, bong gïn gwøge. Dwöög wun kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøøg wun, mɑ́ e døøj o lɑ̈mpyëwe bong cöge; pyëwe pɑ nyi jwɑn rënyø, o pyëwe yöd, lɑɑwe nyi dwööge’ piny kibøli ke di cɑ̈ye.”" 
Joel2:14 Á men ɑ ngɑ̈nyii, ying Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun pyëwe ódwöög kɑ wu gëdhhe byel mø ngenyø. Codhe, o nëngi yi wun ki byëlø geki møgi oløg." 
Joel2:15 Kodhu kɑng kì Kïti Dhɑyøn; muuj wun ciggi twöni rek, kɑ ji cøng wun!" 
Joel2:16 Cøng wun ji kej ɑ́kyel; be kømmi kwøbbi kwër; kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun tyëngdøngø, cøng wun othønhø kí møg-ɑ dhødh thyew. Cɑgg ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ cer ri gen nywømø, wiy gen uddi gen kɑ ge bï gen." 
Joel2:17 Ywöngi ókwërr-ɑ göggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì kɑɑm këli lɑm geki dhø Kengø, kɑ Jwøk kwɑjji gen kinni, “Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí ki jií yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Wø ko wëggí gɑggø, o wø benyi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ̀ kööb gen kinni, ‘Ágøne Jwøøg wun?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Codhe ɑdwöög pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki pinye; pyëwe ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki jie. 
Joel2:19 Aløøge kwøbbi gïn kinni, “Anɑn wu thödhɑ’ thödhø ki byel kí møgi oløg, kí møøw dhetun, o wu óyɑ̈ng. Wu koo benyi yi pödhh-ɑ kyeelø këti." 
Joel2:20 Dɑɑg bɑ̈nyø bëne men-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑɑng wuudø ókøølɑ; kwï gen ókøølɑ yij ryɑng. Pëjji gen ókøølɑ Luuy Omelø, o møg-ɑ cyɑ̈n ókøølɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr. møg-ɑ óthøw ókwɑ̈g. Ge ónɑ̈g yi yɑn kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi gen wun." 
Joel2:21 “Wu ko böggi wun ɑ pwödh, de mïni pëthi wun, kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bënn." 
Joel2:22 Wu ko böggi, wun ɑ lɑ̈yy. Mɑ́ lum ɑ́twïy e mɑr; yenh ɑ́nywøl. Nywøli oløg geki nywøli ólɑm ɑ́ngënyi." 
Joel2:23 “Wun ɑ tyëng Dhɑyøn, mïni pëthi wun kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun. Wu ɑ́thödhe ki kønh døj kì bøli keje. o pɑ nyi jwɑn temø." 
Joel2:24 Rɑrø ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi byel; kɑ møgi oløg geki møw ómullø kì buti kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi biij gen. 
Joel2:25 Gïg-ɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yï wun ócullɑ wun, gen ɑ byelli wun møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑm yi bɑ̈nyø Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́ödi kömi wun ki dɑɑg bɑ̈nyø." 
Joel2:26 Wu ócyɑ̈mø kɑ wu oyɑ̈ngø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun ólenhi yi wun, kipe gïg-ɑ myër møg-ɑ ógögge wun. Jiɑ koo benyi këti." 
Joel2:27 Codhe, o yod yi yïn Isrɑil kinni yɑ nud kì kellí, kí kinni bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ bɑ Jwøgí, bong Jwøk megø. Jiɑ koo benyi këti." 
Joel2:28 “Kì bøli keny megø, wëyɑ ókønyɑ kömi ji bënn; kwøbbɑ ótöng yi wɑ̈ddi wun geki nyigi wun; ywödhhi wun ólɑ̈gi ki lɑ̈g o remthinh ócɑ̈rri ki kwøb." 
Joel2:29 Kì bøli kenyɑni wëyɑ ókønyɑ kömi bɑ̈ngg-ɑ cwøw kí mɑ̈nn. 
Joel2:30 “Yɑ ónyudhø ki ngïjjì kipe cyɑ̈ngɑni kì yij mɑl kí kömi piny; óbëëd e dɑ remø kí mɑc, kí löjji yïrø." 
Joel2:31 Cɑ̈ng ólunyi, kɑ dwɑ̈y ókwɑ̈rrø ni remø, keny-ɑ ócyɑ̈ngi cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki bëënø; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ böggi ki mendwøng." 
Joel2:32 De tyëng-ɑ ócwøl nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ókøny kɑ ge yiel. Ni kɑ ɑ́kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, ‘Kwï ji óbodh kì Yerusɑlem; tyëng-ɑ ɑ́yienyɑ bɑ gen ɑ óbødh.’ ”" 
Joel3:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì bøli kenyɑni Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem ówëggɑ døøgø dönyø." 
Joel3:2 Pödhh bënn ócøngɑ, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Töör Cɑ́y. Ge ócɑyɑ kì kenyɑni kipe gïg-ɑ ɑ́göggi gen jiɑ. Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́kedhhi gen kì kelli pödhh-ɑ pɑth, kɑ pinyɑ, piny Isrɑil pɑ̈ngi yi gen." 
Joel3:3 Ge ɑ́leng-ɑ wél kipe yodi ngɑn-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi ki ɑmɑgg. Womɑ̈nn kí yɑɑg-ɑ cwøw ɑ́ngeew gen yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø ki ngyëny møg culi tyëng-ɑ nyi niin ki köögi, kí møg ngëëw ki møgi oløg." 
Joel3:4 “Á ngø ɑ dwɑddu göggi yɑn, wun ɑ Suur, kí Sïdön kí myërri Pelistiyɑ̀ bënn? Dɑ gïn pir yi wun kì yïɑ? Kwøbu en o jwɑnɑ ki culi wun!" 
Joel3:5 Átengɑ geki dhɑbɑ kí jɑmmɑ møg-ɑ per gen teg bënn ɑ́kɑ̈l wun, kɑ ge kïdhi wun yethi kenggi wun." 
Joel3:6 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem ɑ́kïdhi wun kun lɑ̈wi, kɑ ge ngëwwu tyëng Yönɑn." 
Joel3:7 Anɑn ge ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́ngeew wun gen, o wu lonyɑ ki göggi gïn-ɑ ɑ́göggu gen." 
Joel3:8 Wɑ̈ddi wun geki nyigi wun óngëwwi tyëng Sɑbeɑ̀ pönh-ɑ lɑ̈wi yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Joel3:9 “Kwøbu møg kì yethi pödhh kinni, ‘Tyeny wun ri wun kipe liny, cwølu jøliny, cøngu jøliny kɑ wu kedh wun!" 
Joel3:10 Tyeg wun kwërri wun gɑ pil, kɑ pɑlli wun tyeg wun gɑ tøngg. Cɑgg ɑ́ ngɑn nyødh, ceg-ɑ nyïɑ̈ggø thyew." 
Joel3:11 Jwɑnu bëënø wun ɑ pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi bënn, kɑ ri wun cøng wun yij tör.’ ” Ör linyí piny, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pɑ̈ɑ̈re kömi gen." 
Joel3:12 “Tyeny pödhh ri gen kɑ ge bï gen Töör Cɑ́y. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ópëggi kenyɑni, o pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi bënn cɑyɑ." 
Joel3:13 Ge rijjø ki mendwøng; ngøl gen piny ni byel, kenyi kɑɑj gen kɑ̀ cyeg gen. Nyøng gen ni kenyi nyøng nywøli oløg, kì yij buur bïjø gïti keny-ɑ ómulli møgi oløg.”" 
Joel3:14 Ji mø kwɑnni gen bɑ ɑ́lïp mø ngenyø ge ying-ɑ yij Töör Cɑ́y, mɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ójwɑn bëënø kì kunɑni." 
Joel3:15 Cɑ̈ng ólunyi geki dwɑ̈y, o kyell pɑ mënyø këti." 
Joel3:16 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ngɑ̈ɑ̈r kì Dhɑyøn; cwɑgge pödø nɑ mɑl kì Yerusɑlem; piny geki mɑl ceg-ɑ kïïrø. De jie ócwɑg yi en. 
Joel3:17 “Codhe, o yod yi yïn, yïn ɑ Isrɑil kinni, bene yɑn ɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí, o yɑ bëëd ɑ Dhɑyøn, kïtti kwërɑ. Yerusɑlem óbëëdø ɑ́ kej kwër, koo cigi tyɑmø yi tyëngpɑth." 
Joel3:18 “Kì bøli kenyɑni wɑ̈thi kïttì ókum yi nywøli oløg, o dhög ópɑ̈ng wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ thønhø bënn, nɑ̈mmi Yeudiyɑ̀ ópɑ̈ng yi pï. Nɑm órïngi kì Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e reng-ɑ Töör Álwiy." 
Joel3:19 “Rïp ógöögø ɑ́ ryɑng, kɑ Edöm rënyi, kipe kɑ ɑ́mɑg gen tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ ji mø yï gen bɑ̈r nɑ̈g gen." 
Joel3:20 Yɑn ɑ ócol gøøli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g; tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji pɑ wiy yi yɑn. De Yeudiyɑ̀ kí Yerusɑlem yethi gen óbëëd ceth gïti ɑtheer, o yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ óbëëdø kì Kïti Dhɑyøn.”" 
Joel3:21  
Amos1:1 Møg bɑ kwøbbi Amos, jɑl mɑ ɑ́bëëd yïe dɑ dyëg kì kɑɑl Tekoɑ̀, kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rrii yi Jwøk, kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd Udhiyɑ̀ ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀, o Yeroboɑm wɑ̈d Yeöɑc bɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil. Ri thumi runn ɑ́ryew kì bɑng kwøbbɑni ɑ ɑ́nhɑ̈nhi piny." 
Amos1:2 Amos ɑ́kööb kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óngɑ̈rri ni ngur kì wïj Kïti Dhɑyøn, cwɑgge ólïngi ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Yerusɑlem ge nɑ pööd mɑl. Kɑ̈jj-ɑ nyi cyɑ̈ɑ̈m yi dhög óthwøw, lum ógöögø ki ɑyɑw kì wïj Kïti Kɑrmel.”" 
Amos1:3 “Tyëng Dimɑceg ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ tyëng Gilyɑd ɑ́pwöd yi gen ni byel." 
Amos1:4 Kipe orøngɑni, gøl Rɑ̈dh Adhɑil ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc. Dör møg-ɑ ógerø yi Benɑdɑd órɑ̈b yi mɑc." 
Amos1:5 Thïggi dhøggi döri Dimɑceg ómøddɑ piny, kɑ rɑ̈nh-ɑ bëëdø kì yij Töör Aben nɑ̈g geki jɑngi Bet Eden. Tyëng Arɑm ókøøl piny Kïr gɑ ɑmɑgg.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos1:6 “Tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ pödhø bëne ɑ́køøl yi gen gɑ ɑmɑgg, kɑ gï ngëwwi gen tyëng Edöm." 
Amos1:7 Dör-ɑ korri Gɑdhɑ̀ kɑɑl gen ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc. Dör-ɑ pëddi tegø ócɑm yi mɑc. 
Amos1:8 Jɑngi Acdöd ónɑ̈g yi yɑn geki jɑngi Ackelön. Ekrön ócɑy yi yɑn; o tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ ɑ́döng óthumi ki thøø.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Amos1:9 “Tyëng Suur ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ pödhø bëne ɑ́køøl gen Edöm. Kɑ lwöm-ɑ ɑ́mïdhi gen gɑ wɑdd geki ji-ɑ kyeelø pɑ̈d yi gen." 
Amos1:10 O dörri Suur ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc, kɑ dör-ɑ korrii cɑm yi mɑc.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos1:11 “Tyëng Edöm ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn. Mɑ́ wɑddi gen, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil, ɑ́nɑ̈g yi gen ge thɑngg-ɑ cinggi gen, kɑ pëthi gen ódhɑ̈lø lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki wɑddi gen." 
Amos1:12 Kì bɑng menɑni, kɑɑl Temɑn ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc, kɑ dör-ɑ korri Bodhrɑ̀ cɑm yi mɑc.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos1:13 “Tyëng Amön ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ kì yij liny-ɑ ɑ́nyɑg yi gen, ge lɑny-ɑ kej gen, tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn møg-ɑ bɑ ɑ́yɑjj yethi gen ɑ́kɑg gen kì Gilyɑd." 
Amos1:14 Kì bɑng menɑni, dörri Rɑbɑ̀ ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc, kɑ dörr-ɑ korrii cɑm yi mɑc. Mɑnyɑni órɑ̈b-ɑ́ɑ̀ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny, linyɑni óbëëd e teeg cɑrø ki mendwøng ni ɑtunø." 
Amos1:15 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh gen ókɑ̈l ɑ́ ɑmɑg geki jɑgge. Ge ókɑ̈l kì kej ɑ́kyel bënn.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Amos2:1 “Tyëng Moɑb ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ cu rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Edöm ɑ́rɑ̈b yi gen kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr." 
Amos2:2 Kì bɑng menɑni, Moɑb ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc, men-ɑ ócɑm dörr-ɑ korri kɑɑl Keryöth. Tyëng Moɑb óthøw ge okïïwø ki ywøg kì yij liny, kɑ̈ngì óywöngø." 
Amos2:3 Jɑngi Moɑb ónɑ̈g yi yɑn geki pëjji pɑɑre bënn.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Amos2:4 “Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ pwönyɑ ɑ́bɑny yi gen, kɑ ciggɑ ocögø gï pɑ mïdhi yi gen. Ge ɑ́kedhi bɑng jwögg mø pɑth ni kweyyi gen kɑ̈ge dööng," 
Amos2:5 Kì bɑng menɑni, Yeudiyɑ̀ ógöjjɑ rɑ̈bø ki mɑc, men-ɑ ócɑm dörr-ɑ kor Yerusɑlem.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos2:6 “Tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́røngi ki orøng dwøng cɑrø, ge pɑ bødh ki cɑyø yi yɑn, mɑ́ ngɑntir men wɑnge cɑn nyi ngeew ge’ wɑ̈g ki ɑ́tegø, e bong gïn bɑɑj en. Kɑ ngɑn wɑnge cɑn cɑgg ɑ́ wɑrø ɑ pir kì yïe, nyi ngeew wɑ̈g o ngyënyy-ɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈l yi en ngëëw ki wɑr." 
Amos2:7 Ge nyøn-ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn, de ge ce bong-ɑ per gen, o ge pɑ yïëy ki kønyi tyëng-ɑ rɑngø. Kɑ dhɑnhø nyii rëbø kì ri dhɑjø ɑ́kyel geki wïye, kɑ nyingɑ rënyi yi gen." 
Amos2:8 Ge buud-ɑ kɑ̈jji mɑlli Jwøk kì kömi ógudh møg-ɑ ómɑgø kì yï tyëng-ɑ nyingi gen cɑn. Ge mɑdh-ɑ møgi oløg men-ɑ mɑɑg gen kì yï tyëng-ɑ pir yi gen kì Kengi Jwøøg gen. 
Amos2:9 “Bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ wu pëëjɑ wu korrɑ’ korrø kì yij ryɑng ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen. Kɑ tyëng Amör, jøg-ɑ bɑ̈rrø ni yenh sɑndɑl, ɑ teg ni óthur nɑ̈gɑ kiper wun, kɑ wu mëggɑ piny Amör." 
Amos2:10  
Amos2:11 Yɑ ɑ́yïëëny kì kelli wɑ̈ddi wun ki ji mɑ ɑ́gwøgɑ gɑ jøtöng. Kɑ møøgø yienyɑ, o ge thyey gɑ møg göggi yɑn. Møgɑni pɑth ki dyër wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil?” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos2:12 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “De tyëngcyɑ̈rø ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈n wun köbbi wöönɑ teedø. Kɑ yɑɑg thønhø møg-ɑ bɑ ɑthyey göjji wun mɑdhi møgi oløg, ge ɑ́rënyi yi wun." 
Amos2:13 Wu ómød yi yɑn ni kenyi nyøng ɑ́cungø kì piny ki lwedø. 
Amos2:14 Yɑɑg-ɑ pëddi ngwej kì kelli wun pɑ cuggi rengø. O yɑɑg-ɑ teg óceg ì lɑ̈b. Kɑ nyel teg ódhɑ̈lø yieli ree. 
Amos2:15 Yɑɑg-ɑ nyi pöödø ki weth, pɑ cungi kì bøli liny. Dërø pɑ bødh ki mɑgø. Ngɑn ying kömi kyeny, wëye pɑ lwɑ̈ng yi en ki yielø." 
Amos2:16 Yɑɑg-ɑ jödd tønggi gen óleeng gen piny, kɑ ge órengø.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos3:1 Lïng wun, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, lïngu kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑy wun yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cɑ́y-ɑ ɑ́cɑɑye gøl-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g kì Rïp gø korre’ korrø."
