Amos3:2 “Wu keti wun ɑ ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn kì kelli jurri kömi piny bënn. Wu ɑ́korrɑ kidøøj. De wu ócɑy yi yɑn kɑ per orøøg wun bëne.” 
Amos3:3 Dɑ ji ɑ́ryew mø cuggi welø, keløg wel nuti nywɑɑg gen?" 
Amos3:4 Ngur nyii ngɑ̈rrø kì wɑg, e nuti mɑ̈gø ki lɑ̈y? Ócuggø ywøg kì keny-ɑ buude, e bong gïn mɑɑg en?" 
Amos3:5 Dɑ winyø me nyi mɑg yi ɑbyëg, keløg e bong cyɑ̈ɑ̈mi mɑ ɑ́cïb ri gøn? Dɑ ɑbyëg me nyi dyëddi, e bong gïn gumii?" 
Amos3:6 Dɑ ɑkyew me nyi kiiw, kɑ ji ocögø ge pɑ bwøg? Dɑ ryɑ̈g me töngi kömi pɑc, e nuti ör-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j?" 
Amos3:7 Bong gïjø me nyi gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e yïthhi bɑ̈ngge, jøtöng nuti kwɑ̈d en." 
Amos3:8 Kenyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈r ngur, ɑ́ men ɑ pɑ nyi bwøg? Kenyi kööb Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́ men ɑ cuggi mïdhi kwøbbɑni, gï pɑ köbbe ji?" 
Amos3:9 Tyëngkɑ̈rì kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́köbbi yi Amos kinni, “Di bëëd ɑ dï, keløg jɑggi piny Acdöd geki jɑggi Rïp, ri gen cøng ge’ tøggi kɑɑl wun, kɑ guun-ɑ guud wun nyingi ji, geki orøng-ɑ røngi wun lidh yi gen, wu pɑ di yɑ̈r yi gen?”" 
Amos3:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wun, wu tyëng Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, uddi wun pɑ̈ɑ̈ng wun kɑ jɑmm-ɑ kɑbbi yi wun ki orøg. Bëëndøj kwïj yi wun." 
Amos3:11 Kì bɑng menɑni, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óbï, kɑ kɑɑl wun kedhhi yi gen kɑ jɑmm-ɑ yethi uddi wun kɑ̈l yi gen." 
Amos3:12 “Ngur kɑ̀ cɑme dyel, bɑ tyelli dyel ɑ́ryew wɑlɑ̀ yïthhe ɑ nyi döng kì bɑnge. Nɑ menɑni ceth, keny-ɑ obëën tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, bɑ tyelli nɑngɑreb ɑ́ryew geki thulli pënnì ɑ ódöng ge ótwɑ̈lø kì piny.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos3:13 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïngu møg kɑ ge köbbu kwɑrri Yɑgob." 
Amos3:14 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑyɑ tyëng Isrɑil kipe orøøg gen, kɑ̈jj-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen nyi ngɑ̈ɑ̈d gen ki gëdhhì, ócøørɑ piny kì Betiil. Tùngi këli lɑm møg-ɑ nyi mɑɑg gen jɑmm-ɑ kɑ̈l yi gen gɑ gëdhhì óputhɑ wɑ̈g." 
Amos3:15 Myërr geki kɑ̈dd-ɑ nyi köddi kì lew ócøørɑ piny. Uddi tyëngkɑ̈rì ódöng nøw. Udd-ɑ døngø bënn ócøørɑ piny.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Amos4:1 Lïng wun, wun ɑ mɑ̈nni Sɑmɑriyɑ̀, ɑ bëëd wu cwiy ni dhögi Bɑcɑn. Wu kɑbb-ɑ jɑmmi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur, wu nyøn-ɑ tyëng-ɑ jɑdø. Kɑ cwøwi wun nyi tøøny wun ki köbbø kinni, “Kɑ̈ni wun ki møgi oløg men mɑdh yi wɑ.”" 
Amos4:2 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kiree kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ótëël wun wɑ̈g ni kenyi tëël rëjø wɑ̈g, e óryërø kì dhøg ɑbɑdh ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Dhɑnhø óryëri ni rëjø kì dhøg ɑbɑdh." 
Amos4:3 Wu óywɑɑj wɑ̈g ki keny me twïyø kì ri dörø, kɑ wu weddi.”" 
Amos4:4 Wïlɑ̈bø okööbø kinni, “Wu tyëng Isrɑil, kenyi kedhu Betiil be mɑ̈ddø, kwïj yi wun wu ceg-ɑ orøg, mɑ́ wu guud-ɑ nyingi ji! Kenyi kedhu Gilgɑl be ngɑl ki gëdhhì, kwïj yi wun, wu ceg-ɑ orøg, mɑ́ wu kɑbb-ɑ jɑmmi tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur! Kwɑ̈ny-ɑ rïïj wun wu muuj-ɑ ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun ri thumi cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g, kwïj yi wun ge pɑth ki ɑyïëy yi yɑn." 
Amos4:5 Muuj wun ki ópùn-ɑ ógwøgø ki ɑwɑj me wɑ̈nyyø, ɑ́ gëëdhi mi pwøj, kɑ wu kɑ̈ɑ̈d wun ki gëdhh-ɑ kyeelø, mɑ́ bene gwøng-ɑ mɑɑr yi wun, wu tyëng Isrɑil." 
Amos4:6 “Wu ɑ́twöönɑ ki gïncɑm kì yethi myërri wun. Kɑ bong-ɑ gïncɑm me yɑ̈ng ji kì yethi kɑ̈ddi wun. De wu nuti dwöög yïɑ. 
Amos4:7 Wu ɑ́mɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ ki kødh e döngø ɑ́ dwɑ̈tt ɑ́dɑ̈g kinni o byel cyeg gen. Kɑ kødh nyii mɑ̈gø kì kɑɑl, kɑ nyii cöögø e pɑ mɑ̈gi kì kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø. Kødh ómɑ̈gø kì pwönhï, de pwönh-ɑ kyeelø kedh e ceg-ɑ thwøwø." 
Amos4:8 Ji nyi yɑ̈bb-ɑ kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø ki pï, ge cyɑ̈dhi ge thøø yi röödhø. De ge nyi yod-ɑ pï mø nøg. Wu nuti pɑ̈nyi dwöög yïɑ thyew." 
Amos4:9 “Byelli wun ɑ́göjjɑ gwøg ki ɑ́mujj, keny-ɑ ɑ́kedh bɑ̈ggi wun ge ólɑ̈nyø. Pwödhhi wun geki bɑ̈ggi wun ɑ́cɑm yi bɑ̈nyø. De wu nuti pɑ̈nyi dwöög yïɑ thyew." 
Amos4:10 “Ryɑ̈g ɑ́göjjɑ wun ni kɑ ɑ́göjjɑ en tyëng Rïp. Yɑɑg-ɑ wøbbi wun ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ ki pilø. Kɑ kyënyi wun kwɑnyɑ kì yï wun. Kɑ wu køm-ɑ thengø yi pedi yømi tyëngthøø kì kɑɑl wun. De wu nuti pɑ̈nyi dwöög yïɑ thyew. 
Amos4:11 “Kwï wun ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ ni kɑ ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀. Kɑ wu nɑ yɑnh ywɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì mɑc e rum gɑ̈mmø. De wu nuti pɑ̈nyi dwöög yïɑ. 
Amos4:12 “Kì bɑng menɑni yïn ɑ Isrɑil, yï ócɑy yi yɑn ceth, keløg yï pɑ yewi. Yï ócɑy ki cɑ́y mø døngø, de yɑb wïjí.”" 
Amos4:13 Bɑ Jwøk ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j kïtt-ɑ døngø en ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yømø. Rumme nyi nyudhe’ ji; dicɑ̈ng nyi løge’ wɑ̈r. Cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ mɑl kömi piny bëne. Nyinge bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j!" 
Amos5:1 Lïngu wörri ywøg, møg-ɑ ywøøgɑ wun, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil." 
Amos5:2 “Isrɑil, Nyɑdhey nywöm ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh. Pɑ cigi dhwödhø. Áwiy e obuddø kì piny e kete. Bong ngɑn kønyii ki dhwödhi mɑl.”" 
Amos5:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kɑɑl kedhi be liny gɑ ɑ́lïp, bɑ miyø ɑ́kyel ɑ dwöög pɑc. O kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø ókedhe ɑ́ miyø, bɑ pyɑ̈rø keti gen ɑ dwöög pɑc.”" 
Amos5:4 Yïn ɑ Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lugu pëthi wun yɑn, o wu bødh wun ki cɑyø." 
Amos5:5 De wu ko nyi tyer kedhi kengi Betiil. Kɑ wu ko nyi kedhi kengi Gilgɑl, kɑ wu ko kedhi Bircebɑ̀ be mɑ̈ddø, mɑ́ Betiil óbong nyinge, o Gilgɑl ókøøl yïnø.”" 
Amos5:6 Kedhu yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j o wu yïddi wun ki nënnì. Ke pɑ kedhu yïe, óbï yï kwɑrri Yosep e nɑ mɑc. Betiil órɑ̈b yi en. Bong ngɑn-ɑ ólwɑ̈ng mɑnyɑni ki cɑwø." 
Amos5:7 Wu ɑ́wïyi ki gøggi dyër, de gwøgi dyër nɑ mɑdhi kenø, wɑlɑ̀ gwen kì wïj thur. Kɑ tyëngtir mød yi wun, jɑmmi gen kɑbbu’ kɑbbø." 
Amos5:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́gwøg kyell, en ɑ ɑ́gwøg Curø geki Ábɑnyy. Muudhø nyi løge’ cɑr; kɑ dicɑ̈ng nyi løge wɑ̈r. Pïi nɑm nyi cwööle’ cwöölø, kɑ gï kønye kömi piny. Nyinge bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Amos5:9 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑɑl-ɑ korri kidøøj, gø nyi kedhhe’ kedhhø. O kɑɑl-ɑ ówenø ki dörø me teg; döre nyi cøøre’ piny." 
Amos5:10 Wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu nyi mɑɑn-ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi kømmi dyër kì burø. Tyëng-ɑ dwɑddi dyër, pɑ dwɑddi yi wun." 
Amos5:11 Wu nyøn-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur, kɑ byelli gen nyi kɑbbi yi wun. Wu ɑ́gëëd ki ud mø myëër, de wu pɑth ki møg-ɑ óbëëdø kì yethi gen. Wu ópïdhø ki pwödh mø døngø, de wu pɑth ki møg-ɑ ócyɑ̈mø ki byelli gen." 
Amos5:12 Orøg men-ɑ gøggi yi wun, ngɑ̈nyi yi yɑn; tyëng-ɑ gøggi dyër nyi göggu’ gïnrɑj. Wu nyi ruj-ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur kì kɑ̈jji gønyy. Kɑ jɑgø dhøge nyi kum wun ki ngyëny, kipe kinni o gøny cwɑ̈gge wun." 
Amos5:13 Bëëdø ɑ́rënyi, kɑ tyëng-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen nud døøg-ɑ be kudø kenyi mød ji kì buti gen, mɑ́ piny rɑɑj." 
Amos5:14 Wu ko tyer gøggi gïgrijjø, de tyer wun gøggi gïg-ɑ dyër, o wu bødh wun, o wu ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg lɑ̈bø bëne, ni ngɑ̈nh-ɑ ngɑ̈dhu en." 
Amos5:15 Mɑɑnu rɑj, mɑɑru dyër. Kɑ kwøb nyi cïbu kɑ̈jji gen kì burø, men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ki ɑ́kyëll-ɑ ódöng kì gøl Yosep." 
Amos5:16 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ywøg óceg ì túl! Ji óceg ì kɑɑg ki ywøg, kì yethi kɑ̈dd, kí yethi pwödh; ji mø gïïr óthøw." 
Amos5:17 Ódi ywøg kì yethi pwödh bënn, mɑ́ yɑ óbï kelli wun be cɑyi wun.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Amos5:18 Wun, wu tyëng-ɑ guud nyingi ji, wu okööbø ce wu yïd-ɑ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bëëni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be cɑyi tyëngrijjø. De wun kì ri wun, bene wun tyëng-ɑ rijjø. Cyɑ̈ngɑni óbëëd e rɑɑj kì yï wun, piny ólunyi kì nyingi wun, nyingi wun óbɑɑr." 
Amos5:19 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni wu óbëëd wu nɑ ngɑn cyeddi yi ngur, kɑ yöd e pödh-ɑ dhø kwej. Wɑlɑ̀ ngɑn yömmi ød, de cem cinge thɑɑnye ri dörø, kɑ kɑj yi thwöl." 
Amos5:20 Cyɑ̈ngɑni óbëëd e rɑɑj kì yï wun. Koo bëëdø e døøj ni kɑ ɑ́rømmu en. 
Amos5:21 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ̈yyi wun ɑ́bɑny yi yɑn ki mendwøng. Yɑ ɑ́ngïr yi kwɑ̈jji wun, wun ɑ́ yɑy." 
Amos5:22 Keløg yɑ ómuuj yi wun ki gëdhhì møg-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b geki byëlø, ge pɑ yïëy yi yɑn. Cɑgg yɑ muuj yi wun ki gëdhhì gɑ wɑ̈dhh mø pëddi cwiyø gɑ møg kwɑjju mër, yɑ pɑ pɑ̈nyi lïïdh ri gen." 
Amos5:23 Wu ko cööng ki thom wu owörø kì bølɑ, yɑ ɑ́ngïr yi ywøøg thømi wun." 
Amos5:24 De bëëd wun wu cïmm-ɑ kwøb kì kɑ̈jji gen. Kɑ wu ko wïyi ki gøggi dyër ni thew kì Kiir ɑ pɑ nyi cungi. 
Amos5:25 “Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, yɑ nuti cwöddø kì yï wun ki gëdhhì, wɑlɑ̀ gïg-ɑ nyi muuj keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈llɑ wun kì yij ryɑng, ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen." 
Amos5:26 De ɑnɑn, mɑ́ wu kwɑjj-ɑ ngïjji yɑnh-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ Sɑkuth, jwøng-ɑ mïdhi yi wun ɑ́ rɑ̈ɑ̈dh wun geki ngïjji Kɑywɑn, ɑ løg kyelø men-ɑ mïdhi yi wun ɑ́ jwøg. Ngïjjɑni bɑ møg-ɑ ókɑ̈lli yi wun ceth, keny-ɑ ókøøl wun yïnø wu bɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Amos5:27 Wu ókøølɑ yïnø wu bɑ ɑmɑgg, kɑ wu kïdhɑ pödhø me lɑ̈wi kì ngɑ̈ɑ̈j Dimɑceg kun-ɑcɑ̀.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ bɑ Wïlɑ̈bø ɑgɑk." 
Amos6:1 Wu órɑngi ki orɑng me teg, wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈ll-ɑ døngø kì Yerusɑlem geki Sɑmɑriyɑ̀. Wu orumø ce bene wun ɑ per wun teg, kì pönh-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì kömi piny, o bɑ wun ɑ yï wun nyi kwɑ̈jji." 
Amos6:2 Kedhu be lidhi Kɑlnè. Kɑ wu pödhu be lidhi Amɑth. Kɑ wu pödhu Gɑth kì Pelistiyɑ̀. Per wun pɑ teg kibøli pödhhɑni. Pödhi wun pɑ lɑɑj kibøli pödhi gen, ge ɑ́kedhhi, o wu bɑ møg-ɑ ókedhhi ni gen." 
Amos6:3 Wu ɑ́dhɑ̈li yïëyø kinni cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ryɑ̈g obëënø. De kwïj yi wun kinni ceg-ɑ jwɑn bëënø, kì bɑng orøg men-ɑ gøggi yi wun, kenyi göggu ji ki gïgrijjø." 
Amos6:4 Wu órɑngi ki orɑng me teg wun ɑ jɑgg, mɑ́ wu ɑ́wɑ̈dhi pëggi piny be cɑm ki órömm, geki røjj-ɑ cwiy. Pëthi wun døngø. Wu buud-ɑ yij kɑ̈r wu wɑ̈dh-ɑ lɑɑlø yøw." 
Amos6:5 Kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ be cɑg ki wör, wu orumø ce wu pɑ̈r ki Debïd." 
Amos6:6 Wu mɑdhh-ɑ muggì kì yethi lödd-ɑ døngø. Wu gïïny-ɑ mɑ̈th-ɑ yømi gen med. Wɑ̈thi wun ɑ́wïl ki rëny-ɑ rënyi gøl Yosep. 
Amos6:7 O bɑ wun ɑ ókwøng ki kïdhi yïnø, wu bɑ bɑ̈ngg. Tung-ɑ tuug wun ɑnɑn bɑ men cög." 
Amos6:8 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kiree kinni, “Ngwøni tyëng Isrɑil mɑɑn yi yɑn. Udd-ɑ døngø møg-ɑ geer gen ɑnɑn ɑ́bɑnyɑ. Tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óörɑ, o kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng kì Isrɑil mɑg yi gen.”" 
Amos6:9 Keløg e dɑ ji pyɑ̈rø mø döngø kì wïj gøl gen, ge ceg-ɑ thøø." 
Amos6:10 Keny-ɑ óbëën wɑddi gen be konyi gen, ngɑn-ɑ ókedhi ød be kɑ̈ɑ̈li ji wɑ̈g, ópyëj yi ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́döng kì wɑ̈g kinni, “Dɑ ɑ́kyel me nëënø?” Nyel-ɑ ød ólöggi kinni, “Bong gøn, ge thøø bënn!” Kɑ nyel-ɑ wɑ̈g okööbø kinni, “Kud! Nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ko kɑ̈ɑ̈l. Jwøk pɑ cɑy yi wɑ!”" 
Amos6:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, i øn-ɑ dwøng mød-ɑ piny. Kɑ øn-ɑ thinh kedhhi." 
Amos6:12 Kyënyì nyii rïngø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì? Byel nyii kɑ̈gø kì nɑm? Dɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ wil wun dyër, kɑ løg wun me keej ni kenø, kɑ kwøbb-ɑ dyër løg wun bɑ̈jjø?" 
Amos6:13 Wu ótøllø ce kɑɑl Lödebɑr mɑɑg wun. Wu pwöd-ɑ köthi wun ce Kɑrnɑim mɑɑg wun kɑ tegø. 
Amos6:14 De Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́köngi kiree kinni, “Wun, wu tyëng Isrɑil, yɑ óöni ki liny me teg, men-ɑ ókwɑny pödhi wun. Wu ónyøn yi gen, cɑg kì Ókømi Amɑth kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti nɑɑm Árɑbɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl.”" 
Amos7:1 Yɑ ɑ́nyudhi kì yethi lɑ̈g yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e ócunggø ki bɑ̈nyø men cɑm lum, e lum nudd e bɑ ɑ́pöjø, geki jɑmm-ɑ mɑr bënn." 
Amos7:2 Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑ, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ bɑ̈nyø e cɑm-ɑ jɑmm-ɑ mɑr bënn kì kömi piny, ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, dwöög lɑɑwí piny kipe jií! Isrɑil óyiel-ɑ yi ngø ki ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ni men? Ki tyëng-ɑ kwɑnni gen nøg ni møg!”" 
Amos7:3 Alɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑkööbe kinni, “Møgɑni pɑ cwöb.”" 
Amos7:4 Møg-ɑ ɑ́cigi nyudhi yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ek: Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́lidhɑ e cɑy-ɑ jie, e men-ɑ́ gï göjje’ mɑc. Kɑ cɑ̈ng ólënhø ni mɑc, kɑ nɑ̈mmì odwönø bënn yi mɑnyɑni, geki pïg-ɑ thɑ piny bënn. Kɑ mɑnyɑni ócɑ̈gø rɑ̈bi piny." 
Amos7:5 Codhe ɑkööbɑ kinni, “Cungí yïn ɑ Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Jií óyiel yi ngø ki ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ni men? Ki tyëng-ɑ kwɑnni gen nøg ni møg!”" 
Amos7:6 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ólɑ̈ɑ̈mø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Møgɑni pɑ cwöb thyew.”" 
Amos7:7 Kɑ yɑ cigi nyudhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yethi lɑ̈g. Kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j e ócungø kì buti mɑc, cinge dɑ gwej men-ɑ nyi tëëny ki böltøngg." 
Amos7:8 Apyëje yɑn kinni, “Amos yï nenn-ɑ ngø?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Gwej men-ɑ nyi tëëny ki böltøngg.” Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Tyëng Isrɑil nɑ böltøng me bøømø. Pyëwɑ pɑ cigi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki gen, mɑ́ ge ɑ́dhɑ̈li tyenyø ni böltøng." 
Amos7:9 Keny-ɑ yije nyi mɑ̈ddi yi kwɑrri Yɑgob bɑ men cøør piny, kej kwëër Isrɑil ódöng ɑ́ ryɑng. Jyɑ̈gi Rɑ̈dh Yeroboɑm ócög.”" 
Amos7:10 Kɑ Amɑdhiyɑ̀ ókwëri Betiil öd-ɑ yï Rɑ̈dh Yeroboɑm ki wöödø kinni, “Amos dwɑdd-ɑ göggi yïn ki gïnrɑj, ki gïg-ɑ köbbe tyëng Isrɑil, piny bëne ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi kwøbbe." 
Amos7:11 Amos rïïjø e kømm-ɑ kinni, ‘Yeroboɑm ónɑ̈g kɑ pilø. O tyëng Isrɑil bɑ møg køøl yïnø gɑ ɑmɑgg.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Codhe, ɑköbbi Amos yi Amɑdhiyɑ̀ kinni, “Árum jɑlcyɑ̈rø! Døøg Yeudiyɑ̀, kɑ yï göög ki gwøøg cyɑ̈rø. Yï ócuddi ki ngyëny kì kunɑni." 
Amos7:13 Yï ko kööb ki gïg ni møg kì Betiil këti. Keny bɑ keny-ɑ yije nyi kwɑjji Jwøk yi rɑ̈dh, en ɑ yije di kengi pödhø bëne.”" 
Amos7:14 Alöggi Amos kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki ngeti cyɑ̈rø me göög ngyëny. Yïɑ dɑ dyëg kí pwödh. Yɑ nuti pwönyø ki cyɑ̈rø." 
Amos7:15 De yɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yɑ mïdh-ɑ jɑmmɑ kì wɑ̈yɑ, ɑköbbe yɑn kinni, ‘Kedh, kɑ møg-ɑ köbbɑ yïn nyi loony ki köbbi jiɑ, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil.’" 
Amos7:16 De ɑnɑn lïngí møg-ɑ kømmi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ yï kyëdd-ɑ yɑn kinni yɑ ko kööb kì keny ki kwøbbi cɑyi Isrɑil." 
Amos7:17 Yïn, Amɑdhiyɑ̀, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ yïn kinni, ‘Cyëgí ógöögø ki ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi kì kɑɑl-ɑ ókøølii. Kɑ wɑ̈ddí geki nyigí womɑ̈nn nɑ̈g ki pilø. Kɑ piny gøl wun ngølli, kɑ pɑ̈ngi kì kelli ji møøgø. O yïn kirií, yï óthøw-ɑ yïnø kì pödhø megø. O tyëng Isrɑil bɑ møg kïdhi pödhø megø gɑ ɑmɑgg ceth.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 Kɑ yɑ nyudhi yi Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki lɑ̈g møøgø, kì yethi lɑ̈ggɑni, yɑ ɑ́lidh-ɑ dhöngø men-ɑ nyi lïm ki nywøli yenh." 
Amos8:2 Apyëëj yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Amos, yï nenn-ɑ ngø?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Dhöngø me pɑ̈ng yi nywøli yenh møg cyegø.” Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Jiɑ, ɑ løg tyëng Isrɑil, bøli kej gen ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Ge pɑ cigɑ wiyø, ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø ceth, wɑ̈thi tyëng Isrɑil ópøn yi yɑn ni nywøli yenh." 
Amos8:3 Kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑyɑ gen, wörr-ɑ wör kì kengi Betiil, ri gen óløg gen ywøg. Ji óbëëdø ge odhoongø kì piny ge thøø kì kɑ̈jj bënn. Piny óbëëd e kudø kudø.”" 
Amos8:4 Lïngu møg, wu tyëng-ɑ nyøn ji-ɑ jɑdø, wu cöd-ɑ minni tyëng-ɑ ɑbuur kì pönhï." 
Amos8:5 Wu kømm-ɑ kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø mi wïj tuung dwɑ̈y óthumi kì wën, o wɑ ngëwwi wɑ wɑ̈g ki byellee? Sɑbɑth cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ywömø óthumi kì wën, o wɑ døøg wɑ be ngyëwø? O ngyëny kïdhi mɑl, o thɑ̈thi rummi byel wööl yij, o midhɑn ol, o tyëng-ɑ ngëwø kì yïee gwem yi wɑ." 
Amos8:6 Byell-ɑ bɑ cong ócuggø ngeew wɑ̈g yi wɑ ki ngyëny mø gïïr. O ngɑn wɑnge cɑn men köme di kwör, cɑgg ɑ́ kwör me thiinh, me ni ngyëny-ɑ ngeew wɑrø yøw, ngɑn ni menɑni ceg kɑ ngeew wɑ̈g yi wɑ ɑ́ bɑ̈ng.”" 
Amos8:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg Isrɑil ɑ́köngi kiree kinni, “Wïjɑ pɑ wïl ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi tyëngɑni." 
Amos8:8 Piny ónhɑ̈nhi, dhɑnhø bëne óbëëd e óywöngø. Pönhï bëne órungi, kɑ ree tulle ni ɑpɑgi Kiir.”" 
Amos8:9 Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi kinni, “Cɑ̈ng ólunyi e ying-ɑ dïmɑl, kɑ piny ogöögø e looj kì dicɑ̈ng." 
Amos8:10 Bulli dhwɑ̈ng ódøøg gɑ møg ywøøg tyëngthøø, kɑ wörri wun ogöögø gɑ wörri ywøg. Wu órugø ki thølli thøø ni ji mø ywøg wɑ̈d gen, wɑ̈dkyel. Cyɑ̈ngɑni óbëëd e pëddi rɑ̈jø ki mendwøng.”" 
Amos8:11 Wë ɑ́köngi kinni, “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ógöjjɑ wun kɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Ji ómɑg yi kɑ̈j, pɑth ki kɑ̈ɑ̈j gïncɑm, den-ɑ́ kɑ̈ɑ̈j kwøbbi Jwøk. Ji ómɑg yi röödhø, pɑth ki rönhi pï, den-ɑ́ rönhi kwøbbi Jwøk." 
Amos8:12 Ge óbëëd ge bɑ̈nn-ɑ piny kì kɑɑm nɑɑm kí nɑɑm, kí kɑɑm cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, ge nyii kedhø kɑ ge nyii dwöögø, ge yɑb-ɑ kwøbbi Jwøk, de gï pɑ yod yi gen." 
Amos8:13 Kì bøli kenyɑni, yɑɑg-ɑ wøbb geki wojur-ɑ myëër, ópɑ̈nhi yi röödhø." 
Amos8:14 De men-ɑ́ tyëng-ɑ nyi kwöng jwöggi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ jwögg-ɑ pɑth ki dyër, ge cem-ɑ, ‘Ki nyigi jwøng-ɑ kwömø kì Dɑn!’ Wɑlɑ̀ ‘Ki nyingi jwøng-ɑ kwömø kì Bircebɑ̀!’ Ji-ɑ ni møgɑni bɑ møg pɑ̈ɑ̈dh ceth, ge pɑ cigi dhwödhø.”" 
Amos9:1 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́lidhɑ e ócungø kì buti këli lɑm kì kengi Betiil, kɑ okööbø kinni, “Gøj mënhh-ɑ mïdhi kengø kì wɑ̈thi gen, o ge pɑ̈dhi gen kömi ji-ɑ yije, o ge thøw gen. Møg-ɑ óbødh ónɑ̈g yi yɑn kì kej liny ki pilø. Bong dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel me bødh, bong dhɑnhø me rengi." 
Amos9:2 Keløg ri gen koony ge’ piny thɑ lɑ̈bø pödhi tyëngthøø, ge tëëlɑ’ wɑ̈g kì kunɑni. Keløg ge pɑ̈ɑ̈r-ɑ mɑl me lɑ̈wi, ge dwöögɑ’ piny." 
Amos9:3 Keløg ge pɑ̈n-ɑ kelli thïm-ɑ wïj Kïti Kɑrmel, ge yodɑ’ yodø kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ. Keløg ge pɑ̈n-ɑ nɑm thɑ́ pï, thwöl ɑ́köbbɑ, o gï kɑ̈ɑ̈je." 
Amos9:4 Keløg ge omɑgø kɑ ge kɑ̈l yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø mø gen, pilø óköbbi yi yɑn o gï nɑ̈ge. Yɑ ólugi kì bɑng gen yɑ kɑ̈ll-ɑ rɑ̈jø de pɑth ki døøjø.”" 
Amos9:5 Wïlɑ̈bø Wë, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ke nywɑle piny, piny ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh, kɑ tyëng-ɑ kömi piny óywöngø ki ywøøg thøø. Lɑ̈bø ree ótulle ni ɑpɑgi Kiir." 
Amos9:6 Jwøk, mɑl ɑ́cwɑ̈je, kɑ pɑɑre geere kömi gøn, kɑ pyëën mɑl cïbe mɑl kömi piny. Pïi nɑm nyii kwɑnyø yi en kɑ gï kønye kömi piny. Nyinge bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Amos9:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil, wu pɑ̈r ki tyëng Kuc kì yïɑ, Wu ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp, kɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀ kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì Kɑptör kì muji Kirit, kɑ tyëng Arɑm kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ kì Kïr.”" 
Amos9:8 Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nenn-ɑ Isrɑil ki orøng-ɑ gøggi yi en, bɑ men nyinge órɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì kömi piny. De óyïddi ki ɑ́kyëllì møg-ɑ ódöng kì gøl Yɑgob." 
Amos9:9 Gøl Yɑgob óyieg yi yɑn kì kelli jurrì, ni kenyi yieeg byel ki luy, bong nyɑ wɑng ɑ́kyel men-ɑ ódëëm piny." 
Amos9:10 Tyëngorøg møg-ɑ kelli yɑyɑ bënn, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi kööbø kinni, ‘Jwøk wɑ koo wëgge pïïdø yi rɑ̈jø,’ ge ónɑ̈g ki pilø." 
Amos9:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pödhi Debïd nɑ ød me pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, de óthïg yi yɑn, kɑ døøg-ɑ keje, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn.”" 
Amos9:12 “Budi Edöm men-ɑ dööngø ókwɑny yi tyëng Isrɑil geki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ bɑ møgɑ.” Bene ge møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni ge ócwöb ɑgɑk. 
Amos9:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ ójwɑn jɑmmì cyegø ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, o oløg ójwɑn cyegø e møgø nuti gwøgø. Møgi oløg men-ɑ med ólɑɑj piny kì wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ døngø, kɑ ómullø kì wɑ̈thi kïtt-ɑ thønhø." 
Amos9:14 Jiɑ ódwöögɑ piny gen. Kɑ̈dd-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø óger yi gen, kɑ ge pëgg-ɑ kɑ̈ddɑni. Ge ópïdhø ki oløg, kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløngɑni. Ge ópïdhø ki bɑ̈gg, kɑ gïg-ɑ pidh yi gen cɑm yi gen." 
Amos9:15 “Jiɑ ógurɑ kej gen ni pijø, bong ngɑn lwɑ̈ng gen ki puthø këti.” Jwøgí Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Obadiah1:1 Møg-ɑ ɑ́yɑ̈lli Obɑdiyɑ̀, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wë Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri Edöm. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wëywöne ɑ́öre yï pödhh kɑ wööne lïngi wøn kinni, “Dwödh liny! Kedhu be nyɑɑg ki Edöm!”" 
Obadiah1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Edöm ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Yï ógwøgɑ yï nyøødh, yï óceg ki benyø yi ji bënn." 
Obadiah1:3 Yï ɑ́wëny yi ɑthwøgí, Kɑɑl-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g yi yïn ógerø ki kïttì mø teg pɑɑrí ying-ɑ mɑl kì wɑ̈thi kïttì, bene ɑ bɑnge köbbí rií kinni, ‘Á men ɑ cuggi tëëli yɑn piny?’" 
Obadiah1:4 De cɑgg ødí geer yïn mɑl ni ød cor kɑ ónënnø e ce ying-ɑ kelli kyell, yï ótëëlɑ piny." 
Obadiah1:5 “Ke bëën kurrì gølí kì wɑ̈r, ge kwɑl-ɑ gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi gen yøw. Kenyi lem oløg, nyii yïddø ki ɑ́kyëllì mø döng. De yï órënyi yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn yïn kinni tweet." 
Obadiah1:6 Yïn ɑ gøl Isøø, kɑ̈rí ɑ́kɑ̈l." 
Obadiah1:7 Yï ɑ́wëny yi mɑ̈dhhí yï ɑ́cyeed gen wɑ̈g kì pödhí. Ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd ge mër ki yïn, yï ɑ́mɑny yi gen. Yï ɑ́ceg ki ɑ́kɑ̈llì yi ji-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m wun, yï ɑ́thɑb yi gen kì bɑng nøgi wïjí." 
Obadiah1:8 “Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑyɑ Edöm, bong ngɑn wïje pel men-ɑ ódöng! Mɑ́ tyëng-ɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw ógöjjɑ nøgi wɑ̈ɑ̈th." 
Obadiah1:9 Jøliny Temɑn óbwøg, jøliny Edöm ónɑ̈g bënn." 
Obadiah1:10 “Mɑ́ jɑmmi wɑddí kwɑrri Yɑgob ɑ́kɑb yi yïn kɑ wɑddi wun nɑ̈g wun, yï órënyi kɑ yï ocögø yï yɑ̈rø gïti ɑtheer." 
Obadiah1:11 Yï ɑ́cungi yï lɑ̈wi, dicyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́tëër kɑ̈re yi tyëngpɑth, kɑ thïggi döri kɑɑl toor gen piny. Yï ɑ́bëëd yï rɑj ni gen. gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l kɑ̈ɑ̈r Yerusɑlem, kɑ gø pɑ̈ngi gen kì kelli gen." 
Obadiah1:12 Á kipe ngø ɑ ɑ́mïni pyëwí keny-ɑ ɑ́bëën ryɑ̈g kömi nyiimyëw kì Yeudiyɑ̀? Pyëwí pɑ di ceg mïnø, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́bëën ryɑ̈g kömi gen. Ge pɑ di ngedhi yi yïn keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi gen." 
Obadiah1:13 Yï di ceg-ɑ cögø yï pɑ kedhi kɑɑl jiɑ be gɑggi gen kí kwɑnyi jɑmmi gen kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi gen. 
Obadiah1:14 Yï pɑ di cungi kì ɑ́kɑrri yëëth, yï mɑng-ɑ tyëng-ɑ rengi. Ge pɑ di mɑ̈ggí tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kì cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi gen." 
Obadiah1:15 “Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑyɑ pödhh bënn ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Edöm, gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn, ólony ki göggi yïn. Yï ómëgg-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi yïn." 
Obadiah1:16 Jiɑ ɑ́cɑyɑ ki cɑ́y mø døngø kì wïj kïti kwërɑ. De pödhh-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ócɑyɑ thyew ki cɑ́y mø pëddi döng, ge óthumi ki thøø." 
Obadiah1:17 “Ódi ji møg-ɑ óbodh kì Kïti Dhɑyøn o óbëëdø ɑ́ kej kwër. Tyëng gøl Yɑgob ódøøg ki kwɑnyi piny-ɑ bɑ mi gen. 
Obadiah1:18 Gøl Yɑgob kí gøl Yosep óbëëdø ge nɑ mɑc; gøl Isøø órɑ̈b yi gen ni kenyi rɑ̈ɑ̈b wél yi mɑc, bong dhɑnhø men ɑ óbodh kì yije. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Obadiah1:19 “Tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ møg-ɑ ying wɑɑng wurlwɑl, piny Edöm ókwɑny yi gen. O Pelistiyɑ̀ ókwɑny yi tyëng gøl Yeudɑ̀ møg-ɑ thɑ́ kïtti wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Piny Eprɑim kí Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ókwɑny yi Isrɑil; Gilyɑd ókwɑny yi gøl Ben Yɑmïn." 
Obadiah1:20 Piny Pinikiyɑ̀ ókwɑny yi tyëng gøl Isrɑil møg-ɑ wɑɑng wuudø ge dwöög ɑ yïnø, e pinyɑni pïd-ɑ Dhɑrepɑth. Myërri piny Yeudiyɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, ókwɑny yi tyëng Yerusɑlem møg-ɑ ɑ́ying Sɑrdïs." 
Obadiah1:21 Jøg-ɑ nyi tyɑ̈mø kì Yerusɑlem ópɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Edöm, kɑ gø jɑɑg gen. Codhe o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree jyɑ̈ge ɑ́ rɑ̈dh.”" 
Jonah1:1 Kɑ Yönɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amitɑy köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel kinni," 
Jonah1:2 “Dhwöödh, kedhí Ninɑwɑ̀ kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng. Kɑ tyëng kɑɑlɑni köbbí cɑ́y-ɑ ócɑɑyɑ gen, mɑ́ orøøg gen nennɑ’ nennø.”" 
Jonah1:3 De Yönɑ̀ ɑ́yöd e kedh-ɑ pödhø me ying tung-ɑ kyeelø, e ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ́kedhi Yɑpɑ̀ kɑ óyïddø ki sɑpïnɑ̀ me kømi kedhi Tɑrcic. Kɑ ókïr yɑ̈y muuje, codhe kɑ odhwödhø ki yɑ̈yɑni, e kedh-ɑ kun lɑ̈ɑ̈we ree ki Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Jonah1:4 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j göjj-ɑ nɑɑm omelø ki yømø me teg, kɑ ɑpɑgø ódøngø kì nɑm ki menteg, kɑ sɑpïnɑ̀ ócyɑ̈ngø ki tørrø yi en." 
Jonah1:5 Kɑ jøkëw obwøgø ki mendwøng, kɑ men nyi ywøøg-ɑ kö jwøøg gøl gen. Aleeng gen jɑmm-ɑ yij yɑ̈y nɑm, o yɑ̈y yöne. Yönɑ̀ kedhi øn-ɑ piny kì thɑ sɑpïnɑ̀, kɑ óbuddø, kɑ ónenø." 
Jonah1:6 Kɑ yod kì kenyɑni yi jɑngi jøkëw, ɑköbbe gøn kinni, “Yïde ɑ cɑɑg nenø? Dhwöödh kwɑjjí jwøøg gøl wun men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwe, kɑ wɑ yiele.”" 
Jonah1:7 Kɑ ri gen köbbi gen kinni, “Kedhi wɑ be leng ki wél, o yod yi wɑ mɑ løge gööj men ɑ yïddi wɑ èn ki gïnrɑj.” Kɑ ge olëngø ki wél, ɑpɑ̈dhi wél ki Yönɑ̀." 
Jonah1:8 Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Köbbí wøn, yïn ɑ kɑ̈ni ki göj men? Gwøgí bɑ ngø? O yï kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ keny? O pödhi wun bɑ keny? O yï bɑ wɑ̈d jur ɑ́?”" 
Jonah1:9 Aköbbi gen yi Yönɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ bɑ Ibrì, o yɑ nyi mɑll-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg mɑl, ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j nɑɑm omelø geki piny-ɑ thwøwø.”" 
Jonah1:10 Kɑ ge köbbi yi Yönɑ̀ kinni ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈rø kì buti Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Keny-ɑ ɑ́rume kwøbi møgɑni, ɑbwøg jøgɑni ki mendwøng. Aköbbii yi gen kinni, “Yïde ɑ göög ki gïn ni men?”" 
Jonah1:11 Kɑ yømø ókedhø e ótëngø, ɑpyëjii yi gen kinni, “Á ngø ɑ göggi wøn yïn, o yømø noge?”" 
Jonah1:12 Aköbbe gïn kinni, “Kwɑnyu yɑn, kɑ yɑ leeng wun nɑm o yømø noge, mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni ryɑ̈g men ɑ́bï kömi wun kɑ göjɑ.”" 
Jonah1:13 De jøgɑni ɑ́yöd ge kyëw-ɑ wɑ̈g, kɑ yɑ̈y ódhɑ̈lø kyeew wɑ̈g yi gen, mɑ́ yømø ɑ́kedh e ceg-ɑ tëngø." 
Jonah1:14 Akwɑjji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen kinni, “Yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wø ko wëggí thøø kipe wëyi jɑɑl, kɑ cyën me pɑth ko cïb kömi wøn, mɑ́ yï ɑ́gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi yi yïn.”" 
Jonah1:15 Akwɑny gen Yönɑ̀ kɑ gø leeng gen nɑm. Kɑ ɑpɑgø ócungø. 
Jonah1:16 Kɑ jøgɑni obwøgø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki mendwøng. Angɑ̈ddi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi gen ki gëëdhi, kɑ ge óköngø." 
Jonah1:17 Rëjø me dwøng ókɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ Yönɑ̀ mwøøny yi rënyɑni. Kɑ Yönɑ̀ tyëg-ɑ cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g kí wɑ̈rr ɑ́dɑ̈g kì yij rënyɑni." 
Jonah2:1 Kɑ Yönɑ̀ ókwɑ̈jjø e ying-ɑ yij rëjø kinni," 
Jonah2:2 “Yï ɑ́kwɑjjɑ yɑ ying-ɑ yij orɑng yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ kwɑ̈jjɑ løøg yi yïn. Yɑ ɑ́ryeer yɑ ying-ɑ yij rörø, kɑ cwɑggɑ lïngi yi yïn." 
Jonah2:3 Yɑ ɑ́luudh yi yïn piny piny, yɑ ɑ́kïdhí piny tyeli nɑɑm omelø, yɑ ɑ́tyeg yi pï kì wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. Apɑgø tørr-ɑ ree kì kömɑ." 
Jonah2:4 Kɑ yɑ okööbø kinni, yɑ óngøl wɑ̈yɑ, yɑ pɑ wɑ̈nhi bølí; Kengí kwërø pɑ lidhɑ këti." 
Jonah2:5 Yɑ ɑ́mud yi pï; yɑ ɑ́mwøøny yi nɑɑm omelø; wïjɑ ɑ́myen yi luum nɑɑm omelø. 
Jonah2:6 Yɑ ɑ́ludhi piny thɑ́ kïttì; lɑ̈bø ree ɑ́cyëëge kömɑ gïti ɑtheer. De wëyɑ ɑ́dwöög wɑ̈g yi yïn, yïn ɑ Wɑ̈ɑ Jwøgɑ." 
Jonah2:7 Keny-ɑ ɑ́dhɑ̈ɑ̈rɑ, yɑ ɑ́pɑr-ɑ yïn, kɑ yï kwɑjjɑ, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ cwɑggɑ lïngi yi yïn, kì yij Kengí kwërø." 
Jonah2:8 Tyëng-ɑ mïdhi jwögg-ɑ bong per gen, ge ɑ́wiy-ɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng gen." 
Jonah2:9 De yɑ wör yɑ lejj-ɑ yïn; yï óngɑ̈ddɑ ki gëdhhì; kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́kwöngɑ mïdhi yi yɑn. Yïëdø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j.” 
Jonah2:10 Kɑ rënyɑni köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Angøøge Yönɑ̀ wɑ̈g keny-ɑ thwøwø. 
Jonah3:1 Kɑ Yönɑ̀ cigi köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Jonah3:2 “Dhwöödh kedhí Ninɑwɑ̀ kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng, kɑ ge köbbi møg-ɑ óköbbɑ yïn.”" 
Jonah3:3 Adhwödh Yönɑ̀ kɑ kedh-ɑ Ninɑwɑ̀ ni kɑ ɑ́köbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O Ninɑwɑ̀ ɑ́bëëd ɑ́ kɑɑl me dwøng cɑrø ki mendwøng, yije bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi dhɑnhø kɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈dh cyɑ̈ng ɑ́dɑ̈g." 
Jonah3:4 Kɑ Yönɑ̀ kedh-ɑ kɑɑlɑni, kɑ gø bɑ̈ɑ̈ne ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel, kɑ ócɑ̈gø töng ki kwøb kinni, “Ninɑwɑ̀ óryɑ̈g yi Jwøk bɑng cyɑ̈ng pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen.”" 
Jonah3:5 Kɑ wöni Jwøk yïëy yi tyëng Ninɑwɑ̀, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, i thuum ji bënn, kɑ ge rug gen ki ocwɑ̈llì ge bënn, cɑg kì ri møg-ɑ thønhø gïti ri jøg-ɑ døngø." 
Jonah3:6 Kɑ kwøbbɑni wɑ̈dh-ɑ yï rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Ninɑwɑ̀ kɑ odhwödhø kì wïj kwøme, ɑlunye lɑne wɑ̈g, kɑ ree lunye ki ocwɑ̈lø, kɑ pëgg-ɑ yij búr." 
Jonah3:7 Kɑ rɑ̈dh omuujø ki cigg, e ceg-ɑ tyëng Ninɑwɑ̀ kinni, “Møg-ɑ ɑ́ceg yi rɑ̈dh geki jøgdøngø ek: Ko di dhɑnhø me cyɑ̈mø ki gïïpiny, kɑ ko di gïn mɑdh. Kɑ dhög geki dyëg ko gøøny pɑ̈l be cɑm." 
Jonah3:8 Kɑ ji geki dhög rug gen ki ocwɑ̈llì. Kɑ Jwøk kwɑjji ki menteg, kɑ yëthi orøg wiy yi dhɑnhø bëne, kɑ bëëdø men-ɑ rɑj wiy," 
Jonah3:9 men-ɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëw Jwøk, kɑ lɑɑwe dwööge piny, kɑ ówïyø liny, o wɑ cög wɑ, wɑ pɑ thøw.”" 
Jonah3:10 Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi gen ɑ́lidh yi Jwøk; ɑ́lidhe kinni bëëdø men-ɑ rɑj, men-ɑ ɑ́beed yi gen ɑ́wiy yi gen. Codhe, ɑwiye gïn, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ cɑye ni kɑ ɑ́kööbe." 
Jonah4:1 Kɑ Yönɑ̀ mɑg yi liny ki mendwøng. 
Jonah4:2 Kɑ okööbø kinni, “Pɑth ki gïn-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi yɑn ɑnɑn ceth keny-ɑ ɑ́nudd yɑ ying-ɑ pödhi wøn, ɑ bɑnge ɑ́dwɑddɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈r Tɑrcic? Mɑ́ yɑ ngɑ̈ny wøw kinni yï bɑ Jwøng pyëwí yöd. O lɑ̈mpyëwí bong cöge." 
Jonah4:3 Anɑn kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, kwɑny wëyɑ, mɑ́ thøwɑ lɑ̈w kibøli nënnɑ.”" 
Jonah4:4 Kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggø kinni, “Yï mɑg yi liny kɑ per ngø? Dɑ dyër me pere mɑɑg yïn yi liny?”" 
Jonah4:5 Kɑ Yönɑ̀ kedh-ɑ wɑ̈g kì kɑɑlɑni kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, e kedh-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl. Kɑ ree gögge ki nyɑ ɑkɑnø kì kunɑni. Kɑ pëgg-ɑ thɑre kì tïbe e nenn-ɑ gïn-ɑ ócwöb kì kɑɑlɑni." 
Jonah4:6 Kɑ yɑdh megø pidh yi Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ bɑ̈dde peedhe, ge gwøg-ɑ tïbø me yije bëëd yi Yönɑ̀, o dële ngïnye. Kɑ Yönɑ̀ pyëwe ómïnø ki mendwøng yi yɑnhɑni," 
Jonah4:7 de kì bɑ̈ɑ̈rø cyɑ̈ng-ɑ kyeelø, kɑ Jwøk ókɑ̈nø ki twöngø, kɑ yɑnhɑni byere cɑm yi twöngɑni, kɑ owøwø." 
Jonah4:8 Keny-ɑ ɑ́tuul cɑ̈ng, kɑ yømø me lëëdh ocödø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kuni wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kɑ Yönɑ̀ kømi nɑ̈gø yi lëdhi piny. Kɑ pyëwe tyer-ɑ thøø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lɑ̈w thøwɑ kibøli nënnɑ.”" 
Jonah4:9 Aköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yïí dɑ dyër me ywöngí kiper yɑdh men?” Alöggi Yönɑ̀ kinni, “Yɑ køm-ɑ nɑ̈gø yi rummi yɑnhɑni!”" 
Jonah4:10 Aköbbii yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ywøg-ɑ yɑdh me nuti pidh-ɑ yi yïn. O ɑ́twïy-ɑ wɑ̈r ɑ́kyel kɑ othøø kì wɑ̈r-ɑ kyeelø." 
Jonah4:11 O pyëwɑ di dhɑ̈le’ dï ki lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki Ninɑwɑ̀, eni kɑɑl-ɑ dwøng ni men? O men-ɑ́ yije dɑ othønhø mø yï gen bɑ̈r, mø kwɑnni gen pöödh ɑ́lïp miyø kí pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew, geki dhög kí dyëg!”" 
Micah1:1 Men bɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́mëgge Miikɑ̀, jɑl Möreceth, kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́jyɑ̈ɑ̈g Yöthɑm, kí Akɑɑdh, kí Kedhekiyɑ̀ gɑ rɑ̈nhi Yeudiyɑ̀. Wöönɑni ɑ́kɑ̈lle kì Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ geki Yerusɑlem." 
Micah1:2 Lïng wun, wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi piny; kyënu yïthhi wun, wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi piny. Rɑ̈ji wun ónyodh yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Lïng wun! Kööbø e ying-ɑ pɑɑre mɑl." 
Micah1:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ódhwönhø kì pɑɑre e bï-ɑ piny. Óbï piny kɑ ócyɑ̈dhø kì wɑ̈thi kïttì. 
Micah1:4 Kïttì óleny kì thɑ́ tyelle ni dwɑ̈lø kenyi lenye yi mɑc; Kɑ ge rïng-ɑ yij tör ni pïg rïngi kì wïj ótong. 
Micah1:5 Møgɑni ócwöb, mɑ́ gøl Yɑgob ɑ́røngi, kɑ dhø Jwøk pyem yi gen. Á men ɑ ree ówɑɑng kipe orøøg Isrɑil? Pɑth ki Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ kiree! Á men-ɑ ree ówɑɑng kipe kɑ̀ kwɑ̈jji Yeudiyɑ̀ ki jwögg-ɑ pɑth? Pɑth ki Yerusɑlem kiree!" 
Micah1:6 Bene ɑ bɑnge kööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ógwøg yi yɑn e nɑ tuggì møg-ɑ óröör piny, tuggɑni ócøørɑ yij tör, kɑ tyelli udde kuunyɑ wɑ̈g. Kɑ kej kɑɑlɑni ogöögø ki pwödh." 
Micah1:7 Ngïjji jwögge bënn órɑ̈b ki mɑc, kɑ kwï gen tørri, kɑ ge weddi. Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́mëggi ɑ́mɑ̈jji keng órɑ̈b ki mɑc. Ge ɑ́mëggi Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ gɑ møg kwɑjji nyöödø, o ge ceg kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈lø yi tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii, o ge muuj ɑ́mɑ̈jji keng kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
Micah1:8 Codhe kɑ Miikɑ̀ okööbø kinni, “Kì bɑng menɑni yɑ óywöngi ki ywøøg mwög, kɑ yɑ okïïwø ni tulø. Yɑ ócyɑ̈dhi tyellɑ bong wɑr, riɑ bong ógødh." 
Micah1:9 Sɑmɑriyɑ̀ ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki cɑyø, óni ngɑn ree di kedø mɑ nɑ̈ɑ̈g. Ryɑ̈ngɑni wɑ̈nh-ɑ dïdyëri Yerusɑlem kɑɑl jiɑ.”" 
Micah1:10 Tyɑmee ko köbbu tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kì Gɑth, wu ko ywöngi kinni tek. Wu tyëng Bet Leɑprɑ̀, ngyellu ri wun kì piny gwög, wu nyodh-ɑ bɑɑri nyingi wun." 
Micah1:11 Wu tyëng Sɑpir, töngu yïnø wu cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw ki ɑyɑ̈r. Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Dhɑnɑɑn ko pɑ̈nyi kedhi wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl gen. Keny-ɑ ólïngi wun tyëng Betedhel ge óywöngø, ngɑ̈nyu wøw kinni bong keny me yömmi yi wun kì kunɑni." 
Micah1:12 Tyëng Mɑröth, opɑ̈wi gen ying-ɑ mɑl ge yïd-ɑ yielø, mɑ́ ryɑ̈g ɑ́bï piny e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ wɑ̈nh-ɑ dïdyëri Yerusɑlem." 
Micah1:13 Wu tyëng Lɑkic, twööju kyënyì ri yɑ̈ɑ̈th. Wu ɑ́ngøy-ɑ orøøg Isrɑil, codhe kɑ Yerusɑlem orøngø thyew kì bɑng wun." 
Micah1:14 Wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, dhwödh wun kì Möreceth Gɑth. Rɑ̈nhi Isrɑil pɑ køny yi kɑɑl Akdhïb." 
Micah1:15 Wun ɑ tyëng Mɑrecɑ̀, wu ócïb cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, kɑ kɑɑl wun mɑg; kɑɑl-ɑ nyodh döngi Isrɑil órengi be pɑ̈nø kì órøngi kït kì Adulɑm." 
Micah1:16 Wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, nyɑ̈ɑ̈ru yëyyi wun wɑ̈g kì wɑ̈thi wun, o wɑ̈thi wun budh gen ni wïj cor órɑj, mɑ́ nyigi wun møg-ɑ mɑɑr yi wun ókøøl yïnø gɑ ɑmɑgg." 
Micah2:1 Ri wun dɑ cyën, wu tyëng-ɑ nyi lɑng wɑ̈r wu rømm-ɑ gwøgi gïnrɑj! O kenyi ru wøw, o wu nyi møølu be gwøgi gïnrɑj menɑni, kenyi yïddi wun ki kej wɑng." 
Micah2:2 Kɑ̀ dwɑddu pwödh, ge ceg kɑ kɑbø, kɑ̀ dwɑddu ud ge ceg kɑ kwɑnyø yi wun, bong gï gøl bodh ki kwɑnyø yi wun." 
Micah2:3 Codhe, ɑkööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Wu göjjɑ’ ryɑ̈g, wu pɑ bodh. Wɑ̈thi wun ócungi yi ɑkørrɑni; wu pɑ cigi cyɑ̈dhø wu tɑ̈dø." 
Micah2:4 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, ryɑ̈g men-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kömi wun ócög ɑ́ wɑ́j, kɑ wɑ́jɑni wör yi ji gɑ wörri ɑbɑɑrø kinni, Wɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g ki gɑ̈ngi dwøng! Pinyee ɑ́kwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì yïee, kɑ gø mëgge tyëng-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈l wɑ, wɑ bɑ ɑmɑgg.”" 
Micah2:5 Keny-ɑ ódwöög jii Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kun-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen, óbong keny me yod yi yïn, mɑ́ kɑ̈lli wun ópɑ̈ɑ̈dh." 
Micah2:6 Yɑ nyii köbbø yi ji kinni, “Wø ko jud ki kwøbb-ɑ kømmi yi yïn ɑnɑn!" 
Micah2:7 Yï orumø kinni tyëng Isrɑil ri gen dɑ cyën? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ɑ́ceg-ɑ wïyø ki lɑ̈ɑ̈mø? Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ce nyi kømm-ɑ kwøbb-ɑ døj ki tyëng-ɑ gøggi dyër?” 
Micah2:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggi kinni, “Wu pɑ̈r-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi jiɑ ni tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, ge dwöög kì kej liny ki tɑrø, de wu yuud, wu yïd-ɑ gen kipe lunyi ógudhi gen wɑ̈g kì ri gen." 
Micah2:9 Tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun wɑ̈g kì yethi uddi gen udd-ɑ døøj, kɑ gïgdøj møg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ mëggi othønhø kwɑny yi wun kì yï gen, kɑ ge ocögø ge pɑ döggu gen." 
Micah2:10 Dhwödh wun, kedh wun, keny pɑth ki kej ywömø kì yï wun këti, keny ɑ́rënyi yi gööj orøøg wun." 
Micah2:11 “Ji dwɑdd-ɑ jɑltöng men-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi e okööbø ki kwøbbi pyed yøw kinni, ‘Møgi oløg óbëëd e gïïr kì yï wun.’" 
Micah2:12 “De kwï ɑ́kyëll-ɑ ódöng kì ri tyëng Isrɑil ócøngɑ kej ɑ́kyel ni dyëg kenyi kud gen ri gen. Piny wun ódøøg ki pɑ̈ngø yi ji, ni tör me pɑ̈ng yi dyëg.”" 
Micah2:13 Ge óyïëbbi ki yöö yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l wɑ̈g kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen." 
Micah3:1 Lïng wun, wu jɑggi Isrɑil. Pɑth ki wun ɑ di bëëd wu gøgg-ɑ dyër?" 
Micah3:2 De wude ɑ yöd ɑ́ wun ɑ mɑɑn gïndøj, o wu mɑɑru gwøgi gïnrɑj? Wu nɑ lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l; jiɑ dëlli gen ɑ́yöödu wɑ̈g, kɑ rïnggi gen ngyëëdu wɑ̈g kì ri cu gen." 
Micah3:3 Jiɑ ɑ́cɑm yi wun. Rïnggi gen ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lu wɑ̈g kɑ cu gen kebbi wun ni rïngø men kïdhi dɑg. 
Micah3:4 Obëën bøli kenyɑni, wu óywøøg kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de kwøbbi wun koo løøge, mɑ́ wu gøgg-ɑ gïgrijjø." 
Micah3:5 Jiɑ wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́rënyi yi jøtöng mø pyed, møg-ɑ nyi köbbi tyëng-ɑ thödhi gen ki ngyëny kinni, i piny dɑ mër, kɑ tyëng-ɑ pɑ muujø nyi köbbi yi gen kinni, i liny obëënø." 
Micah3:6 Kì bɑng menɑni wu pɑ cigi töng këti, mɑ́ wu ówiy piny yi wëyi Jwøk; bong gïg-ɑ ónyudhi wun kì yethi lɑ̈g këti, mɑ́ jiɑ ɑ́wëny yi wun." 
Micah3:7 Jøtöng møgɑni óyɑ̈r, kɑ ge døøg-ɑ be cyɑ̈dhø wɑ̈thi gen kuul gen piny, mɑ́ ge nyii rɑ̈ngø kɑ nyi bong-ɑ gïn nyudhi gen yi Jwøk." 
Micah3:8 Yɑ ɑ́thödhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wëye geki tegø kí lögg-ɑ dyër, o yɑ köbb-ɑ tyëng Isrɑil bɑ̈jji gen." 
Micah3:9 Lïngu kwøbbɑ, wun ɑ jɑggi Isrɑil, wu tyëng-ɑ mɑɑn dyër, wun ɑ nyi wil dyër kɑ løgu bɑ̈jjø." 
Micah3:10 Yerusɑlem kɑɑl Jwøk ger yi wun kɑ remø, ɑ́løgu kej nɑ̈g, kí kej mød ki ji." 
Micah3:11 Jɑggi Isrɑil, wu kwɑjji kɑ ngyëny kɑ̀ nennu gøny kì burø, o dyër nyi løg yi wun ɑ́ bɑ̈jjø. Wu tyëng kwër, cigg göög yi wun gɑ møg ri gen yïddi yi wun ki ngyëny. Wun jøtöng, wu nyi rɑ̈ngø kɑ per kinni o wu thödhi ki ngyëny, o wu bënn, wu wej-ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni nud kì kelli wun, wu okööbø kinni, “Bong bɑ̈jjø men-ɑ ócwöb kiperee, mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nud kì kellee!”" 
Micah3:12 Kì bɑng menɑni, Dhɑyøn ógöögø ki wɑɑg pur, kɑ Yerusɑlem ogöögø ki thur, kɑ wïj kïti Kengø, ogöögø ki thïm." 
Micah4:1 Kì yethi cyɑ̈ngg-ɑ óbï, kïn-ɑ köme ógeer Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ógöögø ɑ́ kïn-ɑ pëddi bɑ̈r wïje ókɑ̈ɑ̈l mɑl kibøli kïttì bënn. Pödhh mø gïïr óbï ge rɑɑd-ɑ wïje," 
Micah4:2 ge okööbø kinni, “Bïu kedhi wɑ wïj kïti Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yij Kengi Jwøøg Isrɑil. Wɑ ónyudhe gïn-ɑ dwɑdde kinni o gwøg yi wɑ, wɑ ódøøg be cyɑ̈dhø kì yethi yëthe. Mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pwönyi e ying-ɑ Yerusɑlem, kööbø kì jie e ying-ɑ Dhɑyøn." 
Micah4:3 Akørr-ɑ kelli jurrì bënn ólidh yi en, cɑgg ɑ́ ɑkørri jurr-ɑ lɑ̈wi. Pilli gen óløg gen göjjì, kɑ tønggi gen løg gen pɑlli kɑj ki byel. Ge pɑ cigi nyɑɑg këti kinni tek, ri gen pɑ cigi gen pwönyø ki liny." 
Micah4:4 Ji bënn óbëëdø ki mër; kɑ men pëgg-ɑ thɑ yɑdhe kì yij bɑɑg oløge; o bong ngɑn böggi yi en këti.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk, kinni gï ógwøge." 
Micah4:5 Pödhh mɑll-ɑ jwöggi gen, ge lïng-ɑ kwøbbi gïn. De wøn, wø mɑll-ɑ Jwøøg wøn, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o bɑ en ɑ kwøbbe lïngi yi wøn gïti ɑtheer." 
Micah4:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Bøli kenyɑni ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, eni bøli keny-ɑ ócøngɑ ji-ɑ ɑ́cɑy yi yɑn, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi kì yïnø." 
Micah4:7 Ge nɑ ngöll mø ying kun lɑ̈wi ki pɑc, de ɑ́kyëll-ɑ ɑ́döng óthödhɑ ki tegø, kɑ ge gwøg yi yɑn gɑ pödhø me dwøng. Ge ójɑɑg yi yɑn kì wïj Kïti Dhɑyøn gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Micah4:8 Yïn ɑ Yerusɑlem, keny-ɑ nenni Jwøk jie ni jɑlkwɑ̈yø kenyi nenne dyëge, yï ódøøg ki gwøg yïn ɑ́ kɑɑl jyɑ̈ɑ̈gø ni keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd cøn." 
Micah4:9 Yïn ɑ Yerusɑlem, yïde ɑ ywöngi ki ywøng-ɑ rɑɑj cɑrø, de yï nɑ ngɑn yïe bong rɑ̈dh? O yïde ɑ rɑngi ni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny? Jøgdøngi tøg burí ɑ́ceg-ɑ thøø?" 
Micah4:10 Wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem, wu órɑngi kɑ wu ócurrø ni ngɑndhɑjø me pɑ̈dhi piny, mɑ́ wu ódhwödh kì kɑɑl, kɑ wu kïdhi pɑ̈l. Wu ókïdhi Bɑbïl, de kì kunɑni wu óyiel yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Micah4:11 Yïn ɑ Yerusɑlem, jurrì mø gïïr cong-ɑ lìnyi gen kipe nyɑɑg ki yïn, ge okööbø kinni, “Yerusɑlem di dwɑddø kinni pɑ̈ɑ̈dhe. Kɑɑl menɑni ólidh yi wɑ e ywëdhø.”" 
Micah4:12 De jurrì møgɑni, gïn-ɑ pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kwïj yi gen. Gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cøng gen ni byel kenyi cøng gen yij rɑrø, kwïj yi gen e bɑ kipe kinni o ge cɑy." 
Micah4:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem, dhwödh wun, kɑ wu kedhu be cɑyi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø! Wu ógwøg yi yɑn wu teg ni wɑnh-ɑ thwønh men-ɑ tùnge óyiedhø ge bedh ni bethi mɑy, o dɑddi tyelle teg ni ngyënyø dilɑl. Jurrì mø gïïr ótyɑm yi wun, kɑ kɑ̈rri gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kɑbbi gen thërri yɑn yi wun, yɑ Wïlɑ̈bø bëne.”" 
Micah5:1 Wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem, cøngu liny wun! Wɑ ɑ́tyeg! Jɑngi Isrɑil köme opɑ̈ɑ̈rø!" 
Micah5:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Betleem Eprɑtɑ̀, yï bɑ ɑ́kyel kì kelli kɑ̈dd-ɑ pëddi thïnh kì Yeudiyɑ̀, de jɑngi Isrɑil ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn ɑ rií, kì kelli kɑ̈ll-ɑ wönø’ weenø.”" 
Micah5:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ówiye cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, gïti keny-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi ngɑn-ɑ pɑ̈dhi piny ki wɑ̈de. Codhe cyee, o tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ yïnø rebe ki jii gen." 
Micah5:4 Keny-ɑ óbëëne, jie ójɑɑg yi en ki tegø me kɑ̈ɑ̈l yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, geki mɑ̈ɑ̈r Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; ɑ bɑ Jwøk kiree. Jie óbëëd e bong gïjø me böggi yi gen, mɑ́ dönge óyod yi ji bënn kì kömi piny," 
Micah5:5 o ókɑ̈ni ki mër. Keny-ɑ óbëën tyëng Acuur be mɑnyi pödhee, kɑ ge pödhh-ɑ kelli linyee, pëjj-ɑ pëddi tegø kì kellee óör yi wɑ yï gen be nyɑɑg ki gen." 
Micah5:6 Acuur piny Nimröd ójɑɑg yi gen ki tegø, wɑ óyiel yi gen kì cingi Acuur keny-ɑ óbëëne be mɑnyi pödhee." 
Micah5:7 Tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ óbodh, óni thöjj møg ör yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì kelli jurrì, o ge óni onywiyì kì kömi lum. Ge ómïdh-ɑ yi Jwøk, pɑth ki dhɑnhø ɑ ómïdhi gen." 
Micah5:8 De tyëng Isrɑil møg-ɑ döngi kelli jurrì mø gïïr, óni ngur kì kelli lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l, ni wɑ̈d ngur kì kelli dyëg, kɑ̀ pɑ̈ɑ̈re kelli gen, gï nyi ngølle’ ngøllø gɑ thullì, bong gïn yïëdø." 
Micah5:9 De Isrɑil tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii ótyɑm yi en, tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii óthumi bënn." 
Micah5:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kyënyi linyí ónɑ̈g yi yɑn, kɑ yɑ̈thi linyí tørrɑ." 
Micah5:11 Dörr-ɑ korri pödhí ócøørɑ piny, kɑ myërri pödhí rënyɑ." 
Micah5:12 Wɑ̈lli wun órënyɑ, kɑ jøyenhi wun nɑ̈gɑ." 
Micah5:13 Ngïjji jwöggi wun ótørrɑ, kɑ yïkki wun dhurɑ piny. Gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi wun ki cinggi wun, pɑ cigi mɑllø yi wun këti." 
Micah5:14 Löjji Aceerɑ̀, jwøng-ɑ dhɑjø ómøddɑ piny kì pödhí, kɑ kɑ̈ddí rënyɑ." 
Micah5:15 Jurr-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ nuti lïngi dhøgɑ, ócɑy yi yɑn ki rɑ̈ji pyëwɑ.”" 
Micah6:1 Lïng wun ki møg-ɑ kwøb yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì ri Isrɑil. Dhwöödh, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gøny gønyí kì bøli kïttì, kɑ wiy cwɑggí lïngi yi ótøng." 
Micah6:2 Kïttì, wun ɑ ɑ́wöni weenø wu ying-ɑ kömi piny, lïngu gøøny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïe dɑ gøny ki tyëng Isrɑil, jie." 
Micah6:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ rɑj, ɑ ɑ́göggɑ wun, jiɑ? Wu ɑ́jud yi yɑn kɑ ngø? Løøgu møgɑ." 
Micah6:4 Wu ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì Rïp; wu ɑ́yielɑ kì yij bɑ̈ɑ̈ngø; wu ɑ́örɑ Mosɑ̀, geki Aɑron, kí Miryɑm, o wu pyejji yi gen." 
Micah6:5 Pɑru gïg-ɑ ɑ́dwɑddi göggi wun yi Bɑlɑk rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Moɑb, kí kër-ɑ ɑ́løøg kwøbbe yi Bɑlɑɑm. Pɑru gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb kì yöö wu dhwödh-ɑ kɑɑl Álwiy wu kedh-ɑ Gilgɑl. Pɑru gïgɑni bënn, o gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yɑn kiper yieli wun, yod yi wun.”" 
Micah6:6 Á ngø ɑ ókɑ̈ɑ̈l yi yɑn keny-ɑ óbëënɑ bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j be mɑllii? Bïɑ yïe yɑ kwøll-ɑ wɑ̈dhh ówöbb gɑ gënh-ɑ nyi rɑ̈b? 
Micah6:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ómïni keny-ɑ ómuujɑ en ki dyëg mø gïïr? Pyëwe ómïnø ke muujɑ en ki møøw dhetun me gïïr cɑrø? Muujɑ men-ɑ́ nyɑɑr yijɑ, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø ɑ́ men gøøm bøli orøgɑ?" 
Micah6:8 Pɑth, gïn-ɑ døj ɑ́rum ki köbbi wɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en kì yïee bɑ gøggi dyër, kí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men pɑ lwënyi, geki bëëdø ki möölø kì bøli Jwøgee." 
Micah6:9 Böggi Jwøk døøj, bɑ peli wïj. Cwɑggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j olïngø kì kɑɑl e okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun, wu tyëng-ɑ cugø kì dïkɑɑl!" 
Micah6:10 Kɑ̈rr-ɑ yethi uddi jøgi orøg ɑ́yod yi gen kɑ wëënyø. Ge ɑ́ceg-ɑ gwem ki ji kì kɑ̈jji ngyew, o gïn ni menɑni mɑɑn yi yɑn." 
Micah6:11 Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m kidï ki tyëng-ɑ gwëmø ki ji? 
Micah6:12 Tyëngkɑ̈ri wun ruj-ɑ ɑbuur, o wu bɑ tyëngpyed bënn." 
Micah6:13 Adɑ́ yɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi cyee ki rënyi kɑ̈rri wun, o ryɑ̈g göjjɑ’ wun kipe orøng-ɑ gøggi yi wun." 
Micah6:14 Wu ócyɑ̈mø de wu pɑ yɑ̈ng, yethi wun ócög ge olɑwø. Wu ócungø ki jɑmmì, de ge órënyi yi liny." 
Micah6:15 Wu ópurø ki byel, de wu pɑ kɑ̈jø ki byel. Wu óbïïjø ki møw, de wu pɑ gïnyø ki møw. Wu óbïïjø ki møgi oløg, de wu pɑ mɑ̈dhø ki møgi oløg." 
Micah6:16 Gïgɑni ócwöb kipe kɑ ɑ́ngøy wun gïgrijjø møg-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi Rɑ̈dh Omrì, geki wɑ̈de Rɑ̈dh Akɑɑb. Wu órënyi yi yɑn, mɑ́ wu nudd wu gøgg-ɑ gïg ni møgɑni. Wu óbong per wun kì yï dhɑnhø bëne. Wu ógɑggi yi jurr-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
Micah7:1 Yɑ ɑ́gɑ̈g! Yɑ pɑ̈r ki ngɑn ree di kɑ̈j, me kedhi kö yɑdh be yɑb ki nywøli yɑdh møg cɑm yi en, de ɑ́jɑd kì kö yɑnhɑni. Nywøli yɑnhɑni rumø ki pønø bënn." 
Micah7:2 Bong ji møg döngø ki pönhï, mø gøggi gïg-ɑ dwɑddi yi Jwøk. Bong ngɑn mïdhi kwøbbi Jwøk. Men yɑb-ɑ yöö men nɑ̈ge ki dhɑnhø, kɑ men nyi nɑ̈g yi men." 
Micah7:3 Ge ɑ́wɑ̈dh bënn ki gøggi gïgrijjø. Jøgdøngi mïïri geki jɑgg yɑb-ɑ kwɑjjø ki ngyëny. Ngɑn cinge di tegø nyi cwøl-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi en, codhe o ge rum gen ki yuu-ɑ yodii." 
Micah7:4 Møg-ɑ pëddi døøjø kì kelli gen, pɑ̈r ki thïm koodh. Møg-ɑ døøj cɑrø kì kelli gen pɑ̈r ki lum me ngɑ̈dø ki ji. Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑɑy ji yi Jwøk ɑ́bï, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi jɑl-ɑ kwɑy gen, ɑ løg jɑltöng. Anɑn wɑ̈thi gen ɑ́cungi." 
Micah7:5 Yï ko yïëy ki kwøbbi wɑɑd wun. Mɑ̈dhí ko gɑ̈nní. Korrí dhøgí cɑgg e bɑ cyëgí ɑ kööbø ki yïn. 
Micah7:6 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, ji ógwøøg dhëgg yi nyigi gen. Womɑ̈nn ópëmø ki dhøggi mëëg gen. Kɑ mɑ̈nn-ɑ thønhø nyi ceg-ɑ wërø ki mëëg cwøwi gen; ngeti mɑ̈ni dhɑnhø bɑ ngeti gøl gen." 
Micah7:7 De yɑ ónenn-ɑ yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; yɑ ónenni yï Jwøk, mɑ́ yɑ rum yïëyø kinni yɑ óyiel yi en. Kwɑ̈jjɑ ólïngi yi Jwøgɑ." 
Micah7:8 Bong gïn pere thwøg tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Wø ɑ́ceg-ɑ pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, de wø ódhwödh këti. Wø pɑ̈r ki ji mø ying yij muudhø ɑnɑn, de wø óthödhi ki cɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Micah7:9 Wø ɑ́røngi kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o pyëwe rɑɑj ɑnɑn, de cɑ́yi wøn ceg kɑ yïëyø yi wøn ceth, gïti keny-ɑ ólidhe kwøbbi wøn, kɑ bɑ̈jjø løge dyër. Wø ókɑ̈ɑ̈le yij cɑr, wø óngïnø ceth gïti keny-ɑ óyiele wøn." 
Micah7:10 Codhe, o tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø lïdhi gen ki ɑyɑ̈ɑ̈r gen. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́köbbi wøn kinni, “Ágøne Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun?” Ge ólɑr yi wøn. Kömi gen ócyɑ̈dhi ni gøngì kì yethi yëëth." 
Micah7:11 Tyëng Yerusɑlem, bøli keny-ɑ ódøøg dörri kɑɑl wun ki gerø këti ɑ́bï. Pödhi wun ódøngi kì bøli kenyɑni." 
Micah7:12 Jii wun ódwöög yï wun ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùng bënn. Ge óbï ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Acuur kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl, kí Rïp kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí myërr-ɑ kömi Nɑm Porɑt, kí kömi nɑ̈mmi omelø møg-ɑ lɑ̈wi, kí ngɑ̈thi kïttì." 
Micah7:13 De piny ógöögø ki ryɑng yi gööj orøøg ji-ɑ bëëdø kì yije. 
Micah7:14 Kwɑy jií, kwɑy ji-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, cɑgg ge ying yij thïm ɑnɑn, keny me cyɑ̈ɑ̈m ki lum nud kì bɑdhhi gen. Wiy ge cɑ̈mmi gen Bɑcɑn kì Gilyɑd, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Micah7:15 Göög ki gïïngɑ̈ngø, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ni kɑ ɑ́göög kɑ̈ge dööng, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈l wøn wɑ̈g kì Rïp." 
Micah7:16 Jurr-ɑ kyeelø ri gen pɑ cigi gen lejjø, keny-ɑ óliidh gïïngɑ̈ngø møgɑni yi gen, cɑgg tegi gen dwøng ni ngø! Ge óbëëd ge yɑ̈rø, dhøggi gen pɑ tug yi gen, nyingi gen ókum yi gen." 
Micah7:17 Ge ómulli kì piny yij tør ni thöllì, ge óbï wɑ̈g kì yethi dörri gen dëlli gen okïrrø. Ge ódwöög kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j Jwøgee, ge ceg-ɑ böggø." 
Micah7:18 Bong Jwøk megø me ni yïn, yïn ɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; orøøg tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bødh ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈ny yi yïn. Pyëwí pɑ nyi cög e rɑɑj ki gen kipe orøøg gen. Yï pɑ nyi mïdhi ki ɑter, de pyëwí med ki wøn, kɑ wø nyi nyudhí mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií men-ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi." 
Micah7:19 Pyëwí ócigi lɑ̈ɑ̈mø ki wøn, orøøg wøn óywööny yi yïn piny ki tyellí, kɑ luudh yi yïn tyeli nɑm thɑ́ pï." 
Micah7:20 Tɑri pyëwí geki mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mií men-ɑ pɑ nyi lwënyi, ɑ́nyudhí jií, ɑ løg kwɑrri Abrɑhɑm geki Yɑgob, ni kɑ ɑ́köbbí kweyyi wøn kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Nahum1:1 Men bɑ wööni Jwøk kipe Ninɑwɑ̀, møgɑni ɑ́nyudhi Nɑum jɑl Elköc ge nɑ lɑ̈g." 
Nahum1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bɑ Jwøk me pëddi ki ɑter, tyëng-ɑ bɑny kwøbbe nyi cɑye’ cɑyø; tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyi cɑye’ cɑyø ki rɑ̈ji pyëwe." 
Nahum1:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe pɑ nyi jwɑn rënyø, o yïe dɑ tegø me dwøng, o ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́bɑ̈jji pɑ nyi wiy yi en gø pɑ cɑye. Keny-ɑ cyɑ̈dhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, nyi kwödd-ɑ yi ɑtunø, o pøøl bɑ tør tyelle." 
Nahum1:4 Nɑɑm omelø nyi köbbe köbbø kɑ othwøwø kɑ nɑ̈mm-ɑ thønhø gï nyi göjje dwönø. Piny Bɑcɑn ɑ́thwøw. Kïti Kɑrmel ɑ́göög ki ɑyɑw, kɑ okøggi Lubnɑn othøø." 
Nahum1:5 Kïtt-ɑ døngø nyii kïïrø kì bøle, kɑ kïtt-ɑ thønhø onøyø kì bøle. Piny nyi ceg-ɑ onhɑ̈nh kenyi bëën Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kömi piny kí ji-ɑ yije bënn ceg-ɑ kïïrø." 
Nahum1:6 Á men ɑ cuggi cung kì bøle, kɑ̀ rënyi pyëwe ki menteg? Linye lyel nɑ mɑc, kɑ tuggì nyi nyønge, kɑ ge ogöögø ki búr." 
Nahum1:7 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j døj, jie nyi kore korø kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑj, tyëng-ɑ nyi yömmi yïe, nyi kongge’ konggø." 
Nahum1:8 De tyëng-ɑ nyi pëmø, ómud yi en ki bɑɑyø, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ócyeede yij muudhø." 
Nahum1:9 Á kipe ngø ɑ nywɑ̈ggu dhøggi wun Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Wu ónɑ̈g yi en. Bong ngɑn nyi pyem dhøge ki tyel mø gïïr. 
Nahum1:10 Wu órɑ̈b yi mɑc ni koodh geki lum-ɑ thwøwø! 
Nahum1:11 Ninɑwɑ̀, yijí ɑ́bëën wɑ̈g yi dhɑnhø me yije pɑ̈ng yi rummì, men gøggi gïgrijjø, me rumø kipe göggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki rɑj." 
Nahum1:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie, tyëng Isrɑil ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd tyëng Acuur ge teg, o ge gïïr, ge ótyëg ki nɑ̈gø. Wun ɑ jiɑ, wu ɑ́göjjɑ orɑng me dwøng, de wu pɑ cigɑ cɑyø." 
Nahum1:13 Anɑn ɑcebbi Acuur ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì muddi wun, wu ógöönyɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi töjjì.”" 
Nahum1:14 Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kipe tyëng Acuur ek: “Yï gen óbong kwɑrr møg-ɑ ólɑg kɑ̈jji gen. Ngïjji jwöggi gen møg-ɑ yethi kenggi gen órënyɑ. Acuur ógwøøgɑ ɑ́ rörri ji, mɑ́ e pɑ myëër ki bëëdø e onëënø.”" 
Nahum1:15 Ngeti wöödø ɑ bï ɑcɑ̀, e cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈thi kïttì, e kɑ̈ll-ɑ wöndøj! Bï-ɑ be kwøbi wööni tyɑ̈mø! Tuug yïn ɑ Yeudiyɑ̀, gwøg møg-ɑ ɑ́köngí Jwøk cøn, mɑ́ kömí pɑ cigi pɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi tyëngrijjø. Ge ɑ́thumi kinni tweet!" 
Nahum2:1 Ninɑwɑ̀ kömí opɑ̈ɑ̈rø! Ngɑn-ɑ yïe di teng-ɑ kedhhi yïn ɑ́wɑ̈nhi, Göög ki dör mø korrí rií! Kor yöö! Cwed rií kipe liny!" 
Nahum2:2 (Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j køm-ɑ dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Isrɑil dwöögø, o døøge keje ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde e nuti yɑgø yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø.)" 
Nahum2:3 Liny tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø köddi gen bɑ didïggì o ge rug-ɑ ógudh mø kwɑrø. Ri gen tyeeny gen kipe liny! Yɑ̈thi liny mø gen mëënyø nɑ mɑc! Kyënyi gen ceg-ɑ otɑ̈m kipe liny. 
Nahum2:4 Yɑ̈thi liny mø gen cørr-ɑ yethi yëëth, ge nyi rengi gen, o ge nyi dwöög gen kì yethi ódɑ̈rri kɑɑl. Ge mëënyø nɑ ɑ́menyø, ge ceg-ɑ ogwel ni mɑl." 
Nahum2:5 Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Acuur jyɑ̈gge ɑ́cwøle, ge ɑ́bï yïe ge ócyerrø. Tyëg ɑ́jwɑni kömi döri kɑɑl kɑ ge cïb-ɑ piny ki gënggi ngyënyø møg gëng gen ri gen." 
Nahum2:6 Ótïngø ɑ́mög, gøldwøng yije ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø" 
Nahum2:7 Bɑ̈rɑ̈dh ɑ́kɑ̈l ɑ́ ɑmɑg, de bɑ̈ngge, bɑ̈ngg-ɑ mɑ̈nn ywøg-ɑ gøn, ge lengg-ɑ ri gen kì piny." 
Nahum2:8 Ninɑwɑ̀ nɑ luy me pïge rengi wɑ̈g, kɑ ɑ́rengi jie wɑ̈g, ge ócwølle kinni, “Cungi wun! Cungi wun!” De bong ngɑn-ɑ ólïïdh ngɑ̈je." 
Nahum2:9 Yɑg wun ɑ́tegø! Yɑg wun dhɑb! Kɑɑlɑni kɑ̈re bong cöge! 
Nahum2:10 Ninɑwɑ̀ ɑ́rënyi, ɑ́döng ɑ́ ryɑng! Ji ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, dëlli gen ceg-ɑ kïïrø, bong tegø kì yï gen këti." 
Nahum2:11 Ágøne Ninɑwɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e nɑ ød ngurrì, keny-ɑ́ yije ɑ́piidh nywøli ngurrì kun nyi kedh yi thwøønh ngur geki mɑdhe e bong gïn tɑg yi gen kipe nyigi gen?" 
Nahum2:12 Ngur nywøle ɑ́mɑ̈gge ki lɑ̈yy, cyëge ɑ́mɑ̈gge thyew, øde pɑ̈ng yi rïng." 
Nahum2:13 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ bɑ ngɑn mɑ̈n ki yïn! Yɑ̈thi linyí rɑ̈bɑ’ rɑ̈bø, jølinyí ónɑ̈g kì yij liny. Jɑmm-ɑ ɑ́kwɑny yi yïn kì yï tyëng-ɑ kyeelø kwɑnyɑ’ kwɑnyø. Kwøbbi tegí pɑ cigi lïngø këti kì kömi piny.”" 
Nahum3:1 Yï ɑ́cyen, yï pödhi remø, pönh-ɑ pɑ̈ng yi jɑmmi kɑ̈b, ɑ pɑ nyi wïyi ki nɑ̈g!" 
Nahum3:2 Lïngí ywøøg dël kɑ̀ ceme cwiiy, kí tyelli yɑ̈thi liny kɑ̀ kɑrri gen, kí tyelli kyënyì kɑ̀ tungi gen, kí otɑ̈ɑ̈r yɑ̈ɑ̈th." 
Nahum3:3 Lidh jøliny pil kɑ̀ rɑ̈ngi pilli gen, kí tøngg kɑ̀ gwelli gen! Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g, ge óröör piny ge pɑ cuggi kwɑnø, o ge cwɑnyy-ɑ tyelli ji." 
Nahum3:4 Ninɑwɑ̀ cɑy yi Jwøk kɑ per kɑ ɑ́bëëde ɑ́ ngɑn nyi niin ki köögi. Thɑbb-ɑ ji ki thyënh rɑj, pödhh ɑ́gwøge gïn ɑ́ bɑ̈ngge ki thyëdhe" 
Nahum3:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yï cɑyɑ’ cɑyø, Ninɑwɑ̀! Ógudhí ówɑ̈ɑ̈dɑ wɑ̈g kì rií, o yï nenni yi pödhh yï cyɑ̈dh-ɑ nøw, o ɑyɑ̈rí lidh yi gen." 
Nahum3:6 Yï ócödh yi yɑn, yï óyɑ̈r yi yɑn, yï ówëggɑ ywørø yi ji." 
Nahum3:7 Ngɑn lidh yïn wïje óløg yi en. kɑ okööbø kinni, ‘Ninɑwɑ̀ ɑ́rënyi! Á men ɑ yije óywöngi kipere? Á men ɑ dwɑddi lugii?’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Ninɑwɑ̀, yï lɑ̈w kibøli Theybɑ̀, kɑɑl-ɑ jyɑ̈ɑ̈g kì Rïp? Kɑɑl-ɑ ying kömi Kiir, ɑ ótyegø yi pï, e kor-ɑ yi nɑm, pïge bene gen döre?" 
Nahum3:9 Kɑɑl-ɑ jɑɑg Kuc geki Rïp, kí tegø me bong cöge. O nyii kønyø yi Lïbiyɑ̀." 
Nahum3:10 De cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, jie ɑ́køøl yïnø. Kɑ nyige pöddi kì yethi yëëth bënn. Kɑ ge køm-ɑ thøø. Pëjje ɑ́køøl gɑ ɑtwöj ki ɑ́cwecwel, kɑ ge pɑ̈ngi kì kelli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg gen." 
Nahum3:11 Ninɑwɑ̀, yï ólunyi ki pɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, rií ópɑ̈nyí ki rengø keny-ɑ ócyeddi yïn yi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø." 
Nahum3:12 Dörrí, dörr-ɑ kor yïn ópɑ̈nhi ni kenyi dyëm nywøli ólɑm møg-ɑ cyegø ge dyëëm-ɑ dhøg ngɑn-ɑ nïngi ólɑmɑni!" 
Nahum3:13 Lidh jølinyí kɑ̀ böggi gen ni tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn, thïggi dörrí órɑ̈b ki mɑc." 
Nahum3:14 Yëggi piny ki pï kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti tyeeg yïn, ger kɑ̈jj-ɑ mïdhi dörrí, pɑ̈ɑ̈m ki thob, mɑ̈ɑ̈g jɑmm-ɑ nyi cwɑ̈ɑ̈j thob ki gwirø!" 
Nahum3:15 Yï órɑ̈b ki mɑc, yï ónɑ̈g ki pilø, yï óni byel møg-ɑ ócɑmø yi bɑ̈nyø. Yï ɑ́ngënyi ni bɑ̈nyø!" 
Nahum3:16 Jøngyew møgí ɑ́ngënyi kibøli kyelli mɑl! De ɑnɑn ge bong gïn. Ge ɑ́pɑ̈r ni bɑ̈nyø kenyi peere obërre, kɑ opɑ̈ɑ̈rø." 
Nahum3:17 Nyiirɑ̈dhhí geki pëjjí nɑ bɑ̈ny-ɑ nyi bëëdø kì kelli dörri lɑ̈bø møg-ɑ ógeer pwödhhi wun, kì dicyɑ̈ng-ɑ bëëd piny olïbø. De kɑ̀ yeer cɑ̈ng, ge nyii pɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ bong ngɑn ngɑ̈nyi kun-ɑ ɑ́kedhi gen!" 
Nahum3:18 Rɑ̈nhdwøøng Acuur, jɑggi myërrí thøø, o jøgdøngi pödhí ɑ́dhɑ̈li cyëwø! Jií ɑ́tɑɑy kelli kïttì, o bong ngɑn cøng gen." 
Nahum3:19 Kɑ̈jj-ɑ ledh kì rií pɑ nøggi, tyëng-ɑ ólïngi wöddi rënyí, cinggi gen óteng yi gen ki medi pëthi gen. Dɑ ngɑn mɑ ɑ́cög e nuti nywɑlø yi rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́gøggi yi yïn?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Møg bɑ kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri Abɑkuk, jɑltöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Habakkuk1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ gït-ɑ wɑɑng yɑ ywøøg-ɑ köörí kipe ruj, de yï pɑ yïëdø?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Yɑde ɑ wëggí yɑn lidhi rɑjj-ɑ ni møg? Yïde ɑ cungí yï nenn-ɑ rɑj geki ruji ji? Rɑj kí ruj ying-ɑ bølɑ. Ryɑ̈g kí wëërø pɑth ki gïn ni ngø! 
Habakkuk1:4 Cigg pɑ 'göög, bong dyër me nud. Tyëngtir bɑ ɑwen yi tyëngrijjø. Kì bɑng menɑni, cɑ́y pɑ nyi pɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen." 
Habakkuk1:5 Codhe, ɑköbbi ji yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Nenni wun pödhh-ɑ buti wun, wu óngɑ̈ng yi gïn-ɑ óløøg yi yɑn, yɑ ógöögø ki gïïpiny me koo yïëy yi wun keny-ɑ ólïngu en." 
Habakkuk1:6 Tyëng Bɑbïl ótug yi yɑn, eni pönh-ɑ keej, pönh-ɑ jwɑni kì yij piny, o kwɑnye pìny mø pɑth ki møge," 
Habakkuk1:7 pönh-ɑ ceg ki böggø, e tɑ̈dø, cigge ying-ɑ cinge." 
Habakkuk1:8 “Kyënye nyi yöm-ɑ kwɑ̈nyì, ge pëddi rɑ̈jø kibøli gøøl mø ri gen di kɑ̈j. Jøkyënye rïngi ge tɑ̈dø, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kun lɑ̈wi, ge pɑ̈rri nɑ cør mø dwɑddi cwøøy kömi gïn nɑ̈g ɑ́ men cɑm." 
Habakkuk1:9 “Liny gen bï-ɑ be mød ki ji, ji ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, ge nuti wɑ̈nhø. Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen nɑ tør." 
Habakkuk1:10 Rɑ̈nhì kí jɑgg ceg kɑ gɑggø yi gen. Bong dörø me thøø yi gerø me cuung gen, ge nyi rörr-ɑ piny ki lɑ̈bø kì buti döre, kɑ kɑɑlɑni mɑg gen." 
Habakkuk1:11 Codhe, o ge ruur gen yije ni ɑtunø, jøgɑni tegø mi gen bene Jwøøg gen.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, bene yïn ɑ bɑ Jwøk kër-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈gi piny. Yï bɑ Jwøgɑ, yï bɑ kwërø gïti ɑtheer. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïn ɑ ɑ́yïëy tyëng Bɑbïl, kɑ ge thödhí ki tegø kipe kinni o wø cɑy yi gen." 
Habakkuk1:13 Yï bɑ kwërø, o pyëwí pɑ nyi yïëy ki nenni ruj, de yïde ɑ nenní tyëngrijjø, yïde ɑ kud kɑ̀ nɑ̈ɑ̈g tyëngtir yi gen?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Gede ji ɑ gwøøg gen ni rijji nɑm, wɑlɑ̀ ni twöngg-ɑ bong jɑngi gen me nyudhi gen?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Ji ceg yi tyëng Bɑbïl kɑ ɑ́bɑ̈dhh ni rij. Gï ywɑjji gen kɑ bøyy, ge ceg-ɑ ryeerø, pëthi gen ceg-ɑ medø!" 
Habakkuk1:16 Bøyyi gen ceg kɑ mɑllø yi gen, gï ɑ́thödhi gen ki gëdhhì, kɑ gï rɑ̈bbi gen ki bɑkur, mɑ́ ge ɑ́thödhi yi bøyyɑni ki bëëdi medi pëëth, ge cɑm-ɑ gïgdøj." 
Habakkuk1:17 Ge ócög ge mɑng-ɑ ji ki bøyyɑni, e pëthi gen pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki nɑ̈gi ji gïti ɑtheer?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Yɑ óyedhi mɑl øn-ɑ nyi kurɑ, o yɑ lidhɑ gïn-ɑ óköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ki lögg-ɑ óløøge gønyɑ." 
Habakkuk2:2 Aløøg kwøbbɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Gweed møg-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri yïn kömi gïïpiny, gwed gen ge ónënnø, o ge cuggi gen ki jwɑnø ki rɑngø," 
Habakkuk2:3 mɑ́ kwøbbɑni ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen kì bøli keny-ɑ dwɑddi. De bøli kenyɑni ójwɑn bëënø kɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn obëënø gɑ dyër. Cɑgg ge cwööng, yïd yøw, mɑ́ ge bɑ møg-ɑ ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen ceth, ge koo ti cwöngø." 
Habakkuk2:4 Wöönɑni bɑ kinni, ‘Tyëngrijjø koo bødh, de tyëngtir óbødh, mɑ́ ge ngɑ̈dh-ɑ Jwøk.’ ”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Møgø nɑ medi tyɑ̈mø kì yï ngɑn wïje tɑ̈dø, ree pɑ ywöm yi en. Pyëwe lɑɑj nɑ pyëw thøø; pɑ yɑ̈ng. Pödhh bënn nyi cunge’ ree, kɑ ji bënn cønge gïn-ɑ́ møge." 
Habakkuk2:6 Bøli keny megø óbï men-ɑ ógɑggi tyëng Bɑbïl yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi gen. Gï óköbbi gen kinni, “Cyën ying-ɑ kömi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́congi jɑmm-ɑ pɑth ki mø gen! Wu gït-ɑ wɑɑng wu cïrr-ɑ ji cudi wun ki jɑmmì, kipe kinni o wu kɑ̈ri wun.”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi wun ri gen koo jwɑn yi gen ki lugi wun? Wu koo døøg be böggø yi gen? Jɑmmi wun koo lony yi gen ki kɑbø? 
Habakkuk2:8 Mɑ́ pödhh møøgø mø gïïr ɑ́mɑg yi wun, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bødh ócudø ki gøølø, eni gøøli tyëng-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi wun kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni bënn." 
Habakkuk2:9 Cyën ying-ɑ kömi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi kɑ̈lli gen kɑ̈rø yi jɑmmi kɑ̈b kí ruj, kɑ ge ogëdø ki kɑ̈jj-ɑ døj, kipe kinni o bëëd e bong rɑj møg wɑ̈nhi yï gen!" 
Habakkuk2:10 De kɑ̈lli wun ɑ́yɑ̈r yi wun ki nɑ̈gi ji mø gïïr yi wun, ri wun ɑ́rënyi wun." 
Habakkuk2:11 Cɑgg ɑ́ kïtt-ɑ ógeer dör óceg kïïwø, kɑ ɑ́lɑngi cwɑggi gen nyi gɑm yi yenh-ɑ ógeer tɑnø." 
Habakkuk2:12 Cyën ying-ɑ kömi wun, wu tyëng-ɑ ɑ́ger kɑɑl ki remø, kɑ kyer yi wun ki pödhh-ɑ gøggi gïgrijjø." 
Habakkuk2:13 Bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́wëggi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́mɑg yi wun pïdø yi gwøg, e bong gïn yod yi gen kì bɑng gwøngɑni. Kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́ger yi gen bënn rɑ̈b." 
Habakkuk2:14 Piny ópɑ̈ng yi döngi dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ni kenyi pɑ̈ng nɑɑm omelø yi pï. 
Habakkuk2:15 Cyën ying-ɑ kömi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wëggi cyerrø yi yïn kì yij linyí, ni tyëng-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø." 
Habakkuk2:16 Yï ólunyi ki yɑ̈rø ki mendwøng, kibøli ke di thödhi yïn ki dhwɑ̈ng. Yï ónɑ̈g yi møgø. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yï ócɑye ki cɑ́y mø døngø, kɑ dhwɑ̈ngí ree løge ɑyɑ̈r," 
Habakkuk2:17 mɑ́ møn-ɑ ɑ́mød Lubnɑn ceg kɑ lonyø ki belø yi yïn thyew. Lɑ̈yye ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn, de yï ókölli böögø yi lɑ̈yy ɑnɑn. Møgɑni bɑ kipe ji-ɑ ɑ́nɑ̈g yi yïn, kí rɑjj-ɑ ɑ́göggí ji-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì pinyɑni kì yethi kɑ̈ddɑni." 
Habakkuk2:18 Á gïn ɑ døj kì ri ngïji? Bɑ gïjø mɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j yi dhɑnhø, o pwöny-ɑ pyed yøw. Bong gïndøj me gögge ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈jii, eni jwøng-ɑ pɑ kööbø." 
Habakkuk2:19 Cyën ying-ɑ kömí! Yïn ɑ nyi köbbi gïn-ɑ ógwøgø ɑ́ yɑdh kinni, “Cyëëw!” Wɑlɑ̀ ɑ nyi köbbi tungi kït kinni, “Dhwödhí mɑl!” Yï ócuggø nyudhø ki kwøb yi ngïji me köme ómwønø ki dhɑb, wɑlɑ̀ ki ɑ́tegø, o bong wëy kì ree?" 
Habakkuk2:20 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ yij Kengi kwëre, wiy ji bënn kud gen kì bøle." 
Habakkuk3:1 Men bɑ kwɑ̈jji Abɑkuk, jɑltöng:" 
Habakkuk3:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, per gïg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn cøn ɑ́lïngɑ, kɑ yɑ obwøgø ki mendwøng. Jølí møg-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi yïn cøn, jølí gen kì bøli keny-ɑ di wøn èn. Lɑ̈ɑ̈m pyëwí cɑgg yï ómɑgø yi liny." 
Habakkuk3:3 Jwøk cig-ɑ bëënø e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Edöm, Jwøk kwërø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ Kïti Pɑrɑn. Mɑl ɑ́rïïm yi cɑre kí dhwɑ̈nge, o piny ɑ́pɑ̈ng yi lenhe." 
Habakkuk3:4 Bï cɑre omënyø ni mɑl, cɑr ceg-ɑ rɑ̈ɑ̈dø kì cinge, keny-ɑ yije ókɑɑn tege." 
Habakkuk3:5 Yømø nɑ̈ɑ̈g cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøle, o thøø lug-ɑ́ɑ̀ bɑnge." 
Habakkuk3:6 Acunge kɑ piny onhɑ̈nhø, ɑ́lïdhi kɑ ji okïïrø. Codhe, kɑ kïtt-ɑ weenø ókedhhø, kïtt-ɑ ɑ́wöni cøn ɑ́ludhi piny, gen ɑ kïtt-ɑ́ kömi gïn nyi cyɑ̈dhe cøn." 
Habakkuk3:7 Tyëng Kucɑn ɑ́lidhɑ ge bwøgø, o tyëng Midyɑn dëlli gen okïrrø." 
Habakkuk3:8 Bɑ nɑ̈mmì ɑ ɑ́wëggi yïn mɑgø yi liny, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j? Bɑ nɑɑm omelø ɑ ɑ́wëggi yïn mɑgø yi liny ki menteg? Yï ɑ́cyɑ̈dh ɑ kömi pøøl, yømø bene yɑ̈thi linyí, møg-ɑ nyi thödhí jií ki tyɑ̈mø." 
Habakkuk3:9 Rií ɑ́tyeeny kipe göjjø ki wethí yï køm-ɑ dyëddø ki nywøli wethí. Piny ɑ́pyëëd yi gen. 
Habakkuk3:10 Kïttì ɑ́kïïr keny-ɑ ɑ́liidh yïn yi gen, pï ɑ́dyëm kì mɑl. Pïg-ɑ thɑ piny ɑ́ruur, kɑ ɑpɑgi gen wɑ̈dh-ɑ mɑl" 
Habakkuk3:11 Keny-ɑ ɑ́rɑ̈ɑ̈d nywøli wethí møg-ɑ pëddi rïngø, kɑ tøngí ogwelø, ɑcungi dwɑ̈y geki cɑ̈ng kì kɑ̈jji gen." 
Habakkuk3:12 Yij piny ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi yïn e pyëwí rɑɑj, kɑ pödhh nyøn yi yïn." 
Habakkuk3:13 Yï óbï be yieli jií, geki rɑ̈dhí, rɑ̈nh-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi yïn. Pënyi tyëngrijjø ɑ́dhur piny yi yïn, kɑ jøbɑnge bënn nɑ̈g yi yïn." 
Habakkuk3:14 Jɑngi jølinye ɑ́cwøøb ki tøngí, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëne ni yømø, e bï-ɑ be kedhhi wøn, e pëthi gen med ni ngɑn mød ɑbuur kì gød." 
Habakkuk3:15 Nɑɑm omelø ɑ́bɑ̈ɑ̈n yi yïn ki kyënyí, kɑ pïge wëggí othung ki óböy." 
Habakkuk3:16 Møgɑni ɑ́lïngɑ bënn, kɑ dëlɑ okïrrø, kɑ leggɑ ceg-ɑ oden yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø. Dëlɑ ɑ́ceg ì lɑ̈b, kɑ tyellɑ cwɑnyyɑ. Yɑ ópëggi be yïd yøw kì bøli keny-ɑ ócɑɑy tyëng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömee yi Jwøk." 
Habakkuk3:17 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ pɑ nywøl ólɑm, o oløg bong nywøl kì kööre, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ rënyi dhetun, o bong byel mø cyeg kì yethi pwödh, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ thøw dyëg bënn, o bong dhög kì yethi lwɑ̈gg," 
Habakkuk3:18 pyëwɑ óbëëd e omedø, mɑ́ Jwøk, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j en ɑ bɑ yïënɑ." 
Habakkuk3:19 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bene tegɑ, tyellɑ nyi gwøge’ gwøgø ge teeg ni tyelli ɑ́køny o yɑ cuggɑ yïdhø kì kömi kïttì." 
Zephaniah1:1 Men bɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri Dhepɑniyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Kucì, wɑ̈d Gedɑliyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Amɑriyɑ̀, wɑ̈d Kedhekiyɑ̀. Bɑ kì ri Rɑ̈dh Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amön, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀ ɑ ɑ́mëggii wöönɑni." 
Zephaniah1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Jɑmmi kömi piny bënn nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø;" 
Zephaniah1:3 gen ɑ ji kí lɑ̈yy, kí winy, kí rij bënn. Tyëngrijjø cɑyɑ’ cɑyø. Dhɑnhø bëne nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø, bong gïn döng. Yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, yɑ ɑ́rum ki kwøb." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Tyëng Yerusɑlem cɑyɑ’ cɑyø, geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn. Tyëng-ɑ mɑlli Bɑɑl nɑ̈gɑ’ nɑ̈gø bënn, bong ngɑn-ɑ ópɑrri ókwërri jwögg-ɑ pɑth." 
Zephaniah1:5 Kí tyëng-ɑ nyi yedhi wɑ̈thi ud be mɑlli cɑ̈ng kí kyell. Kí tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli yɑn, kɑ ge nyii köngø ce yïëyi gen ki yɑn ómïdhi yi gen, de ge nyii døøgø ki köngø ki nyingi jwøg Mölek." 
Zephaniah1:6 Kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́døøg cyɑ̈n, kɑ ge ówïyø cyɑ̈dhø kì bɑngɑ. Kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́wïyi ki pyëji yɑn kinni o ge nyudhɑ yuu-ɑ bɑ dyër.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ócɑɑy ji yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi, bëëd wun wu okudø kì bøle. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gwir-ɑ ree kipe muuji jie gɑ gëdhhì, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø kɑ̈ɑ̈le’ be mɑnyi Yeudiyɑ̀." 
Zephaniah1:8 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng ngɑl menɑni, jɑggi mïïri ócɑy yi yɑn, geki nyiirɑ̈dhh, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi göögø ki kwöng-ɑ pɑth bënn." 
Zephaniah1:9 Tyëng-ɑ nyi mɑlli jwögg-ɑ pɑth ócɑyɑ, geki tyëng-ɑ nyi kwɑ̈dø, kɑ ge onɑ̈gø kipe kinni o ge pɑ̈ng gen kɑ̈lli gen ki jɑmmi kɑ̈b." 
Zephaniah1:10 “Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, ywøg ólïngi kì Dhøg Rij kì Yerusɑlem. Akyew ólïngi kì budi kɑɑl, bun-ɑ nyɑ̈n, kí cwɑggi pɑ̈ɑ̈dhi gïïpiny me dwøng kí kïtt-ɑ thønhø kì Yerusɑlem." 
Zephaniah1:11 Ywöngi wun, kɑ wu kïïw wun, wu tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì yij mɑ̈ɑ̈dø kì kɑɑl, mɑ́ jøngyew bënn ónɑ̈g!" 
Zephaniah1:12 “Kì bøli kenyɑni, Yerusɑlem yije óyɑb yi yɑn ki lɑ̈mbɑ̈. Tyëng-ɑ mɑɑr ri gen, ge ngɑ̈dh-ɑ ri gen cɑyɑ’ cɑyø; gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi köbbi ri gen kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bong gïndøj wɑlɑ̀ gïnrɑj me nyi gwøge.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Kɑ̈ɑ̈r gen ókɑb, kɑ uddi gen rënyi, cɑgg ge gëdø ki ud, ge koo bëëdø kì yethi gen, cɑgg ge pïdhø ki bɑ̈ggi oløg, møgi oløøg gen koo mɑdh yi gen.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ dwøng; cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi; ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki mendwøng. Óbëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ng me rɑj, cɑgg ɑ́ jödd, ge ókïïwø kì cyɑ̈ngɑni." 
Zephaniah1:15 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑ̈ji pyëw menɑni, óbëëd ɑ́ cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng orɑng me dwøng geki rɑj, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑ̈jø, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng muunh-ɑ dwøng, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng lojø, cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng pøøl." 
Zephaniah1:16 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng kɑng geki ɑkyeew liny me pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi kɑ̈ddi dör, møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi gen di udd-ɑ nyi kur." 
Zephaniah1:17 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ókööbø kinni, “Ji ógöjjɑ ryɑ̈g; ge óthɑ̈mmi ni cörr. Mɑ́ ge ɑ́røngi kì bølɑ, remmi gen ómulli ni pï, ge ókwɑ̈ɑ̈g piny.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Ge koo yiel yi dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø mø gen ki cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑ̈ji pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Piny bëne ócɑm yi mɑɑc linye. Tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì kömi piny bënn ójwɑn yi en ki nɑ̈gø. 
Zephaniah2:1 Cøngu ri wun, wu pödhh-ɑ pɑ böggi ki ɑyɑ̈r," 
Zephaniah2:2 kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti køøl wun yi yømø ni cong, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti bëën liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, liny-ɑ teg kömi wun, kɑ̈ng-ɑ nuti bëën cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Zephaniah2:3 Dwöög wun kö Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j wu tyëng-ɑ bɑ mööl bënn kì yij pödhø, wu tyëng-ɑ mïdhi cigge. Gøggu dyër, kɑ ri wun dwöög wun piny kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o wu ócög wu pɑ cɑy kì cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Zephaniah2:4 Bong dhɑnhø men-ɑ ódöng kì Gɑdhɑ̀, o Ackelön óbëëd e lïïwø. Tyëng Acdöd ócyeddi kì dicɑ̈ng, kɑ tyëng Ekrön cyeed wɑ̈g kì kɑɑl gen." 
Zephaniah2:5 Wun ɑ tyëng Pelistiyɑ̀, cyën ying-ɑ kömi wun, wun ɑ bëëdø kì kömi nɑɑm omelø, cɑ́yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ kömi wun, wu nɑ̈ge’ nɑ̈gø; bong ngɑn döng." 
Zephaniah2:6 Yïn, yï piny kömi nɑɑm omelø, yï ógöögø yïn ɑ́ kej kwɑ̈yø, bɑ gewwi kwɑ̈yyì geki kyelli dyëg ɑ óying yijí." 
Zephaniah2:7 Kömi nɑm ókwɑny yi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ møg-ɑ óbødh, jɑmmi gen ókwɑy yi gen kì yije, o tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ónin kì yethi uddi Ackelön. Ge ómïdhi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen kɑ gï wëgge døøgø dönyø." 
Zephaniah2:8 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tyëng Moɑb geki tyëng Amön ɑ́lïngɑ ge gwɑdd-ɑ jiɑ, o gï gɑwwi ge’ gɑwwø, ge othwøgø ce piny gïn kwɑɑny gen." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ni kɑ̀ bëëdɑ yɑn ɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Nëënø ceth, Jwøøg Isrɑil, yɑ óköngi kinni, Moɑb geki Amön órënyi ni Sødømɑ̀ geki Gømørɑ̀. Ge ógöögø ki buur omelø, ge órënyi gïti ɑtheer. Yethi gen ótwïy yi lum. Ge óyɑg yi jiɑ møg-ɑ óbødh, kɑ pinyɑni kwɑny yi gen.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Bene kër-ɑ ócɑɑy tyëng Moɑb geki tyëng Amön ɑnɑn, kì bɑng tɑ̈dø geki ɑthwøg mi gen, kí kipe kɑ ɑ́yɑnyyi gen jii Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Zephaniah2:11 Ge ógöjji wɑ̈ɑ̈rø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, jwöggi piny bënn ógwøge ge bong per gen, codhe o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ómɑlli yi pödhh bënn, pönhï kì keje, keny-ɑ bëëde." 
Zephaniah2:12 Tyëng Kuc ówëggi nɑ̈gø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j thyew. 
Zephaniah2:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j tege óløge wɑɑng wuudø be rënyi Acuur, Ninɑwɑ̀ órënye, kɑ gø løge ryɑng me yije bong pï." 
Zephaniah2:14 Yije óbuud yi dyëg kí dhög kí lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l bënn. Tulø óbëëdø kì yethi ɑrugge, ge óywöngi kì ɑwɑjje, cør kí ɑ́gɑ̈ggì geki cyëwwì óbëëdø kì yije. Yenh sɑndɑl møge ówøw." 
Zephaniah2:15 Bene gïn-ɑ óbï kömi kɑɑl-ɑ ɑ́thwøg kipe tege, ɑ rumø kinni bong rɑj møg cuggi bëën köme. Pönh-ɑ kööbø kinni i bong pödhø me pɑ̈ɑ̈r ki en kì kömi piny. Órënyi ki rënyi teg! Yije óbëëd yi lɑ̈yyi pɑ̈l. Ngɑn kɑ̈l yije óngɑ̈ng kɑ wïje kene." 
Zephaniah3:1 Cyën ying-ɑ kömi kɑɑl-ɑ mune teeg, ɑ cödhø yi orøg, kɑɑl-ɑ nyi guud nyingi jie," 
Zephaniah3:2 kɑɑl-ɑ pɑ nyi lïngi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ̀ cege gøn. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pɑ ngɑ̈dh yi en wɑlɑ̀ pɑ nyi cyɑ̈ngi kì buti Jwøge." 
Zephaniah3:3 Jyɑ̈gge bɑ ngurrì møg ngɑ̈rri kì yije, o jɑggi bure bɑ óthönhì mø ri gen di kɑ̈j, ɑ bong gïn nyi cɑm yi gen me nyi döng gïti mwøl." 
Zephaniah3:4 Jøtöng møge bɑ tyëngpyed, o pëthi gen dɑdɑɑr. Ókwër møge Kengø ɑ́bwöl yi gen ki pyemi cigg." 
Zephaniah3:5 De Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j nudd e nud kì yije, e gøgg-ɑ dyër de pɑth ki rɑj. Gøggi dyër ying-ɑ keje kì mwøl yethi cyɑ̈ng bënn. Cɑgg ɑ́ kinøw, tyëngrijjø nudd ge gøgg-ɑ rɑj ceth, wɑ̈thi gen pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈y." 
Zephaniah3:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pödhh ɑ́nɑ̈gɑ bënn, kɑ̈ddi gen ɑ́rënyɑ; dörr-ɑ bɑ̈rrø mø kur ɑ́döng gɑ thur. Kɑ̈ddi gen ɑ́döng gɑ ryɑng. Yethi yëëth bong ji, bong dhɑnhø mɑ ɑ́döng." 
Zephaniah3:7 Arumɑ kinni jiɑ yɑ óböggi yi gen, kɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́cegɑ gen lïngi yi gen, o ge cög gen ge pɑ cɑy yi yɑn këti. De ge ɑ́yöd ge nyi gøgg-ɑ orøg ceth, kì ri jɑmm-ɑ nyi gwøg yi gen bënn.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Wë okööbø kinni, “Yïdu cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ódhwödhɑ be gøønyi pödhh, o ge cøngɑ, o tegi linyɑ lidh yi gen, kömi piny bëne ócɑm yi mɑɑc keji linyɑ." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Codhe o ji wilɑ, o ge kwɑjji gen yɑn, yɑ ketɑ e bong jwøg megø. Ciggɑ ómïdhi yi gen." 
Zephaniah3:10 Cɑgg ɑ́ Kuc, pönh-ɑ lɑ̈wi; jiɑ, ji-ɑ tɑyø yɑ ómuuj yi gen ki gëdhhì." 
Zephaniah3:11 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni wu koo yɑ̈r, kipe kɑ ɑ́pyem wun kwøbbɑ, mɑ́ ngɑn-ɑ óthwøg kɑ otɑ̈dø, ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kelli wun. O kwøbbɑ koo døøg ki pyemø yi wun kì kïti kwërɑ." 
Zephaniah3:12 Mɑ́ yɑ ówiy-ɑ tyëng-ɑ bɑ mööl, ɑ ri gen dwöög gen piny kì kelli wun, gen ɑ tyëng-ɑ nyi bï yïɑ be kønyø." 
Zephaniah3:13 Tyëng-ɑ óbødh kì Isrɑil koo røngø, o ge koo pëëdø, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo wënyø. De ge óbëëdø kì yij kɑ̈r geki døøjø, e bong gïn böggi yi gen.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Wör wun, kɑ wu ryeer wun ki medi pëëth, wun ɑ tyëng Isrɑil! Mïni pyëwí ki mendwøng, yïn ɑ Yerusɑlem!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wïyi ki cɑyi yïn, tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ɑ́nyiige kì butí. Yï omïdhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Isrɑil bong rɑj mø böggi yi yïn këti." 
Zephaniah3:16 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni Yerusɑlem óköbbi kinni, “Yï ko böggi Dhɑyøn! Pyëwí ko nyönhi." 
Zephaniah3:17 Yï omïdhø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgí kɑ yï yiele, yï ówëggi tyɑ̈mø yi tege. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j pyëwe ómed ki yïn, yï óthödhi yi mɑ̈ɑ̈dø mee ki medi pyëw geki nënnì kɑ yï owörø ki medi pyëwí," 
Zephaniah3:18 ni kenyi mïni pëthi ji kì kej tugø.” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ryɑ̈g ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g kì kömí, kɑ ɑyɑ̈rí kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g." 
Zephaniah3:19 Kì bøli kenyɑni, tyëng-ɑ ɑ́guud wɑngí ócɑyɑ, ngöll bënn óyiel yi yɑn, tyëng-ɑ yïnø ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ pɑc. Ayɑ̈ɑ̈r gen óløgɑ dhwɑ̈ng, kɑ ge pøjji yi kömi piny bëne." 
Zephaniah3:20 Kì bøli kenyɑni, jií, ji-ɑ tɑyø ókɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ pɑc, perí ówëggɑ tëngø kì kömi piny bëne, kɑ yï wëggɑ døøgø dönyø.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Haggai1:1 Kì ryeew runni jyɑ̈gi Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs, kì kyeel cyɑ̈nggi bïkyeel dwɑ̈tt, ɑ ɑ́öni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki wöödø e kwøbbɑni kwøb-ɑ yi Agɑy jɑltöng, e köbb-ɑ Dherubɑbïl wɑ̈d Ceɑltiel, jɑngi mïïri kì Yeudiyɑ̀, geki Jöcwø wɑ̈d Yödhɑdɑk Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng." 
Haggai1:2 Agɑy jɑltöng ɑ́köbbi yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Ji møg okööbø i men pɑth ki bøli kej døøgi Kengø ki gerø.”" 
Haggai1:3 Aköbbi Agɑy jɑltöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j i köbbe ji wöödø men kinni," 
Haggai1:4 “Wun ɑ jiɑ, wude ɑ bëëd wun kì yethi ud mø thøø yi gerø, o Kengɑ bɑ thur?" 
Haggai1:5 Gïg-ɑ nyi cwöb kiper wun pɑ nenni yi wun? 
Haggai1:6 Wu kɑ̈g-ɑ jɑmmì mø gïïr, de wu kɑj-ɑ mø nøg. Wu ocyɑ̈mø, de wu pɑ yɑ̈ng. Wu omɑ̈dhø, de röödhø pɑ thøw. Wu orugø ki ógudh, de dëlli wun pɑ lënhi. O ngɑn-ɑ göögø ngyënye pɑ rømmi ree, ge nɑ gïn-ɑ ócïb yij kidhø me twïyø." 
Haggai1:7 Gïn-ɑ́ pere ɑ́cwöb møgɑni, pɑ yod yi wun?" 
Haggai1:8 Kedhu wïj kït, kɑ wu kɑ̈ni wun ki pɑ̈mmì, kɑ Kengø ger wun, codhe o pyëwɑ mïne, o yɑ mɑlli ni kenyi bëëde ceth." 
Haggai1:9 “Wu nyii rumø kinni wu ókɑ̈jø ki jɑmmì mø gïïr, de ge nyi yod ge nøg kenyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l wun gen pɑc, ge nyi rënyɑ’ rënyø. Á kipe ngø ɑ göögɑ kinøw? Kipe kɑ̀ bëëd wu göög ɑ ri gyer ki uddi wun, de Kengɑ bɑ thur." 
Haggai1:10 Bene ɑ bëëd e bong kødh, o bong gïn twïy." 
Haggai1:11 Piny bëne; wɑ̈thi kïttì, kí pwödh, kí bɑ̈ggi oløg kí yenh dhetun, kí gïg-ɑ twïy bënn, kí ji geki lɑ̈yy, ge ɑ́göjjɑ mel.”" 
Haggai1:12 Codhe, ɑlïngi kwøbbi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi Dherubɑbïl geki Jöcwø kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ bënn. Kɑ gïn-ɑ ɑ́köbbi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen gwøg gen. Ge ɑ́bwøg, kɑ dhøg Agɑy, jɑlwööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j lïngi yi gen." 
Haggai1:13 Codhe, ɑköbbi wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ji yi Agɑy kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun.”" 
Haggai1:14 Acïb kwøbbi gwøøg Kengø pëthi ji yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ løg Dherubɑbïl, jɑngi Yeudiyɑ̀, kí Jöcwø Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kí tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø bënn. Acɑ̈gi gen ki geri Kengi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen," 
Haggai1:15 kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi bïkyeel dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runni Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs kì yij lɑwø." 
Haggai2:1 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́kyeel cyɑ̈nggi bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runni Rɑ̈dh Dɑryøs kì yij lɑwø, ɑdøøg Agɑy jɑltöng ki köbbø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Haggai2:2 i köbbe Dherubɑbïl, jɑngi mïïri kì Yeudiyɑ̀, geki Jöcwø Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kí tyëng-ɑ kyeelø kinni," 
Haggai2:3 “Dɑ dhɑnhø kì kelli wun me nuti pɑɑr döng geki myëri Kengø keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn? Bëëd ɑ dï, kɑ̀ nennii yi wun ɑnɑn? Pɑ nënni e dhɑ̈y ce pɑth ki gïïpiny?" 
Haggai2:4 De pëthi wun ko nyönhi. Gwøgu gwøg ceth, mɑ́ yɑ nud kì kelli wun." 
Haggai2:5 Ni kɑ ɑ́köbbɑ wun, keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wun wɑ̈g kì Rïp kinni, yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun; yɑ óbëëdø kì kelli wun ceth, wu ko böggi." 
Haggai2:6 “Kì bɑng keny me thiinh, mɑl kí piny, kí nɑ̈mmì geki piny-ɑ thwøwø ógöjjɑ onhɑ̈nh." 
Haggai2:7 Pödhh órungɑ, kɑ̈ɑ̈r gen ókɑ̈ɑ̈l keny, Kengø men ópɑ̈ɑ̈ngɑ ki jɑmm-ɑ per gen teg." 
Haggai2:8 Átegø kí dhɑb mø kömi piny bɑ møgɑ. 
Haggai2:9 Döng geki myëri Kengø men ópëddi kibøli Kengø men-ɑ ɑ́nud cøn. Jiɑ óthödhɑ ki døøjø geki mër.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk. 
Haggai2:10 Kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi bïngween dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runni Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs kì yij lɑwø, ɑ ɑ́köbbi Agɑy jɑltöng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Haggai2:11 “Pyëj ókwër ki gïn-ɑ kømmi yi cigg kipe pyëj møg; 
Haggai2:12 keløg dhɑnhø ókɑ̈bbø ki rïngø men-ɑ ɑ́kwër ɑ́ gëëdhi, kɑ gø kïdhe yij ógødhe, kɑ tøg ógødh ónywɑ̈dø ki ópun, wɑlɑ̀ møgi oløg, wɑlɑ̀ gïncɑm me bɑ ɑthɑl, wɑlɑ̀ møw, wɑlɑ̀ gïncɑm megø yøw; ogöögø ɑ́ ɑkwër thyew?” Alöggi ókwër kinni, “Pɑ göögø.”" 
Haggai2:13 Acigi Agɑy pëjjø kinni, “Keløg dhɑnhø ree dɑ cølø, kɑ ónywɑ̈dø ki gïgcɑmm mø bɑ ɑkwër, ge ócuggø gwøg ge ywëdhø thyew?” Alöggi ókwër kinni, “Ngee!”" 
Haggai2:14 Codhe ɑkööb Agɑy kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, menɑni bëëd ɑ nøw ki tyëng pönhï. Gïg-ɑ pidh yi gen, kí møg-ɑ muuj yi gen kì wïj këli lɑm ywëdhø.”" 
Haggai2:15 Akööb Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Nuti liidh wun, gen ɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́cwöb cøn, wu nuti cɑ̈gø ki gyer ki Kengø?" 
Haggai2:16 Yï ócuggø rumø kinni pëëm byel ókɑ̈ni ki kïllì miy ɑ́ryew, de nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ miyø kete. Ke kedhí keny-ɑ nyi biij møw yï yɑb-ɑ røthøl miy ɑ́ryew, yï yod-ɑ pyɑ̈r ɑ́ngwen yøw." 
Haggai2:17 Gïg-ɑ nyi pidh yi wun nyii rënyø yi yɑn ki mel geki ɑtuni ɑ́piy, de wu pɑ yewi." 
Haggai2:18 Dicyɑ̈ɑ̈ng bɑ cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́bïkyel kì bïngween dwɑ̈tt, cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́cigi Kengø døøgø ki gerø. Lidhu gïg-ɑ ócwöb, cɑg ɑnɑn." 
Haggai2:19 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̀ bëëd e bong gemè me döngø, o oløg geki ólɑm kí romɑn, kí dhetun nuti cɑ̈gø nywølø, cɑg kì bøli keny gïti bøli keny megø, wu ógyëdh yi yɑn.”" 
Haggai2:20 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni kete, ɑ løg cyɑ̈nggi dwɑ̈y pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngwen, ɑdøøg Dherubɑbïl ki ödø ki wöödø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Haggai2:21 eni Dherubɑbïl jɑngi mïïri Yeudiyɑ̀ kinni, “Mɑl geki piny ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi ki nïngø yi yɑn." 
Haggai2:22 Rɑ̈nhi piny geki tyëng-ɑ jɑɑg yi gen órënyɑ. Yɑ̈thi liny órumɑ piny geki tyëng-ɑ kyewi gen, kyënyì óthøw, jøkyënyì ri gen ónɑ̈g yi gen." 
Haggai2:23 Dherubɑbïl bɑ̈ngɑ, yï ókwɑny yi yɑn kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, o yï jyɑ̈ɑ̈g ki nyingɑ. Bene yïn ɑ ɑ́myeg yi yɑn.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Zechariah1:1 Kì bïdɑ̈ɑ̈g dwɑ̈tt, kì ryeew runni Dɑryøs ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøøng Pɑres, ɑ ɑ́ödi jɑltöng, Dhekɑriyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Berekiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Idö ki wöödø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Zechariah1:2 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Dhekɑriyɑ̀ jɑltöng ɑ́köbbe i köbbe ji kinni, “Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwɑ ɑ́rënyi ki kweyyi wun cøn." 
Zechariah1:3 De ɑnɑn wu köbbɑ’ kinni, ‘Dwöög wun köörɑ, o yɑ dwöögɑ yï wun." 
Zechariah1:4 Wu ko bëëd ni kweyyi wun ɑ ɑ́köbbi yi jøtöng kɑ̈ge dööng kinni, wïyu bënn ki gwøg ki orøg. De kwøbbɑ nuti lïngø yi gen." 
Zechariah1:5 Kweyyi wun geki jøtöng møgɑni pɑ nudd ge onëënø ɑnɑn. 
Zechariah1:6 De kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ bɑ̈nggɑ, jøtöng, kí gïg-ɑ ɑ́kyerɑ nuti yïëyø yi kweyyi wun, ɑ bɑnge rɑngi gen. Codhe ɑyewi gen, kɑ gø yod gen kinni bɑ yɑn, yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ɑ ɑ́cɑy gen, kì bɑng orøøg gen ni kɑ ɑ́dwɑddɑ en.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:7 Kì ryeew runni Rɑ̈nhdwøng Dɑryøs kì yij lɑwø, kì pyɑ̈r ɑ́ryew wïdɑ́ngween cyɑ̈nggi pyɑ̈rø wïdɑ́kyeel dwɑ̈tt, ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri yɑn ki kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì wɑ̈r." 
Zechariah1:8 Yɑ ɑ́lïdhi ki jɑl me ying kömi kyeny me kwɑrø. O cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ kɑɑm yenh bɑlsɑm kì yij tör, o ngɑ̈je dɑ kyënyì møøgø mø kwɑrø, kí møg-ɑ ógwelø, kí møg tɑr." 
Zechariah1:9 Apyëjɑ en kinni, “Wuö, kyënyì møg wɑng-ɑ ngø?” Alögge kinni, “Yï ónyudhɑ gïn-ɑ wɑngi yi gen." 
Zechariah1:10 Ge ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni o ge kedhi gen be yɑgi piny.” 
Zechariah1:11 Aköbbi wëywödø yi gen kinni, “Wø kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij piny bëne, de piny ɑ́yod yi wøn e ree pɑ cuggi nyɑgø yi en, o bɑ ɑtyɑm.”" 
Zechariah1:12 Codhe, ɑlöggi wëywönɑni kinni “Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, pyëwí rɑɑj ki Yerusɑlem geki kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, yï gït-ɑ wɑɑng pyëwí pɑ lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen?”" 
Zechariah1:13 Alöggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki kwøbbi cïïjø me døøj. 
Zechariah1:14 Kɑ yɑ köbbi yi wëywönɑni kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yerusɑlem kɑɑl kwërɑ mɑɑr yi yɑn ki mendwøng," 
Zechariah1:15 o pyëwɑ rɑɑj cɑrø ki pödhh-ɑ tɑ̈bbi kì yij kɑ̈r. Mɑ́ orɑɑng jiɑ ɑ́coodh yi gen keny-ɑ ɑ́kɑl pyëwɑ rënyø ki gen yøw. 
Zechariah1:16 Pyëwɑ ɑ́lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki Yerusɑlem. Kengɑ ódøøg ki gerø, o kɑɑlɑni óger thyew.”" 
Zechariah1:17 Yɑ ɑ́köbbi yi wëywönɑni i kööbɑ thyew kinni, “Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, kɑ̈dde ódøøg ki dönyø, Yerusɑlem ódøøgɑ ki kønyø këti, kɑ obëëdø ɑ́ pɑɑrɑ.”" 
Zechariah1:18 Atïngɑ wïjɑ, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki tùng ɑ́ngwen, tùngi wɑ̈dhh." 
Zechariah1:19 Apyëjɑ wëywön-ɑ ɑ́kööb wøn kinni, “Á ngø ɑ wɑngi yi tùngɑni?” Alögge kinni, “Ge bɑ nyuudhi kipe tegi pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kedhhi tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, geki Isrɑil, kí Yerusɑlem.”" 
Zechariah1:20 Codhe, ɑnyudhi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki bödhhì ɑ́ngwen ki ɑ́bɑnyyi gen." 
Zechariah1:21 Apëjjɑ kinni, “Jøg, ge ɑ́bï-ɑ be gwøgi ngø?” Alögge kinni, “Ge ɑ́bï-ɑ be göjji böögø pödhh-ɑ ɑ́nyøng Yeudiyɑ̀ kɑ gø kedhhi gen, o gï dhur gen piny.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Kɑ wïjɑ tïngɑ, ɑlïdhɑ ki jɑl me cinge di thøl mɑ rumi." 
Zechariah2:2 Apyëjɑ en kinni, “Yï kedh-ɑ keny?” Alögge kinni, “Yɑ kedh-ɑ be rømi Yerusɑlem, o bɑ̈re geki lɑ̈je yodɑ.”" 
Zechariah2:3 Akedh wëywön-ɑ ɑ́kööb wøn, kɑ ge órwömø ki wëywödø megø," 
Zechariah2:4 ɑköbbii yi wëywön-ɑ ɑ́rwööm gen kinni, “Rengí köbbí jɑl-ɑ cinge di rumi thøl kinni, Yerusɑlem yije dɑ ji kí dhög mø gïïr cɑrø, dwøng pɑ cuggi gëddø ki dörø." 
Zechariah2:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́köngi cem e óbëëdø ɑ́ döri mɑc kì tøggi kɑɑlɑni e kor-ɑ gøn, o óbëëdø kì yije ki dhwɑ̈nge bëne.”" 
Zechariah2:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Wu ɑ́kedhhɑ kì wɑ̈thi tùngi piny bënn. De ɑnɑn wu tyëng-ɑ ying yïnø, pɑ̈r wun kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kɑ wu døøg wun Yerusɑlem." 
Zechariah2:7  
Zechariah2:8 Ngɑn-ɑ ónywɑl wun, ɑ́cwög-ɑ wɑngɑ.” Bene ɑ bɑnge ör yɑn yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; yɑ öre’ yï pödhh-ɑ mød jie, o ge köbbɑ kinni," 
Zechariah2:9 “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree ónyïɑ̈ggi ki wun, kɑ wu lony ki mødø yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́bëëd gɑ bɑ̈nggi wun.” Óyod yi ji bënn keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, kinni yɑ ɑ́ör-ɑ yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Zechariah2:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Wör wun ki medi pëthi wun, wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem! Mɑ́ yɑ bï-ɑ be bëëdø kì kelli wun!”" 
Zechariah2:11 Kì bøli kenyɑni, pödhh mø gïïr óbï yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ ge ogöögø gɑ jie. Óbëëdø kì kelli gïn, o óyod yi wun kinni en ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yï wun." 
Zechariah2:12 Yeudiyɑ̀ ógöögø ɑ́ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kì piny-ɑ bɑ ɑkwër. Kɑ Yerusɑlem ogöögø ki kɑɑl-ɑ mɑɑr yi en ki mendwøng." 
Zechariah2:13 Kud wun bënn kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, mɑ́ e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kej kwëre." 
Zechariah3:1 Anyudhi yɑn Jöcwø, Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e cung-ɑ́ɑ̀ bøli wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o Cethɑn ócungø kì buti Jöcwø, e dwɑdd-ɑ gøønyi gøn." 
Zechariah3:2 Aköbbi Cethɑn yi wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Yï ócɑy yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Cethɑn! Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ mɑɑr Yerusɑlem. Jɑɑl, pɑ ni lonh ywɑ̈ɑ̈j wɑ̈g kì mɑc?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Jöcwø ɑ́bëëd e ócungø kì bøli wëywödø, e rug-ɑ ógudh mø cödhø." 
Zechariah3:4 Aköbbi wëywödd møg-ɑ cungi kì buti wëywönɑni yi en kinni, “Kɑ̈ɑ̈lu ógudh-ɑ cödhø wɑ̈g kì ree.” Codhe ɑköbbe Jöcwø kinni, “Lidh, orøgí ɑ́kɑ̈ɑ̈lɑ wɑ̈g, o yï nëngɑ ki ógudh mø nyɑ̈n møg rug yi yïn.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Aköbbe gïn kinni kïdhi gen wïj Jöcwø ki wëëni me dhïw. Codhe, ɑkïdhi gen wïje ki wëëni, kɑ ree lunyi gen ki ógudh mø nyɑ̈n e wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócungø kì kenyɑni ceth." 
Zechariah3:6 Aköbbi Jöcwø yi wëywönɑni kinni," 
Zechariah3:7 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Keløg ciggɑ ómïdhi yi yïn ceth, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ yïn gwøg yi yïn, yï óbëëd yïn ɑ́ jɑngi Kengɑ geki gølɑ bëne, kɑ kwɑ̈jjí lïngɑ ni kenyi lïngɑ kwɑ̈jji wëywödd møg-ɑ nyi cungi kì bølɑ." 
Zechariah3:8 Lïng Jöcwø, yïn ɑ bɑ Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, kɑ wu lïng wun, wun ɑ ókwërr-ɑ kyeelø, wu bɑ ngïjjì kipe gïn-ɑ ócwöb dhuki megø, mɑ́ bɑ̈ngɑ ónyodhɑ, ɑ cwøl ɑ́ bɑɑd yɑdh." 
Zechariah3:9 Bøli Jöcwø cïbɑ’ cïbø ki tungi kït me nyingi ngëdde bɑ ɑ́bïryew. Kïnɑni köme ótwïggɑ ki gwedd, o orøøg pönhï rɑ̈ɑ̈jɑ’ wɑ̈g ki cyɑ̈ng ɑ́kyel yøw." 
Zechariah3:10 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, ngɑɑn tyëng-ɑ cyɑ̈gi ki en ócwøle, o ge bëëd gen ki mër, ge ótyegø yi bɑ̈ggi oløg.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Adwöög wëywön-ɑ ɑ́kööb wøn, kɑ yɑ tuge, ɑyiebɑ nyingɑ ni ngɑn ceg cyëwø. Apëjje kinni," 
Zechariah4:2 “Á ngø ɑ nenni yi yïn?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ me bɑ dhɑb. O dɑ tɑbi møw me ying mɑl. Teggɑni wɑ̈thi gen dɑ lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈ ɑ́bïryew, kí kɑ̈jji korri mɑc kì ri gen." 
Zechariah4:3 Dɑ yenh dhetun ɑ́ryew mø twïyø kì wɑ̈thi tùngi tengɑni, men ying-ɑ tuung, o megø ying-ɑ tung-ɑ kyeelø.”" 
Zechariah4:4 Codhe ɑpyëjɑ wëywönɑni kinni, “Gïg nyodh-ɑ ngø, wuö?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Apyëje yɑn kinni, “Kwïj yi yïn?” Akyëdɑ kinni, “Kwïj yi yɑn, wuö.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Aköbbi yɑn yi wëywönɑni i köbbɑ Dherubɑbïl kinni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pɑth ki tegí wɑlɑ̀ tegi jølinyí ɑ ótyɑ̈ɑ̈m, de yï ótyɑ̈ɑ̈m-ɑ wëyɑ." 
Zechariah4:7 Akørr mø døngø ni kïttì ówɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì bølí. Kengø ódøøg yi yïn ki gerø, o keny-ɑ ócïb kïn-ɑ cyɑ̈n, ji óryeer kinni, ‘Myëër! Myëër!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Acigi yɑn muujø ki wöödø megø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. 
Zechariah4:9 Ákööb kinni, “Dherubɑbïl tyelli Kengø ɑ́këële piny, o gø ótyëge ki gerø. Keny-ɑ ócwöb møgɑni, óyod yi jiɑ kinni bɑ yɑn ɑ ɑ́ör yïn yï gen." 
Zechariah4:10 Pëthi gen pɑ med, mɑ́ gwøg me nøg ɑ ɑ́gwøg. De pëthi gen ómïni, keny-ɑ ólidh gen Dherubɑbïl e ger-ɑ Kengø.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Codhe ɑpyëjɑ en kinni, “Á ngø ɑ nyodh yi yenh dhetun ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùngi teggi lɑ̈mbɑ̈ɑ̈?" 
Zechariah4:12 O ɑ́ ngø ɑ nyodh yi bɑ̈ddi yɑdh dhetun ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ wɑ̈thi tùngi winni møw ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ bɑ dhɑb møg-ɑ kɑ̈ni wɑ̈g ki møw?” 
Zechariah4:13 Apyëje yɑn kinni, “Ge kwïj yi yïn?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Ge kwïj yi yɑn, wuö.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Codhe, ɑkööbe kinni, “Møgɑni bɑ jøg ɑ́ryew møg-ɑ ɑ́yieny yi Jwøk, kɑ gï rønye kipe kinni o ge göggi gen en.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Codhe ɑdøøgɑ wïjɑ ki tïng mɑl, ɑlïdhɑ ki wɑ̈nyø me pɑ̈rri kì yij yømø." 
Zechariah5:2 Apyëëj yɑn yi wëywödø kinni, “Yï ɑ́lidh-ɑ ngø?” Alöggɑ kinni, “Wɑ̈nyø me pɑ̈rri kì yij yømø, bɑ̈re bɑ mïtïr ɑ́bïngwen, o lɑ̈je bɑ mïtïr ɑ́ngwen kí budi mïtïr.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Aköbbe yɑn kinni, “Yij wɑ̈nyɑni ógweed-ɑ cyën me bï kömi piny bëne, yij ɑ́kyel ógwedø kinni tyëng-ɑ nyi kwɑ̈dø bënn ócyeed wɑ̈g kì yij piny, o yiny-ɑ kyeelø ógwedø kinni, tyëng-ɑ nyi köngi ki pyed ócyeed wɑ̈g thyew." 
Zechariah5:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, cyënnɑni öre’ örø, o ge kedhi gen gøl kur kí gøl ngɑn-ɑ nyi kwöng nyinge ki pyed. Cyënnɑni óbëëdø kì kɑ̈llɑni, o ge ryɑ̈g gen.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Acigi wëywönɑni cwöbø, ɑkööbe kinni, “Lïdhí! Gïjø megø obëënø!”" 
Zechariah5:6 Apëjjɑ kinni, “Bɑ ngø?” Alögge kinni, “Bɑ dhöngø, me nyodh orøøg piny bëne.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Kum dhöngɑni bɑ ɑ́yömø. Kɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́nëënɑ, ɑyɑɑl kumɑni, ɑlïdhɑ ki ngɑndhɑjø me bëëdø kì yije!" 
Zechariah5:8 Akööb wëywönɑni kinni, “Ngɑnɑni nyodh-ɑ rɑ̈jø.” Codhe ɑthɑɑnye gøn piny kì yij dhöngø, kɑ kum dwøøge keje." 
Zechariah5:9 Atïngɑ wïjɑ, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn ɑ́ryew mø pɑ̈ɑ̈r kun-ɑ di yɑn, ge pɑ̈rri kɑ obërr mø teg ni obërri ówɑngø. Atïng gen dhöngɑni kɑ ge opɑ̈ɑ̈rø ki gøn." 
Zechariah5:10 Apyëjɑ wëywödø kinni, “Ge kïdh-ɑ kun ki gøn?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Alögge kinni, “Ge kïdh-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, o gø gëddi gen ki kengø. Keny-ɑ órum kengɑni ki gerø, o dhöngɑni cïb gen yije, o mɑlli kì kenyɑni.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Codhe ɑcigɑ wïjɑ tïngø, kɑ yɑ ólïdhø ki yɑ̈thi liny ɑ́ngwen, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kelli kïtti ngyënyø dilɑl ɑ́ryew." 
Zechariah6:2 Yɑ̈y-ɑ mɑl pyejj-ɑ yi kyënyì mø kwɑrø, ryeew gen pyejj-ɑ yi kyënyì mø lojø," 
Zechariah6:3 dɑ̈ɑ̈g gen pyejj-ɑ yi kyënyì mø tɑr, o ngween gen pyejj-ɑ yi kyënyì mø ri gen di kïddì." 
Zechariah6:4 Apyëjɑ wëywödø kinni, “Á ngø ɑ wɑngi yi gen, wuö?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Alögge kinni, “Møgɑni bɑ yømi wɑ̈thi tùngi piny, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ bøli Wïi piny bëne.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Yɑ̈y-ɑ pyejji yi kyëny-ɑ lojø kedh-ɑ Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀, kì wɑɑng wuudø, o kyëny-ɑ tɑr kedh-ɑ wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o kyëny-ɑ ri gen di kïddì kedh-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl."
