Zechariah6:7 Kyëny-ɑ ri gen di kïddì dwɑdd-ɑ jwɑni be yɑgi piny. Akööb wëywönɑni kinni, “Kedhu be yɑgi piny!” Akedh gen ceth." 
Zechariah6:8 Aryeer wëywödø e köbb-ɑ yɑn kinni, “Kyëny-ɑ ɑ́kedhi Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ wɑɑng wuudø, liny Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́wëggi gen kwöjø.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Aöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïɑ ki wöödø kinni," 
Zechariah6:10 “Kwɑny gëdhh-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi tyëng-ɑ ɑ́dwöög kì yïnø, kì Bɑbïlöniyɑ̀ ɑ løg Keldɑy, kí Töbiyɑ̀, kí Yedɑiyɑ̀, kɑ yï kedhí gøl Yöciyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Dhepɑniyɑ̀." 
Zechariah6:11 Göög ki yɑ̈r ki ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb men-ɑ ɑ́muuj yi gen, kɑ cïb wïj Ókwër-ɑ Dwøng, Jöcwø wɑ̈d Yödhɑdɑk." 
Zechariah6:12 Kɑ köbbí kinni, Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, ‘Jɑl-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ bɑɑd yɑdh ódøngi kì keje, kɑ Kengø døøge ki gerø." 
Zechariah6:13 En ɑ ógerii, o óyïddi ki dhwɑ̈ɑ̈ng rɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, kɑ jie jɑɑge. Ódi ókwërø kì buti kwøme, o ge ógöögø kì kej ɑ́kyel ki mër.’" 
Zechariah6:14 Yɑ̈rɑni óbëëdø kì yij Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ men nyi pɑɑr Keldɑy, ki Töbiyɑ̀, kí Yedɑiyɑ̀, kí Yöciyɑ̀.”" 
Zechariah6:15 Jøg-ɑ bëëdø kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ lɑ̈wi óbï, kɑ ge ókunyø ki geri Kengi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Keny-ɑ órume ki gerø, óyod yi wun kinni Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́ör yɑn yï wun. Møgɑni bënn ópɑ̈dhi kɑ̈jji gen keløg Ciggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg wun ómïdhi yi wun ge bënn ceth." 
Zechariah7:1 Kì ngween runni Dɑryøs ɑ́ rɑ̈nhdwøng, kì ngween cyɑ̈nggi bïngween dwɑ̈tt, ɑ ɑ́ödi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ki wöödø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Zechariah7:2 Cɑredher geki Regemelek kí jø gen ɑ́ör Kengi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yi tyëng Betiil be kwɑjji gyëdh kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j," 
Zechariah7:3 kí be pyëji ókwër geki jøtöng kinni, “Nyi ywöngi wøn kipe rënyi Kengø, kɑ ri wøn nyi twöön wøn kì bïïj dwɑ̈tt, ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd wøn kì yethi runn-ɑ ɑ́pöödh bënn?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Men bɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́öre yɑn. 
Zechariah7:5 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́kööb kinni, “Köbbí tyëng pödhø bënn, kí ókwër kinni, keny-ɑ ɑ́ywöngi gen, kɑ ri gen nyi twöön gen kì bïïj dwɑ̈tt geki bïryeew dwɑ̈tt ki runn pyɑ̈r ɑ́bïryew, ɑ́bëëd e pɑth kiper wøri yɑn." 
Zechariah7:6 O keny-ɑ ɑ́cyɑ̈ɑ̈m gen kɑ ge omɑ̈dhø, ge ɑ́cɑ̈mm-ɑ yethi gen.”" 
Zechariah7:7 Bene gen møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì ri jøtöng mø tyeli mɑl cøn, keny-ɑ ɑ́bëëd e Yerusɑlem nudd e døøj, e pɑ̈ng yi ji geki myërr-ɑ bɑdhhe, kí myërri wɑɑng wurlwɑl, kí myërri thɑ́ kïtti wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø." 
Zechariah7:8 Aödi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ki wöödø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Zechariah7:9 “Kɑ̈ge dööng jiɑ ɑ́cegɑ kinni, ‘Gøggu dyër, kɑ yethi wun nyi ywöngi gen kipe ji møøgø." 
Zechariah7:10 Tyëng-ɑ́ cwøwi gen ɑ́thøw kí kïjj møg-ɑ bëëdø kì kelli wun, ko nyi mød wun, kí tyëng-ɑ jɑdø thyew. Wu ko nyi rum kì ri göggi tyëngmøøgø ki rɑj.’" 
Zechariah7:11 “De jiɑ ɑ́bɑ̈nyi lïngø, kɑ muddi gen ótëngø." 
Zechariah7:12 Kɑ pëthi gen gwøg gen ge teeg ni kït kipe ciggɑ ólïngi yi gen, gen ɑ cigg-ɑ ɑ́örɑ gen kì ri jøtöng møg-ɑ ɑ́bëëd kì tyeli mɑl, ɑrënyi pyëwɑ ki mendwøng." 
Zechariah7:13 Ge nuti lïngø keny-ɑ ɑ́köbbɑ gen, bene ɑ cög kwɑ̈jji gen nuti lïngi yɑn." 
Zechariah7:14 Akedhhɑ gen ni kenyi kedhhi jɑmmì yi ɑtunø, kɑ ge køølɑ be bëëdø kì yethi pödhh-ɑ pɑth. Adöng piny-ɑ døj èn ɑ́ ryɑng, e bong dhɑnhø me bëëdø kì yije.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Aödi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ki wöödø yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Zechariah8:2 “Pyëwɑ ɑ́bëëd e okønø ki kønyi Yerusɑlem kipe mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑrɑ jie, eni mɑ̈ɑ̈dø men-ɑ ɑ́wëggi pyëwɑ rënyø ki tyëng-ɑ mɑɑnii." 
Zechariah8:3 Yɑ ódwöög Yerusɑlem, kɑɑl kwërɑ, o yɑ bëëdɑ kì yije. Yerusɑlem ócwøl ɑ́ kɑɑl dyër geki kïti Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j; kïti kwëre." 
Zechariah8:4 Ywödhh-ɑ kwömi ki kemm ódøøg be bëëdø kì yethi ódɑ̈rri kɑɑl. 
Zechariah8:5 Kɑ yethi yëthe ódøøgø pɑ̈ngø yi othønhø møg tug. 
Zechariah8:6 “Møgɑni órømmi gɑ gïg pɑ cuggi yi tyëng-ɑ nud ɑnɑn, de ge ódi bëëdø gɑ gïg pɑ cuggi kì yïɑ?" 
Zechariah8:7 Jiɑ óyïëëlɑ wɑ̈g kì pödhh-ɑ ɑ́kïdhi gen," 
Zechariah8:8 kɑ ge dwöögɑ kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl geki wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø, o ge bëëd gen kì Yerusɑlem. Ge óbëëdø gɑ jiɑ, o yɑ óbëëdø yɑn ɑ́ Jwøøg gen, ge ójɑɑgɑ ki gøggi dyër geki døøjø." 
Zechariah8:9 “Tëngi pëthi wun! Wu lïng-ɑ kwøb mø ni møg-ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi jøtöng kì bøli keny-ɑ ɑ́këël tyeli Kengɑ piny. 
Zechariah8:10 Kɑ̈ng-ɑ óbëëd bøli kenyɑni nuti bëënø, bong dhɑnhø me cuggi kïr ki dhɑnhø wɑlɑ̀ lɑ̈y, o ji óbëëd yï gen bong mër, ge ceg-ɑ orɑng kì cinggi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, mɑ́ ji ɑ́cwɑ̈ɑ̈gɑ kì ri gen." 
Zechariah8:11 De tyëng-ɑ ɑ́döng kì pönhï pɑ mïdhɑ kɑ yuuɑni. 
Zechariah8:12 Ge ópurø ki byel kì yij mër. Bɑ̈ggi gen ónywøl, kɑ byelli gen ocyegø, kødh óbëëd e gïïr. Tyëng pödhɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́bødh óthödhɑ ki gyëdhhɑni bënn." 
Zechariah8:13 Wun ɑ tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Isrɑil! Kɑ̈ge dööng tyëngpɑth ɑ́bëëd ge nyi lɑm-ɑ ri gen kinni, ‘Kömí ópɑ̈dhi yi ryɑ̈ng ni ryɑ̈ng-ɑ ɑ́pɑ̈dhi kömi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil!’ De wu óyielɑ kɑ tyëngɑni døøg-ɑ be köbbi ri gen kinni, ‘Yï óyïddi ki gyëdh ni gyëdhh-ɑ ɑ́yod yi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki Isrɑil!’ Kɑ ɑ́rum bëëde kinøw, tëngi pëthi wun kɑ wu ko böggi.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ ɑ́rënyi pyëwɑ ki kweyyi wun, ge ɑ́göggɑ ki rɑj ceth." 
Zechariah8:15 Anɑn yɑ dwɑdd-ɑ göggi tyëng Yerusɑlem geki tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ki gïgdøj. Kì bɑng menɑni wu ko böggi. 
Zechariah8:16 Nyi kømmi dhɑnhø dyër ki wɑɑd gen. Nyi cïb wun gøny keje kì burø, nyi bëëd wun wu mër ki ji bënn." 
Zechariah8:17 Wu ko nyi rømmi göggi ji møøgø ki rɑj. Wu ko nyi köngi ki pyed kì burø, mɑ́ pyed kí ruj kí mød mɑɑn yi yɑn.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Aödi Dhekɑriyɑ̀ ki wöödø yi Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni," 
Zechariah8:19 “Twön-ɑ nyi twöön wun ri wun kì ngween dwɑ̈tt, kí bïïj dwɑ̈tt, kí bïryeew dwɑ̈tt, kí pyɑ̈ri dwɑ̈tt, ge óbëëdø gɑ bøli kɑ̈jji kwëër medi pëëth kì yï tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀. Mɑɑru dyër geki mër.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Bøli keny-ɑ óbëën ji Yerusɑlem, ge kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ kɑ̈dd-ɑ lɑ̈wi, ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi." 
Zechariah8:21 Tyëng kɑɑl men, tyëng kɑɑl-ɑ kyeelø óköbbi gen kinni, ‘Wø kedh-ɑ be mɑlli Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì Yerusɑlem, o wø gyëdhe. Bïu kedh wɑ kyeel!’" 
Zechariah8:22 Ji mø gïïr kí pödhh mø teg, ge óbï Yerusɑlem be mɑlli Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ge kwɑjj-ɑ gyëdhhe." 
Zechariah8:23 Kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, tyëngpɑth pyɑ̈rø ókedhi yï wɑ̈d Yeud ɑ́kyel, kɑ gø köbbi gen kinni, ‘Wø ceg-ɑ kedhø kyeel kí yïn, mɑ́ wø ɑ́lïng kinni i Jwøk ying-ɑ kelli wun.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Men bɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j dwɑdd-ɑ cɑyi piny Adɑrɑk geki kɑɑl Dimɑceg. Pɑth ki Isrɑil kete ɑ bɑ mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de kɑɑl-ɑ jɑɑg Arɑm bɑ mee thyew." 
Zechariah9:2 Amɑth, ɑ cïb kew ki Adɑrɑk bɑ mee thyew, cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ̈dd-ɑ døngø; Suur geki Sïdön møg-ɑ rummi gen gïïr." 
Zechariah9:3 Suur ree ɑ́gëdde ki dör mø korrii; ɑ́röri piny ki dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø mø ni tør! 
Zechariah9:4 De jɑmme bënn ókwɑny yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ̈re óleenge nɑm, kɑ Suur rɑ̈b yi en ki mɑc." 
Zechariah9:5 Cɑ́yɑni ólidh yi kɑɑl Ackelön kɑ obwøgø, o Gɑdhɑ̀ pyëwe ónyönhi keny-ɑ ólidhe cɑ́yɑni. Ekrön ókïïr yi wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, mɑ́ e gɑ̈nn-ɑ Gɑdhɑ̀ kinni en ɑ ójog tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø. Gɑdhɑ̀ ómɑg, kɑ rɑ̈dhe mɑg, kɑ Ackelön rënyi kɑ odöngø ɑ́ ryɑng." 
Zechariah9:6 Acdöd óbëëd-ɑ yi jurrì mø bɑ̈nni. Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Athwøøg Pelistiyɑ̀ ócuung yi yɑn." 
Zechariah9:7 Rïngø koo cɑm yi gen kí remø kì ree këti, wɑlɑ̀ ge koo cyɑ̈mø ki gïgcɑmm-ɑ kyeelø møg-ɑ bɑ ɑkerø. Tyëng-ɑ óbødh bënn órëbi ki jiɑ, ge óni kɑl ɑ́kyel kì yij gøl Yeudɑ̀. Ekrön órëbi ki jiɑ ni tyëng Yebus." 
Zechariah9:8 Pinyɑ ókorɑ; jøliny ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ cøri yije. Bong jøgwɑ̈j møg-ɑ óruj jiɑ këti. Orɑɑng jiɑ ɑ́rum ki lidhø yi yɑn.” 
Zechariah9:9 Mïni pëthi wun, wun ɑ tyëng Dhɑyøn! Ryeer wun ki medi pëëth, wun ɑ tyëng Yerusɑlem. Lidh, rɑ̈dhí ɑ bï ɑcɑ̀! Bï kɑ tyɑ̈mø me dwøng, de bɑ mölø, o cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi ɑderø, cyɑ̈dh-ɑ́ɑ̀ kömi ɑderø ówöb." 
Zechariah9:10 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ̈thi liny ónyiigɑ kì Isrɑil o kyënyì ónyiigɑ kì Yerusɑlem, wethh-ɑ nyi nyïɑ̈ggi ki liny órënyi. Rɑ̈dhí óbëëdø ki mër geki pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, Lɑ̈ge ócɑ̈gi kì nɑɑm omelø kɑ gït-ɑ nɑɑm omel-ɑ kyeelø, ócɑ̈gi kì Nɑm Porɑt kɑ wɑ̈dh-ɑ cögi piny.”" 
Zechariah9:11 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Kipe lwöm-ɑ kɑɑmee, lwöm-ɑ ɑ́gɑ̈j ki remi gëdhhì, jií ógøny yi yɑn, ge ógöönyɑ wɑ̈g kì yethi burr-ɑ bong pï kì yïnø." 
Zechariah9:12 Døøg wun, wu tyëng-ɑ yïnø, ɑ nudd yï wun di ngɑ̈ɑ̈dhø, døøg wun keny-ɑ óyieel wun. Gyëdhhi wun ówëggɑ ngënyø kì bɑng orɑng-ɑ ɑ́rɑngi wun." 
Zechariah9:13 Yeudiyɑ̀ ógwøgɑ ɑ́ weth mi jɑl-liny, o Isrɑil ógwøgɑ ɑ́ nywøli weth. Jø Dhɑyøn ógwøgɑ gɑ pilø me nyïɑ̈ggɑ ki tyëng Yönɑn.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ɑ́peeje be liny, nywøli wethe óni pööd mɑl. Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kɑng ókodhe, óbï e kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ yij yømi wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Zechariah9:15 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie ókor yi en, kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø tyɑm gen. Gï ónyøn gen. Ge óryeer kì yij liny ni jøg-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø, remmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ómøli ni remmi gëdhh-ɑ nyi køny wïj këli lɑm." 
Zechariah9:16 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie óyiele ni kenyi yiel jɑlkwɑ̈yø dyëge ki rɑj. Ge órɑ̈ɑ̈dø kì pinye ni tigg-ɑ per gen teg kì ri yɑ̈ɑ̈r wïj." 
Zechariah9:17 Piny óbëëd e ce døj ɑ́ ngø! Othønhø ódøngi kɑ dëlli gen ótëngø yi byelli pinyɑni geki møgi oløge. 
Zechariah10:1 Cwöddi wun ki kødh kì yï Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, e kødh køm-ɑ temø. O mɑl wëgge ogwel, o wu nënge ki kødh, o pwödh bënn wëgge mɑ̈rø." 
Zechariah10:2 Ájwöggì geki tyëngbɑg pɑ nyi kømmi dyër, o ge nyi lɑ̈g-ɑ lɑ̈ggi pyed, cïïjø mi gen bong gïndøj kì ree. O ji nyi göjji ge’ wïïnø. Ge nyii rɑngø mɑ́ yï gen bong pëëji." 
Zechariah10:3 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Pyëwɑ rɑɑj ki tyëngpɑth møg-ɑ jɑɑg jiɑ, o ge cɑyɑ’ cɑyø. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ bɑ møgɑ, o ge ókongɑ. Ge bɑ kyënyɑ, kyënyi liny." 
Zechariah10:4 Kelli gen ócwööb yi jɑgg, kí pëjji liny møg-ɑ ójɑɑg jiɑ." 
Zechariah10:5 Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ óni jøg-ɑ nyi tyɑ̈mø, kɑ tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø nyøn gen kì piny kì yethi yëëth. Ge ónyïɑ̈ggi mɑ́ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ying-ɑ tuung gen. Cɑgg ɑ́ jøkyënyi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø, gï ótyɑm gen." 
Zechariah10:6 “Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ówëggɑ tëngø; tyëng Isrɑil óyielɑ. Pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen, kɑ ge dwöögɑ pɑc bënn. Ge óbëëd e dhɑ̈y ge ce nuti pɑ̈nyø bɑnyø yi yɑn. Bene yɑn Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøøg gen; kwɑ̈jji gen óløøgɑ." 
Zechariah10:7 Tyëng Isrɑil ótëngi ni jøliny, pëthi gen ómïni ni ji mø mɑdh møgi oløg. Tyɑ̈mø mi gen ópɑrri yi kwɑrri gen, kɑ pëthi gen nyii mïnø kipe gïn-ɑ ɑ́gwøg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Zechariah10:8 “Jiɑ ócwølɑ, kɑ ge cøngɑ kej ɑ́kyel. Ge óyielɑ, o ge óngënyi ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd gen cøn." 
Zechariah10:9 Cɑgg ɑ́ kɑ ɑ́kedhhɑ gen, yɑ ópɑrri yi gen kì kɑ̈jj-ɑ lɑ̈wi. Ge óbødh geki nyigi gen, kɑ ge dwöög-ɑ pɑc kyeel." 
Zechariah10:10 Ge ódwöögɑ kì Rïp geki Acuur, kɑ ge cïbɑ piny-ɑ bɑ mi gen Ge ócïbɑ Gilyɑd geki Lubnɑn thyew, pinyɑni bëne ópɑ̈ng yi ji." 
Zechariah10:11 Kɑ̀ kɑ̈l gen yij nɑɑm omelø, yij orɑng, ɑpɑgø gøjɑ’ gøjø yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kɑ tyeli nɑm othwøwø. Athwøøg Acuur ódwöög piny, kɑ tegi Rïp ólɑ̈ɑ̈nyø." 
Zechariah10:12 Jiɑ ówëggɑ tëngø, yɑ ómɑlli yi gen, kɑ kwøbbɑ lïngi yi gen.” Møg-ɑ ɑ́kwøb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑgɑk." 
Zechariah11:1 Yieb dhøggi dörrí Lubnɑn, o yenh sɑndɑl rɑ̈b yi mɑc." 
Zechariah11:2 Ywöngi wun kɑ wu kïïw wun, wun ɑ yenh ɑmedh! Yenh sɑndɑl ɑ́pɑ̈ɑ̈dh, yenh-ɑ per gen teg ɑ́rënyi! Ywöngi wun kɑ wu kïïw wun, wun ɑ óthurri Bɑcɑn, thïm-ɑ twij ɑ́ngøl piny!" 
Zechariah11:3 Jɑgg ceg-ɑ ywøg, mɑ́ kɑ̈ɑ̈r gen ɑ́wɑ̈ɑ̈ny! Lïngu ngɑ̈ri ngurrì, mɑ́ wɑg men-ɑ́ yije nyi bëëd yi gen kì kömi Nɑm Urdun ɑ́rënyi!" 
Zechariah11:4 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, Jwøgɑ yɑ ɑ́köbbe kinni, “Göög yïn ɑ́ jɑlkwɑ̈yi dyëg-ɑ ókïdhi be ngɑlø yi wëëg gen yøw," 
Zechariah11:5 ge nyi wɑ̈dhi kɑ ngɑlø yi wëëg gen yøw, o ge pɑ nyi cɑy, kɑ rïngø nyi ngeew gen wɑ̈g ge okööbø kinni, ‘Pwøj wɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j! Wɑ ɑ́kɑ̈ri!’ Men-ɑ́ jøkwɑ̈yø mø gen yethi gen pɑ ywöngi kipe gen.”" 
Zechariah11:6 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yijɑ pɑ ywöngi kipe tyëng kömi piny këti. Yɑn kiriɑ ɑ ócïb ji cinggi jɑggi gen. Piny órënyi yi jɑggɑni, o koo yiel yi yɑn kì cinggi gen.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Yɑ ɑ́kïr yi tyëngdyëg. Agöögɑ yɑn ɑ́ kwɑ̈yi dyëg-ɑ óngɑl. Akɑ̈bbɑ ki lødh ɑ́ryew, kɑ ɑ́kyel cɑgɑ ɑ́ “Jwödhø,” kɑ men-ɑ kyeelø cɑgɑ ɑ́ “Rëbø.” Codhe ɑkorɑ dyëg." 
Zechariah11:8 Kɑ pyëwɑ órënyø ki jøkwɑ̈yø ɑ́dɑ̈g mø mɑɑn yɑn, kɑ ge nɑ̈gɑ bënn kì yij dwɑ̈y ɑ́kyel." 
Zechariah11:9 Codhe, ɑköbbɑ dyëg kinni, “Yɑ pɑth ki jɑlkwɑ̈yø mi wun këti. Ngɑn thøw, wiy thøwe, men rënyi wiy rënye. Møg-ɑ ódöng, ri gen ónɑ̈g yi gen keti gen.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Codhe, ɑkwɑnyɑ lonh-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ “Jwödhø” kɑ torɑ, ɑ́ nyuudhi mi pɑ̈di lwöbø men-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j geki pödhh." 
Zechariah11:11 Lwömɑni ɑ́pɑ̈d dicyɑ̈ngɑni. Codhe, ɑliidh møgɑni yi tyëng-ɑ nyi ngyewi dyëg, kɑ gø yod gen kinni, bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ kööbø kì riɑ." 
Zechariah11:12 Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni, “Keløg e odwɑddø yi wun, mëggu yɑn kööngɑ, de keløg e pɑ dwɑddi yi wun, wiy bëëde.” Codhe, ɑcudi gen yɑn ki ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g gɑ kööngɑ." 
Zechariah11:13 Aköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Cïb gen kömi ngyënyyi Kengø.” Akwɑnyɑ ngyëny ɑ́tegg pyɑ̈r ɑ́dɑ̈g, møg-ɑ ɑ́rømmi yi gen gɑ kööngɑ ceth, ɑcïbɑ gen kömi ngyënyyi Kengø." 
Zechariah11:14 Codhe, ɑtorɑ ryeew lødh, men-ɑ cwøl ɑ́ “Rëbø.” Kɑ Yeudiyɑ̀ ódɑ̈ngø geki Isrɑil." 
Zechariah11:15 Codhe, ɑköbbi yɑn yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, “Døøg ki gwøg yïn ɑ́ jɑlkwɑ̈yø këti, göög yïn ɑ́ jɑlkwɑ̈yø mɑ dhëg." 
Zechariah11:16 Dyëgɑ ɑ́cïbɑ cingi jɑlkwɑ̈yø me pɑ yiel gen kɑ̀ dwɑddi gen nɑ̈gø, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈ny pɑ yɑb yi en, o møg-ɑ ri gen di kedd pɑ tuur yi en, wɑlɑ̀ møg-ɑ døøj pɑ pidhe. De yöd e cɑm-ɑ rïnggi møg-ɑ cwɑɑdhø, kɑ dɑddi gïn nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈le wɑ̈g." 
Zechariah11:17 Jɑlkwɑ̈y-ɑ dhëg menɑni ree dɑ cyën! Dyëge ɑ́wiye piny. Ónyönhi yi liny. Cinge ódhëg, kɑ wɑnge, wɑɑng kyëj ocørø.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Men bɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiper Isrɑil; Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ɑ́cwɑ̈j mɑl kí piny, kɑ dhɑnhø thödhe ki wëy, okööbø kinni," 
Zechariah12:2 “Yerusɑlem ógwøgɑ e nɑ óthɑ̈ngi møgi oløg, pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhe bënn ómɑ̈dhi kɑ ge ócyerø ni ji-ɑ ónɑ̈gø yi møgø. O keny-ɑ ótyeg gen Yerusɑlem, kɑ̈ddi Yeudiyɑ̀ ceg kɑ tyegø thyew." 
Zechariah12:3 De keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, Yerusɑlem ógwøgɑ e nɑ kït me peeg. Pönh-ɑ ópɑ̈nyii ki tïngø, ótor yi en. Pödhhi kömi piny bënn órëbi kipe nyɑɑg ki en." 
Zechariah12:4 Kì bøli kenyɑni, pödhhɑni ógöjjɑ wɑ̈ɑ̈rø, kɑ jøkyënyì omyëlø. Tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀ ókøny yi yɑn, de kyënyi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø ógöjjɑ cøørø." 
Zechariah12:5 “Wɑ̈thi kɑ̈lli Yeudɑ̀ okööbø ki pëthi gen kinni, ‘Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j jie møg-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, nyii thödhø yi en ki tegø.’" 
Zechariah12:6 “Kì bøli kenyɑni kɑ̈lli Yeudɑ̀ ógwøøgɑ ge nɑ mɑc kì yij thïm, wɑlɑ̀ kì yij pwödhi gemè me rum cyegø. Pödhh-ɑ bɑdhhi gen bënn ónɑ̈g yi gen. Tyëng Yerusɑlem óbëëd ge pɑ böggi." 
Zechariah12:7 “Yɑn yɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, liny Yeudiyɑ̀ ówëggɑ tyɑ̈mø møti, kipe kinni o kwɑrri Debïd geki tyëng Yerusɑlem cög ge pɑ thwøg ki gen." 
Zechariah12:8 Kì bøli kenyɑni bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ ókorri tyëng-ɑ bëëdø kì Yerusɑlem, o cɑgg ɑ́ ngɑn nyødh kì kelli gen, ótëngi ni kɑ ɑ́bëëd Debïd. Ge ópyejji yi kwɑrri Debïd ni kenyi pyëjji wëywöni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, wɑlɑ̀ ni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kiree." 
Zechariah12:9 Kì bøli kenyɑni, pödhh-ɑ dwɑddi pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi Yerusɑlem bënn ónɑ̈g yi yɑn." 
Zechariah12:10 “Kwɑrri Debïd geki tyëng Yerusɑlem óthödhɑ ki wëyi ywøøg yeth geki wëyi mɑ̈ddø. Ge ónenni yï ngɑn-ɑ ɑ́cwøb yi gen kɑ othøø, o gø óywøg yi gen ni nyɑɑr gen men bɑ ɑ́kyel. Ge óywöngi ki ywøng teg ni ji møg ywøg wɑ̈d gen, wɑ̈n-ɑ kɑyø." 
Zechariah12:11 Kì bøli kenyɑni, óbëëd e dɑ ywøg me dwøng kì Yerusɑlem, ni ywøng-ɑ ɑ́ywøøg Adɑd Rimön, kì thwøri Megidø" 
Zechariah12:12 Kɑl óywöng-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈ye. Gøl Debïd, kí gøl Nɑthɑn, kí gøl Leebì, kí gøl Cimeì, kí kɑ̈ll-ɑ kyeelø bënn, gøl ywöng-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈ye, cwøwi gøl óywöng-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈yi gen, o mɑ̈nni gen ywöng-ɑ́ɑ̀ wɑ̈yi gen thyew.”" 
Zechariah12:13  
Zechariah12:14  
Zechariah13:1 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, wɑɑng pï óyieb, o pïgɑni lwøøg orøøg kwɑrri Debïd geki tyëng Yerusɑlem, kí bɑ̈jji gen kì bɑng kɑ ɑ́mɑlli gen ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth." 
Zechariah13:2 Kì bøli kenyɑni nyingi ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth ówɑ̈ɑ̈ny kì yij pödhø, kɑ bong-ɑ ngɑn pɑrri gen këti. Ngɑn-ɑ kööbø cem ɑ́ jɑltöng ónyiigɑ kì pönhï. O mɑlli ngïjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth lɑ̈ɑ̈nyɑ." 
Zechariah13:3 Ngɑn-ɑ ónudd e otöngø, wïye kí meye ókööbø kinni nɑ̈g, mɑ́ e ɑ́kööb cem e kööbø kɑ nyingi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, de yöd e ceg-ɑ pyed. Keny-ɑ ótönge, ónɑ̈g-ɑ yi wïye geki meye ceth." 
Zechariah13:4 Kì bøli kenyɑni, jøtöng wɑ̈thi gen ólɑ̈ɑ̈y yi kwøbb-ɑ ɑ́cɑ̈rri gen keløg gï ótöng yi gen, ge koo rugø ki ógudh-ɑ ócwɑ̈jø ki yëyy, ge wëny-ɑ ji." 
Zechariah13:5 De jɑltöng ókyëdø kinni, ‘Yɑ pɑth ki jɑltöng, de yɑ bɑ jɑlpur, bene gwøgɑ kër-ɑ ɑ́pïïdhɑ ceth.’" 
Zechariah13:6 Keny-ɑ ópyëjii kinni, ‘Á kedd mø ngø ɑ rií ɑnɑn?’ Ólöggi kinni, ‘Riɑ ɑ́kïdh ɑ gøl mɑ̈dhɑ ki kedd.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cyëëw pilø, kɑ yï pɑ̈ɑ̈r kömi jɑl-ɑ kwɑy dyëgɑ! Nɑ̈ɑ̈g, o dyëg tɑy gen. Jiɑ ópwöödɑ piny." 
Zechariah13:8 O ryeew ɑ́dɑ̈gg kwɑnni ji kì yij pödhø bëne óthøw. 
Zechariah13:9 O kyeel ɑ́dɑ̈gg kwɑnni ji men-ɑ ódöng, órɑng yi yɑn ki mɑc ni kenyi rɑɑng ɑ́tegø kí dhɑb. Codhe o yɑ kwɑjji yi gen, o kwɑ̈jji gen óløøg yi yɑn. Kɑ ge köbbɑ kinni ge bɑ jiɑ, kɑ ge okööbø kinni, yɑ bɑ Jwøøg gen.”" 
Zechariah14:1 Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng cɑ́yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́cyɑ̈ngi. Yerusɑlem óryɑ̈g, kɑ gïg-ɑ ɑ́kɑb pɑ̈ngi ge onennø yi wun ki nyingi wun." 
Zechariah14:2 Pödhh-ɑ kyeelø óreb yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, o ge bï gen be nyɑɑg ki Yerusɑlem, o kɑɑlɑni mɑg. Udde óyɑg kɑ tyëng-ɑ mɑ̈nn mød. Kɑ budi ji kïdhi yïnø, de kwï jii kɑɑlɑni ódöng." 
Zechariah14:3 Codhe, o Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kedhe be nyɑɑg ki pödhhɑni ni kɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈gge cøn." 
Zechariah14:4 Kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ócungi kì wïj Kïti Dhetun, ɑ ying wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl kì Yerusɑlem. Codhe, o kïnɑni ree pɑ̈nge ɑ́ ɑ́ryew, o kɑɑm gen cwööb yi tör me dwøng, cɑg kì wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng mwøl gïti wɑɑng cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng böörø. Budi kït ókedhi wɑɑng wuudø, kɑ bun-ɑ kyeelø kedh-ɑ wɑɑng wurlwɑl." 
Zechariah14:5 Wu ópɑ̈r wu kɑ̈l-ɑ yij tör-ɑ dɑ̈ɑ̈ng kïttì. Wu ópɑ̈r ni kɑ ɑ́pɑ̈r kweyyi wun yi onhɑ̈ɑ̈nh piny kì ri Rɑ̈dh Udhiyɑ̀, rɑ̈ɑ̈dh Yeudiyɑ̀. Jwøgɑ, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j óbï geki wëywödde bënn." 
Zechariah14:6 Keny-ɑ óbëën bøli kenyɑni, óbëëd e bong ɑ́piy wɑlɑ̀ kööjø," 
Zechariah14:7 wɑlɑ̀ muudhø, piny ócög e tɑr kì dicɑ̈ng kí wɑ̈r. Bøli keny-ɑ ócwöb gïgɑni ngɑ̈ny-ɑ yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kete." 
Zechariah14:8 Keny-ɑ óbëën cyɑ̈ngɑni, pïg tïl ómulli kì Yerusɑlem, budi pïgɑni ómøli Luuy Omelø, kɑ bun-ɑ kyeelø møll-ɑ Nɑɑm Omeli Tɑr, pïgɑni ótyëg run bëne ge ómullø kì lew kí cwir." 
Zechariah14:9 Codhe, o piny bëne jɑɑg yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, ómɑlli yi ji bënn ɑ́ Jwøk, o nyinge óyod yi gen bënn." 
Zechariah14:10 Piny bëne wïje ópɑ̈ɑ̈r, cɑg kì Gebɑ̀ kì wɑɑng wuudø gïti Rimön kì wɑɑng wurlwɑl. De Yerusɑlem ógöögø ɑ́ ótong kɑ ólɑ̈nyø, cɑ̈gi kì Dhøg Ben Yɑmïn e gït-ɑ Dhøg Wïj Tung, keny-ɑ ɑ́di dhøng-ɑ weenø, kɑ ócɑ̈gø kì ri Ønbɑ̈r mi Anɑnel gïti keny-ɑ nyi biij oløg mi gøldwøng." 
Zechariah14:11 Ji óbëëdø kì Yerusɑlem e bong gïn böggi yi gen; bong gïn cigii rënyø. 
Zechariah14:12 Pödhh-ɑ́ nyi nyïɑ̈ggi ki Yerusɑlem bënn ógöjji rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëlli mø rijjø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Dëlli gen ówɑdhhi piny ge nudd ge ócungø kì kömi tyelli gen, o nyingi gen ókwɑ̈ɑ̈g yethi uddi gen, kɑ lebbi gen kwɑ̈ɑ̈g-ɑ yethi dhøggi gen." 
Zechariah14:13 Ge ógöjji tummi wɑ̈thi gen yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kì cyɑ̈ngɑni, kɑ ngɑn nyi wɑ̈dh-ɑ töngi kömi wɑɑd gen yøw." 
Zechariah14:14 Jø Yeudiyɑ̀ ónyïɑ̈ggi kiper Yerusɑlem, kɑ kɑ̈ɑ̈r pödhh-ɑ kyeelø kɑb yi gen, ɑ løg dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø kí ógudh mø gïïr cɑrø." 
Zechariah14:15 Jɑmmi tyëngmɑ̈ɑ̈nø óthøw; gen ɑ kyënyì kí ógɑll, kí ɑmɑl geki ɑderr." 
Zechariah14:16 Codhe, o tyëng-ɑ bodh kì kelli pödhh-ɑ ɑ́nyïɑ̈ggi ki Yerusɑlem nyi bï gen be mɑlli Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ rɑ̈dh kì yethi runn bënn, kí be gwøg ki Kwëër Akɑnnì." 
Zechariah14:17 O pödhh-ɑ óbɑ̈nyi ki bëën be mɑlli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́ rɑ̈dh, kødh koo mɑ̈gi kì piny gen." 
Zechariah14:18 Keløg tyëng Rïp pɑ bï be gwøg ki Kwëër Akɑnnì, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ceg-ɑ ödi kömi gen ki rɑ̈ɑ̈m dëllì møg-ɑ ɑ́göjje pödhh-ɑ kyeelø, møg-ɑ nuti bëënø." 
Zechariah14:19 Bene cɑ́y-ɑ óbï kömi Rïp geki pödhh-ɑ koo gwøg Kwëër Akɑnnì bënn ɑnɑn. 
Zechariah14:20 Kì bøli kenyɑni, cɑgg ɑ́ óköddi muddi kyënyì, ge ógwed kinni, “Athyeey Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j”. Dɑ̈ggi Kengø óbëëdø gɑ ɑkwër ni tɑ̈mmi këli lɑm." 
Zechariah14:21 Dɑ̈ggi Yerusɑlem geki dɑ̈ggi Yeudiyɑ̀ bënn ókwër kipe gwøøg Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. Óbëëd ɑ́ yethi gen ɑ nyi thɑɑl gëdhhì yi tyëng-ɑ nyi muuj gen. Kì bøli kenyɑni óbong-ɑ jøngyew kì yij Kengi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Malachi1:1 Men bɑ wööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j men-ɑ ɑ́öre Isrɑil e kɑ̈ll-ɑ yi Mɑlɑkì. 
Malachi1:2 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu mɑɑr yi yɑn, wu tyëng Isrɑil!” De ge yöd ge okööbø kinni, “Mɑɑr-ɑ mɑɑr wøn ɑ́nyodh yi yïn kidï?” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggi kinni, “Isøø ɑ́bëëd gɑ nyiimëëg geki Yɑgob, yɑ ɑ́mɑɑr-ɑ Yɑgob geki kwɑrre," 
Malachi1:3 de Isøø ɑ́bɑnyɑ geki kwɑrre. Pödhi Isøø, piny-ɑ bɑ kïttì, ɑ́gwøgɑ ɑ́ ryɑng. Bong dhɑnhø me bëëdø kì yije ɑnɑn, ɑ́lɑg-ɑ yi ógwøgg.”" 
Malachi1:4 Keløg kwɑrri Isøø, ɑ løg tyëng Edöm okööbø kinni, “Pödhi wøn ɑ́toor piny de óger yi wøn këti.” Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ólöggi kinni, “Ke døøgu en ki gerø, toorɑ’ piny këti. Ge ócwølli yi ji gɑ pönh-ɑ rɑj, pönh-ɑ ócög e omɑɑnø yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j gïti ɑtheer.”" 
Malachi1:5 Wu tyëng Isrɑil, wu ólïdhi ki nyingi wun, kɑ wu okööbø kinni, “Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïe dɑ tegø kì kömi pödhh bënn; cɑgg pödhhɑni pɑth ki pödhi Isrɑil!”" 
Malachi1:6 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Dhɑnhø nyii wørø yi wɑ̈de, o bɑ̈ng wɑ̈n nyii wørø yi en. Yɑ bɑ wïyi wun, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ pɑ wøru yɑn? O yɑ bɑ wïi wun, ɑ́ kipe ngø ɑ pɑ böggu yɑn? Wun ɑ ókwër, yɑ ɑ́biw yi wun, de wu yöd wu opëjø kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́biw yi wøn kidï?’" 
Malachi1:7 Wu ónyudhɑ kër-ɑ biw wun yɑn. Wu ɑ́kïdh-ɑ jɑmmì geki muggi mø ywëdhø yij këlɑ. De wu okööbø kinni, ‘Áywëdh yi wøn kidï?’ Bɑ ɑbiw yi wun, kɑ̀ rum wun kinni i këli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bong pere." 
Malachi1:8 Kenyi kɑ̈ni wun ki jɑmmì mø bɑ cörr, gɑ gëdhhì, rømmi yi wun e pɑth ki gïnrɑj? O kenyi kɑ̈ni wun ki jɑmmì mø bɑ ngöll, kí møg dëlli gen rɑ̈mø, rømmi yi wun e pɑth ki gïnrɑj? Keløg jɑmm-ɑ ni møgɑni muuj wu’ jɑngi wun, gï oyïëyø yi en, kɑ wu pwøj en?”" 
Malachi1:9 Anɑn wun ɑ ókwër, kwɑjju Jwøk o wɑ gögge ki gïndøj. Kwɑ̈jji wun pɑ løøg yi en, o bɑ bɑ̈jji wun." 
Malachi1:10 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ede ɑ bëëd e bong ngɑn cyëëg dhø Kengø kì kelli wun, o wu mɑ̈ɑ̈ne kodh ki mɑc kì wïj këlɑ, pyëwɑ pɑ med ki wun; gëdhh-ɑ muuju yɑn pɑ yïëy yi yɑn." 
Malachi1:11 Yɑ owørø yi jurrì bënn kì kömi piny, cɑg kì ri tuuli cɑ̈ng gïti kɑ̀ budde. Yɑ nyii rɑ̈bbø yi gen ki bɑkur, kɑ yɑ nyi muuj gen ki gëdhhì mø dhïw. O yɑ owørø yi gen." 
Malachi1:12 De yɑ ceg kɑ biwø yi wun kɑ̀ kööb wun kinni i këlɑ bong pere, kí kenyi kïdhu wïj këlɑ ki gïg-ɑ cedh yi wun kì kelli jɑmmi wun." 
Malachi1:13 Wu okööbø kinni, ‘Wø ɑ́pïd yi gïgɑni bënn!’ Wu törr-ɑ wɑ̈thi wun kì bølɑ. Kɑ yɑ nyi muuj yi wun ki jɑmm-ɑ bɑ ɑkwɑll, kí mø bɑ ngöll, kí mø dëlli gen rɑ̈mø. Wu orumø kinni ge óyïëy yi yɑn ki yï wun?" 
Malachi1:14 Ngɑn köngi ce yɑ óthödhe ki gïïpiny, kɑ yɑ muuje gëëdhi me rɑj, e kelli jɑmme dɑ mø døj, ngɑn ni menɑni ree dɑ cyën! Mɑ́ yɑ bɑ rɑ̈dh me dwøng, o yɑ oböggø yi jurrì bënn.”" 
Malachi2:1 Wïlɑ̈bø Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j köbb-ɑ ókwër kinni, “Cigg møg bɑ kiper wun, wun ɑ ókwër." 
Malachi2:2 Keløg wu pɑ lïngø, o keløg kwøbbɑ pɑ cïb wun pëthi wun, kɑ nyingɑ wør yi wun, wu göjjɑ’ cyën, kɑ gyëdhhi wun løgɑ cyën." 
Malachi2:3 Nyigi wun ógöjji cyën, kɑ nyingi wun wøødhɑ ki wɑyyi gëdhh-ɑ nyi ngɑl yi wun, kɑ wu weddi kömi kwëëdh wɑyyì." 
Malachi2:4 Wu ɑ́örɑ cigg møg kɑ per kinni, o lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm wøn, wøki Leebì kweyi wun, cöge e pɑ pɑ̈d." 
Malachi2:5 “Lwöbø ɑ́ying-ɑ kɑɑm wøn ki kweyyi wun, lwömi wëy kí mër. Wëy geki mër ɑ́mëggɑ gen kiper kinni, o yɑ wør yi gen. Yɑ ɑ́wør yi gen kidyër kì yethi cyɑ̈nggɑni, kɑ nyingɑ böggi yi gen." 
Malachi2:6 Ge ɑ́pwöny-ɑ kwøbb-ɑ bɑ dyër, pɑth ki bɑ̈jjø ɑ ɑ́pwönyi yi gen. Ge ɑ́bëëd ge nyi gwøg-ɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn, kɑ ji mø gïïr dwöög gen wɑ̈g kì yuu orøg." 
Malachi2:7 Gwøøg ókwër bɑ pwönyi kwøbbi Jwøk, Ciggi Jwøk dïd-ɑ yï gen yi ji, mɑ́ ge bɑ jøwööni Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Malachi2:8 “De ɑnɑn, wun ɑ ókwër, yuu-ɑ dyër ɑ́kyëj yi wun. Ji mø gïïr ɑ́göjji orøg yi pwöny-ɑ pwönyi yi wun. Lwöm-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm wøn, wøki kweyyi wun, ɑ́pɑ̈d yi wun." 
Malachi2:9 Yɑn kì tungɑ thyew, wu göjjɑ’ cedhø yi tyëng Isrɑil, mɑ́ ciggɑ nuti lïngø yi wun, o kenyi pwönyu jiɑ, wu nyi pwönyi wu ceg-ɑ geny.”" 
Malachi2:10 Wïyee pɑth ki ɑ́kyel wɑ bënn? Wɑ nuti cwɑ̈j-ɑ yi Jwøk ɑ́kyel wɑ bënn? De wɑde ɑ nyi pɑ̈d wɑ kwøb ki riee, o ede lwöm-ɑ kɑɑm Jwøk geki kweyyee ɑ biw wɑ en?" 
Malachi2:11 Wu tyëng Yeudiyɑ̀, wude ɑ pɑ̈d wun lwöm-ɑ ɑ́ying kɑɑm wun ki Jwøk, kɑ wu pëgg-ɑ be gwøg ki gïgrijjø kì Yerusɑlem geki yij pödhø bëne? Kɑ Keng-ɑ mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j bwöl yi wun. Kɑ wu ónyömø ki mɑ̈nn mø kwɑjji jwögg-ɑ pɑth." 
Malachi2:12 Tyëng-ɑ göögø ki gïg ni møgɑni kì kelli Isrɑil óngøl wɑ̈yi gen, cɑgg ge nyi kɑ̈ni ki gëdhhì mø muuj gen Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j." 
Malachi2:13 Gïjø megø ɑ gwøg yi wun èn. Këli lɑm mi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́mud yi wun ki pïi nyingi wun, wu óywöngø, wu okïïwø, mɑ́ gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuju en pɑ nyi yïëy yi en këti ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Malachi2:14 Wu cög wu opëjø kinni, “Ede pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ pɑ nyi mïne yi gëdhh-ɑ nyi muuj yi wøn?” Bɑ kipe kɑ ɑ́tɑ̈ɑ̈ng nyɑn-ɑ ɑ́nywøm yi yïn yï bɑ wøb. Ábëëd ɑ́ cyëgí, o ɑ́tɑ̈ng yi yïn ngö yï ɑ́rum ki köngø kì bøli Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, kinni ómïdhi yi yïn e bɑ cyëgí ceth." 
Malachi2:15 Wu nuti rebø yi Jwøk, kɑ wu ogöögø ki dhɑnhø ɑ́kyel? Bɑ kiper ngø ɑ ɑ́rebe wun? Bɑ kipe kinni o wu yïddi wun ki nywøl mø bɑ jii Jwøk kidyër. Adɑ́ ko di ngɑn me tɑ̈ng cyëge cyee." 
Malachi2:16 Jwøøg Isrɑil, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Tɑ̈ng, mɑɑn yi yɑn. Pyëwɑ nyii rënyø kenyi di ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, menɑni rɑɑj. Yɑ kyëdd-ɑ wun, ko di ngɑn tɑ̈ng cyëge, møg-ɑ kwöng yi wun ko nyi pɑ̈d wun.”" 
Malachi2:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pïd yi wun ki kwøbbi wun. De wu ceg-ɑ pyëj kinni, “Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pïd yi wøn kidï?” Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ɑ́pïd yi ki kwøbbi wun kinni, “Tyëng-ɑ göögø ki gïgrijjø bënn mɑɑr yi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j,” Kí pyëjji wun kinni, “Ágøne Jwøng-ɑ ɑ́kømmi i nyi gøgg-ɑ dyër?”" 
Malachi3:1 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Lïng wun, jɑlwöönɑ óörɑ bølɑ, be gwiri yöö kiperɑ. Wïi wun men-ɑ pyënyi yi wun, óceg ì nywil kì yij Kenge, jɑlwööni lwöbø men-ɑ yɑb yi wun óbï.”" 
Malachi3:2 Bong ngɑn-ɑ óböyi ki cuung kì bøle keny-ɑ óbëëne; óni sɑbon ɑ nyi kɑ̈ɑ̈l cïl bënn wɑ̈g; o óni mɑc ɑ nyi leeny ɑ́tegø o dhïwe. 
Malachi3:3 Óni bødhø ɑ nyi leny ɑ́tegø o dhïwe, ni bønh-ɑ leny dhɑb kí ɑ́tegø, ókwër ógwøg ge dhïw yi jɑlwööni Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j. O ge døøg gen be muuji Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ki gëdhhì mø dhïw." 
Malachi3:4 Codhe, o pyëw Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j døøge be mïnø yi gëdhh-ɑ nyi muujii yi Yeudiyɑ̀ geki tyëng Yerusɑlem ni kɑ ɑ́bëëde cøn kɑ̈ge dööng." 
Malachi3:5 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Yɑ óbï yï wun be cɑyi wun. Tyëng-ɑ gøggi yɑdh ójwɑn yi yɑn ki cɑyø, geki cwøw-ɑ yɑ̈bø ki mɑ̈nn, kí mɑ̈nn-ɑ yɑ̈bø ki cwøw, geki tyëng-ɑ nyi köngi ki pyed kì burø, kí tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi muuj kööngi ngeti gwøg, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi ruj thwömm geki kïjj, kí tyëng-ɑ nyi ruj ngeti jur-ɑ kyeelø men-ɑ buti gen, kí tyëng-ɑ pɑ nyi wør yɑn; ge ócɑyɑ bënn." 
Malachi3:6 “Mɑ́ yɑ bɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j, riɑ pɑ wil yi yɑn, o lwöbø pɑ pɑ̈d yi yɑn, kwɑrri Yɑgob nudd gɑ jiɑ." 
Malachi3:7 Áwöni kì ri kweyyi wun, wu bɑny-ɑ ciggɑ, o ge nuti mïdhø yi wun. Dwöögu köörɑ, o wu óyiel yi yɑn. De wu opëjø kinni, ‘Gwøg wø ngø, o wø dwöög wøn yïí?’" 
Malachi3:8 Jwøk ócuggø wënyø yi dhɑnhø cøn? Pɑ cuggi kinni tek. De yɑde ɑ wënyu yɑn? Wu okööbø kinni, ‘Yï ɑ́wëny yi wøn kidï?’ Yɑ köbb-ɑ wun kinni, wu ɑ́kwɑ̈ddi kì yïɑ kɑ̀ pɑ nyi mëggu yɑn ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun geki gëdhhì." 
Malachi3:9 Cyën nud kì ri wun bënn, mɑ́ yɑ ɑ́wëny yi pödhø bëne." 
Malachi3:10 Kɑ̈nu ødɑ ki ɑ́kyeel pyɑ̈rri jɑmmi wun bënn, o gïncɑm bëëde e nud kì ødɑ. Pɑ̈nyu yɑn ki göggi møgɑni, o lidh yi wun keløg ɑwɑjji mɑl pɑ yïëbbɑ wun, kɑ gyëdh kønyɑ kömi wun." 
Malachi3:11 Bɑ̈nyø geki twöngg-ɑ kyeelø ómɑ̈ɑ̈nɑ cɑmi byelli wun. Köthi yenhi wun óbëëd ge pɑ̈ng yi nywøl. 
Malachi3:12 Codhe, o wu cwølli yi jurr-ɑ kyeelø wu bɑ ɑgyëdh, mɑ́ piny wun óbëëd e bɑ kej bëëdø me døøj.”" 
Malachi3:13 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Wu ɑ́kööb ki kwøb mø rijjø ki mendwøng kì riɑ. De wu opëjø kinni, ‘Bɑ ngø ɑ rɑj, ɑ ɑ́kømmi yi wøn kì rií?’" 
Malachi3:14 Wu okööbø kinni, ‘Mɑlli Jwøk bong pere, ɑ́ ngø ɑ yod kì bɑng mïdhi cigge? Wɑlɑ̀ nyudhi Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j kinni, wø ɑ́yewi ki orøøg wøn kɑ̈ɑ̈l-ɑ ngø?" 
Malachi3:15 Nënni e bɑ tyëng-ɑ tɑ̈dø ɑ pëthi gen med. Pɑth ki kɑ̈r kete ɑ ɑ́yod yi tyëngrijjø, de Jwøk nyii rɑngø yi gen ki gïgrijjø møg-ɑ gøggi yi gen, o bong gïn kedhi ri gen.’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Kɑ tyëng-ɑ böggi Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j ri gen köbbi gen, kɑ Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j yïthhe kyëne, kɑ gïg-ɑ kømmi yi gen lïnge. Kɑ nyingi tyëng-ɑ wørii gweed piny kì bøle kì yij wɑ̈nyi pɑr." 
Malachi3:17 Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Ge óbëëdø ge bɑ jiɑ. Cyɑ̈ng-ɑ ógwøgɑ gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi yɑn ki gwøgø, pyëwɑ ólɑ̈ɑ̈m ki gen, ni dhɑnhø ɑ pyëwe nyi lɑ̈ɑ̈m ki wɑ̈de, eni wɑ̈n-ɑ gøggi gïn-ɑ dwɑddi yi wïye." 
Malachi3:18 O gïn-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kɑɑm tyëngdøj geki tyëngrijjø lidh yi jiɑ, kí gïn-ɑ bɑ̈ɑ̈n kì kɑɑm ngɑn-ɑ gøggi gïgdøj geki ngɑn pɑ nyi göögø ki gïndøj.”" 
Malachi4:1 Wïlɑ̈bø, Jwøng-ɑ Ácwɑ̈ɑ̈j okööbø kinni, “Cyɑ̈ɑ̈ng cɑ́y obëënø; eni cyɑ̈ng-ɑ órɑ̈bbi tyëngrijjø ni kenyi rɑ̈bbi wél. Ge órɑ̈b kì cyɑ̈ngɑni; bong gïn-ɑ ódöng kì ri gen." 
Malachi4:2 De tyëng-ɑ wør yɑn, tegø men-ɑ yielɑ gen ómënyø ni cɑ̈ng kì kömi gen, kɑ dëlli gen opɑ̈dø; kɑ ge óbeddø ni røjj yi medi pëthi gen." 
Malachi4:3 Tyëngrijjø ótyɑm yi tyëngdøj, kɑ ge nyøn kì piny ni tør. Møgɑni ógwøg yi yɑn ceth." 
Malachi4:4 “Pɑru Ciggi Mosɑ̀ bɑ̈ngɑ, gen ɑ møg-ɑ ɑ́cïgɑ tyëng Isrɑil kì Sinɑy. Ciggɑni ɑ́muuj yi yɑn ge bɑ møg mïdhi yi Isrɑil." 
Malachi4:5 “Eliyɑ̀ jɑltöngɑ óörɑ yï wun, e bøli kej cɑ́y nuti bëënø." 
Malachi4:6 Wëëg ódwøøge kej ɑ́kyel geki nyigi gen, ke bɑ̈jji møgɑni ki cwöbø, yɑ óbï kɑ pödhi wun rënyɑ.”" 
Matthew1:2 Cɑg kì ri Abrɑhɑm gïti ri Rɑ̈dh Debïd, kwɑyy møg-ɑ bɑ ɑlwøb: Isɑɑk, Yɑgob, Yeudɑ̀ geki nyiimen, kí Peredh kí Dherɑ̀, (meyi gen bɑ Tɑmɑr.) Ëdhrön, Rɑm, Aminɑdɑb, Nɑɑcön, Sɑlmön, Boɑdh, Obed (meye bɑ Ruth), Yesì, kì Rɑ̈dh Debïd." 
Luke3:25 Yosep wɑ̈d Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀. Mɑtɑthiyɑ̀ wɑ̈d Amos. Amos wɑ̈d Nɑum. Nɑum wɑ̈d Eslì. Eslì wɑ̈d Nɑgɑy.
